Genesis1:1 Ekuqaleni uThixo wayephezu kwezulu nehlabathi.
Genesis1:2 Umhlaba wawusenyanyeni, ungento; Kwabakho ubumnyama phezu konogumbe womhlaba kwaye uMoya kaThixo wawuhamba phezu kwamanzi."
Genesis1:3 Wathi uThixo, Makubekho ukukhanya, kwabakho ukukhanya."
Genesis1:4 Wakubona ke uThixo ukukhanya ukuba kulungile, wahlula uThixo phakathi kokukhanya nobumnyama."
Genesis1:5 Wathi uThixo ukukhanya yiMini, wathi ubumnyama bubusuku. Kwabakho ke ubusuku, kwasa. Yayilusuku lokuqala."
Genesis1:6 Wathi uThixo, Makubekho ithuba phakathi kwamanzi, ube ngukwahlula amanzi esibhakabhakeni."
Genesis1:7 uThixo wenza isithuba, wawahlula amanzi angaphantsi kwaloo ndawo kumanzi angaphezu kwawo."
Genesis1:8 Wawabiza uThixo amazulu, kwahlwa, kwasa ke ngowesibini umhla."
Genesis1:9 Wathi uThixo, Amanzi angaphantsi kwamazulu makahlanganiselwe ndaweni-nye, kubonakale okomileyo. Kwaye kwenzeka."
Genesis1:10 Umhlaba owomileyo uthi ngumhlaba; yaye indibano yamanzi walubiza ulwandle, yaye uThixo wabona ukuba kulungile."
Genesis1:11 Wathi uThixo, Umhlaba mawuphume uhlaza, nemifuno evelisa imbewu, nemithi eyenza iziqhamo ngohlobo lwayo, embewu ikuyo, emhlabeni. Kwaye kwenzeka."
Genesis1:12 Umhlaba waphuma uhlaza, nemifuno evelisa imbewu ngohlobo lwayo, nemithi eyenza iziqhamo, embewu yayo ngohlobo lwayo. Wabona uThixo ukuba kulungile."
Genesis1:13 Kwahlwa, kwasa ke ngomhla wesithathu."
Genesis1:14 Wathi uThixo, Makubekho izikhanyiso esibhakabhakeni, ukuba zahlule imini kubusuku; kwaye makubekho imiqondiso namaxesha nemihla neminyaka."
Genesis1:15 Mababe njengezikhanyiso esibhakabhakeni, zokukhanyisela ihlabathi; kwaye kwenzeka ngolu hlobo."
Genesis1:16 Wenza uThixo izikhanyiso ezikhulu zazibini; Isikhanyiso esikhulu ukuba silawule imini, nesikhanyiso esincinane ukuba silawule imini; Wenza neenkwenkwezi."
Genesis1:17 Wazibeka uThixo esibhakabhakeni ukuba zikhanyise emhlabeni;
Genesis1:18 nokuba zilawule imini nobusuku, zikwahlule ukukhanya nobumnyama. Wabona uThixo ukuba kulungile."
Genesis1:19 Kwahlwa, kwasa ke ngomhla wesine."
Genesis1:20 Utsho uThixo ukuthi, Amanzi mawanyakazise imiphefumlo ephilileyo, neentaka eziphaphazelayo emazulwini;"
Genesis1:21 Wenza uThixo oominenga mikhulu, nayo yonke imiphefumlo ephilileyo enambuzelayo, awanyakazela ngayo amanzi ngohlobo lwayo, neentaka zonke ezinamaphiko ngohlobo lwazo. Wabona uThixo ukuba kulungile."
Genesis1:22 Wazisikelela uThixo, wathi, Qhamani, nande, niwazalise amanzi olwandle;"
Genesis1:23 Kwahlwa, kwaza kwaba ngumhla wesihlanu ngengomso."
Genesis1:24 Wathi uThixo, Umhlaba mawuphume imiphefumlo ephilileyo ngohlobo lwayo: izinto ezizitho zine, nezinambuzane, nezinto eziphilileyo zomhlaba ngohlobo lwazo. Kwaye kwenzeka ngolu hlobo."
Genesis1:25 Wenza uThixo izinto eziphilileyo zomhlaba ngohlobo lwazo, nezinto ezizitho zine ngohlobo lwazo, nezinto zonke ezinyakazelayo emhlabeni ngohlobo lwazo. Wabona uThixo ukuba kulungile."
Genesis1:26 Wathi uThixo, Masenze abantu ngokomfanekiselo wethu ngokufana nathi, babe nobukhosi ezintlanzini zolwandle, nasezintakeni zezulu, nasezintweni ezizitho zine, nasezinambuzaneni zonke ezinambuzelayo ehlabathini."
Genesis1:27 Wamdala ke uThixo umntu ngokomfanekiselo wakhe; wadala indoda nenkazana.
Genesis1:28 Wabasikelela uThixo, wathi kubo, Qhamani, nande, nihlale emhlabeni, niwulime; nobukhosi ezintlanzini zolwandle, nasezintakeni zezulu, nasezintweni zonke eziphilileyo ezinambuzelayo emhlabeni."
Genesis1:29 Wathi uThixo, Yabonani, ndininika yonke imithi evelisa imbewu, esemhlabeni wonke, nemithi yonke evelisa iziqhamo, ethwala imbewu; mayibe kukutya kwakho."
Genesis1:30 Kodwa zonke izinto eziphilileyo zehlabathi, neentaka zonke zezulu, nezinambuzane zonke ezisemhlabeni, ezihleli phezu kwazo, ndizinikele kuzo zonke imifuno ephuma kuyo ukuba zibe kukudla. Kwenzeke ngolu hlobo."
Genesis1:31 Wakukhangela uThixo konke akwenzileyo, nanko, ukuba kulungile kunene. Kwahlwa, kwasa ke ngomhla wesithandathu."
Genesis2:1 Agqitywa ke amazulu, nomhlaba, nawo wonke umkhosi okhoyo."
Genesis2:2 Wawugqiba ke uThixo ngomhla wesixhenxe umsebenzi wakhe awawenzayo; waphumla ngomhla wesixhenxe kuwo wonke umsebenzi wakhe.
Genesis2:3 uThixo uyalusikelela usuku lwesixhenxe aze alungcwalise, kuba waphumla ngalo emva kwawo wonke umsebenzi wokudala awawenzayo."
Genesis2:4 Yiyo le ke inzala yamazulu nehlabathi ekudalweni kwezo zinto, neyabantu abasemyezweni, mini wabenzayo uYehova uThixo."
Genesis2:5 Yonke imifuno yelizwe engekakhuli emhlabeni, nayo yonke imifuno yelizwe, ingekantshuli, kuba uYehova uThixo ebengekanisi mvula emhlabeni, akwabakho bani ukuwulima umhlaba hayi."
Genesis2:6 Kwenyuka inkungu iphuma ehlabathini, yawunyakamisa wonke umhlaba."
Genesis2:7 uYehova uThixo wambumba umntu ngothuli lwasemhlabeni, waphefumlela emathatheni akhe impefumlo yobomi; umntu ke waba ngumphefumlo ophilileyo."
Genesis2:8 uYehova uThixo watyala umyezo ngasempuma ye-Eden; wahlala apho umntu wamdalayo.
Genesis2:9 uYehova uThixo watyala emhlabeni imithi eyahlukahlukeneyo, eneziqhamo ezimnandi nezinencasa, nencasa ekutyeni. Phakathi emyezweni kwakumi umthi wobomi, nomthi wokwazi okulungileyo nokubi."
Genesis2:10 Umlambo wawuvela e-Eden ukuba uwunyakamise umyezo; ukusuka apho yahlulwa yazizahluko ezine.
Genesis2:11 Igama lowokuqala yiPison; elijikeleze lonke ilizwe lakwaHawila, apho kukho igolide;"
Genesis2:12 Igolide yelo lizwe intle, kukho nebhalsam nelitye lebherilo."
Genesis2:13 Igama lowesibini umlambo yiGihon; ejikeleze lonke ilizwe lakwaKushi.
Genesis2:14 Igama lowesithathu umlambo yiHidekele; kwimpuma yeAsiriya. Owesine umlambo ngumEfrati.
Genesis2:15 uYehova uThixo wamthabatha umntu, wambeka emyezweni we-Eden, ukuba awutyale, awugcine."
Genesis2:16 uYehova uThixo wamwisela umthetho umntu, esithi, Yonke imithi yasendle ungayidla;"
Genesis2:17 Kodwa uze ungadli kuwo umthi wokwazi okulungileyo nokubi, kuba mhla uthe wadla kuwo uya kufa ngokuqinisekileyo."
Genesis2:18 Wathi uYehova uThixo, Akulungile ukuba umntu abe yedwa; ndiya kumenzela umncedi olingana naye."
Genesis2:19 Wadala uYehova uThixo emhlabeni zonke izilo, neentaka zonke zezulu; wazisa kuAdam ukubona ukuba wothini na ukuzibiza; nento awayibizayo uAdam indalo nganye, yaba ligama lazo."
Genesis2:20 Wazithiya amagama uAdam zonke izinto ezizitho zine, neentaka zonke zezulu, nazo zonke izinto eziphilileyo zomhlaba; ke kuAdam akufunyanwanga mncedi ulingana naye."
Genesis2:21 uYehova uThixo wamlalisa ubuthongo umntu, walala;"
Genesis2:22 uYehova uThixo wamdala umfazi ngethambo awalithabathayo endodeni, wamzisa endodeni."
Genesis2:23 Wathi uAdam, Eli ke ngoku lithambo lasemathanjeni am, yinyama yasenyameni yam; ukubizwa kothiwa ngumfazi, ngokuba ethatyathwe endodeni."
Genesis2:24 Ngoko ke, indoda iya kumshiya uyise nonina, inamathele emfazini wayo, baze babe nyama-nye."
Genesis2:25 Baye bobabini behamba ze, umntu lowo nomkakhe, bengenazintloni."
Genesis3:1 Ke kaloku inyoka yaye inobuqhophololo ngaphezu kwazo zonke izinto eziphilileyo zomhlaba, awazenzayo uYehova uThixo. Yathi kumfazi, Ewe, uthe uThixo, Musani ukuyidla yonke imithi yomyezo?"
Genesis3:2 Wathi umfazi enyoka, Iziqhamo zemithi yasendle sinokuzidla."
Genesis3:3 Ke zona iziqhamo zomthi osemyezweni osesazulwini somyezo, wathi uThixo, Ningazidli, ningazichukumisi, hleze nife."
Genesis3:4 Yathi inyoka kumfazi, Anisayi kufa."
Genesis3:5 Kuba esazi uThixo ukuba, xa nithe nadla, oqabuka amehlo enu, nibe njengothixo, nazi okulungileyo nokubi."
Genesis3:6 Wabona umfazi ukuba umthi ulungele ukudliwa, uyawakholisa amehlo, nokuba umthi onqwenelekayo ebubulumko, wathabatha isiqhamo sawo, wadla, wanika indoda yakhe; wadla."
Genesis3:7 Aqabuka amehlo abo bobabini, baqonda ukuba kutheni bebodwa; bathunga amagqabi omkhiwane, benza ezabo iingubo."
Genesis3:8 Baliva izwi likaYehova uThixo, ekuhambeni kwakhe emyezweni, kwakuba pholileyo; bazímela uAdam nomkakhe ebusweni bukaYehova uThixo, phakathi kwemithi yomyezo."
Genesis3:9 uYehova uThixo wambiza umntu, wathi kuye, Uphi na?"
Genesis3:10 Wathi uAtam, Ndive isandi sakho endle, ndasuka ndoyika, ngokuba ndingakholosanga; ndazimela."
Genesis3:11 Wathi, Uxelelwe ngubani na, ukuba uwedwa? Udlile na kuwo umthi, endakuwisela umthetho ngawo, ukuba ungadli kuwo?"
Genesis3:12 Wathi uAdam, Umfazi owandinikayo ukuba abe nam, nguye ondinike umthi, ndadla ke."
Genesis3:13 Wathi uYehova uThixo kumfazi, Yintoni na le uyenzileyo? Wathi umfazi: “Inyoka indikhohlisile, ndadla."
Genesis3:14 Wathi uYehova uThixo kwinyoka, Ngokuba uyenzile le nto, uqalekisiwe wena ngaphezu kweenkomo zonke, naphezu kwazo zonke izinto eziphilileyo zehlabathi; uya kuhamba ngomlomo wakho, udle uthuli yonke imihla yobomi bakho."
Genesis3:15 Ndiya kumisa ubutshaba phakathi kwakho nomfazi, naphakathi kwembewu yakho nembewu yakhe; iya kukunqumla intloko, kwaye uya kuyiluma isithende."
Genesis3:16 Wathi kumfazi, Ndiya kukwandisa kakhulu ukubulaleka kwakho ekumitheni; uya kuzala abantwana eneneni; inkanuko yakho ibe sendodeni yakho, ikulawule yona."
Genesis3:17 Wathi kuAdam, Ekubeni uliphulaphule izwi lomkakho, wadla kuwo umthi endakuwisela umthetho ngawo, ndathi, Musa ukusidla kuwo; uqalekisiwe umhlaba; uya kudla kuwo ubulaleka, yonke imihla yobomi bakho;"
Genesis3:18 Uya kukuntshulela imithana enameva neenkunzane; nidle utyani belizwe;
Genesis3:19 Uya kudla isonka sokubila kobuso bakho ude ubuyele emhlabeni; ngokuba ukhutshiwe kuwe; ngokuba uluthuli, uya kubuyela kwaseluthulini."
Genesis3:20 uAdam walibiza igama lomkakhe ngokuthi nguEva; ngokuba yena engunina wabaphilileyo bonke.
Genesis3:21 uYehova uThixo wabenzela iingubo zezintsu uAdam nomkakhe, wabambathisa ngazo."
Genesis3:22 Yathi iNkosi uYehova: Yabonani, umntu ufana nomnye wethu, ukwazi okulungileyo nokubi; kwaye ngoku, xa akasolula isandla sakhe, wathabatha kuwo umthi wobomi, wadla kuwo, waza waphila ngonaphakade."
Genesis3:23 uYehova uThixo wamkhupha emyezweni we-Eden, ukuba asebenze umhlaba abethatyathwe kuwo."
Genesis3:24 Waza wayindulula indoda; Wabeka iikerubhi ngasempumalanga yomyezo wase-Eden, nelangatye lekrele elijikajikayo, elijikajikayo, ukuba ligcine indlela eya emthini wobomi."
Genesis4:1 uAdam wamazi uEva umkakhe; wamitha, wazala uKayin, wathi, Ndifumene indoda kuYehova."
Genesis4:2 Wazala naye uAbheli umninawa wakhe. Ke uAbheli waba ngumalusi, uKayin engumlimi."
Genesis4:3 Emva kwethuba uKayin wenza idini kuNdikhoyo ngeziqhamo zomhlaba.
Genesis4:4 Naye uAbheli wazisa kumazibulo omhlambi wakhe, namanqatha awo; uYehova wamphulaphula uAbheli nombingelelo wakhe."
Genesis4:5 Kodwa akazange amkhathalele uKayin nombingelelo wakhe. Wacaphuka kunene uKayin, ubuso bakhe bushwabene."
Genesis4:6 Wathi uYehova kuKayin, Uqumbeleni na? Yini na ukuba busangane ubuso bakho?"
Genesis4:7 Ukuba uthe walungisa, anisayi kwamkeleka na? ukuba ke wenze kakuhle, isono sesikungxamele emnyango. Kwaye emva kwakho uya kuba ngumnqweno wakhe, kwaye uya kulawula phezu kwakhe."
Genesis4:8 Wathetha uKayin kuAbheli umninawa wakhe; bathi besendle, uKayin wamvukela uAbheli umninawa wakhe, wambulala."
Genesis4:9 Wathi uYehova kuKayin, Uphi na uAbheli, umninawa wakho? Athi: Andazi: ndingumgcini kabhuti wam?"
Genesis4:10 Wathi, Wenze ntoni na? ilizwi legazi lomninawa wakho liyadanduluka kum emhlabeni."
Genesis4:11 Kaloku, uqalekisiwe wena kulo ilizwe elivule umlomo walo ukuba wamkele igazi lomntakwenu esandleni sakho;"
Genesis4:12 Xa uwulima umhlaba, awusayi kuphinda ube namandla; uya kuba sisibhadubhadu nesibhadubhadu ehlabathini."
Genesis4:13 Wathi uKayin kuYehova, Isohlwayo sam sikhulu ngokungenakuthwala."
Genesis4:14 Yabona, undithumile namhla ehlabathini; ndiya kuzifihla ebusweni bakho; kwaye ndiya kuba sisibhadubhadu nesibhadubhadu ehlabathini; kwaye nabani na ondifumanayo uya kundibulala."
Genesis4:15 Wathi uYehova kuye, Ngako oko, bonke ababulala uKayin kophindezelwa ngokuphindwe kasixhenxe. uYehova wamphawula uKayin, ukuze kungabikho bani umfumanayo angambulala."
Genesis4:16 Kwaye uKayin wemka ebusweni beNkosi waza waya kuhlala kwilizwe laseNodi, ngasempumalanga ye-Eden."
Genesis4:17 Ke uKayin wamazi umkakhe; wamitha, wazala uEnoki; wakha umzi, wawuthiya ngegama lonyana wakhe, uEnoki."
Genesis4:18 uEnoki wazala uIradi; uIradi wazala uMehuyayeli; uMehuyaheli wazala uMetusaheli; uMetusaheli wazala uLameki;
Genesis4:19 uLameki wazeka abafazi ababini, igama lomnye belinguAda, igama lowesibini belinguZila."
Genesis4:20 uAda wazala uYabhali; waba nguyise wabahlala ezintenteni nabalusi.
Genesis4:21 Igama lomninawa wakhe belinguYubhali; waba nguyise wabo bonke abasebenzisa irhengqa namalungu.
Genesis4:22 uZila wazala uTubhali-kayin, obengumfundisi kuzo zonke iingcibi zobhedu nesinyithi; Udade boTubhalikayin ibinguNahama."
Genesis4:23 Wathi uLameki kubafazi bakhe, Ada noSila, liveni ilizwi lam; Zintombi zikaLameki, liveni ilizwi lam, ngokuba ndibulele indoda ngenxeba, nomfana ngomvandedwa."
Genesis4:24 Ukuba uKayin uya kuphindezelwa kasixhenxe, uLameki wophindezelwa kamashumi asixhenxe anesixhenxe."
Genesis4:25 uAdam wabuya wamazi umkakhe; wazala unyana, wathi igama lakhe nguSete. Ngokuba wathi, uThixo undinike enye imbewu ngoAbheli owambulala uKayin."
Genesis4:26 Kananjalo uSete wazalelwa unyana; Wamthiya igama elinguEnoshe; Baqala ke abantu ukulibiza igama likaYehova.
Genesis5:1 Yiyo le incwadi yezizukulwana zika-Adam. Mhla uThixo wamdala umntu, wamenza ngokomfanekiselo kaThixo;"
Genesis5:2 Wadala indoda nenkazana; wabasikelela, wababiza ngokuba nguAdam ngomhla wokudalwa kwabo."
Genesis5:3 uAdam wahlala iminyaka elikhulu elinamanci mathathu, wazala unyana ngokomfanekiso wakhe, ngokomfanekiso wakhe; wamthiya igama elinguSete."
Genesis5:4 Imihla ka-Adam emveni kokuzala kwakhe uSete yaba yiminyaka emakhulu asibhozo; wazala oonyana neentombi.
Genesis5:5 Iyonke imihla ka-Adam, awahlala ngayo yaba yiminyaka emakhulu asithoba anamanci mathathu, wafa ke."
Genesis5:6 uSete wahlala iminyaka elikhulu elinantlanu, wazala uEnoshe."
Genesis5:7 Emva kokuzala uEnoshe, uSete wahlala iminyaka engamakhulu asibhozo anamazinyo asixhenxe, waza wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis5:8 Iyonke imihla kaSete yaba yiminyaka emakhulu asithoba anashumi-nye linamibini;
Genesis5:9 uEnoshe wahlala iminyaka emashumi asithoba, wazala uKenan."
Genesis5:10 Emva kokuzala kwakhe uKenan, uEnoshe wahlala iminyaka engamakhulu asithoba anamazinyo alishumi elinesihlanu, waza wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis5:11 Iyonke imihla kaEnoshe yaba yiminyaka emakhulu asithoba anamnye anamihlanu; wafa ke.
Genesis5:12 uKenan wahlala iminyaka emashumi asixhenxe, wazala uMahalalele."
Genesis5:13 Emva kokuzala uMahalalele, uKenan waphila iminyaka engamakhulu asibhozo anamashumi amane waza wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis5:14 Iyonke imihla kaKanan yaba yiminyaka emakhulu asithoba anashumi-nye; wafa ke.
Genesis5:15 uMahalalele wahlala iminyaka emashumi mathandathu anantlanu, wazala uYerede."
Genesis5:16 Emva kokuzala uYerede, uMahalalele waphila iminyaka engamakhulu asibhozo anamanci mathathu, wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis5:17 Iyonke imihla kaMahalalele yaba yiminyaka emakhulu asibhozo anamanci asithoba anesihlanu;
Genesis5:18 uYerede waphila iminyaka elikhulu elinamashumi amathandathu anesibini, waza wazala uEnoki."
Genesis5:19 Emva kokuzala uEnoki uYerede wahlala iminyaka engamakhulu asibhozo, waza wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis5:20 Yaye iyonke imihla kaYerede yaba yiminyaka emakhulu asithoba anamanci mathandathu anesibini, waza wafa."
Genesis5:21 uEnoki wahlala iminyaka emashumi mathandathu anantlanu, wazala uMethusela."
Genesis5:22 uEnoki wahamba noThixo emveni kokuzala kwakhe uMethusela iminyaka emakhulu mathathu, wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis5:23 Iyonke imihla kaEnoki yaba yiminyaka emakhulu mathathu, anamanci mathandathu anesihlanu;"
Genesis5:24 uEnoki wahamba noThixo, akabakho; ngokuba uThixo wamthabatha."
Genesis5:25 uMethusela wahlala iminyaka elikhulu elinamanci asibhozo anesixhenxe, wazala uLameki."
Genesis5:26 uMethusela wahlala emveni kokuzala kwakhe uLameki iminyaka emakhulu asixhenxe anamanci asibhozo anamibini, wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis5:27 Iyonke imihla kaMethusela yaba yiminyaka emakhulu asithoba, anamanci mathandathu anesithoba;"
Genesis5:28 uLameki wahlala iminyaka elikhulu elinamanci asibhozo anesibini, wazala unyana."
Genesis5:29 Kwaye wabiza uNowa waza wathi: Uya kusithuthuzela ngenxa yomsebenzi wethu nomzamo wezandla zethu ngenxa yelizwe elizisileyo iNkosi.
Genesis5:30 Emva kokuzala uNowa, uLameki wahlala iminyaka engamakhulu amahlanu anamashumi asibhozo yedwa aneshumi elinesihlanu, waza wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis5:31 Iyonke imihla kaLameki yaba yiminyaka emakhulu asixhenxe anamanci asixhenxe anesixhenxe, waza wafa."
Genesis5:32 uNowa ube eminyaka imakhulu mahlanu ezelwe, uNowa wazala ooShem noHam noYafete."
Genesis6:1 Kuthe bakuqala ukwanda abantu ehlabathini, kwazalwa iintombi."
Genesis6:2 Oonyana bakaThixo babona iintombi zabantu ukuba zizithande; bazizekela abafazi kubo bonke ababanyulayo.
Genesis6:3 Wathi uYehova, Umoya wam awusayi kuhlala usebenza emntwini, ngokuba eyinyama; imihla yakhe iya kuba yiminyaka elikhulu elinamanci mabini."
Genesis6:4 Ngaloo mihla bekukho iingxilimbela ehlabathini; Emveni koko, xeshikweni oonyana bakaThixo bangenayo kuzo iintombi zabantu, zabazalela oonyana, zaba ngamagorha amandulo, amadoda anegama."
Genesis6:5 Wabona uThixo ukuba ububi babantu bandile ehlabathini, zonke iingcamango zentliziyo yabo zibububi bodwa."
Genesis6:6 Wazohlwaya uYehova ngenxa yokuba emenzile umntu emhlabeni, waba buhlungu entliziyweni yakhe."
Genesis6:7 Wathi uYehova, Ndiya kumcima ehlabathini umntu endimdalileyo; umntu nesilwanyana. Nezinambuzane, neentaka zezulu; kuba ndiyaxolisa xa ndizenza."
Genesis6:8 uNowa yena wababalwa nguYehova.
Genesis6:9 Yiyo le ke inzala kaNowa. uNowa waye eyindoda elilungisa, egqibeleleyo, ezizukulwaneni zakhe. uNowa wahamba noThixo."
Genesis6:10 uNowa wazala oonyana abathathu: uShem, noHam, noYafete."
Genesis6:11 Ihlabathi lalibolile emehlweni kaThixo, yaye ihlabathi lalizele lugonyamelo."
Genesis6:12 uThixo walikhangela ihlabathi, nalo, libolile; ngokuba yonke inyama ilahlile indlela yayo ehlabathini."
Genesis6:13 Wathi uThixo kuNowa, Isiphelo senyama yonke sifikile phambi kobuso bam; ngokuba ihlabathi lizele lugonyamelo oluphuma kubo; yabona, ndiya kubonakalisa, bona nehlabathi."
Genesis6:14 Zenzele umkhombe ngomthi; Uze wenze amagumbi etyeyeni, uyithambise ngomthwebeba ngaphakathi nangaphandle."
Genesis6:15 Nantsi indlela oya kukwenza ngayo: Ubude bomkhombe bube ngamakhulu amathathu eekubhite, ububanzi bube ngamashumi amahlanu eekubhite, ukuphakama kwawo kube ziikubhite ezimashumi mathathu."
Genesis6:16 Wenze ikroba emkhombeni, ukuligqiba kwakho kube yikubhite enye, ithabathela phezulu; ulumise ucango lwetyeya ngecala; kumgangatho ophantsi, umgangatho wesibini nowesithathu kufuneka uyenze."
Genesis6:17 Uyabona, ndihlisa unogumbe wamanzi ehlabathini, wokonakalisa yonke inyama enomoya wokuphila phantsi kwezulu; kwaye yonke into esemhlabeni iya kufa."
Genesis6:18 Ndowumisa mna umnqophiso wam nani; ungene emkhombeni wena, noonyana bakho, nomkakho, nabafazi boonyana bakho, ndawonye nawe."
Genesis6:19 Kwizinto zonke eziphilileyo, kwinyama yonke, ngenisa emkhombeni ngambini kuzo zonke, ngohlobo ngalunye, ukuze zisindiswe nawe; iya kuba yindoda nomfazi."
Genesis6:20 Kwiintaka ngohlobo lwazo, kwiinkomo ngohlobo lwazo, ezinambuzaneni zonke zomhlaba ngohlobo lwazo, zibe ngambini kuzo zonke, eziya kungena kuwe, ukuba zisindiswe."
Genesis6:21 Thabatha konke ukudla okudliwayo, ukuqokelele; ibe kukutya kwenu nakokwabo."
Genesis6:22 Wenjenjalo uNowa; njengako konke uThixo abemwisele umthetho ngako, wenjenjalo."
Genesis7:1 Wathi uYehova kuNowa, Ngena, wena nendlu yakho yonke, emkhombeni; ngokuba ndibona wena ilungisa phambi kwam kwesi sizukulwana."
Genesis7:2 Kwizinto zonke ezizitho zine ezihlambulukileyo, thabatha kuzo zibe sixhenxe, inkunzi nemazi; kwizinto ezizitho zine eziziinqambi ngambini, ngambini, inkunzi nemazi yazo."
Genesis7:3 Nakwiintaka ezisixhenxe zezulu, inkunzi nemazi; ukugcina imbewu iphila kulo lonke ihlabathi."
Genesis7:4 Ndiya kunisa imvula ehlabathini iimini ezimashumi mane nobusuku obumashumi mane; kwaye yonke into ephilayo endayenzayo ndiya kuyitshabalalisa emhlabeni.
Genesis7:5 Wenza uNowa njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho.
Genesis7:6 uNowa ube eminyaka imakhulu mathandathu ezelwe, oko kunogumbe wagubungela umhlaba."
Genesis7:7 Wangena uNowa emkhombeni, enoonyana bakhe, nomkakhe, nabafazi boonyana bakhe, ndawonye naye, ngenxa yamanzi onogumbe."
Genesis7:8 Kwizinto ezizitho zine ezihlambulukileyo, nakwizinto ezizitho zine eziziinqambi, nakwiintaka, nakwizinto zonke ezinambuzelayo emhlabeni;"
Genesis7:9 zangena zombini kuNowa emkhombeni, inkunzi nemazi, njengoko uThixo abemwisele umthetho uNowa."
Genesis7:10 Emva kweentsuku ezisixhenxe amanzi onogumbe abakho ehlabathini.
Genesis7:11 Ngomnyaka wamakhulu amathandathu wokudla ubomi kukaNowa, ngenyanga yesibini, ngosuku lweshumi elinesixhenxe enyangeni leyo, kanye ngayo loo mini yavuleka yonke imithombo yamanzi onogumbe, neengcango zezulu zavuleka."
Genesis7:12 Yana emhlabeni iimini ezimashumi mane nobusuku obumashumi mane.
Genesis7:13 Kwangaloo mini bangena emkhombeni uNowa, uShem, noHam, noYafete, oonyana bakaNowa, nomkaNowa, nabafazi boonyana bakhe abathathu."
Genesis7:14 Ziboneni zonke izinto eziphilileyo ngohlobo lwazo, nezinto zonke ezizitho zine ngohlobo lwazo, nezinambuzane zonke ezinambuzelayo emhlabeni ngohlobo lwazo, neentaka zonke ngohlobo lwazo, neentaka zonke ngohlobo lwazo, iintlobo zabo."
Genesis7:15 Zangena emkhombeni noNowa, ngambini, ngambini, kwinyama yonke enomoya wokuphila."
Genesis7:16 Kwangena inkunzi nemazi kwinyama yonke, kwangena njengoko uThixo abemwisele umthetho. uYehova wamfaka."
Genesis7:17 Unogumbe uya kubakho ehlabathini iintsuku ezimashumi mane; yaye amanzi anda, bawurhuqa umkhombe, bawuphakamisela emhlabeni."
Genesis7:18 Aye enyuka amanzi, aba namandla kakhulu emhlabeni; wazala umkhombe ngamanzi."
Genesis7:19 Amanzi abe phezu kwehlabathi; zazambatha zonke iintaba eziphakamileyo kakhulu, eziphantsi kwamazulu onke."
Genesis7:20 Amanzi abe namandla ziikubhite ezilishumi elinantlanu; zagutyungelwa iintaba.
Genesis7:21 Yonke inyama enyakazelayo emhlabeni iyafa, ezintakeni nakwizilo nakwizilwanyana zasekhaya nakwizinambuzane zonke ezinambuzelayo emhlabeni, nabantu bonke;"
Genesis7:22 Iinto zonke ezinomphefumlo wokuphila emathatheni azo, kwiinto zonke ezisemhlabeni owomileyo, zafa."
Genesis7:23 Zonke izinto eziphilileyo ezisehlabathini zatshatyalaliswa, abantu, neenkomo, nezinambuzane, neentaka zezulu; kwaye batshatyalaliswa emhlabeni, kwasala uNowa yedwa nabo babenaye emkhombeni."
Genesis7:24 Amanzi awugubungela umhlaba iintsuku ezilikhulu elinamashumi amahlanu.
Genesis8:1 uThixo wamkhumbula uNowa, neento zonke eziphilileyo, nezinto zonke ezizitho zine ezazinaye emkhombeni;"
Genesis8:2 Yavingcwa imithombo kanogumbe neengcango zezulu, wathintelwa umvumbi wezulu;"
Genesis8:3 Ayebuya amanzi emhlabeni, yaye ekupheleni kweentsuku ezilikhulu elinamashumi amahlanu amanzi awutha."
Genesis8:4 Umkhombe wema phezu kweentaba zeArarati ngenyanga yesixhenxe, ngosuku lweshumi elinesixhenxe enyangeni leyo."
Genesis8:5 Amanzi amana ewutha, kwada kwayinyanga yeshumi; ngeyeshumi ke, ngosuku lokuqala enyangeni leyo, zabonakala iincopho zeentaba."
Genesis8:6 Ekupheleni kweentsuku ezimashumi mane wayivula uNowa ifestile yomkhombe abeyenzile.
Genesis8:7 Walithumela ihlungulu, ada atsha amanzi ehlabathini;"
Genesis8:8 Wabuya wakhupha ihobe, ukuze abone ukuba amanzi awuthile na phezu komhlaba;"
Genesis8:9 Ihobe alifumananga ndawo yakuphumza nentende yethupha lalo, labuyela kuye emkhombeni, ngokuba amanzi abephezu kwehlabathi lonke; wasolula isandla sakhe, wayithabatha, wayirhuqela kuye emkhombeni."
Genesis8:10 Walinda ezinye iintsuku zasixhenxe; waba ngukumkani, walikhupha ihobe emkhombeni;"
Genesis8:11 Kweza kuye ihobe ngorhatya; nanko, kukho igqabi lomnquma lisongiwe, lisongiwe; wazi uNowa, ukuba ehlile amanzi ehlabathini."
Genesis8:12 Walinda ezinye iintsuku zasixhenxe; wakhupha ihobe; ababengabuyelanga kuye.
Genesis8:13 Ngonyaka wamakhulu amathandathu ananye, ngenyanga yokuqala, ngolokuqala enyangeni leyo, atsha amanzi ehlabathini; uNowa wasisusa isiciko somkhombe, wakhangela, nango umhlaba womile."
Genesis8:14 Ngenyanga yesibini, ngosuku lwamashumi omabini anesixhenxe enyangeni leyo, woma kwaphela umhlaba."
Genesis8:15 Wathetha uThixo kuNowa, esithi:"
Genesis8:16 Phuma emkhombeni, wena nomfazi wakho, noonyana bakho, nabafazi boonyana bakho, ndawonye nawe."
Genesis8:17 Zithabathe nawe zonke izinto eziphilileyo ezikuwe, yonke inyama, neentaka, neenkomo, neento zonke ezinyakazelayo emhlabeni; bande emhlabeni, bande, bande ehlabathini."
Genesis8:18 Waphuma ke uNowa, noonyana bakhe, nomkakhe, nabafazi boonyana bakhe."
Genesis8:19 Zonke izinto eziphilileyo, zonke izinambuzane, neentaka zonke, neento zonke ezinambuzelayo emhlabeni, ngohlobo lwazo, zaphuma emkhombeni."
Genesis8:20 uNowa wamakhela uYehova isibingelelo; Wazithabatha zonke izinto ezizitho zine ezihlambulukileyo, neentaka zonke ezihlambulukileyo, wenza amadini anyukayo esibingelelweni."
Genesis8:21 uYehova weva ivumba elithozamisayo; Wathi uYehova entliziyweni yakhe, Andisayi kulitshabhisa ihlabathi ngenxa yomntu; ngokuba ukuyila kwentliziyo yomntu kubi kwasebutsheni bakhe; andiyi kuphinda ndizivelele zonke izinto eziphilileyo njengoko ndenze ngako."
Genesis8:22 Lo gama kusekho umhlaba, akuyi kuphela ukuhlwayela nokuvuna, ukubanda nobushushu nehlobo nobusika nemini nobusuku."
Genesis9:1 uThixo wamsikelela uNowa noonyana bakhe, wathi kubo, Qhamani, nande, nizalise ihlabathi."
Genesis9:2 Ukoyikeka kwenu zonke izinto eziphilileyo zomhlaba, naphezu kweentaka zonke zezulu, naphezu kwento yonke enyakazelayo emhlabeni, nakwiintlanzi zonke zolwandle; zinikelwe ezandleni zenu."
Genesis9:3 Yonke inyakanyaka ephilileyo yoba kukudla kwenu; njengemifuno eluhlaza ndininike yonke into.
Genesis9:4 Yinyama enomphefumlo wayo, enegazi layo, ize ningayidli."
Genesis9:5 Igazi lomphefumlo wenu ndolifuna; esandleni sezinto zonke ezizitho zine, nasesandleni somntu; esandleni sakhe wonke umzalwana ndiya kufuna umphefumlo womntu."
Genesis9:6 Ophalaza igazi lomntu, igazi lakhe lophalazwa ngumntu, ngokuba umntu wamenza ngokomfanekiselo wakhe uThixo."
Genesis9:7 Ke wena, nande, nande; Qhamani emhlabeni, nande kulo."
Genesis9:8 Wathetha uThixo kuNowa nakoonyana bakhe ababenaye, esithi:"
Genesis9:9 Yabona, ndiyawumisa umnqophiso wam nawe, nembewu yakho emva kwakho;"
Genesis9:10 nezinto zonke eziphilileyo ezikuni, neentaka, neenkomo, nezinto zonke eziphilileyo zehlabathi ezikuni; kubo bonke abaphuma emkhombeni, kuzo zonke izinto eziphilileyo zomhlaba."
Genesis9:11 Ndiya kuwumisa umnqophiso wam nani; kwaye yonke inyama ayisayi kuphinda itshatyalaliswe ngamanzi onogumbe; yaye akusayi kuphinda kubekho unogumbe wokutshabalalisa umhlaba.
Genesis9:12 Wathi uThixo, Nguwo lo umqondiso womnqophiso endiwubekayo phakathi kwam nani, nayo yonke imiphefumlo ephilileyo ephakathi kwenu, kuse kwizizukulwana zasephakadeni."
Genesis9:13 Umnyama wam ndiwubeka efini, ube ngumqondiso womnqophiso ophakathi kwam nehlabathi."
Genesis9:14 Ukuba ndithe ndawusibekelisa ngelifu umhlaba, kobonakala umnyama emafini;"
Genesis9:15 Ndiya kuwukhumbula umnqophiso wam ophakathi kwam nani, nayo yonke imiphefumlo ephilileyo enyameni yonke; yaye amanzi akasayi kuphinda abe ngunogumbe okonakalisa inyama yonke."
Genesis9:16 Umnyama uya kuba semafini; ndiwukhangele, ndikhumbule umnqophiso ongunaphakade phakathi koThixo nayo yonke imiphefumlo ephilileyo, enyameni yonke esehlabathini."
Genesis9:17 Wathi uThixo kuNowa, Nguwo lo umqondiso womnqophiso endiwumisileyo phakathi kwam nayo yonke inyama esehlabathini;"
Genesis9:18 Oonyana bakaNowa, abaphuma emkhombeni, babengooShem, noHam, noYafete; uHama nguyise kaKanan."
Genesis9:19 Aba ngoonyana bakaNowa bobathathu;
Genesis9:20 uNowa waqala waba ngumlimi, watyala isidiliya."
Genesis9:21 Wasela iwayini, wanxila; waye ze ententeni yakhe."
Genesis9:22 uKama, uyise kaKanan, wakubona ukuzila kukayise, waxelela abakhuluwa bakhe bobabini ngaphandle."
Genesis9:23 uShema noYafete bathabatha ingubo, bayibeka emagxeni abo bobabini, baya eSantayo, babugubungela ubuze bukayise; ubuso babo babubheke ngasemva, abambonanga ukungabikho kukayise."
Genesis9:24 Wavuka uNowa ewayinini yakhe, ekwazi akwenzileyo unyana wakhe omnci kuye."
Genesis9:25 Wathi, Uqalekisiwe uKanan! Yiba ngumkhonzi kubakhonzi babazalwana bakhe."
Genesis9:26 Wathi, Makabongwe uYehova, uThixo kaShem. uKanan abe sisicaka sakhe."
Genesis9:27 uThixo uya kumandisa uYafete, ahlale ezintenteni zikaShem; uKanan abe sisicaka sakhe."
Genesis9:28 uNowa wahlala emveni konogumbe iminyaka emakhulu mathathu anamanci mahlanu.
Genesis9:29 Iyonke imihla kaNowa yaba yiminyaka emakhulu asithoba anamanci mahlanu, wafa ke."
Genesis10:1 Yiyo le ke inzala yoonyana bakaNowa, uShem, noHam, noYafete, abazalwa emva konogumbe."
Genesis10:2 Oonyana bakaYafete nguGomere, noMagogi, noMadayi, noYavan, noTubhali, noMesheki, noTirasi."
Genesis10:3 Oonyana bakaGomere; iAshkenazi neRifati neTogarma.
Genesis10:4 Oonyana baseJapan; uElisha noTarshishe, amaKiti namaDodan."
Genesis10:5 Ngenxa yokuba iziqithi zabezizwe zaba yimihlaba yazo; elowo wathetha ngezakowabo ulwimi, nezindlu zakhe, neentlanga zawo."
Genesis10:6 Oonyana bakaKama; Unxweme, iMizraim, iPute neKanan."
Genesis10:7 Oonyana bakaKushi nguSebha, noHafila, noSabheta, noRama, noSabhetega; noonyana bakaRama; Bona kwaDedan."
Genesis10:8 uKushi wazala uNimrodi;
Genesis10:9 Waba lizingela elikhulu phambi koYehova; ngoko ke kuthiwa: Kanye njengoNimrodi, igorha lezingela phambi koYehova."
Genesis10:10 Ukuqala kobukumkani bakhe kwaba yiBhabheli ne-Ereki neAkadi neKalene kwilizwe laseShinare.
Genesis10:11 iAsiriya yemka kwelo lizwe, yaza yakha iNineve nesixeko saseRehobhoti neKala."
Genesis10:12 NeRene phakathi kweNineve neKala: ngumzi ke lowo.
Genesis10:13 uJitrayim wazala amaLudi, nama-Anam, namaHabhe, namaNafetuhi;"
Genesis10:14 namaPatrusi namaKasluhim, apho aphuma khona amaFilisti namaKafetori."
Genesis10:15 uKanan wazala uSidon, izibulo lakhe, noHeti;"
Genesis10:16 namaYebhusi, nama-Amori, namaGirgashi;"
Genesis10:17 namaHifi, neenqanawa, nezitya zokutshiza;"
Genesis10:18 AmaAravada namaTsemares namaBhahamati yaye emva koko zanda iintsapho zamaKanan.
Genesis10:19 Umda wamaKanan wawususela eSidon uye eGerare ukuya eGaza; wada wesa eSodom, naseGomora, naseAdama, naseTsebhoyim, wesa eLasha."
Genesis10:20 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaKama ngokwemizalwane yabo, ngokweelwimi zabo, emazweni abo, ngokweentlanga zabo."
Genesis10:21 uShem, uyise wabo bonke oonyana bakaHebhere, umninawa kaYafete, omkhulu, waba nabantwana."
Genesis10:22 Oonyana bakaShem nguShem. uElam, uAsiriya, uArpakishadi, uLudi, noAram."
Genesis10:23 Oonyana baka-Aram nguAsheri; Thina kunye nabo kunye noGeter noMas.
Genesis10:24 uArpakishadi wazala uSala; uShela wazala uEbhere.
Genesis10:25 uHebhere wazalelwa oonyana ababini, igama lomnye belinguPelege; ngokuba ngemihla yakhe lahlukana phakathi elimiweyo; igama lomninawa wakhe belinguYoketan."
Genesis10:26 uYoketan wazala uAlemodade, noSelefe, noHasaremete, noYeraki;"
Genesis10:27 neHadoram, neUsale, neDikila;"
Genesis10:28 no-Obhali, noAbhimayeli, noShebha;"
Genesis10:29 noOfire, noHafila, noYobhabhi; bonke bephela ngoonyana bakaYoketan."
Genesis10:30 Ukuhlala kwabo kwathabathela eMesha, kwesa eSefare, kweleentaba ngasempuma."
Genesis10:31 Ndibabona oonyana bakaShem, benezindlu zabo, neelwimi zabo, nezizwe zabo, neentlanga zabo."
Genesis10:32 Yiyo le ke inzala yoonyana bakaNowa, nezizukulwana zabo, neentlanga zabo; zaza zahlukaniswa iintlanga ngoko emhlabeni emva konogumbe."
Genesis11:1 Ihlabathi liphela libe lulwimi-nye, lizwi linye."
Genesis11:2 Ekuphumeni kwawo empumalanga, afumana entlango ezweni laseShinare; bahlala khona."
Genesis11:3 Bathetha omnye komnye besithi, Hambani, senze izitena, sizitshise. Baba nezitena endaweni yamatye, nodaka lodongwe."
Genesis11:4 Bathi ke, Hambani, sizakhele umzi, nemboniselo encopho yayo iye kufika emazulwini; masizenzele igama, hleze sisasazeke ehlabathini."
Genesis11:5 Wehla uYehova ukuze asibone isixeko nenqaba leyo babeyakhile oonyana babantu.
Genesis11:6 Yathi iNkosi: Yabona, abantu bayinto enye, kwaye bonke bantetho-nye; baqala ke ukwenza, ngoku ke abayi kukhatywa nto abacinga ukuyenza."
Genesis11:7 Masihle, siyidube khona intetho yabo, ukuze bangevani ukuthetha;"
Genesis11:8 Waza uYehova wabachithachitha kwalapho ehlabathini lonke, yaye bayeka ukusakha eso sixeko."
Genesis11:9 Ngenxa yoko kwathiwa igama lawo yiBhabheli; ngenxa yokuba kulapho uYehova waluduba khona ulwimi lwehlabathi lonke, yaye uYehova wabachithachitha besuka apho ehlabathini lonke."
Genesis11:10 Yiyo le ke inzala kaShem: uShem ubeminyaka ilikhulu ezelwe;
Genesis11:11 uShema waphila iminyaka engamakhulu amahlanu emva kokuba ezele uArpakishadi, wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis11:12 uArpakishadi wahlala iminyaka emashumi mathathu anamihlanu, wazala uSara."
Genesis11:13 uArpakishade wahlala emveni kokuzala kwakhe uShela iminyaka emakhulu mane anamithathu, wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis11:14 uSala wahlala iminyaka emashumi mathathu, wazala uHebhere."
Genesis11:15 Emva kokuzalwa kukaHebhere uSla waphila iminyaka engamakhulu amane anantathu, wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis11:16 uHebhere wahlala iminyaka emashumi mathathu anamine, wazala uPelege."
Genesis11:17 Emva kokuzala kwakhe uPelege uHebhere waphila iminyaka engamakhulu amane anamashumi mathathu, waza wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis11:18 uPelege wahlala iminyaka emashumi mathathu, wazala uRehu."
Genesis11:19 uPelege wahlala emveni kokuzala kwakhe uRehu iminyaka emakhulu mabini anesithoba, wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis11:20 uRehu wahlala iminyaka emashumi mathathu anamibini, wazala uSerugi."
Genesis11:21 uRehu wahlala emveni kokuzala kwakhe uSerugi iminyaka emakhulu mabini anesixhenxe, wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis11:22 uSerugi wahlala iminyaka emashumi mathathu, wazala uNakore."
Genesis11:23 uSerugi wahlala emveni kokuzala kwakhe uNakore iminyaka emakhulu mabini, wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis11:24 uNakore wahlala khona iminyaka emashumi mabini anesibhozo yedwa, wazala uTera."
Genesis11:25 Emva kokuzala kwakhe uTera, uNahore waphila iminyaka elikhulu elineshumi elinesithoba, waza wazala oonyana neentombi."
Genesis11:26 uTera wahlala iminyaka emashumi asixhenxe, wazala uAbram, noNakore, noHaran."
Genesis11:27 Yiyo le ke inzala kaTera: uTera wazala uAbram, noNakore, noHaran; uHaran wazala uLote."
Genesis11:28 uHaran wafa ngaphambi kukayise uTera kwilizwe awazalelwa kulo, iUre yamaKhaledi."
Genesis11:29 uAbram noNakore bazeka abafazi; igama lomka-Abram belinguSarayi; Igama lomkaNakore lalinguMilika, intombi kaHaran, uyise kaMilka, uyise kaIska."
Genesis11:30 Ke uSarayi ebengazali; wayengenamntwana.
Genesis11:31 uTera wamthabatha uAbram unyana wakhe, noLote, unyana kaHaran, unyana wonyana wakhe, noSarayi, umolokazana wakhe, umka-Abram unyana wakhe; bemka nabo eUre yamaKaledi, baya ezweni lakwaKanan; Bafika kwaHaran, bahlala khona."
Genesis11:32 Imihla kaTera yaba yiminyaka emakhulu mabini anamihlanu; wafa uTera kwaHaran.
Genesis12:1 Wathi uYehova kuAbram, Lishiye ilizwe lakowenu, nendlu yakho, nendlu kayihlo, uye ezweni endokubonisa lona."
Genesis12:2 Ndiya kukwenza uhlanga olukhulu, ndikusikelele, ndilikhulise igama lakho; kwaye uya kuba nethamsanqa."
Genesis12:3 Yaye ndiya kumsikelela okusikeleleyo, lowo ukuqalekisayo ndimqalekise; zisikeleleke ngawe zonke izizukulwana zehlabathi."
Genesis12:4 Wemka uAbram njengoko wathethayo uYehova kuye; uLote wahamba naye, yaye uAbram wayeneminyaka engamashumi asixhenxe anesihlanu ubudala ekuphumeni kwakhe kwelakwaHaran."
Genesis12:5 uAbram wathabatha uSarayi umkakhe, noLote, unyana womninawa wakhe, nengqwebo yabo yonke ababeyiqwebile, nemiphefumlo eyabafumanayo kwaHaran; bemka baya ezweni lakwaKanan; bafika ezweni lakwaKanan."
Genesis12:6 uAbram walicanda ilizwe, waya endaweni yakwaShekem, entlango yaseMore. AmaKanan abekho ngelo xesha ngelo xesha."
Genesis12:7 uYehova wabonakala kuAbram, wathi, Imbewu yakho ndiya kuyinika eli lizwe; waza wamakhela khona isibingelelo uYehova owayebonakele kuye."
Genesis12:8 Wenyuka khona waya entabeni ngasempumalanga, eBheteli, wayimisa intente yakhe eBheteli ngasentshonalanga, iAyi ingasempumalanga; Wakha khona isibingelelo kuYehova, wathandaza egameni likaYehova."
Genesis12:9 Wemka uAbram, wenjenjeya esingise ezantsi."
Genesis12:10 Kwabakho indlala kwelo zwe, wehla uAbram waya eYiputa, ukuba aphambukele khona; ngokuba ibinkulu indlala ehlabathini."
Genesis12:11 Kwathi, xa asondelayo ukungena eYiputa, wathi kuSarayi umkakhe, Yabona, ndiyazi ngenxa yokuba ungumfazi omhle ngembonakalo."
Genesis12:12 Kothi, akukubona amaYiputa, athi, Ngumkakhe lo; andibulale mna, wena akugcine uphila."
Genesis12:13 Yithi, ungudade wethu, ukuze ndilunge ngenxa yakho; kwaye umphefumlo wam uya kuphila ngawe."
Genesis12:14 Akufika uAbram eYiputa, ambona amaYiputa umfazi ukuba mhle kakhulu."
Genesis12:15 Zambona iinkosana zikaFaro, zamdumisa phambi koFaro; umfazi wasiwa endlwini kaFaro."
Genesis12:16 Waqhubeka emenzela okulungileyo uAbram ngenxa yakhe, waba nempahla emfutshane, neenkomo, namaesile, nabakhonzi, nabakhonzazana, namaesile akhe, neenkamela."
Genesis12:17 uYehova wamohlwaya ngokuqatha uFaro nendlu yakhe ngenxa kaSarayi, umka-Abram."
Genesis12:18 uFaro wambiza uAbram, wathi, Yintoni na le undenze yona? Kutheni ungandixelelanga nje ukuba ngumfazi wakho?"
Genesis12:19 Yini na ukuba uthi, Ngudade wethu? ukuze ndimthabathe abe ngumkam; Khangela ke ngoko umkakho, umthabathe, uhambe."
Genesis12:20 uFaro wawawisela umthetho amadoda akhe ngaye, amthuma yena nomkakhe, nako konke abenako."
Genesis13:1 Waphuma uAbram eYiputa, yena nomkakhe, neento zonke abenazo, enoLote, esinga kwelasezantsi."
Genesis13:2 uAbram wayeneenkomo, nesilivere, negolide."
Genesis13:3 Wemka kwelasezantsi, waya eBheteli, apho ibikhona intente yakhe ekuqaleni, phakathi kweBheteli neAyi;"
Genesis13:4 endaweni yesibingelelo, awasenzayo khona ngaphambili; walithandaza uAbram igama likaYehova khona."
Genesis13:5 Naye uLote, obehamba noAbram, waye enempahla emfutshane, neenkomo, neentente."
Genesis13:6 Umhlaba wawunganelanga ukuba bahlale ndawonye, kuba ubutyebi babo babubuninzi, kangangokuba ababa nakuhlala ndawonye."
Genesis13:7 Kwabakho ingxabano phakathi kwabalusi bempahla emfutshane ka-Abram nabalusi bempahla emfutshane kaLote; ngelo xesha kwahlala amaKanan namaPersi kwelo zwe.
Genesis13:8 Wathi uAbram kuLote, Makungabikho mfazwe phakathi kwam nawe, naphakathi kwabalusi bam nabalusi bakho; ngokuba singabantwana babantu."
Genesis13:9 Alikuwe na ilizwe lonke? Yahlukana nam; ukuba uthanda ukuthatha isandla sasekhohlo, ndoya ekunene; nokuba ubheka ekunene, ndoya ekhohlo."
Genesis13:10 uLote wawaphakamisa amehlo akhe, wawukhangela wonke ummandla waseYordan, ngokuba amanzi abemaninzi kuyo yonke indawo, engekayonakalisi uYehova iSodom neGomora, unjengomyezo kaYehova, nanjengelizwe laseYiputa, ekufikeni kwakho eTsohare."
Genesis13:11 uLote wawunyula wonke ummandla waseYordan; uLote waya ngasempumalanga, bahlukana omnye komnye."
Genesis13:12 uAbram wahlala ezweni lakwaKanan, uLote wahlala emizini yasemaphandleni, wayimisa intente yakhe kwesa eSodom."
Genesis13:13 Ke kaloku amadoda aseSodom ayengabenzi bobubi kakhulu, yaye wona phambi koYehova."
Genesis13:14 Wathi uYehova kuAbram ekuzahluleni kukaLote kuye: “Phakamisa amehlo akho kuloo ndawo ukuyo, ujonge emntla nasemzantsi nasempuma nasentshona."
Genesis13:15 Kuba lonke ilizwe olibonayo ndiya kulinika wena nenzala yakho kude kuse ephakadeni.
Genesis13:16 Ndiza kuyenza inzala yakho ibe njengothuli lomhlaba, ukuze ukuba kukho umntu okwaziyo ukubala uthuli lomhlaba, ayibale nembewu yakho."
Genesis13:17 Suka, ulihambe ilizwe ngobude nobubanzi balo; ngokuba ndiya kukunika."
Genesis13:18 Wandula ke uAbram wamisa intente yakhe waza wahlala kumthi oki kaMamre oseHebron, waza wamakhela khona uYehova isibingelelo."
Genesis14:1 Kwathi ngemihla ka-Amrafele ukumkani waseShinare, noAryogi, ukumkani wase-Elazare, noKedorlahomere, ukumkani wakwaElam, noTidali ukumkani weentlanga;"
Genesis14:2 baxabela uBhera ukumkani waseSodom, noBhirsa ukumkani waseGomora, noSinabhi ukumkani waseAdama, noSimber ukumkani waseTsebhoyim, nokumkani waseBhela, eyiTsohare ke leyo."
Genesis14:3 Bahlanganisana bonke abantwana entilini yaseSidim eluLwandle lweTyuwa.
Genesis14:4 Iminyaka elishumi elinamibini bakhonza uKedor-Lahomere, bathi ngomnyaka weshumi elinesithathu bagwilika kuye."
Genesis14:5 Ngonyaka weshumi elinesine uKedore-Lahomere nookumkani ababenaye beza baza bawoyisa amaRafa iAshtaroti-karnayim namaShusim Ham namaEmim Shave-Kiriyatayim;
Genesis14:6 namaHori ezintabeni zakwaSehire, esa e-Elparan engasentlango."
Genesis14:7 Bandula ke babuya baza bafika e-Enemishipati, oko kukuthi eKadeshe, balithimba lonke ilizwe lama-Amaleki nama-Amori awayehlala eHason-Tamare."
Genesis14:8 Waphuma ukumkani waseSodom, nokumkani waseGomora, nokumkani waseAdima, nokumkani waseSebhoyim, nokumkani waseBhela (yiTsohare ke leyo), balwa nabo entilini yaseSidim;"
Genesis14:9 noKedorlahomere ukumkani wakwaElam, noTidali ukumkani weentlanga, noAmrafele ukumkani waseShinare, noAriyoki ukumkani wakwaElazare; ookumkani abane nabahlanu."
Genesis14:10 Umda waseSidim wawuzele yimihadi yodaka; basaba ookumkani baseSodom nowaseGomora, bawela khona; baza abo babesele basabela entabeni."
Genesis14:11 Bayithabatha yonke impahla yaseSodom neGomora, nako konke ukudla kwabo, bemka."
Genesis14:12 Bamthabatha uLote, umninawa ka-Abram, owayehlala eSodom, nempahla yakhe, bemka."
Genesis14:13 Weza okhululekileyo, waxelela uAbram umHebhere; ngokuba ebehleli eMiokini kaMamre umAmori, umzalwana kaEshkole, noAnere umninawa wakhe; benza umnqophiso noAbram."
Genesis14:14 Weva uAbram ukuba ubanjwe umkhuluwa wakhe, wabaxhobisa abakhonzi bakhe abaqeqeshiweyo, ababezalelwe endlwini yakhe, abangamakhulu amathathu aneshumi elinesibhozo, wawasukela, wada wesa kwaDan."
Genesis14:15 Waza wazahlula ebusuku nxamnye nabo, yena nabakhonzi bakhe, waza waboyisa waza wabasukela ukuya kufikelela eHobha, ekwicala lasekhohlo leDamasko."
Genesis14:16 Wayibuyisela yonke impahla yakhe, wambuyisela uLote umninawa wakhe, nempahla yakhe, nabafazi, nabantu."
Genesis14:17 Ukumkani waseSodom waphuma waya kumhlangabeza emva kokuba ebuyile ekuxabeleni uKedorlahomere nookumkani ababenaye, kwintlambo yeShebhe, ekwintlambo yookumkani."
Genesis14:18 uMelkitsedeki, ukumkani waseSalem, wazisa isonka newayini, engumbingeleli kaThixo Osenyangweni."
Genesis14:19 Wamsikelela wathi, Makasikelelwe uAbram nguThixo Osenyangweni, uNkosi wezulu nehlabathi."
Genesis14:20 Makabongwe uThixo Osenyangweni ozinikele iintshaba zakho esandleni sakho. Wamnika isishumi sazo zonke izinto.
Genesis14:21 Wathi ukumkani waseSodom kuAbram, Ndinike abantu, uzithabathele impahla."
Genesis14:22 Wathi uAbram kukumkani waseSodom, Isandla sam ndisiphakamisele kuYehova uThixo Osenyangweni, uYehova wamazulu nehlabathi;"
Genesis14:23 ukuba andiyi kuthabatha nawuphi na umsonto ukuya esithendeni sembadada, yaye andiyi kuthabatha nantoni na eyeyakho, ongazange uthi, ‘Ndimdle ilifa uAbram."
Genesis14:24 Ngaphandle koko bakudlayo abafana, nesabelo samadoda abehamba nam, uAnere, noEshkoli, noMamre; bathathe inxaxheba yabo."
Genesis15:1 Kwathi emveni koko, lafika ilizwi likaYehova kuAbram ngombono, lisithi, Musa ukoyika, Abram; ndiyingweletshetshe yakho, umvuzo wakho ngowona mkhulu."
Genesis15:2 Wathi uAbram, Camagu, Nkosi yam Yehova, wondinika ntoni na, sendikhona nje, intloko yendlu yam nguEliyezere waseDamasko?"
Genesis15:3 Wathi uAbram, Yabona, akundinikanga mbewu;"
Genesis15:4 Kwaye qaphelani, ilizwi leNkosi lafika kuye, lisithi: Lo akasayi kuba yindlalifa yakho; kodwa lowo uphuma ezibilinini zakho uya kuba yindlalifa yakho."
Genesis15:5 Wamkhuphela phandle, wathi, Khangela esibhakabhakeni, uzibale iinkwenkwezi, ukuba unokuzibala; Wathi kuye, Iya kuba njalo imbewu yakho."
Genesis15:6 Wakholwa eNkosini; kwaye wamxelela ukuba ilungile.
Genesis15:7 Wathi kuye, NdinguYehova owakukhuphayo eUre yamaKaledi, ukuba ndikunike eli lizwe ukuba ulihluthe."
Genesis15:8 Wathi, Nkosi Yehova, ndiya kwazi ngani na, ukuba ndiya kulidla ilifa?"
Genesis15:9 Wathi kuye, Ndenzele ithokazi eliminyaka mithathu, ithokazi eliminyaka mithathu, nenkunzi yemvu eminyaka mithathu, nehobe, nehobe;"
Genesis15:10 Wayithabatha ke yonke, wayicanda ngesitshetshe, yasibeka isahlulo saso, sakhangelana neso, kodwa akazahlula iintaka."
Genesis15:11 Zafika iintaka phezu kwezidumbu uAbram, wazigxotha."
Genesis15:12 Kwathi, xa litshonayo ilanga, efikelwe bubuthongo obukhulu uAbram; nanko efikelwa kunkwantyiswa bubumnyama obukhulu."
Genesis15:13 Wathi kuAbram, Yazi ke, ukuba imbewu yakho iya kuba ngabaphambukeli ezweni elingelayo, ibakhonze; baya kubacinezela iminyaka emakhulu mane;"
Genesis15:14 Kananjalo abantu eya kubakhonza ndiya kubagweba; kwaye emva koko baya kuphuma nezinto ezinkulu.
Genesis15:15 Hambani niye kooyihlo ninoxolo; uya kungcwatywa umdala kakhulu.
Genesis15:16 Kwesesine isizukulwana iya kubuyela apha, ngenxa yokuba ububi bama-Amori abukazaliseki."
Genesis15:17 Kwathi, lakuba litshonile ilanga, kwakuba sithokothoko, kwabakho intsintsi yomsi, nesibane esidangazelayo, esicanda phakathi kwezo ndawo."
Genesis15:18 Ngaloo mini uYehova wenza umnqophiso noAbram, wathi, Imbewu yakho ndiyinike eli lizwe, lithabathele emlanjeni waseYiputa, lise emlanjeni omkhulu ongumEfrati."
Genesis15:19 NamaKeni, namaKeni, namaKadmon;"
Genesis15:20 namaHeti, namaPerizi, namaRafa;"
Genesis15:21 nama-Amori, namaKanan, namaGirgashi, namaYebhusi."
Genesis16:1 Ke kaloku uSarayi umka-Abram ubengamzaleli mntwana; waye enomkhonzazana ongumYiputazana, ogama belinguHagare."
Genesis16:2 Wathi uSarayi kuAbram, Yabona, uYehova undivingcile ukuba ndingazali; Ngena kumkhonzazana wam; mhlawumbi ndingazala naye. uAbram waliphulaphula izwi likaSarayi."
Genesis16:3 uSarayi, umka-Abram, wamthabatha uHagare, umkhonzazana wakhe ongumYiputa, emveni kokuba uAbram ubehleli iminyaka elishumi ezweni lakwaKanan, wamnika uAbram indoda yakhe ukuba abe ngumkakhe."
Genesis16:4 Wamngena ke uHagare, wamitha; Wathi akubona ukuba umithi, inkosikazi yakhe yamdela emehlweni akhe."
Genesis16:5 Wathi uSarayi kuAbram, Ityala lam likuwe; ndimnike umkhonzazana wam esifubeni sakho; wathi akubona ukuba umithi, ndacukucezeka emehlweni akhe; uYehova makagwebe phakathi kwam nawe."
Genesis16:6 Wathi uAbram kuSarayi, Yabona, umkhonzazana wakho usesandleni sakho; yenza kuye ngokuthanda kwakho. Wathi akumphatha kakubi uSarayi, wabaleka wemka ebusweni bakhe."
Genesis16:7 Isithunywa sikaYehova samfumana ngasequleni lamanzi entlango, equleni elingasendleleni eya eShura."
Genesis16:8 Wathi, Hagare, mkhonzazana kaSarayi, uvela phi na? kwaye uyaphi? Wathi, Ndibalekile kuSarayi, ukumkanikazi wam."
Genesis16:9 Sathi kuye isithunywa sikaYehova, Buyela kukumkanikazi wakho, zithobe esandleni sakhe."
Genesis16:10 Sathi kuye isithunywa sikaYehova, Ndiya kuyandisa kakhulu imbewu yakho, ingàbabalwa."
Genesis16:11 Sathi isithunywa sikaYehova kuye, Yabona, umithi; uya kuzala unyana, umthiye igama elinguIshmayeli; ngokuba uYehova ukuvile ukubandezeleka kwakho."
Genesis16:12 Kwaye uya kuba yindoda yelizwe; isandla sakhe siya kuba phezu komntu wonke, isandla sabantu bonke sichasane naye; yaye uya kuhlala emehlweni abo bonke abazalwana bakhe."
Genesis16:13 Walikhankanya igama likaYehova owathetha kuye, wathi, uThixo wakho undibonile; ngokuba wathi, Bendilindele ondibonayo na?"
Genesis16:14 Kungoko kwathiwa iqula elo yiBherlaha-royi; nantso iphakathi kweKadeshe neBherede.
Genesis16:15 uHagare wamzalela uAbram unyana;
Genesis16:16 uAbram ubeminyaka imashumi asibhozo anamithandathu ezelwe, oko uHagare wazala uAbram uIshmayeli."
Genesis17:1 Kwathi, uAbram akuba minyaka imashumi asibhozo anamnye ezelwe, uYehova wabonakala kuAbram, wathi kuye, NdinguThixo uSomandla; hamba ecaleni kwam, ube ngogqibeleleyo."
Genesis17:2 Ndiya kuwubeka umnqophiso wam phakathi kwam nawe, ndikwandise kakhulu."
Genesis17:3 Wawa uAbram ngobuso bakhe, wathetha uYehova kuye, esithi,"
Genesis17:4 Mna, yabona, umnqophiso wam unawe; uya kuba nguyise weentlanga ezininzi."
Genesis17:5 Akuyi kuba sathiwa igama lakho nguAbram; ngokuba ndikwenze uyise wezizwe ezininzi.
Genesis17:6 Ndiya kukuphumelelisa kakhulu, ndikwenze iintlanga, kuphume ookumkani kuwe;"
Genesis17:7 Ndowumisa umnqophiso wam phakathi kwam nawe nenzala yakho emva kwakho kwizizukulwana zayo, ube ngumnqophiso wexesha elingenammiselo, wokuba ndibe nguThixo wakho nenzala yakho eya emva kwakho."
Genesis17:8 Yaye ngokuqinisekileyo ndiya kukunika ilizwe ohlala kulo wena nenzala yakho emva kwakho, ilizwe lakwaKanan lonke, libe lilifa lakho ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo; ndibe nguThixo wabo."
Genesis17:9 Wathi uThixo kuAbraham, Wugcine umnqophiso wam, wena nembewu yakho eya emva kwakho kwizizukulwana zabo."
Genesis17:10 Nguwo lo umnqophiso wam, eniya kuwugcina phakathi kwam nani, nembewu yakho emva kwakho; Wonke umntwana oyinkwenkwe kuni makaluswe."
Genesis17:11 Walusa inyama yokwaluswa; ibe ngumqondiso womnqophiso ophakathi kwam nani.
Genesis17:12 Unyana omihla isibhozo kuni mawaluswe, yonke into eyindoda emizalwaneni yenu, ezelwe endlwini, nezuzwe ngemali kubani wasemzini, ongengowakho koonyana bakho."
Genesis17:13 Makaluswe ozelwe endlwini yakho, nozuzwe ngemali yakho; umnqophiso wam enyameni yenu uya kuba ngumnqophiso ongunaphakade."
Genesis17:14 Umntwana oyinkwenkwe, ongahlatywanga ebudodeni bakhe, loo mphefumlo wonqanyulwa, ungabikho ebantwini bakowawo; uwaphule umnqophiso wam."
Genesis17:15 Wathi uThixo kuAbraham, uSarayi umkakho ungambiza ngokuba nguSarayi; igama lakhe loba nguSara."
Genesis17:16 Ndiya kumsikelela, ndikunike unyana ngaye; ewe, ndiya kumsikelela, abe ziintlanga; ookumkani beentlanga baya kuphuma kuye."
Genesis17:17 Ngoko uAbraham wawa ngobuso bakhe waza wahleka waza wathi entliziyweni yakhe: “Ngaba umntwana unokuzalwa aneminyaka elikhulu ubudala na? uSara, ominyaka imashumi asibhozo ezelwe, uya kuzala yedwa na?"
Genesis17:18 Wathi uAbraham kuThixo, uIshmayeli makadle ubomi phambi kwakho."
Genesis17:19 Wathi uThixo, Ewe, uSara umkakho uya kukuzalela unyana; umthiye igama elinguIsake, ndiwumise umnqophiso wam naye, ube ngumnqophiso ongunaphakade kwimbewu yakhe emva kwakhe."
Genesis17:20 Ngokusingisele kuIshmayeli ndikuvile, ndathi, Yabona, ndimsikelele, ndimsikelele, ndimandisile, ngakumbi; uya kuzala abathetheli abalishumi elinababini, ndimenze uhlanga olukhulu."
Genesis17:21 Ndowumisa umnqophiso wam noIsake, oya kuzala uSara ngeli xesha nyakenye."
Genesis17:22 Wayeka ukuthetha naye. Wenyuka uThixo esuka kuAbraham.
Genesis17:23 uAbraham wamthabatha uIshmayeli unyana wakhe, nabo bonke ababezalelwe endlwini yakhe, nabo bonke abazuzwe ngemali yakhe, yonke into eyindoda phakathi kwamadoda endlu ka-Abraham; aza abalusa inyama yokuqala yobudoda ngaloo mini kanye njengoko uThixo wayemyalele."
Genesis17:24 uAbraham ubeminyaka imashumi asithoba anesithoba ezelwe, ukwaluka kwakhe."
Genesis17:25 uIshmayeli unyana wakhe ebeminyaka ilishumi elinamithathu ezelwe, ukwaluka."
Genesis17:26 Kwangaloo mini, boluka uAbraham, noIshmayeli unyana wakhe."
Genesis17:27 Onke amadoda endlu yakhe, azalelwe endlwini yakhe, nazuzwe ngemali kubani wolunye uhlanga, aluswa kunye naye."
Genesis18:1 uYehova wabonakala kuye eMiokini kaMamre, ehleli emnyango wentente emini enkulu."
Genesis18:2 Wawaphakamisa amehlo akhe, wabona amadoda amathathu emi ngakuye; wawabona, wagidima, waya kuwakhawulela emnyango wentente, waqubuda."
Genesis18:3 Wathi, Nkosi, ukuba ndibonise inceba emehlweni akho, musa ukudlula kumkhonzi wakho."
Genesis18:4 Makuthatyathwe amanzi, nihlambe iinyawo zenu, niphumle phantsi komthi lowo."
Genesis18:5 Ndiya kuya ndithabathe iqhekeza lesonka, ndithuthuzele iintliziyo zenu; emveni koko nodlula, ngokuba uze kumkhonzi wakho ngenxa yoko. Athi: Yenza njengoko uthethile."
Genesis18:6 Wakhawuleza uAbraham, waya kuSara ententeni, wathi, Khawulungise iiseha ezintathu zomgubo ocoliweyo, uwose, wenze amaqebengwana eziko."
Genesis18:7 Wagidima waya ezinkomeni uAbraham, wathabatha ithole lenkomo, lithambile, lihle, wanika umfana; wakhawuleza."
Genesis18:8 Wathabatha ubisi, nobisi, nethole lenkomo, abelilungisile, wabeka phambi kwabo; wema nawo phantsi komthi, adla."
Genesis18:9 Athi kuye, Uphi na uSara umkakho? Wathi, Nanko ententeni."
Genesis18:10 Wathi, Ndiya kubuyela kuwe, okunene ngexesha lodla ubomi; yabona, uSara umkakho uya kuba nonyana. Weva uSara umnyango wentente ngasemva kwakhe."
Genesis18:11 Ke kaloku uAbraham noSara babebadala, bebadala; yaye wayenqamka ukuba kuSara njengomfazi."
Genesis18:12 uSara wahleka entliziyweni yakhe, wathi, Ndingade ndibe noyolo na ndaluphele, nenkosi yam yaluphele nje?"
Genesis18:13 Wathi uYehova kuAbraham, Yini na ukuba uSara ahleke, esithi, Yabona, ndiya kuzala mna ngoku?"
Genesis18:14 Ngaba ikho into angenakuyenza uYehova? Ngexesha elimisiweyo ndiya kubuyela kuwe, lakubuya eli xesha, uSara abe nonyana."
Genesis18:15 Wakhanyela uSara, esithi, Andihlekanga; ngokuba ebesoyika. Waphendula ke yena wathi, Hayi; kodwa wahleka."
Genesis18:16 Emka apho amadoda lawo, abheka ngaseSodom; wahamba nawo uAbraham, ewakhokela indlela yawo."
Genesis18:17 Wathi uYehova, Ndomfihlela na uAbraham into endiza kuyenza?"
Genesis18:18 Yabonani, uAbraham uya kuba luhlanga olukhulu, olunamandla, zisikeleleke ngaye iintlanga zonke zehlabathi."
Genesis18:19 Kuba ndaze yena, ukuze abawisele umthetho oonyana bakhe, nendlu yakhe emva kwakhe, bagcine indlela kaYehova, benze ngokwesiko nangobulungisa; ukuze uYehova amzise kuAbraham oko wakuthethayo ngaye."
Genesis18:20 Wathi uYehova, Kungenxa yokuba isikhalo saseSodom neGomora sikhulu, nangenxa yokuba isono sabo sinzima kunene;"
Genesis18:21 Ndiya kuhla ngoku, ndibone, ukuba ubenze ngokwesikhalo esifike kum; ukuba akunjalo, ndazi."
Genesis18:22 Ajika apho amadoda lawo aza aya eSodom, kodwa uAbraham waqhubeka emi phambi koYehova."
Genesis18:23 Wasondela uAbraham, wathi, Ungatshabalalisa na olilungisa nongendawo?"
Genesis18:24 Mhlawumbi kukho amashumi amahlanu amalungisa phakathi komzi; Niya kuyitshabalalisa na ke loo ndawo, ningawacongi amalungisa amashumi mahlanu akuyo?"
Genesis18:25 Makube lee kuwe ukwenza loo nto ukubulala olilungisa nongendawo, olilungisa abe njengongendawo onyathela kude nawe."
Genesis18:26 Wathi uYehova, Ukuba ndithe ndafumana amalungisa amashumi mahlanu emzini waseSodom, ndoyixolela yonke loo ndawo ngenxa yawo."
Genesis18:27 Waphendula uAbraham, wathi, Yabona, ndigqibe kwelokuba ndithethe kuYehova, eluthuli nothuthu."
Genesis18:28 Mhlawumbi aya kuswela isihlanu kumashumi amahlanu amalungisa; Unokuwutshabalalisa na umzi wonke, ngenxa yokuswela kwabahlanu? Wathi, Nokuba ndithe ndafumana khona amashumi omané anesihlanu kubo, andiyi kubatshabalalisa."
Genesis18:29 Wabuya wathetha kuye, esithi, Hleze kufunyanwa amashumi omané. Wathi, Andiyi kuyenza loo nto ngenxa yamashumi omane."
Genesis18:30 Wathi kuye, Mayingabi namsindo iNkosi, ndithi, Mhlawumbi bangamashumi amathathu. Wathi, Ukuba ndithe ndafumana amashumi omathathu."
Genesis18:31 Wathi, Khawubone, ndithethe kuYehova; mhlawumbi kofunyanwa amashumi amabini. Wathi, Andiyi kuwonakalisa ngenxa yamashumi omabini."
Genesis18:32 Wathi, Mayingabi namsindo iNkosi, ndiphinde ndithethe; Wathi, Andiyi kuwonakalisa ngenxa yabalishumi."
Genesis18:33 uYehova waqhubeka nohambo lwakhe, akuba wayeka ukuthetha kuAbraham, waza uAbraham wabuyela ekhayeni lakhe."
Genesis19:1 Kwathi kwakuhlwa, zeza izithunywa ezibini eSodom; uLote wayehleli esangweni laseSodom. Wazibona uLote, wema wazikhawulela; waqubuda ngobuso;"
Genesis19:2 Wathi, Yabona, Nkosi yam, hamba uye endlwini yomkhonzi wakho, ulale, uhlambe iinyawo zakho, uvuke kusasa, uhambe. Baphendula bathi, Hayi! kodwa siya kulala esitratweni ubusuku bonke."
Genesis19:3 Wazingisa ke; baphambukela kuye, bangena endlwini yakhe; wabenzela ukutya, wabhaka izonka ezingenagwele, badla."
Genesis19:4 Ke kaloku, zingekalali, amadoda aloo mzi, amadoda aseSodom, ayirhawula indlu, kuthabathele kumfana, kuthabathela kwindoda, bevela macala onke."
Genesis19:5 Bambiza uLote, bathi kuye, Aphi na laa madoda angene kuwe ngobu busuku? Uzityhile kuthi, ukuze sizazi."
Genesis19:6 Waphuma uLote, waya kuwukhangela umnyango, waluvala ucango emva kwakhe."
Genesis19:7 Wathi, Musani ukukha niyenze into embi, bazalwana bam."
Genesis19:8 Khanibone, ndineentombi ezimbini ekungaziwa mntu; mandizikhuphele kuni, nenze kuzo ngokuthanda kwenu; ze ningenzi nto kula madoda; ngokuba bangene emthunzini wophahla lwam."
Genesis19:9 Bathi, Yima. Babuya bathi, Lo uze kuthetha njengomphambukeli, uza kuba ngumgwebi; ke thina sokuphatha kakubi kunabo. Bamzama uLote, basondela ukuba baluqhekeze ucango."
Genesis19:10 Amadoda lawo asolula isandla, amngenisa uLote kuwo endlwini, alutshixa ucango."
Genesis19:11 Awabetha ngobumfama amadoda awayesemnyango wendlu, ethabathela kumfana esa kwixhego, adinwa kukufuna umnyango."
Genesis19:12 Athi amadoda lawo kuLote, Usenaye na oobayeni bomyeni, noonyana, neentombi, nabo bonke onabo kulo mzi, bakhuphe kule ndawo?"
Genesis19:13 Siya kuyonakalisa le ndawo, ngokuba sikhulu isikhalo ngabo phambi koYehova; yaye uYehova usithume ukuba sinitshabalalise."
Genesis19:14 Waphuma, uLote, wathetha kubayeni beentombi zakhe, abaya kwezendela iintombi zakhe, wathi, Phumani niphume kule ndawo; ngokuba uYehova uya kuwonakalisa lo mzi. Kodwa wayekhangeleka njengomntu ohlekisayo nabakhwenyana bakhe."
Genesis19:15 Kwathi kwakusa, izithunywa zamngxamisa uLote, zathi, Vuka, thabatha umkakho, neentombi zakho zombini, aba banokufumaneka; hleze utshatyalaliswe ngobubi besixeko."
Genesis19:16 Uthe akulibala, amadoda abamba isandla sakhe, nesandla somkakhe, nesandla seentombi zakhe zombini; iNkosi yasikwa yimfesane ke kuye, bamkhupha, bamjulela ngaphandle komzi."
Genesis19:17 Ebakhuphele phandle, wathi, Balekani, uwusindise umphefumlo wenu; musani ukubheka emva, musani ukuma ethafeni lonke; sabelani entabeni, hleze nitshabalale."
Genesis19:18 Wathi kuwo uLote, Mayingabi njalo, nkosi yam."
Genesis19:19 Khawubone, umkhonzi wakho ufumene inceba emehlweni akho; yaye andinakusabela entabeni, hleze ndifikelwe bububi ndize ndife."
Genesis19:20 Ke kaloku, yabona, esi sixeko siza kubalekela kuso, yaye sincinane: Makhe ndibalekele kuso (asisincinane na?) yaye uya kuphila umphefumlo wam."
Genesis19:21 Wathi kuye, Yabona, mna ndikholisile nam ngale ndawo, ukuba ndingawutshabalalisa lo mzi uthethe ngawo."
Genesis19:22 Suk’ ume, uzimele khona; kuba andinakwenza nto, awukafiki kuyo. Ngenxa yoko igama laloo mzi kwathiwa yiTzohare."
Genesis19:23 Ilanga lalithe chatha emhlabeni xa uLote engena eTsohare.
Genesis19:24 Wanisa ke uYehova isulfure nomlilo phezu kweSodom neGomora ezulwini;
Genesis19:25 Wazisingela phantsi ezo zixeko, nelizwe lonke, nabo bonke abemi bezo zixeko."
Genesis19:26 Kodwa umkakhe, ekhangele emva kwakhe, waba yintsika yetyuwa."
Genesis19:27 uAbraham wavuka ekuseni ukuze aye kuloo ndawo wayemi kuyo phambi koYehova.
Genesis19:28 Wondela eSodom naseGomora, nakulo lonke ilizwe eliyintlango, wawubona unyuka umsi welo zwe, njengomsi weziko lemfutho."
Genesis19:29 Xa uThixo wazitshabalalisayo izixeko zasentlango, uThixo wamkhumbula uAbraham, wamkhupha uLote kwelo bhongo, xa wayetshabalalisa izixeko awayehlala kuzo uLote."
Genesis19:30 Wemka uLote eTsohare, wahlala entabeni, neentombi zakhe zombini; ngokuba ebesoyika ukuhlala eTsohare, waya wahlala emqolombeni, yena neentombi zakhe zombini."
Genesis19:31 Yathi eyamazibulo kwencinane, Ubawo waluphele, yaye akukho bani ehlabathini unokungena kuthi njengezinye iintlanga."
Genesis19:32 Yiza, simsele ubawo iwayini, sinamathele kuye, sibakhusele oonyana bakabawo;"
Genesis19:33 Zamseza ke uyise iwayini ngobo busuku, yangena eyamazibulo, yalala noyise; kwaye akazange aqaphele xa elele okanye ekuvukeni kwakhe."
Genesis19:34 Ngengomso yathi eyamazibulo kwencinane, Yabona, bendilele nobawo phezolo; makabuye asele iwayini ngobu busuku; ungene, ulale naye, silondoloze imbewu kabawo."
Genesis19:35 Zamseza ke uyise iwayini ngobo busuku, yavuka, encinane yalala naye; kwaye akazange aqaphele xa elele okanye ekuvukeni kwakhe."
Genesis19:36 Zamitha zombini iintombi zikaLote ngoyise.
Genesis19:37 Enkulu yazala unyana, yathi igama lakhe nguMowabhi; yena nguyise wamaMowabhi unanamhla."
Genesis19:38 Naye omncinane wazala unyana, wathi igama lakhe nguBhenami; yena nguyise wonyana baka-Amon unanamhla."
Genesis20:1 Wemka apho uAbraham, waya ezweni lasezantsi, wahlala phakathi kweKadeshe neShure, wahlala eGerare."
Genesis20:2 Wathi uAbraham kuSara umkakhe, Ngudade wethu; uAbhimeleki ukumkani waseGerare wathumela ukuba kuthatyathwe uSara."
Genesis20:3 Weza uThixo kuAbhimeleki ngephupha ebusuku, wathi kuye, Uyabona, ufile ngenxa yomfazi omthabathileyo; ngokuba ngumkamntu."
Genesis20:4 uAbhimeleki akasondelanga kuye, wathi, Nkosi, uyafuna na ukubulala amalungisa?"
Genesis20:5 Akatshongo na yena kum ukuthi, Ngudade wethu? Wathi, Ngudade wethu; Le nto ndiyenze ngentliziyo yam yonke, nangobumsulwa bezandla zam."
Genesis20:6 Wathi uThixo kuye ngephupha, Ndiyazi, ngokuba uyenze le nto ngentliziyo yakho igqibelele; ngenxa enokuba ndanithintelayo nina, ukuba ningabi ngabachasi bam; ke ngoko, andikuvumelanga ukuba umchukumise."
Genesis20:7 Ngoko yibuyisele loo ndoda emfazini wayo; ngokuba engumprofeti, uya kunithandazela, niphile."
Genesis20:8 Wavuka kusasa uAbhimeleki, wababiza bonke abakhonzi bakhe, wabaxelela zonke ezi zinto babeziva; oyika kakhulu amadoda."
Genesis20:9 uAbhimeleki wambiza uAbraham, wathi kuye, Yintoni na le nto uyenzileyo kuthi? Ndikone ngantoni na, ukuba undizisele isono esikhulu nje nasebukumkanini bam? Undenzele izinto ezingafanele ukwenziwa."
Genesis20:10 Wathi uAbhimeleki kuAbraham, Ubonile na?"
Genesis20:11 Wathi uAbraham, Kungokuba ndithe, Akukho koyika Thixo kule ndawo; zondibulala ngenxa yomkam."
Genesis20:12 Kunjalo nje, ngudade wethu; yintombi kabawo, akantombi kama; waba ngumfazi wam."
Genesis20:13 Oko uThixo wandikhuphayo endlwini kabawo, ndathi kuye, Yinceba yakho, ukuba undenzele inceba; kuzo zonke iindawo esifika kuzo uthi kum, Ndingumzalwana wam."
Genesis20:14 uAbhimeleki wathabatha impahla emfutshane, neenkomo, nabakhonzi, nabakhonzazana, wanika uAbraham, wambuyisela kuye uSara umkakhe."
Genesis20:15 Wathi uAbhimeleki, Yabona, ilizwe lam liphambi kwakho; hlala apho uthanda khona."
Genesis20:16 Wathi kuSara, Uyabona, udade wenu ndimnike iwaka lesilivere; yabona, isigqubuthelo esikuwe, nakubo bonke aba nawe, nakubo bonke abanye; ngoko wakhalinyelwa."
Genesis20:17 Wathandaza uAbraham kuThixo; uThixo wamphilisa uAbhimeleki, nomkakhe, nabakhonzazana bakhe; bazala abantwana."
Genesis20:18 Ngokuba uYehova wabazala bonke abantwana bendlu ka-Abhimeleki ngenxa kaSara, umka-Abraham."
Genesis21:1 Ke kaloku uYehova wamvelela uSara njengoko ebetshilo, uYehova wamenzela uSara njengoko abekuthethile."
Genesis21:2 Wamitha ke uSara waza wamzalela uAbraham unyana ebudaleni bakhe, ngexesha elimisiweyo uThixo awayethethe ngalo kuye."
Genesis21:3 uAbraham wamthiya igama unyana wonyana wakhe lowo wamzalelayo, awamzalela yena uSara, igama elinguIsake."
Genesis21:4 uAbraham wamalusa uIsake unyana wakhe, akuba ntsuku zisibhozo ezelwe, njengoko uThixo abemwisele umthetho."
Genesis21:5 uAbraham ubeminyaka ilikhulu ezelwe, ukuzalwa kukaIsake unyana wakhe."
Genesis21:6 Wathi uSara, Undihlekisile uThixo;"
Genesis21:7 Wathi, Ngubani na obengamxelela uAbraham, ukuba uSara wanyisa abantwana? ngokuba ndimzalele unyana ekwaluphaleni kwakhe."
Genesis21:8 Wakhula umntwana, walunyulwa, waza uAbraham wenza itheko elikhulu mhla alunyulwayo uIsake."
Genesis21:9 uSara wabona ukuba unyana kaHagare umYiputazana, awamzalela uAbraham, ehlekisa ngaye."
Genesis21:10 Wathi kuAbraham, Sikhuphele phandle esi sicakazana nonyana waso, kuba unyana waloo mkhonzazana akayi kulidla ilifa ndawonye nonyana wam uIsake."
Genesis21:11 Yaba mbi kakhulu loo mcimbi emehlweni ka-Abraham ngenxa yonyana wakhe.
Genesis21:12 Wathi uThixo kuAbraham, Musa ukukuvumela ukuba kube kubi emehlweni akho ngenxa yonyana wakho, nangenxa yomkhonzazana wakho; Entweni yonke ayithethileyo uSara kuwe, liphulaphule izwi lakhe; ngokuba iya kubizwa ngoIsake imbewu yakho."
Genesis21:13 Ndiza kumenza uhlanga ngonyana wekhobokazana, ngenxa yokuba eyimbewu yakho."
Genesis21:14 Wavuka kusasa uAbraham, wathabatha isonka neselwa lamanzi, wanika uHagare, wazibeka emagxeni akhe nomntwana, wathi kuye, makahambe; wemka, wabhadula entlango eBher-shebha."
Genesis21:15 Aphela amanzi etankini, waza umntwana wamphosa phantsi kwelinye ityholo."
Genesis21:16 Waya wahlala phantsi malunga nayo, umgama onjengesaphetha; ngokuba wathi, Andiyi kukubona ukufa komntwana. Wahlala phantsi malunga naye, waphakamisa izwi lakhe, wadanduluka."
Genesis21:17 Waliva uThixo ilizwi lenkwenkwe; samemeza isithunywa sikaThixo kuHagare sisemazulwini, sathi kuye, Ukhathazwa yintoni na, Hagare? Musa ukoyika; ngokuba uThixo ulivile ilizwi lonyana apho akhona."
Genesis21:18 Suka ume, uyiphakamise inkwenkwe, uyibambe ngesandla; ngokuba ndiya kumenza uhlanga olukhulu."
Genesis21:19 uThixo wawavula amehlo akhe, wabona iqula lamanzi; Waya kuzalisa ingqayi ngamanzi, wayiseza inkwenkwe."
Genesis21:20 uThixo waba nenkwenkwe; wakhula, wahlala entlango, waba ngumtoli."
Genesis21:21 Wahlala entlango yaseParan, unina wamzeka wangumkakhe ezweni laseYiputa."
Genesis21:22 Ngelo xesha uAbhimeleki noPikole umthetheli-mkhosi wakhe wathetha noAbraham, bathi, uYehova unawe kuko konke okwenzayo."
Genesis21:23 Ngoko ndifungele uThixo apha, ukuba akuyi kundenza ngobumenemene mna, nonyana wam, nonyana wam; kodwa ngokwenceba endikubonise yona, uze wenze kum nakwilizwe owaphambukela kulo njengomphambukeli."
Genesis21:24 Wathi uAbraham, Mna ndofunga."
Genesis21:25 uAbraham wamkhalimela uAbhimeleki ngenxa yequla elo, ababelithabathe ngegunya abakhonzi baka-Abhimeleki;"
Genesis21:26 Wathi uAbhimeleki, Bendingazi ukuba yenziwe ngubani na loo nto;"
Genesis21:27 uAbraham wathabatha impahla emfutshane, neenkomo, wanika uAbhimeleki; benza umnqophiso bobabini."
Genesis21:28 uAbraham wabeka amathokazi asixhenxe ngasempahleni emfutshane.
Genesis21:29 Wathi uAbhimeleki kuAbraham, Ayintoni na la mathokazi ezimvu asixhenxe uzinikileyo?"
Genesis21:30 Wathi, La mathokazi eegusha asixhenxe wowathabatha esandleni sam, abe nokungqina ukuba eli qula limbe mna."
Genesis21:31 Ngenxa yoko wathi loo ndawo yiBher-shebha; kuba kulapho bafunga khona bobabini.
Genesis21:32 Benza ke umnqophiso noBher-shebha, wema uAbhimeleki noPikoli umthetheli womkhosi wakhe, babuyela ezweni lamaFilisti."
Genesis21:33 uAbraham watyala umthi apho, waza wathandaza kuNdikhoyo uThixo ongunaphakade."
Genesis21:34 uAbraham waba ngumphambukeli iintsuku ezininzi kwilizwe lamaFilisti.
Genesis22:1 Emva koko uThixo wamvavanya uAbraham, wathi kuye: “Abraham! Wathi yena, Ndilapha."
Genesis22:2 Wathi, Thabatha kaloku unyana wakho, emnye kuwe, omthandayo, uIsake, uye ezweni laseMoriya; umenzele khona idini elinyukayo, kwenye yeentaba endokuxelela yona."
Genesis22:3 Wavuka kusasa uAbraham, walibopha iesile lakhe, wathabatha abafana bakhe bobabini, noIsake unyana wakhe, wahamba naye, wacanda iinkuni zedini elinyukayo, wemka esiya kuloo ndawo wayemxelele yona uThixo."
Genesis22:4 Ngomhla wesithathu uAbraham wawaphakamisa amehlo akhe, wayibona loo ndawo ikude."
Genesis22:5 Wathi uAbraham kumadodana, Hlalani nina apha ne-esile; siye kunqula khona mna nomfana, sibuyele kuwe."
Genesis22:6 Wazithabatha uAbraham iinkuni zedini elinyukayo, wazisa kuIsake unyana wakhe; waphatha umlilo nemela esandleni sakhe; bahamba bobabini kunye."
Genesis22:7 Wathi uIsake kuAbraham uyise, Bawo! Ndim lo nyana wam. Wathi, Ukho umlilo neenkuni, kodwa liphi na idini elinyukayo?"
Genesis22:8 Wathi uAbraham, uThixo wozinyulela ixhwane elitshiswayo, nyana wam; bahamba bobabini kunye."
Genesis22:9 Bafika endaweni abemxelele yona uThixo; yaye uAbraham wakha isibingelelo apho waza walungisa iinkuni waza wabophelela uIsake unyana wakhe waza wambeka esibingelelweni phezu kweenkuni.
Genesis22:10 Wasolula isandla uAbraham, wathabatha isitshetshe, ukuba ahlabe unyana wakhe."
Genesis22:11 Sambiza ke isithunywa sikaYehova ezulwini, sathi, Abraham, Abraham! Wathi yena, Ndilapha."
Genesis22:12 Wathi, Musa ukusisa isandla sakho kumfana, musa ukumenza nto, ngokuba ndiyazi ngoku ukuba uyamoyika uThixo, ekubeni ungandikhanyelanga unyana wakho emnye."
Genesis22:13 uAbraham waphakamisa amehlo akhe, wakhangela, nantso inkunzi yegusha ngasemva etyholweni, ineempondo zayo; emva koko uAbraham waya wathabatha inkunzi yegusha waza wenza umbingelelo otshiswayo esikhundleni sonyana wakhe."
Genesis22:14 uAbraham wayibiza loo ndawo ngokuthi, NguYehova Jire; njengoko kuthiweyo, Makube njalo entabeni kaYehova."
Genesis22:15 Sambiza ke isithunywa sikaYehova okwesibini, sisemazulwini."
Genesis22:16 Wathi, Ndizifungile, utsho uYehova, ngenxa enokuba uyenzile le nto, akwakhanyela unyana wakho okuphela kwakhe;"
Genesis22:17 Ndiya kukusikelela ndiyandise imbewu yakho njengeenkwenkwezi zezulu nanjengentlabathi eselunxwemeni lolwandle; imbewu yakho iyidle ilifa indlu yeentshaba zayo;
Genesis22:18 Zonke iintlanga zehlabathi ziya kuzisikelela ngembewu yakho; ngenxa yokuba uliphulaphule ilizwi lam.
Genesis22:19 Wabuyela uAbraham kumadodana akhe, bemka baya kunye eBher-shebha; yaye uAbraham wahlala eBher-shebha."
Genesis22:20 Emveni kwezi zinto, waxelelwa uAbraham, kwathiwa, Yabona, uMilka naye wamzalela uNahore, umninawa wakho;"
Genesis22:21 noHusi, izibulo lakhe, noBhusi, umninawa wakhe, noKemuweli, uyise ka-Aram;"
Genesis22:22 noKesede, noHaso, noPildazi, noJidlafu, noBhetuweli."
Genesis22:23 uBhetuweli wazala uRebheka; Oonyana ababini ababenamazinyo asithoba uMilka wazala uNakore, umntakwabo Abraham."
Genesis22:24 Intombi yakhe, egama linguReuma, yazala uTebha, noGaham, noTahase, noMaga."
Genesis23:1 Ke kaloku uSara ebeminyaka ilikhulu elinamanci mabini anesixhenxe; Yiyo le iminyaka yokudla ubomi kukaSara.
Genesis23:2 Wafa ke uSara eKiriyati-arbha; eHebron, ezweni lakwaKanan, waya uAbraham kumlilela uSara, wamlilela."
Genesis23:3 Wema uAbraham ngakumfi wakhe, wathetha koonyana bakaHeti, wathi,"
Genesis23:4 Ndingumphambukeli nondwendwe phakathi kwenu; ndinike ingcwaba nawe, ndingcwabe umfikazi phambi kobuso bam."
Genesis23:5 Bamphendula uAbraham oonyana bakaHeti, bathi kuye:"
Genesis23:6 Sive, nkosi yam, wena uyinkosana eyomeleleyo phakathi kwethu; ngcwaba umfi wakho emangcwabeni ethu anyuliweyo; akukho bani kuthi uya kulivala ingcwaba lakho, ukuba akumngcwabi umfikazi lowo."
Genesis23:7 Wesuka uAbraham, wawa ngobuso bakhe phambi kwabantu belizwe elo, phambi koonyana bakaHeti."
Genesis23:8 Wathetha kubo, wathi, Ukuba nifuna ukuba ndimngcwabe umfikazi phambi kobuso bam; yiva, undixelele ilizwi elilungileyo ngoEfron, unyana kaTsohare."
Genesis23:9 Andinike umqolomba waseMagpela, lowo anawo, ekupheleni kwentsimi yakhe; ngokuba nithe nandinika, yoba bubutyebi bengcwaba phakathi kwenu, njengoko inokulingana."
Genesis23:10 uEfron wahlala phakathi koonyana bakaHeti; uEfron umHeti wamphendula uAbraham, apho babephulaphule oonyana bakaHeti, nabo bonke abangena ngesango lomzi wakhe, wathi,"
Genesis23:11 Hayi, nkosi, ndiphulaphule; Intsimi leyo ndikunika yona, nomqolomba okuyo ndikunika; ndiyakunika phambi koonyana babantu bakowethu; ngcwaba umfikazi lowo."
Genesis23:12 Waqubuda uAbraham phambi kwabantu belo zwe.
Genesis23:13 Wathetha kuEfron, bephulaphule abemi belo zwe, wathi, Ukuba uyapha, phulaphula; ndiya kukunika imali ngelizwe; yithabathe kum, ndingcwabe umfikazi khona."
Genesis23:14 uEfron wamphendula uAbraham, wathi kuye:"
Genesis23:15 Nkosi yam, ndiphulaphule. Umhlaba uthengwa ngeeshekele zesilivere ezimakhulu mane; yintoni phakathi kwam nawe? wandule ukungcwaba umfikazi lowo."
Genesis23:16 uAbraham wamphulaphula uEfron; uAbraham wayilinganisa isilivere leyo kuEfron, abeyibeke ezindlebeni zoonyana bakaHeti, yangamakhulu amané eeshekele zesilivere, kuEfron, abeyibeke ezindlebeni zoonyana bakaHeti."
Genesis23:17 Yalityalwa intsimi kaEfron eMagpela phambi koMamre, nomqolomba lowo, yonke imithi ngeenxa zonke."
Genesis23:18 Kuba uAbraham wayesisityebi phambi koonyana bakaHeti, phambi kwabo bonke abangena ngesango lesixeko sakowabo."
Genesis23:19 Emva koko uAbraham wamngcwaba uSara umkakhe emqolombeni osentsimini yaseMakapela phambi kowakwaMamre; nguHebron ke lowo, ezweni lakwaKanan."
Genesis23:20 Intsimi yomyezo lowo, nomqolomba okuyo, ngoonyana bakaHeti, bawunika uAbraham, ukuba abe yindawo yakhe yokungcwaba."
Genesis24:1 uAbraham wayesele aluphele ediniwe, yaye uYehova wamsikelela ngayo yonke into uAbraham."
Genesis24:2 Wathi uAbraham kumphathi wendlu yakhe, obelawula yonke into anayo, Sibeke isandla sakho esinqeni sam."
Genesis24:3 Ndiza kukufungela ngoYehova uTHIXO wezulu noThixo womhlaba ukuba akuyi kumthabathela kuye nawuphi na umfazi unyana wam kwiintombi zamaKanan endihlala phakathi kwazo.
Genesis24:4 Kodwa hamba uye ezweni lakowethu, umzekele unyana wam uIsake umfazi."
Genesis24:5 Wathi umkhonzi kuye, Hi ke, ayavuma inkazana ukundilandela ukuza kweli lizwe; Ndimbuyisele na unyana wakho kwelo zwe waphuma kulo?"
Genesis24:6 Wathi uAbraham kuye, Zigcine, ungambuyiseli unyana wam khona."
Genesis24:7 uYehova, uThixo wamazulu, owandikhuphayo endlwini kabawo, ezweni labazalwana bam, owathetha nam, wandifungisa, esithi, Lo mhlaba ndiya kuyinika imbewu yakho; Wosithuma isithunywa sakhe, ukuba sikukhokele, simthabathele khona unyana wam njengomfazi."
Genesis24:8 Ukuba loo mfazi uthe akwavuma ukukulandela, sisuse esi sifungo sam; ungambuyiseli nje unyana wam phaya."
Genesis24:9 Wasibeka umkhonzi isandla sakhe ngaphantsi kwesinqe sika-Abraham inkosi yakhe, wamfungela loo nto."
Genesis24:10 Umkhonzi wathabatha iinkamela ezilishumi enkameleni yenkosi yakhe, wemka; ngokuba zonke iimpahla zenkosi yakhe zisesandleni sakhe; wemka, waya eMesopotami, eNakore."
Genesis24:11 Waziguqisa iinkamela ngaphandle komzi, ngasequleni, ngokuhlwa, ngexa lokuphuma kwabakhi bamanzi."
Genesis24:12 Wathi, uYehova, uThixo ka-Abraham, inkosi yam, ndithume namhla, ukuba ube nenceba kuAbraham inkosi yam."
Genesis24:13 Yabona, ndimi ngasequleni; zaphuma iintombi zabantu baloo mzi, zisiya kukha amanzi."
Genesis24:14 Mayihambe intombi endithi kuyo, Mayibeke indebe yakho phantsi, ndisele; athi, Sela, neenkamela zakho ndoziseza; Makabe nguye lowo ubumwisele umthetho umkhonzi wakho uIsake; Ndiya kwazi ngale nto ke, ukuba wenze inceba enkosini yam."
Genesis24:15 Akuba engekagqibi ukuthetha, waphuma uRebheka, lowo wayezalwa nguBhetuweli, unyana kaMilka, umkaNakore, umkhuluwa ka-Abraham, enengqayi egxalabeni lakhe."
Genesis24:16 Intombi leyo ibe intle kunene, njengentombi enyulu, engaziwa mntu; Wehla waya equleni, wayizalisa ingqayi yakhe, wenyuka."
Genesis24:17 Wagidima umkhonzi waya kuyikhawulela, wathi, Ndiphe ndisele amanzi emphandeni wakho."
Genesis24:18 Wathi, Sela, nkosi yam. Wawuhlisa kamsinya umphanda wakhe esandleni sakhe, wamseza."
Genesis24:19 Akugqiba ukusela, wathi, Neenkamela zakho ndiya kuzikhelela, zigqibe ukusela;"
Genesis24:20 Wakhawuleza wayigalela iemele zakhe emkhumbini, wagidima waya equleni, waziqhuba zonke iinkamela zakhe."
Genesis24:21 Wahlala wathi cwaka umntu owamothusayo, ukuze azi enoba uYehova uphumelele na kuhambo lwakhe okanye akunjalo."
Genesis24:22 Zakugqiba ukusela iinkamela, indoda leyo yathabatha ijikazi lekhonkco legolide, elisisiqingatha seshekele, nezacholo zozibini esandleni sayo, eziziishekele ezilishumi zegolide;"
Genesis24:23 Uyintombi kabani na? khawutsho: ikhona indawo yolala kulamzi kayihlo?
Genesis24:24 Wathi kuye, Yintombi kaBhetuweli, unyana kaMilka, awamzalayo uNahore."
Genesis24:25 Ngaphezu koko, wathi kuye: “Sinengca, nokutya, nendawo yokulala;"
Genesis24:26 Yathoba indoda leyo, yaqubuda kuYehova."
Genesis24:27 Wathi, Makabongwe uYehova, uThixo wenkosi yam uAbraham, ongayithobanga inkosi yam ngenceba yakhe, nangokuthembeka kwakhe;"
Genesis24:28 Yabaleka intombazana leyo, yaya kubaxelela udaba lwendlu kanina."
Genesis24:29 uRebheka waye enodade wabo, ogama belinguLabhan; wagidima uLabhan waya endodeni leyo ngasequleni."
Genesis24:30 Wawubona umsesane wakhe, nezacholo ezandleni zodade wabo, waweva amazwi kaRebheka, udade wabo, wathi, Indoda leyo ithethe wenjenje kum; ukufikelela endodeni; nantso imi ngasezinkameleni ngasequleni."
Genesis24:31 Wathi, Ngenani, nina nisikelelweyo yiNkosi; ngubani olinde ngaphandle? ngokuba ndiyilungisile indlu nendawo yeenkamela."
Genesis24:32 Yangena indoda leyo endlwini, wazikhulula iinkamela zayo, wazinika utyani iinkamela, nokutya, namanzi, ukuba zihlambe iinyawo zayo, neenyawo zamadoda abehamba nayo."
Genesis24:33 Kwabekwa ukudla phambi kwakhe, ukuba adle; wathi yena, Andiyi kudla, andikathethi nomyalelo wam. Wathi, Thetha."
Genesis24:34 Wathi, Ndingumkhonzi ka-Abraham."
Genesis24:35 uYehova uyisikelele kunene inkosi yam; wakhula, wamnika impahla emfutshane, neenkomo, nesilivere, negolide, nabakhonzazana, nabakhonzazana, neenkamela, namahashe."
Genesis24:36 uSara, umfazi wankosi yam, wayizala inkosi yam, emveni kokuba iseyaluphele, wayinika konke enako."
Genesis24:37 Yandifungela inkosi yam, yathi, Unyana wam uze ungamzekeli umfazi ezintombini zamaKanan, endihleli ezweni lawo mna."
Genesis24:38 Kodwa uye endlwini kabawo emizalwaneni yakowethu, umzekele unyana wam umfazi."
Genesis24:39 Ndathi enkosini yam, Hi ke ayandilandela inkazana leyo."
Genesis24:40 Yathi kum, uYehova, endihamba phambi kwakhe, wosithuma isithunywa sakhe siye nawe, ayiphumelelise indlela yakho; mthathele umfazi unyana wam endlwini yam nasendlwini kabawo."
Genesis24:41 Wosisusa ngoku esi sifungo sam ekufikeni kwakho emizalwaneni yakowethu; nokuba abakunikanga nto, woba ukhululekile esifungweni sam."
Genesis24:42 Ndifike equleni namhlanje, ndathi, Yehova, Thixo ka-Abraham, nkosi yam, ukuba uthe wayiphumelelisa indlela yam endihamba ngayo!"
Genesis24:43 Yabona, ndimi ngasequleni; Yaphuma intombi isiya kukha amanzi, ndathi kuyo, Ndiphe amanzi emphandeni wakho, ndisele;"
Genesis24:44 Wathi kum, Sela wena nobabini, ndikwenzele iinkamela; Yiba ngumfazi uYehova amabele unyana wenkosi yam."
Genesis24:45 Ndingekagqibi mna ukuthetha entliziyweni yam, gqi uRebheka ethwele ingqayi egxalabeni; wehla waya equleni, wakha amanzi; ndathi kuye, Ndiphe ndisele."
Genesis24:46 Wakhawuleza wayithula iemele yakhe, wathi, Sela, neenkamela zakho ndoziseza; Ndasela ke, waziseza iinkamela."
Genesis24:47 Ndambuza ndathi, Uyintombi kabani na? Wathi, Yintombi kaBhetuweli, unyana kaNakore, awamzalelwa nguMilka;"
Genesis24:48 Ndathoba, ndamnqula uYehova, ngenxa kaYehova, uThixo ka-Abraham, inkosi yam, ondikhokeleyo endleleni ethe tye, ukuba ndimzekele unyana wakhe intombi yomzalwana wenkosi yam."
Genesis24:49 Ngoku ke, ukuba nifuna ukuyikhonza inkosi yam ngenceba nenyaniso, ndixeleleni; ukuba akunjalo, ndixelele; ukuba ndingajika ekunene okanye ekhohlo."
Genesis24:50 Waphendula uLabhan noBhetuweli, bathi, Le nto iphuma kuYehova; asiyi kuthetha okubi okanye okulungileyo kuwe."
Genesis24:51 Yabona, uRebheka unawe; mthabathe, hamba ube ngumkanyana wenkosi yakho, njengoko watshoyo uYehova."
Genesis24:52 Wathi akuweva umkhonzi ka-Abraham amazwi abo, waqubuda kuNdikhoyo."
Genesis24:53 Umkhonzi wakhupha izihombo zesilivere nezegolide, neempahla, wanika uRebheka; wanika udade wabo nonina izinto ezibalulekileyo."
Genesis24:54 Badla, basela, yena namadoda abenaye, balala; bagqiba kusasa, besithi, Ndithumele enkosini yam."
Genesis24:55 Wathi udade wabo nonina, Makhe ihlale nathi intombi iintsuku ezi ngathi zilishumi; emveni koko wohamba."
Genesis24:56 Wathi kubo, Musani ukundibambezela, ngokuba uYehova uyayenza iphumelele indlela yam; ndivumele ndiye enkosini yam."
Genesis24:57 Bathi, Masiyibize intombi, sibuze kuyo ngomlomo wayo."
Genesis24:58 Bambiza uRebheka, bathi kuye, Uyathanda na ukuhamba nale ndoda? Wathi: Ndiya kuhamba."
Genesis24:59 Bamkhulula ke uRebheka udade wabo, nomondli wakhe, umkhonzi ka-Abraham, namadoda abenaye."
