Genesis24:60 Bamsikelela uRebheka, bathi kuye, Ungudade wethu, yiba ngamawaka-waka, imbewu yakho iyidle ilifa izindlu zabo bayithiyayo."
Genesis24:61 Wesuka ke uRebheka nomthinjana wakhe, bakhwela iinkamela, bayilandela indoda leyo; umkhonzi wamthabatha uRebheka, wahamba."
Genesis24:62 Weza uIsake ngendlela eya equleni laseLaha-iroyi; ngokuba ebehlala eMzantsi.
Genesis24:63 uIsake wayecamngca elizweni ngokuhlwa; waphakamisa amehlo akhe, wabona iinkamela zisiza."
Genesis24:64 uRebheka waphakamisa amehlo akhe, wambona uIsake, wehla enkameleni."
Genesis24:65 Wathi kumkhonzi, Yiyiphi na indoda eya kusikhawulela kweli lizwe? Wathi umkhonzi, Yinkosi yam le; ke ngoko, wathabatha isigqubuthelo, wazigquma."
Genesis24:66 Umkhonzi wamxelela uIsake konke abekwenzile.
Genesis24:67 uIsake wamsa ententeni kanina kaSara, wathi igama lakhe nguRebheka, waba ngumkakhe; wamthanda, waza uIsake wathuthuzeleka emva kokufa kukanina."
Genesis25:1 uAbraham wathatha omnye umfazi, ogama linguKetura."
Genesis25:2 Wamzalela uShimran, noYokeshan, noMedan, noMidiyan, noIshbhaki, noShuwage."
Genesis25:3 uYokishane wazala uShebha noDedan; Oonyana bakaDedan baba ngama-Asiriya, namaLutusi, namaEhum."
Genesis25:4 Oonyana bakaMidiyan nguAsheri; uEva, uEfere, uHanoki, uAbhida noElidaha. Bonke ke ngoonyana bakaKetura."
Genesis25:5 uAbraham wamnika uIsake zonke izinto awayenazo.
Genesis25:6 Ke oonyana bezithende awayenazo uAbraham, uAbraham wabanika izipho, wabathabatha kuIsake unyana wakhe, ngoxa wayesadla ubomi, wabathabatha waya nabo empumalanga ezweni lasempumalanga."
Genesis25:7 Yiyo le imihla yeminyaka yokudla ubomi kuka-Abraham, yaba yiminyaka elikhulu elinamanci mathandathu anesihlanu."
Genesis25:8 Wafa ke uAbraham, wafa eyingwevu enkulu, aluphele, ephele ebudaleni; wahlanganiselwa kwabakowabo."
Genesis25:9 Oonyana bakhe uIsake noIshmayeli bamngcwaba emqolombeni waseMakapela, entsimini kaEfron unyana kaTsohare, umHeti, ephambi kowakwaMamre;"
Genesis25:10 Umhlaba awawuthengayo uAbraham koonyana bakaHeti, wangcwatyelwa khona uAbraham noSara umkakhe."
Genesis25:11 Emva kokufa kuka-Abraham, uThixo wamsikelela uIsake unyana wakhe; wahlala uIsake ngasequleni likaLaha-iroyi."
Genesis25:12 Yiyo le ke inzala kaIshmayeli, unyana ka-Abraham, awathi uHagare umYiputazana, umkhonzi kaSara, wamzalela uAbraham."
Genesis25:13 Ngawo la amagama oonyana bakaIshmayeli, ngokwamagama abo ngokwemizalwane yabo: owamazibulo kaIshmayeli nguNebhayoti; iKedare, iAdebheli, neMibhesam,"
Genesis25:14 uMishma, uDuma, noMasa;"
Genesis25:15 neHadare, noTema, noYeture, noNafishe, noKedema;"
Genesis25:16 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaIshmayeli, ngawo la amagama abo ngokwemizi yabo neenqaba zabo; izikhulu ezilishumi elinazibini ngokwezizwe zazo."
Genesis25:17 Yiyo le iminyaka yokudla ubomi kukaIshmayeli, ikhulu elinamanci mathathu anesixhenxe; wahlanganiselwa kwabakowabo."
Genesis25:18 Bema bethabathela eHavila besa eShure, ekhangelene neYiputa, ekuyeni eAsiriya; wafa phambi kwabazalwana bakhe bonke."
Genesis25:19 Yiyo le ke inzala kaIsake, unyana ka-Abraham: uAbraham nguyise kaIsake;"
Genesis25:20 uIsake ubeminyaka imashumi mane ezelwe, ukumzeka kwakhe uRebheka, intombi kaBhetuweli, umAram wasePadan-ram, udade boLabhan umAram, ukuba abe ngumkakhe."
Genesis25:21 uIsake wamthandazela uYehova umkakhe, ngokuba ebengazali; wamitha uRebheka umkakhe."
Genesis25:22 Babambana naye abantwana; Wathi, Ukuba kunjalo, kutheni ndinje? Waya kubuza kuYehova."
Genesis25:23 Wathi uYehova kuye, Zimbini iintlanga esizalweni sakho; olunye uhlanga luya komelela kunolunye uhlanga; Omkhulu uya kukhonza komnci."
Genesis25:24 Kwathi ke kwakuzaliseka umhla wokuzalwa kwakhe, kwabakho amawele esizalweni sakhe."
Genesis25:25 Laphuma elokuqala lingqombela, lonke njengengubo yoboya; Bamthiya igama elinguEsawu."
Genesis25:26 Kamva waphuma umninawa wakhe, isandla sakhe sabamba isithende sikaEsawu; Wathi ke igama elinguYakobi; uIsake ebeminyaka imashumi mathandathu ezelwe, ukubazala kwabo."
Genesis25:27 Akhula amakhwenkwe, uEsawu waba lizingela, indoda yelizwe; yaye uYakobi wayeyindoda engenabulumko ehlala ezintenteni."
Genesis25:28 uIsake wathanda uEsawu, ngokuba ebesidla inyama yezingela; ke uRebheka wayethanda uYakobi."
Genesis25:29 Wayibhaka ke uYakobi intlama, wafika uEsawu evela ezindle, ediniwe."
Genesis25:30 Wathi uEsawu kuYakobi, Makhe ndive loo nto ibomvu, ndiyive; Yiyo loo nto kuthiwa nguEdom."
Genesis25:31 Wathi uYakobi, Ndithengisele iqashiso lakho namhla."
Genesis25:32 Wathi uEsawu, Yabona, andiyi kufa; bundenzani na obo buzibulo?"
Genesis25:33 Wathi uYakobi, Niya kundibuka namhla; wamfungela, wathengisa ngobuzibulo bakhe kuYakobi."
Genesis25:34 uYakobi wamnika uEsawu isonka nepani yeentlumayo; watya, wasela, wavuka, wahamba. Wabudela ke uEsawu ubuzibulo bakhe."
Genesis26:1 Kwabakho indlala ehlabathini, ngaphandle kweyokuqala indlala eyabakho ngexesha lika-Abraham. Waya uIsake eGerare, kuAbhimeleki, ukumkani wamaFilisti."
Genesis26:2 uYehova wabonakala kuye, wathi, Musa ukuhla uye eYiputa; hlala ezweni endiya kukuxelela lona."
Genesis26:3 Hlala ungumphambukeli kweli lizwe; ndoba nawe, ndikusikelele; ngokuba ndiya kukunika wena nembewu yakho onke la mazwe, ndisimise isifungo endasifungayo kuAbraham uyihlo;"
Genesis26:4 ndiya kuyandisa ndiyandise imbewu yakho njengeenkwenkwezi zezulu, ndinike imbewu yakho onke la mazwe; zisikeleleke ngembewu yakho zonke iintlanga zehlabathi;"
Genesis26:5 Ngenxa yokuba uAbraham waliphulaphula ilizwi lam waza wawugcina umyalelo wam, imiyalelo yam, imimiselo yam nemithetho yam."
Genesis26:6 uIsake wakha iGerare.
Genesis26:7 Ambuza amadoda aloo ndawo ngomkakhe; Wathi, Ngudade wethu, ngokuba ebesoyika ukuthi, Ngumkam; Wathi, Mandingandibulali amadoda aloo ndawo ngenxa kaRebheka; ngokuba ebemhle imbonakalo."
Genesis26:8 Kwakuba kudala ekhona, uAbhimeleki ukumkani wamaFilisti, wakroba ngefestile, wabona uIsake edlala noRebheka, umkakhe."
Genesis26:9 uAbhimeleki wambiza uIsake, wathi, Yabona, ngumkakho ngokwenene; kwaye utheni na: Ngudade wethu? Wathi uIsake kuye, Kungokuba ndithe, Andiyi kufa ngenxa yakhe."
Genesis26:10 Wathi uAbhimeleki: “Yintoni le uyenzileyo kuthi? omnye wabantu ebenokulala nomkakho lula, ubuzosigxeka."
Genesis26:11 uAbhimeleki wabawisela umthetho abantu bakhe bonke, wathi, Othe wayichukumisa le ndoda nomkayo, wobulawa afe."
Genesis26:12 uIsake wahlwayela kwelo zwe, wazuza kalikhulu ngaloo mnyaka; uYehova wamsikelela."
Genesis26:13 Indoda leyo yaqhubeka ikhula, ikhula, ikhula de yaba mdala kakhulu."
Genesis26:14 Ngokuba ubenemfuyo yempahla emfutshane, neenkomo, nabakhonzi abaninzi, ammonela amaFilisti."
Genesis26:15 Ngenxa yokuba onke amaqula ababewamba abakhonzi bakayise ngemihla ka-Abraham uyise, amaFilisti awavala aza awazalisa ngomhlaba."
Genesis26:16 Wathi uAbhimeleki kuIsake, Suka kuthi; ngokuba womelele kunathi."
Genesis26:17 Wemka apho uIsake, wamisa intente yakhe kwintlambo yaseGerare, wahlala khona."
Genesis26:18 Wabuya uIsake wawamba amaqula, ababewambile ngemihla ka-Abraham uyise; ngenxa yokuba amaFilisti abalela emva kokufa kuka-Abraham, waza wawabiza ngamagama uyise awayewabize ngamagama."
Genesis26:19 Bemba abakhonzi bakaIsake esihlanjeni somlambo, bafumana iqula khona, linomthombo khona."
Genesis26:20 Abalusi baseGerare babambana nabalusi bakaIsake, besithi, Ngawethu la manzi; Wathi iqula elo yiEseke; ngokuba babambene naye."
Genesis26:21 Bemba elinye iqula, baphikisana ngalo, wathi igama lalo yiSitna."
Genesis26:22 Wemka khona, wemba elinye iqula; kwaye ke ngoko abazange baxabane; wathi ukuyibiza yiRehobhoti; wathi: Kungenxa yokuba ngoku uYehova usenzele indawo, yaye siya kusasazeka ehlabathini."
Genesis26:23 Wemka khona, waya eBher-shebha."
Genesis26:24 uYehova wabonakala kuye ngobo busuku, wathi, NdinguThixo ka-Abraham uyihlo; musa ukoyika, ngokuba ndinawe; ndiya kukusikelela, ndiyandise imbewu yakho, ngenxa ka-Abraham umkhonzi wam."
Genesis26:25 Wakha khona isibingelelo, walithandaza igama likaYehova, wayimisa khona intente yakhe; bemba iqula khona abakhonzi bakaIsake."
Genesis26:26 Emva koko uAbhimeleki weza kuye, evela eGerare, ehamba noAhusati umhlobo wakhe, noPikoli umthetheli womkhosi wakhe."
Genesis26:27 Wathi uIsake kubo, Nize ngani na kum, nandithiya nje, nandigxotha nje kuni?"
Genesis26:28 Bathi ke bona: “Sibonile ngokwenene ukuba uYehova unawe; sathi, Makubekho isifungo phakathi kwethu nawe, senze umnqophiso nawe;"
Genesis26:29 ukuze ungasenzakalisi, ngenxa yokuba asizange sikuchukumise, yaye sikwenzele okulungileyo, sikukhokele ngoxolo; ngoku niyintsikelelo kaYehova."
Genesis26:30 Wabenzela isidlo, badla, basela;"
Genesis26:31 Bavuka kusasa, bafungelana; uIsake wabandulula, bamshiya enoxolo."
Genesis26:32 Beza abakhonzi bakaIsake kwangaloo mini, bamxelela indawo yequla ababelimbile, bathi kuye, Siwafumene amanzi."
Genesis26:33 Wathi ukuyibiza yiSebha; ngenxa yoko igama laloo mzi liyiBher-shebha unanamhla.
Genesis26:34 uEsawu ebeminyaka imashumi mane ezelwe, ukuzeka kwakhe uYuditi intombi kaBheri, umHeti, noBhasemati intombi kaElon, umHeti."
Genesis26:35 Kwaba buhlungu ngoIsake noRebheka.
Genesis27:1 Kwathi, akwaluphala uIsake, amehlo akhe enorhatyazo, engasaboni, wabiza uEsawu unyana wakhe omkhulu, wathi kuye, Unyana wam, wathi kuye, Yabona, nantsiya yi."
Genesis27:2 Wathi, Yabona, ndaluphele, andiyazi imini yokufa kwam."
Genesis27:3 Thabatha ngoko iintonga zakho, umphongolo wakho, nesaphetha sakho, uye ezweni, undizingele inkomo;"
Genesis27:4 ndenzele ukutya okunencasa, njengoko ndikuthandayo, ukuzise kum, ndidle; ukuze umphefumlo wam ukusikelele ndingekafi."
Genesis27:5 uRebheka weva uIsake ethetha noEsawu unyana wakhe, uEsawu waya kuzingela inyamakazi endle."
Genesis27:6 uRebheka wathetha kuYakobi, unyana wakhe, wathi, Yabona, ndive uyihlo ethetha kuEsawu, umninawa wakho, esithi,"
Genesis27:7 Ndizisele inyama yenkomo, undenzele ukudla okunencasa, ndidle, ndikusikelele phambi koYehova ndingekafi."
Genesis27:8 Ke ngoko, nyana wam, liphulaphule izwi lam njengoko ndikuwisela umthetho;"
Genesis27:9 Yiya emhlambini, undizisele khona iinkunzi zezimvu zibe mbini, ezilungileyo; uyihlo ndiya kumenzela ukudla okumnandi, njengoko athanda ngako."
Genesis27:10 Uze uyise kuyihlo, adle, ukuze akusikelele engekafi."
Genesis27:11 Wathi uYakobi kuRebheka unina, Yabona, uEsawu, umnakwethu, yindoda exhonti, mna ndiyindoda egudileyo."
Genesis27:12 Mhlawumbi uBawo uya kundiva, ndize ndizibonakalise kuye njengomlahlekisi; yaye ndiya kuzisela intsikelelo, kungekhona intsikelelo."
Genesis27:13 Wathi unina kuye, Makube phezu kwam ukushwatyulelwa kwakho, nyana wam; mamela nje ilizwi lam, uze uye kundithathela wona."
Genesis27:14 Wayithabatha, wayisa kunina; unina wenza inyama emnandi, njengoko ayithandayo uyise."
Genesis27:15 uRebheka wathabatha iingubo zikaEsawu, unyana wakhe omkhulu, ezintle ezibe bekuye endlwini, wamambathisa uYakobi unyana wakhe omnci."
Genesis27:16 Izintsu zeebhokhwe wambathisa ezandleni zakhe, nasentanyeni yakhe egudileyo;"
Genesis27:17 Wanika inyama emnandi, nesonka, abesilungise ngesandla sikaYakobi unyana wakhe."
Genesis27:18 Weza ke kuyise, wathi, Bawo! Wathi: Ndikho! ungubani nyana wam."
Genesis27:19 Wathi uYakobi kuyise, NdinguEsawu, amazibulo akho; Ndenza njengoko wandiwisela umthetho ngako, wathi, Vuka, uhlale, udle inyama, nenyama, nenyama, ukuze umphefumlo wakho undisikelele."
Genesis27:20 Wathi uIsake kunyana wakhe, Yini na ukuba ukhawuleze ukuyifumana, nyana wam? Wathi: “Kungenxa yokuba uYehova uThixo wakho ewazizisa kum."
Genesis27:21 Wathi uIsake kuYakobi, Sondela, ndikuchukumise, nyana wam, ndibone ukuba unguye na unyana wam uEsawu, akunguye, kusini na."
Genesis27:22 uYakobi waya kuIsake uyise; Wamphuthaphutha, wathi, Ilizwi lona lilizwi likaYakobi, kodwa izandla zizandla zikaEsawu."
Genesis27:23 Akamahlula, kuba izandla zakhe zazinoboya, njengezandla zikaEsawu umkhuluwa wakhe; ke ngoko wamsikelela."
Genesis27:24 Wathi, Ungunyana wam na uEsawu? Wathi yena: Ndinguye."
Genesis27:25 Wathi, Yizise kum ndidle inyama yenkomo yonyana wam, umphefumlo wam uyisikelele. Wamzisela, wadla; wamzisela iwayini, wasela."
Genesis27:26 Wathi uIsake uyise kuye, Khawusondele undiphuze, nyana wam."
Genesis27:27 Wasondela kuye, wamanga, waliva ivumba leengubo zakhe, wamsikelela, esithi, Yabona, ivumba lonyana wam linjengevumba lelizwe elisikelelwe nguYehova."
Genesis27:28 Ngako oko uThixo wakunika umbethe wezulu, nentabalala yehlabathi, nentabalala yengqolowa, newayini entsha."
Genesis27:29 Mazikukhonze izizwe, ziqubude kuwe iintlanga; balawule abazalwana bakho, baqubude kuwe oonyana bakanyoko; Uqalekisiwe okuqalekisayo, Makabongwe okusikelelayo."
Genesis27:30 Kwathi, akugqiba uIsake ukumsikelela uYakobi, uYakobi akamshiyanga uIsake uyise, weza uEsawu, umkhuluwa wakhe, evela ekuzingeleni kwakhe."
Genesis27:31 Naye wenza ukudla okunevumba elimnandi, wazisa kuyise, wathi kuyise, Makavuke ubawo, adle inyama yenkomo yonyana wakhe, ukuze umphefumlo wakho undisikelele."
Genesis27:32 Wathi uyise uIsake kuye, Ungubani na? Wathi, Ndingunyana wakho uEsawu, izibulo lakho."
Genesis27:33 Wagubha kunene uIsake, wathi, Ndingubani na? Uphi na lo uzingele isilwanyana, wasizisa kum, ndatya yonke into engekafiki, ndamsikelela? ewe, woba nentsikelelo."
Genesis27:34 Akuweva uEsawu amazwi kayise, walila ebuhlungu kakhulu, wathi kuyise, Bawo, ndisikelele nam."
Genesis27:35 Wathi yena, Kufike umninawa wakho ngobuqhophololo, wathabatha ubutyebi bakho."
Genesis27:36 Wathi, Ndathi, KunguYakobi na? ngokuba undenze kubini; ubususile ubukhulu bam; nanku ngoku nilithabathileyo. Wathi: Anindigcinelanga ntsikelelo na?"
Genesis27:37 Waphendula uIsake, wathi kuEsawu, Yabona, ndimmisile waba ngukumkani wakho, nabakhuluwa bakhe ndibanike yena, baba ngabakhonzi; ndamthuthuzela ngengqolowa nangewayini; Kaloku ke, nyana wam, ndithini na ngawe?"
Genesis27:38 Wathi uEsawu kuyise, Inye na le ntsikelelo unayo, bawo? Ndisikelele nam bawo! Waliphakamisa uEsawu ilizwi lakhe, walila."
Genesis27:39 Waphendula uIsake uyise, wathi kuye, Yabona, ikhaya lakho liya kuba lintabalala, nombethe wezulu phezulu."
Genesis27:40 Uya kuphila ngekrele lakho, umkhonze umninawa wakho; ukuba uthe walawula, woyaphula idyokhwe yakhe entanyeni yakho."
Genesis27:41 uEsawu wamzonda uYakobi ngenxa yentsikelelo awamsikelela ngayo uyise; uEsawu wathi entliziyweni yakhe, Isondele imihla yesijwili sikabawo; ndiya kumbulalela khona uYakobi umninawa wam."
Genesis27:42 uRebheka wawaxelelwa loo mazwi kaEsawu, unyana wakhe omkhulu, wathumela ukuba kubizwe uYakobi, unyana wakhe omnci, wathi kuye, Yabona, uEsawu umkhuluwa wakho lowo ukuchukumisayo, uhleli ngokufuna ukubulala."
Genesis27:43 Ke ngoko, nyana wam, liphulaphule izwi lam; Wesuka ke, wabalekela kuLabhan umnakwabo kwaHaran;"
Genesis27:44 uhlale naye imihla embalwa, ude uphele umsindo womkhuluwa wakho;"
Genesis27:45 ude umsindo womkhuluwa wakho ubuye kuwe, ayilibale into oyenzileyo kuye;"
Genesis27:46 Wathi uRebheka kuIsake, Ndikruqukile bubomi bam ngenxa yeentombi zakwaHeti;"
Genesis28:1 uIsake wambiza ke uYakobi, wamsikelela, wamwisela umthetho, wathi kuye, Uze ungazeki mfazi ezintombini zakwaKanan."
Genesis28:2 Suka uye ePadan-aram, endlwini kaBhetuweli unyokokhulu; Wathabatha khona umfazi ezintombini zikaLabhan, udade bonyoko."
Genesis28:3 Wanga uThixo uSomandla angakusikelela, akwandise, akwandise, ukuze ube sisikhungu sezizwe;"
Genesis28:4 Makakunike intsikelelo ka-Abraham, wena, nembewu yakho, nawe; ukuze ulidle ilifa ilizwe lokuphambukela kwakho, elo uThixo walinika uAbraham."
Genesis28:5 uIsake wathi kuYakobi makahambe; waya ePadan-ram, kuLabhan unyana kaBhetuweli, umAram, udade boRebheka, unina booYakobi noEsawu."
Genesis28:6 uEsawu wabona ukuba uIsake umsikelele uYakobi, wamvumela ukuba aye ePadan-aram, azeke khona umfazi; ekumsikeleleni kwakhe, wamwisela umthetho, esithi, Uze ungazeki mfazi ezintombini zakwaKanan;"
Genesis28:7 noYakobi umphulaphule uyise nonina, waya ePadan-aram;"
Genesis28:8 Wabona uEsawu ukuba iintombi zakwaKanan azifunwa nguyise uIsake;
Genesis28:9 Waya uEsawu kuIshmayeli, wazeka uMahalati, intombi kaIshmayeli, unyana ka-Abraham, udade boNebhayoti, wangumkakhe."
Genesis28:10 Wemka uYakobi eBher-shebha, waya kwaHaran."
Genesis28:11 Wafika kwenye indawo, walala khona, kuba belithshonile ilanga. Wathabatha kumatye kuloo ndawo, wawabeka emqamelweni wakhe, walala khona."
Genesis28:12 Waphupha ebona intonga imi emhlabeni, incam yayo iye yafika ezulwini; nanzo izithunywa zikaThixo zinyuka ziphuma kuwo, zisihla kuwo;"
Genesis28:13 nanko uYehova emi khona, wathi, NdinguYehova, uThixo ka-Abraham uyihlo, uThixo kaIsake; Lo mhlaba ulele kuwo ndiya kuwunika wena nenzala yakho."
Genesis28:14 Yaye inzala yakho iya kuba njengothuli lomhlaba, yaye uya kusasazeka entshonalanga nasempuma nasemntla nasemzantsi; yaye ngenxa yakho nembewu yakho zonke izizukulwana zehlabathi ziya kuzisikelela."
Genesis28:15 Yabona, ndinawe; ndiya kukugcina naphi na apho uya khona, ndikubuyisele kulo mhlaba; ngokuba andiyi kukushiya, andikwenzanga oko ndikuthethileyo kuwe."
Genesis28:16 Wavuka uYakobi ebuthongweni bakhe, wathi, Kunjenje ke, uYehova ukho kule ndawo; nam bendingazi."
Genesis28:17 Woyika, wathi, Hayi, ukoyikeka kwayo le ndawo! asinto yindlu kaThixo, lisango lezulu."
Genesis28:18 Wavuka kwakusasa uYakobi, walithabatha ilitye abelibeke emqamelweni wakhe, walimisa layintsika, wathulula ioli phezu kwalo."
Genesis28:19 Wathi igama laloo ndawo yiBheteli, kodwa igama laloo mzi ngenxa engaphambili beliyiLuse."
Genesis28:20 Wafunga uYakobi, wathi, Ukuba uThixo uthe waba nam, wandigcina kule ndlela ndiyihambayo, andinike isonka ndidle, neengubo zokunxiba,"
Genesis28:21 ukuze ndibuyele endlwini kabawo ndinoxolo; uYehova uya kuba nguThixo wam khona.
Genesis28:22 Eli litye ndilimisileyo lasisikhumbuzo soba yindlu kaThixo; neento zonke othe wandinika, ndokunika isishumi sazo."
Genesis29:1 uYakobi waqhubela phambili nohambo lwakhe, wada waya kufika kwelasempuma."
Genesis29:2 Wakhangela, wabona iqula ezweni, nantso imihlambi emithathu yempahla emfutshane, ibuthile ngakulo; kuba imihlambi yayiseza kwelo qula, yaye kwakukho ilitye elikhulu emlonyeni wequla."
Genesis29:3 Kulapho ibihlanganisana khona yonke imihlambi, baliqengqe ilitye, balisuse emlonyeni wequla, bayiseze impahla emfutshane, balibuyisele ilitye emlonyeni wequla endaweni yalo."
Genesis29:4 Wathi uYakobi kubo, Bazalwana bam, nivela phi na? Bathi: “Sisuka kwaHaran."
Genesis29:5 Wathi kubo, Niyamazi na uLabhan, unyana kaNakore? Bathi ke bona, Siyamazi."
Genesis29:6 Wathi kubo, Usaphilile na? Bathi, Usahleli, nanko uRakeli intombi yakhe, esiza nempahla emfutshane."
Genesis29:7 Waza wathi: Khangela, kusesemini, kwaye alikafiki ixesha lokuba iinkomo zihlanganiswe; seza iigusha, uziphe ukutya."
Genesis29:8 Bathi, Asinako, ide ihlanganiselwe ndawonye yonke impahla emfutshane, liqengqiwe ilitye, lisuke emlonyeni wequla, siyiseze ke impahla emfutshane."
Genesis29:9 Ke kaloku esathetha nabo, wafika uRakeli nempahla emfutshane kayise, kuba ubesalusa."
Genesis29:10 Uthe uYakobi akumbona uRakeli, intombi kaLabhan, nodade bonina, nempahla emfutshane kaLabhan, udade bonina, wasondela uYakobi, waliqengqa ilitye lesuka emlonyeni wequla, wayishiya impahla emfutshane kaLabhan, udade bonina nika amanzi."
Genesis29:11 uYakobi wamanga uRakeli, waliphakamisa izwi lakhe, walila."
Genesis29:12 uYakobi wamxelela uRakeli ukuba ungudade boyise, nokuba ungunyana kaRebheka; wagidima waya kuxelela uyise."
Genesis29:13 Uthe uLabhan akuluva udaba lukaYakobi, unyana wodade wabo, wagidima waya kumkhawulela, wamwola, wamanga, wamngenisa endlwini yakhe. Wamxelela uLabhan yonke loo nto."
Genesis29:14 Wathi uLabhan kuye, Okunene ulithambo lam, uyinyama yam; Wahlala naye inyanga yanye."
Genesis29:15 Wathi uLabhan kuYakobi, Kungokuba ungudade wethu na? khawutsho uzakuba yintoni umvuzo wakho?"
Genesis29:16 uLabhan waye eneentombi ezimbini; igama lenkulu lalinguLeya, igama lenci lalinguRakeli."
Genesis29:17 Ke uLeya wayenamehlo athambileyo; ke uRakeli ebemhle isiqu, emhle imbonakalo."
Genesis29:18 uYakobi ubethanda uRakeli; Wathi, Ndokukhonza iminyaka esixhenxe ngenxa kaRakeli, intombi yakho encinane."
Genesis29:19 Wathi uLabhan Kulungile ukuba ndimnike wena, kunokuba ndimnike enye indoda; Hlala nam."
Genesis29:20 uYakobi wakhonza uRakeli iminyaka esixhenxe; kwaba yimihla embalwa kuye, ngenxa yothando abemthanda ngalo."
Genesis29:21 Wathi uYakobi kuLabhan, Ndinike umkam, ngokuba izalisekile imihla yam, ukuba ndimngene."
Genesis29:22 uLabhan wabahlanganisa bonke abantu baloo mmandla waza wenza isidlo.
Genesis29:23 Kwahlwa, wathabatha uLeya intombi yakhe, wamngenisa kuye; wangena kuye."
Genesis29:24 Intombi yakhe uLeya, uLabhan wayinika uZilipa, umkhonzazana wakhe, ukuba abe ngumkhonzazana wayo."
Genesis29:25 Kwathi ngesifingo, wabona ukuba nguLeya, wathi kuLabhan, Yintoni na le nto undenze yona? Andikhonzanga nawe uRakeli na? so undiqhathe ngantoni?"
Genesis29:26 Wathi uLabhan, Makwenjiwa nje apha ezweni lakowethu, ukuthi, kunikwe abamncinane phambi kowamazibulo."
Genesis29:27 Gqibezela iveki yakhe, yaye sokunika ngenkonzo oya kundikhonza ngayo eminye iminyaka esixhenxe."
Genesis29:28 Wenjenjalo uYakobi, wayigqiba iveki yaloo mfazi; wamnika noRakeli intombi yakhe, yangumkakhe."
Genesis29:29 Intombi yakhe uRakeli, uLabhan wayinika uBhiliha, umkhonzazana wakhe, ukuba abe ngumkhonzazana wakhe."
Genesis29:30 Naye wamngena uRakeli, wamthanda uRakeli ngaphezu koLeya, wakhonza ke naye eminye iminyaka esixhenxe."
Genesis29:31 uYehova wabona ukuba uLeya uthiyiwe, wasivula isizalo sakhe; ke uRakeli ebengazali."
Genesis29:32 Wamitha ke uLeya, wazala unyana, wathi igama lakhe nguRubhen; ngokuba wathi, uYehova uzibonile iintsizi zam; ngoku iya kundithanda indoda yam."
Genesis29:33 Wabuya wamitha, wazala unyana; Wathi, uYehova uvile ukuba ndithiyiwe, wandinika lo nyana; Wamthiya igama elinguSimon."
Genesis29:34 Wabuya wamitha, wazala unyana; Wathi, Ngoku indoda yam iya kundizeka, kuba ndizele oonyana abathathu; ngenxa yoko wamthiya igama elinguLevi."
Genesis29:35 Wabuya wamitha, wazala unyana, wathi, Kaloku ke ndithanda ukudumisa uYehova; ke ngoko wamthiya igama elinguYuda; akaphinda azale."
Genesis30:1 Ke kaloku akubona uRakeli ukuba akamzaleli mntwana uYakobi, uRakeli wammonela udade wabo. Wathi kuYakobi, Ndinike abantwana bam, hleze ndife."
Genesis30:2 uYakobi wavutha ngumsindo kuRakeli, wathi, Ndisesikhundleni sikaThixo na, owasitshabalalisayo isiqhamo sesizalo sikanyoko?"
Genesis30:3 Wathi, Khangela, uBhiliha, umkhonzazana wam, ungene kuye; kwaye uya kuzala emathangeni am, ukuze ndibe nabantwana kunye naye."
Genesis30:4 Wamnika ke uBhiliha, umkhonzazana wakhe, ukuba abe ngumfazi wakhe; uYakobi wamngena."
Genesis30:5 Wamitha uBhiliha, wamzalela uYakobi unyana."
Genesis30:6 Wathi uRakeli, uThixo undikhokele, waliva izwi lam, wandinika unyana; Yiyo loo nto embiza ngokuba nguDan."
Genesis30:7 Wabuya wamitha uBhiliha, umkhonzazana kaRakeli, wamzalela uYakobi unyana wesibini."
Genesis30:8 Wathi uRakeli, Ndalwa nodade wethu emfazweni enkulu, ndamoyisa, wathi igama layo nguNafetali."
Genesis30:9 Ke kaloku wabona uLeya ukuba uyazala, wathabatha uSilpa, umkhonzazana wakhe, wamnika uYakobi ukuba abe ngumfazi wakhe."
Genesis30:10 uZilipa, umkhonzazana kaLeya, wamzalela uYakobi unyana."
Genesis30:11 Wathi uLeya, Kweza iqela labantu, kwathiwa igama lakhe nguGadi."
Genesis30:12 uZilipa, umkhonzazana kaLeya, wamzalela uYakobi unyana wesibini."
Genesis30:13 Wathi uLeya, Ndinoyolo, ngokuba iintombi zam ziya kuthi ndinoyolo; wamthiya igama elinguAshere."
Genesis30:14 Ngelo xesha uRubhen ngemihla yokuvunwa kwengqolowa wafumana imithuma entsimini wayisa kuLeya unina. Wathi uRakeli kuLeya, Ndinike ama-apile onyana wakho."
Genesis30:15 Wathi kuye, Yinto encinane na ukuyithabatha indoda yam? kwaye nawe ufuna ukususa ama-apile othando kunyana wam? Wathi uRakeli, Kungenxa yoko le nto úya kulala nawe ngobu busuku, ngenxa yama-apile onyana wakho."
Genesis30:16 Wafika uYakobi evela ezindle ngokuhlwa, waphuma uLeya esiya kumkhawulela, wathi, Uze undingene; kuba ndikunyule ngegazi lonyana wam. Walala naye ngobo busuku."
Genesis30:17 uThixo wamphulaphula uLeya, wamitha, wazala unyana wesihlanu kaYakobi."
Genesis30:18 Wathi uLeya, uThixo undinikile umvuzo wam, ngenxa yokuba indoda yam ndiyinike umkhonzazana wam; wamthiya igama elinguIsakare."
Genesis30:19 Wabuya wamitha uLeya, wamzalela uYakobi unyana wesithandathu."
Genesis30:20 Wathi uLeya, uThixo undiphe isipho esilungileyo; ngoku indoda yam iya kuhlala nam, kuba ndiyizalele oonyana abathandathu; wamthiya igama elinguZebhulon."
Genesis30:21 Emva koko wazala intombi waza wayithiya igama elinguDina.
Genesis30:22 uThixo wamkhumbula uRakeli, uThixo wamphulaphula, wasivula isizalo sakhe."
Genesis30:23 Wamitha, wazala unyana; Wathi, uThixo ulisusile ihlazo lam."
Genesis30:24 Wamthiya igama elinguYosefu; Wathi, uYehova makongezelele omnye unyana."
Genesis30:25 Kwathi, akuba ezelwe uYosefu, wathi uYakobi kuLabhan, Ndindulule ndigoduke ezweni lakowethu."
Genesis30:26 Ndinike abafazi bam nabantwana bam endikukhonze ngenxa yabo, ndihambe; ngokuba wena uyayazi inkonzo yam endikukhonze ngayo."
Genesis30:27 Wathi uLabhan kuye, Ukuba ndibonise inceba emehlweni akho, hlala; ngokuba ndiyazi ukuba uYehova undisikelele ngenxa yakho."
Genesis30:28 Wathi, Ndinyulele umvuzo wenu, ndininike wona."
Genesis30:29 Wathi kuye, Uyalwazi nawe uhlobo ebendikukhonze ngalo, nohlobo lokuhlala kwempahla yakho emfutshane kum."
Genesis30:30 Ngokuba ubunayo ndingekafiki yabe imbalwa, ngoku izazekile yaninzi; yaye uYehova ukusikelele ukususela ekufikeni kwam; ngoku ndoyihoya nini indlu yam?"
Genesis30:31 Wathi, Ndikunike ntoni na? Wathi uYakobi, Musa ukundinika nento le; ukuba uyathanda ukundenzela oko, ndobuya ndaluse, ndixhele umhlambi wakho."
Genesis30:32 Ndiya kucanda namhlanje phakathi kwemihlambi yakho yonke, ndikhethe khona zonke iinkomo neemazi zonke, neemazi zonke ezimdaka phakathi kweegusha neebhokhwe; kwaye lo uya kuba ngumvuzo wam."
Genesis30:33 Kuba ubulungisa bam buya kundiphendula ngemihla ezayo, xa ndiza kuwufumana umvuzo wam phambi kobuso bakho: onke atyetyisiweyo, namfutshane phakathi kweebhokhwe, naphakathi kweegusha, kuthiwe abiwe kum."
Genesis30:34 Wathi uLabhan, Yabona, makube ngokwelizwi lakho oko."
Genesis30:35 Wazinyula ngaloo mini zonke izikhova ezingwevu nezingwevu, zonke izikhova ezingwevu nezingwevu, nazo zonke ezimhlophe phakathi kwazo, nezona zimfutshane phakathi kwezimvu, wazibeka esandleni soonyana bakhe."
Genesis30:36 Wamisa uhambo lweentsuku ezintathu phakathi kwakhe noYakobi; uYakobi walusa eseleyo ke impahla emfutshane kaLabhan.
Genesis30:37 uYakobi wathabatha iintonga zompopulari omanzi, nezomnquma, nezompleyini; waza wawuzalisa ngeentambo ezimhlophe, waza wabangela ukuba kubonakale ubumhlophe obabukwilaphu."
Genesis30:38 Wazibeka ezityeni zokusela xa impahla emfutshane isiza kusela, phambi kwempahla emfutshane, phambi kwempahla emfutshane, ukuba imithi, ekuseleni kwayo, phambi kwempahla emfutshane."
Genesis30:39 Wamitha umhlambi weenkomo phambi kwesibonda, wazala iimazi zeenkomo ezityebileyo, ezigudileyo, ezigudileyo."
Genesis30:40 Wawahlula uYakobi amatakane lawo, wabukhangelisa ubuso bempahla emfutshane kwenemizila, nemdaka phakathi kwempahla emfutshane kaLabhan; wayibeka ecaleni impahla yakhe emfutshane, akayibeka empahleni emfutshane kaLabhan."
Genesis30:41 Kwathi, xa zimithiyo iimazi ezomeleleyo, uYakobi wabeka imbewu emhlabeni phambi kweemazi ezilapho emijelweni, ukuze zime phakathi kweentsuba."
Genesis30:42 Ukuba imbalwa impahla emfutshane, makangàzisi; Kwaba njalo ke koswele amandla kaLabhan, nakokomelela kukaYakobi."
Genesis30:43 Yanda loo ndoda yanda kunene, yaba nemfuyo eninzi, nabakhonzazana, nabakhonzi, neenkamela, namaesile."
Genesis31:1 Ke kaloku waweva amazwi oonyana bakaLabhan, ababesithi, uYakobi uzithabathile zonke izinto zikabawo; yaye ubufumene kwinto awayeyiyo ubawo."
Genesis31:2 Wabubona uYakobi ubuso bukaLabhan, ukuba busephezu kwakhe njengokwangaphambili."
Genesis31:3 Wathi uYehova kuYakobi, Buyela ezweni looyihlo, nasendlwini yakho; kwaye ndiya kuba nawe."
Genesis31:4 uYakobi wathumela ukuba kubizwe uRakeli noLeya emhlambini wakhe.
Genesis31:5 Wathi kubo, Ndiyabubona ubuso bukayihlo, ukuba akusanjengezolo nezolo elinye kum; kodwa uThixo kabawo wayenam."
Genesis31:6 Niyazi nina, ukuba uyihlo ndimkhonze ngamandla am onke;"
Genesis31:7 Uyihlo wandixokisa, wawuguqula kalishumi umvuzo wam; kodwa uThixo akamvumelanga ukuba andiphathe kakubi."
Genesis31:8 Ukuba kuthiwa, Bambalwa abaya kuba ngumvuzo wenu; Yathi yonke imihlambi yeengubo ezirhwexayo; Ukuba uthe, Imivumbo yoba ngumvuzo wenu; ngoku yonke imihlambi inemizila."
Genesis31:9 Wayithabatha ke uThixo imfuyo kayihlo, wandinika."
Genesis31:10 Xa iimazi zeenkomo zamitha, ndawaphakamisa amehlo am ndaza ndakhangela ephupheni, yaye ndabona iinkunzi zeegusha zigxalathelana emhlambini, zikhala, zikhala, yaye zikhala."
Genesis31:11 Sathetha nam isithunywa sikaThixo ephupheni, sathi, Yakobi, ndithe, Ndikho;"
Genesis31:12 Wathi, Khawuwamise amehlo akho, ubone; zonke iinkunzi zezimvu ezalusayo zibhityile, zikhala, zincwine; ngokuba ndiyibonile yonke into ayenzayo uLabhan."
Genesis31:13 NdinguThixo waseBheteli, apho walithambisa khona ilitye lesikhumbuzo nalapho wafunga khona kum; yimani ngoku, niphume kweli lizwe, nibuyele ezweni labazalwana benu."
Genesis31:14 Baphendula uRakeli noLeya, bathi kuye, Sisenasabelo nalifa lini na endlwini kabawo?"
Genesis31:15 Asingeniswa njengabasemzini na kuye? ngokuba wasithengisa, wayihlutha imali yethu."
Genesis31:16 Kuba bonke ubutyebi awabuthabathayo uThixo kubawo, bube bobethu, noboonyana bethu; yenza ngoku konke uThixo akuthethileyo kuwe."
Genesis31:17 Wesuka uYakobi wabakhwelisa oonyana bakhe, nabafazi bakhe, ezinkameleni;"
Genesis31:18 Wathabatha yonke imfuyo yakhe nayo yonke impahla yakhe awayeyifumene, umhlambi wakhe weenkomo awayewufumene ePadan-aram ukuze aye kuIsake uyise ezweni lakwaKanan."
Genesis31:19 uLabhan ubeye kucheba impahla yakhe emfutshane; uRakeli wayiba imilonde-khaya kayise.
Genesis31:20 uYakobi wamfihla uLabhan umAram, engazi, akamxelela ukuba uyabaleka."
Genesis31:21 Wabaleka neento zonke abenazo; wemka, wawuwela umlambo, wabubhekisa ubuso bakhe ezintabeni zaseGiliyadi."
Genesis31:22 Kwathi ngomhla wesithathu, waxelelwa uLabhan ukuba uYakobi ubalekile."
Genesis31:23 Wabathabatha abazalwana bakhe, wamsukela, wahamba uhambo lweentsuku ezisixhenxe; bambamba ezintabeni zaseGiliyadi."
Genesis31:24 Weza uThixo kuLabhan umAram ephupheni ebusuku, wathi kuye, Zilinde, ungathethi nto kuYakobi, nokuba yelungileyo nokuba yembi."
Genesis31:25 uLabhan wadibana noYakobi. uYakobi wayimisa intente yakhe phezu kwentaba, uLabhan nabazalwana bakhe bamisa entabeni yaseGiliyadi."
Genesis31:26 Wathi uLabhan kuYakobi, Wenza ntoni na, uzibambile iintombi zam nje ngekrele?"
Genesis31:27 Yini na ukuba ubaleke ngokuzola, uyeba? ubungatshongo kum ukuba ngendikubuyisile ngovuyo nangeengoma, iitamals neziqhithi?"
Genesis31:28 Yini na ukuba ungandivumeli ndibange oonyana bam neentombi zam? wenze into yobudenge.
Genesis31:29 Kusemandleni esandla sam ukwenza ububi; ke uThixo kayihlo uthethe nam phezolo, wathi, Zilinde, ungathethi nto kuYakobi, nokuba yelungileyo nokuba yembi."
Genesis31:30 Ngoku ke umke nje, ngokuba wawulangazelela indlu kayihlo, uzibeleni na zona izithixo zam?"
Genesis31:31 Waphendula uYakobi wathi kuLabhan, Bendisoyika, ndathi, Hleze uzixhakamfule kum iintombi zakho."
Genesis31:32 Osukuba uzifumana kuye izithixo zakho, makangadli bomi. Kuba uYakobi wayengazi ukuba uRakeli uzibile."
Genesis31:33 Wangena uLabhan ententeni kaYakobi, nasententeni kaLeya, nasententeni yeempelesi zombini; akazifumana. Waphuma ententeni kaLeya, wangena ententeni kaRakeli."
Genesis31:34 uRakeli wayithabatha imifanekiso, wayifaka phakathi kwengubo yenkamela, wahlala phezu kwayo. uLabhan wayiphuthaphutha yonke intente, akayifumana."
Genesis31:35 Wathi kuyise, Mawungabi namsindo, Nkosi yam, kuba ndingenako ukuma phambi kwakho; ngokuba ikum isidima sabafazi. Wagqogqa, akafumana mifanekiso."
Genesis31:36 Wacaphuka uYakobi, wamdubadubeka uLabhan. Waphendula uYakobi wathi kuLabhan, Buyintoni na ubugwenxa bam? Siyintoni na isono sam, ukuba undenze nzima kangaka?"
Genesis31:37 Xa ubuzifuna zonke izinto zam, wafumana ntoni na yazo zonke iimpahla zendlu yakho? yibeke apha phambi kwamawethu, ukuze basigwebe sobabini."
Genesis31:38 Ndibe nawe le minyaka imashumi mabini; Impahla yakho emfutshane, neenciniba zakho azidlanga, neenkunzi zempahla yakho emfutshane andizidlanga."
Genesis31:39 Into eqwengiweyo andiyizisanga kuwe, ndayimisela ngokwam; Ndiyithwele ilahleko yayo; uyayifuna esandleni sam, nokuba ibibiwe emini okanye ebusuku."
Genesis31:40 Ndaba njalo; Emini komile kwaye ebusuku kubanda; ubuthongo bam bebungekho emehlweni am.
Genesis31:41 Kwaba minyaka imashumi mabini endlwini yakho; ndakukhonza iminyaka elishumi elinamine ngenxa yeentombi zakho zombini, iminyaka emithandathu ngenxa yemfuyo yakho; uwuguqule kalishumi umvuzo wam."
Genesis31:42 Ukuba uThixo kabawo, uThixo ka-Abraham, Ohlonelwa nguIsake, waba nam, ngendithabathe mna ndedwa. uThixo uzibonile iintsizi zam nomsebenzi wezandla zam, wakukhalimela phezolo."
Genesis31:43 uLabhan wamphendula uYakobi, wathi, Ezi ntombi ziintombi zam, aba oonyana ngoonyana bam, amathokazi lawo ngamathokazi am, neento zonke ozibonayo zezam; Nanamhla oku ndingathini ngezi ntombi zam, nabantwana bazo ezibazeleyo?"
Genesis31:44 Khawuze senze umnqophiso, mna nawe; ube lingqina phakathi kwam nawe."
Genesis31:45 uYakobi wathabatha ilitye, waliphakamisa lasisimiso."
Genesis31:46 Wathi uYakobi kubazalwana bakhe, Cholani amatye; bathabatha amatye, benza imfumba; badla khona imfumba."
Genesis31:47 Wathi ukuyibiza uLabhan yiYegare-sahaduta, uYakobi wathi ukuyibiza yiGalet."
Genesis31:48 Wathi uLabhan, Eli themba namhla libubungqina phakathi kwam nawe. Ke ngoko, igama lawo kwathiwa yiGaledi;"
Genesis31:49 neMizpa; ngokuba wathi, uYehova ubonisele phakathi kwam nawe, xa singasekhoyo."
Genesis31:50 Ukuba uthe wazicinezela iintombi zam, nokuba uthe wazeka abafazi phezu kweentombi zam, akukho bani unathi. Yabona, uThixo ulingqina phakathi kwam nawe."
Genesis31:51 Wathi uLabhan kuYakobi, Nali ke ithemba, nali ke ilitye lesikhumbuzo endiliqilileyo phakathi kwam nawe;"
Genesis31:52 Le ntembeko mayibe bubungqina, kwaye eli litye lesikhumbuzo libe bubungqina, bokuba andiyi kunikela le ntembeko kuni, nokokuba aniyi kuyisusa le nkoloseko neli litye lokundikhumbuza ukuba lenze ububi."
Genesis31:53 Wanga uThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaNakore, uThixo woyise wabo, asigwebe. Wafunga uYakobi ngokoyikeka kukayise uIsake."
Genesis31:54 uYakobi wabingelela umbingelelo entabeni apho, wabiza abazalwana bakhe, ukuba beze badle isonka. Badla isonka, balala entabeni apho."
Genesis31:55 Wavuka uLabhan kusasa, wabanga oonyana bakhe, neentombi zakhe, wabasikelela; Wemka ke uLabhan, wabuyela endlwini yakhe."
Genesis32:1 Wemka ke uYakobi, zaqubisana naye izithunywa zikaThixo."
Genesis32:2 Wabona uYakobi, wathi, Ngawo la amatyala kaThixo; wathi igama laloo ndawo yiMahanayim."
Genesis32:3 uYakobi wathuma abathunywa phambi kwakhe kuEsawu, umkhuluwa wakhe, ezweni lakwaSehire, ezweni lakwaEdom."
Genesis32:4 Wabawisela umthetho, wathi, Thethani kuEsawu, nkosi yam; Wathi umkhonzi wakho uYakobi, Bendingumphambukeli kuLabhan, ndahlala khona kwada kwangoku."
Genesis32:5 Ndineenkomo namaesile, nempahla emfutshane, nabakhonzi, nabakhonzazana; ndithumele ukuxelela inkosi yam loo mazwi, ukuze ndibabalwe emehlweni akho."
Genesis32:6 Babuyela abathunywa kuYakobi, bathi, Sifikile kumkhuluwa wakho uEsawu, naye uze kukukhawulela, enamadoda angamakhulu omane."
Genesis32:7 Woyika kunene uYakobi, wawahlula amadoda lawo, nempahla emfutshane, neenkomo, neenkamela;"
Genesis32:8 Wathi, Ukuba uEsawu uthe wafika kwenye isihlwele, wasichitha, abanye abantu bosinda."
Genesis32:9 Wathi uYakobi, Thixo kabawo uAbraham, Thixo kabawo uIsake, uYehova uthe kum, Buyela ezweni lakho, nasendlwini yakho, ndikwenzele okulungileyo."
Genesis32:10 Andiyilingene yonke inceba, nenyaniso yonke oyenzileyo kumkhonzi wakho; ngenxa enokuba ndayiwela le Yordan, ndinentonga yam; kwaye ngoku ndingamaqela amabini."
Genesis32:11 Ndisindise esandleni somkhuluwa wam, esandleni sikaEsawu; ngokuba ndiyamoyika, hleze afike andibethe, nomama ndawonye nabantwana."
Genesis32:12 Wathi, Ewe, ndiya kukuphatha kakuhle, imbewu yakho ndiyenze ibe njengentlabathi yolwandle, engenakubalwa ngenxa yenani layo."
Genesis32:13 Walala khona ngobo busuku; wathi ngoonyana bakhe uEsawu wamnika ukuba abe ngumnikelo;
Genesis32:14 namakhulu amabini eebhokhwe, namashumi amabini eebhokhwe, namakhulu amabini eegusha, namashumi amabini eenkunzi zeegusha;"
Genesis32:15 iinkamela ezanyayo ezimashumi mathathu, namaxhaka azo, iimazi zeenkomo ezimashumi mane, neenkunzi zeenkomo ezilishumi, namaesile amashumi mabini, namaxhaka alishumi."
Genesis32:16 Wazinikela esandleni sabakhonzi bakhe, umhlambi walowo wamnye; Wathi kubakhonzi bakhe, Phumani phambi kwam, nimise phakathi komhlambi weegusha nempahla emfutshane."
Genesis32:17 Wabawisela umthetho abathetheli, wathi, Xa uEsawu umkhuluwa wam waqubisana nani, wabuza wathi, Ungokabani na? uyaphi? yekabani na le nto iphambi kwakho?"
Genesis32:18 uthi, Leyomkhonzi wakho uYakobi; zisisipho esithunyelwe kukumkani wam uEsawu, nanko ke naye ngasemva kwethu."
Genesis32:19 Ngoko wayalela owesibini nowesithathu nabo bonke abo babelandela umhlambi, esithi: “Nitsho kuEsawu nakufumanana naye."
Genesis32:20 Nanko mkhonzi wakho uYakobi engasemva kwethu. Kuba wathi, Mandimcamagushele ngomnikelo osingwayo kuqala, ndize kamva ndibubone ubuso bakhe; mhlawumbi uya kundamkela."
Genesis32:21 Saphuma ke isipho phambi kwakhe, walala phakathi kweqela elo."
Genesis32:22 Wavuka ngobo busuku, wathabatha abafazi bakhe bobabini, nabakhonzazana bakhe bobabini noonyana bakhe abalishumi elinamnye, wayiwela intili yeYabhoko;"
Genesis32:23 Wabathabatha, wabaseza umlambo, wazithumela nezo abenazo."
Genesis32:24 uYakobi wasala yedwa; Yazamana indoda naye kwada kwasa.
Genesis32:25 Yabona ukuba ayimeyisi, yachukumisa umlambo womlambo wakhe; Yatshona ingcambu yesinqe sikaYakobi ngokuzamana kwakhe naye."
Genesis32:26 Wathi, Ndilinde, kuba ilanga liyaphuma. Wathi: Andikukhulula, awukandisikelele."
Genesis32:27 Yathi kuye, Ungubani na igama lakho? Wathi, Yakobi!"
Genesis32:28 Wathi, Igama lakho akusayi kuba sathiwa nguYakobi;"
Genesis32:29 Wabuza uYakobi wathi, Ndixelele igama lakho. Wathi ke yena, Yini na ukuba ulibuze igama lam? wamsikelela khona."
Genesis32:30 uYakobi wathi loo ndawo yiPeniyeli; ngokuba ndibonene noThixo, wahlangulwa umphefumlo wam."
Genesis32:31 Uthe akudlula ePniel, lakhanya ilanga phezu kwakhe, wema esinqeni sakhe."
Genesis32:32 Kungenxa yoko le nto oonyana bakaSirayeli bengasidli isihlunu esisethangeni loMlambo umNayile de kube namhla, ngenxa yokuba wachukumisa ithambo lomlenze kaYakobi emsipheni owomileyo."
Genesis33:1 Wawavala uYakobi amehlo akhe, wabona, nanko uEsawu esiza, enamadoda angamakhulu omane. Wabahlula uLeya noRakeli neempelesi zombini."
Genesis33:2 Wabeka abakhonzazana nabantwana babo ngaphambili, uLeya nabantwana bakhe emva kwakhe, uRakeli noYosefu emva kwakhe."
Genesis33:3 Wabakhokela, waqubuda kasixhenxe, wada waya kumkhuluwa wakhe."
Genesis33:4 Wagidima uEsawu esiya kumkhawulela, wamwola, wawa entanyeni yakhe, wamanga; balila."
Genesis33:5 Wawaphakamisa amehlo akhe, wabona abafazi nabantwana; Athi: Ngubani na lo unawe? Wathi, Ngabantwana, athe uThixo wabanika umkhonzi wakho ngenceba."
Genesis33:6 Zafika iimpelesi, zona nabantwana bazo, zaqubuda."
Genesis33:7 Wasondela uLeya nabantwana bakhe, baqubuda; emva koko basondela uYosefu noRakeli, baqubuda."
Genesis33:8 Wathi, Iyintoni na yonke le mihlambi endiyikhawulelayo? Wathi, Mabababalwe emehlweni okumkani wam."
Genesis33:9 Wathi uEsawu, Ndanele, mninawa; gcina oko unako."
Genesis33:10 Wathi uYakobi, Hayi; kuba ngenxa yoko ndibubone ubuso bakho, ngathi ndiyabubona ubuso bukaThixo, ukanti uyandicekisa."
Genesis33:11 Thabatha intsikelelo yam ezisiweyo kuwe; ngokuba uThixo unenceba kum, ndonele. Wamjoka, wavuma."
Genesis33:12 Wathi, Masihambe, sihambe, ndonikhokelela kwangoku."
Genesis33:13 Wathi ke kuye, iNkosi yam iyazi ukuba abantwana bathantamisa, nokuba ndinemihlambi yempahla emfutshane, neyeenkomo, neyegusha;"
Genesis33:14 Inkosi yam mayiwele phambi komkhonzi wayo, yaye mna ndohamba kancinci njengomhlambi owela phambi kwam, yaye ndiya kubathwala abantwana ndide ndifike enkosini yam uSehire."
Genesis33:15 Wathi uEsawu, Makhe ndiyishiye inxenye kwaba bantu ndinawe. Wathi: Ifuna ntoni? Mandibabalwe emehlweni enkosi yam."
Genesis33:16 Wabuya ngaloo mini uEsawu ngendlela yakhe, esiya kwaSehire."
Genesis33:17 uYakobi wafuduka, waya eSukoti, wazakhela indlu, iinkomo zakhe wazibiyela iintlantsi; ngenxa yoko kwathiwa igama laloo ndawo yiSukoti."
Genesis33:18 Wafika uYakobi eSalem, emzini kaShekem, ezweni lakwaKanan, ekuveleni kwakhe ePadan-aram; wayimisa intente yakhe kufuphi nesixeko."
Genesis33:19 Walithenga ilizwe abemise kulo intente yakhe, koonyana bakaHamore, uyise kaShekem, ngekhulu lemali."
Genesis33:20 Wamisa khona isibingelelo, wathi igama laso nguElohe-Israyeli."
Genesis34:1 Ke kaloku uDina, intombi kaLeya, leyo wayizalela uYakobi, waphuma waya kubona iintombi zelo zwe."
Genesis34:2 uShekem, unyana kaHamore, uMowabhi, ukumkani welizwe, wambona, wamthabatha, walala naye, wamenza inqambi."
Genesis34:3 Intliziyo yakhe yanamathela kuDina, intombi kaYakobi, wayithanda intombi leyo, wathetha kakuhle nentombi leyo."
Genesis34:4 Wathetha uShekem kuHamore uyise, wathi, Ndinike le ntombi, ibe ngumkam."
Genesis34:5 Weva uYakobi ukuba umenze inqambi uDina, intombi yakhe. Oonyana bakhe babe besendle, besemhlambini wakhe; wathi cwaka ke uYakobi, bada bafika."
Genesis34:6 Waphuma uHamore, uyise kaShekem, waya kuthetha noYakobi."
Genesis34:7 Bathi bakufika oonyana bakaYakobi ezweni, bakukuva oku, aba buhlungu amadoda lawo, aba nomsindo kakhulu, kuba wenza ubudenge kwaSirayeli ngokulala nentombi kaYakobi; into engafanele ukwenziwa."
Genesis34:8 Wathetha uHamore kubo, wathi, uShekem, unyana wam, intliziyo yonyana wam, iyayikhumbula intombi yenu;"
Genesis34:9 Nasithatha, nasinika iintombi zenu, nazeka iintombi zethu;"
Genesis34:10 Niya kuhlala nathi, ilizwe libe ngasecaleni kwenu; qhubeka urhweba ngayo, tyeba kuyo."
Genesis34:11 Wathi uShekem kuyise wenkazana leyo, nakoodade bayo, Mandibabalwe emehlweni enu, nento enithethayo kum, ndoninika yona."
Genesis34:12 Ungaze ucele khazi kum, nesipho esinje, ndokunika njengoko uthethayo kum; kodwa ndinike intombi ibe ngumfazi wam."
Genesis34:13 Oonyana bakaYakobi babaxokisa ooShekem noHamore uyise, bathi, ngokuba ebemenze inqambi uDina, udade wabo."
Genesis34:14 Bathi kubo, Asiyi kuyenza loo nto, yokuba udade wethu simnike indoda engalukanga; ngokuba ibilihlazo kuthi."
Genesis34:15 Sovumelana nani kule ndawo yokuba nithanda ukufana nathi, ngokuthi yaluke kuni yonke into eyindoda;"
Genesis34:16 Soninika ke iintombi zethu, sizeke iintombi zenu, sihlale nani, sibe luhlanga lunye."
Genesis34:17 Ukuba anisiva ukuba naluke; soyithabatha khona intombi yethu, sihambe."
Genesis34:18 Alunga amazwi abo emehlweni kaHamore, nasemehlweni kaShekem, unyana kaHamore."
Genesis34:19 Akalibala umfana ukuyenza loo nto, uba ubethabathekile yintombi kaYakobi; ibizukile yena ngaphezu kwayo yonke indlu kayise."
Genesis34:20 Bafika uHamore noShekem unyana wakhe, esangweni lesixeko sabo, bathetha kumadoda omzi wabo, bathi,"
Genesis34:21 Aba bathanda uxolo nathi; ke ngoko, mabahlale kwelo lizwe baze barhwebe khona; ngokuba ihlabathi, yabonani, bayalingana; sozizeka iintombi zawo zibe ngabafazi bethu, siwanike iintombi zethu."
Genesis34:22 Ke ngenxa yoko aya kuvumelana nathi la madoda, ukuhlala nathi, sibe luhlanga lunye, sithi, sonke ngabanye aluke, njengokuba alukile wona."
Genesis34:23 Imfuyo yawo nempahla yawo nayo yonke imfuyo yawo ayisayi kuba yeyethu na? masivumelane nabo, kwaye baya kuhlala nathi."
Genesis34:24 Bamphulaphula uHamore noShekem unyana wakhe, bonke abaphuma ngesango lomzi wakhe; yaye onke amadoda akhalinyelwa, bonke ababephuma ngesango lesixeko sakowabo."
Genesis34:25 Kwathi ngomhla wesithathu, bakuba bebandezelekile, oonyana ababini bakaYakobi, uSimon noLevi, abanakwabo boDina, bathabatha walowo ikrele lakhe, behla baya kuloo mzi ngokungafihlisiyo, bawabulala onke amadoda."
Genesis34:26 Bambulala ke uHamore, noShekem unyana wakhe, ngohlangothi lwekrele, bamthabatha uDina endlwini kaShekem, bemka."
Genesis34:27 Oonyana bakaYakobi beza kwababuleweyo, bawuphanga umzi, ngokuba bebemenze inqambi udade wabo."
Genesis34:28 Impahla yabo emfutshane, neenkomo zabo, namaesile abo, nabebekukho phakathi komzi, nabasemaphandleni, bazithabatha;"
Genesis34:29 Bathabatha bonke ubutyebi babo, nabantwana babo bonke, nabafazi babo, baphanga neento zonke ebe zisendlwini."
Genesis34:30 Wathi uYakobi kuSimon noLevi, Nindisongela, ukuba nindonakalise phakathi kwabemi beli lizwe, phakathi kwamaKanan namaPersi; Ndimncinane ke ngenani, baya kundihlanganyela, bandibulale; yaye ndiya kutshabalala, mna nendlu yam."
Genesis34:31 Bathi bona, Udade wethu yihenyukazi na?"
Genesis35:1 Wathi uThixo kuYakobi, Hamba unyuke uye eBheteli, uhlale khona, umkhele khona isibingelelo uThixo, owazibonakalisayo kuwe ekubalekeni kwakho kuEsawu, umkhuluwa wakho."
Genesis35:2 Wathi ke uYakobi kwindlu yakhe, nakubo bonke ababenaye, Susani izithixo zasemzini eziphakathi kwenu; zihlambulukeni, ninxibe iingubo zenu."
Genesis35:3 Masisuke, sinyuke siye eBheteli; ndenzele khona isibingelelo kuThixo, owandiphendula ngemini yokubandezelwa kwam, owayenam endleleni endandihamba ngayo."
Genesis35:4 Bazinika uYakobi zonke izithixo zasemzini ezandleni zabo, namajikazi ezindlebeni zabo; waza uYakobi wazifihla phantsi komthi wesikamore owawukwaShekem."
Genesis35:5 Anduluka, yaye ukoyika uThixo kwabakho kwimizi ngeenxa zonke kubo, ayabasukela oonyana bakaYakobi."
Genesis35:6 Wafika uYakobi eLuzi, esezweni lakwaKanan, oko kukuthi, iBheteli, nabantu bonke abenabo."
Genesis35:7 Wakha khona isibingelelo, wathi igama laloo ndawo yiElibhetele;"
Genesis35:8 Wafa ke uDebhora, umanyisikazi kaRebheka, wangcwatyelwa phantsi kweBheteli, phantsi kom-oki, kwathiwa igama layo nguAlonbhakuti."
Genesis35:9 uThixo wabuya wabonakala kuYakobi ekuveleni kwakhe ePadan-aram, wamsikelela."
Genesis35:10 Wathi uThixo kuye, Igama lakho nguYakobi; akusayi kuba sathiwa igama lakho nguYakobi, kuya kuthiwa igama lakho nguSirayeli; wamthiya igama elinguSirayeli."
Genesis35:11 Wathi uThixo kuye, NdinguThixo, uSomandla; nande nande; kuya kuphuma kuwe iintlanga neentlanga, nookumkani baphume esinqeni sakho;"
Genesis35:12 Ilizwe endalinika uAbraham noIsake ndiza kulinika wena, ndilinike imbewu yakho emva kwakho."
Genesis35:13 Wenyuka uThixo, wemka kuye, waya kuloo ndawo abethethe naye kuyo;"
Genesis35:14 uYakobi wamisa ilitye lesikhumbuzo kuloo ndawo abethethe naye kuyo, ilitye lesikhumbuzo; wagalela phezu kwayo umnikelo othululwayo, wagalela neoli phezu kwayo."
Genesis35:15 uYakobi wathi igama laloo ndawo, uThixo abethethe naye kuyo, yiBheteli."
Genesis35:16 Banduluka eBheteli; yaye kwakusemganyana ukuba sifike e-Efrata, yaye uRakeli waba sentlungwini yokuzala, wazala kakhulu."
Genesis35:17 Kwathi, kwaba kuzala kwakhe, wathi umzalisikazi kuye, Musa ukoyika; nawe uya kuba naye lo nyana."
Genesis35:18 Waphuma umoya wakhe, akuba efile, wathi nguBhenoni igama lakhe; ke yena uyise wathi nguBhenjamin."
Genesis35:19 Wafa ke uRakeli, wangcwatyelwa endleleni yomEfrati, eyiBhetelehem ke leyo."
Genesis35:20 uYakobi wamisa ilitye lesikhumbuzo phezu kwengcwaba lakhe; lilitye lesikhumbuzo lengcwaba likaRakeli unanamhla.
Genesis35:21 Wemka ke uSirayeli, wayimisa intente yakhe malunga nenqaba ende yakwa-Edare."
Genesis35:22 Akuba ehleli kwelo zwe uSirayeli, uRubhen walala noBhiliha, ishweshwe likayise, weva uSirayeli. Oonyana bakaYakobi babelishumi elinababini;"
Genesis35:23 Oonyana bakaLeya; noRubhen amazibulo kaYakobi, noSimon, noLevi, noYuda, noIsakare, noZebhulon;"
Genesis35:24 Oonyana bakaRakeli nguAsheri; uYosefu noBhenjamin:
Genesis35:25 Oonyana bakaBhiliha, umkhonzazana kaRakeli; uDan noNafetali:"
Genesis35:26 noonyana bakaZilipa, umkhonzazana kaLeya; nguGadi noAshere: Ngabo abo oonyana bakaYakobi awabazalelwa ePadan-aram."
Genesis35:27 uYakobi waya kuIsake uyise, uMamre, eKiriyati ka-Arbha, eHebron, apho babehleli khona uAbraham noIsake."
Genesis35:28 Imihla kaIsake yaba yiminyaka elikhulu elinamanci asibhozo.
Genesis35:29 Wafa ke uIsake, wasiwa ebantwini bakowabo, eseleluphele eselekhulile, bamngcwaba oonyana bakhe uEsawu noYakobi."
Genesis36:1 Zizo ezi izizwe zakwaEsawu, nguEdom ke lowo."
Genesis36:2 uEsawu wabazeka abafazi bakhe ezintombini zakwaKanan; uAda, intombi kaElon umHeti, noAholibhama, intombi ka-Ana, intombi kaTsibheyon umHeti;"
Genesis36:3 noBhasemati, intombi kaIshmayeli, udade boNebhayoti."
Genesis36:4 uAda wazala uEsawu uElifazi; uBhasemati wazala uRehuweli;
Genesis36:5 uOholibhama wazala uYehushe, noYalam, noKora; Ngabo abo oonyana bakaEsawu, awabazalelwayo ezweni lakwaKanan."
Genesis36:6 uEsawu wabathabatha abafazi bakhe, noonyana bakhe, neentombi zakhe, nabantu bonke bendlu yakhe, nemfuyo yakhe, nemfuyo yakhe yonke, nengqwebo yakhe yonke awayifumanayo ezweni lakwaKanan; yaye wangena ehlabathini phambi kobuso bukaYakobi umntakwabo."
Genesis36:7 Kuba buninzi ubutyebi babo, kunokuba babe ngahlali ndawonye; yaye ilizwe ababekulo lalingenakulithwala ngenxa yemfuyo yabo."
Genesis36:8 Wahlala uEsawu entabeni yakwaSehire: uEsawu nguEdom.
Genesis36:9 Yiyo le ke inzala kaEsawu, uyise wamaEdom, ezintabeni zakwaSehire."
Genesis36:10 Ngawo la amagama oonyana bakaEsawu: nguEsahim; uElifazi, unyana ka-Ada, umkaEsawu, uRehuweli, unyana kaBhashmati, umkaEsawu."
Genesis36:11 Oonyana bakaElifazi nguTeman, no-Omare, noSefo, noGatam, noKenazi."
Genesis36:12 uTimna waba sisithende sikaElifazi, unyana kaEsawu; wazala uElifazi, uAmaleki. Ngabo abo oonyana baka-Ada, umkaEsawu."
Genesis36:13 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaRehuweli; nguNahati noSeraki, nguShama noMisa; Ngabo abo oonyana bakaBhashmati, umkaEsawu."
Genesis36:14 Ngabo abo oonyana baka-Aholibhama, intombi ka-Ana, intombi kaTsibheyon, umkaEsawu; wazala uEsawu, noYehus, noYalam, noKora."
Genesis36:15 Zizo ezi iinkosana zoonyana bakaEsawu: Oonyana bakaElifazi, amazibulo kaEsawu, ngunyana wakhe; uDuke uTeman, uDuke uOmar, uDuke uZepho, uDuke Kenaz,"
Genesis36:16 Inganga uKora, isikhulu esinguGatam, inganga yama-Amaleki; ngabo abo abathetheli abavela kwaElifazi ezweni lakwaEdom; Ngabo abo oonyana baka-Ada."
Genesis36:17 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaRehuweli, unyana kaEsawu; ukumkani uNahati, isikhulu uSeraki, isikhulu esinguShama, isikhulu uMisa; Ngabo abo oonyana bakaBhashmati, umkaEsawu."
Genesis36:18 Ngabo abo oonyana baka-Aholibhama, umkaEsawu; inkosana uYeuse, inkosana uYalam, inkosana uKora; zizo ezo izikhulu zika-Oholibhama, intombi ka-Ana, umkaEsawu."
Genesis36:19 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaEsawu, nguEdom ke lowo, neenkosana zabo ke ezo."
Genesis36:20 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaSehire, uMahore, ababemi kwelo zwe; uLotan, noShobhali, noTsibheyon, noAna;"
Genesis36:21 nguDishon, noEzere, noDishan: zizo ezo izikhulu zamaHori, oonyana bakaSehire, ezweni lakwaEdom."
Genesis36:22 Oonyana bakaLotan nguHori noHemam; yaye udade boLotan yayinguTimna.
Genesis36:23 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaShobale; noAlvane, noManahati, noEbhali, noTsefo, no-Onam."
Genesis36:24 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaTsibheyon; nguAya noAna: nguAna wafumanana noondlebende entlango, xa ebesalusa amaesile kaTsibheyon uyise;"
Genesis36:25 Ngabo abo oonyana baka-Ana; uDishon no-Aholibhama intombi ka-Ana.
Genesis36:26 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaDishon; iHemdan kunye ne-Esbane kunye neJitran neKerane.
Genesis36:27 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaEzere; uBilhan kunye noSaavan kunye noAkan.
Genesis36:28 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaDisane; Utse kunye noAran.
Genesis36:29 Zizo ezo izikhulu zamaHori; noLotan, isikhulu esinguShobhali, isikhulu esinguSibheyon, nesikhulu uAna;"
Genesis36:30 inkulu yakwaDishon, inkulu yakwaEzere, inkulu yakwaDishan; zizo ezo izikhulu zaseHore, nabathetheli bazo ezweni lakwaSehire."
Genesis36:31 Ngabo aba ookumkani ababelawula ezweni lakwaEdom, kungekabikho oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Genesis36:32 uBhela, unyana kaBhehore, waye walawula kwaEdom, yaye igama lomzi wakhe laliyiDinabha."
Genesis36:33 Wafa uBhela, wathi uYobhabhi, unyana kaSeraki, waseBhotsera, waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe."
Genesis36:34 Wafa uYobhabhi, wathi uHusam, wasezweni lakwaTeman, walawula esikhundleni sakhe."
Genesis36:35 Wafa uHusam, wathi uHadade, unyana kaBhedadi, owawabulalayo amaMidiyan ezweni lakwaMowabhi, walawula esikhundleni sakhe; yaye igama lomzi wakhe laliyiAwiti."
Genesis36:36 Wafa uHadade, kwalawula uSamla waseMasereka esikhundleni sakhe."
Genesis36:37 Wafa uSamla, wathi uSawule, waseRehobhoti yoMlambo, walawula esikhundleni sakhe."
Genesis36:38 Wafa uSawule, kwalawula uBhahali-hanan, unyana ka-Akebhore, esikhundleni sakhe."
Genesis36:39 Wafa uBhahali-hanan, unyana ka-Akebhore, wathi uHadare walawula esikhundleni sakhe; Igama lomzi wakhe yiPawu; Igama lomkakhe lalinguMehetabheli, intombi kaMatrede, intombi kaMeshahabhi."
Genesis36:40 Ngawo lawo amagama ezikhulu ezaphuma kuEsawu ngokwezindlu zazo, nangeendawo zazo, nangamagama azo: inkosana uTimna, inkosana uAlva, inkosana uJetet,"
Genesis36:41 iNkosana u-Oholibhama, noEla, neNkosana uPinone,"
Genesis36:42 neNkosana uKenazi, neNkosana uTemane, neNkosana uMibhetsare;"
Genesis36:43 Inkosi yaseMagadiyeli, iNkosana uIram. Zizo ezo izikhulu zakwaEdom, ngokweendawo zazo zokuhlala ezweni lelifa lazo: nguEsawu ke uyise wamaEdom."
Genesis37:1 uYakobi wayehlala eKanana kwelo lizwe wayemi kulo uyise.
Genesis37:2 Yiyo le ke inzala kaYakobi. uYosefu, ominyaka ilishumi linesixhenxe ezelwe, wayesalusa impahla emfutshane ndawonye nabakhuluwa bakhe; Unyana wayenoonyana bakaBhiliha, noonyana bakaZilipa, abafazi bakayise; uYosefu wambikela uyise udaba olubi."
Genesis37:3 uSirayeli wayemthanda uYosefu ngaphezu kwabo bonke oonyana bakhe, ngokuba ebengunyana ngeminyaka yakhe; wamenzela ingubo eqaqambileyo;"
Genesis37:4 Xa abantakwabo babona ukuba uyise wayemthanda ngaphezu kwabo bonke abantakwabo, bamthiya baza ababa nakuthetha naye ngoxolo."
Genesis37:5 uYosefu waphupha iphupha, wabaxelela abakhuluwa bakhe, bamthiya ngakumbi."
Genesis37:6 Wathi kubo, Liveni iphupha endiliphuphileyo."
Genesis37:7 Yabona, besithunga izithungu entsimini, sabona isithungu sam sema bhuxe; yabona, abaninzi kuni bema ngeenxa zonke, baqubuda phambi kweqashiso lam."
Genesis37:8 Bathi abazalwana bakhe kuye, Yinene na ukuba uya kusilawula? Okanye uya kusilawula ngenene? Kwaba kukhona bamthiyayo ngenxa yamaphupha akhe nangenxa yamazwi akhe."
Genesis37:9 Waphupha elinye iphupha, wabaxelela abakhuluwa bakhe, wathi, Yabonani, ndiphuphe elinye iphupha; nalo ilanga nenyanga neenkwenkwezi ezilishumi elinanye ziguqe phambi kwam."
Genesis37:10 Wakuxela kuyise nabazalwana bakhe oko; uyise wamkhalimela, wathi kuye, Liphupha lini na eli uliphuphileyo? Ngaba ngokwenene mna nonyoko nabantakwenu siza kuqubuda kuwe?"
Genesis37:11 Abakhuluwa bakhe bammonela ke; kodwa uyise waligcina elo lizwi.
Genesis37:12 Abakhuluwa bakhe babesalusa impahla emfutshane kaShekem uyise.
Genesis37:13 Wathi uSirayeli kuYosefu, Benditshilo na ukuthi, Abakhuluwa bakho bayigcinile yakwaShekem? yiza, ndikuthume kubo. Wathi ke yena kuye, Ndilapha."
Genesis37:14 Wathi kuye, Hamba uye kukhangela ukuphila kwabakhuluwa bakho nempahla emfutshane; ubuye undizisele ilizwi. Wamthuma ke, emsusa entilini yaseHebron, wafika kwaShekem."
Genesis37:15 Wafunyanwa ngumfo, ebhadula emaphandleni; Indoda leyo yambuza yathi, Ufuna ntoni na?"
Genesis37:16 Wathi, Ndifuna abakhuluwa bam; ndixelele apho balusela khona imihlambi yabo."
Genesis37:17 Wathi umfo, Bandulukile apha; kuba ndeva besithi, Masiye eDotan. uYosefu wabalandela abakhuluwa bakhe, wabafumana eDotan."
Genesis37:18 Bakumbona ke esekude, engekasondeli kubo, babhunga ukumbulala."
Genesis37:19 Bathetha omnye komnye besithi, Nanko umphuphi esiza."
Genesis37:20 Yizani ke, simbulale, simphose komnye umhadi, sithi, Udé elinye irhamncwa, sibone ukuba aya kwenzeka ntoni na amaphupha akhe."
Genesis37:21 Weva uRubhen, wamsindisa esandleni sabo; bathi, Masingambulali."
Genesis37:22 Wathi uRubhen kubo, Ize ningaphalazi gazi; ukuze amhlangule esandleni sabo, ambuyisele kuyise."
Genesis37:23 Akufika uYosefu kubakhuluwa bakhe, bamthabatha uYosefu ingubo yakhe yangaphezulu, ingubo ende enemikhono abeyimbethe;"
Genesis37:24 Bamthabatha ke, bamjulela equleni;"
Genesis37:25 Bahlala phantsi ukuze badle isonka, yaye baphakamisa amehlo abo, bakhangela, yaye, khangela! lifika iqela lamaIshmayeli livela eGiliyadi neenkamela zalo zithwele intlaka emhlophe, ibhalsam nemore, lisendleleni yokuzisa eYiputa."
Genesis37:26 Wathi uYuda kubazalwana bakhe, Yongeza ntoni na, ukuba simbulele umninawa wethu, sifihle igazi lakhe?"
Genesis37:27 Yizani sithengise kuye ngamaIshmayeli, mazingachasana naye izandla zethu; ngokuba ngumzalwana wethu, nenyama yethu. Nabantakwabo banelisekile."
Genesis37:28 Badlula abarhwebi bamaMidiyan; bamkhupha uYosefu emhadini, bamnyusa uYosefu, bathengisa ngaye kumaIshmayeli ngeeshekele ezimashumi mabini zesilivere; bamsa uYosefu eYiputa."
Genesis37:29 Wabuyela emhadini uRubhen; nanko uYosefu engekho ngasequleni; wazikrazula iingubo zakhe.
Genesis37:30 Wabuyela kubaninawa bakhe, wathi, Umfana akakho; Mna ke ndosuka ndiye phi na?"
Genesis37:31 Bayithabatha ingubo kaYosefu, baxhela itakane lebhokhwe, bayithi nkxu ingubo egazini;"
Genesis37:32 Bathumela ingubo ende enemikhono, bayizisa kuyise; bathi, Siyifumene; Yazi ngoku ukuba yingubo yonyana wakho, asiyiyo, kusini na."
Genesis37:33 Wazi, wathi, Le ngubo yeyonyana wam; udliwe lirhamncwa; Ngokungathandabuzekiyo, uYosefu waqwengwa."
Genesis37:34 uYakobi wazikrazula iingubo zakhe, wabopha ezirhwexayo esinqeni sakhe, wamlilela unyana wakhe imihla emininzi."
Genesis37:35 Besuka besuka bonke oonyana bakhe nazo zonke iintombi zakhe, beza kumthuthuzela; akavuma ukuthuthuzeleka; Wathi: Ndiya kuhla ndiye kwelabafileyo, ndilile unyana wam. Ngoko uyise wamlilela."
Genesis37:36 AmaMidiyan athengisa ngaye eYiputa kuPotifare, umthetheli-waka kaFaro, umthetheli wabasiki."
Genesis38:1 Ngelo xesha uYuda wabashiya abazalwana bakhe, wahamba nenye indoda yaseAdulam, egama linguHira."
Genesis38:2 uYuda wabona khona intombi yendoda engumKanan, egama linguShuwa; Wamthatha wamngena."
Genesis38:3 Wamitha, wazala unyana; Wathi igama lakhe nguEre."
Genesis38:4 Wabuya wamitha, wazala unyana; Wathi igama lakhe nguOnan."
Genesis38:5 Wabuya wamitha, wazala unyana; Wamthiya igama elinguSela, waye eseKesibe ukumzala kwakhe."
Genesis38:6 uYuda wamzeka uEre, izibulo lakhe, intombi egama linguTamare;"
Genesis38:7 uEre, owamazibulo kaYuda, ebengumntu mbi emehlweni kaYehova; uYehova wambulala."
Genesis38:8 Wathi uYuda kuOnan, Yiya nomfazi womntakwenu, umngene, umzalele umntakwenu abantwana."
Genesis38:9 Wayesazi uOnan ukuba imbewu ayiyi kuba yeyakhe; wathi akungena kumfazi womninawa wakhe, wazikhahlela emhlabeni, ukuba angamniki mbewu umkhuluwa wakhe."
Genesis38:10 Loo nto wayenzayo yayimbi emehlweni kaYehova; ngoko ke, naye wambulala."
Genesis38:11 Wathi uYuda kuTamare umolokazana wakhe, Hlala ungumhlolokazi endlwini kayihlo, ade akhule uSela, unyana wam; ngokuba ethe, ukuze naye angafi njengabakhuluwa bakhe. uTamare waya kuhlala endlwini kayise."
Genesis38:12 Ekugqibeleni yafa intombi kaShuwa, umkaYuda; yaye uYuda wathuthuzeleka waza wenyuka waya kubachebi bezimvu zakhe eTimna, yena nomhlobo wakhe uHira waseAdulam."
Genesis38:13 Waxelelwa uTamare, kwathiwa, Nanko unyokozala, enyuka esiya kucheba impahla yakhe emfutshane kwaTimna."
Genesis38:14 Wazikhulula ke iingubo zobuhlolokazi bakhe, wazigqubuthela ngesigqubuthelo, wazithi wambu, wahlala ebaleni endleleni eya kwaTimna; ngokuba ebebona ukuba uSela ukhulile, akanikelwa kuye ukuba abe ngumkakhe."
Genesis38:15 uYuda wambona, waba ulihenyukazi; ngokuba ebegqubuthele ubuso."
Genesis38:16 Wathi gu bucala, waya kuye endleleni, wathi, Hamba, ndiya kuhamba nawe; (ngokuba ebengazi ukuba ngumolokazana wakhe.) Wathi, Wondinika ntoni na, ukuze ungene nam?"
Genesis38:17 Wathi, Mna ndothumela ndithabathe itakane lebhokwe elisempahleni emfutshane. Wathi: Ngaba uya kundinika isiqinisekiso de usithumele?"
Genesis38:18 Wathi, Ndikunike sibambiso sini na? Wathi, Umsesane wakho wokutywina, nezacholo zakho, nomsimelelo wakho, zisesandleni sakho. Wamnika ke, wangena kuye, wakhawula ngaye."
Genesis38:19 Wemka, wahamba, wakhulula isigqubuthelo sakhe, wambatha iingubo zobuhlolokazi bakhe."
Genesis38:20 uYuda wathumela itakane lebhokhwe ngesandla somhlobo wakhe waseAdulam, ukuze athabathe isibambiso sakhe esandleni saloo mfazi, kodwa akamfumananga."
Genesis38:21 Sabuza kubantu baloo mmandla, sathi: “Liphi na ing’awukazi ebe ngasendleleni? Bathi ke bona, Akubangwa mbulo apha."
Genesis38:22 Wabuyela kuYuda, wathi, Andimfumananga; athi ke amadoda aloo ndawo, Akuhenyuzi kule ndawo."
Genesis38:23 Wathi uYuda, Makazithabathele, ukuze singadani; yabonani, ndimthume lo mntwana, animfumana;"
Genesis38:24 Kwathi, ekupheleni kweenyanga ezintathu, waxelelwa uYuda, kwathiwa, uTamare, umolokazana wakho, ukrexezile; yabona, ukhawule ekrexeza; Wathi uYuda, Mkhupheni, atshiswe."
Genesis38:25 Akuba ezelwe, wathumela kuninazala, wathi, Ndimithi indoda abazelwe yiyo; abasebenzi."
Genesis38:26 uYuda wabazi, wathi, Ulilungisa kunam; ngokuba ndingamnikanga uSela unyana wam. Kwaye akasamazi."
Genesis38:27 Wathi akuzala, wabona amawele esizalweni sakhe."
Genesis38:28 Kwathi ekuzaleni kwakhe, wasolula isandla umzalisikazi, wathabatha umsonto obomvu wegazi esandleni sakhe, wawubopha esandleni sakhe, wathi, Lo uya kuphuma kuqala."
Genesis38:29 Uthe akuxhawula isandla sakhe, waphuma umzalwana wakhe, wathi, Uphume njani na? ke ngoko, wathiywa igama elinguParese."
Genesis38:30 Emveni koko, waphuma umninawa wakhe, ephethe inundu ebomvu ngesandla, wathi yena nguSarage."
Genesis39:1 uYosefu wehliswa wasiwa eYiputa; uPotifare, umphathiswa wabasiki, umYiputa, wamthenga esandleni samaIshmayeli, abemhlisele khona."
Genesis39:2 uYehova waba naye uYosefu, waba yindoda enempumelelo; waba sendlwini yenkosi yakhe, umYiputa."
Genesis39:3 Yabona inkosi yakhe ukuba uYehova unaye, nokuba yonke into abeyenza, uYehova ubemphumelelisa esandleni sakhe."
Genesis39:4 uYosefu wababalwa emehlweni ayo, wayilungiselela; wamenza umveleli wendlu yakhe, neento zonke ebinazo wazinikela esandleni sakhe."
Genesis39:5 Ukususela ekummiseleni kwakhe ukuba abe ngumgcini wendlu yakhe nezinto zonke anazo, uYehova wayisikelela indlu yomYiputa lowo ngenxa kaYosefu; yaye intsikelelo kaYehova yaba kuyo yonk’ into awayenayo endlwini nasemasimini."
Genesis39:6 Zonke izinto ebinazo wazishiya esandleni sikaYosefu; ubengayazi ke into abeza kuyifumana, ingesiso isonka esidlileyo. Yaye uYosefu wayeyinzwana, indoda enomtsalane."
Genesis39:7 Emveni kwezi zinto, umka-nkosi yakhe wakhangela kuYosefu; Wathi, Lala nam."
Genesis39:8 Wala, wathi kumkankosi yakhe, Yabona, inkosi yam ayiyazi into endinayo endlwini, nokuba indinike konke enako;"
Genesis39:9 Akukho bani mkhulu kum kule ndlu; kwaye akandichasanga nganto, ngaphandle kwakho, ngenxa yokuba ungumfazi wakhe; Ndothini na ukwenza obu bubi bukhulu kangaka, ndone kuThixo?"
Genesis39:10 Wathi ethetha noYosefu imihla ngemihla, akamphulaphula uYosefu ukuba alale naye, nokuba abe naye."
Genesis39:11 Ngelo xesha uYosefu wangena endlwini eya kusebenza umsebenzi wakhe; kwaye kungekho nanye indoda yaloo ndlu.
Genesis39:12 Wambamba ngengubo, wathi, Lala nam; wayishiya ingubo yakhe esandleni sakhe, wabaleka, wamkhuphela phandle."
Genesis39:13 Wathi akubona ukuba uyishiyile ingubo yakhe esandleni sakhe, wabaleka wemka."
Genesis39:14 Wabiza amadoda endlu yakhe, wathetha kuwo, wathi, Yabonani, usizisele umHebhere ukuba adlale ngathi; weza kum ezolala nam, ndakhwaza ngelizwi eliphakamileyo."
Genesis39:15 Wathi akuva ukuba ndiphakamise ilizwi ndikhwaza, wayishiya ingubo yakhe ecaleni kwam, wabaleka, wamkhuphela phandle."
Genesis39:16 Yambatha ingubo yayo phezu kwakhe, yada yafika inkosi yakhe endlwini."
Genesis39:17 Wathetha kuye ngokwala mazwi, wathi, Uze umkhonzi ongumHebhere lowo usizisele kuthi, ukuba enze intlekisa ngam."
Genesis39:18 Ndathi ndakuliphakamisa ilizwi lam ndikhwaza, wayishiya ingubo yakhe ecaleni kwam, wabaleka."
Genesis39:19 Yathi yakuweva inkosi yakhe amazwi omfazi wayo, yamxelela, yathi: “Ikhobokazana lakho lindenze le nto; ukuze uvuthe umsindo wakhe."
Genesis39:20 Ukumkani kaYosefu wamthabatha, wamfaka entolongweni, endaweni abekhonkxwa kuyo amabanjwa okumkani; waye entolongweni apho."
Genesis39:21 uYehova waba naye uYosefu, waba nemfesane kuye, waba nemfesane kuye emehlweni omgcini-ntolongo."
Genesis39:22 Umgcini wababanjwa wabanikela esandleni sikaYosefu onke amabanjwa abesentolongweni; kwaye nantoni na ababeyenza apho, wayeyenza."
Genesis39:23 Umgcini wababanjwa wayengaboni nto esandleni sakhe; ngokuba uYehova ubenaye, nento awayenzayo uYehova wayiphumelelisa."
Genesis40:1 Kwathi emveni koko, umngcamli wokumkani waseYiputa, nompheki wakhe, bamona ukumkani wabo, ukumkani waseYiputa."
Genesis40:2 uFaro waba noburhalarhume kubakhonzi bakhe bobabini, umphathi wabangcamli nomphathi wabapheki."
Genesis40:3 Wabafaka elugcinweni endlwini yomphathi wamafanankosi, endlwini yentolongo, indawo leyo awayevalelwe kuyo uYosefu."
Genesis40:4 Umthetheli wabasiki wathi uYosefu makahambe nabo, abalungiselele; bahlala ke entolongweni ixesha elithile."
Genesis40:5 Bobabini baphupha iphupha, ngamnye iphupha lakhe ngabusuku bunye, ngamnye ngokokutyhilwa kwephupha lakhe, umngcamli nompheki wokumkani waseYiputa, owayesentolongweni."
Genesis40:6 uYosefu wangena kubo kwakusa, wabakhangela, wafika bematshekile."
Genesis40:7 Wababuza abakhonzi bakaFaro, ababenaye endlwini yenkosi yakhe, wathi, Yini na ukuba nibe bubi namhlanje?"
Genesis40:8 Bathi kuye, Siphuphe iphupha, akukho bani unako ukulityhila; Wathi uYosefu kubo, Iziguqulelo asizikaThixo na, akunjalo? nceda undixelele."
Genesis40:9 Umngcamli wabangcamli wamxelela uYosefu iphupha lakhe, wathi kuye, Ephupheni lam ndibone umdiliya ecaleni kwam;"
Genesis40:10 emdiliyeni wadubula iintyatyambo ezintathu, wangathi udubule, wadubula iintyantyambo zawo; iidiliya zawo zivelisa iidiliya ezivuthiweyo;"
Genesis40:11 indebe kaFaro isesandleni sam, ndathabatha iidiliya, ndayikhandela endebeni kaFaro, ndayinikela indebe esandleni sikaFaro;"
Genesis40:12 Wathi uYosefu kuye, Nanku ukushwankathelwa kwalo: amasebe amathathu yimihla emithathu;"
Genesis40:13 Emveni kweentsuku ezintathu, uya kuyiphakamisa intloko yakho uFaro, akubuyisele endaweni yakho; uyibeke indebe kaFaro esandleni sakhe, njengokuba ubungumngcamli wakhe;"
Genesis40:14 Uze undikhumbule xa uthe wahlala phantsi, undenzele inceba, undibizele kuFaro, undikhuphe kule ndlu;"
Genesis40:15 ngokuba okunene ndabiwa ezweni lamaHebhere; nalapha andenzanga nto bangandifaka emhadini.
Genesis40:16 Wabona umphathi wabapheki ukuba isityhilo eso silungile, wathi kuYosefu, Nam ke ephupheni lam, ndithwele iingobozi ezintathu ezimhlophe entloko;"
Genesis40:17 Engobozini ephezulu kukho iintlobo zonke zokutya okuphekiweyo kukaFaro; zasidla iintaka engobozini ephezu kwentloko yam.
Genesis40:18 uJosefu waphendula wathi: “Nantsi ke ingcaciso: “Imibhobho emithathu yomchamo yimihla emithathu.
Genesis40:19 Emveni kweentsuku ezintathu, uya kuyiphakamisa intloko yakho uFaro, akuxhome emthini; iintaka ziyidle inyama yakho kuwe."
Genesis40:20 Kwathi ngomhla wasithathu, umhla wokuzalwa kukaFaro, wabalungiselela isidlo bonke abakhonzi bakhe;"
Genesis40:21 Wambuyisela umphathi wabashicileli eofisini yakhe; wayinikela indebe esandleni sikaFaro.
Genesis40:22 Wamxhoma umphathi wompheki, njengoko uYosefu wabacaciselayo."
Genesis40:23 Kodwa umphathi wabangcamli akazange amkhumbule uYosefu, kodwa wamlibala nje."
Genesis41:1 Kwathi, kwakuzaliseka iminyaka emibini, uFaro waphupha, wambona emi phezu komlambo;"
Genesis41:2 nanko kunyuka, kuphuma emlanjeni, amathokazi asixhenxe atyebileyo, etyebile; ayesidla edlelweni."
Genesis41:3 Ndabona kunyuka, kuphuma emlanjeni, amanye amathokazi asixhenxe emva kwawo, emabi, enqinile, ehluthi; wamisa nezinye iinkomo elunxwemeni lomlambo;"
Genesis41:4 asuka amathokazi amabi, anqinileyo, awadla amathokazi asixhenxe amahle, atyebileyo. Waphakama ke uFaro."
Genesis41:5 Waphinda walala, waphupha okwesibini, wabona iziqhamo ezisixhenxe zikhula eludizeni olunye, zityebile yaye zintle."
Genesis41:6 Nantso ke, kubonakala imitya ezisixhenxe ngasemva kwayo, engcakacileyo, ivela lulophu lwasempumalanga."
Genesis41:7 Zaza iibhokhwe ezisixhenxe ezinqinileyo zazidla iinkunzi zeebhokhwe ezisixhenxe neebhokhwe ezichumileyo. Wavuka uFaro, O, liphupha."
Genesis41:8 Kwasa umoya wakhe wakhathazeka; wathumela ukuba kubizwe zonke izazi zaseYiputa, nezilumko zakhe zonke; uFaro wazixelela iphupha lakhe; kodwa akubangakho namnye ubenako ukuyicacisa kuFaro."
Genesis41:9 Wathi umphathi wabangcamli kuFaro, Ndiyasikhumbula namhla isono sam."
Genesis41:10 uFaro wayenoburhalarhume kubakhonzi bakhe, wandibeka elugcinweni lomthetheli wendlu yabasiki, mna nomthetheli wabapheki."
Genesis41:11 Saphupha iphupha ngobunye ubusuku, mna naye; elowo waphupha ngokutyhilwa kwephupha lakhe."
Genesis41:12 Kwaye kukho kuthi umfana ongumHebhere, umkhonzi womthetheli wabasiki; saza samxelela, yaye wasichazela amaphupha ethu; wachazela wonke umntu ngephupha lakhe."
Genesis41:13 Kwathi, njengoko wayesixelele, kwaba njalo; Wandibuyisela emsebenzini wam, wabeka umnxeba kuye."
Genesis41:14 uFaro wathumela ukuba kubizwe uYosefu. Wazicheba, wanxiba iingubo zakhe, wangena kuFaro."
Genesis41:15 Wathi uFaro kuYosefu, Ndiphuphe iphupha, akwabakho mntu ulityhilayo; ndikuve usithi uyaliqonda iphupha ulitolike."
Genesis41:16 uYosefu wamphendula uFaro, wathi, Andinguye; uThixo uya kumphendula uFaro ngoxolo."
Genesis41:17 Wathi uFaro kuYosefu, Ephupheni lam, yabona, ndimi elunxwemeni lomlambo;"
Genesis41:18 nanko kunyuka, kuphuma emlanjeni, amathokazi asixhenxe etyebile, etyebile; ayesidla edlelweni."
Genesis41:19 Ndabona kunyuka amanye amathokazi asixhenxe emva kwawo, emabi, emabi kakhulu, emabi kakhulu, endingazanga ndiwabone kulo lonke ilizwe laseYiputa, ngenxa yobubi obubi kuwo;"
Genesis41:20 amathokazi angamarhoqorhoqo, anqinileyo, awadla amathokazi asixhenxe atyebileyo."
Genesis41:21 Bakuba ke basidla, akwaziwa ukuba bayidlile; kodwa babesebabi njengakuqala. Ndiye ndaphakama."
Genesis41:22 Ndabona ephupheni lam, ndabona iidumba ezisixhenxe ziphuma mcingeni mnye, zichumile, zintle;"
Genesis41:23 Nanko kuvela iinkozo ezisixhenxe ngasemva kwazo, ezomileyo, ezingcakacileyo, ziqhutywa lulophu lwasempumalanga."
Genesis41:24 Asuka amathanga angcakacileyo, awadla amathangazana asixhenxe alungileyo; kodwa akukho bani unokundicacisela."
Genesis41:25 uYosefu wathi uFaro, Elinye iphupha likaFaro: uThixo umxelele uFaro oko aya kukwenza."
Genesis41:26 Amathokazi asixhenxe alungileyo yiminyaka esixhenxe; nemithambo esixhenxe elungileyo yiminyaka esixhenxe; iphupha lilinye.
Genesis41:27 Amathokazi asixhenxe angamarhoqorhoqo, anyukileyo aphuma emva kwawo, abeminyaka isixhenxe ezelwe; nemitya esixhenxe engenanto, evuthuzwe lulophu lwasempuma, iya kuba yiminyaka esixhenxe yendlala."
Genesis41:28 Lilo eli ilizwi endalithethayo kuFaro lokuthi, oko aya kukwenza uThixo, uya kukubonisa uFaro."
Genesis41:29 Yabona, kukho iminyaka esixhenxe yendyebo ezweni lonke laseYiputa;"
Genesis41:30 Emva kwaleyo kuya kubakho iminyaka esixhenxe yendlala; ilityalwe yonke indyebo ezweni laseYiputa; nendlala iya kulidla ihlabathi;
Genesis41:31 Ayiyi kwaziwa inala ehlabathini, ngenxa yendlala eya kulilandela; kuba kuya kuba nzima kakhulu."
Genesis41:32 Ngoko ke, laphindwa kabini iphupha likaFaro; kungenxa yokuba lo mbandela ucetywe nguThixo, yaye kungekudala uThixo uya kuwuzalisekisa."
Genesis41:33 uFaro makakhangele indoda esisilumko, esisilumko, ayimise phezu kwelizwe laseYiputa."
Genesis41:34 Makenze le nto uFaro, alimise abalawuli ilizwe, athabathe isihlanu selizwe laseYiputa iminyaka esixhenxe yendyebo."
Genesis41:35 Mababuthe konke ukudla kweminyaka yendyebo ezayo, yokudala ingqolowa phantsi kwesandla sikaFaro, bakugcine ukudla emizini;"
Genesis41:36 Oko kudla kuya kuba ngumxhesho welizwe ngeminyaka yosixhenxe yendlala eya kubakho ezweni laseYiputa; hleze ihlabathi litshabalale yindlala.
Genesis41:37 Lalunga loo nto emehlweni kaFaro nasemehlweni abo bonke abakhonzi bakhe.
Genesis41:38 Wathi uFaro kubakhonzi bakhe, Sinokumfumana na umntu onje, onomoya kaThixo?"
Genesis41:39 Wathi uFaro kuYosefu, Ekubeni uThixo ekwazisile zonke ezi zinto, akukho bani usisilumko, unengqondo, njengawe."
Genesis41:40 Wena uya kuba yingangamsha yendlu yam, bazimase bonke abantu bam ngokwelizwi lakho; kusetroneni yodwa endiya kuba mkhulu kuwe."
Genesis41:41 Wathi uFaro kuYosefu, Yabona, ndikumise phezu kwalo lonke ilizwe laseYiputa;"
Genesis41:42 uFaro wawukhulula umsesane wakhe esandleni sakhe, wawufaka esandleni sikaYosefu, wamambathisa ilinen ecikizekileyo, wafaka umxokelelwane wegolide entanyeni yakhe."
Genesis41:43 Wamthabatha kweyesibini inqwelo abenayo; Badanduluka phambi kwakhe, besithi, Qubudani; wamenza umphathi welizwe lonke laseYiputa."
Genesis41:44 Wathi uFaro kuYosefu, NdinguFaro;"
Genesis41:45 uFaro wamthiya uYosefu igama lokuba nguSafenati-paneha; wamnika uAzenati, intombi kaPotifare, umbingeleli wamnye, ukuba abe ngumkakhe. Waphuma uYosefu, waya kulo lonke ilizwe laseYiputa."
Genesis41:46 uYosefu ebeminyaka imashumi mathathu ezelwe, ukuma kwakhe phambi koFaro, ukumkani waseYiputa. uYosefu wemka kuFaro, walicanda ilizwe laseYiputa."
Genesis41:47 Umhlaba wavelisa ngendiphane ngeminyaka esixhenxe yendyebo.
Genesis41:48 Wakubutha konke ukudla kweminyaka esixhenxe eyayikho ezweni laseYiputa, wakubeka ukudla emizini; ukudla kwamasimi ekupheleni kwemizi ngemizi, wakubeka khona."
Genesis41:49 uYosefu wayihlanganisa ingqolowa yam, kunye nentlabathi yolwandle, yaninzi, wada walishiya inani; ngokuba lingena nani."
Genesis41:50 uYosefu wazala oonyana bababini, wabazalelwa nguAzenati, intombi kaPotifare, umbingeleli wamnye, ingekafiki iminyaka yendlala."
Genesis41:51 uYosefu wamthiya owamazibulo igama elinguManase, ngokuba wathi, uThixo undenze ndakulibala konke ukwaphuka kwam, nayo yonke indlu kabawo."
Genesis41:52 Owesibini wamthiya igama elinguEfrayim, ngokuba uThixo wandihambisa emhlabeni weembandezelo."
Genesis41:53 Yaphela ke iminyaka yosixhenxe yendyebo ekhoyo ezweni laseYiputa.
Genesis41:54 Yaqala ukufika iminyaka yosixhenxe yendlala, njengoko wayekuthethile uYosefu. Yabakho indlala kumazwe onke; ke kulo lonke ilizwe laseYiputa kwakukho isonka."
Genesis41:55 Lafa lonke ilizwe laseYiputa yindlala; abantu bakhalela isonka kuFaro; Wathi uFaro kuwo onke amaYiputa, Yiyani kuYosefu; yenza loo nto uyixelelwayo."
Genesis41:56 Indlala yaligubungela lonke ihlabathi; uYosefu wazivula zonke izisele, wathengisa ngamaYiputa; yaba nkulu indlala ezweni laseYiputa."
Genesis41:57 Lesuka ilizwe liphela, leza kuthenga ingqolowa kuYosefu eYiputa; ngokuba ibinkulu indlala kumazwe onke."
Genesis42:1 Wabona uYakobi ukuba kukho ingqolowa eYiputa, wathi uYakobi koonyana bakhe, Nibona ntoni na?"
Genesis42:2 Wathi, Yabonani, ndivile ukuba kukho ingqolowa eYiputa; yihla uye khona, usithenge khona; ukuze sidle ubomi, singafi."
Genesis42:3 Behla abakhuluwa bakaYosefu abalishumi, beya kuthenga ingqolowa eYiputa."
Genesis42:4 Kodwa uBhenjamin, umninawa kaYosefu, akamthumanga uYakobi nabazalwana bakhe; ngokuba ethe, Makangaphathwa ububi."
Genesis42:5 Beza oonyana bakaSirayeli, beza kuthenga ingqolowa kwabo bezayo; kuba indlala ibikho ezweni lakwaKanan."
Genesis42:6 uYosefu wayengurhuluneli welizwe elo; wayethengisa ngengqolowa kubo bonke abantu belo zwe; beza abakhuluwa bakaYosefu, baqubuda kuye."
Genesis42:7 uYosefu wababona abakhuluwa bakhe, wabazi, wazenza wasemzini kubo, wathetha nabo kalukhuni; wathi kubo, Nivela phi na? Bathi, Sivela ezweni lakwaKanan, size kuthenga ukudla;"
Genesis42:8 uYosefu wayebazi abakhuluwa bakhe, kodwa bona babengamazi."
Genesis42:9 Wawakhumbula uYosefu amaphupha abenawo ngabo, wathi kubo, Niziintlola nina; ukubona inkunkuma yelizwe oze kulo."
Genesis42:10 Bathi kuye, Hayi, nkosi yam, abakhonzi bakho baze kuthenga ukudla."
Genesis42:11 Sonke singabazalwana bamntu mnye; singamadoda okwenene, thina bakhonzi bakho asizizo iintlola."
Genesis42:12 Wathi kubo, Nize kubona amampunge eli hlabathi;"
Genesis42:13 Bathi ke bona: “Abakhonzi bakho balishumi elinesibini abazalwana, singoonyana bandoda-nye ezweni lakwaKanan; yabona, omncinane ukubawo namhlanje, omnye akakho."
Genesis42:14 Wathi uYosefu kubo, Yile nto bendiyithetha kuni, ndathi, Niziintlola."
Genesis42:15 Niya kucikidwa ngale ndawo: Ehleli nje uFaro, anisayi kuphuma apha, ukuba akathanga eze apha umninawa wenu."
Genesis42:16 Thumani omnye kuni apha, alandele umzalwana wenu, nokhonkxwa, ukuze acikidwe amazwi enu, ukuba ninenyaniso na;"
Genesis42:17 Wabafaka bonke entolongweni iintsuku ezintathu.
Genesis42:18 Wathi uYosefu kubo ngomhla wesithathu, Yenzani oku, ukuze niphile; ngokuba ndiyamoyika uThixo;"
Genesis42:19 Ukuba ninyanisile, omnye umzalwana wenu makafakwe entolongweni yenu; yiyani, nithabathe ingqolowa ngenxa yendlala yezindlu zenu."
Genesis42:20 Mziseni umninawa wenu kum; ke ngoko, amazwi enu aya kuqinisekiswa, kwaye aniyi kufa. Kwaye benjenjalo."
Genesis42:21 Bathetha omnye komnye besithi, Inene, sinetyala ngenxa yomninawa wethu, ngokuba sakubona ukubandezeleka komphefumlo wakhe, oko abetarhuzisa kuthi, asamphulaphula; ke ngoko, le mbandezelo ifikile kuthi."
Genesis42:22 Wabaphendula uRubhen, wathi, Bendingathethanga kuni; ndithe, Musa ukona, mntwana wam; kwaye ubungafuni nokuva? ke ngoko, yabonani, nalo igazi lakhe liyabizwa."
Genesis42:23 Babengazi bona ukuba uYosefu ubevile; ngokuba wayethetha kubo ngetoliki.
Genesis42:24 Wabafulathela, walila; wabuya weza kubo, wathetha kubo, wamthabatha uSimon kubo, wamkhonkxa phambi kwabo."
Genesis42:25 Wathi uYosefu mazizaliswe iipokotho zabo ngengqolowa, imali yabo bonke ibuyiselwe engxoweni yakhe, banikwe nomphako wendlela; Wenjenjalo ke nakubo."
Genesis42:26 Bayikhwelisa ingqolowa emaesileni abo, bemka khona."
Genesis42:27 Uthe ke omnye akuyivula ingxowa yakhe, ukuba aluse iesile lakhe kwindlu yabahambi, wayibona imali yakhe; ngokuba, yabonani, belisemlonyeni wetyala lakhe."
Genesis42:28 Wathi kubazalwana bakhe, Ibuyisiwe imali yam; yabona ke, ukho wena kum;"
Genesis42:29 Bafika kuYakobi uyise ezweni lakwaKanan, bamxelela konke okubehleleyo; yithi,"
Genesis42:30 Yathetha kakubi ngathi indoda engumninilo lizwe, isithi, siziintlola zelizwe."
Genesis42:31 Sathi kuye, Singabantu abanyanisekileyo; asizizo iintlola,"
Genesis42:32 singabazalwana abalishumi elinababini, oonyana bakabawo; omnye akakho, omncinane ukubawo namhlanje ezweni lakwaKanan."
Genesis42:33 Indoda leyo, engumnini-lizwe, yathi kuthi, Ndiya kwazi ngale nto, ukuba ninyanisile; shiyani abe mnye wabantwana benu apha kum, niphathele ukulamba kwemizalwane yenu, nihambe;"
Genesis42:34 Mziseni umninawa wenu kum; ndiya kwazi ke ngoko, ngokuba anizizo iintlola, ningabantu bokwenene; Ndiya kukukhulula ngentlawulelo mna, mzalwana wam, urhwebe kweli lizwe."
Genesis42:35 Ke kaloku, bakukhuphela iingxowa zabo, yabona, elowo engxoweni yakhe; bakuzibona iziqhuma zemali boyika bona noyise."
Genesis42:36 Wathi kubo uYakobi uyise, Ndibathabathile abantwana bam; uYosefu akakho, noSimon akakho; niza kuthabatha noBhenjamin; zonke ezo zinto zichasene nam."
Genesis42:37 Wathi uRubhen kuyise, Babulale bobabini oonyana bam, ukuba andithanga ndimzise kuwe; mnikele esandleni sam, ndombuyisela kuwe mna."
Genesis42:38 Wathi, Unyana wam akasayi kuhla nani; ngokuba ufile umkhuluwa wakhe, yena usele yedwa; Ukuba uthe wahlelwa bububi endleleni yakho, bozihlisela izimvi zam kwelabafileyo ndinentlungu."
Genesis43:1 Indlala yaba nkulu kwelo zwe.
Genesis43:2 Bayidla ingqolowa, ababeze nayo bevela eYiputa, wathi uyise kubo, Buyani niye kusithengela ukudla."
