Genesis43:3 Wathi uYuda kuye, Yasifunga loo ndoda, yathi, Aniyi kububona ubuso bam, engekho umninawa wenu."
Genesis43:4 Ukuba uthe wamthuma umninawa wethu nathi, sohla siye kukuthengela ukudla."
Genesis43:5 Ukuba akuthanga umthume, asiyi kuhla; ngokuba yathi kuthi loo ndoda, Aniyi kububona ubuso bam, engabangakho nani udade wenu."
Genesis43:6 Wathi uSirayeli, Yini na ukuba undenze into embi kangaka, ukuba uyixelele indoda ukuba unomninawa?"
Genesis43:7 Ngoko bathi: “Le ndoda yasibuza ngenyameko nangemeko yethu neyentsapho yakowethu, isithi: “Usaphila na uyihlo? Wayenomnye umzalwana, saza samxelela ngokwaloo mazwi, sathi: “Ngaba siyazi na ngokuqinisekileyo ukuba uya kuthi: “Mxhaseni umzalwana wenu?"
Genesis43:8 Wathi uYuda kuSirayeli uyise, Thabatha mna nenkwenkwe, sihambe sihambe; ukuze sidle ubomi, singafi, thina nani, nentsapho yethu."
Genesis43:9 Ndiya kulindela kuye; mbuze esandleni sam; Ukuba andithanga ndimzise kuwe, ndimbeke phambi kwakho, ndoba netyala kude kube ngunaphakade."
Genesis43:10 Kuba, ukuba besingathandabuzanga, ngesibuya okwesibini."
Genesis43:11 Wathi uSirayeli uyise kubo, Ukuba kunjalo, makwenziwe ntoni na; Thabathani ezona zintle zelizwe ezityeni zenu, nise ezityeni zenu, nise emntwini lowo, intwana yamafutha aqholiweyo, nentwana yobusi, nentlaka emhlophe, nemore, neenati, neeamangile;"
Genesis43:12 Phayani ezandleni zenu imali ephindiweyo; naloo mali yabuyiswayo emlonyeni weengxowa zenu, yibekeni ezandleni zenu; mhlawumbi le ibiyimpazamo:"
Genesis43:13 Nomntakwenu, mthabathe, usuke, ubuyele kuloo ndoda."
Genesis43:14 Ngamana uThixo uSomandla waniphatha ngemfesane phambi kwaloo ndoda, ukuba imgxothe omnye umzalwana wenu uBhenjamin. Xa abantwana bam bebiwa, ndiyakhuthuzwa."
Genesis43:15 Amadoda lawo awuthabatha umnikelo, nemali ephindwe kabini esandleni sawo, noBhenjamin; Wemka, wehla waya eYiputa, wema ngakuYosefu."
Genesis43:16 uYosefu wambona uBhenjamin enabo, wathi kumphathi wendlu yakhe, Wangenise la madoda endlwini, uwabulale, ulungise; kuba la madoda aya kudla nam emini enkulu."
Genesis43:17 Indoda leyo yenza njengoko uYosefu wamwiselayo umthetho; indoda yawangenisa amadoda endlwini kaYosefu.
Genesis43:18 Oyika loo madoda, ngokuba engeniswe endlwini kaYosefu; bathi, Ngenxa yemali ebibuyiselwe ezingxoweni zethu ngenxa engaphambili, siziswe; ukuze asifumane isizathu sokusiqwenga, asithabathe amakhoboka ethu namaesile ethu."
Genesis43:19 Asondela kumgcini-ndlu kaYosefu, athetha kuye emnyango wendlu."
Genesis43:20 Bathi ke bona, Nkosi, besize kuqala kuthenga ukudla."
Genesis43:21 Sathi sakufika kwindlu yeendwendwe, savula iipokotho zethu, yaye sayibona imali yomntu ngamnye emlonyeni wengxowa yakhe, imali yethu ngokomlinganiselo wayo; saza sayibuyisela ezandleni zethu."
Genesis43:22 Saphatha nemali ezandleni zethu, yokuthenga ukudla; asizukwazi ukuba imali yethu ifakwe ngubani ezipokothweni zethu."
Genesis43:23 Wathi, Xolani, musani ukoyika; Bendinayo imali yakho. Wazisa uSimon kubo."
Genesis43:24 Indoda leyo yawangenisa amadoda endlwini kaYosefu, yawanika amanzi, ahlamba iinyawo zawo; amahashe abo wawanika ukudla."
Genesis43:25 Bamenzela isipho uYosefu owayefike emini; ngokuba evile ukuba baya kudla khona isonka.
Genesis43:26 Kwathi, akungena uYosefu endlwini, awuzisa umnikelo ngesandla sawo endlwini, aziphosa phantsi phambi kwakhe."
Genesis43:27 Wawabuza ukuphila kwawo, wathi, Usaphilile na uyihlo, ixhego enanithethe ngalo? Ngaba usaphila?"
Genesis43:28 Bathi, Usaphilile ubawo umkhonzi wakho, usadla ubomi; Baqubuda, baqubuda."
Genesis43:29 Wawaphakamisa amehlo akhe, wambona uBhenjamin umninawa wakhe, unyana kanina, wathi, Nguye na lo umninawa wenu omncinane, enibe nithetha ngaye kum? Waza wathi: “uThixo makabe nenceba kuwe, nyana wam!"
Genesis43:30 uYosefu wakhawuleza; ngenxa yokuba isisu sakhe sasiswele umninawa wakhe, kwaye wayekhangela indawo apho angalila khona; Wangena egumbini lakhe, walila khona."
Genesis43:31 Waza wahlamba ubuso bakhe, waphuma ezibambile, wathi, Bekani isonka."
Genesis43:32 Baphekela yena yedwa, baba yedwa, namaYiputa abesidla naye odwa; kuba amaYiputa akanakudla sonka namaHebhere; kuba lisikizi kumaYiputa."
Genesis43:33 Bahlala phantsi phambi kwakhe, owamazibulo ngokobuzibulo bakhe, omncinane ngokobuncinane bakhe; othuka amadoda."
Genesis43:34 Wazithabatha, wazisusa kuye; ke ukutya kukaBhenjamin bekubhetele ngokuphindwe kahlanu kunabo bonke abanye. Basela kwaye bonwabile naye."
Genesis44:1 Wamwisela umthetho umalusi wendlu yakhe, esithi, Zizaliseni iindawo zala madoda ngokudla, njengoko zinako ukukhongozela, niyibeke imali yalowo nalowo emlonyeni wengxowa yakhe."
Genesis44:2 Yibeke indebe yam, indebe yesilivere, emlonyeni wengxowa yomncinane, nemali yengqolowa yakhe. Yaye wenza ngokwelizwi awayelithethile uYosefu."
Genesis44:3 Kwathi, kwakuba imvula, amadoda lawo namaesile awo abuyiselwa endleleni yawo."
Genesis44:4 Akuba ephumile esixekweni, uYosefu wathi kumthetheli-waka, Suk’ ume, uwalandele laa madoda; wakufika kubo uthi kubo: Yini na ukuba nibuyisele okulungileyo ngobubi?"
Genesis44:5 Le nto asiyile na inkosi yam iselayo, ikuprofetayo ngokwenyaniso? nenze ububi ngokwenjenjalo."
Genesis44:6 Wafika kubo, wathetha kwaelaa lizwi kubo;"
Genesis44:7 Athi kuye, Yini na ukuba inkosi yam ithethe ngokwaloo mazwi? Ngamana uThixo angabavumeli abakhonzi bakho ukuba benze le nto:"
Genesis44:8 Uyabona, imali esayifumanayo ezingxoweni zethu, sayibuyisela kuwe, sivela ezweni lakwaKanan; Singathini na ukuba endlwini yenkosi yakho isilivere negolide?"
Genesis44:9 Osukuba efunyenwe phakathi kwabakhonzi bakho, makafe naye; nathi siya kuba ngamakhoboka enkosini yam."
Genesis44:10 Kwaye wathi: Nangoku makube ngokwamazwi enu; uya kuba msulwa.
Genesis44:11 Kwandula ke ngokukhawuleza, elowo wakhulula ingxowa yakhe phantsi, elowo wavula ingxowa yakhe."
Genesis44:12 Wagquthagqutha, eqalela komkhulu, eshiya komncinane; yafunyanwa indebe engxoweni kaBhenjamin."
Genesis44:13 Bazikrazula iingubo zabo, babopha elowo iesile lakhe, babuyela kuloo mzi."
Genesis44:14 Wangena uYuda nabazalwana bakhe endlwini kaYosefu; ngokuba wayeselapho, zawa phambi kwakhe."
Genesis44:15 Wathi uYosefu kubo, Nenzele ntoni na? Awuyazi ukuba indoda enjengam ingahlwayela?"
Genesis44:16 Wathi uYuda, Siya kuthini na enkosini yam? sothetha njani? sothini na ukuzihlambulula? uThixo ukubonile okungendawo kwabakhonzi bakho; yabona, singabakhonzi benkosi yam, thina nalowo ifunyenwe kuye indebe."
Genesis44:17 Wathi, Ngamana uThixo angandivimba, ndenze loo nto. Ke osukuba ifunyenwe esandleni sakhe indebe, woba sisicaka sam; wena ke, nyuka uye kuyihlo ngoxolo."
Genesis44:18 Wasondela uYuda kuye, wathi, Camagu, nkosi yam, makathethe ilizwi umkhonzi wakho ezindlebeni zenkosi yam, umsindo wakho mawungavuthi kumkhonzi wakho, ngokuba enjengoFaro."
Genesis44:19 Yababuza inkosi yam abakhonzi bayo, isithi, Ninoyihlo na?"
Genesis44:20 Saza sathi kukumkani wam: Sinobawo wethu, ixhego, nomntwana obudala bakhe, omncinane; wabhubha umninawa wakhe, wasala yedwa nonina, uyise ebemthanda."
Genesis44:21 Wathi ke wena kubakhonzi bakho, Mziseni kum, ndimbone."
Genesis44:22 Sathi thina kukumkani wam, Unyana akanako ukumshiya uyise; kuba xa athe wamshiya, uyise uya kufa."
Genesis44:23 Wathi wena kubakhonzi bakho, Ukuba umninawa wenu omncinane akathanga ehle nani, anisayi kubuya nibubone ubuso bam."
Genesis44:24 Senyuka ke saya kumkhonzi wakho, ubawo, samxelela amazwi am."
Genesis44:25 Wathi ubawo, Buyani niye kusithengela ukudla."
Genesis44:26 Saza sathi, Asinakusuka; Ukuba umninawa wethu unathi, sohla; kuba asiyi kububona ubuso baloo ndoda, xa umninawa wethu engekho kuthi."
Genesis44:27 Wathi uyihlo umkhonzi wakho, Niyazi nina, ukuba umkam wandizalela oonyana ababini nje."
Genesis44:28 Omnye wandishiya, ndathi, Okunene, uqwengiwe; kwaye ixesha elide andizange ndimbone;"
Genesis44:29 Ukuba uthe wabususa kum, wamfikela ilishwa, izimvi zam nozihlisela kwelabafileyo ndinesingqala."
Genesis44:30 Ukuba ndithe ndaya kubawo, umkhonzi wakho lo, akakho phakathi kwethu unyana; ebona ukuba ubomi bakhe bubotshelelwe kubomi benkwenkwe;"
Genesis44:31 Ukuba ithe yabona ukuba inkwenkwe ayikho kuthi, mayife; Abakhonzi bakho baya kuzihlisela izimvi zomkhonzi wakho, ubawo, ziye kwelabafileyo enentlungu."
Genesis44:32 Ngokuba umkhonzi wakho lo wenza umnqophiso phakathi konyana noyise, ndathi, Ukuba andithanga ndimzise kuwe, ndobuthwala ubugwenxa bukabawo ngonaphakade."
Genesis44:33 Ke ngoko makahlale umkhonzi wakho endaweni yenkwenkwe, umkhonzi wenkosi yam; yaza inkwenkwe yenyuka nabantakwabo."
Genesis44:34 Kuba ndingathini na ukunyuka ndiye kubawo, kungekho nkwenkwe? ukuze ndingayiboni intlekele eyehlela ubawo."
Genesis45:1 uYosefu akabanga nakuzibamba phambi kwabo bonke ababemi ngakuye; wadanduluka esithi, Ndikhululeni nonke. Yaye kwakungekho bani umi ngakuye ekuzibonakalisa kukaYosefu kubantakwabo."
Genesis45:2 Wakhala kakhulu; eva amaYiputa nendlu kaFaro.
Genesis45:3 Wathi uYosefu kubazalwana bakhe, NdinguYosefu; Ubawo usaphila, abanakumphendula abazalwana bakhe; ngokuba bebesoyika ebusweni bakhe."
Genesis45:4 Wathi uYosefu kubazalwana bakhe, Sondelani kum apha. Baye basondela. Wathi, NdinguYosefu, umninawa wenu, enamthengayo eYiputa."
Genesis45:5 Musani ukuba buhlungu, ningaziqumbeli, ukuba nathengisa ngam apha; ngokuba uThixo wandithuma phambi kwenu ukuze ndisindise abantu."
Genesis45:6 Kuloo minyaka mibini indlala yabakho ehlabathini, isemihlanu iminyaka ekungayi kubakho kuvuna kuyo nakuvuna."
Genesis45:7 Yaye uThixo wandithuma phambi kwenu ukuze ndigcine inzala yakho ehlabathini ndize ndisindise umphefumlo wakho ngenkululeko enkulu.
Genesis45:8 Ngoku ke asinini abandithume apha, nguThixo; Wandenza uyise kaFaro, nomphathi wendlu yakhe yonke, nomlawuli ezweni lonke laseYiputa."
Genesis45:9 Khawuleza uye kubawo uze uthi kuye: ‘Kutsho uYosefu unyana wakho ukuthi, uThixo undenze umphathi weYiputa yonke; yihla uze kum, musa ukulibala."
Genesis45:10 Uya kuhlala ezweni laseGoshen, ube kufuphi nam, wena, nabantwana bakho, nabantwana babantwana bakho, nempahla yakho emfutshane, neenkomo zakho, neento zonke onazo;"
Genesis45:11 Ndonondla khona; kuba kuya kubakho iminyaka emihlanu yendlala; ukuze ungasweli wena, nendlu yakho, neento zonke onazo."
Genesis45:12 Yabonani, amehlo enu ayabona, noBhenjamin umninawa wam, ngamehlo enu, ukuba ngumlomo wam lo uthethayo kuni."
Genesis45:13 Ze nimxelele uBawo ngalo lonke uzuko lwam eYiputa, neento zonke enizibonileyo; ukhawuleze uze notata apha."
Genesis45:14 Waziphosa entanyeni kaBhenjamin, walila; uBhenjamin wakhala entanyeni yakhe."
Genesis45:15 Ngaphezu koko, wabanga bonke abazalwana bakhe waza walilela phezu kwabo; emva koko abazalwana bakhe bathetha naye."
Genesis45:16 Lavakala ilizwi elo endlwini kaFaro, kwathiwa, Bafika abakhuluwa bakaYosefu, uFaro nabakhonzi bakhe bavuya."
Genesis45:17 Wathi uFaro kuYosefu, Yithi kubakhuluwa bakho, Enjenjalo; yalusa imfuyo yakho, uye ezweni lakwaKanan;"
Genesis45:18 Thabatha uyihlo nendlu yakho, uze kum apha. Ndokunika izinto ezilungileyo zelizwe laseYiputa, udle ukutyeba kwelizwe."
Genesis45:19 Wena ke uwiselwe umthetho, yenze; bathabathe abantwana bakho, nabafazi bakho, ngeenqwelo zokulwa, nibase ezweni laseYiputa, nithwale uyihlo, nize."
Genesis45:20 Kananjalo, musani ukuyinyamekela impahla yenu; kuba zonke izinto ezilungileyo zelizwe lonke laseYiputa zezenu."
Genesis45:21 Benjenjalo ke oonyana bakaSirayeli. uYosefu wabanika iinqwelo ngokomthetho kaFaro, wabanika nomphako wendlela."
Genesis45:22 Wabanika zonke iingubo ngeengubo; kodwa uBhenjamin wamnika amakhulu amathathu eeshekele zesilivere neengubo zangaphantsi ezintlanu.
Genesis45:23 Wathumela enjenjalo kuyise; ishumi leemazi zamaesile, bethwele izinto ezilungileyo zaseYiputa, neshumi leemazi zamaesile zithwele ingqolowa, nesonka, nomphako kayise endleleni."
Genesis45:24 Wathi kubazalwana bakhe, mabahambe; bemka ke; wathi kubo, Zilindeni, ningaweli endleleni."
Genesis45:25 Benyuka bemka eYiputa, bafika ezweni lakwaKanan kuYakobi uyise."
Genesis45:26 Wamxelela wathi, uYosefu usahleli; ewe, ungumphathi welizwe lonke laseYiputa. Yaphuka intliziyo kaYakobi, ngokuba engakholwa ngabo."
Genesis45:27 Bawathetha kuye onke amazwi kaYosefu, abewathethile kubo; akubona iinqwelo awayezithumele uYosefu ukuba zimthabathe, waphila umoya kaYakobi uyise."
Genesis45:28 Wathi uSirayeli, Kwanele; uYosefu unyana wam usahleli; ndiya kumbona ndingekafi."
Genesis46:1 Wanduluka ke uSirayeli neento zonke abenazo, wafika eBher-shebha, wabingelela kuThixo kayise uIsake."
Genesis46:2 Wathetha uThixo kuSirayeli ngombono wobusuku, wathi, Yakobi, Yakobi! Wathi: Ndim lo."
Genesis46:3 Wathi, NdinguThixo, uThixo wooyihlo; musa ukoyika ukuhla uye eYiputa; ngokuba ndiya kukwenza uhlanga olukhulu khona."
Genesis46:4 Mna ndiya kuhla ndiye nawe eYiputa; ndiya kukuvusa okunene, abeke uYosefu isandla sakhe phezu kwamehlo akho."
Genesis46:5 Waphuma ke uYakobi eBher-shebha; oonyana bakaSirayeli bamthabatha uYakobi uyise, nabantwana babo, nabafazi babo, ngeenqwelo ebezithunyelwe nguFaro ukuba zimthabathe."
Genesis46:6 Bayithabatha imfuyo yabo, nengqwebo yabo ababeyifumene ezweni lakwaKanan, bafika eYiputa uYakobi noonyana bakhe bonke."
Genesis46:7 Oonyana bakhe noonyana boonyana bakhe neentombi zakhe neentombi zoonyana bakhe nayo yonke inzala yakhe beza naye eYiputa.
Genesis46:8 Ngawo la amagama oonyana bakaSirayeli abafikayo eYiputa: uYakobi noonyana bakhe: uRubhen amazibulo kaYakobi.
Genesis46:9 Oonyana bakaRubhen nguHanoki, noFalu, noHetseron, noKarmi."
Genesis46:10 Oonyana bakaSimon nguYemuweli, noYamin, no-Ohadi, noYagin, noTsohare, noSawule, unyana womKananekazi."
Genesis46:11 Oonyana bakaLevi nguGershon, noKehati, noMerari."
Genesis46:12 Oonyana bakaYuda nguAsheri; noEre, no-Onan, noShela, noPeretse, noSeraki; kodwa uEre no-Onan bafela ezweni lakwaKanan. Oonyana bakaPeretse nguHetseron noHamule."
Genesis46:13 Oonyana bakaIsakare nguTola, noPuwa, noYobhi, noShimron."
Genesis46:14 Oonyana bakaZebhulon nguSerede, noElon, noYahaleli."
Genesis46:15 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaLeya, awabazalela uYakobi, uPadan-aram, noDina intombi yakhe; Iyonke imiphefumlo yoonyana bakhe neyeentombi zakhe ingamashumi omathathu anamithathu."
Genesis46:16 Oonyana bakaGadi nguAsheri; uSiphon noHaggi, uSuni noEsbhon, uEri noArodi noAreli."
Genesis46:17 Oonyana baka-Ashere nguImna, noIshuwa, noIshvi, noBheriya, noSaraki, udade wabo; noonyana bakaBheriya; uHebhere noMalekiyeli."
Genesis46:18 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaSilipa, awathi uLabhan wamnika uLeya intombi yakhe, awayizalela uYakobi, imiphefumlo elishumi elinamithandathu."
Genesis46:19 Oonyana bakaRakeli, umkaYakobi; uYosefu noBhenjamin."
Genesis46:20 uYosefu wazalelwa ezweni laseYiputa nguManase noEfrayim, awamzalela bona uAzenati, intombi kaPotifare, umbingeleli wamnye."
Genesis46:21 Oonyana bakaBhenjamin yayinguBhela noBhegere noAshbhele, uGera noNahaman, uEhi noRoshe, uMupim noHupim noAredi."
Genesis46:22 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaRakeli, awazalelwa uYakobi; iyonke yimiphefumlo elishumi elinamine."
Genesis46:23 Oonyana bakaDan nguHushim.
Genesis46:24 Oonyana bakaNafetali ngooZingela bamatywina, noGuni, noYezere, noShilem."
Genesis46:25 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaBhiliha, awathi uLabhan wamnika uRakeli intombi yakhe, wamzalela uYakobi;"
Genesis46:26 Iyonke imiphefumlo eyaya noYakobi eYiputa, eyaphuma esinqeni sakhe, ngaphandle kwabafazi boonyana bakaYakobi, yaba ngamashumi amathandathu anamithandathu."
Genesis46:27 Oonyana bakaYosefu awazalelwa eYiputa yimiphefumlo emibini;
Genesis46:28 Wathumela uYuda ukuba amkhaphele kuYosefu, ammise eGoshen; bafika ezweni laseGoshen."
Genesis46:29 uYosefu wayibopha inqwelo yakhe, wenyuka waya kumkhawulela uSirayeli uyise uGoshen, wammisa ngakuye. Waziphosa entanyeni yakhe, walila ixesha elide entanyeni yakhe."
Genesis46:30 Wathi uSirayeli kuYosefu, Makhe ndife, mandibubone ubuso bakho, ngokuba usahleli."
Genesis46:31 Wathi uYosefu kubazalwana bakhe nakubantu bendlu kayise, Ndiya kunyuka ndiye ndiye kumxelela uFaro, ndithi kuye, Baze kum abazalwana bam nabendlu kabawo, ababesezweni lakwaKanan;"
Genesis46:32 Kwaye loo madoda ngabalusi, kuba umsebenzi wawo ibikukwalusa umhlambi; bezisa impahla yabo emfutshane, neenkomo zabo, neento zonke abanazo."
Genesis46:33 Wanibiza uFaro, wathi, Uyintoni na umsebenzi wenu?"
Genesis46:34 Nothi, Besisebenza nabakhonzi bakho, kwasebuncinaneni bethu unangoku, ngemfuyo, thina noobawo; ukuze nime ezweni laseGoshen; kuba balisikizi kumaYiputa bonke abalusi."
Genesis47:1 uYosefu waya kumbikela uFaro, wathi, Ubawo, nabazalwana bam, bevela ezweni lakwaKanan, impahla yabo emfutshane, nemfuyo yabo, neento zonke abanazo; nabo basezweni laseGoshen."
Genesis47:2 Wathabatha amadoda amahlanu kubazalwana bakhe, wawazisa kuFaro;"
Genesis47:3 Wathi uFaro kubazalwana bakhe, Uyintoni na umsebenzi wenu? Bathi kuFaro, Abakhonzi bakho ngabalusi bempahla emfutshane, thina noobawo bethu;"
Genesis47:4 Bathi kuFaro, Siphambukele kweli hlabathi; ngokuba ingenatyani bampahla yabo emfutshane abakhonzi bakho; ngokuba inkulu indlala ezweni lakwaKanan. Kaloku abakhonzi bakho mabahlale ezweni laseGoshen."
Genesis47:5 Wathetha uFaro kuYosefu, wathi, Uyihlo nabantwana bakho bafikile kuwe."
Genesis47:6 Ilizwe laseYiputa liphambi kwakho; makahlale uyihlo nabantakwenu kwelona lizwe lilungileyo; wabamisa ezweni laseGoshen; ukuba uyakwazi okwenzekayo phakathi kwabo, bamise babe ngabalusi bemihlambi yam."
Genesis47:7 uYosefu wamngenisa uYakobi uyise, wammisa phambi koFaro; uYakobi wamsikelela uFaro."
Genesis47:8 Wathi uFaro kuYakobi, Mingaphi na iminyaka yobudala bakho?"
Genesis47:9 Wathi uYakobi kuFaro, Imihla yeminyaka yokunduluka kwam yiminyaka elikhulu elinamanci mathathu; ootata ngexesha lokuhamba kwabo."
Genesis47:10 uYakobi wamsikelela uFaro, waphuma ebusweni bukaFaro."
Genesis47:11 uYosefu wambeka uyise nabazalwana bakhe ezweni laseYiputa, wabanika indawo yokuma kweyona ndawo intle yelizwe, ezweni laseRamses, ngokomthetho kaFaro."
Genesis47:12 uYosefu wamondla uyise, nabazalwana bakhe, nendlu yakhe yonke, ngesonka ngokwezizukulwana zabo."
Genesis47:13 Bekungekho sonka kulo lonke elimiweyo; kuba ibinkulu kunene indlala, apho lafela khona ilizwe laseYiputa nelizwe lakwaKanan ngenxa yendlala."
Genesis47:14 Wayihlanganisa uYosefu yonke imali eyayisezweni laseYiputa nasezweni lakwaKanan, yengqolowa ababeyithenga; wayingenisa uYosefu endlwini kaFaro."
Genesis47:15 Yaphela ke imali ezweni laseYiputa nasezweni lakwaKanan, eza onke amaYiputa kuYosefu, esithi, Sinike isonka; kuba imali iyasilela."
Genesis47:16 Wathi uYosefu, Zikhupheni iinkomo zenu; ndikunike wena nemfuyo yakho, yakuphela imali leyo."
Genesis47:17 Ayizisa imfuyo yawo kuYosefu, uYosefu wawanika isonka samahashe, neenkomo, neenkomo, namaesile;"
Genesis47:18 Waphela loo mnyaka, beza kuye ngomnyaka wesibini, bathi kuye, Asinakukukhanyela kukumkani wethu, ukuba imali iphele; nemihlambi yethu yeenkomo, nkosi yam; akusalanga nto emehlweni enkosi yam, yimizimba yethu ke namasimi ethu kuphela."
Genesis47:19 Kutheni na ukuze sife phambi kwamehlo akho, thina nelizwe lethu? Sithenge thina namasimi ethu ngesonka, thina namasimi ethu sibe ngabakhonzi bakaFaro; usinike imbewu, siphile, singafi, lingabi senkangala ilizwe."
Genesis47:20 uYosefu wamthenga uFaro wonke umhlaba waseYiputa; kuba amaYiputa athengisa elowo ngesabelo somhlaba wakhe, kuba ayefikelwe yindlala; ilizwe laba lelikaFaro."
Genesis47:21 Ke bona abantu wabafudusela emizini, kwathabathela kwelinye icala lomda waseYiputa kwesa kwelinye icala layo."
Genesis47:22 Ngumhlaba wababingeleli wodwa angawuthenganga; ngokuba ababingeleli babebanike isabelo sikaFaro, basidla isabelo eso babesinikwe nguFaro; ke bona abathengisanga ngomhlaba wabo."
Genesis47:23 Wathi uYosefu ebantwini, Yabonani, nina namasimi enu namhla ndithengise ngawo kuFaro; uyabona, yimbewu yakho le, yihlwayele entsimini leyo;"
Genesis47:24 Ngexesha lokuvuna nimnike uFaro isahlulo sesihlanu, ize izahlulo ezine zibe zezenu, njengembewu yentsimi, nezokudliwa nini neentsapho zenu, nokutya kwabantwana benu."
Genesis47:25 Bathi ke bona, Nguye owasisindisayo; Masibabalwe emehlweni okumkani wam, sibe ngabakhonzi bakaFaro;"
Genesis47:26 Wawisa umthetho uYosefu ezweni laseYiputa unanamhla, wokuba uFaro athabathe esesihlanu isahlulo; ngaphandle komhlaba wababingeleli wodwa, ongengokaFaro."
Genesis47:27 Bahlala oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni laseYiputa, ezweni laseGoshen; baba nobutyebi kulo, bande, bande kunene."
Genesis47:28 uYakobi wadla ubomi iminyaka elishumi elinesixhenxe ezweni laseYiputa; Iyonke iminyaka kaYakobi yaba yiminyaka elikhulu elinamanci mane anesixhenxe.
Genesis47:29 Lasondela ixesha lokuba uSirayeli afe; wabiza uYosefu unyana wakhe, wathi kuye, Ukuba kaloku ndibona inceba emehlweni akho, khawubeke isandla sakho phantsi kwethanga lam, ndenzele inceba nenyaniso; uze ungandingcwabi eYiputa."
Genesis47:30 Ke mna ndiya kuhlangana noobawo, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo uya kundikhupha eYiputa uze undingcwabe engcwabeni labo. Wathi: Ndiya kwenza njengoko uthethile."
Genesis47:31 Wathi ke yena, Ningandinaki; Wamfungela ke. Waqubuda uSirayeli emantloko esingqengqelo."
Genesis48:1 Kwathi emveni kwezi zinto, kwathiwa kuYosefu, Uyabona, uyihlo uyafa; Wathabatha oonyana bakhe bobabini, uManase noEfrayim, wahamba naye."
Genesis48:2 Waxelelwa uYakobi, kwathiwa, Nanku unyana wakho uYosefu esiza kuwe, uSirayeli wamomeleza, wahlala ezingqengqelweni."
Genesis48:3 Wathi uYakobi kuYosefu, uThixo uSomandla wabonakala kum eLuse, ezweni lakwaKanan, wandisikelela."
Genesis48:4 Wathi kum, Yabona, ndiya kukwandisa, ndinandise, ndikwenze isikhungu seentlanga; Lo mhlaba ndiwunike imbewu yakho emva kwakho, ube lilifa lakho ngonaphakade."
Genesis48:5 Ngako oko oonyana bakho ababini, owabazalelwayo ezweni laseYiputa, ndingekafiki kuwe eYiputa, ngabam, uEfrayim noManase; njengoRubhen noSimon baya kuba ngabam."
Genesis48:6 Oonyana bakho oya kubazala emva kwabo baya kuba ngabakho yaye baya kubizwa ngegama labazalwana babo elifeni labo.
Genesis48:7 Ke mna, ekundulukeni kwam ePadan, wafela nam uRakeli ezweni lakwaKanan, endleleni, ndathi ndakufika e-Efrata; Ndamngcwabela khona endleleni yase-Efrata; yiBhetelehem ke leyo."
Genesis48:8 uSirayeli wababona oonyana bakaYosefu, wathi, Ngoobani na abo?"
Genesis48:9 Wathi uYosefu kuyise, Ngoonyana bam aba andiphiwe nguThixo kule ndawo. Wathi, Ziziseni kum ndibasikelele."
Genesis48:10 Ayemnyama amehlo amaSirayeli ngenxa yokwaluphala, ukuba angabi nakubona. Wazisondeza kuye; wabanga, wabawola."
Genesis48:11 Wathi uSirayeli kuYosefu, Bendingacingi ukuba ndokubona ubuso bakho; Uyabona, uThixo undibonisile, nembewu yakho."
Genesis48:12 uYosefu wabakhupha phakathi kwamadolo akhe, waqubuda ngobuso bakhe."
Genesis48:13 uYosefu wabathabatha bobabini, uEfrayim ngesokunene sakhe ngasekhohlo kukaSirayeli, noManase ngesokhohlo sakhe, ngasekunene kukaSirayeli, wabazisa kuye."
Genesis48:14 uSirayeli wasolula esokunene sakhe, wasibeka entloko kuEfrayim, engomncinane, wasibeka esokhohlo entlokweni kaManase, ezihambisa ngezandla zakhe ngengqiqo; ngokuba uManase ebengowamazibulo."
Genesis48:15 Wamsikelela uYosefu, wathi, uThixo abahamba phambi kwakhe oobawo uAbraham noIsake, uThixo ondingenise yonke imihla yobomi bam, unanamhla."
Genesis48:16 Isithunywa eso sandihlangula kubo bonke ububi siyawasikelela amakhwenkwe; malibizwe kubo igama lam, negama looyise babo, uAbraham noIsake; kwaye mabakhule babe baninzi ehlabathini."
Genesis48:17 Wabona uYosefu ukuba uyise usibeke isandla sakhe sokunene entlokweni kaEfrayim, wonile;"
Genesis48:18 Wathi uYosefu kuyise, Makube loo nto, bawo, kuba lo ngowamazibulo; beka isandla sakho sokunene phezu kwentloko yakhe."
Genesis48:19 Akavuma uyise, wathi, Ndiyakwazi oku, nyana wam, ndiyakwazi oku; uya kuba luhlanga, ube mkhulu; kodwa okunene umzalwana wakhe uya kumdlula, nabantwana bakhe babe ziintlanga ezininzi."
Genesis48:20 Wabasikelela ngaloo mini, wathi, Ngawe uSirayeli uya kusikelela, ngokuthi, uThixo wokwenza ube njengoEfrayim nanjengoManase; waza wabeka uEfrayim phambi kukaManase."
Genesis48:21 Wathi uSirayeli kuYosefu, Yabona, ndiza kufa; kodwa uThixo uya kuba nani, anibuyisele ezweni looyihlo."
Genesis48:22 Kananjalo ndakunika isiqwenga somhlaba ngaphezu koonyana bakho, endasithabatha ngekrele lam nesaphetha sam esandleni sama-Amori."
Genesis49:1 Wababiza ke uYakobi oonyana bakhe, wathi, Zihlanganiseni, ndinixelele okuya kunihlela ngemihla yokugqibela."
Genesis49:2 Buthani niphulaphule, nina bonyana bakaYakobi, mphulaphule uSirayeli uyihlo."
Genesis49:3 Rubhen, wena mazibulo am, mandla am, ngqalo yokuqina kwam, uzuko lobuqaqawuli, uzuko lonamandla."
Genesis49:4 Ukuba uthe waguquguquka njengamanzi, akusayi kuba ncamisa kunje; kuba unyuke waya esililini sikayihlo; uze uyihlambele; wenyuka waya ebhedini yam."
Genesis49:5 uSimon noLevi ngabazalwana; izixhobo ezikhohlakeleyo kwinkampu yabo.
Genesis49:6 Owu mphefumlo wam, musa ukungena emfihlakalweni yabo; Ungazibandakanyi nebandla labo, sithandwa sam, ngokuba ngomsindo wabo babulele umntu, baludiliza udonga ngabom."
Genesis49:7 Uqalekisiwe umsindo wabo, ngokuba unobungcwangu: nomsindo wabo, ngenxa yokuba wawukhohlakele: Ndiya kubahlula kwaYakobi ndize ndibachithachithe kwaSirayeli."
Genesis49:8 Yuda, nguwe oya kubancoma abazalwana bakho; isandla sakho sibe sezintanyeni zeentshaba zakho; Oonyana bakayihlo baya kuqubuda kuwe;"
Genesis49:9 uYuda yingonyama entsha; Unyuke waya kuphanga, nyana wam; ngubani oza kumvusa?"
Genesis49:10 Intonga yasebukhosini ayiyi kumka kuYuda, nentonga yomlawuli phakathi kweenyawo zakhe ade afike uShilo; kuya kubakho kuye ukuhlanganisana kweentlanga."
Genesis49:11 Ngukhuleka emdiliyeni imazi yakhe, Nemazi yakhe komdiliya onyuliweyo; Wazihlamba iingubo zakhe ngewayini, Neengubo zakhe ngegazi leediliya."
Genesis49:12 Amehlo akhe aya kubabomvu yiwayini, Amazinyo akhe abe mhlophe ngamasi;"
Genesis49:13 uZebhulon wohlala echwebeni lolwandle; liya kuba lizibuko leenqanawa; nelizwe lakhe liya kufikelela eSidon.
Genesis49:14 uIsakare yi-esile elukhuni, Ulala phakathi kweempahla ezimbini;"
Genesis49:15 Kwaye wabona ukuba ukuphumla kulungile kwaye ihlabathi limnandi; Wagoba igxalaba ukuba athwale, waba ngumbuthi werhafu."
Genesis49:16 Ke abantu bakhe baya kugweba njengesinye sezizwe zakwaSirayeli.
Genesis49:17 Kubekho inyoka endleleni, neenyoka endleleni, zililuma izithende zehashe, awe olikhweleyo."
Genesis49:18 Ndikhangele phambili kusindiso lwakho, Yehova."
Genesis49:19 uGade, liqela lezaphuli-mthetho eziya kumoyisa, kodwa ekugqibeleni uya koyisa."
Genesis49:20 uAshere woba sityebi isonka sakhe, amnike izinto ezinqwenelekayo zokumkani."
Genesis49:21 uNafetali yimazi yexhama; unamazwi amahle.
Genesis49:22 uJosefu lisebe eliqhamayo, umthi weziqhamo ngasemthonjeni; omasebe awela eludongeni;"
Genesis49:23 Abalusi besaphetha babenza buhlungu kakhulu ngenxa yakhe;
Genesis49:24 uSithe nkqi isaphetha sakhe, nezandla zezandla zakhe zomelela ngeRafa kaYakobi; (ngoko ke, umalusi, iliwa lakwaSirayeli;)"
Genesis49:25 NgoThixo kayihlo oya kukunceda; yaye ngoSomandla uya kukusikelela ngeentsikelelo ezivela emazulwini phezulu, neentsikelelo zonogumbe ohleli ezantsi, neentsikelelo ezivela esizalweni nasesizalweni."
Genesis49:26 Iintsikelelo zikayihlo zazingaphezu kweentsikelelo zookhokho ukusa ekupheleni kweenduli ezingapheliyo, zibe entlokweni kaYosefu nasekakayizeni yalowo wahlukanayo nabantakwabo."
Genesis49:27 uBhenjamin uqwenga njengengcuka; kusasa uya kudla okuphangiweyo, ebusuku abelane okuphangiweyo."
Genesis49:28 Bonke aba zizizwe zakwaSirayeli ezilishumi elinazibini; Wenjenje ukuthetha kubo uyise, wabasikelela; wabasikelela elowo ngeentsikelelo zakhe."
Genesis49:29 Wabawisela umthetho, wathi kubo, Ndiza kuhlanganiselwa kwabakowethu; ndingcwabele koobawo emqolombeni osentsimini kaEfron umHeti;"
Genesis49:30 emqolombeni nakwintsimi yaseMakapela, ekufuphi kwaMamre, ezweni lakwaKanan, awawuthengayo uAbraham ndawonye nentsimi kuEfron umHeti, ukuba abe yindawo yokungcwaba."
Genesis49:31 Kulapho bangcwatyelwa khona uAbraham noSara umkakhe; kulapho bangcwatyelwa khona uIsake noRebheka umkakhe; ndamfihla khona uLiya.
Genesis49:32 Umhlaba waloo ntsimi nomqolomba okuyo zathengwa koonyana bakaHeti.
Genesis49:33 Wagqiba ke uYakobi ukuyolela oonyana bakhe, wazibeka esingqengqelweni iinyawo zakhe, wafa, wahlanganiselwa kwabakowabo."
Genesis50:1 uYosefu waziphosa ebusweni bukayise, walila phezu kwakhe, wamanga."
Genesis50:2 uYosefu wabawisela umthetho abakhonzi bakhe, ongugqirha, ukuba somele uyise. Ugqirha womisa isidumbu sikaSirayeli."
Genesis50:3 Kwadlula iintsuku ezimashumi mane kuye; ngokuba yazaliseka imihla yokumiswa kwesidumbu; amlilela amaYiputa iintsuku ezimashumi asixhenxe.
Genesis50:4 Kwathi, yakuzaliseka imihla yobumnyama bakhe, wathetha uYosefu kubantu bendlu kaFaro, esithi, Ukuba ndibonise inceba emehlweni enu, thethani esiva uFaro, nithi,"
Genesis50:5 Ubawo wandifungela, esithi, Yabona, ndiyafa; engcwabeni lam endizimbeleyo ezweni lakwaKanan, undingcwabele khona. Kaloku ke mandinyuke ndiye kungcwaba ubawo, ndibuye ndibuye."
Genesis50:6 Wathi uFaro, Nyuka uye kumngcwaba uyihlo njengoko wafungayo."
Genesis50:7 Wenyuka ke uYosefu waya kumngcwaba uyise; benyuka naye bonke abakhonzi bakaFaro, nezikhulu zendlu yakhe, nezikhulu zonke zelizwe laseYiputa."
Genesis50:8 Yonke indlu kaYosefu, nabazalwana bakhe, nendlu kayise, yashiya abantwana bayo kuphela, nemfuyo yabo, nemfuyo yabo, ezweni laseGoshen."
Genesis50:9 Wenyuka yena eneenqwelo zokulwa, nabamahashe, yaba yindimbane enkulu kakhulu."
Genesis50:10 Bafika esandeni sika-Atadi, esiphesheya kweYordan, bakhala khona ngesikhalo esikhulu, esinzima kunene; wazilela uyise iintsuku ezisixhenxe."
Genesis50:11 Abemi belo zwe, amaKanan, bakubona ukulila engcwabeni lika-Atadi, bathi, Eso sikhulu isililo samaYiputa; ke ngoko, eso sixeko sasibizwa ngokuba yiAbhele-mitserayim, ngaphesheya kweYordan."
Genesis50:12 Benza ke oonyana bakhe njengoko wabawisela umthetho ngako.
Genesis50:13 Bamthwala oonyana bakhe, bamsa ezweni lakwaKanan, bamngcwabela emqolombeni osentsimini yaseMakapela, awawuthengayo uAbraham ndawonye nelizwe, ukuba ube lingcwaba lakhe uEfron umHeti phambi kowakwaMamre."
Genesis50:14 uYosefu wabuyela eYiputa ke, yena nabazalwana bakhe, nabo bonke abenyuka naye beya kumngcwaba uyise, ekungcwabeni kwakhe uyise."
Genesis50:15 Ke kaloku abakhuluwa bakaYosefu babona ukuba uyise wabo ufile, bathi, Mhlawumbi uYosefu uya kusicaphukela, abubuyisele kanye na kuthi bonke ububi esimenzele bona."
Genesis50:16 Bathumela umthunywa kuYosefu, besithi, Uyihlo wawisa umthetho engekafi, wathi,"
Genesis50:17 Nothi kuYosefu, Ubuxolele abazalwana bakho ubugwenxa babo nesono sabo; ngokuba bamonile; sixolele izono zabakhonzi boThixo wooyihlo. Walila uYosefu bakuthetha naye."
Genesis50:18 Baya nabakhuluwa bakhe, baziphosa phantsi phambi kwakhe; bathi, Yabona, singabakhonzi bakho."
Genesis50:19 Wathi uYosefu kubo, Musani ukoyika;"
Genesis50:20 Ke nina nikhumbula ububi ngam; kodwa uThixo wacinga ukwenza okulungileyo, njengoko kusenjalo namhla, ukuba kusinde abantu abaninzi."
Genesis50:21 Musani ukoyika ngoku; ndonondla nina, nabantwana benu; Wabathuthuzela waza wathetha nabo ngobubele."
Genesis50:22 uYosefu wahlala eYiputa, yena nendlu kayise; uYosefu wahlala iminyaka elikhulu elinashumi-nye."
Genesis50:23 uYosefu wabona oonyana bakaEfrayim kwesesithathu isizukulwana; oonyana bakaMagire, unyana kaManase, babezalelwe emadolweni kaYosefu."
Genesis50:24 Wathi uYosefu kubakhuluwa bakhe, Ndiza kufa; uThixo okunene uya kunigcina, anikhuphe kweli hlabathi, anise ezweni abelifungele uAbraham, noIsake, noYakobi."
Genesis50:25 Wabafungisa uYosefu oonyana bakaSirayeli, esithi, uYehova woniva okunene, niwakhuphe ke amathambo am."
Genesis50:26 Wafa ke uYosefu engominyaka ilikhulu linashumi-nye; bawumisa umzimba wakhe; wafakwa etyeyeni eYiputa.
Exodus1:1 Ngawo la amagama oonyana bakaSirayeli abaya eYiputa; elowo nendlu yakhe beza noYakobi.
Exodus1:2 uRubhen, uSimon, uLevi noYuda,"
Exodus1:3 noIsakare, noZebhulon, noBhenjamin;"
Exodus1:4 uDan noNafetali, uGadi noAshere."
Exodus1:5 Iyonke imiphefumlo eyaphumayo esinqeni sikaYakobi yayiyimiphefumlo emashumi asixhenxe, ngenxa yokuba uYosefu wayeseseYiputa."
Exodus1:6 Wafa ke uYosefu, nabazalwana bakhe bonke, nesizwe sonke."
Exodus1:7 Banda oonyana bakaSirayeli, banda kunene, banda, baba namandla; wazala umhlaba ngabo."
Exodus1:8 Kwavela omnye ukumkani waseYiputa, awayengamazi uYosefu."
Exodus1:9 Wathi ebantwini bakhe, Yabonani, abantu oonyana bakaSirayeli baninzi, banamandla kunathi."
Exodus1:10 Yizani basebenze ngengqiqo; ukuze bangande, kwaye ukuba kuqhambuka nayiphi na imfazwe, nabo bazimanya neentshaba zethu kwaye balwe nathi baze ngaloo ndlela barhoxe ehlabathini."
Exodus1:11 Bamisa phezu kwabo ababhali, babacinezela ngemithwalo yabo. Bakha izixeko ezingooFaro nePitom neRamase."
Exodus1:12 Okukhona babacinezelayo, kokukhona basasazekayo; Baba buhlungu ngoonyana bakaSirayeli."
Exodus1:13 AmaYiputa abakhaba nzima oonyana bakaSirayeli.
Exodus1:14 Babumisa ubomi babo ebukhoboka obunzima, ngesijwili, nangokwakha izitena, nangayo yonke imisebenzi yasendle; yonke inkonzo yabo ababekhonza ngayo yayinzima."
Exodus1:15 Wathi ukumkani waseYiputa kubazalisikazi abangamaHebherekazi, igama lomnye belinguShifera, igama lomnye belinguPuwa."
Exodus1:16 Wathi, Njengomzalisikazi wamaHebhere, nabo basesihlalweni; ukuba yinkwenkwe, yibulaleni; ke ukuba ithe yayintombi, yodla ubomi."
Exodus1:17 Abazalisikazi boyika uThixo, àbenza ngokomyalelo wokumkani waseYiputa, bazala amakhwenkwe."
Exodus1:18 Wababiza ukumkani waseYiputa abazalisikazi, wathi kubo, Yini na ukuba nenze le nto, niwasindise amakhwenkwe?"
Exodus1:19 Bathi abazalisikazi kuFaro, Kungokuba amaHebherekazi akafani namaYiputa; ngokuba babesahleli, bazala, bengekafiki kubo abazalisikazi."
Exodus1:20 Ngoko uThixo wabaphatha kakuhle abo bazalisikazi, yaye uhlanga lwanda, lwaba namandla kakhulu."
Exodus1:21 Ngenxa yokuba abazalisikazi babemoyika uThixo, wabakhela izindlu."
Exodus1:22 uFaro wabawisela umthetho abantu bakhe bonke, wathi, Bonke oonyana abathe bazalwa, baphoseni emlanjeni umNayile, zonke iintombi nizigcine ziphila."
Exodus2:1 Kwaphuma indoda yendlu kaLevi, yazeka intombi yakwaLevi."
Exodus2:2 Wamitha umfazi lowo, wazala unyana; wambona ukuba ungumntwana omhle, wamfihla iinyanga zantathu."
Exodus2:3 Akuba engasenako ukumngcwaba, wamthabathela umkhombe wengcongolo, wawutyabeka ngodaka nebhitumene, wamfaka kuwo umntwana; Wawabeka elunxwemeni lomlambo."
Exodus2:4 Udade wabo wema mgama, ukuze ayazi into eya kwenzeka kuye."
Exodus2:5 Yehla ke intombi kaFaro, isiya kuqubha emlanjeni; nantso intombazana ihamba elunxwemeni lomlambo; Wawubona umkhombe phakathi kwemikhumbi, wathuma umkhonzazana wakhe, ukuba awuthabathe."
Exodus2:6 Akuba eyivula, wabona umntwana, nanko umntwana ekhala. Wasikwa yimfesane kakhulu, wathi, Ngomnye wabantwana bamaHebhere lo."
Exodus2:7 Wathi udade wabo kwintombi kaFaro, Ndikubize na umfazi ongumnyisi phakathi kwamaHebherekazi, ukuba umanyise umntwana?"
Exodus2:8 Yathi intombi kaFaro kuye: “Hamba! Yaya ke intombi leyo, yabiza unina womntwana."
Exodus2:9 Yathi intombi kaFaro kuye, Thabatha lo mntwana, umzise kum; ndokunika umvuzo wakho mna. Wamthabatha ke umfazi lowo umntwana, wamondla."
Exodus2:10 Wakhula umntwana, wamsa kwintombi kaFaro, waba ngunyana wayo. Wabiza uMoses, wathi, Kungokuba ndimkhuphe emanzini."
Exodus2:11 Ke kaloku, akukhula uMoses, waphuma waya kunyamekela abazalwana bakhe nemithwalo yabo; wabulala umYiputa, owabulala umzalwana wakhe ongumHebhere."
Exodus2:12 Wabhekabheka, wabona ukuba akukho mntu, wambulala umYiputa lowo, wamngcwabela entlabathini."
Exodus2:13 Kwathi ngomhla wesibini ekuphumeni kwakhe, wabona amadoda amabini angamaHebhere ephikisana, wathi kowonileyo, Uyalibetha iqabane lakho na?"
Exodus2:14 Wathi, Umiswe ngubani na ukuba ube ngukumkani nomgwebi wethu? Uza kundibulala na nam, njengokuba umbulele umYiputa? Woyika uMoses, wathi, Iyaziwa le nto."
Exodus2:15 uFaro wayiva le nto, wafuna ukumbulala uMoses. Wabaleka uMoses kuFaro, waya kuma ezweni lakwaMidiyan, wahlala ngasequleni."
Exodus2:16 Umbingeleli wakwaMidiyan wayeneentombi ezisixhenxe;
Exodus2:17 Bafika abalusi, bazigxotha, wesuka uMoses wazinceda, wayiseza impahla yazo emfutshane."
Exodus2:18 Bafika kuRehuweli uyise, wathi, Nifike kamsinya kangakanani na namhlanje?"
Exodus2:19 Bathi, Wasihlangula umYiputa esandleni sabalusi, wasenzela amanzi, wayiseza impahla emfutshane."
Exodus2:20 Wathi ezintombini zakhe, Niphi na? Yini na ukuba nimshiye umntu ombizele ukuba adle isonka?"
Exodus2:21 Wavuma uMoses ukuhlala naloo ndoda, wamnika uMoses uTsipora, intombi yayo."
Exodus2:22 Yazala unyana, yathi igama lakhe nguGershom, kuba ubesithi, Ndingumphambukeli ezweni lolunye uhlanga."
Exodus2:23 Ekuhambeni kwexesha wafa ukumkani waseYiputa. Bancwina oonyana bakaSirayeli ngenxa yobukhoboka, balila, bakhala ebukhobokeni kuThixo."
Exodus2:24 uThixo wayiva imithandazo yabo, wawukhumbula uThixo umnqophiso wakhe noAbraham, noIsake, noYakobi."
Exodus2:25 Wangena uThixo koonyana bakaSirayeli, wababona uThixo."
Exodus3:1 uMoses wayesalusa impahla emfutshane kaYitro, umkakhe, umbingeleli wakwaMidiyan; Wawubuyisela umhlambi umhlambi, waya entlango, waya kufika entabeni yoThixo oyinyaniso, ukuya kufikelela eHorebhe."
Exodus3:2 Kwabonakala isithunywa sikaYehova kuye, siselangatyeni lomlilo etyholweni elinameva."
Exodus3:3 Wathi uMoses, Mandingalahleki; ndiwubone lo mbono mkhulu, liyintoni na ityholo elingatshiyo."
Exodus3:4 Wathi uYehova akubona ukuba ujikile ukuba akhangele, uThixo wambiza etyholweni elinameva, wathi, Moses, Moses! Wathi: Ndim lo."
Exodus3:5 Wathi, Musa ukusondela; khulula iimbadada ezinyaweni zakho, kuba loo ndawo umi kuyo ingumhlaba ongcwele."
Exodus3:6 Wathi, NdinguThixo kayihlo, uThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi. Wabusithelisa uMoses ubuso bakhe; ngokuba ebesoyika ukukhangela kuThixo."
Exodus3:7 Wathi uYehova, Ndikubonile ukuphathwa kakubi kwabantu bam eYiputa, nokukhala kwabo ndikuvile ngenxa yabakhonzi babo; ngokuba ndiyazazi iinkedama zabo;"
Exodus3:8 Ndehla ke ukuze ndibahlangule esandleni samaYiputa, ndibaqeqeshe, basuke kwelo lizwe, baye ezweni elihle, elikhulu, ezweni elibaleka amasi nobusi; ezweni lamaKanan, namaHeti, nama-Amori, namaPerizi, namaHeti, namaYebhusi;"
Exodus3:9 Yabona, ukukhala koonyana bakaSirayeli, kwafika kum, ndabuya ndakubona ukuxina abaxina ngako amaYiputa."
Exodus3:10 Hamba ngoku, ndikuthume kuFaro, ubakhuphe eYiputa abantu bam, oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Exodus3:11 Wathi uMoses kuThixo, Ndingubani na ukuba ndingade ndiye kuFaro, ukuba ndibakhuphe eYiputa oonyana bakaSirayeli?"
Exodus3:12 Wathi, Ndiya kuba nawe; Nangu ke umqondiso wokuba ndikuthumile mna: Ukuba ubakhuphile abantu eYiputa, khonzani uThixo kule ntaba."
Exodus3:13 Wathi uMoses kuThixo, Uyabona, ukuba ndiya koonyana bakaSirayeli, ndithi kubo, uThixo wooyihlo undithumile kuni; bathi kum, Ngubani na igama lakhe? Ndiza kubaxelela ntoni?"
Exodus3:14 Wathi uThixo kuMoses, Ndinguye eNdinguye; Wathi, Uze uthi koonyana bakaSirayeli, NDINGUYE undithumile kuni."
Exodus3:15 Wathi uThixo kuMoses, Wothi koonyana bakaSirayeli, uYehova, uThixo wooyihlo, uThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi, undithumile kuni: igama lam ngonaphakade, yaye esi sisikhumbuzo kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana."
Exodus3:16 Yiya uwahlanganise amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, uthi kuwo, uYehova, uThixo wooyihlo, uThixo ka-Abraham, kaIsake, kaYakobi, undityhilele, wathi, Ndinivelele nina, ndiyibonile into eniyenzileyo uya kwenza eYiputa:"
Exodus3:17 Ndathi ke, Ndiya kunikhupha ebugxwayibeni baseYiputa, ndinise ezweni lamaKanan, namaHeti, nama-Amori, namaPerizi, namaHeti, namaYebhusi, ezweni elizele ngamasi nobusi."
Exodus3:18 Yizani kuye, nina namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, kukumkani waseYiputa, nithi kuye, uYehova, uThixo wamaHebhere, makasincede; ngoku makhe sihambe entlango uhambo lweentsuku ezintathu, siye kubingelela kuYehova uThixo wethu."
Exodus3:19 Ndiyazi ukuba ukumkani waseYiputa akayi kunikhulula, kwanangesandla esomeleleyo."
Exodus3:20 Ndiya kusolula isandla sam, ndiloyise iYiputa ngemisebenzi yam yonke ebalulekileyo, endiya kuyenza kulo; kwaye emva koko uya kunivumela ukuba nihambe."
Exodus3:21 Aba bantu ndiya kubababala phambi kwamaYiputa; ekuphumeni kwenu, aniyi kuhamba nedwa."
Exodus3:22 Kodwa umfazi ngamnye uya kuboleka isilivere negolide nempahla yokunxiba kwintsapho yakhe nomfazi ohlala endlwini yakhe; ukutsalele koonyana bakho neentombi zakho; bawaphange amaYiputa.
Exodus4:1 Waphendula uMoses wathi, Abakholwa ndim, abaliphulaphula izwi lam; kuba bebesithi, uYehova akazibonakalisi kuni."
Exodus4:2 Wathi uYehova kuye, Yintoni na loo nto isesandleni sakho? Wathi: Indlela."
Exodus4:3 Wathi, Zikhahleleni phantsi. Wayiphosa phantsi, yaba yinyoka; wabaleka uMoses."
Exodus4:4 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yolula isandla sakho, uyibambe ngomsila; Wasolula isandla sakhe, wayithabatha, yaba yintonga esandleni sakhe;"
Exodus4:5 ukuze bakholwe ukuba uYehova, uThixo wooyise, uThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi, ubonakele kuwe."
Exodus4:6 Waza uYehova wathi kuye, Faka isandla sakho esifubeni sakho. Wasifaka isandla sakhe esifubeni, wathi akusikhupha, wabona ukuba isandla sakhe simhlophe njengekhephu."
Exodus4:7 Wathi, Sibuyisele isandla sakho esifubeni sakho. Waphinda wabeka isandla sakhe esifubeni sakhe; Wayikrazula isifuba sayo, yasuka yaba njengenyama yayo."
Exodus4:8 Kothi, ukuba abakholwa kuni, nokuba bathe baliva ilizwi lomqondiso wokuqala, bakholwe lilizwi lomqondiso wokugqibela."
Exodus4:9 Ukuba abathanga bakholwe yile miqondiso yomibini, abaliphulaphula nelizwi lakho, wothabatha amanzi emlanjeni, uwaphalazele emhlabeni owomileyo, nasemanzini owathimbileyo; umlambo uya kujika ube ligazi emhlabeni owomileyo."
Exodus4:10 Wathi uMoses kuYehova, Camagu, Nkosi yam! Ke mna ndilulwimi olugudileyo, ndilulwimi olugudileyo."
Exodus4:11 Wathi uYehova kuye, Ngubani na obeke umlomo emntwini? Ngubani na osisimumu okanye osisithulu okanye obonayo okanye oyimfama? Andinayo na iNkosi?"
Exodus4:12 Hamba ngoku, ndoba nomlomo wakho mna, ndikubonise into oya kuyithetha."
Exodus4:13 Wathi, Nkosi, thumela ngesandla salowo uya kumthuma."
Exodus4:14 Wavutha umsindo kaYehova kuMoses, wathi, Akanguye na umkhuluwa wakho uAron umLevi? Ndiyazi ukuba uyakwazi ukuthetha kakuhle. Uyabona, uyeza kukukhawulela, kwaye xa ubona, uya kuvuya entliziyweni yakhe."
Exodus4:15 Thetha naye, ubeke amazwi emlonyeni wakhe; mna ndoba nomlomo wakho nomlomo wakhe, ndinibonise into eniya kuyenza."
Exodus4:16 Yena uya kuba ngummeli wakho ebantwini, abe ngummeli wakho endaweni yomlomo, wena ube ngowakhe esikhundleni sikaThixo."
Exodus4:17 Thabatha le ntonga esandleni sakho, uya kwenza ngayo imiqondiso;"
Exodus4:18 Wemka ke uMoses, wabuyela kuYitro, uyise womkakhe, wathi kuye, Makhe ndibuyele kubazalwana bam eYiputa, ndibone ukuba basahleli na. Wathi uYitro kuMoses, Hamba ngoxolo."
Exodus4:19 Wathi uYehova kuMoses kwaMidiyan, Buyela eYiputa; kuba afile onke amadoda abeza kukubulala."
Exodus4:20 uMoses wathabatha umkakhe noonyana bakhe, wabakhwelisa eesileni, wabuyela ezweni laseYiputa; Wayiphatha uMoses intonga kaThixo ngesandla sakhe."
Exodus4:21 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Ukuba uthe wabuyela eYiputa, qiniseka ukuba uyayenza yonke imiqondiso, endiyibeke esandleni sakho phambi koFaro; Ke mna ndiya kuyenza lukhuni intliziyo yakhe, angabandululi abantu."
Exodus4:22 Wothi kuFaro, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, uSirayeli ngunyana wam wamazibulo;"
Exodus4:23 Kwaye ndithi kuni: Myeke unyana wam, makandikhonze; ukuba uthe akwavuma ukumkhulula, uyabona, ndombulala unyana wakho wamazibulo."
Exodus4:24 Uthe akudlula, iNkosi yamhlangabeza, yafuna ukumbulala."
Exodus4:25 uTsipora wathabatha intshengece, wanqumla incam yelungu lobudoda lonyana wakhe, wayiphosa ezinyaweni zakhe, wathi, Uyindoda yamagazi kum."
Exodus4:26 Waza wamkhulula; Wathi yena, Uyindoda enegazi ngenxa yolwaluko."
Exodus4:27 Wathi uYehova kuAron, Hamba uye kukhawulela uMoses entlango. Waya kumkhawulela entabeni kaThixo, wamanga."
Exodus4:28 uMoses wamxelela uAron onke amazwi kaYehova, abemthume wona, nemiqondiso yonke abemwisele umthetho ngayo."
Exodus4:29 Wahamba uMoses noAron, bawabiza onke amadoda amakhulu oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Exodus4:30 Wawathetha uAron onke amazwi awawathethayo uYehova kuMoses, wabeka nemiqondiso phambi kwamehlo abantu."
Exodus4:31 Bakholwa abantu, beva ukuba uYehova ubavelele oonyana bakaSirayeli wakubona ukubandezeleka kwabo, bathoba baqubuda."
Exodus5:1 Wangena uMoses noAron, bathi kuFaro, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Bandulule abantu bam, bandenzele umthendeleko entlango."
Exodus5:2 Wathi uFaro, Ngubani na uYehova, ukuba ndiphulaphule izwi lakhe, ndibakhulule oonyana bakaSirayeli? uYehova andimazi, kwaye andiyi kumndulula uSirayeli."
Exodus5:3 Bathi ke bona, uThixo wamaHebhere uhlangene nathi; masiye entlango uhambo lweentsuku ezintathu, sibingelele kuYehova uThixo wethu; hleze asiqwele ngesibetho, nokuba likrele."
Exodus5:4 Wathi ukumkani waseYiputa kubo, Yini na ukuba nina Moses noAron nibayeke abantu emsebenzini wabo? yizisani imithwalo yenu."
Exodus5:5 Wathi uFaro, Yabona, abantu beli lizwe sele baninzi, bayiyeke imithwalo yabo."
Exodus5:6 Kwangaloo mini uFaro wabawisela umthetho abalungiseleli babantu, nabakhonzi babo, esithi,"
Exodus5:7 Musani ukunika abantu umququ wokwenza izitena njengokwangaphambili; mabahambe bazikhethele bona.
Exodus5:8 Ibali lezitena abazenzayo unangoku, yibekeni phezu kwalo; ize ninganciphisi nanye kuzo, ngokuba ziceliwe; ngenxa yoko babiza, besithi, Masiye kubingelela kuThixo wethu."
Exodus5:9 Makubekwe umsebenzi phezu kwabantu, bawusebenze; kwaye ninganikeli ngqalelo kumazwi alambathayo."
Exodus5:10 Baphuma abathetheli babantu nabakhonzi babo, bathetha ebantwini, bathi, Utsho uFaro ukuthi, Andiyi kuninika mfazwe;"
Exodus5:11 Hamba uye kuthabatha inqwelo yakho apho ungayifumana khona; kodwa akuyi kuncitshiswa namnye umsebenzi wenu.
Exodus5:12 Baphalazeka abantu ezweni lonke laseYiputa, babutha iindiza endaweni yengca."
Exodus5:13 Abathetheli bathi, Yisebenzeni into yemini ngangemini yayo;"
Exodus5:14 Babethwa abakhonzi boonyana bakaSirayeli, ababemise abalungiseleli bakaFaro phezu kwabo, kusithiwa, Ibiyini na ukuba ningawugqibi umsebenzi wenu wokwenza izitena izolo nanamhla, njengokwangaphambili?"
Exodus5:15 Beza abakhonzi boonyana bakaSirayeli, bambiza uFaro, besithi, Wenza ntoni na kubakhonzi bakho?"
Exodus5:16 Abakhonzi bakho abanikwa tyani, kodwa bathi kuthi, Yenzani izitena; nabo abakhonzi bakho bayabethwa; ke abantu bakho bona banetyala."
Exodus5:17 Uthe ke yena, Uceliwe, uceliwe; ngenxa yoko nithi, Masiye kubingelela kuYehova."
Exodus5:18 Yiyani ngoku, nisebenze; kuba aniyi kunikwa trowel, nonika inani lezitena."
Exodus5:19 Zabona izikhulu zoonyana bakaSirayeli ukuba bakwimeko embi, kusithiwa nje, Ize ningancitshi nto eziteneni zenu, emsebenzini wemini yenu."
Exodus5:20 Baqubisana noMoses noAron emi endleleni ekuphumeni kwabo kuFaro;
Exodus5:21 Bathi ke bona kubo, iNkosi iya kuza nabo, inigwebe; ngenxa yokuba nenze ivumba lethu laba livumba elithozamisayo emehlweni kaFaro naphambi kwabakhonzi bakhe, ngokubanika ikrele lokusibulala."
Exodus5:22 uMoses wabuyela kuYehova, wathi, Nkosi yam, yini na ukuba ubabuze kakubi aba bantu? undithume ntoni?"
Exodus5:23 Kususela koko ndangenayo kuFaro, ndithetha egameni lakho, ulutshabalalisile olu hlanga; kwaye akubasindisanga konke konke abantu bakho."
Exodus6:1 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Uya kukubona ngoku endiya kukwenza kuFaro, kuba uya kubakhulula ngesandla esithe nkqi, abagxothe ezweni lakhe ngesandla esithe nkqi."
Exodus6:2 Wathetha uThixo kuMoses, wathi kuye, NdinguYehova."
Exodus6:3 Ndazibonakalisa kuAbraham, nakuIsake, nakuYakobi, egameni loThixo uSomandla; ke ngegama lam lokuba uYehova andazekanga kubo."
Exodus6:4 Kananjalo ndawumisa nabo umnqophiso wam wokuba ndibanike ilizwe lakwaKanan, ilizwe lokuphambukela kwabo abaphambukela kulo."
Exodus6:5 Kananjalo ndeva indumiso yoonyana bakaSirayeli, abakhonziswayo ngamaYiputa; ndawukhumbula umnqophiso wam."
Exodus6:6 Ngako oko yithi koonyana bakaSirayeli, NdinguYehova, ndiya kunikhulula emithwalweni yamaYiputa, ndinihlangule ebukhobokeni bawo, ndinihlangule ngesandla esolukileyo, nangesandla esikhulu. Izigqibo:"
Exodus6:7 Ndiya kunithabatha nibe ngabantu bam, mna ndibe nguThixo wenu; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova uThixo wenu onikhuphayo phantsi kwemithwalo yamaYiputa;"
Exodus6:8 ndinise ezweni endaphakamisa isandla sam ngalo, ukuba ndilinike uAbraham noIsake noYakobi; ndiya kuninika lona, libe lilifa lenu: ndinguYehova."
Exodus6:9 uMoses wathetha wenjenje koonyana bakaSirayeli, abamphulaphulanga uMoses ngenxa yomphefumlo obuhlungu, nangenxa yomsebenzi onzima."
Exodus6:10 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Exodus6:11 Ngena uthethe kuFaro, ukumkani waseYiputa, ukuba abandulule oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni lakhe."
Exodus6:12 Wathetha uMoses phambi koYehova, wathi, Yabona, oonyana bakaSirayeli abandiphulaphulanga; Wothini na ke uFaro ukundiphulaphula, omlomo ungalukanga?"
Exodus6:13 Ngapha koko, uYehova wathetha kuMoses noAron waza wabayalela oonyana bakaSirayeli noFaro, ukumkani waseYiputa, ukuba abakhuphe oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni laseYiputa."
Exodus6:14 Zizo ezi iintloko zezindlu zooyise: oonyana bakaRubhen, amazibulo kaSirayeli; noHanoki, noPalu, noHetseron, noKarmi; Yiyo le ke inzala kaRubhen."
Exodus6:15 Oonyana bakaSimon nguYemuweli, noYamin, no-Ohadi, noYagin, noTsohare, noSawule, unyana womKananekazi; Ngabo abo oonyana bakaSimon."
Exodus6:16 Ngawo lawo amagama oonyana bakaLevi ngokwemizalwane yabo; uGershon, noKehati, noMerari; iminyaka yobomi bukaLevi yaba yiminyaka elikhulu elinamanci mathathu anesixhenxe."
Exodus6:17 Oonyana bakaGershon nguLibheni noShimehi ngokwemizalwane yabo.
Exodus6:18 Oonyana bakaKehati nguAmram, noItsare, noHebron, noUziyeli; iminyaka yobomi bukaKehati yaba yiminyaka elikhulu elinamanci mathathu anamithathu."
Exodus6:19 Oonyana bakaMerari nguMahali noMushi; yiyo leyo imizalwane yakwaLevi ngokwemizalwane yabo.
Exodus6:20 uAmoram wazeka uYokebhede, udade boyise; wamzalela uAron noMoses; iminyaka yobomi buka-Amram yaba yiminyaka elikhulu elinamanci mathathu anesixhenxe."
Exodus6:21 Oonyana bakaItsahare nguKora noNefegi noSigri.
Exodus6:22 Oonyana bakaUziyeli nguMishayeli noElitsafan noSitri.
Exodus6:23 uAron wazeka uElishebha, intombi ka-Aminadabhi, udade boNashon; wamzalela uNadabhi noAbhihu, uElazare noItamare."
Exodus6:24 Oonyana bakaKoreni nguAsheri; nguAshere, noElikana, noAbhiyasafu: yiyo leyo imizalwane yamaKora."
Exodus6:25 uElazare, unyana ka-Aron, wazeka enye yeentombi zikaPutiyeli yangumkakhe; wamzalela uPinehasi. Zizo ezo iintloko zezindlu zooyise zabaLevi ngokweenzala zazo."
Exodus6:26 Nguye lowo uAron noMoses, wathi kubo uYehova, Bakhupheni oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni laseYiputa ngokwemikhosi yabo;"
Exodus6:27 Ngabo aba bathethayo kuFaro ukumkani waseYiputa, ukuba abakhuphe oonyana bakaSirayeli eYiputa: nguMoses noAron."
Exodus6:28 Kwenzeka oko mini wathetha uYehova kuMoses ezweni laseYiputa, wathi:"
Exodus6:29 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, wathi, NdinguYehova; uthethe kuFaro, ukumkani waseYiputa, zonke izinto endizithethayo kuwe."
Exodus6:30 Wathi uMoses phambi koYehova, Yabona, ndinemilebe yomlomo engalukanga; wothini na ukundiva uFaro?"
Exodus7:1 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yabona, ndikwenze uthixo kuFaro; ke uAron umkhuluwa wakho woba ngumprofeti wakho."
Exodus7:2 Thetha zonke izinto endikuwisele umthetho ngazo; yaye uAron omkhulu uya kuthetha kuFaro ukuba abandulule oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni lakhe.
Exodus7:3 Ndiza kuyenza lukhuni intliziyo kaFaro ndize ndiyandise imiqondiso nemimangaliso yam kwilizwe laseYiputa.
Exodus7:4 Akayi kuniphulaphula uFaro, ngoko ndabeka isandla sam phezu kweYiputa ndaza ndawakhupha amacebo am nohlanga lwam loonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni laseYiputa ngezigwebo ezikhulu;"
Exodus7:5 azi amaYiputa, ekusoluleni kwam isandla sam phezu kweYiputa, ukuba ndinguYehova, ndibakhuphe oonyana bakaSirayeli phakathi kwawo."
Exodus7:6 Wenza ke uMoses noAron; ngoko uYehova wabawisela umthetho ngako, benjenjalo."
Exodus7:7 uMoses ubeminyaka imashumi asibhozo ezelwe, noAron ubeminyaka imashumi asibhozo anamithathu ezelwe, ukuthetha kwabo kuFaro."
Exodus7:8 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses nakuAron, esithi,"
Exodus7:9 Uthe uFaro wathetha kuni, wathi, Zenzeleni ummangaliso, wothi kuAron, Thabatha intonga yakho, uyiphose phambi koFaro; yoba yinyoka."
Exodus7:10 Wangena uMoses noAron kuFaro, benza njengoko uYehova wabawisela umthetho; yaye uAron waluphosa unkontsho lwakhe emhlabeni phambi koFaro naphambi kwabakhonzi bakhe, lwaza lwaba yinyoka."
Exodus7:11 Kananjalo uFaro wazibiza izilumko namatola; zenjenjalo nezazi zaseYiputa ngobugqi bazo.
Exodus7:12 Elowo waphosa intonga yakhe emhlabeni, yaba yinyoka; yasuka intonga ka-Aron yayidla intonga yabo."
Exodus7:13 Wayenza lukhuni intliziyo kaFaro, akabaphulaphula; njengoko watshoyo uYehova."
Exodus7:14 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Intliziyo kaFaro iqaqadekile, akavumi ukubandulula abantu."
Exodus7:15 Yiya kuFaro kusasa; nanko ephuma esiya emanzini; ume eludinini lomlambo ekufikeni kwayo; intonga eyaba yinyoka yiphathe esandleni sakho.
Exodus7:16 Wathi kuye, uYehova, uThixo wamaHebhere, undithume kuwe, esithi, Bashiye abantu bam, baye kundikhonza entlango; yabona, akuvakali kwada kwangoku."
Exodus7:17 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Uya kwazi ngale nto ke ukuba ndinguYehova: yabona, ndiwabetha amanzi oMlambo umNayile ngesandla sam, abe ligazi."
Exodus7:18 Ziya kufa iintlanzi ezisemlanjeni, unuke umlambo; akavuma amaYiputa ukuwasela amanzi omlambo."
Exodus7:19 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yithi kuAron, Thabatha intonga yakho, wolule isandla sakho phezu kwamanzi aseYiputa, phezu kwemilambo yabo, naphezu kwemilambo yabo, naphezu kwamachibi abo, naphezu kwamadike abo onke amanzi abo, abe ligazi yaye kuya kubakho igazi kulo lonke ilizwe laseYiputa, empahleni yomthi nakwimpahla yamatye."
Exodus7:20 OoMoses noAron benza njengoko uYehova wabawisela umthetho; wabeka ibhulorho, wawatywina amanzi oMnayile phambi kwamehlo kaFaro, naphambi kwabakhonzi bakhe; aguquka onke amanzi omlambo, aba ligazi."
Exodus7:21 Zafa iintlanzi ezisemlanjeni; Wanuka umlambo, akaba nako amaYiputa ukuwasela amanzi omlambo; laba ligazi kulo lonke ilizwe laseYiputa."
Exodus7:22 Zenjenjalo ke nezazi zaseYiputa ngobugqi bazo. Yaba lukhuni intliziyo kaFaro, akabaphulaphula, njengoko watshoyo uYehova."
Exodus7:23 Wajika uFaro, wangena endlwini yakhe, akayibekela ntliziyo naye loo nto."
Exodus7:24 Onke amaYiputa emba amanzi okusela ngeenxa zonke emlanjeni; ngokuba ebengenakuwasela amanzi omlambo.
Exodus7:25 Kwadlula iintsuku zasixhenxe emva kokuwubetha kwakhe uYehova umlambo.
Exodus8:1 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yiya kuFaro, uthethe naye, uthi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Bandulule abantu bam, bahambe baye kundikhonza."
Exodus8:2 Ukuba uthe akwavuma ukubandulula, yabona, ndolibetha ilizwe lakho lonke ngamasele."
Exodus8:3 Umlambo wovelisa amasele amaninzi, anyuke anyuke endlwini yakho, nasegumbini lakho lokulala, nasesililini sakho, nasendlwini yabakhonzi bakho, nasebantwini bakho, naseziontini zakho, nasezityeni zakho;"
Exodus8:4 anyuke amasele, eze kuwe, nakubantu bakho, nakubakhonzi bakho bonke;"
Exodus8:5 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yithi kuAron, Yolula isandla sakho nentonga yakho phezu kwemilambo, naphezu kwemilambo, naphezu kwamachibi, anyuke amasele ezweni laseYiputa."
Exodus8:6 Wasolula uAron isandla sakhe phezu kwamanzi aseYiputa; zenyuka iinkumbi, zaligubungela ilizwe laseYiputa."
Exodus8:7 Amagqirha enjenjalo ngomlingo wawo, aza angenisa amasele ezweni laseYiputa."
Exodus8:8 uFaro wabiza uMoses noAron, wathi, Thandazani kuYehova, azisuse ezo iinkumbi kum, nakubantu bam; yaye ndiza kubandulula abantu baye kubingelela kuYehova."
Exodus8:9 Wathi uMoses kuFaro, Ndiqhayise ngam; Ndiya kukucela nini na wena, nakubakhonzi bakho, nakubantu bakho, ukuba uwatshabalalise amasele kuwe nasezindlwini zakho, asale kuMlambo umNayile kuphela?"
Exodus8:10 Wathi ke yena, Ngomso. Wathi, Ngokwelizwi lakho, ukuze wazi ukuba akukho unjengoYehova uThixo wethu;"
Exodus8:11 asuke amasele kuwe, nakwizindlu zakho, nakubakhonzi bakho, nakubantu bakho; basenokuhlala nje emlanjeni."
Exodus8:12 Bemka ooMoses noAron kuFaro; wabiza uMoses kuYehova ngenxa yamavukuthu awayewazise kuFaro.
Exodus8:13 Wenza uYehova ngokwelizwi likaMoses; zafa iinkomo ezindlwini, nasemizaneni, nasemasimini."
Exodus8:14 Bawahlanganisa ayimfumba;
Exodus8:15 Wabona uFaro ukuba ulibele, wayenza lukhuni intliziyo yakhe, akabaphulaphula; njengoko watshoyo uYehova."
Exodus8:16 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yithi kuAron, Yolula intonga yakho, ulubethe uthuli lwelizwe lube ziingcongconi ezweni lonke laseYiputa."
Exodus8:17 Benjenjalo; ngenxa yokuba uAron wasolula isandla sakhe esasibambe intonga yakhe waza walubetha uthuli lomhlaba, lwaba ziingcongconi ebantwini nasezilwanyaneni; Lonke uthuli lwelizwe lwaba luthuli ezweni lonke laseYiputa."
Exodus8:18 Oogqirha benza okufanayo ngomlingo wabo ukuvelisa iingcongconi, kodwa abazange bakwazi;"
Exodus8:19 Zathi izazi kuFaro, Ngumnwe kaThixo lo; njengoko watshoyo uYehova."
Exodus8:20 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Vuka kusasa, ume ngakuFaro; nanko ephuma esiya emanzini; Wathi yena kuye, uYehova uthe, Bandulule abantu bam, baye kundikhonza."
Exodus8:21 Kungenjalo, ukuba uthe akwabandulula abantu bam, yabona, ndothumela iingonyama kuwe, nakubakhonzi bakho, nakubantu bakho, nezindlu zakho; izindlu zamaYiputa ziya kuzala ziimbovane, nelizwe abakulo."
Exodus8:22 Ndiya kulitshabalalisa ngaloo mini ilizwe laseGoshen, abemi kulo abantu bam, kungabikho baneqhenqa; wazi ukuba ndinguYehova phakathi kwehlabathi kude kuse ekupheleni;"
Exodus8:23 ndibahlule abantu bam nabantu bakho; ngomso izakuba ngulomboniso.
Exodus8:24 Wenjenjalo uYehova; Zangena iimbovane endlwini kaFaro, nasezindlwini zabakhonzi bakhe, nakwilizwe lonke laseYiputa;"
Exodus8:25 uFaro wabiza uMoses noAron, wathi, Hambani niye kubingelela kuThixo wenu kweli lizwe."
Exodus8:26 Wathi uMoses, Akulungile ukwenjenjalo; kuba siya kuwenza amasikizi amaYiputa kuYehova uThixo wethu; Yabona, ndiya kuwabulala amasikizi amaYiputa phambi kwawo, angasixulubi ngamatye?"
Exodus8:27 Siya kuhamba iintsuku zibe ntathu entlango, sibingelele kuYehova uThixo wethu, njengoko wasiwisela umthetho ngako."
Exodus8:28 Wathi uFaro, Ndiya kunikhulula, niye kubingelela kuYehova uThixo wenu entlango; kodwa musani ukuya kude; thandazele."
Exodus8:29 Wathi uMoses, Yabona, ndiyamka kuni, ndithandaze kuYehova, amke ngomso amaqhenqa kuFaro, nakubakhonzi bakhe, nakubantu bakhe; yaye uFaro makangabi saba sisiphithiphithi aze abandulule abantu baye kubingelela kuYehova."
Exodus8:30 uMoses wemka kuFaro, wathandaza kuYehova."
Exodus8:31 Wenza uYehova ngokwelizwi likaMoses; wabasusa abaneqhenqa kuFaro, nakubakhonzi bakhe, nakubantu bakhe; akusekho namnye."
Exodus8:32 Naye uFaro wayiqaqadekisa intliziyo yakhe ngelo xesha, akabandulula abantu."
Exodus9:1 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yiya kuFaro, uthethe naye, uthi, Utsho uYehova uThixo wamaHebhere, ukuthi, Bashiye abantu bam, bandikhonze."
Exodus9:2 Kuba xa uthe akwavuma ukubandulula, ubathulise,"
Exodus9:3 Yabona, isandla sikaYehova siphezu kwemfuyo yakho esendle, namahashe, namaesile, neenkamela, neenkomo, neegusha; kuya kubakho indyikitya yokufa."
Exodus9:4 uYehova uya kuwahlula imihlambi yamaSirayeli kwimihlambi yaseYiputa, kungafi nto koonyana bakaSirayeli bonke."
Exodus9:5 Kwaye iNkosi yabeka ixesha, kwaye yathi: Ngomso iNkosi iya kuyenza le nto ehlabathini."
Exodus9:6 Wayenza ke uYehova le nto ngomso, yafa yonke imfuyo yaseYiputa; akwafa nanye emfuyoni yoonyana bakaSirayeli."
Exodus9:7 Wathumela uFaro, yaye abona ukuba akufanga nanye emhlambini wakwaSirayeli. Yaba lukhuni intliziyo kaFaro, akavuma ukubandulula abantu."
Exodus9:8 Wathi uYehova kuMoses nakuAron, Bekani uthuthu eziko oluzele zizalisa izandla, uMoses waluphosa esibhakabhakeni phambi koFaro."
Exodus9:9 Uya kuba luthuli ezweni lonke laseYiputa, abe sisibetho esijikajikayo phakathi kwabantu neenkomo ezweni lonke laseYiputa."
Exodus9:10 Baluthabatha ke uthuthu lweziko, bema phambi koFaro; uMoses wayitshiza esibhakabhakeni; yaye yaba sisibetho esadumba ngamathumba ebantwini nasezilwanyaneni."
Exodus9:11 Ababa nako oogqirha ukuma phambi koMoses ngenxa yezilonda; ngenxa yokuba kwakukho izibetho kumaSiriya nakuwo onke amaYiputa.
Exodus9:12 uYehova wayenza lukhuni intliziyo kaFaro, akabaphulaphula; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo uMoses umthetho."
Exodus9:13 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Vuka kusasa, uye kuma phambi koFaro, uthi kuye, Utsho uYehova uThixo wamaHebhere, ukuthi, Bashiye abantu bam, bandikhonze."
Exodus9:14 Kuba ngesi sihlandlo ndithuma bonke ubugwenxa bam entliziyweni yakho, nakubakhonzi bakho, nakubantu bakho; ukuze wazi ukuba akukho namnye unjengam ehlabathini lonke."
Exodus9:15 Kuba ngoku, ndiya kusolula isandla sam, ndikubethe wena nabantu bakho ngesibetho; uya kunqunyulwa angabikho ehlabathini."
Exodus9:16 Ndikuphakamisile ngenxa yoko, ukuba ndiwabonakalalise ngawe amandla am; nokuba igama lam lithethwe ehlabathini lonke."
Exodus9:17 Usaqhayisa ngabantu bam, ungabandululi nje?"
Exodus9:18 Yabona, eli xesha ngomso ndiya kunisa isichotho esikhulu kunene, ekungazanga kubekho singaso eYiputa, kususela ekusekweni kwayo kude kube ngoku."
Exodus9:19 Thumela ngoku, uthabathe imfuyo yakho, neento zonke onazo ezweni; Kuba phezu kwabantu bonke, nakwizinto zonke eziphilileyo ezifunyenweyo ezweni, ezingabuyiselwa ekhaya, kuya kuwa isichotho phezu kwazo, zife."
Exodus9:20 Owoyikayo ilizwi likaYehova kubakhonzi bakaFaro, mababaleke ezindlwini zabo, abakhonzi bakhe nemfuyo yakhe."
Exodus9:21 Ongaliphulaphulanga ilizwi likaYehova, wabashiya abakhonzi bakhe nemfuyo yakhe ezweni."
Exodus9:22 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yolulela isandla sakho ezulwini, kubekho isichotho ezweni lonke laseYiputa phezu kwabantu, naphezu kweenkomo, naphezu kwemifuno yonke yelizwe ezweni lonke laseYiputa."
Exodus9:23 Wayolulela uMoses intonga yakhe ezulwini, uYehova wathoba iindudumo nesichotho, kwawa umlilo emhlabeni. Waza uYehova walinisa isichotho ilizwe laseYiputa."
Exodus9:24 Kwabakho isichotho nomlilo oxutywe nesichotho esikhulu kunene, ekungazanga kubekho ezweni lonke laseYiputa, kususela oko aba luhlanga."
Exodus9:25 Isichotho salibetha lonke ilizwe laseYiputa, nento yonke ebe isezweni, kuthabathela ebantwini kwesa enkomeni; sayibetha isichotho yonke izityalo zelizwe, sayaphula yonke imithi yelizwe."
Exodus9:26 Kusezweni laseGoshen kuphela, apho kwakukho oonyana bakaSirayeli, engazange kubekho sichotho."
Exodus9:27 Waza uFaro wabiza uMoses noAron, wathi kubo, NdiNgenene ngoku; uYehova ulilungisa, kodwa mna nabantu bam singendawo."
Exodus9:28 Thandazani kuYehova; kwanele ukubakho kweendudumo nesichotho; ndinikhulule, ningabi sabakho."
Exodus9:29 Wathi uMoses kuye, Ekuphumeni kwam phakathi komzi, ndozolulela kuYehova izandla zam; ziphele iindudumo, nesichotho singabi sabakho; ukuze nazi ukuba ihlabathi lelikaYehova."
Exodus9:30 Ke wena nabakhonzi bakho, ndiyazi ukuba anizange niyoyike iNkosi uYehova."
Exodus9:31 Kwakutyelwe iflakisi nerhasi, kuba irhasi ibihleli, neflakisi ibininzi."
Exodus9:32 Ke yona ingqolowa nomdiza ayinqunyulwanga, ngenxa yokuba ibingeninzi."
Exodus9:33 Waphuma uMoses emzini kaFaro, wazolulela izandla zakhe kuYehova, zayeka iindudumo nesichotho, ayabi mvula emhlabeni."
Exodus9:34 Wabona uFaro ukuba iphelile imvula nesichotho neendudumo, waphinda wona, wayiqaqadekisa intliziyo yakhe, yena nabakhonzi bakhe."
Exodus9:35 Yaba lukhuni intliziyo kaFaro, akabandulula oonyana bakaSirayeli; njengoko uYehova wathethayo ngoMoses."
Exodus10:1 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yiya kuFaro; kuba mna ndiyiqaqadekisile intliziyo yakhe, nentliziyo yabakhonzi bakhe, ukuba bathethe imibono yam phambi kwakhe."
Exodus10:2 Uze uthethe kunyana wakho, nakunyana wakho, into endayenzayo eYiputa, nemiqondiso yam endayenzayo phakathi kwabo; ukuze wazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Exodus10:3 Waya uMoses noAron kuFaro, bathi kuye, Utsho uYehova, uThixo wamaHebhere, ukuthi, Kuya kuda kube nini na ungavumi ukuzithoba phambi kwam? bandulule abantu bam, baye kundikhonza."
Exodus10:4 Okanye ukuba uthe akwavuma ukubandulula abantu bam, yabona, ngomso ndozisa iinkumbi ezweni lakho."
Exodus10:5 Ziya kuwugubungela umhlaba, kungabonwa mntu; zidle amasalela akho asindileyo, okuseleyo sisichotho, zidle yonke imithi ehluma phezu kwakho endle;"
Exodus10:6 zizalise izindlu zakho, nezindlu zabakhonzi bakho bonke, nezindlu zamaYiputa onke; Andizange ndibabone ooyihlo nooyihlo kususela emhlabeni unanamhla. Wajika, wemka kuFaro."
Exodus10:7 Bathi abakhonzi bakaFaro kuye, Koda kube nini na indoda esiba ngumgibe kuthi? mabafuduke abantu, baye kukhonza uYehova uThixo wabo; akukazi na, ukuba iYiputa iza kutshabalala?"
Exodus10:8 Baza ooMoses noAron babuyiselwa kwakuFaro; wathi kubo, Hambani, niye kukhonza uYehova uThixo wenu; kodwa ngubani oya kuhamba?"
Exodus10:9 Wathi uMoses, Siya kuhamba neenkomo zethu, namadoda ethu amakhulu, noonyana bethu, neentombi zethu, neenkomo zethu, nemfuyo yethu; kuba kufuneka senze umbhiyozo ozukisa uYehova."
Exodus10:10 Wathi kubo, uYehova makabe nani, ndinikhululele nina nabantwana benu; ngokuba ububi buphambi kwakho."
Exodus10:11 Akunjalo; hambani ngoku niye kukhonza uYehova; kuba ubuyinqwenela. Bagxothwa ke ebusweni bukaFaro.
Exodus10:12 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yolula isandla sakho phezu kwelizwe laseYiputa, phezu kweenkumbi, zilingene ilizwe laseYiputa, ziyidle yonke imifuno yelizwe eli, eseleyo esichothweni."
Exodus10:13 Wayolula uMoses intonga yakhe phezu kwelizwe laseYiputa, uYehova wahambisa umoya wasempumalanga kwelo lizwe yonke loo mini nobusuku bonke; kwakunetha umoya wasempumalanga wezisa iinkumbi."
Exodus10:14 Zenyuka iinkumbi kulo lonke ilizwe laseYiputa, zahlala ezindaweni zonke zaseYiputa; zazinzima kakhulu; phambi kwazo akuzange kubekho zinkumbi zingako, kwabe emva kwazo kungasayi kubakho zinkumbi."
Exodus10:15 Zabugubungela ihlabathi lonke, laba mnyama ilizwe; yaye badla yonke imifuno yomhlaba neziqhamo zonke zemithi eyayisele, akwasala luhlaza emithini nakwizityalo zelizwe kulo lonke ilizwe laseYiputa."
Exodus10:16 Wakhawuleza uFaro wababiza uMoses noAron; wathi, Ndonile kuYehova uThixo wenu, nakuni."
Exodus10:17 Ndixoleleni isono sam kube kanye, nimcele uYehova uThixo wenu, asisuse kum esi sifo."
Exodus10:18 Wemka ke kuFaro, wathandaza kuYehova."
Exodus10:19 Wawuguqula ke uYehova umoya wasentshonalanga lowo, wazithabatha iinkumbi, wazidiba eSekefe; akwasala nanye inkumbi kulo lonke ilizwe laseYiputa."
Exodus10:20 Wayenza lukhuni uYehova intliziyo kaFaro, akabandulula oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Exodus10:21 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yolulela isandla sakho ezulwini, kubekho ubumnyama ezweni laseYiputa, bugutyungelwe bubumnyama."
Exodus10:22 Wasolulela uMoses isandla sakhe ezulwini; kwaza kwakho ubumnyama nesithokothoko kulo lonke ilizwe laseYiputa iintsuku ezintathu.
Exodus10:23 Ababonana, yaye kangangeentsuku ezintathu akukho bani uvukayo kwindawo yakhe yokuhlala, kodwa kubo bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli kwabakho ukukhanya ezintenteni zabo."
Exodus10:24 uFaro wambiza uMoses, wathi, Hambani niye kukhonza uYehova; Impahla yenu emfutshane neenkomo zenu mazime; mabahambe nawe nabantwana bakho."
Exodus10:25 Wathi uMoses, Nisinike nani imibingelelo namadini anyukayo, ukuba siwasondeze kuYehova uThixo wethu;"
Exodus10:26 nemihlambi yethu ihambe nathi; akukho zikhonkwane ezishiywe ngasemva; ngenxa yoko simele sithabathele ekukhonzeni uYehova uThixo wethu; kwaye asazi ukuba masikhonze ngantoni na iNkosi side sifike apho.
Exodus10:27 Wayenza lukhuni uYehova intliziyo kaFaro, akabakhulula."
Exodus10:28 Wathi uFaro kuye, Hamba umke kum, uzigcine, ungaphindi ububone ubuso bam; kuba ngaloo mini, ukuba nibubone ubuso bam, niya kufa."
Exodus10:29 Wathi uMoses, Utyaphile; Andisayi kuphinda ndibubone ubuso bakho."
Exodus11:1 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Andiwisanga nasinye isigwebo phezu koFaro naphezu kweYiputa; emveni koko uya kunisusa apha; ukuba akanindululi, wonigxotha kuphele apho."
Exodus11:2 Thetha apho baphulaphuleyo abantu, uthi, elowo kwindlu yakhe, nabafazi bonke bendlu yakhe, mabacele izivatho zesilivere nezegolide."
Exodus11:3 uYehova wabenzela inceba abantu emehlweni amaYiputa. Loo ndoda ke leyo inguMoses yayinkulu kunene ezweni laseYiputa, emehlweni abakhonzi bakaFaro, nasemehlweni abantu."
Exodus11:4 Wathi uMoses, uYehova wathi, Phakathi kobusuku, ndiya kuphuma ndiye eYiputa."
Exodus11:5 Onke amazibulo ezweni laseYiputa aya kufa, kuqalela kowamazibulo kaFaro ehleli etroneni yakhe, kuse kowamazibulo omkhonzazana osemva kwelitye lokusila; nawo onke amazibulo eenkomo."
Exodus11:6 Kuya kubakho isikhalo esikhulu ezweni lonke laseYiputa, ekungazanga sibekho, nesingayi kubuya sibekho."
Exodus11:7 Ke koonyana bakaSirayeli akuyi kubakho nja ibavuthulula ngolwimi lwayo, kuthabathele emntwini kuse ezinkomeni, ukuze nazi ukuba uYehova uyahluka phakathi kweYiputa noSirayeli."
Exodus11:8 Behla beze kum bonke aba bakhonzi bakho, baqubude kum, bathi, Hamba wena nabantu bonke abaseleyo, ndihambe mna. Emva koko wemka enomsindo omkhulu kuFaro."
Exodus11:9 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Akayi kuniphulaphula uFaro; ukuze imisebenzi yam yanda ezweni laseYiputa."
Exodus11:10 uMoses noAron bayenza yonke le miqondiso phambi koFaro; uYehova wayenza lukhuni intliziyo kaFaro, akabandulula oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni lakhe."
Exodus12:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses nakuAron ezweni laseYiputa, wathi,"
Exodus12:2 Le nyanga kuni iyintloko yeenyanga; Mayibe yinyanga yokuqala enyakeni kuni.
Exodus12:3 Thethani kwibandla lonke lakwaSirayeli, nithi, Ngolweshumi usuku kule nyanga elowo makathabathe ixhwane ezindlwini zooyise, nexhwane kwindlu nganye."
Exodus12:4 Ukuba ithe indlu yancinane exhwaneni, makathabathe ixhwane yena enommelwane wakhe okufuphi nendlu yakhe, ngokwenani lemiphefumlo; elowo anokudla kwakhe ixhwane."
Exodus12:5 Ixhwane lenu malibe liduna eligqibeleleyo, elimnyaka mnye; wolithabatha ezigusha nasebhokhweni."
Exodus12:6 Nize niyigcine kude kube lusuku lweshumi elinesine lwaloo nyanga, liyixhele lonke ibandla lebandla lakwaSirayeli ngokuhlwa;"
Exodus12:7 bathabathe egazini, balitshize emigubasini yomibini, nasemigubasini yezindlu abaya kudlela kuzo;"
Exodus12:8 Bayidla inyama ngobo busuku, yosiwe emlilweni, izonka ezingenagwele; batya kunye nemifuno ekrakra."
Exodus12:9 Musa ukuyidla ingekavuthwa, nokuba ingagalelwanga emanzini, kodwa yosiwe emlilweni; intloko yayo, nomlomo wayo, nokubethwa kwayo."
Exodus12:10 Musani ukushiya nto kuyo kude kuse; okuseleyo kwada kwasa nokutshisa ngomlilo.
Exodus12:11 Woyidla ke; ubhinqe amanqe akho, unxibe iimbadada zakho ezinyaweni zakho, nomsimelelo wakho ezandleni zakho; udle ngokukhawuleza; yipasika kaYehova leyo."
Exodus12:12 Kuba ngobu busuku ndiya kucanda ezweni laseYiputa, ndiwabulale onke amazibulo ezweni laseYiputa, ndithabathele emntwini ndise enkomeni; ndiya kubagweba bonke oothixo baseYiputa: ndinguYehova."
Exodus12:13 Igazi loba ngumqondiso kuni ezindlwini eniya kuba kuzo; xa ndibona igazi, ndodlula kuni, singabi nakufikelwa sisohlwayo sokutshabalalisa, ekulibetheni kwam ilizwe laseYiputa."
Exodus12:14 Le mini yoba yimini yesikhumbuzo kuni; nibhiyozele kuYehova kwizizukulwana zenu; uya kuwubhiyozela ngonaphakade ngomyalelo.
Exodus12:15 Iintsuku ezisixhenxe nidle izonka ezingenagwele; nize nikhuphe igwele ezindlwini zenu ngomhla wokuqala; kuba bonke abadla isonka esinegwele kususela kolokuqala kude kube lusuku lwesixhenxe, bonqanyulwa bangabikho kwaSirayeli loo moya."
Exodus12:16 Ngomhla wokuqala kobakho ibandla elingcwele, nangomhla wesixhenxe kobakho ibandla elingcwele kuni; makungàsetyenzwa kuwo, ingenguwo ukudla komntu wonke, okuya kwenziwa nini kuphela."
Exodus12:17 Yenza umthendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele; kuba ngaloo mini ndabukhupha ubuncwane benu ezweni laseYiputa; ke ngoko, niya kuwugcina lo mhla kwizizukulwana zenu, ngomthetho wanaphakade."
Exodus12:18 Ngeyokuqala inyanga, ngosuku lweshumi elinesine enyangeni leyo, ngokuhlwa, nodla izonka ezingenagwele, kude kuse kusuku lwamashumi omabini analunye lwenyanga leyo, ngokuhlwa."
Exodus12:19 Ze kungafunyanwa gwele ezindlwini zenu iintsuku ezisixhenxe; kuba bonke abadla into enegwele, bonqanyulwa bangabikho ebandleni lakwaSirayeli, nokuba ngumphambukeli, nokuba ngozalelwe kuloo ndawo."
Exodus12:20 Yonke into enegwele ningayidli; ungadla izonka ezingenagwele emakhayeni akho onke.
Exodus12:21 Wawabiza uMoses onke amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, wathi kuwo, Phumani nizithabathele ixhwane ngokwemizalwane yenu, nixhele ipasika."
Exodus12:22 Uthabathe isipha sehisope, usithi nkxu egazini esityeni, ufefe umnyango ophezulu, namacala omabini, ngegazi esityeni; makungaphumi namnye kuni ngomnyango wendlu yakhe kude kube kusasa."
Exodus12:23 Ngokuba uYehova uya kucanda, awabulale amaYiputa; ukuba libona igazi elucangweni olungaphezulu nakwiimbombo zombini, wodlula uYehova emnyango, angamvumeli umenzi wobubi ukuba angene ezindlwini zenu, anitshabalalise."
Exodus12:24 Wugcine lo mbandela ube ngummiselo kuwe nakoonyana bakho kude kuse ephakadeni.
Exodus12:25 Nakufika ezweni aya kuninika uYehova, njengoko watshoyo, niyigcine le nkonzo."
Exodus12:26 Xa bathe oonyana benu kuni, Yeyani na le nkonzo?"
Exodus12:27 nithi, Le yipasika kaYehova, owagqitha ezindlwini zoonyana bakaSirayeli eYiputa, wawaxabela amaYiputa, wazisindisa izindlu zethu; Bathoba abantu, baqubuda."
Exodus12:28 Bemka oonyana bakaSirayeli, benza njengoko uYehova wabawisela umthetho uMoses noAron, benjenjalo."
Exodus12:29 Kwathi phakathi kobusuku, uYehova wawabulala onke amazibulo ezweni laseYiputa, kwathabathela kowamazibulo kaFaro osetroneni yakhe, kwesa kowamazibulo womthinjwa owayevalelwe entolongweni; nawo onke amazibulo eenkomo."
Exodus12:30 Wavuka uFaro ebusuku, yena nabakhonzi bakhe bonke, namaYiputa onke; kwabakho inyikima enkulu eYiputa; ngokuba akubangakho ndlu, kungekho mntu ufileyo."
Exodus12:31 Wabiza uMoses noAron ebusuku, wathi, Sukani niphume phakathi kwabantu bam, nina nyana bakaSirayeli; nihambe niye kukhonza uYehova njengoko nitshilo."
Exodus12:32 Impahla yenu emfutshane neenkomo zenu zithabatheni, njengoko natsho, nihambe; nam undisikelele."
Exodus12:33 AmaYiputa ababongoza abantu ukuba bakhawuleze baphume kwelo zwe; ngokuba besithi, Sifile sonke."
Exodus12:34 Abantu bathabatha intlama yabo engenagwele, neendebe zabo zentlama zibotshelelwe emagxeni abo ezingutyeni zabo."
Exodus12:35 Benza oonyana bakaSirayeli ngokwelizwi likaMoses; yaye baboleka kumaYiputa izinto zesilivere nezinto zegolide neempahla.
Exodus12:36 uYehova wabenzela inceba abantu emehlweni amaYiputa, abanika abakucelayo. Bawaphanga ke amaYiputa."
Exodus12:37 Banduluka oonyana bakaSirayeli eRameses, baya eSukoti, amadoda ahamba ngeenyawo ngathi ngathi angamakhulu omathandathu amawaka, ngaphandle koonyana."
Exodus12:38 Nendimbane engumxube yenyuka nabo; nemfuyo neenkomo, ewe, iinkomo ezininzi."
Exodus12:39 Bosa izonka ezingenagwele ngentlama, ababephume nayo eYiputa, kuba ibingenagwele; ngenxa yokuba bagxothwayo eYiputa, abazange balibale, yaye abazange bazilungiselele ukutya."
Exodus12:40 Ukuhlala koonyana bakaSirayeli eYiputa yiminyaka emakhulu mane, anamanci mathathu."
Exodus12:41 Ekupheleni kweminyaka emakhulu mane anamanci mathathu, kwangayo loo mini, aphuma onke amatyala kaYehova ezweni laseYiputa."
Exodus12:42 Bubusuku obuya kuxolelwa uYehova, ngokuba wabakhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa; bubusuku bukaYehova obo obuya kugcinwa ngoonyana bakaSirayeli bonke, ezizukulwaneni zabo."
Exodus12:43 Wathi uYehova kuMoses nakuAron, Nguwo lo umyalelo wepasika: Ize ningamudli owasemzini."
Exodus12:44 Kodwa ikhoboka lomntu wonke elizuzwe ngemali, ukuba lithe laluka, andule ke ukudla okwakhe."
Exodus12:45 Umphambukeli nolunywebe usuku akayi kuyidla.
Exodus12:46 Yodlelwa ndlwini-nye; musani ukukhupha nto yenyama endlwini; nethambo layo ningaliphuli.
Exodus12:47 Lonke ibandla lakwaSirayeli loyenza loo nto.
Exodus12:48 Kube ngathi ngumphambukeli endlwini yakho, wenze ipasika kuYehova, wayalusa yonke into eyindoda kuye; abe njengozalelwe kwelo zwe, ngokuba akukho mntu wasemzini uya kudla kuyo."
Exodus12:49 Wosebenza kwaloo mthetho ke, kwinzalelwane, nakowasemzini ophambukele phakathi kwenu."
Exodus12:50 Benjenjalo bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli; njengoko uYehova wabawisela umthetho uMoses noAron, benjenjalo."
Exodus12:51 Ngaloo mini uYehova wabakhupha oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni laseYiputa ngokwemikhosi yabo.
Exodus13:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Exodus13:2 Ndihlambululele onke amazibulo, yonke into evula isizalo sikanina woonyana bakaSirayeli, kuthabathele ebantwini nakwinkomo; yeyam."
Exodus13:3 Wathi uMoses ebantwini, Yicingeni le mini ekuphumeni kwenu eYiputa, endlwini yobukhoboka; ngokuba uYehova enikhuphe kule ndawo ngesandla esithe nkqi; Ungasityi isonka esinegwele."
Exodus13:4 Namhla niphume ngenyanga enguAbhibhi.
Exodus13:5 Ekuniseni kukaYehova ezweni lamaKanan, namaHeti, nama-Amori, namaHeti, namaYebhusi, elo walifungela ooyihlo ukuba woninika, ilizwe elizele ngamasi nobusi; inkonzo kule nyanga."
Exodus13:6 Kangangeentsuku ezisixhenxe nodla izonka ezingenagwele, yaye ngomhla wesixhenxe ngumthendeleko kaYehova;"
Exodus13:7 izonka ezingenagwele zodliwa iintsuku ezisixhenxe; Igwele aliyi kufunyanwa endlwini yakho, negwele aliyi kufunyanwa kuwe kuyo yonke indawo ohlala kuyo."
Exodus13:8 Uze umxelele unyana wakho ngaloo mini, uthi, ‘Oku kwenzeke ngenxa yoko uYehova wakwenzayo kum ekuphumeni kwam eYiputa."
Exodus13:9 Kuya kuba ngumqondiso kuwe esandleni sakho, sibe sisikhumbuzo phakathi kwamehlo akho, wokuba umyalelo kaYehova ube semlonyeni wakho; ngokuba uYehova wanikhupha eYiputa ngesandla esithe nkqi."
Exodus13:10 Wugcine ke lo myalelo ngexesha lawo elimisiweyo iminyaka ngeminyaka.
Exodus13:11 Wokuzisa uYehova ezweni lakwaKanan, njengoko wafungayo kooyihlo, wakunika lona;"
Exodus13:12 ukuze ungcwalise kuYehova yonke into evula isizalo, into yonke elizibulo lenkomo, oya kuba nayo; into eyindoda ibe yekaYehova."
Exodus13:13 Into yonke elizibulo le-esile woyikhulula ngokuyimisela ngexhwane; ukuba uthe akwayindulula, yaphule intamo; Bonke abamazibulo koonyana bakho, ubakhulule ngokubamisela."
Exodus13:14 Wakubuza unyana wakho kamva, wathi, Yintoni na? uze uthi kuye, uYehova wasikhupha eYiputa ngesandla esithe nkqi, endlwini yobukhoboka;"
Exodus13:15 Xa uFaro wayefuna ukusikhulula, uYehova wawabulala onke amazibulo ezweni laseYiputa, izibulo lomntu neenkomo; ngoko ke ndinikela kuYehova yonke into evula i-matrix njengomntu; ke wona amazibulo oonyana bam akayi kuwazala."
Exodus13:16 Kube luphawu esandleni sakho, kube njengenyanda entloko phakathi kwamehlo akho; ngokuba uYehova wasikhupha eYiputa ngesandla esithe nkqi."
Exodus13:17 Akubandulula ke uFaro abantu, uThixo akabakhokela ngendlela yelizwe lamaFilisti, nakuba ibikufuphi; ngokuba wathi uThixo, Ukuze bangaguquki abantu bakuyibona imfazwe, babuyele eYiputa."
Exodus13:18 uThixo wabajikeleza abantu ngendlela yentlango yoLwandle oluBomvu; bemka ke oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni laseYiputa.
Exodus13:19 Wawathabatha ke uMoses amathambo kaYosefu, wahamba naye; nize niwathabathe amathambo am emke nani apha."
Exodus13:20 Banduluka eSukoti, bamisa e-Etam, enyeleni yentlango."
Exodus13:21 uYehova wabakhokela ngelifu emini, ukuba abakhaphele endleleni; ebusuku ngesibane somlilo ukubakhanyisela; ukuhamba imini nobusuku:"
Exodus13:22 Akalisusa ilifu emini, nelifu lomlilo phambi kwabantu ebusuku."
Exodus14:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Exodus14:2 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli ukuba bajike, bamise iintente ngasePihagiroti, phakathi kweMigdoli nolwandle, malunga neBhahali-tsefon; ke ngoko, inkampu ngaselwandle."
Exodus14:3 Uya kuthi uFaro ngoonyana bakaSirayeli, Balele emhlabeni, intlango ibagubungela."
Exodus14:4 Ke mna ndiya kuyenza lukhuni intliziyo kaFaro, abalandele; ndizukiseke phambi koFaro, naphambi komkhosi wakhe wonke; ukuze azi amaYiputa ukuba ndinguYehova. Kwaye benjenjalo."
Exodus14:5 Waxelelwa ukumkani waseYiputa ukuba abantu babalekile, yaza intliziyo kaFaro neyabakhonzi bakhe yabavukela abantu, isithi: “Siyenzele ntoni na le nto, sanyula amaSirayeli ukuba asikhonze?"
Exodus14:6 Walungisa inqwelo yakhe, wahamba nabantu bakhe."
