Exodus14:7 Wathabatha amakhulu amathandathu eenqwelo zokulwa ezikhethiweyo, neenqwelo zonke zokulwa zaseYiputa, nabathetheli bazo kuzo zonke."
Exodus14:8 uYehova wayenza lukhuni intliziyo kaFaro ukumkani waseYiputa, ukuze abasikelele oonyana bakaSirayeli, baphuma oonyana bakaSirayeli ngesandla esiphakamileyo."
Exodus14:9 AmaYiputa abasukela, enamahashe onke eenqwelo zokulwa zikaFaro, nakhwelwayo akhe, nempi yakhe, abafumana bemise iintente ngaselwandle, ngasePi-hagiroti, phambi koBhahali."
Exodus14:10 Wasondela uFaro, bawaphakamisa amehlo abo oonyana bakaSirayeli, bawabona amaYiputa emva kwabo. Boyika kunene, babiza oonyana bakaSirayeli kuYehova."
Exodus14:11 Bathi kuMoses, kungokuba bekungekho mangcwaba na eYiputa, le nto usikhuphileyo ukuba sifele entlango apha? Yini na ukuba usenze le nto, usikhuphe eYiputa?"
Exodus14:12 Asililo na elo ilizwi ebesilithetha kuwe eYiputa, sisithi, Masime siwakhonze amaYiputa? Kuba kube kusilungele kanye ukuba sikhonze amaYiputa, kunokuba sifele entlango apha."
Exodus14:13 Wathi uMoses ebantwini, Musani ukoyika; lindani nje, nilubone usindiso aya kunenzela lona uYehova namhla; kuba amaYiputa lawo niwabonileyo namhlanje, anisayi kuphinda niwabone naphakade."
Exodus14:14 uYehova uya kunilwela, ke nina nimele nithi cwaka."
Exodus14:15 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Uyandibiza na? Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli ukuba badlule."
Exodus14:16 Ke wena, phakamisa intonga yakho, wolule isandla sakho phezu kolwandle, ulwahlule, baluwele ulwandle oonyana bakaSirayeli kowomileyo."
Exodus14:17 Mna ke, yabona, ndiya kuzenza lukhuni iintliziyo zamaYiputa, awalandele; Ndiya kumzukisa uFaro, nempi yakhe yonke, neenqwelo zakhe zokulwa, nabamahashe bakhe;"
Exodus14:18 azi amaYiputa ukuba ndinguYehova, ekumzukiseni kwam uFaro, neenqwelo zakhe zokulwa, nabakhweli bakhe;"
Exodus14:19 Ingelosi kaTHIXO oyinyaniso, eyayikhokela umkhosi wamaSirayeli, yemka yawalandela; lesuka ilifu phambi kwabo, lema emva kwabo."
Exodus14:20 Wangena phakathi kwempi yamaYiputa, neyamaSirayeli; laba lilifu elimnyama kubo, libakhanyisela ebusuku, ukuba kungabikho uzayo komnye ubusuku bonke."
Exodus14:21 Wasolula uMoses isandla sakhe phezu kolwandle; yaye uYehova walwenza lwaduduza ulwandle bonke obo busuku ngomoya onamandla wasempuma waza walushukumisa ulwandle, aza ahluka amanzi."
Exodus14:22 Bahamba oonyana bakaSirayeli emhlabeni owomileyo, phakathi elwandle; aza amanzi aba ludonga ngasekunene nangasekhohlo kubo."
Exodus14:23 Abasukela amaYiputa, abalandela esazulwini solwandle, enamahashe onke kaFaro, neenqwelo zakhe zokulwa, nabamahashe bakhe;"
Exodus14:24 Kwathi ngengomso uYehova wesuka waya emkhosini womlilo nelifu phezu komkhosi wamaYiputa, woyiswa umkhosi wamaYiputa."
Exodus14:25 Bayikhulula imilenze yeenqwelo zabo zokulwa kwabakhweli bawo, amaYiputa, athi, Masibaleke phambi kwamaSirayeli; ngokuba uYehova uyawalwela, esilwa namaYiputa."
Exodus14:26 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yolula isandla sakho phezu kolwandle, amanzi abuyele phezu kwamaYiputa, naphezu kweenqwelo zawo zokulwa, naphezu kwabakhweli bawo;"
Exodus14:27 uMoses wasolula isandla sakhe phezu kolwandle, lwabuya ulwandle ngamandla alo xa kuthi qheke ukusa; asaba kuyo amaYiputa; yaye uYehova wawantywilisela amaYiputa phakathi elwandle."
Exodus14:28 Abuya amanzi, azigubungela iingqwelo zokulwa, nabamahashe, nempi yonke kaFaro eyayingene emva kwawo elwandle; akwasala namnye kubo."
Exodus14:29 Ke bona oonyana bakaSirayeli bahamba emhlabeni owomileyo phakathi elwandle; aba ludonga lwamanzi kuwo ngasekunene nangasekhohlo.
Exodus14:30 uYehova wawahlangula ke amaSirayeli ngaloo mini esandleni samaYiputa; oonyana bakaSirayeli bawabona amaYiputa efile elunxwemeni lolwandle.
Exodus14:31 Bawubona oonyana bakaSirayeli umsebenzi omkhulu uYehova awayewenze kumaYiputa, bamoyika abantu uYehova, bakholwa nguYehova noMoses umkhonzi wakhe."
Exodus15:1 Waza uMoses wahlabela le ngoma yokuzukisa uYehova, uMoses noonyana bakaSirayeli, bathi, Ndiya kuhlabela kuYehova, ngokuba unozuko olukhulu; Ihashe nomkhweli walo waliphosa elwandle."
Exodus15:2 uYehova ungamandla am nendumiso yam; Waba lusindiso kum; UnguThixo wam yena, ndiya kumlungiselela indawo yokuhlala; uThixo kabawo ndiya kumphakamisa."
Exodus15:3 uYehova unamandla, nguYehova igama lakhe."
Exodus15:4 Iinqwelo zokulwa zikaFaro nempi yakhe waziphosa elwandle; kwaye abalawuli bakhe abanyuliweyo barhaxwa eSchelfsee.
Exodus15:5 Inzonzobila ibagubungela, batshona ezantsi njengelitye."
Exodus15:6 Isandla sakho sokunene, Yehova, siqaqambile ngamandla; Isandla sakho sokunene, Yehova, siyaphule utshaba."
Exodus15:7 Ngobukhulu bobukhulu bakho ubagungxule abachasi bakho; Wathumela umsindo wakho, wabatshisa njengengca."
Exodus15:8 Ngokuvuthela kwamathatha akho ahlanganisana amanzi, imilambo yema njengemfumba, imithombo yatywinwa ezinzulwini zolwandle."
Exodus15:9 Lwathi utshaba, Ndiyasukela, ndoluse, ndahlule into ephangiweyo; umnqweno wam uya kwaneliswa ngabo; ndirhola ikrele lam, siya kubatshabalalisa isandla sam."
Exodus15:10 Wafutha ngomoya wakho, lwabagubungela ulwandle; basele njengelothe emanzini amakhulu."
Exodus15:11 Ngubani na onjengawe phakathi koothixo, Yehova? Ngubani na onjengawe, wena ubengezela ubungcwele, Woyikekayo ngezibongo, wenzayo ngokubalulekileyo?"
Exodus15:12 Wolula isandla sakho sokunene, umhlaba wabaginya;"
Exodus15:13 Uyabakhokela abantu obakhululeyo, obakhululeyo ngenceba yakho; Wabakhokela ngamandla akho esakhiweni sakho esingcwele."
Exodus15:14 Baya kuva abantu boyike; Usizi luya kubahlela abantu basePalestina.
Exodus15:15 Baya kumangaliswa abathetheli bakwaEdom; abanjwe kukuthuthumela amagorha akwaMowabhi; baya kudana bonke abemi bakwaKanan.
Exodus15:16 Bafikelwa kukunkwantya nokunkwantya; ngokobukhulu besandla sakho zothi cwaka njengelitye; bade badlule abantu bakho, Yehova, bade badlule abantu bakho entweni oyithengileyo."
Exodus15:17 Wobazisa, ubatyale entabeni yelifa lakho, kuloo ndawo uzenzele yona uYehova, ukuba uhlale kuyo, engcweleni eziyimisileyo izandla zakho, Yehova."
Exodus15:18 iNkosi iya kuba ngukumkani ngonaphakade;
Exodus15:19 Kuba ihashe likaFaro langena elwandle neenqwelo zakhe zokulwa nabakhweli bakhe, waza uYehova wawabuyisela phezu kwabo amanzi olwandle; kodwa oonyana bakaSirayeli bahamba emhlabeni owomileyo phakathi elwandle."
Exodus15:20 uMiriyam umprofetikazi, udade boAron, wathabatha igubu ngesandla sakhe; aphuma ke onke amankazana, amlandela eneengqongqo, nezangoma."
Exodus15:21 Wawaphendula uMiriyam, wathi, Vumani nidumise uYehova, kuba ekhazimle ngobungangamsha; ihashe nomkhweli walo babajulela elwandle."
Exodus15:22 uMoses wabathabatha oonyana bakaSirayeli eLwandle oluBomvu, bahamba baya entlango yaseShure; bahamba iintsuku zantathu entlango, befuna amanzi."
Exodus15:23 Afika eMara, akaba nakuwasela amanzi aseMara, kuba ayekrakra; ngenxa yoko kwathiwa igama laso yiMara."
Exodus15:24 Abantu bamkrokrela uMoses, besithi, Siya kusela ntoni na?"
Exodus15:25 Wanqula uYehova; uYehova wambonisa umthi, awawuphosa emanzini, aba mnandi amanzi; khona wabamisela umyalelo nommiselo, wabancina khona."
Exodus15:26 Wathi, Ukuba uthe waliphulaphula izwi likaYehova uThixo wakho, wenza okuthe tye emehlweni akhe, wayibekela indlebe imithetho yakhe, wayigcina yonke imithetho yakhe; ndakuzisa kumaJiputa, kuba ndinguYehova, uphilisayo."
Exodus15:27 Bafika e-Elim, apho bekukho imithombo elishumi elinamabini, nemithi yesundu engamashumi omathandathu; bema khona ngasemanzini."
Exodus16:1 Banduluka e-Elim, lafika lonke ibandla loonyana bakaSirayeli entlango yaseSin, ephakathi kwe-Elim neSinayi, ngomhla weshumi elinesihlanu wenyanga yesibini yokufuduka kwabo ezweni laseYiputa."
Exodus16:2 Labakrokrela ooMoses noAron lonke ibandla loonyana bakaSirayeli entlango apho.
Exodus16:3 Bathi oonyana bakaSirayeli kubo, Ukuba besife sisandla sikaYehova ezweni laseYiputa, xa sasihleli ngasezimbizeni zenyama, sidla izonka ezininzi; ngokuba nisikhuphele kule ntlango, ukuze nilibulale lonke eli bandla ngendlala."
Exodus16:4 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Uyabona, ndiya kunisa isonka siphuma ezulwini; yaye abantu bayaphuma baze baqokelele umlinganiselo othile imihla ngemihla, ukuze ndibavavanye enoba baya kuhamba emthethweni wam okanye akunjalo kusini na."
Exodus16:5 Kothi ngomhla wesithandathu, balungise oko bakuzisileyo; kwaye iya kuphinda kabini imali abayiqokelela imihla ngemihla."
Exodus16:6 Wathi uMoses noAron koonyana bakaSirayeli bonke, Ngokuhlwa niya kwazi ukuba uYehova wanikhupha nini ezweni laseYiputa."
Exodus16:7 Ngomso niya kububona ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova; ngokuba ukuvile ukukrokra kwenu kuYehova. Kwaye singoobani na xa usikhalazela?
Exodus16:8 Wathi uMoses, Ekuninikeni kukaYehova inyama ngokuhlwa, noyidla, woninika ngomso isonka nenyama; ngokuba uYehova uyakuva ukukrokra kwenu enikhala ngako. Kwaye siyintoni? anixhalabelanga thina, kodwa nimkhalazela uYehova."
Exodus16:9 Wathi uMoses kuAron, Yithi kwibandla lonke loonyana bakaSirayeli, Sondelani kuYehova, ngokuba ukuvile ukuduma kwenu."
Exodus16:10 Ke kaloku, esathetha uAron kwibandla lonke loonyana bakaSirayeli, babheka entlango, babubona ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova efini."
Exodus16:11 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Exodus16:12 Ndikuvile ukukrokra koonyana bakaSirayeli. Uthethe kubo uthi, Lakutshona ilanga nodla inyama, ngomso nodla isonka; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova uThixo wenu."
Exodus16:13 Kwahlwa, zenyuka izagwityi, zayigubungela iminquba yonke;"
Exodus16:14 Wenyuka umbethe oweleyo, nanko kukho eArabha intwana, ejiyileyo, encinanana njengeqabaka emhlabeni."
Exodus16:15 Bayibona oonyana bakaSirayeli, bathi omnye komnye, Yimana le, ngokuba babengazi ukuba yintoni na. Wathi uMoses kubo, Sisonka esi abanikileyo uYehova ukuba badle;"
Exodus16:16 Wawisa umthetho uYehova, wathi, Buthani kuyo, elowo ngangokudla kwakhe, ihomere elowo, ngangenani lemizimba yenu; elowo athabathe abo basententeni yakhe."
Exodus16:17 Benjenjalo oonyana bakaSirayeli; babutha omnye kakhulu, omnye kancinane."
Exodus16:18 Bakuba belinganisa ngegomere, akashiywanga obuthe iqashiso, nobutha kancinane akaswelanga; babutha elowo ngangokudla kwakhe."
Exodus16:19 Wathi uMoses, Makungasali namnye kude kuse."
Exodus16:20 Abamphulaphulanga uMoses; Bahlala ke kuyo kwada kwasa, zakuphuma iimpethu, nevumba; waba nomsindo uMoses kubo."
Exodus16:21 Bayiqokelela intsasa nganye, ngamnye njengoko esidla; kwathi lakuba shushu ilanga, yanyibilika."
Exodus16:22 Ngomhla wesithandathu babutha isonka semihla emibini, iihomere ezimbini mntwini mnye; zeza zonke izikhulu zebandla, zamxelela uMoses."
Exodus16:23 Wathi kubo, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ngomso yisabatha kaYehova; yidla obuya kukupheka namhla, upheke oko uya kukupheka; kwaye okuseleyo uzigcinele ingomso."
Exodus16:24 Bayibeka ke kwada kwasa, njengoko uMoses wabawisela umthetho; akanuka, akwabakho mpethu kuyo."
Exodus16:25 Wathi uMoses Yidleni namhla; ngokuba namhla yisabatha kaYehova; namhlanje aniyi kuyifumana elizweni.
Exodus16:26 Noyiqokelela ngeentsuku ezintandathu; ke ngomhla wesixhenxe, yisabatha, akusayi kuba njalo."
Exodus16:27 Yaye kwathi, bambi ebantwini baphuma ngomhla wesixhenxe besiya kubutha, kodwa ababona nto."
Exodus16:28 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Kuya kuda kube nini na, ningavumi ukuyigcina imithetho yam nemiyalelo yam?"
Exodus16:29 Niyabona ke, uYehova uninike isabatha; kungenxa yoko athe ngomhla wesithandathu waninika isonka semihla emibini. Mabahlale elowo endaweni yakhe, kungaphumi mntu endaweni yakhe ngomhla wesixhenxe;"
Exodus16:30 Baye bephumla ke abantu ngomhla wesixhenxe.
Exodus16:31 Indlu kaSirayeli yathi igama lale nto yimana, lalimhlophe njengembewu yekoriyandire; isongo sayo sasifana namanxeba obusi."
Exodus16:32 Wathi uMoses, Nantsi into awise umthetho ngayo uYehova, ukuthi, Yizaliseni ngehomere, niyigcine kwizizukulwana zenu; ukuze asibone isonka endibadlise ngaso entlango, ekubakhupheni kwam ezweni laseYiputa."
Exodus16:33 Wathi uMoses kuAron, Thabatha imbiza, ubeke imana kuyo, uyibeke phambi koYehova, igcinelwe izizukulwana zenu."
Exodus16:34 Njengoko uYehova wamyalelayo uMoses, uAron wayibeka phambi kwengqina ukuze ikhuseleke."
Exodus16:35 Bayidla oonyana bakaSirayeli imana iminyaka emashumi mane, bada bafika ezweni elimiweyo; bayidla imana bada bafika emdeni welizwe lakwaKanan."
Exodus16:36 Igomere sisishumi se-efa.
Exodus17:1 Lemka ke lonke ibandla loonyana bakaSirayeli entlango yaseTsin ngokweehambo zabo, ngokomlomo kaYehova, baya eRefidim. Akwabakho manzi okuba basele abantu."
Exodus17:2 Balwa abantu noMoses, bathi, Siphe amanzi, sisele; Wathi uMoses kubo, Yini na ukuba nihlukane nam? uyambuza na uYehova?"
Exodus17:3 Banxanelwe amanzi apho abantu; abantu bamkrokrela uMoses, bathi, Nguwe owasikhupha eYiputa, ukuze usibulale ngenxano, thina, noonyana bethu, nemfuyo yethu?"
Exodus17:4 uMoses wabiza uYehova, wathi, Ndiya kubathini na aba bantu? Baza kundixuluba ngamatye."
Exodus17:5 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Phuma phambi kwabantu, uthabathe inxenye yamadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli; nentonga yakho obuzibophe ngayo, yiphathe ngesandla sakho, uhambe."
Exodus17:6 Yabona, ndiya kuma nawe khona, phezu kweliwa laseHorebhe; yaye uya kulibetha iliwa, kuphume amanzi kulo ukuze basele abantu. Wenjenjalo ke uMoses phambi kwamadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli."
Exodus17:7 Wathi igama laloo ndawo yiMasa neMeribha, ngenxa yengxabano yoonyana bakaSirayeli, nangenxa yokubuza kwabo kuYehova, besithi, uYehova uphakathi kwethu, akakho, kusini na?"
Exodus17:8 Emva koko uAmaleki weza kulwa noonyana bakaSirayeli eRefidim.
Exodus17:9 Wathi uMoses kuYoshuwa, Sinyulele amadoda, uphume uwaxabele ama-Amaleki; Mna ngomso ndiya kuma encotsheni yenduli, ndiphethe intonga kaThixo ngesandla sam."
Exodus17:10 Wenza uYoshuwa njengoko uMoses wamwiselayo umthetho, walwa nama-Amaleki; benyuka ooMoses, noAron, noHure, baya encotsheni yenduli."
Exodus17:11 Wasiphakamisa uMoses isandla sakhe, boyisa oonyana bakaSirayeli; wathi akuthambathisa isandla sakhe, kweyisa uAmaleki."
Exodus17:12 Zaba nzima ke izandla zikaMoses; Bathabatha ilitye, balibeka phantsi kwakhe, wahlala phezu kwalo; Baziphakamisa ooAron noHure izandla zabo, omnye engapha, omnye engaphaya; zaza izandla zakhe zomelela lada latshona ilanga."
Exodus17:13 uYoshuwa wamdubaduba uAmaleki nabantu bakhe ngohlangothi lwentshuntshe.
Exodus17:14 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Kubhale encwadini ibe sisikhumbuzo, ukuthethe apho asekuva uYoshuwa; ngokuba ndiya kukuphelisa ukukhunjulwa kuka-Amaleki phantsi kwezulu."
Exodus17:15 Wakha uMoses isibingelelo, wathi igama laso nguYehova-Nisi."
Exodus17:16 Ngenxa yokuba wathi: “Ngenxa yokuba uYehova efungile ukuba uYehova uya kumhlasela uAmaleki kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana.
Exodus18:1 uYitro, umbingeleli wakwaMidiyan, umolokazana kaMoses, wayiva yonke into uThixo abeyenzileyo kuMoses, nakubantu bakhe amaSirayeli, ukuba uYehova uwakhuphile amaSirayeli eYiputa."
Exodus18:2 uYitro, uyise womkaMoses, wamthabatha uTsipora, umkaMoses, emveni kokuba uMoses wambuyisa,"
Exodus18:3 noonyana bakhe bobabini; igama lomnye nguGershom; ngokuba wathi, Bendingumphambukeli ezweni lolunye uhlanga."
Exodus18:4 Igama lomnye lalinguEliyezere; ngokuba wathi uThixo kabawo ubengumncedi wam, wandihlangula ekreleni likaFaro."
Exodus18:5 uYitro, umkhwe kaMoses, weza ke noonyana bakhe nomkakhe, kuMoses entlango, apho wayemise intente khona entabeni yoThixo oyinyaniso."
Exodus18:6 Wathi kuMoses, Mna Yitro, unguyihlo, ndize kuwe, ndinomkakho noonyana bakhe bobabini."
Exodus18:7 Waphuma uMoses, waya kumkhawulela uyise womkakhe, waqubuda, wamanga; babuzana impilo; bangena ententeni."
Exodus18:8 uMoses wamxelela umkakhe konke uYehova abekwenzile kuFaro namaYiputa ngenxa yamaSirayeli, neembandezelo zonke eziwafikeleyo endleleni, nokuwahlangula kukaYehova."
Exodus18:9 Wavuya uYitro ngako konke ukulunga abekwenzile uYehova kumaSirayeli, awabahlangulayo esandleni samaYiputa."
Exodus18:10 Wathi uYitro, Makabongwe uYehova owanihlangulayo esandleni samaYiputa, nasesandleni sikaFaro, owabahlangulayo abantu esandleni samaYiputa."
Exodus18:11 Ngoku ndiyazi ukuba uYehova mkhulu koothixo bonke, ngenxa yokuba ngombandela ababeqhayisa ngawo, wayengaphezu kwabo."
Exodus18:12 uYitro, uyise womkaMoses, wamthabathela uThixo idini elinyukayo nemibingelelo; weza uAron namadoda amakhulu onke akwaSirayeli, ukuba adle isonka noyise womkaMoses phambi koThixo."
Exodus18:13 Ngengomso uMoses wahlala phantsi wathetha amatyala abantu; abantu bema ngakuMoses, kususela kusasa kwada kwangokuhlwa."
Exodus18:14 Wayibona uninazala kaMoses yonke into abeyenza ebantwini, wathi, Iyintoni na le nto uyenzayo ebantwini? Yini na, ukuba uhlale wedwa, bathi bona bonke abantu baxhontele kuwe, kususela kusasa kude kuhlwe?"
Exodus18:15 Wathi uMoses kumkakhe, Kungokuba abantu besiza kum ukuba bacele kuThixo;"
Exodus18:16 xa banendawo, baye beze kum; ndigwebe phakathi kwabo, ndibazise imithetho kaThixo nemiyalelo yabo."
Exodus18:17 Wathi uyise womkaMoses kuye, Ayilungile le nto uyenzayo."
Exodus18:18 Uya kudinwa, wena naba bantu unabo; ngokuba le nto inzima kuwe; awunakuyenza ngokwakho."
Exodus18:19 Phulaphula ngoko izwi lam, ndikuphe iqhinga, uThixo abe nawe: yiba noThixo ngenxa yabantu, ukuze umxelele uThixo iindaba ezilungileyo;"
Exodus18:20 ubafundise imimiselo nemimiselo, ubabonise indlela abaya kuhamba ngayo, nomsebenzi abaya kuwenza."
Exodus18:21 Ngaphezu koko, uze uzilungisele amadoda anobunkunkqele ekuthetheni amatyala, amoyikayo uThixo, ayinyaniso, ayithiyileyo inkanuko; ubamisele ukuba babe ngabathetheli bamawaka, nabathetheli bamakhulu, nabathetheli bamashumi ngamahlanu, nabathetheli bamashumi ngamanye;"
Exodus18:22 bathethe amatyala abantu ngamaxesha onke; zonke izinto ezinkulu ziya kuzizisa kuwe, zonke ezincinane baya kuzigweba; ngoko kuya kuba lula kuwe, bawuthwale nawe umthwalo."
Exodus18:23 Ukuba uthe wayenza loo nto, waza wakuwisela umthetho uThixo, woba nako ukuqiniseka, luhambe olu hlanga lonke lunoxolo, endaweni yalo."
Exodus18:24 uMoses waliphulaphula izwi loyise womkakhe, wayenza into yonke abeyithethile."
Exodus18:25 uMoses wanyula amadoda anobunkunkqele ekuthetheni amatyala kuwo onke amaSirayeli, wawamisa aba ziintloko zabantu, aba ngabathetheli-waka, nabathetheli-makhulu, nabathetheli bamashumi ngamahlanu, nabathetheli bamashumi ngamanye."
Exodus18:26 Babethutha abantu ngalo lonke ixesha; Izinto ezinzima bazisa kuMoses, kodwa zonke ezincinane bazigweba."
Exodus18:27 uMoses wathi kuyise womkakhe, mabahambe; wemka kwelakowabo."
Exodus19:1 Ngenyanga yesithathu emveni kokuphuma koonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni laseYiputa, ngayo loo mini, bafika entlango yaseSinayi."
Exodus19:2 Banduluka eRefidim, bafika entlango yaseSinayi, bamisa entlango; baza oonyana bakaSirayeli bema apho phambi kwentaba."
Exodus19:3 uMoses wenyuka waya kuThixo, uYehova wambiza esentabeni apho, wathi, Uya kwenjenjalo kwindlu kaYakobi, wathi koonyana bakaSirayeli;"
Exodus19:4 Khangelani into endayenzayo kumaYiputa, ukuba ndanithwala ngamaphiko okhozi, ndanizisa kum."
Exodus19:5 Ngoku ukuba nithe naliphulaphula ilizwi lam, nawugcina umnqophiso wam, niya kuba bubutyebi bempahla yam ngaphezu kwazo zonke iintlanga, kuba ihlabathi liphela lelam;"
Exodus19:6 nibe bubukumkani bababingeleli kum, nohlanga olungcwele; Ngawo la amazwi oya kuwathetha koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Exodus19:7 Weza ke uMoses, wawabiza amadoda amakhulu abantu, wabeka phambi kwawo onke la mazwi uYehova awamyalela wona."
Exodus19:8 Baphendula bonke abantu ngamxhelo mnye, bathi, Konke akuthethileyo uYehova sokwenza. Wawabuyisela uMoses amazwi abantu kuYehova."
Exodus19:9 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yabona, ndiyeza kuwe ndiselifini elingqingqwa, ukuze beve abantu ekuthetheni kwam nawe, bakholwe kuwe ngonaphakade. uMoses wamxelela uYehova amazwi abantu."
Exodus19:10 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yiya ebantwini, ubangcwalise namhla nangomso, bazihlambe iingubo zabo;"
Exodus19:11 Zilungiseleleni ngomhla wesithathu, kuba ngomhla wesithathu uYehova uya kuhla eNtabeni yeSinayi phambi kwamehlo ohlanga luphela."
Exodus19:12 Bamisele abantu imida, uthi, Zigcineni ningenyuki entabeni, ningawuchukumisi umda wayo;"
Exodus19:13 Makungafiki sandla kuye; akuyi kuphila inkomo nomntu; Lakhala ixesha elide isigodlo, benyuka baya entabeni."
Exodus19:14 Wehla uMoses entabeni, waya ebantwini, wabangcwalisa abantu; bazihlamba iingubo zabo."
Exodus19:15 Wathi ebantwini, Yilungiseni ngomhla wesithathu; musani ukuza kubafazi benu."
Exodus19:16 Kwathi ngomhla wesithathu, kwakusa, kwabakho iindudumo, nemibane, nelifu elinzima phezu kwentaba, nesandi sesigodlo esomeleleyo kakhulu; kangangokuba bonke abantu ababesenkampini bangcangcazela."
Exodus19:17 uMoses wabakhupha abantu eminqubeni, baya kumkhawulela uThixo; bema emazantsi entaba."
Exodus19:18 Intaba yeSinayi yaba ngumsi kwaphela, kuba uYehova wehla phezu kwayo esemlilweni; wenyuka umsi apho njengomsi weziko lemfutho, yaza yanyikima kakhulu yonke intaba."
Exodus19:19 Lathi lavakala isandi sesigodlo, sikhula, wathetha uMoses, uThixo wamphendula ngelizwi."
Exodus19:20 Wehla uYehova phezu kwentaba yeSinayi, encotsheni yentaba, uYehova wambizela uMoses encotsheni yentaba leyo; wenyuka ke uMoses."
Exodus19:21 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yihla, ubawisele umthetho abantu, hleze batyhobozele baye kumkhangela uYehova, kwenzakale into eninzi kubo."
Exodus19:22 Kananjalo ababingeleli abasondela kuYehova bafanele bazingcwalise, ukuze uYehova angavuki nxamnye nabo."
Exodus19:23 Wathi uMoses kuYehova, Abantu abanakunyuka intaba yeSinayi; ngokuba wasiwisela umthetho, wathi, Yimisele imida intaba, uyingcwalise."
Exodus19:24 Wathi uYehova kuye, Hamba uhle, unyuke, wena noAron; ke ababingeleli nabantu mabangatyhobozi, benyuke baye kuYehova, hleze abasukele."
Exodus19:25 Wehla uMoses, waya ebantwini, wathetha kubo."
Exodus20:1 Wawathetha ke uThixo onke la mazwi, wathi:"
Exodus20:2 NdinguYehova, uThixo wakho, owakukhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa, endlwini yobukhoboka."
Exodus20:3 Uze ungabi nathixo bambi ngaphandle kwam.
Exodus20:4 Uze ungazenzeli umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, nokuba ngowayiphi na into emilise esezulwini phezulu, nokuba yinto yonke ephantsi komhlaba, nesemanzini aphantsi komhlaba."
Exodus20:5 Uze ungaqubudi kwezo nto, ungazikhonzi; kuba mna Yehova Thixo wakho, ndinguThixo onekhwele, ndibuvelela ububi koonyana booyise, kwesesithathu nakwesesine isizukulwana sabandithiyileyo."
Exodus20:6 Ndibabale amawaka abandithandayo, abayigcinayo imithetho yam."
Exodus20:7 Uze ungafumane ulibize igama likaYehova uThixo wakho; ngenxa yokuba uYehova akayi kumyeka osebenzisa igama lakhe njengelize.
Exodus20:8 Khumbula umhla wesabatha ukuba uzingcwalise.
Exodus20:9 Wosebenza imihla emithandathu, uwenze wonke umsebenzi wakho;"
Exodus20:10 ke wona umhla wesixhenxe uyisabatha kaYehova uThixo wakho; Uze ungenzi namnye umsebenzi ngayo, wena, nonyana wakho, nentombi yakho, nesicaka sakho, nesicakakazi sakho, nemfuyo yakho, nowasemzini okuwe. Amasango:"
Exodus20:11 Ngokuba ngemihla emithandathu uYehova wenza izulu nomhlaba, nolwandle, neento zonke ezikwezo zinto, waphumla ngomhla wesixhenxe; ngenxa yoko uYehova wawusikelela umhla wesabatha, wawungcwalisa."
Exodus20:12 Beka uyihlo nonyoko, ukuze yolulwe imihla yakho emhlabeni akunika wona uYehova uThixo wakho."
Exodus20:13 Uze ungabulali;
Exodus20:14 Musa ukukrexeza.
Exodus20:15 Musa ukuba.
Exodus20:16 Musa ukuba lingqina lobuxoki ngommelwane wakho.
Exodus20:17 Uze ungawunqweneli umzi wommelwane wakho, ungamnqweneli umfazi wommelwane wakho, nesicaka sakhe, nesicakakazi sakhe, nenkomo yakhe, ne-esile lakhe, nento yonke eyeyakho."
Exodus20:18 Bonke abantu bazibona iindudumo nemibane, nesandi sesigodlo, nentaba engumsi; Bakubona ke abantu oko, bemka baya kuma mgama."
Exodus20:19 Bathi kuMoses, Thetha wena kuthi, siya kuva; kodwa wanga uThixo akathethi kuthi, ukuze singafi."
Exodus20:20 Wathi uMoses ebantwini, Musani ukoyika; kuba uThixo uze kunilinga, ukuba kubekho ukumoyika ebusweni benu, ukuze ningoni."
Exodus20:21 Abantu bema mgama, waza uMoses wasondela ebumnyameni apho akhoyo uThixo."
Exodus20:22 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yithi koonyana bakaSirayeli, Nikhangele, ndithethe kuni ndisemazulwini."
Exodus20:23 Musani ukuzenzela uthixo wesilivere, ningazenzeli oothixo begolide;"
Exodus20:24 undenzele isibingelelo somhlaba, wenze phezu kwaso amadini akho anyukayo, nemibingelelo yakho yombulelo, impahla yakho emfutshane neenkomo zakho; naphi na apho ndithe ndalibiza khona igama lam, ndiya kuza kuwe, ndikusikelele."
Exodus20:25 Ukuba uthe wandakhela isibingelelo samatye, musa ukundakhela ngamatye aqingqiweyo; ngokuba xa uthe wayigalela impahla yakho kuyo, woyingcwalisa."
Exodus20:26 Musani ukunyuka ngezinyuko ukuya esibingelelweni sam, ukuze bungatyhileki into yenu engamampunge."
Exodus21:1 Yiyo le imimiselo oya kuyimisa kubo;
Exodus21:2 Ukuba uthe wathenga ikhoboka elingumHebhere, lokhonza iminyaka emithandathu; nangolwesixhenxe uya kuhamba ngokukhululekileyo."
Exodus21:3 Ukuba ingene yodwa, mayiphume iyodwa; ukuba liyindoda enomfazi, umfazi walo wophuma nalo."
Exodus21:4 Xa ithe inkosi yakho yakunika umfazi, yakuzalela oonyana, nokuba ziintombi; umfazi nabantwana bayo baya kuba nenkosi yayo, kodwa yona iya kuphuma yodwa."
Exodus21:5 Ukuba umkhonzi uthe, Ndiyayithanda inkosi yam, nomkam, nabantwana bam; andiyi kuphuma ndikhululekile."
Exodus21:6 Yokuzisa ke inkosi yakho kubaphathi; umsondeze elucangweni, nokuba emgubasini; inkosi yakho iya kuyigqobhoza indlebe ngomkhonto; yaye uya kumkhonza ngonaphakade."
Exodus21:7 Xa ithe indoda yathengisa ngentombi yayo ukuba ibe likhoboka, mayingaphumi njengekhoboka."
Exodus21:8 Ukuba uthe akayikholisa inkosi yakhe, ebimganele, yoyivumela ukuba ikhululwe ngentlawulelo; ukuba athengise ngaye ebantwini beentlanga, akayi kuba nagunya, ngokuba umlahlekisile."
Exodus21:9 Ukuba ithe yayimisela unyana wayo, makayenze ngokwesiko leentombi;"
Exodus21:10 Ukuba ithe yazeka omnye umfazi; ukutya kwakhe, nempahla yakhe, nelungelo lakhe lokutshata, akufuneki lincitshiswe."
Exodus21:11 Ukuba ayithanga izenze ezo zinto zontathu, lophuma simahla ngaphandle kwemali."
Exodus21:12 Othe wabetha umntu wafa, wobulawa afe."
Exodus21:13 Ukuba ungaboni bani, uThixo wamnikela esandleni sakhe; ndonibonisa ke indawo aya kusabela kuyo."
Exodus21:14 Xa athe umntu wafika kummelwane wakhe, wambulala ngobuqhophololo; umsuse esibingelelweni sam, afe."
Exodus21:15 Othe wabetha uyise nokuba ngunina, wobulawa afe."
Exodus21:16 Othe weba umntu, nokuba uthengise ngaye, nokuba ufunyenwe esandleni sakhe, wobulawa afe."
Exodus21:17 Othe watshabhisa uyise nonina, wobulawa afe."
Exodus21:18 Ngokungathi abantu bayalwa, omnye wabetha omnye ngelitye, nangenqindi, akafa, wathabatha ukhuko lwakhe;"
Exodus21:19 Ukuba uthe wavuka, wahamba ngentonga yakhe, woba msulwa lowo umbethayo; nguye yedwa oya kuhlawula inkcitho yexesha lakhe aze amphilise ngokupheleleyo."
Exodus21:20 Xa athe umntu wabetha ikhoboka lakhe nokuba sisicakakazi sakhe ngentonga, safa ngesandla sakhe; wohlwaywa ngenene."
Exodus21:21 Kodwa ukuba sithe sadla ubomi, asafa, usuku nokuba ziintsuku: makungayi kubethwa, ngokuba yimali yakhe."
Exodus21:22 Xa athe amadoda abambana ngezihlwitha, agila umfazi emithi, waphuma isisu, akwabakho bubi emveni koko: wohlawuliswa ngenene, njengendoda yaloo mfazi, ibimbekile kuye; kwaye ahlawule ngokomyalelo wabagwebi."
Exodus21:23 Ukuba kuthe kwenyuka ububi, wohlawula umphefumlo ngomphefumlo;"
Exodus21:24 Iliso ngeliso, izinyo ngezinyo, isandla ngesandla, unyawo ngonyawo,"
Exodus21:25 ukutshiswa ngokutshiswa, inxeba ngenxeba, inxeba ngenxeba."
Exodus21:26 Xa athe umntu wasibetha esweni isicaka sakhe, nokuba uthe wasibetha esweni isicakakazi sakhe, sotshabalala; uya kumkhulula ngenxa yeliso lakhe."
Exodus21:27 Ukuba uthe wabetha izinyo lesicaka sakhe, nokuba lizinyo lomkhonzazana wakhe; makahambe ekhululekile ngenxa yezinyo lakhe."
Exodus21:28 Ukuba inkomo ithe yadla indoda, nokuba yinkazana, yafa: loo nkomo mayigityiselwe ngamatye, ingadliwa inyama yayo; kodwa umnininkomo uya kukhululwa."
Exodus21:29 Ke ukuba inkomo ithe yahlaba ngesigodlo, walingqina umniniyo, akabuyeli, wabulala indoda nenkazana; iinkomo mazixulutywe ngamatye, nomninizo abulawe."
Exodus21:30 Ukuba uthe wahlawuliswa imali eninzi, woyirhola yonke into eya kubekwa kuye, ibe yintlawulelo yomphefumlo wakhe."
Exodus21:31 Nokuba ithe yabetha unyana nokuba yintombi, makwenziwe ngoko kuye."
Exodus21:32 Xa inkomo ithe yahlaba isicaka, nokuba sisicakakazi; amnike umninizo iishekele zesilivere ezimashumi mathathu, inkomo yona igityiselwe ngamatye."
Exodus21:33 Xa athe umntu wavula iqula, nokuba uthe wemba iqula, akaligquma, kweyela kulo inkomo, nokuba liesile;"
Exodus21:34 Umninimthombo wolilungisa, ambuyisele umninilo ngemali; yaye isilwanyana esifileyo siya kuba sesakhe."
Exodus21:35 Xa inkomo yomntu ithe yahlaba inkomo yommelwane wakhe, iya kufa; mabathengise ngenkomo leyo iphilileyo, bayahlule imali leyo; bayahlule inkunzi entsha efileyo."
Exodus21:36 Ukuba kwakusazeka ukuba inkomo ikhe yaluma, akayinqanda; uya kuyihlawula inkomo ngenkomo; yaye abafileyo baya kuba ngabakhe."
Exodus22:1 Xa umntu athe weba inkomo, nokuba yigusha, wayixhela, mhlawumbi wathengisa ngayo; uya kuyibuyisela iinkomo zibe ntlanu ngenkomo leyo, nempahla emfutshane emine ngemvu leyo."
Exodus22:2 Ukuba isela lithe lafunyanwa ligqobha indlu, labethwa lafa, akukho tyala lagazi kulowo."
Exodus22:3 Lakuphuma ilanga phezu kwakhe, igazi lophalaza phezu kwakhe; ngokuba uya kurhola ngokuzeleyo; ukuba awunanto, kothengiswa ngenxa yobusela bakho."
Exodus22:4 Ukuba ithe isela lithe lafunyanwa liphilile esandleni salo, mhlawumbi yinkomo, nokuba liesile, nokuba yigusha; uya kubuya kabini."
Exodus22:5 Xa umntu athe wadla intsimi, nokuba sisidiliya, wafaka inkomo yakhe, wadla kumhlaba womnye; Wazibuyisela ngezona zintle zelizwe lakhe, nezona zintle zesidiliya sakhe."
Exodus22:6 Xa kuthe kwatsha umlilo, kwangena imithana enameva, yafa imfumba yengqolowa, nokuba yengqolowa, nokuba lilizwe eli, litshiswe kwayiyo; lowo uwutshise umlilo woyimisela."
Exodus22:7 Xa athe umntu wanika ummelwane wakhe imali, nokuba yimpahla, ukuba ayigcine, yaza yabiwa endlwini yaloo mntu; ukuba lithe lafunyanwa isela, maliyihlawula kabini."
Exodus22:8 Ukuba lithe alafunyanwa isela: umninindlu makasondezwe phambi kwabagwebi, akhangele ukuba akayiphathanga na impahla yommelwane wakhe;"
Exodus22:9 Ngenxa yamatyala, iinkomo, iiesile, iigusha, iingubo, izinto zonke ezidakileyo, ezifaniswayo, loo ndawo yabo bobabini yoya phambi koThixo; yaye nabani na ogweba abagwebi, umele ahlawule idlelane lakhe kabini."
Exodus22:10 Xa athe umntu wanika ummelwane wakhe iesile, nokuba yinkomo, nokuba yigusha, nokuba yiyiphi into ezitho zine, ukuba ayigcine; yaye iyafa, okanye yenzakele, okanye igxothwe, kungaboni bani:"
Exodus22:11 makubekho ukufunga uYehova phakathi kwabo bobabini, ukuba akayiphathanga impahla yommelwane wakhe; woyikholisa umniniyo, angayihlawuli."
Exodus22:12 Ukuba ibiwe ikuye, woyibuyisela kumniniyo."
Exodus22:13 Ukuba iqwengiwe, woyizisa ibe lingqina, angayilungisi into eqwengiweyo."
Exodus22:14 Xa athe umntu waboleka isalamane sakhe into, yaza yonakala, okanye yafa, engekho umniniyo, woyibuyisela."
Exodus22:15 Ukuba kunjalo umniniyo, akanako ukuyilungisa; ukuba ibithe yaqeshwa, ibe ihambele umvuzo wayo."
Exodus22:16 Xa ithe indoda ingcatsha intombi engaganiweyo, yaza yalala nayo, yomnika ibe ngumkayo."
Exodus22:17 Ukuba uyise wayo walile nokuyinika, woyirhola imali elingana nekhazi labafazi."
Exodus22:18 Musa ukumyeka umthakathi aphile.
Exodus22:19 Indoda esukuba ilala inkomo, mayibulawe ife."
Exodus22:20 Obingelela kuthixo ongenguye uYehova, woba netyala lokutshabhiswa."
Exodus22:21 Umphambukeli uze ungamqumbisi, ungamxini, kuba naningabaphambukeli nani ezweni laseYiputa."
Exodus22:22 Musani ukumcinezela umhlolokazi nenkedama.
Exodus22:23 Ukuba uthe wabacinezela nangayiphi na indlela, baza bandibiza nangayiphi na indlela, ndiya kusiva isikhalo sabo;"
Exodus22:24 uvuthe umsindo wam, ndinibulale ngekrele; babe ngabahlolokazi abafazi benu, babe ziinkedama abantwana benu."
Exodus22:25 Ukuba uthe wababoleka imali ihlwempu labantu bakowethu, uze ungaliboleki imali, ungalibizi nzala."
Exodus22:26 Ukuba ummelwane wakho ubambise ngeengubo zakhe, womnika ukutshona kwelanga."
Exodus22:27 Kuba yingubo yakhe yodwa, yingubo yakhe yesikhumba; uzolala ngantoni? xa athe wabiza kum, ndiya kuva; ngokuba kulubabalo."
Exodus22:28 Musa ukunyelisa oothixo, ungamtshabhisi nomlawuli wohlanga lwakowenu."
Exodus22:29 Musa ukulibala ukunika intlahlela yeziqhamo zakho nakwiziselo zakho; ndiya kundinika owamazibulo oonyana bakho.
Exodus22:30 Uze wenjenjalo ngenkomo yakho neenkomo zakho; ngokuba iya kuba kunina iintsuku ezisixhenxe; ngomhla wesibhozo wondinika.
Exodus22:31 Noba ngabantu abangcwele kum; inyama ethatyathwe endle nize ningayidli; yiphosele ezinjeni.
Exodus23:1 Musa ukuxoka; musa ukunxulumana nabangendawo, ukuba ube lingqina elingalungisiyo."
Exodus23:2 Musani ukulandela isininzi ukuya kwenza ububi; kwaye ungathethi ukwala emva kwabaninzi ukonakalisa umgwebo.
Exodus23:3 Yaye musa ukungqina kwihlwempu ngemeko yalo.
Exodus23:4 Xa uthe wayifumana inkomo yotshaba lwakho, nokuba liesile lalo, libhadula, wolibuyisela kulo."
Exodus23:5 Ukuba uthe walibona iesile lentiyo yakho libotshelelwe phantsi komthwalo walo, ungafuni ukulinceda, lincede lincede."
Exodus23:6 Musa ukulonakalisa ibango lesisweli sakho ecaleni laso;
Exodus23:7 Suka entethweni yobuxoki; uze ungambulali omsulwa nolilungisa, kuba ndiya kumvelela ongendawo."
Exodus23:8 Musa ukwamkela isipho, ngokuba isipho simfamekisa izilumko, siphenule amazwi amalungisa."
Exodus23:9 Kanjalo, ningamcinezeli owasemzini, kuba niyayazi intliziyo yomphambukeli, kuba naningabaphambukeli nani ezweni laseYiputa."
Exodus23:10 Wowuhlwayela umhlaba wakho iminyaka emithandathu, ubuthe iziqhamo zawo;"
Exodus23:11 ke ngomnyaka wesixhenxe mayiphumle, izole; ukuze adle amahlwempu abantu bakowenu; ekushiyeni kwawo kwadliwa ngamarhamncwa. Yenza okufanayo ngesidiliya sakho nangomnquma wakho."
Exodus23:12 Wowusebenza umsebenzi wakho imihla emithandathu, uphumle ngomhla wesixhenxe, iphumle inkomo yakho ne-esile lakho, aphumle unyana wesicakakazi sakho nomphambukeli."
Exodus23:13 Kugcineni konke endikuthethileyo kuni; amagama thixo bambi uze ungawakhankanyi, ungavakali emlonyeni wakho."
Exodus23:14 Ndenzele isidlo kathathu ngonyaka;
Exodus23:15 Uze uwenze umthendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele (imihla esixhenxe uya kudla izonka ezingenagwele, njengoko ndakuwisela umthetho, ngexesha elimisiweyo lenyanga enguAbhibhi; ngokuba waphuma ngayo eYiputa, nasekuyeni kolalayo ecaleni kwam akaveli)."
Exodus23:16 Nomthendeleko wokuvuna, wentlahlela yemigudu yakho, oyihlwayeleyo ezweni, nomthendeleko wokuphela konyaka, ekuhlanganiseni kwakho ukuxelenga kwakho ezweni;"
Exodus23:17 Izihlandlo ezithathu ngomnyaka, onke amadoda akowenu obonakala phambi kweNkosi uYehova."
Exodus23:18 Igazi ledini lam musa ukulisondeza ndawonye nento enegwele; nenqatha lombingelelo wam malingabi kude kuse.
Exodus23:19 Owamazibulo ezweni lakho uze uwangenise endlwini kaYehova uThixo wakho. Usenokungaliboni itakane ebisini lukanina.
Exodus23:20 Uyabona, ndithuma isithunywa sezulu, ukuba sikukhokele, sikugcine endleleni, sikufikise endaweni endiyilungisileyo."
Exodus23:21 Sigcine, uliphulaphule izwi laso, ungasigculeli; kuba engayi kuluxolela ukreqo lwenu, kuba igama lam liphezu kwakhe."
Exodus23:22 Ke ukuba nithe naliphulaphula izwi lakhe, nakwenza konke endikuthethayo; ndoba lutshaba lweentshaba zakho, ndibe lutshaba lweentshaba zakho."
Exodus23:23 Ngokuba isithunywa sam siya kukukhokela, sikuse kuma-Amori, namaHeti, namaPerizi, namaKanan, namaHeti, namaYebhusi; ndibatshabalalise."
Exodus23:24 Uze ungaqubudi koothixo bazo, ungabakhonzi, ungenzi imisebenzi yabo; kodwa babethe ngesiqalekiso esikrakra nize niyaphule imifanekiso yabo eqingqiweyo ngokupheleleyo."
Exodus23:25 Mkhonzeni uYehova uThixo wenu, asisikelele isonka sakho, namanzi akho; yaye ndiya kusisusa isifo phakathi kwenu."
Exodus23:26 Akuyi kugxothwa amathole awo, nongazaliyo ezweni lakho; ndiya kulizalisa inani lemihla yakho;"
Exodus23:27 Ndiya kuzithuma phambi kwakho izothuso zam, ndizibulale zonke iintlanga oya kufika kuzo, iintshaba zakho zonke ndizenze zikunikele ikhosi;"
Exodus23:28 Ndiza kuthumela oonomeva phambi kwakho abaya kuwagxotha amaHebhere, amaKanan namaHiti phambi kwakho."
Exodus23:29 Andiyi kuwagxotha phambi kwakho ngamnyaka mnye; hleze ilizwe kube senkangala kulo, ande amarhamncwa elizwe phezu kwenu."
Exodus23:30 Ndiza kubagxotha kancinane phambi kwakho ude wande ulidle ilifa ilizwe.
Exodus23:31 Ndoyimisa imida yakho, ithabathele eLwandle oluBomvu, ise elwandle lwamaFilisti, ithabathele entlango, ise kuMlambo umNayile; kuba abemi behlabathi ndiya kubanikela esandleni sakho; uwagxothe phambi kwakho."
Exodus23:32 Uze ungenzi mnqophiso nabo okanye noothixo babo.
Exodus23:33 Mabangemi ezweni lakho, hleze bakwenze ucakwe; ngenxa yokuba xa uthe wabakhonza oothixo bazo, ngokuqinisekileyo baya kuba ngumgibe kuwe."
Exodus24:1 Wathi kuMoses, Nyuka uye kuYehova, wena noAron, noNadabhi, noAbhihu, namashumi asixhenxe amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli; unqula umgama."
Exodus24:2 uMoses uya kusondela kuYehova yedwa, kodwa bona abasondeli; yaye abantu abanyukanga naye."
Exodus24:3 Waya uMoses, wabaxelela abantu onke amazwi kaYehova, nemithetho yakhe yonke; baphendula abantu ngazwi-nye, bathi, Siya kuwenza onke amazwi awathethileyo uYehova."
Exodus24:4 Wawabhala uMoses onke amazwi kaYehova, wagqiba kusasa, wakha isibingelelo phantsi kwentaba, nezimiso zamatye zalishumi elinazibini, ngokwezizwe ezilishumi elinazibini zakwaSirayeli."
Exodus24:5 Wathuma abafana bakoonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuba baye kubingelela kuYehova amadini anyukayo, babingelela imibingelelo yombulelo ngeenkomo."
Exodus24:6 Wathabatha uMoses isiqingatha segazi, waligalela ezindebeni; nesiqingatha segazi ufefe esibingelelweni."
Exodus24:7 Wathabatha incwadi yomnqophiso, wayilesa phambi kwabantu, bathi bona, Yonke into ayithethileyo uYehova soyenza siyive."
Exodus24:8 Walithabatha uMoses igazi, wabatshiza abantu ngalo, wathi, Ligazi eli lomnqophiso awawenzayo uYehova nani ngenxa yala mazwi onke."
Exodus24:9 Wenyuka uMoses, noAron, uNadabhi noAbhihu, namadoda amakhulu angamashumi asixhenxe akwaSirayeli."
Exodus24:10 Bambona uTHIXO kaSirayeli, kwaye phantsi kweenyawo zakhe kunjengelitye eligangathiweyo lesafire, njengembonakalo yesibhakabhaka ngobuqaqawuli balo."
Exodus24:11 Akasolula isandla sakhe kwizikhulu zoonyana bakaSirayeli; bambona nabo uThixo, badla, basela."
Exodus24:12 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Nyuka uze kum entabeni, ube khona, ndikunike amacwecwe nomyalelo nomthetho, endiwubhalileyo; ukuba unokubafundisa."
Exodus24:13 Waphakama uMoses noYoshuwa umkhonzi wakhe waza uMoses wenyuka intaba yoTHIXO oyinyaniso.
Exodus24:14 Wathi kumadoda amakhulu, Hlalani apha ngenxa yethu, side sibuyele kuni; nabo ke ooAron noHure benani; ukuba ubani unento yokwenza, makeze kuye."
Exodus24:15 Wenyuka ke uMoses waya entabeni; ilifu layigubungela intaba.
Exodus24:16 Ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova bahlala phezu kwentaba yeSinayi; ilifu layigubungela iintsuku ezintandathu; Wabiza uMoses ngomhla wesixhenxe efini;
Exodus24:17 Imbonakalo yobuqaqawuli bukaYehova, emehlweni oonyana bakaSirayeli, ibinjengomlilo odlayo encotsheni yentaba."
Exodus24:18 Wangena uMoses efini, wenyuka waya entabeni; wahlala uMoses entabeni iimini ezimashumi mane nobusuku obumashumi mane."
Exodus25:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Exodus25:2 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, bandizisele umbingelelo; kuwo wonke umntu osukuba enikela ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo, wowamkela umnikelo wam."
Exodus25:3 Nguwo lo ke umrhumo eniya kuwuthabatha kubo; igolide, nesilivere, nobhedu;"
Exodus25:4 noboya obubomvu, obubomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, noboya beebhokhwe;"
Exodus25:5 nezintsu zeenkunzi zezimvu ezibomvu, nezintsu zenkunzi entsha, nemithi yesikamore;"
Exodus25:6 ioli yesibane, nesiqhumiso seoli yentambiso, nesiqhumiso esimnandi;"
Exodus25:7 amatye ebherilo, namatye e-efodi, netyeya;"
Exodus25:8 Bandenzela ingcwele; ukuze ndihlale phakathi kwabo.
Exodus25:9 Njengako konke endikubonisa kona: ngokomfanekiso womnquba, nomfanekiso weempahla zawo zonke, ize nenze."
Exodus25:10 Mabenze ityeya ngomthi womnga, ubude bayo bube ziikubhite ezimbini ezinesiqingatha, ububanzi bayo bube yikubhite enesiqingatha, ukuphakama kwayo kube yikubhite enesiqingatha."
Exodus25:11 Uyaleke ngegolide ecocekileyo, uyigqume ngaphakathi nangaphandle, wenze isithsaba segolide esithe jize."
Exodus25:12 Uyenzele iintsontelo ezine zegolide, uzifake ezimbombeni zone; izintya ezimbini kweli icala layo, nemitya emibini kweliya icala."
Exodus25:13 Yenza izibonda ngomthi, uzigqume ngegolide,"
Exodus25:14 ufake izibonda emakhonkcweni asemacaleni etyeya, ithwalwe ngazo ityeya leyo."
Exodus25:15 Imithwalo ibe semakhonkcweni etyeya; aziyi kushukunyiswa kuyo.
Exodus25:16 Faka isingqino endiya kukunika sona emkhombeni.
Exodus25:17 Uze wenze isigubungelo ngegolide ecocekileyo, ubude baso bube ziikubhite ezimbini ezinesiqingatha, ububanzi baso bube yikubhite enye enesiqingatha."
Exodus25:18 Yenza iikerubhi zibe mbini ngegolide; woyenza ibe ngumsebenzi, emaphethweni omabini esigubungelo."
Exodus25:19 Yenza enye ikerubhi ngapha, enye ikerubhi ngaphaya; wenze iikerubhi zibe seziphelweni zaso zozibini;"
Exodus25:20 Iikerubhi ezo zowolula amaphiko azo, zisisibekele isigubungelo ngamaphiko azo, zijongane ubuso ngobuso; ubuso beekerubhi buya kuba semva kwesigubungelo."
Exodus25:21 Beka isigubungelo emkhombeni; ubeke etyeyeni isingqino, endiya kukunika sona."
Exodus25:22 Ndohlangana nawe khona, ndithethe nawe ndisesigqubulweni, phakathi kweekerubhi zombini eziphezu kwetyeya yesingqino, ngeento zonke endiya kukuwisela umthetho ngazo koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Exodus25:23 Uze wenze netafile ngomngampunzi. Ubude bayo boba ziikubhite ezimbini, ububanzi bayo bube yikubhite enye, ukuphakama kwayo kube yikubhite enye enesiqingatha."
Exodus25:24 Wayigqume ngegolide ecocekileyo, wenze isithsaba segolide ngeenxa zonke."
Exodus25:25 Uze uyenzele isithsaba esingangobubanzi besandla ngeenxa zonke, ulwenzele udini lwayo isithsaba segolide esithe jize."
Exodus25:26 Uyenzele amakhonkco egolide abe mane, uwafake amakhonkco ezimbombeni zone zemilenze yayo yomine."
Exodus25:27 Amakhonkco ajongana nesithsaba aba zizihlalo zokuthwala izibonda zokuyithwala itafile.
Exodus25:28 Yenza izibonda ngomngampunzi, uzityabeke ngegolide, ithwalwe ngazo itafile."
Exodus25:29 Uze wenze izitya zayo, neenkamba zayo, neendebe zayo, nemicephe yayo ekuya kuthungwa ngayo; wenze ngegolide ecocekileyo."
Exodus25:30 Beka isonka phambi kwam ngamaxesha onke etafileni;
Exodus25:31 Masenze nesiphatho sezibane ngegolide ecocekileyo. Isihlalo masenze umsebenzi;
Exodus25:32 Kuya kuvela amasebe amathandathu emacaleni aso; iikubhite ezintathu zesundu ngapha, iikubhite ezintathu zesundu kwelinye icala."
Exodus25:33 Zaba ntathu iindebe ezifana neentyantyambo zeamangile, zinamaqhina nentyantyambo esandleni sinye; neentolo ezintathu ezifanayo nezo zexhama kwelinye icala, ineqhina nompu; zikwanjalo ke iingalo ezintandathu ezikwisiphatho sesibane."
Exodus25:34 Phezu kwesiseko sesibane eso bekukho iindebe ezine zeamangile, zineentyantyambo zaso neentyantyambo zaso."
Exodus25:35 Kwaye kuya kubakho iqhosha phantsi kwezandla ezibini ezifanayo, neqhosha phantsi kwezandla ezibini ezifanayo, neqhosha phantsi kwezandla ezibini ezifanayo, ngokweengalo ezintandathu zesiphatho sesibane."
Exodus25:36 Amalungu azo nezandla zawo ziyafana; soba ngumsebenzi omnye wegolide ecocekileyo.
Exodus25:37 Wenze ngazo izibane zibe sixhenxe, uzimise izibane zaso, zikhanyisele."
Exodus25:38 Iingono zayo namacala omlomo wayo ibiyigolide ecocekileyo.
Exodus25:39 Makenze ngetalente yegolide ecocekileyo, neempahla zonke."
Exodus25:40 Kwaye wabona ukuba wenza ngokomzekelo wabo owawuboniswe entabeni.
Exodus26:1 Ke umnquba uze uwenze ngeshumi elinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo, nemfusa, nemfusa, nebomvu; uwenze ngeekerubhi, woba ngumsebenzi wengcibi yokuluka."
Exodus26:2 Ubude belaphu lentente elinye boba ziikubhite ezimashumi mabini anesibhozo, ububanzi belaphu lentente lomnquba bube ziikubhite ezine; Ilengalenga ngalinye lentente loba mlinganiso mnye."
Exodus26:3 Amalaphu amahlanu ahlanganiswe, elinye nelinye; kunye nezinye iilaphu ezintlanu, zahlanganiswa."
Exodus26:4 Wenze imisonto emsi emphethweni wentente ephothiweyo; yaye, ekugqibeleni, wenze nelinye ilaphu lentente, lize lidityaniswe nelinye."
Exodus26:5 Uze wenze amagwegwe abe mashumi mahlanu kwelinye ilangeni lentente, wenze amagwegwe abe mashumi mahlanu emqukumbelweni welengalenga lentente yesibini; ukuze baphathane;"
Exodus26:6 wenze amagwegwe egolide abe mashumi mahlanu, uwahlanganise amagwegwe lawo, ube mnye umnquba."
Exodus26:7 Uze wenze amalaphu entente ngoboya bebhokhwe abe yintente phezu komnquba; wenze amalaphu entente abe lishumi elinanye.
Exodus26:8 Ubude belaphu lentente elinye boba ziikubhite ezimashumi mathathu, ububanzi belaphu lentente elinye bube ziikubhite ezine; amalengalenga alishumi elinalinye entente, olingana onke."
Exodus26:9 Wowahlanganisa amalaphu entente abe mahlanu, namalaphu entente amathandathu ewonke;"
Exodus26:10 Uze wenze amagwegwe abe mashumi mahlanu emqukumbelweni welaphu lentente elinye ngaphandle kwelaphu, namagwegwe abe mashumi mahlanu emqukumbelweni welaphu lentente, edityaniswe kwelesibini ilaphu lentente."
Exodus26:11 Uze wenze amagwegwe obhedu abe mashumi mahlanu, uwafake amagwegwe awo kumalungu awo, uyihlanganise intente ibe nye."
Exodus26:12 Amalaphu entente aseleyo, wona amalaphu aseleyo omnquba, owuxhoma emva komnquba;"
Exodus26:13 Ikubhite enye ngapha, enye ikubhite ngapha kobude obuseleyo bamalaphu entente, ijinga emacaleni omnquba ngapha nangapha, iwugubungele."
Exodus26:14 Intente uze uyenzele isigubungelo ngezintsu zeenkunzi zezimvu, zenziwe zayingqombela, nesigubungelo sezikhumba zamahlengezi."
Exodus26:15 Umnquba uze wenze inkunkuma ngeende.
Exodus26:16 Ubude bombhalo boba ziikubhite ezilishumi, ububanzi bube yikubhite enesiqingatha solunye uhlobo."
Exodus26:17 Izikhonkwane ezibini zibekwe ngendlela enye; nenze kwaezo zonke iintlobo zeminquba.
Exodus26:18 Umnquba uze wenze iintsika zawo, zibe mashumi mabini iintsika ngecala lasezantsi ngasezantsi;"
Exodus26:19 Uze wenze iintsika zesilivere ezimashumi mane phantsi kweentlobo ezimashumi mabini; izihlalo ezibini emilenzeni yenu yomibini, phantsi komthi omnye, nezihlalo ezibini phantsi komnye umthi emilenzeni yenu yomibini."
Exodus26:20 Ezecala lesibini lomnquba ngelasentla iintsika ezimashumi mabini;
Exodus26:21 neziseko zazo zesilivere zibe mashumi mane; nezihlalo ezibini phantsi kweplanga, nezihlalo ezibini phantsi kweplanga."
Exodus26:22 Ezomva womnquba ngasentshonalanga wozenza zibe ntandathu iintsika.
Exodus26:23 Benza iintsika zibe mbini, emambombeni omnquba emacaleni omabini;"
Exodus26:24 zibe ngamawele entloko, bahlangane nekhonkco linye; koba njalo kubo bobabini; ibe ziikona ezimbini."
Exodus26:25 Zoba ziintlobo ezisibhozo neziseko zazo zesilivere, zibe ziziseko ezilishumi elinazithandathu; nezihlalo ezibini phantsi kweplanga, nezihlalo ezibini phantsi kweplanga."
Exodus26:26 Yenza imivalo ngamaplanga; zantlanu zeentsika zelinye icala lomnquba;
Exodus26:27 neentsika zantlanu zeentsika zelinye icala lomnquba;
Exodus26:28 Intendelezo ephakathi, nombindi wezibonda, kwathabathela ekupheleni kwesa ekupheleni;"
Exodus26:29 Iintsika ezo zande ngegolide; ke imiqadi leyo uyaleke ngegolide.
Exodus26:30 Uwumise umnquba ngokwendlela eboniswe entabeni.
Exodus26:31 Maze benze ilaphu elimfusa, elimfusa, elibomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo, umsebenzi wengcibi yokuluka; masenze iikerubhi."
Exodus26:32 Uze uyixhome ezintsikeni ezine zomngampunzi, ezalekwe ngegolide; iziseko zazo zibe zezegolide, phezu kweziseko zozine zesilivere;"
Exodus26:33 usixhome isisitheliso phantsi kwezibiyeli, ukuze uyifake ityeya yesingqino ngaphaya komkhusane; nekhuselo liya kwahlula phakathi kweNgcwele yeeNgcwele nakwiNgcwele yeeNgcwele."
Exodus26:34 Ubeke isigqubuthelo phezu kwetyeya yesingqino kwiNgcwele kaNgcwele;
Exodus26:35 uyibeke itafile nganeno komkhusane, usimise nesiphatho sesibane malunga netafile, ngecala lomnquba elingasezantsi; uze ubeke itafile kwicala elingasemntla."
Exodus26:36 Umnyango wentente uze uwenzele ilaphu elimfusa, nemfusa, nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo, umsebenzi wengcibi yokuluka."
Exodus26:37 Kwilaphu elisithekileyo, uze wenze iintsika zibe ntlanu ngomsonto, uzigubungele ngegolide, neentsika zazo zibe zegolide; masenze iziseko zobhedu zibe zihlanu."
Exodus27:1 Uze usenze isibingelelo ngomthombe: ubude baso bube ziikubhite ezintlanu, ububanzi baso bube ziikubhite ezintlanu; Isibingelelo eso soba ngamacala amane alinganayo, ukuphakama kwaso kube ziikubhite ezintathu;"
Exodus27:2 Uze wenze iimpondo zaso ezimbombeni zaso zone; ziphuma nto-nye iimpondo zaso; yityabeke ngobhedu.
Exodus27:3 Uze wenze neenkamba zaso zokulahla uthuthu lwaso, nemihlakulwana yaso, nezitya zaso zokutshiza, neempondo zaso, neengcedevu zaso zamalahle; zonke iimpahla zakhe uzenze ngobhedu."
Exodus27:4 Wenze ube ngumthi wobhedu; uze wenze umnatha ube neentambo ezine zobhedu eziphelweni zawo zozine;
Exodus27:5 uwubeke phantsi kongqameko lwesibingelelo, uthabathele phantsi, ukuze uthi gaa phakathi kwesibingelelo;"
Exodus27:6 Uze usenzele umthwalo ophezu kwesibingelelo, umthwalo ngomngampunzi, usibekele ngobhedu;"
Exodus27:7 zifakwe izibonda emakhonkcweni, zibe semacaleni omabini esibingelelo izibonda ukuba sithwalwe ngazo."
Exodus27:8 Lichithe ngemifanekiso eqingqiweyo; wenze kubo njengoko wababonisayo entabeni.
Exodus27:9 Uze uyenze intendelezo yomnquba kwelasezantsi icala, ngasezantsi, ibe ngamalaphu amalaphu elinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo, ubude bawo bube ziikubhite ezilikhulu;"
Exodus27:10 Iintsika zayo ezimashumi mabini, neziseko zazo ezimashumi mabini, izezobhedu; iziseko zeentsika nemixokelelwane yazo yayeyesilivere."
Exodus27:11 Kananjalo ngecala lasentla amalengalenga axhonywa iikubhite ezilikhulu, neentsika zawo ezimashumi mabini, nezixhaso zazo ezimashumi mabini; iintsika namakhonkco azo esilivere."
Exodus27:12 Ububanzi bentendelezo ngecala lasentshonalanga amalaphu ajingayo aziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu, iintsika zawo zibe lishumi, nezixhaso zazo zibe lishumi."
Exodus27:13 Ububanzi bentendelezo ngecala lempumalanga ngasempumalanga boba ziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu.
Exodus27:14 Amalaphu axhonywe kwelinye icala lesango oba ziikubhite ezilishumi elinantlanu;
Exodus27:15 Kwelinye icala kwakukho amalaphu axhonyiweyo aziikubhite ezilishumi elinesihlanu, iintsika zawo zaba ntathu, namaxhaka awo aba mathathu."
Exodus27:16 “Esangweni lentendelezo soba sisisitheliso seekubhite ezimashumi mabini, nelinen ecikizekileyo emfusa, nemfusa, nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo, ehonjisiweyo; Iintsika zawo zibe zine, neziseko zazo zibe zine."
Exodus27:17 Zonke iintsika zentendelezo eziyijikelezileyo ziya kuzaliswa ngesilivere; izikhonkwane zazo zibe zezesilivere, neziseko zazo zibe zezobhedu."
Exodus27:18 Ubude bentendelezo bube ziikubhite ezilikhulu, ububanzi bube ziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu kuyo yonk’ indawo, ukuphakama kube ziikubhite ezintlanu zelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo, neentsika zayo zibe zezobhedu."
Exodus27:19 Zonke iimpahla zomnquba, ekusetyenzweni kwawo konke, nezikhonkwane zawo zonke, nezikhonkwane zonke zentendelezo, zoba zezobhedu."
Exodus27:20 Bawisele umthetho oonyana bakaSirayeli, bazise kuwe ioli eqaqambileyo yeminquma engqushiweyo esiphathweni saso, ukuze sihlale sivutha isibane."
Exodus27:21 Ententeni yokuhlangana, nganeno komkhusane, naphambi kwesingqino, woyicwangcisa ooAron noonyana bakhe le nto phambi koYehova, kuthabathele ngokuhlwa kude kuse: ngummiselo ongunaphakade ezizukulwaneni zabo, koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Exodus28:1 Thabatha uAron umkhuluwa wakho noonyana bakhe, ubasondeze kuwe, bephuma koonyana bakaSirayeli, babe ngababingeleli kum: uAron, noNadabhi, noAbhihu, noElazare, noItamare, oonyana baka-Aron."
Exodus28:2 Umenzele izambatho ezingcwele uAron umntakwenu, zibe zezozuko nezihombiso."
Exodus28:3 Thetha kubo bonke abantliziyo zilumkileyo, endibazalise ngomoya wobulumko, ukuba bamenzele izambatho uAron zokumngcwalisa, abe ngumbingeleli kum."
Exodus28:4 Zizo ke ezi iingubo abaya kuzenza; nesikhuselo sesifuba, nengubo emagxeni, nengubo yokunxiba, nengubo ephothiweyo, neqhiya, nesondo lengubo; uze umenzele izambatho ezingcwele uAron umntakwenu omkhulu noonyana bakhe, ukuze abe ngumbingeleli kum."
Exodus28:5 Thabatha igolide, nemisonto emsi nemfusa nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo;"
Exodus28:6 Uze wenze iefodi ngegolide, nemfusa, nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo, umsebenzi ke lowo."
Exodus28:7 Yoba neziziba ezibini zamagxa, zokuyixakatha emiphethweni yayo yomibini; kwaye ke iya kudityaniswa."
Exodus28:8 Isondo le-efodi eliphezu kwayo loba lelakhe, njengokusetyenzwa kwayo; negolide, nengubo emfusa, nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo."
Exodus28:9 Thabatha amatye ebherilo abe mabini, ubhale kuwo amagama oonyana bakaSirayeli;"
Exodus28:10 amagama amathandathu kwelinye ilitye, amanye amathandathu kwelinye ilitye, ngokwemvelaphi yawo."
Exodus28:11 Wowabhala amagama oonyana bakaSirayeli ngokomfanekiso womkroli wamatye, njengombhalo wetywina, loo matye mabini;"
Exodus28:12 ubeke amatye abe mabini ezizibeni zamagxa zelaphu nakumagxa, abe ngamatye esikhumbuzo koonyana bakaSirayeli; yaye uAron wawathwala amagama abo phambi koYehova emagxeni akhe omabini, abe sisikhumbuzo."
Exodus28:13 Yenza iityeya ngegolide;
Exodus28:14 neentsontelo ezimbini zegolide ecocekileyo; wenze ngamatyathanga asongiweyo, kwaye ubophe amatyathanga engxoweni."
Exodus28:15 Yenza ityeya yesigwebo ngobuqhetseba; yenze ibe yiefodi; Uyenze ngegolide, nangengubo emfusa, nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo."
Exodus28:16 Mayiphindwe kabini; ubude bayo bube yikubhite, ububanzi bayo bube yikubhite."
Exodus28:17 Yongeza amatye kuyo, imikrozo emine yamatye; kufuneka ibe ngumgca wokuqala;"
Exodus28:18 ukrozo lwesibini lube yirubhi, nesafire, nedayimani;"
Exodus28:19 kukrozo lwesithathu lwaba yiametiste, neagati, neametiste;"
Exodus28:20 kukrozo lwesine ibe yimbonakalo entle, nebherilo, neyaspisi; kufuneka bafake igolide ezingxoweni zabo;"
Exodus28:21 amatye lawo abe ngokwamagama oonyana bakaSirayeli, abe lishumi elinamabini ngokwamagama abo, ngokombhalo wetywina; iyileyo yayinegama layo ngokwezizukulwana ezilishumi elinazibini."
Exodus28:22 Wenze elubengweni iintsontelo ezo zisontiwe ngegolide ecocekileyo;
Exodus28:23 wenze amakhonkco abe mabini ngegolide elubengweni, uwafake amakhonkco abe mabini emancamini omabini obengo;"
Exodus28:24 ufake iintsontelo ezimbini zegolide emakhonkcweni omabini asemancamini obengo;
Exodus28:25 Zibophe iingxowa ezimbini ezingakumbi zemixokelelwane esongelwe kuzo, uze uzibophe kwimixwayo emagxeni elaphu eliphambi kwayo."
Exodus28:26 Wenze iintsontelo zibe mbini ngegolide, uzifake emancamini omabini obengo, emphethweni walo ongaphakathi we-efodi;"
Exodus28:27 wenze neentsontelo ezimbini zegolide, uzifake ezizibeni zamagxa zozibini ze-efodi, nganeno kwayo, mayela nomphambili wayo, malungana nokuhlangana kwe-efodi;"
Exodus28:28 Bolunxibelela ubengo emakhonkcweni alo emakhonkcweni engubo yamagxa, ngentsontelo emfusa, lube sentla kombhinqo wamagxa, ukuze lungakrazuki ubengo elungwini."
Exodus28:29 Wawathabatha uAron amagama oonyana bakaSirayeli elubengweni lwesigwebo entliziyweni yakhe ekungeneni kwakhe engcweleni, ukuze akhumbule rhoqo phambi koYehova."
Exodus28:30 Wazibeka iiUrim neeTumim engcweleni yetyeya yesigwebo; zibe sentliziyweni ka-Aron ekuyeni kwakhe phambi koYehova;
Exodus28:31 Uze uyenze iefodi yonke ngemisonto emsi nemfusa;
Exodus28:32 Bekukho umngxuma phakathi kuyo; Yiba nebhanti elukiweyo ejikeleze umngxuma, njengomngxuma we-habergeon, ukuze ungakrazuki."
Exodus28:33 Emazantsi eentsiba zayo, wenze amalengalenga ngemisonto emsi nemfusa nebomvu, emphethweni wayo; namakhonkco egolide phakathi kwazo, ngapha nangapha;"
Exodus28:34 imisonto yegolide, nemisonto yegolide emininzi, nemisonto yegolide, nemisonto emininzi yegolide, emqukumbelweni wesambatho sangaphezulu."
Exodus28:35 Woyinxiba uAron xa elungiselela, ukuze livakale ilizwi lakhe ekungeneni kwakhe engcweleni phambi koYehova nasekuphumeni kwakhe, ukuze angafi."
Exodus28:36 Yenza imbasa ngegolide ecocekileyo, ubhale kuyo ngendlela yombhalo wetywina, uthi, INGCWELE KUYEHOVA;"
Exodus28:37 uyibeke emsonto omfusa, uyibeke elunkontshweni; ube phambi konkontsho,"
Exodus28:38 ibe sebunzi kuAron, ukuze abuthwale uAron ubugwenxa bezinto ezingcwele, abaya kuzingcwalisa oonyana bakaSirayeli, ezintweni zonke ezingcwele zabo; ihlale isebunzi kuye, ukuze zibakholekise zona phambi koYehova."
Exodus28:39 Yenza ingubo yokwaleka ngelinen ecikizekileyo, unkontsho ngelinen ecikizekileyo, wenze nombhinqo wokuthunga."
Exodus28:40 Ubenzele iingubo oonyana baka-Aron, ubenzele umbhinqo, ubaenzele iminqwazi, ibe yeyozuko neyokuhomba;"
Exodus28:41 umnxibe uAron umkhuluwa wakho, noonyana bakhe; ubathambise, ubangcwalise, ubangcwalise, babe ngababingeleli kum."
Exodus28:42 Benze iibhulukhwe zelinen emhlophe zokufihla uhlazo lwabo; ukusuka esinqeni ukuya esinqeni baya kufikelela esinqeni.
Exodus28:43 Zinxibe uAron noonyana bakhe ekungeneni kwabo ententeni yokuhlangana, nasekusondeleni kwabo esibingelelweni, besiza kukulungiselela engcweleni; ukuze bangathwali bugwenxa, bafe; ibe ngummiselo ongunaphakade kuye nakwimbewu yakhe emva kwakhe."
Exodus29:1 Uze wenjenje ukubangcwalisa, babe ngababingeleli kum: ndiya kuthabatha inkunzi entsha yenkomo, neenkunzi zezimvu zibe mbini, ezigqibeleleyo;"
Exodus29:2 nezonka ezingenagwele, nezonka ezingenagwele, ezigalelwe ioli, nezonka ezingenagwele, zithanjiswe ioli; wowenza ngomgubo wengqolowa."
Exodus29:3 Wozibeka engobozini-nye, uzisondeze nazo, kwanenkunzi entsha yenkomo, neenkunzi zezimvu zombini zisengobozini;"
Exodus29:4 Wobasondeza uAron noonyana bakhe emnyango wentente yokuhlangana, abahlambe ngamanzi;"
Exodus29:5 Thabatha izambatho, umnxibe uAron isambatho, nesambatho se-efodi, ne-efodi, nobengo, umbophe ngombhinqo we-efodi;"
Exodus29:6 umbeke unkontsho entloko, ubeke isithsaba esingcwele elunkontshweni olo."
Exodus29:7 Thabatha ke ioli yokuthambisa, umgalele entloko, umthambise."
Exodus29:8 Uthabathe oonyana bakhe, ubanxibe iingubo zabo;"
Exodus29:9 Babophe umbhinqo, uAron noonyana bakhe, ubabeke iminqwazi; bube bobabo ububingeleli, bube ngummiselo ongunaphakade; uze usikelele uAron noonyana bakhe."
Exodus29:10 Woyisondeza inkunzi entsha phambi kwentente yokuhlangana; waza uAron noonyana bakhe babeka izandla zabo phezu kwentloko yenkunzi yenkomo.
Exodus29:11 Uyixhelele inkunzi yenkomo phambi koYehova emnyango wentente yokuhlangana.
Exodus29:12 Thatha egazini lenkunzi yenkomo, uliqabe ngomnwe wakho ezimpondweni zesibingelelo, uligalele lonke igazi emazantsi esibingelelo."
Exodus29:13 Uze uwathabathe onke amanqatha agubungele amathumbu, namanqatha onke aphezu kwesibindi, nezintso zombini, nenqatha lazo, uqhumisele ngazo esibingelelweni."
Exodus29:14 Yona inyama yenkunzi entsha, nesikhumba sayo, nomswane wayo, wozitshisa ezo zinto ngomlilo, ngaphandle kweminquba yenu. Lidini lesono elo."
Exodus29:15 Thabatha inkunzi yemvu ibe nye; waza uAron noonyana bakhe babeka izandla zabo phezu kwentloko yenkunzi yegusha leyo.
Exodus29:16 Yixhele inkunzi yemvu, ulithabathe igazi layo, ulitshize esibingelelweni."
Exodus29:17 Inkunzi yemvu yihlahle, uwahlambe amathumbu ayo, nesisu sayo, uzibeke phezu kweenyama zayo, naphezu kwentloko yayo;"
Exodus29:18 Yitshise ngomlilo inkunzi yemvu iphela esibingelelweni. Livumba elithozamisayo, kukudla kwasemlilweni ke oko kuYehova;"
Exodus29:19 Wothabatha enye inkunzi yegusha; waza uAron noonyana bakhe babeka izandla zabo phezu kwentloko yenkunzi yegusha leyo.
Exodus29:20 Yixhele inkunzi yemvu, uthabathe egazini layo, uliqabe endlebeni ka-Aron, nasezindlebeni zasekunene zoonyana bakhe, nakubhontsi bezandla zabo, nakubhontsi beenyawo zabo fafaza igazi phezu kwesibingelelo yonke indawo."
Exodus29:21 Thabatha egazini lesibingelelo, neoli yentambiso, ulifefe kuAron, nezambatho zakhe, noonyana bakhe, nezambatho zoonyana bakhe abakunye naye; wasikelelwa, neempahla zakhe, noonyana bakhe, neempahla zoonyana bakhe, zikuye."
Exodus29:22 Thabatha inqatha lenkunzi yemvu, nomlenze, nomhlehlo ogubungele amathumbu, nomhlehlo ophezu kwesibindi, nezintso zombini, nenqatha lazo, nesandla sasekunene; ngokuba yinkunzi yemvu yembewu;"
Exodus29:23 nesonka somqhathane esigalelwe ioli sibe sinye, nesonka somqhathane engobozini yezonka ezingenagwele, ephambi koYehova."
Exodus29:24 Zonke izinto uzinikele esandleni sika-Aron nasezandleni zoonyana bakhe; uze uwange njengomnikelo otshiswayo phambi koYehova.
Exodus29:25 Woyithabatha ezandleni zabo, uyibeke phezu komlilo phezu kwesibingelelo, ibe lidini elinyukayo, libe livumba elithozamisayo phambi koYehova; Oko kukudla kwasemlilweni kuYehova."
Exodus29:26 Uthabathe incum yenkunzi yemvu yembewu ka-Aron, uyitshangatshangise ibe ngumtshangatshangiso phambi koYehova; kwaye kufuneka ibe yinxalenye yakho."
Exodus29:27 Wayingcwalisa incum yomtshangatshangiso, nomlenze womtshangatshangiso, inkunzi yemvu yembewu ka-Aron, noonyana bakhe;"
Exodus29:28 ibe yeka-Aron noonyana bakhe, ngokommiselo ophuma koonyana bakaSirayeli, kude kuse ephakadeni; ngokuba lidini elinyukayo elo lenziwa; yaye yoba ngumnikelo otshiswayo woonyana bakaSirayeli wemibingelelo yombulelo, umnikelo wabo otshiswayo oziswa kuYehova."
Exodus29:29 Izambatho ezingcwele zika-Aron zoba zezoonyana bakhe emva kwakhe, bathanjiswe, banxibe, bangcwaliswe ngazo."
Exodus29:30 Inkwenkwe engumbingeleli esikhundleni sayo yobamisela imihla esixhenxe ekungeneni kwayo kwindawo yentlanganiso, ukuba ikhonze endaweni engcwele."
Exodus29:31 Thabatha inkunzi yegusha, uyipheke inyama yayo endaweni engcwele;"
Exodus29:32 Bayidla ooAron noonyana bakhe inyama yenkunzi yemvu, kwanesonka engobozini, emnyango wentente yokuhlangana."
Exodus29:33 Ke yona le yenziwe ngokukholeka, bayidla, ukuze bayingcwalise, bayingcwalise; owasemzini makangayidli, kuba ingcwele."
Exodus29:34 Ukuba kuthe kwasala inyama nesonka, kwada kwasa, uze uyitshise ngomlilo into eseleyo; mayingatyiwa, kuba ingcwele."
Exodus29:35 Uze wenze kuAron noonyana bakhe ngokweento zonke endikuwisele umthetho ngazo, ubangcwalise iintsuku zibe sixhenxe."
Exodus29:36 Londoloza iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo, zibe lidini lesono ngemini, lokucamagusha; hlambulula isibingelelo xa ucamagushela isono, usithambise ukuba singcwaliswe."
Exodus29:37 Kangangeentsuku ezisixhenxe wosigubungela isono sesibingelelo, usingcwalise; yoba sisibingelelo esiyingcwele kangcwele; bonke abasichukumisayo isibingelelo boba ngcwele."
Exodus29:38 Yiyo ke le into oya kuyibingelela esibingelelweni; iimvana ezimbini ezinomnyaka mnye, yonke imihla, rhoqo."
Exodus29:39 Nilungise enye imvana kusasa; nize nilungiselele enye imvana ngokuhlwa.
Exodus29:40 Woba nesahlulo seshumi somgubo ocoliweyo, sibe sisahlulo sesine sehin yeoli; nesahlulo sesine sehin yewayini yomnikelo othululwayo."
Exodus29:41 Nilungise enye imvana ngokuhlwa, niyenze ngokomnikelo wakusasa, nangokomnikelo wawo othululwayo, ibe ngumnikelo wasemlilweni olivumba elithozamisayo kuYehova."
Exodus29:42 Elo loba lidini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke kwizizukulwana zenu, emnyango wentente yokuhlangana phambi koYehova, apho ndiya kuhlangana nani khona, ndithethe nani."
Exodus29:43 Khona apho ndohlangana noonyana bakaSirayeli, bangcwaliswe ngobuqaqawuli bam;"
Exodus29:44 ndiyingcwalise intente yokuhlangana nesibingelelo; NoAron noonyana bakhe ndiya kungcwalisa ukuba babe ngababingeleli bam.
Exodus29:45 Ndohlala phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, ndibe nguThixo kubo;"
Exodus29:46 bazi ukuba ndinguYehova uThixo wabo, owabakhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa, ukuba ndihlale phakathi kwabo; NdinguYehova, uThixo wabo."
Exodus30:1 Uze wenze isibingelelo sokuqhumisela; yenze ngomthi welinden.
Exodus30:2 Ubude bayo mabube yikubhite, ububanzi bayo bube yikubhite; mayibe namacala amane alinganayo, ukuphakama kwayo kube ziimitha ezimbini; iimpondo zakhe mazifane."
Exodus30:3 Umphezulu waso wosaleka ngegolide ecocekileyo, namacala aso, neempondo zaso; wenze isithsaba segolide ngeenxa zonke."
Exodus30:4 Wasenzela iintsontelo zambini zegolide, phantsi kwesithsaba saso, eziphelweni zaso zozibini; yenze emacaleni ayo omabini; ibe yindawo yezibonda zokuyithwala."
Exodus30:5 Uze wenze imivalo ngomthi welinen, uyigqume ngegolide."
Exodus30:6 Yibeke phambi komkhusane naphambi kwetyeya yesingqino, phambi kwesigubungelo esiphezu kweSingqino, apho ndiya kuhlangana nawe khona."
Exodus30:7 uAron woqhumisela kuso ubulawu kuyo yonke imiso ngemiso.
Exodus30:8 Emva kokuba uAron ezilumekile izibane ngokuhlwa, aqhumisele phezu kwazo, zibe sisiqhumiso phambi koYehova, kwizizukulwana zenu."
Exodus30:9 Ize ninganyusi phezu kwalo isiqhumiso esingaqhelekanga, nedini elinyukayo, nokuba ngumnikelo wasemlilweni; uze ungagaleli naluphi na uhlobo lwesiselo kuyo."
Exodus30:10 uAron woyigquma imisipha yeempondo zakhe kube kanye ngomnyaka, ngegazi ledini lesono lokucamagusha; noyicamagushela kube kanye ngomnyaka, kwizizukulwana zenu; yeyona nto ingcwele kuYehova."
Exodus30:11 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Exodus30:12 Xa ulibala inani loonyana bakaSirayeli, ngokwenani labo, mabanikele elowo imali yokucamagushela umphefumlo wakhe kuYehova ekubabaleni; ukuze kungabikho siphoso phakathi kwazo xa uzifunda."
Exodus30:13 Nantsi loo nto, bonke abagqithela kwababaliweyo mabanike isiqingatha seshekele ngokweshekele yengcwele, ishekele leyo iziigera ezimashumi mabini; isiqingatha seshekele yoba ngumrhumo kaYehova."
Exodus30:14 Wonk’ ubani odlula kwabo babhalisiweyo ukususela kwabaminyaka ingamashumi amabini ukuya phezulu, umele enze umbingelelo kuYehova."
Exodus30:15 Isityebi asifanele sinikele ngakumbi, yaye ihlwempu alifanele likhuphe ngaphantsi kwesiqingatha seshekele xa kunikelwa umnikelo wokucamagushela imiphefumlo yenu kuYehova."
Exodus30:16 Yithabathe imali yokucamagusha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uyinikele enkonzweni yentente yokuhlangana; sibe sisikhumbuzo phambi koYehova koonyana bakaSirayeli, ukucamagushela imiphefumlo yenu."
Exodus30:17 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Exodus30:18 Uze wenze nesitya sobhedu, noseko lwalo, ukuze uzihlambe ngalo; uyibeke phakathi kwentente yokuhlangana nesibingelelo, ugalele amanzi phezu kwayo;"
Exodus30:19 ngokuba uAron noonyana bakhe bahlamba izandla zabo neenyawo zabo kulo.
Exodus30:20 Ekungeneni kwabo ententeni yokuhlangana, bohlamba ngamanzi, bangafi; nasekusondeleni kwabo esibingelelweni, besiza kukwenza amadini anyukayo kuYehova;"
Exodus30:21 Kwaye bamele bahlambe izandla zabo neenyawo zabo, hleze bafe; ibe ngumyalelo ongunaphakade kubo, kuye nakwimbewu yakhe kwizizukulwana zabo."
Exodus30:22 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Exodus30:23 Wathabatha amakhulu amahlanu eeshekele zemore ecocekileyo, nesiqingatha sesinamon ubunzima bayo, namakhulu amabini anamanci mahlanu eeshekele;"
Exodus30:24 Nomnika amakhulu amahlanu eeshekele ngokweshekele yengcwele, nehin yeoli yomnquma;"
Exodus30:25 wenze ibe yioli engcwele yokuthambisa, umxhesho wokuthambisa, ngokwengqondo yomqholi; yiba yioli engcwele yokuthambisa."
Exodus30:26 Ayithambise nayo intente yokuhlangana, netyeya yesingqino;"
Exodus30:27 netafile nemisebenzi yayo yonke, nesiphatho sezibane nemisebenzi yaso, nesibingelelo sokuqhumisela;"
Exodus30:28 nesibingelelo sedini elinyukayo nempahla yaso yonke, nesitya saso, noseko lwaso;"
Exodus30:29 Uze ubangcwalise, babe ngcwele kakhulu; yonke into eyichukumisayo yoba ngcwele."
Exodus30:30 uAron noonyana bakhe ubathambise, ubangcwalise, babe ngababingeleli bam."
Exodus30:31 Wothetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi, Yoba yioli engcwele yokuthambisa kum le, kwizizukulwana zenu."
Exodus30:32 Ize ingagalelwa enyameni yomntu, uze ungenjenjalo ngomxube wayo; woba ngcwele, ube ngcwele kuni."
Exodus30:33 Nabani na oqokelela into enjengale okanye nabani na obeka enye yayo kumntu wasemzini, makatshatyalaliswe angabikho ebandleni."
Exodus30:34 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Zithabathele ubulawu, isitake, nebherilo, negalebhana; ezi ziqholo zesiqhumiso esihlambulukileyo, ubunzima bazo buyalingana;"
Exodus30:35 wenze ngayo ivumba elithozamisayo, libe livumba elithozamisayo, lomsebenzi womqholi, eliqinileyo, elihlambulukileyo, elingcwele."
Exodus30:36 Uyiqhekeze kakhulu, uyibeke phambi kweSingqino ententeni yokuhlangana, apho ndiya kuhlangana nawe khona; mayibe ngcwele kuni."
Exodus30:37 Isiqhumiso osenzayo, uze ungazenzeli ngokwaso; yoba ngcwele kuYehova."
Exodus30:38 Umntu othe wajoja into enjalo, wobulawa phakathi kwabantu bakowabo."
Exodus31:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Exodus31:2 Yabona, ndimbize ngegama uBhetsaleli unyana kaUri, unyana kaHuri, wesizwe sakwaYuda, ukuba ube ngoonyana bakaUri."
Exodus31:3 Ndamzalisa ngomoya kaThixo ngobulumko, nangengqondo, nangokwazi, nangokwazi konke;"
Exodus31:4 ukuba ayile imisebenzi yenkohliso, kusetyenzwe ngegolide, nesilivere, nobhedu;"
Exodus31:5 nokuba kukrolwe amatye, awafake, akrole imithi, enze imisebenzi yobugcisa, yeentlobo ngeentlobo."
Exodus31:6 Yabona, mna ndimkhuphe uAholiyabhi unyana ka-Ahisamaki, wesizwe sakwaDan;"
Exodus31:7 nentente yokuhlangana, netyeya yesingqino, nesigubungelo esiphezu kwayo, nempahla yonke yomnquba;"
Exodus31:8 netafile nemisebenzi yayo, nesiphatho sezibane esicocekileyo, nemisebenzi yayo yonke, nesibingelelo sokuqhumisela;"
Exodus31:9 nesibingelelo sedini elinyukayo, nemisebenzi yaso yonke, nesibingelelo saso, nesihlalo saso;"
Exodus31:10 nezambatho zokubusa, nezambatho zokubusa, nezambatho zokubusa zika-Aron umbingeleli, nezambatho zoonyana bakhe zokwenzelelela;"
Exodus31:11 neoli yokuthambisa nesiqhumiso esimnandi sengcwele, njengako konke endikuyalele kona."
Exodus31:12 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Exodus31:13 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi, Gcinani iisabatha zam, ngokuba zingumqondiso phakathi kwam nani kwizizukulwana zenu; ukuze nazi ukuba ndinguYehova oningcwalisayo."
Exodus31:14 Ke ngoko, yigcineni isabatha; ngokuba ingcwele kuni; Lowo uyihlambelayo wobulawa afe; kuba bonke abo basebenza umsebenzi ngayo, loo mphefumlo wonqanyulwa, ungabikho ebantwini bakowawo."
Exodus31:15 Umsebenzi unokwenziwa ngeentsuku ezintandathu; ke wona umhla wesixhenxe uyisabatha, kungcwele kuYehova; nabani na owenza nawuphi na umsebenzi ngomhla wesabatha wobulawa afe."
Exodus31:16 Ngako oko oonyana bakaSirayeli mabayigcine ke isabatha, bayenze isabatha kwizizukulwana zabo: ingumnqophiso ongunaphakade."
Exodus31:17 Nguwo lowo umqondiso phakathi kwam noonyana bakaSirayeli ongunaphakade; ngokuba ngemihla emithandathu uYehova wenza izulu nomhlaba, waphumla ngomhla wesixhenxe, waphefumla."
Exodus31:18 Emva kokuthetha noMoses entabeni yeSinayi, wamnika uMoses amacwecwe amabini esingqino, amacwecwe amatye, ebhalwe ngomnwe kaThixo."
Exodus32:1 Ke babona abantu ukuba uMoses akanakuhla entabeni, bambizela ndawonye abantu kuAron, bathi kuye, Hlala, usenzele uthixo oya kusikhokela; ngokuba lo Moses, le ndoda yasikhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa, asiyazi into emhleleyo."
Exodus32:2 Wathi uAron kubo, Khululani ijikazi legolide, ezindlebeni zabafazi benu, noonyana benu, neentombi zenu, niwazise kum."
Exodus32:3 Bonke abantu bawaqhawula amajikazi egolide ezindlebeni zabo, bawazisa kuAron."
Exodus32:4 Wayithabatha ezandleni zabo, wayenza ngeoli yokuthambisa, wayenza ithole elityhidiweyo; bathi, Nanko oothixo bakho, Sirayeli, owakukhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa."
Exodus32:5 Wabona uAron, wakha isibingelelo; Wadanduluka uAron, esithi: “Ngomso ngumthendeleko kaYehova."
Exodus32:6 Bavuka kusasa, banyusa amadini anyukayo, babingelela imibingelelo yokubulela; Yahlala phantsi isihlwele, yadla, yasela, yema ukuba idlale."
Exodus32:7 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Hamba uhle; ngokuba batshabalalisile abantu bakho, owabakhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa."
Exodus32:8 Batyeka kamsinya endleleni leyo ndibawisele umthetho ngayo, bazenzela ithole, baqubuda kulo, babingelela kulo, besithi, Naba oothixo bakho, Sirayeli, onyukileyo ilizwe laseYiputa."
Exodus32:9 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Ndibakhangele aba bantu; uyabona, ngabantu abaneenkani."
Exodus32:10 Mandingemi ngoko, uvuthe umsindo wam kubo, ndibatshabalalise; ndikwenze uhlanga olukhulu."
Exodus32:11 Wathandaza uMoses kuYehova uThixo wakhe, wathi, Yini na ukuba uqumbe, Yehova, ukuba ubagxothe abantu bakho ezweni laseYiputa ngamandla amakhulu, nangesandla esithe nkqi?"
Exodus32:12 Yini na ukuba amaYiputa atsho ukuthi, Nguye lo owabakhupha ebubini, ukuze ababulalele ezintabeni, abatshabalalise emhlabeni? Guquka emsindweni wakho, uzisole ngobu bubi kubantu bakho."
Exodus32:13 Khawumkhumbule uAbraham, uIsake noSirayeli, abakhonzi bakho, owazifunga ngokwakho kubo, wathi kubo, Ndiya kuyandisa imbewu yenu njengeenkwenkwezi zezulu, ndilinike lonke eli lizwe ndalithethayo kuni wena baya kulidla ilifa ngonaphakade."
Exodus32:14 Wazohlwaya uYehova ngobubi awayecinga ukubenza ebantwini bakhe.
Exodus32:15 Wajika uMoses, wehla entabeni, ephethe amacwecwe omabini esingqino esandleni sakhe; iitafile zabekwa ngamacala omabini; ngapha nangapha kubhaliwe."
Exodus32:16 Amacwecwe lawo ebengumsebenzi kaThixo, nombhalo lowo ubungumbhalo kaThixo ubhalwe emacwecweni."
Exodus32:17 Akuyiva uYoshuwa ingxolo yabantu bekhwaza, wathi kuMoses: “Kuyaliwa ezinkampini."
Exodus32:18 Kwaye wathi: Eli asilolizwi labo bakhalayo malunga norhulumente, kwaye asilolizwi labo bakhalayo ngenxa yokuba belahlekisiwe; kodwa ndiyasiva isandi sabaculayo."
Exodus32:19 Uthe akusondela eminqubeni, walibona ithole lenkomo nomngqungqo, wavutha umsindo kaMoses, wawaphosa amacwecwe lawo, wawaqhekeza phantsi kwentaba."
Exodus32:20 Wathabatha ithole lenkomo ababelenzile, walitshisa ngomlilo, waliqoba, waza waneka phezu kwamanzi waza wabaseza oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Exodus32:21 Wathi uMoses kuAron, Lenze ntoni na olu hlanga kuwe, ukuba ubazisele isono esikhulu kangaka?"
Exodus32:22 Wathi uAron, Mawungavuthi umsindo wenkosi yam;"
Exodus32:23 Bathi kum, Senzele uthixo oya kusikhokela; ngokuba lo Moses, le ndoda yasikhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa, asiyazi into emhleleyo."
Exodus32:24 Ndathi kubo, Bonke abanegolide, bayilahleni; Bandinika ke; ndaliphosa emlilweni, laphuma elithole."
Exodus32:25 Wababona uMoses abantu, ukuba baqhawule umkhala; (kuba uAron wayebahluba babe ze ukuze babe neentloni phakathi kweentshaba zabo.)"
Exodus32:26 Wema uMoses esangweni lenkampu, wathi, Ngubani na ongakuYehova? makeze kum. Bahlanganisana kuye bonke oonyana bakaLevi."
Exodus32:27 Wathi kubo, Utsho uYehova uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Makathabathe elowo ikrele lakhe ecaleni lakhe, bangene eminqubeni yonke, bethabathela komnye umnyango besiya komnye, nibulala elowo umzalwana wakhe, elowo umzalwana wakhe, elowo umzalwana wakhe, elowo umzalwana wakhe, elowo umzalwana wakhe, elowo umzalwana wakhe, elowo umzalwana wakhe; kweyakhe umhlobo, elowo ngowakhe."
Exodus32:28 Benza oonyana bakaLevi ngokwelizwi likaMoses; kwafa ngaloo mini amadoda angathi angamawaka amathathu phakathi kwebandla.
Exodus32:29 Wathi uMoses, Ziboniseni kuYehova namhla, elowo kunyana wakhe nakumzalwana wakhe; wanga angakusikelele namhlanje."
Exodus32:30 Wathi uMoses ebantwini ngengomso, Nenze isono esikhulu; ngoku ndiya kunyuka ndiye kuYehova; mhlawumbi ndingasiphilisa isono sakho."
Exodus32:31 uMoses wabuyela kuYehova, wathi, Yoo! Olu hlanga lwenze isono esikhulu, lwazenzela uthixo wegolide."
Exodus32:32 Ngoku ke, ukuba uyasixolela isono sabo; ukuba akunjalo, ndicime encwadini yakho oyibhalileyo."
Exodus32:33 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Wonke umntu ondigibileyo, ndiya kucima yena encwadini yam."
Exodus32:34 Hamba ngoku, ubathabathe abantu apho ndathethayo kuwe; yabona, iNgelosi yam iyakukhokela; kodwa xa ndibohlwaya, ndiya kubohlwaya ngenxa yesono sabo."
Exodus32:35 uYehova wabatshutshisa abantu ngenxa yokuba belenzile ithole elo walenzayo uAron.
Exodus33:1 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Hamba uphume khona, wena nabantu obakhuphileyo ezweni laseYiputa, uye kulo ilizwe endalifungela uAbraham noIsake noYakobi, ndathi, Kuni, Nyuka ndiya kuyinika imbewu;"
Exodus33:2 Ndiya kuthuma isithunywa ukuba sikukhokele; Ndiya kuwagqogqa amaKanan, nama-Amori, namaHeti, namaPerizi, namaHeti, namaYebhusi;"
Exodus33:3 ezweni eliqukuqela ubisi nobusi, ngenxa yokuba andiyi kunyuka ndiye phakathi kwenu; ngokuba ningabantu abaneenkani, ukuze ndinganitshabalalise endleleni."
Exodus33:4 Baliva ke abantu elo lizwi libi, bakhala, akwabakho bani wamambesa iingubo zakhe."
Exodus33:5 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yithi koonyana bakaSirayeli, Niluhlanga oluntamo-lukhuni; yazi into omawuyenze kuwe."
Exodus33:6 Bazikhulula oonyana bakaSirayeli izivatho zabo, entabeni yeHorebhe."
Exodus33:7 Wawuthabatha uMoses umnquba, wayitwabululela ngaphandle kweminquba, kude neminquba, wathi yintente yokuhlangana. Yaye wonk’ ubani owayefuna uYehova waphuma waya kwintente yokuhlangana eyayingaphandle kwekhusi."
Exodus33:8 Ekuphumeni kukaMoses esiya ententeni leyo, lema lonke ibandla, wema walowo emnyango wentente yakhe, wakhangela kuMoses, wada wangena ententeni leyo."
Exodus33:9 Ekungeneni kukaMoses ententeni, lehla ilifu, lema emnyango wentente leyo, wathetha uYehova kuMoses."
Exodus33:10 Balibona bonke abantu ilifu limi emnyango wentente leyo, bema bonke abantu, baqubuda, elowo esemnyango wentente yakhe."
Exodus33:11 uYehova wathetha kuMoses, bekhangelene ebusweni, njengomntu ethetha nomhlobo wakhe, wabuyela kwaseminqubeni; Wabuyela enkampini, kodwa umkhonzi wakhe uYoshuwa, unyana kaNun, umfana, akazange aphume emnqubeni."
Exodus33:12 Wathi uMoses kuYehova, Uyabona, uthe kum, Bashiye aba bantu; Ke wena wathi, Ndikwazile ngegama, kananjalo ndikubabale."
Exodus33:13 Ukuba kaloku ndibabalwe emehlweni akho, ndíndazise indlela yakho, ukuze ndikwazi, nokuze ndibone inceba emehlweni akho; uqonde ukuba olu hlanga luhlanga lwaKho."
Exodus33:14 Wathi, Ubuso bam bohamba nani, ndiniphumze;"
Exodus33:15 Wathi kuye, Ukuba ubuso bakho abuhambi nam, musa ukusisusa apha."
Exodus33:16 Kuya kwaziwa ngantoni na khona, ukuba undibabale mna nabantu bakho? Akungokuba uhamba nathi na? sahlulwe ke mna nabantu bakho kuzo zonke iintlanga zehlabathi."
Exodus33:17 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Nam ndiya kuyenza le nto uyithethileyo, ngenxa enokuba ubabalwe ndim, ndikwazile ngegama."
Exodus33:18 Wathi, Mandibubone ubuqaqawuli bakho."
Exodus33:19 Wathi, Ndiya kukudlulisa konke ukulunga kwam phambi kwakho, ndilibize igama likaYehova phambi kwakho; ndibe nenceba kosukuba ndinenceba kuye, ndibe nenceba kosukuba ndinenceba kuye."
Exodus33:20 Wathi, Akuyi kububona ubuso bam; ngokuba akukho namnye uya kundibona aphile."
Exodus33:21 Wathi uYehova, Yabona, kukho indawo yam; uze ume phezu kweliwa."
Exodus33:22 Ekukhanyeni kwam ukukhanya, ndokubeka eweni, ndikugubungele ngesandla sam ekudluleni kwam."
Exodus33:23 Ndiya kusisusa isandla sam, uwubone umva wam, kodwa ubuso bam abuyi kubonwa."
Exodus34:1 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Zimisele amacwecwe amabini amacwecwe, njengawokuqala, ndiwabhale emacwecweni lawo amazwi abesemacwecweni okuqala owawaqhekezayo."
Exodus34:2 Zilungiselele ngomso, unyuke uye entabeni yeSinayi, ume ngakum encotsheni yentaba;"
Exodus34:3 Makunganyuki mntu nawe, kuze kungabonwa mntu kuyo yonke intaba; Iigusha neenkomo aziyi kudla kufuphi naloo ntaba."
Exodus34:4 Waqingqa amacwecwe amatye amabini, njengawokuqala; Wavuka kusasa uMoses, wenyuka waya entabeni yeSinayi, njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho, ephethe amacwecwe amabini esandleni sakhe."
Exodus34:5 Wehla uYehova efini, wema naye khona, wabiza igama leNkosi."
Exodus34:6 uYehova wadlula phambi kwakhe, wadanduluka, wathi: “Nkosi, Nkosi, Yehova, Thixo onemfesane, onobubele, ozeka kade umsindo, ozele yinceba nenyaniso!"
Exodus34:7 Gcina inceba ngenxa yamawaka, xolela ubugwenxa, nokreqo, nesono, ungamkhululi ongendawo; ubuvelela ubugwenxa booyise koonyana noonyana babantwana, kwesesithathu nakwesesine isizukulwana;"
Exodus34:8 Waqubuda ngokukhawuleza uMoses emhlabeni, waqubuda emhlabeni."
Exodus34:9 Wathi, Ukuba ndibona inceba emehlweni akho, Yehova, mayingene phakathi kwethu iNkosi yam; ngokuba beluhlanga oluyinjubaqa; usixolele ubugwenxa bethu nezono zethu, usenze ilifa lakho."
