Exodus34:10 Wathi, Yabona, ndenza umnqophiso: ndiya kwenza imiqondiso, engazanga idalwe ehlabathini lonke, nasezintlangeni zonke, emehlweni abantu bonke bakho; ziwenze umsebenzi kaYehova zonke iintlanga onazo, ngokuba yinto eyoyikekayo endiya kuyenza kuwe."
Exodus34:11 Yithobele indlebe le nto ndikuwisela umthetho ngayo namhla: Yabona, ndiyawagqogqa ama-Amori, namaKanan, namaHeti, namaPerizi, namaHeti, namaYebhusi."
Exodus34:12 Zigcine, hleze udibane nabemi belo zwe ungena kulo, kube ngumgibe kuwe."
Exodus34:13 Ke nina nizidilizile izibingelelo zabo, niziqhekeze izimiso zabo zamatye, nigawule neziqu zabo."
Exodus34:14 Ngenxa yokuba uze ungamnquli uthixo wolunye uhlanga, kuba uYehova, ogama lakhe linguKhwele, nguThixo onekhwele;"
Exodus34:15 ukuze ungenzi umnqophiso nabemi belo lizwe, bahenyuze ngokulandela oothixo babo, babingelele koothixo babo, kubizwe ke, niwudle umsondezo wabo;"
Exodus34:16 Wazekela oonyana bakho iintombi ezinye, zaza iintombi zabo zahenyuza ngokulandela oothixo babo, zabahenyuza noonyana bakho noothixo bazo."
Exodus34:17 Uze ungazenzeli uthixo otyhidiweyo.
Exodus34:18 Yenza umthendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele; Iintsuku ezisixhenxe nodla izonka ezingenagwele, njengoko ndakuwiselayo umthetho, ngenyanga enguAbhibhi; ngokuba waphuma eYiputa ngenyanga enguAbhibhi."
Exodus34:19 Yonke into evula isizalo yeyam; nawo onke amazibulo eenkomo zakho, nokuba yinkomo, nokuba yimpahla emfutshane, nokuba yigusha;"
Exodus34:20 Ilizibulo le-esile ulikhulule ngokulimisela ngexhwane; ukuba uthe akwamkhulula, wophule intamo. Bonke oonyana bakho bamazibulo uze ubakhulule ngokubamisela; Kwaye akukho mntu uya kuvela phambi kwam elambatha."
Exodus34:21 Wosebenza iintsuku ezintandathu, aphumle ngomhla wesixhenxe; ngexesha lokuvuna naxa lokuvuna ufanele uphumle."
Exodus34:22 Uze uwenze umthendeleko weeveki, wentlahlela yokuvunwa kwengqolowa, nomthendeleko wokuhlanganisela ukutya emakhaya ekupheleni komnyaka."
Exodus34:23 Izihlandlo ezithathu ngonyaka bonke oonyana bakho baya kubonakala phambi koYehova, uTHIXO kaSirayeli."
Exodus34:24 Ndiya kuzigqogqa iintlanga phambi kwakho, ndiwenze banzi ilizwe lakho; yaye akukho bani uya kulinqwenela ilizwe lakho ekunyukeni kwakho usiya kubonakala phambi koYehova uThixo wakho kathathu ngonyaka."
Exodus34:25 Igazi lombingelelo wam musa ukulisondeza kunye namagwele; nombingelelo wepasika awushiywa ngomso.
Exodus34:26 Owamazibulo ezweni lakho uze uwase endlwini kaYehova uThixo wakho. Usenokungaliboni itakane ebisini lukanina.
Exodus34:27 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Wabhale la mazwi; ngokuba ndenze umnqophiso nawe noSirayeli ngokwala mazwi."
Exodus34:28 Wahlala khona ke kuYehova iimini ezimashumi mane nobusuku obumashumi mane; akadla sonka, akasela manzi. Wawabhala emacwecweni amazwi omnqophiso, imithetho elishumi."
Exodus34:29 Xa uMoses wehla eNtabeni yeSinayi ephethe amacwecwe amabini esingqino esandleni sikaMoses ekuhleni kwakhe entabeni, yaye wayengazi uMoses ukuba ulusu lobuso bakhe lwalukhazimla ngoxa wayethetha naye."
Exodus34:30 uAron noonyana bonke bakaSirayeli bambona uMoses, ulusu lobuso bakhe luyakhazimla; boyika ukusondela kuye."
Exodus34:31 Wababiza ke uMoses; uAron nezikhulu zonke zendibano babuyela kuye, waza wathetha kubo uMoses."
Exodus34:32 Emva koko basondela bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli, wabaxelela konke abekuthethile uYehova kuye eNtabeni yeSinayi."
Exodus34:33 Wada wagqiba uMoses ukuthetha nabo, wabugquma ubuso bakhe ngesigqubuthelo."
Exodus34:34 Ekuhambeni kukaMoses phambi koYehova, esiya kuthetha kuye, wasisusa isigqubuthelo, wada waphuma. Waphuma wathetha koonyana bakaSirayeli njengoko wayemwisele umthetho."
Exodus34:35 Babubona oonyana bakaSirayeli ubuso bukaMoses, ukuba ulusu lobuso bukaMoses luyakhazimla. Wabuya ke uMoses wabugquma ubuso bakhe ngesigqubuthelo, wada wangena waya kuthetha naye."
Exodus35:1 Walibizela ndawonye uMoses lonke ibandla loonyana bakaSirayeli, wathi kubo, Zizo ezi iindawo uYehova aniwisele umthetho ngazo ukuba nizenze."
Exodus35:2 Wowenza umsebenzi imihla emithandathu, ke ngomhla wesixhenxe ube yingcwele kuni, isabatha kasabatha kuYehova; wonke umntu osebenza kuyo uya kubulawa."
Exodus35:3 Ize ningaphembi mlilo ezindlwini zenu ngomhla wesabatha.
Exodus35:4 Wathetha uMoses kwibandla lonke loonyana bakaSirayeli, wathi, Lilo eli ilizwi awise umthetho ngalo uYehova, esithi,"
Exodus35:5 Yinikeni iNkosi umnikelo ophuma phakathi kwenu; igolide, nesilivere, nobhedu;"
Exodus35:6 nemisonto emfusa, nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, noboya bebhokhwe;"
Exodus35:7 nezintsu zeenkunzi zezimvu ezibomvu, nezintsu zenkunzi entsha, nemithi yesikamore;"
Exodus35:8 neoli yesiphatho sezibane, nobulawu beoli yentambiso, nobulawu;"
Exodus35:9 namatye ebherilo, namatye okuyifaka iefodi nobengo;"
Exodus35:10 zize zonke iintliziyo ezilumkileyo phakathi kwenu, zikwenze konke abewise umthetho ngako uYehova;"
Exodus35:11 Nguwo ke umnquba, nentente yawo, nesigubungelo sayo, neeplanga zayo, neentsika zayo, nemiqadi yayo, neentsika zayo, nezihlalo zayo;"
Exodus35:12 ityeya nemithwalo yayo, nesigubungelo, nomkhusane wokusithelisa;"
Exodus35:13 itafile nezixhaso zayo, neempahla zayo zonke, nezonka zokubonisa;"
Exodus35:14 nesiphatho sezibane, nempahla yaso, nezibane zaso, neoli yesiphatho sezibane;"
Exodus35:15 nesibingelelo sokuqhumisela, nemithwalo yaso, neoli yokuthambisa, nesiqhumiso, namawunduwundu omnyango womnquba;"
Exodus35:16 isibingelelo sedini elinyukayo, nohluzo lwaso lobhedu, nemithwalo yaso, nemisebenzi yaso yonke, nengubo yaso, nesihlalo saso;"
Exodus35:17 namalaphu entendelezo, neentsika zayo, nezihlalo zazo, namalaphu omnyango wentendelezo;"
Exodus35:18 nezikhonkwane zomnquba, nezikhonkwane zentendelezo, nezintya zazo;"
Exodus35:19 neempahla zokulungiselela engcweleni, neempahla ezingcwele zika-Aron umbingeleli, nezambatho zoonyana bakhe zokulungiselela."
Exodus35:20 Lemka ke lonke ibandla loonyana bakaSirayeli.
Exodus35:21 Bandula ke beza, ngamnye kubo ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo nalowo unqwenelwayo ngumphefumlo wakhe waza wazisa umbingelelo kaYehova womsebenzi wentente yokuhlangana nowomsebenzi wayo wonke wezambatho ezingcwele."
Exodus35:22 Beza, amadoda nabafazi, bonke ababathanda, bezisa iitafile, nezihlalo, neetafile, neempahla zonke zegolide; nabo bonke abazisa umrhumo wegolide kuYehova."
Exodus35:23 Bonke abantu abanezinto ezimfusa nemfusa nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, noboya bebhokhwe, nezintsu zeenkunzi zezimvu ezibomvu, nezikhumba zamahlengezi, mabazizise."
Exodus35:24 Bonke abasondeza umsondezo wesilivere, nowobhedu, bawuzisa umrhumo kuYehova; yaye wonk’ ubani owayefunyenwe kuye iinkuni zomsebenzi wawo nawuphi na umsebenzi wenkonzo wazizisa."
Exodus35:25 Bonke abafazi abantliziyo zilumkileyo bazibetha ngezandla zabo, bazizisa ezo nto bazibethayo, nengubo ebomvu nemfusa nebomvu, nelinen emthubi."
Exodus35:26 Bonke abafazi abantliziyo yabashukumisela ukuba babe nobulumko, basonta iinciniba."
Exodus35:27 Ookumkani beza amatye ebherilo namatye okuhlala phezu kwawo, abe yingubo emagxeni, awokukhuseleka ityeya;"
Exodus35:28 nentlaka yokuqhumisa, neoli yesiphatho sezibane, neoli yokuthambisa, nesiqhumiso."
Exodus35:29 Oonyana bakaSirayeli bazisa umbingelelo wokuqhutywa yintliziyo kuYehova; nawo onke amadoda nabafazi bonke bantliziyo yabaqhubayo ukuyizisela yonke imisebenzi awawisa umthetho uYehova ngesandla sikaMoses, ukuba yenziwe."
Exodus35:30 Wathi uMoses koonyana bakaSirayeli, Khangelani, uYehova umbize ngegama uBhetsaleli, unyana kaUri, unyana kaHuri, wesizwe sakwaYuda."
Exodus35:31 Wazaliswa ngumoya kaThixo ngobulumko, ukuqonda, nokwazi, nokwazi zonke iintlobo;"
Exodus35:32 ukubamba imisebenzi yasemzini, nokusebenza ngegolide, nesilivere, nobhedu;"
Exodus35:33 nangokukrola amatye, awafake, akrole imithi, asebenze imisebenzi yonke ngentelekelelo."
Exodus35:34 Yaye wakubeka entliziyweni yakhe ukuba afundise, yena no-Oholiyabhi unyana ka-Ahisamaki wesizwe sakwaDan."
Exodus35:35 Wabazalisa ngobulumko bentliziyo, ukuba benze zonke iintlobo zemisebenzi, yokuba yimithi, neyengcibi, neyengcibi, neyegolide, nemfusa nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, neyomluki nabo benza nawuphi na umsebenzi nabayila umsebenzi wobuqhophololo."
Exodus36:1 Ke ooBhetetsaleli noAholiyabhi namadoda onke antliziyo zilumkileyo, awathi uYehova wabanikela ubulumko nengqondo, ukuba akwazi ukuwenza wonke umsebenzi wenkonzo yengcwele, njengoko wawisa umthetho uYehova."
Exodus36:2 uMoses wabiza ooBhetsayeli noAholiyabhi namadoda onke alumkileyo, awamnikayo uYehova ubulumko entliziyweni yakhe, onke antliziyo yabavuselelayo, ukuba bangene emsebenzini."
Exodus36:3 Bawathabatha, ebusweni bukaMoses, yonke imibingelelo, ababeyizisile oonyana bakaSirayeli emsebenzini wenkonzo yengcwele. Yaye baqhubeka bemzisela iminikelo yesisa ntsasa nganye."
Exodus36:4 Zeza ke zonke izilumko ezibe ziwenza wonke umsebenzi wengcwele, saseso savela emsebenzini waso esibe siwenza;"
Exodus36:5 Bathetha ke kuMoses, bathi: “Abantu bazisa ngaphezu kokwaneleyo emsebenzini womsebenzi awise umthetho ngawo uYehova ukuba wenziwe."
Exodus36:6 Wawisa umthetho uMoses, kwavakaliswa eminqubeni yonke, kwathiwa, Makungabi sabakho ndoda, nankazana, benza msebenzi wumbi wombingelelo wengcwele. Ngoko abantu bavinjelwe ukuzisa."
Exodus36:7 Izinto ababenazo zawanela wonke umsebenzi wokwenziwa, yaye zazininzi kakhulu."
Exodus36:8 Bonke abalumkileyo, phakathi kwabasebenzi ententeni, benza amalaphu entente alishumi, ngelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo, nangemisonto emsi nemfusa nebomvu; wasenza ngeekerubhi, umsebenzi wengcibi yokuluka."
Exodus36:9 Ubude belaphu elinye lentente baba ziikubhite ezimashumi mabini anesibhozo, ububanzi belaphu elinye baba ziikubhite ezine; onke amalaphu entente aba ngamlinganiso mnye."
Exodus36:10 Wawahlanganisa amaqhina amahlanu, wawahlanganisa ke amaqhina amahlanu."
Exodus36:11 Benza imisonto emsi emqukumbelweni welaphu elinye lentente, emqukumbelweni wawo; Wenjenjalo ekupheleni kwelengalenga lesibini lentente, kwelesibini ikhuselo."
Exodus36:12 Wenza amagwegwe amashumi mahlanu kwelinye ilaphu lentente; amalaphu lawo ayenxibelelene, elinye nelaphu lentente."
Exodus36:13 Wenza amagwegwe ngegolide amashumi mahlanu, wawahlanganisa amakhonkco lawo ngamakhonkco, elinye nelinye, aba mnquba mnye."
Exodus36:14 Benza amalaphu entente ngoboya beebhokhwe, aba yintente phezu komnquba; wenza amalaphu entente alishumi elinanye."
Exodus36:15 Ubude belaphu lentente elinye baba ziikubhite ezingamashumi amathathu, ububanzi belaphu lentente elinye baba ziikubhite ezine; amalaphu entente alishumi elinanye alingana."
Exodus36:16 Wawahlanganisa amalaphu entente amahlanu elinye nelinye, namalaphu entente amathandathu elinye nelinye."
Exodus36:17 Wenza amagwegwe abe mashumi mahlanu emphethweni wengubo, wenza amagwegwe amashumi mahlanu emphethweni wengubo, apho lihlangana khona nelaphu elo."
Exodus36:18 Wenza amagwegwe obhedu amashumi mahlanu, yokuhlanganisa umnquba, into enye."
Exodus36:19 Bayenzela intente isigubungelo ngezintsu zeenkunzi zezimvu, ezenziwe zabomvu, wenza nesigubungelo phezu kwaso ngezintsu zamahlengezi."
Exodus36:20 Umnquba bawenzela iiplanga ngomngampunzi.
Exodus36:21 Ubude bombhalo babuziikubhite ezilishumi, ububanzi bomnye umkrolo baba yikubhite enesiqingatha."
Exodus36:22 Enye indlela bekukho izikhonkwane ezibini, esinye kwesinye; wenza kwangokunjalo nawo wonke umnquba."
Exodus36:23 Wenza imifanekiso yomnquba; amashumi amabini eeplanga ngecala lasezantsi ngasezantsi;
Exodus36:24 Benza iintsika zesilivere zamashumi mane phantsi kweentlobo ezimashumi mabini; izihlalo ezibini emilenzeni yenu yomibini, phantsi komthi omnye, nezihlalo ezibini phantsi komnye umthi emilenzeni yenu yomibini."
Exodus36:25 Ngecala lomnquba elingasentla, wenza iintsika ezimashumi mabini;"
Exodus36:26 neziseko zazo zesilivere zibe mashumi mane; nezihlalo ezibini phantsi kweplanga, nezihlalo ezibini phantsi kweplanga."
Exodus36:27 Emacaleni omnquba ngasentshonalanga benza iintsika zantandathu.
Exodus36:28 Wenza iintsika zambini emaphundwini omnquba emaphundwini omabini.
Exodus36:29 Zaba ngamawele emhlabeni, zanamathela entloko, zada zafikelela ekupheleni; bazenza zombini iikona."
Exodus36:30 Kwaye kukho iintlobo ezisibhozo; neziseko zazo zesilivere zaziziseko ezilishumi elinazithandathu: zazibini iziseko phantsi kweplanga inye.
Exodus36:31 Wenza imivalo ngekalika; zantlanu zeentsika zelinye icala lomnquba;
Exodus36:32 nemiqadi emihlanu yeentsika zelinye icala lomnquba;
Exodus36:33 Benza umqadi ophakathi ukuze uzigqobhoze iiplanga, usuka kwelinye uye kwelinye."
Exodus36:34 Wazaleka iintsika ngegolide; amakhonkco azo bawenza ngegolide, aba apho imiqadi ikhoyo; bayaleka ke imiqadi ngegolide."
Exodus36:35 Wenza ilaphu elimfusa, nemfusa, nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo;"
Exodus36:36 Basenzela iintsika ezine zomngampunzi, bazaleka ngegolide; iziseko zawo bezizezegolide; wazenzela izitya zesilivere ezine."
Exodus36:37 Umnyango womnquba bawenzela ilaphu elimfusa, nemfusa, nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo, umsebenzi oyimfakamfele womluki;"
Exodus36:38 neentsika zaso zantlanu, nezibonda zazo, wazaleka iintloko zazo namakhonkco azo ngegolide;"
Exodus37:1 uBhetsaleli wayenza ityeya yelinden; Ubude bayo bube ziikubhite ezimbini ezinesiqingatha, ububanzi bayo bube yikubhite enesiqingatha, ukuphakama kwayo kube yikubhite enesiqingatha."
Exodus37:2 Wayaleka ngegolide ecocekileyo ngaphakathi nangaphandle, wayithi jize ngesithsaba segolide."
Exodus37:3 Basenzela iintsontelo ezine zegolide, zanxityelelaniswa eziphelweni zaso zozine; iintambo zibe mbini ngeliya icala, nemitya emibini kweliya icala layo."
Exodus37:4 Benza izibonda ngemisonto, wazaleka ngegolide."
Exodus37:5 Wayifaka imithwalo emakhonkcweni asemacaleni etyeya, ukuba ithwalwe ngayo."
Exodus37:6 Wenza isihlalo sokucamagusha ngegolide ecocekileyo, ubude baso baba ziikubhite ezimbini ezinesiqingatha, ububanzi baso baba ziikubhite ezimbini ezinesiqingatha."
Exodus37:7 Wenza iikerubhi zambini ngegolide, umkhando wazo, wazenza eziphelweni zozibini zesigubungelo;"
Exodus37:8 Enye ikerubhi ingaphaya kweliya icala, enye ikerubhi ingaphaya; wenze iikerubhi eziphelweni zaso zozibini."
Exodus37:9 Iikerubhi zaye zolula amaphiko azo, zasigubungela ngamaphiko azo isigubungelo, ubuso bazo bukhangelane; ubuso beekerubhi bebuphezu kwesigubungelo."
Exodus37:10 Wenza netafile ngomngampunzi: ubude bayo baba ziikubhite ezimbini, ububanzi bayo baba yikubhite enye, ukuphakama kwayo kwaba yikubhite enesiqingatha."
Exodus37:11 Wayaleka ngegolide ecocekileyo, wayithi jize ngesithsaba segolide."
Exodus37:12 Uze wenzele ungqameko olufana nobubanzi besandla ngeenxa zonke; wayithi jize ngesithsaba segolide.
Exodus37:13 Wayenzela amakhonkco egolide amane, wawafaka amakhonkco ezimbombeni zone zemilenze yayo yomine."
Exodus37:14 Amakhonkco lawo aba malunga nokuhlangana kodini, aba ziindawo zokufaka izibonda zokuyithwala itafile;"
Exodus37:15 Wenza izibonda ngomthi, wazaleka ngegolide, ukuba ithwalwe ngazo itafile."
Exodus37:16 Wenza etafileni izitya zayo, neendebe zayo, neenkamba zayo, neendebe zayo ekwakuthululwa ngazo, wazenza ngegolide ecocekileyo."
Exodus37:17 Wenza nesiphatho sezibane ngegolide ecocekileyo, isikhondo saso, nesebe laso, neendebe zaso, neentonga zaso, neentyantyambo zaso;"
Exodus37:18 Kwabonakala amasebe amathandathu emacaleni aso; yoba ziikubhite ezintathu kwelinye icala layo, neekubhite ezintathu zengqolowa kwelinye icala layo;"
Exodus37:19 Zaba ntathu iindebe ezifana neentyantyambo zeamangile esandleni esinye, zineentyantyambo nentyantyambo; neentyantyambo zontathu, ezifana neentyantyambo zeamangile, zaba ngasandla sinye, nesiqu, nentyantyambo; ngoko ngezandla ezintandathu kwisiphatho sesibane."
Exodus37:20 Zaba ne iindebe esiphathweni, ezineentyantyambo zeamangile, neentyantyambo zaso, neentyantyambo zaso;"
Exodus37:21 Iqhina eliphantsi kwezandla zozibini lifana nalo; iqhina eliphantsi kwezandla zozibini liphuma kuyo, liphume kuyo iqhina eliphantsi kwezandla zozibini, ngokwazo izandla ezithandathu."
Exodus37:22 Amaqhina awo nezibambo zawo zaphuma kwakumnye, uphela waba ngumkhando wamnye wegolide ecocekileyo."
Exodus37:23 Wenza izibane zaso zasixhenxe, nemilomo yaso, nemilomo yaso ngegolide ecocekileyo."
Exodus37:24 Wenza ke ngetalente yegolide ecocekileyo, neempahla zakhe zonke."
Exodus37:25 Wenza nesibingelelo sokuqhumisela ngomngampunzi; ubude bayo buyikubhite enye, ububanzi bayo buyikubhite enye; ayemacala amane alinganayo; ukuphakama kwaso kwaba ziikubhite ezimbini; iimpondo zaso zaziyinto-nye."
Exodus37:26 Wasaleka ngegolide ecocekileyo umphezulu waso, namacala aso, neempondo zaso; wayithi jize ngesithsaba segolide."
Exodus37:27 Wasenzela amakhonkco amabini ngegolide, phantsi kwesithsaba saso, eziphelweni zaso zozibini, emacaleni aso omabini, aziindawo zokuthwala."
Exodus37:28 Wenza izibonda ngomthi welinen, wazaleka ngegolide."
Exodus37:29 Wenza neoli engcwele yokuthambisa, nesiqhumiso esicocekileyo, ngokomsebenzi womqholi."
Exodus38:1 Wenza nesibingelelo sedini elinyukayo ngomngampunzi; ayemacala amane alinganayo; ukuphakama kwawo kuziikubhite ezintathu.
Exodus38:2 Wenza iimpondo zaso ezimbombeni zaso zone; iimpondo zakhe zaziphezu kwayo, wayinxiba."
Exodus38:3 Wazenza zonke iimpahla zesibingelelo eso: iimbiza, nemihlakulwana, nezitya zokutshiza, neembombo zenyama, neengcedevu; zonke izixhobo zaso wazenza ngobhedu."
Exodus38:4 Isibingelelo wasenzela umnatha ngobhedu, phantsi kwekhonkco laso, esazulwini saso;"
Exodus38:5 Wenza amakhonkco amane eziphelweni zozine zencakuba yobhedu, aba ziindawo zamanani."
Exodus38:6 Wenza izibonda ngomthi welinen, wazaleka ngobhedu."
Exodus38:7 Wazibeka iimpahla emakhonkcweni, emacaleni esibingelelo, ukuba sithwalwe ngazo; wenza isibingelelo ngomthi."
Exodus38:8 Wenza isitya sobhedu, kwanesiphatho saso sobhedu, ngezipili zabafazi, ababehlanganisene emnyango wentente yokuhlangana."
Exodus38:9 Wenza intendelezo kwelasezantsi icala, emazantsi, elengalengayo elinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo, iikubhite ezilikhulu ubude."
Exodus38:10 Iintsika zawo zaba mashumi mabini, neziseko zazo zaba mashumi mabini, zazezobhedu; iintsika namakhonkco azo yayezesilivere."
Exodus38:11 Ngecala lasentla amawunduwundu aziikubhite ezilikhulu; iintsika zawo ezimashumi mabini, neziseko zazo ezimashumi mabini, izezobhedu; iintsika namakhonkco azo esilivere."
Exodus38:12 Ngecala lasentshonalanga amalengalenga aziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu, iintsika zawo zalishumi, nezixhaso zawo zalishumi; iintsika namakhonkco azo esilivere."
Exodus38:13 Ngecala lempumalanga ngasempumalanga aziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu.
Exodus38:14 Amawunduwundu asingisa kwelinye icala lesango aziikubhite ezilishumi elinantlanu; Iintsika zawo zintathu, neentsika zawo zintathu."
Exodus38:15 Ngecala lesango lentsimi, ngapha nangapha, aba ngamawunduwundu eekubhite ezilishumi elinantlanu; Iintsika zawo zintathu, neentsika zawo zintathu."
Exodus38:16 Onke amalaphu ajingayo kwintendelezo aba ngawelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo."
Exodus38:17 Izixhaso zeentsika zaba zezobhedu; iziseko zeentsika nemixokelelwane yazo yayeyesilivere; nokwaleka abathetheli bazo ngesilivere; zonke iintsika zentendelezo zazizele yisilivere.
Exodus38:18 Amawunduwundu esango lentendelezo ayengumsebenzi womluki, nemisonto emsi nemfusa nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo; ubude baba ziikubhite ezimashumi mabini, ukuphakama kwaba ziikubhite ezintlanu ububanzi, kwangaloo mawunduwundu entendelezo."
Exodus38:19 Iintsika zawo zone neziseko zazo zozine zaba zezobhedu; amagwegwe azo esilivere, nesithsaba sabathetheli bazo, namakhonkco azo esilivere."
Exodus38:20 Zonke izikhonkwane zomnquba nezentendelezo ejikelezileyo zazezobhedu.
Exodus38:21 Lilo eli inani lenani lomnquba, intente yesingqino, abeyibelwa ngokomthetho kaMoses, ngenxa yenkonzo yabaLevi, ngesandla sikaItamare, unyana ka-Aron umbingeleli."
Exodus38:22 uBhetsaleli, unyana kaUri, unyana kaHuri, wesizwe sakwaYuda, wakwenza konke uYehova abemwisele umthetho ngako uMoses."
Exodus38:23 Waye noAholiyabhi unyana ka-Ahisamaki, wesizwe sakwaDan, engumkroli, ingcibi, umluki welinen emfusa nemfusa nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, ecikizekileyo."
Exodus38:24 Ke yonke igolide ekwakusetyenzwa ngayo umsebenzi wonke wengcwele, igolide yomtshangatshangiso, yaye iziitalente ezimashumi mabini anesithoba, neeshekele ezimakhulu asixhenxe anamanci mathathu, ngokweshekele yengcwele."
Exodus38:25 Ke isilivere yabo babebhalelwe ibandla, yaba likhulu leetalente neeshekele eziliwaka elinamakhulu asixhenxe, anamanci mathandathu anesihlanu, ngokweshekele yengcwele;"
Exodus38:26 Nomnika isiqingatha seshekele elowo umntu, ngokweshekele yengcwele, kubo bonke ababalwayo, bethabathela kominyaka imashumi mabini ezelwe, banyuse, babe ngamakhulu amawaka, anamakhulu mathandathu, anamanci mahlanu, anamanci mahlanu."
Exodus38:27 Ke lona ikhulu leetalente zesilivere, kwakukho izixhaso zengcwele neziseko zomgongxo; yaba likhulu elinekhulu leetalente, netalente kwiluthi yolunye."
Exodus38:28 Ngeeshekele eziliwaka elinamakhulu asixhenxe anamanci asixhenxe anesihlanu, wenza iintsika, wawagubungela amantloko azo, wazalisa."
Exodus38:29 Ubhedu olungumtshangatshangiso lwaye luziitalente ezingamashumi asixhenxe, neeshekele ezingamawaka amabini anamakhulu mane."
Exodus38:30 Wenza ngayo imigubasi yentente yokuhlangana, nesibingelelo sobhedu, nomsipha waso wobhedu, neempahla zonke zesibingelelo;"
Exodus38:31 nezixhaso zentendelezo ejikelezileyo, nezixhaso zesango lentendelezo, nezikhonkwane zonke zomnquba, nezikhonkwane zonke zentendelezo ejikelezileyo."
Exodus39:1 Benza amalaphu amfusa, nemfusa, nebomvu, ukuba akhonze engcweleni; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Exodus39:2 Iefodi wayenza ngegolide, nemisonto emsi nemfusa nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo."
Exodus39:3 Bandula ke bakhanda iipleyiti zegolide ezicekethekileyo, bazenza iziqwenga, bazenza ngemisonto emfusa nemfusa nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, umsebenzi wengcibi yokuluka."
Exodus39:4 Bayenza iziziba zamagxa zokuyixakatha;
Exodus39:5 Isondo le-efodi eliphezu kwayo laphuma kuyo, njengokusetyenzwa kwayo; ngegolide, nengubo emfusa, nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Exodus39:6 Benza amatye ebherilo, atywinwa ngamaqhekeza egolide, akrolwa ngokwamatywina, ngokwamagama oonyana bakaSirayeli;"
Exodus39:7 wawabeka ezizibeni zamagxa ze-efodi, aba ngamatye esikhumbuzo koonyana bakaSirayeli; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Exodus39:8 Wenza umqukumbelo wenkontsho, umsebenzi wengcibi yokuluka, ngegolide, nengubo emfusa, nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo."
Exodus39:9 Amacala amane alinganayo; Bayisonga umkhombe kabini: ubude bawo baba yikubhite enye, ububanzi bawo baba yikubhite enye, sansongwa kabini."
Exodus39:10 Bafaka kulo imikrozo yamine yamatye; ibingumgca wokuqala;
Exodus39:11 kukrozo lwesibini yiemeraldi, nesafire, nedayimani;"
Exodus39:12 kukrozo lwesithathu lwaba yiswekile, neagati, neametiste;"
Exodus39:13 kukrozo lwesine yaba yirieli, nebherilo, neyaspisi; bafakwa kwiingxowa zegolide ezingxoweni zabo."
Exodus39:14 Amatye lawo abe ngamagama oonyana bakaSirayeli abalishumi elinababini, ngokwamagama abo;"
Exodus39:15 Benza elubengweni intsontelo ezolukiweyo zegolide ecocekileyo.
Exodus39:16 Benza iingxowa ezimbini zegolide, namakhonkco amabini ngegolide; ubeke iintsontelo zibe mbini emiphethweni yomibini yesifuba."
Exodus39:17 Bazifaka iintsontelo ezimbini zegolide emakhonkcweni omabini asemancamini obengo;
Exodus39:18 Iingongoma zombini zezo tyathanga zimbini bazixhoma ezityeyeni zombini, bazixhoma ezizibeni zamagxa ze-efodi;"
Exodus39:19 Benza amakhonkco amabini ngegolide, bawafaka emancamini omabini obengo, emphethweni walo ongaphakathi kwe-efodi."
Exodus39:20 Benza amanye amakhonkco amabini ngegolide, bawafaka emacaleni omabini e-efodi, emacaleni asezantsi, kufuphi nokuqhina kwayo, emqukumbelweni we-efodi."
Exodus39:21 Bawubopha unkontsho olo elunkontshweni ngomsonto obomvu oqaqambileyo, esinga phezu komtya wasentloko, ukuze ungahlukani nonkontsho; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Exodus39:22 Benza ingubo yokwaleka ye-efodi ngomsebenzi womluki, yonke ngemisonto emsi nemfusa."
Exodus39:23 Bekukho umngxuma phakathi kwengubo, onjengomngxuma wentombi enyulu, ubiyele umngxuma lowo, ukuze ingakrazuki."
Exodus39:24 Benza amalaphu emqukumbelweni wengubo ebomvu, nebomvu, nelinen ebomvu, ephothiweyo."
Exodus39:25 Benza iiperile zegolide ecocekileyo, bazifaka phakathi kwamalaphu emqukumbelweni wengubo yokwaleka, kujikelezo phakathi kokwaleka;"
Exodus39:26 nomnikelo wegarnet, nomqukumbelo wengubo yokwaleka, nomqukumbelo wengubo yokwaleka; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Exodus39:27 uAron noonyana bakhe babenzela iingubo zelinen ecikizekileyo;
Exodus39:28 nonkontsho, ngelinen ecikizekileyo, neminqwazi yelinen ecikizekileyo, neminqwazi yelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo;"
Exodus39:29 nengubo yelinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo, nengubo emfusa, nebomvu, umsebenzi oyiluki; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Exodus39:30 Benza necwecwe lesithsaba esingcwele segolide ecocekileyo, babhala phezu kwalo umbhalo ngombhalo wetywina, othi, Uzahlulele kuYehova."
Exodus39:31 Bayibopha ngentambo emfusa, yokunxitywa elunkontshweni; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Exodus39:32 Wagqitywa ke wonke umsebenzi wentente yokuhlangana; yaye oonyana bakaSirayeli benza kanye njengoko uYehova wamyalelayo uMoses, benjenjalo."
Exodus39:33 Bawuzisa kuMoses umnquba, intente, nemisebenzi yayo yonke, neeplanga zayo, neentsika zayo, nemiqadi yayo, neentsika zayo, nezihlalo zayo;"
Exodus39:34 nesigubungelo sezintsu zeenkunzi zezimvu siye sajika sabomvu, nesigubungelo sezintsu zamahlengezi, nomkhusane osigubungeleyo;"
Exodus39:35 netyeya yesingqino, nemithwalo yayo, nesigubungelo;"
Exodus39:36 itafile nemisebenzi yayo yonke, nezonka zokubonisa;"
Exodus39:37 nesiphatho sezibane esihlambulukileyo, nezibane zaso, nezibane ezilungisiweyo, nemisebenzi yaso yonke, neoli yokukhanyisa;"
Exodus39:38 nesibingelelo segolide, neoli yokuthambisa, nobulawu, namalengalenga axhonywe emnyango womnquba;"
Exodus39:39 nesibingelelo sobhedu, nesefa yaso yobhedu, nemithwalo yaso, nemisebenzi yaso yonke, nengubo yaso, nesihlalo saso;"
Exodus39:40 namawunduwundu entendelezo, neentsika zawo, nezihlalo zazo, namawunduwundu omnyango wentendelezo, nezintya zawo, nezikhonkwane zawo, nomsebenzi wonke womnquba wentente yokuhlangana;"
Exodus39:41 nezambatho zenkonzo yengcwele nezambatho ezingcwele zika-Aron umbingeleli, nezambatho zoonyana bakhe zokulungiselela ububingeleli."
Exodus39:42 Benza oonyana bakaSirayeli wonke umsebenzi, njengako konke uYehova awamwisela umthetho ngako uMoses."
Exodus39:43 Wawukhangela uMoses wonke umsebenzi, wabona ukuba bayawenza; njengoko uYehova abemwisele umthetho ngako, bawenza; wabasikelela uMoses."
Exodus40:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Exodus40:2 Ngomhla wokuqala wenyanga yokuqala uze uyimise intente yokuhlangana;
Exodus40:3 uyibeke kuyo ityeya yesingqino, uyigqume ngomkhusane ityeya leyo;"
Exodus40:4 Uze netafile, uzicwangcise izinto zayo ezicwangciswayo; zisani nesiphatho sezibane, nizikhanyise izibane zaso."
Exodus40:5 Uze usibeke phambi kwetyeya yesingqino isibingelelo segolide sokuqhumisela, usixhome amalengalenga omnyango wentente;"
Exodus40:6 asimise isibingelelo sedini elinyukayo phambi komnyango wentente yokuhlangana;
Exodus40:7 Beka isitya phakathi kwentente yokuhlangana nesibingelelo uze ugalele amanzi kuso.
Exodus40:8 Uze ayimise intendelezo ijikeleze, aze axhome amalengalenga ekungeneni kwentendelezo."
Exodus40:9 Thabatha ioli yokuthambisa, uthambise umnquba neento zonke ezikuwo, uwungcwalise, nomsebenzi wawo wonke, ube yingcwele;"
Exodus40:10 Uthambise isibingelelo sedini elinyukayo nempahla yaso yonke, ungcwalise isibingelelo, sibe sesona sibingelelo singcwele."
Exodus40:11 Uthambise isitya sokuhlambela, noseko lwaso, ulungcwalise."
Exodus40:12 Uze usondeze uAron noonyana bakhe emnyango wentente yokuhlangana, ubahlambe ngamanzi;"
Exodus40:13 Mnxibe uAron iingubo ezingcwele, umthambise, umngcwalise; ukuze abe ngumbingeleli kum."
Exodus40:14 Uthabathe oonyana bakhe, ubanxibe izambatho ezinde;"
Exodus40:15 Wabathambisa njengoko wamthambisayo uyise, ukuze babe ngababingeleli bam; ngokuba ukuthanjiswa kwabo kuya kuba kokobubingeleli obungunaphakade kubo kwizizukulwana zabo."
Exodus40:16 Wenza ke uMoses, njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho, wenjenjalo."
Exodus40:17 Ngenyanga yokuqala ngomnyaka wesibini, ngolokuqala enyangeni leyo, wamiswa umnquba."
Exodus40:18 Wawumisa ke uMoses umnquba, wazimisa izixhaso zawo, wazimisa iintsika zawo, wayifaka imiqadi yawo, wazimisa iintsika zawo."
Exodus40:19 Wayaneka intente phezu komnquba, wabeka isigubungelo sentente phezu kwayo; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Exodus40:20 Wasithabatha isingqino, wasibeka etyeyeni, wazifaka izibonda etyeyeni, wasibeka isigubungelo senceba phezu kwetyeya."
Exodus40:21 Wayingenisa ityeya emnqubeni, wawuxhoma umkhusane osithelisayo, wayisithelisa ityeya yesingqino; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Exodus40:22 Wayimisa itafile ententeni yokuhlangana, ngecala lomnquba elingasentla, nganeno komkhusane;"
Exodus40:23 Walungisa isonka phezu kwayo phambi koYehova; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses.
Exodus40:24 Wasimisa isiphatho sezibane ententeni yokuhlangana, sakhangelana netafile ngecala lomnquba elingasezantsi;"
Exodus40:25 wazimisa izibane phambi koYehova; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses.
Exodus40:26 Wasibeka isibingelelo segolide ententeni yokuhlangana, phambi komkhusane;"
Exodus40:27 Waqhumisela phezu kwaso; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses.
Exodus40:28 Waxhoma ilaphu elijingayo emnyango womnquba;
Exodus40:29 Wasibeka isibingelelo sedini elinyukayo emnyango wentente yokuhlangana, wenyusa phezu kwaso idini elinyukayo nomnikelo wokudla; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Exodus40:30 Wabeka imbadada phakathi kwentente yokuhlangana nesibingelelo, waza wagalela amanzi okuhlamba ngayo."
Exodus40:31 Bazihlamba ooMoses noAron noonyana bakhe izandla zabo neenyawo zabo kulo.
Exodus40:32 Ekungeneni kwabo ententeni yokuhlangana, nasekusondeleni kwabo esibingelelweni, bahlamba; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Exodus40:33 Wamisa intendelezo ejikeleza umnquba lo nesibingelelo esi, waxhoma amalengalenga esango lentendelezo. Wawugqiba ke uMoses umsebenzi."
Exodus40:34 Ilifu layigubungela intente yokuhlangana, ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova bawuzalisa umnquba."
Exodus40:35 uMoses akaba nakungena ententeni yokuhlangana, ngokuba ilifu lahlala phezu kwayo, nobuqaqawuli bukaYehova bazala ententeni leyo."
Exodus40:36 Belisithi lakuvuka ilifu phezu komnquba, banduluke oonyana bakaSirayeli;"
Exodus40:37 Ke xa ilifu belingekanyuswa, bebenganduluki kude kube yimini yokunyuka kwalo;"
Exodus40:38 Kuba ilifu likaYehova laliba phezu komnquba emini, umlilo ube phezu kwawo ebusuku phambi kwamehlo ayo yonke indlu kaSirayeli kulo lonke uhambo lwabo."
Leviticus1:1 uYehova wambiza uMoses, wathetha kuye ententeni yokuhlangana, wathi,"
Leviticus1:2 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi kubo, Xa umntu kuni asondeza kuYehova umbingelelo, wowusondeza umsondezo wakhe ngeenkomo, neenkomo, neegusha."
Leviticus1:3 Ukuba umbingelelo wakhe ulidini elinyukayo lenkomo, wosondeza iduna eligqibeleleyo; uwuzise ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo phambi koYehova, emnyango wentente yokuhlangana."
Leviticus1:4 Wacinezela ngesandla sakhe phezu kwentloko yedini elinyukayo; kwaye kuya kukholeka kuye ukumxolela.
Leviticus1:5 Mayixhelelwe inkunzi entsha phambi koYehova, bathi oonyana baka-Aron, ababingeleli, balisondeze igazi, bafefe ngegazi bajikelezise esibingelelweni, emnyango wentente yokuhlangana,"
Leviticus1:6 alithambise idini elinyukayo, alityatye;"
Leviticus1:7 Oonyana baka-Aron babeka umlilo phezu kwesibingelelo, babeka iinkuni phezu komlilo."
Leviticus1:8 Bazicwangcise oonyana baka-Aron, ababingeleli, iinyama ezo, nentloko, nenqatha, phezu kweenkuni eziphezu komlilo ophezu kwesibingelelo."
Leviticus1:9 Ke yena uya kuzihlamba izibilini zakhe neenyawo zakhe ngamanzi, aqhumisele ngezo nto zonke umbingeleli esibingelelweni zibe lidini elinyukayo, kukudla kwasemlilweni oko kukuthi ivumba elithozamisayo kuYehova."
Leviticus1:10 Ukuba umsondezo wakhe ngoomhlambi weebhokhwe, nokuba ziibhokhwe, ulidini elinyukayo; makazise inkunzi egqibeleleyo."
Leviticus1:11 Woyihlaba ecaleni lesibingelelo ngasentla phambi kobuso bukaYehova; bathi oonyana baka-Aron, ababingeleli, baligalele igazi layo bajikelezise esibingelelweni."
Leviticus1:12 Wolityatya iinyama zalo, kwanentloko yalo nenqatha lalo, aze umbingeleli azibeke phezu kweenkuni eziphezu komlilo ophezu kwesibingelelo."
Leviticus1:13 Kodwa yena wosihlamba isisu sakhe neenyawo zakhe ngamanzi, azisondeze umbingeleli zonke ezo zinto, aqhumisele ngazo ngomlilo esibingelelweni; Elo lidini elinyukayo, livumba elithozamisayo kuYehova."
Leviticus1:14 Ukuba idini lakhe elinyukayo kuYehova ulithabatha leentaka, wolizisa ihobe lakhe, nokuba lihobe."
Leviticus1:15 Wolisondeza umbingeleli esibingelelweni, alinqumle intloko, aqhumisele ngalo ngomlilo esibingelelweni; igazi lalo maligalelwe ecaleni lesibingelelo."
Leviticus1:16 Makawuthabathe umsondezo wakhe kunye neentsiba zawo, awuphose ecaleni lomlilo ngasempumalanga, endaweni yothuthu."
Leviticus1:17 Uya kukuqwenga ngamaphiko akhe, kodwa akayi kukuqwenga; Woqhumisela ngezo nto umbingeleli esibingelelweni, phezu kweenkuni ezitshayo kumlilo, umlilo, livumba elithozamisayo kuYehova."
Leviticus2:1 Ukuba umntu uthe wasondeza umsondezo kuYehova, umnikelo wakhe woba ngumgubo ocoliweyo; ugalele ioli phezu kwawo, ubeke isiqhumiso phezu kwawo."
Leviticus2:2 Wawuzisa koonyana baka-Aron, ababingeleli; uthabathe esandleni sakhe umgubo ocoliweyo, neoli yakhe, kunye nesiqhumiso esikhona; umbingeleli aqhumisele ngesikhumbuzo salo esibingelelweni, libe ngumnikelo wasemlilweni, olivumba elithozamisayo kuYehova."
Leviticus2:3 Okuseleyo kukudla kwasemlilweni koba kokuka-Aron noonyana bakhe; liyingcwele kangcwele kwidini elinyukayo likaYehova.
Leviticus2:4 Xa usondeza ukudla kwasemlilweni eziko, mayibe yisonka esingenagwele somgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, nokuba sisonka esingenagwele, esigalelwe ioli, sigalelwe ioli;"
Leviticus2:5 Ukuba umnikelo wakho ungumnikelo wasemlilweni ophekwe ngepani, woba ngomgubo ocoliweyo ongenagwele, ogalelwe ioli."
Leviticus2:6 Yityatye ibe ziingceba, ugalele ioli phezu kwayo; kukudla kwasemlilweni oko."
Leviticus2:7 Ukuba umnikelo wakho wasemlilweni ungumnikelo wasemlilweni ophekwe ngepani, mawenziwe ngomgubo ocoliweyo neoli."
Leviticus2:8 Nizise umnikelo wokudla okuziinkozo kuYehova ngezo zinto; ukuba lisiwa kumbingeleli, wolisondeza esibingelelweni."
Leviticus2:9 Wothabatha umbingeleli kuwo idini lesikhumbuzo emnikelweni wokudla, aqhumisele ngalo esibingelelweni; kukudla kwasemlilweni, ivumba elithozamisayo kuYehova."
Leviticus2:10 Okuseleyo kukudla kwasemlilweni koba kokuka-Aron noonyana bakhe; liyingcwele kangcwele kwidini elinyukayo likaYehova.
Leviticus2:11 Nawuphi na umnikelo wasemlilweni, eniwusondeza kuYehova, awuyi kuba nagwele; ngokuba igwele nobusi aniyi kuqhumisela kuYehova."
Leviticus2:12 Ke wona umnikelo wasemlilweni wamazibulo, wowusondeza kuYehova, kodwa ungatshiswa esibingelelweni njengevumba elithozamisayo."
Leviticus2:13 Wonke umnikelo wokudla wokudla, ufefa ityuwa ngetyuwa; ize ingasweli ityuwa yomnqophiso woThixo wakho emnikelweni wakho wokudla; zonke izipho zakho wozisa ityuwa."
Leviticus2:14 Xa uthe wenza umsondezo kuYehova ekudleni kwamanxila akho, wowenza idini elinyukayo, izithungu zakho eziluhlaza zomiswe emlilweni, neekhilogram ezipheleleyo zengqolowa."
Leviticus2:15 Ugalele ioli phezu kwawo, ubeke isiqhumiso phezu kwawo; kukudla kwasemlilweni oko."
Leviticus2:16 Woqhumisela umbingeleli ngesikhumbuzo sawo inxalenye yengqolowa ebhuliweyo nenxalenye yeoli nesiqhumiso sayo sonke; Oko kukudla kwasemlilweni kuYehova.
Leviticus3:1 Ukuba umsondezo wakhe ungumnikelo wombulelo, makawusondeze ube ngumnikelo wenkomo; nokuba uyindoda nokuba yinkazana, woyisondeza igqibelele phambi koYehova."
Leviticus3:2 Maze acinezele entlokweni yomsondezo wakhe ngesandla sakhe, awunikele emnyango wentente yokuhlangana; Oonyana baka-Aron, ababingeleli, bolitshiza igazi bajikelezise esibingelelweni;"
Leviticus3:3 Nosondeza umnikelo wombulelo kuYehova; nomhlehlo ogubungele amathumbu, namanqatha onke aphezu kwamathumbu;"
Leviticus3:4 Umele asuse izintso zombini nenqatha lazo, emacaleni, neselu sesibindi, kwanezintso."
Leviticus3:5 Boqhumisela ngezo oonyana baka-Aron esibingelelweni phezu kwedini elinyukayo, eliphezu kweenkuni eziphezu komlilo, kukudla kwasemlilweni, livumba elithozamisayo kuYehova."
Leviticus3:6 Ukuba umbingelelo wakhe ngumbingelelo wombulelo kuYehova, ungowasempahleni emfutshane; wozisa indoda nokuba yinkazana, igqibelele."
Leviticus3:7 Ukuba usondeza imvana ibe ngumbingelelo wakhe, woyizisa phambi koYehova."
Leviticus3:8 Maze acinezele ngesandla sakhe phezu kwentloko yomsondezo wakhe, awusondeze phambi kwentente yokuhlangana; oonyana baka-Aron balitshize igazi lalo bajikelezise esibingelelweni;"
Leviticus3:9 Wosondeza ukudla kwasemlilweni kaYehova kumbingelelo wombulelo; susa amanqatha akhe kunye nawo onke amathanga aqinile emqolo wakhe; nomhlehlo ogubungele amathumbu, namanqatha onke aphezu kwamathumbu;"
Leviticus3:10 izintso zombini, nenqatha lazo, emacaleni, nomhlehlo, nenxalenye eseleyo yesibindi, kunye nezintso;"
Leviticus3:11 Woqhumisela wena umbingeleli esibingelelweni: lidini elinyukayo ke elo kuYehova.
Leviticus3:12 Ukuba umbingelelo wakhe yibhokhwe, woyisondeza phambi koYehova."
Leviticus3:13 Maze acinezele ngesandla sakhe phezu kwentloko yayo, ayibethele phambi kwentente yokuhlangana; oonyana baka-Aron balitshize igazi lalo bajikelezise esibingelelweni;"
Leviticus3:14 Wowuzisa kuyo umsondezo wakhe, ukudla kwasemlilweni kuYehova; nomhlehlo ogubungele amathumbu, namanqatha onke aphezu kwamathumbu;"
Leviticus3:15 Wozisusa izibindi ezibini, nenqatha lazo, elingasecaleni, nomhlehlo, nomhlehlo, nenqatha phezu kwesibindi;"
Leviticus3:16 Woqhumisela ngezo nto umbingeleli esibingelelweni. Lidini elinyukayo, livumba elithozamisayo; onke amanqatha ngaYehova."
Leviticus3:17 Lowo woba ngumyalelo ongunaphakade ezizukulwaneni zenu, emakhayeni enu onke, wokuba ningadli nqatha nagazi."
Leviticus4:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Leviticus4:2 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi, Xa athe umntu wegqitha kumthetho kaYehova ngokulahleka, nokuba nguwuphi na, nokuba nguwuphi na, wenza kuwo;"
Leviticus4:3 Ukuba umbingeleli othanjisiweyo uthe wenza isono ngokwesono sabantu; wozisa inkunzi yenkomo egqibeleleyo kuYehova ibe ngumnikelo wesono ngenxa yesono osenzileyo.
Leviticus4:4 Woyizisa inkunzi entsha emnyango wentente yokuhlangana phambi koYehova; abeke isandla sakhe phezu kwentloko yenkunzi yenkomo aze ayixhelele inkunzi yenkomo phambi koYehova.
Leviticus4:5 Umbingeleli othanjisiweyo umele athabathe egazini lenkunzi yenkomo, alizise esibingelelweni sobudlelane."
Leviticus4:6 Awuthi nkxu umbingeleli umnwe wakhe egazini aze atshize ngenxalenye yegazi izihlandlo ezisixhenxe phambi koYehova, phambi kwekhuselo lengcwele."
Leviticus4:7 Umbingeleli wogalela inxalenye yegazi esiqhumeni phambi koYehova ententeni yokuhlangana; lonke igazi lenkunzi entsha logalelwa esisekweni sesibingelelo sedini elinyukayo emnyango wentente yokuhlangana.
Leviticus4:8 Wowasusa onke amanqatha enkozweni yedini lesono; nomhlehlo ogubungele amathumbu, namanqatha onke aphezu kwamathumbu;"
Leviticus4:9 Wozisusa izibindi ezibini, nenqatha lazo, elisecaleni, nesibindi, nomhlehlo;"
Leviticus4:10 Njengoko athatyathwayo enkomeni yombingelelo woxolo, aqhumisele ngawo umbingeleli esibingelelweni sedini elinyukayo."
Leviticus4:11 Kesikhumba senkunzi entsha, nenyama yayo yonke, nentloko yayo, namathambo ayo, namathumbu ayo, nomswane wayo;"
Leviticus4:12 Woyikhuphela inkunzi entsha iphela, ayikhuphele ngaphandle kweminquba, aye endaweni emhlophe, apho kuchithwa khona uthuthu, ayitshise ngomlilo phezu kweenkuni; apho kulahlwa khona uthuthu, ziya kutshiswa."
Leviticus4:13 Ukuba lonke ibandla lakwaSirayeli lithe wona ngabom, yaza loo nto ifihlakele emehlweni ebandla, laza lenza into enxamnye nomnye wemiyalelo kaYehova engenziwa, ibe lityala;"
Leviticus4:14 Emva kokuba sisaziwa isono esone ngaso kuye, lifanele libingelele ibandla ngenkunzi yenkomo yesono, liyizise phambi kwentente yokuhlangana."
Leviticus4:15 Yaye amadoda amakhulu ebandla amele abeke izandla zawo phezu kwentloko yenkunzi yenkomo phambi koYehova, ize inkunzi yenkomo ixhelwe phambi koYehova."
Leviticus4:16 Umbingeleli othanjisiweyo umele azise inxalenye yegazi lenkunzi yenkomo ententeni yokuhlangana.
Leviticus4:17 Umbingeleli umele akhande inxalenye yegazi ngomnwe wakhe aze afefe ngalo izihlandlo ezisixhenxe phambi koYehova, phambi komkhusane;"
Leviticus4:18 ayithambise inxalenye yegazi ezimpondweni zesibingelelo phambi koYehova ententeni yokuhlangana, igazi lonke aligalele emazantsi esibingelelo sedini elinyukayo emnyango wesibingelelo intente yokuhlangana."
Leviticus4:19 Wowathabatha onke amanqatha kulo, aqhumisele ngawo esibingelelweni."
Leviticus4:20 Makenze kwinkunzi entsha njengoko wenza kwinkunzi entsha yenkomo yedini lesono, makenjenjalo nakule; aze umbingeleli abacamagushele, baze baxolelwe."
Leviticus4:21 Woyithabatha inkunzi entsha ngaphandle kweminquba, ayitshise njengoko wayitshisayo inkunzi entsha yokuqala; Lidini lesono ke elo lebandla."
Leviticus4:22 Ukuba isikhulu sona, sathi singazi, senza into echasene nomthetho kaYehova uThixo waso, nokuba nguwuphi na, wento engeyakwenziwa, kwalityala oko;"
Leviticus4:23 Ukuba besisaziwa isono sakhe one ngaso; Wosondeza umbingelelo wakhe, itakane lebhokhwe, eligqibeleleyo;"
Leviticus4:24 Socinezela ngesandla saso phezu kwentloko yebhokhwe exhonti, siyixhelele apho kunyuswa khona idini elinyukayo phambi koYehova. Lidini lesono ke elo."
Leviticus4:25 Umbingeleli umele athabathe inxalenye yegazi lomnikelo wesono ngomnwe wakhe aze alidyobhe ezimpondweni zesibingelelo somnikelo otshiswayo aze igazi lawo aligalele ngaphantsi esibingelelweni somnikelo otshiswayo.
Leviticus4:26 Amanqatha alo wowaqhumisela esibingelelweni, njengamanqatha ombingelelo wombulelo; aze umbingeleli amcamagushele ngenxa yesono sakhe, aze axolelwe."
Leviticus4:27 Ukuba ubani wenza isono engazi, wenza into enxamnye nomnye wemiyalelo kaYehova, engafanele ukwenziwa, wazeka ityala;"
Leviticus4:28 Okanye ukuba sithe saziwa isono sakhe esenzileyo, wosondeza umbingelelo wakhe wetakane lebhokhwe, ithokazi eligqibeleleyo, ngenxa yesono sakhe osenzileyo."
Leviticus4:29 Umele abeke isandla sakhe phezu kwentloko yedini lesono aze anikele idini lesono esikhundleni somnikelo otshiswayo.
Leviticus4:30 Umbingeleli wocaphula egazini lalo ngomnwe wakhe, alidyobhe ezimpondweni zesibingelelo somnikelo otshiswayo, lonke igazi laso aligalele emazantsi esibingelelo."
Leviticus4:31 Wowasusa onke amanqatha kulo, njengoko asuswayo amanqatha ombingelelo wombulelo; Woqhumisela ngezo nto umbingeleli esibingelelweni, libe livumba elithozamisayo kuYehova; aze umbingeleli amcamagushele, aze axolelwe."
Leviticus4:32 Ukuba uyisondeza imvana ibe lidini lesono, wozisa ithokazi eligqibeleleyo;"
Leviticus4:33 Umele abeke isandla sakhe phezu kwentloko yedini lesono, alibingelele libe lidini lesono apho kubingelelwa khona idini elinyukayo."
Leviticus4:34 Umbingeleli wothabatha egazini lomnikelo wesono ngomnwe wakhe, alidyobhe ezimpondweni zesibingelelo somnikelo otshiswayo, igazi lalo lonke aligalele kumzantsi wesibingelelo."
Leviticus4:35 Wowasusa onke amanqatha kulo, njengoko asuswayo amanqatha emvana yombingelelo wombulelo; Woqhumisela ngezo nto umbingeleli esibingelelweni, phezu kokudla kwasemlilweni kukaYehova; aze umbingeleli asicamagushele isono sakhe osenzileyo, aze axolelwe ke."
Leviticus5:1 Xa athe ubani wona, waliva izwi lesiqalekiso, walingqina ke, nokuba ubebone oko, nokuba ubesazi; ukuba akathetha, wobuthwala ubugwenxa bakhe."
Leviticus5:2 Xa umoya uthe wachukumisa into eyinqambi, nokuba sisidumbu sezinto ezizitho zine eziziinqambi, nokuba sisidumbu sezinto ezizitho zine eziziinqambi, nokuba sisidumbu sesilwanyana esirhubuluzayo esiyinqambi, ingasitheliswanga loo nto kuye; woba yinqambi, abe netyala."
Leviticus5:3 Xa athe wachukumisa ubunqambi bomntu, into yonke eyinqambi, adyobhekile yiyo, efihlakeleyo kuye; ukuba uthe wafumanisa, woba netyala."
Leviticus5:4 Okanye xa athe umntu wafunga waza wathetha ngomlomo wakhe, esenza okubi okanye okulungileyo, into athe wafunga ngayo umntu ngesifungo, yaza loo nto ifihlakele kuye; ukuba uyazi, woba netyala kwenye yazo."
Leviticus5:5 Ukuba uthe waba netyala kuyo nayiphi na kwezo zinto, wovuma ukuba wone ngako."
Leviticus5:6 Wolizisa idini letyala lakhe kuYehova ngenxa yesono sakhe one ngaso, ithokazi lasempahleni yakhe emfutshane, imvanazana nokuba litakane lebhokhwe, libe lidini lesono; umbingeleli azicamagushele izono zaso ngenxa yesono saso."
Leviticus5:7 Ukuba isandla sakhe sithe asaba nakuzizisa imvana, wozisa amahobe abe mabini, nokuba ngamahobe amabini kuYehova, ngetyala lakhe elonileyo; elinye libe leledini lesono, elinye libe leledini elinyukayo."
Leviticus5:8 Wowuzisa kumbingeleli, enze umnikelo wesono kuqala, awubeke entanyeni yawo, kodwa angawahluli;"
Leviticus5:9 aze atshize ngenxalenye yegazi ledini lesono ecaleni lesibingelelo. Eliseleyo igazi liya kugalelwa esibingelelweni; Lidini lesono elo.
Leviticus5:10 Elesibini wenze idini elinyukayo ngokomthetho; aze umbingeleli amcamagushele ngenxa yesono sakhe one ngaso, aze axolelwe."
Leviticus5:11 Ukuba ke isandla sakhe sithe asaba nakuwafumana amavukuthu amabini, nokuba ngamavukuthu, wozisa umsondezo wakhe lowo wonileyo, ube sisahlulo seshumi se-efa yomgubo ocoliweyo, ube lidini lesono; angagaleli oli phezu kwawo, angayibeki isiqhumiso phezu kwawo, kuba lidini lesono elo."
Leviticus5:12 Wowusondeza kumbingeleli, athabathe umbingeleli kuwo, azalise isandla sakhe, abe lidini lesikhumbuzo, aqhumisele ngalo ngomlilo esibingelelweni, phezu kokudla kwasemlilweni kukaYehova: lidini lesono elo."
Leviticus5:13 Umbingeleli wozigubungela ngezono zakhe ngesono sakhe one ngaso kwenye kwezo, aze axolelwe; Okuseleyo koba kokwababingeleli, njengomnikelo wokudla."
Leviticus5:14 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Leviticus5:15 Ukuba umphefumlo uthe wona, ngongazi, ezintweni ezingcwele zikaYehova; Wozisa idini letyala kuYehova, inkunzi yemvu egqibeleleyo yasempahleni emfutshane, ngokwexabiso lakho ngeeshekele zesilivere, ngokweshekele yengcwele, ibe lidini letyala."
Leviticus5:16 Umele alungise umonakalo awenzileyo engcweleni, ongeze isahlulo sesihlanu sayo kuko oko, anike umbingeleli; Umbingeleli wozigubungela izono zakhe ngenkunzi yemvu yedini letyala, aze axolelwe ke."
Leviticus5:17 Umntu xa athe wona, wenza into kumthetho kaYehova; nokuba ebengazi, woba netyala, wobuthwala ubugwenxa bakhe."
Leviticus5:18 Wozisa inkunzi yemvu egqibeleleyo yasempahleni yakhe emfutshane, ngokwemilinganiselo yakho, ibe lidini letyala kumbingeleli; aze umbingeleli amcamagushele ngenxa yokuhenyuza kwakhe akwenzileyo engazi, yaye woxolelwa."
Leviticus5:19 Lidini letyala ke elo; nonile kuYehova.
Leviticus6:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Leviticus6:2 Xa athe umntu wona, wona kuYehova, wamlukuhla ummelwane wakhe ngento oyinikiweyo, ngelizwi, ngento ebuxhakasileyo, nokuba wamlukuhla ummelwane wakhe;"
Leviticus6:3 bathi, bakuyifumana ebilahlekile, baxoka, bafunga ubuxoki kuyo; kuzo zonke ezo zinto umntu wona."
Leviticus6:4 Ke kaloku, ekubeni enze isono, enetyala, makayibuyise into abeyithabathile ngokunyanzelwa, naleyo ayizuzileyo ngobuqhophololo, nento abeyinikiwe ukuba ayigcine, nento ayifumeneyo ilahlekile."
Leviticus6:5 Okanye zonke izifungo zakhe zobuxoki; yibuyisele etyaleni elikhulu, nesahlulo sesihlanu sayo kuko oko, umnike imfanelo yakhe ngomhla wedini lakhe letyala."
Leviticus6:6 Wosondeza idini lakho letyala kuYehova, inkunzi yemvu egqibeleleyo yasempahleni emfutshane, ngokwenani lakho, ibe lidini letyala kumbingeleli."
Leviticus6:7 Umbingeleli umele azigubungele izono zakhe phambi koYehova, aze axolelwe ke ngokona kwakhe ngako."
Leviticus6:8 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Leviticus6:9 Wisela uAron noonyana bakhe umthetho, uthi, Nguwo lo umyalelo wedini elinyukayo: Lilo elo idini elinyukayo lomlilo ophezu kwesibingelelo ubusuku bonke kude kuse, nomlilo wesibingelelo uhlale usitsha phezu kwalo."
Leviticus6:10 Umbingeleli ufanele ambathe isambatho sakhe selinen, ambathe ibhulukhwe yelinen emzimbeni wakhe, athabathe uthuthu lomlilo otshiswe ngumnikelo otshiswayo esibingelelweni, alubeke ecaleni lesibingelelo."
Leviticus6:11 Umele akhulule iimpahla zakhe, ambathe ngubo zimbi, alukhuphele ngaphandle kweminquba uthuthu endaweni ehlambulukileyo."
Leviticus6:12 Umlilo ophezu kwesibingelelo wovutha phezu kwaso; ayinakucinywa; umbingeleli wobeka iinkuni phezu kwawo imiso ngemiso, abeke phezu kwawo idini elinyukayo; aqhumisele phezu kwalo ngamanqatha ombingelelo woxolo."
Leviticus6:13 Umlilo wohlala usitsha esibingelelweni; awuyi kucinywa.
Leviticus6:14 Nguwo lo umyalelo wedini elinyukayo: oonyana baka-Aron bowulungiselela phambi koYehova, phambi kwesibingelelo;"
Leviticus6:15 Wothabatha kuwo, azalise isandla kumgubo ocoliweyo womnikelo wokudla, naseolini yawo, nasesiqhumeni sonke esiphezu komnikelo wokudla, aqhumisele ngazo esibingelelweni, zibe livumba elithozamisayo, libe sisikhumbuzo yona, eNkosini."
Leviticus6:16 Okuseleyo kuwo kodliwa nguAron noonyana bakhe; yodliwa izonka ezingenagwele endaweni engcwele; bawadlela entendelezweni yentente yokuhlangana.
Leviticus6:17 Uze ungabhaki unegwele. Ndabanika yona njengesabelo sabo emirhumeni yam; yingcwele kangcwele, ibe lidini lesono neletyala."
Leviticus6:18 Yonke into eyindoda phakathi koonyana baka-Aron yowudla. Yoba ngumthetho ongunaphakade ezizukulwaneni zenu ngokuphathelele iminikelo yasemlilweni kaYehova; bonke abayichukumisayo boba ngcwele.
Leviticus6:19 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Leviticus6:20 Nguwo lowo umsondezo ka-Aron noonyana bakhe, abowuzisa kuYehova ngomhla wokuthanjiswa kwakhe; ube sisahlulo seshumi se-efa yomgubo ocoliweyo, ube ngumnikelo wokudla wamaxesha onke;"
Leviticus6:21 Yenze epanini, eneoli; wakuba uvuthiwe, uze nawo; yaye wolungisa amaqhekeza omnikelo wasemlilweni abe livumba elithozamisayo kuYehova."
Leviticus6:22 Nombingeleli othanjisiweyo esikhundleni sakhe wobaxolelanisa; Ngumthetho ongunaphakade kuYehova lowo; mayitshiswe iphele.
Leviticus6:23 Kuba yonke iminikelo yasemlilweni wombingeleli yotshiswa kuphele; mayingadliwa.
Leviticus6:24 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Leviticus6:25 Thetha kuAron nakoonyana bakhe, uthi, Nguwo lo umthetho wedini lesono: Idini lesono losondezwa phambi koYehova apho kunyuswe khona idini elinyukayo; ingcwele kakhulu."
Leviticus6:26 Umbingeleli olenzayo idini lesono wolidla; yodliwa endaweni engcwele, entendelezweni yentente yokuhlangana."
Leviticus6:27 Yonke into esukuba iyichukumisa inyama yayo yoba ngcwele; yaye ukuba elinye igazi lafefa kwisambatho ngasinye, liya kuhlanjwa kweso sifefweyo ekupheleni kokholo."
Leviticus6:28 Ke yona imbiza yodongwe ebigalelwe kulo, iya kwaphuka; yaye ukuba igalelwe ngembiza yobhedu, yoshenxiswa ize ihlanjwe ngamanzi."
Leviticus6:29 Yonke into eyindoda phakathi kwababingeleli yolidla; yeyona nto ingcwele.
Leviticus6:30 Idini lesono, eligazi lalo eliziswe ententeni yokuhlangana, ukuba licamagushele engcweleni, malingadliwa; utshiswe ngomlilo."
Leviticus7:1 Nguwo lowo umyalelo wedini letyala: liyingcwele kangcwele lona.
Leviticus7:2 Apho kubingelelwa khona idini letyala, zowusondeza apho umnikelo wetyala; igazi layo litshize kumacala onke esibingelelweni."
Leviticus7:3 Wowasondeza onke amanqatha alo; umnqamlezo nenqatha eligubungele amathumbu;
Leviticus7:4 Wozisusa izibindi ezibini, nenqatha lazo, elisecaleni, neseli elisesibindini, kunye nezibindi;"
Leviticus7:5 Woqhumisela ngezo nto umbingeleli esibingelelweni, kukudla kwasemlilweni kaYehova; Lidini letyala ke elo."
Leviticus7:6 Yonke into eyindoda phakathi kwababingeleli yolidla; yodliwa endaweni engcwele; yeyona nto ingcwele.
Leviticus7:7 Njengedini lesono, nedini letyala, likwanjalo, mnye umyalelo kuwo omabini; ibe ngumbingeleli ocamagusha ngalo."
Leviticus7:8 Umbingeleli osukuba ethabatha idini elinyukayo lomntu, isikhumba sedini elinyukayo alisondezayo soba sesakhe."
Leviticus7:9 Wonke umnikelo wokubhaka obhaka eziko, nayo yonke into elungiselelwa epanini, nasepanini, yoba ngumbingeleli oya kuwunikela."
Leviticus7:10 Wonke umnikelo wokudla kwasemlilweni, ogalelwe ioli, owomileyo, wonikwa oonyana bonke baka-Aron, omnye abe njengomnye."
Leviticus7:11 Kwaye ngumthetho wombulelo ukuba umelwe kukuwuzisa eNkosini.
Leviticus7:12 Ukuba uthe wasondeza umbingelelo wombulelo, wobhaka izonka ezingenagwele, zigalelwe ioli, nezonka ezingenagwele, zithanjiswe ioli, nesonka esigalelwe ioli, nomgubo ocoliweyo, kube ngumnikelo wendumiso, nomnikelo wombulelo."
Leviticus7:13 Ngaphandle kwesonka wosondeza umnikelo wakhe wesonka esinegwele ndawonye nomnikelo wakhe wombulelo.
Leviticus7:14 Umele anikele ube mnye emnikelweni wokudla okupheleleyo, ube ngumnikelo onikelwa kuYehova, ube ngowombingeleli olitshizayo igazi lombingelelo wombulelo."
Leviticus7:15 Inyama yombingelelo wakhe woxolo wodliwa kwangaloo mini yokuphuma kwakhe; makangashiyi nto kuyo kude kuse.
Leviticus7:16 Ke ukuba umsondezo wakhe waba ngowesibambiso, nokuba ngumnikelo wokuzithandela, wodliwa kwangaloo mini asondeza ngayo umsondezo wakhe;"
Leviticus7:17 Ke yona inyama eseleyo ngomhla wesithathu iya kutshiswa ngomlilo.
Leviticus7:18 Ukuba kuthe kwadliwa inyama yombingelelo wakhe wombulelo, ngomhla wesithathu, awusayi kumkholekisa, awusayi kubalelwa kulowo uwuhlwayelayo; yoba lisikizi, idle umphefumlo. Niya kuthwala ububi kuyo."
Leviticus7:19 Inyama efike entweni eyinqambi mayingadliwa; itshiswe ngomlilo; ukuba yinyama, bonke abahlambulukileyo bayidle;"
Leviticus7:20 ke yena othe wayidla inyama yombingelelo wombulelo kaYehova, ekwinto engcolileyo yakhe, loo mphefumlo wonqanyulwa, ungabikho ebantwini bakowawo."
Leviticus7:21 Umntu osukuba echukumisa nantoni na engahlambulukanga, njengokungahlambuluki komntu, nasiphi na isilwanyana esingahlambulukanga okanye nantoni na ecekisekayo engahlambulukanga, waza wayidla inyama yombingelelo wombulelo kaYehova, loo mphefumlo wonqunyulwa ungabikho kuye abantu."
Leviticus7:22 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Leviticus7:23 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi, Ize ningawadli amanqatha eenkomo, nagusha, nabhokhwe."
Leviticus7:24 Inqatha lento ezifeleyo, namanqatha ento eqwengiweyo, angásebenza ngayo; kodwa nize ningawadli."
Leviticus7:25 Kuba nabani na olidlayo inqatha lezinto ezizitho zine, ubani enze idini elinyukayo kuYehova, loo mntu ulidlayo wonqanyulwa, angabikho ebandleni lakowabo."
Leviticus7:26 Ize ningadli nagazi ezindlwini zenu zonke, nokuba lelentaka, neleenkomo;"
Leviticus7:27 Wonke umphefumlo othe wadla igazi lalo naluphi na uhlobo, loo mphefumlo wonqanyulwa, ungabikho phakathi kwawo."
Leviticus7:28 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Leviticus7:29 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi, Umntu osukuba esondeza imibingelelo yakhe yombulelo kuYehova, wowuzisa umsondezo wakhe kuYehova, ube phezu kwemibingelelo yakhe yombulelo;"
Leviticus7:30 Wolizisa ngezandla zakhe idini elinyukayo kuYehova, elinamanqatha kunye netyeya, ityeya yokuhambisa idini elinyukayo phambi koYehova."
Leviticus7:31 Umbingeleli woqhumisela ngenqatha elo esibingelelweni, kodwa ityeya ibe yeka-Aron noonyana bakhe."
Leviticus7:32 Nomnika umbingeleli intende yesandla esikhulu, ibe ngumrhumo ebingelelweni lenu loxolo."
Leviticus7:33 Omnye koonyana baka-Aron, osondeza igazi lombulelo, nenqatha lesandla sakhe sokunene, soba sisabelo sakhe;"
Leviticus7:34 Kuba ityeya eshukunyiswayo nesandla ndazithabatha koonyana bakaSirayeli kumbingelelo wombulelo ndaza ndazinika uAron umbingeleli noonyana bakhe njengommiselo wexesha elingenammiselo ovela koonyana bakaSirayeli.
Leviticus7:35 Ezo nto ke ziyinxalenye yokuthanjiswa kuka-Aron nokuthanjiswa koonyana bakhe kwasekudleni kwasemlilweni kukaYehova ngomhla awabasondezayo ukuba babe ngababingeleli kuYehova;
Leviticus7:36 awawisa umthetho uYehova, ngomhla wokubathambisa kwakhe, ukuba bawunikwe phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, ngokomyalelo ongunaphakade, ezizukulwaneni zabo."
Leviticus7:37 Nguwo lo umthetho womnikelo otshiswayo, nomnikelo otshiswayo nomnikelo wesono nomnikelo wetyala nombingelelo nowombulelo;"
Leviticus7:38 awamwisela umthetho ngawo uYehova uMoses, entabeni yaseSinayi, ngomhla wokubawisela kwakhe umthetho oonyana bakaSirayeli, entlango yaseSinayi, ukuba basondeze imisondezo yabo kuYehova."
Leviticus8:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Leviticus8:2 Thabatha ooAron noonyana bakhe, iingubo, ioli yokuthambisa, inkunzi entsha yenkomo, yedini lesono, neenkunzi zezimvu zibe mbini, nengobozi yezonka ezingenagwele;"
Leviticus8:3 Libizele ndawonye lonke ibandla emnyango wentente yokuhlangana.
Leviticus8:4 Wenza uMoses ngoko uYehova wamwisela umthetho ngako; labizela ndawonye ibandla emnyango wentente yokuhlangana.
Leviticus8:5 Wathi uMoses kwibandla, Yiyo le into awise umthetho ngayo uYehova ukuba yenziwe."
Leviticus8:6 uMoses wabasondeza ke ooAron noonyana bakhe, wabahlamba ngamanzi."
Leviticus8:7 Wamambathisa idyasi wambhinqisa umbhinqo wamambathisa idyasi wamfaka ilaphu egxalabeni wambopha ngelaphu egxalabeni wambopha ngalo.
Leviticus8:8 Wafaka nengxowa yesifuba; wabeka iiUrim neeTumim elubengweni;
Leviticus8:9 wamfaka unkontsho entloko; elunkontshweni phambi kwakhe wabeka isitya segolide, isigubungelo esingcwele; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Leviticus8:10 Wayithabatha uMoses ioli yokuthambisa, wawuthambisa umnquba neento zonke ezikuwo, wawungcwalisa."
Leviticus8:11 Wafefa isibingelelo izihlandlo ezisixhenxe, wasithambisa isibingelelo nempahla yaso yonke nengubo yaso yokwaleka noseko lwaso, ukuba singcwaliswe."
Leviticus8:12 Wagalela ioli yokuthambisa kuAron entloko, wamthambisa ukuba angcwaliswe."
Leviticus8:13 Wabasondeza ke uMoses oonyana baka-Aron, wabanxiba iingubo zabo ezinde zangaphezulu, wababopha ngamaqhina, wabathwala iminqwazi; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Leviticus8:14 Wasondeza inkunzi entsha yenkomo yedini lesono, bacinezela ooAron noonyana bakhe ngezandla zabo phezu kwentloko yenkunzi entsha yedini lesono."
Leviticus8:15 Wayihlaba; Walithabatha uMoses igazi, walitshiza ngeempondo zesibingelelo ngomnwe wakhe, wasihlambulula isibingelelo, waligalela umzantsi wesibingelelo igazi, wasingcwalisa, ukuze sicamagushele."
Leviticus8:16 Wawathabatha onke amanqatha asesiswini, namanqatha asesibindini, nezintso zombini, nenqatha lazo, waqhumisela ngazo uMoses esibingelelweni."
Leviticus8:17 Ke inkomo, nesikhumba sayo, nenyama yayo, nomswane wayo, wayitshisa ngomlilo ngaphandle kweminquba; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Leviticus8:18 Wasondeza inkunzi yemvu yedini elinyukayo, bacinezela ooAron noonyana bakhe ngezandla zabo phezu kwentloko yenkunzi yemvu."
Leviticus8:19 Wayihlaba; uMoses walitshiza igazi, wajikelezisa esibingelelweni;"
Leviticus8:20 inkunzi yemvu wayityatya; Waqhumisela uMoses ngentloko, nenyama, nenqatha."
Leviticus8:21 Wazihlamba izibilini namathambo ngamanzi; uMoses waqhumisela ngenkunzi yemvu iphela esibingelelweni; laba lidini elinyukayo, livumba elithozamisayo, kukudla kwasemlilweni ke oko kuYehova; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Leviticus8:22 Yazisa enye inkunzi yemvu, inkunzi yemvu; waza uAron noonyana bakhe babeka izandla zabo phezu kwentloko yenkunzi yegusha leyo."
Leviticus8:23 Wayihlaba; Wathabatha uMoses egazini layo, walidyobha endlebeni yasekunene yesandla sika-Aron, nakusithupha wesandla sakhe sasekunene, nakubhontsi wonyawo lwakhe lwasekunene."
Leviticus8:24 Wabasondeza oonyana baka-Aron, uMoses wafefa ngenxalenye yegazi esithinzini sendlebe yabo yasekunene, nakoobhontsi bezandla zabo, nakubhontsi bonyawo lwabo; uMoses walitshiza igazi, wajikelezisa esibingelelweni."
Leviticus8:25 Wawathabatha amanqatha, nomlenze, namanqatha onke asesiswini, nomhlehlo wesibindi, nezintso zombini, nenqatha lazo, nesandla sasekunene."
Leviticus8:26 Wathabatha engobozini yezonka ezingenagwele eyayiphambi koYehova, wathabatha iqebengwana elingenagwele lalinye, neqebengwana leoli, neqebengwana lalinye, wabeka phezu kwamanqatha egxalabeni lasekunene."
Leviticus8:27 Wazibeka zonke izinto ezandleni zika-Aron nasezandleni zoonyana bakhe waza wenza umnikelo otshangatshangiswayo phambi koYehova.
Leviticus8:28 Wayithabatha uMoses ezandleni zabo, waqhumisela ngayo esibingelelweni, phezu kwedini elinyukayo; zazinikelwe kwivumba elimnandi; Oko kukudla kwasemlilweni kuYehova."
Leviticus8:29 Wayithabatha uMoses ityeya, wayitshangatshangisa, yaba ngumtshangatshangiso phambi koYehova; inkunzi yemvu yasisabelo sikaMoses; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Leviticus8:30 Wayithabatha uMoses ioli yokuthambisa, nenxalenye yegazi lasesibingelelweni, wamtshiza uAron, nezambatho zakhe, noonyana bakhe, nezambatho zoonyana bakhe ababenaye; yaye wamngcwalisa uAron nezambatho zakhe noonyana bakhe nezambatho zoonyana bakhe ndawonye naye."
Leviticus8:31 Wathi uMoses kuAron noonyana bakhe, Yiphekeni inyama emnyango wentente yokuhlangana, niyidle khona isonka engobozini yomnikelo wokudla, njengoko ndawisa umthetho, ndathi, uAron noonyana bakhe boyidla. Yona."
Leviticus8:32 Into eseleyo yenyama nesonka, uze ungayitshisi ngomlilo."
Leviticus8:33 Ize ningaphumi emnyango wentente yokuhlangana, imihla esixhenxe, ide izaliseke imihla yembewu yakho; uya kuningcwalisa iintsuku ezisixhenxe."
Leviticus8:34 uYehova uwise umthetho ukuba kwenziwe njengoko enzile namhla, ukukunyanga."
Leviticus8:35 Nohlala ubusuku nemini iintsuku ezisixhenxe emnyango wentente yokuhlangana, niyigcine inkonzo kaYehova, ukuze ningafi; ngokuba ndiwisiwe ngolo hlobo."
Leviticus8:36 Benza uAron noonyana bakhe yonke into awayeyiyalele uYehova ngenkonzo kaMoses.
Leviticus9:1 Ngomhla wesithoba nowesibini, uMoses wabiza uAron noonyana bakhe, namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli;"
Leviticus9:2 Wathi kuAron, Thabatha ithole, ithole lenkomo, libe lidini lesono, nenkunzi yemvu ibe lidini elinyukayo eligqibeleleyo, uzisondeze phambi koYehova."
Leviticus9:3 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi, Zithabatheleni itakane lebhokhwe, libe lidini lesono; nethole lenkomo, nemvana, eneminyaka emibini ubudala, ezigqibeleleyo, zizezedini elinyukayo ke ezo;"
Leviticus9:4 nenkunzi yenkomo, nenkunzi yemvu, zibe ngumbingelelo wombulelo wokubingelelwa kuYehova; nomnikelo othanjiswe ngeoli, ngokuba namhla uYehova uya kubonakala kuwe."
Leviticus9:5 Bakuzisa oko uMoses wayekuyalele phambi kwentente yokuhlangana, lasondela lonke ibandla, lema phambi koYehova."
Leviticus9:6 Wathi uMoses, Yiyo loo nto uYehova akuwisele umthetho ngayo, ukuze ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova bubonakale kuwe."
Leviticus9:7 Wathi uMoses kuAron, Sondela esibingelelweni, wenze idini lakho lesono, nedini lakho elinyukayo, ucamagushele izono zakho nezono zabantu; sondezani umbingelelo wabantu, uwucamagushele isono; njengoko uYehova wawisayo umthetho."
Leviticus9:8 Wasondela uAron esibingelelweni waza waxhela ithole lenkomo lomnikelo wesono ongowakhe.
Leviticus9:9 Balizisa oonyana baka-Aron igazi kuye, wawuthi nkxu umnwe wakhe egazini, waligalela ezimpondweni zesibingelelo, waligalela igazi emazantsi esibingelelo."
Leviticus9:10 Ke inqatha, nezintso, neseli elisesibindini sedini lesono, waqhumisela ngezo zinto ngomlilo esibingelelweni, njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Leviticus9:11 Inyama nesikhumba wayitshisa ngomlilo ngaphandle kweminquba.
Leviticus9:12 Wenza idini elinyukayo; Oonyana baka-Aron basondeza igazi kuye, waligalela phezu kwesibingelelo."
Leviticus9:13 Balizisa kuye idini elinyukayo, neenxalenye zalo, nentloko, waqhumisela ngezo nto esibingelelweni."
Leviticus9:14 Wawahlamba amathumbu nezibilini, waqhumisela ngezo zinto phezu kwedini elinyukayo esibingelelweni."
Leviticus9:15 Emva koko wasondeza umbingelelo wasesidlangalaleni, wathabatha ibhokhwe yomnikelo wesono wasesidlangalaleni, wayixhela, wenza nomnikelo wesono njengeyokuqala."
Leviticus9:16 Emva koko wenza umnikelo otshiswayo waza wawunikela ngokomthetho.
Leviticus9:17 Wasondeza idini elinyukayo, uzalisa isandla kulo, waqhumisela ngalo esibingelelweni, ngexesha ledini elinyukayo lakusasa."
Leviticus9:18 Kananjalo waxhela inkunzi yenkomo nenkunzi yegusha, zibe ngumbingelelo wombulelo; oonyana baka-Aron bamnika igazi, walitshiza wajikelezisa esibingelelweni;"
Leviticus9:19 namanqatha enkunzi entsha yenkomo, nelenkunzi yemvu, nomlenze, nowagubungele amathumbu, nezintso, namanqatha esibindi;"
Leviticus9:20 Babeka amanqatha phezu kweetyesi, waqhumisela ngamanqatha esibingelelweni."
Leviticus9:21 Wazisondeza ke uAron iincum ezo nesokunene, zaba ngumtshangatshangiso phambi koYehova; njengoko uMoses wamwiselayo umthetho."
Leviticus9:22 Wasiphakamisela ebantwini isandla sakhe uAron, wabasikelela, wehla emnikelweni wesono, nakumbingelelo onyukayo, nowombulelo."
Leviticus9:23 Bangena ooMoses noAron ententeni yokuhlangana, baphuma babasikelela abantu, babonakala ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova kubo bonke abantu."
Leviticus9:24 Kwaphuma umlilo phambi koYehova, walidla idini elinyukayo, nenqatha, phezu kwesibingelelo. Bakubona bonke abantu, baduma, bawa ngobuso."
Leviticus10:1 Bathabatha ooNadabhi noAbhihu, oonyana baka-Aron, bathabatha enye kuzo ugcedevu lwakhe, babeka umlilo kuwo, babeka isiqhumiso phezu kwawo, bazisa umlilo ongesesikweni phambi koYehova, angabawiselanga mthetho ngawo."
Leviticus10:2 Kwaphuma umlilo ovela kuYehova, wabatshisa, bafa phambi koYehova."
Leviticus10:3 Wathi uMoses kuAron, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ndozingcwalisela abasondela kum, ndizukiseke phambi kwabantu bonke. Wathi tu uAron."
Leviticus10:4 uMoses wabiza uMishayeli noElishafane, oonyana bakaUziyeli, uyisekazi ka-Aron, wathi kubo, Sondelani, nibakhuphele phandle abazalwana benu eminqubeni phambi kwengcwele."
Leviticus10:5 Basondela ke, babathwalela ngaphandle kweminquba, beneengubo zabo; njengoko watshoyo uMoses."
Leviticus10:6 Wathi uMoses kuAron nakoonyana bakhe uElazare noItamare, Musani ukuzigqubuthela entloko, ningazikrazuli iingubo zenu; ukuze ningafi, bungabi nalo lonke uhlanga; kodwa mabalile bonke aba bazalwana bendlu kaSirayeli ngenxa yomlilo awutshisileyo uYehova."
Leviticus10:7 Ize ningaphumi ngomnyango wentente yokuhlangana, hleze nife; ngokuba ubugwenxa bukaYehova buphezu kwakho. Benza ke ngokwelizwi likaMoses."
Leviticus10:8 Wathetha uYehova kuAron, esithi:"
Leviticus10:9 Musa ukusela wayini nasiselo sinxilisayo, wena noonyana bakho abakunye nawe, ekungeneni kwenu ententeni yokuhlangana, ukuze ningafi; ibe ngumyalelo ongunaphakade ezizukulwaneni zenu;"
Leviticus10:10 ukuze nikwazi ukwahlula ongcwele kokuyinqambi, nakoyinqambi kohlambulukileyo;"
Leviticus10:11 ukuze bayalwe oonyana bakaSirayeli yonke imithetho awabawiselayo uYehova ngenkonzo kaMoses.
Leviticus10:12 Wathi uMoses kuAron, nakuElazare, nakuItamare, oonyana bakhe abaseleyo, Thabathani umnikelo oseleyo ekudleni kwasemlilweni kukaYehova, niwudle ungenagwele esibingelelweni; ngokuba uyingcwele kakhulu;"
Leviticus10:13 Nizidle endaweni engcwele, kuba zezakho noonyana bakho, ekudleni kwasemlilweni kukaYehova; ngokuba ndifundisiwe."
Leviticus10:14 Zidle ibele elishukumayo, negxalaba elishukumayo endaweni ehlambulukileyo; wena noonyana bakho, neentombi zakho, nawe; ngokuba yeyakho neyoonyana bakho, ekuyibingelelweni imibingelelo yombulelo yoonyana bakaSirayeli."
Leviticus10:15 Umlenze ophakanyiswayo netyeya etshangatshangiswayo yoziswa ndawonye nomnikelo otshiswayo wamanqatha ukuze zitshangatshangiswe zibe ngumnikelo otshangatshangiswayo phambi koYehova; ibe yeyakho noonyana bakho kude kuse ephakadeni; njengoko uYehova wawisayo umthetho.
Leviticus10:16 Wayikhangela uMoses itakane lebhokhwe, wabona ukuba litshisiwe, wavutha ngumsindo kuElazare noItamare, oonyana baka-Aron abaseleyo, wathi,"
Leviticus10:17 Kutheni na ningawudlanga umnikelo wesono kwindawo engcwele, ekubeni uyeyona nto ingcwele, waza uThixo waninika wona ukuba nithwale ububi bebandla, ukuze nilicamagushele phambi koYehova?"
Leviticus10:18 Yabona, igazi lawo aliziswanga engcweleni;"
Leviticus10:19 Wathi uAron kuMoses, Yabona, namhlanje besondeze idini labo lesono, nedini labo elinyukayo phambi koYehova; zandihlela ezo zinto; yaye ukuba bendiwudlile umnikelo wesono namhlanje, ngaba ngekukholekile na emehlweni kaYehova?"
Leviticus10:20 Akuyiva uMoses loo nto, waneliseka;"
Leviticus11:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses nakuAron, wathi kubo,"
Leviticus11:2 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi, Zizo ezi izinto ezizitho zine eninokuzidla phakathi kwezinto zonke eziphilileyo zehlabathi."
Leviticus11:3 Yonke into ethiwe gqiphu uphuphu, neyahlukene iinyawo, nebetha phakathi kwezilwanyana, nozidla zona."
Leviticus11:4 Kwezibetha uphuphu, nakwezithiwe gqiphu uphuphu, musani ukuyidla; njengenkamela, ngokuba ibetha, kodwa ayiluthe gqiphu uphuphu; akuzihlambulukanga kuwe;"
Leviticus11:5 nentsika, ngokuba ihlaba, kodwa azikahlulwa izikhonkwane; akuzihlambulukanga kuwe;"
Leviticus11:6 Nomvundla, ngokuba ubetha, kodwa iinzipho azahlukanga; akuzihlambulukanga kuwe;"
Leviticus11:7 neehagu, nakuba zicandeke kabini, zabe zithe gqiphu uphuphu, azilawuli; akuzihlambulukanga kuwe;"
Leviticus11:8 Ize ningayidli inyama yazo, ningazichukumisi izidumbu zazo; azihlambulukanga kuni."
Leviticus11:9 Nozidla ezintweni zonke ezisemanzini: Zonke izinto ezinamaphiko namaxolo emanzini, elwandle nasemilanjeni, nozidla."
Leviticus11:10 Yaye yonk’ into engenamaphiko namaxolo elwandle nasemilanjeni, kuyo yonke into enyakazelayo emanzini nayo yonke into ephilayo esemanzini, iya kukrazulwa kuwe."
Leviticus11:11 Yoba lisikizi kuni; nize ningayidli inyama yazo, nesidumbu sazo soba lisikizi kuni."
Leviticus11:12 Yonke into engenamaphiko namaxolo emanzini yoba nezothe kuni.
Leviticus11:13 Zezo ezintakeni niya kuba lisikizi; mazingadliwa, ngamasikizi: lixhalanga, nentaka, nentaka;"
Leviticus11:14 nexhalanga ngohlobo lwazo;
Leviticus11:15 nehlungulu lonke ngohlobo lwalo;
Leviticus11:16 nenciniba, nenqu, nenqu, nenquba ngohlobo lwazo;"
Leviticus11:17 nesikhova, nesikhova, nesikhova;"
Leviticus11:18 nokhetshe, nexhalanga, nexhalanga;"
Leviticus11:19 nengabangaba ngohlobo lwayo, nengabangaba, nengabangaba."
Leviticus11:20 Zonke iintaka ezirhubuluzayo nezinemilenze emine yoba nezothe kuni.
Leviticus11:21 Kodwa ungadla kuzo zonke izinambuzane ezihamba ngemilenze emine, ezineenyawo ezinyaweni zazo zokutsiba nazo emhlabeni;"
Leviticus11:22 Ungazidla nawe; iinkumbi ngohlobo lwazo, iinkumbi ngohlobo lwazo, iinkumbi ngohlobo lwazo, neenkumbi ngohlobo lwazo."
Leviticus11:23 Zonke ezinye izidalwa eziphaphazelayo, ezinemilenze yomine, zoba nezothe kuni."
Leviticus11:24 Ngako oko noba ziinqambi; bonke abachukumisa ingubo yakhe boba ziinqambi, bahlwise."
Leviticus11:25 Nabani na othe wathabatha esidumbini sazo, wozihlamba iingubo zakhe, abe ngongahlambulukanga kude kuhlwe."
Leviticus11:26 Zonke izidumbu eziluthe gqiphu uphuphu, ukulucanda kubini, zingaboli, ziziinqambi kuni; nabani na oyichukumisayo woba yinqambi."
Leviticus11:27 Yonke into ehamba ngeenyawo zayo, ezintweni zonke ezizitho zine, yoba ziinqambi kuni; osichukumisayo isidumbu sazo woba yinqambi, ahlwise."
Leviticus11:28 Lowo uyithwalayo, wozihlamba iingubo zakhe, abe yinqambi, ahlwise; azihlambulukanga kuni."
Leviticus11:29 Nazo ezo zoba ziinqambi kuni enyakanyakeni enyakazelayo emhlabeni; impuku, impuku, nehobe ngohlobo lwazo;"
Leviticus11:30 intaka, nexhalanga, necilishe, necilishe, nesele."
Leviticus11:31 Yoba lisikizi kuni ezinambuzaneni zonke; bonke abayichukumisayo into efileyo kuyo, woba yinqambi, bahlwise."
Leviticus11:32 Yonke into ethe yawelwa enye kuzo ekufeni, yoba yinqambi; nokuba yimpahla yomthi, nokuba yingubo, nokuba yimpahla, nokuba yisikhumba, nokuba yingxowa, yonke into ekusetyenzwa ngayo, yaphoswa emanzini, ibe yinqambi, ihlwise; ngoko iya kuhlanjululwa."
Leviticus11:33 Limpahla zonke zomdongwe, ethe yeyela kuzo enye kuzo, zoba ziinqambi zonke izinto eziphakathi kwazo; kwaye uya kuyiqhekeza."
Leviticus11:34 Yonke inyama edliwa phezu kwamanzi anjalo yoba yinqambi; newayini yonke engaseselwa kweso sitya, yoba yinqambi."
Leviticus11:35 Yonke into ethe yawelwa ngumgibe wabo, yoba yinqambi; nokuba liziko, nokuba ziimbiza, zoqhekezwa, ngokuba azihlambulukanga kuni, yoba ziinqambi kuni."
Leviticus11:36 Kodwa iqula, nequla elinamanzi amaninzi, lohlambuluka; bonke abasichukumisayo isidumbu sazo woba yinqambi."
Leviticus11:37 Xa kuthe kwawa nandawoni yesidumbu sazo embewini yonke eza kuhlwayelwa, yohlambuluka yona."
Leviticus11:38 Kodwa xa imbewu igalelwe emanzini, kwawa nantoni na efileyo phezu kwayo, yoba yinqambi kuni."
Leviticus11:39 Ukuba kuthe kwafa nto izitho zine enisukuba nisidla, yiyo edliwayo; osichukumisayo isidumbu saso woba yinqambi, ahlwise."
Leviticus11:40 Lowo uyidlayo inyama yesidumbu sayo, wozihlamba iingubo zakhe, abe yinqambi, ahlwise; lowo uwuthwalayo, wozihlamba iingubo zakhe, abe yinqambi, ahlwise."
Leviticus11:41 Yonke into enyakazelayo emhlabeni yoba ngamasikizi; mayingadliwa.
Leviticus11:42 Yonke into enambuzelayo ngesisu sayo, nayo yonke into ehamba ngemilenze emine, okanye nantoni na enemilenze emininzi phakathi kwezinambuzane zonke ezisehlabathini, ize ningazidli; ngokuba lisikizi."
Leviticus11:43 Musani ukuyenza imiphefumlo yenu ibe nezothe ngenyakanyaka yonke, ningazenzi iinqambi ngayo, nizenze iinqambi ngayo."
Leviticus11:44 Kuba ndiyiNkosi uThixo wenu; ke ngoko, kufuneka nibe ngcwele, nibe ngcwele; ngokuba ndingcwele mna; musani ukuzenza iinqambi ngenyakanyaka yonke enyakazelayo emhlabeni."
Leviticus11:45 Ngokuba ndinguYehova onikhuphileyo ezweni laseYiputa, ukuba ndibe nguThixo wenu; ke ngoko, kufuneka nibe ngcwele, ngokuba ndingcwele mna."
Leviticus11:46 Nguwo lo umyalelo weento ezizitho zine, neentaka, neento zonke eziphilileyo ezinambuzelayo emanzini, nezinambuzane zonke ezinambuzelayo emhlabeni:"
Leviticus11:47 woyahlula into eyinqambi nehlambulukileyo, nento ezitho zine edliwayo nengadliwayo."
Leviticus12:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Leviticus12:2 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi, Umfazi, xa athe wathabatha, wazala indoda, woba yinqambi imihla esixhenxe; njengemihla yokuhlanjululwa kwesigulo sakhe woba yinqambi."
Leviticus12:3 Ngomhla wesibhozo uya kwaluswa ijwabi.
Leviticus12:4 Wohlala egazini lokuhlanjululwa kwakhe iintsuku ezimashumi mathathu anantathu; angachukumisi nanye ingcwele, angangeni engcweleni, zide zizaliseke iintsuku zokuhlanjululwa kwakhe."
Leviticus12:5 Ke ukuba uthe wazala intombi, woba yinqambi iiveki ezimbini, njengokuqhawula kwakhe umtshato; ahlale egazini lokuhlanjululwa kwakhe iintsuku ezimashumi mathandathu anesithandathu."
Leviticus12:6 Ekupheleni kweentsuku zokuhlanjululwa kwakhe, ngenxa yonyana nokuba yentombi, wozisa imvana emnyaka mnye, ibe lidini elinyukayo, nehobe, nokuba lihobe, libe lidini lesono emnyango, lithabathele ententeni yokuhlangana, liye kumbingeleli;"
Leviticus12:7 uyisondeze phambi koYehova, umcamagushele; alihlambe ithombo legazi lakhe. Nguwo lowo umthetho ngomntwana oyinkwenkwe okanye oyinkazana."
Leviticus12:8 Ukuba ke akanako ukuzisa imvana, wozisa amahobe amabini, nokuba ngamahobe amabini; elinye libe leledini elinyukayo, elinye libe leledini lesono; aze umbingeleli amcamagushele, aze azisulungekise."
Leviticus13:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses nakuAron, esithi,"
Leviticus13:2 Umntu xa kuthe kwakho eluswini lwenyama yakhe itshatshazi, nokuba litshatshazi, nokuba litshatshazi, libonakala linjengeqhenqa eluswini lwenyama yakhe; woziswa kuAron umbingeleli, nakomnye woonyana bakhe, ababingeleli."
Leviticus13:3 Akukhangele umbingeleli ukufa eluswini lwenyama; ukuba iinwele zomfi zithe zaba mhlophe, waza umfi wabonakala emhlophe kunolusu lwenyama yakhe: liqhenqa ke elo; umbingeleli amkhangele, athi uhlambulukile."
Leviticus13:4 Xa kuthe kwakho itshatshazi eluswini lwenyama yayo, alabunanga eluswini, alwasuka lwaba mhlophe unwele lwalo; umbingeleli womvalela onesi sifo iintsuku ezisixhenxe."
Leviticus13:5 Wothi ke umbingeleli amkhangele ngomhla wesixhenxe, akhangele ukuba isibetho siphelile emehlweni akhe, asinwenwanga eluswini isibetho; aphinde umbingeleli amvalele imihla esixhenxe;"
Leviticus13:6 abuye ambone umbingeleli ngomhla wesixhenxe; isibetho asiqhenqethanga eluswini, umbingeleli wothi uhlambulukile; ndimhlophe kuphela; anxibe iingubo zakhe, ahlambuluke."
Leviticus13:7 Ukuba ukujaduka kuqhenqethile eluswini, emva kokubonakala kwakhe kumbingeleli ngenxa yokuhlanjululwa kwakhe, wophinda abonakale kumbingeleli;"
Leviticus13:8 umbingeleli uthe, akuba liqhenqethile eluswini, umbingeleli wothi uyinqambi; liqhenqa."
Leviticus13:9 Ukuba lithe labakho emntwini iqhenqa, woziswa kumbingeleli;"
Leviticus13:10 umbingeleli amkhangele, O! ukujaduka kumhlophe eluswini, unwele lusuke lwamhlophe, kukho inyama ephilileyo elukhweni;"
Leviticus13:11 liqhenqa elidala eli elùswini lwenyama yakhe, umbingeleli wovakalisa ukuba uyinqambi, angamvaleli entolongweni, ngokuba akahlambulukanga."
Leviticus13:12 Ukuba lithe labonakala iqhenqa eluswini, lasuka iqhenqa lalugubungela lonke ulusu lomntu onesibetho, lithabathela entloko lesa ezinyaweni, apho akhangele umbingeleli;"
Leviticus13:13 akhangele umbingeleli, O! ukuba iqhenqa liwugubungele wonke umzimba wakhe, wovakalisa ukuba uhlambulukile onesibetho; yonke into yaba mhlophe; uhlambulukile."
Leviticus13:14 Ke ukuba kuthe kwabonakala kuye inyama ekrwada, yoba yinqambi."
Leviticus13:15 Woyikhangela umbingeleli inyama ekrwada, athi ayihlambulukile; ngokuba inyama ephekiweyo iyinqambi: liqhenqa ke elo."
Leviticus13:16 Naxa ithe yabuya inyama ekrwada, yasuka yaba mhlophe, woza kumbingeleli;"
Leviticus13:17 umbingeleli amkhangele, O! wothi umbingeleli uhlambulukile onesibetho; uhlambulukile."
Leviticus13:18 Ke inyama eyayinesilonda eluswini lwayo, yaphiliswa;"
Leviticus13:19 endaweni yesilonda kwabakho itshatshazi elimhlophe, nokuba litshatshazi, elimhlophe elifuna ukuba yingqombela, woboniswa umbingeleli;"
Leviticus13:20 akubona umbingeleli, O! utyekile kunolusu, neenwele zakho zimhlophe; umbingeleli wothi akahlambulukile; liqhenqa elisuka ethumbeni."
Leviticus13:21 Ukuba umbingeleli uthe wakubona, wakhangela, akukho lunwele lumhlophe kuwe, aligqubuthele eluswini, lisuke laburhalarhuqa; Umbingeleli womvalela imihla esixhenxe."
Leviticus13:22 Ke ukuba liselithe elùswini, umbingeleli wothi uyinqambi; ngubhubhani."
Leviticus13:23 Ke ukuba itshatshazi lithe lema endaweni yalo, alaphilisa: sisibetho esitshisayo eso; aze umbingeleli athi uhlambulukile."
Leviticus13:24 Xa kuthe kwakho eluswini lwenyama, kwabakho itshatshazi, kwabakho itshatshazi elimhlophe elibomvu, nokuba limhlophe;"
Leviticus13:25 wokukhangela umbingeleli, O! lusuke lwaba mhlophe unwele olusebunzi, libonakala limhlophe eluswini; liqhenqa lomlilo; wothi umbingeleli akahlambulukile; liqhenqa ke elo."
Leviticus13:26 Wabona umbingeleli, O! akukho lunwele lumhlophe ekreleni, lingagqubuthelenga ulusu, lisuke lamnyama; Umbingeleli womvalela imihla esixhenxe."
Leviticus13:27 Umbingeleli womkhangela ngomhla wesixhenxe; umbingeleli wothi uyinqambi; liqhenqa ke elo.
Leviticus13:28 Ukuba itshatshazi lithe lema endaweni yalo, alaqhenqetha eluswini, lisuke labuna: yimfumba yomlilo leyo, aze umbingeleli athi ihlambulukile, ngokuba kukudla komlilo oko."
Leviticus13:29 Xa kuthe kwakho isibetho kwindoda nenkazana entloko, nokuba kusesilevini;"
Leviticus13:30 umbingeleli akukhangele ukufa, O! kukho iinwele ezicekethekileyo ezimthubi; wovakalisa umbingeleli ukuba akahlambulukile: litshatshazi elimhlophe elomileyo, liqhenqa entloko, nokuba kusesilevini eso."
Leviticus13:31 Wasibona umbingeleli isibetho sokujaduka, wasikhangela, ukuba lithe gangqa eluswini ukubonakala kwalo, kungekho lunwele lumnyama kuso; umbingeleli amvalele imihla esixhenxe onendawo edlathukileyo;"
