Numbers2:3 Ngasempumalanga, ngasekuphumeni kwelanga, bozimisa iibhanile zeminquba yakwaYuda, ngokwemikhosi yabo; yaye uNashon, unyana ka-Aminadabhi, uya kuba yinganga yoonyana bakaYuda."
Numbers2:4 Umkhosi wakhe nabakhonzi bakhe baba lishumi elinesine lamawaka, anamakhulu mathandathu."
Numbers2:5 Abomisa ngakuye sisizwe sakwaIsakare; yaye uNataniyeli unyana kaTsuhare uya kuba yinkokeli yoonyana bakaIsakare;
Numbers2:6 umkhosi wakhe, nababalwáyo kubo, ngamashumi omahlanu anesine amawaka, anamakhulu mane."
Numbers2:7 Indlu yakwaZebhulon noEliyabhi, unyana kaHelon, ngukumkani woonyana bakaZebhulon;"
Numbers2:8 umkhosi wakhe, nababalwáyo kubo, ngamashumi omahlanu anesixhenxe amawaka, anamakhulu mane."
Numbers2:9 Bonke ke ababalelwa eminqubeni yakwaYuda likhulu elinamanci asibhozo anesithandathu samawaka, ngokwemikhosi yabo. Oku kuya kucaciswa kuqala."
Numbers2:10 Ngecala lasezantsi kwakukho ibhanile yendlu kaRubhen ngokwemikhosi yabo; Inkulu yoonyana bakaRubhen nguElitsure, unyana kaTedure;"
Numbers2:11 umkhosi wakhe, nababalwáyo kubo, ngamashumi omané anesithandathu samawaka, anamakhulu mahlanu."
Numbers2:12 Abomisa ngakuye yoba sisizwe sakwaSimon; Inkulu yoonyana bakaSimon nguShelumiyeli, unyana kaTsurishadayi;"
Numbers2:13 umkhosi wakhe, nabo babalwayo kuye, ngamashumi omahlanu anesithoba amawaka, anamakhulu mathathu."
Numbers2:14 Isizwe sakwaGadi; yaye uEliyasafu unyana kaRehuweli uya kuba yinkokeli yoonyana bakaGadi;
Numbers2:15 umkhosi wakhe, nabo bábhalwayo kuye, ngamashumi omane anesihlanu amawaka, anamakhulu mathandathu, anamanci mahlanu."
Numbers2:16 Bonke ke ababalelwa eminqubeni yakwaRubhen likhulu, elinamanci mahlanu amawaka, anawakanye, linamakhulu mane, anamanci mahlanu, ngokwemikhosi yabo. Kwaye baya kuthatha inyathelo kwinqanaba lesibini."
Numbers2:17 Yenyuka intente yokuhlangana ndawonye nomkhosi wabaLevi, phakathi kweminquba; njengoko bemisa iintente zabo, bonyuka ngokunjalo, elowo endaweni yakhe ngokwebhanile yakhe."
Numbers2:18 Ibhanile yeminquba yakwaEfrayim yayingasentshonalanga, ngokwamaqela abo; ukumkani woonyana bakaEfrayim nguElishama, unyana ka-Amihudi."
Numbers2:19 Umkhosi wakhe, abo babalwayo kubo, ngamashumi omane amawaka, anamakhulu mahlanu."
Numbers2:20 Kwaye kuya kubakho naye isizwe sakwaManase; Inkulu yoonyana bakaManase nguGamiyeli, unyana kaPedasure;"
Numbers2:21 Umkhosi wakhe, nabo babalwayo kuye, ngamashumi omathathu anesibini amawaka, anamakhulu mabini."
Numbers2:22 Ize kulandele isizwe sakwaBhenjamin; yaye uAbhidan, unyana kaGidiyon, uya kuba yinganga yoonyana bakaBhenjamin."
Numbers2:23 Umkhosi wakhe, nabo babalwayo kubo, ngamashumi omathathu anesihlanu amawaka, anamakhulu mane."
Numbers2:24 Bonke ke ababalelwa eminqubeni yakwaEfrayim likhulu elinamanci asibhozo ananye lamawaka, ngokwemikhosi yabo. Kwaye baya kunyuka ukuya kwinqanaba lesithathu."
Numbers2:25 Ibhanile yendlu yakwaDan iya ngasentla, ngokwemikhosi yabo; yaye uAhiyezere unyana ka-Amishadayi uya kuba yinjengele yoonyana bakaDan."
Numbers2:26 Umkhosi wakhe nababhaliswayo kuwo ngamashumi omathandathu anesibini amawaka, anamakhulu asixhenxe."
Numbers2:27 Abo bamisa naye yoba sisizwe sakwa-Ashere; Inkulu yoonyana baka-Ashere nguPagiyeli, unyana kaOkran;"
Numbers2:28 Umkhosi wakhe nababhaliswayo kuwo ngamashumi omane amawaka, anawaka-nye, anamakhulu mahlanu."
Numbers2:29 Nesizwe sakwaNafetali; yaye uAhira, unyana kaEnan, uya kuba yinganga yoonyana bakaNafetali;"
Numbers2:30 umkhosi wakhe, nababuthiweyo bawo, ngamashumi omahlanu anesithathu samawaka, anamakhulu mane."
Numbers2:31 Bonke ke ababalelwa eminqubeni yakwaDan likhulu elinamanci mahlanu anesixhenxe amawaka, anamakhulu mathandathu. Baya kubuyela emva kwimilinganiselo yabo."
Numbers2:32 Ngabo ke aba babalwayo koonyana bakaSirayeli, ngokwezindlu zooyise; bonke ababalelwa eminqubeni ngokwemikhosi yabo ngamakhulu omathandathu anesithathu samawaka, anamakhulu mahlanu, anamanci mahlanu."
Numbers2:33 Ke abaLevi ababalelwanga phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses.
Numbers2:34 Benza oonyana bakaSirayeli kanye njengoko uYehova wamyalelayo uMoses, bayimisa inkampu ngokwendwe yabo, bahamba ke, ngamnye neentsapho zabo nezindlu zooyise."
Numbers3:1 Ngabo aba oonyana baka-Aron noMoses, mini wathetha uYehova kuMoses entabeni yaseSinayi."
Numbers3:2 Ngawo la amagama oonyana baka-Aron; Owamazibulo nguNadabhi, noAbhihu, noElazare, noItamare."
Numbers3:3 Ngawo lawo amagama oonyana baka-Aron, ababingeleli abathanjisiweyo, awabamiselayo ukuba babe ngababingeleli."
Numbers3:4 Bafa ooNadabhi noAbhihu phambi koYehova ekusoseni kwabo umlilo ongesesikweni phambi koYehova, entlango yaseSinayi; yaye uEleyazare noItamare baba ngababingeleli emehlweni ka-Aron uyise."
Numbers3:5 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers3:6 Sisondeze isizwe sakwaLevi, usimise phambi koAron umbingeleli, ukuba balungiselele kuye."
Numbers3:7 Bawugcina umsebenzi wakhe, nenkonzo yebandla lonke phambi kwentente yokuhlangana, ukuba basebenze umsebenzi wentente;"
Numbers3:8 uzigcine zonke iimpahla zentente yokuhlangana, nenkonzo yoonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuba bawufeze umsebenzi wenkonzo yentente;"
Numbers3:9 AbaLevi wabanikela uAron noonyana bakhe; zanikwa yena phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli.
Numbers3:10 Uze unyule uAron noonyana bakhe, babe ngababingeleli; yaye umxube osondelayo mawubulawe."
Numbers3:11 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers3:12 Yabona, ndathabatha abaLevi phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli esikhundleni samazibulo onke avula isizalo phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli; ke ngoko, abaLevi baya kuba ngabam;"
Numbers3:13 Ngokuba onke amazibulo ngawam; Ekubaxabeleni kwam onke amazibulo ezweni laseYiputa, ndawanyula onke amazibulo kwaSirayeli, ethabathela emntwini esa enkomeni; yoba yeyam: ndinguYehova."
Numbers3:14 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses entlango yaseSinayi, esithi,"
Numbers3:15 Babale oonyana bakaLevi ngokwemizalwane yabo, ngokweenzala zabo;"
Numbers3:16 Wawabala ke uMoses ngokomlomo kaYehova, njengoko wamwiselayo umthetho."
Numbers3:17 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaLevi ngokwamagama abo; uGershon noKehati noMerari.
Numbers3:18 Ngawo lawo amagama oonyana bakaGershon ngokwemizalwane yabo; uLibheni noShimehi.
Numbers3:19 Oonyana bakaKehati ngokwemizalwane yabo; nguAmram noIsakare, nguHebron noUziyeli."
Numbers3:20 Oonyana bakaMerari ngokwemizalwane yabo; uMahli kunye noMusi. Yiyo leyo imizalwane yabaLevi, ngokwezindlu zabo."
Numbers3:21 KwaGershon kwakukho intsapho yakwaLibhene nentsapho kaBhashim; Yiyo le ke inzala yamaGershon.
Numbers3:22 Ababhaliswayo ngenani lawo, yonke into eyindoda, ethabathela kunyana onyanga-nye inyuse: ngamawaka asixhenxe, anamakhulu mahlanu."
Numbers3:23 Imizalwane yakwaGershon yayimise intente ngasemva komnquba ngasentshonalanga.
Numbers3:24 Inkulu yendlu yooyise kaGershon nguEliyasafu, unyana kaLayeli."
Numbers3:25 Inkonzo yoonyana bakaGershon ententeni yokuhlangana yoba ngumnquba, nentente, nesigubungelo sayo, nesisitheliso esisingisele emnyango wentente yokuhlangana;"
Numbers3:26 namalengalenga entendelezo, nesisitheliso somnyango wentendelezo, ephambi komnquba, phambi kwesibingelelo, nezintya zayo zomsebenzi wawo wonke."
Numbers3:27 KwaKehati kwakukho intsapho yama-Amram nentsapho yamaIshhare nendlu yamaHebhere nentsapho yamaBhawusi; yiyo leyo imizalwane yamaHeti.
Numbers3:28 Ngenani, into yonke eyindoda, ethabathela kunyana onyanga-nye inyuse, ngamawaka osibhozo, anamakhulu mathandathu, abephethe inkonzo yengcwele."
Numbers3:29 Imizalwane yoonyana bakaKehati yomisa intente ngecala lomnquba elingasezantsi;
Numbers3:30 Inkulu yendlu yooyise ngokwemizalwane yamaHeti nguElishafan, unyana kaUziyeli;"
Numbers3:31 Umsebenzi wabo yityeya, netafile, nesiphatho sezibane, nezibingelelo, neempahla zengcwele abalungiselela ngazo, nesisitheliso, nomsebenzi wawo wonke."
Numbers3:32 Inkulu yezikhulu zakwaLevi nguElazare, unyana wombingeleli uAron, abavelele abagcina inkonzo yengcwele."
Numbers3:33 KwaMerari kwakukho intsapho yakwaMagali nentsapho yakwaMushi; Yiyo leyo imizalwane yakwaMerari.
Numbers3:34 Ababhaliswayo ngenani lawo, yonke into eyindoda, ethabathela kunyana onyanga-nye ukuya phezulu, baba ngamawaka amathandathu, anamakhulu mabini."
Numbers3:35 Inkulu yendlu yooyise ngokwemizalwane yakwaMerari nguSuriyeli, unyana ka-Abhihayili; yomisa iintente ngecala lomnquba elingasentla."
Numbers3:36 Ngaphantsi kwesandla soonyana bakaMerari, babenyamekela iintsika zomnquba nemiqadi yawo, neentsika zawo, nezihlalo zawo, nemisebenzi yawo yonke, nemisebenzi yawo yonke,"
Numbers3:37 neentsika zentendelezo ngeenxa zonke, neziseko zazo, nezikhonkwane zazo, nezintya zazo."
Numbers3:38 Abomisa iintente phambi komnquba ngasempumalanga, phambi kwentente yokuhlangana, nguMoses, noAron, noonyana bakhe, abaphethe umsebenzi wengcwele, enkonzweni yoonyana kwaSirayeli; yaye umxube osondelayo mawubulawe."
Numbers3:39 Bonke ke abaLevi ababalwayo, ababalwayo nguMoses noAron ngokomlomo kaYehova, ngokweenzala zabo, yonke into eyindoda, ethabathela kunyana onyanga-nye inyuse, baba ngamashumi amabini amawaka anesibini."
Numbers3:40 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Wabale onke amazibulo ento eyindoda koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthabathele konyanga-nye unyuse, ubhale inani lamagama awo."
Numbers3:41 Thabatha abaLevi: ndinguYehova, esikhundleni samazibulo onke phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli; neenkomo zabaLevi esikhundleni samazibulo onke eenkomo zoonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers3:42 Wawabhala ke uMoses onke amazibulo phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho."
Numbers3:43 Onke amazibulo ento eyindoda ngenani lamagama, ethabathela kunyana onyanga-nye anyuse, ababalwayo kubo baba ngamashumi amabini anamabini amawaka, anamakhulu mabini, anamanci mathandathu anesithathu."
Numbers3:44 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers3:45 Thabatha abaLevi esikhundleni samazibulo onke oonyana bakaSirayeli, nemfuyo yabaLevi esikhundleni semfuyo yabo; babe ngabam abaLevi. NdinguYehova."
Numbers3:46 Kumazibulo oonyana bakaSirayeli kukho amakhulu amabini, anamanci mathandathu anabathathu, angaphezu kwamakhulu amabini, anamanci mathandathu anabathathu abaLevi;"
Numbers3:47 Thabatha iishekele zibe ntlanu ngokweshekele yengcwele; (ishekele iziigera ezingamashumi amabini)
Numbers3:48 Wayinika loo mali yokukhululwa ngentlawulelo inani elithe lise, kuAron nakoonyana bakhe;"
Numbers3:49 Wayithabatha ke uMoses loo mali yokukhululwa kwabo bakhululwa ngokumiselwa ngabaLevi.
Numbers3:50 Wathabatha imali kumazibulo oonyana bakaSirayeli; iliwaka elinamakhulu amathathu, anamanci mathandathu anantlanu, ngokweshekele yengcwele;"
Numbers3:51 uMoses wayinika uAron noonyana bakhe imali leyo yentlawulelo, ngokomlomo kaYehova, njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Numbers4:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses nakuAron, esithi,"
Numbers4:2 Babale oonyana bakaKehati koonyana bakaLevi, ngokwezindlu zabo, ngokwezindlu zooyise,"
Numbers4:3 bethabathela kominyaka imashumi mathathu ezelwe, banyuse, base kominyaka imashumi mahlanu ezelwe, bonke abeza umkhosi ukuba basebenze ententeni yokuhlangana."
Numbers4:4 Nguwo lowo umsebenzi woonyana bakaKehati ententeni yokuhlangana, ezintweni eziyingcwele kanye."
Numbers4:5 Ekundulukeni kweminquba, beze ooAron noonyana bakhe, basithabathe isigqubuthelo, bayisithelise ityeya yesingqino ngaso."
Numbers4:6 Ubeke phezu kwayo isigubungelo sezikhumba zamahlengezi, wande phezu kwayo ilaphu elimfusa, ufake nezibonda zayo."
Numbers4:7 Etafileni yezonka zokubonisa, bendlala ilaphu elimfusa, babeka izitya, neenkamba, neenkamba, neendebe, phezu kwayo; nesonka sam semihla ngemihla sifanele sibe kuso."
Numbers4:8 Batwabulula phezu kwaso ngelaphu elibomvu, basigubungele ngesigqubuthelo sezikhumba zamahlengezi, bafake nezibonda zaso."
Numbers4:9 Bathabatha ilaphu elimfusa baze bagubungele isiphatho sezibane izibane zaso izibane zaso neempahla zaso neempahla zaso zomlilo neempahla zaso zonke zeoli abalungiselela ngazo.
Numbers4:10 Basibeka ndawonye nempahla yaso yonke esigqumeni sezintsu zeebhokhwe, basixhoma esibondeni."
Numbers4:11 Batwabulula ilaphu elimfusa phezu kwesibingelelo segolide, basigquma ngesigqubuthelo sezikhumba zamahlengezi, basixhoma kwizibonda zaso."
Numbers4:12 Bamele bathabathe zonke izixhobo zenkonzo abakhonza ngazo endaweni engcwele, bazifake elaphu elimfusa, bagqume ngesigqubuthelo sesikhumba esitywiniweyo, bazibeke esibondeni."
Numbers4:13 Thabatha uthuthu lwesibingelelo, wandlala ilaphu elimfusa phezu kwaso."
Numbers4:14 Bazibeka zonke iimpahla zakhe abalungiselela phezu kwazo, iingcedevu, neembombo zenyama, nemihlakulwana, nezitya zokutshiza, zonke iimpahla zesibingelelo; baza batwabulula phezu kwaso isigqubuthelo sezikhumba zeentini baza basifaka kwizibonda zaso."
Numbers4:15 Emveni kokuba uAron noonyana bakhe begqibile ukuyigubungela ingcwele nempahla yonke yengcwele ekunyukeni kwabo eminqubeni; Emveni koko boza oonyana bakaKehati, bayithwale; yaye abazange bachukumise nantoni na engcwele, ukuze bangafi. Ezo zinto ngumthwalo woonyana bakaKehati ententeni yokuhlangana."
Numbers4:16 Ke wona umsebenzi kaElazare, unyana ka-Aron umbingeleli, yayiyioli yesiphatho sesibane, nesiqhumiso, nomnikelo wemini le, neoli yokuthambisa, nokumisa umnquba wonke, nezinto zonke ezikuwo ingcwele nempahla yayo."
Numbers4:17 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses nakuAron, esithi,"
Numbers4:18 Musani ukuyitshabalalisa imizalwane yoonyana bakaKehati kubaLevi.
Numbers4:19 Yenzani wena kubo, ukuze baphile, bangafi ekusondeleni kwabo kwezona zinto zingcwele: uAron noonyana bakhe bangene, balungiselele elowo nomthwalo wakhe."
Numbers4:20 Kodwa uze ungangeni kubo ugutyungelwe izinto ezingcwele, hleze bafe."
Numbers4:21 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers4:22 Babale oonyana bakaGershon ngokwemizalwane yabo, ngokweenzala zabo;"
Numbers4:23 bethabathela kominyaka imashumi mathathu ezelwe, banyuse, base kominyaka imashumi mahlanu ezelwe, babale; bonke abeza kusebenza ententeni yokuhlangana, ukuba basebenze."
Numbers4:24 Nguwo lowo umsebenzi wezizukulwana zoonyana bakaGershon, ekulungiseleleni nasekuthwaleni."
Numbers4:25 Mabawathabathe amalaphu omnquba, nentente yokuhlangana, nesisigubungelo sayo, nesigubungelo sezikhumba eziphezu kwayo, nesigubungelo somnyango wentente yokuhlangana;"
Numbers4:26 namawunduwundu entendelezo, namawunduwundu omnyango wesango lentendelezo, nasententeni, nasesibingelelweni ngeenxa zonke, nezintya zazo, neempahla zazo zonke zenkonzo yazo, neempahla zazo zonke bona: baya kukhonza ke."
Numbers4:27 Wonke umsebenzi woonyana bakaGershon woba ngokomlomo ka-Aron noonyana bakhe, yonke imithwalo yabo, nomsebenzi wabo wonke."
Numbers4:28 Nguwo lowo umsebenzi wenkonzo yezizukulwana zoonyana bakaGershon ententeni yokuhlangana, nomsebenzi wabo woba phantsi kwesandla sikaItamare, unyana ka-Aron umbingeleli."
Numbers4:29 Oonyana bakaMerari bababale ngokwemizalwane yabo, ngokwemizalwane yabo;"
Numbers4:30 bethabathela kominyaka imashumi mathathu ezelwe, banyuse, base kominyaka imashumi mahlanu ezelwe;"
Numbers4:31 Nguwo lowo umsebenzi wempahla yabo, ngokwenkonzo yabo yonke ententeni yokuhlangana; neentsika zomnquba, nemiqadi yawo, neentsika zawo, neentsika zawo;"
Numbers4:32 neentsika zentendelezo ngeenxa zonke, neziseko zazo, nezikhonkwane zazo, nezintya zazo, neempahla zazo zonke, nemisebenzi yazo yonke yenkonzo;"
Numbers4:33 Nguwo lowo umsebenzi wemizalwane yoonyana bakaMerari, ngokomsebenzi wabo wonke ententeni yokuhlangana, esandleni sikaItamare, unyana ka-Aron umbingeleli."
Numbers4:34 uMoses noAron neentloko zebandla bababala oonyana bakaHeti ngokwezindlu zabo, ngokwezindlu zooyise,"
Numbers4:35 bethabathela kominyaka imashumi mathathu ezelwe, banyuse, base kominyaka imashumi mahlanu ezelwe, bonke abeze ententeni yokuhlangana;"
Numbers4:36 Ababhaliswayo ngokweentsapho zabo baba ngamawaka amabini anamakhulu asixhenxe anamashumi mahlanu.
Numbers4:37 Ngawo lawo amagama emizalwane yoonyana bakaKehati, bonke abo basebenza umsebenzi wentente yokuhlangana, awababhalayo uMoses noAron ngokomlomo kaYehova, ngokwenkonzo kaMoses."
Numbers4:38 Ke bona ababhaliswayo koonyana bakaGershon ngokwemizalwane yabo nangokwezindlu zooyise,"
Numbers4:39 bethabathela kominyaka imashumi mathathu ezelwe, banyuse, base kominyaka imashumi mahlanu ezelwe, bonke abeze ententeni yokuhlangana;"
Numbers4:40 ababhaliswayo ngokwezindlu zabo ngokwezindlu zooyise baba ngamawaka amabini, anamakhulu mathandathu, anamanci mathathu."
Numbers4:41 Nali inani lemizalwane yoonyana bakaGershon, yabo bonke abo basebenzayo ententeni yokuhlangana, awababalayo uMoses noAron ngokomlomo kaYehova."
Numbers4:42 Ababhaliweyo ezindlwini zoonyana bakaMerari ngokwezindlu zabo nezindlu zabo;
Numbers4:43 bethabathela kominyaka imashumi mathathu ezelwe, banyuse, base kominyaka imashumi mahlanu ezelwe, bonke abo basebenza ententeni yokuhlangana;"
Numbers4:44 Ababhaliswayo ngokweentsapho zabo baba ngamawaka amathathu anamakhulu mabini.
Numbers4:45 Lilo elo inani lezizukulwana zoonyana bakaMerari, awayibhalayo uMoses noAron ngokomlomo kaYehova, ngenkonzo kaMoses."
Numbers4:46 Bonke ke abaLevi, abababalayo uMoses noAron, nezikhulu zakwaSirayeli ngokwemizalwane yabo, nangezindlu zooyise,"
Numbers4:47 bethabathela kominyaka imashumi mathathu ezelwe, banyuse, besa kominyaka imashumi mahlanu ezelwe, bonke abeza kuphuma umkhosi, ukuba bathwale intente yokuhlangana;"
Numbers4:48 Abo babhalisiweyo baba ngamawaka asibhozo anamakhulu mahlanu anamashumi asibhozo.
Numbers4:49 Babalwa ngokomlomo kaYehova, ngesandla sikaMoses, elowo ngokwenkonzo yakhe, nangokwendyebo yakhe; babala kuye, njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Numbers5:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Numbers5:2 Bawisele umthetho oonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuba babakhuphe eminqubeni onke amadoda aneqhenqa, nabo bonke ababhobhozayo, nabo bonke abaziinqambi ngofileyo;"
Numbers5:3 Indoda nomfazi baya kunigxotha; wabakhupha eminqubeni; ukuze bangazingcolisi iibhedi zabo endihleli kuzo.
Numbers5:4 Benjenjalo ke oonyana bakaSirayeli, babakhuphela phandle kweminquba; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo uMoses umthetho, benjenjalo oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers5:5 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers5:6 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi, Indoda nokuba yinkazana, xa athe wona umntu, wonile kuYehova, ube netyala loo mntu;"
Numbers5:7 Ngoku ke mabasivume isono sabo abasona ngaso; Makahlawule ityala lakhe entlokweni yakhe, ongeze isahlulo sesihlanu sayo kuko oko, ayinike lowo umonileyo."
Numbers5:8 Ukuba indoda leyo ithe ayinamphindezeli wegazi, lophindezelwa ityala elo kuYehova, kumbingeleli; ngenkunzi yemvu yokucamagushela isono, amcamagushele ngayo."
Numbers5:9 Wonke umnikelo wazo zonke izipho ezingcwele zoonyana bakaSirayeli abawuzisa kumbingeleli woba ngowakhe.
Numbers5:10 Elowo ingcwele yakhe yoba yeyakhe; into ubani ayinika umbingeleli, yoba yeyakhe."
Numbers5:11 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers5:12 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi kubo, Xa athe indoda yaphuma umkamntu, yayona;"
Numbers5:13 Indoda leyo yalala naye, yaye oko kufihlakele emehlweni endoda yakhe nommelwane wakhe, waba yinqambi, kwaza kwabakho ubungqina ngakuye, nokuphathwa kakubi kwakhe."
Numbers5:14 Wafikelwa ngumoya wobukhwele, wamkhweletela umkayo, wazenza inqambi; nokuba uthe wafunyanwa ngumoya wobukhwele, wamkhweletela umkayo, angazenzi inqambi;"
Numbers5:15 Indoda leyo mayimzise umkayo kumbingeleli, iwuzise umsondezo wayo, isahlulo seshumi se-efa yomgubo werhasi; angagaleli oli phezu kwawo, angabeki siqhumiso phezu kwawo; ngokuba ingumbingelelo wokucamagusha, umbingelelo wesikhumbuzo okhumbuza ububi."
Numbers5:16 Umbingeleli wosondela kuye aze ammise phambi koYehova.
Numbers5:17 Umbingeleli wothabatha amanzi angcwele ngesitya sodongwe; Umbingeleli woluthabatha uthuli, alubeke emgangathweni wentente, aluphose emanzini."
Numbers5:18 Umbingeleli wombeka umfazi lowo phambi koYehova, agqubuthele intloko yomfazi lowo, awubeke esandleni sakhe umnikelo wesikhumbuzo wobukhwele, abe esandleni sakhe amanzi akrakra esiqalekiso eso;"
Numbers5:19 amfungise umbingeleli, athi kumfazi, Ukuba anithanga walala nawe, ukuba akuthanga wazenza inqambi ngendoda yakho esikhundleni sendoda yakho, woba ukhululekile kula manzi akrakra esiqalekiso.”"
Numbers5:20 Xa uthe waya kwenye esikhundleni sendoda yakho, wazenza inqambi, yalala enye indoda endodeni yakho;"
Numbers5:21 Umbingeleli womfungisa isifungo umfazi lowo, athi umbingeleli kumfazi, uYehova wokwenza isiqalekiso nesifungo phakathi kwabantu bakowenu, ukuba uYehova uthe wenza isinqe sakho, nesisu sakho sagoba."
Numbers5:22 Kwaye la manzi esiqalekiso aya kungena emathunjini akho, ukuze athambise isisu sakho aze anyibilikise isinqe sakho. Yathi inkazana, Amen, amen."
Numbers5:23 Umbingeleli wozibhala ezi zishwabulo encwadini, azicime ngamanzi akrakra;"
Numbers5:24 Umfazi makasele amanzi akrakra esiqalekiso, angene kuye amanzi esiqalekiso abe krakra."
Numbers5:25 Wowuthabatha umbingeleli umbingelelo esandleni somfazi lowo, awusondeze umbingelelo phambi koYehova, awulungise esibingelelweni;"
Numbers5:26 Umbingeleli wothabatha emnikelweni womnikelo wokudla, umnikelo wawo wesikhumbuzo, aqhumisele ngawo ngomlilo esibingelelweni, amnike amanzi umfazi lowo."
Numbers5:27 Ukuba uthe wamgalela loo manzi, ukuba uthe wazenza inqambi, yakrexeza indoda yakhe, angene kuye amanzi esiqalekiso, amcaphukise, isisu sakhe sidumbe, ubole umlambo wakhe; abe sisiqalekiso umfazi phakathi kwabantu bakowabo."
Numbers5:28 Ke ukuba lo mfazi ubengathanga azenze nqambi, uhlambulukile yena; ke uya kukhululeka akhawule."
Numbers5:29 Nguwo lowo umyalelo wobukhwele xa umfazi uthe wangena endaweni yendoda yakhe, wazenza inqambi;"
Numbers5:30 nokuba uthe wafikelwa ngumoya wobukhwele, yamkhweletela umkayo, yamzisa loo mfazi phambi koYehova, umbingeleli wowenza kuye wonke lo myalelo."
Numbers5:31 Yoba msulwa indoda leyo, aze yena umfazi abuthwale ubugwenxa bakhe."
Numbers6:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Numbers6:2 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi kubo, Xa indoda nenkazana ithe yazahlula, yenza isifungo somNaziri, ukunyula uYehova;"
Numbers6:3 Ufanele angaseli wayini nasiselo sinxilisayo, angaseli wayini naviniga okanye neviniga yesiselo esinxilisayo, angaseli incindi yeediliya, angatyi zidiliya zimanzi okanye iidiliya ezomisiweyo."
Numbers6:4 Ngayo yonke imihla yokhetho lwakhe, aze angadli nantoni na eyenziwe ngeediliya, ukususela kwiimbewu ukusa emacwecweni."
Numbers6:5 Ngemihla yonke yesibhambathiso sakhe, makungafiki blakhwe entlokweni yakhe; ide izaliseke imihla uYehova azinyulele yona, yibani ngcwele neenwele zentloko yakhe zibe nde."
Numbers6:6 Yonke imihla yokunyula kukaYehova akayi kusondela kwabafileyo;
Numbers6:7 Makangazenzi inqambi ngoyise okanye ngonina okanye ngomntakwabo okanye udade wabo xa bathe bafa, kuba ubungcwele boThixo wakhe buphezu kwentloko yakhe."
Numbers6:8 Ngayo yonke imihla yobungcwele bakhe, woba ngcwele kuYehova."
Numbers6:9 Ukuba uthe ubani uthe wafa kwaoko ngenxa yakhe, wayenza inqambi intloko yakhe; woyicheba intloko yakhe ngomhla wokuhlanjululwa kwakhe; woyicheba ngomhla wesixhenxe."
Numbers6:10 Ngomhla wesibhozo wozisa amahobe amabini, nokuba ngamavukuthu abe mabini, kumbingeleli emnyango wentente yokuhlangana."
Numbers6:11 Umbingeleli umele alenze elinye libe ngumnikelo wesono lize elinye libe lidini elinyukayo, azigubungele izono zakhe ngenxa yokuba wonile kofileyo, ayingcwalise intloko yakhe kwangaloo mini."
Numbers6:12 Woyingcwalisa kuYehova imihla yemibingelelo yakhe, azise imvana emnyaka mnye, ibe lidini letyala;"
Numbers6:13 Nguwo lo umyalelo wozahluleyo, ekuzalisekeni kwemihla yozahlulo lwakhe, woziswa emnyango wentente yokuhlangana."
Numbers6:14 Wowusondeza umsondezo wakhe kuYehova, imvana emnyaka mnye, egqibeleleyo, ibe lidini elinyukayo, nemvana emnyaka mnye egqibeleleyo, ibe lidini lesono, nenkunzi yemvu egqibeleleyo, ibe ngumbulelo umnikelo;"
Numbers6:15 nengobozi yezonka ezingenagwele, nomgubo ocoliweyo onegwele, ugalelwe ioli, nezonkana ezingenagwele, zithanjiswe ioli, nomnikelo wazo wokudla, neminikelo yazo ethululwayo."
Numbers6:16 Wolisondeza umbingeleli phambi koYehova, asondeze idini lakhe lesono nedini lakhe elinyukayo;"
Numbers6:17 inkunzi yegusha mayibe ngumnikelo wombulelo kuYehova, kunye nengobozi yezonka ezingenagwele; umbingeleli awenze umnikelo wakhe wokudla, nomnikelo wakhe othululwayo."
Numbers6:18 Woyicheba indoda engumNaziri intloko yebandla lakhe emnyango wentente yokuhlangana, athabathe iinwele zentloko yebandla lakhe, aziphose emlilweni phantsi kombingelelo wombulelo."
Numbers6:19 Umbingeleli wothabatha umkhono obhaptiziweyo wenkunzi yegusha nesonka esingabhakwanga sibe sinye engobozini, nesonka esingabhakwanga sibe sinye, azibeke esandleni somNaziri emva kokuba echetyiwe;"
Numbers6:20 alitshangatshangise umbingeleli, libe ngumtshangatshangiso phambi koYehova; Zingcwele ezo kumbingeleli, kunye nencum yedini elinyukayo, kwanesandla sokutyunyuzwa. Emveni koko ozahluleyo angayisela iwayini."
Numbers6:21 Nguwo lowo umyalelo wozahluleyo, obhambathisa umsondezo wakhe kuYehova ngenxa yobungcwele bakhe, ngaphandle koko sinokukufumana isandla sakhe; uya kwenza ngokomyalelo wakhe ngokwesifungo sakhe; ukwahlukana kokuzalwa."
Numbers6:22 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers6:23 Thetha kuAron nakoonyana bakhe, uthi, Nize nenjenje ukubasikelela oonyana bakaSirayeli, nithi kubo,"
Numbers6:24 uYehova akusikelele, akugcine;"
Numbers6:25 uYehova uya kubukhanyisa ubuso bakhe kuwe, abe nenceba kuwe."
Numbers6:26 uYehova uya kubuphakamisela kuwe ubuso bakhe, akunike uxolo."
Numbers6:27 Baya kulibeka igama lam phezu koonyana bakaSirayeli; ndibasikelele.
Numbers7:1 Ngemini awawumisa ngayo uMoses umnquba, wawuthambisa, wawungcwalisa, wawungcwalisa, nenkonzo yawo yonke, nesibingelelo nemisebenzi yaso yonke, wasithambisa, wangcwalisa;"
Numbers7:2 Ookumkani bakwaSirayeli, iintloko zezindlu zooyise, abaziintloko zezizwe, eziphethe ababalwayo kubo, babebingelela."
Numbers7:3 Zawuzisa umbingelelo wazo phambi koYehova, iinqwelo ezinophahla zantandathu, neenkomo zalishumi elinambini; iyinqwelo yokulwa kwizikhulu ezibini, ibe yinkomo kwisikhulu esinye; bazizisa phambi komnquba."
Numbers7:4 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers7:5 Wuthabathe kubo, ukuze basebenze umsebenzi wentente yokuhlangana; ayinike abaLevi, elowo ngokomsebenzi wakhe."
Numbers7:6 Wazithabatha ke uMoses iinqwelo neenkomo, wazinika abaLevi."
Numbers7:7 Oonyana bakaGershon wabanika iinqwelo ezimbini neenkomo ezine ngokomsebenzi wabo.
Numbers7:8 Wabanika oonyana bakaMerari iinqwelo ezine, neenkomo ezisibhozo, ngokomsebenzi wabo, esandleni sikaItamare, unyana ka-Aron umbingeleli."
Numbers7:9 Ke oonyana bakaKehati akabanikanga nto, ngokuba umsebenzi wengcwele obuphezu kwabo bebewuthwala ngegxalaba bona."
Numbers7:10 Iinkosana zenze umbingelelo wokusungula isibingelelo ngomhla wokuthanjiswa kwaso, yaye iinkosana zanikela imibingelelo yazo phambi kwesibingelelo."
Numbers7:11 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Sonyusa imibingelelo yabo, isikhulu ngasinye ngemini yaso, ukuba singcwaliswe isibingelelo."
Numbers7:12 Owawenza umbingelelo wakhe ngomhla wokuqala nguNason, unyana ka-Aminadabhi, wesizwe sakwaYuda."
Numbers7:13 Umsondezo wakhe waba sisitya esinye sesilivere, bulikhulu elinamanci mathathu eeshekele ubunzima baso; zombini bezizele ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, ngumnikelo wokudla;"
Numbers7:14 yanye igolide eziishekele ezilishumi, izele sisiqhumiso;"
Numbers7:15 yanye inkunzi entsha, inkomo, yanye inkunzi yemvu, yanye imvana emnyaka mnye, zizezedini elinyukayo ke ezo;"
Numbers7:16 yanye inkunzi yemvu yedini lesono;
Numbers7:17 ezombingelelo wombulelo iimazi zeenkomo ezimbini, iinkunzi zeegusha zantlanu, zantlanu iinkunzi zeegusha, zantlanu, iinkunzi zeemvana ezineminyaka emihlanu ubudala."
Numbers7:18 Ngemini yesibini kwabingelela uNataniyeli unyana kaTsuhare, inkulu yakwaIsakare;"
Numbers7:19 Wasondeza isitya sesilivere, bulikhulu elinamanci mathathu eeshekele ubunzima baso; zombini zizele ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, lidini elinyukayo;"
Numbers7:20 lwalunye ukhamba lwegolide oluziishekele ezilishumi, luzele sisiqhumiso;"
Numbers7:21 yanye inkunzi entsha, inkomo, yanye inkunzi yemvu, yanye imvana emnyaka mnye, zizezedini elinyukayo ke ezo;"
Numbers7:22 yanye inkunzi yemvu yedini lesono;
Numbers7:23 njengomnikelo wombulelo zeenkomo zambini, iinkunzi zeegusha zantlanu, zantlanu iinkunzi zeegusha, zantlanu iinkunzi zeemvana ezimnyaka mnye ubudala."
Numbers7:24 Ngemini yesithathu kwabingelela uEliyabhi unyana kaHelon, ukumkani woonyana bakaZebhulon;"
Numbers7:25 Umsondezo wakhe waba sisitya esinye sesilivere, bulikhulu elinamanci mathathu eeshekele ubunzima baso; zombini zizele ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, lidini elinyukayo;"
Numbers7:26 nengqayi yegolide eziishekele ezilishumi, izele sisiqhumiso;"
Numbers7:27 yanye inkunzi entsha, inkomo, yanye inkunzi yemvu, yanye imvana emnyaka mnye, zizezedini elinyukayo ke ezo;"
Numbers7:28 yanye inkunzi yemvu yedini lesono;
Numbers7:29 njengombingelelo wombulelo iinkomo zambini, zantlanu iinkunzi zeegusha, zantlanu iinkunzi zeegusha, zantlanu iinkunzi zeemvana eziminyaka mihlanu ubudala;"
Numbers7:30 Ngemini yesine wabingelela uElitsure unyana kaSedure, inkulu yoonyana bakaRubhen;"
Numbers7:31 Umsondezo wakhe waba sisitya esinye sesilivere, silikhulu elinamanci mathathu eeshekele, sasinye isitya sokutshiza sesilivere, esiziishekele ezimashumi asixhenxe ngokweshekele yengcwele; zombini zizele ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, lidini elinyukayo;"
Numbers7:32 nengqayi yegolide eziishekele ezilishumi, izele sisiqhumiso;"
Numbers7:33 yanye inkunzi entsha, inkomo, yanye inkunzi yemvu, yanye imvana emnyaka mnye, zizezedini elinyukayo ke ezo;"
Numbers7:34 nenkunzi yebhokhwe ibe nye, ibe lidini lesono;"
Numbers7:35 ezombingelelo wombulelo zambini iinkomo, zantlanu iinkunzi zezimvu, zantlanu iinkunzi zezimvu, zantlanu, neemvana eziminyaka mihlanu;"
Numbers7:36 Ngemini yesihlanu kwasondeza inkulu yoonyana bakaSimon, uShelumiyeli unyana kaTsurishadayi."
Numbers7:37 Umsondezo wakhe waba sisitya esinye sesilivere, bulikhulu elinamanci mathathu eeshekele ubunzima baso; zombini zizele ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, lidini elinyukayo;"
Numbers7:38 nengqayi yegolide eziishekele ezilishumi, izele sisiqhumiso;"
Numbers7:39 yanye inkunzi entsha, inkomo, yanye inkunzi yemvu, yanye imvana emnyaka mnye, zizezedini elinyukayo ke ezo;"
Numbers7:40 nenkunzi yebhokhwe ibe nye, ibe lidini lesono;"
Numbers7:41 ezombingelelo wombulelo zeenkomo zambini, iinkunzi zeegusha zantlanu, zantlanu iinkunzi zeegusha, zantlanu iinkunzi zeemvana ezimnyaka mnye;"
Numbers7:42 Ngemini yesithandathu kwasondeza inkulu yoonyana bakaGadi, uEliyasafu, unyana kaDehuweli."
Numbers7:43 Umsondezo wakhe waba sisitya esinye sesilivere, bulikhulu elinamanci mathathu eeshekele ubunzima baso; zombini zizele ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, lidini elinyukayo;"
Numbers7:44 nengqayi yegolide eziishekele ezilishumi, izele sisiqhumiso;"
Numbers7:45 yanye inkunzi entsha, inkomo, yanye inkunzi yemvu, yanye imvana emnyaka mnye, zizezedini elinyukayo ke ezo;"
Numbers7:46 nenkunzi yebhokhwe ibe nye, ibe lidini lesono;"
Numbers7:47 ezombingelelo wombulelo iimazi zeenkomo ezimbini, iinkunzi zeegusha zantlanu, zantlanu iinkunzi zeegusha, zantlanu iinkunzi zeemvana ezimnyaka mnye ubudala;"
Numbers7:48 Ngemini yesixhenxe, kwabingelela uElishama unyana ka-Amihudi, inkulu yoonyana bakaEfrayim;"
Numbers7:49 Umsondezo wakhe waba sisitya esinye sesilivere, bulikhulu elinamanci mathathu eeshekele ubunzima baso; zombini zizele ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, lidini elinyukayo;"
Numbers7:50 nengqayi yegolide eziishekele ezilishumi, izele sisiqhumiso;"
Numbers7:51 yanye inkunzi entsha, inkomo, yanye inkunzi yemvu, yanye imvana emnyaka mnye, zizezedini elinyukayo ke ezo;"
Numbers7:52 yanye inkunzi yemvu yedini lesono;
Numbers7:53 njengomnikelo wombulelo zeenkomo zambini, iinkunzi zeegusha zantlanu, zantlanu iinkunzi zeegusha, zantlanu iinkunzi zeemvana eziminyaka mihlanu ubudala;"
Numbers7:54 Ngemini yesithoba neyesibini, uGamaliyeli unyana kaPedasure, ukumkani woonyana bakaManase, wabingelela."
Numbers7:55 Umsondezo wakhe waba sisitya esinye sesilivere, bulikhulu elinamanci mathathu eeshekele ubunzima baso; zombini zizele ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, lidini elinyukayo;"
Numbers7:56 nengqayi yegolide eziishekele ezilishumi, izele sisiqhumiso;"
Numbers7:57 yanye inkunzi entsha, inkomo, yanye inkunzi yemvu, yanye imvana emnyaka mnye, zizezedini elinyukayo ke ezo;"
Numbers7:58 nenkunzi yebhokhwe ibe nye, ibe lidini lesono;"
Numbers7:59 ezombingelelo wombulelo zambini iinkomo, zantlanu iinkunzi zezimvu, zantlanu iinkunzi zezimvu, zantlanu, neemvana eziminyaka mihlanu;"
Numbers7:60 Ngemini yesithoba kwabingelela uAbhidan unyana kaGidiyon, inkulu yoonyana bakaBhenjamin;"
Numbers7:61 Umsondezo wakhe waba sisitya esinye sesilivere, bulikhulu elinamanci mathathu eeshekele ubunzima baso; zombini zizele ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, lidini elinyukayo;"
Numbers7:62 nengqayi yegolide eziishekele ezilishumi, izele sisiqhumiso;"
Numbers7:63 yanye inkunzi entsha, inkomo, yanye inkunzi yemvu, yanye imvana emnyaka mnye, zizezedini elinyukayo ke ezo;"
Numbers7:64 yanye inkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti yedini lesono;
Numbers7:65 ezombingelelo wombulelo iimazi zeenkomo ezimbini, iinkunzi zeegusha zantlanu, zantlanu iinkunzi zeegusha, zantlanu iinkunzi zeemvana ezimnyaka mnye ubudala."
Numbers7:66 Ngemini yeshumi, uAkezere, unyana ka-Amisadayi, ukumkani woonyana bakaDan, wabingelela;"
Numbers7:67 Umsondezo wakhe waba sisitya esinye sesilivere, bulikhulu elinamanci mathathu eeshekele ubunzima baso; zombini zizele ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, lidini elinyukayo;"
Numbers7:68 nengqayi yegolide eziishekele ezilishumi, izele sisiqhumiso;"
Numbers7:69 yanye inkunzi entsha, inkomo, yanye inkunzi yemvu, yanye imvana emnyaka mnye, zizezedini elinyukayo ke ezo;"
Numbers7:70 yanye inkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti yedini lesono;
Numbers7:71 njengomnikelo wombulelo zeenkomo zambini, iinkunzi zeegusha zantlanu, zantlanu iinkunzi zeegusha, zantlanu iinkunzi zeemvana ezimnyaka mnye ubudala."
Numbers7:72 Ngemini yeshumi elinanye kwabingelela uPagiyeli unyana kaOkran, inkulu yoonyana baka-Ashere;"
Numbers7:73 Umsondezo wakhe waba sisitya esinye sesilivere, bulikhulu elinamanci mathathu eeshekele ubunzima baso; zombini zizele ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, lidini elinyukayo;"
Numbers7:74 lwalunye ukhamba lwegolide oluziishekele ezilishumi, luzele sisiqhumiso;"
Numbers7:75 yanye inkunzi entsha, inkomo, yanye inkunzi yemvu, yanye imvana emnyaka mnye, zizezedini elinyukayo ke ezo;"
Numbers7:76 yanye inkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti yedini lesono;
Numbers7:77 ezombingelelo wombulelo zambini iinkomo, zantlanu iinkunzi zezimvu, zantlanu iinkunzi zezimvu, zantlanu iimvana, zantlanu iimvana ezimnyaka mnye;"
Numbers7:78 Ngemini yeshumi elinesibini, uAhira, unyana kaEnana, inkulu yoonyana bakaNafetali, wabingelela."
Numbers7:79 Umsondezo wakhe waba sisitya esinye sesilivere, bulikhulu elinamanci mathathu eeshekele ubunzima baso; zombini zizele ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, lidini elinyukayo;"
Numbers7:80 nengqayi yegolide eziishekele ezilishumi, izele sisiqhumiso;"
Numbers7:81 yanye inkunzi entsha, inkomo, yanye inkunzi yemvu, yanye imvana emnyaka mnye, zizezedini elinyukayo ke ezo;"
Numbers7:82 yanye inkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti yedini lesono;
Numbers7:83 ezombingelelo wombulelo zambini iinkomo, zantlanu iinkunzi zezimvu, zantlanu iinkunzi zezimvu, zantlanu iimvana, zantlanu iimvana ezimnyaka mnye;"
Numbers7:84 Kuko oko ukusungulwa kwesibingelelo, mini sathanjiswa zizikhulu zakwaSirayeli. Zaba lishumi elinazibini izitya zokutshiza zesilivere, zalishumi elinazibini izitya zokutshiza zesilivere, zalishumi elinambini iinkamba zegolide, neengcambu zambini."
Numbers7:85 Isitya sesilivere sisinye saziishekele ezilikhulu elinamanci mathathu; Zonke iimpahla zesilivere zaba ngamawaka amabini, anamakhulu mane, ngokweshekele yengcwele;"
Numbers7:86 Zaba lishumi elinambini iimpahla zegolide, zizele sisiqhumiso, zalishumi iishekele kubunzima bunye ngokweshekele yengcwele; iyonke igolide yeenkamba yaba likhulu elinamanci mabini."
Numbers7:87 Zizonke iinkomo zedini elinyukayo zaba ziinkunzi ezintsha ezilishumi elinambini, neenkunzi zezimvu zabalishumi elinambini, neemvana ezimnyaka mnye zaba lishumi elinambini, namadini azo anyukayo, zalishumi elinambini iinkunzi zezimvu, zedini lesono."
Numbers7:88 Zizonke iinkomo zombingelelo wombulelo zaye zingamashumi omabini anane, iinkunzi ezintsha, neenkunzi zezimvu zaba ngamashumi omathandathu, neenciniba zaba ngamashumi omathandathu, neemvana ezimnyaka mnye zaba ngamashumi omathandathu. Kuko oko ukusungulwa kwesibingelelo, sathanjiswa."
Numbers7:89 Ke ekungeneni kukaMoses ententeni yokuhlangana, ukuba athethe naye, weva izwi lothetha kuye esisithekweni esiphezu kwetyeya yesingqino, phakathi kweekerubhi zombini; wathetha naye."
Numbers8:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Numbers8:2 Thetha kuAron, uthi kuye, Ekuzimiseni kwakho izibane, mazikhanyise izibane zibe sixhenxe ecaleni kwesiphatho sezibane."
Numbers8:3 Wenjenjalo uAron; wazimisa izibane zaso zaphambi kwesiphatho sezibane, njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Numbers8:4 Ukusetyenzwa kwesiphatho eso yaba yigolide ekhandiweyo, kwasa esiqwini saso, kwasa ezintyantyambeni zaso, ingumkhando wona; ngokomfanekiso uYehova awawubonisayo uMoses, wenjenjalo ukwenza isiphatho sezibane."
Numbers8:5 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers8:6 Bakhuphe abaLevi phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, ubahlambulule;"
Numbers8:7 Nantsi into oya kuyenza kubo ukuba bahlanjululwe: Bafefa ngamanzi okuhlambulula, yaye bachebe umzimba wabo wonke, bahlambe iimpahla zabo, bahlambuluke."
Numbers8:8 Uze uthabathe inkunzi entsha yenkomo, nedini layo elinyukayo, nomgubo ocoliweyo, ogalelwe ioli, uyithabathe eyesibini inkunzi entsha, ibe lidini lesono;"
Numbers8:9 Uze ubasondeze abaLevi ententeni yokuhlangana, ulibizele ndawonye lonke ibandla loonyana bakaSirayeli;"
Numbers8:10 Ubasondeze abaLevi phambi koYehova, bacinezela oonyana bakaSirayeli ngezandla zabo phezu kwabaLevi."
Numbers8:11 Wobasondeza uAron abaLevi phambi koYehova, babe ngumbingelelo woonyana bakaSirayeli, bakhonze uYehova."
Numbers8:12 AbaLevi bacinezela ngezandla zabo phezu kweentloko zezo nkunzi zeenkomo, uze wenze enye ibe lidini lesono, enye ibe lidini elinyukayo kuYehova lokucamagushela izono zabaLevi."
Numbers8:13 Ubabeke abaLevi phambi koAron naphambi koonyana bakhe, ubasondeze njengomnikelo kuYehova."
Numbers8:14 Khetha ke abaLevi phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, babe ngabam abaLevi."
Numbers8:15 Emveni koko bongena abaLevi, basebenze ententeni yokuhlangana; bazihlambulule, bazenze idini."
Numbers8:16 Ngokuba ndanikwa mna phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli; esikhundleni sabo bavula zonke izizalo zonina, esikhundleni samazibulo onke koonyana bakaSirayeli, ndabathabathela mna."
Numbers8:17 Ngokuba ngawam onke amazibulo phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, ebantwini nasezinkomeni; xa ndawaxabelayo onke amazibulo ezweni laseYiputa, ndawangcwalisela mna."
Numbers8:18 Ndabathabatha abaLevi esikhundleni samazibulo onke koonyana bakaSirayeli.
Numbers8:19 AbaLevi ndabanikela ukuba babe sisipho kuAron noonyana bakhe phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuba balungiselele oonyana bakaSirayeli ententeni yokuhlangana, bacamagushele izono zoonyana bakaSirayeli akukho sihlwayo phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, ekusondeleni koonyana bakaSirayeli engcweleni."
Numbers8:20 Benza ke ooMoses noAron nebandla lonke loonyana bakaSirayeli kubaLevi; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses ngabaLevi, benjenjalo oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers8:21 Bazihlambulula abaLevi, bahlamba iingubo zabo; uAron wayisondeza yaba ngumsondezo phambi koYehova; yaye uAron wabenzela umnikelo wokuba bahlambuluke."
Numbers8:22 Emva koko bangena abaLevi ukuze basebenze umsebenzi wabo ententeni yokuhlangana phambi koAron naphambi koonyana bakhe; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses ngenxa yabaLevi, benjenjalo."
Numbers8:23 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers8:24 “Nguwo lo wabaLevi: othabathele kominyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ezelwe, kwenyusa, bongena enkonzweni ententeni yokuhlangana."
Numbers8:25 Ukususela kwiminyaka engamashumi amahlanu ubudala baya kuyeka ukuyilinda inkonzo yayo, yaye abayi kuphinda bayikhonze."
Numbers8:26 Kodwa bafanele basebenze kunye nabazalwana babo ententeni yokuhlangana ukuba bagcine inkonzo, bangenzi nawuphi na umsebenzi wakukhonza. Uze wenjenjalo kubaLevi ngokwesiko aya kuniwisela umthetho ngako."
Numbers9:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses entlango yaseSinayi, ngenyanga yokuqala, ngomnyaka wesibini wokuphuma kwabo ezweni laseYiputa, wathi,"
Numbers9:2 Oonyana bakaSirayeli bafanele bayibhiyozele ipasika ngexesha layo elimisiweyo.
Numbers9:3 Noyenza ngomhla weshumi elinesine kuloo nyanga, lakutshona ilanga, ngexesha elimisiweyo; niyigcine ngokwamasiko nezithethe zayo."
Numbers9:4 Wathi uMoses koonyana bakaSirayeli, mabenze ipasika."
Numbers9:5 Bayenza ke ipasika ngenyanga yokuqala, ngomhla weshumi elinesine, ngokuhlwa, entlango yaseSinayi njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses, benjenjalo oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers9:6 Kwakukho amadoda athile awayedyobhekile sisidumbu somntu, kangangokuba ayengenakuyenza ipasika ngaloo mini; bakhokela phambi koMoses noAron ngaloo mini."
Numbers9:7 Athi loo madoda kuye, Siziinqambi ngomntu; sithintelwe yini na, ukuba singawusondezi umbingelelo kaYehova phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli ngexesha lakhe elimisiweyo?"
Numbers9:8 Wathi uMoses kubo, Sukani nime, ndive ukuba uYehova woniwisela ntoni na."
Numbers9:9 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers9:10 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi, Umntu ngomntu ongowembewu yenu, xa athe wazenza inqambi ngofileyo, nokuba uthe wathabathe uhambo olude, woyenza ipasika, ukumzukisa uYehova."
Numbers9:11 Boyenza ngenyanga yesibini, ngomhla weshumi elinesine, ngokuhlwa, kunye nezonka ezingenagwele kunye nemifuno ekrakra;"
Numbers9:12 Musa ukushiya nto kuyo kude kuse, ungaphuli thambo layo; wenze ngokwemithetho yonke yepasika."
Numbers9:13 Ke yena umntu ohlambulukileyo, ongekho eluhambeni, othe akayibhiyozeli ipasika, loo mphefumlo wonqanyulwa, ungabikho ebandleni, ngokuba akawusondezanga umbingelelo kaYehova ngexesha elimisiweyo, wowuhlawula lowo isono sakhe sinxibe."
Numbers9:14 Njengokuphambukela kuni ophambukele phakathi kwenu, wenza ipasika ekumzukiseni uYehova; Ukwenjenjalo ke uya kwenza ngokommiselo wepasika nangokwesiko layo;"
Numbers9:15 Ngomhla wokumiswa komnquba, ilifu lawusibekela umnquba oyintente yesingqino;"
Numbers9:16 Kwahlala kunjalo: Ilifu laliwusibekela emini, laba yimbonakalo yomlilo ebusuku."
Numbers9:17 Kwathi, lakunyuka ilifu phezu komnquba, basuke balandele oonyana bakaSirayeli; yaye kwindawo elihlala kuyo ilifu oonyana bakaSirayeli bamisa iintente zabo khona kanye."
Numbers9:18 Ngokomyalelo kaYehova banduluka oonyana bakaSirayeli, bamisa iinkampu ngokomyalelo kaYehova;"
Numbers9:19 Lahlala ilifu imihla emininzi phezu komnquba, bayigcina oonyana bakaSirayeli inkonzo kaYehova, abanduluka."
Numbers9:20 Lathi, lakubuya ilifu phezu komnquba nokuba yimihla embalwa, basigcina isigxina sikaYehova, abanduluka. Ngokomlomo kaYehova bahlala ezintenteni zabo, ngokomlomo kaYehova banduluka."
Numbers9:21 Lathi, lakubakho ilifu ngokuhlwa kude kuse, lakunyuka ilifu kwakusa, banduluke; nokuba kunyuke ilifu emini, nokuba kusebusuku, ahamba."
Numbers9:22 Nokuba ilifu lihleli phezu komnquba iintsuku ezimbini, nokuba yinyanga, nokuba ngumnyaka, ukuthi lihlale phezu kwawo, bamisa oonyana bakaSirayeli, abanduluka; lakuba ke lavuka, bahamba."
Numbers9:23 Ngokomlomo kaYehova babehlala ezintenteni, bafuduka ngokomlomo kaYehova;"
Numbers10:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Numbers10:2 Zenzele amaxilongo esilivere abe mabini; wenze iqashiso, ukuze ube nokuwusebenzisa ekubizeni ibandla nasekutsaleni izitya."
Numbers10:3 Xa kukhatshwa isandi, lohlanganisana nawe lonke ibandla emnyango wentente yokuhlangana."
Numbers10:4 Ukuba kuthe kwavuthelwa ixilongo, kwavuthela nje elinye, zohlanganisana kuwe izikhulu eziziintloko zamawaka akwaSirayeli."
Numbers10:5 Xa ubiza ukumkani, iibhere zasempumalanga ziya phambili."
Numbers10:6 Xa nithe nambiza okwesibini ukumkani, maze ashukume amatyala asezantsi; kufuneka baziphakamisele i-alarm emva koko."
Numbers10:7 Kodwa xa ibandla lithe lahlangana, khwazani, kodwa ningahlabi."
Numbers10:8 Bavuthela ngezigodlo oonyana baka-Aron ababingeleli; ibe ngummiselo ongunaphakade kuni kwizizukulwana zenu.
Numbers10:9 Xa uthe walihlasela utshaba olunibandezelayo, vuthelani ngezigodlo; aye niya kukhunjulwa phambi koYehova uThixo wenu, nikhululwe ezintshabeni zenu."
Numbers10:10 Yaye, ngomhla wovuyo lwenu nangemihla yenu yomthendeleko nasekuthwaseni kweenyanga zenu novuthela amaxilongo phezu kweminikelo yenu etshiswayo naphezu kwemibingelelo yenu yombulelo; ukuze sibe sisikhumbuzo kuni phambi koThixo wenu: ndinguYehova, uThixo wenu."
Numbers10:11 Ngomhla wamashumi amabini wenyanga yesibini, ngomnyaka wesibini, kwabakho ilifu phezu kwentente yesingqino."
Numbers10:12 Banduluka ke oonyana bakaSirayeli entlango yaseSinayi; lema ilifu entlango yaseParan.
Numbers10:13 Baqala banduluka ngokomyalelo kaYehova ngenkonzo kaMoses.
Numbers10:14 Yahamba ibhanile yeminquba yoonyana bakaYuda phambi kwabo, banduluka benemikhosi yabo; yaye iqabane lakhe lalinguNashon unyana ka-Aminadabhi."
Numbers10:15 Indlu yendlu yoonyana bakaIsakare yayiphethwe nguNataniyeli, unyana kaTsuhare."
Numbers10:16 Indlu yoonyana bakaZebhulon yayiphethwe nguEliyabhi, unyana kaHelon;"
Numbers10:17 Wadilizwa umnquba; Baphuma ke oonyana bakaGershon noonyana bakaMerari, bethwele umnquba."
Numbers10:18 Yaye ibhanile yongqingo lukaRubhen yahlulwa ngokwezahlulo zabo, yaye isahlulo sakhe yayinguElitsure unyana kaTedure."
Numbers10:19 Indlu yendlu yoonyana bakaSimon yayiphethwe nguSelumiyeli, unyana kaTsurishadayi."
Numbers10:20 Indlu yendlu yoonyana bakaGadi yayiphethwe nguEliyasafu, unyana kaDehuweli."
Numbers10:21 Bemka ke oonyana bakaKehati, bayithwala ingcwele; bamisa umnquba phezu kwayo."
Numbers10:22 Ibhanile yokhuselo loonyana bakaEfrayim yayikwizikolo zabo, yaye ibutho lakhe yayinguElishama unyana ka-Amihudi."
Numbers10:23 Indlu yoonyana bakaManase ibiphethwe nguGamaliyeli, unyana kaPedasure;"
Numbers10:24 Indlu yendlu yoonyana bakaBhenjamin yayiphethwe nguAbhidan, unyana kaGidiyon."
Numbers10:25 Yaye ibhanile yongqingo loonyana bakaDana yaba ngumvuzo wongqingo bonke ngamaqela abo; yaye iqabane lakhe yayinguAhieser unyana ka-Amishadayi.
Numbers10:26 Ibhunga lemizalwane yoonyana baka-Ashere laliphethwe nguPagiyeli unyana kaOkran.
Numbers10:27 Ibhunga losapho loonyana bakaNafetali laliphethwe nguAhira, unyana kaEnana."
Numbers10:28 Iihambo zoonyana bakaSirayeli namabhunga abo zazinjalo ekunyukeni kwabo.
Numbers10:29 Wathi uMoses kuHobhabhi, unyana kaReguweli, umMidiyan, uyise womkaMoses, Thina siyenyuka siye kuloo ndawo athe uYehova, Ndiya kuninika yona; Hamba nathi, sokwenzela okulungileyo; uYehova uthethe kakuhle ngoSirayeli."
Numbers10:30 Wathi yena kuye, Andiyi kuhamba; kodwa ke ndiza kuya kwilizwe lakowethu nakwindlu yam."
Numbers10:31 Wathi yena, Musa ukusishiya; ngokuba uyakwazi ukumisa iintente entlango, kwaye unokuba kwindawo yethu kumgama wamehlo."
Numbers10:32 Ukuba uthe wahamba nathi, ewe, konke okulungileyo aya kusenzela kona uYehova, sokwenzela nathi."
Numbers10:33 Banduluka entabeni kaYehova, umgama weentsuku ezintathu, yaye ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova yabakhokela kuhambo lweentsuku ezintathu ukuba ibafumanele indawo yokuphumla."
Numbers10:34 Ilifu likaYehova laba phezu kwabo emini ekuphumeni kwabo eminqubeni.
Numbers10:35 Kwathi ekumkeni kwetyeya, wathi uMoses, Zivuse, Yehova, zichithachithe iintshaba zakho; mababaleke kuwe abakuthiyayo."
Numbers10:36 Uthe ke ekuphumleni kwawo, Nkosi, buyela kumawaka akwaSirayeli."
Numbers11:1 Ukuba bathe abantu bakrokra, bububi emehlweni kaYehova; weva uYehova; wavutha umsindo wakhe; watsha umlilo kaYehova phakathi kwabo, wabadla abo basemacaleni eminquba."
Numbers11:2 Abantu bambiza uMoses; wathandaza uMoses kuYehova, waphuma umlilo."
Numbers11:3 Wathi igama laloo ndawo yiTabhera, ngenxa yokuba umlilo kaYehova wawusitsha phakathi kwabo."
Numbers11:4 Yaza inkitha ephakathi kwabo yefa yindlala; babuya balila oonyana bakaSirayeli, besithi, Ngubani na oya kusinika ukudla, sidle?"
Numbers11:5 Sicinga ngeentlanzi ebesizidla eYiputa ngesisa; iikomkomere, iimelon, iiliki, itswele, ikonofile;"
Numbers11:6 Kungokunje umphefumlo wethu womile;
Numbers11:7 Imana leyo ibinjengeenkozo zekoriyandire, ukubonakala kwayo bekunjengokubonakala kweBhedola;"
Numbers11:8 Bajikeleza abantu, bayichola, bayisile etyeni lokusila, mhlawumbi bayisile ngodaka, bayibhaka ngeepani, benza ngayo isonka;"
Numbers11:9 Kwakuhla umbethe esililini ebusuku, yawa imana phezu kwawo."
Numbers11:10 Weva uMoses abantu bekhala emizalwaneni yabo, elowo emnyango wentente yakhe; Wavutha umsindo kaYehova kunene; NoMoses wayengonwabanga."
Numbers11:11 Wathi uMoses kuYehova, Yini na ukuba umcinezele umkhonzi wakho? yaye kutheni na ndingaboni mfesane emehlweni akho, ekubeni undibize ngokuba ngumthwalo wolu hlanga luphela?"
Numbers11:12 Ndibamkele bonke na aba? Ndim na owabazalayo, naxa uthe kum, Bathwale esifubeni sakho, njengoko kuzala umntwana, ubase kwelo zwe wafunga kooyise ngalo?"
Numbers11:13 Ndoyizuza phi na inyama, ndibanike bonke aba bantu? ngokuba bekhala kum, besithi, Siphe ukudla, sidle."
Numbers11:14 Andinako ukuluthwala ndedwa olu hlanga, ngokuba lunzima kakhulu kum."
Numbers11:15 Ukuba uthe wenjenjalo kum, ndibulale, ukuba ndibabalwe nguwe; kwaye andizange ndiyibone intlungu yam."
Numbers11:16 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Ndihlanganisele amadoda amashumi asixhenxe kumadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, owaziyo ukuba ngamadoda amakhulu abantu, neentloko zabo; uwazise ententeni yokuhlangana, eme khona nawe."
Numbers11:17 Ndiya kuhla, ndithethe nawe khona; ndithabathe ube mnye kuMoya ophezu kwakho, ndiwubeke phezu kwabo; yaye baya kuwuthwala umthwalo waba bantu kunye nawe, ukuze ungawuthwali wedwa."
Numbers11:18 Uthi ebantwini, Zihlambululeni ngomso, nodla inyama; ngokuba nakhalayo phambi koYehova, nisithi, Ngubani na oya kusinika inyama sidle? ngokuba izinto bezisihambela kakuhle eYiputa; ke uYehova uya kuninika inyama, nidle."
Numbers11:19 Nize ningadli usuku olunye, nokuba ziintsuku ezimbini, nokuba mihlanu, nokuba lishumi, nokuba ziintsuku ezimashumi mabini;"
Numbers11:20 yoba yinyanga iphela, ide iphume emathatheni enu, ibe lisikizi kuni; ngokuba nimcekisile uYehova ophakathi kwenu, namemeza phambi kwakhe, nisithi, Savela eYiputa?"
Numbers11:21 Wathi uMoses, Abantu endiphakathi kwabo bangamakhulu amathandathu amawaka amadoda ahamba ngeenyawo; Ubusithi, Ndiya kubanika inyama, bayidle inyanga iphela."
Numbers11:22 Umhlambi weebhokhwe neenkomo uya kuxhelelwa bona na? Okanye ngaba zonke iintlanzi zolwandle ziya kuhlanganiselwa ukuba zibalingane?
Numbers11:23 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Isandla sikaYehova sifutshane na? wandule ukubona ukuba ilizwi lam liya kuza kuwe, aliyi kubuya."
Numbers11:24 Waphuma uMoses, wawathetha ebantwini amazwi kaYehova, wahlanganisa amadoda amakhulu angamashumi asixhenxe abantu, ahlala ewujikelezile umnquba."
Numbers11:25 iNkosi yehla efini, yathetha kuye, yathabatha uMoya ophezu kwakhe, yawunika amadoda amakhulu angamashumi asixhenxe; Wahlala uMoya phezu kwabo, baprofeta, ababeka."
Numbers11:26 Ke kaloku kwasala amadoda amabini eminqubeni, igama lenye belinguElidade, igama leyesibini linguMedade; wahlala phezu kwawo umoya; yaye babengabaprofeti abathile, yaye babengaphumi emnqubeni; baprofeta eminqubeni."
Numbers11:27 Wagidima umfana, waxelela uMoses, wathi, OoElidade noMedade bayaprofeta eminqubeni."
Numbers11:28 Waphendula uYoshuwa unyana kaNun, umlungiseleli kaMoses, wakubakhonzi bakhe, wathi, Bathintele, Moses, nkosi yam;"
Numbers11:29 Wathi uMoses kuye, Unekhwele ngam na? Wanga uThixo angabenza abaprofeti bonke abantu bakaYehova, abeke uMoya wakhe phezu kwabo!"
Numbers11:30 uMoses wamrholela eminqubeni, yena namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli."
Numbers11:31 Waphuma umoya kaYehova, wangenisa iinqanawa elwandle, zawela eminqubeni, zawela eminqubeni, zaba luhambo lwemini ukuya apha, zaba luhambo lwemini ukuya kwelinye, ngeenxa zonke iinkampu, nanjengohambo losuku ukuphakama kwawo bekuziikubhite ezimbini emhlabeni."
Numbers11:32 Bema ke abantu yonke loo mini, ubusuku bonke, yonke imini yengomso, babutha izagwityi; owabutha kancinane wabutha iihomere ezilishumi, babela eminqubeni bonke;"
Numbers11:33 Kwathi xa inyama leyo isesemazinyweni abo, ingekahlafunwa, wavutha umsindo kaYehova kubo abantu, wababulala abantu ngokufa kabuhlungu kunene."
Numbers11:34 Wathi igama laloo ndawo yiKibrothafa, ngokuba kulapho bangcwabela khona iinkanuko zabo."
Numbers11:35 Banduluka abantu eKibroti-hataweva, baya eHatseroti; wahlala eHatseroti."
Numbers12:1 Bathetha kakubi ooMiriyam noAron ngoMoses ngenxa yenkazana engumKushikazi abeyizekile, ngenxa yokuba wayezeke inkazana engumKushikazi."
Numbers12:2 Bathi ke, uYehova uthethile na ngoMoses? Akathethanga ngathi? Weva uYehova."
Numbers12:3 (uMoses wayengoyena mntu ulula kunabantu bonke behlabathi.)
Numbers12:4 Wathetha uYehova kwaoko kuMoses, nakuAron, nakuMiriyam, wathi, Phumani nina nobathathu ententeni yokuhlangana. Baphuma ke bobathathu."
Numbers12:5 Wehla uYehova efini, wema emnyango wentente, wabiza ooAron noMiriyam, baphuma bobabini."
Numbers12:6 Wathi: Phulaphulani amazwi am: Ukuba kukho umprofeti phakathi kwenu, mna, Yehova, ndobonakala kuye ngombono, ndithethe kuye ephupheni."
Numbers12:7 Akanjalo ngomkhonzi wam uMoses, othembekileyo endlwini yam yonke;"
Numbers12:8 Ndiya kuthetha naye umlomo kumlomo, ngokubonakalayo, kungabi ngamazwi adelekileyo; yaye uya kuwubona umfanekiselo kaYehova. Yini na ukuba ungoyiki ukuthetha kumkhonzi wam uMoses?"
Numbers12:9 Wavutha umsindo kaYehova kubo; wemka ke.
Numbers12:10 Lemka ilifu emnqubeni; nanko uMiriyam eneqhenqa, emhlophe njengekhephu; yaye uAron waya kuMiriyam, nanko eneqhenqa."
Numbers12:11 Wathi uAron kuMoses, Camagu, nkosi yam!"
Numbers12:12 Makangabi njengofileyo, ekuphumeni kwakhe esizalweni sonina, ekudliwe isiqingatha senyama."
Numbers12:13 Wabiza uMoses kuYehova, wathi, Thixo, ndiyakukhunga, mphilise."
Numbers12:14 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Ukuba uyise wamtshicela ebusweni, ubengayi kuva ihlazo na iintsuku ezisixhenxe? wakhutshelwa ngaphandle kweminquba iintsuku ezisixhenxe, waphinda wamkelwa."
Numbers12:15 uMiriyam wavalelwa ngaphandle kweminquba iintsuku zasixhenxe, àbaphuma ke abantu, wada wabuyiswa uMiriyam."
Numbers12:16 Emva koko bemka abantu eHatseroti bamisa iinkampu entlango yaseParan.
Numbers13:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Numbers13:2 Thumelani amadoda enu, aye kuhlola ilizwe lakwaKanan, endilinika oonyana bakaSirayeli kwisizwe sooyise, nithumele indoda ibe nye, iyileyo ibe ngukumkani kubo."
Numbers13:3 Wabathuma ke uMoses, esentlango yaseParan, ngokomlomo kaYehova; onke loo madoda eziintloko zoonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers13:4 Ngawo la amagama abo: kwisizwe sakwaRubhen ibinguSamuwa, unyana kaSakure;"
Numbers13:5 kwaSimon nguShafati, unyana kaHore;"
Numbers13:6 kwisizwe sakwaYuda, ibinguKalebhi, unyana kaYefune;"
Numbers13:7 kwisizwe sakwaIsakare, ibinguIgali, unyana kaYosefu;"
Numbers13:8 kwisizwe sakwaEfrayim nguHoseya, unyana kaNun;"
Numbers13:9 kwisizwe sakwaBhenjamin, ibinguPalti, unyana kaRafu;"
Numbers13:10 kwisizwe sakwaZebhulon, ibinguGadiyeli, unyana kaSodi;"
Numbers13:11 kwisizwe sakwaYosefu, kwisizwe sakwaManase, ibinguGadi, unyana kaSusi;"
Numbers13:12 kwisizwe sakwaDan, ibinguAmiyeli, unyana kaGemali;"
Numbers13:13 kwisizwe sakwa-Ashere nguSeture, unyana kaMikayeli;"
Numbers13:14 kwisizwe sakwaNafetali, ibinguNagibhi, unyana kaWofi;"
Numbers13:15 kwisizwe sakwaGadi ibinguGehuweli, unyana kaMagi;"
Numbers13:16 Ngawo lawo amagama amadoda awawathumayo uMoses, ukuba aye kuhlola ilizwe. uMoses wabiza uHoseya, unyana kaNun, uYoshuwa."
Numbers13:17 Wabathuma uMoses, ukuba baye kuhlola ilizwe lakwaKanan, wathi kubo, Hambani niye ngapha ezantsi, ninyuke entabeni;"
Numbers13:18 Kwaye khangelani ihlabathi elikhoyo; nabantu abemi khona, nokuba bomelele, nokuba bathambile, bambalwa, nokuba baninzi;"
Numbers13:19 Yaye liyintoni na ihlabathi abaphila kulo, enoba lilungile okanye libi kusini na; nokuba zeziphi na izixeko abahlala kuzo, enoba basezintenteni okanye basezinqabeni;"
Numbers13:20 ukuba linjani na ilizwe elo, liyachuma, alichumi, kusini na; Yomelelani, nivelise iziqhamo zelizwe. Ngoku yayilixesha leziqhamo zokuqala ezivuthiweyo."
Numbers13:21 Bandula ke benyuka baza balihlola ilizwe ukususela entlango yaseTsin ukusa eRehobhi ukuya kufikelela eHamati.
Numbers13:22 Benyuka baya ezantsi, beza eHebron; apho kwakukho uAkiman, uSheshayi noTalemayi, oonyana baka-Anaki. Ke iHebron yayakhiwe iminyaka esixhenxe ngaphambi kweTsohan yaseYiputa."
Numbers13:23 Bafika entilini yomlambo waseEshkole, bagawula khona umdiliya onesihloko esinye seediliya, bawuthwala ngentonga phakathi kwawo; beza neerharnati namakhiwane."
Numbers13:24 Loo ndawo yathiywa igama lesihlambo sase-Eshkole, ngenxa yeediliya ababezivuna kuso oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers13:25 Abuya emva kweentsuku ezimashumi mane, eza kulihlola ilizwe."
Numbers13:26 Eza afika kuMoses, nakuAron, nakwibandla lonke loonyana bakaSirayeli, entlango yaseParan eKadeshe; wabaxelela, nakwibandla lonke, wabazisa eziqhameni zelizwe."
Numbers13:27 Bamxelela besithi, Sifikile kwelo zwe usithume kulo; inene, libaleka amasi nobusi; sisiqhamo sawo ke esi."
Numbers13:28 Ke bona abantu abemi kwelo zwe baqinisa amandla, imizi yakhiwe ngeendonga ezinkulu kunene; sabona nabantwana baka Enake apho."
Numbers13:29 Ama-Amaleki ahleli ezweni elingasezantsi, namaHeti, namaYebhusi, nama-Amori, ahleli ezintabeni, namaKanan ahleli ngaselunxwemeni lweYordan."
Numbers13:30 Wabakhwankqisa uKalebhi abantu phambi koMoses, wathi, Masinyuke ngokukhawuleza, siyithabathe; ngokuba somelele ngokwaneleyo ukuba sisoyise."
Numbers13:31 Ke amadoda abenyuke naye athi, Asiyi kuya kwaba bantu; ngokuba bomelele kunathi."
Numbers13:32 Baza babazisa oonyana bakaSirayeli ilizwi elibi ngelizwe ababelihlola, besithi, Ilizwe esacanda kulo silihlola, lilizwe elidla abemi balo; yaye bonke abantu esababonayo kuyo bangabantu abade."
Numbers13:33 Sazibona khona iinkomo, oonyana baka-Enaki, bakubaFarisi; yaye emehlweni ethu saba njengeenkumbi, yaye sasinjalo emehlweni abo."
Numbers14:1 Laduma lonke ibandla; balila abantu ngobo busuku.
Numbers14:2 Babakrokrela ooMoses noAron bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli, lathi kubo lonke ibandla, Akwaba besifele ezweni laseYiputa! okanye uThixo angasibulala kule ntlango!"
Numbers14:3 Kwakutheni ukuze uYehova asizise kweli hlabathi ukuze sibulawe ngekrele, baze abafazi nabantwana bethu babe ngabathinjwa? Akusilungele na kanye ukuba sibuyele eYiputa?"
Numbers14:4 Bathetha omnye komnye besithi, Masizinyulele ukumkani, sibuyele eYiputa."
Numbers14:5 Bawa ngobuso uMoses noAron phambi kwebandla lonke lebandla loonyana bakaSirayeli.
Numbers14:6 uYoshuwa unyana kaNun, noKalebhi unyana kaYefune, ababephakathi kwabo babethimbe ilizwe, bazikrazula iingubo zabo."
Numbers14:7 Athetha kwisihlwele sonke soonyana bakaSirayeli, esithi, Ilizwe esacanda kulo silihlola, lilizwe elihle kunene."
Numbers14:8 Ukuba uYehova uyakholiswa sithi, wosisa kweli lizwe, asinike; lilizwe elibaleka amasi nobusi."
Numbers14:9 Kodwa musani ukugwilika kuYehova, ningaboyiki abantu belo zwe nina; ngokuba kukudla kwethu; Umkile kubo ikhusi labo, ngokuba uYehova unathi; musani ukuboyika."
Numbers14:10 Lathi lonke ibandla mabaxulutywe ngamatye. Babonakala ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova ententeni yokuhlangana, phambi koonyana bonke bakaSirayeli."
Numbers14:11 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Kuya kuda kube nini na bengandithobeli aba bantu? kwaye kuyakuthatha ixesha elingakanani phambi kokuba bandikholelwe, ngenxa yayo yonke imimangaliso endiyenzileyo phakathi kwabo?"
Numbers14:12 Ndiya kuwohlwaya ngesibetho ndize ndiwuhluthe, ndikwenze ube luhlanga olukhulu nolomeleleyo kunalo."
Numbers14:13 Wathi uMoses kuYehova, AmaYiputa avile, ukuba ulukhuphe ngesandla sakho olu hlanga phakathi kwawo;"
Numbers14:14 Boxelela abantu beli lizwe, ngokuba bevile ukuba iNkosi yakho iphakathi kwaba bantu, nokuba iNkosi yakho ibonwa ubuso ngobuso, nokuba ilifu lakho liphezu kwabo, ubakhokela emini kubumnyama belifu nakubumnyama bomlilo ebusuku."
Numbers14:15 Ukuba uthe walubulala lonke olu hlanga njengamntu mnye, zothi iintlanga eziluvileyo udumo lwakho, zithi,"
Numbers14:16 Ngenxa yokuba uYehova ebengenako ukubasa aba bantu ezweni abebafungele lona, ngenxa yoko wababulala entlango."
Numbers14:17 Ke kaloku, ngamana amandla enkosi yam abe makhulu, njengoko uthethileyo ukuthi:"
Numbers14:18 uYehova uzeka kade umsindo, unemfesane enkulu, uxolela ubugwenxa nezikreqo, angamenzi msulwa onetyala, ubuvelela ubugwenxa booyise koonyana, kwesesithathu nakwesesine isizukulwana."
Numbers14:19 Buxolele ubugwenxa baba bantu ngobuninzi benceba yakho, njengoko ubuxoleleyo ubugwenxa baba bantu, uthabathele eYiputa wezisa apha."
Numbers14:20 Wathi uYehova, Ndikuxolele ngelizwi lakho."
Numbers14:21 Noko ke, ndiphila nje, ihlabathi lonke liya kuzaliswa bubuqaqawuli bukaYehova."
Numbers14:22 Ekubeni bonke bebubonile ubuqaqawuli bam, nemisebenzi yam ebalulekileyo endayenzayo eYiputa nasentlango, bandilingile ngoku izihlandlo ezilishumi, abaliphulaphula izwi lam;"
Numbers14:23 Okunene abayi kulibona ilizwe endafunga kooyise ngalo, bengaliboni namnye kwabandingcikivayo;"
Numbers14:24 Ke yena umkhonzi wam uKalebhi, ngenxa enokuba ebenamoya wumbi, wandilandela kwaphela, ndomzisa ezweni ebeye kulo; Ilidle ilifa imbewu yakhe."
Numbers14:25 Abemi ke ama-Amaleki namaKanan entilini leyo. Jikani ngomso, niye entlango ngendlela eya eShelfeshe;"
Numbers14:26 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses nakuAron, esithi,"
Numbers14:27 Kuya kuda kube nini na ndilithwele eli bandla lingendawo likrokrayo? Ndeva ke ukuduma koonyana bakaSirayeli, ekuthetheni kwabo ngam."
Numbers14:28 Yithi kubo, Ndihleli nje, utsho uYehova, njengoko nithethileyo ezindlebeni zam, ndiya kwenjenjalo kuni."
Numbers14:29 Izidumbu zenu ziya kuwa kule ntlango; nabo bonke ababhaliweyo ngani, bebonke ngokwenani lenu, bethabathela kominyaka imashumi mabini ezelwe, kwesa kwabakhulu, bona badunyiswa ndim."
Numbers14:30 Aniyi kungena kulo ilizwe endafungayo ukuba ndonenza kulo, ngaphandle kukaKalebhi unyana kaYefune noYoshuwa unyana kaNun."
Numbers14:31 Kodwa nina bantwana abancinane enithe niya kuthinjwa, ndiya kubazisa, yaye baya kulazi ilizwe enilicekisileyo."
Numbers14:32 Kodwa nina, imizimba yenu, niya kuwa kule ntlango."
Numbers14:33 Oonyana bakho baya kubhadula entlango iminyaka emashumi mane, besenza ubuhenyu babo, zide izidumbu zabo ziphele entlango."
Numbers14:34 Ngokwenani leentsuku enalihlola ngalo ilizwe, iintsuku ezimashumi mane, umhla ube ngumnyaka, uya kuzithwala izono zenu iminyaka emashumi mane, nilaphule ke ilizwi lam."
Numbers14:35 Mna, iNkosi, ndathi: Ndiya kuyenza le nto kulo lonke eli bandla likhohlakeleyo elindihlanganiseleyo; baya kutshabalala kule ntlango, bafele khona."
Numbers14:36 Amadoda awawathumayo uMoses ukuba aye kuhlola ilizwe, abuya alikrokrisa lonke ibandla ngaye ngokuyihleka ilizwe."
Numbers14:37 Kwanaloo madoda azisa ingxelo embi elizweni abulawa sisibetho eso phambi koYehova.
Numbers14:38 Kodwa uYoshuwa unyana kaNun noKalebhi unyana kaYefune, ababephakathi kwamadoda awayeye kuhlola ilizwe, babesaphila."
Numbers14:39 Wawathetha ke uMoses koonyana bakaSirayeli bonke loo mazwi, bakhala abantu kakhulu."
Numbers14:40 Bavuka kusasa, benyuka baya encotsheni yentaba, besithi, Yabona, sikho, siyanyuka siye kuloo ndawo wayithembisa uYehova, ngokuba soyisakele."
Numbers14:41 Wathi uMoses, Yini na ukuba niwaphule umthetho kaYehova? kodwa ayiyi kuphumelela."
Numbers14:42 Musani ukunyuka, kuba uYehova akakho phakathi kwenu; hleze nigxothwe ziintshaba zenu."
Numbers14:43 Ngokuba ama-Amaleki namaKanan aphambi kwenu, niya kuwa likrele; ngokuba umnikele umva uYehova, akayi kuba nawe uYehova."
Numbers14:44 Basuka baba nobuganga, benyuka baya encotsheni yenduli; Ke yona ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova, noMoses ayiphumanga eminqubeni."
Numbers14:45 Ehla ke ama-Amaleki namaKanan awayehlala kuloo nduli, awoyisa aza adubaduba lawo ukuya kufikelela eHorem."
Numbers15:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Numbers15:2 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi kubo, Xa nithe nafika ezweni lezakhiwo zenu endininika lona,"
Numbers15:3 nosondeza kuYehova idini elinyukayo, nokuba lidini elinyukayo, nokuba lidini elinyukayo, nokuba libe lidini elinyukayo, nokuba libe lidini lokuqhutywa yintliziyo, libe lidini elinyukayo kuYehova, libe lidini elinyukayo, nokuba libe livumba elithozamisayo kuYehova, nokuba yinkomo, nokuba yinkomo, nokuba lidini elinyukayo eyenkomo, neyeenkomo umhlambi:"
Numbers15:4 Lowo uwuzisa umsondezo wakhe kuYehova, wosondeza isahlulo seshumi sehin yeoli, ukudla kwasemlilweni;"
Numbers15:5 nomnikelo othululwayo nesahlulo sesine sehin yewayini, kunye nedini elinyukayo, nokuba ngumbingelelo, ube ngowamvana-nye."
Numbers15:6 Nokuba ngowenkunzi yegusha, wenze umnikelo wokudla ube zizahlulo ezibini zesishumi somgubo ocoliweyo, neoli ibe sisahlulo sesithathu sehin."
Numbers15:7 Yaye uya kunikela isahlulo sesithathu sehin yewayini njengomnikelo othululwayo, ibe livumba elithozamisayo kuYehova."
Numbers15:8 Xa uthe wenza inkomo ibe lidini elinyukayo, nokuba yeyesibhambathiso, nokuba ngumbingelelo wokubulela kuYehova;"
Numbers15:9 Yaye umele azise umnikelo wasemlilweni wezahlulo ezithathu zesishumi somgubo ocoliweyo nesiqingatha sehin yeoli ndawonye nenkunzi yenkomo.
Numbers15:10 Wosondeza isiqingatha sehin yewayini ibe ngumnikelo othululwayo, ibe livumba elithozamisayo kuYehova;"
Numbers15:11 Kwenziwa oko ngenkunzi yenkomo enye, nokuba kukwinkunzi yegusha enye, nokuba kukwimvana enye, nokuba kukwitakane lebhokhwe elinye."
Numbers15:12 Ngokwenani eniya kulilungisa, yenzani ngokunjalo elowo ngokwenani lakhe."
Numbers15:13 Wonk’ ubani ozalelwe kwelo lizwe uya kuzenza ezi zinto ngokunikela umnikelo wasemlilweni onevumba elithozamisayo kuYehova.
Numbers15:14 Kube ngathi kuphambukele kuni umphambukeli, ezizukulwaneni zenu, xa athe waphambukela kuni, wazisa ivumba elithozamisayo kuYehova, ivumba elithozamisayo; njengoko nisenza ngako, uya kwenza ngako."
Numbers15:15 Woba mnye umthetho kuni ebandleni nakumphambukeli ophambukele kuni, ube ngumthetho wexesha elingenammiselo kwizizukulwana zenu; njengoko unjalo wena, woba njalo umphambukeli phambi koYehova."
Numbers15:16 Wosebenza umthetho mnye, nendlela enye, kuni nakumphambukeli ophambukele phakathi kwenu."
Numbers15:17 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers15:18 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi kubo, Xa nithe nafika kulo ilizwe elo ndinisa kulo,"
Numbers15:19 Ngoku ke, ukuba nithe nasidla isonka selo lizwe, nosondeza umnikelo kuYehova."
Numbers15:20 Sondelani isonka eso sentlama sentlama yenu, sibe lidini elinyukayo; woyiphakamisa njengoko wenza ngako kwisabelo sesibetho."
Numbers15:21 Kowokuqala kwintlama yenu nomnika uYehova umnikelo kwizizukulwana zenu.
Numbers15:22 Ukuba nithe nalahleka, anayigcina yonke imithetho abethe uYehova wayiwisela uMoses;"
Numbers15:23 Zonke izinto uYehova waniwisela umthetho ngazo ngoMoses, kususela koko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses, nakwizizukulwana zenu;"
Numbers15:24 Ukuba oku kuthe kwenziwa ningalazi ibandla lonke, ibandla lonke losondeza umnikelo otshiswayo, ivumba elithozamisayo kuYehova, nomnikelo wakhe wokudla, nomnikelo wakhe othululwayo ngokomthetho, nenkunzi yemvu ibe nye, ibe lidini lesono."
Numbers15:25 Umbingeleli wozicamagushela izono zebandla lonke loonyana bakaSirayeli; ngokuba ikukungazi; yaye bawuzisa umbingelelo wabo wasemlilweni kuYehova nomnikelo wabo wesono phambi koYehova ngenxa yokungazi kwabo.
Numbers15:26 Loxolelwa ke lonke ibandla loonyana bakaSirayeli, nomphambukeli ophambukele phakathi kwenu; kuba bonke abantu bebengazi."
Numbers15:27 Ukuba ubani uthe wona engazi, wosondeza ithokazi lenkomo elimnyaka mnye, libe lidini lesono."
Numbers15:28 Umbingeleli wozicamagushela izono zomphefumlo owonayo ngongazi, xa uthe wona ngempazamo phambi koYehova, awucamagushele; kwaye uya kuxolelwa."
Numbers15:29 Woba mnye umyalelo kuni ngowonileyo, engazi, nakozalelwe phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, nakowasemzini ophambukele phakathi kwabo."
Numbers15:30 Ke yena othe wakhukhumala, waba ngozalelwe ezweni nokuba ngumphambukeli, uyamdela uYehova; loo mphefumlo wonqanyulwa, ungabikho ebantwini bakowawo."
Numbers15:31 Ngokuba ulidelile ilizwi likaYehova, uwaphule nomyalelo wakhe: loo mphefumlo wohlwaywa ngesiqalekiso; ubugwenxa bakhe buphezu kwakhe."
Numbers15:32 Kwathi, oonyana bakaSirayeli besentlango, bafumana umntu ethwele iinkuni ngomhla wesabatha."
Numbers15:33 Abo bamfumanayo ethwele iinkuni, bamsondeza kuMoses nakuAron nakwibandla lonke;"
Numbers15:34 bamfaka elugcinweni, kuba bekungekathethwa nto eza kwenziwa ngaye."
Numbers15:35 Wathi uYehova kuMoses: “Inene, loo mntu uya kubulawa; Lamngqinga lonke ibandla ngaphandle kweminquba."
Numbers15:36 Lonke ibandla lamkhuphela ngaphandle kweminquba, lamxuluba ngamatye, wafa; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Numbers15:37 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers15:38 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi kubo, mabenze imiqukumbelo yeempahla zabo ngokwemizalwane yabo, bafake umsonto omfusa emqukumbelweni waloo miqukumbelo."
Numbers15:39 Woba ngumqondiso kuni, ukuba niwubone, niyikhumbule yonke imithetho kaYehova, niyenze; nokuze ungayigocagoci intliziyo yakho namehlo akho, obuye wahenyuza emva koko;"
Numbers15:40 ukuze niyikhumbule niyenze yonke imiyalelo yam, nibe ngcwele kuThixo wenu."
Numbers15:41 NdinguYehova uThixo wenu, onikhuphileyo ezweni laseYiputa, ukuba ndibe nguThixo kuni; NdinguYehova, uThixo wenu."
Numbers16:1 uKore, unyana kaItsare, unyana kaKehati, unyana kaLevi, noDatan, noAbhiram, oonyana bakaEliyabhi, no-On unyana kaPelete, oonyana bakaRubhen."
Numbers16:2 Bema phambi koMoses, ndawonye nabanye boonyana bakaSirayeli, iinkosana zebandla ezingamakhulu amabini anamashumi amahlanu, ezaziwayo ebandleni, nezazidumileyo;"
Numbers16:3 Bababiza uMoses noAron, bathi kubo, Nisenanele nina, ngokuba lingcwele lonke ibandla, elowo kubo; uYehova uphakathi kwabo; niziphakamisile ngoko ebandleni likaYehova?"
Numbers16:4 Akuyiva uMoses loo nto, wawa ngobuso."
Numbers16:5 Wathetha kuKore nakwingxokolo yakhe yonke, esithi, Ngomso uYehova uya kumazisa ongcwele; wasondela kuye; lowo amnyulileyo uya kumsondeza kuye."
Numbers16:6 Yenzani; zithabatheni iingcedevu, wena Kora nebandla lakhe lonke;"
Numbers16:7 Galela umlilo kuyo uze ugalele nesiqhumiso kuso phambi koYehova, yaye umntu athe uYehova wamnyula woba ngcwele; nidla kakhulu, nyana bakaLevi."
Numbers16:8 Wathi uMoses kuKora: “Phulaphulani, nina bonyana bakaLevi!"
Numbers16:9 Yinto encinane na kuni, ukuba uThixo kaSirayeli aninyule phakathi kwebandla lakwaSirayeli, ukuba anisondeze kuye, nisebenze umsebenzi womnquba kaYehova, nime phambi kwebandla, nilungiselele?"
Numbers16:10 wakuthabatha, wena nabazalwana bakho bonke, oonyana bakaLevi, ndawonye nawe; ningaba nifuna nobubingeleli na?"
Numbers16:11 Yini na ukuba nihlanganisene kuYehova wena nesihlwele sakho sonke, yaye uyintoni na uAron ukuba ummbombozelele?"
Numbers16:12 Wathumela uMoses, wabiza uDatan noAbhiram, oonyana bakaEliyabhi bathi, Asiyi kunyuka sinyuke."
Numbers16:13 Yinto encinane na le yokuba usikhuphe ezweni elivelisa amasi nobusi, uze kusibulala apha entlango, ukuba akuzenzanga ukumkani wethu kanye?"
Numbers16:14 Kananjalo akusingenisanga ezweni elibaleka amasi nobusi, akusinikanga lifa lamasimi nezidiliya; Uya kuwakrazula na amehlo aba bantu? asiyi kunyuka."
Numbers16:15 Wavutha kakhulu ngumsindo uMoses, wathi kuYehova: “Musa ukuyiphulaphula imibingelelo yabo;"
Numbers16:16 Wathi uMoses kuKora, Wena nengxokolo yakho yonke, noba phambi koYehova, wena nabo, noAron."
Numbers16:17 Makathabathe elowo isitya sakhe somlilo, agalele kuso isiqhumiso, asondeze elowo isitya sakhe somlilo phambi koYehova, elowo abe neengcedevu zakhe ezimakhulu mabini anamanci mahlanu; wena noAron elowo epanini yakhe."
Numbers16:18 Wathabatha elowo ugcedevu lwakhe, wabeka umlilo kuso, wagalela isiqhumiso phezu kwaso, wema noMoses noAron emnyango wentente yokuhlangana."
Numbers16:19 uKora walibizela ndawonye ngabo ibandla lonke emnyango wentente yokuhlangana, babonakala ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova kwibandla lonke."
Numbers16:20 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses nakuAron, esithi,"
Numbers16:21 Zahluleni kweli bandla, ukuze ndiliphelise kwaoko."
Numbers16:22 Bawa ngobuso, bathi, Camagu, Thixo, Thixo wemiphefumlo yenyama yonke, ùnokona na umntu omnye, unoburhalarhume kwibandla lonke na?"
Numbers16:23 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers16:24 Uze uthethe kwibandla, uthi, Sukani nize ngeenxa zonke emnqubeni kaKora noDatan noAbhiram."
Numbers16:25 Wemka uMoses, waya kuDatan noAbhiram; amlandela amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli."
Numbers16:26 Wathetha nebandla, wathi, Phumani ezintenteni zala madoda angendawo, ningachukumisi nto iyeyawo, hleze nitshabalale ezonweni zawo zonke."
Numbers16:27 Benyuka bemka emnqubeni kaKora noDatan noAbhiram, bajikelezisa; baphuma ooDatan noAbhiram, bema emnyango weentente zabo, nabafazi babo, noonyana babo, nabantwana babo."
Numbers16:28 Wathi uMoses, Niya kwazi ngale nto, ukuba uYehova undithumele ukwenza yonke le misebenzi; kuba andenzanga ngokuthanda kwam."
Numbers16:29 Ukuba aba bathe bafa ngokufa kwabantu bonke, nokuba bathe bathweswa isohlwayo sabantu bonke; uYehova akandithumanga."
Numbers16:30 Ke ukuba uYehova uthe wenza into entsha, umhlaba wavula umlomo wawo, wabaginya, nento yonke abanayo, behla baye emhadini behleli; uya kwandula uqonde ukuba kutheni la madoda ehlekisa ngawo uYehova."
Numbers16:31 Akugqiba ukuwathetha onke la mazwi, waqhekeka umhlaba obuphantsi kwabo."
Numbers16:32 Ngoko umhlaba wawuvula umlomo wawo waza wabaginya bona nezindlu zabo nabo bonke abantu bakaKora nempahla yabo yonke.
Numbers16:33 Behla bona besaphilile, nento yonke ababenayo, baya emhadini, umhlaba wabavala, batshabalala phakathi kwebandla."
Numbers16:34 Onke oonyana bakaSirayeli ababebalindile ngaphakathi basaba ngenxa yokukhala kwabo; ngokuba babesithi, Hleze usiginye umhlaba."
Numbers16:35 Kwandula ke kwaphuma umlilo ovela kuYehova waza watshisa amadoda angamakhulu amabini anamashumi amahlanu awayezisa isiqhumiso.
Numbers16:36 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers16:37 Thetha kuElazare, unyana ka-Aron, umbingeleli, ukuba azithabathe iingcedevu zomlilo ovuthayo, awubeke khona umlilo; ngokuba bathenjisiwe."
Numbers16:38 Neengcedevu zabo bonayo ngakwimiphefumlo yabo, zozenza zibe ziipleyiti zokwaleka isibingelelo; ngokuba ayexhelele khona phambi koYehova, zangcwaliswa; ibe ngumqondiso koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers16:39 Wazithabatha ke umbingeleli uElazare izitya zesiqhumiso zobhedu, ababetshiswe ngazo; neepanele ezibanzi zesibingelelo."
Numbers16:40 Yaba sisikhumbuzo koonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuba kungabikho mntu wasemzini, ongoonyana baka-Aron, osondela ukuba aqhumisele ngesiqhumiso phambi koYehova; ukuze angabi njengoKora nakwinkoliso yabantu bakhe, njengoko uYehova wathethayo kuye ngoMoses."
Numbers16:41 Labakrokrela ooMoses noAron ngengomso lonke ibandla loonyana bakaSirayeli, lisithi, Nina nibabulele abantu bakaYehova."
Numbers16:42 Lababizela ndawonye ibandla uMoses noAron, bakhangela ententeni yokuhlangana; nalo ilifu liyisibekele, babonakala ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova."
Numbers16:43 Beza ooMoses noAron phambi kwentente yokuhlangana.
Numbers16:44 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers16:45 Suka kweli bandla, ndilitshabalalise kamsinya; Bawa ngobuso."
Numbers16:46 Wathi uMoses kuAron: “Thabatha ugcedevu uze ugalele umlilo ovela esibingelelweni phezu kwaso, ugalele nesiqhumiso phezu kwaso, uye ngokukhawuleza uye ebandleni, usicamagushele, ngenxa yokuba kuphume umsindo kaYehova; isibetho siqalile."
Numbers16:47 Wathabatha uAron njengoko uMoses wamwisela umthetho, wabaleka phakathi kwebandla; nanko ke, uqalile ukwahlukana phakathi kwabantu, wabavuthulula inkunkuma abantu;"
Numbers16:48 Wema phakathi kwabafileyo nabahleliyo; sathintelwa isibetho.
Numbers16:49 Abo bafayo sisibetho baba lishumi elinesine lamawaka anamakhulu asixhenxe, ngaphandle kwabafayo ngenxa kaKora."
Numbers16:50 Wabuyela uAron kuMoses emnyango wentente yokuhlangana;
Numbers17:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Numbers17:2 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthabathe intonga kubo ngokwezindlu zooyise, kwiinkulu zabo zonke ngokwezindlu zooyise, iintonga zibe lishumi elinambini; bhala igama lomntu wonke kwintonga yakhe."
Numbers17:3 Wobhala igama lika-Aron entongeni yakwaLevi, kuba yoba nye intonga yentloko yezindlu zooyise."
Numbers17:4 Uzibeke ententeni yokuhlangana phambi kwesingqino, apho ndiya kuhlangana nawe khona;"
Numbers17:5 Kothi, iphupha lendoda endiyinyulileyo lityatyambe; yaye ndiza kuzibuyisela izikhalazo zoonyana bakaSirayeli abakhala ngazo ngenxa yenu kum."
Numbers17:6 Wathetha ke uMoses koonyana bakaSirayeli, yaza iinkulu zabo zamnika intonga, intonga kwinkulu yomzalwane wabo, zalishumi elinambini iintonga yaye intente ka-Aron yayiphakathi kweentente zabo."
Numbers17:7 Wazibeka uMoses imithwalo leyo emhlabeni phambi koYehova, ententeni yesingqino."
Numbers17:8 Kwathi ngengomso, wangena uMoses ententeni leyo; nantso intonga ka-Aron, wendlu kaLevi, idubule, yadubula iintyatyambo, yavelisa iiamangile."
Numbers17:9 uMoses wasondeza bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli iintonga zonke phambi koYehova. Bakhangela, elowo wathabatha intonga yakhe."
Numbers17:10 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yibuyisele intonga ka-Aron phambi kwengqina, ibe ngumqondiso kubawexuki; uzisuse kum neendudumo zabo, ukuze bangafi."
Numbers17:11 Wenza ke uMoses, njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho, wenjenjalo."
Numbers17:12 Bathetha oonyana bakaSirayeli kuMoses, bathi, Yabona, siyafa, siyabhubha, siyaphela sonke."
Numbers17:13 Nabani na osondela ententeni kaYehova uya kufa; Sodlula ekufeni na?
Numbers18:1 Wathi uYehova kuAron, Wena noonyana bakho, nendlu kayihlo, nobuthwala ubugwenxa obenziwe kwindawo engcwele; wena noonyana bakho nobuthwala ubugwenxa bobubingeleli benu."
Numbers18:2 Abazalwana bakho, esizweni sakwaLevi, esizweni sikayihlo, wobasondeza nawe, banamathele kuwe, bakukhonze; ke wena noonyana bakho nokhonza phambi komnquba wesingqino."
Numbers18:3 Boyigcina inkonzo yenu nenkonzo yomnquba uphela; kodwa mabangasondeli empahleni yengcwele nasesibingelelweni, hleze bafe, ningasondeli."
Numbers18:4 Bohlangana nawe, bagcine umsebenzi wentente yokuhlangana emsebenzini wonke wenkonzo yentente; owasemzini akayi kuza kuwe."
Numbers18:5 Gcinani inkonzo yengcwele nenkonzo yesibingelelo, ukuze kungabuyi kubuye umsindo koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers18:6 Yabonani, ndibathabathile abazalwana benu, abaLevi, phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli; ninikelwe ukuba nisebenze umsebenzi wentente yokuhlangana, kuYehova."
Numbers18:7 Wena noonyana bakho niya kwenza umsebenzi wobubingeleli benu ezintweni zonke eziphuma esibingelelweni, nangaphaya komkhusane; nokhonza; ndininikile ububingeleli benu njengesipho; yaye umxube osondelayo mawubulawe."
Numbers18:8 Wathi uYehova kuAron, Yabona, mna ndikunika umsebenzi wezipho zam zonke ezingcwele zoonyana bakaSirayeli; ndiwunika wena noonyana bakho zibe ngumxhesho ongunaphakade."
Numbers18:9 Yoba yeyakho kwizinto ezizezona zingcwele ezitshiswa ngomlilo: yonke iminikelo yabo yasemlilweni nayo yonke iminikelo yabo yasemlilweni nayo yonke iminikelo yabo yesono nayo yonke imibingelelo yabo yetyala abaya kuyinikela kum zingcwele kuwe noonyana bakho.
Numbers18:10 Niya kuyidla engcweleni kangcwele; yonke into eyindoda yozidla; mayibe ngcwele kuni.
Numbers18:11 Kwaye yeyakho; namaqashiso ezipho zabo, namaqashiso onke amaqashiso oonyana bakaSirayeli; ndikunika wena, noonyana bakho, neentombi zakho, nawe, ube ngummiselo ongunaphakade; bonke abahlambulukileyo endlwini yakho bowudla."
Numbers18:12 Yonke ioli etyebileyo, newayini entsha emnandi, nengqolowa, ulibo lwezo zinto baya kuzinika uYehova, ndikunika lona."
