Numbers18:13 Zonke iintlahlela ezisezweni, abazizisa kuYehova, zoba zezakho; bonke abahlambulukileyo endlwini yakho mabadle."
Numbers18:14 Zonke izinto ezingcwele kwaSirayeli zoba zezakho.
Numbers18:15 Yonke into evula isizalo enyameni yonke abayizisa kuYehova, ebantwini nasezinkomeni, yoba yeyakho;"
Numbers18:16 Uze ukhululwe kumntwana onyanga-nye, ngokulinganisela kwakho iishekele ezintlanu ngokweshekele yengcwele, eziigera ezimashumi mabini."
Numbers18:17 Kodwa akunako ukuwakhulula ngokumisela amazibulo enkomo, namazibulo ezimvu, namazibulo eebhokhwe; bangcwele; igazi lawo ulitshize esibingelelweni, uqhumisele ngamanqatha awo abe livumba elithozamisayo, ukudla kwasemlilweni ke oko kuYehova;"
Numbers18:18 Inyama yawo yoba yeyakho, njengetyeya eshukumayo, nanjengegxalaba lakho lasekunene."
Numbers18:19 Yonke imisondezo engcwele, abayisondezayo oonyana bakaSirayeli kuYehova, ndiyinika wena, noonyana bakho, neentombi zakho ndawonye nawe, ukuba ibe ngumthetho ongunaphakade; ingumnqophiso wetyuwa ongunaphakade phambi koYehova. Nkosi kuwe, nakwinzala yakho, nakuwe."
Numbers18:20 Wathi uYehova kuAron, Ezweni labo akuyi kuba nalifa, akuyi kuba nasabelo phakathi kwabo; Ndim isahlulo sakho nelifa lakho phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers18:21 Uyabona, oonyana bakaLevi ndibanika zonke izishumi kwaSirayeli, ukuba zibe lilifa, ngenxa yomsebenzi wabo, wenkonzo yentente yokuhlangana;"
Numbers18:22 Oonyana bakaSirayeli mabangasondeli ententeni yokuhlangana ukususela ngoku, ukuze bangathwali isono baze bafe."
Numbers18:23 Ke bona abaLevi bosebenza umsebenzi wentente yokuhlangana, bathwale ubugwenxa babo; ibe ngummiselo ongunaphakade ezizukulwaneni zenu, ukuze bangabi nalifa phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers18:24 Isishumi soonyana bakaSirayeli, abasizisa kuYehova umrhumo, ndasinika abaLevi sibe lilifa; ngenxa yoko ndathi kubo, Abayi kulidla ilifa phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers18:25 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers18:26 Thetha kubaLevi, uthi kubo, Ukuba nithe nathabatha koonyana bakaSirayeli isishumi endibanikayo, ukuba sibe lilifa lenu, nosondeza umsondezo waso kuYehova, osisahlulo seshumi sesishumi eso."
Numbers18:27 Lo mnikelo wenu uya kubalelwa kuni njengengqolowa yasesandeni nanjengokhozo lwesixovulelo.
Numbers18:28 Nosondeza umsondezo kuYehova kuzo zonke izishumi zenu, enizithabathayo koonyana bakaSirayeli; nize ninike uAron umbingeleli umnikelo kaYehova."
Numbers18:29 Eziphoni zenu zonke nosondeza wonke umnikelo ophakanyiswa kuYehova, kweyona ilungileyo kuyo yonke, ube sisahlulo sayo esingcwele."
Numbers18:30 Uze uthi ke kubo, Ukuba nithabathile ezona zilungileyo kuzo, ziya kubalelwa kubaLevi, ziyimveliso yesixovulelo sewayini, ziyimveliso yesixovulelo sewayini;"
Numbers18:31 Zidleni kuzo zonke iindawo, nina nemizalwane yenu, kuba ngumvuzo wenu lowo ngomsebenzi wenu ententeni yokuhlangana."
Numbers18:32 Ngako oko anisayi kusithwala isono, ukuba nithe nalususa ukulunga kwaso; ize ningazenzi inqambi izinto ezingcwele zoonyana bakaSirayeli, hleze nife."
Numbers19:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses nakuAron, esithi,"
Numbers19:2 Oko ke ukuze kuqiniselwe umyalelo awawuwisayo uYehova, esithi, Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, bakuzisele imazi yenkomo ebomvu, egqibeleleyo, engathwali dyokhwe."
Numbers19:3 Niyinike uElazare umbingeleli, ukuba ayikhuphele ngaphandle kweminquba, ixhelelwe phambi kobuso bakhe;"
Numbers19:4 Umbingeleli uElazare wothabatha egazini layo ngomnwe wakhe aze atshize ngenxalenye yegazi layo izihlandlo ezisixhenxe kanye phambi kwentente yokuhlangana.
Numbers19:5 Woyitshisa inkomo phambi kwamehlo akhe; Mazitshiswe isikhumba sayo, nenyama yayo, negazi layo, ndawonye nomswane wayo;"
Numbers19:6 Umbingeleli wothabatha umsedare nehisope nomthi omfusa aze aziphose ezo zinto phakathi kokutshiswa kwemazi yenkomo.
Numbers19:7 Umbingeleli wozihlamba iingubo zakhe, ahlambe emanzini, angene eminqubeni, abe yinqambi kude kuhlwe."
Numbers19:8 Lowo ulitshisileyo wozihlamba iingubo zakhe emanzini, awuhlambe umzimba wakhe emanzini, abe ngongahlambulukanga kude kuhlwe."
Numbers19:9 Uthuthu lwethokazi lenkomo indoda ehlambulukileyo yoluthabatha, ilubeke ngaphandle kweminquba endaweni ehlambulukileyo, lugcinelwe ibandla loonyana bakaSirayeli, lube ngamanzi entsomi; kukuhlanjwa kwesono."
Numbers19:10 Owola uthuthu lwethokazi lenkomo, wozihlamba iingubo zakhe, abe yinqambi, ahlwise; ibe ngummiselo ongunaphakade koonyana bakaSirayeli, nakowasemzini ophambukele phakathi kwabo."
Numbers19:11 Umntu ochukumisa ofileyo woba yinqambi iintsuku ezisixhenxe;
Numbers19:12 Wothi ngomhla wesithathu azihlambulule isono, nangomhla wesixhenxe wohlambuluka; Ukuba ke akazihlambululanga ngosuku lwesithathu, akayi kuba uhlambulukile ngomhla wesixhenxe."
Numbers19:13 Bonke abo bachukumisa ofileyo, bangazihlambululi isono, bawenza inqambi umnquba kaYehova; unqunyulwe kwaSirayeli loo moya; ngokuba engagalelwanga phezu kwakhe ngamanzi okuhlamba, woba yinqambi; ubunqambi bakhe busephezu kwakhe."
Numbers19:14 Nguwo lo umyalelo xa athe umntu wafela ententeni leyo: Bonke abangena ententeni leyo, nabo bonke abasukuba besesententeni leyo, boba ziinqambi iintsuku ezisixhenxe."
Numbers19:15 Yonke into evulwayo, engenasigubungelo, engabotshwanga phezu kwayo, yoba yinqambi."
Numbers19:16 Umntu osukuba echukumisa umntu obulewe ngekrele, nokuba sisidumbu, nokuba lithambo lomntu, nokuba lingcwaba, woba yinqambi iintsuku ezisixhenxe."
Numbers19:17 Baluzisa uthuthu lwenkomo etshiswayo yedini lesono kulowo uyinqambi, amanzi omthombo awagalela kulo ngesitya."
Numbers19:18 Umntu ohlambulukileyo ufanele athabathe ihisope, ayifunxe emanzini, afefe ngayo intente, nasezityeni zonke, nakubantu ababelapho, nalowo uchukumise unyawo, nalowo woyisiweyo okanye obanjwe ukufa, okanye ingcwaba:"
Numbers19:19 Ohlambulukileyo makafefe oyinqambi ngomhla wesithathu nangomhla wesixhenxe; Wothi ngomhla wesixhenxe, azihlambe iingubo zakhe, ahlambe emanzini, ngokuhlwa abe uhlambulukile."
Numbers19:20 Kodwa umntu ongahlambulukanga aze angazihlambululi, loo mphefumlo wonqunyulwa ungabikho ebandleni, ngenxa yokuba uye wayenza inqambi ingcwele kaYehova; akatshizwanga ngamanzi okuhlamba ukungcola; akahlambulukile."
Numbers19:21 Woba ngumthetho ongayi kubuyela kubo, wokuba lowo ugalela amanzi omqondiso, azihlambe iingubo zakhe; nalowo uchukumisa amanzi okuhlamba woba yinqambi, ahlwise."
Numbers19:22 Yonke into emchukumisayo oyinqambi yoba yinqambi; yaye umntu oyichukumisayo woba ngongahlambulukanga kude kuhlwe.
Numbers20:1 Bafika oonyana bakaSirayeli, lonke ibandla, entlango yaseTsin ngenyanga yokuqala; bahlala abantu eKadeshe wafela khona uMiriyam, wangcwatyelwa khona."
Numbers20:2 Akwabakho manzi apho ebandleni; babizela ndawonye ooMoses noAron.
Numbers20:3 Babambana abantu noMoses, bathi, Akwaba besife ukufa kwabazalwana bethu phambi koYehova!"
Numbers20:4 Yini na ukuba nilizise ibandla likaYehova kule ntlango, sifele kuyo, thina nemfuyo yethu?"
Numbers20:5 Yini na ukuba nisikhuphe eYiputa, nisizise kule ndawo imbi kangaka? asiyindawo yambewu, asiyoyamakhiwane, asiyiyo yeediliya, neyeerharnati; kwaye akukho manzi okusela."
Numbers20:6 Baphuma ooMoses noAron ebandleni, beza emnyango wentente yokuhlangana, bawa ngobuso, babonakala kubo ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova."
Numbers20:7 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers20:8 Thabatha intonga, ulibizele ndawonye ibandla, wena noAron umkhuluwa wakho, nithethe engxondorheni phambi kwamehlo abo; liya kubanika amanzi alo, ubakhuphele amanzi engxondorheni; liseze ibandla nemihlambi yalo."
Numbers20:9 Wayithabatha uMoses intonga phambi koYehova, njengoko wamwiselayo umthetho ngako."
Numbers20:10 uMoses noAron balibizela ndawonye ibandla phambi kweliwa, bathi kulo: “Phulaphulani, nina banemvukelo! Sakhupha amanzi kweli litye na?"
Numbers20:11 Wasiphakamisa uMoses isandla sakhe, wayibetha ingxondorha ngentonga yakhe izihlandlo zazibini, aphuma amanzi amaninzi, lasela ibandla nemfuyo yalo."
Numbers20:12 Wathi uYehova kuMoses nakuAron, Ekubeni ningandivumelanga ukuba ndindingcwalise phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli, aniyi kusingenisa esi sikhungu ezweni endibanika lona."
Numbers20:13 Ngawo la amanzi aseMeribha; ngokuba bakreqa oonyana bakaSirayeli kuYehova, wazenza inqambi ngabo."
Numbers20:14 uMoses wabuya wathuma abathunywa kukumkani wakwaEdom, obeseKadeshe, esithi, mzalwana, Sirayeli, uyazazi wena zonke iimbandezelo ezisihleleyo."
Numbers20:15 Behla oobawo, baya eYiputa, sahlala eYiputa imihla emininzi; asicaphukisa amaYiputa, thina noobawo."
Numbers20:16 Sabiza kuYehova, waliva ilizwi lethu, wathuma isithunywa, sasikhupha eYiputa; yabona, siyiKadeshe, sisixeko esisekupheleni kwelizwe lakho."
Numbers20:17 Masicande ezweni lakho, asiyi kucanda emasimini nasezidiliyani, singaseli manzi equleni; sohamba emendweni wokumkani, singatyekeli ekunene nasekhohlo, side sidlule emideni yakho."
Numbers20:18 Wathi uEdom kuye, Musa ukuwela kum, hleze ndirhole ikrele lam, ndilwe nawe."
Numbers20:19 Bathi oonyana bakaSirayeli kuye, Sohamba ngomendo; ukuba mna nemfuyo yam singawasela amanzi akho, ndowahlawula; Ndiya nje, ndingenzi nantoni na eyenye, ndidlule ezinyaweni zam."
Numbers20:20 Wathi, Aniyi kudlula. Waza uEdom wamxabela ngamadoda amaninzi nangesandla esithe nkqi."
Numbers20:21 Ngenxa yoko wala uEdom ukubavumela oonyana bakaSirayeli ukuba bacande ezweni labo; Wemka ke uSirayeli, wemka kuye."
Numbers20:22 Banduluka eKadeshe oonyana bakaSirayeli, ibandla lonke, bafika entabeni yeHore."
Numbers20:23 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses nakuAron entabeni yeHore, emdeni welizwe lakwaEdom, wathi,"
Numbers20:24 “uAron uya kuthatyathwa ebantwini bakowabo, ngenxa yokuba akayi kungena kwilizwe endilinike oonyana bakaSirayeli, ngenxa yokulivukela kwabo ilizwi lam emanzini aseMeribha."
Numbers20:25 Thabatha uAron noElazare unyana wakhe, ubanyuse entabeni yeHore."
Numbers20:26 Umhlube ke uAron iingubo zakhe, umnxibe uElazare unyana wakhe, amthabathe uAron, amse ebantwini bakowabo, afele khona."
Numbers20:27 Wenza uMoses njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho; benyuka eNtabeni yeHore phambi kwamehlo ebandla lonke.
Numbers20:28 uMoses wamhluba uAron iingubo zakhe, wazambathisa uElazare unyana wakhe; Wafela khona uAron encotsheni yentaba, behla uMoses noElazare entabeni."
Numbers20:29 Lakubona lonke ibandla ukuba uAron ufile, bamlilela uAron imihla emashumi mathathu, yonke indlu kaSirayeli."
Numbers21:1 Ukumkani waseAradi, umKanan, owayehlala kwelasezantsi, weva ukuba amaSirayeli abeze ngeentlola. Waza walwa noonyana bakaSirayeli, wabathimba abanye kubo."
Numbers21:2 uSirayeli wamfungela uYehova, esithi, Ukuba uthe wabanikela aba bantu esandleni sam, ndoyiqalekisa imizi yabo."
Numbers21:3 Waliva uYehova ilizwi lamaSirayeli, wawanikela amaKanan amaKanan baqalekisa bona nemizi yabo; wathi igama laloo ndawo yiHorma."
Numbers21:4 Banduluka eNtabeni yeHore, ngendlela yoLwandle oluBomvu, bajikeleza ilizwe lakwaEdom; wadandatheka kakhulu abantu ngaloo ndlela."
Numbers21:5 Bathetha abantu kakubi ngoThixo nangoMoses, bathi, Nisikhuphe eYiputa, ukuze sifele entlango apha? ngokuba kungekho sonka namanzi; esi sonka sikhaphukhaphu yasicekisa umphefumlo wethu."
Numbers21:6 uYehova wathumela iinyoka ezinobuhlungu ebantwini, zabaluma abantu; kwafa abantu abaninzi bakwaSirayeli."
Numbers21:7 Beza abantu kuMoses, bathi, Sonile, ngokuba sithethe kakubi ngoYehova nangawe; thandazani kuYehova ukuba azisuse kuthi ezi nyoka. Wabathandazela ke uMoses abantu."
Numbers21:8 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Zenzele inyoka eshushu, uyixhome emthini; yaye lowo ulunyiweyo uya kuphila, ukuba uthe wakukhangela kuyo."
Numbers21:9 uMoses wenza inyoka yobhedu, wayixhoma esibondeni, yaye xa inyoka leyo yayiluma umntu, wayephila xa ebona inyoka yobhedu."
Numbers21:10 Banduluka oonyana bakaSirayeli, bamisa iintente eObhoti."
Numbers21:11 Banduluka eObhoti, bamisa eYebharim, entlango ephambi kwelakwaMowabhi, ngasempuma."
Numbers21:12 Ukusuka apho banduluka baya kumisa iinkampu kwintlambo yaseSarede.
Numbers21:13 Anduluka khona, amisa phesheya kweArnon, entlango, ezweni lama-Amori; ngokuba iArnon ngumda wakwaMowabhi, phakathi kwamaMowabhi nama-Amori."
Numbers21:14 Kungenxa yoko le nto kuthiwa encwadini yeemfazwe zikaYehova, Oko wakwenzayo eLwandle oluBomvu, nasemithonjeni yaseArnon;"
Numbers21:15 nasemingxunyeni yezihlambo, ezihla ziye endaweni yokuhlala yaseAri, esemdeni wakwaMowabhi."
Numbers21:16 Besuka khona, baya eBhere; Lilo eli iqula, awathetha ngalo uYehova kuMoses, esithi, Hlanganisa abantu, ndibanike amanzi;"
Numbers21:17 Waza uSirayeli wavuma le ngoma: Tsiba, mthombo! cula ngayo:"
Numbers21:18 Bemba iqula izikhulu, zemba abathetheli babantu ngeentonga zabo, ngokomyalelo womthetheli-waka. Baphuma ke entlango, beza eMatana."
Numbers21:19 Basuka eMatana baya eNahaliyeli; basuka eNahaliyeli baya eBhamoti.
Numbers21:20 Bazishiya iiMoths, baya entilini ezweni lakwaMowabhi, endulini yePisga, ekhangelene neYesimon."
Numbers21:21 AmaSirayeli athumela abathunywa kuSihon, ukumkani wama-Amori, esithi,"
Numbers21:22 ndicande ezweni lakho; Asiyi kusela manzi equla, kodwa sohamba emendweni wokumkani, side sidlule emdeni wakho."
Numbers21:23 Ke uSihon akabavumelanga oonyana bakaSirayeli ukuba bacande ezweni lakhe; yaye wafika eYahashe walwa noSirayeli.
Numbers21:24 Bamoyisa oonyana bakaSirayeli ngohlangothi lwekrele, balihlutha ilizwe lakhe, bathabathela eArnon, besa eYabhoki, besa koonyana baka-Amon, ngokuba umda woonyana baka-Amon ubuliqele."
Numbers21:25 Bazithimba zonke ezo zixeko oonyana bakaSirayeli, yaye oonyana bakaSirayeli bahlala kuzo zonke izixeko zama-Amori naseHeshbhon nakwiidolophu zonke ezilapho."
Numbers21:26 Kuba iHeshbhon yayisisixeko sikaSihon, ukumkani wama-Amori, owalwa nokumkani wokuqala wakwaMowabhi waza walithimba lonke ilizwe lakhe esandleni sakhe ukuya kufikelela eArnon."
Numbers21:27 Ngako oko abathetha ngemizekeliso bathi, Yizani eHeshbhon, umzi kaSihon wakhiwe, walungiswa;"
Numbers21:28 Ngokuba bekukho umlilo eHeshbhon, nelangatye emzini wakwaSihon; Wayibhukuqa iAri yakwaMowabhi, nabathetheli beentaba zeArnon."
Numbers21:29 Yeha, wena Mowabhi! Niphahlile nina bantu bakwaKamose! Oonyana bakhe ababesabile, neentombi zakhe wabanikela ekuthinjweni kuSihon, ukumkani wama-Amori."
Numbers21:30 Sabadubula; iHeshbhon yatshabalala ukuya kufikelela eDibhon, yaye sabatshabalalisa ukuya kufikelela eNofa ukuya kufikelela eMedebha."
Numbers21:31 Bahlala ke oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni lama-Amori.
Numbers21:32 uMoses wathumela ukuba kuyithabathe iYazere, bayithimba imizi, bawagqogqa ama-Amori abekuyo."
Numbers21:33 Bajika, benyuka ngendlela eya eBhashan; waphuma uOgi, ukumkani waseBhashan, eza kubakhawulela, yena nabantu bakhe bonke, ekulweni e-Edreyi."
Numbers21:34 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Musa ukumoyika; ngokuba ndimnikele esandleni sakho, yena nabantu bakhe bonke, nelizwe lakhe; uya kwenza kuye njengoko wenzayo kuSihon, ukumkani wama-Amori, obemi eHeshbhon."
Numbers21:35 Bamoyisa yena noonyana bakhe nabantu bakhe bonke, kwada akwabakho uphilayo, balithimba ilizwe lakhe."
Numbers22:1 Banduluka oonyana bakaSirayeli, baya bamisa emfuleni wakwaMowabhi, ngasempumalanga kweYordan, malunga neYeriko."
Numbers22:2 Wakubona uBhalaki, unyana kaTsipore, konke abekwenzile uSirayeli kuma-Amori."
Numbers22:3 uMowabhi wanxunguphala kakhulu ngabantu, ngokuba bebaninzi; wakhwankqiswa uMowabhi ngoonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers22:4 Wathi uMowabhi kumadoda amakhulu akwaMidiyan, Ngoku esi sihlwele siya kudla konke okusijikelezileyo njengeenkomo, sidle ingca yelizwe. uBhalaki, unyana kaTsipore, ubengukumkani wakwaMowabhi ngelo xesha."
Numbers22:5 Wathuma abathunywa kuBhileham, unyana kaBhehore, kuPetros, osemlanjeni ezweni loonyana babantu bakowabo, ukuba bambize bathi, Yabona, kuphume abantu eYiputa; nabo bawugubungele umhlaba, bahlala ngasecaleni lam."
Numbers22:6 Yiza, undisindise aba bantu; ngokuba banzima kunam; mhlawumbi ndiya koyisa, ukuze sibe nokuboyisa kwaye sibagxothe ehlabathini; ngokuba ndiyazi ukuba osikelelayo usikelelwe;"
Numbers22:7 Ngoko izikhulu zakwaMowabhi nezikhulu zakwaMidiyan zahamba nomvuzo wokuvumisa ezandleni zazo; beza kuBhileham, bamxelela amazwi kaBhalaki."
Numbers22:8 Wathi kuwo, Lalani apha ngobu busuku; ndoninika ilizwi, njengoko uYehova aya kuthetha kum; Bahlala ke abathetheli bakwaMowabhi noBhileham."
Numbers22:9 Wafika uThixo kuBhileham, wathi, Ngoobani na la madoda unawe?"
Numbers22:10 Wathi uBhileham kuThixo, uBhalaki unyana kaTsipore, ukumkani wakwaMowabhi, uthumele kum, esithi,"
Numbers22:11 Yabona, kukho uhlanga lwaseJiputa oluwugubungelayo umhlaba; yizani nindibone; mhlawumbi ndingaba nako ukuboyisa, ndibagxothe."
Numbers22:12 Wathi uYehova kuBhileham, Musa ukuhamba nawo; Musani ukubaqalekisa abantu, kuba basikelelwe."
Numbers22:13 Wagqiba uBhileham kusasa, wathi kubathetheli bakaBhalaki, Hambani niye ezweni lenu; ngokuba uYehova uyala ukundivumela ndihambe nani."
Numbers22:14 Besuka ke abathetheli bakwaMowabhi, baya kuBhalaki, bathi, Walile uBhileham ukuza nathi."
Numbers22:15 Waphinda uBhalaki wathuma abathetheli ababebekeke ngaphezu kwabo.
Numbers22:16 Zafika ke kuBhileham, zathi kuye, uBhalaki, unyana kaTsipore, kwathiwa, Musa ukuthintela ukuza kum;"
Numbers22:17 Kuba ndokuzukisa kakhulu, ndikwenze konke ondixelela kona; yiza, undisindisele olu hlanga."
Numbers22:18 Waphendula uBhileham, wathi kubakhonzi bakaBhalaki, Angafanelana uBhalaki ethanda ukundinika indlu yakhe izele yisilivere negolide, andingekhe ndiwugqithe umlomo kaYehova, uThixo wam, ndenze okuncinane nokuba kokukhulu."
Numbers22:19 Hlala apha ngobu busuku, ukuze ndiyazi into eya kundixelela yona uYehova."
Numbers22:20 Wafika uThixo kuBhileham ebusuku, wathi kuye, Akufika la madoda eza kukubiza, suka uhambe nawo; kodwa nangona kunjalo, ilizwi endiya kukuxelela lona, kufuneka ulenze."
Numbers22:21 Kwakusasa uBhileham, wayibopha idonki yakhe, wahamba nabathetheli bakwaMowabhi."
Numbers22:22 Wavutha umsindo kaThixo ngokuba emkile. Sema isithunywa sikaYehova endleleni yomchasi. Wakhwela eesileni lakhe, nabakhonzi bakhe ababini."
Numbers22:23 Xa idonki yayibona ingelosi kaYehova imi endleleni ibambe ikrele layo elirholileyo; lathi gu bucala iesile, lasinga emaphandleni; uBhileham walibetha iesile, walijika endleleni."
Numbers22:24 Sema isithunywa sikaYehova endleleni yezidiliya, iludonga ngapha, iludonga ngapha."
Numbers22:25 Iesile lasibona isithunywa sikaYehova, laguqa, nonyawo lukaBhileham eludongeni, layibetha kwakhona."
Numbers22:26 Sahamba isithunywa sikaYehova, sema endaweni emxinwa, apho bekungekho ndlela yakucezela ekunene nasekhohlo."
Numbers22:27 Idonki leyo ithe yakusibona isithunywa sikaYehova, lasuka lawa, laqumba phantsi koBhileham, wavutha umsindo kaBhileham, walibetha ngentonga iesile."
Numbers22:28 Wawuvula ke uYehova umlomo we-esile, wathi kuBhileham, Ndikwenze ntoni na, ukuba undibethe kathathu nje?"
Numbers22:29 Wathi uBhileham kwiesile, Undiqumbisile nje, ukuba bendiphethe umkhonto esandleni sam, inene, ndithanda ukukubulala ngoku."
Numbers22:30 Lathi iesile kuBhileham, Ubukhwele idonki yakho na, kususela kwakho oko unanamhla? Ngaba ndakha ndakwenza oko kuwe?” Wathi: “Hayi!"
Numbers22:31 Wawavula ke uYehova amehlo kaBhileham, wabona isithunywa sikaYehova simi endleleni, sirhole ikrele laso. Wathoba intloko yakhe, wawa ngobuso."
Numbers22:32 Sathi kuye isithunywa sikaYehova, Ulibethele ntoni na iesile lakho izihlandlo ezithathu? uyabona, ndiphumele kulwa nawe; ngokuba indlela yakho imbi emehlweni am."
Numbers22:33 Idonki yandibona, yajika kathathu;"
Numbers22:34 Wathi uBhileham kwisithunywa sikaYehova, Ndihlulekile; kuba bendingazi ukuba umi endleleni ngokundichasa; ndiphinde ndibuyele kuwe ukuba awundithandi."
Numbers22:35 Sathi isithunywa sikaYehova kuBhileham, Hamba naloo madoda; ke ilizwi endolithetha kuwe, uze uthethe lona lodwa. uBhileham wahamba nabathetheli bakaBhalaki."
Numbers22:36 Weva uBhalaki ukuba uBhileham ufikile, waphuma wamhlangabeza emzini wakwaMowabhi, emdeni waseArnon, ngasemdeni wolwandle."
Numbers22:37 Wathi uBhalaki kuBhileham, Andikuthumelanga na ndikuthumela ukuba ndikubize? bekutheni ukuze ungezi kum?"
Numbers22:38 Wathi uBhileham kuBhalaki, Yabona, ndifikile kuwe; ndinawo amandla othetha nto ngoku? ilizwi aya kulibeka emlonyeni wam uThixo, ndiya kuthetha lona."
Numbers22:39 uBhileham wahamba noBhalaki, baya kufika eKiriyati-husoti."
Numbers22:40 Wabingelela uBhalaki iinkomo nempahla emfutshane, wazithumela kuBhileham nakubathetheli ababenaye."
Numbers22:41 Ngengomso uBhalaki wamthabatha uBhileham, wamsa entabeni kaBhahali, ukuze alibone ikamva labantu khona."
Numbers23:1 Wathi uBhileham kuBhalaki, Nditsalele apha izibingelelo zibe sixhenxe, undimisele khona iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo zibe sixhenxe, neenkunzi zeegusha zibe sixhenxe."
Numbers23:2 Wenza ke uBhalaki njengoko wathethayo uBhileham; uBhalaki noBhileham baxhela inkunzi yenkomo nenkunzi yegusha kwisibingelelo ngasinye.
Numbers23:3 Wathi uBhileham kuBhalaki, Yima emlilweni wakho, ndihambe mna; mhlawumbi uYehova wondichasa; Wenyuka ke."
Numbers23:4 uThixo waqubisana noBhileham, wathi kuye, Ndalungisa izibingelelo zasixhenxe, ndaxhelela inkunzi entsha yenkomo, nenkunzi yemvu, kwisibingelelo ngesibingelelo."
Numbers23:5 uYehova wabeka ilizwi emlonyeni kaBhileham, lathi, Buya uye kuBhalaki, uthethe le nto."
Numbers23:6 Wabuyela ke kuye, emi phambi kwedini lakhe elinyukayo, yena nabathetheli bonke bakwaMowabhi."
Numbers23:7 Waprofeta wathi, uBhalaki, ukumkani wakwaMowabhi, undizise kwa-Aram, ezintabeni zasempumalanga, wathi, Yizani, msindiseni uYakobi;"
Numbers23:8 Ndothini na ukuqalekisa angamqalekisiyo uThixo? Ndim nje, ingambanganga uYehova?"
Numbers23:9 Ngokuba ndiyambona, ndisencotsheni yamawa, ndisezindulini, ndiyambona; yabona, iintlanga ziya kuhlala zodwa, angabalwa phakathi kweentlanga."
Numbers23:10 Ngubani na ongalubalayo uthuli lwakwaYakobi, Nesahlulo sesine sakwaSirayeli ngokwenani? Mandife ukufa kwelungisa, Libe njengelalo ikamva lam."
Numbers23:11 Wathi uBhalaki kuBhileham, Yintoni na le nto undenze yona? Ndikuthabathele ukuba uziqalekise iintshaba zam, nanku uzithamsanqelisile;"
Numbers23:12 Waphendula yena, wathi, Oko akubekileyo uYehova emlonyeni wam, mandingakugcini na, ndikuthethe?"
Numbers23:13 Wathi uBhalaki kuye, Hamba siye ndaweni yimbi, apho uya kubabona; uya kubona kuphela ukugqithisela kwabo, ingabi bonke bephela; uze undicelele wona xa ulapho kum."
Numbers23:14 Wamsa emhlabeni wakwaSofim, esangweni lasePisga, wakha izibingelelo ezisixhenxe; wabingelela inkunzi entsha yenkomo, nenkunzi yemvu, kwisibingelelo ngesibingelelo."
Numbers23:15 Wathi kuBhalaki, Yima apha ngasemlilweni wakho, ndihlangane noYehova khona."
Numbers23:16 uYehova waqubisana noBhileham, wabeka ilizwi emlonyeni wakhe, wathi, Hamba uye kuBhalaki, uthethe naye."
Numbers23:17 Ekufikeni kwakhe kuye, nanko emi ngakumnikelo wakhe otshiswayo, kunye neenkosana zakwaMowabhi. Wathi uBhalaki kuye, Utsho uYehova?"
Numbers23:18 Wawuthetha ngomzekeliso wakhe, wathi, Yima, Bhalaki, uve; ndiphulaphule, nyana kaTsipore;"
Numbers23:19 uThixo akamntu ukuba axoke; nonyana womntu, ukuze azohlwaye; utsho kanti akunjalo? ethethile nje akaqondi?"
Numbers23:20 Yabona, ndamkele umthetho wokusikelela, wasikelela; kwaye andinako ukuyibuyisela umva."
Numbers23:21 Akubona bubi kuYakobi, akubona nkohliso kuSirayeli; uYehova uThixo wakhe unaye, nesikhalo sokumkani siphakathi kwabo."
Numbers23:22 uThixo wabakhupha eYiputa; unamandla e-unicorn, ngokungathi kunjalo."
Numbers23:23 Akukho kuvumisa ngoYakobi, akukho kuvumisa ngoSirayeli; Ngeli xesha kuya kuthiwa kuYakobi nakuSirayeli, Yintoni na ayenzileyo uThixo!"
Numbers23:24 Yabona, abantu baya kuma njengengonyama enkulu, baziphakamise njengehobe;"
Numbers23:25 Wathi uBhalaki kuBhileham, Musa ukubaqalekisa, uze ungabasikelele;"
Numbers23:26 Waphendula uBhileham wathi kuBhalaki, Ndathi, Bendingatshongo na kuwe, ndathi, Konke oko akuthethayo uYehova, ndiya kukwenza na?"
Numbers23:27 Wathi uBhalaki kuBhileham, Hamba ndikuse ndaweni yimbi; mhlawumbi kuya kumkholisa uThixo ukuba ufuna ndikubone apho."
Numbers23:28 uBhalaki wamsa uBhileham encotsheni yePehore, malungana noYesimon."
Numbers23:29 Wathi uBhileham kuBhalaki, Ndakhele apha izibingelelo zibe sixhenxe, undimisele apha iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo zibe sixhenxe, neenkunzi zeegusha zibe sixhenxe."
Numbers23:30 Wenza ke uBhalaki njengoko wathethayo uBhileham, wabingelela kwisibingelelo ngesibingelelo inkunzi entsha yenkomo nenkunzi yemvu."
Numbers24:1 Wabona uBhileham, ukuba uYehova ubefuna ukumthamsanqelisa uSirayeli, akasuka waya kuhlaba umkhosi njengakuqala, wabubhekisa ubuso bakhe entlango."
Numbers24:2 Wawaphakamisa amehlo akhe uBhileham, wababona oonyana bakaSirayeli behleli ngokwezizwe zabo ezintenteni zakhe; uMoya kaThixo wamfikela."
Numbers24:3 Waqala ke umzekeliso wakhe, esithi, uBhileham unyana kaBhehore, otyhilwe amehlo, wathi:"
Numbers24:4 Wathi yena owawevayo amazwi kaThixo, wabubonayo ubuso boSomandla, weyiswa nguMoya, kodwa amehlo akhe avuleka."
Numbers24:5 Hayi, ukuba ntle kweentente zakho, Yakobi, Neminquba yakho, Sirayeli!"
Numbers24:6 Njengeentlambo ezinentlambo, njengemiyezo ngasemlanjeni, njengemithi yekhala etyalwe nguYehova nanjengemisedare ngasemanzini."
Numbers24:7 Kuya kuphalala amanzi emithanjeni yakhe, imbewu yakhe ibe semanzini amaninzi, ukumkani wakhe aphakame ngaphezu koAgagi, buziphakamise ubukumkani bakhe."
Numbers24:8 uThixo wamkhupha eYiputa; unamandla endongomane; uya kuzidla iintlanga zeentshaba zakhe, awaphule amathambo azo, aziphaluse ngeentolo zakhe."
Numbers24:9 Wangqengqa, walala njengengonyama, nanjengengonyama enkulu; ngubani oza kumvusa? Unoyolo okusikelelayo, Uqalekisiwe okuqalekisayo."
Numbers24:10 Wavutha umsindo kaBhalaki kuBhileham, waqhwaba izandla; Wathi uBhalaki kuBhileham, Ndikubizele ukuba uziqalekise iintshaba zam, nanku, uzisikelele izihlandlo zazithathu."
Numbers24:11 Ke ngoko, balekela ekhayeni lakho; ndikhumbule ukukuzukisa kakhulu; yabona, uYehova uyalucekisa uzuko."
Numbers24:12 Wathi uBhileham kuBhalaki, Andithethanga nam kubathunywa bakho, obubathumele kum;"
Numbers24:13 Angafanelana uBhalaki endinika indlu yakhe izele yisilivere negolide, andingekhe ndiwaphule umyalelo kaYehova, ngokwenza okulungileyo nokuba kokubi entliziyweni yam; kodwa oko akuthethayo uYehova, ndiya kuthetha kona?"
Numbers24:14 Kaloku yabona, ndiyahamba, ndiya ebantwini bakowethu; yiza ke, ndikuxelele okuya kukwenza olu hlanga kuhlanga lwakho ekupheleni kwemihla."
Numbers24:15 Waqala ke umzekeliso wakhe, esithi, uBhileham unyana kaBhehore, otyhilwe amehlo, wathi:"
Numbers24:16 Wathi, lowo uwevayo amazwi kaThixo nokwaziyo ukwazi kOyena Uphakamileyo, obona ubuso boSomandla ulala ubuthongo, kodwa amehlo akhe avulekile."
Numbers24:17 Ndiya kumbona, kungekhona ngoku; Ndiya kumbona, kodwa kungekhona kufuphi; inkwenkwezi iya kuvela kwaYakobi, ivele intonga kwaSirayeli, ibethe eziphelweni zikaMowabhi, noonyana bonke bakaSete."
Numbers24:18 uEdom abe bubutyebi, uSehire abe bubutyebi beentshaba zakhe; yaye uSirayeli uya kwenza ngenkalipho."
Numbers24:19 Umlawuli uya kuvela kwaYakobi, atshabalalise amasalela omzi."
Numbers24:20 Kwaye xa wabona uAmaleki, wathabatha umfanekiso wakhe waza wathi: uAmaleki wayengowokuqala phakathi kwezizwe; kodwa isiphelo sakhe siya kutshabalala ngonaphakade."
Numbers24:21 Wawabona amaKanan, eqhayisile, wathi, Isakhiwo sakho siqinile, nendlu yakho uyakha eweni;"
Numbers24:22 Kodwa amaKanan aya kutshatyalaliswa ide iAsiriya iwathabathe ekuthinjweni.
Numbers24:23 Wathetha ngomzekelo wakhe, esithi, Ngubani na oya kubudla ubomi, ukuba uThixo uthe wenjenjalo?"
Numbers24:24 Kwaye iinqanawa ziya kuza zivela elunxwemeni lwaseKitim iyicinezele iAsiriya zize zicinezele uHebhere, yaye naye uya kutshabalala ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo."
Numbers24:25 Wesuka ke uBhileham, wemka, wabuyela endaweni yakhe, wemka noBhalaki."
Numbers25:1 uSirayeli wahlala eShitim, baza abantu bakrexeza neentombi zakwaMowabhi."
Numbers25:2 Zababizela abantu emibingelelweni yoothixo bazo; badla abantu, baqubuda kwizithixo zabo."
Numbers25:3 AmaSirayeli azibandakanya noBhahali-pehore, waza uYehova wawavutha ngumsindo."
Numbers25:4 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Thabatha bonke abaziintloko zabantu, ubaxhome phambi koYehova, phezu kwelanga, ukuze ubuye umsindo kaYehova kaSirayeli."
Numbers25:5 Wathi uMoses kubagwebi bakwaSirayeli, Bulalani elowo emadodeni akowabo, elowo uzibophelele kuBhahali-pehore."
Numbers25:6 Weza ke omnye woonyana bakaSirayeli, wamzisa umMidiyanekazi kubazalwana bakhe emehlweni kaMoses, nasemehlweni ebandla lonke loonyana bakaSirayeli, ababelila phambi komnyango wentente yakwaSirayeli ibandla."
Numbers25:7 Wakubona oko uPinehasi, unyana kaElazare, unyana ka-Aron umbingeleli, wema phakathi kwebandla, ephethe intshuntshe ngesandla sakhe."
Numbers25:8 Wayilandela indoda leyo yakwaSirayeli ukuya ententeni, wabahlaba bobabini, indoda yakwaSirayeli nomfazi wayo esiswini. Ngoko ke isohlwayo soonyana bakaSirayeli siyaphetshwa."
Numbers25:9 Abafayo ngesibetho baba ngamashumi amabini anesine amawaka.
Numbers25:10 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers25:11 uPinehasi, unyana kaElazare, unyana ka-Aron, umbingeleli, wawususa umsindo wam koonyana bakaSirayeli, ekukhweleteni kwakhe ngam, ukuze ndingabatshabalalisi oonyana bakaSirayeli ngekhwele lam."
Numbers25:12 Ngako oko uthi, Yabona, ndimnika umnqophiso wam woxolo,"
Numbers25:13 ube kuye nendlu yakhe emva kwakhe, umnqophiso ongabuyiyo wobubingeleli; ngokuba ebenekhwele ngoThixo wakhe, wabacamagushela oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers25:14 Igama lendoda engumSirayeli, eyahlatywayo, yabulawa kunye nomMidiyanekazi, belinguZimri, unyana kaSalu, umthetheli womkhosi woonyana bakaSimon."
Numbers25:15 Igama lenkazana leyo yahlatywayo ingumMidiyanekazi, belinguKoshebhi, intombi kaTsure; wayeyintloko yohlanga nendlu yasebukhosini yakwaMidiyan."
Numbers25:16 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers25:17 Wacinezeleni amaMidiyan, niwoyise;"
Numbers25:18 Kuba banikhathaza ngeminqweno yabo abanilukuhlayo ngayo kwimeko kaPehore nakwimeko kaKoshebhi, intombi yenkosana yakwaMidiyan, udade wabo, owabulawa ePehore ngomhla wesibetho."
Numbers26:1 Emva kokufa kwesibetho, wathetha uYehova kuMoses nakuElazare, unyana ka-Aron, umbingeleli, esithi,"
Numbers26:2 nilibale lonke ibandla loonyana bakaSirayeli, bethabathela kominyaka imashumi mabini ezelwe, banyuse, ngokwezindlu zabo, bonke abaphuma umkhosi kwaSirayeli."
Numbers26:3 Wathetha uMoses noElazare umbingeleli kubo ezinkqantosini zakwaMowabhi ngaseYordan malunga neYeriko, besithi,"
Numbers26:4 Bala abantu, uthabathele kominyaka imashumi mabini ezelwe, unyuse; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses, noonyana bakaSirayeli, ababephuma ezweni laseYiputa."
Numbers26:5 uRubhen, amazibulo kaSirayeli, ngoonyana bakaRubhen; uEnoki, owazalelwa kuye indlu kaEnoki; kwaPalu, endlwini kaBhapalu;"
Numbers26:6 kuHetseron ozala amaHetseron; kuKarmi ozala amaKarmi.
Numbers26:7 Yiyo leyo imizalwane yamaRubhen, ngokwababhaliswayo kubo ngamashumi omane anamathathu amawaka, anamakhulu asixhenxe, anamanci mathathu."
Numbers26:8 Oonyana bakaPalu nguEliyabhi.
Numbers26:9 Oonyana bakaEliyabhi yayinguNemuweli noDatan noAbhiram. NgooDatan noAbhiram, ababazekayo ebantwini, balwa noMoses noAron eqenjini likaKora, ekulweni kwabo noYehova;"
Numbers26:10 umhlaba wawuvula umlomo wawo, wabatshisa kunye neKore ekufeni kwesihlwele, ekutshatyalalisweni komlilo amadoda angamakhulu amabini anamanci mahlanu, aba ngumqondiso."
Numbers26:11 Kodwa oonyana bakaKora abazange bafe.
Numbers26:12 Ngabo aba oonyana bakaSimeyon ngokweentsapho zabo: KuNemuweli yintsapho kaNemuweli; nendlu kaYamin; eYagin, endlwini kaBhajagin;"
Numbers26:13 kwaSeraki, endlwini kaBhezerege; kuSawule indlu yakwaSawule."
Numbers26:14 Yiyo leyo imizalwane yamaSimon: amashumi amabini anamabini amawaka, anamakhulu mabini."
Numbers26:15 Ngabo aba oonyana bakaGadi ngokwemizalwane yabo: kwaTsefon yindlu kaTsefon; ngoHagi wendlu kaBhahagi; kuSuni intsapho yamaSunni;
Numbers26:16 kuOsheni ozala amaBhasni; ngoEri, indlu kaBhaheri;"
Numbers26:17 kuArodi ozala ama-Arodi; ngoAreli indlu kaBhahareli.
Numbers26:18 Zizo ezi izizukulwana zoonyana bakaGadi, ngokwenani labo: amashumi amane amawaka, anamakhulu mahlanu."
Numbers26:19 Oonyana bakaYuda nguEre no-Onan; bafela ezweni lakwaKanan uEre no-Onan.
Numbers26:20 Oonyana bakaYuda bema ngokwemizalwane yabo; iSela, yindlu yabazalwayo; ePersi yintsapho yamaPersi; nguSeraki, wendlu kaBhezeregi."
Numbers26:21 Oonyana bakaPershe ngoonyana bakaPershe; eHetseron, endlwini yamaHetseron; ngoHamule, indlu kaBhahamule."
Numbers26:22 Yiyo leyo imizalwane yakwaYuda, ngokwababhaliswayo kubo: ishumi elinesithandathu lamawaka, anamakhulu mahlanu."
Numbers26:23 Koonyana bakaIsakare ngokwemizalwane yabo: nguTola owazala isizwe sakwaTola; kumaPuwa kwisizwe sakwaPune;
Numbers26:24 ngakuYashubhi, kwindlu kaYashubhi; eShimron, endlwini yamaShimron."
Numbers26:25 Zizo ezo ke inzala kaIsakare, ngokwababhaliswayo kubo: amashumi amathandathu anesine amawaka, anamakhulu mathathu."
Numbers26:26 Koonyana bakaZebhulon ngokwemizalwane yabo: kuSerede ozala amaSardesi; kuElon, yindlu kaBhalon; ngoYahaleli, kwindlu kaYahalele."
Numbers26:27 Zizo ezo ke inzala zamaZebhulon ngokwenani labo: amashumi amathandathu anesihlanu amawaka, anamakhulu mahlanu."
Numbers26:28 Oonyana bakaYosefu ngokwemizalwane yabo nguManase noEfrayim.
Numbers26:29 Koonyana bakaManase: nguMagire ozala amaGire; uMagire wazala uGiliyadi; eGiliyadi kwaphuma isizwe sakwaGiliyadi.
Numbers26:30 Ngabo aba oonyana bakaGiliyadi: KuYezere yintsapho yamaYezere; kwaHeleki kwindlu kaHeleki;
Numbers26:31 nguAseriyeli ozala oonyana bakaSirayeli; noShekem indlu yabakwaShekem;
Numbers26:32 kuShemida ozala uBhashemida; kuHefere ozala amaHefere.
Numbers26:33 uTselofadi, unyana kaHefere, ebengenanyana, eneentombi zodwa; yaye amagama eentombi zikaTselofehadi yayinguMagala noNowa noHogela noMileka noTiresa."
Numbers26:34 Zizo ezo izizwe zakwaManase, yaye ababhaliswayo baba ngamashumi amahlanu anesibini amawaka anamakhulu asixhenxe."
Numbers26:35 Ngabo aba oonyana bakaEfrayim ngokweentsapho zabo: NguNashela yintsapho yamaShutela; eBheger, endlwini kaBhabhaki; eTahane, endlwini kaBhatahan."
Numbers26:36 Ngabo aba oonyana bakaSutela: kwaEran yintsapho kaBhaheran.
Numbers26:37 Zizo ezi izizukulwana zoonyana bakaEfrayim, ngokwababhaliswayo kubo, baba ngamashumi amathathu anesibini amawaka anamakhulu mahlanu. Ngabo abo oonyana bakaYosefu ngokweenzala zabo."
Numbers26:38 Oonyana bakaBhenjamin ngokwemizalwane yabo: nguBhela ozala amaBhabheli; kuAshebele ozala uBhaasebele; ngoAhram, indlu ka-Akim;"
Numbers26:39 ngaseSufam, yindlu kaSufam; eHufame yintsapho kaBahufame."
Numbers26:40 Oonyana bakaBhela nguArede noNahaman; eArede, endlwini kaBhaharadi; kuNahaman yintsapho kaBhanama."
Numbers26:41 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaBhenjamin ngokweentsapho zabo, yaye ababhaliswayo baba ngamashumi amane anesihlanu amawaka anamakhulu mathandathu."
Numbers26:42 Ngabo aba oonyana bakaDan ngokwemizalwane yabo: kuShuham ozala amaShuham. Yiyo leyo imizalwane yakwaDan ngokwemizalwane yabo.
Numbers26:43 Yonke imizalwane yakwaShuham, ngokwababhaliswayo kubo, ngamashumi omathandathu anesine amawaka, anamakhulu mane."
Numbers26:44 Oonyana baka-Ashere ngokwemizalwane yabo: nguImna ozala uImna; kumaJesuit yintsapho yamaJesuits; nguBheriya, indlu kaBhabhariya."
Numbers26:45 Koonyana bakaBheriya: kwaHebhere yintsapho yamaHebhere; kwaMalekiyeli, indlu kaMalekiyeli."
Numbers26:46 Igama lentombi ka-Ashere belinguSara.
Numbers26:47 Yiyo leyo imizalwane yoonyana baka-Ashere ngenani labo; ibingamashumi amahlanu anamathathu amawaka, anamakhulu mane."
Numbers26:48 Oonyana bakaNafetali ngokwemizalwane yabo: nguYatsele ozala amaYatsele; ngakuGuni indlu kaBhaguni;
Numbers26:49 eYizere, endlwini yamaYizere; kwaSilleme yintsapho kaBasilme."
Numbers26:50 Zizo ezo iintsapho zakwaNafetali ngokweentsapho zabo, yaye ababhaliswayo baba ngamashumi amane anesihlanu amawaka anamakhulu mane."
Numbers26:51 Ngabo abo ababalwayo koonyana bakaSirayeli: amakhulu omathandathu amawaka anawaka-nye, anamakhulu asixhenxe, anamanci mathathu."
Numbers26:52 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers26:53 Ilizwe liya kwabelwa bona, libe lilifa, ngokwenani lamagama;"
Numbers26:54 Abaninzi wobanika ilifa labaninzi, abambalwa nobanika ilifa elincinane; elowo uya kunikwa ilifa lakhe, njengoko babalwayo ngako."
Numbers26:55 Liya kwabelwa ilizwe ngamaqashiso, balidle ilifa ngokwamagama emizalwane yooyise."
Numbers26:56 Ngokwesiphelo, ubutyebi bayo buya kwabelwa abaninzi nabambalwa."
Numbers26:57 Ngabo aba ababhaliswayo kubaLevi ngokweentsapho zabo: KuGershon yintsapho yamaGershon; eKehati, endlwini yamaHeti; ngaseMerari, kwindlu yamaMerari."
Numbers26:58 Yiyo le imizalwane yakwaLevi: yintsapho yamaLibheni, yintsapho yamaHebhere, yintsapho yamaMagali, yintsapho yamaMushi, yintsapho yamaKore. Ke uKehati wazala uAmram."
Numbers26:59 Igama lomka-Amram belinguYogebhede, intombi kaLevi, owazala uLevi eYiputa; uAmram wazala uAron noMosis noMiriyam udade wabo."
Numbers26:60 uAron wazalelwa uNadabhi noAbhihu, uElazare noItamare."
Numbers26:61 Yaye uNadabhi noAbhihu bafa ngenxa yokuzisa loo mlilo ungekho mthethweni phambi koYehova.
Numbers26:62 Ababalwayo kubo baba ngamashumi amabini anamathathu amawaka, yonke into eyindoda, ethabathela kunyana onyanga-nye inyuse; ngenxa yokuba ayengabhalwanga phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, ekubeni engazange anikwe lifa phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers26:63 Ngabo abo ababhaliswayo nguMoses noEleyazar umbingeleli owabalayo oonyana bakaSirayeli emathafeni akwaMowabhi ngaseYordan ngaseYeriko.
Numbers26:64 Ke kubo kube kungekho namnye wabababalayo uMoses noAron umbingeleli, ekubabaleni kwabo oonyana bakaSirayeli entlango yaseSinayi."
Numbers26:65 Kuba uYehova wathi ngabo: “Baya kufela entlango akwasala namnye kubo, yaba nguKalebhi unyana kaYefune, noYoshuwa, unyana kaNun."
Numbers27:1 Zangena iintombi zikaTselofehadi, unyana kaHefere, unyana kaGiliyadi, unyana kaMagire, unyana kaManase, zendlu kaManase, unyana kaYosefu; ngawo la amagama eentombi zakhe; uMagla, uNowa, uHogla, uMilka, noTirsa."
Numbers27:2 Zema phambi koMoses naphambi koElazare umbingeleli, naphambi kwezikhulu, nebandla lonke, emnyango wentente yokuhlangana, zathi:"
Numbers27:3 Ubawo wafela entlango, akakho eqeleni lababehlanganisene kuYehova kwiqela lamaKore; kodwa wafa esonweni sakhe, engenanyana."
Numbers27:4 Yini na ke ukuba igama likabawo licinywe phakathi kwemizalwane yakhe, kuba engenanyana? Ke kaloku siphe ubutyebi phakathi kwabazalwana bakabawo."
Numbers27:5 uMoses wasibeka isimangalo sawo phambi koYehova.
Numbers27:6 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers27:7 Iintombi zikaTselofehadi zathetha zalungisa, zathi, Zozinika ilifa phakathi kwabazalwana bakayise; yaye ilifa likayise malidlulele kubo."
Numbers27:8 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi, Xa ithe yafa indoda ingenanyana, nolidlulisela ilifa layo kwintombi yayo."
Numbers27:9 Ukuba ithe ayaba nantombi, ilifa layo nilinike abantakwayo."
Numbers27:10 Ukuba ithe ayaba nabazalwana, ilifa layo nilinike abazalwana bakayise."
Numbers27:11 Ukuba uyise uthe akaba nabazalwana, ilifa layo ulinike oyena usondeleyo kuye wegazi emizalwaneni yayo, alidle ilifa; ube ngumyalelo wokugweba koonyana bakaSirayeli, njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Numbers27:12 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Nyuka uye kule ntaba yeAbharim, ulikhangele ilizwe endilinike oonyana bakaSirayeli;"
Numbers27:13 Ukuba uyayibona le nto, nawe uya kususwa ebantwini bakowenu, njengoko wahlanganiswayo umkhuluwa wakho uAron."
Numbers27:14 Kuba nawuvukela umyalelo wam entlango yaseSine ngexesha laxa ibandla lalixoxisana nalo, ngokundingcwalisa ngamanzi phambi kwamehlo alo."
Numbers27:15 Wathetha uMoses kuYehova, wathi:"
Numbers27:16 uYehova, uThixo wemiphefumlo yenyama yonke, makamisele indoda yokulawula ibandla;"
Numbers27:17 onokuthi aphume phambi kwabo, angene phambi kwabo, abakhuphe, abakhuphe; ukuze lingabi njengezimvu ezingenamalusi ibandla likaYehova."
Numbers27:18 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Thabatha uYoshuwa unyana kaNun, indoda okuyo umoya, ubeke isandla sakho phezu kwakhe;"
Numbers27:19 ummise phambi koElazare umbingeleli, naphambi kwebandla lonke; wamwisela umthetho emehlweni abo."
Numbers27:20 Beka phezu kwakhe isidima sakho, ukuze liphulaphule lonke ibandla loonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers27:21 Uya kuma phambi kombingeleli uEleyazare, aze yena abuze kuye ngokwesiko leUrim phambi koYehova; Bophuma ngokomlomo wakhe, bangene ngokomlomo wakhe, yena noonyana bonke bakaSirayeli, nebandla lonke."
Numbers27:22 Wenza uMoses ngoko uYehova wamwisela umthetho ngako; wamthabatha uYoshuwa, wammisa phambi koElazare umbingeleli naphambi kwebandla lonke."
Numbers27:23 Wabeka izandla zakhe phezu kwakhe, wamwisela umthetho, njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho ngoMoses."
Numbers28:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Numbers28:2 Bawisele umthetho oonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi kubo, Ndiziseleni umbingelelo wam, nesonka sam semibingelelo yam, sibe livumba elithozamisayo kum, ngexesha elimisiweyo."
Numbers28:3 Uze uthi kubo, Kuko oku ukudla kwasemlilweni eniya kuwuzisa kuYehova; iimvana ezimnyaka mnye ezigqibeleleyo, zemini ngemini, zedini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke;"
Numbers28:4 Nilungise enye imvana kusasa, nilungise enye imvana ngokuhlwa;"
Numbers28:5 nesahlulo seshumi se-efa yomgubo ocoliweyo, ube ngumnikelo wokudla, ugalelwe ioli esisahlulo sesine sehin."
Numbers28:6 Lidini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke, liphuma entabeni yeSinayi, livumba elithozamisayo, kukudla kwasemlilweni ke oko kuYehova;"
Numbers28:7 nomnikelo wayo othululwayo woba sisahlulo sesine sehin kwimvana enye; uya kugalela iwayini enxilisayo engcweleni, ibe ngumnikelo othululwayo."
Numbers28:8 Enye imvana woyenza ngokuhlwa; Wowenza idini elinyukayo lakusasa, nomnikelo walo othululwayo, ukudla kwasemlilweni, ivumba elithozamisayo kuYehova;"
Numbers28:9 Ngomhla wesabatha iinkunzi zeemvana ezigqibeleleyo ezineminyaka emibini ubudala nezahlulo ezibini zesishumi zomgubo ocoliweyo zibe ngumnikelo wokudla okuziinkozo ogalelwe ioli nomnikelo wawo othululwayo;
Numbers28:10 Lidini elinyukayo ke elo lesabatha ngesabatha, ngaphandle kwedini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke, nomnikelo walo othululwayo."
Numbers28:11 Ekuthwaseni kweenyanga zenu nosondeza kuYehova idini elinyukayo; neenkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo zibe mbini, nenkunzi yemvu ibe nye, neemvana ezimnyaka mnye ezigqibeleleyo zibe sixhenxe;"
Numbers28:12 nezahlulo zeshumi zomgubo ocoliweyo zibe zithathu, ube ngumnikelo wokudla, ugalelwe ioli, kuyo inkunzi entsha enye yenkomo; nezahlulo zeshumi zomgubo ocoliweyo zibe zibini, ube ngumnikelo wokudla, ugalelwe ioli, kuyo inkunzi enye yemvu;"
Numbers28:13 nezahlulo zeshumi zomgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, ube ngukudla kwasemlilweni kuyo imvana enye. Lidini elinyukayo, livumba elithozamisayo, kukudla kwasemlilweni kuYehova;"
Numbers28:14 umnikelo wazo othululwayo woba sisiqingatha sehin kuyo inkunzi entsha yenkomo, nesahlulo sesithathu sehin kuyo inkunzi yegusha, nesahlulo sesine sehin kuyo imvana. Lidini elinyukayo lenyanga ngenyanga yomnyaka."
Numbers28:15 Konikelwa ngenkunzi yegusha enye ibe ngumnikelo wesono kuYehova ngaphandle komnikelo otshiswayo othe rhoqo nomnikelo wawo othululwayo.
Numbers28:16 Ngosuku lweshumi elinesine enyangeni yokuqala, yipasika kaYehova."
Numbers28:17 Ngomhla weshumi elinesihlanu waloo nyanga ngumthendeleko; izonka ezingenagwele zodliwa iintsuku ezisixhenxe.
Numbers28:18 Ngomhla wokuqala kobakho intlanganiso engcwele; ningenzi namnye umsebenzi ngayo;
Numbers28:19 Nosondeza ukudla kwasemlilweni, idini elinyukayo kuYehova; neenkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo zibe mbini, nenkunzi yemvu enye, neemvana ezisixhenxe; nibe ngongenakusoleka kuni."
Numbers28:20 Nomnikelo wazo wokudla woba ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ogalelwe ioli, izahlulo zeshumi zibe zithathu kuyo inkunzi entsha yenkomo, nezahlulo zeshumi zibe zibini kuyo inkunzi yemvu;"
Numbers28:21 Wosondeza izahlulo zeshumi zibe sixhenxe kuyo imvana enye, kuzo iimvana ezisixhenxe."
Numbers28:22 Nenkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti ibe nye, ibe lidini lesono lokunicamagushela."
Numbers28:23 Lilungiselele ndawonye nedini elinyukayo lakusasa, lona idini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke."
Numbers28:24 Ngoko imihla yonke, iintsuku ezisixhenxe nolungiselela inyama yomnikelo otshiswayo, olivumba elithozamisayo kuYehova;"
Numbers28:25 Ngomhla wesixhenxe kobakho intlanganiso engcwele kuni; ningenzi namnye umsebenzi.
Numbers28:26 Kananjalo, ngomhla wentlahlela, ukuba nizisa umnikelo omtsha wasemlilweni kuYehova emva kokuphela kweeveki zenu, yoba yindibano engcwele kuni; ningenzi namnye umsebenzi;"
Numbers28:27 Wolungiselela idini elinyukayo, libe livumba elithozamisayo kuYehova; neenkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo zibe mbini, nenkunzi yemvu enye, neemvana ezisixhenxe;"
Numbers28:28 nomnikelo wazo wokudla womgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, izahlulo zeshumi zibe zithathu kuyo inkunzi entsha yenkomo, nezahlulo zeshumi zibe zibini kuyo inkunzi yemvu inye;"
Numbers28:29 nezahlulo zeshumi zibe zibini kuyo imvana enye, kuzo iimvana ezisixhenxe;"
Numbers28:30 Nenkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti ibe nye, yokunicamagushela."
Numbers28:31 Nize niyenze ndawonye nedini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke, nomnikelo walo wokudla (zoba zezigqibeleleyo kuni), neminikelo yazo ethululwayo."
Numbers29:1 Ngenyanga yesixhenxe, ngolokuqala enyangeni leyo, kobakho intlanganiso engcwele kuni ningenzi namnye umsebenzi; yimini yesigodlo kuni."
Numbers29:2 Wosondeza idini elinyukayo, libe livumba elithozamisayo kuYehova; yanye inkunzi entsha, inkomo, nenkunzi yemvu yanye, neemvana ezimnyaka mnye ezigqibeleleyo zibe sixhenxe;"
Numbers29:3 Umsondezo wazo woba ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, izahlulo zeshumi zibe zithathu kuyo inkunzi entsha yenkomo, nezahlulo zeshumi zibe zibini kuyo inkunzi yemvu,"
Numbers29:4 nesahlulo seshumi ngasinye kuyo imvana enye kuzo iimvana ezisixhenxe;
Numbers29:5 nenkunzi yemvu ibe nye, yedini lesono, yokunicamagushela:"
Numbers29:6 ngaphandle komnikelo otshiswayo wenyanga nomnikelo wawo wokudla okuziinkozo nomnikelo otshiswayo othe rhoqo nomnikelo wawo wokudla okuziinkozo neminikelo yawo ethululwayo ngokwesiko lawo, ibe ngumnikelo wasemlilweni olivumba elithozamisayo kuYehova."
Numbers29:7 Ngolweshumi enyangeni leyo, kobakho ibandla elingcwele kuni; kwaye niya kuyithoba imiphefumlo yenu; ungenzi namnye umsebenzi ngayo."
Numbers29:8 Nosondeza idini elinyukayo kuYehova, ivumba elithozamisayo; yanye inkunzi entsha, inkomo, nenkunzi yemvu yanye, neemvana ezisixhenxe; buya kulunga kuni."
Numbers29:9 Umsondezo wazo woba ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, izahlulo zeshumi zibe zithathu kuyo inkunzi entsha yenkomo, nezahlulo zeshumi zibe zibini kuyo inkunzi yemvu inye,"
Numbers29:10 nesahlulo seshumi sibe sinye kuyo imvana enye, kuzo iimvana ezisixhenxe;"
Numbers29:11 yanye inkunzi yemvu yedini lesono; ngaphandle kwedini lesono, nedini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke, nomnikelo wazo wokudla, kwaneminikelo yazo ethululwayo."
Numbers29:12 Ngosuku lweshumi elinesihlanu enyangeni yesixhenxe, kobakho ibandla elingcwele kuni; nize ningenzi namnye umsebenzi wokukhonza, nimenzele umthendeleko uYehova iintsuku ezisixhenxe."
Numbers29:13 Ninikele idini elinyukayo, ukudla kwasemlilweni ivumba elithozamisayo kuYehova; neenkunzi zeenkomo ezilishumi elinantathu, neenkunzi zezimvu zibe mbini, neemvana ezilishumi elinane; baya kufuna isiphene."
Numbers29:14 Nomnikelo wazo woba ngumgubo ocoliweyo, ugalelwe ioli, izahlulo zeshumi zibe zithathu kuyo inkunzi entsha yenkomo inye, kuzo iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo ezilishumi elinantathu, nezahlulo zeshumi zibe zibini kwinkunzi yemvu inye, kuzo iinkunzi zezimvu zibe mbini,"
Numbers29:15 nesahlulo seshumi ngasinye kuyo imvana inye kuzo iimvana ezilishumi elinane;
Numbers29:16 nenkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti ibe nye, ibe lidini lesono; ngaphandle kwedini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke, nomnikelo walo wokudla, kwanomnikelo walo othululwayo."
Numbers29:17 Ngosuku lwesibini nobingelela iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo zibe lishumi elinambini, neenkunzi zezimvu zibe mbini, neemvana ezimnyaka mnye ezigqibeleleyo zibe lishumi elinane;"
Numbers29:18 Umnikelo wazo wokudla okuziinkozo neminikelo yazo ethululwayo yeenkunzi zeenkomo, iinkunzi zeegusha neenkunzi zeemvana, ufanele ube ngangenani lazo ngokwesiko;"
Numbers29:19 nenkunzi yemvu ibe nye, ibe lidini lesono; ngaphandle kwedini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke, nomnikelo wokudla, kwaneminikelo yazo ethululwayo."
Numbers29:20 Ngosuku lwesithathu nosondeza iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo zibe lishumi elinanye, neenkunzi zezimvu zibe mbini, neemvana ezimnyaka mnye ezigqibeleleyo zibe lishumi elinane;"
Numbers29:21 Umnikelo wazo wokudla okuziinkozo neminikelo yazo ethululwayo yeenkunzi zeenkomo, iinkunzi zeegusha neenkunzi zeemvana, ufanele ube ngangenani lazo ngokwesiko;"
Numbers29:22 nenkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti yedini lesono; ngaphandle kwedini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke, nomnikelo walo wokudla, kwanomnikelo walo othululwayo."
Numbers29:23 Ngosuku lwesine nosondeza iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo zibe lishumi, neenkunzi zezimvu zibe mbini, neemvana ezimnyaka mnye ezigqibeleleyo zibe lishumi elinane;"
Numbers29:24 Umnikelo wazo wokudla okuziinkozo neminikelo yazo ethululwayo yeenkunzi zeenkomo, iinkunzi zeegusha neenkunzi zeemvana, ufanele ube ngangenani lazo, ngokwenkqubo yazo;"
Numbers29:25 nenkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti ibe nye; ngaphandle kwedini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke, nomnikelo walo wokudla, kwanomnikelo walo othululwayo."
Numbers29:26 Ngosuku lwesihlanu nosondeza iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo zibe sithoba, neenkunzi zezimvu zibe mbini, neemvana ezimnyaka mnye ezigqibeleleyo zibe lishumi elinane;"
Numbers29:27 Umnikelo wazo wokudla okuziinkozo neminikelo yazo ethululwayo yeenkunzi zeenkomo, iinkunzi zeegusha neenkunzi zeemvana, ufanele ube ngangenani lazo ngokwesiko;"
Numbers29:28 nenkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti yedini lesono; ngaphandle kwedini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke, nomnikelo walo wokudla, kwanomnikelo walo othululwayo."
Numbers29:29 Ngosuku lwesithandathu nosondeza iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo zibe sibhozo, neenkunzi zezimvu zibe mbini, neemvana ezimnyaka mnye ezigqibeleleyo zibe lishumi elinane;"
Numbers29:30 Umnikelo wazo wokudla okuziinkozo neminikelo yazo ethululwayo yeenkunzi zeenkomo, iinkunzi zeegusha neenkunzi zeemvana, ufanele ube ngangenani lazo ngokwesiko;"
Numbers29:31 nenkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti yedini lesono; ngaphandle kwedini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke, nomnikelo walo wokudla, kwanomnikelo walo othululwayo."
Numbers29:32 Ngosuku lwesixhenxe nosondeza iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo zibe sixhenxe, neenkunzi zezimvu zibe mbini, neemvana ezimnyaka mnye ezigqibeleleyo zibe lishumi elinane;"
Numbers29:33 Umnikelo wazo wokudla okuziinkozo neminikelo yazo ethululwayo yeenkunzi zeenkomo, iinkunzi zeegusha neenkunzi zeemvana, ufanele ube ngangenani lazo ngokwesiko;"
Numbers29:34 nenkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti yedini lesono; ngaphandle kwedini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke, nomnikelo walo wokudla, kwanomnikelo walo othululwayo."
Numbers29:35 Ngosuku lwesibhozo kuya kubakho umthendeleko;
Numbers29:36 Nosondeza idini elinyukayo, ukudla kwasemlilweni, ivumba elithozamisayo kuYehova, ibe nye; ibe nye inkunzi entsha, ithole lenkomo, nenkunzi yemvu ibe nye, neemvana ezimnyaka mnye ezigqibeleleyo, zibe sixhenxe;"
Numbers29:37 Umnikelo wazo wokudla okuziinkozo neminikelo yazo ethululwayo kuyo inkunzi yenkomo, nenkunzi yegusha, nenkunzi yeemvana, ufanele ube ngangenani lazo ngokwesiko;"
Numbers29:38 nenkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti yedini lesono; ngaphandle kwedini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke, nomnikelo walo wokudla, kwanomnikelo walo othululwayo."
Numbers29:39 Niya kuzenzela ezi zinto kuYehova emithendelekweni yenu, ngaphandle kwezibhambathiso zenu neminikelo yenu yokuzithandela, iminikelo yenu etshiswayo neminikelo yenu yokudla okuziinkozo neminikelo yenu ethululwayo nemibulelo yenu."
Numbers29:40 uMoses wabaxelela oonyana bakaSirayeli njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses.
Numbers30:1 Wathetha uMoses kwiintloko zezizwe zoonyana bakaSirayeli, wathi, Yiyo le into awise umthetho ngayo uYehova."
Numbers30:2 Xa athe umntu wenza isibhambathiso kuYehova, nokuba ufunge isifungo sokuwubopha umphefumlo wakhe ngokuzikhanyeza; akalihlambeli ilizwi lakhe, uya kwenza ngako konke okuphuma emlonyeni wakhe."
Numbers30:3 Ukuba umfazi uthe wenza isibhambathiso kuYehova waza wazibopha ngoxa esendlwini kayise ebutsheni bakhe;
Numbers30:4 Uyise uya kuziphulaphula izibhambathiso zakhe, nezibhambathiso zakhe, uthi cwaka uyise kuye; emva koko zonke izibophelelo zakhe ziya kuqina, kwaye zonke izibophelelo azenzileyo, ziya kuqina."
Numbers30:5 Ukuba uyise uthe wamshiya ngomhla wokuva kwakhe oko; ukuba angabi nasinye kwizifungo zakhe azifungeleyo; uYehova womxolela, ngokuba ethe wamwisela umthetho ngako uyise."
Numbers30:6 Ukuba ithe ngendoda, ithe yabhambathisa isibhambathiso, nokuba ithe ngelizwi layo eliphuma emlonyeni wayo, ebizibophe ngalo;"
Numbers30:7 Yakuva indoda yakhe, yathi cwaka kuye ngomhla wevayo;"
Numbers30:8 Ukuba ithe indoda yakhe yamnqanda ngomhla eyakuva ngayo oko; mayenze isibhambathiso kumkayo, ekuthethileyo ngomlomo wayo, ebophe umphefumlo wayo ngako, ekuyikhanyeni; uYehova uya kumxolela."
Numbers30:9 Sonke isibhambathiso somhlolokazi nesomfazi owaliweyo, abophe ngaso umphefumlo wakhe, soma phezu kwakhe;"
Numbers30:10 Ukuba ithe yenza isibhambathiso endlwini yendoda yayo, nokuba ithe ibophe umphefumlo wayo ngako ngesifungo, isifungo;"
Numbers30:11 Yakuva indoda yakhe, yathi cwaka kuye, akamvumela; emva koko zonke izibophelelo zakhe ziya kuqina, kwaye zonke izibophelelo azenzileyo, ziya kuqina."
Numbers30:12 Kodwa ukuba indoda yakhe ithe yasitshabalalisa, mhla yakuva ngaso; ngoko okuphuma emlonyeni wakhe malunga nokuzibophelela kwakhe okanye malunga neqhina lomphefumlo wakhe akuyi kubakho; indoda yakhe yayisitshabalalisa; uYehova uya kumxolela."
Numbers30:13 Zonke izifungo nezifungo zokuwucinezela umphefumlo indoda yakhe ingasimisa, nokuba indoda yakhe ingasitshitshisa."
Numbers30:14 Ke ukuba indoda yakhe ithe cwaka kuye yonke imihla, woba siso oko; kulapho aqinisekisa khona zonke izibophelelo zakhe, okanye zonke izibophelelo zakhe eziphezu kwakhe; uyaziqinisa, ngokuba wayelele naye ngalaa mini wayivayo."
Numbers30:15 Ukuba uthe wayiva, wayitshabalalisa; uya kubuthwala khona ubugwenxa bakhe."
Numbers30:16 Yiyo leyo imithetho ayimiseleyo uYehova phakathi kwendoda nomkayo, phakathi koyise nentombi yakhe, isemncinci endlwini kayise."
Numbers31:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Numbers31:2 Xelela amaMidiyan koonyana bakaSirayeli; emva koko uya kusiwa ebantwini bakowenu.
Numbers31:3 Wathetha uMoses ebantwini, wathi, Zilungiseleni imfazwe, niwaxabele amaMidiyan, nixele kuYehova wakwaMidiyan."
Numbers31:4 Thumelani iwaka esizweni ukuba liye edabini ezizweni zonke zakwaSirayeli.
Numbers31:5 Kumawaka akwaSirayeli, iwaka, esizweni, iwaka esizweni, ishumi elinamabini lamawaka axhobele imfazwe."
Numbers31:6 uMoses wabathuma emfazweni, iwaka esizweni, bona noPinehasi, unyana wombingeleli uElazare, emfazweni, beneempahla ezingcwele, namaxilongo okukhalisa."
Numbers31:7 Awaxabela ke amaMidiyan, njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses; babulala yonke into eyindoda."
Numbers31:8 Ababulala ookumkani bamaMidiyan ngaphandle kwabo bonke ababulawayo; ezizezi: uEwi, noRekem, noShure, noHure, noRebha, ookumkani abahlanu bamaMidiyan; noBhileham, unyana kaBhehore, wababulala ngekrele."
Numbers31:9 Oonyana bakaSirayeli babathimba abafazi bakwaMidiyan, nabantwana babo, nemfuyo yabo yonke, nempahla yabo yonke, nempahla yabo yonke;"
Numbers31:10 Imizi yabo yonke ababehlala kuyo, neengqili zabo zonke bazitshisa ngomlilo;"
Numbers31:11 Bawathimba onke amaxhoba nezinto zonke ezithinjiweyo, abantu neenkomo."
Numbers31:12 Bandula ke babazisa abathinjwa namaxhoba nezinto eziphangiweyo kuMoses nakuEleyazare umbingeleli nakwibandla loonyana bakaSirayeli ababesenkampini entlango yakwaMowabhi naseYordan ngaseYeriko.
Numbers31:13 Baphuma ooMoses noElazare umbingeleli nezikhulu zonke zebandla, baya kubakhawulela ngaphandle kweminquba."
Numbers31:14 uMoses wanoburhalarhume kubo abathetheli bamaqela, namawaka abathetheli, namakhulu abathetheli-waka."
Numbers31:15 Wathi uMoses kubo, Nibakhuphe na abafazi bonke behleli?"
Numbers31:16 Yabona, yabenza oonyana bakaSirayeli kuYehova ngenxa kaPehore, ngelizwi likaBhileham; kwaza kwabakho ukufa phezu kwebandla likaYehova."
Numbers31:17 Yibulaleni ngoko yonke into eyindoda phakathi kosapho;
Numbers31:18 Ke zonke iintsana zabafazi abazanga zibe nandoda ngokulala nayo; zigcineni nina.
Numbers31:19 Hlalani ngaphandle kweminquba iintsuku ezisixhenxe. Bonke ababulele umntu, nabo bonke abasukuba bemchukumisa obulewe, zenzeni nyulu, nina nabo nibathimbileyo ngomhla wesithathu nangomhla wesixhenxe."
Numbers31:20 Zihlambeni zonke iingubo zenu, neempahla zonke zezintsu, nezinto zonke zoboya bebhokhwe, nezinto zonke ezenziwe ngomthi."
Numbers31:21 Wathi umbingeleli uElazare kumagorha aphume umkhosi, umthetho uYehova awamwisela uMoses umthetho ngawo waqinisekiswa ngawo;"
Numbers31:22 igolide, nesilivere, nobhedu, nesinyithi, nebhekile, nelothe;"
Numbers31:23 Yonke into enokumelana nomlilo, woyigalela emlilweni, ihlambuluke; nangona kunjalo, kufuneka icocwe ngamanzi adibeneyo; yaye bonke abo bangenako ukumelana nomlilo, babasasaze emanzini."
Numbers31:24 Zihlambeni iingubo zenu ngomhla wesixhenxe; nohlambuluka ke, ningene emveni koko eminqubeni."
Numbers31:25 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers31:26 Thatha inani lamaxhoba, abantu neenkomo, wena noElazare umbingeleli, neentloko zezindlu zooyise zebandla."
Numbers31:27 Ukwahlula ixhoba libe ziinxalenye ezimbini; phakathi kwabaphuma umkhosi, abaphuma umkhosi, naphakathi kwebandla lonke."
Numbers31:28 Nihlawule irhafu kumadoda omkhosi owaphuma umkhosiumkhosi kuYehova: umphefumlo ubemnye kumakhulu amahlanu, amadoda, neenkomo, namaesile, neegusha;"
Numbers31:29 Thabatha isiqingatha kuzo, unike uElazare umbingeleli, njengomnikelo ovela kuYehova;"
Numbers31:30 Esiqingatheni soonyana bakaSirayeli wothabatha ibe nye, ibe nye, nakuzo iinkomo, nakuwo amaesile, nakuwo amaesile, nakuzo iinkomo, kuzo zonke iindidi zeenkomo, uzinike abaLevi abaluse impahla emfutshane inkonzo yomnquba kaYehova."
Numbers31:31 Wenza uMoses noElazare umbingeleli njengoko uYehova wamwisela umthetho uMoses.
Numbers31:32 Ke amaxhoba lawo, awayeshiyeke ekuphangeni, awathimbayo amadoda omkhosi, yaba ngamakhulu omathandathu amawaka, anamanci asixhenxe anesihlanu amawaka;"
Numbers31:33 ngamashumi omathandathu anesibini amawaka eenkomo;
Numbers31:34 ngamashumi omathandathu amawaka anawaka elinye lamaesile;
Numbers31:35 kubo bonke abafazi abangayazanga indoda ngokulala nayo, ngamashumi omathathu anesibini amawaka amadoda."
Numbers31:36 Isiqingatha sesabelo sabaphuma umkhosi, saba ngamakhulu amathathu anamanci mathathu anesixhenxe samawaka, anamakhulu mahlanu amawaka eegusha;"
Numbers31:37 Irhafu kaYehova yeegusha yayingamakhulu amathandathu anamashumi amathandathu anesihlanu.
Numbers31:38 Iinkomo, ngamashumi omathathu amawaka, anesithandathu samawaka; kubo irhafu yokumkani ibingamashumi amathandathu anesibini."
Numbers31:39 Amaesile, ngamashumi omathathu amawaka, anamakhulu mahlanu; kubo irhafu kaYehova yaba ngamashumi amathandathu ananye."
Numbers31:40 Abantu ishumi elinesithandathu lamawaka; kubo irhafu kaYehova yaba ngabantu abangamashumi amathathu anesibini.
Numbers31:41 uMoses wamnika uElazare umbingeleli irhafu, engumnikelo kaYehova, njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Numbers31:42 Isiqingatha soonyana bakaSirayeli, awabahlulayo uMoses emadodeni okulwa;"
Numbers31:43 Isiqingatha sebandla, ngamakhulu amathathu, anamanci mathathu anesixhenxe, anamakhulu mahlanu amawaka;"
Numbers31:44 ngamashumi omathathu anesithandathu amawaka eenkomo;
Numbers31:45 ngamashumi omathathu amawaka, anamakhulu mahlanu amaesile;"
Numbers31:46 neshumi elinesithandathu lamawaka abantu;
Numbers31:47 Wacaphula uMoses esiqingatheni soonyana bakaSirayeli into emashumi mahlanu, ebantwini nasezinkomeni, wazinika abaLevi ababesebenza ententeni kaYehova; njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Numbers31:48 Basondela kuMoses abathetheli-waka, nabathetheli-waka, nabathetheli-khulu."
Numbers31:49 Bathi kuMoses, Abakhonzi bakho bawabalile amadoda okulwa, asesandleni sethu; akukho nanye engekhoyo kuthi."
Numbers31:50 Sazisa ke kuYehova ukudla kwasemlilweni, sawafumana elowo nalowo, amatye egolide, nemixokelelwane, nezacholo, nezacholo, namajikazi, namajikazi, neetafile, ukuba siyicamagushele imiphefumlo yethu phambi koYehova."
Numbers31:51 Wayithabatha uMoses noElazare umbingeleli igolide kubo, inguwo wonke umsebenzi owenziwayo."
Numbers31:52 Iyonke igolide yomrhumo ababeyizisa kuYehova yaba ziishekele ezilishumi elinesithandathu lamawaka, namakhulu asixhenxe anamanci mahlanu, evela kubathetheli-waka, nakubathetheli bekhulu."
Numbers31:53 Ngokuba amadoda okulwa azihlutha elowo indawo yakhe.
Numbers31:54 Wayithabatha uMoses noElazare umbingeleli igolide kubathetheli-waka nabamakhulu, bayizisa ententeni yokuhlangana, ukuze ibakhumbuze oonyana bakaSirayeli phambi koYehova."
Numbers32:1 Oonyana bakaRubhen noonyana bakaGadi baye benempahla emfutshane emininzi; alibona ilizwe laseYazere nelizwe laseGiliyadi, yayiyindawo yeenkomo;"
Numbers32:2 Beza oonyana bakaGadi noonyana bakaRubhen, bathetha kuMoses, nakuElazare umbingeleli, nakumadoda amakhulu ebandla, bathi,"
Numbers32:3 neAtaroti, neDibhon, neYazere, neNimra, neHeshbhon, ne-Elale, neSebham, neNebho, neBhehon;"
Numbers32:4 Ilizwe eloyiswa nguYehova phambi kwebandla likaSirayeli lilizwe lemfuyo, yaye abakhonzi bakho banemfuyo."
Numbers32:5 Bathi ngoko, Ukuba usibabale, abakhonzi bakho mabanikwe elo zwe, ukuba libe lelabo, ungasiwezi eYordan."
Numbers32:6 Wathi uMoses koonyana bakaGadi noonyana bakaRubhen, Abazalwana benu baya emfazweni, nihlale apha na nina?"
Numbers32:7 Yini na ukuba nizithethe iintliziyo zoonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuba bawele baye ezweni abanika lona uYehova?"
Numbers32:8 Benjenjalo ooyihlo ekubathumeni kwam siseKadeshe-bharneha ukuba baye kuhlola ilizwe.
Numbers32:9 Xa benyuka baya kwintlambo yomlambo oqukuqelayo wase-Eshkoli baza balibona ilizwe, bazityhafisa iintliziyo zoonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuze bangangeni kwilizwe abanika lona uYehova."
Numbers32:10 Wavutha umsindo kaYehova ngelo xesha, wafunga wathi,"
Numbers32:11 Ngokuba akuyi kulibona nalinye kuloo madoda anyukayo ephuma eYiputa, ethabathela kominyaka imashumi mabini ezelwe, anyuse, ilizwe endalifungela uAbraham noIsake noYakobi; ngenxa yokuba bengandilandeli ngokupheleleyo;"
Numbers32:12 ingenguKalebhi unyana kaYefune, umKeni, noYoshuwa, unyana kaNun; ngokuba babekufunge uYehova."
Numbers32:13 Wavutha umsindo kaYehova koonyana bakaSirayeli, wawabhadulisa entlango iminyaka emashumi mane, sada satshabalala sonke isizwe, ebesenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova."
Numbers32:14 Yabonani, nisuke ngenxa yooyihlo, inkitha yaboni, niwongeza ubushushu bomsindo kaYehova kumaSirayeli;"
Numbers32:15 Xa nithe natyeka kuye, wophinda abasalise entlango; yaye uya kulutshabalalisa olu hlanga luphela."
Numbers32:16 Basondela kuye, bathi, Izibaya zempahla emfutshane siya kubakhela emhlambini wethu, nemizi yabantwana bethu."
Numbers32:17 Ke thina siya kuphuma sixhobile, sihambe phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli, side sibaseendaweni yabo; nabantwana bethu abancinane baya kuhlala kwizixeko ezikhuselekileyo ngenxa yabemi behlabathi."
Numbers32:18 Asiyi kubuyela ezindlwini zethu, bade oonyana bakaSirayeli bazuze elowo ilifa lakhe."
Numbers32:19 Kuba asiyi kubakhohlisa phesheya kweYordan nangaphaya; ngokuba ilifa lethu liphesheya kweYordan.
Numbers32:20 Wathi uMoses kubo, Ukuba nithe nenjenjalo, ekuphumeni kwenu kuYehova, nixhobele ukulwa,"
Numbers32:21 Nowela iYordan nixhobile phambi koYehova, ade azigxothe iintshaba zakhe phambi kwakhe."
Numbers32:22 Ilizwe liya kuthotywa ebusweni bukaYehova; eli lizwe libe bubutyebi benu phambi koYehova.
Numbers32:23 Ke ukuba aniyenzi loo nto, yabonani, noba nonile kuYehova; kwaye uqiniseke ukuba isono sakho sikufumene."
Numbers32:24 Zakheleni imizi oonyana benu, nezibaya zempahla yenu emfutshane; wenze okuphuma emlonyeni wakho."
Numbers32:25 Bathetha oonyana bakaGadi noonyana bakaRubhen, bathi, Abakhonzi bakho baya kwenza njengoko inkosi yam iwise umthetho."
Numbers32:26 Oonyana bethu, nabafazi bethu, neenkomo zethu, nemfuyo yethu yonke, yoba semizini yaseGiliyadi."
Numbers32:27 Ke abakhonzi bakho baya kuwela, bexhobele imfazwe, bonke bexhobele imfazwe phambi koYehova, njengoko yathethayo inkosi yam."
Numbers32:28 uMoses wamwisela umthetho ngabo umbingeleli uElazare, noYoshuwa unyana kaNun, neentloko zezindlu zoonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers32:29 Wathi uMoses kubo, Ukuba oonyana bakaGadi noonyana bakaRubhen bawela nani iYordan, boyiswa bonke abaxhobileyo phambi koYehova, loyiswa ilizwe phambi kwenu; wandule ke ubanike ilizwe laseGiliyadi ukuba libe bubutyebi."
Numbers32:30 Ke ukuba abathanga bawele bexhobile nani, bohlala phakathi kwenu ezweni lakwaKanan."
Numbers32:31 Baphendula oonyana bakaGadi noonyana bakaRubhen, bathi, Siya kwenza njengoko uYehova wabawisela umthetho abakhonzi bakho."
Numbers32:32 Thina sohlala sixhobile phambi koYehova, singene ezweni lakwaKanan, libe lelethu ilifa lethu nganeno kweYordan ngasempumalanga."
Numbers32:33 uMoses wabanika oonyana bakaGadi, noonyana bakaRubhen, nesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase, unyana kaYosefu, nobukumkani bukaSihon, ukumkani wama-Amori, nobukumkani bukaOgi ukumkani waseBhashan, nelizwe namadlelo alo, iidolophu ezisemaphandleni."
Numbers32:34 Oonyana bakaGadi bakha iDibhon, neAtaroti, neArohere;"
Numbers32:35 neAtroti, neShofan, neYazere, neYogebheha;"
Numbers32:36 neBhete-nimra, neBhete-haran, imizi enqatyisiweyo, nezibaya."
Numbers32:37 Oonyana bakaRubhen bakha iHeshbhon, ne-Elehali, neKiriyatayim;"
Numbers32:38 neNebho, neBhahali-mehon, awaguquka amagama awo, neSibhema; nezixeko bazakha ngamanye amagama."
Numbers32:39 Oonyana bakaMagire, unyana kaManase, baya eGiliyadi, bayithimba, bawagqogqa ama-Amori abekuyo."
Numbers32:40 uMoses wamnika iGiliyadi uMagire, unyana kaManase; wahlala kuyo."
Numbers32:41 uYayire unyana kaManase waya wayithimba imizana yakhe, wayibiza ngokuba yiHavoti-yahire."
Numbers32:42 uNobha waya wayithimba iKenati namagxamesi alapho, wathi yiNobha ngegama lakhe."
Numbers33:1 Zizo ke ezi iimfuduka zoonyana bakaSirayeli, abaphumayo ezweni laseYiputa ngokwemikhosi yabo, ngesandla sikaMoses noAron."
Numbers33:2 Wakubhala uMoses ukuphuma kwabo ngokweehambo zabo ngokomlomo kaYehova; Zizo ke ezi iimhambo zabo ngokweehambo zabo.
Numbers33:3 Banduluka eRamses ngenyanga yokuqala, ngosuku lweshumi elinesihlanu lwenyanga yokuqala; Ngengomso emva kwepasika, baphuma oonyana bakaSirayeli ngesandla esiphakamileyo, emehlweni amaYiputa onke."
Numbers33:4 AmaYiputa abafihla onke amazibulo awo, awawabulalayo uYehova phakathi kwawo; uYehova wabohlwaya noothixo bawo."
Numbers33:5 Banduluka oonyana bakaSirayeli eRameses bamisa iinkampu eSukoti.
Numbers33:6 Banduluka eSukoti, bamisa e-Etam, enyeleni yentlango."
Numbers33:7 Emva koko banduluka e-Etam babuyela ePi-hagiroti ephambi kweBhahali-tsefon baza bamisa iinkampu phambi kweMigdoli.
Numbers33:8 Emva koko banduluka ePihagiroti bawela ulwandle baya entlango baza bahamba uhambo lweentsuku ezintathu entlango ye-Etam baza bamisa iinkampu eMara.
Numbers33:9 Banduluka eMara baya e-Elim, yaye e-Elim kwakukho imithombo yamanzi elishumi elinesibini nemithi yesundu engamashumi amathandathu; bamisa iintente khona."
Numbers33:10 Emva koko banduluka e-Elim bamisa iinkampu ngakuLwandle lwaseSkelf.
Numbers33:11 Banduluka eShelfeshe, bamisa entlango yeZine."
Numbers33:12 Banduluka entlango yaseSin, bahamba batyala iDofka."
Numbers33:13 Banduluka eDofka, beza kuAluse."
Numbers33:14 Bemka ke eAlus, bamisa eRafidim, apho kwakungekho manzi okuba abantu basele."
Numbers33:15 Emva koko banduluka eRefidim bamisa iinkampu entlango yeSinayi.
Numbers33:16 Emva koko banduluka entlango yeSinayi bamisa iinkampu eKibroti-hataha.
Numbers33:17 Banduluka eKibroti-hataweva, bamisa eHatseroti."
Numbers33:18 Banduluka eHatseroti, bamisa iinkampu eRitma."
Numbers33:19 Banduluka eRitma bamisa iinkampu eRimon-pere.
Numbers33:20 Banduluka eRimon-peretse, bamisa eLibhena."
Numbers33:21 Banduluka eLibhena, bamisa eRisa."
Numbers33:22 Banduluka eRisa bamisa iinkampu eKehelati.
Numbers33:23 Banduluka eKehelati, bamisa iintente entabeni eSafer."
Numbers33:24 Banduluka eNtabeni iSafa, bamisa iinkampu eHarada."
Numbers33:25 Banduluka eHarada, baya kumisa iiMekelo."
Numbers33:26 Emva koko banduluka eMaheloti bamisa iinkampu eTahati.
Numbers33:27 Banduluka eTahati, beza eTara."
Numbers33:28 Banduluka eTara, bamisa eMitka."
Numbers33:29 Banduluka eMitka, bamisa eHashmona."
Numbers33:30 Emva koko banduluka eHasmona bamisa iinkampu eMoseroti.
Numbers33:31 Banduluka eMoseroti, bemka kwaBhenjakan."
Numbers33:32 Banduluka kwaBhenjan, bamisa iinkampu eHorhagidegade."
Numbers33:33 Ekundulukeni kwabo eHore-hagidegadi bamisa iinkampu eYotebhata.
Numbers33:34 Emva koko banduluka eYotebhata bamisa iinkampu eAbron.
Numbers33:35 Emva koko banduluka eAbron bamisa iinkampu e-Etsiyon-gebhere.
Numbers33:36 Emva koko banduluka e-Etsiyon-gebhere bamisa iinkampu entlango yeTsin, eyiKadeshe."
Numbers33:37 Banduluka eKadeshe, bamisa entabeni yeHore, ekupheleni kwelizwe lakwaEdom."
Numbers33:38 uAron umbingeleli wenyuka waya entabeni yeHore ngokomyalelo kaYehova, wafela khona ngomnyaka wamashumi omane wokuphuma koonyana bakaSirayeli eYiputa, ngosuku lokuqala lwenyanga yesihlanu."
Numbers33:39 uAron ebeminyaka ilikhulu elinamanci mabini anamithathu ezelwe, ekufeni kwakhe entabeni yeHore."
Numbers33:40 Weva umKanan, ukumkani waseAradi, obemi kwelasezantsi ezweni lakwaKanan ukuba bafikile oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers33:41 Banduluka eNtabeni yeHore, bamisa iintente eTalmon."
Numbers33:42 Banduluka eSalmona, beza ePunon."
Numbers33:43 Emva koko banduluka ePunone bamisa iinkampu eObhoti.
Numbers33:44 Banduluka eObhoti, baya kuma eIye-abharim, emdeni wakwaMowabhi."
Numbers33:45 Bemka eIime, bayimisa iDibongade."
Numbers33:46 Bemka eDibongade baya kuhlala eAlmondi-Blataime.
Numbers33:47 Banduluka eAlmon-dihlatayim, bamisa ezintabeni zeAbharim malunga neNebho."
Numbers33:48 Banduluka ezintabeni zeAbharim, bamisa ezinkqantsoni zakwaMowabhi, ngaseYordan malunga neYeriko."
Numbers33:49 Bamisa ngaseYordan, bethabathela eBhete-yeshimoti, besa eAbhele-shitim, ezinkqantosini zakwaMowabhi."
Numbers33:50 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses ezinkqantosini zakwaMowabhi ngaseYordan, malunga neYeriko, esithi,"
Numbers33:51 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi kubo, Xa nithe nayiwela iYordan, nisiya ezweni lakwaKanan;"
Numbers33:52 Bagxotheni ke ngoko bonke abemi belizwe phambi kwenu, niyitshabalalise yonke imifanekiso yabo eqingqiweyo, nizitshabalalise zonke izithixo zabo ezinqatyisiweyo, nizidilize zonke iziganga zabo."
Numbers33:53 Bagxotheni abemi belizwe, nihlale kulo; kuba ndininikile ilizwe elo ukuba nilihluthe."
Numbers33:54 Lahlula ilizwe ngamaqashiso, libe lilifa kwizizukulwana zenu; Onomnika ilifa elikhulu, libe likhulu, omncinane nibanike ilifa elincinane; ilifa lomntu wonke loba sendaweni eliya kuwela kuyo iqashiso lakhe; niya kulidla ilifa kwizizukulwana zooyihlo."
Numbers33:55 Kodwa ukuba akubagqogqanga abemi belizwe phambi kwakho; ndonishiya, nihlale njengamatye emehlweni enu, namatye emacaleni enu, nithotywe ezweni enihleli kulo."
Numbers33:56 Kothi, njengoko ndagqibayo ukwenza kubo, ndenze ngako kuni;"
Numbers34:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi,"
Numbers34:2 Bawisele umthetho oonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi kubo, Xa nithe nafika ezweni lakwaKanan; (Lilo eli ilizwe eliya kuwela kuni njengelifa, ilizwe lakwaKanan nemida yalo.)"
Numbers34:3 Umda wawo ngasezantsi wothabathela entlango yeTsin, use ngasemdeni wakwaEdom;"
Numbers34:4 Umda wenu wojika, uthabathele ezantsi, uye eqhineni leAkrabhim, udlule uye eSine; usuke ezantsi, uye eKadeshe-bharneha, udlulele eHatsaredare, udlulele eAshmon."
Numbers34:5 Umda uya kusuka eAshmon, uye emlanjeni waseYiputa; umda wawo ume ngolwandle."
Numbers34:6 Umda wasentshonalanga umda wenu woba luLwandle Olukhulu; lo ngumda wenu wasentshonalanga.
Numbers34:7 Umda wenu wangasentla uya kuba nguwo lo: Ukusuka kuLwandle Olukhulu uya kuthi ga kwiNtaba yeHore;
Numbers34:8 nithabathela entabeni yeHore, nide nise eHamati; ukusuka emdeni yiSedade;"
Numbers34:9 wegqitha umda eZifron, uye eHasarenan; lo ngumda wenu wangasentla."
Numbers34:10 Nize nizikhethele umda wenu wasempumalanga ukusuka eHatsare-nan ukuya eSefame.
Numbers34:11 Umda uya kuhla usuka eSefame uye eRibhela, ngasempumalanga kwaseAyin; yaye umsonto uya kuhla uze udlulele ngakwicala loLwandle lwaseKinneret ngasempuma."
Numbers34:12 Wehla umda waya eYordan, usiya eLwandle lweTyuwa; loba lilizwe lenu nelizwe lalo ngeenxa zonke kulo."
Numbers34:13 uMoses wabawisela umthetho oonyana bakaSirayeli, esithi, Lilo eli ilizwe enilihluthe ngeqashiso, awisa umthetho uYehova ukuba linikwe izizwe ezisithoba, nesiqingatha sesizwe, ndaweni-nye."
Numbers34:14 Ngokuba isizwe soonyana bakaRubhen ngokwezindlu zooyise, nesizwe soonyana bakaGadi, ngokwezindlu zooyise, sithabathé ilifa laso; nesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase sanikwa ilifa laso."
Numbers34:15 Izizukulwana ezibini ezinesiqingatha zalifumana ilifa lazo nganeno kweYordan, malunga neYeriko, zibheke empumalanga, zibheke ngasempumalanga."
Numbers34:16 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers34:17 Ngawo la amagama amadoda aya kunabela ilizwe: uElazare umbingeleli noYoshuwa unyana kaNun.
Numbers34:18 Zithabatheleni isikhulu esinye kwisizwe ngasinye, sahlule ilizwe ngokwelifa."
Numbers34:19 Ngawo la amagama aloo madoda: Kwisizwe sakwaYuda, nguKalebhi unyana kaYefune;"
Numbers34:20 kwintsapho yoonyana bakaSimon nguSemuweli unyana ka-Amihudi;
Numbers34:21 kwisizwe sakwaBhenjamin nguElidade, unyana kaKislon;"
Numbers34:22 emizaneni yoonyana bakaDan, ukumkani uBhuki, unyana kaYogli;"
Numbers34:23 kwintsapho yoonyana bakaManase, ukumkani woonyana bakaYosefu, inguHaniyeli, unyana kaEfodi;"
Numbers34:24 kwisizwe soonyana bakaEfrayim, ingukumkani uKemuweli, unyana kaSifetan;"
Numbers34:25 inkulu yesizwe soonyana bakaZebhulon, ibinguElishafan, unyana kaParanaki;"
Numbers34:26 kwintsapho yoonyana bakaIsakare, ukumkani uPaltiyeli, unyana ka-Asan;"
Numbers34:27 inkulu yendlu yoonyana baka-Ashere, ibinguAkihudi, unyana kaShelom;"
Numbers34:28 esizweni soonyana bakaNafetali ibinguPedayeli, unyana ka-Amihudi;"
Numbers34:29 Ngabo abo uYehova wabawisela umthetho wokuba bahlule ilifa loonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni lakwaKanan.
Numbers35:1 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses entlango yakwaMowabhi, ngaseYordan, malunga neYeriko, esithi,"
Numbers35:2 Bawisele umthetho oonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuba banike abaLevi ilifa labo emizini abahlala kuyo; yabanika amadlelo abaLevi emizini yabo."
Numbers35:3 Baya kuba nemizi yokuhlala; amadlelo abo abe ngaweenkomo zabo, naweenkomo zabo, nawempahla yabo yonke."
Numbers35:4 Idlelo lezo zixeko liya kunikwa abaLevi, lithabathele eludongeni lwesixeko libe ziikubhite eziliwaka macala onke;"
Numbers35:5 nilinganise nithabathela ngaphandle komzi, iikubhite ezingamawaka amabini ngasempumalanga, zibe ziikubhite ezingamawaka amabini ngasemzantsi, neekubhite ezingamawaka amabini ngasentshonalanga, neekubhite ezingamawaka amabini ngasentla; yaye isixeko siya kuba sesazulwini, siya kuba ngamadlelo azo ezixeko."
Numbers35:6 Imizi eniya kuyinika abaLevi yoba nemizi emithathu yokusabela, noyinika lowo unibuleleyo, abalekele kuyo; nokongeza kuyo imizi engamashumi amane anesibini."
Numbers35:7 Zonke izixeko eniya kuzinika abaLevi zoba ngamashumi amane anesibhozo; wolinika kunye nedlelo labo.
Numbers35:8 Izixeko eniya kuzithabatha kwilifa loonyana bakaSirayeli; mnikeni into eninzi; kodwa kwabancinane, nize nibanike kancinane; ngasinye ezixekweni zaso siya kubanika abaLevi ngokwelifa laso, esidle ilifa."
Numbers35:9 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses, esithi:"
Numbers35:10 Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi kubo, Xa nithe nayiwela iYordan, nongena ezweni lakwaKanan;"
Numbers35:11 nize nizinyulele ke izixeko eniya kuba zikhululekile; ukuze abalekele khona umbulali lowo ubulele umntu ngengozi.
Numbers35:12 Yoba yimizi yenu leyo yokusabela kumphindezeli; ukuze angafi umbulali lowo, emi phambi kwebandla ukuze agwetywe."
Numbers35:13 Izixeko eniya kubanika zona zoba nezixeko ezithandathu zokusabela.
Numbers35:14 Nobanika izixeko ezithathu nganeno kweYordan, nize nibanike izixeko ezithathu ezweni lakwaKanan, zibe ziidolophu ezikhululekileyo."
Numbers35:15 Loo mizi mithandathu yoba yeyokusabela koonyana bakaSirayeli, nakumphambukeli, nakowasemzini ophakathi kwenu;"
Numbers35:16 Ukuba uthe wambetha umntu ngentsimbi, wafa, ungumbulali; umbulali makabulawe."
Numbers35:17 Ukuba uthe wambetha ngelitye, angafayo ngalo, wafa, ungumbulali; umbulali makabulawe."
Numbers35:18 Nokuba uthe wambetha ngento engumthi, angáfa ngayo, wafa, ungumbulali; umbulali makabulawe."
Numbers35:19 Onxanelwe igazi wombulala umbulali; ukuba uthe waqubisana naye, wombulala."
Numbers35:20 Ukuba uthe wamtyhalela ngentiyo, nokuba uthe wambetha ngezwi elikhulu, wafa;"
Numbers35:21 Okanye umbethe ngobutshaba ngesandla, wafa; ombethileyo wobulawa afe; ngokuba ungumbulali lowo; umphindezeli wegazi wombulala umbulali lowo, akuqubisana naye."
Numbers35:22 Ukuba ke uthe wamtyhala ngesiquphe, kungekho lutshaba, nokuba wamgibisela nokuba yintoni na, engalindelanga;"
Numbers35:23 nokuba ngelitye, athe wafa umntu ngalo, engamboni, wamgibisela ngalo;"
Numbers35:24 Lize ligwebe ibandla phakathi kweqela labalindi nenani legazi ngokwemimiselo le:
Numbers35:25 Ibandla limhlangule umbulali esandleni samagazi, limbuyisele ibandla emzini okhululekileyo, abebalekela kuwo; ahlale kulo ade afe umbingeleli omkhulu, athanjiswe ngeoli engcwele."
Numbers35:26 Ukuba umbulali lowo uthe wangena nangaliphi na ixesha ngaphandle komda wesixeko esikhululekileyo ebebalekele kuso;
Numbers35:27 Inani legazi lamfumana ngaphandle kwemida yomzi wakhe okhululekileyo, lathi inani legazi lambulala umbulali lowo makangabi natyala lagazi;"
Numbers35:28 ngokuba wathanda ukuhlala emzini wakhe omkhulu, kwada kwafa umbingeleli omkhulu; kodwa emva kokufa kombingeleli omkhulu umbulali wobuyela emhlabeni welifa lakhe."
Numbers35:29 Yoba ngumyalelo womgwebo kuni ezizukulwaneni zenu ezindaweni zonke enihlala kuzo.
Numbers35:30 Othe wabulala umntu, wobulawa umbulali lowo ngomlomo wamangqina; ke linye ingqina alinakungqina ngomntu ukuba ambulale."
Numbers35:31 Ngaphezu koko, maningamkeli naluphi na ulwaneliseko ngenxa yomphefumlo wombulali ofanelwe kukufa, kodwa umele abulawe afe."
Numbers35:32 Uze ungamvumeli ukuba abuyele emzini okhululekileyo welizwe lakowabo, ade abhubhe umbingeleli."
Numbers35:33 Ize ningalihlambeli ilizwe enikulo, kuba igazi liyalihlambela ilizwe; nomhlaba awunakuhlanjululwa ngenxa yegazi eliphalazwe kuwo, ukuba kungengagazi lalowo uliphalazayo."
Numbers35:34 Ize ningalihlambeli ilizwe enihlala kulo, endihleli kulo mna; kuba mna Yehova ndihleli phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Numbers36:1 Zasondela iintloko zemizalwane yoonyana bakaGiliyadi, unyana kaMagire, unyana kaManase, zemizalwane yoonyana bakaYosefu, zathetha phambi koMoses, naphambi kwezikhulu, iintloko zezindlu zooyise oonyana bakaSirayeli:"
Numbers36:2 Bathi ke, uYehova umwisele umthetho ukumkani wam ukuba abanike ilizwe oonyana bakaSirayeli ngokweqashiso, ukuba libe lilifa; yaye inkosi yam yayiyalelwe nguYehova ukuba ilifa likaSelofhade umzalwana wethu linike iintombi zakhe."
Numbers36:3 Ukuba zithe zendela koonyana bezizwe zoonyana bakaSirayeli, loncitshiswa ilifa lazo elifeni loobawo, lisiwe elifeni lesizwe abathatyathelwe kuso, sisusiwe kwilifa lethu."
Numbers36:4 Ekufikeni konyaka weNtlokoma woonyana bakaSirayeli, limele longezelelwe ilifa labo kwilifa lesizwe abasiwa kuso; ke ngoko, ilifa labo liya kushenxiswa kwilifa lesizwe soobawo."
Numbers36:5 uMoses wabawisela umthetho oonyana bakaSirayeli ngokomlomo kaYehova, esithi, Imizalwane yoonyana bakaYosefu ilungisile ukuthetha."
Numbers36:6 Lilo eli ilizwi awaliwisela umthetho uYehova ngeentombi zikaTselofehadi, wathi, Mazende kwabasukuba kufanelekile; mabatshate kumlibo kayise."
