Numbers36:7 Ngoko ilifa loonyana bakaSirayeli alifanele lidlule kwesinye isizukulwana liye kwesinye, kuba oonyana bakaSirayeli bafanele bagcine elowo elifeni lesizukulwana sooyise."
Numbers36:8 Yonke intombi enelifa esizweni soonyana bakaSirayeli yoba ngumfazi wesizwe sesizwe sikayise, ukuze oonyana bakaSirayeli badle ilifa ooyise."
Numbers36:9 Ilifa aliyi kuphuma kwesinye isizukulwana liye kwesinye; kodwa sonke isizwe soonyana bakaSirayeli siya kuzigcina elifeni laso.
Numbers36:10 Iintombi zikaTselofehadi zenza njengoko uYehova wamwisela umthetho uMoses.
Numbers36:11 Ngokuba uMagala, noTirtsa, noHogela, noMilka, noNowa, iintombi zikaTselofehadi, zendela koonyana babazalwana bakayise."
Numbers36:12 Zendela emizalwaneni yoonyana bakaManase, unyana kaYosefu, laza ilifa labo lahlala emzalwaneni wooyise."
Numbers36:13 Yiyo leyo imiyalelo nezigwebo awabayalela ngazo uYehova ngoMoses oonyana bakaSirayeli kumathafa akwaMowabhi kufuphi neYordan malunga neYeriko.
Deuteronomy1:1 Ngawo la ke amazwi, awawathethayo uMoses kumaSirayeli onke phesheya kweYordan entlango, entlango malunga noLwandle oluBomvu, phakathi kweParan, neTofele, neLabhan, neHatseroti, neZagabhi."
Deuteronomy1:2 (Luhambo lweentsuku ezilishumi elinanye ukusuka eHorebhe ngendlela esuka kwintaba yakwaSehire ukuya eKadeshe-bharneha).
Deuteronomy1:3 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omane, ngenyanga yeshumi elinanye, ngolokuqala enyangeni leyo, wathetha uMoses koonyana bakaSirayeli ngako konke uYehova abemwisele umthetho ngako;"
Deuteronomy1:4 Wababulala uSihon ukumkani wama-Amori, obemi eHeshbhon, no-Ogi ukumkani waseBhashan, obemi eAshtaroti e-Edreyi."
Deuteronomy1:5 Waqala uMoses ukuwushumayela lo myalelo phesheya kweYordan ezweni lakwaMowabhi, esithi,"
Deuteronomy1:6 Wathetha kuthi uYehova, uThixo wethu, eseHorebhe, wathi, Kukade nihleli kule ntaba;"
Deuteronomy1:7 Jikani, nihambe niye ezintabeni zama-Amori, nasezindaweni zonke ezikufuphi nazo, entlango, ezintabeni, nasezihlanjeni, nakwelasezantsi, naselwandle, nijikeleze ilizwe lamaKanan, nelizwe lamaKanan iintaba. iLebhanon ise emlanjeni omkhulu, umlambo umEfrati."
Deuteronomy1:8 Yabonani, ndinivelisela ihlabathi; Ngenani, nilidle ilifa ilizwe, awafungayo uYehova kooyihlo uAbraham, noIsake, noYakobi, ukuba wolinika bona, nembewu yabo emva kwabo."
Deuteronomy1:9 Ngelo xesha ndathetha kuni, ndathi, Andinakunithwala ndedwa;"
Deuteronomy1:10 uYehova uThixo wenu unandisile; nanku namhla ningangeenkwenkwezi zezulu, ukuba nibe baninzi kwenu."
Deuteronomy1:11 Wanga uYehova uThixo wooyihlo, anandise ngaphezu kwenu kaliwaka, anisikelele njengoko wathethayo kuni;"
Deuteronomy1:12 Ndingathini na ukubuthwala ububi benu ninedwa, nemithwalo yenu, neengxabano zenu?"
Deuteronomy1:13 Ndithabatheleni amadoda alumkileyo, aziingqondi, abadumileyo phakathi kwezizwe zakowenu, ndiwamise abe ziintloko zenu."
Deuteronomy1:14 Wandiphendula, wathi, Kulungile ukuba siyenze ngokwelizwi lakho."
Deuteronomy1:15 Ndabathabatha ke abaziintloko zezizwe zakowenu, amadoda alumkileyo, adumileyo, ndawamisa aba ziintloko zenu, abathetheli bewaka, nabathetheli balikhulu, nabathetheli bamashumi ngamahlanu, nabathetheli beshumi labathetheli bezizwe zakomawenu."
Deuteronomy1:16 Ngelo xesha ndabayalela abagwebi benu, ndathi, ‘Waphulaphuleni amatyala aphakathi kwabazalwana benu, nize nigwebe ngobulungisa phakathi komntu nomzalwana wakhe nomphambukeli akuye."
Deuteronomy1:17 Musani ukukhetha ubuso bomntu ekugwebeni; uthobele umncinane nomkhulu; musani ukuboyika ubuso bamntu; ngokuba umgwebo lo ngokaThixo; ukuba ityala linzima yizise kum ndilive.
Deuteronomy1:18 Ndaniwisela umthetho ngelo xesha ngezinto zonke enozenza.
Deuteronomy1:19 Sanduluka eHorebhe, sayicanda yonke intlango enkulu, eyoyikekayo, nayibonayo, sihamba endleleni yentaba yama-Amori, njengoko wasiwisela umthetho uYehova uThixo wethu; safika eKadeshe-bhareya."
Deuteronomy1:20 Ndathi ke kuni, Nifikile ezintabeni zama-Amori, aya kusinika zona uYehova uThixo wethu."
Deuteronomy1:21 Yabona, uYehova uThixo wakho ulibeke ihlabathi phambi kwakho; nyukani nilime, njengoko wathethayo uYehova uThixo wooyihlo kuni; musani ukoyika, ningatyhafi."
Deuteronomy1:22 Nasondela ke elowo kuni, nathi, Masithumele amadoda, asikhokele, asihlolele ilizwe, asixelele indlela esohamba ngayo, nemizi esofika kuyo."
Deuteronomy1:23 Landithanda elo lizwi, ndathabatha kuni amadoda alishumi elinamabini, indoda yanye esizweni."
Deuteronomy1:24 Ajika ke, anyuka intaba, afika entilini yomlambo wase-Eshkole, ayihlola."
Deuteronomy1:25 Athabatha esandleni sawo iziqhamo zelo zwe, asizisa, athi, Lilizwe elilungileyo eli, asinikayo uYehova uThixo wethu."
Deuteronomy1:26 Kodwa anivumanga ukunyuka, nawuphikisa umlomo kaYehova uThixo wenu."
Deuteronomy1:27 Baduma ezintenteni zabo, bathi, Kungenxa yokuba esithiyile uYehova, wasikhupha ezweni laseYiputa, ukuze asinikele esandleni sama-Amori, asitshabalalise."
Deuteronomy1:28 Siya kunyukela phi na? abazalwana bethu bazidimaza iintliziyo zethu ngokuthi: Abantu abadala nabade kunathi; imizi emikhulu, eludongeni oluya kufikelela emazulwini; kananjalo, sababona khona oonyana bakaBhahanake."
Deuteronomy1:29 Ndathi ke kuni, Musani ukuboyika, ningaboyiki;"
Deuteronomy1:30 uYehova uThixo wenu, onikhokelayo, wonilwela, njengoko wakwenzayo kuni, phambi kwamehlo enu eYiputa;"
Deuteronomy1:31 Yaye entlango, apho wabonayo ukuba uYehova uThixo wakho wakuzala, kanye njengoko umntu ezala unyana wakhe, ngendlela yonke enahamba ngayo de nafika kule ndawo."
Deuteronomy1:32 Kodwa kule nto anikholwanga kuNdikhoyo uThixo wenu,"
Deuteronomy1:33 owakukhokelayo endleleni, ekufuna apho ungamisa khona iintente zakho, emlilweni ebusuku ukuba akubonise indlela enohamba ngayo, ngelifu emini."
Deuteronomy1:34 Wasiva ke uYehova isandi samazwi enu, wavutha ngumsindo, wafunga, wathi,"
Deuteronomy1:35 Ngokuqinisekileyo akukho namnye kwaba bantu esi sizukulwana singendawo uya kulibona elo lizwe lihle, endathembisa ngalo kooyihlo-mkhulu,"
Deuteronomy1:36 hlangula uKalebhi unyana kaYefune; uya kulibona, ndimnike ilizwe awanyathela kulo, yena nabantwana bakhe, ngokuba umlandele uYehova ngokupheleleyo."
Deuteronomy1:37 uYehova wandifuthela ngenxa yenu, wathi, Nawe akuyi kungena nalapho."
Deuteronomy1:38 uYoshuwa unyana kaNun, oma phambi kwakho, nguye oya kungena khona; Mkhuthaze, ngokuba nguye oya kuwanika uSirayeli ilifa lakhe."
Deuteronomy1:39 Abantwana benu, enibe nisithi bothinjwa, nabantwana benu abangakwaziyo okulungileyo nokubi ngelo xesha, bona bongena khona, ndibanike lona, babe zizityebi."
Deuteronomy1:40 Ke nina jikani, nihambe entlango ngendlela yoLwandle oluBomvu."
Deuteronomy1:41 Naphendula nathi kum, Sonile kuYehova; sonyuka thina, silwe, njengoko wasiyalelayo uYehova uThixo wethu. Naxa elowo exhobile, exhobe exhobele imfazwe, nalungela ukunyuka intaba."
Deuteronomy1:42 Wathi uYehova kum, Yithi kubo, Ize ningenyuki niye kulwa; kuba andikho phakathi kwenu; hleze nigxothwe ziintshaba zenu."
Deuteronomy1:43 Kungenxa yoko le nto ndithethe kuni; naza anaphulaphula, kodwa nawuvukela umyalelo kaYehova naza nenyuka induli ngekratshi."
Deuteronomy1:44 Anihlasela ke ama-Amori ami kuloo ntaba, anisukela njengeenyosi, amtshabalalisa uSehire, esa eHorem."
Deuteronomy1:45 Wabuya walila phambi koYehova; akaliphulaphula uYehova ilizwi lenu, akakuphulaphula nani."
Deuteronomy1:46 Ngoko nahlala eKadeshe imihla emininzi, ngokwemihla enayihlalayo khona;"
Deuteronomy2:1 Sanduluka, sabheka entlango ngendlela eya eShelefeshe, njengoko watshoyo uYehova kum; Sayijikeleza intaba yakwaSehire imihla emininzi."
Deuteronomy2:2 Wathetha uYehova kum, wathi:"
Deuteronomy2:3 Sekulithuba elide niyijikeleza le ntaba;
Deuteronomy2:4 Wabawisela umthetho abantu, wathi, Niya kucanda ezweni labazalwana benu, oonyana bakaEsawu, abemi kwaSehire; baya kukoyika; zigcineni ke ngokwenu."
Deuteronomy2:5 Musa ukubaphazamisa; kuba ezweni labo andiyi kuninika nto, nokuba bububanzi bonyawo; ngokuba intaba yakwaSehire ndamnika uEsawu ukuba ayime."
Deuteronomy2:6 Wothenga inyama kubo ngemali, udle; uthenge kubo amanzi ngemali, usele."
Deuteronomy2:7 Ngokuba ukusikelele uYehova uThixo wakho emsebenzini wonke wezandla zakho; Uyayazi indlela yakho kule ntlango inkulu; kuba le minyaka imashumi mane uYehova uThixo wakho unani; akufuni nto.
Deuteronomy2:8 Sagqitha kubazalwana bethu, oonyana bakaEsawu, ababehleli kwaSehire, sahamba ngendlela yentlango ye-Elati ne-Etsiyon-gebhere, sajika sahamba ngendlela yentlango yakwaMowabhi."
Deuteronomy2:9 Wathi uYehova kum, Musani ukuwahlisela ishwangusha amaMowabhi, uze ungalwa nawo ulwe nawo; kuba ezweni lawo andiyi kuninika lilifa; ngokuba ndilinike oonyana bakaLote ukuba libe lilifa labo."
Deuteronomy2:10 AmaEma ahlala khona, eluhlanga olukhulu, olukhulu, olude njengama-Anaki;"
Deuteronomy2:11 kananjalo babalelwa ekubeni ngamagorha, njengama-Anaki; ke amaMowabhi ababiza ngokuba ngamaEma."
Deuteronomy2:12 AmaHori ebemi kwaSehire ngenxa engaphambili; kodwa bandwendwa oonyana bakaEsawu, babatshabalalisa phambi kwabo, bemka endaweni yabo; njengoko benza ngako oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni ababelihluthile, awabanika lona uYehova."
Deuteronomy2:13 Ndithi, yima ngoku, uthuthuzele umlambo waseSerede. Kwaye sawela umlambo iSeredi."
Deuteronomy2:14 Ukuhamba kwethu eKadeshe-bharneha sada sawela umlambo iSerede, yaba yiminyaka emashumi mathathu anesibhozo; side siphele sonke isizukulwana samagorha phakathi komkhosi, njengoko uYehova wawafungelayo."
Deuteronomy2:15 Saye kananjalo isandla sikaYehova siphezu kwawo, ukuba awatshabalalise, ade aphume."
Deuteronomy2:16 Abhubha onke amagorha, afa phakathi kwabantu;"
Deuteronomy2:17 Wathetha uYehova kum, wathi:"
Deuteronomy2:18 Namhla niya kuyiwela iAre, unxweme lwakwaMowabhi;"
Deuteronomy2:19 Ekusondeleni kwakho koonyana baka-Amon, uze ungabaphazamisi, ungabaphazamisi; kuba ilizwe loonyana baka-Amon andiyi kuninika lilifa; ngokuba ndayinika oonyana bakaLote ukuba bayime."
Deuteronomy2:20 Nangona kunjalo, kwakusithiwa lilizwe lamandulo; kumaxesha amandulo, iingxilimbela zazihlala kulo;"
Deuteronomy2:21 uhlanga olukhulu, olukhulu, olude njengama-Anaki; uYehova wabatshabalalisa phambi kwabo; bawangenela, bema esikhundleni sabo."
Deuteronomy2:22 Wenza koonyana bakaEsawu abemiyo kwaSehire, wawatshabalalisa amaHori phambi kwabo; bawalandela, bema esikhundleni sabo unanamhla."
Deuteronomy2:23 Yaye iiAve ezazihlala eHasherem zenyuka zaya kutsho kuAsa, abaTshitshi ababevela eKatore bazitshabalalisa baza bahlala endaweni yazo."
Deuteronomy2:24 Suka, uwele umlanjana oyiArnon; yabonani, ndiya kumnikela uSihon umAmori, ukumkani waseHeshbhon, nelizwe lakhe, esandleni senu; qalani ukuyithimba nilwe nayo edabini."
Deuteronomy2:25 Namhlanje ndiya kuqala ukubeka ukunkwantya kwakho nokoyikeka kwakho phezu kweentlanga eziphantsi kwezulu lonke, eziya kuva ngawe, zigungqe, zoyike."
Deuteronomy2:26 Ndathumela abathunywa entlango yeKedemoti, baya kuSihon ukumkani waseHeshbhon, benamazwi oxolo, ndathi,"
Deuteronomy2:27 ndicande ezweni lakho; Ndiya kuhamba ngomendo, ndingaphambukeli ekunene nasekhohlo;"
Deuteronomy2:28 Ndithengisele inyama ngemali, ndidle; ndinike amanzi ngemali, ndisele; kodwa ndiya komba ngeenyawo zam;"
Deuteronomy2:29 ngendlela benza ngayo kum oonyana bakaEsawu abemiyo kwaSehire, namaMowabhi abemiyo, ndada ndawela iYordan, ndaya ezweni aya kusinika lona uYehova uThixo wethu;"
Deuteronomy2:30 Akasivumela uSihon ukumkani waseHeshbhon ukuba sicande kuye; ngokuba uYehova uThixo wakho wamqinisa isibindi, wayenza ingqoshomba intliziyo yakhe, ukuze amnikele esandleni sakho, njengoko kunjalo namhla."
Deuteronomy2:31 Wathi uYehova kum, Yabona, ndiqalile ukumnikela kuwe uSihon nelizwe lakhe; qalani ukulihlutha, ukuze nilihluthe ilizwe lakhe."
Deuteronomy2:32 Waphuma uSihon wasihlangabeza, yena nabantu bakhe bonke, ukuba silwe neYahaze."
Deuteronomy2:33 uYehova uThixo wethu wamnikela kuthi; samoyisa yena noonyana bakhe nabantu bakhe bonke.
Deuteronomy2:34 Sazithimba zonke izixeko zakhe ngelo xesha, satshabhisa amadoda, nabafazi, nabantwana bemizi ngemizi; asisekho bani."
Deuteronomy2:35 Imfuyo yodwa sayithimba, sayithimba imizi."
Deuteronomy2:36 Ukususela eArohere, ekumda woMlambo iArnon, nokususela kwisixeko esikufuphi noMlambo umNayile ukuya eGiliyadi, akubangakho nasinye isixeko esomeleleyo kuthi; uYehova, uThixo wethu, usinike yonk’ into."
Deuteronomy2:37 Kuphela eningafikanga kwilizwe loonyana baka-Amoni, nakuwo nawuphi na ummandla woMlambo iYabhoki nakwizixeko ezisezintabeni okanye kuko konke awasalela ngako uYehova uThixo wethu."
Deuteronomy3:1 Sajika senyuka saya eBhashan, waphuma uOgi ukumkani waseBhashan, wasihlangabeza, yena nabantu bakhe bonke, ukuba silwe ne-Edreyi."
Deuteronomy3:2 Wathi uYehova kum, Musa ukumoyika; ngokuba ndiya kumnikela esandleni sakho, nabantu bakhe bonke, nelizwe lakhe; uya kwenza kuye njengoko wenzayo kuSihon, ukumkani wama-Amori, obemi eHeshbhon."
Deuteronomy3:3 Ngoko uYehova uThixo wethu wamnikela uOge ukumkani waseBhashan nabo bonke abantu bakhe esandleni sethu; samoyisa yada yalambatha.
Deuteronomy3:4 Sazithimba zonke izixeko zakhe ngelo xesha, yaye akubangakho sixeko singasithimbanga kubo, izixeko ezingamashumi amathandathu, ummandla wonke waseArgobhi, ubukumkani bukaOgi waseBhashan."
Deuteronomy3:5 Yonke loo mizi ibijikelezwe ngeendonga eziphakamileyo, namasango, nemivalo; kufuphi nezixeko ezininzi ezingenaludonga."
Deuteronomy3:6 Sabaqalekisa, njengoko samtshabhisayo uSihon ukumkani waseHeshbhon, satshabhisa amadoda, nabafazi, nabantwana bemizi ngemizi."
Deuteronomy3:7 Ke zona iinkomo namaxhoba aloo mizi sazithimbela.
Deuteronomy3:8 Salithimba ilizwe ngelo xesha esandleni sookumkani bobabini bama-Amori, ababengasempumalanga kweYordan, lithabathela emlanjeni oyiArnon, lesa entabeni yeHermon;"
Deuteronomy3:9 (yiHermon yona, leyo amaTsidon ayibiza ngokuba yiSiriyon, ama-Amori ayibiza ngokuba yiSenire);"
Deuteronomy3:10 Zonke izixeko zaseNtlango neGiliyadi yonke nayo yonke iBhashan ukuya kufikelela eSalga nase-Edreyi, izixeko zobukumkani bukaOgi eBhashan."
Deuteronomy3:11 Ngokuba nguOgi yedwa, ukumkani waseBhashan, oseleyo kumaRafa; nantso isilili sakhe sisilili yentsimbi; Asiyiyo na iRabha yoonyana baka-Amon? zaba ziikubhite ezisithoba ubude bayo, neekubhite ezine ububanzi bayo, ngokwekubhite yomntu."
Deuteronomy3:12 Eli lizwe saloyisayo ngelo xesha, ukususela eArohere kufuphi nomlambo iArnon, isiqingatha seentaba zaseGiliyadi nezixeko zayo, ndalinika amaRubhen namaGadi."
Deuteronomy3:13 Enye inxalenye yaseGiliyadi neBhashan yonke, oko kukuthi, ubukumkani bukaOgi, ndawunika isiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase; nelizwe lonke laseArgobhi, neBhashan yonke, leyo bekusithiwa lilizwe lamaRafa."
Deuteronomy3:14 uYayire, unyana kaManase, waloyisa lonke ilizwe laseArgobhi ukuya kufikelela kumda waseGeshuri neMagati; wazibiza ngegama lakhe, wathi yiBhashan-havoti-yahire unanamhla."
Deuteronomy3:15 iGiliyadi ndayinika uMagire.
Deuteronomy3:16 AmaRubhen namaGadi ndawanika isiqingatha somfula ophuma eGiliyadi, uye emlanjeni oyiArnon, nomda weYabhoki, emdeni woonyana baka-Amon;"
Deuteronomy3:17 neNtlango neYordan nomda wayo, ukususela eKinereti ukusa kuLwandle Lwentlango, uLwandle lweTyuwa, phantsi kweAshdode nePisga ngasempuma."
Deuteronomy3:18 Ndaniwisela umthetho ngelo xesha, ndisithi, uYehova uThixo wenu uninike eli lizwe ukuba nilihluthe;"
Deuteronomy3:19 Kodwa abafazi bakho, nabantwana bakho, nemfuyo yakho, ngenxa yokuba ndisazi ukuba unemfuyo eninzi, basala emizini yakho endikunike yona;"
Deuteronomy3:20 ade uYehova abaphumze abazalwana benu njengani, bade nabo balidle ilifa ilizwe abanika lona uYehova uThixo wenu phesheya kweYordan; nibuyele ke elowo elifeni lakhe endininike lona."
Deuteronomy3:21 Ndamwisela umthetho uYoshuwa ngelo xesha, ndathi, Amehlo akho makakubone konke akwenzileyo uYehova uThixo wenu kwaba kumkani bobabini; uYehova uya kwenjenjalo kuzo zonke izikumkani oya kuzo."
Deuteronomy3:22 Musani ukuboyika; ngokuba uYehova uThixo wenu uya kunilwela.
Deuteronomy3:23 Ndathandaza kuYehova ngelo xesha, ndathi:"
Deuteronomy3:24 Nkosi yam, Yehova, wambonisa umkhonzi wakho ubukhulu bakho, nesandla sakho esithe nkqi; ngokuba nguwuphi na uthixo emazulwini nasehlabathini onokwenza ngokwemisebenzi yakho, nangamandla akho?"
Deuteronomy3:25 Makhe ndiwele ndize ndibone ilizwe elihle phesheya kweYordan, intaba entle neLebhanon."
Deuteronomy3:26 Wandifuthela uYehova ngenxa yenu, akandiphulaphula; wathi uYehova kum, Kwanele; ungaphindi uthethe nam ngalento."
Deuteronomy3:27 Nyuka uye encotsheni yePisga, uphose amehlo akho entshonalanga, nasentla, nasezantsi, nasempumalanga, ulikhangele ngamehlo; ngokuba akuyi kuyiwela le Yordan."
Deuteronomy3:28 uYoshuwa mwisele umthetho, umomeleze, umkhaliphise, ngokuba yena uya kuhlala phambi kwaba bantu; yena uya kubadlisa ilifa, elilelo lizwe aya kulibona."
Deuteronomy3:29 Sahlala ke entilini ekhangelene neBhete-pehore.
Deuteronomy4:1 Khawuphulaphule ke, Sirayeli imimiselo nemithetho endiniyala ngayo, ukuba niyenze, niphile, ningene, nilihluthe ilizwe elo akunikayo uYehova uThixo wooyihlo."
Deuteronomy4:2 Ize ningongezi nto ezwini endiniwisela umthetho ngalo, ningathabatha nto kulo, ukuze niyigcine imithetho kaYehova uThixo wenu, endiniwisela yona."
Deuteronomy4:3 Amehlo enu akubonile oko uYehova wakwenzayo kuBhahali-pehore; ngokuba bonke abantu ababemlandela uBhahali-pehore, uYehova uThixo wakho ubatshabalalisile, bangabikho phakathi kwakho."
Deuteronomy4:4 Kodwa nina nanamathelayo kuYehova uThixo wenu, nonke ngabanye nisaphila nanamhla."
Deuteronomy4:5 Yabonani, ndinifundise imimiselo namasiko, njengoko ndawiselwa umthetho nguYehova uThixo wam, ukuze nenze ngokunjalo ezweni eningena kulo ukuba nilihluthe."
Deuteronomy4:6 Gcinani ningenzi; ngenxa yokuba bubulumko benu nokuqonda kwenu phambi kwamehlo eentlanga eziya kuyiva yonke le miyalelo, isithi: ‘Eneneni, olu hlanga lukhulu ngabantu abalumkileyo, abanengqondo."
Deuteronomy4:7 Kuba luluphi uhlanga olukhulu uThixo asondele kulo, njengoko uYehova, uThixo wethu, esondele kulo naphi na apho simbiza khona?"
Deuteronomy4:8 Luluphi na uhlanga olukhulu olunemithetho nemiyalelo, njengalo myalelo wonke ndiwuwiselayo namhla?"
Deuteronomy4:9 Kodwa zigcine, uwugcine umphefumlo wakho kunene, hleze uyilibale into ayibonileyo amehlo akho, ingaphumi entliziyweni yakho yonke imihla yobomi bakho uze uwafundise oonyana bakho, noonyana boonyana bakho;"
Deuteronomy4:10 Ingakumbi ngemini owama ngayo phambi koYehova uThixo wakho, eHorebhe, oko uYehova wathi kum, Ndihlanganisele abantu, ndibaphulaphule amazwi am, bafunde ukundiva; boyike yonke imihla yobomi babo emhlabeni, bafundise abantwana babo."
Deuteronomy4:11 Yasondela, yema phantsi kwentaba; intaba isitsha ngumlilo esazulwini sezulu, kumnyama, namafu, kumnyama."
Deuteronomy4:12 Wathetha uYehova kuni esemlilweni; nasiva isandisa mazwi, anabona mbonakalo yaso; weva ilizwi lodwa."
Deuteronomy4:13 Wanizisa ngomnqophiso wakhe awaniwisela umthetho ngawo, ukuba niwuzalise, lowo ngumthetho olishumi; wayibhala emacwecweni amabini."
Deuteronomy4:14 Ngelo xesha uYehova wandiyalela ukuba ndinifundise imithetho nezigwebo, ukuze nizizalise kwilizwe enifudukela kulo ukuba nityebe."
Deuteronomy4:15 Zigcineni ngoku; ngenxa yokuba anibonanga kwangaloo mini wathetha ngayo uYehova kuni eHorebhe phakathi komlilo;
Deuteronomy4:16 ukuze ningazenzi iinqambi, ngokuzenzela umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, nokuba ngowayiphi na imbonakalo, njengendoda nenkazana;"
Deuteronomy4:17 nemfano yazo zonke izinto eziphilileyo ezisemhlabeni, nemfano yeentaka zonke ezinamaphiko, eziphaphazela esibhakabhakeni;"
Deuteronomy4:18 Umfanekiselo wento yonke enyakazelayo emhlabeni, nomfanekiselo weentlanzi zonke ezisemanzini aphantsi komhlaba;"
Deuteronomy4:19 hleze amehlo akho uwaphakamisele esibhakabhakeni, uthi, walibona ilanga, nenyanga, neenkwenkwezi, nesibhakabhaka, uphetshethwe, ukuba uqubude kuzo, ukhonze abo ibakhonzayo iNkosi yakho. Uzahlule zonke iintlanga phantsi kwezulu lonke."
Deuteronomy4:20 Ke nina uYehova unithabathileyo, wanikhupha kwiziko lesinyithi, amaYiputa, ukuba nibe ngabantu abalilifa kuye, njengoko ninjalo namhla."
Deuteronomy4:21 Ngaphezu koko, uYehova waba nomsindo kum ngenxa yenu waza wafunga ukuba andiyi kuyiwela iYordan nokuba andiyi kungena kwilizwe elihle uYehova uThixo wenu aya kuninika lona njengelifa;"
Deuteronomy4:22 kuba ndiya kufela kweli lizwe, andiyiweli iYordan; Ke nina niya kuwela, nilidle ilifa elo lizwe lihle."
Deuteronomy4:23 Zigcineni, ningawulibali umnqophiso kaYehova uThixo wenu, awawenzayo nani, nizenzele umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, umfanekiso wento yonke awalayo uYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy4:24 Ngokuba uYehova uThixo wakho ungumlilo odlayo, unguThixo onekhwele."
Deuteronomy4:25 Wakuba ungazalanga mntwana nabazukulwana, wahlala kwelo zwe imihla emininzi, wazidubula, wazenzela umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, nokuba ngumfanekiso oqingqiweyo; amehlo kaYehova, uThixo wenu, ukuba amqumbise umdla:"
Deuteronomy4:26 Ndibiza izulu nomhlaba namhlanje ukuba zibe ngamangqina kuni, okuba kungekudala niya kutshatyalaliswa ngokupheleleyo kwilizwe eniwela iYordan nisiya kulidla ilifa; anisayi kuyolula imihla yenu kulo, niya kuqalekiswa."
Deuteronomy4:27 Woniphangalalisa uYehova phakathi kweentlanga, nisale nibambalwa ezintlangeni, aya kunisa kuzo uYehova."
Deuteronomy4:28 Niya kukhonza oothixo, umsebenzi wezandla zomntu, umthi namatye, abangaboniyo, abangevayo, abangadliyo, abangevayo nevumba;"
Deuteronomy4:29 Ukuba nithe naquqela uYehova uThixo wenu, ekhona, nimfumana, ukuba nithe naquqela kuye ngentliziyo yenu yonke, nangomphefumlo wenu wonke."
Deuteronomy4:30 Ekubandezelekeni kwenu nasekubandezelekeni kwenu konke oku, ekupheleni kwemihla, nabuyela kuYehova uThixo wenu, niliphulaphule ilizwi lakhe;"
Deuteronomy4:31 Kuba uYehova uThixo wakho nguThixo onenceba;
Deuteronomy4:32 Khanibuze ngoku, kwimihla yamandulo, eyayikho phambi kwenu, kususela ekumdaleni kukaThixo umntu ehlabathini, uthabathe, uthabathele esiphelweni sezulu, use kwesinye isiphelo samazulu, ukuba ikho na into enjengale, nokuba kwakha kwakho nje; uyeva?"
Deuteronomy4:33 Bakha baliva na abantu izwi loThixo ethetha phakathi komlilo, njengoko walivayo wena, baphila noko?"
Deuteronomy4:34 Okanye ngaba uThixo wayefuna ukuhlanganisa abantu phakathi kwabanye abantu ngezilingo, ngemiqondiso, ngezilingo, nangemfazwe, nangesandla esomeleleyo, nangesandla esoluliweyo, nangezoyikiso ezinkulu, nangako konke uYehova akwenzileyo? uThixo wakwenza iYiputa emehlweni akho?"
Deuteronomy4:35 Makwazeke oko kuni, ukuze nazi ukuba uYehova nguThixo yena; akukho bani ingenguye."
Deuteronomy4:36 Waliva ilizwi lakhe emazulwini ukuba anifundise; kwaye ehlabathini wabonisa umlilo wakhe omkhulu; naweva amazwi akhe emlilweni.
Deuteronomy4:37 Wabathandayo nje ooyihlo, wayinyula imbewu yabo emva kwabo, wakukhupha eYiputa ngamandla akhe amakhulu, phambi kwamehlo akhe;"
Deuteronomy4:38 ukuba azigqogqe phambi kwakho iintlanga ezinkulu ezomeleleyo kunawe, ukuba akungenise, akunike ilizwe lazo libe lilifa, njengoko kunjalo namhla."
Deuteronomy4:39 Yazi ke namhla, uze ukwazi ngentliziyo yakho, ukuba uYehova nguye uThixo emazulwini phezulu, nasehlabathini phantsi; akekho omnye;"
Deuteronomy4:40 ugcine imithetho yakhe, nemithetho yakhe, endikuwiselayo namhla, ukuze usikelelwe, wena noonyana bakho emva kwakho, ukuze uyolule imihla yakho kwelo lizwe, uYehova uThixo wakho, omnikayo kude kuse ephakadeni."
Deuteronomy4:41 uMosis wazinqumla izixeko ezithathu nganeno kweJordan ekuphumeni kwelanga;
Deuteronomy4:42 ukuze abalekele khona umbulali lowo, owabulala ummelwane wakhe ngengozi, ebengamthiyanga ngenxa engaphambili; ukuze iphile, xa ithe yasabela komnye wale mizi."
Deuteronomy4:43 NdinguBhetsere entlango, entlango yakwaRubhen; neRamoti yaseGiliyadi, ezweni lakwaGadi; neGolan, eBhashan, ezweni lakwaManase."
Deuteronomy4:44 Nguwo lo umyalelo awawumiselayo uMoses koonyana bakaSirayeli.
Deuteronomy4:45 Zizo ezi izingqino, nemithetho, namasiko, awawathethayo uMoses koonyana bakaSirayeli ekuphumeni kwabo eYiputa."
Deuteronomy4:46 Ngaphesheya kweYordan, entilini ephambi kweBhete-pehore, ezweni likaSihon ukumkani wama-Amori, obemi eHeshbhon, owamoyisayo uMoses noonyana bakaSirayeli ekuphumeni kwabo eYiputa."
Deuteronomy4:47 Balithimba ilizwe lakhe nelizwe likaOge ukumkani waseBhashan, ookumkani ababini bama-Amori ababengaphesheya kweYordan ngasempuma;"
Deuteronomy4:48 lithabathela eArohere, eseludinini lomlanjana oyiArnon, lesa entabeni yeZiyon: yiHermon;"
Deuteronomy4:49 nentlango yonke engaphesheya kweYordan ngasempumalanga, yesa elwandle lwasentlango, phantsi kwemithombo yasePisga."
Deuteronomy5:1 Wawabiza uMoses onke amaSirayeli, wathi kuwo, Yiphulaphuleni, maSirayeli, imimiselo nemithetho endiyithethayo kuni namhla, yivani, nifunde, niyenze."
Deuteronomy5:2 uYehova uThixo wethu wenza umnqophiso nathi eHorebhe.
Deuteronomy5:3 uYehova akawenzanga noobawo bethu lo mnqophiso;
Deuteronomy5:4 uYehova wathetha kuni, ekhangelene nani entabeni phakathi komlilo;"
Deuteronomy5:5 (Ngelo xesha ndema phakathi koYehova nani ukuze ndinixelele ilizwi likaYehova, ngenxa yokuba nanisoyika umlilo, ananyuka entabeni, nisithi:"
Deuteronomy5:6 NdinguYehova, uThixo wakho, owakukhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa, endlwini yobukhoboka."
Deuteronomy5:7 Uze ungabi nathixo bambi ngaphandle kwam.
Deuteronomy5:8 Uze ungazenzeli umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, nokuba ngowamnye umfanekiso wento esemazulwini phezulu, nephantsi komhlaba, nesemanzini aphantsi komhlaba."
Deuteronomy5:9 Uze ungaqubudi kwezo nto, ungazikhonzi; kuba mna Yehova, Thixo wakho, ndinguThixo onekhwele, ubuvelela ubugwenxa booyise koonyana, kwesesithathu nakwesesine isizukulwana sabandithiyileyo;"
Deuteronomy5:10 Ndibabale amawaka abandithandayo, abayigcinayo imithetho yam."
Deuteronomy5:11 Uze ungafumane ulibize igama likaYehova uThixo wakho, kuba uYehova akayi kumyekela msulwa osebenzisa igama lakhe njengelize."
Deuteronomy5:12 Wugcine ungcwele umhla wesabatha, njengoko wakuwisela umthetho uYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy5:13 Wosebenza imihla emithandathu, uwenze wonke umsebenzi wakho;"
Deuteronomy5:14 ke wona umhla wesixhenxe uyisabatha kaYehova uThixo wakho; Uze ungenzi namnye umsebenzi ngayo, wena, nonyana wakho, nentombi yakho, nesicaka sakho, nesicakakazi sakho, nenkomo yakho, neesile lakho, nokuba yiyiphi into ezitho zine, nokuba yiyiphi into ezitho zine, nokuba yiyiphi na ephakathi kwakho, nowasemzini ophakathi kwakho; ukuze uphumle umkhonzi wakho nomkhonzazana wakho njengawe."
Deuteronomy5:15 Ukhumbule ukuba wawulikhoboka ezweni laseYiputa, wakukhupha kulo uYehova uThixo wakho ngesandla esomeleleyo nangesandla esoluliweyo; ngenxa yoko ukuwisele umthetho uYehova uThixo wakho, ukuba uwugcine umhla wesabatha."
Deuteronomy5:16 Beka uyihlo nonyoko, njengoko akuwisele umthetho uYehova uThixo wakho; ukuze yande imihla yakho, nokuze kulunge kuwe ezweni elo akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy5:17 Uze ungabulali;
Deuteronomy5:18 Kwaye musa ukukrexeza.
Deuteronomy5:19 Uze ungebi nawe.
Deuteronomy5:20 Uze ungangqini ubungqina obubuxoki ngommelwane wakho.
Deuteronomy5:21 Kananjalo uze ungamnqweneli umfazi wommelwane wakho, ungayinqweneli indlu yommelwane wakho, nentsimi yakhe, nesicaka sakhe, nesicakakazi sakhe, nenkomo yakhe, ne-esile lakhe, nantoni na eyeyakho."
Deuteronomy5:22 La mazwi uYehova wawathetha ngezwi elikhulu ebandleni lenu lonke entabeni phakathi komlilo, nelifu, nesithokothoko; akongezi nto. Wayibhala emacwecweni amabini, wandinika."
Deuteronomy5:23 Naliva ilizwi eliphuma emnyameni (ngokuba intaba isitsha ngumlilo), neza kum, zonke iintloko zezindlu zooyise, namadoda amakhulu enu;"
Deuteronomy5:24 Kwaye bathi: Qaphelani, iNkosi uThixo wethu isibonisile ubuqaqawuli bayo nobukhulu bayo, kwaye silivile ilizwi layo emlilweni; sibonile namhla, ukuba uThixo wathetha emntwini, waphila."
Deuteronomy5:25 Kutheni simele sife ngoku? ngokuba lo mlilo mkhulu uya kusitshisa; ukuba siliva ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wethu, siya kufa."
Deuteronomy5:26 Kuba ngubani na phakathi kwenyama yonke owalivayo ilizwi likaThixo ophilileyo, ethetha phakathi komlilo, njengathi, waphila noko?"
Deuteronomy5:27 Sondela, uve yonk’ into aya kuyithetha uYehova uThixo wethu; Sixelele yonk’ into aya kuyithetha kuwe uYehova uThixo wethu; sova ke, siyenze."
Deuteronomy5:28 Waliva uYehova izwi lokuthetha kwenu ekuthetheni kwenu kum; Wathi uYehova kum, Ndiwavile amazwi aba bantu ababewathethile kuwe; Babenyanisile kuyo yonke into ababeyithetha."
Deuteronomy5:29 Akwaba nje bebenentliziyo enjalo yokundoyika baze bayigcine yonke imiyalelo yam ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo, ukuze izinto zihambe kakuhle kubo nakoonyana bawo ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo!"
Deuteronomy5:30 Athi kubo, Buyelani ezintenteni zenu."
Deuteronomy5:31 Ke wena, yima apha nam, ndiyithethe kuwe yonke imithetho nemiyalelo nemiyalelo, oya kubafundisa yona, ukuba bayenze ezweni elo ndibanika ukuba balime."
Deuteronomy5:32 Ngoko ke yenzani ngenyameko njengoko uYehova uThixo wenu eniyaleleyo, ningatyekeli ekunene nasekhohlo."
Deuteronomy5:33 Hambani ngeendlela zonke aniwisele umthetho ngazo uYehova uThixo wenu, ukuze niphile, nibe nempumelelo, niyolule imihla yenu emhlabeni oya kuwudla ilifa."
Deuteronomy6:1 Yiyo le imimiselo, nemiyalelo, nomthetho, aniwisele umthetho ngawo uYehova uThixo wenu, ukuba niwufundise, ukuba niwenze ezweni elo uya kulihlutha;"
Deuteronomy6:2 ukuze umoyike uYehova uThixo wakho, uyigcine yonke imiyalelo yakhe nemithetho yakhe endikuwiselayo, wena nonyana wakho, nonyana wonyana wakho, yonke imihla yobomi bakho; ukuze yolulwe imihla yakho."
Deuteronomy6:3 Khawuve, Sirayeli, ukuze izinto zinihambele kakuhle, nande, njengoko uYehova, uTHIXO wookhokho benu, wakuthembisayo, ezweni eliqukuqela ubisi nobusi."
Deuteronomy6:4 Phulaphula, Sirayeli, uYehova uThixo wethu nguYehova yedwa."
Deuteronomy6:5 Uze umthande uYehova uThixo wakho ngentliziyo yakho yonke, nangomphefumlo wakho wonke, nangamandla akho onke."
Deuteronomy6:6 La mazwi ndikuwisela umthetho ngawo namhlanje, abe sentliziyweni yakho."
Deuteronomy6:7 Uyifundise ngenyameko abantwana bakho, uthethe ngayo ekuhlaleni kwakho endlwini yakho, nasekuhambeni kwakho ngendlela, nasekuleleni kwakho, nasekuvukeni kwakho;"
Deuteronomy6:8 Yibophe ibe ngumqondiso esandleni sakho, ibe njengebhanti phakathi kwamehlo akho."
Deuteronomy6:9 Wabhale emigubasini yendlu yakho nasemasangweni akho.
Deuteronomy6:10 Xa athe uYehova uThixo wakho wakungenisa kulo ilizwe abelifungele ooyihlo, ooAbraham noIsake noYakobi, ukuba akunike imizi emikhulu, emihle, ongayakhanga;"
Deuteronomy6:11 nezindlu ezizele zizinto zonke ezintle, ongazizalisanga, namaqula ongawambanga, nesidiliya nesidiliya, ongazityalanga; nokuba nithe nadla, nohlutha;"
Deuteronomy6:12 Zigcine, ungamlibali uYehova owakukhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa, endlwini yobukhoboka."
Deuteronomy6:13 Yoyika uYehova uThixo wakho, umkhonze, ufunge igama lakhe."
Deuteronomy6:14 Nize ningalandeli thixo bambi, oothixo beentlanga ezingeenxa zonke kuni;"
Deuteronomy6:15 ngokuba nguThixo onekhwele, uYehova uThixo wakho phakathi kwakho, nguThixo onekhwele, hleze umsindo kaYehova uThixo wakho uvuthe phezu kwakho, akutshabalalise ehlabathini."
Deuteronomy6:16 Musani ukumlinga uYehova uThixo wenu, njengoko wamlingayo;"
Deuteronomy6:17 Gcinani imithetho kaYehova uThixo wenu, nezilumkiso zakhe, nemiyalelo yakhe, awakuwiselayo;"
Deuteronomy6:18 Yenzani okulungileyo nokulungileyo emehlweni kaYehova, ukuze kulunge kuni, ningene nilidle ilifa ilizwe elihle awalifungela ooyihlo uYehova;"
Deuteronomy6:19 ukuba azigxothe iintshaba zakho zonke phambi kwakho, njengoko wathethayo uYehova."
Deuteronomy6:20 Kuthekani ukuba unyana wakho ekubuza kamva, esithi: ‘Lithini icebiso, imithetho nemiyalelo asiyalele yona uYehova uThixo wethu?"
Deuteronomy6:21 Wothi kunyana wakho, Sibe singamakhoboka kaFaro eYiputa; wasikhupha uYehova eYiputa ngesandla esithe nkqi."
Deuteronomy6:22 uYehova wenza eYiputa imiqondiso nezimanga, ezikhulu nezinzima, kuFaro, nakwindlu yakhe yonke, emehlweni ethu;"
Deuteronomy6:23 wasikhupha khona, ukuze asithabathe, ukuba asinike ilizwe elo awalifungela oobawo ngesifungo;"
Deuteronomy6:24 Wasiwisela umthetho uYehova, ukuba siyenze le mithetho yonke, ukuba simoyike uYehova uThixo wethu, silunge ngonaphakade, asigcine ebomini, njengoko kunjalo namhla."
Deuteronomy6:25 Kuya kuba yinto efanelekileyo kuthi ukuba siyayinyamekela ukuyenza le miyalelo phambi koYehova uThixo wethu, njengoko wasiyalelayo."
Deuteronomy7:1 Xa athe uYehova uThixo wakho wakungenisa kulo ilizwe oya kulo ukuba ulihluthe, wagqogqa iintlanga ezininzi phambi kwakho, amaHeti, namaGirgashi, nama-Amori, namaKanan, namaPerizi, namaHeti, namaYebhusi; zisixhenxe iintlanga mkhulu nowomeleleyo kunawe;"
Deuteronomy7:2 Xa uYehova uThixo wakho wazinikela kuwe; boyise, baqalekise; Uze ungamanyanisi nabo, ungabi nanceba kubo;"
Deuteronomy7:3 Uze ungabatshabhi nabo; intombi yakho uze ungayiniki unyana wakhe, nentombi yakhe ungayizeki kunyana wakho."
Deuteronomy7:4 Kuba yomtyekisa unyana wakho kum, akhonze thixo bambi; uya kuvutha umsindo kaYehova kuni, anitshabalalise ngoko nangoko."
Deuteronomy7:5 Yenjenje ke ukwenza kubo; zidilizeni izibingelelo zazo, nizidilize izimiso zazo, nibagawule izibonda zemithi yabo engcwele, niyitshise ngomlilo imifanekiso yazo eqingqiweyo."
Deuteronomy7:6 Ngokuba uluhlanga olungcwele kuYehova uThixo wakho; uYehova uThixo wakho uninyule ukuba nibe ngabantu bakhe abakhethekileyo ngaphezu kwezizwe zonke zehlabathi.
Deuteronomy7:7 uYehova akanithandanga yaye akaninyulanga, ngenxa yokuba naningaphezu kweentlanga zonke; ngokuba ubuyena umncinci kubo bonke abantu."
Deuteronomy7:8 Kodwa ngenxa yokunithanda kukaYehova nokusigcina kwakhe isifungo awasifungela ookhokho benu, uYehova unikhuphe ngesandla esomeleleyo waza wanikhulula kwindlu yamakhoboka esandleni sikaFaro, ukumkani waseYiputa."
Deuteronomy7:9 Yazi ke ngoku, ukuba uYehova uThixo wakho nguye uThixo, uThixo wenyaniso, obagcinelayo umnqophiso nenceba abamthandayo, abayigcinayo imithetho yakhe, ase ewakeni lezizukulwana;"
Deuteronomy7:10 Baxeleleni abamthiyayo ekuhleni, ukuba batshatyalaliswe;"
Deuteronomy7:11 Gcina imiyalelo nemimiselo nezigwebo endikuyalela ukuba uzenze namhlanje.
Deuteronomy7:12 Kothi, xa nithe nayiva le mithetho, niyigcine, nayenza, wonigcinela umnqophiso nenceba uYehova uThixo wenu, awabafungayo ooyihlo;"
Deuteronomy7:13 Wonithanda, anisikelele, anandise; Wosisikelela isiqhamo sesizalo sakho, nesiqhamo somhlaba wakho, ingqolowa yakho, newayini yakho entsha, neoli yakho, nesiqhamo senkomo yakho, namatakane empahla yakho emfutshane, emhlabeni lowo abewufungele ooyihlo ukukunika."
Deuteronomy7:14 Wosikeleleka ngaphezu kweentlanga zonke; akusayi kubakho nto ingazaliyo, nasezinkomeni zakho;"
Deuteronomy7:15 uYehova wozisusa zonke izifo kuwe; buya kuba ngumthwalo kuni bonke abanithiyayo.
Deuteronomy7:16 Uzitshabalalisile zonke iintlanga aya kuzisindisa wena uYehova uThixo wakho; malingabi nanceba kubo iliso lakho; ungabakhonzi oothixo bazo; kuba kuya kuba ngumgibe kuni.
Deuteronomy7:17 Xa uthe entliziyweni yakho, Ezi ntlanga zininzi kunam; Ndingazisusa njani?"
Deuteronomy7:18 Musa ukuzoyika; kodwa khumbula kakuhle awakwenzayo uYehova uThixo wakho kuFaro nakumaYiputa onke;
Deuteronomy7:19 izilingo ezikhulu azibonileyo amehlo akho, nemiqondiso nezimanga nesandla esomeleleyo nesandla esoluliweyo awakukhupha ngaso uYehova uThixo wakho; uya kwenjenjalo uYehova uThixo wakho kuzo zonke iintlanga ozoyikayo."
Deuteronomy7:20 Ngaphezu koko, uYehova uThixo wakho uya kuthumela oonomeva kuzo, zide ezo ziseleyo, zizisithelisayo ebusweni bakho, zibhubhe."
Deuteronomy7:21 Musa ukuzoyika, ngokuba uYehova uThixo wakho unawe, uThixo onamandla nowoyikekayo."
Deuteronomy7:22 uYehova uThixo wakho uya kuzigqogqa kancinane ezo ntlanga phambi kwakho; ize ningawadli kamsinya, hleze ande ande phezu kwenu amarhamncwa elizwe."
Deuteronomy7:23 Kodwa uYehova uThixo wakho uya kuzinikela kuwe, azitshabalalise ngentshabalalo enkulu, zide zitshatyalaliswe."
Deuteronomy7:24 Ookumkani bazo ubanikele esandleni sakho, uwacime amagama abo phantsi kwezulu; akukho mntu uya kuma ngakuwe ude uzitshabalalise."
Deuteronomy7:25 Imifanekiso eqingqiweyo yoothixo bazo yitshise ngomlilo; isilivere negolide ekuyo, uze ungayinqweneli, ungayithabatheli kuwe, hleze uwe kuyo; ngokuba lisikizi kuYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy7:26 Uze ungangenisi nanye into elisikizi endlwini yakho, ukuze ungaqalekiswa njengalo; ngokuba iyinto esingelwe phantsi."
Deuteronomy8:1 Wonke umthetho endikuwiselayo namhla, zigcineni nize niwenze, ukuze niphile, nande, ningene nilime ilizwe elo walifungela ooyihlo uYehova."
Deuteronomy8:2 Uze uyikhumbule yonke indlela akuhambise ngayo uYehova uThixo wakho, ngale minyaka imashumi mane entlango, ukuze uthotywe, ucikidelwe, ukwazi okusentliziyweni yakho, ukuba woyigcina imithetho yakhe, akuyi kuyigcina, kusini na."
Deuteronomy8:3 Wakuthoba, wakulambisa, wakudlisa imana obungayazi, ababengayazi ooyihlo; ukuze akwazise ukuba akaphili ngasonka sodwa umntu, uphila ngamazwi onke aphuma emlonyeni kaYehova."
Deuteronomy8:4 Iingubo zakho azonakalanga bubudala kuwe, nomlenze wakho awudumbanga kule minyaka imashumi mane."
Deuteronomy8:5 Khumbula ngentliziyo yakho ukuba uYehova uThixo wakho uyakuqeqesha wena, njengomntu emqeqeshayo unyana wakhe."
Deuteronomy8:6 Ngoko ke yigcineni imithetho kaYehova uThixo wenu, nihambe ngeendlela zakhe, nimoyike."
Deuteronomy8:7 Kuba uYehova uThixo wakho uya kukuzisa kwilizwe elihle, ilizwe elinemisinga yamanzi equkuqelayo, imithombo nemithombo evela kwiintlambo neenduli;"
Deuteronomy8:8 Lilizwe lengqolowa, nerhasi, nezidiliya, namakhiwane, neerharnati; ilizwe leoli yeoli nobusi;"
Deuteronomy8:9 Ezweni, oya kudla isonka ungaswelanga sonka, akuyi kuswela nto kulo; lilizwe elimatye esisinyithi, ezindulini zalo womba ubhedu."
Deuteronomy8:10 Udle, uhluthe, umdumise uYehova uThixo wakho, ngenxa yelizwe elihle omnike lona."
Deuteronomy8:11 Uze uzigcine, ungamlibali uYehova uThixo wakho, ngokuthi ungayigcini imithetho yakhe, nemiyalelo yakhe, nemiyalelo yakhe, endikuwiselayo namhla."
Deuteronomy8:12 Yabonani, xa nithe nadla, nahlutha, nakha izindlu ezintle, nihlala kuzo;"
Deuteronomy8:13 Ukuba yande imfuyo yakho, neenkomo zakho, nesilivere yakho, negolide yakho, neento zonke onazo;"
Deuteronomy8:14 Yasuka yaba nekratshi intliziyo yakho, wamlibala uYehova uThixo wakho owakukhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa endlwini yobukhoboka;"
Deuteronomy8:15 owakukhokelela kwintlango enkulu eyoyikekayo, eneenyoka ezinobuhlungu, noonomadudwane, ekunxanelweni kwamanzi; owakhupha amanzi eweni;"
Deuteronomy8:16 owakudlisa imana entlango, ababengayazi ooyihlo, ukuze akuthobe, akulinge, akwenzele okulungileyo ekupheleni kwakho;"
Deuteronomy8:17 Wathi ke wena entliziyweni yakho, Ngamandla am nokuqina kwesandla sam okundenzele obu butyebi;"
Deuteronomy8:18 Uze umkhumbule ke uYehova uThixo wakho, ngokuba nguye okunika amandla obutyebi, ukuba awumise umnqophiso wakhe abewufungele ooyihlo, njengoko kunjalo namhla."
Deuteronomy8:19 Ukuba uthe wamlibala uYehova uThixo wakho, walandela thixo bambi, wabakhonza, waqubuda kubo, ndiyaningqinela namhlanje, ukuba nobhubha ngonaphakade."
Deuteronomy8:20 Niya kutshabalala njengeentlanga awazitshabalalisayo uYehova phambi kwenu; ngenxa yokuba ungaliphulaphulanga ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wakho.
Deuteronomy9:1 Yiva, Sirayeli, uya kuyiwela namhla iYordan, usiya kuzihlutha iintlanga ezinkulu ezomeleleyo kunawe, imizi emikhulu, enodonga olude ezisa ezulwini;"
Deuteronomy9:2 uhlanga olukhulu, olude, oonyana baka-Enaki, obaziyo, obavileyo kwathiwa, Ngubani na onokuma phambi koonyana baka-Enaki?"
Deuteronomy9:3 Yazini namhla, ukuba uYehova uThixo wakho nguye onikhokelayo; njengomlilo odlayo, uya kubadla, abawise phambi kwakho; bagqogqani ngoku, nibatshabalalise kamsinya, njengoko wathethayo kuni uYehova."
Deuteronomy9:4 Uze ungatsho entliziyweni yakho ekubagxotheni kukaYehova uThixo wakho ebusweni bakho, ukuthi, Kungobulungisa bam le nto uYehova wandingenisa, ukuba ndilidle ilifa eli lizwe; izisa phambi kwakho."
Deuteronomy9:5 Akungenxa yobulungisa bakho, nangenxa yengqibelelo yentliziyo yakho, akuyi kulidla ilifa ilizwe labo; Kungokungendawo kwezo ntlanga, uYehova, uThixo wakho, wozigqogqa ebusweni bakho, alizalise ilizwi awalithethayo uYehova kooyihlo, ooAbraham noIsake noYakobi."
Deuteronomy9:6 Yazi ukuba uYehova, uThixo wakho, akakunikanga eli hlabathi lilungileyo, ngenxa yobulungisa bakho; ngokuba ningabantu abaneenkani."
Deuteronomy9:7 Khumbula, ungayilibali indlela owamcaphukisa ngayo uYehova uThixo wakho entlango: kususela kwimini owaphuma ngayo ezweni laseYiputa wada wafika kule ndawo, namvukela uYehova."
Deuteronomy9:8 Yaye iHorebhe yamcaphukisa uYehova kangangokuba uYehova waba nomsindo kuni waza wanitshabalalisa.
Deuteronomy9:9 Oko ndenyuka ndaya entabeni ukuya kuthabatha amacwecwe, amacwecwe omnqophiso abewenza uYehova nani, ndahlala iimini ezimashumi mane nobusuku obumashumi mane entabeni, ndingadli sonka, ndingaseli manzi."
Deuteronomy9:10 uYehova wandinika amacwecwe amatye amabini, ebhalwe ngomnwe kaThixo; kwakubhalwe kuyo onke amazwi uYehova awawathethayo kuni entabeni emlilweni ngomhla wokuhlangana."
Deuteronomy9:11 Ekupheleni kweemini ezimashumi mane nobusuku obumashumi mane, uYehova wandinika amacwecwe amatye amabini, angamacwecwe omnqophiso."
Deuteronomy9:12 Wathi uYehova kum, Vuka, umke apha kamsinya; ngokuba abantu bakho obakhuphileyo eYiputa bonile baphela; batyeka kamsinya endleleni endabawisela umthetho ngayo; bazenzela umfanekiso otyhidiweyo."
Deuteronomy9:13 Kwakhona uYehova wathetha kum, esithi: “Ndilubonile olu hlanga, yaye luhlanga oluneenkani;"
Deuteronomy9:14 mandime, ndibatshabalalise, ndilicime igama labo phantsi kwezulu; ndikwenze uhlanga olunamandla, olukhulu kunabo."
Deuteronomy9:15 Ndajika ke ndehla entabeni, intaba isitsha ngumlilo, amacwecwe omabini omnqophiso esezandleni zam zozibini."
Deuteronomy9:16 Ndabona, ndabona ukuba nonile kuYehova uThixo wenu, nasuka nazenzela ithole elixheliweyo; Naphambuka ngokukhawuleza kwindlela uYehova abeniyalele ngayo."
Deuteronomy9:17 Ndathabatha amacwecwe amabini, ndawaphosa ezandleni zam zozibini, ndawaqhekeza phambi kwamehlo enu."
Deuteronomy9:18 Ndawa phantsi phambi koYehova, njengemini yokuqala, iimini ezimashumi mane nobusuku obumashumi mane; Andidlanga sonka, andiselanga manzi ngenxa yezono zenu zonke, enone ngazo ngokwenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, ukuba nimqumbise."
Deuteronomy9:19 Kuba bendiwoyika umsindo nokuvutha komsindo kaYehova ukuba anitshabalalise. Kodwa ngelo xesha uYehova wandiva.
Deuteronomy9:20 uYehova wamfuthela kunene uAron, wada wamtshabalalisa; ndathandaza noAron ngelo xesha."
Deuteronomy9:21 Ndasithabatha isono sakho, ithole elo walenzayo, ndalitshisa ngomlilo, ndalisila, ndalisila, lada lacoleka njengothuli; yaye uthuli lwawo ndaluphosa emlanjeni weentaba."
Deuteronomy9:22 Yaye eTabhera naseMasa naseKibroti-hatafa namenza bubi uYehova.
Deuteronomy9:23 Nasekunisuseni kukaYehova eKadeshe-bharneha, esithi, Nyukani, nilihluthe ilizwe elo ndininikileyo; nawuphikisa umlomo kaYehova uThixo wakho, anakholwa nguye, analiphulaphula izwi lakhe."
Deuteronomy9:24 Namvukela uYehova kususela koko ndanaziyo.
Deuteronomy9:25 Ndawa ke phantsi phambi koYehova, ezo mini zimashumi mane nobusuku obumashumi mane, endawayo phantsi; ngokuba uYehova wathi uya kunitshabalalisa."
Deuteronomy9:26 Ndathandaza ke kuYehova, ndathi, Nkosi yam, Yehova, musa ukubatshabalalisa abantu bakho, ilifa lakho, obakhululeyo ngobukhulu bakho, obakhuphileyo eYiputa ngesandla esithe nkqi."
Deuteronomy9:27 Khumbula abakhonzi bakho, ooAbraham, noIsake, noYakobi; musa ukukhangela inkani yaba bantu, nobubi babo, nesono sabo."
Deuteronomy9:28 Ilizwe enisikhuphe kulo malingatsho ukuthi, ‘Kungenxa yokuba uYehova engabangenisanga kwilizwe awayebathembise lona, yaye ngenxa yokuba wayebathiyile, wabathumela ukuba bababulalele entlango."
Deuteronomy9:29 Ke ngabantu bakho nelifa lakho, obakhuphileyo ngamandla akho amakhulu, nangesandla sakho esolukileyo."
Deuteronomy10:1 Ngelo xesha wathi uYehova kum, Zilungisele amacwecwe amabini, njengawokuqala, unyuke uye kum entabeni, uzenzele ityeya yomthi;"
Deuteronomy10:2 ndiwabhale emacwecweni lawo amazwi abesemacwecweni okuqala owawaqhekezayo, ndiwabeke etyeyeni;"
Deuteronomy10:3 Ndenza ke ityeya ngomthi welinden, ndakrola amacwecwe amatye amabini, njengawokuqala; ndenyuka entabeni, ndiphethe amacwecwe omabini esandleni sam."
Deuteronomy10:4 Wayibhala emacwecweni, ngokombhalo wokuqala, imiyalelo elishumi uYehova awayithetha kuni ngomhla wokuhlangana entabeni phakathi komlilo; wandinika ke uYehova."
Deuteronomy10:5 Ndajika ke, ndehla entabeni, ndawabeka amacwecwe etyeyeni endayenzayo zinjalo ke, njengoko iNkosi yandiwisela umthetho ngako."
Deuteronomy10:6 Bayishiya oonyana bakaSirayeli eBheroti-bhene-yahakan, baya eMosera; Wafela khona uAron, wangcwatyelwa khona; unyana wakhe uEleyazare waba ngumbingeleli esikhundleni sakhe."
Deuteronomy10:7 Banduluka khona, baya eGudegoda; ethabathela eGudegoda, esa eYotebhati, ezweni loMjelo wamanzi."
Deuteronomy10:8 Ngelo xesha uYehova wanyula isizwe sakwaLevi ukuba sithwale ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova, ukuze sime phambi koYehova simkhonze, sisikelele egameni lakhe de kube namhla."
Deuteronomy10:9 Ngoko ke uLevi akanasabelo nalifa ndawonye nabazalwana bakhe; nguYehova ilifa lakhe, njengoko wakuthethayo uYehova uThixo wakho kuye."
Deuteronomy10:10 Ndema ke mna entabeni, njengemini yokuqala, iimini ezimashumi mane nobusuku obumashumi mane; Naye uYehova wandiva ngelo xesha, yaye uYehova akafuna ukunitshabalalisa."
Deuteronomy10:11 Wathi uYehova kum, Suka uye ebantwini, bangene balime ilizwe elo, ndafungayo kooyise, ndathi, Ndiya kubanika."
Deuteronomy10:12 Kaloku ke, Sirayeli, uYehova uThixo wakho, ufuna ntoni na kuwe, kungekuko ukumoyika uYehova uThixo wakho, uhambe ngeendlela zakhe zonke, umthande, umkhonze uYehova uThixo wakho ingqondo yakho yonke, nangentliziyo yakho yonke umoya,"
Deuteronomy10:13 ugcine imithetho kaYehova, nemimiselo yakhe, endikuwiselayo namhla ngenxa yakho?"
Deuteronomy10:14 Yabona, amazulu, nezulu lamazulu, nguYehova uThixo wakho, nehlabathi, neento zonke ezikhona;"
Deuteronomy10:15 NguYehova kuphela owakholiswayo ngookhokho benu ukuba abathande, waza wanyula inzala yabo emva kwabo, nina phakathi kweentlanga zonke, njengoko kunjalo namhla."
Deuteronomy10:16 Guqukani ngoku ezintliziyweni zenu, ningabi saqaqadeka."
Deuteronomy10:17 Ngokuba uYehova uThixo wenu nguThixo woothixo, yiNkosi yookumkani, nguThixo omkhulu, onamandla, onamandla, ongakhethi buso bamntu, ongamkeliyo umvuzo."
Deuteronomy10:18 Ugweba ityala lenkedama nomhlolokazi, Uthanda owasemzini, ngokumnika ukudla, nempahla yokunxiba."
Deuteronomy10:19 Ngoko ke bathandeni umphambukeli, ekubeni naningabaphambukeli nani ezweni laseYiputa."
Deuteronomy10:20 Yoyika uYehova uThixo wakho; nimkhonze, ninamathele kuye, nifunge igama lakhe."
Deuteronomy10:21 Nguye okuncomayo, yaye nguThixo wakho okwenzele ezi zinto zinkulu nezoyikekayo azibonileyo amehlo akho."
Deuteronomy10:22 Behla ooyihlo ukuya eYiputa, bekunye namadoda angamashumi amathandathu; Kaloku ke, uYehova uThixo wenu, unandisile njengeenkwenkwezi zezulu."
Deuteronomy11:1 Ngoko ke uze umthande uYehova uThixo wakho, ugcine imiyalelo yakhe, nemithetho yakhe, nemiyalelo yakhe, nemithetho yakhe, imihla yonke."
Deuteronomy11:2 Yazini ngokwenu namhla, ngokuba andithethi kuni, nyana bangabonanga, bangabonanga, ubugwenxa bukaYehova uThixo wenu, nobukhulu bakhe, nesandla sakhe esithe nkqi, nengalo yakhe eyolukileyo,"
Deuteronomy11:3 nezimanga zakhe, nemisebenzi yakhe awayenzayo phakathi kweYiputa kuFaro ukumkani waseYiputa, nakwilizwe lakhe lonke;"
Deuteronomy11:4 nento awayenzayo kwimikhosi yamaYiputa, namahashe ayo, neenqwelo zayo zokulwa; ukuba wabakhukulisa emanzini aseSekelefeshe, ekusukeleni kwabo, awabatshabalalisayo uYehova unanamhla;"
Deuteronomy11:5 noko wakwenzayo kuni entlango, nada nafika kule ndawo;"
Deuteronomy11:6 noko wakwenzayo kuDatan noAbhiram, oonyana bakaEliyabhi, unyana kaRubhen, wathi umhlaba wawuvula umlomo wawo, wabaginya, nemizalwane yabo, neentente zabo, nengqwebo yabo yonke ekubadleni ilifa phakathi kwabo."
Deuteronomy11:7 Kodwa amehlo enu azibonile zonke izenzo zikaYehova ezikhulu azenzileyo.
Deuteronomy11:8 Ize niyigcine ke yonke imithetho endiniwiselayo namhla, ukuze nomelele, nileyise ilizwe elo ningena kulo ukuba nilihluthe;"
Deuteronomy11:9 ukuze niyolule imihla emhlabeni lowo uYehova awalithembisa ookhokho benu ngesifungo sokuba uya kuwunika bona nenzala yabo ilizwe eliqukuqela ubisi nobusi.
Deuteronomy11:10 Kuba ilizwe oya kulidla ilifa alinjengelizwe laseYiputa owaphuma kulo, apho wayihlwayelayo imbewu yakho, wayinkcenkceshela ngonyawo lwakho, njengomyezo wemifuno."
Deuteronomy11:11 Ke lona ilizwe eniya kulidla ilifa, lilizwe leentaba nezihlambo, elisela amanzi emvula yezulu."
Deuteronomy11:12 Lilizwe alinyamekelayo uYehova uThixo wakho; ahlala ekulo amehlo kaYehova uThixo wakho, ethabathela ekuqaleni komnyaka, ade ase ekupheleni komnyaka."
Deuteronomy11:13 Ukuba nithe nayiphulaphula ngenyameko imithetho yam, endiniwisela yona namhla, nimthande uYehova uThixo wenu, nimkhonze ngentliziyo yenu yonke, nangomphefumlo wenu wonke;"
Deuteronomy11:14 ndininike iimvula zelizwe lenu ngexesha lazo, iimvula zokuqala nezeemvula zamva, niyihlanganise ingqolowa yakho, nomdiza wakho, neoli yakho;"
Deuteronomy11:15 Ndiya kuthumela utyani ezweni lemfuyo yakho, udle, uhluthe;"
Deuteronomy11:16 Zilumkeleni, hleze zilahlekiswe iintliziyo zenu, niphambuke, nikhonze thixo bambi, niqubude kubo;"
Deuteronomy11:17 Ngoku ke uyavutha umsindo kaYehova, wawavala amazulu, ukuba kungabikho mvula, nelizwe linganikeli iziqhamo zalo; nokuze ningangxami nitshabalale ezweni elihle aninika lona uYehova."
Deuteronomy11:18 Ke ngoko, la mazwi am wabekeni ezintliziyweni zenu nasemoyeni wenu, niwabophe njengomqondiso ezandleni zenu, ukuze abe njengeqhina phakathi kwamehlo enu."
Deuteronomy11:19 Uze uthethe ngawo koonyana bakho ekuhlaleni kwakho endlwini yakho, nasekuhambeni kwakho ngendlela, nasekulaleni kwakho, nasekuvukeni kwakho;"
Deuteronomy11:20 uwabhale emigubasini yendlu yakho nasemasangweni akho:
Deuteronomy11:21 ukuze yande imihla yenu nemihla yoonyana benu emhlabeni lowo uYehova wayewuthembise ookhokho benu ngesifungo sokuba uya kubanika, njengemihla yamazulu emhlabeni."
Deuteronomy11:22 Kuba, ukuba nithe nawugcina ngenyameko lo mthetho wonke ndiniwiselayo ukuba niwenze, nimthande uYehova uThixo wenu, nihambe ngeendlela zakhe zonke, ninamathele kuye;"
Deuteronomy11:23 Yaye ngokuqinisekileyo uYehova uya kuzigxotha zonke ezi ntlanga phambi kwenu, yaye niya kuzidla ilifa iintlanga ezinkulu nezinamandla kunani."
Deuteronomy11:24 Yonke indawo eya kunyathela ngentende yonyawo lwenu yoba yeyenu: ukususela entlango naseLebhanon ukususela kuMlambo umEfrate kuse elwandle kwelinye icala lelizwe iya kuba yindawo yenu.
Deuteronomy11:25 Akukho bani uya kuma phambi kwenu, kuba uYehova uThixo wenu uya kubeka ukunkwantya kwenu nokoyikeka kwenu kulo lonke ilizwe eniya kulinyathela ngokwalo njengoko nithethileyo."
Deuteronomy11:26 Yabonani, ndininika namhla intsikelelo nesiqalekiso;"
Deuteronomy11:27 Ninoyolo, xa nithe nayiphulaphula imithetho kaYehova uThixo wenu, endiniwiselayo namhla."
Deuteronomy11:28 Uqalekisiwe, ukuba nithe aniyiphulaphula imithetho kaYehova uThixo wenu, nasuka natyeka endleleni endiniyalela yona namhlanje ngokulandela thixo bambi eningabazi."
Deuteronomy11:29 Xa athe uYehova, uThixo wakho, wakungenisa kulo ilizwe oya kulo ukuba ulidle ilifa, wayisikelela intaba yeGerizim, nesiqalekiso phezu kwentaba ye-Ebhali."
Deuteronomy11:30 Ndakuthi, Àziphesheya kweYordan na, ngaphaya kwendlela yasentshonalanga, ezweni lamaKanan, amiyo eminqubeni eGiligali, entilini yentlango kaMore?"
Deuteronomy11:31 Kuba niya kuwela iYordan, nisiya kulihlutha ilizwe elo aninikayo uYehova uThixo wenu, nilihluthe ke nime kulo."
Deuteronomy11:32 Yenzani ngenyameko yonke imiyalelo nezigwebo endizibeke phambi kwenu namhlanje.
Deuteronomy12:1 Yiyo le imimiselo namasiko, owoyigcina, wenze ezweni elo, akunikayo uYehova uThixo wooyihlo, ukuba ulime yonke imihla yobomi bakho emhlabeni."
Deuteronomy12:2 Niya kuziqalekisa zonke iindawo eziya kuthi iintlanga nizidle ilifa zikhonze uthixo wazo ezintabeni eziphakamileyo nakwiinduli naphantsi kwemithi yonke eluhlaza;
Deuteronomy12:3 nizidilize izibingelelo zabo, niziqhekeze izimiso zabo zamatye, nizitshise ngomlilo iziqu zabo; yigawuleni imifanekiso eqingqiweyo yoothixo bazo nize niwacime amagama azo kuloo ndawo."
Deuteronomy12:4 Uze ungenjenjalo kuYehova uThixo wakho.
Deuteronomy12:5 Kodwa endaweni aya kuyinyula uYehova uThixo wenu ezizukulwaneni zenu zonke, ukuba alimise kuyo igama lakhe, kuleyo ndawo ahlala kuyo, eniya kuyimisela khona."
Deuteronomy12:6 Zisani khona amadini enu anyukayo, nemibingelelo yenu, nezishumi zenu, nomnikelo wokudla esandleni senu, nezibhambathiso zenu, nemibingelelo yenu yokuqhutywa yintliziyo, namazibulo eenkomo zenu, nasempahleni yenu emfutshane;"
Deuteronomy12:7 nidle khona phambi koYehova uThixo wenu, nivuye ngenxa yento yonke eniya kuyibeka izandla zenu, nina nezindlu zenu, akusikeleleyo ngazo uYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy12:8 Musani ukwenza ngokwezinto zonke esizenzayo apha namhla, ukuba wonke umntu ozibona lilungisa kwawakhe amehlo."
Deuteronomy12:9 Kuba okwangoku anikafiki kwindawo yokuphumla nelizwe akunika lona uYehova uThixo wakho.
Deuteronomy12:10 Xa nithe nayiwela iYordan, nahlala ezweni elo, aninikayo uYehova uThixo wenu, ukuba libe lilifa lenu, waniphumza ezintshabeni zenu zonke ezingeenxa zonke kuni, nahlala ninoxolo;"
Deuteronomy12:11 Kothi ke kubekho indawo aya kuyinyula uYehova uThixo wakho, alibeke kuyo igama lakhe; uya kuzisa khona zonke izinto endikuwisele umthetho ngazo; amadini enu anyukayo, nemibingelelo yenu, nezishumi zenu, nomrhumo wezandla zenu, nezibhambathiso zenu ezikhethekileyo, enibhambathise ngazo kuYehova;"
Deuteronomy12:12 nivuye phambi koYehova uThixo wenu, nina noonyana benu, neentombi zenu, nabakhonzi benu, nezicakakazi zenu, nomLevi emasangweni enu; ngokuba akanasabelo nalifa nani."
Deuteronomy12:13 Uze uzigcine ungawanyuseli amadini akho anyukayo ezindaweni zonke ozibonayo.
Deuteronomy12:14 Ke endaweni leyo aya kuyinyula uYehova kwesinye sezizwe zakowenu, wowanyusa khona amadini akho anyukayo, ukwenze khona konke endikuwisela umthetho ngako."
Deuteronomy12:15 Kodwa inyama ungayixhela emasangweni akho onke uze udle ukutya okunqwenelwa ngumphefumlo wakho ngokwentsikelelo kaYehova uThixo wakho akunikileyo; intliziyo.
Deuteronomy12:16 Musani ukulidla igazi; liphalaze njengamanzi.
Deuteronomy12:17 Uze ungasidli isishumi sakho sengqolowa, nesewayini yakho entsha, neseoli yakho, nesamazibulo eenkomo zakho, nempahla yakho emfutshane, nesibhambathiso sakho osifungeleyo, nombingelelo wakho wokuqhutywa yintliziyo, nowokuqhutywa yintliziyo iminikelo hayi umnikelo wesandla sakho:"
Deuteronomy12:18 Uze uzidlele phambi koYehova uThixo wakho endaweni leyo aya kuyinyula uYehova uThixo wakho, wena nonyana wakho nentombi yakho nekhoboka lakho nesicakakazi sakho nomLevi emasangweni akho; nibe nemihlali phambi koYehova uThixo wenu ngenxa yayo yonke into eniya kuyibeka izandla."
Deuteronomy12:19 Uze uzilumkele ukuba ungamshiyi umLevi yonke imihla yobomi bakho emhlabeni.
Deuteronomy12:20 Xa athe uYehova uThixo wakho wawenza banzi umda wakho, njengoko abethethe ngako kuwe, uthi, Ndiya kudla inyama, ngokuba umphefumlo wakho unqwenela ukuyidla inyama; ungadla inyama, ngokunqwena konke komphefumlo wakho."
Deuteronomy12:21 Ukuba ithe yakude kuwe indawo leyo, athe uYehova uThixo wakho wayinyulela ukulibeka kuyo igama lakhe, woxhela iinkomo zakho, nempahla yakho emfutshane, akunikileyo uYehova, njengoko ndakuwiselayo umthetho, udle emasangweni akho onke into oyinqwenelayo umphefumlo wakho."
Deuteronomy12:22 Uya kubadla njengokudliwa kwexhama nexhama; oyinqambi nohlambulukileyo boyidla ngokulinganayo.
Deuteronomy12:23 Lumkani, ningalidli igazi, kuba igazi libubomi; musani ukudla ubomi nenyama."
Deuteronomy12:24 Ungalidli; uyawuphalaza njengamanzi.
Deuteronomy12:25 Musani ukuyidla; ukuze kulunge kuwe, wena nabantwana bakho emva kwakho, ukuba nenza okulungileyo emehlweni kaYehova."
Deuteronomy12:26 Kuphela zizipho zakho ezingcwele onazo, nezibhambathiso zakho, onokuthi uhambe uye kwindawo aya kuyinyula uYehova;"
Deuteronomy12:27 wenze amadini akho anyukayo, ngenyama negazi, esibingelelweni sikaYehova uThixo wakho; igazi lomnikelo wakho woligalela esibingelelweni sikaYehova uThixo wakho, uyidle inyama wena."
Deuteronomy12:28 Yivani nize niwaphulaphule la mazwi onke ndiniyalela wona, ukuze kulunge kuwe nakoonyana bakho emva kwakho ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo, ukuba uthe wenza okulungileyo nokufanelekileyo emehlweni kaYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy12:29 Ngenxa enokuba uYehova uThixo wakho wazitshabalalisa phambi kwakho iintlanga, lowo ungena kuzo ukuba uzihluthe, ke wena wazilandela, wahlala ezweni lazo;"
Deuteronomy12:30 Zilumkele ukuba ungaweli emgibeni wokuzilandela emva kokuba zitshatyalalisiwe phambi kwakho; ukuze ungabuzi koothixo bazo, uthi, Zibe zisithini na ezi ntlanga ukubakhonza oothixo bazo? Ndiza kwenza njalo."
Deuteronomy12:31 Uze ungenjenjalo kuYehova uThixo wakho; ngokuba ziyenzile koothixo bazo zonke izinto ezingamasikizi kuYehova, awazithiyileyo; ngenxa yokuba kwanoonyana bazo neentombi zabo babebatshisa oothixo bazo ngomlilo."
Deuteronomy12:32 Konke endikuwisela umthetho ngako, uze ukwenze ngenyameko;"
Deuteronomy13:1 Xa kuthe kwabonakala kuwe umprofeti, nomphuphi wamaphupha, wakunika imiqondiso nezimanga;"
Deuteronomy13:2 Kwathi, kwakusenzeka oko umqondiso nomqondiso awuthethileyo kuni, wathi, Masibaleke siye thixweni bambi eningabazanga, sibakhonze;"
Deuteronomy13:3 Musani ukuwaphulaphula amazwi aloo mprofeti naloo mphuphi wamaphupha, kuba uYehova uThixo wenu unilinga ukuze azi ukuba niyamthanda na uYehova uThixo wenu ngentliziyo yenu yonke nangomphefumlo wenu wonke."
Deuteronomy13:4 Landela uYehova uThixo wakho, umoyike, ugcine imithetho yakhe, uliphulaphule ilizwi lakhe, umkhonze, unamathele kuye."
Deuteronomy13:5 Ke loo mprofeti naloo mphuphi wamaphupha makabulawe; ngenxa yokuba wayethe makakulahlekise uYehova uThixo wakho owakukhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa aze akukhulule endlwini yobukhoboka ukuze akulahlekise endleleni awakuyalela ukuba uhambe ngayo uYehova uThixo wakho kwi bususeni ke ububi phakathi kwenu.
Deuteronomy13:6 Xa athe umzalwana wakho, nokuba ngunyana kanyoko, nonyana wakho, nentombi yakho, nomfazi wesifuba sakho, nommelwane wakho, onjengomphefumlo wakho, lowo wakungcatshayo ngasese, wathi, Masikhonze thixo bambi; osinikileyo akwaziwa wena noyihlo;"
Deuteronomy13:7 ngoothixo beentlanga ezingeenxa zonke kuni, ezikufuphi kuni, ezikude lee kuwe, kuthabathela esiphelweni sehlabathi, kuse esiphelweni sehlabathi;"
Deuteronomy13:8 Musani ukukholwa nguye, musani ukumphulaphula; malingabi nanceba kuye iliso lakho, ungamxoleli, ungamsithelisi."
Deuteronomy13:9 Mbulale ke; Isandla sakho siya kumbulala kuqala, kwandule ke isandla sabantu bonke;"
Deuteronomy13:10 Makaxulutywe ngamatye, afe; ngokuba wazama ukukugxotha uYehova uThixo wakho, owakukhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa, wakungenisa endlwini yobukhoboka."
Deuteronomy13:11 Wonke uSirayeli uya kukuva oku aze oyike, angabi saphinda enze into embi njengaleyo yenziwe phakathi kwakho."
Deuteronomy13:12 Xa uthe weva komnye umzi wakowenu, kwathiwa, Loo nto akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho, ukuba uhlale khona, ukuthi,"
Deuteronomy13:13 Kwaphuma amadoda angamatshijolo phakathi kwenu, abaqweqwedisa abemi bomzi wabo, athi, Masihambe siye kukhonza thixo bambi eningabazanga;"
Deuteronomy13:14 Ngoku ufanele ukubuza kwaye uphengulule kwaye ubuze ngenyameko; yabona, ukuba yinyani, injalo loo nto, ewe ewenzile amasikizi anjalo phakathi kwenu;"
Deuteronomy13:15 Babulaleni bonke abemi baloo mzi ngohlangothi lwekrele, nibabulale ngesiqalekiso, nento yonke ekuwo, kwanemfuyo yawo, ngohlangothi lwekrele."
Deuteronomy13:16 Hlanganisela onke amaxhoba aso esazulwini sendawo yaso, usitshise ngomlilo umzi namaxhoba aso onke, kuYehova uThixo wakho; kwaye kuya kubakho ithemba ngonaphakade; ayinakubuyiselwa."
Deuteronomy13:17 Makungafaki nto yesiqalekiso esandleni sakho, ukuze abuye uYehova ekuvutheni komsindo wakhe, abe nenceba kuwe, abe nenceba kuwe, akwandise, njengoko wafungayo kooyihlo ngesifungo;"
Deuteronomy13:18 Xa uthe waliphulaphula izwi likaYehova uThixo wakho, wayigcina yonke imithetho yakhe endikuwiselayo namhla, ukuba wenze okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy14:1 Oonyana bakaYehova uThixo wenu; musani ukuzenza mnyama, ningenzi mpandla phakathi kwamehlo akho ngenxa yofileyo."
Deuteronomy14:2 Ngokuba niluhlanga olungcwele kuYehova uThixo wenu, yaye uYehova uninyule ukuba nibe luhlanga lwakhe olukhethekileyo phakathi kweentlanga zonke zomhlaba."
Deuteronomy14:3 Uze ungadli nanye into elizothe.
Deuteronomy14:4 Zizo ezi izinto ezizitho zine enozidla: inkomo, negusha, netakane lebhokhwe;"
Deuteronomy14:5 Ixhama, ixhama, ixhama, ixhama, ixhama, ixhama nexhama."
Deuteronomy14:6 Sonke isilwanyana esiluthe gqiphu uphuphu nesahlule uphuphu lwaso lwacanda kabini, esidla uphuphu phakathi kwezilo, siya kuyidla."
Deuteronomy14:7 Kodwa uze ungawudli kwababethayo, nakweziziqhekeze izikhonkwane; njengenkamela, umvundla, nenkamela; ngokuba bayabetha, kodwa abazahluleli izikhonkwane; ngenxa yoko baziinqambi;"
Deuteronomy14:8 nehagu, ngokuba iluthe gqiphu uphuphu, kodwa ayiwetyisi; ningayidli inyama yazo, ningayidli inyama yazo."
Deuteronomy14:9 Zonke izinto ezisemanzini nozidla: Zonke izinto ezinamaphiko namaxolo nozidla.
Deuteronomy14:10 Yonke into engenamaphiko namaxolo nize ningayidli; anihlambulukile.
Deuteronomy14:11 Zonke iintaka ezihlambulukileyo nozidla.
Deuteronomy14:12 Zizo ezi izinto eningasayi kuzidla: lukhozi, nentaka, nentaka;"
Deuteronomy14:13 novuyo, inkonjane, nexhalanga;"
Deuteronomy14:14 nehlungulu lonke ngohlobo lwalo;
Deuteronomy14:15 nenciniba, nenqu, nenqu, nenquba ngohlobo lwazo;"
Deuteronomy14:16 Nesikhova, nembande;"
Deuteronomy14:17 nokhozi, nexhalanga;"
Deuteronomy14:18 nexhalanga, ixhalanga nelulwane."
Deuteronomy14:19 Yonke into enyakazelayo, ephaphazelayo, iyinqambi kuni; ningazidli."
Deuteronomy14:20 Zonke iintaka ezihlambulukileyo ningazidla.
Deuteronomy14:21 Musani ukuyidla into ezifeleyo ngokwayo; mnike owasemzini emnyango, adle; okanye ungathengisa ngayo kowolunye uhlanga, ngokuba usisizwana esingcwele kuYehova uThixo wakho. Usenokungaliboni itakane ebisini lukanina."
Deuteronomy14:22 Uze uthabathe isishumi kuyo yonke imveliso yembewu yakho yelizwe eliphuma minyaka le.
Deuteronomy14:23 Uze udle isahlulo seshumi sengqolowa yakho, nesewayini yakho entsha, neseoli yakho, nesamazibulo eenkomo zakho, nawempahla yakho emfutshane, phambi koYehova uThixo wakho, kuloo ndawo aya kuyinyulela ukulibeka kuyo igama lakhe; ukuze ufunde ukumoyika uYehova uThixo wakho ngamaxesha onke."
Deuteronomy14:24 Ukuba inde indlela kuni, aninako ukuhamba ngayo; indawo ekude kuwe, aya kuyinyula uYehova uThixo wakho, ukuba alimise kuyo igama lakhe, ekusikeleleni kwakho uYehova uThixo wakho;"
Deuteronomy14:25 Ngoku ke, tshintshisa ngemali uze uyibophe esandleni sakho, uye kuloo ndawo aya kuyinyula uYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy14:26 Uze unike imali ngayo nantoni na oyinqwenelayo umphefumlo wakho, inkomo okanye imfuyo okanye iwayini okanye isiselo esinxilisayo okanye ngayo nantoni na oyinqwenelayo umphefumlo wakho; udle khona phambi koYehova uThixo wakho, uvuye, wena nendlu yakho;"
Deuteronomy14:27 NomLevi emasangweni akho; musa ukumshiya; ngokuba akanasabelo nalifa nani.
Deuteronomy14:28 Ekupheleni kweminyaka emithathu, wokhupha sonke isishumi somvuzo wakho waloo nyaka, usiphose emasangweni akho."
Deuteronomy14:29 Beze ke umLevi (ngokuba akanasabelo, nokuba lilifa elivela kuni), neenkedama nomhlolokazi osemasangweni akho, badle bahluthe; ukuba akusikelele uYehova uThixo wakho emsebenzini wonke wezandla zakho owenzayo."
Deuteronomy15:1 Ekupheleni kweminyaka esixhenxe, uze wenze uyekelelo."
Deuteronomy15:2 Nantsi indlela yokukhululwa: Wonke umntu oboleka ummelwane wakhe uya kumkhulula; makangayifuni entsatsheni yakhe, nokuba kumzalwana wakhe; ngokuba kubizwa ngokuba lusindiso lukaYehova."
Deuteronomy15:3 Ungaphinda uyicele kumntu ongamaziyo;
Deuteronomy15:4 ngathi akukho hlwempu kuni; ngokuba uYehova wokusikelela kakhulu ezweni elo, akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho ukuba libe lilifa, ulihluthe."
Deuteronomy15:5 Xa uthe waliphulaphula ngenyameko ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wakho, uze uyenze yonke le miyalelo ndikuyalela yona namhlanje."
Deuteronomy15:6 Ngokuba uYehova uThixo wakho uya kukusikelela njengoko wathethayo kuwe, woboleka iintlanga ezininzi ngezibambiso, ke wena ungabolekisi ngazo; uya kulawula iintlanga ezininzi, ke zona aziyi kukulawula."
Deuteronomy15:7 Xa kuthe kwakho ihlwempu kubazalwana bakho kwelinye lamasango akho, ezweni lakho akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho, musa ukuyenza lukhuni intliziyo yakho, ungasivaleli isandla sakho kumzalwana wakho olihlwempu."
Deuteronomy15:8 Kodwa vula kakhulu isandla sakho kuye, uze ngokuqinisekileyo umboleke ngokokuswela kwakhe, ngokokuthanda kwakhe."
Deuteronomy15:9 Zilumkele, kungabikho ingcinga embi entliziyweni yakho, ithi, Usondele umnyaka wesixhenxe, umnyaka woyekelelo; libe libi iliso lakho ngakumzalwana wakho olihlwempu, ungamniki nto; Ubize kuYehova ngani, ibe sisono kuni oko."
Deuteronomy15:10 Mnike, ingabi mbi intliziyo yakho, xa uthe wamnika; ngokuba uYehova uThixo wakho wokusikelela ngenxa yale nto kuyo yonke imisebenzi yakho, nakweyonke into oya kuyibamba ngesandla sakho."
Deuteronomy15:11 Kuba amahlwempu akasayi kuba saphela ehlabathini; ngenxa yoko ndikuwisela umthetho, ndithi, vula isandla sakho kumzalwana wakho ofunyenweyo, olihlwempu ezweni lakho."
Deuteronomy15:12 Xa athe umzalwana wakho ongumHebhere uthe wazithengisa kuwe, indoda nokuba yinkazana, wakukhonza iminyaka emithandathu; uze umkhulule kuwe ngomnyaka wesixhenxe."
Deuteronomy15:13 Ukuba uthe wamndulula ekhululekile, uze ungamndululi eyedwa."
Deuteronomy15:14 Umnike ngesisa empahleni yakho emfutshane, nasesanda sakho, nasesixovulelweni sakho; umnike oko akusikelele ngako uYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy15:15 Khumbula ukuba ube ulikhoboka ezweni laseYiputa, wakukhulula uYehova uThixo wakho; Yiyo loo nto ndikuyalela oku namhlanje."
Deuteronomy15:16 Nokuba uthe kuni, Andiyi kunishiya; ngokuba ekuthanda, kwanabendlu yakho, ngokuba izinto zilungile kuwe;"
Deuteronomy15:17 Ke kaloku, thabatha ikhonkco uze umgqobhoze indlebe emnyango, yaye uya kuba ngumkhonzi wakho ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo wenjenjalo kwisicakakazi sakho."
Deuteronomy15:18 Akuyi kuba nzima kuwe ukuba umndulule ahambe nawe ngokukhululekileyo; Kuba ubefanelwe ngumvuzo weentsuku ezimbini, ukuba akhonze iminyaka emithandathu; yaye uYehova uThixo wakho uya kukusikelela kuko konke okwenzayo."
Deuteronomy15:19 Onke amazibulo eenkomo zakho, nasempahleni yakho emfutshane, ùngcwele kuYehova uThixo wakho; Uze ungenzi namnye umsebenzi ngemazibulo enkomo yakho, ungawachebi amazibulo empahla yakho emfutshane."
Deuteronomy15:20 Uze ukudlele phambi koYehova uThixo wakho unyaka nonyaka kuloo ndawo aya kuyinyula uYehova, wena nendlu yakho."
Deuteronomy15:21 Ukuba lineqhenqa, nokuba sisiqhwala, nokuba yimfama, nokuba lineqhenqa, uze ungalisondezi kuYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy15:22 Udla emasangweni akho; oyinqambi nohlambulukileyo boyidla kunye, njengexhama nexhama."
Deuteronomy15:23 Kodwa igazi layo musani ukulidla; uyawuphalaza njengamanzi.
Deuteronomy16:1 Yigcine inyanga enguAbhibhi, wenze ipasika kuYehova uThixo wakho; ngokuba wakukhupha ngenyanga enguAbhibhi uYehova uThixo wakho eYiputa ebusuku."
Deuteronomy16:2 Uze ubingelele ipasika kuYehova uThixo wakho, impahla emfutshane neenkomo, kuloo ndawo uYehova aya kuyinyulela ukuba alibeke kuyo igama lakhe."
Deuteronomy16:3 Uze ungasidli isonka esinegwele kunye nayo; iintsuku ezisixhenxe wodla izonka ezingenagwele kunye nayo, isonka sokubandezeleka; kuba waphuma ngokukhawuleza ezweni laseYiputa, ukuze uyikhumbule yonke imihla yobomi bakho ngomhla wokuphuma kwakho ezweni laseYiputa."
Deuteronomy16:4 Iintsuku ezisixhenxe kungabonwa gwele kuwe ezweni lakho lonke; akwasala nto kwinyama ebixhelwe ngokuhlwa ngosuku lokuqala kwada kwasa.
Deuteronomy16:5 Uze ungayibhiyozeli ipasika ezixekweni zakho akunike zona uYehova uThixo wakho.
Deuteronomy16:6 Ke endaweni aya kuyinyulela ukulibeka kuyo igama likaYehova uThixo wakho, apho woyibingelela khona ipasika ngokuhlwa, ukutshona kwelanga, ngexesha lokuphuma kwakho eYiputa;"
Deuteronomy16:7 Woyithabatha, uyidle, kuloo ndawo aya kuyinyula uYehova uThixo wakho; guquka kusasa, uye ezintenteni zakho."
Deuteronomy16:8 Wodla izonka ezingenagwele imihla emithandathu; ke ngomhla wesixhenxe ùngumthendeleko kuYehova uThixo wakho;
Deuteronomy16:9 Zibalele iiveki ezisixhenxe; qala ukubala iiveki ezisixhenxe ukususela xa wawuqala ukusasaza irhengqa phezu kwengqolowa.
Deuteronomy16:10 Yaye wenze umthendeleko weeveki zokumzukisa uYehova uThixo wakho ngerhafu yomnikelo wokuzithandela wesandla sakho, oya kuwunikela kuYehova uThixo wakho, njengoko uYehova uThixo wakho akusikeleleyo;"
Deuteronomy16:11 ube nemihlali phambi koYehova uThixo wakho, wena, nonyana wakho, nentombi yakho, nesicaka sakho, nesicakakazi sakho, nomLevi osemasangweni akho, nomphambukeli, nenkedama, nomhlolokazi wakho ophakathi kwakho elizweni awayinyulayo uYehova uThixo wakho, ukuba alimise khona igama lakhe."
Deuteronomy16:12 Khumbula ukuba ube ulikhoboka eYiputa; uyigcine, uyenze le mithetho."
Deuteronomy16:13 Uze wenze umthendeleko weminquba iintsuku zibe sixhenxe, wakuba uyibutha ingqolowa yakho, nomququ wakho;"
Deuteronomy16:14 Yiba nemihlali emthendelekweni wakho, wena, nonyana wakho, nentombi yakho, nesicaka sakho, nesicakakazi sakho, nomLevi, nomphambukeli, nenkedama, nomhlolokazi osemasangweni akho."
Deuteronomy16:15 Kangangeentsuku ezisixhenxe uze wenze umthendeleko wokumzukisa uYehova uThixo wakho kuloo ndawo aya kuyinyula uYehova, kuba uYehova uThixo wakho uya kukusikelela kuyo yonke imveliso yakho nasemisebenzini yonke yezandla zakho. Yonwaba."
Deuteronomy16:16 Izihlandlo ezithathu ngomnyaka, yonke into eyindoda yakowenu yobonakala ebusweni bukaYehova uThixo wakho, kuloo ndawo aya kuyinyula; ngomthendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele, nangomthendeleko weeveki, nangomthendeleko weminquba; yaye abazange bavele phambi koYehova bengenanto."
Deuteronomy16:17 Wonke umntu makanikele kangangoko anako, ngokwentsikelelo akunikileyo uYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy16:18 Zimisele abagwebi nabagcini emasangweni akho onke akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho, ngokwezizukulwana zakho; yaye baya kugweba abantu ngomgwebo wobulungisa."
Deuteronomy16:19 Musa ukulonakalisa isiko; aniyi kuhoya mntu, ningamkeli sicengo; ngokuba isipho simfamekisa amehlo ezilumko, siphenula intetho yamalungisa."
Deuteronomy16:20 Landela bonke ubulungisa, ukuze uphile, ulidle ilifa ilizwe elo akunika lona uYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy16:21 Uze ungazigxumekeli aAshera, kufuphi nesibingelelo sikaYehova uThixo wakho, ozakhela sona."
Deuteronomy16:22 Uze ungazenzeli umfanekiso oqingqiweyo; into ayithiyileyo uYehova uThixo wakho.
Deuteronomy17:1 Uze ungabingeleli kuYehova uThixo wakho, nkomo, nagusha ineqhenqa, nokuba sisiphi na isifo; ngokuba lisikizi kuYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy17:2 Xa kuthe kwafunyanwa kuwe, kwelinye emasangweni akho, akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho, indoda nokuba yinkazana, eyenze okubi emehlweni kaYehova uThixo wakho, ngokwaphula umnqophiso wakhe;"
Deuteronomy17:3 Waya wakhonza thixo bambi, waqubuda kubo, ilanga, nenyanga, nesazulu, endingawisanga mthetho ngaso;"
Deuteronomy17:4 Kwathi, ekuxeleni kwakho, weva, wabuza, wabona, kuyinyaniso, inyaniso, ukuba enziwe la masikizi kwaSirayeli."
Deuteronomy17:5 Ke ngoko, yikhuphela loo ndoda, nokuba yilaa nkazana, iyenzileyo ububi ngaphandle kwamasango akho, loo ndoda, nokuba yiloo nkazana, uyixulube ngamatye, ife;"
Deuteronomy17:6 Lowo ufanelwe kukubulawa wobulawa ngomlomo wamangqina amabini, nokuba ngamathathu; kodwa ngamlomo walinye ingqina makangabulawa."
Deuteronomy17:7 Ziya kuba phezu kwakhe izandla zamangqina ngaphambi kokuba ambulale, kwandule ke kufike izandla zabantu bonke ubutshayele ke ububi, bungabikho phantsi kwakho;"
Deuteronomy17:8 Xa kuthe kwavela ityala kuni elikhulu enkundleni ngenxa yenu, phakathi kwegazi negazi, phakathi komthandazo nomthandazo, naphakathi kwesijeziso nesigwebo, ngokuba ngumcimbi lowo emasangweni enu; ninduluke ninyuke niye kuloo ndawo aya kuyinyula uYehova uThixo wenu;"
Deuteronomy17:9 Yiya kubabingeleli babaLevi, nakumgwebi oya kubakho ngaloo mihla, ubuze; kwaye baya kukuxelela umgwebo."
Deuteronomy17:10 Yenza ngokwesigwebo abo baya kukunika sona ngoxa ulapho kuloo ndawo aya kuyinyula uYehova; uze wenze ngenyameko ngako konke abaya kukuxelela kona.
Deuteronomy17:11 Yenza ngokomyalelo abaya kukuyala ngawo, nangokwesiko abaya kusithetha kuwe;"
Deuteronomy17:12 Nabani na ofuna ukuzibeka kwindawo yokuqala aze angamphulaphuli umbingeleli omi apho ukuze akhonze uYehova uThixo wakho okanye umgwebi wakho, loo mntu uya kufa; yaye bususe ububi kwaSirayeli."
Deuteronomy17:13 Bonke abantu baya kuva, boyike, bangabi saqhayisa."
Deuteronomy17:14 Xa uthe wafika kulo ilizwe akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho, ulihluthe, uhlale kulo, uthi, Ndiya kuzenza ukumkani, njengeentlanga zonke ezingeenxa zonke;"
Deuteronomy17:15 Zinyuleleni abe ngukumkani wenu, entweni yonke aya kuyinyula uYehova uThixo wenu; nimenze ukumkani kubazalwana benu; uze ungakhethi mntu wasemzini ongengomzalwana wakho."
Deuteronomy17:16 Kodwa makangawandisi amahashe, angabavumeli abantu ukuba babuyele eYiputa ukuze andise amahashe;"
Deuteronomy17:17 Makangazazeli bafazi, ize ityeke intliziyo yakhe; yaye akayi kuziqwebela isilivere negolide eninzi."
Deuteronomy17:18 Wothi, xenikweni athe wahlala etroneni yobukumkani bakhe, azibhalele impinda yombhalo yalo myalelo encwadini, esusela kubabingeleli abangabaLevi;"
Deuteronomy17:19 Yoba ngakuye, ayifunde yonke imihla yobomi bakhe, ukuze afunde ukumoyika uYehova uThixo wakhe nokuwagcina onke amazwi alo mthetho nale mithetho imiselweyo ukuba ayiphumeze;"
Deuteronomy17:20 ukuze ingaphakami intliziyo yakhe phezu kwabazalwana bakhe nokuze angatyeki emyalelweni, aye ekunene okanye aye ekhohlo, ukuze ayolule imihla yakhe ebukumkanini bakhe, yena noonyana bakhe, phakathi koSirayeli."
Deuteronomy18:1 Ababingeleli babaLevi, nesizwe sonke sakwaLevi, mabangabi nasabelo nalifa kunye namaSirayeli; bawadle amadini anyukayo kaYehova, nelifa lakhe."
Deuteronomy18:2 Ke ngoko, abayi kuba nalifa phakathi kwabazalwana babo; uYehova lilifa labo, njengoko wathethayo kubo."
Deuteronomy18:3 Lityala lababingeleli babantu abasondeza umbingelelo, nokuba ziinkomo, nokuba ziigusha; banika umbingeleli isandla, nezidlele ezibini, nesidlele."
Deuteronomy18:4 Umnike ulibo lwengqolowa yakho, newayini yakho entsha, neoli yakho, neentlahlela zompahla yakho emfutshane."
Deuteronomy18:5 Ngenxa yokuba uYehova uThixo wakho wamnyula kwizizukulwana zenu zonke ukuba eme akhonze egameni likaYehova, yena noonyana bakhe ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo."
Deuteronomy18:6 Xa kuthe kwaphuma umLevi kwelinye lamasango akho, kwaSirayeli ephela, abephambukele khona, weza ngokunqwena konke kwentliziyo yakhe, endaweni aya kuyinyula uYehova;"
Deuteronomy18:7 Ke ngoko makakhonze egameni likaYehova uThixo wakhe, njengabazalwana bakhe bonke, abaLevi, abemayo khona phambi koYehova."
Deuteronomy18:8 Baya kudla izabelo ezilinganayo, ngaphandle koko kuthengiswe kwilifa lakhe."
Deuteronomy18:9 Xa ufikile kwilizwe akunika lona uYehova uThixo wakho, uze ungafundisi ngokwezinto ezicekisekayo zezo ntlanga."
Deuteronomy18:10 Maze kungafunyanwa namnye kuni otshisa unyana wakhe, nokuba yintombi yakhe emlilweni, nosiyatha, nosiyazi, nosiyazi, nosiyazi;"
Deuteronomy18:11 nosiyazi, nosiyazi, nosiyazi, nosiyazi, nofileyo."
Deuteronomy18:12 Ngokuba bangamasikizi kuYehova bonke abenza ezo zinto; yaye ngenxa yezi zinto zicekisekayo uYehova uThixo wakho uya kuzigxotha phambi kwakho.
Deuteronomy18:13 Uze ugqibelele kuYehova uThixo wakho.
Deuteronomy18:14 Kuba ezi ntlanga uzidle ilifa zaphulaphula abakhafuli nabakhafuli; kodwa ke nina, uYehova uThixo wenu akakuvumelanga ukuba nenjenjalo."
Deuteronomy18:15 uYehova uThixo wakho uya kunivelisela umprofeti ophuma phakathi kwenu, kubazalwana benu, onjengam; Uze umphulaphule;"
Deuteronomy18:16 Njengako konke enakubuzayo ngomhla wendibano kaYehova uThixo wakho eHorebhe, ‘Andisayi kuphinda ndilive ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wam, yaye andiyi kuphinda ndiwubone lo mlilo mkhulu niya kuwenza."
Deuteronomy18:17 Wathi uYehova kum, Balitsho kanye ilizwi labo;"
Deuteronomy18:18 ndiya kubavelisela umprofeti ephuma phakathi kwabazalwana babo, onjengawe, ndiwabeke amazwi am emlonyeni wakhe; Wobaxelela konke endiya kubawisela umthetho ngako."
Deuteronomy18:19 Kuya kuthi ke, ukuba uthe akaliphulaphula ilizwi lam, eliya kulithetha egameni lam, mna ndiwafune kuye."
Deuteronomy18:20 Kodwa umprofeti yena othe wakhukhumala, wathetha ilizwi egameni lam, endingamwiselanga mthetho ukuba alithethe, nothe wathetha egameni lathixo bambi: loo mprofeti uya kufa naye."
Deuteronomy18:21 Xa ke uthe entliziyweni yakho, Sothini na ukulazi ilizwi angalithethanga uYehova?"
Deuteronomy18:22 Umprofeti uthe wathetha egameni likaYehova, alabakho loo nto, ayenzeka, lilizwi angalithethanga uYehova, kodwa umprofeti wathetha ngekratshi; musani ukumoyika."
Deuteronomy19:1 Xa athe uYehova uThixo wenu wazitshabalalisa iintlanga, aninikayo uYehova uThixo wenu ezweni lazo, nizilandela, nihlale emizini yazo, nasezindlwini zazo;"
Deuteronomy19:2 Zikhethele izixeko ezithathu ezweni lakho, akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho ukuba ulidle ilifa."
Deuteronomy19:3 Zilungisele indlela, ulabe ilizwe lakho, aya kukunika ilifa uYehova uThixo wakho, ulabe libe zahlulo zithathu, basabele khona bonke abagxothwayo."
Deuteronomy19:4 Nantsi into yesibulala-mntu, esithe sasabela ukuhlala khona, ukuba abulale uwabo engazi, ebengamthiyile ngaphambili;"
Deuteronomy19:5 Njengoko indoda isiya ehlathini nentsapho yayo ukuya kugawula iinkuni, isandla sakhe sigawula izembe ngezembe lokugawula umthi, yaye intloko yaphuncuka emphinini, ibetha usapho lwakhe, wafa; uya kusabela komnye waloo mizi, aphile;"
Deuteronomy19:6 ukuba umphindezeli wegazi angamsukeli umbulali lowo, isavutha intliziyo yakhe, imfikele; ngokuba nde kwendlela; ukanti ebengamfanelanga ukufa, kuba ebengamthiyanga ngaphambili."
Deuteronomy19:7 Ngoko ke ndikuyalela, ndithi: Zikhetheleni izixeko ezithathu."
Deuteronomy19:8 Ukuba uthe uYehova uThixo wakho uthe wakhulisa ilizwe lakho, njengoko wafungayo kooyihlo ngesifungo, walinika lonke ilizwe elo, awalithethayo ooyihlo, ukuba wokunika;"
Deuteronomy19:9 Ukuba uthe wawugcina ukuba ukwenze konke endikuwiselayo namhla, ukuba umthande uYehova uThixo wakho, uhambe ngeendlela zakhe ngamaxesha onke; uze wakhe ezinye izixeko ezithathu ngaphandle kwezi zithathu;"
Deuteronomy19:10 ukuze kungaphalazwa gazi limsulwa ezweni lakho akunika lona uYehova uThixo wakho njengelifa, lize ke igazi libe phezu kwakho."
Deuteronomy19:11 Xa athe umntu wamthiya ummelwane wakhe, wamlalela, wamvunukela, wambetha wafa, wasabela komnye wale mizi;"
Deuteronomy19:12 othumela ke amadoda amakhulu omzi wakowabo, ukuba ayithabathe khona, amnikele esandleni somphindezeli wegazi, ukuze afe."
Deuteronomy19:13 Ze lingabi nanceba iliso lakho kuye; ke ulisuse ityala legazi elingenatyala kwaSirayeli, ukuze kulunge kuwe."
Deuteronomy19:14 Uze ungawushenxisi umda wendlu yakho, abawubekileyo elifeni lakho, kwakudala, oya kulidla ezweni elo akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho ukuba ulime."
Deuteronomy19:15 Ze kungesuki kume ngqina linye ngomntu ngenxa yobugwenxa, nokuba bubuphi na, nangenxa yesono nokuba sisiphi one ngaso; Loo nto iqiniselwe ngomlomo wamangqina amabini, nokuba kungomlomo wamangqina amathathu."
Deuteronomy19:16 Xa lisuke lasuka ingqina elixokayo lingqine omnye umntu, ukuba unetyala;"
Deuteronomy19:17 Ke loo madoda mabini abambeneyo oma phambi koYehova, phambi kwababingeleli nabagwebi abaya kubakho ngaloo mihla babe khona;"
