Deuteronomy19:18 Kwaye abagwebi bafanele baphande ngenkuthalo; Ke ukuba lingqina lobuxoki, lingqine ubuxoki ngomzalwana walo;"
Deuteronomy19:19 Yenzani ngoko kuye, njengoko ebeya kwenza ngako kumzalwana wakhe; ubutshayele ke ububi, bungabikho phakathi kwakho."
Deuteronomy19:20 Bova ke abo baseleyo, boyike, bangaphindi benze ububi phakathi kwakho."
Deuteronomy19:21 Aliyi kuba nanceba iliso lakho; ke umphefumlo uhlawule ngomphefumlo, iliso ngeliso, izinyo ngezinyo, isandla ngesandla, unyawo ngonyawo."
Deuteronomy20:1 Xa uthe wazingenela iintshaba zakho, ngamahashe, neenqwelo zokulwa, nabantu abaninzi kunokuba ubabona, uze ungaboyiki; ngokuba unawe uYehova uThixo wakho, owakukhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa."
Deuteronomy20:2 Ekusondeleni kwenu ekulweni, wosondela umbingeleli, athethe ebantwini, athi,"
Deuteronomy20:3 Ndiya kuthi kubo, Yiva, Sirayeli, namhla usondela ukuba ulwe neentshaba zakho; mayingabi mbi intliziyo yenu, musani ukoyika, musani ukungcangcazela, musani ukuqhiphuka umbilini zizo;"
Deuteronomy20:4 Ngenxa yokuba uYehova uThixo wenu nguye ohamba nani ukuya kulwa neentshaba zenu ukuze anisindise.
Deuteronomy20:5 Abakhonzi bothetha ebantwini, bathi, Nguwuphi na umntu owakhe indlu entsha, akayisungula? Makahambe abuyele endlwini yakhe, hleze afele emfazweni, itshatyalaliswe ngomnye umntu."
Deuteronomy20:6 Ngubani na lo mntu watyala isidiliya, akadla? makahambe abuyele endlwini yakhe, hleze afele emfazweni, idliwe ngomnye;"
Deuteronomy20:7 Ngubani na indoda eganelwe umfazi, aze amzeke? makabuyele endlwini yakhe, hleze afele emfazweni, abanjwe ngomnye;"
Deuteronomy20:8 Izicaka ziya kuqhubeka zithetha ebantwini, zithi: “Nguwuphi na umntu owoyikayo nodakumbileyo? makabuyele endlwini yakhe, hleze ithi thaa intliziyo yabazalwana bakhe, njengoko yenjenjalo intliziyo yakhe."
Deuteronomy20:9 Emva kokuba abathetheli begqibile ukuthetha nabantu, uze umisele abathetheli-mkhosi ukuba bakhokele abantu."
Deuteronomy20:10 Xa uthe wasondela emzini, usiya kulwa naso, xela uxolo;"
Deuteronomy20:11 Ukuba uthe wawuphendula unoxolo, wavula, zonke iintlanga ezifunyenwe kuwo ziya kuba ngabahlawuli bakho, zikukhonze."
Deuteronomy20:12 Ukuba ke akafuni kuxolelana nawe, wesuka walwa nawe, wuthintele;"
Deuteronomy20:13 Ukuba uYehova uThixo wakho uthe wawunikela esandleni sakho, woyibulala yonke into eyindoda kuyo ngohlangothi lwekrele."
Deuteronomy20:14 Ke nina nazithimbela abafazi, nabantwana, neenkomo, neento zonke ezibe ziphakathi komzi, amaxhoba awo onke; udle amaxhoba eentshaba zakho, akunikileyo uYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy20:15 Niya kwenjenjalo ezixekweni zonke ezikude kakhulu kuni, kungekhona phakathi kwezixeko zezi ntlanga."
Deuteronomy20:16 Kodwa phakathi kwezixeko zolu hlanga aya kukunika lona uYehova uThixo wakho njengelifa, uze unganiki bomi kuyo nantoni na ephefumlayo."
Deuteronomy20:17 Babethe ke ngesiqalekiso; namaHeti, nama-Amori, namaKanan, namaPerizi, namaHeti, namaYebhusi; njengoko wakuwiselayo umthetho uYehova uThixo wakho;"
Deuteronomy20:18 ukuze banganifundisi ukwenza amasikizi abo onke, abawenze koothixo babo; none kuYehova uThixo wenu."
Deuteronomy20:19 Xa nithe nawungqinga umzi imihla emininzi, nisilwa ukuba niwuthimbe, ize ningonakalisi imithi yaso ngokuyigalela ngezembe; ngokuba ungadla kuzo, ungazigawuli umthi welizwe bubomi bomntu) ukuzisebenzisa ukubhloka."
Deuteronomy20:20 Kuphela yimithi oyaziyo ukuba ayisiyomithi engadliwayo; woyitshabalalisa, uyigawule; Yakhani iindonga ezilwa nani, nide niwe."
Deuteronomy21:1 Xa kuthe kwafunyanwa ubani ezweni elo, akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho, wofunyanwa ezweni elo; akwaziwa ukuba ubulewe ngubani na;"
Deuteronomy21:2 Ophuma ke amadoda amakhulu akowenu nabagwebi benu, balinganise imizi ewayiliweyo ngeenxa zonke;"
Deuteronomy21:3 Umzi okufuphi nababuleweyo, amadoda amakhulu aloo mzi, athabathe ithokazi lenkomo, elingabotshwanga, elingabotshwanga;"
Deuteronomy21:4 Athi amadoda amakhulu aloo mzi ayizisa imazi yenkomo emlanjeni, ingazalelwanga, ingatyalwanga, ayinqamla intamo leyo emlanjeni."
Deuteronomy21:5 Basondela ababingeleli, oonyana bakaLevi; ngokuba benyule uYehova uThixo wenu, ukuba bamkhonze, badumise igama likaYehova; kwaye ngelizwi labo lonke idabi nalo lonke uhlaselo luya kuzanywa."
Deuteronomy21:6 Ahlamba ke onke amadoda amakhulu aloo mzi, akufuphi kwababuleweyo, izandla zawo phezu kwemazi yenkomo emlanjeni;"
Deuteronomy21:7 Aphendule athi, Izandla zethu aziliphalazanga eli gazi, namehlo ethu akabonanga;"
Deuteronomy21:8 Yehova, yiba nemfesane kubantu bakho amaSirayeli owawakhululayo; musa ukuphalaza igazi elimsulwa ngokomthetho wabantu bakho amaSirayeli. Negazi liya kubaxolela."
Deuteronomy21:9 Wolisusa ke ityala legazi elimsulwa phantsi kwakho ukuba wenze okulungileyo emehlweni kaYehova.
Deuteronomy21:10 Xa uthe wazingenela iintshaba zakho, wabanikela uYehova uThixo wakho esandleni sakho, wathimba;"
Deuteronomy21:11 Wabona inkazana eyinzwakazi phakathi kwabathinjwa, wayinqwenela, wayinqwenela ukuba ibe ngumkakho;"
Deuteronomy21:12 Ngoko mngenise endlwini yakho; achebe intloko yakhe, achebe iinzipho;"
Deuteronomy21:13 Makakhulule ingubo yakhe yokuthinjwa, ahlale endlwini yakho, enze isijwili uyise nonina inyanga iphela; emveni koko wongena kuye, ube yindoda yakhe, yena abe ngumkakho."
Deuteronomy21:14 Ukuba akukukholisanga, myeke aye apho athanda khona; uze ungamthengisi ngemali, ungenzi nto naye, ngokuba umphoxile."
Deuteronomy21:15 Xa ithe indoda inabafazi ababini, omnye ethandwa, omnye ethiyiwe, bayizalela abantwana, lowo uthandwayo nalowo uthiyiweyo; ukuba unyana wamazibulo uthiyiwe;"
Deuteronomy21:16 Ke kaloku xa ebavumele ukuba badle ilifa oko anako oonyana bakhe, makangammiseli owamazibulo lowo uthandwayo phambi konyana walowo uthiyiweyo, owamazibulo ngokwenene;"
Deuteronomy21:17 unyana lo wothiyiweyo makamamkele owamazibulo, amnike izahlulo ezibini zento yonke anayo; ngokuba yingqalo yamandla akhe; ubuzibulo bobakhe."
Deuteronomy21:18 Xa indoda ithe yanonyana oyinjubaqa, oneenkani, ongaliphulaphuliyo ilizwi likayise, nelizwi likanina, wamohlwaya, akaphulaphula;"
Deuteronomy21:19 Uyise nonina bamthabatha, bamsa kumadoda amakhulu omzi wakowabo, nasesangweni lendawo yakhe yokuhlala;"
Deuteronomy21:20 Uze uthethe kumadoda amakhulu edolophana yakowabo, uthi, Lo nyana wethu uneenkani, uneenkani, akaliphulaphulanga ilizwi lethu; ulidlakudla nenxila."
Deuteronomy21:21 Onke amadoda omzi wakowabo amgibisela ngamatye, wafa; ubususe ububi phantsi kwakho; yaye wonke uSirayeli uya kuva aze oyike."
Deuteronomy21:22 Ukuba ubani wenze isono esilingene ukufa, wobulawa afe, umxhonywe emthini;"
Deuteronomy21:23 isidumbu sakhe singahlali phezu komthi ubusuku bonke, uze ungcwatywe kwangaloo mini; ngokuba oxhonyiweyo uqalekisiwe nguThixo; ukuze ilizwe lakho akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho libe lilifa, lingabi yinqambi."
Deuteronomy22:1 uze ungathi, uyibona impahla yomzalwana wakho, nempahla yakhe emfutshane, ebhadula; zibuyisele kudade wenu."
Deuteronomy22:2 Ukuba umzalwana wakho akakho ngakuwe, nokuba akumazi, uze uyizise endlwini yakho, ibe kuwe, ade ayifune umzalwana wakho, uyibuyisele kuye."
Deuteronomy22:3 Uze wenjenjalo nakwiesile layo; enjenjalo nezambatho zakhe; nazo zonke izinto ezilahlekileyo zomzalwana wakho, aphulukene nazo, uze uzifumane, yenza kwaezo zinto; usenokungazifihli."
Deuteronomy22:4 Uze ungathi, ulibona iesile lomzalwana wakho, nokuba yinkomo yakhe, iwile endleleni, uzisithelise kuyo; kufuneka umncede azichole kwakhona."
Deuteronomy22:5 Umfazi makanganxibi iimpahla zendoda, nendoda ize inganxibi ingubo yenkazana; ngokuba bangamasikizi kuYehova uThixo wakho bonke abenza loo nto."
Deuteronomy22:6 Xa kukho intaka endleleni yakho, nokuba kuwuphi na umthi, nokuba kusemhlabeni, nokuba kumathole, nokuba ngamaqanda, yaza ke izalela unina, nokuba ngamaqanda, musa ukuthabatha nonina, nokuba lincinane."
Deuteronomy22:7 Noko ke, mndulule unina, athabathe abancinane, ahambe nawe; ukuze kulunge kuwe, ukuze uyolule imihla yakho."
Deuteronomy22:8 Xa uthe wakha indlu entsha, lwenzela udonga uphahla lwakho, ukuze ungazisi magazi endlwini yakho, xa athe wawa owayo phezu kwayo."
Deuteronomy22:9 Uze ungahlwayeli ntlobo ntlobo zembewu esidiliyeni sakho, hleze inzala oyihlwayeleyo, nesiqhamo sesidiliya sakho singangcoliswa."
Deuteronomy22:10 Uze ungalimi ngenkunzi yenkomo ne-esile.
Deuteronomy22:11 Musa ukunxiba iimpahla ezizintlobo ngeentlobo, ezinjengoboya nelinen kunye."
Deuteronomy22:12 Zenzele imiqukumbelo ezizibeni zone zesambatho sakho ozigubungela ngaso.
Deuteronomy22:13 Indoda esukuba izeka inkazana, yamngena, yamthiya;"
Deuteronomy22:14 Wayithetha kakubi ngayo, wayizisa ngegama elibi, usithi, Ndimthabathile lo mfazi, ndakufika kuyo, andiwufumananga umkhonzazana wayo."
Deuteronomy22:15 Uyise wentombi nonina bathabatha iimpawu zobuntombi bentombi leyo, bazise kumadoda amakhulu omzi ngasesangweni."
Deuteronomy22:16 Wothi uyise wentombi kumadoda amakhulu, Intombi yam ndiyinikelo mfo ukuba ibe ngumkayo, wayithiya;"
Deuteronomy22:17 Wammangalela, esithi, Andimfumananga umkhonzazana wentombi yakho; kodwa, ezi iimpawu zobuntombi bentombi yam yandlala ingubo leyo phambi kwamadoda amakhulu omzi."
Deuteronomy22:18 Oyithabatha amadoda amakhulu aloo mzi, ayibethe;"
Deuteronomy22:19 Bafanele bamnike ikhulu leeshekele zesilivere, balinike uyise wentombi, ngokuba wayiphathe kakubi intombi yakwaSirayeli; abe ngumfazi wayo; akayi kumshiya yonke imihla yakhe."
Deuteronomy22:20 Ukuba ke eli lizwi liyinyaniso, azafunyanwa iimpawu zobuntombi entombini;"
Deuteronomy22:21 Bayithabatha intombazana leyo emnyango wendlu kayise, bayigibisela ngamatye amadoda omzi wakowayo, yafa, ngokuba yenze ubudenge kwaSirayeli, ngokukrexeza endlwini kayise; yisuseni ke ububi phakathi kwenu."
Deuteronomy22:22 Xa indoda ithe yafunyanwa imlala umkamntu, bobulawa bobabini, loo ndoda ilele naloo nkazana, kwanaloo mfazi; ubususe ke ububi kwaSirayeli."
Deuteronomy22:23 Xa ithe intombi eyintombi yayiganelwe indoda, yaza indoda leyo yayifumana phakathi komzi, yalala nayo;"
Deuteronomy22:24 Bakhupheni ngoko bobabini ngaphandle kwesango laloo mzi, nibaxulube ngamatye, bafe; intombazana leyo, ngokuba ingabizanga isesixekweni; nendoda, ngokuba imonile umkayo; ngoko ke, bususeni ububi phakathi kwenu."
Deuteronomy22:25 Ukuba indoda ithe yafumana ephandleni intombi eganiweyo, yaza loo ndoda yayilala nayo, wofa loo mfo uyileleyo."
Deuteronomy22:26 Ke musani ukuyenza nto intombi; entombini akukho sono silingenwe kukufa, njengoko kunjalo naxa indoda ithi imvunukele ummelwane wayo, imbulale afe."
Deuteronomy22:27 Ngokuba wamfumana endle, yakhala intombi eganiweyo, akwabakho uyisindisayo."
Deuteronomy22:28 Xa athe ubani wafumana intombi eyintombi engaganiweyo, wayibamba, walala nayo, bofunyanwa;"
Deuteronomy22:29 loo mfo uyileleyo womnika uyise wentombi amashumi omahlanu eeshekele zesilivere, ibe ngumkakhe; ngokuba emhlazisile, akayi kumshiya yonke imihla yakhe."
Deuteronomy22:30 Indoda mayingamzeki umkayise, ingawuhluli ingubo kayise."
Deuteronomy23:1 Umntu oxulutywe ngamatye, okanye onqunyulwe ilungu lomzimba, makangangeni ebandleni likaYehova."
Deuteronomy23:2 Makungabikho mntwana ukrexezayo ungena ebandleni likaYehova; makangangeni ebandleni likaYehova, kude kuse kwisizukulwana seshumi."
Deuteronomy23:3 Makungabikho mAmon nomMowabhi ungenayo ebandleni likaYehova; kude kuse kwisizukulwana sabo seshumi abayi kungena ebandleni likaYehova ngonaphakade;
Deuteronomy23:4 ngenxa yokuba benganikhawulelanga ngesonka namanzi endleleni ekuphumeni kwenu eYiputa; nangenxa yokuba baqesha uBhileham unyana kaBhehore, wasePetore, kwaMesopotamiya, ukuba aqalekise."
Deuteronomy23:5 Akavuma ke uYehova uThixo wakho ukumphulaphula uBhileham; kodwa uYehova uThixo wakho wakuguqulela isiqalekiso saba yintsikelelo, ngenxa yokuba wayekuthanda uYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy23:6 Uxolo nokulungelwa kwabo akuyi kulufuna naphakade, yonke imihla yakho."
Deuteronomy23:7 Musani ukumcekisa umEdom; ngokuba engumzalwana wakho; uze ungamthiyi umYiputa; ngokuba ubungumphambukeli ezweni lakowabo.
Deuteronomy23:8 Oonyana babo besizukulwana sesithathu baya kungena ebandleni likaYehova.
Deuteronomy23:9 Xa umkhosi uhlasela iintshaba zakho, zikhusele kuko konke okubi."
Deuteronomy23:10 Ukuba kuthe kwakho nabani na phakathi kwenu ongahlambulukanga ngenxa yokungcola, noziphawulayo ebusuku, wophuma emke enkampini, angangeni."
Deuteronomy23:11 Kuthi xa kuhlwayo, azihlambe ngamanzi; latshona ilanga, wabuyela eminqubeni."
Deuteronomy23:12 Woba nendawo engaphandle kweminquba, apho uya kufuduka khona;"
Deuteronomy23:13 Zilumkele izixhobo zakho; ukuba uthe waphambukela kubo, wemba, ubuye, ukugqume oko kuvela kuwe;"
Deuteronomy23:14 ngokuba uYehova uThixo wakho uhambahamba phakathi kweminquba yakho, ukuba akusindise, azihlangule iintshaba zakho kuwe; ke ngoko, umandlalo wakho woba ngcwele, ukuze bangaboni nto ingcolileyo kuwe, baphambuke."
Deuteronomy23:15 Musa ukumhlangula umkhonzi osaba enkosini yakhe, eze kuwe;"
Deuteronomy23:16 Sohlala nawe phakathi kwenu, kuloo ndawo sithe sayinyula kwelinye isango emasangweni akho, apho sithande khona kakhulu; musani ukumxina."
Deuteronomy23:17 Makungabikho ng’awukazi phakathi kweentombi zakwaSirayeli;
Deuteronomy23:18 Uze ungawuzisi umvuzo wehenyukazi nomvuzo wenja endlwini kaYehova uThixo wakho, ngenxa yaso nasiphi na isibambiso; kuba kwanazo zombini ziyinto ecekisekayo kuYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy23:19 Musa ukumboleka umzalwana wakho nzala; obolekisa ngemali, obolekisayo ngokudla, nabani na obolekayo unenzala;"
Deuteronomy23:20 Uyakwazi ukumboleka omnye umntu ngenzala; uze ungamboleki kakhulu umzalwana wakho, ukuze akusikelele uYehova uThixo wakho ezintweni zonke osa isandla sakho kuzo, kulo ilizwe oya kulo ukuba ulihluthe."
Deuteronomy23:21 Xa uthe wabhambathisa isibhambathiso kuYehova uThixo wakho, musa ukulibala ukusizalisekisa; ngokuba uYehova uThixo wakho uya kubuza kuwe; Oko kuya kuba sisono kuni."
Deuteronomy23:22 Ke ukuba uthe akwafunga, akuyi kuba sono oko kuwe."
Deuteronomy23:23 Okuphuma emlonyeni wakho, kugcine, ukwenze; ewe, ube lidini lokuqhutywa yintliziyo, njengoko wamfungelayo uYehova uThixo wakho, owenze ngomlomo wakho."
Deuteronomy23:24 Xa uthe wafikelela esidiliyeni sommelwane wakho, wodla iidiliya ezininzi ngokuthanda kwakho; kodwa ungafaki nto emgqomeni wakho."
Deuteronomy23:25 Xa uthe wangena entsimini yommelwane wakho engekavunwa, waluvuna ukhula ngesandla sakho; kodwa musa ukuphosa rhengqa kwingqolowa yommelwane wakho."
Deuteronomy24:1 Xa ithe indoda yazeka inkazana, yamzeka, akwabakho mfazi ukuba angabi nanceba emehlweni ayo, ngokuba ufumene ukungcola kuyo; wambhalela incwadi yokwahlukana, wamnika, wamndulula endlwini yakhe."
Deuteronomy24:2 Ukuba ithe yaphuma endlwini yayo, yoya yaba ngowandoda yimbi;"
Deuteronomy24:3 Ukuba indoda yokugqibela iyamthiya ize imbhalele incwadi yoqhawulo-mtshato ize iyibeke esandleni sakhe ize imgxothe endlwini yakhe; nasekufeni kwendoda yesibini, eyamzekayo ukuba abe ngumkayo;"
Deuteronomy24:4 Indoda yakhe yokuqala eyamqhawulayo ayiyi kumthabatha abe ngumfazi wayo emva kokuba enziwe inqambi; ngokuba lisikizi phambi koYehova; yaye ungalibeki ityala ilizwe elo akunika lona uYehova uThixo wakho ukuba ulidle ilifa.
Deuteronomy24:5 Xa indoda ithe yazeka umfazi omtsha, mayingayi emfazweni, ize ingazithwali ngumthwalo nawuphi na umsebenzi; Woba mnye umnyaka ekhululekile endlwini yakhe, avuye umfazi wakhe amthabathileyo."
Deuteronomy24:6 Makungabikho ubambisa umntu ngesibambiso ngaphantsi okanye umphezulu, kuba oko kukubambisa ngomphefumlo womntu."
Deuteronomy24:7 Xa ithe indoda yafunyanwa isiba omnye ebazalwaneni bayo, phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, mkhonze njengekhoboka, mhlawumbi ithengise ngaye; liya kufa ke elo sela; yaye bususe ububi phantsi kwakho."
Deuteronomy24:8 Zilumkele iqhenqa, unikele ingqalelo uze wenze kanye njengoko baya kunifundisa ababingeleli babaLevi; yenzani njengoko ndabawisela umthetho ngako."
Deuteronomy24:9 Khumbula oko uYehova uThixo wakho wakwenzayo kuMiriyam endleleni ekuphumeni kwenu eYiputa.
Deuteronomy24:10 Xa uthe wamboleka umzalwana wakho, uze ungangeni endlwini yakhe, uye kuthabatha ibambiso kuye."
Deuteronomy24:11 Wena yima ngaphandle, ithi loo ndoda uyibolekayo ikukhuphele isibambiso ngaphandle kwelizwe."
Deuteronomy24:12 Ukuba ithe indoda yaba sisisweli, musa ukuya kulala unesibambiso sayo."
Deuteronomy24:13 Lakutshona ilanga, buyisela kuye isibambiso eso, alale ngengubo yakhe, akusikelele; kube bubulungisa bakho phambi koYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy24:14 Musa ukumcudisa olihlwempu, nolihlwempu elingumsebenzi wasemini, nokuba ngowabazalwana bakho, nokuba ngowabaphambukeli abasezweni lakho, emasangweni akho."
Deuteronomy24:15 Mnike umvuzo wakhe ngemini yakhe, lingatshoni ilanga kuyo; ngokuba elusizana, emise intliziyo yakhe kulo;"
Deuteronomy24:16 Aba oyise mabangabulawa ngenxa yabantwana, nabantwana mabangabulawa ngenxa yooyise; elowo uya kubulawa ngenxa yesono sakhe."
Deuteronomy24:17 Musa ukuligqwetha ilungelo lomphambukeli nelenkedama; nempahla yomhlolokazi ingazithabatheli idini;
Deuteronomy24:18 Kodwa khumbula ukuba wawulikhoboka eYiputa, waza uYehova uThixo wakho wakukhulula khona; ke ngoko, ndikuyalela ukuba wenze le nto."
Deuteronomy24:19 Xa uthe wagawula isivuno sakho emhlabeni wakho, walibala kakhulu emhlabeni, akuyi kuwuthabatha; zibe zezomngeneleli, nenkedama, neyomhlolokazi, ukuze uYehova uThixo wakho akusikelele emsebenzini wonke wezandla zakho."
Deuteronomy24:20 Xa uthe wawuncothula umnquma wakho, uze ungabuyi ugalele amasebe;"
Deuteronomy24:21 Xa uthe wavuna isidiliya esidiliyeni sakho, uze ungasivuni kamva;"
Deuteronomy24:22 Khumbula ukuba ube ulikhoboka ezweni laseYiputa; ke ngoko, ndikuyalela ukuba wenze le nto."
Deuteronomy25:1 Xa kuthe kwabambana abantu, besa ematyaleni, bogwetyelwa ngabagwebi; apho baya kuligwebela ilungisa, bagwebe abangendawo."
Deuteronomy25:2 Ukuba ongendawo uthe wafanelwa kukubethwa, umgwebi amlalise phantsi, ambethe phambi kobuso bakhe, ngokwetyala lakhe, ngokwesilinganiso."
Deuteronomy25:3 Angayibetha imivumbo emashumi mane, ingabi ngaphezu koko; ukuze ukuba uthe akagqithanga kuye, wambetha imivumbo emininzi kunale, akuphathe kakubi umzalwana wakho."
Deuteronomy25:4 Ungayifaki isicheme inkunzi entsha, xa ibhula ingqolowa."
Deuteronomy25:5 Xa bathe bahlala ndawonye abantu bezalana, wafa omnye engenabantwana, umfazi womfi makangendeli kwindoda yasemzini; umzalwana wendoda yakhe makangene naye, amthabathe abe ngumkakhe, afeze uxanduva lwakhe womzalwana wakhe ngenxa yakhe."
Deuteronomy25:6 Yaye owamazibulo aya kumzala uya kuphumelela egameni lomntakwabo ofileyo, ukuze igama lakhe linganqunyulwa kwaSirayeli."
Deuteronomy25:7 Ukuba indoda ithe ayakunanza ukumzeka umfazi womntakayise, makanyuke umkamfi lowo, aye esangweni kumadoda amakhulu, athi, Umzalwana wam, indoda yam iyala ukuliphakamisa igama lomzalwana wayo kwaSirayeli, ayiyi kuwumisa loo myalelo umsebenzi womninawa womyeni wam."
Deuteronomy25:8 Ambiza ke amadoda amakhulu omzi wakowabo, athetha naye; Wema phambi kwayo, wathi, Andithandi ukumthabatha;"
Deuteronomy25:9 Wofika umfazi womntakwayo kuyo phambi kwamadoda amakhulu, ayikhulule imbadada ezinyaweni zayo, ayitshicele ebusweni, amphendule, athi, Kwenjiwa nje loo ndoda kwindlu yomzalwana wayo."
Deuteronomy25:10 Kothiwa ke igama layo kwaSirayeli nguNdlw’-ihlangulwa-zihlangu.
Deuteronomy25:11 Xa amadoda asukuzanayo, wasondela umfazi wenye ukuze asindise indoda yakhe esandleni salowo uyibethayo, yaye yena wolula isandla sakhe wayibamba ngasese;"
Deuteronomy25:12 Sinqumle kaloku isandla sakhe, malingabi nanceba kuye iliso lakho."
Deuteronomy25:13 Usenokungabi nobukhulu obahlukeneyo engxoweni yakho, enkulu nencinane."
Deuteronomy25:14 Musa ukuba nemilinganiselo eyahlukeneyo endlwini yakho, enkulu nencinane."
Deuteronomy25:15 Ke yiba nelitye elizalisekileyo, elilelobulungisa, nelitye elizalisekileyo, elilelobulungisa, ukuze izaliseke imihla yakho emhlabeni lowo, akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy25:16 Kuba bangamasikizi kuYehova uThixo wakho bonke abenza ezo zinto, nabo bonke abangemalungisa."
Deuteronomy25:17 Khumbula awakwenzayo kuwe ama-Amaleki endleleni, ekuphumeni kwenu eYiputa;"
Deuteronomy25:18 owakuhlangabezayo ngendlela, wakubetha emhlana wakho, zonke ezityhafileyo emva kwakho, udiniweyo, udiniwe; akamoyika uThixo."
Deuteronomy25:19 Kothi, ekukuphumzeni kukaYehova uThixo wakho ezintshabeni zakho zonke ezingeenxa zonke kuwe, ezweni elo akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho ukuba ulime, usicime isikhumbuzo sika-Amaleki phantsi kwezulu soze uyilibale."
Deuteronomy26:1 Xa uthe wangena ezweni akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho ukuba ulihluthe, walihlutha, wohlala kulo;"
Deuteronomy26:2 uthabathe ulibo kwintlahlela yonke yomhlaba, owukhuphayo ezweni lakho akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho, ukuphose engobozini, uye kuloo ndawo aya kuyinyula uYehova uThixo wakho beka igama lakhe apho;"
Deuteronomy26:3 uye kumbingeleli othe wakho ngelo xesha, uthi kuye, Namhlanje ndiyaxela kuYehova uThixo wakho, ukuba ndifikile ezweni, awafungayo uYehova koobawo ngesifungo, ukuba wosinika lona nika."
Deuteronomy26:4 Umbingeleli makayithabathe ingobozi esandleni sakho, ayibeke phambi kwesibingelelo sikaYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy26:5 Thetha, uthi phambi koYehova uThixo wakho, Ubawo ebengumAram eselunxwemeni lotshaba; wehla waya eYiputa, wahlala khona engumphambukeli, enabambalwa; yaba ligorha apho enkulu, inabemi abaninzi uluntu."
Deuteronomy26:6 AmaYiputa asinqula ngomsindo, asicinezela, asenza amakhoboka anzima."
Deuteronomy26:7 Xa sasibiza kuYehova, uThixo woobawo, uYehova waweva amazwi ethu waza wakubona ukubandezeleka kwethu nomsebenzi wethu nokubandezeleka kwethu."
Deuteronomy26:8 uYehova wasikhupha eYiputa ngesandla esomeleleyo, nangesandla esoluliweyo, nangoloyiko olukhulu, nangemiqondiso, nangezimanga;"
Deuteronomy26:9 Wasisa kule ndawo, wasinika eli lizwe, ilizwe elibaleka amasi nobusi."
Deuteronomy26:10 Khawubone, ndizise ulibo lweziqhamo zomhlaba lowo undinikileyo, Yehova. Yibeke phantsi phambi koYehova uThixo wakho, uqubude phambi koYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy26:11 Uyonwabele zonke izinto ezilungileyo akunikileyo uYehova uThixo wakho, wena nendlu yakho, wena, nomLevi, nomphambukeli ophakathi kwenu."
Deuteronomy26:12 Ukuba uthe wasinikela emvuzweni wakho wonke, ngomnyaka wesithathu ongumnyaka wesishumi, wazinika umLevi, nomphambukeli, nenkedama, nomhlolokazi, ukuba bawudle emasangweni akho adliwe emizini yenu igcwaliswe;"
Deuteronomy26:13 uthethe phambi koYehova uThixo wakho, uthi, Ndizikhuphile ezingcwele endlwini yam, ndiyinike umLevi, nomphambukeli, nenkedama, nomhlolokazi, ngokwemithetho yakho yonke, oyithethileyo wandinika bona andigqithanga kwimithetho yakho, andiyilibali;"
Deuteronomy26:14 Andidlanga nto kuso ekuzileni kwam, andithabathanga nto kuso ngenxa yobunqambi, andinikanga nto yayo kwabangasekhoyo; Ndaliphulaphula ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wam, ndenza njengoko wandiwisela umthetho ngako."
Deuteronomy26:15 Vela uvela esakhiweni sakho esingcwele emazulwini, ubasikelele abantu bakho, amaSirayeli, nomhlaba lo usinikileyo, njengoko wafungayo koobawo ngesifungo, ilizwe elibaleka amasi nobusi."
Deuteronomy26:16 Namhlanje uYehova uThixo wakho ukuwisele umthetho, ukuba uyenze le mithetho nezigwebo; kugcine, ukwenze ngentliziyo yakho yonke, nangomphefumlo wakho wonke."
Deuteronomy26:17 Nimazile namhlanje uYehova ukuba unguThixo wenu nokuba nihambe ngeendlela zakhe nokugcina imiyalelo yakhe imisiwe nemiyalelo yakhe nezigwebo zakhe nokuliphulaphula ilizwi lakhe.
Deuteronomy26:18 uYehova uninyule namhla, ukuba nibe ngabantu bakhe abakhethekileyo, njengoko wakuthethayo kuni, niyigcine yonke imithetho yakhe;"
Deuteronomy26:19 aniphakamise ngaphezu kweentlanga zonke azenzileyo, ngendumiso, negama, nembeko; nibe ngabantu abangcwele kuYehova uThixo wenu, njengoko wakuthethayo;"
Deuteronomy27:1 uMoses namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli babawisela abantu umthetho, esithi, Yigcineni yonke imithetho endiniwiselayo namhla."
Deuteronomy27:2 Ngemini eniyiwelayo iYordan ningena kwilizwe aninika lona uYehova uThixo wenu, zilungisele amatye amakhulu, niwaqabe ngodongwe,"
Deuteronomy27:3 uwabhale kuwo onke amazwi alo myalelo, wakuba ugqithile, ungene ezweni akunikayo uYehova uThixo wakho, ilizwe elibaleka amasi nobusi; njengoko uYehova uThixo wooyihlo wathethayo kuni."
Deuteronomy27:4 Nothi, nakuyiwela iYordan, nimise la matye ndiniwisela umthetho ngawo namhla, entabeni ye-Ebhali, niwafuke ngodongwe;"
Deuteronomy27:5 wakhele apho isibingelelo kuYehova uThixo wakho, isibingelelo samatye; uze ungaphakamiseli isixhobo sentsimbi phezu kwayo."
Deuteronomy27:6 Wosakha ngamatye apheleleyo isibingelelo sikaYehova uThixo wakho, unyuse phezu kwaso amadini anyukayo kuYehova uThixo wakho;"
Deuteronomy27:7 nibingelele imibingelelo yombulelo, nidle khona, nivuye phambi koYehova uThixo wenu;"
Deuteronomy27:8 Wabhale ematyeni lawo onke amazwi alo myalelo ngokucacileyo;
Deuteronomy27:9 Wathetha uMoses nababingeleli babaLevi koonyana bakaSirayeli bonke, esithi: “Zilinde, uphulaphule, Sirayeli! namhla nibe ngabantu bakaYehova uThixo wenu."
Deuteronomy27:10 Liphulaphule ke ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wakho, wenze imithetho yakhe nemimiselo yakhe, endikuwiselayo namhla."
Deuteronomy27:11 Ngaloo mini uMoses wabayalela abantu, esithi:"
Deuteronomy27:12 Bema entabeni yeGerizim, ukuba basikelele abantu, ekuweleni kwabo iYordan; uSimon, noLevi, noYuda, noIsakare, noYosefu, noBhenjamin;"
Deuteronomy27:13 Baya kuma entabeni ye-Ebhali, baqalekise; uRubhen, uGadi, uAshere, noZebhulon, uDan noNafetali."
Deuteronomy27:14 Mabathethe abaLevi, bathethe ngezwi elikhulu kumadoda onke akwaSirayeli;"
Deuteronomy27:15 Uqalekisiwe umntu owenza umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, olisikizi kuYehova, umsebenzi wezandla zengcibi, awubeke endaweni esitheleyo; Baphendula bonke abantu, bathi, Amen!"
Deuteronomy27:16 Uqalekisiwe oqeqeshwe nguyise nokuba ngunina; Bathi bonke abantu, Amen!"
Deuteronomy27:17 Uqalekisiwe oshenxisa umda wommelwane wakhe; Bathi bonke abantu, Amen!"
Deuteronomy27:18 Uqalekisiwe olahlekisa imfama; Bathi bonke abantu, Amen!"
Deuteronomy27:19 Uqalekisiwe ojika isigwebo sabasemzini, nenkedama, nomhlolokazi; Bathi bonke abantu, Amen!"
Deuteronomy27:20 Uqalekisiwe olala nomkayise; ngokuba eyambethe ingubo kayise. Bathi bonke abantu, Amen!"
Deuteronomy27:21 Uqalekisiwe olala nantoni na; Bathi bonke abantu, Amen!"
Deuteronomy27:22 Uqalekisiwe olala nodade wabo, nentombi kayise, nokuba yintombi kanina; Bathi bonke abantu, Amen!"
Deuteronomy27:23 Uqalekisiwe olala noninazala; Bathi bonke abantu, Amen!"
Deuteronomy27:24 Uqalekisiwe obetha ummelwane wakhe ngasese; Bathi bonke abantu, Amen!"
Deuteronomy27:25 Uqalekisiwe owamkelayo isohlwayo sokubulala umntu, omsulwa; Bathi bonke abantu, Amen!"
Deuteronomy27:26 Uqalekisiwe ongawamisiyo amazwi alo myalelo ukuba awenze; Bathi bonke abantu, Amen!"
Deuteronomy28:1 Ke ukuba uthe waliphulaphula izwi likaYehova uThixo wakho, wayigcina yonke imithetho yakhe, wakwenza endikuwiselayo namhla: wokuphakamisa uYehova uThixo wakho, ngaphezu kweentlanga zonke zehlabathi;"
Deuteronomy28:2 Yaye zonke ezi ntsikelelo ziya kuza kuwe zize zikufumane ukuba uthe waliphulaphula ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wakho.
Deuteronomy28:3 Wosikelelwa phakathi komzi, usikelelwe emaphandleni;"
Deuteronomy28:4 Iya kusikelelwa isiqhamo sesizalo sakho nesiqhamo somhlaba wakho nesiqhamo seenkomo zakho, inkonyana yenkomo yakho nempahla yakho emfutshane."
Deuteronomy28:5 Mayisikelelwe ingobozi yakho, nobuncwane bakho."
Deuteronomy28:6 Woba nentsikelelo ekungeneni kwakho, ube nentsikelelo ekuphumeni kwakho."
Deuteronomy28:7 uYehova wozinikela zixatyelwe phambi kwakho iintshaba zakho ezivukelana nawe; ziya kukuhlasela ngandlela-nye, zikubaleke ngeendlela ezisixhenxe."
Deuteronomy28:8 uYehova wokusikelela empahleni yakho, nasezintweni zonke osa isandla sakho kuzo; yaye uya kukusikelela ezweni elo akunika lona uYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy28:9 uYehova wonenza nibe ngabantu abangcwaliselweyo kuye, njengoko wakufungelayo, xa uthe wayigcina imithetho kaYehova uThixo wakho, wahamba ngeendlela zakhe;"
Deuteronomy28:10 Kwaye bonke abantu behlabathi baya kubona ukuba igama likaYehova libizwe kuyo; baya kukoyika wena.
Deuteronomy28:11 uYehova wokusikelela ngezinto ezilungileyo, esiqhameni sesizalo sakho, nesiqhamo senkomo yakho, nesiqhamo somhlaba wakho, emhlabeni lowo awafungayo uYehova kooyihlo ukuba wokunika."
Deuteronomy28:12 uYehova uya kukuvulela ubuncwane bakhe obulungileyo, amazulu, ukuze unise imvula ilizwe lakho ngexesha elifanelekileyo, awusikelele wonke umsebenzi wesandla sakho; woboleka iintlanga ezininzi ngezibambiso, ke wena akuyi kuboleka nto kuzo."
Deuteronomy28:13 uYehova wokwenza ube yintloko, ungabi ngumsila; uya kuba phezulu kuphela, ungabi phantsi; xa uthe wayiphulaphula imithetho kaYehova uThixo wakho, endikuwiselayo namhla, ukuba uyigcine, uyenze;"
Deuteronomy28:14 uze ungatyeki emazwini onke endiniwisela umthetho ngawo namhla, uye ekunene nasekhohlo, ukulandela thixo bambi, ubakhonze."
Deuteronomy28:15 Ke ukuba uthe akwaliphulaphula izwi likaYehova uThixo wakho, ukuba uyigcine yonke imithetho yakhe nemiyalelo yakhe endikuwiselayo namhla; zibe phezu kwakho ezo ziqalekiso zonke, zikufumane;"
Deuteronomy28:16 Niya kuqalekiswa phakathi komzi, niqalekiswe emasimini;"
Deuteronomy28:17 Mayiqalekiswe ingobozi yakho, novimba wakho;"
Deuteronomy28:18 uqalekisiwe isiqhamo sesizalo sakho, nesiqhamo somhlaba wakho, nesiqhamo senkomo yakho, nongeniselo lwempahla yakho emfutshane."
Deuteronomy28:19 Woqalekiswa ekungeneni kwakho, uqalekiswe ekuphumeni kwakho."
Deuteronomy28:20 uYehova wokuthumela iziqalekiso, nokuthethiswa, nokuthethisa, ezintweni zonke osa isandla sakho kuzo, ude ubhubhe, ubhubhe kamsinya; ngenxa yobubi bezenzo zakho ozenzileyo kum."
Deuteronomy28:21 uYehova wosibangela sinamathele kuwe isibetho ade akutshabalalise ungabikho emhlabeni oya kuwudla ilifa.
Deuteronomy28:22 uYehova wokohlwaya ngendyikitya yokufa nangecesina nangesifo sokudumba esitshisayo nangomlilo omkhulu nangekrele nangezinkemba nangokungunda; ziya kukusukela ude ubhubhe.
Deuteronomy28:23 Izulu lakho phezu kwentloko yakho loba lubhedu, umhlaba ophantsi kwakho ube sisinyithi."
Deuteronomy28:24 uYehova woyenza imvula yelizwe lakho ibe luthuthu nothuli; iya kuhla iza kuwe ivela emazulwini, ude utshabalale."
Deuteronomy28:25 Woninikela uYehova phambi kweentshaba zenu; niya kuwahlasela ngandlela-nye, nisaba kuzo ngeendlela ezisixhenxe, nigungqiswe ezikumkanini zonke zehlabathi;"
Deuteronomy28:26 Izidumbu zenu zoba kukudla kweentaka zonke zezulu, nokwamarhamncwa asendle, kungabikho bani uziqwengayo."
Deuteronomy28:27 uYehova wokohlwaya ngeqhenqa laseYiputa, nangeqhenqa, nangeqhenqa, nangejaduka, ongayi kuphola kulo."
Deuteronomy28:28 uYehova wokubetha ngokugeza, ngobumfama, nangokuphambana kwentliziyo;"
Deuteronomy28:29 Uya kuphuthaphutha emini njengemfama ephuthaphutha emnyameni, ungabi nampumelelo ezindleleni zakho; yaye uya kuhlala ucinezelwe yaye uthinjwa, kungabikho bani ukuhlangulayo."
Deuteronomy28:30 Wozeka umfazi, alalwe ndoda yimbi; uya kwakha indlu, ungahlali kuyo; tyala isidiliya, kodwa ungavuni isiqhamo saso."
Deuteronomy28:31 Imfuyo yakho yoxhelwa phambi kwamehlo akho, ungayidli; 30 Ke iesile lakho liya kuthatyathwa phambi kobuso bakho, aliyi kubuyela kuwe; yonikwa iintshaba zakho impahla yakho emfutshane, ungasweli nto ukubasindisa."
Deuteronomy28:32 Oonyana bakho neentombi zakho baya kunikwa olunye uhlanga, akhangele amehlo akho aze abe buhlungu ukubabona imini yonke, ungabi namandla esandleni sakho."
Deuteronomy28:33 Isiqhamo somhlaba wakho nomsebenzi wakho wonke wodliwa luhlanga ongalwaziyo; yaye uya kuqhubeka utyunyuzwa, yaye uya kuhlala unoyolo;"
Deuteronomy28:34 ukuze ubhudiswe kukubona amehlo akho oya kukubona.
Deuteronomy28:35 uYehova wokubetha emadolweni akho nasezinyaweni zakho, ngenxeba elingapholiyo, ethabathela entendeni yonyawo ase entloko."
Deuteronomy28:36 uYehova wokusa kuhlanga eningalwaziyo wena nooyihlo; nikhonze khona thixo bambi, imithi namatye."
Deuteronomy28:37 Yaye niya kuba yintlekisa nesigculelo phakathi kweentlanga zonke aya kukusa kuzo uYehova.
Deuteronomy28:38 Wozisa imbewu eninzi emhlabeni, uhlanganise into encinane; ngokuba iya kudliwa ziinkumbi."
Deuteronomy28:39 Tyalani izidiliya, nizisebenze, ningaseli wayini noko, ningavuni zidiliya; ngokuba baya kudliwa ziimpethu."
Deuteronomy28:40 Woba neminquma ezindaweni zakho zonke, ungazithambisi ngeoli noko; kuba umnquma wakho wothwala isiqhamo sawo."
Deuteronomy28:41 Uya kuzala oonyana neentombi, ungabi nakonwaba noko; ngokuba baya kuthinjwa."
Deuteronomy28:42 Yonke imithi yakho nesiqhamo somhlaba wakho siya kudliwa ziinkumbi.
Deuteronomy28:43 Owasemzini ophakathi kwakho uya kusuka eme phezu kwakho; kwaye uya kuhla kakhulu.
Deuteronomy28:44 Wokuboleka yena, ungamboleki wena; woba yintloko yena, ube ngumsila wena."
Deuteronomy28:45 Zoza ke phezu kwakho ezo ziqalekiso zonke, zikusukele, zikubambe, ude ubhubhe; ngokuba ungaliphulaphulanga ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wakho, ukuba uyigcine imithetho yakhe nemithetho yakhe owise umthetho ngayo;"
Deuteronomy28:46 ibe ngumqondiso nesimanga kuwe, nakoonyana bakho kude kuse ephakadeni;"
Deuteronomy28:47 ngenxa yokuba ungamkhonzanga uYehova uThixo wakho ngovuyo nangentliziyo echwayithileyo ngenxa yobutyebi bento yonke;
Deuteronomy28:48 Ke ngoko, khonzani iintshaba zenu eya kuthi iNkosi izithumele ngokuchasene nani ngendlala nonxano kwaye niswele yonke into; abeke idyokhwe yentsimbi entanyeni yakho, akutshabalalise."
Deuteronomy28:49 uYehova wokuzisela abantu bephela, abaphuma eziphelweni zehlabathi, abatshwebele njengexhalanga; luhlanga olulwimi lungenako ukuqonda;"
Deuteronomy28:50 luhlanga olunobuso obuvutha, obungayihloniphi indoda enkulu, olungenanceba kumncinane;"
Deuteronomy28:51 Nodla isiqhamo semfuyo yakho, nesiqhamo somhlaba wakho, ude ubhubhe; ukutshabalalisile."
Deuteronomy28:52 Lokungqinga emasangweni akho onke, zide ziwe iindonga zakho eziphakamileyo, ezinqabileyo, ozithembileyo ezweni lakho lonke; lukufikele emasangweni akho onke ezweni lakho lonke akunike lona uYehova uThixo wakho;"
Deuteronomy28:53 udle isiqhamo sesizalo sakho, inyama yoonyana bakho neentombi zakho akunikileyo uYehova uThixo wakho, ekungqingweni nasekuxinweni, olokulukuhlayo ngako iintshaba zakho."
Deuteronomy28:54 Indoda esukuba inembeko, nemfesane kakhulu phakathi kwakho, yoba libi kumzalwana wayo, nomfazi wesifuba sayo, namasalela abantwana bayo abasaseleyo;"
Deuteronomy28:55 ukuze inganiki namnye kubo inyama yabantwana bayo ayidlayo, ngenxa yokuba ingasenanto ekungqingweni nasekuxinweni, olokulukuhla ngako iintshaba zakho, emasangweni akho onke."
Deuteronomy28:56 Umfazi olula phakathi kwenu, ongayi kuba nabuganga bakubeka intende yonyawo lwakhe emhlabeni, ngenxa yobulali nobulali, libe libi iliso lakhe endodeni yesifuba sakhe, nakunyana wakhe, nakwintombi yakhe;"
Deuteronomy28:57 nomntwana ophuma phakathi kwemilenze yakhe, nangenxa yabantwana bakhe, abo aya kubazala; kuba uya kuzidla ngokufihlakeleyo ngenxa yokungabikho kwayo yonk’ into yokungqinga nexhala oluya kukulukuhla ngalo utshaba lwakho emasangweni akho."
Deuteronomy28:58 Ukuba anithanga nikunyamekele ukuwenza onke amazwi alo myalelo, abhaliweyo kule ncwadi, ukuze niloyike eli gama lizukileyo, loyikekayo, uYehova uThixo wenu;"
Deuteronomy28:59 uYehova wokwenza kube yimisebenzi yakho ebalulekileyo, nezohlwayo zoonyana bakho, ube sisibetho ezikhulu, nezifo ezihlala zihleli, ezinzima, ezingunaphakade."
Deuteronomy28:60 Uya kukuzisela zonke izifo zaseYiputa owawuzoyika; kwaye baya kunamathela kuwe.
Deuteronomy28:61 Nako konke ukufa, nayo yonke isohlwayo esingabhaliweyo encwadini yalo myalelo, wozinyusa uYehova phezu kwenu ude ubhubhe;"
Deuteronomy28:62 nisale nibantu bambalwa, nakuba naningangeenkwenkwezi zezulu ukuba baninzi; ngokuba ungaliphulaphulanga ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy28:63 Njengokuba uYehova wanithandayo, ukuba anenzele okulungileyo, anandise; ngoko ke, uYehova uya kukholeka kuni ukunitshabalalisa, anitshabalalise; yaye ngokuqinisekileyo niya kuthatyathwa ezweni elo uya kulidla ilifa."
Deuteronomy28:64 Woniphangalalisa uYehova ezintlangeni zonke, athabathele esiphelweni sehlabathi, ase ekupheleni kwehlabathi; yaye apho uya kukhonza abanye oothixo ababengabazi wena nookhokho bakho, abenziwe ngomthi namatye."
Deuteronomy28:65 Kwaye phakathi kwezo ntlanga aniyi kufumana kuphumla, nentende yeenyawo zenu ayisayi kuzola; aze ke uYehova aninike intliziyo eyaphukileyo namehlo anorhatyazo nodandatheko lwengqondo."
Deuteronomy28:66 Kwaye ubomi bakho buya kujinga phambi kwakho; unkwantya imini nobusuku, bungakhuseleki ubomi bakho."
Deuteronomy28:67 Kusasa uya kuthi: “Ewe, bekungokuhlwa! ngokuhlwa uya kuthi, Kwowu, bekungomso! ngokoyikeka kwentliziyo yakho, oya kunkwantya ngako, nangenxa yokubona aya kukubona amehlo akho."
Deuteronomy28:68 uYehova wokubuyisela eYiputa ngeenqanawa, njengoko ndathi kuni, Aniyi kuphinda niyibone; yaye apho niya kuthengiswa kwiintshaba zenu ukuze nibe ngamakhoboka namakhoboka, yaye akukho bani uya kunithenga."
Deuteronomy29:1 Ngawo la amazwi omnqophiso, awamwisela uMoses umthetho ngawo uYehova, ukuba awenze noonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni lakwaMowabhi, ngaphandle komnqophiso awawenzayo nabo eHorebhe."
Deuteronomy29:2 uMoses wababiza bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli, wathi kubo, Nikubonile konke akwenzileyo uYehova phambi kwenu ezweni laseYiputa, kuFaro, nakubakhonzi bakhe bonke, nakwilizwe lakhe lonke;"
Deuteronomy29:3 izilingo ezikhulu azibonileyo amehlo akho, kwanemiqondiso emikhulu nezimanga;"
Deuteronomy29:4 Ke akaninikanga uYehova intliziyo yokubona, namehlo abo, neendlebe zabo, unanamhla."
Deuteronomy29:5 Ndanihambisa entlango iminyaka emashumi mane; Iingubo zakho azonakalanga bubudala kuwe, neembadada zakho azonakalanga bubudala ezinyaweni zakho."
Deuteronomy29:6 Anidlanga sonka, aniselanga wayini nasiselo sinxilisayo, ukuze nazi ukuba ndinguYehova uThixo wenu."
Deuteronomy29:7 Nakufika kule ndawo, wasixabela uSihon ukumkani waseHeshbhon, no-Ogi ukumkani waseBhashan, sabaxabela."
Deuteronomy29:8 Salithabatha ke ilizwe labo, salinika amaRubhen, namaGadi, nesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase, ukuba libe lilifa."
Deuteronomy29:9 Wagcineni amazwi alo mnqophiso, niwenze, ukuze nibe nempumelelo ezintweni zonke enisukuba nizenza."
Deuteronomy29:10 Yimani nonke namhla phambi koYehova uThixo wenu; neentloko zezindlu zenu, namadoda enu amakhulu, nabakhonzi benu, namadoda onke akwaSirayeli;"
Deuteronomy29:11 abantwana benu, nabafazi benu, nowasemzini ophakathi kwenu, ethabathela emahlathini ase equleni lakho;"
Deuteronomy29:12 wenze umnqophiso noYehova uThixo wakho, nesifungo sakhe, asenzayo uYehova uThixo wakho nawe namhla;"
Deuteronomy29:13 aniqinise namhla nibe ngabantu bakhe, nibe nguThixo wenu, njengoko wathethayo kuni, njengoko wathethayo kuni ooAbraham, noIsake, noYakobi;"
Deuteronomy29:14 Ndenza lo mnqophiso nani nodwa nesi sifungo;
Deuteronomy29:15 Kodwa ngubani na omi nathi apha namhlanje phambi koYehova uThixo wethu, ongekhoyo apha nathi namhlanje?"
Deuteronomy29:16 Kuba niyayazi nina indlela esahlala ngayo ezweni laseYiputa, nendlela esacanda ngayo phakathi kweentlanga enadlula kuzo;"
Deuteronomy29:17 Wabona izinto zabo ezinezothe, nemifanekiso yazo eyenziwe ngomthi namatye, nesilivere, negolide, phakathi kwazo;"
Deuteronomy29:18 Makungabikho ndoda, namfazi, nantsapho, nasizwe sintliziyo ijikayo namhla kuYehova, uThixo wethu, ukuba sikhonze oothixo bezo ntlanga; kungabikho ngcambu ivelisa inyongo nenyongo phakathi kwenu;"
Deuteronomy29:19 Kwaye akuba eweva amazwi esi siqalekiso, wazisikelela entliziyweni yakhe, esithi: Ndiya kuba noxolo, nokuba ndihamba ngeminqweno yentliziyo yam, ndisongeza ukunxila enxanweni."
Deuteronomy29:20 uYehova akayi kuba nanceba kuye, kodwa umsindo kaYehova nekhwele lakhe uya kuvuka kuloo mphefumlo, ziwele phezu kwakhe zonke iziqalekiso ezibhaliweyo kule ncwadi, alibize uYehova igama lakhe phantsi kwezulu."
Deuteronomy29:21 Yaye uYehova uya kumahlula kuzo zonke izizwe zakwaSirayeli ukuba abe mbi, ngokwemfundiso yonke yomnqophiso ebhalwe kule ncwadi yomthetho."
Deuteronomy29:22 Siso eso isizukulwana senu siya kubonakala emva kwenu, aze athi umphambukeli ovela kwilizwe elikude, ekuboneni kwakhe ukohlwaywa kwelo lizwe nezifo azibeke kulo uYehova;"
Deuteronomy29:23 yaye lonke ilizwe layo libe yisalfure netyuwa nomlilo ovuthayo, ukuze lingahlwayeli, lingahlwayeli, kungabikho ngca, njengokubhukuqwa kweSodom neGomora, iAdima Tsebhoyim awayitshabalalisayo uYehova ekuyitshabalaliseni kwayo umsindo wakhe nobushushu bakhe."
Deuteronomy29:24 Zothi ke zonke iintlanga, Yini na ukuba uYehova walenze eli lizwe? Kuthetha ukuthini ukuvutha komsindo onjalo?"
Deuteronomy29:25 Bathi ke abantu, Kungokuba bewushiyile umnqophiso kaYehova uThixo wooyise, awawenzayo nabo ekubakhupheni kwakhe ezweni laseYiputa."
Deuteronomy29:26 Bahamba baya kukhonza abanye oothixo baza babanqula, oothixo ababengabazi nawayengabanikanga yena."
Deuteronomy29:27 Wavutha ke umsindo kaYehova lo mhlaba ukuze azise kuwo zonke izifundo ezibhaliweyo kule ncwadi.
Deuteronomy29:28 uYehova wabanyothula emhlabeni wabo ngomsindo nangomsindo nangobushushu obukhulu, wabaphosa kwelinye ilizwe, njengoko kusenjalo namhlanje."
Deuteronomy29:29 Izinto ezifihlakeleyo zezikaYehova uThixo wethu, kodwa izinto ezityhiliweyo zezethu noonyana bethu ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo, ukuze siwaphumeze onke amazwi alo mthetho."
Deuteronomy30:1 Xa zithe zanifikela zonke ezo zinto, intsikelelo nesiqalekiso, endizibeke phambi kwenu, wazikhumbula phakathi kweentlanga zonke, athe wakuphangalalisela kuzo uYehova uThixo wakho;"
Deuteronomy30:2 Uze ubuyele kuYehova uThixo wakho, ulithobele ilizwi lakhe ngako konke endikuyalela kona namhlanje, wena noonyana bakho ngentliziyo yakho yonke nangomphefumlo wakho wonke;"
Deuteronomy30:3 Wokuguqulela uYehova uThixo wakho ukuthinjwa kwakho, abe nemfesane kuwe, abuye akubuthe ezintlangeni zonke, akuchithachithileyo uYehova uThixo wakho."
Deuteronomy30:4 Ukuba ubani kuni ugxothelwe esiphelweni samazulu, uYehova uThixo wakho wonihlanganisela khona, anikhuphe."
Deuteronomy30:5 Wokuzisa uYehova uThixo wakho kulo ilizwe ababelihluthile ooyihlo, ulime; uya kunenzela okulungileyo, akwandise ngaphezu kooyihlo."
Deuteronomy30:6 Woyalusa intliziyo yakho uYehova uThixo wakho, nentliziyo yembewu yakho, ukuba umthande uYehova uThixo wakho ngentliziyo yakho yonke, nangomphefumlo wakho wonke, ukuze uphile."
Deuteronomy30:7 Wozizisa zonke ezi ziqalekiso uYehova uThixo wakho phezu kweentshaba zakho nakwabo bakuthiyileyo, abanitshutshisayo."
Deuteronomy30:8 Uya kubuya ke wena, uliphulaphule ilizwi likaYehova, wenze yonke imiyalelo yakhe endikuwiselayo namhlanje."
Deuteronomy30:9 Wandise uYehova uThixo wakho emsebenzini wonke wesandla sakho, isiqhamo sesizalo sakho, nesiqhamo senkomo yakho, nesiqhamo somhlaba wakho, kulunge; ngokuba uYehova uya kubuya akholiswe nguwe, kulunge, njengoko wabakholisayo ooyihlo:"
Deuteronomy30:10 ukuba uthe waliphulaphula izwi likaYehova uThixo wakho, wayigcina imithetho yakhe nemiyalelo yakhe, ebhaliweyo encwadini yalo myalelo, wabuyela kuYehova uThixo wakho ngentliziyo yakho yonke, nangomphefumlo wakho wonke."
Deuteronomy30:11 Ngokuba lo myalelo ndikuwiselayo namhla awukude kuwe, awukude nokuba kude."
Deuteronomy30:12 Awukho emazulwini, apho ningathi, Ngubani na oya kusinyukela emazulwini, asithabathele, ukuze sive, siwugqibe?"
Deuteronomy30:13 Nani phesheya kolwandle, nithi, Ngubani na oya kusiwelela ulwandle, asithabathele, siwuve, siwenze?"
Deuteronomy30:14 Ngokuba ilizwi eli lisondele kunene kuwe, emlonyeni wakho nasentliziyweni yakho, ukuba ulenze."
Deuteronomy30:15 Yabona, ndibeke phambi kwakho namhla ubomi nokulunga, ukufa nobubi;"
Deuteronomy30:16 Kungenxa yoko le nto ndikuyalela namhlanje ukuba umthande uYehova uThixo wakho, uhambe ngeendlela zakhe, ugcine imiyalelo yakhe nemithetho yakhe nezigwebo zakhe, ukuze uphile, wande; yaye uYehova uThixo wakho uya kukusikelela ezweni oya kulidla ilifa."
Deuteronomy30:17 Ke ukuba ithe yalahleka intliziyo yakho, aweva;"
Deuteronomy30:18 Namhla ndithi kuni, niya kudaka kuphele, aniyi kuyolula imihla yenu emhlabeni, nawela iYordan nisiya kuwuhlutha."
Deuteronomy30:19 Ndingqinisisa amazulu nehlabathi namhla ngani, ukuba ndibeke phambi kwenu ubomi nokufa, intsikelelo nesiqalekiso; zinyulele ke wena ubomi, ukuze uphile, wena nembewu yakho;"
Deuteronomy30:20 ukuze umthande uYehova uThixo wakho, uliphulaphule ilizwi lakhe, unamathele kuye, ngokuba bubomi bakho nokolulwa kwemihla yakho, ukuze uhlale emhlabeni awufungelayo uYehova ooyihlo ooAbraham noIsake noYakobi, ukuba ndibanike wona."
Deuteronomy31:1 Wahamba ke uMoses, wawaxelela onke amaSirayeli loo mazwi,"
Deuteronomy31:2 wathi kubo, Namhlanje ndiminyaka ilikhulu elinamanci mabini ndizelwe; Andisenako ukungena nokuphuma; Waphinda wathi uYehova kum, Akusayi kuyiwela le Yordan."
Deuteronomy31:3 NguYehova uThixo wakho oya kunikhokela, azitshabalalise ezi ntlanga phambi kwakho, uzidle ilifa; noYoshuwa, nguye oya kunikhokela, njengoko watshoyo uYehova."
Deuteronomy31:4 uYehova uya kwenza kuzo njengoko wenzayo kuSihon no-Ogi, ookumkani bama-Amori, nakwilizwe lowabatshabalalisayo;"
Deuteronomy31:5 uYehova wozinikela phambi kwenu, ukuze nenze ngokwemithetho yonke endiniyalele yona."
Deuteronomy31:6 Yomelelani nikhaliphe; musani ukoyika, musani ukuboyika; ngokuba uYehova uThixo wakho nguye ohamba nawe; Akayi kukulahla, akayi kukufulathela."
Deuteronomy31:7 Wandula ke uMoses wambiza uYoshuwa waza wathi kuye phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli bonke: “Yiba nesibindi uze ukhaliphe, kuba wena uya kuhamba nesi sizwana uye kwilizwe awathembisa ngalo uYehova kooyise ukuba wobanika lona nika; yaye uya kubenza babe lilifa."
Deuteronomy31:8 NguYehova okhokelayo; yena uya kuba nawe, akayi kukulahla, akayi kukulahla; musani ukoyika, musani ukoyika."
Deuteronomy31:9 Wawubhala uMoses lo myalelo, wawunika ababingeleli, oonyana bakaLevi, abathwala ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova, namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli onke."
Deuteronomy31:10 uMoses wabawisela umthetho, wathi, Ekupheleni kweminyaka esixhenxe, ngexesha lokubhiyozela umnyaka woyekelelo, ekubhiyozeleni kweminquba,"
Deuteronomy31:11 Xa onke amaSirayeli eza kubonakala phambi koYehova uThixo wakho, kuloo ndawo aya kuyinyula, awulese lo mthetho phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli bonke, apho awuphulaphuleyo."
Deuteronomy31:12 Bahlanganisele ndawonye abantu, amadoda nabafazi nabantwana, nomphambukeli osemasangweni akho, ukuze beve, bafunde, bamoyike uYehova uThixo wenu, bawagcine ngenyameko onke amazwi alo myalelo:"
Deuteronomy31:13 beve oonyana babo, ababengazi, bafunde ukumoyika uYehova uThixo wenu, ekuhlaleni kwenu emhlabeni, eniwela iYordan nisiya kuwuhlutha."
Deuteronomy31:14 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yabona, isondele imihla yakho yokuba ufe; Wamemeza uYoshuwa, wema ententeni yokuhlangana, ukuze ndimyalele. Bahamba ooMoses noYoshuwa, babazisa ententeni yokuhlangana."
Deuteronomy31:15 Wabonakala uYehova ententeni efini; lathi zinzi ilifu emnyango womnquba.
Deuteronomy31:16 Wathi uYehova kuMoses, Yabona, uya kulala nooyihlo; basuke aba bantu bakrexeze noothixo basemzini belizwe abaya kuma kulo, bandishiye, bawaphule umnqophiso wam endawenza nabo;"
Deuteronomy31:17 Uya kwandula ke uvuthe umsindo wam kubo ngaloo mini, ndize ndibashiye ndize ndibusithelise ubuso bam kubo, batshabalale, bafikelwe ziintlekele neembandezelo ezininzi; ngaloo mini, baya kuthi: Ngaba asisayi kubunyamezela obu bubi, ngenxa yokuba uThixo wethu engekho phakathi kwethu?"
Deuteronomy31:18 Yaye ndiya kubufihla ngokuqinisekileyo ubuso bam ngaloo mini ngenxa yobubi bonke ababenze ngokuphethukela kwabanye oothixo.
Deuteronomy31:19 Ngoku ke zibhaleleni le ngoma, niyifundise oonyana bakaSirayeli; bayibeke emlonyeni wabo, ukuze le ngoma ibe bubungqina bam koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Deuteronomy31:20 Kuba ndithe ndabazisa kwelo zwe ndafunga kooyise ngesifungo, elibaleka amasi nobusi; baya kudla, bahluthe, batyebe; bajike baye thixweni bambi, babakhonze, badlale ngam, bawaphule umnqophiso wam."
Deuteronomy31:21 Xa bathe bahlelwa bububi obuninzi, isuke le ngoma ingqina ngabo; ngokuba ayisayi kulityalwa emlonyeni wabantwana babo; ngokuba ndiyazazi iingcinga zabo ukuba basaxhalabile, nangoku, ndingekabangenisi ezweni endabafungayo kubo."
Deuteronomy31:22 Wayibhala uMoses loo ngoma ngaloo mini, wayifundisa oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Deuteronomy31:23 Wamwisela umthetho uYoshuwa unyana kaNun, wathi, Yomelela, ukhaliphe, kuba uya kubangenisa wena oonyana bakaSirayeli kwelo zwe ndabafungela lona; mna ndiya kuba nawe."
Deuteronomy31:24 Wagqiba uMoses ukuwabhala amazwi alo myalelo encwadini, ada agqitywa."
Deuteronomy31:25 uMoses wabawisela umthetho abaLevi ababethwele ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova, esithi,"
Deuteronomy31:26 Thabathani le ncwadi yomthetho nize niyibeke ecaleni kwetyeya yomnqophiso kaYehova uThixo wenu, ibe bubungqina kuni apho."
Deuteronomy31:27 Ngokuba ndiyazazi iingxaki zakho, nentamo yakho elukhuni; yabonani, andisahlali nani namhla, nigwilikile kuYehova; Kuya kuba njani na emva kokufa kwam?"
Deuteronomy31:28 Ndihlanganiseleni onke amadoda amakhulu emizalwane yenu, nabakhonzi bakho, ukuze ndiwathethe la mazwi apho bawevayo khona, ndibize izulu nomhlaba phezu kwabo."
Deuteronomy31:29 Kuba ndiyazi ukuba emva kokufa kwam niya kutshabalala kuphele, nityeke endleleni endiniwisele umthetho ngayo; nokwehlelwa yintlekele ekupheleni kwemihla; ngokuba uya kwenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, ukuba umqumbise ngemisebenzi yezandla zakho."
Deuteronomy31:30 Wawathetha ke uMoses amazwi ale ngoma, lada layiva lonke ibandla lakwaSirayeli, lada lagqitywa."
Deuteronomy32:1 Yivani, mazulu, ndithethe; liveni, hlabathi, amazwi omlomo wam."
Deuteronomy32:2 Ichaphaze njengemvula imfundiso yam, Ichaphaze njengombethe intetho yam, Njengomvumbi phezu kwezityalo ezithambileyo, nanjengemvumbi engceni."
Deuteronomy32:3 Ngokuba ndiya kuvakalisa igama likaYehova; nimnike ubukhulu uThixo wethu.
Deuteronomy32:4 NguLiwa, ugqibele umsebenzi wakhe, ngokuba zonke iindlela zakhe zisesikweni;"
Deuteronomy32:5 Bakhahlelekile, asingoonyana bakhe ibala, Isizukulwana esingendawo, esingendawo."
Deuteronomy32:6 Nimbuyekeza ngaloo ndlela na uYehova, bantundini bazizidenge nabazizidenge? Andithi nguyihlo okuthengileyo? Akakwenzi na ukuba akuqinisekise?"
Deuteronomy32:7 Khumbula iimini zasephakadeni, Qonda iminyaka yezizukulwana ngezizukulwana; Buza kuyihlo, wokuxelela; amadoda amakhulu akho, aya kukuxelela."
Deuteronomy32:8 Xa Oyena Uphakamileyo wazabela ilifa lazo phakathi kweentlanga, Ekubahlulahluleni kwakhe oonyana baka-Adam, Wayimisa imida yeentlanga ngokwenani loonyana bakaSirayeli."
Deuteronomy32:9 Ngokuba isabelo sikaYehova ngabantu bakhe; uYakobi sisiphelo selifa lakhe.
Deuteronomy32:10 Wamfumana ezweni eliyintlango, Entlango, enkangala; wamsa kuyo yonke indawo, wamqeqesha, wamlondoloza njengokhozo lweliso lakhe."
Deuteronomy32:11 Njengokhozi luphaphazela phezu kwamantshontsho alo, luphaphazele phezu kwamantshontsho alo, luwolule amaphiko alo, luthabathe, luthwale ngamaphiko alo;"
Deuteronomy32:12 Ngoko uYehova yedwa wamkhokela, kungekho thixo wumbi kunye naye."
Deuteronomy32:13 Wamsa ezigangeni zehlabathi, ukuba adle imveliso yelizwe; wamdlisa ubusi engxondorheni, nangeoli elulwalweni;"
Deuteronomy32:14 Ubisi lweenkomo, nobisi lwezimvu, namanqatha eemvana, neenkunzi zeegusha zesizwe saseBhashan, neenciniba, kunye namanqatha ezintso zengqolowa; Wasela igazi elimsulwa leediliya."
Deuteronomy32:15 Watyeba ke uYeshurun, wakhaba; utyebile, utyebile, utyebile; Wasuka wemka kuThixo owamenzayo, Walidela iLiwa losindiso lwakhe."
Deuteronomy32:16 Bamsola thixweni bambi, bamqumbisa ngezinto ezinezothe."
Deuteronomy32:17 Babingelela kwiidemon, kungekhona uThixo; oothixo ababengabazi, abangoothixo abatsha abavele bavuka, ababengabahlonele ooyihlo."
Deuteronomy32:18 Awunakulikhumbula iLiwa elakuzalayo, Ungamlibalanga uThixo owakudalayo."
Deuteronomy32:19 Wakubona uYehova, wabalahla ngenxa yokuhleka koonyana bakhe neentombi zakhe."
Deuteronomy32:20 Wathi, Ndiya kubusithelisa ubuso bam kubo, ndibone ukuba koba yintoni na ukuphela kwabo; kuba bayintsapho embi kakhulu, abantwana abangenalukholo kubo."
Deuteronomy32:21 Bandikhweletisa ngongeThixo; bandiqumbisile ngamampunge abo, ndaba nobukhwele ngabangebantu; ndiya kubohlwaya ngabantu abaziziyatha;"
Deuteronomy32:22 Ngokuba kuphenjwe umlilo emsindweni wam;
Deuteronomy32:23 Ndiya kubahlanganisela ububi; Ke utolo lwam ndoluphelela kubo.
Deuteronomy32:24 Odliwa yindlala, odliwe kukurhala, nekuphanza elikrakra; ndiya kubathumela amazinyo amarhamncwa, nobuhlungu beenyoka zothuli."
Deuteronomy32:25 Uya kuphanzisa umkhonto ongaphandle, zinkwantye ngaphakathi kumlisela nomthinjana, nomntwana nengwevu."
Deuteronomy32:26 Ndathi, Ndiya kubaphangalalisa ezimbombeni, ndisiphelise isikhumbuzo sabo ezintlangeni."
Deuteronomy32:27 Yayingekuko na ngenxa yokoyika umsindo weentshaba, naxa iintshaba zazo zingenzi ngendlela engaqhelekanga zaza zathi: “Izandla zethu ziphakamile, yaye uYehova akazange na akwenze konke oku?"
Deuteronomy32:28 Ngokuba ngabantu abangenanjongo, tu ingqondo kubo."
Deuteronomy32:29 Ukuba babelumkile, ngebekuqonde oko, Waliqonda ikamva labo!"
Deuteronomy32:30 Bebeya kubaleka njani na iwaka, yaye bekuya kuthini na ukusaba ishumi lamawaka amabini, ukuba iLiwa labo belingathengisanga ngabo, waza uYehova wabazala?"
Deuteronomy32:31 Ngokuba alinjengeLiwa lethu iliwa lazo, lintshaba zethu zingabagwebi."
Deuteronomy32:32 Ngokuba iidiliya zabo zizidiliya zaseSodom, namasimi aseGomora; Iidiliya zabo ziidiliya ezinencasa, iidiliya zabo zinobukrakra;"
Deuteronomy32:33 Bubuhlungu beempungutye iwayini yabo, Bubuhlungu obubulalayo bezizwe."
Deuteronomy32:34 Ayihlanganiselwanga na kum, yatywinwa koovimba bam?"
Deuteronomy32:35 Yeyam impindezelo nesohlwayo; Unyawo lwabo luya kukhubeka ngexesha elifanelekileyo, ngenxa yokuba isondele imini yentlekele yabo, yaye izinto ezehlelayo ziyakhawuleza."
Deuteronomy32:36 Ngenxa yokuba uYehova uya kubagweba abantu bakhe yaye uya kuba buhlungu ngenxa yabakhonzi bakhe xa ebona amandla abo ephelile, yaye akukho bani uvalelweyo okanye ushiywe."
Deuteronomy32:37 Uya kuthi, Baphi na oothixo babo, iLiwa labo ababekholose ngalo?"
Deuteronomy32:38 Abadla amanqatha emibingelelo yabo, Abasela iwayini yeminikelo yabo ethululwayo? makavuke, akuncede, abe lukhuselo lwakho."
Deuteronomy32:39 Bonani ngoku, ukuba ndikho nje, ngokuba kungekho thixo unam. Ndiyabulala, ndidlise ubomi; Ndihlabile, ndiphilisa, akukho unokuhlangula esandleni sam."
Deuteronomy32:40 Ngokuba ndisiphakamisela ezulwini isandla sam, Ndithi, Ndihleli ngonaphakade."
Deuteronomy32:41 Ukuba ndililolile ikrele lam elibengezelayo, Sabamba isigwebo ngesandla sam; Ndiya kuphindezela kwiintshaba zam, ndiphindezele kwabandithiyayo."
Deuteronomy32:42 Ndiza kuzinxilisa iintolo zam egazini, nekrele lam liya kudla inyama; kwaye oku ngegazi labo babuleweyo nabathinjwe, ukususela ekuqaleni kwempindezelo kutshaba."
Deuteronomy32:43 Memelelani, zintlanga, bantu bakhe, ngenxa yokuba eliphindezelela igazi labakhonzi bakhe, eliphindezelela impindezelo kubachasi bakhe, abe nemfesane ezweni lakhe nakubantu bakhe."
Deuteronomy32:44 Weza ke uMoses, wawathetha onke amazwi ale ngoma, bephulaphule abantu, yena noHoseya unyana kaNun."
Deuteronomy32:45 Wagqiba uMoses ukuwathetha onke la mazwi koonyana bakaSirayeli bonke.
Deuteronomy32:46 Wathi kuwo, Wabekeleni iintliziyo zenu onke amazwi endiwangqinayo phakathi kwenu namhla, nibawisele umthetho oonyana benu, ukuba bagcine ukuwenza onke amazwi alo myalelo;"
Deuteronomy32:47 Kuba akulambatha kuni; ngokuba bubomi bakho; yaye ngenxa yoko niya kuyandisa imihla yenu kwilizwe eniwela iYordan nisiya kulidla ilifa.
Deuteronomy32:48 Wathetha uYehova kuMoses kwangaloo mini, esithi,"
Deuteronomy32:49 Nyuka uye kule ntaba yeAbharim, uye entabeni yeNebho, esezweni lakwaMowabhi, malungana neYeriko; ukhangele ilizwe lakwaKanan, endilinika oonyana bakaSirayeli ukuba libe lilifa labo."
Deuteronomy32:50 Wena ufele entabeni, oyinyukayo, uphumle phakathi kwabantu bakowenu; njengoko wafelayo umkhuluwa wakho uAron entabeni yeHore, wathatyathwa phakathi kwabantu bakowabo."
Deuteronomy32:51 Kungenxa yokuba nalahlwayo phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli emanzini aseMeribha yaseKadeshe entlango yaseSine; ngenxa yokuba ningandingcwalisanga phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli.
Deuteronomy32:52 Wolibona ilizwe liphambi kwakho; ke aniyi kungena ezweni endilinika oonyana bakaSirayeli.
Deuteronomy33:1 Yiyo le intsikelelo, awabasikelela ngayo uMoses, umfo wakwaThixo, oonyana bakaSirayeli, engekafi."
Deuteronomy33:2 Wathi, uYehova wavela eSinayi, wabakhupha kwaSehire; Wabengezela esezintabeni zaseParan, weza neshumi lamawaka abantu bengcwele; ekunene kwakhe ngumthetho womlilo kubo."
Deuteronomy33:3 Ewe, wayebathanda abantu; Bonke abangcwele bakhe basezandleni zenu, yaye bahleli ezinyaweni zenu; bonke baya kuwamkela amazwi akho."
Deuteronomy33:4 uMoses wasiwisela umyalelo, Ilifa ke elo lebandla lakwaYakobi."
Deuteronomy33:5 Waba ngukumkani kwaYeshurun, Ekuzihlanganiseni iintloko zabantu, nezizwe zakwaSirayeli."
Deuteronomy33:6 uRubhen makadle ubomi, angafi; kwaye amadoda akhe makangabi buthathaka."
Deuteronomy33:7 Yiyo le intsikelelo kaYuda: yaye wathi: “Yehova, liphulaphule ilizwi likaYuda, uze umzise kubantu bakowabo; iingalo zakhe zimnele; Umncede ezintshabeni zakhe."
Deuteronomy33:8 Wathi uLevi, IiTumim zakho neeUrim zakho mazibe koyiNgcwele wakho, Owamlingayo eMasa, Owamnyulayo emanzini aseMeribha;"
Deuteronomy33:9 Lowo wathi kuyise nakunina, Andimbonanga; yaye akabazi abantakwabo, akabazi nabantwana bakhe, ngenxa yokuba baligcina ilizwi lakho nomnqophiso wakho."
Deuteronomy33:10 Baya kumyala uYakobi ngamasiko akho, bamfundise uSirayeli umyalelo wakho; baqhumisele phambi kwakho, baqhumisele ngamadini anyukayo esibingelelweni sakho."
Deuteronomy33:11 Dumisani, Yehova, ukulunga kwakhe, Yamkelani imisebenzi yezandla zakhe; wababetha esinqeni abo basukela phezulu kuye, nabamthiyayo, bangabi savuka."
Deuteronomy33:12 NgoBhenjamin wathi, Intanda kaYehova iya kuhlala kuye ikholosile; yaye uYehova uya kumgubungela yonke imihla, yaye uya kuhlala phakathi kwamagxa akhe."
Deuteronomy33:13 Wathi uYosefu, uYehova makalisikelele ilizwe lakhe ngezinto ezinqabileyo zezulu, nangombethe, naphezu komlambo wamanzi asezantsi;"
Deuteronomy33:14 nakwiziqhamo ezilungileyo eziveliswa lilanga, nakwiziqhamo ezilungileyo eziveliswa yinyanga."
Deuteronomy33:15 Ngezinto ezinqwenelekayo zeentaba zamandulo, Nezinto ezinqabileyo ezisezintabeni ezihlala zihleli;"
Deuteronomy33:16 Ngokuphathelele izinto ezinqwenelekayo zehlabathi nenzaliseko yalo nokukholisa lowo uhlala emahlathini: Intsikelelo mayibe entlokweni kaYosefu nasentlokweni yalowo wahlukanisiweyo naye abazalwana.
Deuteronomy33:17 Eyamazibulo inkunzi yakhe, ubungangamsha bayo, neempondo zayo zinjengeempondo zenqu; ngoko ke uya kubatyhala abantu kude kuse eziphelweni zehlabathi; yaye bangamawaka alishumi akwaEfrayim, yaye bangamawaka akwaManase."
Deuteronomy33:18 Ngokusingisele kuZebhulon wathi, Yiba nemihlali, Zebhulon, ngenxa yokumka kwakho; noIsakare ezintenteni zakho."
Deuteronomy33:19 Baya kubizela entabeni iintlanga; baya kubingelela khona imibingelelo yobulungisa; ngokuba besanya ubutyebi baselwandle nobuncwane obufihliweyo entlabathini.
Deuteronomy33:20 NgoGadi wathi, Makabongwe owandisa uGadi; uhleli njengengonyama, esolula isandla sakhe elukakayini lwentloko yakhe."
Deuteronomy33:21 Wazinyulela isahlulo esiyingqalo; ngokuba besihleli khona isabelo sommisi-mthetho; Wabazisa iintloko zabantu, wenza ubulungisa bukaYehova, namasiko akhe kwaSirayeli."
Deuteronomy33:22 Wathi yena uDan, uDan yingonyama; uya kubonakala eBhashan."
Deuteronomy33:23 Wathi yena uNafetali, Nafetali, yaneliseke yintsikelelo kaYehova; owasentshona nomzantsi."
Deuteronomy33:24 Wathi uAshere, Usikelelwe ngoonyana uAshere; Makamkeleke kubazalwana bakhe, athi nkxu unyawo lwakhe eolini."
Deuteronomy33:25 Iimbadada zakho mazibe yintsimbi nobhedu; kube njengemihla yakho ukuqina kwakho.
Deuteronomy33:26 Akukho unjengoThixo, Yeshurun, unyuka emazulwini ukuba ancede, Nokuphakama kwakhe emazulwini."
Deuteronomy33:27 Likhaya uThixo wamandulo, Ngaphantsi ziingalo ezingunaphakade; wolugxotha utshaba phambi kwenu; bathi, Batshabalalise."
Deuteronomy33:28 uSirayeli uya kuhlala yedwa ekonwabayo; Iqula likaYakobi liya kuba sezweni lengqolowa nelewayini; nesibhakabhaka sakhe siya kuwisa umbethe.
Deuteronomy33:29 Unoyolo, Sirayeli, onjengawe, luhlanga oluhlawulelweyo nguYehova, Ikhaka loncedo lwakho, Ikrele lobukhulu bakho zofunyanwa zixoka kuni iintshaba zenu; yaye uya kuzinyathela iindawo zabo eziphakamileyo."
Deuteronomy34:1 uMoses wazishiya iintlango zakwaMowabhi, wenyuka waya entabeni yeNebho, esangweni lePisga, malungana neYeriko. uYehova wambonisa lonke ilizwe laseGiliyadi, kwesa kwaDan;"
Deuteronomy34:2 nelakwaNafetali lonke, nelizwe lakwaEfrayim, nelakwaManase, nelizwe lonke lakwaYuda, kwesa elwandle nganeno kwayo;"
Deuteronomy34:3 nelizwe lasezantsi, nentlango yaseYeriko, umzi wamasundu, lesa eTsohare."
Deuteronomy34:4 Wathi uYehova kuye, Lilo eli ilizwe endafunga ngalo kooAbraham noIsake noYakobi, ndathi, Ndiya kulinika imbewu yakho; Ndikubonise ngamehlo akho, kodwa ungahambi. Pha."
Deuteronomy34:5 Wafela khona uMoses, umkhonzi kaYehova, ezweni lakwaMowabhi, ngokwelizwi likaYehova."
Deuteronomy34:6 Wamngcwabela emfuleni wakwaMowabhi, ngaseBhete-pehore, engaziwa bani ingcwaba lakhe unanamhla."
Deuteronomy34:7 uMoses ubeminyaka ilikhulu elinamanci mabini ezelwe, ukufa kwakhe; Laye lingasenalurhatyazo iliso lakhe, engekabi nawo amandla emvelo."
Deuteronomy34:8 Oonyana bakaSirayeli bamlilela uMoses ezinkqantosini zakwaMowabhi iintsuku ezimashumi mathathu; zaphela ke iintsuku zokulila nokumzilela uMoses.
Deuteronomy34:9 Waza uYoshuwa, unyana kaNun, wazala ngumoya wobulumko; ngokuba uMoses wabeka izandla phezu kwakhe; Bamthobela oonyana bakaSirayeli, benza njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses."
Deuteronomy34:10 Ukususela ngelo xesha akuzange kubonakale mprofeti unjengoMoses kwaSirayeli, ubemazi uYehova bekhangelene ebusweni;"
Deuteronomy34:11 nemiqondiso yonke, nezimanga, awamthumayo uYehova ukuba azenze ezweni laseYiputa kuFaro, nakubakhonzi bakhe bonke, nakwilizwe lakhe lonke;"
Deuteronomy34:12 nangaso sonke eso sandla sithe nkqi, nako konke ukoyika okukhulu awakwenzayo uMoses emehlweni oonyana bakaSirayeli bonke."
Joshua1:1 Kwathi, akufa uMoses umkhonzi kaYehova, wathetha uYehova kuYoshuwa unyana kaNun, umkhonzi kaMoses, esithi,"
Joshua1:2 uMoses umkhonzi wam ufile; Suka kaloku, uyiwele iYordan le, wena naba bantu bonke, ningene ezweni endilinika oonyana bakaSirayeli;"
Joshua1:3 Iindawo zonke eziya kunyathela kuyo intende yonyawo lwenu, ndininikile, njengoko ndathethayo kuMoses."
Joshua1:4 Ukususela entlango le Lebhanon kuse kumlambo omkhulu, uMlambo umEfrate, lonke ilizwe lamaHeti, ukuya kufikelela kuLwandle Olukhulu ekutshoneni kwelanga, iya kuba ngumda wenu."
Joshua1:5 Akukho mntu uya kuma phambi kwakho yonke imihla yokudla kwakho ubomi; ndiya kuba nawe, njengokuba bendinoMoses; Andisoze ndikushiye okanye ndikufulathele."
Joshua1:6 Yomelela ukhaliphe, ngenxa yokuba olu hlanga uya kulunika ilizwe endathembisa ookhokho balo ngesifungo sokuba ndiya kubanika lona njengelifa."
Joshua1:7 Kodwa ke zomelela, ukhaliphe kunene, ukuze wenze ngokomyalelo wonke, awawisa umthetho ngawo uMoses umkhonzi wam, ungatyeki kuwo, uye ekunene nasekhohlo, ukuze ube ngengqiqo apho sukuba usiya khona."
Joshua1:8 Ize ingesuki incwadi yomyalelo emlonyeni wakho; uze ucinge ngayo imini nobusuku, ukuze wenze ngenyameko, njengoko kubhaliweyo kuyo;"
Joshua1:9 Andikuyalelanga na? Yomelela ukhaliphe; musa ukoyika, musa ukoyika, ngokuba uYehova uThixo wakho unawe, naphi na apho sukuba usiya khona."
Joshua1:10 uYoshuwa wabayalela abalindi abantu, wathi:"
Joshua1:11 Khandlula amatyala, nibawisele umthetho abantu, nithi, Zilungiseni ukudla; kuba emva kweentsuku ezintathu niya kuyiwela le Yordan nisiya kulidla ilifa ilizwe elo uYehova uThixo wenu aya kuninika lona ukuba libe lelenu."
Joshua1:12 Wathetha uYoshuwa kumaRubhen, amaGadi, nakwisiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase, wathi:"
Joshua1:13 Likhumbuleni ilizwi awaniwisela umthetho ngalo uMoses, umkhonzi kaYehova, esithi, uYehova uThixo wenu uniphumzile, uninikile eli lizwe."
Joshua1:14 Abafazi benu, nabantwana benu, nemfuyo yenu, bohlala ezweni aninika lona uMoses nganeno kweYordan; sukani ke nikhawuleze nixhobe, niye kubazalwana benu, onke amagorha anobukroti, nibancede;"
Joshua1:15 ade uYehova abaphumze abazalwana benu, njengoko aninikileyo nina, balihluthe nabo ilizwe elo abanika lona uYehova uThixo wenu; nandule ke nibuyele ezweni lelifa lenu, nidle oko waninika kona uMoses umkhonzi kaYehova nganeno kweYordan ekuphumeni kwelanga."
Joshua1:16 Bamphendula uYoshuwa, bathi, Yonke into osiyalele yona soyenza; naphi na apho usithumele khona, siya kuya."
Joshua1:17 Ngako konke esamphulaphulayo uMoses, siya kukuphulaphula nawe kwanjengoko; uYehova uThixo wakho yedwa makabe nawe, njengokuba wayenoMoses."
Joshua1:18 Bonke abasukuba begwilika kumyalelo wakho, bangawaphulaphuli amazwi akho, kuyo yonke into omwisele umthetho ngayo, bobulawa; yiba nje womelele uze ukhaliphe."
Joshua2:1 uYoshuwa unyana kaNun wesusa amadoda amabini aziintlola, wathi ngasese, Hambani niye kulikhangela ilizwe laseYeriko. Ahamba ke afika endlwini yehenyukazi eligama linguRahabhi, ahlala khona."
Joshua2:2 Waxelelwa ukumkani waseYeriko, kwathiwa, Yabonani, kufike apha amadoda akoonyana bakaSirayeli ngobu busuku, eza kulihlola ilizwe."
Joshua2:3 Wathumela ukumkani waseYeriko kuRahabhi, esithi, Wakhuphe amadoda afikileyo kuwe, angenileyo endlwini yakho; ngokuba eze kuhlola ihlabathi lonke."
Joshua2:4 Yawathabatha inkazana loo madoda omabini, yawafihla, isithi, Bekukho amadoda abesiza kum, phofu bendingawazi apho abevela khona."
Joshua2:5 Lakuba livaliwe isango, kwakuba mnyama, aphuma amadoda; Bendingazi ukuba aye phi na loo madoda; ngokuba uya kufikelela kubo."
Joshua2:6 Wawazisa eluphahleni lwendlu, wawafihla phezu kweendiza zeflakisi, abezilungelelanisile eluphahleni."
Joshua2:7 Awasukela loo madoda ngendlela yaseYordan, esa emdeni; baphuma ke abo basukelayo, balivala isango."
Joshua2:8 Ngaphambi kokuba baye kulala, wenyuka waya kubabona phezu kwendlu."
Joshua2:9 Wathi kuloo madoda, Ndiyazi ukuba uYehova uninikile eli lizwe, nokuba ukulinda kwenu kube phezu kwethu, nokuba bafa bonke abemi belizwe ngenxa yenu."
Joshua2:10 Kuba sivile ukuba iNkosi yanitshisela amanzi olwandle lwaseGalili ekuphumeni kwenu eYiputa; noko nakwenzayo kookumkani ababini bama-Amori, ababephesheya kweYordan, uSihon no-Ogi, enabaqalekisayo."
Joshua2:11 Sithe ke sakuziva ezi zinto, zanyibilika iintliziyo zethu, akwabakho kuqina kwamxhelo mntwini ngenxa yenu; ngokuba uYehova uThixo wenu nguye uThixo emazulwini phezulu, nasehlabathini phantsi apha."
Joshua2:12 Ndifungeleni ke uYehova, ekubeni ndinenzele inceba, ukuba nani niya kuyenzela inceba indlu kabawo nindinike umqondiso wenyaniso;"
Joshua2:13 nokuba usindise ubawo noma, nabantakwethu, neento zonke abanazo, usisindise ekufeni."
Joshua2:14 Athi kuye loo madoda, Siphila ngawe, ukuba anithanga nisixele. Yaye ukuba uYehova usinike eli lizwe, siya kunikhonza ngobubele nangokunyaniseka."
Joshua2:15 Wabahlisa ke ngefestile ngentsontelo, ngokuba indlu yakhe yayingaseludongeni lomzi, ibe yena ehleli eludongeni."
Joshua2:16 Wathi kubo, Hambani niye entabeni, banganihlanganisi abanitshutshisayo; zimele apho iintsuku ezintathu, bade babuye abo banisukelayo; kwaye emva koko ungahamba."
Joshua2:17 Athi loo madoda kuye, Asinatyala thina ngesi sifungo sakho osifungise kuthi."
Joshua2:18 Uyabona, sakungena kweli lizwe, ubophe le ntsontelo ibomvu efestileni obusihlise ngayo; ngenisa uyihlo nonyoko nabantakwenu nosapho lwakho lonke ekhaya eya kuwe."
Joshua2:19 Osukuba ephuma emnyango wendlu yakho, esiya phandle, igazi lakhe loba phezu kwentloko yakhe, sibe msulwa thina; osukuba ekuwe endlwini, igazi lakhe malibe phezu kwentloko yethu, ukuba kuthe kwasiwa sandla kuye."
Joshua2:20 Ukuba uthe wasixelela ngale nto, sokhululeka esifungweni sakho owasifungayo."
Joshua2:21 Wathi yena, Kungokwamazwi enu. Wabandulula ke bemka; waza wabophelela umtya obomvu efestileni."
Joshua2:22 Ahamba ke aya entabeni, ahlala khona iintsuku zantathu, bada babuya abo bawasukelayo; baza abatshutshisi babafuna endleleni yonke, ababafumana."
Joshua2:23 Abuya amadoda lawo omabini, ehla entabeni, awela, afika kuYoshuwa unyana kaNun, amxelela yonke into eyenzeka kuwo."
Joshua2:24 Athi kuYoshuwa: “Okunene, uYehova ulinikele esandleni sethu lonke ilizwe elo; ngokuba bathe ngenxa yethu bonke abemi behlabathi."
Joshua3:1 Wavuka kusasa uYoshuwa; Banduluka eShitim, bafika eYordan, yena noonyana bonke bakaSirayeli, balalisa khona ubusuku ngaphambi kokuba banduluke."
Joshua3:2 Emva kweentsuku ezintathu abathetheli behamba phakathi komkhosi;
Joshua3:3 babawisela abantu umthetho, besithi, Xa nithe nayibona ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova uThixo wenu, nababingeleli abangabaLevi beyithwele, nophumani endaweni yenu, niyilandele."
Joshua3:4 Kodwa makubekho ithuba phakathi kwakho naye, elingathi ngamawaka amabini eekubhite ngokomlinganiso; musani ukusondela kuyo, ukuze uyazi indlela oya kuhamba ngayo;"
Joshua3:5 Wathi uYoshuwa ebantwini, Zihlambululeni, ngokuba ngengomso uYehova uya kwenza imisebenzi ebalulekileyo phakathi kwenu."
Joshua3:6 Wathi uYoshuwa kubabingeleli, Thwalani ityeya yomnqophiso, nihambe phambi kwabantu; Bayithabatha ityeya yomnqophiso, baphuma, bekhokela abantu."
Joshua3:7 Wathi uYehova kuYoshuwa, Namhlanje ndiya kuqala ukukwenza mkhulu emehlweni oonyana bakaSirayeli bonke, bazi ukuba ndiya kuba nawe, njengokuba ndibe ndinoMoses."
Joshua3:8 Bawisele umthetho ababingeleli abathwele ityeya yomnqophiso, uthi, Xa nithe nafika emdeni wamanzi aseYordan, nime eYordan;"
Joshua3:9 Wathi uYoshuwa koonyana bakaSirayeli, Sondelani apha, nive amazwi kaYehova uThixo wenu."
Joshua3:10 Wathi uYoshuwa, Niya kwazi ke ukuba uThixo ophilileyo uphakathi kwenu, uya kuwagqogqa phambi kwenu amaKanan, namaHeti, namaHeti, namaPerizi, namaGirgashi, nama-Amori, phambi kwenu, namaYebhusi."
Joshua3:11 Yabonani, ityeya yomnqophiso weNkosi yehlabathi lonke inisa eYordan;"
Joshua3:12 Zithabatheleni ke amadoda abe lishumi elinamabini kuzo izizwe zakwaSirayeli, indoda ibe nye esizweni."
Joshua3:13 Kuthe ke, xeshikweni iintende zeenyawo zababingeleli abathwele ityeya kaYehova, iNkosi yehlabathi, zithe zafika emanzini aseYordan, avingca amanzi eYordan ngamanzi aphuma phezulu; baya kuma phezu kwemfumba."
Joshua3:14 Baphuma ke abantu ezintenteni zabo, ukuba bawele iYordan, nababingeleli abathwele ityeya yomnqophiso babakhokela abantu;"
Joshua3:15 Kwathi, ekufikeni kwabathwali betyeya eYordan, zantywiliselwa iinyawo zababingeleli abathwele ityeya elunxwemeni lwamanzi; ngokuba iYordan ibiwela zonke iindonga zayo, ngexesha lokuvuna."
Joshua3:16 Ema amanzi avela phezulu, aba yimfumba, kude nomzi ka-Adam, okufuphi neSaretan, ehla elwandle lwentlango, uLwandle lweTyuwa, aphela, atshabalala bawela abantu eYeriko."
Joshua3:17 Ababingeleli abathwele ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova bema ngokuqinileyo emhlabeni owomileyo phakathi kweYordan, yaye onke amaSirayeli awela kumhlaba owomileyo de lonke uhlanga luwele iYordan lucocekile."
Joshua4:1 Bahlambuluka ke bonke abantu eYordan, wathetha uYehova kuYoshuwa, wathi,"
Joshua4:2 Zithabatheleni ebantwini amadoda abe lishumi elinamabini, indoda ibe nye esizweni."
Joshua4:3 Wabawisela umthetho, wathi, Thabathani apha phakathi kweYordan, apho zazimi khona iinyawo zababingeleli, amatye alishumi elinamabini, niwathuthuzele, niwashiye apho nilala khona iyakuhlala ngokuhlwanje."
Joshua4:4 Wawabiza uYoshuwa amadoda alishumi elinamabini, abewamisile koonyana bakaSirayeli, indoda yanye esizweni."
Joshua4:5 Wathi uYoshuwa kubo, Hambani ngokukhawuleza niye etyeya kaYehova uThixo wenu, ningene eYordan phakathi, nithabathe elowo ilitye egxalabeni lakhe, ngokwenani lezizukulwana zoonyana bakaSirayeli;"
Joshua4:6 kube ngumqondiso phakathi kwenu, xa bathe oonyana benu babuza kooyise ngexesha elizayo, bathi, Ayintoni na la matye?"
Joshua4:7 Baphenduleni, nithi, Amanzi eYordan avingcelwa phambi kwetyeya yomnqophiso kaYehova; ekuweleni kwayo iYordan, anqamka amanzi aseYordan, abe sisikhumbuzo saloo matye koonyana bakaSirayeli ngonaphakade."
Joshua4:8 Oonyana bakaSirayeli benza njengoko uYoshuwa wabawisela umthetho ngako, bathabatha amatye alishumi elinamabini eYordan phakathi, njengoko uYehova wathethayo kuYoshuwa, ngenani lezizwe zoonyana bakaSirayeli, bawasa ezweni lakwaSirayeli balala khona, balala khona."
Joshua4:9 uYoshuwa wawamisa amatye alishumi elinamabini eYordan phakathi, apho zazimi khona iinyawo zababingeleli abathwele ityeya yomnqophiso; aselapho unanamhla."
Joshua4:10 Ababingeleli ababethwele ityeya bema phakathi eYordan de yagqitywa yonke into uYehova awayiyalela uYoshuwa ukuba ayithethe ebantwini, kanye njengoko uMoses wamyalelayo uYoshuwa; badlula ngokukhawuleza abantu."
Joshua4:11 Bahlambuluka bonke abantu, yadlula ityeya kaYehova nababingeleli phambi kwabantu."
Joshua4:12 Bawela oonyana bakaRubhen, noonyana bakaGadi, nesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase, bexhobile, phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli, njengoko wathethayo kubo uMoses."
Joshua4:13 Ngathi babengamashumi amane amawaka axhobele imfazwe, abawelayo phambi koYehova, baye kulwa ezinkqantosini zaseYeriko."
Joshua4:14 Ngaloo mini uYehova wamvelisa uYoshuwa emehlweni amaSirayeli onke; yaye bamoyika kanye njengoko babemoyika uMoses yonke imihla yobomi bakhe.
Joshua4:15 Wathetha uYehova kuYoshuwa, wathi:"
Joshua4:16 Bawisele umthetho ababingeleli abathwele ityeya yesingqino, ukuba baphume eYordan;"
Joshua4:17 uYoshuwa wabawisela umthetho ababingeleli, wathi, Nyukani niphume eYordan."
Joshua4:18 Ekunyukeni kwawo eYordan ababingeleli ababethwele ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova, nokunyuka kweenyawo zababingeleli baya emhlabeni owomileyo, abuyela endaweni yawo amanzi aseYordan, ahamba phezu kwelizwe lonke iindonga zayo, njengoko benza ngako."
Joshua4:19 Banduluka abantu eYordan ngomhla weshumi wenyanga yokuqala, bamisa iintente eGiligali, engasempumalanga yeYeriko."
Joshua4:20 Amatye alishumi elinamabini abawathabatha eYordan, uYoshuwa wawamisa eGiligali."
Joshua4:21 Wathetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, wathi, Xa bathe oonyana benu babuza kooyise ngexesha elizayo, bathi, Ayintoni na la matye?"
Joshua4:22 Nize nibaxelele oonyana benu, nithi, Oonyana bakaSirayeli bayiwela le Yordan, behamba emhlabeni owomileyo."
Joshua4:23 Kuba uYehova uThixo wenu wawafudumeza amanzi aseYordan phambi kwenu nada nawela, kanye njengoko wenzayo uYehova uThixo wenu ngoLwandle lweSikhephe awalufudumeza phambi kwethu sada sawela;"
Joshua4:24 ukuze zonke izizwe zehlabathi zisazi isandla sikaYehova ukuba somelele, ukuze zimoyike uYehova uThixo wazo ngonaphakade."
Joshua5:1 Kwathi, beva bonke ookumkani bama-Amori, ababephesheya kweYordan ngasentshonalanga, nookumkani bonke bamaKanan, ababengaselwandle, ukuba uYehova wawapheka kuqala amanzi aseYordan sada sacanda oonyana bakaSirayeli, zanyibilika iintliziyo zabo, akaba sabakho kubo umoya wabo ngenxa yoonyana bakaSirayeli."
Joshua5:2 Ngelo xesha wathi uYehova kuYoshuwa, Zenzele iintshengece, uphinde ubaluse oonyana bakaSirayeli okwesibini."
Joshua5:3 Wazenzela uYoshuwa iintshengece, wabalusa oonyana bakaSirayeli endulini yezintsu."
Joshua5:4 Nasi isizathu sokuba uYoshuwa abaluse: Bonke abantu abaphuma eYiputa, amadoda, ewe, onke amadoda okulwa, afela entlango endleleni, ekuphumeni kwawo eYiputa."
Joshua5:5 Baqalekiswa bonke abantu abaphumayo; Ke bonke abantu abazalelwe entlango endleleni ephuma eYiputa babengalukanga.
Joshua5:6 Bahamba oonyana bakaSirayeli entlango iminyaka emashumi mane, ada atshabalala onke amadoda okulwa aphuma eYiputa, ngokuba engaliphulaphulanga ilizwi likaYehova; awabafungelayo uYehova ukuba akayi kubakho babonise ilizwe elo uYehova walithembisa ooyise ngesifungo, ukuba wosinika lona, ilizwe elibaleka amasi neenyosi."
Joshua5:7 Kwaabantwana wabavusileyo endaweni yabo, ngabo abamalusayo uYoshuwa, ngokuba bemathile, ngokuba bengabalusanga endleleni."
Joshua5:8 Bakuba belugqibile ukulwalusa uhlanga lonke, bahlala ezintenteni zabo, bada baphola."
Joshua5:9 Wathi uYehova kuYoshuwa, Namhla ndilisusile ihlazo leYiputa kuwe; ngenxa yoko kwathiwa igama laloo ndawo yiGiligali, unanamhla."
Joshua5:10 Bamisa iintente oonyana bakaSirayeli eGiligali, benza ipasika ngomhla weshumi elinesine wenyanga, lakutshona ilanga, ezinkqantosini zaseYeriko."
Joshua5:11 Ngengomso emva kwepasika yengqolowa yelizwe, badla izonka ezingenagwele nengqolowa egcadiweyo, kwangaloo mini."
Joshua5:12 Yaphela imana ngengomso, xa badla ingqolowa yelizwe; bangabi saba nemana oonyana bakaSirayeli; badla iziqhamo zelizwe lakwaKanan ngaloo mnyaka."
Joshua5:13 Xa uYoshuwa wayeseYeriko wawaphakamisa amehlo akhe, wakhangela, wabona indoda imi malunga naye, ithe rhuthu ikrele layo ngesandla; Waya kuyo uYoshuwa, wathi kuyo, Ungakuthi, ungakuthi, kusini na?"
Joshua5:14 Wathi, Hayi; kodwa ngoku ingumthetheli wenkundla kaYehova. Wawa uYoshuwa ngobuso bakhe, waqubuda, wathi kuyo, Ithetha ntoni na inkosi yam kumkhonzi wayo?"
Joshua5:15 Wathi umthetheli womkhosi kaYehova kuYoshuwa, Khulula iimbadada zakho; ngokuba indawo leyo umi kuyo ingcwele. Wenjenjalo uYoshuwa."
Joshua6:1 Wavalwa ke umzi waseYeriko ngenxa yoonyana bakaSirayeli; akwaphuma mntu, kungangeni mntu."
Joshua6:2 Wathi uYehova kuYoshuwa, Yabona, ndiyinikela esandleni sakho iYeriko, nokumkani wayo, namagorha anobukroti."
Joshua6:3 Wujikelezeni umzi, nonke nina madoda okulwa, niwujikeleze umzi kube kanye; Uya kwenjenjalo ngeentsuku ezintandathu."
Joshua6:4 Ke isixhenxe sababingeleli sothabatha iimpondo ezisixhenxe zenkunzi yegusha, phambi kwetyeya; ngomhla wesixhenxe nijikeleze isixeko izihlandlo ezisixhenxe, yaye ababingeleli bamele bavuthele izigodlo zeenkunzi zeegusha."
Joshua6:5 Ekuvuthelweni kwesigodlo ixesha elide, nasekuveni isandi sesigodlo, baduma bonke abantu, baduma; kwaye udonga lwesixeko luya kuwa, kwaye abantu baya kunyuka, ngamnye amkhokela."
Joshua6:6 uYoshuwa, unyana kaNun, wababiza ababingeleli, wathi kubo, Thwalani ityeya yomnqophiso, ababingeleli abasixhenxe bathabathe iimpondo ezisixhenxe zenkunzi yegusha, baqhube ityeya kaYehova."
Joshua6:7 Wathi ebantwini, Yiyani, niwungenele umzi, abaxhobileyo bagqithe ngokukhawuleza etyeyeni kaYehova."
Joshua6:8 Xa uYoshuwa wayethetha nabantu, ababingeleli abasixhenxe abaphethe izigodlo ezisixhenxe zenkunzi yegusha bahamba phambi koYehova, bevuthela izigodlo, yaye ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova yabalandela."
Joshua6:9 Abaxhobileyo babakhokela ababingeleli abaquphayo ukuvuthela ngezigodlo, umvuzo ulandela ityeya, ababingeleli baqupha ukuvuthela ngezigodlo."
Joshua6:10 uYoshuwa wabawisela umthetho abantu, wathi, Musani ukuduma, ningawaphithi amazwi enu, ningaphumi lizwi emlonyeni wenu, ide ibe yimini endiniwisela umthetho ngayo ukuba nimbulale ukumkani; ngoko kufuneka ukhwaze."
Joshua6:11 Yawujikeleza ke ityeya kaYehova umzi, yafika kwaba kanye kuwo; bangena eminqubeni, balala phakathi kweminquba;"
Joshua6:12 uYoshuwa wavuka kusasa ngengomso, bayithwala ababingeleli ityeya kaYehova."
Joshua6:13 Ababingeleli abasixhenxe ababethwele iimpondo ezisixhenxe zeenkunzi zeegusha phambi kwetyeya kaYehova badlula baza bavuthela izigodlo; zikhokelwa ngamagorha; kodwa umvuzo waba ngasemva kwetyeya kaYehova, ekuqhubekeni kwababingeleli ukuvuthela ngezigodlo zokuvuthela."
Joshua6:14 Ngomhla wesibini bawujikeleza umzi kanye, babuyela eminqubeni; benjenjalo iintsuku zantandathu."
Joshua6:15 Bavuka kusasa ngengomso, bawujikeleza umzi kwangolo hlobo izihlandlo zasixhenxe; kodwa ngaloo mini basijikeleza isixeko izihlandlo ezisixhenxe."
Joshua6:16 Kwathi ngesihlandlo sesixhenxe ababingeleli bavuthela izigodlo, waza uYoshuwa wathi ebantwini: “Khwazani! ngokuba uYehova uninikile umzi."
Joshua6:17 Isixeko siya kuba sisiqalekiso kuYehova, sona nento yonke ekuso; kuphela nguRahabhi ihenyukazi yedwa owodla ubomi, yena nento yonke ekuye endlwini yakhe; ngokuba wabazimezayo abathunywa esabathumayo."
