Joshua6:18 Noko ke, zigcineni kwizinto ezalelweyo, ukuze ningaqalekiswa ngokwenu ukuba nithe nazamkela ezinye zezinto ezalelweyo, nenza inkampu kaSirayeli yaba yinto esingelwe phantsi, ibe isuka yabaqalekisa."
Joshua6:19 Ke yona isilivere, negolide, neempahla zobhedu, nezesinyithi, zinyulelwe uYehova; iya kungena ebuncwaneni bukaYehova."
Joshua6:20 Baduma ke abantu, ababingeleli ukuvuthela ngezigodlo baqupha; bakuva abantu isandi sesigodlo, baduma abantu ngodumo olukhulu, lwawa udonga, benyuka abantu bangena esixekweni, elowo ecaleni lakhe, wasithimba isixeko."
Joshua6:21 Ababulala ngobushushu bekrele bonke ababekuloo mzi, amadoda nabafazi, abaselula nabadala, neenkomo, neegusha, namaesile."
Joshua6:22 Wathi uYoshuwa kumadoda amabini abelihlolile ilizwe, Ngenani endlwini yehenyukazi, niyikhuphe loo nkazana nayo yonke impahla yayo, njengoko nayifungelayo;"
Joshua6:23 Abengenile ke amadodana aziintlola, amthabatha uRahabhi, noyise, nonina, nabanakwabo, nabo bonke abenabo; yaye bazikhupha zonke izizwe zakhe baza bazishiya ngaphandle kwenkampu yakwaSirayeli."
Joshua6:24 Bawutshisa umzi ngomlilo, neento zonke eziluwo; ngaphandle kwesilivere, negolide, nezinto zobhedu, nezesinyithi, zazibeka ebuncwaneni bendlu kaYehova."
Joshua6:25 uYoshuwa wamsindisa uRahabhi, ihenyukazi, nendlu kayise, nabo bonke abenabo; wahlala kwaSirayeli unanamhla; ngokuba ubebazime abathunywa, abebathumile uYoshuwa ukuba baye kuhlola iYeriko."
Joshua6:26 Wawaqalekisa uYoshuwa ngelo xesha, esithi, Uqalekisiwe phambi koYehova umntu oya kusuka awakhe lo mzi, iYeriko le; wowuseka ngowamazibulo akhe, unyana wakhe omncinane awamise amasango ayo."
Joshua6:27 uYehova waba noYoshuwa; udumo lwakhe lwaphuma ehlabathini lonke.
Joshua7:1 Baxhuma oonyana bakaSirayeli ebuncwaneni; ngokuba uAkan, unyana kaKarmi, unyana kaSabhedi, unyana kaSeraki, wesizwe sakwaYuda, wathimba elinye ixhoba, wavutha ke umsindo kaYehova koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Joshua7:2 uYoshuwa wasusa amadoda eYeriko ukuba aye eAyi, malungana neBhete-aven, ngasempumalanga eBheteli, wathi kuwo, Nyukani nilihlole ilizwe. Enyuka amadoda lawo, ayikhangela eAyi."
Joshua7:3 Abuyela kuYoshuwa, athi kuye, Musa ukuluvumela lunyuke lonke uhlanga; kodwa amadoda angamawaka amabini, okanye amathathu, ahlasela ayoyise iAyi; akuyi kusebenza bonke abantu khona; ngokuba bambalwa."
Joshua7:4 Kwenyuka ke kwaya khona amadoda amalunga namawaka amathathu, asaba phambi kwamadoda aseAyi."
Joshua7:5 Amadoda aseAyi abulala kuwo, amalunga namashumi amathathu anantandathu, ngokuba awasukelayo, esuka phambi kwesango, esa eSebharim, awabulala esisekweni; zanyibilika iintliziyo zabantu, zaba njengamanzi."
Joshua7:6 uYoshuwa wazikrazula iingubo zakhe, wawa ngobuso bakhe phambi kwetyeya kaYehova kwada kwahlwa, yena namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, bazigqubuthela ngothuli iintloko zabo."
Joshua7:7 Wathi uYoshuwa, Camagu, Nkosi yam, Yehova, yini na ukuba ubathuthuzele aba bantu eYordan, usinikele esandleni sama-Amori, asitshabalalise? Ukuba nje uThixo ebekholisiwe sithi, ngesa sahlala phesheya kweYordan!"
Joshua7:8 Owu, Yehova, ndothini na xa amaSirayeli ezinikele ikhosi iintshaba zawo!"
Joshua7:9 Ngokuba aya kuva amaKanan, nabemi bonke behlabathi, asinyelise, alicime igama lethu ehlabathini; Wenze ntoni na ngegama lakho elikhulu?"
Joshua7:10 Wathi uYehova kuYoshuwa, Suk’ ume; yini na ukuba ulale okobuso nje?"
Joshua7:11 Ona oonyana bakaSirayeli, bawaphula umnqophiso wam endawawisela umthetho ngawo; kuba bade bathabatha enye yempahla yebhanki kananjalo beba baza bagrogrisa kwakhona, baza bayibeka phakathi kwempahla yabo."
Joshua7:12 Ngoko oonyana bakaSirayeli ababanga nakuma phambi kweentshaba zabo, kodwa bazinikela umva iintshaba zabo, ngenxa yokuba babeqalekisiwe; andisayi kuba nawe, ukuba anithanga nitshabalalise isiqalekiso phakathi kwenu."
Joshua7:13 Vuka, ubangcwalise abantu, uthi, Zihlambululeni ngomso; ngokuba utsho uYehova uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Kukho nto isiqalekiso phakathi kwakho, Sirayeli; Aniyi kuma phambi kweentshaba zenu nide nizisuse abaqalekisiweyo phakathi kwenu."
Joshua7:14 Ke ngoko, niya kuziswa ngomso ngokwezizukulwana zenu; yaye isizukulwana uYehova akholiswayo ngaso siya kuza kwizizukulwana zakhe; yaye isizukulwana esamkelekileyo kuYehova siya kuza ngokweentsapho; nendlu aya kuyithabatha uYehova, yophuma ngomntu."
Joshua7:15 Lowo uthinjiweyo nempahla yakhe uya kutshiswa ngomlilo, yena nayo yonke into anayo, ngenxa yokuba uwaphule umnqophiso kaYehova nangenxa yokuba wenze ngobudenge kwaSirayeli."
Joshua7:16 Wavuka kusasa uYoshuwa, wabasondeza oonyana bakaSirayeli ngokwezizwe zabo; ekunyulweni kwesizwe sakwaYuda."
Joshua7:17 Wasisondeza isizwe sakwaYuda; wathabatha umzi kaSarge; wasisondeza isizwe sikaBhasargi ngokwaso; noSabdi wabanjwa.
Joshua7:18 Wasondela elowo endlwini yakhe; kwakhethwa uAkan, unyana kaKarmi, unyana kaSabhedi, unyana kaSeraki, wesizwe sakwaYuda;"
Joshua7:19 Wathi uYoshuwa kuAkan, Nyana wam, mzukise uYehova uThixo kaSirayeli, umdumise; khawundixelele into oyenzileyo; musa ukundifihlela."
Joshua7:20 uAkan wamphendula uYoshuwa, wathi, Okunene ndonile kuYehova uThixo kaSirayeli, ndenze le nto naleya:"
Joshua7:21 ndabona exhobeni ingubo enkulu entle yaseBhabheli, namakhulu amabini eeshekele zesilivere, nejikazi lekhonkco legolide, liziishekele ezimashumi mahlanu ubunzima balo; nanzo zifunyenwe emhlabeni, phakathi emqolombeni wam, isilivere ingaphantsi."
Joshua7:22 Wathuma uYoshuwa abathunywa, wagidima waya ententeni; nanzo zimbelwe ententeni yakhe, isilivere ingaphantsi."
Joshua7:23 Bayithabatha ententeni, bayisa kuYoshuwa, nakoonyana bakaSirayeli bonke, bayibeka phambi koYehova."
Joshua7:24 uYoshuwa enamaSirayeli onke, wamthabatha uAkan, unyana kaSeraki, nesilivere, nengubo yokwaleka, nesacholo segolide, noonyana bakhe, neentombi zakhe, neenkomo zakhe, namaesile akhe, nempahla yakhe emfutshane, nentente yakhe, neentombi zakhe zonke ukuba unayo bayisa entilini yeAgore."
Joshua7:25 Wathi uYoshuwa, Yini na ukuba undoyikise? uYehova uya kukoyikisa namhlanje. Onke amaSirayeli amgibisela ngamatye, azitshisa ezo nto ngokubaxuluba ngamatye."
Joshua7:26 Bamfumba phezu kwakhe imfumba enkulu yamatye, unanamhla. Wabuya ke uYehova ekuvutheni komsindo wakhe. Ngenxa yoko, loo ndawo yabizwa ngokuba nguMda weAgore, kude kube namhlanje."
Joshua8:1 Wathi uYehova kuYoshuwa, Musa ukoyika, musa ukoyika; thabatha onke amadoda okulwa, uyigqibe, unyuke uye eAyi; yabona, ndimnikela esandleni sakho ukumkani waseAyi, nabantu bakhe, nomzi wakhe, nelizwe lakhe;"
Joshua8:2 wenze kwiAyi nokumkani wayo njengoko wenza ngako kwiYeriko nokumkani wayo; kodwa noyithimba impahla yayo, neenkomo zayo; lalelani umzi ngasemva kwawo."
Joshua8:3 Wazilungiselela uYoshuwa namagorha onke okulwa eAyi; uYoshuwa wanyula amadoda angamakroti angamashumi amathathu amawaka, wawathuma ebusuku."
Joshua8:4 Wabawisela umthetho, wathi, Yabonani, nilele phantsi, nisidla umzi, nasemva komzi; musani ukuya kude nesixeko, kodwa wonke umntu makalungiselele."
Joshua8:5 Mna ke, nabantu bonke abakunye nam, siya kusondela esixekweni;"
Joshua8:6 (ngokuba osilandela wona), side siwatsalele ngaphandle komzi; kuba baya kuthi, Basaba phambi kwethu njengasekuqaleni; ke ngoko, siya kusaba kubo."
Joshua8:7 Ke kaloku yimani apho nilalele khona, nisithimbe isixeko, kuba uYehova uThixo wenu uya kusinikela esandleni senu."
Joshua8:8 Xa nithe nathabatha umzi, wutshiseni umzi ngomlilo; wenze ngokomyalelo kaYehova. Yabonani, ndiniwisele umthetho."
Joshua8:9 Wabathuma ke uYoshuwa, balalela, bahlala phakathi kweBheteli neAyi, ngasentshonalanga kweAyi; ke uYoshuwa walala phakathi kwabantu ngobo busuku."
Joshua8:10 Wagqiba uYoshuwa kwakusasa, wababala abantu, wenyuka, yena namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, wabakhokela abantu baya eAyi."
Joshua8:11 Benyuka ke bonke abantu bokulwa abenaye, basondela, beza phambi kwesixeko, bamisa iintente ngasentla kweAyi; ke intlambo phakathi kwabo neAyi."
Joshua8:12 Wathabatha amadoda ngathi angamawaka amahlanu, wawalalela phakathi kweBheteli neAyi, ngasentshonalanga komzi."
Joshua8:13 Banyula ke amadoda, impi yonke engasentla komzi, namaxoki angakwicala elingasentshonalanga yesixeko, wangena uYoshuwa entilini ngobo busuku."
Joshua8:14 Wakubona ukumkani waseAyi, wagqiba kwakusasa kwakusasa, aphuma amadoda aloo mzi, aya kulwa noonyana bakaSirayeli, yena nabantu bakhe bonke, ngexesha elimisiweyo ngaseArabha; kodwa wayengazi ukuba emva kwesixeko kwakukho abantu ababemlindile emva kwesixeko."
Joshua8:15 uYoshuwa nabo bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli bazenza ngathi boyisiwe phambi kwabo baza basaba ngendlela eya entlango.
Joshua8:16 Bonke abantu ababeseAyi bahlanganisana ukuba babasukele; bamsukela ke uYoshuwa, baphuma esixekweni."
Joshua8:17 Akwasala eAyi naseBheteli ongaphumanga ukubasukela amaSirayeli; bawushiya umzi uvulekile, basukela oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Joshua8:18 Wathi uYehova kuYoshuwa, Wolule umkhonto osesandleni sakho ngaseAyi; ngokuba ndiya kukunikela esandleni sakho. Wawolulela uYoshuwa umkhonto obusesandleni sakhe kuwo umzi."
Joshua8:19 Basuka abalaleli kamsinya endaweni yabo, bagidima asolula isandla sakhe; bangena esixekweni, bawuthimba, bangxama, basitshisa isixeko."
Joshua8:20 Ajika amadoda aseAyi, abona umsi womzi unyuka usiya ezulwini, akaba namandla okusaba ngapha nangapha abantu ababesabele entlango bakreqa kwabo babebasukela."
Joshua8:21 uYoshuwa nawo onke amaSirayeli babona ukuba abalaleli basithimbile isixeko yaye kunyuka umsi esixekweni, babuya bawabulala amadoda aseAyi."
Joshua8:22 Baphuma abasemzini, beza kubakhawulela; aba phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, abanye bengapha, abanye bengapha; yaye bawoyisa, apho abazange bashiye namnye kubo okanye abasindileyo."
Joshua8:23 Ambamba ukumkani waseAyi ephila, amzisa kuYoshuwa."
Joshua8:24 Akugqiba oonyana bakaSirayeli ukubabulala bonke abemi baseAyi ezweni, entlango apho babebasukele khona, bababulala bonke ngohlangothi lwekrele bada babhubha, abuyela eAyi onke amaSirayeli, ayinqoba ngohlangothi lwentshuntshe."
Joshua8:25 Kwathi ke, bonke abawayo ngaloo mini, amadoda nabafazi, baba lishumi elinamabini lamawaka, onke amadoda aseAyi."
Joshua8:26 Kuba uYoshuwa akazange asibuyise isandla sakhe awayewolule ngaso umkhonto wakhe, de wabatshabhisa bonke abemi baseAyi."
Joshua8:27 Kuphela yimfuyo nempahla yesixeko abathinjwa ngayo oonyana bakaSirayeli, ngokwelizwi likaYehova awaliyalelayo uYoshuwa."
Joshua8:28 uYoshuwa wayitshisa iAyi wayenza imfumba engapheliyo, yaba yintlango de kube namhla."
Joshua8:29 Ukumkani waseAyi wazixhoma emthini kwada kwahlwa; kwathi nje ukutshona kwelanga, uYoshuwa wayalela ukuba basihlise isidumbu sakhe emthini baze basiphose kumnyango wesango lesixeko baze bakhe imfumba enkulu yamatye phezu kwaso de kube namhla."
Joshua8:30 uYoshuwa wamakhela uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, isibingelelo, entabeni ye-Ebhali;"
Joshua8:31 Kanye njengoko uMoses umkhonzi kaYehova wabayalelayo oonyana bakaSirayeli, kanye njengoko kubhaliwe encwadini yomthetho kaMoses, isibingelelo samatye apheleleyo, ekungekho bani unokusiphakamisa nesinyithi; yaye phezu kwayo banikela iminikelo etshiswayo kuYehova, nemibingelelo yombulelo."
Joshua8:32 Wawubhala ematyeni umbhalo womyalelo kaMoses, abewubhala phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Joshua8:33 Onke oonyana bakaSirayeli, namadoda awo amakhulu, nabalungiseleli bawo, nabagwebi bawo, bema kweli cala letyeya nakweliya icala, ngakubabingeleli, nabaLevi abathwele ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova, nowasemzini, wazalelwa phakathi kwabo; isiqingatha sabo sesa ezintabeni zeGerizim, esinye isiqingatha sabo sibheka entabeni ye-Ebhali; njengoko uMoses umkhonzi kaYehova wabawisela umthetho ngenxa engaphambili, ukuba babasikelele oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Joshua8:34 Emva koko wawafunda onke amazwi omthetho, iintsikelelo neziqalekiso, ngako konke okubhaliweyo encwadini yomthetho."
Joshua8:35 Akubangakho nalinye ilizwi kuwo onke amazwi uMoses awayewayalele, angalilesanga uYoshuwa phambi kwebandla lonke lakwaSirayeli, nabafazi, nabantwana, nabasemzini ababeqhelene nabo."
Joshua9:1 nangenxa yookumkani bonke ababephesheya kweYordan ezintabeni, nasezimbombeni, nasezindaweni zonke zolwandle olukhulu, malungana neLebhanon, namaHeti, nama-Amori, namaKanan, namaPersi amaHivi namaYebhusi eva oko;"
Joshua9:2 bahlanganisana ndawonye ukuba balwe noYoshuwa namaSirayeli.
Joshua9:3 Beva abemi baseGibheyon into ayenzileyo uYoshuwa eYeriko naseAyi.
Joshua9:4 Benza ngobuchule baza bahamba baza bazenza oonozakuzaku baza bathabatha iingxowa ezindala kwiidonki zabo neentsuba zewayini ezindala, ezikrazukileyo, zabotshelelwa;"
Joshua9:5 neembadada ezonakeleyo, ezigugileyo ezinyaweni, zambethe iingubo ezindala; sonke isonka sabo saba somile kwaye singenanto."
Joshua9:6 Eza kuYoshuwa emkhosini eGiligali, athi kuye nakumadoda akwaSirayeli, Sivela ezweni elikude; ngoku usenza umnqophiso nathi."
Joshua9:7 Athi amadoda akwaSirayeli kumaHebhere, Mhlawumbi nihleli naphakathi kwethu; sothini na ukunimisela umnqophiso?"
Joshua9:8 Bathi kuYoshuwa, Singabakhonzi bakho. Wathi uYoshuwa kubo, Ningoobani na? ungowaphi?"
Joshua9:9 Bathi kuye, Abakhonzi bakho bavela ezweni elikude ngenxa yegama likaYehova uThixo wakho, ekubeni siyivile ingxelo yakhe, nako konke awakwenzayo eYiputa;"
Joshua9:10 nako konke awakwenzayo kookumkani ababini bama-Amori, ababephesheya kweYordan, uSihon ukumkani waseHeshbhon, no-Ogi ukumkani waseBhashan, obeseAshtaroti."
Joshua9:11 Asixelela ngoko amadoda amakhulu, nabemi bonke belizwe lakowethu, esithi, Thabathani ukudla kwenu endleleni, niye kuwakhawulela, nithi kuwo, Singabakhonzi benu; ke ngoko, yenza umnqophiso kunye nathi ngoku."
Joshua9:12 Esi sonka sethu sasithabatha sisoma ezindlwini zethu, sakukudla, ngemini esaphuma ngayo ukuza kuni; ngoku yomile, kwaye uyakrokra;"
Joshua9:13 Iintsuba zewayini esazizalisa zisentsha; kwaye khangela, zazikrazukile, kwaye iimpahla zethu nezihlangu zethu zazigugile ngenxa yohambo olude."
Joshua9:14 Loo madoda athabatha ukuziphilisa kwawo, yaye akamceli uYehova."
Joshua9:15 Wenza uxolo nabo uYoshuwa, wabamisela umnqophiso wokubasindisa; zafunga izikhulu zebandla kubo."
Joshua9:16 Kwathi ekupheleni kweentsuku ezintathu emveni kokuba benze umnqophiso nabo, beva ukuba bakufuphi kubo, nokuba babehlala phakathi kwabo."
Joshua9:17 Bemka oonyana bakaSirayeli, bafika emizaneni yabo ngomhla wesithathu. Imizi yabo yayiyiGibheyon, neKefira, neBheroti, neKiriyati-yeharim."
Joshua9:18 Oonyana bakaSirayeli abababanga bona, ngokuba izikhulu zebandla zibe zifunge uYehova uThixo kaSirayeli kubo. Lazikrokrela izikhulu lonke ibandla."
Joshua9:19 Zathi zonke izikhulu kwibandla lonke, Thina sifunge uYehova uThixo kaSirayeli kubo; ke ngoko asisayi kubachukumisa ngoku."
Joshua9:20 Siya kwenjenjalo ke kubo; nathi siya kuwayeka aphile, hleze kufike umsindo phezu kwethu ngenxa yesifungo esabafungela wona."
Joshua9:21 Zathi kubo izikhulu, Mabadle ubomi; kodwa yayingabathanda iinkuni, nabathanda amanzi ebandla lonke; njengoko zathethayo izikhulu kubo."
Joshua9:22 Wababiza ke uYoshuwa, wathetha kubo, wathi, Nisinyulele, nathi, Sikude kakhulu kuni; uhlala phakathi kwethu?"
Joshua9:23 Kungenxa yoko le nto niqalekisiweyo, yaye akukho namnye kuni oya kukhululwa ebukhobokeni nakwabo bagawula iinkuni namaqula amanzi endlu kaThixo wam."
Joshua9:24 Bamphendula uYoshuwa, bathi, Baxelelwa abakhonzi bakho ukuba uYehova uThixo wakho wamwisela uMoses umkhonzi wakhe umthetho, ukuba uya kuninika lonke ilizwe, nokuba uya kubatshabalalisa bonke abemi belizwe eliphambi kwenu; ngenxa yoko saba buhlungu kakhulu, boyika ubomi bethu ngenxa yenu, senza le nto."
Joshua9:25 Ngoku niyabona, sisesandleni senu; yenza kuthi njengoko kulungileyo, njengoko kuthe tye emehlweni akho."
Joshua9:26 Wenjenjalo ke kubo, wabahlangula esandleni soonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuze bangababulali."
Joshua9:27 Ngaloo mini uYoshuwa wabenzela loo mini abo bagawula iinkuni namaqula amanzi, ebandleni nasesibingelelweni sikaYehova, kude kube namhla kuloo ndawo abeya kuyinyula."
Joshua10:1 Wathi uAdoni-shekeki, ukumkani waseYerusalem, weva ukuba uYoshuwa uyithimbile iAyi, wamqalekisa; Wenjenjalo kwiYeriko, nakukumkani wayo, nakwiAyi, nakukumkani wayo; nokuthi abemi baseGibheyon benza uxolo namaSirayeli, bahlala phakathi kwawo;"
Joshua10:2 Boyika kunene, kuba iGibheyon ibingumzi omkhulu, njengomnye wemizi yakomkhulu, ngokuba inkulu kuneAyi, namadoda akhona angamagorha."
Joshua10:3 Waza uAdoni-tsedeki, ukumkani waseYerusalem, wathumela kuHoham ukumkani waseHebron, nakuPiram, ukumkani waseYarmuti, nakuYafiya ukumkani waseLakishe, nakuDebhiri ukumkani wase-Eglon, esithi,"
Joshua10:4 Nyukani nize kum nize nindincede, ukuze siyoyise iGibheyon, ngenxa yokuba yenze uxolo noYoshuwa noonyana bakaSirayeli."
Joshua10:5 Bahlanganisana ookumkani abahlanu bama-Amori, nokumkani waseYerusalem, nokumkani waseHebron, nokumkani waseYarmuti, nokumkani waseLakishe, ukumkani wase-Eglon, balwa, yena nemikhosi yakhe yonke, bamisa phambi kweGibheyon, nilwe imfazwe nayo."
Joshua10:6 Athumela ke amadoda aseGibheyon kuYoshuwa emkhosini eGiligali, esithi, Musa ukusisusa isandla sakho kubakhonzi bakho; yiza kuthi, usihlangule, usincede; ngokuba besibuthelene bonke ookumkani bama-Amori abemiyo ezintabeni;"
Joshua10:7 Wenyuka uYoshuwa, waya eGiligali, namadoda onke okulwa, namagorha onke."
Joshua10:8 Wathi uYehova kuYoshuwa, Musa ukuboyika; kuba ndibanikele esandleni sakho; akukho namnye kubo oya kuma ngakuwe."
Joshua10:9 Wafika uYoshuwa kubo ngequbuliso, wenyuka ubusuku bonke, evela eGiligali."
Joshua10:10 uYehova wabaxhokonxa phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli, wababulala ngobulalo olukhulu eGibheyon, wabasukela ngendlela enyukayo yaseBhete-horon, wababulala kwesa eAsheki, wesa eMakeda."
Joshua10:11 Xa babesaba phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli nasendleleni eya eBhete-horon, uYehova wabagibisela amatye amakhulu ukusuka ezulwini ukuya kutsho kwa-Asheki, baza bafa; oonyana bakaSirayeli babulele ngekrele."
Joshua10:12 Wathetha uYoshuwa kuYehova ngomhla uYehova awawanikela ngawo ama-Amori koonyana bakaSirayeli, wathi emehlweni oonyana bakaSirayeli, Langa, yima eGibheyon; nawe, nyanga, entilini yeAyalon."
Joshua10:13 Lama ilanga, yema inyanga, bada abantu baziphindezela impindezelo ezintshabeni zabo. Xa ndithi, kubhaliwe na encwadini yeYazere? Ilanga lema lingashukumi embindini wesibhakabhaka, lingangxamelanga ukutshona, phantse imini yonke."
Joshua10:14 Akuzange kubekho mini injengaleyo phambi kwakhe nasemva koko uYehova waliphulaphula ilizwi lomntu; ngokuba uYehova ebewalwela amaSirayeli.
Joshua10:15 Emva koko uYoshuwa nawo onke amaSirayeli awayekunye naye babuyela enkampini eGiligali.
Joshua10:16 Ke aba kumkani bobahlanu basaba, bazimela emqolombeni waseMakeda."
Joshua10:17 Waxelelwa uYoshuwa, kwathiwa, Kufunyenwe ookumkani abahlanu bezimele emqolombeni waseMakeda."
Joshua10:18 Wathi uYoshuwa, Qengqelani amatye amakhulu emnyango womqolomba, nimise abantu ngakuwo ukuba bawulinde."
Joshua10:19 Zisukeleni iintshaba zenu, nibe ngasemva kwazo; ningabavumeli ukuba bangene emizini yabo, ngokuba uYehova uThixo wenu uwanikele esandleni senu."
Joshua10:20 Akugqiba uYoshuwa noonyana bakaSirayeli ukuwabulala ngogonyamelo olukhulu ade atshatyalaliswa, aza asala angena kwizixeko ezinqatyisiweyo."
Joshua10:21 Lwabuya lonke uhlanga ngoxolo emkhosini kuYoshuwa waseMakeda; akwabakho namnye koonyana bakaSirayeli owathetha ngolwimi lwakhe.
Joshua10:22 Wathi uYoshuwa, Ndivuleleni emqolombeni, nibakhuphe emqolombeni abo kumkani bobahlanu."
Joshua10:23 Benjenjalo ke babazisa kuye abo kumkani bobahlanu basemqolombeni, ukumkani waseYerusalem, nokumkani waseHebron, nokumkani waseYarmuti, nokumkani waseLakishe, nokumkani wase-Eglon."
Joshua10:24 Kwathi, babazisa abo kumkani kuYoshuwa, uYoshuwa wawabiza onke amadoda akwaSirayeli, wathi kubathetheli bamadoda okulwa abehambe naye, Sondelani, nibabeke ezinyaweni zaba kumkani; Basondela babeka iinyawo zabo entanyeni."
Joshua10:25 Wathi uYoshuwa kubo, Musani ukoyika, musani ukoyika; yomelelani, yomelelani, ngokuba uYehova uya kwenza okufanayo kuko konke okulwelayo."
Joshua10:26 Emva koko uYoshuwa waboyisa, wababulala, wabaxhoma emithini emihlanu, baxhonywa emithini kwada kwahlwa."
Joshua10:27 Latshona ilanga, uYoshuwa wayalela ukuba bayikhuphe emithini baza bayiphosa emqolombeni ababezimele kuwo, baza babeka amatye amakhulu emlonyeni womqolomba esekhona nanamhla."
Joshua10:28 uYoshuwa wayithimba iMakeda ngaloo mini waza wayoyisa ngohlangothi lwekrele, nokumkani wayo wambulala ngesiqalekiso, bona nayo yonke imiphefumlo eyayikuyo; Wenza kukumkani waseMakeda njengoko wenza ngako kukumkani waseYeriko."
Joshua10:29 Wemka ke uYoshuwa eMakeda yaye onke amaSirayeli ayekunye naye kwada kwesa eLibhena, alwa neLibhena;"
Joshua10:30 uYehova wayinikela yona nokumkani wayo esandleni soonyana bakaSirayeli; Wambulala ngohlangothi lwentshuntshe, nabo bonke abantu ababekuyo; akavuma ukuba kusale bani khona; Wenza kukumkani wakhe njengoko wenza ngako kukumkani waseYeriko."
Joshua10:31 Wemka ke uYoshuwa eLibhena, yena noonyana bonke bakaSirayeli, waya eLakishe, wamisa iintente kuyo, walwa nayo."
Joshua10:32 uYehova wayinikela iLakishe esandleni soonyana bakaSirayeli, bayithimba ngomhla wesibini, bababulala bonke abantu abakuyo ngohlangothi lwekrele, njengoko wenzayo eLibhena."
Joshua10:33 uHoram ukumkani waseGezere wayihlasela iLakishe; uYoshuwa wambulala yena nabantu bakhe, kwada akwasala bani."
Joshua10:34 Waphuma uYoshuwa eLakishe, waya e-Eglon, enamaSirayeli onke; bakungqinga, balwa nawe."
Joshua10:35 Bayithimba ngaloo mini baza bayoyisa ngohlangothi lwekrele, yaye wayiqalekisa yonke imiphefumlo eyayikuyo ngaloo mini, kanye njengoko wenzayo eLagishe."
Joshua10:36 Wemka uYoshuwa e-Eglon, enamaSirayeli onke, waya eHebron; balwa nalo."
Joshua10:37 Bayithimba baza bayibulala ngohlangothi lwekrele, nokumkani wayo nezixeko zayo zonke nayo yonke imiphefumlo eyayikuyo; makangashiyi namnye, njengoko wenzayo e-Eglon; kodwa wayitshabhisa, kwanemimoya yonke eyayikuyo."
Joshua10:38 Wabuyela uYoshuwa eDebhiri, enamaSirayeli onke; walwa."
Joshua10:39 Wayithimba nokumkani wayo nezixeko zayo zonke; ababulala ngohlangothi lwentshuntshe, batshabhisa bonke oomoya ababekuyo; wayengenabani; Wenjenjalo naseHebron, naseDebhiri, nakukumkani wayo; njengoko wenzayo kwiLibhena nokumkani wayo."
Joshua10:40 Waloyisa uYoshuwa lonke ilizwe leentaba, nelasezantsi, nezihlambo, namaqula, nookumkani bonke bakhona;"
Joshua10:41 Wawaxabela uYoshuwa, wathabathela eKadeshe-bharneha, wesa eGaza, nelizwe lonke laseGoshen, wesa eGibheyon;"
Joshua10:42 Ngoko nangoko uYoshuwa wabathimba bonke abo kumkani namazwe abo, ngenxa yokuba uYehova uTHIXO kaSirayeli wayemlwela uSirayeli."
Joshua10:43 Babuyela uYoshuwa emkhosini eGiligali, enamaSirayeli onke."
Joshua11:1 Weva ke uYabhin, ukumkani waseHatsore, wathumela kuYobhabhi ukumkani waseMadon, nakukumkani waseShimron, nakukumkani ka-Asafu;"
Joshua11:2 nakookumkani abangasentla kweentaba namahewu, ngasezantsi kweKineroti, nasesihlanjeni, nasentshonalanga kweDore;"
Joshua11:3 namaKanan empumalanga nasentshonalanga, nama-Amori, namaHeti, namaPerizi, namaYebhusi asezintabeni, namaHifi abephantsi kweHermon, ezweni laseMizpa."
Joshua11:4 Bemka bona nemikhosi yabo yonke, into eninzi yabantu, ebaninzi entlabathini naselunxwemeni lolwandle, enamahashe amaninzi, neenqwelo zokulwa."
Joshua11:5 Bahlanganisana abo kumkani bonke, beza bamisa emanzini aseMerom ukuba balwe namaSirayeli."
Joshua11:6 Wathi uYehova kuYoshuwa, Musa ukuboyika; ngokuba ngomso eli xa ndiya kubanikela bonke ababuleweyo phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli; wagawuleni amahashe abo, nizitshise ngomlilo iinqwelo zabo zokulwa."
Joshua11:7 Waza uYoshuwa namadoda okulwa awayekunye naye kwaoko bawaxabela emanzini aseMerom; bawa phezu kwabo.
Joshua11:8 uYehova wabanikela esandleni soonyana bakaSirayeli, bawaxabela, bawasukela, kwada kwesa eTsidon enkulu, kwesa eMisrefoti-mayim, kwesa entilini yeMizpa ngasempumalanga; bawoyisa kwada akwasala namnye."
Joshua11:9 Wenza ke uYoshuwa kubo njengoko uYehova wamwisela umthetho ngako; wawenyusa amahashe abo, wazitshisa ezinqwelweni zabo zokulwa."
Joshua11:10 Wajika uYoshuwa ngelo xesha, wayithimba iHatsore, wambulala ukumkani wayo ngekrele, kuba uHatsore wayefudula eyintloko yazo zonke ezo zikumkani."
Joshua11:11 Ababulala bonke abantu abakuyo ngobushushu bekrele, babaxabela ngekrele; kwakungekho mntu uphefumlayo; wamtshisa uHatsore ngomlilo."
Joshua11:12 uYoshuwa wazithimba zonke izixeko zabo kumkani nabo bonke ookumkani bazo waza wababulala ngohlangothi lwekrele, wababulala ngesiqalekiso, kanye njengoko uMoses umkhonzi kaYehova wayalelayo."
Joshua11:13 Ke imizi eyayishiyeke ezinqabeni zayo amaSirayeli akayitshisanga, yaba yiHatsore kuphela; wamtshisa uYoshuwa."
Joshua11:14 Onke amaxhoba aloo mizi neenkomo bazithimbelayo oonyana bakaSirayeli; kodwa bababulala wonk’ ubani ngohlangothi lwekrele de babatshabalalisa, yaye abazange bavumele nabani na ophefumlayo."
Joshua11:15 Njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uMoses umkhonzi wakhe, uMoses wamwisela umthetho ngokunjalo uYoshuwa. Wenjenjalo ke uYoshuwa; makangonakalisi nantoni na uYehova awamwisela umthetho ngayo uMoses."
Joshua11:16 Waloyisa uYoshuwa lonke elo zwe leentaba, nelizwe lonke lasezantsi, nelizwe laseGoshen lonke, leentili, nentlango, neentaba zakwaSirayeli, nezihlambo zakhona;"
Joshua11:17 ukusuka kwiNtaba yeHalaki enyuka iye kwaSehire ukuya eBhahali-gadi kwintlambo yaseLebhanon phantsi kweNtaba yeHermon; bonke ookumkani bawo wabathimba, waboyisa, wababulala."
Joshua11:18 uYoshuwa waqhubeka esilwa nabo bonke abo kumkani ixesha elide.
Joshua11:19 Akubangakho mzi wazinikelayo ngoxolo koonyana bakaSirayeli, ingengamaHifi kuphela abemi baseGibheyon; abaseleyo babasa emfazweni."
Joshua11:20 Kuba kwavela kuYehova ukuze azenze lukhuni iintliziyo zawo ukuba amhlasele uSirayeli ngemfazwe, ukuze awabethe ngesiqalekiso esitshabalalisayo, yaye awaba nanceba, ngaphandle kokuba amtshabalalise, kanye njengoko uYehova wayeyalele."
Joshua11:21 Ngelo xesha uYoshuwa weza waza wawatshabalalisa ama-Anaki ezintabeni, eHebron, eDebhiri, eAnabhi nakuzo zonke iintaba zakwaYuda nakwiintaba zonke zakwaSirayeli; Wawaqalekisa uYoshuwa wona nemizi yawo."
Joshua11:22 Akwasala namnye kuma-Anaki ezweni loonyana bakaSirayeli, ngaphandle kweGaza neGati neAshdode."
Joshua11:23 Waliloyisa ke uYoshuwa lonke ilizwe, njengako konke uYehova awakuthethayo kuMoses; uYoshuwa wababela oonyana bakaSirayeli ilifa labo, ngokwezabelo zabo ngokwemizalwane yabo. Yaye ihlabathi laphumla emfazweni."
Joshua12:1 Naba ookumkani belizwe, abababulalayo oonyana bakaSirayeli, balihlutha ilizwe labo phesheya kweYordan, ethabathela emlanjeni oyiArnon, esa entabeni yeHermon, nentlango yonke ngasempumalanga;"
Joshua12:2 uSihon, ukumkani wama-Amori, obemi eHeshbhon, wayelawula eArohere, eselunxwemeni lomlambo iArnon, nesiqingatha somlambo, nesiqingatha seGiliyadi, wesa emlanjaneni oyiYabhoki, engumlambo ke lowo. Umda welizwe oonyana baka-Amon;"
Joshua12:3 bathabathela entlango, besa elwandle lwaseKineroti ngasempumalanga, besa elwandle lwentlango, besa eLwandle lweTyuwa ngasempumalanga, ngendlela yaseBhete-yeshimoti; kwelasezantsi, phantsi kweAshdode-pisga;"
Joshua12:4 nommandla ongaselunxwemeni lukaOgi ukumkani waseBhashan, omnye wamasalela amaRafa, owayehlala eAshtaroti nase-Edreyi;"
Joshua12:5 Wayelawula eNtabeni yeHermon naseSaleka naseBhashan yonke ukuya kufikelela kumda wamaGeshuri namaAgati nesiqingatha saseGiliyadi kumda kaSihon ukumkani waseHeshbhon.
Joshua12:6 Bambulala ke uMoses umkhonzi kaYehova, noonyana bakaSirayeli; uMoses, umkhonzi kaYehova, walinika amaRubhen, namaGadi, nolunye uhlanga lwesizwe sakwaManase, ukuba libe lilifa labo."
Joshua12:7 Ngabo aba ookumkani belizwe uYoshuwa noonyana bakaSirayeli aboyisayo ngasempuma kweYordan ngakwicala elingasentshona, ukusuka eBhahali-gadi entlanjeni yaseLebhanon ukuya ezintabeni zeHalaki ezinyukayo eSehire; awathi uYoshuwa wazinika izizwe zakwaSirayeli, ukuba zibe lilifa ngokwezabelo zazo;"
Joshua12:8 ezintabeni, nasezihlanjeni, nasezinkqantosini, nasemithonjeni, nasezinkqantosini, nasezweni lasezantsi; namaHeti, nama-Amori, namaKanan, namaPerizi, namaHeti, namaYebhusi;"
Joshua12:9 ngukumkani waseYeriko emnye; ukumkani waseAyi ukhangelene neBheteli, inye;"
Joshua12:10 ukumkani waseYerusalem yedwa; omnye ngukumkani waseHebron;
Joshua12:11 ukumkani waseYarmuti eyedwa; ukumkani waseLakishe yedwa;
Joshua12:12 ngukumkani wase-Eglon, emnye; omnye ukumkani waseGezere;"
Joshua12:13 ngukumkani waseDebiri, emnye; mnye kuphela ukumkani waseGedere;"
Joshua12:14 ngukumkani waseHorma, emnye; ukumkani waseAradi yedwa;"
Joshua12:15 ngukumkani waseLibhena, emnye; ukumkani waseAdulam yedwa;"
Joshua12:16 ngukumkani waseMakeda, emnye; ngukumkani waseBheteli yedwa;"
Joshua12:17 ngukumkani waseTapuwage yedwa; mnye kuphela ukumkani wakwaHefere;
Joshua12:18 ngukumkani waseAfeki yedwa; ukumkani kaLazaro yedwa;
Joshua12:19 ngukumkani waseMadon yedwa; omnye ukumkani waseHatsore;
Joshua12:20 omnye ukumkani waseShimron-meron; ukumkani ka-Asafu emnye;
Joshua12:21 ngukumkani waseTahenage yedwa; mnye ukumkani waseMegido;
Joshua12:22 ngukumkani waseKedeshe, emnye; omnye ukumkani waseYokenam yaseKarmele;"
Joshua12:23 ukumkani waseDore, elunxwemeni lwaseDore, emnye; ukumkani wezizwe zaseGiligali yedwa;"
Joshua12:24 ngukumkani waseTirtsa yedwa; ookumkani abamashumi mathathu ananye bebonke.
Joshua13:1 Ke kaloku uYoshuwa wayeseleyingwevu enkulu, ebudaleni iminyaka; Wathi uYehova kuye, Umdala, ukhulile, yaye kusekho umhlaba omninzi wobutyebi."
Joshua13:2 Lilo eli ke ilizwe eliseleyo: lonke ilizwe lamaFilisti, nelizwe lonke lamaGeshuri;"
Joshua13:3 lithabathela eSihore ekufuphi neYiputa, lisa emdeni we-Ekron, ngasentla, apho ababalwayo khona amaKanan, eziizikhulu ezihlanu zamaFilisti; nabaseGaseti, nabaseAshdode, nabase-Eskloni, nabaseGati, nabase-Ekron; kunye ne-Avites:"
Joshua13:4 lithabathela ezantsi, lonke ilizwe lamaKanan, nelaseMera, elikhangelene neTsidon, lesa eAfeki, nomda wama-Amori;"
Joshua13:5 ilizwe laseGibhile nayo yonke iLebhanon ngasempuma, ukusuka eBhahali-gadi phantsi kweNtaba yeHermon ukuya eHamati."
Joshua13:6 Bonke abemi beentaba ukususela eLebhanon kuse eMisrefoti-mayim nawo onke amaSidon, ndiya kubagxotha phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli; nilabe ngamaqashiso oonyana bakaSirayeli, libe lilifa labo, njengoko ndaniwiselayo umthetho."
Joshua13:7 Uzahlule ngoku eli lizwe, libe lilifa lezizwe ezisithoba ezinesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase."
Joshua13:8 Balizuza ilifa oonyana bakaRubhen namaGadi, awabanika lona uMoses nganeno kweYordan ngasempumalanga, njengoko wabanikayo uMoses umkhonzi kaYehova;"
Joshua13:9 lithabathela eArohere, eseludinini lomlanjana oyiArnon, nesixeko esisembindini womlambo, nentlango yonke, ithabathele eMedebha, iye eDibhon;"
Joshua13:10 nemizi yonke kaSihon ukumkani wama-Amori, obephethe eHeshbhon, wesa emdeni woonyana baka-Amon;"
Joshua13:11 nelaseGiliyadi, nelizwe lamaGeshuri, nelama-Aga, nentaba yonke yeHermon, neBhashan yonke, kwesa eSaleka;"
Joshua13:12 bonke ubukumkani bukaOgi eBhashan, obephethe iAshtaroti ne-Edreyi, oshiye phakathi kwamaEfrayim; ngokuba bamoyisayo uMoses, babagxotha."
Joshua13:13 Kodwa oonyana bakaSirayeli abazange bawagxothe amaGeshuri namaMagati, kodwa amaGeshuri namaMagati asahlala phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli de kube namhla."
Joshua13:14 Kuphela sisizwe sakwaLevi, angabanikanga lifa; amadini anyukayo kaYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, alilifa labo, njengoko wathethayo kubo."
Joshua13:15 uMoses wababela ilifa oonyana bakaRubhen ngokwemizalwane yabo.
Joshua13:16 Umda wabo wathabathela eArohere, eseludinini lomlanjana oyiArnon, nomzi ophakathi komlambo, nentlango yonke, neMedebha;"
Joshua13:17 iHeshbhon nemizi yayo yonke entilini; iDibhon, neMoti-bhahali, neBhete-bhahali-mehon;"
Joshua13:18 neYahasa, neKedemoti, neMefati;"
Joshua13:19 neKiriyatayim, neSibhema, neTsarete-sahare, entabeni yentili;"
Joshua13:20 neBhete-pehore, neAshdoti, nePisga, neBhete-yeshimoti;"
Joshua13:21 nemizi yonke yentlango, nobukumkani bonke bukaSihon, ukumkani wama-Amori, obephethe eHeshbhon, awambulalayo uMoses, nezikhulu zakwaMidiyan, uEvi, noRekem, noTsure, noHuri, noRebha, abathetheli bakwaMidiyan, noRekem, noHure, noRebha kwaMidiyan uSihon, ohlala kwelo lizwe."
Joshua13:22 uBhileham unyana kaBhehore, umvumi, wababulala oonyana bakaSirayeli ngekrele, phakathi kwabaxabelayo."
Joshua13:23 Umda woonyana bakaRubhen waba yiYordan nommandla wayo. Lilo elo ilifa loonyana bakaRubhen ngokwemizalwane yabo, nemizi yabo, nemizana yabo."
Joshua13:24 uMoses wasinika ilifa isizwe sakwaGadi, oonyana bakaGadi, ngokweenzala zabo."
Joshua13:25 Ilizwe labo laba yiYazere nazo zonke izixeko zaseGiliyadi nesiqingatha selizwe loonyana baka-Amoni ukuya kufikelela eArohere ephambi kweRabha;
Joshua13:26 ukusuka eHeshbhon ukuya eRamati-mizpa naseBhetenim; ukusuka eMahanayim, wesa emdeni weDebiri;"
Joshua13:27 nasentilini iBhete-ram, neBhete-nimra, neSukoti, neTsafon, nommandla oseleyo wobukumkani bukaSihon ukumkani waseHeshbhon, neYordan nelizwe layo, kwesa ekupheleni koLwandle oluBomvu. Kinneret, phesheya kweYordan; empuma."
Joshua13:28 Lilo elo ilifa loonyana bakaGadi ngokwemizalwane yabo, imizi yabo, nemizana yabo."
Joshua13:29 uMoses wasinika ilifa isiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase, yaye laba lilifa lesiqingatha sesizwe soonyana bakaManase ngokwezizukulwana zabo."
Joshua13:30 Ilizwe labo lathabathela eMahanayim, neBhashan yonke, nobukumkani bonke bukaOgi ukumkani waseBhashan, nemizana yonke yakwaYahire eBhashan, imizi emashumi mathandathu;"
Joshua13:31 Isiqingatha saseGiliyadi neAshtaroti ne-Edreyi, izixeko zobukumkani bukaOgi eBhashan, yaba yeyoonyana bakaMagire, unyana kaManase, isiqingatha soonyana bakaMagire ngokweentsapho zabo."
Joshua13:32 Ngawo la ke amazwe awawabelayo uMoses njengelifa kwiintlango zakwaMowabhi phesheya kweYordan, iYeriko, ngasempuma."
Joshua13:33 Kodwa uMoses akazange asinike ilifa isizwe sakwaLevi; uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, waba lilifa labo, njengoko wathethayo kubo."
Joshua14:1 Ngawo la amazwe abawadlayo oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni lakwaKanan, abawanikayo umbingeleli uElazare, noYoshuwa unyana kaNun, neentloko zezindlu zoonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuba libe lilifa labo."
Joshua14:2 Ilifa labo lahlulwa ngamaqashiso, kanye njengoko uYehova wayeyalele ngoMoses, izizukulwana ezisithoba nesiqingatha sesizukulwana."
Joshua14:3 Ngokuba uMoses wazinika ilifa izizwe ezibini ezinesiqingatha nganeno kweYordan, kodwa abaLevi akabanikanga lifa phakathi kwazo."
Joshua14:4 Ngokuba oonyana bakaYosefu babezizizwe ezibini, uManase noEfrayim; Ke abaLevi ababanikanga sabelo ezweni elo, babanika kuphela imizi yokuhlala, namadlelo emfuyo yabo, nempahla yabo."
Joshua14:5 Kanye njengoko uYehova wamyalelayo uMoses, benjenjalo oonyana bakaSirayeli baza balaba ilizwe."
Joshua14:6 Beza oonyana bakaYuda kuYoshuwa eGiligali, wathi uKalebhi, unyana kaYefune, umKeni, kuye, Uyalazi wena ilizwi likaYehova, awalithethayo uYehova kuMoses, umfo wakwaThixo, ngawe nangawe, eKadeshe-bharneha."
Joshua14:7 Ndandiminyaka imashumi mane ndizelwe, ekususweni kwam nguMoses umkhonzi kaYehova, eKadeshe-bharneha, ukuba ndeye kulihlola ilizwe; ndaza ndashumayela kuye kwakhona njengoko kwakusentliziyweni yam."
Joshua14:8 Kodwa abazalwana bam, abanyuka nam, bayidimaza intliziyo yabantu, mna ke ndamlandela uYehova uThixo wam ngokupheleleyo."
Joshua14:9 Wafunga ke uMoses ngaloo mini, esithi, Inene, ilizwe elinyathelwe lunyawo lwakho loba lelakho, nelifa loonyana bakho, kude kuse ephakadeni, ngokuba ukuzalisile ukumlandela uYehova uThixo wam."
Joshua14:10 Khangela ke, uYehova undidlise ubomi le minyaka imashumi mane anamihlanu, njengoko wakuthethayo, kususela koko walithethayo uYehova elo lizwi kuMoses, oko oonyana bakaSirayeli babebhadule entlango; ngoku, yabona, ziintsuku ezimashumi asibhozo anambini neminyaka emihlanu."
Joshua14:11 Unanamhla ndisomelele njengamini wandithumayo uMoses; njengoko ayenjalo amandla am oko, asenjalo nangoku amandla am okulwa, kwa-awokuphuma nawokubuya."
Joshua14:12 Ke ngoko ndinike ezo ntaba wathetha zona uYehova ngaloo mini; ngenxa yokuba weva ngaloo mini ukuba ama-Anake ayelapho nokuba izixeko ezikhulu zenziwe iinqaba; ukuba uYehova ungakum, ndokwazi ukubagxotha, njengoko watshoyo uYehova."
Joshua14:13 uYoshuwa wamsikelela, wamnika iHebron uKalebhi unyana kaYefune, ukuba ibe lilifa."
Joshua14:14 Ngoko iHebron yaba lilifa likaKalebhi unyana kaYefune umKenazi de kube namhla, ngenxa yokuba wamlandela ngokupheleleyo uYehova uTHIXO kaSirayeli."
Joshua14:15 Igama leHebron ngenxa engaphambili beliyiKiriyati-arbha; ke uArbha ebeyindoda enkulu phakathi kwama-Anaki. Laphumla ilizwe emfazweni.
Joshua15:1 Lilo elo ke isahlulo sesizwe soonyana bakaYuda ngokweenzala zabo; kuse emdeni wakwaEdom, entlango yeTsin ngasemzantsi, ekupheleni komzantsi."
Joshua15:2 Umda wabo ngasezantsi wathabathela elunxwemeni loLwandle lweTyuwa, kwiNyoba ebheke ezantsi."
Joshua15:3 Yaye waphuma waya ngasemzantsi weMahale-hakrabhim wadlulela eTsin wenyuka waya ngasemzantsi weKadeshe-bharneha wadlulela eHetseron wenyuka waya eAdare wajikeleza iKarkaha.
Joshua15:4 Wegqitha khona apho, waya eAshmon, wegqitha waya emlanjeni waseYiputa; kwaye iindlela zaloo nxweme zazingaselwandle; olu loba lunxweme lwayo olungasezantsi."
Joshua15:5 Umda wasempumalanga luLwandle lweTyuwa, use ekupheleni kweYordan. Umda wabo ngangasentla wathabathela elunxwemeni lolwandle, ekupheleni kweYordan;"
Joshua15:6 wenyuka umda waya eBhete-hogela, wegqitha waya emantla eBhete-harabha; yaye umsonto wenyuka waya kwilitye likaBhohan unyana kaRubhen."
Joshua15:7 Umda unyukela eDebhiri usuka entlanjeni yaseAgore uye ngasemntla eGiligali, phambi kwethambeka eliya eAdumim, esemzantsi womEfrate; kwaye ukuphuma kwayo kwaba yi-Enrogele."
Joshua15:8 Wenyuka umda ngomfula woonyana bakaHinom, ngasemzantsi wamaYebhusi; YiYerusalem ke leyo; wenyuka umda waya encotsheni yentaba, malunga nomfula wakwaHinom, ngasentshonalanga, osekuphekeni kwentili yamaRafa ngasentla."
Joshua15:9 Wegqitha umda encotsheni yentaba, waya emthonjeni wamanzi aseNefetota, wegqitha waya emizini yentaba ye-Efron; yaye umda waphuma waya eBhahali, oko kukuthi, iKiriyati-yarim."
Joshua15:10 Umda waphuma entshonalanga eBhahali, waya entabeni yakwaSehire, wegqitha waya egxalabeni leNtaba yeYeharim engasentla: oko kukuthi, iKesalon, wehla waya eBhete-shemeshe, wegqitha waya eTimna."
Joshua15:11 Yaye umda waphuma waya kwicala le-Ekron ngasemntla, yaye umda waphuma waya kufika eShikron wadlulela kwintaba kaBhahali wadlulela eYabheneli; Umda wawuselwandle."
Joshua15:12 Umda wasentshonalanga wawuseLwandle oluKhulu, umda walo. Nguwo lowo umda woonyana bakaYuda ngeenxa zonke, ngokwemizalwane yabo."
Joshua15:13 uKalebhi unyana kaYefune wanikezwa isabelo phakathi koonyana bakaYuda, njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho uYoshuwa, umzi ka-Arbha, uyise kaEnaki, eyiHebron ke leyo."
Joshua15:14 uKalebhi wabagqogqa oonyana abathathu baka-Anaki, uSeshayi, noAkiman, noTalemayi, oonyana baka-Anaki;"
Joshua15:15 Wesuka khona waya kubemi baseDebhiri; igama leDebhiri laliyiKiriyati-sefere ngaphambi koko.
Joshua15:16 Wathi uKalebhi, Othe wayithimba iKiriyati-sefere, wayithimba, ndomnika intombi yam uAhazi, ibe ngumkakhe."
Joshua15:17 Wangena uOteniyeli, unyana kaKenazi, umninawa kaKalebhi, wamnika ke intombi yakhe, uAkisa, yangumkakhe."
Joshua15:18 Efikile ke kuye, wamvuselela ukuba acele umhlaba kuyise; wakhwela eesileni lakhe; Wathi uKalebhi kuye, Ùfuna ntoni na?"
Joshua15:19 Wathi, Ndisikelele; ngokuba endinike ilizwe lasezantsi; ndinike imithombo yamanzi. Wamnika amaqula aphezulu namaqula angaphantsi."
Joshua15:20 Lilo elo ilifa lesizwe soonyana bakaYuda ngokweenzala zabo.
Joshua15:21 Imizi yokugqibela yesizwe soonyana bakaYuda emdeni ongezantsi kaEdom yiKabhetsele, ne-Edere, neYagure;"
Joshua15:22 noKina, noDimona, noAdada,"
Joshua15:23 neKedeshe, neHatsore, neItnan;"
Joshua15:24 ooSife, noTeleme, noBheloti,"
Joshua15:25 neHatsore, neHadati, neKeriyoti, neHetseron, eyiHatsore ke leyo;"
Joshua15:26 uAmam noShema noMolada,"
Joshua15:27 neHasargada, neHeshmon, neBhete-paleti;"
Joshua15:28 neHatsareshuali, neBher-shebha, neBhisyoti;"
Joshua15:29 uBhahali, no-Iyim, noAshem,"
Joshua15:30 neElitoladi, neKesile, neHorma;"
Joshua15:31 neTsikelage, neMademana, neSansana;"
Joshua15:32 neLebhawoti, neSilehim, neAyin, neRimon; iyodwa imizi emashumi mabini anesithoba, inemizana yayo;"
Joshua15:33 nasentilini iEshtawoli, neTsoreya, neAsna;"
Joshua15:34 neSanoage, ne-Enganim, neTapuge, neEnam;"
Joshua15:35 iYarmum neAdulam, iSogo neAzeki,"
Joshua15:36 neSharaim, neAditayim, neGedera, neGederotayim; izixeko ezilishumi elinesine nemizana yazo."
Joshua15:37 iSenen, neHadasha, neMigdalagade;"
Joshua15:38 neDileyan, neMitspe, neYoketeli;"
Joshua15:39 iLakishe, neBhoskate, neEglon;"
Joshua15:40 neKabhone, neLamame, neKitlishe,"
Joshua15:41 neGederoti, neBhete-dagon, neNahama, neMakeda; izixeko ezilishumi elinesithandathu nemizana yazo."
Joshua15:42 iLibhena, noEtere, noAsan,"
Joshua15:43 noYifeta, noAsna, noNesibhi;"
Joshua15:44 neKehila, neAgsibe, neMaresa; kukho izixeko ezisibhozo nemizana yazo."
Joshua15:45 iEkron namadlelo ayo, namadlelo ayo;"
Joshua15:46 kwathabathela e-Ekron ngaselwandle, ilizwe elilelonke elingaseAshdode, namagxamesi ayo;"
Joshua15:47 iAshdode namadlelo ayo, namadlelo ayo, neGaza namadlelo ayo, namadlelo ayo, kwesa emlanjeni waseYiputa, nolwandle olukhulu, nomda walo;"
Joshua15:48 nakweleentaba, iSamire, neYatire, neSoko;"
Joshua15:49 noDana, noKiryatsana, onguDebiri,"
Joshua15:50 noAnabhe, noEstemo, noAnime;"
Joshua15:51 neGoshen, neHolon, neGilo; imizi elishumi elinamnye, inemizana yayo."
Joshua15:52 Ama-Arabhu namaDuma namaEsane,"
Joshua15:53 neYanum, neBhete-puge, neAfeka;"
Joshua15:54 neHumta, neKiriyatarbha, yiHebron ke leyo, neTsore; kukho izixeko ezisibhozo nemizana yazo."
Joshua15:55 iMahon, iKarmele, iZifi, neJuta,"
Joshua15:56 neYizereli, neYokedeham, neSanowagi;"
Joshua15:57 iKayin, iGibheha, neTimna; izixeko zayo ezilishumi;"
Joshua15:58 iHalehule, neBhete-shure, neGedore;"
Joshua15:59 neMarati, neBhete-anoti, neElitekon; izixeko ezithandathu nemizana yazo."
Joshua15:60 iKiriyati-bhahali (yiKiriyati-yeharim ke leyo) neRabha; imizi emibini nemizana yayo.
Joshua15:61 Entlango, iBhetarabha, iMidine, neSekaka,"
Joshua15:62 neNibhesan, nesixeko saseLetswayi, ne-Engedi; izixeko ezithandathu nemizana yazo."
Joshua15:63 Ke amaYebhusi, abengabemi baseYerusalem, ababanga nako ukuwagqogqa oonyana bakaYuda; kodwa amaYebhusi asaqhubeka ehlala eYerusalem noonyana bakaYuda de kube namhla."
Joshua16:1 Laphuma iqashiso loonyana bakaYosefu eYordan, baya eYeriko, emanzini aseYeriko, ngasempumalanga, entlango enyuka iye eYeriko, ngasentabeni yaseBheteli;"
Joshua16:2 Wesuka eBheteli, waya eLuse, wegqitha waya emdeni weArki, waya eAtaroti."
Joshua16:3 Wehla entshonalanga, waya emdeni weYafeleti, waya emdeni weBhete-horon-ezantsi, naseGezere; yaye ukuphuma kwayo kukufuphi nolwandle."
Joshua16:4 Balithabatha ke ilifa labo oonyana bakaYosefu, uManase noEfrayim."
Joshua16:5 Umda woonyana bakaEfrayim ngokweentsapho zabo wawumi ngolu hlobo: Umda welifa labo ngasempuma wawuyiAtarota-dare, uye kufikelela eBhete-horon phezulu;"
Joshua16:6 waba umda waya elwandle, wesa eMigmeta ngecala langasentla; umda waphuma ngasempumalanga eTahanati-silo, waya eYanoha ngasempumalanga;"
Joshua16:7 Wehla eYanowa, waya eAtaroti naseNahare, wafika eYeriko, wema eYordan."
Joshua16:8 Wesuka umda eTapuge ngasentshonalanga, waya emlanjeni waseKana; yaye indlela yawo yokuphuma yayingaselwandle. Lilo elo ilifa loonyana bakaEfrayim ngokwemizalwane yabo."
Joshua16:9 Imizi yoonyana bakaEfrayim yaba phantsi kwelifa loonyana bakaManase, yonke imizi nemizana yayo."
Joshua16:10 Abawagqogqanga amaKanan abemi eGezere; ke wona amaKanan aqhubeka ehlala phakathi kwamaEfrayim de kube namhla, yaye asahlawulwa."
Joshua17:1 Isizwe sakwaManase besisabaninzi; ngokuba ebengowamazibulo kuYosefu; Lowo nguMagire, amazibulo kaManase, uyise kaGiliyadi; ngokuba ebeyindoda yokulwa, wayidla ilifa iGiliyadi neBhashan."
Joshua17:2 Baba baninzi koonyana bakaManase ngokwemizalwane yabo; koonyana baka-Abhiyezere, noonyana bakaHeleki, noonyana baka-Aseriyeli, noonyana bakaShekem, noonyana bakaHefere, noonyana bakaShemida; ngabo abo oonyana bakaManase, unyana kaYosefu, ngokwemizalwane yabo."
Joshua17:3 Ke uTselofehadi, unyana kaHefere, unyana kaGiliyadi, unyana kaMagire, unyana kaManase, ebengenanyana; eneentombi zodwa; Ngawo la amagama eentombi zakhe: nguMagla, noNowa, noHogla, noMilka, noTirtsa."
Joshua17:4 Beza kuElazare umbingeleli, nakuYoshuwa unyana kaNun, nakubathetheli, bathi, uYehova wamwisela umthetho uMoses, ukuba asinike ilifa phakathi kwabazalwana bethu. Ngoko wabanika ilifa phakathi kwabantakwaboyise ngokomyalelo kaYehova."
Joshua17:5 Zaba lishumi izahlulo kuManase ngaphandle kwelizwe laseGiliyadi, neBhashan ephesheya kweYordan;"
Joshua17:6 Ngokuba iintombi zikaManase zabelwa ilifa phakathi koonyana bakhe; nelizwe laseGiliyadi laba nabanye oonyana bakaManase.
Joshua17:7 Umda kaManase wathabathela kwa-Ashere, waya eMigmeta ephambi kweShekem; kwaye umgca uhamba ngqo kubantu base-Entapuag."
Joshua17:8 Ilizwe laseTapuwa laba lelakwaManase, kodwa iTapuwa, emdeni kaManase, yaba yeyoonyana bakaEfrayim;"
Joshua17:9 Wehla umda wommandla waya emfuleni iKana, ezantsi komlambo; Le mizi yakwaEfrayim yayiphakathi kwemizi yakwaManase; Umda kaManase waba ngasentla koMlambo, ukuma kwawo waya wema ngolwandle;"
Joshua17:10 Ngasezantsi laba lelakwaEfrayim, ngasentla laba lelikaManase; ulwandle lwaba ngumda walo; bahlanganisana kwa-Ashere ngasentla, nakwaIsakare ngasempumalanga."
Joshua17:11 uManase wayidla ilifa iBhete-shehan namadlelo ayo, neIbleyam namadlelo ayo, nabemi beDore namadlelo ayo, nabemi base-Endore namadlelo ayo, nabemi baseTahanaki namadlelo ayo abemi baseMegido namagxamesi ayo: amazwe amathathu."
Joshua17:12 Babengenako oonyana bakaManase ukuyigqogqa loo mizi; kodwa amaKanan afuna ukuhlala kwelo lizwe.
Joshua17:13 Ke oonyana bakaSirayeli bazinikela amandla, bawahlawulisa amaKanan; kodwa akabakhuphanga konke konke."
Joshua17:14 Bathetha oonyana bakaYosefu kuYoshuwa, bathi, Yini na ukuba usinike ilifa lalinye, nesabelo sibe sinye, ekubeni ndiluhlanga olukhulu, uYehova endisikelele unangoku?"
Joshua17:15 Wathi uYoshuwa kubo, Ukuba niluhlanga olukhulu, nyukani niye ehlathini, nimise ezweni lamaPersi nelakwaEfrayim, njengokuba ixinene kuni intaba yakwaEfrayim."
Joshua17:16 Bathi oonyana bakaYosefu, Induli le ayisilingene; yaye onke amaKanan awayehlala kwilizwe elisentlanjeni aneenqwelo zokulwa zentsimbi, lawo ayevela eBheteshan needolophu ezilapho nabo babevela entlanjeni eYizereli."
Joshua17:17 Wathi uYoshuwa kwindlu kaYosefu, uEfrayim noManase, Niluhlanga olukhulu, ninamandla amakhulu; mhlawumbi awunalo ikamva elinye."
Joshua17:18 Ke yona intaba iya kuba yeyenu; kuba lungumthi, wowugawula; nezithako zayo ziya kuba zezakho; kuba niya kuwagqogqa amaKanan, nakuba eneenqwelo zentsimbi yaye omelele."
Joshua18:1 Labizelwa ndawonye lonke ibandla loonyana bakaSirayeli eShilo, bayimisa khona intente yokuhlangana. Kwaye ihlabathi loyiswa phambi kwabo."
Joshua18:2 Kwasala phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli izizwe ezisixhenxe ezazingekanikwa lifa lazo.
Joshua18:3 Wathi uYoshuwa koonyana bakaSirayeli, Kuya kuda kube nini na nilibele ukulidla ilifa ilizwe elo aninikileyo uYehova uThixo wooyihlo?"
Joshua18:4 Ndinike amadoda abe mathathu esizweni ngasinye, ndiwathume, anduluke alicenge ilizwe, alibhale ngokwelifa lawo yaye baya kubuyela kum."
Joshua18:5 Aya kulahlula libe ziinxalenye ezisixhenxe: uYuda uya kuhlala kummandla wakhe ngasezantsi, indlu kaYosefu ime kummandla wayo ngasentla."
Joshua18:6 Wolibhala ilizwe libe ziinxalenye ezisixhenxe, nizizise kum ukuqonda, ukuze ndenze ngokwamaqashiso phambi koYehova uThixo wethu."
Joshua18:7 Ke abaLevi abanasabelo kuni; ngokuba ilifa labo bububingeleli bukaYehova; yaye uGadi noRubhen nesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase banikwa ilifa labo nganeno kweYordan ngasempumalanga, awabanika lona uMoses umkhonzi kaYehova."
Joshua18:8 Asuka amadoda lawo, emka; uYoshuwa wabawisela umthetho abo baza kulibhala ilizwe, wathi, Hambani nelizwe, nilibhale, nibuyele kum, ndinenzele amaqashiso apha phambi koYehova, Shilo."
Joshua18:9 Ahamba amadoda lawo, alityhutyha ilizwe, alibhala encwadini ngokwemizi yawo, abe ngamacandelo asixhenxe; abuyela kuYoshuwa ekulweni eShilo."
Joshua18:10 Wawawisela amaqashiso uYoshuwa eShilo phambi koYehova, uYoshuwa wababela ilizwe oonyana bakaSirayeli ngokwezabelo zabo khona."
Joshua18:11 Laphuma iqashiso lesizwe soonyana bakaBhenjamin ngokwemizalwane yabo; umda welifa labo waphuma phakathi koonyana bakaYuda noonyana bakaYosefu.
Joshua18:12 Umda wabo wathabathela eYordan; yaye umda unyuka uye kwicala laseYeriko ngasemntla uze unyuke iintaba ngasentshona; ukuma kwawo, kwaba sentlango yaseBhetaven."
Joshua18:13 Umda waphuma khona, waya eLuse, ecaleni kweLuse ngasezantsi: yiBheteli ke lero; yaye umda wehla uye eAtaroti-adare ngasendulini esemzantsi weBhete-horon ezantsi."
Joshua18:14 Wahlaba umda, wajika waya embombeni yolwandle, waya ngasezantsi, usuka entabeni engaseBhete-horon ngasezantsi; waphuma, waya eKiriyati-bhahali, oko kukuthi, iKiriyati-yeharim, umzi woonyana bakaYuda; yayiyiwadi yasentshona."
Joshua18:15 Icala lasezantsi lathabathela ekupheleni kweKiriyati-yeharim, waphuma umda waya entshonalanga, wegqitha waya equleni laseNefetoa."
Joshua18:16 Wehla umda waya ekupheleni kwentaba phambi kwentlambo yonyana kaHinom entlanjeni yeeNefili ngasemntla, yaye wehla waya kwintlambo kaHinom entlanjeni yaseYebhusi uye ngasezantsi wehle uye e-Enerogele;"
Joshua18:17 Wesuka entla, waphuma waya e-Enesem, waphuma waya eGeliloti, malunga nethambeka laseAdumim, wehla waya engxondorheni kaBhohan unyana kaRubhen."
Joshua18:18 Wegqitha waya egxalabeni leArabha, waya ngasentla, wehla waya eArabha;"
Joshua18:19 wegqitha umda waya egxalabeni laseBhete-hogela ngasentla; umda wegqitha waya encamini engasentla yoLwandle lweTyuwa, ekupheleni kweYordan ngasezantsi; yayilunxweme lwasezantsi."
Joshua18:20 iYordan yaba ngumda walo ngasempumalanga. Lilo elo ilifa loonyana bakaBhenjamin, nelizwe lakhe kwizizukulwana zabo."
Joshua18:21 Imizi yesizwe soonyana bakaBhenjamin ngokwezindlu zabo yayiyiYeriko, neBhete-hogela, nomfula wamaKetsi;"
Joshua18:22 neBhete-rabha, neShemarayim, neBheteli;"
Joshua18:23 noAvim, nePara, neOfra,"
Joshua18:24 neKefarha-amonayi, neOfeni, neGebha; imizi elishumi elinamibini, inemizana yayo;"
Joshua18:25 iGibheyon, neRama, neBheroti;"
Joshua18:26 neMizpa, neKefira, noMoses;"
Joshua18:27 noRekem, noIrepeli, noTarara;"
Joshua18:28 neSela, ne-Elefe, neYebhusi (yiYerusalem ke leyo), neGibheya, neKiriyati; izixeko ezilishumi elinesine nemizana yazo. Lilo elo ilifa loonyana bakaBhenjamin ngokweenzala zabo."
Joshua19:1 Laphuma elesibini ilifa kuSimon, emndenini woonyana bakaSimon, ngokwemizalwane yabo; yaye ilifa labo laba phakathi kwelifa loonyana bakaYuda."
Joshua19:2 Ilifa labo laba seBher-shebha neShebha neMolada;
Joshua19:3 noHasare, noBhala, noAshem,"
Joshua19:4 neElitoladi, neBhethuli, neHorma;"
Joshua19:5 neTsikelage, neBhete-marabhoti, neHatsarsusa;"
Joshua19:6 neBhetelebhote, neSaruhen; izixeko ezilishumi elinesithathu nemizana yazo;"
Joshua19:7 iAyin, neRimon, neEtere, neAsan; izixeko ezine nemizana yazo,"
Joshua19:8 nemizi yonke ejikelezileyo kuloo mizi, kwesa eBhahalati-bhere (yiRama esezantsi ke leyo). Lilo elo ilifa lentsapho yoonyana bakaSimon ngokweenzala zabo."
Joshua19:9 Ilifa loonyana bakaYuda lavela elifeni loonyana bakaSimon; ngokuba isabelo soonyana bakaYuda besisikhulu kubo; ke ngoko, oonyana bakaSimon banikwa ilifa labo."
Joshua19:10 Esinye isahlulo sesithathu saya koonyana bakaZebhulon ngokwemizalwane yabo; umda welifa labo wafika eSaridi.
Joshua19:11 Umda wabo wenyuka waya elwandle, naseMarala, naseDabheseti, nasemlanjeni phambi kweYokenam;"
Joshua19:12 waphuma eSaridi, wasinga empumalanga, usinge empumalanga, ude uye emdeni weKislotabhore, waphuma waya eDabherati, unyuka uye eYafiya;"
Joshua19:13 Wegqitha khona empumalanga, waya eGita-hefere, wesa eIttakashin, wegqitha eRimon-metoare, waya eNege;"
Joshua19:14 umda wajika waya ngasentla, waya eHanaton, wema ngentili yeYaphetheli;"
Joshua19:15 neKati, neNahalali, neShimron, neIdala, neBhetelehem: yimizi elishumi elinamibini inemizana yayo."
Joshua19:16 Lilo elo ilifa loonyana bakaZebhulon ngokwemizalwane yabo, loo mizi nemizana yayo."
Joshua19:17 Iqashiso lesine laphuma noIsakare, noonyana bakaIsakare ngokweentsapho zabo."
Joshua19:18 Umda wabo waya eYizereli, neKesuloti, neShunem;"
Joshua19:19 namaHafari, neZiyon, neAnaharati,"
Joshua19:20 neRabhiti, noKiyon, noAbheshe;"
Joshua19:21 neRemete, ne-Enganim, ne-Enehada, neBhete-passes;"
Joshua19:22 Umda osemdeni waqhubeka uye kufikelela eTabhore naseSahasim naseBhete-shemeshe; Iziphelo zelizwe labo yiYordan: imizi elishumi elinamithandathu inemizana yayo.
Joshua19:23 Lilo elo ilifa lemizalwane yoonyana bakaIsakare ngokwemizalwane yabo, imizi yabo, nemizana yabo."
Joshua19:24 Lavela iqashiso lesihlanu nesizwe soonyana baka-Ashere ngokwemizalwane yabo.
Joshua19:25 Umda wabo waba yiHelekati, neHali, neBhetene, neAgsafu;"
Joshua19:26 noAlameleki, neAmade, neMishahali; Weza eKarmele ngasentshonalanga, naseSihore-libhenati;"
Joshua19:27 Wajika waya ngasempuma, ngaseBhete-dagon, wafika kwaZebhulon nakwintlambo yomlambo oqukuqelayo waseYaphetheli kumntla weBhete-temeke neNehiyeli waya eKabhuli ngasekhohlo;"
Joshua19:28 neHebron, neRehobhi, neHamon, neKana, neTsidon enkulu;"
Joshua19:29 umda waya eRama, wesa emzini onqatyisiweyo oyiTire; yaye umda wommandla wawubheke eHosa; waphuma elwandle, evela ngaselunxwemeni, waya eAgsibe;"
Joshua19:30 neUma, neAfeki, neRehobhi: yimizi emashumi mabini anamibini, inemizana yayo."
Joshua19:31 Lilo elo ilifa lemizalwane yoonyana baka-Ashere ngokwemizalwane yabo, loo mizi nemizana yayo."
Joshua19:32 Iqashiso lesithandathu laba leloonyana bakaNafetali, noonyana bakaNafetali ngokweentsapho zabo."
Joshua19:33 Umda wabo wathabathela eHelefe, eAlon, wesa eSahananim, neAdami, neNekebhi, neYabheneli, wesa eLakum; ukuphuma kwawo kwaba yiYordan;"
Joshua19:34 Umda waya ngasentshona eAshnot-tare, ukusuka apho waya eHukoki, waya kwaZebhulon ngasemzantsi, waya kwa-Ashere ngasentshona, noYuda neYordan ngasempumalanga."
Joshua19:35 Imizi enqatyisiweyo yiSidim, neSere, neHamati, neRakati, neKinerete;"
Joshua19:36 noAdam, neRama, neHatsore,"
Joshua19:37 neKedeshe, ne-Edreyi, ne-Enetsore,"
Joshua19:38 noYister, neMigdaleli, neHorem, neBhete-shemeshe, neBhete-shemeshe; izixeko ezilishumi elinethoba nemizana yazo."
Joshua19:39 Lilo elo ilifa lentsapho yoonyana bakaNafetali ngokweentsapho zabo, izixeko needolophana."
Joshua19:40 Laphuma iqashiso lesixhenxe nemizalwane yoonyana bakaDan ngokwemizalwane yabo;
Joshua19:41 Ilizwe lelifa labo laba yiTsoreya, ne-Eshtawoli, neIrshemeshe;"
Joshua19:42 neShahalabhin, neAyalon, neYetla;"
Joshua19:43 neElon, neTimna, ne-Ekron;"
Joshua19:44 neEliteki, neGibheton, neBhahalati;"
Joshua19:45 noYuda, noBhen-bheraki, neGati-rimon;"
Joshua19:46 neMejarkon, neRakon, nomda omalunga neYafo."
Joshua19:47 Umhlaba woonyana bakaDan ubemncinane kubo; ke ngoko, oonyana bakaDan bahamba baya kulwa neLesem baza bayithimba baza bayoyisa ngohlangothi lwekrele baza bayithimba baza bahlala kuyo baza bayibiza iLesem Dan ngegama likaDan uyise."
Joshua19:48 Lilo elo ilifa lemizalwane yoonyana bakaDan ngokwemizalwane yabo, abo bahlali, nemizana yabo."
Joshua19:49 Bakugqiba ukulaba ilizwe ngokwelizwe labo, oonyana bakaSirayeli bamnika uYoshuwa, unyana kaNun, ilifa phakathi kwabo."
Joshua19:50 Ngokomlomo kaYehova bamnika umzi awawubizayo, iTimnati-sera, ekweleentaba lakwaEfrayim; wakha isixeko, wahlala kuso."
Joshua19:51 Ngawo lawo amafa abawabelwa ngeqashiso umbingeleli uElazare, noYoshuwa unyana kaNun, neentloko zezizwe zoonyana bakaSirayeli, ngeqashiso eShilo phambi koYehova, ekungeneni kwentente, njengoko ilizwe laba lilifa yahlulwe ilifa lebandla. Bayeka ke ukulaba ilizwe."
Joshua20:1 Wathetha uYehova kuYoshuwa, wathi,"
Joshua20:2 “Thetha koonyana bakaSirayeli, uthi, ‘Zishenxiseni izixeko ezikhulu endathetha ngazo kuni ngoMoses;"
Joshua20:3 ukuze abalekele khona umbulali obulele umntu ngokungazi; ibe yindawo yenu yokusabela kumphindezeli wegazi.
Joshua20:4 Ukuba uthe wasabela komnye waloo mizi, wema ekungeneni kwesango lomzi, wayithetha indaba yakhe, apho aphulaphuleyo amadoda amakhulu aloo mzi, umse kuwo umzi, umnike indawo, ukuba ahlale kuyo. Pha unokuhlala phakathi kwabo."
Joshua20:5 Ukuba umphindezeli wegazi uthe wamsukela, musa ukumnikela umbulali lowo esandleni sakhe; kuba wabetha ummelwane wakhe engazi, akazange amthiye ngaphambili."
Joshua20:6 Wohlala kuloo mzi ade eme phambi kwebandla, agwetywe, ade afe umbingeleli omkhulu oya kuba elapho ngaloo mihla kwisixeko awayebalekele kuso."
Joshua20:7 Bamisa iKedeshe yaseGalili eNtabeni yakwaNafetali, neShekem kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, neKiriyatarebha, oko kukuthi, iHebron, ezintabeni zakwaYuda."
Joshua20:8 Ngaphesheya kweYordan, eYeriko ngasempumalanga, banyula iBhete-tsere entlango, kwisizwe sakwaRubhen, neRamoti yaseGiliyadi, kwisizwe sakwaGadi, neGolan eBhashan, kwisizwe sakwaManase."
Joshua20:9 Zizo ezi izixeko ezigcinelwe oonyana bakaSirayeli bonke, nomphambukeli ophambukele phakathi kwabo, ukuze abalekele khona bonke ababulele umntu ngengozi, angabulawa ngumphindezeli wegazi, ade eme phambi kwebandla."
Joshua21:1 Zasondela ke iintloko zezindlu zooyise zabaLevi kuElazare umbingeleli, nakuYoshuwa unyana kaNun, nakwiintloko zezindlu zooyise zoonyana bakaSirayeli."
Joshua21:2 Bathetha kubo eShilo, ezweni lakwaKanan, bathi, uYehova uwise umthetho ngoMoses, ukuba siyinikwe imizi esiya kuhlala kuyo, namadlelo ayo abe ngawempahla emfutshane."
Joshua21:3 Oonyana bakaSirayeli babanika abaLevi ezo mizi, namadlelo ayo, elifeni labo, ngokomlomo kaYehova."
Joshua21:4 Laphuma iqashiso ngemizalwane yamaHeti; Oonyana bombingeleli uAron, abangabaLevi, babela isizwe sakwaYuda, nesizwe sakwaSimon, nesizwe sakwaBhenjamin, imizi elishumi elinamithathu."
Joshua21:5 Abanye oonyana bakaKehati banikwa iintsapho zesizwe sakwaEfrayim nesizwe sakwaDan nesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase ngeqashiso.
Joshua21:6 Oonyana bakaGershon banikwa imizi elishumi elinesithathu kwiintsapho zesizwe sakwaIsakare nesizwe sakwa-Ashere nesesizwe sakwaNafetali nakwisiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase eBhashan.
Joshua21:7 Oonyana bakaMerari ngokwemizalwane yabo banikwa esizweni sakwaRubhen, nakwisizwe sakwaGadi, nakwisizwe sakwaZebhulon, imizi elishumi elinamibini."
Joshua21:8 Oonyana bakaSirayeli babanika abaLevi ezo zixeko namadlelo azo ngeqashiso, kanye njengoko uYehova wabayalelayo ngenkonzo kaMoses."
Joshua21:9 Esizweni soonyana bakaYuda, nakwisizwe soonyana bakaSimon, labelwa le mizi magama;"
Joshua21:10 ababenoonyana baka-Aron emizalwaneni yamaKehati, yoonyana bakaLevi, ngokuba laba lelabo iqashiso lokuqala."
Joshua21:11 Babanika umzi ka-Arbha, uyise ka-Enaki, owaseHebron ke lowo, ezintabeni zakwaYuda, namadlelo ayo."
Joshua21:12 Ke lona ilizwe laloo mzi, namagxamesi awo, bawanika uKalebhi unyana kaYefune, ukuba libe yinzuzo yakhe."
Joshua21:13 Babanika oonyana baka-Aron umbingeleli iHebron nedlelo layo njengesixeko esikhululekileyo sokuxhelwa; neLibhena nedlelo layo;
Joshua21:14 neYatire namadlelo ayo, neEstemowa namadlelo ayo;"
Joshua21:15 neHolon namadlelo ayo, neDebhiri namadlelo ayo;"
Joshua21:16 neAyin nedlelo layo, neYuta nedlelo layo, neBhete-shemeshe nedlelo layo; izixeko ezisithoba kuzo zizwe zibini."
Joshua21:17 Kwisizwe sakwaBhenjamin iGibheyon nedlelo layo, neGebha nedlelo layo,"
Joshua21:18 iAnatoti nedlelo layo, neAlmon nedlelo layo; izixeko ezine."
Joshua21:19 Iyonke imizi yoonyana baka-Aron, ababingeleli, yaba yimizi elishumi elinamithathu inamadlelo ayo."
Joshua21:20 Imizalwane yoonyana bakaKehati, abaLevi abaseleyo koonyana bakaKehati, yanikwa isizwe sakwaEfrayim imizi yeqashiso."
Joshua21:21 Kuba babanika iShekem nedlelo layo ezintabeni zakwaEfrayim, njengesixeko esikhululekileyo sokuxhela; neGezere nedlelo layo;"
Joshua21:22 neKibhetsayim nedlelo layo, neBhete-horon nedlelo layo; izixeko ezine."
Joshua21:23 Ezweni lesizwe sakwaDan iEliteki nedlelo layo, neGibheton nedlelo layo,"
Joshua21:24 iAyalon nedlelo layo, iGati-rimon nedlelo layo; izixeko ezine."
Joshua21:25 Kwisiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase: iTanaki nedlelo layo, neGathrimon nedlelo layo; izixeko ezibini."
Joshua21:26 Iyonke imizi yaba lishumi, namadlelo ayo, ngokweenzala zoonyana bakaKehati abaseleyo."
Joshua21:27 Oonyana bakaGershon, iintsapho zabaLevi, kwesinye isiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase banikela iGolan eseBhashan nedlelo layo, njengesixeko esikhululekileyo sokuxhela; neBheshera nedlelo layo; izixeko ezibini."
Joshua21:28 Kwisizwe sakwaIsakare, iKishon nedlelo layo, neDabhere nedlelo layo;"
Joshua21:29 iYarmuti nedlelo layo, i-Enganim nedlelo layo; izixeko ezine."
Joshua21:30 Kwisizwe sakwa-Ashere, iMisale nedlelo layo, neAbhedon nedlelo layo,"
Joshua21:31 neHelekati nedlelo layo, neRehobhi nedlelo layo; izixeko ezine."
Joshua21:32 Kwisizwe sakwaNafetali, iKedeshe yaseGalili nedlelo layo, ibingumzi wosigezo; neHamoti-dore nedlelo layo, neKartan nedlelo layo; izixeko ezithathu."
Joshua21:33 Iyonke imizi yoonyana bakaGershon ngokwemizalwane yabo yaba yimizi elishumi elinamithathu, inamadlelo ayo."
Joshua21:34 Imizalwane yoonyana bakaMerari, engabaLevi abaseleyo, esizweni sakwaZebhulon, yiYokenam namadlelo ayo, neKarta namadlelo ayo;"
Joshua21:35 iDimna nedlelo layo, iNahalale nedlelo layo; izixeko ezine."
Joshua21:36 Kwisizwe sakwaRubhen iBhete-tsere nedlelo layo, neYahasa nedlelo layo;"
Joshua21:37 iKedemoti nedlelo layo, neMefahati nedlelo layo; izixeko ezine."
Joshua21:38 Kwisizwe sakwaGadi, iRamoti-giliyadi nedlelo layo, njengesixeko sokuxhela; neMahanayim namadlelo ayo;"
Joshua21:39 iHeshbhon nedlelo layo, iYazere nedlelo layo; izixeko ezine zizonke."
Joshua21:40 Iyonke imizi yoonyana bakaMerari ngokwemizalwane yabo, abaseleyo emizalwaneni yabaLevi ngeqashiso labo yaba yimizi elishumi elinamibini."
Joshua21:41 Iyonke imizi yabaLevi ezweni loonyana bakaSirayeli yaba yimizi engamashumi amane anesibhozo, inamadlelo ayo."
Joshua21:42 Loo mizi yonke ibinamadlelo ayo ngeenxa zonke; kwaba njalo ke kuyo yonke le mizi.
Joshua21:43 uYehova wamnika uSirayeli lonke ilizwe awayefungele ukumnika ookhokho bakhe; balidle ilifa, bahlala kulo."
Joshua21:44 uYehova wawaphumza, njengoko wafungayo kooyise; Akwabakho namnye weentshaba zawo ume phezu kwawo; uYehova wazinikela esandleni sawo zonke iintshaba zawo."
Joshua21:45 Akukho nto ingekhoyo uYehova ayithiyileyo kwindlu kaSirayeli; yonke into yenzeka.
Joshua22:1 Wababiza ke uYoshuwa amaRubhen, namaGadi, nesinye isizwe sakwaManase;"
Joshua22:2 Wathi kubo, Nikugcinile konke uMoses umkhonzi kaYehova abeniwisele umthetho ngako, naliphulaphula izwi lam ezintweni zonke endiniwisele umthetho ngazo."
Joshua22:3 Kangangeentsuku ezininzi anibalahlanga abazalwana benu, kodwa niye nawugcina umsebenzi womyalelo kaYehova uThixo wenu."
Joshua22:4 Kaloku ke, uYehova, uThixo wenu, ubaphumzile abazalwana benu, njengoko wathethayo kubo; buyani ke, niye ezintenteni zenu, kwelo lizwe lityebileyo, elo waninikayo uMoses, umkhonzi kaYehova, nganeno kweYordan;"
Joshua22:5 Gcinani niwugcine umthetho nomthetho, awaniwisela wona uMoses umkhonzi kaYehova, ukuba nimthande uYehova uThixo wenu, nihambe ngeendlela zakhe zonke, niyigcine imithetho yakhe, ninamathele kuye, nimkhonze ngentliziyo yenu yonke iintliziyo nangomphefumlo wakho wonke."
Joshua22:6 Wabasikelela uYoshuwa, wabandulula, baya ezintenteni zabo."
Joshua22:7 uMoses wasinika isiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase umhlaba waseBhashan, kodwa uYoshuwa wasinika esinye isabelo kubazalwana baso ngasentshona yeYordan. uYoshuwa wababuyisela ezintenteni zabo, wabasikelela;"
Joshua22:8 Wathi kubo, Buyelani ezintenteni zenu ninobutyebi obukhulu, ninengqwebo eninzi, nesilivere, negolide, nobhedu, nesinyithi, neengubo ezininzi; Yabelani amaxhoba eentshaba zenu phakathi kwabazalwana benu."
Joshua22:9 Babuya oonyana bakaRubhen, noonyana bakaGadi, nesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase, besuka koonyana bakaSirayeli eShilo, esezweni lakwaKanan, baya ezweni laseGiliyadi, ezweni lelifa labo balihlutha ngokomlomo kaYehova, ngokomsebenzi kaMoses."
Joshua22:10 Bafika emdeni weYordan, ezweni lakwaKanan, bakha oonyana bakaRubhen, noonyana bakaGadi, nesinye isahlulo sesizwe sakwaManase, isibingelelo ngaseYordan, isibingelelo esikhulu, esingasetyenzwayo ibonwa ngamehlo."
Joshua22:11 Beva oonyana bakaSirayeli, kusithiwa, Yabonani, oonyana bakaRubhen, noonyana bakaGadi, nesinye isahlulo sesizwe sakwaManase, bakhe isibingelelo malunga nelizwe lakwaKanan, emdeni weYordan, phezu kweYordan umendo woonyana bakaSirayeli."
Joshua22:12 Beva ke oonyana bakaSirayeli, balibizela ndawonye lonke ibandla loonyana bakaSirayeli eShilo, ukuba lilwe nabo."
Joshua22:13 Baza oonyana bakaSirayeli bathumela koonyana bakaRubhen noonyana bakaGadi nakwisiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase ezweni laseGiliyadi, uFinehasi unyana wombingeleli uEleyazare;"
Joshua22:14 Wayenabathetheli abalishumi kwindlu ngendlu, engukumkani nenganga, ezizweni zonke zakwaSirayeli; Elowo wayeyintloko yendlu yooyise kumawaka akwaSirayeli."
Joshua22:15 Beza koonyana bakaRubhen, noonyana bakaGadi, nakwisiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase, ezweni laseGiliyadi, bathetha kubo, besithi,"
Joshua22:16 Kwathiwa kwibandla lonke likaYehova, Bubugwenxa buni na obu, nimeneze ngabo kuThixo kaSirayeli, ekubuyeni kwenu kuYehova namhla, ngokuzakhela isibingelelo, nigwilike nje kuYehova namhla?"
Joshua22:17 Ngaba isiphoso sikaPehore sincinane gqitha kuthi, esingekazihlambululi kuso de kube namhlanje, nangona isibetho sabonakala ebandleni likaYehova?"
Joshua22:18 Ngaba ubuya kutyeka na namhlanje ekulandeleni uYehova? ngoxa nivukela uYehova namhlanje, ngomso uya kulicaphukela lonke ibandla lakwaSirayeli."
Joshua22:19 Ukuba liyinqambi ilizwe lelifa lenu, hambani niye ezweni lelifa likaYehova, ohleli kulo umnquba kaYehova, nixhamle phakathi kwethu; Ke musa ukugwilika kuYehova, musa ukusiphikisa; wazakhele isibingelelo phambi kwesibingelelo sikaYehova uThixo wethu."
Joshua22:20 Akazange na uAkan, unyana kaSeraki, enze ububi ngenxa yobubi, kwaza kwabakho umsindo phezu kwebandla lonke likaSirayeli? kwaye loo mntu akazange atshabalale ngokungendawo kwakhe yedwa."
Joshua22:21 Baphendula oonyana bakaRubhen, noonyana bakaGadi, nesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase, bathi kwiintloko zamawaka akwaSirayeli,"
Joshua22:22 uYehova, uThixouThixo, uYehova, uThixouThixo, nguye owaziyo, uya kumazi amaSirayeli; nokugwilika kuYehova, nokona kuYehova (musa ukusisindisa namhla)"
Joshua22:23 ukuze sakhe isibingelelo sokubuya simke kuYehova okanye senze umnikelo otshiswayo okanye umnikelo wokudla okuziinkozo phezu kwaso okanye senze imibingelelo yombulelo phezu kwaso, kuya kuba yimfuneko kuYehova ngokwakhe;"
Joshua22:24 Besingenakuyenza njani loo nto, ngenxa yokuba besisoyika lo mbandela, saza sathi, Ekuhambeni kwexesha oonyana benu baya kukwazi ukuthetha koonyana bethu, besithi, ‘Nina nengxaki uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli?"
Joshua22:25 Kuba uYehova umise umda weYordan phakathi kwethu nani, nyana bakaRubhen noonyana bakaGadi aninasabelo kuYehova; ukuze abantwana benu bayeke ukumoyika uYehova."
Joshua22:26 Kungenxa yoko le nto sithe: Masilungiselele ngoku ukuze asakhele isibingelelo, singesamadini anyukayo nemibingelelo."
Joshua22:27 Kodwa ukuze kube bubungqina phakathi kwethu nani nakwizizukulwana zethu eziya kulandela emva kwethu, ukuze siyenze inkonzo kaYehova phambi kobuso bakhe ngeminikelo yethu etshiswayo nangemibingelelo yethu nemibingelelo yethu yombulelo; ukuze oonyana benu ngexesha elifanelekileyo bangathi koonyana bethu: “Aninasabelo kuYehova nina."
Joshua22:28 Kungenxa yoko le nto sithe, ukuba bathe basixelela le nto, nakwizizukulwana zethu kwixesha elizayo, sobuya sithi, Khangelani umzekelo wesibingelelo sikaYehova, abasenzayo oobawo, kungekhona umlilo; kungekhona imibingelelo; kodwa ulingqina phakathi kwethu nani."
Joshua22:29 Ngamana uThixo angasithintela ekuvukeleni uYehova nasekuphambukeni kuYehova namhlanje, sakhe isibingelelo sedini elinyukayo neminikelo etshiswayo okanye iminikelo esibingelelweni sikaYehova uThixo wethu phambi komnquba wakhe."
Joshua22:30 Waweva ke uPinehasi umbingeleli, nezikhulu zebandla, neentloko zamawaka akwaSirayeli, ezibe zinaye, amazwi abewathethile oonyana bakaRubhen, noonyana bakaGadi, noonyana bakaManase, bawabona kakuhle."
Joshua22:31 Wathi uPinehasi, unyana wombingeleli uElazare, koonyana bakaRubhen, nakoonyana bakaGadi, nakoonyana bakaManase, Namhla siyabona ukuba uYehova uphakathi kwethu, ngokuba animonanga kuYehova nibakhulule ngoku oonyana bakaSirayeli esandleni sikaYehova."
Joshua22:32 Wabuya ke uPinehasi unyana kaElazare, umbingeleli nezikhulu, koonyana bakaRubhen, nakoonyana bakaGadi, ezweni laseGiliyadi, ezweni lakwaKanan, koonyana bakaSirayeli; bona yazi kwakhona."
Joshua22:33 Lalunga elo lizwi koonyana bakaSirayeli oonyana bakaSirayeli bamdumisa uThixo, àbacinga ukuba babaxabele, balitshabalalise ilizwe ababehleli kulo oonyana bakaRubhen noGadi."
Joshua22:34 Oonyana bakaRubhen noonyana bakaGadi basibiza eso sibingelelo ngokuthi nguEdi, kuba siya kuba lingqina phakathi kwethu lokuba uYehova unguThixo."
Joshua23:1 Kwakuba kudlule imihla emininzi, uYehova wabaphumza oonyana bakaSirayeli emsebenzini wabo wonke. Waluphele uYoshuwa, wabacinezela."
Joshua23:2 Wawabiza uYoshuwa onke amaSirayeli, amadoda awo amakhulu, nabathetheli bawo, nabagwebi bawo, nabathetheli bawo, wathi kubo, Mna ndisendimdala, ndicinezelekile."
Joshua23:3 Nina nikubonile konke abekwenzile uYehova uThixo wenu kwezo ntlanga zonke ngenxa yenu; ngokuba uYehova uThixo wenu nguye onilweleyo.
Joshua23:4 Yabonani, ndizahlula ngamaqashiso ezi ntlanga ziseleyo, zibe lilifa lezizukulwana zenu, zithabathele eYordan, kunye neentlanga zonke endazitshabalalisayo, zesa kulwandle olukhulu ngasentshonalanga."
Joshua23:5 uYehova uThixo wakho wozigqogqa phambi kwakho, azigqogqe phambi kwakho; yaye niya kulidla ilifa ilizwe labo njengoko uYehova uThixo wenu wanithembisayo."
Joshua23:6 Yomelelani kunene, nigcine nenze konke okubhaliweyo encwadini yomyalelo kaMoses, ukuze ningatyeki kuwo, niye ekunene nasekhohlo;"
Joshua23:7 ukuze ningangeni ezi ntlanga ziseleyo phakathi kwenu; ningawakhankanyi amagama oothixo bazo, nifunge ngawo, ningabakhonzi, ningabakhonzi."
Joshua23:8 Kodwa namathelani kuYehova uThixo wenu, njengoko nenzileyo unanamhla."
Joshua23:9 Kuba uYehova wagxotha iintlanga ezinkulu nezomeleleyo phambi kwenu, kodwa nina akukho namnye owakhe wema phambi kwenu de kube namhla;"
Joshua23:10 indoda enye kuni isukele iwaka; ngokuba uYehova uThixo wenu nguye onilwelayo, njengoko wakuthethayo kuni."
Joshua23:11 Zilumkeleni, ukuze nimthande uYehova uThixo wenu."
Joshua23:12 Kungenjalo ungenza nangayiphi na indlela, ubuye uwathabathe amasalela ezi zizwe, eziseleyo phakathi kwenu, uwathabathe, ungene nawo, nawo abe nawe;"
Joshua23:13 Yazini ukuba uYehova, uThixo wenu, akasayi kuphinda azigqogqe ezi ntlanga phambi kwenu; kube ngumgibe nomgibe kuni, kube ziingozi emacaleni enu, noviko emehlweni enu, nide nicinywe kulo mhlaba ulungileyo, aninikileyo uYehova uThixo wenu."
Joshua23:14 Yabonani, ndihamba ngendlela yehlabathi lonke namhlanje; yonke into yenzeke kuwe, akukho nto iye yasilela kuyo."
Joshua23:15 Kuya kuthi ke kuni, njengoko onke amazwi alungileyo, abewathethile uYehova uThixo wenu kuni, anifikele; uYehova wozisela ububi bonke kuwe, akonakalisa kulo mhlaba ulungileyo, aninikileyo uYehova uThixo wakho."
Joshua23:16 Xa nithe nawaphula umnqophiso kaYehova uThixo wenu, awaniwisela umthetho ngawo, nahamba nakhonza thixo bambi, nabanqula; kulapho uvuthe umsindo kaYehova kuni, nitshabalale kamsinya emhlabeni olungileyo aninikileyo."
Joshua24:1 Wazibizela ndawonye uYoshuwa zonke izizwe zakwaSirayeli kwaShekem, wabiza amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, neentloko zawo, nabagwebi bawo, nabalungiseleli bawo; bazimisa phambi koThixo."
Joshua24:2 Wathi uYoshuwa kubo bonke abantu, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ooyihlo babehleli phesheya koMlambo kususela kwamandulo, njengoTera, uyise ka-Abraham, uyise kaNakore; bakhonza thixo bambi."
Joshua24:3 Ndamthabatha uyihlo uAbraham ndamwela umkhukula ndamhambisa kulo lonke ilizwe lakwaKanan ndaza ndayandisa inzala yakhe ndaza ndamnika uIsake.
Joshua24:4 Ndamnika uIsake noYakobi noEsawu; uEsawu ndamnika intaba yakwaSehire, ukuba ayime; ke uYakobi noonyana bakhe behla baya eYiputa."
Joshua24:5 Ndaphinda ndathuma uMoses noAron, ndayicinezela iYiputa, njengoko ndenzayo kuyo; ndaza emva koko ndanikhupha."
Joshua24:6 Ndamkhupha uyihlo eYiputa, weza elwandle; amaYiputa amsukela uyihlo eneenqwelo zokulwa nangabamahashe, ada besa kuLwandle oluBomvu."
Joshua24:7 Bambiza uYehova, wabeka ubumnyama phakathi kwenu namaYiputa, wawazisela ulwandle, wawagubungela; amehlo enu akubona oko ndakwenzayo eYiputa, nahlala entlango imihla emininzi."
Joshua24:8 Ndaningenisa ezweni lama-Amori, abehleli phesheya kweYordan; balwa nani; ndawanikela esandleni senu, ukuze nilidle ilifa ilizwe lawo; Ndazitshabalalisa phambi kwakho."
Joshua24:9 Wesuka uBhalaki unyana kaTsipore, ukumkani wakwaMowabhi, walwa namaSirayeli, wathumela kuBhileham unyana kaBhehore, ukuba aniqalekise."
Joshua24:10 Andivuma ke ukumphulaphula uBhileham; ke ngoko, usakusikelela; ngenxa yoko ndanihlangula esandleni sakhe."
Joshua24:11 Nayiwela iYordan nafika eYeriko, yaye amadoda aseYeriko alwa nani, ama-Amori namaPerizi namaKanan namaHiti namaGirgashi namaHiti namaYebhusi; ndawanikela esandleni sakho."
Joshua24:12 Ndathumela oonomeva phambi kwenu, babagqogqa phambi kwenu, ookumkani bobabini bama-Amori; kodwa kungabi ngekrele lakho, nangesaphetha sakho."
Joshua24:13 Ndaninika ilizwe eningalikhonzanga, nemizi eningayakhanga, nahlala ke kuyo; udla izidiliya nemithi yeminquma, ongayityalanga."
Joshua24:14 Moyikeni ke ngoko uYehova, nimkhonze ngenyaniso nangenyaniso; basuseni oothixo ababekhonza bona ooyihlo phesheya koMlambo naseYiputa; khonza uYehova."
Joshua24:15 Ukuba kubi emehlweni akho ukumkhonza uYehova, zinyulele namhla lowo uya kumkhonza; noothixo ababekhonza bona ooyihlo phesheya koMlambo, noothixo bama-Amori enihleli ezweni lawo; Ke mna nendlu yam siya kukhonza uYehova."
Joshua24:16 Baphendula abantu bathi, Masingemki kuYehova, sikhonze thixo bambi;"
Joshua24:17 Ngokuba nguYehova, uThixo wethu, owasikhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa, endlwini yobukhoboka, thina noobawo, owayenzayo le miqondiso mikhulu phambi kwethu, nosigcinayo endleleni yonke esahamba ngayo naphantsi kwethu bonke abantu esacanda kubo;"
Joshua24:18 uYehova wabagqogqa bonke abantu phambi kwethu, ama-Amori abehleli ezweni; ke ngoko, nathi siya kukhonza uYehova; ngokuba nguThixo wethu yena."
Joshua24:19 Wathi uYoshuwa ebantwini, Aninako ukumkhonza uYehova; ngokuba nguThixo ongcwele; unguThixo onekhwele; Akayi kunixolela ukreqo lwenu nezono zenu."
Joshua24:20 Ukuba nithe namfulathela uYehova, nakhonza thixo bambi, wojikela kuni, anenzele ububi, anitshabalalise, ngokuba anenzele okulungileyo nina."
Joshua24:21 Bathi abantu kuYoshuwa, Hayi; ke thina siya kukhonza uYehova."
Joshua24:22 Wathi uYoshuwa ebantwini: “Ningamangqina enu ukuba ninyule uYehova ukuba nimkhonze. Bathi ke bona, Singamangqina."
Joshua24:23 Uthi ke, Balahleni oothixo bolunye uhlanga abaphakathi kwenu, nimthobele ngeentliziyo zenu uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli."
Joshua24:24 Bathi abantu kuYoshuwa, Siya kukhonza uYehova uThixo wethu, siliphulaphule ilizwi lakhe."
Joshua24:25 Wandula ke uYoshuwa wenza umnqophiso nabantu ngaloo mini waza wabamisela umthetho nommiselo kwaShekem.
Joshua24:26 uYoshuwa wawabhala la mazwi encwadini yomthetho kaTHIXO oyinyaniso, wathabatha ilitye elikhulu walibeka apho phantsi komthi womthi wokripthi kwindawo engcwele kaYehova."
Joshua24:27 Wathi uYoshuwa kubo bonke abantu, Yabonani, eli litye liya kuba lingqina lethu; ngokuba niwevile onke amazwi kaYehova, awathethileyo kuthi."
Joshua24:28 Wabandulula ke uYoshuwa abantu, elowo waya elifeni lakhe."
Joshua24:29 Emveni kwezi zinto, wafa uYoshuwa unyana kaNun, umkhonzi kaYehova, eminyaka ilikhulu elinashumi-nye ezelwe."
Joshua24:30 Bamngcwabela emdeni welifa lakhe, eTimnati-sera, ekweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, entla kwenduli yakwaGahazi."
Joshua24:31 Oonyana bakaSirayeli bamkhonza uYehova yonke imihla kaYoshuwa, nayo yonke imihla yamadoda amakhulu awasindayo kuYoshuwa, ibe ayewazi onke amashwa."
Joshua24:32 Amathambo kaYosefu awawanyusayo oonyana bakaSirayeli eYiputa baza awangcwaba kwaShekem entsimini awayithenga uYakobi koonyana bakaHamore uyise kaShekem ngekhulu leeshekele zesilivere; ilifa loonyana bakaYosefu.
Joshua24:33 Wafa ke uElazare unyana ka-Aron; yaye bamngcwabela endulini kaFinehasi unyana wakhe, awayinikwayo kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim."
Judges1:1 Wafa uYoshuwa, babuza oonyana bakaSirayeli kuYehova, besithi, Ngubani na kuthi oya kuwaxabela amaKanan, aqale alwe nawo?"
Judges1:2 Wathi uYehova, Konyuka uYuda; yabona, ndilinikela ilizwe esandleni sakhe."
Judges1:3 Wathi uYuda kuSimon umkhuluwa wakhe, Nyuka nam siye endaweni yam, siye kulwa namaKanan; kwaye ndiya kuhamba nawe ekupheleni kwakho. Wahamba naye uSimon."
Judges1:4 Wenyuka uYuda; yaye uYehova wawanikela esandleni sawo amaKanan namaPersi, aza abulala phakathi kwawo ishumi lamawaka amadoda eBheseki."
Judges1:5 Bamfumana uAdoni-bhezeki eBhezeki baza balwa naye baza bawabulala amaKanan namaPersi.
Judges1:6 Wasaba uAdoni-bhezeki; bamsukela, bambamba, bamnqumla oobhontsi bezandla neenzwane."
Judges1:7 Wathi uAdoni-bhezeki, Ookumkani abangamashumi amathandathu aneshumi ababenqumla oosithupha bezandla noobhontsi behlanganisana phantsi kwetafile yam; njengoko ndenze ngako, wenjenjalo uThixo kum. Bamsa eYerusalem, wafela khona."
Judges1:8 Oonyana bakaYuda bayingenela iYerusalem, bayithimba, bayibulala ngohlangothi lwekrele, basitshisa neso sixeko."
Judges1:9 Emva koko behla oonyana bakaYuda baya kulwa namaKanan awayehlala ezintabeni ezimzantsi nasentlanjeni yomlambo oqukuqelayo.
Judges1:10 Aza amaYuda alwa namaKanan abehleli eHebron; igama leHebron ngenxa engaphambili beliyiKiriyati ka-Arbha; ababulala uSheshayi, noAkiman, noTalemayi."
Judges1:11 Ukusuka apho wabahlasela abemi baseDebhiri, yaye igama leDebhiri laliyiKiriyati-sefere ngenxa engaphambili."
Judges1:12 Wathi uKalebhi, Othe wayithimba iKiriyati-sefere, wayithimba, ndomnika intombi yam uAhazi, ibe ngumkakhe."
Judges1:13 Wangena uOteniyeli, unyana kaKenazi, umzalwana kaKalebhi, wamnika intombi yakhe, uAkisa, yangumkakhe."
Judges1:14 Efikile ke kuye, wamvuselela ukuba acele umhlaba kuyise; Wathi uKalebhi kuye, Ùfuna ntoni na?"
Judges1:15 Wathi kuye, Ndinike into, ngokuba undinike umhlaba wasezantsi; ndinike imithombo yamanzi. Ke uKalebhi wamnika amaqula aphezulu namaqula angaphantsi."
Judges1:16 Oonyana bakaMokeni, uyise womkaMoses, benyuka noonyana bakaYuda, besuka emzini wamaSundu, baya entlango yakwaYuda, ezantsi kweAradi baya bahlala phakathi kwabantu."
Judges1:17 uYuda wahamba noSimon umkhuluwa wakhe, bawabulala amaKanan abehleli eShefati, bayitshabhisa. Igama laloo mzi laliyiHorma."
Judges1:18 AmaYuda ayithimba iGasa nommandla wayo ngaselwandle, neAshkelon nommandla wayo, ne-Ekron nommandla wayo."
Judges1:19 uYehova waba noYuda; wabagqogqa abemi bentaba; ke ababanga nako ukubagqogqa abemi bentili, ngokuba babeneemoto zesinyithi."
Judges1:20 Bamnika uKalebhi eHebron, njengoko wathethayo uMoses, wabathuma khona oonyana bobathathu baka-Anaki."
Judges1:21 Ke oonyana bakaBhenjamin abawagqogqanga amaYebhusi, abehleli eYerusalem; kodwa amaYebhusi asahlala noonyana bakaBhenjamin eYerusalem de kube namhla."
Judges1:22 Benyuka nabo abendlu kaYosefu, baya eBheteli, uYehova waba nabo."
Judges1:23 Indlu kaYosefu yathumela ukuba kuhlolwe iBheteli. (Ke igama laloo mzi ngenxa engaphambili beliyiLuze.)
Judges1:24 Iintlola ezo zambona umntu ephuma esixekweni, zathi kuye, Sibonise indlela yokungena kulo mzi; soba nenceba kuwe."
Judges1:25 Akubabonisa indlela yokungena esixekweni, bawuthimba umzi ngohlangothi lwekrele; Bayikhulula indoda leyo, nayo yonke intsapho yayo."
Judges1:26 Loo ndoda yahamba yaya kwilizwe lamaHeti yaza yakha isixeko, yasibiza ngokuba yiLuse, ligama laso elo de kube namhla."
