Judges1:27 Akazange abe nabemi baseBhete-shehan namadlelo ayo, neTahanaki namadlelo ayo, nabahleli eDore namadlelo ayo, nabemi baseIbleyam namadlelo ayo, nabemi baseMegido namadlelo ayo hayi ukugxotha; kodwa amaKanan afuna ukuhlala kwelo lizwe."
Judges1:28 Bathi bakomelela oonyana bakaSirayeli, bawahlasela amaKanan, kodwa abazange bawagxothe."
Judges1:29 uEfrayim akawagqogqanga amaKanan abehleli eGezere; ahlala amaKanan phakathi kwawo eGezere.
Judges1:30 Naye uZebhulon akazange abagxothe abemi baseKitron nabemi baseNahaloli; amaKanan ahlala phakathi kwabo, emlungiselela."
Judges1:31 Yaye uAshere akazange abagxothe abemi baseAki nabemi baseSidon okanye iAglabhi neAgisibhi neHelebha neApiki neRehobhi.
Judges1:32 Kodwa ama-Ashere ahlala phakathi kwamaKanan awayehlala kwelo lizwe, kuba akazange awagxothe."
Judges1:33 Kananjalo uNafetali akabagqogqanga abemi baseBhete-shemeshe nabemi baseBhete-anati; wahlala phakathi kwamaKanan abehleli kwelo zwe; kodwa abemi baseBhete-shemeshe naseBhete-anati babengabahlawuli berhafu kubo.
Judges1:34 Ama-Amori amkhwelisa umntwana kweleentaba, ngokuba akabavumelanga ukuba behle baye entilini."
Judges1:35 Ke ama-Amori ami entabeni yeHeres, eAyalon naseSaalbhim;"
Judges1:36 Umda wama-Amori wathabathela ethambekeni leAkrabhim, eLiwa, wesa encotsheni."
Judges2:1 Saphuma isithunywa sikaYehova eGiligali, senyuka saya eBhogim, sathi, Ndanikhupha eYiputa, ndanizisa ezweni endafungayo kooyihlo; ndathi, Andiyi kuwaphula umnqophiso wam nawe;"
Judges2:2 Musani ukuhlangana nabemi beli lizwe; nizidilizile izibingelelo zabo, aniliphulaphula ilizwi lam. Uyenzele ntoni lonto?"
Judges2:3 Ndathi ke, Andiyi kubagxotha phambi kwakho; kodwa baya kuba njengameva emacaleni enu, noothixo bazo babe ngumgibe kuni."
Judges2:4 Sawathetha ke isithunywa sikaYehova la mazwi kubo bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli, baliphakamisa abantu izwi labo, balila."
Judges2:5 Bayibiza loo ndawo ngokuthi yiBhogim baza babingelela kuYehova apho.
Judges2:6 Wathi uYoshuwa ebantwini ukuba bahambe; baya oonyana bakaSirayeli elowo elifeni lakhe, ukuba balidle ilifa ilizwe."
Judges2:7 Abantu bamkhonza uYehova yonke imihla kaYoshuwa nayo yonke imihla yamadoda amakhulu awayesaphila emva koYoshuwa, awayeyibona yonke imisebenzi emikhulu kaYehova awayeyenzele amaSirayeli."
Judges2:8 Wafa ke uYoshuwa unyana kaNun, umkhonzi kaYehova, eminyaka ilikhulu elinashumi-nye ezelwe."
Judges2:9 Bamngcwabela emdeni welifa lakhe, eTimnatare, kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, kumntla wenduli yaseGahazi."
Judges2:10 Yaye sonke eso sizukulwana sasuswa kooyise, kwaza kwavela esinye isizukulwana emva kwaso, awayengasazi uYehova okanye imisebenzi awayeyenzele uSirayeli."
Judges2:11 Oonyana bakaSirayeli benza ububi emehlweni kaYehova, bakhonza ooBhahali."
Judges2:12 Bamnikela umva uYehova uThixo wooyise, owabakhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa, balandela oothixo bolunye uhlanga, oothixo beentlanga ezibangqongileyo, babanqula, bamphikisa uYehova umsindo."
Judges2:13 Bamlahla ke uYehova, bakhonza uBhahali noAshtaroti."
Judges2:14 Wavutha umsindo kaYehova ngoonyana bakaSirayeli, waza wabanikela esandleni sabaphangi ababaphangayo, waza wathengisa ngabo esandleni seentshaba zabo ezazibajikelezile, ukuze bangabi saba nakuma phambi kweentshaba zabo."
Judges2:15 Naphi na apho aya khona, isandla sikaYehova saba nxamnye nawo ngobubi, kanye njengoko wakuthethayo uYehova nanjengoko wayewathethile ngesifungo uYehova; bakhathazeka kakhulu."
Judges2:16 Ke uYehova wavelisa abagwebi, ababasindisayo esandleni sabo babewaphanga."
Judges2:17 Noko ke, akabaphulaphulanga abagwebi bawo, asuka akrexeza nabanye oothixo, babanqula kodwa abazange."
Judges2:18 uYehova wabazisa abagwebi, uYehova waba naloo mgwebi, wabasindisa esandleni seentshaba zabo yonke imihla yaloo mgwebi; ngokuba uYehova wayenovelwano ngabo, walila ngenxa yabacinezeli bawo wabacaphukisa."
Judges2:19 Kwathi, kwakutshatyalaliswa umgwebi lowo, babuya batshabalalisa ngaphezu kooyise, balandela thixo bambi, babakhonze, baqubude kubo; abazange bazilahle izenzo zabo neentshukumo zabo ezilukhuni."
Judges2:20 Wavutha ke umsindo kaYehova kuSirayeli; Wathi, Ekubeni olu hlanga luwaphule umnqophiso wam endawumisela ooyise, alwaliphulaphula ilizwi lam;"
Judges2:21 Kananjalo, ukususela ngoku kuse phambili, andiyi kugxotha nabani na phakathi kweentlanga awazishiyayo uYoshuwa ekufeni kwakhe;"
Judges2:22 ukuze ndibacikide oonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuba boyigcina na indlela kaYehova, bahambe ngayo, njengoko bayigcinayo ooyise, abayi kuyigcina, kusini na."
Judges2:23 Kungenxa yoko le nto uYehova ezishiya ngaphandle kokuzigxotha ngokukhawuleza ezo ntlanga; akabanikela esandleni sikaYoshuwa.
Judges3:1 Zizo ezi iintlanga awazishiyayo uYehova, ukuze awalinge oonyana bakaSirayeli, oonyana bakaSirayeli bonke ababengazazi zonke iimfazwe zakwaKanan;"
Judges3:2 Kuphela nje ukuze izizukulwana zoonyana bakaSirayeli zazi, ukuze zifundiswe imfazwe, kwanabo babengazi nto ngayo ngaphambili;"
Judges3:3 Zizo ezi iinkosana ezintlanu zamaFilisti nawo onke amaKanan namaSidon namaHeti awayehlala kwiNtaba yeLebhanon ukusuka kwiNtaba yeBhahali-Hermon ukuya kutsho eHamati.
Judges3:4 Kwafuneka abavavanye bebodwa oonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuze kwazi ukuba babeya kuyiphulaphula na imiyalelo uYehova awayeyinike ookhokho bawo ngoMoses."
Judges3:5 Bahlala oonyana bakaSirayeli phakathi kwamaKanan, namaHeti, nama-Amori, namaPerizi, namaHeti, namaYebhusi."
Judges3:6 Bazizeka iintombi zawo zaba ngabafazi bawo, neentombi zawo bazinika oonyana bawo, bakhonza oothixo bawo."
Judges3:7 Oonyana bakaSirayeli benza ububi emehlweni kaYehova, bamlibala uYehova uThixo wabo, bakhonza ooBhahali namatyholo."
Judges3:8 Wavutha ke umsindo kaYehova ngoonyana bakaSirayeli, wathengisa ngabo esandleni sikaKushan-ristaima, ukumkani wakwa-Aram phakathi kweMilambo;"
Judges3:9 Babiza oonyana bakaSirayeli kuYehova, wabavelisela umsindisi oonyana bakaSirayeli, wabahlangula, uOteniyeli, unyana kaKenazi, umzalwana kaKalebhi."
Judges3:10 uMoya kaYehova waba phezu kwakhe, wabakhokela oonyana bakaSirayeli, waphuma waya kulwa kwaye isandla sakhe samoyisa iKusan-Risatime."
Judges3:11 Lazola ilizwe iminyaka emashumi mane. Wafa uOteniyeli, unyana kaKenazi."
Judges3:12 Baphinda oonyana bakaSirayeli benza ububi emehlweni kaYehova; yaye uYehova wamomeleza uEglon ukumkani wakwaMowabhi nxamnye noSirayeli, ngenxa yokuba benze ububi emehlweni kaYehova."
Judges3:13 Wabahlanganisa ndawonye oonyana baka-Amon no-Amaleki, wahamba wawaxabela amaSirayeli, wawuthimba umzi wamasundu."
Judges3:14 Oonyana bakaSirayeli bamkhonza uEglon, ukumkani wakwaMowabhi, iminyaka elishumi elinesibhozo."
Judges3:15 Bathi bakubiza oonyana bakaSirayeli kuYehova, wabavelisela umsindisi, uEhudi unyana kaGera, umBhenjamin, indoda elinxele; oonyana bakaSirayeli bathumela izipho ngaye kuEglon, ukumkani wakwaMowabhi."
Judges3:16 uEhude wazenzela ikrele elintlangothi-mbini, ubude balo likubhite enye; wawubopha phantsi kwengubo yakhe ethangeni lakhe lasekunene."
Judges3:17 Wasondeza isipho kuEglon ukumkani wakwaMowabhi; uEglon ebengumfo otyebileyo.
Judges3:18 Wathi akugqiba ukumnika isipho, wathi abo babethwele eso sipho mabahambe."
Judges3:19 Wabuya emifanekisweni eqingqiweyo eseGiligali, wathi, Ndinelizwi lasentsithelweni nawe, kumkani; Baphuma kuye bonke ababemi phambi kwakhe."
Judges3:20 Waya kuye uEhude; wahlala egumbini lasehlotyeni, abenalo. Wathi uEhude, Ndinelizwi likaThixo eliza kuwe; Uye waphakama esihlalweni."
Judges3:21 uEhudi wasolula isandla sakhe sasekhohlo waza walithabatha ikrele ethangeni lakhe lasekunene waza wamhlaba ngalo esiswini.
Judges3:22 Yangena nencakuba emva kwencakuba; inqatha layigubungela intsimbi, akaba nako ukulikhupha ikrele esiswini sakhe; kwaphuma ukungcola."
Judges3:23 Waphuma uEhude waya evarandeni, wazivala iingcango zegumbi lokuhlala, wazitshixa;"
Judges3:24 Ephumile ke yena, bafika abakhonzi bakhe; yaye bakubona iingcango zegumbi lokutyela zivaliwe, bathi: “Enyanisweni, ugubungela iinyawo zakhe egumbini lakhe lasehlotyeni."
Judges3:25 Balinda bada baneentloni, nanko kungavuli mntu ezingcangweni zegumbi lokuhlala; bawuthabatha ke umkhombe, bawuvula, nanko ukumkani wabo ewile emhlabeni, wafa."
Judges3:26 uEhude wasaba, besazilazila bona, wayigqitha imifanekiso eqingqiweyo, wasabela eSeirati."
Judges3:27 Uthe akufika wavuthela ngesigodlo kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, behla naye oonyana bakaSirayeli kweleentaba, wabakhokela."
Judges3:28 Wathi kubo, Ndilandeleni, ngokuba uYehova uzinikele iintshaba zenu, amaMowabhi, esandleni senu. Behla ke, bamlandela, bawela iYordan baya kwaMowabhi, abavumela mntu ukuba awele."
Judges3:29 Ngelo xesha babulala kwaMowabhi malunga neshumi lamawaka amadoda, onke amadoda anobukroti, anobukroti; akwasinda mntu."
Judges3:30 Woyiswa ke amaMowabhi ngaloo mini phantsi kwesandla samaSirayeli; Lazola ilizwe iminyaka emashumi asibhozo.
Judges3:31 Emva kwakhe yaba nguSamgare, unyana ka-Anati, owabulala kumaFilisti amakhulu amathandathu ngendle yenkomo; wawasindisa amaSirayeli."
Judges4:1 Baphinda oonyana bakaSirayeli benza ububi emehlweni kaYehova, ekufeni kukaEhude."
Judges4:2 uYehova wathengisa ngabo, wabanikela esandleni sikaYabhin, ukumkani wakwaKanan, obephethe iHatsore; Ingqwayi-ngqwayi yakhe ibinguSisera, owayehlala eHarosheti yeentlanga."
Judges4:3 Bambiza oonyana bakaSirayeli kuYehova, ngokuba ebeneenqwelo zesinyithi ezingamakhulu asithoba; Wabacinezela oonyana bakaSirayeli iminyaka emashumi mabini."
Judges4:4 Kwaye uDebhora, umprofetikazi, umkaLapidoti, nguye owayekhokela amaSirayeli ngelo xesha."
Judges4:5 Wayehlala phantsi komthi wesundu kaDebhora phakathi kweRama neBheteli kummandla weentaba wakwaEfrayim, yaye oonyana bakaSirayeli benyuka baya kuye ukuze agwebe."
Judges4:6 Wathumela kuBharaki, unyana ka-Abhinowam, waseKedeshe-nafetali, wathi kuye, Akawisanga mthetho na uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, esithi, Yiya entabeni yeTabhore, uthabathe ishumi lamawaka koonyana bakaNafetali, uze? nawe? Koonyana bakaZebhulon?"
Judges4:7 Ndiya kumtsalela kuwe uSisera, injengele yomkhosi kaYabhin, iinqwelo zakhe zokulwa nesihlwele sakhe kuMlambo iKishon; ndimnikele esandleni senu."
Judges4:8 Wathi uBharaki kuye, Ukuba ùthanda ukuhamba nam, ndohamba; ukuba akuthanga uhambe nam, andiyi kuhamba."
Judges4:9 Wathi, Ndiya kuhamba nawe; ngokuba uYehova uya kumnikela uSisera esandleni somfazi. Wagqiba uDebhora, wahamba noBharaki ukuya eKedeshe."
Judges4:10 uBharaki wawabiza amaZebhulon noNafetali, ukuba yiKedeshe; wenyuka eneshumi lamawaka amadoda ngasezinyaweni zakhe, noDebhora wenyuka naye."
Judges4:11 Wazahlula uHebhere, umKanan, koonyana bakaHobhabhi, uyise kaMoses, kumaKanan, wamisa iintente zakhe, wada wesa kuMoki waseSanayim eKedeshe."
Judges4:12 Waxelelwa uSisera ukuba uBharaki, unyana ka-Abhinowam, unyuke waya entabeni yeTabhore."
Judges4:13 uSisera wazihlanganisa zonke iinqwelo zakhe zokulwa, amakhulu asithoba eenqwelo zesinyithi yedwa, nabantu bonke ababenaye, bethabathela eHarosheti yeentlanga, besa emlanjeni oyiKishon."
Judges4:14 uDebhora wathi kuBharaki: “Yima! kuba le yimini uYehova aya kumnikela ngayo uSisera esandleni sakho. Akanikhokelanga na uYehova? Wehla uBharaki entabeni yeTabhore, elandelwa ngamadoda angamawaka alishumi."
Judges4:15 uYehova wamdubaduba uSisera neenqwelo zakhe zonke zokulwa, nomkhosi wakhe wonke, ngohlangothi lwekrele phambi koBharaki; Wehla uSisera enqwelweni yakhe, wasaba ngeenyawo."
Judges4:16 uBharaki wazisukela iinqwelo zokulwa nomkhosi, wesa eHarosheti yeentlanga; akwasala namnye."
Judges4:17 uSisera wasaba ngeenyawo, waya ententeni kaYaheli, umkaHebhere, umKeni; ngokuba belixolile phakathi koYabhin ukumkani waseHatsore nendlu kaHebhere umKeni."
Judges4:18 Waphuma ke uYaheli, waya kumkhawulela uSisera, wathi kuye, Khawuze kum, nkosi yam; Musa ukuphaphazela. Uthe xa engena naye ententeni, wamgquma ngengubo."
Judges4:19 Wathi kuye, Ndiphe amanzi ndisele, ngokuba ndinxaniwe; wayivula intsuba yobisi, wamseza, wayivala."
Judges4:20 Wathi ke kuye, Yima emnyango ententeni; uya kuthi: Hayi."
Judges4:21 uYaheli umkaHebhere wathabatha isikhonkwane sentente, waphatha isando ngesandla, wasondela kuye, wabethelela isikhonkwane ezibondeni zakhe, wasibethelela emhlabeni, kuba wayelele ubuthongo. Ngoko wafa."
Judges4:22 Kwathi, xa uBharaki esasukela uSisera, waphuma uYaheli waya kumkhawulela, wathi kuye, Yiza, ndikubonise indoda uyifunayo. Wathi akungena ententeni yakhe, wabona uSisera elele efile, enesikhonkwane etempileni yakhe."
Judges4:23 uThixo wamthoba ngaloo mini uYabhin, ukumkani wamaKanan, phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Judges4:24 Isandla soonyana bakaSirayeli saqhubeka simoyisa uYabhin, ukumkani wamaKanan, bada bamchitha uYabhin, ukumkani wakwaKanan."
Judges5:1 Baza bavuma ooDebhora noBharaki, unyana ka-Abhinowam, ngaloo mini, besithi,"
Judges5:2 Mdumiseni uYehova, ngenxa yempindezelo yakwaSirayeli, Ekunikeleni kwabo ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo abantu;"
Judges5:3 Yivani, bokumkani; yivani, zidwangube; Ndiya kuvuma kuYehova; Ndiyakuthanda ukuvuma iindumiso kuYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli."
Judges5:4 uYehova ekuphumeni kwenu kwaSehire, ekunyukeni kwenu ezweni lakwaEdom, Lanyikima ihlabathi, izulu lavuza, amafu avuza amanzi."
Judges5:5 Iintaba zanyibilika phambi koYehova, kwaneSinayi phambi koYehova, uTHIXO kaSirayeli."
Judges5:6 Ngemihla kaSamgare, unyana ka-Anati, Ngemihla kaYaheli, bezingahanjwa iindlela, Abahambi babehamba ngeendlela."
Judges5:7 Abemi bemizi bamisa, bawavala amaSirayeli, ndada ndema mna, Debhora, ndema njengonina kaSirayeli."
Judges5:8 Bazinyulela oothixo abatsha; kwaliwa emasangweni; Ngaba bekukho ikhaka okanye umkhonto phakathi kwamashumi amane amawaka akwaSirayeli?
Judges5:9 Intliziyo yam ikubalawuli bakwaSirayeli abazinikele ngokuzithandela phakathi kwabantu. Dumisani uYehova.
Judges5:10 Yithini, nina bakhwele edizayini ezimhlophe, nina bahlala enkundleni, nina bahamba ngendlela."
Judges5:11 Abo basindisiweyo kwisandi sabo badubula ngesaphetha kwiindawo zemithombo yamanzi, apho baya kuva izenzo zobulungisa zikaYehova, izenzo zobulungisa azenzayo kubemi bezixeko zakhe zakwaSirayeli, ke abantu bakaYehova baya kuhla baye emasangweni."
Judges5:12 Vuka, vuka, Debhora; vuka, vuka, vuma ingoma; Suk’ ume, Bharaki, umthabathe umthimbe unyana ka-Abhinowam."
Judges5:13 Abaseleyo wabamisela ukuba balawule amanene ezintlangeni; uYehova undenze umlawuli wabanamandla.
Judges5:14 KwaEfrayim ingcambu yabo yaba ngama-Amaleki; emva kwakho, Bhenjamin, phakathi kwabantu bakowenu; kwaMagire kwaphuma abathetheli, kwaZebhulon abo baphethe usiba lombhali."
Judges5:15 KwaIsakare abathetheli kunye noDebhora; ewe, uIsakare noBharaki; wasiwa entilini ngeenyawo. Kumaqela akwaRubhen kwakukho iingcamango ezinkulu zentliziyo."
Judges5:16 Kutheni na uhlala ezibayeni zezimvu ukuze uve ukukhala komhlambi? Zazigocagoca kakhulu iintliziyo zamaqela kaRubhen.
Judges5:17 uGiliyadi wahlala ngaphesheya kweYordan, yaye kwakutheni ukuze uDan aqhubeke ehlala ezinqanaweni? Wahlala uAshere elunxwemeni lolwandle, wahlala ezintenteni zakhe."
Judges5:18 uZebhulon noNafetali yayingabantu ababeke babeka ubomi babo esichengeni de bafe kwiindawo eziphakamileyo.
Judges5:19 Ookumkani beza balwa, yaye emva koko ookumkani bakwaKanan balwa eTahanaki emanzini aseMegido; abazange bafumane mali."
Judges5:20 Bayalwa besemazulwini; Zalwa iinkwenkwezi emendweni yazo noSisera.
Judges5:21 Umlambo waseKishon wabakhukulisa, umlambo omdala waseKishon. Owu mphefumlo wam, wonakele amandla."
Judges5:22 Aza akroboza amanqina amahashe, aza anamandla ajulwa."
Judges5:23 Qalekisani uMerose, satsho isithunywa sikaYehova, baqalekiseni abemi bakhona; ngenxa yokuba bengamncedanga uYehova, uYehova weza kunceda amagorha."
Judges5:24 Makadunyiswe uYaheli phakathi kwabafazi, UmkaHebhere umKeni, Makasikelelwe phakathi kweentokazi ezisezintenteni."
Judges5:25 Wacela amanzi, wamnika amasi; weza nebhotolo ngesitya esiswiti."
Judges5:26 Ubeka isandla sakhe esikhonkwaneni, nesandla sakhe sokunene eluphawulweni lwabasebenzi; wambetha uSisera ngentonga, wamnqumla intloko njengoko ebemhlaba, wambetha ezimpunzini."
Judges5:27 Waqubuda ezinyaweni zakhe, wawa, walala ubuthongo; Waqubuda ezinyaweni zakhe, wawa; apho wagoba khona, wawa wafa."
Judges5:28 Walunguza ngefestile unina kaSisera, wamemeza, wathi, Ilibele yini na inqwelo yakhe yokulwa, ingafiki nje? kutheni iimoto zakhe zishiywe lixesha?"
Judges5:29 Amphendula amanenekazi akhe alumkileyo athi:
Judges5:30 Abakhawulezanga na? abahlulanga amaxhoba; kwindoda yonke intombazana, nokuba ngambini; Neengubo ezimfakamfele kuSisera, ezimfakamfele, ezimfakamfele, ezimfakamfele kumacala omabini, neentamo zabathinjwa?"
Judges5:31 Mazitshabalale zonke iintshaba zakho, Yehova, Ke abakuthandayo mababe njengelanga ekuphumeni kwalo ngamandla alo. Kwaye ihlabathi laphumla iminyaka engamashumi amane."
Judges6:1 Oonyana bakaSirayeli benza ububi emehlweni kaYehova, uYehova wabanikela esandleni samaMidiyan iminyaka esixhenxe."
Judges6:2 Izandla zamaMidiyan zaboyisa oonyana bakaSirayeli, yaye ngenxa yamaMidiyan la maSirayeli azenzela imingxuma ezintabeni, nemiqolomba neenqaba."
Judges6:3 Xa oonyana bakaSirayeli babehlwayela, amaMidiyan ama-Amaleki noonyana baseMpuma benyuka besiya kuwahlasela;"
Judges6:4 Bamisa inkampu nxamnye nabo baza batshabalalisa imveliso yomhlaba de kwafika eGaza, yaye abazange bamshiyele kutya uSirayeli, kwaneegusha okanye nkomo okanye needonki."
Judges6:5 Benyuka bona nempahla yabo emfutshane, neentente zabo, beza njengeenkumbi ukuba baninzi; ngokuba babengenakubalwa bona neenkamela zabo; bangena ehlabathini ukuba balitshabalalise."
Judges6:6 AmaSirayeli ahlwempuzeka kakhulu ngenxa yamaMidiyan; babiza oonyana bakaSirayeli kuYehova.
Judges6:7 Bakhala oonyana bakaSirayeli kuYehova ngenxa yamaMidiyan.
Judges6:8 uYehova wathuma umprofeti koonyana bakaSirayeli, wathi kubo, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ndanikhupha eYiputa, ndanikhupha endlwini yobukhoboka;"
Judges6:9 Ndanihlangula esandleni samaYiputa, nasesandleni sabo bonke abanitshutshisayo, ndaza ndabagxotha phambi kwenu, ndaninika ilizwe labo;"
Judges6:10 ndathi kuni, NdinguYehova, uThixo wenu; musani ukuboyika oothixo bama-Amori, enihleli ezweni lawo, analiphulaphula ilizwi lam."
Judges6:11 Yaza ingelosi kaYehova yeza yahlala phantsi komthi wesiripine owawuseOfra, kaYowashe umMowabhi; unyana wakhe uGidiyon wayebhula ingqolowa kwisixovulelo sewayini ukuze afihle amaMidiyan."
Judges6:12 Kwabonakala isithunywa sikaYehova kuye, sathi kuye, uYehova unawe, gorhandini."
Judges6:13 Wathi uGidiyon kuyo, Camagu, Nkosi yam, ukuba uYehova unathi, yini na ukuba sibe ezi zinto zonke? Iphi na yonke imisebenzi yakhe ebalulekileyo, ababesibalisela ngayo oobawo, bathi, AsinguYehova nalowo wasikhuphayo eYiputa? ngoku uYehova usilahlile, wasinikela esandleni samaMidiyan."
Judges6:14 uYehova wamkhangela, wathi, Hamba ngala mandla akho, uwahlangule amaSirayeli esandleni samaMidiyan. Andikuthumanga?"
Judges6:15 Wathi yena kuye, Camagu, Nkosi yam, ndowasindisa ngantoni na amaSirayeli? Uyabona, umzi wakowethu ulihlwempu ezweni lakwaManase, mna ndingoyena mncinane endlwini kabawo."
Judges6:16 Wathi uYehova kuye, Ndiya kuba nawe, yaye uya kuwaxabela amaMidiyan njengamntu mnye."
Judges6:17 Wathi kuye, Ukuba kaloku ndibabalwe nguwe, ndinike umqondiso wokuba wena uthethe nam."
Judges6:18 Musa ukumka apha ndide ndize kuwe, ndisithabathe isipho sam, ndisibeke phambi kwakho. Athi: Ndizakulinda ude ubuye."
Judges6:19 Wangena uGidiyon, walungisa itakane lebhokhwe, nezonka ezingenagwele ze-efa yomgubo ocoliweyo; inyama wayibeka engobozini, umhluzi wawugalela embizeni, wazisa kuye phantsi komthi weturpentine, wazisa."
Judges6:20 Sathi kuye isithunywa sikaThixo, Thabatha inyama nezonka ezingenagwele, uzibeke phezu kweli litye, uwugalele umhluzi. Wenjenjalo."
Judges6:21 Saza isithunywa sikaYehova sathabatha incam yentonga esandleni saso, sachukumisa inyama nezonka ezingenagwele; kwaphuma umlilo eliweni, wayitshisa inyama nezonka ezingenagwele. Saza isithunywa sikaNdikhoyo semka emehlweni akhe."
Judges6:22 Xa uGidiyon wabona ukuba yingelosi kaYehova leyo, uGidiyon wathi: “Owu, Nkosi enguMongami Yehova! ngokuba ndabona isithunywa sikaYehova, sakhangelana ebusweni."
Judges6:23 Wathi uYehova kuye, Uxolo malube nawe! musani ukoyika, anisayi kufa."
Judges6:24 uGidiyon wamakhela khona isibingelelo uYehova, wathi igama likaYehova liluxolo; unanamhla iseliOfra yama-Abhiyezere."
Judges6:25 Ndabona ngobo busuku uYehova wathi kuye: “Thabatha inkunzi yenkomo kayihlo, eyesibini inkunzi eminyaka isixhenxe, usichithe isibingelelo sikaBhahali sikayihlo, uze ugawule ityholo elinalo netyholo;"
Judges6:26 wakhela uYehova uThixo wakho isibingelelo kule ngxondorha endaweni emisiweyo, uthabathe eyesibini inkunzi yenkomo, wenze idini elinyukayo ngeenkuni zehlathi oya kuzigawula."
Judges6:27 uGidiyon wathabatha amadoda alishumi kubakhonzi bakhe; wenza njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho ngako; yaye ngenxa yokuba wayeyoyika indlu kayise namadoda aloo mzi, kuba wayengenako ukuyenza loo nto emini, wenjenjalo kusebusuku."
Judges6:28 Avuka ekuseni amadoda esixeko, abona isibingelelo sikaBhahali sidiliziwe, netyholo elisecaleni laso ligawuliwe, nenkunzi yenkomo yesibini ibingelelwe phezu kwesibingelelo esasakhiweyo."
Judges6:29 Yathi enye kwenye, Ngubani na lo wenze le nto? Babuza, babuza, bathi, NguGidiyon unyana kaYowashe, wenjenjalo."
Judges6:30 Athi amadoda aloo mzi kuYowashe, Mkhuphe unyana wakho, afe; ngokuba usidilizile isibingelelo sikaBhahali, wasitshabalalisa yayililifa lehlathi elalilapho."
Judges6:31 Wathi uYowashe kubo bonke ababemi phambi kwakhe, Niya kumthethelela uBhahali yini na? Ngaba uya kumsindisa? ofuna ukumthethelela makabulawe ngomso; ukuba unguthixo, makazimele, ngokuba kukho odilize isibingelelo sakhe."
Judges6:32 Wambiza ke uYerubhahali ngaloo mini, wathi, uBhahali makammangalele, ngokuba esonakalisa isibingelelo sakhe."
Judges6:33 Ahlanganisana onke amaMidiyan nama-Amaleki nabasempumalanga, awela, amisa entilini yaseYizereli."
Judges6:34 Wehla ke uMoya kaYehova phezu kukaGidiyon, wavuthela isigodlo; uAbhiyezere warhola emva kwakhe."
Judges6:35 Wathuma abathunywa kumaManase onke; wathumela abathunywa kwa-Ashere, nakwaZebhulon, nakwaNafetali; benyuka baya kubakhawulela."
Judges6:36 Wathi uGidiyon kuThixo, Ukuba uthe wawahlangula amaSirayeli ngesandla sam, njengoko uthethileyo;"
Judges6:37 Yabona, ndibeka uboya boboya emhlabeni; yaye ukuba ukungunda kusebunweleni kuphela kuze kome kulo lonke ihlabathi ngaphandle, ndiya kwazi ke ukuba uya kumhlangula uSirayeli ngesandla sam, kanye njengoko ubuthethile."
Judges6:38 Akubanga njalo; ngokuba wavuka kusasa ngesifingo, wabutha uboya, wagalela ukufuma eboyeni, loo mngxuma uzele ngamanzi."
Judges6:39 Wathi uGidiyon kuThixo, Musa ukuwuyeka umsindo wakho kum, ndithethe kube kanye; mandiyizame, kodwa ngeli xesha ngoboya; makube komile uboya, kubekho umbethe phezu komhlaba."
Judges6:40 Wenjenjalo uThixo ngobo busuku;
Judges7:1 Bavuka kusasa ooYerubhahali, onguGidiyon, namadoda onke abenaye, bemisa ngasequleni likaHarodi. Umkhosi wamaMidiyan wawungasentla kwawo, phezu kwenduli kaMore, entilini."
Judges7:2 Wathi uYehova kuGidiyon, Baninzi abantu onabo, ukuze ndiwanikele amaMidiyan esandleni sabo, hleze bandivukele oonyana bakaSirayeli, bathi, Ndisindisiwe ngesandla sam."
Judges7:3 Khawuhambe ke umemeze ezindlebeni zabantu, uthi, Bonke abangcangcazelayo makabuye, bemke ezintabeni zaseGiliyadi. Kwabuya ke ebantwini abangamashumi amabini anamabini amawaka; kwasala ishumi lamawaka."
Judges7:4 Wathi uYehova kuGidiyon, Basebaninzi abantu; Yehla nawo uye emanzini, ndikuvavanyele wona apho. Ndithi ke kuni, Makangahambi nani, makangahambi nani."
Judges7:5 Wabahlisela abantu emanzini, waza uYehova wathi kuGidiyon: “Nabani na owakhotha amanzi ngolwimi lwakhe njengenja ekhothayo, makamyeke; unjalo wonke umntu oguqa ngamadolo ukuba asele."
Judges7:6 Inani labo babekhotha, bazibeka izandla emlonyeni wabo, lalingamakhulu amathathu amadoda; abanye abantu baguqa ngamadolo ukuba basele amanzi."
Judges7:7 Wathi uYehova kuGidiyon, Ndiya kukuhlangula ngala madoda makhulu mathathu, ndiwanikele amaMidiyan esandleni sakho; zihambe zonke ezinye iintlanga, elowo aye endaweni yakhe."
Judges7:8 Abantu bathabatha ukudla kwabo, baphatha izigodlo zabo esandleni sabo, wathi onke amaSirayeli makaye elowo ententeni yakhe, wawagcina amadoda amakhulu mathathu yaye umkhosi wamaMidiyan wawuphantsi kwakhe entlanjeni."
Judges7:9 Ngobo busuku uYehova wathi kuye: “Sukuma, uhle uye emkhosini; ngokuba ndiyinikele ezandleni zenu."
Judges7:10 Ukuba uyoyika ukuhla, yihla uye emkhosini noFura umkhonzi wakho."
Judges7:11 Kwaye uve into abayithethayo; emva koko izandla zakho ziya komelela ukuba uhle uye enqabeni. Wehla ke yena noPura isicaka sakhe, baya kutsho kumda womkhosi oxhobileyo."
Judges7:12 AmaMidiyan nama-Amaleki noonyana bonke basempumalanga babelele emlanjeni njengeenkumbi ezininzi; neenkamela zabo bezizininzi njengentlabathi eselunxwemeni lolwandle.
Judges7:13 Wafika uGidiyon, wabona indoda exelela ummelwane wayo iphupha, yathi, Yabona, ndiphuphe iphupha; yawa, yayibhukuqa, yalala intente ngecala layo."
Judges7:14 Waphendula umlingane wakhe, wathi, Likrele likaGidiyon, unyana kaYowashe, indoda yakwaSirayeli; uThixo uwanikele esandleni sakhe amaMidiyan nomkhosi wonke."
Judges7:15 Akuliva uGidiyon iphupha elo, nokutyhilwa kwalo, waguqa, wabuyela ezintlwini zakwaSirayeli, esithi, Yekani! ngokuba uYehova uyinikele imikhosi yakwaMidiyan esandleni sakho."
Judges7:16 Wawahlula aba zahlulo zontathu amadoda angamakhulu mathathu, wabeka isigodlo esandleni ngasinye, nemiphanda engenanto, nezibane eziphangeni."
Judges7:17 Wathi kubo, Khangelani kum, nenze kwanjengam; ndithi, ndakuphuma eminqubeni, nenze njengoko ndenza ngako."
Judges7:18 Ndakuvuthela isigodlo, mna nabo bonke abakunye nam, nani nivuthele izigodlo, nijikeleze eminqubeni, nithi, Ingoma kaYehova, nengoma kaGidiyon!"
Judges7:19 uGidiyon nekhulu lamadoda abenaye bafika ngaphandle kweminquba, ekuqalekeni kweqela lamadoda aphakathi; yaye bemisa nje abalindi, baza bavuthela izigodlo baza bayaphula imiphanda eyayisesandleni sabo."
Judges7:20 Avuthela izigodlo amalungu omathathu, aziqhekeza imiphanda, aphatha izibane ngezandla zasekhohlo, namaxilongo ngesandla sokunene, ukuba avuthe; baduma, besithi, Ikrele likaYehova nelikaGidiyon!"
Judges7:21 Bema elowo endaweni yakhe, ngeenxa zonke eminqubeni;"
Judges7:22 Amakhulu mathathu avuthela izigodlo, uYehova wabeka ikrele lomntu ngamnye kumlingane wakhe, nakumkhosi wonke;"
Judges7:23 Ahlanganisana amadoda akwaSirayeli kwaNafetali, nakwa-Ashere, nakuManase wonke, awasukela amaMidiyan."
Judges7:24 uGidiyon wesusa abathunywa ezintabeni zonke zakwaEfrayim, esithi, Yihlani niye kumaMidiyan, niwagxothe amanzi phambi kwawo, nide nise eBhete-bhara, naseYordan. Abuthelana ndawonye onke amadoda akwaEfrayim, akha amanzi, esa eBhete-bhara naseYordan;"
Judges7:25 Bathimba iinkosana ezimbini zakwaMidiyan, uOrebhe noSebe; bambulalela uOrebhi eliweni likaOrebhi, waza uShebhe wawaxabela kwisixovulelo sewayini sikaShehebhi waza wawasukela amaMidiyan waza wayiweza intloko kaOrebhi nekaShebhe eYordan."
Judges8:1 Athi amadoda akwaEfrayim kuye, Usikhonze, asikubizanga na oko wakuwaxabela amaMidiyan? Kwaye balwa naye kakhulu."
Judges8:2 Wathi kubo, Ndenze ntoni na ngangani? Intlahlela yeediliya zikaEfrayim ayilungile na, ngaphezu kokuvuna kweediliya zika-Abhiyezere?"
Judges8:3 uThixo wabanikela abathetheli bakwaMidiyan, uOrebhe noShebhi, esandleni senu; ndenze ntoni na xa kuthelekiswa nawe? Wadamba umsindo wabo akuba etshilo."
Judges8:4 uGidiyon wafika eYordan, wayiwela, yena namadoda angamakhulu amathathu awayekunye naye, ediniwe, kodwa awasukela."
Judges8:5 Wathi kumadoda aseSukoti, Banikeni isonka aba bandilandelayo; kuba badiniwe, yaye ndisukela uShebha noTsalimuna, ookumkani bakwaMidiyan."
Judges8:6 Bathi abathetheli baseSukoti, Sesithabathe isandla sikaShebha neTsalimuna sesandleni sakho, ukuze sinike abathetheli bakho isonka?"
Judges8:7 Wathi uGidiyon, Ukuba ke uNdikhoyo uthe wayinikela iShebha neTsalimuna esandleni sam, ndoyiqwenga inyama yenu ngemithana enameva yasentlango."
Judges8:8 Wenyuka khona wenyuka waya ePenuweli, wathetha kubo kwangokunjalo. Bamphendula abantu basePenuweli njengoko bamphendulayo abantu baseSukoti."
Judges8:9 Waphinda wathetha kumadoda asePenuweli, wathi, Ekubuyeni kwam ngoxolo, ndoyidiliza le nqaba ende."
Judges8:10 iSebha neTsalmuna zaziseKarkore nomkhosi wazo owawukunye nawo, amadoda amalunga neshumi elinesihlanu lamawaka, lawo onke awayesele kuwo onke amabhunga oonyana baseMpuma; kuba kwawa ikhulu elinamanci mabini amawaka amadoda arhola ikrele."
Judges8:11 uGidiyon wenyuka ngendlela yabemi beentente ngasempuma kweNobha naseYogebheha waza wawoyisa umkhosi, kuba umkhosi wawukhuselekile."
Judges8:12 Wabaleka uShebha noTsalimuna, wabasukela, wababamba ookumkani ababini bakwaMidiyan, uShebha noTsalimuna, waludubaduba lonke uhlanga."
Judges8:13 Wabuya uGidiyon unyana kaYowashe edabini, lingekaphumi ilanga;"
Judges8:14 Wabamba umfana wamadoda aseSukoti, wacebisana naye; Wamcacisela abathetheli baseSukoti, namadoda amakhulu akhe, amadoda amashumi asixhenxe."
Judges8:15 Weza kumadoda aseSukoti, wathi, Sebha noSalemuna, ngabo enaniqalekisayo ngabo, nisithi, iSebha neSalemuna sele zisesandleni sakho na, ukuba siwanike amadoda lawo na? ngoobani abadinwe sisonka?"
Judges8:16 Wawathabatha amadoda amakhulu aloo mzi, nemithana enameva, nenkunzane entlango, wawafundisa amadoda aseSukoti kunye nawo."
Judges8:17 Wayidiliza inqaba ende yasePenuweli, wababulala abantu baloo mzi."
Judges8:18 Wathi kuSebha noTsalimuna, Ngoobani na abantu enababulalayo eTabhore? Aphendula athi, Babenjengawe; wonke umntu wayekhangeleka njengabantwana benkosi."
Judges8:19 Wathi, Babengabazalwana bam abo, oonyana bakama; ehleli nje uYehova, ukuba benibasindisile, ngendinganibulalanga."
Judges8:20 Wathi kuYetere, amazibulo akhe, Vuka, ubabulale. Ke umfana akazange alirhole ikrele lakhe, kuba wayesoyika, kuba wayesengumfana."
Judges8:21 Bathi ooSebha noTsalimuna, Hlalani nisibulale, ngokuba njengoko anjalo umntu, bunjalo ubugorha bakhe. Wesuka ke uGidiyon wawabulala uShebha noTsalimuna, wazithabatha ezo zivatho zeentamo zeenkamela zabo."
Judges8:22 Athi amadoda akwaSirayeli kuGidiyon, Silawule, wena nonyana wakho, nonyana wonyana wakho, ngokuba usisindisile esandleni samaMidiyan."
Judges8:23 Wathi uGidiyon kuwo, Andiyi kunilawula mna; akayi kunilawula nonyana wam; uYehova uya kunilawula."
Judges8:24 Wathi uGidiyon kuwo, Ndicela nto-nye kuni; (ngokuba babenamajikazi egolide, kuba babengamaIshmayeli.)"
Judges8:25 Baphendula bathi, Siya kubanika ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo. Kwaye bandlala ilaphu baza ngamnye waphosa amakhonkco exhoba lakhe."
Judges8:26 Ubunzima bamakhonkco egolide awabucelayo baba liwaka elinamakhulu asixhenxe eeshekele zegolide; ngaphandle kwezaa ntsimbi namacici, neengubo ezimfusa ezibe zikookumkani bamaMidiyan, nemixokelelwane esezintanyeni zeenkamela zabo."
Judges8:27 uGidiyon wenza ilaphu ngayo, wayibeka eOfra, idolophu yakowabo, aza ahenyuza khona onke amaSirayeli, yaza yaba ngumgibe kuGidiyon nakwindlu yakhe."
Judges8:28 Athotywa ke amaMidiyan phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli, akaphinda aziphakamise iintloko zawo. Lazola ilizwe iminyaka emashumi mane ngemihla kaGidiyon."
Judges8:29 uYerubhahali, unyana kaYowashe, waya wahlala endlwini yakhe."
Judges8:30 uGidiyon ubenoonyana abamashumi amathandathu besiza sakhe, ngokuba ebenabafazi abaninzi."
Judges8:31 Neshweshwe lakhe, elibe likwaShekem, lamzalela unyana nalo, elathi igama lakhe nguAbhimeleki."
Judges8:32 Wafa uGidiyon unyana kaYowashe, eyingwevu enkulu, wangcwatyelwa engcwabeni likaYowashe uyise, eOpra yama-Abhiyezere."
Judges8:33 Kwathi kamsinya nje akuba efile uGidiyon, oonyana bakaSirayeli bajika baza bakrexeza noBhahali baza benza uBhahali-bheriti uthixo wabo."
Judges8:34 Oonyana bakaSirayeli abamkhumbulanga uYehova uThixo wabo, owabakhululayo esandleni seentshaba zabo zonke ngeenxa zonke."
Judges8:35 Yaye abazange bayenzele inceba indlu kaYerubhahali, uGidiyon, ngako konke ukulunga awayekwenzele uSirayeli."
Judges9:1 Waya uAbhimeleki, unyana kaYerubhahali, kuShekem, kubazalwana bonina, wathetha kubo nomzalwane wonke wendlu kayise, wathi,"
Judges9:2 Thethani ezindlebeni zabemi bakwaShekem bonke, nithi, Okona kulungileyo kuni, kukuthi nilawulwe nyana bamashumi amathandathu oonyana bakaYerubhahali, kukuthi nilawulwe yindoda ibe nye, kusini na? nikhumbule ukuba lithambo lenu nenyama yenu."
Judges9:3 Bawathetha abazalwana bonina loo mazwi akhe onke, ezindlebeni zabemi bakwaShekem bonke, intliziyo yabo yakuthobela ukumlandela uAbhimeleki; ngokuba bathi, Ngumzalwana wethu."
Judges9:4 Bamnika iishekele zesilivere ezimashumi mathandathu zendlu kaBhahali-bheriti;
Judges9:5 Weza endlwini kayise eOfra, wababulala abazalwana bakhe, oonyana bakaYerubhahali, amadoda amashumi mathandathu aneshumi, tyeni linye; kwasala uYotam, unyana omncinane kaYerubhahali; ngokuba ebezimele."
Judges9:6 Bahlanganisana bonke abemi bakwaShekem nendlu yonke yeMilo, baya bamenza ukumkani uAbhimeleki emthini wesikhumbuzo nokwaShekem."
Judges9:7 Waxelelwa uYotam, waya wema encotsheni yentaba yeGerizim, waliphakamisa izwi lakhe, wadanduluka kubo, wathi kubo, Yivani, bemi bakwaShekem, aze uYehova eve nina."
Judges9:8 Yaphuma imithi ukuya kumthambisa ukumkani wayo; bathi kumnquma, Silawule."
Judges9:9 Wathi umnquma kuyo: “Ndiwashiye na amanqatha am abazukisa ngawo uThixo nabantu, ndize ndiye ndivelele imithi?”"
Judges9:10 Yathi imithi kumkhiwane, Yiza, usilawule."
Judges9:11 Wathi umkhiwane kuyo, Ndingade ndiyincame na incasa yam nencasa yam, ndiye kuyivelele imithi?"
Judges9:12 Yathi imithi kumdiliya, Yiza, usilawule."
Judges9:13 Wathi umdiliya kuyo, Ndingade ndiyincame na iwayini yam ekholekileyo kuThixo nakubantu, ndiye kuyinyamekela imithi?"
Judges9:14 Yathi yonke imithi kumeva, Yiza, usilawule."
Judges9:15 Lathi ityholo kwimithi, Ukuba okunene niyandithambisa ndibe ngukumkani wenu, nokholosa ngomthunzi wam;"
Judges9:16 Ke kaloku ukuba nenze ngenyaniso nangenyaniso ngokumenza ukumkani uAbhimeleki, ukuba nimenzele kakuhle uYerubhahali nendlu yakhe, namenza ngokwezandla zakhe;"
Judges9:17 Ngenxa yokuba ubawo wanilwela waza wabeka ubomi bakhe esichengeni ekude, wanihlangula esandleni sikaMidiyan."
Judges9:18 Kusuke kwavuka namhlanje indlu kayise noonyana bakhe, amadoda angamashumi omathandathu, awabulawelwa lityeni elinye, amenza uAbhimeleki, unyana womkhonzazana wakhe, ukumkani wabemi bakwaShekem, ngokuba engunyana wakho;"
Judges9:19 Ukuba namhlanje nenze ngenyaniso nangenyaniso kuYerubhahali nendlu yakhe, vuyani ngoAbhimeleki, avuye naye ngani;"
Judges9:20 Ukuba akunjalo, mawuphume umlilo kuAbhimeleki, ubatshise abemi bakwaShekem nendlu yeMilo; mawuphume umlilo kubanikazi bakwaShekem nakwindlu yeMilo, umtshise uAbhimeleki."
Judges9:21 Wasaba ke uYotam, wasaba, wafika eBhere, wahlala khona ngenxa ka-Abhimeleki umninawa wakhe."
Judges9:22 uAbhimeleki wayengukumkani kwaSirayeli iminyaka emithathu.
Judges9:23 uThixo wathuma umoya ombi phakathi koAbhimeleki nabemi bakwaShekem; yaye abanini bakwaShekem bamsokolisa uAbhimeleki;
Judges9:24 ukuze inkohlakalo eyenziwa koonyana bakaYerubhahali abangamashumi asixhenxe ize negazi labo libe phezu koAbhimeleki umzalwana wabo owababulalayo; nabemi bakwaShekem, abamncedayo ukubulala abazalwana babo."
Judges9:25 Abemi bakwaShekem ezintabeni bamenza amaxoki baza baphanga wonke umntu odlula ngendlela, yaye oku kwaxelwa kuAbhimeleki."
Judges9:26 Wafika uGayeli unyana kaEbhede, nabazalwana bakhe, baya kwaShekem; abanini bakwaShekem bakholosa ngaye."
Judges9:27 Ngoko baqhubeka besiya emasimini baza bakhakula izidiliya zabo, bazixovula iidiliya baza benza imihlali, bangena endlwini yothixo wabo, badla, basela, bamqalekisa uAbhimeleki."
Judges9:28 Wathi uGahali unyana kaEbhede, Ngubani na yena uAbhimeleki? Engubani na yena uShekem, ukuba simkhonze? Akanguye na unyana kaYerubhahali? noZebhule umlungiseleli wakhe? Bakhonzeni oonyana bakaHamore, uyise kaShekem, kuba kutheni na ukuba simkhonze?"
Judges9:29 Kwaye ukuba uThixo angasibeka esi sizwe ezandleni zam! ndimsuse ke uAbhimeleki. Wathi kuAbhimeleki, Yandisa impi yakho, uphume;"
Judges9:30 Waweva uZebhule, ukumkani weso sixeko, amazwi kaGayeli, unyana kaEbhede, wavutha umsindo wakhe."
Judges9:31 Wathuma abathunywa kuAbhimeleki ngasese, esithi, Nanku uGahali unyana kaEbhede, nabazalwana bakhe, befikile kwaShekem; bawuqinisa umzi, ukuba balwe nawo."
Judges9:32 Ke kaloku, vuka ebusuku, wena nabantu onabo, ulale uze ulinde ilizwe."
Judges9:33 Kusasa, ukuphuma kwelanga, vuka kusasa, uwunqamle umzi; yabona ke, ukuba uthe yena namadoda anabo bakuhlasela, wothi ke ngoko uthabathe inyathelo kubo."
Judges9:34 Wavuka ebusuku uAbhimeleki namadoda onke abenaye, balinda bengamaqela amane malunga noShekem."
Judges9:35 Waphuma uGayeli unyana kaEbhede, wema ekungeneni kwesango;"
Judges9:36 Wababona uGahali abantu, wathi kuSebhule, Yabona, nanko besiza bevela ezincotsheni zeentaba. Wathi uSebule kuye: Ubona amathunzi eentaba ngathi ngabantu."
Judges9:37 Waphinda waqokela uGayeli, wathi, Yabona, abantu bayehla bevela ezweni;"
Judges9:38 Wathi uZebhule kuye, Uphi na kaloku umlomo wakho, owathi ngawo, Ngubani na uAbhimeleki ukuba simkhonze? Asingabo aba bantu ubacekisile? Ndiyathandaza, phumani ngoku, nilwe nabo."
Judges9:39 Waphuma uGahali phambi kwabemi bakwaShekem, walwa noAbhimeleki."
Judges9:40 uAbhimeleki wamsukela, wasaba ebusweni bakhe;"
Judges9:41 uAbhimeleki waqhubeka ehlala eArum, yaye uZebhule wamgxotha uGahali nabazalwana bakhe ukuze bangahlali kwaShekem."
Judges9:42 Baphuma ke ngengomso abantu, baya emaphandleni; wamxelela uAbhimeleki."
Judges9:43 Wawathabatha amadoda lawo, wawahlula aba zahlulo zintathu, walala entsimini, wakhangela, wawabona amadoda ephuma phakathi komzi; wabavukela, waboyisa."
Judges9:44 uAbhimeleki nesihlwele esasinaye bakhawuleza, bema emnyango wesango lomzi; zabalekela ezinye izihlwele ezibini, zababulala bonke abantu ababelapho."
Judges9:45 uAbhimeleki walwa nomzi yonke loo mini; wasithimba isixeko, wababulala abantu ababekuso, wasitshabalalisa isixeko, wasigalela ityuwa."
Judges9:46 Beva ke bonke abanini benqaba ende yakwaShekem, besuka bangena enqabeni yeentaba, yendlu yothixo waseBheriti."
Judges9:47 Waxelelwa uAbhimeleki, ukuba babuthelene khona bonke abasenqabeni ende yakwaShekem."
Judges9:48 Wayinyuka uAbhimeleki intaba yaseTalmon, yena nabantu bonke abenabo; uAbhimeleki waphatha izembe ngesandla sakhe, wagawula isebe lomthi, walithabatha, walibeka egxalabeni lakhe, wathi ebantwini ababenaye, Khawulezani nindibone ndisenza le nto yenza njengoko ndenzayo."
Judges9:49 Ngokufanayo bonke abantu bagawula ngamnye isebe lakhe baza bamlandela uAbhimeleki baza bawabeka kwindawo enqatyisiweyo esezintabeni baza bayitshisa inqaba eyayiphezu kwayo ezintabeni; kangangokuba bafa onke amadoda enqaba yakwaShekem, malunga newaka lamadoda nabafazi."
Judges9:50 Emva koko uAbhimeleki waya eTebhesi, wayingqinga iTebhesi, wayithimba."
Judges9:51 Kwaye kukho inqaba ende eliqele phakathi komzi, abalekela khona onke amadoda, nabafazi, nomzi wonke, bazivalela, bazakhela phezu kodonga lwenqaba leyo inde."
Judges9:52 Wafika uAbhimeleki enqabeni leyo, walwa nayo, wasondela emnyango wenqaba leyo, ukuze ayitshise ngomlilo."
Judges9:53 Yasuka inkazana yaphosa ilitye lokusila entlokweni ka-Abhimeleki, lamophula ukakayi."
Judges9:54 Wakhawuleza wabiza umfana, wathi kuye, Rhola ikrele lakho, undibulale, hleze bathi ngam, Ubulewe ngumfazi; Waza isoka lakhe lamtyhala, wabhubha."
Judges9:55 Abona amadoda akwaSirayeli ukuba ufile uAbhimeleki, aya elowo endaweni yakhe."
Judges9:56 Ngoko ke uThixo wabuphindezela ububi buka-Abhimeleki awayebenzile kuyise ngokubulala abantakwabo abangamashumi asixhenxe.
Judges9:57 uThixo wabubuyisela bonke ububi bamadoda akwaShekem ezintlokweni zawo, nesiqalekiso sikaYotam, unyana kaYerubhahali, saba phezu kwawo."
Judges10:1 Emva koAbhimeleki kwesuka wema uTola unyana kaPuwa, unyana kaDodo, indoda kaIsakare, ukuba awakhusele amaSirayeli; yaye wayehlala eSamire kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim."
Judges10:2 Wawalawula amaSirayeli iminyaka emashumi mabini anantathu, waza wafa, wangcwatyelwa eSamire."
Judges10:3 Emveni kwakhe kwalandela uYayiro umGiliyadi, wangukumkani kwaSirayeli iminyaka emashumi mabini anamibini."
Judges10:4 Wayenoonyana abamashumi mathathu, bekhwele iiesile ezimashumi mathathu; banemizi emashumi mathathu, kuthiwa yiHavoti-yahire, unanamhla, ezweni laseGiliyadi."
Judges10:5 Wafa ke uYayiro, wangcwatyelwa eKamon."
Judges10:6 Oonyana bakaSirayeli baphinda benza ububi emehlweni kaYehova, bakhonza ooBhahali, nooAshtoreti, noothixo bakwa-Aram, noothixo baseTsidon, noothixo bakwaMowabhi, noothixo boonyana baka-Amon, noothixo boonyana baka-Amon koonyana baka-Amon. Oothixo bamaFilisti bamfulathela uYehova, abamkhonza."
Judges10:7 Wavutha umsindo kaYehova kumaSirayeli, wathengisa ngawo, wawanikela esandleni samaFilisti, nasesandleni soonyana baka-Amon."
Judges10:8 Ngaloo nyaka babacinezela oonyana bakaSirayeli, babaxinzelela phantsi iminyaka elishumi elinesibhozo, bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli ababephesheya kweYordan ezweni lama-Amori aseGiliyadi."
Judges10:9 Kananjalo oonyana baka-Amon bayiwela iYordan, baya kulwa noYuda noBhenjamin, nendlu kaEfrayim; wabandezeleka kunene uSirayeli."
Judges10:10 Bakhala oonyana bakaSirayeli kuYehova, besithi, Sonile kuwe, ngokuba simkile thina uThixo wethu, sakhonza ooBhahali."
Judges10:11 Wathi uYehova koonyana bakaSirayeli, Andinihlangulanga na esandleni samaYiputa, nama-Amori, noonyana baka-Amon, nakumaFilisti?"
Judges10:12 Anixinzelela phantsi amaTsidon, nama-Amaleki, namanyanga; nakhala kum, ndanihlangula esandleni sabo."
Judges10:13 Noko nindikreqile, nakhonza thixo bambi; ke ngoko, andiyi kuphinda ndinisindise."
Judges10:14 Hambani niye kubiza oothixo enibanyulileyo; ngamana angakusindisa ngexesha lembandezelo yakho.
Judges10:15 Bathi oonyana bakaSirayeli kuYehova, Sihlulekile; Sihlangule namhlanje kuphela, siyathandaza."
Judges10:16 Basusa oothixo bolunye uhlanga phakathi kwabo, bakhonza uYehova; waza umphefumlo wakhe waba buhlungu ngenxa yokutshatyalaliswa kukaSirayeli."
Judges10:17 Bahlanganisana oonyana baka-Amon, bamisa eGiliyadi. Bahlanganisana oonyana bakaSirayeli, bayimisa iMitspe."
Judges10:18 Bathi abantu nezikhulu zaseGiliyadi omnye komnye, Ngubani na oya kuqala ahlasele oonyana baka-Amon? yoba yintloko yabemi bonke baseGiliyadi."
Judges11:1 uYafete waseGiliyadi ube ligorha elinobukroti, ubengunyana wenkazana elihenyukazi; uGiliyadi wazala uYafete."
Judges11:2 Umfazi waseGiliyadi wamzalela oonyana; Bakhula oonyana bomkakhe, bamgxotha uYafete, bathi kuye, Akuyi kudla ilifa indlu kabawo; ngokuba engunyana womphambukeli."
Judges11:3 Wasaba uYafete kubazalwana bakhe, waya wahlala ezweni laseTobhi; kwahlanganisana amadoda angenabuntu kwaYafete, aphuma naye."
Judges11:4 Ekugqibeleni oonyana baka-Amoni balwa noSirayeli.
Judges11:5 Xa oonyana baka-Amon bawahlasela amaSirayeli, amadoda amakhulu aseGiliyadi aya kuthabatha uYafete ezweni laseTobhi."
Judges11:6 Kwaye bathi kuYafete: Yiza, ube yinkokeli yethu, ukuze sibe nokulwa noonyana baka-Amon."
Judges11:7 Wathi uYafete kumadoda amakhulu aseGiliyadi, Asinini na abandithiyayo, bandigxotha endlwini kabawo? nize kum ngoku nibandezelekile?"
Judges11:8 Athi amadoda amakhulu aseGiliyadi kuYafete, Kungenxa yoko le nto sibuyela kuwe, ukuba uhambe nathi, uye kulwa noonyana baka-Amon, ube yinganga yethu phezu kwabemi bonke baseGiliyadi."
Judges11:9 Wathi uYafete kumadoda amakhulu aseGiliyadi, Ukuba nithe nandibuyisa, ukuze ndilwe noonyana baka-Amon, uYehova wabanikela esandleni sam, mna ndoba yinkokeli yenu na?"
Judges11:10 Athi amadoda amakhulu aseGiliyadi kuYafete, uYehova ulingqina phakathi kwethu, ukuba asithanga senze ngokwelizwi lakho."
Judges11:11 Wahamba ke uYafete namadoda amakhulu aseGiliyadi; abantu bammisa ukuba abe yintloko nomphathi wabo; Wawathetha uYafete onke amazwi akhe phambi koYehova uMuzi.
Judges11:12 uYafete wathumela abathunywa kukumkani woonyana baka-Amon, wathi, Yintoni na enam nawe, uzé kulwa nam nje ezweni lam?"
Judges11:13 Wabaphendula ukumkani woonyana baka-Amon kubathunywa bakaYafete, wathi, Kungokuba amaSirayeli alithabathayo ilizwe lam, ekunyukeni kwawo eYiputa, athabathela eArnon esa eYabhoki, esa eYordan; uwabuyisele eluxolweni loo mazwe."
Judges11:14 Wabuya ke uYafete wathumela abathunywa kukumkani woonyana baka-Amon.
Judges11:15 Wathi kuye, Kwathiwa nguYafete, Oonyana bakaSirayeli abalithimbanga ilizwe lakwaMowabhi, nelizwe loonyana baka-Amon;"
Judges11:16 Baphuma oonyana bakaSirayeli eYiputa, bahamba entlango, besa eLwandle oluBomvu, bafika eKadeshe;"
Judges11:17 AmaSirayeli athumela abathunywa kukumkani wakwaEdom, esithi, Ndivumele ndicande ezweni lakho, akaphulaphula ukumkani wakwaEdom. Bathumela nakukumkani wakwaMowabhi, naye akavuma; yaye oonyana bakaSirayeli bahlala eKadeshe."
Judges11:18 Bahamba ke entlango, balijikeleza ilizwe lakwaEdom nelizwe lakwaMowabhi, bafika ngasempuma kwelizwe lakwaMowabhi, bamisa iinkampu ngaphesheya kweArnon, kodwa abazange bangene kumda wakwaMowabhi ngokuba iArnon ibingumda wakwaMowabhi."
Judges11:19 AmaSirayeli athuma abathunywa kuSihon, ukumkani wama-Amori, ukumkani waseHeshbhon; Wathi uSirayeli kuye, Masicande ezweni lakho, sigoduke."
Judges11:20 Ke uSihon akakholwa ngamaSirayeli, ukuba acande ezweni lakhe; wabahlanganisa bonke abantu bakhe, wamisa eYatsa, walwa noonyana bakaSirayeli."
Judges11:21 Yaye uYehova uTHIXO kaSirayeli wamnikela uSihon nabo bonke abantu bakhe esandleni sikaSirayeli, babaxabela; yaye oonyana bakaSirayeli balithimba lonke ilizwe lama-Amori, abemi belo lizwe."
Judges11:22 Aloyisa lonke ilizwe lama-Amori, athabathela eArnon esa eYabhoki, athabathela entlango esa eYordan."
Judges11:23 Ke kaloku uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, uwagxothile ama-Amori phambi kwabantu bakhe amaSirayeli;"
Judges11:24 Akuyi kulidla ilifa na, alidle ilifa uKamus uthixo wakho? sobadla ilifa bonke abo uYehova uThixo wethu, aya kubagxotha phambi kwethu."
Judges11:25 Ulungile na wena kunoBhalaki unyana kaTsipore, ukumkani wakwaMowabhi? Ngaba wakha walwa namaSirayeli, okanye wakha walwa nawo?"
Judges11:26 Ngoxa amaSirayeli ayehlala eHeshbhon neziseko zayo neArohere needolophana zayo nazo zonke izixeko ezikunxweme lolwandle lwaseArnon iminyaka engamakhulu amathathu? bekutheni ukuze ungababuyiseli ngoko?
Judges11:27 Mna andikonanga; nguwe ondenza into embi ngokulwa nam; uYehova uMgwebi uya kugweba namhla phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli noonyana baka-Amon.
Judges11:28 Kodwa ukumkani woonyana baka-Amon akawaphulaphula amazwi kaYafete awayemthumele kubo.
Judges11:29 Waza umoya kaYehova wehla phezu koYafete waza wadlula eGiliyadi nakwaManase wadlula eMizpa aseGiliyadi waza wadlula eMizpa yaseGiliyadi waya koonyana baka-Amoni.
Judges11:30 uYafete wafunga uYehova, wathi, Ukuba uthe wabanikela kwangoko oonyana baka-Amon esandleni sam,"
Judges11:31 Yonk’ into ephuma emnyango wendlu yam, yondihlasela, ndide ndibuye ndixolile koonyana baka-Amon, ibe yekaYehova, ndiyithabathe ibe lidini elinyukayo."
Judges11:32 uYafete wahamba phambi koonyana baka-Amon ukuba alwe nabo; uYehova wabanikela esandleni sakhe.
Judges11:33 Wababulala ngogonyamelo olukhulu ukususela eArohere ukusa eMiniti, izixeko ezingamashumi amabini ukuya kutsho kwiNtlango yezidiliya. Bathotywa ke oonyana baka-Amon phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Judges11:34 Wafika uYafete eMizpa, yaphuma intombi yakhe, yamkhawulela, ibetha ingqongqo, ingqungqa; yaye ekuphela komntwana wakhe; kuye ebengenanyana nantombi."
Judges11:35 Akuyibona, wazikrazula iingubo zakhe, wathi, Camagu, ntombi yam! Undithobe kakhulu, ungomnye wabandoyikisayo, ngokuba ndiwuvulile umlomo wam kuYehova, andinakubuya."
Judges11:36 Wathi kuye, Bawo, uwuvulile umlomo wakho kuYehova; yenza kum njengoko kuphume emlonyeni wakho; ngokuba uYehova eniphindezelele izenzo zenu, nyana baka-Amon."
Judges11:37 Wathi kuyise, Makube le nto kum: Mandilinde iinyanga zibe mbini, ndinyuke iintaba, ndibulilele ubuntombi bam, mna nabalingane bam."
Judges11:38 Wathi: “Hamba! Wamnika ikhefu leenyanga zambini, wahamba nabalingane bakhe, walilela ezintabeni;"
Judges11:39 Ekupheleni kweenyanga ezimbini, wabuyela kuyise, wenza kuye ngokwesifungo sakhe, abesithethile; kwaye wayengazi mntu. Yaba lisiko elo kwaSirayeli;"
Judges11:40 iminyaka ngeminyaka, iintombi zakwaSirayeli ziye ziyibolela intombi kaYafete waseGiliyadi, imihla emine ngomnyaka."
Judges12:1 Ahlanganisana amadoda akwaEfrayim, aya entla, athi kuYafete, Yini na ukuba ubaxabele oonyana baka-Amon, ungasibizanga sihambe nawe? siya kuyitshisa indlu yakho phezu kwakho ngomlilo."
Judges12:2 Wathi uYafete kubo, Mna nabantu bam sasibambene kakhulu noonyana baka-Amon; ndakubiza, anandihlangula esandleni sabo."
Judges12:3 Ndithe ndakubona ukuba anindisindisi, ndawunikela umphefumlo wam esandleni sam, ndawela ndaya koonyana baka-Amon, uYehova wabanikela esandleni sam; kungenxa yoko le nto nize kum namhlanje ukuba nilwe. Mna?"
Judges12:4 Wawahlanganisa ke uYafete onke amadoda aseGiliyadi, walwa noEfrayim; amadoda aseGiliyadi amoyisa uEfrayim, ngokuba ebesithi, Nina, madoda aseGiliyadi, nasabayo ezweni lakwaEfrayim, naphakathi kwamaEfrayim namaManase."
Judges12:5 AmaGiliyadi athabatha inxalenye yeYordan phambi koonyana bakaEfrayim; Athi kuye amadoda aseGiliyadi, UngumEfrayim na? Ukuba uthe: Hayi!"
Judges12:6 Bathi kuye, Yithi, Sibholete, wathi, Sibholete, ngokuba engakwazi ukuthetha kakuhle. Bandula ke bambamba baza bambulalela eYordan, yaye ngelo xesha kwakukho amashumi amane anesibini amawaka akwaEfrayim."
Judges12:7 uYafete wawakhokela amaSirayeli iminyaka emithandathu. Wafa uYafete waseGiliyadi, wangcwatyelwa komnye umzi waseGiliyadi."
Judges12:8 Emva kwakhe uIbhesan waseBhetelehem wakhokela amaSirayeli.
Judges12:9 Wayenoonyana abamashumi mathathu neentombi ezimashumi mathathu; Yaye wawakhokela amaSirayeli iminyaka esixhenxe.
Judges12:10 Wafa ke uIbhesan, wangcwatyelwa eBhetelehem."
Judges12:11 Emva kwakhe uElon umZebhulon wayekhokela oonyana bakaSirayeli; waba neminyaka elishumi engukumkani kwaSirayeli.
Judges12:12 Wafa uElon wakwaZebhulon, wangcwatyelwa eAyalon ezweni lakwaZebhulon."
Judges12:13 Emva kwakhe uAbhedon unyana kaHileli wasePiraton wayekhokela oonyana bakaSirayeli.
Judges12:14 Wayenoonyana abamashumi mane, nabazukulwana abamashumi mathathu, ababekhwele iimazi zamaesile ezimashumi mathandathu; yaye wabakhokela oonyana bakaSirayeli iminyaka esibhozo."
Judges12:15 Wafa ke uAbhedon unyana kaHileli, wasePiraton, wangcwatyelwa ePiraton, ezweni lakwaEfrayim, kweleentaba lama-Amaleki."
Judges13:1 Baphinda oonyana bakaSirayeli benza ububi emehlweni kaYehova; uYehova wabanikela esandleni samaFilisti iminyaka emashumi mane.
Judges13:2 Kwaye kukho indoda yaseSore, yesizwe sakwaBhadan, egama belinguManowa; Umkakhe waye eludlolo, eludlolo."
Judges13:3 Kwabonakala isithunywa sikaYehova kumfazi lowo, sathi kuye, Yabona, uludlolo wena, akuyi kuzala; ngokuba uya kumitha, uzale unyana."
Judges13:4 Zigcine ke ngoko, ungaseli wayini nasiselo sinxilisayo, ungadli nanye into eyinqambi."
Judges13:5 Ngokuba uyabona, uya kumitha, azale unyana; ize ingabi nencakuba entlokweni yakhe; ngokuba unyana lowo uya kuba ngumahlulwa kaThixo kwasesizalweni yaye uya kuqalisa ukumhlangula uSirayeli esandleni samaFilisti."
Judges13:6 Wandula ke umfazi weza wathi endodeni yakhe: “Lo mntu kaTHIXO oyinyaniso uze kum, nembonakalo yakhe yayinjengobuso bengelosi kaTHIXO oyinyaniso, yoyikeka kakhulu; andimbuzanga apho avela khona, akandixelelanga negama lakhe."
Judges13:7 Wathi kum, Uyabona, uya kumitha, uzale unyana; ke ngoko uze ungaseli wayini nasiselo sinxilisayo, ungadli nanye into eyinqambi; ngokuba le nkwenkwe iya kuba ngumahlulwa kaThixo kwasesizalweni sayo, kude kube ngumhla wokufa kwayo."
Judges13:8 Wathandaza ke uManowa kuYehova, wathi, Nkosi yam, lo mfo wakwaThixo umthumileyo, makabuyele kuthi, asifundise ukuba simthini na umntwana oya kuzalwa."
Judges13:9 Waliva uThixo ilizwi likaManowa; Sabuya isithunywa sikaYehova kumfazi ohleli entsimini, uManowa indoda yakhe engenaye."
Judges13:10 Wagidima umfazi ngokukhawuleza, waya kuxelela indoda yakhe, wathi kuyo, Yabona, le ndoda ibize kum laa mhla, ibonakele kum."
Judges13:11 Wesuka ke uManowa, wamlandela umkakhe, waya kuloo ndoda, wathi kuyo, Ungulaa mntu na ubethetha nomfazi? Wathi yena: Ndinguye."
Judges13:12 Wathi uManowa, Makube njalo amazwi akho. Siya kumqeqesha njani umntwana, kwaye siya kwenza ntoni ngaye?"
Judges13:13 Sathi isithunywa sikaYehova kuManowa, Makenze konke endikuthethileyo kumfazi."
Judges13:14 Maze angadli nto emdiliyeni, angaseli wayini nasiselo sinxilisayo, angadli nanye into engahlambulukanga; konke endimwisele umthetho ngako, makakugcine."
Judges13:15 Wathi uManowa kwisithunywa sikaYehova, Masikubambe, side sikulungisele itakane lebhokhwe."
Judges13:16 Sathi isithunywa sikaYehova kuManowa, Nokuba uthe wandinyamekela, andiyi kudla isonka sakho; yaye ukuba uyafuna ukuthabatha umnikelo otshiswayo, uwuse kuYehova. Kuba uManowa wayengazi ukuba yingelosi kaYehova."
Judges13:17 Wathi uManowa kwisithunywa sikaYehova, Ungubani na igama lakho, ukuze sikuhlonele ekuzalisekeni kwamazwi akho?"
Judges13:18 Sathi kuye isithunywa sikaYehova, Yini na ukuba ulibuze kangaka igama lam, lisithele?"
Judges13:19 Wandula ke uManowa walithabatha itakane lebhokhwe kunye nomnikelo wasemlilweni waza wabingelela kuYehova phezu kweliwa, yaye ingelosi yenza ummangaliso; uManowa nomkakhe bebukele."
Judges13:20 Lenyuka ilangatye lisuka esibingelelweni, lisiya ezulwini, senyuka isithunywa sikaYehova ngelangatye lesibingelelo. uManowa nenkosikazi yakhe bayijonga bawa ngobuso."
Judges13:21 Kodwa ingelosi kaYehova ayizange iphinde ibonakale kuManowa nomfazi wakhe. Waqonda ke uManowa ukuba sisithunywa sikaYehova.
Judges13:22 Wathi uManowa kumkakhe, Siya kufa ngenene, ngokuba simbonile uThixo."
Judges13:23 Wathi umkakhe kuye, Ukuba uYehova ubefuna ukusibulala, ange engalamkelanga esandleni sethu nedini elinyukayo, angavumi ukuba sizibone zonke ezi zinto, njengoko kunjalo namhla khange."
Judges13:24 Wazala unyana umfazi lowo, wathi igama lakhe nguSamson; wakhula umntwana, uYehova wamsikelela."
Judges13:25 Maxa wambi umoya kaYehova uqala ukumqhubela enkampini yakwaDan phakathi kweSoreya ne-Eshtawoli.
Judges14:1 Wehla uSamson, waya kwaTimna, wabona inkazana ezintombini zamaFilisti, uTimna."
Judges14:2 Wenyuka, waxelela uyise nonina, wathi, Ndibone inkazana enguTimna, entombini yamaFilisti; ke ngoko mthabathe abe ngumfazi wam."
Judges14:3 Bathi kuye uyise nonina, Akukho mfazi na ezintombini zabazalwana bakho, nasebantwini bakowethu bonke, ukuba uthe wazeka umfazi kumaFilisti? Wathi uSamson kuyise, Ndithabathele yena; ngokuba undonwabisa kakhulu."
Judges14:4 Kodwa uyise nonina babengazi ukuba ivela kuYehova xa wayefuna ithuba lokulwa namaFilisti, ekubeni ngelo xesha amaFilisti ayelawula uSirayeli."
Judges14:5 Wahamba uSamson noyise nonina, baya eTimna, bafika ezidiliyeni zaseTimna; nantso ingonyama imgquma."
Judges14:6 Wehla phezu kwakhe uMoya kaYehova ngamandla, wamdla edla itakane, kungekho nto esandleni sakhe; Akabaxelelanga uyise nonina into ayenzileyo."
Judges14:7 Wehla wathetha nenkazana leyo; wamkholisa kunene uSamson.
Judges14:8 Wabuya weza kumthabatha, wajika, wasibona isidumbu sengonyama; nantso inkitha yeenyosi nobusi emzimbeni wengonyama."
Judges14:9 Wathabatha esandleni sakhe, wadla, waya kuyise nonina, wabanika, badla; kodwa ungabaxeleli ukuba uthabathe ubusi emhadini wengonyama."
Judges14:10 Wehla ke uyise waya kuloo nkazana, uSamson walungisa ukudla khona; ngokuba abafana babedla ngokuyenza loo nto."
Judges14:11 Bakumbona ke, bazisa abalingane abangamashumi amathathu ukuba babe naye."
Judges14:12 Wathi uSamson kubo, Makhe ndinimisele iqhina; ukuba nithe nandixelela oku ngeentsuku ezisixhenxe zomthendeleko, nalifumana, ndoninika amalaphu angamashumi amathathu, neengubo ezikwakwaba ezimashumi mathathu."
Judges14:13 Ukuba anithanga nibe nako ukundicombululela, niya kundinika amalaphu angamashumi amathathu, nezinye iingubo ezimashumi mathathu. Bathi kuye, Ndixelele iqhina lakho, silive."
Judges14:14 Wathi kubo, Ukudla kuphuma kodlayo, nobumnandi buphuma konamandla. Ababa nako ukuyicombulula loo mfihlelo ngeentsuku ezintathu."
Judges14:15 Kwathi ngomhla wesixhenxe, bathi kumkaSamson, Yizame indoda yakho, isixelele loo mfihlelo, singakutshisi wena nendlu kayihlo; usibizele ukuba sizothatha into esinayo? Ngaba akunjalo?"
Judges14:16 UmkaSamson walila phezu kwakhe, wathi, Undithiyile, akundithandi; Ubenzele iqhina oonyana babantu bakowethu, akwandixelela noko. Athi kuye, Uyabona, ezo zinto andizanga ndimxelele ubawo noma;"
Judges14:17 Walila phambi kwakhe imihla esixhenxe, emthendelekweni wabo; Wamxelela ngomhla wesixhenxe, ngenxa yokuba emonile; wabaxelela abantwana babantu bakowabo loo mfihlelo."
Judges14:18 Kwathi ngomhla wesixhenxe, lingekatshoni ilanga, athi kuye amadoda aloo mzi, Yintoni na enencasa ngaphezu kobusi? Yintoni na enamandla ngaphezu kwengonyama? Wathi kubo: Ukuba beningalimanga ngenkomo yam, ngeningayifumananga imfihlo yam."
Judges14:19 Yaye umoya kaYehova wehla phezu kwakhe, yaye wehla waya eAshkelon waza wabulala amadoda angamashumi amathathu phakathi kwawo waza wathabatha amaxhoba awo waza wanika abo babechaza imfihlelo izambatho zabo. Wavutha umsindo wakhe, wenyuka waya endlwini kayise."
Judges14:20 Ke umkaSamson wanikwa ugxa wakhe, obengumhlobo wakhe;"
Judges15:1 Kwakuba ntsuku, ngexesha lokuvuna ingqolowa, uSamson wamvelela umkakhe, enetakane lebhokhwe; Athi: ndizongena nomfazi wam ekamereni. Akavuma uyise ukuba angene."
Judges15:2 Wathi uyise, Inene, ndathi, umthiyile ngokupheleleyo; ke ngoko, ndimnikile kumlingane wakho; Usisi wakhe akamhle kunaye? mthabathe endaweni yakhe."
Judges15:3 Wathi uSamson kuwo, Ndiya kuba njengamaFilisti, ndimsulwa, nokuba ndithe wona ngobugwenxa kuwo."
Judges15:4 Waya uSamson wabamba amakhulu amathathu oodyakalashe, wawathabatha oodyakalashe, wayijika imisila yabo ngasemva, wafaka umlilo phakathi kwemisila leyo yomibini."
Judges15:5 Akuba ezitshise umlilo iinkuni, wayiyeka yawela phakathi kwengqolowa eseleyo yamaFilisti, wayitshisa ingqolowa eseleyo, neediliya, kwanesidiliya, neminquma."
Judges15:6 Athi amaFilisti, Ngubani na lo wenze loo nto? Baphendula bathi, NguSamson, umyeni kaTimna; ngokuba wamthabatha umkakhe, wamnika umlingane wakhe. Enyuka amaFilisti, amtshisa yena noyise ngomlilo."
Judges15:7 Wathi uSimon kubo, Nokuba nithe nenjenjalo, ndoniphindezela impindezelo kuni, ndandule ke ukuyeka."
Judges15:8 Wababetha esinqeni nasethangeni ngobubi obukhulu, wehla ke, wahlala eliweni lika-Etam."
Judges15:9 Enyuka ke amaFilisti, amisa kwaYuda, asasaza eLehi."
Judges15:10 Athi amadoda akwaYuda, Yini na ukuba nisihlasele? Athi, Sinyuke, siya kubopha uSamson, senze kuye njengoko enze ngako kuthi."
Judges15:11 Enyuka amadoda angamawaka amathathu, evela kwaYuda, aya engxondorheni yase-Etam, athi kuSamson, Awazi na ukuba amaFilisti asilawule? usenze ntoni? Wathi kuwo, Njengoko enze ngako kum, ndenze ngako nam kuwo."
Judges15:12 Athi kuye, Sihle, size kukukhonkxa, ukuba sikunikele esandleni samaFilisti. Wathi uSamson kubo, Nindilumkele, ningandibethi;"
Judges15:13 Bathetha kuye bathi, Hayi; kodwa siya kukubopha size sikunikele ezandleni zabo; kodwa ngokuqinisekileyo asiyi kukubulala. Bambopha ngeentsontelo ezimbini ezintsha baza bamnyusela eliweni."
Judges15:14 Wathi akufika eLehi, amaFilisti amenzela isijwili, uMoya kaYehova waba phezu kwakhe ngamandla, zasuka iintsontelo ezandleni zakhe zaba njengelinen eshiswe ngumlilo, aphuka amathambo ezandleni zakhe."
Judges15:15 Wafumanana nomhlathi omtsha we-esile, wolula isandla sakhe, wawuthabatha, wabulala ngawo iwaka lamadoda."
Judges15:16 Wathi uSamson, Ngomhlathi we-esile ndibulele iwaka ngomhlathi wedonki;"
Judges15:17 Wathi akugqiba ukuthetha, wawuphosa umhlathi esandleni sakhe, wathi loo ndawo yiRamatlehi."
Judges15:18 Wanxanwa kakhulu, wanqula uYehova, wathi, Wena usinike olu sindiso lukhulu esandleni somkhonzi wakho, kwaye ngoku ndiya kufa lunxano ndiwele ezandleni zabangalukanga?"
Judges15:19 uThixo wacanda umngxuma emhlathini, kwaphuma amanzi kuwo; wasela, wabuya umoya wakhe, waphila; ke ngoko, silibiza elo gama ngokuba yiEnehakore, enguLihayi kude kube namhla."
Judges15:20 Waqhubeka ekhokela amaSirayeli ngemihla yamaFilisti iminyaka engamashumi amabini.
Judges16:1 uSamson waya eGasa, wabona inkazana elihenyukazi, wahlala kulo."
Judges16:2 Babikelwa abamenyiweyo, kwathiwa, uSimon uze apha. Bamngqonga, bamlinda ubusuku bonke esangweni lesixeko, bathi cwaka ubusuku bonke, besithi: “Ngomso, kwakuba semini, siya kumbulala."
Judges16:3 Walala uSamson kwada kwaphakathi kobusuku, wavuka phakathi kobusuku, wazithabatha iingcango zesango lomzi, nemigubasi yomibini yeengcango, wahamba nazo, nemivalo neento zonke, wazibeka phezu kwempahla yakhe."
Judges16:4 Emva koko wathanda enye inkazana eyayikwintlambo yomlambo waseSoreki, igama layo yayinguDelila."
Judges16:5 Zandula ke iinkosana zamaFilisti zeza kuye zaza zathi kuye: “Mvavanye uze ubone apho akhoyo amandla akhe angaka, nendlela esinokumoyisa ngayo, ukuze simkhonkxe ukuze simcinezele; sokunika elowo iishekele zesilivere ezilishumi elinanye."
Judges16:6 Wathi uDelila kuSamson, Ndixelele ukuba avela phi na la mandla akho angaka, nokuba ungakhonkxwa ngantoni na, ukuba akuqobe?"
Judges16:7 Wathi uSimon kuye, Ukuba bathe bandikhonkxa ngemifuno ekrwada esixhenxe, ndothi fehle, ndibe njengomnye umntu."
Judges16:8 Zandula ke iinkosana zamaFilisti zamzisela imifuno esixhenxe engomileyo, waza wamkhonkxa ngayo."
Judges16:9 Kwabakho amadoda abemlalele, aza ahlala naye egumbini. Wathi kuye, Samson, amaFilisti aphezu kwakho! Wazicheba ke iinwele zakhe, njengokunqunyulwa kwentsontelo yakuva umlilo; Ngoko amandla akhe ayengaziwa."
Judges16:10 Wathi uDelila kuSamson: “Yabona, udlale ngam waza wandixokisa; ndixelele ukuba ungabotshwa yintoni."
Judges16:11 Wathi kuye, Ukuba bathe bandikhonkxa amathambo amatsha, abe kengekasebenzi, ndothi fehle, ndibe njengomnye umntu."
Judges16:12 uDelila wathabatha iintsontelo ezintsha, wamkhonkxa ngazo, wathi kuye, uSamson, arhawulwe ngamaFilisti; Kwaye kwakukho amaxoki ahlala kwelo gumbi. Yaye wawakrazula ezandleni zakhe njengentsontelo."
Judges16:13 Wathi uDelila kuSamson, Udlale ngam unangoku, undixokisa; ndixelele ukuba ungabotshwa yintoni. Wathi kuye, Ukuba uthe waluka imisonto esixhenxe yeenwele zentloko yam engutyeni;"
Judges16:14 Wamxhoma esibondeni, wathi kuye, Samson, amaFilisti aphezu kwakho; Wavuka ebuthongweni, wazixhoma ngesikhonkwane somthi nelaphu."
Judges16:15 Wathi kuye, Ungathini na ukuthi ndiyakuthanda, ukanti intliziyo yakho ayinam? Undithwale kwada kwakathathu, akwandixelela ukuba aphi na amandla akho angaka."
Judges16:16 Yaye kwathi, yonke imihla embandezela ngamazwi akhe, embandezela, wakhathazeka umphefumlo wakhe, wada wesa ekufeni;"
Judges16:17 Wamxelela konke okube kusentliziyweni yakhe; wathi kuye, Andiyichebanga intloko yakho; ngokuba ndingumNazarete kaThixo kwasesizalweni sikama."
Judges16:18 Wabona uDelila ukuba umxelele yonke intliziyo yakhe, wathumela, wabiza abathetheli bamaFilisti, wathi, Nyukani kaloku, ngokuba undibonisile yonke intliziyo yakhe. Zeza kuye abathetheli bamaFilisti, bephethe imali ngesandla sazo."
Judges16:19 Wamlalisa emathangeni akhe; wayibiza indoda, wayicheba iinwele ezisixhenxe zentloko yakhe; waqala wamxina, ephela amandla akhe."
Judges16:20 Wathi, Samson, amaFilisti aphezu kwakho; Wavuka ebuthongweni wathi, Ndiya kuphuma ndingcangcazela njengakuqala. Wayengazi ke ukuba uYehova umshiyile."
Judges16:21 Ambamba amaFilisti, amgquma ubuso, amzisa eGaza, amkhonkxa ngemixokelelwane yobhedu; wafela entolongweni."
Judges16:22 Zaqala iinwele zentloko yakhe zahluma, emva kokuba echetyiwe."
Judges16:23 Abathetheli bamaFilisti bahlanganisana, ukuba babingelele umbingelelo omkhulu kuDagon uthixo wabo, bavuya; bathi, uThixo wethu umnikele esandleni sethu uSamson, utshaba lwethu."
Judges16:24 Bambona abantu, badumisa uthixo wabo, bathi, uThixo wethu ulunikele esandleni sethu utshaba lwethu, umtshabalalisi welizwe lethu, obenze babaninzi ababuleweyo kuthi."
Judges16:25 Kwathi, ngenxa yovuyo lwentliziyo yabo, bathi, Bizani uSamson, asidlalele. Bambiza ke uSamson entolongweni; bammisa phakathi kweentsika."
Judges16:26 Wathi uSamson kumfana ombambe ngesandla, Ndiyeke ndichukumise iintsika emi ngazo indlu, ndayame ngazo;"
Judges16:27 Indlu ibizele ngamadoda nabafazi; zazikhona zonke iinkosana zamaFilisti; yaye eluphahleni kwakukho malunga namawaka amathathu amadoda nabafazi bebukele ngoxa uSamson wayedlala.
Judges16:28 Wakhala uSamson kuYehova, wathi, Yehova, Yehova, ndikhumbule, ndivuse kube kanye, Yehova, ndiphindezele impindezelo kumaFilisti ngenxa yamehlo am omabini."
Judges16:29 Wazibamba uSamson zombini iintsika ezisesazulwini, emi kuzo indlu, emi kuzo, emi kuzo, enye ngesandla sokunene, enye ngesandla sakhe sasekhohlo."
Judges16:30 Wathi uSamson, Mandife namaFilisti. Wathoba ngobugorha bakhe bonke; yawa indlu phezu kwezikhulu naphezu kwabantu bonke ababekuyo. Ngoko ke abafileyo awababulala ekufeni kwakhe baba baninzi kunabo wababulala esadla ubomi."
Judges16:31 Behla abazalwana bakhe nendlu kayise yonke, bamthabatha, bamnyusa, bamngcwabela phakathi kweSoreya ne-Eshtawoli, engcwabeni likaManowa uyise. Walawula kwaSirayeli iminyaka emashumi mabini."
Judges17:1 Kwaye kukho indoda yelasezintabeni zakwaEfrayim egama linguMika.
Judges17:2 Wandula ke wathi kunina: “Eliwaka elinekhulu leeshekele zesilivere ezathatyathwa kuwe, owaqalekisa ngazo waza wathetha ndisakuva, yabona, isilivere leyo ikum; Ndayithatha. Unina wathi: Ngamana uYehova akusikelele, nyana wam!"
Judges17:3 Xa wayibuyisela kunina isilivere ebunzima buliwaka elinekhulu leeshekele, wathi unina: “Isilivere leyo ndiyinyulele kuYehova ngokupheleleyo, ephuma esandleni sam ibe yeyonyana wam, ukuba enze umfanekiso oqingqiweyo nomfanekiso oqingqiweyo; oku kuwe."
Judges17:4 Wayibuyisela kunina imali; Unina wathabatha amakhulu amabini eeshekele zesilivere, wawanika umyili, wenza ngazo umfanekiso oqingqiweyo notyhidiweyo; yaye yayisendlwini kaMika."
Judges17:5 Loo ndoda, uMika, yayinendlu yothixo yaye yenza ilaphu legxalaba ngothixo wendlu yaza yangcwalisa omnye woonyana bayo ukuba abe ngumbingeleli wayo."
Judges17:6 Ngaloo mihla kwakungekho kumkani kwaSirayeli, kodwa wonk’ ubani wenza oko akubonayo kwakulungile emehlweni akhe."
Judges17:7 Ke eBhetelehem yakwaYuda kwakukho umfana wesizwe sakwaYuda, engumLevi, engumphambukeli apho."
Judges17:8 Yaphuma indoda leyo eBhetelehem yakwaYuda, yaphambukela eBhetelehem yakwaYuda, yaya kuphambukela apho ingafumana indawo;"
Judges17:9 Wathi uMika kuyo, Ungowaphi na? Wathi kuye, NdingumLevi waseBhetelehem yakwaYuda;"
Judges17:10 Wathi uMika kuye, Hlala nam, ube ngubawo nombingeleli; ndokunika ishumi leeshekele zesilivere iminyaka ngeminyaka, nengubo yokwaleka, nendlela yokuphila. Wangena ke umLevi."
Judges17:11 Wavuma umLevi lowo ukuhlala nendoda leyo; umfana lowo waba njengomnye woonyana bakhe kuye.
Judges17:12 uMika wamngcwalisa umLevi lowo; loo mfana waba ngumbingeleli wakhe lowo, wahlala endlwini kaMika."
Judges17:13 Wathi uMika, Kaloku ndiyazi ukuba uYehova uya kundenzela okulungileyo; ngokuba ndinomLevi ongumbingeleli wam."
Judges18:1 Ngelo xesha kube kungekho kumkani kwaSirayeli. Ngelo xesha abantu besizwe sakwaDan babefuna ilifa lokwakha; ngenxa yokuba kwada kwayiloo mini babengekalifumani lonke ilifa labo phakathi kwezizwe zakwaSirayeli.
Judges18:2 Oonyana bakaDan bathumela amadoda amahlanu emizalwaneni yawo endaweni yawo, amadoda angamakroti aseTsora nase-Eshtawoli ukuba aye kuhlola ilizwe nokulihlola; athi kuwo, Hambani ninyuke emhlabeni."
Judges18:3 Akubona ukuba besendlwini kaMika, alifanisa ilizwi lendodana engumLevi; Bangena khona, bathi kuye, Uziswe ngubani na apha? wenza ntoni kulendawo? kwaye unantoni apho?"
Judges18:4 Wathi kuwo, Wenjenje uMikaya, wandithabatha, ndaba ngumbingeleli wakhe;"
Judges18:5 Bathi kuye, Cela icebo kuThixo, sazi ukuba le ndlela siyihambayo yosikeleleka na."
Judges18:6 Wathi umbingeleli kubo, Hambani ninoxolo, phambi koYehova, nihambe apho nihamba khona."
Judges18:7 Ahamba ke amadoda amahlanu afika eLayishe, ababona abantu behleli khona, bezolile njengamaTsidon; kwaye bekungekho ukhozo lwemostade ezweni lam olwalubahlazisa nakuwuphi na umcimbi; babekude namaTsidon, bengahlangani namntu."
Judges18:8 Afika kubazalwana bawo eTsora nase-Eshtawoli; bathi abazalwana bawo kuwo, Nithini na?"
Judges18:9 Athi, Vukani, sibaxabele; kuba silibonile ihlabathi, kwaye qaphelani, lilunge kakhulu; kanti uselapho? ungalibazisi ukuya kwaye ungene ukuze ulidle ilifa ilizwe."
Judges18:10 Ukuba nithe nahamba, nofika ezweni elikhuselekileyo, ezweni elibanzi ngeenxa zombini; indawo apho kungekho nto emhlabeni."
Judges18:11 Kwaphuma khona amadoda angamakhulu amathandathu esizwe sakwaBhadan, evela eTsora nase-Eshtawoli, exhobe izixhobo zemfazwe."
Judges18:12 Enyuka ke, amisa eKiriyati-yeharim yakwaYuda; ke ngoko, bayibiza loo ndawo ngokuba yiMahanehadan kude kube namhla; nantso isemva kweKiriyati-yarim."
Judges18:13 Anduluka apho aya kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, afika endlwini kaMika."
Judges18:14 Aphendula ke amadoda amahlanu, abeze kulihlola ilizwe laseLayishe, athi kubazalwana bawo, Niyazi na ukuba kwezi zindlu kukho umfanekiso oqingqiweyo noqingqiweyo? ngoku ke yigqale into omelwe kukuyenza."
Judges18:15 Ajika ke apho, afika endlwini yendodana engumLevi, endlwini kaMika, aza ayibulisa."
Judges18:16 Amakhulu amathandathu amadoda axhobe ukulwa, akoonyana bakaDan, ema ekungeneni kwesango."
Judges18:17 Amadoda amahlanu awayeye kuhlola ilizwe, enyuka angena apho, awuthabatha umfanekiso oqingqiweyo nesambatho esisemagxeni noothixo bendlu nomfanekiso oqingqiweyo; umbingeleli wema ekungeneni kwesango namadoda angamakhulu amathandathu axhobe iimpahla zemfazwe."
Judges18:18 Emva koko bangena endlwini kaMika baza bathabatha umfanekiso oqingqiweyo ne-efodi noothixo bendlu nomfanekiso oqingqiweyo. Wathi umbingeleli kubo, Nenza ntoni na?"
Judges18:19 Bathi kuye, Yithi tu, ubeke isandla emlonyeni, uhambe nathi, ube ngubawo nombingeleli wethu; Kulungile na kuwe, ukuba ube ngumbingeleli wendlu yamntu mnye, ungumbingeleli wesizwe, nesizwe sakwaSirayeli na?"
Judges18:20 Yaba nemihlali intliziyo yombingeleli, wayithabatha iefodi noothixo bendlu nomfanekiso oqingqiweyo waza wangena phakathi kwabantu."
Judges18:21 Bajika ke, bahamba, babeka abantwana neenkomo nenqwelo phambi kwabo."
Judges18:22 Akuba kude nendlu kaMika, amadoda abesezindlwini ezikufuphi nendlu kaMika ahlanganisana, ababamba oonyana bakaDan."
Judges18:23 Babiza oonyana bakaDan. Ajika ke athi kuMika, Uhlelwe yintoni na, ukufika kwakho unesihlwele esingaka?"
Judges18:24 Wathi yena, Oothixo bam endabenzayo nibathabathile, nemka naye nombingeleli wam; kwaye yintoni enye endinayo? Sathi kum, Yintoni na ingxaki yakho?"
Judges18:25 Bathi kuye oonyana bakaDan, Musa ukulivakalisa ilizwi lakho kuthi, hleze akusukele amadoda anomsindo, uphulukane nomphefumlo wakho nowendlu yakho."
Judges18:26 Bahamba ke oonyana bakaDan. Wabona uMika ukuba bomelele kunaye, wajika wabuyela endlwini yakhe."
Judges18:27 Bayithabatha impahla awayeyenzile uMika, nombingeleli lowo wayenaye, beza eLayishe nabantu ababehleli ngoxolo nabahleli bekhuselekile; ababulala ngohlangothi lwekrele, bawutshisa umzi ngomlilo."
Judges18:28 Bekungekho msindisi, ngokuba bekukude eTsidon, kungekho kuzala; yaye isentilini ekufuphi neBhete-hobhe. Kwaye bakha isixeko baza bahlala kuso."
Judges18:29 Bathi loo mzi ngowakwaDan, ngegama likaDan, owazalelwa kwaSirayeli; kodwa ngaphambili, igama lesixeko laliyiLayishe."
Judges18:30 Oonyana bakaDan bazimisela umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, yaye uYonatan unyana kaGershom, unyana kaManase, yena noonyana bakhe baba ngababingeleli besizwe sakwaDan de kwangumhla wokuthinjwa kwelo lizwe."
Judges18:31 Yaye balungiselela umfanekiso oqingqiweyo kaMika awayewenzile ngayo yonke imihla yendlu yoTHIXO oyinyaniso eyayiseShilo.
Judges19:1 Ngelo xesha, kungekho kumkani kwaSirayeli, bekukho umLevi owayehlala kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, wazeka umfazi eBhetelehem yakwaYuda."
Judges19:2 Wakrexeza naye isithende, wemka kuye, waya endlwini kayise eBhetelehem yakwaYuda, wahlala khona iinyanga zane."
Judges19:3 Yesuka indoda yalo yalilandela, ukuba ithethe kakuhle nalo, yalibuyisa nekhoboka lalo, namanye amaesile; wayingenisa endlwini kayise, wayibona uyise wentombazana, wakuvuyela ukuyihlangabeza."
Judges19:4 Uyise womkakhe, uyise wentombi, wayeyigcinele yona; wahlala naye iintsuku zantathu; badla, basela, balala khona."
Judges19:5 Kwathi ngomhla wesine, bavuka kusasa, ukuba ahambe; wathi uyise wentombi kumyeni wakhe, Yithuthuzele intliziyo yakho ngeqhekeza lesonka, ungashiyi emva."
Judges19:6 Bahlala phantsi, badla, basela ndawonye, ngokuba wathi uyise wentombi endodeni leyo, Vuka, ulale ubusuku bonke, ize ibe nemihlali intliziyo yakho."
Judges19:7 Yesuka indoda leyo ukuba ihambe; wayijoka uyise womkayo; ke ngoko, wachitha ubusuku apho kwakhona."
Judges19:8 Yavuka kusasa ngomhla wesihlanu ukuba ihambe; Wathi uyise wentombazana, Yithuthuzele intliziyo yakho; Bahlala ke kwada kwasemini enkulu, badla bobabini."
Judges19:9 Yavuka indoda leyo, ukuba ihambe, yona inomkhonzi wayo, nomkhonzi wayo, uyisezala, uyise wentombi yayo, yathi kuyo: “Yabona, le mini iyeza, lala; ilanga liyakhula kude kube sekupheleni, hlala apha, ukuze intliziyo yakho ivuye; ndihambe ngomso ndigoduke."
Judges19:10 Akuthandanga kulala indoda leyo, yesuka yemka, yafika eYebhusi, eyiYerusalem ke leyo; idizili ezimbini; nesithende sakhe sasikunye naye."
Judges19:11 Bafika eYebhusi, lalisele litshonile ilanga; Wathi umkhonzi enkosini yakhe, Hamba, singene kulo mzi wamaYebhusi, silale khona."
Judges19:12 Yathi kuye inkosi yakhe, Masingasuki apha siye kumzi wolunye uhlanga, ongewoonyana bakaSirayeli; siya eGibheha."
Judges19:13 Wathi kumfana wakuyo, Yiza, sisondele kwenye indawo, silale, nokuba kuseGibheha, nokuba kuseRama."
Judges19:14 Zahamba, zahamba; latshona ilanga phezu kwabo beseGibheha ezweni lakwaBhenjamin."
Judges19:15 Baphambukela khona, baya eGibheha, balalisa khona; wangena, wamhlalisa ezitratweni zomzi; kuba bekungekho namnye ubamkelayo ukuba baye kulala endlwini yakhe."
Judges19:16 Ke kaloku indoda enkulu yeza ivela emsebenzini wayo ngokuhlwa, ivela emasimini, yeza ivela kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim; wayishiya iGibheya njengomphambukeli, kodwa amadoda aloo ndawo ayephuma kwisizwe sakwaBhenjamin."
Judges19:17 Wawaphakamisa amehlo akhe, wabona umhambi endaweni yembutho yomzi; Yathi indoda enkulu, Uya ngaphi na? ungowaphi?"
Judges19:18 Yathi kuyo, Siyahamba, sivela eBhetelehem yakwaYuda; siya emathambekeni akwaEfrayim; Ndemka khona, ndaya eBhetelehem yakwaYuda; ngoku ke ndihambela endlwini kaYehova; kwaye akukho bani undamkelayo endlwini."
Judges19:19 Noko ke sikho utyani, neendiza zamaesile ethu; kukho isonka newayini ngenxa yam, nomkhonzazana wakho, nomfana onabakhonzi bakho; ayifuni nto."
Judges19:20 Yathi indoda enkulu, Uxolo malube nawe; yonke iminqweno yakho mayibe phezu kwam; ungahlali nje esitratweni."
Judges19:21 Wamsa endlwini yakhe, wabanika ukudla; bazihlamba iinyawo zabo, badla, basela."
Judges19:22 Kwathi, bakuba benemihlali ezintliziyweni zabo, nango amadoda aloo mzi, oonyana bakaBheliyali, engena endlwini, ankqonkqoza elucangweni, athetha kumninindlu, ixhego, esithi, Zisa usindiso indoda engene endlwini yakho, ukuze simazi."
Judges19:23 Yaphuma indoda engumninindlu, yaya kubo, yathi kubo, Hayi, bazalwana bam, musani ukukha nenze into embi enjengale; nibone ukuba le ndoda ingene endlwini yam, musani ukwenza obu budenge."
Judges19:24 Nantsi intombi yam, intombi eyintombi, nesithende sayo; ngoku ndiya kubakhupha, ndikuthobe, ndibenzele okulungileyo emehlweni akho;"
Judges19:25 Akavuma loo madoda ukumphulaphula. Indoda leyo yathabatha isithende sayo, yasizisa kuwo; kwaye bamazi baza bamtshabhisa ubusuku bonke kwada kwasa; lwathi lwakufika, bamkhulula."
Judges19:26 Wafika umfazi lowo kusasa, waziphosa phantsi phambi komnyango wendlu yendoda, umniniyo, kwada kwasa."
Judges19:27 Yagqiba inkosi yakhe kusasa, yazivula iingcango zendlu, yaphuma ukuba ihambe; nantso intokazi iwile emnyango wendlu, izandla zayo zisemnyango."
Judges19:28 Wathi kuye, Yima, sihambe; Kodwa akukho namnye waphendulayo. Yamkhwelisa e-esileni, yesuka indoda leyo, yagoduka."
Judges19:29 Wathi akungena endlwini yakhe, wathabatha isitshetshe, wasibamba isithende sakhe, wasicanda saziziqwenga ezilishumi elinazibini, wasithumela kulo lonke ilizwe lakwaSirayeli."
Judges19:30 Bathi bonke abayibonayo, Akuzanga kwenziwe nto inje, akuzanga kubonwe oku, kususela ekunyukeni koonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni laseYiputa, unanamhla; nikela ingqalelo, thabatha icebiso kwaye uthethe ingqondo yakho."
Judges20:1 Baphuma ke bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli, labizelwa ndawonye ibandla kuYehova Mizpa njengamntu mnye, lithabathela kwaDan lesa eBher-shebha, nasezweni laseGiliyadi."
Judges20:2 Babonakala ke izikhulu zabantu, zezizwe zonke zakwaSirayeli, ebandleni labantu bakaThixo, bengamakhulu amane amawaka angumqikela, arhola ikrele."
Judges20:3 Beva ke oonyana bakaBhenjamin ukuba oonyana bakaSirayeli benyuke baya eMizpa. Baza oonyana bakaSirayeli bathi: “Sixelele, kwenzeke ntoni na obu bubi?"
Judges20:4 Waphendula umLevi, indoda yaloo mbulali, wathi, Ndifikile eGibheha yakwaBhenjamin, mna nesithende sam, ukuba ndilale khona."
Judges20:5 Abemi baseGibheha bandivunukela, bayirhawula indlu phakathi kwam ebusuku, baceba ukundibulala; yaye isithende sam sabanyanzela ukuba bafe."
Judges20:6 Ndasithabatha isithende sam, ndasinqunqa, ndasithumela kulo lonke ilizwe lelifa lakwaSirayeli; ngokuba enze okuziintloni nobudenge kuSirayeli."
Judges20:7 Yabonani, bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli; nika iingcebiso kunye neengcebiso zakho apha."
Judges20:8 Lonke uhlanga lwema njengamntu mnye, lwathi, Asiyi kuya ententeni yakhe, asiyi kungena endlwini yakhe."
Judges20:9 Kaloku ke siya kuyenza le nto ngeGibheha; siya kuyihlasela ekupheleni;
Judges20:10 Siya kuthabatha amadoda alishumi kwikhulu ezizweni zonke zakwaSirayeli, nekhulu ewakeni, ewakeni, eshumini lamawaka, ukuba aye kubalungiselela abantu ukudla, abaya kukwenza ekufikeni kwabo eGibheha kwilizwe lakwaBhenjamin."
Judges20:11 Abuthelana umzi onke amadoda akwaSirayeli, ekhonkxiwe njengamntu mnye."
Judges20:12 Izizwe zakwaSirayeli zathumela amadoda kwizizwe zonke zakwaBhenjamin, zathi, Bububi buni na obu, benziweyo phakathi kwenu?"
Judges20:13 Ke kaloku sinike la madoda, oonyana bakaBheliyali, baseGibheya, ukuze siwabulale, sisuse ububi kwaSirayeli. Abavuma oonyana bakaBhenjamin ukuliphulaphula ilizwi labazalwana babo, oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Judges20:14 Bahlanganisana oonyana bakaBhenjamin emizini yaseGibheha, ukuba balwe noonyana bakaSirayeli."
Judges20:15 Ngelo xesha babhaliswa oonyana bakaBhenjamin ezixekweni amadoda angamashumi amabini anesithandathu amawaka arhola ikrele, ngaphandle kwabemi baseGibheya, ababengamakhulu asixhenxe amadoda anyuliweyo."
Judges20:16 Kolu hlanga lonke kwakukho amakhulu asixhenxe amadoda awayenyulwe ngasekhohlo; wonk’ ubani wayenokugibisela ngamatye kangangendlela enobubanzi beenwele, engakhange aphoswe nakancinane."
Judges20:17 Ke amadoda akwaSirayeli, ngaphandle kwamaBhenjamin, abebalwe emakhulu mane amawaka arhola ikrele; bonke babengamagorha."
Judges20:18 Bandula ke oonyana bakaSirayeli bazilungisa baza benyuka baya endlwini yoTHIXO oyinyaniso baza bacela icebiso kuThixo, bathi: “Ngubani na kuthi oya kunyuka kuqala aye kulwa noonyana bakaBhenjamin? Wathi uYehova, Konyuka kuqala uYuda."
Judges20:19 Bachitha ingomso oonyana bakaSirayeli, bayimisa iintente ngaseGibheha."
Judges20:20 Aphuma amadoda akwaSirayeli, aya kulwa namaBhenjamin; yaye amadoda akwaSirayeli agxalathelana ukuya kulwa nawo eGibheya."
Judges20:21 Baphuma oonyana bakaBhenjamin eGibheha, batshabalalisa ngaloo mini amadoda angamashumi amabini anamabini amawaka koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Judges20:22 Bazomeleza abantu, amadoda akwaSirayeli, baphinda balwa endaweni ababeyilungisile ngomhla wokuqala."
