Judges20:23 Benyuka oonyana bakaSirayeli, balila phambi koYehova, kwada kwahlwa. Babuza kuYehova, bathi, Ndiphínde na ndisondele ekulweni noonyana bakaBhenjamin, umzalwana wam? Wathi uYehova, Nyukani niye kubo."
Judges20:24 Basondela oonyana bakaSirayeli, baya kubakhawulela oonyana bakaBhenjamin ngomhla wesibini."
Judges20:25 Aphuma amaBhenjamin eGibheha, aya kubakhawulela ngomhla wesibini, abulala ishumi elinesibhozo lamawaka amadoda ezweni loonyana bakaSirayeli; bonke barhole amakrele abo."
Judges20:26 Bandula ke bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli nabo bonke abantu benyuka baya endlwini yoTHIXO oyinyaniso balila baza bahlala phantsi phambi koYehova baza ngaloo mini bazila ukutya kwada kwangokuhlwa baza banikela iminikelo etshiswayo neyombulelo phambi koYehova. NKOSI.
Judges20:27 Babuza oonyana bakaSirayeli kuYehova, ngokuba ityeya yomnqophiso kaThixo ibilapho ngelo xesha."
Judges20:28 Ngelo xesha uPinehasi unyana kaElazare, unyana ka-Aron, wema ngakuye, wathi, Ndibuye ndiphume ndiye kulwa noonyana bakaBhenjamin, umzalwana wam, ndiyeke, kusini na? Wathi uYehova, Nyuka; ngokuba ngomso ndiya kubanikela esandleni sakho."
Judges20:29 Yaye uSirayeli waqhubeka ehlala kufuphi neGibheya.
Judges20:30 Baxabela oonyana bakaSirayeli oonyana bakaBhenjamin ngomhla wesithathu, bayingenela iGibheha njengokwangaphambili."
Judges20:31 Baphuma oonyana bakaBhenjamin, baya kubakhawulela abantu, bafuduswa kuwo umzi; Baxabela abantu, bababulala njengokwangaphambili, ezindleleni, ezinyukayo ziye endlwini kaThixo, enye isiya eGibheha emaphandleni, bengamadoda angathi amashumi amathathu akwaSirayeli."
Judges20:32 Bathi oonyana bakaBhenjamin, Bagxothiwe phambi kwethu njengokwamandulo; Bathi oonyana bakaSirayeli, Masibarhuqele emendweni ophuma kuwo umzi."
Judges20:33 Anduluka onke amadoda akwaSirayeli endaweni yawo, axhobela imfazwe eBhahali-tamare;"
Judges20:34 Kwafika ishumi lamawaka amadoda ahleliweyo kumaSirayeli onke, eGibheha; idabi lalinzima; babengazi bona ukuba ububi bubafikele."
Judges20:35 uYehova wawoyisa amaBhenjamin phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli, batshabalalisa oonyana bakaSirayeli ngaloo mini amashumi amabini anesihlanu amawaka, anekhulu lamaBhenjamin; bonke barhole amakrele abo."
Judges20:36 Oonyana bakaBhenjamin babona ukuba boyisiwe, ngenxa yokuba amadoda akwaSirayeli azinikela koonyana bakaBhenjamin, ngenxa yokuba ayekholose ngamaxoki awayehlala kufuphi neGibheya."
Judges20:37 Amaxoki akhawuleza, aya eGibheha; yaye abavukeli bahlanganisana ndawonye baza bangqinga isixeko siphela ngomsindo wekrele."
Judges20:38 Kwabakho ke umqondiso phakathi kwamadoda akwaSirayeli namaxoki, abelindele ukukhupha umsi omkhulu esixekweni."
Judges20:39 Abuyela edabini amadoda akwaSirayeli, asuka amaBhenjamin abulala, abulala amadoda angathi amashumi amathathu kumadoda akwaSirayeli; kuba bathi: Inene, boyisiwe phambi kwethu njengakwimfazwe yokuqala."
Judges20:40 Kwathi, ekunyukeni kwelangatye esixekweni kwilifu lomsi, babheka emva kwabo oonyana bakaBhenjamin, bawubona umzi unyuka usiya ezulwini."
Judges20:41 Abuya amadoda akwaSirayeli, othuka amadoda akwaBhenjamin, ngokuba abona ukuba ewelwe bububi."
Judges20:42 Ngenxa yoko anikela ikhosi kumadoda akwaSirayeli, abehamba ngendlela eya entlango; yawafumana imfazwe; yaye abo babevela ezixekweni babatshabalalisa phakathi kwabo."
Judges20:43 Bawarhawula amaBhenjamin, bawasukela, bawanyathelela phantsi, besa eGibheha ukuphuma kwelanga."
Judges20:44 Kwishumi elinesibhozo lamawaka amadoda akwaBhenjamin; bonke babengamadoda anobukroti.
Judges20:45 Ajika ke, asabela entlango, engxondorheni yeRimon; basukela ukuya kufikelela eGidomo, babulala kuwo amawaka amabini."
Judges20:46 Bonke abawayo kumaBhenjamin ngaloo mini baba ngamashumi amabini anesihlanu amawaka, ingamadoda arhola ikrele; bonke babengamadoda anobukroti."
Judges20:47 Ke ajika asabela entlango engxondorheni eRimon engamakhulu amathandathu amadoda, ahlala engxondorheni yeRimon iinyanga zane."
Judges20:48 Abuya amadoda akwaSirayeli koonyana bakaBhenjamin, ababulala ngohlangothi lwekrele, kwanabantu bemizi ngemizi, njengenkomo, nabo bonke ababambene ngezandla; Bayitshisa yonke imizi beze ngantoni."
Judges21:1 Afunga amadoda akwaSirayeli eMizpa, esithi, Akukho kuthi uya kunika umBhenjamin intombi yakhe, ibe ngumkakhe."
Judges21:2 Beza abantu endlwini yoTHIXO oyinyaniso baza bahlala apho kwada kwahlwa phambi koThixo oyinyaniso, baza baphakamisa amazwi abo baza balila ngokukrakra;"
Judges21:3 Wathi: “Yehova, Thixo kaSirayeli, ngani na ukuba namhlanje kufe esinye isizukulwana kwaSirayeli?"
Judges21:4 Ngemini elandelayo abantu bavuka ekuseni baza bakha isibingelelo apho baza benza iminikelo etshiswayo neyombulelo.
Judges21:5 Bathi oonyana bakaSirayeli, Ngubani na ezizweni zonke zakwaSirayeli onganyukanga aye kuYehova nebandla? Ngokuba bamfungele isifungo esikhulu onganyukanga aye kuYehova eMitspe, besithi, Inene, uya kubulawa."
Judges21:6 Badana oonyana bakaSirayeli ngenxa kaBhenjamin, abazalwana babo, besithi, Namhla kutshabalale esinye isizwe sakwaSirayeli."
Judges21:7 Siya kubathini na abo baseleyo nabafazi, ekubeni thina sifungile uYehova ukuba asiyi kuwanika iintombi zethu zibe ngabafazi bawo?"
Judges21:8 Bathi ke, Ngubani na ezizweni zakwaSirayeli onganyukanga aye kuYehova eMizpa? Nanko ke kungekho mntu eminqubeni yaseYabheshe eGiliyadi, emva kwentlanganiso leyo."
Judges21:9 Babalwa abantu, nanko kungabangakho namnye kubemi baseYabheshe yaseGiliyadi."
Judges21:10 Ibandla lathumela khona ishumi elinamabini lamawaka amadoda anobukroti, lawawisela umthetho, lisithi, Hambani niye kubulala abemi baseYabheshe yaseGiliyadi, ngohlangothi lwekrele, kwanabafazi nabantwana."
Judges21:11 Nantsi into eniya kuyenza: uqalekiseni onke amadoda, nabafazi bonke abathe balala nendoda;"
Judges21:12 Bafumana kubemi baseYabheshe yaseGiliyadi, bafumana amakhulu omane iintombi eziziintombi, ekungaziwanga mntu ukuba abe neentlobano zokwazana nandoda; babazisa ekuthinjweni eShilo esezweni lakwaKanan."
Judges21:13 Lathumela lonke ibandla, laya kuthetha koonyana bakaBhenjamin ababesengxondorheni yeRimon, ukuba bacele uxolo."
Judges21:14 Abuya ke amaBhenjamin ngelo xesha; babanika abafazi ababebakhulise kubafazi baseYabheshe eGiliyadi, kodwa ababanelanga."
Judges21:15 Abantu bazisola ngoBhenjamin, kuba uYehova wayezinqamle izizwe zakwaSirayeli."
Judges21:16 Athi amadoda amakhulu ebandla, Siya kubathini na abaseleyo abafazi, xa etshatyalalisiwe abafazi bakwaBhenjamin?"
Judges21:17 Bathi, Libe lilifa leembacu zakwaBhenjamin, ukuze singatshabalali isizwe kwaSirayeli."
Judges21:18 Ke thina asiyi kubanika abafazi beentombi zethu, ngokuba bafungile oonyana bakaSirayeli, besithi, Uqalekisiwe onika umBhenjamin umfazi."
Judges21:19 Babesithi ke, Niyabona, kukho umthendeleko kaYehova iminyaka ngeminyaka eShilo, ngasentla kweBheteli, ngasempumalanga endleleni ephuma eBheteli, iye kwaShekem, nasezantsi kweLebhona."
Judges21:20 Abawisela oonyana bakaBhenjamin, besithi, Lalani, nikhangele ezidiliyeni;"
Judges21:21 yabonani, xenikweni iintombi zaseShilo ziphuma zingqungqa, ziphuma ezidiliyeni, zithabathele elowo umkakhe ezintombini zaseShilo, niye ezweni lakwaBhenjamin."
Judges21:22 Xa ooyise nabanakwazo beza kuthi beze kumangalela kuthi, sothi kubo, Senzeleni inceba ngenxa yethu; ngokuba anibanga namfazwe phakathi kwenu, ngokuba anibanikanga bona ixesha; ukuba netyala."
Judges21:23 Benjenjalo oonyana bakaBhenjamin, bazeka abafazi ngokwenani labo kwiemvumi ababezithimbile; banduluka, babuyela elifeni labo, bakha imizi, bahlala kuyo."
Judges21:24 Bemka apho oonyana bakaSirayeli ngelo xesha, baya elowo emizalwaneni yakhe, nasemzalwaneni wakowabo, baphuma khona, waya elowo elifeni lakhe."
Judges21:25 Ngaloo mihla kube kungekho kumkani kwaSirayeli; elowo wenza unothanda.
Ruth1:1 Ngexesha labagwebi kwabakho indlala ehlabathini. Yahamba indoda yaseBhetelehem yakwaYuda, yaya ezweni lakwaMowabhi, yona nomkayo, noonyana bayo ababini."
Ruth1:2 Igama lale ndoda lalinguElimeleki, igama lomkayo lalinguNahomi, amagama oonyana bayo babengooMahalon noKiliyon bakumaEfrata aseBhetelehem yakwaYuda. Bafika ke elizweni lakwaMowabhi, bema khona."
Ruth1:3 Wafa uElimeleki indoda kaNahomi; wasala noonyana bakhe bobabini.
Ruth1:4 Bazeka abafazi kubafazi bakwaMowabhi; igama lomnye belinguOrpa, igama lomnye belinguRute; bahlala khona iminyaka emalunga neshumi."
Ruth1:5 Bafa kananjalo bobabini ooMalon noKiliyon; Wasala loo mfazi noonyana bakhe bobabini nendoda yakhe.
Ruth1:6 Wagqiba ngoomolokazana bakhe ukubuya ezweni lakwaMowabhi; ngenxa yokuba wayevile kwilizwe lakwaMowabhi ukuba uYehova ubavelele abantu bakhe ngokubanika isonka.
Ruth1:7 Waphuma kuloo ndawo abekuyo, enoomolokazana bakhe bobabini; yaye bagqiba kwelokuba babuyele kwilizwe lakwaYuda."
Ruth1:8 Wathi uNahomi koomolokazana bakhe bobabini, Buyani, aye elowo endlwini yonina; uYehova makanenzele okulungileyo nina, njengoko nenze ngako kum nakwabafileyo."
Ruth1:9 Ngamana uYehova anganinika ukuphumla, ngamnye endlwini yendoda yakhe. Waza wabanga; Baliphakamisa ilizwi labo, balila."
Ruth1:10 Bathi kuye, Hayi, siya kubuyela nawe kubantu bakowenu."
Ruth1:11 Wathi uNahomi, Buyani, zintombi zam; nihamba nam na? Basekho oonyana esizalweni sam, ukuba babe ngamadoda enu?"
Ruth1:12 Phakani, zintombi zam, nihambe; ngokuba sendikwaluphalele ukuba nendoda. Ukuba ndithe, Ndisenethemba, nokuba ndithe ndaba ngoyindoda ngobu busuku, ndabuya ndazala oonyana;"
Ruth1:13 Ngaba ubuya kubalinda bade bakhule? ungathanda ukuba namadoda? hayi, zintombi zam; kuba ndibuhlungu kakhulu ngenxa yenu kuba isandla sikaYehova siphume nxamnye nam."
Ruth1:14 Bawaphakamisa amazwi abo, babuya balila, uOrpa wamanga uninazala; kodwa uRute wamsindisa."
Ruth1:15 Wathi, Yabona, umolokazana wakho ubuyele kubantu bakowabo nakoothixo bakowabo; buyela emva komolokazana wakho."
Ruth1:16 Wathi uRute, Musa akundibongoza ukuba ndikushiye, ndibuye ndikulandele; ngokuba ndiya kuya apho uya khona; apho uhlala khona, ndiya kuhlala khona; Abantu bakowenu baya kuba ngabantu bam, noThixo wakho abe nguThixo wam."
Ruth1:17 Ndiya kufela apho ufela khona, ndingcwatyelwe khona; Uya kwenjenjalo kum uYehova, nangakumbi, logama nje ukufa kusahlula kuni."
Ruth1:18 Wathi akubona ukuba uzimisele ukuhamba naye, wayeka ukuthetha kuye."
Ruth1:19 Bahamba ke bobabini, bada bafika eBhetelehem. Bakufika eBhetelehem, isixeko sonke saxokozela, sisithi, NguNahomi na lo?"
Ruth1:20 Wathi kubo, Musani ukuthi ndinguNahomi; yithini ndinguMara, ngokuba undenze ububi kunene uSomandla."
Ruth1:21 Ndaphuma ndizele, yaye uYehova wandibuyisa ndilambatha; Yini na ukuba nithi ndinguNahomi, ekubeni uYehova endingqinele, anditshutshise uSomandla?"
Ruth1:22 Wabuya uNahomi enoRute umMowabhikazi, umolokazana wakhe, ekubuyeni kwakhe evela ezweni lakwaMowabhi; bafika eBhetelehem ekuqaleni kokuvunwa kwerhasi."
Ruth2:1 Ke kaloku uNahomi ubenomninawa wendoda yakhe, eyindoda enkulu emzalwaneni kaElimeleki; igama lakhe lalinguBhohazi."
Ruth2:2 Wathi uRute umMowabhikazi kuNahomi, Makhe ndiye ezweni, ndibhula ingqolowa, andiyi kubabalwa emehlweni akhe. Wathi kuye, Hamba, ntombi yam;"
Ruth2:3 Wahamba waya kubhula entsimini emva kwabavuni;
Ruth2:4 Kwathi gqi uBhohazi, evela eBhetelehem, wathi kubemi bomzi, uYehova makabe nani. Bathi kuye: uYehova akusikelele!"
Ruth2:5 Wathi uBhohazi kwindodana yakhe ephethe abavuni, Ngokabani na lo mntwana?"
Ruth2:6 Waphendula umkhonzi ophethe abalusi, wathi, Yintombi engumMowabhikazi, eze noNahomi ezweni lakwaMowabhi."
Ruth2:7 Wathi, Makhe ndibuthe phantsi kwezithungu emva kwabavuni; Weza ke, wahlala kwakusasa kwada kwangoku, ehleli nje kancinane endlwini."
Ruth2:8 Wathi uBhohazi kuRute: “Awuva na, ntombi yam? Musa ukunyuka uye kwelinye ilizwe, okanye ukusuka apha, kodwa hlala apha nosapho lwam."
Ruth2:9 Amehlo akho makalibone ilizwe abalivunayo, uzilandele; Andithi na amakhwenkwe angakuchukumisi? ukuba unxaniwe, yiya equleni, usele kuloo nto bayirholeyo abafana."
Ruth2:10 Wawa ngobuso bakhe, waqubuda, wathi kuye, Ndibone ngani ubabalo emehlweni akho, ukuba undazi, ndingowasemzini?"
Ruth2:11 Waphendula uBhohazi, wathi kuye, Ndiyixelelwe yonke into oyenzileyo kunyokozala, emva kokufa kwendoda yakho, nokushiya kwakho uyihlo nonyoko, nelizwe owazalelwa kulo."
Ruth2:12 Wanga uYehova angakubuyekeza izenzo zakho, uzaliseke umvuzo wakho ovela kuYehova uThixo kaSirayeli, okholose ngaye phantsi kwamaphiko akhe."
Ruth2:13 Wathi, Mandibabalwe nguwe, nkosi yam; ngenxa enokuba undithuthuzele, wathetha kakuhle kumkhonzazana wakho, nangona ndingenjengomnye wabakhonzazana bakho."
Ruth2:14 Wathi uBhohazi kuye, Ngexesha lokudla sondela apha, udle isonka, uncinde iviniga ngeqhekeza lakho. Wahlala phantsi ngasebalusi. Kweza kuye ingqolowa eyomileyo, wadla, wahlutha, wemka."
Ruth2:15 Uthe ke akuphakama ukubawa, uBhohazi wabawisela umthetho abakhonzi bakhe, wathi, Makabawe naphakathi kwabaninzi, musani ukumgxeka."
Ruth2:16 Kanjalo, inxenye yabambalwa iwela phezu kwakhe ngabom, imshiya, ukuze abathabathe, bangamkhalimeli."
Ruth2:17 Wabhula entsimini kwada kwahlwa, wayibhula into abeyibhulile, yanga yiefa yerhasi."
Ruth2:18 Wayithabatha ke, wangena esixekweni, wayibona uninazala into awayeyithabathile;"
Ruth2:19 Wathi uninazala kuye, Ubusiya phi na namhlanje? kwaye ubusebenza phi? unoyolo lowo unikhathaleleyo. Wazisa umazala wakhe awayesebenza naye, wathi: Igama lendoda endandisebenza nayo namhlanje nguBoase."
Ruth2:20 Wathi uNahomi kumolokazana wakhe: Ngamana angasikelelwa nguYehova, ongayekanga ukubonisa inceba kwabaphilayo nabafileyo. Wathi uNahomi kuye, Le ndoda ikufuphi kuthi, ingumzalwana wethu;"
Ruth2:21 Wathi uRute umMowabhikazi, Kananjalo uthe kum, Namathela kumadodana am, alugqibe lonke uvuno lwam;"
Ruth2:22 Wathi uNahomi kuRute, umolokazana wakhe, Kulungile, ntombi yam, ukuba uthe waphuma nomthinjana wakhe, ukuba ungakufiki kumhlaba wolunye uhlanga."
Ruth2:23 Wazimanya neentombi zikaBhohazi ukuba abhule, kwada kwagqitywa ukuvunwa kwerhasi nokuvunwa kwengqolowa; wahlala noninazala."
Ruth3:1 Wathi uNahomi uninazala kuye, Ntombi yam, ndingakufuneli na ukuphumla, uphumle?"
Ruth3:2 Ke kaloku uBhohazi akangowesizwe sakowethu; ubeneentombi zini na? Yabona, ngobu busuku uzuza irhasi esandeni."
Ruth3:3 Zihlambe, uthambise, yambatha iingubo zakho, uhle; kodwa uze ungazazisi endodeni leyo, ide igqibe ukudla nokusela."
Ruth3:4 Xa ithe yalala, yinyamekele indawo eya kulala kuyo, ungene, ugubungele iinyawo zayo, ulale; wokuxelela ke yena into omawuyenze."
Ruth3:5 Wathi kuye, Yonke into ondixelela yona ndoyenza."
Ruth3:6 Wehla ke, wenza njengoko abemwisele umthetho uninazala."
Ruth3:7 Wakugqiba ukudla nokusela uBhohazi, yachwayitha intliziyo yakhe, walala ekupheleni kwesithungu; wayivula kakuhle imilenze yakhe, wamlalisa."
Ruth3:8 Ezinzulwini zobusuku indoda yoyika, yajika, yabona umfazi elele ezinyaweni zakhe."
Ruth3:9 Wathi, Ungubani na? Wathi, NdinguRute, umkhonzazana wakho; Yandlala ingubo yakho phezu komkhonzazana wakho; ngokuba ezalamana naye."
Ruth3:10 Wathi, Makasikelelwe nguYehova, ntombi yam, ngenxa enokuba wayenzela imfesane yakho ekupheleni, ngaphezu kweyokuqala, ngenxa yokuba ungalandelanga madodana nje, nokuba ngasweleyo nokuba butyebi."
Ruth3:11 Kaloku ke, ntombi yam, musa ukoyika; Ndiya kwenza nantoni na oyicelayo, kuba yonke idolophana yakowethu iyakwazi ukuba ungumfazi olungileyo."
Ruth3:12 Kuyinyaniso oko, ukuba ndingumzalwana wakho; kodwa kukho isalamane esisondeleyo kum."
Ruth3:13 Lala ngobu busuku; kothi kusasa, ukuba uthe wayenzela indlu le, kulungile; makadlale indima yomkrexezi; ke ukuba akathanga anesabelo kuwe, ndiya kubelana nawe ngesabelo ngeNkosi ephilileyo; lala kude kuse."
Ruth3:14 Walala ezinyaweni zakhe kwada kwasa, wavuka engekamazi omnye. Athi: Akufunekanga yaziwe isizathu sokuba lomfazi eze enkundleni."
Ruth3:15 Wabuya wathi, Sisondeze isigqubuthelo osigubungeleyo, sibambe; Wayibamba, walinganisa iiseha ezintandathu zerhasi, wamnika; waza wangena kuwo umzi."
Ruth3:16 Wathi akufika kuninazala, wathi: “Ungubani na, ntombi yam? Wamxelela konke ekwenzileyo kuye loo ndoda."
Ruth3:17 Wathi, Indinike ezi milinganiselo mithandathu yerhasi; ngokuba wathi kum, Musa ukuya kunyokozala wedwa."
Ruth3:18 Wandula ke wathi: “Yithi cwaka, ntombi yam, ude wazi ukuba kuya kuphela njani oku; ngokuba akayi kuphumla loo mntu, ade ayigqibe loo nto namhla."
Ruth4:1 wenyuka uBhohazi, waya esangweni lomzi, wahlala khona; owathi kubo: Oh! Jika, uhlale phantsi apha. Uye wajika wahlala phantsi."
Ruth4:2 Wathabatha amadoda alishumi kumadoda amakhulu omzi, wathi, Hlalani apha. Bahlala phantsi."
Ruth4:3 Wathi kumkhuluwa wakhe, uNahomi obuyele ezweni lakwaMowabhi uthengise ngentsimi kaElimeleki, umzalwana wethu."
Ruth4:4 Bendizimisele ukukwazisa, ndisithi, Wuthenge phambi kwabemiyo naphambi kwamadoda amakhulu esizwe sakowethu. Ukuba ufuna ukuyishiya, yishiye; ke ukuba uthe akwavuma ukusindulula, ndixelele, ukuze ndiyazi; ndikushiye ngasemva. Athi: Ndiya kuyishiya."
Ruth4:5 Wathi uBhohazi, Ngemini oyithengayo intsimi esandleni sikaNahomi, woyithenga nakuRute, umMowabhikazi, umfazi womfi, ukuba uvuselele igama lomfi elifeni lakhe."
Ruth4:6 Wathi umqokeleli, Andiyi kuzithabathela ngokwam, ukuze ndingalonakalisi ilifa lam; Hlukana nam; ngokuba andinako ukuyikhulula ngentlawulelo."
Ruth4:7 Le yayiyindlela kaSirayeli yosindiso nenguquko, eqinisekisa yonke into; umntu wakhulula imbadada yakhe, wayinika ummelwane wakhe; yaye oko kwaba ngumqondiso kwaSirayeli."
Ruth4:8 Wathi umlindi kuBhohazi, Zithengele. Ngoko ukhulula isihlangu sakhe."
Ruth4:9 Wathi uBhohazi kumadoda amakhulu nakubantu bonke, Ningamangqina namhla, ukuba ndiyithengile yonke impahla kaElimeleki, nekaKiliyon yonke, nekaMagalon, esandleni sikaNahomi."
Ruth4:10 Kananjalo uRute, umMowabhikazi, umMowabhikazi, umMowabhikazi, ndamthenga, ukuba abe ngumkam, ukuze ndiphilise igama lomfi elifeni lakhe, lingacinywa igama lomfi phakathi kwabazalwana bakhe kunye noodade isango lendlu yakhe: namangqina namhla."
Ruth4:11 Bonke abantu ababesesangweni namadoda amakhulu bathi, Singamangqina. uYehova makamenze lo mfazi ungenayo endlwini yakho, abe njengoRakeli nanjengoLeya, bona bayakhayo indlu kaSirayeli bobabini; yaye uqhuba kakuhle e-Efrata, yaye udume eBhetelehem."
Ruth4:12 Indlu yakho mayibe njengendlu kaPeretse, awamzalela uTamare kuYuda, nabantwana abo aya kukunika uYehova ngale ntombi;"
Ruth4:13 uBhohazi wamzeka uRute waba ngumfazi; Uthe ke ekungeneni kwakhe kuye, uYehova wamthabatha, wazala unyana."
Ruth4:14 Bathi abafazi kuNahomi, Makabongwe uYehova ongakuyekelanga ukuba uswele umntakwabo namhla, ogama lakhe laduma kwaSirayeli."
Ruth4:15 Yena uya kubuxhasa ubomi bakho, akugcine ebudaleni bakho, kuba ezelwe ngumolokazana wakho okuthandayo, lowo ulunge ngakumbi kuwe kunoonyana abasixhenxe."
Ruth4:16 uNahomi wamthabatha umntwana lowo, wambeka esifubeni sakhe, wamanyisa."
Ruth4:17 Bamthiya igama abafazi ababehlala ngakuye, besithi, uNahomi uzele unyana; Bamthiya igama elinguObhedi. Yena nguyise kaYese, uyise kaDavide;"
Ruth4:18 Yiyo le imizalwane kaPeretse: nguPeretse ozala uHetseron;
Ruth4:19 uHetseron wazala uRam, uRam wazala uAminadabhi;"
Ruth4:20 uAminadabhi wazala uNagshon, uNagshon wazala uSalmon;"
Ruth4:21 uSalmon wazala uBhohazi; uBhohazi wazala uObhedi;
Ruth4:22 uObhedi wazala uYese; uYese wazala uDavide;
1Samuel1:1 Kwakukho indoda yaseRamatayim-Sofim, kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, egama belinguElikana, unyana kaYeroham, unyana kaElihu, unyana kaTohu, unyana kaSufi, umEfrati."
1Samuel1:2 Yayinabafazi ababini; igama lomnye belinguAna, igama lomnye belinguPenina; yaye uPenina wayenabantwana, kodwa uHana wayengenabantwana."
1Samuel1:3 Le ndoda ibiphuma iminyaka ngeminyaka, iye kuthandaza, ibingelele kuYehova wemikhosi eShilo. Babekhona ke oonyana bakaEli bobabini, uHofeni noPinehasi, ababingeleli bakaYehova."
1Samuel1:4 Lafika ixesha likaElikana lokubingelela, wanika umkakhe uPenina, noonyana bakhe bonke, neentombi zakhe, izabelo."
1Samuel1:5 Ke yena uAna wamnika isabelo esaneleyo; ngokuba ebemthanda uAna, ke uYehova ebesivalile isizalo sakhe."
1Samuel1:6 Yaye utshaba lwakhe lwalusenza intlekisa ngaye ukuze amqhathe, ngenxa yokuba uYehova wayesivalile isibeleko sakhe."
1Samuel1:7 Wenza loo nto iminyaka emininzi ekunyukeni kwakhe ukuya endlwini kaYehova, wadlala ngaye; ke ngoko, walila akadla."
1Samuel1:8 Wathi uElikana indoda yakhe kuye, Hana, uyalila na? Kutheni ungatyi nje? Yini na ukuba ibe mbi intliziyo yakho? Andilungile na kuwe ngaphezu koonyana abalishumi?"
1Samuel1:9 Wesuka uAna, emveni kokuba ebedlile eShilo, emveni kokuba besele. uEli umbingeleli wayehleli esitulweni esisecaleni kwentsika yetempile kaYehova."
1Samuel1:10 Waba buhlungu kakhulu umphefumlo wakhe, wathandaza kuYehova, wasitsho isililo."
1Samuel1:11 Wafunga wathi, Yehova wemikhosi, ukuba uthe wazikhumbula iintsizi zam nomkhonzazana wakho, akwamlibala umkhonzazana wakho, wamnika umkhonzazana wakho umntwana oyinkwenkwe: ndomnika uYehova yonke imihla yobomi bam. Hlala endlwini yakho ubomi bakhe, nencakuba ayiyi kufika entlokweni yakhe."
1Samuel1:12 Njengoko wayeqhubeka ethandaza phambi koYehova, uEli wawubona umlomo wakhe."
1Samuel1:13 uAna wathetha entliziyweni yakhe; yayibebezela imilebe yodwa, ilizwi lakhe lingavakali; ke ngoko, uEli wacinga ukuba unxilile."
1Samuel1:14 Wathi uEli kuye, Koda kube nini na unxila? yisuse iwayini yakho kuwe."
1Samuel1:15 Waphendula uAna, wathi, Hayi, nkosi yam, ungumfazi omoya unobunzima; Andiselanga wayini nasiselo sinxilisayo, kodwa ndawuphalaza umphefumlo wam phambi koYehova."
1Samuel1:16 Musa ukuthabatha umkhonzazana wakho njengentombi yetshijolo;
1Samuel1:17 uEli waphendula wathi: “Hamba ngoxolo, yaye uThixo kaSirayeli wokunika imithandazo yakho oyicelileyo kuye."
1Samuel1:18 Wathi, Umkhonzazana wakho makababalwe nguwe. Waya ke umfazi lowo, wadla, ababa saba lusizi ubuso bakhe."
1Samuel1:19 Bavuka ekuseni kakhulu baza baqubuda phambi koYehova baza babuya bafika ekhayeni labo eRama; uElikana wamthiya igama elinguHana umkakhe; uYehova wamkhumbula.
1Samuel1:20 Ngoko lathi lakufika ixesha lokuba uAna akhawule, wazala unyana, waza wamthiya igama elinguSamuweli, esithi: “Kungenxa yokuba ndamcela kuYehova."
1Samuel1:21 Yenyuka indoda leyo inguElikana nendlu yayo yonke, iye kubingelela umbingelelo womnyaka, nesifungo sayo kuYehova."
1Samuel1:22 Ke yena uAna akanyukanga; ngokuba wathi endodeni yakhe, Andiyi kunyuka ndinyuke, ade azale umntwana;"
1Samuel1:23 Wathi uElikana indoda yakhe kuye, Yenza ngokubona kwakho; hlala ude umgxothe; NguYehova yedwa olaziyo ilizwi lakhe. Wahlala ke umfazi lowo, wancancisa unyana wakhe, wada wamlumla;"
1Samuel1:24 Akuba emlumle, wamthabatha wahamba naye, kunye neenkunzi zeenkomo ezintathu ne-efa enye yomgubo nengxowa yewayini, wamzisa endlwini kaYehova eShilo, yaye umntwana usemncinci."
1Samuel1:25 Bayixhela inkunzi entsha, bamsa umntwana kuEli."
1Samuel1:26 Wathi, Camagu, nkosi yam, lo gama usadla ubomi umphefumlo wakho, nkosi yam, ndingulaa mfazi wayemi nawe apha, ethandaza kuYehova."
1Samuel1:27 Bendithandazela lo mntwana; Wandinika ke uYehova umthandazo endawucelayo kuye.
1Samuel1:28 Kungenxa yoko le nto bendiboleka uYehova nam; yonke imihla yobomi bakhe, uya kunikezelwa kuYehova. Yaye wanqula uYehova kanye apho."
1Samuel2:1 Wathandaza uAna, wathi, Intliziyo yam idlamkile ngoYehova, Uphondo lwam luphakanyisiwe nguYehova. Uvulekile umlomo wam ngazo iintshaba zam; ngokuba ndivuyela usindiso lwakho."
1Samuel2:2 Akukho bani unjengoYehova, ngenxa yokuba akukho bani ngaphandle kwakho, yaye akukho liwa linjengoThixo wethu."
1Samuel2:3 Musani ukuthetha ngekratshi; makungaphumi kratshi emlonyeni wenu, ngokuba uYehova nguThixo owazi konke, Yena ngumlinganiso wezenzo zakhe."
1Samuel2:4 Izaphetha zamagorha ziqhawukile, Abakhubekayo baboshwe bugorha."
1Samuel2:5 Abahluthiyo bezithengisa ngesonka; Bathi ke abalambileyo bayeka, bazala abasixhenxe babeludlolo; waza ke yena unabantwana abaninzi waba buthathaka."
1Samuel2:6 NguYehova odlisa ubomi; uyehla aye eHadesi aze anyuke.
1Samuel2:7 uYehova ulihlwempu, usisityebi yena; Uyazithoba kwaye aphakamise."
1Samuel2:8 Uphakamisa ihlwempu eluthulini, aphakamise umngqibi emgqomeni wothuli, ukuze ammise phakathi kweenkosana aze amenze abe yindlalifa yetrone yozuko; kuba iintsika zehlabathi zezikaYehova, yaye umhlaba phezu kwazo."
1Samuel2:9 Iinyawo zabakhe benceba uya kuzigcina, Abangendawo badake ebumnyameni; ngokuba akukho mntu uya kweyisa ngamandla."
1Samuel2:10 Abachasi bakaYehova baya kutyunyuzwa; ududuma phezu kwabo emazulwini: uYehova uya kugweba phakathi kwehlabathi; uya kumnika amandla ukumkani wakhe, aluphakamise uphondo lomthanjiswa wakhe."
1Samuel2:11 Wesuka uElikana, waya endlwini yakhe; Le nkwenkwana yayikhonza uYehova phambi kombingeleli uEli."
1Samuel2:12 Oonyana bakaEli babengamatshijolo; babengamazi uYehova.
1Samuel2:13 Isiko lababingeleli phakathi kwabantu lalisithi, xa umntu ebingelela umbingelelo, size isicaka sombingeleli, xa inyama iyaphekwa, ephethe incam yenyama ngesandla sakhe;"
1Samuel2:14 Makaqhotswe ngepani, nokuba kusembizeni, nokuba kusembizeni, nokuba kusembizeni; yonke into esenyameni, umbingeleli wazithabathela yona. Benjenjalo eShilo noonyana bonke bakaSirayeli ababefike khona."
1Samuel2:15 Yaye, ngaphambi kokuba kuqhunyiswe amanqatha, wayesiza umlungiseleli wombingeleli aze athi kwindoda ebingelelayo: “Yinike umbingeleli inyama, yosiwe; kuba akayi kusela kudla kuwe, kodwa ekrwada."
1Samuel2:16 Ukuba uthe umntu kuye, Mayingabi namanqatha ngoku, wandule ke uzithabathele, njengoko unqwenela ngako umphefumlo wakho; wathi kuye, Hayi; ke wena undinike ngoku; ukuba akunjalo, ndoyithabatha ngamandla."
1Samuel2:17 Ngenxa yoko isono saba bafana saba sikhulu kunene phambi koYehova; ngokuba abantu bawuthiyile umnikelo kaYehova;
1Samuel2:18 Ke yena uSamuweli wayesengumntwana phambi koYehova, enxibe isambatho esisemagxeni selinen."
1Samuel2:19 Ngaphezu koko, amadoda ayemenzela isambatho sendoda, awayesizisa kuye minyaka le xa wenyuka nomyeni wakhe ukuya kubingelela umnyaka."
1Samuel2:20 uEli wamsikelela uElikana nomkakhe, wathi, uYehova makakuphe imbewu ngalo mfazi, ngenxa yalowo wabalelwa kuYehova. Bahamba ke baya endlini yabo."
1Samuel2:21 uYehova wamvelela uAna, wamitha, wazala oonyana abathathu, neentombi ezimbini. Ke inkwenkwe uSamuweli yakhula phambi koYehova."
1Samuel2:22 uEli ubeseleyindoda enkulu, eyiva yonke into ababeyenza oonyana bakhe kumaSirayeli onke; nendlela ababelala ngayo nabafazi ababehlanganisene emnyango wentente yokuhlangana."
1Samuel2:23 Wathi kubo, Yini na ukuba nenze izinto ezinjengezi? Ngokuba ndivile ububi bakho kubo bonke aba bantu."
1Samuel2:24 Hayi, nyana bam; kuba asinto ilungileyo endiyivayo: nibangela ukuba abantu bakaYehova baphule umthetho."
1Samuel2:25 Ukuba ubani uthe wona umntu, umgwebi uya kumgweba; kodwa ukuba umntu wona kuYehova, ngubani na oya kumkhusela? Kodwa abazange baliphulaphule ilizwi lesikhohlakali kuba uYehova wayefuna ukubabulala."
1Samuel2:26 Ngoko umntwana uSamuweli waqhubeka ekhula yaye ekholekile kuYehova nakubantu.
1Samuel2:27 Wandula ke weza umfo wakwaThixo kuEli waza wathi kuye: “Utsho uYehova ukuthi, ‘Andizange na ndibonise ukuba ndiyindlu kayihlo ngoxa babeseYiputa endlwini kaFaro?"
1Samuel2:28 Ndimnyule na phakathi kwezizwe zonke zakwaSirayeli ukuba abe ngumbingeleli kum, ukuze enze umbingelelo phezu kwam, anyuse isiqhumiso, anxibe irhonya phambi kobuso bam? Ndiwanikele na onke amadini anyukayo oonyana bakaSirayeli endlwini kayihlo?"
1Samuel2:29 Kungenxa yoko le nto ulinyathelayo idini lam, nombingelelo wam endinawo endaweni yam yokuhlala; Uzukise oonyana bakho ngaphezu kwam na, ngokuba ubatyebisa ngemibingelelo yabantu bam amaSirayeli?"
1Samuel2:30 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ndathi, Indlu yakho nendlu kayihlo yohlala ihamba ecaleni kwam; kodwa Yehova, mntundini, makube lee kum. Kuba ondihlonelayo ndiya kumhlonela, ondidelayo udelekile."
1Samuel2:31 Uyabona, iyeza imihla, endiya kusinqumla isandla sakho nesandla sendlu kayihlo, kungabikho ngwevu endlwini kayihlo;"
1Samuel2:32 ndibone ndisekhaya kubo bonke ubutyebi aya kubunika uSirayeli uThixo; kungabikho ngwevu endlwini yakho ngonaphakade.
1Samuel2:33 Indoda yakho, endingayi kucilela kumama, iya kuwadla amehlo akho, ibe buhlungu intliziyo yakho;"
1Samuel2:34 Nguwo lo umqondiso kuwe, oya kubafikela oonyana bakho bobabini, uHofeni noPinehasi; ngenye imini baya kufa bobabini."
1Samuel2:35 Ndiya kuzinyulela umbingeleli othembekileyo, oya kwenza njengoko kusentliziyweni yam, nasemphefumlweni wam; ndimakhele indlu eyomeleleyo; yaye uya kusoloko uhamba ecaleni komthanjiswa wam."
1Samuel2:36 Kothi, lowo useleyo endlwini yakho, eze azigobe kuye ngenxa yeqhosha lesilivere nesuntswana lesonka, athi, Khawundifake komnye umsebenzi wobubingeleli, ukuze ndidle iqhekeza lesonka."
1Samuel3:1 Unyana kaSamuweli wayekhonza uYehova phambi koEli. Laye lilungile ilizwi likaYehova ngaloo mihla; kwakungekho mbono uvulekileyo.
1Samuel3:2 Ngelo xesha uEli wayelele endaweni yakhe; amehlo akhe ayeqale ukuba mnyama, engasaboni;"
1Samuel3:3 Isibane sikaTHIXO oyinyaniso besingekacimi etempileni kaYehova, apho yayikhona ityeya yoTHIXO oyinyaniso, uSamuweli wayelele;"
1Samuel3:4 uYehova wambiza uSamuweli, wathi, Ndikho."
1Samuel3:5 Wabalekela kuEli, wathi, Ndikho; ngokuba endibizile. Waphendula ke yena wathi, Andikubizanga; lala kwakhona. Wahamba wayolala."
1Samuel3:6 uYehova waphinda wambiza uSamuweli. Wesuka ke uSamuweli, waya kuEli, wathi, Ndim lo! ngokuba endibizile. Waphendula wathi, Andikubizanga, nyana wam; lala kwakhona."
1Samuel3:7 uSamuweli wayengekamazi uYehova, nelizwi likaYehova lalingekatyhilwa kuye."
1Samuel3:8 uYehova wambiza uSamuweli okwesithathu. Waphakama waya kuEli, wathi: “Ndim lo! ngokuba endibizile. Wabona uEli ukuba uYehova umbizile umntwana."
1Samuel3:9 Wathi uEli kuSamuweli, Lala, uthi, wakubiza, uthi, Thetha, Yehova; ngokuba uyeva umkhonzi wakho. uSamuweli waya kulala endaweni yakhe."
1Samuel3:10 Weza uYehova, wema, wabiza njengangaphambili, wathi, Samuweli, Samuweli! Waphendula uSamuweli, wathi, Thetha; ngokuba uyeva umkhonzi wakho."
1Samuel3:11 Wathi uYehova kuSamuweli, Uyabona, ndiya kwenza into kwaSirayeli, eya kuviwa ngabo bonke abayivayo."
1Samuel3:12 Ngaloo mini ndiya kuyenza kuEli yonke into endayithethayo ngendlu yakhe; xa ndiqala, ndiya kugqiba kwakhona."
1Samuel3:13 Ndathi kuye, Ndiya kuyigweba indlu yakhe kude kuse ephakadeni, ngenxa yobubi ababaziyo; ngokuba babedlala oonyana bakhe, akabanqanda."
1Samuel3:14 Ngoko ndabafungela abantu bendlu kaEli, ndathi, Abuyi kuhlanjululwa ububi bendlu kaEli, ngamadini, nangedini elinyukayo, kuphele."
1Samuel3:15 Walala uSamuweli kwada kwasa, wazivula ke iingcango zendlu kaYehova. uSamuweli woyika ukubonisa ubuso bakhe kuEli."
1Samuel3:16 uEli wambiza uSamuweli, wathi, Samuweli, nyana wam! Waphendula ke yena wathi, Ndilapha."
1Samuel3:17 Wathi, Utheni na kuwe uYehova? Ndiyakubongoza, sukundifihlela; uThixo uya kwenza oku kuwe, aqokele ukwenjenje, ukuba uthe wandifihlela nto kuyo yonke into ondixelele yona."
1Samuel3:18 uSamuweli wamxelela yonke into, akamfihlela nto. Wathi yena, NguYehova; Makenze into ayibona ifanelekile."
1Samuel3:19 Wakhula uSamuweli, uYehova waba naye, akwawa phantsi nalinye ilizwi emazwini akhe emhlabeni."
1Samuel3:20 Yaye onke amaSirayeli ukususela kwaDan kuse eBher-shebha azi ukuba uSamuweli umiselwe ukuba abe ngumprofeti kaYehova.
1Samuel3:21 Waphinda uYehova wabonakala eShilo, ngenxa yokuba uYehova wazityhila kuSamuweli eShilo ngelizwi likaYehova."
1Samuel4:1 Ilizwi likaSamuweli lafika kumaSirayeli onke. Aphuma amaSirayeli, aya kulwa namaFilisti, amisa iintente e-Ebhenezere yaye amaFilisti ayingqinga iAfeki."
1Samuel4:2 AmaFilisti aqalisa ukuba buthathaka nxamnye namaSirayeli, yaye xa ayehlangene edabini, amaSirayeli oyiswa phambi kwamaFilisti; yaye babulala elizweni malunga namawaka amane amagorha."
1Samuel4:3 Afika amadoda eminqubeni, athi amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, Yini na ukuba uYehova esoyise namhlanje phambi kwamaFilisti? Masihambe siye kuthabatha ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova eShilo, ukuze isihlangule esandleni seentshaba zethu, ukuba ithe yangena phakathi kwethu."
1Samuel4:4 Bathumela abantu eShilo, ukuba kuyithabathe ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova wemikhosi ohleli phakathi kweekerubhi; Oonyana ababini bakaEli, uHofeni noFinehasi, babelapho netyeya yomnqophiso kaThixo."
1Samuel4:5 Yathi yakufika ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova enkampini, akhwaza kakhulu onke amaSirayeli, kangangokuba umhlaba waphinda wanyikima."
1Samuel4:6 Akusiva amaFilisti eso sandi sokukhwaza, athi: “Siyintoni na esi sandi sokukhwaza kwiinkampu zamaHebhere? Beva ke ukuba ityeya kaYehova ifikile enkampini."
1Samuel4:7 Oyika amaFilisti, athi, uThixo ungenile emkhosini. Bathi ke bona: Yeha ke thina! ngokuba ibingekho ngaphambili into enje."
1Samuel4:8 Yeha ke thina! Ngubani na oya kusihlangula esandleni saba thixo banamandla? ikwangoothixo ababetha amaYiputa ngezigwebo zonke entlango.
1Samuel4:9 Zinikeni amandla nize nime njengamadoda, nina maFilisti, ukuze ningawakhonzi amaHebhere njengoko ayekhonza kuni;"
1Samuel4:10 Alwa ke amaFilisti, oyiswa amaSirayeli, abalekela elowo ententeni yakhe; kwabakho ukubulala kakhulu; ngokuba amashumi amathathu amawaka amaSirayeli abulawa ngeenyawo."
1Samuel4:11 Kwathinjwa ke ityeya kaThixo; babulawa oonyana ababini bakaEli, uHofeni noPinehasi."
1Samuel4:12 Kwabaleka indoda yakwaBhenjamin, ivela emkhosini, yeza eShilo kwangaloo mini, iingubo zayo zikrazukile, inomhlaba entloko."
1Samuel4:13 Ekufikeni kwakhe, wabona uEli ehleli esitulweni ecaleni kwendlela waza wakhangela, kuba intliziyo yakhe yayigubha ngenxa yetyeya yoTHIXO oyinyaniso. Ukufika kwale ndoda kuloo dolophana, yashumayela, yaye yonke loo dolophana yalila."
1Samuel4:14 Waliva uEli izwi lokuduma, wathi, Liyintoni na elo lizwi lesiphithiphithi? Yakhawuleza yangena indoda leyo, yamxelela uEli."
1Samuel4:15 uEli ebeminyaka imashumi asibhozo anamnye ekhona; amehlo akhe ayemnyama kangangokuba wayengaboni.
1Samuel4:16 Yathi indoda leyo kuEli, Ndingulo uvela emkhosini mna, ndibaleke ke mna namhla. Anathi: Kwenzeke ntoni apho nyana wam?"
1Samuel4:17 Waphendula umthunywa lowo, wathi, Asaba oonyana bakaSirayeli kumaFilisti, kwabakho uxabelo olukhulu ebantwini, bafa oonyana bakho bobabini, uHofeni noPinehasi, yathinjwa ke ityeya kaThixo."
1Samuel4:18 Wathi akuthetha ngetyeya yoThixo oyinyaniso, waziphosa esihlalweni esisecaleni kwesango, waza wayaphula intamo, wafa, ngenxa yokuba wayeyindoda endala nenzima. Wawakhokela amaSirayeli iminyaka emashumi mane."
1Samuel4:19 Ke kaloku umolokazana wakhe, umkaPinehasi, wayemithi, seleza kuzala; Wathi akuva ukuba ityeya kaThixo ithinjiwe, nokuba uninazala nomyeni wakhe bafile, waguqa, wazala ngokuba intlungu yakhe yamongamela."
1Samuel4:20 Ekufeni kwakhe, abafazi ababemi ngakuye bathi kuye, Musa ukoyika; ngokuba uzele unyana. Kodwa akazange aphendule, yaye akazange ayicinge loo nto."
1Samuel4:21 Wandula ke wabiza inkwenkwe enguIkabhodi, wathi: “Uzuko lumkile kwaSirayeli, ngenxa yokuba ityeya yoTHIXO oyinyaniso ithinjiwe ngenxa kayisezala nomyeni wakhe."
1Samuel4:22 Waza wathi: “Uzuko lumkile kwaSirayeli, ngenxa yokuba ityeya yoTHIXO oyinyaniso ithinjiwe.”"
1Samuel5:1 AmaFilisti ayithabatha ityeya kaThixo, ayithabatha e-Ebhenezere, ayisa eAshdode."
1Samuel5:2 Xa amaFilisti ayithabatha ityeya yoThixo oyinyaniso, ayizisa endlwini kaDagon, ayibeka phambi kukaDagon."
1Samuel5:3 Banduluka kusasa eAshdode, babona uDagon ewile ngobuso phambi kwetyeya kaYehova. Bamthabatha uDagon, bambuyisela endaweni yakhe."
1Samuel5:4 Bavuka kusasa, nanko uDagon ewile ngobuso phambi kwetyeya kaYehova; uDagon wayenqunyulwe intloko nezandla zakhe zozibini ngasemnyango; yasala isiphunzi sikaDagon yedwa."
1Samuel5:5 Kungenxa yoko le nto ababingeleli bakaDagon, nabo bonke abangena endlwini kaDagon, benganyatheli emnyango kaDagon Ashdode, unanamhla."
1Samuel5:6 Saba nzima isandla sikaYehova eAshdode, wabatshabalalisa, wababulala ngekrele, eyiAshdode ke leyo, nelizwe lakhona."
1Samuel5:7 Akubona amadoda aseAshdode ukuba kunjalo, athi, Ayiyi kuhlala kuthi ityeya yoThixo kaSirayeli, ngokuba isandla sakhe sinzima phezu kwethu, nakuDagon uthixo wethu."
1Samuel5:8 Bathumela ukuba babize zonke iinkosana zamaFilisti, bathi, Siyithini na ityeya yoThixo kaSirayeli? Bathi, Ityeya yoThixo kaSirayeli mayisiwe eGati. Bayingenisa khona ityeya yoThixo kaSirayeli."
1Samuel5:9 Yaye kwathi, bakuba siwungqingile, isandla sikaYehova saba nxamnye neso sixeko ngentshabalalo enkulu kakhulu; amacandelo."
1Samuel5:10 Kungenxa yoko le nto bayithumela ityeya yoTHIXO oyinyaniso e-Ekron. Ithe yakufika ityeya kaThixo e-Ekron, baduma abemi base-Ekron, bathi, Bazizisile kuthi ityeya yoThixo kaSirayeli, ukuze isibulale thina nabantu bethu."
1Samuel5:11 Bandula ke bathumela ukuba bahlanganise zonke iinkosana zamaFilisti baza bathi: “Ityeya yoTHIXO kaSirayeli mayibuyele endaweni yayo, ukuze ingasibulali thina nabantu bakowethu; kuba umzi uphela wawubhuqa; Saye sinzima kunene isandla sikaThixo apho."
1Samuel5:12 Abethwa amadoda angafanga, kwenyuka kwaya ezulwini ukukhala komzi."
1Samuel6:1 Yahlala ke ityeya kaYehova ezweni lamaFilisti iinyanga zasixhenxe.
1Samuel6:2 AmaFilisti ababiza ababingeleli nezazi, athi, Siyithini na ityeya kaYehova? Sixelele ngayo, siyise endaweni yayo."
1Samuel6:3 Bathi, Ekuyibuyiseni kwenu ityeya yoThixo kaSirayeli, musani ukuyigodusa iyodwa; kodwa mbuyiseni idini letyala; uya kwandula ke uphiliswe, wazi ukuba kutheni singasuswanga isandla sakhe kuwe."
1Samuel6:4 Athi, Liyintoni na idini letyala, silibuyisele kuye? Aphendula athi, Zintlanu iinyosi zegolide, neempuku zantlanu zegolide, ngokwenani lezikhulu zamaFilisti;"
1Samuel6:5 Ize nenze imifanekiso yamatye okusila, nemifanekiso yeempuku zenu ezilonakalisayo ihlabathi; Mzukiseni uThixo kaSirayeli; mhlawumbi wosenza lula isandla sakhe phezu kwenu, naphezu koothixo benu, naphezu kwelizwe lenu."
1Samuel6:6 Kutheni na ke nizenza lukhuni iintliziyo zenu njengoko azenza lukhuni iintliziyo zawo amaYiputa noFaro? Xa wayesebenza ngokungummangaliso phakathi kwabo, ngaba abazange bavumele abantu ukuba bafuduke baze bafuduke?"
1Samuel6:7 Yenzani inqwelo entsha ngoko, nithabathe iimazi ezimbini ezintsha ezanyisayo, ezingekabotshwa, nizibophe enqwelweni, niwabuyisele ekhaya amathole azo."
1Samuel6:8 Yithabatheni ityeya kaYehova, niyibeke enqwelweni; neempahla zegolide enizibuyisela kuye, zibe lidini letyala, ebhokisini elisecaleni kwayo; Yekela ihambe."
1Samuel6:9 Yabonani, ukuba ithe yenyuka ngendlela yomda wakhe, yaya eBhete-shemeshe, kulapho asenzele khona obu bubi bukhulu; ukuba akunjalo, sazi ukuba ibingesiso isandla sakhe esibethileyo; yayilithuba esenzeka kuthi."
1Samuel6:10 Enjenjalo amadoda; wathabatha iinkomo ezimbini ezanyisayo, wazibopha enqwelweni, wawavalela endlwini amathole azo."
1Samuel6:11 Bayingenisa ityeya kaYehova enqwelweni, netyeya ineempuku zegolide, nemifanekiso yeempondo zazo ezibukhali."
1Samuel6:12 Iinkomo zahamba ngokuthe ngqo ngendlela yaseBhete-shemeshe, zahamba ngendlela, zisidla, aziphambukanga ukuya ekunene nasekhohlo; zawasukela abathetheli bamaFilisti, besa emdeni waseBhete-shemeshe."
1Samuel6:13 Abantu baseBhete-shemeshe babevuna ingqolowa yabo entlanjeni, yaye baphakamisa amehlo abo, bayibona ityeya, bakuvuyela ukuyibona."
1Samuel6:14 Inqwelo yafika entsimini kaYoshuwa, eMobhete-shemeta, yema apho kwakukho ilitye elikhulu; Bayicanda iinkuni inqwelo, iinkomo zenza idini elinyukayo kuYehova."
1Samuel6:15 Bayithabatha abaLevi ityeya kaYehova, netyeya ebinayo izihombo zegolide, bayibeka emthini omkhulu; abantu baseBhete-shemeshe banyusa amadini anyukayo nemibingelelo kuYehova ngaloo mini."
1Samuel6:16 Zakubona oko iinkosana ezihlanu zamaFilisti, zabuyela e-Ekron kwangaloo mini."
1Samuel6:17 Ngawo la amarhengqa egolide, awawabuyiselayo amaFilisti kuYehova njengedini letyala; elinye libe leleAshdode, elinye libe lelikaGaza, libe lelaseAshkelon elinye, libe lelaseGati, elinye le-Ekron;"
1Samuel6:18 neempuku zegolide ngokwenani lemizi yonke yamaFilisti, yezikhulu ezihlanu, ezithabathela emizini enqatyisiweyo, nasemizaneni esemaphandleni, zesa etyeni elikhulu lika-Abheli, apho bayibeka khona ityeya kaYehova kuyo. NKOSI elo litye liseleyo unanamhla entsimini kaYoshuwa waseBhete-shemeshe."
1Samuel6:19 Wababulala abantu baseBhete-shemeshe, ngenxa yokuba babesiya engxoweni kaYehova, ewe, wabulala amadoda angamashumi amathandathu anesihlanu; ukubulala."
1Samuel6:20 Athi amadoda aseBhete-shemeshe, Ngubani na onokuma phambi koYehova uThixo oyiNgcwele? Wonyuka aye kubani na, emke kuthi?"
1Samuel6:21 Bandula ke bathumela abathunywa kubemi baseKiriyati-yarim ukuya kuthi: “AmaFilisti ayibuyisile ityeya kaYehova; yihla, uzithabathele kuwe."
1Samuel7:1 Eza amadoda aseKiriyati-yeharim, ayithabatha ityeya kaYehova, ayisa endlwini ka-Abhinadabhi endulini, anyula uElazare, unyana wakhe, ukuba ayigcine ityeya kaYehova."
1Samuel7:2 Ithe iseKiriyati-yeharim ityeya, zanda iintsuku; kuba yaba yiminyaka engamashumi amabini, yaye yonke indlu kaSirayeli yamzilela uYehova."
1Samuel7:3 Wathetha uSamuweli kwindlu yonke kaSirayeli, wathi, Xa nithe nabuyela kuYehova ngeentliziyo zenu zonke, basuseni phakathi kwenu oothixo bolunye uhlanga, noAshtaroti, nizimise iintliziyo zenu kuYehova, nikhonze yena yedwa uya kunihlangula esandleni samaFilisti."
1Samuel7:4 Bamlahla ke oonyana bakaSirayeli ooBhahali noAshtaroti, bakhonza uYehova yedwa."
1Samuel7:5 Wathi uSamuweli, Bahlanganiseleni eMizpa bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli, ndinithandazele kuYehova."
1Samuel7:6 Bahlanganisana eMitspe, bakha amanzi, bawagalela phambi koYehova, bazila ukudla ngaloo mini, bathi, Sonile kuYehova. uSamuweli wabawisela umthetho oonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuba beze eMitiva."
1Samuel7:7 Xa amaFilisti evayo ukuba oonyana bakaSirayeli baqokelelene ndawonye eMizpa, iinkosana zamaFilisti zamhlasela uSirayeli. Beva oonyana bakaSirayeli, boyika amaFilisti."
1Samuel7:8 Bathi oonyana bakaSirayeli kuSamuweli, Musa ukuyeka ukunqula uYehova uThixo wethu, ukuba asigcine, asihlangule esandleni samaFilisti."
1Samuel7:9 uSamuweli wathabatha itakane elanyayo, wenza ngalo umbingelelo otshiswayo ngokupheleleyo kuYehova, waza uSamuweli wabiza kuYehova ngenxa yoSirayeli; wamva uYehova."
1Samuel7:10 Kwathi, xa uSamuweli wayezisa idini elinyukayo, amaFilisti asondela ukuba alwe noonyana bakaSirayeli; boyiswa ngamaSirayeli."
1Samuel7:11 Amadoda akwaSirayeli aphuma eMizpa, awasukela amaFilisti, awabulala, ada aya kufika eBhete-kare."
1Samuel7:12 uSamuweli wathabatha ilitye, walibeka phakathi kweMitspe neSene, wathi igama layo yiEbhenezere, wathi, uYehova usincedile unangoku."
1Samuel7:13 Oyiswa ke amaFilisti, akaba saphinda eze ezweni lakwaSirayeli; yaye isandla sikaYehova saba nxamnye namaFilisti yonke imihla kaSamuweli."
1Samuel7:14 Imizi abeyithimbile amaFilisti kumaSirayeli yabuyela kwaSirayeli, ithabathela e-Ekron yesa eGati; yaye ilizwe lakhe lamkhulula uSirayeli esandleni samaFilisti. Kwabakho uxolo phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli nama-Amori."
1Samuel7:15 uSamuweli waqhubeka ekhokela amaSirayeli yonke imihla yobomi bakhe.
1Samuel7:16 Minyaka le wayesiya eBheteli naseGiligali naseMizpa ukuze ayalele amaSirayeli kuzo zonke ezo ndawo.
1Samuel7:17 Waye ebuyela eRama; ngokuba indlu yakhe ibikhona; wabawisela umthetho oonyana bakaSirayeli khona; wamakhela khona isibingelelo uYehova.
1Samuel8:1 Akuba mdala uSamuweli wabamisa oonyana bakhe baba ngabagwebi kwaSirayeli.
1Samuel8:2 Igama lonyana wakhe wamazibulo lalinguYoweli; igama lowesibini belinguAbhiya; bengabagwebi eBher-shebha.
1Samuel8:3 Oonyana bakhe abahambanga ngeendlela zakhe, kodwa baphambuka emva kwengeniso baza bamkela izinyobo yaye basigqwetha isigwebo."
1Samuel8:4 Ahlanganisana ke onke amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, eza kuSamuweli eRama."
1Samuel8:5 Wathi kuye, Yabona, wena waluphele, oonyana bakho abahambi ngeendlela zakho; simisele ngoko ukumkani wokusilawula, njengeentlanga zonke."
1Samuel8:6 Kodwa loo nto yaba imbi emehlweni kaSamuweli, xa bathi, Sinike ukumkani ukuba asilawule. uSamuweli wathandaza kuYehova."
1Samuel8:7 Wathi uYehova kuSamuweli, Liphulaphule izwi labantu entweni yonke abaya kuyithetha kuwe; ngokuba ingenguwe lo ubagatyileyo;"
1Samuel8:8 Ngokwemisebenzi yonke abayenzayo ukususela kwimini endabakhupha ngayo eYiputa de kube yile mini yokundishiya kwabo baza bakhonza abanye oothixo, benza okufanayo nakuwe."
1Samuel8:9 Liphulaphule ke ngoko izwi labo; bakhalimele, balazi igunya lokumkani oya kubalawula."
1Samuel8:10 uSamuweli wabaxelela abantu ababecela ukumkani kuye onke amazwi kaYehova.
1Samuel8:11 Wahlabela mgama wathi: “Nantsi indlela yokumkani oya kunilawula: Wobathabatha oonyana benu, abanikele kuye iinqwelo zakhe zokulwa, nabamahashe bakhe; yaye abanye baya kusaba phambi kweenqwelo zakhe."
1Samuel8:12 Wommisa abe yingqwayi-ngqwayi yewaka, abe ngumthetheli wamashumi amahlanu; yaye uya kubamisela ukuba bamenzakalisa, baqhekeze isikrweqe sakhe baze benze izixhobo zakhe zemfazwe neenqwelo zakhe zokulwa."
1Samuel8:13 Iintombi zenu wozithabatha zibe ngabapheki, nabapheki, nabapheki;"
1Samuel8:14 Amasimi enu wowathabatha, nezidiliya zenu, neminquma yenu emihle, azinike abakhonzi bakhe;"
1Samuel8:15 Wothabatha isishumi sembewu yenu, nesezidiliya zenu, azinike abakhonzi bakhe nabakhonzi bakhe;"
1Samuel8:16 Izicaka zenu nezicakakazi zenu uya kubathabatha, amadodana enu amahle, namaesile enu, enze umsebenzi wakhe ngawo."
1Samuel8:17 Uya kuthabatha isishumi sempahla yenu emfutshane, nibe ngabakhonzi bakhe;"
1Samuel8:18 Niya kukhala ngaloo mini ngenxa yokumkani wenu enizinyuleleyo; yaye uYehova akayi kuniphulaphula ngaloo mini.
1Samuel8:19 Abavuma abantu ukuliphulaphula ilizwi likaSamuweli; baphendula bathi, Hayi! ke siya kuba nokumkani osilawulayo;"
1Samuel8:20 ukuze sibe njengeentlanga zonke; nokuba ukumkani wethu asigwebe, asikhokele, kwaye alwe amadabi ethu."
1Samuel8:21 Waweva uSamuweli onke amazwi abantu, waweva ezindlebeni zikaYehova."
1Samuel8:22 Wathi uYehova kuSamuweli, Liphulaphule izwi labo, ubenze babe ngukumkani. Wathi uSamuweli kumadoda akwaSirayeli, Maye elowo emzini wakowabo."
1Samuel9:1 Kwakukho ndoda yakwaBhenjamin, igama layo belinguKishe, unyana ka-Abhiyeli, unyana kaSerore, unyana kaBhekorati, unyana ka-Afiya, umBhenjamin, igorha."
1Samuel9:2 Yayinonyana ogama linguSawule, umfo omtsha, omhle, omhle; bekungekho ndoda ilungileyo phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli kunaye; ethabathele emagxeni enyusa, wayemde kunabo bonke abantu."
1Samuel9:3 Zafa iiesile zikaKishe uyise kaSawule. Wathi uKishe kuSawule unyana wakhe, Thabatha omnye wakubakhonzi, uye kuzifuna iimazi zamaesile."
1Samuel9:4 Wahamba waya kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, wacanda ilizwe laseSalisa, abawabona; balityhutyha ilizwe laseSalem, nalapho zazingekho; yaye walityhutyha ilizwe loonyana bakaBhenjamin, kodwa abazange bababone."
1Samuel9:5 Bakufika ezweni laseSufi, uSawule wathi kumfana obenaye, Hamba sibuye; latata akayeki ukuhoya iidonki usicingele."
1Samuel9:6 Wathi ke yena kuye, Uyabona, kulo mzi kukho umntu kaThixo; yonke into ayithethayo iyenzeka; masiye khona ngoku; mhlawumbi angasibonisa indlela emasihambe ngayo."
1Samuel9:7 Wathi uSawule kumfana lowo, Yabona, sihamba nje, siya kumphathela ntoni na? ngokuba isonka esisezimbizeni zethu siphelile; akukho sathabatha singasisela umfo wakwaThixo into esinayo."
1Samuel9:8 Waphinda umfana wamphendula uSawule, wathi, Uyabona, ndinesahlulo sesine seshekele yesilivere; Le nto ndiza kuyinika umfo wakwaThixo, asixelele indlela yethu."
1Samuel9:9 Ngemihla yamandulo kwaSirayeli, xa umntu esiya kubuza kuThixo, ubesithi, Yiza siye kumatola; ngokuba lowo kuthiwa ungumprofeti namhla, ubethiwa yimboni ngenxa engaphambili."
1Samuel9:10 Wathi uSawule kumfana lowo, Ulungisile ukuthetha; Yiza sihambe, baya kuloo mzi abekhona umfo wakwaThixo."
1Samuel9:11 Enyuka esiya emzini, enyuka esiya entabeni, afumana iintombi zisiya kukha amanzi, athi kuwo, Ikho na imboni leyo?"
1Samuel9:12 Baphendula bathi kubo, Ukhona; niyabona, uphambi kwenu; khawulezani, ngokuba ifikile namhlanje kulo mzi; kuba namhlanje kukho umbingelelo wasesidlangalaleni endaweni ephakamileyo;"
1Samuel9:13 ekungeneni kwenu esixekweni, noyifumana kwaoko ingekanyuki iye kudla endaweni ephakamileyo; ngokuba abayi kudla abantu, ingekafiki, wawusikelela umbingelelo; baza emva koko badla abo babemenyiwe. Ngoko sukuma ngoku; ngokuba niya kumfumana ngeli xesha."
1Samuel9:14 Benyuka baya kuwo umzi, bakungena kuwo umzi, waphuma uSamuweli wabakhawulela, enyuka aye esigangeni."
1Samuel9:15 Wathetha uYehova kuSamuweli endlebeni yakhe, kwangemini yangaphambi kokuza kukaSawule, esithi,"
1Samuel9:16 Ngeli xesha ngomso, ndiya kuthumela kuwe indoda yasezweni lakwaBhenjamin, iyithambise, ibe yinganga yabantu bam amaSirayeli, ibasindise abantu bam esandleni samaFilisti; kuba ndiyibonile."
1Samuel9:17 uSamuweli wambona uSawule, wathi uYehova kuye, Nantsi le ndoda bendithethe ngayo kuwe; Uya kubalawula abantu bam."
1Samuel9:18 Waya uSawule kuSamuweli esangweni, wathi, Ndixelele, iphi na indlu yemilingo?"
1Samuel9:19 uSamuweli wamphendula uSawule, wathi, Ndiyimboni; Mtsalele phambi kwam enyangweni; ngokuba namhlanje uya kudla nam, ndikukhulule ngomso, ndikuxelele konke okusentliziyweni yakho."
1Samuel9:20 Ke iimazi zamaesile esekuntsuku ntathu namhla zikulahlekile, uze ungakhathali kuzo; ngokuba bafunyenwe. Ziphezu kabani na zonke izinto ezinqwenelekayo zakwaSirayeli? Ayikho kuwe nakuyo yonke indawo endlwini yakho?"
1Samuel9:21 Waphendula uSawule, wathi, AndingumBhenjamin yini na, oyena mncinane kwizizwe zakwaSirayeli? nesizukulwana sam esincinane kwizizukulwana zonke zesizwe sakwaBhenjamin? Khona kutheni uthetha nam ngolohlobo?"
1Samuel9:22 uSamuweli wamthabatha uSawule nomfana lowo, wabangenisa egumbini lokuhlala, wababeka kweyona ndawo iphakamileyo phakathi kwabamenyiweyo, bekumashumi amathathu abantu."
1Samuel9:23 Wathi uSamuweli kumpheki, Zisa isabelo endakunikayo, endisithethileyo kuwe, ndathi, Sibeke."
1Samuel9:24 Umoji-zonka wathabatha igxalaba eliphezu kwayo, wawubeka phambi koSawule. Wathi uSamuweli, Yabona, into eseleyo; Yibeke phambi kwakho udle, ngokuba ibibekelwe nina, kususela koko ndathi, Ndimemile abantu. Wadla ke uSawule noSamuweli ngaloo mini."
1Samuel9:25 Behla esigangeni, bangena esixekweni, wathetha uSamuweli kuSawule phezu kwendlu."
1Samuel9:26 Bavuka kusasa, uSamuweli wabiza uSawule phezu kwendlu, wathi, Vuka, ndikushiye. Wagqitywa ke uSawule, baphuma bobabini, yena noSamuweli."
1Samuel9:27 Kwathi, behla baya ekupheleni komzi, wathi uSamuweli kuSawule, Yitsho kumfana lowo, ukuba ahambe phambi kwethu (wasa ke yena), khawume ithutyana, ndithethe kuwe ilizwi likaYehova uThixo."
1Samuel10:1 uSamuweli wathabatha isigodlo seoli, wamgalela entloko, wamanga, wathi, Ndithe mna, uYehova ukuthambisile, ukuba ube yinganga yelifa lakhe?"
1Samuel10:2 Ekumkeni kwenu namhla kum, niya kufumana amadoda amabini engcwabeni likaRakeli, emdeni wakwaBhenjamin, iSelsa; aya kuthi kuwe, Zifunyenwe iimazi zamaesile obuzifuna; nanko uyihlo eseleyishiyile idizili, ebuhlungu, esithi, Ndiya kuthini na ngonyana wam?"
1Samuel10:3 Ukuphuma kwakho apho, hamba, ufika entlango yeTabhore, uqubisane namadoda amathathu enyuka esiya kuThixo eBheteli, enye ithwele iibhokhwe ezintathu, enye ithwele izonka ezithathu, enye ithwele igwegwe lehagwe yewayini."
1Samuel10:4 Baya kukubulisa bakunike izonka ezibini; oya kukwamkela ezandleni zabo.
1Samuel10:5 Emva koko uya kufika endulini kaThixo, apho akhona amajoni amaFilistiya; wothi wakufika esixekweni, uquqele inkitha yabaprofeti, besihla ivela phezulu, iphethe uhadi, nengqongqo, nempempe, nohadi; kwaye baya kuprofeta;"
1Samuel10:6 uMoya kaYehova uya kuhlela phezu kwakho, uprofete kunye nabo, ube mntu wumbi."
1Samuel10:7 Ke, xa ithe yabonakala kuwe le miqondiso, zenzele indawo efanelekileyo; ngokuba uThixo unawe;"
1Samuel10:8 uhle phambi kwam uye eGiligali; uyabona, ndiyeza kuwe, ukuze ndinyuse amadini anyukayo nemibingelelo yombulelo; hlalani iintsuku zibe sixhenxe, ndide ndize kuni, ndinixelele into eniya kuyenza."
1Samuel10:9 Wathi akuthi gu bucala ukuba emke kuSamuweli, uThixo wamguqula, wanantliziyo yimbi; yafika yonke loo miqondiso kwangayo loo mini."
1Samuel10:10 Bakufika endulini, wahlangatyezwa yindimbane yabaprofeti; wafikelwa nguMoya kaThixo phezu kwakhe, waprofeta phakathi kwabo."
1Samuel10:11 Babona bonke ababemazi ngaphambili, ukuba uprofete phakathi kwabaprofeti, bathi abantu omnye komnye, Uhliwe yintoni na unyana kaKishe? Ngaba naye uSawule ungomnye wabaprofeti?"
1Samuel10:12 Waphendula umntu wathi, Ngubani na uyise wabo? Ke ngoko kwabakho umzekeliso othi, Ungomnye wabaprofeti na noSawule?"
1Samuel10:13 Akugqiba ukuprofeta, wafika kwindawo ephakamileyo."
1Samuel10:14 Wathi uRangwanaa uSawule kuye nakumfana lowo, Ubusiya phi na? Wathi, Sifuna iiesile; sathi sakubona ukuba abakho, saya kuSamuweli."
1Samuel10:15 Wathi ubawo noyisekazi uSawule, Ndixeleleni, ukuba utheni na kuni uSamuweli."
1Samuel10:16 Wathi uSawule kuyise, Usixelele ukuba zifunyenwe idizili. Kodwa akazange amxelele ngobukumkani awayethetha ngabo uSamuweli."
1Samuel10:17 uSamuweli wabahlanganisela kuYehova abantu eMizpa;
1Samuel10:18 Wathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ndawakhupha amaSirayeli eYiputa, ndanihlangula esandleni samaYiputa, nasesandleni soorhulumente bonke, nasesandleni sabathwali abanitshutshisayo;"
1Samuel10:19 Namhla nimlahlile uThixo wenu, owanihlangulayo kuzo zonke iimbandezelo zenu, nasekubandezelweni kwenu; wathi kuye, Hayi, simisele ukumkani. Zilungiseleleni ke ngoku phambi koYehova, kunye nezizukulwana zenu, namawaka enu."
1Samuel10:20 Wazibizela ndawonye uSamuweli zonke izizwe zakwaSirayeli, kwanyulwa isizwe sakwaBhenjamin."
1Samuel10:21 Wasisondeza isizwe sakwaBhenjamin ngokwemizalwane yaso, kwanyulwa umzi wakwaMatri, kwathi uSawule unyana kaKishe wathinjwa; bamfuna, akafunyanwa."
1Samuel10:22 Kungenxa yoko le nto baqhubeka bebuza kuYehova enoba yayisaya kufika na apho loo ndoda. Wathi uYehova, Yabona, uzimele phakathi kwezinto."
1Samuel10:23 Bagidima, bamthabatha khona; yaye xa wema phakathi kwabantu, wayemde kunabo bonke abantu ukususela egxalabeni ukusa phezulu."
1Samuel10:24 Wathi uSamuweli ebantwini bonke, Niyambona na lo umnyulileyo uYehova, ukuba akukho unjengaye ebantwini bonke? Baduma bonke abantu, besithi, uYehova makamsindise ukumkani."
1Samuel10:25 Wandula ke uSamuweli wabaxelela abantu indlela yobukumkani waza wayibhala encwadini waza wayibeka phambi koYehova. Waza uSamuweli wathi bonke abantu mabahambe, elowo aye endlwini yakhe."
1Samuel10:26 Naye uSawule waya endlwini yakhe eGibheha; wahamba neqela lamadoda antliziyo zichukumisekileyo kuThixo.
1Samuel10:27 Ke bona oonyana bakaBheliyali bathi, Wothini na ukusisindisa loo mntu? Bamdela, abamzisela nezipho. Kodwa wathi cwaka."
1Samuel11:1 Wenyuka uNahashe, umAmon, wamisa iintente ngaseYabheshe yaseGiliyadi. Athi onke amadoda aseYabheshe kuNahashe, Simisele umnqophiso, sikukhonze."
1Samuel11:2 Wathi uNahashe umAmon kubo, Ndonimisela umnqophiso, ndibatyhale amehlo abalungiseleli benu bonke, ndiwahlaze amaSirayeli onke."
1Samuel11:3 Athi kuye amadoda amakhulu aseYabheshe, Siphe iintsuku zibe sixhenxe, sithume abathunywa ezweni lonke lakwaSirayeli; ngoku ke, xa kungekho mhlanguli, sophuma siye kuni."
1Samuel11:4 Bafika abathunywa eGibheha kaSawule, baluxela udaba ebebeluvile abantu;"
1Samuel11:5 Nanko uSawule, ephuma elizweni, elandela imihlambi; Wathi uSawule, Banantoni na abantu, ngeli xesha bayalila? Bamxelela ngamadoda aseYabheshe."
1Samuel11:6 uMoya kaThixo wamfikela uSawule ekuyiveni kwakhe le nto, wavutha umsindo wakhe kunene."
1Samuel11:7 Wazithabatha iinkomo, wazityatya, wathuma abathunywa ezweni lonke lakwaSirayeli, esithi, Bonke abasukuba bengamlandeli uSawule noSamuweli, baya kwenjiwa njalo emazimeni abo. Ukoyikwa kukaYehova kwaba phezu kwabantu, bahamba bentliziyo-nye."
1Samuel11:8 Wababala ke uBhezeki, oonyana bakaSirayeli baba ngamakhulu amathathu amawaka, amadoda akwaYuda angamawaka angamashumi amathathu."
1Samuel11:9 Bathi kubathunywa ababefikile, Yizani kumadoda aseYabheshe yaseGiliyadi, nithi, ngomso ukufudumala kwelanga, niya kukhululwa. Beza abathunywa, bawaxela amadoda aseYabheshe; kwaye bonwabile."
1Samuel11:10 Athi amadoda aseYabheshe, Siya kunihlasela ngomso, yaye niya kwenza kuthi ngokuthanda kwenu."
1Samuel11:11 Ngengomso uSawule wabahlula abantu bangamaqela amathathu; kwaye beza phakathi kwamajoni ngomlindo wakusasa, babulala ama-Amon kwada kwasa."
1Samuel11:12 Bathi abantu kuSamuweli, Ngubani na obesithi, uSawule uya kusilawula na? Wazise loo madoda, siwabulale."
1Samuel11:13 Wathi uSawule, Makungabulawa mntu namhla; ngokuba uYehova uwahlangule namhla amaSirayeli."
1Samuel11:14 Wathi uSamuweli ebantwini, Hambani, sihambe siye eGiligali, sibubuyisele khona ubukumkani."
1Samuel11:15 Baya bonke abantu eGiligali; bambeka ukumkani uSawule eGiligali phambi koYehova; babingelela apho imibingelelo yombulelo phambi koYehova; yaye uSawule nawo onke amadoda akwaSirayeli bavuya kakhulu apho.
1Samuel12:1 Wathi uSamuweli kumaSirayeli onke, Yabonani, ndiliphulaphule izwi lenu ngako konke enakuthethayo kum, ndanimisa nina."
1Samuel12:2 Kaloku nanko ukumkani ehamba phambi kwenu. Ke mna ndaluphele, ndiyingwevu; nabo oonyana bam benani; mna ndihambe nani kwasebuncinaneni bam unanamhla."
1Samuel12:3 Yabonani, ndim lo ndithathe iesile likabani na? ndilahlekise bani na? Ndakha ndacinezela bani na? ndinyobe kubani na ukuba ndiwamfamekise amehlo am ngayo? ndiya kuyibuyisela kuni."
1Samuel12:4 Bathi ke bona, Akusixokisanga, akusicudisanga, akuthabathanga nto esandleni samntu."
1Samuel12:5 Wathi kubo, uYehova ulingqina ngani, nomthanjiswa wakhe ulingqina namhla, ukuba anamkelanga nto esandleni sam. Baphendula bathi, Ndilingqina."
1Samuel12:6 Wathi uSamuweli ebantwini, NguYehova owabavusayo ooMoses noAron, owabakhuphayo ooyihlo ezweni laseYiputa."
1Samuel12:7 Yimani ngoku, ndithethe kuni phambi koYehova ngayo yonke imisebenzi yobulungisa kaYehova, ayenzileyo kuni nakooyihlo."
1Samuel12:8 Xenikweni uYakobi waya eYiputa, bathandaza ooyihlo kuYehova; uYehova wathuma ooMoses noAron, babakhupha ooyihlo eYiputa, babamisa kule ndawo."
1Samuel12:9 Bamlibala uYehova uThixo wabo, wathengisa ngabo esandleni sikaSisera, umthetheli-mkhosi waseHatsore, nasesandleni samaFilisti, nasesandleni sokumkani wakwaMowabhi; balwa nabo."
1Samuel12:10 Banqula uYehova, besithi, Sifekile, ngokuba sikukreqile kuYehova, sakhonza ooBhahali nooAshtaroti; sihlangule esandleni seentshaba zethu, yaye siya kukukhonza."
1Samuel12:11 uYehova wathuma ooYerubhahali, noBhedan, noYafete, noSamuweli, wanihlangula esandleni seentshaba zenu ngeenxa zonke, nahlala ngoxolo."
1Samuel12:12 Nabona uNahashe, ukumkani woonyana baka-Amon, enixabela, nathi kum, Hayi; kodwa siya kulawulwa ngukumkani, nangona uYehova uThixo wenu engukumkani wenu."
1Samuel12:13 Khangelani ke, ukumkani enimnyulileyo, lowo nimlandeleyo; uyabona, uYehova ukwenze ukumkani."
1Samuel12:14 Ukuba nithe namoyika uYehova, nimkhonze, naliphulaphula ilizwi lakhe, anawugwilika kuYehova uThixo wenu, nina nokumkani onilawulayo, nimlandele uYehova uThixo wenu."
1Samuel12:15 Ke ukuba anithanga niliphulaphule ilizwi likaYehova, nithe nawuphikisa umlomo kaYehova, isandla sikaYehova siya kunichasa, njengokuba sachasa ooyihlo."
1Samuel12:16 Yimani ngoku, niyibone le nto inkulu, ayenzayo uYehova phambi kwamehlo enu."
1Samuel12:17 Akuvunwa ingqolowa yini na namhla? Ndiya kubiza kuYehova, ahlise iindudumo nemvula; ukuze nibone, nibone ukuba bukhulu ububi benu enibenzileyo emehlweni kaYehova ngokubucela kukumkani."
1Samuel12:18 uSamuweli wanqula uYehova; yaye uYehova wathumela iindudumo nemvula ngaloo mini, yaye lonke uhlanga lwamoyika kakhulu uYehova noSamuweli."
1Samuel12:19 Bathi bonke abantu kuSamuweli, Bathandazele abakhonzi bakho kuYehova uThixo wakho, ukuze singafi; ngokuba songeze obu bubi ezonweni zethu zonke ngokuzicelela kwethu kukumkani."
1Samuel12:20 Wathi uSamuweli ebantwini, Musani ukoyika;"
1Samuel12:21 Kwaye musani ukutyeka; ngokuba ingamampunge.
1Samuel12:22 Ngenxa yokuba uYehova akayi kubafulathela abantu bakhe ngenxa yegama lakhe elikhulu, ngenxa yokuba kwakholeka kuYehova ukunenza abantu bakhe."
1Samuel12:23 Ke mna, wanga uThixo angandivimba, ndingoni kuYehova ngokuyeka ukunithandazela; ndonifundisa indlela elungileyo, yobulungisa."
1Samuel12:24 Moyikeni uYehova nize nimkhonze ngokwenyaniso ngeentliziyo zenu zonke; ngokuba nizibonile izinto ezinkulu anenzele zona.
1Samuel12:25 Ke ukuba nithe naqhubeka nenza ububi, nobhubha, nina nokumkani wenu."
1Samuel13:1 uSawule ebelawula kwaSirayeli unyaka wamnye.
1Samuel13:2 uSawule wanyula amawaka amathathu amadoda kumaSirayeli; Amawaka amabini kubo anoSawule eMigmas ezintabeni zaseBheteli, iwaka libe noYonatan eGibheha yakwaBhenjamin; Abantu abaseleyo wababuyisela ezintenteni zabo."
1Samuel13:3 uYonatan wawuxabela umkhosi wamaFilisti owawuseGebha, aza eva amaFilisti. uSawule wavuthela ngesigodlo kulo lonke ilizwe, esithi, Waveni amaHebhere."
1Samuel13:4 Onke amaSirayeli eva ukuba uSawule uyoyisile umkhosi wamaFilisti, nokuba amaSirayeli angamasikizi kumaFilisti. Yaye abantu bahlanganisana ndawonye ukuba balandele uSawule ukuya eGiligali."
1Samuel13:5 AmaFilisti ahlanganisana ukuba alwe namaSirayeli, amashumi amathathu amawaka eenqwelo zokulwa, namawaka amathandathu abamahashe, namadoda amaninzi njengalawo asemazantsi elwandle; banduluka baza bamisa iinkampu zabo eMigemas ngasempuma yeBhete-afen."
1Samuel13:6 Akubona amadoda akwaSirayeli ukuba aswele (ngenxa yokuba abantu babebandezelekile), abantu bazifihla emiqolombeni nasemahlathini nasemaweni nasezindaweni eziphakamileyo nasemingxunyeni."
1Samuel13:7 Amanye amaHebhere awela iYordan esiya kwilizwe lakwaGadi naseGiliyadi. Ke yena uSawule, wayeseseGiligali, yaye bonke abantu babengcangcazela bemlandela."
1Samuel13:8 Walinda iintsuku zasixhenxe, ngokwexesha elimisiweyo likaSamuweli; ke uSamuweli akafikanga eGiligali; Baphalala abantu bemka kuye."
1Samuel13:9 Wathi uSawule, Zisani kum idini elinyukayo nemibingelelo yombulelo. Wenza idini elinyukayo."
1Samuel13:10 Kwathi, akugqiba ukulinyusa idini elinyukayo, nanko uSamuweli efika; Waphuma uSawule waya kumkhawulela, ukuba ambulise."
1Samuel13:11 Wathi uSamuweli, Wenza ntoni na? Wathi uSawule, Ngenxa enokuba ndibonile ukuba amadoda echithakele, endishiya, nawe ungezanga ngemihla emisiweyo, namaFilisti abehlanganisene eMigmas;"
1Samuel13:12 Ndathi ke, AmaFilisti aya kundihlasela eGiligali, ndingathandazanga kuYehova;"
1Samuel13:13 Wathi uSamuweli kuSawule, Wenze ngobudenge, akwawugcina umthetho kaYehova uThixo wakho owawuwisayo; ngokuba uYehova ebeya kubumisa ubukumkani bakho kwaSirayeli kude kuse ephakadeni."
1Samuel13:14 Kodwa ngoku, ubukumkani bakho abuyi kubakho; uYehova wakhangela indoda entliziyweni yayo, wayimisa uYehova ukuba ibe ngumlawuli wabantu bakhe, ngokuba engayigcinanga imithetho kaYehova."
1Samuel13:15 Wemka uSamuweli, wenyuka waya eGiligali, waya eGibheha ezweni lakwaBhenjamin. uSawule wawabala amadoda abenaye, ngathi kumakhulu amathandathu amadoda."
1Samuel13:16 uSawule, noYonatan unyana wakhe, namadoda abenabo, bahlala eGibheha yakwaBhenjamin, amaFilisti wona amise iintente eMigmas."
1Samuel13:17 Ababhuqi baya kuza bephuma kwiinkampu zamaFilisti bengamaqela amathathu, iqela elinye linyuke ngendlela yaseOfura kwilizwe laseShuwali."
1Samuel13:18 Esinye isihlwele sabheka endleleni yaseBhete-horon;
1Samuel13:19 Akwafunyanwa krele kulo lonke ilizwe lakwaSirayeli, ngokuba amaFilisti ebesithi, AmaHebhere makangazenzele makrele nemikhonto."
1Samuel13:20 Ehla onke amaSirayeli aya kumaFilisti, elowo walola isahlulo sakhe, neentolo zakhe, nezembe lakhe, nomsimelelo wakhe."
1Samuel13:21 Ke bona babenefayile yeenduku, yeentsimbi, neefolokhwe, nezamazembe, neyezinto zokulola."
1Samuel13:22 Ngemini yedabi bekungekho krele nantshuntshe esandleni samadoda onke abenoSawule noYonatan; kodwa kwakukho uSawule noYonatan unyana wakhe.
1Samuel13:23 Waza umkhosi wamaFilisti waqhubeka waya kwintlambo yaseMigmas.
1Samuel14:1 Kwathi ngamhla uthile, uYonatan unyana kaSawule wathi kumfana lowo uphatha iintonga zakhe, Hamba siye kumagorha amaFilistiya ngaphesheya. Akamxelela uyise."
1Samuel14:2 uSawule wayehleli ekupheleni kweGibheha phantsi komrharnate oseMigron; amadoda abenaye ngathi angamakhulu amathandathu amadoda;
1Samuel14:3 inguAhiya, unyana ka-Ahitubhi, umkhuluwa kaIkabhodi, unyana kaPinehasi, unyana kaEli, umbingeleli kaYehova waseShilo, enxibe ingubo engaphantsi. Babengazi abantu ukuba uYonatan uyile."
1Samuel14:4 Phakathi kwezikroba, abefuna ukuphumela kuzo uYonatan, aye kwizigidimi zamaFilisti, bekukho iliwa elibe neli nganeno; igama lomnye nguBosese, kwaye igama lomnye nguSene."
1Samuel14:5 Esinye isahlulo sasibheke entla, sibheka eMigmas, esinye sibheka ezantsi eGibheha."
1Samuel14:6 Wathi uYonatan kumfana lowo uphatha iintonga zakhe, Hamba, siwele, siye kwaba balindi ngomzuzu."
1Samuel14:7 Wathi umphathi weentonga zakhe kuye, Konke okusentliziyweni yakho, kwenze; uyabona, ndinawe ngokwentliziyo yakho."
1Samuel14:8 Wathi uYonatan, Yabona, siya kuya kulaa madoda, sibonakale kuwo."
1Samuel14:9 Ukuba bathe kuthi, Yithini, Ngesifike kuwe; siya kuma khona endaweni yethu, singenyuki siye kubo."
1Samuel14:10 Ukuba bathi, Nyukani nize kuthi; siya kunyukela khona apho, ngokuba uYehova uwanikele esandleni sethu, yaye oku kuya kuba ngumqondiso kuthi."
1Samuel14:11 Babonakala bengamadoda amabini akumaFilistiya, athi amaFilisti, Yabona, amaHebhere ephuma emingxunyeni abezimele kuyo."
1Samuel14:12 Abaphendula abalindi ooYonatan nomphathi weentonga zakhe, bathi, Nyukani nize kuthi, sonibonisa. Wathi uYonatan kumfana lowo, Nyuka undilandele; ngokuba uYehova uwanikele esandleni soonyana bakaSirayeli."
1Samuel14:13 Wema uYonatan, ekhase izandla neenyawo, umphathi weentonga zakhe esemva kwakhe, waziphosa ngakuYonatan umphathi weentonga zakhe wambulala."
1Samuel14:14 Elokuqala waxabela uYonatan nomphathi weentonga zakhe, awaxabela amadoda angathi amashumi mabini, afuye iinkomo ezisisiqingatha sesango."
1Samuel14:15 Kwabakho ukunyikima phakathi komkhosi ezweni nakubo bonke abantu;
1Samuel14:16 Bakhangela abalindi bakaSawule, baseGibheha yakwaBhenjamin; kwaye khangela, isihlwele sanyibilika, kwaye baqhubeka bebethana."
1Samuel14:17 Wathi uSawule kumadoda abenaye, Fundani, nibone ukuba ngubani na ophume kuthi; Akubala, akakho uYonatan nomphathi weentonga zakhe."
1Samuel14:18 Wathi usawule kuAhiya, Zisa apha ityeya kaThixo; ngokuba ityeya kaThixo ibinoonyana bakaSirayeli ngaloo mini."
1Samuel14:19 Kwathi, esathetha uSawule kumbingeleli, saphuma isandi samaqela amaFilisti; wathi uSawule kumbingeleli, Buyisa isandla sakho."
1Samuel14:20 Wahlanganisana uSawule namadoda onke abenaye, eza kulwa;"
1Samuel14:21 NamaHebhere abekumaFilisti ngaphambili, abenyuka esiya emkhosini, evela emazweni, aba koonyana bakaSirayeli, ababenoSawule noYonatan."
1Samuel14:22 Kwanamadoda onke akwaSirayeli, abezimele kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, eva ukuba amaFilisti asabile, awalandela ekulweni."
1Samuel14:23 uYehova wawasindisa ke amaSirayeli ngaloo mini; ukulwa kwada kwesa eBhetaven.
1Samuel14:24 Amadoda akwaSirayeli ayedidekile ngaloo mini, kuba uSawule wayebacebisile abantu, esithi, Uqalekisiwe odla inyama, kude kuhlwe, ndize ndiziphindezelele ezintshabeni zam. Ngoko ke abantu akubangakho namnye ukungcamla ukutya."
1Samuel14:25 Lonke ilizwe lafikelela ehlathini; kwaye kukho ubusi phezu komhlaba.
1Samuel14:26 Afika amadoda ehlathini, avuza ubusi; akasibeka isandla sakhe emlonyeni wakhe, ngokuba abantu bebesoyika isifungo."
1Samuel14:27 Akaphulaphula uYonatan ekucebisaneni kukayise ebantwini; ke ngoko, wathabatha incam yentonga awayeyibambe, wayicinezela endlwini yeenyosi, waza wabeka isandla sakhe emlonyeni; kwaye amehlo akhe akhazimla."
1Samuel14:28 Yaphendula enye indoda, yathi, Uyihlo ubathethe kakubi abantu, wathi, Uqalekisiwe odla isonka, namhlanje. Kwaye abantu babediniwe."
1Samuel14:29 Wathi uYonatan, Ubawo ulizisele isiphithiphithi ilizwe; Yabona, amehlo am aqabukile, ngokuba ndive intwana yezi busi."
1Samuel14:30 Kwenzeka njani ukuba namhlanje abantu badle amaxhoba eentshaba zabo baze bawafumane ngesisa? ngokuba amaFilisti ayengabulawanga kangako?
1Samuel14:31 Ngaloo mini bawaxabela amaFilisti, ukusuka eMigmas ukuya eAyalon, yaye abantu babediniwe."
1Samuel14:32 Baphaphatheka abantu emaxhobeni, bathabatha impahla emfutshane, neenkomo, namathole eenkomo, baxhela, badla negazi;"
1Samuel14:33 Waxelelwa uSawule, kwathiwa, Uyabona, abantu bayona kuYehova ngokudla igazi; Wathi, Nikreqile; ndiphose ilitye elikhulu namhlanje."
1Samuel14:34 Wathi uSawule, Yiyani phakathi kwabantu, uthi kubo, Ziziseni kum elowo inkomo yakhe nomhlambi wakhe, nixhelele apha, nidle; ningoni kuYehova ngokudla igazi. Bonke abantu bazisa elowo iinkomo zakhe ngobo busuku, baxhelela khona."
1Samuel14:35 uSawule wamakhela uYehova isibingelelo; sisibingelelo sokuqala awasakhela sona uYehova.
1Samuel14:36 Wathi uSawule, Masiwasukele amaFilisti ebusuku, siwaphange kude kube ngomso, kungashiyi namnye kuwo. Bathi ke bona, Yenzani okulungileyo emehlweni enu. Wathi umbingeleli, Masisondele kuThixo."
1Samuel14:37 uSawule wabuza kuThixo, esithi, Ndibaleke ndingene na kumaFilisti? wowanikela na esandleni samaSirayeli? Kodwa ngaloo mini akazange amphendule."
1Samuel14:38 Wathi uSawule, Yizani apha, nonke nina zibonda zabantu, nive, nibone ukuba siyintoni na esi sono namhlanje?"
1Samuel14:39 Kuba eneneni ngoYehova ophilayo okhululayo uSirayeli, ukuba kuthe kwenzeka kuYonatan unyana wam, ngokuqinisekileyo uya kufa. Kodwa phakathi kwabantu bonke akubangakho namnye umphendulayo."
1Samuel14:40 Wathi kumaSirayeli onke, Yimani ngapha, mna noYonatan unyana wam, sibe ngelinye icala. Bathi abantu kuSawule, Yenza okulungileyo emehlweni akho."
1Samuel14:41 Wathi uSawule kuYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, Yenza amaqashiso. uSawule noYonatan babanjwa, kodwa amadoda asaba."
1Samuel14:42 Wathi uSawule, Yenzani iqashiso phakathi kwam noYonatan unyana wam. Wabanjwa ke uYonatan."
1Samuel14:43 Wathi uSawule kuYonatan, Ndixelele, yintoni na le nto uyenzileyo? uYonatan wamxelela, wathi, Ndive intwana yobusi ngencam yentonga endiyibambe ngesandla, nanku ndiya kufa."
1Samuel14:44 Waphendula uSawule wathi, uThixo makenjenje, aqokele ukwenjenje; inene, uya kufa, Yonatan."
1Samuel14:45 Bathi abantu kuSawule, Afe na uYonatan, owenze ngolo hlobo amaSirayeli? Ehleli nje uYehova, akuyi kuwa nonwele lwentloko yakhe emhlabeni; ngokuba usebenzisene noThixo namhlanje. Bamsindisa abantu uYonatan, akafa."
1Samuel14:46 Wenyuka uSawule, wawalandela amaFilisti; amaFilisti aya emakhayeni awo."
1Samuel14:47 uSawule wabuthabatha ubukumkani bakwaSirayeli waza walwa nazo zonke iintshaba zakhe ezazivela macala onke, walwa noMowabhi noonyana baka-Amoni noEdom nookumkani baseTsobha namaFilisti; kwaye naphi na apho wayejika wayesoyikisa."
1Samuel14:48 Wahlanganisa umkhosi, wawaxabela ama-Amaleki, wawahlangula amaSirayeli esandleni sabo babewatshutshisa;"
1Samuel14:49 Oonyana bakaSawule nguYonatan, noYeshvi, noMalekishuwa; ngawo la amagama eentombi zakhe zombini; igama lowamazibulo nguMerabhe, igama lowemnci nguMikale;"
1Samuel14:50 Igama lomkaSawule belinguAkinoma, intombi ka-Ahimahatse; igama lomthetheli-mkhosi belinguAbhinere, unyana kaNere, uyisekazi kaSawule."
1Samuel14:51 Uyise kaSawule ubenguKishe; uNere, uyise ka-Abhinere, wayengunyana ka-Abhiyeli."
1Samuel14:52 Kwaye kukho imfazwe enzima kumaFilisti yonke imihla kaSawule; yaye xa uSawule wabona indoda eyomeleleyo okanye indoda elikroti, wayizisa kuye."
1Samuel15:1 Wabuya wathi uSamuweli kuSawule, uYehova undithume ukuba ndikuthambise ube ngukumkani kubantu bakhe amaSirayeli; liphulaphule ke ngoku ilizwi lamazwi kaYehova."
1Samuel15:2 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Ndiyakuqonda oko ama-Amaleki akwenzayo koonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuba abebalindile endleleni ekuphumeni kwabo eYiputa."
1Samuel15:3 Ke kaloku hamba uye uwabulale ama-Amaleki, utshabalalise yonke into anayo, ungawacongi; kodwa yixheleleni inkunzi, nemazi, nabantwana, nabantwana, neenkomo, nempahla emfutshane, neenkamela, namaesile."
1Samuel15:4 Wawahlanganisa uSawule amadoda, wawabala eTelayim: amakhulu amabini amawaka omqikela, neshumi lamawaka amadoda akwaYuda."
1Samuel15:5 Wafika uSawule emzini wama-Amaleki, walala entilini."
1Samuel15:6 Wathi uSawule kumaKanan, Sukani, nihle, ningene kuma-Amaleki, hleze ndinitshabalalise nawo; ngenxa yokuba nabenzela inceba bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli ekunyukeni kwabo bephuma eYiputa. Aphuma ke amaKanan kuma-Amaleki."
1Samuel15:7 uSawule wawaxabela ama-Amaleki, wathabathela eHavila wesa eShure, ekhangelene neYiputa."
1Samuel15:8 Wambamba uAgagi ukumkani wama-Amaleki esaphila, wababulala bonke abantu ngekrele ngesiqalekiso."
1Samuel15:9 Kodwa uSawule nabantu bamsindisa uAgagi nezona zilungileyo izimvu neenkomo netyetyisiweyo namatakane eegusha nako konke okulungileyo; hlamba ukungcola.
1Samuel15:10 Lafika ilizwi likaYehova kuSamuweli, lisithi:"
1Samuel15:11 Ndiyaxolisa ngokuba ndimenze ukumkani uSawule, ngenxa yokuba uye wandinikela umva waza akazange ayiphumeze imiyalelo yam. Kwaba buhlungu oko kuSamuweli; wabiza uYehova ubusuku bonke."
1Samuel15:12 Wavuka kusasa uSamuweli, waya kukhawulela uSawule; waxelelwa uSamuweli, kwathiwa, uSawule uze eKarmele, wabona ukuba umlungisele indawo; wemka, wehla, wehla waya eGiligali."
1Samuel15:13 Weza uSamuweli kuSawule, wathi uSawule kuye, Wanga uYehova akusikelele. Ndawuthobela umyalelo kaYehova."
1Samuel15:14 Wathi uSamuweli, Kuyintoni na ukukhala kwempahla emfutshane ezindlebeni zam, nokuhleka kweenkomo endikuvayo?"
1Samuel15:15 Wathi uSawule, Bazithabatha kuma-Amaleki; ngokuba abantu babesele eyona ilungileyo imihlambi yempahla emfutshane, neenkomo, ukuze babingelele kuYehova uThixo wakho; kwaye abanye sibohlwaya ngesiqalekiso sokugxothwa."
1Samuel15:16 Wathi uSamuweli kuSawule, Yima, ndikuxelele oko uYehova akuthethileyo kum ngobu busuku. Wathi ke yena kuye, Khawutsho."
1Samuel15:17 Wathi uSamuweli, Akubekwanga yintloko yezizwe zakwaSirayeli yini na, ubusemncinane emehlweni akho? Wakuthambisa uYehova ukuba ube ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli?"
1Samuel15:18 uYehova wathumela ngendlela, wathi, Hamba uye kubatshabhisa abo boni bama-Amaleki, ulwe nawo, ubatshabalalise."
1Samuel15:19 Kutheni na ngoko ningaliphulaphulanga ilizwi likaYehova, nasuka naphaphazela emaxhobeni nenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova?"
1Samuel15:20 Wathi uSawule kuSamuweli, Ndaliphulaphula ilizwi likaYehova, ndemka ngendlela uYehova ebendithume ngayo, ndamzisa uAgagi ukumkani wama-Amaleki, ndawaqalekisa ama-Amaleki."
1Samuel15:21 Kodwa abantu bathabatha emhlambini weebhokhwe neenkomo ezithinjiweyo, ezona zibalaseleyo kwezo zaziqalekisiwe, ukuze babingelele ngazo kuYehova uThixo wakho eGiligali."
1Samuel15:22 Wathi uSamuweli, uYehova unonelele amadini anyukayo nemibingelelo, ngaphezu kokuva ilizwi likaYehova? Yabona, ukuphulaphula kulungile ngaphezu kombingelelo, ukuphulaphula kulungile ngaphezu kwamanqatha eenkunzi zeegusha."
1Samuel15:23 Ngokuba ukuba neenkani kusisono esinjengokuvumisa, ubungqola bunjengenkonzo yezithixo nemilondekhaya. Ngokuba ulicekisile ilizwi likaYehova, naye ukucekisile ukuba ungabi ngukumkani."
1Samuel15:24 Wathi uSawule kuSamuweli, Ndonile; ngokuba ndigqithile emthethweni kaYehova naselizwini lakho; kuba bendisoyika abantu, ndaphulaphula izwi labo."
1Samuel15:25 Sixolele isono sam, ubuye nam, ukuze ndimnqule uYehova."
1Samuel15:26 Wathi uSamuweli kuSawule, Andiyi kubuya nawe; ngokuba ulicekisile ilizwi likaYehova, naye uYehova ukucekisile, ukuba ungabi ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
1Samuel15:27 Wathi uSamuweli akujika ukuba emke, wabamba ilaphu lengubo yakhe, yakrazuka."
1Samuel15:28 Wathi uSamuweli kuye, Namhla uYehova ubukrazule kuwe ubukumkani bakwaSirayeli, obuniké kobakho."
1Samuel15:29 Kananjalo amandla kaSirayeli akaxoki, yaye abaguquki, kuba asingobantu ukuba baguquke."
1Samuel15:30 Wathi, Ndihlulekile; Noko ke ndizukise phambi kwamadoda amakhulu abantu bakowethu, naphambi kwamaSirayeli, ubuye nam, ndimnqule uYehova uThixo wakho."
1Samuel15:31 Wabuya ke uSamuweli, wamlandela uSawule; uSawule wamnqula uYehova."
1Samuel15:32 Wathi uSamuweli, Mziseni kum uAgagi, ukumkani wama-Amaleki ke uAgagi weza kuye enenceba. Wathi uAgage: Inene, iintlungu zokufa ziphelile."
1Samuel15:33 Wathi uSamuweli, Njengokuba umkhonto wakho ubadlayo aba bafazi, unyoko uya kubabulala abantwana phakathi kwabafazi. uSamuweli wamnqumla uAgagi phambi koYehova eGiligali."
1Samuel15:34 Waya uSamuweli eRama; Wenyuka uSawule waya endlwini yakhe eGibheha, emzini kaSawule."
1Samuel15:35 uSamuweli akabuyanga amvelele uSawule, kwada kwayimini yokufa kwakhe; kodwa uSamuweli waba buhlungu ngenxa kaSawule, yaye uYehova waguquka ngenxa yokuba wayemenze uSawule ukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
1Samuel16:1 Wathi uYehova kuSamuweli, Uya kumlilela kude kube nini na uSawule, ndimshiyile nje ukuba abe ngukumkani kumaSirayeli? Zalisa isigodlo sakho ngeoli, hamba, ndiya kukuthumela kuYese waseBhetelehem; ngokuba ndizinyulele ukumkani koonyana bakhe."
1Samuel16:2 Wathi uSamuweli, Ndothini na ukuya? akuva uSawule, andibulale. Wathi uYehova, Zithabathele ivesi, ithi, Ndize kubingelela kuYehova."
1Samuel16:3 Bizela embingelelweni uYese; ndokuxelela mna into oya kuyenza; uze undinike lowo bendikubizele kona.
1Samuel16:4 Wenza ke uSamuweli ngokwelizwi likaYehova, wafika eBhetelehem. Akufika kuye amadoda amakhulu aloo mzi, athi, Ufike enoxolo na?"
1Samuel16:5 Wathi, Ndize kubingelela kuYehova ndinoxolo; zingcwaliseni, nize nam embingelelweni. Wabangcwalisa uYese noonyana bakhe waza wababizela embingelelweni."
1Samuel16:6 Ekufikeni kwabo, wakhangela kuEliyabhi, wathi, Okunene, umthanjiswa kaYehova unaye."
1Samuel16:7 Wathi uYehova kuSamuweli, Musa ukukhangela ubuso bakhe, nokuphakama kwesiqu sakhe; ngokuba ndimshiyile; ngokuba uYehova akaboni njengoko abonayo umntu; ngokuba umntu ukhangela umphandle, uYehova ukhangela intliziyo."
1Samuel16:8 uYese wabiza uAbhinadabhi waza wamvumela ukuba agqithe phambi koSamuweli. Wathi: uYehova akamnyulanga nalo.
1Samuel16:9 uYese wamndulula ke uSama. Wathi: uYehova akamnyulanga nalo.
1Samuel16:10 Kwakhona uYese wabandulula oonyana bakhe abasixhenxe ukuba badlule phambi koSamuweli. Wathi uSamuweli kuYese, uYehova akamnyulanga lo."
1Samuel16:11 Wathi uSamuweli kuYese, Baphelele na oonyana bakho? Wathi, Kusele umncinane; nanko lusalusa iigusha. Wathi uSamuweli kuYese, Thumela abizwe, ngokuba asinakuhlala ade eze apha."
1Samuel16:12 Wathumela ukuba aziswe. Ebebomvu ebusweni, emhle, emhle imbonakalo. Wathi uYehova, Suka ume, umthambise; ngokuba nguye;"
1Samuel16:13 uSamuweli wathabatha uphondo oluneoli waza wamthambisa phakathi kwabazalwana bakhe, yaye umoya kaYehova wehla phezu koDavide ukususela ngaloo mini. Emva koko uSamuweli waphakama waya eRama."
1Samuel16:14 Umoya kaYehova wemka kuSawule, waza wankwantyiswa ngumoya ombi kaYehova."
1Samuel16:15 Bandula ke abakhonzi bakaSawule bathi kuye: “Yabona, udandathekiswa ngumoya ombi ophuma kuThixo."
1Samuel16:16 Kaloku ukumkani wethu makabawisele umthetho abakhonzi bakho phambi kwakho, ukuba bafune indoda elumkileyo ebetha uhadi; ukuba umoya ombi kaThixo ufikile kuwe, ufika ngesandla sakhe, nophiliswa wena."
1Samuel16:17 Wathi uSawule kubakhonzi bakhe, Ndiqokeleleni indoda ekwaziyo ukubetha uhadi, niyizise kum."
1Samuel16:18 Waphendula omnye wakubakhonzi, wathi, Yabona, ndimbonile unyana kaYese waseBhetelehem okrelekrele, indoda eligorha, esisilumko kweshishini, njengendoda entle; uYehova unaye."
1Samuel16:19 uSawule wathumela abathunywa kuYese, esithi, Mthumele eze kum, uDavide, unyana wakho, ohlala emhlambini."
1Samuel16:20 uYese wathabatha iesile, kubotshelelwe isonka, nengxowa yewayini, netakane lebhokhwe, wathumela kuSawule ngesandla sikaDavide unyana wakhe."
1Samuel16:21 Weza uDavide kuSawule, wema ngakuye, wamthanda kunene; waba ludibi lwezixhobo zakhe."
1Samuel16:22 Wathumela uSawule kuYese, esithi, uDavide ume ngakum; ngokuba ubabalwe ndim."
1Samuel16:23 Wehla umoya ombi kaThixo kuSawule, walithabatha izembe elingaphakathi uDavide, wabetha ngesandla sakhe;"
1Samuel17:1 AmaFilisti ayihlanganisa imikhosi yawo ukuba ilwe, ayihlanganisela eSogo yakwaYuda, amisa phakathi kweSogo neAzeka, e-Efese-Damim."
