1Samuel17:2 uSawule namadoda akwaSirayeli bahlanganisana, bamisa inkampu entlanjeni yoMfula kaElaa baza balwa imfazwe nxamnye namaFilisti."
1Samuel17:3 AmaFilisti ayemi kwelinye icala lentaba, amaSirayeli emi kwelinye icala lentaba, kukho intlambo phakathi kwawo."
1Samuel17:4 Kwavela igorha elisenkampini yamaFilisti, igama lalo lalinguGoliyati waseGati, obude buziikubhite ezintandathu nomolulo wesandla;"
1Samuel17:5 enxibe isigcina-ntloko sobhedu entloko, ethwele isigcina-sifuba; ubunzima bengubo bebuziishekele zobhedu ezingamawaka amahlanu;"
1Samuel17:6 ezinyaweni zayo yayineepani zobhedu, nombhinqo wobhedu phakathi kwamagxa ayo;"
1Samuel17:7 uluthi lwentshuntshe yayo belungangomthi wabaluki; Intloko yentshuntshe yayo ibiziishekele ezimakhulu mathandathu esinyithi;
1Samuel17:8 Wesuka wema, wayibiza imikhosi yakwaSirayeli, wathi kuyo, Yini na ukuba niphume nalungiselela ukulwa kwenu? Andinguye na umFilisti, nabakhonzi bakho uSawule? Zinyuleleni indoda, ihle ize kum."
1Samuel17:9 Ukuba ithe yanako ukulwa nam, yandibulala, soba ngabakhonzi kuni; ukuba ndithe ndayoyisa mna, ndayibulala, noba ngabakhonzi kuthi, nisikhonze."
1Samuel17:10 Wathi umFilisti, Namhla ndiyawacekisa abathetheli bakwaSirayeli; ndinike indoda, silwe sobabini."
1Samuel17:11 Baweva ooSawule namaSirayeli onke amazwi alo mFilisti, boyika, boyika kunene."
1Samuel17:12 uDavide ubengunyana waloo mEfrata waseBhetelehem yakwaYuda, ogama belinguYese; ubenoonyana abasibhozo, ibe ke indoda leyo ibiyindoda enkulu phakathi kwabantu ngexesha likaSawule."
1Samuel17:13 Bahamba oonyana abathathu bakaYese abakhulu, bamlandela uSawule baya emfazweni; amagama oonyana bakhe abathathu ababeye emfazweni yayinguEliyabhi owamazibulo, noAbhinadabhi owesibini, noShama wesithathu."
1Samuel17:14 uDavide wayengoyena mncinane, yaye amadoda amakhulu amathathu alandela uSawule."
1Samuel17:15 uDavide ubehamba ebuya kuSawule, esiya kwalusa impahla emfutshane kayise eBhetelehem."
1Samuel17:16 UmFilisti lowo wayesondela kusasa nangokuhlwa, wamvelela iintsuku ezimashumi mane."
1Samuel17:17 Wathi uYese kuDavide unyana wakhe, Thabathela abakhuluwa bakho iefa yale ngqolowa egcadiweyo, nezonka ezi zilishumi, uzithumele eminqubeni kubakhuluwa bakho;"
1Samuel17:18 Uze ezi mpahla emfutshane zilishumi, uzizise kumthetheli-waka, ubone ukuba kuqhubeka ntoni na abazalwana bakho, uthabathe kubo isibambiso."
1Samuel17:19 uSawule, nabo, namadoda onke akwaSirayeli, babekwintlambo kaEla, balwa namaFilisti."
1Samuel17:20 Wavuka kusasa uDavide, wazishiya izimvu kumalusi, wazithabatha, wemka, njengoko abemwisele umthetho uYese; Yafika emhadini xa umkhosi uphumayo usiya edabini, wakhala edabini."
1Samuel17:21 Kuba amaSirayeli namaFilisti ayemise imfazwe, umkhosi ukhangelene nomkhosi."
1Samuel17:22 uDavide wayishiya inqwelo yakhe esandleni sabalindi, wabalekela emkhosini, wababulisa abazalwana bakhe."
1Samuel17:23 Ngoxa wayesathetha nabo, kwathi gqi indoda elikroti, umFilisti waseGati, ogama linguGoliyati, evela ezintendelezweni zamaFilisti, yathetha kwalaa mazwi, waza uDavide weva."
1Samuel17:24 Onke amadoda akwaSirayeli ayibona le ndoda, asaba ebusweni bayo yaye oyika kakhulu."
1Samuel17:25 Athi amadoda akwaSirayeli, Niyibonile na laa ndoda inyukayo? wenyuka waya kuwadela amaSirayeli; yaye umntu oya kumbulala, ukumkani uya kumtyebisa ngobutyebi obuninzi, amnike intombi aze ayikhulule indlu kayise kwaSirayeli."
1Samuel17:26 Wathetha uDavide kumadoda abemi phambi kwakhe, wathi, Ngubani na othe wabulala laa mFilisti, walisusa ihlazo lamaSirayeli? ngenxa yokuba ngubani na laa mFilisti ungalukanga ukuba ade ayidele imiyalelo yoThixo ophilayo?"
1Samuel17:27 Baphendula abantu ngokwelo lizwi, bathi, Kuya kwenjiwa nje kuloo mntu umbuleleyo."
1Samuel17:28 Weva uEliyabhi, umkhuluwa wakhe, ethetha naloo madoda; Wavutha umsindo kaEliyabhi kuDavide, wathi, Ifike apha? Uyishiye nabani na laa mpahla imfutshane imbalwa entlango? Ndiyakwazi mna ukukhukhumala kwakho, nobubi bentliziyo yakho; ngokuba nihle nize kubona imfazwe."
1Samuel17:29 Wathi uDavide, Ndenze ntoni na ngoku? Ngaba akukho sizathu?"
1Samuel17:30 Wamshiya, waya komnye, ethetha kwangokunjalo."
1Samuel17:31 Aviwa amazwi awawathethayo uDavide, avakala kuSawule, wadanduluka kuye."
1Samuel17:32 Wathi uDavide kuSawule, Makungathambi mntu ngenxa yakhe; umkhonzi wakho lo uya kuya alwe nalo mFilisti."
1Samuel17:33 Wathi uSawule kuDavide, Akunako ukumhlasela laa mFilisti umlwe naye; ngokuba usengumfana, ukanti ubeyindoda elwayo kwasebuncinaneni bakhe."
1Samuel17:34 Wathi uDavide kuSawule, Umkhonzi wakho ebesalusa impahla emfutshane kayise, kwafika ingonyama nebhere, yathabatha ixhwane emhlambini."
1Samuel17:35 Ndaphuma ke, ndayilandela, ndayibetha, ndayigcina emlonyeni wayo; yathi yesuka phezu kwam, ndayibamba ngodevu lwayo, ndayibetha, ndayibulala."
1Samuel17:36 Umkhonzi wakho ubulele ingonyama nebhere, yaye lo mFilisti usiyatha uya kuba njengenye yazo, ngenxa yokuba uyidelile imikhosi yoThixo ophilayo."
1Samuel17:37 Wathi uDavide, uYehova owandihlangulayo egazini lengonyama nasegazini lebhere, nguye oya kundihlangula esandleni saloo mFilisti. Wathi uSawule kuDavide, Hamba ke, uYehova abe nawe."
1Samuel17:38 uSawule wamambathisa uDavide iingubo zakhe, wabeka isigcina-ntloko sobhedu entloko; naye exhobe ngesixhobo."
1Samuel17:39 uDavide walibopha ikrele lakhe esikrweqeni sakhe, wazama ukuhamba; ngokuba engangqinanga. Wathi uDavide kuSawule, Andinako ukuhamba nawo; kuba andizange ndizame. uDavide wazithabatha kuye."
1Samuel17:40 Wathabatha umsimelelo wakhe ngesandla sakhe, wazinyulela amatye amahlanu agudileyo kwintlambo yomlambo, wawafaka engxoweni engxoweni yakhe yomalusi; isilingi sakhe sisesandleni sakhe, waya kumFilisti."
1Samuel17:41 Weza umFilisti, waya kuDavide; indoda ephethe ikhaka yayihamba phambi kwakhe."
1Samuel17:42 Xa umFilisti wasingasinga waza wambona uDavide, wamdelela, ngenxa yokuba umfana ebomvu, enembonakalo entle."
1Samuel17:43 Wathi umFilisti kuDavide, Ndiyinja na, uze kum uneentonga? UmFilisti wamqalekisa uDavide ngoothixo bakhe."
1Samuel17:44 Wathi umFilisti kuDavide, Yiza kum apha, ndiyinike iintaka zezulu namarhamncwa asendle inyama yakho."
1Samuel17:45 Wathi uDavide kumFilisti, Wena uza kum unekrele, nentshuntshe, nekhaka; ke mna ndiza kuwe egameni likaYehova wemikhosi, uThixo wemikhosi kaSirayeli."
1Samuel17:46 Namhlanje uYehova uya kukunikela esandleni sam; yaye ngokuqinisekileyo ndiya kukoyisa, ndiyinqumle intloko yakho; namhla ndizinike iintaka zezulu namarhamncwa asendle izidumbu zemikhosi yamaFilisti; ukuze ihlabathi lonke lazi ukuba kukho uThixo kwaSirayeli."
1Samuel17:47 Liya kwazi lonke eli bandla, ukuba uYehova akahlanguli ngakrele nantshuntshe; ngokuba imfazwe yekaYehova, woninikela esandleni sethu."
1Samuel17:48 Akugqiba umFilisti, waya kukhawulela uDavide, wakhawuleza uDavide, wagidima waya emkhosini, esiya kukhawulela umFilisti lowo."
1Samuel17:49 uDavide wafaka isandla sakhe epokothweni yakhe, warhola ilitye, waliphosa, wambetha umFilisti leyo ebunzi; wawa ngobuso."
1Samuel17:50 uDavide wamxabela umFilisti ngenkwitshi nangelitye, wamhlaba umFilisti lowo, wambulala; ke kungekho krele esandleni sikaDavide."
1Samuel17:51 Wagidima ke uDavide, wema ecaleni komFilisti, walithabatha ikrele lakhe, walirhola eludinini lwalo, wambulala, wamnqumla intloko ngalo. Abona ke amaFilisti ukuba lifile igorha lawo, asaba."
1Samuel17:52 Amadoda akwaSirayeli nakwaYuda azilungisa, amemeza, awasukela amaFilisti, ada aya kufika entilini yoMnayile, aya kufikelela emasangweni ase-Ekron. Yaye abo bawoyisayo kumaFilisti bawela emhlabeni endleleni eya eSarayim ukuya kufikelela eGati nokuya kufikelela e-Ekron."
1Samuel17:53 Babuya oonyana bakaSirayeli ekuwasukeleni amaFilisti, baziphanga iintente zawo."
1Samuel17:54 uDavide wayithabatha intloko yomFilisti, wayisa eYerusalem; isikrweqe sakhe wasibeka ententeni yakhe."
1Samuel17:55 uSawule wambona uDavide emxabela umFilisti, wathi kuAbhinere umthetheli-mkhosi, Ngunyana kabani na laa mfana, Abhinere? Wathi uAbhinere, Ewe, kumkani, uhleli umphefumlo wakho."
1Samuel17:56 Wathi ukumkani, Niyabuza ukuba ngunyana kabani na lo?"
1Samuel17:57 Ekubuyeni kukaDavide ekumbulaleni umFilisti, uAbhinere wamthabatha, wamzisa phambi koSawule, ephethe intloko yomFilisti ngesandla sakhe."
1Samuel17:58 Wathi uSawule kuye, Ungunyana kabani na, mfanandini? Waphendula uDavide, wathi, Ndingunyana womkhonzi wakho uYese waseBhetelehem."
1Samuel18:1 Kwathi, akugqiba ukuthetha noSawule, umoya kaYonatan wanamathela entliziyweni kaDavide; uYonatan wamthanda njengokuzithanda kwakhe."
1Samuel18:2 uSawule wamthabatha ngaloo mini, akamvumela ukuba abuyele endlwini kayise."
1Samuel18:3 Benza umnqophiso ooYonatan noDavide, ngokumthanda kwakhe njengoko ebezithanda."
1Samuel18:4 uYonatan wayihluba ingubo yokwaleka abenayo, wayinika uDavide, neengubo zakhe zokulwa, kwesa ekreleni lakhe, kwesa esingxotyeni sakhe, kwesa embhinqweni wakhe."
1Samuel18:5 Waphuma uDavide, waya apho wathunywa khona nguSawule, wenza ngengqiqo; uSawule wamenza umphathi wamadoda okulwa. Wakholeka emehlweni abantu bonke, nasemehlweni abakhonzi bakaSawule."
1Samuel18:6 Ekufikeni kwabo, xa uDavide wabuyayo ekuxabeleni umFilisti, abafazi beza bevela kuzo zonke izixeko zakwaSirayeli, bevuma ingoma yaye bengqungqa ukuya kuhlangabeza uKumkani uSawule ngamagubu ngovuyo nangeempahla zokuvuma."
1Samuel18:7 Abafazi baphendulana, babizana, bathi, uSawule ubulele amawaka akhe, uDavide ubulele amashumi akhe amawaka."
1Samuel18:8 Wavutha kunene ngumsindo uSawule; uthi, uDavide bamnika ishumi lamawaka, kodwa bandinika iwaka lodwa; kwaye yintoni anokuyizuza ngaphezu korhulumente?"
1Samuel18:9 uSawule waqhubeka ekhangele kuDavide ukususela loo mini.
1Samuel18:10 Ngengomso umoya ombi kaThixo wamfikela uSawule, waprofeta endlwini; Wawangawangisa ngesandla uDavide njengokwangaphambili; intshuntshe isesandleni sikaSawule."
1Samuel18:11 uSawule wabinza ngentshuntshe; ngokuba wathi, Ndiya kumbethelela eludongeni uDavide. uDavide wamshiya kwada kwakabini."
1Samuel18:12 uSawule wamoyika uDavide, ngokuba uYehova ubenaye, wamshiya uSawule."
1Samuel18:13 Ngenxa yoko uSawule wamsusa kuye, wammisa waba ngumthetheli wewaka; Waphuma wakhawuleza waya ebantwini."
1Samuel18:14 uDavide wenza ngengqiqo kuzo zonke iindlela zakhe; uYehova waba naye.
1Samuel18:15 Ngoko ke, xa uSawule wabonayo ukuba wayesenza ngobulumko kakhulu, wamoyika."
1Samuel18:16 Ke onke amaSirayeli namaYuda ebemthanda uDavide, ngokuba ebengena ephuma phambi kwawo."
1Samuel18:17 Wathi uSawule kuDavide, Yabona, uMerabha, intombi yam enkulu, ndiya kunika ibe ngumkakho; kodwa yibani nesibindi ngenxa yam, nilwe iimfazwe zikaYehova ngokuba wathi uSawule, Masingalwi isandla sam kuye, masiye kuye izandla zamaFilisti."
1Samuel18:18 Wathi uDavide kuSawule, Ndingubani na? Buyintoni na ubomi bam, nemizalwane kabawo kwaSirayeli, ukuba ndibe ngumyeni kukumkani?"
1Samuel18:19 Kodwa ngexesha uMerabhe intombi kaSawule eya kunikelwa kuDavide, wanikwa uAdriyeli waseMehola, ukuba abe ngumfazi wakhe."
1Samuel18:20 uMikali, intombi kaSawule, ubemthanda uDavide;"
1Samuel18:21 Wathi uSawule, Ndiya kumnika yona ibe ngumgibe kuye, sibe phezu kwakhe isandla samaFilisti. Wathi uSawule kuDavide, Yena uya kuba ngumyeni kum namhla kwenye kuzo zombini."
1Samuel18:22 uSawule wabawisela abakhonzi bakhe umthetho, wathi, Thethani kuDavide ngasese, nithi, Yabona, ukumkani ukunanzile, nabakhonzi bakhe bonke bayakuthanda; kaloku yiba ngumyeni kukumkani."
1Samuel18:23 Bawathetha abakhonzi bakaSawule loo mazwi, ephulaphule uDavide. Wathi uDavide, Yinto encinane na le ukuba ube ngumyeni kukumkani; mna kuthiwa ndingomncinane?"
1Samuel18:24 Bamxelela abakhonzi bakaSawule, besithi, uDavide uthe."
1Samuel18:25 Wathi uSawule, Yiyani kuDavide, nithi, Ukumkani akabunqweneli ubukumkani; lilikhulu leemfele zamaFilisti, ukuze aziphindezelele kubakhonzi bokumkani. Kodwa uSawule wayezimisele ukumyeka uDavide abulawe ngamaFilistiya."
1Samuel18:26 Abakhonzi bakhe bamxelela uDavide loo mazwi; uDavide wakuvuyela ukuba ngumyeni kukumkani, zibe zingekapheli iintsuku."
1Samuel18:27 Waphuma ke uDavide, wahamba, yena namadoda akhe, wabulala kumaFilisti amakhulu amabini amadoda; uDavide wazizisa iintsuba zabo, bamxelela ukumkani zonke iindaba ezo, ukuze abe ngumyeni kukumkani. uSawule wamnika ke uMikali intombi yakhe, yangumkakhe."
1Samuel18:28 Wakubona uSawule, wakwazi ukuba uYehova ebenoDavide, nokuba uMikali, intombi kaSawule, ubemthanda."
1Samuel18:29 uSawule wamoyika okunye uDavide; yaye uSawule waba lutshaba lukaDavide kuyo yonke indawo.
1Samuel18:30 Zandula ke iinkosana zamaFilisti zemka, yaye emva kokuba zihambile, uDavide waqhubeka esenza ngengqiqo ngaphezu kwabo bonke abakhonzi bakaSawule; ukuze igama lakhe libe likhulu."
1Samuel19:1 Wathetha uSawule kuYonatan, unyana wakhe, nakubakhonzi bakhe bonke, ukuba bambulale uDavide."
1Samuel19:2 uYonatan unyana kaSawule ubekholekile kunene kuDavide; uYonatan wamxelela uDavide, esithi, Uyise uSawule ufuna ukukubulala."
1Samuel19:3 Mna ndiya kuphuma ndime nobawo endle, apho ukhona, ndithethe ngawe kubawo; kwaye endikubonayo ndiya kukuxelela."
1Samuel19:4 uYonatan wathetha okulungileyo ngoDavide kuSawule uyise, wathi kuye, uYehova makangoni kumkhonzi wakhe uDavide; ngokuba akonanga kuwe, nangenxa yokuba imisebenzi yakhe ibilungile kakhulu kuwe."
1Samuel19:5 Wawunikela umphefumlo wakhe esandleni sakhe, wambulala umFilisti. uYehova wawazisa usindiso olukhulu amaSirayeli onke; wabona, wavuya; Yini na ukuba ube netyala legazi elimsulwa, ngokubulala nje uDavide?"
1Samuel19:6 Waliphulaphula uSawule ilizwi likaYonatan, wafunga uSawule, wathi, Ova uYehova akayi kubulawa."
1Samuel19:7 uYonatan wambiza uDavide, uYonatan wamxelela la mazwi onke. uYonatan wamzisa uDavide kuSawule, wahlala ecaleni kwakhe njengangaphambili."
1Samuel19:8 Kwabuya kwabakho imfazwe, waphuma uDavide, walwa namaFilisti, wawabulala kakhulu; asaba ebusweni bakhe."
1Samuel19:9 Umoya ombi kaYehova wamfikela uSawule ehleli endlwini yakhe, ephethe umkhonto ngesandla, ebetha uDavide ngesandla sakhe."
1Samuel19:10 uSawule wazama ukumxhoma ngentshuntshe uDavide eludongeni; Wesuka ebusweni bukaSawule, waluhlaba udonga ngomkhonto wakhe; Wasaba ke uDavide ngobo busuku."
1Samuel19:11 Wabuya uSawule wathumela abathunywa endlwini kaDavide ukuba bamlinde, bambulale kusasa; uMikale, umkaDavide, wamxelela, wathi, Ukuba uthe akwawusindisa umphefumlo wakho ngobu busuku, wobulawa ngomso."
1Samuel19:12 uMikayeli wamhlisa uDavide ngefestile, wasaba, wasaba."
1Samuel19:13 Emva koko uMigale wawuthabatha umfanekiso womfanekiso wawubeka phezu kwebhedi waza wabeka umqamelo woboya bebhokhwe phezu kwelaphu lawo waza wawugubungela ngelaphu.
1Samuel19:14 uSawule wasusa abathunywa ukuba baye kumphuthuma uDavide, wathi yena, Uyafa."
1Samuel19:15 uSawule waphinda wathuma abathunywa ukuba baye kubona uDavide, esithi, Mziseni kum ngokhuko, ndimbulale."
1Samuel19:16 Bakungena abathunywa, bawubona umfanekiso lowo usemandlalweni, nomqamelo woboya bebhokhwe engutyeni yawo."
1Samuel19:17 Wathi uSawule kuMikali: “Kutheni na ukuba undixokise ngolu hlobo, ulundulule utshaba lwam, lwasinda lona? uMikali wamphendula uSawule, wathi, Wathi yena kum, Ndiyeke ndihambe; kutheni ndikubulale."
1Samuel19:18 Ebalekile uDavide, wasinda, waya kuSamuweli eRama, wamxelela konke abekwenzile uSawule kuye. Wahamba ke yena noSamuweli, baya bahlala eNayoti."
1Samuel19:19 Waxelelwa uSawule, kwathiwa, Nanku uDavide eNayoti ngaseRama."
1Samuel19:20 uSawule wasusa abathunywa ukuba baye kumphuthuma uDavide; Babona into eninzi yabaprofeti iprofeta, inguSamuweli phezu kwabo, wehla uMoya kaThixo phezu kwabathunywa bakaSawule, baprofeta kananjalo nabo."
1Samuel19:21 Waxelelwa uSawule, wasusa abanye abathunywa, baprofeta kwangokunjalo naye. uSawule waphinda wathuma abathunywa okwesithathu, baprofeta kananjalo nabo."
1Samuel19:22 Naye waya eRama, wafika equleni elikhulu laseSegu; wabuza wathi, Baphi na ooSamuweli noDavide? Wathi omnye, Khangela, baneNayoti, iRama."
1Samuel19:23 Waya apho uNayoti eRama, yaye umoya kaThixo waba phezu kwakhe, yaye waqhubeka eprofeta de waya kufika eNayoti eRama."
1Samuel19:24 Wazikhulula naye iingubo zakhe, waprofeta kwangokunjalo phambi koSamuweli, walala eze imini yonke, nobusuku bonke. Bathi ke, Ungomnye wabaprofeti noSawule na?"
1Samuel20:1 Wabaleka uDavide eNayoti ngaseRama, weza, wathi kuYonatan, Ndenze ntoni na? yintoni ingxaki yam Siyini na isono sam phambi koyihlo, ukuba ufuna ukundibulala?"
1Samuel20:2 Wathi kuye, Hayi, Thixo; aniyi kufa; yabona, ubawo akazange enze nantoni na enkulu, nokuba incinci, amazise; kanti ubawo ungandifihlela lo mcimbi? Akunjalo."
1Samuel20:3 Wabuya wafunga uDavide, esithi, Uyihlo uyazi okunene, ngokuba ndinenceba kuwe; Wathi, Makangazi uYonatan, hleze abe buhlungu; kodwa eneneni ngoYehova ophilayo nomphefumlo wakho uphila, linyathelo elinye kuphela phakathi kwam nokufa."
1Samuel20:4 Wathi uYonatan kuDavide, Yonke into oyibizayo umphefumlo wakho, ndoyenza kuwe."
1Samuel20:5 Wathi uDavide kuYonatan, Yabona, iya kuthwasa inyanga ngomso; ndindulule ndiye kuzifihla endle, kude kuhlwe ngomhla wesithathu."
1Samuel20:6 Ukuba uyihlo uthe wandifuna, wothi wena, Ucele wandibongoza uDavide ukuba ndihambe, ndibaleke ndiye eBhetelehem kowabo; ngokuba kukho umbingelelo womnyaka wemizalwane yonke;"
1Samuel20:7 Ukuba uthe, Kulungile; Umkhonzi wakho lo uya kuba seluxolweni; ke ukuba uthe wavutha kakhulu ngumsindo, yazi ukuba ucebe ububi."
1Samuel20:8 Ngoko ke, menzele inceba umkhonzi wakho; ngokuba umngenise emnqophisweni kaYehova umkhonzi wakho lo nawe; ngoba ungathini ukundisa kuyihlo?"
1Samuel20:9 Wathi uYonatan, Makube lee kuwe; ukuba ndibe ndibazi ububi acinga ukukwehlela ubawo, ndinge ndixelelwe na?"
1Samuel20:10 Wathi uDavide kuYonatan, Ngubani na oya kundixelela ezi zinto? okanye kuthekani ukuba uyihlo ukuphendule ngelizwi elikhulu?"
1Samuel20:11 Wathi uYonatan kuDavide, Hamba siye ezweni. Baphuma bobabini baya emaphandleni."
1Samuel20:12 Wathi uYonatan kuDavide, Yehova, Thixo kaSirayeli, ukuba ndithe ndambiza ubawo ngomso nokuba ngowesithathu umhla, ndaza ndabona ukuba ulungile uDavide, andathumela kuwe ukuba ndikubonise oko;"
1Samuel20:13 Wenjenjalo uYehova kuYonatan, ongezelele; ukuba ubawo uthe wafuna ukunenza okubi, ndonazisa, ndinikhulule, nihambe ninoxolo; uYehova abe nawe, njengokuba ebenobawo."
1Samuel20:14 Aniyi kundenzela nceba uYehova ndisadla ubomi nje, ukuze ndingafi."
1Samuel20:15 Kodwa ubabalo lwakho aluyi kucima endlwini yam ngonaphakade;
1Samuel20:16 Wanqophisana ke uYonatan nendlu kaDavide, esithi, uYehova makawanikele esandleni seentshaba zikaDavide."
1Samuel20:17 Waphinda uYonatan ukumfungela uDavide ngokumthanda kwakhe, ngokuba ebemthanda njengomphefumlo wakhe."
1Samuel20:18 Wathi uYonatan kuDavide, Ngomso iya kuphuma inyanga, usweleke, ngokuba isihlalo sakho siya kuba sodwa."
1Samuel20:19 Ukuba nithe nahlala iintsuku ezintathu, khawulezani nihle, nize kuloo ndawo ubuzimele kuyo, lisaqhubeka elo lizwi, uhlale ngasetyeni le-esile;"
1Samuel20:20 Ndiza kutolela ecaleni kwalo iintolo zibe ntathu, ngokungathi ndizidubula ngaxeshanye."
1Samuel20:21 Yabona, ndiya kuthuma umfana, wathi, Hamba uye kuzifuna iintolo. Ukuba ndithe kwinkwenkwe, Nanzo iintolo zingaphaya kwakho, zithabathe; uze ke, ngokuba uxolo lunawe, akukho ngozi; NgoYehova ophilileyo."
1Samuel20:22 Ke ukuba ndithe kwindodana leyo, Nanzo iintolo zingaphaya kwakho; hamba, ngokuba uYehova ukuthumile."
1Samuel20:23 Ke yona into esiyithethileyo mna nawe, yabona, uYehova uphakathi kwam nawe kude kuse ephakadeni."
1Samuel20:24 uDavide wamngcwabela entsimini, kwathi ekuphumeni kwenyanga, wahlala ukumkani ukuba adle ukudla."
1Samuel20:25 Ukumkani wahlala esihlalweni sakhe, njengokwangaphambili, esitulweni esingaseludongeni;"
1Samuel20:26 Akathetha nto uSawule ngaloo mini, ngokuba wathi: “Uhlelwe yinto embi, akahlambulukanga; Ngokuqinisekileyo akacocekanga."
1Samuel20:27 Kwathi ngengomso, ngomhla wesibini wenyanga, ayaba namntu indawo kaDavide. Wathi uSawule kuYonatan unyana wakhe, Yini na ukuba angezanga kudla unyana kaYese izolo nanamhlanje?"
1Samuel20:28 uYonatan wamphendula uSawule, wathi, uDavide ucele ngokunyamekileyo ukuba ndiye eBhetelehem;"
1Samuel20:29 Wathi, Ndindulule, ngokuba kukho umbingelelo wemizalwane yakowethu ekhaya; wandiwisela umthetho ke umkhuluwa wam, wathi, Mandiye kubona abazalwana bam ngoko, ukuba ndibabalwe nguwe kutheni angezi etafileni yokumkani."
1Samuel20:30 uSawule wavutha ngumsindo kuYonatan, wathi kuye, Nyanandini wendoda engendawo, enenjubaqa, andazi na ukuba kutheni na ukunyula unyana kaYese ukuba abe ngumphangi wakho, nehlazo lokukreqa kukanyoko?"
1Samuel20:31 Kuba yonke imihla unyana kaYese aya kudla ubomi ngayo emhlabeni, wena nobukumkani bakho akuyi kuqiniseka. Thumela ngoko, umzise kum, ngokuba inene uya kufa."
1Samuel20:32 uYonatan wamphendula uSawule uyise, wathi kuye, Yini na ukuba ubulawe? nzeni."
1Samuel20:33 uSawule wamjula ngomkhonto ukuba amgwaze; waqonda uYonatan ukuba uyise uceba ukumbulala uDavide.
1Samuel20:34 Wema uYonatan etafileni enomsindo omkhulu; ukanti ngomhla wesibini wenyanga leyo, akadla kudla, ngokuba ubebuhlungu ngenxa kaDavide, ngokuba ebemhlazisile uyise."
1Samuel20:35 Kwathi kusasa, uYonatan waya ezweni ngexesha elimisiweyo noDavide, nenkwenkwe."
1Samuel20:36 Wathi kunyana wakhe, Gidima, uzikhangele iintolo endizixunayo. Yabaleka inkwenkwe leyo, yadubula utolo ecaleni kwayo."
1Samuel20:37 Wafika umfana endaweni abedla kuyo uYonatan, uYonatan wambiza umfana emva kwakhe, wathi, Nalo ngaphaya kwakho utolo?"
1Samuel20:38 Wamemeza uYonatan kumfana, wathi, Khawuleza, khawuleza, musa ukulibala. Unyana kaYonatan wathabatha iintolo, weza enkosini yakhe."
1Samuel20:39 Ke yena umntwana ubengazi nto; nguYonatan noDavide ababeyazi loo nto.
1Samuel20:40 uYonatan wamnika umpu wakhe unyana wakhe, wathi kuye, Hamba, ubasa kuwo umzi."
1Samuel20:41 Ekundulukeni kwenkwenkwe leyo, wema uDavide kwindawo engasemzantsi, yawa ngobuso yaza yaqubuda izihlandlo ezithathu;"
1Samuel20:42 Wathi uYonatan kuDavide, Hamba unoxolo, ngokuba safunga egameni likaYehova, sathi, uYehova makabe phakathi kwam nawe kude kuse ephakadeni, naphakathi koonyana bam noonyana bakho. Wemka uYonatan, wahamba, wangena uYonatan esixekweni."
1Samuel21:1 Weza uDavide kuAhimeleki, umbingeleli waseNobhi. uAhimeleki wagubha phambi koDavide, wathi kuye, Yintoni na le nto uhlala wedwa, ungenamntu?"
1Samuel21:2 Wathi uDavide kuAhimeleki, umbingeleli, uYehova undinike ilizwi, wathi kum, Makungabikho mntu uyaziyo le nto ndikuthumayo, ndikuwisele umthetho ngayo; ndabeka abakhonzi bam ndaweni ithile."
1Samuel21:3 Ngoko yintoni ephantsi kwengalo yakho? ndinike esandleni izonka ezihlanu, nokuba yintoni na ekhoyo."
1Samuel21:4 Umbingeleli wamphendula uDavide, wathi, Akukho sonka sisesandleni sam, sodwa esingcwele; ukuba abafana ubuncinane bahlala kude kubafazi."
1Samuel21:5 uDavide wamphendula umbingeleli, wathi kuye, Yinyaniso ukuba, ezi ntsuku zintathu ndiphumileyo, iinkazana bezingavumelekile kuthi, izitya zamadodana zingcwele, nesonka siyinto eqhelekileyo, noko kunjalo. Kunamhlanje ke isitya singcwaliswa."
1Samuel21:6 Umbingeleli wamnika izonka ezingcwele, ngokuba bekungekho zonka khona, ingesiso izonka zokubonisa, eziziswe phambi koYehova, ukuze kubekwe izonka ezishushu ngemini yokundululwa kwaso."
1Samuel21:7 Kwaye kukho omnye wakubakhonzi bakaSawule ngaloo mini, ebanjwe phambi koYehova; igama lakhe lalinguDowegi, umEdom, umthetheli wabalusi bakaSawule."
1Samuel21:8 Wathi uDavide kuAhimeleki, Ndathi, Akukho mkhonto nakrele esandleni sakho? kuba ikrele lam okanye izixhobo zam andilizisanga, ngenxa yokuba umsebenzi kakumkani wawungxamisekile."
1Samuel21:9 Wathi umbingeleli, Ikrele likaGoliyati umFilisti, owambeyisa entilini kaEla, nali emva kwengubo ende egxalabeni; ukuba uyafuna ukulithabatha, lithabathe; kuba akukho mntu apha. Wathi uDavide, Akunjalo; Yinike mna."
1Samuel21:10 Wabaleka uDavide kwangaloo mini ngenxa yokoyika uSawule, waya kuAkishe, ukumkani waseGati."
1Samuel21:11 Bathi kuye abakhonzi baka-Akishe, Lo asinguye na uDavide ukumkani wehlabathi? Abavumanga ngaye na, besithi, uSawule ubulele amawaka akhe, uDavide ubulele amawaka akhe?"
1Samuel21:12 uDavide wawabeka la mazwi entliziyweni yakhe, wamoyika kunene uAkishe ukumkani waseGati."
1Samuel21:13 Waziguqula iindlela zakhe phambi kwabo, wazenza isidenge esandleni sabo, wazonwaya iingcango zesango, wawatshicela ezindevini zakhe."
1Samuel21:14 Wathi uAkishe kubakhonzi bakhe, Khangelani, niyabona ukuba le ndoda isisihiba; Khona kutheni nimzisa kum?"
1Samuel21:15 Ndiswele impambano na, le nto niyizise le ndoda phambi kwam? Izakungena endlini yam landoda?"
1Samuel22:1 Wemka apho ke uDavide, wabalekela emqolombeni waseAdulam; Beva abazalwana bakhe nendlu yakhe yonke, behla baya kuye."
1Samuel22:2 Abuthelana kuye onke amadoda abandezelekileyo, namadoda onke anamatyala, namadoda angahluthanga; waba ngumlawuli wabo, ekunye namadoda akumakhulu amane."
1Samuel22:3 Wemka apho ke uDavide, waya eMizpe yakwaMowabhi, wathi kukumkani wakwaMowabhi, Ubawo noma makaphume ahlale nawe, ndide ndiyazi into aya kundenzela yona uThixo."
1Samuel22:4 Wabazisa phambi kokumkani wakwaMowabhi, bahlala naye yonke imihla abesemboniselweni uDavide entabeni."
1Samuel22:5 Wathi umprofeti uGadi kuDavide, Musa ukuhlala endaweni yonqaba ezintabeni; hamba, uye ezweni lakwaYuda. Emva koko uDavide wemka waya kwihlathi laseHereti."
1Samuel22:6 Xa uSawule wevayo ukuba uDavide namadoda awayekunye naye bafikile, ngoko uSawule wahlala eGibheya phantsi komthi weRama, ephethe umkhonto wakhe esandleni sakhe, nabo bonke abakhonzi bakhe bemi ngakuye."
1Samuel22:7 Wathi uSawule kubakhonzi bakhe ababemi ngakuye, Phulaphulani, maBhenjamin! Unyana kaYese uya kuninika elowo amasimi nezidiliya, animise nonke nibe ngabathetheli-waka nabathetheli-makhulu;"
1Samuel22:8 ngenxa enokuba ninditshabhise nje nonke, kungekho namnye undixeleleyo ukuba unyana wam uzimase unyana kaYese, akwabakho namnye uvelana nam, engandixelelanga ukuba ukhuliswe ngunyana wam. Undivukile ke umkhonzi, ukuze akrobe njenganamhla?"
1Samuel22:9 Wathi uDowegi umEdom, obephethe abakhonzi bakaSawule, Ndimbonile unyana kaYese eNobhi, kuAhimeleki, unyana ka-Ahitubhi."
1Samuel22:10 Wambuza kuYehova, wamnika ukudla, wamnika nekrele likaGoliyati umFilisti."
1Samuel22:11 Wathumela ukumkani, wambiza uAhimeleki unyana ka-Ahitubhi, umbingeleli, nendlu yonke kayise, ababingeleli ababeseNobhe; beza bonke kukumkani."
1Samuel22:12 Wathi uSawule: “Phulaphula, nyana ka-Ahitubhi! Waphendula ke yena wathi, Ndikho, nkosi yam."
1Samuel22:13 Wathi uSawule kuye, Yini na ukuba undithande, wena nonyana kaYese, umnike isonka nekrele, uthandaze kuThixo ukuba andivuse, ndilale? linda, njenganamhlanje?"
1Samuel22:14 uAhimeleki wamphendula ukumkani, wathi, Ngubani na kubakhonzi bakho bonke othembeke njengoDavide, umyeni wokumkani, ohamba ngokwesiko lakho, ozukileyo endlwini yakho?"
1Samuel22:15 Ndaqala na ngoko ukumbuza kuThixo? Ukumkani makangathwali nto umkhonzi wakhe, nakwindlu yonke kabawo, ngokuba umkhonzi wakho ebengazi nto ngayo, nokuba kuncinane."
1Samuel22:16 Wathi ukumkani, Uya kufa, Ahimeleki, wena nendlu yakho yonke."
1Samuel22:17 Wathi ukumkani kwababemi ngeenyawo nabamlindile, Jikani, nibabulale ababingeleli bakaYehova; ngokuba nesabo isandla siphezu koDavide, nangokuba babesazi oko wabalekayo yena, bengandazisanga. Kodwa abakhonzi bakakumkani bala ukolula izandla zabo ukuze balwe nababingeleli bakaYehova."
1Samuel22:18 Wathi ukumkani kuDowegi, Jika, uxabele ababingeleli. Wajika uDoege wakwaEdom, wababulala ababingeleli, wabulala amashumi asibhozo anababini abantu ngaloo mini, bambethe ilinen emhlophe."
1Samuel22:19 NoNobhe isixeko sababingeleli wayibulala ngohlangothi lwekrele, amadoda nabafazi, abantwana neentsana, iinkomo, amaesile nezimvu ngohlangothi lwekrele."
1Samuel22:20 Omnye woonyana baka-Ahimeleki unyana ka-Akitubhi, ogama linguAbhiyatare, wasinda waza wabaleka emva koDavide."
1Samuel22:21 uAbhiyatare wamxelela uDavide ukuba uSawule ubabulele ababingeleli bakaYehova.
1Samuel22:22 Wathi uDavide kuAbhiyatare, Bendisazi kwangaloo mini, ukuba, ekho nje uDowegi umEdom, uya kuthi kanye kuSawule, Ndibabulele bonke abantu bendlu kayihlo."
1Samuel22:23 Hlala nam, musa ukoyika; ngokuba ofuna umphefumlo wam ufuna umphefumlo wakho; kodwa ngam niya kusindiswa."
1Samuel23:1 Kwaxelwa kuDavide, kwathiwa, Nanga amaFilisti ehlasela iKehila, ephanga amasimi."
1Samuel23:2 Wabuza uDavide kuYehova, wathi, Ndiye na ndiwabulale laa maFilisti? Wathi uYehova kuDavide, Hamba uye kuwaxabela amaFilisti, usindise iKehila."
1Samuel23:3 Athi amadoda kaDavide kuye, Nanku thina sisoyika, sikwaYuda apha; Singangena njani eKehila siye kuhlasela imikhosi yamaFilisti?"
1Samuel23:4 uDavide waphinda wabuza kuYehova. uYehova wamphendula, wathi, Yihla uye eKehila; kuba ndiya kuwanikela amaFilisti esandleni sakho."
1Samuel23:5 uDavide namadoda akhe baya eKehila, bawaxabela amaFilisti, bayithimba imfuyo yawo, bawabulala kakhulu. Wabasindisa ke uDavide abantu baseKehila."
1Samuel23:6 Xa uAbhiyatare, unyana ka-Ahimeleki, wabalekayo ukulandela uDavide eKehila, wehla eneqhiya egxalabeni."
1Samuel23:7 Waxelelwa uSawule, ukuba uDavide ufikile eKehila. Wathi uSawule, uThixo umnikele esandleni sam; ngokuba nizalwa ngokungena emzini onamasango nezitrato."
1Samuel23:8 Wabahlanganisa uSawule bonke abantu ukuba balwe, behle baye eKehila, bangqinge uDavide namadoda akhe."
1Samuel23:9 Wazi uDavide ukuba uSawule ubemqhathe ngasese; Wathi kuAbhiyatare umbingeleli, Zisa iefodi apha."
1Samuel23:10 Wathi uDavide, Yehova, Thixo kaSirayeli, uvile ngenene umkhonzi wakho, ukuba uSawule ufuna ukuza eKehila, ukuba awonakalise umzi ngenxa yam."
1Samuel23:11 Amadoda aseKehila aya kundinikela na esandleni sakhe? Uya kuhla na uSawule njengoko evile umkhonzi wakho? Yehova, Thixo kaSirayeli, mxelele umkhonzi wakho. Wathi uYehova: Uya kuhla."
1Samuel23:12 Wathi uDavide, Amadoda aseKehila andinikela na mna namadoda am esandleni sikaSawule? Wathi uYehova, Baya kukunikela esandleni sakho."
1Samuel23:13 Emva koko wesuka uDavide namadoda akhe, abantu abamalunga namakhulu amathandathu, besuka eKehila, bahamba naphi na apho babesiya khona. Waxelelwa uSawule, ukuba uDavide ubalekile eKehila; woyisakala ke ukuphuma."
1Samuel23:14 uDavide wahlala entlango ezimboniselweni, wahlala entabeni eyintlango yeZifi. uSawule wamkhangela yonke imihla, kodwa uThixo akamnikela esandleni sakhe."
1Samuel23:15 Wabona uDavide ukuba uSawule uphume eza kufuna umphefumlo wakhe; uDavide wayesentlango yeZifi entshinyeleni yehlathi.
1Samuel23:16 Wesuka uYonatan, unyana kaSawule, waya kuDavide entshinyeleni yehlathi, wasomeleza isandla sakhe kuThixo."
1Samuel23:17 Wathi kuye, Musa ukoyika, ngokuba isandla sikaSawule ubawo asiyi kukufumana; Wena uya kuba ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli, mna ndibe nawe; ukanti uSawule uyise uyayazi le nto."
1Samuel23:18 Benza umnqophiso bobabini phambi koYehova, waza uDavide wahlala ehlathini, waza uYonatan waya endlwini yakhe."
1Samuel23:19 Benyuka abaseZifi, baya kuSawule eGibheha, bathi, uDavide akazizimeze kuthi na ezimboniselweni zehlathi, endulini yeHagila, ngasezantsi kweYesimon?"
1Samuel23:20 Kaloku, kumkani, yihla ngokomnqweno wonke womphefumlo wakho; kwaye isabelo sethu siya kuba kukumnikela esandleni sokumkani."
1Samuel23:21 Wathi uSawule, uYehova makakusikelele; ngokuba undenzele inceba."
1Samuel23:22 Yiyani nilungise, nikhangele, nibone apho ahlala khona, nokuba ngubani na owambona khona; kuba ndixelelwe ukuba unobuqhophololo."
1Samuel23:23 Nikhangele, nibone zonke iindawo zokuzimela, aya kuzimela kuzo, nize nibuyele kum okunene; ndohamba nani; yaye ukuba ukho ehlabathini, ndiya kumkhangela phakathi kwawo onke amawaka akwaYuda."
1Samuel23:24 Bagqiba ke bamrhola uSawule, bamsa eZifi; uDavide namadoda akhe wayesentlango yeMahon, ezantsi kweYesmon."
1Samuel23:25 Wahamba uSawule namadoda akhe ukuya kumfuna. Kwaxelwa kuDavide, kwathiwa, Wehla ke waya encotsheni yengxondorha, wahlala entlango yeMahon. Weva uSawule, wamsukela uDavide entlango yeMahon."
1Samuel23:26 Wesuka uSawule waya kwelinye icala lentaba; waphuma uDavide namadoda akhe, baya nganeno kwentaba; ngokuba uSawule namadoda akhe babemrhawula uDavide namadoda akhe, ukuba bababambe."
1Samuel23:27 Weza umthunywa kuSawule, wathi, Akofa, yiza; ngokuba amaFilisti abelingenele ilizwe."
1Samuel23:28 Wabuya ke uSawule ekusukeleni uDavide, waya kuwakhawulela amaFilisti; ngoko ke, loo ndawo bayibiza ngokuba yiSelaama-Hlekoti."
1Samuel23:29 Wemka apho uDavide, wahlala ezinqabeni zase-Engedi."
1Samuel24:1 Wabuya uSawule kumaFilisti, waxelelwa, kwathiwa, Nanku uDavide entlango yase-Engedi."
1Samuel24:2 Wandula ke uSawule wathabatha amadoda angamawaka amathathu awayenyulwe kuSirayeli wonke waza waya kufuna uDavide namadoda akhe emaweni eebhokhwe zelizwe.
1Samuel24:3 Wafika ezibayeni zempahla emfutshane, ngasendleleni, kukho umqolomba apho; Wangena uSawule ukuba agubungele iinyawo zakhe, waza uDavide namadoda akhe bahlala emqolombeni."
1Samuel24:4 Athi amadoda kaDavide kuye, Nantsi imini, athe uYehova kuwe, Yabona, ndiya kulunikela utshaba lwakho esandleni sakho, wenze ngokokuthanda kwakho. Wesuka wema uDavide, wayinqumla ngasese ingubo yokwaleka yengubo kaSawule."
1Samuel24:5 Emva koko, intliziyo kaDavide yaqhubeka ibetha, ngenxa yokuba wayesikile isambatho sangaphezulu sikaSawule."
1Samuel24:6 Wathi kumadoda akhe, Ngamana uYehova angandinqanda, ndiyenze le nto enkosini yam, umthanjiswa kaYehova, ndisise isandla sam kuye, ngokuba ndingothanjisiweyo kaYehova."
1Samuel24:7 uDavide wabanqanda ngaloo mazwi abakhonzi bakhe, akabavumela ukuba basukele kuSawule. Wemka uSawule emqolombeni, wemka."
1Samuel24:8 Wemka naye uDavide, waphuma emqolombeni, wabiza uSawule emva kwakhe, wathi, Nkosi yam, nkosi yam! Wathi uSawule akukhangela ngasemva, uDavide wathoba, waqubuda ngobuso emhlabeni."
1Samuel24:9 Wathi uDavide kuSawule, Yini na ukuba uwaphulaphule amazwi akho athi, Nanku uDavide efuna ukukwenzakalisa?"
1Samuel24:10 Yabona, namhlanje amehlo akho abonile ukuba uYehova ebekunikele namhla esandleni sam emqolombeni; abanye bathi mandikubulale; Ndathi, Andiyi kusolula isandla sam enkosini yam; ngokuba engumthanjiswa kaYehova."
1Samuel24:11 Kananjalo, Bawo, khangela, nawu umqukumbelo wengubo yakho esandleni sam; ngenxa enokuba ndiwunqumle umsonto wengubo yakho, andakubulala; yazi wena, wabona ukuba akukho bubi nabugwenxa esandleni sam, andonanga kuwe; ke nifuna umphefumlo wam, ukuba niwuthabathe."
1Samuel24:12 uYehova uya kugweba phakathi kwam nani, uYehova andibuyisele kuni; ke isandla sam asiyi kuba phezu kwakho."
1Samuel24:13 Njengoko litshoyo iqhalo lakudala ukuthi, Okungendawo kuphuma kongendawo; ke isandla sam asikwazi ukulwa nabo."
1Samuel24:14 Uvela kubani na ukumkani wakwaSirayeli? uleqa bani? kwinja efileyo, ukuyibiza."
1Samuel24:15 uYehova makabe ngumgwebi nomgwebi phakathi kwam nawe, akhangele, andithethelele etyaleni lam, andisindise esandleni senu."
1Samuel24:16 Wagqiba uDavide ukuwathetha la mazwi kuSawule, wathi uSawule, Lilizwi lakho na elo, Davide, nyana wam? Waliphakamisa uSawule ilizwi lakhe, walila."
1Samuel24:17 Wathi kuDavide, Ulilungisa wena kunam, ngokuba undenze okulungileyo wena, ndakwenza okubi mna;"
1Samuel24:18 Wena ubonisile namhla ukuba undenze okulungileyo, ngenxa yokuba ungandibulalanga ekundinikeleni kwam uYehova esandleni sakho."
1Samuel24:19 Ukuba umntu uthe walufumana utshaba lwakhe, wolukhulula na? uya kukubuyekeza uYehova ngenxa yento oyenzileyo kum namhla."
1Samuel24:20 Kaloku yabona, ndiyazi ukuba uya kuba ngukumkani, bume esandleni sakho ubukumkani bakwaSirayeli."
1Samuel24:21 Ndifungele ke uYehova, ukuba akuyi kuyitshabalalisa imbewu yam emva kwam, nokuba akuyi kulitshabalalisa igama lam endlwini kabawo;"
1Samuel24:22 uDavide wamfungela uSawule. Wagoduka uSawule; kodwa uDavide namadoda akhe benyuka baya kwindawo enqatyisiweyo ezintabeni.
1Samuel25:1 Wafa uSamuweli; yaye bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli bahlanganisana baza bamzilela baza bamngcwabela endlwini yakhe eRama. Wagqiba ke uDavide, wehla waya entlango yaseParan."
1Samuel25:2 Ke kaloku bekukho indoda yaseMahone, obutyebi bakhe buseKarmele; indoda leyo yayinkulu kakhulu, ineegusha ezingamawaka amathathu, neebhokhwe eziliwaka; waye echeba iigusha zakhe eKarmele."
1Samuel25:3 Igama laloo ndoda lalinguNabhali; igama lomkayo nguAbhigali; waye engumfazi onengqondo entle, ebukekayo; waye engowendlu kaKalebhi."
1Samuel25:4 Weva uDavide entlango ukuba uNabhali ucheba iigusha zakhe.
1Samuel25:5 uDavide wesusa ishumi lamadodana, wathi uDavide kumadodana akhe, Nyukani niye eKarmele, niye kuNabhali, nibulise egameni lam."
1Samuel25:6 Nize nithi kulowo uphumeleleyo, Uxolo malube nawe, uxolo malube nawe, uxolo malube nawe, uxolo malube nayo yonke into onayo."
1Samuel25:7 Ndivile ngoku ukuba unabahlobo; Ke kaloku, abalusi bakho ababenathi, asibenzanga nto, abaswelanga nto yonke imihla yokuba seKarmele kwabo."
1Samuel25:8 Buza kumadodana akho, okuxelela; Makababalwe nguwe abafana emehlweni akho; ngokuba siza ngemini elungileyo; Konke okusesandleni sakho ubanike abakhonzi bakho nonyana wakho uDavide."
1Samuel25:9 Afika amadodana kaDavide, amxelela uNabhali onke loo mazwi egameni likaDavide, ayeka."
1Samuel25:10 uNabhali wabaphendula abakhonzi bakaDavide, wathi, Ngubani na yena uDavide? Ngubani na unyana kaYese? kule mihla baninzi abakhonzi abaqhatha elowo enkosini yakhe."
1Samuel25:11 Ngoku ke ndiya kuthabatha isonka sam, namanzi am, nenyama yam, endayibingelelayo kubachebi bam, ndiyinike abantu endingabaziyo apho baphuma khona?"
1Samuel25:12 Ajika ke amadodana kaDavide, abuya, amxelela loo mazwi onke."
1Samuel25:13 Wathi uDavide kumadoda akhe, Thabathani elowo ikrele lakhe. Babhinqa elowo ikrele lakhe; Naye uDavide wabhinqa ikrele lakhe, waza walandela uDavide, malunga namadoda angamakhulu amana kwasala amakhulu amabini kwabalungileyo."
1Samuel25:14 Ke kaloku uAbhigali, umkaNabhali, waxelelwa yindodana ethile kumadodana akhe, yathi, Yabona, uDavide ususe abathunywa entlango, ukuba beze kusikelela ukumkani wethu; wabaqalekisa."
1Samuel25:15 Kodwa loo madoda ayesenza okulungileyo kunene kuthi, yaye akazange asenze bubi, yaye asizange siswele nto ngoxa sasisendle."
1Samuel25:16 Yayiludonga kuthi, imini nobusuku, yonke imihla esasinabo, sisaluse izimvu."
1Samuel25:17 Yazi ngoku, uyinyamekele into oyenzayo; kuba eneneni ububi bufikela ukumkani wethu nendlu yakhe yonke, ekubeni engunyana kaBheliyali ekungekho bani uya kuthetha naye."
1Samuel25:18 Wakhawuleza ke uAbhigali, wathabatha amakhulu amabini ezonka, neendebe zambini zewayini, neegusha zantlanu ezilungisiweyo, neeseha zantlanu zengqolowa egcadiweyo, nekhulu lezicumba zeerasintyisi, nekhulu lezonka zamakhiwane zazibini, wazibeka emaesileni."
1Samuel25:19 Wathi kubakhonzi bakhe, Gqithelani phambi kwam; uyabona, ndiya kukulandela. Kodwa akazange ayixelele indoda yakhe uNabhali."
1Samuel25:20 Ekhwele iesile, wehla waya endaweni yokuzimela endulini, wabona uDavide namadoda akhe besihla besiza kumkhawulela; waqubisana nabo."
1Samuel25:21 Wathi uDavide, Ndifumane ndafumana, ndakuba ndizigcine zonke izinto enazo entlango, kungalahleki nto entweni yonke yakhe; wandibuyisela ububi bam ngokulungileyo."
1Samuel25:22 uThixo uya kwenza oku ngakumbi kwiintshaba zikaDavide, ukuba ngenye intsasa nditshisa ngomlilo yonke into anayo."
1Samuel25:23 uAbhigali wambona uDavide, wakhawuleza wakhwela e-esileni, wawa ngobuso phambi koDavide, waqubuda."
1Samuel25:24 Waza waziphosa phantsi ezinyaweni zakhe waza wathi: “Makube phezu kwam obu bubi, nkosi yam, yaye umkhonzazana wakho makabuthethe phambi kwabaphulaphuli bakho” uweve amazwi omkhonzazana wakho."
1Samuel25:25 Inkosi yam mayingakhe inikele ingqalelo kulo mntu ulitshijolo, uNabhali, ngenxa yokuba njengoko linjalo igama lakhe, unjalo; Igama lakhe nguNabhali, unebudenge; Ke mna mkhonzi wakho, andibabonanga abafana benkosi yam, obuwathumele."
1Samuel25:26 Kaloku, nkosi yam, ehleli nje uYehova, uhleli nje umphefumlo wakho, ekubeni uYehova ekwawisele umthetho wokuba uphalaze igazi, uziphindezelele ngesandla sakho; zifuneni kaloku iintshaba zenu, nabenzi bobubi, uYehova wam, njengoNabhali."
1Samuel25:27 Ngoko le ntsikelelo, ayizisileyo umkhonzazana wakho enkosini yam, mayinikwe amadodana alandela inkosi yam."
1Samuel25:28 Uze umxolele umkhonzi wakho ukreqo lwakhe; ngokuba, inene, uYehova uya kuyakhela inkosi yam indlu eqinileyo; ngokuba inkosi yam ilwa iimfazwe zikaYehova; ububi abuyi kufunyanwa kuwe yonke imihla yakho."
1Samuel25:29 Wesuka umntu, wakusukela, wawufuna umphefumlo wakho; ke wona umphefumlo wenkosi yam wobotshwa esiqhumeni sabahleli kuYehova uThixo wakho; yaye niya kuyilahla imiphefumlo yeentshaba zenu ngokungathi ivela esazulwini somhlaba."
1Samuel25:30 Emveni kokuba uYehova wenze enkosini yam konke okulungileyo, awakuthethileyo kuwe, wakumisa ukuba ube yinganga yakwaSirayeli;"
1Samuel25:31 makungabikho kuwe ukuba buhlungu okanye ube nengqumbo entliziyweni yakho ngenxa yenkosi yam ngokuphalaza igazi ngaphandle kwesizathu okanye ukuziphindezela kwenkosi yam; ukuba uYehova wenze okulungileyo enkosini yam, womkhumbula umkhonzi wakho."
1Samuel25:32 Wathi uDavide kuAbhigali, Makabongwe uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, okuthumileyo namhla, wandikhawulela."
1Samuel25:33 Malibongwe icebo lakho, ubongwe wena ondaleleyo namhla ukuba ndiphalaze igazi, nokuphindezelela ngesandla sam."
1Samuel25:34 Kuba ehleli uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ondithinteleyo ukuba ndingenzi nto imbi kuwe, ukuba ubungangxamanga uze kundikhawulela, ange engathanga uNabhali kusasa, angamohlwayanga uYehova idonga."
1Samuel25:35 uDavide wayiphatha esandleni sakhe loo nto abemzisile, wathi kuye, Nyuka unoxolo, uye endlwini yakho; uyabona, ndiliphulaphule izwi lakho, ndasithabatha isimo sakho."
1Samuel25:36 Waya ke uAbhigali kuNabhali; nanko enesidlo endlwini yakhe, njengesidlo sokumkani; intliziyo kaNabhali yayichwayitile phakathi kwakhe, enxila kunene ke ngoko, makangamxeleli nto, nokuba ingako, kude kube kusasa."
1Samuel25:37 Kwathi kusasa, ukuphuma kwewayini kuNabhali nomkakhe, yamxelela loo nto, yafa intliziyo yakhe phakathi kwakhe, waba lilitye."
1Samuel25:38 Emva kweentsuku ezimalunga neshumi, uYehova wambulala uNabhali kangangokuba wafa."
1Samuel25:39 Weva uDavide ukuba uNabhali ufile, wathi: “Makabongwe uYehova oye wakhusela ungcikivo lukaNabhal nomkhonzi wakhe ebubini; ngenxa yokuba ububi bukaNabhali busentlokweni yakhe. Emva koko uDavide wathumela kuAbhigali ukuba amthabathe abe ngumfazi wakhe."
1Samuel25:40 Bafika abakhonzi bakaDavide kuAbhigali eKarmele, bathetha kuye, bathi, uDavide usithume kuwe ukuba akuthabathe, ube ngumkakhe."
1Samuel25:41 Wesuka wema, waqubuda ngobuso, wathi, Yabona, umkhonzazana wakho makabe ngumkhonzi wokuhlamba iinyawo zabakhonzi benkosi yam."
1Samuel25:42 Wesuka ngokukhawuleza uAbhigali, wakhwela e-esileni; wabalandela abathunywa bakaDavide, waba ngumkakhe."
1Samuel25:43 uDavide wathabatha uAkinowam waseYizereli; baba ngabafazi bakhe bobabini nabo.
1Samuel25:44 Ke uSawule wamnika uPalti, unyana kaLayishe waseGalim, intombi yakhe, uMikali, umkaDavide."
1Samuel26:1 Beza abaseZifi kuSawule eGibheha, bathi, Bendisithi na, uDavide uzimele endulini yeHagila, ngaseYesimon?"
1Samuel26:2 Wagqiba uSawule, wehla waya entlango yeZifi, enamadoda angamawaka amathathu ahleliweyo akwaSirayeli, eya kufuna uDavide entlango yaseZifi."
1Samuel26:3 uSawule wamisa endulini yeHagila, ngakuYesmon, ngasendleleni. Ke uDavide wayehleli entlango, wabona uSawule emlandela entlango."
1Samuel26:4 uDavide wasusa iintlola, weva ukuba uSawule uzile kakuhle."
1Samuel26:5 Wemka uDavide, waya kuloo ndawo ebemise kuyo uSawule; Wayibona uDavide indawo alele kuyo uSawule, noAbhinere unyana kaNere, umthetheli womkhosi; uSawule wayelele emhadini, yaye abantu bamise iintente kufutshane naye."
1Samuel26:6 Waphendula uDavide, wathi kuAhimeleki umHeti, nakuAbhishayi, unyana kaTseruya, umntakwabo-Yowabhi, Ngubani na oya kuhla nam aye kuSawule emkhosini? Wathi uAbhishayi, Ndiya kuhla nawe."
1Samuel26:7 Wafika uDavide noAbhishayi ebantwini ebusuku. Nanko uSawule elele emhadini, igxunyekiwe intshuntshe yakhe emhlabeni ngasemhadini, uAbhinere namadoda elele, bemlalele ngaphakathi."
1Samuel26:8 Wathi uAbhishayi kuDavide, uThixo ulunikele namhla utshaba lwakho esandleni sakho; Andiyi kumbetha nangentshuntshe nakanye, ndingayi kumeyisa okwesibini."
1Samuel26:9 Wathi uDavide kuAbhishayi, Musa ukumtshabalalisa; ngokuba ngubani na ongasolula isandla sakhe kumthanjiswa kaYehova omsulwa?"
1Samuel26:10 uDavide wongezelela wathi, NgoYehova ovayo, uYehova uya kumvelela; nokuba iya kufika imini yakhe yokufa; okanye uya kuhla aye emfazweni, atshabalale."
1Samuel26:11 Wandinqanda uYehova ukuba ndingasoluli isandla sam kumthanjiswa kaYehova; kodwa thabatha umkhonto ngasemphongolweni wakhe nasemnqamlezweni wamanzi, sihambe."
1Samuel26:12 uDavide wathabatha intshuntshe, nonqamlezo lwamanzi kumphongolo kaSawule; barhoxa, akwabakho bani ubonayo, nokwaziyo, novukayo; kuba bonke babephethukile; ngokuba balele ebuthongweni obukhulu bukaYehova."
1Samuel26:13 Wesuka uDavide, waya kwelinye icala, wema encotsheni yenduli ekude; umgama phakathi kwabo:"
1Samuel26:14 Wababiza abantu uDavide, noAbhinere, unyana kaNere, wathi, Akuphenduli na, Abhinere? Waphendula uAbhinere, wathi, Ungubani na wena ubiza ukumkani?"
1Samuel26:15 Wathi uDavide kuAbhinere, Akuyindoda elikroti na? yaye ngubani na onjengawe kwaSirayeli? Yini na ukuba ungayisindisanga inkosi yakho, kumkani? ngokuba kufike umntu ebantwini, eza konakalisa ukumkani wakho."
1Samuel26:16 Ayilungile le nto uyenzileyo. Ehleli nje uYehova, nifanelwe kukufa, ngenxa yokuba aniyikhuselanga inkosi yenu, umthanjiswa kaYehova. Ngoku khawujonge apho umkhonto wokumkani kunye nomnqamlezo wamanzi wawukumphongolo wakhe."
1Samuel26:17 Walazi uSawule ilizwi likaDavide, wathi, Lilizwi lakho na elo, Davide, nyana wam? Wathi uDavide, Lilo eli ilizwi lam, nkosi yam, nkosi yam!"
1Samuel26:18 Wathi, Yini na ukuba inkosi yam imsukele ngolu hlobo umkhonzi wayo? Ndenze bubi buni na, siyintoni na esandleni sam?"
1Samuel26:19 Ke ngoko inkosi yam ukumkani mayikhe iwaphulaphule amazwi omkhonzi wayo. Ukuba uYehova ekuxhobisile kum, makawamkele umbingelelo; Ke oonyana babantu baqalekisiwe phambi koYehova; ngenxa yokuba namhlanje bandigxothile ukuba ndingahlali elifeni likaYehova, besithi, ‘Hamba uye kukhonza abanye oothixo."
1Samuel26:20 Ke kaloku igazi lam alifanele liwele emhlabeni phambi koYehova, ngenxa yokuba ukumkani wakwaSirayeli waphuma waya kufuna iintakumba njengokuzingela ezintabeni."
1Samuel26:21 Wathi uSawule, Ndidanile; buya, nyana wam Davide, ngokuba andiyi kuba sakwenza nto imbi, ngokuba umphefumlo wam ubunqabile emehlweni akho namhla;"
1Samuel26:22 Waphendula uDavide, wathi, Nantsi intshuntshe yokumkani; makeze omnye wabafana, ayithabathe."
1Samuel26:23 Ngamana uYehova angabuyisela ubulungisa bakhe nokuthembeka kwakhe elowo nalowo, ngenxa yokuba namhlanje uYehova ubunikele esandleni sam, kodwa andivumanga ukusa isandla sam phezu kothanjisiweyo kaYehova."
1Samuel26:24 Yabonani, njengoko umphefumlo wenu uqinile emehlweni am, kwada kwayile mini, ngamana umphefumlo wam ungama phambi koYehova, andisindise kuko konke ukubandezeleka."
1Samuel26:25 Wathi uSawule kuDavide, Usikelelwe, nyana wam, Davide; ngokuba wenze izinto ezinkulu, woyise. Wahamba ke uDavide, waza uSawule wabuyela endlwini yakhe."
1Samuel27:1 Wathi uDavide entliziyweni yakhe, Ndiya kubulawa ngamhla sisandla sikaSawule; uSawule uya kundifuna ezindaweni zonke zakwaSirayeli; ndiya kusinda ke esandleni sakhe."
1Samuel27:2 Akugqiba uDavide, enamadoda angamakhulu amathandathu, waya kuAkishe, unyana kaMagogi, ukumkani waseGati."
1Samuel27:3 uDavide wahlala noAkishe eGati, yena namadoda akhe, yayileyo nendlu yayo, noDavide nabafazi bakhe bobabini, uAkinowam waseYizereli, noAbhigali waseKarmele, umkaNabhali."
1Samuel27:4 Waxelelwa uSawule ukuba uDavide ubalekele eGati, akaba saphinda amfune."
1Samuel27:5 Wathi uDavide kuAgishe, Ukuba kaloku ndibabalwe nguwe, mandinikwe indawo ngomnye umzi osemaphandleni, ndihlale khona; Yini na ukuba umkhonzi wakho ahlale nawe emzini wakomkhulu?"
1Samuel27:6 uAgise wamnika ngaloo mini iTsikelage; ngenxa yoko iTsikelage iye yaba yeyookumkani bakwaYuda, unanamhla."
1Samuel27:7 Imihla awahlala kuyo uDavide kwilizwe lamaFilisti yaba ngunyaka neenyanga ezine.
1Samuel27:8 Wenyuka ke uDavide namadoda akhe, bawaxabela amaGeshuri, namaGezere, nama-Amaleki; ngokuba ezo ntlanga zazimi kwelo zwe kwakudala, ekufikeni kwenu eShure, sesa ezweni laseYiputa."
1Samuel27:9 uDavide waloyisa ilizwe, akashiya ndoda nankazana iphila, wathabatha impahla emfutshane, neenkomo, namaesile, neenkamela, neempahla, wabuyela kuAkishe."
1Samuel27:10 Wathi uAgise, Ubusiya phi na namhlanje? Wathi uDavide, Elasezantsi lakwaYuda, nelasezantsi lamaYerameli, nelasezantsi lamaKanan."
1Samuel27:11 uDavide akazisa ndoda namfazi ehleli eGati, esithi, Ngoko abasixeleli ukuthi, Wenze loo nto nguDavide; ezweni lamaFilisti."
1Samuel27:12 uAkishe wakholwa nguDavide, wathi, Ubenze bangamasikizi abantu bakhe amaSirayeli; ke ngoko, uya kuhlala esisicaka sam."
1Samuel28:1 Ngelo xesha amaFilisti ahlanganisana ndawonye ukuba alwe noonyana bakaSirayeli. Wathi uAgise kuDavide, Yazi ukuba uya kuya nam emfazweni, wena namadoda akho."
1Samuel28:2 Wathi uDavide kuAgishe, Ewe, uya kuyazi into eya kwenziwa ngumkhonzi wakho. Wathi uAgise kuDavide, Ngenxa yoko ndikwenza ube ngumveleli wentloko yam ngamaxesha onke."
1Samuel28:3 Wafa ke uSamuweli; ammbambazelela onke amaSirayeli; amngcwabela eRama emzini wakowabo. uSawule wabakhupha oomoya babafileyo namagqwirha ezweni.
1Samuel28:4 Ahlanganisana ke amaFilisti, eza amisa iintente eShunem; uSawule wawahlanganisa onke amaSirayeli, wamisa eGilibhowa."
1Samuel28:5 Wayibona uSawule impi yamaFilisti, woyika, yagubha intliziyo yakhe kunene."
1Samuel28:6 Wabuza uSawule kuYehova, akamphendula nangamaphupha, nangeeUrim, nangabaprofeti."
1Samuel28:7 Wathi uSawule kubakhonzi bakhe, Ndikhangeleleni inkazana enomoya wabafileyo, ndiye kuyo, ndibuze kuyo. Bathi abakhonzi bakhe kuye, Nankuya umfazi e-Enedore enemimoya."
1Samuel28:8 uSawule wazenza mntu wumbi, wambatha ngubo zimbi, wahamba enamadoda amabini, baya kufika kuloo ntokazi ebusuku; nyuka, ndikubize."
1Samuel28:9 Yathi inkazana leyo kuye, Yabona, uyayazi nawe into ayenzileyo uSawule, ukuba ebebatshabalalisa oomoya abangasekhoyo namagqwirha ehlabathini; Yiyo le nto uwuthiyele umphefumlo wam, ukuze ndife?"
1Samuel28:10 uSawule wamfungisa uYehova, wathi, NgoYehova ovayo iimbaleki zakho aziyi kuba netyala kuwe."
1Samuel28:11 Yathi inkazana leyo, Ndithume bani na kuwe? Wathi, Ndiziseleni uSamuweli."
1Samuel28:12 Yambona inkazana uSamuweli, yakhala ngezwi elikhulu; Yatsho inkazana leyo kuSawule, yathi, Undixokile na? ngokuba unguSawule wena."
1Samuel28:13 Wathi ukumkani kuye, Musa ukoyika, ngokuba ubonile? Yathi inkazana kuSawule, Ndibone kunyuka izithixo emhlabeni;"
1Samuel28:14 Wathi kuye, Ungowabani na? Wathi, Kuzalwe indoda enkulu; kwaye uzigqume ngengubo. Waqonda uSawule ukuba nguSamuweli lowo, waqubuda kuye, waqubuda."
1Samuel28:15 Wathi uSamuweli kuSawule, Yini na ukuba undikhathaze ngokundivusa? Wathi uSawule, Ndibandezelekile kakhulu; ngokuba amaFilisti esilwa nam, uThixo undishiyile, anisayi kuba sandiphendula ngabaprofeti namaphupha; ke ngoko, ndikubizile, ukuze ube nokundazisa emandikwenze."
1Samuel28:16 Wathi uSamuweli, Yini na ukuba undibuze, uYehova ekushiyile nje, wasuke walutshaba lwakho?"
1Samuel28:17 uYehova wamenzela njengoko wakuthethayo ngam; uYehova ubukrazule ubukumkani esandleni sakho, wabunika obakho, Davide."
1Samuel28:18 Ngenxa yokuba ungaliphulaphulanga ilizwi likaYehova, ungawuvumelanga umsindo wakhe ovuthayo kuma-Amaleki, kungenxa yoko le nto uYehova enjenje kuni namhlanje."
1Samuel28:19 Ngaphezu koko, uYehova uya kumnikela uSirayeli kunye nawe esandleni samaFilisti; ngomso wena noonyana bakho nibe nam; uYehova uya kuyinikela imikhosi yakwaSirayeli esandleni samaFilisti."
1Samuel28:20 Wawa emhlabeni kwaoko uSawule, woyika kunene ngamazwi kaSamuweli, akwabakho mandla kuye; ngokuba ubengadlanga sonka imini yonke, nobusuku bonke."
1Samuel28:21 Yeza inkazana leyo kuSawule, yabona ukuba ukhathazeke kakhulu, yathi kuye, Yabona, umkhonzazana wakho uliphulaphule izwi lakho, ndawunikela umphefumlo wam esandleni sam, ndaweva amazwi akho owandixelela wona."
1Samuel28:22 Liphulaphule izwi lomkhonzi wakho, ndibeke iqhekeza lesonka phambi kwakho; udle, ube namandla ekuhambeni kwakho."
1Samuel28:23 Akavuma ke esithi, Andiyi kudla. Bamnyanzela abakhonzi bakhe kwanenkazana leyo; waliphulaphula ilizwi labo. Uphakame phantsi wahlala ebhedini."
1Samuel28:24 Ke kaloku inkazana leyo yayinethole elityetyisiweyo endlwini; waxovula kamsinya, wathabatha umgubo, wawosa ngawo, wosa izonka ezingenagwele ngawo."
1Samuel28:25 Wabeka phambi koSawule naphambi kwabakhonzi bakhe; badla ke. Bavuka ke bahamba ngobo busuku.
1Samuel29:1 AmaFilisti ayihlanganisa yonke imikhosi yawo eAfeki, aza amaSirayeli amisa ngasequleni eYizereli."
1Samuel29:2 Iinkosana zamaFilisti zatyhoboza zingamakhulu namawaka, kodwa uDavide namadoda akhe bahamba noAkishe ukuze bafumane umvuzo."
1Samuel29:3 Zathi iinkosana zamaFilisti, Enza ntoni na la maHebhere? Wathi uAkishe kwiinkosana zamaFilisti, Lo asinguye na uDavide, umkhonzi kaSawule, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, obenam ngale mihla nakule minyaka, ndaza andafumana tyala kuye ukususela ngoko? wandibetha? olusuku?"
1Samuel29:4 Abathetheli bamaFilisti baba nomsindo ngakuye; zathi kuye iinkosana zamaFilisti, Indoda leyo mayibuyele kuloo ndawo ubuyiwisele umthetho ngayo, ingehli nathi iye kulwa, hleze ilwe nathi edabini hayi ngokuba ebeya kuxolelana ngantoni nenkosi yakhe? Akufanelanga ukuba ibe malunga neentloko zala madoda?"
1Samuel29:5 Yayingenguye na uDavide lo ababevuma ngaye ekungqungqeni, besithi, uSawule ubulele amawaka akhe, uDavide ubulele amashumi akhe amawaka?"
1Samuel29:6 uAkishe wambiza uDavide, wathi kuye, Ehleli nje uYehova, ube ulilungisa wena; ngokuba andifumananga bubi kuwe, kususela koko weza kum, unanamhla;"
1Samuel29:7 Ke ngoko buya, uhambe ngoxolo, hleze ukhubekise izikhulu zamaFilisti."
1Samuel29:8 Wathi uDavide kuAkishe, Ndenze ntoni na? yaye ufumene ntoni na kumkhonzi wakho ukususela ekubeni bendikunye nawe kwada kwayile mini yokuba ndingakwazi ukuya kulwa neentshaba zenkosi yam ukumkani?"
1Samuel29:9 Waphendula uAkishe, wathi kuDavide, Ndiyazi ukuba ulungile emehlweni am njengesithunywa sikaThixo; nokuba bathe abathetheli bamaFilisti, Makangenyuki nathi, aye ekulweni."
1Samuel29:10 Ngoko ke, vuka kusasa, nabakhonzi benkosi yakho abaze nawe; kwaye ngokukhawuleza uvuka ekuseni kwaye ukhanyise, hamba."
1Samuel29:11 Wavuka kusasa uDavide namadoda akhe, babuyela ezweni lamaFilisti. Yaye amaFilisti ayihlasela iYizereli."
1Samuel30:1 Kwathi, akufika uDavide eTsikelage ngomhla wesithathu, afika ama-Amaleki eTsikelage ngasezantsi, neTsikelage, ayixabela iTsikelage, ayitshisa ngomlilo;"
1Samuel30:2 Abathimba abafazi ababekhona;
1Samuel30:3 Wangena ke uDavide namadoda akhe phakathi komzi, bawufumana utshisiwe ngomlilo; abafazi babo noonyana babo neentombi zabo bathinjwa."
1Samuel30:4 Baliphakamisa ooDavide namadoda abenaye ilizwi labo, balila, kwada akwabakho mandla kubo okulila."
1Samuel30:5 Yaye abafazi ababini bakaDavide bathatyathelwa ekuthinjweni, uAhinowam umYizerel noAbhigali umfazi kaNabhali waseKarmele."
1Samuel30:6 Wabandezeleka kunene uDavide; kuba abantu babesithi bamgibisele ngamatye; ngokuba umoya wesizwe siphela ubebandezelekile, elowo ngenxa yoonyana bakhe nangenxa yeentombi zakhe; ke uDavide wazomeleza ngoYehova uThixo wakhe."
1Samuel30:7 Wathi uDavide kuAbhiyatare, unyana ka-Ahimeleki, umbingeleli, Ndizise apha ingubo yamagxa; uAbhiyatare wamthabathela khona uDavide iefodi."
1Samuel30:8 Wabuza uDavide kuYehova, esithi, Ndiligibele na elo qela? Ndiya kubafumana. Wathi ke yena kuye, Bandulule, ngokuba uya kubambisa, kwaye uya kuphinda ulawule yonke into ngaphandle kokulibala."
1Samuel30:9 Wahamba ke uDavide, enamadoda angamakhulu amathandathu, waya kufika emlanjaneni oyiBhesore, apho aseleyo amasalela."
1Samuel30:10 Walandela uDavide, yena namadoda angamakhulu amane; ngokuba kwakusele amakhulu amabini amadoda ediniwe, ukuba abe nako ukuwela umlambo iBhesore."
1Samuel30:11 Ke kaloku bafumana indoda engumYiputa isezweni, bayizisa kuDavide, bayinika isonka, yadla; bampha amanzi;"
1Samuel30:12 Bamnika ke icandelo lesicumba somkhiwane, nezicumba ezimbini zeerasintyisi; Ekudleni kwakhe wabuyela kuye umoya wakhe; ngokuba ebengadlanga sonka, engaselanga manzi iimini ezintathu nobusuku obuthathu."
1Samuel30:13 Wathi uDavide kuyo, Yekabani na? ungowaphi? Wathi, NdingumYiputa, umkhonzi wendoda engumAmaleki; Indishiyile inkosi yam, ngokuba bendisifa iintsuku ezintathu."
1Samuel30:14 Sahlasela elasezantsi lamaKrete, nelakwaYuda, nelasezantsi likaKalebhi; sayitshisa iTsikelage ngomlilo."
1Samuel30:15 Wathi uDavide kuyo, Ungandihlisela na kulaa sihlwele? Wathi, Musani ukundilahla phambi koThixo, ukuba ningandibulali, ningandinikele esandleni senkosi yam, ndinihlisele kule ngxokolo."
1Samuel30:16 Wamthoba, bachithachitheka kulo lonke elimiweyo, besidla, besela, bememelela ngenxa yamaxhoba onke amakhulu ababewathimbile ezweni lamaFilisti nasezweni lakwaYuda."
1Samuel30:17 uDavide wawaxabela ukususela ngokuhlwa kwada kwahlwa ngengomso; akwasinda namnye kubo, ngaphandle kwamakhulu amane amadodana akhwela iinkamela, asabayo."
1Samuel30:18 uDavide wazihlangula zonke izinto ezazithinjwe ngama-Amaleki, waza uDavide wabasindisa nabafazi bakhe bobabini."
1Samuel30:19 Abazange baswele nto, enoba yencinane okanye enkulu, okanye oonyana okanye iintombi, okanye into ephangiweyo okanye nantoni na ababeyithabathele kubo. uDavide wayibuyisela yonke loo nto."
1Samuel30:20 Wayithabatha uDavide yonke imihlambi yempahla emfutshane, neenkomo, ababeyisukela phambi kwemihlambi, bathi, Lixhoba likaDavide eli."
1Samuel30:21 uDavide wafika kumakhulu amabini amadoda adiniweyo, engenako ukumlandela uDavide, awawabeka entilini yomlanjana oyiBhesore; yaye baphuma baya kuhlangabeza uDavide nokuhlangabeza amadoda awayekunye naye. Wafika uDavide ebantwini, wababulisa."
1Samuel30:22 Aphendula ke onke amadoda amatshijolo namadoda angamatshijolo, abehambe noDavide, athi, Ekubeni bengahambanga nathi, asiyi kubanika amaxhoba esiwakhululeyo; umfazi wakhe abantwana, ukuze babakhaphele, bahambe."
1Samuel30:23 Wathi uDavide, Musani ukuyenza loo nto, bazalwana bam, ngento asinike yona uYehova, owasisindisayo, wayinikela ezandleni zethu izihlwele ezazisihlasela."
1Samuel30:24 Ngubani na oya kuniva kweli lizwi? Ke njengoko sinjalo isabelo sohlayo ukuya emfazweni, siya kuba njalo isabelo soseleyo emaxhobeni;"
1Samuel30:25 Ukususela ngaloo mini wakumisa oko umyalelo nommiselo koonyana bakaSirayeli kude kube namhla.
1Samuel30:26 Wafika uDavide eTsikelage, wathumela inxenye yexhoba kumadoda amakhulu akwaYuda kubahlobo bakhe, esithi, Yabonani, kukho isipho senu ekuthinjweni kweentshaba zikaYehova;"
1Samuel30:27 neBhetele, nelasezantsi kweRamoti, neYatire;"
1Samuel30:28 nabaseArohere, nabaseTsipmoti, nabaseEstemowa;"
1Samuel30:29 nabaseRagali, nasemizini yamaYerameli, nasemizini yamaKanan;"
1Samuel30:30 namaHorma, namaKorashi, namaAtage;"
1Samuel30:31 naseHebron, nasezindaweni zonke abehamba kuzo uDavide namadoda akhe."
1Samuel31:1 Alwa amaFilistiya namaSirayeli, asaba amadoda akwaSirayeli phambi kwamaFilisti, afa entabeni yeGilibhowa."
1Samuel31:2 AmaFilisti athana mbende noSawule noonyana bakhe; yaye amaFilisti ambulala uYonatan noAbhinadabhi noMalekishuwa, oonyana bakaSawule."
1Samuel31:3 Kwaba nzima ukulwa kuSawule; bambetha abatoli yaye wenzakala kakhulu ngenxa yabantu abantsundu.
1Samuel31:4 Wathi uSawule kumfana lowo, Rhola ikrele lakho, undibulale ngalo; masithi mhlawumbi bazakufika aba bantu, bandihlabe bandiqalekise. Akavuma umphathi weentonga zakhe; ngokuba ebesoyika kunene. Walithabatha ke uSawule ikrele, waziwisa phezu kwalo."
1Samuel31:5 Uthe umphathi weentonga zakhe, akubona ukuba ufile uSawule, waziwisa phezu kwekrele lakhe, wafa kunye naye."
1Samuel31:6 Wafa ke uSawule noonyana bakhe abathathu, nomphathi weentonga zakhe, namadoda akhe onke ngamini-nye."
1Samuel31:7 Abona amadoda akwaSirayeli abengaphesheya kwentlambo, nabengaphesheya kweYordan, ukuba asabile amadoda akwaSirayeli, ufile uSawule noonyana bakhe, aphuma kuloo mizi, asaba; namaFilisti aya kwakha kuyo."
1Samuel31:8 Ngengomso xa amaFilistiya eza kubhunyula ababuleweyo, amfumana uSawule noonyana bakhe bobathathu, bewile entabeni yeGilibhowa."
1Samuel31:9 Bandula ke bamnqumla intloko baza bazikhulula izikrweqe zakhe baza bazithumela kwilizwe lamaFilisti ngeenxa zonke ukuba lazise endlwini yemifanekiso yabo eqingqiweyo nasebantwini.
1Samuel31:10 Azibeka iintonga zakhe ezindlwini zika-Ashtaroti, awubethelela umzimba wakhe eludongeni lwaseBhete-shane."
1Samuel31:11 Beva abemi baseYabheshe yaseGiliyadi akwenzileyo amaFilisti kuSawule;
1Samuel31:12 Avuka ke onke amadoda anobukroti, ahamba ubusuku bonke, awuthabatha umzimba kaSawule, nemizimba yoonyana bakhe, eludongeni lwaseBhete-shan, eza eYabheshe, ayitshisa khona."
1Samuel31:13 Awathabatha amathambo abo, awangcwabela phantsi komthi eYabheshe, azila ukudla iintsuku zasixhenxe."
2Samuel1:1 Wafa uSawule, ekubuyeni kukaDavide ekuwabulaleni ama-Amaleki, uDavide wamxabela uShikele iintsuku zambini;"
2Samuel1:2 Kwathi ngomhla wesithathu, kwaphuma indoda eminqubeni, zazikrazukile iingubo zikaSawule, inomhlaba entloko; wathi akufika kuDavide, waziphosa phantsi, waguqa."
2Samuel1:3 Wathi uDavide kuyo, Ungowaphi na? Wathi kuye, Ndisindisile emkhosini wamaSirayeli."
2Samuel1:4 Wathi uDavide kuyo, Kuthekeni na? Nceda undixelele. Wathi, Kungokuba abantu babesoyika ukuphuma emfazweni, kwaza kwawa abantu abaninzi, bafa; NoSawule noYonatan unyana wakhe bafa."
2Samuel1:5 Wathi uDavide kwindodana ebimxelela, Wazi ngani na, ukuba bafile uSawule, noYonatan unyana wakhe?"
2Samuel1:6 Yathi indodana ebimxelela, Ekufikeni kwam entabeni yeGilibhowa, nanko uSawule ezihlaba ngomkhonto; yabona iinqwelo zokulwa nabakhweli zimsukela ngamandla."
2Samuel1:7 Wathi akubheka, wandibona, wandibiza. Ndaphendula ndathi: Ndim lo."
2Samuel1:8 Wathi kum, Ungubani na? Ndathi kuye, NdingumAmaleki."
2Samuel1:9 Wabuya wathi kum, Yima ecaleni kwam, undibulale, ngokuba ndizelwe ngengozi, ngokuba ndisahleli kum."
2Samuel1:10 Ndema phezu kwakhe ndaza ndambulala, ngenxa yokuba ndandisazi ukuba akayi kuphila emva kokuba esiwile; ndathabatha isithsaba esibe sisentlokweni yakhe, nesithsaba esibe sisesandleni sakhe, ndazizisa apha enkosini yam."
2Samuel1:11 uDavide wazibamba iimpahla zakhe, wazikrazula; enjenjalo onke amadoda abenaye."
2Samuel1:12 Balila, balila baza bazila ukutya kwada kwahlwa ngenxa kaSawule nangenxa kaYonatan unyana wakhe nangenxa yabantu bakaYehova nangenxa yendlu kaSirayeli; ngokuba bawa likrele."
2Samuel1:13 Wathi uDavide kwindodana ebimxelela, Ungowaphi na? Waphendula wathi, Ndingunyana wendoda engumphambukeli, umAmaleki."
2Samuel1:14 Wathi uDavide kuyo, Ùtheni ukuba ungoyiki ukusa isandla sakho, umtshabalalise umthanjiswa kaYehova?"
2Samuel1:15 uDavide wabiza enye yakumadodana, wathi, Yiza uyibulale. Waza wambetha wafa."
2Samuel1:16 Wathi uDavide kuyo, Igazi lakho malibe phezu kwentloko yakho; ngokuba wathi, Mna ndimbulele umthanjiswa kaYehova."
2Samuel1:17 uDavide wamenzela isijwili uSawule noYonatan unyana wakhe, ngale ngoma."
2Samuel1:18 Wathi mabafundiswe oonyana bakaYuda ukusebenzisa isaphetha; nantso kubhaliwe encwadini yOthe Tye.
2Samuel1:19 Bubulewe ubuhle bukaSirayeli ezintabeni zakho; Asiwa amagorha!
2Samuel1:20 Musani ukukuxela eGati, ningakuxeleli ezitratweni zeAshkelon; ukuze zingavuyi iintombi zamaFilisti, Zingavuyi iintombi zezinye iintlanga."
2Samuel1:21 Ezintabeni zaseGilibhowa, kungabikho mbethe, kungabikho mvula kuni, namasimi emibingelelo; Ngokuba likhona ingweletshetshe yamagorha, Ingweletshetshe kaSawule, elahlwe khona, ngathi akathanjiswanga."
2Samuel1:22 Egazini labahlatyiweyo namanqatha amagorha, Isaphetha sikaYonatan besingabuyi, nekrele likaSawule belingabuyi lilambatha."
2Samuel1:23 uSawule noYonatan babeziinzwana, benomtsalane ebomini babo, nasekufeni kwabo abahlukananga; Babekhawuleza ngaphezu kwamaxhalanga, babenamandla ngaphezu kweengonyama."
2Samuel1:24 Zintombi zakwaSirayeli, mlileleni uSawule, Obenambesa ingubo ebomvu, nasekudleni kwenu, Obeninxiba izihombo zegolide ezambathweni zenu."
2Samuel1:25 Hayi, ukuwa kwamagorha emfazweni! Wena Yonatan, ubulawelwe ezintabeni zakho;"
2Samuel1:26 Ndixhalabile ngawe, mzalwana wam Yonatan; ubunomtsalane kum; Kubalukekile ukundithanda kwakho Ngaphezu kokuthanda komntu oyinkazana."
2Samuel1:27 Hayi, ukuwa kwamagorha nezixhobo zemfazwe!"
2Samuel2:1 Emveni koko wabuza uDavide kuYehova, wathi, Ndinyuke na ndiye emzini wakwaYuda? Wathi uYehova kuye, Vuka! Wathi uDavide, Ndinyuke ndiye phi na? Wathi yena: “YiHebron!"
2Samuel2:2 Wenyuka waya khona uDavide, nabafazi bakhe bobabini, uAkinowam waseYizereli, noAbhigali, umkaNabhali waseKarmele."
2Samuel2:3 uDavide wawasusa amadoda akhe abenaye, ukuba anyuke, iyileyo nendlu yayo, ahlala emizini yaseHebron."
2Samuel2:4 Eza amadoda akwaYuda, amthambisa khona apho uDavide, ukuba abe ngukumkani wendlu yakwaYuda. Waxelelwa uDavide, kwathiwa, Amadoda aseYabheshe yaseGiliyadi ngawo abeze kuSawule."
2Samuel2:5 uDavide wathumela abathunywa kumadoda aseYabheshe yaseGiliyadi, wathi kuwo, Wanga uYehova anisikelele, ngenxa enokuba nenenceba yenu kuSawule inkosi yenu, nayingcwaba."
2Samuel2:6 Kaloku, uYehova undenzele inceba ngenene, ndiya kunibuyisela le nceba, ngenxa yokuba nayenzayo loo nto."
2Samuel2:7 Ke kaloku mazomelele izandla zenu nibe nesibindi, ngenxa yokuba uSawule ukumkani wenu ufile, yaye nendlu kaYuda indithambisile ukuba ndibe ngukumkani wayo."
2Samuel2:8 Ke uAbhinere, unyana kaNere, umthetheli womkhosi kaSawule, wamthabatha uIshbhoshete, unyana kaSawule, wamzisa eMahanayim;"
2Samuel2:9 Wamenza ukumkani eGiliyadi, naseAsiriya, naseYizereli, nakwaEfrayim, nakwaBhenjamin, nakumaSirayeli onke."
2Samuel2:10 uIshe-bhoshete, unyana kaSawule, ubeminyaka imashumi mane ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe kwaSirayeli, waba neminyaka emibini engukumkani. Ke indlu yakwaYuda yamlandela uDavide."
2Samuel2:11 Ixesha uDavide awayengukumkani wendlu kaYuda eHebron laliyiminyaka esixhenxe neenyanga ezintandathu.
2Samuel2:12 Wemka ke uAbhinere, unyana kaNere, nabakhonzi bakaNkosi-bhoshete, unyana kaSawule, eMahanayim, baya eGibheyon."
2Samuel2:13 uYowabhi unyana kaTseruya nabakhonzi bakaDavide baphuma baza baqubisana echibini laseGibheyon; bahlala phantsi, omnye ekweli cala lebhafu, omnye ekweliya icala lebhafu."
2Samuel2:14 Wathi uAbhinere kuYowabhi, Makeme amadodana adlale phambi kwethu. Wathi uYowabhi, Mabasuke basuke."
2Samuel2:15 Bandula besuka bema baza badlula kwinani lamaBhenjamin alishumi elinesibini kuIshbhoshete unyana kaSawule neshumi elinesibini labakhonzi bakaDavide.
2Samuel2:16 Yaye ngamnye wabamba iqabane lakhe ngentloko waza waxabela kulo ngekrele lakhe ethangeni; ngoko ke bawa kunye. Kungenxa yoko le nto loo ndawo kuthiwa yiHelekati-hasurim eGibheyon.
2Samuel2:17 Kwabakho idabi eloyikekayo ngaloo mini; woyiswa ke uAbhinere namadoda akwaSirayeli phambi kwabakhonzi bakaDavide.
2Samuel2:18 Kwakukho oonyana abathathu bakaTseruya, uYowabhi, noAbhishayi, noAsaheli; yaye uAsaheli wayelula ezinyaweni zakhe njengexhama."
2Samuel2:19 uAsayeli wamsukela uAbhinere; xa ehambayo, makangaphambukeli kuAbhinere aye ekunene okanye ekhohlo."
2Samuel2:20 Wabheka ngasemva uAbhinere, wathi, UnguAsayeli na? Waphendula ke yena wathi, Ndinguye."
2Samuel2:21 Wathi uAbhinere kuye, Jika uye ekunene, nokuba uye ekhohlo, bamba enye kumadodana, uthabathe iintonga zayo. Akavumanga uAsayeli ukutyeka ekumlandeleni."
2Samuel2:22 Wabuya wathi uAbhinere kuAsaheli, Musa ukuwela kum; kutheni ndikubethe? Ndothini na ukububeka ubuso bam phambi komzalwana wakho uYowabhi?"
2Samuel2:23 Akavuma ukutyeka; ngoko ke, uAbhinere wamgwaza ngomva wentshuntshe phantsi kwentamo yakhe; wawa khona, wafela khona."
2Samuel2:24 OoYowabhi noAbhishayi bamsukela ke uAbhinere, lada latshona ilanga, bada bafika endulini yeAma, malungana neGiya, endleleni yentlango yaseGibheyon."
2Samuel2:25 Bamngqonga uAbhinere oonyana bakaBhenjamin, baba liqela elinye, bema encotsheni yentaba."
2Samuel2:26 uAbhinere wambiza uYowabhi, wathi, Uya kuhlala upheliswa na umkhonto? Anazi na, ukuba isiphelo siya kuba krakra? Kuya kuthatha ixesha elingakanani phambi kokuba uyalele abantu ukuba babuyele emva baye kuleqa abazalwana babo?"
2Samuel2:27 Wathi uYowabhi, NgoYehova ovileyo, ukuba bekungathanga uthethe, bavuka kusasa abantu, elowo kubazalwana bakhe, bamlandela."
2Samuel2:28 Wavuthela isigodlo uYowabhi, bema bonke abantu, ababa sabasukela oonyana bakaSirayeli, ababa saphinda balwe."
2Samuel2:29 uAbhinere namadoda akhe bahamba ubusuku bonke entlango, bayiwela iYordan, bayiwela yonke iBhitron, bafika eMahanayim."
2Samuel2:30 Wabuya ke uYowabhi, wamlandela uAbhinere; wabahlanganisa bonke abantu, kungekho shumi elinesithoba lamadoda noAsaheli kubakhonzi bakaDavide."
2Samuel2:31 Ke abakhonzi bakaDavide babulala inxenye yakwaBhenjamin nakumadoda akwa-Abhinere, kwafa amakhulu amathathu anamanci mathandathu amadoda."
2Samuel2:32 Bamthabatha uAsaheli, bamngcwabela engcwabeni likayise eBhetelehem. uYowabhi namadoda akhe bahamba ubusuku bonke, bafika eHebron kusasa."
2Samuel3:1 Kwaba kude kube yimfazwe phakathi kwendlu kaSawule nendlu kaDavide; uDavide waya esomelela ngokomelela; yasuka yaphelelwa ngamandla indlu kaSawule.
2Samuel3:2 uDavide wazalelwa oonyana eHebron, yaye izibulo lakhe yayinguAmnon ka-Akinowam umYizereli;"
2Samuel3:3 Owesibini ibinguKilabhi, ka-Abhigali, umkaNabhali waseKarmele; owesithathu nguAbhisalom, unyana kaMagi, intombi kaTalemayi, ukumkani waseGeshuri;"
2Samuel3:4 owesine nguAdoniya, unyana kaHagiti; owesihlanu nguShefatiya, unyana ka-Abhitali;"
2Samuel3:5 Owesithandathu nguJitream ngoEgla, umkaDavide; Bona bazalelwa uDavide eHebron."
2Samuel3:6 Ke kaloku, kwakubon’ ukuba kukho imfazwe phakathi kwendlu kaSawule nendlu kaDavide, uAbhinere wamana ukuzomeleza ngenxa yendlu kaSawule."
2Samuel3:7 uSawule ebeneshweshwe eligama linguRitspa, intombi ka-Aya; Wathi uIshe-bhoshete kuAbhinere, Yini na ukuba ungene ngesithende sikabawo?"
2Samuel3:8 Wavutha kunene ngumsindo uAbhinere ngamazwi kaNkosi-bhoshete, wathi, Ndiyintloko yenja na eyenzela inceba uYuda namhla, kwindlu kaSawule uyihlo, nakubazalwana bakhe, nakubahlobo bakhe, andikwenzanga oko? uyonga? esandleni sikaDavide, ingaba namhlanje undityhola ngetyala laloo mfazi?"
2Samuel3:9 uThixo uya kumenzela enjenje uAbhinere, aqokele ukwenjenje, ukuba ndiya kwenjenjalo kuye njengoko uYehova wamfungelayo uDavide;"
2Samuel3:10 ukuba buguqulwe ubukumkani bendlu kaSawule, buqinise itrone kaDavide kwaSirayeli nakwaYuda, kwaDan kuse eBher-shebha."
2Samuel3:11 Akaba nakumphendula nelizwi uAbhinere, ngokuba ebemoyika."
2Samuel3:12 uAbhinere wasusa abathunywa kuDavide esikhundleni sakhe, esithi, Lilizwe likabani na eli lizwe? uthi, Yenza umnqophiso nam; yabona, isandla sam sinawe, ukuba ndiwazise kuwe onke amaSirayeli."
2Samuel3:13 Wathi, Kulungile; Ndiya kwenza isivumelwano nawe, kodwa inye into endiyifunayo kuwe, yile: Akuyi kububona ubuso bam, ukuba uthe wazisa uMikali, intombi kaSawule, wakuza kundibona."
2Samuel3:14 uDavide wesusa abathunywa kuIshe-bhoshete, unyana kaSawule, esithi, Myeke uMikali, umkam, endamthenga ngekhulu leemfele zamaFilisti."
2Samuel3:15 Wathumela ke iNkosi uBhoshete ukuba amthabathele kuPaltiyeli unyana kaLayishe, indoda yakhe."
2Samuel3:16 Yahamba naye indoda yakhe, ilila, kwada kwesa eBhahurim. Wathi uAbhinere kuyo, Hamba ubuye. Uye wabuya."
2Samuel3:17 Wathetha uAbhinere kumadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, wathi: “Benifuna uDavide abe ngukumkani wenu."
2Samuel3:18 Yenza ngoku, ngenxa yokuba uYehova wathetha ngoDavide esithi: “Ngesandla sikaDavide umkhonzi wam ndiya kubahlangula abantu bam amaSirayeli esandleni samaFilisti nasesandleni seentshaba zabo zonke."
2Samuel3:19 Kanjalo, uAbhinere wathetha phambi kweendlebe zikaBhenjamin, noAbhinere waqalisa ukuthetha apho uDavide wayesiva yonke into eyayilungile kuSirayeli noko kwakubonakala kulungile kuyo yonke indlu kaBhenjamin."
2Samuel3:20 Waya uAbhinere kuDavide eHebron, enamadoda amashumi mabini. uDavide wamlungiselela ukudla uAbhinere namadoda abenaye."
2Samuel3:21 Wathi uAbhinere kuDavide, Ndiya kuhamba ndiye ndimhlanganisele ukumkani, inkosi yam, amaSirayeli onke, enze umnqophiso nawe, ukulawule konke okunqwenelwa yintliziyo yakho. uDavide wambuyisa uAbhinere; wahamba enoxolo."
2Samuel3:22 Ke kaloku, khangela, abakhonzi bakaDavide nabakaYowabhi babephuma ukuya kuhlangula lowo uneqhenqa yaye babezisa into eninzi yamaxhoba, yaye uAbhinere wayengekho kuDavide eHebron ngokuba wambuyisa, wemka enoxolo."
2Samuel3:23 Wafika uYowabhi nomkhosi wonke owawunaye, waxelelwa uYowabhi, kwathiwa, uAbhinere, unyana kaNere, ubeze kukumkani, wathi ukumkani makahambe, wahamba enoxolo.”"
2Samuel3:24 Waya uYowabhi kukumkani, wathi, Yintoni na le uyenzileyo? nanku uAbhinere eze kuwe; Yini na ukuba umndulule, abe engasekho?"
2Samuel3:25 Uyamazi uAbhinere unyana kaNere, ekubeni ebeze kukuxokisa, ukuze akwazi ukuphuma kwakho, nokungena kwakho, akwazi konke okwenzayo."
2Samuel3:26 Wemka uYowabhi kuDavide, wasusa abathunywa ukuba bamlandele uAbhinere, bambuyisela emhadini waseSira; ke yena uDavide ubengayazi loo nto."
2Samuel3:27 Ekubuyeni kukaAbhinere eHebron, uYowabhi wamthabathela bucala esangweni ukuze athethe naye ngasese, waza wamgwaza apho esiswini, kangangokuba wafa ngenxa yegazi lika-Asaheli umntakwabo."
2Samuel3:28 Weva uDavide, wathi kamva, Mna nobukumkani bam asisayi kugwetywa ngonaphakade, ngenxa yamagazi ka-Abhinere, unyana kaNere;"
2Samuel3:29 makabe phezu kwentloko kaYowabhi, naphezu kwendlu yonke kayise; yaye endlwini kaYowabhi kungabikho mhlambi ovuzayo okanye oneqhenqa nokhonya ngomsimelelo okanye owa ngekrele okanye oswele isonka."
2Samuel3:30 uYowabhi noAbhishayi umntakwabo bambulala uAbhinere, ngenxa yokuba wayembulele uAsaheli umntakwabo edabini eGibheyon."
2Samuel3:31 Wandula ke wathi uDavide kuYowabhi nakuwo onke amadoda awayenaye: “krazulani izambatho zenu nize nibhinqe amarhonya nize nimlilele uAbhinere. NoKumkani uDavide wawulandela ngokwakhe umqobo.
2Samuel3:32 Bamngcwabela eHebron uAbhinere; waliphakamisa ukumkani ilizwi lakhe, walila engcwabeni lika-Abhinere bonke abantu bayalila."
2Samuel3:33 Ukumkani wamlilela uAbhinere, wathi, Ufile ngokwegeza na uAbhinere?"
2Samuel3:34 Izandla zakho bezingabotshwanga, neenyawo zakho bezingabotshwanga; bawa njengokuwa kongendawo. Babuya bonke abantu bammbambazelela."
2Samuel3:35 Beza bonke abantu ukuba badle uDavide emini enkulu, wafunga uDavide, wathi, Makenjenje uThixo kum;"
2Samuel3:36 Lonke ilizwe lakubona oko, kwalunga emehlweni abo, ngokuba yonke into abeyenza ukumkani yakholisa bonke abantu."
2Samuel3:37 Baqonda ke lonke uhlanga noSirayeli wonke ngaloo mini, ukuba ukubulawa kuka-Abhinere unyana kaNere kwakungengumthetho kakumkani."
2Samuel3:38 Wathi ukumkani kubakhonzi bakhe, Anazi na, ukuba namhlanje kufe inkosana nomntu omkhulu kwaSirayeli?"
2Samuel3:39 Kwaye namhlanje ndibuthathaka, nangona ndathanjiswa ukuba ndibe ngukumkani; la madoda, oonyana bakaTseruya, anamandla kunam;"
2Samuel4:1 Weva unyana kaSawule ukuba uAbhinere uyibhuqile iHebron, zotha izandla zakhe. Oyika onke amaSirayeli."
2Samuel4:2 Unyana kaSawule ubenamadoda amabini angabathetheli bemikhosi; igama lenye belinguBhahana, igama leyesibini belinguRegabhi, oonyana bakaRimon, waseBheroti, koonyana bakaBhenjamin; ngokuba neBheroti kwabalelwa kuyo noBhenjamin;"
2Samuel4:3 (AmaBheroti asabela eGitayim, ahlala khona unanamhla.)"
2Samuel4:4 Ke kaloku uYonatan unyana kaSawule ubenonyana ofe iinyawo; ubeminyaka mihlanu ezelwe, ukufika kwelizwi likaSawule noYonatan, livela eYizereli; umxhasi wakhe wamthabatha, wabaleka; wathi ebaleka ngokukhawuleza, wawa waba sisiqhwala. Igama lakhe lalinguMefibhoshete."
2Samuel4:5 Oonyana bakaRimon waseBheroti, uRekabhi noBhahana, bahamba baza bafika endlwini kaIshe-bhosheti emini emaqanda, elele ebhedini emini enkulu."
2Samuel4:6 Bafika phakathi kwendlu, ngathi baya kuthabatha ingqolowa; yaye bamxhoma kubambo lwesihlanu, waza uRegabhe noBhahana umntakwabo babaleka."
2Samuel4:7 Bangena ke endlwini, elele esingqengqelweni sakhe egumbini lakhe lokulala; bambetha, bambulala, bamnqumla intloko, bayithabatha intloko yakhe, babarhuqela ethafeni ebusuku, bonke abantu."
2Samuel4:8 Bayizisa intloko yeNkosi uBhoshete kuDavide eHebron, bathi kukumkani, Nantsi intloko yeNkosi Bhoshete, unyana kaSawule, utshaba lwakho, obelufuna ukukubulala; namhla uYehova umphindezele ukumkani, inkosi yam, kuSawule, nakoonyana bakhe."
2Samuel4:9 uDavide wabaphendula ooRekabhi noBhahana, umkhuluwa wakhe, oonyana bakaRimon waseBheroti, wathi kubo, Ehleli nje uYehova, owukhululeyo umphefumlo wam kuzo zonke iimbandezelo;"
2Samuel4:10 Wandixelela ngale nto, wathi, Yabona, ufile uSawule; ngokuba ebesithi, uzise iindaba ezilungileyo;"
2Samuel4:11 Babeka phi na ke abangendawo, ukumbulala umntu olungileyo endlwini yakhe, esililini sakhe? Andiyi kulifuna igazi lakhe ezandleni zenu, ndinisuse emhlabeni?"
2Samuel4:12 uDavide wabawisela umthetho abakhonzi bakhe, bababulala, babanqumla izandla neenyawo, babaxhoma echibini laseHebron. Bayithabatha ke intloko kaNkosi-bhoshete, bayingcwabela engcwabeni lika-Abhinere eHebron."
2Samuel5:1 Zafika ke zonke izizwe zakwaSirayeli kuDavide eHebron, zathi, Uyabona, singamathambo akho nenyama yakho."
2Samuel5:2 Ngaphambili, oko uSawule ebengukumkani wethu, ibinguwe ebebakhupha oonyana bakaSirayeli, ubangenise; wathi uYehova kuwe, Wena uya kubanyamekela abantu bam amaSirayeli, wena ube ngumlawuli kwaSirayeli."
2Samuel5:3 Aya ke onke amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli kukumkani eHebron; Ukumkani uDavide wenza umnqophiso nawo eHebron, phambi koYehova; amthambisa uDavide ukuba abe ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
2Samuel5:4 uDavide ubeminyaka imashumi mathathu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emashumi mane engukumkani."
2Samuel5:5 uHebron wayengukumkani kwaYuda iminyaka esixhenxe neenyanga ezintandathu; yaye iYerusalem yalawula iminyaka engamashumi amathathu anesithathu kuSirayeli wonke noYuda.
2Samuel5:6 Waza ukumkani namadoda akhe baya eYerusalem kumaYebhusi abengabemi belizwe, bathetha kuDavide, bathi, Ukuba uthe akwasusa iimfama neziqhwala, akuyi kungena apha."
2Samuel5:7 uDavide wayithimba inqaba yaseZiyon; sisixeko sikaDavide.
2Samuel5:8 Wathetha uDavide ngaloo mini, wathi, Bonke abaya kukhwela emhadini, babulale amaYebhusi, neziqhwala, neemfama, abathiyiweyo entliziyweni kaDavide, ngabo aba yintloko nentloko; Bathi ngoko, Iimfama neziqhwala azinakungena endlwini."
2Samuel5:9 uDavide waya kuhlala kuloo nqaba, wayibiza ngokuba sisiXeko sikaDavide. Wazakha uDavide yonke into esuka eMilo naphakathi kwelizwe."
2Samuel5:10 uDavide waqhubeka ekhula, yaye uYehova, uThixo wemikhosi, wayenaye."
2Samuel5:11 uHiram, ukumkani waseTire, wathumela abathunywa kuDavide, nemisedare, neengcibi zemithi, neengcibi zamatye, bamakhela indlu uDavide."
2Samuel5:12 uDavide waqonda ukuba uYehova unyule yena ukuba abe ngukumkani kwaSirayeli nokuba wayebuphakamisile ubukumkani bakhe ngenxa yabantu bakhe amaSirayeli.
2Samuel5:13 uDavide wabuya wazeka abafazi nabafazi eYerusalem, ekundulukeni kwakhe eHebron, uDavide wazala abanye oonyana neentombi."
2Samuel5:14 Ngawo la amagama abazalelwe eYerusalem; uSamuwa, noShobhabhe, noNatan, noSolomon;"
2Samuel5:15 noIbhare, noElishuwa, noNefege, noYafiya;"
2Samuel5:16 noElishama, noEliyada, noElifeleti."
2Samuel5:17 Xa amaFilisti evayo ukuba babemthambisile uDavide ukuba abe ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli, onke amaFilisti enyuka esiya kufuna uDavide; Weva ke uDavide, wehla waya entabeni enqatyisiweyo."
2Samuel5:18 Afika amaFilisti, athana mbende entilini yamaRafa."
2Samuel5:19 Wabuza uDavide kuYehova, esithi, Ndihambe ndiye na kumaFilisti? Ngaba uya kuwanikela esandleni sam? Wathi uYehova kuDavide, Yima, ngokuba ndiya kuwanikela okunene amaFilisti esandleni sakho."
