2Samuel5:20 Weza uDavide eBhahali-perasim; wahlala khona uDavide kubo, wathi, uYehova undityhoboze njengomlambo, esilwa neentshaba zam phambi kwam ngenxa yoko wathi igama laloo ndawo yiBhahali-peratsim."
2Samuel5:21 Bayishiya apho imifanekiso yabo eqingqiweyo; uDavide namadoda akhe bayitshisa;
2Samuel5:22 Aphinda enyuka amaFilisti, athana mbende entilini yamaRafa."
2Samuel5:23 uDavide wabuza kuYehova, esithi, Musa ukunyuka; kodwa niwajikeleze ngasemva nize niwahlasele ngasemithini yamaqunube."
2Samuel5:24 Kwaye kuthiwa ukuba usiva isandi sokunyathelwa phezu kwemithi yommirtile, ngoko uya konwaba; ngokuba ngoku uYehova uya kunikhokelela ekuxabeleni izintlu zamaFilisti."
2Samuel5:25 Wenza uDavide njengoko uYehova wamwiselayo umthetho; yaye wawaxabela amaFilisti ukususela eGebha ukuya kutsho eGezere.
2Samuel6:1 Wabuya wabahlanganisa uDavide bonke abanyulwa bakwaSirayeli, amashumi amathathu amawaka."
2Samuel6:2 Waphuma ke uDavide, wahamba nabantu bonke abenabo, esiya eBhahali yakwaYuda, esiya kuyithabathela khona ityeya kaThixo, ogama ligama likaYehova wemikhosi ohleli phezu kweekerubhi."
2Samuel6:3 Bayikhwelisa kwinqwelo entsha ityeya yoTHIXO oyinyaniso baza bayisusa endlwini ka-Abhinadabhi eyayiseGibheya; U-Uza noAhiyo, oonyana baka-Abhinadabhi, babeqhuba imoto entsha."
2Samuel6:4 Bayikhupha endlwini ka-Abhinadabhi eseGibheha, ndawonye nobuncwane boThixo oyinyaniso; Waphuma uAjo ekhokela umkhombe."
2Samuel6:5 uDavide nendlu yonke kaSirayeli baqamba phambi koYehova, bebetha imithi yonke yesipres, neehadi, nemirhubhe, namagubu, namacangci, namacangci."
2Samuel6:6 Ekufikeni kwabo esandeni sikaNagon, u-Uza wolulela isandla sakhe etyeyeni yoTHIXO oyinyaniso wayithabatha; ngokuba iinkomo zaziyithuthile."
2Samuel6:7 Wavutha umsindo kaYehova kwaUsa; uThixo wamohlwaya khona ngenxa yobugwenxa bakhe; wafela khona phambi kwetyeya kaThixo.
2Samuel6:8 uDavide wavutha ngumsindo ngenxa yokuba uYehova ebemisele u-Uza; kwaye loo ndawo yiPeretsusa kude kube namhlanje.
2Samuel6:9 uDavide wamoyika uYehova ngaloo mini, wathi, Yothini na ukuza kum ityeya kaYehova?"
2Samuel6:10 uDavide akavuma ukuyisa ityeya kaYehova emzini kaDavide; ke uDavide wayiphambukisela endlwini kaObhedi-edom waseGati.
2Samuel6:11 Yahlala ke ityeya kaYehova endlwini kaObhedi-edom waseGati iinyanga zantathu; uYehova wamsikelela uObhedi-edom, nendlu yakhe yonke."
2Samuel6:12 Waxelelwa ukumkani uDavide, kwathiwa, Uyisikelele uYehova indlu kaObhedi-edom, nempahla yakhe yonke, ngenxa yetyeya kaThixo. Waya uDavide, wayithabatha ityeya kaThixo evuya endlwini kaObhedi-edom, wayisa emzini kaDavide."
2Samuel6:13 Xa abathwali bomkhombe kaYehova babehamba izinyuko ezithandathu, wabingelela ngeenkomo nezilwanyana ezityetyisiweyo."
2Samuel6:14 uDavide wangqungqa ngamandla akhe onke phambi koYehova; yaye uDavide wayebhinqe iqhiya yelinen.
2Samuel6:15 uDavide nendlu yonke kaSirayeli babeyinyusa ke ityeya kaYehova, bevuya, behlokomisa isigodlo."
2Samuel6:16 Kwathi ke ekufikeni kwetyeya kaYehova kwisiXeko sikaDavide, uMikali, intombi kaSawule, wavela ngefestile, wabona uKumkani uDavide exhuma esina phambi koYehova; wamcekisa entliziyweni yakhe."
2Samuel6:17 Bayingenisa ityeya kaYehova, bayimisa endaweni yayo phakathi kwentente, abeyilungisele uDavide; yaye uDavide wanikela iminikelo etshiswayo neyombulelo phambi koYehova."
2Samuel6:18 Akugqiba uDavide ukunyusa amadini anyukayo neyombulelo, wabasikelela abantu, egameni likaYehova wemikhosi."
2Samuel6:19 Wababela bonke abantu, kwingxokolo yonke yakwaSirayeli, abafazi namadoda; elowo wamnika iqhekeza lesonka, neqhekeza lesonka, nesuntswana lewayini, nendebe yewayini. Emva koko bonke abantu baya emakhayeni abo."
2Samuel6:20 Wabuya ke uDavide, waya kusikelela indlu yakhe. Waphuma uMikali, intombi kaSawule, esiya kukhawulela uDavide, wathi, Hayi, ukuzizukisa kokumkani wamaSirayeli namhla, njengoko ezibonakalisile namhla emehlweni abakhonzazana babakhonzi bakhe, njengoko omnye wamatshijolo ezenza oneentloni."
2Samuel6:21 Wandula ke wathi uDavide kuMikali: “Ndandiphambi koYehova owandinyula phambi koyihlo naphambi kwendlu yakhe yonke ukuba andimisele ukuba ndibe ngumlawuli wabantu bakaYehova amaSirayeli; ke ngoko ndiya kuvuma phambi koYehova.
2Samuel6:22 Ndiya kuba lisikizi ngaphezu koko, ndibe mncinane emehlweni am; neempelesi ozithethileyo, ndozukiswa zizo."
2Samuel6:23 Ke uMikali intombi kaSawule akabanga namntwana kwada kwayimini yokufa kwakhe.
2Samuel7:1 Kwathi, ehleli ukumkani endlwini yakhe, uYehova wamphumza ukuba awenze wonke umsebenzi wakhe;"
2Samuel7:2 Wathi uYehova kuNatan umprofeti, Uyabona, mna ndihleli endlwini yemisedare, ke yona ityeya kaThixo ihleli elinen ecikizekileyo."
2Samuel7:3 Wathi uNatan kukumkani, Konke okusentliziyweni yakho, hamba uye ukwenze; ngokuba uYehova unawe."
2Samuel7:4 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuNatan ngobo busuku, lisithi:"
2Samuel7:5 Yiya uthethe kumkhonzi wam uDavide, uthi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Nguwe na ke oya kundakhela indlu, yokuba ndihlale kuyo?"
2Samuel7:6 Ukususela kwixesha endabanyusa ngalo oonyana bakaSirayeli eYiputa de kube namhla andihlalanga nakweyiphi na indlu, kodwa ndandihamba ententeni nasententeni."
2Samuel7:7 Ezindaweni zonke endahambahamba kuzo mna noonyana bonke bakaSirayeli, ndathetha ilizwi kwesinye sezizwe zakwaSirayeli, endasiwisela umthetho wokuba sibaluse abantu bam amaSirayeli, ndathi, Yini na ukuba ningandinyamekeli? indlu yomsedare?"
2Samuel7:8 Ngoko ke wothi kuDavide umkhonzi wam, Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Mna ndakuthabatha esibayeni, emva komhlambi, ukuba ube yinganga yabantu bam amaSirayeli."
2Samuel7:9 Ndandinawe naphi na apho wawusiya khona, yaye ndazitshabalalisa zonke iintshaba zakho phambi kwakho ndaza ndakwenzela igama elikhulu njengegama labo bakhulu ehlabathini."
2Samuel7:10 Ngaphezu koko, ndiya kubanyulela indawo abantu bam amaSirayeli ndize ndibaqinise, ukuze bahlale endaweni yabo, bangabi sagungqiswa kwakhona; oonyana bobutshijolo bangabi sabacinezela njengangaphambili;"
2Samuel7:11 Ukususela kwixesha endayalela ngalo abagwebi ukuba babalawule abantu bam amaSirayeli, ndaza ndaninika ukuphumla ezintshabeni zenu zonke. Kwakhona uYehova ukuxelela ukuba uya kukwenzela indlu."
2Samuel7:12 Xa ithe yazaliseka imihla yakho, walala noyihlo, ndoyivelisa emva kwakho imbewu yakho, ibonakale esiswini sakho, ndibuqinise ubukumkani bakhe."
2Samuel7:13 Nguye oya kulakhela igama lam indlu, ndiyiqinise itrone yobukumkani bakhe, kude kuse ephakadeni."
2Samuel7:14 Mna ndiya kuba nguyise kuye, yena abe ngunyana wam; Ukuba uthe wenza ububi, ndombetha ngentonga yabantu, nangentonga yoonyana baka-Adam;"
2Samuel7:15 Ke yona inceba yam ayiyi kumka kuye, njengoko ndayisusayo kuSawule, endimsusileyo ebusweni bakho."
2Samuel7:16 Indlu yakho nobukumkani bakho buya kuma ngonaphakade phambi kwakho; Itrone yakho iya kuzinza ngonaphakade.
2Samuel7:17 Njengaloo mazwi onke, ngokwalo mbono, wenjenjalo uNatan ukuthetha kuDavide."
2Samuel7:18 Wangena ukumkani uDavide, wahlala phambi koYehova, wathi, Ndingubani na mna, Nkosi yam Yehova? Iyintoni na indlu yam, ukuba ude undizise apha?"
2Samuel7:19 Bekusekuncinane oko emehlweni akho, Nkosi enguMongami Yehova; Wathetha ixesha elide ngendlu yomkhonzi wakho. Le yindlela yomntu na, Nkosi yam Yehova?"
2Samuel7:20 Wobuya athini na ke uDavide kuwe? ngokuba wena, Nkosi yam Yehova, uyamazi umkhonzi wakho."
2Samuel7:21 Ngenxa yelizwi lakho nangokwentliziyo yakho wenze zonke ezi zinto zinkulu, ukuze umkhonzi wakho azazi."
2Samuel7:22 Ngako oko umkhulu, Yehova Yehova, ngokuba akukho unjengawe, akukho Thixo ingenguwe, njengoko sikuvileyo ngeendlebe zethu."
2Samuel7:23 Luluphi na uhlanga ehlabathini apha, olunjengohlanga lwenu, olunjengoSirayeli, awazikhululela lona uThixo, ukuba lube luhlanga, luzenzele igama, lulenzele ilizwe lenu izinto ezinkulu ezoyikekayo, phambi kwelizwe lenu phambi kobuso belizwe abantu bakho obakhululeyo ubakhulule? Ufumaneka eYiputa ezintlangeni nakoothixo bazo na?"
2Samuel7:24 Uqinise abantu bakho amaSirayeli, ukuba babe ngabantu bakho kude kuse ephakadeni; wena Yehova waba nguThixo wabo."
2Samuel7:25 Kaloku, Yehova Yehova, ilizwi olithethileyo ngomkhonzi wakho, nangendlu yakhe, limise ngonaphakade, wenze njengoko ukuthethileyo;"
2Samuel7:26 Malibe likhulu igama lakho kude kuse ephakadeni, kusithiwa, uYehova wemikhosi nguThixo kaSirayeli; Mayizinze indlu kaDavide umkhonzi wakho phambi kwakho."
2Samuel7:27 Ngenxa enokuba wena, Yehova wemikhosi, Thixo kaSirayeli, utyhile kumkhonzi wakho, wathi, Ndiya kukwakhela indlu; ngenxa yoko umkhonzi wakho wayifikelela intliziyo yakhe ukuba awuthandaze lo mthandazo."
2Samuel7:28 Kaloku, Nkosi yam Yehova, unguye uThixo wena, namazwi akho ayinyaniso;"
2Samuel7:29 Ke kaloku makukholeke kuwe ukuyisikelela indlu yomkhonzi wakho, ukuze ihlale ihleli phambi kobuso bakho ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo, ngenxa yokuba wena, iNkosi enguMongami uYehova uthethile; yaye indlu yomkhonzi wakho mayisikelelwe ngentsikelelo yakho ngonaphakade."
2Samuel8:1 Emva koko uDavide wawaxabela amaFilisti, waweyisa; uDavide wayithabatha iMetegamma esandleni samaFilisti."
2Samuel8:2 Wawaxabela amaMowabhi, wawalinganisa ulutya lokulinganisa, wawawisa; nangeentambo zokulinganisa zibe mbini, ukuze usindise ubomi ngomsonto wonke. Ngoko ke amaMowabhi aba ngabakhonzi bakaDavide abazisa izipho."
2Samuel8:3 uDavide wahlala noHadade-Ezere, unyana kaRehobhi, ukumkani waseSobha, ekubuyeni kwakhe, walibuyisela ilizwe lakhe emlanjeni ongumEfrati."
2Samuel8:4 uDavide wathimba iwaka leenqwelo zokulwa, namakhulu asixhenxe abamahashe, namashumi amabini amawaka omqikela;"
2Samuel8:5 Akufika ama-Aram evela eDamasko esiza kumnceda uHadade-Ezere ukumkani waseSobha, uDavide wabulala ama-Aram amashumi amabini anamabini amawaka."
2Samuel8:6 uDavide wabeka abalindi eDamasko kwelase-Aram, aza ama-Aram aba ngabakhonzi bakaDavide, abazisa izipho kuye. uYehova wamkhusela uDavide naphi na apho wayesiya khona."
2Samuel8:7 uDavide wawathabatha amakhaka egolide awayekubakhonzi bakaHadade-Ezere, wawazisa eYerusalem."
2Samuel8:8 eBheta naseBherotayi, izixeko zikaHadadezere, ukumkani uDavide wathabatha ubhedu oluninzi."
2Samuel8:9 Weva uToyi, ukumkani waseHamati, ukuba uDavide uyoyisile yonke impi kaHadade-Ezere."
2Samuel8:10 Ngoko uYehoram unyana wakhe wathumela kuKumkani uDavide ukuba ambulise aze amsikelele ngenxa yokuba wayelwe noHadadizere waza wamoyisa; ngenxa yokuba uHadadezere wayesilwa noToyi. uYoram weza neempahla zesilivere, nezegolide, nezobhedu;"
2Samuel8:11 nethe ukumkani uDavide wayingcwalisela uYehova, kunye nesilivere negolide, abeyingcwalisile ezintlangeni zonke awazithimbayo;"
2Samuel8:12 kuma-Aram, namaMowabhi, noonyana baka-Amon, namaFilisti, nama-Amaleki, namaxhoba kaHadade-Ezere, unyana kaRehobhi, ukumkani waseTsobha."
2Samuel8:13 uDavide wazenzela igama ekubuyeni kwakhe ekuwaxabeleni ama-Aram kwiNtlambo yeTyuwa, ishumi elinesibhozo lamawaka."
2Samuel8:14 Wamisa abalindi kwaEdom; kulo lonke elakwaEdom wabeka amadoda anamandla, yaye lonke iEdom laba ngabakhonzi bakaDavide. uYehova wamkhusela uDavide naphi na apho wayesiya khona."
2Samuel8:15 Waye engukumkani ke uDavide kumaSirayeli onke; uDavide ubesenza okusesikweni nangobulungisa ebantwini bakhe bonke.
2Samuel8:16 uYowabhi, unyana kaTseruya, ubephethe umkhosi; nguYoshafati unyana ka-Akiludi, obephethe;"
2Samuel8:17 uTsadoki unyana ka-Ahitubhi, noAhimeleki, unyana ka-Abhiyatare, babengababingeleli; uSeraya ubengumbhali;"
2Samuel8:18 uBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada wayephethe amaKrete namaPleti; yaye oonyana bakaDavide babeziintloko.
2Samuel9:1 Wathi uDavide, Kusekho mpunde na kwindlu kaSawule, endiya kuyisindisa ngenxa kaYonatan?"
2Samuel9:2 Ke endlwini kaSawule bekukho isicaka esigama linguTsibha. Bambizela kuDavide, wathi ukumkani kuye, UnguTsibha na? Wathi, Ngumkhonzi wakho lo."
2Samuel9:3 Wathi ukumkani, Akukho bani wendlu kaSawule, endinokumbonisa inceba kaThixo? Wathi uTsibha kukumkani, Omnye unyana kaYonatan usisiqhwala."
2Samuel9:4 Wathi ukumkani kuye, Uphi na? Wathi uTsibha kukumkani, Nantsiya iLodebhare endlwini kaMagire, unyana ka-Amiyeli;"
2Samuel9:5 Wathumela ukumkani uDavide ukuba amthabathe endlwini kaMagire unyana ka-Amiyeli, eLodebhare."
2Samuel9:6 Weza uMefibhoshete, unyana kaYonatan, unyana kaSawule, kuDavide, wawa ngobuso, waqubuda kuye. Wathi uDavide, Mefibhoshete! Wathi, Nanko umkhonzi wakho!"
2Samuel9:7 Wathi uDavide kuye, Musa ukoyika; ngokuba ndiya kuba nemfesane kuwe ngenene, ngenxa kaYonatan uyihlo; ndiya kulibuyisela lonke ilizwe likaSawule uyihlo; kwaye niya kusoloko nisidla isonka etafileni yam."
2Samuel9:8 Waqubuda, wathi, Uyintoni na umkhonzi wakho, ukuba ukhangele nenja efileyo nje, enjengam nje?"
2Samuel9:9 Ukumkani wabiza uTsibha, umfana wakwaSawule, wathi kuye, Yonke into ebiyekaSawule, nendlu yakhe yonke, ndiyinike unyana wenkosi yakho."
2Samuel9:10 Wena ke, wena noonyana bakho, nabakhonzi bakho, nimtyale umhlaba, nimvelise iziqhamo, adle unyana wokumkani wenu; ke uMefibhoshete, unyana wenkosi yakho, uya kusoloko esidla isonka etafileni yam. UZibha ubenoonyana abalishumi elinabahlanu, nabakhonzi abamashumi mabini."
2Samuel9:11 Wathi uTsibha kukumkani, Njengoko ukumkani, inkosi yam, wamwisela umthetho umkhonzi wakhe, uya kwenza ngako umkhonzi wakho. Ke yena uMefibhoshete, utsho ukumkani, uya kudla etafileni yam njengomnye woonyana bokumkani."
2Samuel9:12 uMefibhoshete wayenonyana omncinane, ogama linguMika. Yaye bonke abo babehlala endlwini kaTsibha babengabakhonzi bakaMefibhoshete."
2Samuel9:13 uMefibhoshete ubehlala eYerusalem, ngokuba ubesidla etafileni yokumkani ngamaxesha onke; wayesisiqhwala emilenzeni yakhe yomibini."
2Samuel10:1 Emva koko wafa ukumkani woonyana baka-Amon, kwalawula uHanun, unyana wakhe, esikhundleni sakhe."
2Samuel10:2 Wathi uDavide, Mandimenzele inceba uHanun unyana kaNahashe, njengokuba noyise wandenzelayo inceba. Wathumela uDavide ukuba amkhuze ngabakhonzi bakhe ngenxa kayise. Bafika abakhonzi bakaDavide ezweni loonyana baka-Amon."
2Samuel10:3 Bathi abathetheli boonyana baka-Amon kuHanun umniniyo, Uthi na wena, Utsho na ukuthi, Uyihlo uDavide ebebeka intuthuzelo kuwe na? uDavide akabathumanga na abakhonzi bakhe kuni, ukuba awuhlole lo mzi, bawuncothule, bawutshabalalise?"
2Samuel10:4 Wababamba ke uHanun abakhonzi bakaDavide, wabacheba isiqingatha seendevu zabo, wazicanda iingubo zabo, wada waya esinqeni, wada wabandulula."
2Samuel10:5 Kwathi, xa bamxelelayo uDavide, wathumela ukuba bawahlangabeze; ngokuba amadoda lawo abeneentloni kakhulu; Wathi ukumkani, Hlalani eYeriko zide zihlume iindevu zenu, nandule ukubuya."
2Samuel10:6 Babona oonyana baka-Amon ukuba badakumbile phambi koDavide, bathumela oonyana baka-Amon, baqesha kuma-Aram aseBhete-hobhi, nakuma-Aram aseTsobha, amashumi amabini amawaka amadoda ahamba ngeenyawo, nakukumkani waseMahaka, iwaka lamadoda, ishumi elinesibini lamawaka amadoda ahamba ngeenyawo."
2Samuel10:7 Akuyiva le nto uDavide wathumela uYowabhi nomkhosi wonke wamagorha.
2Samuel10:8 Baphuma oonyana baka-Amon, balwa idabi ekungeneni kwesango; ama-Aram aseSobha, naseRehobhi, naseIstobhi, naseMahagi, ebeyedwa ezweni."
2Samuel10:9 Wabona uYowabhi ukuba imfazwe ifike ngaphambili nangasemva kwakhe;
2Samuel10:10 Abanye abantu wabanikela kuAbhishayi umntakwabo, ukuze abalungiselele nxamnye noonyana baka-Amoni."
2Samuel10:11 Wathi, Xa athe andifumana ama-Aram, wondinceda; kodwa ukuba oonyana baka-Amoni bomelele kunawe, ndiya kuza ndize ndikuncede."
2Samuel10:12 Yiba nesibindi size senze isabelo sethu ukuze kulungelwe uhlanga lwethu nakwizixeko zoThixo wethu, yaye ngamana uYehova angenza ukuthanda kwakhe."
2Samuel10:13 Wasondela uYowabhi namadoda abenaye, ukuba bawaxabele ama-Aram; asaba ebusweni bakhe."
2Samuel10:14 Xa oonyana baka-Amoni babona ukuba ama-Aram asabile, nabo basaba phambi koAbhishayi baza bangena esixekweni. Wabuya ke uYowabhi koonyana baka-Amon, weza eYerusalem."
2Samuel10:15 Akubona ama-Aram ukuba oyiswe ngamaSirayeli, ahlanganisana ndawonye."
2Samuel10:16 Wathumela uHadadezere, waya kuwathabatha ama-Aram abephesheya koMlambo, afike eHelam; ekhokelwa nguShobhage, injengele yomkhosi kaHadadezere."
2Samuel10:17 Kwaxelwa kuDavide, wawahlanganisa onke amaSirayeli, wayiwela iYordan, waya kufika eHelam. Yaye amaSiriya ahlanganisana ndawonye ukuba alwe noDavide, yaye alwa naye."
2Samuel10:18 Asaba ama-Aram phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli; uDavide wabulala kuma-Aram amakhulu asixhenxe amadoda eenqwelo zokulwa, namashumi amane amawaka abamahashe, noSobhage, umthetheli womkhosi, wafela khona."
2Samuel10:19 Babona bonke ookumkani bakaHadadezere ukuba uyoyisiwe phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli, baxolelana noonyana bakaSirayeli, babakhonza. Ngoko ke ama-Aram oyika ukubanceda oonyana baka-Amon kwakhona."
2Samuel11:1 Wakuzaliseka umnyaka, ngexesha lokulwa kookumkani, uDavide wamthuma uYowabhi, nabakhonzi bakhe, namaSirayeli onke; yaye bababulala oonyana baka-Amoni baza bayibulala iRabha. Kodwa uDavide wayeseseYerusalem."
2Samuel11:2 Kwahlwa, wesuka uDavide esingqengqelweni sakhe, wahambahamba phezu kwendlu yokumkani; yaye loo mfazi wayemhle kunene ngembonakalo."
2Samuel11:3 Wathumela uDavide ukuba aye kubuza kuloo ntokazi. Wathi omnye, Asinguye na uBhatshebha, intombi kaEliyam, umkaUriya umHeti?"
2Samuel11:4 uDavide wathuma abathunywa ukuba bamthabathe; wamngena, walala naye; kuba ebehlambulukile ihambo yakhe, wabuyela endlwini yakhe."
2Samuel11:5 Wamitha umfazi lowo, wathumela ukuya kuxelela uDavide, esithi, Ndimithi."
2Samuel11:6 uDavide wathumela kuYowabhi, esithi, Thumela kum u-Uriya umHeti. uYowabhi wamthumela u-Uriya kuDavide."
2Samuel11:7 Weza u-Uriya kuye; uDavide wambuza ukuba unjani na uYowabhi, banjani na abantu, injani na imfazwe."
2Samuel11:8 Wathi uDavide ku-Uriya, Yihla uye endlwini yakho, uhlambe iinyawo zakho. Waphuma u-Uriya endlwini yokumkani; walandelwa yinto eninzi yezidlo zokumkani."
2Samuel11:9 U-Uriya walala emnyango wendlu yokumkani, nabakhonzi bonke benkosi yakhe, akehla aye endlwini yakhe."
2Samuel11:10 Kwaxelwa kuDavide, kwathiwa, U-Uriya akehla aye endlwini yakhe; Yini na ukuba ungehli uye endlwini yakho?"
2Samuel11:11 Wathi u-Uriya kuDavide, Ityeya namaSirayeli namaYuda ahleli ezintenteni; Inkosi yam uYowabhi, nabakhonzi benkosi yam, babemise iintente ezweni; Ndiya kungena endlwini yam ndidle, ndisele, ndilale nomkam? ukuba niphilile, uphila umphefumlo wakho, andiyi kuyenza loo nto."
2Samuel11:12 Wathi uDavide ku-Uriya, Naye usahleli apha, ndokukhulula ngomso. Yaye u-Uriya wayithimba iYerusalem ngaloo mini nangengomso."
2Samuel11:13 Wambiza uDavide, wadla, wasela ngakuye wanxila, waphuma ngokuhlwa waya kulala esingqengqelweni sakhe nabakhonzi benkosi yakhe, akehla aye endlwini yakhe."
2Samuel11:14 Kwathi kusasa uDavide wabhalela uYowabhi incwadi, wayithumela ngo-Uriya."
2Samuel11:15 Wabhala ke encwadini, wathi, Mbekeni u-Uriya phambi kwemfazwe enzima, nimndulule, abuyiswe, afe."
2Samuel11:16 Akuwubona uYowabhi umzi lowo, wambeka u-Uriya kwindawo abesazi ukuba kukho amadoda anobukroti."
2Samuel11:17 Aphuma amadoda aloo mzi, aya kulwa noYowabhi; kwawa amadoda kubakhonzi bakaDavide; wafa naye u-Uriya umHeti."
2Samuel11:18 Emva koko uYowabhi wathumela waza wamxelela uDavide konke malunga nedabi;
2Samuel11:19 Wamwisela umthetho umthunywa, wathi, Xa ugqibileyo ukumxelela ukumkani iindaba zemfazwe;"
2Samuel11:20 Wenyuka umsindo wokumkani, wathi kuni, Ibiyini na ukuba nisondele phakathi komzi ngokulwa? Ubungazi na ukuba zodla eludongeni?"
2Samuel11:21 Ngubani na owambulala uAbhimeleki unyana kaYerubheseti? Asinguye na owagalela kuye ilitye lokusila ephezu kodonga, wada wafela eTebhetse? Yini na ukuba usondele eludongeni? wathi, Utshabalele umkhonzi wakho u-Uriya umHeti."
2Samuel11:22 Wahamba umthunywa, wafika wamxelela uDavide konke abemthume kona uYowabhi."
2Samuel11:23 Wathi umthunywa lowo kuDavide, La madoda asoyisa, esifa ezweni, sahlala nawo kwada kwasa ekungeneni kwesango."
2Samuel11:24 Abadla eludongeni badla abaluse abakhonzi bakho; kwafa inxenye yakubakhonzi bokumkani, wafa nomkhonzi wakho u-Uriya umHeti."
2Samuel11:25 Wathi uDavide kumthunywa lowo, Yithi kuYowabhi, Mayingakuvuthi le nto, ngokuba umkhonto ubulala bonke abantu; qinisa ukulwa kwakho nomzi lowo, utshatyalalisiwe, womeleze ngawo."
2Samuel11:26 Weva umka-Uriya ukuba ufile u-Uriya indoda yakhe, wayikhalela indoda yakhe."
2Samuel11:27 Lakuzaliseka ixesha lesijwili, wathumela uDavide, wamthabathela endlwini yakhe, waba ngumkakhe, wamzalela unyana. Kodwa into eyenziwa nguDavide yayiphosakele emehlweni kaYehova."
2Samuel12:1 uYehova wathumela uNatan kuDavide. Weza kuye, wathi kuye, Kwakukho amadoda amabini kwidolophu enye; omnye usisityebi, omnye elihlwempu."
2Samuel12:2 Indoda esisityebi yayinemihlambi yeegusha neenkomo ezininzi.
2Samuel12:3 Elihlwempu yayingenanto, kuphela yayinemva nazana encinane inye, ebiyizuzile, yayikhulisa; yadla isonka sayo, yasela endebeni yayo, yalala esifubeni sayo, yanjengentombi kuye."
2Samuel12:4 Ke kaloku, kwafika undwendwe kumntu osisityebi, wayeka ukuthabatha empahleni yakhe emfutshane neenkomo zakhe, ukuba amgcine umhambi lowo ubeze kuye; wathabatha ixhwane lendoda elihlwempu, wayilungiselela umntu oze kuyo."
2Samuel12:5 Wavutha umsindo kaDavide ngenxa yaloo ndoda; Wathi kuNatan, NgoYehova ovayo, inene, loo mntu wenze loo nto uya kufa."
2Samuel12:6 Woyibuyisela imvana ezimvini, ngenxa yokuba eyenzile le nto nangenxa yokuba engenanceba."
2Samuel12:7 Wathi uNatan kuDavide, Nguwe loo ndoda. Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ndikuthambisile ukuba ube ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli, ndikuhlangule esandleni sikaSawule;"
2Samuel12:8 ndakunika indlu yenkosi yakho, nabafazi benkosi yakho esifubeni sakho, ndakunika indlu yakwaSirayeli neyakwaYuda; ke ukuba ibithe yancinane, ngendikunike oku, noko;"
2Samuel12:9 Kutheni na ukuba uwudelele umyalelo kaYehova wokuba wenze okubi emehlweni akhe? wambulala u-Uriya umHeti ngekrele, wamthabatha umkakhe, wangumkakhe, wambulala ngekrele loonyana baka-Amon."
2Samuel12:10 Ngoku ikrele aliyi kumka endlwini yakho; ngenxa enokuba undidelile, wamzeka umkaUriya umHeti, wangumkakho."
2Samuel12:11 Wathi uYehova, Yabona, ndikukhuphela ububi obuphuma endlwini yakho, ndibathabathe abafazi bakho, basuke ebusweni bakho, ndibanike abakho, ulale nabafazi bakho, phambi kwale mini."
2Samuel12:12 Kuba wena ukwenze oko emfihlekweni, kodwa mna ndiya kuyenza le nto phambi kwawo onke amaSirayeli naphambi kwamehlo elanga."
2Samuel12:13 Wathi uDavide kuNatan, Ndonile kuYehova. Wathi uNatan kuDavide, uYehova usisusile isono sakho; anisayi kufa."
2Samuel12:14 Kodwa ngenxa yokuba ngesi senzo uzinike isizathu esikhulu sokunyelisa iintshaba zikaYehova, lo mntwana umzeleyo uya kufa ngokuqinisekileyo."
2Samuel12:15 Waya uNatan endlwini yakhe. uYehova wambetha umntwana lowo umkaUriya wamzalela uDavide, wagula kakhulu."
2Samuel12:16 uDavide wathandazela umntwana kuThixo; uDavide wazila ukudla, wangena, walala emhlabeni ubusuku bonke."
2Samuel12:17 Asuka amadoda amakhulu endlu yakhe, eza kuye, ukuba amfunqule emhlabeni; akavuma, akadla sonka nabo."
2Samuel12:18 Kwathi ngomhla wesixhenxe wafa umntwana. Boyika abakhonzi bakaDavide ukumxelela ukuba umntwana ufile, bathi, Yabona, engaphilanga umntwana, sathetha kuye, akawaphulaphula amazwi ethu; Uzoxakwa njani xa simxelela ukuba umntwana ufile?"
2Samuel12:19 Wabona uDavide ukuba abakhonzi bakhe bayasebezelana, wabona uDavide ukuba ufile umntwana; Wathi uDavide kubakhonzi bakhe, Ufile na umntwana? Bathi ke bona, Ufile."
2Samuel12:20 Emva koko uDavide waphakama emhlabeni waza wazihlamba waza wamthambisa waza wambatha ezinye izambatho waza wangena endlwini kaYehova waqubuda; wacela, babeka isonka phambi kwakhe, wadla."
2Samuel12:21 Bathi abakhonzi bakhe kuye, Yintoni na le nto uyenzileyo? Oko ebesahleli umntwana, wazila ukudla, walila; Akuba efile umntwana, wavuka wadla isonka."
2Samuel12:22 Wathi, Akuba engasahleli umntwana, ndazila ukudla, ndalila, ngokuba bendisithi, Ngubani na owaziyo, ukuba uThixo angandiba nenceba, aphile umntwana?"
2Samuel12:23 Efile nje kaloku, yini na ukuba ndibe ndisazila ukudla? ndingambuyisela na ke kuye, ndiya kuye, akasayi kubuyela kum."
2Samuel12:24 uDavide wamthuthuzela uBhatshebha umkakhe, wamngena, walala naye; wazala unyana, wathi igama lakhe nguSolomon; uYehova wamthanda."
2Samuel12:25 Wathumela ke ngesandla somprofeti uNatan; waza wamthiya igama elinguYedidiya ngenxa kaYehova.
2Samuel12:26 uYowabhi wayixabela iRabha yoonyana baka-Amoni waza wasithimba isixeko sasebukhosini.
2Samuel12:27 uYowabhi wathumela abathunywa kuDavide, esithi, Ndilwile neRabha, ndawuthimbela umzi wamanzi."
2Samuel12:28 Bahlanganiseni ke ngoko abantu abaseleyo, nimise iintente phakathi komzi, nibuye, ukuze ndingawuthimbi umzi, ubizwe ngegama lam."
2Samuel12:29 Wabahlanganisa ke uDavide bonke abantu, waya eRabha, walwa, wayoyisa."
2Samuel12:30 Wathabatha isithsaba sokumkani wabo entlokweni yakhe, ubunzima betalente yegolide, sinamatye anqabileyo, wasibeka entlokweni kaDavide. Waphuma namaxhoba aloo mzi, aba maninzi kunene."
2Samuel12:31 Wawathabatha amadoda akhona, wawafaka ngeesarha, nangamazembe esinyithi, namazembe esinyithi, awacandisa ezikweni lamatye; Wenjenjalo kwimizi yonke yoonyana baka-Amon. Emva koko uDavide nabantu bonke babuyela eYerusalem."
2Samuel13:1 Emveni koko ke uAbhisalom, unyana kaDavide, ebenodade wabo oyinzwakazi, ogama linguTamare; uAmnon, unyana kaDavide, ubemthanda."
2Samuel13:2 Wakhathazeka uAmnon, wagula ngenxa kaTamare udade wabo; ngokuba ebeyintombi; kwaba nzima kuye uAmnon ukuba amenze nto."
2Samuel13:3 Ke kaloku uAmnon ebenomhlobo, ogama linguYonadabhi, unyana kaShimeha, umkhuluwa kaDavide; uYonadabhi ebeyindoda elumke kakhulu."
2Samuel13:4 Wathi kuye, Yini na, nyana wokumkani, ukuba ubhitywe imihla ngemihla? awundixeleli? Wathi uAmnon kuye, Ndithanda uTamare, udade boAbhisalom, udade wethu."
2Samuel13:5 Wathi uYonadabhi kuye, Lala esililini sakho, uyafa; xa uyihlo eze kukubona, uthi kuye, Yithi kuTamare, udade wethu, eze kundinike inyama, alungise inyama emehlweni am, ukuze ndiyibone, ndiyidle esandleni sakhe."
2Samuel13:6 Walala ubuthongo uAmnon, wahliwa kukufa; Wafika ukumkani eza kumbona, wathi uAmnon kukumkani, Yithi kuTamare, udade wethu, eze, andenzele isonka phambi kwam, ndisidle esandleni sakhe."
2Samuel13:7 Wathumela uDavide kuTamare endlwini, esithi, Yiya kuAmnon udadewenu, umlungiselele ukudla."
2Samuel13:8 Waya uTamare endlwini ka-Amnon udade wabo; walala. Wathabatha umgubo, waxovula, wenza amaqebengwana phambi kwakhe, wawosa amaqebengwana."
2Samuel13:9 Wathabatha ipani, wayigalela phambi kwakhe; akavuma ukudla. Wathi uAmnon, Mabandishiye bonke bephela. Baphuma ke ngabanye kuye."
2Samuel13:10 Wathi uAmnon kuTamare, Yingenise inyama egumbini, ndiyidle esandleni sakho. Wazithabatha uTamare izonkana eziyolisa intliziyo abezenzile, wawasa egumbini lika-Amnon udade wabo."
2Samuel13:11 Wazisondeza kuye ukuba adle, wambamba, wathi kuye, Yiza, ulale nam, mzalwana wam."
2Samuel13:12 Waphendula ke wathi kuye, Hayi, dade wethu, musa ukundidlwengula; ngokuba ayinakwenziwa into enjalo kwaSirayeli; musani ukwenza obu budenge."
2Samuel13:13 Mna ndingaya phi na ihlazo lam? ke wena, uya kuba njengesidenge kwaSirayeli. Thetha uAko kukumkani; ngokuba akayi kundabela nani."
2Samuel13:14 Akavuma ukuliphulaphula ilizwi lakhe, kodwa ngenxa yokuba wamomelele kunaye, wamnyanzela, walala naye."
2Samuel13:15 Waza uAmnon wamthiya kunene kunene; ngokuba yaba nkulu intiyo awamthiya ngayo, ngaphezu kothando abemthande ngalo. Wathi uAmnon kuye, Vuka uhambe."
2Samuel13:16 Wathi kuye, Akukho tyala; Obu bubi bokundigxotha bukhulu kunabo bonke obenzileyo kum. Akavuma ukumphulaphula."
2Samuel13:17 Wabiza umfana, umlungiseleli wakhe, wathi, Thabathani, emke kum le nkazana, nilutshixe ucango emva kwayo."
2Samuel13:18 Wayambethe ingubo eqaqambileyo, njengengubo enjalo iintombi zokumkani eziseziintombi, eziziintombi. Waza umlungiseleli wakhe waphuma nayo, waluvala ucango emva kwayo."
2Samuel13:19 Waza uTamare wazigalela ngothuthu entloko, wayikrazula isambatho sakhe esimibalabala abesikuye, wabeka isandla sakhe phezu kwentloko yakhe, waqhubeka elila."
2Samuel13:20 Wathi uAbhisalom udade kuye, Ubenawe na uAmnon udadewenu? Kodwa khawuthule, dade wethu, ndingumnakwenu; musa ukucinga ngale nto. Wahlala uTamare endlwini ka-Abhisalom udade wabo, ekhathazekile."
2Samuel13:21 Waziva ukumkani uDavide zonke ezo nto, wavutha ngumsindo kunene."
2Samuel13:22 uAbhisalom akazange athethe okulungileyo okanye okubi kuAmnon umntakwabo, ngenxa yokuba uAbhisalom wamthiya uAmnon ngenxa yokuba wayengqongqo kuTamare udade wabo."
2Samuel13:23 Kwathi ke, ekupheleni kweminyaka emibini ezeleyo, waba nabachebi kuAbhisalom eBhahali-hatsore kwaEfrayim; uAbhisalom wamema bonke oonyana bokumkani."
2Samuel13:24 uAbhisalom weza kukumkani, wathi, Yabona, nabachebi kumkhonzi wakho; Ukumkani nabakhonzi bakhe makahambe nomkhonzi wakho."
2Samuel13:25 Wathi ukumkani kuAbhisalom, Hayi, nyana wam, masiye sonke; ngokuba asinatyala kuwe. Wamjoka, akavuma ukuya; endaweni yoko wamsikelela."
2Samuel13:26 Wathi uAbhisalom, Ukuba akunjalo, makahambe nathi uAmnon, umkhuluwa wam. Wathi ukumkani kuye, Yini na ukuba ahambe nawe?"
2Samuel13:27 Kodwa uAbhisalom waqhubeka emcinezela kangangokuba wavuma ukuba uAmnon nabo bonke oonyana bokumkani bahambe naye.
2Samuel13:28 uAbhisalom wabayalela abakhonzi bakhe, esithi: “Nikelani ingqalelo xa intliziyo ka-Amnon inemihlali ngewayini, ndize mna ndithi kuni, ‘Bulalani uAmnon! uze ke umbulale, musani ukoyika. Andikuyalelanga? Yiba nesibindi kwaye ube nesibindi."
2Samuel13:29 Enza ke amadodana ka-Abhisalom kuAmnon njengoko uAbhisalom abewawisele umthetho. Besuka bonke oonyana bokumkani, bamkhwelisa elowo imeyile yakhe, babaleka."
2Samuel13:30 Kwathi, besendleleni, yafika ingxelo kuDavide, isithi, uAbhisalom ubabulele bonke oonyana bokumkani, akwasala namnye."
2Samuel13:31 Wesuka wema ukumkani, wazikrazula iingubo zakhe, waqungquluza emhlabeni; bonke abakhonzi bakhe bemi khona apho, benxibe iingubo ezikrazukileyo."
2Samuel13:32 Waphendula uYonadabhi, unyana kaShimeha, umkhuluwa kaDavide, wathi, Mayingathi inkosi yam abulewe onke amadodana angoonyana bokumkani; ngenxa yokuba nguAmnon yedwa owafayo, ekubeni yayitywiniwe ngokomyalelo ka-Abhisalom ukususela ngomhla awamnyanzela ngawo uTamare udade wabo."
2Samuel13:33 Ke ngoko ukumkani wam makangawubeki ntliziyo lo mbandela, athi bonke oonyana bokumkani mabafe; ngokuba nguAmnon yedwa ofileyo."
2Samuel13:34 Ke uAbhisalom wasaba. Unogada waphakamisa amehlo akhe waza wabona abantu abaninzi benyuka ngendlela besuka endulini emva kwakhe.
2Samuel13:35 Wathi uYonadabhi kukumkani, Naba oonyana bokumkani besiza; njengoko watshoyo umkhonzi wakho, kunjalo."
2Samuel13:36 Kwathi, akugqiba ukuthetha, bafika oonyana bokumkani, baliphakamisa ilizwi labo, balila; balila ngokukrakra ukumkani nabakhonzi bakhe."
2Samuel13:37 Kodwa uAbhisalom wasaba waza waya kuTalemayi unyana ka-Amihudi ukumkani waseGeshuri. uDavide wamzilela unyana wakhe imini yonke.
2Samuel13:38 Wasaba ke uAbhisalom, waya eGeshuri, wahlala khona iminyaka emithathu."
2Samuel13:39 Intliziyo kaKumkani uDavide yamlangazelela uAbhisalom, ngenxa yokuba wayethuthuzelekile nguAmnon, kuba efile."
2Samuel14:1 uYowabhi unyana kaTseruya, wabona ukuba intliziyo yokumkani ikuAbhisalom."
2Samuel14:2 Wathumela uYowabhi eTekowa, wathabatha khona inkazana elumkileyo, wathi kuyo, Yambatha iingubo ezimnyama, yambathe iingubo ezimnyama, ungazithambisi ngeoli; yiba njengomfazi olilela ofileyo ixesha elide;"
2Samuel14:3 uye kukumkani, uthethe kuye wenjenje; uYowabhi wawabeka amazwi emlonyeni wakhe."
2Samuel14:4 Wathi umkaTekowa kukumkani, wawa ngobuso, waqubuda, wathi, Sindisa, kumkani."
2Samuel14:5 Wathi ukumkani kuye, Uyintoni na umsebenzi wakho? Waphendula wathi, Ndingumhlolokazi; indoda yam ifile."
2Samuel14:6 Umkhonzazana wakho ebenoonyana ababini, balwa bobabini endle, akwabakho mhlanguli phakathi kwabo; omnye wambetha omnye, wambulala."
2Samuel14:7 Yabona, wonke umzalwane wenyuka phezu komkhonzi wakho, wathi, Masizinikele kulowo umbuleleyo umzalwana wakhe, simbulale ngenxa yomphefumlo womzalwana lowo ambuleleyo; kananjalo siya kutshabalalisa indlalifa, kwaye ke baya kulicima ilahle lam eliseleyo, kwaye bangashiyi gama okanye intsalela yomyeni wam ehlabathini."
2Samuel14:8 Wathi ukumkani kwinkazana leyo, Hamba uye endlwini yakho, ndokuwisela umthetho."
2Samuel14:9 Wathi umkaTekowa kukumkani, Nkosi yam, kumkani, senziwe ububi kum, nakwindlu kabawo; umsulwa yena ukumkani netrone yakhe."
2Samuel14:10 Wathi ukumkani, Bonke baya kunibalisa ibali, nimzise kum; akasayi kuphinda akuchukumise."
2Samuel14:11 Wathi, uYehova makamkhumbule uYehova uThixo wakho, ukuba ungabi savuma ukuba amadoda anegazi atshabalalise, angamtshabalalisi unyana wam. Wathi, Ehleli nje uYehova, akuyi kuwa nalunye unwele lonyana wakho emhlabeni."
2Samuel14:12 Yathi inkazana, Makhe athethe umkhonzazana wakho enkosini yam ukumkani. Wathi yena, Hambani niye!"
2Samuel14:13 Yathi inkazana leyo, Yini na ukuba ucinge into enje ngabantu bakaThixo? ngenxa yokuba ukumkani ethetha ngale ndawo nangetyala, ukumkani angambuyiseli endlwini yakhe ogxothiweyo."
2Samuel14:14 Ngokuba siya kufa, sibe njengamanzi aphaleleyo emhlabeni, angenakuqokelelwa kwakhona; kananjalo uThixo akahloniphi mntu; Noko ke, uceba icebo ukuze abathinjwa bakhe bangagxothwa bemke kuye."
2Samuel14:15 Ke kaloku, le nto ndize kuyithetha le nto enkosini yam ukumkani, kungenxa yokuba abantu bebendisongela; wathi umkhonzi wakho, Makhe ndithethe kukumkani; kunokwenzeka ukuba ukumkani azalisekise isicelo sekhoboka lakhe."
2Samuel14:16 Kuba ukumkani uya kuva ukuze asindise ikhoboka lakhe esandleni somntu ofuna ukunditshabalalisa kunye nonyana wam elifeni likaThixo.
2Samuel14:17 Wathi umkhonzi wakho, Ilizwi lokumkani, nkosi yam, malibe lelokuthuthuzela; ngokuba inkosi yam ukumkani, inkosi yam, injengesithunywa sikaThixo, esahlula phakathi kokulungileyo nokubi; ngako oko uYehova uThixo wakho uya kuba nawe."
2Samuel14:18 Waphendula ukumkani, wathi kwinkazana, Musa ukukha uyikhanyele kum into endikubuzayo. Yathi inkazana, Camagu, nkosi yam, makathethe."
2Samuel14:19 Wathi ukumkani, Ndathi, Isandla sikaYowabhi sinawe na kuyo yonke loo nto? Yaphendula inkazana leyo, yathi, Ngemihla yakho yonke, nkosi yam, nkosi yam, akuyi kutyeka, aye ekunene nasekhohlo, kuko konke akuthethileyo inkosi yam ukumkani; ngokuba undiwisele umthetho umkhonzi wakho uYowabhi, kuwo onke la mazwi emlonyeni womkhonzi wakho."
2Samuel14:20 Wenjenjalo uYowabhi umkhonzi wakho, ukuba athethe ilizwi; Ke inkosi yam ilumke ngokulumka kwesithunywa sikaThixo, ukuba yazi konke okusehlabathini;"
2Samuel14:21 Wathi uYehova kuYowabhi, Yabona, ndiyenzile ke loo nto; hamba uye, umbuyise umfana lowo uAbhisalom."
2Samuel14:22 Wawa uYowabhi ngobuso bakhe, waqubuda, wabulela kukumkani; Wathi uYowabhi, Uyazi kakuhle namhla, mkhonzi wakho, ukuba ndikwenzele inceba, enkosini yam ukumkani, ngesicelo sokumkani, somkhonzi wakhe."
2Samuel14:23 Wemka uYowabhi, waya eGeshuri, wamzisa uAbhisalom eYerusalem."
2Samuel14:24 Wathi ukumkani, Makahambe aye endlwini yakhe, angabuboni ubuso bam. uAbhisalom wabuyela endlwini yakhe; akabubona ubuso bokumkani."
2Samuel14:25 Ke kumaSirayeli onke bekungekho ndoda injengoAbhisalom ukuba yinzwana, ngokokuze adunyiswe kunene; kuthabathele entendeni yeenyawo kwesa entloko, akusweli nto."
2Samuel14:26 Kwathiwa akayinqumli intloko, ngokuba wayeyinqunqa ekupheleni konyaka; ngokuba iinwele bezinzima kuye, wabulinganisa, wabulinganisa ubunzima beenwele zentloko yakhe, zaba ziishekele ezimakhulu mabini, ngokobunzima bokumkani."
2Samuel14:27 uAbhisalom wazala oonyana abathathu, nentombi yanye, igama layo belinguTamare; ibingumfazi omile kakuhle."
2Samuel14:28 uAbhisalom wahlala eYerusalem iminyaka emibini, engabuboni ubuso bokumkani."
2Samuel14:29 uAbhisalom wathumela kuYowabhi, ukuba amthumele kukumkani; akavuma ukuza kuye; Waphinda wathumela okwesibini akavuma ukuza."
2Samuel14:30 Wathi kubakhonzi bakhe, Khangelani, umhlaba kaYowabhi, ungakwem, unerhasi khona; uya kukutshisa wena. Bayitshisa abakhonzi baka-Abhisalom intsimi."
2Samuel14:31 Akugqiba uYowabhi, weza kuAbhisalom endlwini yakhe, wathi kuye, Yini na ukuba abakhonzi bakho bayitshise intsimi yam?"
2Samuel14:32 uAbhisalom wamphendula uYowabhi, wathi, Yabona, ndithumele kuwe, ndisithi, Yiza apha, ndikuthumele kukumkani, uthi, Ndimkile na eGeshuri? kwakumnandi xa ndikhona; Makhe ndibubone ubuso bokumkani; ukuba buthe bakho kum ubutshinga, makandibulale."
2Samuel14:33 Waya ke uYowabhi kukumkani, wamxelela; Wambiza uAbhisalom, weza kuYehova, waqubuda kuye; ukumkani wamanga uAbhisalom."
2Samuel15:1 Emveni koko uAbhisalom wamlungisela iinqwelo zokulwa, namahashe, namadoda angamashumi amahlanu abaleka ngakuye."
2Samuel15:2 uAbhisalom wavuka kusasa, wema endleleni ngasesangweni; Kwathi, kwakufika kukumkani ukuba agwebe, uAbhisalom wambiza, wathi, Ungowawuphi na umzi? Wathi, Umkhonzi wakho lo ungowezizwe zakwaSirayeli."
2Samuel15:3 Wathi uAbhisalom kuye, Yabona, iindawo zakho zilungile, zinobulungisa; Ke ukumkani akanikwanga ukuba aphulaphule."
2Samuel15:4 Wathi uAbhisalom, Ukuba bendithe ndaba ngumgwebi kweli lizwe, beza kum bonke abantu abanendawo kubo, nokuba kubanjwene, bendiya kumgweba."
2Samuel15:5 Kwakusithiwa xa kukho umntu osondela kuye ukuze amhlonele, wayesolula isandla sakhe ambambe aze amange."
2Samuel15:6 Wenza ke uAbhisalom kumaSirayeli onke, abesiza kukumkani ukuba agwebe;"
2Samuel15:7 Kwathi, kwakuzaliseka iminyaka emashumi mane, wathi uAbhisalom kukumkani, Ndivumele ndiye, ndisizalise isibhambathiso sam endasenzayo kuYehova eHebron;"
2Samuel15:8 Kuba wenza isifungo somkhonzi wakho ngoxa ndandisahlala eGeshuri ezweni lakwa-Aram, ndathi, ‘Ukuba uYehova angandibuyisela ngokulungileyo eYerusalem, ndiya kukhonza uYehova."
2Samuel15:9 Wathi ukumkani kuye, Hamba unoxolo. Wesuka ke waya eHebron."
2Samuel15:10 uAbhisalom wathuma iintlola ezizweni zonke zakwaSirayeli, esithi, Xa nithe naliva izwi lesigodlo, nithi, uAbhisalom ngukumkani waseHebron."
2Samuel15:11 uAbhisalom wahamba eYerusalem enamakhulu amabini amadoda abemenyiwe; bahamba ngobululamo babo, bengazi nto."
2Samuel15:12 uAbhisalom wathumela, ukuba kubizwe uAhitofele waseGiloni, umphakathi kaDavide, emzini wakhe eGilo, ebingelela imibingelelo. Laza elo cebo laba namandla; ngokuba abantu bebesanda kuAbhisalom."
2Samuel15:13 Wafika umthunywa lowo kuDavide, wathi, Iintliziyo zamadoda akwaSirayeli zilandele uAbhisalom;"
2Samuel15:14 Wathi uDavide kubakhonzi bakhe bonke ababenaye eYerusalem, Sukani, sisabe; ngokuba asinako ukumbaleka ngenye indlela uAbhisalom; khawulezani, nimke, hleze asifumane kwaoko, asihlisele ububi, awuxabele umzi ngohlangothi lwentshuntshe."
2Samuel15:15 Bathi abakhonzi bokumkani kukumkani, Yabona, yonke into, aya kuyimisa phambi kokumkani, inkosi yethu, naba bekho abakhonzi bakho."
2Samuel15:16 Waphuma ukumkani, yamlandela yonke indlu yakhe. Ukumkani wabashiya abalishumi elinezihibe, ukuba balinde indlu."
2Samuel15:17 Waphuma ke ukumkani, bamlandela bonke abantu, baya kuhlala mgama."
2Samuel15:18 Bahamba ecaleni kwakhe bonke abakhonzi bakhe; nawo onke amaKrete onke amaPeleti onke amaGati, amadoda angamakhulu amathandathu anesithandathu awayemlandela ukusuka eGati, awela phambi kokumkani."
2Samuel15:19 Wathi ukumkani kuItayi Mogati, Yini na ukuba uhambe nathi? buyela endlwini yakho, uhlale nokumkani;"
2Samuel15:20 Ufike nje izolo, ndikuvumele ukuba uhambe nathi namhlanje? Apho ndiya khona mna, buyani nani nithabathe abazalwana benu; Ubabalo nenyaniso zibe nawe."
2Samuel15:21 uItayi wamphendula ukumkani, wathi, NgoYehova ohleliyo, nangokumkani, ukumkani, inkosi yam, ohleliyo, nokuba ezindaweni zonke, ukumkani wam ukumkani uya kuba khona, ekufeni, nasebomini. Ndikhoyo, umkhonzi wakho uya kuba lapho."
2Samuel15:22 Wathi uDavide kuItayi, Hamba ugqithe. uItai waMogathe wadlula namadoda akhe onke nabantwana ababenaye."
2Samuel15:23 Lonke ilizwe laye lilila ngezwi elikhulu; nokumkani wawuwela umlambo waseKidron, yaye bonke abantu bawela ngendlela eya entlango."
2Samuel15:24 uTsadoki nabo bonke abaLevi babekunye naye bethwele ityeya yomnqophiso kaTHIXO oyinyaniso; bayibeka phantsi ityeya kaThixo; Wenyuka uAbhiyatare bada baphuma bonke abantu esixekweni.
2Samuel15:25 Wathi ukumkani kuTsadoki, Yibuyisele kuwo umzi ityeya kaThixo; ukuba ndithe ndababalwa nguYehova, wondibuyisa, andibonise yona nendawo yakhe yokuhlala."
2Samuel15:26 Ukuba uthe, Andikuvuyeleli; Yabona, ndim lo, undenze njengoko kulungileyo;"
2Samuel15:27 Wathi ukumkani kuTsadoki umbingeleli, Akuvumi na? buyela kuwo umzi unoxolo, noAhimahatse unyana wakho, noYonatan unyana ka-Abhiyatare, oonyana benu bobabini kunye nawe."
2Samuel15:28 Yabona, ndiya kuma ethafeni eliyinkqantosi;"
2Samuel15:29 Ngoko uTsadoki noAbhiyatare bayibuyisela ityeya yoTHIXO oyinyaniso eYerusalem baza bahlala khona.
2Samuel15:30 uDavide wenyuka kwithambeka leNtaba yemiNquma, wenyuka ekhala, egqubuthele intloko, ehamba engenazimbadada; benyuka."
2Samuel15:31 Kwaxelwa kuDavide, kwathiwa, uAhitofele ungomnye wabacebi baka-Abhisalom. Wathi uDavide, Yehova, liguqule libe bubudenge icebo lika-Ahitofele."
2Samuel15:32 Xa uDavide wafikayo encotsheni yentaba, apho wayethandaza kuThixo, uHushayi umArabhi wamhlangabeza, enxibe isambatho sangaphezulu eside nothuli entloko."
2Samuel15:33 Wathi uDavide kuye, Ukuba uthe wahamba nam, woba ngumthwalo kum;"
2Samuel15:34 ke ukuba uthe wabuyela kuwo umzi, wathi kuAbhisalom, Ndoba ngumkhonzi wakho, kumkani; njengoko bendingumkhonzi kayihlo unangoku, ndoba ngumkhonzi wakho ngokunjalo; wolitshitshisa icebo lika-Ahitofele ngenxa yam."
2Samuel15:35 Abanawe na ababingeleli uTsadoki noAbhiyatare? Ngoko ke baxelele ababingeleli uTsadoki noAbhiyatare yonke into oyivayo endlwini yokumkani.
2Samuel15:36 Yabona, bakho khona oonyana babo bobabini, uAhimahatse unyana kaTsadoki, noAbhiyatare unyana kaYonatan; nithumele kum yonke into eniyivayo, kunye nabo."
2Samuel15:37 Wafika uHushayi, umhlobo kaDavide, esixekweni, noAbhisalom weza eYerusalem."
2Samuel16:1 Kwathi, ekuweleni kukaDavide entabeni, wamkhawulela uTsibha, umkhonzi kaMefibhoshete, emkhawulela, eneemazi zamaesile ezisasazekileyo, ezimakhulu mabini, ethwele phezu kwawo izonka ezimakhulu mabini, nekhulu leediliya ezomisiweyo, nekhulu leezidiliya. Yeziqhamo zasehlotyeni, nendebe yewayini."
2Samuel16:2 Wathi uYehova kuTsibha, Uthini na ngaloo nto? Wathi uTsibha, Iimazi zamaesile zikulungele ukukhwela endlwini yokumkani; nesonka neziqhamo zasehlotyeni zamadodana; newayini, ukuze basele abatyhafileyo entlango."
2Samuel16:3 Wathi ukumkani, Uphi na unyana wenkosi yakho? Wathi uTsibha kukumkani, Yabona, uhlala eYerusalem, ngokuba usithi, Namhla indlu kaSirayeli iya kububuyisela kum ubukumkani bukabawo."
2Samuel16:4 Wathi ukumkani kuTsibha, Uyabona, zonke izinto ezikuMefibhoshete zezakho. Wathi uTsiba, Ndiya kuthandaza ngokuzithoba, ukuba ndibabalwe nguwe, nkosi yam, nkosi yam!"
2Samuel16:5 Wafika ukumkani uDavide eBhahurim, wabona kukho indoda yendlu kaSawule, egama linguShimehi, unyana kaGera;"
2Samuel16:6 Wamxuluba ngamatye uDavide nabakhonzi bonke bokumkani uDavide; bonke abantu namagorha onke babengasekunene kwakhe nangasekhohlo kwakhe.
2Samuel16:7 Ngoko uShimeyi waqhubeka eqalekisa, esithi: “Hamb’ umke, ndoda yamagazi nenyanisekileyo!"
2Samuel16:8 uYehova wawabuyisela phezu kwakho lonke igazi lendlu kaSawule, owalawula esikhundleni sakhe phezu kwakho; uYehova wabunikela ubukumkani esandleni sika-Abhisalom unyana wakho;"
2Samuel16:9 Wathi ke uAbhishayi unyana kaTseruya kukumkani, Yini na ukuba le nja ifileyo itshabhise ukumkani wam? mandihambe ndimnqumle intloko."
2Samuel16:10 Wathi uYehova, Yintoni na ingxaki yam kuni, nyana bakaZeruya? makatshabhise, ngokuba uYehova wathi kuye, Mtshabhise uDavide! Ngoko ke ngubani oya kuthi: Kutheni le nto uyenzileyo?"
2Samuel16:11 Wathi uDavide kuAbhishayi nakubakhonzi bakhe bonke, Niyabona, unyana wam owaphuma esizalweni sam ungxamele umphefumlo wam; Unokwenza malini ngoku uBenjamin? makame, aqalekise; ngokuba uYehova ebemwisele umthetho."
2Samuel16:12 Mhlawumbi uYehova angabukhangela umvandedwa wam, yaye namhla uYehova wondibuyekeza ngesiqalekiso sakhe."
2Samuel16:13 Ekuhambeni kwexesha uDavide namadoda akhe babehamba ngendlela, uShimehi waqhubeka ehamba phambi kwentaba, esiya ngakuye, yaye njengoko wayehamba wamgibisela ngamatye, emphosa nothuli."
2Samuel16:14 Ukumkani nabantu bonke ababenaye badinwa, baphumla apho."
2Samuel16:15 uAbhisalom nabo bonke abantu, amadoda akwaSirayeli, bafika eYerusalem, enoAhitofele."
2Samuel16:16 Weza uHushayi umAram, umhlobo kaDavide, kuAbhisalom, wathi uHushayi kuAbhisalom, Makasindise ukumkani!"
2Samuel16:17 Wathi uAbhisalom kuHushayi, Kukumthanda kwakho na oku? kutheni ungahambi netshomi yakho?"
2Samuel16:18 Wathi uHushayi kuAbhisalom, Hayi! kodwa lowo amnyulileyo uYehova, nolu hlanga, namadoda onke akwaSirayeli, ndoba ngowakhe, ndihlale naye."
2Samuel16:19 Kananjalo ndiya kukhonza bani na? Akayi kumkhonza na unyana wakhe? njengoko ndamkhonzayo uyihlo, ndiya kuba nawe ngokunjalo."
2Samuel16:20 Wathi uAbhisalom kuAhitofele, Thetha into esiya kuyenza."
2Samuel16:21 Wathi uAhitofele kuAbhisalom, Ngena ezithendeni zikayihlo, abezishiyile ukuba zigcine indlu; eve onke amaSirayeli ukuba umthiyile uyihlo; zandule ke zomelele izandla zabo bonke abanawe."
2Samuel16:22 Bayimisa intente ka-Abhisalom phezu kwendlu; uAbhisalom wamlandela uyise phambi kwamaSirayeli onke.
2Samuel16:23 Icebiso lika-Ahitofele, awayelicebisa ngaloo mihla lalifana nomntu obuza ilizwi likaThixo; Icebiso lika-Ahitofele kuDavide noAbhisalom lalinjalo."
2Samuel17:1 Wongeza uAhitofele, wathi kuAbhisalom, Makhe ndinyule ishumi elinesibini lamawaka amadoda, ndime, ndibaleke kuDavide ngobu busuku;"
2Samuel17:2 Ndiya kumhlasela atyhafile, nezandla zakhe zityhafile, ndimoyikise; basabe bonke abantu anabo; yaye ndiya kumoyisa ukumkani kuphela;"
2Samuel17:3 ndibabuyisele kuwe bonke abantu; umntu omfunayo usengathi babuyile bonke; ngoko bonke abantu baya kuba noxolo.
2Samuel17:4 Yalunga loo nto emehlweni ka-Abhisalom nasemehlweni amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli.
2Samuel17:5 Wathi uAbhisalom, Bizani uHushayi umAram, sive ukuba uya kuthini na ukuthetha kwakhe."
2Samuel17:6 Weza uHushayi kuAbhisalom, wathetha uAbhisalom kuye, wathi, Utsho uAhitofele ukuthi; Senze ngokwelizwi lakhe na? Ukuba akukho njalo; uthi."
2Samuel17:7 Wathi uHushayi kuAbhisalom, Icebo uAhitofele acebisa lona alilungile okwangoku."
2Samuel17:8 Wathi uHusayi, Uyamazi uyihlo namadoda akhe, ukuba bakhohlakele, batyumkile intliziyo, njengebhere ewahlutha amathole ayo endle; kwaye uyihlo yindoda yemfazwe, akafuni kulala nabantu."
2Samuel17:9 Yabona, uzimele komnye umngxuma, nokuba kukwenye indawo; kothi ke, xa bathe bafika kuqala, bonke abavileyo bathi, Kukho ukubulawa kwabantu abamlandelayo uAbhisalom."
2Samuel17:10 Kwaye kwanendoda eligorha entliziyo injengentliziyo yengonyama, iya kutshata ngokupheleleyo; ngenxa yokuba wonke uSirayeli uyazi ukuba uyihlo ligorha, yaye abo bakunye naye ngamadoda anamandla."
2Samuel17:11 Ngoko ke ndicebisa ukuba onke amaSirayeli ahlanganisene kuwe, ethabathela kwaDan esa eBher-shebha, abe yintabalala yentlabathi yam nonxweme lolwandle; nokuba uhambe wedwa edabini."
2Samuel17:12 Somkhawulela ke kuloo ndawo aya kufunyanwa kuyo, siwe phezu kwakhe, njengokuwa kombethe emhlabeni; akusayi kusala yena nakumadoda onke anaye."
2Samuel17:13 Ngaphezu koko, ukuba ithe yahlala esixekweni, onke amaSirayeli ozisa iintsontelo kweso sixeko, size sibarhuqele emlanjeni de kungafumaneki nalinye ilitye elincinane."
2Samuel17:14 Wathi ke uAbhisalom namadoda onke akwaSirayeli, Icebo likaHushayi umAram lilungile kunecebo lika-Ahitofele. Kuba uYehova wayezimisele ukutshabalalisa icebo elilungileyo lika-Ahitofele, ngenjongo yokuba uYehova amzisele intlekele uAbhisalom."
2Samuel17:15 Wathi uHushayi kuTsadoki nakuAbhiyatare ababingeleli, uAhitofele umcebisa ngale ndlela uAbhisalom namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli; kwaye ndinike iingcebiso."
2Samuel17:16 Thumelani ke kamsinya, nixelele uDavide, nithi, Musa ukulalisa enkqantosini; hleze adle ukumkani nabantu bonke abanaye."
2Samuel17:17 uYonatan noAkimatse bahlala e-Enerogel; kuba azabonakala ekungeneni kwawo esixekweni baya baxelela ukumkani uDavide.
2Samuel17:18 Umfana wababona, waxelela uAbhisalom; Bakhawuleza bobabini, bafika eBhahurim endlwini yendoda enequla eyadini yayo; apho bawela khona."
2Samuel17:19 Yasithabatha inkazana isigqubuthelo, yasitwabulula phezu komnyango wequla, yasitwabulula ingqolowa egcadiweyo; ityala lalingaziwa."
2Samuel17:20 Bafika abakhonzi baka-Abhisalom kuloo ntokazi endlwini, bathi, Baphi na ooAhimaheyu noYonatan? Yathi intokazi kubo, Welani umlambo; Bafuna, abazifumana, babuyela eYerusalem."
2Samuel17:21 Banduluka, benyuka baya equleni, bamxelela ukumkani uDavide, bathi kuDavide, Khawuyeke, ukha amanzi kamsinya; ngokuba uAhitofele ucebe icebo ngani."
2Samuel17:22 Emveni koko bagqiba ke ooDavide namadoda onke abenaye, bayiwela iYordan;"
2Samuel17:23 Uthe uAhitofele akubona ukuba icebo lakhe alilandelwa, wabopha idonki yakhe, wesuka waya endlwini yakhe, esixekweni sakowabo, wayilungisa indlu yakhe, wazixhoma, wafa, wangcwatyelwa engcwabeni likayise."
2Samuel17:24 uDavide wafika eMahanayim. uAbhisalom wayiwela iYordan namadoda onke akwaSirayeli.
2Samuel17:25 uAbhisalom wammisa uAmasa ukuba abe yingqwayi-ngqwayi esikhundleni sikaYowabhi; uAmasa ebengunyana wendoda egama linguYitra, engumSirayeli, eyangena noAbhigali, intombi kaNahashe, udade boTseruya, unina kaYowabhi."
2Samuel17:26 Oonyana bakaSirayeli noAbhisalom bamisa iintente ezweni laseGiliyadi.
2Samuel17:27 Wafika uDavide eMahanayim, enoSobhi unyana kaNahashe, waseRabha yoonyana baka-Amon, noMagire unyana ka-Amiyeli, eLodebhare, noBharzilayi waseGiliyadi, waseRogelim;"
2Samuel17:28 Yiza nezingqengqelo, neengqayi, neengqayi, nerhasi, nomgubo, nengqolowa egcadiweyo, neembotyi, neelentile, nengqolowa egcadiweyo;"
2Samuel17:29 nobusi, nebhotolo, nempahla emfutshane, namasi eenkomo, kuDavide nakubantu ababenaye ukuba badle; ngokuba bathi, Abantu balambile, badiniwe, banxaniwe entlango."
2Samuel18:1 uDavide wawabala amadoda abenaye, wabamisa aba ngabathetheli-waka nabathetheli-makhulu."
2Samuel18:2 uDavide wasithumela isahlulo sesithathu sabantu esandleni sikaYowabhi, nesahlulo sesithathu esandleni sika-Abhishayi unyana kaTseruya, umzalwana kaYowabhi, nesahlulo sesithathu esandleni sikaItayi waseGati. Wathi ukumkani ebantwini, Ndophuma nani."
2Samuel18:3 Baphendula abantu bathi, Aninako ukumka; ngokuba, xa sithe sasaba, abayi kusigcina; xa sithe safa isiqingatha sethu, ziya kusigcina; kodwa ngoku, nilingana neshumi lamawaka kuthi; ngoko ke, kungcono ukuba usincede siwushiye umzi."
2Samuel18:4 Wathi ukumkani kubo, Ndiya kwenza ngokuthanda kwenu. Ukumkani wema esangweni, yaye bonke abantu baphuma ngamakhulu namawaka."
2Samuel18:5 uYehova wabawisela umthetho uYowabhi, noAbhishayi, noItayi, wathi, Yibani nenceba kumfana lowo, uAbhisalom, ngenxa yam. Beva ke bonke abantu ukuba ukumkani ubawisele umthetho abathetheli bonke ngoAbhisalom."
2Samuel18:6 Aphuma amadoda aya elizweni, aya kukhawulela oonyana bakaSirayeli; kwaliwa ehlathini lakwaEfrayim;"
2Samuel18:7 Apho kwabulawa abantu bakwaSirayeli phambi kwabakhonzi bakaDavide, kwaza kwabulawa abantu abaninzi ngaloo mini amadoda angamashumi amabini amawaka."
2Samuel18:8 Kuba imfazwe yasasazeka kulo lonke ilizwe, nehlathi latshabalalisa abantu abaninzi kunabo batshatyalaliswe ngekrele ngaloo mini."
2Samuel18:9 uAbhisalom waqubisana nabakhonzi bakaDavide. uAbhisalom wayekhwele imeyile, yaye imeyile yangena phantsi kwamasebe ashinyeneyo omthi omkhulu wom-oki; wahamba imeyile ebiphantsi kwakhe."
2Samuel18:10 Indoda ethile yakubona oko, yamxelela uYowabhi, yathi, Khangela, ndimbonile uAbhisalom ejinga emterebhintini."
2Samuel18:11 Wathi uYowabhi kuloo ndoda imxeleleyo, Khangela, umbonile nje, ibiyini na ukuba ungambethi khona? Bendiya kukunika iishekele ezilishumi zesilivere nebhanti."
2Samuel18:12 Yathi indoda leyo kuYowabhi, Ndingafanelana ndithabathe iwaka leshekele esandleni sam, andiyi kusithintela isandla sam kunyana wokumkani; ngokuba ukumkani ukuwisele umthetho, wena noAbhishayi noItayi, sithe sakuva, wathi, Dlulani! akukho namnye umchukumisayo umfana uAbhisalom."
2Samuel18:13 Okanye, bendiya kuxoka emphefumlweni wam, ngokuba akukho nto ifihlakeleyo kukumkani; ubuya kuwaphakamisa amandla am."
2Samuel18:14 Wathi uYowabhi, Andiyi kuhlala kuwe ngolu hlobo. Wathabatha iintolo ezintathu esandleni sakhe waza wamhlaba uAbhisalom entliziyweni ngoxa wayesaphila emthini weturpentine."
2Samuel18:15 Bamrhawula abafana abalishumi abanxibe izixhobo zikaYowabhi, baxabela uAbhisalom, bambulala."
2Samuel18:16 Wavuthela uYowabhi isigodlo, abuya amadoda lawo, alandela oonyana bakaSirayeli; ngokuba uYowabhi wabanqanda abantu."
2Samuel18:17 Bamthabatha uAbhisalom, bamphosa emngxunyeni omkhulu wehlathi, babeka phezu kwakhe imfumba enkulu kakhulu yamatye; asaba onke amaSirayeli, aya elowo ententeni yakhe."
2Samuel18:18 Ke kaloku uAbhisalom wayesadla ubomi, wathabatha isimiso, wasimisa entilini yokumkani; ngokuba wathi, Andinanyana uya kulikhumbula igama lam; walibiza ilitye lesikhumbuzo ngegama lakhe; khuleni nanamhla, endlwini ka-Abhisalom!"
2Samuel18:19 Wathi uAkimaya, unyana kaTsadoki, Mandigidime, ndimxelele ukumkani, ukuba uYehova umgwebele, umgwebele ezintshabeni zakhe."
2Samuel18:20 Wathi uYowabhi kuye, Akuyi kuzisa nto namhla, wozisa lizwi ngenye imini; ke namhla aniyi kuzizisa iindaba ezilungileyo, ngokuba unyana wokumkani ufile."
2Samuel18:21 Wathi uYowabhi kuKushi, Hamba uye kumxelela ukumkani okubonileyo. uKushi waguqa phambi koYowabhi, wagidima."
2Samuel18:22 Wathi uAhimaya, unyana kaTsadoki, kuYowabhi, Mandibaleke nam, ndibaleke ndiye kuKushi. Wathi uYowabhi, Uyabaleka, nyana wam, ubungekazithethi ezi ndaba?"
2Samuel18:23 Kodwa wathi, Mandibaleke ndibaleke. Wathi kuye, Gijima uAhimahatse wabaleka wehla ngendlela esuka ethafeni waza wambamba uKusi."
2Samuel18:24 uDavide wahlala phantsi phakathi kwamasango omabini, umlindi wenyuka waya eluphahleni lwesango eludongeni, waphakamisa amehlo akhe, nanko indoda ibaleka iyodwa."
2Samuel18:25 Bamemeza ke abalindi, baxelela ukumkani. Wathi uYehova, Xa iyodwa, inelizwi emlonyeni wayo. Weza ngokukhawuleza, wasondela."
2Samuel18:26 Umlindi wabona enye indoda ibaleka; umlindi wabiza umlindi, wathi, Nantsiya indoda ibaleka iyodwa. Wathi ukumkani, Naleyo izisa iindaba."
2Samuel18:27 Wathi umlindi, Ndiyabona ukubaleka kwendoda enkulu kufana nokubaleka kuka-Akimeyu, unyana kaTsadoki. Wathi ukumkani, Uyindoda elungileyo, uza neendaba ezilungileyo."
2Samuel18:28 Wamemeza uAkimaya, wathi kukumkani, Konke kulungile; Wawa ngobuso phambi kokumkani, wathi, Makabongwe uYehova uThixo wakho, owabasindisayo abo baziphakamiselayo izandla zabo kukumkani, nkosi yam."
2Samuel18:29 Wathi uYehova, Usaphilile na umfana, uAbhisalom? Wathi uAhimaha, ekumthumeni kukaYowabhi umkhonzi wokumkani, mna ndingumkhonzi wakho, ndabona ingxokolo enkulu, ndingazi ukuba yintoni na."
2Samuel18:30 Wathi ukumkani kuye, Hamba, ume apha. Wajika, wema."
2Samuel18:31 Nanko kufika uKusi; Wathi uKusi, Yitsho kukumkani, nkosi yam, ngokuba uYehova uthethe namhla kubo bonke abo bakuphakamisela isandla sakho."
2Samuel18:32 Wathi uYehova kuKushi, Usaphilile na umfana, uAbhisalom? Waphendula uKusi, wathi, Iintshaba zokumkani, nkosi yam, nabo bonke abasukele phezulu kuwe ukukwenza into embi, mababe njengaloo ndodana."
2Samuel18:33 Waba buhlungu kakhulu ukumkani wenyuka waya egumbini eliphambi kwesango, walila; wahamba, wathi, Nyana wam, Abhisalom, nyana wam, nyana wam, Abhisalom! Akwaba bendinokufela wena, Abhisalom, nyana wam, nyana wam!"
2Samuel19:1 Kwaxelwa kuYowabhi, kwathiwa, Nanko ukumkani elila, elilela uAbhisalom."
2Samuel19:2 Usindiso lwaloo mini lwaba lusizi ebantwini bonke, ngokuba abantu beva ngaloo mini ukuba ukumkani wenze ububi ngonyana wakhe."
2Samuel19:3 Ngaloo mini abantu banyebelezela phakathi komzi, njengabasaba emfazweni, njengehlazo."
2Samuel19:4 Ukumkani wazigqubuthela ubuso, wadanduluka ukumkani ngezwi elikhulu, wathi, Nyana wam, Abhisalom, Abhisalom, nyana wam, nyana wam!"
2Samuel19:5 Wangena uYowabhi endlwini yokumkani, wathi, Ubenze inqambi namhla ubuso babakhonzi bakho bonke abakusindisileyo namhla, nomphefumlo woonyana bakho, neentombi zakho, nomphefumlo wabafazi bakho; Yehova, nobomi bezithende zakho;"
2Samuel19:6 Ngokuthanda iintshaba zakho nangokuthiya abahlobo bakho. Ngokuba namhla uthe, Akukhathali ngabathetheli nabakhonzi; ngenxa yokuba namhlanje ndiyabona ukuba ukuba ebesaphila uAbhisalom size sife sonke namhlanje, ngekulungile kuwe."
2Samuel19:7 Vuka ke ngoko, uhambe, uthethe kakuhle nabakhonzi bakho; ngokuba ndifunga uYehova, ndithi, ukuba anithanga niphume, inene, akukho mntu uya kuhlala nani ngobu busuku; kuya kuba kubi ngaphezu kobubi bonke obuzayo wena kwasebuncinaneni bakho kude kube ngoku."
2Samuel19:8 Wavuka ukumkani, wahlala esangweni. Baxelelwa abantu bonke, kwathiwa, Nanko ukumkani ehleli esangweni. Beza bonke abantu phambi kokumkani; ngokuba oonyana bakaSirayeli babebaleke, elowo waya ententeni yakhe."
2Samuel19:9 Basuka ke bonke abantu baxabana ezizweni zonke zakwaSirayeli, besithi: “uYehova usihlangule esandleni seentshaba zethu, yaye usihlangule esandleni samaFilisti; wabaleka ke ngoku ebusweni buka-Abhisalom, ezweni."
2Samuel19:10 uAbhisalom, owasithambisayo ukuba abe ngukumkani, ufele edabini; Yini na ukuba ningathi, nimbuyise ukumkani?"
2Samuel19:11 Wathumela ukumkani uDavide kuTsadoki nakuAbhiyatare ababingeleli, esithi, Nothi kumadoda amakhulu akwaYuda, nithi, Yini na ukuba nibe ngabokugqibela ekumbuyiseni ukumkani endlwini yakhe? walibona ilizwi lamaSirayeli onke, waya kukumkani endlwini yakhe."
2Samuel19:12 Nabazalwana bam, namathambo am, nenyama yam; yini na ukuba nibe ngabokugqibela ekumbuyiseni ukumkani?"
2Samuel19:13 Wathi kuAmasa, Akulilo ithambo lam, nenyama yam na? Ngamana uThixo wandinika ukuba ungabi kufutshane nabantu bakowethu endaweni kaYowabhi."
2Samuel19:14 Wayitsala intliziyo yamadoda onke akwaYuda njengandoda-nye; Bathumela ke ilizwi kukumkani, bathi, Buya, wena nabakhonzi bakho bonke;"
2Samuel19:15 Wabuya ke ukumkani, wafika eYordan. Afika amaYuda eGiligali, esiya kumkhawulela ukumkani, amthuthuzela ukumkani waseYordan."
2Samuel19:16 uShimehi, unyana kaGera, umBhenjamin, waseBhahurim, wehla ngokukhawuleza namadoda akwaYuda, esiya kukhawulela ukumkani uDavide."
2Samuel19:17 Wayekunye naye iwaka lamadoda akwaBhenjamin, noTsibha, umkhonzi wendlu kaSawule, noonyana bakhe abalishumi elinesihlanu namashumi amabini kubakhonzi bakhe ababenaye; bayiwela iYordan phambi kokumkani."
2Samuel19:18 Wanduluka ngomkhombe, waya endlwini yokumkani, ukuba enze ngoko akubonileyo. uShimehi, unyana kaGera, wawa phambi kokumkani ekuweleni kwakhe iYordan;"
2Samuel19:19 Wathi kukumkani, Musa ukundigweba ngobugqwetha, nkosi yam, ungabukhumbuli ububi abenzileyo umkhonzi wakho, ekususweni kwenkosi yam ukumkani eYerusalem, ukuze ukumkani angayibeki loo nto entliziyweni yam."
2Samuel19:20 Ngokuba umkhonzi wakho lo uyazi, ukuba ndihlulekile; nanku, ndingowokuqala ofikileyo namhla wasendlwini yonke kaYosefu, ukuba ndihle ndiye kumkhawulela ukumkani inkosi yam."
2Samuel19:21 Waphendula uAbhishayi unyana kaTseruya, wathi, Anditshongo na ukuthi, uShimehi akayi kubulawa, ngokuba wamtshabhisayo umthanjiswa kaYehova?"
2Samuel19:22 Wathi uDavide, Yintoni na enam nani, nyana bakaTseruya, ngokuba nide nibachase nje namhla? Kuya kubulawa mntu na kwaSirayeli namhla? kuba andiyazi na ukuba ndingukumkani wakwaSirayeli namhlanje?"
2Samuel19:23 Wathi ukumkani kuShimehi, Akuyi kufa. Ukumkani wamfungela."
2Samuel19:24 Ke uMefibhoshete, unyana kaSawule, wehla waya kumkhawulela ukumkani, akazilungisa iinyawo zakhe, engazichebi neendevu zakhe, engazihlambanga neengubo zakhe, kususela kwimini yokuhamba kokumkani, kwada kwayimini yokubuya kwakhe enoxolo."
2Samuel19:25 Ekufikeni kwakhe eYerusalem eza kukhawulela ukumkani, wathi ukumkani kuye, Yini na ukuba ungahambi nam, Mefibhoshete?"
2Samuel19:26 Wathi, Nkosi yam, nkosi yam, umkhonzi wam undixokisile; ngokuba umkhonzi wakho lo undim ubesithi, Ndiya kulibophela iesile, ndikhwele kulo, ndiye kukumkani; ngokuba umkhonzi wakho lo undim."
2Samuel19:27 Wahleba umkhonzi wakho enkosini yam ukumkani; kodwa ukumkani, nkosi yam, unjengesithunywa sikaThixo; wenze ke ngoko kulungileyo emehlweni akho."
2Samuel19:28 Ngokuba yonke indlu kabawo yafa phambi kwenkosi yam ukumkani; kanti wena umbekile umkhonzi wakho phakathi kwabadla etafileni yakho. Liliphi ilungelo endisenalo lokubiza ukumkani?
2Samuel19:29 Wathi ukumkani kuye, Akuthethi na ngemicimbi yakho? Ndathi: Wena noTsiba, yabelanani ngehlabathi."
2Samuel19:30 Wathi uMefibhoshete kukumkani, Makayithabathe yonke into, ngokuba ukumkani, inkosi yam, ubuyele endlwini yakhe enoxolo."
2Samuel19:31 uBharsileyi waseGiliyadi wehla eRogelim, wawela nokumkani eYordan, ukuba amthuthuzele eYordan."
2Samuel19:32 uBharasileyi ebemdala kakhulu, eminyaka imashumi asibhozo ezelwe; kuba wayeyindoda enkulu kakhulu."
2Samuel19:33 Wathi ukumkani kuBharsilayi, Hamba nam, ndokugcina eYerusalem."
2Samuel19:34 Wathi uBharisilayi kukumkani, Lixesha lingakanani na elisaseleyo, ukuba ndinyuke ndiye eYerusalem nokumkani?"
2Samuel19:35 Namhlanje ndiminyaka imashumi asibhozo ubudala, yaye ndinako na ukwahlula phakathi kokulungileyo nokubi? Unako na umkhonzi wakho lo ukuyiva into ayidlayo nayiselayo? ndisenako na ukuva amazwi eemvumi neentombi? Yini na ukuba umkhonzi wakho lo abuye abe ngumthwalo enkosini yam?"
2Samuel19:36 Umkhonzi wakho lo uya kuyiwela iYordan nokumkani umgama omfutshane; yini na ukuba ukumkani andibuyekeze ngalo mvuzo?
2Samuel19:37 Makabuye umkhonzi wakho, ndifele emzini wakowethu, ndingcwatyelwe engcwabeni likabawo noma. Nanko umkhonzi wakho uKiham; makawele nokumkani, nkosi yam; wenze okulungileyo kuwe."
2Samuel19:38 Waphendula ukumkani, wathi, uKiham wowela nam, ndikwenzele okulungileyo; nento othe wayicela kum, ndokwenzela."
2Samuel19:39 Lonke uhlanga lwawela iYordan; Akufika ukumkani, ukumkani wamanga uBharsilayi, wamsikelela; wagoduka."
2Samuel19:40 Wawela ke ukumkani, waya eGiligali, wahamba naye uKiham; yaye bonke abantu bakwaYuda bakhokela ukumkani nenxalenye yesihlanu yabantu bakwaSirayeli."
2Samuel19:41 Eza onke amadoda akwaSirayeli kukumkani, athi kukumkani, Yini na ukuba abazalwana bethu, amadoda akwaYuda, bebele kuwe, bamthuthuzele ukumkani nendlu yakhe namadoda onke kaDavide eYordan?"
2Samuel19:42 Aphendula onke amadoda akwaYuda kumadoda akwaSirayeli, athi, Kungokuba ukumkani ekufuphi kuthi; ngoku uqumbele ntoni ngalento? Ngaba sikhe satya na ngemali yokumkani? Okanye ngaba usinike isipho?"
2Samuel19:43 Aphendula amadoda akwaSirayeli kumadoda akwaYuda, athi, Sinezabelo ezilishumi kukumkani, kananjalo sinegunya ngaphezu kwenu kuDavide kunani; siyambuyisela ukumkani wethu? Yaye ilizwi lamadoda akwaYuda lalinamandla kunamadoda akwaSirayeli."
2Samuel20:1 Kwaye kukho indoda elitshijolo, egama linguShebha, unyana kaBhigi, umBhenjamin; wavuthela isigodlo, wathi, Asinasabelo kuDavide, singenalifa kunyana kaYese. Maye elowo ententeni yakhe, Sirayeli!"
2Samuel20:2 Amshiya ke onke amadoda akwaSirayeli kuDavide, alandela uShebha unyana kaBhigi; ke amadoda akwaYuda anamathela kukumkani wawo, ethabathela eYordan esa eYerusalem."
2Samuel20:3 uDavide wafika endlwini yakhe eYerusalem; Ukumkani wathabatha abafazi abalishumi kwizithende zakhe, abebashiyile ukuba balinde indlu, wababeka elugcinweni, babagcine, akangena nabo. Bavalelwa ke entolongweni kwada kwayimini yokufa kwabo, behleli njengabahlolokazi."
2Samuel20:4 Wathi ukumkani kuAmasa, Ndibizele amadoda akwaYuda imihla emithathu, ube apha."
2Samuel20:5 uAmasa waya kuwahlanganisa amadoda akwaYuda, walibala ngaphezu kwexesha abemiselwe lona."
2Samuel20:6 Wathi uDavide kuAbhishayi, Kaloku uSebha, unyana kaBhigi, uya kusenzela ububi kunoAbhisalom;"
2Samuel20:7 Aphuma emva kwakhe amadoda kaYowabhi, namaKrete nezigidimi, namagorha onke, aphuma eYerusalem, asukela uShebha unyana kaBhigi."
2Samuel20:8 Bafika engxondorheni eliseGibheyon, waphuma uAmasa, wabakhokela. Ke uYowabhi ubeyibhinqile ingubo yakhe abeyinxibile, ebhinqe ikrele lakhe esinqeni sakhe, lingumbhinqo wakhe; uthe akugqiba wawa."
2Samuel20:9 Wathi uYowabhi kuAmasa, Usahleli kakuhle na, mzalwana wam? uYowabhi wathabatha iindevu zika-Amasa ngesandla sakhe sokunene, ukuba amange."
2Samuel20:10 Akaliphulaphulanga uAmasa ikrele elalisesandleni sikaYowabhi; wafa ke. uYowabhi noAbhishayi umninawa wakhe basukela uShebha, unyana kaBhigi."
2Samuel20:11 Wema ke omnye wakubakhonzi bakaYowabhi ngakuye, wathi, Lowo umthandayo uYowabhi, ongakuDavide, makalandele uYowabhi."
2Samuel20:12 uAmasa yena wayelele igazi phezu kohola wendlela. Indoda leyo yakubona ukuba abantu bonke bamile, yamthabatha uAmasa emendweni, yamsa emaphandleni, yaphosa ingubo phezu kwakhe, yababona bemile bonke abezayo kuye."
2Samuel20:13 Wathi akususwa emendweni, bonke abantu balandela uYowabhi, basukela uShebha unyana kaBhigi."
2Samuel20:14 Wacanda ezizweni zonke zakwaSirayeli, wada wesa eAbhele, naseBhete-maga, naseBhabheli yonke; babuthelana ndawonye, bamlandela nabo."
2Samuel20:15 Bafika bayingqinga iAbhele-bhete-maga, bawuphosa ngodaka, bema emhadini onke amadoda abenoYowabhi aludiliza udonga, ukuze aludilize."
2Samuel20:16 Ke kaloku kwamemeza intokazi elumkileyo ikuloo mzi, isithi, Phulaphulani, phulaphulani! nithi kuYowabhi, Yiza apha, ndithethe nawe."
2Samuel20:17 Wafika kuye; yathi loo ntokazi, UnguYowabhi na? Waphendula ke yena wathi, Ndinguye. Wathi kuye, Yiva amazwi omkhonzazana wakho. Waphendula ke yena wathi, Ndiyeva."
2Samuel20:18 Wathetha ke wathi, Kwasephakadeni babesithi, Nobuza kuAbheli; bawugqiba ke umcimbi."
2Samuel20:19 Ungowabathanda uxolo, nabanyanisileyo kwaSirayeli; ufuna umzi kunye nomama kaSirayeli; Yini na ukuba nidle ilifa likaYehova?"
2Samuel20:20 Waphendula uYowabhi, wathi, Kukude lee kum, ukuba ndidle, nditshabalale."
2Samuel20:21 Umbandela awunjalo, kodwa indoda yentaba yakwaEfrayim, egama linguSebha, unyana kaBhikri, yaphakamisa isandla sayo kukumkani, nxamnye noDavide; mgcine, ndowushiya umzi. Yathi inkazana kuYowabhi, Yabona, intloko yakhe iya kuwa eludongeni, ngenxa yakho."
2Samuel20:22 Yaya loo ntokazi kubo bonke abantu ngobulumko bayo. Bayinqumla ke intloko kaShebha, unyana kaBhigi, bayiphosa ngaphandle koYowabhi. Wavuthela isigodlo, baphuma kuloo mzi, elowo waya ententeni yakhe. uYowabhi wabuyela eYerusalem kukumkani."
2Samuel20:23 uYowabhi wayephethe umkhosi wonke wakwaSirayeli, yaye uBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada wayephethe amaKrete namaPleti."
2Samuel20:24 uAdoram wayephethe irhafu, yaye uYehoshafati unyana ka-Ahiludi wayeyinjengele yenkundla."
2Samuel20:25 uSheva ubengumbhali, uTsadoki noAbhiyatare bengababingeleli."
2Samuel20:26 Kwakhona, uIra, umYiputa, wayengumlawuli kaDavide."
2Samuel21:1 Kwabakho indlala ngemihla kaDavide iminyaka emithathu ilandelelana; uDavide wabuza kuYehova. Wathi uYehova, Kungenxa kaSawule nagazi lakhe, ngokuba wawabulala amaGibheyon."
2Samuel21:2 uYehova wababiza abaseGibheyon, wathi kubo, (AbaseGibheyon babengengabo oonyana bakaSirayeli, kodwa babengamasalela ama-Amori; oonyana bakaSirayeli bafunga kubo, waza uSawule walinga ukubabulala ngekhwele lakhe oonyana bakaSirayeli nabakwaYuda.)"
2Samuel21:3 Wathi uDavide kwabaseGibheyon, Ndinenzele ntoni na? yaye ndiya kwenza umnqophiso ngantoni na ukuze nilisikelele ilifa likaYehova?"
2Samuel21:4 Athi abaseGibheyon kuye, Asinasilivere nagolide kuSawule nendlu yakhe; yaye ngenxa yethu musani ukubulala nabani na kwaSirayeli. Wathi, Into oyithethayo ndiya kuyenza."
2Samuel21:5 Baphendula bathi kukumkani, Yilaa ndoda yasitshabalalisayo, eyayifuna ukusitshabalalisa, ukuze sihlale ezweni lonke lakwaSirayeli."
2Samuel21:6 Masinikwe amadoda abe sixhenxe koonyana bakhe, siwaxhome phambi koYehova, iGibheha kaSawule, onyuliweyo nguYehova. Wathi uYehova, Ndiya kubanika."
2Samuel21:7 Kodwa ukumkani wamsindisa uMefibhoshete unyana kaYonatan unyana kaSawule ngenxa yesifungo sikaYehova esasiphakathi kwabo, phakathi koDavide noYonatan unyana kaSawule."
2Samuel21:8 uYehova wathabatha oonyana ababini bakaRitspa, intombi ka-Aya, awabazalela uSawule, uArmoni noMefibhoshete; noonyana abahlanu bakaMikali, intombi kaSawule, awabanyusela kuAdriyeli, unyana kaBharsilayi, waseMehola;"
2Samuel21:9 Wabanikela esandleni samaGibheyon, aza abaxhoma endulini phambi koYehova; zawa ndawonye zosixhenxe, zabulawa ngemihla yokuvuna, ekuqaleni, ekuqalekeni kwerhasi isivuno."
2Samuel21:10 uRitspa, intombi ka-Aya, wathabatha iingubo ezimnyama, wazandlala phezu kwakhe eweni, kususela ekuqalekeni kokuvuna, ada awela amanzi phezu kwabo, esibhakabhakeni, ukuba zingavuki iintaka zezulu ngokuhlwa phumla, namarhamncwa ebusuku."
2Samuel21:11 Waxelelwa uDavide awakwenzayo uRitspa, intombi ka-Aya, umlungiseleli kaSawule."
2Samuel21:12 uDavide wahamba waza wawathabatha amathambo kaSawule nonyana wakhe uYonatan kumadoda aseYabheshe yaseGiliyadi, awayewabile kwindawo yembutho yaseBhete-shan, apho amaFilisti ayebaxhome khona, xa amaFilisti ebulala uSawule iGilibhowa."
2Samuel21:13 Wawanyusa khona amathambo kaSawule, namathambo kaYonatan unyana wakhe; yaye bawaqokelela amathambo abo babexhonyiwe."
2Samuel21:14 Amathambo kaSawule noYonatan unyana wakhe, angcwatyelwa ezweni lakwaBhenjamin, eSela, engcwabeni likaKishe uyise; benza konke abewise umthetho ngako ukumkani. Kwaye ke uThixo wathandazwa ehlabathini."
2Samuel21:15 Kananjalo amaFilisti alwa kwakhona noonyana bakaSirayeli; Wehla uDavide, nabakhonzi bakhe balwa naye namaFilisti, ediniwe uDavide."
2Samuel21:16 Ke yena uIshbhi-bhenobhi, woonyana bamaRefa, ubunzima bomkhonto wakhe babungamakhulu amathathu eeshekele zobhedu, exhobe ngekrele elitsha, wacinga ukuba umbulele uDavide."
2Samuel21:17 Ke uAbhishayi unyana kaTseruya wamnceda, wamxabela umFilisti lowo, wambulala. Aza amadoda kaDavide amfungela, esithi, Uze ungabi sahamba nathi ekulweni, hleze ucime ukukhanya kwaSirayeli."
2Samuel21:18 Emva koko kwabakho elinye idabi namaFilisti eGobhi;
2Samuel21:19 Kwaphinda kwabakho imfazwe namaFilisti eGobhi, waza uElihanan unyana kaYahare-oregime umBhetelehem umntakwabo Goliyati umGati, umkhonto wakhe wawunjengomthi wabaluki, wawoyisa."
2Samuel21:20 Kwabakho ke imfazwe eGati, apho kwakukho indoda emde, ineminwe emithandathu esandleni ngasinye, neenzwane ezintandathu elunyaweni lunye, amashumi amabini anesine ngenani; naye wazalwa sisigebenga."
2Samuel21:21 Kwathi, ekulweni kwakhe namaSirayeli, wambulala uYonatan unyana kaShimeha, umkhuluwa kaDavide."
2Samuel21:22 Oonyana abane bazalelwa ingxilimbela yaseGati yaye bawa ngesandla sikaDavide nangezandla zabakhonzi bakhe.
2Samuel22:1 uDavide wamxelela uYehova amazwi ale ngoma, ekumhlanguni kwakhe uYehova esandleni seentshaba zakhe zonke, nasesandleni sikaSawule."
2Samuel22:2 Wathi, uYehova liliwa lam, Imboniselo yam, umsindisi wam;"
2Samuel22:3 uThixo liliwa lam; Ndiya kuzimela ngaye, ingweletshetshe yam, luphondo losindiso lwam, Ingxonde yam, ndawo yokusabela kwam, umsindisi wam; Uyandisindisa kugonyamelo."
2Samuel22:4 Ndinqula uYehova ongowokudunyiswa; ndiya kusinda ezintshabeni zam.
2Samuel22:5 Ekundijikeleni kwamaza okufa, Imilambo yobungendawo yandidandathekisa;"
2Samuel22:6 Iintswelo zobomi bezisondele kum; Izirhintyelo zokufa zandivingca;
2Samuel22:7 Ndanqula uYehova ngentliziyo yam, Ndabiza uThixo wam, Waliva etempileni yakhe izwi lam, Ukuzibika kwam kwafika ezindlebeni zakhe."
2Samuel22:8 Lanyikima ihlabathi, lanyikima; Zashukuma iziseko zezulu, Ngokuba enomsindo."
2Samuel22:9 Kwenyuka umsi emathatheni akhe, kwatsha umlilo emlonyeni wakhe; amalahle abaswe yiyo."
2Samuel22:10 Wawathoba amazulu, wehla; Kwaye ke kumnyama phantsi kweenyawo zakhe."
2Samuel22:11 Wakhwela phezu kwekerubhi, waphaphazela, wabonakala emaphikweni omoya."
2Samuel22:12 Wazenza mnyama iintente, ukuba amsibekele ngaphakathi, amanzi abe mnyama, neengqimba zamafu ezulu."
2Samuel22:13 Avutha amalahle omlilo phambi kwakhe.
2Samuel22:14 Wadudumisa emazulwini uYehova, Oyena Uphakamileyo walikhupha ilizwi lakhe."
2Samuel22:15 Wathuma iintolo, wabaphangalalisa; umbane, wabadubaduba."
2Samuel22:16 Yabonakala imijelo yolwandle, zatyhileka iziseko zehlabathi ngokukhalima kukaYehova, ngokuphefumla komoya wamathatha akhe."
2Samuel22:17 Wathumela wandithabatha; Wandikhupha emanzini amaninzi;
2Samuel22:18 Wandihlangula elutshabeni lwam olunamandla, Kwabandithiyileyo, ngokuba bebomelele kunam."
2Samuel22:19 Bandifikela ngemini yokusindeka kwam, uYehova wandixhasa."
2Samuel22:20 Wabuya wandisa endaweni ebanzi; Wandisindisa, ngokuba endithandile."
2Samuel22:21 uYehova undibize ngokobulungisa bam; ngobunyulu bezandla zam uyandikhulula.
2Samuel22:22 Kuba ndizigcinile iindlela zikaYehova, yaye andizange ndiphambuke kuThixo wam ngobungendawo."
2Samuel22:23 Kuba yonke imiyalelo yakhe emiselweyo yayiphambi kwam, nakwimiyalelo yakhe emiselweyo andityekanga."
2Samuel22:24 Ndandililungisa phambi kwakhe, Ndazinqanda ebubini bam."
2Samuel22:25 Ngenxa yoko, uYehova undivuze ngobulungisa bam; ngobunyulu bam phambi kwamehlo akhe."
2Samuel22:26 Kowenceba uya kuba nenceba, kwilungisa uzenza ilungisa."
2Samuel22:27 Kohlambulukileyo uya kuzibonakalisa uhlambulukile; na kongendawo ukucaphuka kwakho.
2Samuel22:28 Amahlwempu aya kukuhlangula, Amehlo akho ajonge abanekratshi, Ukuba ubathobe."
2Samuel22:29 Kuba usisibane sam, Yehova, yaye uYehova ukhanyisa ubumnyama bam."
2Samuel22:30 Ngenxa yakho ndihambe phakathi kwamatutu, ngenxa yoThixo wam nditsibe eludongeni."
2Samuel22:31 uThixo yena, igqibelele indlela yakhe; Ilizwi likaYehova linyibilikisiwe; Uyingweletshetshe kubo bonke abazimela ngaye."
2Samuel22:32 Ngokuba ngubani na onguThixo, ingenguye uYehova? Ngubani na oliliwa, ingenguThixo wethu?"
2Samuel22:33 UloThixo uligwiba lam, uligwiba lam, Umakhileyo indlela yam;"
2Samuel22:34 Uzifanisayo iinyawo zam nezamaxhama, Undimisayo ezinyaweni zam;"
2Samuel22:35 Uzifundisayo ukulwa izandla zam; zaza izandla zam zawaphula isaphetha sentsimbi.
2Samuel22:36 Undinike ingweletshetshe yosindiso lwakho, Yandomeleza inceba yakho."
2Samuel22:37 Wandise amanyathela am phantsi kwam; ukuze zingatyibilizi iinyawo zam.
2Samuel22:38 Ndiya kuzisukela iintshaba zam, ndizitshabalalise; andabuya ndade ndawagqiba."
2Samuel22:39 Ndazitshabalalisa, ndazibetha, azaba nakuvuka; Zawa phantsi kweenyawo zam."
2Samuel22:40 Ngokuba undibophe ngamandla okulwa; Abo bandomelezayo, wabathoba phantsi kwam."
2Samuel22:41 Kananjalo undinike intamo yeentshaba zam, Ukuze ndibatshabalalise abandithiyayo."
2Samuel22:42 Bakhangela, kungabikho msindisi; kuYehova, kodwa akazange abaphendule."
2Samuel22:43 Ndababetha njengothuli lomhlaba, Ndibasasaza njengodaka lwendlela, ndibasasaza."
2Samuel22:44 Kananjalo wandisindisa ezibambanweni zabantu bam, wandigcina ndiyintloko yeentlanga; abantu ebendingabazi baya kundikhonza."
2Samuel22:45 Oonyana bolunye uhlanga baya kundilulamela; kamsinya nje bakuva, baya kundithobela."
2Samuel22:46 Oonyana bolunye uhlanga baya kunqunyulwa, bangcangcazele phakathi kwabo;"
2Samuel22:47 uYehova uhleli; lelokubongwa iliwa lam; kwaye makaphakanyiswe uThixo oliliwa losindiso lwam.
2Samuel22:48 Mna ndinguThixo ondikhululayo, ozithobelayo phantsi kwam iintlanga;"
2Samuel22:49 Undikhuphayo ezintshabeni zam; Undiphakamisile kwabandiphakamisileyo; Wandihlangula kumcinezeli.
2Samuel22:50 Kungenxa yoko le nto ndifuna ukukubonga, Yehova, phakathi kweentlanga, ndilibethele uhadi igama lakho."
2Samuel22:51 Uligwiba losindiso lokumkani wakhe, Unenceba kumthanjiswa wakhe, KuDavide, nakwimbewu yakhe kude kuse ephakadeni."
2Samuel23:1 Ngawo la amazwi okugqibela kaDavide. Wathetha uDavide, unyana kaYese, yaphakanyiswa indoda, umthanjiswa kaThixo kaYakobi, umdumisi wakwaSirayeli, wathi,"
2Samuel23:2 uMoya kaYehova uthetha ngam, ilizwi lakhe liselulwimini lwam."
2Samuel23:3 Wathi uThixo kaSirayeli, Iliwa lakwaSirayeli lithethile kum, lathi, Olawula abantu uya kuba lilungisa, alawule emoyika uThixo;"
2Samuel23:4 Unjengokukhanya kokusa, ekuphumeni kwelanga, ngesifingo esingenalifu; njengengca ephuma emhlabeni, Kukukhanya okuqaqambileyo emva kwemvula."
2Samuel23:5 Nakuba indlu yam ingenjalo kuThixo; noko ke wenze nam umnqophiso ongunaphakade, osingiselwayo, osisiqinisekiso sezinto zonke; kuba oku kukusindiswa kwam konke kunye nomnqweno wam wonke, nokuba akaphakamisi."
2Samuel23:6 Ke bonke oonyana bakaBheliyali baya kuba njengameva ahlabayo, ngokuba awabanjiswa ngazandla."
2Samuel23:7 Umntu ozichukumisayo woba nothango lwentsimbi nomkhonto esinqeni sakhe; uzitshise khona ngomlilo.
2Samuel23:8 Ngawo la amagama amadoda anamandla awayekunye nawo uDavide: uTahemon owayehleli etroneni, intloko yeenkosana; yayinguAdino, eMoesne; wanqanda umkhonto wakhe kumazinyo angamakhulu alithoba anamabini awawahlabayo kwakanye."
2Samuel23:9 Ngasemva kwakhe nguEleyazare unyana kaDodo umAhowa, omnye wamagorha amathathu awayenoDavide, ekulweni kwabo namaFilisti awayelapho ukuba aye kulwa, namadoda akwaSirayeli ahamba."
2Samuel23:10 Wesuka wawabulala amaFilisti, sada sadinwa isandla sakhe, sanamathela ekreleni isandla sakhe; uYehova wenza usindiso olukhulu ngaloo mini; abuya amadoda lawo, emlandela, esiya kuphanga kuphela."
2Samuel23:11 Emva kwakhe nguShama unyana ka-Age, uMoharari. Yaye amaFilisti ahlanganisana ndawonye, apho intsimi yayizele ziimbotyi; asaba amadoda phambi kwamaFilisti."
2Samuel23:12 Kodwa yena wema esazulwini selizwe waza wawukhusela waza wawabulala amaFilisti, yaye uYehova wenza usindiso olukhulu."
2Samuel23:13 Kwehla isithathu sabaziintloko emashumini amathathu, beza kuDavide ngexesha lokuvuna emqolombeni waseAdulam;"
2Samuel23:14 Ngelo xesha uDavide wayesezintabeni kwindawo enqatyisiweyo, yaye abalindi bamaFilisti babeseBhetelehem ngelo xesha."
2Samuel23:15 Wanqwena uDavide, wathi, Akwaba bendithe ndasela amanzi equla laseBhetelehem elisesangweni!"
2Samuel23:16 Atyhoboza umkhosi wamaFilistiya amadoda amathathu lawo, akha amanzi equleni laseBhetelehem elisesangweni, awazisa kuDavide; akavuma ukuwasela, wawagalela phambi koYehova."
2Samuel23:17 Wathi, Makube lee kum, Yehova, ukwenza oko! ngoko ke, akazange akuthande ukuwasela. Yiloo nto eyenza loo magorha mathathu."
2Samuel23:18 Ke uAbhishayi, umninawa kaYowabhi, unyana kaTseruya, waye eyintloko yabathathu. Wajula umkhonto wakhe kumakhulu amathathu, wababulala; laduma igama lakhe phakathi kwabathathu."
2Samuel23:19 Ebengebekeke ngaphezu kwabo bathathu na? ngoko xa wayengumlawuli wabo; kodwa akafikanga kwabathathu bokuqala.
2Samuel23:20 uBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada, unyana wendoda enobukroti, waseKabhetseli, owenza izenzo ezininzi, wabulala amadoda amabini akwaMowabhi, njengeengonyama;"
2Samuel23:21 Wabulala indoda engumYiputa, enenzwakazi; UmYiputa lowo ephethe intshuntshe esandleni sakhe; kodwa wehla waya kuye ephethe intonga waza wawuhlutha umkhonto esandleni somYiputa waza wambulala ngomkhonto wakhe."
2Samuel23:22 Le nto yenziwa nguBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada, wayedume phakathi kwamagorha amathathu."
2Samuel23:23 Wayebekekile yena ngaphezu kwamashumi amathathu lawo, kodwa akafikanga kwabathathu bokuqala. uDavide wammisa phezu kwabalindi bakhe."
2Samuel23:24 uAsaheli, umninawa kaYowabhi, ebengomnye wamashumi omathathu lawo; uElihanan, unyana kaDodo, waseBhetelehem;"
2Samuel23:25 uSama waseHarodi, noElika waseHarodi,"
2Samuel23:26 noHele wasePalta, noIra unyana kaIkeki waseTekowa;"
2Samuel23:27 noAbhiyezere waseMoanatoti, noMebhunayi waseMohusa;"
2Samuel23:28 Salmone Mowahoke, Maharai Monetofa,"
2Samuel23:29 noHelebhi, unyana kaBhahana, eMonetofu, noItayi, unyana kaRibhayi, waseGibheha, koonyana bakaBhenjamin;"
2Samuel23:30 noBhenaya wasePiraton, noHidayi waseMilanjeni yaseGahashe;"
2Samuel23:31 nguAbhihalibhon waseArbhati, neAsmaveti yaseBharahum,"
2Samuel23:32 noEliyabhi, unyana kaShahalebhon, koonyana bakaYashen, noYonatan;"
2Samuel23:33 noShama umMohari, noAkiyam unyana kaSharare umMohari;"
2Samuel23:34 noElifeleti, unyana ka-Akebhayi, unyana kaGati, noEliyam, unyana ka-Ahitofele waseGilon;"
2Samuel23:35 noHesrai waseKarmele, noPararayi wamaMowabhi,"
2Samuel23:36 noIgali, unyana kaNatan waseTsobha, noBhani waseMogadi;"
