2Samuel23:37 noTseleki umAmon, noNaharayi waseBheroti, umkhonzi kaYowabhi, unyana kaTseruya;"
2Samuel23:38 noIra waseMoitere, noGarebhe waseMoitere,"
2Samuel23:39 ngu-Uriya umHeti, bebonke bengamashumi amathathu anesixhenxe."
2Samuel24:1 Wabuya wavutha umsindo kaYehova kwaSirayeli, wamxhokonxela uDavide kubo, esithi, Hambani niwabale amaSirayeli namaYuda."
2Samuel24:2 Wathi uYehova kuYowabhi, umthetheli-mkhosi obenaye, Hamba uye kuzo zonke izizwe zakwaSirayeli, uthabathela kwaDan use eBher-shebha, ubabale abantu, ndilazi inani labantu."
2Samuel24:3 Wathi uYowabhi kukumkani, uYehova uThixo wakho makalunyuse uhlanga ngokuphindwe kalikhulu, engenakubalwa, abone namehlo okumkani, inkosi yam; Yini na ukuba ivume inkosi yam ukumkani ngale nto?"
2Samuel24:4 Laqinisela ilizwi lokumkani kuYowabhi nakubathetheli bamadoda. Waphuma ke uYowabhi nabathetheli bamaphakathi kukumkani, ukuba baye kubabala abantu bakwaSirayeli."
2Samuel24:5 Bayiwela iYordan, bamisa eArohere, ngasekunene kwesixeko phakathi koMlambo uGadi, besa eYazere."
2Samuel24:6 Baya eGiliyadi nasezweni laseTatimhode; Bafika eDanyan, bajikeleza eSidon."
2Samuel24:7 Bafika enqabeni yaseTire, nasezixekweni zonke zamaHivi namaKanan, beza kwelasezantsi lakwaYuda, besa eBher-shebha."
2Samuel24:8 Bakuba behamba nelizwe lonke, bafika eYerusalem emva kweenyanga ezisithoba ezineentsuku ezimashumi mabini."
2Samuel24:9 uYowabhi wamnika ukumkani inani labantu: amaSirayeli aba ngamakhulu asibhozo amawaka amadoda anobukroti, arhola ikrele; amadoda akwaYuda aba ngamakhulu amahlanu amawaka amadoda."
2Samuel24:10 Yaphuka intliziyo kaDavide emveni kokuba ebabalile abantu. Wathi uDavide kuYehova, Ndonile kunene ngale nto ndiyenzileyo; ngokuba ndenze izinto ezininzi zobudenge."
2Samuel24:11 Wavuka uDavide kusasa, lafika ilizwi likaYehova kuGadi umprofeti, imboni kaDavide, lisithi,"
2Samuel24:12 Yiya uthi kuDavide, uYehova wathi, Ndikunika ezithathu; khetha ibe nye kuyo, ndiyenzele wena."
2Samuel24:13 Waya ke uGadi kuDavide, wamxelela, wathi kuye, Sele uneminyaka esixhenxe na kulamba ezweni lakho? Okanye wobaleka utshaba lwakho iinyanga zibe ntathu na, lukusukela? Okanye ngaba iintsuku ezintathu zesibetho kwilizwe lakho? kongeza ngoku, ubone into endiya kuyenza kowandithumayo."
2Samuel24:14 Wathi uDavide kuGadi, Ndibandezelekile; masiwele kaloku esandleni sikaYehova; ngokuba inkulu inceba yakhe, mandingaweli ezandleni zabantu."
2Samuel24:15 uYehova wathoba ke indyikitya yokufa kwaSirayeli, yathabathela ekuseni yesa kwixa elimisiweyo;"
2Samuel24:16 Xa ingelosi yasolula isandla sayo nxamnye neYerusalem ukuze iyitshabalalise, uYehova waba nosizi ngenxa yaloo ntlekele waza wathi kwingelosi eyayitshabalalisa abantu: “Kwanele, bamba isandla sakho! Ke isithunywa sikaYehova sasihleli etroneni ka-Aravena umYebhusi."
2Samuel24:17 Wathetha uDavide kuYehova akusibona isithunywa eso sibabulala abantu, wathi, Yabona, ndonile, ndonile; kodwa ezi zimvu zenze ntoni na? isandla sakho masibe phezu kwam, naphezu kwendlu kabawo."
2Samuel24:18 Waya ke uGadi kuDavide ngaloo mini, wathi kuye, Nyuka, uye kummisela uYehova isibingelelo esandeni sika-Aravena umYebhusi."
2Samuel24:19 Wenyuka uDavide ngokwelizwi likaGadi, njengoko uYehova abemwisele umthetho ngako."
2Samuel24:20 Waya uAravena, wambona ukumkani nabakhonzi bakhe besiza kuye; waphuma uAravena, waqubuda kukumkani ejonge phantsi."
2Samuel24:21 Wathi uAravena, Yini na ukuba inkosi yam ukumkani ize kumkhonzi wayo? Wathi uDavide, Ndiya kunithengela isibingelelo, ukuze wakhele uYehova isibingelelo, sithintele abantu isibetho."
2Samuel24:22 Wathi uAravena kuDavide, Ukumkani wam makathabathe ukumkani wam, axhelele oko kulungileyo kuye; nanzi iinkomo zokutshisa umlilo, neenkomo, nezinye izinto zeenkomo ukuba zibe ziinkuni."
2Samuel24:23 Zonke ezo zinto, ukumkani, uAravena ubezinike ukumkani. Wathi uAravena kukumkani, uYehova uThixo wakho ukwamkele."
2Samuel24:24 Wathi ukumkani kuAravena, Hayi! ndiya kusithenga ngexabiso kuwe; yaye ndiya kwenzela uYehova uThixo wam iminikelo etshiswayo endingayihlawulanga. uDavide wathenga isanda neenkomo ngeeshekele zesilivere ezimashumi mahlanu."
2Samuel24:25 uDavide wamakhela khona uYehova isibingelelo waza wanikela iminikelo etshiswayo nemibingelelo yombulelo. Ngoko uYehova walithandazela ilizwe, yaye isibetho sayeka kwaSirayeli."
1Kings1:1 Ke kaloku ukumkani uDavide ubeseleyindoda enkulu, edandathekile iminyaka; bamambesa ke, akafudumala."
1Kings1:2 Bathi abakhonzi bakhe kuye, Nkosi, nkosi yam, makakhangele intombi; makame phambi kokumkani, amkhusele, alale esifubeni sakho, ifudumale inkosi yam ukumkani."
1Kings1:3 Bafuna intombi eyinzwakazi ezweni lonke lakwaSirayeli, bafumana uAbhishagi waseShunem, bamzisa kukumkani."
1Kings1:4 Loo ntombi yayiyinzwakazi encamisileyo, yamonga ukumkani, yamlungiselela, ukumkani akayazi."
1Kings1:5 Waza uAdoniya unyana kaHagiti waziphakamisa, wathi, Ndiyalawula; Wazilungisela iinqwelo zokulwa, nabamahashe, namadoda angamashumi amahlanu abaleka phezu kwakhe."
1Kings1:6 Uyise akazange ambethe emehlweni ngokuthi: “Uyenzele ntoni na loo nto? kwaye waye eyindoda entle kakhulu; unina wamzala emva koAbhisalom.
1Kings1:7 Wathetha noYowabhi unyana kaTseruya, noAbhiyatare umbingeleli, balandela uAdoniya."
1Kings1:8 Ke yena uTsadoki umbingeleli, noBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada, noNatan umprofeti, noShimehi, noReyi, namagorha kaDavide, ababanga ngakuAdoniya."
1Kings1:9 uAdoniya waxhelela izimvu neenkomo neenkomo ezityetyisiweyo kwilitye laseSohelete ngase-Enerogele, yaye wamema bonke abantakwabo oonyana bakakumkani nawo onke amadoda akwaYuda abakhonzi bakakumkani."
1Kings1:10 Akambizanga umprofeti uNatan, noBhenaya, namagorha, noSolomon umkhuluwa wakhe."
1Kings1:11 Ngoko uNatan wathetha noBhatshebha, unina kaSolomon, wathi: “Awuvanga na ukuba uAdoniya, unyana kaHagiti, uyalawula ngoku, ukanti inkosi yethu uDavide ayiyazi?"
1Kings1:12 Khawuze ke, ndikucebise, uwusindise umphefumlo wakho nowonyana wakho uSolomon."
1Kings1:13 Hamba uye kukumkani uDavide, uthi kuye, Nkosi yam, nkosi yam, ubungamfungelanga na umkhonzazana wakho, wathi, uSolomon unyana wakho uya kuba ngukumkani emveni kwam, kuhlale etroneni yam? Ngoko, kwakutheni ukuze uAdoniya alawule?"
1Kings1:14 Uyabona, ndothi, usathetha nokumkani, ndingene nam emva kwakho, ndiwazalise amazwi akho."
1Kings1:15 Wangena uBhatshebha egumbini lokumkani; uAbhishagi waseShuneme ubelungiselela ukumkani.
1Kings1:16 Wathoba uBhatshebha, wawa ngobuso bakhe phambi kokumkani. Wathi ukumkani, Ufuna ntoni na?"
1Kings1:17 Wathi kuye, Nkosi, nguwe owamfungelayo uYehova uThixo wakho kumkhonzi wakho, wathi, uSolomon unyana wakho nguye oya kuba ngukumkani emveni kwam, kuhlale etroneni yam."
1Kings1:18 Ngoku ke nanku engukumkani uAdoniya; Kaloku wena nkosi yam kumkani, akukwazi."
1Kings1:19 Wabingelela iinkomo, neenkomo ezityetyisiweyo, neenkomo zaninzi, wababiza bonke oonyana bokumkani, noAbhiyatare umbingeleli, noYowabhi umthetheli-mkhosi; ke akambizanga uSolomon umkhonzi wakho."
1Kings1:20 Wena kumkani, kumkani, amehlo amaSirayeli onke akhangele kuwe, ukuba uwaxelele, ukuba kuhlale bani na etroneni yokumkani, inkosi yam, emveni kwakhe."
1Kings1:21 Kungenjalo, xa ithe yalala kooyise inkosi yam ukumkani, mna noSolomon unyana wam sogqalwa njengabakreqi."
1Kings1:22 Esathetha nokumkani, kwangena umprofeti uNatan."
1Kings1:23 Bamxelela ukumkani, bathi, Lo nguNatan umprofeti. Wathi akungena phambi kokumkani, waguqa phambi kokumkani, ubuso bakhe bubheke emhlabeni."
1Kings1:24 Wathi uNatan, Nkosi yam, ùtshilo na wena ukuthi, NguAdoniya oya kuba ngukumkani emveni kwam, kuhlale etroneni yam?"
1Kings1:25 Kuba namhlanje uye wehla waza waxhela iinkomo neenkomo ezityetyisiweyo neenkomo zaninzi waza wabiza bonke oonyana bokumkani nabathetheli-mkhosi noAbhiyatare umbingeleli; nabo babesidla besela phambi kwakhe, besithi, Ukumkani uAdoniya makamkhusele!"
1Kings1:26 Kodwa akandibizanga mna mkhonzi wakho, uTsadoki umbingeleli noBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada noSolomon umkhonzi wakho."
1Kings1:27 Le nto yenziwe yinkosi yam na, waza akwamxelela umkhonzi wakho oya kuhlala etroneni yokumkani emva kwakhe?"
1Kings1:28 Waphendula ukumkani uDavide, wathi, Ndibizeleni uBhatshebha. Weza kukumkani, wema phambi kokumkani."
1Kings1:29 Wafunga uYehova, wathi, NgoYehova ovayo, owukhululayo umphefumlo wam ekubandezelekeni konke;"
1Kings1:30 njengoko ndakufungela uYehova uThixo kaSirayeli, ndathi, uSolomon unyana wakho uya kuba ngukumkani emveni kwam, kuhlale yena esikhundleni sam etroneni yam; ngokuqinisekileyo ndiya kwenjenjalo namhlanje."
1Kings1:31 Wathoba uBhatshebha ngobuso, wazukisa ukumkani, wathi, Makadle ubomi ukumkani wam, ukumkani uDavide, kude kuse ephakadeni."
1Kings1:32 Wathi ukumkani uDavide, Bizani kum uTsadoki umbingeleli, noNatan umprofeti, noBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada. Bafika ke kukumkani."
1Kings1:33 Wathi ukumkani kubo, Bathabatheni abakhonzi benkosi yenu, ndimkhwelele uSolomon, unyana wam, undlebende wam, ndihle ndiye naye eGihon."
1Kings1:34 uTsadoki umbingeleli noNatan umprofeti bamthambisa khona apho ukuba abe ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli; Vuthelani isigodlo nithi, Makadle ubomi ukumkani uSolomon!"
1Kings1:35 Mlandeleni ngoku, ukuze ahlale etroneni yam; kuba uya kuba ngukumkani esikhundleni sam, yaye ndiya kumenza umlawuli kaSirayeli noYuda."
1Kings1:36 Waphendula uBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada, wathi kukumkani, Amen, utsho uYehova, uThixo kakumkani, nkosi yam;"
1Kings1:37 Njengoko uYehova wayenokumkani wam ukumkani, makabe noSolomon, aze ayiphakamise itrone yakhe ngaphezu kwetrone kaKumkani wam ukumkani uDavide."
1Kings1:38 Wehla ke umbingeleli uTsadoki, noNatan umprofeti, noBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada, namaKrete, nezigidimi, bamkhwelisa uSolomon e-esileni likakumkani uDavide, bamzisa eGihon."
1Kings1:39 uTsadoki umbingeleli wathabatha isigodlo seoli ententeni, wamthambisa uSolomon. Bavuthela isigodlo; bathi bonke abantu, Makasindiswe ukumkani uSolomon."
1Kings1:40 Bamlandela ke bonke abantu, baza abantu babetha iimbande, bevuya ngovuyo olukhulu; lasuka lakrazuka ihlabathi sisandi sabo."
1Kings1:41 Wakuva oko uAdoniya nabamenyiweyo bonke ababenaye, bakugqiba ukudla. Wasiva uYowabhi isandi sesigodlo, wathi, Siyintoni na isandi sesigodlo esiphakathi komzi?"
1Kings1:42 Uthe esathetha, kwafika uYonatan unyana ka-Abhiyatare umbingeleli; Wathi uAdoniya kuye, Ngena; ngokuba uyindoda enobukroti, uzisa iindaba ezilungileyo."
1Kings1:43 Waphendula uYonatan, wathi kuAdoniya, Ewe, ukumkani uDavide inkosi yethu umenze ukumkani uSolomon."
1Kings1:44 Ngoko ukumkani wathumela umbingeleli uTsadoki noNatan umprofeti noBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada namaKrete nePeleti kunye naye, baza bamkhwelisa imeyile kakumkani."
1Kings1:45 uTsadoki umbingeleli noNatan umprofeti bamthambisa uGihon ukuba abe ngukumkani; Yingxolo oyivileyo leyo.
1Kings1:46 Kananjalo uSolomon uhleli etroneni yobukumkani;
1Kings1:47 Ngaphezu koko, abakhonzi bakakumkani beza beza kumbonga ukumkani wethu uDavide, besithi, ‘Ngamana uThixo angalenza libe lihle igama likaSolomon kunegama lakho, ayiphakamise itrone yakhe etroneni yakho ngakumbi. Waqubuda ukumkani esililini."
1Kings1:48 Wathi ukumkani, Makabongwe uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, endinike namhla indoda yokuba ndihlale etroneni yam, ngokwam mna ndibona ngamehlo."
1Kings1:49 Boyika bonke abamenyiweyo ababenoAdoniya, besuka bema, bahamba yangulowo ngendlela yakhe."
1Kings1:50 uAdoniya wamoyika uSolomon, waphakama, wabamba iimpondo zesibingelelo."
1Kings1:51 Waxelelwa ke uSolomon, kwathiwa, Nanko uAdoniya esoyika ukumkani uSolomon, ethabathe iimpondo zesibingelelo, esithi, Undifungele namhlanje ukumkani uSolomon, ukuba akayi kumbulala ngekrele umkhonzi wakhe umkhonto."
1Kings1:52 Wathi uSolomon, Ukuba uthe wazibonakalisa ukuba ulungile, akuyi kuwa nalunye unwele lwakhe emhlabeni; ke ukuba kuthe kwafunyanwa ubugwenxa kuye, uya kufa."
1Kings1:53 Wathumela ukumkani uSolomon, bamhlisa esibingelelweni. Waya, waqubuda kukumkani uSolomon, wathi uSolomon kuye, Hamba uye endlwini yakho."
1Kings2:1 Isondele imihla yokufa kukaDavide; wamwisela umthetho uSolomon unyana wakhe, wathi,"
1Kings2:2 Ndihamba ngendlela yehlabathi lonke; wandule uzinike amandla, ube yindoda;"
1Kings2:3 Wugcine umthetho kaYehova uThixo wakho, uhambe ngeendlela zakhe, uyigcine imiyalelo yakhe, nemithetho yakhe, namasiko akhe, nezilumkiso zakhe, njengoko kubhaliweyo emyalelweni kaMoses, ukuze ube nempumelelo entweni yonke oyenzayo uyenza; naphi na apho uya khona;"
1Kings2:4 ukuze uYehova aligcine ilizwi lakhe awalithethayo ngam, xa wathi: “Ukuba oonyana bakho banikela ingqalelo kwindlela yabo, baze bahambe enyanisweni ngentliziyo yabo yonke nangomphefumlo wabo uphela, utsho ukuthi: etroneni yakwaSirayeli."
1Kings2:5 Kananjalo uyakwazi awakwenzayo kum uYowabhi unyana kaTseruya, awakwenzayo kubathetheli bobabini bemikhosi yakwaSirayeli, uAbhinere unyana kaNere, noAmasa unyana kaYetere, umthetheli womkhosi wamaSirayeli ukumkani wakwaSirayeli walixhela enoxolo igazi lemfazwe, walikhulula igazi lemfazwe embhinqo wakhe, nasesinqeni sakhe, nasezimbadada ezinyaweni zakhe."
1Kings2:6 Yenza ngokobulumko bakho, ungehli ubushushu bakhe iye kwelabafileyo enoxolo."
1Kings2:7 Ke koonyana bakaBharzilayi waseGiliyadi, uze ube nenceba kubo, babe phakathi kwabadla etafileni yakho; kuba beze ngale ndlela kum xa ndandibaleka ngenxa ka-Abhisalom umntakwenu."
1Kings2:8 Uyabona, unaye uShimehi unyana kaGera, umBhenjamin, waseBhahurim, yena wanditshabhisa ngotshabhiso olukrakra, ekuyeni kwam eMahanayim; ke yena wehla weza kundikhawulela eYordan, ndamfungela uYehova, ndathi, Andiyi kukubulala ngekrele."
1Kings2:9 Ke kaloku musa ukumgqala emsulwa, ekubeni uyindoda elumkileyo yaye ukwazi oko ufanele ukwenze kuye; Intloko yakhe ethotyiweyo ikuwisele kwelabafileyo unegazi."
1Kings2:10 Walala ke uDavide kooyise, wangcwatyelwa emzini kaDavide;"
1Kings2:11 Imihla uDavide abengukumkani kwaSirayeli ngayo yaba yiminyaka emashumi mane; waba neminyaka esixhenxe engukumkani eHebron, eseYerusalem iminyaka emashumi mathathu anamithathu."
1Kings2:12 Wahlala ke uSolomon etroneni kaDavide uyise; bazimisela kakhulu ubukumkani bakhe.
1Kings2:13 Waza uAdoniya unyana kaHagiti weza kuBhatshebha unina kaSolomon. Wathi, Nize ngoxolo na? Wathi, Ndinoxolo."
1Kings2:14 Waza wathi: “Kukho into endifuna ukukuxelela yona. Wathi yena, Hambani niye!"
1Kings2:15 Wathi: “Uyazi wena ukuba bebubobam ubukumkani, abe ebekhangele kum ukuba ndilawule onke amaSirayeli; kodwa ubukumkani baguquka baba bobomntakwethu, ngenxa yokuba baba bobakhe buvela kuYehova."
1Kings2:16 Kungokunje ndicela nto-nye kuni, ze ningandichasi; Wathi kuye, Yitsho."
1Kings2:17 Wathi, Yitsho kukumkani uSolomon, ngokuba engayi kukulala; ndinike uAbhishagi waseShunem, abe ngumkam."
1Kings2:18 Wathi ke uBhatshebha: “Kulungile! Ndiya kuthetha kukumkani esikhundleni sakho.
1Kings2:19 Waya ke uBhatshebha kukumkani uSolomon, ukuba athethe naye ngoAdoniya. Waza ukumkani wammisa, waqubuda kuye, wahlala etroneni yakhe, wamisa isihlalo sikanina wokumkani; wahlala ngasekunene kwakhe."
1Kings2:20 Wathi, Ndicela nto encinane kuwe; Nceda, ungandixeleli. Wathi uYehova kuye, Cela uma, kuba andiyi kukukhanyela."
1Kings2:21 Wathi, uAbhishagi waseShunem makanikwe uAdoniya, umkhuluwa wakho, abe ngumkakhe."
1Kings2:22 uKumkani uSolomon waphendula wathi kunina: “Bekutheni na ukuze ucele uAdoniya uAbhishage umShunem? bucele kuye ubukumkani; ngokuba engumzalwana wam omkhulu; yena noAbhiyatare umbingeleli, noYowabhi unyana kaTseruya."
1Kings2:23 Ukumkani uSolomon wafunga uYehova, wathi, uThixo uya kwenza le nto kum, ayenze, ukuba uAdoniya akalithethanga elo lizwi elahla umphefumlo wakhe."
1Kings2:24 Ke kaloku, ehleli nje uYehova, owandizisayo, wandihlalisa etroneni kaDavide ubawo, owandenzela indlu, njengoko watshoyo, namhlanje uya kubulawa uAdoniya."
1Kings2:25 Ukumkani uSolomon wathuma uBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada; wamwela phezu kwakhe, wafa."
1Kings2:26 Wathi umbingeleli uAbhiyatare kukumkani, Hamba uye eAnatoti ezweni lakowenu; kuba ufanelwe kukufa, kodwa andiyi kukubulala ngeli xesha, ngenxa yokuba wayithwala ityeya kaYehova phambi kukaDavide ubawo, nangokucinezelwa kwakho kuyo yonk’ into awayecinezelwe ngayo ubawo."
1Kings2:27 Ngoko uSolomon wamndulula uAbhiyatare ngenxa yokuba wayengenguye umbingeleli kaYehova; ukuze alizalise ilizwi likaYehova, awalithethayo ngendlu kaEli Shilo."
1Kings2:28 Ezi ndaba zafika kuYowabhi, ngenxa yokuba uYowabhi wayemshiyile uAdoniya, nangona wayengamlandelanga uAbhisalom. Wasabela uYowabhi ententeni kaYehova, wabamba iimpondo zesibingelelo."
1Kings2:29 Waxelelwa ukumkani uSolomon, ukuba uYowabhi usabele ententeni kaYehova; nanko ngasesibingelelweni. uSolomon wathuma uBhenaya, unyana kaYehoyada, wathi, Mbulale."
1Kings2:30 Waya uBhenaya ententeni kaYehova, wathi kuye, Uthe ukumkani, Phuma. Waphendula ke yena wathi, Hayi; kodwa ndiya kufela apha. Waphinda uBhenaya wamxelela ukumkani, wathi, Utshilo uYowabhi, wenjenje ukuthetha nam."
1Kings2:31 Wathi ukumkani kuye, Yenza into ayithethileyo, umbulale, umngcwabe; ukuze ulisuse kum nakwindlu kabawo igazi elimsulwa, aliphalazile uYowabhi."
1Kings2:32 uYehova uya kulibuyisela entlokweni yakhe igazi lakhe, abawa amadoda amabini angamalungisa, elungile kunaye, awabulala ngentshuntshe, engazi uyise kaDavide, onguAbhinere, unyana kaNere; umthetheli wemikhosi yakwaSirayeli, noAmasa unyana kaYetere, umthetheli womkhosi wakwaYuda."
1Kings2:33 Ngako oko amagazi awo obuyela entlokweni kaYowabhi, nasentlokweni yoonyana bakhe kude kuse ephakadeni; kodwa kuDavide nakwinzala yakhe nakwindlu yakhe nakwitrone yakhe kuya kubakho uxolo oluvela kuYehova ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo."
1Kings2:34 Wenyuka ke uBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada, wamgwaza, wambulala; wangcwatyelwa endlwini yakhe entlango."
1Kings2:35 Ukumkani wambeka uBhenaya, unyana kaYehoyada, esikhundleni sakhe ukuba aphathe umkhosi; uTsadoki umbingeleli wambeka ukumkani kwigumbi lokudlela lika-Abhiyatare."
1Kings2:36 uYehova wambiza uShimehi, wathi kuye, Zakhele indlu eYerusalem, uhlale khona, ungashiyi khona."
1Kings2:37 Kuba mhla waphumayo, wawuwela umlanjana oyiKidron, uya kwazi ngokuqinisekileyo ukuba uya kufa, inene; igazi lakho liya kuba phezu kwentloko yakho."
1Kings2:38 Wathi uShimehi kukumkani, Lilungile eli lizwi; njengoko ithethileyo ukumkani, inkosi yam, umkhonzi wakho uya kwenza. uShimehi wahlala imihla emininzi eYerusalem."
1Kings2:39 Kwakuba kudlule iminyaka emithathu, babaleka abakhonzi ababini bakaShimehi, baya eAgis unyana kaMaga, ukumkani waseGati. Waxelelwa uShimehi, kwathiwa, Yabona, abakhonzi bakho baseGati;"
1Kings2:40 Wesuka uShimehi, wayibopha iesile lakhe, waya eGati eAgishe, esiya kufuna abakhonzi bakhe; wahamba uShimehi, wabathabatha abakhonzi bakhe eGati."
1Kings2:41 Waxelelwa uSolomon ukuba uShimehi wemka eYerusalem, waya eGati, wabuya."
1Kings2:42 Ukumkani wathumela kuShimehi, wathi kuye, Mna andikufungisanga uYehova; ndakugweba mna, ndathi, Mhla waphuma waya ezindaweni zonke, uya kufa na? Wathi ke wena kum, Ilizwi endilivileyo lilungile;"
1Kings2:43 Kutheni na ke ukuba ungasizalisekisi isifungo sikaYehova nomyalelo endakuyalela wona?
1Kings2:44 Wathi ukumkani kuShimehi, Uyabazi wena bonke ububi obaziwa yintliziyo yakho, owabenzayo kuDavide ubawo; uYehova uya kubuhlisela ububi bakho entlokweni yakho;"
1Kings2:45 Yaye uKumkani uSolomon uya kusikelelwa, yaye itrone kaDavide iya kumiselwa ngokuqinileyo phambi koYehova ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo."
1Kings2:46 Wawisa umthetho uBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada; eyaphuma yawa phezu kwakhe, wafa. Ubukumkani baqiniselwa esandleni sikaSolomon."
1Kings3:1 uSolomon wakha ubuhlobo noFaro ukumkani waseYiputa, wazeka intombi kaFaro, wayizisa emzini kaDavide, wada wayigqiba ukuyakha indlu yakhe, nendlu kaYehova, nodonga lwaseYerusalem, lwa lonke."
1Kings3:2 Kodwa abantu babebingelela ezigangeni; ngokuba lalingekakhelwa ndlu igama likaYehova kwada kwayiloo mini.
1Kings3:3 uSolomon wamthanda uYehova ngokuhamba emimiselweni kaDavide uyise; wayebingelela ezigangeni zodwa, wenyuka umsi."
1Kings3:4 Ukumkani ubesiya eGibheyon, ukuba abingelele khona; ngenxa yokuba yayiyindawo ephakamileyo kakhulu: uSolomon wanikela iwaka leminikelo etshiswayo kweso sibingelelo."
1Kings3:5 Xa wayeseGibheyon, uYehova wabonakala kuSolomon ebusuku ephupheni, wathi uThixo: “Cela into, ndikuphe;"
1Kings3:6 Wathi uSolomon, Umenzele inceba enkulu umkhonzi wakho uDavide, ubawo, njengoko abehamba phambi kwakho enyanisweni, nangobulungisa, nangentliziyo elungileyo; wambambela olu babalo bukhulu, wada wamnika unyana ukuba ahlale etroneni yakhe, njengoko kunjalo namhla."
1Kings3:7 Kaloku, Yehova Thixo wam, wena umenze ukumkani umkhonzi wakho esikhundleni sikaDavide ubawo; ndisengumntwana; Andazi ndiphume okanye ndingene njani."
1Kings3:8 Umkhonzi wakho lo uphakathi kohlanga lwakho olunyuliweyo, uhlanga olukhulu, olungenakubalwa, olungenakubalwa ngenxa yobuninzi."
1Kings3:9 Mnike umkhonzi wakho intliziyo evayo, yokubalawula abantu bakho, ahlule phakathi kokulungileyo nokubi; ngokuba ngubani na ongalugwebayo olu hlanga lwakho lukhulu?"
1Kings3:10 Lalunga elo lizwi emehlweni kaYehova, wabuza uSolomon."
1Kings3:11 Wathi ke uThixo kuye, Ekubeni ucele loo nto, akwayicela imihla emininzi; Anibucelanga ubutyebi benu, anicelanga nomphefumlo weentshaba zenu; Ke ucele ukuqonda kwakho ukuba kugwebe;"
1Kings3:12 Yabona, ndenze ngokwamazwi akho; niyabona, ndininike intliziyo elumkileyo nenokuqonda; kangangokuba ngaphambi kwakho akuzange kubekho unjengawe, nasemva kwakho kungabikho unjengawe."
1Kings3:13 Ndikunikile oko ungakucelanga, ubutyebi nozuko, ukuze kungabikho unjengawe phakathi kookumkani yonke imihla yakho."
1Kings3:14 Ukuba uthe wahamba ngeendlela zam, wayigcina imithetho yam nemimiselo yam, njengoko wahamba ngako uDavide uyihlo, ndoyolula imihla yakho."
1Kings3:15 Wavuka uSolomon; liphupha. Weza eYerusalem, wema phambi kwetyeya yomnqophiso kaYehova, wenyusa amadini anyukayo nemibingelelo yombulelo, wabenzela isidlo abakhonzi bakhe bonke."
1Kings3:16 Ngelo xesha beza kukumkani amankazana amabini angamahenyukazi, ema phambi kwakhe."
1Kings3:17 Yathi enye inkazana, Camagu, nkosi yam, mna nalo mfazi sihlala ndlwini-nye; ndafika kukho umntwana naye endlini."
1Kings3:18 Wazala ngomhla wesithathu, naye lowo wazala; kwaye sasikunye; kwaye kungekho mntu wasemzini unathi kuloo ndlu, sisodwa thina sobabini kuloo ndlu."
1Kings3:19 Wafa ke umntwana wale nkazana ebusuku; ngokuba wayigubungelayo.
1Kings3:20 Wavuka ezinzulwini zobusuku, wamthabatha unyana wam phambi kwam, elele umkhonzazana wakho, wamlalisa esifubeni sakhe, wambeka esifubeni sam umntwana wakhe ofileyo."
1Kings3:21 Ndavuka kusasa, ukuba ndimanyise umntwana wam, O! kodwa ndathi ndakuyicinga ekuseni ndabona ukuba ayingonyana wam lo ndimzeleyo."
1Kings3:22 Wathi omnye umfazi, Hayi; ngunyana wam lo uhleliyo, unyana wakho ngulowa ufileyo. Wathi yena, Hayi; unyana wakho ngulowa ufileyo, ngunyana wam lo uhleliyo. Batsho phambi kwenkosi."
1Kings3:23 Wathi ukumkani, Kuthiwa, Ngunyana wam lo uhleliyo, unyana wakho ngulowa ufileyo; omnye wathi: Hayi! kodwa unyana wakho ufile, yaye unyana wam ngulo udla ubomi."
1Kings3:24 Wathi ukumkani, Ndithabatheleni ikrele. Balizisa ikrele phambi kokumkani."
1Kings3:25 Wathi ukumkani, Mcandeni kubini lo mntwana uhleliyo, niyinike isiqingatha enye, niyinike isiqingatha;"
1Kings3:26 Yathetha le nkazana, ungowayo unyana ohleliyo, kukumkani (ngokuba isisu besikhalela unyana wayo), yathi, Camagu, nkosi yam, senimnike ehleli umntwana; Wathi ke omnye, Mayingabi yeyam, ingabi yeyakho;"
1Kings3:27 Waphendula uYehova, wathi, Mnike umntwana ohleliyo; ngumama wam."
1Kings3:28 Asiva onke amaSirayeli isigwebo abesenza ukumkani; amoyika ukumkani, ngokuba ayebona ukuba ubulumko bukaThixo bungaphakathi kwakhe, ukuba agwebe."
1Kings4:1 Ke kaloku ukumkani uSolomon waba ngukumkani kumaSirayeli onke.
1Kings4:2 Ngabo abo abathetheli abenabo; umbingeleli uAzariya, unyana kaTsadoki;"
1Kings4:3 ngooElihorefe noAhiya, oonyana bakaSisa, ababhali; uYehoshafati unyana ka-Ahiludi, umphathi wentlanganiso yamatyala;"
1Kings4:4 uBhenaya unyana kaJoyada wayeyinjengele yomkhosi, uZadoki noAbhiyatare bengababingeleli;"
1Kings4:5 uAsariya, unyana kaNatan, ephethe abalungiseleli;"
1Kings4:6 uAhisare wayephethe indlu yakhe, uAdoniram unyana ka-Abheda ephethe irhafu."
1Kings4:7 uSolomon ubenabalungiseleli abalishumi elinababini, kumaSirayeli onke, ababemxhasa ukumkani nendlu yakhe; ngamnye wayezixhasa ngenyanga yakhe enyakeni."
1Kings4:8 Ngawo la amagama abo: ngunyana kaHure, ezintabeni zakwaEfrayim;"
1Kings4:9 unyana kaDekare nguMakashe, noShahalebhim, neBhete-shemeshe, noElon-bethanan;"
1Kings4:10 unyana kaHesedi nguArubhoti; kuye iSogo nelizwe lonke lakwaHefere;
1Kings4:11 unyana ka-Abhinadabhi, ezweni lonke lakwaDore; nguTafati ke lowo, intombi kaSolomon, umkakhe;"
1Kings4:12 nguBhahana unyana ka-Ahiludi; eyakhe yaba yiTahanaki neMegido nayo yonke iBhete-shehan phantsi kweTsartana ephantsi kweYizereli, ukususela eBhete-shehan ukuya eAbheli-mehola ngaphaya kweYokenam;"
1Kings4:13 unyana kaGebhere yiRamoti yaseGiliyadi; Yayizizixeko zikaYahire, unyana kaManase, eGiliyadi. Ke ilizwe laseArgobhi eBhashan, bekukho izixeko ezingamashumi amathandathu ezikhulu, ezinodonga nemivalo yobhedu;"
1Kings4:14 uAhinadabhi, unyana kaIdo, wazala uMahanayim;"
1Kings4:15 nguAhimahatse kwaNafetali; Watshata noBasmathe, intombi kaSolomon, ukuba abe ngumfazi wakhe;"
1Kings4:16 nguBhahana unyana kaHushayi kwa-Ashere naseAloti;
1Kings4:17 uYehoshafati unyana kaParuwa, ezweni lakwaIsakare;"
1Kings4:18 nguShimehi unyana kaEla, ezweni lakwaBhenjamin;"
1Kings4:19 uGebhere unyana kaUri wayesezweni laseGiliyadi, kwilizwe likaSihon ukumkani wama-Amori no-Ogi ukumkani waseBhashan; yaye yayinguye yedwa umlawuli kwelo lizwe."
1Kings4:20 Ayemaninzi amaYuda namaSirayeli, abemaninzi entlabathini naselunxwemeni lolwandle, esidla, esela, ezonwabisa."
1Kings4:21 uSolomon ubelawula ezikumkanini zonke, ethabathela kuwo uMlambo, naselizweni lamaFilisti, wesa nasemdeni weYiputa; bazisa izipho, bamkhonza uSolomon yonke imihla yobomi bakhe."
1Kings4:22 Ukutya kukaSolomon imini enye kwaba ziikhilogram ezimashumi mathathu zomgubo ocoliweyo, namashumi amathandathu eekhilogram zomgubo;"
1Kings4:23 neshumi leenkomo ezityetyisiweyo, neenkomo zasemadlelweni ezimashumi mabini, nekhulu leenkomo ezintsha ezityetyisiweyo, kungabalwa amaxhama, namaxhama, namaxhama atyetyisiweyo."
1Kings4:24 Ubephethe ilizwe lonke elinganeno koMlambo, ethabathela eTifsa wesa eAza, nookumkani bonke abaphesheya koMlambo; Wayenoxolo kuzo zonke iindawo."
1Kings4:25 AmaYuda namaSirayeli ayehlala ekhuselekile ngamnye phantsi komdiliya wakhe naphantsi komkhiwane wakhe, ukususela kwaDan kuse eBher-shebha yonke imihla kaSolomon."
1Kings4:26 uSolomon ubenamashumi amane amawaka eenqwelo zokulwa, namawaka alishumi elinamabini amahashe akhwelwayo."
1Kings4:27 Abo bathetheli bamnika ukudla ukumkani uSolomon, nabo bonke abasondela etafileni yokumkani uSolomon, elowo exhasa ngenyanga yakhe; babengaswele nto."
1Kings4:28 Kananjalo bazisa irhasi nengca yamahashe neekati, elowo ngokwesiko lakhe;"
1Kings4:29 uThixo wamnika ke uSolomon ubulumko obuninzi nengqondo, nentliziyo enkulu, njengentlabathi eselunxwemeni lolwandle."
1Kings4:30 Ubulumko bukaSolomon bebulunge ngaphezu kobulumko boonyana bonke basempumalanga, naphezu kobulumko bonke bamaYiputa."
1Kings4:31 Ngokuba ubelumkile ngaphezu kwabantu bonke; noEtan waseMosera, noHeman, noKakoli, noDarda, oonyana bakaMahole; udumo lwakhe lwaba sezizweni zonke ezimjikelezileyo."
1Kings4:32 Wathetha amawaka amathathu emizekeliso, zathi neengoma zakhe zaliwaka elinantlanu."
1Kings4:33 Wayethetha ngemithi, eqalela kumsedare waseLebhanon, wesa kwihisope ephuma eludongeni; Wathetha ngezilwanyana, neentaka, nezinambuzane, neentlanzi."
1Kings4:34 Babephuma kuzo zonke iintlanga besiza kuva ubulumko bukaSolomon, kubo bonke ookumkani bomhlaba ababephulaphule ubulumko bakhe."
1Kings5:1 Wathuma uHiram, ukumkani waseTire, abakhonzi bakhe kuSolomon; kuba wayevile ukuba bamthambisile ukuba abe ngukumkani endlwini kayise, ekubeni uHiram wayesoloko emthanda uDavide."
1Kings5:2 uSolomon wathumela umyalezo kuHiram, esithi:"
1Kings5:3 Uyazi wena, ukuba uDavide ubawo ubengenako ukulakhela indlu igama likaYehova uThixo wakhe, ngenxa yeemfazwe ezimfikeleyo, wada uYehova wambeka phantsi kweenyawo zakhe."
1Kings5:4 Kaloku ke undiphumzile uYehova, uThixo wam, ngeenxa zonke, akukho lutshaba, akukho ngozi."
1Kings5:5 Yabona, ndiceba ukulakhela indlu igama likaYehova uThixo wam, njengoko wakuthethayo uYehova ubawo uDavide, wathi, Unyana wakho, endiya kumbeka etroneni yakho esikhundleni sakho, nguye oya kundakhela indlu igama."
1Kings5:6 Ngoko ke wisa umthetho, bandimisele imisedare eLebhanon; abakhonzi bam babe nabakhonzi bakho, ndikunike umvuzo ngokwento yonke othe wabawisela umthetho ngayo; ngokuba niyazi nina, ukuba akukho namnye kuthi ogawula imithi njengamaTsidon."
1Kings5:7 Akuweva uHiram amazwi kaSolomon, wavuya kunene, wathi, Makabongwe uYehova namhla, omnike uDavide unyana olumkileyo, wokuba alulawule olu hlanga lukhulu."
1Kings5:8 uHiram wamthuma ke uSolomon, wathi, Ndizibonile izinto ondithume zona, ndikwenze konke okufunayo, ngemisedare nemisipres."
1Kings5:9 Abakhonzi bam boyihlisela elwandle lwaseLebhanon; mna ndiya kumse elwandle, adada, kuloo ndawo uya kundikhubekisa kuyo, ndimse elwandle, umamkele; wondiphilisa ke umnqweno wokunika indlu yam ukudla."
1Kings5:10 uHiram wamnika ke uSolomon imisedare nemisipres ngangokuthanda kwakhe konke.
1Kings5:11 uSolomon wamnika uHiram amashumi amabini amawaka engqolowa ukuba idle indlu yakhe; namashumi amabini eekore zeoli engqushiweyo; uSolomon wayinika uHiram njengaminyaka le.
1Kings5:12 uYehova wamnika ubulumko uSolomon, njengoko wayekuthethile kuye; lwaba luxolo phakathi koHiram noSolomon; benza umnqophiso bobabini."
1Kings5:13 Ukumkani uSolomon waqhubeka erhafisa oonyana bakaSirayeli bonke; unikelo ngamashumi omathathu amawaka amadoda.
1Kings5:14 Wabathuma eLebhanon, ishumi lamawaka ngenyanga, ngokwamaqela; inyanga enye babe seLebhanon, iinyanga ezimbini babe sekhaya; yaye uAdoniram wayeyinjengele yabo bakhethiweyo."
1Kings5:15 uSolomon wayenamashumi amathandathu amawaka abachebi nabachebi beenwele ezintabeni;
1Kings5:16 ngaphandle kwabathetheli babalindi bakaSolomon, ababephethe umsebenzi, babengamawaka amathathu anamakhulu amathathu, ababephethe abantu emsebenzini."
1Kings5:17 Ukumkani wawisa umthetho, bezisa amatye amakhulu, amatye anqabileyo, amatye aqingqiweyo okuseka indlu;"
1Kings5:18 Abakhi bakaSolomon nabakhi bakaHiram babadiliza, nabakhi bamatye; balungisa imithi namatye okwakha indlu."
1Kings6:1 Kwathi ngomnyaka wamakhulu amane anamanci asibhozo anababini koonyana bakaSirayeli, baphumayo ezweni laseYiputa, ngomnyaka wesine kaSolomon engukumkani kwaSirayeli, ngenyanga enguSifi, oko kukuthi, inyanga yesibini ukwakha indlu kaYehova."
1Kings6:2 Indlu awayakhela yona uYehova ukumkani uSolomon, ibiziikubhite ezimashumi mathandathu ubude bayo, iziikubhite ezimashumi mabini ububanzi bayo, nokuphakama kwayo kuziikubhite ezimashumi mathathu."
1Kings6:3 Ivaranda, ebiphambi kwebhotwe lendlu, ibiziikubhite ezimashumi mabini, ingangobubanzi bendlu; ububanzi bebuziikubhite ezilishumi phambi kwendlu."
1Kings6:4 Benza iifestile ezibukhali zendlu;
1Kings6:5 Ecaleni kodonga lwendlu wakha amagumbi okuhlangana ngeenxa zonke; wenza namagumbi kuzo zonke iindawo.
1Kings6:6 Igumbi eliphantsi beliziikubhite ezintlanu ububanzi balo; eliphakathi beliziikubhite ezintandathu ububanzi balo; elesithathu laba ziikubhite ezisixhenxe ububanzi balo; ngokuba, ngaphandle kodonga lwendlu, wenza iindonga ezicekethekileyo ezindaweni zonke, ukuze imiqadi ingabotshelelwa ezindongeni zendlu. Indlu."
1Kings6:7 Indlu ekwakhiweni kwayo yakhiwa ngamatye alungisiweyo, ingekaziswa kuyo, ukuze kungavakali sando, nazembe, nasiphi na isixhobo esenziwe ngesinyithi endlwini ekwakhiweni kwayo."
1Kings6:8 Umnyango wegumbi eliphakathi wawukwicala lasekunene lendlu, yaye benyuka ngezinyuko ezijikajikayo ukuya kwigumbi eliphakathi, besuka kweliphakathi besiya kwelesithathu."
1Kings6:9 Wakha ke indlu, wayigqiba; wayakha indlu ngemiqadi neeplanga zemisedare."
1Kings6:10 Emva koko wakha amagumbi kuyo yonke indlu, ukuphakama kweekubhite ezintlanu, yaye phezu kwendlu kwakukho amaplanga omsedare."
1Kings6:11 Lafika ilizwi likaYehova kuSolomon, lisithi:"
1Kings6:12 Ngokusingisele kule ndlu uyakhayo, ukuba nihambe ngokwemiyalelo yam nize niyenze izigwebo zam nize niyigcine yonke imiyalelo yam nihambe ngayo; ke ndiya kulimisa kuwe ilizwi lam, endalithetha kuyihlo uDavide."
1Kings6:13 Ndiya kuhlala phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, ndingabanikeleli umva abantu bam amaSirayeli;"
1Kings6:14 Wayakha ke uSolomon indlu, wayigqiba."
1Kings6:15 Wazakha iindonga zendlu ngaphakathi ngamaplanga omsedare, nomgangatho wendlu kunye neendonga zophahla; wayityabeka ngomthi ngaphakathi, wayityabeka ngemisipres phantsi."
1Kings6:16 Wakha emacaleni endlu iikubhite ezimashumi mabini, emacaleni endlu, ethabathela emgangathweni wesa eludongeni, ngeeplanga zemisedare; kananjalo wayakha ngaphakathi kwendlu engaphakathi, eyingcwele kangcwele."
1Kings6:17 Indlu eyitempile, ebiphambi kwayo ibiziikubhite ezimashumi mane ubude bayo."
1Kings6:18 Yayimisedare kule ndlu ngaphakathi, ihonjiswe ngeentyatyambo neentyantyambo; yayingumsedare yonke; akwabonwa litye."
1Kings6:19 Walungisa igumbi lokuhlanganisana endlwini ngaphakathi endlwini ukuze ibekwe khona ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova.
1Kings6:20 Umnyango ophambili ubuziikubhite ezimashumi mabini, ubude bawo buziikubhite ezimashumi mabini, nokuphakama kwawo kwakuziikubhite ezimashumi mabini; Wasaleka ngegolide ecocekileyo; nesibingelelo eso senziwe ngomsedare."
1Kings6:21 uSolomon wayigubungela indlu ngaphakathi ngegolide ecocekileyo; Wayaleka ngegolide.
1Kings6:22 Wayaleka ngegolide yonke ke indlu, yada yagqitywa yonke indlu; Wasaleka ngegolide yonke isibingelelo endlwini engaphakathi."
1Kings6:23 Wenza iikerubhi zambini ngomthi womnquma ngaphakathi, zaziikubhite ezilishumi ukuphakama kwazo."
1Kings6:24 Elinye iphiko lekerubhi beliziikubhite ezintlanu, nelinye iphiko lekerubhi beliziikubhite ezintlanu; ziziikubhite ezilishumi, zithabathela encamini yelinye iphiko, zise encamini yelinye iphiko."
1Kings6:25 Enye ikerubhi ibiziikubhite ezilishumi; Ubukhulu bufana nobukhulu bezithunywa zezulu zombini.
1Kings6:26 Ukuphakama kwenye ikherubhi bekuziikubhite ezilishumi, yaye enye ikerubhi bekunjalo."
1Kings6:27 Wazibeka iikerubhi endlwini engaphakathi, oluka amaphiko eekerubhi, lada iphiko lenye lafika kolunye udonga, lathi iphiko lenye ikerubhi lafikelela kolunye udonga; aza amaphiko azo afikelelana esazulwini sendlu."
1Kings6:28 Wazaleka iikerubhi ngegolide;
1Kings6:29 Wathi zonke iindonga zendlu ngeenxa zonke wazikrola imifanekiso eqingqiweyo yeekerubhi, namasundu, neentyantyambo ezidubulayo, ngaphakathi nangaphandle."
1Kings6:30 Umgangatho wendlu wawutyabeka ngegolide ngaphakathi nangaphandle.
1Kings6:31 Umnyango wegumbi elingaphakathi wawenzela iingcango ngeminquma;
1Kings6:32 Iingcango zombini bezizezomnquma; Wakrola kuyo imifanekiso yeekerubhi, namasundu, neentyantyambo, wayityabeka ngegolide, wabeka igolide phezu kweekerubhi namasundu."
1Kings6:33 Wenza isahlulo sesine sodonga lomnyango womnyango wendlu ngemigubasi ngeminquma.
1Kings6:34 Iingcango zombini bezizezemisipres;
1Kings6:35 Wakrola iikherubhi nemithi yesundu neentyantyambo ezintshula kuso waza wasigubungela ngegolide efakwe kumfanekiso oqingqiweyo.
1Kings6:36 Wakha intendelezo engaphakathi ngeengcamba ezintathu zamatye aqingqiweyo, nangoluhlu lwemiqadi yemisedare."
1Kings6:37 Ngomnyaka wesine kwasekwa indlu kaYehova, ngenyanga enguSife;"
1Kings6:38 ngomnyaka weshumi elinamnye, ngenyanga enguPoho, eyinyanga yesibhozo leyo, yagqitywa loo ndlu ezintweni zayo zonke, nasezintweni zayo zonke. Wachitha iminyaka esixhenxe eyakha."
1Kings7:1 uSolomon wayakha indlu yakhe iminyaka elishumi elinamithathu, wayigqiba indlu yakhe yonke."
1Kings7:2 Wakha indlu ehlathini laseLebhanon; Yaba ziikubhite ezilikhulu ubude, zaba ziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu ububanzi, neekubhite ezimashumi mathathu ukuphakama, phezu kwemikrozo emine yeentsika zomsedare, ezinemiqadi echweliweyo yemisedare phezu kweentsika ezo."
1Kings7:3 Kwaye yaxhonywa ngomsedare phezu kwemiqadi eyayiphezu kweentsika ezingamashumi amane anantlanu, ishumi elinesihlanu lukroze ngalunye."
1Kings7:4 Kwakukho iifestile kwimiqolo emithathu, yaye ukukhanya kwakujongene nokukhanya ngokwamanqanaba amathathu."
1Kings7:5 Zonke iingcango nemigubasi yayinamacala amane alinganayo, neefestile;"
1Kings7:6 Wenza iivaranda ngeentsika; baba ziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu ubude, baziikubhite ezimashumi mathathu ububanzi bayo; Iveranda yayiphambi kwazo, yaye ezinye iintsika nemiqadi yayiphambi kwazo."
1Kings7:7 Wenza intendelezo yetrone, apho abegweba khona, nevaranda yamatyala; yaye yayifulelwe ngomsedare ukusuka kwelinye icala lomgangatho ukuya kwelinye."
1Kings7:8 Indlu yakhe awayehlala kuyo yayinenye intendelezo phakathi ngasevarandeni, yasetyenzwa kwangokunjalo. uSolomon wayakhela indlu enjalo intombi kaFaro, awayizekayo ukuba ibe ngumkakhe."
1Kings7:9 Zonke ezo zinto bezizezamatye anqabileyo, ngokomlinganiso wamatye aqingqiweyo, asarhiweyo ngeesarha, ngaphakathi nangaphandle, ethabathela esisekweni esa eluphahleni, nangaphandle esa entendelezweni enkulu."
1Kings7:10 Useko lwalungamatye anqabileyo, amatye amakhulu, amatye eekubhite ezilishumi, amatye eekubhite ezisibhozo."
1Kings7:11 Ngaphezulu bekukho amatye anqabileyo ngokwesilinganiso samatye aqingqiweyo nemisedare.
1Kings7:12 Intendelezo enkulu ejikelezileyo yayineengcamba ezintathu zamatye aqingqiweyo, nocamba lwemisedare, yeyantendelezo engaphakathi yendlu kaYehova, neyeevaranda zendlu."
1Kings7:13 Ukumkani uSolomon wathumela ukuba kuthathwe uHiram eTire.
1Kings7:14 Waye engunyana womhlolokazi wesizwe sakwaNafetali, yaye uyise eyindoda yaseTire, esebenza ngobhedu; yaye wayezele bubulumko nengqiqo nokuqonda ukuze enze yonke imisebenzi ngobhedu. Weza kuKumkani uSolomon waza wawenza wonke umsebenzi wakhe."
1Kings7:15 Wenza iintsika zambini zobhedu: yalishumi elinesibhozo iikubhite ukuphakama kwayo, nomtya oziikubhite ezilishumi elinambini ngeenxa zonke inye."
1Kings7:16 Wenza iintloko ezimbini zobhedu zokuhlala phezu kweentsika ezo: ukuphakama kwentloko enye kuziikubhite ezintlanu, ukuphakama kwentloko enye kuziikubhite ezintlanu;"
1Kings7:17 wenze iminatha ngelaphu, nezithsaba, nezithsaba, ezenziwe ngemixokelelwane, zabaphathiswa ababephezu kweentsika; ezisixhenxe kwisahluko esinye, nesixhenxe kwesinye isahluko."
1Kings7:18 Wenza iintsika zambini, zambini ngeenxa zonke emgangathweni; wenjenjalo nakweyesibini intloko."
1Kings7:19 Iminqwazi ebiseentsika ezo, ibingumsebenzi weenyibiba, ngokwevaranda, iziikubhite ezine;"
1Kings7:20 Iintloko zeentsika zombini zazineerharnate phezulu, malunga nesisu esibe selangeni; nezithsaba ezimakhulu mabini, zikroze kukrozo lwentloko enye."
1Kings7:21 Wazimisa iintsika phezu kophahla lwetempile, wayimisa intsika ngasekunene, wathi ukuyibiza yiYakin; wayimisa intsika ngasekhohlo, wabiza uBhohazi."
1Kings7:22 Ngaphezu kweentsika ezo bekukho umsebenzi weenyibiba; wagqitywa ke umsebenzi weentsika.
1Kings7:23 Wenza ulwandle olutyhidiweyo: lwaziikubhite ezilishumi, kwathabathela kwelinye icala kwesa kwelinye; ibingqukuva, ukuphakama kwayo kube ziikubhite ezintlanu; yaye umtya oziikubhite ezimashumi mathathu wawujikelezile ngeenxa zonke."
1Kings7:24 Ngaphantsi komjikelo walo kwakukho amaqhina ajikelezileyo, aziikubhite ezilishumi ubude bawo, alujikelezile ulwandle olo; i-buds yenziwa kwimiqolo emibini ukuba yenziwe."
1Kings7:25 Wema phezu kweenkomo ezilishumi elinambini: ezintathu zibheke entla, ezintathu zibheke entshonalanga, ezintathu zibheke ezantsi, ezintathu zibheke empumalanga; kwaye ulwandle lwaba phezu kwabo, namaxhama abo onke ekukho."
1Kings7:26 Ukuphakama kwalo bebungangobubanzi besandla; udini lwalo belwenziwe lwanjengodini lwendebe, lwaneentyantyambo zeenyibiba; lalinamawaka amabini amalulwane."
1Kings7:27 Wenza izixhaso zalishumi ngobhedu; ubude becala elinye baba ziikubhite ezine, ububanzi baba ziikubhite ezine, nokuphakama kwayo kwakuziikubhite ezintathu."
1Kings7:28 Isihlalo sasinje: Zazinezibopho, nemithambo phakathi kwemiphetho."
1Kings7:29 Yaye kwiingcango ezisesazulwini samacala kwakukho iingonyama, iinkunzi zeenkomo neekherubhi, yaye phezu kwezi ngongoma kwakukho intsika, yaye ngaphantsi kweengonyama neenkomo kwakukho izimvu, ezibhityileyo."
1Kings7:30 Inqaba nganye yayinemilenze emine yobhedu neepleyiti zobhedu, neekona zayo zone zinezakhiwo; ngaphantsi komhadi kwakukho uphahla ngapha nangapha."
1Kings7:31 Umlomo wayo wawuyikubhite enye entloko nangaphezulu; emlonyeni wawo kwakukho imifanekiso eqingqiweyo, emacaleni awo, ububanzi, ingengqukuva."
1Kings7:32 Phantsi kweentambo beziziivili ezine; izibonda zeevili ezo zahlangana nesiseko, ukuphakama kwevili bekuyikubhite enye enesiqingatha."
1Kings7:33 Ukwenziwa kweevili bekunjengokwenziwa kweevili zeenqwelo zonke;
1Kings7:34 Kwakukho izixhaso ezine ezimbombeni zone zesiseko esinye, yaye iziseko zaziziziseko."
1Kings7:35 Ngaphezu kwesiseko esijikelezileyo kwakukho isangqa esisisiqingatha sekubhite ukuphakama kwayo;
1Kings7:36 Emacwecweni ayo neziphelo zayo wayebhale iikerubhi, iingonyama namasundu, ngokomlinganiso wayo, nezidanga ngeenxa zonke."
1Kings7:37 Wenza izihlalo zalishumi;
1Kings7:38 Wenza izitya zokutshiza zobhedu zalishumi: isitya esinye sasiziikubhite ezimashumi mane, isitya ngasinye sasiziikubhite ezine, isitya esinye phezu kweentsika ezilishumi."
1Kings7:39 Wabeka izixhaso zantlanu ngasekunene kwendlu, zantlanu ngecala lasekhohlo layo indlu; walubeka ulwandle ngasekunene kwendlu, ngecala lasempumalanga, ngecala lasezantsi."
1Kings7:40 uHuram wenza izitya zokuhlambela, nemihlakulwana, nezitya zokutshiza. Wawugqiba ke uHiram wonke umsebenzi abewenzela ukumkani uSolomon, wendlu kaYehova:"
1Kings7:41 iintsika zombini, neembumba ezimbini zentloko, ezibe zeentsika zombini; naentsontelo zombini, ezo zitsala iimbumba ezimbini zeentloko zeentsika ezo;"
1Kings7:42 namakhulu amane eenwele zeentsontelo ezimbini, imikrozo emibini yentambo emtya mnye yokuzunguleza iimbumba ezimbini zentloko, ezibe zisezintsikeni zombini;"
1Kings7:43 neenqwelo zokuhlambela ezilishumi, nezitya zokuhlambela ezilishumi eenqwelo zokuhlambela;"
1Kings7:44 nolwandle olunye, neenkomo ezilishumi elinambini ngaphantsi kolwandle olo;"
1Kings7:45 Iimbiza nemihlakulwana nezitya zonke ezi zixhobo uHuram awazenzela ukumkani uSolomon zendlu kaYehova zazizezobhedu olukhazimlisiweyo.
1Kings7:46 uYehova wazigalela entlango yaseYordan, emhlabeni wodongwe phakathi kweSukoti neSartan."
1Kings7:47 Waziyeka uSolomon zonke izitya zingalinganiswanga, ngokuba bezizininzi kakhulu; kwaye ubunzima bomthengi abukamiselwa."
1Kings7:48 uSolomon wazenza zonke iimpahla zendlu kaYehova, nesibingelelo segolide, netafile yegolide ebezikuyo izonka zokubonisa;"
1Kings7:49 neziphatho zezibane zegolide ecocekileyo: zazihlanu ngasekunene, zazihlanu ngasekhohlo, phambi kwendlu engaphakathi, neentyantyambo, nezibane, namalaphu egolide;"
1Kings7:50 nezitya, nezitya zokutshiza, neenkamba, neengcedevu zegolide ecocekileyo; nemigubasi yendlu engaphakathi yegolide, yengcwele kangcwele, neengcango zendlu leyo eyeyotempile."
1Kings7:51 Wagqitywa ke wonke umsebenzi awawenzela indlu kaYehova uKumkani uSolomon. uSolomon wayizisa imibingelelo, abeyingcwalisile uDavide uyise; nesilivere, negolide, nempahla, wazibeka phantsi kobuncwane bendlu kaYehova."
1Kings8:1 Waza uSolomon wawabizela kuye amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, neentloko zonke zezindlu zooyise, iintloko zezindlu zoonyana bakaSirayeli, kukumkani uSolomon eYerusalem, ukuba ayithabathe kuwo umzi ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova kaDavide, waseZiyon."
1Kings8:2 Abuthelana kukumkani uSolomon onke amadoda akwaSirayeli emthendelekweni wenyanga enguEtanim: yinyanga yesixhenxe ke leyo.
1Kings8:3 Eza ke onke amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, bayithwala ababingeleli ityeya leyo."
1Kings8:4 Benyuka nayo ityeya kaYehova, nentente yokuhlangana, neempahla zonke zengcwele, ezibe zisententeni, babanyusa ababingeleli nabaLevi."
1Kings8:5 uKumkani uSolomon nebandla lonke lamaSirayeli elalihlanganiselwe kuye phambi kweTyeya, babingelela ngezimvu neenkomo ezingenakulinganiswa okanye zibalwe ngenxa yesihlwele esikhulu."
1Kings8:6 Bayizisa ababingeleli ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova endaweni yayo, endlwini engaphakathi endlwini, kwiNgcwele kaNgcwele, phantsi kwamaphiko eekherubhi."
1Kings8:7 Ngokuba iikerubhi zaye ziwolule amaphiko azo phezu kwendawo yetyeya, iikerubhi zayisithelisa ityeya nezibonda zayo ngaphezulu."
1Kings8:8 Wazithula ke imithwalo, azabonakala izikali endaweni engcwele phambi kwendlu, zingabonakali ngaphandle; zisekho unanamhla."
1Kings8:9 Kwakungekho nto etyeyeni ngaphandle kwamacwecwe amabini awayewabeke apho uMoses eHorebhe, xa uYehova wenza umnqophiso noonyana bakaSirayeli ekuphumeni kwabo ezweni laseYiputa."
1Kings8:10 Kwathi, ekuphumeni kwababingeleli engcweleni, lasuka ilifu layizalisa indlu kaYehova;"
1Kings8:11 ababingeleli ababa nakuma balungiselele ngenxa yelifu, ngokuba ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova bazala endlwini kaYehova."
1Kings8:12 Wathi uSolomon, uYehova wathi, niya kuhlala ebumnyameni."
1Kings8:13 Mna ke ndikwakhele indlu apho uya kuhlala khona, indawo eqinileyo oya kuhlala kuyo ngonaphakade."
1Kings8:14 Wee guququ ukumkani walisikelela lonke ibandla lakwaSirayeli, laza lonke ibandla lakwaSirayeli lema."
1Kings8:15 Wathi, Makabongwe uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, owathethayo ngomlomo wakhe kuDavide ubawo, wakuzalisa ngesandla sakhe, esithi,"
1Kings8:16 Kususela kwimini yokubakhupha kwam abantu bam amaSirayeli eYiputa, andinyulanga mzi ezizweni zonke zakwaSirayeli wokwakha indlu, yokuba libe khona igama lam; ke mna ndinyule uDavide ukuba abe yinganga yabantu bam amaSirayeli."
1Kings8:17 Kwaye kukho entliziyweni kaDavide ubawo ukuthi alakhele indlu igama likaYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli."
1Kings8:18 Wathi uYehova kuDavide ubawo, Ukuba bekusentliziyweni yakho ukuthi ulakhele indlu igama lam, walungisa ngokwentliziyo yakho;"
1Kings8:19 Ke wena akuwenzi umzi; kodwa unyana wakho uya kuphuma esinqeni sakho, yena uya kulakhela indlu igama lam."
1Kings8:20 Yaye uYehova walizalisekisa ilizwi lakhe awalithethayo, yaye ndema egumbini likabawo uDavide ndaza ndahlala etroneni yakwaSirayeli, kanye njengoko uYehova wayethethile, ndaza ndalakhela indlu igama likaYehova uThixo kwaSirayeli."
1Kings8:21 Ndayilungisa ityeya apho kwakukho umnqophiso kaYehova awawenzayo nookhokho bethu ekubakhupheni kwakhe ezweni laseYiputa.
1Kings8:22 Wema ke uSolomon phambi kwesibingelelo sikaYehova phambi kwebandla lonke lakwaSirayeli, wazolulela ezulwini izandla zakhe."
1Kings8:23 Wathi, Yehova, Thixo kaSirayeli, akukho Thixo unjengawe emazulwini nasehlabathini, ubagcinelayo umnqophiso nenceba abakhonzi bakho, abahamba phambi kwakho ngentliziyo yabo yonke;"
1Kings8:24 owamthembisayo umkhonzi wakho uDavide, ubawo, oko wakuthethayo kuye; uthethe ngomlomo wakho, wakwenza ngesandla sakho njengoko kunjalo namhla."
1Kings8:25 Ngako oko uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, umqinisele umkhonzi wakho uDavide ubawo oko wakuthethayo kuye, wathi, Emehlweni am akuyi kufunwa mntu, uhleli etroneni yakwaSirayeli; ukuze oonyana bakho bayigcine indlela yabo, bahambe phambi kwam, njengoko wahamba ngako wena phambi kwam."
1Kings8:26 Kaloku, Thixo kaSirayeli, malinyaniseke ilizwi lakho, owalixelela umkhonzi wakho uDavide ubawo."
1Kings8:27 Kodwa ngaba ngokwenene uThixo uya kuhlala emhlabeni? Yabonani, amazulu, nezulu lawo amazulu, alilingani; Ingakanani le ndlu ndiyakhileyo?"
1Kings8:28 Khawuphulaphule umthandazo womkhonzi wakho nesicelo sakhe, Yehova Thixo wam, ukuphulaphule isikhalo nomthandazo athandaza ngawo umkhonzi wakho phambi kwakho namhlanje;"
1Kings8:29 ukuze amehlo akho avuleke le ndlu imini nobusuku, nendawo owathi ngayo, ‘Igama lam liya kuba lapho, ukuze niwuphulaphule umthandazo womkhonzi wakho wokwenza kule ndawo."
1Kings8:30 Phulaphula umthandazo womkhonzi wakho, nowoonyana bakho amaSirayeli, abaya kuthandaza ngako kule ndawo; yivani, nina basemazulwini, esakhiweni senu; xa uthe weva, xolela;"
1Kings8:31 Xa athe umntu woniwa ngummelwane wakhe, wamfungela, kwaza kwafika isifungo phambi kwesibingelelo sakho kule ndlu;"
1Kings8:32 Khawuve ke emazulwini, wenze, ugwebe kubakhonzi bakho, umgwebe ongendawo, uyibeke indlela yakhe entlokweni yakhe; Ilungisa limnike ngokobulungisa bakhe."
1Kings8:33 Xa abantu bakho amaSirayeli boyiswa lutshaba, kuba bekonile, babuya beza kuwe, bathandaza, bathandaza kuwe kule ndlu;"
1Kings8:34 Ke kaloku yiva usemazulwini, usixolele isono sabantu bakho amaSirayeli, ubabuyisele kwilizwe owalinika ookhokho babo."
1Kings8:35 Ukuba livalekile izulu, akwabakho mvula, ngokuba bakonile; xa bethandaza kule ndawo kwaye babiza igama lakho kwaye baguquke kwisono sabo ukuba uyabacinezela;"
1Kings8:36 Ke kaloku yiva usemazulwini, usixolele isono sabakhonzi bakho nesabantu bakho amaSirayeli, ukuze ubafundise indlela elungileyo abafanele bahambe ngayo, nokunisa imvula ezweni lakho olinike abantu bakho njengelifa."
1Kings8:37 “Ukuba kuthe kwakho indlala elizweni, xa kuthe kwakho indyikitya yokufa, izikhukula, iinkumbi, iinkumbi; Xa iintshaba zabo zabangqinga elizweni lemizi yabo; nasiphi na isifo, nokuba siyintoni na;"
1Kings8:38 Umthandazo nawo nawuphi na umthandazo othe wacelwa nguye nabani na okanye ngabantu bakho bonke amaSirayeli, bayakwazi ngamnye ukufa kwentliziyo yakhe baze bazolulele izandla zabo kule ndlu;"
1Kings8:39 Yiva ke ngoko wena emazulwini, apho uhlala khona, uxolele; ngokuba nguwe wedwa ozaziyo iintliziyo zoonyana babantu;"
1Kings8:40 ukuze bakoyike yonke imihla yobomi babo, emhlabeni owawunika oobawo."
1Kings8:41 Ke yena owasemzini, ongengowesizwe sakowenu, osuka kwilizwe elikude ngenxa yegama lakho;"
1Kings8:42 Kuba baya kuliva igama lakho elikhulu, nesandla sakho esithe nkqi, nengalo yakho ethe tye, ukuba uthe weza wathandaza ekule ndlu;"
1Kings8:43 Yiva xa usemazulwini, kwindawo ohlala kuyo, wenze ngokuvumelana nako konke okubiza ngako iintlanga, ukuze zonke iintlanga zomhlaba zilazi igama lakho, mazikoyike, kanye njengomphefumlo wakho abantu bakwaSirayeli; bazi ukuba igama lakho libizwe phezu kwale ndlu ndiyakhileyo."
1Kings8:44 Xa abantu bakho bathe bazihlasela iintshaba zabo, apho ubathumela khona, bathandaza kuYehova bebhekisa kulo mzi uwunyulileyo, nakule ndlu ndiyakhele igama lakho;"
1Kings8:45 Yiva usemazulwini umthandazo wabo nokutarhuzisa kwabo, ubamele esikhundleni sabo."
1Kings8:46 Ukuba bathe bakona kuwe (ngenxa yokuba kungekho bani ungoniyo) uze ube nomsindo kubo uze ubanikele ezandleni zeentshaba, zaza zabathimbela kwilizwe lotshaba; kude okanye kufutshane;"
1Kings8:47 Kodwa ukuba bacinga ngelizwe ababethinjelwe kulo, baguquka baze babongoze kuwe ngokunyanisekileyo elizweni labo bathinjwa, besithi: “Sonile senza ububi, senze ububi ububi;"
1Kings8:48 abuyela kuwe ngentliziyo yawo yonke, nangomphefumlo wawo wonke, esezweni leentshaba zawo ezaziwathimbile, athandaza kuwe, ebhekisa ezweni lawo owalinika ooyise, umzi owawunyulayo, nendlu endiyakhele igama lakho;"
1Kings8:49 Yiva umthandazo wabo nokutarhuzisa kwabo usemazulwini, ekuhlaleni kwakho, ubamele ngenxa yabo."
1Kings8:50 Baxolele abantu bakho abonileyo kuwe, nezikreqo zabo zonke abakona ngazo kuwe, ube nemfesane kubo phambi kwababathimbileyo, ukuze babe nosizi ngabo."
1Kings8:51 Ngokuba ngabantu bakho, nelifa lakho, owabakhuphayo eYiputa ezikweni lesinyithi;"
1Kings8:52 ukuze amehlo akho akhangele emthandazweni womkhonzi wakho nomthandazo wabantu bakho amaSirayeli, ukuze ubaphulaphule kuyo yonk’ into abaya kubhenela kuyo kuwe."
1Kings8:53 Ngenxa enokuba wabanyula ezizweni zonke zehlabathi, ukuba babe lilifa lakho, njengoko wathethayo ngoMoses umkhonzi wakho, ekubakhupheni kwakho oobawo eYiputa, Nkosi Yehova."
1Kings8:54 Akugqiba uSolomon ukwenza wonke lo mthandazo nezibongozo kuYehova, wema phambi kwesibingelelo sikaYehova, eguqe ngamadolo nezandla zakhe ezolulele ezulwini."
1Kings8:55 Wesuka wema, walisikelela lonke ibandla lakwaSirayeli ngelizwi elikhulu, wathi:"
1Kings8:56 Makabongwe uYehova, obaphumzayo abantu bakhe amaSirayeli ngako konke wakuthethayo; akwasala nalinye ilizwi kuwo onke amazwi akhe alungileyo, awawathethayo ngoMoses umkhonzi wakhe."
1Kings8:57 uYehova uThixo wethu makabe nathi, njengokuba wayenoobawo bethu; makangasishiyi, makangasishiyi;"
1Kings8:58 ukuze ayithobele kuye intliziyo yethu ukuba sihambe ngeendlela zakhe zonke, sigcine imiyalelo yakhe, nemithetho yakhe, nezigwebo zakhe, awabawisela umthetho ngazo oobawo."
1Kings8:59 La mazwi am ndiwathandazayo phambi koYehova ngamana abe kufuphi noYehova uThixo wethu imini nobusuku ukuze ayixhase imeko yomkhonzi wakhe nemeko yabantu bakhe amaSirayeli ngamaxesha onke, njengoko kuyimfuneko;"
1Kings8:60 ukuze bonke abantu behlabathi bazi ukuba uYehova unguThixo, akukho wumbi."
1Kings8:61 Ke kaloku mazigqibelele iintliziyo zenu kuYehova uThixo wethu, ukuba nihambe ngemithetho yakhe emisiweyo, niyigcine imithetho yakhe, njengoko namhla kunjalo."
1Kings8:62 uYehova namaSirayeli onke bazisa umnikelo phambi koYehova.
1Kings8:63 uSolomon wabingelela umbulelo kuYehova, wawuzisa kuYehova: iinkomo ezingamashumi amabini anesibini amawaka, nekhulu elinamanci amabini lamawaka empalula emfutshane. Waphuma ke ukumkani noonyana bonke bakaSirayeli endlwini kaYehova."
1Kings8:64 Ngaloo mini ukumkani wawungcwalisa umphakathi wentendelezo phambi kwendlu kaYehova; kuba kulapho wazisa khona iminikelo etshiswayo nemibingelelo etshiswayo namanqatha emibingelelo yombulelo, ngenxa yokuba isibingelelo sobhedu esasiphambi koYehova sasincinane kakhulu ukuba singawamkela umnikelo otshiswayo nomnikelo otshiswayo namanqatha imibingelelo yoxolo."
1Kings8:65 Ngelo xesha uSolomon wenza itheko nawo onke amaSirayeli ekunye naye, ibandla elikhulu, ukususela ekungeneni kweHamati ukusa kuMlambo waseYiputa, phambi koYehova uThixo wethu, iintsuku ezisixhenxe neentsuku ezisixhenxe, iintsuku ezilishumi elinesine."
1Kings8:66 Ngosuku lwesibhozo wathi ebantwini mabahambe, baza bambonga ukumkani baza baya ezintenteni zabo bevuya yaye ezintliziyweni zabo benemihlali ngenxa yokulunga konke uYehova awakwenzayo kuDavide umkhonzi wakhe nakubantu bakhe amaSirayeli."
1Kings9:1 Wagqiba uSolomon ukuyakha indlu kaYehova, nendlu yokumkani, nomnqweno wonke kaSolomon, abefuna ukukwenza."
1Kings9:2 uYehova wabonakala kuSolomon okwesibini, njengoko wayebonakele kuye eGibheyon."
1Kings9:3 Wathi uYehova kuye, Ndikuvile ukuthandaza kwakho nokutarhuzisa kwakho okwenzileyo phambi kwam; aya kuhlala elapho amehlo am nentliziyo yam."
1Kings9:4 Ukuba uthe wahamba nam, njengoko wahamba ngako uDavide uyihlo, ngentliziyo ethe tye, nangobulungisa, ukwenze konke endikuwisele umthetho ngako, uyigcine imithetho yam nemimiselo yam;"
1Kings9:5 Ke kaloku ndiya kuyiqinisa itrone yobukumkani bakho phezu koSirayeli ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo, kanye njengoko ndathembisa uyihlo uDavide ndisithi, ‘Akuyi kunqunyukelwa ndoda etroneni yakwaSirayeli."
1Kings9:6 Ke ukuba nithe nabuya kum, nina, noonyana benu, nemithetho yam, nemiyalelo yam, endiyibeke phambi kwenu, anayenza, anakhonza thixo bambi, nabanqula;"
1Kings9:7 Ndiza kumtshabalalisa uSirayeli emhlabeni endimnike wona; nale ndlu ndiyingcwalisayo ngenxa yegama lam, ndoyilahla, imke ebusweni bam; uSirayeli uya kuba yintsomi ezintlangeni zonke."
1Kings9:8 Kule ndlu ephakamileyo, bonke abadlulayo kuyo bomangaliswa, bavuthele umlozi; yaye ngokuqinisekileyo baya kuthi: ‘Kwakutheni ukuze uYehova enze eli hlabathi nale ndlu ngolu hlobo?"
1Kings9:9 Baphendule bathi, Kungenxa yokuba batyekayo kuYehova uThixo wabo, owabakhuphayo ooyise ezweni laseYiputa, bathabatha oothixo bolunye uhlanga, babanqula, babakhonza; uYehova wabahlisela yonke le ntlekele."
1Kings9:10 Ekupheleni kweminyaka emashumi mabini, uSolomon wayakha izindlu ezimbini indlu kaYehova nendlu yokumkani;"
1Kings9:11 Ke uHiram, ukumkani waseTire, wanika uSolomon imisedare nemisipres, nemisipres, negolide, ngangokuthanda kwakhe konke; ngoko ukumkani uSolomon wamnika uHiram izixeko ezimashumi mabini ezweni laseGalili."
1Kings9:12 Wemka ke uHiram eTire, waya kubona imizi abemnike yona uSolomon; kwaye abamkholisanga."
1Kings9:13 Wathi, Yimizi mini na le undinikileyo, mzalwana wam? Wathi lilizwe laseKabhuli unanamhla."
1Kings9:14 uHiram wathumela kukumkani iitalente zegolide ezimashumi mathandathu.
1Kings9:15 Siso esi isizathu sokunyula irhafu, awayisusayo uSolomon; ukuba akhe indlu kaYehova, nendlu yakhe, neMilo, nodonga lweYerusalem, neHatsore, neMegido, neGezere."
1Kings9:16 Wenyuka uFaro ukumkani waseYiputa, wayithabatha iGezere, wayitshisa ngomlilo, wawabulala amaKanan abehleli kuloo mzi, wayinika intombi yakhe, umkaSolomon, yaba sisipho."
1Kings9:17 uSolomon wakha iGezere, neBhete-horon ezantsi;"
1Kings9:18 neBhahalati, neTademore entlango, ezweni;"
1Kings9:19 nemizi yonke engoovimba uSolomon abenayo, nemizi yeenqwelo zakhe, nemizi yamahashe akhe, awayefuna ukuyakha uSolomon eYerusalem naseLebhanon, nasezweni lonke lolawulo lwakhe;"
1Kings9:20 nabo bonke abaseleyo bama-Amori, namaHeti, namaPerizi, namaHeti, namaYebhusi, abengengawo oonyana bakaSirayeli;"
1Kings9:21 Oonyana babo abasala emva kwabo elizweni, abo oonyana bakaSirayeli babengabaqalekisanga nokubaqalekisa, uSolomon wabamisela irhafu yenkonzo de kube namhla."
1Kings9:22 Kodwa uSolomon akazange akhonze namnye woonyana bakaSirayeli, kodwa baba ngamadoda alwayo nabakhonzi bakhe neenkosana zakhe nabaphathi bakhe nabaphathi beenqwelo zakhe nabangamadoda ahlala amahashe."
1Kings9:23 Aba yayiziintloko zezigidimi, ababephethe umsebenzi kaSolomon, babengamakhulu amahlanu anamanci mahlanu, ababephethe abantu abenza umsebenzi."
1Kings9:24 Yenyuka ke intombi kaFaro, iphuma kwisiXeko sikaDavide, yaya endlwini yayo awayakhela yona uSolomon; emva koko wakha iMilo."
1Kings9:25 uSolomon wayenikela imibingelelo etshiswayo neyombulelo izihlandlo ezithathu ngonyaka esibingelelweni awayesakhele uYehova, yaye wenza ukuba kutshiswe nesiqhumiso esiphambi koYehova. Wayigqiba ke indlu."
1Kings9:26 Ukumkani uSolomon wakha izinqanawa e-Esion-gebhere, engase-Eloti, elunxwemeni loLwandle oluBomvu, ezweni lakwaEdom."
1Kings9:27 uHiram wathuma abakhonzi bakhe, oomatiloshe abalwazi ulwandle, nabakhonzi bakaSolomon enqanaweni."
1Kings9:28 Bafika eOfire, bathabatha khona igolide, amakhulu amane anamanci mabini eetalente, bazisa kukumkani uSolomon."
1Kings10:1 Xa ukumkanikazi waseShebha weva ibali likaSolomon eliphathelele igama likaYehova, weza kumvavanya ngemibuzo enzima."
1Kings10:2 Wafika eYerusalem enesihlwele esikhulu kunene, esineenkamela ezithwele ubulawu, negolide eninzi, namatye anqabileyo; ekufikeni kwakhe kuSolomon wathetha naye ngayo yonke into eyayisentliziyweni yakhe."
1Kings10:3 uSolomon wamana emxelela yonke imibuzo yakhe;
1Kings10:4 Wabubona ukumkanikazi waseShebha bonke ubulumko bukaSolomon, nendlu awayakhayo,"
1Kings10:5 nokudla kwetafile yakhe, nezihlalo zabakhonzi bakhe, nenkonzo yabakhonzi bakhe, nezambatho zabo, nabangcamli bakhe, nezinyuko zakhe abe enyuka ngazo ukuya endlwini kaYehova; akwaba sabakho kuphefumla kuye."
1Kings10:6 Wathi kukumkani, Lilizwi eliyinyaniso, endilivileyo ezweni lam, ngezenzo zakho nobulumko bakho."
1Kings10:7 Andikholwanga kuloo mazwi, ndada ndeza, abona amehlo am; uyabona, andixelelwanga nesiqingatha esi. Ubulumko bakho nempumelelo yakho ilugqithile udaba endiluvileyo."
1Kings10:8 Anoyolo amadoda akho, banoyolo aba bakhonzi bakho bemiyo ecaleni kwakho ngamaxesha onke, bebuva ubulumko bakho."
1Kings10:9 Makabongwe uYehova uThixo wakho, okunyulileyo ukuba akubeke etroneni yakwaSirayeli, ngenxa yokuba uYehova emthanda uSirayeli kude kuse ephakadeni, ngenxa yoko wamenza ukumkani ukuba enze okusesikweni nobulungisa."
1Kings10:10 Ukumkani wanika ukumkani ikhulu elinamanci amabini eetalente zegolide, nasebulawini into eninzi, namatye anqabileyo; akwaba sabakho bulawu bunjengabo, ukumkanikazi waseShebha wabunika ukumkani uSolomon."
1Kings10:11 Iinqanawa zikaHiram ezazithwele igolide evela kwaOfire zeza nemithi yomamangile eninzi namatye axabisekileyo evela kwaOfire.
1Kings10:12 Ukumkani wazenza ngemialmondi iintsika zendlu kaYehova, nezendlu yokumkani, neehadi, nemirhubhe yeemvumi;"
1Kings10:13 Ukumkani uSolomon wanika ukumkanikazi waseShebha konke awayekunqwenela, awayekucelile; Wajika waya ezweni lakhe, yena nabakhonzi bakhe."
1Kings10:14 Ubunzima begolide awazuzayo uSolomon ngomnyaka, baba ngamakhulu omathandathu anamanci mathandathu anesithandathu eetalente zegolide."
1Kings10:15 Ngaphezu koko, wayenabarhwebi, nabarhwebi beziqholo, nookumkani bonke baseArabhi, neerhuluneli zelizwe."
1Kings10:16 Ukumkani uSolomon wenza amakhulu amabini eeshekele zegolide ekhandiweyo;
1Kings10:17 Wenza amakhulu amathathu amakhaka egolide ekhandiweyo; Lanye ikhaka legolide elibunzima buziikhilogram ezintathu, waza ukumkani walibeka endlwini yehlathi laseLebhanon."
1Kings10:18 Ngaphezu koko, ukumkani wenza itrone enkulu yophondo lwendlovu waza wayaleka ngegolide esulungekileyo."
1Kings10:19 Itrone leyo ibinezinyuko ezithandathu; itrone leyo ibinomphezulu oyinqila ngasemva, kukho izixhaso kumacala omabini esihlalo eso, kumi iingonyama ezimbini ngasezixhasweni."
1Kings10:20 Kwakukho iingonyama ezilishumi elinambini khona ezinyukweni ezithandathu, ngapha nangapha;"
1Kings10:21 Zonke iimpahla zokumkani uSolomon zabe zezegolide, nempahla yonke yendlu yehlathi laseLebhanon yabe iyeyegolide ecikizekileyo; kwakungekho nto yesilivere; kwakungekho nto yayifundwa ngexesha likaSolomon."
1Kings10:22 Ngokuba ukumkani ubeneenqanawa zaseTarshishe elwandle, kananjalo nezikaHiram; zeza kanye ngeminyaka emithathu iinqanawa ezo zaseTarshishe, zizise igolide, nesilivere, neempondo zeendlovu, neenkawu, neepikoko."
1Kings10:23 Ngoko uKumkani uSolomon wabagqwesa bonke ookumkani behlabathi ngobutyebi nangobulumko.
1Kings10:24 Lonke ihlabathi lafuna ukuva uSolomon ubulumko bakhe, awayebunike entliziyweni yakhe uThixo."
1Kings10:25 Elowo wazisa isipho sakhe: iimpahla zesilivere, neempahla zegolide, neempahla, nezixhobo, nobulawu, namahashe, noondlebende, iminyaka ngeminyaka."
1Kings10:26 uSolomon wahlanganisa iinqwelo zokulwa namahashe akhwelwayo, waba newaka elinamakhulu amane eenqwelo zokulwa, namawaka alishumi elinamabini amahashe akhwelwayo;"
1Kings10:27 uYehova wayenza isilivere yanjengamatye eYerusalem, nemisedare wayenza yanjengemithombe esezihlanjeni, ukuba mininzi."
1Kings10:28 uSolomon ubenamahashe aseYiputa, nelinen emhlophe; Abarhwebi bokumkani bamkela ilinen emhlophe ngexabiso."
1Kings10:29 Yenyuka inqwelo yokulwa, yaphuma eYiputa, ingamakhulu omathandathu eeshekele zesilivere, nehashe ngekhulu elinamanci mahlanu; bazinika bonke ookumkani bamaHeti, nookumkani bama-Aram."
1Kings11:1 Ukumkani uSolomon wayethanda abafazi abaninzi bezinye iintlanga, nentombi kaFaro, namaMowabhikazi, nama-Amon, namaEdom, namaTsidon, namaHeti;"
1Kings11:2 bephakathi kweentlanga, abethe uYehova koonyana bakaSirayeli, Ize ningangeni kuzo, nazo zingangeni kuni;"
1Kings11:3 Waba nabafazi abangamakhulu asixhenxe, amakhosazana, nezithende ezingamakhulu amathathu; abafazi bakhe bayityekisa intliziyo yakhe."
1Kings11:4 Ke kaloku kwathi, ngexesha lobudala bukaSolomon, abafazi bakhe bayityekisa intliziyo yakhe ekulandeleni thixo bambi; yaye intliziyo yakhe yayingamlungelanga uYehova uThixo wakhe njengentliziyo kaDavide uyise."
1Kings11:5 uSolomon walandela uAshtoreti, uthixokazi wamaTsidon, noMilkom, isikizi loonyana baka-Amon."
1Kings11:6 uSolomon wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, akamlandela uYehova ngokupheleleyo njengoDavide uyise."
1Kings11:7 uSolomon wamakhela uKemoshe, izothe lakwaMowabhi, entabeni ekufuphi neYerusalem, noMologi, izothe loonyana baka-Amon, isiganga."
1Kings11:8 Wenjenjalo ke nakubo bonke abafazi bakhe bezinye iintlanga, ababeqhumisela bebingelela koothixo babo."
1Kings11:9 uYehova ke waba nomsindo kuSolomon, ngokuba ibityekile intliziyo yakhe, yemka kuYehova uThixo kaSirayeli, owayezityhile kuye izihlandlo ezibini;"
1Kings11:10 Wamwisela umthetho ngalo mbandela, ukuba angalandeli thixo bambi, angenzi oko uYehova abemwisele umthetho ngako."
1Kings11:11 Wathi ke uYehova kuSolomon, Ekubeni wenze le nto, akwawugcina umnqophiso wam, nemiyalelo yam endakuwiselayo, okwenene, ndiya kubukrazula ubukumkani kuwe, ndibunike umkhonzi wakho."
1Kings11:12 Ke andiyi kukwenza oko ngemihla yakho, ngenxa kaDavide uyihlo; kodwa ndiya kubukrazula esandleni sonyana wakho."
1Kings11:13 Andiyi kubukrazula bonke ubukumkani; unyana wakho ndimnike isizwe esinye ngenxa kaDavide umkhonzi wam, nangenxa yeYerusalem endiyinyulileyo."
1Kings11:14 uYehova wamvelisela uSolomon utshaba, uHadadi umEdom; wayengowoonyana bokumkani wakwaEdom."
1Kings11:15 Kwathi, oko uDavide ebekwaEdom, wenyuka uYowabhi, umthetheli-mkhosi, waya kungcwaba ababuleweyo, wawabulala onke amadoda akwaEdom."
1Kings11:16 Wahlala apho uYowabhi nawo onke amaSirayeli iinyanga zantandathu, wada wayitshabalalisa yonke into eyindoda yakwaEdom."
1Kings11:17 Wabaleka uHadade, enamaEdom kayise, baya eYiputa; Ke uHadade ebengumntwana omncinane."
1Kings11:18 Banduluka kwaMidiyan, beza eParan; owamnika indlu, wamnika ukudla, wamnika namasimi."
1Kings11:19 uHadade wababalwa kakhulu emehlweni kaFaro, kangangokuba wamnika udade bomkakhe, udade boTahepenesi, ukumkanikazi, ukuba abe ngumkakhe."
1Kings11:20 Umsakwabo boTahepenese wamzalela unyana wakhe, uGenubhati, lowo uTahepenase wamanyisa endlwini kaFaro; uGenubhati wahlala endlwini kaFaro phakathi koonyana bakaFaro."
1Kings11:21 Weva uHadade eseYiputa, ukuba uDavide ulele kooyise, ufile noYowabhi umthetheli-mkhosi; wathi uHadade kuFaro, Ndindulule ndiye ezweni lakowethu."
1Kings11:22 Wathi uFaro kuye, Undikhathalele ngantoni na, ukuba uya kubuyela ezweni lakowenu? Waphendula ke yena wathi, Akukho nto; nangona kunjalo, ndivumele ndihambe nokuba kukweliphi na icala."
1Kings11:23 uThixo wamvelisela omnye umchasi onguReson, unyana kaEliyada, owabalekayo phambi koHadadezere, ukumkani waseTsobha, ukumkani wakhe."
1Kings11:24 Wabizela kuye amadoda, waba yingqwayi-ngqwayi yamadoda omkhosi, ekuxabeleni kukaDavide iSobha; baya eDamasko, bahlala khona, bayilawula eDamasko."
1Kings11:25 Waba lutshaba lukaSirayeli yonke imihla kaSolomon, ngaphandle nje kobubi awabenzayo uHadadi; Wawathiya amaSirayeli, wayelawula kwa-Aram."
1Kings11:26 uYerobhoham unyana kaNebhati, umEfrate waseSereda, umkhonzi kaSolomon, ogama likanina lalinguTseruya umhlolokazi, yaye wasiphakamisa isandla sakhe nxamnye nokumkani."
1Kings11:27 Nasi isizathu sokuba amphakamisele isandla ukumkani: uSolomon wayesakha iMilo waza walungisa nemijelo yesiXeko sikaDavide uyise.
1Kings11:28 Ke loo ndoda inguYarobheham ibiligorha; yaye xa uSolomon wabonayo ukuba umfana lowo wayesebenza nzima, wammisela ukuba abe ngumphathi wayo yonke inkonzo yendlu kaYosefu."
1Kings11:29 Ngelo xesha uYerobhoham waphuma eYerusalem, wadibana nomprofeti uAhiya Moshilo endleleni; wambatha ingubo entsha; baye bobabini bebodwa ezweni."
1Kings11:30 uAkija wayithabatha loo ngubo intsha abeyinxibile, wayikrazula yaziziqwenga ezilishumi elinazibini."
1Kings11:31 Wathi kuYarobheham, Zithabathele iziqwenga zibe lishumi; ngokuba utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Yabona, ndiya kubukrazula ubukumkani esandleni sikaSolomon, ndibunike izizukulwana ezilishumi;"
1Kings11:32 Kodwa wena uya kuba nesizwe esinye ngenxa kaDavide umkhonzi wam nangenxa yeYerusalem, isixeko endisinyulileyo ezizweni zonke zakwaSirayeli."
1Kings11:33 Ndibukrazula ngenxa enokuba bendishiyile mna, baqubuda kuAshtoreti, uthixo wamaMowabhi, nakuMilikom, uthixo woonyana baka-Amon; àbahamba ngeendlela zam, ukuba benze okuthe tye ngeendlela zam, ukuba benze okuthe tye emehlweni am, nemimiselo yam, namasiko am, njengoDavide uyise."
1Kings11:34 Kodwa andiyi kubuthabatha bonke ubukumkani esandleni sakhe, kodwa ndiya kumenza ukumkani yonke imihla yobomi bakhe ngenxa kaDavide umkhonzi wam endimnyulileyo, ngenxa yokuba uyigcinile imiyalelo yam nemiyalelo yam inamathele."
1Kings11:35 Ndiya kubuthabatha ubukumkani esandleni sonyana wakhe, ndibunike wena izizukulwana ezilishumi;"
1Kings11:36 unyana wakhe ndimnike isizwe esinye, ukuze kubekho ukukhanya kuDavide, umkhonzi wam, yonke imihla phambi kwam eYerusalem, umzi endiwunyulileyo ukuba alimise khona igama lam."
1Kings11:37 Ndiya kukuthabatha, ube ngukumkani kanye njengoko unqwenela umphefumlo wakho, ube ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
1Kings11:38 Ukuba uthe waphulaphula kuyo yonk’ into endikuyalela yona, wahamba ngeendlela zam, wenze okulungileyo emehlweni am ngokugcina imiyalelo yam emiselweyo nemiyalelo yam, kanye njengoko wenzayo umkhonzi wam uDavide; ukuze ndibe nawe, ndikwakhele indlu eyomeleleyo, njengoko ndamakhelayo uDavide, ndikunike uSirayeli."
1Kings11:39 Ngenxa yoko ndiya kuyicinezela inzala kaDavide, kodwa kungekhona ngonaphakade."
1Kings11:40 uSolomon wazama ukumbulala uYarobheham. Wagqiba uYarobheham, wasabela eYiputa kuShishaki, ukumkani waseYiputa, wayilawula eYiputa, wada wafa uSolomon."
1Kings11:41 Ezinye izinto zikaSolomon, nako konke awakwenzayo, nobulumko bakhe, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi kaSolomon?"
1Kings11:42 Ixesha awalawula ngalo uSolomon eYerusalem phezu koonyana bakaSirayeli bonke yaba yiminyaka engamashumi amane.
1Kings11:43 uSolomon walala kooyise, wangcwatyelwa emzini kaDavide uyise; unyana wakhe uRehobhoham waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
1Kings12:1 Kwaye Ekufikeni kukaYarobheham eShekem, ngokuba amaSirayeli onke abeye kumenza ukumkani kwaShekem."
1Kings12:2 Weva uYarobheham, unyana kaNebhati, eseYiputa, ngokuba wayebaleke ukumkani uSolomon; wahlala uYarobheham eYiputa,"
1Kings12:3 wathumela ukuba ambize. Weza ke uYarobheham nebandla lonke likaSirayeli, bathetha kuRehabheham, bathi,"
1Kings12:4 Uyihlo wasithwalela idyokhwe enzima; ke wena yenze lula inkonzo enzima kayihlo, nedyokhwe yakhe enzima ayibeke phezu kwethu, sikukhonze."
1Kings12:5 Wathi kubo, Hambani niye iintsuku zibe ntathu, nibuye nize kum. Kwaye abantu bayahamba."
1Kings12:6 Ukumkani uRehabheham wacebisana namadoda amakhulu, abesakuma phambi koSolomon uyise oko ebesahleli, wathi, Ninika cebo lini na nina, ukuba ndibanike ilizwi aba bantu?"
1Kings12:7 Athetha ke kuye, athi, Ukuba uthe namhla waba ngumkhonzi kwaba bantu, wabakhonza, wabaphendula, wathetha amazwi amahle kubo, boba ngabakhonzi bakho kude kuse ephakadeni."
1Kings12:8 Kodwa walishiya icebiso awayelinikwe ngamadoda amakhulu, waya kucebisana nabafana abaziintanga zakhe ababemi ngakuye."
1Kings12:9 Wathi kuwo, Ninika cebo lini na nina, ukuze sibanike ilizwi aba bantu bathethileyo kum, besithi, Yiba lula edyokhweni awayibeka phezu kwethu uyihlo?"
1Kings12:10 Athetha ke kuye amadodana aziintanga zakhe, esithi, Yithi kwaba bantu bathethe kuwe, besithi, Uyihlo wayithwala idyokhwe yethu enzima, senzele yona; wothi kubo, Ucikicane wam uya kuba mkhulu kunesinqe sikabawo."
1Kings12:11 Ngoku ke, xa uBawo enithwalise idyokhwe enzima, mna ke ndiya kuyongeza idyokhwe yenu;"
1Kings12:12 Baya ke ooYarobheham nabantu bonke kuRehabheham ngomhla wesithathu, njengoko abewise umthetho ngako ukumkani, wathi, Yizani kum ngomhla wesithathu;"
1Kings12:13 Ukumkani wabaphendula abantu kalukhuni, walishiya icebo lamadoda amakhulu abemnike lona;"
1Kings12:14 Wathetha kubo ngecebo lamadodana, esithi, Ubawo wanithwalisa idyokhwe enzima, mna ke ndiya kuyandisa idyokhwe yenu; Ubawo wayenibetha ngeentsontelo, mna ke ndiya kunibetha ngeekatsi."
1Kings12:15 Akabaphulaphulanga ke abantu ukumkani; ngenxa yokuba lo mbandela wawungokaYehova, ukuze aliphumeze ilizwi lakhe awalithethayo uYehova ngenkonzo ka-Ahiya uMoshilo kuYerobhoham unyana kaNebhati."
1Kings12:16 Akubona ke onke amaSirayeli ukuba ukumkani akawaphulaphuli, abantu bambuyisela ukumkani ilizwi elithi, Sinasabelo sini na kuDavide? Asinalifa kunyana kaYese; Yiya ezintenteni zakho, Sirayeli, ukhangele indlu yakho, Davide; Yaye oonyana bakaSirayeli baya ezintenteni zabo."
1Kings12:17 Ke oonyana bakaSirayeli, ababehleli emizini yakwaYuda, uRehabheham wabalawula."
1Kings12:18 Ukumkani uRehabheham wathuma uAdoram, umbuthi werhafu; yaye bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli bamgibisela ngamatye, wafa. Ngoko ukumkani uRehobhoham wakhawuleza wamkhwelisa enqwelweni waza wasabela eYerusalem."
1Kings12:19 Akreqa ke amaSirayeli kwindlu kaDavide, unanamhla."
1Kings12:20 Evile ke onke amaSirayeli ukuba uYarobheham ubuyile, athumela ambizela ebandleni, amenza ukumkani kumaSirayeli onke; akwabakho mntu wakha wayilandela indlu kaDavide, yaba sisizwe sakwaYuda sodwa."
1Kings12:21 Weza uRehabheham eYerusalem, wayihlanganisa yonke indlu yakwaYuda, nesizwe sakwaBhenjamin, amadoda anamandla, amadoda okulwa alikhulu elinamanci asibhozo anamabini, ukuba aye kulwa nendlu kaSirayeli, ukuba abuyele ezweni ubukumkani kuRehabheham, unyana kaSolomon."
1Kings12:22 Lafika ke ilizwi likaThixo kuShemaya umfo wakwaThixo, lisithi:"
1Kings12:23 Yitsho kuRehabheham unyana kaSolomon, ukumkani wakwaYuda, nendlu yonke yakwaYuda, neyakwaBhenjamin, namasalela abantu, ukuthi,"
1Kings12:24 Wathi uYehova, Ize ninganyuki niye kulwa nabazalwana benu, oonyana bakaSirayeli; makabuyele elowo endlwini yakhe; ngokuba yeyam le nto. Bandula ke baliphulaphula ilizwi likaYehova baza babuya bahamba ngokwelizwi likaYehova."
1Kings12:25 uYarobheham wayakha iShekem kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, wahlala kuyo; wemka apho wakha iPnuele."
1Kings12:26 Wathi uYarobheham entliziyweni yakhe, Kaloku ubukumkani buya kubuyela endlwini kaDavide."
1Kings12:27 Ukuba bathe benyuka aba bantu baya eYerusalem, baya kubingelela endlwini kaYehova, intliziyo yaba bantu yobuyela enkosini yabo, kuRehabheham, ukumkani wakwaYuda, bandibulale ke mna, nakuRehabheham ukumkani wakwaYuda Yuda, hamba uYuda."
1Kings12:28 Ukumkani wacinga ukwenza amathole egolide abe mabini, wathi kubo, Ukunyuka siye eYerusalem kunzima; yabona, Sirayeli, oothixo bakho bakukhupha ezweni laseYiputa."
1Kings12:29 Walimisa elinye eBheteli, walimisa elinye kwaDan."
1Kings12:30 Yaba sisono loo nto; ngokuba abantu baqubuda elowo nowabo, besa kwaDan."
1Kings12:31 Wenza indlu ephakamileyo waza wabeka ababingeleli kwelona nqanaba lisezantsi phakathi kwabantu ababengengoonyana bakaLevi.
1Kings12:32 uYarobheham wenza umthendeleko ngenyanga yesibhozo, ngomhla weshumi elinesihlanu enyangeni leyo, onjengomthendeleko wakwaYuda; Wenjenjalo naseBheteli, wabingelela amathole awawenzileyo; wabamisa ababingeleli beziganga awazenzayo eBheteli."
1Kings12:33 Wenza umbingelelo esibingelelweni awasenzayo eBheteli, ngomhla weshumi elinesihlanu wenyanga yesibhozo, ngenyanga leyo abeyicamangile entliziyweni yakhe; Wabenzela umthendeleko oonyana bakaSirayeli, wawusondeza esibingelelweni, waqhumisela."
1Kings13:1 Nanko, wafika umfo wakwaThixo, evela kwaYuda, ngokwelizwi likaYehova, wafika eBheteli, uYarobheham emi phambi kwesibingelelo eqhumisela."
1Kings13:2 Wamemeza esibingelelweni ngelizwi likaYehova, wathi, Wena sibingelelo, sibingelelo, utsho uYehova; Uyabona, kuya kuzalwa umntwana kwindlu kaDavide ogama linguYosiya; uze ubabulale ababingeleli beziganga abaqhumisela phezu kwakho, atshiswe phezu kwakho amathambo abantu."
1Kings13:3 Wanikela umqondiso ngaloo mini, wathi, Nguwo lo umqondiso awuthethileyo uYehova; Yabona, isibingelelo siya kuqwengwa, nothuthu oluphezu kwaso lulahlwe;"
1Kings13:4 Weva ukumkani uYarobheham ilizwi lomfo wakwaThixo ekhwaza esibingelelweni esiseBheteli, wasolulela isandla sakhe esibingelelweni, wathi, Mbambeni. Kwanesandla sakhe awayesolulele kuye esomile, ngokokude angabi nako ukusisondeza kuye."
1Kings13:5 Sikrazulwa isibingelelo nothuthu lwesibingelelo, ngokomqondiso awawunikelayo umntu kaTHIXO oyinyaniso ngelizwi likaYehova."
1Kings13:6 Waphendula uYehova, wathi kumfo wakwaThixo, Thandaza kuYehova uThixo wakho, undithandazele, sibuyele kum isandla sam. Wathandaza umfo wakwaThixo kuYehova, saza isandla sokumkani samphilisa kwakhona, waba njengokwangaphambili."
1Kings13:7 Wandula ke ukumkani wathi kumfo wakwaThixo: “Hamba nam siye ekhaya, uze uzithembe, yaye ndiza kukunika umvuzo."
1Kings13:8 Wathi umfo wakwaThixo kukumkani, Nokuba uthe wandinika isiqingatha sendlu yakho, andingekhe ndiye nawe, andingekhe ndidle sonka, andingekhe ndisele manzi kule ndawo."
1Kings13:9 Ngenxa enokuba ndawiselwa umthetho ngelizwi likaYehova, elithi, Uze ungadli sonka, ungaseli manzi, ungabuyi ngendlela obuze ngayo."
1Kings13:10 Wahamba ngenye indlela, akabuya ngendlela abeze ngayo eBheteli."
1Kings13:11 Kwaye kukho apho eBheteli umprofeti othile, owalupheleyo; Beza oonyana bakhe, bamxelela yonke imisebenzi awayenzayo umfo wakwaThixo ngaloo mini, eBheteli amazwi awawathethayo kukumkani, awawaxela nakuyise."
1Kings13:12 Wathi uyise kubo, Nihambe ngayiphi na indlela? Kuba oonyana bakhe babeyibonile indlela awayehamba ngayo umntu kaThixo wokwenene owayevela kwaYuda."
1Kings13:13 Wathi koonyana bakhe, Ndigcineleni iesile. Bayibopha iesile, wakhwela."
1Kings13:14 Wamlandela umntu kaTHIXO oyinyaniso waza wamfumana ehleli phantsi komdiliya, waza wathi kuye: “Unguye na umfo kaTHIXO oyinyaniso owaphuma kwaYuda? Wathi yena: Ndinguye."
1Kings13:15 Wathi kuye, Hamba siye ekhaya, udle isonka."
1Kings13:16 Wathi yena, Andiyi kubuya nawe, andiyi kungena nawe; andiyi kudla sonka, andiyi kusela manzi nawe kule ndawo."
1Kings13:17 Kwathi, ngenxa enokuba ndixelelwe ngelizwi likaYehova, kwathiwa, Uze ungadli sonka, ungaseli manzi khona, ungabuyi ngendlela obuhambe ngayo."
1Kings13:18 Wathi kuye, Ndingumprofeti nam njengawe; sathetha isithunywa sikaYehova kum, sisithi, Mbuyisele endlwini yakho, adle isonka, asele namanzi. Kodwa wamxokisa."
1Kings13:19 Wabuya ke naye, wadla isonka, wasela namanzi endlwini yakhe."
1Kings13:20 Kwathi, besetafileni, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kumprofeti lowo ubembuyisile."
1Kings13:21 Wabiza umfo wakwaThixo ovela kwaYuda, wathi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ekubeni uwungcikive umlomo kaYehova, akwawugcina umthetho abekuwisele uYehova uThixo wakho;"
1Kings13:22 Wabuya wadla isonka, wasela amanzi kuloo ndawo abethethe ngayo uYehova, wathi, Ize ningadli sonka, ningaseli manzi; umzimba wakho awuyi kufikelela engcwabeni likayihlo."
1Kings13:23 Emva kokutya isonka nokusela, wabopha idonki, awayeyibuyisele umprofeti lowo wayembuyisile."
1Kings13:24 Uthe ke akuphuma, wafunyanwa yingonyama endleleni, yambulala; isidumbu sakhe sajulwa endleleni, lema iesile phezu kwalo; nayo ingonyama yema ngasesibatheni."
1Kings13:25 Kwabonakala kudlula amadoda lawo, abona isabatha endleleni, kumi ingonyama phezu komgibe; beza bashumayela kwisixeko awayehlala kuso umprofeti omdala."
1Kings13:26 Wathi akukuva oko umprofeti obembuyisile endleleni, wathi: “Lo ngumfo wakwaThixo oyinyaniso ongaliphulaphulanga ilizwi likaYehova; uYehova wamnika ingonyama, yamqwenga, yambulala ngokwelizwi likaYehova, awalithethayo kuye."
1Kings13:27 Wathetha koonyana bakhe, wathi, Ndigcineleni iesile. Kwaye bamjonga."
1Kings13:28 Waya ke, wawuphosa umzimba wakhe endleleni; ingonyama ayizange iwudle umgibe, ayizange iyiqwenge nedonki."
1Kings13:29 Ngoko umprofeti wawuthabatha umzimba womntu oyinyaniso kaTHIXO oyinyaniso wawukhwelisa e-esileni waza wabuya nawo; Weza ke esixekweni umprofeti lowo useleyindoda enkulu, ukuba ammbambazelele, amngcwabe."
1Kings13:30 Wawubeka umzimba wakhe engcwabeni lakhe; Bamkhalela, besithi: Oh!"
1Kings13:31 Wathi ke ekumngcwabeni kwakhe, wathetha koonyana bakhe, esithi, Ndakuba ndifile, yizani, nindingcwabe engcwabeni angcwatyelwe kulo umfo wakwaThixo; wawabeka amathambo phambi kwamathambo akhe."
1Kings13:32 Ngokuba liya kuzaliseka ilizwi elo, awalimemezayo ngelizwi likaYehova esibingelelweni esiseBheteli, nasezigangeni zonke zemizi yakwaSamari."
1Kings13:33 Emva koko uYerobhoham akazange ajike endleleni yakhe embi, kodwa waphinda wamisela abantu abasweleyo phakathi kwabantu ukuba babe ngababingeleli beendawo eziphakamileyo;"
1Kings13:34 Eli lizwi laba sisono kwindlu kaYarobheham, ukuba litshatyalaliswe, litshatyalaliswe emhlabeni."
1Kings14:1 Ngelo xesha wahliwa sisifo uAbhiya, unyana kaYarobheham."
