1Kings14:2 Wathi uYarobheham kumkakhe, Yeka, uzenze mntu wumbi, ungazi, ngokuba ungumkaYarobheham; waya eShilo; nanku umprofeti uAhiya, owandixelelayo ukuba ndiya kuba ngukumkani wolu hlanga."
1Kings14:3 Thabatha izonka ezilishumi, nesonka, neselwa lobusi, uze kuye; uya kukuxelela okuya kwenzeka kumntwana."
1Kings14:4 Wenjenjalo umkaYarobheham, wesuka waya eShilo, wafika endlwini ka-Ahiya. Ke uAhiya wayengaboni; ngokuba amehlo akhe abenorhatyazo ebuxhegweni bakhe."
1Kings14:5 Wathi uYehova kuAhiya, Nanko umkaYarobheham esiza kuwe, eze kucela kuwe ngonyana wakhe; ngokuba uyagula; mxelele ke: kuba xa engena uzenza omnye umfazi."
1Kings14:6 Weva uAhiya iinyawo zakhe, xa engena emnyango, wathi, Ngena, mkaYarobheham kutheni uzenza omnye umntu? ngokuba ndithunywe kuni ndineendaba ezibuhlungu."
1Kings14:7 Ke, wothi kuYarobheham, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ekubeni ndakuphakamisayo phakathi kwabantu, ndiya kukwenza ukumkani wabantu bam amaSirayeli;"
1Kings14:8 Bususe ubukumkani endlwini kaDavide, unike yena; ukanti wawungenjengomkhonzi wam uDavide, owayigcinayo imiyalelo yam nowandilandela ngentliziyo yakhe yonke ukuze enze oko kulungileyo kum amehlo;"
1Kings14:9 Kambe ke wena wenze ububi obungaphezu kobo bubekho phambi kwakho, ngenxa enokuba uzenzele izithixo zasemzini, nezithixo ezingento, wadlala ngam, wandiphosa emva komhlana wakho."
1Kings14:10 Ngako oko, yabona, ndiyizisela ububi indlu kaYarobheham, ndinqumle kwaYarobheham olwa nodonga, ongavaliweyo kwaSirayeli, ndiwasuse amasalela endlu kaYehova. uYarobheham, njengomntu osusa ubulongwe bude buphele."
1Kings14:11 OkaYarobheham ofela phakathi komzi, uya kudliwa zizinja; yaye lowo ufela entlango uya kudliwa ziintaka zezulu, ngenxa yokuba uYehova ethethile."
1Kings14:12 Vuka kaloku, uye endlwini yakho; ekungeneni kweenyawo zakho kuwo umzi, iya kufa umntwana."
1Kings14:13 Onke amaSirayeli omzilela aze amngcwabe, kuba nguye yedwa kwaYarobheham oya kungena engcwabeni, ngenxa yokuba kufunyenwe kuye okuthile okulungileyo okuvela kuYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, endlwini kaYarobheham."
1Kings14:14 Ngaphezu koko, uYehova uya kumvelisela ukumkani wakwaSirayeli oya kuyitshabalalisa indlu kaYarobheham ngaloo mini; kodwa ntoni? nangoku."
1Kings14:15 Ngokuba uYehova uya kuwabetha amaSirayeli, njengengcongolo izanyazanyiswa emanzini, awanqumle amaSirayeli kulo mhlaba ulungileyo, awawunika ooyise, awachithachithele phesheya koMlambo, ngenxa enokuba ezenzele ihlathi umthi ongcwele ogculela uYehova."
1Kings14:16 Yena uya kumkhulula uSirayeli ngenxa yezono zikaYarobheham, awawonisa ngazo amaSirayeli."
1Kings14:17 Wahamba umkaYarobheham, waya eTirtsa; yathi, yakungena emnyango, yafa inkwenkwe;"
1Kings14:18 Bamngcwaba; yaye wonke uSirayeli wamlilela ngokwelizwi likaYehova awalithethayo ngomkhonzi wakhe, umprofeti uAkiya."
1Kings14:19 Ezinye izinto zikaYarobheham, ukulwa kwakhe, nokulawula kwakhe, nanzo zibhaliwe encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli."
1Kings14:20 Imihla awalawula ngayo uYarobheham yaba yiminyaka emashumi mabini anamibini; walala noyise, unyana wakhe uNadabhi waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe."
1Kings14:21 Ke uRehabheham, unyana kaSolomon, waye engukumkani kwaYuda. uRehabheham ubeminyaka imashumi mane anamnye ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka elishumi elinesixhenxe engukumkani eYerusalem, umzi awawunyulayo uYehova ezizweni zonke zakwaSirayeli, ukuba alimise igama lakhe kuwo. Igama lonina belinguNahama umAmon."
1Kings14:22 AmaYuda enza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, amqumbisa ngezono zawo, abenzé ngaphezu kooyise bonke."
1Kings14:23 Kwakhona azakhela iindawo eziphakamileyo nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo neziqu zemithi engcwele kuzo zonke iinduli eziphakamileyo naphantsi kwayo yonke imithi eluhlaza.
1Kings14:24 Kananjalo bekukho amaSodom kwelo lizwe, enza ngokwamasikizi onke eentlanga, awazigqogqayo uYehova phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
1Kings14:25 Ngomnyaka wesihlanu wokumkani uRehobhowam, uShishaki ukumkani waseYiputa wayihlasela iYerusalem."
1Kings14:26 Wabuthabatha ubuncwane bendlu kaYehova nobuncwane bendlu yokumkani; wazithabatha zonke, wathabatha onke amakhaka egolide awawenzayo uSolomon."
1Kings14:27 Ukumkani uRehabheham wenza iingweletshetshe zobhedu esikhundleni sazo, wazinika umthetheli wabasiki, umlinda womnyango wendlu yokumkani."
1Kings14:28 Uthe akungena ukumkani endlwini kaYehova, zathabatha abalindi, bazibuyisela egumbini lezigidimi."
1Kings14:29 Ezinye izinto zikaRehabheham, nako konke awakwenzayo, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaYuda?"
1Kings14:30 Yaye iyimfazwe phakathi koRehabheham noYarobheham yonke imihla yabo.
1Kings14:31 uRehabheham walala kookhokho bakhe, wangcwatywa nookhokho bakhe kwisiXeko sikaDavide. Igama lonina lalinguNahama, oonyana baka-Amon. uAbhiya, unyana wakhe, waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe."
1Kings15:1 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinesithoba anesibini wokumkani uYarobheham unyana kaNebhati, uAbhiya waba ngukumkani kwaYuda."
1Kings15:2 Waba neminyaka emithathu engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguMaga, intombi ka-Abhisalom."
1Kings15:3 Waqhubeka ehamba ezonweni zonke zikayise awazenzayo phambi kwakhe, yaye intliziyo yakhe yayingaphelele kuYehova uThixo wakhe njengentliziyo kaDavide uyise."
1Kings15:4 Kodwa ngenxa kaDavide, uYehova uThixo wakhe wamnika isibane eYerusalem, ukuze avelise unyana wakhe emva kwakhe, ukuze ayiqinise iYerusalem."
1Kings15:5 uDavide wenza okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova, akatyeka kuko konke awamwisela umthetho ngako yonke imihla yobomi bakhe, ngaphandle kwemeko kaUriya umHeti."
1Kings15:6 Yaye iyimfazwe phakathi koRehabheham noYarobheham yonke imihla yobomi bakhe.
1Kings15:7 Ezinye izinto zika-Abhiya, nako konke awakwenzayo, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaYuda? Kwabakho imfazwe phakathi kuka-Abhiya noYarobheham."
1Kings15:8 Walala uAbhiya kooyise; waza wangcwatyelwa kwisiXeko sikaDavide, waza uAsa unyana wakhe walawula esikhundleni sakhe."
1Kings15:9 Ngomnyaka wamashumi amabini kaYarobheham ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, uAsa waba ngukumkani kwaYuda."
1Kings15:10 Waba neminyaka emashumi mane anamnye engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguMaga, intombi ka-Abhisalom."
1Kings15:11 uAsa wenza okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova, njengoDavide uyise."
1Kings15:12 Wawasusa amahenyukazi ehlabathini, wayisusa yonke imifanekiso eqingqiweyo ababeyenzile ooyise;"
1Kings15:13 NoMaga unina wayerhoxa ebukumkanini, ngokuba wenza umfanekiso oqingqiweyo etyholweni; uAsa wasitshabalalisa isithixo sakhe, wasitshisa kumlambo iKidron."
1Kings15:14 Kodwa iziganga aziphambukanga; kodwa yona intliziyo ka-Asa yabe iqinile kuYehova yonke imihla yakhe.
1Kings15:15 Wazizisa izipho awayezingcwalisile uyise, awayezingcwalisile endlwini kaYehova, isilivere negolide nempahla."
1Kings15:16 Kwaye kukho imfazwe phakathi kuka-Asa noBhasha ukumkani wakwaSirayeli yonke imihla yabo.
1Kings15:17 uBhahesha ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wawaxabela amaYuda, wayakha iRama, ukuze angavumi ukuba kuphume bani aye kuAsa ukumkani wakwaYuda."
1Kings15:18 Wayithabatha uAsa yonke isilivere negolide eyayisele ebuncwaneni bendlu kaYehova, nasebuncwaneni bendlu yokumkani, wayinikela esandleni sabakhonzi bakhe; ukumkani uAsa wayithumela kunyana kaBhen-hadade. Wathi uTabrimon unyana kaHeziyon, ukumkani wakwa-Aram, ohleli eDamasko:"
1Kings15:19 Kukho umnqophiso phakathi kwam nawe, naphakathi kobawo noyihlo; uyabona, ndikuthumelela isipho sesilivere negolide; Yiza, uwaphule umnqophiso wakho noBhasha, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, wokuba ndihambe."
1Kings15:20 Wandula ke uBhen-hadadi wamphulaphula uKumkani uAsa waza wathumela abathetheli bemikhosi yakhe nxamnye nezixeko zakwaSirayeli, waza woyisa i-Iyon neDan neAbhele-bhete-mahaga nayo yonke iShineroti nelizwe lonke lakwaNafetali."
1Kings15:21 Akukuva oku uBhasha wayeka ukuyakha iRama, wahlala eTirtsa."
1Kings15:22 Waza uKumkani uAsa wakhala phakathi kwawo onke amaYuda; bawasusa amatye eRama, nemithi yayo, awasakha ngayo uBhahesha; yaye ukumkani uAsa wakha ngazo bha yakwaBhenjamin neMizpa."
1Kings15:23 Ezinye izinto zika-Asa, nobugorha bakhe bonke, nako konke awakwenzayo, nemizi awayakhayo, nâzo zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaYuda? Noko ke, ekwaluphaleni kwakhe, wayegula yimilenze yakhe."
1Kings15:24 Ekugqibeleni uAsa walala kookhokho bakhe waza wangcwatywa nookhokho bakhe kwisiXeko sikayise uDavide unyana wakhe uYehoshafati waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe.
1Kings15:25 Ke yena uNadabhi, unyana kaYarobheham, waba ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli ngomnyaka wesibini ka-Asa ukumkani wakwaYuda, waba ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli iminyaka emibini."
1Kings15:26 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, walandela umzekelo kayise nesono sakhe awamcinezela ngaso uSirayeli."
1Kings15:27 uBhahesa unyana ka-Ahiya, wendlu kaIsakare, wagwilika kuye; uBhahesa wayixabela iGibheton yamaFilisti; ngokuba uNadabhi noonyana bonke bakaSirayeli babeyingqingile iGibheton."
1Kings15:28 Ngomnyaka wesithathu ka-Asa ukumkani wakwaYuda, uBhasha wambulala ke, waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe."
1Kings15:29 Ukuqala kwakhe ukulawula, wayibulala yonke indlu kaYarobheham; akasalisa namnye umphefumlo kaYarobheham, wada wamtshabalalisa, ngokwelizwi likaYehova, awalithethayo ngomkhonzi wakhe uAhiya waseShilo:"
1Kings15:30 ngenxa yezono zikaYerobhoham awazenzayo waza wamonisa ngazo uSirayeli ngenxa yomsindo wakhe awamcaphukisa ngawo uYehova uTHIXO kaSirayeli.
1Kings15:31 Ezinye izinto zikaNadabhi, nako konke awakwenzayo, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli?"
1Kings15:32 Yaye iyimfazwe phakathi kuka-Asa noBhasha ukumkani wakwaSirayeli yonke imihla yabo.
1Kings15:33 Ngomnyaka wesithathu ka-Asa ukumkani wakwaYuda, uBhahesha, unyana ka-Ahiya, waba ngukumkani kumaSirayeli onke eTirtsa, iminyaka emashumi mabini anamine."
1Kings15:34 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, wahamba ngendlela kaYarobheham, nasesonweni sakhe awawonisa ngaso amaSirayeli."
1Kings16:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYehu, unyana kaHanani, phezu kweBhahesa, lisithi,"
1Kings16:2 Ngokuba ndakukhupha eluthulini, ndakwenza ukumkani wabantu bam amaSirayeli; yaye wahamba ngendlela kaYarobheham waza wababeka ityala abantu bam amaSirayeli ngokundikhotyokisa ngezono zabo;"
1Kings16:3 Yabona, ndiya kuyishenxisa imbewu kaBhasha, nembewu yendlu yakhe; nendlu yakho ndiya kuyenza ibe njengendlu kaYerobhoham unyana kaNebhati."
1Kings16:4 OngowaseBhesha ofela phakathi komzi, uya kudliwa zizinja; yaye ofela endle wodliwa ziintaka zezulu."
1Kings16:5 Ezinye izinto zikaBhahesha, awakwenzayo, nobugorha bakhe, nâzo zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli?"
1Kings16:6 Ekugqibeleni uBhasha walala kookhokho bakhe waza wangcwatywa eTirtsa, yaye uEla unyana wakhe waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
1Kings16:7 Ngesandla somprofeti uYehu, unyana kaHanani, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuBhasha nendlu yakhe, ngenxa yobubi bonke awabenzayo emehlweni kaYehova, ngokumxhaphaza; hlekisa esandleni sakhe njengendlu kaYarobheham; nangenxa yokuba embulele."
1Kings16:8 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omabini anesithandathu ka-Asa ukumkani wakwaYuda, waba ngukumkani uEla, unyana kaBhasha, kwaSirayeli eTirtsa, iminyaka emibini."
1Kings16:9 Waza umkhonzi wakhe uZimri, umthetheli wesiqingatha seenqwelo zakhe zokulwa, wagwilika kuye eseTirtsa, ekunxileni kwakhe endlwini ka-Arsa, umlindi wendlu yakhe eTirtsa."
1Kings16:10 Wangena uZimri, wamgwaza, wambulala, ngomnyaka wamashumi omabini anesixhenxe ka-Asa ukumkani wakwaYuda, waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe."
1Kings16:11 Uthe akuqala ukuba ngukumkani, ehleli etroneni yakhe, wayibulala yonke indlu kaBhahesha; akashiya nabani na eqhekeza udonga, kwanabazalwana bakhe nabahlobo bakhe."
1Kings16:12 Wayitshabalalisa ke uZimri yonke indlu kaBhasha, ngokwelizwi likaYehova, awalithethayo ngoBhasha ngomkhonzi womprofeti uYehu;"
1Kings16:13 ngenxa yezono zonke zikaBhasha nezono zikaEla unyana wakhe abona ngazo ababangela ukuba oonyana bakaSirayeli bangabi nasono ngokugculela uYehova uTHIXO kaSirayeli ngomsindo wabo olambathayo.
1Kings16:14 Ezinye izinto zikaEla, nako konke awakwenzayo, ndithi, nanzo zibhaliwe encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli?"
1Kings16:15 Ngomnyaka wamashumi amabini anesixhenxe ka-Asa ukumkani wakwaYuda, uZimri waba ngukumkani eTire iintsuku ezisixhenxe. Amadoda amisa inkampu nxamnye neGibheton yamaFilisti."
1Kings16:16 Yaye amadoda awayewangqinga eva ukuba kwathiwa, uSimeri wenze icebo lemvukelo waza wambulala nokumkani; Onke ke amaSirayeli ammisa ngaloo mini uOmri, umthetheli-mkhosi, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, ukuba amise emkhosini."
1Kings16:17 Emva koko uOmri wenyuka waya eGibheton nawo onke amaSirayeli awayekunye naye, baza bangqinga iTirtsa."
1Kings16:18 Wathi akubona uZimri ukuba isixeko sithinjiwe, wangena ebhotwe lendlu kakumkani waza wayitshisa indlu kakumkani ngomlilo, wafa;"
1Kings16:19 ngenxa yezono zakhe awazenzayo ngokwenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, wahamba ngendlela kaYarobheham, nangenxa yezono zakhe awazenzayo, esongela amaSirayeli."
1Kings16:20 Ke eminye imicimbi kaZimri nobuqhophololo awabenzayo, akubhalwanga na encwadini yemicimbi yookumkani bakwaSirayeli?"
1Kings16:21 Baza bahluka kubini oonyana bakaSirayeli; esinye isiqingatha sabantu salandela uTibheni, unyana kaGinati, ukuba simenze ukumkani; abanye balandela uOmri."
1Kings16:22 Kodwa abantu ababelandela uOmri baboyisa abantu ababelandela uTibheni unyana kaGinati, wafa uTibheni, yaye uOmri waqalisa ukulawula."
1Kings16:23 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omathathu anamnye ka-Asa ukumkani wakwaYuda, uOmri waba ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli iminyaka elishumi elinamibini; Walawula iminyaka emithandathu eThirtsa."
1Kings16:24 Waza wathenga intaba yakwaSamari kuShemere ngeetalente ezimbini zesilivere, wakha kuloo ntaba, wathi loo mzi wawakhayo yiSamari, ngegama likaShemere umninintaba."
1Kings16:25 Kodwa uOmri wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, wenza okubi ngakumbi kunabo bonke ababengaphambi kwakhe."
1Kings16:26 Waqhubeka ehamba ngendlela yonke kaYerobhoham unyana kaNebhati nesono sakhe awamzisa kuso uSirayeli, ukuze amqumbise uYehova uTHIXO kaSirayeli ngomsindo wabo olambathayo."
1Kings16:27 Ke eminye imicimbi kaOmri awayenzayo namandla akhe awawenzayo, akubhalwanga na encwadini yemicimbi yookumkani bakwaSirayeli?"
1Kings16:28 Ekugqibeleni uOmri walala kookhokho bakhe waza wangcwatywa kwaSamari, yaye uAhabhi unyana wakhe walawula esikhundleni sakhe."
1Kings16:29 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omathathu anesibini ka-Asa ukumkani wakwaYuda, waba ngukumkani uAhabhi, unyana kaOmri kumaSirayeli; uAhabhi, unyana kaOmri, wayengukumkani kwaSirayeli iminyaka emashumi mabini anamibini eSamariya."
1Kings16:30 uAhabhi unyana kaOmri wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova ngaphezu kwabo bonke ababengaphambi kwakhe.
1Kings16:31 Yaye kwathi, ngokungathi yinto elula kuye ukuhamba ezonweni zikaYerobhoham unyana kaNebhati, wathabatha uIzebhele unyana kaEtebhahali ukumkani waseTsidon waba ngumfazi wakhe waza waya kumbulala. Bakhonza uBhahali, baqubuda kuye."
1Kings16:32 Wakha isibingelelo sikaBhahali endlwini kaBhahali awayakhayo eSamariya.
1Kings16:33 uAhabhi wenza ihlathi; waphinda uAhabhi wamqumbisa uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ngaphezu kookumkani bonke bakwaSirayeli ababengaphambi kwakhe."
1Kings16:34 Ngexesha lakhe uHiyeli waseBheteli wayakha iYeriko; wawuseka ngoAbhiram, amazibulo akhe, wawamisa amasango ayo ngoSegubhe, unyana wakhe omncinane, ngokwelizwi likaYehova, awalithethayo ngomyalelo kaYoshuwa unyana kaNun."
1Kings17:1 Wathi uEliya waseTishbhe, kubemi baseGiliyadi, kuAhabhi, NgoYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ohleliyo, endimi phambi kwakhe, akuyi kubakho mbethe namvula ngale minyaka, kungengalo ilizwi likaYehova."
1Kings17:2 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuye, lisithi:"
1Kings17:3 Mka apha, ujike uye empumalanga, uzimele emlanjeni oyiKereti, oseYordan."
1Kings17:4 Uya kusela emlanjeni; ndaza ndayalela amagwababa ukuba adle khona.
1Kings17:5 Wahamba ke wenza ngokwelizwi likaYehova, ngokuba waya wahlala emfuleni womlanjana oyiKereti, ngaseYordan."
1Kings17:6 Amagwababa amzisela isonka nenyama kusasa, isonka nenyama ngokuhlwa; wawusela umlambo."
1Kings17:7 Ekuhambeni kwexesha umlambo oqukuqelayo woma, ngenxa yokuba kwakungekho mvula elizweni."
1Kings17:8 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuye, lisithi:"
1Kings17:9 Yiya eTsarfati, ezweni laseTsidon, uhlale khona; yabona, ndimwisele umthetho umhlolokazi okhona, ukuba akubophe."
1Kings17:10 Wavuka ke, waya eSafati. Wathi akufika esangweni lesixeko, nanko umhlolokazi ethwele iinkuni; Wambiza wathi: Ndiziseleni iemele yamanzi ndisele."
1Kings17:11 Eya kuyithabatha, wayibiza wathi, Ndinike iqhekeza lesonka esandleni sakho."
1Kings17:12 Wathi, NgoYehova uThixo wakho ohleliyo, andinasonka, ingengumgubo ongazalisa isandla emphandeni, nentwana yeoli ngesitya; nanku ke nditheza iinkuni ezimbini, ukuba ndiye ndenzele mna nonyana wam, sizidle, sife."
1Kings17:13 Wathi uEliya kuye, Musa ukoyika; hamba uye kwenza njengoko uthethile; kodwa kuqala ndenzele isonkana ngawo, undizisele, wenzele wena nonyana wakho."
1Kings17:14 Ngokuba utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Umgubo osembizani awuyi kuphela, neoli ayiyi kuphela, ide iphele, ide ibe yimini uYehova aya kuyinisa imvula phezu komhlaba."
1Kings17:15 Wahamba ke, wenza ngokwelizwi likaEliya, wadla yena nendlu yakhe imihla emininzi."
1Kings17:16 Kodwa umgubo owawusembizani awuphelanga, neoli eyayisembizeni ayizange iphele, ngokwelizwi likaYehova awayelithethile ngomkhonzi kaEliya."
1Kings17:17 Emveni kwezi zinto, wahliwa sisifo unyana waloo nkazana, engumninindlu; yaye isigulo sakhe saba sibi kangangokuba akwabikho moya kuye."
1Kings17:18 Wathi kuEliya, Yintoni na enam nawe, mfo wakwaThixo? Uza kum ukukhumbula isono sam, umbulale unyana wam?"
1Kings17:19 Wathi kuye, Ndinike unyana wakho. Wamsusa esifubeni sakhe, wamsa emkhumbini apho wayehlala khona, wamlalisa esingqengqelweni sakhe."
1Kings17:20 Wanqula uYehova, wathi, Yehova, Thixo wam, umtshabalalisile na umhlolokazi lo bendihleli kuye ngokubulala unyana wakhe?"
1Kings17:21 Wathoba phezu komntwana izihlandlo zazithathu, wathandaza kuYehova, esithi, Yehova, Thixo wam, wubuyisele kuye umphefumlo walo mntwana."
1Kings17:22 Waliva uYehova ilizwi likaEliya; wabuyela kuye umoya wenkwenkwe, waphila."
1Kings17:23 uEliya wamthabatha umntwana, wehla naye, waya naye egumbini eliphezulu, wamngenisa endlwini, wamnikela kunina; Wathi uEliya, Uyabona, unyana wakho uhleli."
1Kings17:24 Wathi loo mfazi kuEliya, Kaloku ke ndiyazi ukuba uyindoda yakwaThixo wena, nelizwi likaYehova elisemlonyeni wakho liyinyaniso."
1Kings18:1 Kwathi kwakuba mzuzu, lafika ilizwi likaYehova kuEliya ngomnyaka wesithathu, lathi, Hamba uye kubonana noAhabhi; ndiya kunisa imvula phezu komhlaba."
1Kings18:2 Wahamba waya kubonana uEliya kuAhabhi. Kwabakho ke indlala enkulu kwaSamari.
1Kings18:3 uAhabhi wabiza uObhadiya, intloko yendlu yakhe. (Ke uObhadiya wayemoyika kakhulu uYehova."
1Kings18:4 Xa uIzebhele wabatshabalalisa abaprofeti bakaYehova, uObhadiya wathabatha abaprofeti abalikhulu waza wabafihla emqolombeni babe ngamaqela angamashumi amahlanu waza wabondla ngesonka namanzi.)"
1Kings18:5 Wathi uAhabhi kuObhadiya, Hamba uye emhlabeni, emithonjeni yonke yamanzi nasemilanjeni yonke; Mhlawumbi sofumana utyani bokugcina amahashe noondlebende, ukuze singalahlekelwa zizilwanyana zonke."
1Kings18:6 Babelana ngelizwe lokuya kulo; wahamba yedwa uAhabhi ngenye indlela, wahamba yedwa uObhadiya."
1Kings18:7 Uthe uObhadiya esendleleni, wabona uEliya emkhawulela; wambona, wawa ngobuso, wathi, UnguEliya na, nkosi yam?"
1Kings18:8 Waphendula ke yena wathi, Ndinguye; hamba uye kuthi enkosini yakho, Nanku elapha uEliya."
1Kings18:9 Wathi, Ndenze ntoni na, ukuba umnikele umkhonzi wakho esandleni sika-Ahabhi ukuba andibulale?"
1Kings18:10 NgoYehova uThixo wakho ohleliyo, akubangakho luhlanga nabukumkani, angàthumanga ukuba akufunele ukumkani wam; bathi, Akakho; wafunga kurhulumente nakubantu, ukuba abayi kuyifumana."
1Kings18:11 Kaloku ke uthi, Hamba uye kuthi enkosini yakho, ithi, Nanku elapha uEliya."
1Kings18:12 Ekushiyeni kwam umoya kaYehova wonisa apho ndingaziyo; ukuba ndiye kuxelela uAhabhi, angakufumani, andibulale; kodwa mna, umkhonzi wakho, bendimoyika uYehova ukususela ebutsheni bam."
1Kings18:13 Ayixelelwanga na inkosi yam into endayenzayo xa uIzebhele wayebulala abaprofeti bakaYehova, indlela endabafihla ngayo abaprofeti bakaYehova abalikhulu elinamashumi amahlanu emqolombeni ndaza ndabondla ngesonka namanzi?"
1Kings18:14 Kaloku ke uthi, Hamba uye kuthi enkosini yakho, uthi, Nanku elapha uEliya, aze andibulale."
1Kings18:15 Wathi uEliya, Ehleli nje uYehova wemikhosi, endimiyo phambi kwakhe, namhlanje ndiya kuzibonakalisa kuye."
1Kings18:16 uObhadiya waya kumkhawulela ke uAhabhi, wamxelela; wahamba uAhabhi, waya kumkhawulela uEliya."
1Kings18:17 Uthe ke uAhabhi akumbona uEliya, wathi kuye: “Nguwe na lo umoyikisa amaSirayeli?"
1Kings18:18 Wathi, Andimoyikisanga amaSirayeli; wena nendlu kayihlo, ngenxa yokuba niyicekisile imithetho kaYehova, walandela uBhahali."
1Kings18:19 Ke kaloku thumela uze uhlanganisele kum wonke uSirayeli eNtabeni yeKarmele, abaprofeti bakaBhahali abangamakhulu amane anamashumi amahlanu namakhulu amane abaprofeti bemithi engcwele abadla etafileni kaIzebhele."
1Kings18:20 Emva koko uAhabhi wathumela ilizwi kubo bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli waza wabahlanganisela ndawonye abaprofeti eNtabeni yeKarmele.
1Kings18:21 Wafika uEliya ebantwini abo bonke, wathi, Koda kube nini na nimi phakathi kweentliziyo ezimbini? ukuba uYehova nguThixo, landelani yena; Ke yena uBhahali landelani yena. Akamphendula isihlwele."
1Kings18:22 Wathi uEliya ebantwini, Kusele mna ndodwa umprofeti kaYehova; Ke abaprofeti bakaBhahali ngamadoda angamakhulu amane anamanci mahlanu."
1Kings18:23 Sinikeni iinkunzi ezintsha zibe mbini; zinyuleleni inkunzi entsha ibe nye, niyityatye, niyibeke phezu kweenkuni, ningafaki mlilo; nenye inkunzi entsha ndiyibeke phezu kweenkuni, ndingabasi mlilo phantsi kwayo."
1Kings18:24 Bizani igama loothixo benu, ndithandaze ke igama likaYehova; yaye uThixo ophendula ngomlilo makabe nguThixo. Baphendula bonke abantu, bathi, Lilungisile ilizwi lakho."
1Kings18:25 Wathi uEliya kubaprofeti bakaBhahali, Zinyuleleni inkunzi entsha ibe nye, niyilungise kuqala; ngokuba nibaninzi; nqulani igama lothixo wenu, ningafaki mlilo phantsi kwenu."
1Kings18:26 Bayithabatha inkunzi yenkomo ababeyinikiwe, balilima, balibiza igama likaBhahali kususela kusasa kwada kwasemini enkulu, besithi: “Owu, Bhahali, siphulaphule! Kodwa akuzange kubekho lizwi, nditsho nempendulo. Kwaye baxhumela phezulu esibingelelweni esasenziwe."
1Kings18:27 Ke kaloku, kwakufika imini enkulu, uEliya wadlala ngabo, wathi, Dumani kakhulu, ngokuba ndinguThixo; mhlawumbi uyathetha, okanye uyaleqa, okanye uyahamba, okanye mhlawumbi ulele kwaye ufuna ukuvuka."
1Kings18:28 Badanduluka kakhulu, bazicenta ngeemela nangezikhali ngokwesiko labo, lada laphalaza igazi phezu kwabo."
1Kings18:29 Kwahlwa, yaye baprofeta de kwafika ixesha lombingelelo wangokuhlwa, akwabakho lizwi okanye uphendulayo okanye nabani na owaphulaphulayo."
1Kings18:30 Wathi uEliya ebantwini bonke, Sondelani kum apha. Basondela kuye bonke abantu. Waza ke wasihlaziya isibingelelo sikaYehova esasidiliziwe."
1Kings18:31 uEliya wathabatha amatye alishumi elinamabini ngokwenani lezizukulwana zoonyana bakaYakobi, elafikayo kubo ilizwi likaYehova, lisithi, Igama lakho liya kuba nguSirayeli;"
1Kings18:32 Wakha isibingelelo ngamatye egameni likaYehova; Wenza umsele olingene iiseha ezimbini zembewu, ngeenxa zonke esibingelelweni."
1Kings18:33 Wazilungisa iinkuni, wayityatya inkunzi entsha, wayibeka phezu kweenkuni, wathi, Zalisani iiemele zibe zine ngamanzi, niwagalele phezu kwedini elinyukayo, naphezu kweenkuni."
1Kings18:34 Wathi, Yenzani okwesibini. Bayenza ke okwesibini. Wathi, Yenzani okwesithathu. Bayenza ke okwesithathu."
1Kings18:35 Amanzi ahambahamba ngeenxa zonke esibingelelweni; wawuzalisa nomsele ngamanzi.
1Kings18:36 Ngexesha lombingelelo wangokuhlwa, umprofeti uEliya wasondela waza wathi: “Yehova, Thixo ka-Abraham, kaIsake, noSirayeli, makwazeke namhla ukuba uThixo wakho usezweni lakwaSirayeli; nokuba ndingumkhonzi wakho, ukuze ndizenze zonke ezi zinto ngelizwi lakho."
1Kings18:37 Ndiphendule, Yehova, ndiphendule, bazi aba bantu ukuba wena Yehova unguYehova, nokuba nguwe oyibuyiseleyo intliziyo yabo."
1Kings18:38 Wehla ke umlilo kaYehova, walidla idini elinyukayo, kwaneenkuni, kwanamatye, kwanothuli, wawakhotha namanzi emhadini."
1Kings18:39 Bakukubona oko abantu bonke, bawa ngobuso, bathi: “uYehova nguThixo! Yehova, ndinguThixo."
1Kings18:40 Wathi uEliya kubo, Babambeni abaprofeti bakaBhahali; akukho namnye kubo osindileyo. Bababamba, uEliya wabahlisela emlanjaneni oyiKishon, wababulalela khona."
1Kings18:41 Wathi uEliya kuAhabhi, Vuka, udle, usele; ngokuba kuvakala isandi semvula enkulu."
1Kings18:42 Wenyuka ke uAhabhi, waya kudla, wasela. Wenyuka uEliya, waya encotsheni yeKarmele; waqubuda, wabubeka ubuso bakhe phakathi kwamadolo akhe;"
1Kings18:43 Wathi kwindodana yakwakhe, Khawunyuke, ukhangele elwandle; Yenyuka, yakhangela, yathi, Akukho nto. Wathi, Buyela umva, kasixhenxe."
1Kings18:44 Wathi ngomhla wesixhenxe, Nanko, kuphuma intaka elwandle, engathi sisandla somntu; Wathi, Nyuka, uthi kuAhabhi, Lungisa inqwelo yakho, uhle, hleze imvula ingakuyeki."
1Kings18:45 Lasuka laba mnyama izulu ngamafu nomoya, akwabakho mvula inkulu. Wakhwela uAhabhi, waya eYizereli."
1Kings18:46 Sabakho ke isandla sikaYehova kuEliya; wabhinqa esinqeni sakhe waza wabaleka phambi kuka-Ahabhi de waya kufika kumnyango waseYizereli.
1Kings19:1 uAhabhi wamxelela uIzebhele konke awakwenzayo uEliya, nokubabulala kwakhe abaprofeti bonke ngentshuntshe."
1Kings19:2 uIzebhele wathuma umthunywa kuEliya, esithi, Mabenjenje oothixo kum, bande, ukuba ngomso eli xa andiwuwenzanga umphefumlo wakho, ube njengomnye wabo."
1Kings19:3 Uthe akubona oko, wesuka wasaba, esindisa umphefumlo wakhe, wafika eBher-shebha yakwaYuda, wamshiya khona umkhonzi wakhe."
1Kings19:4 Wahamba entlango uhambo lwemini enye, wafika wahlala phantsi konwele; waye yena ecinga ukuba ubeya kufa; Wathi, Kwanele; ngoku, Yehova, wuthabathe umphefumlo wam; ngokuba andilungile kunobawo."
1Kings19:5 Kwathi, elele phantsi konwele, kwabonakala isithunywa sezulu simchukumisa, sathi kuye, Vuka udle."
1Kings19:6 Wakhangela, nantso iqebengwana elosiweyo lesonka, neselwa lamanzi phezu kwentloko yakhe. Watya, wasela, waphinda walala."
1Kings19:7 Sabuya isithunywa sikaYehova okwesibini, samchukumisa, sathi, Vuka, udle; kuba uhambo lukhulu kakhulu kuwe."
1Kings19:8 Wavuka, wadla, wasela, waza ngamandla oko kudla wahamba iimini ezingamashumi amane nobusuku obungamashumi amane ukuya kutsho eHorebhe, intaba yoThixo oyinyaniso."
1Kings19:9 Wangena emqolombeni, walala khona; Nalo izwi likaYehova lifika kuye, lathi kuye, Uyintoni na apha, Eliya?"
1Kings19:10 Wandula ke wathi: “Ndandikhweletela kakhulu ngoYehova uTHIXO wemikhosi, ngenxa yokuba oonyana bakaSirayeli bewushiyile umnqophiso wakho, bazidiliza izibingelelo zakho baza bababulala abaprofeti bakho ngekrele; ndasala ndedwa; kwaye bafuna ukuthabatha ubomi bam."
1Kings19:11 Wathi, Phumani, nime entabeni phambi koYehova. Nanko uYehova edlula, kwavuthuza iintaba umoya omkhulu onamandla, wawaqhekeza amawa phambi koYehova; kodwa uYehova wayengekho kumoya, yaye emva komoya kwabakho inyikima kodwa uYehova wayengekho kuloo nyikima."
1Kings19:12 Emva kwendudumo kwabakho umlilo; kodwa uYehova wayengekho emlilweni, yaye emva komlilo kwakukho ilizwi elizolileyo."
1Kings19:13 Akukuva oko uEliya, wabugquma ubuso bakhe ngesambatho sakhe sangaphezulu, waphuma wema emnyango womqolomba nanko kufika kuye ilizwi, lisithi, Wenza ntoni na apho, Eliya?"
1Kings19:14 Wathi, Ndenziwe likhwele ngoYehova, uThixo wemikhosi; ngokuba bewushiyile umnqophiso wakho oonyana bakaSirayeli, nezibingelelo zakho bazidiliza, abaprofeti bakho bababulala ngekrele; ndasala ndedwa; kwaye bafuna ukuthabatha ubomi bam."
1Kings19:15 Wathi uYehova kuye, Hamba ubuyele entlango yaseDamasko; ekufikeni kwakho, uthambise uHazayeli, abe ngukumkani wakwa-Aram."
1Kings19:16 uYehu, unyana kaNimsi, wamthambisa ukuba abe ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli; uthambise uElisha, unyana kaShafati, waseAbelemhola, ukuba abe ngumprofeti esikhundleni sakho."
1Kings19:17 Wothi uYehu ambulale osinde ekreleni likaHazayeli; osinde ekreleni likaYehu, uElisha uya kumbulala."
1Kings19:18 Ke ndishiye amaSirayeli angamawaka asixhenxe, angaguqanga amadolo onke kuBhahali, imilebe yonke engekamanga."
1Kings19:19 Wesuka khona, wafumana uElisha, unyana kaShafati, elima, phambi kwakhe ngamahashe alishumi elinamabini; yena engoweshumi elinesibini; uEliya wadlula ngakuye waza waphosa isambatho sakhe sangaphezulu phezu kwakhe."
1Kings19:20 Wazishiya iinkabi, wabaleka emva koEliya, esithi, Makhe ndiye kwanga ubawo noma, ndikulandele ke. Wathi kuye, Buya; ndikwenze ntoni na?"
1Kings19:21 Wabuya ke ekumlandeleni, wazithabatha iinkomo, wabingelela, wayipheka inyama yazo ngezidlele zeenkomo, wanika abantu, badla. Wesuka ke, wamlandela uEliya, wamkhonza."
1Kings20:1 uBhen-hadade ukumkani wakwa-Aram wayihlanganisa yonke impi yakhe, enookumkani abamashumi mathathu anababini, namahashe, neenqwelo zokulwa; wenyuka waya kungqinga umzi wakwaSamari, walwa nawo."
1Kings20:2 Wathumela abathunywa kuAhabhi, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, phakathi komzi, wathi kuye, Utsho uBhen-hadade ukuthi,"
1Kings20:3 Isilivere yakho negolide yakho yeyam; nabafazi bakho nabantwana bakho, abona bahle kakhulu, ngabam."
1Kings20:4 Waphendula ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, wathi, Ngokwelizwi lakho, kumkani, nkosi yam; Ndingowakho, nako konke endinako."
1Kings20:5 Babuya abathunywa, bathi, uBhen-hadade uthe, Noko ndithumele kuwe, ndithi, ndinike isilivere yakho, negolide yakho, nabafazi bakho, nabantwana bakho;"
1Kings20:6 Kodwa ngomso eli xa ndiya kuthumela abakhonzi bam kuwe, kwaye baya kuyihlola indlu yakho nezindlu zabakhonzi bakho; kwaye nantoni na ekholekileyo emehlweni akho baya kuyinikela esandleni sabo, bayithabathe."
1Kings20:7 Wandula ke ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wabiza onke amadoda amakhulu elizwe waza wathi: “Lumkani nize nibone indlela le ndoda ifuna ngayo ububi, ekubeni ithumele kum ibiza abafazi bam nabantwana bam nesilivere yam negolide yam; nam andamkhanyela."
1Kings20:8 Athi kuye onke amadoda amakhulu, nabantu bonke, Musani ukumphulaphula, musani ukukholwa nguye."
1Kings20:9 Wathi kubathunywa bakaBhen-hadade, Nothi enkosini yam ukumkani, Yonke into obumthumele kuyo umkhonzi wakho ngaphambili, ndoyenza; kodwa le nto andiyi kuyenza. Bahamba abathunywa, babuya bamxelela."
1Kings20:10 Wathumela uBhen-hadade kuye, wathi, Oothixo bandenzile, banda ngokunjalo, ukuba luthe uthuli lwakwaSamari lwazala izandla zabantu bonke abandilandelayo."
1Kings20:11 Waphendula ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, wathi, Yithini kuye, Makangaqhayisi onxiba iingubo zakhe, njengozikhululayo."
1Kings20:12 Waliva uBhen-hadade elo lizwi, esasela, yena nookumkani abo ngasezintenteni, wathi kubakhonzi bakhe, Lungisani. Bawuhlasela umzi."
1Kings20:13 Kwabonakala mprofeti uthile, wafika kuAhabhi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, wathi, uYehova uthi, Uyibonile na le ngxokolo ingaka? yabonani, ndiyawunikela esandleni senu namhla; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
1Kings20:14 Wathi uAhabhi, Ngabani na? Wathi uYehova, Ngamadodana abathetheli bamazwe. Wathi, Ngubani na oya kumisela imfazwe? Waphendula ke yena wathi, Wena!"
1Kings20:15 Wawabala amadodana abathetheli bamazwe, aba ngamakhulu amabini anamanci mathathu anamabini; yaye emva kwabo wababala bonke abantu, bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli, bangamawaka asixhenxe."
1Kings20:16 Baphuma ke emva kwemini. Ke uBhen-hadade wanxila ezintenteni, yena nookumkani abamashumi mathathu anababini, ababemncedisa."
1Kings20:17 Aphuma kuqala amadodana abathetheli bamazwe; Wathumela uBhen-hadade ukuba amxelele; kwathiwa, Kufike amadoda kwaSamari."
1Kings20:18 Wathi, Ukuba baphume benoxolo, babambe behleli; ukuba bathe baya emfazweni, babambe behleli;"
1Kings20:19 Aphuma ke la madodana abathetheli bamazwe phakathi komzi, enomkhosi osemva kwawo."
1Kings20:20 Elowo wayibulala indoda yakhe, asaba ama-Aram; AmaSirayeli abasukela, waza uBhen-hadade ukumkani wakwa-Aram wasaba ekhwele ihashe nabakhweli."
1Kings20:21 Waphuma ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, wawaxabela amahashe neenqwelo zokulwa, wawaxabela kakhulu ama-Aram."
1Kings20:22 Wafika umprofeti lowa kukumkani wakwaSirayeli, wathi kuye, Hamba uye kuzomeleza, uhlale, ubone into oya kuyenza; ngokuba ekufikeni komthombo, ukumkani wakwa-Aram uya kukuhlasela."
1Kings20:23 Bathi kuye abakhonzi bokumkani bakwa-Aram, Ngoothixo basezintabeni oothixo babo; ke ngoko bomelele kunathi; kodwa mabalwe entlango, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo siya kuboyisa."
1Kings20:24 Yenza le nto: basuse ookumkani elowo endaweni yakhe, ubeke abathetheli ezingontsini zabo;"
1Kings20:25 Zibale iintendelezo njengeentendelezo zakho, amahashe abe ngangaloo mahashe, inqwelo ngenqwelo; kwaye siya kulwa nabo entlango, kwaye ngokuqinisekileyo siya kubadlula ngamandla. Waliphulaphula ilizwi labo, wenjenjalo."
1Kings20:26 Kwathi ekuqaleni kwentwasahlobo, uBhen-hadade wawabala ama-Aram, wenyuka waya kulwa noonyana bakaSirayeli eAfeki."
1Kings20:27 Babalwa oonyana bakaSirayeli, baba khona bonke, babalwa; ke ama-Aram alizalisa ilizwe."
1Kings20:28 Weza umfo wakwaThixo, wathetha kukumkani wakwaSirayeli, wathi, Kutsho uYehova ukuthi, Ekubeni ethe ama-Aram, NguThixo weentaba uYehova, kodwa akanguThixo weembombo; yonke le ngxokolo ingaka yoyinikela esandleni senu; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
1Kings20:29 Bamisa ke, elowo ekhangelene iintsuku zasixhenxe. Kwabakho imfazwe ngomhla wesixhenxe; oonyana bakaSirayeli babulala kuma-Aram ikhulu lamawaka angumqikela ngamini-nye."
1Kings20:30 Inxenye yasabela eAfeki umzi; lwawa udonga phezu kwamashumi amabini anesixhenxe amawaka amadoda aseleyo. Wasaba uBhen-hadade, wangena engontsini engaphakathi yomzi."
1Kings20:31 Bathi kuye abakhonzi bakhe, Yabona, sivile ukuba ookumkani bendlu kaSirayeli ngookumkani abanenceba; masithi, sibeke iingubo zokulila, sibeke iintshinga ezintlokweni zethu, siphume siye kukumkani wakwaSirayeli;"
1Kings20:32 Babhinqa ke iingubo ezimnyama emanqeni, bekhonkxa ngeentsontelo ezintlokweni zabo, baya kukumkani wakwaSirayeli, bathi, Umkhonzi wakho uBhen-hadade ubesithi, Mawusindise umphefumlo wam. Athi: Usaphila? Ngumntakwethu."
1Kings20:33 Loo madoda ayelumke ukuze abone ukuba kuya kuphuma nto na kuye, akhawuleza ukuyibamba; Bathi, Bhen-hadade, mzalwana. Wathi, Yiyani, nimthabathe. Waphuma uBhen-hadade, waya kuye; kwaye makangene emotweni."
1Kings20:34 Wathi uBhen-hadade kuye, Ndiya kuyibuyisa imizi awayithabathayo ubawo kuyihlo; Uya kuzenzela izitrato eDamasko, njengoko wazenzelayo ubawo kwaSamari. Wathi uAhabhi, Ndiya kukundulula nalo mnqophiso. Wenza isivumelwano naye waza wambuyisa."
1Kings20:35 Wathi omnye koonyana babaprofeti kummelwane wakhe ngelizwi likaYehova, Ndibethe! Akavuma loo mntu ukumbetha."
1Kings20:36 Yathi kuye, Ekubeni ungaliphulaphulanga ilizwi likaYehova, yabona, ukuba uthe wemka kum, ingonyama iya kukubulala. Uthe ke akumshiya, wafunyanwa yingonyama, yambulala."
1Kings20:37 Wafumana mntu wumbi, wathi, Ndibethe. Yandula ke indoda leyo yambetha, kangangokuba yamlimaza ngokumbetha."
1Kings20:38 Wahamba ke umprofeti lowo, wamlinda ukumkani endleleni, wazigqubuthela ngothuthu ubuso bakhe."
1Kings20:39 Wadlula ukumkani, wambiza ukumkani, wathi, Umkhonzi wakho lo uvela edabini; nanko kuphenduka enye indoda, yezisa indoda kum, yathi, Gcina le ndoda;"
1Kings20:40 Wathi akuxakeka ngumkhonzi wakho lo, wemka. Wathi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli kuye, Umgwebo wakho woba wenjenje; Wenze isigqibo."
1Kings20:41 Wakhawuleza walususa uthuthu ebusweni bakhe; yaye ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wamkhetha njengomnye wabaprofeti.
1Kings20:42 Wathi kuye: “Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ekubeni uye wakhulula indoda esandleni sakho endayiwisela umthetho wokuba ayitshabalalise, umphefumlo wakho uya kuba sesikhundleni somphefumlo wayo, nabantu bakho esikhundleni sabantu bayo."
1Kings20:43 Waba buhlungu ukumkani wakwaSirayeli waza wacaphuka endlwini yakhe waza waya eSamariya.
1Kings21:1 Emva koko uNabhoti waseYizereli ebenesidiliya eYizereli kufuphi nebhotwe lika-Ahabhi ukumkani waseSamariya.
1Kings21:2 Wathetha uAhabhi kuNabhoti, wathi, Ndinike isidiliya sakho, ndisenze umyezo wemifuno, ngokuba sikufuphi nendlu yam; kwaye ngenxa yoko ndiya kukunika isidiliya esilungileyo kunesi; okanye ukuba kulungile, ndokunika ixabiso layo ngemali."
1Kings21:3 Wathi uNabhoti kuAhabhi, Ngamana uYehova angandithintela ekukunikeni ilifa loobawo!"
1Kings21:4 Wangena uAhabhi endlwini yakhe, ethe khunubembe, equmbile, lilizwi abelithethile kuye uNabhoti waseYizereli; ngokuba wathi, Andiyi kukunika ilifa loobawo. Walala esingqengqelweni sakhe, wabujika ubuso bakhe, akadla sonka."
1Kings21:5 Weza kuye uIzebhele umkakhe, wathi kuye, Yini na ukuba ube mbi umphefumlo wakho, ungadli sonka?"
1Kings21:6 Wathi kuye, Ngokuba ndithethe noNabhoti waseYizereli, ndathi kuye, Ndinike isidiliya sakho ngemali; okanye, ukuba uyavuma, ndokunika esinye isidiliya esikhundleni saso; waphendula wathi, Andiyi kukunika isidiliya sam."
1Kings21:7 Wathi uIzebhele, umkakhe, kuye, Nguwe na olawula ebukumkanini bakwaSirayeli? Vuka, udle isonka, igcobe intliziyo yakho; Ndiza kukunika isidiliya sikaNabhoti waseYizereli."
1Kings21:8 Wabhala iincwadi egameni lika-Ahabhi waza waziqinisa ngetywina lakhe, wazithumela ezo ncwadi kumadoda amakhulu nakwizidwangube ezazihlala kwisixeko sakhe esasihlala noNabhoti."
1Kings21:9 Wabhala kwezo ncwadi, wathi, Memezani umhla wokudla, nimmise uNabhoti encotsheni yabantu."
1Kings21:10 Kwabekwa phambi kwakhe amadoda amabini angamatshijolo, ukuba angqine ngaye, athi, Uthuke uThixo nokumkani; nimkhuphele phandle, nimxulube ngamatye, afe."
1Kings21:11 Amadoda omzi wakowabo, izikhulu nabanumzana ababehlala emzini wakhe, enza njengoko abewathumele uIzebhele, njengoko kubhaliweyo ezincwadini zakhe;"
1Kings21:12 Bavakalisa ukuba kuzilwe ukutya, baza bammisa uNabhoti endaweni ephakamileyo phakathi kwabantu."
1Kings21:13 Kwangena amadoda amabini, oonyana bakaBheliyali, ahlala phambi kwakhe, aza loo madoda angamatshijolo anikela ubungqina nxamnye noNabhoti phambi kwabantu, esithi: “uNabhoti uthuke uThixo nokumkani. Bamkhuphela ngaphandle komzi, bamgibisela ngamatye, wafa."
1Kings21:14 Bathumela kuIzebhele, bathi, uNabhoti ugityiselwe ngamatye, wafa."
1Kings21:15 Wathi uIzebhele akuva ukuba uNabhoti ugityiselwe ngamatye wafa, uIzebhele wathi kuAhabhi: “Sukuma, uthabathe isidiliya sikaNabhoti waseYizereli, abengafuni ukukunika sona ngemali, kuba uNabhoti akaphilanga kodwa bafile."
1Kings21:16 Weva uAhabhi ukuba uNabhoti ufile, wesuka wehla, waya kusilungisa isidiliya sikaNabhoti waseYizereli."
1Kings21:17 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuEliya Motishebhe, lisithi:"
1Kings21:18 Suka, uhle, uye kukhawulela uAhabhi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli okwaSamari; Nanko esesidiliyeni sikaNabhoti, apho ubehle waya kusisebenza."
1Kings21:19 Uze uthethe kuye uthi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ubulele na, waba sisityebi na? Uze uthethe kuye, uthi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Apho izinja zalixhaphela khona igazi likaNabhoti, ziya kulingcamla izinja igazi lakho, elilelakho;"
1Kings21:20 Wathi uAhabhi kuEliya, Undifumene na, lutshaba lwam? Wathi yena, Ndikufumene, ngenxa yokuba uzithengisele ukwenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova."
1Kings21:21 Yabona, ndikuzisela ububi, ndiyithabathile imbewu yakho, ndinqumle kuAhabhi olwela udonga, nomthinjwa oseleyo kwaSirayeli;"
1Kings21:22 ndoyenza indlu yakho ibe njengendlu kaYarobheham unyana kaNebhati, nanjengendlu kaBhahesa unyana ka-Ahiya, ngenxa yezingcikivo owamngcikiva ngazo amaSirayeli."
1Kings21:23 Wathetha uYehova ngoIzebhele, wathi, uIzebhele eludongeni lwaseYizereli uya kudliwa zizinja."
1Kings21:24 Nabani na ka-Ahabhi ofela esixekweni uya kudliwa zizinja; yaye nabani na ofela endle wodliwa ziintaka zezulu.
1Kings21:25 Kodwa akukho bani unjengoAhabhi owazithengisela ukwenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, owazala uIzebhele umfazi wakhe."
1Kings21:26 Waqhubeka esenza izinto ezininzi ezicekisekayo ngokulandela izithixo ezinezothe, kanye njengoko enzayo ama-Amori awayewagxothe uYehova phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
1Kings21:27 Akuweva uAhabhi loo mazwi, wazikrazula iingubo zakhe, wabeka ezirhwexayo emzimbeni, wazila ukudla, walala enxibe ezirhwexayo, wahamba ecotha."
1Kings21:28 Lafika ilizwi likaYehova kuEliya waseTishbhe, lisithi:"
1Kings21:29 Ubonile na, ukuzithoba kwakhe uAhabhi phambi kwam? ngenxa enokuba ezithobile phambi kwam, andiyi kuzisa bubi ngexesha lakhe; ndiya kuyizisela ububi indlu yakhe ngemihla yonyana wakhe."
1Kings22:1 Bahlala iminyaka emithathu, kungekho mfazwe phakathi kwama-Aram namaSirayeli."
1Kings22:2 Ngomnyaka wesithathu uYehoshafati, ukumkani wakwaYuda, wehla waya kukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
1Kings22:3 Wathi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli kubakhonzi bakhe, Niyazi na ukuba iRamoti yaseGiliyadi yeyethu, ukuba sithe cwaka nje, singayihluthi esandleni sokumkani wakwa-Aram?"
1Kings22:4 Wathi kuYehoshafati, Wohamba na nam, siye eRamoti yaseGiliyadi? Wathi uYehoshafati kukumkani wakwaSirayeli, Ndinjengawe; abantu bam banjengabantu bakho, namahashe am anjengamahashe akho."
1Kings22:5 Wathi uYehoshafati kukumkani wakwaSirayeli, Cela ilizwi likaYehova namhla."
1Kings22:6 Wababiza ukumkani wakwaSirayeli abaprofeti, bekumakhulu amane amadoda, wathi kubo, Ndiye kulwa na neRamoti yaseGiliyadi, ndiyikhulule, kusini na? Athi, Nyuka; ngokuba uYehova uya kuyinikela esandleni sokumkani."
1Kings22:7 Wathi uYehoshafati, Akukho mprofeti kaYehova na apha?"
1Kings22:8 Wathi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli kuYehoshafati, Kusekho enye indoda, enguMika, unyana kaImla, esingabuza ngayo kuYehova; ke mna ndimthiyile; ngokuba ayiprofeti okulungileyo ngam, nokuba ayiyimbi. Wathi uYehoshafati, Makangatsho uYehova."
1Kings22:9 Waza ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wabiza umphathiswa, wathi, Khawuleza uze apha uMika unyana kaImla."
1Kings22:10 Ukumkani wakwaSirayeli noYehoshafati, ukumkani wakwaYuda, behleli elowo etroneni yakhe, benxibe iingubo zabo elubala, ekungeneni kwesango lakwaSamari; yaye bonke abaprofeti babeprofeta phambi kwabo."
1Kings22:11 uZedekiya, unyana kaKenan, wazenzela iimpondo zesinyithi, wathi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ngezi mpondo uya kuwahlaba ama-Aram, uwatshabalalise."
1Kings22:12 Bonke abaprofeti benjenjalo ukuprofeta, besithi, Nyuka uye eRamoti yaseGiliyadi, ube nempumelelo; ngokuba uYehova uya kuyinikela esandleni sokumkani."
1Kings22:13 Umthunywa obembizile uMika wathetha kuye, wathi, Yabona, amazwi abaprofeti athetha kakuhle ngamlomo mnye kukumkani; ilizwi lakho malibe njengelizwi labo, uthethe okulungileyo."
1Kings22:14 Wathi uMika, Ehleli nje uYehova, oko uYehova aya kukuthetha kum, ndiya kukuxela."
1Kings22:15 Wandula ke waya kukumkani. Wathi uYehova kuye, Mika, siye na siye kulwa neRamoti yaseGiliyadi, siyishiye, kusini na? Wathi kuye, Hamba uphumelele, ngokuba uYehova uya kuyinikela esandleni sokumkani."
1Kings22:16 Wathi ukumkani kuye, Makube zizihlandlo ezingaphi na ndikufungela, ukuba akuyi kundixelela nto yimbi, ingeyiyo nyaniso egameni likaYehova?"
1Kings22:17 Wathi, Ndibone amaSirayeli onke elusali ezintabeni, njengeegusha ezingenamalusi; Wathi uYehova, Abanankosi; mababuyele elowo endlwini yakhe ngoxolo."
1Kings22:18 Wathi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli kuYehoshafati, Bendingatshongo na kuwe ukuthi, akayi kuprofeta okulungileyo ngenxa yam, woprofeta okubi?"
1Kings22:19 Wathi, Khanive ilizwi likaYehova: Ndimbonile uYehova ehleli etroneni yakhe, umi wonke umkhosi wasemazulwini phambi kwakhe, ngasekunene kwakhe nangasekhohlo kwakhe."
1Kings22:20 Waza uYehova wathi: “Ngubani na oya kukhokelela uAhabhi enyuka aze abulawelwe eRamoti yaseGiliyadi? Watsho omnye leya, nomnye wathi."
1Kings22:21 Kwaphuma omnye umoya, wema phambi koYehova, wathi, Ndomlukuhla mna."
1Kings22:22 Wathi uYehova kuye, Ngani na? Wathi yena, Ndoya ndibe ngumoya wobuxoki emlonyeni wabaprofeti bakhe bonke. Wathi ke yena, Uze umeyise, uloyise kananjalo; phuma uyekwenza."
1Kings22:23 Uyabona ke, uYehova ungenise umoya wobuxoki emlonyeni wabo baprofeti bakho bonke; uYehova uthethe okubi ngawe."
1Kings22:24 Wesuka uZedekiya, unyana kaKanan, wafika wambetha uMika esidleleni, wathi, Ugqithe ngayiphi na indlela kum uMoya kaYehova, ukuba aye kuthetha kuwe?"
1Kings22:25 Wathi uMika, Yabona, woyibona loo mini, ukuba uthe wangena egumbini, wazimela."
1Kings22:26 Wathi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, Mthabathe uMika, umse kuAmon umphathi womzi, nakuYowashe unyana wokumkani;"
1Kings22:27 Wathi ukumkani, Yifakeni entolongweni le ndoda, niyinike isonka sokubandezeleka namanzi okubandezeleka, ndide ndibuye ndinoxolo."
1Kings22:28 Wathi uMika, Ukuba uthe wabuya unoxolo, woba uYehova akathethanga ngam. Wandula ke wathi: Phulaphulani, nonke ngabanye!"
1Kings22:29 Wenyuka ukumkani wakwaSirayeli noYehoshafati, ukumkani wakwaYuda, baya eRamoti yaseGiliyadi."
1Kings22:30 Wathi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli kuYehoshafati, Ndiya kuzenza mntu wumbi, ndingene ekulweni; kodwa nxibani iimpahla zenu. Wazenza mntu wumbi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, wangena ekulweni."
1Kings22:31 Ukumkani wakwa-Aram wabawisela umthetho abathetheli beenqwelo zakhe zokulwa ezimashumi mathathu anababini, wathi, Ize ningalwi nomfana nomkhulu; ize ningalwi nokumkani wakwaSirayeli;"
1Kings22:32 Bambona uYehoshafati abathetheli beenqwelo zokulwa, bathi, Nanku ukumkani wakwaSirayeli; Bajika ke, beza kulwa naye, uYehoshafati wamcel’ umngeni."
1Kings22:33 Babona abathetheli beenqwelo zokulwa ukuba akanguye ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, bajika, bamsukela;"
1Kings22:34 Indoda ethile yatola isaphetha, yasinda, yambulala ukumkani wakwaSirayeli ekuhlanganeni kotolo kuba ndonzakele."
1Kings22:35 Ukulwa kwenyuka loo mini, ukumkani wahlala enqwelweni yakhe emelene nama-Aram, wafa ngokuhlwa;"
1Kings22:36 Lakutshona ilanga, kwavakala isikhalo phakathi komkhosi wonke, sisithi, Elowo makaye emzini wakowabo, elowo aye ezweni lakowabo."
1Kings22:37 Wafa ke ukumkani, waziswa kwaSamari; bamngcwabela ukumkani kwaSamari."
1Kings22:38 Bayihlamba inqwelo edikeni lakwaSamari; zalixhapha izinja igazi lakhe; bazihlamba izixhobo zakhe; ngokwelizwi likaYehova awalithethayo.
1Kings22:39 Ezinye izinto zika-Ahabhi, nako konke awakwenzayo, nendlu awayakhayo ngeempondo zeendlovu, nemizi yonke awayakhayo, azibhalwanga na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli?"
1Kings22:40 Walala uAhabhi kuyise; unyana wakhe uAhaziya waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe.
1Kings22:41 uYehoshafati, unyana ka-Asa, waba ngukumkani kwaYuda ngomnyaka wesine ka-Ahabhi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
1Kings22:42 uYehoshafati ubeminyaka imashumi mathathu anamihlanu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emashumi mabini anamihlanu engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguAsubha, intombi kaSilehi."
1Kings22:43 Wahamba ngeendlela zonke zika-Asa uyise; makangaphambuki ekwenzeni okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova; ke iziganga azisuswanga; kuba abantu babesabingelela kwiindawo eziphakamileyo yaye beqhumisa.
1Kings22:44 uYehoshafati wenza uxolo nokumkani wakwaSirayeli;
1Kings22:45 Ezinye izinto zikaYehoshafati, nobugorha bakhe awawenzayo, nokulwa kwakhe, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaYuda?"
1Kings22:46 Ke amasalela aseSodom, awasalayo ngemihla kayise uAsa, wawagxotha ezweni."
1Kings22:47 Bekungekho kumkani kwaEdom ngelo xesha; ibamba libe ngukumkani.
1Kings22:48 uYehoshafati wakha iinqanawa ezisuka eTarshishe ukuya kwaOfire, ukuba ziqokelele igolide; ke abemka; ngokuba iinqanawa zaphuka e-Esionngeber."
1Kings22:49 Wathi uAhaziya, unyana ka-Ahabhi, kuYehoshafati, Abakhonzi bam mabahambe nabakhonzi bakho ngeenqanawa. Akavuma uYehoshafati."
1Kings22:50 uYehoshafati walala kooyise, wangcwatyelwa kooyise emzini kaDavide uyise; unyana wakhe uYehoram waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
1Kings22:51 uAhaziya, unyana ka-Ahabhi, waba ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli eSamariya ngomnyaka weshumi elinesixhenxe kaYehoshafati ukumkani wakwaYuda, waba ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli iminyaka emibini."
1Kings22:52 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, wahamba ngeendlela zikayise, nangeendlela zikanina, nangeendlela zikaYarobheham unyana kaNebhati, obekhokele kwaSirayeli;"
1Kings22:53 Ngenxa yokuba wakhonza uBhahali waza waqubuda kuye waza wamdelela uYehova uThixo kaSirayeli kanye njengoko wenzayo uyise.
2Kings1:1 Wakreqa ke amaMowabhi kumaSirayeli emva kokufa kuka-Ahabhi.
2Kings1:2 uAhaziya wawa efestileni yegumbi lakhe eliphezulu kwaSamari, wahliwa kukufa; wathuma abathunywa, wathi kubo, Hambani niye kubuzisa kuBhahali-zebhubhi, uthixo wase-Ekron, ukuba ndiya kuphila na kwesi sifo."
2Kings1:3 Sathi isithunywa sikaYehova kuEliya waseTishbha, Hamba uye kukhawulela abathunywa bokumkani wakwaSamari, uthethe kubo, uthi, Kungokuba kungekho Thixo kwaSirayeli na, ukuya kubuzisa kuBhahali-zebhule uthixo wase-Ekron?"
2Kings1:4 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova ukuthi, Akusayi kuhla kuloo mandlalo ukhwele kuwo, kodwa uya kufa ngonaphakade. Wahamba ke uEliya."
2Kings1:5 Babuyela kuye abathunywa, wathi kubo, Yini na ukuba nibuye?"
2Kings1:6 Bathi kuye, Kufike indoda, yeza kusikhawulela, yathi kuthi, Hambani nibuyele kukumkani onithumileyo, nithi kuye, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Kungokuba kungekho Thixo na? Sirayeli, ukuba uthe wathumela kubuzisa kuBhahali-zebhubhi, uthixo wase-Ekron? ke ngoko, akusayi kuhla kuloo mandlalo unyuke kuwo, inene, uya kufa."
2Kings1:7 Wathi kubo, Ebenjani na ke yena lowo wahlangana nani, wathetha kuni la mazwi?"
2Kings1:8 Bathi ke bona kuye, Indoda leyo, eneenwele ezinde, ebhinqe umbhinqo wentlonze esinqeni sayo. Wathi, Lo nguEliya waseTishbhe."
2Kings1:9 Ukumkani wathumela kuye umthetheli-mashumi-mahlanu, enamashumi omahlanu akhe. Wenyuka waya kuye, wambona ehleli encotsheni yenduli; Wathi kuye, Mfo wakwaThixo, uthe ukumkani, Yihla."
2Kings1:10 Waphendula uEliya, wathi kumthetheli-mashumi-mahlanu, Ukuba ke ndingumfo wakwaThixo, makuhle umlilo ezulwini, ukutshise wena namashumi omahlanu akho. Kwehla umlilo ezulwini, wamtshisa yena namashumi omahlanu akhe."
2Kings1:11 Waphinda wamthumela kuye omnye umthetheli-mashumi-mahlanu, enamashumi omahlanu akhe. Waphendula wathi kuye, Mfo wakwaThixo, uthi ukumkani, Yihla ngokukhawuleza."
2Kings1:12 Waphendula uEliya, wathi kubo, Ukuba ke ndingumfo wakwaThixo, makuhle umlilo ezulwini, ukutshise wena namashumi omahlanu akho. Wehla umlilo kaThixo ezulwini, wamtshisa yena namashumi omahlanu akhe."
2Kings1:13 Waphinda wathuma nowesithathu umthetheli-mashumi-mahlanu, enamashumi omahlanu akhe. Wenyuka ke owesithathu umthetheli-mashumi-mahlanu, waguqa ngamadolo phambi koEliya, wathandaza kuye, wathi kuye, Camagu, mfo wakwaThixo, wusindise umphefumlo wam, nomphefumlo waba bakhonzi bakho bamashumi mahlanu! zixabiseke emehlweni akho."
2Kings1:14 Uyabona, kwehla umlilo ezulwini, wabadla ookumkani bobabini babokuqala, kunye namashumi omahlanu abo; ke ngoko umphefumlo wam uya kunqaba emehlweni akho."
2Kings1:15 Sathi isithunywa sikaYehova kuEliya, Yihla naye; musani ukumoyika. Wesuka wehla naye waya kukumkani."
2Kings1:16 Wathi kuye, Kutsho uYehova ukuthi, Kungokuba kungekho Thixo kwaSirayeli na, le nto uthume abathunywa bokubuza kuBhahali-zebhubhe, uthixo wase-Ekron? ke ngoko, akusayi kuhla kuloo mandlalo unyuke kuwo, inene, uya kufa."
2Kings1:17 Wafa ngokwelizwi likaYehova elathethwa nguEliya. Waba ngukumkani uYoram esikhundleni sakhe, ngomnyaka wesibini kaYoram unyana kaYehoshafati, ukumkani wakwaYuda; ngokuba ebengenanyana."
2Kings1:18 Ezinye izinto zika-Ahaziya awazenzayo, azibhalwanga na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli?"
2Kings2:1 Xa uYehova wathabatha uEliya wamsa ezulwini ngesaqhwithi, uEliya wemka eGiligali noElisha."
2Kings2:2 Wathi uEliya kuElisha, Khawuhlale apha; ngokuba uYehova undithume eBheteli. Wathi uElisha kuye, NgoYehova ovayo, nangomphefumlo wakho ophilileyo, andiyi kwahlukana nawe. Emva koko behla baya eBheteli."
2Kings2:3 Baphuma oonyana babaprofeti baseBheteli, baya kuElisha, bathi kuye, Uyazi na kodwa ukuba kutheni na namhlanje uYehova ayisuse inkosi yakho entlokweni yakho? Waphendula ke yena wathi, Ewe, ndiyazi; thula."
2Kings2:4 Wathi uEliya kuye, Elisha, hlala apha; ngokuba uYehova undithume eYeriko. Wathi yena, NgoYehova ovayo, nangomphefumlo wakho ophilileyo, andiyi kwahlukana nawe. Bafika eYeriko."
2Kings2:5 Beza oonyana babaprofeti baseYeriko kuElisha, bathi kuye, Uyazi na kodwa ukuthi, yini na ukuba namhla uYehova ayisuse inkosi yakho entlokweni yakho? Waphendula ke yena wathi, Ewe, ndiyazi; thula."
2Kings2:6 Wathi uEliya kuye, Hlala apha; ngokuba uYehova undithume eYordan. Wathi yena, NgoYehova ovayo, nangomphefumlo wakho ophilileyo, andiyi kwahlukana nawe. Bahamba bobabini."
2Kings2:7 Kwahamba amadoda amashumi mahlanu koonyana babaprofeti, ema ekhangele emgama; bema bobabini ngaseYordan."
2Kings2:8 uEliya wayithabatha ingubo yakhe yangaphezulu, wayisonga, wabetha ngayo emanzini;"
2Kings2:9 Badlula, wathi uEliya kuElisha, Cela into, ndikwenzele, ingekasuswa kuwe. Wathi uElisa, Zahlulo ezibini zomphefumlo wakho zibe phezu kwam."
2Kings2:10 Wathi, Ucele into enzima; kodwa ukuba undibonile ndisusiwe kuwe, koba njalo nakuwe; ukuba akunjalo, akuyi kuba njalo."
2Kings2:11 Bathe besathetha, kwabonakala inqwelo yomlilo namahashe omlilo, yabadla bobabini; wenyuka uEliya ngomoya ovuthuzayo, waya emazulwini."
2Kings2:12 uElisha wakubona oko, wadanduluka, wathi, Bawo, bawo, nqwelo yokulwa yakwaSirayeli nabakhwele kuyo! Akaba sambona, wazithabatha iingubo zakhe, wazikrazula ngencakuba."
2Kings2:13 Wayithabatha ingubo enkulu kaEliya, eyayiwe kuye, wabuya, wema elunxwemeni lweYordan;"
2Kings2:14 Wayithabatha ingubo enkulu kaEliya, eyayiwe kuye, wabetha ngayo emanzini, wathi, Uphi na uYehova, uThixo kaEliya, yena kanye? wawabetha amanzi, ahlukana, wawela uElisha."
2Kings2:15 Bambona oonyana babaprofeti ababeseYeriko, bathi, Umoya kaEliya uhleli kuElisha. Bamhlangabeza baza baqubuda kuye."
2Kings2:16 Bathi kuye, Yabona, kukho amashumi amahlanu amadoda anobukroti nabakhonzi bakho; Mabahambe baye kufuna ukumkani wakho, hleze uMoya kaYehova ungamfukuli, umjulele kwenye intaba, nokuba kwenye intili. Wathi, Musani ukuthumela."
2Kings2:17 Bamjongisa wada waneentloni, besithi: “Roma! Bawathuma ke amadoda amashumi mahlanu; Amfuna iintsuku zantathu, akamfumana."
2Kings2:18 Akufika kuye, ehleli eYeriko, wathi kuwo, Ndibe ndingatshongo na kuni ukuthi, Musani ukuya?"
2Kings2:19 Athi amadoda aloo mzi kuElisha, Uyabona, ukuma kwalo mzi kuhle, njengoko ibonayo inkosi yam; ke amanzi akanamntu, nelizwe lilugwadule."
2Kings2:20 Wathi, Ndiziseleni isitya esitsha, nigalele ityuwa kuso. Bayizisa kuye."
2Kings2:21 Waphuma, waya emthonjeni wamanzi, wagalela ityuwa kuwo, wathi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ndiwaqinise la manzi; akusayi kuba sabakho kufa naluqweqwe lwazo."
2Kings2:22 Amanzi lawo aphila unanamhla, ngokwelizwi likaElisha awalithethayo."
2Kings2:23 Wemka khona, waya eBheteli; kwathi esasendleleni, kwathi gqi abantwana baloo mzi, bahlekisa ngaye, bathi kuye, nkqayindini, nyuka! nyuka, ntloko inenkqayi."
2Kings2:24 Wajika, wabakhangela, wawaqalekisa egameni likaYehova. Kwavela iimazi zamabhere ezimbini ehlathini, zazala amashumi amane anambini amathole."
2Kings2:25 Wesuka khona waya entabeni yeKarmele, wesuka khona wabuyela kwaSamari."
2Kings3:1 uYoram, unyana ka-Ahabhi, waba ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli kwaSamari, ngomnyaka weshumi elinesithoba nowesibini kaYehoshafati ukumkani wakwaYuda; waba neminyaka elishumi elinamibini engukumkani."
2Kings3:2 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova; kodwa akaba njengoyise nanjengonina, ngenxa enokuba wawususayo umfanekiso kaBhahali, awawenzayo uyise."
2Kings3:3 Wanamathela ezonweni zikaYarobheham unyana kaNebhati, awawonisa ngazo amaSirayeli; akatyeka kuyo."
2Kings3:4 uMesha, ukumkani wakwaMowabhi, ubengumalusi, wabuyisela kukumkani wakwaSirayeli ikhulu lamawaka eemvana, nekhulu lamawaka eenkunzi zeegusha ezinoboya."
2Kings3:5 Wathi akufa uAhabhi, wakreqa ukumkani wakwaMowabhi kukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
2Kings3:6 Ngelo xesha ukumkani uYoram waphuma eSamariya waza wawabala onke amaSirayeli.
2Kings3:7 Waphuma, wathumela kuYehoshafati ukumkani wakwaYuda, esithi, Undijikile ukumkani wakwaMowabhi; Wohamba nam siye kulwa namaMowabhi? Wathi, Ndiya kunyuka ndiye, ndinjengani; abantu bam banjengabantu bakho, amahashe am anjengamahashe akho."
2Kings3:8 Wathi, Sonyuka ngayiphi na indlela? Wathi, Yindlela yentlango yakwaEdom."
2Kings3:9 Wahamba ke ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, nokumkani wakwaYuda, nokumkani wakwaEdom, bahamba uhambo olude lweentsuku ezisixhenxe;"
2Kings3:10 Wathi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, Yoo! uYehova wabahlanganisa abo kumkani bathathu ukuze abanikele esandleni sikaMowabhi."
2Kings3:11 Wathi uYehoshafati, Akukho mprofeti kaYehova na apha, esinokubuza ngaye kuYehova? Waphendula omnye wakubakhonzi bokumkani wakwaSirayeli, wathi, Lo nguElisha, unyana kaShafati, obegalela amanzi esandleni sikaEliya."
2Kings3:12 Wathi uYehoshafati, Ilizwi likaYehova linaye. Wehla ke ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, noYehoshafati, nokumkani wakwaEdom, baya kuye."
2Kings3:13 Wathi ke uElisha kukumkani wakwaSirayeli, Yintoni na enam nawe? Hambani niye kubaprofeti bakayihlo, nakubaprofeti bakanyoko. Wathi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli kuye, Hayi, ngokuba uYehova ubabizele aba kumkani bathathu, ukuba abanikele esandleni sikaMowabhi."
2Kings3:14 Wathi uElisha, Ehleli nje uYehova wemikhosi, endimi phambi kwakhe, inene, ukuba bendingambonanga uYehoshafati, ukumkani wakwaYuda, ndingakubhekanga khona, ndingakubonanga."
2Kings3:15 Ndiziseleni ke ngoko umkhonzi. Ke kaloku, esamemeza umkhonzi, isandla seNkosi saba phezu kwakhe."
2Kings3:16 Wathi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yizaliseni le ntili ngemingxuma;"
2Kings3:17 Ngokuba wathi uYehova, Aniyi kubona moya namvula; kodwa loo ntlambo iya kuzala amanzi, nisele nina, neenkomo zenu, neenkomo zenu."
2Kings3:18 Le nto incinane emehlweni kaYehova: uya kuwanikela amaMowabhi esandleni senu.
2Kings3:19 Noyithimba yonke imizi enqatyisiweyo, nemizi yonke enyuliweyo, niyigawule yonke imithi emihle, niyivingce yonke imithombo yamanzi, niyitshabalalise ngamatye ummandla welizwe elihle ngamatye."
2Kings3:20 Kwathi ngomso, lakuziswa idini elinyukayo, kwafika amanzi endleleni eya kwaEdom, lazala ilizwe ngamanzi."
2Kings3:21 Eva ke onke amaMowabhi ukuba benyukile ookumkani, besiza kulwa nawo, abutha bonke abaxhobileyo, bema emdeni."
2Kings3:22 Bavuka kusasa, ilanga labengezela emanzini, awabona amaMowabhi amanzi ebomvu njengegazi."
2Kings3:23 Bathi ke bona: “Ligazi eli! phanga ngoku, Mowabhi."
2Kings3:24 Bafika ke emkhosini wakwaSirayeli, bagqiba oonyana bakaSirayeli ukuwaxabela amaMowabhi, asaba phambi kwawo; kodwa bemka, bawaxabela amaMowabhi ezweni lawo."
2Kings3:25 Bayidiliza imizi; bawavala onke amaqula, bagawula yonke imithi enencasa kodwa izilingi ziyajikeleza kwaye ziphumelele."
2Kings3:26 Wathi akubona ukumkani wakwaMowabhi ukuba imfazwe inzima kuye, wathabatha amadoda angamakhulu asixhenxe arhola ikrele kunye naye, ukuze atyhobozelele kukumkani wakwaEdom;"
2Kings3:27 Wathabatha unyana wakhe wamazibulo, owaba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe, wenza idini elinyukayo phezu kodonga. Wavutha kunene ngumsindo uSirayeli, amshiya, abuyela ezweni lawo."
2Kings4:1 Ke kaloku umfazi othile woonyana babaprofeti wakhala kuElisha, esithi, Umkhonzi wakho, indoda yam, ubhubhile; yaye wena uyazi ukuba umkhonzi wakho wayemoyika uYehova, waza umbolekisi weza kubathabatha oonyana bam bobabini ukuba babe ngamakhoboka akhe."
2Kings4:2 Wathi uElisha kuye, Ndikwenzele ntoni na? khawutsho unantoni apha endlini? Wathi, Umkhonzazana wakho akananto endlwini, yingqayi yeoli yodwa."
2Kings4:3 Sathi, Hamba uye kuboleka iiemele ezingenanto kubamelwane bakho bonke; musa ukuboleka iperi."
2Kings4:4 Ekungeneni kwakho, utshixe ucango, wena noonyana bakho, uzikhuphe zonke ezo zitya, uze uzibeke ecaleni."
2Kings4:5 Wasuka ke, wamvalela yena noonyana bakhe, bamzisela izitya; wagabha."
2Kings4:6 Kwathi, zakuzala iingqayi, wathi kunyana wakhe, Ndizise enye into. Wathi kuye, Akusekho umphanda; Yahlala ke ioli."
2Kings4:7 Emva koko weza waxelela umfo wakwaThixo loo nyaniso. Wathi yena, Hamba uye kuthengisa ngeoli, uhlawule ityala lakho, uze wena nabantwana bakho nidle ubomi obunye."
2Kings4:8 Kwathi ngamhla uthile, uElisha wawela, waya eShunem, apho kwakukho umfazi omkhulu; wamnyanzela ukuba adle isonka. Wadlula apho, wajika ukuba adle isonka."
2Kings4:9 Wathi endodeni yakhe, Yabona, ndiyaqonda ukuba lo mfo ungcwele wakwaThixo umana egqitha apha."
2Kings4:10 Masenze igumbi elincinane ngaseludongeni; simbekele ibhedi, netafile, nesitulo, nesibane; wothi, xa athe weza kuthi, ajike."
2Kings4:11 Wafika khona ngamhla uthile, wangena egumbini, walala khona."
2Kings4:12 Wathi kuGehazi umkhonzi wakhe, Biza laa mfazi waseShunem. Uthe akumbiza, wema ecaleni kwakhe."
2Kings4:13 Uthe ke yena kuye, Kungokunje uthi kuye, Uyabona, usinyamekele ngayo yonke le nyameko; Kufuneka wenzelwe ntoni? Niya kusiwa kukumkani, nokuba kukumthetheli wenkundla? Wathi yena: Ndihleli phakathi kwabantu bakowethu."
2Kings4:14 Wathi, Makwenziwe ntoni na? Waphendula uGehazi, wathi, Akanamntwana; nendoda yakhe yaluphele."
2Kings4:15 Wathi, Mbizeni. Uthe xa embiza wema emnyango."
2Kings4:16 Wathi, Ngeli xesha nyakenye uya kunxiba inkwenkwe. Wathi, Hayi, nkosi yam, mfo wakwaThixo, musa ukumxokisa umkhonzazana wakho."
2Kings4:17 Wamitha ke umfazi lowo, wazala unyana ngelo xesha limisiweyo lanyakenye, abelithethile uElisha kuye."
2Kings4:18 Akukhula umntwana, ngamhla uthile waya kuyise kubavuni."
2Kings4:19 Wathi kuyise, Intloko yam, intloko yam! Wathi kumfana, Mse kunina."
2Kings4:20 Wamthabatha, wamsa kunina, wahlala emathangeni akhe kwada kwasemini enkulu, wafa."
2Kings4:21 Wenyuka waya kumlalisa emandlalweni womntu kaTHIXO oyinyaniso waza wamvalela ucango waphuma.
2Kings4:22 Wandula ke wabiza indoda yakhe, wathi: “Ndithumele omnye wabafana nenye yeemazi zamaesile, khe ndibaleke ndiye kumfo wakwaThixo oyinyaniso ndize ndibuye.”"
2Kings4:23 Wathi, Ungathini na ukuya kuye namhla? asikuthwasa kwenyanga, asiyisabatha. Wathi yena, Kuya kulunga."
2Kings4:24 Wayibopha iesile, wathi kumfana lowo, Hamba ukhwele; Ungandilibali ngaphandle kokuba ndikuxelele."
2Kings4:25 Wahamba ke waya kufika kumfo wakwaThixo oyinyaniso eNtabeni yeKarmele. Wambona umfo wakwaThixo esekude, wathi kuGehazi umkhonzi wakhe, Nankuya apho umShunemikazi."
2Kings4:26 Gidima uye kumkhawulela, uthi kuye, Uphilile na? Uphilile na umyeni wakho? uphilile umntwana? Waphendula ke wathi, Kulungile."
2Kings4:27 Akufika kumfo kaTHIXO oyinyaniso endulini, wambamba ngeenyawo; wasondela uGehazi ukuba amsunduze. Wathi umfo wakwaThixo, Makalinde; ngokuba umphefumlo wakhe ukrakra phakathi kwakhe, uYehova undifihlele le nto, akandityhilela;"
2Kings4:28 Wathi, Ndakha ndacela unyana yini na enkosini yam? Khange ndithi: Ungandixokisi?"
2Kings4:29 Wathi kuGehazi, Bhinqa isinqe sakho, uthabathe umsimelelo wam ngesandla sakho, uhambe; xa uthe wadibana nomntu, uze ungambulisi; ukuba uthe wabulisa, uze ungaphindi umphendule; ndibeke intonga yam ebusweni benkwenkwe."
2Kings4:30 Wathi unina womntwana, NgoYehova ovayo, uphile umphefumlo wakho, andiyi kwahlukana nawe. Waphakama wamlandela."
2Kings4:31 Wasondela uGehazi kubo, wawubeka umsimelelo ebusweni benkwenkwe; kodwa kwakungekho lizwi nabaphulaphuli. Ngoko waphinda waya kumhlangabeza waza wamxelela waza wathi: “Umntwana akavukanga.”"
2Kings4:32 Wangena ke uElisha endlwini, wafumana inkwenkwe ifile, ilele esingqengqelweni sakhe."
2Kings4:33 Wangena, walutshixa ucango, bebobabini; wathandaza kuYehova."
2Kings4:34 Wenyuka, wangqengqa phezu komntwana lowo, wabeka umlomo wakhe emlonyeni wakhe, namehlo akhe phezu kwamehlo akhe, nezandla zakhe phezu kwezandla zakhe; yafudumala inyama yomntwana."
2Kings4:35 Wabuya, wasinga ngapha kwakanye, wasinga ngapha kwakanye, wahamba endlwini; Yenyuka, wazolula phezu kwakhe, yathimla inkwenkwe izihlandlo ezisixhenxe, yawavula inkwenkwe amehlo ayo."
2Kings4:36 Wabiza uGehazi, wathi, Biza laa mkaShunem. Yiyo loo nto emfownelayo. Efikile ke kuye, wathi, Thabatha unyana wakho."
2Kings4:37 Emva koko wangena waziphosa ezinyaweni zakhe waqubuda waza wamthabatha unyana wakhe waphuma.
2Kings4:38 uElisha wabuya, waya eGiligali. Kwakukho indlala elizweni; oonyana babaprofeti babehleli ngakuye;"
2Kings4:39 Waphuma othile, waya kukha imifuno emaphandleni; wafumana umdiliya wasemaphandleni, wakha kuwo, wazala ingubo yakhe, weza, wawunqunqa embizeni, kuba babengazi."
2Kings4:40 Baza bawaphakela amadoda ukuba adle. Bakuba besidla isonka, badanduluka besithi, Mfo wakwaThixo, kufa embizeni! Kwaye abanakuyidla."
2Kings4:41 Wathi, Zisani umgubo. Wagalela embizeni; Wathi, Nika abantu, badle akwabakho bubi embizeni."
2Kings4:42 Kwafika indoda, ivela eBhahali-salilisa, izisele umfo wakwaThixo izonka zerhasi ezimashumi mabini, neengobozi zizele yingqolowa. Wathi, Nika abantu, badle."
2Kings4:43 Wathi umfana lowo, Ndothini na ukulinika ikhulu lamadoda? Wathi, Nika abantu badle, ngokuba uYehova wathi, Baya kudla, basele."
2Kings4:44 Wazibeka phambi kwabo; badla, bashiya ngokwelizwi likaYehova."
2Kings5:1 Ke kaloku uNahaman, umthetheli-mkhosi wokumkani wakwa-Aram, waye eyindoda enkulu phambi kokumkani wakhe, ebekekileyo; ngokuba uYehova wayewanike ngaye ama-Aram; naye wayeligorha elikhaliphileyo, kodwa eneqhenqa."
2Kings5:2 Yaye amaSiriya abalusa abaninz aza alithimba ikhoboka kwilizwe lakwaSirayeli; Walinda umkaNahaman.
2Kings5:3 Wathi kumkakhe, Akwaba uThixo, inkosi yam, ubenomprofeti kwaSamari! ngokuba ubeza kuphiliswa eqhenqeni lakhe."
2Kings5:4 Wafika omnye, wayixelela inkosi yakhe, wathi, Intombi yasezweni lakwaSirayeli ithethe ngokunjalo."
2Kings5:5 Wathi ukumkani wakwa-Aram, Hamba uye, ndithumele incwadi kukumkani wakwaSirayeli. Wemka ke, wathabatha ishumi leetalente zesilivere, namawaka amathandathu eeshekele zegolide, neshumi leengubo zokuhlambela."
2Kings5:6 Wazisa incwadi kukumkani wakwaSirayeli, isithi, Xa ithe yafika kuwe le ncwadi, yabona, ndikuthuma uNahaman umkhonzi wam kuwe, ukuba umphilise eqhenqeni lakhe."
2Kings5:7 Wayilesa ukumkani wakwaSirayeli incwadi, wazikrazula iingubo zakhe, wathi, NdinguThixo obulalayo, osindisayo, lo ubethumele kum ukuba ndiphilise indoda eqhenqeni layo ke ngoko, nikelani ingqalelo, nibone ukuba ufuna ukuya nam njani."
2Kings5:8 Xa uElisha, indoda kaTHIXO oyinyaniso wevayo ukuba ukumkani wakwaSirayeli uzikrazule izambatho zakhe, wathumela umyalezo kukumkani, esithi: “Kutheni ukrazula nje izambatho zakho?” makeze kum kaloku, azi, ngokuba kukho umprofeti kwaSirayeli."
2Kings5:9 Weza uNahaman namahashe akhe neenqwelo zakhe, wema emnyango wendlu kaElisha."
2Kings5:10 uElisha wathuma umthunywa kuye, esithi, Hamba uye kuhlamba izihlandlo ezisixhenxe eYordan, inyama yakho ibuyele kuwe, uhlambuluke."
2Kings5:11 Waqumba uNahaman, wemka, wathi, Yabona, ndithe, Uya kuphuma eze kum, eme, alibize igama likaYehova uThixo wakhe, asibethe isandla sakhe phezu kwendawo eneqhenqa."
2Kings5:12 iAbhana nePapare, imilambo yaseDamasko, ayilungile na, ngaphezu kwamanzi onke akwaSirayeli? ndihlambe apho ndicoceke? Wajika ke wemka enomsindo."
2Kings5:13 Beza abakhonzi bakhe, bathetha kuye, bathi, Bawo, ukuba umprofeti ubethethe into enkulu kuwe, ubungàyi kuyenza yini na? Kangakanani na ke xa athe kuwe, Hlamba, uhlambuluke?"
2Kings5:14 Wehla ke waza wabhaptizwa izihlandlo ezisixhenxe eYordan, ngokwelizwi lomntu kaThixo oyinyaniso; yabuya ke inyama yakhe, yanjengenyama yomntwana, wahlambuluka."
2Kings5:15 Wabuyela kumntu kaTHIXO oyinyaniso, yena nebandla lakhe lonke, weza, wema phambi kwakhe; kwaye wathi: Khangela, ngoku ndiyazi ukuba akukho Thixo ehlabathini lonke, ngaphandle kwaSirayeli; Thandaza, wamkele intsikelelo kumkhonzi wakho."
2Kings5:16 Wathi yena, Ehleli nje uYehova, endimi phambi kwakhe, andiyi kukholiswa mntu. Wamjoka ukuba amamkele; akavuma."
2Kings5:17 Wathi uNahaman, Umkhonzi wakho akayi kunikwa yini na oondlebende ababini belizwe? ngokuba umkhonzi wakho akasayi kuba senza dini linyukayo nambingelelo thixweni bambi, ingenguYehova yedwa."
2Kings5:18 Xa kunjalo ke, uYehova uya kumxolela umkhonzi wakho, ukuba ithe yangena inkosi yam endlwini kaRimon ukuba ithandaze khona, yayama esandleni sam, nam ndoqubuda endlwini kaRimon; xa ndiqubuda endlwini kaRimon, aze uYehova amxolele umkhonzi wakho kulo mbandela."
2Kings5:19 Wathi kuye, Hamba unoxolo. Ngoko wemka kuye okwethutyana."
2Kings5:20 Kodwa uGehazi, umkhonzi kaElisha, indoda kaTHIXO oyinyaniso, wathi: “Yabona, inkosi yam imyekile uNahaman umAram lo, ngokungakwamkelanga esandleni sakhe oko wayekuzisile; ehleli nje uYehova, ndiya kumsukela, ndithabathe okuthile kuye."
2Kings5:21 uGehazi wamlandela uNahaman. Wathi uNahaman akumbona ebaleka, wehla emotweni esiya kumkhawulela, wathi: “Uphilile na?"
2Kings5:22 Wathi yena, Konke kulungile; iNkosi yam indithumile, isithi, Yabona, kufike kum amadodana amabini akoonyana babaprofeti, evela kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim; banike italente yesilivere, neengubo zangaphantsi zibe mbini."
2Kings5:23 Wathi uNahaman, Kwanele, thabatha zibe mbini iitalente. Wamjoka, wabeka iitalente zambini zesilivere ezingxoweni ezimbini, neengubo zangaphantsi ezimbini, wanika abakhonzi bakhe ababini; baza batwabulula phambi kwakhe."
2Kings5:24 Uthe akufika enqabeni, wayithabatha ezandleni zabo, wayingenisa endlwini; wawandulula amadoda lawo, ahamba."
2Kings5:25 Wangena, wema phambi kwenkosi yakhe. Wathi uElisha kuye, Uvela phi na, Gehazi? Wathi, Umkhonzi wakho lo akazanga ndawo."
2Kings5:26 Wathi kuye, Intliziyo yam ayihambanga nawe yini na, okuya yabuyayo indoda emotweni yayo, yeza kukukhawulela? Lixesha na eli lokwamkela imali, nempahla, neminquma, nezidiliya, nempahla emfutshane, neenkomo, nabakhonzi, nabakhonzi?"
2Kings5:27 Iqhenqa likaNahaman liya kunamathela kuwe nakwimbewu yakho ngonaphakade; Waza wabushiya ubuso bakhe, buneqhenqa, bumhlophe njengekhephu."
2Kings6:1 Bathi oonyana babaprofeti kuElisha, Uyabona, le ndawo, sihleli kuyo phambi kwakho, imxinwa;"
2Kings6:2 Masihambe siye eYordan, sithabathe khona elowo intonga, sizenzele khona indawo yokuhlala; Waphendula ke yena wathi, Hamba!"
2Kings6:3 Wathi omnye, Molo, hamba nabakhonzi bakho. Waphendula ke yena wathi, Ndiya kuhamba."
2Kings6:4 Wahamba ke nabo. Afika eYordan, agawula imithi;"
2Kings6:5 Kodwa xa omnye wayegawula umthi, izembe lawela emanzini, waza wadanduluka wathi: “Owu! ngokuba libolekiwe."
2Kings6:6 Wathi umfo wakwaThixo, Iwe phi na? Wambonisa loo ndawo. Wanqumla uluthi, waluphosa khona; yaza yaqubha intsimbi."
2Kings6:7 Ke ngoko wathi: Yithabathe; Wasolula isandla sakhe wayithabatha.
2Kings6:8 Wawaxabela ke ukumkani wama-Aram amaSirayeli, wacebisana nabakhonzi bakhe, wathi, Yoba ndaweni ithile ndilihlathi lam."
2Kings6:9 Wathumela umfo wakwaThixo kukumkani wakwaSirayeli, esithi, Zilindeni, ningacandi kulaa ndawo; ngokuba ama-Aram ehlele khona."
2Kings6:10 Wandula ke ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wathumela kwindawo awayemyalele ukuba alumkise kuyo umfo kaTHIXO oyinyaniso, amgcine khona, kungekhona kanye okanye kabini."
2Kings6:11 Yabhabhama kakhulu intliziyo yokumkani wakwa-Aram yiloo nto; Wabiza abakhonzi bakhe, wathi kubo, Anindibonisi na ukuba ngubani na kuthi omela ukumkani wakwaSirayeli?"
2Kings6:12 Wathi omnye wakubakhonzi bakhe, Makungabikho bani, nkosi yam, ingenguElisha, umprofeti okwaSirayeli, omxelela ukumkani wakwaSirayeli amazwi owathetha usengontsini yakho yokulala."
2Kings6:13 Wathi, Yiyani, nikhangele apho akhona, ndimbize. Waxelelwa kwathiwa, Khangela, useDotan."
2Kings6:14 Ngoko wathumela apho amahashe neenqwelo zokulwa nempi enkulu, baza bafika ebusuku, basingqinga isixeko."
2Kings6:15 Xa umkhonzi womntu kaTHIXO oyinyaniso wavuka ekuseni waza waphuma, wabona umkhosi ujikeleze isixeko unamahashe neenqwelo zokulwa. Wathi umlungiseleli wakhe kuye, Oh! siza kwenza ntoni?"
2Kings6:16 Wathi, Musani ukoyika; ngokuba baninzi abangakuthi, ngaphezu kwabangakubo."
2Kings6:17 Wathandaza uElisha, wathi, Yehova, vula amehlo akhe, abone. uYehova wawavula amehlo omfana; wakhangela, nantso intaba izele ngamahashe neenqwelo zokulwa zomlilo, zimlindile uElisha phakathi."
2Kings6:18 Behla baya kuye, wathandaza uElisha kuYehova, wathi, Usibethe ngobumfama esi sizwana. Wababetha ke ngobumfama ngokwelizwi likaElisha."
2Kings6:19 Wathi uElisha kubo, Asiyondlela le, asinguwo umzi; ndilandeleni, ndinise kuloo ndoda niyifunayo; Kodwa wabasa kwaSamari."
2Kings6:20 Bakufika kwaSamari, uElisha wathi: “Yehova, wavule amehlo aba bantu, babone. uYehova wawavula amehlo abo, babona; nanko bekwaSamari."
2Kings6:21 Wathi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli kuElisha, akubabona, Ndibaxabele na, ndibaxabele na, bawo? ndiya kubohlwaya."
2Kings6:22 Wathi, Musani ukubohlwaya; Ngaba uyathanda ukubabulala abathinjwa bakho ngekrele lakho nangobutshaba bakho? ubeke isonka namanzi phambi kwabo, badle, basele, baye enkosini yabo."
2Kings6:23 Wabenzela ukutya okuninzi, badla basela, wabayalela ukuba bahambe, baya kukumkani wabo. Ke ngoko imikhosi yama-Aram ayisayi kuphinda ingene ezweni lakwaSirayeli."
2Kings6:24 Emva koko uBhen-hadadi ukumkani wakwa-Aram wawuhlanganisa ndawonye wonke umkhosi wakhe wamajoni waza wenyuka waya kungqinga iSamariya.
2Kings6:25 Kwabakho indlala enkulu eSamariya, yaye, khangela!"
2Kings6:26 Kwathi, ewela ukumkani wakwaSirayeli phezu kodonga, yambiza inkazana, yathi, Sindisa, nkosi yam, kumkani."
2Kings6:27 Wathi yena, Engakusindisi nje uYehova, ndokusindisa ngantoni na mna? ukusuka kwiqonga okanye kwisali?"
2Kings6:28 Wathi ukumkani kuye, Ukhathazwa yintoni na? Wathi, Lo mfazi uthe kum, Khupha unyana wakho, simdle namhla, sidle unyana wam ngomso."
2Kings6:29 Sampheka ke unyana wam, samdla; ndathi kuye ngengomso, Khupha unyana wakho, simdle; wamngcwaba unyana wakhe."
2Kings6:30 Uthe akuweva ukumkani amazwi entokazi leyo, wazikrazula iingubo zakhe; wadlula eludongeni, kwaye abantu bayibona loo nto, babona ukuba unxibe ilaphu elirhabaxa enyameni yakhe ngaphakathi."
2Kings6:31 Wathi, uThixo enjenje kum, waqokele ukwenjenje, yakuba intloko kaElisha, unyana kaShafati, imi phezu kwakhe namhla."
2Kings6:32 uElisha wayehleli endlwini yakhe, namadoda amakhulu ehleli naye; Ukumkani wathuma umthunywa ukuba amkhaphele; akafika umthunywa lowo kuye, wathi kumadoda amakhulu, Niyabona na, ukubo unyana walo mbulali uthumele ukuba ndithabathe intloko? Niyabona, akufika umthunywa lowo, luvaleni ucango, nilugcine ucango; Isandi seenyawo zenkosi yakhe asisemva kwayo na?"
2Kings6:33 Esathetha nawo, kwafika umthunywa kuye, wathi, Yabona, obu bubi buphuma kuYehova; Ndisalindele ntoni kuYehova?"
2Kings7:1 Wathi uElisha, Liveni ilizwi likaYehova; Wathi uYehova, Eli xesha ngomso kuya kuthengwa iseha yomgubo ocoliweyo ibe yishekele, neeseha ezimbini zerhasi zibe yishekele kwisango lakwaSamari."
2Kings7:2 Wamphendula umfo wakwaThixo omnye umntu, abesayama esandleni sakhe ukumkani, wathi, Yabona, khona ukuba uYehova wenze iifestile ezulwini, ingabakho na loo nto? Wathi yena, Khangela, uya kuyibona loo nto ngamehlo akho, ungadli ngayo;"
2Kings7:3 Ke kaloku kwakukho amadoda amane aneqhenqa ngaphandle kwesango. Athi enye kwenye: “Sihlaleleni na apho side sife?
2Kings7:4 Ukuba sithe, Masingene kulo mzi, kuya kubakho indlala kuwo umzi lo, siya kufela khona; ukuba sithe sahlala apha, siyafa. Khawuze siwe phambi kwemikhosi yama-Aram; ukuba asigcina siphila, sodla ubomi; nokuba bayasibulala, siya kufa."
2Kings7:5 Banduluka ngokuhlwa, baya eminqubeni yama-Aram; afika ekupheleni kweminquba yama-Aram, akwabakho bani khona."
2Kings7:6 Ngokuba uYehova wawuvisa umkhosi wama-Aram isandi seenqwelo zokulwa, nesandi samahashe, nesandi somkhosi omkhulu; bathi omnye komnye, Niyabona, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli usiqeshele ookumkani ukuba balwe nathi amaHeti nookumkani baseYiputa baya kusihlasela."
2Kings7:7 Besuka ke, basaba ngongcwalazi, bazishiya iintente zabo, namahashe abo, namaesile abo, eminqubeni, injengoko injalo, basaba ukuba basindise umphefumlo wabo."
2Kings7:8 Afika ke loo madoda aneqhenqa ekupheleni kweminquba, angena kwenye intente, adla, asela, athabatha khona isilivere negolide neempahla, aziqhusheka; wabuya wangena kwenye intente wayithatha wemka wayifihla."
2Kings7:9 Bathetha omnye komnye besithi, Asihambanga kakuhle; le mini yimini yeendaba ezilungileyo, sizola; ukuba sizilazila kwada kwasa, sokhubeka; Hambani ngoku, siye kuyixelela indlu yokumkani."
2Kings7:10 Beza, babiza abalindi besango lomzi, babaxelela, bathi, Sifikile eminqubeni yama-Aram, sabona ukuba akukho bani khona, kungekho nazwi lamntu, ingengamahashe axhobileyo, nabamahashe iimazi zamaesile neentente zinjengoko bezinjalo."
2Kings7:11 Wababiza ke abamasango; bawaxelela endlwini yokumkani.
2Kings7:12 Wavuka ukumkani ebusuku, wathi kubakhonzi bakhe, Makhe ndinixelele into ayenzileyo kuthi ama-Aram. Bayazi ukuba kutheni silambile; Aphuma ke eminqubeni, aya kuzimela ezweni, esithi, Ukuba bathe baphuma kuwo umzi, sowabamba behleli, singene kuwo umzi."
2Kings7:13 Waphendula omnye wakubakhonzi bakhe, wathi, Inxenye kuthabathe abe mahlanu kumahashe, aseleyo phakathi komzi; Ndithi, banjengengxokolo yonke yoonyana bakaSirayeli abatshabalalayo; masithumele, sibone."
2Kings7:14 Bathabatha amahashe okulwa amabini; Ukumkani wawasukela ama-Aram, wathi, Hambani niye kubona;"
2Kings7:15 Bawalandela, bada besa eYordan, nayibona indlela yonke izele ziingubo nezitya, abezilahlile ama-Aram ngenxa yokungxama kwawo. Babuya abathunywa abo, baya kuxelela ukumkani."
2Kings7:16 Aphuma amadoda lawo, aziphanga iintente zama-Aram. Yathi iseha yomgubo ocoliweyo yayeyeshekele, neeseha ezimbini zerhasi zazezeshekele, ngokwelizwi likaYehova."
2Kings7:17 Ukumkani wammisa ukumkani owayesayame esandleni sakhe, ukuba alawule isango; Bamnyathela abantu esangweni, wafa, njengoko watshoyo umfo wakwaThixo, ekuhleni kokumkani, esiza kuye."
2Kings7:18 Wathetha umfo wakwaThixo oyinyaniso kukumkani, wathi: “Ngomso, ukuba kunjalo, imilinganiselo emibini yerhasi ngeshekele, neseha yomgubo ocolekileyo ngeshekele, yoba sesangweni laseSamariya ngeli xesha."
2Kings7:19 Indoda leyo yamphendula umfo wakwaThixo oyinyaniso, yathi, Yabona, ukuba uYehova wenze iifestile ezulwini, ingabakho na into enjalo? Wathi yena, Khangela, uya kuyibona loo nto ngamehlo akho, ungadli ngayo;"
2Kings7:20 Yawa ke phezu kwakhe, ngokuba abantu bamnyathele esangweni, wafa."
2Kings8:1 Wathetha ke uElisha kwintokazi eyamvusayo unyana wakhe, wathi, Vuka, uhambe, wena nomzi wakho, uye kuphambukela apho ungaphambukela khona; ngokuba uYehova ubize indlala; kwaye uya kuza ehlabathini kwiminyaka esixhenxe."
2Kings8:2 Wagqiba ke umfazi lowo, wenza ngokwelizwi lomntu kaTHIXO oyinyaniso; Wahamba nentsapho yakhe waza wahlala iminyaka esixhenxe njengomphambukeli kwilizwe lamaFilisti."
2Kings8:3 Ekupheleni kweminyaka esixhenxe leyo, yabuya inkazana leyo ezweni lamaFilisti, yaphuma yaya kuzibika kukumkani ngendlu yayo nentsimi yayo."
2Kings8:4 Wathetha uYehova kuGehazi, umkhonzi womfo wakwaThixo, wathi, Ndixelele zonke izinto ezinkulu azenzileyo uElisha."
2Kings8:5 Yaye xa wayexelela ukumkani indlela awasibuyisela ngayo ebomini isidumbu, khangela! Wathi uGehazi, Nkosi yam, kumkani, yilaa nkazana iphilisileyo uElisha nonyana wayo."
2Kings8:6 Wayibuza ukumkani intokazi leyo; Ukumkani wammisela omnye umphathi, wathi, Buyisa yonke impahla yakhe, neziqhamo zonke zentsimi, oko walishiya ilizwe unangoku."
2Kings8:7 uElisha wafika eDamasko; yaye uBhen-hadadi ukumkani wakwa-Aram wayegula; Kwathiwa, Umfo wakwaThixo uze apha."
2Kings8:8 Wathi uYehova kuHazayeli, Thabatha umnikelo, uye umkhawulela umfo wakwaThixo, umbuze uYehova ngaye, uthi, Ndiya kuphila na kwesi sifo?"
2Kings8:9 uHazayeli waya kumkhawulela, wathabatha izipho zonke ezilungileyo zaseDamasko, ubunzima beenkamela ezimashumi mane, weza, wema phezu kwakhe, wathi, Unyana wakho uBhen-hadade, ukumkani wakwa-Aram, undizisile eya kuwe. Wayethunywe ukuba athi: Ngaba ndiya kuphila kwesi sifo?"
2Kings8:10 Wathi uElisha kuye, Ewe, ùthi kuye, Uya kuphila ngonaphakade; ke uYehova undibonisile ukuba uya kufa ngonaphakade."
2Kings8:11 Wabutywina ubuso bakhe wada waneentloni, walila umfo wakwaThixo oyinyaniso."
2Kings8:12 Wathi uHazayeli, Ililelani na inkosi yam? Waphendula wathi, Kungokuba ndibazi ububi oya kubenza koonyana bakaSirayeli; nomntwana."
