2Kings8:13 Wathi uHazayeli, Uyintoni na umkhonzi wakho, ndiyinja nje, ukuba ndenze into enkulu kangaka? Wathi uElisha, uYehova undibonisile, ukuba uya kuba ngukumkani wakwa-Aram yena."
2Kings8:14 Wamshiya ke uElisha, waya enkosini yakhe; Athi kuye, Utheni na uElisha kuwe? Waphendula ke wathi, Uthe kum, inene, uya kuphila."
2Kings8:15 Ngengomso wathabatha ingubo, wayithi nkxu emanzini, wayaneka phezu kobuso bakhe apho ebefele khona; uHazayeli waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings8:16 Ngomnyaka wesihlanu kaYoram unyana ka-Ahabhi, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, uYehoshafati engukumkani wakwaYuda, waba ngukumkani uYoram, unyana kaYehoshafati, ukumkani wakwaYuda."
2Kings8:17 Ubeminyaka imashumi mathathu anamibini ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; Waba neminyaka emashumi asibhozo anamibini engukumkani eYerusalem."
2Kings8:18 Waqhubeka ehamba ngendlela yookumkani bakwaSirayeli, kanye njengoko yahambayo indlu ka-Ahabhi, ngenxa yokuba intombi ka-Ahabhi yayingumfazi wakhe; yaye wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova."
2Kings8:19 Kodwa uYehova ebengafuni ukumtshabalalisa uYuda, ngenxa kaDavide umkhonzi wakhe, njengoko wathethayo kuye, wathi, uya kusoloko emkhanyisela yena noonyana bakhe."
2Kings8:20 Ngexesha lakhe amaEdom amvukela uYuda, amisela ukumkani wawo."
2Kings8:21 Wagqitha uYehoram, waya eTsahira, eneenqwelo zakhe zonke zokulwa; wavuka ebusuku, wawaxabela amaEdom awayemrhawule ngeenxa zonke, nabathetheli beenqwelo zokulwa; asaba amadoda, aya ezintenteni zawo."
2Kings8:22 Akreqa ke amaEdom kumaYuda, unanamhla. Yaza iLibhena yavukela kwangaxeshanye."
2Kings8:23 Ezinye izinto zikaYoram, nako konke awakwenzayo, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaYuda?"
2Kings8:24 uYoram walala kooyise, wangcwatyelwa kooyise emzini kaDavide; unyana wakhe uAhaziya waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings8:25 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinesibini kaYoram unyana ka-Ahabhi ukumkani wamaSirayeli, waba ngukumkani uAhaziya, unyana kaYoram, ukumkani wakwaYuda."
2Kings8:26 uAhaziya ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamibini ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba namnyaka mnye engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguAtaliya, intombi kaOmri, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
2Kings8:27 Waqhubeka ehamba ngendlela yendlu ka-Ahabhi waza wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, kanye njengendlu ka-Ahabhi kuba wayengumkhwenyana wendlu ka-Ahabhi."
2Kings8:28 Wahamba noYoram unyana ka-Ahabhi, baya kulwa noHazayeli ukumkani wakwa-Aram eRamoti yaseGiliyadi; yaye amaSiriya amxabela uYehoram."
2Kings8:29 Ukumkani uYoram wabuyela eYizereli, ukuba anyangwe loo manxeba wawafumanayo kuma-Aram eRama, ekulweni kwakhe noHazayeli ukumkani wakwa-Aram. Wehla uAhaziya, unyana kaYoram, ukumkani wakwaYuda, waya kubona uYoram unyana ka-Ahabhi eYizereli, ngokuba ebesifa."
2Kings9:1 Ke kaloku uElisha umprofeti wabiza omnye koonyana babaprofeti, wathi kuye, Bhinqa isinqe sakho, uthabathe le ngxowa yeoli, uye eRamoti yaseGiliyadi."
2Kings9:2 Ufikile khona, nanko uYehu, unyana kaYehoshafati, unyana kaNimshi, ungene, wamnqanda phakathi kwabazalwana bakhe, wamngenisa egumbini;"
2Kings9:3 Thabatha isigodlo seoli, umgalele entloko, uthi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ndikuthambisile ukuba ube ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli vula ucango, ubaleke, ungalibali;"
2Kings9:4 Wemka umfana lowo, umfana womprofeti, waya eRamoti yaseGiliyadi."
2Kings9:5 Wafika ke, ahlala khona amadindala enkundla; wathi, Ndinelizwi kuwe, kumkani! Wathi uYehu, Ngubani na phakathi kwethu sonke? Wathi, Kuwe, kumkani!"
2Kings9:6 Esukile ke, wangena endlwini; wamgalela ioli entloko, wathi kuye, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ndikuthambisile ukuba ube ngukumkani woonyana bakaYehova bakaSirayeli."
2Kings9:7 Yibulale indlu ka-Ahabhi inkosi yakho, ndihlawule igazi labakhonzi bam, nabaprofeti, negazi labakhonzi bonke bakaYehova, esandleni sikaIzebhele."
2Kings9:8 Kuba yonke indlu ka-Ahabhi iya kutshabalala, yaye ndiza kumtshabalalisa kuAhabhi lowo ubetha udonga nebanjwa noshiywe kwaSirayeli."
2Kings9:9 Ndoyenza indlu ka-Ahabhi ibe njengendlu kaYarobheham, unyana kaNebhati, nanjengendlu kaBhahesa, unyana ka-Ahiya;"
2Kings9:10 Yaye uIzebhele uya kudliwa ziintaka kummandla waseYizereli, yaye akuyi kubakho bani umngcwabayo. Wavula ucango wabaleka."
2Kings9:11 Ephumile uYehu, waya kubakhonzi benkosi yakhe. Kwathiwa kuye, Usahleli kakuhle na? kutheni ize kuwe lendoda iphambeneyo? Wathi kubo, Niyamazi nina loo mntu nelizwi lakhe."
2Kings9:12 Bathi ke bona, Bubuxoki; Wathi, Wenjenje ukuthetha kum, wathi, uYehova wathi, Ndikuthambisile ukuba ube ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
2Kings9:13 Bakhawuleza, bathabatha ingubo yomntu wonke, bayibeka ezinyukweni ezingaphantsi kwakhe, bavuthela ngezigodlo, bathi, uYehu ngukumkani."
2Kings9:14 Waza uYehu, unyana kaYehoshafati, unyana kaNimshi, wagwilika kuYoram. (uYoram wayeyilinda iRamoti yaseGiliyadi, yena naye wonke uSirayeli, ngenxa kaHazayeli ukumkani wakwa-Aram."
2Kings9:15 Ukumkani uYoram wabuyela eYizereli, ukuba anyangwe amanxeba awawafumana kuye ama-Aram, ekulweni kwakhe noHazayeli ukumkani wakwa-Aram ilizwe alisindi umzi ekuthethwe ngawo eYizereli."
2Kings9:16 Wakhwela uYehu enqwelweni, waya eYizereli; ngokuba uYoram ubelele khona. Wehla uAhaziya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, esiya kubona uYehoram."
2Kings9:17 Umbulali wayemi phezu kwenqaba yaseYizereli ekhangele isihlwele sikaYehu ekufikeni kwakhe, wathi: “Ndibona isihlwele. Wathi uYoram, Thabatha umkhweli wehashe, umthume ukuba aye kubakhawulela. Wathi, Luxolo na?"
2Kings9:18 Waqubisana naye ekhwele ihashe, wathi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Luxolo na? Wathi uYehu, Yintoni na enawe noxolo? Wajika emva kwam, watsho umlindi, wathi, Umthunywa ufike kubo, kodwa akabuyi."
2Kings9:19 Wathuma nowesibini umkhweli-hashe, waya kubo, wathi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Luxolo na? Wathi uYehu, Yintoni na enawe noxolo? Jikela emva kwam."
2Kings9:20 Waxela umlindi, wathi, Uye wafika kubo, akabuya; ngokuba uqhuba ngobudlongodlongo."
2Kings9:21 Wathi uYehoram, Zilungiselele. Yalungiswa inqwelo yakhe. Waphuma uYehoram ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, noAhaziya ukumkani wakwaYuda, elowo esenqwelweni yakhe, baya kumkhawulela uYehu, bamfumana ezweni likaNabhoti waseYizereli."
2Kings9:22 uYoram wambona uYehu, wathi, Luxolo na, Yehu? Wathi: Luxolo olunjani na, xa ubuhenyu bukaIzebhele, nonyoko, nobugqwirha bakhe, buseninzi?"
2Kings9:23 Wazijika uYoram izandla zakhe, wabaleka, wathi kuAhaziya, Ahaziya!"
2Kings9:24 uYehu watola ngamandla akhe onke isaphetha sakhe, wamtyhoboza uYoram phakathi kwezandla zakhe, lwaphuma utolo entliziyweni yakhe, wawa enqwelweni yakhe."
2Kings9:25 Wandula ke uYehu wathi kuBhidekare umphathi wakhe: “Mphakamise uze umphose entsimini kaNabhoti waseYizereli;
2Kings9:26 Inene, ndiwabonile izolo amagazi kaNabhoti, namagazi oonyana bakhe, utsho uYehova; ndinibuyisele kule ndawo, utsho uYehova. Ke ngoko, mthabathe, umkhahlele emhlabeni, ngokwelizwi likaYehova."
2Kings9:27 uAhaziya ukumkani wakwaYuda, ekubonile oko, wasabela endlwini yomyezo. uYehu wamlandela, wathi, Nawe umbethe emotweni. Benjenjalo kwinduli eya eGur, eJibheleham. Wasabela eMegido, wafela khona."
2Kings9:28 Abakhonzi bakhe bamsa eYerusalem ngenqwelo, bamngcwabela engcwabeni lakhe kooyise, kwisixeko sikaDavide."
2Kings9:29 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinamnye kaYoram unyana ka-Ahabhi, uAhaziya waba ngukumkani kwaYuda."
2Kings9:30 Uthe uYehu akufika eYizereli, weva uIzebhele; waqaba ubuso bakhe, wanikina intloko, wakroba ngefestile."
2Kings9:31 Wangena uYehu esangweni, wathi, Uhleli ngoxolo na uZimri, wena umbuleleyo inkosi yakhe?"
2Kings9:32 Wabuphakamisa ubuso bakhe efestileni, wathi, Ngubani na ophambi kwam? I-WHO? Kwaye kukho amathenwa amabini okanye amathathu, emlindile."
2Kings9:33 Wathi, Mkhahleleni phantsi. Zamkhahlela phantsi, igazi lakhe latshiza eludongeni nasemahasheni, amnyathela."
2Kings9:34 Wangena wadla, wasela; wathi, Hambani niye, nikhangele inkazana eqalekisiweyo, nimngcwabe; ngokuba yintombi yokumkani."
2Kings9:35 Baya kumngcwaba; abafumana nto kuye, yaba lukakayi, neenyawo, namasundu kuphela."
2Kings9:36 Babuya ke bamxelela. Wathi, Lilizwi likaYehova elo, awalithethayo ngoEliya waseTishbha, umkhonzi wakhe, lisithi, Inyama kaIzebhele yodliwa zizinja ezweni laseYizereli."
2Kings9:37 Yaye umzimba kaIzebhele uya kuba njengeliva entsimini kummandla waseYizereli; ukuze bangathi, Lo nguIzebhele."
2Kings10:1 uAhabhi ubenoonyana abamashumi asixhenxe kwaSamari. uYehu wabhala iincwadi, wazithumela kwaSamari kubathetheli baseYizereli, nakumadoda amakhulu, nakubanyusi baka-Ahabhi, wathi,"
2Kings10:2 Xa nje ithe yafika kuni le ncwadi, ekubeni oonyana benkosi yenu benani, niseneenqwelo zokulwa, namahashe, nomzi onqatyisiweyo uneentonga;"
2Kings10:3 Khangelani oyena mkhulu koonyana bokumkani wenu, nimmise etroneni kayise, niyilwele indlu yokumkani wenu."
2Kings10:4 Boyika kakhulu, bathi, Yabonani, ookumkani ababini bemi ngakuye; sizakulinda njani ngoku?"
2Kings10:5 Bathumela ke umlindi wendlu, nomlindi womzi, namadoda amakhulu, nabafundisi boonyana kuYehu, besithi, Singabakhonzi bakho; konke osiwisele umthetho ngako, sokwenza; asiyi kumisa ukumkani; yenza okulungileyo emehlweni akho."
2Kings10:6 Wababhalela eyesibini incwadi, esithi, Ukuba ningakum, niliva ilizwi lam, thabathani iintloko zamadoda, oonyana benkosi yenu, nizizise kum ngomso eYizereli. Oonyana bokumkani, abangamadoda angamashumi asixhenxe, babenamadoda amakhulu omzi awayebakhulisa."
2Kings10:7 Yakufika kubo le ncwadi, babathabatha oonyana bokumkani, babulala amadoda angamashumi asixhenxe, bazifaka iintloko zabo ezingobozini, bamthumela eYizereli."
2Kings10:8 Wafika umthunywa, wamxelela, wathi, Bazizisile iintloko zoonyana bokumkani. Wathi, Yibeke zibe ziimfumba ezimbini ngaphandle kwesango kude kuse;"
2Kings10:9 Ngentsasa elandelayo waphuma waza waphakama waza wathi kubo bonke abantu: “Nilungile; yabonani, ndithethile enkosini yam, ndathi, Ndiyibulele; kodwa ngubani obulele bonke aba bantu?"
2Kings10:10 Yazini ke ngoku ukuba ilizwi likaYehova awalithethayo uYehova ngendlu ka-Ahabhi aliyi kuwa emhlabeni, ngenxa yokuba uYehova ukwenzile oko wakuthethayo ngomkhonzi wakhe uEliya."
2Kings10:11 uYehu wayibulala yonke enye indlu ka-Ahabhi uYizereli, nabalungiseleli bakhe bonke, nomzalwane wakhe, nababingeleli bakhe, kwada akwamshiya."
2Kings10:12 Wesuka ke, waya kwaSamari. Xa wayekwivenkile yokucheba endleleni."
2Kings10:13 uYehu waqubisana nabazalwana bakhe uAhaziya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, wathi, Ningoobani na nina? Aphendula athi, Singabazalwana baka-Ahaziya; siyehla siye kuthi ndlela-ntle kubantwana bokumkani nakubantwana benkosikazi."
2Kings10:14 Wathi, Babambeni besadla ubomi; Bababamba behleli, bababulala emhadini womchebi, amadoda amashumi mane anamabini; akashiya namnye kubo."
2Kings10:15 Wemka khona, wamtshisa uYonadabhi, unyana kaRekabhi, obeze kumkhawulela; wambulisa wathi kuye: Ithe tye na intliziyo yakho, njengokuba injalo intliziyo yam entliziyweni yakho? Waphendula uYonadabhi, wathi, Injalo. Ukuba kunjalo, ndinike isandla sakho. Wamnika ke isandla sakhe; wamsa kuye ngemoto."
2Kings10:16 Wathi: “Hamba nam, uze uyibone inzondelelo yam ngoYehova. Bamshiya ke emotweni yakhe."
2Kings10:17 Weza kwaSamari, wababulala bonke abaseleyo kuAhabhi kwaSamari, wada wamtshabalalisa ngokwelizwi likaYehova, awalithethayo kuEliya."
2Kings10:18 Wabahlanganisa uYehu bonke abantu, wathi kubo, uAhabhi wamkhonza kancinane uBhahali; uYehu womkhonza kunene."
2Kings10:19 Babizeni ngoko bonke abaprofeti bakaBhahali, abakhonzi bakhe bonke, nababingeleli bakhe bonke. Makungabikho mfuneko, ngokuba ndinombingelelo omkhulu kuBhahali; lowo usweleyo akayi kuphila. uYehu wenza loo nto ngobuqhokolo, ukuze abatshabalalise abakhonzi bakaBhahali."
2Kings10:20 Wathi uYehu, Memezani umthendeleko kaBhahali. Baceba ke."
2Kings10:21 uYehu wathumela ilizwi kuSirayeli wonke, beza bonke abakhonzi bakaBhahali, akwasala namnye ungezanga. Bangena endlwini kaBhahali; yazala indlu kaBhahali, kwathabathela kwelinye icala kwesa kwelinye."
2Kings10:22 Wathi kumgcini weengubo, Ndinike iingubo zabo bonke abakhonza uBhahali. Wabaphathela iingubo."
2Kings10:23 Wangena uYehu noYonadabhi, unyana kaRekabhi, endlwini kaBhahali, wathi kubakhonzi bakaBhahali, Quqelani nikhangele ukuba akukho bakhonzi bakaYehova na apha kuni, ingengabakhonzi bakaBhahali bodwa."
2Kings10:24 Ekungeneni kwabo beza kubingelela imibingelelo namadini anyukayo, uYehu wakhuphela phandle amadoda amashumi asibhozo anamabini, wathi, Xa ithe yasinda indoda kulaa madoda, ndiwazise esandleni senu, othe wayikhulula, umphefumlo wayo woba sesikhundleni somphefumlo wayo."
2Kings10:25 Kwathi, akugqiba ukulenza idini elinyukayo, uYehu wathi kwizigidimi nakumadindala, Ngenani nibabulale; makungaphumi mntu. Abaxabela ngohlangothi lwentshuntshe; bawagxotha amadindala namadindala, baya emzini wendlu kaBhahali."
2Kings10:26 Bandula ke bayikhupha imifanekiso yendlu kaBhahali baza bayitshisa.
2Kings10:27 Zayidiliza ilitye eliqingqiweyo likaBhahali nendlu kaBhahali zaza zayenza indlu esekwe namhla.
2Kings10:28 uYehu wamtshabalalisa ke uBhahali kwaSirayeli;
2Kings10:29 Ke uYehu akatyeka ezonweni zikaYarobheham unyana kaNebhati, awawonisa ngazo amaSirayeli, amathole egolide aseBheteli nakwaDan."
2Kings10:30 Wathi uYehova kuYehu, Ekubeni wenze okuthe tye emehlweni am, wenza ngako konke ngenxa yendlu ka-Ahabhi njengoko ndakwenzayo entliziyweni yam, ndohlala etroneni oonyana bakho besizukulwana sesine kwaSirayeli."
2Kings10:31 Ke uYehu akakunyamekelanga ukuhamba ngomyalelo kaYehova uThixo kaSirayeli ngentliziyo yakhe yonke; ngokuba akatyeka ezonweni zikaYarobheham, awawonisa ngazo amaSirayeli."
2Kings10:32 Ngaloo mihla uYehova waqalisa ukubanciphisa oonyana bakaSirayeli, yaye uHazayeli waboyisa kuzo zonke iindawo zakwaSirayeli;"
2Kings10:33 Ukususela eYordan ukuya ngasempuma, lonke ilizwe laseGiliyadi, amaGadi namaRubhen namaManase, ukusuka eArohere ekufuphi noMlambo iArnon ukusa eGiliyadi naseBhashan."
2Kings10:34 Ezinye izinto zikaYehu, nako konke awakwenzayo, nobugorha bakhe bonke, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli?"
2Kings10:35 uYehu walala kooyise, wangcwatyelwa kwaSamari unyana wakhe uYehowahazi waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings10:36 Yaye imihla awalawula ngayo uYehu kwaSirayeli eSamariya yaba yiminyaka engamashumi amabini anesibhozo.
2Kings11:1 Uthe uAtaliya, unina ka-Akasiya, akubona ukuba unyana wakhe ufile, wesuka wayitshabalalisa yonke indlu yakomkhulu."
2Kings11:2 Ke uYoshebha, intombi yokumkani uYoram, udade boAhaziya, wamthabatha uYowashe, unyana ka-Ahaziya, wamba phakathi koonyana bokumkani, ababulawayo; bamfihla yena nomondli wakhe egumbini lika-Ataliya, ukuze angabulawa."
2Kings11:3 Wazimela endlwini kaYehova iminyaka emithandathu. Ke uAtaliya wayelawula ihlabathi.
2Kings11:4 Ngomnyaka wesixhenxe, uYehoyada wathumela ukuba kubizwe abathetheli-makhulu nabathetheli bentlanganiso yamatyala, nabalindi, wabazisa kuye endlwini kaYehova, wenza umnqophiso nabo, wabazisa endlwini kaYehova wababonisa ubutyebi unyana wokumkani."
2Kings11:5 Wabawisela umthetho, esithi, Nize nenze loo nto; nesahlulo sesithathu kuni, ningenayo ngesabatha, soba ngabagcini bendlu yokumkani;"
2Kings11:6 esinye isahlulo sesithathu soba sesangweni laseShure; esinye isahlulo sesithathu soba sesangweni emva kwabalindi; yigcine ke indlu, ingawi."
2Kings11:7 Yaye izahlulo ezibini kuni nonke, eniphumayo ngesabatha, ewe, zoyigcina indlu kaYehova kukumkani."
2Kings11:8 Nimphahle ukumkani ngeenxa zonke, elowo ephethe iintonga zakhe ngesandla; owathi ufika emasimini wobulawa; yiba nokumkani ekuphumeni kwakhe nasekungeneni kwakhe."
2Kings11:9 Benza ke abathetheli-khulu njengako konke abewise umthetho ngako uYehoyada umbingeleli, bathabatha elowo amadoda akowabo, abemelwe ukungena ngesabatha, nalawo amele ukuphuma ngesabatha, beza kuYehoyada umbingeleli."
2Kings11:10 Umbingeleli wawanika amakhulu abathetheli iintshuntshe namakhaka kaDavide ukumkani, abesendlwini kaYehova."
2Kings11:11 Bema abalindi, elowo ephethe iintonga zakhe ngesandla, bethabathela kwicala lasekunene lendlu besa kwelasekhohlo lendlu, ngasesibingelelweni nangasendlwini."
2Kings11:12 Wamkhupha unyana kakumkani waza wamthwesa isithsaba waza wanikela ubungqina ngaye; bamenza ukumkani, bamthambisa; baza baqhwaba izandla baza bathi: Ngamana uThixo angamsindisa ukumkani!"
2Kings11:13 Uthe uAtaliya akusiva isandi sezigidimi nesabantu, waya ebantwini endlwini kaYehova."
2Kings11:14 Wathi akukhangela, wabona ukumkani emi ngakwilitye lesikhumbuzo ngokwesiko, neenkosana namaxilongo zikunye nokumkani, yaye bonke abantu belizwe babevuya yaye bevuthela amaxilongo; uAtaliya wazikrazula iingubo zakhe, wadanduluka, wathi, Sidengendini!"
2Kings11:15 Umbingeleli uYehoyada wabawisela umthetho abathetheli-makhulu, abathenda bentendelezo, wathi kubo, Makahambe aphume ezweni, abulale ongasemva kwakhe ngentshuntshe ngokuba ebesithi umbingeleli, Makangabulawelwa endlwini kaYehova."
2Kings11:16 Bambamba ke; wahamba ngendlela angena ngayo amahashe endlwini yokumkani, wabulawelwa khona."
2Kings11:17 Wandula ke uYehoyada wenza umnqophiso phakathi kukaYehova nokumkani nabantu ukuba babe ngabantu bakaYehova; naphakathi kokumkani nabantu.
2Kings11:18 Bonke abantu behlabathi baya endlwini kaBhahali, bayidiliza; izibingelelo zakhe nemifanekiso yakhe bayiqhekeza; bambulala uMatan, umbingeleli kaBhahali, phambi kwezibingelelo. Umbingeleli wamisela abagcini bendlu kaYehova."
2Kings11:19 Wathabatha amakhulu abathetheli, nabathetheli, nabagcini, nabantu bonke belizwe; bamhlisa ukumkani, bamsa endlwini kaYehova, bangena ngesango lezigidimi endlwini yokumkani. Wahlala etroneni yookumkani."
2Kings11:20 Bavuya bonke abantu belizwe, sazola umzi; bambulalela uAtaliya ngekrele endlwini yokumkani."
2Kings11:21 uYowashe ubeminyaka isixhenxe ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe."
2Kings12:1 Waba ngukumkani uYowashe ngomnyaka wesixhenxe kaYehu; waba neminyaka emashumi mane engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguTsibhiya waseBher-shebha.
2Kings12:2 uYowashe waqhubeka esenza okulungileyo emehlweni kaYehova yonke imihla yakhe awayefundiswa ngayo uYehoyada umbingeleli.
2Kings12:3 Kodwa iindawo eziphakamileyo azizange zishenxiswe;
2Kings12:4 Wathi uYowashe kubabingeleli, Yonke imali yezinto ezingcwele, eziswayo endlwini kaYehova, nemali yabo bonke abaya kubalela, nemali leyo yabalinganiswa bonke abo, nemali leyo yonke eyabakhoyo entliziyweni yakhe ukuba azise endlwini kaYehova;"
2Kings12:5 Mabathabathele kubo ababingeleli, elowo ngokokwazi kwakhe, bavale iintanda zendlu, naphi na apho kungafunyanwa khona umsantsa."
2Kings12:6 Kodwa ngomnyaka wamashumi amabini anesithathu wokumkani uYowashe, ababingeleli abazitywini iintanda zendlu."
2Kings12:7 Ukumkani uYowashe wabiza uYehoyada umbingeleli nabanye ababingeleli, wathi kubo, Yini na ukuba ningazitywini iintanda zendlu? uze ungamkeli mali kwabazana nawe, kodwa uyinike abo baphukileyo."
2Kings12:8 Bavuma ababingeleli ukuba bangabi sathabatha mali ebantwini, nokuba iya kulungisa iintanda zendlu."
2Kings12:9 uYehoyada umbingeleli wathabatha ityeya, wagqobhoza umngxuma esiguqweni sayo, wawubeka ecaleni lesibingelelo, ngasekunene ekungeneni komntu endlwini kaYehova; nababingeleli abagcini bomnyango babenayo yonke imali ebiziswe endlwini kaYehova."
2Kings12:10 Bathi bakubona ukuba kukho imali eninzi kwindawo yokugcina ubuncwane, unobhala kakumkani nombingeleli omkhulu benyuka baza bahlala ezingxoweni baza banikela ingxelo ngemali eyayifunyenwe endlwini kaYehova."
2Kings12:11 Bandula ke bayinikela imali emva kokuba ibekwe esandleni sabenzi bomsebenzi ababephethe indlu kaYehova; bayinika abachweli nabakhi ababesebenza endlwini kaYehova.
2Kings12:12 Nabaqingqi bamatye, nabaqingqi bamatye, bathenga imithi, namatye aqingqiweyo, ukuba kutywinwe iintanda zendlu kaYehova, nento yonke eyakhelwayo ukuba kuhlaziywe indlu."
2Kings12:13 Ke akwenziwa zitya zasilivere, nazitya zokutshiza, namaxilongo, nampahla yegolide, nasilivere, neziswe ngayo imali endlwini kaYehova."
2Kings12:14 Kodwa bayinika abasebenzi baza bayilungisa ngayo indlu kaYehova.
2Kings12:15 Ngaphezu koko, babengawabala amadoda awayenike imali ezandleni zawo ukuba anike abasebenzi, kuba ayesebenza enyanisekile."
2Kings12:16 Ke imali yetyala, nemali yesono, ibingaziswa endlwini kaYehova; babengababingeleli."
2Kings12:17 uHazayeli ukumkani wakwa-Aram wenyuka waya kulwa neGati, wayithimba; wajika uHazayeli ukuba enyuke aye eYerusalem."
2Kings12:18 Wazithabatha uYowashe ukumkani wakwaYuda zonke izipho ezingcwele, ababezingcwalisile ooYehoshafati, noYoram, noAhaziya, ooyise, ookumkani bakwaYuda, nezipho zakhe ezingcwele, negolide yonke ebikho, nasebuncwaneni bendlu kaYehova. uYehova nendlu yokumkani, wabathuma kuHazayeli ukumkani wakwa-Aram;"
2Kings12:19 Ezinye izinto zikaYowashe, nako konke awakwenzayo, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaYuda?"
2Kings12:20 Bandula bema abakhonzi bakhe baza benza iyelenqe baza bambulala uYowashe endlwini kaMilo eyehlela eSila.
2Kings12:21 Bamoyisa ke uYosagare unyana kaShimehati, noYozabhadi unyana kaSomere, abakhonzi bakhe, wafa; yaye bamngcwabela nookhokho bakhe kwisiXeko sikaDavide, waza uAmatsiya unyana wakhe walawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings13:1 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omabini anamithathu kaYowashe, unyana ka-Ahaziya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, waba ngukumkani uYowashe, unyana kaYehu, kumaSirayeli kwaSamari, iminyaka elishumi elinesixhenxe."
2Kings13:2 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, walandela izono zikaYarobheham unyana kaNebhati, awawohlwaya ngazo amaSirayeli; akatyeka kuyo."
2Kings13:3 Wavutha umsindo kaYehova kumaSirayeli, wawanikela esandleni sikaHazayeli ukumkani wakwa-Aram, nasesandleni sikaBhen-hadade, unyana kaHazayeli, yonke imihla."
2Kings13:4 Wathandaza uYehowahazi kuYehova, weva uYehova; ngokuba ubeyibonile ingcinezelo yoonyana bakaSirayeli, becinezelwa ngayo ngukumkani wakwa-Aram."
2Kings13:5 uYehova wabanikela oonyana bakaSirayeli umsindisi, baphuma esandleni sama-Aram, bakha ke oonyana bakaSirayeli iintente zabo, njengokwangaphambili."
2Kings13:6 Kodwa abazange baphambuke ezonweni zendlu kaYarobheham, awawonisa ngazo amaSirayeli, baqhubeka behamba kuzo; lisekho ihlathi lakwaSamari.)"
2Kings13:7 Akamshiya ebantwini uYehowahazi, yaba ngamashumi amahlanu abamahashe, neshumi leenqwelo zokulwa, neshumi lamawaka omqikela; ngokuba wabatshabalalisa ukumkani wakwa-Aram, wabenza njengothuli lwekhuba."
2Kings13:8 Ezinye izinto zikaYowaka, nako konke awakwenzayo, nobugorha bakhe, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli?"
2Kings13:9 Walala uYowashe kooyise; baza bamngcwabela eSamariya, yaye uYowashe unyana wakhe walawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings13:10 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omathathu anesixhenxe kaYowashe ukumkani wakwaYuda, waba ngukumkani uYowashe, unyana kaYowahazi, kwaSirayeli kwaSamari, iminyaka elishumi elinamithandathu."
2Kings13:11 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova; akatyeka ezonweni zikaYarobheham unyana kaNebhati, awawonisa ngazo amaSirayeli; kodwa waya kuyo."
2Kings13:12 Ezinye izinto zikaYowashe, nako konke awakwenzayo, namandla akhe awalwa ngawo noAmatsiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, azibhalwanga na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli?"
2Kings13:13 Walala uYowashe kooyise; Wahlala uYarobheham etroneni yakhe, uYowashe wangcwatywa nookumkani bakwaSirayeli kwaSamari."
2Kings13:14 uElisha wagula ngenxa yesifo awafa ngaso. Wehla uYowashe, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, waya kuye, walila ebusweni bakhe, esithi, Bawo, bawo, nqwelo yokulwa yakwaSirayeli, nabakhweli bayo!"
2Kings13:15 Wathi uElisha kuye, Thabatha isaphetha notolo; Wamthengela isaphetha notolo."
2Kings13:16 Wathi kukumkani wakwaSirayeli, Sibeke isandla sakho kwisaphetha; Wasibeka isandla sakhe phezu kwayo, uElisha wabeka izandla zakhe phezu kwezandla zokumkani."
2Kings13:17 Waqhubeka wathi: “Vula ifestile esempuma. Watsho eyivula. Wathi uElisha, Yondla; Kwaye wadubula. Wathi, Lutolo losindiso oluphuma kuYehova, lutolo losindiso oluphuma kuma-Aram;"
2Kings13:18 Wathi, Thabatha iintolo. Wazithabatha ke. Wathi kukumkani wakwaSirayeli, Betha emhlabeni. Wabetha kathathu waphakama."
2Kings13:19 Umfo wakwaThixo wavutha ngumsindo ngakuye, wathi, Unge utsho kahlanu, nokuba kathandathu; wawaxabela ama-Aram wada wawatshabalalisa; kodwa ngoku uya kuwahlasela kathathu ama-Aram."
2Kings13:20 Wafa ke uElisha, bamngcwaba. Kwaye amaqela amaMowabhi ahlasela ilizwe ekuqaleni konyaka."
2Kings13:21 Ke kaloku, bakuba bengcwaba umntu, babona igquba; bayiphosa indoda leyo engcwabeni likaElisha."
2Kings13:22 uHazayeli ukumkani wakwa-Aram waqhubeka ewaxabela amaSirayeli yonke imihla kaYehowahazi.
2Kings13:23 uYehova waba nemfesane kuwo, waba nemfesane kuwo, waba nemfesane kuwo, ngenxa yomnqophiso wakhe noAbraham noIsake noYakobi, akathanda ukubatshabalalisa, akabashiya phambi kobuso bakhe."
2Kings13:24 Wafa uHazayeli ukumkani wakwa-Aram; unyana wakhe uBhen-hadadi walawula esikhundleni sakhe.
2Kings13:25 uYowashe unyana kaYowakashe wabuya wayithimba esandleni sikaBhen-hadade unyana kaHazayeli, izixeko abezithimbile kuYowaka uyise ngemfazwe. uYowashe wamxabela izihlandlo zazithathu, wazakha izixeko zakwaSirayeli."
2Kings14:1 Ngomnyaka wesibini kaYowashe unyana kaYehowahazi, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, waba ngukumkani uAmatsiya, unyana kaYowashe ukumkani wakwaYuda."
2Kings14:2 Ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emashumi mabini anesithoba engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguYodan waseYerusalem."
2Kings14:3 Wenza okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova; kodwa kungekhona njengoDavide uyise; Wenza konke awakwenzayo uYowashe uyise.
2Kings14:4 Ke zona iindawo eziphakamileyo zonqulo zange zitshitshiswe, kodwa abantu babesabingelela beqhumisela ezigangeni."
2Kings14:5 Kwathi, bakuqiniseka ubukumkani esandleni sakhe, wababulala abakhonzi bakhe abambulalayo ukumkani uyise."
2Kings14:6 Ke oonyana bababulali akababulalanga, ngoko kubhaliweyo encwadini yomyalelo kaMoses, awawisa umthetho ngawo uYehova, esithi, Aba oyise mabangabulawa ngenxa yoonyana; oonyana mababulawe engabulawanga ukufa kooyise; kodwa elowo uya kubulawa ngesakhe isono."
2Kings14:7 Wabulala ishumi lamawaka amaEdom kwiNtlambo yeTyuwa waza wayithimba iSela edabini, wayibiza ngokuba yiYoketeli de kube namhla."
2Kings14:8 uAmatsiya wathumela abathunywa kuYowashe, unyana kaYowahazi, unyana kaYehu, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, wathi, Yiza sijongane."
2Kings14:9 uYowashe ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wathumela kuAmatsiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, wathi, iTeshelo yaseLebhanon yathumela kumsedare oseLebhanon, isithi, Unyana wam mnike intombi yakho, ibe ngumkakho."
2Kings14:10 Uwoyisile uEdom, yakhukhumala intliziyo yakho; hlonipha oku, kwaye uhlale ekhaya;"
2Kings14:11 Akaphulaphula uAmatsiya; Wenyuka ke uYowashe ukumkani wakwaSirayeli; bakhangelana ubuso, yena noAmatsiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, eBhete-shemeshe ezweni lakwaYuda."
2Kings14:12 uYuda wavutha ngumsindo kuSirayeli; basaba elowo waya ententeni yakhe.
2Kings14:13 uYowashe ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wamthabatha uAmatsiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, unyana kaYowashe, unyana ka-Ahaziya, wamsa eBhete-shemeshe, weza eYerusalem, waludiliza udonga lweYerusalem, wathabathela esangweni lakwaEfrayim, wada wesa eBhete-shemeshe isango likaEfrayim. Isango leKona liziikubhite ezimakhulu mane."
2Kings14:14 Wayithabatha yonke igolide nesilivere nezixhobo zonke ezafunyanwayo endlwini kaYehova nasebuncwaneni bendlu kakumkani namabanjwa, wabuyela kwaSamari."
2Kings14:15 Ke eminye imicimbi kaYowashe oko wakwenzayo namandla akhe nendlela awalwa ngayo noAmatsiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, akubhalwanga na encwadini yemicimbi yookumkani bakwaSirayeli?"
2Kings14:16 uYowashe walala kooyise, wangcwatyelwa kwaSamari kookumkani bakwaSirayeli unyana wakhe uYerobhoham waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings14:17 uAmatsiya, unyana kaYowashe, ukumkani wakwaYuda, wahlala iminyaka elishumi elinesihlanu emva kokufa kukaYowashe, unyana kaYehowahazi, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
2Kings14:18 Ezinye izinto zika-Amatsiya, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yookumkani bakwaYuda?"
2Kings14:19 Bamceba eYerusalem, wasabela eLakishe; bathumela emva kwakhe eLakishe, bambulalela khona."
2Kings14:20 Bamthwala ngamahashe, wangcwatyelwa eYerusalem kooyise, emzini kaDavide."
2Kings14:21 Bonke abantu bakwaYuda bamthabatha uAzariya, owayeneminyaka elishumi elinesithandathu ubudala, bamenza ukumkani esikhundleni sikayise uAmatsiya."
2Kings14:22 Nguye owayakhayo iElati, wayibuyisela kwaYuda emva kokulala kokumkani kooyise."
2Kings14:23 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinesihlanu ka-Amatsiya unyana kaYowashe, ukumkani wakwaYuda, waba ngukumkani uYarobheham, unyana kaYowashe, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, kwaSamari, iminyaka emashumi mane anamnye."
2Kings14:24 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, akatyeka kuzo zonke izono zikaYarobheham unyana kaNebhati, awawonisa ngazo amaSirayeli."
2Kings14:25 Yena walibuyisela ilizwe lakwaSirayeli, ethabathela ngaseHamati, wesa elwandle lwentlango, ngokwelizwi likaYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, awalithethayo ngoYona unyana ka-Amitayi, umprofeti, umkhonzi wakhe kuthekani ngoGathefer."
2Kings14:26 Wakubona uYehova ukuba kukrakra kunene kwaSirayeli;
2Kings14:27 uYehova akazange athi uya kutshabalalisa igama likaSirayeli phantsi kwamazulu, kodwa wamsindisa ngesandla sikaYerobhoham unyana kaYowashe."
2Kings14:28 Amanye amazwi kaYarobheham, nako konke awakwenzayo, nobugorha bakhe, ukulwa kwakhe, nokuyibuyisela kwakhe iDamasko neHamati ezweni lakwaYuda kumaSirayeli, azibhalwanga encwadini yemicimbi kookumkani bakwaSirayeli?"
2Kings14:29 Walala uYarobheham kooyise, nookumkani bakwaSirayeli; unyana wakhe uZekariya waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings15:1 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omabini anesixhenxe kaYarobheham ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, waba ngukumkani uAzariya, unyana ka-Amatsiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda."
2Kings15:2 Ubeminyaka ilishumi elinamithandathu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emashumi mahlanu anamibini engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama likanina belinguYekoliya waseYerusalem."
2Kings15:3 Wenza okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova, njengoko wenza ngako uAmatsiya uyise;"
2Kings15:4 Ngaphandle kokuba iindawo eziphakamileyo azizange zishenxiswe, abantu babesabingelela kwiindawo eziphakamileyo yaye babenyusa neziqhumiso."
2Kings15:5 uYehova wambetha ukumkani, waba neqhenqa kwada kwayimini yokufa kwakhe, wahlala kwenye indlu. uYotam, unyana wokumkani, ubephethe indlu, ebalawula abantu belizwe."
2Kings15:6 Ezinye izinto zika-Azariya, nako konke awakwenzayo, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaYuda?"
2Kings15:7 Walala uAzariya kooyise; yaye bamngcwaba nookhokho bakhe kwisiXeko sikaDavide, yaye uYotham unyana wakhe waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings15:8 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omathathu anesibini ka-Azariya ukumkani wakwaYuda, uZekariya, unyana kaYarobheham, waba ngukumkani kumaSirayeli kwaSamari, iinyanga zantandathu."
2Kings15:9 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, njengoko benza ngako ooyise; akatyeka ezonweni zikaYarobheham unyana kaNebhati, awawonisa ngazo amaSirayeli."
2Kings15:10 Wandula ke uShalum unyana kaYabheshe wamvukela waza wambulala phambi kwabantu, wambulala waza waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings15:11 Ezinye izinto zikaZekariya, nanzo zibhaliwe encwadini yemicimbi yookumkani bakwaSirayeli."
2Kings15:12 Lilo eli ilizwi likaYehova awalixelela uYehu, lisithi, Kwesesine isizukulwana kuya kuhlala oonyana bakho etroneni yakwaSirayeli. Kwaye kwenzeka."
2Kings15:13 uShalum unyana kaYabheshe waba ngukumkani ngomnyaka wamashumi omathathu anesibhozo kaUziya ukumkani wakwaYuda; waba ngukumkani kwaSamari inyanga yonke.
2Kings15:14 Wenyuka uMenahem unyana kaGadi, esuka eTirtsa, weza kwaSamari, wambulala uShalum unyana kaYabheshe kwaSamari, wambulala, waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings15:15 Ezinye izinto zikaShalum, neyelenqe awalicebayo, zibhaliwe encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli."
2Kings15:16 Waza uMenahem wayixabela iTifsa nento yonke ebikuyo, nelizwe layo, kwathabathela eTirtsa; ngenxa enokuba bengamvulelanga, wasuka waboyisa; wabaqwenga bonke abamithiyo ababekuyo."
2Kings15:17 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omathathu anesithoba ka-Azariya ukumkani wakwaYuda, waba ngukumkani uMenahem, unyana kaGadi, kwaSamari, iminyaka yalishumi."
2Kings15:18 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, yaye akazange atyeke kwizono zikaYarobheham unyana kaNebhati, awawonisa ngazo amaSirayeli."
2Kings15:19 Walingenela ilizwe uPule, ukumkani waseAsiriya; uMenahem wamnika uPule iwaka leetalente zesilivere, ukuze isandla sakhe sibe naye, ukuze abuqinise ubukumkani esandleni sakhe."
2Kings15:20 uMenahem wayibiza imali yamaSirayeli kumadoda onke okulwa, ukuba anike ukumkani waseAsiriya iishekele ezimashumi mahlanu zesilivere. Wabuya ke ukumkani waseAsiriya, akaba sahlala kwelo zwe."
2Kings15:21 Zithini na ezinye izinto zikaMenahem, nako konke awakwenzayo, ndithi, nanzo zibhaliwe encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli?"
2Kings15:22 Walala uMenahem kooyise; unyana wakhe uPeka waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe.
2Kings15:23 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omahlanu ka-Asariya ukumkani wakwaYuda, uPekakiya, unyana kaMenahem, waba ngukumkani kumaSirayeli kwaSamari, iminyaka emibini."
2Kings15:24 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova; akatyeka ezonweni zikaYarobheham unyana kaNebhati, awawonisa ngazo amaSirayeli."
2Kings15:25 Kodwa uPeka unyana kaRemaliya, intloko yakhe, wamvukela waza wambulala eSamariya kwibhotwe lendlu kakumkani, kunye noArgobhe noAri kunye namadoda angamashumi amahlanu akuGiliyadi; wambulala, waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings15:26 Ezinye izinto zikaPekaya, nako konke awakwenzayo, nanzo kubhaliwe encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli."
2Kings15:27 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omahlanu anesibini ka-Asariya ukumkani wakwaYuda, waba ngukumkani uPeka, unyana kaRemaliya, kumaSirayeli kwaSamari, iminyaka emashumi mabini."
2Kings15:28 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova; akatyeka ezonweni zikaYarobheham unyana kaNebhati, awawonisa ngazo amaSirayeli."
2Kings15:29 Ngemihla kaPeka ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, kwafika uTigelate-pilezere ukumkani waseAsiriya, walithimba i-Iyon, neAbhele-bhete-maga, neYanowa, neKedeshe, neHatsore, neGiliyadi, neGalili, lonke ilizwe lakwaNafetali; Wafuduselwa eAsiriya."
2Kings15:30 uHoseya, unyana kaEla, wamvukela uPeka unyana kaRemaliya, wambulala, waza waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe ngonyaka wamashumi amabini kaYotham unyana kaUziya."
2Kings15:31 Ezinye izinto zikaPeka, nako konke awakwenzayo, nanzo kubhaliwe encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli."
2Kings15:32 Ngomnyaka wesibini kaPeka unyana kaRemaliya, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, waba ngukumkani uYotam, unyana ka-Uziya, ukumkani wakwaYuda."
2Kings15:33 Ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka elishumi elinamithandathu engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguYerusha, intombi kaTsadoki."
2Kings15:34 Wenza okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova, wenza njengoko wenzayo uyise u-Uziya."
2Kings15:35 Ke iziganga azisuswanga; abantu babebingelela ezigangeni, nomsi wawunyuka unyuka. Wakha isango eliphezulu lendlu kaYehova."
2Kings15:36 Ezinye izinto zikaYotam, nako konke awakwenzayo, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaYuda?"
2Kings15:37 Ngaloo mihla waqala uYehova ukuthumela uRetsin, ukumkani wakwa-Aram, noPeka, unyana kaRemaliya, ukuba baye kulwa noYuda."
2Kings15:38 uYotam walala kooyise, wangcwatyelwa kooyise emzini kaDavide uyise unyana wakhe uAhazi walawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings16:1 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinesixhenxe kaPeka unyana kaRemaliya, waba ngukumkani uAhazi, unyana kaYotam, ukumkani wakwaYuda."
2Kings16:2 uAhazi ubeminyaka imashumi mabini ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka elishumi elinamithandathu engukumkani eYerusalem; akenzanga okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova uThixo wakhe, njengoDavide uyise."
2Kings16:3 Waqhubeka ehamba ngendlela yookumkani bakwaSirayeli, wamvumela unyana wakhe ukuba acande emlilweni, ngokwezinto ezicekisekayo zeentlanga ezo uYehova wazigxothayo phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
2Kings16:4 Wenza umbingelelo waza wawunyusa umsi kwiindawo eziphakamileyo nasezindulini naphantsi kwayo yonke imithi eluhlaza.
2Kings16:5 Emva koko uRetsin ukumkani wakwa-Aram noPeka unyana kaRemaliya ukumkani wakwaSirayeli benyuka baya eYerusalem ukuze balwe, bamngqinga uAhazi, kodwa abazange bamoyise."
2Kings16:6 Ngelo xesha uRetsine ukumkani wakwa-Aram wayibuyisela iElati kwa-Aram waza wawagxotha amaYuda e-Elati; Afika ke ama-Aram e-Elati, ahlala khona unanamhla."
2Kings16:7 uAhazi wathumela abathunywa kuTigelate-pilezere, ukumkani waseAsiriya, wathi, Ndingumkhonzi wakho nonyana wakho; nyuka undisindise esandleni sokumkani wakwa-Aram, nasesandleni sokumkani wakwaSirayeli, oya kufikayo ngokuchasene nam."
2Kings16:8 Ngoko uAhazi wayithabatha isilivere negolide eyayifumaneka endlwini kaYehova nakubuncwane bendlu kakumkani waza wayithumela njengesipho kukumkani waseAsiriya.
2Kings16:9 Ukumkani waseAsiriya wamphulaphula, waza ukumkani waseAsiriya wayixabela iDamasko, wayithimba, wabathimba abantu bakhe, wabasa eKire, wambulala uRetsine."
2Kings16:10 Ukumkani uAhazi waya kumkhawulela uTigelate-pilezere, ukumkani waseAsiriya, eDamasko, wasibona isibingelelo eDamasko; Ukumkani uAhazi wathumela ku-Uriya umbingeleli umfanekiso wesibingelelo, nomfanekiso waso, ngokwendlela yaso yonke."
2Kings16:11 Wasakha isibingelelo u-Uriya umbingeleli, njengako konke abemthumele khona uAhazi ukumkani eDamasko; yaye umbingeleli u-Uriya waba nxamnye noKumkani uAhazi waseDamasko."
2Kings16:12 Uthe akufika ukumkani evela eDamasko, wasibona ukumkani isibingelelo eso, yaye ukumkani waya esibingelelweni waza wabingelela phezu kwaso."
2Kings16:13 Walitshisa idini lakhe elinyukayo nomnikelo wakhe wokudla, wathulula umnikelo wakhe othululwayo, wafefa ngegazi lombingelelo wakhe wombulelo esibingelelweni."
2Kings16:14 Wasondeza isibingelelo sobhedu esiphambi koYehova phambi kwendlu, phakathi kwesibingelelo nendlu kaYehova, wasibeka kwicala elingasentla lesibingelelo."
2Kings16:15 Ukumkani uAhazi wamwisela umthetho u-Uriya umbingeleli, wathi, Kwisibingelelo esikhulu qhumisela idini elinyukayo lakusasa, nedini langokuhlwa, nedini elinyukayo lokumkani, nedini lakhe elinyukayo, nedini elinyukayo labantu bonke belizwe, nedini elinyukayo labantu nomnikelo wokudla, neminikelo yazo ethululwayo; lonke igazi ledini elinyukayo, nalo lonke igazi lombingelelo, litshize phezu kwalo; yaye isibingelelo sebandla siya kubonakala kum."
2Kings16:16 Wenza ke u-Uriya umbingeleli njengako konke awamwisela umthetho ngako ukumkani uAhazi.
2Kings16:17 Ukumkani uAhazi wawanqumla ke amasondo eenqwelo zokuhlambela, wayisusa kuzo indebe yokuhlambela; waluthoba ulwandle empahleni yobhedu ebiphantsi kwalo, walubeka endaweni egalelwe ngamatye."
2Kings16:18 Yaye indawo yokuzimela yesabatha ababeyakha endlwini nomnyango wokumkani ophuma ngaphandle, wayishenxisa endlwini kaYehova kukumkani waseAsiriya."
2Kings16:19 Ke eminye imicimbi ka-Ahazi awayenzayo, akubhalwanga na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaYuda?"
2Kings16:20 Ekugqibeleni uAhazi walala kookhokho bakhe waza wangcwatywa nookhokho bakhe kwisiXeko sikaDavide; uHezekiya unyana wakhe waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe.
2Kings17:1 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinesibini ka-Ahazi ukumkani wakwaYuda, uHoseya, unyana kaEla, waba ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli eSamariya, iminyaka yasibhozo yedwa."
2Kings17:2 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, kodwa kungekhona njengookumkani bakwaSirayeli ababengaphambi kwakhe."
2Kings17:3 uShalemanesere ukumkani waseAsiriya walwa naye; uHoseya waba ngumkhonzi wakhe, wampha izipho."
2Kings17:4 Yaye ukumkani waseAsiriya wabona icebo lesiphithiphithi kuHoseya, ngenxa yokuba wathumela abathunywa kukumkani waseYiputa yaye akazange azise isipho kukumkani waseAsiriya njengoko wayesenza minyaka le; ke ngoko, ukumkani waseAsiriya wamvalela entolongweni, waza wamkhonkxa entolongweni."
2Kings17:5 Ukumkani waseAsiriya walityhutyha lonke ilizwe, wayihlasela iSamari, wayingqinga iminyaka emithathu."
2Kings17:6 Ngonyaka wesithoba kaHoseya, ukumkani waseAsiriya wayithimba iSamariya waza wathimba oonyana bakaSirayeli wabasa eAsiriya, wababeka eHala naseHabhore entlanjeni yomlambo waseGoshan nakwizixeko zamaMedi."
2Kings17:7 Ngokuba oonyana bakaSirayeli bonayo kuYehova uThixo wabo, owabakhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa ngesandla sikaFaro ukumkani waseYiputa, boyika thixo bambi;"
2Kings17:8 Waqhubeka ehamba ngokwemiyalelo emiselweyo yeentlanga ezo uYehova wazigxothayo phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli nangokwemithetho yookumkani bakwaSirayeli ababeyenzile.
2Kings17:9 Oonyana bakaSirayeli benza ngasese izinto ezingafanelekanga kuYehova uThixo wabo, baza bazakhela iindawo eziphakamileyo kuzo zonke izixeko zabo, ukususela kwinqaba yokulinda ukusa kwisixeko esibiyelwe ngodonga."
2Kings17:10 Bamisa imifanekiso neziqu zemithi engcwele kuzo zonke iinduli eziphakamileyo naphantsi kwayo yonke imithi eluhlaza.
2Kings17:11 Baqhumisa umsi ezigangeni zonke, njengoko zenjenjalo iintlanga awazikhokelayo uYehova phambi kwabo; yaye benza izinto ezimbi ukuze bamcaphukise uYehova."
2Kings17:12 Kuba bakhonza izithixo, awayethe uYehova kubo: Ize ningakwenzi oko."
2Kings17:13 Waqononondisa uYehova kuSirayeli nakwaYuda, ngabaprofeti bonke nangemibono yonke, wathi, Buyani ezindleleni zenu ezimbi, niyigcine imithetho yam nemithetho yam, ngokomyalelo wonke endawumisela ooyihlo, endawumiselayo kuni. Ndithunywe kuni ngabakhonzi bam, abaprofeti."
2Kings17:14 Abaphulaphula, bazenza lukhuni iintamo zooyise abangakholwanga kuYehova uThixo wabo."
2Kings17:15 Bayigatya imithetho yakhe nomnqophiso awawenzayo nookhokho babo, nobungqina bakhe awayebungqinele kubo; balandela ilize, aba nto, balandela iintlanga ezibangqongileyo, awabawiselayo umthetho uYehova ukuba bangenzi."
2Kings17:16 Bayishiya yonke imiyalelo kaYehova uThixo wabo baza bazenzela imifanekiso eqingqiweyo, amathole amabini eenkomo baza benza netyholo baqubuda kuzo zonke izidalwa zasezulwini baza bakhonza uBhahali."
2Kings17:17 Batshisa oonyana babo neentombi zabo emlilweni, bekhafula, nangokukhafula, bazithengisela ukwenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, ukuba bamqumbise."
2Kings17:18 uYehova wavutha kunene ngumsindo ngakumaSirayeli, wawasusa ebusweni bakhe; akusekho bani, sisizwe sakwaYuda sodwa."
2Kings17:19 KwanamaYuda akazange ayigcine imiyalelo kaYehova uThixo wawo, kodwa aqhubeka elandela imiyalelo emiselweyo kaSirayeli awayeyenzile."
2Kings17:20 Wayilahla ke uYehova yonke indlu kaSirayeli, wabacudisa, wabanikela esandleni sabatshabalalisa, wada wabasusa ebusweni bakhe."
2Kings17:21 Ngokuba wawakrazula amaSirayeli endlwini kaDavide; bamenza ukumkani uYarobheham, unyana kaNebhati; uYarobheham wawagxotha amaSirayeli ekumlandeleni uYehova, wawonisa ngesono esikhulu."
2Kings17:22 Bahamba oonyana bakaSirayeli ezonweni zonke zikaYarobheham, awazenzayo; abazange baphambuke;"
2Kings17:23 wada uYehova wamsusa amaSirayeli kuye, njengoko wakuthethayo ngabakhonzi bakhe bonke, abaprofeti. Bafuduselwa ke oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni labo, basiwa eAsiriya unanamhla."
2Kings17:24 Wandula ke ukumkani waseAsiriya wazisa amadoda avela eBhabhiloni naseKuta naseAwa naseHamati naseSefarvayim waza wawabeka kwizixeko zaseSamariya endaweni yoonyana bakaSirayeli; bayithimba iSamariya baza bahlala kuyo izixeko ezikhoyo.
2Kings17:25 Kwathi ekuhlaleni kwabo khona abamoyika uYehova; uYehova wathumela iingonyama phakathi kwabo, zababulala abanye kubo."
2Kings17:26 Bathetha ngoko kukumkani waseAsiriya, bathi, Izizwe owazigqogqayo, wazinikela ukuba zime emizini yakwaSamari, zona aziyazi indlela yoThixo welo lizwe ke ngoko, wathumela iingonyama phakathi kwabo, zababulala, ngenxa yokuba bengayazi indlela yoThixo wehlabathi."
2Kings17:27 Wawisa umthetho ukumkani waseAsiriya wathi, Thabatha abe mnye kubabingeleli enabakhuphayo khona; mabahambe, bahlale khona, babafundise indlela yoThixo wehlabathi."
2Kings17:28 Weza omnye wababingeleli, ababebafudusile kwaSamari, wahlala eBheteli, wabafundisa ukumoyika uYehova."
2Kings17:29 Luhlanga lwazenzela olwalo uthixo, lwaza lwambeka ezindlwini zezindlu eziphakamileyo, ezo abezakhiwe ngamaSamariya, uhlanga ngohlanga emizini yalo, apho beluhlala khona."
2Kings17:30 Amadoda aseBhabheli enza iSukoti-bhenoti, amadoda aseKuti enza uNergali, amadoda aseHamati enza uAshima."
2Kings17:31 IiAve zenza uNibhas noTartake, yaye amaFarvayim atshisa oonyana bawo emlilweni ngenxa ka-Adrameleki noAnameleki, oothixo baseSefarvayim."
2Kings17:32 Bayamoyika uYehova, babamisele ababingeleli abakhulu abaphuma phantsi kwabo, babaqhumisele ezindlwini eziphakamileyo."
2Kings17:33 uYehova ayemoyika, oothixo bawo ebakhonza njengeentlanga ababefuduse kuzo."
2Kings17:34 Unanamhla asaqhubeka esenza ngokwezithethe zawo, akamhloneli uYehova, angenzi ngokwemithetho yawo, namasiko awo, nomthetho nomthetho, abewise umthetho ngawo uYehova koonyana bakaYakobi, ababewuwisela umthetho lowo wambiza ngokuba nguSirayeli."
2Kings17:35 uYehova wenza umnqophiso nabo, wabawisela umthetho, wathi, Ize ningaboyiki thixo bambi, ningabakhonzi, ningabakhonzi, ningabingeleli kubo."
2Kings17:36 Ke yena uYehova, owanikhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa ngamandla amakhulu, nangesandla esolukileyo, yena yedwa eniya kumoyika, nithandaze kuye, nibingelele kuye;"
2Kings17:37 Imithetho nezigwebo nomyalelo nomyalelo anibhalele wona, niwenze ngenyameko kude kuse ephakadeni; nize ningaboyiki thixo bambi;"
2Kings17:38 umnqophiso endawenza nani, ize ningawulibali; ningaboyiki thixo bambi."
2Kings17:39 Kodwa moyike uYehova uThixo wakho; anisindise esandleni seentshaba zenu zonke.
2Kings17:40 Kodwa abaphulaphulanga kubo, benza njengangaphambili."
2Kings17:41 Ezi ntlanga zazimoyika uYehova, zikhonza nemifanekiso yazo eqingqiweyo, oonyana bazo noonyana boonyana bazo; njengoko benza ngako ooyise, baseyenza nanamhla."
2Kings18:1 Ngomnyaka wesithathu kaHoseya unyana kaEla, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, waba ngukumkani uHezekiya, unyana ka-Ahazi ukumkani wakwaYuda."
2Kings18:2 Ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emashumi mabini anesithoba engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguAbhi, intombi kaZekariya."
2Kings18:3 Wenza okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova, njengoko wenzayo uDavide uyise."
2Kings18:4 Wazisusa iindawo eziphakamileyo waza waqhekeza izimiso zamatye wagawula amatyholo waza wayaphula inyoka yobhedu awayenzayo uMoses, ngenxa yokuba kwada kwayiloo mihla oonyana bakaSirayeli babesenza umsi ophuma kuyo, yaye wayibiza ngokuthi. Nehustan."
2Kings18:5 Wakholosa ngoYehova uThixo kaSirayeli; kangangokuba emva kwakhe akuzange kubekho unjengaye kubo bonke ookumkani bakwaYuda nakubo bonke abo babengaphambi kwakhe.
2Kings18:6 Ngenxa enokuba wanamathela kuYehova, akatyeka kuye; wayigcina imithetho abethe uYehova wayiwisela uMoses."
2Kings18:7 uYehova waba naye; naphi na apho aya khona, waphumelela, wagwilika kukumkani waseAsiriya, akamkhonza."
2Kings18:8 Wawaxabela amaFilisti, wada wesa eGaza nasemdeni wayo, ethabathela enqabeni yababoniseli, wesa emzini onqatyisiweyo."
2Kings18:9 Ngomnyaka wesine wokumkani uHezekiya, kwaba ngumnyaka wesixhenxe kaHoseya unyana kaEla, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, uShalmanesere, ukumkani waseAsiriya, wayifikela iSamari, wayingqinga."
2Kings18:10 Bayithimba ekupheleni kweminyaka emithathu, kwathi ngonyaka wesithandathu kaHezekiya, oko kukuthi, umnyaka wesithoba kaHoseya, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, yathinjwa iSamari."
2Kings18:11 Wandula ke ukumkani waseAsiriya wabakhokela oonyana bakaSirayeli ukuya kufikelela eAsiriya waza wababeka eHala naseHabhore entlanjeni yomsinga waseGoshan nakwizixeko zamaMedi.
2Kings18:12 Ngenxa yokuba bengaliphulaphulanga ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wabo, basuka bawaphula umnqophiso wakhe, nayo yonke into awawisa umthetho ngayo uMoses, umkhonzi kaYehova, abazange bayenze."
2Kings18:13 Ngonyaka weshumi elinesine kaKumkani uHezekiya, uSenaribhe ukumkani waseAsiriya wazihlasela zonke izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo zakwaYuda waza wazithimba."
2Kings18:14 Wathumela uHezekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda kukumkani waseAsiriya eLakishe, wathi, Ndihlulekile; Jika; oko undibeke khona ndiya kukuthwala. Ukumkani waseAsiriya wamnika uHezekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda amakhulu amathathu eetalente zesilivere, namashumi omathathu eetalente zegolide."
2Kings18:15 uHezekiya wamnika yonke isilivere eyafunyanwa endlwini kaYehova, nasebuncwaneni bendlu yokumkani."
2Kings18:16 Ngelo xesha uHezekiya wayikrola igolide kwiingcango zetempile kaYehova nakwimigubasi awayeyigqume uHezekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, wayinika ukumkani waseAsiriya."
2Kings18:17 Ukumkani waseAsiriya wasusa uTartan noRabhesarisi noRabheshe eLakishe, baya kukumkani uHezekiya eYerusalem, benempi enzima. Benyuka, beza eYerusalem. Benyukile ke, bafika, bema emseleni wechibi eliphezulu, endleleni ephambili yentsimi yokuhlambela."
2Kings18:18 Bambiza ukumkani, noEliyakim unyana kaHilekiya umgcini wendlu noShebhena unobhala noYowaki unyana ka-Asafu umphathi wenkundla, waphuma waya kubo."
2Kings18:19 Bathi ke ababingeleli kubo, Yithini kuHezekiya, Itsho iNkosi enkulu, ukumkani waseAsiriya, ukuthi, Liyintoni na ithemba lakho?"
2Kings18:20 Uthi (uthetha into engento): Ndinenjongo nobugorha bokulwa. Khona umthembile bani ukuba undijike?
2Kings18:21 Uyabona, ukholose ngeYiputa, le ngcongolo evikivekileyo, ethi, othe wayama ngayo, imngene esandleni, imhlabe; uya kuba njalo kuFaro, ukumkani waseYiputa, nakubo bonke abakholose ngaye."
2Kings18:22 Ke ukuba nithi kum, Sikholose ngoYehova uThixo wethu, ndithi, Asinguye na uHezekiya owabonayo izibingelelo eziphakamileyo nezibingelelo zakhe, wathi kumaYuda nakwiYerusalem, Ize niqubude phambi kwesi sibingelelo eYerusalem apha?"
2Kings18:23 Ke kaloku, yenza isivumelwano nokumkani wam, ukumkani waseAsiriya, yaye ndokunika amawaka amabini amahashe ukuba unokukhwelisa abakhweli kuwo."
2Kings18:24 Wothini na ke ukufulathela omnye wakubathetheli babakhonzi abancinane benkosi yam, ukholose ngeYiputa ngeenqwelo zokulwa nangabamahashe?"
2Kings18:25 Ngokunje ndingaphandle koYehova, ukuze ndime kule ndawo ukuba ndiyonakalise? uYehova uthe kum, Nyuka uye kweli lizwe, ulonakalise."
2Kings18:26 Ngoko uEliyakim unyana kaHilekiya noShebhena noYowaki bathi kuRabheshake: “Thetha kubakhonzi bakho ngesiSiriya; ngokuba siyasiva, anithethi kuthi ngesiYuda, ukuze nive abantu abaseludongeni."
2Kings18:27 Wathi uRabheke kubo, Inkosi yam indithume ukuba ndiwathethe la mazwi enkosini yakho na, nakuwe na? Ndathi ke, akandithumanga na kumadoda abehleli eludongeni, ukuze adle ilindle lawo, asele newayini yawo?"
2Kings18:28 Wasukuma uRabheshake waza wadanduluka ngelizwi elikhulu ngolwimi lwesiYuda wathi: “Liveni ilizwi lokumkani omkhulu, ukumkani waseAsiriya!"
2Kings18:29 Wathi uYehova, Makanganilukuhli uHezekiya, ngokuba akayi kuba nako ukunihlangula esandleni sakhe."
2Kings18:30 Musani ukumvumela uHezekiya ukuba anithembise uYehova, esithi, uYehova uya kusihlangula okunene, nesi sixeko asiyi kunikelwa esandleni sokumkani waseAsiriya."
2Kings18:31 Musani ukumphulaphula uHezekiya, ngokuba uthe ukumkani waseAsiriya, Yenzani umnqophiso nam ngomnikelo; amanzi equla lakhe;"
2Kings18:32 ndide ndize ndinise kwilizwe elinjengelizwe lenu, ilizwe lengqolowa nelewayini, ilizwe lesonka nezidiliya, ilizwe leoli lomnquma nobusi, ukuze niphile, ningafi; Akanicenga uHezekiya ngokuthi, uYehova uya kusisindisa."
2Kings18:33 Bakho na oothixo beentlanga, abalihlanguleyo ilizwe labo esandleni sokumkani waseAsiriya?"
2Kings18:34 Baphi na oothixo baseHamati neArpadi? Baphi na oothixo baseSefarvayim, neHena, neIwa? Balihlangule na elakwaSamari esandleni sam?"
2Kings18:35 Nguwuphi na koothixo bonke bala mazwe owalihlangulayo ilizwe lakhe esandleni sam, ukuze uYehova ayisindise iYerusalem esandleni sam?"
2Kings18:36 Bathi tu abantu, abamphendula; ngokuba ilizwi lokumkani belisithi, Ze ningamphenduli."
2Kings18:37 Weza uEliyakim, unyana kaHilekiya, umgcini wendlu, noShebhena umbhali, noYowaki unyana ka-Asafu, umphathi, kuHezekiya, benxibe iingubo ezikrazukileyo, bamxelela amazwi kaRabheshake."
2Kings19:1 Akuva ukumkani uHezekiya, wazikrazula iingubo zakhe, wazigqubuthela ngezirhwexayo, wangena endlwini kaYehova."
2Kings19:2 Ngoko wathumela uEliyakim owayephethe indlu, uShebhena unobhala namadoda amakhulu ababingeleli benxibe amarhonya kuIsaya umprofeti unyana ka-Amotsi."
2Kings19:3 Bathi kuye, Kwathiwa nguHezekiya, Namhlanje yimini yokusindeka, yeyokugiba, yogiba; ngokuba kuzelwe oonyana, akakho ke amandla okuzala."
2Kings19:4 Mhlawumbi uYehova uThixo wakho angaweva onke amazwi kaRabheshake, othunywe ngukumkani waseAsiriya inkosi yakhe, ukungcikiva uThixo ophilileyo; wowakhalimela ke amazwi uYehova uThixo wakho, awavileyo."
2Kings19:5 Beza ke abakhonzi bokumkani uHezekiya kuIsaya.
2Kings19:6 Wathi uIsaya kubo, Yizani, nithi enkosini yenu, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Musa ukuwoyika amazwi owavileyo, abawenze kum abakhonzi bokumkani waseAsiriya."
2Kings19:7 Yabona, ndimthumela umoya, ukuba eve udaba olubi, abuyele ezweni lakhe; yaye ndiya kumnqumla ngekrele elizweni lakhe."
2Kings19:8 Ngoko zabuya iinkosana zikaRabheshake zaza zamfumana ukumkani waseAsiriya esilwa neLibhena, ngenxa yokuba wayevile ukuba wayeyishiyile iLakishe."
2Kings19:9 Wathi akuva ngoTiraka, ukumkani wakwaKushi, Nanko ephuma eza kulwa nawe; wabuya wathuma abathunywa kuHezekiya, esithi,"
2Kings19:10 Yiza uthethe kuHezekiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, uthi, Makangakulukuhli uThixo wakho, okholose ngaye wena, usithi, Ayisayi kunikelwa iYerusalem esandleni sokumkani waseAsiriya."
2Kings19:11 Uyabona, ukuvile wena abakwenzayo ookumkani baseAsiriya kumazwe onke, ngokuwatshabhisa; kwaye uya kusindiswa?"
2Kings19:12 Oothixo beentlanga ke bazisindisa ooyise na? njengeGoshan, neHaran, neReshefe, noonyana baka-Eden ababeseTelazare?"
2Kings19:13 Uphi na ukumkani waseHamati nokumkani waseArpadi nokumkani wesixeko saseSefarvayim saseHena naseIwa?
2Kings19:14 Wathabatha uHezekiya incwadi ebhalwe ngesandla, ephuma kumthunywa lowo, wayifunda; yaye uHezekiya wenyuka waya endlwini kaYehova waza wayivula phambi koYehova."
2Kings19:15 Wathandaza uHezekiya phambi koYehova, wathi, Yehova, Thixo kaSirayeli, uhleli phezu kweekerubhi, unguye wena wedwa uthixo kwizikumkani zonke zehlabathi; Wenza izulu nehlabathi."
2Kings19:16 Yehova, vula indlebe yakho, uve; Yehova, vula amehlo akho, ukhangele, uweve amazwi kaSaneribhe, omthume ukuba angcikive uThixo ophilileyo."
2Kings19:17 Okunene, uYehova, ookumkani baseAsiriya baziphanzisile iintlanga namazwe azo;"
2Kings19:18 babanikela oothixo bazo emlilweni, kuba babengethixo, bebengumsebenzi wezandla zomntu, umthi nelitye; babatshabalalisa ke."
2Kings19:19 Ke kaloku, Yehova Thixo wethu, sihlangule esandleni sakhe, zazi zonke izikumkani zehlabathi, ukuba wena umnye, Yehova Thixo."
2Kings19:20 Wathumela ke uIsaya, unyana ka-Amotsi, kuHezekiya, esithi, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ndikuvile, undithandazele ngako uSaneribhe, ukumkani waseAsiriya."
2Kings19:21 Lilo eli ilizwi awalithethayo uYehova ngaye; Intombi, intombi enguZiyon, egxeka, ihleka; Intombi enguYerusalem yahlunguzela intloko phezu kwakho."
2Kings19:22 Ngubani na lo umtshabhisileyo, umnyelisileyo? Uliphakamise kubani na ilizwi lakho, uwaphakamisele amehlo akho kubani na? nxamnye naLowo Ungcwele kaSirayeli."
2Kings19:23 Wamngcikiva uYehova ngezithunywa zakho, usithi, Ngobuninzi beenqwelo zam zokulwa ndiqabele encotsheni yeentaba, encamini yeLebhanon, ndayigawula imisedare yayo emide kakhulu, nemisipres yayo; Ndiya kungena ezindlwini zelizwe lakhe, nakwihlathi leKarmele yakhe."
2Kings19:24 Ndimbe, ndasela amanzi abefudula engekho, ndayitshisa ngentende yeenyawo zam yonke imijelo yamanxuwa."
2Kings19:25 Anivanga na ukuba ndandikwenza oku kwakudala nendlela endandikwenza ngayo? Ndiyakwenza oku, ukuba uyenze amanxuwa imizi enqatyisiweyo."
2Kings19:26 Ngeso sizathu, abemi bayo babembalwa, boyiswa baza bahlaziswa; baba yingca yasendle, nengca, nengca phezu kwendlu, nanjengengqolowa ephetshethwayo, ingekantshuli."
2Kings19:27 Kodwa ndiyakwazi ukuhlala kwakho, nokuphuma kwakho, nokungena kwakho, nokundiqumba kwakho."
2Kings19:28 Ngenxa enokuba unyuke umsindo wakho kum, nesandi sakho esi ezindlebeni zam, ndiya kufaka ugwali lwam empumlweni yakho, nomkhala wam emlonyeni wakho, ndikubuyisele ngendlela oweza ngayo."
2Kings19:29 Nguwo lo umqondiso kuwe: lo nyaka kodliwa ummilela wodwa, ngomnyaka wesibini nidle ummilela; ngomnyaka wesithathu nohlwayela, nivune, nityale izidiliya, nidle iziqhamo zazo."
2Kings19:30 Kwaye abasindileyo bendlu yakwaYuda baya kuphinda bendelisele iingcambu phantsi baze bathwale isiqhamo phezulu.
2Kings19:31 Ngokuba amasalela aya kuza evela eYerusalem, nabasabayo entabeni yeZiyon; ubukhwele bukaYehova wemikhosi buya kukwenza oko."
2Kings19:32 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova ngokumkani waseAsiriya, ukuthi, Akayi kungena kulo mzi, akayi kutola notolo kuwo, akayi kuwuzela enengweletshetshe, akayi kuzakhela ludonga."
2Kings19:33 Indlela eze ngayo, uya kubuya ngayo, akasayi kungena kulo mzi; utsho uYehova."
2Kings19:34 Ndiya kuwukhusela lo mzi, ndiwusindise ngenxa yam, nangenxa kaDavide umkhonzi wam."
2Kings19:35 Kwaphuma isithunywa sikaYehova ngobo busuku, saxabela emkhosini wama-Asiriya ikhulu elinamanci asibhozo anesihlanu lamawaka; bavuka kusasa, bezizidumbu ezifileyo bonke."
2Kings19:36 Wasuka uSaneribhe ukumkani waseAsiriya, wabuya, wahlala eNineve."
2Kings19:37 Xa wayequbuda endlwini yothixo wakhe uNiserogi, oonyana bakhe uAdrameleki noTsaretsere bambulala ngekrele, baza basabela kwilizwe laseArarati unyana wakhe uEsar-hadon waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings20:1 Ngelo xesha wahliwa sisifo uHezekiya, wafa. Waya umprofeti uIsaya, unyana ka-Amos, kuye, wathi kuye, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yilawule indlu yakho; ngokuba uya kufa, aniyi kuphila."
2Kings20:2 Wabubhekisa eludongeni ubuso bakhe, wathandaza kuYehova, esithi:"
2Kings20:3 Khawukhumbule, ndiyakukhunga, Yehova, ukuhamba kwam phambi kwakho, enyanisweni, nangentliziyo ephelelisileyo, ndakwenza okulungileyo emehlweni akho. uHezekiya walila ngokukrakra."
2Kings20:4 Kwathi, engekaphumi uIsaya entendelezweni ephakathi, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuye, lisithi:"
2Kings20:5 Buya uye kuthi kuHezekiya ukumkani wabantu bam, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaDavide uyihlo, ukuthi, Ndiwuvile umthandazo wakho, ndizibonile iinyembezi zakho; yabona, ndingumphilisi; ngomhla wesithathu uya kunyuka aye endlwini kaYehova."
2Kings20:6 Ndiya kuyandisa imihla yakho ngeminyaka elishumi elinesihlanu; Ndiya kukuhlangula wena nalo mzi esandleni sokumkani waseAsiriya; ndiwukhusele lo mzi ngenxa yam, nangenxa kaDavide umkhonzi wam."
2Kings20:7 Wathi uIsaya, Thabathani isipha samakhiwane; Bamthabatha, bambeka emkhosini, waphila."
2Kings20:8 Wathi uHezekiya kuIsaya, Uyintoni na umqondiso wokuba uYehova uya kundiphilisa, ndinyuke ndiye endlwini kaYehova ngomhla wesithathu?"
2Kings20:9 Wathi uIsaya, Kukho umqondiso ophuma kuYehova, wokuba uya kulenza uYehova ilizwi alithethileyo: Isithunzi sihambe na izinyuko ezilishumi, sibuye na izinyuko ezilishumi?"
2Kings20:10 Wathi uHezekiya, Kulula kwisithunzi ukoluka izinyuko ezilishumi; hayi, kodwa isidima sibuyele umva izidanga ezilishumi."
2Kings20:11 Wabiza uIsaya umprofeti kuYehova, wasibuyisela isithunzi izinyuko zalishumi, ebesiziwo encwadini ka-Ahazi."
2Kings20:12 Ngelo xesha uBherodage-Bhiladan unyana kaBhaladan ukumkani waseBhabhiloni wathumela iileta nesipho kuHezekiya, ngenxa yokuba wayevile ukuba uHezekiya wayegula."
2Kings20:13 Wabeva uHezekiya, wababonisa yonke indlu yakhe yexabiso, isilivere, negolide, nobulawu, neoli entle, nendlu yonke yesikrweqe sakhe, nento yonke eyafumanekayo ebuncwaneni bendlu yakhe akwabakho nto endlwini yakhe nakubukumkani bakhe bonke, angabavumelanga uHezekiya ukuba bayibone."
2Kings20:14 Waya umprofeti uIsaya kukumkani uHezekiya, wathi kuye, Atheni na la madoda? bevela phi na ukuza kuwe? Wathi uHezekiya, Baphuma ezweni elikude, eBhabheli."
2Kings20:15 Wathi, Abone ntoni na endlwini yakho? Wathi uHezekiya, Abone into yonke esendlwini yam; akubangakho nto ndingakubonisanga yona ebuncwaneni bam."
2Kings20:16 Wathi uIsaya kuHezekiya, Live ilizwi likaYehova."
2Kings20:17 Uyabona, iyeza imihla, eya kuthinjwa ngayo yonke into esendlwini yakho, nento abayiqwebayo ooyihlo, kwada kwayile mini, basiwe eBhabheli; akuyi kusala nto, utsho uYehova."
2Kings20:18 Koonyana bakho abaya kuphuma kuwe, oya kubazala, bathabathe; yaye ziya kugcinwa kwibhotwe likakumkani waseBhabhiloni."
2Kings20:19 Wathi uHezekiya kuIsaya, Lilungile ilizwi likaYehova olithethileyo. Wathi, Akulungile na ukuba kukho uxolo nenyaniso ngexesha lam?"
2Kings20:20 Ezinye iindaba ezingakumbi zikaHezekiya nawo onke amandla akhe nendlela awahlamba ngayo equleni nokuzisa amanzi esixekweni, azibhalwanga na encwadini yemicimbi yookumkani bakwaYuda?"
2Kings20:21 Walala uHezekiya kooyise; uManase, unyana wakhe, waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings21:1 uManase ubeminyaka ilishumi elinamibini ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emashumi mahlanu anamihlanu engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguHefezibha."
2Kings21:2 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, ngokwamasikizi eentlanga, awazigqogqayo uYehova phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
2Kings21:3 Kuba waphinda wazakha iindawo eziphakamileyo ezo uHezekiya uyise wazitshabalalisayo; Wamakhela uBhahali izibingelelo, wenza neAshtaroti, njengoko wenzayo uAhabhi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli; yaqubuda yonke imikhosi yezulu, iyikhonze."
2Kings21:4 Wazakha izibingelelo endlwini kaYehova, awathi uYehova, Ndiya kulimisa eYerusalem igama lam."
2Kings21:5 Wazakhela izibingelelo zonke izidalwa zasezulwini kwiintendelezo zombini zendlu kaYehova.
2Kings21:6 Wabeka unyana wakhe umlilo, wawagcina amaxesha, wasebenzisana nemimoya, noosiyazi; wenza ububi obukhulu emehlweni kaYehova, ukuba amqumbise."
2Kings21:7 Wawumisa umfanekiso oqingqiweyo wetyholo abewenzile, endlwini awayethe uYehova kuDavide nakuSolomon unyana wakhe, Kuyo le ndlu naseYerusalem, endiyinyulileyo ezizweni zonke zakwaSirayeli, iya kukhetha ulibeke ngonaphakade igama lam."
2Kings21:8 Andisayi kuphinda ndilushukumise unyawo lwamaSirayeli emhlabeni endawunika ooyise; ngalo lonke ixesha besenza ngenyameko njengako konke endibawisele umthetho ngako, nangokomyalelo wonke, awabawiselayo uMoses umkhonzi wam."
2Kings21:9 Kodwa abaphulaphulanga kubo, yaye uManase wabahenda ukuba benze okubi ngakumbi kuneentlanga awazitshabalalisayo uYehova phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
2Kings21:10 uYehova wathetha ngabakhonzi bakhe, abaprofeti, wathi:"
2Kings21:11 Ngenxa yokuba uManase, ukumkani wakwaYuda, wayezenzile ezi zinto zicekisekayo waza wenza okubi ngakumbi kunako konke awakwenzayo ama-Amori ngaphambi kwakhe, waza wamonisa uYuda ngezithixo ezinezothe awayezinqula."
2Kings21:12 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Yabona, ndiyihlisela iYerusalem noYuda ububi, abaya kuthi bonke ababuvayo bavingce iindlebe zabo;"
2Kings21:13 Ndoyolula ulutya lokulinganisa lwakwaSamari phezu kweYerusalem, nolutya lwendlu ka-Ahabhi; yaye ndiya kuyisula iYerusalem njengokuba umntu esula isitya, asisule aze asiqhekeze."
2Kings21:14 Ndowashiya amasalela elifa lam, ndiwanikele esandleni seentshaba zawo; yaye baya kuba lixhoba nexhoba kuzo zonke iintshaba zabo;"
2Kings21:15 Ngokuba benze ububi emehlweni am, bandingcikiva, kususela kwimini abaphuma ngayo ooyise eYiputa unanamhla;"
2Kings21:16 Ngaphezu koko, uManase waliphalaza igazi elininzi elimsulwa kangangokuba wayizalisa iYerusalem, kwathabathela kwelinye icala kwesa kwelinye; ngaphandle nje kwesono sakhe awasizisa kuYuda ngokwenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova."
2Kings21:17 Ezinye izinto zikaManase, nako konke awakwenzayo, nesono sakhe awasenzayo, azibhalwanga na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaYuda?"
2Kings21:18 Ekugqibeleni uManase walala kookhokho bakhe waza wangcwatywa emyezweni wendlu yakhe, emyezweni kaUza; unyana wakhe uAmon waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings21:19 uAmon ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamibini ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emibini engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguMesulemet, intombi kaHarosi, waseYotebha."
2Kings21:20 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, njengoko wenzayo uManase uyise."
2Kings21:21 Waqhubeka ehamba ngendlela yonke awahamba ngayo uyise, wayikhonza imifanekiso eqingqiweyo awayeyikhonza uyise, waqubuda kuyo."
2Kings21:22 Wamnikela umva uYehova uThixo wooyise, akahamba ngendlela kaYehova."
2Kings21:23 Bamceba abakhonzi baka-Amon, bambulala ukumkani lowo endlwini yakhe."
2Kings21:24 Kwaye abantu behlabathi bababulala bonke abo babecebe nxamnye nokumkani uAmon; abantu belizwe bamenza ukumkani uYosiya, unyana wakhe, esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings21:25 Ezinye izinto zika-Amon awazenzayo, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaYuda?"
2Kings21:26 Wangcwatyelwa engcwabeni lakhe emhlabeni waseUsha, waba ngukumkani uYosiya, unyana wakhe, esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings22:1 uYosiya ubeminyaka isibhozo ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emashumi mathathu anamnye engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguYedida, intombi ka-Adaya umSkitiya."
2Kings22:2 Wenza okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova, wahamba ngeendlela zonke zikaDavide uyise, akatyekela ngasekunene nangasekhohlo."
2Kings22:3 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinamnye nowesibini wobukumkani bukaYosiya, ukumkani wathumela uShafan unyana ka-Atsaliya, unyana kaMeshulam, umbhali, endlwini kaYehova, ukuba athi,"
2Kings22:4 Nyuka uye kuHilekiya umbingeleli omkhulu, ukuze aqokelele isilivere eziswa endlwini kaYehova, eqokelelwe ngabagcini-masango basesidlangalaleni."
2Kings22:5 Bayinikela esandleni sabenzi bomsebenzi wendlu kaYehova; uyinike abasebenzi bendlu kaYehova, ukuba batywine iintanda zendlu kaYehova;"
2Kings22:6 nabachweli, nabakhi, nabaqingqi bamatye, bethenga imithi, namatye aqingqiweyo, ukuba kuhlaziywe indlu."
2Kings22:7 Kodwa imali eyayinikelwe ezandleni zabo ayizange ibalwe, kuba babesebenza ngokunyaniseka."
2Kings22:8 Wathi uHilekiya, umbingeleli omkhulu, kuShafan umbhali, Incwadi yomyalelo ndiyifumene endlwini kaYehova. uHilekiya wayinika uShafan incwadi leyo, wayifunda."
2Kings22:9 Weza ke uShafan umbhali kukumkani, wamxelela ukumkani, wathi, Abakhonzi bakho bayiqokelele imali eyafunyanwa endlwini, bayinikela esandleni sabasebenzi bomsebenzi wabo yendlu kaYehova."
2Kings22:10 Waxela ke uShafan umbhali kukumkani, wathi, Umbingeleli uHilekiya undinike incwadi. uShafane wafunda phambi kokumkani."
2Kings22:11 Uthe akuweva ukumkani amazwi encwadi yomyalelo, wazikrazula iingubo zakhe."
2Kings22:12 Ukumkani wamwisela umthetho umbingeleli uHilekiya, noAhikam, unyana kaShafan, noAkebhore unyana kaMikaya, noShafan umbhali, noAsaya umkhonzi wokumkani, wathi:"
2Kings22:13 Yiyani nibuze kuYehova, mna nakubantu, nangenxa yamaYuda onke, malunga namazwi ale ncwadi ifunyenweyo; ngenxa yokuba umsindo kaYehova ovuthayo nxamnye nathi mkhulu, ngenxa yokuba ookhokho bethu abazange baphulaphule ngokwamazwi ale ncwadi, ukuba enze konke okubhaliweyo ngathi."
2Kings22:14 Waya ke umbingeleli uHilekiya, noAhikam, noAkebhore, noShafan, noAsaya, kuHulida umprofeti, umkaShalum, unyana kaTikiva, unyana kaHarhazi, umgcini-ngubo; ebehlala eYerusalem ekholejini; baye bethetha naye."
2Kings22:15 Wathi kubo, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Nothi kwindoda eniyithumele kum, nithi,"
2Kings22:16 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndiyizisela ububi le ndawo, naphezu kwabemi bayo, onke amazwi encwadi leyo ayifundileyo ukumkani wakwaYuda."
2Kings22:17 Ngenxa yokuba bandinikele umva baza baqhumisa abanye oothixo ngenxa yam, ukuze bandihleke ngayo yonke imisebenzi yezandla zabo; ke ngoko, umsindo wam uya kuvutha kule ndawo, kwaye awuyi kucinywa."
2Kings22:18 Ke kukumkani wakwaYuda, lowo nimthume ukuba nibuzise kuYehova, nithi kuye, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ngokusingisele kumazwi owavileyo;"
2Kings22:19 Ngenxa yokuba intliziyo yakho ibithambile waza wazithoba phambi koYehova, ekuveni kwakho endikuthethileyo nxamnye nale ndawo nanxamnye nabemi bayo, ukuba baya kuba yintlango eqalekisiweyo, neempahla zakho zikrazukile yaye bakhale phambi kwabo amehlo akho. Ndingu; Nam ndikuvile, utsho uYehova."
2Kings22:20 Ngako oko, uyabona, ndiya kukusongela ngooyihlo, ubethwe ngoxolo engcwabeni lakho; angayi kububona amehlo enu bonke ububi endibuzisa kule ndawo. Babuya ke bamxelela ukumkani."
2Kings23:1 Wathumela ukumkani, ahlanganiselwa kuye onke amadoda amakhulu akwaYuda nawaseYerusalem."
2Kings23:2 Wenyuka ukumkani waya endlwini kaYehova, namadoda onke akwaYuda, nabemi bonke baseYerusalem, nababingeleli, nabaprofeti, nabantu bonke, kwathabathela komncinane kwesa komkhulu, wafunda kubo amazwi encwadi yomnqophiso, eyafunyanwa endlwini kaYehova."
2Kings23:3 uYehova wema ecaleni kwelitye lesikhumbuzo waza wenza umnqophiso phambi koYehova wokulandela uYehova nokugcina imiyalelo yakhe namacebo akhe nemithetho yakhe emisiweyo ngentliziyo yonke nangomoya wonke ukuze azalisekise amazwi alo mnqophiso; zibhaliwe kule ncwadi. Kwaye lonke uhlanga lwema emnqophisweni.
2Kings23:4 uYehova wamwisela umthetho uHilekiya, umbingeleli omkhulu, nababingeleli bomthetho wesibini, nabagcini-masango, ukuba bazikhuphe etempileni kaYehova zonke iimpahla zikaBhahali, nezasehlathini, nezinkwenkwezi zonke zezulu, bazitshise ngomlilo umlilo ngaphandle kweYerusalem, ezweni laseKidron, baluzisa uthuthu lwazo eBheteli."
2Kings23:5 Wabasusa ababingeleli bezithixo zookumkani bakwaYuda ababebamisele ukuba baqhumisele kwiindawo eziphakamileyo kwizixeko zakwaYuda nakwiindawo ezijikeleze iYerusalem; baqhumisela uBhahali, ilanga, nenyanga, neenkwenkwezi, nomkhosi wonke wezulu."
2Kings23:6 Wathabatha ityholo lendlu kaYehova elingaphandle kweYerusalem, lalisa emlanjaneni oyiKidron, walitshisela entilini yentlambo yaseKidron, lalisila laluthuthu, lawuphosa umgubo walo emangcwabeni abantwana bakawonke-wonke."
2Kings23:7 Wazidiliza izindlu zaseSodom ezibe zisendlwini kaYehova, apho abafazi babelukela ihlathi amalaphu ajingayo."
2Kings23:8 Wabakhupha bonke ababingeleli emizini yakwaYuda, wazenza inqambi izibingelelo eziphakamileyo, ababeqhumisela kuzo ababingeleli, ethabathela eGebha ase eBher-shebha, wazidiliza nezibingelelo eziphambi kwesango likaYoshuwa irhuluneli yomzi, ebisekunene kwindoda ekungeneni kwesango lomzi."
2Kings23:9 Kodwa ababingeleli beendawo eziphakamileyo babengenyuki baye esibingelelweni sikaYehova eYerusalem, kodwa babesidla izonka ezingenagwele phakathi kwabazalwana babo."
2Kings23:10 Wayenza inqambi iTofete, intlambo yoonyana bakaHinom, ukuze kungabikho nabani na ovumela unyana wakhe okanye intombi yakhe ukuba idlule emlilweni iye kufika eMologi."
2Kings23:11 Wawasusa amahashe ookumkani bakwaYuda, ababewanikele elangeni, emnyango wendlu kaYehova, egumbini likaNataniyeli, ithenwa, nentlambo, neenqwelo zokulwa zelanga zatshiswa ngomlilo."
2Kings23:12 Izibingelelo ezibe ziphezu kwegumbi eliphezulu lika-Ahazi, ababelenzile ookumkani bakwaYuda, nezibingelelo awazenzayo uManase ezintendelezweni zombini zendlu kaYehova, ukumkani wazidiliza, waza waziqhekeza baluphosa uthuli lwabo emlanjaneni oyiKidron."
2Kings23:13 Neenqaba ezinde, eziphambi kweYerusalem, ezilunge ngasekunene kwentaba yentshabalalo, leyo uSolomon ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wazakhela uAshtoreti, isikizi lamaTsidon, noKemoshe, isikizi lamaMowabhi, uMilkom. Ewe, wena umenze inqambi ukumkani, isikizi loonyana baka-Amon."
2Kings23:14 Wayiqhekeza imifanekiso eqingqiweyo, wawagawula amatyholo, wazizalisa iindawo zawo ngamathambo abantu."
2Kings23:15 Ngaphezu koko, wenza isibingelelo eBheteli nendawo ephakamileyo awayonisa ngayo uYerobhoham unyana kaNebhati koonyana bakaSirayeli, wasidiliza isibingelelo nendawo ephakamileyo waza wayitshisa indawo ephakamileyo waza wayiqhekeza umgubo, walitshisa ityholo."
2Kings23:16 Wajika uYosiya, wawakhangela amangcwaba abesentaba, wathumela, wawathabatha amathambo emangcwabeni lawo, wawatshisela phezu kwesibingelelo, wawenza inqambi ngokwelizwi likaYehova, abelithethile umfo wakwaThixo wayeshumayela, lowo wayethetha la mazwi."
2Kings23:17 Wathi, Ligama lini na eli ndilibonayo? Athi kuye amadoda aloo mzi, Eli lingcwaba lomfo wakwaThixo, owayevela kwaYuda, washumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zezinto owazenzayo esibingelelweni saseBheteli."
2Kings23:18 Wathi ke, Mayime; Makungabikho namnye owashukumisa amathambo akhe. Bawayeka emi kanye amathambo akhe, kunye namathambo omprofeti owayevela kwaSamari."
2Kings23:19 Yaye zonke izindlu zeendawo eziphakamileyo zezixeko zaseSamariya, ezo ookumkani bakwaSirayeli ababezakhele ukuze bamqumbise uYehova, uYosiya wazishenxisa waza wenza kuzo ngokwezenzo zakhe zonke awayezenzile eBheteli."
2Kings23:20 Wababulala bonke ababingeleli beziganga ababekhona ezibingelelweni, wawatshisa amathambo abantu phezu kwazo, wabuyela eYerusalem."
2Kings23:21 uYehova wabawisela umthetho abantu bonke, wathi, Yenzani ipasika kuYehova, uThixo wenu, ngoko kubhaliweyo encwadini yalo mnqophiso."
2Kings23:22 Kananjalo bekungenziwanga pasika ngokwale pasika ngemihla yabagwebi ababelawula kwaSirayeli, nangemihla yookumkani bakwaSirayeli, nookumkani bakwaYuda;"
2Kings23:23 Kodwa ngomnyaka weshumi elinamnye nowesibini wokumkani uYosiya, kwenziwa le pasika kuYehova eYerusalem."
2Kings23:24 Ngaphezu koko, uYosiya wabashenxisa abasebenzi abanoomoya abalahlekayo nabakhafuli nezithixo nezithixo nawo onke amasikizi awayevavanyiwe kwilizwe lakwaYuda nelaseYerusalem, ukuze azalisekise amazwi omthetho awayebhalwe encwadini Umbingeleli uHilekiya wamfumana endlwini kaYehova."
2Kings23:25 Ngaphambi kwakhe akubangakho kumkani unjengaye, ubuyeleyo kuYehova ngentliziyo yakhe yonke, nangomphefumlo wakhe wonke, nangamandla akhe onke, ngokomyalelo wonke kaMoses; kwaye emva kwakhe akubangakho namnye unjengaye."
2Kings23:26 Ke uYehova akabuyanga ekuvutheni komsindo wakhe, owavutha ngawo umsindo wakhe kuYuda, ngenxa yomsindo wonke abemngcikive ngawo uManase."
2Kings23:27 Wathi uYehova, Ndiya kumsusa uYuda ebusweni bam, njengoko ndawasusayo amaSirayeli, ndiwulahle lo mzi waseYerusalem ndawunyulayo, nendlu le ndathi, Liya kuba kuyo igama lam."
2Kings23:28 Ezinye izinto zikaYosiya, nako konke awakwenzayo, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaYuda?"
2Kings23:29 Ngemihla yakhe uFaro-nego, ukumkani waseYiputa, wamxabela ukumkani waseAsiriya ngasemlanjeni ongumEfrati, ukumkani uYosiya wamxabela; yaye wambulalela eMegido akumbona."
2Kings23:30 Abakhonzi bakhe bamthabatha ngenqwelo efileyo, besuka eMegido, bamsa eYerusalem, bamngcwabela engcwabeni lakhe. Abantu belizwe bathabatha uYowakas, unyana kaYosiya, bamthambisa, bamenza ukumkani esikhundleni sikayise."
2Kings23:31 uYowakazi ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamithathu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neenyanga ezintathu engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguHamutali, intombi kaYeremiya, waseLibhena."
2Kings23:32 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, njengoko benza ngako ooyise."
2Kings23:33 uFaro-nego wamfaka eRibhela, ezweni laseHamati, ukuba angabi nakulawula eYerusalem; walirhumela ilizwe ikhulu leetalente zesilivere, netalente yegolide yanye."
2Kings23:34 uFaro-nego wamenza ukumkani uEliyakim, unyana kaYosiya, esikhundleni sikaYosiya uyise, waliguqula igama lakhe languYoyakim, wamthabatha uYowaka; waya eYiputa, wafela khona."
2Kings23:35 uYehoyakim wamnika uFaro isilivere negolide; wayelirhafisa nje ilizwe, ukuze ahlawule imali ngokomyalelo kaFaro; Wabiza isilivere negolide kubantu belizwe, elowo nerhafu yakhe, ukuze ayinike uFaro-nego."
2Kings23:36 uYehoyakim ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; Waba neminyaka elishumi elinamnye engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguSebuda, intombi kaPedaya waseRuma."
2Kings23:37 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, njengoko benza ngako ooyise."
2Kings24:1 Ngexesha lakhe uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli wahlasela uYowakim, waba ngumkhonzi kuye iminyaka emithathu; emveni koko wajika, wamjikela."
2Kings24:2 Yaye uYehova wathumela amatutu amaKhaledi namatutu ama-Aram namatutu amaMowabhi namatutu oonyana baka-Amoni ukuba amhlasele, waza wawathumela kuYuda ukuba amtshabalalise, ngokomthetho woonyana baka-Amoni. Ilizwi likaYehova awalithethayo kubakhonzi bakhe abaprofeti bathethile."
2Kings24:3 Enyanisweni, ngokomyalelo kaYehova kwafika uYuda ukuba amshenxise phambi kwakhe ngenxa yezono zikaManase ngako konke awakwenzayo;"
2Kings24:4 nangenxa yegazi elingenatyala, ngenxa yokuba wayizalisa iYerusalem ngegazi elingenatyala; into angazange ayixolele uYehova."
2Kings24:5 Ezinye izinto zikaYehoyakim, nako konke awakwenzayo, ndithi, zibhaliwe na encwadini yemicimbi yemihla yookumkani bakwaYuda?"
2Kings24:6 uYehoyakim walala kookhokho bakhe, yaye uYoyakin unyana wakhe walawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Kings24:7 Ukumkani waseYiputa akazange abuye ezweni lakhe, kuba ukumkani waseBhabhiloni wayezithimbile zonke izinto zokumkani waseYiputa ukususela kumlambo waseYiputa ukusa kumlambo ongumEfrati."
2Kings24:8 uYehoyakin ubeminyaka ilishumi elinesibhozo ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neenyanga ezintathu engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguNehusta, intombi kaElinatan, waseYerusalem."
2Kings24:9 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, njengoko wenzayo uyise."
2Kings24:10 Ngelo xesha abakhonzi bakaNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabhiloni bayihlasela iYerusalem, yaye isixeko sangqingwa."
2Kings24:11 Wawufikela uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, bewungqinga abakhonzi bakhe."
2Kings24:12 Waya uYehoyakin, ukumkani wakwaYuda, waya kukumkani waseBhabheli, yena nonina, nabakhonzi bakhe, nabathetheli bakhe, nabakhonzi bakhe; ukumkani waseBhabheli wamthabatha ke ngomnyaka wesithoba, nowesibini wobukumkani bakhe."
2Kings24:13 Wabuthabatha khona bonke ubuncwane bendlu kaYehova, nobuncwane bendlu yokumkani, neempahla zonke zegolide, awazenzayo uSolomon ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, awazenzayo endlwini kaYehova, wazinqunqa phakathi amaqhekeza utsho uYehova."
2Kings24:14 Wayithimba yonke iYerusalem, nabathetheli bonke, namagorha onke, belishumi lamawaka abathinjwa, bonke abarhwebi, neengcibi zonke zesinyithi; akwasala bani, yaba ngamahlwempu elizwe odwa owasalayo."
2Kings24:15 Wamthabatha uYehoyakin wamsa eBhabheli, nonina wokumkani, nabafazi bokumkani, nabakhonzi bakhe, namagorha elizwe, wabafudusela eYerusalem eBhabheli."
2Kings24:16 Onke ke onke amawaka asixhenxe amadoda okulwa, newaka leengcibi nabakhandi besinyithi, bonke abomeleleyo nabakwaziyo ukulwa, bamthabatha ukumkani waseBhabheli, bamsa eBhabheli."
2Kings24:17 Ukumkani waseBhabheli wamenza uMataniya, umkhuluwa kayise, ukumkani esikhundleni sakhe, waliguqula igama lakhe laba nguZedekiya."
2Kings24:18 uZedekiya ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamnye ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka elishumi elinamnye engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguHamutali, intombi kaYeremiya, waseLibhena."
2Kings24:19 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, njengoYehoyakim."
2Kings24:20 Kwenzeka ngenxa yomsindo kaYehova eYerusalem nakwaYuda, wada wabagxotha phambi kwakhe, kangangokuba uZedekiya wamvukela ukumkani waseBhabhiloni."
2Kings25:1 Kwathi ngomnyaka wesithoba wodwa wobukumkani bakhe, ngenyanga yeshumi, ngolweshumi enyangeni leyo, wayifikela uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, nemikhosi yakhe yonke, wayingqinga iYerusalem; yaye balakha ngeenqaba macala onke."
2Kings25:2 Wangqingwa ke umzi, kwada kwangumnyaka weshumi elinamnye wokumkani uZedekiya."
2Kings25:3 Ngomhla wesithoba wenyanga yesine kwabakho indlala phakathi komzi, ababa nasonka abantu belizwe."
2Kings25:4 Uqhekekile umzi, asaba onke amadoda okulwa ebusuku, ngesango eliphakathi kweendonga zombini, elingasemyezweni wokumkani; AmaKaledi awurhawula umzi, wesuka ukumkani waya entlango."
2Kings25:5 Imikhosi yamaKaledi yamsukela ukumkani, yambamba ezinkqantosini zaseYeriko, yamphalala, yemka kuye yonke impi yakhe."
2Kings25:6 Ambamba ukumkani, amzisa kukumkani waseBhabheli, eRibhela; bamgweba."
2Kings25:7 Ababulala oonyana bakaZedekiya phambi kwamehlo akhe baza bamkrukra amehlo uZedekiya baza bamkhonkxa ngemixokelelwane yobhedu baza bamzisa eBhabhiloni.
2Kings25:8 Ngenyanga yesihlanu, ngomhla wesixhenxe enyangeni leyo, oko kukuthi, ngonyaka weshumi elinesithoba kaKumkani uNebhukadenetsare, ukumkani waseBhabhiloni, uNebhuzaradan umphathi wamafanankosi, umkhonzi kakumkani waseBhabhiloni, weza eYerusalem;"
