2Kings25:9 Wayitshisa ngomlilo indlu kaYehova, nendlu yokumkani, nezindlu zonke zaseYerusalem, nendlu yabo bonke abakhulu;"
2Kings25:10 Yaye ibutho lonke lomkhosi wamaKhaledi elalinomphathi lazaphula iindonga zaseYerusalem ngeenxa zonke.
2Kings25:11 Inxenye yabantu ababesele phakathi komzi, neembacu ezigwilike kukumkani waseBhabheli, namasalela amaninzi, wabathimba uNebhuzaradan, umthetheli wabasiki."
2Kings25:12 Kodwa umthetheli wabasiki wabashiya abathile kwizisweli zelizwe, ukuba babe ngabasebenzi bezidiliya nabalimi."
2Kings25:13 Neentsika zetempile ezazisendlwini kaYehova neebhafu nedike letempile elisendlwini kaYehova, amaKhaledi azaphula aza ayithabatha itempile kuzo aza aya eBhabhiloni."
2Kings25:14 Athabatha neembiza, nemihlakulwana, neenkamba, neendebe, neempahla zonke zobhedu ababelungiselela ngazo."
2Kings25:15 Umthetheli wabasiki wathabatha iimbiza zomlilo, nezitya zokutshiza, nayo yonke loo golide, igolide, nesilivere, nesilivere."
2Kings25:16 Iintsika zambini, nolwandle olunye, neenqwelo zokuhlambela, awazenzela indlu kaYehova uSolomon; Ubhedu lwezo zinto zonke lwalungenabunzima."
2Kings25:17 Ubude bentsika enye bebuziikubhite ezilishumi elinesibhozo, intloko yayo ibiyeyobhedu, intloko yayo ibiyeyobhedu, ukuphakama kwentloko bekuziikubhite ezintathu; Ingqolowa, iingubo, iintloko, zonke ezo nto yayizezobhedu;"
2Kings25:18 Umthetheli wabasiki wamthabatha uSeraya, umbingeleli omkhulu, noZefaniya, umbingeleli wesibini, nabagcini-masango bobathathu."
2Kings25:19 Kuloo mzi wathabatha umthetheli-mkhosi obemiselwe ukuba ube ngumveleli wamagorha, namadoda amahlanu kwaphambi kokumkani, awafunyanwayo phakathi komzi, nonobhala wenkundla, obenyule ukumkani abantu belizwe, namadoda amashumi mathandathu kubantu belizwe, awafunyanwayo phakathi komzi;"
2Kings25:20 Wayithabatha uNebhuzaradan umthetheli wabasiki, wayisa kukumkani waseBhabheli eRibhela."
2Kings25:21 Ukumkani waseBhabhiloni waboyisa waza wababulala eRibhela kwilizwe laseHamati. Ngenxa yoko uYuda wafuduswa emhlabeni wabo.
2Kings25:22 Ke abantu abasalayo ezweni lakwaYuda, awabashiyayo uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, wabamisela uGedaliya, unyana ka-Ahikam, unyana kaShafan, wangukumkani."
2Kings25:23 Beva bonke abathetheli benkundla, bona namadoda abo, ukuba ukumkani waseBhabheli umenze irhuluneli uGedaliya, beza kuGedaliya eMizpa, inguIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya, noYohanan unyana kaKeraki, noSeraya Unyana kaTanumete, kaMonetofa, noYazaniya unyana womAgati, bona namadoda abo."
2Kings25:24 Wabafungela bona namadoda abo uGedaliya, wathi kubo: “Musani ukoyika ukuba ngabakhonzi bamaKhaledi; hlalani kweli lizwe, nikhonze ukumkani waseBhabheli; kwaye uya kulunga."
2Kings25:25 Kodwa ngenyanga yesixhenxe uIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya unyana kaElishama wentsapho yasebukhosini weza waza wabulala amadoda alishumi kunye naye noGedaliya, kangangokuba wafa kunye namaYuda namaKhaledi awayekunye naye eMizpa."
2Kings25:26 Besuka ke bonke abantu, bethabathela kumfana besa kwindoda enkulu, nabathetheli bezintlu, beza eYiputa, ngenxa yokoyika amaKaledi."
2Kings25:27 Kwathi ngomnyaka wamashumi omathathu anesixhenxe wokuthinjwa kukaYehoyakin, ukumkani wakwaYuda, ngenyanga yeshumi elinesibini, ngosuku lwamashumi omabini anesixhenxe enyangeni leyo, uEvili-merodaki, ukumkani waseBhabheli, ngomnyaka wokuqalisa kwakhe ukuba ngukumkani, ukuba aphakanyiswe intloko kaYehoyakin, ukumkani wakwaYuda, ephuma entolongweni;"
2Kings25:28 Wathetha naye kakuhle, wayimisa itrone yakhe, yangaphezu kweetrone zookumkani ababenaye eBhabheli;"
2Kings25:29 Wanxiba iingubo zakhe zasentolongweni, wadla isonka phambi kobuso bakhe yonke imihla yobomi bakhe."
2Kings25:30 Imbonakalo yakhe yaba sisabelo samaxesha onke, abesinikwa ukumkani, isonka semihla ngemihla, yonke imihla yobomi bakhe."
1Chronicles1:1 uAdam, uSete, uEnoshe,"
1Chronicles1:2 uKenan, noMahalaleli, noYaredi,"
1Chronicles1:3 uEnoki, uMethusela, uLameki,"
1Chronicles1:4 uNowa, noShem, noHam, noYafete."
1Chronicles1:5 Oonyana bakaYafete nguGomere, noMagogi, noMadayi, noYavan, noTubhali, noMesheki, noTirasi."
1Chronicles1:6 Oonyana bakaGomere nguAsh. iAshkenazi neRifati neTogarma.
1Chronicles1:7 Oonyana bakaYafan nguElisha, noTarshishe, namaKiti, namaDodan."
1Chronicles1:8 Oonyana bakaKama iKushi neMizraim, iPuti neKanan."
1Chronicles1:9 Oonyana bakaKushi nguSebha, noHafila, noSabheta, noRama, noSabhetega. Oonyana bakaRama nguAsheri. Bona kwaDedan."
1Chronicles1:10 uKushi wazala uNinaroti; waqala ukuba namandla ehlabathini.
1Chronicles1:11 uJitrayim wazala amaLudi, nama-Anam, namaHabhabhi, namaNafetu;"
1Chronicles1:12 namaPatrusi, namaKasluhi, apho ayevela khona amaFilisti, namaKafetori."
1Chronicles1:13 uKanan wazala uSidon, izibulo lakhe, noHeti;"
1Chronicles1:14 namaYebhusi, nama-Amori, namaGirgashi;"
1Chronicles1:15 namaHifi, neenqanawa, nezitya zokutshiza;"
1Chronicles1:16 namaArvadi, namaTsemares, namaMathematika."
1Chronicles1:17 Oonyana bakaShem nguShem. uElam, noAshure, noArpakishadi, noLudi, noAram, noUtse, noHule, noGetere, noMesheki."
1Chronicles1:18 uArpakishadi wazala uShela; uShela wazala uHebhere.
1Chronicles1:19 uHebhere wazalelwa oonyana ababini, igama lomnye belinguPelege; ngokuba ngemihla yakhe lahlukahlukana elimiweyo; igama lomninawa wakhe belinguYoketan."
1Chronicles1:20 uYoketan wazala uAlemodade, noSelefe, noHasaremete, noYeraki;"
1Chronicles1:21 neHadoram, neUsale, neDikela;"
1Chronicles1:22 noEbhali, noAbhimayeli, noShebha;"
1Chronicles1:23 noOfire, noHafila, noYobhabhi. Bonke ke ngoonyana bakaYoketan."
1Chronicles1:24 uShem, noArpakishadi, noShela;"
1Chronicles1:25 uEbhere, uPelege, uRehu,"
1Chronicles1:26 noSerugi, noNakore, noTera,"
1Chronicles1:27 uAbram; yena nguAbraham.
1Chronicles1:28 Oonyana baka-Abraham ngu uIsake noIshmayeli.
1Chronicles1:29 Zizo ezi ke inzala yabo: owamazibulo kaIshmayeli nguNebhayoti; neKedare, neAdebheli, neMibhesam;"
1Chronicles1:30 uMishma noDuma, uMasa, uHadade, noTema;"
1Chronicles1:31 noYeture, noNafishe, noKedema. Ngabo abo oonyana bakaIshmayeli."
1Chronicles1:32 Oonyana bakaKetura, isithende sika-Abraham, bamzala uZimran, noYokeshan, noMedan, noMidiyan, noIshbhaki, noShuwagi. Oonyana bakaYokesan nguAsheri; Bona kwaDedan."
1Chronicles1:33 Oonyana bakaMidiyan nguAsheri; uEva noEfere noEnoki noAbhida noElidaha. Bonke ngoonyana bakaKetura.
1Chronicles1:34 uAbraham wazala uIsake; Oonyana bakaIsake nguAyiri; uEsawu noSirayeli.
1Chronicles1:35 Oonyana bakaEsawu nguElifazi, noRehuweli, noYehuse, noYalam, noKora."
1Chronicles1:36 Oonyana bakaElifazi nguAsheri; uTeman no-Omare, uSefi noGatam, uKenazi noTimna noAmaleki."
1Chronicles1:37 Oonyana bakaRehuweli nguNahati, noSeraki, noShama, noMisa."
1Chronicles1:38 Oonyana bakaSehire yayinguLotan noShobhali noTsibheyon noAna noDishon noEzere noDishan.
1Chronicles1:39 Oonyana bakaLotan nguHori noHomam, uTimna ubengudade boLotan."
1Chronicles1:40 Oonyana bakaShobale; noAlan, noManahati, uEbhali, uSefi, no-Onam. Oonyana bakaTsibheyon nguAsh uAya, noAna."
1Chronicles1:41 Oonyana baka-Ana; Dishon noonyana bakaDishon; uAmram noEsbhan noJitran noKeran.
1Chronicles1:42 Oonyana bakaEzere nguBhilehan, noZavan, noYakan. Oonyana bakaDishan; Utse kunye noAran."
1Chronicles1:43 Ngabo aba ookumkani ababelawula ezweni lakwaEdom, kungekabikho kumkani ubelawula oonyana bakaSirayeli; uBhela, unyana kaBhehore, igama lomzi wakhe yiDinabha."
1Chronicles1:44 Wafa uBhela, kwalawula uYobhabhi, unyana kaSeraki, waseBhotsera esikhundleni sakhe."
1Chronicles1:45 Wafa uYobhabhi, waba ngukumkani uHusam, wasezweni lakwaBhateman;"
1Chronicles1:46 Wafa uHusam, waba ngukumkani uHadadi, unyana kaBhedadi, owawabulalayo amaMidiyan ezweni lakwaMowabhi; yaye igama lomzi wakhe laliyiAwiti."
1Chronicles1:47 Wafa uHadadi, kwalawula uSamla waseMasereki esikhundleni sakhe."
1Chronicles1:48 Wafa uSamla, kwalawula uSawule, waseRehobhoti emlanjeni esikhundleni sakhe."
1Chronicles1:49 Wafa uSawule, kwalawula uBhahali-hanan, unyana ka-Akebhore, esikhundleni sakhe."
1Chronicles1:50 Wafa uBhahali-hanan, kwalawula uHadade esikhundleni sakhe; igama lomzi wakhe yiPahi; Igama lomkakhe lalinguMehetabheli, intombi kaMatrede, intombi kaMeshahabhi."
1Chronicles1:51 Naye uHadade wafa. Ke izikhulu zakwaEdom zaba; nenkosana uTimna, nenkosana uAliya, nesikhulu esinguYeteti;"
1Chronicles1:52 noNtente-yakhe, inkosana uEla, nesikhulu esinguPinon;"
1Chronicles1:53 neNkosana uKenazi, neNkosana uTemane, neNkosana uMibhetsare,"
1Chronicles1:54 iNkosana uMagdiel, iNkosana u-Iram. Ziinkosana zakwaEdom ezo."
1Chronicles2:1 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaSirayeli; uRubhen, uSimon, uLevi noYuda, uIsakare noZebhulon;"
1Chronicles2:2 uDan, uYosefu noBhenjamin, uNafetali, uGadi noAshere."
1Chronicles2:3 Oonyana bakaYuda nguAsheri; kunye no-Onan noShela; bathathu kwabazalelwa uShuwa, intombi yomKanan. Ke uEre, amazibulo kaYuda, ube enobubi emehlweni kaYehova; wambulala."
1Chronicles2:4 uTamare umolokazana wakhe wamzalela uPeretse noSaraki. Bonke oonyana bakaYuda baba bahlanu.
1Chronicles2:5 Oonyana bakaPeretse nguHetseron noHamuli.
1Chronicles2:6 Oonyana bakaSeraki yayinguSheraki; uZimri, uEtan, uHeman, uKalkoli noDara, bebahlanu."
1Chronicles2:7 Oonyana bakaKarmi nguAkare, umhlebi kaSirayeli, wenza ubumenemene entweni esingelwe phantsi."
1Chronicles2:8 Oonyana bakaEtan nguAzariya.
1Chronicles2:9 Oonyana bakaHetseron awazalelwa kubo; uJerekimeli noRam noKelubhayi.
1Chronicles2:10 Kwaye uRame wazala uAminata; uAminadabhi wazala uNashon, intloko yoonyana bakaYuda;"
1Chronicles2:11 uNagshon wazala uSalma, uSalma wazala uBhohazi;"
1Chronicles2:12 uBhohazi wazala uObhedi; uObhedi wazala uYese;
1Chronicles2:13 uYese wazala uEliyabhi, amazibulo akhe, noAbhinadabhi owesibini, noShima owesithathu;"
1Chronicles2:14 owesine uNataniyeli, wesihlanu nguRadayi;"
1Chronicles2:15 noOtsem owesithandathu, noDavide owesixhenxe;"
1Chronicles2:16 Oodade wabo yayinguTseruya noAbhigali. Oonyana bakaTseruya nguAbhishayi, noYowabhi, noAsaheli bathathu."
1Chronicles2:17 uAbhigali wazala uAmasa; uyise ka-Amasa ebenguYetere umIshmayeli.
1Chronicles2:18 uKalebhi, unyana kaHetseron, wazala oonyana baka-Azubha umkakhe, noYeriyoti; Ngabo aba oonyana bakhe; iYezere, neSobhabhi, neArdon."
1Chronicles2:19 Wafa uAsubha, uKalebhi wamthabatha uEfrata, wamzalela uHure."
1Chronicles2:20 uHure wazala u-Uri, u-Uri wazala uBhetsaleli;"
1Chronicles2:21 Emveni koko wayingena uHetseron intombi kaMagire, uyise kaGiliyadi, wayizeka eminyaka imashumi mathandathu ezelwe; wazala uSegube."
1Chronicles2:22 uSegubhe wazala uYahire, obenemizi emashumi mabini anamithathu ezweni laseGiliyadi."
1Chronicles2:23 Wathabatha kubo iGeshuri, nama-Aram, nemizi kaYahire, neKenati namagxamesi ayo: izixeko ezimashumi mathandathu. Bonke aba yayingoonyana bakaMagire, uyise kaGiliyadi."
1Chronicles2:24 Emva kokufa kukaHetseron eKalebhefrata, uAbhiya, umfazi kaHetseron, wazala uAshure, uyise kaTekowa."
1Chronicles2:25 Oonyana bakaYerakemeli, amazibulo kaHetseron, nguRam owamazibulo, noBhuna, no-Oren, no-Osem, noAhiya."
1Chronicles2:26 uYerameli ebenomnye umfazi, ogama belinguAtara; ibingu mama ka Onam."
1Chronicles2:27 Oonyana bakaRam, amazibulo kaYerameli, nguMahase, noYamin, noEkere."
1Chronicles2:28 Oonyana bakaOnam nguShemayi noYada noonyana bakaSamayi; uNadabhi noAbisur.
1Chronicles2:29 Igama lomka-Abhishure lalinguAbhihayile; wamzalela uAgbhane noMolide.
1Chronicles2:30 Oonyana bakaNadabhi nguSeledi noApayim, kodwa uSelede wafa engenabantwana."
1Chronicles2:31 Oonyana baka-Apayim nguIshi. Oonyana bakaIshi yayinguIshi. Sheshane. Oonyana bakaSheshan nguSheshan; Ima kancinci.
1Chronicles2:32 Oonyana bakaYada umntakwaboSamayi yayinguYada. uYetere noYonatan, noYetere wafa engenabantwana."
1Chronicles2:33 Oonyana bakaYonatan nguAsheri; uPelete noZaza. Ngabo abo oonyana bakaYeramiyeli.
1Chronicles2:34 uSeshane ebengenanyana, eneentombi zodwa. uSheshane ubenomkhonzi ongumYiputa, ogama belinguYarha."
1Chronicles2:35 uSeshane wamnika uYarha, umkhonzi wakhe, intombi yakhe, yangumkakhe; wamzalela uAtayi."
1Chronicles2:36 uAtayi wazala uNatan; uNatan wazala uSabhadi;
1Chronicles2:37 uSabhadi wazala uEfali; uEfelali wazala uObhedi;
1Chronicles2:38 uObhedi wazala uYehu; uYehu wazala uAzariya;
1Chronicles2:39 uAzariya wazala uHelesi, uHeleshe ozala uEleyasa;"
1Chronicles2:40 uElesa wazala uShisamayi; uShisamayi wazala uShalum;
1Chronicles2:41 uShalum wazala uYekamiya; uYekamiya wazala uElishama;
1Chronicles2:42 Oonyana bakaKalebhi, umntakwabo Yerameli, yayinguMesha amazibulo akhe, uyise kaSife noonyana bakaMaresa, uyise kaHebron."
1Chronicles2:43 Oonyana bakaHebron nguKora, noTapuwa, noRekem, noShema."
1Chronicles2:44 uShema wazala uRaham, uyise kaYokowam, noRekem, uyise kaShema."
1Chronicles2:45 Unyana kaShemayi nguMahon; uMahon wazala iBhete-tsure.
1Chronicles2:46 uEva, isithende sikaKalebhi, wazala uHaran, uMoses noGas; uHaran wazala uGase."
1Chronicles2:47 Oonyana bakaYagedayi nguRegem, noYotam, noGeshan, noPelete, noEfa, noShahafu."
1Chronicles2:48 uMahaga, isithende sikaKalebhi, wazala uShebhere noTirana."
1Chronicles2:49 Wazala uShahafe uyise wabaseMademana, noSewa ozala amaMagena, noyise wabaseGibheha; Intombi kaKalebhi ibinguAhazi."
1Chronicles2:50 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaKalebhi, unyana kaHure, amazibulo kaEfrata; nguSobhali uyise kaKiriyati-yeharim;"
1Chronicles2:51 uSalima, uyise kaBhetelehem, uHarefe, uyise wabaseBhete-gadere."
1Chronicles2:52 uShobhali uyise kaKiriyati-yeharim wayenoonyana; Abathathu abanesiqingatha abakwaManase.
1Chronicles2:53 Nemizalwane yaseKiriyati-yeharim; amaBhaite, amaPugi, amaSumati namaYiputa; kubo kwaphuma amaBasariya namaStauli."
1Chronicles2:54 Oonyana bakaSalma nguAsheri; iBhetelehem, namaNetofi, neAtaroti, nendlu kaYowabhi, nesiqingatha soonyana bakaManaki, namaTsoro."
1Chronicles2:55 Nenzala yababhali, ababehlala eYabheshe; nabahlambi behlamba, noShimeyi, nooSuga. Ngawo lawo amaKanan, awaphuma eHamati, uyise wendlu kaRekabhi."
1Chronicles3:1 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaDavide, awabazalelwayo eHebron; owamazibulo nguAmnon ngoAkinowam waseYizereli; owesibini nguDaniyeli ka-Abhigali waseKarmele;"
1Chronicles3:2 Owesithathu nguAbhisalom, unyana kaMagi, intombi kaTalemayi, ukumkani waseGeshuri; owesine nguAdoniya, unyana kaHagiti;"
1Chronicles3:3 owesihlanu nguShefatiya wakwa-Abhitali; owesithandathu nguJitream ngoEgla umkakhe.
1Chronicles3:4 Abo bathandathu bazalelwa eHebron; waba neminyaka esixhenxe neenyanga ezintandathu engukumkani eYerusalem, waba neminyaka emashumi mathathu anamithathu engukumkani."
1Chronicles3:5 Wabazalelwa eYerusalem; uShimeha, noShobhabhi, noNatan, noSolomon, bobane; nguBhatshe-shuwa intombi ka-Amiyeli;"
1Chronicles3:6 noIbhare, noElishama, noElifelete;"
1Chronicles3:7 noNoga, noNefege, noYafiya;"
1Chronicles3:8 Kukho uElishama, uEliyada, noElifeleti abasithoba bodwa."
1Chronicles3:9 Bonke aba yayingoonyana bakaDavide, ngaphandle koonyana bezithende, noTamare udade wabo."
1Chronicles3:10 Unyana kaSolomon yayinguRehabheham, unyana wakhe uAbhiya, unyana wakhe uAsa, unyana wakhe uYoshafati,"
1Chronicles3:11 nguYoram unyana wakhe, nguAhaziya unyana wakhe, nguYowashe unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles3:12 uAmatsiya unyana wakhe, uAzariya unyana wakhe, uYotam unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles3:13 nguAhazi unyana wakhe, nguHezekiya unyana wakhe, nguManase unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles3:14 unyana wakhe uAmon, unyana wakhe uYosiya."
1Chronicles3:15 Oonyana bakaYosiya nguYohanan inkulu, noYoyakim owesibini, nguZedekiya owesithathu, nguShalum owesine."
1Chronicles3:16 Oonyana bakaYehoyakim nguYekoniya unyana wakhe, nguZedekiya unyana wakhe."
1Chronicles3:17 Oonyana bakaYekoniya nguAsire unyana wakhe, uSalatiyeli;"
1Chronicles3:18 noMalekiram, noPedaya, noSenazare, noYekamiya, noHosama, noNedabhiya."
1Chronicles3:19 Oonyana bakaPedaya nguZerubhabheli noShimehi; noonyana bakaZerubhabheli; ooMeshulam, noHananiya, noShelomoti udade wabo;"
1Chronicles3:20 noHasubha, no-Oheli, noBheriya, noHasadiya, noYusabhetsede;"
1Chronicles3:21 Oonyana bakaHananiya nguShela; oonyana bakaPelatiya noIsaya: oonyana bakaRefaya, oonyana baka-Arnan, oonyana baka-Obhadiya, oonyana bakaSheganiya."
1Chronicles3:22 Oonyana bakaSheganiya yayinguShekaniya noonyana bakaShemaya; uHatusi, noJigale, noBharja, noNearjah, noShafati ezintandathu."
1Chronicles3:23 Oonyana bakaNeriyasi yayinguAriyeli uEliyonayi, noHezekiya, noAsrikam;"
1Chronicles3:24 Oonyana bakaEliyonayi nguHodaya, noEliyashibhi, noPelaya, noAkubhe, noYohanan, noDelaya, noAnani, basixhenxe."
1Chronicles4:1 Oonyana bakaYuda nguAsheri; noPeretse, noHetseron, noKarmi, noHure, noShobhali."
1Chronicles4:2 uRehaya, unyana kaShobhali, wazala uYahati; uYahati wazala uAkumayi noLahadi. Yiyo leyo imizalwane yamaSora."
1Chronicles4:3 Ngabo abakayise uEtam; neYizereli, neIsma, noIdebhas; igama lodade wabo lalinguHaselponi;"
1Chronicles4:4 noPenuweli ozala amaGedore, noEzere ozala uHusa. Ngabo abo oonyana bakaHure, amazibulo kaEfrata, uyise kaBhetelehem."
1Chronicles4:5 Uyise kaTekowa wayenabafazi ababini, uHela noNaara."
1Chronicles4:6 uNahara wamzalela uAhuzam, noHefere, noTemeni, noHahashtari. Aba yayingoonyana bakaNahara."
1Chronicles4:7 Oonyana bakaHela nguSereti noItsohare noEtenan.
1Chronicles4:8 uKose wazala uAnubhi, noSobeba, neentsapho zika-Akarhali unyana kaHarum."
1Chronicles4:9 Ke kaloku uYabhetse ebezukile kunabazalwana bakhe; Unina wamthiya igama elinguYabheshe, esithi, Kungokuba ndimzele ndinentlungu."
1Chronicles4:10 uYabhetse wambongoza uTHIXO kaSirayeli, esithi: “Owu, ukuba ngokwenene uyafuna ukundisikelela waza wandisa ilizwe lam, ukuba isandla sakho sibe phezu kwam nokuba undikhusele ebubini, ukuze ndingandenzakalisanga. Waza uThixo wamnika oko akucelayo."
1Chronicles4:11 Kelube, umninawa kaShuwa, wazala uMehiri, uyise kaEston."
1Chronicles4:12 Kwaye uEston wazala uBhetrafa noPaseka noTehina, uyise kaIrinahasi. Ngawo lawo amadoda akwaRega."
1Chronicles4:13 Oonyana bakaKenazi nguOteniyeli noSeraya; noonyana bakaOteniyeli; Hathath.
1Chronicles4:14 uMehonotayi wazala uOpra; uSeraya wazala uYowabhi, ozala ooSihlambo samaKerasim; ngokuba bezizingcibi."
1Chronicles4:15 Noonyana bakaKalebhi, unyana kaYefune; uIru, noEla, noNaham; Oonyana bakaEla nguKenazi."
1Chronicles4:16 Oonyana bakaYehaleli nguSife noZifa, noTiriya, noAzareli."
1Chronicles4:17 Oonyana bakaEzra nguYetere, noMerede, noEfere, noYalon; Wazala uMiriyam noSamayi noIshbha, uyise kaEstemowa."
1Chronicles4:18 uYuda umkakhe wazala uYarede, uyise kaGedore, noHebhere, ozala ooSogo, noYekutiyeli, ozala uSanowa. Ngabo abo oonyana bakaBhitiya, intombi kaFaro, eyazeka uMeredeti;"
1Chronicles4:19 Oonyana bomkakhe uHodya, udade boNaham, nguyise kaKehila umGaram, noEstemowa waseMagati."
1Chronicles4:20 Oonyana bakaShimon nguAmnon noRina, uBhen-hanan noTilon. Oonyana bakaIshi nguShuheti noBhen-soheti."
1Chronicles4:21 Oonyana bakaShela, unyana kaYuda, nguEre, uyise kaLeka, noLada, uyise kaMaresa, nemizalwane yendlu yabasebenza kakuhle, yendlu ka-Ashbheha;"
1Chronicles4:22 noYokim namadoda akwaKosebha, noYowashe, noSarafi, ababelawula amaMowabhi, noYashubilehem. Kwaye ezi zizinto zakudala."
1Chronicles4:23 Ngabo abo ababumbi nabahlala phakathi kwezityalo neentango; bahlala khona nokumkani emsebenzini wakhe.
1Chronicles4:24 Oonyana bakaSimon nguNemuweli, noYamin, noYaribhi, noSaraki, noSawule,"
1Chronicles4:25 nguShalum unyana wakhe, nguMibhesam unyana wakhe, nguMishma unyana wakhe."
1Chronicles4:26 Oonyana bakaMishma nguHamuweli unyana wakhe, nguSagure unyana wakhe, nguShimehi unyana wakhe."
1Chronicles4:27 uShimehi ubenoonyana abalishumi elinabathandathu, neentombi ezintandathu; kodwa abazalwana bakhe ababanga nabantwana baninzi, yaye yonke inzala yabo ayizange yande njengoonyana bakaYuda."
1Chronicles4:28 Bahlala eBher-shebha naseMolada naseHatsare;
1Chronicles4:29 noBhiliha, noEsem, noToladi;"
1Chronicles4:30 neBhetuweli, neHorma, neTsikelage;"
1Chronicles4:31 neBhete-marabhoti, neHazarusi, neBhete-bhiri, neShaharayim. Yiyo leyo imizi yabo, wada uDavide waba ngukumkani."
1Chronicles4:32 Imizi yabo yayiyiEtam, neAyin, neRimon, neToken, neAsan, izixeko ezihlanu;"
1Chronicles4:33 nemizi yabo yonke ebeyiyiphahlile loo mizi, kwesa kwaBhahali. Zizo ezo iindawo zabo zokuhlala nemizalwane yabo."
1Chronicles4:34 NoMesobhabhe, noYamleki, noYosa unyana ka-Amatsiya;"
1Chronicles4:35 noYoweli, noYehu, unyana kaYosibhiya, unyana kaSeraya, unyana ka-Asiyeli;"
1Chronicles4:36 noEliyohenayi, noYakobi, noYohana, noAsaya, noAdiyeli, noYeshimiyeli, noBhenaya;"
1Chronicles4:37 noSisa, unyana kaZifi, unyana ka-Alon, unyana kaYedaya, unyana kaZimri, unyana kaShemaya;"
1Chronicles4:38 Abo bakhankanyiweyo ngamagama babezizikhulu ngokwemizalwane yabo, nezindlu zooyise zaba ninzi kakhulu."
1Chronicles4:39 Banduluka besa eGedore ngasempumalanga komfula, besiya kuyifunela utyani imfuyo yabo."
1Chronicles4:40 Bafumana idlelo elityebileyo, elihle; ngokuba bebemi khona abantu bakwaHam kudala."
1Chronicles4:41 Beza abamagama abhaliweyo ngemihla kaHezekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, bazidiliza iintente zabo, nezakhiwo ezafunyanwa khona, baziqalekisa unanamhla, bahlala emagumbini abo okudlela, ngokuba bekungekho namnye iintente amadlelo emihlambi yabo."
1Chronicles4:42 Abanye kubo, oonyana bakaSimon, bengamakhulu amahlanu, benyuka baya entabeni yakwaSehire, benoPelatiya, noNeriya, noRefaya, noUziyeli, oonyana bakaIshi, bengabathetheli."
1Chronicles4:43 Bawathimba amasalela ama-Amaleki awayekhululwe, ahlala khona unanamhla."
1Chronicles5:1 Oonyana bakaRubhen, amazibulo kaSirayeli, yena waba ngamazibulo; Kungokuba wasenza inqambi isilili sikayise, ubuzibulo bakhe banikwa oonyana bakaYosefu, unyana kaSirayeli; ubuzibulo."
1Chronicles5:2 Kuba uYuda wazenza wanegunya phezu kwabazalwana bakhe, kwaphuma kuye inganga; kodwa ubuzibulo yayibubo bukaYosefu:"
1Chronicles5:3 Ndithi oonyana bakaRubhen, izibulo likaSirayeli, nguHanoki, noPalu, nguHetseron, noKarmi;"
1Chronicles5:4 Oonyana bakaYoweli; unyana wakhe uShemaya, nguGogi unyana wakhe, nguShimehi unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles5:5 nguMika unyana wakhe, nguRehaya unyana wakhe, nguBhahali unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles5:6 unyana wakhe uBhehera, awathinjwa nguTigelati-pilenezere, ukumkani waseAsiriya; ibiyinkosana yamaRubhen."
1Chronicles5:7 Abazalwana ngokwemizalwane yabo emilibeni yokuzalwa ngokwemizalwane yabo, inkulu yooyise ibinguYehiyeli noZekariya,"
1Chronicles5:8 noBhela unyana ka-Asazi, unyana kaShema, unyana kaYoweli, ohleli eArohere, wesa eNebho naseBhahali-meyon;"
1Chronicles5:9 Ngasempuma wahlala entlango ukuya kufikelela kumlambo umEfrate, ngenxa yokuba imihlambi yabo yayimininzi kwilizwe laseGiliyadi."
1Chronicles5:10 Ngemihla kaSawule bawaxabela amaHagaren, awawa esandleni sabo, ahlala ezintenteni zawo ezweni lonke lasempumalanga laseGiliyadi."
1Chronicles5:11 Oonyana bakaGadi bahlala malungana nabo ezweni laseBhashan, besa eSalga."
1Chronicles5:12 uYoweli wayeyintloko, owesibini yayinguShafam, uYahanayi noShafati, eBhashan."
1Chronicles5:13 Abazalwana babo ngokwezindlu zooyise nguMikayeli, noMeshulam, noShebha, noYorayi, noYagan, noZiya, noHebhere, basixhenxe;"
1Chronicles5:14 Ngabo aba oonyana baka-Abhihayili, unyana kaHuri, unyana kaYarowa, unyana kaGiliyadi, unyana kaMikayeli, unyana kaYese, unyana kaYagdo, unyana kaBhusi;"
1Chronicles5:15 uAki, unyana ka-Abhediyeli, unyana kaGuni, intloko yezindlu zabo."
1Chronicles5:16 Bahlala eGiliyadi naseBhashan namadlelo ayo, namadlelo onke aseSharon ezweni labo."
1Chronicles5:17 Bonke aba babebhalwe ngokwemizalwane, ngemihla kaYotam ukumkani wakwaYuda, nangemihla kaYarobheham ukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
1Chronicles5:18 Oonyana bakaRubhen, noGadi, nesinye isizwe sakwaManase, amagorha aphethe izixhobo nekrele, abatola izaphetha, abenolwazi lwemfazwe, babengamashumi amane amawaka, anamakhulu mane, anamanci mathandathu ukuya emfazweni."
1Chronicles5:19 Kwaye balwa ngokuchasene noHagare, ngokuchasene noYitare noNifayi noNodabhi."
1Chronicles5:20 Bancedwa kuwo, kwaza kwanikelwa ooHagare esandleni sabo, nabo bonke ababenabo; ngokuba babekholose ngaye."
1Chronicles5:21 Bayithabatha imihlambi yabo; iinkamela zabo ngamashumi omahlanu amawaka, anamakhulu mabini anamanci mahlanu, mpahla emfutshane, namawaka amabini amaesile, nekhulu lamawaka amadoda."
1Chronicles5:22 Kuba babebaninzi ababuleweyo, ngokuba imfazwe leyo ibiyekaThixo; Bahlala ke endaweni yabo kwada kwathinjwa."
1Chronicles5:23 Oonyana besiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase babehlala kwelo zwe; banduluka bethabathela eBhashan, besa eBhahali-hermon, naseSenire, besa entabeni yeHermon."
1Chronicles5:24 Zizo ezi iintloko zezindlu zooyise: uEfere, noIshi, noEliyeli, noAsriyeli, noYeremiya, noHodawa, noYagiyeli, amadoda anobukroti, amadoda anegama, iintloko zezindlu zooyise."
1Chronicles5:25 Bamona uTHIXO wookhokho babo baza bakrexeza noothixo beentlanga zelo lizwe uThixo wayewazitshabalalisa phambi kwabo.
1Chronicles5:26 uThixo kaSirayeli wawukhupha umoya kaPule, ukumkani waseAsiriya, nomoya kaTilegati-pilenezere, ukumkani waseAsiriya, wabasusa, amaRubhen, namaGadi, nesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase; babazisa eHala, naseHabhore, naseHar, besa emlanjeni oyiGoshan, unanamhla."
1Chronicles6:1 Oonyana bakaLevi nguAsheri; uGershon, noKehati, noMerari."
1Chronicles6:2 Oonyana bakaKehati nguAmram, noItsare, noHebron, noUziyeli."
1Chronicles6:3 Oonyana baka-Amram nguAsheri; uAron noMosis noMiriyam noonyana baka-Aron; uNadabhi noAbhihu, uElazare noItamare."
1Chronicles6:4 uElazare wazala uPinehasi; uPinehasi wazala uAbhishuwa;
1Chronicles6:5 uAbhishuwa wazala uBhuki, uBhuki wazala u-Uzi;"
1Chronicles6:6 u-Uzi wazala uSeraya; uSeraya wazala uMerayoti;
1Chronicles6:7 uMerayoti wazala uAmariya, uAmariya wazala uAkitubhi;"
1Chronicles6:8 uAhitubhi wazala uTsadoki, uTsadoki wazala uAhimahatse;"
1Chronicles6:9 uAhimahatse wazala uAzariya; uAzariya wazala uYohanan;
1Chronicles6:10 uYohanan nguyise ka-Azariya, obengumbingeleli endlwini awayakhayo uSolomon eYerusalem;"
1Chronicles6:11 uAzariya wazala uAmariya, uAmariya wazala uAkitubhi;"
1Chronicles6:12 uAhitubhi wazala uTsadoki, uTsadoki wazala uShalum;"
1Chronicles6:13 uShalum wazala uHilekiya; uHilekiya wazala uAzariya;
1Chronicles6:14 uAzariya wazala uSeraya; uSeraya wazala uYosadaki;
1Chronicles6:15 uYotsadaki waya ekuthinjweni ekumshenxiseni kukaYehova uYuda neYerusalem ngesandla sikaNebhukadenetsare.
1Chronicles6:16 Oonyana bakaLevi ngu uGershom, noKehati, noMerari."
1Chronicles6:17 Ngawo lawo amagama oonyana bakaGershom; uLibheni noShimehi.
1Chronicles6:18 Oonyana bakaKehati nguAmram, noItsare, noHebron, noUziyeli."
1Chronicles6:19 Oonyana bakaMerari nguMali noMushi. Zizo ezo ke inzala kaLevi ngokwezindlu zooyise.
1Chronicles6:20 Van Gersom; nguLibheni unyana wakhe, nguYahati unyana wakhe, nguShima unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles6:21 nguYowaki unyana wakhe, nguIdo unyana wakhe, nguSeraki unyana wakhe, nguYaterayi unyana wakhe."
1Chronicles6:22 Oonyana bakaKehati nguAminadabhi unyana wakhe, nguKora unyana wakhe, nguAsire unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles6:23 unyana wakhe nguElikana, nguEbhiyasafu unyana wakhe, noAsire unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles6:24 nguTahati unyana wakhe, ngu-Uriyeli unyana wakhe, ngu-Uziya unyana wakhe, nguSawule unyana wakhe."
1Chronicles6:25 Oonyana bakaElikana nguAmasayi noAkimoti.
1Chronicles6:26 KuElikana: oonyana bakaElikana; unyana wakhe uSofayi, noNahati unyana wakhe;"
1Chronicles6:27 noEliyabhi unyana wakhe, noYeroham unyana wakhe, noElikana unyana wakhe."
1Chronicles6:28 Oonyana bakaSamuweli nguAsheri; owamazibulo nguVashni noAbhiya.
1Chronicles6:29 Oonyana bakaMerari nguMageli unyana wakhe, noLibheni, noShimehi unyana wakhe, no-Uza unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles6:30 noSimeha unyana wakhe, noHagia unyana wakhe, noAsaya unyana wakhe."
1Chronicles6:31 Aba ngabo uDavide wababeka phezu kwenkonzo yokuvuma endlwini kaYehova emva kokuphumla kwetyeya.
1Chronicles6:32 Baqhubeka bekhonza ngengoma phambi kwendawo yokuhlala yentente yokuhlangana de uSolomon wayakha indlu kaYehova eYerusalem;
1Chronicles6:33 Yaye babengabo babelindile nabantwana babo koonyana bamaHeti nguHeman, imvumi, unyana kaYoweli, unyana kaSamuweli;"
1Chronicles6:34 unyana kaElikana, unyana kaYeroham, unyana kaEliyeli, unyana kaTowagi,"
1Chronicles6:35 unyana kaSufi, unyana kaElikana, unyana kaMahati, unyana ka-Amasayi,"
1Chronicles6:36 unyana kaElikana, unyana kaYoweli, unyana ka-Azariya, unyana kaZefaniya,"
1Chronicles6:37 unyana kaTahati, unyana ka-Asire, unyana ka-Abhiyasafu, unyana kaKora;"
1Chronicles6:38 unyana kaItsare, unyana kaKehati, unyana kaLevi, unyana kaSirayeli."
1Chronicles6:39 uAsafu umzalwana wakhe wema ngasekunene kwakhe, inguAsafu unyana kaBherekiya, unyana kaShimeha;"
1Chronicles6:40 unyana kaMikayeli, unyana kaBhaseya, unyana kaMalekiya,"
1Chronicles6:41 unyana kaEtene, unyana kaSeraki, unyana ka-Adaya,"
1Chronicles6:42 unyana kaEtan, unyana kaShima, unyana kaShimehi;"
1Chronicles6:43 unyana kaYahati, unyana kaGershom, unyana kaLevi."
1Chronicles6:44 Bemi abazalwana babo, oonyana bakaMerari, ngasekhohlo: uEtan, unyana kaKishe, unyana ka-Abhedi, unyana kaMaluke;"
1Chronicles6:45 unyana kaHashabhiya, unyana ka-Amatsiya, unyana kaHilekiya;"
1Chronicles6:46 unyana ka-Amsi, unyana kaBhani, unyana kaShamere,"
1Chronicles6:47 unyana kaMageli, unyana kaMushi, unyana kaMerari, unyana kaLevi."
1Chronicles6:48 Nabazalwana babo, abaLevi, bebanyulelwe wonke umsebenzi womnquba wendlu kaThixo."
1Chronicles6:49 uAron noonyana bakhe babesenza umbingelelo esibingelelweni seminikelo etshiswayo nasesibingelelweni sesiqhumiso, yaye babenyulelwe wonke umsebenzi weNgcwele kaNgcwele nokucamagushela izono zoonyana bakaSirayeli, ngokoko konke uMosis, umkhonzi kaThixo oyinyaniso, owayelapho umyalelo."
1Chronicles6:50 Ngabo abo oonyana baka-Aron; nguElazare unyana wakhe, nguPinehasi unyana wakhe, nguAbhishuwa unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles6:51 noBhuki unyana wakhe, no-Usi unyana wakhe, noSeraya unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles6:52 unyana wakhe uMerayoti, nguAmariya unyana wakhe, nguAhitubhi unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles6:53 nguTsadoki unyana wakhe, nguAhimahatse unyana wakhe."
1Chronicles6:54 Zizo ezo iindawo zabo zokuhlala ezintenteni zabo, ngeendawo zabo, ezoonyana baka-Aron, bemizalwane yoonyana bakaKehati; ngokuba laba lelabo iqashiso."
1Chronicles6:55 Babanika iHebron ezweni lakwaYuda namadlelo ayo ngeenxa zonke.
1Chronicles6:56 Kodwa umhlaba wesixeko needolophana zaso bawunika uKalebhi unyana kaYefune.
1Chronicles6:57 Banikwa oonyana baka-Aron imizi yakwaYuda: yiHebron leyo, umzi ongqingiweyo, neLibhena namadlelo ayo, neYatire, ne-Estemowa, namadlelo ayo;"
1Chronicles6:58 neHilene nedlelo layo, neDebiri nedlelo layo,"
1Chronicles6:59 neAsan nedlelo layo, neBhete-shemeshe nedlelo layo;"
1Chronicles6:60 kwisizwe sakwaBhenjamin; neGebha namadlelo ayo, neAlemete namadlelo ayo, neAnatoti namadlelo ayo. Yonke imizi yabo ngokwemizalwane yabo yaba yimizana elishumi elinamithathu."
1Chronicles6:61 Oonyana bakaKehati, abaseleyo emizalwaneni yeso sizwe, banikwa ngeqashiso imizi elishumi kwesinye kwisiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase."
1Chronicles6:62 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaGershom ngokweentsapho zabo kwisizwe sakwaIsakare nakwisizwe sakwa-Ashere nakwisizwe sakwaNafetali nakwisizwe sakwaManase eBhashan.
1Chronicles6:63 Oonyana bakaMerari banikwa iqashiso imizi elishumi elinamibini, ngokwemizalwane yabo, kwisizwe sakwaRubhen, nakwisizwe sakwaGadi, nakwisizwe sakwaZebhulon."
1Chronicles6:64 Oonyana bakaSirayeli babanika abaLevi ezo mizi namadlelo ayo.
1Chronicles6:65 Babanika ngeqashiso imizi leyo yathiywayo esizweni soonyana bakaYuda, nakwisizwe soonyana bakaSimon, nakwisizwe soonyana bakaBhenjamin."
1Chronicles6:66 Eminye imizalwane yoonyana bakaKehati yaba nemizi yelizwe labo esizweni sakwaEfrayim.
1Chronicles6:67 Babanika iShekem kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, nedlelo layo emizini esezantsi banika iGezere namadlelo ayo;"
1Chronicles6:68 neYokemeham nedlelo layo, neBhete-horon nedlelo layo;"
1Chronicles6:69 neAyalon nedlelo layo, neGati-rimon nedlelo layo;"
1Chronicles6:70 kwisiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase; iAnere nedlelo lakhe, noBhileham nedlelo lakhe, esizweni esiseleyo soonyana bakaKehati."
1Chronicles6:71 Oonyana bakaGershom kwisiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase banikwa iGolan, neBhashan namadlelo ayo, neAshtaroti namadlelo ayo;"
1Chronicles6:72 kwisizwe sakwaIsakare; iKedeshe namadlelo ayo, neDabherati namadlelo ayo;"
1Chronicles6:73 neRamoti nedlelo layo, neAnem nedlelo layo;"
1Chronicles6:74 kwisizwe sakwa-Ashere; neMasale nedlelo layo, neAbhedon nedlelo layo;"
1Chronicles6:75 neHukoki nedlelo layo, neRehobhi nedlelo layo;"
1Chronicles6:76 kwisizwe sakwaNafetali; iKedeshe yaseGalili namadlelo ayo, neHamon namadlelo ayo, neKiriyatayim namadlelo ayo."
1Chronicles6:77 Koonyana bakaMerari, kwisizwe sakwaZebhulon, banikwa iRimon nedlelo layo, neTabhore nedlelo layo."
1Chronicles6:78 Ngaphesheya kweYordan iYeriko, engasempumalanga kweYordan, yanikwa isizwe sakwaRubhen, iBhete-tsere entlango, nedlelo layo, neYaha namadlelo ayo;"
1Chronicles6:79 neKedemoti nedlelo layo, neMefati nedlelo layo;"
1Chronicles6:80 kwisizwe sakwaGadi; iRamoti yaseGiliyadi namadlelo ayo, neMahanayim namadlelo ayo;"
1Chronicles6:81 neHeshbhon nedlelo layo, neYazere nedlelo layo."
1Chronicles7:1 Oonyana bakaIsakare nguTola, noPuwa, noYashubhi, noShimron, bebane."
1Chronicles7:2 Oonyana bakaTola nguAsheri; no-Uzi, noRefaya, noYeriyeli, noYagemayi, noIbhesam, noSemuweli, iintloko zezindlu zooyise zakwaTola; babengamagorha akhaliphileyo kwizizukulwana zabo; inani lawo ngemihla kaDavide laba ngamashumi amabini anamabini amawaka, anamakhulu mathandathu."
1Chronicles7:3 Oonyana bakaUzi ngoonyana bakaIseraga; uMikayeli, no-Obhadiya, noYoweli, noIsiya, bebahlanu, iintloko zonke."
1Chronicles7:4 Babenabo ngokwemizalwane yabo, ngokwemizalwane yooyise, kwakukho amashumi amathathu anamathandathu amawaka, amadodana anamandla, ngokuba babenabafazi abaninzi, noonyana abaninzi."
1Chronicles7:5 Abazalwana babo kuzo zonke izizukulwana zikaIsakare, babengamashumi asibhozo anesixhenxe amawaka, ngokwemizalwane yabo yonke."
1Chronicles7:6 Oonyana bakaBhenjamin nguElohim; uBhela, noBhekere, noYedihayeli abathathu."
1Chronicles7:7 Oonyana bakaBhela nguShela; uEsbhon, noUzi, noUziyeli, noYerimoti, noIri, bahlanu; iintloko zezindlu zooyise, amagorha anobukroti; ngokwemilibo yabo yokuzalwa babengamashumi amabini anamabini amawaka, anamanci mathathu anesine."
1Chronicles7:8 Oonyana bakaBhege uSemira, noYowashe, noEliyezere, noEliyonayi, no-Omri, noYerimoti, noAbhiya, noAnatoti, noAlameti. Bonke ngoonyana bakaBhege."
1Chronicles7:9 Inani labo ngokweenzala zabo ngokweenzala zabo zeentloko zezindlu zooyise, amagorha anobukroti, babengamashumi amabini amawaka, anamakhulu mabini."
1Chronicles7:10 Oonyana bakaYedihayeli nguAsheri; Oonyana bakaBhilehan nguBhilehan; uYesu noBhenjamin noEhudi noKanan noSathana noTarshishe noAhishakare.
1Chronicles7:11 Bonke oonyana bakaYedihayeli, ngokweentloko zezindlu zooyise, amagorha anobukroti, baba lishumi elinesixhenxe lamawaka, anamakhulu mabini, aphuma umkhosiumkhosi."
1Chronicles7:12 NoSupim noHupim, oonyana bakaIre, noHushim, oonyana baka-Ahhere."
1Chronicles7:13 Oonyana bakaNafetali nguYagisiyeli noGuni noYezere noShalum oonyana bakaBhiliha.
1Chronicles7:14 Oonyana bakaManase nguAsriyeli awamzalayo; isithende sakhe saba ngumAram, sazala uMagire, uyise kaGiliyadi."
1Chronicles7:15 uMagire wazeka udade boHupim noSupim, udade wabo kwathiwa nguMaga, waba ngumkakhe; igama lowesibini belinguTselofehadi; uTselofehadi waye eneentombi."
1Chronicles7:16 uMaga, umkaMagire, wazala unyana, wathi igama lakhe nguPeres; igama lomninawa wakhe belinguSerese; Oonyana bakhe ngu-Ulam noRakem."
1Chronicles7:17 Yintoni oonyana beeUlama? Ngabo abo oonyana bakaGiliyadi, unyana kaMagire, unyana kaManase."
1Chronicles7:18 Udade wabo uHamolekete wazala uYesu, noAbhiyezere, noMahala."
1Chronicles7:19 Oonyana bakaShemida yayinguAhyan noShekem noLiki noAnjam.
1Chronicles7:20 Oonyana bakaEfrayim nguSutela, noBherede unyana wakhe, noTahati unyana wakhe, noEliyada unyana wakhe, noTahati unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles7:21 noZabhadi unyana wakhe, noSutela unyana wakhe, noEzere, noEladi, ababulala abantu baseGati ababezalelwe kwelo zwe, ngokuba babehle beza kuthimba imfuyo yabo."
1Chronicles7:22 uEfrayim uyise wabenzela isijwili imihla emininzi, beza kuye abazalwana bakhe, beza kumkhuza."
1Chronicles7:23 Wamngena umfazi wakhe; wakhawula, wazala unyana, wathi igama lakhe nguBheriya;"
1Chronicles7:24 Intombi yakhe ibinguSera, yakha iBhete-horon yasezantsi neyasentla, neUsera."
1Chronicles7:25 Unyana wakhe yayinguRefa, noRetsefe, noTela unyana wakhe, noTahan unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles7:26 uLaedan unyana wakhe, uAmihudi unyana wakhe, uElishama unyana wakhe,"
1Chronicles7:27 Hayi, unyana wakhe, uYoshuwa unyana wakhe."
1Chronicles7:28 Izinto zabo neendawo zabo zokuhlala zaba: iBheteli namadlelo ayo, neNaharan nentshona yeGezere namadlelo ayo; noShekem namadlelo ayo, kwesa eGaza namadlelo ayo;"
1Chronicles7:29 Ngakwilizwe loonyana bakaManase yiBhete-shehan nemida yayo, iTahanaki nemida yayo, iMegido nemida yayo, iDore nemida yayo. Babehleli kule ndawo oonyana bakaYosefu, unyana kaSirayeli."
1Chronicles7:30 Oonyana baka-Ashere nguAshere; uImna, noYeshuwa, noIshuwa, noBheriya, noSeraki udade wabo."
1Chronicles7:31 Oonyana bakaBheriya nguHebhere noMalekiyeli, ozala uBhirsaviti."
1Chronicles7:32 uHebhere wazala uYafelete, noSomere, noHotam, noShuwa udade wabo."
1Chronicles7:33 Oonyana bakaYafete yipasika, noBhimhali, noAshwati. Ngabo abo oonyana bakaYafelete."
1Chronicles7:34 Oonyana bakaShamere nguAhi noRoga, uYehubha noAram."
1Chronicles7:35 Oonyana bomntakwabo yayinguHelem; iSofa kunye noJimna kunye noSeles noAmal.
1Chronicles7:36 Oonyana bakaSofi; uSuagi noHarnefer noSual noBeri noImra,"
1Chronicles7:37 neBhete-tsere, noHode, noShama, noSilesa, noYitran, noBhera."
1Chronicles7:38 Oonyana bakaYetere nguYefune, noPispa, noAra."
1Chronicles7:39 Oonyana bakaUla nguAragi noHaniyeli noResiya.
1Chronicles7:40 Bonke bephela babengoonyana baka-Ashere, iintloko zezindlu zooyise, amagorha ahleliweyo, angamakroti, iintloko zezikhulu. Inani lesizwe sabaphuma umkhosi lalingamashumi amabini anamathandathu amawaka."
1Chronicles8:1 uBhenjamin wazala uBhela, izibulo lakhe, uAshbhele owesibini, noAhare owesithathu,"
1Chronicles8:2 eyesine inyoka, neyesihlanu uRafa."
1Chronicles8:3 Oonyana bakaBhela nguAdare, noGera, noAbhihudi;"
1Chronicles8:4 noAbhishuwa, noNahaman, noAhagi;"
1Chronicles8:5 noGera, noSefufan, noHuram."
1Chronicles8:6 Ngabo aba oonyana bakaEhudi: zizo ezo iintloko zezindlu zooyise zabemi baseGebha, baya eManahati."
1Chronicles8:7 Yaba nguNahaman, noAkiya, noGera, owabafudusayo, wazala u-Usa noAkihudi."
1Chronicles8:8 uSharayim wazala abantwana ezweni lakwaMowabhi, ekubagxotheni kwakhe; Abafazi bakhe yayinguHushim noBhahara."
1Chronicles8:9 Umkakhe wazala uHodi, noYobhabhi, noSibhiya, noMesha, noMalekam;"
1Chronicles8:10 noYehuse, noSakiya, noMirma. Ngabo abo oonyana bakhe, iintloko zezindlu zooyise."
1Chronicles8:11 uHushim wazala uAbhitubhi noElipahali.
1Chronicles8:12 Oonyana bakaElipahali nguAsheri; uHebhere, noMisam, noSkamed, owakha iOno, neLodi namadlelo ayo;"
1Chronicles8:13 noBheriya noShema, ababeziintloko zeentsapho zabemi baseAyalon, abagxotha abemi baseGati."
1Chronicles8:14 NoAhiyo, noSasaki, noYeromoti;"
1Chronicles8:15 noZebhadiya, noAradi, noAdere;"
1Chronicles8:16 noMikayeli, noIshpa, noYowa, oonyana bakaBheriya;"
1Chronicles8:17 noZebhadiya, noMeshulam, noHizeki, noHebhere;"
1Chronicles8:18 noItsemerayi, noItseliya, noYobhabhi, oonyana bakaElipahali;"
1Chronicles8:19 noYakim, noSigri, noSabhedi;"
1Chronicles8:20 noElihenayi, noSiletayi, noEliyeli;"
1Chronicles8:21 noAdaya, noBheraya, noShimerati, oonyana bakaShimehi;"
1Chronicles8:22 noIspan, noHebhere, noEliyeli;"
1Chronicles8:23 neAbhedon, noSigri, noHanan;"
1Chronicles8:24 noHananiya, noElam, noAntotiya;"
1Chronicles8:25 noYefediya noPenuweli, oonyana bakaSasaki;"
1Chronicles8:26 noSamserayi, noZekariya, noAtaliya;"
1Chronicles8:27 noYaresiya, noEliya, noSigri, oonyana bakaYeroham."
1Chronicles8:28 Zizo ezo iintloko zooyise ngokwemizalwane yabo, ziziintloko. Bahlala eYerusalem."
1Chronicles8:29 Uyise kaGibheyon wayehlala eGibheyon; ogama lomkakhe belinguMaaka.
1Chronicles8:30 Unyana wakhe wamazibulo nguAbhedon, noTsure, noKishe, noBhahali, noNadabhi;"
1Chronicles8:31 neGedore, neAjo, neSager."
1Chronicles8:32 uMikelo wazala uSimon. Nabo bahlala nabazalwana babo eYerusalem malungana nabo.
1Chronicles8:33 uNere wazala uKishe, noKishe, uyise kaSawule; uSawule wazala uYonatan, noMalekishuwa, noAbhinadabhi, noEshbhahali."
1Chronicles8:34 Unyana kaYonatan nguMeribhahali; uMeribhahali wazala uMika.
1Chronicles8:35 Oonyana bakaMika nguPiton, noMeleki, noTariya, noAgashe."
1Chronicles8:36 uAhazi wazala uYowada; uYoda wazala uAlemete, noAsmavete, noZimri; uZimri wazala uMoses;"
1Chronicles8:37 uMoses wazala uBhineha; unyana wakhe nguRafa, unyana wakhe uEleyasa, unyana wakhe uAseli."
1Chronicles8:38 uAsheli ubenoonyana abathandathu; amagama abo ngooAshrikam, noBhokeru, noIshmayeli, noShehariya, no-Obhadiya, noHanan. Bonke ke ngoonyana baka-Asheli."
1Chronicles8:39 Oonyana bakaHezekile umninawa wakhe ngu-Ulam, izibulo lakhe, noYehuse owesibini, noElifelete."
1Chronicles8:40 Oonyana baka-Ulama babengamagorha, abazingela ngesaphetha, noonyana abaninzi, noonyana abalikhulu elinamashumi amahlanu. Bonke babephuma koonyana bakaBhenjamin."
1Chronicles9:1 Bonke ke oonyana bakaSirayeli babalwa ngokwemizalwane; nabo babhaliwe encwadini yookumkani bakwaSirayeli nabakwaYuda abathinjelwa eBhabhiloni ngenxa yokunxaxha kwabo.
1Chronicles9:2 Abokuqala, ababehlala elifeni labo, ezixekweni zabo, yayingamaSirayeli, nababingeleli, nabaLevi, nabakhonzi betempile."
1Chronicles9:3 Kwahlala ke inxenye yoonyana bakaYuda, nabanye boonyana bakaBhenjamin, nabanye koonyana bakaEfrayim, nabakwaManase, eYerusalem:"
1Chronicles9:4 ngu-Utayi, unyana ka-Amihudi, unyana kaOmri, unyana kaImri, unyana kaBhani, koonyana bakaPeretse, unyana kaYuda."
1Chronicles9:5 NabaseSilone; Owamazibulo nguAsaya noonyana bakhe.
1Chronicles9:6 Koonyana bakaSeraki; uYehuweli nabazalwana bakhe bangamakhulu amathandathu, anamanci asibhozo, bodwa."
1Chronicles9:7 Koonyana bakaBhenjamin; nguSalu, unyana kaMeshulam, unyana kaHodaviya, unyana kaHasenuage,"
1Chronicles9:8 noIbheneya, unyana kaYeroham, noEla, unyana kaUzi, unyana kaMigri, noMeshulam, unyana kaShefatiya, unyana kaRehuweli, unyana kaIbheniya;"
1Chronicles9:9 Abazalwana babo ngokweenzala zabo babengamakhulu asithoba anamanci mahlanu anabathandathu. Onke loo madoda abeziintloko zezindlu zooyise ezindlwini zooyise.
1Chronicles9:10 Nakubabingeleli; noYedaya, noYehoyaribhi, noYagin;"
1Chronicles9:11 noAzariya unyana kaHilekiya, unyana kaMeshulam, unyana kaTsadoki, unyana kaMerayoti, unyana ka-Akitubhi, umphathi wendlu yoThixo oyinyaniso;"
1Chronicles9:12 noAdaya, unyana kaYeroham, unyana kaPashkure, unyana kaMalekiya, noMahasayi, unyana ka-Adiyeli, unyana kaYageshera, unyana kaMeshulam, unyana kaMesilemiti, unyana kaImere;"
1Chronicles9:13 nabazalwana babo, iintloko zezindlu zooyise, iwaka elinamakhulu asixhenxe, anamanci mathandathu; maninzi amadoda anobukroti emsebenzini wenkonzo yendlu kaThixo."
1Chronicles9:14 NakubaLevi; nguShemaya, unyana kaHashubhi, unyana ka-Ashrikam, unyana kaHashabhiya, koonyana bakaMerari;"
1Chronicles9:15 noBhakare, noHerese, noGalali, noMataniya, unyana kaMika, unyana kaSigri, unyana ka-Asafu;"
1Chronicles9:16 no-Obhadiya, unyana kaShemaya, unyana kaGalali, unyana kaYedutun, noBheriya, unyana ka-Asa, unyana kaElikana, obehleli emizini yamaNetofi."
1Chronicles9:17 Abamasango: ibinguShalum, noAkubhe, noTalemon, noAhiman, nabazalwana babo; uShalum wayeyintloko;"
1Chronicles9:18 othe unangoku elinde esangweni lokumkani, elisingise empumalanga; babengabamasango ngokwamaqela oonyana bakaLevi."
1Chronicles9:19 uShalum, unyana kaKora, unyana ka-Abhiyasafu, unyana kaKora, nabazalwana bakhe bendlu kayise, amaKora, bephethe inkonzo yenkonzo, nabagcini bamasango entente yokuhlangana nooyise ababephethe inkonzo abo babephethe amatyala kaYehova babengabagcini-masango."
1Chronicles9:20 uPinehasi, unyana kaElazare, waye eyinganga yabo ngenxa engaphambili, uYehova wayenaye."
1Chronicles9:21 uZekariya unyana kaMeshelemiya wayengowesango ententeni yokuhlangana.
1Chronicles9:22 Bonke oonyana abanyulwa ukuba babe ngabagcini-masango babengamakhulu amabini, anashumi-nye linababini. Babalwa ngokwemizalwane yabo emizini yabo, abehleli beyibeka imisebenzi yabo uDavide nemboni uSamuweli."
1Chronicles9:23 Bona noonyana babo babewagcina amasango endlu kaYehova, eyindlu yomnquba, ngokwezigidimi."
1Chronicles9:24 Abamasango babekho emacaleni omane, ngasempumalanga, ngasentshonalanga, ngasentla, nangasezantsi."
1Chronicles9:25 Abazalwana babo emizaneni yabo babengabokuza kubo amaxesha ngamaxesha emva kweentsuku ezisixhenxe;
1Chronicles9:26 Kuba aba baLevi, abagcini-masango abane abaziintloko, babekwizikhundla zabo, bephethe amagumbi nobuncwane bendlu kaTHIXO oyinyaniso."
1Chronicles9:27 Bachitha ubusuku bejikeleza indlu yoThixo oyinyaniso, ngenxa yokuba lo myalelo wawuphezu kwabo, yaye wawuvulelwa ntsasa nganye."
1Chronicles9:28 Inxenye kubo ibiphethe imisebenzi yenkonzo, ukuze bayingenise, bayikhuphe ngokomzekeliso."
1Chronicles9:29 Kwamiselwa abathile kubo ukuba banyamekele iimpahla neempahla zonke zengcwele, nomgubo, newayini, neoli, neziqhumiso, neziqholo."
1Chronicles9:30 Koonyana bababingeleli bekukho ababesenza ubulawu.
1Chronicles9:31 uMatitja, omnye wabaLevi, izibulo likaShalume-Mokore, wayephethe umsebenzi wokwenziwa kweepani."
1Chronicles9:32 Koonyana bakaHeti, abazalwana babo, ababephethe izonka ezikroziswayo, ukuzilungisa iisabatha ngeesabatha."
1Chronicles9:33 Zizo ezo iimvumi, iintloko zezindlu zooyise zabaLevi, ezibe zihleli emagumbini okudlela zingakhululekile, ngokuba bezisebenza imini nobusuku."
1Chronicles9:34 Zizo ezo iintloko zezindlu zooyise zabaLevi, iintloko zezindlu zooyise bahlala eYerusalem."
1Chronicles9:35 eGibheyon kwahlala uyise kaGibheyon, uYehiyeli, ogama lomkakhe belinguMahega."
1Chronicles9:36 Unyana wakhe wamazibulo nguAbhedon, noTsure, noKishe, noBhahali, noNere, noNadabhi;"
1Chronicles9:37 neGedore, neAyo, noZekariya, noMikeloti."
1Chronicles9:38 uMikelo wazala uShimeham. Nabo bahlala nabazalwana babo eYerusalem, ngenxa yabazalwana babo."
1Chronicles9:39 uNere ke wayenguyise kaKishe; uKishe wazala uSawule; uSawule wazala uYonatan, noMalekishuwa, noAbhinadabhi, noEshbhahali."
1Chronicles9:40 Unyana kaYonatan nguMeribhahali, uMeribhahali nguyise kaMika."
1Chronicles9:41 Oonyana bakaMika yayinguPiton noMeleki noTariya noAgashe.
1Chronicles9:42 uAhazi wazala uYara; uYara wazala uAlemete, noAsmawete, noZimri; uZimri wazala uMoses;"
1Chronicles9:43 uMoses wazala uBhineha; uRefaya unyana wakhe, uEleyasa unyana wakhe, uAsheli unyana wakhe."
1Chronicles9:44 uAsheli ubenoonyana abathandathu; Ngabo abo oonyana baka-Asheli.
1Chronicles10:1 Kwasilwa amaFilisti namaSirayeli; yaye amadoda akwaSirayeli asaba phambi kwamaFilisti aza awela ebulewe ezintabeni zaseGilibhowa.
1Chronicles10:2 AmaFilisti athana mbende noSawule noonyana bakhe; yaye amaFilisti ambulala uYonatan noAbhinadabhi noMalekishuwa, oonyana bakaSawule."
1Chronicles10:3 Kwaba nzima ukulwa kuSawule; bambetha abatoli, wangxwelerhwa ngabatoli."
1Chronicles10:4 Wathi uSawule kumfana lowo, Rhola ikrele lakho, undibulale ngalo; mhlawumbi abo bantu bangafika bandihleke. Akavuma umphathi weentonga zakhe; ngokuba ebesoyika kunene. uSawule walithabatha ikrele, waziwisa phezu kwalo."
1Chronicles10:5 Uthe umphathi weentonga zakhe, akubona ukuba ufile uSawule, waziwisa phezu kwekrele lakhe, wafa."
1Chronicles10:6 Wafa ke uSawule, noonyana bakhe abathathu, nendlu yakhe yonke;"
1Chronicles10:7 Athi onke amadoda akwaSirayeli abesentilini yoMnayile, abona ukuba asabile, ukuba ufile uSawule noonyana bakhe, ayishiya imizi yawo, asaba; namaFilisti aya kwakha kuyo."
1Chronicles10:8 Kwathi ngengomso amaFilisti eza kubhunyula ababuleweyo, amfumana uSawule noonyana bakhe bewile ezintabeni zeGilibhowa."
1Chronicles10:9 Emva kokuba amhlube, athabatha intloko yakhe nezikrweqe zakhe aza athumela kwilizwe lamaFilisti ngeenxa zonke ukuba axele imifanekiso yawo eqingqiweyo nasebantwini ezo ndaba."
1Chronicles10:10 Azibeka iintonga zakhe endlwini yothixo wawo, ukanti intloko yakhe ayibeka endlwini kaDagon."
1Chronicles10:11 Beva bonke abaseYabheshe eGiliyadi konke abekwenzile amaFilisti kuSawule.
1Chronicles10:12 Agqiba ke onke amadoda anobukroti, awuthabatha umzimba kaSawule, nezidumbu zoonyana bakhe, azizisa eYabheshe, awangcwabela amathambo abo phantsi komthi wetalanti eYabheshe, azila ukudla iintsuku zasixhenxe."
1Chronicles10:13 Wafa ke uSawule ngenxa yokuvukela kwakhe uYehova, enxamnye nelizwi likaYehova angaligcinanga, nangenxa yokuba wacela icebiso kumntu onomoya owaziwayo owathi wambuza;"
1Chronicles10:14 Akamcela uYehova; wambulala ke, wabunika uDavide, unyana kaYese, ubukumkani."
1Chronicles11:1 Ahlanganisana onke amaSirayeli kuDavide eHebron, athi, Uyabona, singamathambo akho nenyama yakho."
1Chronicles11:2 Kwakudala, oko uSawule ebengukumkani, ibinguwe ububakhupha oonyana bakaSirayeli, ubangenise;"
1Chronicles11:3 Aya ke onke amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli kukumkani eHebron; Wenza umnqophiso nawo uDavide eHebron phambi koYehova; yaye bamthambisa uDavide ukuba abe ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli ngokwelizwi likaYehova ngenkonzo kaSamuweli.
1Chronicles11:4 uDavide namaSirayeli onke beza eYerusalem: yiYebhusi ke leyo; apho abehlala khona amaYebhusi ezweni abekuwo.
1Chronicles11:5 Bathi abemi baseYebhusi kuDavide, Akuyi kungena apha. Noko ke, uDavide wayithimba inqaba yaseZiyon, esisixeko sikaDavide."
1Chronicles11:6 Wathi uDavide, Owathe wawaxabela amaYebhusi kwasentloko, woba yintloko nomlawuli; Kwenyuka kuqala uYowabhi, unyana kaTseruya, waba yinganga."
1Chronicles11:7 uDavide wahlala emboniselweni; ke ngoko bathi, sisixeko sikaDavide."
1Chronicles11:8 Wawakha umzi ngeenxa zonke, ethabathela eMilo ngeenxa zonke;"
1Chronicles11:9 uDavide waqhubeka ekhula, kuba uYehova wemikhosi wayenaye."
1Chronicles11:10 Zizo ezi iintloko zamagorha awayekunye nawo uDavide, awamomelezayo ebukumkanini bakhe noSirayeli wonke ukuba amenze ukumkani, ngokwelizwi likaYehova ngokuphathelele uSirayeli."
1Chronicles11:11 Lilo eli inani lamagorha kaDavide; noYasobham, noHagmon, intloko yabathetheli; wajula umkhonto wakhe kumakhulu mathathu lawo abewaxabele kwangoko."
1Chronicles11:12 Ngasemva kwakhe nguEleyazare unyana kaDodo, uMakhi, omnye wamagorha amathathu."
1Chronicles11:13 Yena wayenoDavide ePas-damim, yaye amaFilisti ayehlanganisene khona ukuze alwe, apho intsimi yayizele yirhasi; basaba abantu phambi kwamaFilisti."
1Chronicles11:14 Bazifaka esazulwini sengxowa, bayinikela, bawabulala amaFilisti; uYehova wabahlangula ke usindiso olukhulu."
1Chronicles11:15 Kwehla isithathu sabaziintloko emashumini amathathu, baya eweni kuDavide, emqolombeni waseAdulam; imikhosi yamaFilisti yayimise iintente entilini yamaRafa."
1Chronicles11:16 uDavide yena esenqabeni, bona abalindi bamaFilisti beseBhetelehem."
1Chronicles11:17 Wanqwena uDavide, wathi, Akwaba bendithe ndasela amanzi equla laseBhetelehem elisesangweni!"
1Chronicles11:18 Atyhoboza amadoda amathathu empini yamaFilisti, akha amanzi equleni laseBhetelehem elisesangweni, awathabatha awazisa kuDavide; akavuma ukuwasela uDavide; wawaphalazela phambi koYehova;"
1Chronicles11:19 Wathi, Akayi kuyenza le nto uThixo wam; Ndiya kulisela na igazi lala madoda abubeke esichengeni ubomi bawo? ngokuba babazisile ngokubeka ubomi babo esichengeni. Yiyo loo nto wayengafuni ukuyisela. Ezi zinto zintathu bazenza ngamandla amakhulu."
1Chronicles11:20 uAbhishayi, umninawa kaYowabhi, waye eyintloko yabathathu."
1Chronicles11:21 Kubo bathathu ubebekeke ngaphezu kwabo bobabini; ngokuba ebengumlawuli wabo; kodwa akafikanga kwabathathu bokuqala.
1Chronicles11:22 NguBhenaya, unyana kaYehoyada, unyana wendoda enobukroti yaseKabhetseli, ewenza imisebenzi emininzi; wabulala iingonyama ezimbini zakwaMowabhi; wabuya wehla, wayibulala ingonyama emhadini, kungekho khephu."
1Chronicles11:23 Wabulala indoda engumYiputa, indoda enexesha elide, ekubhite ezintlanu; esandleni somYiputa lowo ephethe intshuntshe enjengentonga yomluki; Wehla ke waya kuye ephethe intonga, wayihlutha intshuntshe esandleni somYiputa lowo, wambulala ngentshuntshe yakhe."
1Chronicles11:24 Wenjenjalo uBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada; waba nodumo phakathi kwamagorha amathathu.
1Chronicles11:25 Ubebekekile yena phakathi kwamashumi amathathu lawo, kodwa akafikanga kwabathathu bokuqala; uDavide wammisa phezu kwabalindi bakhe."
1Chronicles11:26 Amagorha omkhosi ibinguAsaheli, umninawa kaYowabhi, noElihanan, unyana kaDodo, waseBhetelehem;"
1Chronicles11:27 neSamati yaseHarhore, neGileya yasePelone,"
1Chronicles11:28 noIra unyana kaIkeki waseTekowa, noAbhiyezere waseMowantoti;"
1Chronicles11:29 noSibhegayi umHusha, noIlayi umAhowa;"
1Chronicles11:30 noMaharayi waseNetofa, noHeledi unyana kaBhahana waseNetofa;"
1Chronicles11:31 nguItayi unyana kaRibhayi, waseGibheha koonyana bakaBhenjamin, noBhenaya wasePiraton;"
1Chronicles11:32 Entlanjeni yaseGahashe, iAbhiyeli, neArbhati,"
1Chronicles11:33 neAsmavete yamaRumi, noElijabha waseSaalbhon;"
1Chronicles11:34 Oonyana bakaHashem Mogizone nguYonatan unyana kaSage waseMoharare;
1Chronicles11:35 noAhiya, unyana kaSakare, umMoharari, noElifele, unyana kaUre;"
1Chronicles11:36 noHefere waseMegereta, noAhiya wasePelone;"
1Chronicles11:37 noHetsero waseKarmele, noNaharayi, unyana kaEshbhayi;"
1Chronicles11:38 noYoweli umzalwana kaNatan, noMibhare unyana kaHagiri;"
1Chronicles11:39 noTseleki umAmon, noNaharayi waseBheroti, umkhonzi kaYowabhi, unyana kaTseruya;"
1Chronicles11:40 noIra waseMoitere, noGarebhe waseMoitere,"
1Chronicles11:41 no-Uriya umHeti, noSabhadi unyana ka-Alayi;"
1Chronicles11:42 uAdina unyana kaSisa, umRubhene, inkulu yamaRubhen, enamashumi amathathu;"
1Chronicles11:43 uHanan unyana kaMahagi, noYehoshafati waseMomitna;"
1Chronicles11:44 u-Uziya waseAsterhati, noShama, noYehiyeli, oonyana bakaHotan waseArore;"
1Chronicles11:45 noYedihayeli unyana kaZimri, noYowa umninawa kaMotishe;"
1Chronicles11:46 uEliyeli umMowabhi, noYeribhayi, noYosaviya, oonyana bakaElinaham, noIma umMowabhikazi;"
1Chronicles11:47 nguEliyeli, no-Obhedi, noYasiyeli, baseMesobha."
1Chronicles12:1 Ngabo aba, abeza kuDavide emzini waseShikelage, esamnqanda ngenxa kaSawule, unyana kaKishe; baba phakathi kwamagorha, abancedi emfazweni."
1Chronicles12:2 Babexhobe ngezaphetha yaye bedubula ngesandla sasekunene nangesandla sasekhohlo, begibisela ngamatye, batole neentolo ngesaphetha, ababengabazalwana bakaSawule wakwaBhenjamin."
1Chronicles12:3 Intloko ibinguAhiyezere noYowashe, oonyana bakaShemaha waseGibheha; noYesiyeli noPelete, oonyana baka-Ashmaveti; noBheraga noYehu waseMohanantoti;"
1Chronicles12:4 noIshmaya waseGibheyon, igorha phakathi kwamashumi amathathu anamanci mathathu; noYeremiya, noYagasiyeli, noYohanan, noYozabhadi waseGedera;"
1Chronicles12:5 uEluzayi, noYerimoti, noBhehaliya, noShemariya, noShefatiya Moharufi;"
1Chronicles12:6 noElikana, noIsiya, noAzareli, noYoshere, noYasobham, waseKorge;"
1Chronicles12:7 noYoweli noZebhadiya, oonyana bakaYeroham waseGedore."
1Chronicles12:8 Ke bona oonyana bakaGadi, bamnyulela uDavide kummandla weentaba, ukusa entlango, amadoda anamandla namadoda emfazwe alungele idabi, awayephethe ikhaka nekhaka, abuso bawo babunjengobuso beengonyama nobuso obunjengobeengonyama nendlu kaGadi umendu njengexhama ezintabeni;"
1Chronicles12:9 uEzere inkulu, noObhadiya owesibini, noEliyabhi owesithathu,"
1Chronicles12:10 owesine nguMishmana, owesihlanu nguYeremiya;"
1Chronicles12:11 owesithandathu nguAtayi, owesixhenxe nguEliyeli;"
1Chronicles12:12 owesibhozo nguYohanan, owesithoba nguElizabhadi;"
1Chronicles12:13 oweshumi nguYeremiya, oweshumi elinanye eMagabhanayi."
1Chronicles12:14 Zizo ezo iintloko zamaqela oonyana bakaGadi; omncinane ubelingana nekhulu, omkhulu elingana newaka."
1Chronicles12:15 Ngabo abo bayiwelayo iYordan ngenyanga yokuqala, izele, ihamba phezu kweendonga zayo; yaye asaba kuyo yonke imilambo ngasempuma nasentshona."
1Chronicles12:16 Abanye boonyana bakaBhenjamin bakaYuda beza entabeni kunye noDavide.
1Chronicles12:17 Waphuma uDavide, waya kubakhawulela, wathi kubo, Ukuba niza kum ninoxolo, ukuba nindincede, intliziyo yam yonamathela kuni; yaye ukuba uthe weza kundihlangula ezintshabeni zam, kungekho siphoso esandleni sam, uTHIXO wookhokho bethu, yaye uya kukhalimela."
1Chronicles12:18 Umoya wamfikela uAmasayi, umthetheli wabathetheli, wathi, Singakuwe, Davide, singakuwe, nyana kaYese; uxolo, uxolo malube nani, uxolo malube nani nabancedi bakho; ngokuba uThixo wakho uyakunceda. Emva koko uDavide wabamkela waza wabenza iinkokeli zelo qela."
1Chronicles12:19 Abanye bakuManase bawela kuDavide, ekuyeni kwakhe namaFilisti ukuba kuliwe noSawule; kodwa ababancedanga; ngokuba abathetheli bamaFilisti babemcebise ukuba ahambe, besithi, Uya kumbeka esichengeni ukumkani wakhe uSawule yeentloko zethu."
1Chronicles12:20 Kwathi, ekuyeni kwakhe eTsikelage, bamxabela ke uAdena, noYozabhadi, noYedihayeli, noMikayeli, noYozabhadi, noElihu, noSiletayi, amawakawaka abathetheli bakwaManase."
1Chronicles12:21 Bona bancedisana noDavide ekulweni neqela lamadoda okulwa, ngokuba onke ayengamagorha anobukroti nabathetheli bomkhosi."
1Chronicles12:22 Kuba ngelo xesha babesiza yonke imihla kuDavide ukumnceda, yada yaba ngumkhosi omkhulu njengomkhosi woThixo oyinyaniso."
1Chronicles12:23 Ngawo la amanani amaqela axhobele imfazwe, eza kuDavide eHebron, ukuba bubuyiselwe kuye ubukumkani bukaSawule, ngokwelizwi likaYehova."
1Chronicles12:24 Oonyana bakaYuda bephethe ikhaka nentshuntshe bangamawaka amathandathu, anamakhulu asithoba, anamabini, axhobe ukulwa."
1Chronicles12:25 Koonyana bakaSimon, amagorha emfazwe ibingamakhulu asixhenxe amawaka."
1Chronicles12:26 Koonyana bakaLevi ngamawaka amane, anamakhulu mathandathu;"
1Chronicles12:27 Ke uYehoyada waye eyinganga yoonyana baka-Aron, enamawaka amathathu anamakhulu asixhenxe;"
1Chronicles12:28 nomfana, uTsadoki, umkroti, nabathetheli abamashumi mabini anababini endlwini kayise."
1Chronicles12:29 Koonyana bakaBhenjamin, yintsapho kaSawule, babengamawaka amathathu; ngokuba kwada kwaba ngoku uninzi lwabo lwalusayigcinile indlu kaSawule."
1Chronicles12:30 Koonyana bakaEfrayim, amadoda anobukroti angamashumi amabini amawaka, anamanci asibhozo anamabini, anegama ezindlwini zooyise."
1Chronicles12:31 Kwisiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase lishumi elinesibhozo lamawaka, ababalulwa ngamagama ukuba bamisele uDavide ukumkani."
1Chronicles12:32 Koonyana bakaIsakare, abawaziyo abawaqondayo amaxesha, ukuba bayakwazi abaya kukwenza oonyana bakaSirayeli; iintloko zabo ibingamakhulu amabini; yaye bonke abazalwana babo babelawulwa ngabo."
1Chronicles12:33 KwaZebhulon abo balwayo, abanolwazi lwemfazwe nazo zonke izixhobo zemfazwe, amashumi amahlanu amawaka axhobe amajoni; babengaqhathana."
1Chronicles12:34 KwaNafetali ngabathetheli bewaka, namashumi amathathu anesixhenxe amawaka, aphatha ikhaka neentshuntshe."
1Chronicles12:35 Kwisizwe sakwaDan abaphuma umkhosi babengamashumi amabini anesibhozo amawaka, anamakhulu mathandathu."
1Chronicles12:36 Kwisizwe sakwa-Ashere, abaphuma umkhosi, ababengabathetheli bemfazwe, ngamashumi omane amawaka."
1Chronicles12:37 Ngaphesheya kweYordan, koonyana bakaRubhen namaGadi kwisiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase, bathabatha izixhobo zalo lonke uhlobo lwemfazwe, ikhulu elinamashumi amabini amawaka."
1Chronicles12:38 Onke la magorha alungelelanisa umkhosi eza eHebron enentliziyo epheleleyo ukuze amisele uDavide ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wonke; avuma onke amaSirayeli ukumenza ukumkani uDavide.
1Chronicles12:39 Ahlala khona noDavide iintsuku zantathu, esidla esela; ngokuba abazalwana bawo babewalungiselele."
1Chronicles12:40 Ngaphezu koko, abo babesondele kubo, ukuya kufikelela kwaIsakare nakwaZebhulon nakwaNafetali bezisa isonka ngeedonki neenkamela neemeyile neenkomo nenyama, umgubo, amaqebengwana amakhiwane nezirasentyisi ezininzi newayini neoli neenkomo nemfuyo ngokuba kwabakho uvuyo kwaSirayeli."
1Chronicles13:1 uDavide wathetha kubathetheli bamawaka nabamakhulu, nakubathetheli bonke."
1Chronicles13:2 Wathi uDavide kwibandla lonke lakwaSirayeli, Ukuba kulungile emehlweni enu, ukuba kuthe kwalunga emehlweni enu, kuYehova uThixo wethu, masithumele kubazalwana bethu abaseleyo ezweni lonke lakwaSirayeli, nakubabingeleli kunye nabo nabaLevi emizini yabo nasemadlelweni abo, basihlanganisele ndawonye."
1Chronicles13:3 Masiyibuyisele kuthi ityeya yoThixo wethu; ngokuba asiyicelanga yona ngemihla kaSawule;
1Chronicles13:4 Lathi lonke ibandla makwenziwe, ngokuba loo nto ibilungile emehlweni abantu bonke."
1Chronicles13:5 Wawahlanganisa ke uDavide onke amaSirayeli, wathabathela eShihore ezweni laseYiputa, wada wesa ekungeneni eHamati, ukuze ayithabathe ityeya kaThixo eKiriyati-yarim."
1Chronicles13:6 Wenyuka ke uDavide, waya eBhahali: yiKiriyati-yeharim ezweni lakwaYuda, enamaSirayeli onke, ukuba ayithabathe khona ityeya kaThixo uYehova ohleli phezu kweekerubhi, ebizwa ngalo igama lakhe."
1Chronicles13:7 Bayikhwelisa ngenqwelo entsha ityeya kaThixo oyinyaniso endlwini ka-Abhinadabhi, yaye u-Uza noAjo babeyiqhuba inqwelo."
1Chronicles13:8 uDavide nawo onke amaSirayeli babedlala phambi koThixo wabo ngamandla abo onke nangeengoma ngeehadi ngeehadi namagubu namacangci namaxilongo.
1Chronicles13:9 Bakufika esandeni sikaKidon, u-Uza wasolula isandla sakhe ukuba ayibambe ityeya; ngokuba iinkomo bezikhubeka."
1Chronicles13:10 Wavutha umsindo kaYehova kuUsa, wambulala, ngokuba esifake isandla etyeyeni; wafela khona phambi koThixo."
1Chronicles13:11 uDavide wavutha ngumsindo ngenxa enokuba uYehova ebemisele u-Uza; ke ngoko, loo ndawo kwathiwa yiPerestsa kude kube namhla."
1Chronicles13:12 uDavide wamoyika uThixo ngaloo mini, wathi, Ndothini na ukuyizisa endlwini yam ityeya kaThixo?"
1Chronicles13:13 uDavide akayisa emzini wakhe ityeya emzini kaDavide; wayisa endlwini kaObhedi-edom waseGati.
1Chronicles13:14 Yahlala ityeya kaThixo emzini kaObhedi-edom, iinyanga zantathu. uYehova wayisikelela indlu kaObhedi-edom, nako konke awayenako."
1Chronicles14:1 Ke kaloku uHiram, ukumkani waseTire, wathumela abathunywa kuDavide, nemisedare, neengcibi zamatye, neengcibi zemithi, ukumakhela indlu."
1Chronicles14:2 uDavide waqonda ukuba uYehova ummisele ukuba abe ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli, ngenxa yokuba ubukumkani bakhe baphakanyiselwa ngenxa yabantu bakhe amaSirayeli."
1Chronicles14:3 uDavide waphinda wazeka abanye abafazi eYerusalem, waza wazala abanye oonyana neentombi."
1Chronicles14:4 Ngawo lawo amagama oonyana bakhe, awabazalela eYerusalem; uSamuwa noShobhabhe, uNatan noSolomon,"
1Chronicles14:5 noIbhehare, noElishuwa, noElipaleti;"
1Chronicles14:6 noNoga, noNefege, noYafiya;"
1Chronicles14:7 noElishama, noBheliyadi, noElifelete."
1Chronicles14:8 Athi akuva amaFilisti ukuba uDavide uthanjiswe waba ngukumkani kumaSirayeli onke, enyuka onke amaFilisti, aya kumfuna uDavide. Weva ke uDavide, waphuma waya kuwakhawulela."
1Chronicles14:9 Afika amaFilisti, abachithachitha entilini yamaRafa."
1Chronicles14:10 uDavide wabuza kuYehova, esithi, Ndiwahlasele na amaFilisti? uya kuwanikela na esandleni sam? Wathi uYehova kuye, Yima; ngokuba ndiya kuwanikela esandleni sakho."
1Chronicles14:11 Benyuka baya eBhahali-peratsim; uDavide wawaxabela khona. Wathi uDavide, uThixo uzigqobhozile iintshaba zam; ngenxa yoko bathi loo ndawo yiBhahali-perasima."
1Chronicles14:12 Azishiya apho izithixo zawo, waza uDavide wayalela ukuba atshiswe ngomlilo."
1Chronicles14:13 Aphinda amaFilisti achithakala entilini leyo.
1Chronicles14:14 Waphinda uDavide wabuza kuThixo; Wathi uThixo kuye, Musa ukubalandela; zijike, uzikhawulele ngasemithini yequnube."
1Chronicles14:15 Xa uthe waliva isandi sokuhamba emantloko emithi yequnube, phuma uye kulwa; ngokuba uThixo uphumile phambi kwakho, ukuba awuxabele umkhosi wamaFilisti."
1Chronicles14:16 Wenza uDavide njengoko uYehova wamwisela umthetho ngako, bawuxabela umkhosi wamaFilisti, bathabathela eGibheyon, besa eGezere."
1Chronicles14:17 Lwaphuma lwaya emazweni onke udaba lukaDavide; yaye uYehova wabeka uloyiko lwakhe kuzo zonke iintlanga.
1Chronicles15:1 uDavide wazakhela izindlu emzini kaDavide; wayilungiselela indawo ityeya kaThixo, wayimisela intente."
1Chronicles15:2 Wathi uDavide, Akukho bani unako ukuyithwala ityeya kaThixo, ingengabaLevi; ngokuba abanyule uYehova ukuba bayithwale ityeya kaThixo, bamkhonze ngonaphakade."
1Chronicles15:3 uDavide wawahlanganisa onke amaSirayeli eYerusalem ukuba athabathe ityeya kaYehova iyise endaweni yayo awayeyilungiselele yona.
1Chronicles15:4 Wabahlanganisa uDavide oonyana baka-Aron nabaLevi.
1Chronicles15:5 Koonyana bakaKehati yangu-Eriyeli; U-Uriyeli umthetheli, nabazalwana bakhe, belikhulu elinamanci mabini;"
1Chronicles15:6 koonyana bakaMerari; uAsaya umthetheli, nabazalwana bakhe, bengamakhulu amabini anamanci mabini;"
1Chronicles15:7 koonyana bakaGershom yangu-Asheri; uYoweli umthetheli, nabazalwana bakhe, belikhulu elinamanci mathathu;"
1Chronicles15:8 koonyana bakaElishafan yangu uShemaya umthetheli, nabazalwana bakhe, bengamakhulu amabini;"
1Chronicles15:9 koonyana bakaHebron; nguEliyeli intloko, nabazalwana bakhe, amazinyo amashumi asibhozo anamabini;"
1Chronicles15:10 koonyana bakaUziyeli yangu uAminadabhi umthetheli, nabazalwana bakhe, belikhulu elinashumi-nye linababini."
1Chronicles15:11 uDavide wabiza uTsadoki noAbhiyatare, ababingeleli nabaLevi, ukuba beze kuUriyeli, noAsaya, noYoweli, noShemaya, noEliyeli, noAminadabhi;"
1Chronicles15:12 Wathi kubo, Iintloko zezindlu zooyise zabaLevi; zihlambululeni nina nabazalwana benu, ukuze niyise ityeya kaYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ize endaweni endiyilungisileyo."
1Chronicles15:13 Ekubeni ningenjinjalo ekuqaleni, uYehova uThixo wethu usitshabalalisile, ngenxa yokuba asimfunanga ngomyalelo wobulungisa."
1Chronicles15:14 Bazingcwalisa ke ababingeleli nabaLevi, ukuba bayinyuse ityeya kaYehova uThixo kaSirayeli."
1Chronicles15:15 Bayithwala oonyana bakaLevi ityeya kaThixo, njengoko abemwisele umthetho uMoses ngokwelizwi likaYehova, emagxeni abo, nezibonda ezikuyo."
1Chronicles15:16 uDavide waqhubeka ethetha neentloko zabaLevi ukuba zikhethe abazalwana babo ukuba babe ziimvumi ezinezixhobo zomculo, iihadi nemirhubhe namacangci abavakalisa ngovuyo."
1Chronicles15:17 AbaLevi bambeka uHeman unyana kaYoweli; kubazalwana bakhe ibinguAsafu unyana kaBherekiya; koonyana bakaMerari, abazalwana babo nguEtan unyana kaKushiya;"
1Chronicles15:18 Banabazalwana babo bodidi lwesibini, uZekariya, uBhen, uYaheziyeli, uSemiramoti, uYehiyeli, uUni, uEliyabhi, uBhenaya, uMahaseya, uMatitja, uElifeli, uMikeya, uObhedi-edom noYehiyeli, abagcini-masango."
1Chronicles15:19 Ke iimvumi, ooHeman, noAsafu, noEtan, bakhethwa ukuba badlale amacangci obhedu;"
1Chronicles15:20 noZekariya, noAsiyeli, noSemiramoti, noYehiyeli, noUni, noEliyabhi, noMahaseya, noBhenaya, abaneehadi zeehadi;"
1Chronicles15:21 OoMatitiya, noElifele, noMikeneya, no-Obhedi-edom, noYehiyeli, noAzasiya, belunge nesahlulo sesithathu phezu kwamaSemi."
1Chronicles15:22 Ke uKenaniya, intloko yabaLevi, ubecula;"
1Chronicles15:23 OoBheriya noElikana babengabamasango etyeya.
1Chronicles15:24 Yaye uSebhaniya noYoshafati noNataniyeli noAmasayi noZekariya noBhenaya noEliyezere ababingeleli babevuthela amaxilongo phambi kobuncwane boThixo oyinyaniso, yaye uObhedi-edom noYehiya babengabalusi bamasango eNgxowa-mali."
1Chronicles15:25 uDavide namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli nezikhulu baya kuyithabatha ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova bevuya endlwini kaObhedi-edom.
1Chronicles15:26 Xa uThixo wanceda abaLevi ekuthwaleni ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova, babingelela ngeenkunzi zeenkomo ezisixhenxe neenkunzi zeegusha ezisixhenxe."
1Chronicles15:27 Wayambethe ingubo yokwaleka yelinen ecikizekileyo uDavide, nabaLevi bonke ababethwele ityeya, neemvumi, noKenaniya umphathi wabathwali, neemvumi; ke uDavide ebhinqe ilinen egxalabeni;"
1Chronicles15:28 Ngoko wonke uSirayeli wayiphakamisa ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova ngovuyo ngesandi sesigodlo samaxilongo namacangci ekhalisa iihadi neehadi.
1Chronicles15:29 Kwathi ke ekungeneni kwetyeya yomnqophiso kaYehova kwisiXeko sikaDavide, uMikali, intombi kaSawule, wavela ngefestile, wambona uKumkani uDavide esina edlala, wamcekisa entliziyweni yakhe."
1Chronicles16:1 Bayingenisa ityeya kaThixo, bayimisa esazulwini sentente abeyimisile uDavide, banyusa amadini anyukayo nemibingelelo yombulelo phambi koYehova."
1Chronicles16:2 Wagqiba ke uDavide ukwenza amadini anyukayo nemibingelelo yombulelo, wabasikelela abantu egameni likaYehova."
1Chronicles16:3 Wabanika bonke abantu bakwaSirayeli, inkunzi nemazi; elowo wamnika intenda yesonka, nesuntswana lenyama, nendebe yewayini."
1Chronicles16:4 Wabeka abanye kubaLevi ukuba bakhonze phambi kwetyeya kaYehova, banike ingxelo, badumise, badumise uYehova uThixo kaSirayeli."
1Chronicles16:5 Yaba nguAsafu intloko, yanguZekariya emva kwakhe, noYehiyeli, noShemiramoti, noYehiyeli, noMatitiya, noEliyabhi, noBhenaya, no-Obhedi-edom; noYaheli ngeehadi neehadi; uAsafu ebetha amacangci;"
1Chronicles16:6 Yaye ababingeleli uBhenaya noYahaziyeli babesoloko bevuthela ngezigodlo phambi kwetyeya yomnqophiso kaTHIXO oyinyaniso.
1Chronicles16:7 Kwangaloo mini, uDavide waqalisa ukwenza le ndumiso ebulela uYehova ngoAsafu nabazalwana bakhe."
1Chronicles16:8 Dumisani uYehova, nqulani igama lakhe, zaziseni iintlanga izenzo zakhe."
1Chronicles16:9 Vumani kuye, mbetheleni ingoma, Xoxani ngemisebenzi yakhe yonke ebalulekileyo."
1Chronicles16:10 Qhayisani ngegama lakhe elingcwele; mayivuye intliziyo yabamngxameleyo uYehova.
1Chronicles16:11 Mfuneni uYehova namandla akhe, Funani ubuso bakhe ngamaxesha onke."
1Chronicles16:12 Cingani ngemisebenzi yakhe ebalulekileyo awayenzayo, Izimanga zakhe nezigwebo zomlomo wakhe;"
1Chronicles16:13 Nina nyana bakaSirayeli, mkhonzi wakhe, nyana bakaYakobi, banyulwa bakhe."
1Chronicles16:14 NguYehova uThixo wethu yena; zisehlabathini lonke izigwebo zakhe.
1Chronicles16:15 Khumbulani ngamaxesha onke umnqophiso wakhe; Ilizwi awalimisela iwaka lezizukulwana;
1Chronicles16:16 Ngokomnqophiso awawenzayo noAbraham, Nokufunga kwakhe kuIsake;"
1Chronicles16:17 Walimisa kuYakobi ukuba libe ngummiselo, KuSirayeli ukuba libe ngumnqophiso ongunaphakade;"
1Chronicles16:18 Wathi, Ndikunika ilizwe lakwaKanan, libe lilifa lenu;"
1Chronicles16:19 Nise nimbalwa, nimbalwa, ningabaphambukeli phakathi kwenu;"
1Chronicles16:20 Behamba besuka kolunye uhlanga, baye kolunye uhlanga, Besuka kobunye ubukumkani, baye kolunye uhlanga;"
1Chronicles16:21 Akavumelanga mntu ukuba abenzakalise; ewe, wabakhalimela ookumkani ngenxa yabo."
1Chronicles16:22 Wathi, Musani ukubachukumisa abathanjiswa bam, Musani ukubaphatha kakubi abaprofeti bam."
1Chronicles16:23 Vumani kuYehova, nonke hlabathi; ulwazisa imihla ngemihla usindiso lwakhe."
1Chronicles16:24 Balisani ezintlangeni uzuko lwakhe; imisebenzi yakhe ebalulekileyo ezintlangeni zonke.
1Chronicles16:25 Kuba mkhulu uYehova yaye ufanele ukudunyiswa kakhulu; Uyoyikeka yena ngaphezu koothixo bonke.
1Chronicles16:26 Kuba bonke oothixo beentlanga banqula izithixo, kodwa uYehova wenza amazulu."
1Chronicles16:27 Uzuko nozuko luphambi kobuso bakhe; amandla novuyo lusendaweni yalo.
1Chronicles16:28 Mnikeni uYehova, nina zizukulwana zeentlanga, mnikeni uYehova uzuko namandla."
1Chronicles16:29 Zisani kuYehova uzuko lwegama lakhe; wenze idini, uze phambi kwakhe; nqula uYehova ngendlela ebalaseleyo."
1Chronicles16:30 Moyikeni ubuso bakhe, nonke hlabathi; umhlaba uya kuzinziswa, ukuba ungashukumi."
1Chronicles16:31 Malivuye izulu, ligcobe ihlabathi, Zithi iintlanga phakathi kweentlanga, uYehova ngukumkani."
1Chronicles16:32 Malugqume ulwandle nokuzala kwalo; makavuye amasimi nako konke okukuwo.
1Chronicles16:33 Iya kwandula ke imithi yehlathi ibe nemihlali phambi koYehova, ngenxa yokuba eze kugweba ihlabathi."
1Chronicles16:34 Dumisani uYehova; ngokuba elungile; Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe.
1Chronicles16:35 Nithi ke, Thixo ongumsindisi wethu, sisindise, usihlanganise, usihlangule ezintlangeni, ukuze sidumise igama lakho elingcwele, sidumise igama lakho."
1Chronicles16:36 Makabongwe uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, kude kuse ephakadeni. Bathi bonke abantu, Amen, badumisa uYehova."
1Chronicles16:37 Wabashiya apho phambi kwetyeya yomnqophiso kaYehova uAsafu nabazalwana bakhe ukuze basebenze rhoqo phambi kweTyeya, ngokomsebenzi wemihla ngemihla;"
1Chronicles16:38 no-Obhedi-edom nabazalwana babo, bengamashumi amathandathu anesibhozo; uObhedi-edom, unyana kaYedutun, noHosa, bengabamasango;"
1Chronicles16:39 uTsadoki umbingeleli nomntakwabo ababingeleli baphambi komnquba kaYehova kwindawo ephakamileyo eyayiseGibheyon,"
1Chronicles16:40 ukuba basoloko besondeza amadini anyukayo kuYehova, kusasa nangokuhlwa, esibingelelweni sedini elinyukayo, bakwenze konke okubhaliweyo emyalelweni kaYehova, awawumisela amaSirayeli;"
1Chronicles16:41 baba noHeman noYedutun nabanye abanyuliweyo ababizwa ngamagama ukuba badumise uYehova, ngenxa yokuba inceba yakhe ikwixesha elingenammiselo;"
1Chronicles16:42 baba noHeman noYedutun, bephethe amaxilongo, namaxilongo, abo bakhaphayo, neempahla zikaThixo. Oonyana bakaYedutun bengabamasango."
1Chronicles16:43 Bafuduka bonke abantu, elowo waya endlwini yakhe; wabuya uDavide, waya kusikelela indlu yakhe."
1Chronicles17:1 Kwathi, ehleli endlwini yakhe uDavide, wathi uDavide kuNatan umprofeti, Uyabona, mna ndihleli endlwini yomsedare; ke yona ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova ihleli phantsi kwezilaphu."
1Chronicles17:2 Wathi uNatan kuDavide, Konke okusentliziyweni yakho, kwenze; ngokuba uThixo unawe."
1Chronicles17:3 Kwathi ngobo busuku, lafika ilizwi likaThixo kuNatan, lisithi:"
1Chronicles17:4 Hamba uye kuthi kumkhonzi wam uDavide, uthi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Musa ukundakhela indlu endiya kuhlala kuyo;"
1Chronicles17:5 Ngokuba andihlalanga ndlwini, kususela kulaa mini ndabanyusayo oonyana bakaSirayeli, unanamhla; ephuma emnqubeni aye kwenye, ephuma emnqubeni aye komnye."
1Chronicles17:6 Ekuhambeni konke endakuhambayo noonyana bakaSirayeli bonke, ndabaxelela omnye wabagwebi bakwaSirayeli, endabawisela umthetho wokuba babaluse abantu bam, ndathi, Yini na ukuba ungandakheli indlu yomsedare?"
1Chronicles17:7 Ngoko ke uze uthi kumkhonzi wam uDavide, Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Mna ndakukhupha esibayeni, ndisemva komhlambi, ukuze ube yinganga yabantu bam amaSirayeli."
1Chronicles17:8 Ndandinawe naphi na apho wawusiya khona, yaye ndazitshabalalisa zonke iintshaba zakho phambi kwakho, ndaza ndakwenzela igama njengegama labo bakhulu emhlabeni."
1Chronicles17:9 Ndiya kubalungisela indawo abantu bam amaSirayeli, ndibaqinise, beme endaweni yabo, bangabi sagungqa; kwaye abantwana bobugwenxa abasayi kuphinda babatshabalalise njengangaphambili;"
1Chronicles17:10 kususela kulaa mini ndabamisela abantu bam amaSirayeli abagwebi. Kwaye ndiza kuzoyisa zonke iintshaba zakho. Ngaphezu koko, ndithi kuni, uYehova uya kukwakhela indlu."
1Chronicles17:11 Xa ithe yazaliseka imihla yakho yokuba uye kooyihlo, ndiya kuyizalela emva kwakho imbewu yakho, iphume koonyana bakho; ndibuzinzise ubukumkani bakhe."
1Chronicles17:12 Nguye ke oya kundakhela indlu, ndiyizinzise itrone yakhe, kude kuse ephakadeni."
1Chronicles17:13 Mna ndiya kuba nguyise kuye, yena abe ngunyana wam;"
1Chronicles17:14 Ndiza kummisela endlwini yam nasebukumkanini bam ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo, netrone yakhe iya kuqiniseka ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo."
1Chronicles17:15 Njengaloo mazwi onke, ngokwalo mbono, wenjenjalo ukuthetha uNatan kuDavide."
1Chronicles17:16 Waya ukumkani uDavide, wahlala phambi koYehova, wathi, Ndingubani na, YehovaYehova, iyintoni na indlu yam, ukuba undizise apha?"
1Chronicles17:17 Kuncinane oko ke emehlweni akho, Thixo; ngenxa yokuba kwanexesha elide wathetha ngendlu yomkhonzi wakho waza wandinyamekela ngokobuhle bendoda ephakamileyo, uYehova uThixo."
1Chronicles17:18 Wobuya athini na uDavide kuwe ngenxa yomkhonzi wakho? ngokuba uyamazi umkhonzi wakho.
1Chronicles17:19 Yehova, ngenxa yomkhonzi wakho nangokwentliziyo yakho uzenzile zonke ezi zinto zinkulu ngokwazisa zonke ezi zinto zikhulu."
1Chronicles17:20 Yehova, akukho unjengawe, akukho Thixo ingenguwe, njengoko konke sikuvileyo ngeendlebe zethu."
1Chronicles17:21 Luluphi na uhlanga ehlabathini apha olunjengohlanga lwakho lukaSirayeli, awalukhululayo uThixo ukuba lube luhlanga lwakhe, ukuze uzenzele igama elikhulu eloyikekayo ngokugxotha iintlanga phambi kwabantu bakho owabakhululayo kubo? Jiphethe?"
1Chronicles17:22 Ngokuba ubenze abantu bakho amaSirayeli baba ngabantu bakho kude kuse ephakadeni; wena Yehova waba nguThixo wabo.
1Chronicles17:23 Ngako oko, Yehova, ilizwi olithethileyo ngomkhonzi wakho nangendlu yakhe malihlale limi, wenze njengoko ukuthethileyo;"
1Chronicles17:24 Malinyaniseke, ukuze igama lakho libe likhulu ngonaphakade, ngokuthi, uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, uThixo kaSirayeli; nendlu kaDavide umkhonzi wakho mayime phambi kwakho."
1Chronicles17:25 Ngokuba wena, Thixo wam, wathi kumkhonzi wakho, Uya kumakhela indlu; ngenxa yoko umkhonzi wakho wayifikelela intliziyo yakhe ukuba athandaze phambi kwakho."
1Chronicles17:26 Kaloku, Yehova, unguThixo wena, yaye umthembise ezi ntsikelelo umkhonzi wakho."
1Chronicles17:27 Kaloku makukholeke kuwe ukuyisikelela indlu yomkhonzi wakho, ukuba ihlale ihleli phambi kwakho ngonaphakade; ngokuba usikelelwe wena, Yehova;"
1Chronicles18:1 Emva koko uDavide wawaxabela amaFilisti, wawoyisa, wayithimba iGati nemizi yayo esandleni samaFilisti."
1Chronicles18:2 Wawaxabela uMowabhi; yaye amaMowabhi aba ngabakhonzi bakaDavide abazisa izipho kuwo.
1Chronicles18:3 uDavide wambulala uHadadezere, ukumkani waseTsobha, wada wesa eHamati, ekuyeni kwakhe ukubuzinzisa ubukumkani bakhe emlanjeni ongumEfrati."
1Chronicles18:4 uDavide wathimba iwaka leenqwelo zokulwa, namawaka asixhenxe abamahashe, namashumi amabini amawaka omqikela;"
1Chronicles18:5 Xa ama-Aram ephuma eDamasko esiza kumnceda uHadadezere ukumkani waseSobha, uDavide wabulala ama-Aram angamashumi amabini anamabini amawaka."
1Chronicles18:6 uDavide wamisa abalindi kwa-Aram; yaye amaSiriya aba ngabakhonzi bakaDavide abazisa izipho kuwo. Ngoko uYehova wamkhusela uDavide naphi na apho wayesiya khona.
1Chronicles18:7 uDavide wawathabatha amakhaka egolide awayekubakhonzi bakaHadadezere, wawazisa eYerusalem."
1Chronicles18:8 uDavide wathabatha ubhedu oluninzi eTibhati naseKuna, imizi kaHadadezere, awathi uSolomon wenza ngayo ulwandle lobhedu, neintsika, nezinto zobhedu."
1Chronicles18:9 Weva uToyu ukumkani waseHamati, ukuba uDavide uyixabele yonke impi kaHadadezere, ukumkani waseTsobha;"
1Chronicles18:10 Wathumela unyana wakhe uHadoram kuKumkani uDavide ukuba ambuze ukuphila kwakhe nokubulela ngenxa yokuba wayelwe noHadadizere waza wamoyisa; (ngokuba uHadadezere wasilwa neTou) eneempahla zeentlobo ngeentlobo zegolide, isilivere nobhedu."
1Chronicles18:11 Kananjalo ukumkani uDavide wanyula uYehova, kunye nesilivere negolide abeyithabathe kuzo zonke ezo ntlanga; kumaEdom, nakuMowabhi, nakoonyana baka-Amon, nakumaFilisti, nakuAmaleki."
1Chronicles18:12 Ngaphezu koko, uAbhishayi unyana kaTseruya wakwaEdom kwiNtlambo yeTyuwa wabulala ishumi elinesibhozo lamawaka."
1Chronicles18:13 Wamisa abalindi kwaEdom; yaye onke amaEdom aba ngabakhonzi bakaDavide. Ngoko uYehova wamkhusela uDavide naphi na apho wayesiya khona.
1Chronicles18:14 uDavide ke walawula uSirayeli ephela, esenza ngokusesikweni nangobulungisa ebantwini bakhe bonke."
1Chronicles18:15 uYowabhi, unyana kaTseruya, ubephethe umkhosi; noYehoshafati, unyana ka-Akiludi, umphathi;"
1Chronicles18:16 uTsadoki unyana ka-Ahitubhi, noAbhimeleki, unyana ka-Abhiyatare, babengababingeleli; uShavasha ubengunobhala;"
1Chronicles18:17 uBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada wayephethe amaKrete nePleti; yaye oonyana bakaDavide babeyintloko kakumkani.
1Chronicles19:1 Emveni koko wafa uNahashe ukumkani woonyana baka-Amon, unyana wakhe waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe."
