1Chronicles19:2 Wathi uDavide, Mandimenzele inceba uHanun unyana kaNahashe, njengokuba noyise wandenzela inceba. uDavide wathumela abathunywa ukuba baye kumthuthuzela ngenxa kayise. Bafika abakhonzi bakaDavide ezweni loonyana baka-Amon, uHanun, ukuba bamthuthuzele."
1Chronicles19:3 Bathi abathetheli boonyana baka-Amon kuHanun, na wena ukuthi, Uyamhlonela na uyihlo uDavide, oko ethume abakhuzi kuwe? Abakhonzi bakhe abeze kuni na, ukuba balihlole ilizwe, ukuba balibhukuqe, balihlole?"
1Chronicles19:4 Ngoko uHanun wabathabatha abakhonzi bakaDavide waza wabacheba waza wasika izambatho zabo waza wanqunqa phakathi ukuya ngasemva waza wabandulula.
1Chronicles19:5 Kwahamba abantu, bamxelela uDavide okwenziwe kuloo madoda. Wathumela ukuba ahlangatyezwe, kuba loo madoda ayehlazekile kakhulu. Wathi ukumkani, Hlalani eYeriko zide zihlume iindevu zenu, nandule ukubuya."
1Chronicles19:6 Babona oonyana baka-Amon, ukuba benze amasikizi kuDavide, bathumela ke ooHanun noonyana baka-Amon kwa-Aram ephakathi kweMilambo, nakwa-Aram-maga, naseSobha, iwaka leetalente zesilivere, ukuba baqeshe iinqwelo zokulwa nabamahashe."
1Chronicles19:7 Baziqeshela amashumi amathathu anamabini amawaka eenqwelo zokulwa, nokumkani waseMaga nabantu bakhe; abo bezayo bamisa ngaseMedebha. Bahlanganisana oonyana baka-Amon emizini yabo, beza kulwa."
1Chronicles19:8 Akuva ke uDavide, wathumela uYowabhi nomkhosi wonke wamagorha."
1Chronicles19:9 Baphuma oonyana baka-Amon, baya kulwa phambi kwesango lesixeko; ookumkani ababefikile babebodwa ezweni."
1Chronicles19:10 Wabona uYowabhi ukuba imfazwe ingxamele kuye, ngaphambili nangasemva;"
1Chronicles19:11 Abaseleyo wabanikela esandleni sika-Abhishayi umkhuluwa wakhe; bagidima baya kubakhawulela oonyana baka-Amon.
1Chronicles19:12 Wathi, Xa athe andifumana ama-Aram, wondinceda; kodwa ukuba oonyana baka-Amoni bomelele kunawe, ndiya kukunceda mna."
1Chronicles19:13 Yiba nesibindi size sibe nesibindi ngenxa yohlanga lwethu nangenxa yezixeko zoThixo wethu, yaye ngamana uYehova enze okulungileyo emehlweni akhe."
1Chronicles19:14 Weza uYowabhi namadoda abenaye kuma-Aram emfazweni; asaba ebusweni bakhe.
1Chronicles19:15 Xa oonyana baka-Amoni babona ukuba ama-Aram asabile, nabo basaba phambi koAbhishayi umntakwabo baza bangena esixekweni. Wafika uYowabhi eYerusalem."
1Chronicles19:16 Akubona ama-Aram ukuba anomsindo phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli, athumela abathunywa, bawakhupha ama-Aram awayephesheya koMlambo; nguSofagus, umthetheli womkhosi kaHadadezere, ekhokele kuwo."
1Chronicles19:17 Waxelelwa uDavide; wawahlanganisa onke amaSirayeli, wayiwela iYordan, wawaxabela, walwa nawo. Xa uDavide wawaxabelayo ama-Aram, aza amhlasela."
1Chronicles19:18 Asaba ke ama-Aram phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli; uDavide wabulala kuma-Aram amawaka asixhenxe abaqhubi beenqwelo zokulwa, namashumi amane amawaka omqikela, waxabela noSofage, umthetheli womkhosi."
1Chronicles19:19 Babona abakhonzi bakaHadadezere ukuba babevutha ngumsindo phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli, baxolelana noDavide baza bamkhonza; ama-Aram akasayi kuba sabahlangula oonyana baka-Amon."
1Chronicles20:1 Wakudlula umnyaka, ngexesha lokulwa kookumkani, uYowabhi wakhokela umkhosi onamandla, walenza laphanzisa ilizwe loonyana baka-Amon, wayingqinga iRabha. Ke uDavide wayehleli eYerusalem. uYowabhi wayoyisa iRabha, wayitshabalalisa."
1Chronicles20:2 uDavide wasithabatha isithsaba sikakumkani wabo entlokweni yakhe waza wafumana ubunzima baso bebuyitalente yegolide, sinamatye anqabileyo; yabekwa entlokweni kaDavide, wathabatha amaxhoba amaninzi aloo mzi."
1Chronicles20:3 Wawakhupha amadoda awayekuyo, wawasika ngeesarha, nangeemela zesinyithi, nangeempahla ezibukhali zesinyithi; Wenjenjalo uDavide kwimizi yonke yoonyana baka-Amon. Emva koko uDavide nabantu bonke babuyela eYerusalem."
1Chronicles20:4 Emva kwemfazwe wawasukela amaFilisti eGezere; Ngelo xesha uSibhegayi kaHuse wambulala uSipayi, omnye woonyana bamaRafa, bazithoba."
1Chronicles20:5 Kwabuya ke kwabakho ukulwa namaFilisti; uElihanan, unyana kaYayiro, wambulala uLami, umzalwana kaGoliyati waseGati, ontshuntshe yakhe ibinganjengentshuntshe yabaluki."
1Chronicles20:6 Kwaphinda kwabakho imfazwe eGati, apho kwakukho indoda ephakamileyo, iminwe yayo ingamashumi amabini anesine, emithandathu esandleni ngasinye nemithandathu emlenzeni ngamnye; ekwangunyana wengxilimbela."
1Chronicles20:7 Kwathi, ekulweni kwakhe noonyana bakaSirayeli, wambulala uYonatan unyana kaShimeha, umkhuluwa kaDavide."
1Chronicles20:8 Bazalwa kwiRafa iGati; yaye babulawa ngesandla sikaDavide nangesandla sabakhonzi bakhe.
1Chronicles21:1 Ke kaloku uSathana wabasukela oonyana bakaSirayeli, wamlinga uDavide ukuba awabale amaSirayeli."
1Chronicles21:2 Wathi uDavide kuYowabhi nakubathetheli babantu, Hambani niye kuwabala amaSirayeli, nithabathele eBher-shebha, nide nise kwaDan; undizisele inani labo, ndilazi."
1Chronicles21:3 Wathi uYowabhi, uYehova makabandise abantu bakhe kalikhulu kunabo bangabo; kodwa, nkosi yam kumkani, bonke aba asingabakhonzi benkosi yam na? iyifunelani lento nkosi yam? Kutheni ilityala likaSirayeli nje?"
1Chronicles21:4 Laqinisela ilizwi lokumkani kuYowabhi. Wemka uYowabhi, wacanda kumaSirayeli onke, weza eYerusalem."
1Chronicles21:5 uYowabhi wamnika uDavide inani labantu. Bonke abaphuma kwaSirayeli baba liwaka elinekhulu lamawaka, namaYuda angamawaka angamakhulu amane anamanci mathandathu amawaka."
1Chronicles21:6 Akababalelanga uLevi noBhenjamin phakathi kwabo, ngokuba ilizwi lokumkani lalisikizi kuYowabhi."
1Chronicles21:7 Akakholiswanga ke ngulo uThixo; ngoko ke, wawoyisa amaSirayeli."
1Chronicles21:8 Wathi uDavide kuThixo, Ndonile kunene ngale nto ndiyenzileyo; ke ngoko bususe ububi bomkhonzi wakho; ngokuba ndenze izinto ezininzi zobudenge."
1Chronicles21:9 Wathetha uYehova kuGadi, imboni kaDavide, wathi:"
1Chronicles21:10 Yiya uthethe kuDavide, uthi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ndikunika izinto ezintathu; zinyulele ibe nye kuzo, ndikwenzele yona."
1Chronicles21:11 Waya ke uGadi kuDavide, wathi kuye, uYehova uthe, Zinyulele;"
1Chronicles21:12 nokuba yiminyaka emithathu yendlala; nokuba ziinyanga ezintathu ugxothwe ziintshaba zakho, xa umkhonto weentshaba zakho ufika kuwe; nokuba ziintsuku ezintathu ikrele likaYehova, nendyikitya yokufa, ibe sehlabathini; ke isithunywa sikaYehova sawatshabalalisa onke amazwe akwaSirayeli. Kaloku ke, mandinixelele ilizwi endiya kulibuyisela kowandithumayo."
1Chronicles21:13 Wathi uDavide kuGadi, Ndibandezelekile; mandiwele esandleni sikaYehova; ngokuba zininzi iinceba zakhe, kodwa mandingaweli ezandleni zabantu."
1Chronicles21:14 uYehova wathumela isibetho kuSirayeli, kwaza kwafa amashumi asixhenxe amawaka amadoda kwaSirayeli."
1Chronicles21:15 uThixo wathuma isithunywa eYerusalem, ukuba siyitshabalalise; wakubona oko uYehova, wasikwa yimfesane ngenxa yobubi obo, wathi kwisithunywa eso sitshabalalisayo, Kwanele, bamba isandla sakho. Ingelosi kaYehova yayimi etroneni kaOrnan umYebhusi."
1Chronicles21:16 Wawaphakamisa amehlo akhe uDavide, wayibona ingelosi kaYehova imi phakathi komhlaba nezulu, iphethe ikrele layo ngesandla, isalathe eYerusalem. Emva koko uDavide namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli bawa ngobuso, benxibe iingubo ezimnyama."
1Chronicles21:17 Wathi uDavide kuThixo, Asindim yini na othe mababalwe abantu? ndonile, ndonile, ndonile; kodwa ezi zimvu zenze ntoni na? Yehova, Thixo wam, isandla sakho masibe phezu kwam, nendlu kabawo; kungabi phakathi kwabantu bakho, ukuze batshatyalaliswe."
1Chronicles21:18 Ke isithunywa sikaNdikhoyo sathi kuGadi makaxelele uDavide ukuba uDavide makanyuke aye kumakhela uNdikhoyo iqonga lamadini esandeni sikaOrnan umYebhusi.
1Chronicles21:19 Wenyuka uDavide ngokwelizwi likaGadi, awalithethayo egameni likaYehova."
1Chronicles21:20 Wajika uOrnane, wabona isithunywa; oonyana bakhe abane abakunye naye bazimele. Ke uOrnane wayebhula ingqolowa."
1Chronicles21:21 Wathi akufika uDavide kuOrnan, uOrnan wakhangela waza wambona uDavide, waphuma esandeni waza waqubuda kuDavide ejonge phantsi."
1Chronicles21:22 Wathi uDavide kuOrnan, Ndinike esi sandá, ndimakhele khona uYehova isibingelelo; ndinike ngexabiso elizalisekileyo, sithintelwe isibetho sabantu."
1Chronicles21:23 Wathi uOrnan kuDavide, Yithabathe, inkosi yam ukumkani yenze okulungileyo emehlweni ayo; Yabonani, ndininika iinkomo zibe ngamadini anyukayo, namakhiwane abe ziinkuni, nengqolowa ibe ngumnikelo wokudla; Ndinikela ngako konke."
1Chronicles21:24 Wathi ukumkani uDavide kuOrnan: “Hayi! kodwa ngokuqinisekileyo ndiya kusithenga ngexabiso elipheleleyo, ngenxa yokuba andiyi kuthabatha oko kukokwakho kuYehova, okanye ndinikele nomnikelo otshiswayo ngaphandle kwentlawulo."
1Chronicles21:25 uDavide wamnika uOrnan loo ndawo ubunzima beeshekele zegolide ezibunzima bumakhulu mathandathu.
1Chronicles21:26 Wakhela apho ke uDavide isibingelelo kuYehova, wanyusa amadini anyukayo neyombulelo, wanqula uYehova; wamphendula ngomlilo ophuma ezulwini, phezu kwesibingelelo sedini elinyukayo."
1Chronicles21:27 Wathetha uYehova kwisithunywa; walifaka ikrele esingxotyeni sakhe.
1Chronicles21:28 Ngelo xesha akubona uDavide ukuba uYehova umphendule ngesibetho sikaOrnan umYebhusi, wabingelela apho."
1Chronicles21:29 Kuba ngelo xesha umnquba kaYehova awawenzayo uMoses entlango nesibingelelo somnikelo otshiswayo zazikwindawo ephakamileyo yaseGibheyon.
1Chronicles21:30 Kodwa uDavide akazange akwazi ukumkhokelela ekubeni abuze kuThixo, kuba wayesoyika ikrele lengelosi kaYehova."
1Chronicles22:1 Wathi uDavide, Yiyo le indlu kaYehova uThixo; siso esi isibingelelo samadini anyukayo kwaSirayeli."
1Chronicles22:2 Wathi uDavide mabahlanganiswe abasemzini, abasezweni lakwaSirayeli; waqesha abaqingqi bamatye, ukuba bakrole amatye axholiweyo, okwakha indlu kaThixo."
1Chronicles22:3 uDavide walungisa isinyithi sasininzi sezikhonkwane zeengcango zamasango nezezinyuko; nobhedu oluninzi, alwaba nakulinganiswa;"
1Chronicles22:4 nemisedare yamininzi; ngokuba abaseTsidon nabaseTire bamzisele yaninzi imisedare uDavide.
1Chronicles22:5 Wandula ke wathi uDavide: “uSolomon unyana wam mncinane yaye usemtsha, yaye indlu eza kwakhelwa uYehova ifanele ibe yeyeyona inkulu, idumileyo nezukileyo kuwo onke amazwe; Ngoko uDavide walungiselela okuninzi ngaphambi kokufa kwakhe."
1Chronicles22:6 Emva koko wabiza unyana wakhe uSolomon, wamyalela ukuba amakhele indlu uYehova uThixo kaSirayeli."
1Chronicles22:7 Wathi uDavide kuSolomon, Nyana wam, ndandizimisele ukulakhela indlu igama likaYehova uThixo wam."
1Chronicles22:8 Ke lafika kum ilizwi likaYehova, lisithi, Uphalaze igazi elininzi, ulwe iimfazwe ezinkulu; akuyi kulakhela ndlu igama lam, ngokuba uphalaze igazi elininzi ehlabathini phambi kwamehlo am."
1Chronicles22:9 Yabona, uya kuzalelwa unyana; yena uya kuba yindoda yoxolo; yaye ndiya kumphumza ezintshabeni zakhe zonke ezimjikelezileyo, ngenxa yokuba igama lakhe liya kuba nguSolomon, yaye ndiya kumnika uSirayeli uxolo nokuphumla ngemihla yakhe."
1Chronicles22:10 Nguye ke oya kulakhela igama lam indlu; yena uya kuba ngunyana wam, mna ndibe nguyise kuye; yaye ndiya kusimisa isihlalo sobukumkani bakhe kwaSirayeli ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo."
1Chronicles22:11 Ke kaloku, nyana wam, ngamana uYehova angaba nawe! ube nempumelelo, uyakhe indlu kaYehova uThixo wakho, njengoko wakuthethayo kuwe."
1Chronicles22:12 NguYehova kuphela okunika ubulumko nokuqonda, nokukuyalela ngoSirayeli, ukuze uwugcine umthetho kaYehova uThixo wakho."
1Chronicles22:13 Uya kuphumelela apho, ukuba uthe wakugcina ukuyenza imithetho namasiko, awathi uYehova wamwisela uMoses umthetho ngawo ngenxa yamaSirayeli. Yomelela, ukhaliphe; musani ukoyika, musani ukoyika."
1Chronicles22:14 Uyabona, ekubandezelekeni kwam ndiyilungisele indlu kaYehova ikhulu lamawaka eetalente zegolide, newaka leetalente zesilivere; nobhedu nesinyithi, abungenakulinganiswa nanto; ngokuba izele; Kananjalo ndalungisa imithi namatye; kwaye ungayongeza."
1Chronicles22:15 Kananjalo baninzi kuwe abasebenzi, abaxholi, nabasebenza ngamatye nemithi, namadoda onke angamagcisa emsebenzini wonke."
1Chronicles22:16 Igolide, nesilivere, nobhedu, nesinyithi, azinakubalwa yimani ngoku, niyenze, uYehova woba nawe."
1Chronicles22:17 Waphinda uDavide wabawisela umthetho zonke iinkosana zakwaSirayeli, ukuba zincede uSolomon unyana wakhe, wathi:"
1Chronicles22:18 Akanani na uYehova uThixo wenu? Akaniphumzanga na? ngokuba abemi behlabathi nibasandleni sam; yaye ilizwe loyiswa phambi koYehova naphambi kwabantu bakhe.
1Chronicles22:19 Ke kaloku zimiseleni ukumquqela uYehova uThixo wenu ngentliziyo yenu nangomphefumlo wenu; yimani niyakhe ingcwele kaYehova uThixo, ukuba iziswe ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova, neempahla ezikhethekileyo zikaThixo, endlwini eya kwakhelwa igama likaYehova."
1Chronicles23:1 Ke kaloku, xa uDavide wayesel’ aluphele, ehambisekile ebudaleni, wamenza uSolomon unyana wakhe ukumkani kwaSirayeli."
1Chronicles23:2 Wazihlanganisa zonke izikhulu zakwaSirayeli nababingeleli nabaLevi.
1Chronicles23:3 Oonyana bakaSirayeli ukususela eBher-shebha ukusa kwaDan nenani labo ngokwenani labo, indoda ngendoda lalingamashumi amathathu anesibhozo amawaka."
1Chronicles23:4 Kubo amashumi amabini anesine amawaka aza kuqhubeka nomsebenzi wendlu kaYehova; amawaka amathandathu ngabaphathi nabagwebi;
1Chronicles23:5 Ngaphezu koko, babengamawaka amane abagcini-masango; bobane mabadumise uYehova ngeempahla endazenzayo, watsho uDavide, ukuba babadumise."
1Chronicles23:6 uDavide wabahlula bazizigaba ngokoonyana bakaLevi, yanguGershon, noKehati, noMerari."
1Chronicles23:7 Koonyana bakaGershon nguLadan noShimehi;
1Chronicles23:8 Oonyana bakaLadan, iintloko, nguYehiyeli, noSetam, noYoweli;"
1Chronicles23:9 Oonyana bakaShimehi yayinguAsh. uShelomiti noHasiyeli noHaran bathathu. Zizo ezo iintloko zezindlu zooyise zakwaLaedan.
1Chronicles23:10 Oonyana bakaShimehi nguYahati, noSina, noYewuse, noBheriya. Abo bane yayingoonyana bakaShimehi."
1Chronicles23:11 uYahati wayengomkhulu, noSisa owesibini; ke uYehuse noBheriya bebengenanyana baninzi; ngenxa yoko baba nenani elinye ngokwezindlu zooyise."
1Chronicles23:12 Oonyana bakaKehati nguAmram, noItsare, noHebron, noUziyeli, bebane."
1Chronicles23:13 Oonyana baka-Amram nguAsheri; uAron, noMoses, noAron, banyulwa ukuba bazingcwalise izinto ezingcwele, kude kuse ephakadeni, yena noonyana bakhe, baqhumisele ngesiqhumiso phambi koYehova, balungiselele kuye, basikelele egameni lakhe kude kuse ephakadeni."
1Chronicles23:14 Ngokuphathelele uMoses, umfo wakwaThixo, oonyana bakhe babizwa kwisizwe sakwaLevi."
1Chronicles23:15 Oonyana bakaMoses yayinguGershom noEliyezere.
1Chronicles23:16 Koonyana bakaGershom yayinguShebhuele intloko.
1Chronicles23:17 Oonyana bakaEliyezere nguRehabheya inkulu. uEliyezere akabanga nanyana bambi; ke oonyana bakaRehabheya bebebaninzi kunene.
1Chronicles23:18 Koonyana bakaItsahare; uShelomite ukumkani.
1Chronicles23:19 Koonyana bakaHebron; Owokuqala nguYeriya, owesibini nguAmariya, owesithathu nguYahaziyeli, owesine nguYekameyam."
1Chronicles23:20 Koonyana bakaUziyeli yanguShumiyeli; owokuqala nguMika, noYesiya;"
1Chronicles23:21 Oonyana bakaMerari nguMali noMushi oonyana bakaMagali; uElazare noKis.
1Chronicles23:22 Wafa uElazare engenanyana, eneentombi zodwa; bababamba abazalwana babo, oonyana bakaKishe."
1Chronicles23:23 Oonyana bakaMushi; uMageli, noEdere, noYeremoti, bebathathu."
1Chronicles23:24 Ngabo abo oonyana bakaLevi ngokwezindlu zooyise; neentloko zezindlu zooyise ngenani lamagama, ngokwamagama abo, besenza inkonzo yendlu kaYehova, bethabathela kominyaka imashumi mabini ezelwe, banyuse."
1Chronicles23:25 Ngokuba wathi uDavide, uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ubaphumzile abantu bakhe, ukuze bahlale eYerusalem kude kuse ephakadeni."
1Chronicles23:26 NakubaLevi; bangabi sawuthwala umnquba, neempahla zawo zenkonzo."
1Chronicles23:27 Ngokuba ngokwamazwi kaDavide okugqibela, abaLevi babalwa, kwathabathela kwabaminyaka imashumi mabini bezelwe, kwenyusa."
1Chronicles23:28 Kuba umsebenzi wabo yayikukukhonza oonyana baka-Aron enkonzweni yendlu kaYehova, ezintendelezweni nasemagumbini okudlela, nokuhlambulula zonke izinto ezingcwele nomsebenzi wenkonzo yendlu kaThixo oyinyaniso:"
1Chronicles23:29 nezonka ezingenagwele, nezonka ezingenagwele, nezonka ezingenagwele, nezonka ezingenagwele, nezonka ezingenagwele, nezonka ezigcadiweyo, nezilinganiso, nesayizi;"
1Chronicles23:30 Vukani imiso ngemiso, nidumise, nidumise uYehova, kwangokunjalo ngokuhlwa;"
1Chronicles23:31 nowokunyusa onke amadini anyukayo kuYehova ngeesabatha, nasekuthwaseni kwenyanga, nangamaxesha emithendeleko, ngokwenani, ngokomthetho abewuwiselwe umthetho, amaxesha onke phambi koYehova."
1Chronicles23:32 Yaye babenyamekela inkonzo yentente yokuhlangana nenkonzo yengcwele nenkonzo yoonyana baka-Aron, abazalwana babo, enkonzweni yendlu kaYehova."
1Chronicles24:1 Ngawo la ke amaqela oonyana baka-Aron; uNadabhi noAbhihu, uElazare noItamare."
1Chronicles24:2 Bafa ooNadabhi noAbhihu phambi koyise, bengenanyana; ngoko ke, uElazare noItamare babengababingeleli."
1Chronicles24:3 Wabahlula uDavide: yanguTsadoki koonyana bakaElazare, yanguAhimeleki koonyana bakaItamare, ngokwabakhonzi babo ekonzweni yabo."
1Chronicles24:4 Kwafunyanwa ukuba koonyana bakaElazare, amadoda abalaseleyo kunoonyana bakaItamare; baza ke ngoko bohlukana. Koonyana bakaElazare, iintloko zezindlu zooyise zaba lishumi elinantandathu; oonyana bakaItamare ngokwemizalwane yooyise, abasibhozo."
1Chronicles24:5 Babahlula ngamaqashiso, aba baba naba; ngokuba abathetheli bengcwele, nabaphathi bendlu kaThixo, yayikoonyana bakaElazare, nakoonyana bakaItamare."
1Chronicles24:6 uShemaya unyana kaNataniyeli, umbhali kubaLevi, wayibhala phambi kokumkani, nabathetheli, noTsadoki umbingeleli, noAhimeleki unyana ka-Abhiyatare, naphambi kweentloko zezindlu zooyise zababingeleli nezabaLevi elinye libe lelikaElazare, elinye libe lelikaItamare."
1Chronicles24:7 Iqashiso lokuqala laba noYoyaribhi, elesibini noYedaya;"
1Chronicles24:8 elesithathu noHarim, elesine noSeorim;"
1Chronicles24:9 elesihlanu noMalekiya, elesithandathu noMiyamin;"
1Chronicles24:10 owesixhenxe wazala uHakotsi, owesibhozo uAbhiya;"
1Chronicles24:11 owesithoba wazala uYeshuwa, oweshumi waba nguShekaniya;"
1Chronicles24:12 oweshumi elinanye wazala uEliyashibhi, oweshumi elinesibini uYakim;"
1Chronicles24:13 eleshumi elinesithathu noHupa, eleshumi elinesine noIzebhehabhi;"
1Chronicles24:14 eleshumi elinesihlanu noBhiliga, eleshumi elinesithandathu noImere;"
1Chronicles24:15 eleshumi elinesixhenxe noHesire, eleshumi elinesibhozo noAfese;"
1Chronicles24:16 eleshumi elinesithoba likaPetaya, elamashumi amabini kuHezekile;"
1Chronicles24:17 elamashumi omabini ananye noYagin, elamashumi omabini anesibini noGamule;"
1Chronicles24:18 elamashumi omabini anesithathu noDelaya, elamashumi omabini anesine kumaAsiya."
1Chronicles24:19 Lulo ke olo ulwalathiso lwenkonzo yabo yokungena endlwini kaNdikhoyo ngokwesiko labo phantsi koyise uAron, ngokomyalelo kaNdikhoyo uThixo kaSirayeli."
1Chronicles24:20 Ngabo aba oonyana bakaLevi: koonyana baka-Amram; koonyana bakaTsubhayeli; Yehdeja.
1Chronicles24:21 Ke uRehabhiya: koonyana bakaRehabhiya, owamazibulo nguYese."
1Chronicles24:22 KumaIshtar; koonyana bakaShelomoti; eYahati.
1Chronicles24:23 Oonyana bakaHebron nguYeriya inkulu, noAmariya owesibini, noYahaziyeli owesithathu, noYekamam owesine."
1Chronicles24:24 Koonyana bakaUziyeli yangu koonyana bakaMika nguShamire.
1Chronicles24:25 Umninawa kaMika nguYese; koonyana bakaYese; uZekariya.
1Chronicles24:26 Oonyana bakaMerari nguMagali noMushi; oonyana bakaYasiya; Beno.
1Chronicles24:27 Oonyana bakaMerari ngoYahaseya; uBeno noSoham noZakure noIbri.
1Chronicles24:28 KwaMageli kwaphuma uElazare, owayengenanyana."
1Chronicles24:29 Ke yena uKishe, unyana kaKishe nguYeramiyeli."
1Chronicles24:30 Oonyana bakaMushi; uMageli noEdere noYerimoti. Ngabo abo oonyana babaLevi, ngokwezindlu zooyise."
1Chronicles24:31 Nabo benza amaqashiso ngabazalwana babo, oonyana baka-Aron, phambi koKumkani uDavide noTsadoki noAhimeleki neentloko zeentsapho zababingeleli nezabaLevi, iintloko zooyise kubazalwana babo, bona bancinane."
1Chronicles25:1 Kananjalo uDavide nabathetheli bamaqela bazinyulela inkonzo yoonyana baka-Asafu, noHeman, noYedutun, beprofeta ngeehadi, nangeehadi, namacangci; inani labasebenzi ngokwenkonzo yabo laba."
1Chronicles25:2 Koonyana baka-Asafu yangu nguSakure, noYosefu, noNetaniya, noAsharela, oonyana baka-Asafu, bephethwe nguAsafu, obeprofeta ngomthetho wokumkani."
1Chronicles25:3 KuYedutun: oonyana bakaYedutun; uGedaliya, uSeri, uIsaya, uHashabhiya noMatitiya, abathandathu, ezandleni zikayise uYedutun, owayeprofeta ngencakuba ukudumisa nokudumisa uYehova."
1Chronicles25:4 KuHeman: oonyana bakaHeman; noBhukiya, noMataniya, noUziyeli, noZebhuweli, noYerimoti, noHananiya, noHanani, noEliyata, noGidaleti, noRomametisere, noYoshebheka, noMaloti, noHotire, noMahashiyoti;"
1Chronicles25:5 Bonke babengoonyana bakaHeman, imboni yokumkani, emazwini kaThixo oyinyaniso, ukuba aluphakamise uphondo. uThixo wamnika uHeman oonyana abalishumi elinabane, neentombi ezintathu."
1Chronicles25:6 Bonke babephantsi kwesandla sikayise ekuculeni endlwini kaYehova ngamacangci nangeehadi neehadi zenkonzo yendlu yoTHIXO oyinyaniso, ngokomyalelo kakumkani kuAsafu, uYedutun noYedutun. uHeman."
1Chronicles25:7 Inani labo kunye nabazalwana babo ababefundiswe ukuvuma iingoma zikaYehova, bonke abazizilumko, lalingamakhulu amabini anamashumi asibhozo anesibhozo."
1Chronicles25:8 Bawisa amaqashiso amadoda amakhulu, amadoda namakhulu, nabafundi bakhe."
1Chronicles25:9 Iqashiso lokuqala laphuma noAsafu, noYosefu: yena, nabazalwana bakhe, noonyana bakhe, baba lishumi elinababini;"
1Chronicles25:10 elesithathu noSakure: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:11 elesine noIsri: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:12 elesihlanu noNetaniya: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:13 elesithandathu noBhukiya: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:14 elesixhenxe noYetsarela: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:15 elesibhozo noIsaya: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:16 elesithoba noMataniya: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:17 eleshumi noShimehi: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:18 eleshumi elinanye noAzareli: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:19 eleshumi elinesibini noHashabhiya: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:20 eleshumi elinesithathu noTsubhayeli: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:21 eleshumi elinesine noMatitiya: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:22 eleshumi elinesihlanu noYeremoti: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:23 eleshumi elinesithandathu noHananiya: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:24 eleshumi elinesixhenxe noYoshebhekasa: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:25 eleshumi elinesibhozo noHanani: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:26 eleshumi elinesithoba noMaloti: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:27 elamashumi omabini noEliyata: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:28 elamashumi omabini analinye noHotire: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:29 elamashumi omabini anesibini noGidaleti: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:30 elamashumi omabini anesithathu noMahashiyoti: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini;
1Chronicles25:31 elamashumi omabini anesine noRomamtisere: yena noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe baba lishumi elinababini.
1Chronicles26:1 Ke amaqela abamasango: kumaKorogi nguMeshelemiya unyana kaKora, koonyana baka-Asafu."
1Chronicles26:2 Oonyana bakaMeshelemiya nguZekariya owamazibulo, noYedihayeli owesibini, noZebhadiya owesithathu, noYateniyeli owesine;"
1Chronicles26:3 owesihlanu uElam, owesithandathu nguYohanan, wesixhenxe uEliyonayi."
1Chronicles26:4 Oonyana bakaObhedi-edom nguShemaya inkulu, noYozabhadi owesibini, noYowaki owesithathu, noSakare owesine, noNataniyeli owesihlanu;"
1Chronicles26:5 owesithandathu nguAmiyeli, owesixhenxe nguIsakare, wesibhozo nguPeulthayi; ngokuba uThixo ebemsikelele."
1Chronicles26:6 uShemaya unyana wakhe naye wazala oonyana abalawula indlu kayise iphela, kuba babengamagorha anobukroti."
1Chronicles26:7 Oonyana bakaShemaya nguShemaya; uOtni noRefayeli no-Obhedi, uElisabadi, abazalwana bakhe babengamadoda anamandla, uElihu noSemágya."
1Chronicles26:8 Bonke aba yayingoonyana bakaObhedi-edom, bona noonyana babo nabazalwana babo, amadoda anamandla asebenza enkonzweni, ababengamashumi amathandathu anesibini kuObhedi-edom."
1Chronicles26:9 uMeshelemiya ubenoonyana abalishumi elinesibhozo nabazalwana, amadoda anobukroti."
1Chronicles26:10 uHosa, omnye koonyana bakaMerari, ubenoonyana; WayenguZimri, intloko, (ngokuba wayengengowamazibulo, nguyise wamenza ukumkani);"
1Chronicles26:11 owesibini nguHilekiya, owesithathu nguTebhaliya, owesine nguZekariya; bebonke oonyana bakaHosa nabazalwana babo baba lishumi elinabathathu."
1Chronicles26:12 Phakathi kwabo kwakukho amaqela abagcini-masango, phakathi kweenkokeli ezazinabalindi ukuze bakhonze endlwini kaYehova."
1Chronicles26:13 Bawisa amaqashiso, ethabathela komncinane esa koyena mkhulu, ngokwezindlu zooyise, isango ngalinye."
1Chronicles26:14 Iqashiso lasempumalanga laphuma noSelemiya; Bamwisela amaqashiso uZekariya unyana wakhe, umphakathi oqiqileyo; laphuma iqashiso lakhe langasentla;"
1Chronicles26:15 uObhedi-edom ngasemzantsi; nakoonyana bakhe indlu ka-Asupim.
1Chronicles26:16 Iqashiso likaSupime noHosa laphumela ngasentshona, nesango laseSalege, ngendlela enyukayo, ukuze kugadwe abalindi."
1Chronicles26:17 Ngasempumalanga babebathandathu abaLevi; ngasentla bebane imihla ngemihla; ngasezantsi bebane imihla ngemihla;
1Chronicles26:18 iParebhare ngasentshona, ezine zisendleleni, ezimbini ziseParbhare."
1Chronicles26:19 Ngawo lawo amaqela abagcini-masango phakathi koonyana bakaKore noonyana bakaMerari.
1Chronicles26:20 Phakathi kwabaLevi, uAhiya wayephethe ubuncwane bendlu yoTHIXO oyinyaniso nobuncwane bezinto ezingcwele."
1Chronicles26:21 Ke oonyana bakaLaedan; Oonyana bakaLaedan umGershon, iintloko zezindlu zooyise zikaLaedan umGershon nguYehiyeli."
1Chronicles26:22 Oonyana bakaYehiyeli nguAsheri; uSetam nomntakwabo uYoweli, ababephethe ubuncwane bendlu kaYehova."
1Chronicles26:23 Koonyana baka-Amram noIshre nguHebron noBhawusile;
1Chronicles26:24 uSebhuweli, unyana kaGershom, unyana kaMoses, ebengumgcini wobuncwane."
1Chronicles26:25 Abazalwana bakhe bakwaEliyezere; unyana wakhe uRehabhiya, uIsaya unyana wakhe, uYoram unyana wakhe, uZigri unyana wakhe, uShelomoti unyana wakhe."
1Chronicles26:26 Ukuba uShelomoti nabazalwana bakhe babephethe bonke ubuncwane bezinto ezingcwele ezazingcwaliswe nguKumkani uDavide neentloko zeentsapho zabo nabathetheli bamawaka nabamakhulu nabathetheli bamabhunga.
1Chronicles26:27 Ke amaxhoba athinjwa emfazweni, akhetha ukuyinyamekela indlu kaYehova."
1Chronicles26:28 Nazo zonke izinto abezingcwalisile uSamuweli imboni, noSawule unyana kaKishe, noAbhinere unyana kaNere, noYowabhi unyana kaTseruya; wonk’ ubani owayengcwalisa enye into wayephantsi kwesandla sikaShelomoti nabazalwana bakhe."
1Chronicles26:29 Koonyana bakaIshhariya, uKenaniya noonyana bakhe babe ngabathetheli nabagwebi bemicimbi yakwaSirayeli ngaphandle."
1Chronicles26:30 KumaHebhere, uHashabhiya nabazalwana bakhe, amadoda anobukroti, abaliwaka elinamakhulu asixhenxe, babenabaphathi phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli ngaphesheya kweYordan ngasentshona kuwo wonke umsebenzi kaYehova nasenkonzweni kakumkani."
1Chronicles26:31 KumaHebhere nguYeriya, intloko yamaHebhere ngokweenzala zooyise. Ngomnyaka wamashumi omane wobukumkani bukaDavide bafunwa, kwafunyanwa kubo amagorha eYazere yaseGiliyadi."
1Chronicles26:32 Abazalwana bakhe, amadoda akhaliphileyo, iintloko zeentsapho zabo babengamawaka amabini anamakhulu asixhenxe, awathi uKumkani uDavide wababeka phezu kwamaRubhen namaGadi nesiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase kuwo wonke umsebenzi kaThixo nawo wonke umsebenzi kaTHIXO oyinyaniso ikumkani."
1Chronicles27:1 Oonyana bakaSirayeli ngokwenani labo, abaziintloko zezindlu zooyise, nabathetheli bamawaka nabamakhulu, nabagcini bomkhosi, abalungiselela ukumkani ngokwamaqela onke, abahamba inyanga nenyanga ngenyanga, ngeenyanga yonke into ngonyaka, iqela ngalinye lalingamashumi amabini anesine amawaka."
1Chronicles27:2 Umphathi weqela lokuqala ngenyanga yokuqala yayinguYasobham unyana kaSabhediyeli, yaye kwisahlulo sakhe yayingamashumi amabini anesine amawaka."
1Chronicles27:3 Koonyana bakaPeretse wayengumphathi wabo bonke abaphathi bomkhosi ngenyanga yokuqala.
1Chronicles27:4 Ngenyanga yesibini uDodayi engumMowaki, intloko yebandla lakhe ibinguMikeloti; eqeleni lakhe ibingamashumi amabini anamané amawaka."
1Chronicles27:5 Umphathi wesithathu kweyesithathu inyanga yayinguBhenaya unyana kaYehoyada umbingeleli omkhulu; Kwiqela lakhe ibingamashumi amabini anesine amawaka.
1Chronicles27:6 Nguye lowo uBhenaya, eyindoda enkulu phakathi kwamashumi omathathu lawo, inamashumi mathathu; unyana wakhe nguAmisabhadi kwiqela lakhe."
1Chronicles27:7 Owesine ngenyanga yesine ibinguAsaheli umninawa kaYowabhi, inguZebhadiya unyana wakhe emva kwakhe; Kwiqela lakhe ibingamashumi amabini anesine amawaka."
1Chronicles27:8 Owesihlanu umthetheli ngenyanga yesihlanu ibinguSamhuti wakwaMoiserahi; eqeleni lakhe ibinamashumi amabini anesine amawaka.
1Chronicles27:9 Owesithandathu ngenyanga yesithandathu ibinguIra unyana kaIkeki waseMotekowa; Kwiqela lakhe ibingamashumi amabini anesine amawaka.
1Chronicles27:10 Umlawuli wesixhenxe wenyanga yesixhenxe yayinguHele wasePelone woonyana bakaEfrayim; Kwiqela lakhe ibingamashumi amabini anesine amawaka.
1Chronicles27:11 Owesibhozo kweyesibhozo inyanga yayinguSibhegayi uMoseti waseBhasharge; Kwiqela lakhe ibingamashumi amabini anesine amawaka.
1Chronicles27:12 Owesithoba ngenyanga yesithoba ibinguAbhiyezere waseManatoti wesizwe sakwaBhenjamin; Kwiqela lakhe ibingamashumi amabini anesine amawaka.
1Chronicles27:13 Oweshumi ngenyanga yeshumi ibinguMaharayi waseMonetofate waseBhaseregi; Kwiqela lakhe ibingamashumi amabini anesine amawaka.
1Chronicles27:14 Oweshumi elinamnye ngenyanga yeshumi elinanye ibinguBhenaya wasePiraton woonyana bakaEfrayim; Kwiqela lakhe ibingamashumi amabini anesine amawaka.
1Chronicles27:15 Oweshumi elinesibini ngenyanga yeshumi elinesibini ibinguHeledayi waseMenotefa waseOtheniyeli; Kwiqela lakhe ibingamashumi amabini anesine amawaka.
1Chronicles27:16 Kananjalo ezizweni zakwaSirayeli: ukumkani woonyana bakaRubhen nguEliyezere, unyana kaSigri; koonyana bakaSimon nguShefatiya unyana kaMaki;"
1Chronicles27:17 kubaLevi nguHashabhiya unyana kaKemuweli; koonyana baka-Aron yanguTsadoki;
1Chronicles27:18 KwaYuda, uElihu omnye wabantakwabo Davide; kuIsakare, inguOmri, unyana kaMikayeli;"
1Chronicles27:19 kwaZebhulon nguIshmaya unyana kaObhadiya; kwaNafetali nguYerimoti unyana ka-Aseriyeli;
1Chronicles27:20 koonyana bakaEfrayim nguHoseya unyana ka-Asaya; kwisiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase nguYoweli, unyana kaPedaya;"
1Chronicles27:21 kwisiqingatha sesizwe sakwaManase eGiliyadi nguIdo unyana kaZekariya; kwaBhenjamin nguYahaziyeli unyana ka-Abhinere;
1Chronicles27:22 kwaDan nguAzareli unyana kaYeroham; Ezi yayiziinkosana zezizwe zakwaSirayeli.
1Chronicles27:23 Kodwa uDavide akazange alibale inani labaneminyaka engamashumi amabini ubudala nangaphantsi, kuba uYehova wayethe uya kubandisa oonyana bakaSirayeli njengeenkwenkwezi zezulu."
1Chronicles27:24 uYowabhi unyana kaTseruya waqala ukubala, akagqiba, ngokuba umsindo waya koonyana bakaSirayeli ngenxa yabo; yaye elo nani alibhalwanga encwadini yembali yokumkani uDavide."
1Chronicles27:25 Ophethe ubuncwane bokumkani nguAsmavete unyana ka-Adiyeli; uJonatan unyana ka-Uziya wayephethe ubuncwane bamasimi, nemizi, nemizi, neenqaba."
1Chronicles27:26 Obephethe abenza umsebenzi wokulima umhlaba nguEzeri unyana kaKelubhi.
1Chronicles27:27 Obephethe izidiliya nguShimehi waseRama; ngenxa yokukhula kwemidiliya yokugcina iwayini yayinguSabdi Mosifi.
1Chronicles27:28 Owayephethe imithi yomnquma namakhiwane elizwe elisentlanjeni yayinguBhahali-hanan umGedere, noYowashe wayephethe iintsika zeoli."
1Chronicles27:29 Ophethe umhlambi odla eSharon nguSiterayi umSharon; yaye ophethe umhlambi owawusezintlanjeni yayinguShafati unyana ka-Adilayi.
1Chronicles27:30 Owayephethe iinkamela yayinguObhile umIshmayeli, ophethe iimazi zamaesile yayinguYediya umMeronoti."
1Chronicles27:31 Owayephethe umhlambi yayinguJasise Mohagere. Bonke babengabalawuli bezinto zikaKumkani uDavide.
1Chronicles27:32 uYonatan, umninawa kaDavide, ubengumphakathi, indoda esisilumko, umbhali; yaye uYehiyeli unyana kaHagmon wayenoonyana bokumkani."
1Chronicles27:33 uAhitofele, obengumaphakathi kakumkani, noHushayi umAram, ube lidlelane lokumkani."
1Chronicles27:34 Emva koAhitofele yayinguYehoyada unyana kaBhenaya noAbhiyatare; injengele yomkhosi wokumkani ibinguYowabhi.
1Chronicles28:1 uDavide wabamisa zonke iinkosana zakwaSirayeli, iinkosana zezizwe, nabathetheli bamaqela omkhosi olungiselela ukumkani, nabathetheli bamawaka, nabathetheli-makhulu, nabagcini bempahla yonke yokumkani, nobuncwane bakhe, neempahla zokumkani ubutyebi koonyana bakhe, nabathetheli, namagorha, namagorha onke, besa eYerusalem."
1Chronicles28:2 Waphakama ukumkani uDavide, wathi: “Ndiphulaphuleni, bazalwana bam nani bantu bam! isihlalo seenyawo zoThixo wethu, silungiselwe ukwakha."
1Chronicles28:3 Wathi uThixo kum, Akuyi kulakhela ndlu igama lam, ngokuba uligorha, uphalaze igazi;"
1Chronicles28:4 Ke uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, unyule mna phezu kwendlu yonke kabawo, ukuba ndibe ngukumkani wakwaSirayeli kude kuse ephakadeni, ngokuba wamnyula uYuda; nakwindlu kaYuda, kwindlu kabawo; yaye wayebathanda oonyana bakabawo kangangokuba ndazenza ukumkani kuSirayeli wonke."
1Chronicles28:5 Koonyana bam bonke, ekubeni undinike oonyana abaninzi uYehova, unyule uSolomon, unyana wam, ukuba ahlale etroneni yobukumkani bukaYehova, awalawule amaSirayeli."
1Chronicles28:6 Wathi kum, uSolomon, unyana wakho, nguye oya kulakhela indlu yam namasimi am; ngokuba ndizinyulele yena ukuba abe ngunyana wam, ndibe nguyise kuye mna;"
1Chronicles28:7 ndibuzinzise ubukumkani bakhe kude kuse ephakadeni, ukuba uthe wayimisa imimiselo yam nemiyalelo yam, njengoko kunjalo namhla."
1Chronicles28:8 Ke kaloku, phambi kwamehlo kaSirayeli wonke, yimani indibano kaYehova naphambi kwendlebe yoThixo wethu, niyiphengulule yonke imiyalelo kaYehova uThixo wenu, ukuze nilidle ilifa eli lizwe lihle’ nize niyisebenzise libe lilifa koonyana bakho emva kwakho ngonaphakade."
1Chronicles28:9 Ke wena, nyana wam Solomon, uze umazi uThixo kayihlo uze umkhonze ngentliziyo epheleleyo nangomoya wothando; ngokuba uYehova uyazicikida zonke iintliziyo, uziqonda zonke iingcamango; ukuba nithe namquqela, nofunyanwa; ukuba uthe watyeka kuye, wonilahla kuphele."
1Chronicles28:10 Lumka ngoku; ngokuba uYehova ukunyule ukuba wakhe indlu engcwele; yomelela, yenze."
1Chronicles28:11 uDavide wamnika uSolomon unyana wakhe umfanekiso wefreyimu, nowezindlu zakhe, nowobuncwane, nowamagumbi akhe aphezulu, nesamagumbi akhe angaphakathi, nesesigubungelo;"
1Chronicles28:12 nomzekelo wezinto zonke awayenazo emoyeni, oweentendelezo zendlu kaYehova nowamagumbi onke ajikelezileyo, nowobuncwane bendlu yoThixo oyinyaniso, nobuncwane bezipho ezingcwele;"
1Chronicles28:13 nesamaqela ababingeleli, nabaLevi, nawo wonke umsebenzi wenkonzo yendlu kaYehova, nawo wonke umsebenzi wenkonzo yendlu kaYehova."
1Chronicles28:14 Ubunzima begolide yeempahla zonke, beempahla zonke zeenkonzo ngeenkonzo; nesilivere yemisebenzi yonke yesilivere, ngokobunzima bayo bemisebenzi yeenkonzo zonke;"
1Chronicles28:15 Ubunzima beziphatho zezibane zegolide, nezibane zazo zegolide ngokobunzima besiphatho sezibane, nezibane zaso; neziphatho zesilivere ngokobunzima bazo, besiphatho sezibane, nezibane zaso, ngokomsebenzi wesiphatho ngasinye;"
1Chronicles28:16 negolide ngokobunzima bayo, beetafile zokucwangcisa izonka, ngokwetafile; nesilivere yeetafile zesilivere;"
1Chronicles28:17 nakwiimbombo zenyama, nezitya zokutshiza, neendebe, negolide ecocekileyo; neendebe zegolide ngokobunzima besitya ngasinye; nesilivere ngokobunzima bendebe ngendebe zesilivere;"
1Chronicles28:18 ubunzima begolide esulungekileyo yesibingelelo sesiqhumiso; nomfanekiso wenqwelo, yeekerubhi zegolide, ezolule amaphiko ayo, zisithelisa ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova."
1Chronicles28:19 Zonke ezi zinto, watsho uDavide, uYehova wandityhilela ngokubhaliweyo, ngesandla sakhe esiphezu kwam, yonke imisebenzi yalo mzekeliso."
1Chronicles28:20 Wathi uDavide kuSolomon unyana wakhe, Yomelela, ukhaliphe, wenze musa ukoyika, musa ukoyika, ngokuba uYehova, uYehova, uThixo wam, unawe; akayi kuyishiya, akayi kubuya umva, ade awugqibe wonke umsebenzi wenkonzo yendlu kaYehova."
1Chronicles28:21 Yabona, amaqela ababingeleli nabaLevi aba nawe kuyo yonke inkonzo yendlu yoThixo oyinyaniso; abathetheli nabantu bonke baya kuthobela wena ngokugqibeleleyo."
1Chronicles29:1 Wathi ukumkani uDavide kwibandla lonke, uSolomon unyana wam, owanyulwa nguThixo ukuba abe yedwa, usemtsha, uthambile; ke umsebenzi mkhulu, ngokuba le ndlu yobukumkani asiyiyo eyomntu, yeyabantu kaYehova uThixo."
1Chronicles29:2 Ke kaloku, ngamandla am onke ndiyilungisele indlu kaThixo wam igolide, ibe yeyezinto zegolide, nesilivere yezinto zesilivere, nobhedu lwezinto zobhedu, izinto zentsimbi, izinto zesinyithi, nezomthi kwizinto; ngamaplanga; amatye ebherilo, namatye axholiweyo, namatye abengezelayo, nawo onke amatye anemibala, nawo onke amatye anqabileyo, namatye emarmore, abe maninzi."
1Chronicles29:3 Kananjalo ngenxa yokuyithanda kwam indlu yoThixo wam, ndinempahla yam, igolide nesilivere, endiyinike indlu kaThixo wam, ngaphandle kwezinto zonke endizilungisele ingcwele indlu,"
1Chronicles29:4 amawaka amathathu eetalente zegolide yegolide yakwaOfire, amawaka asixhenxe eetalente zesilivere ehluziweyo yokugubungela iindonga zezindlu ngazo;"
1Chronicles29:5 Igolide yegolide, neyesilivere, neyemisebenzi yonke, yenziwe ngesandla seengcibi. Yaye ngubani okulungeleyo ukunikela inkonzo yakhe kuYehova namhlanje?"
1Chronicles29:6 Babingelela ke ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo iintloko zezindlu zooyise, neentloko zezizwe zakwaSirayeli, nabathetheli bamawaka nabamakhulu, nabaphathi bomsebenzi wokumkani;"
1Chronicles29:7 Wanikela amawaka amahlanu eetalente zegolide kwinkonzo yendlu kaThixo, needrarhma ezingamawaka alishumi, nesilivere yaziitalente ezingamawaka alishumi, nobhedu lwaziitalente ezingamawaka alishumi elinesibhozo, nesinyithi saziitalente ezingamawaka alikhulu."
1Chronicles29:8 Abo kwafunyanwa kubo amatye anqabileyo, bawanikela ebuncwaneni bendlu kaYehova ngesandla sikaYehiyeli Mogershone."
1Chronicles29:9 Bandula ke abantu baba nemihlali ngenxa yokuba babenikele ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo, ngenxa yokuba babenikela imibingelelo kuYehova ngokuvumayo ngentliziyo epheleleyo; NoKumkani uDavide wavuya ngovuyo olukhulu."
1Chronicles29:10 uDavide wambonga uYehova phambi kwebandla lonke, esithi, Mawubongwe wena, Yehova, Thixo kabawo wethu, uSirayeli, kude kuse ephakadeni."
1Chronicles29:11 Yehova, ubukhulu, namandla, nozuko, noloyiso, nobungangamsha bobakho; ngokuba yokwakho yonke into esemazulwini nesemhlabeni; bobakho ubukumkani, Yehova; uphakamile wayintloko yeento zonke."
1Chronicles29:12 Ubutyebi nozuko luvela kuwe, ulawula zonke izinto; kwaye esandleni sakho kukho amandla namandla; kwaye esandleni sakho kukwandisa nokomelela kubo bonke."
1Chronicles29:13 Ke kaloku, Thixo wethu, sinokubulela kuwe, sidumise igama lakho elibekekileyo."
1Chronicles29:14 Kodwa ndingubani na mna, yaye bangoobani na abantu bam, ukuba side senze imibingelelo ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo? ngokuba zonke izinto ziphuma kuwe, sakunika okukokwakho."
1Chronicles29:15 Ngokuba singabaphambukeli phambi kwakho, silundwendwe njengoobawo bethu bonke;"
1Chronicles29:16 Yehova Thixo wethu, yonke le nkuni siyilungisele ukulakhela indlu igama lakho elingcwele, ivela esandleni sakho, yeyakho yonke."
1Chronicles29:17 Ndiyazi, Thixo wam, ukuba uyayicikida intliziyo, ukholiswa yinyaniso. Mna ke, ekunyaniseni kwentliziyo yam, ndizincame ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo zonke ezi zinto; yaye ngoku ndibone ngovuyo abantu bakho abakhoyo apha, benikela imibingelelo ngenxa yakho."
1Chronicles29:18 Yehova, Thixo woobawo bethu, uAbraham, noIsake, noSirayeli, kugcine ngonaphakade kwinkumbulo yeengcinga zentliziyo yabantu bakho, uyibhekise kuwe intliziyo yabo;"
1Chronicles29:19 uSolomon unyana wam umnike intliziyo ephelelisekileyo, yokugcina imithetho yakho, nezilumkiso zakho, nemiyalelo yakho, ayenze yonke, alakhe ibhotwe endililungisileyo."
1Chronicles29:20 Wathi uDavide kwibandla lonke, Khanimbonge uYehova uThixo wenu. Lonke ibandla lamdumisa uYehova uThixo wooyise, laqubuda, laqubuda kuYehova nakukumkani."
1Chronicles29:21 Babingelela kuYehova baza banikela iminikelo etshiswayo kuYehova ngosuku olulandelayo, iinkunzi zeenkomo eziliwaka, iinkunzi zeegusha eziliwaka, neemvana eziliwaka, ndawonye neminikelo yazo ethululwayo, nemibingelelo emininzi, ngenxa yamaSirayeli onke."
1Chronicles29:22 Wadla wasela ngovuyo olukhulu phambi koYehova ngaloo mini. uSolomon unyana kaDavide bamenza ukumkani okwesibini, bamthambisa phambi koYehova ukuba abe yirhuluneli, noTsadoki abe ngumbingeleli."
1Chronicles29:23 Wahlala ke uSolomon etroneni kaYehova njengokumkani esikhundleni sikaDavide uyise, waqhubeka enempumelelo; yaye wonke uSirayeli wamva."
1Chronicles29:24 Bonke abathetheli, namagorha, noonyana bonke bokumkani uDavide, bazithoba kukumkani uSolomon."
1Chronicles29:25 uYehova waqhubeka emkhulisa uSolomon ngeyona ndlela ibalaseleyo emehlweni oonyana bakaSirayeli bonke waza wamnika uzuko lwasebukhosini olwalungazange lubekho kuye nawuphi na ukumkani wakwaSirayeli ngaphambili.
1Chronicles29:26 Ke uDavide, unyana kaYese, waye engukumkani wamaSirayeli onke."
1Chronicles29:27 Imihla awalawula ngayo amaSirayeli yaba yiminyaka emashumi mane; Waba neminyaka esixhenxe engukumkani eHebron, yaye walawula eYerusalem iminyaka emashumi mathathu anantathu."
1Chronicles29:28 Wafa eyindoda enkulu, ehambisekile ebudaleni, ehambisekile ebudaleni, enobutyebi nozuko; unyana wakhe uSolomon waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
1Chronicles29:29 Ke izinto zikakumkani uDavide, ezokuqala nezokugqibela, nanzo zibhaliwe encwadini kaSamuweli imboni, encwadini yomprofeti uNatan, encwadini kaGadi imboni;"
1Chronicles29:30 nalo lonke ulawulo namandla akhe namaxesha adluleyo phezu kwakhe naphezu koSirayeli naphezu kwezikumkani zonke zamazwe.
2Chronicles1:1 uSolomon, unyana kaDavide, wamomeleza ebukumkanini bakhe; uYehova uThixo wakhe waba naye, wamandisa kunene."
2Chronicles1:2 Wathetha uSolomon kumaSirayeli onke, kubathetheli bamawaka nabamakhulu, nakubagwebi, kwizikhulu zonke zamaSirayeli onke, kwiintloko zezindlu zooyise."
2Chronicles1:3 Baya ke ooSolomon nebandla lonke esigangeni esibe siseGibheyon; ngenxa yokuba kwakukho intente yokuhlangana kaThixo eyayisenziwa nguMoses umkhonzi kaYehova entlango.
2Chronicles1:4 Kodwa uDavide wayalela ukuba ityeya kaThixo inyuswe eKiriyati-yarim iziswe kwindawo uDavide awayeyilungiselele yona, ngenxa yokuba wayemise intente eYerusalem."
2Chronicles1:5 Wasibeka isibingelelo sobhedu, awasenzayo uBhetsaliyeli unyana kaUri, unyana kaHuri, phambi komnquba kaYehova; Wayifuna ke uSolomon nebandla elo."
2Chronicles1:6 uSolomon wenyuka waya esibingelelweni sobhedu phambi koYehova esasisententeni yokuhlangana waza wenza iminikelo etshiswayo eliwaka phezu kwaso.
2Chronicles1:7 uThixo wabonakala kuSolomon ngobo busuku, wathi kuye, Cela into, ndikuphe."
2Chronicles1:8 Wathi uSolomon kuThixo, Inceba yakho wena wenze kuDavide ubawo, wandenza ukumkani esikhundleni sakhe."
2Chronicles1:9 Ke kaloku, Yehova Thixo, lizalise idinga owalenza kubawo uDavide, kuba undenze ukumkani wohlanga olukhulu njengothuli lomhlaba."
2Chronicles1:10 Ke kaloku ndinike ubulumko nokwazi, ukuze ndiphume ndingene phambi kwaba bantu; ngokuba ngubani na ongalugwebayo olu hlanga lwakho lukhulu?"
2Chronicles1:11 Wathi uThixo kuSolomon, Ngenxa enokuba loo nto ibisentliziyweni yakho, akwacela ubutyebi, nendyebo, nozuko, nobomi beentshaba zakho, akwathandaza imihla emininzi; ke ucele ubulumko bakho nokwazi kwakho, ukuze ube nako ukubalawula abantu bam endikumisele njengokumkani wabo."
2Chronicles1:12 Unikwe ubulumko nokwazi; yaye ngokuqinisekileyo ndiya kukunika ubutyebi nobutyebi nozuko olungazange lubekho kookumkani ababengaphambi kwakho, yaye akuyi kubakho namnye emva kwakho."
2Chronicles1:13 Wandula ke uSolomon walushiya uhambo lwakhe ukuya kwindawo ephakamileyo eyayiseGibheyon waya eYerusalem, esuka phambi kwentente yokuhlangana, waza waqalisa ukulawula uSirayeli."
2Chronicles1:14 uSolomon wahlanganisa iinqwelo zokulwa namahashe akhwelwayo, waba newaka elinamakhulu amane eenqwelo zokulwa, namawaka alishumi elinamabini amahashe akhwelwayo;"
2Chronicles1:15 uYehova wayenza yaninzi isilivere negolide njengamatye eYerusalem, nemisedare wayenza yanjengemithombe entlango, ukuba mininzi."
2Chronicles1:16 uSolomon ubenamahashe aseYiputa, nelinen emhlophe; Abarhwebi bokumkani bamkela ilinen emhlophe ngexabiso."
2Chronicles1:17 Benyuka ke, bathabatha inqwelo yokulwa eYiputa ngamakhulu amathandathu eeshekele zesilivere, nehashe ngekhulu elinamanci mahlanu; ngoko banikela ngamahashe kubo bonke ookumkani bamaHiti nookumkani bama-Aram ngesandla sabo."
2Chronicles2:1 uSolomon wacinga ukulakhela indlu igama likaYehova, nokubakhela indlu ubukumkani bakhe."
2Chronicles2:2 uSolomon wabeka amadoda angamashumi amathandathu amawaka ukuba athwale imithwalo, amashumi asibhozo amawaka ukuze agawule ezintabeni, amawaka amathathu anamakhulu amathandathu ukuba abe ngabalindi."
2Chronicles2:3 Wathumela uSolomon kuHiram ukumkani waseTire, wathi, Njengoko wenza ngako kuDavide ubawo, wathumela kuye imisedare yokuzakhela indlu yokuba ahlale kuyo, wenjenjalo nakum."
2Chronicles2:4 Yabona, ndilakhela indlu igama likaYehova uThixo wam, ukuba ndingcwaliswe kuye, ndiqhumisele phambi kwakhe, ndiqhumisele ngezonka ezicwangcisiweyo ngamaxesha onke, namadini anyukayo akusasa nangokuhlwa, kusasa nangokuhlwa. Iisabatha nakwinyanga entsha ucinga ntoni? emithendelekweni kaYehova uThixo wethu. Lowo ngummiselo ongunaphakade kuSirayeli."
2Chronicles2:5 Indlu endiyakhayo inkulu, kuba uThixo wethu mkhulu koothixo bonke."
2Chronicles2:6 Ngubani na ongamakhela indlu, ekubeni izulu lawo amazulu alingana naye? Ndingubani na ke mna, ukuba ndimakhele indlu, ingekukuba itshise phambi kobuso bakhe?"
2Chronicles2:7 Ndithumele ke indoda elumkileyo, isebenze ngegolide, nesilivere, nobhedu, nesinyithi, nemfusa, nebomvu, nemfusa, ekwaziyo ukungcwaba ndawonye nezilumko ezinam ezweni lakwaYuda neYerusalem, awayilungisayo uDavide ubawo."
2Chronicles2:8 Ndithumele nemisedare, nemisipres, nemialgumi, evela eLebhanon; ngokuba ndiyazi ukuba abakhonzi bakho banako ukugawula imithi eLebhanon; yabona, abakhonzi bam baya kuba nabakhonzi bakho;"
2Chronicles2:9 Wandilungisela nemithi emininzi, ngokuba indlu endiyakhayo inkulu ngokumangalisayo."
2Chronicles2:10 Yabona, ndibanika abakhonzi bakho abagawula iinkuni iitoni ezingamawaka angamashumi amabini engqolowa, namashumi amabini amawaka eebhari zerhasi, namashumi amabini amawaka eebhare zewayini, namashumi amabini amawaka emiphanda yeoli."
2Chronicles2:11 Waphendula uHiram ukumkani waseTire, ngencwadi abeyithumele kuSolomon, wathi, uYehova ubathande abantu bakhe, ubamisele ukumkani wabo."
2Chronicles2:12 uHuram wathi, Makabongwe uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, owenza izulu nehlabathi, omnike ukumkani uDavide unyana osisilumko, oqiqayo, onengqondo, omakhelayo uYehova indlu, umakhiyo ubukumkani bakhe."
2Chronicles2:13 Kwaye ngoku, ndithumele indoda esisilumko, enengqondo, ivela kubawo uHuram;"
2Chronicles2:14 Yena waye engunyana wenkazana yasezintombini zakwaDan, uyise engumTire, ekwazi ukusebenza ngegolide, nesilivere, nobhedu, nesinyithi, nelitye, nomthi, nemfusa nemfusa, nantsi ke le nto entle nomfusa; niqingqe amangcwaba ezinto zonke, niziqondele zonke icebo, aya kulinikwa, nezilumko zenu, neengcinga zokumkani wam uDavide, uyihlo."
2Chronicles2:15 Makathumele ke ingqolowa, nerhasi, neoli, newayini, eyathetha ngazo inkosi yam kubakhonzi bayo;"
2Chronicles2:16 Sogawula imithi eLebhanon, njengoko uthanda ngako; uze uyinyuse uyise eYerusalem."
2Chronicles2:17 uSolomon wababala bonke oonyana bolunye uhlanga, ababesezweni lakwaSirayeli, ngokwenani awababalayo uDavide uyise; kwaye kwafunyanwa ikhulu elinamashumi amahlanu anesithathu samawaka anamakhulu amathandathu."
2Chronicles2:18 Wamisa amashumi amathandathu amawaka kubo ukuba abe ngabathwali bemithwalo, namashumi asibhozo amawaka ukuba abe ngabalukileyo entabeni, namawaka amathathu anamakhulu amathandathu abalindi ukuba banyule umsebenzi wabantu."
2Chronicles3:1 uSolomon waqala ukuyakha indlu kaYehova eYerusalem, entabeni yeMoriya, apho uYehova wazityhilayo kuDavide uyise, endaweni awayilungisayo uDavide, esandeni sikaOrnan umYebhusi."
2Chronicles3:2 Waqala ukwakha ngenyanga yesibini, ngowesibini umhla, ngomnyaka wesine wobukumkani bakhe."
2Chronicles3:3 Zizo ezi ke izinto awawisa umthetho ngazo uSolomon ukuba ayakhe indlu kaThixo; Ubude beekubhite ngokomlinganiso wokuqala baba ziikubhite ezimashumi mathandathu, ububanzi baba ziikubhite ezimashumi mabini."
2Chronicles3:4 Ivaranda, ebiphambi kwendlu, bebungangobubanzi bendlu, bebuziikubhite ezimashumi mabini, nokuphakama kwayo kube zilikhulu elinamanci mabini; wayaleka ngaphakathi ngegolide ecocekileyo."
2Chronicles3:5 Indlu enkulu wayithambisa ngemisipres, wayaleka ngegolide engcwengiweyo, waza wabeka kuyo amasundu nemixokelelwane."
2Chronicles3:6 Wayivathisa indlu ngamatye anqabileyo ukuyihombisa, negolide leyo ibiyigolide yaseParvayim."
2Chronicles3:7 Wayaleka indlu, imiqadi, neeplanga zayo, neendonga zayo, neengcango zayo, ngegolide; zakrolwa iikerubhi ezindongeni."
2Chronicles3:8 Wayakha ke indlu yengcwele kangcwele; Wayaleka amakhulu amathandathu eetalente zegolide ecocekileyo.
2Chronicles3:9 Ubunzima bezikhonkwane bebuziishekele ezimashumi mahlanu zegolide. Amagumbi aphezulu wawaleka ngegolide.
2Chronicles3:10 Wenza kwengcwele kangcwele iikerubhi ezimbini ezikroliweyo, wazaleka ngegolide."
2Chronicles3:11 Amaphiko eekerubhi ubude bawo bebuziikubhite ezimashumi mabini; nelinye iphiko beliziikubhite ezintlanu, ukuya ephikweni lenye ikerubhi."
2Chronicles3:12 Nelinye iphiko lenye ikerubhi beliziikubhite ezintlanu, lenyuka laya eludongeni lwendlu; nelinye iphiko beliziikubhite ezintlanu, ukuya kuhlangana nephiko lenye ikerubhi."
2Chronicles3:13 Amaphiko ezo kerubhi abeziikubhite ezimashumi mabini;
2Chronicles3:14 Wenza umkhusane ngemisonto emsi nemfusa nebomvu, nelinen ecikizekileyo, wenza kuwo iikerubhi."
2Chronicles3:15 Wenza iintsika zambini phambi kwendlu, zaziikubhite ezimashumi mathathu anantlanu ukuphakama kwazo, nentloko ephezu kwazo zonke iikubhite ezintlanu."
2Chronicles3:16 Wenza imixokelelwane efana negumbi elingaphakathi, wayibeka emantloko eentsika; wenza iziqhushumbisi ezilikhulu, wazibeka ematyaleni."
2Chronicles3:17 Wazimisa iintsika phambi kwetempile, enye yangasekunene, enye yangasekhohlo; igama leyasekunene nguYagin, negama leyasekhohlo nguBhohazi."
2Chronicles4:1 Wenza nesibingelelo sobhedu: baziikubhite ezimashumi mabini ubude baso, baziikubhite ezimashumi mabini ububanzi baso, kwaziikubhite ezilishumi ukuphakama kwaso."
2Chronicles4:2 Wenza ulwandle olutyhidiweyo: lwaziikubhite ezilishumi, ukusuka kolunye udini lwesa kolunye, kuyiwe kolunye, oluyinqila ngeenxa zonke, lwaziikubhite ezintlanu ukuphakama kwawo; yaye umtya oziikubhite ezimashumi mathathu wawujikelezile ngeenxa zonke."
2Chronicles4:3 Ngaphantsi kwayo yayiyimbonakalo yenkunzi yenkomo, ngeenxa zonke, eyikubhite enye, elujikelezile ulwandle. Kwakukho imiqolo emibini yeenkomo ezenziwe ngodongwe."
2Chronicles4:4 Wema phezu kweenkomo ezilishumi elinambini: ezintathu zibheke entla, ezintathu zibheke entshonalanga, ezintathu zibheke ezantsi, ezintathu zibheke empumalanga; kwaye ulwandle lwaba phezu kwabo, namaxhama abo onke engaphakathi."
2Chronicles4:5 Ubungqingqwa balo bebungangobubanzi besandla; udini lwalo belwenziwe lwanjengodini lwendebe, lwaneentyantyambo zeenyibiba; bathabatha, bagcina amawaka amathathu eeemele."
2Chronicles4:6 Wenza nezitya zalishumi, wabeka ezintlanu ngasekunene, zantlanu ngasekhohlo, zokuhlambela kuzo ke ulwandle lwaba lolwababingeleli bokuhlamba."
2Chronicles4:7 Wenza iziphatho zezibane zegolide zalishumi, ukumila kwazo, wazibeka etempileni, ezintlanu ngasekunene, ezihlanu ngasekhohlo."
2Chronicles4:8 Wenza neetafile zalishumi, wazibeka etempileni, ezintlanu ngasekunene, zantlanu ngasekhohlo. Wenza ikhulu leempahla zegolide."
2Chronicles4:9 Wenza nentendelezo yababingeleli, nentendelezo enkulu, neengcango zentendelezo; wazigubungela iingcango zazo ngobhedu."
2Chronicles4:10 Walubeka ulwandle ngecala lasekunene ngecala lasempumalanga, olujonge ezantsi."
2Chronicles4:11 uHuram wenza iimbiza, nemihlakulwana, nezitya zokutshiza. Wawugqiba ke uHuram umsebenzi abewenzela indlu kaThixo kakumkani uSolomon;"
2Chronicles4:12 Neentsika zombini, neentsika, neentloko ezibe ziphezu kweentsika zombini, nezithsaba zombini zokugubungela iintsika zombini eziphezu kweentsika ezo;"
2Chronicles4:13 neziqhushumbisi ezingamakhulu amane emaweni amabini; Kwisithsaba ngasinye kukho imikrozo emibini yokugubungela iingqukuva ezibe zisezintsikeni zombini.
2Chronicles4:14 Wenza neenqwelo zokuhlambela, wenza nezitya zokuhlambela phezu kweenqwelo;"
2Chronicles4:15 Ulwandle lwalunye, neenkomo ezilishumi elinambini ngaphantsi kwalo."
2Chronicles4:16 Neembiza, nemihlakulwana, namahaki, nazo zonke iimpahla zazo, uHuram uyise wazenzela ukumkani uSolomon, zizezendlu kaYehova, ngobhedu olukhazimlisiweyo."
2Chronicles4:17 uYehova wazigalela entlango yaseYordan emhlabeni wodongwe phakathi kweSukoti neSeredata.
2Chronicles4:18 uSolomon wazenza zininzi kakhulu zonke ezi zitya; ngokuba ubunzima bobhedu olo babungaziwa.
2Chronicles4:19 uSolomon wazenza zonke iimpahla zendlu yoThixo oyinyaniso, nesibingelelo segolide neetafile ekwakubekwe kuzo izonka zokubonisa;"
2Chronicles4:20 Neziphatho zezibane, nezibane zazo, ziqhunyiswe ngokwesiko legolide ecocekileyo phambi kwendlu engaphakathi;"
2Chronicles4:21 Iintyatyambo, izibane, nemigangatho, izezegolide, ecocekileyo;"
2Chronicles4:22 nezibane, nezitya zokutshiza, neenkamba, neengcedevu, zegolide ecocekileyo; Umnyango wendlu, neengcango ezingaphakathi zengcwele kangcwele, neengcango zendlu yetempile, izezegolide."
2Chronicles5:1 Wagqitywa ke wonke umsebenzi awawenzela indlu kaYehova uSolomon; uSolomon wazibeka zonke izinto, abezingcwalisile uDavide uyise; nesilivere, negolide, neempahla zonke, wazibeka phantsi kobuncwane bendlu kaThixo."
2Chronicles5:2 Wawahlanganisa ke uSolomon eYerusalem amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, neentloko zonke zezizwe, iintloko zezindlu zoonyana bakaSirayeli, neentloko zonke zezizwe zoonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuba bayikhuphe eYerusalem ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova, emzini kaDavide. iZiyon."
2Chronicles5:3 Abuthelana ke onke amadoda akwaSirayeli emthendelekweni wokumkani wenyanga yesixhenxe.
2Chronicles5:4 Eza ke onke amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli; bayithwala abaLevi ityeya.
2Chronicles5:5 Bandula ke bayinyusa ityeya nentente yokuhlangana nazo zonke iimpahla ezingcwele ezazisententeni, babanyusa ababingeleli nabaLevi."
2Chronicles5:6 uKumkani uSolomon nebandla lonke likaSirayeli elalihlanganisene kuye phambi kweTyeya babingelela ngezimvu neenkomo ezazingenakulinganiswa okanye zibalwe ngenxa yenani.
2Chronicles5:7 Bayizisa ababingeleli ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova endaweni yayo, endlwini engaphakathi endlwini, kwiNgcwele kaNgcwele, phantsi kwamaphiko eekherubhi;"
2Chronicles5:8 ngokuba iikerubhi zaye ziwolule amaphiko phezu kwendawo yetyeya, iikerubhi zayisithelisa ityeya nezibonda zayo ngaphezulu."
2Chronicles5:9 Bayikhupha ke imithwalo yetyeya, ukubonakala kwempahla yetyeya phambi kwegumbi elingaphakathi; kodwa zazingabonakali ngaphandle. Yaye isekho nanamhla."
2Chronicles5:10 Kwakungekho nto etyeyeni, ngaphandle kwamacwecwe amabini amatye awayewabeke kuyo uMoses xa wayeseHorebhe, xa uYehova wenza umnqophiso noonyana bakaSirayeli ekuphumeni kwabo eYiputa."
2Chronicles5:11 Ekuphumeni kwababingeleli engcweleni, ngokuba bonke ababingeleli abafumanekayo babengcwalisiwe, àbalindanga ngelo xesha."
2Chronicles5:12 Ke abaLevi ababeziimvumi, ooAsafu, noHeman, noYedutun, noonyana babo, nabazalwana babo, bambethe ilinen emhlophe, benamacangci, nemirhubhe, nemirhubhe, bemi ngasempumalanga esibingelelweni, benengubo enye ababingeleli abalikhulu elinamashumi amabini bavuthela amaxilongo."
2Chronicles5:13 Kwathi ke xa abaxilongo neemvumi baba nye, bavakalisa ngazwi-nye, bedumisa, bedumisa uYehova; Bathe bakuphakamisa ilizwi ngamaxilongo, nangamacangci, nangeempahla zabo, bamdumisa uYehova, besithi, Elungile, ewe; ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe, ekuzalisweni lilifu indlu kaYehova;"
2Chronicles5:14 Ababingeleli ababa nakuma balungiselele ngenxa yelifu, ngokuba ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova bayizalisa indlu kaThixo."
2Chronicles6:1 Wathi uSolomon, uYehova wathi, niya kuhlala ebumnyameni."
2Chronicles6:2 Mna ke ndikwakhele indlu, nesakhiwo, kude kuse ephakadeni;"
2Chronicles6:3 Wee guququ ukumkani ngobuso, walisikelela lonke ibandla lakwaSirayeli; lonke ibandla lakwaSirayeli lema."
2Chronicles6:4 Wathi, Makabongwe uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, okwenzileyo oko ngesandla sakhe, awakuthetha ngomlomo wakhe kuDavide ubawo, esithi,"
2Chronicles6:5 Ukususela kwimini endabakhuphayo ngayo abantu bam ezweni laseYiputa, andinyulanga nasinye isixeko kuzo zonke izizwe zakwaSirayeli ukuze ndimakhele indlu igama lam; kwaye andinyulanga mntu ukuba abe yinganga yabantu bam amaSirayeli;"
2Chronicles6:6 ndanyula iYerusalem, ukuba igama lam libe khona; ndanyula uDavide ukuba abe yingànga yabantu bam amaSirayeli."
2Chronicles6:7 Kwaye kukho entliziyweni kaDavide ubawo ukuthi alakhele indlu igama likaYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli."
2Chronicles6:8 Wathi uYehova kuDavide ubawo, Ngenxa enokuba kwakukho entliziyweni yakho ukuthi ulakhele indlu igama lam, walungisa, ngokuba bekusentliziyweni yakho oko."
2Chronicles6:9 Ke wena akuwenzi umzi; kodwa unyana wakho uya kuphuma esinqeni sakho, yena uya kulakhela indlu igama lam."
2Chronicles6:10 Ngoko uYehova walizalisekisa ilizwi lakhe awalithethayo, ngenxa yokuba ndema egumbini likabawo uDavide ndaza ndahlala etroneni kaSirayeli, kanye njengoko wayethethile uYehova, ndaza ndalakhela indlu igama likaYehova uThixo kaSirayeli."
2Chronicles6:11 Ndayibeka khona ityeya, engumnqophiso kaYehova, awawenzayo noonyana bakaSirayeli."
2Chronicles6:12 Wema phambi kwesibingelelo sikaYehova phambi kwebandla lonke lakwaSirayeli, wazolula izandla zakhe."
2Chronicles6:13 uSolomon wenza ikhuselo lobhedu: ubude balo baba ziikubhite ezintlanu, ububanzi balo baba ziikubhite ezintlanu, nokuphakama kwalo kwaba ziikubhite ezintathu, walimisa esazulwini sentendelezo; wema phezu kwayo, waguqa ngamadolo phambi kwebandla lonke kaSirayeli, wazolulela ezulwini izandla zakhe;"
2Chronicles6:14 wathi, Yehova, Thixo kaSirayeli, akukho Thixo unjengawe emazulwini nasehlabathini; uyawugcina umnqophiso, unenceba kubakhonzi bakho abahamba kuwe ngentliziyo yabo yonke;"
2Chronicles6:15 wena umgcineleyo umkhonzi wakho uDavide, oko wakuthethayo kuye; wathetha ngomlomo wakho, wakuzalisa ngesandla sakho, njengoko kunjalo namhla."
2Chronicles6:16 Kaloku, Yehova, Thixo kaSirayeli, umqinisele umkhonzi wakho uDavide ubawo, oko wakuthethayo kuye, wathi, Emehlweni am akuyi mfuneko yakuhlala mntu etroneni yakwaSirayeli; noko ke ukuze bagqale oonyana benu endleleni yabo yokuhamba ngomyalelo wam, njengoko nihambe ngako phambi kwam."
2Chronicles6:17 Kaloku, Yehova, Thixo kaSirayeli, malizalise ilizwi lakho owalithethayo kumkhonzi wakho uDavide."
2Chronicles6:18 Kodwa ngaba ngokwenene uThixo uya kuhlala nabantu emhlabeni? Yabonani, amazulu, nezulu lawo amazulu, alilingani; iyakuba njani na le ndlu ndiyakhileyo?"
2Chronicles6:19 Ke kaloku, Yehova Thixo wam, wuphulaphule umthandazo womkhonzi wakho nomthandazo wakhe, ukuze umamele isikhalo nomthandazo awuthandazayo umkhonzi wakho phambi kwakho;"
2Chronicles6:20 ukuze amehlo akho avuleke imini nobusuku ngokuphathelele le ndlu, kwindawo othe uya kulimisa kuyo igama lakho; uphulaphule umthandazo athandaza ngawo umkhonzi wakho kule ndawo."
2Chronicles6:21 Phulaphula izicelo zomkhonzi wakho, nezicelo zabantu bakho amaSirayeli, abaya kuzicela kule ndawo; yiva umkhosi wakho, wena usemazulwini; xa uthe weva, xolela;"
2Chronicles6:22 Xa athe ubani wona ummelwane wakhe, wafunga kuye, wamfungela, kwaza kwafika isifungo phambi kwesibingelelo sakho kule ndlu;"
2Chronicles6:23 yivani ke emazulwini, nenze, nigwebe kubakhonzi benu, nimbuyise ongendawo, niyibuyisele indlela yakhe entlokweni yakhe; ngokugwebela ilungisa, umnike ubulungisa bakhe."
2Chronicles6:24 Ukuba bathe abantu bakho amaSirayeli bakhweletela iintshaba zabo, kuba bekonile; abaya kubuya bedumisa igama lakho, bethandaza, bethandaza kuwe bekule ndlu;"
2Chronicles6:25 Ke kaloku yiva usemazulwini, usixolele isono sabantu bakho amaSirayeli, ubabuyisele kwilizwe owabanika lona nookhokho babo."
2Chronicles6:26 Lakuvaleka izulu, akwabakho mvula, ngokuba bakona; kwaye ukuba bayathandaza kule ndawo baze balivume igama lakho kwaye baguquke kwisono sabo ukuba uyabacinezela;"
2Chronicles6:27 yiva ke wena emazulwini, usixolele isono sabakhonzi bakho, nabantu bakho amaSirayeli, ngokuba ubafundise indlela elungileyo abaya kuhamba ngayo; uze unise imvula ezweni lakho olinike abantu bakho njengelifa."
2Chronicles6:28 Ukuba kuthe kwakho indlala elizweni, xa kuthe kwakho isibetho, xa kuthe kwakho umlilo okanye ukungunda, iinkumbi okanye iinkumbi; Xa iintshaba zawo ziwarhawula emizini yawo; nayiphi na intlungu okanye ukufa okunokuthi kwenzeke:"
2Chronicles6:29 Nakuphi na ukuthandaza nokuthandaza kuye nawuphi na umntu, nokuba ngabantu bakho bonke amaSirayeli, xa baya kwazi elowo intlungu yakhe nentlungu yakhe, aze azolule izandla zakhe endlwini;"
2Chronicles6:30 Ke kaloku yiva usemazulwini, kwindawo ohlala kuyo, uxolele yaye ubuyekeze wonk’ ubani ngokweendlela zakhe zonke, ontliziyo ikwaziyo wena; Ngokuba uyazazi iintliziyo zoonyana babantu;"
2Chronicles6:31 ukuze bakoyike, bahambe ngeendlela zakho, yonke imihla yobomi babo, emhlabeni owawunika oobawo."
2Chronicles6:32 Ngaphezu koko, ngokuphathelele owasemzini ongengowesizwe sakho amaSirayeli, kodwa oweza evela kwilizwe elikude ngenxa yegama lakho elikhulu nangesandla sakho esomeleleyo nangesandla sakho esithe ngqo; beza kuthandaza kule ndlu;"
2Chronicles6:33 Yivani ngoko usemazulwini, apho uhlala khona, wenze njengoko wabiza ngako owasemzini; ukuze zonke iintlanga zehlabathi zilazi igama lakho, zikoyike, njengabantu bakho amaSirayeli, ukuze zazi ukuba lisahlala likhankanywa igama lakho phezu kwale ndlu ndiyakhileyo."
2Chronicles6:34 Xa bathe abantu bakho balwa neentshaba zabo ngendlela obathuma kuyo, bathandaza kuwe bebhekisa kulo mzi uwunyulileyo, nakule ndlu ndiyakhele igama lakho;"
2Chronicles6:35 Yiva usemazulwini umthandazo wabo nokutarhuzisa kwabo, ubamele endaweni yabo."
2Chronicles6:36 Ukuba bathe bakona kuwe (ngenxa yokuba kungekho bani ungoniyo), wacaphuka waza wabanikela esandleni seentshaba zabo, babathimba babasa kwilizwe elikude okanye elikufuphi;"
2Chronicles6:37 Bakukhumbula oko ezweni ababethinjelwe kulo, baguquka, bathandaza kuwe ezweni lokuthinjwa kwabo, besithi, Sihlulekile, senze ububi, senze ububi;"
2Chronicles6:38 ukuba babuyela kuwe ngentliziyo yabo yonke, nangomphefumlo wabo wonke, bevela kwelo zwe bathinjelwe kulo, bathandaza bebhekisa ezweni labo owalinika ooyise, nakulo umzi owawunika ooyise; ndiyinyule yona, nendlu endayakhela igama lakho;"
2Chronicles6:39 Ke kaloku yiva usemazulwini, ewe, kwindawo ohlala kuyo, umthandazo wabo nezibongozo zabo, uze ubalinde, ubaxolele abantu bakho abakonileyo."
2Chronicles6:40 Kaloku, Thixo wam, makavuleke amehlo akho, iindlebe zakho ziwuphulaphule umthandazo owenziwa kule ndawo."
2Chronicles6:41 Kaloku, Yehova Thixo, yima endaweni yokuphumla kwakho, wena netyeya yamandla akho; ababingeleli bakho, Yehova, Thixo, mabambathe usindiso, badle okulungileyo abo ubathandayo."
2Chronicles6:42 Yehova Thixo, musa ukutyeka ebusweni bomthanjiswa wakho; khumbula inceba kaDavide, umkhonzi wakho."
2Chronicles7:1 Akugqiba uSolomon ukuthandaza, umlilo welula ezulwini, walitshisa idini elinyukayo nemibingelelo; ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova bayizalisa indlu."
2Chronicles7:2 Ababingeleli ababa nakungena endlwini kaYehova, ngokuba ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova babuzele endlwini kaYehova."
2Chronicles7:3 Bakubona bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli ukuhla komlilo, nobuqaqawuli bukaYehova buphezu kwendlu, baqubuda emhlabeni, baguqa, badumisa uYehova, besithi, Elungile, ewe, uYehova ulungile. Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
2Chronicles7:4 Ukumkani nabantu bonke babingelela kuYehova.
2Chronicles7:5 Wabingelela ukumkani uSolomon amashumi amabini anesibini amawaka eenkomo, ikhulu elinamanci amabini lamawaka empalula emfutshane; Bayingcwalisa ke indlu kaThixo ukumkani nabantu bonke."
2Chronicles7:6 Ababingeleli babemi ezihlalweni zabo, nabaLevi benezixhobo zikaYehova awazenzayo uKumkani uDavide ukuba badumise uYehova, ngenxa yokuba ububele bakhe bothando bulapho de kwaba lixesha elingenammiselo kaDavide wayidumisa inkonzo yabo; ababingeleli bavuthela ngezigodlo phambi kwabo, ema onke amaSirayeli."
2Chronicles7:7 uSolomon wawungcwalisa umphakathi wentendelezo ephambi kwendlu kaYehova; kuba kulapho wazisa khona iminikelo etshiswayo namanqatha emibingelelo yombulelo, ngenxa yokuba isibingelelo sobhedu awasenzayo uSolomon sasingenako ukuwufumana umbingelelo otshiswayo, umnikelo otshiswayo namanqatha."
2Chronicles7:8 Ngelo xesha uSolomon wenza itheko iintsuku ezisixhenxe, nawo onke amaSirayeli awayekunye naye, njengebandla elikhulu kakhulu, ukususela ekungeneni kweHamati ukusa kuMlambo waseYiputa."
2Chronicles7:9 Benza ngomhla wesibhozo umthendeleko; ukungcwaliswa kwesibingelelo bakwenza iintsuku zasixhenxe, nomthendeleko iintsuku zasixhenxe."
2Chronicles7:10 Ngosuku lwamashumi amabini anesithathu lwenyanga yesixhenxe wathi ebantwini mabahambe baye ezintenteni zabo bevuya yaye benemihlali ezintliziyweni zabo ngenxa yokulunga uYehova awayekwenzile kuDavide noSolomon nabantu bakhe amaSirayeli.
2Chronicles7:11 Wayigqiba ke uSolomon indlu kaYehova nendlu yokumkani, yaye yonke into eyathi qatha entliziyweni kaSolomon ukuba ayenze endlwini kaYehova nasendlwini yakhe, wayiphumelelisa."
2Chronicles7:12 uYehova wabonakala kuSolomon ebusuku, wathi kuye, Ndikuvile ukuthandaza kwakho;"
2Chronicles7:13 Ukuba ndithe ndasivala izulu, ukuba kungabikho mvula, nokuba ndithe ndaziwisela umthetho iinkumbi, ukuba zilidle ilizwe, nokuba ndithe ndathumela ebantwini bam indyikitya yokufa;"
2Chronicles7:14 bathoba ke abantu bam, ababizwa kubo igama lam, bathandaza, bafuna ubuso bam, babuya ezindleleni zabo ezimbi; ndiya kuva ke emazulwini, ndibaxolele izono zabo, ndiliphilise ihlabathi labo."
2Chronicles7:15 Ovuleka ke amehlo am, iindlebe zam ziwuphulaphule umthandazo owenziwa kule ndawo."
2Chronicles7:16 Kuba ngoku ndiyinyule le ndlu ndaza ndayingcwalisa, ukuze igama lam libe kuyo ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo, namehlo am nentliziyo yam iya kusoloko ikuyo."
2Chronicles7:17 Wena ke, ukuba uthe wahamba ngam, njengoko wahamba ngako uDavide uyihlo, wayenza yonke into endikuwisele umthetho ngayo, uyigcine imithetho yam nemimiselo yam;"
2Chronicles7:18 ndiyiqinise itrone yobukumkani bakho, njengoko ndanqophisana ngako noyihlo uDavide, ndisithi, Akuyi kuswela ndoda yakulawula kwaSirayeli."
2Chronicles7:19 Ke ukuba nithe natyeka, nayishiya imithetho yam emisiweyo, nemithetho yam, endiyibeke phambi kwenu, nemka nakhonza thixo bambi, naqubuda kubo;"
2Chronicles7:20 ngoku ndiya kubanyothula emhlabeni wam endibanike wona; nale ndlu, ndiyingcwalisele igama lam, ndoyishiya, ndoyishiya, ndiyenze ibe yintsomi nentsomi ezintlangeni zonke."
2Chronicles7:21 Le ndlu ephakamileyo yobamangalisa bonke abadlulayo kuyo; Wathi, Yini na ukuba uYehova enjenje kweli lizwe, nale ndlu?"
2Chronicles7:22 Kuya kuthi ke kuthi, Kuthiwe, Kungenxa enokuba babuyayo kuYehova uThixo wooyise, owabakhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa, bathabatha oothixo bolunye uhlanga, babanqula, babakhonza; ke ngoko wabazisela yonke le ntlekele."
2Chronicles8:1 Ke kaloku, kwakuzaliseka iminyaka emashumi mabini, wayakha uSolomon indlu kaYehova nendlu yakhe;"
2Chronicles8:2 uSolomon wayakha imizi leyo uHuram awayibuyiselayo kuSolomon, wabahlalisa kuyo oonyana bakaSirayeli."
2Chronicles8:3 uSolomon waya eHamati-tsobha waza wayithimba.
2Chronicles8:4 Wakha iTademore entlango, nemizi yonke enqatyisiweyo wayakha eHamati."
2Chronicles8:5 Wakha neBhete-horon engasentla neBhete-horon yasezantsi, yaba yimizi enqatyisiweyo, enamasango nemivalo;"
2Chronicles8:6 neBhahalati nazo zonke izixeko ezingoovimba uSolomon awayenazo, nazo zonke izixeko zemfazwe nezixeko zamahashe nayo yonke into awayefuna ukuyakha uSolomon eYerusalem naseLebhanon nakulo lonke ilizwe lolawulo lwakhe."
2Chronicles8:7 Ke bonke abaseleyo kumaHeti, nama-Amori, namaPerizi, namaHeti, namaYebhusi, abengengawo akwaSirayeli;"
2Chronicles8:8 Kodwa phakathi koonyana babo abasala elizweni emva kwabo, abo oonyana bakaSirayeli bangabatshabalalisanga, bamrhafisa uSolomon de kube namhla."
2Chronicles8:9 Ke uSolomon akabakhonzanga oonyana bakaSirayeli; kodwa babengamagorha akhe, nabathetheli bakhe, nabathetheli beenqwelo zakhe zokulwa, nabamahashe bakhe."
2Chronicles8:10 Iingqwayi-ngqwayi zabalindi bokumkani uSolomon, babengamakhulu amabini anamanci mahlanu, ababelawula abantu."
2Chronicles8:11 uSolomon wathabatha intombi kaFaro, wayisa emzini kaDavide, wayingenisa endlwini abeyakhele; ngokuba wathi, Akahlalanga umfazi wam endlwini kaDavide, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli; kuba iindawo ezingcwele zobuncwane bukaYehova obuya kufika kuyo zingcwele."
2Chronicles8:12 uSolomon wenyusa amadini anyukayo kuYehova esibingelelweni sikaYehova, abesakha phambi kwevaranda;"
2Chronicles8:13 Ke ngokomlinganiselo othile, imihla ngemihla, ngokomyalelo kaMoses, ngeesabatha, nasekuthwaseni kwenyanga, nangemithendeleko, kathathu ngomnyaka, emthendelekweni wezonka ezingenagwele, nangomthendeleko iiveki, nangomthendeleko weminquba."
2Chronicles8:14 Ngokomyalelo kayise uDavide wamisela amaqela ababingeleli ukuze balungiselele inkonzo yabo, nabaLevi ukuze babe ngabalungiseleli babo ukuze badumise, balungiselele phambi kwababingeleli kwinkonzo yemihla ngemihla inkonzo nasekungeneni kuwo onke amasango, njengoko wamwiselayo umthetho uDavide umfo wakwaThixo."
2Chronicles8:15 Abatyekanga kumyalelo wokumkani kubabingeleli nabaLevi ngokuphathelele kuyo nayiphi na imibandela okanye ngokuphathelele ubuncwane.
2Chronicles8:16 Walungiswa ke wonke umsebenzi kaSolomon de kwayimini yokusekwa kwesiseko sendlu kaYehova de kwagqitywa. Ngoko indlu kaYehova yayigqibelele.
2Chronicles8:17 Wandula ke uSolomon waya e-Etsiyon-gebhere nase-Eloti, kunxweme lolwandle kwilizwe lakwaEdom."
2Chronicles8:18 uHiram wamthumelela iinqanawa ngesandla sabakhonzi bakhe, nabakhonzi ababelwazi ulwandle; yaye bahamba nabakhonzi bakaSolomon eOfire baza bathabatha apho amakhulu amane anamashumi amahlanu eetalente zegolide bazizisa kuKumkani uSolomon."
2Chronicles9:1 Ke kaloku ukumkanikazi waseShebha waliva ilizwi likaSolomon, weza kumlinga uSolomon ngemibuzo enzima eYerusalem, enesihlwele esikhulu kunene, neenkamela ezithwele ubulawu, negolide eninzi, namatye anqabileyo; wathi akufika; Wathetha kuSolomon ngayo yonke into esentliziyweni yakhe."
2Chronicles9:2 uSolomon wamxelela yonke imibuzo yakhe, yaye akukho nto ifihlakeleyo kuSolomon angazange amxelele yona."
2Chronicles9:3 Wabubona ukumkanikazi waseShebha ubulumko bukaSolomon, nendlu awayakhayo;"
2Chronicles9:4 nokudla kwetafile yakhe, nezihlalo zabakhonzi bakhe, nenkonzo yabakhonzi bakhe, neempahla zabo; nabakhonzi bakhe neempahla zabo; nokuma kwakhe ukunyuka kwakhe ukuya endlwini kaYehova; akwaba sabakho kuphefumla kuye."
2Chronicles9:5 Wathi kukumkani, Lilizwi eliyinyaniso, endilivileyo ezweni lam, ngezenzo zakho nobulumko bakho."
2Chronicles9:6 Andikholwanga ngamazwi abo, ndada ndeza, ababona amehlo am; uyabona, andixelelwanga nesiqingatha esi sobuninzi bobulumko bakho; ngokuba ulugqithile udaba endiluvileyo."
2Chronicles9:7 Anoyolo amadoda akho, banoyolo aba bakhonzi bakho bemiyo phambi kwakho amaxesha onke, bebuva ubulumko bakho."
2Chronicles9:8 Makabongwe uYehova uThixo wakho, okunoneleleyo, ukukubeka etroneni yakhe, ube ngukumkani kaYehova uThixo wakho; ngokuba uThixo wakho wawathanda amaSirayeli, ukuba awamise ngonaphakade; wambeka ukumkani wakho phezu kwawo ukuba enze ngokwesiko nangobulungisa."
2Chronicles9:9 Ukumkani wanika ukumkani ikhulu elinamanci amabini eetalente zegolide, nasebulawini into eninzi, namatye anqabileyo; yaye akuzange kubekho zibulawu zifana nezo ukumkanikazi waseShebha wazinika uKumkani uSolomon."
2Chronicles9:10 Yaye abakhonzi bakaHiram nabakhonzi bakaSolomon, ababeze negolide evela kwaOfire, beza nemithi yeallum namatye axabisekileyo."
2Chronicles9:11 Ukumkani wazenza iivaranda zendlu kaYehova, nezendlu yokumkani, ngemialgumi, neehadi, nemirhubhe yeemvumi; yaye akazange abonwe umntu onjalo ngaphambili kwilizwe lakwaYuda."
2Chronicles9:12 Ukumkani uSolomon wanika ukumkanikazi waseShebha konke awayekunqwenela, konke awayekucelile; ngaphandle koko wayekuzisele ukumkani. Wajika waya ezweni lakhe, yena nabakhonzi bakhe."
2Chronicles9:13 Ubunzima begolide awazuzayo uSolomon ngomnyaka, baba ngamakhulu omathandathu anamanci mathandathu anesithandathu eetalente zegolide;"
2Chronicles9:14 ingekuko oko kweziswa ngamasela nabarhwebi. Bonke ookumkani bama-Arabhi nabalawuli belizwe babezisa igolide nesilivere kuSolomon.
2Chronicles9:15 Ukumkani uSolomon wenza amakhulu amabini eeshekele zegolide ekhandiweyo;
2Chronicles9:16 Wenza amakhulu amathathu amakhaka egolide ekhandiweyo; Ukumkani wawabeka endlwini yehlathi laseLebhanon.
2Chronicles9:17 Ngaphezu koko, ukumkani wenza netrone enkulu yophondo lwendlovu waza wayaleka ngegolide esulungekileyo."
2Chronicles9:18 Kwakukho izinyuko ezithandathu ezikhokelela etroneni, kunye nezihlalo zeenyawo zegolide, ezinamathele etroneni leyo, nezixhaso macala omabini esihlalo eso, kumi iingonyama ezimbini ngasezixhasweni."
2Chronicles9:19 Kwakukho iingonyama ezilishumi elinambini khona ezinyukweni ezithandathu, ngapha nangapha; Akukho nto injengaleyo yenziweyo kuye nawuphi na urhulumente."
2Chronicles9:20 Zonke iimpahla zokumkani uSolomon zabe zezegolide, nempahla yonke yendlu yehlathi laseLebhanon yabe iyeyegolide ecikizekileyo; kwakungekho nto yayibalwa ngemihla kaSolomon."
2Chronicles9:21 Ngokuba iinqanawa zokumkani zaya eTarshishe nabakhonzi bakaHiram; Rhoqo ngeminyaka emithathu kwafika iinqanawa ezivela eTarshishe zithwele igolide, isilivere, iimpondo zeendlovu, iinkawu neepikoko."
2Chronicles9:22 Waba mkhulu ke ukumkani uSolomon, ngaphezu kookumkani bonke behlabathi, ngobutyebi nangobulumko."
2Chronicles9:23 Bonke ookumkani behlabathi bafuna ukubona ubuso bukaSolomon, ukuba beve ubulumko bakhe, awayebunike entliziyweni yakhe uThixo."
2Chronicles9:24 Elowo wazisa isipho sakhe: iimpahla zesilivere, neempahla zegolide, neempahla, nemisonto, nobulawu, namahashe, noimeyile, iminyaka ngeminyaka."
2Chronicles9:25 uSolomon ubenamawaka amane amahashe neenqwelo zokulwa, namawaka alishumi elinamabini amahashe akhwelwayo; wayibeka emizini yemfazwe, nakukumkani waseYerusalem."
2Chronicles9:26 Ubelawula ookumkani bonke, ethabathela kuwo uMlambo, naselizweni lamaFilisti, wesa nasemdeni waseYiputa."
2Chronicles9:27 uYehova wayenza isilivere yanjengamatye eYerusalem, nemisedare wayenza yanjengemithombe yasezihlanjeni, ukuba mininzi."
2Chronicles9:28 Bawazisa amahashe kaSolomon eYiputa, nasezizweni zonke;"
2Chronicles9:29 Ezinye izinto zikaSolomon, ezokuqala nezokugqibela, azibhalwanga na encwadini yomprofeti uNatan, nasesiprofetweni sika-Ahiya waseShilo, nasemibonweni kaIdo, imboni, ngoYarobheham umshumayeli unyana kaNebhati?"
2Chronicles9:30 uSolomon waba ngukumkani kumaSirayeli onke iminyaka emashumi mane eYerusalem.
2Chronicles9:31 uSolomon walala kooyise, wangcwatyelwa emzini kaDavide uyise; unyana wakhe uRehobhoham waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Chronicles10:1 uRehabheham waya kwaShekem; ngokuba amaSirayeli onke abeye kumenza ukumkani kwaShekem.
2Chronicles10:2 Weva uYarobheham, unyana kaNebhati, eYiputa, apho wayebalekele khona ngenxa kaSolomon ukumkani, wabuya uYarobheham eYiputa;"
2Chronicles10:3 Bathumela ngoko ukuba kumbizwe. Weza uYarobheham namaSirayeli onke, bathetha kuRehabheham, bathi,"
2Chronicles10:4 Uyihlo wasithwalela idyokhwe enzima; ke wena yenze lula inkonzo enzima kayihlo, nedyokhwe yakhe enzima ayibeke phezu kwethu, sikukhonze."
2Chronicles10:5 Wathi kubo, Yizani kum emveni kweentsuku ezintathu; Kwaye abantu bayahamba."
2Chronicles10:6 Ukumkani uRehabheham wacebisana namadoda amakhulu, abemi ngakuSolomon uyise oko ebesahleli, wathi, Ninika cebo lini na kum, ukuba ndithe ndabaphendula aba bantu?"
2Chronicles10:7 Athetha ke kuye, athi, Ukuba uthe wabenzela okulungileyo aba bantu, wabavuyisa, wathetha amazwi amahle kubo, boba ngabakhonzi bakho kude kuse ephakadeni."
2Chronicles10:8 Kodwa walishiya icebiso awayelinikwe ngamadoda amakhulu, wacebisana namadodana aziintanga zakhe, awayemi ngakuye."
2Chronicles10:9 Wathi kuwo, Ninika cebo lini na kuthi, ukuze sibaguqule aba bantu bathethe kum, besithi, Yisuse idyokhwe awayibeka phezu kwethu uyihlo?"
2Chronicles10:10 Athetha ke kuye amadodana aziintanga zakhe, esithi, Baphendule abantu abathethe kuwe, besithi, Uyihlo wayithwala idyokhwe yethu enzima, usinciphise kancinane; wothi kubo, Ucikicane wam uya kuba mkhulu kunesinqe sikabawo."
2Chronicles10:11 Kuba, ukuba ubawo unithwalise idyokhwe enzima, mna ke ndiya kongeza edyokhweni yenu;"
2Chronicles10:12 Baya ke ooYarobheham nabantu bonke kuRehabheham ngomhla wesithathu, njengoko wayewise umthetho ngako ukumkani, wathi, Noweza kum ngomhla wesithathu;"
2Chronicles10:13 uYehova wabaphendula kalukhuni; ukumkani uRehabheham walinikela umva ibhunga lamadoda amakhulu;
2Chronicles10:14 Wathetha kubo ngokwecebo lamadodana, esithi, Ubawo wanithwalisa idyokhwe enzima, mna ke ndiya kongeza kuyo;"
2Chronicles10:15 Kungenxa yoko le nto ukumkani engabaphulaphulanga abantu, ngenxa yokuba lo mbandela wawungokaThixo, ukuze uYehova alizalise ilizwi awayelithethile ngoAhiya uMoshilo kuYerobhoham unyana kaNebhati."
2Chronicles10:16 Akubona ke onke amaSirayeli ukuba ukumkani akawaphulaphuli, abantu bambuyisela ukumkani ilizwi elithi, Sinasabelo sini na kuDavide? Asinalifa kunyana kaYese; Kaloku ke, Davide, gcina indlu yakho. Aya ezintenteni zawo onke amaSirayeli."
2Chronicles10:17 Ke oonyana bakaSirayeli, ababehleli emizini yakwaYuda, uRehabheham wabalawula."
2Chronicles10:18 Ukumkani uRehabheham uthuma uHadoram, umbuthi werhafu; Bamgibisela ngamatye oonyana bakaSirayeli, wafa. Ukumkani uRehabheham wakhawuleza, wamkhwelisa enqwelweni yakhe, wasabela eYerusalem."
2Chronicles10:19 Akreqa ke amaSirayeli kwindlu kaDavide, unanamhla."
2Chronicles11:1 Weza uRehabheham eYerusalem, wabizela ndawonye indlu yakwaYuda neyakwaBhenjamin, ikhulu elinamanci asibhozo anesibini amawaka amadoda okulwa, ukuba aye kulwa namaSirayeli, bubuyiselwe ubukumkani kuRehabheham."
2Chronicles11:2 Lafika ke ilizwi likaYehova kuShemaya umfo wakwaThixo, lisithi:"
