2Chronicles11:3 Thetha kuRehabheham unyana kaSolomon, ukumkani wakwaYuda, nakumaSirayeli onke kwaYuda nakwaBhenjamin, uthi,"
2Chronicles11:4 Wathi uYehova, Ize ningenyuki niye kulwa nabazalwana benu; makabuyele elowo endlwini yakhe, ngokuba yenziwe kum le nto. Bawaphulaphula amazwi kaYehova baza babuya edabini nxamnye noYerobhoham."
2Chronicles11:5 Wahlala uRehabheham eYerusalem, wakha imizi enqatyisiweyo kwaYuda."
2Chronicles11:6 Wayakha iBhetelehem, ne-Etam, neTekowa;"
2Chronicles11:7 neBhetesera, neSoko, neAdulam;"
2Chronicles11:8 neGati, neMaresha, neSife;"
2Chronicles11:9 neAdoraim, neLakishe, neAseki;"
2Chronicles11:10 iTsoreya, neAyalon, neHebron, imizi enqatyisiweyo kwaYuda nakwaBhenjamin."
2Chronicles11:11 Wazomeleza iinqaba waza wabeka iirhuluneli kuzo noovimba bokutya neoli newayini.
2Chronicles11:12 Kwisixeko ngasinye wabeka amakhaka nemikhonto waza wayenza yomelela ngokugqithiseleyo, yaye uYuda noBhenjamin babesondele kuye."
2Chronicles11:13 Ababingeleli nabaLevi ababekwelakwaSirayeli lonke beza kuye bevela ezindaweni zabo zonke.
2Chronicles11:14 Kuba abaLevi bawashiya amadlelo abo nendyebo yabo baza beza kwaYuda naseYerusalem, ngenxa yokuba uYarobheham noonyana bakhe babebayekisile ekukhonzeni uYehova njengababingeleli."
2Chronicles11:15 Wazenzela ababingeleli beziganga, needemon, namathole eenkomo abewenzile;"
2Chronicles11:16 Emva kwabo kuzo zonke izizwe zakwaSirayeli beza eYerusalem ababezimisele ukufuna uYehova uTHIXO kaSirayeli, ukuze benze umbingelelo kuYehova uTHIXO wookhokho babo."
2Chronicles11:17 Babuqinisa ubukumkani bukaYuda, bamomeleza uRehobhoham unyana kaSolomon iminyaka emithathu; bahamba emanyathelweni kaDavide noSolomon iminyaka emithathu."
2Chronicles11:18 uRehabheham wazeka uMahalati, intombi kaYerimoti, unyana kaDavide, noAbhihayili, intombi kaEliyabhi, unyana kaYese;"
2Chronicles11:19 owamzalela abantwana; iYeyus neSamariya neZahama.
2Chronicles11:20 Emva kwakhe wazeka uMaga, intombi ka-Abhisalom; Nguye ke wamzalela uAbhiya, noAtayi, noSisa, noShelomiti."
2Chronicles11:21 uRehabheham wathanda uMahagi, intombi ka-Abhisalom, ngaphezu kwabafazi bakhe bonke, nezithende zakhe;"
2Chronicles11:22 uRehabheham wamisa uAbhiya unyana kaMahaka, intloko, ukuba abe yintloko kubazalwana bakhe, ngokuba ubefuna ukumenza ukumkani."
2Chronicles11:23 Wenza ngengqiqo, wabathi saa bonke oonyana bakhe ezweni lakwaYuda nelakwaBhenjamin, emizini yonke enqatyisiweyo; wabanika ukutya okuninzi. Wafuna abafazi abaninzi."
2Chronicles12:1 Akubuqinisa uRehabheham ubukumkani, womelela, wawulahla umyalelo kaYehova, namaSirayeli onke kunye naye."
2Chronicles12:2 Kwathi ngomnyaka wesihlanu wokumkani uRehabheham, wenyuka uShishaki, ukumkani waseYiputa, wayifikela iYerusalem, ngokuba yonile kuYehova;"
2Chronicles12:3 ngeenqwelo zokulwa eziliwaka elinamakhulu amabini, namashumi amathandathu amawaka amahashe; yaye abantu abaphuma kunye naye eYiputa babebaninzi; AmaLubhi, amaShukim namaTiyopiya."
2Chronicles12:4 Wazithimba izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo zakwaYuda, wada waya kufika eYerusalem."
2Chronicles12:5 Weza uShemaya umprofeti kuRehabheham, nakubathetheli bakwaYuda ababehlanganisene eYerusalem ngenxa kaShishaki, wathi kubo, uYehova wathi, Nina nindishiyile, nam ndinishiyile, ndanishiya esandleni sam kaShishaki."
2Chronicles12:6 Bazithoba abathetheli bakwaSirayeli nokumkani; bathi, Lilungisa uYehova."
2Chronicles12:7 Akubona uYehova ukuba bazithobile, lafika ilizwi likaYehova kuShemaya, lisithi, Bazithobile; ke ngoko, andiyi kubatshabalalisa, kodwa ndiya kubanika olunye usindiso; yaye umsindo wam awuyi kuthululelwa eYerusalem ngesandla sikaShishaki."
2Chronicles12:8 Baya kuba ngabakhonzi bakhe; ukuze bayazi inkonzo yam nenkonzo yoorhulumente belizwe.
2Chronicles12:9 uShishaki ukumkani waseYiputa wayihlasela iYerusalem waza wabuthabatha ubuncwane bendlu kaYehova nobuncwane bendlu kakumkani; wathabatha yonke into; wawathabatha namakhaka egolide abenziwe nguSolomon.
2Chronicles12:10 Ukumkani uRehabheham wenza amakhaka obhedu endaweni yawo, wawanika abathetheli bezigidimi, ababegcina umnyango wendlu yokumkani."
2Chronicles12:11 Ekungeneni kokumkani endlwini kaYehova, zeza izigidimi, zizithabatha, zazibuyisela egumbini lezigidimi."
2Chronicles12:12 Wathi akuzithoba, umsindo kaYehova wemka kuye, akafuna ukumtshabalalisa ngokupheleleyo; waye uYuda ehambe kakuhle."
2Chronicles12:13 Ukumkani uRehabheham wazenzela amandla eYerusalem, walawula; ngenxa yokuba uRehobhoham wayeneminyaka engamashumi amane ananye ubudala ekuqaliseni kwakhe ukulawula, yaye walawula iminyaka elishumi elinesixhenxe eYerusalem, isixeko awasinyulayo uYehova kuzo zonke izizwe zakwaSirayeli ukuba asimise igama lakhe apho. Igama lonina belinguNahama umAmon."
2Chronicles12:14 Wenza okubi, ngokuba engayibhekisanga intliziyo yakhe ukumquqela uYehova."
2Chronicles12:15 Ke yona imicimbi kaRehobhoham, eyokuqala neyokugqibela, ayibhalwanga na encwadini yomprofeti uShemaya nalowo wabona imibono uIdo ngokuphathelele izizukulwana? Kwaye kukho iimfazwe phakathi koRehabheham noYarobheham."
2Chronicles12:16 uRehabheham walala kooyise, wangcwatyelwa emzini kaDavide; unyana wakhe uAbhiya walawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Chronicles13:1 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinesithoba anesibini wokumkani uYarobheham, uAbhiya waba ngukumkani wakwaYuda."
2Chronicles13:2 Waba neminyaka emithathu engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguMikaya, intombi kaUriyeli waseGibheha. Kwabakho imfazwe phakathi kuka-Abhiya noYarobheham."
2Chronicles13:3 uAbhiya wayixhobela imfazwe enempi yamagorha, engamakhulu amane amawaka ahleliweyo;"
2Chronicles13:4 Wema uAbhiya ezintabeni zakwaSemarayim, kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, wathi, Phulaphulani, Yarobheham, nani maSirayeli nonke!"
2Chronicles13:5 Anazi na ukuba uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, wamnika uDavide ubukumkani bakwaSirayeli ngonaphakade, yena noonyana bakhe, ngomnqophiso wetyuwa?"
2Chronicles13:6 Wesuka wema uYarobheham unyana kaNebhati, umkhonzi kaSolomon unyana kaDavide, wagwilika enkosini yakhe."
2Chronicles13:7 Kwandula ke kwahlanganisana kuye amadoda angenabuntu, oonyana bakaBheliyali, abomelezayo nxamnye noRehobhoham unyana kaSolomon, ngoxa uRehobhoham wayeselula yaye enentliziyo ebuthathaka yaye engakwazi ukumelana nabo."
2Chronicles13:8 Ke ngoku nicinga ngokubuchasa ubukumkani bukaYehova, obusezandleni zoonyana bakaDavide; yaba yinkamela, inamathole egolide, awawenzela uYarobheham ukuba abe nguthixo kuyo."
2Chronicles13:9 Asinini na aba bagxothayo ababingeleli bakaYehova, oonyana baka-Aron nabaLevi, naza anibamisela ababingeleli benu ngokwesiko leentlanga zakwamanye amazwe? ukuze nabani na oza kumngcwalisa ngenkunzi yenkomo nangeenkunzi zeegusha ezisixhenxe, abe ngumbingeleli ongenguye uthixo."
2Chronicles13:10 Ke thina, uYehova nguThixo wethu, asimshiyanga; yaye ababingeleli abakhonza uYehova ngoonyana baka-Aron, yaye abaLevi balindele umsebenzi wabo."
2Chronicles13:11 Baqhubeka besenza iminikelo etshiswayo nesiqhumiso kuYehova ntsasa nganye nangokuhlwa ngokuhlwa; nezonka zokubonisa bazibeka etafileni ehlambulukileyo; nesiphatho sezibane segolide, kwanezibane zaso zivutha ukuhlwa ngokuhlwa; Ke nina nimcekisile."
2Chronicles13:12 Kwaye qaphelani, uThixo ngenene unathi kumlawuli wethu, kwaye ababingeleli bakhe baphethe amaxilongo avakalisa ukumbulala ukumkani. Nina nyana bakaSirayeli, musani ukulwa noYehova, uThixo wooyihlo; ngokuba akuyi kuphumelela."
2Chronicles13:13 Ke uYarobheham wathuma abalaleli emva kwabo; bona babengaphambi kwamaYuda, nabalaleli babesemva kwawo."
2Chronicles13:14 Abheka ngasemva amaYuda, abona imfazwe ngaphambili nangasemva, anqula uYehova, ababingeleli bavuthela izigodlo."
2Chronicles13:15 Aduma ke amadoda akwaYuda; ekudumeni kwamadoda akwaYuda, uThixo wamoyisa uYarobheham namaSirayeli onke phambi koAbhiya namaYuda."
2Chronicles13:16 Basaba oonyana bakaSirayeli ebusweni bamaYuda, uThixo wabanikela esandleni sabo."
2Chronicles13:17 uAbhiya nabantu bakhe bababulala ngogonyamelo olukhulu, kangangokuba kwaSirayeli aba ngamakhulu amahlanu amawaka amadoda akhethiweyo."
2Chronicles13:18 Babehleli oonyana bakaSirayeli ngelo xesha, bakhalipha oonyana bakaYuda, ngokuba bayama ngoYehova uThixo wooyise."
2Chronicles13:19 uAbhiya wamsukela uYarobheham, wayithimba imizi yakhe: iBheteli namadlelo ayo, neYesana namadlelo ayo, nakwaEfrayim namadlelo ayo."
2Chronicles13:20 Wayengasenamandla uYarobheham ngemihla ka-Abhiya; uYehova wambetha, wafa."
2Chronicles13:21 Wazomeleza uAbhiya, wazeka abafazi abalishumi elinabane, wazala oonyana abamashumi mabini anababini, neentombi ezilishumi elinantandathu."
2Chronicles13:22 Ingxelo eqhubekayo ka-Abhiya neendlela zakhe namazwi akhe ichazwe kwibali lomprofeti uIdo.
2Chronicles14:1 uAbhiya walala noyise, wangcwatyelwa emzini kaDavide; unyana wakhe uAsa waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe. Ngemihla yakhe ilizwe lazola iminyaka elishumi."
2Chronicles14:2 uAsa wenza okulungileyo nokuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova uThixo wakhe.
2Chronicles14:3 Wazisusa izibingelelo zabanye oothixo neendawo eziphakamileyo, wayidiliza imifanekiso eqingqiweyo waza wagawula namatyholo."
2Chronicles14:4 AmaYuda awayalela ukuba afune uYehova, uThixo wooyise, aze azalisekise umthetho nemiyalelo."
2Chronicles14:5 Kwakhona wazisusa iindawo eziphakamileyo nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo kuzo zonke izixeko zakwaYuda, baza ke ubukumkani bazola phambi kwakhe."
2Chronicles14:6 Wazakha izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo kwaYuda, ngenxa yokuba ilizwe lalizolile, yaye kwakungekho mfazwe ngaloo minyaka; ngokuba uYehova wayemphumzile."
2Chronicles14:7 Wathi ke kumaYuda, Masiyakhe le mizi, senze iindonga ngeenxa zonke kuyo, sibe neenqaba ezinde, sibe namasango, namasango, libe phambi kwethu ilizwe; ngokuba samquqela uYehova uThixo wethu, samquqela kuye, wasiphumza ngeenxa zonke. Bakha ke baba nempumelelo."
2Chronicles14:8 uAsa wayenomkhosi wamajoni axhobileyo nezikhali, amakhulu amathathu amawaka avela kwaYuda; kwisizwe sakwaBhenjamin, abaphatha iingweletshetshe, batyeda izaphetha, babengamakhulu amabini, anamanci asithoba anamabini amawaka; bonke babengamagorha akhaliphileyo."
2Chronicles14:9 Waphuma uSeraki wakwaKushe waya kubo, enempi engamawaka amathathu eenqwelo zokulwa; waya eMarésa."
2Chronicles14:10 uAsa waya kumhlangabeza, balwa entlanjeni yaseSefata eMaresha."
2Chronicles14:11 uAsa wabiza kuYehova uThixo wakhe, wathi, Yehova, aniyi kubanceda abaninzi nabasweleyo; sincede, Yehova, Thixo wethu! ngokuba sikholose ngawe, sihlasela esi sihlwele ngegama lakho. Yehova, unguThixo wethu; ungaphoswa mntu."
2Chronicles14:12 Ngoko uYehova wawabulala amaKushe phambi kuka-Asa naphambi koYuda; asaba amaKushi.
2Chronicles14:13 uAsa namadoda abenaye bawasukela, bada besa eGerare; ngokuba aqotywa phambi koYehova, naphambi kweentshaba zakhe; baphanga into eninzi yamaxhoba."
2Chronicles14:14 Bayingqinga yonke imizi ngeenxa zonke eGerare; ngokuba bafikelwa kukunkwantya kukaYehova, bayithimba yonke imizi; ngokuba amaxhoba ebemaninzi kubo."
2Chronicles14:15 Bahlala ezintenteni zeenkomo, bathimba impahla emfutshane, neenkamela, zininzi, baza babuyela eYerusalem."
2Chronicles15:1 uMoya kaThixo wamfikela uAzariya, unyana kaOdedi."
2Chronicles15:2 Waphuma, esiya kukhawulela uAsa, wathi kuye, Ndiphulaphuleni, Asa, nani nonke maYuda namaBhenjamin; uYehova unani ekubeni ninaye; ukuba uthe wamfuna, womfumana; ukuba nithe namshiya, wonishiya nani."
2Chronicles15:3 Ke kaloku kwabakho ixesha elide uSirayeli engenaye uThixo wokwenyaniso nombingeleli ofundisayo nomthetho.
2Chronicles15:4 Kwathi, ekubandezelekeni kwawo, abuyela kuYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, amquqela, wafunyanwa phakathi kwawo."
2Chronicles15:5 Ngaloo mihla bekungekho luxolo kwabaphumayo, nakubangenayo; zabafikela izijeziso ezikhulu abemi baloo mazwe."
2Chronicles15:6 Batshatyalaliswa ke abantu, bangabikho phakathi komzi nesixeko, kuba uThixo wayebatshutshisa ngazo zonke iintlekele."
2Chronicles15:7 Yomelelani; mazingawi izandla zenu; ngokuba umsebenzi wenu unomvuzo.
2Chronicles15:8 Wathi uAsa akuweva la mazwi nezihlabo zikaOdedi umprofeti, womelela, wazisusa imifanekiso enezothe ezweni lonke lakwaYuda nelakwaBhenjamin, nemizi awazithimbayo kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, wazihlaziya, wasisusa isibingelelo kaYehova ephambi kwevaranda kaYehova."
2Chronicles15:9 Wawahlanganisa onke amaYuda namaBhenjamin nabasemzini ababekuwo, bakwaEfrayim, nabakwaManase, nabakwaSimon; ngenxa yokuba baxabela kuye bebaninzi kwaSirayeli, bakubona ukuba uYehova uThixo wakhe wayenaye."
2Chronicles15:10 Bahlanganisana eYerusalem ngenyanga yesithathu ngomnyaka weshumi elinesihlanu wobukumkani buka-Asa.
2Chronicles15:11 Babingelela kuYehova ngelo xesha lokuphanga, iinkomo ezingamakhulu asixhenxe namawaka asixhenxe empahla emfutshane."
2Chronicles15:12 Benza umnqophiso wokumquqela uYehova, uThixo wooyise, ngentliziyo yabo yonke, nangomphefumlo wabo wonke;"
2Chronicles15:13 ukuze wonk’ ubani ongamfuniyo uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, abulawe, kuthabathele komncinane kuse kwixhego, kuthabathele kwindoda kuse kwinkazana."
2Chronicles15:14 Bafunga kuYehova ngezwi elikhulu, nangentswahla, nangamaxilongo, nangamaxilongo."
2Chronicles15:15 Asivuyela onke amaYuda isifungo eso; ngokuba afunga ngentliziyo yawo yonke, omelela ngokomnqweno wawo wonke; yaye wabonwa kubo, waza uYehova wabanika ukuphumla macala onke."
2Chronicles15:16 Kananjalo uMaga, unina wokumkani uAsa, wamsusa ebukumkanini, ngokuba wenze umfanekiso oqingqiweyo ehlathini;"
2Chronicles15:17 Ke iziganga azisuswanga kwaSirayeli; kodwa yona intliziyo ka-Asa yayigqibelele yonke imihla yakhe.
2Chronicles15:18 Wazizisa endlwini kaThixo izinto uyise awayezingcwalisile, awayezingcwalisile: isilivere negolide nempahla."
2Chronicles15:19 Akwaba sabakho mfazwe, kwada kwaba ngumnyaka wamashumi amathathu anesihlanu wobukumkani buka-Asa."
2Chronicles16:1 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omathathu anamithandathu wobukumkani buka-Asa, uBhahesha ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wawafikela amaYuda, wayakha iRama, esithi, makangaphumi mntu, angene noAsa ukumkani wakwaYuda."
2Chronicles16:2 uAsa wathabatha isilivere negolide kubuncwane bendlu kaYehova nobendlu kakumkani waza wathumela kuBhen-hadadi ukumkani wakwa-Aram, owayehlala eDamasko, esithi:"
2Chronicles16:3 Kukho umnqophiso phakathi kwam nawe, phakathi kobawo noyihlo; niyabona, ndinithumela isilivere negolide; hamba, uwaphule umnqophiso wakho noBhahesa ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, ukuba andishiye."
2Chronicles16:4 uBhen-hadade wamthobela ukumkani uAsa, wathumela iingqwayi-ngqwayi zomkhosi wakhe, ukuba ziye kuhlasela izixeko zakwaSirayeli yaye ayixabela i-Iyon neDana neAlemayim nazo zonke izixeko zakwaNafetali."
2Chronicles16:5 Akukuva oko uBhahesa, wayeka ukuyakha iRama, wawuyeka umsebenzi wakhe."
2Chronicles16:6 Ukumkani uAsa wawathabatha onke amaYuda; bawathabatha amatye eRama, nemithi yayo, abesakhiwe ngayo uBhahesha; waza wakha ngayo iGebha neMizpa."
2Chronicles16:7 Ngelo xesha, weza uHanani, imboni, kuAsa, ukumkani wakwaYuda, wathi kuye, Ekubeni wayame kukumkani wama-Aram, akwakholosa ngoYehova uThixo wakho, ngenxa yoko iintendelezo zelizwe. Wasinda ukumkani wama-Aram isandla sakho."
2Chronicles16:8 Andithi na ke amaKushi namaLubhi abe ngumkhosi omkhulu weenqwelo zokulwa nabamahashe? kodwa ngenxa yokuba wayama ngoYehova, wawanikela esandleni sakho."
2Chronicles16:9 Kuba amehlo kaYehova akhangela emhlabeni wonke ukuba omelele ngenxa yabo bantliziyo zizele nguye. Nenze ngobudenge; ke ngoko, niya kuba neemfazwe ukususela ngoku ukuya phambili."
2Chronicles16:10 uAsa wayiqumbela imboni leyo, wayifaka entolongweni; ngokuba wayemqumbele ngenxa yoko. uAsa wabacinezela abantu ngelo xesha."
2Chronicles16:11 Yabona, iziganeko zika-Asa, ezokuqala nezokugqibela, nanzo zibhaliwe encwadini yookumkani bakwaYuda nabakwaSirayeli."
2Chronicles16:12 uAsa waba buthathaka ezinyaweni zakhe ngomnyaka wamashumi omathathu anesibhozo wobukumkani bakhe, kwada kwaba kukhulu ukufa kwakhe; kodwa ekuguleni kwakhe akazange amfune uYehova, kodwa wafuna oogqirha."
2Chronicles16:13 uAsa walala kooyise, wafa ngomnyaka wamashumi omane anamnye wobukumkani bakhe."
2Chronicles16:14 Bamngcwabela engcwabeni lakhe abemenzele lona, emzini kaDavide; bamlalisa esingqengqelweni esizele bubulawu, nobobulawu beentlobo zonke, obulungiselwe ngobuchule babaqholi; bamenzela umlilo omkhulu kunene."
2Chronicles17:1 uYehoshafati, unyana wakhe, waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe, wamomeleza ukuba alwe namaSirayeli."
2Chronicles17:2 Wamisa umkhosi kuzo zonke izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo zakwaYuda waza wamisa imikhosi yamajoni kwilizwe lakwaYuda nakwizixeko zakwaEfrayim ezo uAsa uyise awazithimbayo.
2Chronicles17:3 uYehova waba noYehoshafati; ngokuba wahamba ngeendlela zokuqala zikaDavide uyise, akabaquqela ooBhahali;"
2Chronicles17:4 wamquqela uYehova, uThixo kayise, wahamba ngokwemithetho yakhe, kungekhona ngokwezenzo zamaSirayeli."
2Chronicles17:5 uYehova wabuqinisa ubukumkani esandleni sakhe; yaye onke amaYuda azisa izipho kuYehoshafati; wazuza ilifa ubutyebi nozuko ngokuyintabalala.
2Chronicles17:6 Yagcoba intliziyo yakhe ngeendlela zikaYehova, wazisusa iziganga, nemithi engcwele kwaYuda;"
2Chronicles17:7 Kwakhona, ngonyaka wesithathu wolawulo lwakhe, wathumela kwiinkosana zakhe, uBhen-hayili, uObhadiya, uZekariya, uNataniyeli noMikaya, ukuba baye kufundisa kwizixeko zakwaYuda."
2Chronicles17:8 Wabathumela kunye nabo abaLevi, ooShemaya, noNetaniya, noZebhadiya, noAsaheli, noShemiramoti, noYonatan, noAdoniya, noTobhiya, noTobhadoniya, abaLevi; kunye noElishama noYoram, ababingeleli."
2Chronicles17:9 Baqalisa ukufundisa kwilizwe lakwaYuda yaye benencwadi yomthetho kaYehova yaye bazijikeleza zonke izixeko zakwaYuda baza bafundisa abantu.
2Chronicles17:10 Ukoyikwa kukaYehova kwazifikela zonke izikumkani zamazwe ajikeleze uYuda, ukuba zingalwi noYehoshafati."
2Chronicles17:11 AmaFilisti athile azisa izipho kuYehoshafati nemali yerhafu; Ama-Arabhu amzisela imfuyo, amawaka asixhenxe anamakhulu asixhenxe eenkunzi zeegusha, namawaka asixhenxe anamakhulu asixhenxe eebhokhwe."
2Chronicles17:12 uYoshafati waba mkhulu kunene; wakha iinqaba nezixeko ezingoovimba kwilizwe lakwaYuda.
2Chronicles17:13 Wayenemicimbi emininzi kwizixeko zakwaYuda, yaye kwakukho amadoda okulwa namagorha anamandla eYerusalem."
2Chronicles17:14 Lilo eli inani labo ngokwezindlu zooyise: kwaYuda njengabathetheli kwiwaka; uAdna, inkokeli, wayenamadoda okulwa angamakhulu amathathu amawaka."
2Chronicles17:15 Olandelayo ibinguYohanan, intloko; ibingamakhulu amabini anamanci asibhozo amawaka."
2Chronicles17:16 Ngakuye nguAmatsiya unyana kaSigri, owazinikela ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo ukuze akhonze uYehova; unamagorha angamakhulu amabini amawaka."
2Chronicles17:17 NoBhenjamin; uElijada, igorha elinamandla, enamadoda axhobe isaphetha namakhaka angamakhulu amabini amawaka;"
2Chronicles17:18 ngakuye nguYozabhadi, enekhulu elinamanci asibhozo amawaka, axhobele imfazwe."
2Chronicles17:19 Babekhonza ukumkani, ngaphandle kwabo ukumkani wayebabeke kwizixeko ezinqatyisiweyo kulo lonke elakwaYuda."
2Chronicles18:1 uYoshafati waye enobutyebi nozuko olukhulu, waza wahamba noAhabhi."
2Chronicles18:2 Emva kweminyaka emininzi waya kuAhabhi kwaSamari. Yaye uAhabhi wambulala yena nabantu bakhe, enemihlambi yezimvu neenkomo, wamcenga ukuba anyuke naye aye eRamoti yaseGiliyadi."
2Chronicles18:3 Wathi uAhabhi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli kuYehoshafati ukumkani wakwaYuda, Wohamba na nam, siye eRamoti yaseGiliyadi? Wathi kuye, Ndinjengawe, nabantu bam, banjengabantu bakho; kwaye siya kuba nani edabini."
2Chronicles18:4 Wathi uYehoshafati kukumkani wakwaSirayeli, Cela ilizwi likaYehova namhla."
2Chronicles18:5 Ngoko ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wabiza amakhulu amané abaprofeti, wathi kubo, Siye kulwa na neRamoti yaseGiliyadi, ndiyishiye, kusini na? Athi, Nyuka; ngokuba uThixo uya kuyinikela esandleni sokumkani."
2Chronicles18:6 Wathi uYehoshafati, Akukho mprofeti kaYehova khona; singambuza bani na?"
2Chronicles18:7 Wathi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli kuYehoshafati, Kusekho enye indoda, esingabuza ngayo kuYehova; ke mna ndimthiyile; ngokuba ingaprofeti okulungileyo kuye, iprofeta okubi ngamaxesha onke; nguMikaya, unyana kaImla. Wathi uYehoshafati, Makangatsho uYehova."
2Chronicles18:8 Ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wabiza omnye wabakhonzi bakhe, wathi, Khawulezani, nize noMika unyana kaImla."
2Chronicles18:9 Ukumkani wakwaSirayeli noYehoshafati, ukumkani wakwaYuda, wamisa omnye wabo etroneni yakhe, bevathe iingubo zabo, bahlala endaweni engenanto, esangweni lakwaSamari; yaye bonke abaprofeti babeprofeta phambi kwabo."
2Chronicles18:10 uZedekiya, unyana kaKanan, wazenzela iimpondo zesinyithi, wathi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Uya kuwagqogqa ngalezi ama-Aram, uwatshabalalise."
2Chronicles18:11 Bonke abaprofeti benjenjalo ukuprofeta, besithi, Nyuka uye eRamoti yaseGiliyadi, ube nempumelelo; ngokuba uYehova uya kuyinikela esandleni sokumkani."
2Chronicles18:12 Umthunywa owayebize uMika wathetha kuye, wathi, Yabona, amazwi abaprofeti bemxhelo mnye ukumkani; Ilizwi lakho malibe njengenye yazo, uthethe kakuhle."
2Chronicles18:13 Wathi uMika, Ehleli nje uYehova, oko aya kukuthetha uThixo wam, ndothetha kona."
2Chronicles18:14 Wafika kukumkani; wathi ukumkani kuye, Mika, siye na eRamoti yaseGiliyadi ukuba silwe, ndiyishiye, kusini na? Wathi, Phuma, uphumelele, kwaye baya kunikelwa ezandleni zakho."
2Chronicles18:15 Wathi ukumkani kuye, Makube zizihlandlo ezingaphi na ndikucebisa, ukuba ungandixeleli nto, ingeyiyo nyaniso egameni likaYehova?"
2Chronicles18:16 Wathi, Ndibone amaSirayeli onke elusali ezintabeni, njengezimvu ezingenamalusi; Wathi uYehova, Abanankosi; mababuyele elowo endlwini yakhe enoxolo."
2Chronicles18:17 Wathi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli kuYehoshafati, Ndathi, Bendingakuxelelanga, ndathi, Akayi kuprofeta okulungileyo ngam, koprofeta okubi?"
2Chronicles18:18 Wathi, Liphulaphuleni ke ilizwi likaYehova; Ndayibona iNkosi ihleli etroneni yayo, isithi yonke imikhosi yezulu imi ngasekunene kwayo nangasekhohlo kwayo."
2Chronicles18:19 Wathi uYehova, Ngubani na oya kuhenda uAhabhi, ukumkani wamaSirayeli, ukuba enyuke aye abulawelwa eRamoti yaseGiliyadi? Omnye wathetha oku, omnye wathi leya."
2Chronicles18:20 Waphuma omnye umoya, wema phambi koYehova, wathi, Ndiya kumlinga. Wathi uYehova kuye: Ngoba?"
2Chronicles18:21 Wathi yena, Ndophuma ndiye, ndibe ngumoya wobuxoki emlonyeni wabaprofeti bakhe bonke. Wathi uYehova, Mcikide, woyise nawe; phuma uyekwenza."
2Chronicles18:22 Uyabona ke, uYehova ungenise umoya wobuxoki emlonyeni wabo baprofeti bakho; uthethe ngomsindo kaYehova ngani."
2Chronicles18:23 Wasondela uZedekiya, unyana kaKanan, wambetha uMika esidleleni, wathi, Ugqithe ngantoni na kum uMoya kaYehova, ukuba aye kuthetha kuwe?"
2Chronicles18:24 Wathi uMika, Yabona, ùya kuzimela egumbini elingaphakathi;"
2Chronicles18:25 Wathi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, Mthabathe uMika, umse kuAmon umphathi womzi, nakuYowashe unyana wokumkani;"
2Chronicles18:26 Wathi ukumkani, Yifakeni entolongweni le ndoda, niyinike isonka somvandedwa namanzi osizi, ndide ndibuye ndinoxolo."
2Chronicles18:27 Wathi uMika, Ukuba uthe wabuya unoxolo, woba uYehova akathethanga ngam. Wathi, Yivani, zintlanga zonke;"
2Chronicles18:28 Wenyuka ukumkani wakwaSirayeli noYehoshafati, ukumkani wakwaYuda, baya eRamoti yaseGiliyadi."
2Chronicles18:29 Wathi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli kuYehoshafati, Ndiya kuzenza mntu wumbi, ndingene ekulweni; kodwa nxibani iimpahla zenu. Wazenza mntu wumbi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli; baya emfazweni."
2Chronicles18:30 Ukumkani wakwa-Aram wabawisela umthetho abathetheli beenqwelo zokulwa ababenaye, wathi, Ize ningalwi nomncinane nomkhulu; ize ningalwi nokumkani wakwaSirayeli;"
2Chronicles18:31 Bambona uYehoshafati abathetheli beenqwelo zokulwa, bathi, Nanku ukumkani wakwaSirayeli; Bamhlasela, balwa naye. uYehoshafati wamphikisa; uYehova wamnceda, uYehova; waza uThixo wawagxotha kuye."
2Chronicles18:32 Kwathi, bakubona abathetheli beenqwelo zokulwa ukuba akanguye ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, babuya beza kumsukela."
2Chronicles18:33 Indoda yatola ngesaphetha ngento elukhuni, yambulala ukumkani wakwaSirayeli ekuhlanganeni kotolo kuba ndonzakele."
2Chronicles18:34 Ukulwa kwenyuka loo mini; ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wamisa enqwelweni yakhe kuma-Aram kwada kwahlwa; wathi lakutshona ilanga wafa.
2Chronicles19:1 Wabuya uYehoshafati ukumkani wakwaYuda, waya eYerusalem enoxolo, endlwini yakhe."
2Chronicles19:2 Waphuma uYehu, unyana kaHanani, imboni, esiya kumkhawulela, wathi kukumkani uYehoshafati, Uyabanceda na abangendawo, ubathande na abathiyi bakaYehova? ngenxa yoko bunifikele uburhalarhume, buphuma ebusweni bukaYehova."
2Chronicles19:3 Ke wena wafunyanwa izinto ezilungileyo, ngenxa enokuba wasusa amatyholo ezweni, wayijika intliziyo yakho ekumquqeleni uThixo."
2Chronicles19:4 uYehoshafati wahlala eYerusalem, wabuya waphuma, wabacanda abantu, ethabathela eBher-shebha wesa kweleentaba lakwaEfrayim, wababuyisela kuYehova, uThixo wooyise."
2Chronicles19:5 Wamisa abagwebi ezweni lonke, emizini yakwaYuda enqatyisiweyo, emizini ngemizi;"
2Chronicles19:6 Wathi kubagwebi, Kulumkeleni enikwenzayo; ngokuba anigwebi bantu, nigweba uYehova oniwe ekugwebeni."
2Chronicles19:7 Ke ngoko ukoyika uYehova kuya kuba phezu kwenu; Ziboneni ngokwenu, nenze; ngokuba kuYehova uThixo wethu akukho bubi, akukho kuthulula abantu, kungamkeli sicengo."
2Chronicles19:8 Ngaphezu koko, uYehoshafati wayinikela iYerusalem kubaLevi nakubabingeleli nakwiintloko zeentsapho zoonyana bakaSirayeli ngenxa yomgwebo kaYehova nembambano ekubuyeleni kwabo eYerusalem."
2Chronicles19:9 Wabawisela umthetho, wathi, Yenzani ngokoyika uYehova ngokunyanisekileyo, nangentliziyo epheleleyo."
2Chronicles19:10 Ngokuphathelele abazalwana benu, yenzani oku, ningoni."
2Chronicles19:11 Yabonani, umbingeleli omkhulu uAmariya uya kunilawula kuzo zonke iindawo zeNkosi; noZebhadiya unyana kaIshmayeli, umphathi wendlu yakwaYuda, kwimicimbi yonke yokumkani; nabaLevi boba nani. Yiba nesibindi, yaye uYehova uya kuba nolungileyo."
2Chronicles20:1 Emveni koko oonyana bakaMowabhi, noonyana baka-Amon, nabanye kunye nabo, ngaphandle koonyana baka-Amon, bamxabela uYehoshafati."
2Chronicles20:2 Beza ke abanye, bamxelela uYehoshafati, bathi, Uhlaselwa sisihlwele esikhulu, sivela phesheya kolwandle lwama-Aram; bona, abantu baseHadazon-tamare, oko kukuthi i-Engedi."
2Chronicles20:3 Woyika uYehoshafati waza wamkhangela uYehova, waza wavakalisa usuku lokuzila ukutya kulo lonke elakwaYuda."
2Chronicles20:4 Wahlanganisana ke amaYuda, efuna uncedo kuYehova; nasemizini yonke yakwaYuda beza kumquqela uYehova."
2Chronicles20:5 Wema uYehoshafati ebandleni lakwaYuda nelaseYerusalem, endlwini kaYehova, entendelezweni entsha;"
2Chronicles20:6 Wathi, Yehova, Thixo woobawo, asinguwe na onguThixo emazulwini? Asinguwe na olawula zonke izikumkani zeentlanga? Akukho mandla namandla esandleni sakho, akukho bani unokukuchasa?"
2Chronicles20:7 Asinguwe na uThixo wethu, owabagxothayo abemi beli lizwe phambi kwabantu bakho amaSirayeli waza walinika intsapho ka-Abraham umhlobo wakho ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo?"
2Chronicles20:8 Bahlala kulo, balakhela igama lakho ingcwele, besithi:"
2Chronicles20:9 Ukuba sithe sahlelwa sisihelegu esinjengekrele, nesigwebo, nokuba kukufa, ngendyikitya yokufa, nangendlala, sema phambi kwale ndlu naphambi kobuso bakho, (ngokuba likule ndlu igama lakho), ubize usiva ubunzima; wova, sincede."
2Chronicles20:10 Kaloku ke naba oonyana baka-Amon, namaMowabhi, neentaba zakwaSehire, owawungathandi ukuba babaxabele oonyana bakaSirayeli ekuphumeni kwabo ezweni laseYiputa, wabanikela umva, akwabatshabalalisa bona;"
2Chronicles20:11 Yabona, ndithi, baya kusibuyekeza ngokuza kusigxotha ebuncwaneni bakho osinikileyo, ukuba sibe lilifa."
2Chronicles20:12 Thixo wethu, akufuni ukubagweba na? kuba asinamandla okumelana nendimbane enkulu esiza nxamnye nathi; kwaye asazi ukuba senze ntoni na, kodwa amehlo ethu akuwe."
2Chronicles20:13 Ema ke onke amaYuda phambi koYehova, neentsana zawo, nabafazi bawo, nabantwana bawo."
2Chronicles20:14 uYahaziyeli unyana kaZekariya unyana kaBhenaya unyana kaYehiyeli unyana kaMataniya umLevi woonyana baka-Asafu wafikelwa ngumoya kaYehova, umoya kaYehova wawuphakathi kwebandla fika;"
2Chronicles20:15 Wathi, Yivani, nonke maYuda, nani bemi baseYerusalem, nawe kumkani Yehoshafati. Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Musani ukoyika, musani ukoyika, musani ukoyika ngenxa yale ngxokolo inje ukuba ninzi; ngokuba imfazwe asiyeyenu, yekaThixo."
2Chronicles20:16 Yihlani, niye kubabona ngomso; nabo benyuka baya eliweni likaSis; nobafumana ekupheleni komlambo, entlango yaseYeruweli."
2Chronicles20:17 Ize ningalwi eli dabi; yimani, yimani, nilubone usindiso lukaYehova onani, maYuda neYerusalem; musani ukoyika, musani ukoyika; Bahlaseleni ngomso, ngokuba uYehova unani."
2Chronicles20:18 Waqubuda uYehoshafati ngobuso, namaYuda onke nabemi baseYerusalem bawa phambi koYehova, baqubuda kuYehova."
2Chronicles20:19 Basuka bema abaLevi, koonyana bakaKehati, nakoonyana bakaKora, ukuba badumise uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ngezwi elikhulu."
2Chronicles20:20 Bavuka kusasa ngengomso, baya entlango yeTekowa; bakuba begqibile, wema uYehoshafati, wathi, Ndiphulaphuleni, nina maYuda, nani bemi baseYerusalem; Kholwani ngoYehova uThixo wenu, niya kuqiniseka; kholwani kubaprofeti bakhe, noba nempumelelo."
2Chronicles20:21 Uthe ke akuba ethethile ebantwini, wamisa iimvumi zozuko lukaYehova, ezidumisa uzuko lobungcwele, ukuba zihambe phambi kwamatyala, zisithi, Dumisani uYehova! Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
2Chronicles20:22 Yaye kwathi ekuqaliseni kwabo ukumemelela nokuzisola, uYehova wabeka iinkwenkwezi phezu koonyana baka-Amon, nakwaMowabhi, naphezu kweentaba zakwaSehire, ababeza kulwa noYuda; babethwa."
2Chronicles20:23 Oonyana baka-Amon namaMowabhi basukela phezulu kubemi bentaba yakwaSehire, ukuba babaqalekise, babatshabalalise;"
2Chronicles20:24 Akufika amaYuda emboniselweni esentlango, asikhangela eso sihlwele, abona ukuba zizidumbu, ziwe emhlabeni, kungekho usindileyo."
2Chronicles20:25 uYehoshafati nabantu bakhe beza kuphanga amaxhoba kubo, bafumana kubo ubutyebi obukhulu, nezidumbu, neempahla ezinqwenelekayo, bazithabathela kubo; ababa nakuhamba nabo; bachitha iintsuku ezintathu beqokelela amaxhoba, nto leyo eyayininzi kakhulu."
2Chronicles20:26 Ngosuku lwesine bahlanganisana entilini yaseBheraga; ngokuba babemnqula khona uYehova; ke ngoko, indawo leyo yathiywa ngokuba yiMoedi waBeraga kude kube namhlanje."
2Chronicles20:27 Abuya, onke amadoda akwaYuda nawaseYerusalem, ekhokelwa nguYehoshafati, ukuba abuyele eYerusalem evuya; ngokuba uYehova wabavuyisa ngenxa yeentshaba zabo."
2Chronicles20:28 Afika eYerusalem enemirhubhe, neehadi, namaxilongo, aya endlwini kaYehova."
2Chronicles20:29 Ukoyika uThixo kwabakho kubo bonke oorhulumente baloo mazwe bakuva ukuba uYehova ulwe neentshaba zikaSirayeli.
2Chronicles20:30 Bathi cwaka ke ubukumkani bukaYehoshafati, ngokuba uThixo wakhe ubemphumzile ngeenxa zonke."
2Chronicles20:31 uYehoshafati waye engukumkani kwaYuda; Ubeminyaka imashumi mathathu anamihlanu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emashumi mabini anamihlanu engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguAsubha, intombi kaSilehi."
2Chronicles20:32 Waqhubeka ehamba ngendlela kayise uAsa, akazange aphambuke ekwenzeni okulungileyo emehlweni kaYehova."
2Chronicles20:33 Ke iziganga azisuswanga; ngokuba abantu bebengayilungisanga intliziyo yabo kuThixo wooyise.
2Chronicles20:34 Ezinye izinto zikaYehoshafati, ezokuqala nezokugqibela, nanzo zibhaliwe encwadini kaYehu unyana kaHanani, ebhalwe encwadini yookumkani bakwaSirayeli."
2Chronicles20:35 Emva koko uYehoshafati, ukumkani wakwaYuda, wema noAhaziya, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, owayesenza ububi obukhulu."
2Chronicles20:36 Wazimanya naye ngokwenza iinqanawa eziya eTarshishe; benza iinqanawa eEsionbhere.
2Chronicles20:37 Waprofeta uEliyezere, unyana kaDodahu waseMaresha, kuYehoshafati, esithi, Ngokunamathela kwakho kuAhaziya, uyaphule uYehova imisebenzi yakho. Zaphuka ke iinqanawa ezo, azaba nako ukuya eTarshishe."
2Chronicles21:1 uYehoshafati walala kuyise, wangcwatyelwa kuyise, emzini kaDavide; unyana wakhe uYehoram waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Chronicles21:2 Wayenabazalwana bakhe, oonyana bakaYoshafati, uAzariya, noYehiyeli, noZekariya, noAzariya, noMikayeli, noShefatiya; bonke bephela babengoonyana bakaYehoshafati ukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
2Chronicles21:3 Uyise wabanika izipho ezininzi zesilivere nezegolide, nezinto ezinqwenelekayo, kwanemizi enqatyisiweyo kwaYuda; ke ubukumkani wabunika uYoram; ngokuba ebengowamazibulo."
2Chronicles21:4 Wesuka uYehoram ebukumkanini bukayise, wazomeleza, wababulala bonke abazalwana bakhe ngekrele, nezinye iinkosana zakwaSirayeli."
2Chronicles21:5 uYoram ubeminyaka imashumi mathathu anamibini ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka esibhozo engukumkani eYerusalem."
2Chronicles21:6 Waqhubeka ehamba ngendlela yookumkani bakwaSirayeli kanye njengoko yahambayo indlu ka-Ahabhi, ngenxa yokuba wayengumfazi wentombi ka-Ahabhi; yaye wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova."
2Chronicles21:7 Wala uYehova ukuyonakalisa indlu kaDavide, ngenxa yomnqophiso awawenzela uDavide, njengoko wathethayo, ukuba uya kumkhanyisela, yena noonyana bakhe, kude kuse ephakadeni."
2Chronicles21:8 Ngemihla yakhe amaEdom amvukela uYuda, azenzela ukumkani."
2Chronicles21:9 Wemka uYoram, nabathetheli bakhe, neenqwelo zakhe zonke zokulwa; wavuka ebusuku, wawabulala amaEdom awayemrhawule ngeenxa zonke, nabaqhubi beenqwelo zokulwa."
2Chronicles21:10 Akreqa ke amaEdom kumaYuda, unanamhla. Kwangelo xesha neLibhena yagwilika kuye; ngokuba umnikele umva uYehova, uThixo wooyise."
2Chronicles21:11 Ngaphezu koko, wenza iindawo eziphakamileyo ezintabeni zakwaYuda waza wabangela ukuba abemi baseYerusalem bakrexeze waza wamnyanzela uYuda ukuba enjenjalo."
2Chronicles21:12 Kwafika kuye incwadi yomprofeti uEliya, isithi, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaDavide uyihlo, ukuthi, Ngenxa enokuba ungahambanga ekhondweni likayihlo uYehoshafati, nangokuhamba ekhondweni lika-Asa ukumkani wakwaYuda hamba,"
2Chronicles21:13 Kodwa wena wahamba ngendlela yookumkani bakwaSirayeli waza wabangela ukuba uYuda nabemi baseYerusalem bahenyuze, njengamahenyukazi endlu ka-Ahabhi, yaye wababulala nabantakwenu bendlu kayihlo, ababelunge ngakumbi kunaye."
2Chronicles21:14 Yabona, uYehova uya kubavelela ngesijeziso esikhulu abantu bakho, nabantwana bakho, nabafazi bakho, nobutyebi bakho bonke;"
2Chronicles21:15 Kwaye uya kubanjwa isifo esikhulu ngokugula emathunjini akho, ade amathumbu akho aphume imihla ngemihla ngenxa yokugula."
2Chronicles21:16 Ngaphezu koko, uYehova wawuxhokonxa umoya wamaFilisti nama-Arabhu awayesondele kumaKushi ukuba ahlasele uYoram."
2Chronicles21:17 Enyuka ke aya kwaYuda, angena kulo, athabatha yonke impahla eyafumaneka endlwini yokumkani, noonyana bakhe, nabafazi bakhe; engashiyanga nyana wakhe, ngaphandle kukaYowakazi, oyena mncinane koonyana bakhe."
2Chronicles21:18 Emva kwako konke oku, uYehova wambetha isisu sakhe ngokufa okungenakuphiliswa."
2Chronicles21:19 Kwathi ke ekuhambeni kwexesha, ekupheleni kweminyaka emibini, amathumbu akhe aphuma ngaphandle ngenxa yesifo sakhe, apho wafa ngenxa yezifo ezibuhlungu. Yaye abantu bakhe abazange babase umlilo njengowookhokho bakhe."
2Chronicles21:20 Ubeminyaka imashumi mathathu anamibini ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka esibhozo engukumkani eYerusalem, engasweli nto. Bamngcwabela emzini kaDavide, kodwa akangcwatyelwa emangcwabeni ookumkani."
2Chronicles22:1 Abemi baseYerusalem bamenza ukumkani uAhaziya, unyana wakhe omncinane, esikhundleni sakhe; Ke uAhaziya, unyana kaYehoram, ukumkani wakwaYuda, waba ngukumkani."
2Chronicles22:2 uAhaziya ubeminyaka imashumi mane anamibini ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba namnyaka mnye engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguAtaliya, intombi kaOmri."
2Chronicles22:3 Naye wahamba ngendlela yendlu ka-Ahabhi, ngokuba unina ubengumcebisi wakhe, ukuba enze okubi."
2Chronicles22:4 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, njengabendlu ka-Ahabhi; ngokuba babengabacebisi bakhe bona emva kokufa kukayise, kwada kwawa."
2Chronicles22:5 Naye walithobela icebo labo, wahamba noYoram unyana ka-Ahabhi ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, baya kulwa noHazayeli ukumkani wakwa-Aram eRamoti yaseGiliyadi, yaye amaSiriya amoyisa uYoram."
2Chronicles22:6 Wabuyela eYizereli, ukuba anyangwe amanxeba awawafumana eRama, ekulweni kwakhe noHazayeli ukumkani wakwa-Aram. Wehla uAzariya unyana kaYoram, ukumkani wakwaYuda, waya kubona uYoram unyana ka-Ahabhi eYizereli, ngokuba ebesifa."
2Chronicles22:7 uThixo wamtshabalalisa uAhaziya ngokuza kwakhe kuYoram; ngenxa yokuba ekufikeni kwakhe waphuma noYehoram ukuya kuhlangabeza uYehu unyana kaNimshi, lowo uYehova wamthambisayo ukuba atshabalalise indlu ka-Ahabhi."
2Chronicles22:8 Xa uYehu wayengumgwebi wendlu ka-Ahabhi waza wafumana iinkosana zakwaYuda noonyana babantakwabo-Ahaziya ababekhonza uAhaziya, wababulala."
2Chronicles22:9 Wafuna uAhaziya, bambamba (ezimele kwaSamari), bamzisa kuYehu; bambulala, bamngcwaba; ngokuba besithi, Ngunyana kaYehoshafati, obemquqela uYehova ngentliziyo yakhe yonke. Ngoko abo bendlu ka-Ahaziya babengenawo amandla okuthomalalisa urhulumente."
2Chronicles22:10 Uthe uAtaliya unina ka-Ahaziya akubona ukuba unyana wakhe ufile, wesuka wasuka wayitshabalalisa yonke intsapho yasebukhosini yendlu yakwaYuda."
2Chronicles22:11 Ke uYobhati, intombi yokumkani, wamthabatha uYowashe, unyana ka-Ahaziya, wamba phakathi koonyana bokumkani ababulawayo, wammisa yena nomfana wakhe egumbini lokulala. uYehosati, intombi kaKumkani uYehoram, umfazi wombingeleli uYehoyada (kuba wayengudade boAhaziya) wamfihla kuAtaliya ukuze angambulali."
2Chronicles22:12 Wangcwatyelwa kubo endlwini kaThixo iminyaka emithandathu; ke uAtaliya walilawula ilizwe.
2Chronicles23:1 Ngomnyaka wesixhenxe, uYehoyada wazomeleza, wathabatha abathetheli-makhulu: ooAzariya unyana kaYeroham, noIshmayeli unyana kaYohanan, noAzariya unyana kaObhedi, noMahaseya unyana ka-Adaya, uElishafati, unyana kaSigri wenze umnqophiso naye."
2Chronicles23:2 Bawajikeleza ke amaYuda, babahlanganisa abaLevi emizini yonke yakwaYuda, neentloko zezindlu zooyise zooyise zakwaSirayeli, beza eYerusalem."
2Chronicles23:3 Lonke ibandla lenza umnqophiso nokumkani endlwini yoTHIXO oyinyaniso. Wathi kubo, Yabonani, unyana wokumkani uya kuba ngukumkani, njengoko wakuthethayo uYehova ngoonyana bakaDavide."
2Chronicles23:4 Nantsi into oya kuyenza; Isahlulo sesithathu kuni bangenayo ngesabatha, kubabingeleli nabaLevi, soba ngabagcini bamasango;"
2Chronicles23:5 nesahlulo sesithathu soba sendlwini yokumkani; esinye isahlulo sesithathu sibe sesangweni lesiseko, lize ibandla lonke libe sezintendelezweni zendlu kaYehova."
2Chronicles23:6 Ize kungangeni bani endlwini kaYehova, ngaphandle kwababingeleli nabakhonza njengabaLevi; bona bongena, ngokuba bangcwele; kodwa bonke abantu baya kuhlala belindile kuYehova."
2Chronicles23:7 AbaLevi bamrhawula ukumkani, elowo ephethe iintonga zakhe ngesandla; bonke abangena endlwini bobulawa; woba nokumkani ekungeneni kwakhe, nokuba uthe waphuma."
2Chronicles23:8 Benza ke abaLevi namaYuda onke njengako konke abewise umthetho ngako uYehoyada umbingeleli; ngokuba uYehoyada umbingeleli akamgxothanga izifundo.
2Chronicles23:9 Ngaphezu koko, umbingeleli uYehoyada wanikela iinkosana zemikhonto namakhaka nekhulu lamakhaka kaKumkani uDavide, awayesendlwini yoTHIXO oyinyaniso."
2Chronicles23:10 Wabambathisa bonke abantu, elowo ephethe iintonga zakhe esandleni sakhe, bethabathela kwelokunene lendlu besa kwelasekhohlo lendlu, malunga nesibingelelo nendlu, phambi kokumkani."
2Chronicles23:11 Bandula ke bamkhupha unyana kakumkani baza bamthwesa isithsaba baza bamnika ubungqina bamenza ukumkani. uYehoyada noonyana bakhe bamthambisa, bathi, uYehova makamsindise ukumkani."
2Chronicles23:12 Uthe uAtaliya akusiva isandi sokubaleka kwabantu, bedumisa ukumkani, weza ebantwini endlwini kaYehova."
2Chronicles23:13 Wakhangela, wambona ukumkani emi ngasetyeni lakhe lesikhumbuzo emnyango, nabathetheli nabavutheli-maxilongo benokumkani yaye njengoko babefundiswa ukucula iingoma zokudumisa. Waza uAtaliya wazikrazula iimpahla zakhe waza wathi: “Liqhinga, liqhinga eli!"
2Chronicles23:14 Yaye umbingeleli uYehoyada wabakhupha abathetheli abalikhulu ababephethe umkhosi waza wathi kubo: “Mkhupheni kweli lizwe! yaye nabani na omlandelayo makabulawe ekreleni ngokuba ethe umbingeleli, Musani ukumbulala endlwini kaYehova."
2Chronicles23:15 Bambamba ke; Ekufikeni kwakhe ekungeneni kwesango lamahashe endlwini yokumkani, bambulalela khona."
2Chronicles23:16 uYehoyada wenza umnqophiso phakathi kwakhe nohlanga luphela nokumkani, wokuba babe ngabantu bakaYehova."
2Chronicles23:17 Lwaya lonke uhlanga endlwini kaBhahali, lwayidiliza, nezibingelelo zakhe, nemifanekiso yakhe, lwambulala uMatan, umbingeleli kaBhahali, phambi kwezibingelelo."
2Chronicles23:18 uYehoyada wawumisa umsebenzi wendlu kaYehova ngesandla sababingeleli, abaLevi, awabahluthayo uDavide endlwini kaYehova, ukuba basondeze amadini anyukayo kaYehova, ngoko kubhaliweyo emyalelweni kaMoses; nangokuvuma iingoma, njengoko uDavide wawisayo umthetho."
2Chronicles23:19 Wabeka abagcini-masango emasangweni endlu kaYehova, ukuze kungangeni nabani na ongahlambulukanga nganto."
2Chronicles23:20 Wathabatha amakhulu abathetheli nezidwangube neerhuluneli zohlanga nabo bonke abantu belizwe waza wehla nokumkani wamsa endlwini kaYehova baza bangena ngeSango Eliphakamileyo ukuze bangene endlwini kakumkani baze babeke ukumkani ukumkani etroneni yobukumkani.
2Chronicles23:21 Bavuya bonke abantu belizwe, umzi wazola, bambulala uAtaliya ngekrele."
2Chronicles24:1 uYowashe ubeminyaka isixhenxe ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emashumi mane engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama likanina lalinguSibja waseBher-shebha."
2Chronicles24:2 uYowashe waqhubeka esenza okulungileyo emehlweni kaYehova yonke imihla kaYehoyada umbingeleli.
2Chronicles24:3 uYehoyada wamzekela abafazi ababini; wazala oonyana neentombi.
2Chronicles24:4 Emva koko uYowashe wemka ukuze ayakhe kwakhona indlu kaYehova.
2Chronicles24:5 Wababiza ababingeleli nabaLevi, wathi kubo: “Yiyani ezixekweni zakwaYuda, niqokelele imali kumaSirayeli onke, ukuze kulungiswe indlu yoThixo wenu unyaka nonyaka, niwukhawulezise lo mbandela. Kodwa abaLevi babengangxamanga."
2Chronicles24:6 Ukumkani wambiza uYehoyada umthetheli-waka, wathi kuye, Yini na ukuba ungatshongo kubaLevi, ukuba bazise iminikelo ephuma kwaYuda naseYerusalem, ngokomthetho kaMoses, umkhonzi kaYehova, nowebandla lakwaYuda? Sirayeli, ngaba uthini na kwintente yesingqino?"
2Chronicles24:7 Kuba oonyana baka-Ataliya, umfazi ongendawo, babeyidiliza indlu yoTHIXO oyinyaniso; bazinika ooBhahali zonke izipho ezingcwele zendlu kaYehova."
2Chronicles24:8 Ngokomlomo wokumkani, benza ityeya baza bayibeka ngaphandle kwesango lendlu kaYehova."
2Chronicles24:9 Bamemeza kulo lonke elakwaYuda naseYerusalem ukuba kuziswe kuYehova iminikelo uMoses, umkhonzi kaTHIXO oyinyaniso, phezu koonyana bakaSirayeli."
2Chronicles24:10 Zavuyisana zonke iinkosana nabantu bonke, bazisa, baphosa engxoweni, bada bagqiba."
2Chronicles24:11 Xa ingxowa-mali yayiziswe kukumkani ngesandla sabaLevi, yaye bakubona ukuba kukho imali eninzi, unobhala kakumkani nentloko yombingeleli omkhulu beza, bagalela engxoweni. Wayithatha wabuya nayo endlini yakhe. Ngoko benza oko yonke imihla kwaye baqokelela imali eninzi."
2Chronicles24:12 Ukumkani noYehoyada bawanikela kubasebenzi benkonzo yendlu kaYehova; beza neengcibi zamatye, neengcibi zemithi, ukuba ziyihlaziye indlu kaYehova, nesinyithi, nobhedu, zendlu kaYehova."
2Chronicles24:13 Basebenza ke abenzi bomsebenzi, wagqitywa ke umsebenzi ngabo, bayimisa indlu kaThixo, bayiqinisa."
2Chronicles24:14 Bakugqiba ke, bayizisa imali eseleyo phambi kokumkani noYehoyada, ekwenziwe ngayo iimpahla zendlu kaYehova, iimpahla zokulungiselela, nezokubingelela kunye, neenkamba, neempahla zegolide nezesilivere. Yaye aqhubeka ezisa iminikelo etshiswayo endlwini kaYehova yonke imihla kaYehoyada."
2Chronicles24:15 Ke uYehoyada wayeseleyingwevu, ehambisekile ebudaleni, wafa; ubeminyaka ilikhulu elinamanci mathathu ezelwe, ukufa kwakhe."
2Chronicles24:16 Bamngcwabela kwisiXeko sikaDavide phakathi kookumkani, ngenxa yokuba wenza okulungileyo kuSirayeli, kuThixo nakwindlu yakhe."
2Chronicles24:17 Emva kokufa kukaYehoyada, beza abathetheli bakwaYuda, baqubuda kukumkani. Wabaphulaphula ke ukumkani."
2Chronicles24:18 Bayinikela ikhosi indlu kaYehova, uThixo wooyise, bakhonza imithi engcwele noothixo. Afikelwa buburhalarhume amaYuda neYerusalem ngenxa yezikreqo zawo."
2Chronicles24:19 Wathuma abaprofeti kubo bokubabuyisela kuYehova; kwaye banikela ubungqina nxamnye nabo, kodwa abazange babaphulaphule."
2Chronicles24:20 uMoya kaThixo wamthi gqubuthu uZekariya, unyana wombingeleli uYehoyada, wema phambi kwabantu, wathi kubo, Kuthiwe ngenxa kaThixo, Yini na ukuba niyiphule imithetho kaYehova, nize ningabi nampumelelo? ngenxa yokuba nimshiyile uYehova, naye unilahlile."
2Chronicles24:21 Bamvukela baza bamgibisela ngamatye ngokomyalelo kakumkani entendelezweni yendlu kaYehova.
2Chronicles24:22 Ukumkani uYowashe akakukhumbulanga okulungileyo awakwenzayo uYehoyada kuye, wasuka wambulala unyana wakhe. Ekufeni kwakhe wathi, uYehova makakhangele, abuze kuye."
2Chronicles24:23 Ekupheleni komnyaka impi yama-Aram yamxabela, yeza kwaYuda naseYerusalem, yabatshabalalisa bonke abathetheli babantu ebantwini, yathinjwa yonke into yabo yalithumela kukumkani waseDamasko."
2Chronicles24:24 Ngokuba impi yama-Aram yeza inamadoda ambalwa; uYehova wanikela esandleni sawo impi eninzi kunene; ngokuba babemnike umva uYehova, uThixo wooyise. Bamgweba ke uYowashe."
2Chronicles24:25 Xa bamshiyayo (ngenxa yokuba bamshiya egula kakhulu), abakhonzi bakhe bamenzela iyelenqe ngenxa yegazi loonyana bombingeleli uYehoyada, bambulalela esingqengqelweni sakhe, wafa lowo ufileyo; bamngcwaba emzini kaDavide, kodwa abamngcwabelanga emangcwabeni ookumkani."
2Chronicles24:26 Babona ke abo babemenzela iyelenqe; noSabhadi, unyana kaShimehati, umAmon, noYozabhadi, unyana kaZimriti, umMowabhi."
2Chronicles24:27 Ke bona oonyana bakhe neempahla ezinkulu ezazithwalwe kuye, nokuhlaziywa kwendlu yoTHIXO oyinyaniso, nantso ibhaliwe ingxelo yencwadi yookumkani. uAmatsiya unyana wakhe walawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Chronicles25:1 uAmatsiya ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emashumi mabini anesibhozo yedwa eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguYodan waseYerusalem."
2Chronicles25:2 Wenza okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova, kodwa kungekhona ngentliziyo epheleleyo."
2Chronicles25:3 Bakuba buqinile ubukumkani kuye, wababulala abakhonzi bakhe abambulalayo ukumkani uyise."
2Chronicles25:4 Akababulalanga oonyana babo; wenza njengoko kubhaliweyo emyalelweni, encwadini kaMoses, apho uYehova wawisa umthetho, esithi, Aba yise mabangafe ngenxa yabantwana babo, mabangafe oonyana ngenxa yoonyana babo kodwa elowo uya kufa ngesakhe isono."
2Chronicles25:5 Ngaphezu koko, uAmatsiya wawahlanganisa ndawonye amaYuda waza wawamisela ukuba abe ngabaphathi bamawaka neentloko zamakhulu ngokwezindlu zooyise kulo lonke elakwaYuda nelakwaBhenjamin; amadoda, ekwazi ukuya emfazweni, enokuphatha umkhonto nekhaka."
2Chronicles25:6 Waqesha kumaSirayeli ikhulu lamawaka amagorha ngekhulu leetalente zesilivere.
2Chronicles25:7 Wafika umfo wakwaThixo kuye, wathi, Camagu, kumkani, musa ukuyivumela imikhosi yakwaSirayeli ihambe nawe; ngenxa yokuba uYehova akakho kuSirayeli, oko kukuthi kubo bonke oonyana bakaEfrayim."
2Chronicles25:8 Ke ukuba ùthanda ukuya, yiya yomelela edabini; uThixo woniwisa phambi kotshaba; ngokuba uThixo unamandla okunceda nawokubhukuqa."
2Chronicles25:9 Wandula ke uAmatsiya wathi kumfo wakwaThixo oyinyaniso: “Kodwa siya kuthini na ngekhulu leetalente endalinika umkhosi wakwaSirayeli? Waphendula umfo wakwaThixo, wathi, uYehova unako ukukunika okungaphezu koko."
2Chronicles25:10 uAmatsiya ke wayahlula impi leyo yayize kuye, ivela kwaEfrayim, ukuba ibuyele endaweni yayo; Bavutha ke umsindo wabo kwaYuda, baza babuyela ekhaya bevutha ngumsindo."
2Chronicles25:11 Yaye uAmatsiya wamomeleza waza wabakhokela abantu bakhe waphuma waya kwiNtlambo yeTyuwa waza wabulala ishumi lamawaka koonyana bakaSehire.
2Chronicles25:12 Amanye alishumi lamawaka awayesaphila, oonyana bakaYuda bathatyathelwa ekuthinjweni baza basiwa emqhokrweni wengxondorha baza babaphosa phantsi emqhokrweni wengxondorha, kangangokuba baqhekeka bonke."
2Chronicles25:13 Ke amagorha awawabuyisayo uAmatsiya ukuba angayi naye ekulweni, ayingenela imizi yakwaYuda, ethabathela kwaSamari, esa eBhete-horon, abulala kuyo amawaka amathathu, ayithimba iqashiso."
2Chronicles25:14 Xa uAmatsiya wabuyayo ekuxabeleni amaEdom, wazisa oothixo boonyana bakaSehire waza wabamisa baba ngoothixo bakhe waza waqubuda phambi kwabo waza wawunyusa umsi."
2Chronicles25:15 Wavutha ke umsindo kaYehova uAmatsiya, wathumela umprofeti kuye, wathi kuye, Ubuphi na oothixo babantu abangabahlangulanga abantu babo esandleni sakho?"
2Chronicles25:16 Esathetha naye, ukumkani wathi kuye, Ùphuma kukumkani na ngecebo? ibhere; yini na ukuba ubethwe? Wema lo mprofeti wathi: “Ndiyazi ukuba uThixo uzimisele ukukutshabalalisa, ngenxa yokuba ukwenzile oku, akwaliphulaphula icebiso lam."
2Chronicles25:17 uAmatsiya ukumkani wakwaYuda wacebisa, wathumela kuYowashe, unyana kaYehowahazi, unyana kaYehu, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, wathi, Yiza sibonane sikhangelane ubuso."
2Chronicles25:18 uYowashe ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wathumela kuAmatsiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, wathi, uTeshelo waseLebhanon wathumela eKedare waseLebhanon, wathi, Unyana wam mnike intombi yakho, abe ngumkakho; Yadlula irhamncwa laseLebhanon, wayinyathela emeveni."
2Chronicles25:19 Uthi, Yabona, uwoyisile amaEdom; nentliziyo yakho iphakamele eluzukweni; hlala ekhaya ngoku; Yini na ukuba ude ungene ebubini bakho, wena namaYuda kunye nawe?"
2Chronicles25:20 Akavuma ke uAmasiya ukuva; ngokuba kwakuphuma kuThixo ukubanikela esandleni seentshaba zabo, kuba babefuna oothixo bakwaEtom."
2Chronicles25:21 Wenyuka ke uYowashe ukumkani wakwaSirayeli; babonana ubuso ngobuso, yena noAmatsiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, eBhete-shemeshe yakwaYuda."
2Chronicles25:22 AmaYuda aqalisa ukuba nomsindo nxamnye namaSirayeli, yaye ngamnye wasaba waya ententeni yakhe."
2Chronicles25:23 uYowashe ukumkani wakwaSirayeli wamthabatha uAmatsiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, unyana kaYowashe, unyana kaYehowahazi, eBhete-shemeshe, wamzisa eYerusalem, waluqhekeza udonga lweYerusalem, esangweni lakwaEfrayim. Isango lembombo liziikubhite ezimakhulu mane."
2Chronicles25:24 Wayithabatha yonke igolide nesilivere nezixhobo zonke ezafunyanwayo endlwini yoTHIXO oyinyaniso kuObhedi-edom nobuncwane bendlu kakumkani namabanjwa, waza wabuyela kwaSamari."
2Chronicles25:25 uAmatsiya, unyana kaYowashe, ukumkani wakwaYuda, wahlala iminyaka elishumi elinesihlanu emva kokufa kukaYowashe, unyana kaYehowahazi, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
2Chronicles25:26 Ezinye izinto zika-Amatsiya, ezokuqala nezokugqibela, azibhalwanga na encwadini yookumkani bakwaYuda nabakwaSirayeli?"
2Chronicles25:27 Ke kaloku, emveni kwexesha awatyeka ngalo uAmatsiya kuYehova, bamceba eYerusalem; wabalekela eLagishe, bathumela eLagishe, bambulalela khona."
2Chronicles25:28 Bamthwala ngamahashe, bamngcwabela nooyise emzini wakwaYuda."
2Chronicles26:1 Bonke abantu bakwaYuda bamthabatha u-Uziya, akubon’ ukuba uminyaka ilishumi linamithandathu ezelwe, bamenza ukumkani esikhundleni sika-Amatsiya uyise."
2Chronicles26:2 Nguye owakha iEloti, wayibuyisela kwaYuda emva kokulala kokumkani kooyise."
2Chronicles26:3 U-Uziya ubeminyaka ilishumi elinamithandathu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emashumi mahlanu anamibini engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguYekoliya waseYerusalem."
2Chronicles26:4 Wenza okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova, njengoko wenzayo uyise uAmatsiya."
2Chronicles26:5 Wayemlindile uThixo ngemihla kaZekariya, obenengqondo emehlweni kaThixo; yaye ekumfuneni kwakhe uYehova, uThixo wanempumelelo."
2Chronicles26:6 Waphuma waya kulwa namaFilisti waza waludiliza udonga lwaseGati udonga lwaseYabhen nodonga lwaseAshdode waza wakha izixeko macala onke eAshdode naphakathi kwamaFilisti.
2Chronicles26:7 uThixo wamncedisa kumaFilisti, nakuma-Arabhi, abehleli eGurbhahali, nakumaMehun."
2Chronicles26:8 Yaye oonyana baka-Amoni banikela izipho ku-Uziya, yaye igama lakhe lasasazeka ukuya kufikelela naphakathi kweYiputa; ngokuba wazenza nzima kakhulu."
2Chronicles26:9 U-Uziya wakha iinqaba ezinde eYerusalem kwiSango leKona nakwiSango leNtili nakwimbombo yodonga, wayiqinisa."
2Chronicles26:10 Kananjalo wakha iinqaba ezinde entlango, wemba amaqula amaninzi; nabalimi nabasebenzi bezidiliya ezintabeni naseKarmele, ngokuba ebethanda ukulima."
2Chronicles26:11 Ngaphezu koko, u-Uziya wayenomkhosi wamajoni awayesiya emfazweni ngokwamaqela eenkundla, ngokwenani lengxelo yawo uYehiyeli unobhala nenkokeli uMahaseya phantsi kolwalathiso lukaHananiya igosa likakumkani."
2Chronicles26:12 Inani leentloko zezindlu zamagorha laba ngamawaka amabini anamakhulu amathandathu.
2Chronicles26:13 Phantsi kwawo yayingamakhulu amathathu anesixhenxe amawaka, anamakhulu mahlanu amawaka, amadoda anamandla, ukuze ancede ukumkani elutshabeni."
2Chronicles26:14 U-Uziya wawulungisela umkhosi wonke iingweletshetshe, nezikhali, nezigcina-ntloko, namahashe, nezaphetha, nezisawuli."
2Chronicles26:15 Wenza omatshini eYerusalem, aqingqwe ziingqondi, zaba phezu kweenqaba ezinde nasezindongeni, kukho iintolo namatye amakhulu. Laduma igama lakhe; kuba wancedwa ngendlela emangalisayo wada womelela."
2Chronicles26:16 Uthe ke akomelela, yaqhayisela intliziyo yakhe ngobubi; ngenxa yokuba wona kuYehova uThixo wakhe waza wangena etempileni kaYehova ukuze atshise isiqhumiso esibingelelweni sesiqhumiso."
2Chronicles26:17 Kwangena emva kwakhe umbingeleli uAsariya, enamashumi asibhozo ababingeleli bakaYehova, amadoda anobukroti."
2Chronicles26:18 Bamchasa ukumkani u-Uziya, bathi kuye, Uziya, akakho emandleni akho ukwenzela uYehova isiqhumiso; kokwababingeleli, oonyana baka-Aron, abanyuliweyo ukuba baqhumisele; ngokuba wenze ubumenemene; yaye akuyi kuba yindumiso kaYehova uThixo."
2Chronicles26:19 Wacaphuka u-Uziya, yaye esandleni sakhe wayephethe imbiza yesiqhumiso ukuze akhuphe isiqhumiso; ngoxa wayenomsindo kubabingeleli, kwavela iqhenqa ebunzi phambi kwababingeleli endlwini kaYehova, ngasesibingelelweni sesiqhumiso."
2Chronicles26:20 uAsriya umbingeleli omkhulu nababingeleli bonke bekhangele kuye, babona ukuba uneqhenqa ebunzi, bamndulula ke; naye wakhawuleza wemka, ngokuba uYehova ubemkhaliphile."
2Chronicles26:21 Ukumkani uOsiya ubeneqhenqa, kwada kwayimini yokufa kwakhe, wahlala ezindlwini ngezindlu, ngenxa yokuba ebeneqhenqa; unyana wakhe uYotham wayephethe indlu kakumkani yaye egweba abantu belizwe."
2Chronicles26:22 Ezinye izinto zika-Osiya, ezokuqala nezokugqibela, zazibhalwe nguIsaya unyana ka-Amos, umprofeti."
2Chronicles26:23 U-Uziya walala kooyise; bamngcwabela yena nookhokho bakhe engcwabeni lookumkani ngokuba bathi, Uneqhenqa; uYotam, unyana wakhe, waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe."
2Chronicles27:1 uYotam ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka elishumi elinamithandathu engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguYerusha, intombi kaTsadoki."
2Chronicles27:2 Wenza okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova, njengoko wenza ngako u-Uziya uyise; ke akangena etempileni kaYehova. Kwaye abantu basenokonakala."
2Chronicles27:3 Wakha isango eliphakamileyo lendlu kaYehova, eludongeni lweOfeli waba zininzi."
2Chronicles27:4 Wakha nemizi kweleentaba lakwaYuda, nasemahlathini wakha iinqaba neemboniselo."
2Chronicles27:5 Wabuya walwa nokumkani woonyana baka-Amon, waboyisa. Oonyana baka-Amon bamnika ngaloo nyaka ikhulu leetalente zesilivere, neshumi lamawaka ezithungu zengqolowa, neshumi lamawaka erhasi. Oonyana baka-Amon bamnika kwaloo nto ngomnyaka wesibini nowesithathu."
2Chronicles27:6 Wazomeleza uYotam, ngokuba wayeziqinise iindlela zakhe phambi koYehova uThixo wakhe."
2Chronicles27:7 Ezinye izinto zikaYotam, neemfazwe zakhe zonke, neendlela zakhe, zibhaliwe encwadini yookumkani bakwaSirayeli nabakwaYuda."
2Chronicles27:8 Ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka elishumi elinamithandathu engukumkani eYerusalem."
2Chronicles27:9 uYotam walala kooyise, wangcwatyelwa emzini kaDavide; unyana wakhe uAhazi walawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Chronicles28:1 uAhazi ubeminyaka imashumi mabini ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka elishumi elinamithandathu engukumkani eYerusalem kodwa akazange enze okulungileyo emehlweni kaYehova njengoDavide uyise."
2Chronicles28:2 Wahamba ngendlela yookumkani bakwaSirayeli waza waphinda wenzela ooBhahali imifanekiso etyhidiweyo.
2Chronicles28:3 Ngaphezu koko, wanyusa umsi kwintlambo yonyana kaHinom waza wabatshisa oonyana bakhe ngomlilo, ngokwezinto ezicekisekayo zeentlanga ezo uYehova wazigxothayo phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
2Chronicles28:4 Yaye wenza umbingelelo waza wawunyusa umsi kwiindawo eziphakamileyo nasezindulini naphantsi kwayo yonke imithi eluhlaza.
2Chronicles28:5 uYehova, uThixo wakhe, wamnikela esandleni sokumkani wakwa-Aram; bameyisa, bathimba into eninzi yabathinjwa, babasa eDamasko. Waphinda wanikelwa esandleni sokumkani wakwaSirayeli, wamxabela ngogonyamelo olukhulu."
2Chronicles28:6 uPeka unyana kaRemaliya wabulala kumaYuda ikhulu elinamanci amabini lamawaka ngamini-nye, bonke bengamadoda anobukroti; ngokuba bamcekisile uYehova, uThixo wooyise."
2Chronicles28:7 uSigri, igorha lakwaEfrayim, wabulala uMahaseya unyana wokumkani, noAsrikam umphathi wendlu yakhe, noElikana ongene esikhundleni sikakumkani."
2Chronicles28:8 Oonyana bakaSirayeli bathimba abafazi abangamakhulu amabini amawaka, oonyana neentombi zabazalwana babo, babaphanga amaxhoba amaninzi, bawazisa amaxhoba lawo kwaSamari."
2Chronicles28:9 Ke bekukho umprofeti kaYehova, ogama linguOdedi; Wagqithela kwizintlu ezifike kwaSamari, wathi kubo, Yabonani, ngenxa enokuba uYehova, uThixo wooyihlo, ebenoburhalarhume kumaYuda, wawanikela esandleni senu, niwabulala ngomsindo omkhulu ifikelela esibhakabhakeni."
2Chronicles28:10 Kaloku ke, niza kuhlala phakathi koonyana bakaYuda naseYerusalem, nibe ngamakhoboka namakhobokazana; kodwa akukho namnye phakathi kwenu owonayo kuYehova uThixo wenu?"
2Chronicles28:11 Phulaphulani ke ngoku, nize nibahlangule abathinjwa enibathabathileyo kubazalwana benu, ngenxa yokuba uYehova uniqumbele."
2Chronicles28:12 Kwesuka ke kwizikhulu zoonyana bakaEfrayim, uAzariya unyana kaYohanan, noBherekiya unyana kaMeshilemoti, noIshkiya unyana kaShalum, noAmasa unyana kaHadlayi, emfazweni;"
2Chronicles28:13 Wathi kubo, Ningabazisi amabanjwa apha; ngokuba, noko sonile kuYehova, uya kuzandisa izono zethu nezikreqo zethu; kuba ukunxaxha kwethu kukhulu yaye kukho umsindo ovuthayo nxamnye noSirayeli."
2Chronicles28:14 Abaxhobileyo babandulula abathinjwa namaxhoba, baye kumabamba nebandla lonke."
2Chronicles28:15 Asuka ke amadoda abizwa ngamagama, ababamba ababanjiweyo, ababambathisa bonke ababehamba ze phakathi kwabo, abanxiba, abanxiba iimbadada, abapha ukuba badle, basele, babathambise, baphilise bonke abaswele amandla idizili, yeza nazo baya kubazalwana babo eYeriko, umzi wamasundu; emva koko babuyela kwaSamari."
2Chronicles28:16 Ngelo xesha uKumkani uAhazi wathumela umyalezo kookumkani baseAsiriya ukuba bamncede.
2Chronicles28:17 Abuya ke amaEdom, amoyisa uYuda, athimba abathinjwa."
2Chronicles28:18 AmaFilisti azixabela izixeko ezisezintabeni nezisemzantsi zakwaYuda aza ayithimba iBhete-shemeshe neAyalon neGederoti neSogo namagxamesi ayo neTimna needolophana zayo neGimzo needolophana zayo kwaye bahlala khona.
2Chronicles28:19 Ngokuba uYehova wawathoba amaYuda ngenxa ka-Ahazi, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli; kuba wamphanga uYuda waza wona kakhulu kuYehova."
2Chronicles28:20 Wandula ke uTilegati-pilezere ukumkani waseAsiriya weza kuye waza wamkhwankqisa, kodwa akazange amomeleze."
2Chronicles28:21 Kuba uAhazi wathabatha inxalenye yendlu kaYehova, neyendlu yokumkani, neyobathetheli, wayinika ukumkani waseAsiriya;"
2Chronicles28:22 Ekubandezelekeni kwakhe waqhubeka esona ngakumbi kuYehova;
2Chronicles28:23 Wabingelela kwizithixo zaseDamasko ezimeyisileyo, wathi, Izithixo zookumkani bama-Aram ziyanceda, ndobingelela ngazo, zindincede mna. Kwaba yintlekele kuye nakumaSirayeli onke."
2Chronicles28:24 uAhazi waziqokelela zonke izitya zendlu yoTHIXO oyinyaniso waza waziqhekeza iimpahla zendlu yoTHIXO oyinyaniso, wazivala iingcango zendlu kaYehova waza wazenzela izibingelelo kuzo zonke iimbombo zeYerusalem."
2Chronicles28:25 Kwimizi yonke yakwaYuda wenza iziganga zokutshisa thixo bambi; wamqumbisa uYehova uThixo wooyise.
2Chronicles28:26 Ezinye izinto zakhe, neendlela zakhe, ezokuqala nezokugqibela, nanzo zibhaliwe encwadini yookumkani bakwaYuda nabakwaSirayeli."
2Chronicles28:27 Walala uAhazi kooyise, bamngcwabela emzini oyiYerusalem; abamsa emangcwabeni ookumkani bakwaSirayeli; uHezekiya unyana wakhe waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Chronicles29:1 uHezekiya ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu engukumkani; waba neminyaka emashumi mabini anesibhozo engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguAbhiya, intombi kaZekariya."
2Chronicles29:2 Wenza okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova, njengoko wenzayo uDavide uyise."
2Chronicles29:3 Ngomnyaka wokuqala wobukumkani bakhe, ngenyanga yokuqala, wazivula iingcango zendlu kaYehova, wayilungisa."
2Chronicles29:4 Wabasondeza ababingeleli nabaLevi, wabahlanganisa entendelezweni yasempumalanga."
2Chronicles29:5 Wathi kubo, Ndiphulaphuleni, baLevi, zingcwaliseni, yingcwaliseni indlu kaYehova, uThixo wooyihlo, nikususe ubunqambi bengcwele."
2Chronicles29:6 Kuba oobawo benza ngokungathembeki baza benza okubi emehlweni kaYehova uThixo wethu, baza bamfulathela baza babususa ubuso babo emnqubeni kaYehova baza bajika."
2Chronicles29:7 Bazitshixa iingcango zevaranda baza bazicima izibane, abazange baqhumisele ngesiqhumiso, yaye abazange banikele iminikelo etshiswayo kuThixo kaSirayeli engcweleni."
2Chronicles29:8 Ngoko ke wafikelwa yingqumbo kaNdikhoyo phezu koJuda neJerusalem, waza wawanikela ukuba athuthuzeleke, akhwankqiswe, abe sisigculelo, njengoko nikubonayo ngamehlo enu."
2Chronicles29:9 Yabona, abazalwana bethu bawile likrele, oonyana bethu neentombi zethu nabafazi bethu basekuthinjweni ngenxa yoko."
2Chronicles29:10 Ngoku ke makhe ndenze umnqophiso noYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuze abuye kuthi umsindo wakhe."
2Chronicles29:11 Bonyana bam, musani ukuncama ngoku; ngokuba uYehova uninyule, ukuze nime phambi kwakhe, nimkhonze, nimkhonze, kuphume umsi."
2Chronicles29:12 Basuka bema abaLevi, ooMahati unyana ka-Amasayi, noYoweli unyana ka-Azariya, koonyana bakaKehati; koonyana bakaMerari nguKishe unyana ka-Abhedi, noAsariya unyana kaYehaleli, nakumaGershon; uYowa, unyana kaSima, noEden, unyana kaYowa;"
2Chronicles29:13 koonyana bakaElishafan; uZimri noYehiyeli; nakoonyana baka-Asafu; uZekariya noMataniya:
2Chronicles29:14 koonyana bakaHeman; uYehiyeli noShimehi; nakoonyana bakaYedutun; uShemaya noUziyeli.
2Chronicles29:15 Babahlanganisa ke abazalwana babo, babangcwalisa, beza ngokomyalelo wokumkani ngokwelizwi likaYehova, ukuyihlambulula indlu kaYehova."
2Chronicles29:16 Ababingeleli bangena endlwini kaYehova ukuze bayihlambulule, baza bazisa konke ukungcola ababekufumana etempileni kaYehova entendelezweni yendlu kaYehova. Bazithabatha ke abaLevi, babasa ngaphandle komlanjana oyiKidron."
2Chronicles29:17 Bangcwalisa ngomhla wokuqala wenyanga yokuqala, baza ngomhla wesibhozo wenyanga leyo bafika evarandeni kaYehova; yaye bayingcwalisa indlu kaYehova iintsuku ezisibhozo; bagqiba ngomhla weshumi elinesithandathu wenyanga yokuqala."
2Chronicles29:18 Baya kukumkani uHezekiya, bathi, Siyihlambulule indlu kaYehova yonke, nesibingelelo somnikelo onyukayo, nemisebenzi yayo yonke, netafile yezonka zokubonisa, nemisebenzi yayo yonke."
2Chronicles29:19 Ngaphezu koko, sizilungisile saza sazingcwalisa zonke izixhobo awazilahlwayo uKumkani uAhazi ebudeni bolawulo lwakhe ngenxa yobugwenxa bakhe, yaye, khangelani, ziphambi kwesibingelelo sikaYehova."
2Chronicles29:20 Wavuka ukumkani uHezekiya kusasa, wahlanganisa abathetheli besixeko, wenyuka waya endlwini kaYehova."
2Chronicles29:21 Bazisa iinkunzi zeenkomo zasixhenxe, neenkunzi zeegusha zasixhenxe, neemvana zasixhenxe, neenciniba zasixhenxe, ukuba zibe lidini lesono ngenxa yobukumkani, nangenxa yendawo engcwele, nangenxa yamaYuda. Wabawisela umthetho ababingeleli, oonyana baka-Aron, ukuba bababulalele esibingelelweni sikaYehova."
2Chronicles29:22 Bazixhela iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo, balithabatha ababingeleli igazi, bafefa ngalo esibingelelweni; bekunjalo, emva kokuxhelela iinkunzi zezimvu, balitshiza igazi esibingelelweni; baxhela neemvana, balitshiza igazi esibingelelweni isibingelelo."
2Chronicles29:23 Bandula ke bazizisa izikhova phambi kokumkani nebandla; bababeka izandla.
2Chronicles29:24 Bazixhela ababingeleli, baza bacamagushela ngegazi lazo esibingelelweni ukuze bagubungele izono zabo bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli; ngokuba ukumkani wayewise umthetho wokuba kwenziwe amadini anyukayo nedini lesono ngenxa yamaSirayeli onke."
2Chronicles29:25 Wabamisa abaLevi endlwini kaYehova bephethe amacangci iihadi neehadi, ngokomyalelo kaDavide noGadi imboni kakumkani nomprofeti uNatan; ngokuba bekunjalo ngomthetho kaYehova ngomthetho wakhe abaprofeti."
2Chronicles29:26 Bema abaLevi beneempahla zikaDavide, ababingeleli benamaxilongo."
2Chronicles29:27 Wathi uHezekiya, makuziswe idini elinyukayo esibingelelweni; Ekuqalisweni komnikelo otshiswayo, ingoma kaYehova yaqalisa ngamaxilongo nezixhobo ezazibekwe nguDavide ukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
2Chronicles29:28 Laguqa lonke ibandla, iimvumi zivuma, amaxilongo avuthela; Kwenziwa oko konke lada lagqitywa idini elinyukayo."
2Chronicles29:29 Bakugqiba ukubingelela, ukumkani nabo bonke ababenaye baguqa baqubuda."
2Chronicles29:30 Ngaphezu koko, ukumkani uHezekiya nabathetheli babayalela abaLevi ukuba bavume kuYehova amazwi kaDavide noAsafu imboni. Bavuma iingoma zokudumisa, benovuyo, bathoba iintloko zabo, baqubuda."
2Chronicles29:31 Waphendula uHezekiya, wathi, Zinikele kuYehova ngoku; sondela, uzise imibingelelo neyombulelo endlwini kaYehova. Ibandla lazisa imibingelelo neyombulelo; bonke abantliziyo ziqhutywa yintliziyo, mabawenze amadini anyukayo."
2Chronicles29:32 Inani lamadini anyukayo elawazisayo ibandla, lalingamashumi amathandathu eenkomo, nekhulu leenkunzi zeegusha, namakhulu amabini eemvana; Elo lonke lidini elinyukayo likaYehova."
2Chronicles29:33 Izinto ezingcwele zazingamakhulu amathandathu eenkomo, namawaka amathathu empahla emfutshane."
2Chronicles29:34 Ke ababingeleli babephelelwe, ababa nakuwawisa onke amadini anyukayo; bancedisa abazalwana babo abaLevi, ude ugqitywe umsebenzi, bade bazihlambulule ababingeleli; ngokuba abaLevi babentliziyo iqinile ekwenzeni izithembiso zabo ngaphezu kwababingeleli."
2Chronicles29:35 Yaye imibingelelo etshiswayo yaba mininzi, kwanamanqatha emibingelelo yombulelo neminikelo ethululwayo yawo wonke umnikelo otshiswayo. Inkonzo yendlu kaYehova yayalelwa ngolo hlobo."
2Chronicles29:36 uHezekiya nabo bonke abantu bonwabile xa uYehova elulungisa uhlanga, kuba loo nto yenzeka ngequbuliso."
2Chronicles30:1 Wathumela uHezekiya kuwo onke amaSirayeli namaYuda, wabhala iincwadi eziya kumaEfrayim namaManase, ukuba kuziwe endlwini kaYehova eYerusalem, kwenziwe ipasika kaYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli."
2Chronicles30:2 Ukumkani nabathetheli bakhe nebandla lonke eYerusalem baceba ukwenza ipasika ngeyesibini inyanga.
2Chronicles30:3 Kuba babengenakukwenza oko ngelo xesha, ngenxa yokuba ababingeleli babengazingcwalisanga ngokwaneleyo, nabantu abazange bahlanganisane eYerusalem."
2Chronicles30:4 Loo nto yalunga emehlweni okumkani, nasemehlweni ebandla lonke."
2Chronicles30:5 Bawisa umthetho, bandulula ukuba bandulule ilizwi koonyana bakaSirayeli, kuthabathele eBher-shebha, kuse kwaDan, beze kumenzele ipasika uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli eYerusalem; ngokuba yayiseyimihla yamandulo ukwenziwa ipasika kwenziwa ibhaliwe."
2Chronicles30:6 Bahamba abathetheli neencwadi zokumkani nezabathetheli bakhe, kulo lonke ilizwe lakwaSirayeli nelakwaYuda, nangokwelizwi lokumkani, elithi, Bonyana bakaSirayeli, buyelani kuYehova, uThixo ka-Abraham, kaIsake, kaSirayeli, endinidalileyo uya kubuyela kumasalela akho, abasindileyo esandleni sookumkani baseAsiriya."
2Chronicles30:7 Musani ukuba njengooyihlo nanjengabazalwana benu abona uYehova uThixo wookhokho babo, owabanika imfumba yamanxuwa, njengani."
2Chronicles30:8 Musani ukuba lukhuni ngokokwenza ooyihlo; yibani kuYehova, ningene engcweleni yakhe, ayingcwalisayo kude kuse ephakadeni, nimkhonze uYehova uThixo wenu, kubuye kuni ukuvutha komsindo wakhe."
2Chronicles30:9 Kuba, ukuba nithe naguquka kuYehova, abazalwana benu nabantwana benu bofumana inceba phambi kwabo bathimbe, babuyele kweli lizwe; ngokuba unemfesane, unemfesane uYehova uThixo wenu, wonibuyisa, ukuba nibuyele kuye."
2Chronicles30:10 Amanani ahamba ukusuka kwesinye isixeko, aye kwesinye, elizweni lakwaEfrayim nelakwaManase, kwesa kwaZebhulon;"
2Chronicles30:11 Bazithoba oonyana baka-Ashere nabakwaManase nakwaZebhulon, beza eYerusalem."
2Chronicles30:12 Kananjalo isandla sikaThixo sasikho kwaYuda, ukuba abanike ntliziyo-nye yokwenza umthetho wokumkani nabathetheli, ngokwelizwi likaYehova."
2Chronicles30:13 Kwahlanganisana eYerusalem abantu abaninzi, ukuze benze umthendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele ngenyanga yesibini, balibandla elikhulu kunene."
2Chronicles30:14 Besuka bema, bazisusa izibingelelo eziseYerusalem, bazisusa zonke izibingelelo zeziqhumiso, baziphosa entilini yomlambo waseKidron."
2Chronicles30:15 Bandula ke benza ipasika ngosuku lweshumi elinesine lwenyanga yesibini, yaye ababingeleli nabaLevi baba neentloni baza bazingcwalisa, bawazisa amadini anyukayo endlwini kaYehova."
2Chronicles30:16 Baqhubeka bemi endaweni yabo ngokwesiko labo, ngokomthetho kaMoses, umntu kaTHIXO oyinyaniso;"
2Chronicles30:17 Ngokuba babebaninzi ebandleni ababengangcwaliswanga; Ngoko ke abaLevi babephethe bonke ababengahlambulukanga ngePasika, ukuze bangcwaliswe uYehova."
2Chronicles30:18 Kuba inkitha yabantu, abaninzi bakwaEfrayim nakwaManase, kwaIsakare nakwaZebhulon, abazange bazihlambulule, kodwa bayidla ipasika ngokuchasene noko kubhaliweyo. Kodwa uHezekiya wabathandazela, esithi, uYehova olungileyo uxolela bonke abantu;"
2Chronicles30:19 oyibhekise intliziyo yakhe ekumquqeleni uThixo uYehova, uThixo wooyise, nakuba kungengokwentlambululo yendawo engcwele."
2Chronicles30:20 uYehova wamphulaphula uHezekiya waza wabaphilisa abantu.
2Chronicles30:21 Oonyana bakaSirayeli ababeseYerusalem benza umthendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele imihla yasixhenxe, bevuya kakhulu;"
2Chronicles30:22 Wathi uHezekiya kubaLevi bonke, ababekuqondile ukumazi kakuhle uYehova, wabathuthuzela; yaye ebudeni bomthendeleko badla iintsuku ezisixhenxe baze banikele imibingelelo yombulelo baze bavume izono zabo kuYehova uThixo wooyise."
2Chronicles30:23 Ibandla lonke laceba ukubhiyozela ezinye iintsuku ezisixhenxe, baza babhiyozela ezinye iintsuku ezisixhenxe ngovuyo."
2Chronicles30:24 Ngokuba uHezekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda walirhumela ibandla iwaka leenkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo, namawaka asixhenxe empahla emfutshane; Izikhulu zalirhumela ibandla iwaka leenkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo, namawaka alishumi empahla emfutshane, bangcwalisa ababingeleli abaninzi."
2Chronicles30:25 Lavuya lonke ibandla lakwaYuda, nababingeleli, nabaLevi, nebandla lonke elavela kwaSirayeli, nabasemzini, bevela ezweni lakwaSirayeli, nababehleli kwaYuda."
2Chronicles30:26 Kwabakho uvuyo olukhulu eYerusalem, ngenxa yokuba ukususela ngemihla kaSolomon unyana kaDavide ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, akuzange kubekho into enjengale eYerusalem."
2Chronicles30:27 Besuka bema ababingeleli babaLevi, babasikelela abantu; lavakala ilizwi labo, wenyuka nomthandazo wabo waya endaweni yakhe engcwele emazulwini."
2Chronicles31:1 Kwathi ke konke oko kwenziwe, aphuma onke amaSirayeli abekhona, aya emizini yakwaYuda, aziqhekeza izimiso zamatye, azigawula imithi, azidiliza izibingelelo nezibingelelo kumaYuda onke nakwaBhenjamin, ezweni lakwaEfrayim noManase kwakhona, bada babaqalekisa bonke. Babuyela ke bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli emizini yabo, elowo elifeni lakhe."
2Chronicles31:2 uHezekiya wawamisa amaqela ababingeleli nabaLevi ngokwamaqela abo, ngalinye ngokwenkonzo yalo, ababingeleli nabaLevi njengeminikelo etshiswayo neyombulelo, ukuze balungiselele, badumise nokudumisa eminyango yeentente Zesibini. Nkosi."
2Chronicles31:3 Kwakhona, wanyula inxalenye yempahla kakumkani ukuze ibe yiminikelo etshiswayo, iminikelo etshiswayo yakusasa neyangokuhlwa neminikelo etshiswayo yeesabatha neyokuthwasa kwenyanga neyemithendeleko, kanye njengoko kubhaliwe emthethweni kaYehova."
2Chronicles31:4 Ngaphezu koko, wayalela abantu baseYerusalem ukuba banikele isabelo sababingeleli nabaLevi, ukuze baqine emthethweni kaYehova."
2Chronicles31:5 Yaye kwathi kamsinya nje ekuphumeni kwalo myalelo oonyana bakaSirayeli bazisa intlahlela yengqolowa, iwayini neoli nobusi nentabalala yazo zonke iziqhamo zelizwe; saye saphuphuma isishumi sezinto zonke."
2Chronicles31:6 Oonyana bakaSirayeli nabakwaYuda ababehlala kwizixeko zakwaYuda nabo bazisa isishumi seenkomo nesezimvu nesishumi sezinto ezingcwele ezazinyulelwe uYehova uThixo wabo baza baziqokelela zaba ziimfumba.
2Chronicles31:7 Baqala ngenyanga yesithathu ukuzenza iziseko zemfumba, bagqiba ngenyanga yesixhenxe."
2Chronicles31:8 Xa uHezekiya neenkosana beza baza bazibona iimfumba zewax uYehova nabantu bakhe amaSirayeli.
2Chronicles31:9 Wababuza uHezekiya ababingeleli nabaLevi ngeemfumba ezo.
2Chronicles31:10 Waphendula uAzariya, umbingeleli omkhulu wendlu kaTsadoki, wathi kuye, Kususela oko abantu beqalile ukuzisa imibingelelo endlwini kaYehova, sakwazi ukudla, saza ke saphela; ngokuba uYehova ebeyisikelele indlu yendlu kaYehova abantu kwaye okuseleyo yile venkile inkulu."
2Chronicles31:11 Waza uHezekiya wayalela ukuba alungiswe amagumbi endlu kaYehova; bazilungiselela ke.
2Chronicles31:12 Wawuzisa umrhumo, nezishumi, nezipho ezingcwele, enyanisekile; uKonaniya umLevi waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe, yanguShimehi umntakwabo."
2Chronicles31:13 uYehiyeli noAzasiya noNahati noAsaheli noYerimoti noYozabhadi noEliyeli noIsmagiya noMahati noBhenaya babengabalindi phantsi kwesandla sikaKonaniya noShimehi umntakwabo ngokomyalelo kaKumkani uHezekiya noAzariya intloko yendlu yoTHIXO oyinyaniso.
2Chronicles31:14 uKora unyana kaImna, umLevi, umlindi wesango elingasempuma, wayephethe izipho zokuzithandela zikaThixo, ukuze anikele umnikelo kaYehova nezona zipho zingcwele."
2Chronicles31:15 Ecaleni kwakhe yayinguEden noMinyamin noYeshuwa noShemaya uAmariya noShekaniya, kwizixeko zababingeleli, nomsebenzi wabo onyuliweyo, ukuze banike abazalwana babo, abadala nabancinane;"
2Chronicles31:16 ababalelwa emizalwaneni yabo into eyindoda, ethabathela kominyaka mithathu ezelwe kwenyusa, kubo bonke abangenayo endlwini kaYehova, umlinganiso wemini ngangemini yayo, ngokwamaqela abo;"
2Chronicles31:17 Ngokwengxelo yentsapho yababingeleli ngokweentsapho zabo nabaLevi ukususela kwabanamashumi amabini eminyaka ubudala ukusa phezulu, ngokwenkonzo yabo ngokwamaqela abo;"
2Chronicles31:18 ubhale umlibo wokuzalwa koonyana babo bonke, nabafazi babo, noonyana babo, neentombi zabo, kwibandla lonke; ngokuba babezinikele emsebenzini wabo ongcwele."
2Chronicles31:19 Kananjalo koonyana baka-Aron, ababingeleli ababesedlelweni lemizi yabo emizini yabo, emizini ngemizi, amadoda lawo abizwe ngamagama, ukuba bababele izabelo yonke into eyindoda phakathi kwababingeleli, nakubantu bonke abafumanekayo babalelwa kubaLevi ngokwemizalwane yabo."
2Chronicles31:20 Wenza loo nto uHezekiya kulo lonke ilizwe lakwaYuda, wenza okulungileyo, nokuthe tye, nokwenyaniso, phambi koYehova uThixo wakhe;"
2Chronicles31:21 Yaye kuwo wonke umsebenzi awawuqalayo wenkonzo yendlu yoTHIXO oyinyaniso nomthetho nomyalelo wokufuna uThixo wakhe wawuwenza ngentliziyo yakhe yonke waza waphumelela.
2Chronicles32:1 Emveni koko, nokuqinisela kwabo, weza uSaneribhe, ukumkani waseAsiriya, walingenela elakwaYuda, wayingqinga imizi enqatyisiweyo, wathi uya kuyithimba."
2Chronicles32:2 Wabona uHezekiya ukuba uSenaribhe uyeza, waceba ukuyihlasela iYerusalem."
2Chronicles32:3 Wacebisana nabathetheli bakhe namagorha akhe, ukuba bawavingce amanzi emithonjeni engaphandle komzi; bamnceda ke."
2Chronicles32:4 Kwahlanganisana abantu abaninzi, bawavala onke amaqula, nomlanjana oqukuqelayo ezweni, bathi, Yini na ukuba ookumkani baseAsiriya beze bafumane amanzi amaninzi?"
2Chronicles32:5 Wazomeleza, walwakha lonke udonga olwaluwile, waluphakamisa ukuya kutsho kwiinqaba ezinde nolunye udonga ngaphesheya, wayivusa kwakhona iMilo kwisiXeko sikaDavide, wenza neentolo namakhaka amaninzi."
2Chronicles32:6 Wabeka amadoda emfazwe phezu kwabantu waza wawahlanganisela kuye ebaleni lesango lesixeko waza wathetha nawo ngendlela ethuthuzelayo, wathi:"
2Chronicles32:7 Yomelelani nikhaliphe, musani ukoyika okanye ningoyiki ngenxa kakumkani waseAsiriya nangenxa yaso sonke isihlwele esikunye naye, kuba abo bakunye nathi baninzi ngakumbi kunabo bakunye naye."
2Chronicles32:8 Kuye kukho isandla senyama; kodwa kuthi uYehova nguThixo wethu ukuba asincede asilwele amadabi ethu. Ke abantu bakholosa ngamazwi kaHezekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda.
2Chronicles32:9 Emva koko uSenaribhe ukumkani waseAsiriya wathumela abakhonzi bakhe eYerusalem (kodwa wayingqinga iLakishe wonke umkhosi wakhe wamajoni awayekunye naye) kuHezekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda nakuYuda wonke owayeseYerusalem, wathi:"
2Chronicles32:10 Kwathiwa nguSaneribhe, ukumkani waseAsiriya, Ubuthembele ngantoni na, usayingqingile iYerusalem?"
2Chronicles32:11 uHezekiya makanganilahli na, ukuba uzinikele ekufeni yindlala nakunxanwa, esithi, uYehova, uThixo wethu, wosihlangula esandleni sokumkani waseAsiriya?"
2Chronicles32:12 Ndathi, Ndathi, uHezekiya akazisusi iziganga zakhe nezibingelelo zakhe, wathi kumaYuda nakwiYerusalem, Qubudani phambi kwesibingelelo sinye, niqhumisele phezu kwaso?"
2Chronicles32:13 Aniyazi na into endayenzayo noobawo ezintlangeni zonke zamazwe? Baba nako nokuba nako na oothixo bezizwe zala mazwe ukuwahlangula amazwe azo esandleni sam?
2Chronicles32:14 Nguwuphi na koothixo bonke beentlanga ezabaqalekisayo oobawo owabahlangulayo abantu bakhe esandleni sam, ukuze uThixo wenu anihlangule esandleni sam?"
2Chronicles32:15 Ke kaloku, makanganikhohlisi uHezekiya, anikhohlise ngale ndlela, ningakholwa nguye nangoku; kuba akukho thixo walo naluphi na uhlanga okanye naluphi na ubukumkani oye wakwazi ukuhlangula abantu bako esandleni sam nasesandleni sooyise. Akayi kunihlangula na uThixo wenu esandleni sam?"
2Chronicles32:16 Abakhonzi bakhe baqhubeka bethetha kakubi ngoYehova uThixo nomkhonzi wakhe uHezekiya.
2Chronicles32:17 Kananjalo wabhala iincwadi zokumnyelisa uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, wathetha kakubi ngaye, esithi, Njengoko oothixo bezizwe zakwamanye amazwe bengabasindisanga abantu babo esandleni sam, wenjenjalo uThixouThixo kaHezekiya ayiyi kusindisa abantu bakhe esandleni sam."
2Chronicles32:18 Bamemeza ngelizwi elikhulu ngentetho yesiYuda kubemi baseYerusalem ababeseludongeni, beboyikisa, beboyikisa; ukuze bawuthimbe umzi."
2Chronicles32:19 Bathetha ngoThixo weYerusalem njengoothixo bezizwe zehlabathi, umsebenzi wezandla zomntu."
2Chronicles32:20 Ngoko uKumkani uHezekiya noIsaya unyana ka-Amos umprofeti bathandaza baze babongoze izulu.
2Chronicles32:21 uYehova wathumela isithunywa sezulu, sawatshabalalisa onke amagorha, neenkosana, nabathetheli, emkhosini wokumkani waseAsiriya. Wabuyela kwelakowabo edanile. Uthe ke akungena endlwini yothixo wakhe, zaza zaphuma ezibilinini zakhe zambulalela khona ngekrele."
2Chronicles32:22 Ngoko uYehova wamhlangula uHezekiya nabemi baseYerusalem esandleni sikaSaneribhe ukumkani waseAsiriya nasesandleni sabo bonke, wabakhupha macala onke."
2Chronicles32:23 Abaninzi bazisa izipho kuYehova eYerusalem nezipho kuHezekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, kangangokuba ukususela ngoku kuse phambili wazukiswa emehlweni eentlanga zonke."
2Chronicles32:24 Ngelo xesha wayesifa uHezekiya, wayeza kufa, wathandaza kuYehova; wathetha kuye, wamnika umqondiso."
