2Chronicles32:25 Ke uHezekiya akazange abuyekeze ngokwenceba abenzelwe yona; ngokuba intliziyo yakhe yaphakama; ke ngoko, waba nomsindo ngakuye noYuda neYerusalem."
2Chronicles32:26 Ke uHezekiya wamthoba ngenxa yekratshi lentliziyo yakhe, yena nabemi baseYerusalem, ababafikela ngemihla kaHezekiya uburhalarhume bukaYehova."
2Chronicles32:27 uHezekiya ube nobutyebi nozuko olukhulu kunene, wazenzela ubutyebi besilivere, negolide, namatye anqabileyo, nobulawu, namakhaka, nawo onke amatye anqabileyo;"
2Chronicles32:28 noovimba bengqolowa, nobewayini, nobeoli; kunye neendlwana zezilwanyana ngeentlobo, kunye neendlwana zeenkomo."
2Chronicles32:29 Ngaphezu koko, wamnika izixeko nemfuyo yempahla emfutshane, neenkomo ezininzi, ngenxa yokuba uThixo wayemnike ubutyebi obuninzi."
2Chronicles32:30 uHezekiya lo wawuvala umntla ongasentla wamanzi aseGihon, wawubhekisa ngasentshona kwisixeko sikaDavide. Yaye uHezekiya waqhubeka ephumelela kuyo yonke imisebenzi yakhe."
2Chronicles32:31 Ke mayela nabathunywa babathetheli baseBhabheli, ababethunyiwe kuye, beza kumbuza ngomangaliso owabakho kwelo lizwe, uThixo wamvavanya, ukuze akwazi konke okusentliziyweni yakhe."
2Chronicles32:32 Ezinye izinto zikaHezekiya, nokwenza kwakhe ngenceba, nanzo kubhaliwe emehlweni kaIsaya unyana ka-Amos, umprofeti, nasencwadini yookumkani bakwaYuda nabakwaSirayeli."
2Chronicles32:33 Walala uHezekiya kooyise, bamngcwabela entloko kumangcwaba oonyana bakaDavide; yaye onke amaYuda nabemi baseYerusalem bambeka imbeko ekufeni kwakhe. uManase unyana wakhe walawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Chronicles33:1 uManase ubeminyaka ilishumi elinamibini ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emashumi mahlanu anamihlanu engukumkani eYerusalem."
2Chronicles33:2 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, njengamasikizi eentlanga, awazigqogqayo uYehova phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
2Chronicles33:3 Wazakha kwakhona iindawo eziphakamileyo ezo uHezekiya uyise wayezidilizile, waza wakhela ooBhahali izibingelelo, wenza nemithi, waqubuda, wakhonza zonke izidalwa zasezulwini."
2Chronicles33:4 Wazakha izibingelelo endlwini kaYehova, leyo wathi uYehova ngayo, Igama lam liya kuba yiYerusalem ngonaphakade."
2Chronicles33:5 Wazakhela izibingelelo zonke izidalwa zasezulwini kwiintendelezo zombini zendlu kaYehova.
2Chronicles33:6 Wabacandisa oonyana bakhe emlilweni, emfuleni wakwaBhen-hinom; kananjalo wayewagcina amaxesha, ehlaba, enemilingo, esebenzelana nemimoya nabakhafuli; wenza ububi obukhulu emehlweni kaYehova, ukuba amqumbise."
2Chronicles33:7 Wawubeka umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, umfanekiso abewenzile, endlwini kaThixo, awathi uThixo kuDavide nakuSolomon unyana wakhe, Kule ndlu naseYerusalem, endiyinyulileyo phakathi kwezizwe zonke zakwaSirayeli; ndiya kulimisa igama lam ngonaphakade."
2Chronicles33:8 Andisayi kuba salususa unyawo lukaSirayeli emhlabeni endawushumayezayo kooyihlo-mkhulu; ukuze bakunyamekele ukwenza konke endibayalele kona, ngokomthetho wonke nemiyalelo nezigwebo ngesandla sikaMoses."
2Chronicles33:9 Yaye uManase wamtshabalalisa uYuda nabemi baseYerusalem nokwenza okubi ngakumbi kuneentlanga ezo uYehova wazitshabalalisayo phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli.
2Chronicles33:10 uYehova wathetha kuManase nakubantu bakhe, kodwa abazange baphulaphule."
2Chronicles33:11 uYehova wabazisa abathetheli bempi yokumkani waseAsiriya, ukuba bafike kubo. Bambamba uManase ngameva, bamkhonkxa ngamakhamandela, bamsa eBhabheli."
2Chronicles33:12 Ke kaloku kwathi, ekubandezelekeni kwakhe, wathandaza kuYehova uThixo wakhe, wazithoba kakhulu phambi koThixo wooyise."
2Chronicles33:13 Wathandaza kuye, wathandaza kuye, wakuva ukucela kwakhe, wambuyisela eYerusalem ebukumkanini bakhe. Wazi ke uManase ukuba uYehova nguThixo."
2Chronicles33:14 Emva koko wakha udonga ngaphandle kwesixeko sikaDavide ngasentshona yeGihon entilini, wada wee xhaxhe ngeSango leeNtlanzi, wayijikeleza iOfeli, wayiphakamisa kakhulu kuzo zonke izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo zakwaYuda."
2Chronicles33:15 Wabasusa ke abanye oothixo nesithixo endlwini kaYehova nesiqhumiso sonke awayesakhe entabeni yendlu kaYehova naseYerusalem, wazilahlela ngaphandle kwesixeko."
2Chronicles33:16 Walungisa isibingelelo sikaYehova waza wanikela phezu kwaso imibingelelo neyombulelo, waza wayalela amaYuda ukuba akhonze uYehova uThixo kaSirayeli."
2Chronicles33:17 Kodwa abantu bam babebingelela kwiindawo eziphakamileyo, kodwa babesenzela uYehova uThixo wabo kuphela."
2Chronicles33:18 Ezinye izinto zikaManase, nomthandazo wakhe kuThixo wakhe, namazwi ababoni ababethetha kuye egameni likaYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, nanzo zibhaliwe encwadini yookumkani bakwaSirayeli."
2Chronicles33:19 Nomthandazo wakhe nendlela awaviwa ngayo uThixo kuye, nesono sakhe sonke nokunxaxha kwakhe neendawo awakha kuzo iindawo eziphakamileyo waza watyala izikhondo zemithi engcwele nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo ngaphambi kokuba athobeke. Yabonani, kubhaliwe kwathiwa, phakathi kwemigwebo yeemboni."
2Chronicles33:20 uManase walala kookhokho bakhe, bamngcwabela endlwini yakhe, yaye uAmon unyana wakhe waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sakhe."
2Chronicles33:21 uAmon ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamibini ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emibini engukumkani eYerusalem."
2Chronicles33:22 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, njengoManase uyise; uAmon wabingelela yonke imifanekiso eqingqiweyo, awayenzayo uManase uyise, wayikhonza;"
2Chronicles33:23 yaye akazange azithobe phambi koYehova njengoko wazithobayo uManase uyise; kodwa uAmon waqhubeka eqhekeza.
2Chronicles33:24 Bagwilika kuye abakhonzi bakhe, bambulala endlwini yakhe."
2Chronicles33:25 Kwaye abantu behlabathi bababulala bonke abo babecebe nxamnye nokumkani uAmon; abantu belizwe bamenza ukumkani uYosiya, unyana wakhe, esikhundleni sakhe."
2Chronicles34:1 uYosiya ubeminyaka isibhozo ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka emashumi mathathu anamnye engukumkani eYerusalem."
2Chronicles34:2 Wenza okuthe tye emehlweni kaYehova, wahamba emizekweni kaDavide uyise, akatyekela ekunene nasekhohlo."
2Chronicles34:3 Kuba ngomnyaka wesibhozo wobukumkani bakhe, esemncinane, waqala wamquqela uThixo kaDavide uyise; Ngomnyaka weshumi elinesibini waqala wawahlambulula amaYuda neYerusalem, ukuze azishenxise iziganga, neziqu zemithi, nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo netyhidiweyo."
2Chronicles34:4 Zazidiliza phambi kwakhe izibingelelo zooBhahali; nezithixo eziphakamileyo ezibe ziphezulu, wazidiliza; neziqu ezingcwele nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo wayiqhekeza waza wayityumza waza wayichithachitha phezu kwamangcwaba abo babebingelela kuyo."
2Chronicles34:5 Wawatshisa amathambo ababingeleli phezu kwezibingelelo zabo, wawahlambulula ke amaYuda neYerusalem."
2Chronicles34:6 Wenjenjalo emizini yakwaManase, neyakwaEfrayim, neyakwaSimon, kwesa kwaNafetali, nelizwe layo ngeenxa zonke."
2Chronicles34:7 Emva kokuba ezidilizile izibingelelo nemithi engcwele nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo wayigawula yaluthuli waza wazigawula zonke izithixo ezazinqulwa kulo lonke ilizwe lakwaSirayeli, wabuyela eYerusalem."
2Chronicles34:8 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinesibhozo anesibini wobukumkani bakhe, ulihlambulule ilizwe nendlu, wathuma uShafan unyana ka-Azaliya, noMahaseya umphathi womzi, noYowa unyana kaYowaka, umthetheli; ngeenxa zonke esixekweni indlu kaYehova uThixo wakhe."
2Chronicles34:9 Xa beza kuHilekiya umbingeleli omkhulu baza bayinikela imali eyayiziswe endlwini yoTHIXO oyinyaniso, leyo yayiqokelelwe ngabaLevi ababegcina amasango esandleni sikaManase noEfrayim nakuwo onke amasalela akwaSirayeli kubo bonke abasendlwini kaThixo uYuda noBhenjamin; babuyela eYerusalem."
2Chronicles34:10 Bayinika abasebenzi ababephethe indlu kaYehova, bayinika abasebenzi abasebenza endlwini kaYehova ukuba bayilungise bayilungise indlu."
2Chronicles34:11 Balinika iingcibi nabakhi, ukuba kuthengwe amatye axholiweyo, nemithi, ukuba badibanise, bakhe izindlu, ezo bazichithayo ookumkani bakwaYuda."
2Chronicles34:12 Loo madoda ebesebenza umsebenzi wawo enyanisekile; Abaveleli babo ibinguYahati no-Obhadiya, abaLevi bakoonyana bakaMerari; uZekariya noMeshulam, oonyana bamaHeti, bayifundisa; nabanye abaLevi, bonke ababekwazi ukucula."
2Chronicles34:13 Babephethe abathwali bemithwalo yaye babegcina isigxina sabo bonke abenza umsebenzi wawo nawuphi na umsebenzi; kubaLevi kwakukho ababhali, amagosa nabagcini-masango."
2Chronicles34:14 Xa babeyikhupha imali eyayiziswe endlwini kaYehova, umbingeleli uHilekiya wayifumana incwadi yomthetho kaYehova eyanikelwa ngesandla sikaMoses."
2Chronicles34:15 Waphendula uHilekiya, wathi kuShafan umbhali, Ndifumene incwadi yomyalelo endlwini kaYehova. uHilekiya wayinika uShafan incwadi."
2Chronicles34:16 uShafane wayizisa incwadi kukumkani, waza ukumkani wayibuyisela kuye, wathi, Konke okuphathiswe esandleni sabakhonzi bakho, bokwenza."
2Chronicles34:17 Yaye bayiqokelela imali eyafumanekayo endlwini kaYehova, bayibeka esandleni sabalindi nasesandleni sabasebenzi."
2Chronicles34:18 Waxela ke uShafan umbhali kukumkani, wathi, Umbingeleli uHilekiya undinike incwadi. uShafane wafunda phambi kokumkani."
2Chronicles34:19 Uthe akuweva ukumkani amazwi omyalelo, wazikrazula iingubo zakhe."
2Chronicles34:20 Ukumkani wabawisela umthetho uHilekiya, noAhikam, unyana kaShafan, noAbhedon, unyana kaMikaya, noShafan umbhali, noAsaya umkhonzi wokumkani, wathi:"
2Chronicles34:21 Yiyani nibuze kuYehova ngenxa yam, nangenxa yamasalela akwaSirayeli namaYuda, ngokuphathelele amazwi encwadi efunyenweyo; ngenxa yokuba mkhulu umsindo kaYehova ophalazwe phezu kwethu, ngenxa yokuba ookhokho bethu abazange baligcine ilizwi likaYehova ukuba benze yonke into ebhaliweyo kule ncwadi."
2Chronicles34:22 Waya uHilekiya nabakwakumkani kuHulida umprofetikazi, umkaShalum unyana kaTikwata, unyana kaHatsera, umgcini-ngubo; (ebe ehleli eYerusalem ekholejini) baza bathetha naye ngayo."
2Chronicles34:23 Wathi kubo, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Nothi kwindoda eniyithumele kum, nithi,"
2Chronicles34:24 Wathi uYehova, Yabona, ndiyizisela ububi le ndawo, naphezu kwabemi bayo, zonke iziqalekiso ezibhaliweyo encwadini abayifundayo phambi kokumkani wakwaYuda."
2Chronicles34:25 Ngenxa yokuba bandinikele umva baza baqhumisa abanye oothixo ngenxa yam, ukuze bandihlekise ngayo yonke imisebenzi yezandla zabo; ke ngoko, umsindo wam uya kuthululwa phezu kwale ndawo, kwaye awuyi kucinywa."
2Chronicles34:26 Ke ukumkani wakwaYuda, lowo nimthumileyo ukuba abuze kuYehova, nithi kuye, uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, uthethile amazwi owavileyo;"
2Chronicles34:27 Ngenxa yokuba intliziyo yakho ibithambile waza wazithoba phambi koThixo ekuveni kwakho amazwi akhe nxamnye nale ndawo nanxamnye nabemi bayo, yaye wazithoba phambi kwakho wakrazula izambatho zakho walila phambi kwam; Nam ndikuvile, utsho uYehova."
2Chronicles34:28 Uyabona, ndiya kukugubungela nooyihlo, ugqunywe engcwabeni lakho unoxolo, angabuboni amehlo akho bonke ububi endibuzisa kule ndawo, nabemi bayo. Balibuyisela ilizwi lokumkani."
2Chronicles34:29 Wathumela ukumkani, wabiza onke amadoda amakhulu akwaYuda nawaseYerusalem."
2Chronicles34:30 Wenyuka ukumkani waya endlwini kaYehova, namadoda onke akwaYuda, nabemi baseYerusalem, nababingeleli, nabaLevi, nabantu bonke, kwathabathela komkhulu kwesa komncinane, wawafunda onke amazwi aloo ncwadi ezindlebeni zabo womnqophiso ofunyenwe endlwini kaYehova."
2Chronicles34:31 Ukumkani wema endaweni yakhe waza wenza umnqophiso phambi koYehova wokulandela uYehova nokugcina imiyalelo yakhe nezingqino zakhe nemithetho yakhe emisiweyo ngentliziyo yakhe yonke nangomphefumlo wakhe wonke ngokuphathelele amazwi alo mnqophiso abhalwe kule ncwadi.
2Chronicles34:32 Wabamisa bonke abaseYerusalem nakwaBhenjamin. Yaye abemi baseYerusalem benza ngokomnqophiso kaThixo, uTHIXO wookhokho babo."
2Chronicles34:33 uYosiya wawasusa onke amasikizi emazweni onke, angawoonyana bakaSirayeli, wabanikela bonke abafumanekayo kwaSirayeli ukuba bakhonze uYehova uThixo wabo. Yonke imihla yobomi bakhe abazange baphambuke ekulandeleni uYehova uTHIXO wookhokho babo."
2Chronicles35:1 uYosiya wenzela uYehova ipasika eYerusalem; benza ipasika ngomhla weshumi elinesine wenyanga yokuqala.
2Chronicles35:2 Wabamisa ababingeleli emsebenzini wabo, wabomeleza enkonzweni yendlu kaYehova;"
2Chronicles35:3 Waqhubeka wathi kubaLevi ababefundisa bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli, ababengcwele kuYehova: “Yibekeni ityeya engcwele endlwini awayakhayo uSolomon unyana kaDavide ukumkani wakwaSirayeli; akuyi kuba mthwalo emagxeni enu; Mkhonzeni kaloku uYehova uThixo wenu, nabantu bakhe amaSirayeli;"
2Chronicles35:4 Zilungiseni ngokwemizalwane yooyihlo, ngokwamaqela enu, ngokwesibhalo sikaDavide ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, nangokwesibhalo sikaSolomon unyana wakhe;"
2Chronicles35:5 Yima engcweleni ngokwamaqela emizalwane yooyise, abantu namaqela emizalwane yabaLevi."
2Chronicles35:6 Ke ngoko bhiyozela iPasika, nizingcwalise nize nilungiselele abazalwana benu, ukuze benze ngokwelizwi likaYehova ngenkonzo kaMoses."
2Chronicles35:7 uYosiya wabarhumela oonyana babantu, iimvana, neenkunzi zeebhokhwe, zonke ezo nto zezombingelelo wepasika, kubo bonke abafumanekayo, inani lawo elingamawaka amashumi mathathu anesithathu samawaka; ibibubutyebi bokumkani."
2Chronicles35:8 Iinkosana zakhe zabanikela ngokuzithandela abantu, kubabingeleli nabaLevi: uHilekiya noZekariya noYehiyeli, iintloko zendlu yoThixo oyinyaniso, banikela kubabingeleli amawaka amabini anamakhulu amathandathu anamakhulu mathathu izimvu zombingelelo wepasika iinkomo."
2Chronicles35:9 Ke uKonaniya, noShemaya, noNataniyeli, abazalwana babo, noHashabhiya, noYehiyeli, noYozabhadi, iintloko zabaLevi, barhumela abaLevi amawaka amahlanu eegusha, namakhulu amahlanu eenkomo zePasika."
2Chronicles35:10 Yalungiswa ke inkonzo leyo; bema ababingeleli ezindaweni zabo, abaLevi ngokwamaqela abo, ngokomthetho wokumkani."
2Chronicles35:11 Bayixhela ipasika, ababingeleli bafefa igazi ezandleni zabo, bawathambisa abaLevi."
2Chronicles35:12 Bayisusa iminikelo etshiswayo ngokwamaqela ezizwe zoonyana babantu, ukuze benze umbingelelo kuYehova, kanye njengoko kubhaliwe encwadini kaMoses. Benza okufanayo nangeenkomo."
2Chronicles35:13 Ipasika bayitshisa ngomlilo ngokwesiko; ezinye izinto ezingcwele bazithambisa ngeembiza, neepani, nangeepani, babele ke bonke abantu ngokukhawuleza."
2Chronicles35:14 Emveni koko bazilungisa nababingeleli, ngokuba ababingeleli, oonyana baka-Aron, babesanyusa amadini anyukayo namaqatha, kude kube sebusuku; bazilungisa ke abaLevi, kwanababingeleli, oonyana baka-Aron."
2Chronicles35:15 Iimvumi, oonyana baka-Asafu, babekwindawo yabo ngokomyalelo kaDavide noAsafu noHeman noYedutun imboni kakumkani; nabamasango bemi kwiminyango ngeminyango; ungatyeki emsebenzini wabo; ngenxa yabazalwana babo, ababelungiselelwe bona ngabaLevi."
2Chronicles35:16 Ngoko yonke inkonzo kaYehova yalungiswa kwangaloo mini ukuze kubhiyozelwe iPasika nokwenza iminikelo etshiswayo esibingelelweni sikaYehova ngokomyalelo kaKumkani uYosiya.
2Chronicles35:17 Oonyana bakaSirayeli ababelapho ngelo xesha benza ipasika nomthendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele iintsuku ezisixhenxe.
2Chronicles35:18 Bekungazanga kwenziwe pasika ngokwalo kwaSirayeli, kususela kwimihla kaSamuweli umprofeti yaye bonke ookumkani bakwaSirayeli abazange benze umbhiyozo ofana nalowo wawubhiyozelwa nguYosiya nababingeleli nabaLevi noYuda wonke noSirayeli ababelapho nabemi baseYerusalem."
2Chronicles35:19 Le pasika yenziwa ngomnyaka weshumi elinesibhozo wobukumkani bukaYosiya.
2Chronicles35:20 Emva kwayo yonke loo nto, xa uYosiya wayeyilungisa itempile, uNego, ukumkani waseYiputa, wenyuka waya kulwa neKarkemishe umEfrate; waphuma uYosiya esiya kumkhawulela."
2Chronicles35:21 Wathuma abathunywa kuye, wathi, Yintoni na enam nawe, kumkani wakwaYuda? Andinilwi namhla, kodwa ndihlasela indlu endiyilwelayo; ngokuba uThixo undiwisele umthetho wokuba ndikhawuleze; musa ukumphazamisa uThixo onam, hleze unitshabalalise."
2Chronicles35:22 Akavumanga uYosiya ukububhekisa ubuso bakhe kuye, wazenza mntu wumbi, ukuba alwe naye, akawaphulaphula amazwi kaNego, aphuma emlonyeni woThixo oyinyaniso, weza kulwa entilini yaseMegido."
2Chronicles35:23 Abazingela ngeentolo bazingela ukumkani uYosiya; Wathi ukumkani kubakhonzi bakhe, Ndivumeleni; kuba ndingxwelerhekile."
2Chronicles35:24 Bamkhupha ke abakhonzi bakhe kuloo nqwelo, bamkhwelisa kweyesibini inqwelo abenayo; Bamsa eYerusalem, wafa, wangcwatyelwa kwelinye lamangcwaba kayise. Onke amaYuda neYerusalem wamzilela uYosiya."
2Chronicles35:25 uYeremiya wamenzela isijwili uYosiya; zathetha zonke iimvumi neemvumi ezimbononweni zabo ngoYosiya, unanamhla, bazibeka ngokomyalelo omiswe kwaSirayeli kwaye yabona, amazwi kaYeremiya acacisiwe."
2Chronicles35:26 Ezinye izinto zikaYosiya, nokwenza kwakhe ngenceba, ngoko kubhaliweyo emyalelweni kaYehova;"
2Chronicles35:27 Ke izinto zakhe ezokuqala nezokugqibela, nanzo zibhaliwe encwadini yookumkani bakwaSirayeli nabakwaYuda."
2Chronicles36:1 Ke kaloku abantu behlabathi bathabatha uYowakas, unyana kaYosiya, bamenza ukumkani eYerusalem esikhundleni sikayise."
2Chronicles36:2 uYehowahazi ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamithathu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neenyanga ezintathu engukumkani eYerusalem."
2Chronicles36:3 Ukumkani waseYiputa wahlala eYerusalem, waligweba ilizwe ikhulu leetalente zesilivere netalente enye yegolide."
2Chronicles36:4 Ukumkani waseYiputa wamenza uEliyakim, umkhuluwa wakhe, ukumkani wakwaYuda neYerusalem, waliguqula igama lakhe laba nguYehoyakim. uNego wamthabatha uYehowahazi, umninawa wakhe, wamsa eYiputa."
2Chronicles36:5 uYehoyakim ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka elishumi elinamnye engukumkani eYerusalem; yaye wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova uThixo wakhe."
2Chronicles36:6 uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli wamxabela, wamkhonkxa ngamakhamandela, wamsa eBhabheli."
2Chronicles36:7 uNebhukadenetsare wazisa ezinye zeempahla zendlu kaYehova eBhabhiloni waza wazibeka etempileni yakhe eBhabhiloni.
2Chronicles36:8 Ezinye izinto zikaYehoyakim, namasikizi akhe awawenzayo, nokwafumanekayo kukuye, zibhaliwe encwadini yookumkani bakwaSirayeli nabakwaYuda; unyana wakhe uYehoyakin waqalisa ukulawula esikhundleni sakhe."
2Chronicles36:9 uYehoyakin ubeminyaka isibhozo ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neenyanga ezintathu ezineentsuku ezilishumi engukumkani eYerusalem; yaye wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova."
2Chronicles36:10 Ekupheleni konyaka, uKumkani uNebhukadenetsare wathumela wamzisa eBhabhiloni neempahla ezilungileyo zendlu kaYehova, waza wenza uZedekiya umntakwabo kumkani wakwaYuda naseYerusalem."
2Chronicles36:11 uZedekiya ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamnye ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka elishumi elinamnye engukumkani eYerusalem."
2Chronicles36:12 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova uThixo wakhe, yaye akazange azithobe phambi komprofeti uYeremiya, owayethetha ngokuphuma emlonyeni kaYehova."
2Chronicles36:13 Kananjalo wagwilika kukumkani, kuNebhukadenetsare, awayemfungele uThixo;"
2Chronicles36:14 Ngaphezu koko, bonke ababingeleli abakhulu nabantu bonile kunene, ngokwamasikizi onke eentlanga; wayenza inqambi indlu kaYehova, awayingcwalisayo eYerusalem."
2Chronicles36:15 uYehova, uThixo wooyise, wathumela kubo ngabathunywa bakhe, wesuka wathumela; ngokuba wayenovelwano ngabantu bakhe nendlu yakhe;"
2Chronicles36:16 Kodwa bayabagculela abathunywa bakaTHIXO oyinyaniso bewadelela amazwi akhe yaye benyelisa abaprofeti bakhe de ifike ingqumbo kaYehova nxamnye nabantu bakhe de kungabikho kuphiliswa.
2Chronicles36:17 Wabazisa ukumkani wamaKaledi, owawabulala amadodana abo ngekrele endlwini yengcwele yabo, akaconga ndodana nantombi, naxhego, nandoda ithe yaca phambi kwabo ubudala abayanga; wabanika bonke esandleni sakhe."
2Chronicles36:18 Zonke iimpahla zendlu yoThixo oyinyaniso, ezinkulu nezincinane, nobuncwane bendlu kaYehova, nobuncwane bokumkani, nobabathetheli bakhe; Zonke ezo zinto wazizisa eBhabheli."
2Chronicles36:19 Bayitshisa indlu yoThixo oyinyaniso, baludiliza udonga lwaseYerusalem, bawatshisa ngomlilo onke amabhotwe ayo, bazitshabalalisa zonke iimpahla zayo ezintle."
2Chronicles36:20 Abasindileyo ekreleni babathimba, babasa eBhabheli; apho baba ngabakhonzi bakhe noonyana bakhe, kwada kwaba sebukumkanini bobukumkani bamaPersi;"
2Chronicles36:21 ukuze kuphume ilizwi likaYehova emlonyeni kaYeremiya, lizaliseke, lide ilizwe lanele ziisabatha zalo;"
2Chronicles36:22 Kwathi ngomnyaka wokuqala kaKoreshi ukumkani wasePersi, ukuze lizaliseke ilizwi likaYehova, awalithethayo ngomlomo kaYeremiya, uYehova wawunyusa umoya kaKoreshi ukumkani wasePersi, ukuba uzaliseke ebukumkanini bakhe bonke, wabhala, esithi,"
2Chronicles36:23 Kwathiwa nguKoreshi ukumkani wasePersi, Zonke izikumkani zehlabathi uzinikiwe nguYehova, uThixo wamazulu; wandiwisela umthetho wokuba ndimakhele indlu eYerusalem, ezweni lakwaYuda. Ngubani na kuni ongowabantu bakhe bonke? Wanga uYehova, uThixo wakhe, angaba naye, anyuke."
Ezra1:1 Ngomnyaka wokuqala kaKoreshi, ukumkani wasePersi, ekuzalisekeni kwelizwi likaYehova ngomlomo kaYeremiya, uYehova wawunyusa umoya kaKoreshi ukumkani wasePersi, ukuba atsho, ekumiselweni kwakhe bonke ubukumkani bakhe kwaye ngokubhala, esithi:"
Ezra1:2 Wathi uKoreshi, ukumkani wasePersi, uYehova, uThixo wamazulu, undinike zonke izikumkani zehlabathi; wandiwisela umthetho wokuba ndimakhele indlu eYerusalem, ezweni lakwaYuda."
Ezra1:3 Ngubani na phakathi kwenu ebantwini bakhe bonke? Ngamana uThixo wakhe waba naye, anyuke aye eYerusalem ekwaYuda, ayakhe indlu kaYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, eYerusalem."
Ezra1:4 Wonk’ ubani oseleyo kuyo nayiphi na indawo aphambukele kuyo njengomphambukeli, amadoda endawo yakhe makamncede ngesilivere negolide nempahla nemfuyo nomnikelo wokuzithandela wendlu kaThixo eYerusalem."
Ezra1:5 Zenyuka ke iintloko zezindlu zooyise zakwaYuda, nezakwaBhenjamin, nababingeleli, nabaLevi, nabo bonke abo uThixo wawuxhokonxayo umoya wabo, baya kuyakha indlu kaYehova eYerusalem."
Ezra1:6 Bonke ababebajikelezile bazomeleza izandla zabo ngeempahla zesilivere, nangegolide, nempahla, neenkomo, nangezinto ezinqwenelekayo, ngaphandle kwayo yonke into eyenziwa ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo."
Ezra1:7 Kananjalo ukumkani uKoreshi wazikhupha iimpahla zendlu kaYehova, awayezithabathe eYerusalem uNebhukadenetsare, wazibeka endlwini yothixo wakhe;"
Ezra1:8 Aba ngabo awathi uKoreshi ukumkani wasePersi wabathabatha esandleni sikaMitredati umgcini wobuncwane waza wawafundela uSheshbhatsare inkosana yakwaYuda.
Ezra1:9 Lilo eli inani lazo: izitya zegolide ezimashumi mathathu, izitya zesilivere eziliwaka, nezitshetshe ezimashumi mabini anesithoba;"
Ezra1:10 izitya zegolide ezimashumi mathathu, izitya zesilivere zohlobo lwesibini zaba ngamakhulu amane aneshumi, nezinye iimpahla eziliwaka."
Ezra1:11 Zonke iimpahla zegolide nezesilivere zaba ngamawaka amahlanu anamakhulu mane. Yonke le nto yabangela ukuba uSheshbhatsare enyuke nawo, aphume ekuthinjweni okwakuphakanyiswe eBhabhiloni, aye eYerusalem."
Ezra2:1 Ngabo aba oonyana bephondo abashiya abathinjwa, abathinjwa, abo uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabhiloni wabathabathela eBhabhiloni waza wabuyela eYerusalem nakwaYuda, ngamnye kwisixeko sakowabo;"
Ezra2:2 abeza noZerubhabheli: nguYeshuwa, noNehemiya, noSeraya, noRehelaya, noMordekayi, noBhilesan, noMitspar, noBhigwayi, noRehum, noBhahana. Inani loonyana bakaSirayeli:"
Ezra2:3 oonyana bakaParoshe ingamawaka amabini, anekhulu elinamanci asixhenxe anababini;"
Ezra2:4 oonyana bakaShefatiya babengamakhulu amathathu anamashumi asixhenxe anesibini;
Ezra2:5 oonyana baka-Aragi babengamakhulu asixhenxe anamashumi asixhenxe anesihlanu;
Ezra2:6 oonyana bakaPahati wakwaMowabhi, koonyana bakaYeshuwa noYowabhi, ibingamawaka amabini, anamakhulu asibhozo, aneshumi elinye elinababini."
Ezra2:7 Oonyana bakaElam babeliwaka elinamakhulu amabini anamashumi mahlanu anesine;
Ezra2:8 Oonyana bakaSathu ibingamakhulu asithoba, anamanci mane anabahlanu;"
Ezra2:9 oonyana bakaSakayi ibingamakhulu asixhenxe, anamanci mathandathu;"
Ezra2:10 oonyana bakaBhani ibingamakhulu amathandathu, anamanci mane anababini;"
Ezra2:11 oonyana bakaBhebhayi ibingamakhulu amathandathu, anamanci mabini anabathathu;"
Ezra2:12 oonyana baseAshgade ibiliwaka, elinamakhulu amabini, anamanci mabini anababini;"
Ezra2:13 oonyana baka-Adonikam babengamakhulu amathandathu anamashumi mathandathu anesithandathu;
Ezra2:14 oonyana bakaBhigwayi babengamawaka amabini anamanci mahlanu anesithandathu;
Ezra2:15 oonyana baka-Adin babengamakhulu amane, anamanci mahlanu anabane;"
Ezra2:16 Oonyana baka-Atere kaHezekiya ibingamashumi asithoba anamnye, anamanci asibhozo anababini;"
Ezra2:17 oonyana bakaBheshayi babengamakhulu amathathu anamashumi amabini anesithathu;
Ezra2:18 oonyana bakaYora babelikhulu elineshumi elinesibini;
Ezra2:19 oonyana bakaHashum babengamakhulu amabini anamashumi amabini anesithathu;
Ezra2:20 oonyana baseGibhare ibingamashumi asithoba anabahlanu;
Ezra2:21 oonyana baseBhetelehem babelikhulu elinamashumi amabini anesithathu;
Ezra2:22 amadoda aseNetofi angamashumi amahlanu anesithandathu;
Ezra2:23 amadoda aseAnatoti ayelikhulu elinamashumi amabini anesibhozo;
Ezra2:24 Oonyana baseAsmawete babemashumi mane anababini;
Ezra2:25 oonyana baseKiriyati-yeharim neKefira neBheroti ibingamakhulu asixhenxe, anamanci mane anabathathu;"
Ezra2:26 Oonyana baseRama neGabha ibingamakhulu amathandathu, anamanci mabini anamnye."
Ezra2:27 Amadoda aseMigmas ayelikhulu elinamashumi amabini anesibini;
Ezra2:28 amadoda aseBheteli neAyi ibingamakhulu amabini, anamanci mabini anamathathu;"
Ezra2:29 Oonyana baseNebho ibingamashumi amahlanu anababini;
Ezra2:30 oonyana baseMagibhishe babelikhulu elinamashumi amahlanu anesithandathu;
Ezra2:31 Oonyana bomnye uElam ibiliwaka elinamakhulu amabini, anamanci mahlanu anabane."
Ezra2:32 Oonyana bakaHarim ibingamakhulu amathathu, anamanci mabini."
Ezra2:33 Oonyana baseLodi neHadide neOno ibingamakhulu asixhenxe, anamanci mabini anabahlanu;"
Ezra2:34 oonyana baseYeriko ibingamakhulu amathathu, anamanci mane anabahlanu;"
Ezra2:35 oonyana baseSenege ibingamawaka amathathu, anamakhulu mathandathu, anamanci mathathu;"
Ezra2:36 Ababingeleli: oonyana bakaYedaya bendlu kaYeshuwa babengamakhulu asithoba anamashumi asixhenxe anesithathu.
Ezra2:37 Oonyana bakaImere ibiliwaka, elinamanci mahlanu anababini;"
Ezra2:38 oonyana bakaPashure ibiliwaka, elinamakhulu amabini, anamanci mane anesixhenxe;"
Ezra2:39 Oonyana bakaHarim iwaka elineshumi elinesixhenxe;
Ezra2:40 abaLevi: oonyana bakaYeshuwa noKademiyeli koonyana bakaHodawa babengamashumi asixhenxe anesine.
Ezra2:41 Iimvumi, oonyana baka-Asafu ibilikhulu, elinamanci mabini anesibhozo."
Ezra2:42 Oonyana babagcini-masango, oonyana bakaShalum, oonyana baka-Atere, oonyana bakaTalemon, oonyana baka-Akubhi, oonyana bakaHatita, oonyana bakaShobhayi, bebonke belikhulu elinashumi-nye."
Ezra2:43 Abakhonzi betempile: oonyana bakaSiha, oonyana bakaHasufa, oonyana bakaTaboti,"
Ezra2:44 nabantwana bakwaKerose, nabantwana bakwaSiha, nabantwana bakwaPadon,"
Ezra2:45 nabantwana bakwaLabhan, nabantwana bakwaHagabha, nabantwana bakwa-Akubhi,"
Ezra2:46 nabantwana bakwaHagabhi, nabantwana bakwaSalimayi, nabantwana bakwaHanan,"
Ezra2:47 noonyana bakaGidele, noonyana bakaGahare, noonyana bakaRehaya,"
Ezra2:48 noonyana bakaRetsin, noonyana bakaNekoda, noonyana bakaGasam;"
Ezra2:49 nabantwana bakwa-Usa, nabantwana bakwaPasaki, nabantwana bakwaBhesayi,"
Ezra2:50 nabantwana bakwa-Asna, nabantwana bakwaMehuni, nabantwana bakwaNefushim,"
Ezra2:51 nabantwana bakwaBhakebuke, nabantwana bakwaHakufa, nabantwana bakwaHarure,"
Ezra2:52 nabantwana bakwaBhatseluti, nabantwana bakwaMehida, nabantwana bakwaHarsa,"
Ezra2:53 nabantwana bakwaBharkose, nabantwana bakwaSisera, nabantwana bakwaTama,"
Ezra2:54 oonyana bakaNesiya, oonyana bakaHatifa."
Ezra2:55 Oonyana babakhonzi bakaSolomon: oonyana bakaSotayi, oonyana bakaSofereti, oonyana bakaPeruda;"
Ezra2:56 nabantwana bakwaYaela, nabantwana bakwaDarkon, nabantwana bakwaGidel,"
Ezra2:57 nabantwana bakwaShefatiya, nabantwana bakwaHatili, nabantwana bakwaPogereti kaSebhayim, nabantwana bakwa-Ami."
Ezra2:58 Bonke abakhonzi betempile noonyana babakhonzi bakaSolomon babengamakhulu amathathu, anamanci asibhozo anamnye."
Ezra2:59 Ngabo abo abenyuka baya eTelemela, eTele-harsha, eKerubhi, eAdane naseImere, kodwa babengenakuyibonisa indlu kayise nenzala yabo ukuba babephuma kwaSirayeli:"
Ezra2:60 oonyana bakaDelaya, oonyana bakaTobhiya, oonyana bakaNekoda, babengamakhulu omathandathu, anamanci mahlanu anababini;"
Ezra2:61 Koonyana bababingeleli: oonyana bakaHabhaya, oonyana bakaKeshe, oonyana bakaBharzilayi; owazeka umfazi ezintombini zikaBharzilayi waseGiliyadi, wabizwa ngegama lazo."
Ezra2:62 Bakhangela ingxelo yabo phakathi kwabo babebalwe ngokwemilibo yokuzalwa, abayifumana; ke ngoko, benziwe inqambi, bagxothwa kububingeleli."
Ezra2:63 Ngoko umphathi wabayalela ukuba bangazidli ezona zinto zingcwele de kuvele umbingeleli oneUrim neTumim.
Ezra2:64 Lonke ibandla lingamawaka angamashumi amane anamabini, anamakhulu mathathu, anamanci mathandathu;"
Ezra2:65 ngaphandle kwezicaka zabo ezi, nezicakakazi zabo ezi, zingamawaka asixhenxe, anamakhulu mathathu, anamanci mathathu anesixhenxe, aneemvumi neemvumi ezimakhulu mabini."
Ezra2:66 Amahashe abo ibingamakhulu asixhenxe, anamanci mathathu anesithandathu; oondlebende babo ibingamakhulu amabini, anamanci mane anabahlanu;"
Ezra2:67 iinkamela zabo ibingamakhulu amane, anamanci mathathu anantlanu; amaesile ibingamawaka amathandathu, anamakhulu asixhenxe, anamanci mabini."
Ezra2:68 Ke inxenye yeentloko zezindlu zooyise zakwaSirayeli zabe zisendlwini kaYehova eYerusalem, zazibingelela imibingelelo endlwini kaThixo, ukuba ime endaweni yayo."
Ezra2:69 Banikela ebuncwaneni bomsebenzi igolide engamawaka amashumi amathandathu, nesilivere yangamawaka amahlanu eemina, nekhulu leengubo ezingaphantsi zababingeleli, ngokwamandla abo."
Ezra2:70 Ababingeleli, nabaLevi, nabanye abantu, neemvumi, nabamasango, namaNethini, bahlala emizini yakowabo, oonyana bakaSirayeli bonke emizini yabo."
Ezra3:1 Ithe yakufika inyanga yesixhenxe, oonyana bakaSirayeli besemizini yabo, bahlangana abantu eYerusalem njengamntu mnye."
Ezra3:2 Wesuka wema ooYeshuwa unyana kaYotsadaki, nabazalwana bakhe, ababingeleli, noZerubhabheli unyana kaSalatiyeli, nabazalwana bakhe, basakha isibingelelo soThixo kaSirayeli, ukuze benze amadini anyukayo phezu kwaso, njengoko wenzayo ebhalwe emthethweni kaYehova. uMoses umfo wakwaThixo."
Ezra3:3 Basibeka isibingelelo phezu kwesiseko saso; ngokuba bafikelwa kukunkwantya ngenxa yabemi baloo mazwe; yaye banikela iminikelo etshiswayo kuYehova phezu kwayo, iminikelo etshiswayo yakusasa nangokuhlwa."
Ezra3:4 Babuya benza umthendeleko weminquba, njengoko kubhaliweyo;"
Ezra3:5 Emva koko wenza umnikelo otshiswayo othe rhoqo, wokuthwasa kwenyanga nowawo wonke amatheko angcwele kaYehova nawo wonke umntu obingelela ngokuzithandela kuYehova."
Ezra3:6 Baqala ngomhla wokuqala wenyanga yesixhenxe ukwenza amadini anyukayo kuYehova; Kodwa isiseko setempile kaYehova sasingekabekwa.
Ezra3:7 Imali bayinika abaqingqi bamatye nabachweli; nokudla nento eselwayo newayini kubantu baseTsidon nabaseTire, bathabathe imisedare eLebhanon, bayise elwandle lwaseYopa, ngokwesipho sikaKoreshi ukumkani wasePersi."
Ezra3:8 Ngonyaka wesibini wokungena kwabo endlwini yoTHIXO oyinyaniso eYerusalem, ngenyanga yesibini, uZerubhabheli unyana kaShalatiyeli noYeshuwa unyana kaYosadaki abanye abazalwana babo, ababingeleli nabaLevi baqala ke bonke abo babephume ekuthinjweni beza eYerusalem; yaye wamisela abaLevi ukususela kwabaneminyaka engamashumi amabini ubudala ukusa phezulu ukuba benze umsebenzi wendlu kaYehova."
Ezra3:9 Wema ke uYesu noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe, uKademiyeli noonyana bakhe, oonyana bakaYuda, ukukhokela abasebenzi bendlu yoThixo oyinyaniso: oonyana bakaHenadadi noonyana babo nabazalwana babo, abaLevi."
Ezra3:10 Abakhi bayiseka itempile kaYehova, bamisa ababingeleli, bevathe iingubo ezinde, benamaxilongo; nabaLevi, oonyana baka-Asafu, bephethe amacangci, bedumisa uYehova, ngokomyalelo kaDavide ukumkani kwaSirayeli."
Ezra3:11 Bavuma kunye bezohlwaya, bezohlwaya kuYehova; ngokuba elungile, ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe kuSirayeli. Lwaduma ngodumo olukhulu lonke uhlanga, ekumdumiseni kwabo uYehova, ngenxa yokuba iziseko zendlu kaYehova zisekiwe."
Ezra3:12 Ke isininzi sababingeleli, nabaLevi, neentloko zezindlu zooyise, namadoda amakhulu, awayeyibonile indlu yokuqala ekusekweni kwale ndlu emehlweni abo, balila ngezwi elikhulu; yaye abaninzi baduma ngovuyo."
Ezra3:13 Apho abantu babengenakulihlula ilizwi lovuyo nokukhala kwabantu;
Ezra4:1 Zakuva iintshaba zakwaYuda nezakwaBhenjamin, ukuba bathinjwa bamakhele indlu uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli."
Ezra4:2 Beza kuZerubhabheli nakwiintloko zezindlu zooyise, bathi kubo, Masakhe ndawonye nani, ngokuba simquqela uThixo wenu njengani; sibingelela kuye kususela kwimihla kaEsar-hadon, ukumkani waseAsiriya, owasizisa apha."
Ezra4:3 Wathi uZerubhabheli, noYoshuwa, neentloko zezindlu zooyise zakwaSirayeli kubo, Anithe nakazani nathi ekumakheleni uThixo wethu indlu; Thina siya kumakhela kunye uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, njengoko wasiwisela umthetho ngako uSireshi ukumkani wasePersi."
Ezra4:4 Baza abantu belizwe bazenza buthathaka izandla zoonyana bakaYuda baza babaphazamisa ngesakhiwo.
Ezra4:5 Yaye waqesha abantu abacebisa ukuba balitshitshise icebo labo, yonke imihla kaKoreshi ukumkani wasePersi, kwada kwezisa ebukumkanini bukaDariyo ukumkani wasePersi."
Ezra4:6 Ngexesha lika-Ahaswerosi, ekuqalekeni kobukumkani bakhe, babhala, bebancetheza abemi bakwaYuda nabaseYerusalem."
Ezra4:7 Nangemihla ka-Artashashta uBhislam, noMitredati, noTabhele, nabalingane babo, babhalela uArtashashta ukumkani wasePersi; incwadi leyo yayibhalwe ngesiAram, icaciswa ngesiAram."
Ezra4:8 uRehum umthetheli wenkundla, noShimshayi umbhali, babhala incwadi ngeYerusalem, kuArtashashta ukumkani."
Ezra4:9 Babhala ke ooRehum umthetheli, noShimshayi, umbhali, namakholwane abo; namaDina, namaPersi, namaTarpeli, namaPersi, namaArgi, namaBhabheli, namaShushan, namaHava, namaElam;"
Ezra4:10 nezinye iintlanga, awazithimbayo uAsnapare omkhulu, obekekileyo, wazibeka emizini yakwaSamari, nakweminye nganeno koMlambo umEfrati, ngaloo mihla."
Ezra4:11 Yiyo le ikopi yencwadi abayithumela ku-Artashashta ukumkani; Abakhonzi bakho, amadoda aphesheya koMlambo, njalonjalo."
Ezra4:12 Wanga uYehova ayazi ukuba amaYuda anyukileyo evela kuni, eze kuthi eYerusalem, eza kwakha isixeko esigwilikayo, esikhohlakeleyo, azakha iindonga zaso, amisa iziseko."
Ezra4:13 Ke kaloku makayazi ukumkani ukuba, ukuba esi sixeko sakhiwa neendonga zabuya zakhiwa, aziyi kukhulula nayiphi na irhafu okanye irhafu, yaye oko kuya kubeka engozini imali yookumkani."
Ezra4:14 Ngoku ekubeni sinegunya lokuyinyamekela indlu yokumkani, singakubonanga nokungabi nambeko kokumkani, ngoko sithumele ukumqinisekisa ukumkani;"
Ezra4:15 ukuze uphengululwe encwadini yemicimbi yooyihlo; niya kufumana encwadini yeZiganeko, nazi ukuba lo mzi ngumzi ozele lukreqo, uyingozi kookumkani bawo namazwe aso, nokuba bavuse imvukelo kuwo. Yini na ukuba lo mzi ubhubhe?"
Ezra4:16 Sithi kukumkani, ukuba uthe wakhiwa lo mzi, zamiswa neendonga zawo, anisayi kuba nasabelo njengalo nganeno komlambo;"
Ezra4:17 Ukumkani wathumela impendulo kuRehum umthetheli, noShimshayi umbhali, namakholwane abo abehleli kwaSamari, nabanye phesheya koMlambo, wathi, Luxolo lwenu lwenze njalo."
Ezra4:18 Ileta leyo nisithumele yona yacaca phambi kwam.
Ezra4:19 Ndakhupha umyalelo, kwaza kwaphandwa, kwafunyanwa ukuba esi sixeko sidala saba nemvukelo nxamnye nookumkani, yaye kukho imvukelo nemvukelo kuso."
Ezra4:20 Kananjalo eYerusalem bekukho ookumkani abanamandla, nabanegunya kuwo onke amazwe aphesheya koMlambo; kwaye iirhafu, iirhafu kunye neerhafu zihlawulwa kubo."
Ezra4:21 Yazisani ke ngoko, niwamise la madoda, ukuze singakhiwa esi sixeko, ndide ndikhuphe omnye umyalelo ophuma kum."
Ezra4:22 Zilindeni ngoku, hleze nikwenze oko;"
Ezra4:23 Ithe yakuleswa imibhalo yencwadi ka-Artashashta ukumkani phambi koRehum noShimshayi umbhali nabalingane babo, benyuka ngokukhawuleza baya eYerusalem kumaYuda, bawamisa ngenkani nangamandla."
Ezra4:24 Waza wamiswa umsebenzi wendlu kaThixo eYerusalem. Yaqhuba ke yangunyaka wesibini wolawulo lukaDariyo ukumkani wasePersi.
Ezra5:1 Ke kaloku abaprofeti, ooHagayi umprofeti, noZekariya unyana kaIdo, baprofeta kumaYuda abekwaYuda neYerusalem, egameni likaThixo kaSirayeli."
Ezra5:2 Ngoko uZerubhabheli unyana kaShalatiyeli noYeshuwa unyana kaYotsadaki baphakama baza baqalisa ukwakha indlu kaThixo eYerusalem, yaye baba nabaprofeti bakaThixo ababebanceda."
Ezra5:3 Ngelo xesha uTatenayi, irhuluneli engasentshona yoMlambo, noSetarbhosnayi namaqabane abo beza kubo baza bathi kubo: “Ngubani na oniyaleleyo ukuba nakhe le ndlu nize nakhe olo donga?"
Ezra5:4 Sathi kubo, Ngoobani na amagama amadoda ayakhayo le ndlu?"
Ezra5:5 Ke iliso loThixo wabo libe liphezu kwezikhulu zamaYuda, ababa nako ukubathintela, ide loo nto iye kufikelela kuDariyo; Baphendula ke ngokubhala ngayo loo nto."
Ezra5:6 Incwadi leyo, ooTatenayi, ibamba langaneno koMlambo, noShetar-bhosnayi, nabalingane bakhe babaFarisi abaphesheya koMlambo, bayithumelayo kuDariyo ukumkani;"
Ezra5:7 Bathumela kuye incwadi leyo; KuDariyo ukumkani, uxolo luphelele!"
Ezra5:8 Ngamana iNkosi yazi ukuba sangena kummandla wakwaYuda, endlwini kaThixo omkhulu, eyakhiwe ngamatye amakhulu, yaxhonywa iindonga ezindongeni, yaye lo msebenzi uqhubeka ngokukhawuleza, yaye usaqhubeka abanempumelelo ezandleni zabo."
Ezra5:9 Ngoko sabuza kumadoda amakhulu saza sathi kuwo: “Ngubani na oniyalele ukuba niyakhe le ndlu nize nakhe ezi ndonga?
Ezra5:10 Kananjalo sacela ukuba siqiniselwe namagama awo, ukuze siwabhale phantsi amagama amadoda aziintloko zawo;"
Ezra5:11 Basiphendula, bathi, Singabakhonzi bakaThixo wezulu nomhlaba; sakha indlu eyayakhiwe kwiminyaka emininzi eyadlulayo, awayakhayo ukumkani omkhulu wakwaSirayeli."
Ezra5:12 Kodwa emva kokuba oobawo bamqumbisayo uTHIXO wamazulu, babanikela esandleni sikaNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseKhaledi ukumkani waseBhabhiloni, owayitshabalalisayo le ndlu waza wathimbela abantu eBhabhiloni."
Ezra5:13 Ke ngomnyaka wokuqala kaKoreshi ukumkani waseBhabheli, ukumkani uKoreshi wathi, mayakhiwe le ndlu kaThixo;"
Ezra5:14 Neempahla zendlu kaThixo zegolide nezesilivere, awazithabathayo uNebhukadenetsare etempileni eseYerusalem, nasetempileni yaseBhabheli, ukumkani uKoreshi wazithabatha etempileni yaseBhabheli; lalikho negama lokumkani. uSheshbhatsare, awamenza irhuluneli;"
Ezra5:15 Wathi kuye, Thabatha ezi mpahla, uye nazo etempileni eseYerusalem, indlu kaThixo yakhelwe endaweni yayo."
Ezra5:16 Waza weza lo Sheshbhatsare, wabeka isiseko sendlu kaThixo eYerusalem;"
Ezra5:17 Ke kaloku, ukuba kulungile kukumkani, makuphengululwe endlwini yobuncwane bokumkani eBhabhiloni, enoba ngumbandela kaKoreshi kusini na ukumkani wokunikela umyalelo wokuba yakhiwe le ndlu kaThixo eYerusalem, ukumkani makasithumele ukuthanda kwakhe kulo mbandela."
Ezra6:1 Waza uDariyo ukumkani wawisa umthetho; kwaphicothwa endlwini khona eBhabheli.
Ezra6:2 Kwaye kwafunyanwa incwadi esongwayo eAkemeta, kwibhotwe, kummandla wamaMedi, yaye kuyo kwakukho incwadi ebhalwe ngolu hlobo."
Ezra6:3 Ngonyaka wokuqala kaKoreshi ukumkani, ukumkani uKoreshi wakhupha umyalelo ngokuphathelele indlu yoThixo oyinyaniso eYerusalem: “Imele imiselwe ngokuqinileyo; Ukuphakama kwayo bekuziikubhite ezimashumi mathandathu, nobubanzi bayo bebuziikubhite ezimashumi mathandathu;"
Ezra6:4 Yibani neengcamba ezintathu zamatye amakhulu, nocamba lwemithi emitsha; kwaye iindleko zifanele ziphume endlwini yokumkani."
Ezra6:5 Kananjalo iimpahla zendlu kaThixo zegolide nezesilivere, awazithabathayo uNebhukadenetsare etempileni eYerusalem, wazisa eBhabheli, zibuyisiwe zabuyiselwa etempileni eseYerusalem, iyileyo endaweni yaso, nendawo yaso endlwini kaThixo."
Ezra6:6 Ke ngoko, Tatenayi, nkosi nganeno koMlambo, nawe Setar-bhosnayi, namahlakani akho aseFarsi phesheya koMlambo, hlukanani nalapho;"
Ezra6:7 wushiyeni umsebenzi wale ndlu kaThixo; irhuluneli yamaYuda namadoda amakhulu amaYuda mayiyakhe le ndlu kaThixo endaweni yayo.
Ezra6:8 Kananjalo ndikuwisela umthetho, wenjenje kumadoda amakhulu amaYuda, ukwakha le ndlu kaThixo: nasebutyebini bokumkani, nasesichumeni nganeno koMlambo, indleko zirhole kwangoko kube kanye kula madoda ngoko abangeni endleleni."
Ezra6:9 Kuya kuba yimihla yabo, iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo, neenkunzi zeegusha, neemvana, zamadini anyukayo oThixo wezulu, ingqolowa, netyuwa, newayini, neoli, ngokomyalelo wababingeleli baseYerusalem; ngosuku olunikiweyo ngaphandle kokulibazisa;"
Ezra6:10 ukuze benze idini elivumba limnandi kuThixo wamazulu, bathandazele ubomi bokumkani noonyana bakhe."
Ezra6:11 Kananjalo ndawisa umthetho wokuba nabani na othe waliguqula elo lizwi, makagawule umthi endlwini yakhe, awuxhome, axhonywe kuwo; nendlu yakhe mayenziwe udaka ngenxa yayo."
Ezra6:12 uThixo obeke igama lakhe apho uya kubatshabalalisa bonke ookumkani neentlanga eziya kuthabathekela kubo ukutshintsha nokutshabalalisa le ndlu kaThixo eYerusalem. Mna, Dariyo, ndikhuphe umyalelo; makwenziwe ngokukhawuleza."
Ezra6:13 Waza uTatenayi irhuluneli engaphaya koMlambo, uSetarbhosnayi namaqabane abo, benza ngokukhawuleza ngokomyalelo kaDariyo ukumkani."
Ezra6:14 Amadoda amakhulu amaYuda ayesakha yaye aqhubeka ephumelela ngomprofeti uHagayi noZekariya unyana kaIdo. Bakha baza bagqiba ngokomyalelo kaTHIXO kaSirayeli nangokomyalelo kaKoreshi noDariyo noArtashashta ukumkani wasePersi.
Ezra6:15 Le ndlu yagqitywa ngomhla wesithathu wenyanga enguAdare, oko kukuthi, ngonyaka wesithandathu wolawulo lukaDariyo ukumkani."
Ezra6:16 Oonyana bakaSirayeli, ababingeleli, nabaLevi, nabathinjwa, bavula loo ndlu kaThixo bevuya;"
Ezra6:17 Ekungcwalisweni kwale ndlu kaThixo, ikhulu leenkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo, namakhulu amabini eenkunzi zeegusha, namakhulu amane eemvana; zalishumi elinazibini izikhova, zedini lesono, ngenxa yamaSirayeli onke, ngokwenani lezizwe zakwaSirayeli."
Ezra6:18 Babamisa ababingeleli ngokwamaqela abo, nabaLevi ngokwamaqela abo, ukuba bakhonze uYehova eYerusalem; njengoko kubhaliweyo encwadini kaMoses."
Ezra6:19 Oonyana basemfudusweni bayenza ipasika ngomhla weshumi elinesine wenyanga yokuqala;
Ezra6:20 Bahlanjululwa ababingeleli nabaLevi ngandawonye, bahlambuluka bonke bephela, bawabingelela amabanjwa onke nabazalwana babo nababingeleli ngenxa yabo ngepasika."
Ezra6:21 Badla ke oonyana bakaSirayeli ababebuyile ekuthinjweni nabo bonke ababezahlule kubunyhukunyhuku beentlanga zehlabathi besiya kufuna uYehova uThixo kaSirayeli;
Ezra6:22 Benza umthendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele imihla yasixhenxe bevuyile, ngokuba uYehova ebebavuyisile, wabanika intliziyo yokumkani waseAsiriya, ukuze izandla zabo zomelezwe emsebenzini wendlu kaThixo kaSirayeli, uThixo kaSirayeli."
Ezra7:1 Emveni koko, ebukumkanini buka-Artashashta ukumkani wasePersi, uEzra, unyana kaSeraya, unyana ka-Azariya, unyana kaHilekiya,"
Ezra7:2 unyana kaShalum, unyana kaTsadoki, unyana ka-Ahitubhi,"
Ezra7:3 unyana ka-Amariya, unyana ka-Azariya, unyana kaMerayoti,"
Ezra7:4 unyana kaSeraya, unyana kaUzi, unyana kaBhuki,"
Ezra7:5 unyana ka-Abhishuwa, unyana kaPinehasi, unyana kaElazare, unyana ka-Aron, umbingeleli omkhulu;"
Ezra7:6 Wenyuka lo uEzra, evela eBhabheli; wayengoyena mbhali ubalaseleyo emyalelweni kaMoses, awawuwisayo uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli;"
Ezra7:7 Bambi boonyana bakaSirayeli, nababingeleli, nabaLevi, neemvumi, nabamasango, nabakhonzi betempile, benyuka baya eYerusalem ngomnyaka wesixhenxe ka-Artashashta ukumkani."
Ezra7:8 Wafika eYerusalem ngenyanga yesihlanu, ngonyaka wesixhenxe wokumkani."
Ezra7:9 Kuba ngomhla wokuqala wenyanga yokuqala wenyuka ephuma eBhabhiloni, yaye ngomhla wokuqala wenyanga yesihlanu weza eYerusalem, ngokwesandla esilungileyo sikaThixo wakhe esasiphezu kwakhe."
Ezra7:10 uEzra wayezimisele ukufuna umthetho kaYehova nokuwuzalisekisa nokufundisa imithetho nezigwebo kwaSirayeli.
Ezra7:11 Nguwo lo umbhalo wencwadi leyo uKumkani uArtashashta wayinika uEzra, umbingeleli, unobhala, unobhala wamazwi emiyalelo kaYehova nemiyalelo yakhe eyamiselwa kwaSirayeli."
Ezra7:12 uArtashashta, ukumkani wookumkani, kuEzra umbingeleli, umphathi kaThixo wamazulu, uxolo olupheleleyo, ngelo xesha."
Ezra7:13 Ndikhupha umyalelo wokuba bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli nababingeleli babo nabaLevi ebukumkanini bam, abo ngokuzithandela kwabo banqwenela ukunyuka baye eYerusalem, mabahambe nawe."
Ezra7:14 Wena uthunywe ngukumkani namaphakathi akhe abasixhenxe, ukuba uye kuwahlola amaYuda neYerusalem, ngokomthetho kaThixo wakho osesandleni sakho;"
Ezra7:15 bathabathe isilivere negolide, abayinika ukumkani namaphakathi akhe, ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo, bayinike uThixo kaSirayeli, ondlu yakhe iseYerusalem;"
Ezra7:16 nayo yonke isilivere negolide, oyifumanayo ezweni lonke laseBhabheli, kwaneminikelo yokuqhutywa yintliziyo yabantu, neyababingeleli, abaqhutywa yintliziyo kumbingelelo wendlu kaThixo wabo eYerusalem;"
Ezra7:17 ukuze nikhawuleze nithenge iinkunzi zeenkomo neenkunzi zeegusha neemvana neminikelo yazo yasemlilweni neminikelo yazo ethululwayo ngale mali nize niyinikele esibingelelweni sendlu kaThixo wenu eYerusalem.
Ezra7:18 Nantoni na esukuba ilungile kuwe nabazalwana bakho noyenza ngesilivere nangegolide eseleyo, niyenze ngokokuthanda kukaThixo wenu."
Ezra7:19 Ke iimpahla ozinikiweyo zenkonzo yendlu yoThixo wakho, uzigcine phambi koThixo waseYerusalem;"
Ezra7:20 Ke yonke into efunekayo yendlu kaThixo wakho, osukuba unethuba lokuyinika, yikhuphe ebuncwaneni bokumkani;"
Ezra7:21 Kananjalo, mna, kumkani Artashashta, ndibawisela umthetho bonke abagcini-ndyebo abaphesheya koMlambo, ukuba konke akubizayo uEzra, umbingeleli, owazi ngomthetho kaThixo wamazulu, kukwenze kamsinya;"
Ezra7:22 ukusa kwikhulu leetalente zesilivere noku ukusa kwikhulu leeshekele zengqolowa ukusa kwikhulu leengqayi zewayini nokusa kwikhulu leengqayi zeoli netyuwa kungaxelwa ukuba ingakanani na.
Ezra7:23 Yonke into engomthetho kaThixo wamazulu mayenzelwe indlu kaThixo wamazulu ngenyameko; kuba kungani na ukuba bufikelwe buburhalarhume ubukumkani bokumkani noonyana bakhe?
Ezra7:24 Kananjalo ndithi kuni, akuvumelekile ukuba kuhlawulwe irhafu, nokuba kuthatyathwe, nokuba kuthatyathwe, nokuba kulunge kubabingeleli, nabaLevi, neemvumi, nabamasango, nabakhonzi betempile, nabakhonzi bale ndlu kaThixo."
Ezra7:25 Wena ke, Ezra, ngokobulumko bukaThixo wakho obusesandleni sakho, zikhethele abagwebi nabagwebi abanokugweba bonke abantu abaphesheya koMlambo, bonke abayaziyo imithetho kaThixo wakho; ufundisa abangaziyo."
Ezra7:26 Ke bonke abasukuba bengawenzi umthetho kaThixo wakho, nomthetho wokumkani, maliwise isigwebo phambi kwakhe, nokuba sikukufa, nokuba kugxothwa, nokuba kukuhluthwa impahla, nokuba sekusentolongweni."
Ezra7:27 Makabongwe uYehova, uThixo woobawo, oyinikeleyo loo nto entliziyweni yokumkani, ukuba ayihombise indlu kaYehova eYerusalem."
Ezra7:28 Wandenzela inceba phambi kokumkani, namaphakathi akhe, naphambi kwabathetheli bonke bokumkani abangamagorha. Ndomelela njengoko sasiphezu kwam isandla sikaYehova uThixo wam, ndazihlanganisa izikhulu zakwaSirayeli, ukuba zinyuke nam."
Ezra8:1 Zizo ezi iintloko zezindlu zooyise, nemizalwane yabo benyuka nam baya eBhabheli, ebukumkanini buka-Artashashta ukumkani:"
Ezra8:2 koonyana bakaPinehasi yanguAsheriyeli; koonyana bakaItamare; koonyana bakaDavide; Hattush;
Ezra8:3 koonyana bakaSeganja, koonyana bakaFaro; uZakariya wayenekhulu elinamashumi amahlanu amadoda abhalisiweyo kwintsapho yakhe;"
Ezra8:4 koonyana bakaPahati-mowabhi; uElihunayi unyana kaSeraya ubenamadoda angamakhulu amabini;
Ezra8:5 koonyana bakaSeganja; unyana kaYagasiyeli enamadoda angamakhulu amathathu;
Ezra8:6 nakoonyana baka-Adin; uEbhedi, unyana kaYonatan, ubenamadoda amashumi mahlanu;"
Ezra8:7 koonyana bakaElam; uIsaya unyana ka-Ataliya ubenamashumi asixhenxe amadoda;
Ezra8:8 koonyana bakaShefatiya; uZebhadiya unyana kaMikayeli ubenamashumi asibhozo anamabini amadoda;
Ezra8:9 koonyana bakaYowabhi; nguObhadiya unyana kaYehiyeli, enamadoda angamakhulu amabini aneshumi elinesibhozo;"
Ezra8:10 koonyana bakaShelomiti; Unyana kaYosefu ubenamadoda alikhulu elinamanci mathandathu;
Ezra8:11 koonyana bakaBhebhayi; uZekariya unyana kaBhebhayi ubenamadoda amashumi mabini anesibhozo;
Ezra8:12 koonyana baseAshgade; uYohanan unyana kaHakatan ubenamadoda alikhulu elinashumi-nye;
Ezra8:13 koonyana bokugqibela baka-Adonikam abamagama angala, nguElifelete, noYehiyeli, noShemaya, benamashumi amathandathu amadoda;"
Ezra8:14 nakoonyana bakaBhigwayi; Utai kunye noSabude, namadoda angamashumi asixhenxe."
Ezra8:15 Ndababutha emlanjeni ongena eAhava; sahlala khona iintsuku zantathu; Ndabakhangela abantu nababingeleli, ndafika kungekho namnye woonyana bakaLevi."
Ezra8:16 Ndathuma ooEliyezere, noAriyeli, noShemaya, noElinatan, noYaribhi, noElinatan, noNatan, noZekariya, noMeshulam, abaziintloko; noYoyaribhi noElinatan, amadoda aziingqondi."
Ezra8:17 Ndabathumela ngokomyalelo kuIdo, umphathi wendlu kaSifiya, ndabaxelela into abaya kuyithetha kuIdo, nakubazalwana bakhe, amaBhetelehim, endlwini kaKasifiya, ukuba abakhonzi babo bangabendlu yethu ukuzisa ekhaya kuthi. uThixo."
Ezra8:18 Ngesandla esilungileyo sikaThixo wethu esasiphezu kwethu, basizisela indoda enengqiqo evela koonyana bakaMagali unyana kaLevi, unyana kaSirayeli; noSherebhiya noonyana bakhe nabazalwana bakhe, ishumi elinesibhozo;"
Ezra8:19 uHashabhiya wayekunye noIsaya koonyana bakaMerari, abantakwabo noonyana babo abangamashumi amabini;"
Ezra8:20 nakubakhonzi betempile, abathe uDavide neenkosana bababeka enkonzweni yabaLevi, abakhonzi betempile abangamakhulu amabini anamashumi amabini; wonke umntu uchazwa ngamagama."
Ezra8:21 Ke kaloku, ngakumlambo iAhawa, ndavakalisa umhla wokuzila ukudla, ukuze sizithobe phambi koThixo wethu, sizifunele indlela yobulungisa, thina noonyana bethu, nobutyebi bethu bonke."
Ezra8:22 Kuba ndandineentloni ukucela kukumkani iqela lamajoni nabakhweli-mahashe ukuba basincede silwe neentshaba endleleni, ngenxa yokuba sathetha nokumkani sathi: “Isandla soThixo wethu silungile kubo bonke abo bamfunayo ke amandla akhe nomsindo wakhe uphezu kwabo bonke ababuyayo kuye."
Ezra8:23 Ngoko sazila ukutya saza sambongoza uThixo wethu ngenxa yoku, waza wasibongoza."
Ezra8:24 Ndabanyula ababingeleli abakhulu abalishumi elinababini: ooSherebhiya, noHashabhiya, nabazalwana babo abalishumi;"
Ezra8:25 Wababela isilivere, negolide, nempahla, engumnikelo wendlu kaThixo wethu, lowo ukumkani nabacebisi bakhe nabalungiseleli bakhe namaSirayeli onke abewazisileyo khona."
Ezra8:26 Ndalinganisa nazo amakhulu amathandathu anamanci mahlanu eetalente zesilivere, nekhulu leempahla zesilivere, nekhulu leetalente zegolide;"
Ezra8:27 namashumi amabini eendebe zegolide ziliwaka leedrarhima; neempahla ezimbini zobhedu olubengezela, zinqweneleka njengegolide."
Ezra8:28 Ndathi kubo, Ningcwele kuYehova; izinto nazo zingcwele; nesilivere negolide zingumnikelo wabaqhutywa yintliziyo kuYehova, uThixo wooyihlo."
Ezra8:29 Uyigcine, uyigcine, ude uyibeke phambi kwababingeleli abakhulu, nabaLevi, neentloko zezindlu zooyise zoonyana bakaSirayeli, eYerusalem, emagumbini endlu kaYehova."
Ezra8:30 Ababingeleli nabaLevi bawathabatha ke umlinganiso wesilivere negolide nempahla, ukuba bawuzise eYerusalem endlwini yoThixo wethu."
Ezra8:31 Ngomhla weshumi elinesibini wenyanga yokuqala sawushiya umlambo iAhava, saya eYerusalem; kodwa isandla soThixo wethu saba phezu kwethu, wasihlangula esandleni seentshaba nakwabasilindileyo."
Ezra8:32 Safika ke eYerusalem, sahlala khona iintsuku zantathu."
Ezra8:33 Ngosuku lwesine balinganisa ubunzima besilivere, negolide, neempahla zendlu yoThixo wethu, ngesandla sikaMeremoti unyana kaUriya, umbingeleli; WayenoElazare unyana kaPinehasi; kunye noYozabhadi unyana kaYeshuwa, noNowa unyana kaBhinuwi, abaLevi;"
Ezra8:34 Ngenani nangobunzima bayo nganye nganye, yaye bonke ubunzima babhalwa phantsi ngelo xesha."
Ezra8:35 Oonyana basemfudusweni basondeza amadini anyukayo kuThixo kaSirayeli: iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo zalishumi elinambini, ngenxa yamaSirayeli onke, neenkunzi zezimvu zaba ngamashumi asithoba anantandathu, neemvana zamashumi asixhenxe anesixhenxe, zalishumi elinambini izikhova zesono."
Ezra8:36 Bayinikela imiyalelo kakumkani kubalungiseleli bakakumkani nakwirhuluneli engasempuma yoMlambo umEfrate, yaye baxhasa uhlanga nendlu yoThixo oyinyaniso."
Ezra9:1 Kwathi, kwakusenzeka ezo zinto, beza kum izikhulu, bathi, Oonyana bakaSirayeli, nababingeleli, nabaLevi, abazahlulanga kubantu baloo mazwe, kumaKanan, namaHeti, ukuba benze amasikizi abo namaPersi, namaYebhusi, nama-Amon, namaMowabhi, namaYiputa, nama-Amori."
Ezra9:2 Bazizeka ezintombini zabo, bazizekela bona noonyana babo, yaza yaxubana imbewu engcwele neentlanga zaloo mazwe; ewe, isandla seenkosana neenkosana ibiyeyona inkulu kolu lwaphulo-mthetho."
Ezra9:3 Ndithe ndakuva oko, ndazikrazula iingubo zam nengubo yam, ndazihluthula iinwele zam neendevu zam, ndahlala phantsi ndimangalisiwe."
Ezra9:4 Babuthelana kum bonke begubha ngamazwi oThixo kaSirayeli, ngenxa yobubi bomhambi; ndahlala ndimangalisiwe, kwada kwafika umbingelelo wangokuhlwa."
Ezra9:5 Ndema phambi kombingelelo wangokuhlwa; ndakrazula isambatho sam nesambatho sam, ndaguqa ngamadolo, ndazolulela izandla zam kuYehova uThixo wam,"
Ezra9:6 Ndathi, Camagu, Thixo wam, ndidanile, ndibuhlungu, ndakubuphakamisela kuwe ubuso bam, Thixo wam;"
Ezra9:7 Kususela kwimihla yoobawo, sisetyaleni elikhulu unanamhla; ngenxa yobugwenxa bethu sanikelwa thina, nookumkani bethu, nababingeleli bethu, esandleni sookumkani bala mazwe, umkhonto, nokuthinjwa, nokuphangwa, nokucukucezwa kobuso bethu, njengoko kunjalo namhla."
Ezra9:8 Kaloku, ngoku, uYehova uThixo wethu, okwethutyana, uya kusihawukela ngokusishiyela abasindileyo, wasishiyela isikhonkwane engcweleni yakhe, ukuze uThixo wethu awakhanyisele amehlo ethu, awaphumze."
Ezra9:9 Kuba besingamakhoboka; Noko ke, uThixo wethu akasishiyanga ebukhobokeni bethu; wesuka wasenzela inceba phambi kookumkani bamaPersi, wasinika umphefumlo, ukuba siyakhe indlu yoThixo wethu, siwalungise amanxuwa ayo, asinikele udonga lokungqinga ilizwe lakwaYuda, iYerusalem."
Ezra9:10 Kaloku, Thixo wethu, sothini na emveni koko? ngokuba siyishiyile imithetho yakho;"
Ezra9:11 owawisa umthetho ngawo ngabakhonzi bakho, abaprofeti, wathi, Ilizwe eniya kulidla ilifa lilizwe elingcolileyo, lizele amanqambi abantu baloo mazwe, namasikizi abo, athabathele kwelinye icala ase ekupheleni ngokungcola kwabo."
Ezra9:12 Ke ngoko iintombi zenu musani ukuzendisela koonyana bazo, neentombi zabo ningazithabatheli koonyana benu, ningalufuni uxolo lwazo nokuba yinzuzo kubo; abantwana ngonaphakade."
Ezra9:13 Yaye emva kwako konke okusihleleyo ngenxa yezenzo zethu ezimbi nangenxa yezikreqo zethu ezikhulu, kungenxa yakho, Thixo wethu, othe wasibetha kancinane kunezono zethu ngokufanelekileyo, waza wasinika olu hlobo losindiso."
Ezra9:14 Siya kubuya siyihlambe na imithetho yakho, sinxulumane naba bantu bacekisekayo? Akuyi kuba noburhalarhume na kuthi ude usitshabalalise, kungabikho masalela nasindileyo?"
Ezra9:15 Yehova, Thixo kaSirayeli, ulilungisa, ngokuba sisesindile, njengoko kunjalo namhla; yabona, sisecaleni kwakho ebugwenxeni bethu, ngenxa yoko asinakuma phambi kwakho."
Ezra10:1 Ke kaloku akuthandaza uEzra, akukuxela oku, walila, equbudile phambi kwendlu kaThixo, kwabuthelana kuye ibandla elikhulu kakhulu lamadoda, nabafazi, nabantwana, bevela kwaSirayeli; balila ngokukrakra abantu."
Ezra10:2 Waphendula uSheganiya unyana kaYehiyeli, owoonyana bakaElam, wathi kuEzra, Sonile kuThixo wethu, sazeka abafazi bezinye iintlanga ezizweni zeli hlabathi; Noko ke, kukho ithemba kwaSirayeli ngokuphathelele lo mbandela."
Ezra10:3 Ke kaloku masenze umnqophiso noThixo wethu wokuba sisuse bonke abafazi nabantwana abazelwe ngabo, ngokwecebo lenkosi yam nalowo ugubha ngomyalelo woThixo wethu; kwaye kwenziwa ngokomthetho."
Ezra10:4 Vuka; ngokuba le nto yeyakho; nathi siya kuba nani; yomelelani niyenze.
Ezra10:5 Wesuka wema uEzra, wabafungisa ababingeleli abakhulu, nabaLevi, noonyana bonke bakaSirayeli, ukuba benze ngokwelo lizwi; Bafunga ke."
Ezra10:6 uEzra wema phambi kwendlu yoTHIXO oyinyaniso waza wangena kwigumbi likaYohanan unyana kaEliyashibhi, wafika apho, akadla sonka okanye asele manzi; ngokuba wayebuhlungu ngenxa yobugwenxa babo bafuduswayo."
Ezra10:7 Baduma kwaYuda naseYerusalem, kubo bonke oonyana basemfudusweni, ukuba babahlanganisele eYerusalem;"
Ezra10:8 kuthi, osukuba engafika emva kwemihla emithathu, ngokwecebo labathetheli namadoda amakhulu, ithinjwe yonke impahla yakhe, ahlulwe ebandleni labathinjwa."
Ezra10:9 Abuthelana eYerusalem onke amadoda akwaYuda nawakwaBhenjamin iintsuku ezintathu yaye iyinyanga entsha, ngomhla wamashumi amabini enyangeni leyo; Bahlala bonke abantu ebaleni lendlu kaThixo, bengcangcazela yile nto, naziimvula ezinkulu."
Ezra10:10 Wesuka wema umbingeleli uEzra waza wathi kubo: “Nenze ubugwenxa yaye nizeke abafazi bezinye iintlanga ngokwandisa isikreqo sikaSirayeli.
Ezra10:11 Mdumiseni kaloku, uYehova, uThixo wooyihlo, nenze ngokuthanda kwakhe, nizahlule kwesi sizukulwana, nakubafazi bezinye iintlanga."
Ezra10:12 Laphendula ke lonke ibandla ngezwi elikhulu, lathi, Sinako ukwenza ngokwelizwi lakho."
Ezra10:13 Kodwa baninzi abantu, yaye ilixesha leemvula ezinkulu, yaye asinako ukuma ngaphandle, yaye asingomsebenzi wemini enye okanye ezimbini, ngenxa yokuba abaninzi bethu baye benza ubugwenxa ngalo mbandela."
Ezra10:14 Mazime ke ngoko izikhulu zebandla lethu lonke, nabazeke abafazi bezinye iintlanga emizini yethu, ngamaxesha amisiweyo, namadoda amakhulu omzi ngamnye, nabagwebi bawo, ide ifike loo mzi uburhalarhume boThixo wethu."
Ezra10:15 NguYonatan unyana ka-Asayeli, noYahasiya unyana kaTikiva, kuphela abalungisayo kuloo ndawo; uMeshulam noSabhetayi umLevi bayabanceda."
Ezra10:16 Benjenjalo oonyana bamabanjwa; Umbingeleli uEzra, iintloko zezindlu zooyise ngokweentsapho zooyise, bonke bephela ngamagama abo, bazinyula baze bahlale phantsi ukuze bahlolisise umcimbi ngomhla wokuqala wenyanga yeshumi."
Ezra10:17 Bawatshabalalisa onke amadoda awayezeke abafazi bezinye iintlanga, ngomhla wokuqala wenyanga yokuqala;"
Ezra10:18 Koonyana bababingeleli kwafumaneka abafazi bezinye iintlanga: oonyana bakaYeshuwa unyana kaYotsadaki, nabazalwana babo; noMahaseya, noEliyezere, noYaribhi, noGedaliya."
Ezra10:19 Banika izandla zabo ukuba baqhawule umtshato nabafazi babo; ngokuba bebenetyala, baxhela inkunzi yegusha ngenxa yobugwenxa babo;"
Ezra10:20 koonyana bakaImere; uHanani noZebhadiya;
Ezra10:21 koonyana bakaHarim; noMahaseya, noEliya, noShemaya, noYehiyeli, no-Uziya;"
Ezra10:22 koonyana bakaPasgure; uElijonayi, noMahaseya, noIshmayeli, noNataniyeli, noYozabhadi, noElasa;"
Ezra10:23 nakubaLevi; uYozabhadi, noShimehi, noKelaya, okwanguKelita, noPetaya, noYuda, noEliyezere;"
Ezra10:24 nakwiemvumi; noEliyashibhi nakubagcini-masango; uShalum noTeleme noUri;
Ezra10:25 koonyana bakaParosi yangu-Eriyeli; uRamiya, noYesiya, noMalekiya, noMiyamin, noElazare, noMalekiya, noBhenaya;"
Ezra10:26 koonyana bakaElam; noMataniya, noZekariya, noYehiyeli, noAbhedi, noYeremiya, noEliya;"
Ezra10:27 koonyana bakaSathu; uEliyonayi, uEliyashibhi, uMataniya, uYeremiya, uSabhadi, noAsaya;"
Ezra10:28 nakoonyana bakaBhebhayi; uYohanan, uHananiya, uSabhayi noAtlayi;"
Ezra10:29 koonyana bakaBhani; noMeshulam, noMaluge, noAdaya, noYashubhi, noShehali, noRamoti;"
Ezra10:30 koonyana bakaPahati-mowabhi; nguAdena, noKelali, noBhenaya, noMahaseya, noMataniya, noBhete-saleli, noBhinuwi, noManase;"
Ezra10:31 koonyana bakaHarim; uEliyezere, uIshiya, uMalekiya, uShemaya, uSimon,"
Ezra10:32 uBhenjamin, uMaleki, noShemariya;"
Ezra10:33 koonyana bakaHashum yangu nguMatenayi, noMatatha, noSabhadi, noElifeleti, noYeremiya, noManase, noShimehi;"
Ezra10:34 koonyana bakaBhani; uMahadayi, uAmram noUweli,"
Ezra10:35 uBhenaya, uBhedeya, uKelu,"
Ezra10:36 uVanya, uMeremoti, uEliyashibhi,"
Ezra10:37 uMataniya, uMatenayi, noYahasau,"
Ezra10:38 noBhani, noBhinuwi, noShimehi;"
Ezra10:39 noShelemiya, noNatan, noAdaya,"
Ezra10:40 neMakenadebhayi, neShashayi, neSharayi,"
Ezra10:41 noAzareli, noShelemiya, noShemariya,"
Ezra10:42 uShalum, noAmariya, noYosefu;"
Ezra10:43 koonyana baseNebho; uYehiyeli, noMattitja, noSabhadi, noSebhina, noYadawu, noYoweli, noBhenaya."
Ezra10:44 Bonke bazeka abafazi bezinye iintlanga, baza nabanye babo baba nabantwana."
Nehemiah1:1 Amazwi kaNehemiya unyana kaHagaliya. Ngenyanga enguKislevu, ngomnyaka wamashumi amabini, ndiseShushan komkhulu,"
Nehemiah1:2 Kwafika uHanani, omnye wakubazalwana bam, yena namanye amadoda akwaYuda; ndaza ndababuza ngamaYuda awayekhululekile awayesele ekuthinjweni, nangeYerusalem."
Nehemiah1:3 Bathi kum, Aphambe, abaseleyo abathinjwa, abaseleyo emhlabeni, balambe kakhulu; Zadilizwa iindonga zeYerusalem, namasango ayo atshiswe ngomlilo."
Nehemiah1:4 Ndathi ndakuweva la mazwi, ndahlala phantsi ndalila ndaza ndazila kangangeentsuku ezithile ndaza ndazila ukutya ndaza ndathandaza phambi koThixo wezulu."
Nehemiah1:5 Ndithi, Ndiyathandaza kuwe, Yehova, Thixo wamazulu, Thixo omkhulu, owoyikekayo, obagcinelayo umnqophiso nenceba abamthandayo, abayigcinayo imithetho yakhe;"
Nehemiah1:6 Phulaphula ngoko ezindlebeni zakho, uwavule amehlo akho, ukuze uwuve umthandazo womkhonzi wakho, endiwuthandazayo ngoku phambi kwakho, imini nobusuku, ndiwenzela oonyana bakaSirayeli, nakubakhonzi bakho, nezono zoonyana bakaSirayeli. Sivume ukuba sonile kuwe, mna nendlu kabawo sonile."
Nehemiah1:7 Sikwenze ngobubi obukhulu, yaye asiyigcinanga imiyalelo nemiyalelo nezigwebo owamwisela umthetho ngazo uMoses umkhonzi wakho."
Nehemiah1:8 Khumbula ilizwi owamwisela umthetho ngalo uMoses umkhonzi wakho, elithi, Ukuba nithe nameneza, ndonichithachitha phakathi kweentlanga."
Nehemiah1:9 Kwaye ukuba uyaguqukela kum kwaye uxhase imiyalelo yam kwaye uyenze; Nokuba bathe babakho kuni abathatyathwe esiphelweni sezulu, ndobahlanganisela khona, ndibazise kuloo ndawo ndiyinyulileyo, ukuba ndilimise khona igama lam."
Nehemiah1:10 Ke aba ngabakhonzi bakho, nabantu bakho, owabakhulula ngamandla akho amakhulu, nangesandla sakho esithe nkqi."
Nehemiah1:11 Ndiya kukhunga, Yehova, indlebe yakho iwuve umthandazo womkhonzi wakho, nomthandazo wabakhonzi bakho abaloyikayo igama lakho; ubabalo emehlweni ale ndoda. Kaloku mna ndandingumngcamli wokumkani."
Nehemiah2:1 Ngenyanga enguNisan, ngomnyaka wamashumi amabini ka-Artashashta ukumkani, bekukho iwayini phambi kwakhe, ndayithabatha iwayini leyo, ndayinika ukumkani. Ngoku ndandingenalusizi phambi kwakhe ngaphambili."
Nehemiah2:2 Wathi ukumkani kum, Kungani na ukuba ubuso bakho bube nje, ukuba bubi, ungasafi nje? ayonto ngaphandle kobuhlungu bentliziyo. Ndiye ndoyika kakhulu."
Nehemiah2:3 Wathi kukumkani, Ukumkani makadle ubomi ngonaphakade; Yini na ukuba ubuso bam bungabi bubi, ulinxuwa nje umzi, indawo yokungcwaba ooyihlo, amasango awo etshiswe ngomlilo?"
Nehemiah2:4 Wathi ukumkani kum, Ucela ntoni na? Ndathandaza ke kuThixo wamazulu."
Nehemiah2:5 Ndathi kukumkani, Ukuba ukumkani uthe wakubona kufanelekile, ukuba umkhonzi wakho lo abona kulungile kuwe, ndithumele kwaYuda, kuwo umzi wamangcwaba kabawo, ndiwakhe."
Nehemiah2:6 Wathi ukumkani kum (ukumkanikazi ehleli naye), Uhambo lwakho loba lolwexesha elingakanani na? kwaye uya kubuya nini? Ngoko ke, ukumkani wavuma ukundithuma; ndamnika ixesha."
Nehemiah2:7 Kananjalo ndathi kukumkani, Ukuba ukumkani uthe wathanda, mabanikwe iincwadi zam eziya kumabamba anganeno koMlambo, aze andise kwaYuda;"
Nehemiah2:8 nencwadi eya kuAsafu, umgcini wehlathi lokumkani, ukuba andinike imithi yokwenza imiqadi yeengcango zendlu yokumkani, neyodonga lomzi, neyendlu endiya kuyakhela indlu ndiya kuyaba. Wandinika ke ukumkani ngokwesandla sikaThixo esilungileyo esiphezu kwam."
Nehemiah2:9 Ndafika kumabamba anganeno koMlambo, ndawanika iincwadi zokumkani. Waza ukumkani wathumela nam abathetheli nabamahashe."
Nehemiah2:10 Xa uSanebhalati umHoron noTobhiya umkhonzi womAmoni bakuyivayo loo nto, baba buhlungu kakhulu xa kwafika enye indoda ukuze incede oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Nehemiah2:11 Ndafika ke eYerusalem, ndahlala khona iintsuku zantathu."
Nehemiah2:12 Ndavuka ebusuku, ndinamadoda ambalwa; Andixelelanga mntu into abeyibeke entliziyweni yam uThixo wam, ukuba ndiyenzele eYerusalem; Ndibe ndingenamaqegu, ibilelo lodwa bendikhwele kulo."
Nehemiah2:13 Ndaphuma ebusuku ngesango likaPhula phambi komhadi wenamba ndaya kwisango laseMoiteli, ndabona udonga lwaseYerusalem ludilika, namasango ayo etshiswe ngomlilo."
Nehemiah2:14 Ndaphuma ndaya esangweni leQula nechibi lokumkani; akwabakho ndawo yokuba lidlule iqegu endandikhwele kulo.
Nehemiah2:15 Ndanyuka ebusuku ndaya entilini yomlambo, ndaza ndalugqala udonga, ndabuya ndangena ngesango lomfula, ndabuya."
Nehemiah2:16 Abaphathi babengazi apho ndandiye khona, nento endayenzayo; andiwaxelanga amaYuda, nababingeleli, nezikhulu, nabathetheli, nabanye abasebenzi."
Nehemiah2:17 Ndathi kubo, Niyabubona ububi esikubo, ukuba iYerusalem yinxuwa, ukuba iingcango zayo zitshiswe ngomlilo; yizani silwakhe udonga lweYerusalem, singabi saba lihlazo."
Nehemiah2:18 Ndabaxelela ukulunga kum isandla soThixo wam; namazwi okumkani, awawathethayo kum. Athi: Masilinde, masakhe. Bazomeleza izandla zabo ukuwenza lo msebenzi ulungileyo."
Nehemiah2:19 Kwathi kamsinya nje akuba uSanebhalati umHoron noTobhiya umkhonzi womAmoni noGeshem umArabhu bakuyivayo le nto, basuka bahlekisa ngathi baza basiphoxa besithi: “Yintoni le niyenzayo? Niya kugwilika na kukumkani?"
Nehemiah2:20 Ndabaphendula, ndathi kubo, uThixo wamazulu uya kusisikelela; ngoko ke, thina bakhonzi bakhe, siya kusuka sakhe; ke nina aninasabelo nalungelo nasikhumbuzo eYerusalem."
Nehemiah3:1 Wesuka wema uEliyashibhi umbingeleli omkhulu, nabazalwana bakhe ababingeleli, balakha isango lempahla emfutshane; balingcwalisa, bazifaka iingcango zalo; bayingcwalisa, besa enqabeni ende yeMeha, besa enqabeni ende kaHananeli."
Nehemiah3:2 Amadoda aseYeriko akha malunga naye; Phambi kwabo kwakha uSakure unyana kaImri;
Nehemiah3:3 Kodwa iSango Leentlanzi lakhiwa ngoonyana bakaHasenaha, nabo bafaka imiqadi yalo baza bafaka iingcango zalo nezitshixo nemivalo yalo."
Nehemiah3:4 uMeremoti, unyana kaUriya, unyana kaKeshe, emalunga nabo walungisa malungana nabo. Ke bona amaFilisti unyana kaBheriya, unyana kaMeshezabheli, alungisa; ngakubo waphiliswa uTsadoki, unyana kaBhahana."
Nehemiah3:5 Ngokuchasene nabo, abaLingwayo babuya bachacha; ke iingangamsha zabo azizingenisanga zona iintamo zazo enkonzweni yeNkosi yazo."
Nehemiah3:6 iSango Elidala lalilungiswa ngoYoyada unyana kaPasaki, noMeshulam unyana kaBhesodiya; bayifaka imiqadi, bazifaka iingcango zalo, nezitshixo zalo, nemivalo yalo."
Nehemiah3:7 Phezu kwabo uMelatiya waseGibheyon, noYadon waseMeronoti, amadoda aseGibheyon naseMizpa, etroneni yerhuluneli engasentshona yoMlambo umEfrati."
Nehemiah3:8 U-Uziyeli unyana kaHarehaya, umkhandi wegolide, malungana naye wayelungisa; Ngokuchasene naye, uHananiya unyana womnye wabaqholi wachacha, yaye bayiqinisa iYerusalem ukusa kudonga olubanzi."
Nehemiah3:9 Ecaleni kwabo, uRefaya unyana kaHure, ukumkani wesiqingatha sesithili saseYerusalem, elungisa;"
Nehemiah3:10 ngakubo kulungiswa nguYedaya unyana kaHarumafi, malungana nendlu yakhe; Kwaye phambi kwakhe waphila uHatus, unyana kaHasabhenja."
Nehemiah3:11 uMalekiya unyana kaHarim, noHashubhi, unyana kaPahati, wakwaMowabhi, balungisa esinye isithuba, nenqaba ende yeziko."
Nehemiah3:12 Ngakuye, kwakulungiswa nguShalum unyana kaHaloheshe, ukumkani wesiqingatha sesithili saseYerusalem, yena neentombi zakhe."
Nehemiah3:13 uDalepoort wambuyisela uHanun nabemi baseSanoage; balakha, bazifaka iingcango zalo nemivalo yalo nezitshixo zalo;"
Nehemiah3:14 Isango laseMoitedi lalilungiswa nguMalekiya, unyana kaRekabhi, umphathi wesithili saseBhete-hakereme; walakha, wazifaka iingcango zalo nezitshixo zalo nemivalo yalo."
Nehemiah3:15 Isango lequla lalilungiswa nguShalon unyana kaKolehose, ibamba lesithili saseMizpa; walakha, walifulela, wazifaka iingcango zalo, nezitshixo zalo, nemivalo yalo, nodonga lweChibi laseSilowa, emyezweni wokumkani, kwesa ezinyukweni zokuhla ukuya emzini kaDavide."
Nehemiah3:16 Emva kwakhe uNehemiya unyana ka-Ashbhuki, isiqingatha senkosana yaseBhete-tsure walungisa ukuya kutsho kwindawo ephambi kwengcwaba likaDavide ukuya echibini elalenziwe apho ukuya kufikelela kwindlu yamagorha."
Nehemiah3:17 Emva kwakhe abaLevi, uRehum unyana kaBhani, bahlaziya. Ecaleni kwakhe uHasábja, umphathi wesiqingatha seKehila, wayibuyisela indawo yakhe."
Nehemiah3:18 Emva kwakhe kwakha abazalwana babo uBhawayi unyana kaHenadade, inkosana yesiqingatha sesithili saseKehila."
Nehemiah3:19 Ngaphambi kwakhe uEzere unyana kaYeshuwa, inkosana yaseMizpa wayelungisa enye indawo emalunga nomnyango wendawo yokugcina izikrweqe embombeni yodonga."
Nehemiah3:20 Emva kwakhe kwakulungiswa nguBharuki, unyana kaSabhayi, esinye isithuba; kwanzima, kwathabathela embombeni yodonga, kwesa emnyango wendlu yombingeleli omkhulu, uEliyashibhi."
Nehemiah3:21 Emva kwakhe uMeremoti unyana kaUriya unyana kaKoshe walungisa esinye isithuba, ukususela kumnyango wendlu kaEliyashibhi ukusa ekupheleni kwendlu kaEliyashibhi."
Nehemiah3:22 Baphiliswa emva kwakhe ababingeleli, amadoda a entlango."
Nehemiah3:23 Emva kwakhe kwakulungiswa nguBhenjamin noHashubhi, malunga nendlu yabo. Emva kwakhe uAzariya, unyana kaMahaseya, unyana ka-Ananiyas, wabuyela endlwini yakhe."
Nehemiah3:24 Emva kwakhe kwakulungiswa nguBhinuwi unyana kaHenadade, esinye isithuba; kwathabathela endlwini ka-Azariya, kwesa embombeni yodonga, kwesa embombeni."
Nehemiah3:25 uPalali unyana kaUshayi, emalunga nembombo yodonga, nakwinqaba evelele yendlu yokumkani, ngasentendelezweni yentolongo. Emva kwakhe nguPedaya unyana kaParoshe."
Nehemiah3:26 Ngaphezu koko, amaNethini ahlala eOfele, ukuya kutsho kummandla ongakwimpuma yeSango laManzi nakwinqaba eveleleyo."
Nehemiah3:27 Emva koko iTekowa yalungisa enye indawo, malunga nenqaba enkulu ephume ngaphandle, ukuya kudonga lweOfele."
Nehemiah3:28 Encotsheni yesango lamahashe ababingeleli balungisa, elowo ekhangele endlwini yakhe."
Nehemiah3:29 Emva kwabo kwakulungiswa nguTsadoki, unyana kaImere, malunga nendlu yakhe; Emva kwakhe wachacha uShemaya unyana kaSeganja, umgcini wesango lasempumalanga."
Nehemiah3:30 Emva kwakhe kwakulungiswa nguHananiya unyana kaShelemiya, noHanun unyana wesithandathu kaShelafu, esinye isithuba. Kwathi emveni koko, uMeshulam, unyana kaBheriya, wayilungisa indlu yakhe;"
Nehemiah3:31 Emva kwakhe kwakulungiswa nguMalekiya, unyana womkhandi wegolide, ukuya kufikelela kwindawo yabakhonzi betempile nabarhwebi, phambi kwesango leMifkade, kwesa kwithambeka lembombo."
Nehemiah3:32 Phakathi kwethambeka lembombo ukuya kwiSango leegusha, kukho iingcibi zegolide nabarhwebi."
Nehemiah4:1 Akuva uSanebhalati ukuba silwakhile udonga, wacaphuka, waba nomsindo kakhulu, wawangcikiva amaYuda."
Nehemiah4:2 Wathetha phambi kwabazalwana bakhe naphambi kwamaqela aseSamariya, wathi: “Enza ntoni na la maYuda abuthathaka? baya kuziqinisa na? baya kubingelela na? ziya kuphela ngamini-nye? Angawasusa na amatye kwiimfumba zenkunkuma?"
Nehemiah4:3 uTobhiya umAmon wayenaye, wathi, Nokuba yintoni na abayakha ngayo, ukuba kuthe gqi impungutye, iya kuluchitha udonga lwabo lwamatye."
Nehemiah4:4 Yiva, Thixo wethu; ngokuba sideliwe; kwaye ubuyisele ihlazo labo phezu kweentloko zabo nokubanikela ukuba babe ngabathinjwa kwilizwe lokuthinjwa."
Nehemiah4:5 Musa ukubugquma ubungendawo babo, ungasivumeli sicinywe isono sabo phambi kwakho, ngenxa yokuba bakwenza intlekisa phambi kwabakhi."
Nehemiah4:6 Sakha ke udonga; kwahlanganiswa udonga lonke, kwada kwesiqingatha salo; ngokuba amadoda abekhuthalele ukusebenza."
Nehemiah4:7 Kodwa xa uSanebhalati noTobhiya nama-Arabhu noonyana baka-Amoni noAshdode bevayo ukuba iindonga zeYerusalem zazakhiwe nokuba iintanda zazisele zivaliwe, bavutha ngumsindo."
Nehemiah4:8 Babhunga bonke bephela, ukuba beze kulwa neYerusalem, bayithintele."
Nehemiah4:9 Noko ke, sathandaza kuThixo wethu, samisa abalindi nxamnye nabo imini nobusuku ngenxa yabo."
Nehemiah4:10 Wathi uYuda, Aphelile amandla abathwali, nenkunkuma ininzi; ngoko asinako ukwakha udonga."
Nehemiah4:11 Zathi iintshaba zethu, khange bazi, ababonanga, sada sangena phakathi kwabo, sababulala, sawumisa umsebenzi."
Nehemiah4:12 Athi akufika amaYuda awayekunye nawo, asixelela izihlandlo ezilishumi, esithi: “Zonke iindawo eninokubuyela kuzo kuthi, ziya kufika kuni."
Nehemiah4:13 Ndamisa ezindaweni eziphantsi emva kodonga nasezigangeni, ndamisa abantu ngokwemizalwane yabo, benamakrele abo, nezikhali zabo, nezaphetha zabo."
Nehemiah4:14 Ndakhangela, ndaphakama, ndathi kubanumzana, neerhuluneli nakwabanye abantu, Musani ukuboyika; khumbulani uYehova omkhulu owoyikekayo, nibalwele abazalwana benu, noonyana benu, neentombi zenu, nabafazi benu, nezindlu zenu."
Nehemiah4:15 Zithe ke zakuva iintshaba zethu ukuba kuyaziwa kuthi, nokuba uThixo uliphelisile icebo lazo, sabuyela eludongeni, elowo emsebenzini wakhe."
Nehemiah4:16 Ukususela ngelo xesha isiqingatha sabakhonzi bam sasebenza, esinye isiqingatha sabo siphethe iincula, namakhaka, nezaphetha, nabaninimzi; nezikhulu zazisemva kwendlu yonke yakwaYuda."
Nehemiah4:17 Abo babesakha eludongeni nabo babethwala imithwalo kunye nabo babezala, ngamnye waqalisa ukusebenza ngesandla esinye, ephethe isixhobo ngesinye isandla."
Nehemiah4:18 Kubakhi, elowo wabeka ikrele lakhe ecaleni lakhe, kwaye bakha ngale ndlela. Lavuthela ixilongo, waba nam."
Nehemiah4:19 Ndathi kwizidwangube nakubathetheli nakubo bonke abanye abantu: “Lo msebenzi mkhulu, mkhulu, yaye sahlulwe ngodonga, omnye ukude komnye."
Nehemiah4:20 Apho nithe nakuva isandi sesigodlo, yiyani khona; uThixo wethu wosilwela."
Nehemiah4:21 Sandula ke sasebenza emsebenzini, yaye isiqingatha sabo sasiphethe umkhonto ukususela ngesifingo de kube sekuphumeni kweenkwenkwezi."
Nehemiah4:22 Ndathi ke ebantwini ngelo xesha, Elowo makalale nesicaka sakhe eYerusalem, sibe ngumlindi wethu ebusuku, sisebenze emini."
Nehemiah4:23 Ke mna, nabazalwana bam, nabakhonzi bam, namadoda omlindi abendilandela, akubangakho namnye uzikhululayo iingubo zakhe;"
Nehemiah5:1 Ke kaloku kwabakho ukukhala okukhulu ebantwini nabafazi babo ngabazalwana babo amaYuda.
Nehemiah5:2 Bekukho ababesithi, Thina, oonyana bethu, neentombi zethu, sibaninzi; ngoko ke, sibathabathele ingqolowa, ukuze sidle, ukuze siphile."
Nehemiah5:3 Kwakukho nabanye ababesithi: “Ngenxa yokuswela kwethu siye sabeka amasimi ethu, nezidiliya, nezindlu zethu, ukuze sithenge ingqolowa."
Nehemiah5:4 Kwakukho nababesithi, Saboleka imali kwirhafu yokumkani, namasimi ethu, nezidiliya zethu;"
Nehemiah5:5 Kungokunje, inyama yethu injengenyama yabazalwana bethu, nabantwana bethu banjengoonyana babo; uyabona, siyabafaka oonyana neentombi zethu ebukhobokeni, neentombi zethu sezikhonziswe; kananjalo akukho semandleni ethu ukubakhulula; kuba abanye abantu banamasimi nezidiliya zethu."
Nehemiah5:6 Ndaba noburhalarhume obukhulu ekubabizeni kwam, ndaweva la mazwi."
Nehemiah5:7 Ndacamanga phakathi kwam, ndabakhalimela abathetheli nabathetheli, ndathi kubo, Ningxamele elowo umzalwana wakhe. Ndaza ndabavelisela ibandla elikhulu."
Nehemiah5:8 Ndathi ke kubo, Sibakhulule, njengoko sinako, abazalwana bethu amaYuda, ebe kuthengiswe ngabo kwiintlanga; kwaye ungathengisa nabantakwenu? okanye ziza kuthengiswa kuthi? Bathe cwaka ke, abafumana nto yokuphendula."
Nehemiah5:9 Kananjalo ndathi, Akulungile ukuba nenze loo nto; nibe ningafanele na ukuhamba ekoyikeni uThixo wethu, ngenxa yehlazo leentlanga eziziintshaba zethu?"
Nehemiah5:10 Kwangokunjalo, mna nabazalwana bam, nabakhonzi bam, sibe nako ukubiza kubo imali nengqolowa;"
Nehemiah5:11 Babuyisele namhla amasimi abo, nezidiliya zabo, neminquma yabo, nezindlu zabo, nekhulu lemali, nelengqolowa, nelewayini, neoli, enilithabathileyo kubo."
Nehemiah5:12 Bathi ke bona, Asiyi kukubuyisa oko, asiyi kubiza nto kubo; siya kwenza njengoko utshoyo. Ndababiza ababingeleli, ndabafungela ukuba baya kwenza ngokwelo lizwi."
Nehemiah5:13 Ndavuthulula ingubo yam, ndathi, uThixo makenjenje, elowo endlwini yakhe, nasemsebenzini wakhe, nabani na ongawufeziyo lo mbandela naye wancothulwa kwangolo hlobo, engaswele nto. Lathi lonke ibandla, Amen, bongani uYehova; Abantu bayenza loo nto."
Nehemiah5:14 Ngaphezu koko, ukususela kwixesha endamiselwa ngalo ukuba ndibe yirhuluneli yabo kwilizwe lakwaYuda, ukususela kunyaka wamashumi amabini ukuya kutsho kunyaka wamashumi amathathu anesibini ka-Artashashta, oko kukuthi, iminyaka elishumi elinesibini, mna nabantakwethu asizange siwudle umthendeleko."
Nehemiah5:15 Ke zona iirhuluneli zokuqala ezazikho phambi kwam zathetha kakubi ngabantu, zathabatha kubo isonka newayini, ngaphandle kweeshekele zesilivere ezimashumi mane; ewe, kwanabakhonzi babo ngokwenene babalawula abantu; ke andikwenzanga oko, ngenxa yokoyika uThixo."
Nehemiah5:16 Ewe, ndawuqhuba umsebenzi wolu donga, yaye asithenganga mhlaba, yaye bonke abakhonzi bam bahlanganisana khona ukuze basebenze."
Nehemiah5:17 Kananjalo amaYuda, nabathetheli abalikhulu elinamanci mahlanu, babesidla etafileni yam, kwanabo babeze kuthi bevela ezintlangeni ezisijikelezileyo."
Nehemiah5:18 Kwaye bekulungiselelwa imini enye inkomo, neegusha ezikhethiweyo ezintandathu; kwaye iintaka zazilungiselelwa mna, kwaye kanye ngeentsuku ezilishumi, zonke iintlobo zewayini zaziqokelelwa; noko ke andisifunanga isonka serhuluneli, ngokuba ubukhoboka belunzima phezu kolu hlanga."
Nehemiah5:19 Ndikhumbulele okulungileyo, Thixo wam, ngako konke endakwenzayo kolu hlanga."
Nehemiah6:1 Bathi ke ooSanebhalati, noTobhiya, noGeshem, umArabhi, nabathile kuthi, beva ukuba ndilwakhile udonga, akwabakho sikhewu kulo; (nangona ngelo xesha ndingazifakanga iingcango zesango;)"
Nehemiah6:2 Bandithuma ke ooSanebhalati noGeshem, bathi, Yiza, sihlanganisene komnye umzi entlango yeOno; Kodwa babecinga ukundithuthumbisa."
Nehemiah6:3 Ndathumela abathunywa kubo, ndathi, Ndenza umsebenzi omkhulu, andinakuhla; ungayekiswani umsebenzi ukuba ndiyawushiya ndihle ndize kuni?"
Nehemiah6:4 Bathumela kum izihlandlo zazine; Ndabaphendula kwangolo hlobo.
Nehemiah6:5 Ke kaloku umkhonzi wakhe uSanebhalati wathumela kum okwesihlanu, ephethe incwadi evulekileyo esandleni sakhe;"
Nehemiah6:6 Kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Kwenziwa udumo phakathi kweentlanga, noGasmu uthi, wena namaYuda nicinga ukuvukela uThixo; ngenxa yoko wakha udonga ukuze abe ngukumkani kubo ngokwamazwi."
Nehemiah6:7 Wamisela abaprofeti ukuba bathethe ngawe eYerusalem, besithi, ‘Kukho ukumkani kwaYuda, yaye ke la mazwi aya kuxelwa kukumkani. Yiza ngoku, sithethe kunye."
Nehemiah6:8 Ndathumela kuye, ndathi, Akuzanga kwenziwe nto injengaleyo uyithethileyo; wena ke uyibeke ngokusuka entliziyweni."
Nehemiah6:9 Ngokuba bebesoyikisa sonke, besithi, Izandla zabo ziya kuwuyeka lo msebenzi, ungenziwa. Yomeleza izandla zam ngoku, Thixo."
Nehemiah6:10 Ndangena endlwini kaShemaya unyana kaDelaya, unyana kaMehetabheli, elugcinweni; Wathi, Masihlangane endlwini kaThixo, ngaphakathi kwetempile, sivale iingcango zetempile, ngokuba baza kukubulala; ewe, ebusuku baya kuza kukubulala."
Nehemiah6:11 Ndathi ke, Kubaleke indoda enjengam na? ngubani na onjengam onako ukungena etempileni, ukuba asisindise umphefumlo wakhe? Andiyi kungena."
Nehemiah6:12 Yabonani, ndaqonda ukuba uThixo akamthumanga; Uthethe esi siprofeto nxamnye nam, ngokuba ebeqeshwe nguTobhiya noSanebhalati."
Nehemiah6:13 Kungoko ebeqeshelwe ukuze ndoyike, ndenze loo nto, ndone, babe nentetho embi, ukuze banditshabalalise."
Nehemiah6:14 Bakhumbule, Thixo wam, ooTobhiya noSanebhalati ngokwezenzo zabo, nangomprofetikazi uNowadiya nabanye abaprofeti ababendoyikisa."
Nehemiah6:15 Lwagqitywa ke udonga ngomhla wamashumi omabini anesihlanu wenyanga enguEluli, ngeentsuku ezimashumi mahlanu anamibini."
Nehemiah6:16 Kwathi zakukuva oko iintshaba zethu zonke, zakubona oko zonke iintlanga ezisijikelezileyo, zawa emehlweni azo, ngokuba zibonile ukuba lo msebenzi ubewenziwe nguThixo wethu."
Nehemiah6:17 Kananjalo abanumzana bakwaYuda bazongeza iincwadi eziya kuTobhiya ngaloo mihla, nezikaTobhiya zazifika kubo."
