Nehemiah6:18 Kuba babebaninzi kwaYuda ababemfungele, ngenxa yokuba wayengumkhwenyana kaSheganiya unyana ka-Ara; unyana wakhe uYohanan wazeka intombi kaMoslem unyana kaBheregiya."
Nehemiah6:19 Baye bendixelela ngemisebenzi yakhe emihle phambi kwam, namazwi am. Kwaye uTobias wathumela iileta zokundigrogrisa."
Nehemiah7:1 Lwalulwa udonga, ndazifaka iingcango, bamisa abamasango, neemvumi, nabaLevi;"
Nehemiah7:2 Ndabeka uHanani umntakwethu noHananiya ukuba baphathe indlu yobukumkani ukuba balawule iYerusalem, ngenxa yokuba wayeyindoda ethembekileyo neyoyika uThixo ngaphezu kwabaninzi."
Nehemiah7:3 Ndathi kubo, Musani ukuwavula amasango aseYerusalem, lide lifudumale ilanga; kwaye ngoxa bemi apho, baya kuzivala iingcango baze bahambe; wamisa ababoniseli phakathi kwabemi baseYerusalem, elowo esembonisweni yakhe, elowo wema malunga nendlu yakhe."
Nehemiah7:4 Umzi ububanzi ngeenxa zombini, ubanzi ngeenxa zombini; abantu bembalwa kuwo, kungakhiwanga zindlu."
Nehemiah7:5 Yaye uThixo wam wakubeka entliziyweni yam ukuba ndiqokelele ndawonye izikhulu nabalawuli nabantu ukuba babalwe ngokomnombo wam. Ndafumana umlibo wokuzalwa wokuqala, ndawufumana kubhaliwe kwathiwa,"
Nehemiah7:6 Ngabo aba oonyana bephondo ababevela ekuthinjweni, abathinjwa, awabathabathayo uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabhiloni waza wababuyisela eYerusalem nakwaYuda, ngamnye kwisixeko sakowabo;"
Nehemiah7:7 abeza noZerubhabheli, uYeshuwa, uNehemiya, uAzariya, uRamaya, uNahamani, uMordekayi, uBhilesan, uMispereti, uBhigwayi, uNehum, uBhahana. Ndithi, inani loonyana bakaSirayeli yaba leli;"
Nehemiah7:8 oonyana bakaParosi babengamawaka amabini anekhulu elinamashumi asixhenxe anesibini;
Nehemiah7:9 oonyana bakaShefatiya ibingamakhulu amathathu, anamanci asixhenxe anababini;"
Nehemiah7:10 oonyana baka-Aragi ibingamakhulu amathandathu, anamanci mahlanu anababini;"
Nehemiah7:11 oonyana bakaPahati wakwaMowabhi, koonyana bakaYeshuwa noYowabhi, ibingamawaka amabini, anamakhulu asibhozo, aneshumi elinye elinesibhozo."
Nehemiah7:12 Oonyana bakaElam babeliwaka elinamakhulu amabini anamashumi mahlanu anesine;
Nehemiah7:13 Oonyana bakaSathu ibilikhulu, elinamanci mane anabahlanu;"
Nehemiah7:14 oonyana bakaSakayi ibingamakhulu asixhenxe, anamanci mathandathu;"
Nehemiah7:15 oonyana bakaBhinuwi babengamakhulu amathandathu anamashumi mane anesibhozo;
Nehemiah7:16 oonyana bakaBhebhayi babengamakhulu amathandathu anamashumi amabini anesibhozo;
Nehemiah7:17 oonyana baseAshgade babengamawaka amabini, anamakhulu mathathu, anamanci mabini anababini;"
Nehemiah7:18 Oonyana baka-Adonikam ibingamakhulu amathandathu, anamanci mathandathu anesixhenxe."
Nehemiah7:19 Oonyana bakaBhigwayi ibingamawaka amabini, anamanci mathandathu anesixhenxe;"
Nehemiah7:20 oonyana baka-Adin ibingamakhulu amathandathu, anamanci mahlanu anabahlanu;"
Nehemiah7:21 Oonyana baka-Atere kaHezekiya ibingamashumi asithoba anamnye, anamanci asibhozo anababini;"
Nehemiah7:22 oonyana bakaHashum babengamakhulu amathathu anamashumi amabini anesibhozo;
Nehemiah7:23 oonyana bakaBheshayi babengamakhulu amathathu anamashumi amabini anesine;
Nehemiah7:24 oonyana bakaHarifi ibilikhulu, elinashumi linye linababini."
Nehemiah7:25 Oonyana baseGibheyon ngamashumi asibhozo anamnye;
Nehemiah7:26 amadoda aseBhetelehem naseNetofa ayelikhulu elinamashumi asibhozo anesibhozo.
Nehemiah7:27 Amadoda aseAnatoti ayelikhulu elinamashumi amabini anesibhozo;
Nehemiah7:28 amadoda aseBhete-semawete amashumi mane anamabini;
Nehemiah7:29 amadoda aseKiriyati-yeharim neKefira neBheroti ibingamakhulu asixhenxe, anamanci mane anabathathu."
Nehemiah7:30 Amadoda aseRama neGebha ibingamakhulu amathandathu, anamanci mabini anamnye."
Nehemiah7:31 Amadoda aseMigmas ayelikhulu elinamashumi amabini anesibini;
Nehemiah7:32 Amadoda aseBheteli neAyi ibilikhulu, elinamanci mabini anamathathu."
Nehemiah7:33 Amadoda aseNebho enye inamashumi amahlanu anesibini.
Nehemiah7:34 Oonyana bomnye uElam ibiliwaka elinamakhulu amabini, anamanci mahlanu anabane."
Nehemiah7:35 Oonyana bakaHarim ibingamakhulu amathathu, anamanci mabini."
Nehemiah7:36 Oonyana baseYeriko ibingamakhulu amathathu, anamanci mane anabahlanu;"
Nehemiah7:37 Oonyana baseLode neHadide neOno ibingamakhulu asixhenxe, anamanci mabini anamnye."
Nehemiah7:38 Oonyana baseSenege ibingamawaka amathathu, anamakhulu asithoba, anamanci mathathu;"
Nehemiah7:39 Ababingeleli: oonyana bakaYedaya bendlu kaYeshuwa ibingamakhulu asithoba, anamanci asixhenxe anabathathu."
Nehemiah7:40 Oonyana bakaImere ibiliwaka, elinamanci mahlanu anababini;"
Nehemiah7:41 oonyana bakaPashure ibiliwaka, elinamakhulu amabini, anamanci mane anesixhenxe."
Nehemiah7:42 Oonyana bakaHarim ibiliwaka, elineshumi elinesixhenxe;"
Nehemiah7:43 AbaLevi: oonyana bakaYeshuwa noKademiyeli noonyana bakaHodewa, ibingamashumi asixhenxe anabane."
Nehemiah7:44 Iimvumi, oonyana baka-Asafu, babelikhulu elinamashumi mane anesibhozo."
Nehemiah7:45 Abagcini-masango, oonyana bakaShalum, oonyana baka-Atere, oonyana bakaTalemon, oonyana baka-Akubhi, oonyana bakaHatita, oonyana bakaShobhayi, babelikhulu elinamashumi amathathu anesibhozo."
Nehemiah7:46 Abakhonzi betempile: oonyana bakaSiha, oonyana bakaHasufa, oonyana bakaTaboti,"
Nehemiah7:47 nabantwana bakwaKerose, nabantwana bakwaSiya, nabantwana bakwaPadon,"
Nehemiah7:48 nabantwana bakaLabhana, nabantwana bakwaHagabha, nabantwana bakwaSalimayi;"
Nehemiah7:49 noonyana bakaHanan, noonyana bakaGidele, noonyana bakaGahare,"
Nehemiah7:50 noonyana bakaRewaya, noonyana bakaRetsin, noonyana bakaNekoda,"
Nehemiah7:51 nabantwana bakwaGasam, nabantwana bakwa-Usa, noonyana bakaPasiya;"
Nehemiah7:52 oonyana bakaBhesayi, oonyana bakaMehun, oonyana bakaNefishi,"
Nehemiah7:53 nabantwana bakwaBhakebuke, nabantwana bakwaHakufa, nabantwana bakwaHarure,"
Nehemiah7:54 nabantwana bakwaBhasheliti, nabantwana bakwaMehida, nabantwana bakwaHarsa,"
Nehemiah7:55 nabantwana bakwaBharkose, nabantwana bakwaSisera, nabantwana bakwaTama,"
Nehemiah7:56 oonyana bakaNesiya, oonyana bakaHatifa."
Nehemiah7:57 Oonyana babakhonzi bakaSolomon: oonyana bakaSotayi, oonyana bakaSofereti, oonyana bakaPerida;"
Nehemiah7:58 nabantwana bakwaYahala, nabantwana bakwaDarkon, nabantwana bakwaGidel,"
Nehemiah7:59 nabantwana bakwaShefatiya, nabantwana bakwaHatili, nabantwana bakwaPogereti-sebhayim, oonyana baka-Amon."
Nehemiah7:60 Bonke abakhonzi betempile noonyana babakhonzi bakaSolomon babengamakhulu amathathu, anamanci asibhozo anamnye."
Nehemiah7:61 Ngabo abo abenyuka baya eTelemela, naseTele-haresha, naseKerubhi, naseAdon, naseImere, kodwa babengayixela indlu yoyise, nembewu yabo, ukuba babephuma kwaSirayeli:"
Nehemiah7:62 oonyana bakaDelaya, oonyana bakaTobhiya, oonyana bakaNekoda, babengamakhulu omathandathu, anamanci mane anababini."
Nehemiah7:63 Kubabingeleli: oonyana bakaHabhaya, oonyana bakaKoshe, oonyana bakaBharzilayi, owatshata enye yeentombi zikaBharzilayi umGiliyadi waza wathiywa ngabo."
Nehemiah7:64 Bakhangela ingxelo yabo phakathi kwabo babebhalwe emilibeni yokuzalwa, kodwa ayifunyanwa;"
Nehemiah7:65 Ngoko umphathi wabayalela ukuba bangazidli ezona zinto zingcwele de umbingeleli eme eneUrim neTumim.
Nehemiah7:66 Lonke ibandla lingamawaka angamashumi amane anamabini, anamakhulu mathathu, anamanci mathandathu;"
Nehemiah7:67 ngaphandle kwezicaka zabo ezi, nezicakakazi zabo ezingamawaka asixhenxe, anamakhulu mathathu, anamanci mathathu anesixhenxe, zineemvumi neemvumi ezimakhulu mabini anesihlanu."
Nehemiah7:68 Amahashe abo ibingamakhulu asixhenxe, anamanci mathathu anesithandathu; iimeyile zabo ibingamakhulu amabini, anamanci mane anabahlanu;"
Nehemiah7:69 iinkamela zabo zazingamakhulu amane, anamanci mathathu anantlanu; amaesile angamawaka amathandathu, anamakhulu asixhenxe, anamanci mabini."
Nehemiah7:70 Inxenye yeentloko zezindlu zooyise ibisebenza. uTirshata wanikela ebuncwaneni iwaka leedrarhma zegolide, namashumi amahlanu eendebe zokutshiza, namakhulu amahlanu anamanci mathathu eengubo zangaphantsi zababingeleli."
Nehemiah7:71 Inxenye yeentloko zezindlu zooyise yanikela ebuncwaneni bomsebenzi, amashumi amabini amawaka eedrarhima, nesilivere engamawaka amabini, anamakhulu mabini."
Nehemiah7:72 Okwanikelwa ngabanye abantu ibe iyigolide engamawaka amashumi amabini eedrarhima, nesilivere engamawaka amabini eemina, namashumi amathandathu anesixhenxe eengubo zangaphantsi zababingeleli."
Nehemiah7:73 Ababingeleli, nabaLevi, nabamasango, neemvumi, nabantu, nabakhonzi betempile, nawo onke amaSirayeli, bahlala emizini yabo; yafika inyanga yesixhenxe, besemizini yakoonyana bakaSirayeli."
Nehemiah8:1 Bahlanganisana bonke abantu njengamntu mnye ebaleni lesango lamanzi; bathi kuEzra umbhali, makazise incwadi yomyalelo kaMoses, awawumiselayo uYehova koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Nehemiah8:2 Umbingeleli uEzra wawuzisa umthetho phambi kwebandla lamadoda nabafazi nabo bonke ababesebeqabuke ingqondo ukuze baphulaphule, ngomhla wokuqala wenyanga yesixhenxe."
Nehemiah8:3 Wawufunda phambi kwendawo yembutho ephambi kweSango laManzi ukususela kusasa kwada kwasemini emaqanda, phambi kwamadoda nabafazi nabo banokuqonda; zaphulaphula iindlebe zabantu bonke encwadini yomyalelo."
Nehemiah8:4 Ke umchazi-mthetho uEzra lo wayemi phezu kweqonga lamaplanga, ababemenzele lona; ngakuye kwakumi ooMatiti, noShema, noAnaya, no-Uriya, noHilekiya, noMaseya, ngasekunene kwakhe; ngasekhohlo kwakhe nguPedaya, noMishayeli, noMalekiya, noHashum, noHasbhadan, noZekariya, noMeshulam."
Nehemiah8:5 uEzra wayivula incwadi phambi kwamehlo abo bonke abantu; (ngokuba ebengaphezu kwabo bonke abantu;) wathi akuba evule, bema ngeenyawo bonke."
Nehemiah8:6 uEzra wambonga uYehova, uThixo omkhulu. Baphendula bonke abantu, bathi, Amen, amen, ngokuphakamisa izandla zabo; bathoba, baqubuda kuYehova, bekhangele phantsi."
Nehemiah8:7 OoYehuwa, noBhani, noSherebhiya, noYamin, noAkubhe, noSabhetayi, noHodiya, noMahaseya, noKelita, noAzariya, noYozabhadi, noHanan, noPelaya, nabaLevi, babewuqonda umthetho, nabantu bemi ezindaweni zabo."
Nehemiah8:8 Bandula ke bawufunda encwadini ngokucacileyo umthetho kaThixo baza bawucacisa, babenza bakuqonde oko ukufundwayo."
Nehemiah8:9 uNehemiya, owayenguTirshata, nombingeleli uEzra, umbhali, nabaLevi ababefundisa abantu, bathi kubo bonke abantu: “Le yimini engcwele kuYehova uThixo wenu; musani ukulila, musani ukulila. Balila bonke abantu bakuweva amazwi omyalelo lowo."
Nehemiah8:10 Wathi kubo, Hambani niye nidle okutyebileyo, nisele izinto ezinencasa, nise isabelo kwabangalungiselwanga nto; ngokuba le mini yiNkosi yethu; ngokuba uvuyo lukaYehova ligwiba lenu."
Nehemiah8:11 Bazolisa abaLevi uhlanga lonke, bathi, Zolani, kuba ingcwele le mini; yaye musani ukuba buhlungu."
Nehemiah8:12 Ngoko bonke abantu baya kudla, basela, babela izabelo, bavuya, ngenxa yokuba babewaqonda amazwi ababeshunyayelwa kuwo."
Nehemiah8:13 Ngosuku lwesibini iintloko zeentsapho zabo bonke abantu, ababingeleli nabaLevi, zahlanganisana ndawonye noEzra unobhala ukuze baqonde amazwi omthetho."
Nehemiah8:14 Bayifumana ingcaciso yomyalelo uYehova abewuwisele umthetho ngesandla sikaMoses, wokuba oonyana bakaSirayeli bahlale eminqubeni ngomthendeleko wenyanga yesixhenxe;"
Nehemiah8:15 bakuxele, kuthiwe emizini yabo yonke naseYerusalem, Yiyani entabeni, nithabathe amasebe omnquma, namasebe ompayini, namasebe ommirtile, namasebe esundu, namasebe emithi eshinyeneyo; yenza iminquba njengoko injalo ibhaliwe."
Nehemiah8:16 Baphuma ke abantu, bawazisa, bazenzela iminquba, elowo phezu kwendlu yakhe, nasezintendelezweni zabo, nasezintendelezweni zendlu kaThixo, nasendaweni yembutho yeSango laManzi, nasebaleni leSango laManzi isikwere sikaEfrayim. Isango."
Nehemiah8:17 Lonke ibandla elalibuyile ekuthinjweni lenza iminquba, lahlala phantsi kweminquba leyo; ngenxa yokuba ukususela kwimihla kaYoshuwa unyana kaNun de kube yiloo mini oonyana bakaSirayeli babengenzanga loo nto. Kwaye kwabakho uvuyo olukhulu."
Nehemiah8:18 Walesa encwadini yomyalelo kaThixo imihla ngemihla, kwathabathela kumhla wokuqala kwezisa kowokugqibela. Babhiyoza iintsuku ezisixhenxe; nangomhla wesithoba nowesibini kwabakho umthendeleko ngokumiselwa."
Nehemiah9:1 Ngosuku lwamashumi omabini anesine lwaloo nyanga, bahlanganisana oonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuba bazile ukudla, banxibe iingubo ezimnyama, benomhlaba."
Nehemiah9:2 Bazahlula oonyana bakaSirayeli kuzo zonke iintlanga, besuka bazixela izono zabo, nobugwenxa booyise."
Nehemiah9:3 Bema endaweni yabo baza bafunda inxalenye yesine yemini encwadini yomthetho kaYehova uThixo wabo; esinye isahlulo sesine sasivuma izono zabo, sinqula uYehova uThixo wabo."
Nehemiah9:4 Wema ezinyukweni zabaLevi ooYeshuwa, noBhani, noKademiyeli, noShebanja, noBhuni, noSherebhiya, noBhani, noKenani, badanduluka ngezwi elikhulu kuYehova uThixo wabo."
Nehemiah9:5 AbaLevi, ooYeshuwa, noKademiyeli, noBhani, noHasabhenja, noSherebja, noHodiya, noSebanja, noPetaya, bathi, Sukani nime, nimdumise uYehova uThixo wenu ngonaphakade kanaphakade, nilidumise igama lakhe elibekekileyo, eliphakame ngaphezu kwayo yonke indumiso, nemibongo yonke."
Nehemiah9:6 Wena, ewe, wena unguYehova wedwa; Wena wenza izulu, nezulu lawo amazulu, nomkhosi walo wonke, umhlaba nento yonke ephezu kwawo, iilwandle neento zonke ezikhona, uzidlisa ubomi zonke ezo; kwaye imikhosi yezulu ikunqula."
Nehemiah9:7 Wena unguYehova uThixo owanyula uAbram waza wamkhupha eUre yamaKhaledi waza wamthiya igama elinguAbraham;
Nehemiah9:8 Yaye wayimisa intliziyo yakhe enyanisekileyo phambi kwenu waza wenza umnqophiso kunye naye wokunika ilizwe lamaKanan namaHiti nama-Amori namaPersi namaYebhusi namaGirgashi ukuba alinike lona, ndithi, ‘Ndiza kulinika ilizwe lamaKanan namaHiti nama-Amori namaPersi namaYebhusi namaGirgashi ukuba alinike lona. Yithi, wolinika imbewu yakhe. Yehova, ndiwafezekisile amazwi akho; ngokuba ulilungisa;"
Nehemiah9:9 Ndazibona iintsizi zoobawo eYiputa, ndakuva ukukhala kwabo eLwandle oluBomvu;"
Nehemiah9:10 Wenza imiqondiso nezimanga kuFaro, nakubakhonzi bakhe bonke, nakubantu bonke belizwe lakhe, ngokuba ubusazi ukuba banekratshi kubo; Nantso ke indlela owazenzela ngayo igama, njengokuba kunjalo namhlanje."
Nehemiah9:11 Walwahlula ulwandle phambi kwabo, baluwela ulwandle kowomileyo; Wabaphosa enzulwini ababandezeli babo, Njengelitye emanzini alwayo."
Nehemiah9:12 Wabakhokela ngelifu emini; nasebusuku ngesibane somlilo, ukubakhanyisela endleleni abafanele bahambe ngayo."
Nehemiah9:13 Kananjalo wehla waya entabeni yeSinayi, wathetha kubo usemazulwini, wabanika imiyalelo eyinyaniso, nemiyalelo eyinyaniso, nomyalelo olungileyo, nomyalelo olungileyo;"
Nehemiah9:14 wabazisa ngesabatha yakho engcwele, wabawisela umthetho, nemithetho, nemithetho, ngesandla somkhonzi wakho uMoses."
Nehemiah9:15 Wabanika isonka sasezulwini ngenxa yokulamba kwabo, wabavelisela namanzi engxondorheni ngenxa yokunxanwa kwabo; wabathembisa ukuba baya kulidla ilifa ilizwe, owabaphakamisela isandla sakho, ukuba wobanika lona."
Nehemiah9:16 Bakhukhumala bona noobawo bethu, bazenza lukhuni iintamo zabo, àbayiphulaphula imithetho yakho."
Nehemiah9:17 Kwaye akavumanga ukuphulaphula, kwaye akazange acinge ngemimangaliso yakho owayenzayo phakathi kwabo; Wazenza lukhuni iintamo zabo, wabenza umlawuli ezikreqweni zabo, babuyela ebukhobokeni babo; kodwa wena unguThixo oxolelayo, onemfesane, onemfesane, oqinisekileyo, onenceba enkulu, akwabafulathela."
Nehemiah9:18 Ewe, xa bazenzela ithole elityhidiweyo, bathi, ‘Nguye lo uThixo wenu owanikhuphayo eYiputa, wanizisela intlekele enkulu;"
Nehemiah9:19 Akubashiyanga ke ngobuninzi benceba yakho entlango; Ayesuki kubo isithunzi selifu emini, ukuba abahambe endleleni; kwanesikhuni somlilo ebusuku ukuze sibabonise ukukhanya nendlela abafanele bahambe ngayo."
Nehemiah9:20 Wabanika umoya wakho olungileyo, ukuba ubafundise, akuyicima imana yakho emlonyeni wabo, wabanika amanzi ngenxa yenxano labo."
Nehemiah9:21 Wabaxhasa iminyaka emashumi mane entlango, abaswela nto; iimpahla zabo azonakalanga bubudala, neenyawo zabo azidumbanga."
Nehemiah9:22 Ngapha koko, wabanika izikumkani neentlanga waza wazahlula zaba zimbombo, ukuze balidle ilifa ilizwe lakwaSihon nelizwe likakumkani waseHeshbhon nelizwe likaOgi ukumkani waseBhashan."
Nehemiah9:23 Wabandisa oonyana babo njengeenkwenkwezi zezulu, wabazisa kwelo zwe, owafunga kooyise ngalo, ukuba baya kulidla ilifa."
Nehemiah9:24 Bangena ke aba bantwana, balihlutha ilizwe, wabathoba phambi kwabo abemi belo lizwe, amaKanan, wabanikela esandleni sabo, nookumkani bawo nabantu belo lizwe, ukuba bawenze njengoko bebeya kwenza."
Nehemiah9:25 Bazithimba izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo nomhlaba otyebileyo baza bathimba izindlu ezizele zizinto zonke, amaqula nambiweyo, nezidiliya nemithi yomnquma nemithi yeziqhamo yamininzi; batye, bahluthe, batyebe, badle ukulunga kwakho okukhulu."
Nehemiah9:26 Bakhukhumala, bagwilika kuwe, babuya emyalelweni wakho, bababulala abaprofeti bakho ababengqina ukubabuyisela kuwe;"
Nehemiah9:27 Ngenxa yoko wabanikela esandleni seentshaba zabo, ezabaqumbisayo; ngokobuninzi benceba yakho wabanika abasindisi, wabahlangula esandleni seentshaba zabo."
Nehemiah9:28 Ke ekuphumleni kwabo, baya kuphinda benze ububi phambi kwakho; ngenxa yoko wabanikela esandleni seentshaba zabo, ukuba babalawule; wabakhulula ngokuphindaphindiweyo ngeenceba zakho;"
Nehemiah9:29 Bangqine, ukuba ubabuyisele emyalelweni wakho; ke bona bakhukhumala, abayiphulaphula imithetho yakho; bagqitha emithethweni yakho, awothi umntu ewenzile aphile ngayo; bayenza lukhuni igxalaba neentamo zabo, abaphulaphula."
Nehemiah9:30 Wabanyamezela iminyaka emininzi, wangqina ngabo ngomoya wakho, ngabaprofeti bakho; noko abeva; ke ngoko, wabanikela ezandleni zabantu baloo mazwe."
Nehemiah9:31 Ngenxa yenceba yakho enkulu, akubatshabalalisanga kuphele, akwabashiya; ngokuba unguThixo onemfesane, unemfesane."
Nehemiah9:32 Ke kaloku, Thixo wethu, Thixo omkhulu, onamandla, owoyikekayo, owugcinayo umnqophiso nenceba, mabungabi ncinane phambi kwakho bonke ububi obusifikeleyo, nookumkani bethu, nabathetheli bethu, naphezu kwethu ababingeleli nabaprofeti bethu, noobawo, nabantu bakho bonke, kususela kwimihla yookumkani baseAsiriya, unanamhla."
Nehemiah9:33 Uyilungisa wena kuko konke okusizelayo; ngokuba yena wenze okulungileyo, ke thina senze okubi."
Nehemiah9:34 Ookumkani bethu, nabathetheli bethu, nababingeleli bethu, noobawo, abawugcinanga umyalelo wakho, abayiphulaphula imithetho yakho, necebo lakho, owabawisela lona."
Nehemiah9:35 Ngenxa enokuba bengakukhonzanga ebukumkanini babo, nangobabalo lwakho olukhulu owabanikayo, nasezweni elibanzi, elichumayo, owabanikayo; ababuyanga ezenzweni zabo ezimbi."
Nehemiah9:36 Yabona, singabakhonzi namhla; nelizwe owalinika oobawo, ukuba sidle iziqhamo zalo nokulunga kwalo, nanku singabakhonzi bakho."
Nehemiah9:37 Ke lona linika isivuno esikhulu kookumkani obamise phezu kwethu ngenxa yezono zethu; Imizimba yethu neenkomo zethu zezabo ngokuthanda kwabo, kwaye sisendlaleni enkulu."
Nehemiah9:38 Ngezo zinto zonke senza umnqophiso oqinileyo, sawubhala; ziqinise abathetheli bethu, nabaLevi bethu, nababingeleli bethu;"
Nehemiah10:1 Abo boyiswayo nguNehemiya, noTirshata, unyana kaHagaliya, noZedekiya;"
Nehemiah10:2 uSeraya, uAzariya, uYeremiya,"
Nehemiah10:3 uPashkure, uAmariya, uMalekiya,"
Nehemiah10:4 Hattus, Sebanja, Malug,"
Nehemiah10:5 noHarim, noMeremoti, no-Obhadiya,"
Nehemiah10:6 noDaniyeli, noGineton, noBharuki,"
Nehemiah10:7 uMeshulam, uAbhiya, uMiyamin,"
Nehemiah10:8 noMahaseya, noBhilegayi, noShemaya: abo ke babengababingeleli."
Nehemiah10:9 AbaLevi nguYeshuwa unyana ka-Asaniya, noBhinuwi koonyana bakaHenadade, noKademiyeli;"
Nehemiah10:10 Abazalwana babo: nguShebhaniya, noHodiya, noKelita, noPelaya, noHanan,"
Nehemiah10:11 nguMika, noRehobhi, noHashabhiya,"
Nehemiah10:12 noSakure, noSherebhiya, noShebhaniya,"
Nehemiah10:13 noHodiya, noBhani, noBhenu;"
Nehemiah10:14 Intloko yoluntu; noParoshe, noPahati wakwaMowabhi, noElam, noSatu, noBhani;"
Nehemiah10:15 noBhuni, noAzegadi, noBhebhayi;"
Nehemiah10:16 noAdoniya, noBhigevayi, noAdin;"
Nehemiah10:17 uAtere, uHezekiya, uAzure,"
Nehemiah10:18 noHodiya, noHashum, noBheshayi,"
Nehemiah10:19 iHarif, neAnatoti, neNebhayi,"
Nehemiah10:20 uMagapi, noMeshulam, noHezire,"
Nehemiah10:21 noMesabhele, noTsadoki, noYaduwa;"
Nehemiah10:22 uPelatiya, uHanan, uAnaya,"
Nehemiah10:23 uHoseya, uHananiya, uHashubhi,"
Nehemiah10:24 neHalosheshe, nePileha, neShobeke,"
Nehemiah10:25 uRehum, uHashabhena, noMahaseya,"
Nehemiah10:26 noAhiya, noHanan, noAnan,"
Nehemiah10:27 uMaluke, uHarim, uBhahana."
Nehemiah10:28 Ke abanye abantu, ababingeleli, nabaLevi, nabamasango, neemvumi, nabakhonzi betempile, nabo bonke abazahlulayo ebantwini bamazwe, ngokomthetho kaThixo, nabafazi babo, noonyana babo, noonyana babo ziintombi bona; bonke abanolwazi nengqondo;"
Nehemiah10:29 Banamathela kubazalwana babo nakwizikhulu zabo, bafunga ngokunjalo, ukuba baya kuwuthobela umyalelo kaThixo owawuwisayo ngoMoses umkhonzi kaThixo, bayigcine yonke imithetho yeNkosi yethu uYehova yigcineni niyenze, nemithetho yayo, nemiyalelo yayo;"
Nehemiah10:30 nokuba iintombi zethu singaziniki abantu beli lizwe, neentombi zabo singazithabathi koonyana bethu."
Nehemiah10:31 Ukuba abantu belizwe elo bazisa impahla, nokuba yiyiphi na indlela yokuziphilisa, ukuba bethengise ngayo ngomhla wesabatha, asiyi kuwathenga ngesabatha nangomhla ongcwele; nokuba siwushiye umnyaka wesixhenxe, nesibophelelo salo lonke ityala."
Nehemiah10:32 Kananjalo sizenzele ngokwethu isahlulo sesithathu seshekele ngomnyaka wenkonzo yendlu yoThixo wethu;
Nehemiah10:33 nezonka zokubonisa, nomnikelo wokudla wamaxesha onke, nedini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke, lesabatha, nelokuthwasa kwenyanga, nelomthendeleko, nelezinto ezingcwele, neledini lesono, ukuba baxolelwe amaSirayeli, kuwo wonke umsebenzi."
Nehemiah10:34 Sabawisela umthetho ababingeleli, nabaLevi, nabantu, ukuba bawuzise umsondezo weenkuni endlwini yoThixo wethu, ngokwezindlu zoobawo, ngamaxesha amisiweyo iminyaka ngeminyaka, batshiswe ngawo isibingelelo kaYehova uThixo wethu, njengoko kubhaliweyo emthethweni;"
Nehemiah10:35 sizise iintlahlela zamasimi ethu neentlahlela zeziqhamo zonke zemithi yonke endlwini kaYehova iminyaka ngeminyaka;
Nehemiah10:36 namazibulo oonyana bethu naweenkomo zethu, ngoko kubhaliweyo emyalelweni, namazibulo eenkomo zethu, nawempahla yethu emfutshane, ukuba siwazise endlwini yoThixo wethu, kubabingeleli abalungiselelayo endlwini yoThixo wethu;"
Nehemiah10:37 neentlahlela zomgrayo wethu, nemirhumo yethu, neziqhamo zemithi yonke, newayini entsha, neoli, sizizise kubabingeleli emagumbini okudlela endlu kaThixo wethu; nesishumi semihlaba yethu kubaLevi, ukuze abaLevi bathabathe isishumi semizi yonke yemizi yethu."
Nehemiah10:38 Umbingeleli unyana ka-Aron woba nabaLevi, ekuthabatheni abaLevi isishumi;"
Nehemiah10:39 Ngokuba oonyana bakaSirayeli noonyana bakaLevi baya kuzisa umsondezo wengqolowa, newayini entsha, newayini entsha, emagumbini okudlela, apho kukho iimpahla zengcwele, nezababingeleli, nabamasango kunye nezo mvumi yaye asiyi kuyishiya indlu yoThixo wethu."
Nehemiah11:1 Bahlala abathetheli babantu eYerusalem; Abanye abantu bawisa amaqashiso; kwahlala omnye kwabalishumi eYerusalem kuwo umzi ongcwele, nabanye abasithoba kweminye imizi."
Nehemiah11:2 Uhlanga lwawasikelela amadoda onke aqhutywa yintliziyo ukuba ahlale eYerusalem.
Nehemiah11:3 Zizo ezo iirhuluneli zelizwe lakwaYuda, ezibe zihleli eYerusalem; ke emizini yakwaYuda, yahlala elowo elifeni lakhe, emizini yabo, oko kukuthi, amaSirayeli, ababingeleli, nabaLevi, nabakhonzi betempile, noonyana babakhonzi bakaSolomon."
Nehemiah11:4 Bahlala eYerusalem beboonyana bakaYuda noonyana bakaBhenjamin koonyana bakaYuda; uAtaja, unyana ka-Osiya, unyana kaZekariya, unyana ka-Amariya, unyana kaShefatiya, unyana kaMahalaleli, koonyana bakaPerets;"
Nehemiah11:5 noMahaseya, unyana kaBharuki, unyana kaKoloshe, unyana kaHazaya, unyana ka-Adaya, unyana kaYoyaribhi, unyana kaZekariya, unyana kaShilon."
Nehemiah11:6 Bonke oonyana bakaPerets ababehlala eYerusalem babengamakhulu amane, anamanci mathandathu anesibhozo, amadoda anobukroti."
Nehemiah11:7 Ngabo aba oonyana bakaBhenjamin; nguSalu, unyana kaMeshulam, unyana kaYuda, unyana kaPedaya, unyana kaKoliya, unyana kaMahaseya, unyana kaItiyeli, unyana kaIsaya."
Nehemiah11:8 Emva kwakhe nguGabhayi, noSalayi, ibingamakhulu asithoba, anamanci mabini anesibhozo."
Nehemiah11:9 uYoweli unyana kaTzigri wayengumboniseli wabo, noYuda unyana kaSenwa, engowesibini kumphathi wesixeko."
Nehemiah11:10 Kubabingeleli: nguYedaya unyana kaYoyaribhi, noYagin;"
Nehemiah11:11 uSeraya, unyana kaHilekiya, unyana kaMeshulam, unyana kaTsadoki, unyana kaMerayoti, unyana ka-Akitubhi, wayephethe indlu kaThixo."
Nehemiah11:12 Abazalwana babo abenza imisebenzi yasendlini ibingamakhulu asibhozo, anamanci mabini anababini; noAdaya, unyana kaYeroham, unyana kaPelaliya, unyana ka-Amsi, unyana kaZekariya, unyana kaPashkure, unyana kaMalekiya,"
Nehemiah11:13 nabazalwana bakhe, iintloko zezindlu zooyise, bengamakhulu amabini, anamanci mane anababini; noAmasayi, unyana ka-Azareli, unyana ka-Akashayi, unyana kaMeshilemoti, unyana kaImere;"
Nehemiah11:14 nabazalwana babo, amagorha anobukroti, belikhulu elinamanci mabini anesibhozo; umlindi wabo ke ibinguSabhediyeli, unyana womnye wamadoda amakhulu."
Nehemiah11:15 KubaLevi yayinguShemaya unyana kaHashubhi, unyana ka-Ashrikam, unyana kaHashabhiya, unyana kaBhuni;"
Nehemiah11:16 Yaye uSabhetayi noYozabhadi kwiintloko zabaLevi babephethe umsebenzi ngaphandle kwendlu yoTHIXO oyinyaniso.
Nehemiah11:17 uMataniya unyana kaMika unyana kaShabhedi unyana ka-Asafu wayeyintloko yokubulela ngomthandazo; noBhakebhukiya, owesibini kubazalwana bakhe, noAbheda, unyana kaSamuwa, unyana kaGalali, unyana kaYedutun."
Nehemiah11:18 Bonke abaLevi kumzi ongcwele babengamakhulu amabini, anamanci asibhozo anabane."
Nehemiah11:19 Ngaphezu koko, abagcini-masango, uAkubhe, uTalemon nabazalwana babo ababegada amasango, babelikhulu elinamashumi asixhenxe anesibini."
Nehemiah11:20 Amasalela akwaSirayeli, nababingeleli, nabaLevi, babekweminye imizi yonke yakwaYuda, elowo eselifeni lakhe."
Nehemiah11:21 Ke abakhonzi betempile babehleli eOfele, bephethe ooSika noGishpa."
Nehemiah11:22 Umlindi wabaLevi eYerusalem ibingu-Uzi unyana kaBhani, unyana kaHashabhiya, unyana kaMataniya, unyana kaMika. Oonyana baka-Asafu babeziimvumi zomsebenzi wendlu kaThixo."
Nehemiah11:23 Ngokuba umthetho wokumkani ubuphezu kwabo, wokuba kubekho isabelo seemvumi ngemini;"
Nehemiah11:24 uPetaya, unyana kaMeshezabheli, koonyana bakaSeraki, unyana kaYuda, ubesesandleni sokumkani kuyo yonke imicimbi yesizwe."
Nehemiah11:25 Imizi namadlelo ayo, kwahlala koonyana bakaYuda eKiriyati ka-Arbha namadlelo ayo, neDibhon namadlelo ayo, neYekabhetseli namagxamesi ayo;"
Nehemiah11:26 noYeshuwa, neMolada, neBhete-felete;"
Nehemiah11:27 neHatsareli, neBher-shebha, namagxamesi akhona;"
Nehemiah11:28 neTsikelage, neMekona namagxamesi ayo;"
Nehemiah11:29 neEnrimon, neTsarege, neYarmuti;"
Nehemiah11:30 neSanowa, neAdulam namagxamesi ayo, neLagishe namasimi ayo, neAsheki namagxamesi ayo. Bahlala eBher-shebha besa entilini yakwaHinom."
Nehemiah11:31 Oonyana bakaBhenjamin waseGebha babehlala eMigmas, naseAya, naseBheteli, nasemizini yayo,"
Nehemiah11:32 neAnatoti, neNobhe, neHananiyas,"
Nehemiah11:33 neHatsore, neRama, neGitayim,"
Nehemiah11:34 iHadide, iSebhoyim, neNebhati,"
Nehemiah11:35 Lode naseOno, emfuleni weengcaphephe;"
Nehemiah11:36 KubaLevi kwakukho amaqela kwaYuda nakwaBhenjamin.
Nehemiah12:1 Ngabo aba ababingeleli nabaLevi, abenyuka noZerubhabheli unyana kaShalatiyeli, noYoshuwa: uSeraya, noYeremiya, noEzra,"
Nehemiah12:2 noAmariya, noMaluke, noHato,"
Nehemiah12:3 uSheganiya, noRehum, noMeremoti,"
Nehemiah12:4 uIdo, uGineto, uAbhiya,"
Nehemiah12:5 iMiyamine, iMaadja, iBilga,"
Nehemiah12:6 uShemaya noYoyaribhi, noYedaya,"
Nehemiah12:7 uShalu, uAmoki, uHilekiya, uYedaya. Aba yayingababingeleli abakhulu nabazalwana babo ngemihla kaYesu."
Nehemiah12:8 Ke abaLevi: nguYeshuwa, noBhinuwi, noKademiyeli, noSherebhiya, noYuda, noMataniya, obephethe imibulelo, yena nabazalwana bakhe."
Nehemiah12:9 Abazalwana babo babemalunga neBhuja noUni, belindile."
Nehemiah12:10 uYeshuwa wazala uYoyakim; uYoyakim wazala uEliyashibhi; uEliyashibhi wazala uYehoyada;
Nehemiah12:11 uYoyada wazala uYonatan; uYonatan wazala uYaduwa;
Nehemiah12:12 Ngemihla kaYehoyakim kwakukho ababingeleli, iintloko zezindlu zooyise: okaSeraya, njengoMeraya; kuYeremiya: uHananiya;"
Nehemiah12:13 uEzra, enguMeshulam; kuAmariya: nguYohanan;"
Nehemiah12:14 Van Melicu, Jonathan; kwaSebanja: uJoseph;"
Nehemiah12:15 kwaHarim, eAdena; eMerayoti, inguHelekayi;"
Nehemiah12:16 eIdo nguZekariya; eGineton nguMeshulam;
Nehemiah12:17 Koonyana baka-Abhiya nguSigri; ekaMinyamine, ekaMowa, ekaPilitayi;"
Nehemiah12:18 yakwaBhiliga, inguSamuwa; kuShemaya: nguYonatan;"
Nehemiah12:19 kuYoyaribhi: nguMatenayi; ekaYedaya ingu-Uzi;
Nehemiah12:20 eSalayi, eKalayi; oka-Amoki nguEbhere;"
Nehemiah12:21 kuHilekiya: nguHashabhiya; ekaYedaya inguNataniyeli.
Nehemiah12:22 AbaLevi ngemihla kaEliyashibhi, uYehoyada noYohanan noYaduwa babhalwa njengeentloko zeentsapho zabo, nababingeleli kwada kwakulawula uDariyo umPersi."
Nehemiah12:23 Oonyana bakaLevi, iintloko zezindlu zooyise, babebhalwe encwadini yemicimbi, kwada kwayimihla kaYohanan unyana kaEliyashibhi."
Nehemiah12:24 Iintloko zabaLevi yayinguHashabhiya, uSherebhiya, uYeshuwa unyana kaKademiyeli, nabazalwana babo ababephambi kwabo ukuze benze indumiso nendumiso ngokomyalelo kaDavide umfo wakwaThixo wokwenyaniso."
Nehemiah12:25 uMataniya, noBhakebhukiya, no-Obhadiya, noMeshulam, noTalemon, noAkubhe babengabagcini bamasango, begcina abagcini bamasango."
Nehemiah12:26 Kwakungemihla kaYehoyakim unyana kaYeshuwa unyana kaYosadaki nangemihla yerhuluneli uNehemiya nombingeleli uEzra umbhali.
Nehemiah12:27 Ekusungulweni kodonga lwaseYerusalem, kwafunwa abaLevi kuzo zonke iindawo zabo ukuze babazise eYerusalem, ukuze kusungulwe ngovuyo, ngombulelo ngengoma ngamacangci ngeehadi ngeehadi."
Nehemiah12:28 Bahlanganisana oonyana beemvumi entlango ngeenxa zonke eYerusalem nasemizini yaseNetofati;
Nehemiah12:29 nabendlu yaseGiligali, nelizwe laseGebha, neAshmaveti; ngokuba iimvumi zazakha imizi ngeenxa zonke eYerusalem."
Nehemiah12:30 Bazihlambulula ababingeleli nabaLevi, nabantu, namasango, nodonga olo."
Nehemiah12:31 Ndanyusa iinkosana zakwaYuda ndanyusa udonga ndaza ndabeka iingoma ezimbini zokudumisa, yaye enye yazo yema ngasekunene kodonga ukuya kwisango laseMohili."
Nehemiah12:32 Balandela ooHoshaya nesiqingatha sabathetheli bakwaYuda,"
Nehemiah12:33 noAzariya, noEzra, noMeshulam;"
Nehemiah12:34 uYuda noBhenjamin, uShemaya noYeremiya;"
Nehemiah12:35 Koonyana bababingeleli baqupha ukuvuthela ngezigodlo; nguZekariya, unyana kaYonatan, unyana kaShemaya, unyana kaMataniya, unyana kaMikaya, unyana kaSagure, unyana ka-Asafu;"
Nehemiah12:36 Abazalwana bakhe yayinguShemaya noAzareli noMilalayi noGilalayi noMahayi noNataniyeli noYuda noHanani ababephambi kwabo bephethe izixhobo zikaDavide uTHIXO oyinyaniso noEzra umbhali.
Nehemiah12:37 Bemi ngasesangweni lequla, malungana nabo, benyuka ngezinyuko zomzi kaDavide, ethambekeni lodonga phezu kwendlu kaDavide, besa eSangweni laManzi ngasempuma."
Nehemiah12:38 Ndaqubisana nabo nenye inyambalala yengoma, mna ngasemva kwabo, ndinesiqingatha sabantu, phezu kodonga, inqaba ende yeziko, sesa eludongeni olubanzi;"
Nehemiah12:39 yaye ukususela encotsheni yeSango lakwaEfrayim ladlula kwiSango Elidala ladlula kwiSango Leentlanzi nakwinqaba ende kaHananeli nenqaba yaseMege ukuya kutsho kwiSango lezimvu; bema esangweni lentolongo.
Nehemiah12:40 Ngoko izihlwele ezibini zomculo zema endlwini yoTHIXO oyinyaniso, yaye mna nesiqingatha sabalawuli sasikunye nam;"
Nehemiah12:41 nababingeleli; uEliyakim, noMahaseya, uMiniyamin, uMikaya, uEliyohenayi, uZekariya, uHananiya, benamaxilongo;"
Nehemiah12:42 noMahaseya, noShemiya, noElazare, noUzi, noYohanan, noMalekiya, noElam, noEzere. Kwaye iimvumi zavuma ngokuvakalayo, kunye noJísraja, umgcini wabo."
Nehemiah12:43 Babingelela ngaloo mini imibingelelo emikhulu, bavuya; ngokuba uThixo ubebenzele uvuyo olukhulu; abafazi nabantwana bavuya, kangangokuba ukuvuya kweYerusalem kwavakala kude."
Nehemiah12:44 Ngelo xesha kwamiselwa abanye abaza kongamela amagumbi obuncwane neminikelo yentlahlela nesishumi, ukuze kuqokelelwe izabelo ezisemthethweni zababingeleli nabaLevi kumasimi ezixeko; uYuda wabavuyela ababingeleli nabaLevi ababelindile."
Nehemiah12:45 Iimvumi nabagcini-masango bagcina umlindo kaThixo wabo nomlindo wokusulungekiswa ngokomyalelo kaDavide noSolomon unyana wakhe.
Nehemiah12:46 Ngenxa yokuba ngemihla kaDavide noAsafu kwakudala kwakukho iintloko zeemvumi neengoma zokudumisa nemibulelo ezizukisa uThixo.
Nehemiah12:47 Onke amaSirayeli ngemihla kaZerubhabheli nangemihla kaNehemiya ayenikela izabelo zeemvumi nabagcini bamasango, suku ngalunye; yaye bathembisa abaLevi ngezinto ezingcwele; yaye abaLevi bakuthembisa oonyana baka-Aron."
Nehemiah13:1 Kwangaloo mini bafunda encwadini kaMoses phambi kwabantu; kwaye kwafunyanwa kubhaliwe kuyo ukuba ama-Amon namaMowabhi akayi kungena ebandleni likaThixo ngonaphakade;
Nehemiah13:2 ngokuba engabakhawulelanga oonyana bakaSirayeli enesonka namanzi; asuka aqesha uBhileham, ukuba abaqalekise; ke uThixo wethu wayiguqula ingqalekiso yaba yintsikelelo."
Nehemiah13:3 Bawuva umyalelo lowo, bayihlula yonke ingxubevange yakwaSirayeli;"
Nehemiah13:4 uEliyashibhi umbingeleli, umgcini wegumbi lendlu yoThixo wethu, ubesisicaka sikaTobhiya."
Nehemiah13:5 Wamlungiselela igumbi elikhulu, ababebeke kulo ngaphambili iminikelo etshiswayo, isiqhumiso neembiza, nesahlulo seshumi sengqolowa nesewayini neseoli esasetyenziselwa sona wathi, mabanikwe abaLevi neemvumi nabagcini-masango; neminikelo yababingeleli."
Nehemiah13:6 Ebudeni beli xesha lonke bendingekho eYerusalem, ngenxa yokuba, ngomnyaka wamashumi amathathu anesibini ka-Artashashta ukumkani waseBhabheli, ndeza kukumkani, ndaza emva kweentsuku ezithile ndacela kukumkani."
Nehemiah13:7 Ndafika eYerusalem ndabuqonda ububi obenziwe nguEliyashibhi kuTobhiya ngokumlungiselela igumbi ezintendelezweni zendlu yoTHIXO oyinyaniso.
Nehemiah13:8 Ndakhathazeka kakhulu, ngenxa yoko ndazilahlela phandle zonke iimpahla zendlu kaTobhiya ngaphandle kwegumbi."
Nehemiah13:9 Ndatsho ke, bawahlambulula amagumbi; ndazibuyisela khona iimpahla zendlu kaThixo, namadini anyukayo, neziqhumiso."
Nehemiah13:10 Ndaqonda ukuba abaLevi babengazinikwanga izabelo zabo; ngokuba abaLevi neemvumi ababesebenzela bona basaba, elowo waya ezweni lakowabo."
Nehemiah13:11 Ndabakhalimela abathetheli, ndathi, Indlu kaThixo ishiyiwe? Ndabaqokelela ndaza ndazibeka endaweni yazo."
Nehemiah13:12 Ngoko onke amaYuda azisa isishumi sengqolowa nesewayini neseoli koovimba.
Nehemiah13:13 Ndamisa phezu kobuncwane phezu kobuncwane: uShelemiya umbingeleli, noTsadoki umbhali, noPedaya kubaLevi; ngakubo nguHanan unyana kaSakure, unyana kaMataniya; ngenxa yokuba bekuthiwe bathembekile, nomsebenzi wabo wabelwe abazalwana babo."
Nehemiah13:14 Camagu, Thixo wam, ndikhumbule kule ndawo, ungazishiyi iinceba zam, endizenzileyo endlwini kaThixo wam, nakwizenzo zayo."
Nehemiah13:15 Ngaloo mihla ndabona kwaYuda indlela abathile ababexovula ngayo izixovulelo zewayini ngesabatha nabazizisi abaninzi nabakhwelisa amaesile; newayini, neediliya, namakhiwane, neentlobo zonke zemithwalo, ababezizisa eYerusalem ngomhla wesabatha; yaye ndanikela ubungqina kubo mhla babethengisa ukutya."
Nehemiah13:16 Kwaye kukho nabafo baseTire, ababemi khona, besiza neentlanzi neento zonke, bethengisa ngazo ngesabatha koonyana bakaYuda nabaseYerusalem."
Nehemiah13:17 Ndabambana nezikhulu zakwaYuda, ndathi kubo, Bububi buni na obu nibenzayo, niwuzukisa nje umhla wesabatha?"
Nehemiah13:18 Asingooyihlo na abasenzayo, asibangelanga na uThixo wethu yonke le ntlekele phezu kwethu naphezu kwesi sixeko? noko niyandisa ingqumbo kaSirayeli, niyihlambela nje isabatha."
Nehemiah13:19 Kwathi kwakuba mnyama amasango aseYerusalem ngaphambi kwesabatha, ndathi makavalwe amasango, ndathi makavulwe kuphela emva kwesabatha; emasangweni, kungathwaliswa mthwalo ngomhla wesabatha."
Nehemiah13:20 Ke abarhwebi, nabathengisa ngeento zonke ezithengiswayo, babehlala ngaphandle kweYerusalem kanye nakabini."
Nehemiah13:21 Ndaqononondisa ndathi kubo, Yini na ukuba nilale eludongeni? ukuba nithe naphinda, ndonisa isandla. Ukususela ngelo xesha ababanga saphinda beze ngesabatha."
Nehemiah13:22 Ndathi kubaLevi mabazihlambulule, baze balinde amasango ukuze kungcwaliswe umhla wesabatha. Ndikhumbule, Thixo wam, undixolele ngobuninzi benceba yakho."
Nehemiah13:23 Ngelo xesha ndawabona amaYuda abezeke abafazi baseAshdode, nama-Amon, namaMowabhi;"
Nehemiah13:24 Ke sona isiqingatha soonyana babo babethetha ulwimi lwaseAshdode, bengakwazi ukuthetha isiYuda, kodwa bethetha ngolwimi lweentlanga zonke."
Nehemiah13:25 Ndalwa nawo, ndawatshabhisa, ndabetha amadoda kuwo, ndawanyothula iinwele, ndawafungela uThixo, ndathi, Ize ninganikeli iintombi zenu koonyana babo, oonyana benu ningabazekeli oonyana benu, iintombi zabo ingenguwe okanye wena."
Nehemiah13:26 Wayengone na uSolomon, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli? Noko ke, ezintlangeni ezininzi kwakungekho kumkani unjengaye, ethandwa nguThixo wakhe, yaye uThixo wamenza ukumkani kumaSirayeli onke; nangona kunjalo, uyabagxeka abanye abafazi."
Nehemiah13:27 Ngaba siya kuniphulaphula na xa nenza obu bubi bukhulu ngokona kuThixo wethu ngokutshata abafazi basemzini?
Nehemiah13:28 Ke koonyana bakaYehoyada, unyana kaEliyashibhi, umbingeleli omkhulu, bekukho kubo ongumyeni kwaSanebhalati waseHoron; ke ngoko, ndamgxotha kum."
Nehemiah13:29 Thixo wam, bakhumbule, ngenxa yokuhlambela kwabo ububingeleli, nomnqophiso wobubingeleli, nowobuLevi."
Nehemiah13:30 Ndabahlambulula ke koonyana bonke bolunye uhlanga, ndamisa izigxina zababingeleli nabaLevi, elowo emsebenzini wakhe;"
Nehemiah13:31 nezomnikelo weenkuni ngamaxesha amisiweyo nezeentlahlela. Ndikhumbule, Thixo wam, ngenxa yam;"
Esther1:1 Ngemihla ka-Assuwerosi ibinguAsuwerosi obelawula amazwe alikhulu elinamanci mabini anesixhenxe, ethabathela eIndiya, wesa kwaKushi,"
Esther1:2 ngelo xesha, ukumkani uAsuwerosi ebehleli etroneni yobukumkani bakhe kumzi waseShushan;"
Esther1:3 Ngomnyaka wesithathu wobukumkani bakhe wabenzela isidlo abathetheli bakhe nabakhonzi bakhe; Igunya lamaPersi namaMedi, nabathetheli, nabathetheli bamazwe, baphambi kwakhe;"
Esther1:4 Ekubonakaliseni kwakhe ubutyebi obuzukileyo bobukumkani bakhe, nobuqaqawuli bobungangamsha bobuhle bakhe imihla emininzi, eziintsuku ezilikhulu elinamanci asibhozo anesibini."
Esther1:5 Ekupheleni kwaloo mihla, ukumkani wabenzela isidlo bonke abantu ababeseShushan komkhulu iintsuku zasixhenxe, kwathabathela koyena mkhulu kwesa komncinane, entendelezweni yomyezo wendlu yokumkani;"
Esther1:6 Amawunduwundu aba ke ngelinen ecikizekileyo, nemfusa, ebotshelelwe emakhonkcweni esilivere, neentsika zemarmore emhlophe;"
Esther1:7 Basela ngeempahla zegolide (ezingezinye) newayini yokumkani ibeninzi, ngokwesigxina sokumkani."
Esther1:8 Ukusela kwakusemthethweni; bekungekho bani ukunyanzelayo, ngokuba ukumkani ubemise bonke abagcini bendlu yakhe, ukuba benze njengoko babefuna bonke abantu."
Esther1:9 Ukumkanikazi uVashti wenzela abafazi isidlo kwibhotwe likakumkani uAhaswerosi.
Esther1:10 Kwathi ngomhla wesixhenxe, yakuchwayitha intliziyo yokumkani yiwayini, wabawisela umthetho ooMehumane, noBhishta, noHarbhona, noBhigeta, noAbhagta, noSetar, noKarkas, abalungiseleli abasixhenxe phambi kokumkani uAhaswerosi;"
Esther1:11 mabamzise uVashti, ukumkanikazi phambi kokumkani, enesithsaba sobukumkani, ukuba abonise abantu nabathetheli ubuhle bakhe;"
Esther1:12 Akavumanga ukumkanikazi uVashti ukuza ngelizwi lokumkani ngabakhonzi bakhe; ke ngoko, ukumkani waba nomsindo kakhulu, waza wavutha umsindo wakhe ngaphakathi kwakhe."
Esther1:13 Wandula ke ukumkani wathi kwizilumko ezaziwazi amaxesha, ekubeni isimo sengqondo sikakumkani sasinjalo kubo bonke ababewazi umthetho nokusesikweni."
Esther1:14 Ngakuye ibinguKarsena, noSetar, neAdmata, noTarshishe, noMerese, noMarsena, noMemukane, iinkosana ezisixhenxe zamaPersi namaMedi, ezabubonayo ubuso bokumkani, ukuba zibe ngowokuqala ukuhlala ebukumkanini."
Esther1:15 Ngokomthetho, siya kuthini na ngoKumkanikazi uVashti, ekubeni engazange awuphumeze umyalelo kaKumkani uAhaswerosi nabalungiseleli?"
Esther1:16 Waphendula uMemukane phambi kokumkani namaphakathi, wathi, Ukumkanikazi uVashti akone kukumkani yedwa;"
Esther1:17 Kuba esi senzo sokumkanikazi siya kubonakala kubafazi bonke, bawadelele amadoda abo emehlweni abo, xa kuthiwa, Ukumkani uAsuwerosi wathi, mayiziswe phambi kwakhe inkosikazi uVashti, yenjenjalo ungezi."
Esther1:18 Namhlanje ookumkanikazi basePersi naseMedi baya kuzixela zonke iinkosana zokumkani eziyivileyo le nto yokumkanikazi; Kuya kuvela indelelo eninzi nomsindo.
Esther1:19 Ukuba kubonakala kulungile kukumkani, mawuhle uye kuye umthetho wasebukhosini, ubhalwe emthethweni wamaPersi namaMedi, ukuze ungaguquki, ukuba uVashti akezi kwakhona phambi kokumkani uAhaswerosi; Ukumkani makanikele ubuncwane bakhe kolungileyo kunaye."
Esther1:20 Emva komyalelo kakumkani uya kwaziwa ebukumkanini bakhe bonke (ngokuba bukhulu), bonke abafazi bafanele bawahlonele amadoda abo, amakhulu namancinane."
Esther1:21 Lalunga elo lizwi kukumkani nabathetheli; Wenza ke ukumkani ngokwelizwi likaMemukane.
Esther1:22 Wathumela iincwadi emazweni onke kakumkani, kwisithili ngasinye ngokweencwadi zaso, kwisizwe ngasinye ngokweentetho zaso, ukuba silawule elowo endlwini yakhe, ukuba abonakale ngokwentetho yaso wonke umntu umntu."
Esther2:1 Kwathi ke, wakudamba umsindo kakumkani uAhaswerosi, wamkhumbula uVashti, noko abekwenzile, noko abemwisele umthetho ngako."
Esther2:2 Bathi abakhonzi bokumkani ababelungiselela kuye, Ukumkani makafunelwe iintombi ezinyulu."
Esther2:3 Ukumkani makanyule abaphathi kuwo onke amaphondo obukumkani bakhe, ukuba bahlanganise zonke iintombi ezinyulu ezibukekayo endlwini yasebukhosini endlwini yabafazi, phantsi kwesandla sikaHege, umlindi wendlu kakumkani, umlindi wendlu kakumkani, banikwa izinto zabo ezihlambulukileyo."
Esther2:4 Yaye intombi ekholekileyo kukumkani mayibe yinkosikazi esikhundleni sikaVasheti. Yalunga loo nto kukumkani; Yaye wenjenjalo.
Esther2:5 Ke kaloku kwakukho indoda engumYuda eShushan komkhulu, egama linguMordekayi, unyana kaYayiro, unyana kaShimehi, unyana kaKishe, umBhenjamin;"
Esther2:6 owayethatyathelwe ekuthinjweni eYerusalem nabathinjwa uYekoniya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, lowo uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabhiloni wabathabatha waya ekuthinjweni."
Esther2:7 Nguye owayekhulisa uHadasa, oko kukuthi, uEstere, intombi kayisekazi; ngokuba ebengenayise nanina; kwathi ekufeni kukayise nonina uMordekayi wayithabatha yaba yintombi yakhe."
Esther2:8 Kwathi kwakuvakala umyalelo nomyalelo kakumkani, yaye ekuhlanganiseni kwabafazi abaninzi ebhotwe eSusan phantsi kwesandla sikaHegayi, noEstere waziswa endlwini kakumkani phantsi kweliso likaHegayi, umlindi wabafazi."
Esther2:9 Yamkholisa intombi leyo, wamkeleka kuye; wakhawuleza, wamnika iimpahla zakhe zokuhlambela, neento zonke abenazo, neentombi ezisixhenxe zendlu yokumkani, awayeza kuzinikwa; wayinyula yona nomthinjana wayo phezu kweyona ndawo intle kwindlu yabafazi."
Esther2:10 uEstere akazange abaxelele abantu bakowabo nentsapho yakhe, kuba uMordekayi wayemyalele ukuba angabaxeleli."
Esther2:11 uMordekayi wayemana ukuhamba imihla ngemihla yonke phambi kwentendelezo yendlu yabafazi, ukuba abone ukuphila kukaEstere, noko kuya kwenzeka kuye."
Esther2:12 Kwathi, ekufikeni kwentombi nganye kukumkani uAhaswerosi, ineenyanga ezilishumi elinambini ngokwesiko labafazi, ngokuba yayizalisekile imihla yokuhlanjululwa kwabo, zaba ziinyanga ezintandathu ngeoli yemore, neenyanga ezintandathu ngeziqholo, kunye nezinye iimveliso zococeko lobufazi;"
Esther2:13 Zeza ngolo hlobo ke zonke iintombi kukumkani; yonke into ayifunayo wanikwa ukuba ihambe naye, isuke endlwini yabafazi, iye endlwini yokumkani."
Esther2:14 Wemka ngaloo ngokuhlwa, yaye ngengomso wabuyela kwindlu yabafazi besibini, phantsi kweliso likaShehasegasi, umlindi wendlu kakumkani, umlindi wezithende nokuba ukhankanywe ngegama."
Esther2:15 Kwathi, kwakufika ixesha likaEstere, intombi ka-Abhihayili, uyisekazi kaMordekayi, obeyithabathe ukuba abe yintombi yakhe, angene kukumkani, akafuna nto, ingenguHegayi, ithenwa lokumkani, umgcini wendlu yenkosi ikumkani abafazi, abanyuliweyo. Yaye uEstere wabonakala ekholekile emehlweni abo bonke ababembona."
Esther2:16 Wasiwa ke uEstere kukumkani uAhaswerosi, ebhotwe lakhe, ngenyanga yeshumi, oko kukuthi, inyanga enguTebhete, ngomnyaka wesixhenxe wobukumkani bakhe."
Esther2:17 uYehova wamthanda uEstere ngaphezu kwabafazi bonke; Ngoko wamthwesa isithsaba sobukumkani entlokweni yakhe, wamenza ukumkanikazi esikhundleni sikaVashti."
Esther2:18 Ukumkani wabenzela bonke abathetheli bakhe nabakhonzi bakhe isidlo esikhulu, isidlo sikaEstere; wakhulula amazwe, wanikela izipho ngokwemeko yokumkani."
Esther2:19 Zithe ke zahlanganisana okwesibini iintombi ezo, waye uMordekayi ehleli esangweni lokumkani."
Esther2:20 uEstere akazange ayichaze intsapho yakowabo nentsapho yakowabo; njengoko uMordekayi abemwisele umthetho; ngenxa yokuba uEstere wawuthobela umyalelo kaMordekayi kanye njengoko wayekhuliswe nguye.
Esther2:21 Ngaloo mihla, ngoxa uMordekayi wayehleli esangweni likakumkani, abamaphakathi ababini bokumkani, uBhigetan noTeres, abagcini-masango, bacaphuka baza bafuna ukumsa izandla ukumkani uAsuwerosi."
Esther2:22 Yaziwa loo nto nguMordekayi, waxelela uEstere ukumkanikazi; yaye uEstere wavakalisa ukumkani wayo egameni likaMordekayi."
Esther2:23 Yancinwa loo nto, yafunyanwa; ke ngoko, bobabini baxhonywa emthini;"
Esther3:1 Emva koko ukumkani uAsuwerosi wamphakamisa uHaman, unyana kaHamedata, umAgagi, wamphakamisa, wambeka etroneni yakhe ngaphezu kwabathetheli bonke ababenaye."
Esther3:2 Bonke abakhonzi bokumkani, ababesesangweni lokumkani, baqubuda, baqubuda kuHaman; ngokuba ukumkani ubewise umthetho wenjenjalo ngaye. Ke yena uMordekayi akaqubuda kuye, akamhlonela;"
Esther3:3 Bathi abakhonzi bokumkani, ababesesangweni lokumkani kuMordekayi, Yini na ukuba uwaphule umthetho wokumkani?"
Esther3:4 Ke kaloku, bathetha naye imini yonke, akabaphulaphula; bamxelela uHaman, ukuba aya kuma na amazwi kaMordekayi, kuba ubebaxelele ukuba yena ungumYuda."
Esther3:5 Wabona uHaman ukuba uMordekayi akaguqi, nokuba akamzukisa; wavutha ngumsindo uHaman."
Esther3:6 Wagweba uMordekayi yedwa ukuba amse izandla; ngokuba bambonise abantu bakuloMordekayi; ngoko ke, uHaman wazama ukuwatshabalalisa onke amaYuda kubo bonke ubukumkani baseAsswerosi, abantu bakaMordekayi."
Esther3:7 Ngenyanga yokuqala, oko kukuthi, inyanga enguNisan, ngonyaka weshumi elinesibini kaKumkani uAhaswerosi, benza iPuri, oko kukuthi, amaqashiso, phambi koHaman yonke imihla nenyanga nganye, kwada kwayinyanga yeshumi elinesibini, oko kukuthi inyanga enguAdare."
Esther3:8 Wathi uHaman kukumkani uAhaswerosi, Kukho olunye uhlanga oluthe saa, oluthe saa ezintlangeni emazweni onke obukumkani bakho; nemithetho yabo yahlukile kweyabo bonke abantu; nemithetho yokumkani abayigcini; ke ngoko, akulungile ukuba ukumkani anyamezele."
Esther3:9 Ukuba kulungile kukumkani, makubhalwe ukuba zitshatyalaliswe, yaye ndonikela ishumi lamawaka eetalente zesilivere esandleni sabo banomcimbi wokuzizisa kwindawo yokugcina ubuncwane kakumkani."
Esther3:10 Ukumkani wawukhulula umsesane wakhe esandleni sakhe, wawunika uHaman, unyana kaHadete, umAgagi, umbandezeli wamaYuda."
Esther3:11 Wathi ukumkani kuHaman, Unikiwe isilivere, wena nabantu; yenza kubo ngokokuthanda kwakho."
Esther3:12 Babizwa ke ababhali bakakumkani ngomhla weshumi elinesithathu wenyanga yokuqala, kwaza kwabhalwa ngokoko konke awakuthethayo uHaman kubaphathiswa bakakumkani, neerhuluneli ezaziphethe isithili ngasinye, nakubalawuli bezizwe zonke ezivela kumazwe ngamazwe amanye amazwe isithili ngasinye sinombhalo waso, kwaye isizwe ngasinye sinolwimi lwaso; yabhalwa egameni likaKumkani uAhaswerosi yaza yatywinwa ngomsesane kakumkani."
Esther3:13 Kwathunyelwa iincwadi kuwo onke amaphondo kakumkani, ukuba kutshatyalaliswe, kubulawe, kutshatyalaliswe onke amaYuda, kuthabathele komncinane kuse kwixhego, abantwana nabafazi, ngamini-nye, ngomhla weshumi elinesithathu lweshumi elinesibini elinesibini yinyanga enguAdare ke, niyiphange imfuyo yabo."
Esther3:14 Ikopi yomthetho, eyayiza kuwiswa iphondo ngalinye, yaziswa kuzo zonke iintlanga, ukuba ziya kuhlala zilungile loo mini."
Esther3:15 Amanani aphuma ngokukhawuleza ngokomyalelo kakumkani, yaye umyalelo weza kuSusan ebhotwe. Ukumkani noHaman bahlala phantsi, basela; kodwa isixeko sakwaSusan sasisiphithiphithi."
Esther4:1 Akukubona konke okwenzekileyo uMordekayi, uMordekayi wazikrazula iingubo zakhe, wambatha iingubo ezimnyama zokuzila nothuthu;"
Esther4:2 Wafika phambi kwesango lokumkani, kuba akukho mntu unokungena esangweni lokumkani, enxibe iimpahla zokuzila."
Esther4:3 Yaye kuwo onke amaphondo apho umyalelo kakumkani nomyalelo wakhe wawufikele khona, kwakukho ukuzila okukhulu phakathi kwamaYuda, nokuzila ukutya nokulila nokulila; abaninzi balala benxibe amadlavu nothuthu."
Esther4:4 Zeza ke iimpelesi zikaEstere nabakhonzazana bakhe, bamxelela. Waba buhlungu kakhulu ukumkanikazi; Wathumela iingubo zokumambesa uMordekayi, wamsusa ezirhwexayo;"
Esther4:5 Wandula ke uEstere wabiza uHathage, omnye wabalungiseleli bakakumkani, lowo wayemiselwe ngukumkani ukuba amnyamekele, waza wamyalela ukuba axelele uMordekayi ukuze azi ukuba yintoni kanye kanye le nto yaye kutheni."
Esther4:6 Waphuma uHataki, waya kuMordekayi ebaleni lesixeko phambi kwesango lokumkani."
Esther4:7 uMordekayi wamana emxelela konke okumhleleyo, nemali leyo uHaman awayethe uya kuyifaka kuvimba kakumkani, ukuze atshatyalaliswe ngamaYuda."
Esther4:8 Wamnika nekopi yencwadi leyo yayinikwe uSusan, yokuba batshatyalaliswe, ukuze amxelele uEstere, amazise, amyale ukuba aye kubuza kukumkani kuye nokucela kuye abantu bakhe."
Esther4:9 Weza uHatage, wamxelela uEstere amazwi kaMordekayi."
Esther4:10 Wabuya uEstere wathetha kuHathage, wathi makayizise kuMordekayi;"
Esther4:11 Bonke abakhonzi bokumkani nabantu abaseziphaleni zokumkani bayazi ukuba nabani na, nokuba yindoda nokuba yinkazana, othe eze kukumkani entendelezweni engaphakathi, engabizwanga, mnye umthetho wokuba makabulawe, umiselwe ukumkani ngaphandle kwabo ukumkani aya kubaphathela intonga yobukhosi yegolide, ukuze baphile; kodwa andizange ndibizwe ukuba ndiye kukumkani ngaloo mihla imashumi mathathu."
Esther4:12 Bamxelela uMordekayi amazwi kaEstere.
Esther4:13 Ngoko uMordekayi wayalela ukuba impendulo inikwe uEstere: “Musa ukuzixelela ukuba uya kusinda wena endlwini yokumkani ngaphezu kwamaYuda onke.
Esther4:14 Kuba xa nithe nathula cwaka ngeli xesha, ukwaphuka nosindiso luya kubonakala kwenye indawo kumaYuda; ke wena nendlu kayihlo niya kutshabalala; Ngubani na owaziyo, ukuba ungene ebukumkanini ngenxa yexesha elinje?"
Esther4:15 uEstere waxelela uMordekayi, wathi:"
Esther4:16 Yiya uwahlanganise onke amaYuda alapho eSusa, nizile ukudla ngenxa yam; ningadli, ningaseli iintsuku ezintathu, ubusuku nemini. Mna nabakhonzazana bam sozila ngaloo ndlela; ndongena ke kukumkani, kungengamthetho; nokuba nditshabalele, ndiya kutshabalala."
Esther4:17 Wahamba ke uMordekayi, wenza njengoko uEstere wamwiselayo umthetho;"
Esther5:1 Kwathi ngomhla wesithathu uEstere wambatha ingubo yakhe yobukumkani, wema entendelezweni engaphakathi yendlu yokumkani, malunga nendlu yokumkani; ukumkani ubehleli etroneni yobukumkani bakhe, endlwini yokumkani, malunga nesango lendlu."
Esther5:2 Ukumkani wambona uEstere ukumkanikazi emi entsimini, wambabala; Waza ukumkani wayolulela intonga yegolide abeyibambe kuEstere. Wasondela uEstere, wachukumisa incam yentonga yobukumkani."
Esther5:3 Wathi uYehova kuye, Ufuna ntoni na, kumkanikazi Estere? siyintoni na isicelo sakho? uya kunikwa isiqingatha sobukumkani."
Esther5:4 Wathi uEstere, Ukuba ukumkani uthe wabona kufanelekile, makeze ukumkani namhlanje noHaman esidlweni endimenzele sona."
Esther5:5 Wathi ukumkani, Makangxame uHaman, enze ngokwelizwi likaEstere. Ke ukumkani noHaman beza esidlweni abesilungiselele uEstere."
Esther5:6 Wathi ukumkani kuEstere ngasesidlweni sewayini, Uthandazela ntoni na? Siyintoni na isicelo sakho? kude kube sisiqingatha sobukumkani kuya kugqitywa."
Esther5:7 Waphendula uEstere, wathi, Sisicelo sam esi, nokucela kwam;"
Esther5:8 Ukuba ndithe ndababalwa emehlweni okumkani, ukuba kuthe kwalunga kukumkani, ukuba andinike umthandazo wam, asizalise isicelo sam, makeze ukumkani noHaman esidlweni endibalungisela sona ngomso; ndiya kuza yenza njengoko wathethayo ukumkani."
Esther5:9 Waza waphuma uHaman ngaloo mini evuya evuya, kodwa akumbona uMordekayi esangweni likakumkani ukuba akazange ayeke yaye akazange angcangcazele ngenxa yakhe, uHaman wazala ngumsindo nxamnye noMordekayi."
Esther5:10 Wazibamba uHaman, waya endlwini yakhe, wabiza izihlobo zakhe, noSerese umkakhe."
Esther5:11 uHaman wabaxelela ngozuko lobutyebi bakhe nenani loonyana bakhe nazo zonke izinto awamphakamisa ngazo ukumkani, nendlela aziphakamisa ngayo ngaphezu kweenkosana nabakhonzi bakakumkani."
Esther5:12 Ngaphezu koko, uHaman wathi: “Ewe, ukumkanikazi uEstere akazange avumele nabani na ukuba abe kunye nokumkani esidlweni awayesilungiselele ngaphandle kwam; yaye ngomso ndiya kumenyelwa kuye nokumkani."
Esther5:13 Ke yonke le nto ayindincedi nganto, njengoko ndabona uMordekayi umYuda ehleli esangweni lokumkani."
Esther5:14 Wathi ke uSeres umkakhe nezihlobo zakhe zonke kuye, Umthi mawuphakame ube ziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu, uthethe kukumkani ngomso, ukuba uMordekayi axhonywe kuwo; emva koko atye kunye nokumkani ngovuyo. Yalunga loo nto emehlweni kaHaman; kwaye wenza ukuba kwenziwe umthi."
Esther6:1 Ngobo busuku, ukumkani walala ubuthongo, waza wayalela ukuba kuziswe incwadi; zaleswa phambi kokumkani."
Esther6:2 Kwafunyaniswa ukuba kwakubhaliwe oko uMordekayi wayekuxelile ngokuphathelele uBhigetana noTerese, izicakakazi ezimbini zendlu kakumkani, abagcini-masango, ababefuna ukubulala uKumkani uAhaswerosi."
Esther6:3 Wathi uYehova, Wenze mbekoni na, nabukhulu buni na uMordekayi? Bathi abakhonzi bokumkani ababelungiselela kuye, akenziwanga nto."
Esther6:4 Wathi ukumkani, Ngubani na osendlwini? Wangena uHaman entendelezweni engaphandle yendlu yokumkani, esiya kuthetha kukumkani malunga nokuxhonywa kukaMordekayi emthini abemlungisele wona."
Esther6:5 Bathi abakhonzi bokumkani kuye, Nanko uHaman emi endle. Wathi ukumkani, Makangene."
Esther6:6 Wangena uHaman, wathi ukumkani kuye, Makwenziwe ntoni na kwindoda, athe ukumkani athanda ukuyibeka imbeko? Wathi uHaman entliziyweni yakhe, Ngubani na ukumkani angathanda ukubeka embekweni ngaphezu kwam?"
Esther6:7 uHaman wamphendula ukumkani, wathi, Kungenxa yokuba indoda leyo ukumkani athanda ukuyihlonela;"
Esther6:8 Maziziswe ingubo yokwaleka yokumkani, nehashe akhwele kulo ukumkani, nesithsaba sobukumkani esithiwe wambu entlokweni yakhe;"
Esther6:9 Esi sambatho nehashe masinikelwe esandleni somnye wezikhulu zokumkani ezibekekileyo, ukuba ambambe lowo athanda ukumbeka ukumkani, akhwele ehashini endaweni yembutho yesixeko wadanduluka phambi kwakhe. Kuya kwenziwa ngokwendoda ukumkani afuna ukuhlonelwa."
Esther6:10 Wathi ukumkani kuHaman, Khawuleza, uthabathe ingubo leyo nehashe elo, njengoko ukuthethileyo, wenjenjalo kuMordekayi umYuda, ohleli emnyango wokumkani; Makungabikho siphazamiso kuyo yonke into oyithethileyo."
Esther6:11 Wandula ke uHaman wathabatha isambatho nehashe waza wamambathisa uMordekayi waza wamkhwelisa ehashini ukuya kwindawo yembutho yesixeko waza wadanduluka phambi kwakhe esithi: “Makwenziwe oku kwindoda afuna imbeko kuyo ukumkani.
Esther6:12 Wabuya uMordekayi weza esangweni lokumkani; Wangxama uHaman, waya endlwini yakhe, elila, egqubuthele intloko."
Esther6:13 uHaman waxelela uSerese umkakhe, nezihlobo zakhe zonke, konke okumhleleyo. Zathi kuye izilumko zakhe, noSerese umkakhe, Ukuba ungowesizwe samaYuda uMordekayi, lowo uqalileyo ukuwa phambi kwakhe, akuyi kumeyisa; wowa phambi kwakhe."
Esther6:14 Bathe besathetha naye, beza abalungiseleli bokumkani, bamgibisela uHaman esidlweni ebesilungiselwe nguEstere."
Esther7:1 Ukumkani noHaman beza kudla noEstere ukumkanikazi.
Esther7:2 Waphinda ukumkani wathi kuEstere ngomhla wesibini womthendeleko wewayini, Uthandaza ntoni na, kumkanikazi Estere? Siyintoni na isicelo sakho? yaye iya kugqitywa ukusa kwisiqingatha sobukumkani."
Esther7:3 Waphendula uEstere ukumkanikazi, wathi, Ukuba ndifumene inceba emehlweni akho, kumkani, ukuba ukumkani uthe wavuma, mandinikwe umphefumlo wam ngokucela kwam, nangenxa yabantu bakowethu."
Esther7:4 Ngenxa yokuba kuthengisiwe ngathi, mna nabantu bakowethu, ukuze sitshatyalaliswe, sibulawe, sisingelwe phantsi. Ukuba bekuthengiswe ngathi ukuba sibe ngamakhoboka namakhobokazana, ndaye ndithule, nangona utshaba lwalungenako ukumbulala ukumkani."
Esther7:5 Waphendula ukumkani uAsuwerosi, wathi kuEstere ukumkanikazi, Ngubani na lowo?"
Esther7:6 Wathi uEstere, Utshaba notshaba ngulo Haman ungendawo; Ke uHaman wamoyika ukumkani nokumkanikazi."
Esther7:7 Wesuka ukumkani enomsindo emthendelekweni, waya emyezweni wendlu yokumkani; wesuka wema uHaman, ukuba acele umphefumlo wakhe kuEstere ukumkanikazi; ngokuba ebebona ukuba ukumkani ugwetyelwe ububi."
Esther7:8 Wabuya ukumkani emyezweni wendlu yobukumkani, waya endaweni yesidlo sewayini; yaye uHaman wawa phezu kwesingqengqelo awayekuso uEstere. Wathi ukumkani, Nokumkanikazi lo uya kumngenisa endlwini esecaleni kwam na? Laphuma elo lizwi emlonyeni wokumkani, babugqubuthela ubuso bukaHaman."
Esther7:9 Wathetha uHarabhona, omnye wababusi, phambi kokumkani, wathi, Khawukhangele umthi, uHaman abewenzele uMordekayi, owathetha okulungileyo ngokumkani, ubude bawo buziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu; Wathi ukumkani, Mxhomeni kuwo."
Esther7:10 Bamxhoma ke uHaman emthini abewulungisele uMordekayi; Wadamba ke umsindo wokumkani.
Esther8:1 Ngaloo mini, ukumkani uAhaswerosi wamnika ukumkanikazi uEstere indlu kaHaman, umbandezeli wamaYuda. uMordekayi weza phambi kokumkani; ngokuba uEstere ubemxelele into abeyiyo kuye."
Esther8:2 Ukumkani wawukhulula umsesane wakhe, abewuthabathe kuHaman, wawunika uMordekayi. uEstere wabeka uMordekayi ukuba abe ngumphathi wendlu kaHaman."
Esther8:3 Wabuya wathetha uEstere phambi kokumkani, wawa ezinyaweni zakhe, elila, wambongoza ukuba abuyeke ububi bukaHaman umAgagi, necebo lakhe awayelicingile ngamaYuda."
Esther8:4 Waza ukumkani wayolulela intonga kuEstere; Wesuka uEstere, wema phambi kokumkani;"
Esther8:5 Wathi, Akuvuma ukumkani, ndambabala emehlweni akhe, yabonakala ilungile loo nto phambi kokumkani, nam ndakholeka emehlweni akhe; nantso ibhaliwe ezincwadini ezibhalwe nguHaman, unyana wokumkani nguHamedadati umAgagi, owabhala ukuba kutshatyalaliswe amaYuda emazweni onke kakumkani."
Esther8:6 Ndingathini na ukuba nako ukuyibona intlekele eza kufikela abantu bam? Ndingathini na ukuba nako ukuyibona intshabalalo yosapho lwam?
Esther8:7 Wathi ukumkani uAsuwerosi kuEstere ukumkanikazi, nakuMordekayi umYuda, Yabonani, indlu kaHaman ndiyinike uEstere; yena wamxhoma emthini, ngenxa yokuba wasa isandla sakhe kumaYuda."
Esther8:8 Bhalani kumaYuda egameni lokumkani, ngokokuthanda kwenu, nitywine ngomsesane wokumkani; ngokuba incwadi ebibhalwe egameni lokumkani, yatywinwa ngomsesane wokumkani, ayinakuguqulwa."
Esther8:9 Babizwa ke ababhali bokumkani ngelo xesha ngenyanga yesithathu (yinyanga enguSifan ke leyo), ngomhla wamashumi amabini anesithathu kuyo; Kwabhalwa ngako konke awawawisa umthetho uMordekayi amaYuda, nabathetheli, nabathetheli, namabamba amazwe, athabathela kwelaseIndiya esa kwaKushi, amazwe alikhulu elinamanci mabini anesixhenxe, kwelinye icala, nakwelinye ukuba kubhalwe kuzo zonke iintlanga ngokweentetho zazo, namaYuda ngokweebhalo zawo, nangolwimi lwazo."
Esther8:10 Yaye wabhala egameni likaKumkani uAhaswerosi waza wayitywina ngesithupha sikakumkani, wathumela iincwadi ngeposi ekhwele amahashe nabakhweli beemeyile neenkamela neenkamela ezincinane."
Esther8:11 Ukumkani wawawisela umthetho amaYuda akwimizi ngemizi, ukuba ahlanganisane, alinde umphefumlo wawo, ukuba atshabalalise, abulale, atshabalalise onke amandla abantu, nelizwe, abeza kulihlasela, amadodana nabafazi, batshabalalise onke amazimba amandla abantu nelizwe eliya kubahlasela ukuba athimbe kubo njengokuphangwayo;"
Esther8:12 ngamini-nye, emazweni onke kakumkani uAhaswerosi, oko kukuthi, ngomhla weshumi elinesithathu wenyanga yeshumi elinesibini (yinyanga enguAdare ke leyo)."
Esther8:13 Ikopi yomthetho eyayiza kunikwa iphondo ngalinye yaziswa kuzo zonke iintlanga, yaye amaYuda ayemele alungiselele loo mini ukuziphindezela kwiintshaba zawo."
Esther8:14 Bandula ke ooyise baphuma ngokukhawuleza, bekhwele iimeyile neenkamela, ngokomyalelo kakumkani. Kwaye umyalelo wanikwa kwibhotwe likaSusan."
Esther8:15 uMordekayi wemka kukumkani wambethe ingubo yobukumkani emfusa nemhlophe, enxibe isithsaba esikhulu segolide, evathe ingubo ende yelinen ecikizekileyo nemfusa; umzi waseShushan wavuya wavuya."
Esther8:16 KumaYuda kwabakho ukukhanya, nokuvuya, novuyo, nembeko."
Esther8:17 Kuwo onke amaphondo nakwizixeko ngezixeko, naphi na apho umyalelo kakumkani nomyalelo wakhe wawufikela khona, amaYuda ayenovuyo nemihlali, imibhiyozo nemini nobumnandi. Abantu abaninzi belizwe baba ngamaYuda; ngokuba bafikelwa kukunkwantya ngamaYuda."
Esther9:1 Ngenyanga yeshumi elinesibini (yinyanga enguAdare ke leyo), ngomhla weshumi elinesithathu kuyo, ekuzalisekeni kwelizwi lokumkani nomthetho wakhe, ngaloo mini iintshaba zamaYuda zaziza kuwahlasela baye, (nangona kwakuchasene noko, ukuba amaYuda ayebalawula abo babewathiyile);"
Esther9:2 AmaYuda ahlanganisana kwizixeko zawo kuwo onke amaphondo kaKumkani uAhaswerosi ukuze abase izandla abo babefuna ububi bawo; kwaye kungekho bani unako ukuma nawo; ngokuba bafikelwa kukunkwantya abantu bonke.
Esther9:3 Bonke abathetheli bamazwe, nabathetheli, namabamba, nabathetheli bokumkani, bawanceda amaYuda; ngokuba bafikelwa kukoyika uMoretogayi."
Esther9:4 Kuba uMordekayi wayemkhulu endlwini kakumkani, yaye udumo lwakhe lwaqhubeka lufikelela kuwo onke amaphondo, kuba le ndoda inguMordekayi yayikhula ngakumbi."
Esther9:5 Azoyisa ke amaYuda zonke iintshaba zawo ngekrele, nangokubulala, nangokutshabalalisa, enza ngokuzithandela kwabo babewathiyile."
Esther9:6 Ebhotwe uSusan, amaYuda abulala atshabalalisa amakhulu amahlanu amadoda."
Esther9:7 NeParshandata, noDalfon, noAspata;"
Esther9:8 noPorata, noAdaliya, noAridata;"
Esther9:9 neParmashta, noArisayi, noAridayi, noVayeshata;"
Esther9:10 Oonyana abalishumi bakaHaman unyana kaHamedati, umbandezeli wamaYuda, bababulala; ke abawasa sandla emaxhobeni."
Esther9:11 Ngaloo mini inani lababuleweyo eShushan leziswa phambi kokumkani.
Esther9:12 Wathi ukumkani kuEstere ukumkanikazi, eShushan amaYuda abulele, atshabalalisa amakhulu amahlanu amadoda, noonyana abalishumi bakaHaman; babesenza ntoni kwamanye amazwe kakumkani? sithini isicelo sakho? kwaye uya kuyinikwa; okanye siyintoni na isicelo sakho? kwaye iya kwenzeka."
Esther9:13 Wathi uEstere, Ukuba ukumkani uthe wathanda, bovulelwa amaYuda aseShushan ngokwesiko lanamhlanje ngomso, nokuthi oonyana abalishumi bakaHaman baxhonywe emthini."
Esther9:14 Wathi ukumkani makwenziwe oko; umthetho wawiswa nguSusan; baxhonywa oonyana abalishumi bakaHaman.
Esther9:15 Abizelana ndawonye amaYuda aseShushan ngomhla weshumi elinesine wenyanga enguAdare, abulala amakhulu amathathu amadoda eShushan; ke abawasa sandla emaxhobeni."
Esther9:16 Kodwa amaYuda athile awayekumaphondo kakumkani ahlanganisana aza alinda umphefumlo wawo aza aphumla ezintshabeni zawo aza abulala amashumi asixhenxe anesihlanu amawaka eentshaba zawo, kodwa akazange alibambe ixhoba."
Esther9:17 Ngosuku lweshumi elinesithathu lwenyanga enguAdare; baphumla ngomhla weshumi elinesine, bawenza umhla wokuchwayitha nowovuyo."
Esther9:18 Ke amaYuda aseShushan ahlanganisana ngomhla weshumi elinesithathu kuyo, nangomhla weshumi elinesine kuyo; baphumla ngomhla weshumi elinesihlanu, bawenza umhla wokuchwayitha nowovuyo."
Esther9:19 Ngenxa yoko amaYuda asemizini nasemizini engenaludonga, awenza umhla weshumi elinesine wenyanga enguAdare, ube ngumhla wemivuyo nowovuyo, nomhla wokuchwayitha, nowokuthumelana izabelo."
Esther9:20 uMordekayi wazibhala ezo zinto, wathumela iincwadi kumaYuda onke, emazweni onke kakumkani uAhaswerosi, akufuphi nakude;"
Esther9:21 ukuba akuqinisele, awugcine umhla weshumi elinesine wenyanga enguAdare, nomhla weshumi elinesihlanu kuyo umnyaka;"
Esther9:22 Kufana nemihla aphumla ngayo amaYuda ezintshabeni zawo, yaza nenyanga yatshintsha kuwo usizi yaba luvuyo, isijwili saba lusuku oluhle nezipho kumahlwempu."
Esther9:23 Aqala ke amaYuda ukwenza njengoko uMordekayi wayewabhalele;
Esther9:24 ngenxa yokuba uHaman unyana kaHamedata, umAgagi, utshaba lwamaYuda onke, wayeceba ukuwatshabalalisa amaYuda aze enze iPuri, oko kukuthi, iqashiso, ukuwatshabalalisa nokuwatshabalalisa;"
Esther9:25 Kodwa ekufikeni kukaEstere phambi kokumkani, wayalela ngeencwadi ukuba icebo lakhe elibi awayecebe ngalo ngamaYuda libuyele entlokweni yakhe, yaye yena noonyana bakhe baxhonywa emthini."
Esther9:26 Yiyo ke loo nto namhlanje beyibiza ngegama lePurim, beyibiza ngokuba yiNgcwele ngenxa yoko, ngenxa yamazwi onke ale ncwadi, nangenxa yoko awakubonayo, awafikayo kuwo ngenxa yale nto,"
Esther9:27 AmaYuda ashumayela yaye azithabathele abazukulwana bawo bonke abo bathelela kuwo, kangangokuba kungeyomfuneko ngawo ukuba agcine ezi ntsuku zimbini ngokwezibhalo zawo nokuhamba ngexesha lawo elimisiweyo minyaka le;"
Esther9:28 ikhunjulwe loo mihla, igcinwe kwizizwe ngezizwe, kwizizwe ngezizwe, kwisithili ngemizi, kwimizi ngemizi; nokuba le mihla yePurim ingatshabalali phakathi kwamaYuda, nokukhunjulwa kwayo akupheli kwinzala yawo."
Esther9:29 Babhala ke ooEstere ukumkanikazi, intombi ka-Abhihayili, noMordekayi umYuda, babhala ngamandla abo onke, bemisa le ncwadi yesibini yePuri."
Esther9:30 Wathumela iincwadi kumaYuda onke, akumaphondo alikhulu elinamanci mabini anesixhenxe, obukumkani buka-Ahaswerosi, zinamazwi oxolo nenyaniso,"
Esther9:31 ukuze kuqinisekwe imihla yePurim ngamaxesha ayo amisiweyo, kanye njengoko uMordekayi umYuda noKumkanikazi uEstere babebayalele, nangokuvumelana noko babegqibe ngako kubo nangokwenzala yabo ngokuphathelele ukuzila ukutya nokubizwa kwabo."
Esther9:32 Umyalelo kaEstere uziqinisela ezo ndawo zePuri; kwaye kubhaliwe encwadini.
Esther10:1 Ukumkani uAhaswerosi wayerhafisa ilizwe neziqithi zolwandle.
Esther10:2 Ke zonke izenzo zamandla akhe namandla akhe nengxelo yobukhulu bukaMordekayi awathi ukumkani wamphakamisa kubo, akubhalwanga na encwadini yemicimbi yookumkani bamaMedi namaPersi?"
Esther10:3 Ngenxa yokuba uMordekayi umYuda wayengene ezihlangwini zokumkani uAsuwerosi, wayengoyena mkhulu phakathi kwamaYuda, ekholisekile kuninzi lwabazalwana bakhe, ebanqwenelela okuhle abantu bakowabo, wathetha uxolo kuyo yonke imbewu yakhe."
Job1:1 Kwaye kukho ndoda ithile kwelakithi, egama linguYobhi; loo mntu wayelilungisa, elilungisa, emoyika uThixo, etyeka ebubini."
Job1:2 Wazalelwa oonyana abasixhenxe, neentombi ezintathu."
Job1:3 Imfuyo yakhe yayingamawaka asixhenxe eenkomo, amawaka amathathu eenkamela, namakhulu amahlanu eenkomo, namakhulu amahlanu amaesile, nabakhonzi abaninzi kunene; yaba nkulu ke le ndoda kubo bonke abantu baseMpuma."
Job1:4 Oonyana bakhe babeqhele ukuya kwenza isidlo ezindlwini zabo, elowo eyimini yakhe; wathumela ukuba kubizwe oodade babo bobathathu, ukuze badle basele nabo."
Job1:5 Zakuzaliseka iintsuku zetheko lawo, wathumela uYobhi, wabangcwalisa, wavuka kusasa, wenyusa amadini anyukayo ngokwenani lawo; ngokuba ebesithi uYobhi, Mhlawumbi oonyana bam bangaba bonile, bamlahla uThixo entliziyweni yabo. Ngoko uYobhi wayesoloko ekwenza oko."
Job1:6 Kwathi ngamhla uthile oonyana bakaThixo beza kuzimisa phambi koYehova, wangena noSathana phakathi kwabo."
Job1:7 Wathi uYehova kuSathana, Uvela phi na? uSathana wamphendula uYehova, wathi, Ulihambahamba ehlabathini, nasezindaweni zonke ezikulo."
Job1:8 Wathi uYehova kuSathana, Ubonile na, umkhonzi wam uYobhi, ukuba akukho unjengaye ehlabathini, indoda elilungisa, elilungisa, emoyikayo uThixo, etyekayo ebubini?"
Job1:9 uSathana wamphendula uYehova, wathi, uYobhi lo ke woyika uThixo yedwa na?"
Job1:10 Akubiyelwa nguwe na wena, nendlu yakhe, nento yonke awayenzayo ngeenxa zonke? Wawusikelela umsebenzi wezandla zakhe, banda ubutyebi bakhe ehlabathini."
Job1:11 Ke ngoku khawuse isandla sakho, uchukumise yonke into anayo, ukuba akayi kukulahla na wena phambi kwamehlo akho."
Job1:12 Wathi uYehova kuSathana, Yabona, konke anako kusesandleni sakho; musa nje ukubeka isandla sakho phezu kwakhe. Wemka ke uSathana, wemka ebusweni bukaYehova."
Job1:13 Kwathi ngamhla uthile oonyana bakhe neentombi zakhe babesidla, basela iwayini endlwini yomkhuluwa wabo."
Job1:14 Wafika umthunywa lowo kuYobhi, wathi, Iinkomo bezilima, namaesile ebesidla ecaleni lazo."
Job1:15 Abaxabela ke amaShebha, abathabatha; ewe, bababulala abakhonzi ngobushushu bekrele; Ndisinde ndedwa, ukuza kukuxelela."
Job1:16 Esathetha lo, kwabonakala omnye, wathi, Kuhle umlilo kaThixo ezulwini, watshisa impahla emfutshane nezicaka. Ndisinde ndedwa, ukuza kukuxelela."
Job1:17 Esathetha lowo, kwafika nomnye wathi: “AmaKaledi amisa imikhosi emithathu, azingenela iinkamela, azithabatha, ababulala abakhonzi ngohlangothi lwekrele; Ndisinde ndedwa, ukuza kukuxelela."
Job1:18 Esathetha lo, kwafika uthile, wathi, Oonyana bakho neentombi zakho babesidla, besela iwayini endlwini yomninawa wabo;"
Job1:19 nanko kuvela umoya omkhulu ngasentlango, wabetha ezimbombeni zone zendlu, wabawela abafana, bafa; Ndisinde ndedwa, ukuza kukuxelela."
Job1:20 Waphakama uYobhi, wazikrazula iimpahla zakhe, wacheba intloko yakhe, wawa phantsi, waqubuda."
Job1:21 Wathi, Ndaphuma ndedwa esizalweni sikama, ndiya kubuyela khona ndedwa; uYehova wanika, yaye uYehova uthabathile; Malibongwe igama likaYehova."
Job1:22 Kuko konke oko akonanga uYobhi, akamthukanga uThixo."
Job2:1 Kwathi ngamhla uthile, oonyana bakaThixo beza kubonakala ebusweni bukaYehova, weza noSathana nabo, ukuba babonakale ebusweni bukaYehova."
Job2:2 Wathi uYehova kuSathana, Uvela phi na? uSathana wamphendula uYehova, wathi, Ulihambahamba ehlabathini, ahambahamba kulo."
Job2:3 uYehova wathi kuSathana: “Ukubonile na, mkhonzi wam uYobhi, ukuba akukho unjengaye ehlabathini, indoda elilungisa, elilungisa, emoyikayo uThixo, ebuphepha ububi? ukanti usabugcinile ubulungisa bakhe, nokuba undishukumisele ukuba ndimtshabalalise ngelize."
Job2:4 uSathana wamphendula uYehova, wathi, Ulusu ngenxa yolusu; yonke into anayo umntu woyinikela ngenxa yomphefumlo wakhe."
Job2:5 Ke kaloku khawuse isandla sakho, uchukumise emathanjeni akhe nasenyameni yakhe, ukuba akayi kukulahla na phambi kwamehlo akho."
Job2:6 Wathi uYehova kuSathana, Nanko esesandleni sakho; kodwa wusindise umphefumlo wakhe."
Job2:7 uSathana wesuka ebusweni bukaYehova, wambetha uYobhi ngamathumba, wathabathela entendeni yeenyawo zakhe wesa etholeni lakhe."
Job2:8 Wathabatha isitya sodongwe, wazikrwela ngaso; wahlala eluthuthwini."
Job2:9 Wathi umkakhe kuye, Usabambelele na ekugqibeleleni kwakho? Mqalekise uThixo, ufe."
Job2:10 Wathi ke yena kuye, Uthetha njengesidenge. Intoni? Siya kwamkela okulungileyo esandleni sikaThixo na, singamkeli ezimbi? Kuko konke oko akonanga uYobhi ngomlomo wakhe."
Job2:11 Zathi izihlobo ezithathu zikaYobhi zakuva ngayo yonke le ntlekele emhleleyo, zeza zaya elowo endlwini yakhe; nguElifazi wakwaTeman, uBhiledadi wakwaShuwa, noTsofare wakwaNahama; ngokuba babenzela umnqophiso wokumenza buhlungu, bamthuthuzele."
Job2:12 Bawaphakamisela amehlo abo bekude, abamazanga, baphakamisa izwi labo, balila; Bazikrazula iingubo zabo bonke, bagalela ngothuli entloko, belugalela ngothuli entloko."
Job2:13 Bahlala naye phantsi iimini zasixhenxe nobusuku bazo; kungekho uthetha naye, ngokuba babebona ukuba umvandedwa wakhe mkhulu kakhulu."
Job3:1 Emveni koko uYobhi wawuvula umlomo wakhe, wayiqalekisa imini yakhe."
Job3:2 Wathi uYobhi:
Job3:3 Mayitshabalale imini endazalwa ngayo, nobusuku ekwakusithiwa ngabo, Kukhawulwe umntwana oyinkwenkwe."
Job3:4 Mayibe mnyama loo mini; Kwanga uThixo angàyiboni iphezulu, Nokukhanya kungakhanyi phezu kwayo."
Job3:5 Mayihlanjelwe ubumnyama nethunzi lokufa; maliyakhe ilifu phezu kwayo; mabuyoyike ubumnyama belanga.
Job3:6 Mabumbethe ubumnyama obo busuku; musani ukuyiphatha imihla yomnyaka, ningafaki inani leenyanga;"
Job3:7 Yabona, obo busuku mabube lilolo, kungabikho lizwi lovuyo kubo."
Job3:8 Aqalekise abaqalekisa ilanga, Abakuphaphameleyo ukukuvusa ukukhala kwabo;"
Job3:9 Iinkwenkwezi zenu zokuhlwa mazibe mnyama; Makafune ukukhanya, kungabikho; makungakuboni ukusa;"
Job3:10 Ngokuba bungazivalanga iingcango zesizalo sikama, Bungabusithelisanga ububi emehlweni am."
Job3:11 Yini na ukuba ndingafeli esizalweni sikanina? bekutheni ze ndingakhuphanga moya xa ndiphuma esuswini sam?
Job3:12 Bekutheni ukuze amadolo am andibambezele? okanye ndincancisa ntoni?
Job3:13 Kuba ngoku ngendiba ndilele, ndilele, ndilele; ukuba bendithe cwaka,"
Job3:14 ookumkani, nabacebisi behlabathi, abazakhela amanxuwa;"
Job3:15 Nabathetheli ngegolide, ababezalise izindlu zabo ngesilivere;"
Job3:16 Okanye ngendingaba khona njengeentsana ezifihlakeleyo; njengeentsana ezingazange zakubona ukukhanya kwemini.
Job3:17 Kuba apho, abangendawo bayekile ukuxhalaba; nalapho abatyhafileyo bayaphumla."
Job3:18 Apho amabanjwa aphumla ndaweni-nye; aziliva ilizwi lomcudisi.
Job3:19 Abancinane nabakhulu balapho; yaye ikhoboka likhululekile enkosini yalo.
Job3:20 Ngenxa yeso sizathu, unikwe ukukhanya ukuya ekubandezelekeni, kwaye ubomi kwintliziyo eyaphukileyo;"
Job3:21 abalangazelela ukufa, kusuke kungafiki; bawungcwaba ngaphezu kobutyebi obuselelweyo;"
Job3:22 Ngoobani abavuyayo nabavuyayo xa befumana ingcwaba?
Job3:23 Kutheni le nto ukukhanya kunikwa umntu ondlela yakhe ifihliweyo nokhuselweyo nguThixo?
Job3:24 Kuba kufike ukuncwina kwam phambi kokuba ndidle, Nokubhonga kwam kumpompoza njengamanzi."
Job3:25 Kuba into endinxunguphala yiyo, indifikele, nento endinxunguphala yiyo indizele."
Job3:26 Andikhuselekanga, andiphumlanga, andizolanga; kodwa yafika ingxaki."
Job4:1 Waphendula uElifazi wakwaTeman, wathi:"
Job4:2 Ukuba sizama ukuthetha nawe, ngaba uya kuziva ukhathazekile? ngubani na ongakwaziyo ukuthetha?"
Job4:3 Qaphela, ubafundise abaninzi, waza wazomeleza izandla ezibuthathaka."
Job4:4 Amazwi akho amxhasa lowo wayeza kuwa, waza wawaqinisa amadolo abuthathaka."
Job4:5 Kodwa ngoku uzelwe, kwaye udiniwe; uyamchukumisa, uyoyika."
Job4:6 Asikuko na ukunkwantya, ithemba lakho, ithemba lakho, nobulungisa beendlela zakho?"
Job4:7 Khumbula, ngubani na owakha wadaka, kuba emsulwa? Anqunyulwa phi na amalungisa?"
Job4:8 Njengoko ndabonayo, abahlwayela ubugqwetha, bavuna ubutshinga, bahlwayele ubugqwetha."
Job4:9 Umoya kaThixo ubatshabalalisa, Ngokuphefumla komsindo wakhe banyamalale."
Job4:10 Ukugquma kwengonyama, nelizwi lengonyama egqumayo, namazinyo eengonyama ezintsha aqhawuke."
Job4:11 Ingonyama entsha itshabalala ngenxa yokuswela amaxhoba, namathole engonyama entsha abe ziintsali."
Job4:12 Yaziswa kum entsithelweni;
Job4:13 Ezinkumbulo zemibono yasebusuku, Xa abantu befikelwa bubuthongo obukhulu;"
Job4:14 Ndibanjwe kukunkwantya, Kwawarhwaqaza onke amathambo am."
Job4:15 Wadlula umoya ebusweni bam; iinwele zenyama yam ziphelile.
Job4:16 Wema, ndingasiboni isimo sawo; kwavela umfanekiso phambi kwamehlo am, kwathi cwaka, ndeva ilizwi lisithi:"
Job4:17 Ngaba umntu ofayo uya kuba lilungisa ngakumbi kunoThixo? Ngaba umntu uya kuba nyulu kunoMdali wakhe?
Job4:18 Yabona, akakholwa ngabakhonzi bakhe; wazithetha ngobudenge izithunywa zakhe."
Job4:19 Bathini na ke ukuhlala ezindlwini zodongwe, eziziseko zabo ziseluthulini, ezityunyuzwe luthuli?"
Job4:20 Bagxothwa kususela kusasa kwada kwahlwa;
Job4:21 Ubuhle babo abupheleli na kubo? Bafa bengenabulumko.
Job5:1 Khawubize, ukuba ukho, wosabela kuwe; Nguwuphi na ke kwabangcwele oya kuphethukela kuye?"
Job5:2 Ngokuba ingqumbo iyabulala izimathane, Nekhwele liyabulala izinyabi."
Job5:3 Ndabona isidenge sikhula, Ndaliqalekisa kwaoko ikhaya laso."
Job5:4 Bakude nosindiso abantwana bakhe, batyunyuzwa esangweni, kungabikho msindisi."
Job5:5 Kuba abalambileyo badla amaxhoba, bawahluthe ngameva;"
Job5:6 Nakuba kungekho ntlekele ivela eluthulini, Nobubi abuphumi emhlabeni;"
Job5:7 Noko ke, umntu uzalelwa ebubini, njengentlantsi ekubalekeni kwayo phezulu."
Job5:8 Bendiya kuquqela kuThixo, Ndilibeke kuThixo ityala lam,"
Job5:9 abenza izinto ezinkulu ezingenakulinganiswa; imimangaliso emininzi.
Job5:10 Ulonisa imvula ehlabathini, Uthumela amanzi ehlabathini;"
Job5:11 Ukuba aphakamise abathobekileyo; ukuze abo bazilileyo baphakanyiswe benoxolo.
Job5:12 Uyawatshitshisa amacebo amatshijolo, Zingenzi izenzo zabo izandla zabo."
Job5:13 Usenokuba nobulumko emanqeni abo, liguqulwe injongo yabafundisi bobuxoki."
Job5:14 Emini bafumana ubumnyama;
Job5:15 Uyabahlangula abaziintsizana emkhontoni, Emilebeni yabo, Nasesandleni sowomeleleyo."
Job5:16 Kubekho ke ithemba kosweleyo, Ubungendawo buyawuvala umlomo walo."
Job5:17 Yabona, unoyolo mntu owohlwaywa nguThixo; ke ngoko anisigwebi isohlwayo sikaSomandla."
Job5:18 Kuba wenza buhlungu, abophe; uyaphalusa, ziphilise izandla zakhe."
Job5:19 Uya kukusindisa ezimbandezelweni ezintandathu; Kwabasixhenxe akukho bubi bungayi kuchukunyiswa.
Job5:20 Uya kukuhlangula endlaleni, nasekufeni, emandleni ekrele."
Job5:21 Uya kusitheliswa ekufeni kolwimi, Ungayoyiki intshabalalo yakufika."
Job5:22 Imbuqo nendlala uya kuyihleka, ungawoyiki amarhamncwa elizwe;"
Job5:23 Kuba uya kwenza umnqophiso namawa elizwe, zibe noxolo izilo zelizwe nawe."
Job5:24 Uya kwazi ukuba uxolo yintente yakho; wondwendwela ekhaya, ungoni."
Job5:25 Uya kwazi nokuba inzala yakho iya kuba ninzi, nenzala yakho ibe njengengca yomhlaba."
Job5:26 Uya kufikelela engcwabeni umdala kakhulu, njengesithungu sengqolowa ngexesha laso;"
Job5:27 Khangela, siyihlolile, injalo loo nto; yiva kwaye wazi ngokuqinisekileyo."
Job6:1 Waphendula uYobhi, wathi,"
Job6:2 Mabulinganiswe ubuhlwempu bam, Nomvandedwa wam ulinganiswe esikalini!"
Job6:3 Kuba ngoku bekuya kuba nzima ngaphezu kwentlabathi yolwandle; Kungenxa yoko le nto amazwi am aginyiwe.
Job6:4 Kuba iintolo zoSomandla zimi kum, Umphefumlo wam wawufinca ubuhlungu bazo; izothuso zikaThixo zihlangene ngam."
Job6:5 Iesile liyalila na, xa linomtya? Okanye ngaba iinkomo ziya kulala edlelweni lazo?"
Job6:6 Iyadliwa na into ejavujavu, ingenatyuwa? Okanye ngaba kukho incasa kwiqanda elimhlophe?"
Job6:7 Izinto owala ukuzichukumisa umphefumlo wam, zinjengenyama yam elusizi."
Job6:8 Owu, ukuba bendinokusifumana isicelo sam; kwaye uThixo uya kundinika into endiyilangazelelayo!"
Job6:9 Kananjalo kube kuhle emehlweni kaThixo ukunditshabalalisa; ukukhulula isandla sakhe andihlise!
Job6:10 Ke kaloku bendiya kuthuthuzeleka; Ewe, bendiya kuziqaqadekisa ndiselusizini makangacongi; Andiwafihlanga amazwi oyiNgcwele."
Job6:11 Ayintoni na amandla am, ukuba ndingade ndithembe? Siyintoni na isiphelo sam, ukuze ndibandise?"
Job6:12 Angamandla amatye na amandla am? Okanye inyama yam lubhedu na?
Job6:13 Akukho kum na uncedo lwam? Buphumile kum na bonke ubulumko?
Job6:14 Oxhwalekileyo abe nenceba kummelwane wakhe; Ke yena uyatyeka ekumoyikeni uSomandla.
Job6:15 Abazalwana bam banginiza njengomlambo oqukuqelayo, badlula njengomlambo oqukuqelayo;"
Job6:16 omnyama ngenxa yomkhenkce, ekusithele kuwo ikhephu;"
Job6:17 Ekufudumaleni kwawo, ayaphela; kwakubashushu, zitshabalala endaweni yazo."
Job6:18 Iindlela zabo zisuke zalahleka; baba yinto engento, batshabalale."
Job6:19 Banduluka amagorha akwaTema, abakwaShebha babalindile."
Job6:20 Yadana, ngokuba ibikholosile; beza apho, badanile."
Job6:21 Kuba ngoku akukho nto; uyakubona ukuguqa kwam, woyika."
Job6:22 Ndithe na, Ndiziseni? okanye: Ndinike ixabiso lempahla yakho?"
Job6:23 Okanye ndihlangule esandleni sotshaba? okanye: Ndihlangule esandleni sowomeleleyo?
Job6:24 Ndifundiseni, ukuze ndizole, ndiqonde apho ndilahleka khona."
