Job6:25 Hayi indlela anamandla ngayo amazwi afanelekileyo! kodwa ingxabano yakho ikhalimela ntoni?
Job6:26 Ngaba uya kukhalinyelwa ngamazwi nentetho yomphefumlo odakumbileyo?
Job6:27 Ewe, ucinezela inkedama, Ummbele iqula ummelwane wakho."
Job6:28 Yanelisa ngoku, khangela kum; kuba uyabona ukuba bubuxoki."
Job6:29 Khanibuye, musa ukuba ngongendawo; ewe, buya, ubulungisa bam bukuyo."
Job6:30 Bukho na ububi elulwimini lwam? Ngaba incasa yam ayikwazi ukubona izinto ezingalunganga?
Job7:1 Akakho na ixesha emntwini ehlabathini? Ayinjengemihla yomntu ohlambulukileyo na imihla yakhe?
Job7:2 Njengomkhonzi oshiywa ngumthunzi, nanjengenxila, elindele umvuzo wengqesho yakhe;"
Job7:3 Ngoko basikelelwe ngeenyanga eziphuthileyo, nobusuku obutyhafileyo bumiselwe mna."
Job7:4 Xa ndileleyo ndithi, Ndiya kuvuka nini na, ubusuku budlule? ndaqina isibindi ndaya ngapha nangapha kwade kwasa."
Job7:5 Inyama yam yembeswe iimpethu namanxeba othuli; ulusu lwam lwaphukile, lungamasikizi."
Job7:6 Imihla yam ikhawuleza ngaphezu kwenqwelo; Akukho themba.
Job7:7 Khumbula ukuba bungumoya ubomi bam; Aliyi kukubona okulungileyo iliso lam.
Job7:8 Iliso elindibonayo aliyi kuba sandibona; Amehlo akho akum, ndingekho;"
Job7:9 Njengoko ilifu litshabalala kwaye linyamalala, ngokunjalo nalowo uhla aye kwelabafileyo akayi kubuya avuke."
Job7:10 Akasayi kubuyela endlwini yakhe, nekhaya lakhe lingabi samazi."
Job7:11 Ke ngoko, andiyi kuwuvala umlomo wam; Ndiya kuthetha ekubandezelweni komphefumlo wam; Ndiya kuwukhalaza umphefumlo wam ngenxa yobubi;"
Job7:12 Lulwandle na, ngumnenga na, le nto undibona?"
Job7:13 Xa ndithi, Wondithuthuzela umyalelo wam, Zolithoza izingqengqelo zam;"
Job7:14 Ngoku uyandoyikisa ngamaphupha yaye undoyikisa ngemibono.
Job7:15 Ngoko ke umphefumlo wam wanyula ukufa nokufa kunobomi bam.
Job7:16 Ndiyithiyile loo nto; andiyi kuphila ngonaphakade, andiyi kuma; ngokuba ilize imihla yam."
Job7:17 Uyintoni na umntu, ukuba uthe wamenza mkhulu? Umisele intliziyo yakho kuye?"
Job7:18 Kwaye nokuba umndwendwela yonke intsasa uze umvavanye umzuzu ngamnye?
Job7:19 Kuya kude kube nini na ningandishiyi ningandivumeli ndilinde de nditshice?
Job7:20 Ndonile; ndithini na ngawe, Msindisi wabantu? yini na ukuba undenze umqondiso kuwe, ukuba ube ngumthwalo kum?"
Job7:21 Kwaye kungani na ukuba ungasixoleli isikreqo sam uze ubususe ubugwenxa bam? ngokuba ngoku ndiya kulala eluthulini; nindifune kusasa, ndingabikho."
Job8:1 Waphendula uBhiledadi wakwaMoses, wathi,"
Job8:2 Koda kube nini na nithetha ezi zinto? Aya kude abe njengomoya onamandla, amazwi omlomo wakho?"
Job8:3 uThixo uyagqwetha na okusesikweni? uSomandla uwujikele na umyalelo?
Job8:4 Ukuba oonyana bakho bathe bamona kuye, wabashiya ngenxa yobumenemene babo;"
Job8:5 Ukuba uthe wamquqela uThixo ngexesha elililo, Nomthandazo wakho kuSomandla;"
Job8:6 Ukuba uhlambulukile, ulungile; inene, uya kuvuka ngenxa yakho, ayenze ibe nempumelelo indawo yokuhlala yobulungisa bakho."
Job8:7 Nakuba isiqalo sakho besincinane, kodwa isiphelo sakho siya kukhula kakhulu."
Job8:8 Kuba babuze ngenkulungwane yokuqala baze balungiselele ukugocagocwa kooyise.
Job8:9 Ngokuba singabayizolo, asazi, ngokuba isithunzi imihla yethu ehlabathini;"
Job8:10 Abayi kunifundisa na, bathethe kuni, bathethe amazwi entliziyweni yabo?"
Job8:11 Ngaba iindonga ziyakhula ngaphandle kodaka? Iyahluma na indwe emanzini?
Job8:12 Xa luthe lwaluhlaza, lungekanqunywa, luyabuna phambi kwayo yonke imifuno."
Job8:13 Zizo ezo iindlela zabo bonke abamlibalayo uThixo; nethemba labahanahanisi liya kutshabalala;
Job8:14 abathemba labo liya kubhangiswa, abathemba liyintambo;"
Job8:15 Wayama ngendlu yakhe, ingemi; uya kuyichukumisa, kodwa ayiyi kuma."
Job8:16 Uluhlaza elangeni, Nomasebe akhe ayahluma emyezweni wakhe."
Job8:17 Iingcambu zakhe zirhawula imfumba, Ubonela indawo yamatye."
Job8:18 Ukuba uthe wamsusa endaweni yakhe, wokhanyela, esithi, Andikubonanga."
Job8:19 Khangela, luvuyo lwendlela yakhe, kwaye abanye baya kukhula ehlabathini."
Job8:20 Yabona, uThixo akamshiyi ogqibeleleyo, Akasindisi amanginingini;"
Job8:21 Ade azalise umlomo wakho ngokuhleka, Nomlomo wakho ugcwale ngovuyo."
Job8:22 Baya kudana abakuthiyayo; nekhaya labangendawo liya kutshatyalaliswa.
Job9:1 Waphendula uYobhi, wathi:"
Job9:2 Ndiyazi ukuba kuyinyaniso oko; Ke angathini na umntu lo ukuba lilungisa phambi koThixo?
Job9:3 Ukuba uthe yena wafuna ukubambana naye, Akayi kuphendula nangelinye ilizwi ewakeni."
Job9:4 Unentliziyo elumkileyo, unamandla amakhulu; ngubani na owamshumayezayo, waba nempumelelo?"
Job9:5 banyikimisa iintaba zingazi; owabagxothayo ngomsindo wakhe.
Job9:6 Ulogungqisa ihlabathi endaweni yalo, Zididizele iintsika zalo;"
Job9:7 Ulothetha elangeni, lingaphumi; kwaye uqinisekise iinkwenkwezi."
Job9:8 Uvula izulu yedwa, Unyathela emimangweni yolwandle;"
Job9:9 Ulowenza iinkwenkwezi zeBhere, namaKroza, nesiLimela, Neengontsi zasezantsi."
Job9:10 Owenza izinto ezinkulu ezingekaveliswa; Nezimanga ezingenakubalwa.
Job9:11 Yabona, udlula phezu kwam, ndingamboni; uyaqhubeka naye, kodwa andimboni."
Job9:12 Yabona, exwila, ngubani na ongamnqandayo? Ngubani na oya kuthi kuye, Wenza ntoni na?"
Job9:13 Ukuba uThixo akawunqandi umsindo wakhe, Baya kuqubuda kuye abancedisi abanekratshi."
Job9:14 Ndinokuthini na xa ndimphendula yaye ndikhetha amazwi am okunxibelelana naye?
Job9:15 Okokuba, nangona bendililungisa, andimphenduli; kodwa ndathandaza kumgwebi wam."
Job9:16 Ukuba ndithe ndambiza, wandiphendula; nangona kunjalo, andizange ndikholelwe ukuba uliphulaphule ilizwi lam."
Job9:17 Kuba undibetha ngesaqhwithi yaye wandisa amanxeba ngaphandle kwesizathu.
Job9:18 Angandivumeli ndiphefumle, ke undihluthisa ngobukrakra."
Job9:19 Ukuba ndithe ndaqinisa, uthi, Yabona, womelele;"
Job9:20 Ukuba bendithe ndalilungisa, umlomo wam ubuya kundigweba; Ukuba ndithe, Ndigqibelele, oko koba kukundikhanyela;"
Job9:21 Ukuba bendigqibelele, andiwuqondi umphefumlo wam; Bendiya kubadela ubomi bam."
Job9:22 Le yimbi le nto; ngenxa yoko ndithe, Olilungisa nongendawo uyabatshabalalisa."
Job9:23 Ukuba ithe yabulala ngesiquphe indyikitya yokufa, Woyihleka into yabamsulwa."
Job9:24 Ihlabathi linikelwe esandleni sabangendawo; Uyabugquma ubuso babagwebi bakhe; ukuba akunjalo, uphi na, ungubani na?"
Job9:25 Ngoku imihla yam ikhawuleza ngaphezu komqobo; wabaleka engaboni nto ilungileyo.
Job9:26 Idlula njengemikhombe yeengcongolo, Njengokhozi luxhelekile kwixhoba lalo."
Job9:27 Xa ndithi, Ndiya kuwulibala umsindo wam, Ndiyiyeke ingqumbo yam, ndizole."
Job9:28 Ndiyazoyika zonke iinkxwaleko zam, Ndiyazi, ngokuba aniyi kundifuna;"
Job9:29 Ukuba ndithe ndabangongendawo, yini na ukuba ndifumane ndasebenza?"
Job9:30 Ukuba ndithe ndazihlamba ngamanzi ekhephu, andazihlambululanga kangako izandla zam;"
Job9:31 Ke wena uya kundiphosa emhadini, neengubo zam ziya kunuka;"
Job9:32 Ngenxa yokuba akangomntu njengam ukuba ndimphendule, yaye siya kugwetyelwa."
Job9:33 Akukho bani kuthi emini unokubeka isandla phezu kwethu sobabini;
Job9:34 Makayisuse intonga yakhe kum, Makungandoyikisi kum."
Job9:35 Bendiya kuthetha, ndingamoyiki; ke kum akunjalo."
Job10:1 Umphefumlo wam udimele bubomi; Ndiya kukuyeka ukukhalaza kwam; Ndiya kuthetha ngomoya owaphukileyo.
Job10:2 Ndithi kuThixo, Musa ukundigweba; Ndibonise ukuba kutheni undixabanisa nje."
Job10:3 Ngaba kulungile kuwe xa ucinezela, ukuba udelele umsebenzi wezandla zakho uze uwakhanyele amacebo abangendawo?"
Job10:4 Unamehlo? Ngaba ubona ngokokubona komntu?
Job10:5 Ngaba imihla yakho iyafana neyabanye abantu? Injengemihla yomntu na iminyaka yakho?
Job10:6 Xa uthe wabugweba ubugwenxa bam, uya kusigweba na isono sam?"
Job10:7 Niyazi ukuba andingongendawo; kwaye akukho bani unokuhlangula esandleni sakho.
Job10:8 Izandla zakho zindenzile, zinde zonke izinto; noko uyanditshabalalisa."
Job10:9 Khumbula ukuba undenze ngokodongwe; uya kundibuyisela eluthulini?
Job10:10 Akundithululanga na njengamasi, Wandanda njengamasi?"
Job10:11 Wandambesa ngolusu nenyama, Wandirhawula ngamathambo nemisipha."
Job10:12 Undinike ubomi nenceba, Nokuvelela kwakho kuwukhusele umphefumlo wam."
Job10:13 Ezi zinto ke uzibeke entliziyweni yakho;
Job10:14 Xa ndonile, wondibona, ungabuxoleli ubugwenxa bam."
Job10:15 Ukuba ndithe ndabangongendawo, athi ke mna! nokuba ndilungile, andisayi kuyiphakamisa intloko yam. Ndizele kukudideka; ke ngoko, niyayibona intlungu yam;"
Job10:16 Kuba luyanda. Uzingela njengengonyama, kwaye kwakhona uzibonakalisa ngendlela engaqhelekanga phezu kwam."
Job10:17 Uhlaziye amangqina akho nxamnye nam, yaye uwandise umsindo wakho nxamnye nam; Iinguquko nemfazwe zindichasile."
Job10:18 Yini na ke ukuba ukhutshwe esizalweni sikama? Ukuba bendifile, ndingabonwa liso!"
Job10:19 Ngendiba andikho; Inoba ndathathwa ndasiwa engcwabeni.
Job10:20 Ayimfutshane na imihla yam? linda ngoku, ndilinde, ukuze ndithuthuzele kancinane;"
Job10:21 Phambi kokuba ndihambe, apho ndingayi kubuya khona, ezweni lobumnyama nethunzi lokufa;"
Job10:22 Ilizwe lobumnyama bunjengobumnyama; ithunzi lokufa ngokuchasa umthetho; apho ukukhanya kububumnyama.
Job11:1 Waphendula uTsofare waseNahama, wathi,"
Job11:2 Akunakuphendulwa na amazwi amaninzi? Ugwetyelwe na umntu ozeleyo?
Job11:3 Ngaba ubuxoki bakho bufanele ukubavala umlomo abantu? ukuba uyahleka, akukho mntu unokukuhlazisa?"
Job11:4 Ngokuba wathi, Iqaqambile imfundiso yam, Ndinyulu emehlweni akho."
Job11:5 Kwaye ewe, ukuba uThixo uthe wathetha waza wavula umlomo wakhe ngokuchasene nawe;"
Job11:6 Makakubonise iimfihlakalo zobulumko, Ukuba buphindeke kabini, bayinto ezimasekileyo; Yazi ke ngoku ukuba uThixo akafuni kuwe ngaphezu kobungendawo bakho."
Job11:7 Ngaba unokumfumana uThixo ngokufuna? Unokulinganisa ngokugqibeleleyo uSomandla?
Job11:8 Kuphakame njengezulu; ungenza ntoni na ngaphezu kwesihogo; into oyaziyo.
Job11:9 Mde kunehlabathi isilinganiso sakhe, sibanzi kunolwandle."
Job11:10 Ukuba uthe wanqumla, uyamvalela, nokuba uthe wabutha, ngubani na ongamnqanda?"
Job11:11 Kuba yena uyabazi abantu abakhohlakeleyo; kwanenkohlakalo uyabubona; akazange acinge ngelo xesha?
Job11:12 Kuba umntu okhohlakeleyo uya kuba sisilumko, Kwanokuba umntu uzalwa njengethole."
Job11:13 Ukuba uthe wayilungisa intliziyo yakho, Wazolulela kuye izandla zakho;"
Job11:14 Ukuba kusesandleni sakho ububi, bukhwelelise kude, Makungabikho bugqwetha ezintenteni zakho;"
Job11:15 Kuba ngoku uya kubuphakamisa ubuso bakho bungenasisihla; ewe, kufuneka nikhuthazeke ningoyiki;"
Job11:16 Kuba uya kukulibala ukubandezeleka kwakho, ucinge njengamanzi adlulayo;"
Job11:17 Ukwaluphala kwakho kuya kukhanya ngaphezu kwemini; uya kukhanya, ube njengokusa."
Job11:18 Wosindiswa ke, ngokuba sekukho ithemba; ewe, kufuneka umbe ngeenxa zonke kuwe, kwaye uya kuphumla ngokukhuselekileyo."
Job11:19 Uya kulala, kungabikho ukoyikayo; ewe, abaninzi baya kukumangalela."
Job11:20 Ke wona amehlo abangendawo ophelelwa;
Job12:1 Waphendula uYobhi, wathi:"
Job12:2 Kodwa nina ningabantu, yaye ubulumko buya kufa nani."
Job12:3 Nam ke ndinentliziyo njengani; Andingomncinane kuwe; Ewe, ngubani na ongazaziyo izinto ezinjalo?"
Job12:4 Ndisuke ndanjengomntu oyintlekisa kummelwane wakhe, Engonqula uThixo, andiphendule; indoda elungileyo iyahlekwa."
Job12:5 Unjengesibane esidelekileyo, esisentliziyweni yothi cwaka, osisibane sentliziyo yakhe."
Job12:6 Iintente zamasela ziba nempumelelo, nabo bagculela uThixo bakhuselekile; abathe uThixo watyeba esandleni sakhe."
Job12:7 Kodwa khawubuze ezinkomeni, zokuyala; neentaka zezulu ziya kukuxelela;"
Job12:8 Thetha nehlabathi, lokuyala, neentlanzi zolwandle zokuxelela."
Job12:9 Ngubani na ongaziyo ngezo zinto zonke, ukuba sisandla sikaYehova esizenzileyo?"
Job12:10 Usesandleni sakhe umoya wezinto zonke eziphilileyo, Nomoya wabantu bonke."
Job12:11 Indlebe ayiyi kukucikida na ukuthetha? Nomlomo wayo uyingcamla kweyakhe inyama?
Job12:12 Kudala ubulumko; nangobude bemihla ukuqonda.
Job12:13 Unobulumko namandla, unecebo nokuqonda;"
Job12:14 Yabona, iyawa, ayinako ukwakhiwa kwakhona; uvala umntu, kwaye akayi kuvulwa."
Job12:15 Yabona, uyawavala amanzi, uyatshisa; Waphinda wabathuma, bawubhukuqa umhlaba."
Job12:16 Kuye amandla nobulumko;
Job12:17 Ubahlutha abacebi ababhuqiweyo, Azenze izinyabi abagwebi."
Job12:18 Ukhulula amathambo ookumkani, Abophe umbhinqo emanqeni abo."
Job12:19 Uyabathabatha abathetheli abaphangiweyo, ababhukuqe abanamandla."
Job12:20 Uyayishenxisa intetho yabathembekileyo, ayishenxise ingqondo yabadala."
Job12:21 Uphalazela amanene ungcikivo, Uwathobe amandla amagorha."
Job12:22 Utyhila iinzulu zasebumnyameni, Akhuphe ithunzi lokufa."
Job12:23 Wandisa iintlanga, azitshabalalise; Uziphangalalisa iintlanga, aziphanzise;"
Job12:24 Uzishenxisile iintliziyo zabaphathi beentlanga elimiweyo, Ababhadulisa entlango apho kungekho ndlela."
Job12:25 Ziphamza emnyameni kungekho kukhanya, Azibhadulise njengenxila."
Job13:1 Yabona, konke oko akubonile amehlo am, Yakuva indlebe yam, yakuqonda."
Job13:2 Oko ukwaziyo nam ndiyakwazi: Andimncinci kuwe.
Job13:3 Bendiya kuthetha kuSomandla, Ndibe ndinqwenela ukuthetha noThixo."
Job13:4 Niyaxoka, ningamagqirha angento nonke niphela;"
Job13:5 Akwaba ubuthe cwaka nje! kwaye obu bubulumko bakho.
Job13:6 Yivani ngoku iingcinga zam, uwubazele indlebe umthandazo womlomo wam."
Job13:7 Niya kuthetha ububi na kuThixo? uze uthethe naye ngenkohliso?
Job13:8 Uya kubamkela na ubuntu bakhe? Niya kumlwela na uThixo?
Job13:9 Kufanelekile na ukuba akugocagoce? Ngaba nawe uhlekisa ngaye na?
Job13:10 Wonohlwaya inene, xa namkela abantu emfihlekweni;"
Job13:11 Ubude bakhe abuyi kukukhwankqisa na? kwaye iimbandezelo zakhe zawela phezu kwenu?
Job13:12 Iingcinga zakho zinjengothuthu, nomzimba wakho unjengomzimba wodongwe."
Job13:13 Yithini cwaka, ndime, ukuze ndithethe, ndokutyhilelwa kum."
Job13:14 Yini na ukuba ndiyibambe inyama yam ngamazinyo am, Umphefumlo wam ndiwubeke esandleni sam?"
Job13:15 Nokuba uthe wandibulala, ndokholosa ngaye; Ke mna ndiya kuziqinisa iindlela zam phambi kwakhe."
Job13:16 Woba lusindiso kum ke, Ngokuba akuyi kuza kuye intshembezana;"
Job13:17 Phulaphulani ngenyameko ilizwi lam, ukuthetha kwam ngeendlebe zenu."
Job13:18 Khawubone, ndilicacisile ityala lam; Ndiyazi ukuba ndiza kutyholwa."
Job13:19 Ngubani na oya kubambana nam? Kuba ngoku, ukuba ndithe ndabamba umlomo, ndowukhupha umoya."
Job13:20 Musani ukwenza izinto ezimbini kum, ukuze ndingazifihleli kuni;"
Job13:21 Sisuse kum isandla sakho, Makungandoyikisi ukoyika kwakho;"
Job13:22 Biza ke, ndisabele mna; okanye mandithi, ndiphendule."
Job13:23 Buphi na ubugwenxa bam, nezono zam? Ndazise ukreqo lwam nesono sam."
Job13:24 Yini na ukuba ubusithelise ubuso bakho, undifihle elutshabeni lwakho?"
Job13:25 Ngaba unokuwuqhekeza umthi ogawulweyo apha naphaya? yaye ngaba uya kuleqa iindiza ezomileyo na?
Job13:26 Ngokuba uzibhalela kum izinto ezikrakra, Ndibudle ilifa ububiubutsha bam;"
Job13:27 Ubuye wazifaka iinyawo zam esitokisini, kwaye uyazibona iindlela zam zonke; Ubeke uphawu ezithendeni zeenyawo zam."
Job13:28 Utshabalala njengevila, njengengubo edliwe ngamanundu."
Job14:1 Umntu ozelwe ngumfazi uneentsuku ezimbalwa ezelwe, ezele ziinkxwaleko."
Job14:2 Uphuma njengentyantyambo, abune; ubaleka njengesithunzi, angemi."
Job14:3 Yaye ngaba uyawavula amehlo akho ngokuphathelele umntu onjalo uze undimise phambi kwam ematyaleni kunye nawe?
Job14:4 Ngubani na ongakhupha ohlambulukileyo koyinqambi? AWUKHO wedwa.
Job14:5 Xa imihla yakhe imisiwe, lingekafiki wena inani leenyanga zakhe, Ummisele umda wakhe angakwaziyo ukuwucanda;"
Job14:6 Myeke, aphumle, achithe imihla yakhe njengenxila."
Job14:7 Ngokuba kukho ithemba emthini, xa uthe wagawulwa, wobuya uhlume, Igatya lawo lingatshabalali."
Job14:8 Nokuba ingcambu yakhe yonakele emhlabeni, Sife nesiqu sakhe emhlabeni;"
Job14:9 Kodwa ngevumba lamanzi iya kutyatyamba ize yenze amasebe njengesityalo.
Job14:10 Ke yena umntu ufa alahlekwe; Ewe, umntu unika isinyi, kwaye uphi?"
Job14:11 Njengoko edlula amanzi olwandle, etshatyalaliswe nonogumbe, komile;"
Job14:12 Ulala ke akavuki; Lide lidlule izulu, abasayi kuvuka ebuthongweni babo."
Job14:13 Ukuba ungathanda ukundingcwaba engcwabeni, ndigcine ude uphele umsindo wakho, ndibekele ixesha uze undikhumbule!"
Job14:14 Ukuba umntu uthe wafa, wophila na? ngayo yonke imihla yokumiselwa kwam, ndolinda kude kufike ukukhululwa kwam."
Job14:15 Uya kubiza, ndisabele; wowunqwenela umsebenzi wezandla zakho."
Job14:16 Kuba ngoku uyawabala amabanga am; Awukhathali ngesono sam?
Job14:17 Ukreqo lwam luvalelwe engxoweni; Ubusebenza ubugwenxa bam.
Job14:18 Kwaye eneneni, intaba ewileyo iyatshabalala, neliwa liyasuswa endaweni yalo."
Job14:19 Amanzi opha amatye; kwaye uyawatshabalalisa amathemba abantu.
Job14:20 Umeyisile ngonaphakade, wagqitha; Uyamtshintsha ubuso umshiye."
Job14:21 Oonyana bakhe bayakhazimla, akazi yena; bathotywa, akabaqonda."
Job14:22 Kwaye inyama yakhe iya kuba buhlungu kuye, nomoya wakhe ngaphakathi kuye uya kukhala."
Job15:1 Waphendula uElifazi wakwaTeman, wathi:"
Job15:2 Ngaba isilumko sinokuthetha into engento yanto, size sizalise isisu saso ngomoya wasempumalanga?"
Job15:3 Ngaba ufanele uqiqe ngembudane? okanye ngeelwimi angenakwenza nto ngazo?
Job15:4 Ewe, uyakulahla ukunkwantya, athintele umthandazo phambi koThixo."
Job15:5 Ngokuba umlomo wakho uthetha ngobugwenxa bakho, Unyule ulwimi lwenkohliso."
Job15:6 Asindim okugwebayo ngumlomo wakho; Ewe, umlomo wakho uyangqina ngawe."
Job15:7 Ngaba ungowokuqala ukuzalwa? Ngaba wenziwa ngaphambi kweenduli?
Job15:8 Wakha wayiva na imfihlelo kaThixo? Wabugcina kuwe na ubulumko bakho?
Job15:9 Wazi ntoni na, esingayaziyo thina? uqonde ntoni na, hayi kuthi?"
Job15:10 Phakathi kwethu kukho amadoda anezimvi namaxhego, amadala kakhulu kunoyihlo."
Job15:11 Zincinane na kuwe iintuthuzelo zikaThixo? unayo imfihlo?
Job15:12 Yini na ukuba ithabatheke intliziyo yakho? kulapho amehlo akho akhangele khona;
Job15:13 Ukuba uthe wawuphikisa umphefumlo wakho kuThixo, ukhupha amazwi anjalo emlonyeni wakho?"
Job15:14 Yintoni umntu omele ahlambuluke? Nalowo uzelweyo ngumfazi, angaba lilungisa na?"
Job15:15 Yabona, akakholosi ngabakhe benceba; nezulu alihlambulukile phambi kwamehlo akhe."
Job15:16 Ngaphezu koko, umntu osela ubungendawo njengamanzi ulizothe yaye akahlambulukanga?"
Job15:17 Ndiya kukubonisa, phulaphula kum; kwaye endikubonileyo ndiya kukuxelela;"
Job15:18 Okwaxelwa zizilumko kooyise, zaza akwafihla;"
Job15:19 Ngabo bodwa elanikwa bona ihlabathi, Akuzanga kucande mntu wasemzini phakathi kwabo."
Job15:20 Yonke imihla yakhe ongendawo uyabandezeleka, Nenani leminyaka liqwetyelwe ingqwangangqwili."
Job15:21 Kuvakala ilizwi eloyikekayo ezindlebeni zakhe;
Job15:22 Akakholwa ukuba uya kubuya emnyameni; Ke ulindelwe likrele.
Job15:23 Wabhadula efuna isonka, wathi, Siphi na? uyazi, ngokuba imini yobumnyama ikufuphi kuye."
Job15:24 Iimbandezelo neenkxwaleko ziya kumkhwankqisa; ziya kudlula kuye njengokumkani olungiselela imfazwe.
Job15:25 Ngokuba esolulele ngakuThixo isandla sakhe, Unamandla phezu koSomandla."
Job15:26 Uya kumgila, ewe, emqaleni wakhe, ebuboya obuninzi bamakhaka akhe."
Job15:27 Kuba egqubuthele ubuso bakhe ngamanqatha akhe, Walityebisa icala lakhe."
Job15:28 Yaye uye wahlala kwizixeko ezidala nakwizindlu ezingenabemi, ezikufuphi ukuba zishiywe."
Job15:29 Akayi kuba sisityebi, nobutyebi bakhe abuyi kubakho, nemfezeko yabo ayiyi kubandisa ehlabathini."
Job15:30 Akayi kubushiya ubumnyama; Amasebe akhe aya kuwatshisa amadangatye, Emke ngomoya womlomo wakhe."
Job15:31 Okhohliswayo makangakholosi ngelize, ngokuba umvuzo wamampunge uyafana."
Job15:32 Uya kugqitywa ngaphambi kwexesha lawo, kwaye isebe lawo aliyi kuba luhlaza."
Job15:33 Wovuthulula njengediliya iziqhamo zakhe ezikrwada, avuthulule njengomnquma intyantyambo yakhe."
Job15:34 Kuba ibandla leentshembenxa liya kuba yintlango, nomlilo uzitshise iintente zokucenga."
Job15:35 Bakhawula ububi, bazalele ilize, Nezizalo zabo zinenkohliso."
Job16:1 Waphendula uYobhi, wathi:"
Job16:2 Ndive izinto ezininzi ezinjengezo; ningabathuthuzeli abangamatshijolo nonke niphela.
Job16:3 Ngaba amazwi alambathayo aya kuphela? Okanye yintoni ekomelezayo ukuba uphendule?
Job16:4 Nam bendiya kukwazi ukuthetha njengani: ukuba umphefumlo wenu ubusendaweni yomphefumlo wam, bendiya kuhlanganisana amazwi kuni, ndihlunguzele intloko."
Job16:5 Ke bendiya kunikhaliphisa ngomlomo wam, Nokukhuza komlomo wam kuzithobe iintlungu zenu."
Job16:6 Nokuba ndithe ndathetha, awunqabi umvandedwa wam;"
Job16:7 Hayi, undithobile ngoku, uyitshabalalisile ingxokolo yam yonke;"
Job16:8 Undihluthise ngemibimbi, oko oko kube bubungqina nxamnye nam, nokunyuka kwam ukuza kum ubutsha bam, bububungqina bobuso bam."
Job16:9 Ondithiyileyo uginya ngomsindo wakhe; Utshixize amazinyo; utshaba lwam lundijongile.
Job16:10 Bathetha kum ngemilebe yomlomo wabo; bandibetha esidleleni ngesithuko; bandihlanganisa.
Job16:11 uThixo undinikele kwabangendawo, Wandinikela esandleni sabangendawo."
Job16:12 Ndaxola, wandahlula; Uphinde wandibamba entanyeni wandibamba wandenza iziqwenga wandimisa njengophawu lwakhe."
Job16:13 Bandithiyela ngezaphetha, wazityanda izintso zam, angabuyi umva; Utshica inyongo yam emhlabeni."
Job16:14 Undikhohlisa, ugidima eze kum njengegorha."
Job16:15 Ndathungela iingubo ezirhwexayo enkwaneni yolusu lwam, Ndalucofa uphondo lwam;"
Job16:16 Ubuso bam budyobhekile kukulila, Phezu kwamashiya am lithunzi lokufa;"
Job16:17 Kungabi ngamanyala asezandleni zam; Uqaqambile umthandazo wam.
Job16:18 Owu mhlaba, musa ukuligquma igazi lam, nokukhala kwam makungabi nandawo."
Job16:19 Kaloku, yabona, lisemazulwini ingqina lam;"
Job16:20 Abahlobo bam bayanditshata, kodwa iliso lam liyaphalala kuThixo."
Job16:21 Hayi, ukuba umntu angamlamlela umntu kuThixo, njengokuba ethetha kummelwane wakhe!"
Job16:22 Emva kweminyaka embalwa, ndiya kuhamba ngendlela endingayi kubuya ndibuyele kuyo."
Job17:1 Umphefumlo wam wonakele, imihla yam iphelile, Ndilungiselelwe amangcwaba."
Job17:2 Andinazo na iziqhulo? Iliso lam aliphumli ekuhlekeni kwabo?
Job17:3 Hamba, ulale, uwuthabathe umnqophiso wam nawe; ngubani ozondibetha?"
Job17:4 Ngokuba intliziyo yabo uyifihlele ukuqiqa; ke ngoko, musani ukubaphakamisa."
Job17:5 Oncoma izihlobo zakhe uphela amehlo abantwana bakhe.
Job17:6 Undenze intlekisa ebantwini; kwaye ngaphambi kokuba ndibe njengegubu.
Job17:7 Laza lanorhatyazo iliso lam kukukhathazeka; Amalungu am anjengesithunzi onke ephela.
Job17:8 Omangaliswa yiloo nto amalungisa, abamsulwa basukele phezulu kwabahanahanisi."
Job17:9 Kanjalo, ilungisa liya kuyigcina indlela yalo, yaye onezandla ezihlambulukileyo uya komelela ngakumbi."
Job17:10 Ke nina nonke, buyani, nize; ngokuba andifumananga silumko phakathi kwenu."
Job17:11 Iphelile imihla yam, icikizekile amacebo am, neengcinga zentliziyo yam."
Job17:12 Bajika ubusuku bube yimini, isikhanyiso esifutshane ngobumnyama."
Job17:13 Ukuba ndithe ndathemba, ndithembe elabafileyo, likhaya lam; Ndondlula ibhedi yam kwamnyama."
Job17:14 Ndathi kwintshabalalo, Ungubawo; kumpethu: Ungumama wam nodade wethu."
Job17:15 Liphi na ke ngoku ithemba lam? Ithemba lam, ngubani na owolibona?"
Job17:16 Ziya kuhla ziye emivalweni yelabafileyo, Siphumle kunye eluthulini."
Job18:1 Waphendula uBhiledadi wakwaMoses, wathi,"
Job18:2 Kuya kuthatha ixesha elingakanani ukuba uyeke ukuthetha? Phawula, kwaye emva koko siya kuthetha."
Job18:3 Kutheni kusithiwa sigqalwa njengeenkomo yaye sigqalwa njengabadelekileyo emehlweni akho?
Job18:4 Ukhala ngomsindo wakhe, esithi, Liya kushiywa na ilizwe ngenxa yakho? Linokususwa na iliwa endaweni yalo?"
Job18:5 Nokukhanya kongendawo kuya kucinywa, Lingabi mhlophe ilangatye lomlilo wakhe."
Job18:6 Ukukhanya kuya kwenziwa mnyama ententeni yakhe, nesibane sakhe sicinywe kunye naye."
Job18:7 Amanyathelo akhe omelele, necebo lakhe liya kumwisa."
Job18:8 Kuba iinyawo zakhe zifakwe esibatheni, wahamba ke esibatheni."
Job18:9 Inxila liya kumbamba ngesithende, yaye isela liya kumeyisa."
Job18:10 Ubanjiselwe isirhintyelo emhlabeni, Nomgibe endleleni yakhe."
Job18:11 Unkwantyo luya kumothusa macala onke luze lumqhubele ezinyaweni zakhe.
Job18:12 Amandla akhe aya kufa yindlala, Intshabalalo isondele kuye."
Job18:13 Iya kudla ukuqina kolusu lwakhe; owamazibulo ukufa uya kuwadla amandla akhe.
Job18:14 Ithemba lakhe liya kuncothulwa ententeni yakhe, Limzise kukumkani wokukhwankqisa."
Job18:15 Uya kuhlala ententeni yakhe, kuba ingeyakhe; Indlu yakhe iya kutshizwa isulfure."
Job18:16 Ngaphantsi ziya koma iingcambu zawo, linqunyulwe isebe lawo phezulu."
Job18:17 Inkumbulo yakhe iya kudaka ehlabathini, angabi nagama ezitratweni."
Job18:18 Uya kugxothwa ekukhanyeni, aye ebumnyameni, agxothwe ehlabathini."
Job18:19 Akayi kuba nanyana nanzala ebantwini bakowabo, namasalela eminqubeni yakhe."
Job18:20 Baya kumangaliswa yimini yakhe abaya kulandela emva kwakhe, njengokuba babesoyika abamandulela."
Job18:21 Inene, zizakhiwo zabangendawo, Indawo yabangamaziyo uThixo."
Job19:1 Waphendula uYobhi, wathi:"
Job19:2 Kunini na nisenza isingqala kumphefumlo wam, Nindingcikiva ngamazwi?"
Job19:3 Ezi zihlandlo zilishumi nindanga kabuhlungu;
Job19:4 Ukuba okunene ndonile, ityala lam lihleli phezu kwam."
Job19:5 Ukuba okunene nithanda ukuziphakamisa nxamnye nam nokuthetha ngendelelo yam nxamnye nam;
Job19:6 Yazini ke ngoku, ukuba uThixo undijikile, Wandirhawula ngomnatha wakhe;"
Job19:7 Yabona, ndiyakhala, ndikhala, ndingaviwa; Ndiyakhala kakhulu, kodwa akukho sigwebo."
Job19:8 Uyivingcile indlela yam, akwabakho ukugqitha; Ezingqushwini zam wabeka ubumnyama."
Job19:9 Yalususa uzuko lwam, yathabatha isithsaba entlokweni yam;"
Job19:10 Wandidiliza ngeenxa zonke, ndemka, Walisusa ithemba lam njengomthi."
Job19:11 Wabuya wabuya umsindo wakhe, wandinyusa, Wandigqala njengesinye seentshaba zakhe."
Job19:12 Imikhosi yakhe ibingumkhosi wakhe, yaza yalwa nam, Yayirhawula intente yam;"
Job19:13 Ubasusile abazalwana bam kude kum, Abandaziyo bagxothiwe kum."
Job19:14 Intsapho yakowethu iwile, yaye abahlobo bam abadumileyo bandishiyile."
Job19:15 Abahlala endlwini yam, nabakhonzazana bam, bathi ndingowasemzini; Ndingumphambukeli emehlweni abo."
Job19:16 Ndibize umkhonzi wam, akandiphendula; Ndamncamisa emlonyeni."
Job19:17 Umoya wam ucocekile ngenxa yomkam;
Job19:18 Ewe, nabancinci badlale ngam; Ndaphakama bathetha ngam."
Job19:19 Bonke abahlobo bam bandithiyile, Nabandithandayo bandijikele."
Job19:20 Ithambo lam libotshelelwe eluswini lwam nasenyameni yam; Ndisinde ngolusu lwamazinyo am.
Job19:21 Tarhuni, bazalwana bam! ngokuba isandla sikaThixo siphezu kwam."
Job19:22 Kutheni le nto ninditshutshisa njengoThixo, ninganeli yinyama yam?"
Job19:23 Owu, ngaba amazwi am abhaliwe ngoku! ukuba nje bezinokushicilelwa encwadini!"
Job19:24 Sibhalwe eweni, ngesikhonkwane sentsimbi nelothe ngonaphakade;"
Job19:25 Ngokuba ndiyazi mna ukuba uhleli umsindisi wam, Uya kusuka eme phezu komhlaba ekupheleni kwemihla."
Job19:26 Nangona iimpethu ziwudlavula lo mzimba, kodwa enyameni yam ndiya kumbona uThixo."
Job19:27 Ndiya kumbona ke, namehlo am aya kumbona, akukho wumbi; nokuba umphefumlo wam ubutshatyalalisiwe kum."
Job19:28 Kodwa niya kuthi, ‘Kutheni simtshutshisa nje, ekubeni ingcambu yalo mbandela ifunyenwe kum?"
Job19:29 Loyikani ikrele, ngokuba ingqumbo iza ngomgwebo womkhonto, Ukuze nazi ukuba kukho umgwebo."
Job20:1 Waphendula uTsofare waseNahama, wathi,"
Job20:2 Ngako oko iingcingangcinga zam ziyandiphendula, Kungenxa yoko le nto ndikhawulezayo."
Job20:3 Ndikuvile ukungcikiva kwam, wandiphendula umoya wengqondo yam."
Job20:4 Anazi na, ukuba kususela kudala umntu wamiswa ehlabathini?"
Job20:5 Kuba usindiso lwabangendawo lulufutshane, Ukuvuya kwabangendawo kokwephanyazo?"
Job20:6 Nangona ubukhulu bakhe bufikelela esibhakabhakeni, intloko yakhe iye emafini;"
Job20:7 Njengelindle lakhe uya kudaka kuphele; abambonayo bathi, Uphi na?"
Job20:8 Uya kuphaphazela njengephupha, angafunyanwa; ewe, uya kulahlelwa phandle njengobuso bobusuku."
Job20:9 Kwaneliso lambonayo aliyi kuphinda limbone; nesihlalo sakhe asiyi kuphinda simbone.
Job20:10 Abantwana bakhe baya kungxamela isisweli, Izandla zakhe zibuyise impahla yakhe."
Job20:11 Amathambo akhe ebezele bubugwenxa bobutsha; Bolaliswa phantsi naye eluthulini.
Job20:12 Nokuba ububi bunencasa emlonyeni wakhe, Wabufihla phantsi kolwimi lwakhe;"
Job20:13 Nokuba uthe wayibamba, akaphuma; zigcine nje emlonyeni wakhe."
Job20:14 Inyama yakhe ijikile nje emathunjini akhe, yinyongo yomsindo phakathi kwakhe."
Job20:15 Uginye ubutyebi, wabutshica; uThixo uya kuyikhupha esiswini sakhe."
Job20:16 Uya kwanya ubuthi bezizwe, ulwimi lwezizwe luya kumbulala."
Job20:17 Akayi kubona milambo, milambo, zihlambo zobusi, nezigudileyo."
Job20:18 Uya kukubuyisa oko akusebenzileyo, angaginyi; ngokomvuzo wakhe olungileyo, akayi kuwudla."
Job20:19 Ngenxa yokuba wabacinezela waza wabashiya abasweleyo; ngokuba wayithimba indlu abengayakhanga;
Job20:20 Okunene, akayi kuziva ezolile esiswini sakhe, akayi kwenza nto ngaphandle kokuthanda kwakhe."
Job20:21 Makungasali nto ekudleni kwakhe; ngoko ke, akukho bani uya kufuna okwakhe."
Job20:22 Ebudaleni bakhe uya kudideka;
Job20:23 Xa athe wahlutha isisu sakhe, uThixo wowuthululela phezu kwakhe ukuvutha komsindo wakhe, anise imvula phezu kwakhe, esidla."
Job20:24 Usabe isixhobo sentsimbi, umgqobhoze isaphetha sentsimbi."
Job20:25 Uyatsalwa, uphumele ngaphandle komzimba; ewe, ikrele elibengezelayo liphuma enyongweni yakhe; kufike ukuvuswa kuye."
Job20:26 Ubumnyama bonke buya kufihlwa emifihlekweni yabo; umlilo ongatshiyo uya kumtshisa; kuya kuba kubi kohlala ententeni yakhe.
Job20:27 Izulu liya kubutyhila ubugwenxa bakhe; kwaye ihlabathi liya kumvukela.
Job20:28 Ziya kumka iziqhamo zendlu yakhe, Buphalale ubuncwane bakhe ngemini yomsindo wakhe."
Job20:29 Siso eso isabelo somfo wakwaThixo, nelifa awalibelwe nguThixo."
Job21:1 Waphendula uYobhi, wathi,"
Job21:2 Liphulaphuleni ilizwi lam, libe yintuthuzelo yenu."
Job21:3 Ndivuse ndithethe; ndatsho emva koko ndiphoxisa.
Job21:4 Mna ke, ukukrokra kwam ebantwini? kwaye ukuba kwakunjalo, kutheni umphefumlo wam ungashukunyiswa?"
Job21:5 Khangela kum, umangalise, ubeke isandla emlonyeni."
Job21:6 Ndithi ndakuyicinga le nto, ndikhwankqiswe, Nenyama yam igubhe."
Job21:7 Yini na ukuba abangendawo badle ubomi, Babe badala, kananjalo bomelele?"
Job21:8 Abazukulwana babo bema nabo phambi kwamehlo abo, nabazukulwana babo phambi kwamehlo abo."
Job21:9 Izindlu zabo azinkwantyi, Nentonga kaThixo ayibafikeli."
Job21:10 Inkunzi yabo yenkomo iyazala, ingatshi; lithole lenkomo, alilishiyi ithole lalo."
Job21:11 Ziwazala njengomhlambi, oonyana bazo bayalila."
Job21:12 Bathabatha igubu elincinane nezembe, balivuyela isandi sesigodlo."
Job21:13 Bayayigqiba imihla yabo besisityebi, Behle ngephanyazo ukuya kwelabafileyo."
Job21:14 Ke ngoko, bathi kuThixo: Mka kuthi; kuba asikunanzile ukuzazi iindlela zakho."
Job21:15 Uyini na uSomandla, ukuba simkhonze? yaye siya kungenelwa ngantoni ukuba sithandaza kuye?"
Job21:16 Yabona, izinto zabo ezilungileyo azisesandleni sabo; Iqhinga labangendawo malibe lee kum."
Job21:17 Kukangaphi na ke ukuba isibane sabangendawo sicinywe! Kukangaphi na ukubahlela! uThixo uchithachitha usizi ngomsindo wakhe.
Job21:18 Bafana neendiza phambi komoya nanjengomququ ophetshethwa sisaqhwithi.
Job21:19 uThixo uyabunqanda ubugwenxa bakhe koonyana bakhe; Uphindezela, kwaye uya kwazi."
Job21:20 Amehlo akhe aya kukubona ukwaphuka kwabo, Babusele ubushushu boSomandla."
Job21:21 Ngokuba yabona ntoni na emva kwayo endlwini yayo, ukuba lichanelwe phakathi inani leenyanga zayo?"
Job21:22 Ngaba kukho nabani na oya kufundisa uThixo ukwazi? Ke yena ogweba abaphezulu.
Job21:23 Omnye ufa engenamandla, ophumle, ezolile."
Job21:24 Isifuba sakhe sizele ngamasi, Nomongo wawo utyebile."
Job21:25 Umntu ufa enentliziyo eyaphukileyo, engatyanga ncam."
Job21:26 Baya kulala eluthulini, iimpethu zibagubungele;"
Job21:27 Yabonani, ndiyazazi iingcinga zenu, nobungendawo benu;"
Job21:28 Ngokuba nithi, Iphi na indlu yokumkani? ziphi na izakhiwo ezingendawo?"
Job21:29 Anibuzanga na kwabo basendleleni na? aniyazi na imiqondiso yabo?
Job21:30 Ukuba abangendawo basindiselwe imini yentshabalalo? baya kukhutshelwa ngaphandle kude kube yimini yokuphuphuma komsindo.
Job21:31 Ngubani na owoxela indlela yakhe emehlweni akhe? ewe, ngubani na oya kuphindezela kuye?"
Job21:32 Kodwa uya kusiwa kwelabafileyo, ahlale kwelabafileyo."
Job21:33 Aya kuba mnandi kuye amaxolo omfula oqukuqelayo, bamlandele bonke, njengabaninzi abamkhaphayo."
Job21:34 Ningathini na ke ukundithuthuzela ngeento ezingento, libubuxoki nje iimpendulo zenu?"
Job22:1 Waphendula uElifazi wakwaTeman, wathi:"
Job22:2 Umntu unokumnceda na ke uThixo, njengokuba indoda elumkileyo inokuba luncedo kuye?"
Job22:3 Kuhle na kuSomandla, ukuba lilungisa? Kumlungele na ukuba uthe wazilungisa iindlela zakho?"
Job22:4 Wokukhalimela kabukhali na, ngokuba esoyika? Uya ematyaleni nawe na?"
Job22:5 Ububi bakho abubukhulu na? nobugwenxa benu obungenasiphelo?
Job22:6 Kuba uthathe isibambiso kumntakwenu ngaphandle kwentlawulo, wabahluba abo babehamba ze."
Job22:7 Ubungamsezi amanzi odiniweyo, Olambileyo ubumvimba isonka."
Job22:8 Ukuba ke uthe waba ligorha, ulelona ihlabathi; kwaye bekuhlala indoda elinene."
Job22:9 Ubagxotha abahlolokazi bodwa, Zaphuke izandla zeenkedama."
Job22:10 Ngenxa yoko, izibatha zifihlwe ngaphakathi, kwaye uloyiko lwentlekele luyothusa;"
Job22:11 Okanye ubumnyama obungenakububona; kwaye amanzi amaninzi awugubungela.
Job22:12 Akakho na uThixo emazulwini? Yekani ukuphakama kweenkwenkwezi!
Job22:13 Kwaye uthi: Wayazi njani uThixo loo nto? Unokugweba na, eselifini elimnyama?"
Job22:14 Amafu asisigqubuthelo sakhe, ukuba angaboni; kwaye uhamba kwisazinge sezulu."
Job22:15 Umendo wamandulo uyawugcina na, Bahanjwe ngabangendawo?"
Job22:16 owatshatyalaliswayo kwakudala, osiseko sagutyungelwa ngunogumbe;"
Job22:17 abathi kuThixo, Sishiye; Wothini na ke uSomandla kubo?"
Job22:18 Ke nina nizizalisile izindlu zabo ngezinto ezilungileyo; Ke yona iqhinga labangendawo likude lee kum.
Job22:19 Akubona oko amalungisa avuya, Abamsulwa bahlekisa ngawo,"
Job22:20 nangona ubutyebi bethu bungatshabalali, noko iintsalela zabo zitshiswe ngumlilo."
Job22:21 Khawuziqhelisele, ube noxolo;"
Job22:22 Wamkele umyalelo emlonyeni wakhe, Ugcine amazwi akhe entliziyweni yakho."
Job22:23 Ukuba uthe wabuyela kuSomandla, uya kwakhiwa; bususe ubungendawo ezintenteni zakho."
Job22:24 Yisuseni igolide ibe njengothuli, negolide yakwaOfire njengamatye equla."
Job22:25 Ewe, uSomandla uya kuba likhusi lakho, yaye uya kuba nentabalala yesilivere."
Job22:26 Ngokuba uya kuluphakamisela khona uvuyo lwakho kuSomandla, Nobuso bakho kuThixo."
Job22:27 Uthandaze kuye, wokuva, Azizalise izibhambathiso zakho."
Job22:28 Uze wenze isigqibo, sokulindela wena, Ukukhanya kukhanyisele umendo wakho."
Job22:29 Ekubhukuqweni kohlanga uthi, Luyasuka; abalulamileyo uya kubasindisa."
Job22:30 Uya kusisindisa isiqithi sabamsulwa, sisindiswe bubunyulu bezandla zakho."
Job23:1 Waphendula uYobhi, wathi:"
Job23:2 Namhlanje kukrakra ukukhala kwam;
Job23:3 Owu, bendisazi apho bendinokumfumana khona! ukuze ndingene esihlalweni sakhe!"
Job23:4 Bendiya kuxoxa ityala lam phambi kwakhe, Ndiwuzalise umlomo wam ngeziganeko."
Job23:5 Bendiya kukwazi abeya kundiphendula ngako, Ndiyiqonde into abeya kuyithetha kum."
Job23:6 Ingandoyisa na ngamandla ayo amakhulu? Hayi; kodwa ebeya kundibeka amandla.
Job23:7 Apho ilungisa liya kuxoxa naye; ndide ndikhululwe kumgwebi wam ngonaphakade.
Job23:8 Yabona, ndiya kuqala, angabikho; ngasemva, ndingamboni;"
Job23:9 ngasekhohlo, apho asebenza khona, ndingamboni; uzimela ngasekunene, ukuba ndingamboni."
Job23:10 Ke niyayazi indlela endihamba ngayo; ukuba uthe wandilinga, ndophuma njengegolide."
Job23:11 Unyawo lwam lubambe emanyathelweni akhe, Ndayigcina indlela yakhe, andathi gu bucala."
Job23:12 Andisuki emyalelweni womlomo wakhe; Ndawathatha amazwi omlomo wakhe ngaphezu kokutya kwam.
Job23:13 Ke yena umphefumlo mnye, ngubani na ongambuyisayo? yaye uya kwenza into oyinqwenelayo umphefumlo wakhe."
Job23:14 Ngokuba uyakwenza endikumiseleyo; kanjalo zikho kuye izinto ezininzi ezinje.
Job23:15 Ndikhwankqisiwe ebusweni bakhe; xa ndicingayo ndiyamoyika.
Job23:16 Kuba uThixo uyayithoba intliziyo yam, yaye undenza buhlungu uSomandla."
Job23:17 Ngokuba andinqunyulwanga sisithokothoko, nawe akwabugubungelanga ubumnyama ebusweni bam."
Job24:1 Yini na ukuba kungafihlwa kuSomandla, Abamaziyo bangayiboni imihla yakhe?"
Job24:2 Abanye bayayisusa imiqondiso; bathimba imfuyo, baluse ngamandla;"
Job24:3 Kugqogqa iesile lenkedama, Babambise ngenkomo yomhlolokazi."
Job24:4 Kugilwa amahlwempu endleleni; abazimela ndawonye abaziintsizana behlabathi.
Job24:5 Yabona, njengamaesile asendle entlango, Baphuma nomsebenzi wabo; vuka ngexesha lokuvuna, intlango ibanike ukudla kwabantwana;"
Job24:6 Elowo uvuna ingqolowa yakhe entsimini, ahlanganise isivuno sabangendawo."
Job24:7 Bahamba ze ebusuku, bengenangubo, Ukuze bangazisitheli engqeleni."
Job24:8 Bamanziswe sisiphango seentaba, yaye bawola iliwa ngenxa yokungabi nakhusi."
Job24:9 Kuhluthwa iinkedama esifubeni, Bambisane nabasweleyo."
Job24:10 Bamshiya eze, bezé, bathimba into eninzi yabantu ababelambile;"
Job24:11 Abenza ioli ezindongeni zabo, Baxovula ezixovulelweni zabo, banxanwe."
Job24:12 Abantu bayancwina phakathi komzi, imiphefumlo yabangxwelerhiweyo yenza isijwili;"
Job24:13 Ngabo abo bagwilika ekukhanyeni; abazazi iindlela zakhe, abahambi ezindleleni zakhe."
Job24:14 Umbulali ovuka ekukhanyeni ubulala usizana nehlwempu, nasebusuku ulisela njengesela."
Job24:15 Iliso lomkrexezi lijonge ukuba lityhilwe, athi, Akukho liso liya kundibona, liya kubusithelisa ubuso bakhe."
Job24:16 Emini baziqhekeza izindlu zabo, abazakhele bona; abalwazi ukukhanya."
Job24:17 Ngokuba intsasa injengethunzi lokufa kubo; ekwazazini kwazo kukho izothuso zethunzi lokufa.
Job24:18 Unamendu njengamanzi; liqalekisiwe iqashiso labo emhlabeni; akayiboni indlela eya ezidiliyeni.
Job24:19 Imbalela nobushushu butshisa amanzi ekhephu, ngokunjalo nelabafileyo abonayo."
Job24:20 Isizalo siya kumlibala; umbungu uya kumdla kamnandi; akayi kukhunjulwa; nobungendawo buya kugawulwa njengomthi.
Job24:21 Uthethela oludlolo, akamphathi kakuhle umhlolokazi."
Job24:22 Utsala amagorha ngamandla akhe; uvuka, yaye akukho bani uqinisekileyo ukuba uya kuphila."
Job24:23 Kwanokuba unikwe ukusindiswa, apho axhomekeke khona; kanti amehlo akhe aphezu kweendlela zabo."
Job24:24 Baphakanyiselwa phezulu, bemka, bethotywa; bathatyathwe endleleni njengabaseleyo, banqunyulwa njengobuso bemithanjana."
Job24:25 Ukuba kanti akunjalo, ngubani na owondenza ixoki, libe lilize ukuthetha kwam?"
Job25:1 Waphendula uBhiledadi wakwaMoses, wathi,"
Job25:2 Ubukumkani nokunkwantya kukuye; Wenza uxolo emimangweni yakhe;
Job25:3 Ngaba kukho inani lemikhosi yakhe? Ngubani na ke ongamphakamisiyo?
Job25:4 Ukuba kunjalo, angathini na umntu ukugwetyelwa nguThixo? Angathini na ukuba ngohlambulukileyo yena ozelwe ngumfazi?"
Job25:5 Khangela inyanga, ingakhanyi; ewe, iinkwenkwezi azihlambulukile emehlweni akhe."
Job25:6 Ngaba umntu yimpethu na? Ke yena unyana womntu, ngubani na umpethu?"
Job26:1 Waphendula uYobhi, wathi,"
Job26:2 Umncede njani obuthathaka? umsindisa njani umntu oswele amandla?
Job26:3 Umcebise njani umntu ongenabulumko? kwaye utheni lo mbandela njengoko unjalo?
Job26:4 Uwathethe kubani la mazwi? Kuphume umoya kabani na kuni?
Job26:5 Kwadaleka izinto ezifileyo phantsi kwamanzi, nabemi bawo;"
Job26:6 Umzimba uzé phambi kwakhe, Imbubhiso ayinangubo."
Job26:7 Ulaneka izulu langasentla enyanyeni, Axhome ihlabathi phezu kokungeni."
Job26:8 Ubutha amanzi emafini akhe; ilifu alahlukanga phantsi kwabo.
Job26:9 Uphethe ubuso betrone yakhe, waneka ilifu lakhe phezu kwayo."
Job26:10 Wawajikeleza amanzi ngemida, kwada kwahlwa, kwada kwahlwa;"
Job26:11 Iintsika zezulu ziyanyikima, Zingakhulumi kukukhalima kwakhe."
Job26:12 Ngamandla akhe ulwahlula ulwandle, Ngengqondo yakhe uloyisa abanekratshi."
Job26:13 Wenza amazulu ngomoya wakhe; isandla sakhe sayila inyoka ejijekileyo.
Job26:14 Yabona, ngamancam eendlela zakhe lawo; kodwa ngubani na onokuyiqonda indudumo yamandla akhe?"
Job27:1 uYobhi waqhubeka eqhubeka nomzekeliso wakhe, esithi:"
Job27:2 NgoThixo ophilileyo, ulisusile ityala lam; noSomandla uwudandathekise umphefumlo wam;"
Job27:3 Umoya wam uhleli kum, nomoya kaThixo usemathatheni am;"
Job27:4 Umlomo wam awuthethi bugqwetha, Nolwimi lwam aluthethi nkohliso."
Job27:5 Ngamana uThixo anganenzeli ilungisa; Ndide ndife, andiyi kukususa kum ukonakala kwam."
Job27:6 Ndinamathele ebulungiseni bam, andibuyi; Intliziyo yam ayizundisinda ndisadla ubomi."
Job27:7 Makungabikho utshaba lwam lunjengongendawo, nalowo undivukelayo abe njengongalungisiyo."
Job27:8 Kuba liyintoni na ithemba lentshembenxa, ukuba ithe yazuza, xa athe wawunqumla, uThixo wawurhola umphefumlo wayo?"
Job27:9 Wokuva na uThixo ukuhlahlamba kwakhe, xa efikelwa yimbandezelo?"
Job27:10 Uya kumkholisa na uSomandla? Uya kuhlala unqula uThixo na?
Job27:11 Ndiya kuniyala ngesandla sikaThixo, Andiyi kukukhanyela oku kuSomandla."
Job27:12 Yabonani, nizibonile ngokwenu nonke; kutheni ungenanto?"
Job27:13 Siso eso isabelo sabangendawo, esiphuma kuThixo, nelifa labacinezeli, abaya kusizuza kuSomandla."
Job27:14 Kuba bathe banda oonyana bakhe, ngenxa yentshuntshe, Oonyana bakhe abahluthi sisonka."
Job27:15 Amathambo akhe aya kungcwatywa kukufa, Abahlolokazi bakhe bangenzi sijwili."
Job27:16 Nakuba efumba isilivere njengothuli, Wayilungisa iingubo njengodongwe;"
Job27:17 Unokuyilungisa, kodwa amalungisa aya kuyinxiba, kwaye abamsulwa baya kwabelana ngayo ngesilivere."
Job27:18 Uyakha indlu yakhe njengenundu nanjengephempe elenziwa ngumlindi.
Job27:19 Isityebi siya kulala, singaphindi; Uvula amehlo akhe, akakho."
Job27:20 Ufikelwa kukunkwantya njengamanzi, Uqhwithela luyamqweqwedisa ebusuku."
Job27:21 Ulophu lwasempumalanga luyamthabatha, ahambe, aluqweqwedise endaweni yakhe."
Job27:22 Ngokokuba uThixo uya kumlahla, akayi kumconga; angathanda ukubaleka esandleni sakhe."
Job27:23 Amadoda aya kuqhwaba izandla, abethe umlozi ukuba emke endaweni yakhe."
Job28:1 Kukho nendawo yegolide, ehluzwayo."
Job28:2 Kutsalwa isinyithi emhlabeni, kunyibilika ubhedu etyeni."
Job28:3 Ulophelisa ubumnyama, Ucikida yonke inzaliseko: Amatye obumnyama nethunzi lokufa."
Job28:4 Umlambo uyaphuma kubemi; kwanamanzi aseleyo ezinyaweni atsha, abashiya abantu."
Job28:5 Umhlaba wona ubonakala isonka, yaye ngaphantsi kwawo kutsha njengomlilo."
Job28:6 Amatye aso yindawo yesafire, yaye luthuli lwegolide."
Job28:7 Kukho indlela engaziwayo intaka, Aliboni liso lokhozi;"
Job28:8 Amathole engonyama akazange ayinyathele, nengonyama enoburhalarhume ayizange idlule kuyo."
Job28:9 Isandla sakhe usolulele eweni; Uloncothula iintaba.
Job28:10 Waphula imilambo phakathi kweengxondorha; yaye iliso lakhe libona zonke izinto ezibalulekileyo.
Job28:11 Uyivingca imilambo, ingaphumi; into efihlakeleyo uyayityhila elukhanyeni."
Job28:12 Kodwa buya kufunyanwa phi ubulumko? kwaye kude kangakanani ukuqonda?
Job28:13 Umntu akalazi ixabiso layo; yaye akufumaneki kwelabantu baphilayo.
Job28:14 Amanzi anzongonzongo athi, Asinto yam, nolwandle luthi, Asinto yam."
Job28:15 Awunakuthengwa ngegolide, nesilivere ayinakulinganiswa ngexabiso lawo."
Job28:16 Ayinakulingana negolide yakwaOfire, Nebherilo yebherilo nesafire;"
Job28:17 Igolide nekristale aziyi kulingana, kwaye ukutshintshiselana kwabo akuyi kuba ngamatye egolide ecocekileyo."
Job28:18 Akunakuthethwa ngekorale neeperile, kuba ixabiso lobulumko lixabiseke ngaphezu kweeperile."
Job28:19 Itopazi yakwaKushi ayinakulinganiswa nabo; ayinakulinganiswa nayo negolide engcwengiweyo.
Job28:20 Buvela phi ubulumko? kwaye kude kangakanani ukuqonda?
Job28:21 Ngokuba abubonakali emehlweni abaphilileyo bonke, bube bufihlakele ezintakeni zezulu."
Job28:22 Intshabalalo nokufa kuthi, Silivile ilizwi lakho ngeendlebe zethu."
Job28:23 NguThixo oyiqondayo indlela yabo, Nguye oyaziyo indawo yabo."
Job28:24 Kuba ubheka esiphelweni sehlabathi, ubona phantsi kwezulu lonke;"
Job28:25 ukwenza ubunzima bemiphefumlo; yena ulinganisa amanzi ngomlinganiselo.
Job28:26 Ekuwiseni kwakhe umthetho ngayo imvula, nendlela yokuphuma kwemibane yendudumo."
Job28:27 Wabona, wavakalisa; yilungise, ewe, yiphendle."
Job28:28 Wathi kwindoda leyo, Yabona, ukoyika uYehova bubulumko; Ke ukutyeka ebubini kuyingqondo."
Job29:1 uYobhi waqhubeka eqhubeka nomzekeliso wakhe, esithi:"
Job29:2 Hayi, bendinjengokwenyanga zamandulo, njengakwimihla yokundisindisa kukaThixo;"
Job29:3 Xa ndakhanyisa isibane sakhe phezu kwentloko yam, Ekucaluleni kwam ebumnyameni ngokukhanya kwakhe;"
Job29:4 Njengoko bendinjalo ngemihla yam yobutsha, Oko imfihlakalo kaThixo ibiphezu kwentente yam;"
Job29:5 Engasenam uSomandla, Bendirhawula oonyana bam;"
Job29:6 Oko bendizihlamba iinyawo zam ngamasi, Iliwa lazithululela imilambo yeoli kum;"
Job29:7 Xa bendiphuma ngesango kuwo umzi, ndasilungisa isihlalo sam endaweni yembutho;"
Job29:8 Bandibona abafana, bazimela, asuka ema amadoda amakhulu."
Job29:9 Izikhulu azivumanga ukuthetha, zabeka izandla emlonyeni;"
Job29:10 Iingangamsha zithe cwaka, ulwimi lwazo lunamathele enkalakahleni yazo;"
Job29:11 Xa indlebe indiva, iyandisikelela; Landibona iliso, langqina kum;"
Job29:12 Kuba ndandihlangula ihlwempu elililayo, iinkedama nabangenanto yakuzinceda."
Job29:13 Yafika intsikelelo yotshabalalayo kum, ndayivuyisa intliziyo yomhlolokazi."
Job29:14 Ubulungisa bendibambatha, bundambathe; ugwebo lwam lwaba njengengubo nengubo."
Job29:15 Bendingamehlo eemfama, neenyawo zeziqhwala;"
Job29:16 Ndandinguyise wamahlwempu, ndahlola into endingayaziyo."
Job29:17 Bendiwaphula amabamba ongendawo, Bendilikrazula ixhoba emazinyweni akhe."
Job29:18 Ndathi ke, Ndiya kufela endlwaneni yam, Ndiyandise imihla yam njengentlabathi."
Job29:19 Ingcambu yam iphumela emanzini, Umbethe ulala emasebeni am ubusuku bonke."
Job29:20 Uzuko lwam luyahlaziyeka kum, sihlaziyekile isaphetha sam esandleni sam."
Job29:21 Abantu bandiphulaphula, balinda, bathi cwaka."
Job29:22 Emva kwelizwi lam abaphinda bathethe; yabawela ukuthetha kwam.
Job29:23 Kwaye babendilindile njengelindele imvula; bavula umlomo wabo xa bevula imvula yasentwasahlobo.
Job29:24 Ukuba bendibahleka, bebengayi kukholwa; nokukhanya kobuso bam akubacimi."
Job29:25 Ndabanyula indlela yabo Ndababeka njengomphathi, Ndihleli njengokumkani emkhosini, Njengothuthuzela abo bazilileyo."
Job30:1 Kungoku bayandigculela abancinane kunam, Abayise ndabagatyayo ukuba bahlale nezinja zomhlambi wam."
Job30:2 Ewe, ubugorha bezandla zabo bondinceda, ngubani na otshabaleleyo?"
Job30:3 Baba bodwa ngenxa yobuhlwempu nendlala; sabela entlango kwimihla yakudala, amanxuwa namanxuwa;"
Job30:4 abakhetha imifuno etyholweni neengcambu zejunipha ukuze babe kukudla kwabo.
Job30:5 Bagxothwa ebantwini;
Job30:6 ukuba bahlale emaweni eentili, emiqolombeni yomhlaba nasemaweni."
Job30:7 Amatyholo ayagqabhuka; Babutha phantsi kwerhawu.
Job30:8 Bengabantwana abaziziyatha, bengabantwana bamatshijolo; babengaphantsi kwehlabathi."
Job30:9 Kwaye ngoku yingoma yabo, ewe, yintetho yabo."
Job30:10 Bandithiyile, bayandibaleka, Abanditshicele ebusweni."
Job30:11 Ekubeni wayicombululayo intambo yam, wanditshutshisa, bawukhupha nomkhala kuqala."
Job30:12 Umfana umi ngasekunene kwam; Basusela kude ezinyaweni zam, Bandijikela iindlela zabo zokwaphula."
Job30:13 Bayonakalisa indlela yam, bandizisela ububi, bengenamncedi."
Job30:14 Zandifikela njengomlambo; Zandirhawula entlango.
Job30:15 Zindifikele iimbandezelo, zasukela umphefumlo wam njengomoya; Yadlula njengelifu intuthuzelo yam."
Job30:16 Kwaye ngoku, umoya wam uthululelwe phezu kwam; Ndifikelwe ziintsuku zembandezelo."
Job30:17 Amathambo am ahlatywa phakathi kwam ebusuku, Izihlunu zam aziphumli."
Job30:18 Ngenxa yobukhulu bokuqina kwesigulo sam, isambatho sam siguquke, sandithandela njengomqala wengubo yam."
Job30:19 Wandiphosa eludakeni, ndanjengothuli nothuthu."
Job30:20 Ndikhala kuwe, ungandiva; Ndimi, ningandiboni;"
Job30:21 Uzenza isijorha kum; Undichasile ngesandla esithe nkqi.
Job30:22 Undiphakamisela phezulu esibhakabhakeni; Undiyeke ndiyikhwele ndalahla izinto zam.
Job30:23 Kuba ndiyazi ukuba uya kundikhokelela ekufeni, nasendlwini yokumiselwa kwabaphilileyo bonke."
Job30:24 Kodwa isandla sakhe akasayi kusolulela kwelabafileyo, kwanokuba babiza ukuwa kwakhe."
Job30:25 Andimlilelanga na lowo ubandezelekileyo? Ubungenalusizi na umphefumlo wam ngenxa yehlwempu?
Job30:26 Kuba ndathemba okulungileyo, ndehlelwa bububi; ndathi ndisalinde ukukhanya, kwafika ubumnyama."
Job30:27 Isisu sam siyabila, asiphumli; Yandifikela imihla yeentsizi."
Job30:28 Ndalila ngaphandle kwelanga; Ndaphakama ndabiza intlanganiso.
Job30:29 Ngumzalwana weempungutye, Nomlingane weenciniba."
Job30:30 Ulusu lwam lumnyama, amathambo am agqabhuka bubushushu."
Job30:31 Kananjalo izembe lam laba sisikhalo, nelungu lam lobudoda laba lilizwi labazilileyo."
Job31:1 Ndenze umnqophiso namehlo am; khona ndicingela intombi?
Job31:2 Kuba siyini na indawo kaThixo evela phezulu? Liyintoni na ilifa loSomandla elivela phezulu?
Job31:3 Ayikontshabalalo na kwabangendawo? Sibetho esimangalisayo na kwabenzi bobubi?
Job31:4 Akaziboni na yena iindlela zam, Awabale onke amabanga am?"
Job31:5 Ukuba ndihambe ndafumana ndafumana, Lwakhawuleza ukuchukumisa unyawo lwam;"
Job31:6 Makandilinganise esikalini, akwazi uThixo ubulungisa bam."
Job31:7 Ukuba ukunyathela kwam kuyatyeka emendweni, Intliziyo yam ilandela amehlo am, Nebala linamathele ezandleni zam;"
Job31:8 Makhe ndihlwayele, kudle omnye; Ewe, mayinqunyulwe imbewu yam."
Job31:9 Ukuba ibihendekile intliziyo yam ngenxa yomfazi, Ndabheka emnyango wommelwane wam;"
Job31:10 Umkam makadle ngelinye ixesha, kuqubude phambi kwakhe;"
Job31:11 Ngokuba bububi obubi; ewe, akulunganga ukohlwaywa ngabagwebi."
Job31:12 Kuba loo nto ngumlilo ovuthayo use entshabalalweni yaye uya kuyitshabalalisa yonke imveliso yam.
Job31:13 Ukuba ndithe ndalandula ilungelo lomkhonzi wam nelomkhonzazana wam, ekubeni babambene nam;"
Job31:14 Ndithini na xa evuka uThixo? Ukuba uthe wavela, ndophendula ndithini na?"
Job31:15 Lowo wandenzayo esizalweni, akamenzanga na? yaye akakho na umntu osidale ngokomfanekiso kanina?"
Job31:16 Ukuba bendibanqanda abasweleyo kwiminqweno yabo, okanye ndiwagxothe amehlo omhlolokazi;"
Job31:17 Bendisidle ndedwa iqhekeza lam, ayasidla nenkedama;"
Job31:18 Ngokuba ndamkhulisa kwasebuncinaneni bam, njengoyise, ndamkhupha esizalweni sikama;"
Job31:19 Ukuba ndithe ndambona otshabalalayo, engenanto yengubo, nehlwempu lingenanto yokwambatha;"
Job31:20 Ukuba abengandisikeleli amanqe akhe, Akazifudumeza ngoboya bempahla yam emfutshane;"
Job31:21 Ukuba ndithe ndasiphakamisela isandla sam kwinkedama, Andiluboni uncedo lwam esangweni."
Job31:22 Masiwele ngoku isandla sam egxalabeni lam, nengalo yam mayiphuke ethanjeni."
Job31:23 Ngokuba ukutshitsha kukaThixo bekundinkwantyisa, Ndingenako ukukuthwala ngenxa yobukhulu bakhe."
Job31:24 Ukuba bendenze igolide inqolonci yam, Ndathi kwigolide ecikizekileyo, Ndikholose;"
Job31:25 Ukuba bendikuvuyela ukuba buninzi kobutyebi bam, nokuba buninzi kwesandla sam;"
Job31:26 Ndakubona ilanga liphuma, nenyanga ihamba kakuhle;"
Job31:27 Yavakala entsithelweni intliziyo yam, Wasanga umlomo wam isandla sam."
Job31:28 Kwaye kwaba bubugwenxa obufanele ukohlwaywa ngumgwebi, ngenxa yokuba ndibe ndikhanyela uThixo ophakamileyo."
Job31:29 Ukuba bendikuvuyela ukutshabalala kondithiyileyo, Ndaziphakamisa xa efikelwe bububi;"
Job31:30 Ke andiwuvumelanga umlomo wam ukuba one, ndiwunqwenelele intshwabulo umphefumlo wakhe;"
Job31:31 Akwaba bebengatshongo abantu bentente yam, ukuthi, Akwaba besinayo inyama yakhe! asiyi kwaneliswa."
Job31:32 Undwendwe lwalungahlali esitratweni, kodwa iingcango zam ndandizivulela elundwendwe."
Job31:33 Ukuba bendizigqubuthele njengoAdam izono zam, Bendibubeke ubugwenxa bam esifubeni sam;"
Job31:34 Ngaba bendisoyika isihlwele esikhulu, okanye ngaba indelo yaloo ntsapho yandoyikisayo, kangangokuba ndathi cwaka ndingaphumi emnyango?"
Job31:35 Owu, umntu uya kundiva! Yabona, umnqweno wam kukuba uSomandla andiphendule, Abandichasayo babhale incwadi."
Job31:36 Ndayithwala ngesixhanti, ndasithwala njengesithsaba sam."
Job31:37 Inani lamabanga am bendiya kwazisa yena; njengenkosana bendiya kuye.
Job31:38 Ukuba ilizwe lakowethu lithe lakhala ngam, nokukhala kwalo;"
Job31:39 Ukuba ndithe ndadla iziqhamo zawo ngaphandle kwemali, bafa abaniniwo;"
Job31:40 Makuhlume imithana enameva esikhundleni sengqolowa, Kuhlume ukhula esikhundleni serhasi. Amazwi kaYobhi agqityiwe."
Job32:1 Ayeka loo madoda omathathu ukumphendula uYobhi, kuba ubezibona elilungisa emehlweni akhe."
Job32:2 Wavutha umsindo kaElihu, unyana kaBharageli, umphathi wesizwe sakwaRam; Wavutha umsindo wakhe kuYobhi, ngokuba wayezigqala elilungisa kunoThixo."
Job32:3 Wavutha umsindo wakhe kubahlobo bakhe abathathu, ngenxa enokuba bengafumananga kumphendula, besuka bamgxeka uYobhi."
Job32:4 uElihu walinda wada wathetha uYobhi, kuba babebadala kunaye."
Job32:5 Wabona uElihu, ukuba akukho mpendulo emlonyeni waloo madoda mathathu, wavutha umsindo wakhe."
Job32:6 Waphendula uElihu, unyana kaBharageli, kaBhushe, wathi, Ndimncinane mna, ke nina nibadala kunene; ngoko ndandisoyika yaye ndandingenaso isibindi sokuvakalisa iimvakalelo zam."
Job32:7 Ndathi, Kukho imihla yokuthetha, Neminyaka emininzi iya kufundisa ubulumko."
Job32:8 Noko umoya usemntwini, Nokuphefumla kukaSomandla kuqondisa."
Job32:9 Amadoda amakhulu akasoloko elumkile, namadoda amakhulu akakuqondi okusesikweni."
Job32:10 Ngoko ke ndathi, Phulaphulani kum; Nam ndiya kunikela uluvo lwam."
Job32:11 Yabona, bendiwalindele amazwi akho; Ndimamele izizathu zenu, nijonge ukuba nithini na."
Job32:12 Ndanigqala ke indlebe; Yabonani, akukho namnye kuni umohlwayileyo uYobhi, Wawaphendula amazwi akhe."
Job32:13 Musani ukuthi, Sibufumene ubulumko;"
Job32:14 Akabhekisanga kum amazwi akhe, nam andiyi kumphendula ngamazwi enu."
Job32:15 Bathi nqa, ababi saphendula; bayeka ukuthetha."
Job32:16 Ndathi ndakulinda (kuba bengathethi, bema, àbaphinda baphendule);"
Job32:17 Ndathi, Nam ndiya kuphendula okwam, Ndixele uluvo lwam."
Job32:18 Kuba ndizele luthuli, umoya phakathi kwam uyandishukumisa."
Job32:19 Yabona, isisu sam sinjengewayini engenamoya; seyiza kugqabhuka njengamaqebengwana."
Job32:20 Ndiya kuthetha, ukuze ndiphumle; Ndiya kuwuvula umlomo wam, ndiphendule."
Job32:21 Andiyi kuzibonakalalisa ngokwam, ndingabizi amagama angcolileyo."
Job32:22 Ngokuba andikwazi ukubabiza ngamagama ancomekayo; ngoko ke umdali wam wayesele eza kundithatha.
Job33:1 Ngako oko, Yobhi, wabekele indlebe amazwi am;"
Job33:2 Yabona, ndiyawuvula umlomo wam, Luyathetha ulwimi lwam emlonyeni wam."
Job33:3 Amazwi am ophuma entliziyweni yam, Nomlomo wam uxela ukwazi kakuhle."
Job33:4 uMoya kaThixo wandenza, Nokuphefumla kukaSomandla kwandiphilisa."
Job33:5 Ukuba unako, ndiphendule, yalungise intetho yakho phambi kwam, ume."
Job33:6 Uyabona, ndingokwakho ngokwentando yakho; Nam ndenziwe ngodongwe."
Job33:7 Yabonani, isilumkiso sam asiyi kukunkwantyisa, nesandla sam asiyi kunicinezela."
Job33:8 Ewe, uthethe ezindlebeni zam, ndasiva isandi samazwi akho, ndathi:"
Job33:9 Ndinyulu, andinasono, ndimsulwa; akukho bubi kum."
Job33:10 Yabona, ufuna ikamva lam, undibethe ngotshaba lwakhe;"
Job33:11 Uzifaka iinyawo zam esitokisini, Uzigculela zonke iindlela zam."
Job33:12 Yabona, awulungisile ndawo; ndoniphendula, ndithi, uThixo yena mkhulu kunomntu."
Job33:13 Yini na ukuba ubambane naye? ngenxa yokuba engayiphenduliyo imicimbi yakhe.
Job33:14 Kuba uThixo uthetha kube kanye, Nangezimbini, kodwa umntu akaboni."
Job33:15 Ephupheni, embonweni wasebusuku, xa abantu besindwa bubuthongo obukhulu, abalali ezingqengqelweni;"
Job33:16 Wandula ke avule iindlebe zabantu aze awuqinise umyalelo wabo,"
Job33:17 ukuze amshenxise umntu kwinjongo yakhe, afihle ikratshi lomntu."
Job33:18 Ugcina umphefumlo wakhe emngxunyeni, Nobomi bakhe bungatshabalali likrele."
Job33:19 Ubethwa yintlungu esililini sakhe, nenkxwaleko enkulu yamathambo akhe;"
Job33:20 Ubomi bakhe bukwale ukudla, Nomphefumlo wakhe wale ukudla okulungileyo."
Job33:21 Itshiswe inyama yakhe, ingabonwa; zaphuma iinyawo zakhe ezingabonakaliyo."
Job33:22 Ewe, umphefumlo wakhe usondele kwelabafileyo nobomi bakhe kwabatshabalalisayo."
Job33:23 Ukuba ke kuthe kwakho isithunywa sezulu kunye naye, umkhumshi ubemnye ewakeni, ukuze abonise umntu inyaniso yakhe;"
Job33:24 Emva koko waba nosizi kuye waza wathi: “Mhlangule angehli aye emhadini: Ndiyifumene intlawulelo.
Job33:25 Iyahlaziyeka inyama yakhe kuneyomntwana; uya kubuyela emihleni yobutsha bakhe;
Job33:26 Wothandaza kuThixo, umkholise; ububone ubuso bakhe evuya, ngokuba embuyisela emntwini ubulungisa bakhe."
Job33:27 Wondela ebantwini, athi omnye kubo, Ndonile, ndakugwenxa okuthe tye, akwandinceda nto;"
Job33:28 Uya kuwukhulula umphefumlo wakhe ekuyeni kwelabafileyo, Nobomi bakhe bokubona ukukhanya."
Job33:29 Uyabona ke, zonke ezi zinto ubuye asebenze umntu;"
Job33:30 ukuba abuyisele umphefumlo wakhe kwelabafileyo, Ukhanye ngokukhanya kobomi."
Job33:31 Ndibekele indlebe, Yobhi, ndiphulaphule; Yithini cwaka, ndithethe."
Job33:32 Ke ukuba unokuthetha, ndiphendule; Thetha, ngokuba ndithanda ukukugwebela."
Job33:33 Ukuba akunjalo, phulaphula kum; Yithi cwaka, ndikufundise ubulumko."
Job34:1 uElihu waphendula wathi:
Job34:2 Yivani, nina zilumko, ukuthetha kwam; ndiphulaphuleni, nina bazi."
Job34:3 Ngokuba indlebe iyakucikida ukuthetha, Ikhuhlangubo liyakuva ukudla."
Job34:4 Masizigqibe ngokwethu, sazi okulungileyo omnye komnye."
Job34:5 Ngokuba wathi uYobhi, Ndililungisa, kodwa uThixo ubususile ubulungisa bam."
Job34:6 Ndiyaxoka na, ityala lam? Inxeba lam alinakuphiliswa, akukho lukreqo."
Job34:7 Uphi na umfo onjengoYobhi, ugculela njengamanzi aselayo?"
Job34:8 abahamba nabenzi bokungendawo, abahamba namadoda angendawo."
Job34:9 Kuba wathi, Akancedi lutho umntu, ngokuba ekholiswa nguye uThixo."
Job34:10 Ngako oko, nina madoda okuqonda, ndiphulaphuleni; Kukude kuThixo ukuba wenze ububi; nokukaSomandla ukwenza ububi."
Job34:11 Uya kumbuyekeza ngokwezenzo zakhe, Elowo nalowo ngokwendlela yakhe."
Job34:12 Ewe, uThixo akenzi bubi, uSomandla akayi kukujikisa okusesikweni."
Job34:13 Ngubani na omnike ubukhosi phezu kwehlabathi? Ngubani na ke yena ophethe ihlabathi lonke?
Job34:14 Ukuba ubhekise intliziyo yakhe emntwini, ukuba uhlanganisa umphefumlo wakhe nempefumlo yakhe kuye;"
Job34:15 Yonke inyama iya kutshabalala kunye, nomntu uya kubuyela eluthulini."
Job34:16 Ke, ukuba nithe nakuqonda, liveni oku, liveni ilizwi lamazwi am."
Job34:17 Umthiyile wokusesikweni uya kulawula na? Ke yena uya kuligweba na olilungisa?
Job34:18 Kufanelekile na ukuthi kukumkani, Ungendawo? nakubathetheli, Ningendawo na?"
Job34:19 Kwenzeka njani na kulowo ungabumkeliyo ubuso beenkosana aze angazithabathi izityebi phezu kwamahlwempu? ngokuba bonke bangumsebenzi wezandla zakhe.
Job34:20 Baya kufa ngoko nangoko, phakathi kobusuku boyike, badlule, namagorha angabanjwa ngesandla."
Job34:21 Ngokuba amehlo akhe ondele iindlela zomntu, Uyazibona zonke iindlela zakhe."
Job34:22 Akukho bumnyama, akukho thunzi lakufa, ukuba basithele kulo abenzi bobubi."
Job34:23 Ngokuba akaxoki ngaphezu kobulungisa bomntu; ukuba eze ematyaleni noThixo.
Job34:24 Uya kuzityumza ezingenakubalwa amadoda anamandla, azimise endaweni yawo."
Job34:25 Ke ngoko uyazazi izenzo zabo, kwaye uyabaguqula nasebusuku, ukuze babe nokutshabalala."
Job34:26 Uya kubohlwaya ngokwabangendawo emehlweni abantu;
Job34:27 Ngenxa enokuba batyekile kuye, abaziqiqa zonke iindlela zakhe;"
Job34:28 Ngoko bakuvumele kuye ukukhala kosweleyo, Akuve ukukhala kotyumkileyo."
Job34:29 Ukuba uthe cwaka, ngubani na owohlisa ishwangusha? Ukuba uyabusithelisa ubuso bakhe, ngubani na ongambonayo? isenokuba ngumcimbi kawonke wonke, nokuba imalunga nomntu omnye;"
Job34:30 Ukuze angalawuli umntu oyintshembenxa, Ukuba angabanjwa."
Job34:31 Kufanelekile ukuthi kuThixo, Ndiguqukile, andisayi kuphinda ndone."
Job34:32 Endingakuboniyo, nguwe ondifundisayo; Ukuba ndenze ububi, andiyi kuphinda?"
Job34:33 Makube sekuqondeni kwakho na? nguye oya kukuhlawula, nokuba uyala, nokuba uthanda; hayi mna: thetha into oyaziyo."
Job34:34 Mazithethe kum izilumko, Nezilumko zindive."
Job34:35 uYobhi wathetha engenakwazi, namazwi akhe akanabulumko."
Job34:36 Akwaba makacikidwe uYobhi kude kuse ekupheleni, Ngenxa yokuphendula kwakhe kwabangendawo;"
Job34:37 Ngokuba siphikise isono sakhe, uqhwaba izandla phakathi kwethu, maninzi amazwi akhe ngoThixo."
Job35:1 Wathetha uElihu, wathi:"
Job35:2 Ngaba ndinyanisile na xa usithi: ‘Ubulungisa bam bukhulu kunobukaThixo?
Job35:3 Ngokuba wathi, Wozuza ntoni na? Nondinceda ngantoni na, ukuba ndithe ndahlanjululwa esonweni sam?"
Job35:4 Ndiya kukuphendula mna, wena nabalingane bakho abanawe."
Job35:5 Khangela phezulu ezulwini, ubone; ubone amafu aphezu kwakho;"
Job35:6 Ukuba uthe wona, unatyala lini na kuye? okanye ukuba izikreqo zakho zanda, uya kuthini na ngaye?"
Job35:7 Ukuba uthe walungisa, umnika ntoni na? Wamkela ntoni na esandleni sakho?"
Job35:8 Onjengawe buyamonakalisa ububi bakho; nobulungisa bakho bumnceda unyana womntu.
Job35:9 Ngenxa yeembandezelo ezininzi bathi abacinezelweyo; Bakhala esandleni sowomeleleyo.
Job35:10 Kodwa akukho bani uthi: “Uphi na uThixo, uMdali wam, Lowo ucula ebusuku?"
Job35:11 Ngubani na osifundisa okulungileyo ngaphezu kweenkomo zehlabathi, Osenze silumke ngaphezu kweentaka zezulu?"
Job35:12 Babiza khona, akwabakho usabelayo, Ngenxa yekratshi labangendawo."
Job35:13 Ngokwenene, uThixo akeva nto, noSomandla akayi kunikela ingqalelo kuyo."
Job35:14 Nokuba nithe aniyi kumbona, isigwebo siphambi kwakhe; ke ngoko, ukholose kuYe."
Job35:15 Kodwa ngoku, ngenxa yokuba bekungenjalo, ubethe ngomsindo wakhe; nangona kunjalo, akazi kakhulu."
Job35:16 Ke ngoko, uYobhi uwuvula ilize umlomo wakhe; udla ngokusebenzisa amagama angazinto."
Job36:1 uElihu wongeza wathi:
Job36:2 Khaninyamezele okwethutyana, ndokubonisa ukuba andiyi kuthetha ngokukaThixo."
Job36:3 Ndiya kukuphakamisela entweni ekude ukwazi kwam, Ndigwebe kuMenzi wam."
Job36:4 Okunene, akayi kuxoka amazwi am;"
Job36:5 Yabona, uThixo unamandla, akamcekisi umntu; Womelele ngokomelela nangobulumko."
Job36:6 Akawucongi umphefumlo wabangendawo; uyabagwebela abalulamileyo.
Job36:7 Akawabhekiseli amehlo akhe kumalungisa, uhleli nookumkani etroneni yakhe; ewe, uzimise ngonaphakade, ziphakame."
Job36:8 Babekhonkxiwe ngemixokelelwane, ngeentsontelo zembandezelo;"
Job36:9 Emva koko ubabonisa izenzo zabo nezikreqo zabo abazenzileyo.
Job36:10 Uzityhilela uqeqesho iindlebe zabo, Ukuba babuye ebubini."
Job36:11 Ukuba bathe beva, bamkhonza, boyigqiba imihla yabo ekulungeni, neminyaka yabo benoyolo."
Job36:12 Kodwa ukuba abevanga, bobhubha likrele, bafe bengenakwazi."
Job36:13 Ke abantliziyo iziintshembenxa bazeka kade umsindo; abalili xa ebakhonkxa.
Job36:14 Bafa besebancinane, umphefumlo wabo ube phakathi koyinqambi."
Job36:15 Uyamhlangula oxhwalekileyo ekubandezelekeni kwakhe, uzityhile iindlebe zabo ekubandezelekeni kwabo."
Job36:16 Naye ebeya kunisusa ezimbandezelweni, anise endaweni ebanzi, engenaxhala; nokubekwa etafileni yakho kuya kuzala ngamanqatha."
Job36:17 Ke wena ugweba abangendawo; Umgwebo nobulungisa kukubambela.
Job36:18 Ukuba ke ingqumbo ikhona, zikhangeleleni ngokwenu, hleze ithabatheke ngemivumbo yakhe; ke yona intlawulelo enkulu ayiyi kukuhlangula."
Job36:19 Uya kuhoya na ubutyebi bakho? hayi, igolide, nkqu noSomandla."
Job36:20 Akubunqwenelanga ubusuku bokunqunyulwa kwabantu ezindaweni zabo.
Job36:21 Zilumkele, ungabhekisi ububi; ngokuba unyule bona endaweni yokubandezeleka."
Job36:22 Yabona, uThixo uphezulu ngamandla akhe;"
Job36:23 Ngubani na omphathise indlela yakhe? Ngubani na ongathi, Wenze ububi?"
Job36:24 Khumbula ukuba ukhuthaza umsebenzi wakhe obonwa ngabantu.
Job36:25 Wonke umntu uyayibona; umntu uyabona kude.
Job36:26 Yabona, uThixo mkhulu, kodwa asimazi; Nenani leminyaka yakhe alinakubalwa."
Job36:27 Ngokuba ethambisa amathontsi amanzi; Zinise ngomphunga wazo;
Job36:28 owehlisa amafu, azalise umntu;"
Job36:29 Ngubani na okuqondayo ukuqengqeleka kwamafu, nesandi somnquba wakhe?"
Job36:30 Yabona, waneka phezu kwakhe ukukhanya kwakhe, Azigubungele ngeenzulu zolwandle."
Job36:31 Kuba ngezo nto ugweba abantu; unika inyama eninzi.
Job36:32 Ugubungela ngamafu ukukhanya; wathi kungabikho kukhanya kwelo lifu ligqobhozayo.
Job36:33 Isandi sayo siyayixela, Nokutshayela, nomphunga."
Job37:1 Intliziyo yam iyagubha ngenxa yoko, Iyishiyile indawo yayo."
Job37:2 Liveni ngenyameko isandi selizwi lakhe, nesandi esiphuma emlonyeni wakhe."
Job37:3 Ukuthumela phantsi kwezulu lonke, Nombane walo uye eziphelweni zehlabathi."
Job37:4 Latsho laduma ilizwi; ududuma ngezwi lobungangamsha bakhe; Akayi kuwavala, xa livakalayo izwi lakhe."
Job37:5 uThixo ududuma ngezwi lakhe ngokumangalisayo; izinto ezinkulu azenzayo thina asinakuziqonda.
Job37:6 Kuba uthi kwikhephu, Yiba sehlabathini; kuyafana nangeemvula ezinkulu, neemvula zamandla akhe."
Job37:7 Uyomeleza isandla sabantu bonke; ukuze bonke abantu bawazi umsebenzi wakhe.
Job37:8 Emva koko izilwanyana zingena emingxunyeni zize zihlale ezindaweni zazo.
Job37:9 Kukho umoya ovuthuzayo, ovela ezantsi, nasentla, ukubanda."
Job37:10 Ngokuphefumla kukaThixo kuza ingqele, Nobubanzi bamanzi ngoku."
Job37:11 Kananjalo uya lophelisa ilifu ngokusela amanzi; utwabulula ilifu lakhe elibengezelayo;
Job37:12 Kwaye iguqulwa ngokwentando yakhe, ukuze babe nako ukwenza yonke into abayalela yona, kulo lonke ihlabathi lehlabathi."
Job37:13 Uyakuvumela ukuba kufike, nokuba kuthethiwe, nokuba kungenxa yelizwe lakhe, nokuba kwenziwe inceba."
Job37:14 Yiva oku, Yobhi, uphakame, ugqale imisebenzi ebalulekileyo kaThixo."
Job37:15 Uyazi na ukuwabeka kukaThixo, Nokubengezelisa kwawo ilifu lakhe?"
Job37:16 Uyawazi na umlinganiso wamafu, nemisebenzi ebalulekileyo yoSokwazi?"
Job37:17 Zifudumala kangakanani na iimpahla zakho, xa ulalisa elimiweyo ngomoya wasezantsi;"
Job37:18 Wasasaza na phezu kwawo isibane esilukhuni, njengesipili esigalelwe phezu kwabo?"
Job37:19 Sifundise into esiya kuyithetha kuye; ngokuba singenako ukuzibamba iintetho ngenxa yobumnyama.
Job37:20 Kuya kuthiwa, ndiyathetha kuye? ukuba umntu uthe wathetha, wodliwa."
Job37:21 Ngoku abantu abakuboni ukukhanya okuqaqambileyo emafini, kodwa umoya uyadlula uze uwahlambulule."
Job37:22 Ubuhle buvela entla; kuThixo kukho ubukhulu obuwoyikekayo.
Job37:23 Ukuba sithe samchukumisa uSomandla, asiyi kumfumana; Akayi kuxinzelela phantsi."
Job37:24 Kungenxa yoko le nto abantu bemoyika;
Job38:1 uYehova wamphendula uYobhi esemoyeni, wathi,"
Job38:2 Ngubani na lo usitha icebo ngamazwi okungazi?
Job38:3 Ke ngoko, bhinqa amanqe akho njengendoda; ngokuba ndiya kunibuza, nindiphendule."
Job38:4 Ubuphi na wena ukulidala kwam ihlabathi? yithi, ukuba unengqiqo."
Job38:5 Ngubani na olinganise imilinganiso yalo, uyazi na? okanye ngubani obeke umda?"
Job38:6 Zimiswe entwenini na iziseko zalo? ngubani na owabeka ilitye lesiseko;
Job38:7 Xa amakhwezi evuma kunye, Yaye bonke oonyana bakaThixo banemihlali?"
Job38:8 Ngubani na owaluvalayo ulwandle ngeengcango Ekutyhobozeni kwalo, kwaphuma esizalweni?"
Job38:9 iEner ndiyenze ilifu libe yingubo yakhe, Ubumnyama bamenze ingubo yakhe;"
Job38:10 Nizidilizile iindawo zam emiselweyo, niyifakile imivalo neengcango;"
Job38:11 Wathi, Uya kufika apha, ungegqithi; Aya kupheliswa amaza enu akratshayo?"
Job38:12 Umise ingomso ngeemini zakho; kwathi ngesifingo wayityhila indawo yakhe;
Job38:13 Ukuze soyise iziphelo zehlabathi, Bavuthululwe kulo abangendawo?"
Job38:14 Lwaba njengodongwe lokutywina; kwaye zema njengengubo.
Job38:15 Abangendawo bavinjwa ukukhanya kwabo, Saphuke isandla esiphakamileyo."
Job38:16 Ngaba ungene emithonjeni yolwandle? Okanye usuke waya kufuna amanzi anzongonzongo na?
Job38:17 Ngaba uwavulelwe na amasango okufa? Wakha wawabona na amasango ethunzi lokufa?
Job38:18 Ububonile na ububanzi behlabathi? utsho ukuba wazi yonke into.
Job38:19 Iphi na indlela yokukhanya? ukuba bubumnyama, iphi na indawo yabo;"
Job38:20 Ukuba ubuse emdeni wayo, Uzazi neendlela eziya endlwini yayo?"
Job38:21 Ngaba uyakwazi oko, ngenxa yokuba wawuzelwe ngelo xesha? okanye kungenxa yokuba imihla yakho mininzi?"
Job38:22 Wakha wabuzuza na ubuncwane bekhephu? okanye bubone ubutyebi besichotho;
Job38:23 Ukuba ndiwuqwebele ixesha lembandezelo, imini yemfazwe nemfazwe?"
Job38:24 Kwahlula ntoni na ukukhanya, ukwaneka umoya wasempumalanga ehlabathini?"
Job38:25 oshenxisiwe unogumbe wamanzi endleleni, nombane wamafu nendlela;"
Job38:26 Imvula emhlabeni, kungekho mntu; enkqantosini, kungekho mntu;"
Job38:27 ukuze azalise ilizwe eliyinkangala, eliphanzileyo; nokuseza ihlumelo lengca?"
Job38:28 Ngaba kuyanetha nobawo? ngubani na owenza amathontsi ombethe?
Job38:29 Uphuma kubani umkhenkce? kunye nobuluhlaza obubandayo besibhakabhaka, ngubani owenze?"
Job38:30 Amanzi ayaqina njengelitye, Amanzi abe ngumkhenkce."
Job38:31 Unokuyibopha na ingoma yesiTyalo, Uzicombulule iimbophelelo zeOrion?"
Job38:32 Unokuzala na uMatsaroti ngexesha lakhe? Ungámalathisa na iArkturo noonyana bayo?
Job38:33 Uyayazi na imimiselo yezulu? Ngaba unokuthelekelela indlela aza kulilawula ngayo ihlabathi?
Job38:34 Unokuliphakamisela emafini na izwi lakho, ukuze amanzi amaninzi akugubungele?"
Job38:35 Unokuthumela na umbane, ahambe, athi kuwe, Singabathi aba?"
Job38:36 Ngubani na omise ubulumko? Ngubani na onike ukuqonda entliziyweni?
Job38:37 Ngubani na onokufunda iingqimba zamafu ngobulumko? Ngubani na onokuchitha izulu;
Job38:38 Xa luqina uthuli, Ukuhlanganisana kwamatye?"
Job38:39 Woyizingela na inyamakazi ingonyama? okanye wanelise inkanuko yabafazi;
Job38:40 Xa belala emingxunyeni yabo, behleli entsithelweni ukuba babukele?"
Job38:41 Ngubani na onika amagwababa ukudla? xa abantwana bakhe bakhala kuThixo, balahleka ngenxa yokuswela inyama."
Job39:1 Uyazi ukuba iibhokhwe zasematyeni zizala nini? okanye ungaphawula xa ixhama lizala?
Job39:2 Uyazibala na iinyanga ude uzigqibe? Uyalazi na ixesha labo lokuzalwa?
Job39:3 Zigobile, zazala amathole azo, Zabulahla umvandedwa wazo."
Job39:4 Abantwana babo banesimo esilungileyo, bakhule nengqolowa; bayaphuma, ababuyeli kubo."
Job39:5 Ngubani na olikhulule iesile lasendle? Ngubani na ozithukululeyo izintso ze-esile lasendle?
Job39:6 indlu yayo ndiyenze inxuwa, nelizwe libe yintlango, iziseko zalo;"
Job39:7 Uyayidela ingxokolo yomzi, Akayiva kukukhala komqhubi."
Job39:8 Intaba bubutyani bayo, ifuna yonke into eluhlaza."
Job39:9 Inyathi iyakuthanda ukukulungiselela, ihlale emkhumbini wakho?"
Job39:10 Unokuyibopha na inyathi ngomsele emhadini? okanye uya kundilandela iintili?
Job39:11 Unokukholosa na ngayo, ngokuba emakhulu amandla ayo? okanye uzowushiya kuye umsebenzi wakho?"
Job39:12 Wokholwa na kuyo, ukuba yoyizisa imbewu yakho endlwini, iyibuthele kuvimba wakho?"
Job39:13 Uzinike amaphiko amahle iipikoko? Amaphiko neentsiba zenciniba?
Job39:14 yona ishiya amaqanda ayo emhlabeni, iwafudumeza abe luthuli;"
Job39:15 Ulibale ukuba unyawo luya kumtyumza, Nento egxothiweyo."
Job39:16 Ubenze balukhuni abantwana bakhe, bengabakhe; imigudu yakhe ililize, akukho koyika;"
Job39:17 Ngokuba uThixo wenze yabulibala ubulumko, akabunika ukuqonda."
Job39:18 Indlela eliziphakamisa ngayo, liyalidela ihashe nomkhweli walo."
Job39:19 Linike ihashe amandla na? Owambethe intamo yakhe ngemibane?
Job39:20 Ngaba uya kuyingcangcazelisa njengenkumbi? Ukukhanya kweempumlo zayo kuyoyikeka.
Job39:21 Uhamba emfuleni, uvuye ngamandla; uya kukhawulela amadoda axhobileyo."
Job39:22 Liyakuhleka ukunkwantya, alinkwantyi; akawufulathela umkhonto."
Job39:23 Iyabhonga phezu kwakhe indudumo, Umkhonto obenyezelayo, nengweletshetshe."
Job39:24 Utshisa ihlabathi ngomsindo nangengqumbo, Akakholwa ukuba sisandi sesigodlo."
Job39:25 Xa iphakathi kwamaxilongo, ithi: “Ha! waliva mgama ivumba lemfazwe, nezwi labathetheli nelokumkani."
Job39:26 Unokuphaphazela ukhetshe ngobulumko bakho, Yolule amaphiko ayo ezantsi?"
Job39:27 Ngaba ixhalanga linyuka ngomyalelo wakho, Liyiphakamise indlu yalo phezulu?"
Job39:28 Udla ubomi, uhleli elulwalweni, Elulwalweni naselulwalweni;"
Job39:29 Lisuka apho likhangele ixhoba, namehlo alo akhangele emgama."
Job39:30 Kwaye abantwana bakhe abancinci bamunca igazi, kwaye apho bakhoyo ababuleweyo, kulapho bakhoyo."
Job40:1 Waphinda uYehova wamphendula uYobhi, wathi,"
Job40:2 Obambana noSomandla ngaba uya kumfundisa na? Omkhalimelayo uThixo makaphendule;
Job40:3 uYobhi wamphendula uYehova, wathi:"
Job40:4 Yabona, ndinetyala; Ndingathini ukukuphendula? Ndiya kubeka isandla sam emlonyeni wam."
Job40:5 Ndathetha ngasihlandlo sithile; kodwa andiyi kuphendula, ewe, kabini; kodwa andiyi kuhambela phambili."
Job40:6 uYehova wamphendula uYobhi esemoyeni, wathi:"
Job40:7 Ke ngoko, bhinqa amanqe akho njengendoda; ndiya kukubamba, ndikuxelele kum."
Job40:8 Ngaba nawe uya kusiphelisa isigwebo sam? Uza kundigweba na, ukuze wena ube lilungisa?"
Job40:9 Unaso na isandla esinjengesikaThixo? Uya kugquma na ngelizwi elinjengelakhe?
Job40:10 Khawuzihombise ngobuhle nobungangamela; Yambatha uzuko nobuhle.
Job40:11 Lahla ingqumbo yakho, ubheke kubo bonke abakhukhumeleyo, ulithobe."
Job40:12 Khangela bonke abantu abanekratshi, umthobe; banyhashe abangendawo esikhundleni sabo."
Job40:13 Bangcwabele ndawonye eluthulini; Ububophe ubuso babo emfihlekweni.
Job40:14 Ke kaloku, ndiya kukuxelela, Ukuba isandla sakho sokunene sinokukusindisa."
Job40:15 Khawubone ke iBhehemoti endayenza yanawe; udla utyani njengenkomo.
Job40:16 Khawubone, amandla ayo asemanqeni ayo, Nokuqina kwayo kusesangweni lesisu sayo."
Job40:17 Ishukuma umsila wayo njengomsedare; izihlunu zamathambo alo zihlanganisene ndawonye.
Job40:18 Iinyawo zayo zifana nobhedu; Amathambo ayo anjengemivalo yentsimbi.
Job40:19 Yintlahlela yeendlela zikaThixo: Lowo uyenzayo uya kufika ekreleni lakhe kuyo.
Job40:20 Ewe, iintaba ziyivelisela ukudla, apho adlala khona onke amarhamncwa elizwe."
Job40:21 Ulala phantsi kwemithi enomthunzi, phantsi kweengcongolo nengca."
Job40:22 Imithi ethunzi imgubungela ngomthunzi wayo; imingcunube yomlambo imjikelezile.
Job40:23 Yabona, uyawusela umlambo, akangxami; ngethemba lokuyikhupha iYordan emlonyeni wayo."
Job40:24 Uyibamba ngamehlo, Ugqobhoza impumlo yakhe kwizirhintyelo."
Job41:1 Unokuyikhupha na iLeviyatan ekuthinjweni? okanye uyaluthoba ulwimi lwakhe ngentambo?
Job41:2 Ngaba unokuyifaka isithuba empumlweni? Ugqobhoze umhlathi ngentonga?
Job41:3 Ngaba uya kutsala umdla ngakumbi kuwe? Angathetha amazwi alula na kuwe?
Job41:4 Ingenza umnqophiso na nawe? Woyithabatha ibe ngumkhonzi wakho na ngonaphakade?
Job41:5 Wodlala na nayo njengentaka? okanye ufuna ukumbophisa ezintombini zakho?
Job41:6 Angadliwa na amaqabane akhe? Angarhweba ngayo na phakathi kwabarhwebi?
Job41:7 Unokusizalisa na isikhumba sayo ngeentsimbi ezitsolo? Intloko yayo inemikhonto yeentlanzi?
Job41:8 Beka isandla sakho kuyo; khumbula ukulwa, ungaphindi ulwe."
Job41:9 Yabona, ithemba lakhe lingamampunge;"
Job41:10 Akukho sijorha esingaba nako ukusivusa; ngoku, ngubani na onokuma ngakum?"
Job41:11 Ngubani na ondithinteleyo ekumbuyekezeni? Konke okuphantsi kwamazulu onke yeyam.
Job41:12 Andiyi kuzifihla ngamalungu ayo, Nokuqina kwayo, nobuhle bayo."
Job41:13 Ngubani na onokuwutyhila umphambili wesambatho sakhe? Ngubani na ongamkhawulela enemikhala yomibini?
Job41:14 Iingcango ebusweni bayo, ngubani na onokuzivula? Amazinyo ayo ayoyikeka kuyo yonke indawo."
Job41:15 Iliqhayiya amaxolo ayo, evalwe ngetywina eliqinileyo."
Job41:16 Enye isondelelene kangangokuba nomoya awunakungena phakathi kwayo.
Job41:17 Bamanyene, benamathela omnye komnye, ukuze bangehlukani."
Job41:18 Ekuphiliseni kwakhe kukhanya ukukhanya, Namehlo akhe anjengeenkophe zesifingo."
Job41:19 Emlonyeni wayo kuphuma izikhuni ezitshangazayo, namalangatye omlilo."
Job41:20 Kuphuma umsi emathatheni ayo, ngathi kusembizeni okanye ngepani."
Job41:21 Umoya wayo uvuthisa amalahle, Kuphuma ilangatye emlonyeni."
Job41:22 Entanyeni yayo kuhleli amandla, Neentlungu zijika zibe luvuyo phambi kwayo."
Job41:23 Izintsu zenyama yayo zihlangene, ziqinile; azikwazi ukushukuma."
Job41:24 Iqine njengelitye intliziyo yayo; ewe, iqine njengelitye eliphantsi lekalikali."
Job41:25 Ekuphakameni kwayo, ziyankwantya iinjengele; bazihlambulule ngenxa yokreqo."
Job41:26 Ikrele lomlilo alinakulubamba: Umkhonto, notolo, nakrele."
Job41:27 Uthabatha isinyithi njengengca, Nobhedu njengomthi obolileyo;"
Job41:28 Utolo lwesaphetha aluyi kuyishiya, abe ngumququ amatye okusawula kuyo."
Job41:29 Iifayile kuthiwa ziindiza, Ihleka xa izanyazanyiswa umkhonto."
Job41:30 Ngaphantsi kwawo amatye abukhali; usasaza izinto ezibukhali eludakeni.
Job41:31 Iyibiliza njengembiza amanzi; Ulolwenza ulwandle lube yimbiza yokutshisa;
Job41:32 Wenza indlela yokukhanya ngasemva; umntu unokucinga ukuba ubunzulu buzuba.
Job41:33 Akukho namnye unjengaye ehlabathini, odalwe engenaloyiko."
Job41:34 Ibona konke okuphakamileyo, Ingukumkani kubo bonke oonyana abanekratshi."
Job42:1 uYobhi wamphendula uYehova, wathi,"
Job42:2 Ndiyazi ke ukuba ungenza nantoni na;
Job42:3 Ngubani na oyifihlayo icebo engenakwazi? ke ngoko, ndathi andizange ndiqonde; izinto ezindimangalisa kakhulu, ebendingazazi."
Job42:4 Yivani, ndithethe mna; ndiya kukubamba, ndikuxelele kum."
Job42:5 Ndive ngendlebe yakho, Kungoku iliso lam likubonile."
Job42:6 Kungenxa yoko le nto ndizithiyileyo, kwaye ndiyazohlwaya, ndiseluthulini naseluthuthwini."
Job42:7 Wawathetha uYehova la mazwi kuYobhi, wathi uYehova kuElifazi wakwaTeman, Umsindo wam uyavutha kuwe, nakubahlobo bakho bobabini, ngenxa enokuba anithethanga ngobulungisa ngam, njengoYobhi umkhonzi wam."
Job42:8 Ngoku ke zithabatheleni iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo zibe sixhenxe, neenkunzi zeegusha zibe sixhenxe, niye kumkhonzi wam uYobhi, nizenzele idini elinyukayo; uYobhi, umkhonzi wam, uya kunithandazela; kuba ndiya kukholiswa nguye, ukuze ndingenzi kuni ngobudenge benu, ekubeni aningobulungisa njengoko umkhonzi wam uYobhi watshoyo ngam."
Job42:9 Baya ke ooElifazi wakwaTeman, noBhiledadi wakwaShuwa, noTsofare waseNahama, benza njengoko uYehova wabawisela umthetho ngako; NoYehova wamamkela uYobhi."
Job42:10 uYehova wayitshintsha imeko kaYobhi xa wathandazela abahlobo bakhe; Waphinda uYehova wamnika uYobhi loo nto wayenayo.
Job42:11 Beza kuye bonke abazalwana bakhe, noodade bakhe bonke, nabo bonke abebazi, badla isonka endlwini yakhe; bamlilela, bemthuthuzela ngenxa yobubi bonke, abemhlisele bona uYehova;"
Job42:12 Ngoko uYehova wakusikelela ukuphela kukaYobhi ngaphezu kwesiqalo sakhe, ngenxa yokuba wayenezimvu ezilishumi elinesine lamawaka neenkamela ezingamawaka amathandathu namahashe angamawaka neenkomo namaesile aliwaka."
Job42:13 Waba noonyana abasixhenxe, neentombi ezintathu."
Job42:14 Eyokuqala wathi igama elinguYemima; igama lowesibini nguKetsiya; igama leyesithathu nguKeren-hapuke.
Job42:15 Ehlabathini lonke akuzange kubekho mfazi wayemhle njengeentombi zikaYobhi, yaye uyise wazinika ilifa phakathi kwabantakwabo."
Job42:16 Emva koko uYobhi waphila iminyaka elikhulu elinamashumi amane, wabona oonyana bakhe noonyana bakhe, ukusa kwizizukulwana ezine."
Job42:17 Wafa ke uYobhi, emdala, ehambisekile ebudaleni."
Psalms1:1 Hayi, uyolo lomntu ongahambiyo ngecebo labangendawo, ongemiyo endleleni yaboni, ongahlaliyo etroneni yabagxeki."
Psalms1:2 Yena unonelela umyalelo kaYehova; kwaye ucamanga ngomyalelo wakhe imini nobusuku.
Psalms1:3 Unjengomthi omiliselwe phezu kwemijelo yamanzi, Onika isiqhamo sawo ngexesha lawo; igqabi lawo aliyi kubuna; yaye konke akwenzayo kophumelela."
Psalms1:4 Akanjalo ongendawo, unjengamalahle aphetshethwa ngumoya."
Psalms1:5 Ngoko ke, abangendawo abayi kuma ekugwetyweni, yaye ebandleni lamalungisa akukho boni."
Psalms1:6 Ngokuba uYehova uyayazi indlela yamalungisa, kodwa indlela yabangendawo iya kudaka."
Psalms2:1 Yini na ukuba iintlanga zenze ingxokozelo, abantu bacinge into engeyakonto?"
Psalms2:2 Ookumkani behlabathi bazilungiselele, nezikhulu zicebisana kunye uYehova nomthanjiswa wakhe;"
Psalms2:3 Masiyiqhawule imixokelelwane yabo, siwaphose kuthi amathambo abo."
Psalms2:4 Lowo uhleli emazulwini uya kuhleka; uYehova uya kubagculela.
