Psalms2:5 Uya kuthetha kubo ngomsindo wakhe, abathuthumbise ngokuphuphuma komsindo wakhe;"
Psalms2:6 Noko ke, mna ke ndimmisile ukumkani wam entabeni yam engcwele yaseZiyon."
Psalms2:7 Ndiya kuwuvakalisa umgwebo: uYehova uthe kum, UnguNyana wam wena; namhlanje ndikwazisile."
Psalms2:8 Cela kum, ndikunike iintlanga zibe lilifa lakho, neziphelo zehlabathi zibe bubutyebi bakho."
Psalms2:9 Zaphule ngentonga yentsimbi; uya kuziqhekeza njengembiza yombumbi.
Psalms2:10 Yibani ngobulumko, nina bokumkani;"
Psalms2:11 Mkhonzeni uYehova ninoloyiko, nigcobe ningcangcazela."
Psalms2:12 Mangeni uNyana, hleze aqumbe, atshabalale endleleni, Ukuba uvutha umsindo wakhe umzuzwana. Hayi, uyolo lwabo bonke abazimela ngaye!"
Psalms3:1 Ingoma kaDavide, ekubalekeni kwakhe kuAbhisalom, unyana wakhe; Baninzi abasukela phezulu kum."
Psalms3:2 Baninzi abathi kumphefumlo wam, Akunto yanto kuThixo; Sela."
Psalms3:3 Wena, Yehova, uyingweletshetshe yam; ubungangamsha bam nozuko lwentloko yam."
Psalms3:4 Ndidanduluka kuYehova ngezwi lam, Andiphendule entabeni yakhe engcwele. Sela."
Psalms3:5 Ndalala phantsi, ndalala ubuthongo; Ndivukile; ngokuba uYehova ebendixhasa."
Psalms3:6 Andiyi kuboyika amashumi amawaka abantu abahlanganisene kum.
Psalms3:7 Vuka, Yehova; Ndisindise, Thixo wam, ngokuba uzibetha zonke iintshaba zam emhlathini; Uyawaphula amazinyo abangendawo."
Psalms3:8 Usindiso lolukaYehova, intsikelelo yakho ibe phezu kwabantu bakho. Sela."
Psalms4:1 Kumvumi waseNeginoti, umhobe kaDavide. Ndibabale, uwuve umthandazo wam."
Psalms4:2 Nina, nyana babantu, kunini na uzuko lwam luhlazisa? Kunini na nithanda amampunge, nifuna umvuzo? Sela."
Psalms4:3 Yazini ke ukuba uYehova umthambisile ilungisa; uYehova uya kuva xa ndimbiza.
Psalms4:4 Yoyikani, ningoni; thethani neentliziyo zenu ezinkukweni zenu, nithi cwaka. Sela."
Psalms4:5 Zisani imibingelelo yobulungisa, nikholose ngoYehova."
Psalms4:6 Baninzi abathi, Ngubani na oya kusibonisa okulungileyo? Nkosi, phakamisa ukukhanya kobuso bakho."
Psalms4:7 Uyivuyise intliziyo yam ngaphezu kwexesha lokwanda kwengqolowa newayini yabo.
Psalms4:8 Ndiya kulala phantsi ndixolile, ndilale ubuthongo, kuba wena, Yehova, nguwe wedwa ondivumela ukuba ndihlale ngoxolo."
Psalms5:1 Kumvumi kaNehiloti, Ingoma kaDavide."
Psalms5:2 Live ilizwi lokuzibika kwam, Nkosi yam, Thixo wam, ngokuba ndithandaza kuwe."
Psalms5:3 Yehova, uya kuliva izwi lam kwakusasa; kusasa ndiya kuwubhekisa kuwe umthandazo wam, ndibheke phezulu."
Psalms5:4 Ngokuba wena akunguThixo onanze okungendawo; abuyi kuphambukela kuwe ububi.
Psalms5:5 Ayiyi kuba phambi kwamehlo akho izimathane; ubathiyile bonke abenza okubi.
Psalms5:6 Bapheliseni abathetha ububi; uYehova uya kulicekisa umntu ophalaza igazi nokhohlisayo.
Psalms5:7 Ke mna ndiya kungena endlwini yakho ngobukhulu benceba yakho, ndiqubude, ndikoyike etempileni yakho engcwele."
Psalms5:8 Yehova, ndikhaphe ngobulungisa bakho ngenxa yeentshaba zam; yenza indlela yakho phambi kobuso bam."
Psalms5:9 Ngokuba emlonyeni wabo akukho nto emlonyeni; ingaphakathi labo libi kakhulu; Lingcwaba elivulekileyo umqala wabo; badumisa ngolwimi lwabo.
Psalms5:10 Batshabalalise, Thixo; mabawe kwinjongo yabo; bagxothe ngobuninzi bobugwenxa babo; ngokuba bagwilikile kuwe."
Psalms5:11 Mabanoyolo bonke abakholose ngawe; Mabahlale bevuya, ngokuba ubakhusela; mabavuye ngawe abalithandayo igama lakho."
Psalms5:12 Ngokuba wena, Yehova, uyalisikelela ilungisa; Uya kumngqonga ngovuyo njengekhaka."
Psalms6:1 Yehova, musa ukundohlwaya unomsindo, musa ukundibetha ngomsindo;"
Psalms6:2 Ndibabale, Yehova; ngokuba ndibuthathaka. Nkosi, ndiphilise; ngokuba amathambo am aphukile."
Psalms6:3 Umphefumlo wam ukhwankqiswe kakhulu; Ke wena, Yehova, koda kube nini na?"
Psalms6:4 Buya, Yehova, uwusindise umphefumlo wam; ndisindise ngenxa yenceba yakho."
Psalms6:5 Ngokuba ekufeni akusayi kukhunjulwa; ngubani na oya kukudumisa kwelabafileyo?
Psalms6:6 Ndidiniwe kukuncwina kwam; ubusuku bonke ndondlala umandlalo wam; Ndimanzisa umandlalo wam ngeenyembezi zam.
Psalms6:7 Iliso lam liyalila kukukhathazeka; Úyaluphele ngenxa yeentshaba zam zonke.
Psalms6:8 Sukani kum, nina nonke benzi bobutshinga ngokuba uYehova ulivile ilizwi lokuzibika kwam."
Psalms6:9 uYehova wawuva umthandazo wam; uYehova uya kuwamkela umthandazo wam.
Psalms6:10 Ziya kudana, zibe noburhalarhume zonke iintshaba zam; wabuya nazo zaphakama ngoko nangoko iintloni."
Psalms7:1 (Ixilongo likaDavide, awavuma ngalo kuYehova ilizwi likaKushi umBhenjamin.) Yehova, Thixo wam, ndikholose ngawe; Ndisindise kubo bonke abandisukelayo, ndisindise,"
Psalms7:2 ukuze angawuqwengi njengengonyama umphefumlo wam, awuqwenge, kungabikho bani uwusindisayo."
Psalms7:3 Yehova, Thixo wam, ukuba ndikwenzile oku; ukuba kukho ububi ezandleni zam;"
Psalms7:4 Ukuba ndimbuyisele ububi obexolelene nam; Ewe, ndalusindisa utshaba lwam ngaphandle kwesizathu."
Psalms7:5 Maluwusukele utshaba umphefumlo wam, luwuthimbe; Makabunyashele phantsi ubomi bam, Abubeke eluthulini uzuko lwam. Sela."
Psalms7:6 Khawusuk’ ume, Yehova, unomsindo, uziphakamise ngenxa yomsindo weentshaba zam, uphakame ngenxa yam, wenze isigwebo osiyaleleyo."
Psalms7:7 Liya kukurhawula ibandla leentlanga; ke ngoko, guqukani ngenxa yabo."
Psalms7:8 uYehova uya kugweba iintlanga; ndigwebe, Yehova, ngokobulungisa bam, nangokokulunga okukum."
Psalms7:9 Mabuphele ububi babangendawo; kodwa uqinise amalungisa, ngokuba uThixo olilungisa uyazicikida iintliziyo nezintso."
Psalms7:10 Ingweletshetshe yam ikuThixo, Umsindisi wabantliziyo zithe tye."
Psalms7:11 uThixo ngumgwebi olilungisa, Uqumbele abangendawo yonke imini."
Psalms7:12 Ukuba ongendawo uthe akabuya, ulilolile ikrele lakhe; wamisa isaphetha sakhe wasifunda."
Psalms7:13 Wabuya walungisa izixhobo zokufa; Uluchanaba lutolo lwakhe kubacinezeli.
Psalms7:14 Yabona, uzelwe engendawo, wabamkela ububi, wazala ubuxoki;"
Psalms7:15 Wemba iqula, wemba, wawela emngxunyeni abewumbile."
Psalms7:16 Umsindo wakhe uya kubuyela entlokweni yakhe, nogonyamelo lwakhe lunge entanyeni yakhe."
Psalms7:17 Ndiya kubulela kuYehova ngenxa yobulungisa bakhe, Ndilidumise igama likaYehova oPhezukonke."
Psalms8:1 Kumvumi waseGiti, Ingoma kaDavide umise ubuqaqawuli bakho ngaphezu kwezulu."
Psalms8:2 Emlonyeni wabantwana nabanyayo unike amandla ngenxa yeentshaba zakho, Ukuze udambise utshaba nomphindezeli."
Psalms8:3 Ndalibona izulu lakho, umsebenzi weminwe yakho, inyanga neenkwenkwezi ozicebileyo;"
Psalms8:4 Uyintoni na umntu, ukuba uthe wamkhumbula? Unyana womntu, womvelela nini na?"
Psalms8:5 Ngokuba umhlise kancinane kunezithunywa zezulu, wamthwesa uzuko nembeko."
Psalms8:6 Ummisile ukuba alawule izenzo zezandla zakho; Zonke izinto uzibeke phantsi kweenyawo zakhe;
Psalms8:7 Yonke impahla emfutshane, neenkomo zonke, ewe, namarhamncwa asendle;"
Psalms8:8 Iintaka zezulu, neentlanzi zolwandle, nento yonke edlula ngeendlela zolwandle."
Psalms8:9 Yehova, Nkosi yethu, hayi indlela elizuke ngayo igama lakho ehlabathini lonke!"
Psalms9:1 Ndiya kubulela kuwe, Yehova, ngentliziyo yonke; Ndiya kuyazisa yonke imisebenzi yakho ebalulekileyo."
Psalms9:2 Ndiya kuvuya ndidlamke ngawe; Ndiya kulidumisa igama lakho, Wena usenyangweni."
Psalms9:3 Ekubuyeni kweentshaba zam, ziya kuwa zize zitshabalale phambi kobuso bakho."
Psalms9:4 Ngokuba ubulifezile ubulungisa bam, nebango lam; uhleli phezu kwetrone, ugweba ngobulungisa."
Psalms9:5 Uzikhalimele iintlanga, wabatshabalalisa abangendawo, uliphanzisile igama labo ngonaphakade kanaphakade."
Psalms9:6 Lutshabandini, amanxuwa aphele, udilize imizi engamanxuwa; Yatshabalala kunye nabo inkumbulo."
Psalms9:7 Ke yena uYehova uya kuma ngonaphakade, ilungiselwe ugwebo itrone yakhe."
Psalms9:8 Uya kuligweba ihlabathi ngobulungisa, Uya kugweba abantu ngobulungisa."
Psalms9:9 uYehova uya kuba yindawo yokusabela kotyunyuziweyo, ihlathi ngamaxesha eembandezelo."
Psalms9:10 Yaye abo balaziyo igama lakho baya kukholosa ngawe, ngenxa yokuba wena, Yehova, akubashiyanga abo bakufunayo."
Psalms9:11 Vumani kuYehova ohlala eZiyon; Xelani ezintlangeni izenzo zakhe.
Psalms9:12 Xa ecela igazi, uyacinga ngako; Akakulibalanga ukukhala kwabathobekileyo."
Psalms9:13 Ndibabale, Yehova; Kulumkele ukucinezeleka kwam ngenxa yabandithiyileyo, wena wondiphakamisayo emasangweni okufa."
Psalms9:14 Ukuze ndiyimeme yonke imibongo yakho Emasangweni entombi uZiyon; ndigcobe ngosindiso lwakho.
Psalms9:15 Iintlanga zatshona emhadini awawenzayo; mabazifihle, lubanjwe unyawo lwabo."
Psalms9:16 uYehova uyaziwa ngomgwebo wakhe; Ongendawo ubanjiswa zizenzo zezandla zakhe. I-Higgaion. Sela.
Psalms9:17 Baya kubuyela kwelabafileyo abangendawo, Kwaiintlanga zonke ezimlibalayo uThixo;"
Psalms9:18 Ngokuba aliyi kuhlala lilityalwa ihlwempu; Ithemba lehlwempu aliyi kutshabalala naphakade.
Psalms9:19 Vuka, Yehova; ubani makangathwali mthwalo; mazigwetywe iintlanga phambi kwamehlo akho."
Psalms9:20 Zoyike, Yehova, ukuze zazi iintlanga ukuba zingabantu. Sela."
Psalms10:1 Yehova, ngubani na olinde kude? Yini na ukuba nizifihle ngamaxesha engxingongo?"
Psalms10:2 Ngekratshi lakhe ongendawo uyatshutshisa amahlwempu; mababanjwe kumacebo abo.
Psalms10:3 Kuba ongendawo uyaqhayisa ngomnqweno wentliziyo yakhe yaye uyamsikelela onekhwele amthiyileyo uYehova.
Psalms10:4 Ongendawo akayi kubuza kuThixo, enekratshi lobuso bakhe; uThixo akakho kuzo zonke iingcinga zakhe."
Psalms10:5 Iindlela zakhe zihlala zilukhuni; Izigwebo zakho ziphezu kobuso bakhe; Uzivule zonke iintshaba zakhe.
Psalms10:6 Wathi entliziyweni yakhe, Andisayi kushukuma; ngokuba andiyi kubandezeleka naphakade."
Psalms10:7 Umlomo wakhe uzele sisiqalekiso nenkohliso nenkohliso; phantsi kolwimi lwakhe bububi nokuzingca.
Psalms10:8 Uhleli ezinqabeni zemizi; ubulala omsulwa entsithelweni; amehlo akhe ajonge kwihlwempu emfihlakalweni.
Psalms10:9 Ulalela njengengonyama emhadini wayo; ulalela ukuba abambise abaziintsizana; Uyalibambisa ihlwempu xa elirhuqela emgibeni walo.
Psalms10:10 Uyagoba, azithobe, liwile ihlwempu namandla alo."
Psalms10:11 Wathi entliziyweni yakhe, uThixo ulibele; Uyabusithelisa ubuso bakhe; soze ayibone."
Psalms10:12 Vuka, Yehova; Yehova, phakamisa isandla sakho; musani ukubalibala abathobekileyo."
Psalms10:13 Kutheni abangendawo bemdela uThixo? wathi entliziyweni yakhe: Akuyi kufuna.
Psalms10:14 Wabona; ngenxa enokuba ubona ububi nobubi ukuba ububuyisele ngesandla sakho; amahlwempu azinikela kuwe; ungumncedi wenkedama.
Psalms10:15 Usaphule isandla songendawo nongendawo; funani ububi bakhe, nide nibufumane."
Psalms10:16 uYehova yiNkosi ngonaphakade kanaphakade; zatshabalala iintlanga elizweni lakhe.
Psalms10:17 Umnqweno wabalulamileyo uwuvile, Nkosi; Uya kuzilungisa iintliziyo zabo, ive indlebe yakho,"
Psalms10:18 ukuba ugwebe iinkedama noxinzelelweyo, Angabi sabacinezela umntu wasehlabathini."
Psalms11:1 Umhobe kaDavide. Ndikholose ngoYehova; Ningathini na ukuthi kumphefumlo wam, Balekela entabeni yakho njengentaka?"
Psalms11:2 Ngokuba, yabonani, abangendawo batola isaphetha sabo, Bexunele iintolo zabo entanjeni, Ukuba bazingele abathe tye entsithelweni."
Psalms11:3 Xa iziseko zithe zagungxulwa, lingenza ntoni na ilungisa?"
Psalms11:4 uYehova usetempileni yakhe engcwele, itrone kaYehova isemazulwini;"
Psalms11:5 uYehova uyalilinga ilungisa, kodwa abangendawo nabathanda ugonyamelo bawuthiyile umoya wakhe."
Psalms11:6 Uya kuyinisa phezu kwabangendawo imigibe, nomlilo, nesulfure, nesaqhwithi esoyikekayo; ibe sisabelo sendebe yabo."
Psalms11:7 Ngokuba uYehova ulilungisa uthanda ubulungisa; Amalungisa ayabubona ubuso bawo.
Psalms12:1 Kukumkani wamaSemina, ingoma kaDavide ngokuba ilungisa lihambile; ngokuba abathembekileyo batshabalele phakathi koonyana babantu."
Psalms12:2 Bafumana bethetha elowo nowakhe; ngomlomo wenkohliso, nangeentliziyo ezimbini."
Psalms12:3 uYehova uya kuyinqumla yonke imilebe yomlomo wenkohliso, nolwimi olukhukhumeleyo."
Psalms12:4 Abathe, Siya koyisa ngolwimi lwethu; imilomo yethu yeyethu; ngubani na osilawulayo?"
Psalms12:5 Ngenxa yokubhuqwa kweentsizana, ngenxa yokuncwina kweentsizana, Ndiya kuma ngoku, utsho uYehova; Ndiza kumbeka endaweni ekhuselekileyo ukuze ambethe."
Psalms12:6 Amazwi kaYehova ngamazwi anyulu, Ayisilivere enyibilikisiweyo emhlabeni, Ehluzwe kasixhenxe."
Psalms12:7 Basindise, Yehova, basindise kwesi sizukulwana kuse kwixesha elingenammiselo."
Psalms12:8 Abangendawo babaleka ngeenxa zonke; Ke abalihlazo baya kuphakanyiswa.
Psalms13:1 KuYehova weengoma. Kunini na, Yehova, undilibele? rhoqo? Kunini na ubusithelisa ubuso bakho kum?"
Psalms13:2 Kunini na ndihleli ndicinga phezu komphefumlo wam, ngeengqaqambo zentliziyo yam? Koda kube nini na luziphakamisa utshaba lwam?"
Psalms13:3 Bona, undiphulaphule, Yehova, Thixo wam; Khanyisa amehlo am, ukuze ndingalali ubuthongo bokufa;"
Psalms13:4 Makungabikho utshaba lwam luthi, Ndimoyisile; Bavuya ke abandisukelayo, ekushukumeni kwam;"
Psalms13:5 Ke ndikholose ngenceba yakho; iya kuvuya intliziyo yam ngosindiso lwakho.
Psalms13:6 Ndiyathanda ukuculela uYehova, kuba undenze ndalunga."
Psalms14:1 Kumongameli, ingoma kaDavide. Bonakele, benza izinto ezimasikizi, akukho namnye wenza okulungileyo."
Psalms14:2 uYehova ukhangela koonyana babantu esemazulwini, ukuba ukho na oqiqayo, omquqelayo uThixo."
Psalms14:3 Bonke balahleka, benziwe inqambi bonke bephela; Akukho wenza okulungileyo, eyedwa."
Psalms14:4 Abanakwazi na bonke abenzi bokungendawo? abadla abantu bam njengoko badla isonka, bengambongozi uYehova."
Psalms14:5 Bafikelwa luloyiko olukhulu, ngokuba uThixo usesizukulwaneni samalungisa."
Psalms14:6 Icebo lehlwempu ulihlazile, Ngokuba uYehova ulihlathi lalo."
Psalms14:7 Ukuba beluphuma eZiyon usindiso lukaSirayeli! ekusibuyiseleni kukaYehova isabelo sabantu bakhe, uya kuvuya uYakobi, avuye noSirayeli."
Psalms15:1 (Indumiso kaDavide.) Yehova, ngubani na owohlala ententeni yakho? Ngubani na owohlala entabeni yakho engcwele?"
Psalms15:2 Ngulowo uhamba ngobulungisa nowenza okusesikweni nothetha inyaniso ngentliziyo yakhe.
Psalms15:3 Ongathethiyo ngolwimi lwakhe, akamenzi nto imbi ummelwane wakhe, akamngcikivi ummelwane wakhe."
Psalms15:4 Umntu odelekileyo kwawakhe amehlo; kodwa uyabahlonela abamoyikayo uYehova. Ofungayo uya kuzithoba, akaguquguquki."
Psalms15:5 Ongayisebenzisiyo imali yakhe ekufuneni inzuzo, makangamkeli intlawulo kwabamsulwa. Lowo uzenzayo ezi zinto akayi kushukunyiswa."
Psalms16:1 (iMiktame kaDavide.) Thixo, ndisindise, Ngokuba ndikholose ngawe."
Psalms16:2 Wathi ke umphefumlo wam kuYehova, UyiNkosi yam; Ukulunga kwam akwenzeki kuwe;"
Psalms16:3 Ke kwabo bangcwele ehlabathini, kwabakhulu, endikholisiweyo ngabo ezintweni zonke."
Psalms16:4 Iimbandezelo zabo ziya kufikelela kwabasukela uthixo wasemzini; Andiyi kuyizisa iminikelo yabo ethululwayo yegazi, namagama abo andiyi kuwathetha ngomlomo wam."
Psalms16:5 NguYehova isahlulo selifa lam, nendebe yam; uyaligcina ikamva lam."
Psalms16:6 Zibotshelelwe kum izintya zokulinganisa; ewe, ndinelifa elilungileyo."
Psalms16:7 Ndiya kumbonga uYehova ondenzele injongo; Zindifundise izintso zam ebusuku.
Psalms16:8 Ndimbeka phambi kwam uYehova ngamaxesha onke; Ngokuba ungasekunene kwam, andiyi kushukunyiswa."
Psalms16:9 Ke ngoko, intliziyo yam iyagcoba, nozuko lwam luyagcoba; nenyama yam iya kuphumla inethemba."
Psalms16:10 Ngokuba akuyi kuwushiya umphefumlo wam kwelabafileyo; kwaye akuyi kumyekela oyiNgcwele wakho ukuba abone ukubola.
Psalms16:11 Wondazisa indlela yobomi; phambi kobuso bakho kuzele yimincili; Ekunene kwakho yimihlali engunaphakade.
Psalms17:1 Yiva, Yehova, umgwebi, kubekele indlebe ukuhlahlamba kwam, uwubazele indlebe umthandazo wam ongaphumiyo emlonyeni wenkohliso."
Psalms17:2 Mawuphume ebusweni bakho isigwebo sam; Amehlo akho abone kwaoko.
Psalms17:3 Uyicikidile intliziyo yam; Wandivelela ebusuku; Undicikidile, akwafumana nto; Ndagqiba kwelokuba umlomo wam awuzukwaphuka."
Psalms17:4 Ke yona imisebenzi yabantu, ngelizwi lomlomo wakho, ndizithintele iindlela zomonakalisi."
Psalms17:5 Gcina iindlela zam ngeendlela zakho, Ukunyathela kwam makungatyibiliki."
Psalms17:6 Ndinqula wena, ngokuba undiva, Thixo; ndibekele indlebe, uliphulaphule izwi lam."
Psalms17:7 Zibalule iinceba zakho, wena ubakhululayo abazimela ngawe, ngesandla sakho sokunene, kwabasukela phezulu."
Psalms17:8 Ndigcine njengentshula yeliso, ndisibekele ngomthunzi wamaphiko akho;"
Psalms17:9 Ngenxa yabangendawo abandisukelayo, ngenxa yeentshaba zam ezindibulalayo."
Psalms17:10 Bagutyungelwe ngamanqatha abo; Ngomlomo wazo zithetha ngekratshi.
Psalms17:11 Zindijikelezile ngoku ekuhambeni kwethu; bawaphose phantsi amehlo abo;
Psalms17:12 Njengengonyama isukela ixhoba, nanjengengonyama ifuna ukuzimela;"
Psalms17:13 Khawusuk’ ume, Yehova, umcinezele, umwise; Wusindise umphefumlo wam kongendawo, olikrele lakho."
Psalms17:14 Kubantu besandla sakho, Yehova, beentlanga zelimiweyo, abanesabelo kobu bomi, abasisu sabo usizalise ngobuncwane bakho obufihliweyo; bondle abantwana babo, Bonke ubutyebi babo babushiyele abantwana babo."
Psalms17:15 Mna ndiya kububona ubuso bakho ndisebulungiseni; Ndiya kwanela ekuvukeni kwam, ndisebumeni bakho."
Psalms18:1 Kumvumi, Ingoma kaDavide, umkhonzi kaYehova, owawathethayo amazwi ale ngoma kuYehova, ekubahlanguleni kukaYehova esandleni seentshaba zakhe zonke, nasesandleni sikaSawule; Wathi, Ndiya kukuthanda, Yehova, mandla am."
Psalms18:2 uYehova liliwa lam, igwiba lam, umsindisi wam; Thixo wam, liwa lam endizimela ngaye; Ngweletshetshe yam, luphondo losindiso lwam, nenqaba yam ephakamileyo."
Psalms18:3 Ndinqula uYehova ongowokudunyiswa; ndiya kusinda ezintshabeni zam.
Psalms18:4 Izibetho zokufa zandirhawula, Nemilambo yabangendawo yandikhwankqisa."
Psalms18:5 Izibindi zelabafileyo zandibhijela, zaza izirhintyelo zokufa zandirhintyela."
Psalms18:6 Ndanqula uYehova ngentliziyo yam, Ndanqula uThixo wam; Waliva etempileni yakhe izwi lam, Ukuzibika kwam kwafika kuye ezindlebeni zakhe."
Psalms18:7 Lanyikima ihlabathi, lanyikima; Iziseko zeentaba zashukuma, Zahexa, ngokuba Enomsindo."
Psalms18:8 Kwenyuka umsi emathatheni akhe, kwatsha umlilo emlonyeni wakhe; amalahle abaswe yiyo."
Psalms18:9 Wabuya walithoba izulu, wehla, Yangamafu amnyama phantsi kweenyawo zakhe."
Psalms18:10 Wakhwela ekerubhini, wabhabha; ewe, waphaphazela ngamaphiko omoya."
Psalms18:11 Wenze ubumnyama baba lisithe lakhe; Intente eyayimgqume ngaphakathi yayingamanzi amnyama namafu angqingqwa esibhakabhakeni.
Psalms18:12 Ngokukhanya okuphambi kwakhe, adlula amafu akhe, Isichotho namalahle omlilo."
Psalms18:13 Wadudumisa esibhakabhakeni uYehova, walivakalisa uMthetheleli-lizwi ilizwi lakhe; isichotho namadangatye."
Psalms18:14 Wathuma iintolo zakhe, wabaphangalalisa; wabaphosa imibane, wabadubaduba."
Psalms18:15 Kwabonakala imijelo yamanzi, Kwatyhileka iziseko zehlabathi ngokukhalima kwakho, Yehova, Ngokuphefumla komoya wempumlo yakho."
Psalms18:16 Wolula isandla ephezulu, wandibamba, Wandirhuqela emanzini amaninzi."
Psalms18:17 Wandihlangula elutshabeni lwam olunamandla, Kwabandithiyileyo, ngokuba bebomelele kunam."
Psalms18:18 Bandifikela ngemini yeshwangusha lam, uYehova wandixhasa."
Psalms18:19 Wandisa endaweni enkulu; Wandisindisa, ngokuba endithandile."
Psalms18:20 uYehova undibize ngokobulungisa bam; Wandenza ngokobunyulu bezandla zam.
Psalms18:21 Kuba ndizigcinile iindlela zikaYehova, yaye andizange ndiphambuke kuThixo wam."
Psalms18:22 Ngokuba bonke ubunile bakhe ngakum, andiwususanga ubunile bakhe kum."
Psalms18:23 Ndandililungisa phambi kwakhe, Ndazinqanda ebubini bam."
Psalms18:24 Ngako oko, uYehova undibize ngokobulungisa bam, nangokobunyulu bezandla zam phambi kwamehlo akhe."
Psalms18:25 Woba nenceba kuwe; kwindoda elungileyo uzenza ixoki;
Psalms18:26 Kohlambulukileyo uya kuzibonakalisa uhlambulukile; kwaye ngempazamo uya kuzichaza.
Psalms18:27 Ngokuba wena uyabasindisa abantu ababandezelekileyo; ke yena uya kulithoba imbonakalo ephakamileyo.
Psalms18:28 Ngokuba uyasilumeka isibane sam wena: uYehova, uThixo wam, uyabukhanyisela ubumnyama bam."
Psalms18:29 Kuba bendifudula ndicanda iqela labachasene nomthetho ngenxa yenu; yaye ngoThixo wam ndatsiba eludongeni.
Psalms18:30 uThixo yena, igqibelele indlela yakhe; Ilizwi likaYehova linyibilikisiwe; Uyingweletshetshe kubo bonke abazimela ngaye."
Psalms18:31 Ngokuba ngubani na onguThixo, ingenguye uYehova? okanye ngubani na oliliwa ngaphandle koThixo wethu?"
Psalms18:32 UloThixo undibhinqise ubukroti, Oyilungiselayo indlela yam;"
Psalms18:33 Uzifanisayo iinyawo zam nezamaxhama, Undimisa emimangweni yam;"
Psalms18:34 Uzifundisayo ukulwa izandla zam, Zaphule isaphetha sesinyithi izandla zam."
Psalms18:35 Undinikileyo ingweletshetshe yosindiso lwakho, Sandibamba isandla sakho sokunene, Yandiphakamisa inceba yakho."
Psalms18:36 Uwatwabulule amanyathela am phantsi kwam, Aziyi kuhexa iinyawo zam."
Psalms18:37 Ndazisukela iintshaba zam, ndazifumana;"
Psalms18:38 Ndabahlaba, ababa nakuvuka; zawa phantsi kweenyawo zam."
Psalms18:39 Undibophe ubugorha bokulwa; Abo bandomelezayo, wababeka phantsi kwam."
Psalms18:40 Ubuye wandinika intamo yeentshaba zam; ukuze ndibatshabalalise abandithiyayo.
Psalms18:41 Bakhala, akwabakho mhlanguli: KuYehova, akabaphendula."
Psalms18:42 Ndabacola njengothuli oluqhutywa ngumoya; Ndabalahla njengothuli lwesitrato.
Psalms18:43 Wandihlangula ezimbandezelweni zabantu; undenze intloko yeentlanga; abantu ebendingabazi baya kundikhonza.
Psalms18:44 Besakuva ngam, bondiva; Oonyana bolunye uhlanga baya kundilulamela."
Psalms18:45 Oonyana bolunye uhlanga baya kunkwantya, bankwantye ngeendawo zabo."
Psalms18:46 uYehova uhleli; lelokubongwa iliwa lam; kwaye ngamana uThixo wosindiso lwam angenziwa mkhulu.
Psalms18:47 Mna ndinguThixo ovuzayo, ozithobelayo phantsi kwam iintlanga."
Psalms18:48 Undihlangulayo ezintshabeni zam, Ewe, undiphakamisayo kwabasukela phezulu kum; Wandihlangula kumcinezeli."
Psalms18:49 Ngako oko, Yehova, ndiya kubulela kuwe phakathi kweentlanga, Ndivume kwigama lakho."
Psalms18:50 Ulokhulisa usindiso lokumkani wakhe; Uze ube nenceba kumthanjiswa wakhe, kuDavide, nakwimbewu yakhe kude kuse ephakadeni."
Psalms19:1 Kukumkani weemvumi, Umhobe kaDavide. Izulu libalisa uzuko lukaThixo; nesibhakabhaka sixela umsebenzi wezandla zakhe."
Psalms19:2 Emini uthetha ulwimi, ubusuku nemini uthetha ukwazi."
Psalms19:3 Akukho ntetho, nantetho, kungekho lizwi livakaliswayo;"
Psalms19:4 Indumiso yabo iye ehlabathini lonke, Namazwi abo eziphelweni zehlabathi. Wamisa umnquba khona,"
Psalms19:5 onjengomyeni, xa ephuma egumbini, agcobe njengegorha, ukuba ibaleke elugqatsweni."
Psalms19:6 Ukuphuma kwalo kuthabathele ekupheleni kwezulu, ukujikeleza kwalo kuse ekupheleni; akukho nto ifihlakeleyo kuye ubushushu balo."
Psalms19:7 Umyalelo kaYehova ugqibelele, uhlaziya umphefumlo; Ubungqina bukaYehova buqinisekile, bunika abaziziyatha ubulumko."
Psalms19:8 Imithetho kaYehova inobulungisa, ivuyisa intliziyo; Umyalelo kaYehova unyulu, uvula amehlo."
Psalms19:9 Ukoyika uYehova kucocekile, kumi ngonaphakade; Imigwebo kaYehova iyinyaniso yaye inobulungisa."
Psalms19:10 Zinokubekeka ngaphezu kwegolide embiweyo, nakwegolide engcwengiweyo; zimnandi ngaphezu kobusi nenqatha lobusi."
Psalms19:11 Kananjalo umkhonzi wakho ulumkiswa ngazo; ukuzigcina kunomvuzo omkhulu.
Psalms19:12 Ngubani na onokuziqonda iimpazamo zakhe? Ndihlambulule kwiimpazamo ezifihlakeleyo.
Psalms19:13 Mgcine umkhonzi wakho ezonweni zobuqhophololo; abayi kuba nagunya kum; ndonyaniseka, ndimsulwa ebugwenxeni obukhulu."
Psalms19:14 Makakholeke amazwi omlomo wam, nezicamango zentliziyo yam, emehlweni akho, Yehova, mandla am, Msindisi wam."
Psalms20:1 Umhobe kaDavide malikugcine igama likaThixo kaYakobi;
Psalms20:2 Makathumele uncedo oluvela engcweleni, amnike amandla aseZiyon;"
Psalms20:3 Wawakhumbula onke amadini akho anyukayo, wawakholise amadini akho anyukayo; Sela."
Psalms20:4 Nikela intliziyo yakho, Uwafeze onke amacebo akho."
Psalms20:5 Siya kumemelela ngosindiso lwakho, Siphakamise iziganga zethu egameni loThixo wethu; Ngamana uYehova angazenza zonke izicelo zakho."
Psalms20:6 Ndiyazi ngoku ukuba uYehova ngumsindisi womthanjiswa wakhe; uya kumgweba ngamandla okusindisa esandla sakhe sokunene emazulwini akhe angcwele.
Psalms20:7 Abanye bakholose ngeemoto, abanye ngamahashe, kodwa thina siya kulikhumbula igama likaYehova, uThixo wethu."
Psalms20:8 Zawa phantsi, kodwa savuka saza sema nkqo."
Psalms20:9 Yehova, sindisa; Ukumkani asiphendule ngemini yokubiza kwethu."
Psalms21:1 Umhobe kaDavide. iNkosi iya kuvuya ngamandla akho, Yehova; yaye hayi indlela oya kugcoba ngayo ngosindiso lwakho!"
Psalms21:2 Umnike umnqweno wentliziyo yakhe, akwalandula isicelo somlomo wakhe. Sela."
Psalms21:3 Ngokuba umkhawulela ngeentsikelelo ezilungileyo; Umnike isithsaba segolide ecocekileyo.
Psalms21:4 Wacela ubomi kuwe, wamnika ke, imihla emide ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo."
Psalms21:5 Lukhulu uzuko lwakhe ngosindiso lwakho; wamnika indili nobukhulu.
Psalms21:6 Ngokuba umenze wasikelelwa ngonaphakade; Umenzele uvuyo olukhulu ebusweni bakho.
Psalms21:7 Ngokuba ukumkani ukholose ngoYehova, ngenxa yenceba yOsenyangweni akayi kushukunyiswa."
Psalms21:8 Isandla sakho siya kubamba zonke iintshaba zakho; isandla sakho sokunene siya kubafumana abakuthiyayo.
Psalms21:9 Uya kubenza babe njengeziko lomlilo, ngexesha lomsindo wakho; uYehova uya kubatshisa ngomsindo wakhe, nomlilo ubatshise."
Psalms21:10 Wositshabalalisa isiqhamo sabo emhlabeni, nabantwana babo phakathi koonyana babantu;"
Psalms21:11 Kuba bacebe ububi ngawe, bacebe icebo eliyingozi abangayi kuligqiba."
Psalms21:12 Ke ngoko, zikhwebule kubo, xa uthe wabaxunela iintolo zakho ezintanjeni."
Psalms21:13 Phakamisa, Yehova, ngamandla akho; Ngoko ke siya kumemelela, sidumise amandla akho."
Psalms22:1 Kumongameli. Umhobe kaDavide. Thixo wam, Thixo wam, undishiye ngani na? Yini na ukuba ude ungandincedi, uthethe ngokubhonga kwam?"
Psalms22:2 Thixo wam, ndibiza imini, ungeva; ebusuku, andiphumli."
Psalms22:3 Ke nina ningcwele, nina nimiyo emideni yakwaSirayeli;"
Psalms22:4 Oobawo bakholosa ngawe, bakholosa ngawe, wabasindisa;"
Psalms22:5 Babiza kuwe, basindiswa; bakholose ngawe, àbadana."
Psalms22:6 Mna ke ndingumbungu, andenzi bubi; sisingcikivo soluntu, into edelekileyo ebantwini."
Psalms22:7 Bonke abandibonayo bayandihleka; bakhupha imilomo yabo, bahlunguzela iintloko zabo, bathi:"
Psalms22:8 Wakholosa ngoYehova ukuba amsindise; makamsindise, ngokuba emthandile."
Psalms22:9 Ke nguwe owandithabatha esizalweni sikanina; Wandenza ndakholelwa esibelekweni sikamama.
Psalms22:10 Mna ndilahlwe kuwe kwasesizalweni sikama; Wena unguThixo wam kwasesizalweni sikama.
Psalms22:11 Musa ukuba kude nam; ngokuba isondele intlekele; ngokuba ngamampunge.
Psalms22:12 Ndingqongwe ziinkunzi ezininzi, iinkunzi ezintsha zeBhashan zandirhawula."
Psalms22:13 Zindakhamele umlomo wazo njengengonyama egqumayo;
Psalms22:14 Ndiphalele njengamanzi, aphukile onke amathambo am; Intliziyo yam injengomthwebeba; yanyibilika esuswini sam."
Psalms22:15 Omile njengohlangothi lweziko amandla am; Ulwimi lwam lunamathele emhlathini wam; Wandibeka eluthulini lokufa.
Psalms22:16 Ngokuba zindirhawule izinja, Ingxokolo yongendawo indirhawule; bagqobhoza izandla zam neenyawo zam."
Psalms22:17 Ndinokuwabala onke amathambo am;
Psalms22:18 Babelana ngeengubo zam, bazenza amaqashiso ngempahla yam;"
Psalms22:19 Ke wena, Yehova, musa ukuba kude; Ungamandla am, khawuleza undincede."
Psalms22:20 Wusindise umphefumlo wam emkhontweni; Intanda yam isemandleni enja.
Psalms22:21 Ndisindise emlonyeni wengonyama, Ngokuba uve iimpondo zenyathi."
Psalms22:22 Ndiya kulixela igama lakho kubazalwana bam; ndiya kukudumisa ebandleni.
Psalms22:23 Nina nimoyikayo uYehova, mdumiseni; Nonke, nzala kaYakobi, mzukiseni; moyikeni, nonke nina nzala kaSirayeli."
Psalms22:24 Kuba azidelekanga, azibanga nazothe kuye ukubandezeleka kolusizana; akabusithelisa ubuso bakhe kuye; wambiza, weva."
Psalms22:25 Indumiso yam ibe kuwe ebandleni elikhulu, Nezibhambathiso zam ndiya kuzizalisa phambi kwabamoyikayo."
Psalms22:26 Abalulamileyo baya kudla bahluthe; abamngxameleyo baya kudumisa uYehova; iya kuphila intliziyo yakho ngonaphakade.
Psalms22:27 Ziya kukhumbula zonke iziphelo zehlabathi, zibuyele kuYehova, iguqe phambi kwakho yonke imizalwane yeentlanga."
Psalms22:28 Kuba ubukumkani bobukaYehova, yaye nguye umlawuli weentlanga."
Psalms22:29 Baya kudla, baguqe bonke abatyebileyo behlabathi; Baya kuguqa phambi kwakhe bonke abatshona eluthulini; akukho namnye unako ukuwugcina uphila umphefumlo wakhe."
Psalms22:30 Imbewu iya kumkhonza; uYehova uya kubalelwa kwesinye isizukulwana.
Psalms22:31 Baya kuza baxele ubulungisa bayo Kubantu abaza kuzalwa, ukuba nguye owenze oko."
Psalms23:1 (Indumiso kaDavide.) uYehova ngumalusi wam; Andifuni.
Psalms23:2 Undiphumza emakriweni aluhlaza; Undikhokelela emanzini angawokuphumla.
Psalms23:3 Uyawuhlaziya umphefumlo wam, undikhaphela ezindleleni zobulungisa ngenxa yegama lakhe."
Psalms23:4 Nokuba ndihamba emfuleni wethunzi lokufa, Andiyi koyika bubi, ngokuba unam wena; Intonga yakho nomsimelelo wakho ziyandithuthuzela."
Psalms23:5 Undilungisela isithebe phambi kobuso bam, Ebusweni beentshaba zam; Uyithambisa ngeoli intloko yam; iyaphalala indebe yam."
Psalms23:6 Inene, ndiya kulandelwa kokulungileyo nenceba Yonke imihla yobomi bam, ndihlale endlwini kaYehova yonke imihla."
Psalms24:1 (Indumiso kaDavide.) LelikaYehova ihlabathi neento zonke ezikulo; ihlabathi abahlala kulo.
Psalms24:2 Ngokuba waluseka ulwandle, Wayitywina imilambo;"
Psalms24:3 Ngubani na oya kunyuka aye entabeni kaYehova? Ngubani na onokuma engcweleni yakhe?
Psalms24:4 Yezandla ezihlambulukileyo, nentliziyo ehlambulukileyo; Ongawuphakamiseli ilize umoya wakhe, Ongafungi ubuxoki."
Psalms24:5 Uya kufumana intsikelelo kaYehova, nokusesikweni kuThixo wosindiso lwakhe."
Psalms24:6 Siso esi isizukulwana sabakufunayo, abafuna ubuso bakho, Yakobi. Sela."
Psalms24:7 Phakamisani iintloko zenu, masango; niziphakamise, minyango yaphakade; yaye ukumkani obekekileyo uya kungena."
Psalms24:8 Ngubani na loo kumkani ubekekileyo? NguYehova, igorha eligorha, nguYehova, igorha emfazweni."
Psalms24:9 Phakamisani iintloko zenu, masango; niphakame, masango angunaphakade! yaye ukumkani obekekileyo uya kungena."
Psalms24:10 Ngubani na lo kumkani ubekekileyo? uNdikhoyo wemikhosi nguNdikhoyo onamandla onke. Sela.
Psalms25:1 (Indumiso kaDavide.) Yehova, ndiwuphakamisela kuwe umphefumlo wam."
Psalms25:2 Thixo wam, ndikholose ngawe; Andiyi kudana, andisayi kukha bandoyise iintshaba zam."
Psalms25:3 Ewe, makungabikho namnye uneentloni ngaye okulindeleyo; ihlazo kwabo benza ubugwenxa ngaphandle kwesizathu."
Psalms25:4 Ndazise iindlela zakho, Yehova; Ndifundise iindlela zakho"
Psalms25:5 Ndinyathelise enyanisweni yakho, ndifundise, Ngokuba unguThixo ongumsindisi wam; Kudala ndikulindile imini yonke."
Psalms25:6 Zikhumbule iinceba zakho, Yehova, neemfesane zakho; ngokuba babebadala."
Psalms25:7 Musa ukuzikhumbula izono zobutsha bam, nokreqo lwam; ndikhumbule ngenceba yakho, ngenxa yenceba yakho, Yehova."
Psalms25:8 uYehova nguThixo, ulilungisa; ngenxa yoko uya kubafundisa endleleni aboni."
Psalms25:9 Uyabanyathelisa abalulamileyo emasikweni, Abafundise abalulamileyo indlela yakhe."
Psalms25:10 Zonke iindlela zikaYehova ziyinceba nenyaniso kwabagcina umnqophiso wakhe namacebo akhe.
Psalms25:11 Ngenxa yegama lakho, Yehova, xolela ubugwenxa bam; kuba inkulu."
Psalms25:12 Ngubani na ke lo mntu woyika uYehova? uya kumfundisa ngokwendlela ayinyulileyo.
Psalms25:13 Wolala ngoxolo umphefumlo wakhe; nembewu yakhe iya kulidla ilifa ilizwe.
Psalms25:14 Ucweyo lukaYehova nabamoyikayo; nowazisa umnqophiso wakhe kubo.
Psalms25:15 Amehlo am ahlala ekuYehova; kuba nguye oya kuzikhupha iinyawo zam emgibeni.
Psalms25:16 Ndibheke, undibabale; ngenxa yokuba ndindodwa, ndicinezelekile."
Psalms25:17 Amaxhala entliziyo yam aninzi; ndikhuphe engxakini yam!
Psalms25:18 Wujonge umsindo wam nokwaphuka kwam; undixolele zonke izono zam.
Psalms25:19 Zilumkele iintshaba zam; ngokuba baninzi; Bandithiye ngentiyo ekhohlakeleyo.
Psalms25:20 Wusindise umphefumlo wam, undisindise; mandingadani; ngokuba ndikholose ngawe."
Psalms25:21 Mandilondolozele ubulungisa nokusesikweni; ngokuba ndilindele wena
Psalms25:22 Owu Thixo, mhlangule uSirayeli kuzo zonke iimbandezelo zakhe."
Psalms26:1 (Indumiso kaDavide.) Lithethe ityala lam, Yehova; ngokuba ndihambe ngobulungisa bam; Kananjalo ndakholosa ngoYehova; ke ngoko, andiyi kutyibilika."
Psalms26:2 Ndigocagoce, Yehova, undicikide; Ndicikide isinqe sam nentliziyo yam."
Psalms26:3 Ngokuba inceba yakho iphambi kwamehlo am, Ndihamba enyanisweni yakho."
Psalms26:4 Andihlali namadoda akhohlakeleyo, Andihambi nabakhohlisi."
Psalms26:5 Ndilithiyile ibandla lamanginingini; kwaye akayi kuhlala nabangendawo.
Psalms26:6 Ndiya kuhlamba izandla zam ngobumsulwa; Ndiya kunqula isibingelelo sakho, Yehova!"
Psalms26:7 ukuze ndithethe ndinezwi lokubulela, Ndibalise ngayo yonke imisebenzi yakho ebalulekileyo."
Psalms26:8 Yehova, ndiyakuthanda ukwakha indlu yakho, nendawo yokuhlala kozuko lwakho."
Psalms26:9 Musa ukuwubuthela umphefumlo wam ndawonye naboni, Ubomi bam ndawonye namadoda anamagazi."
Psalms26:10 Kusezandleni zabo ubutshinga, Osandla sokunene sizele sisicengo."
Psalms26:11 Mna ke ndihamba ngobulungisa bam; ndisindise, ube nenceba kum."
Psalms26:12 Unyawo lwam lumi endaweni ebanzi; ndisemabandleni ndiya kumdumisa uYehova.
Psalms27:1 (Indumiso kaDavide.) uYehova kukukhanya kwam nomsindisi wam; ndiya koyika bani na? NguYehova inqaba yobomi bam; Ndizakoyika bani?
Psalms27:2 Beza kum abangendawo, neentshaba zam, neentshaba zam, ukuba badle inyama yam, bakhubeka bawa bona;"
Psalms27:3 Nokuba ithe yandivingca intendelezo, isuka ingoyiki intliziyo yam; nokuba ndithe ndavuka ndaya emfazweni, ndokholosa ngalo."
Psalms27:4 Ndicele nto-nye kuYehova, ndifuna yona; ukuze ndihlale endlwini kaYehova yonke imihla yobomi bam, ukuze ndibubone ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova, ndihlale etempileni yakhe."
Psalms27:5 Ngokuba wondigusha ententeni yakhe ngexesha lobubi; Undigusha apho esithebeni intente yakhe; Uya kundibeka eweni.
Psalms27:6 Kwaye ngoku, intloko yam iya kuphakama phezu kweentshaba zam ezindirhawulayo; ke ngoko ndiya kunikela imibingelelo yovuyo ententeni yakhe; Ndiyakuthanda ukucula, ewe, ndiyakuthanda ukuculela uzuko lukaYehova."
Psalms27:7 Ndibazele indlebe, Yehova, ndakubiza ngezwi lam; ndibabale, undiphendule."
Psalms27:8 Xa nithi, Funani ubuso bam; Intliziyo yam yathi kuwe, Ndiya kubufuna ubuso bakho, Yehova."
Psalms27:9 Musa ukubusithelisa ubuso bakho kum; Musa ukumgxotha umkhonzi wakho ngomsindo; Uluncedo kum; Musa ukundishiya, Thixo ondisindisayo;"
Psalms27:10 Ukuba ubawo noma bandishiyile, Wondithabatha uYehova;"
Psalms27:11 Ndifundise indlela yakho, Yehova, Ndikhaphe emendweni othe tye, ngenxa yabandilaleleyo."
Psalms27:12 Musa ukundinikela elitheni leentshaba zam; ngokuba ndiphakanyelwe ngamangqina obuxoki, nabantu abafutha ubutshinga."
Psalms27:13 Ndandidiniwe, andizange ndikholelwe ukuba ndingakubona ukulunga kukaYehova kwihlabathi labo bakuvayo."
Psalms27:14 Kholosa ngoYehova, yiba nesibindi, woyiqinisa intliziyo yakho; Ndithi, lindela kuYehova."
Psalms28:1 Ndinqula wena, Yehova, liwa lam; musa ukuthi cwaka ngam, ukuba anithanga nithule ngam, ndifane nabahla baye emhadini."
Psalms28:2 Live ilizwi lomthandazo wam ekudandulukeni kwam kuwe, Ekuziphakamiseni kwam izandla zam engcweleni yakho engcwele."
Psalms28:3 Musa ukundihambisa kunye nabangendawo, nabangendawo, abathetha uxolo kummelwane wabo, kanti intliziyo yabo inenkohliso."
Psalms28:4 Banike ngokwemisebenzi yabo, ngokobubi bezenzo zabo; Banike umsebenzi wezandla zabo; Babuyisele intlango yabo."
Psalms28:5 Ngenxa yokuba bengayihloneli imisebenzi kaYehova nomsebenzi wezandla zakhe, uya kubatshabalalisa, angabaphakamisi."
Psalms28:6 Makabongwe uYehova, kuba elivile ilizwi lomthandazo wam."
Psalms28:7 NguYehova amandla am nengweletshetshe yam; Yakholosa ngaye intliziyo yam, ndancedwa; ke ngoko, intliziyo yam yonwabe kakhulu; ndiya kumdumisa ngengoma yam."
Psalms28:8 uYehova uligwiba labo, uyingxonde yomthanjiswa wakhe."
Psalms28:9 Khulula abantu bakho, lisikelele ilifa lakho; kwaye uzidlise kwaye uziphakamise ngonaphakade."
Psalms29:1 iNgoma kaDavide.
Psalms29:2 Mnikeni uYehova imbeko kwigama lakhe; nqula uYehova ngendlela ebalaseleyo.
Psalms29:3 Ilizwi likaYehova liphezu kwamanzi: uThixo wozuko uyaduduma, uYehova uphezu kwamanzi amaninzi."
Psalms29:4 Ilizwi likaYehova linamandla; Ilizwi likaYehova lizele bubuhle.
Psalms29:5 Ilizwi likaYehova linyikimisa imisedare; Ewe, uYehova uyayonakalisa imisedare yaseLebhanon."
Psalms29:6 Uyabatsiba njengethole lenkomo; iLebhanon neSiriyon njengenkonyana yenyathi.
Psalms29:7 Ilizwi likaYehova lahlula amadangatye omlilo;
Psalms29:8 Izwi likaYehova liyothusa intlango; uYehova unyikimisa intlango yaseKadeshe.
Psalms29:9 Ilizwi likaYehova lizala ixhama, amahlathi ayatshatyalaliswa, yaye yonke into etempileni yakhe ixela uzuko lwakhe."
Psalms29:10 uYehova uhleli phezu konogumbe; ewe, uYehova uhleli ngonaphakade."
Psalms29:11 uYehova uya kubanika amandla abantu bakhe; uYehova uya kubasikelela abantu bakhe ngoxolo.
Psalms30:1 EkaDavide. EkaDavide. Ndiya kubulela kuwe, Yehova; Ngokuba undirhole, Akwazivumela iintshaba zam ukuba zindivuyelele."
Psalms30:2 Yehova, Thixo wam, ndibize kuwe, wandiphilisa."
Psalms30:3 Yehova, uwuphakamisile umphefumlo wam kwelabafileyo; Wandihlangula ekuhlikeni ndiye emhadini."
Psalms30:4 Vumani kuYehova, nina bangcwele bakhe, mdumiseni uzuko lwakhe olungcwele."
Psalms30:5 Ngokuba yinto yephanyazo umsindo wakhe; Ngobabalo lwakhe kukho ubomi: Ukulila kuhleli ubusuku bunye, Kusasa luvuyo."
Psalms30:6 Ndandisazi ke mna ekuthuthuzelekeni kwam, ukuba andiyi kushukunyiswa naphakade."
Psalms30:7 Yehova, ngenceba yakho uyayomeleza intaba yam; Ubusithelisile ubuso bakho, ndoyika."
Psalms30:8 Ndadanduluka kuwe, Yehova; ndathandaza kuYehova."
Psalms30:9 Kukho nzuzo yani na egazini lam, ekuhleni kwam ndiye emhadini? Luya kukudumisa uthuli na? iya kuthetha inyaniso yaKho?"
Psalms30:10 Yehova, ndiphendule, ndibabale; Yehova, yiba ngumncedi wam."
Psalms30:11 Ukuguqule ukukhala kwam kwaba ngumngqungqo; Wathabatha ilaphu lengxowa yam, wandibopha ngovuyo;"
Psalms30:12 Lude uzuko lwam luvume uzuko lwakho, lungathi cwaka. Yehova, Thixo wam, ndiya kubulela kuwe ngonaphakade."
Psalms31:1 Kukumkani umhobe kaDavide ungaze undidanise; ndisindise ngobulungisa bakho.
Psalms31:2 Yiwa phantsi ecaleni kwam; khawuleza undisindise; Yiba liliwa eliligwiba kum, nemboniselo yokundisindisa."
Psalms31:3 Ngokuba ingxondorha yam nemboniselo yam nguwe; ke ngenxa yegama lakho, ndikhokele, ndikhokele."
Psalms31:4 Ndihlangule esirhintyelweni ababendilinde ngaso, Ngokuba ungamandla am."
Psalms31:5 Ndiwubeke esandleni sakho umphefumlo wam: ndisindise, Yehova, Thixo oyinyaniso."
Psalms31:6 Ndabathiya abaphulaphula ubuxoki, kodwa ndathembela ngoYehova."
Psalms31:7 Ndiya kuba nemihlali ndigcobe ngenxa yobubele bakho bothando, ngenxa yokuba ukubonile ukubandezeleka kwam; Uyazi ukuba umphefumlo wam usengxakini;"
Psalms31:8 Anindinikela esandleni sotshaba; wangena egumbini elikhulu.
Psalms31:9 Ndibabale, Yehova, ngokuba ndibandezelekile; alilile iinyembezi zam, nomphefumlo wam, nesisu sam;"
Psalms31:10 Ngokuba ubomi bam buzele yimbandezelo, Neminyaka yam iyancwina;"
Psalms31:11 Ndaba sisingcikivo phakathi kweentshaba zam zonke, Ngokukodwa kubamelwane bam; bandibaleka abandibona ndingaphandle."
Psalms31:12 Ndilityelwe njengofileyo entliziyweni, ndinjengembiza eqhekekileyo."
Psalms31:13 Ngokuba ndive intlebendwane yabaninzi, yathi, Kukunxunguphala ngeenxa zonke; njengoko babhunga ngam, Babhunga ukuthabatha umphefumlo wam."
Psalms31:14 Ke mna ndikholose ngawe, Yehova; Ndathi: UnguThixo wam."
Psalms31:15 Asesandleni sakho amaxesha am; ndihlangule esandleni seentshaba zam, nasesandleni sabandisukelayo."
Psalms31:16 Ubuso bakho bukhanyise kumkhonzi wakho; Ngenxa yeenceba zakho ndihlangule.
Psalms31:17 Yehova, musa ukundidanisa; ngokuba ndikubizile; Mabadane abangendawo, bathi cwaka kwelabafileyo."
Psalms31:18 Umlomo wobuxoki mawuthi cwaka; abathetha amalungisa ngokusa, ngendelo."
Psalms31:19 Hayi, ubukhulu bokulunga kwakho, obuqwebele abakoyikayo; Into oyenzileyo kwabo bakholosa ngawe phambi koonyana babantu!"
Psalms31:20 Uyabagusha emfihlekweni, Ngenxa yekratshi labantu; Kufuneka uzigcine ziyimfihlo endlwini kungquzulwano lweelwimi."
Psalms31:21 Makabongwe uYehova, kuba undenze isixeko eyomeleleyo ngenceba yakhe emangalisayo."
Psalms31:22 Ngokuba ndathi mna entliziyweni yam, Ndinqanyulwe phambi kwamehlo akho; waliva ilizwi lomthandazo wam ekudandulukeni kwam kuwe."
Psalms31:23 Thandani uYehova, nonke nina zintanda zakhe, ngokuba uYehova ungumlondolozi wabanyanisileyo, uyabavuza abangendawo."
Psalms31:24 Yibani nesibindi, yaye uya kuzomeleza iintliziyo zenu, nonke nina nikholose ngoYehova."
Psalms32:1 iNgoma kaDavide: iMaskil.
Psalms32:2 Hayi, uyolo lomntu ongabunyamezeliyo uYehova kuye ubugwenxa, Omoya wakhe ukhululekileyo ekukhohlisweni."
Psalms32:3 Ndathi ndakuthi cwaka, aluphale amathambo am ngenxa yokubhonga kwam imini yonke."
Psalms32:4 Ngokuba besinzima phezu kwam isandla sakho imini nobusuku, Busuka ubumanzi bam, baba kukubalela kwasehlotyeni. Sela."
Psalms32:5 Ndisivumile isono sam kuwe, andabufihla ubugwenxa bam; Ndathi, Ndithanda ukuzixela izono zam kuYehova; undixolele ububi besono sam. Sela."
Psalms32:6 Ngako oko, onke amalungisa aya kuthandaza kuwe ngexesha lokufunyanwa kwakho; Ewe, emijelweni yamanzi amaninzi, ayisayi kufika kuye."
Psalms32:7 Uyindawo yam yokusabela; Uya kundihlangula embandezelweni; Uya kundirhawula ngeengoma zosindiso. Sela.
Psalms32:8 Ndiya kuniyala, ndinibonise indlela enifanele ukuhamba ngayo; Ndiya kukukhokela ngeliso lam."
Psalms32:9 Musani ukuba njengehashe, noondlebende, ukungabi nangqondo; abamlomo wabo uvingcelwe ngokuluma nangomkhala, hleze bafike kuni."
Psalms32:10 Uza kufikelwa ziimbandezelo ezininzi, kodwa okholose ngoYehova ujikelezwe yinceba."
Psalms32:11 Vuyani kuYehova, gcobani, nina malungisa, gcobani, nonke nina bantliziyo zithe tye."
Psalms33:1 Memelelani kuYehova, nina malungisa, Ngokuba imnandi indumiso kumalungisa."
Psalms33:2 Mdumiseni uYehova ngencakuba; vumani kuye ngohadi nangomrhubhe ontambo zilishumi.
Psalms33:3 Mvumeleni ingoma entsha; dlala kamnandi ngengxolo eninzi.
Psalms33:4 Ngokuba lithe tye ilizwi likaYehova; yonke imisebenzi yakhe uyenzele inyaniso.
Psalms33:5 Uthanda ubulungisa nokusesikweni, Uzele yinceba kaYehova ihlabathi."
Psalms33:6 Lenzeka izulu ngelizwi likaYehova; nomkhosi wawo wonke ngomoya womlomo wakhe.
Psalms33:7 Ulobutha njengemfumba amanzi olwandle; Ugcina amanzi koovimba.
Psalms33:8 Loyike uYehova elimiweyo; Mabamoyike bonke abemi behlabathi.
Psalms33:9 Ngokuba wathetha, kwabakho; wayalela, yahlala imile."
Psalms33:10 uYehova uyawatshitshisa amacebo eentlanga; Uyawatshabalalisa amacebo abantu.
Psalms33:11 Injongo kaYehova ingunaphakade, iingcamango zentliziyo yakhe zisuka kwesinye isizukulwana ziye kwesinye."
Psalms33:12 Hayi, uyolo lohlanga oluThixo walo unguYehova; nabantu abanyulileyo, ukuba babe lilifa kuye."
Psalms33:13 uYehova uqondele esemazulwini; uyababona bonke abantwana babantu.
Psalms33:14 Esendaweni yakhe yokuhlala uyababona bonke abemi behlabathi.
Psalms33:15 Uyayikholisa intliziyo yabo; Ubona zonke izenzo zabo.
Psalms33:16 Akukho kumkani usindiswayo ngobuninzi bamaphakathi; iqhawe alisindi ngamandla amakhulu.
Psalms33:17 Ihashe alinakusinda, yaye ngenxa yobugorha balo alinakumsindisa umntu."
Psalms33:18 Yabona, amehlo kaYehova aphezu kwabamoyikayo, abakholose ngenceba yakhe;"
Psalms33:19 Ukuba akhulule imiphefumlo yabo ekufeni, Abasindise endlaleni."
Psalms33:20 Umphefumlo wethu ulindele kuYehova; Uncedo lwethu nengweletshetshe yethu nguye.
Psalms33:21 Ngokuba iya kuvuya ngaye intliziyo yethu, Sikholosile nje ngegama lakhe elingcwele."
Psalms33:22 Yehova, inceba yakho mayibe phezu kwethu, njengoko sikholose ngawe."
Psalms34:1 Umhobe kaDavide, ekuphambukeni kwakhe kuAbhimeleki, wamndulula, wemka."
Psalms34:2 Uya kuqhayisa umphefumlo wam ngoYehova;
Psalms34:3 Mbongeni uYehova kunye nam, siliphakamise kunye igama lakhe."
Psalms34:4 Ndamfuna uYehova, wandiva, Wandihlangula kuzo zonke iimbandezelo zam."
Psalms34:5 Bakhangela kuye, bakhazimla, baza ubuso babo baba nazintloni."
Psalms34:6 Ladanduluka elihlwempu, weva uYehova, wayihlangula kuzo zonke iimbandezelo zayo."
Psalms34:7 Ingelosi kaYehova yehla ibajikeleza abo bamoyikayo, ize ibasindise."
Psalms34:8 Ngcamlani nibone ukuba ulungile uYehova; Hayi, uyolo lomntu okholose ngaye!"
Psalms34:9 Moyikeni uYehova, nina bangcwele bakhe, Kuba abaswele nto abamoyikayo."
Psalms34:10 Iingonyama ezintsha ziswele, zilambile; ke bona abamfunayo uYehova abasweli nto ilungileyo."
Psalms34:11 Yizani, bonyana, ndiphulaphuleni, ndinifundise ukumoyika uYehova."
Psalms34:12 Ngubani na umntu obuthandayo ubomi, othanda imihla emininzi, ukuze abone okulungileyo?"
Psalms34:13 Gcina ulwimi lwakho ebubini, Nomlomo wakho enkohliso."
Psalms34:14 Suka ebubini, wenze okulungileyo; funa uxolo, uluphuthume."
Psalms34:15 Amehlo kaYehova akumalungisa, uyakuva ukukhalela kwawo uncedo."
Psalms34:16 Ubuso bukaYehova bujonge abenzi bokubi, ukuba akuphelise ehlabathini ukukhunjulwa kwabo."
Psalms34:17 Amalungisa ayabiza, uyaweva uYehova, Awahlangule kuzo zonke iimbandezelo zawo."
Psalms34:18 Usondele uYehova kwabantliziyo yaphukileyo; usindise abatyhafileyo intliziyo.
Psalms34:19 Zininzi iimbandezelo zelungisa, kodwa uYehova uyalihlangula kuzo zonke."
Psalms34:20 Uyawagcina onke amathambo alo; akukho namnye kubo owaphukileyo.
Psalms34:21 Ububi buya kubabulala abangendawo, nabathiyayo amalungisa babe yintlango."
Psalms34:22 uYehova uyawukhulula umphefumlo wabakhonzi bakhe, yaye akukho namnye kwabakholose ngaye oya kuba yintlango."
Psalms35:1 (Indumiso kaDavide.) Yehova, babambene nababambene nam, Ulwe nababambana nam."
Psalms35:2 Thabathani ikhaka nekrele; lindani uncedo lwam.
Psalms35:3 Betha ikrele, ubanqande abandisukelayo; Uthi kumphefumlo wam, Ndilusindiso lwakho."
Psalms35:4 Mababe neentloni badane abawufunayo umphefumlo wam;
Psalms35:5 Mababe njengomsonto ophetshethwa ngumoya, sivuthele phezu kwabo isithunywa sikaYehova."
Psalms35:6 Mayibe mnyama indlela yabo, ibe mtyibilizi, Masidlule phezu kwabo isithunywa sikaYehova."
Psalms35:7 Ngokuba basigqumele mna isibatha sabo ngelize esihogweni, abawumbeleyo umphefumlo wam ngelize."
Psalms35:8 Ukonakala makuwele phezu kwakhe ngequbuliso; nithabathe kuphela oko akufihlayo; makawe kwakuloo ntshabalalo.
Psalms35:9 Wogcoba ke umphefumlo wam ngoYehova; liya kulunandipha usindiso lwayo.
Psalms35:10 Onke amathambo am aya kuthi, Yehova, ngubani na onjengawe, umsindisi wosizana kowomeleleyo kunalo, usizana nosizana kwabambano lwalo?"
Psalms35:11 Kwavela amangqina obuxoki; bandinyanzela ukuba ndenze izinto endingazaziyo.
Psalms35:12 Babuyisela ububi bam esikhundleni sokulungileyo, bawonakalisa umphefumlo wam."
Psalms35:13 Ke mna, xa babesifa, ingubo yam ibiluhlaza; Ndawuthoba umoya wam ngokuzila ukudla; umthandazo wam wabuyela esifubeni sam."
Psalms35:14 Ndaziphatha njengomhlobo wam, okanye udade wethu, Ndazithoba, njengombambazelela unina."
Psalms35:15 Ekubandezelekeni kwam bavuya, bahlanganisana ndawonye; ndahlule, ungayeki."
Psalms35:16 Batshixizela amazinyo nabahanahanisi emithendelekweni.
Psalms35:17 Yehova, koda kube nini na uyibona? Wusindise umphefumlo wam ekubhujisweni kwabo, zintanda zam."
Psalms35:18 Ndiya kubulela kuwe ebandleni elikhulu; Ndiya kukudumisa phakathi kwabantu abaninzi.
Psalms35:19 Mabangandivuyeleli iintshaba zam, Bangaphelelwa lithemba abandithiyayo."
Psalms35:20 Kuba abathethi luxolo, kodwa bashumayela ubuqhophololo kubantu abaseluxolweni elizweni."
Psalms35:21 Ewe, bandikhamisele umlomo wabo, besithi, Tshotsho, ayabona, amehlo ethu abonile;"
Psalms35:22 Ubonile, Yehova; ithe cwaka; Nkosi, musa ukuba kude kum."
Psalms35:23 Khawusuk’ ume, undigwebe, undigwebe, Thixo wam, Nkosi yam;"
Psalms35:24 Lithethe ityala lam, Yehova Thixo wam, ngobulungisa bakho; kwaye abandithandi."
Psalms35:25 Abatsho entliziyweni yabo ukuthi, Oh, nathi siyafuna; Mabangathi: Simdlile."
Psalms35:26 Mabame bedanile, bakhungatheke kunye Abavuyela ububi bam; banxibe ihlazo nehlazo, abandihlazisayo."
Psalms35:27 Mabavuye, bavuye, Ababuthandayo ubulungisa bam; ewe, mabahlale besithi, Makabe mkhulu uYehova, obonelele ngobutyebi bomkhonzi wakhe."
Psalms35:28 Ulwimi lwam luya kuxela ubulungisa bakho nendumiso yakho, imini yonke."
Psalms36:1 Umhobe kaDavide: umkhonzi kaYehova. Uthi okungendawo kongendawo entliziyweni yam, Akukho koyika Thixo phambi kwamehlo akhe."
Psalms36:2 Ngokuba uyazikhohlisa kwawakhe amehlo, bude bube lisikizi ububi bakhe."
Psalms36:3 Amazwi omlomo wakhe abubutshinga nenkohliso; wayeka ukuba sisilumko nokwenza okulungileyo.
Psalms36:4 Usila ububi esililini sakhe; uziphatha ngendlela engalunganga; akayi kucekisa ububi.
Psalms36:5 Yehova, isemazulwini inceba yakho; Ukuthembeka kwakho kufikelela esibhakabhakeni."
Psalms36:6 Ubulungisa bakho bunjengeentaba ezinkulu; Zinzulu kakhulu izigwebo zakho; Yehova, uyamkhusela umntu nesilwanyana."
Psalms36:7 Hayi, ubukhulu benceba yakho, Thixo! ngenxa yoko oonyana babantu bakholose ngomthunzi wamaphiko akho."
Psalms36:8 Bayahlutha kunene bubutyebi bendlu yakho; ubaseze emlanjeni wovuyo lwakho.
Psalms36:9 Ngokuba iqula lobomi likuwe; ekukhanyeni kwakho sobona ukukhanya.
Psalms36:10 Qhubekela phambili inceba yakho kwabo ubaziyo; nobulungisa bakho yintliziyo ethe tye.
Psalms36:11 Makungandichukumisi unyawo lwabazidlayo, Singandicinezeli ngesandla sabangendawo."
Psalms36:12 Bawile abasebenzi bobutshinga; ziphoswa phantsi, azinakuvuka."
Psalms37:1 (Indumiso kaDavide.) Musa ukubaxhalela amatshijolo, musa ukubamonela abenzi bobubi."
Psalms37:2 Ngokuba baya kusikwa kamsinyane njengengca, babune njengohlaza."
Psalms37:3 Kholosa ngoYehova, wenze okulungileyo; niya kuphila ezweni, nidle amadlelo odwa."
Psalms37:4 Vuyani ke ngoYehova; wokunika okunqwenelwa yintliziyo yakho.
Psalms37:5 Yiyekele kuYehova indlela yakho; ukholose ngaye kwakhona; kwaye uya kukwenza ukuba kwenzeke.
Psalms37:6 Uya kubonakalisa ubulungisa bakho njengokukhanya, nomgwebo wakho njengemini;"
Psalms37:7 Yithi cwaka kuYehova, umlinde ngomonde; Musani ukumxhalela lowo unempumelelo endleleni yakhe, nalowo uceba ububi."
Psalms37:8 Yeka ukuba nomsindo, wuyeke umsindo; musa ukuba noburhalarhume nangayiphi na indlela;"
Psalms37:9 Ngokuba abangendawo baya kubhuqwa; Ke bona abakholose ngoYehova, baya kulidla ilifa ilizwe."
Psalms37:10 Kusaya kuba mzuzwana, angabikho ongendawo; Ewe, woyiqwalasela indawo yakhe, ibe akuyi kubakho."
Psalms37:11 Kwaye abalulamileyo baya kulidla ilifa ihlabathi; baziyolise ngobutyebi boxolo.
Psalms37:12 Ongendawo ulenzela amayelenqe ilungisa, Ulitshixizela amazinyo."
Psalms37:13 iNkosi iya kumhleka, Ngokuba ibona ukuba iyeza imini yakhe."
Psalms37:14 Barhola amakrele abangendawo, barhola izaphetha zabo, Ukuba babhukuqe usizana nehlwempu, Babulale abahamba ngobulungisa."
Psalms37:15 Ikrele labo liya kungena ezintliziyweni zabo, zaphuke izaphetha zabo."
Psalms37:16 Intwana enayo ilungisa ilunge ngakumbi kunendyebo yabantu abaninzi abangendawo.
Psalms37:17 Kuba izandla zabangendawo ziya kwaphulwa, kodwa uYehova umxhasi wamalungisa."
Psalms37:18 uYehova uyayazi imihla yamalungisa, nelifa lawo liya kuba ngunaphakade."
Psalms37:19 Abayi kudana ngexesha lentlekele, yaye ngemihla yendlala baya kuhlutha."
Psalms37:20 Ke bona abangendawo baya kutshabalala, neentshaba zikaYehova zibe njengamanqatha eemvana baya kutshabalala emsi."
Psalms37:21 Ongendawo uyaboleka angabuyiseli, kodwa ilungisa linenceba lize liphe."
Psalms37:22 Ngokuba abasikelelweyo nguye baya kulidla ilifa ihlabathi; nabo batsalwe nguye baya kunqunyulwa.
Psalms37:23 Ukunyathela kwelungisa kuqiniswa nguYehova, yaye uyakholiswa yindlela yakhe."
Psalms37:24 Nokuba ithe yawa, ayiyi kuqubuda isiqalekiso, kuba uYehova umxhasile ngesandla sayo."
Psalms37:25 Ndandimtsha, kungokunje ndimdala; Ke andizanga ndilibone ilungisa lishiywa, nembewu yalo ifuna isonka."
Psalms37:26 Uhlala ebabala, eboleka; yasikelelwa imbewu yakhe."
Psalms37:27 Suka ebubini, wenze okulungileyo; kwaye uhlale ngonaphakade."
Psalms37:28 Ngokuba uYehova uthanda okusesikweni, Angabashiyi abo bamthandayo; Ke yona imbewu yongendawo iya kutshabalala."
Psalms37:29 Amalungisa aya kuwudla ilifa umhlaba aze ahlale kuwo ngonaphakade.
Psalms37:30 Umlomo welungisa uxela ubulumko, Nolwimi lwalo luthetha okuthe tye."
Psalms37:31 Umyalelo woThixo walo usentliziyweni yalo; Akukho kunyathela kwakhe kuya kuhexa.
Psalms37:32 Ongendawo uyalikhangela ilungisa, afune ukulibulala;"
Psalms37:33 uYehova akayi kumyekela esandleni sakhe, angamgwebi ekugwetyweni kwakhe."
Psalms37:34 Thembela kuYehova, umqinise; Wokukhupha, ulidle ilifa ilizwe; ekutshatyalalisweni kongendawo uya kubona."
Psalms37:35 Ndithe ndakubona ukuba womelele, wazikhukula njengomthi wothuthu oluhlaza."
Psalms37:36 Wafa, nanko engasekho; ndamfuna, akafunyanwa."
Psalms37:37 Qonda ogqibeleleyo, ulikhangele ilungisa; Ngokuba izivela-mva zoxolo."
Psalms37:38 Ke bona abangendawo batshatyalaliswe kuphele; isiphelo sabangendawo sigqityiwe.
Psalms37:39 Usindiso lwamalungisa luphuma kuYehova; Uligorha labo ekuzalweni kwabo.
Psalms37:40 uYehova uya kubanceda, abasindise; Uya kubahlangula kongendawo, abasindise, Ngokuba bekholose ngaye."
Psalms38:1 (Indumiso kaDavide, isisikhumbuzo.) Yehova, musa ukundohlwaya unomsindo, musa ukundibetha ngomsindo."
Psalms38:2 Ngokuba zitshone kum iintolo zakho, Sandibetha isandla sakho."
Psalms38:3 Akukho mpilo enyameni yam, ngenxa yomsindo wakho; Akukho kuphumla emathanjeni am ngenxa yesono sam."
Psalms38:4 Ngokuba ubugwenxa bam bugqithile entlokweni yam; bandithwele njengomthwalo onzima.
Psalms38:5 Iyanuka, iyabola amanxeba am, Ngenxa yokumatha kwam."
Psalms38:6 Ndithingaza; Ndithobeke kakhulu; Ndiya kulila imini yonke.
Psalms38:7 Kuba amanqe am azele bububi, Akukho mzimba uphilileyo enyameni yam."
Psalms38:8 Ndithambile, ndityumkile kakhulu; Ndabhomboloza kukudana kwentliziyo yam."
Psalms38:9 Yehova, wonke umnqweno wam uphambi kwakho; akusithele kuwe ukuncwina kwam."
Psalms38:10 Intliziyo yam iphelile, ndiphelelwe ngamandla; nokukhanya kwamehlo am kuphelile kum."
Psalms38:11 Izithandane zam nezihlobo zam zikude nentlungu yam; abazalwana bam bema mgama.
Psalms38:12 Bandithiyele abafuna umphefumlo wam; Ke bona abangxamele ububi bam bathetha ububi, Bacinga inkohliso imini yonke."
Psalms38:13 Ke mna ndinjengesithulu, andiva; yaye ndaba njengesimumu esingawuvuli umlomo waso."
Psalms38:14 Ngoko ndaba njengongevayo, nomlomo ungevayo;"
Psalms38:15 Ngokuba ndikholose ngawe, Yehova; Uya kuva, Yehova, Thixo wam."
Psalms38:16 Ngenxa enokuba ndithi, Phulaphula kum, hleze bandivuyelele; Ekutyibilikeni konyawo lwam, bayandisukela."
Psalms38:17 Ngokuba ndizimisele ukuyeka, Umvandedwa wam uhleli unam."
Psalms38:18 Ngokuba ndiya kubuxela ububi bam; Ndiya kuzisola ngesono sam.
Psalms38:19 Ke zona iintshaba zam zihleli, zomelele;"
Psalms38:20 Abandibuyekeza ngobubi ngobubi, baziintshaba zam; kuba ndilandela okulungileyo."
Psalms38:21 Musa ukundishiya, Yehova, Thixo wam, musa ukubuya umva kum."
Psalms38:22 Khawuleza undincede, Yehova, lusindiso lwam."
Psalms39:1 KuYedutun; umhobe kaDavide. Ndiya kuwuvala umlomo wam, xa abangendawo bekunye nam."
Psalms39:2 Ndaba sisidenge, ndazola, ndazola, ndalungisa; nentlungu yam yashukuma."
Psalms39:3 Intliziyo yam iyaphuphuma, ndakukhumbula umlilo olenyayo; ndiye ndathetha ngolwimi lwam."
Psalms39:4 Ndazise, Yehova, isiphelo sam, nomlinganiso wemihla yam, ukuba injani na; ukuze ndazi ukuba ndibuthathaka kangakanani."
Psalms39:5 Yabona, uyenze imihla yam yangangobubanzi besandla; iminyaka yam ayinto yanto phambi kwakho; inene, wonke umntu ngamampunge awakhe amandla. Sela."
Psalms39:6 Inene, wonke umntu uhamba nomyalezo ongento; ewe, bakhwankqiswe ngamampunge; ehlanganisa ubutyebi, akazi nokuba ngubani na oya kububutha."
Psalms39:7 Ngoku ke ndilindele ntoni na, Nkosi yam? ithemba lam likuwe."
Psalms39:8 Ndisindise elukreqweni lwam lonke; sukundenza isidenge.
Psalms39:9 Ndisisidenge, umlomo wam andiwuvuli; ngokuba uyenzile."
Psalms39:10 Bususe kum ubugwenxa bakho; Ndinqamkile ngokubetha kwesandla sakho.
Psalms39:11 Wakumthethisa umntu ngenxa yobugwenxa, Nobuhle bakhe buphela njengengxokolo; Eneneni, wonke umntu akanaxabiso. Sela."
Psalms39:12 Yehova, wubekele indlebe umthandazo wam, ukubekele indlebe ukutarhuzisa kwam; Musa ukuthi cwaka kwiinyembezi zam; ngokuba ndingumphambukeli kuwe, ndilundwendwe njengooyihlo bonke."
Psalms39:13 Ndenzele inceba, ndihlaziyeke amandla am, ndingekamki apha, ndingabikho."
Psalms40:1 Ndithembele kuYehova; Wathoba kum, wakuva ukuzibika kwam."
Psalms40:2 Ubuye wandirhola emhadini woyikekayo, eludakeni, Wazimisa eliweni iinyawo zam, wazimisa iindlela zam."
Psalms40:3 Wabeka emlonyeni wam ingoma entsha, uzuko loThixo wethu; abaninzi baya kukubona oko, boyike, bakholose ngoYehova."
Psalms40:4 Hayi, uyolo lomntu okholose ngoYehova, ongahloneliyo abanekratshi, ongaguqukiyo ebuxokini."
Psalms40:5 Yehova, Thixo wam, mininzi imisebenzi yakho ebalulekileyo, oyenzileyo, neengcinga zakho kuthi; akuyi kubalelwa kuwe; ukubala."
Psalms40:6 Umbingelelo nomnikelo wokudla, akuwuthandanga; uzivulile iindlebe zam; Idini elinyukayo, nedini lesono, anilithandanga."
Psalms40:7 Ndathi, Yabona, ndiyeza; encwadini kubhalwe eyam;"
Psalms40:8 Ndiyakuvuyela ukwenza ukuthanda kwakho, Thixo wam; nomyalelo wakho usentliziyweni yam."
Psalms40:9 Ndithethe ubulungisa ebandleni elikhulu; Yabona, andiwuvala umlomo wam, Yehova, uyazi wena."
Psalms40:10 Ubulungisa bakho andibugqumanga phakathi kwentliziyo yam; Ndikwazisile ukuthembeka kwakho nosindiso lwakho; Andizange ndikufihlele inceba yakho nenyaniso yakho ebandleni elikhulu.
Psalms40:11 Yehova, musa ukukuvimba kum; Inceba yakho nokuthembeka kwakho kundigcine ngamaxesha onke."
Psalms40:12 Ngenxa yokuba ububi obungenakulinganiswa bundijikele; Buninzi kuneenwele zentloko yam; ke ngoko, intliziyo yam iyandilangazelela."
Psalms40:13 Ngamana uYehova wandisindisa; Nkosi, khawuleza undincede."
Psalms40:14 Mabadane kunye, babe neentloni abazungula umphefumlo wam ukuze bawutshabalalise; Mababuye umva, babe neentloni abandenze into embi."
Psalms40:15 Makabe nomsindo kubo ngenxa yehlazo labo abathi kum: “Kulungile ke!
Psalms40:16 Mababe nemihlali bavuye ngawe bonke abakufunayo; mabahlale bathethe abaluthandayo usindiso lwakho, besithi, Makabe mkhulu uYehova!"
Psalms40:17 Ke mna ndilusizana, ndilihlwempu; Noko ke, uYehova undikhumbule: Umncedi wam noMsindisi wam nguwe; Thixo wam, musa ukulibala."
Psalms41:1 Kumvumi, ingoma kaDavide."
Psalms41:2 uYehova uya kumgcina, amnike ubomi; Wosikelelwa yena ehlabathini, ungamnikeli ekuthandeni kweentshaba zakhe."
Psalms41:3 uYehova uya kumomeleza ezingqengqelweni zakhe zobubi;
Psalms41:4 Ndathi ke mna, Yehova, ndibabale; Philisa umphefumlo wam; kuba ndonile kuwe."
Psalms41:5 Iintshaba zam zithetha kakubi ngam, zisithi, Uya kufa nini na, lidake igama lakhe?"
Psalms41:6 Xa eze kundibona, uthetha ilize; uthi, ukuba uthe waphuma waya kwelasemzini."
Psalms41:7 Bathetha ngam bonke abandithiyayo; Bacinga ububi ngam.
Psalms41:8 Bathi, unamathele kukufa okubi; ngoku exokile, akasayi kuvuka."
Psalms41:9 Ewe, nomhlobo wam ebendikade ndimazi, ebendikholose ngaye, obesidla isonka sam, undiphakamisele isithende sakhe."
Psalms41:10 Kodwa wena, Yehova, yiba nenceba kum, ndikhokele, ndibuyele kubo."
Psalms41:11 Ndiyazi ngale nto ukuba uyandithanda, Ngokuba alundoyisi utshaba lwam."
Psalms41:12 Ke mna uya kundixhasa ngokuthembeka kwam, Undimisa phambi kwakho ngonaphakade."
Psalms41:13 Makabongwe uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, kususela kwaphakade kude kuse ephakadeni. Amen, kwaye Amen."
Psalms42:1 Kumvumi: yoonyana bakaKora;
Psalms42:2 Umphefumlo wam unxanela uThixo, uThixo ophilileyo;"
Psalms42:3 Iinyembezi zam zaba kukudla kwam imini nobusuku, Bakuthi kum imihla yonke, Uphi na uThixo wakho?"
Psalms42:4 Ndathi ndakuziqonda ezo zinto, ndiwuthulule umoya wam ngaphakathi kwam; ngenxa yokuba ndaya kukubona endlwini kaThixo, ndinezwi lovuyo nenguquko, nesihlwele esibhiyozayo."
Psalms42:5 Kungani na ukuba usibekeke, mphefumlo wam? kanti ukhathazekile ngam? Kholosa ngoThixo, ngokuba ndisaya kubuya ndibulele kuye, ngenxa yoncedo lobuso bakhe."
Psalms42:6 Thixo wam, umoya wam udandathekile phakathi kwam; ngako oko, ndiya kukukhumbula ezweni laseYordan, nasezintabeni zeHermon, endulini yeMisar."
Psalms42:7 Amanzi anzongonzongo abiza imithombo ngesandi semilambo yakho; Adlule phezu kwam onke amaza akho alwayo namaza alwayo.
Psalms42:8 Emini uYehova uya kuyiwisela umthetho inceba yakhe, Nasebusuku ukuvuma ingoma yakhe kunam, Nomthandazo wam kuThixo wobomi bam."
Psalms42:9 Ndithi ke kuThixo oyingxondorha yam, Yintoni na le nto undenzé yona? Ndiya kuzila na ngokuxina kotshaba?"
Psalms42:10 Njengomkhonto emathanjeni am, zindingcikiva iintshaba zam; Bathi kum imihla yonke, Uphi na uThixo wakho?"
Psalms42:11 Kungani na ukuba usibekeke, mphefumlo wam? kanti ukhathazekile ngam? Kholosa ngoThixo, ngokuba ndisaya kubuya ndibulele kuye, olusindiso lobuso bam, noThixo wam."
Psalms43:1 Lithethe ityala lam, Thixo, ngenxa yabantu abanobubi; Ndihlangule endodeni ekhohlisayo, enobutshinga."
Psalms43:2 Ngokuba unguThixo oyinqaba yam; undishiyelani? Ndiya kuzila na ngokuxina kotshaba?
Psalms43:3 Thumela ukukhanya kwakho nenyaniso yakho; mabandikhaphe; bazise entabeni yakho engcwele nasezintenteni zakho.
Psalms43:4 Ngoko ke ndiya kusondela esibingelelweni sikaThixo, kuThixo wovuyo lwam olukhulu; ewe, ndiya kubulela kuwe emnqubeni, Thixo wam."
Psalms43:5 Kungani na ukuba usibekeke, mphefumlo wam? kanti ukhathazekile ngam? Kholosa ngoThixo, ngokuba ndisaya kubuya ndibulele kuye, olusindiso lobuso bam, noThixo wam."
Psalms44:1 Kumvumi woonyana bakaKora, uMasgile. Thixo, sivile ngeendlebe zethu, ukuba oobawo basibalisela ngomsebenzi owawenzayo ngemihla yabo, kwamandulo."
Psalms44:2 Oko wazigqogqayo iintlanga ngesandla sakho, wabatyala bona; owabacinezelayo, wabagxotha abantu."
Psalms44:3 Kuba abazange balidle ilifa ilizwe ngekrele labo, nesandla sabo asibasindisanga, kodwa isandla sakho sasekunene nesandla sakho nokukhanya kobuso bakho, ngenxa yokuba wawunenceba kubo."
Psalms44:4 Nkosi yam, Thixo, misela uYakobi usindiso."
Psalms44:5 Siya kuzicinezela ngawe iintshaba zethu; egameni lakho siya kubanyathela abasukela phezulu kuthi.
Psalms44:6 Ngokuba andikholose ngesaphetha sam; Andisindiswanga nekrele lam.
Psalms44:7 Kodwa wena wasihlangula kwiintshaba zethu nakwabo bazihlazisayo iintshaba zethu.
Psalms44:8 Siya kubulela kuThixo yonke imihla, sidumise igama lakho ngonaphakade. Sela."
Psalms44:9 Ke usishiyile, wasihlazisa; kwaye ungayishiyi imikhosi yethu."
Psalms44:10 Uyatyeka ezintshabeni zethu, Abasithiyileyo baphange."
Psalms44:11 Wasinika njengeegusha ezidliwayo; Wasichithachitha ezintlangeni.
Psalms44:12 Wathengisa ngabantu bakho, akwazuza, Akwalinyusa ixabiso labo."
Psalms44:13 Usenze into elungcikivo kubamelwane bethu, Isigculelo kwabasingqongileyo."
Psalms44:14 Usenze intlekisa phakathi kweentlanga, sahlunguzela iintloko zethu phakathi kweentlanga."
Psalms44:15 Ihlazo lam liphambi kwam ngamaxesha onke, ukudana kobuso bam kugutyungelwe;"
Psalms44:16 Ngenxa yelizwi lomnyelisi nomhlebi; ngenxa yotshaba nomphindezeli.
Psalms44:17 Konke oko kwasihlela; kanti asikulibalanga, asenzanga buxoki emnqophisweni wakho."
Psalms44:18 Ayiphambukanga intliziyo yethu, Ukunyathela kwethu akuthanga gu bucala emendweni wakho;"
Psalms44:19 Nangona wasityumza kwilizwe leempungutye Wasigubungela ngethunzi lokufa.
Psalms44:20 Ukuba sililibele igama loThixo wethu, Sazolulela kuthixo wolunye uhlanga izandla zethu;"
Psalms44:21 Ngaba uThixo akayi kuyicikida na? ngokuba uyazazi izinto ezifihlakeleyo zentliziyo.
Psalms44:22 Ewe, ngenxa yakho sibulawa imini yonke; yiyo loo nto sesifana neegusha eziya kuxhelwa nje."
Psalms44:23 Vuka, ulele ntoni na, Nkosi? suk’ ume, ungasishiyi ngonaphakade."
Psalms44:24 Ubusitheliselani na ubuso bakho, Ukulibale ukubandezeleka kwethu, nokubandezeleka kwethu?"
Psalms44:25 Ngokuba umphefumlo wethu ubotshelelwe eluthulini, Izisu zethu zinamathele emhlabeni."
Psalms44:26 Yima, usincede, usihlangule ngenxa yenceba yakho."
Psalms45:1 Kumvumi kaSosannim, eyoonyana bakaKora; ingoma yothando lukaMasigiliya. Intliziyo yam ilungile; umbhali olungisiweyo."
Psalms45:2 Umhle yena ngaphezu koonyana babantu; Kuphalala inceba emlonyeni wakho; ke ngoko, uThixo akusikelele ngonaphakade."
Psalms45:3 Bhinqa ikrele lakho esinqeni sakho, Gorha, ngozuko nobukhulu bakho."
Psalms45:4 Ukhwele ebukhosini bakho, ngenxa yenyaniso, nobumsulwa, nobulungisa; esokunene sakho siya kukuyala izinto ezoyikekayo."
Psalms45:5 Iintolo zakho zitsolile entliziyweni yeentshaba zokumkani; ngazo baya kuwa abantu phantsi kwakho.
Psalms45:6 Itrone yakho, Thixo, ingunaphakade kanaphakade; Yintonga yobukumkani bakho yokwenene."
Psalms45:7 Uthanda ubulungisa, uthiye okungendawo; Ngenxa yoko, uThixo, uThixo wakho, ukuthambise Ngeoli yolonwabo ngaphezu kwabalingane bakho."
Psalms45:8 Zinevumba lemore nekasiya neengubo zakho zonke, Emabhotweni ophondo lwendlovu, ezikunanzileyo."
Psalms45:9 Iintombi zokumkani zibe phakathi kwabafazi bakho abazukileyo; Ukumkanikazi umi ngasekunene kwakho, Enxibe igolide yaseOfire."
Psalms45:10 Yiva, ntombi, uve, uthobe indlebe yakho; ululibale uhlanga lwakho nendlu kayihlo;"
Psalms45:11 uYehova wobunqwenela kunene ubunzwakazi bakho, ngokuba eyiNkosi yakho; niqubude kuye."
Psalms45:12 Intombi yaseTire iya kuba khona nesipho; nezityebi phakathi kweentlanga ziya kucela kuwe inceba.
Psalms45:13 Intle intombi yokumkani ngaphakathi, izambatho zayo ziyigolide engcwengiweyo."
Psalms45:14 Wosiwa kukumkani ambethe iingubo; Iintombi, amadlelane akhe amlandelayo, ziya kusiwa kuwe."
Psalms45:15 Baya kuziswa benovuyo novuyo; baya kungena endlwini yokumkani.
Psalms45:16 Endaweni yooyihlo kuya kubakho abantwana bakho, oya kubamisa babe ngabathetheli ehlabathini lonke."
Psalms45:17 Ndiya kukhunjulwa ngegama lakho kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana; ngenxa yoko ziya kukubonga iintlanga ngonaphakade kanaphakade.
Psalms46:1 Kumvumi woonyana bakaKora: Ingoma kaAlamoti. uThixo ulihlathi, uligwiba kuthi;"
Psalms46:2 Ke ngoko, asisayi koyika, nokuba umhlaba uyanyikima, kwanokuba iintaba zishenxisiwe embindini wolwandle;"
Psalms46:3 Ayagquma anyikima amanzi, Iintaba zizamazama ngenxa yokugquma kwawo. Sela."
Psalms46:4 Kukho umlambo, ophuma kuwo umzi kaThixo, oyingcwele yeminquba yOsenyangweni."
Psalms46:5 uThixo uphakathi kwawo; akayi kuxengaxenga: uThixo uya kumnceda, nakwangaphambili."
Psalms46:6 Zashukuma iintlanga, noorhulumente bashukunyiswa; Waliva ilizwi lakhe, lanyibilika ihlabathi."
Psalms46:7 uYehova wemikhosi unathi; Ingxonde yethu nguThixo kaYakobi. Sela.
Psalms46:8 Yizani niyibone imisebenzi kaYehova, intshabalalo ayenzileyo ehlabathini."
Psalms46:9 Ulophelisa iimfazwe kude kuse eziphelweni zehlabathi; waphula isaphetha, waphula umkhonto; inqwelo yokulwa uyitshise emlilweni."
Psalms46:10 Yekani, nazi ukuba ndinguThixo mna;"
Psalms46:11 uYehova wemikhosi unathi; Ingxonde yethu nguThixo kaYakobi. Sela.
Psalms47:1 Kumvumi, ingoma yoonyana bakaKora bhomboloza kuThixo ngezwi loloyiso."
Psalms47:2 Ngenxa yokuba uYehova, uMthetheleli owongamileyo uyoyikeka; UnguKumkani omkhulu wehlabathi lonke."
Psalms47:3 Uzinyathela phantsi kwethu iintlanga, nezizwe phantsi kweenyawo zethu;"
Psalms47:4 Uya kulingcwalisa ilifa lethu, Uzuko lukaYakobi awamthandayo. Sela."
Psalms47:5 uThixo uyenyuka eduma, uYehova enesandi sesigodlo."
Psalms47:6 Vumani nibonge uThixo, nibonge uThixo; vumani uhadi lweNkosi yethu, vumani iingoma."
Psalms47:7 Ngokuba uThixo yiNkosi yehlabathi lonke; ukuvuma iindumiso ngengqondo.
Psalms47:8 uThixo ulawula iintlanga, Ulohlala etroneni yakhe engcwele."
Psalms47:9 Bahlanganisene ookumkani bezizwe, ewe, uhlanga loThixo ka-Abraham, ngenxa yokuba iingweletshetshe zehlabathi zezikaThixo; uphakame kakhulu."
Psalms48:1 (Ingoma neendumiso zoonyana bakaKora.) uYehova mkhulu, ufanele ukudunyiswa kwisixeko soThixo wethu, entabeni yakhe engcwele."
Psalms48:2 Ilungile imeko, yimihlali yelimiweyo liphela, Intaba yaseZiyon yasentla, Umzi weNkosi enkulu."
Psalms48:3 uThixo ezingxandeni zakhe waziwa ukuba yingxonde.
Psalms48:4 Kuba nabo ookumkani babendawonye, bawela kunye;"
Psalms48:5 Bakubona ke oko, bakhwankqiswa; bayacaphuka, bakhawuleze."
Psalms48:6 Bangenwa luloyiko khona nentlungu enjengeyomfazi ozalayo.
Psalms48:7 Uzaphula ngomoya wasempumalanga iinqanawa zaseTarshishe.
Psalms48:8 Njengoko sikuvileyo, sibone kunjalo Emzini kaYehova wemikhosi, emzini woThixo wethu: uThixo uya kuwuzinzisa ngonaphakade. Sela."
Psalms48:9 Khumbula iinceba zakho, Thixo, etempileni yakho;"
Psalms48:10 Egameni lakho, Thixo, Injalo indumiso yakho, Yesa eziphelweni zehlabathi; Isandla sakho sokunene sizele bubulungisa."
Psalms48:11 Mayivuye intaba yaseZiyon, Zivuye iintombi zakwaYuda ngemigwebo yakho;"
Psalms48:12 Yijikelezeni iZiyon, niyijikeleze; yithiya iinqaba zakhe."
Psalms48:13 Khangela iinqaba zakhe, zigqale iingxande zakhe ezinde; ukuze ube nokuxela kwisizukulwana esilandelayo."
Psalms48:14 Kuba lo Thixo nguThixo wethu ngonaphakade kanaphakade: Uya kusikhokelela ekufeni.
Psalms49:1 Kumvumi, ingoma yoonyana bakaKora yivani, nonke bemi belimiweyo;"
Psalms49:2 Abaphantsi nabaphezulu, abazizityebi nabangamahlwempu kunye."
Psalms49:3 Umlomo wam uya kuthetha ubulumko; kwaye iingcinga zentliziyo yam ziya kukuqonda.
Psalms49:4 Ndiya kuyinqumla indlebe yam emzekelisweni; Ndiya kulivulela entsimbini ilizwi lam elimnyama.
Psalms49:5 Ndoyikelani na emihleni yobubi, Xa ubugwenxa babandibambisayo bujikelezile?"
Psalms49:6 Abo bakholose ngobutyebi babo, nozuko lwabo ngobuninzi bobutyebi;"
Psalms49:7 Akukho namnye unako ukumkhulula ngentlawulelo umzalwana wakhe, angamnikeli uThixo intlawulelo ngaye."
Psalms49:8 (Ngokuba usindiso lwemiphefumlo yabo lubalulekile, luhlala ngonaphakade.)"
Psalms49:9 ukuze ahlale ngonaphakade, angayiboni intshabalalo."
Psalms49:10 Kuba uyabona ukuba izilumko ziyafa, nesidenge nomgxeki bayatshabalala baze bayishiyele abanye indyebo yabo."
Psalms49:11 Iingcinga zabo ezingaphakathi zezokuba izindlu zabo zihlala kude kuse ephakadeni, neendawo zabo zokuhlala ukusuka kwesinye isizukulwana kuye kwesinye; amazwe azo bawabiza ngamagama."
Psalms49:12 Ke yena obekekileyo akahlali; nifana nezilwanyana ezitshabalalayo.
Psalms49:13 Yiyo le indlela yabo, nokumatha kwabo, nembewu yabo ivumelana namazwi abo. Sela."
Psalms49:14 Babuthe ngokweegusha emangcwabeni; ukufa kuya kubondla; yaye amalungisa aya kubalawula ngomso; nobuhle babo buya kutshatyalaliswa kwelabafileyo, bungabikho ebudodeni babo."
Psalms49:15 Kodwa uThixo uya kuwuhlangula umphefumlo wam emandleni eHadesi, ngenxa yokuba uya kundamkela. Sela."
Psalms49:16 Musani ukoyika ukuba umntu uthe waba sisityebi, yande indlu yakhe;"
Psalms49:17 Kuba xa ithe yafa, ayisayi kuthabatha nto; abuyi kuhla emva kwakhe uzuko lwakhe."
Psalms49:18 Nangona wawusikelela umphefumlo wakhe ngoxa wayesaphila, yaye abantu baya kukudumisa xa uthe wazenzela okulungileyo."
Psalms49:19 Uya kuya esizweni sooyise; abayi kukubona ukukhanya kwemini.
Psalms49:20 Umntu obekekileyo, ongaqondiyo, ufana nezilwanyana ezitshabalalayo."
Psalms50:1 (Iindumiso ka-Asafu.) Uthethile uYehova, uThixo oligorha, ebiza elimiweyo ethabathela empumalanga ese entshonalanga."
Psalms50:2 eZIyon, ubuhle obugqibeleleyo, uThixo ubengezela."
Psalms50:3 uThixo wethu uyeza, akayi kuthi tu; umlilo uya kuvutha kufuphi naso, uvutha macala onke."
Psalms50:4 Uya kulibiza izulu phezulu, nehlabathi, ukuba ligwebe phakathi kwabantu bakhe."
Psalms50:5 Bahlanganiseleni kum abam benceba; owanqophisana nam ngamadini.
Psalms50:6 Izulu lixela ubulungisa bakhe, Ngokuba uThixo ngumgwebi. Sela."
Psalms50:7 Phulaphulani, bantu bam, ndithethe; Sirayeli, ndiyangqina ngawe, ndithi, NdinguThixo, uThixo wakho."
Psalms50:8 Andiyi kunikhalimela ngenxa yeminikelo yenu okanye iminikelo yenu etshiswayo ebiphambi kwam ngamaxesha onke.
Psalms50:9 Andiyi kuthabatha nanye inkunzi yenkomo endlwini yakho, kwanenkunzi yebhokhwe esibayeni sakho."
Psalms50:10 Ngokuba zezam zonke iinyamakazi zehlathi, Neenkomo ezisezintabeni eziliwaka."
Psalms50:11 Zonke iintaka zasezintabeni ndiyazazi, namarhamncwa asendle ngawam."
Psalms50:12 Ukuba bendilambile, ndibe ndingayi kukuxelela; ngokuba lelam elimiweyo nenzaliseko yalo."
Psalms50:13 Ndidle inyama yeenkunzi eziziimbalasane na? Ndisele igazi leenkunzi zeebhokhwe na?
Psalms50:14 Bulelani kuThixo; uze uzalisekise imbopheleleko yakho kOyena Uphakamileyo.
Psalms50:15 Undibize ngemini yembandezelo, Ndiya kukusindisa, undizukise."
Psalms50:16 Ke kongendawo uthi uThixo, Wothini na ukuyixela intetho yam, Uwuthabathe ngomlomo wakho umnqophiso wam?"
Psalms50:17 ngenxa yokuba uluthiyile uqeqesho, wawaphosa emva kwakho amazwi am."
Psalms50:18 Xa ubona isela, uvumelana nalo, ukrexeza;"
Psalms50:19 Umlomo wakho uwuyekela ebubini, Nolwimi lwakho lufunga inkohliso;"
Psalms50:20 Uthi uhlale uthethe ngomzalwana wakho; uyanyelisa unyana kanyoko.
Psalms50:21 Uzenzile ezo nto, ndathi tu; Ubusithi ndifana nawe kodwa ndikukhalimele, ndikuqeqeshe phambi kwakho."
Psalms50:22 Khanive, nina bamlibalayo uThixo, ukuze ndinganiqwengi, kungabikho unihlangulayo."
Psalms50:23 Lowo uzisa uzuko uyandizukisa; lowo uyikhokelayo indlela yakhe ndiya kumazisa usindiso lukaThixo.
Psalms51:1 Eyokuvuma ingoma kaDavide, ekuzeni kukaNatan umprofeti kuye, wangena uBhatshebha ngobuninzi benceba yakho, ndikhulule elukreqweni lwam."
Psalms51:2 Ndihlambulule ebugwenxeni bam, Ndihlambulule esonweni sam."
Psalms51:3 Ngokuba ndiyalwazi mna ukreqo lwam, Nesono sam siphambi kwam ngamaxesha onke."
Psalms51:4 Ndonile kuwe wedwa, ndenzé ububi emehlweni akho, ukuze ube lilungisa ekuthetheni kwakho, ube lilungisa ekugwebeni kwakho."
Psalms51:5 Yabona, mna ndidalelwe ebugwenxeni; ukanti umama undamkele esonweni."
Psalms51:6 Qaphela, unqwenela inyaniso ngaphakathi, kwaye uya kufunda ubulumko emfihlekweni."
Psalms51:7 Ndihlambulule ngehisope, ndihlambuluke; Ndihlambe, ndibe mhlophe kunekhephu;"
Psalms51:8 Mandingabi naluvuyo novuyo; ukuze amathambo asibhozo abe nemihlali.
Psalms51:9 Sithelisa ubuso bakho ezonweni zam, uzicime zonke izono zam."
Psalms51:10 Dala, Thixo, intliziyo ehlambulukileyo; uhlaziye umoya onobulungisa phakathi kwam."
Psalms51:11 Musa ukundilahla ebusweni bakho; yaye musa ukuwususa kum umoya wakho oyingcwele.
Psalms51:12 Buyisela uvuyo losindiso lwakho; kwaye undixhase ngomoya wakho okhululekileyo.
Psalms51:13 Ndobafundisa abangendawo iindlela zakho; baya kubuyela kuwe aboni.
Psalms51:14 Thixo, Thixo ongumsindisi wam, ndihlangule etyaleni legazi, Logcoba ulwimi lwam ngobulungisa bakho."
Psalms51:15 Yehova, vula umlomo wam; Nomlomo wam uya kuxela indumiso yakho."
Psalms51:16 Ngokuba akufuni mbingelelo; kungenjalo bendiya kunikela ngayo. Anikholiswanga lidini elinyukayo.
Psalms51:17 Imibingelelo kaThixo ngumoya owaphukileyo; intliziyo eyaphukileyo, eyaphukileyo, Thixo, akuyi kuyidela."
Psalms51:18 Yenzele okulungileyo iZiyon; zakha iindonga zeYerusalem.
Psalms51:19 Kwandule ukuyonwabela imibingelelo yobulungisa, amadini anyukayo, namadini anyukayo; Uze wenze idini ngenkunzi yenkomo esibingelelweni sakho."
Psalms52:1 Uqhayiselani na ngobubi, wena gorha? Inceba kaThixo ikho imihla yonke."
Psalms52:2 Ulwimi lwakho luthetha kakubi; njengencakuba ebukhali esebenza ngobuqhetseba.
Psalms52:3 Uthanda okubi kunokulungileyo; kunye nokuxoka endaweni yokuthetha inyaniso. Sela.
Psalms52:4 Uthanda onke amazwi atshabalalisayo, Lulwimindini lunenkohliso."
Psalms52:5 uThixo uya kukutshabalalisa kuphele; Uya kukuthabatha akukhuphe endaweni ohlala kuyo, akutshabalalise ezweni labaphilileyo. Sela."
Psalms52:6 Ke wona amalungisa aya kubona, oyike, amhleke;"
Psalms52:7 Yabona, ngumntu lowo uThixo angamnikiyo amandla akhe; ke wakholosa ngobuninzi bobutyebi bakhe, womelela ebubini bakhe."
Psalms52:8 Ke mna ndinjengomnquma oluhlaza endlwini kaThixo; Ndikholose ngenceba kaThixo ngamaxesha onke, kanaphakade."
Psalms52:9 Ndiya kubulela kuwe ngonaphakade, ngokuba ukwenzile oku; kwaye ndiya kulithemba igama lakho; ngokuba kuhle kwabangcwele bakho."
Psalms53:1 Eyokuqiqa kaMahalate, ethi: iMaskili, umbongo kaDavide. Sathi ke igeza entliziyweni yalo, Akukho Thixo. Bonakalisile, benze amasikizi; akukho wenza okulungileyo."
Psalms53:2 uThixo uqondele esemazulwini, Uqondele koonyana babantu, Ukubona ukuba ukho na onengqondo, Oquqela kuThixo."
Psalms53:3 Babuya umva elowo; bangcole ngokupheleleyo; Akukho wenza okulungileyo, eyedwa."
Psalms53:4 Abanakwazi na abenzi bokubi? abathi badle abantu bam xa badla isonka; babengababizeli kuThixo.
Psalms53:5 Oyika kakhulu apho kungekho loyiko, ngenxa yokuba uThixo wayewathi saa amathambo alowo wayemise inkampu nxamnye nani; ubadanisile, ngokuba uThixo ubadanisile."
Psalms53:6 Ukuba beluphuma eZiyon usindiso lukaSirayeli! Xa uThixo ebuyisela abantu bakhe ukuthinjwa, uya kuvuya uYakobi noSirayeli."
Psalms54:1 Kumvumi waseNeginoti, uMaskili, ingoma kaDavide, ekuzeni kweZifi kuSawule, zisithi, uDavide akasimemele na kuthi? amandla."
Psalms54:2 Thixo, yiva umthandazo wam; yibekeleni indlebe intetho yomlomo wam."
Psalms54:3 Kuba abasemzini basukele phezulu kum, nabacinezeli bafuna umphefumlo wam; abambekanga uThixo phambi kwabo. Sela."
Psalms54:4 Yabona, uThixo ngumncedi wam; uYehova unabo bawuxhasayo umphefumlo wam."
Psalms54:5 Uya kubuyekeza ngobubi iintshaba zam; batshabalele enyanisweni yakho.
Psalms54:6 Ndithanda ukuzinikela kuwe ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo; Ndiyakuthanda ukudumisa igama lakho, Yehova; ngokuba ilungile."
Psalms54:7 Ngokuba undihlangule kuzo zonke iimbandezelo, Neliso lam libone ikhwele labandibandezelayo."
Psalms55:1 Kumvumi waseNeginoti, uMaskile, umhobe kaDavide musa ukuwufihla umthandazo wam."
Psalms55:2 Ndibekeleni indlebe, nindiphulaphule; Ndiyalila ngokulila kwam, ndikhupha ilizwi;"
Psalms55:3 Ngenxa yelizwi lotshaba, ngenxa yokuxinzelelwa phantsi ngabangendawo; Ngokuba bandiqengqela ubutshinga, Bandithiya ngomsindo."
Psalms55:4 Intliziyo yam iyazibhijabhija phakathi kwam, Izothuso zokufa zindiphethe."
Psalms55:5 Ndafikelwa lunkwantyo nokungcangcazela, ndafikelwa kukuxhalaba."
Psalms55:6 Ndathi, Ukuba bendinamaphiko njengehobe! ngokuba bendiya kubhabha ndiphumle."
Psalms55:7 Yabona, bendiya kubalekela kude, ndihlale entlango; Sela."
Psalms55:8 Bendiya kukhawuleza, ndisinde Emoyeni ovuthuzayo nasesiphangweni;"
Psalms55:9 Yehova, batshabalele, banqumla ulwimi lwabo, ngokuba ndibone ubutshinga bokuxabana phakathi komzi."
Psalms55:10 Imini nobusuku bawujikeleza ngeenxa zonke iindonga zawo; kukho ububi nobuhlwempu kuyo.
Psalms55:11 Ubuvila bukuyo; ubuqhophololo nenkohliso azishiyi ezitratweni zayo.
Psalms55:12 Ngokuba asilutshaba olu lundithethisayo; ke bendizokwazi ukunxiba; ingabi ngothiyayo, lowo uzidlayo kum; kulapho ngendimfihle khona."
Psalms55:13 Kodwa nguwe, intanga yam, umhlobo wam, nomhlobo wam;"
Psalms55:14 Samkela icebiso elihle kunye saza saya kunye endlwini kaThixo.
Psalms55:15 Makubafikelwe kukufa, Mabehle baye kwelabafileyo besaphilile; ngokuba ububi busemizini yabo naphakathi kwabo."
Psalms55:16 Mna ke, ndiya kubhenela kuThixo; yaye uYehova uya kundihlangula."
Psalms55:17 Ndiya kuthandaza ngokuvakalayo ebusuku nakusasa nasemini enkulu, yaye uya kuliva ilizwi lam."
Psalms55:18 Wawusindisa umphefumlo wam unoxolo, ekulweni kwabo nxamnye nam, ngokuba bebaninzi kum."
Psalms55:19 uThixo uya kuva, abacinezele, ohleli kumaxesha amandulo. Sela. Ngenxa yokuba abananguquko, ngoko abamoyiki uThixo."
Psalms55:20 Wazolulela izandla zakhe kwababenoxolo naye; Wawaphula umnqophiso wakhe.
Psalms55:21 Ubuthelezi amazwi omlomo wabo, Ke yimfazwe entliziyweni yakhe; Amazwi akhe ayekhanye ngaphezu kweoli, likrele elibukhali."
Psalms55:22 Umthwalo wakho wulahlele kuYehova, yaye yena wokuxhasa; Akayi kuliyekela ilungisa lishukunyiswe."
Psalms55:23 Wena ke, Thixo, uya kubahlisela emngxunyeni wesihogo; kodwa ndikholose ngawe."
Psalms56:1 Iculo likaYonatarokokim, uMikitam kaDavide, ekumthimbeni kwakhe amaFilisti eGati. Osilwa imini yonke uyanditshutshisa."
Psalms56:2 Iintshaba zam bezindidla yonke imini, Ngokuba baninzi abalwa nam, Wena usenyangweni."
