Psalms56:3 Nokuba ndinkwantya kangakanani na, ndiya kukuthemba;"
Psalms56:4 Ndiya kulidumisa ilizwi likaThixo, Ndikholose ngoThixo; Andiyi koyika ukuba inyama inokundenza ntoni na."
Psalms56:5 Imihla yonke bayawachitha amazwi am; zonke iingcinga zabo zindichasile.
Psalms56:6 Baqhubile, bayasithela, Babonisela ukunyathela kwam, Ngokokuba belinde umphefumlo wam."
Psalms56:7 Baya kusinda na ngobugqwetha? Bahlise ngomsindo, Thixo abantu;"
Psalms56:8 Ukubhadula kwam unokuxela, Iinyembezi zam uziphalazela esityeni sakho; Ayikho encwadini yakho na?"
Psalms56:9 Ekubizeni kwam kuwe, zobuya zibuye iintshaba zam; endikwaziyo; ngokuba uThixo unam."
Psalms56:10 Ndilidumisa ngoThixo ilizwi lakhe, Ndilidumisa ngoYehova ilizwi."
Psalms56:11 Ndikholose ngoThixo, ndingoyiki;"
Psalms56:12 Thixo, isithembiso sakho siphezu kwam; ndiya kukubonga."
Psalms56:13 Ngokuba uwuhlangule ekufeni umphefumlo wam; Akuyi kuzikhulula na iinyawo zam ekukhubekeni, Ukuba ndihambe phambi koThixo ekukhanyeni kobomi?"
Psalms57:1 Kumvumi, uAletaschithe, uMictam kaDavide, ekubalekeni kwakhe uSawule emqolombeni. Ndiya kusabela emaphikweni de ezi ntlekele ziphele."
Psalms57:2 Ndinqula uThixo Osenyangweni; kuThixo ondenzela yonke into.
Psalms57:3 Uya kuthuma esemazulwini, andisindise ehlazweni lalowo uthanda ukuginya. Sela. uThixo uya kuthuma inceba yakhe nenyaniso yakhe."
Psalms57:4 Umphefumlo wam usezingonyameni; ndiya kulala phantsi kwabatshileyo emlilweni, Koonyana babantu abamazinyo aziintshuntshe neentolo, Abalulwimi lulikrele elibukhali."
Psalms57:5 Ziphakamise ngaphezu kwezulu, Thixo; Uzuko lwakho malube phezu kwehlabathi lonke."
Psalms57:6 Bawuthiyele umgibe ukunyathela kwam; umoya wam ulahlekile; bemba umngxuma phambi kobuso bam, bawela kuwo. Sela."
Psalms57:7 Izimasekile intliziyo yam, Thixo, izimasekile intliziyo yam, Ndithanda ukucula nokudumisa."
Psalms57:8 Khawusuk’ ume, nkosi yam; vuka, luhadi nohadi; Ndiya kuvuka kusasa."
Psalms57:9 Ndiya kubulela kuwe, Yehova, phakathi kweentlanga; phakathi kwezizwe ndiyathanda ukucula kuwe."
Psalms57:10 Ngokuba inkulu yesa ezulwini, inceba yakho, yesa esibhakabhakeni ukuthembeka kwakho."
Psalms57:11 Ziphakamise ngaphezu kwezulu, Thixo; Ngamana uzuko lwaKho lube ngaphezu kwehlabathi lonke."
Psalms58:1 Kumvumi, Altaschithe, Miktame van Davida. Nigweba ngobulungisa na, nyana babantu?"
Psalms58:2 Ewe, wenza ububi entliziyweni yakho; Ubulinganisa ububi bezandla zakho ehlabathini."
Psalms58:3 Abangendawo bahlukanisiwe kwasesizalweni; ezelwe, balahleka, bathethe ubuxoki."
Psalms58:4 Ubuhlungu babo bunjengobuhlungu benyoka;
Psalms58:5 abo bangaliphulaphuliyo ilizwi lezazi, ababanga nako ukumamela ngobu bulumko;"
Psalms58:6 Thixo, uwaphule, Yehova, amazinyo abo emlonyeni wabo, Wawaphule amazinyo amakhulu eengonyama."
Psalms58:7 Mabanyibilike njengamanzi aqukuqelayo; Akusityeda isaphetha sakhe ekutoleni ngeentolo zakhe, mazibe ziingceba."
Psalms58:8 Ngamnye kubo makadlule njengodongwe olunyibilikayo, njengomfazi ozalayo, ukuze bangaliboni ilanga."
Psalms58:9 Zingekaveli iinkuni iimbiza zakho, uya kuzisusa njengesaqhwithi, besadla ubomi ngomsindo wakhe."
Psalms58:10 Abanoyolo abalungileyo, xa ebona impindezelo; iinyawo zakhe uya kuzihlamba egazini labangendawo."
Psalms58:11 Ngoko uthile uya kuthi: “Eneneni, kukho umvuzo welungisa; Inene, nguThixo ogwebayo ihlabathi."
Psalms59:1 EyokuQala kweemvumi, kaAltaskite, kaMikitam kaDavide, ekuthumeleni kukaSawule, ukuba bayigcine indlu kumbulali. Thixo wam, ndihlangule ezintshabeni zam;"
Psalms59:2 Ndihlangule kwabenzi bobubi, Ndihlangule ebantwini bamagazi."
Psalms59:3 Kuba, yabonani, bawondla umphefumlo wam; kungekhona ngenxa yokunxaxha okanye isono sam, Yehova."
Psalms59:4 Bagidime balungisa, andinatyala; sukuma, undincede, ubone;"
Psalms59:5 Wena Yehova, Thixo wemikhosi, Thixo kaSirayeli, khawusuk’ ume, uzivelele zonke iintlanga; uze ungamcongi nabani na ongendawo. Sela."
Psalms59:6 Babuya ngokuhlwa, beduma njengenja, bewujikeleza umzi."
Psalms59:7 Yabona, ziyaxokozela ngemilomo yazo; amakrele asemlonyeni wabo; kuba bathi, Kuva bani na?"
Psalms59:8 Ke wena, Yehova, uya kubahleka; niya kuzigculela zonke iintlanga."
Psalms59:9 Ngenxa yamandla akhe ndithembele kuwe, Ngokuba uThixo ulihlathi lam."
Psalms59:10 uThixo wam uya kundikhawulela ngenceba yam; uThixo uya kundibonisa oko ndikunqwenelayo ezintshabeni zam.
Psalms59:11 Musa ukubabulala, ukuze bangalibaleki abantu bam; Bachithachithe ngamandla akho; Banike elabafileyo, Nkosi, ngweletshetshe yethu."
Psalms59:12 Ngenxa yesono somlomo wabo, nangenxa yelizwi lomlomo wabo, mabaqhayise ngekratshi labo, nangenxa yesiqalekiso nobuxoki;"
Psalms59:13 Babhangise ngomsindo, batshabalalise, bangabikho; bazi ukuba uThixo ulawula noYakobi, wesa eziphelweni zehlabathi. Sela."
Psalms59:14 Mababuye ngokuhlwa; mababhomboloze okwenja, bahambe nomzi."
Psalms59:15 Mababhadule befuna ukudla, Babhadule ukuba abahluthanga."
Psalms59:16 Ke mna ndiya kuvuma ngamandla akho; ewe, ngomso ndiya kuvuma ngenceba yakho, Kuba ubuyingxonde kum, nehlathi lam ngemini yokubandezelwa kwam."
Psalms59:17 Uligwiba lam, ndikubethela uhadi, ungamandla am, ngokuba uThixo ulihlathi lam, unguThixo onenceba."
Psalms60:1 Kumvumi waseShushaneduti, uMictam kaDavide, ukuba afundise; Ekubambeni kwakhe nama-Aramna-Harayim nama-Aramesobha, ekubuyeni kukaYowabhi, wabulala ishumi elinamabini lamawaka amaEdom kwiNtlambo yeTyuwa. Thixo, usilahlile! Usichithachithe, unomsindo; Jikela kuthi kwakhona."
Psalms60:2 Ulinyikimisile ihlabathi; Uwaphule; Philisa ukwaphuka kwayo; kuba iyangcangcazela.
Psalms60:3 Ubaxelele abantu bakho izinto ezilukhuni, Usiseze iwayini emnandi;"
Psalms60:4 Ubanike ibhanile abakoyikayo, Ukuba bayiphakamise ngenxa yenyaniso. Sela."
Psalms60:5 Ukuze lowo umthandayo asindiswe; Sindisa ngesandla sakho sokunene, undive."
Psalms60:6 uThixo uthethe engcwele; Ndiya kumemelela uShekem, ndiyilinganisele intili yaseSukoti."
Psalms60:7 Ngowam uGiliyadi, ngowam uManase; uEfrayim sisigwiba sentloko yam; uYuda umazi womyalelo wam;"
Psalms60:8 uMowabhi sisitya sam; Ndiyiphosa kwaEdom imbadada yam; Filistiya, uloyiso lwam;"
Psalms60:9 Ngubani na owondisa emzini onqatyisiweyo? ngubani na owondikhaphela kwaEdom?
Psalms60:10 Thixo, akufuni na oko sikulahlekeleyo? Akuphumanga na wena, Thixo, nemikhosi yethu?"
Psalms60:11 Sincede ekubandezelekeni kwethu, ngokuba uncedo lomntu luyinto engento."
Psalms60:12 NgoThixo siya kwenza ngenkalipho, kuba yena uya kuzinyhasha iintshaba zethu."
Psalms61:1 Kumvumi kaNegina, Ingoma kaDavide wubazele indlebe umthandazo wam."
Psalms61:2 Ndiya kudanduluka kuwe ndiseziphelweni zehlabathi, ekukhwankqisweni kwentliziyo yam; ndise eweni eliphezu kwam."
Psalms61:3 Ngokuba ulihlathi lam, Uyinqaba ende eliqele phambi kotshaba."
Psalms61:4 Ndiya kuhlala ententeni yakho ngonaphakade; Ndizimela ngesithe lamaphiko akho. Sela.
Psalms61:5 Ngokuba wena, Thixo, usivile isibhambathiso sam; Ubanike ilifa abaloyikayo igama lakho."
Psalms61:6 Uya kuyolula imihla yobomi bokumkani, neminyaka yakhe njengezizukulwana ngezizukulwana;"
Psalms61:7 Uya kuphila ngonaphakade phambi koThixo; Mlungisele inceba nenyaniso, amkhusele."
Psalms61:8 Ngoko ndiya kulibethela uhadi igama lakho ngonaphakade, Ndizizalise izibhambathiso zam yonke imihla."
Psalms62:1 EkaYedutun umhobe kaDavide. Ewe, umphefumlo wam ulindele kuThixo, usindiso lwam luvela kuye."
Psalms62:2 Nguye yedwa iliwa lam, umsindisi wam; ulihlathi lam; Andizushukuma kakhulu."
Psalms62:3 Kunini na niceba ububi emntwini? niya kubulawa nonke; njengodonga olugotywayo, nanjengothango oludilikayo."
Psalms62:4 Babhunga ke ngokumphosa phezulu; banandipha ubuxoki; basikelela ngomlomo, kanti embilinini bayatshabhisa. Sela."
Psalms62:5 Thozamela kuThixo yedwa, mphefumlo wam; ngokuba ithemba lam livela kuye."
Psalms62:6 Nguye yedwa iliwa lam, umsindisi wam; ulihlathi lam; Andiyi kushukuma."
Psalms62:7 KuThixo usindiso lwam nozuko lwam;
Psalms62:8 Kholosani ngaye ngamaxesha onke; Phalazani intliziyo yenu phambi kwakhe, zintlanga; Sela."
Psalms62:9 Okwenene, abantu abaphantsi bangamampunge, nabaphakamileyo bangamanga;"
Psalms62:10 Musani ukukholosa ngokucudisa, ningalambathi nento ephangiweyo; yakwanda ubutyebi, musa ukuyibekela ntliziyo yona."
Psalms62:11 uThixo wathetha kwakanye; Ndaliva kabini; la mandla ngakaThixo.
Psalms62:12 Nenceba yeyakho, Nkosi; ngokuba uyababuyekeza elowo ngokomsebenzi wakhe."
Psalms63:1 Ingoma kaDavide, oko wayesentlango yakwaYuda. Thixo, unguThixo wam; Ndiya kuquqela kuwe kwakusasa; umphefumlo wam ukungxamele, inyama yam inxanelwe ezweni elingumqwebedu, elibharhileyo, elingenamanzi;"
Psalms63:2 ukuba ndiwabone amandla akho nobuqaqawuli bakho, njengoko ndakubonayo usendaweni engcwele."
Psalms63:3 Ngokuba inceba yakho ilungile ngaphezu kobomi, Umlomo wam uya kukudumisa."
Psalms63:4 Ndiya kukubonga lo gama ndidla ubomi, Ndiphakamise izandla zam egameni lakho."
Psalms63:5 Umphefumlo wam uhluthi njengomongo namanqatha; nomlomo wam uya kukudumisa ngemilebe yovuyo.
Psalms63:6 Ndithi ndakukhumbula esililini sam, ndikukhumbule emlindweni wasebusuku."
Psalms63:7 Ngokuba uluncedo lwam, ngenxa yoko ndidlamkile esithunzini samaphiko akho."
Psalms63:8 Umphefumlo wam uyakulangazelela, isandla sakho sokunene siyandixhasa."
Psalms63:9 Kwaye abo bafuna ukutshabalalisa umphefumlo wam baya kuya kwiindawo ezisezantsi zomhlaba.
Psalms63:10 Baya kuwa likrele; siya kuba sisabelo seempungutye.
Psalms63:11 Ke yena ukumkani uya kuvuya ngoThixo; Othetha ubuxoki uya kuqhayisa; Ke wona umlomo wabaxokayo uya kuvinjwa.
Psalms64:1 Thixo, yiva izwi lam emthandazweni wam, londoloza ubomi bam, ndingaloyiki utshaba."
Psalms64:2 Ndisithelise egquguleni labangendawo; Ngokukreqa kwabenzi bobubi;
Psalms64:3 abalola ulwimi lwabo njengomkhonto, abalola izaphetha zabo, ukuze bazingele ngeentolo, amazwi akrakra;"
Psalms64:4 Batole abagqibeleleyo ngasese; ziluse ngequbuliso, zingankwantyi."
Psalms64:5 Bazomelezela ububi; Athi: Ngubani oza kubabona?
Psalms64:6 Baphengulula ubutshinga; Baphengulula bechwayitile: Iingcamango neentliziyo zabo zinzulu.
Psalms64:7 Ke yena uThixo uya kubatola ngotolo; baya kwenzakala ngephanyazo.
Psalms64:8 Kwaye baya kuluyekela phezu kwabo ulwimi lwabo, basabe bonke abababonayo."
Psalms64:9 Basuka boyike bonke, bawuvakalise umsebenzi kaThixo; ngokuba baya kuyiqiqa imisebenzi yakhe;"
Psalms64:10 Ilungisa liya kuvuya ngoYehova, likholose ngaye; baya kuqhayisa bonke abantliziyo zithe tye."
Psalms65:1 Kumvumi, iNgoma kaDavide. Thixo, yindumiso kuwe, Thixo, sifezeke kuwe isifungo."
Psalms65:2 Wena uwuvayo umthandazo, yonke inyama iya kuza kuwe."
Psalms65:3 Bundoyisile ubugwenxa; Cima ukreqo lwethu;
Psalms65:4 Hayi, uyolo lomntu omnyulileyo, wamvumela ukuba eze kuwe, ukuba ahlale ezintendelezweni zakho; Siya kwaneliswa kukulunga kwendlu yakho, kwetempile yakho engcwele."
Psalms65:5 Usiphendula ngezenzo ezoyikekayo zobulungisa, Thixo osisindisayo; elilithemba leziphelo zonke zehlabathi, nelaseziphelweni zolwandle;"
Psalms65:6 Ulobopha iintaba ngamandla akhe; uzibophelele ngamandla ku:
Psalms65:7 ulodambisa isandi solwandle, isandi samaza alo, nokuxokozela kwabantu;"
Psalms65:8 Nabahleli ekupheleni bayoyika imiqondiso yakho; Uyakonwabela ukuphuma ekuseni nangokuhlwa.
Psalms65:9 Uyawuvelela umhlaba, uwunyakamise; Uwutyebisa kakhulu ngomlambo kaThixo ozele ngamanzi; Ubalungisela ingqolowa ukuba ubalungiselele."
Psalms65:10 Uyawankcenkceshela amathambeka ayo, Uyawaqinisa amaqukuqela awo; Uwuthambisa ngemvula; Uyayisikelela ihlumelo layo."
Psalms65:11 Iwudumisa umnyaka ngesithsaba sokulunga kwakho; kwaye iindlela zakho zivuza amanqatha.
Psalms65:12 Ziwa emakriweni asemathafeni, Iinduli zigcobe ngeenxa zonke."
Psalms65:13 Amakriwa anxibe iinkomo; neentili zigutyungelwe yingqolowa; bamemelela ngovuyo, kananjalo bavuma ingoma."
Psalms66:1 Kukumkani weemvumi, Ingoma, nokuba yingoma;"
Psalms66:2 Libetheleni uhadi igama lakhe, mdumiseni indumiso yakhe."
Psalms66:3 Yithini kuThixo, Hayi, ilishwa ngezenzo zakho! ngenxa yobukhulu bamandla akho ziya kuhanahanisa kuwe iintshaba zakho."
Psalms66:4 Lonke ihlabathi liya kukunqula, Bakubethele uhadi; baya kulibethela uhadi igama lakho. Sela."
Psalms66:5 Yizani, nibone imisebenzi kaThixo, Eyoyikekayo ngezenzo zakhe koonyana babantu."
Psalms66:6 Waluguqula ulwandle lwayinto eyomileyo, bawuwela umlambo ngeenyawo; apho savuya ngaye."
Psalms66:7 Ulolawula ngobugorha bakhe ngonaphakade; amehlo akhe akhangele ezintlangeni; Abawexuki abafanele babe nekratshi. Sela.
Psalms66:8 Bizani kuThixo wethu, zintlanga, livakalise ilizwi lakhe;"
Psalms66:9 Ulodlisa ubomi bethu, Olungazivumeli lukhubekise unyawo lwethu."
Psalms66:10 Ngokuba usicikidile, Thixo; Usinyibilikisile njengokunyibilikiswa kwesilivere;"
Psalms66:11 Usingenise emgibeni; Ubeke inkxwaleko emanqeni ethu.
Psalms66:12 Ukhwelise abantu entlokweni yethu; sicande emlilweni nasemanzini, nasuka nasisa endaweni etyebileyo;"
Psalms66:13 Ndiya kungena endlwini yakho ndinamadini anyukayo; Ndiya kuzizalisa kuwe izibhambathiso zam;
Psalms66:14 Owuvulayo umlomo wam, Othethe umlomo wam ekubandezelweni kwam;"
Psalms66:15 Ndiya kukwenzela amadini anyukayo eemvana ezityebileyo, nesiqhumiso seenkunzi zeegusha; Ndiya kubingelela iinkunzi zeenkomo neebhokhwe. Sela."
Psalms66:16 Yizani, nive, ndinixelele, nonke nina bamoyikayo uThixo, awenzele umphefumlo wam."
Psalms66:17 Ndadanduluka kuye ngomlomo wam, waza wazukiswa ngolwimi lwam."
Psalms66:18 Xa ndicinga ubutshinga entliziyweni yam, akandigwebi uYehova;"
Psalms66:19 Hayi ke, uThixo undivile; waliva ilizwi lomthandazo wam."
Psalms66:20 Makabongwe uThixo, ongawuyekanga umthandazo wam, nenceba yakhe kum."
Psalms67:1 Kumbhexeshi-kwayara. Umhobe. Wanga uThixo angasisikelela; makabukhanyise ubuso bakhe phezu kwethu; Sela.
Psalms67:2 Ukuze yaziwe ehlabathini indlela yakho, Usindiso lwakho phakathi kweentlanga zonke."
Psalms67:3 Mazikubonge iintlanga, Thixo; mabakubonge bonke abantu."
Psalms67:4 Mazigcobe zigcobe iintlanga, ngokuba ùya kugweba phakathi kweentlanga ngobulungisa, Uzilawule ehlabathini. Sela."
Psalms67:5 Mazikubonge iintlanga, Thixo; mabakubonge bonke abantu."
Psalms67:6 Umhlaba uyivelisile indyebo yawo; Wosisikelela uThixo, uThixo wethu."
Psalms67:7 uThixo uya kusisikelela; zimoyike zonke iziphelo zehlabathi.
Psalms68:1 Kumongameli, ingoma kaDavide mababaleke kuye abamthiyayo."
Psalms68:2 Bagxothe njengokufutha komsi; batshabalala abangendawo phambi komlilo, njengekhasa phambi komlilo."
Psalms68:3 Ke wona amalungisa makavuye; mabagcobe phambi koThixo, ewe, mabagcobe ngokugqithileyo."
Psalms68:4 Vumani uzuko lukaThixo, nibethe uhadi igama lakhe; Mdumiseni uhleli emazulwini, egameni lakhe nguYehova, nigcobe phambi kobuso bakhe."
Psalms68:5 Uyise weenkedama, umgwebi wabahlolokazi, nguThixo kwisakhiwo sakhe esingcwele."
Psalms68:6 uThixo nguhlalisa endlwini ababebodwa, Ngukhuphela emakhamandeleni abakhonkxiwe; Ke bona ababandezeli bahleli emhlabeni owomileyo."
Psalms68:7 Thixo, ekubahambiseni kwakho abantu bakho, Ekucaleni kwakho enkangala; Cella:"
Psalms68:8 Lanyikima ihlabathi, nezulu lawa phambi koThixo; iSinayi sagubha phambi koThixo, uThixo kaSirayeli."
Psalms68:9 Wena, Thixo, wehlisela izantyalantyala zemvula, Walizinzisa ilifa lakho ngexesha lembandezelo."
Psalms68:10 Lahlala khona ibandla lakho; Wena, Thixo, ubalungisele abaphulaphuli ngobubele bakho;"
Psalms68:11 Wathi uYehova, Babaninzi ke abanikelayo."
Psalms68:12 Zasaba ngokukhawuleza iinkosi, nenkazana ehleli endlwini yawahlula amaxhoba."
Psalms68:13 Nokuba uthe walala phakathi kweembiza, wofana namaphiko evukuthu alekwe ngesilivere, Neentsiba zalo ezalekwe ngegolide emthubi."
Psalms68:14 Ekubadubadubeni kukaSomandla ookumkani kulo, Koba mhlophe njengekhephu leTsalimon."
Psalms68:15 Intaba kaThixo injengentaba yaseBhashan; Yintaba ephakamileyo njengentaba yaseBhashan.
Psalms68:16 Niyatsiba na, zintaba ziphakamileyo? yinduli apho athanda ukuhlala khona uThixo; ewe, uYehova uya kuhlala apho ngonaphakade."
Psalms68:17 Iinqwelo zokulwa zikaThixo zizigidi ezingamashumi amabini, ewe, amawaka ezithunywa zezulu; uYehova uphakathi kwabo, njengokuba eseSinayi engcweleni."
Psalms68:18 Nenyuka waya ezigangeni, wathimba abathinjwa; ukwamkela izipho ebantwini; ewe, nakuzo iintshaba, ukuba ahlale uYehova uThixo phakathi kwazo."
Psalms68:19 Makabongwe uYehova, osithwalisa imisebenzi emihle imihla yonke, uThixo wosindiso lwethu! Sela."
Psalms68:20 uThixo wethu nguThixo wosindiso; yaye ngaYehova amanzi aphuma ekufeni.
Psalms68:21 Kodwa uThixo uya kuziqhekeza iintloko zeentshaba zakhe nolukakayi oluneenwele eziqhubeka elukreqweni.
Psalms68:22 Wathi uYehova, Ndiya kuyilanda iBhashan, ndibabuyisele abantu bam emazantsi elwandle;"
Psalms68:23 luthiwe nkxu unyawo lwakho egazini leentshaba zakho, naselulwimini lwezinja zakho."
Psalms68:24 Mazibone iindlela zakho, Thixo; nokuhamba koThixo wam, iNkosi yam, engcweleni."
Psalms68:25 Phambili iimvumi, ngasemva izixhobo zomkhosi; phakathi kwabo kukho amantombazana adlala amagubu."
Psalms68:26 Dumisani uYehova emabandleni, Yehova, Thende likaSirayeli."
Psalms68:27 Ukhona uBhenjamin umncinane, nabathetheli babo, abathetheli bakwaYuda nebhunga labo, iinkosana zakwaZebhulon, neenkosana zakwaNafetali."
Psalms68:28 uThixo wakho wakunika amandla; kuqinise, Thixo, oko usenzele kona."
Psalms68:29 Ngenxa yetempile yakho eYerusalem, ookumkani baya kukuzisela izipho;"
Psalms68:30 xabelani ingxokolo yezikhali, nengxokolo yeenkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo, namathole eenkomo, bade banikele amaqhosha esilivere elowo; ukubachithachitha abantu abathanda imfazwe."
Psalms68:31 Kuya kuphuma abathetheli eYiputa; iKushi iya kuzolulela ngokukhawuleza izandla zayo kuThixo.
Psalms68:32 Memelelani uzuko lukaThixo, zikumkani zehlabathi; Memelelani uzuko lukaYehova; Cella:"
Psalms68:33 Kulo uphezu kwezulu lamazulu, owayekho kwamandulo; yabona, ukhupha ilizwi Lakhe, kwaye lilizwi elinamandla."
Psalms68:34 Mnikeni amandla uThixo, Uzuko lwakhe luphezu kwaSirayeli, Buphezu kwamafu amandla akhe."
Psalms68:35 Thixo, uwoyikekayo ezingcweleni zakho; UloThixo kaSirayeli, ubanika amandla nokomelela abantu bakhe. Makabongwe uThixo."
Psalms69:1 Kukumkani waseSosannim: Umhobe kaDavide ngokuba amanzi andingene emphefumlweni.
Psalms69:2 Nditshonile eludakeni olunzulu, akukho ndawo yokuma; Ndangena emanzini anzongonzongo, apho imisinga yafika kum."
Psalms69:3 Ndidiniwe kukulila, womile umqala wam, amehlo am adiniwe kukulinda uThixo wam."
Psalms69:4 Abandithiyayo ngelize baninzi ngaphezu kweenwele zentloko yam; Ababethanda ukunditshabalalisa baziintshaba zam, bomelele; ndiye ndabuyisela into endingayithathanga."
Psalms69:5 Wena, Thixo, uyakwazi ukumatha kwam; nezono zam azigushekile kuwe."
Psalms69:6 Mabangadani ngam abakuthembayo, Nkosi yam, Yehova wemikhosi; Mabangadani ngam abakufunayo, Thixo kaSirayeli."
Psalms69:7 Ngokuba ndithwele ihlazo ngenxa yakho; ihlazo ligqubuthele ubuso bam.
Psalms69:8 Ndingumphambukeli kubazalwana bam, Ndingumphambukeli koonyana bakama."
Psalms69:9 Ngokuba lindidlile ikhwele ngenxa yendlu yakho; yaye ihlazo labakukhubekisileyo lawela phezu kwam.
Psalms69:10 Mna, ndalila, ndizila ukudla, ndilila;"
Psalms69:11 Kananjalo ndazenza iingubo zam ezimnyama; Ndaba ngumzekeliso kubo.
Psalms69:12 Bathetha ngam abahleli esangweni; ndabe ndinxilile ingoma.
Psalms69:13 Ke mna ndithandaza kuwe, Yehova, ngexesha elamkelekileyo; Ndiphendule, Thixo, ngobuninzi benceba yakho, Nenyaniso yosindiso lwakho."
Psalms69:14 Ndisindise eludakeni, unganditshoni; Ndihlangule kwabandithiyayo, nasemanzini anzongonzongo."
Psalms69:15 Mawungandintywiliseli umlambo, Ungandiginyi nomlambo, Ungandivali umlomo wequla phezu kwam."
Psalms69:16 Ndiphendule, Yehova! ngokuba ilungile inceba yakho."
Psalms69:17 Musa ukubusithelisa ubuso bakho kumkhonzi wakho; ngokuba ndibandezelekile; khawuleza undive
Psalms69:18 Sondela emphefumlweni wam, uwuhlangule; ndisindise ezintshabeni zam."
Psalms69:19 Wena uyakwazi ukungcikivwa kwam, nokucukucezwa kwam, nokudelwa kwam; Abandichasayo banawe bonke."
Psalms69:20 Ingcikivo yayaphula intliziyo yam; ndaye ndeva intlungu; nabathuthuzeli, kodwa andabafumana."
Psalms69:21 Ukudla bandinika inyongo; xa ndinxaniwe, bandinika iviniga."
Psalms69:22 Isithebe sabo phambi kwabo masibe ngumgibe, Kube kulunge kubo kube ngumgibe."
Psalms69:23 Amehlo abo amnyama, ukuba angaboni; amanqe abo ahlala engcangcazela."
Psalms69:24 Baphalazele ngomsindo wakho, Ubaqweqwedise umsindo wakho."
Psalms69:25 Isakhiwo sabo masibe senkangala; yaye makungabikho bani uhlala emhadini wabo.
Psalms69:26 Ngokuba bayamtshutshisa lowo umbethayo; bathetha ngeentlungu zabo nibabuleleyo.
Psalms69:27 Wongeza ubugwenxa ebugwenxeni babo, Abangena ebulungiseni bakho."
Psalms69:28 Mabacinywe encwadini yobomi, Bangabhalwa namalungisa."
Psalms69:29 Ke ndilusizana, ndibuhlungu; Ngamana usindiso lwakho, Thixo, malundiphakamise."
Psalms69:30 Ndiya kulidumisa igama likaThixo ngokuvuma, Ndilidumise ngokubulela."
Psalms69:31 Nako oku kuya kumkholisa uYehova njengenkunzi yenkomo okanye inkunzi yenkomo eneempondo neenzipho.
Psalms69:32 Abathobekileyo bobona, bavuye, Nentliziyo emfunayo uThixo iphile."
Psalms69:33 Ngenxa yokuba uYehova uyaphulaphula abathobekileyo yaye akabadeleli amabanjwa akhe.
Psalms69:34 Malimdumise izulu nomhlaba, Ulwandle nento yonke enambuzelayo kulo."
Psalms69:35 Kuba uThixo uya kuyikhulula ngentlawulelo iZiyon, aze azakhe izixeko zakwaYuda, ukuze bahlale khona baze bazidle ilifa."
Psalms69:36 Ilidle ilifa imbewu yabakhonzi bakhe, Bahlale kulo abalithandayo igama lakhe."
Psalms70:1 Kukumkani weemvumi, umhobe kaDavide khawuleza undincede, Yehova."
Psalms70:2 Mabadane badane abawufunayo umphefumlo wam;
Psalms70:3 Mabajike kwihlazo labo, bathi, Tshotsho!"
Psalms70:4 Mababe nemihlali bavuye ngawe bonke abakufunayo; nabaluthandayo usindiso lwakho bathi, Mkhulu uThixo!"
Psalms70:5 Ke mna ndilusizana, ndilihlwempu; yiza kum, Thixo; Umncedi wam noMsindisi wam nguwe; Nkosi, musa ukulibala;"
Psalms71:1 Yehova, ndikholose ngawe; ungaze undiyeke ndikhathazeke."
Psalms71:2 Ndisindise ngobulungisa bakho, ndisindise; ndiphulaphule, ndisindise."
Psalms71:3 Yiba lihlathi lam elingunaphakade, endizimela ngalo ngamaxesha onke; Wathi mandisindiswe; Ngokuba ingxondorha yam nemboniselo yam nguwe."
Psalms71:4 Ndisindise, Thixo wam, esandleni songendawo, Esandleni songendawo, esijorha."
Psalms71:5 Kuba ulithemba lam, Yehova, ulithemba lam kwasebuncinaneni bam."
Psalms71:6 Ndakhuliswa nguwe kwasesizalweni sikanina; Nguwe owandikhupha esizalweni sikama; uya kuhlala eyindumiso yam.
Psalms71:7 Oko kungummangaliso kwabaninzi; Ke wena ulihlathi lam elinqabileyo.
Psalms71:8 Umlomo wam mawuzaliswe yindumiso yakho, Nozuko lwakho imini yonke."
Psalms71:9 Musa ukundishiya ebudaleni; musa ukundishiya xa ephelile amandla.
Psalms71:10 Ngokuba zithetha ngam iintshaba zam; Abawulalelayo umphefumlo wam bacebisana kunye;
Psalms71:11 Wathi, uThixo umlahlile; msukeleni nimbambe; ngokuba akukho bani umsindisayo."
Psalms71:12 Thixo, musa ukuba kude nam; Owu Thixo wam, khawuleza undincede."
Psalms71:13 Mabadane, batshatyalaliswe, abawuchasayo umphefumlo wam; Mabathiwe wambu ngocukucezo nehlazo abafuna ububi bam."
Psalms71:14 Ke mna ndiya kuhlala ndikholose ngawe, Ndiya kukubonga kakhulu."
Psalms71:15 Umlomo wam uya kubalisa ngobulungisa bakho, nosindiso lwakho yonke imihla; kuba andiwazi amanani ayo."
Psalms71:16 Ndiya kuhamba ngamandla eNkosi uYehova; Ndibiza ubulungisa bakho kuwe wedwa.
Psalms71:17 Thixo, undifundisile kwasebuncinaneni bam, Kude kube ngoku ndiyayixela imisebenzi yakho ebalulekileyo."
Psalms71:18 Ke, ukuba ndide ndaluphele ndibe yingwevu, Thixo, musa ukundishiya; Ndide ndisazise esi sizukulwana amandla akho, nobugorha bakho kubo bonke abezayo."
Psalms71:19 Kananjalo ubulungisa bakho buye bafika phezulu, Thixo, wena uzenzayo izinto ezinkulu; Owu Thixo, ngubani na onjengawe!"
Psalms71:20 Wena, owandiphilisayo kwiimbandezelo ezinkulu, oziphetheyo, uyandiphilisa, undirhole ezinzonzobileni zamanzi ehlabathi;"
Psalms71:21 Uya kubandisa ubukhulu bam, andithuthuzele ngeenxa zonke;"
Psalms71:22 Nam ndiya kukudumisa ngohadi, Inyaniso yakho, Thixo wam; Ndiya kukubethela uhadi, Wena Ngcwele kaSirayeli;"
Psalms71:23 Uya kuvuya kakhulu umlomo wam, ndakukubethela uhadi; nomphefumlo wam owukhululeyo;"
Psalms71:24 Yaye ulwimi lwam luya kuthetha ngobulungisa bakho imini yonke, ngenxa yokuba behlazekile, ngenxa yokuba abo bafuna ububi bam bahlazekile."
Psalms72:1 (Indumiso ka-Solomon.) Thixo, mnike ukumkani imigwebo yakho, mnike unyana wokumkani ubulungisa bakho."
Psalms72:2 Uza kugweba abantu bakho ngobulungisa, Nabaziintsizana zakho ngokwesiko."
Psalms72:3 Iintaba mazibathwalele uxolo abantu, neenduli zibe ngubulungisa;"
Psalms72:4 Makagwebe ityala labaziintsizana ebantwini, asindise oonyana bamahlwempu, abaxinzelele phantsi abacudisi."
Psalms72:5 Ziya kukoyika ukuma kwelanga nenyanga, kususela kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana."
Psalms72:6 Uya kuhla njengemvula phezu kotyani obugudiweyo, njengemvula enyakamisa umhlaba."
Psalms72:7 Ngemihla yakhe amalungisa aya kuphumelela; noxolo olukhulu kuyo yonke inyanga.
Psalms72:8 Uya kulawula ethabathela elwandle ase elwandle, ethabathela kuwo uMlambo ase eziphelweni zehlabathi."
Psalms72:9 Baya kuqubuda kuye abemi bomqwebedu; iintshaba zakhe ziya kukhotha uthuli.
Psalms72:10 Ookumkani baseTarshishe neziqithi baya kuzisa izipho; ookumkani bakwaShebha nabakwaSebha baya kupha izipho.
Psalms72:11 Baqubude kuye bonke ookumkani; zonke iintlanga ziya kumkhonza.
Psalms72:12 Ngokuba uya kulisindisa ihlwempu xa ebiza; namahlwempu namahlwempu.
Psalms72:13 Uya kuba nemfesane kolusizana nolihlwempu, ayisindise imiphefumlo yamahlwempu;"
Psalms72:14 Uya kuwukhulula umphefumlo wabo enkohliso, nasekugonyamelweni, negazi labo lixabiseke emehlweni akhe."
Psalms72:15 Uya kuphila, anikwe esinye isahlulo segolide sikaShebha; Yaye yonke imihla uya kudunyiswa."
Psalms72:16 Intabalala yengqolowa iya kuwuzalisa umhlaba encotsheni yeentaba; iziqhamo zawo ziya kunyikima njengeLebhanon, nesixeko siya kutyatyamba njengengca."
Psalms72:17 Igama lakhe liya kuba ngunaphakade; igama lakhe liya kuhlala likho logama lisekhona ilanga, yaye abantu baya kusikelelwa ngaye; zonke iintlanga ziya kuthi ninoyolo."
Psalms72:18 Makabongwe uYehova uThixo, uThixo kaSirayeli, osebenza imiqondiso yedwa."
Psalms72:19 Kwaye igama lakhe elizukileyo malisikelelwe ngonaphakade, kwaye ihlabathi lonke malizaliswe bubuqaqawuli bakhe; Amen, kwaye Amen."
Psalms72:20 Izalisekile imithandazo kaDavide, unyana kaYese;"
Psalms73:1 Umhobe ka-Asafu. Ulungile kwaphela uThixo kuSirayeli, Kwabantliziyo zinyulu."
Psalms73:2 Ke mna, imilenze yam isiphantse ukuba ukuphuma; Phantse ukutyibilika ukunyathela kwam."
Psalms73:3 Kuba bendibamonela abaziziyatha, Ndakukubona ukuphumelela kwabangendawo."
Psalms73:4 Ngokuba abanazibophelelo ekufeni kwabo;
Psalms73:5 Abakho sengxakini njengabanye abantu; kwaye abaxhatshazwa njengabanye abantu.
Psalms73:6 Ngoko ke ikratshi labo libakhonkxile ngomxokelelwane; ukugonyamela kubathe wambu ngokwengubo.
Psalms73:7 Amehlo abo akhazimla, akhazimla;"
Psalms73:8 Bonakalisile, baxela ububi; bathetha ngokuzidla."
Psalms73:9 Bawubhekisa ezulwini umlomo wabo, nolwimi lwabo lwahamba emhlabeni."
Psalms73:10 Babuyela apha abantu bakhe;
Psalms73:11 Bathi ke bona, Wazi ngani na uThixo? Kukho ukwazi na kOsenyangweni?"
Psalms73:12 Yabona, abangendawo bayaphumelela ehlabathini; bandise ubutyebi."
Psalms73:13 Sifumane sayiqaqambisa intliziyo yethu kanti, Sazihlamba izandla zethu ngokuba msulwa;"
Psalms73:14 Kuba benditshutshiswa imini yonke, ndikhalinyelwa imiso ngemiso."
Psalms73:15 Xa ndithi, Ndiya kuthetha; yabona, ndiya kusikhubekisa esizukulwaneni soonyana bakho."
Psalms73:16 Ndathi ke ndakucinga ukuba ndikwazi oko, ndaba buhlungu kakhulu;"
Psalms73:17 ndide ndingene engcweleni kaThixo; ndiye ndaliqonda ikamva labo.
Psalms73:18 Inene, ubamise ezindaweni ezibuthelezi, ubahlisele entshabalalweni;"
Psalms73:19 Hayi, ukuphanziswa kwabo ngephanyazo; baphanza ngokupheleleyo luloyiko."
Psalms73:20 Njengephupha ekuqabukeni komntu; ngako oko, Nkosi, wowudela umfanekiso wabo."
Psalms73:21 Ngoko intliziyo yam yaba buhlungu, ndahlatywa ezintso zam."
Psalms73:22 Bendisisidenge, ndingazi nto, Ndinjengenkomo phambi kwakho."
Psalms73:23 Mna ke ndihlala ndinani; Wandibamba ngesandla sasekunene.
Psalms73:24 Uya kundikhapha ngecebo lakho, Undithabathe emveni koku, ndibe nozuko."
Psalms73:25 Ndinabani na emazulwini? kwaye akukho namnye ehlabathini endimnqwenelayo, ngaphandle kwakho."
Psalms73:26 Ingaphela inyama yam nentliziyo yam: Iliwa lentliziyo yam, nesabelo sam, nguThixo ngamaxesha onke."
Psalms73:27 Ngokuba abanyawukileyo kuwe baya kudaka; ubabhangisile bonke abakrexezayo kuwe.
Psalms73:28 Kodwa ukusondela kuThixo kulungile kum: Ndikholose ngeNkosi uYehova, Ukuze ndiyibalise yonke imisebenzi yakho."
Psalms74:1 Yini na, Thixo, ukuba usishiye ngonaphakade? Wavutha umsindo wakho izimvu zedlelo lakho?"
Psalms74:2 Cinga ngebandla lakho, owalithenga kumaxesha amandulo; intonga yelifa lakho oyikhulule ngokuyihlawulela; le ntaba yaseZiyon, ubumi kuyo."
Psalms74:3 Phakamisa unyawo lwakho emanxuweni angunaphakade; nako konke okwenziwa lutshaba endaweni engcwele.
Psalms74:4 Zigquma iintshaba zakho phakathi kwebandla lakho; bamisa iiflegi zabo, ukuba zibe yimiqondiso."
Psalms74:5 Umfo othile wayedume ngokuphakamisa amazembe emithini eshinyeneyo.
Psalms74:6 Kodwa ngoku bakhawuleza bayiqhekeza imifanekiso yakhe eqingqiweyo ngamazembe neehamile.
Psalms74:7 Bagalela umlilo engcweleni yakho, Eyinqambi ngokudiliza isakhiwo segama lakho."
Psalms74:8 Bathi ezintliziyweni zabo, Mabagqithe kunye; Bazitshisa zonke izindlu zesikhungu zikaThixo ehlabathini."
Psalms74:9 Imiqondiso yethu asiyiboni; akusekho mprofeti, akukho namnye kuthi owaziyo ukuba iya kufika nini na."
Psalms74:10 Kunini na, Thixo, umbandezeli edela? Utshaba luhleli luligiba igama lakho?"
Psalms74:11 Uyasifinyeza na isandla sakho, ewe, esokunene sakho? yithathe esifubeni sakho."
Psalms74:12 Ngokuba uThixo nguKumkani wam kususela kwamandulo, Ulosindisayo phakathi kwehlabathi."
Psalms74:13 Nguwe owahlula ulwandle ngamandla akho; Owaphula iintloko zoodyakalashe emanzini.
Psalms74:14 Nguwe owaphula iintloko zeLeviyatan waza wazinika ukuba zibe kukudla kwabantu abahlala entlango.
Psalms74:15 Nguwe owahlula iqula noNogumbe, Watshisa imilambo emikhulu;"
Psalms74:16 Yeyakho imini, bobakho ubusuku; Nguwe owalungisa ukukhanya nelanga."
Psalms74:17 Wadala yonke imida yehlabathi, uMenzi wehlobo nobusika."
Psalms74:18 Khumbula ukuba utshaba luqalekisiwe, Yehova, yaye abantu abaziziyatha bangcikive igama lakho."
Psalms74:19 Musa ukuwunikela umphefumlo wehobe lakho kwingidi yabangendawo; ungalibali ngonaphakade ibandla lamahlwempu akho.
Psalms74:20 Phulaphulani umnqophiso, ngokuba iindawo ezimnyama zomhlaba zizele zizakhiwo zobungendawo."
Psalms74:21 Ocinezelweyo akayi kubuya eneentloni; malidumise igama lakho olusizana nolihlwempu.
Psalms74:22 Zivuse, Thixo, ngenxa yebango lakho; cinga ukuba isidenge sikungcikiva yonke imihla."
Psalms74:23 Musa ukulilibala ilizwi leentshaba zakho: ingxokozelo yabasukela phezulu kuwe ihlala ikhula.
Psalms75:1 Kumbhexeshi-kwayara, umhobe ka-Asafu. Siyabulela kuwe, Thixo, siyabulela; ngokuba likufuphi igama lakho, Iya kubalisa imisebenzi yakho ebalulekileyo."
Psalms75:2 Xa ndamkelekileyo ebandleni, ndiya kugweba ngobulungisa;"
Psalms75:3 Liya kuqotywa ihlabathi, nabemi balo, ndizizinzisile iintsika zalo. Sela."
Psalms75:4 Ndathi ke kwabazizinyabi, Musani ukuba zizidenge; nakubangendawo;"
Psalms75:5 Musani ukuluphakamisa uphondo lwakho; ungathethi ngentamo elukhuni.
Psalms75:6 Ngokuba uzuko aluphumi empumalanga, nasentshonalanga, nasezantsi;"
Psalms75:7 Ke yena uThixo nguMgwebi; uyamthoba omnye, aphakamise omnye."
Psalms75:8 Kuba indebe isesandleni sikaYehova, iwayini ebomvu; uzele ngumxube; uya kuyiphalaza kuwo, kodwa intsipho yawo, bonke abangendawo behlabathi baya kuyitshabalalisa bayisele."
Psalms75:9 Ke mna ndiya kuthetha ngonaphakade; Ndiyathanda ukucula kuThixo kaYakobi.
Psalms75:10 Ndiya kuzinqumla zonke iimpondo zabangendawo; ke iimpondo zamalungisa ziya kuphakanyiswa.
Psalms76:1 Kumongameli waseNeginoti; Ingoma ka-Asafu. Waziwa uYuda uThixo; likhulu igama lakhe kwaSirayeli.
Psalms76:2 Umnquba wakhe useSalem, Nekhaya lakhe liseZiyon."
Psalms76:3 Wayaphula apho iintolo, nengweletshetshe, nekrele, nemfazwe. Sela."
Psalms76:4 Uzukile, mhle ngaphezu kweentaba zenyama."
Psalms76:5 Baphangiwe abantliziyo inamandla, balala ubuthongo, Akazifumana izandla zawo onke amagorha."
Psalms76:6 Ngokukhalima kwakho, Thixo kaYakobi, Siwe bubuthongo inqwelo yokulwa nehashe."
Psalms76:7 Wena, ewe, ufanele woyike, yaye ngubani na onokuma phambi kwakho xa uqala ukucaphuka?"
Psalms76:8 Uthumele umgwebo uphuma emazulwini; Loyika ihlabathi, lazola;"
Psalms76:9 Xa uThixo emele umgwebo, ukuze asindise bonke abalulamileyo behlabathi. Sela."
Psalms76:10 Inene, umsindo womntu uya kubulela kuwe;"
Psalms76:11 Yenza isibhambathiso, ubuyisele kuYehova uThixo wakho;"
Psalms76:12 Uya kuwutshabalalisa umoya wabathetheli; Uyoyikeka kookumkani behlabathi.
Psalms77:1 kuYedutun ingoma ka-Asafu wandiva ke.
Psalms77:2 Ngemini yokubandezeleka kwam ndamfuna uYehova, amathumba am ebusuku asuka aqhawuka, yaye akazange ayeke; umphefumlo wam wala ukuthuthuzeleka."
Psalms77:3 Ndacinga ngoThixo, ndakhwankqiswa; Sela."
Psalms77:4 Uwamfamekisa amehlo am; Ndididekile, andikwazi kuthetha."
Psalms77:5 Ndacinga ngemihla yamandulo, iminyaka yamandulo;"
Psalms77:6 Ndikhumbula ukubetha kwam uhadi ebusuku, Ndithetha entliziyweni yam, Uphengulula umphefumlo wam."
Psalms77:7 uYehova uya kunishiya na ngonaphakade? akayi kuba nanceba ngakumbi na?
Psalms77:8 Iphele yaphela na inceba yakhe? Lingunaphakade na idinga lakhe?
Psalms77:9 uThixo ukulibele na ukwenza inceba? Ngaba uzivalele ngomsindo iinceba zakhe? Sela.
Psalms77:10 Ndathi ke, Bubuthathaka bam obu, Iminyaka yesandla sokunene sOsenyangweni ndiya kuyikhumbula."
Psalms77:11 Ndikhankanya izenzo ezincamisayo zikaYehova; Ndiya kuyikhumbula imimangaliso yakho yamandulo.
Psalms77:12 Ndicamngca ngemisebenzi yakho yonke, Ndicamanga ngezenzo zakho zonke."
Psalms77:13 Thixo, isebungcweleni indlela yakho; Ngubani na onguThixo omkhulu njengoThixo wethu?"
Psalms77:14 UnguThixo, umenzi wemimangaliso; Ubuxelile ubugorha bakho ezintlangeni."
Psalms77:15 Wabasindisa ngesandla sakho abantu bakho, oonyana bakaYakobi noYosefu. Sela."
Psalms77:16 Wawabona amanzi, Thixo, wawabona amanzi; boyika; namaqula angcangcazela."
Psalms77:17 Amafu agalela amanzi, umoya ukhupha isandi; ziphumele ngaphandle iintolo zakho."
Psalms77:18 Izwi lendudumo yakho labakho esibhakabhakeni, Imibane yalikhanyisa ihlabathi, Lanyikima ihlabathi, lanyikima."
Psalms77:19 Indlela yakho yaba selwandle, nasemanzini amaninzi indlela yakho, akwaziwa ukunyathela kwakho."
Psalms77:20 Wabakhokela njengomhlambi abantu bakho, Ngesandla sikaMoses noAron."
Psalms78:1 (Maschil ka-Asafu.) Bantu bam, wubekeleni indlebe umyalelo wam; yibekeleni indlebe intetho yomlomo wam."
Psalms78:2 Ndiya kuwuvula umlomo wam ngomzekeliso;
Psalms78:3 Oko sikuvileyo, nesikwaziyo, oko basixelela kona oobawo;"
Psalms78:4 Asiyi kuzifihla koonyana babo, yaye isizukulwana esilandelayo siya kubalisa iingoma zikaYehova nangamandla akhe nemimangaliso yakhe awayenzayo."
Psalms78:5 Ngokuba wamisa umqondiso kwaYakobi, Wabeka umyalelo kwaSirayeli, Awawumisela oobawo, Ukuba bawazise oonyana babo."
Psalms78:6 Ukuze siwazi isizukulwana esizayo, oonyana abaya kuzalwa; abo banokuma, babaxelele abantwana babo ezo zinto;"
Psalms78:7 ukuze bakholose ngoThixo, bangayilibali imisebenzi yakhe, bayigcine imithetho yakhe."
Psalms78:8 Musa ukuba njengooyise, isizukulwana esiyinjubaqa, esineenkani; isizukulwana esingazilungisanga iintliziyo zaso, esimoya ungaqinisekanga kuThixo."
Psalms78:9 Oonyana bakaEfrayim, bexhobile, beziintoli ezinezaphetha, babuya ngemini yemfazwe."
Psalms78:10 Abawugcinanga umnqophiso kaThixo, Abavumanga ukuhamba ngomyalelo wawo;"
Psalms78:11 Ke yena wayilibala imisebenzi yakhe, kwanemiqondiso awababonisa yona."
Psalms78:12 Wenza izinto ezingaqhelekanga emehlweni ooyise, Ezweni laseYiputa, ezweni laseTsohan."
Psalms78:13 Walahlula ulwandle, wabathuthuzela; wamisa amanzi njengemfumba."
Psalms78:14 Wabakhokela ngelifu emini nasebusuku, ngokukhanya komlilo."
Psalms78:15 Wawacanda amawa entlango, wawaseza njengamanzi enzonzobila;"
Psalms78:16 Wakhupha imilambo engxondorheni, wawahambisa amanzi njengemilambo."
Psalms78:17 Baqhubeka besona kuye ngokugculela Oyena Uphakamileyo entlango.
Psalms78:18 Babongoza uThixo ngentliziyo yabo, Ngokuwubizela umphefumlo wabo ukudla."
Psalms78:19 Ewe, bathetha ngokuchasene noThixo; bathi, Unako na uThixo ukulungisa isithebe entlango?"
Psalms78:20 Yabona, walibetha iliwa; Anako na ukunika isonka? Wobanika na abantu bakhe inyama?"
Psalms78:21 Weva ke uYehova, wacaphuka;"
Psalms78:22 Ngokuba bengakholwanga kuThixo, Bengakholosanga ngosindiso lwakhe;"
Psalms78:23 Wawamisela amafu phezulu, Wazivula iingcango zezulu;"
Psalms78:24 Wabatshiza imana ukuba badle, Wabanika iinkozo zezulu."
Psalms78:25 Abantu badla ukudla kwezithunywa zezulu; Wabanika inyama.
Psalms78:26 Wavuthela umoya wasempumalanga ezulwini, Wawuvuthela ngamandla akhe umoya wasezantsi;"
Psalms78:27 Wabanisela phezu kwabo inyama njengothuli, neentaka ezineentsiba njengentlabathi yolwandle."
Psalms78:28 Kwaye wawa esazulwini sokhuseleko lwabo kufuphi nekhaya labo.
Psalms78:29 Badla bahlutha, ngokuba wabanikayo inkanuko yabo;"
Psalms78:30 Abahlukananga neminqweno yabo. Kodwa ngelixa inyama yabo isesemlonyeni wabo.
Psalms78:31 Wavutha umsindo kaThixo phezu kwabo, Wabulala abatyebileyo kubo, waboyisa abanyuliweyo bakwaSirayeli."
Psalms78:32 Noko ke, basesona, yaye abazange bayikholelwe imimangaliso yakhe."
Psalms78:33 Ngako oko uyitshitshisile ililize imihla yabo, Neminyaka yabo esizalweni."
Psalms78:34 Yaye xa wababulalayo, bamfuna; yaye babuya baza babuza kuThixo kusengaphambili."
Psalms78:35 Bakhumbula ukuba uThixo uliliwa labo, uThixo Osenyangweni ungumkhululi wabo."
Psalms78:36 Ke bamlukuhla ngemilebe yomlomo wabo, Bamxokisa ngolwimi lwabo;"
Psalms78:37 Ngenxa yokuba intliziyo yabo yayinganyanisekanga kuye, yaye babenganyanisekanga emnqophisweni wakhe."
Psalms78:38 Ke yena owayenemfesane, wabaxolela ubugwenxa babo, akabatshabalalisa;"
Psalms78:39 Wakhumbula ukuba kukudla kodwa; umoya odlulayo ungabuyi.
Psalms78:40 Hayi, ukuba bamenze intlekisa entlango, ukuba bamenzakalisa entlango!"
Psalms78:41 Babuya ke bamlinga uThixo, Bamgiba oyiNgcwele kaSirayeli."
Psalms78:42 Abasikhumbula isandla sakhe, namhla awabahlangulayo ezintshabeni zabo;"
Psalms78:43 Wenza imiqondiso yakhe eYiputa, Nezimanga zakhe ezweni laseTsohan."
Psalms78:44 Bayiguqula imijelo yabo, yaba ligazi; nemilambo yabo, ayinakuyisela."
Psalms78:45 Wathumela kubo zonke iintlobo zeembovane, zadla; kunye nezinambuzane ezabatshabalalisayo."
Psalms78:46 Izilimo zazo wayinika iinkumbi ezandayo, nomsebenzi wazo wawunika iinkumbi."
Psalms78:47 Wazitshabalalisa izidiliya zabo ngesichotho, Nemithombe yabo ngeqabaka."
Psalms78:48 Wayinikela kwisichotho imfuyo yabo, Nemfuyo yabo ngemibane."
Psalms78:49 Waphosa phezu kwabo ukuvutha komsindo wakhe, nomsindo, nengqumbo, nembandezelo, Ethumela phakathi kwabo izithunywa ezikhohlakeleyo."
Psalms78:50 Wenza indlela yokuphuphuma komsindo wakhe; Akawuconga umphefumlo wabo ekufeni, Wabunikela umphefumlo wabo ekufeni;"
Psalms78:51 Wawabulala onke amazibulo eYiputa; Owokuqala amandla abo ezintenteni zikaKama;
Psalms78:52 Abantu bakhe wabafudusa njengezimvu, Wabaqhuba njengomhlambi entlango."
Psalms78:53 Wabakhapha bekholosile, ukuba bangoyiki; Ke zona iintshaba zabo zagutyungelwa lulwandle."
Psalms78:54 Wabasa eludinini lwengcwele yakhe, kule ntaba sayithengayo isandla sakhe sokunene."
Psalms78:55 Kanjalo, wazigxotha iintlanga phambi kwazo, wazahlula ilifa lazo ngomgca wolutya, waza wazihlalisa ezintenteni izizwe zakwaSirayeli."
Psalms78:56 Bamngcikiva uThixo Osenyangweni, Abaligcina icebo lakhe."
Psalms78:57 Basuka baguquka benza ubumenemene njengooyise; batyeka njengesaphetha esityeketyeke.
Psalms78:58 Bamqumbisa ngobude babo, bambeka ngemifanekiso yabo eqingqiweyo."
Psalms78:59 Akukuva oko uThixo, wavutha ngumsindo, wawathiya amaSirayeli."
Psalms78:60 Wawushiya umnquba waseShilo, Intente abeyimisile phakathi kwabantu;"
Psalms78:61 Uwanikele ekuthinjweni amandla akhe, Nozuko lwakhe esandleni sotshaba."
Psalms78:62 Kwakhona wabanikela abantu bakhe ekreleni; Waba noburhalarhume kwilifa lakhe.
Psalms78:63 Abafana babo batsha ngumlilo; neentombi zabo zingazeki.
Psalms78:64 Ababingeleli babo bawa likrele; nabahlolokazi babo abakhalazi.
Psalms78:65 Wavuka ngokomntu oleleyo, njengegorha elirhawulwa yiwayini."
Psalms78:66 Wazixabela ngasemva iintshaba zakhe; Wabazisela ukubandezeleka okungunaphakade.
Psalms78:67 Ngaphezu koko, wawucekisa umnquba kaYosefu, akasinyula isizwe sakwaEfrayim."
Psalms78:68 Yanyula isizwe sakwaYuda, Intaba yaseZiyon eyayithandayo."
Psalms78:69 Yayakha njengokuphakama kwezulu ingcwele yakhe, Njengokwehlabathi alidalayo ngonaphakade."
Psalms78:70 Kwakhona wanyula uDavide umkhonzi wakhe, waza wamkhupha entolongweni."
Psalms78:71 Yamkhuphela emva kwempahla emfutshane, ukuba aluse abantu bayo, namaSirayeli elifeni lakhe."
Psalms78:72 Kwaye wabondla ngokobunyulu bentliziyo yakhe; wabakhokela ngobulumko bezandla zakhe.
Psalms79:1 (Indumiso ka-Asafu.) Thixo, oonyana bolunye uhlanga bangene elifeni lakho; ziyenze inqambi itempile yakho engcwele; bayenza iYerusalem yangumwewe."
Psalms79:2 Zinike izidumbu zabakhonzi bakho ukuba zibe kukudla kweentaka zezulu, kukudla kwabakho benceba kumarhamncwa elizwe."
Psalms79:3 Baliphalaze igazi labo njengamanzi ngeenxa zonke eYerusalem; akwabakho bani wokungcwaba.
Psalms79:4 Senziwe isingcikivo kubamelwane bethu, Isigculelo nesigculelo kwabasingqongileyo."
Psalms79:5 Koda kube nini, Yehova? Uya kuqumba ngonaphakade? Ikhwele lakho liya kuvutha njengomlilo na?"
Psalms79:6 Phalaza umsindo wakho ezintlangeni ongazaziyo, nasezikumkanini ezingalibizanga igama lakho."
Psalms79:7 Kuba bamdlile uYakobi baza bayonakalisa indawo yakhe yokuhlala.
Psalms79:8 Musa ukuzikhumbula izono zethu zangaphambili; Inceba yakho mayibonakale kuthi ngokukhawuleza, Ngokuba sithobeke kakhulu."
Psalms79:9 Thixo ongumsindisi wethu, sincede ngenxa yegama lakho, Usisindise, Usihlambulule ezonweni zethu ngenxa yegama lakho."
Psalms79:10 Yini na ukuba zithi iintlanga, Uphi na uThixo wabo? Makwazeke phakathi kweentlanga phambi kwamehlo ethu, impindezelo yegazi labakhonzi bakho abaphalaziweyo."
Psalms79:11 Makufike phambi kwakho ukuncwina kombanjwa; Khusela abafileyo ngamandla akho amakhulu;
Psalms79:12 Abamelwane bethu yibeke ezifubeni zabo izihlandlo zibe sixhenxe, Ukungcikiveka kwabo, bakungcikive ngayo, Yehova;"
Psalms79:13 Ngenxa yoko siya kubulela kuwe ngonaphakade, thina bantu bakho, nezimvu zedlelo lakho; Siya kuyixela indumiso yakho kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana."
Psalms80:1 (Indumiso ka-Asafu.) Phulaphula, Malusi kaSirayeli, wena mthundeziyo uYosefu njengomhlambi; Wena uhleli phakathi kweekerubhi, luzuko."
Psalms80:2 Phakamisa amandla akho phambi koEfrayim noBhenjamin noManase, uze usisindise;"
Psalms80:3 Guquka, Thixo, bukhanyise ubuso bakho; kwaye siya kusindiswa."
Psalms80:4 Yehova, Thixo wemikhosi, Kunini na uqumba ngenxa yemithandazo yabantu bakho?"
Psalms80:5 Ubadlisa isonka seenyembezi; wabaseza iinyembezi ezininzi.
Psalms80:6 Ubangela ukuba sixabane nabamelwane bethu, Zisigculele iintshaba zethu."
Psalms80:7 Thixo wemikhosi, silawule, Malukhanye ubuso bakho; kwaye siya kusindiswa."
Psalms80:8 Wavelisa iidiliya eYiputa, wazigxotha iintlanga, wazityala;"
Psalms80:9 Ubulungisela indawo, wendelisa iingcambu, walizalisa ilizwe."
Psalms80:10 Zagutyungelwa iintaba ngumthunzi wawo, nemisedare yakhe emasebeni ayo."
Psalms80:11 Wawatwabulula amasebe awo elwandle, namahlamvu awo afika eMlanjeni."
Psalms80:12 Ngoko kutheni na ukuze uzidilize iindonga zeendonga zakhe, ukuze bonke abadlula ngendlela bakugqogqe?"
Psalms80:13 Udliwa ziihagu zehlathi, udliwa ziinyamakazi;"
Psalms80:14 Buya, Thixo wemikhosi, uqondele usemazulwini, ubone;"
Psalms80:15 nesidiliya eso satyala sona sisandla sakho sokunene, isebe oxhaswe ngalo."
Psalms80:16 Itshiswe ngomlilo, yatshatyalaliswa; baya kudaka ngenxa yobugwenxa bobuso bakho."
Psalms80:17 Isandla sakho masibe phezu kwendoda engasekunene kwakho, kunyana womntu owenze nzima."
Psalms80:18 Ke thina asiyi kukufulathela; sisindise, sinqule igama lakho."
Psalms80:19 Yehova, Thixo wemikhosi, sibuyise; Khanyisa ubuso bakho; kwaye siya kusindiswa."
Psalms81:1 Kukumkani waseGiti, umhobe ka-Asafu. Vumani nibonge uThixo, amandla ethu, nivuye ngozuko loThixo kaYakobi."
Psalms81:2 Thabathani ingoma nize negubu, isixhobo somculo esimnandi esinohadi."
Psalms81:3 Vuthelani isigodlo ekuphumeni kwenyanga, Ngexesha elimisiweyo, ngemini yomthendeleko wethu."
Psalms81:4 Kuba lo yayingummiselo kuSirayeli nomthetho kaThixo kaYakobi.
Psalms81:5 Wasivakalisa ke esi singqino kuYosefu, ekundulukeni kwakhe ezweni laseYiputa, ndeva ulwimi endingalwaziyo."
Psalms81:6 Ndawususa umthwalo egxalabeni lam, Zababaleka izandla zakhe emahasheni."
Psalms81:7 Ubukhala ubuntlungu, ndakusindisa; Ndakuphendula esitheni lendudumo, Ndakucikida emanzini aseMeribha. Sela."
Psalms81:8 Yivani, bantu bam, ndiqononondise kuni; Sirayeli, ukuba uthe waphulaphula kum;"
Psalms81:9 Makungabikho thixo wasemzini phakathi kwenu; ninganquli thixo wumbi.
Psalms81:10 NdinguYehova uThixo wakho, owakukhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa; vula umlomo wakho, ndiwuzalise."
Psalms81:11 Ke bona abantu bam abaliphulaphula izwi lam; yaye oonyana bakaSirayeli abazange bafune nabani na kum.
Psalms81:12 Ngoko ke ndabanikela kwiminqweno yeentliziyo zabo, baza bahamba ngokwecebo labo."
Psalms81:13 Akwaba abantu bam bebendiva, Akwaba uSirayeli wahamba ngendlela yam!"
Psalms81:14 Bendiya kuzoyisa ngokukhawuleza iintshaba zabo ndize ndinikele isandla sam nxamnye nabo bachasene nabo.
Psalms81:15 Abo bamthiyileyo uYehova bebeya kuzithoba kuye, kodwa ixesha labo liya kuba ngunaphakade."
Psalms81:16 Ufanele kubondla ngeyona ngqolowa ilungileyo, mna ndinihluthise ngobusi obuphuma eweni."
Psalms82:1 Indumiso ka-Asafu. uThixo umi ebandleni lamagorha; ugweba phakathi koothixo.
Psalms82:2 Kunini na ugweba ngobugqwetha, Umkholisa ongendawo? Sela."
Psalms82:3 Khusela oxhwalekileyo neenkedama, wenze ubulungisa kwabaxhwalekileyo nabangamahlwempu."
Psalms82:4 Sindisa olusizana nolihlwempu, Bahlangule esandleni songendawo."
Psalms82:5 Abazi, kwaye abayi kuqonda; bahamba ebumnyameni, zigungxule zonke iziseko zehlabathi."
Psalms82:6 Ndathi, Noothixo; yaye nonke ningoonyana bOyena Uphakamileyo."
Psalms82:7 Kodwa niya kufa njengabantu, niwe njengomnye weenkosana."
Psalms82:8 Khawusuk’ ume, Thixo, gweba elimiweyo; Ngokuba uya kuzidla ilifa wena zonke iintlanga."
Psalms83:1 Ingoma ka-Asafu, musa ukuthi cwaka, Thixo; musa ukuthi cwaka, ungathi cwaka, Thixo."
Psalms83:2 Ngokuba, yabona, iintshaba zakho ziyaxokozela, nabakuthiyayo baphakamise iintloko zabo."
Psalms83:3 Bacebe abantu bakho amayelenqe, benza iyelenqe ngabantu bakho;"
Psalms83:4 Bathi, Yizani, siwatshabalalise, abe luhlanga; ukuze lingabi sakhunjulwa igama likaSirayeli."
Psalms83:5 Kuba bavumelene, benza umnqophiso nxamnye nawe;"
Psalms83:6 nezindlu zakwaEdom namaIshmayeli; amaMowabhi namaHagari;
Psalms83:7 iGebhali, noAmon, noAmaleki; amaFilisti nabemi baseTire;"
Psalms83:8 Bazingenela ke, bazingela oonyana bakaLote; Sela."
Psalms83:9 Yenza kuwo njengoko wenzayo kumaMidiyan; ooSisera noYabhin, entlanjeni yaseKishon;"
Psalms83:10 abatshabalalayo e-Enedore, Baba ngumgquba womhlaba."
Psalms83:11 Iinkosana zabo mazibe njengo-Orebhe noZebhe, nazo zonke iinkosana zabo zibe njengoShebha noTsalimuna;"
Psalms83:12 bathi, Masizithimbe izindlu zikaThixo."
Psalms83:13 Thixo wam, benze njengevili; njengeendiza phambi komoya."
Psalms83:14 Njengomlilo utshisa iinkuni, iintaba zitshiswa lilangatye;"
Psalms83:15 Ngoku ke bakhukuliseni ngoqhwithela lwakho, Ubakhwankqise ngesiphango sakho."
Psalms83:16 Zalisa ubuso babo ngokudana; ukuze balifune igama lakho, Yehova."
Psalms83:17 Mabadane, bahlale besoyika; ewe, mabame badane, bathi shwaka;"
Psalms83:18 Ukuze abantu bazi ukuba wena, ogama linguYehova, nguwe wedwa Oyena Uphakamileyo phezu kwehlabathi lonke."
Psalms84:1 Kumvumi waseGiti, Ingoma yoonyana bakaKora;"
Psalms84:2 Umphefumlo wam uwakhumbule amasimi kaYehova, efile; Intliziyo yam nenyama yam ikhala kuThixo ophilileyo."
Psalms84:3 Intaka mayiyifumanele indlu, ifumane indluindlu yayo, apho ingabeka khona amathole ayo, izibingelelo zakho, Yehova wemikhosi, Nkosi yam, Thixo wam."
Psalms84:4 Hayi, uyolo lwabahlala endlwini yakho; baya kuhlala bekudumisa. Sela."
Psalms84:5 Hayi, uyolo lomntu omandla akhe akuwe; abandlela zisentliziyweni yabo."
Psalms84:6 Odlula entilini yeBhaka, yenzeni iqula; imvula ikwazalisa amadama."
Psalms84:7 Bayanda amandla, elowo uzibonisa iZiyon phambi koThixo."
Psalms84:8 Yehova, Thixo wemikhosi, wuve umthandazo wam; yiva, Thixo kaYakobi! Sela."
Psalms84:9 Owu Thixo, uyibonile ingweletshetshe yethu, Ububonile ubuso bomthanjiswa wakho."
Psalms84:10 Ngokuba imini enye ezintendelezweni zakho ilungile kunewaka; Ndinyule ukuba semnyango endlwini kaThixo wam, Kunokuhlala ngaphakathi kweentente zokungendawo."
Psalms84:11 Ngokuba ulilanga nekhaka uYehova uThixo; uYehova uya kubabala, azukise; Akayi kubandeza okulungileyo kwabahamba ngobulungisa."
Psalms84:12 Yehova wemikhosi, Hayi, uyolo lomntu okholose ngawe!"
Psalms85:1 Kumvumi, ingoma yoonyana bakaKora."
Psalms85:2 Ububuxolela ubugwenxa babantu bakho, Ubuziselela zonke izono zabo. Sela."
Psalms85:3 Wena ukurhole wonke umsindo wakho; Ukujikile ekuvutheni komsindo wakho.
Psalms85:4 Guquka, Thixo ongumsindisi wethu, uwuphelise kuthi umsindo wakho."
Psalms85:5 Uya kuqumbela ngonaphakade na? Ngaba iUU iya kusasaza ingqumbo ukusuka kwesinye isizukulwana ukuya kwesinye?
Psalms85:6 Awufuni na ukusiphilisa kwakhona, ukuze abantu bakho bavuye ngenxa yakho?"
Psalms85:7 Yehova, sibonise inceba yakho, siphe usindiso lwakho."
Psalms85:8 Ndiya kuva oko akuthethayo uYehova uThixo, ngenxa enokuba ethetha uxolo kubantu bakhe nakwinceba yakhe; kodwa musani ukubuyela ekusweleni ukuqonda."
Psalms85:9 Inene, lusondele usindiso lwakhe kwabamoyikayo; ukuze uzuko luhlale ezweni lakowethu."
Psalms85:10 Inceba nenyaniso zimanye; ubulungisa noxolo ziyancamisana.
Psalms85:11 Inyaniso iya kukhula ehlabathini; kwaye ubulungisa buya kuhla buphuma ezulwini.
Psalms85:12 Ewe, uYehova uya kusinika okulungileyo; ilizwe lethu livelise iziqhamo zalo."
Psalms85:13 Ubulungisa buya kumkhaphela; yaye uya kusikhokelela endleleni yokunyathela kwakhe.
Psalms86:1 Umthandazo kaDavide.
Psalms86:2 Wusindise umphefumlo wam; ngokuba ndingcwele mna; Thixo wam, msindise umkhonzi wakho lo ukholose ngawe."
Psalms86:3 Ndibabale, Nkosi yam, Ngokuba ndidanduluka kuwe yonke imini."
Psalms86:4 Wuvuyise umphefumlo womkhonzi wakho, Ngokuba ndiwuphakamisela kuwe, Nkosi yam, umphefumlo wam."
Psalms86:5 Ngenxa yokuba wena, Yehova, ulungile, ukulungele ukuxolela; nenceba enkulu kubo bonke abakunqulayo."
Psalms86:6 Yehova, wuve umthandazo wam; uliphulaphule izwi lomthandazo wam."
Psalms86:7 Ngemini yokubandezelwa kwam ndinqula wena, ngokuba uya kundiphendula."
Psalms86:8 Phakathi koothixo akukho unjengawe, Yehova; kwaye akukho misebenzi ifana neyakho."
Psalms86:9 Zonke iintlanga ozenzileyo ziya kuza zize ziqubude phambi kwakho, Yehova; kwaye ndiya kulizukisa igama lakho."
Psalms86:10 Ngokuba umkhulu, wenza ngokubalulekileyo; Wena wedwa unguThixo."
Psalms86:11 Ndiyalele, Yehova, indlela yakho; Ndiya kuhamba enyanisweni yakho; yibandakanye intliziyo yam ukuba ndiloyike igama lakho."
Psalms86:12 Ndiya kubulela kuwe, Yehova, Thixo wam, ngentliziyo yonke; kwaye ndiya kulizukisa igama lakho ngonaphakade."
Psalms86:13 Ngokuba inceba yakho ibe inkulu kum, wawusindisa umphefumlo wam endlwini yofileyo."
Psalms86:14 Thixo, abakhukhumali basukele phezulu kum; akwayibeka phambi kwabo."
Psalms86:15 Ke wena, Yehova, unguThixo onemfesane, unobubele, uyiqinisele intliziyo, umkhulu ngenceba nenyaniso."
Psalms86:16 Guquka, undibabale; mnike amandla umkhonzi wakho, Msindise unyana womkhonzazana wakho."
Psalms86:17 Ndiboniseni umqondiso olungileyo; ukuze abandithiyileyo babone, badane, ngokuba ukholose ngam, Yehova, wandithuthuzela."
Psalms87:1 (Ingoma yoonyana bakaKora). Isiseko sakhe sisezintabeni ezingcwele.
Psalms87:2 Amasango eZiyon uYehova uwathanda ngaphezu kwezakhiwo zonke zikaYakobi.
Psalms87:3 Kuthethwa iinto ezizukileyo ngawe, Mzi kaThixo. Sela."
Psalms87:4 uRahabhi noBhabheli ndiya kubabiza kwabandaziyo; Yabona, iFilisti neTire, kunye noKushi; Le ndoda izalelwe khona."
Psalms87:5 Kuya kuthiwa ngeZiyon, Lo mntu nalowa wazalelwa khona, yaye uMthetheli Omkhulu uya kukuqinisekisa oko."
Psalms87:6 uYehova, xa ebhalela abantu, uya kufunda ukuba lo mntu wazalelwa khona. Sela."
Psalms87:7 Ziya kubakho khona iimvumi neemvumi; Onke amathende am anawe.
Psalms88:1 Ingoma yoonyana bakaKore, nemvumi kaMahalate-Lenon, ingoma kaHeman Moesra. Yehova, Thixo ondisindisayo, Ndikhala phambi kwakho ubusuku nemini."
Psalms88:2 Mawuze phambi kwakho umthandazo wam; kubekele indlebe ukuhlahlamba kwam;
Psalms88:3 Ngokuba umphefumlo wam uhluthi zizinto ezimbi, Ubomi bam bufike esichengeni sokufa."
Psalms88:4 Ndibalelwe nabahle baya emhadini; Ndifana nendoda engenamandla.
Psalms88:5 Bakhululwe kwabafileyo, njengababuleweyo, belele engcwabeni, ongasabakhumbuliyo, abanqunyulweyo esandleni sakho."
Psalms88:6 Undibeke emhadini ongaphantsi, esithokothokweni, enzonzobileni."
Psalms88:7 Umsindo wakho unam, Undibethele onke amaza akho alwayo. Sela."
Psalms88:8 Abo ndibaziyo ubasusile kum; Undenze ndalisikizi kubo; Ndivalelwe ngaphandle, andikwazi ukuphuma."
Psalms88:9 Iliso lam liyalila kukubandezeleka, Ndidanduluka kuwe, Yehova, yonke imihla, Ndizolulela kuwe izandla zam."
Psalms88:10 Uyathanda na ukwenza imiqondiso kwabafileyo? Baya kuvuka abafileyo na, babulele kuwe? Sela."
Psalms88:11 Inceba yakho uyixelelwa kwabafileyo na? Niya kutshabalala na?
Psalms88:12 Yaziswa emnyameni na imisebenzi yakho ebalulekileyo? Nobulungisa bakho ehlabathini lonke na?
Psalms88:13 Ke mna ndadanduluka kuwe, Yehova; nomthandazo wam uya kunikhusela ngomso."
Psalms88:14 Uwulahlelani na, Yehova, umphefumlo wam? uyabusithelisa ubuso bakho kum?"
Psalms88:15 Ndilusizana, ndiyinto efayo kwasebuncinaneni bam; ngelixa ndinyamezele izoyikiso zakho, ndididekile."
Psalms88:16 Ubushushu bakho buphezu kwam; Ukoyika kwakho kundidlile.
Psalms88:17 Zindijikelezile njengamanzi imini yonke; Zandirhawula kunye.
Psalms88:18 Intanda nomhlobo ubasusile kude kum, abo ndibaziyo ebumnyameni."
Psalms89:1 Iinceba zikaYehova ndiya kuvuma ngazo ngonaphakade; Ndiya kuxela ukuthembeka kwakho ngomlomo wam kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana.
Psalms89:2 Ngokuba ndithi, Inceba iya kwakhelwa ngonaphakade; Ukuthembeka kwakho kuya kukugcinela emazulwini."
Psalms89:3 Ndifungele umnyulwa wam umnqophiso, ndifungele umkhonzi wam uDavide,"
Psalms89:4 Ndiya kuyizimasa ngonaphakade imbewu yakho, Ndiyakhe itrone yakho kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana. Sela."
Psalms89:5 Yehova, izulu liya kuyincoma imisebenzi yakho ebalulekileyo, nawe tshata ebandleni labangcwele."
Psalms89:6 Kuba ngubani na ezulwini onokuthelekiswa noYehova? Ngubani phakathi koonyana bengxilimbela onokuthelekiswa noYehova?
Psalms89:7 Uyoyikeka kakhulu uThixo ebandleni labangcwele, Uyoyikeka kubo bonke abamkhawulelayo."
Psalms89:8 Yehova, Thixo wemikhosi, Ngubani na uYehova onjengawe, oligorha? Ukuthembeka kwakho kukujikelezile?"
Psalms89:9 Ulobukumkani phezu kolwandle olulwayo; Ekuphakameni kwamaza akho, uyawadambisa."
Psalms89:10 Nguwena wamtyumza uRahabhi njengowisiweyo; Uzithi saa iintshaba zakho ngesandla sakho esithe nkqi.
Psalms89:11 Lelakho izulu, likwalelakho ihlabathi; ihlabathi nenzaliseko yalo, Wadala lona."
Psalms89:12 Uphakamisile umntla nomzantsi, iTabhore neHermon zivuye egameni lakho."
Psalms89:13 Unesandla esithe nkqi, isandla sakho somelele, esokunene sakho siphakamile."
Psalms89:14 Isitulo setrone yakho bubulungisa nobulungisa; inceba nenyaniso iya kukukhokela.
Psalms89:15 Hayi, uyolo lwabantu abakwaziyo ukonwaba; baya kuhamba ekukhanyeni kobuso bakho, Yehova."
Psalms89:16 Baya kugcoba egameni lakho imini yonke, baphakame ngobulungisa bakho."
Psalms89:17 Ngokuba isihombo samandla abo nguwe, Uphondo lwethu luphakamile ngokuthanda kwakho."
Psalms89:18 Ngokuba uYehova uyindawo yethu yokusabela; OyiNgcwele kaSirayeli ukumkani wethu.
Psalms89:19 Wathetha kowengcwele wakho ngombono, wathi, Ndincede, ndandoyisa; Ndimphakamisile umnyulwa phakathi kwezizwe."
Psalms89:20 Ndimfumene umkhonzi wam uDavide; ndamthambisa ngeoli yam engcwele.
Psalms89:21 Ngubani na owositywina isandla sam; kwaye isandla sam siya kumomeleza.
Psalms89:22 Utshaba aluyi kuthetha kuye; ke yena unyana wobugqwetha akamcinezeli.
Psalms89:23 Ndiza kuzoyisa iintshaba zakhe phambi kobuso bakhe, ndibathwaxe kakubi abo bamthiyileyo."
Psalms89:24 Kodwa inyaniso yam nenceba yam inaye, nophondo lwakhe luphakame egameni lam."
Psalms89:25 Ndiya kusisa elwandle isandla sakhe, Emilanjeni esokunene sakhe."
Psalms89:26 Yena uya kundibiza, athi, Bawo, unguThixo wam, neliwa lokundisindisa."
Psalms89:27 Ndiya kumenza owamazibulo, Osenyangweni kookumkani behlabathi."
Psalms89:28 Ndiya kumgcinela inceba yam ngamaxesha onke, Ungabi naye umnqophiso wam;"
Psalms89:29 Ndiya kuyenza igcineke imbewu yakhe, netrone yakhe ibe njengemihla yamazulu."
Psalms89:30 Bathe oonyana bakhe babuya emyalelweni wam, abahamba ngemimiselo yam;"
Psalms89:31 Xa bathe bayaphula imithetho yam, abayigcina imithetho yam;"
Psalms89:32 Ndoluvelela ukreqo lwabo ngentonga, nobubi babo ngemivumbo;"
Psalms89:33 Kodwa andiyi kubuhlutha ububele bam kuye, yaye andiyi kubuyeka ukuthembeka kwam."
Psalms89:34 Andiyi kuwaphula umnqophiso wam, nelizwi eliphume emlonyeni wam andiyi kulijika."
Psalms89:35 Ndafunga kwangaxesha lithile ngobungcwele bam, ndathi, Inene, andiyi kumxokisa uDavide;"
Psalms89:36 Oonyana bakhe baya kuphila ngonaphakade, Netrone yakhe njengelanga phambi kwam."
Psalms89:37 Iya kuma ngonaphakade njengenyanga, ibe lingqina elithembekileyo emazulwini. Sela."
Psalms89:38 Kodwa wena wamgatya waza wamthiya, waqumbela umthanjiswa wakho."
Psalms89:39 Uwaphule umnqophiso womkhonzi wakho; Usixabhele isithsaba sakhe ngokusisa phantsi.
Psalms89:40 Izitshabalalisile zonke iinqaba zakhe; Uziphanzisile iinqaba zalo.
Psalms89:41 Bayamphanga bonke abadlula ngendlela; Ulihlazo kummelwane wakhe.
Psalms89:42 Usiphakamisile isandla sokunene sababandezeli bakhe; Uzivuyisile zonke iintshaba zakhe.
Psalms89:43 Ubuye waluguqula uhlangothi lwekrele lakhe, akwamyeka ekulweni;"
Psalms89:44 Niluphelisile uzuko lwakhe, Netrone yakhe niyiwisele phantsi emhlabeni;"
Psalms89:45 Uyinqamle imihla yobutsha bakhe; Umdanisile. Sela.
Psalms89:46 Koda kube nini na, Yehova? Uya kuzifihla ngonaphakade na? Uvutha njengomlilo na umsindo wakho?"
Psalms89:47 Khumbula ukuba ixesha lam lifinyele;
Psalms89:48 Ngubani na umntu ongenakububona ubomi nokufa? Uya kuwusindisa na umphefumlo wakhe esandleni selabafileyo? Sela.
Psalms89:49 Zingaphi na iinceba zakho zangaphambili, Yehova, Owazithethayo kuDavide ngokuthembeka kwakho?"
Psalms89:50 Owu, Nkosi, khumbula ukudana kwabakhonzi bakho; Ndothini na ukuthwala ingcikivo yamagorha onke esifubeni sam;"
Psalms89:51 Ezo iintshaba zakho zimnyelise nabo, Yehova! abawanyelise ngawo amanyathelo omthanjiswa wakho."
Psalms89:52 Makabongwe uYehova ngonaphakade. Amen, kwaye Amen."
Psalms90:1 (Umthandazo kaMoses, mfo wakwaThixo.) Nkosi, wena ulikhaya lethu kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana."
Psalms90:2 Iintaba azikazalwa, kungakhathaliseki nokuba uyalidala na ihlabathi nehlabathi, ukususela kwixesha elingenammiselo ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo, wena unguThixo."
Psalms90:3 Umrholela umntu entshabalalweni; Wathi, Buyani, nyana babantu!"
Psalms90:4 Ngokuba iwaka leminyaka emehlweni akho linjengemini yezolo, xa iphela, nanjengomlindo wasebusuku."
Psalms90:5 Uyabaqweqwedisa njengoMkhukula; bafana nobuthongo; kusasa banjengengca.
Psalms90:6 Kusasa buyatyatyamba, buhlume; ngokuhlwa iyasikwa yomiswe."
Psalms90:7 Ngenxa yokuba sibhangisiwe ngumsindo wakho, siyawoyika umsindo wakho."
Psalms90:8 Ububeke ubugwenxa bethu phambi kwakho, Nezono zethu uzibeke ekukhanyeni kobuso bakho."
Psalms90:9 Ngokuba yonke imihla yethu iphele ngomsindo wakho; iminyaka yethu siyichitha njengebali elibaliswayo.
Psalms90:10 Imihla yeminyaka yethu yiminyaka elishumi elinamithandathu; kwaye ukuba yiminyaka engamashumi asibhozo ngenxa yobunzima, kwangokunjalo amandla ayo ngumsebenzi nosizi; kuba iza kunqunyulwa ngokukhawuleza, kwaye siyayibhabha."
Psalms90:11 Ngubani na owaziyo amandla omsindo wakho? ngokoyikeka kwenu, ukwanjalo umsindo wenu."
Psalms90:12 Ngoko ke sifundise ukuyibala imihla yethu, khon’ ukuze sizuze ubulumko."
Psalms90:13 Buya, Yehova, kude kube nini na? ibe yeyabakhonzi bakho."
Psalms90:14 Sihluthise kwakusasa ngenceba yakho; ukuze sigcobe, sivuye yonke imihla yethu."
Psalms90:15 Usivuyele njengemihla owasicinezela ngayo, Nangokweminyaka esabona ububi ngayo."
Psalms90:16 Mayibonakale kubakhonzi bakho imisebenzi yakho, Nozuko lwakho koonyana babo."
Psalms90:17 Ukulunga kukaYehova uThixo wethu makube kuthi, kusiqinisele isenzo sezandla zethu; ewe, umsebenzi wezandla zethu uyangqina."
Psalms91:1 Ulolala emthunzini woSomandla.
Psalms91:2 Ndithi ke kuYehova, Uyindawo yam yokusabela, negwiba lam; Ndiya kumthemba."
Psalms91:3 Ewe, uya kukuhlangula emgibeni womthiyeli, nakwindyikitya yokufa ebetha intliziyo."
Psalms91:4 Wokugubungela ngeentsiba zakhe, Ukholose phantsi kwamaphiko akhe; Yingweletshetshe yakho nengweletshetshe yakhe."
Psalms91:5 Musa ukoyika ngenxa yonkwantyiso lwasebusuku; nokuba ungumzingeli obhabha emini;
Psalms91:6 kananjalo asiyindyikitya yokufa ehamba ebumnyameni; nokuba yinkunkuma echitha imini.
Psalms91:7 Kuya kuwa iwaka ecaleni kwakho, neshumi lamawaka ngasekunene kwakho; kodwa ayiyi kusondela kuwe."
Psalms91:8 Uya kubona kuphela ngamehlo akho, Uwubone umvuzo wongendawo."
Psalms91:9 Ngokuba umenzile uYehova, indawo yam yokusabela, umenze Oyena Uphakamileyo waba likhaya lakho;"
Psalms91:10 Akuyi kwehlelwa bubi, ukufa akuyi kusondela ententeni yakho."
Psalms91:11 Ngokuba uya kuziwisela umthetho izithunywa zakhe ukuba zikugcine ezindleleni zakho zonke.
Psalms91:12 Ziya kukuthwala ngezandla, Hleze ubetheke etyeni unyawo lwakho."
Psalms91:13 Uya kuzinyathela ingonyama nezizwe; uya kunyathela ingonyama nenamba.
Psalms91:14 Ngokuba endithanda, ndomsindisa; Ndiya kumphakamisa, ngokuba elazi igama lam."
Psalms91:15 Wondibongoza, ndiphendule, Ndoba naye embandezelweni; ndiya kumkhulula ngentlawulelo, ndiya kumzukisa;"
Psalms91:16 Ndiya kumanelisa imihla emide, ndilubone usindiso lwam."
Psalms92:1 (Indumiso okanye Ingoma yomhla wesabatha.) Kulungile ukudumisa uYehova nokuculela igama lakho, Wena usenyangweni!"
Psalms92:2 Ukutyhila inceba yakho kwakusasa, Nokuthembeka kwakho ubusuku bonke;"
Psalms92:3 Umrhubhe ontambo zilishumi, nomrhubhe; ngohadi ngesandi esimnandi."
Psalms92:4 Ngokuba uyandivuyisa, Yehova, ngomsebenzi wakho; ndiya kukoyisa ngemisebenzi yezandla zakho."
Psalms92:5 Hayi, ukuba zininzi izenzo zakho, Yehova! zinzulu kakhulu iingcinga zakho."
Psalms92:6 Umntu owoyikayo akazi; kwaye isidenge asiyiqondi.
Psalms92:7 Ekukhuleni kongendawo njengengca, Naxa bonke abenzi bobubi bephumelela; oko kukuthi, baya kutshatyalaliswa ngonaphakade."
Psalms92:8 Kodwa wena, Yehova, ungOyena Uphakamileyo ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo."
Psalms92:9 Ngokuba uyabona, uYehova iintshaba zakho, ngokuba, uyabona, iintshaba zakho ziva kutshabalala; bonke abenzi bobubi baya kutshabalala."
Psalms92:10 Uya kuluphakamisa uphondo lwam njengolwenqu; Ndigalelwe ioli entsha.
Psalms92:11 Iliso lam liya kukubona ukunqwenela kwam izenzo zam, iindlebe zam ziya kuva abasukela phezulu kum abangendawo."
Psalms92:12 Ilungisa liya kuphumelela njengomthi wesundu, njengomsedare waseLebhanon."
Psalms92:13 Abo batyalwe endlwini kaYehova baya kuphumelela ezintendelezweni zoThixo wethu.
Psalms92:14 Baya kuqhubeka bethwala isiqhamo ebudaleni; baya kutyeba, bophe;"
Psalms92:15 Ukuze abonise ukuba ulilungisa uYehova: Uliwa lam, akukho bubi kuye."
Psalms93:1 uYehova ngukumkani, sambethe ngobuhle; uYehova wambathise ubugorha abebhambathise ngabo; Liqinile ihlabathi, ngokokude lingabi nakushukuma."
Psalms93:2 Itrone yakho iqinile kususela kwaphakade, wena wawukho kususela kwaphakade."
Psalms93:3 Imilambo iphakamisile, Yehova, Imilambo iphakamisile ingxolo yayo; Imilambo iwaphakamisa amaza ayo."
Psalms93:4 uYehova unamandla ngaphezu kwesandi samanzi amaninzi, Ngaphezu kwamaza alatyuzayo olwandle."
Psalms93:5 Anyanisekile ke amacebo akho: Ingcwele indlu yakho, Yehova, kude kuse ephakadeni."
Psalms94:1 uYehova uThixo, impindezelo yeyakhe; Zibonise Thixo, impindezelo;"
Psalms94:2 Ziphakamise, Mgwebi wehlabathi, Ubavuze abanekratshi."
Psalms94:3 Yehova, kuya kude kube nini na abangendawo bekho, kuya kude kube nini na abangendawo bekhona?"
Psalms94:4 Kunini na bethetha amazwi arhabaxa? Baqhayise bonke abangendawo?
Psalms94:5 Yehova, bayabaxovula abantu bakho, balicinezele ilifa lakho."
Psalms94:6 Babulala umhlolokazi nowasemzini, Nenkedama babulala."
Psalms94:7 Bathi ke bona, uYehova akaboni, akaboni uThixo kaYakobi."
Psalms94:8 Qondani, nina zinyabi phakathi kwabantu; nani zinyabi, niya kulumka nini na?"
Psalms94:9 Onendlebe akayi kuva na? Lowo wadala iliso, akayi kubona na?"
Psalms94:10 Lowo wohlwaya iintlanga, akayi kuzohlwaya na? Ofundisa abantu ukwazi, akayi kukwazi na?"
Psalms94:11 uYehova uyazazi iingcinga zabantu, ukuba zingumphunga."
Psalms94:12 Yehova, hayi, uyolo lomntu okuthethisayo, omfundisa umyalelo wakho;"
Psalms94:13 ukuze umphumze ngeemini zobubi, ade ambelwe isihogo ongendawo."
Psalms94:14 Kuba uYehova akayi kubagxotha abantu bakhe, engayi kulishiya nelifa lakhe."
Psalms94:15 Kodwa okusesikweni kuya kubuyela ebulungiseni, kwaye bonke abantliziyo zilungileyo bayakulandela."
Psalms94:16 Ngubani na oya kumelana nabenzi bobubi, ngenxa yam? okanye ngubani na oya kumelana nam nxamnye nabenzi bobubi?"
Psalms94:17 Ukuba akathanga uYehova andincede, Umphefumlo wam ubuzola."
Psalms94:18 Xa ndithi, Lwatyibilika unyawo lwam; Yehova, inceba yakho indixhase."
Psalms94:19 Ebuninzini beengcinga-ngcinga zam, iintuthuzelo zakho ziyawuyolisa umphefumlo wam."
Psalms94:20 Ingahlangana nawe na itrone yolweyeliselo, Wena uceba ububi ngomyalelo?"
Psalms94:21 Balihlanganyela umphefumlo welungisa, baligwebe igazi elingenatyala."
Psalms94:22 Kodwa uYehova uyindawo yam yokusabela; yaye uThixo wam liliwa endisabela kulo.
Psalms94:23 Kwaye uya kuzisa inkohlakalo yabo phezu kwabo aze abatshabalalise ebubini babo; Ewe, uYehova uThixo wethu uya kubatshabalalisa."
Psalms95:1 Yizani simdumise uYehova, sigcobe eweni losindiso lwethu."
Psalms95:2 Masize phambi kobuso bakhe sinombulelo, simdumise ngeendumiso."
Psalms95:3 Ngokuba uYehova nguThixo omkhulu, yiNkosi enkulu ngaphezu koothixo bonke."
Psalms95:4 Ubunzulu bomhlaba busesandleni sakhe; namandla eentaba ngawakhe.
Psalms95:5 Ulolwakhe ulwandle, nguyena walwenzayo, Nomhlaba owomileyo zawenza izandla zakhe."
Psalms95:6 Yizani, masiqubude, sithobe; masiguqe phambi koYehova, uMdali wethu."
Psalms95:7 Ngokuba nguThixo wethu yena; yaye thina singabantu bedlelo lakhe nezimvu zesandla sakhe. Namhlanje ukuba ufuna ukuva ilizwi lakhe,"
Psalms95:8 Musani ukuzenza lukhuni iintliziyo zenu, njengasesihendweni, nasekuhendweni entlango."
Psalms95:9 Bandicikida ooyihlo, bandicikida, bayibona imisebenzi yam."

Psalms95:11 Ndibafungile ndinomsindo, ukuba abayi kungena ekuphumleni kwam;"
Psalms96:1 Vumani kuYehova ingoma entsha; Vumani kuYehova, nonke hlabathi."
Psalms96:2 Vumani kuYehova, lidumiseni igama lakhe; vakalisani usindiso lwakhe imihla ngemihla."
Psalms96:3 Balisani ezintlangeni zonke uzuko lwakhe, Balisani ezizweni zonke imisebenzi yakhe ebalulekileyo."
Psalms96:4 Ngokuba mkhulu uYehova, efanelwe yindumiso eninzi; Uyoyikeka ngaphezu koothixo bonke."
Psalms96:5 Kuba bonke oothixo beentlanga banqula izithixo, kodwa uYehova wenza amazulu."
Psalms96:6 Isihomo nesithozela siphambi kwakhe, amandla nobuhle busengcweleni yakhe."
Psalms96:7 Mnikeni uYehova, nina zintlanga, mnikeni uYehova uzuko namandla;"
Psalms96:8 Zisani kuYehova uzuko lwegama lakhe; zidinile, ningene ezintendelezweni zakhe."
Psalms96:9 Mnquleni uYehova ngencasa engcwele; moyikeni, nonke hlabathi."
Psalms96:10 Yithini ezintlangeni, Nithi, uYehova ngukumkani; uya kugweba iintlanga ngobulungisa."
Psalms96:11 Malivuye izulu, ligcobe ihlabathi; Malugqume ulwandle, lugcwale."
Psalms96:12 Intsimi mayivuye, nento yonke ekulo; yandule yonke imithi yehlathi ivuye;"
Psalms96:13 Phambi kobuso bukaYehova, ngokuba esiza, ngokuba esiza kuligweba ihlabathi; Uya kuligweba elimiweyo ngobulungisa, Nezizwe ngenyaniso yakhe."
Psalms97:1 uYehova ngukumkani; malibe nemihlali ihlabathi; izihlwele zaseziqithini mazivuye.

Psalms97:3 Kuphuma umlilo phambi kwakhe uze utshise iintshaba zakhe kuyo yonke indawo.
Psalms97:4 Ikhanyisa elimiweyo imibane yakhe, Labona elimiweyo, lanyikima."
Psalms97:5 Iintaba zanyibilika njengomthwebeba phambi koYehova, Phambi kweNkosi yehlabathi lonke."

Psalms98:1 (iNdumiso.) Mvumeleni ingoma entsha uYehova; ngokuba wenzé imisebenzi ebalulekileyo, isandla sakhe sokunene, nesandla sakhe esingcwele simnike uloyiso."

Psalms98:7 Malugqume ulwandle nokuzala kwalo; ihlabathi abahlala kulo.

Psalms99:2 uYehova mkhulu eZiyon; kwaye ungaphezu kwabantu bonke.
