Psalms100:1 Umhobe woguquko. Vumani kuYehova, nonke zintlanga."
Psalms100:2 Mkhonzeni uYehova nivuya; esiza phambi kobuso bakhe evuya.
Psalms100:3 Uyazi na ukuba uYehova nguThixo; nguye owasenzayo, asisithi; singabantu bakhe nezimvu zedlelo lakhe."
Psalms100:4 Ngenani emasangweni akhe nibulela, Ezintendelezweni zakhe nibulela; bulelani, nilidumise igama lakhe."
Psalms100:5 Ngokuba uYehova ulungile; Inceba yakhe ingunaphakade; kwaye inyaniso yakhe isuka kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana.
Psalms101:1 (Indumiso kaDavide.) Ndiyathanda ukucula ngenceba nobulungisa; Ndiyakuthanda ukucula indumiso yakho, Yehova."
Psalms101:2 Ndiya kwenza ngengqiqo ngendlela egqibeleleyo; Uya kuza nini kum? Ndiya kuhamba endlwini yam ngentliziyo epheleleyo.
Psalms101:3 Andiyi kubeka nanye ububi phambi kwamehlo am; ayinakunamathela kum.
Psalms101:4 Intliziyo enobubi iya kuphuma kum; Abangendawo andiyi kubazi.
Psalms101:5 Omhlebayo ummelwane wakhe ngasese, Lowo ndiya kumbhangisa; Ozidlayo, ozidlayo, andiyi kubandezeleka;"
Psalms101:6 Amehlo am akwaba ngabathembekileyo ehlabathini, Ukuba bahlale nam; Ohamba ngendlela ethe tye nguye oya kundikhonza."
Psalms101:7 Lowo ukhohlisayo makangahlali endlwini yam; Othetha ubuxoki akayi kulibala phambi kwamehlo am.
Psalms101:8 Ndiya kubatshabalalisa kuqala bonke abangendawo belizwe; ukuze ndibatshabalalise bonke abangendawo emzini kaYehova.
Psalms102:1 Umthandazo wolusizana xa ephelelwe lithemba, uphalaza iinyembezi zakhe phambi koYehova. Yehova, wuve umthandazo wam, Kufike kuwe ukuzibika kwam."
Psalms102:2 Musa ukubusithelisa ubuso bakho kum ngemini yokubandezelwa kwam; Mamela kum; xa ndibizayo, khawuleza undiphendule."
Psalms102:3 Ngokuba iyaphela imihla yam njengomsi; Amathambo am avutha njengeziko.
Psalms102:4 Yomile njengengca, intliziyo yam yomile; kangangokuba ndilibele nokudla isonka sam."
Psalms102:5 Ngenxa yesandi sokuncwina kwam, Amathambo am athe nca eluswini lwam."
Psalms102:6 Ndifana nexhalanga lasentlango, Ndifana nesikhova sasentlango."
Psalms102:7 Ndakhangela, ndaba njengongqatyana phezu kwendlu;"
Psalms102:8 Imini yonke ziyandigiba iintshaba zam; Abandiqumbeleyo bandifungele.
Psalms102:9 Ngokuba ndidle uthuthu njengesonka, Into endiyiselayo ndiyiphithikeze ngeenyembezi;"
Psalms102:10 Ngenxa yomsindo wakho nangenxa yomsindo wakho, ngenxa yokuba undifunqule wandiphosa phantsi."
Psalms102:11 Injengethunzi lesithunzi imihla yam; ndoma njengengca.
Psalms102:12 Ke wena, Yehova, uya kuba lapho ngonaphakade; Nesikhumbuzo sakho kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana."
Psalms102:13 Uya kuvuka uze ube nenceba ngeZiyon, ngenxa yokuba ixesha lokuyikholisa, ewe, ixesha elimisiweyo lifikile."
Psalms102:14 Ngokuba abakhonzi bakho bawavuyelele amatye ayo, Bagcobe ngothuli lwayo."
Psalms102:15 Ziya kuloyika iintlanga igama likaYehova, nookumkani bonke behlabathi baloyike uzuko lwakho."
Psalms102:16 Xa uYehova eyakha iZiyon, uya kubonakala esebuqaqawulini bakhe."
Psalms102:17 Uya kuwuva umthandazo weentsizana, Awucekise umthandazo wabo."
Psalms102:18 Oku kuya kubhalelwa isizukulwana esilandelayo, kuze kudalwe abantu abaza kudumisa uYehova."
Psalms102:19 Ngokuba uqondele esendaweni ephakamileyo yengcwele yakhe; uYehova walibona esezulwini;
Psalms102:20 Ekuveni ukuhlahlamba kombanjwa; ukuba abakhulule abagwetyelwe ukufa;
Psalms102:21 Ukuvakalisa eZiyon igama likaYehova, nendumiso yakhe eYerusalem;"
Psalms102:22 Xa iintlanga noorhulumente behlanganisana ukuze bakhonze uYehova.
Psalms102:23 Wawatyhafisa amandla am endleleni; uyinqumle imihla yam.
Psalms102:24 Ndathi, Thixo wam, musa ukundisusa phakathi kwemihla yam; Iminyaka yakho ikwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana."
Psalms102:25 Wena usoloko udala ihlabathi, Namazulu angumsebenzi wezandla zakho."
Psalms102:26 Ezo zinto ziya kudaka, wena ke ume; ewe, bonke baya konakala njengengubo; baya kutshintshwa njengengubo, baya kutshintshwa;"
Psalms102:27 Kodwa usewedwa, neminyaka yakho ayiyi kuphela."
Psalms102:28 Oonyana babakhonzi bakho bosala, nembewu yabo yomelele phambi kwakho."
Psalms103:1 Umhobe kaDavide.
Psalms103:2 Mbonge uYehova, mphefumlo wam, Ungayilibali yonke impatho yakhe entle."
Psalms103:3 Uloxolela zonke izono zakho; ophilisa zonke izifo zakho;
Psalms103:4 Ulokhulula ubomi bakho esihogweni; othwele isithsaba senceba nesithsaba;
Psalms103:5 Ulowuzalisa umlomo wakho ngezinto ezilungileyo; ukuze buhlaziyeke ubutsha bakho njengobokhozi.
Psalms103:6 uYehova wenza okusesikweni nobulungisa kubo bonke abacinezelweyo.
Psalms103:7 Umazisi weendlela zakhe kuMoses, oonyana bakaSirayeli izenzo zakhe ezincamisileyo."
Psalms103:8 uYehova unenceba, unobabalo, uzeka kade umsindo, uzele yinceba."
Psalms103:9 Akayi kuhlala exabana, akawugcini umsindo wakhe ngonaphakade."
Psalms103:10 Akasenzanga ngokwezono zethu; kwaye akasiphindezeli ngokwezigwenxa zethu.
Psalms103:11 Ngokuba injengokuphakama kwezulu phezu komhlaba, Ukuba namandla, inceba yakhe kwabamoyikayo;"
Psalms103:12 Njengokuba impumalanga ikude lee entshonalanga, Ubukhwelelisile kuye ubugwenxa bethu;"
Psalms103:13 Kunjengokusikwa yimfesane koyise kubantwana, ukusikwa yimfesane kukaYehova kwabamoyikayo."
Psalms103:14 Ngokuba uyasazi isimo sethu; ukhumbula ukuba siluthuli.
Psalms103:15 Umntu yena, injengotyani imihla yakhe; njengentyantyambo yelizwe, uyadubula ngolo hlobo."
Psalms103:16 Ngokuba umoya uvuthuza phezu kwayo, ingabikho; nendawo yayo ayisayi kuphinda yaziwe."
Psalms103:17 Ke yona inceba kaYehova ingunaphakade kwabamoyikayo, Nobulungisa bakhe bukoonyana boonyana;"
Psalms103:18 Kwabawugcinayo umnqophiso wakhe, Kwabazikhumbulayo iziyalezo zakhe ukuba bazenze."
Psalms103:19 uYehova uyizinzisile emazulwini itrone yakhe; nobukumkani bakhe bulawula phezu kwento yonke.
Psalms103:20 Mdumiseni uYehova, nina zithunywa zakhe, nina balawuli bobugorha, balenzayo ilizwi lakhe, niphulaphula isandi selizwi lakhe."
Psalms103:21 Mdumiseni uYehova, nonke nina bhunga lakhe; nina bakhonzi bakhe, abenza ukuthanda kwakhe okulungileyo."
Psalms103:22 Mdumiseni uYehova, nonke zenzo zakhe, Ezindaweni zonke zobukumkani bakhe; Mbonge uYehova, mphefumlo wam;"
Psalms104:1 Mbonge uYehova, mphefumlo wam. Yehova, Thixo wam, umkhulu kakhulu; wambeswe ubungangamsha nobungangamsha."
Psalms104:2 Owanambesa ngokukhanya njengengubo, Waneka izulu njengeqhiya;"
Psalms104:3 Ulomisa emanzini imiqadi yezindlu zakhe, Ulowenza amafu inqwelo yakhe, Ulohamba ngamaphiko omoya;"
Psalms104:4 Ulozenza izithunywa zakhe imimoya; abakhonzi bakhe bangumlilo otshayo;
Psalms104:5 owalidalayo ihlabathi, ukuba lingashukunyiswa naphakade kanaphakade."
Psalms104:6 Waligubungela ngomsinga wamanzi njengengubo, Ema amanzi phezu kweentaba."
Psalms104:7 Ungayithethisi kabukhali, yabaleka; kwakuva ukuduma kwakho, zimka ngokukhawuleza."
Psalms104:8 Enyuka aya ezintabeni; ehla ezihlanjeni, aya kuloo ndawo ubuwalungisele yona."
Psalms104:9 Ubamisele umda abangenakuwuwela; hleze babuye bawugubungele umhlaba.
Psalms104:10 Ulothumela imithombo ezintlanjeni, Ephakathi kweenduli;"
Psalms104:11 Iseza zonke izilo zelizwe, amahashe elizwe acima unxano lwawo."
Psalms104:12 Kuya kuhlala kuwo iintaka zezulu, zithethe phakathi kwamasebe;"
Psalms104:13 Uloseza iintaba kumagumbi akhe; liyahlutha ihlabathi ziziqhamo zezenzo zakho.
Psalms104:14 Ulontshulisela iinkomo utyani, nezityalo zokulungiselela umntu, ukuze kuphume ukudla emhlabeni;"
Psalms104:15 newayini evuyisa intliziyo yomntu, neoli ebukhazimlisa ubuso bakhe, nesonka siyixhase intliziyo yomntu."
Psalms104:16 Imithi kaYehova izele yincindi; yimisedare yaseLebhanon awayityalayo;
Psalms104:17 Apho iintaka zakha khona iindlwane zazo, nengwamza, likhaya labo lemisipres."
Psalms104:18 Zizimela zamaxhama iintaba ezinde; kunye namatye e-cones.
Psalms104:19 Inyanga wayimisela ngokwamaxesha; Ilanga liyakwazi ukutshona kwalo.
Psalms104:20 Wenza ubumnyama, kube bubusuku, Anyakazele kuwo onke amarhamncwa elizwe."
Psalms104:21 Iingonyama ezintsha zigquma emaxhobani, Zifune ukutya kwazo kuThixo."
Psalms104:22 Lakuphuma ilanga, ziyabuthana, zizimele emingxunyeni yazo."
Psalms104:23 Umntu uyahamba aye emsebenzini wakhe nasemsebenzini wakhe de kube ngokuhlwa.
Psalms104:24 Hayi indlela emininzi ngayo imisebenzi yakho, Yehova! Uzenze ngobulumko zonke ziphela; Uzele umhlaba bubutyebi bakho."
Psalms104:25 Kukwanjalo kolu lwandle lukhulu, lubanzi ngeenxa zombini, kukho ezirhubuluzayo ezingenakubalwa, ezincinci nezinkulu."
Psalms104:26 Kulapho iinqanawa zihamba khona;
Psalms104:27 Bonke abantu balindele wena; ukuba unokubanika ukutya ngexesha elifanelekileyo.
Psalms104:28 Obanika kona, bayakubutha; Uyasivula isandla sakho, ziyahlutha kokulungileyo."
Psalms104:29 Uyabusithelisa ubuso bakho, ziyadana; Uyawususa umoya wazo, ziphume umphefumlo, Zibuyele eluthulini lwazo."
Psalms104:30 Uthumela uMoya wakho, zidalwe, Ubuhlaziye ubuso behlabathi."
Psalms104:31 Uzuko lukaYehova luya kuba lapho ngonaphakade; uYehova uya kukholiswa yimisebenzi yakhe.
Psalms104:32 Uyalikhangela ilizwe, lingcangcazele; Uchukumisa iinduli, atshaye;"
Psalms104:33 Ndithanda ukudumisa uYehova ngoxa ndisaphila;
Psalms104:34 Makube nencasa kuye ukucamngca kwam; Mna ndiya kugcoba ngoYehova.
Psalms104:35 Mabatshatyalaliswe aboni ehlabathini, bangabi sabakho abangendawo. Mbonge uYehova, mphefumlo wam! Dumisani uYehova."
Psalms105:1 Mdumiseni uYehova; nqulani igama lakhe, nizazise ezintlangeni izenzo zakhe."
Psalms105:2 Vumani uzuko lwakhe, mbetheleni uhadi; xelani yonke imisebenzi yakhe ebalulekileyo."
Psalms105:3 Qhayisani ngegama lakhe elingcwele; mayivuye intliziyo yabamngxameleyo uYehova.
Psalms105:4 Mfuneni uYehova namandla akhe; nisoloko nifuna ubuso bakhe.
Psalms105:5 Qwalaselani imimangaliso awayenzayo; izimanga zakhe nezigwebo zomlomo wakhe;
Psalms105:6 Nina nyana baka-Abraham, umkhonzi wakhe, Nyana bakaYakobi, banyulwa bakhe!"
Psalms105:7 NguYehova uThixo wethu yena; Zisehlabathini lonke izigwebo zakhe.
Psalms105:8 Wawukhumbula ngonaphakade umnqophiso wakhe, Ilizwi awalimisela iwaka lezizukulwana."
Psalms105:9 Wanqophisana noAbraham, Nokufunga kwakhe kuIsake;"
Psalms105:10 Walimisa kuYakobi ukuba libe ngummiselo, KuSirayeli ukuba libe ngumnqophiso ongunaphakade."
Psalms105:11 Wathi, Ndikunika ilizwe lakwaKanan, libe lilifa lenu."
Psalms105:12 Xa babengamadoda ambalwa ngenani; ewe, bambalwa kakhulu, nabasemzini kuloo nto."
Psalms105:13 Bahamba besuka kolunye uhlanga, baye kolunye uhlanga, Besuka kobunye ubukumkani, baye kolunye uhlanga;"
Psalms105:14 Akavumelanga mntu ukuba abenzakalise; ewe, wabakhalimela ookumkani ngenxa yabo;"
Psalms105:15 Wathi, Musani ukubachukumisa abathanjiswa bam, Musani ukubaphatha kakubi abaprofeti bam."
Psalms105:16 Ngaphezu koko, wabiza indlala ehlabathini; wasiqhekeza sonke isonka."
Psalms105:17 Wathuma indoda ukuba ibaqhubele, inguYosefu;"
Psalms105:18 Owabayilimaza imilenze ngamakhamandela, wafakwa entsimbini;"
Psalms105:19 Lada lafika ilizwi lakhe, ilizwi likaYehova lamlinga."
Psalms105:20 uYehova wathumela ukuba amkhulule; nomphathi wabantu, wamndulula."
Psalms105:21 Wammisa ukuba abe ngukumkani wendlu yakhe, nomlawuli wabo bonke ubutyebi bakhe."
Psalms105:22 Ukubakhonkxa abathetheli bakhe ngokuzithandela kwakhe; abalungiseleli bakhe abafundise ubulumko.
Psalms105:23 Naye uSirayeli wangena eYiputa; uYakobi waphambukela ezweni laseHama.
Psalms105:24 Wabandisa kakhulu abantu bakhe; wabenza bomelela ngaphezu kweentshaba zabo.
Psalms105:25 Waziguqula iintliziyo zabo ukuba babathiye abantu bakhe, abaqhathe abakhonzi bakhe."
Psalms105:26 Wathuma uMoses umkhonzi wakhe; noAron owamnyulayo.
Psalms105:27 Benza kubo kubo imiqondiso yakhe, Nezimanga zakhe ezweni lakwaKama."
Psalms105:28 Wathumela ubumnyama, kwaba mnyama; kwaye abazange bavukele ilizwi lakhe."
Psalms105:29 Wawaguqula amanzi aba ligazi, wazibulala iintlanzi zabo."
Psalms105:30 Ilizwe labo livelisa amasele amaninzi, ezindlwini zookumkani babo."
Psalms105:31 Wathetha, kwafika iintlobo ngeentlobo zeempukane neengcongconi ezweni labo."
Psalms105:32 Wabanika imvula isichotho, namalangatye omlilo ezweni labo."
Psalms105:33 Wabetha nezidiliya zabo nemikhiwane yabo; bagawule imithi yelizwe labo.
Psalms105:34 Wathetha, kwaza kwafika iinkumbi ezandayo, nabangenakubalwa."
Psalms105:35 Zayidla yonke imifuno yelizwe labo, zadla iziqhamo zomhlaba wabo."
Psalms105:36 Wabazuza kunye nabo bonke abamazibulo belizwe labo, Abagwebi bobugorha babo bonke."
Psalms105:37 Wakhupha isilivere negolide kubo, akwabakho mntu uswele amandla emizalwaneni yabo."
Psalms105:38 Avuya amaYiputa ekuphumeni kwawo, kuba ebesoyika ukuwa."
Psalms105:39 Walivula ilifu njengekhuselo; nomlilo ukhanyise ebusuku.
Psalms105:40 Abantu bacela, waza wazisa izagwityi waza wabondla ngesonka sasezulwini."
Psalms105:41 Wavula iliwa, kwaphuma amanzi; baya endaweni eyomileyo njengomlambo."
Psalms105:42 Kuba wayecinga ngesithembiso sakhe esingcwele nangoAbraham umkhonzi wakhe.
Psalms105:43 Wabakhupha ke abantu bakhe bevuya, nabanyulwa bakhe bevuya."
Psalms105:44 Babanika amazwe ezizwe, bawudla ilifa umsebenzi wabantu;"
Psalms105:45 ukuze bayigcine imithetho yakhe, bayigcine imiyalelo yakhe. Dumisani uYehova."
Psalms106:1 Dumisani uYehova. Dumisani uYehova; ngokuba elungile, ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms106:2 Ngubani na onokuzixela izenzo zobugorha zikaYehova? Ngubani na onokuyicengceleza yonke imibongo yakhe?
Psalms106:3 Hayi, uyolo lwalowo ulugcinayo ubulungisa, Owenza ubulungisa ngamaxesha onke!"
Psalms106:4 Ndikhumbule, Yehova, ngenxa yokulunga kwakho okwenzela abantu bakho; ndivelele ngosindiso lwakho;"
Psalms106:5 Ukuze ndibone inyhweba yabanyulwa bakho, Ndivuye ekuvuyeleleni kwabantu bakho, Ndiqhayise ngelifa lakho."
Psalms106:6 Sonile kunye noobawo, senze ubugwenxa, senze ubugwenxa."
Psalms106:7 Oobawo abayiqiqanga eYiputa imisebenzi yakho ebalulekileyo; ababucinganga ubuninzi beenceba zakho; kodwa wamgculela ngaselwandle, kananjalo nangaseSchelfsee."
Psalms106:8 Kodwa wabasindisa ngenxa yegama lakhe, ukuze abazise ubungangamsha bakhe."
Psalms106:9 Wayikhalimela iShelfsee, yoma; wabakhokelela enzulwini, ngathi bahamba entlango."
Psalms106:10 Wabahlangula esandleni sabamthiyileyo, Wabahlangula esandleni seentshaba."
Psalms106:11 Amanzi abagubungela ababandezeli babo; akwasala namnye kubo.
Psalms106:12 Bakholwa ke ngamazwi akhe; bacula umbongo wakhe.
Psalms106:13 Bazilibala ngokukhawuleza izenzo zakhe; abazange balindele icebiso lakhe.
Psalms106:14 Ke abo bathanda entlango, Bamlinga uThixo entlango;"
Psalms106:15 Wabanika ke ngokwesicelo sabo; ke yena wathumela ukutyumza emiphefumlweni yabo.
Psalms106:16 Bammonela uMoses eminqubeni, nangoAron ongcwele kaYehova."
Psalms106:17 Wavuleka umhlaba, wamginya uDatan, wawugubungela umkhosi ka-Abhiram."
Psalms106:18 Watsha umlilo wathi kwingxokolo yabo; idangatye liyabadla abangendawo.
Psalms106:19 Benza ithole eHorebhe, baqubuda emfanekisweni otyhidiweyo."
Psalms106:20 Balwananisa uzuko lwabo ngembonakalo yenkunzi yenkomo, edla utyani."
Psalms106:21 Bamlibala uThixo, umsindisi wabo, Owenza izinto ezinkulu eYiputa;"
Psalms106:22 Imisebenzi ebalulekileyo ezweni laseKama Nezinto ezoyikekayo eLwandle oluBomvu.
Psalms106:23 Kungoko wathi uya kubatshabalalisa, ukuba wesukanga uMoses, umnyulwa wakhe, wesuka wema phezu kwakhe ethubeni, ukuba awuthintele umsindo wakhe, ukuba angatshabalalisi."
Psalms106:24 Ewe, balicekisa ilizwe elihle, Abakholwa lilizwi lakhe."
Psalms106:25 Bakrokra ezintenteni zabo, àbaliphulaphula ilizwi likaYehova."
Psalms106:26 Wabaphakamisela ke isandla sakhe, ukuba abaphose entlango;"
Psalms106:27 ukuba ayitshabalalise inzala yabo phakathi kweentlanga, ayichithachithe emazweni."
Psalms106:28 Bazibandakanya noBhahali-pehore, Badla imibingelelo yabafileyo;"
Psalms106:29 Bamqumbisa ngezenzo zabo; sabakho ke kubo isibetho.
Psalms106:30 Wesuka wema uPinehasi, wasiphumeza eso sibetho;"
Psalms106:31 Kwaye wabalelwa ekubeni lilungisa ukususela kwisizukulwana kuye kwisizukulwana kuse ephakadeni.
Psalms106:32 Bamqumbisa ke ngamanzi omkhosi, wagalala uMoses ngenxa yabo."
Psalms106:33 Ngokuba bawuqumbise umphefumlo wakhe, Wathetha ngobudenge ngomlomo wakhe."
Psalms106:34 Abazange bazitshabalalise iintlanga awayebawisele umthetho ngazo uYehova.
Psalms106:35 Kodwa bahlangana nabeentlanga, baza bafunda imisebenzi yabo."
Psalms106:36 Bakhonza oothixo bazo ababuxoki, baba ngumgibe kubo."
Psalms106:37 Babingelela ngoonyana babo nangeentombi zabo kwiidemon;
Psalms106:38 Baphalaza igazi elimsulwa, igazi loonyana babo neleentombi zabo, ababebingelelwe koothixo abangcolileyo bakwaKanan; lahlanjelwa ilizwe ligazi."
Psalms106:39 Bazenza iinqambi ngezenzo zabo, bakrexeza ngezinto abaziqilileyo."
Psalms106:40 Wavutha ke umsindo kaYehova kubantu bakhe, kangangokuba walizonda ilifa lakhe."
Psalms106:41 Wabanikela ezandleni zeentlanga; balawulwa ngababathiyileyo.
Psalms106:42 Zabacinezela iintshaba zabo baza boyiswa phantsi kwezandla zabo.
Psalms106:43 Wabahlangula izihlandlo ezininzi; kodwa basuka bamenza intlekisa ngeengcebiso zabo, bethobekile ngobubi babo."
Psalms106:44 Wakubona ukubandezeleka kwabo, Akuva ukuhlahlamba kwabo."
Psalms106:45 Wawukhumbula umnqophiso wakhe kubo, Wazohlwaya ngenxa yobuninzi beenceba zakhe."
Psalms106:46 Waba nosizi ngabo bonke abo babebathimbile.
Psalms106:47 Yehova, Thixo wethu, sihlangule, sibuthe ezintlangeni, Ukuze sidumise igama lakho elingcwele, Sizingce ngendumiso yakho."
Psalms106:48 Makabongwe uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, kususela kwaphakade kude kuse ephakadeni, bathi bonke abantu, Amen! Dumisani uYehova."
Psalms107:1 Mdumiseni uYehova, ngokuba elungile, Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms107:2 Kutshiwo ngabakhululwa bakaYehova, Awabakhululayo esandleni sotshaba;"
Psalms107:3 Bahlanganisana emazweni ehlabathi, empumalanga nasentshonalanga, nasentla, nasezantsi."
Psalms107:4 Balamka entlango, ngendlela esecaleni; abafumana sixeko sokuhlala."
Psalms107:5 Indlala nokunxanwa kwawenza watyhafa umoya wabo phakathi kwabo.
Psalms107:6 Bamnqula ke uYehova embandezelweni yabo, Wabahlangula ekubandezelekeni kwabo."
Psalms107:7 Wabakhapha ngendlela ethe tye, ukuze bangene kumzi wokuhlala."
Psalms107:8 Akwaba abantu bebenokudumisa uYehova ngokulunga kwakhe nangemimangaliso ayenzele oonyana babantu!
Psalms107:9 Ngokuba wawudlisa umphefumlo olambileyo, Wawudlisa okulungileyo umphefumlo olambileyo."
Psalms107:10 Abahleli emnyameni nasethunzini lokufa, bekhonkxiwe ziimbandezelo nesinyithi;"
Psalms107:11 Ngokuba baphikise amazwi kaThixo, Balidela icebo lOsenyangweni;"
Psalms107:12 Ke ngoko, wazithambisa iintliziyo zabo ngobunzima; bawa, akwabakho mncedi."
Psalms107:13 Bandula ke babiza kuYehova ekubandezelekeni kwabo, waza wabahlangula ekubandezelekeni kwabo."
Psalms107:14 Wabakhupha emnyameni nasethunzini lokufa, Waziqhawula iimbophelelo zabo."
Psalms107:15 Akwaba abantu bebenokudumisa uYehova ngokulunga kwakhe nangemimangaliso ayenzele oonyana babantu!
Psalms107:16 Ngokuba ezaphule iingcango zobhedu, nemivalo yesinyithi;"
Psalms107:17 Izimathane zicudiswa lukreqo lwazo nangenxa yobugwenxa babo.
Psalms107:18 Umphefumlo wabo ukwale konke ukudla; basondela emasangweni okufa.
Psalms107:19 Bakhala ke kuYehova embandezelweni yabo, Wabahlangula ekubandezelekeni kwabo."
Psalms107:20 Wathumela ilizwi lakhe, wabaphilisa, Wabahlangula ekufeni."
Psalms107:21 Akwaba abantu bebenokudumisa uYehova ngokulunga kwakhe nangemimangaliso ayenzele oonyana babantu!
Psalms107:22 Mababingelele imibingelelo yombulelo, Bancokole ngezenzo zakhe benemihlali."
Psalms107:23 Abaya elwandle ngeenqanawa, Abarhwebi emanzini amaninzi;"
Psalms107:24 Bazibona izenzo zikaYehova, nemimangaliso yakhe enzulwini."
Psalms107:25 Kuba uwise umthetho, aphakamise umoya wesaqhwithi, sinyuse amaza aso."
Psalms107:26 Benyuka baya emazulwini, babuya behla emanzini anzongonzongo; Umphefumlo wabo uyanyibilika ngenxa yokubandezeleka."
Psalms107:27 Bayahexa njengenxila, baphelelwe zingqondo."
Psalms107:28 Bakhala ke kuYehova embandezelweni yabo, Wabakhupha embandezelweni yabo."
Psalms107:29 Ulodambisa isaqhwithi, azole amaza aso;"
Psalms107:30 Ngoku bayavuya, kuba edambile; yiyo loo nto ebazisa kwizibuko abalinqwenelayo."
Psalms107:31 Akwaba nje abantu bebenokudumisa uYehova ngenxa yokulunga kwakhe nemimangaliso yakhe kubantwana babantu!
Psalms107:32 Mabamphakamise ebandleni labantu, Bamdumise ebandleni lamadoda amakhulu."
Psalms107:33 Wenza imilambo enkqantosini, Nemithombo yamanzi emhlabeni owomileyo;"
Psalms107:34 Ilizwe elityebileyo malibe lugwali, ngenxa yezinto ezimbi zabemi balo."
Psalms107:35 Uloguqula intlango ibe yimithombo yamanzi, Umqwebedu ube yimithombo yamanzi."
Psalms107:36 Wadlisa khona abalambileyo, ukuze balungise umzi abangahlala kuwo;"
Psalms107:37 Bahlwayeleni emasimini, nityale izidiliya ezineziqhamo."
Psalms107:38 Wabasikelela naye, banda kunene; kwaye abazange batshayele."
Psalms107:39 Bathotywa kananjalo bathotywa yingcinezelo, ukubandezeleka nosizi."
Psalms107:40 Ugalela indelo phezu kweenkosana kwaye azenze zibhadulise entlango apho kungekho ndlela.
Psalms107:41 Kodwa yena uyamphakamisa ekubandezelekeni kwabasweleyo, Amenzele iintsapho njengomhlambi."
Psalms107:42 Amalungisa aya kubona aze avuye, nabo bonke ububi buya kuwuvala umlomo wabo."
Psalms107:43 Lowo usisilumko nofuna ukuzigcina ezi zinto uya kubuqonda ububele bukaYehova.
Psalms108:1 (Ingoma kaDavide.) Thixo, izimasekile intliziyo yam; ndiya kuvuma, ndidumise, kwanozuko lwam."
Psalms108:2 Suk’ ume, mrhubhe nengqongqo, Ndivuke kusasa."
Psalms108:3 Yehova, ndiya kukubonga phakathi kweentlanga, ndiya kukudumisa phakathi kweentlanga."
Psalms108:4 Ngokuba inkulu ngaphezu kwezulu inceba yakho, Yada yesa esibhakabhakeni inyaniso yakho."
Psalms108:5 Ziphakamise ngaphezu kwezulu, Thixo, Buphezu kwehlabathi lonke ubuqaqawuli bakho;"
Psalms108:6 Ukuze zisindiswe iintánda zakho, Sindisa ngesandla sakho sokunene, undiphendule."
Psalms108:7 uThixo uthethe engcwele; Ndiya kumemelela uShekem, ndiyilinganisele intili yaseSukoti."
Psalms108:8 Ngowam uGiliyadi; ngowam uManase; uEfrayim sisigwiba sentloko yam; uYuda umazi womyalelo wam;
Psalms108:9 uMowabhi sisitya sam; Ndiya kuyiphosa kwaEdom imbadada yam; ndiya kuloyisa amaFilisti.
Psalms108:10 Ngubani na owondisa emzini onqatyisiweyo? ngubani na owondikhaphela kwaEdom?
Psalms108:11 Thixo, akufuni na oko sikulahlekeleyo? Ke wena, Thixo, akuyi kuhamba nemikhosi yethu na?"
Psalms108:12 Sincede ekubandezelekeni kwethu, ngokuba uncedo lomntu luyinto engento."
Psalms108:13 NgoThixo siya kwenza ngokungafihlisiyo, ngokuba uya kuzinyathela iintshaba zethu."
Psalms109:1 Umhobe kaDavide. Yithi tu, Thixo wendumiso yam;"
Psalms109:2 Ngokuba uvulwe kum umlomo wongendawo, nomlomo wabakhohlisayo; bathetha ubuxoki ngam."
Psalms109:3 Bandijikele ngeentetho zentiyo; kwaye wandilwela ngaphandle kwesizathu.
Psalms109:4 Ngenxa yothando lwam bayandichasa, ke mna ndithandaza."
Psalms109:5 Babuyisela ububi bam esikhundleni sokulungileyo, nentiyo ngokuthanda kwam."
Psalms109:6 Bekani ongendawo phezu kwakhe, makeme uSathana ngasekunene kwakhe."
Psalms109:7 Ekugwetyweni kwakhe uyagwetywa, Nomthandazo wakhe uba sisono."
Psalms109:8 Imihla yakhe mayibe mifutshane; umntu makahlale esihlalweni sakhe.
Psalms109:9 Oonyana bakhe mababe ziinkedama, Nomkakhe abe ngumhlolokazi."
Psalms109:10 Babhadule becela abantwana bakhe ngamaxesha onke; mabafune isonka eminqubeni yabo engamanxuwa.
Psalms109:11 Umenzi-bubi makayithabathe yonke into anayo; Oonyana bolunye uhlanga bawuphange umsebenzi wakhe.
Psalms109:12 Makungabikho uba nenceba kuye;
Psalms109:13 Batshabalale oonyana bakhe; igama labo malicinywe kwisizukulwana esizayo.
Psalms109:14 Mabukhunjulwe phambi koYehova izinto ezimbi zooyise; nesono sikanina asiyi kucinywa.
Psalms109:15 Mababe phambi kobuso bukaYehova ngamaxesha onke, ukuze aphelise ukukhunjulwa kwabo emhlabeni."
Psalms109:16 Ngenxa enokuba ebengacinganga nceba, ebetshutshisa amahlwempu namahlwempu, ebabulala abantliziyo zaphukileyo."
Psalms109:17 Njengoko wayethanda ukuqalekisa, kwamfikela; njengoko engakuvuyeli ukusikelelwa, makube kude kuye."
Psalms109:18 Njengoko ethe wanxiba isiqalekiso njengesambatho sakhe, masingene embilinini wakhe njengamanzi nanjengeoli emathanjeni akhe."
Psalms109:19 Makube njengengubo kuye, azithe wambu phezu kwayo, nanjengombhinqo, athi aziphose kuwo;"
Psalms109:20 Nguwo lowo umvuzo wababandezeli bam kuYehova, nowabathetha okubi ngomphefumlo wam."
Psalms109:21 Kodwa, Yehova, Yehova, ndenzele ngenxa yegama lakho; Ngokuba inceba yakho ilungile, ndihlangule."
Psalms109:22 Ngokuba ndilusizana, ndilihlwempu, Intliziyo yam ityumkile phakathi kwam."
Psalms109:23 Ndihamba njengesithunzi ekutshoneni kwakho; Ndiphetshethwa njengentethe;
Psalms109:24 Amadolo am aluphele amandla; nenyama yam ibhinqile emanqatheni.
Psalms109:25 Ndibe lihlazo kubo; xa bendijonga banikina intloko.
Psalms109:26 Ndincede, Yehova, Thixo wam, ndisindise ngokwenceba yakho;"
Psalms109:27 bazi ukuba sisandla sakho; ukuba nguwe, Yehova, owenze loo nto."
Psalms109:28 Makaqalekise bona, akusikelele wena; ukuba bathe bema, mabadane; kodwa makavuye umkhonzi wakho."
Psalms109:29 Abandichasayo baya kwambatha ihlazo, Bazithi wambu ihlazo njengengubo."
Psalms109:30 Ndiya kumdumisa kakhulu uYehova ngomlomo wam; ewe, ndiya kumdumisa phakathi kwezihlwele."
Psalms109:31 Kuba emi ekunene kolihlwempu, Ukuba amsindise kwabawugxekayo umphefumlo wakhe."
Psalms110:1 Yathi iNkosi eNkosini yam, Hlala ngasekunene kwam, Iintshaba zakho ndizenze isihlalo seenyawo zakho."
Psalms110:2 Intonga yamandla akho uya kuyithumela uYehova, ivela eZiyon; lawula phakathi kweentshaba zakho."
Psalms110:3 Abantu bakho baya kuzinikela ngokuzithandela ngomhla wamandla akho, ngobuhle obungcwele kwasesibelekweni; unombethe wobutsha bakho."
Psalms110:4 Ufungile uYehova, akayi kuzohlwaya: Ungumbingeleli ngonaphakade, Ngokohlobo lukaMelkitsedeke."
Psalms110:5 uYehova ngasekunene kwakho uya kuboyisa ookumkani ngemini yomsindo wakhe.
Psalms110:6 Uya kugweba phakathi kweentlanga, azalise iindawo ngezidumbu; uya kuphalusa iintloko zezizwe ezininzi."
Psalms110:7 Uya kusela emlanjeni endleleni; ngenxa yoko iya kuphakamisa intloko.
Psalms111:1 Dumisani uYehova. Ndiyakuthanda ukudumisa uYehova ngentliziyo yam yonke, phakathi kwebandla lamalungisa nebandla."
Psalms111:2 Mikhulu imisebenzi kaYehova, yaye ifunwa ngabo bonke abayithandayo."
Psalms111:3 Ubekekile umsebenzi wakhe, unobungangamsha, nobulungisa bakhe bungunaphakade."
Psalms111:4 Wenza abantu bakhumbule imimangaliso yakhe: uYehova unenceba, unenceba."
Psalms111:5 Ubanike ukudla abamoyikayo; Uhlala ewukhumbula umnqophiso wakhe;
Psalms111:6 ubazisa abantu bakhe amandla emisebenzi yakhe, ukuze abanike ilifa iintlanga."
Psalms111:7 Izenzo zezandla zakhe ziyinyaniso nesiko; yonke imithetho yakhe ithembekile.
Psalms111:8 Bema beqinile amaxesha ngamaxesha, kwaye benziwa ngenyaniso nangenyaniso."
Psalms111:9 Wabathumela usindiso abantu bakhe; Uwumise ngonaphakade umnqophiso wakhe; Lingcwele, lingcwele igama lakhe."
Psalms111:10 Ingqalo yokulumka kukoyika uYehova; Bonke abenza imithetho yakhe banengqiqo; indumiso yakhe ingunaphakade.
Psalms112:1 Dumisani uYehova. Hayi, uyolo lomntu omoyikayo uYehova, Oyinoneleleyo imithetho yakhe!"
Psalms112:2 Iya kuba namandla ehlabathini imbewu yakhe; isizukulwana samalungisa sisikelelwe.
Psalms112:3 Bubuncwane nobutyebi endlwini yakhe, Ubulungisa bakhe buhlala buhleli."
Psalms112:4 Kuba ilungisa likhanya ebumnyameni; Unenceba, uzele yimfesane nobulungisa."
Psalms112:5 Olungileyo uyababala, aboleke; Uya kuqhuba imicimbi yakhe ngeemvakalelo."
Psalms112:6 Ngokuba akayi kushukunyiswa naphakade; Ilungisa liya kukhunjulwa ngonaphakade.
Psalms112:7 Akoyikiswa ziindaba ezimbi; Iqinile intliziyo yakhe, ukholose ngoYehova."
Psalms112:8 Izimasekile intliziyo yakhe, akoyiki, Ude azibonele iintshaba zakhe."
Psalms112:9 Uyachithachitha, wabele amahlwempu; ubulungisa bakhe buhlala buhleli; uphondo lwakhe luya kuphakanyiswa, lube nozuko."
Psalms112:10 Baya kubona abangendawo, babe buhlungu; Utshixize amazinyo, anyibilike; umnqweno wabangendawo uyadaka."
Psalms113:1 Dumisani uYehova. Dumisani, nina bakhonzi beNkosi, Dumisani iGama leNkosi."
Psalms113:2 Malibongwe igama likaYehova ukususela ngoku kuse kwixesha elingenammiselo.
Psalms113:3 Ukususela ekuphumeni kwelanga kuse ekutshoneni kwalo, igama likaYehova lifanele lidunyiswe."
Psalms113:4 uYehova ungaphezu kweentlanga zonke, ubuqaqawuli bakhe buphezu kwamazulu."
Psalms113:5 Ngubani na onjengoYehova uThixo wethu, ohleli phezulu,"
Psalms113:6 lowo uzithobayo ukuba abone okusezulwini nasemhlabeni!
Psalms113:7 Uvusa eluthulini ihlwempu, Aphakamise amahlwempu endaweni yokulahla;"
Psalms113:8 ukuze abonakale kubathetheli, nakubathetheli bohlanga lwakhe;"
Psalms113:9 Ulomisela elugcinweni umfazi ongazaliyo, Abe ngunozala onoyolo. Dumisani uYehova."
Psalms114:1 Ekukhutshweni kukaSirayeli eJiputa indlu kaYakobi yenziwa abantu abalulwimi lumbi;
Psalms114:2 uYuda waba yingcwele yakhe, uSirayeli ubukumkani bakhe."
Psalms114:3 Ulwandle lwakubona, lwabaleka, iYordan yabuya umva."
Psalms114:4 Iintaba zadloba njengeenkunzi zeegusha, neenduli njengamatakane."
Psalms114:5 Wenze ntoni na, lulwandle, ukuba usabe? Jordan, ungabuyela?"
Psalms114:6 Iintaba owaziwela njengeenkunzi zeegusha; neenduli zakho njengeemvana?
Psalms114:7 Gubha, Owu hlabathi, phambi kobuso beNkosi, phambi kobuso boThixo kaYakobi;"
Psalms114:8 ulojika iliwa libe yindawo yokuma yamanzi, nelitye libe ngumthombo wamanzi;"
Psalms115:1 Musa ukusinika, Yehova, ungasiniki; lizukise igama lakho, ngenxa yenceba yakho, nangenxa yenyaniso yakho."
Psalms115:2 Yini na ukuba zithi iintlanga, Uphi na ngoku uThixo wabo?"
Psalms115:3 Ke yena uThixo wethu usemazulwini; Wenza unothanda.
Psalms115:4 Izithixo zabo yisilivere negolide, umsebenzi wezandla zomntu."
Psalms115:5 Zinemilebe yomlomo, kodwa azithethi; banamehlo, kodwa ababoni."
Psalms115:6 Zineendlebe nje, aziva; zineempumlo, kodwa azisezeli."
Psalms115:7 Zinazo izandla, kodwa azibambi; zinemilenze, kodwa azihambi; kwaye abathethi ngeentamo zabo."
Psalms115:8 Abenzayo bayafana nabo; banjalo bonke abazimela ngaye.
Psalms115:9 Sirayeli, kholosa ngoYehova; Uncedo lwabo nengweletshetshe yabo nguye."
Psalms115:10 Nina bendlu ka-Aron, kholosani ngoYehova; Uncedo lwabo nengweletshetshe yabo nguye."
Psalms115:11 Nina boyika uYehova, kholosani ngoYehova; Uncedo lwabo nengweletshetshe yabo nguye."
Psalms115:12 uYehova usikhumbule; Wosisikelela; uya kuyisikelela indlu kaSirayeli; woyisikelela indlu ka-Aron.
Psalms115:13 Uya kubasikelela abo boyika uYehova, abaselula nabadala."
Psalms115:14 uYehova uya kunandisa nina nabantwana benu.
Psalms115:15 Ngamana nisikelelwa nguYehova, owenza izulu nomhlaba."
Psalms115:16 Amazulu, ewe, amazulu kaYehova, kodwa umhlaba uwunike oonyana babantu."
Psalms115:17 Asingabafileyo abamdumisayo uYehova, Asingabo bonke abehlayo bezolile."
Psalms115:18 Kodwa thina siya kumdumisa uYehova ukususela ngoku kuse kwixesha elingenammiselo. Dumisani uYehova.
Psalms116:1 Ndiyamthanda, ngokuba uYehova eliva Ilizwi lam, nemithandazo yam."
Psalms116:2 Ngokuba endiphulaphule, Ndiya kunqula yena yonke imihla yobomi bam."
Psalms116:3 Iimfuno zokufa zazindingqongile, neentswelo zikaBobipo zazindibambile; Ndafumana ixhala kunye nosizi."
Psalms116:4 Ndalibiza ke igama likaYehova; Nkosi, wusindise umphefumlo wam."
Psalms116:5 uYehova unenceba nobulungisa; ewe, uThixo wethu unenceba."
Psalms116:6 Ngumgcini wabazizidenge uYehova; Ndandithobekile, yaye wandinceda."
Psalms116:7 Buyela ekuphumleni kwakho, mphefumlo wam; ngokuba uYehova ukwenzele okulungileyo."
Psalms116:8 Ngokuba uwuhlangule umphefumlo wam ekufeni, Iliso lam ezinyembezini, Unyawo lwam ekungqulekeni."
Psalms116:9 Ndiya kuhamba-hamba phambi koYehova Ezweni labaphilileyo.
Psalms116:10 Ndavuma ke, ndathi, Ndatshutshiswa kakhulu;"
Psalms116:11 Ndathi ke kuso isazela sam: Bonke abantu ngamaxoki;
Psalms116:12 Ndiya kumbuyekeza ngantoni na uYehova ngalo lonke ubabalo lwakhe kum?
Psalms116:13 Ndoyithabatha indebe yosindiso, ndinqule igama likaYehova."
Psalms116:14 Ngoku ndiza kusizalisekisa isibhambathiso sam kuYehova phambi kwabo bonke abantu bakhe.
Psalms116:15 Ukufa kwabangcwele bakhe kubalulekile emehlweni kaYehova.
Psalms116:16 Okunene, Yehova, ndingumkhonzi wakho; Ndingumkhonzi wakho, unyana womkhonzazana wakho; Undikhulule kwiintambo zam;"
Psalms116:17 Ndiya kubingelela kuwe umbingelelo wombulelo, ndinqule igama likaYehova."
Psalms116:18 Ke kaloku ndiya kusizalisekisa isithembiso sam kuYehova, phambi kwabantu bakhe bonke;"
Psalms116:19 Ezintendelezweni zendlu kaYehova, ngaphakathi kwakho, Yerusalem! Dumisani uYehova."
Psalms117:1 Mdumiseni uYehova, nonke zizwe, mdumiseni, nonke zizwe."
Psalms117:2 Ngokuba inkulu inceba yakhe kuthi, nokuthembeka kukaYehova kungunaphakade. Dumisani uYehova."
Psalms118:1 Mdumiseni uYehova; ngokuba elungile, ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms118:2 Makathi uSirayeli, Ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms118:3 Mayithi indlu ka-Aron, inceba yakhe ingunaphakade."
Psalms118:4 Mabathi ke abamoyikayo uYehova, Ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms118:5 Ndakhala kuYehova ndisembandezelweni; uYehova wandiphendula waza wandibeka endaweni enkulu.
Psalms118:6 uYehova ungakum; Andiyi koyika; umntu angandenza ntoni?
Psalms118:7 uYehova uya kusithabatha isabelo sam kwabandincedayo; ke ngoko ndiya kuwubonisa umnqweno wam kwabo bandithiyileyo.
Psalms118:8 Ukukholosa ngoYehova kulunge ngakumbi kunokukholosa ngomntu.
Psalms118:9 Ukukholosa ngoYehova kulungile, kunokukholosa ngamanene."
Psalms118:10 Zindijikelezile zonke iintlanga, kodwa egameni likaYehova ndiya kuzitshabalalisa."
Psalms118:11 Zandirhawula; zandirhawula, kodwa egameni likaYehova ndiya kuzitshabalalisa."
Psalms118:12 Zingafanelana zindirhawule njengeenyosi; bacinywa njengomlilo wemithana enameva, kuba ndiya kubatshabalalisa egameni likaYehova."
Psalms118:13 Undibethe ndawa, kodwa uYehova wandinceda."
Psalms118:14 uYehova ungamandla am nendumiso yam, yaye uye waba lusindiso kum."
Psalms118:15 Izwi lemihlali nelosindiso lisezindlini zamalungisa; Isandla sokunene sikaYehova sisenamandla amakhulu.
Psalms118:16 Isandla sokunene sikaYehova siphakamile, esokunene sikaYehova sinamandla amakhulu."
Psalms118:17 Andiyi kufa, kodwa ndiya kudla ubomi ndize ndixele izenzo zikaYehova."
Psalms118:18 uYehova wandibetha kabuhlungu, kodwa akandinikela ekufeni."
Psalms118:19 Ndivuleleni amasango okusesikweni; Ndiya kungena nayo, ndimbonge uYehova."
Psalms118:20 Lilo eli isango likaYehova, aya kungena kulo amalungisa."
Psalms118:21 Ndiya kubulela kuwe, ngenxa enokuba undivile, waba lusindiso kum."
Psalms118:22 Ilitye abalicekisayo abakhi laba yintloko yembombo;
Psalms118:23 Wenjenjalo uYehova; ngummangaliso emehlweni ethu.
Psalms118:24 Le yimini ayenzileyo uYehova; siya kuyonwabela, siyonwabele."
Psalms118:25 Sindisa, Yehova, Yehova, thumela intabalala."
Psalms118:26 Makabongwe lo uzayo esegameni likaYehova, Siyanisikelela endlwini kaYehova."
Psalms118:27 uYehova nguThixo osibonise ukukhanya; Bophelelani umnikelo ngeentambo ezimpondweni zesibingelelo.
Psalms118:28 UnguThixo wam, ndiya kubulela kuwe; UnguThixo wam, ndiya kukuphakamisa."
Psalms118:29 Dumisani uYehova; ngokuba elungile, ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms119:1 Hayi, uyolo lomntu ongadyobhekiyo endleleni, Ohamba ngomyalelo kaYehova!"
Psalms119:2 Hayi, uyolo lwabaligcinayo amacebo akhe, Abamquqelayo ngentliziyo yabo yonke!"
Psalms119:3 Abenzi ububi, nabo; bahamba ngeendlela zakhe."
Psalms119:4 Usiyale ukuba siyigcine imithetho yakho.
Psalms119:5 Akwaba iindlela zam bezithe tye ukuqinisa unxano lwakho!
Psalms119:6 Kungokunje andiyi kudana xa ndiyigcina yonke imithetho yakho.
Psalms119:7 Ndiya kubulela kuwe ngentliziyo ethe tye, Ekwazini kwam ubulungisa bakho."
Psalms119:8 Ndiya kuyigcina imithetho yakho; musa ukundishiya ngokupheleleyo
Psalms119:9 Lo mfana uya kuyicoca ngantoni indlela yakhe? Ngokuyinikela ingqalelo kuyo ngokwelizwi lakho.
Psalms119:10 Ndiya kuquqela kuwe ngentliziyo yam yonke; musa ukundilahla emithethweni yakho.
Psalms119:11 Ndiligcine ilizwi lakho entliziyweni yam, ukuze ndingoni kuwe."
Psalms119:12 Mawubongwe wena, Yehova, ndifundise ubulumko bakho."
Psalms119:13 Ndiyawavakalisa ngomlomo wam onke amasiko omlomo wakho.
Psalms119:14 Ndikholiswa yindlela yengcebiso yakho, njengobuninzi bayo."
Psalms119:15 Ndiya kucamngca ngeziyalezo zakho, Ndibheke kumendo wakho."
Psalms119:16 Ndiya kuvuya ngentsikelelo yakho; Andisokuze ndililibale ilizwi lakho.
Psalms119:17 Mphathe kakuhle umkhonzi wakho, ndiphile, Ndigcine ilizwi lakho."
Psalms119:18 Vula amehlo am, ukuba ndiyibone Imisebenzi ebalulekileyo yasemyalelweni wakho."
Psalms119:19 Ndingowasemzini ehlabathini; musa ukuyisithelisa kum imithetho yakho.
Psalms119:20 Umphefumlo wam utyumkile ngenxa yokuba uhlala ukhumbula izigwebo zakho.
Psalms119:21 Ubakhalimele abanekratshi, nabaqalekisiweyo, abatyekayo emiyalelweni yakho;"
Psalms119:22 Shenxisa imke kum ingcikivo nendelo; ngokuba ndiwagcinile amacebo akho.
Psalms119:23 Abathetheli basoloko bethetha ngam, ke yena umkhonzi wakho lo ubekwazi ukukrokra kwakho."
Psalms119:24 Amacebo akho ayandiyolisa, Namaphakathi am."
Psalms119:25 Umphefumlo wam ubotshelelwe eluthulini; ndiphilise ngelizwi lakho.
Psalms119:26 Ndazazisa iindlela zam, wandiphulaphula; Ndifundise iimfihlelo zakho."
Psalms119:27 Andiyiqondi indlela yemithetho yakho; ngoko ndiya kuyibalisa imisebenzi yakho ebalulekileyo.
Psalms119:28 Umphefumlo wam ulila kukuzibhijabhija; ndivuse ngelizwi lakho.
Psalms119:29 Indlela yobuxoki yisuse kum; Ndibabale umyalelo wakho.
Psalms119:30 Ndiyinyule indlela ethe tye, Izigwebo zakho ndizibeka phambi kwam."
Psalms119:31 Ndibambelele ecebiso lakho, Nkosi, musa ukundidanisa;"
Psalms119:32 Ndiya kuhamba ngendlela yemithetho yakho, ukuba uyenze banzi intliziyo yam."
Psalms119:33 Ndifundise, Yehova, indlela yomnqweno wakho; kwaye ndiya kuyigcina kude kube sekupheleni."
Psalms119:34 Ndiqondise, ndibambe umyalelo wakho; ewe, ndiya kusigcina ngentliziyo yam yonke."
Psalms119:35 Ndigcine imithetho yakho; kuba ndiyayonwabela.
Psalms119:36 Intliziyo yam yithobele emacengeni akho, ungayibhekiseli ebubini."
Psalms119:37 Yenza amehlo am angaboni nto; Undinyathelise endleleni yakho.
Psalms119:38 Mzimase intetho yakho umkhonzi wakho owoyikayo.
Psalms119:39 Liphelise ihlazo lam endinxunguphalayo, Ngokuba amasiko akho alungile."
Psalms119:40 Yabona, ndiyayikhumbula imiyalelo yakho; ndiphilise ngobulungisa bakho."
Psalms119:41 Ngamana iinceba zakho zingaza kum, Yehova, nosindiso lwakho ngelizwi lakho."
Psalms119:42 Ndiya kukwazi ukuphendula umkhonzi wam, Ngokuba ndikholose ngelizwi lakho."
Psalms119:43 Kwaye anilisusanga ngokupheleleyo emlonyeni wam ilizwi lenyaniso; Ngokuba ndikholose ngezigwebo zakho.
Psalms119:44 Ndowugcina umyalelo wakho ngonaphakade;
Psalms119:45 Ndihamba-hambe ndikhululekile, ngenxa yezilumkiso zakho."
Psalms119:46 Ndophinda ndithethe icebo lakho phambi kokumkani, ndingadani;"
Psalms119:47 Ndiyaziyolisa ngeziyalezo zakho endizithandayo;
Psalms119:48 Ndiziphakamise izandla zam emithethweni yakho endiyithandayo; ndiya kucamngca ngokuncwina kwakho.
Psalms119:49 Khumbula ilizwi owalithethayo kumkhonzi wakho, lowo undithembise ngako."
Psalms119:50 Yiyo le intuthuzelo ekubandezelekeni kwam, Ngokuba ilizwi lakho lindiphilisile."
Psalms119:51 Abakhukhumali bandiqumbele kakhulu, Noko ke andiphambuki emyalelweni wakho."
Psalms119:52 Yehova, ndiwagqale amasiko akho angunaphakade; ndaye ndazithuthuzela."
Psalms119:53 Ndisuke ndankwantya ngabangendawo abakreqayo emyalelweni wakho.
Psalms119:54 Iziyalezo zakho beziziingoma kum endlwini yokuphambukela kwam.
Psalms119:55 Yehova, ndikhumbule igama lakho ebusuku, Ndawugcina umyalelo wakho."
Psalms119:56 Ndifumene yona, ngokuba ndiyigcinile imithetho yakho."
Psalms119:57 Isabelo sam, Yehova, ndithi, Ndigcine amazwi akho."
Psalms119:58 Ndithandazele inceba yakho ngentliziyo yam yonke; ndibabale ngokwelizwi lakho.
Psalms119:59 Ndizikhumbule iindlela zam, Ndazibuyisela iinyawo zam ezicengeni zakho."
Psalms119:60 Ndikhawulezile, andayekelela ukuyigcina imiyalelo yakho."
Psalms119:61 Izintya zabangendawo zindibambile, Noko andiwulibali umyalelo wakho."
Psalms119:62 Ndiya kuvuka phakathi kobusuku ukuze ndikudumise ngenxa yezigwebo zobulungisa bakho.
Psalms119:63 Ndilidlelane labo bonke abakoyikayo, abayigcinayo imithetho yakho."
Psalms119:64 Yehova, ihlabathi lizele zinceba zakho; Ndifundise iimfihlelo zakho."
Psalms119:65 Umenzele okulungileyo umkhonzi wakho, uYehova, ngelizwi lakho."
Psalms119:66 Ndifundise, ndibe nemvo nokwazi okulungileyo, Ngokuba ndiyigcina imithetho yakho."
Psalms119:67 Ndingekatshutshiswa, ndaye ndilahleka; Kungokunje ndiligcinile ilizwi lakho."
Psalms119:68 Ulungile, ulungisa; Ndifundise iimfihlelo zakho."
Psalms119:69 Abakhukhumali bandixokisile, Mna ndizibamba ngentliziyo yonke imithetho yakho."
Psalms119:70 Ithe fithi kukutyeba intliziyo yabo; Ke mna ndiziyolisa ngomyalelo wakho.
Psalms119:71 Kulungile ukuba ndicudiswe; ukuze ndiwafunde amazwi akho.
Psalms119:72 Ulungile kum umyalelo womlomo wakho, Ngaphezu kwamawaka egolide nesilivere."
Psalms119:73 Izandla zakho zindenzile, zandilungisa; Ndiqondise, ndifunde iziyalezo zakho."
Psalms119:74 Abakoyikayo bondibona bovuya; Ngokuba ndikholose ngelizwi lakho.
Psalms119:75 Ndiyazi, Yehova, ukuba zinobulungisa izigwebo zakho, nokuba unditshutshisile ngokuthembeka."
Psalms119:76 Mayibe yintuthuzelo inceba yakho, njengoko ukuthethileyo kumkhonzi wakho."
Psalms119:77 Mazize kum iinceba zakho, ndiphile, Ngokuba umyalelo wakho uluvuyo lwam."
Psalms119:78 Mabadane abakhukhumali; ngokuba bandone bodwa, ke mna ndiya kuyigqala imithetho yakho."
Psalms119:79 Mababuyele kum abakoyikayo, nabawaziyo amacebo akho."
Psalms119:80 Mayiphile intliziyo yam ngeentsikelelo zakho; ukuba andinazintloni.
Psalms119:81 Umphefumlo wam ulangazelela usindiso lwakho, Ke mna ndikholose ngelizwi lakho."
Psalms119:82 Amehlo am ayakubona ukuthetha kwakho, Ndithi, Uya kundithuthuzela nini na?"
Psalms119:83 Ngokuba ndinjengokhula emsini; nangona kunjalo, andiyilibali iminqweno yakho."
Psalms119:84 Zingaphi na iintsuku zomkhonzi wakho? uya kubagweba nini na abandisukelayo?
Psalms119:85 Abakhukhumeleyo bemba imingxuma, Abangathobeli myalelo wakho."
Psalms119:86 Yonke imithetho yakho ithembekile: Bandixinzelela phantsi ngobugqwetha; ndincede
Psalms119:87 Baphantse ukunditshabalalisa ehlabathini; andityekanga kwimithetho yakho.
Psalms119:88 Ndiphilise ngenceba yakho; ndizigcine izingqiniso zomlomo wakho.
Psalms119:89 Yehova, liqinile emazulwini ilizwi lakho ngonaphakade."
Psalms119:90 Ukuthembeka kwakho kukwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana, Uliwenzile elimiweyo, limiwe."
Psalms119:91 Namhla baphila ngokwemithetho yakho, ngokuba bonke bangabakhonzi bakho."
Psalms119:92 Ukuba ubungandithandi umyalelo wakho, Ndinge ndaphelayo ekubandezelekeni kwam."
Psalms119:93 Andiyi kuyilibala naphakade imithetho yakho, Ngokuba undidlise ubomi ngayo."
Psalms119:94 Ndingowakho, ndisindise; kuba ndifuna izilumkiso zakho."
Psalms119:95 Abangendawo bendilindele ukuba nditshabalale, Ke mna ndibambe isiluleko sakho."
Psalms119:96 Yonke inzaliseko ndiyibonile apho iphela khona; Ke wona ucwangco lwakho lubanzi kakhulu.
Psalms119:97 Hayi, ukuwuthanda kwam umyalelo wakho! oku kukucamngca kwam imini yonke."
Psalms119:98 Undifundisa ubulumko ngaphezu kweentshaba zam ngemithetho yakho, Ngokuba yeyam ngonaphakade."
Psalms119:99 Ndinokuqonda ngaphezu kwabo bonke abandifundisayo, Ngokuba iingcinga zakho ziziingcinga zam."
Psalms119:100 Ndinokuqonda ngaphezu kwamadoda amakhulu, Ngokuba ndiyigcina imithetho yakho."
Psalms119:101 Ndizinqandile iinyawo zam kwiindlela zonke ezimbi, Ukuba ndiligcine ilizwi lakho."
Psalms119:102 Andisuki emasikweni akho, Ngokuba undifundisile."
Psalms119:103 Hayi, ukuba mnandi kwentetho yakho ekhuhlangubeni lam! Ewe, zimnandi kunobusi emlonyeni wam!"
Psalms119:104 Ndinokuqonda ngemithetho yakho; ngoko ke, ndikuthiyile zonke iindlela zobuqhophololo."
Psalms119:105 Lisisibane seenyawo zam ilizwi lakho, Likukukhanya emendweni wam."
Psalms119:106 Ndikufungele, ndikumisile, ndathi, Izigwebo zobulungisa bakho ndiya kuzigcina."
Psalms119:107 Nditshutshiswa kakhulu; Yehova, ndiphilise ngelizwi lakho."
Psalms119:108 Yehova, yamkele iminikelo yokuzithandela yomlomo wam, Undifundise imigwebo yakho."
Psalms119:109 Umphefumlo wam uhlala usesandleni sam, Ndingawulibali umyalelo wakho."
Psalms119:110 Abangendawo bandithiyele ngesibatha, Noko ke andityekanga emithethweni yakho."
Psalms119:111 Icebo lakho ndililifa kwamsinyane, Ngokuba kuluvuyo lwentliziyo yam."
Psalms119:112 Ndiyibeke intliziyo yam ekwenzeni imithandazo yakho rhoqo, kude kube sekupheleni."
Psalms119:113 Abambaxa ndiyabathiya, Wona umyalelo wakho ndiyawuthanda."
Psalms119:114 Uyindawo yam yokusabela, nengweletshetshe yam; Ndikholose ngelizwi lakho."
Psalms119:115 Sukani kum, nina bakreqi; ngokuba ndiya kuyigcina imithetho yoThixo wam."
Psalms119:116 Ndityebise ngelizwi lakho, Ndiphile, Ndingadani ngokuthemba kwam."
Psalms119:117 Ndikhusele, ndisinde, Ndihlale ndiwagcina amacebo akho."
Psalms119:118 Ubanyhashe bonke abatyekayo emiyalelweni yakho, Ngokuba inkohliso yabo ibubuxoki."
Psalms119:119 Utshabalalisa bonke abangendawo behlabathi njengodaka; ngoko ke, ndiyalithanda icebiso lakho."
Psalms119:120 Inyama yam isuka ihambe kukunkwantyiswa nguwe; ndiyayoyika imigwebo yakho.
Psalms119:121 Ndenza ngokwesiko nangobulungisa; ungandishiyi kubacinezeli bam.
Psalms119:122 Mgcine umkhonzi wakho; mabangandigqithisi phambi kwam abazidlayo.
Psalms119:123 Amehlo am alukhangele usindiso lwakho, Nentetho yobulungisa bakho."
Psalms119:124 Menzele inceba umkhonzi wakho, Ndifundise ubulumko bakho."
Psalms119:125 Ndingumkhonzi wakho; Ndiqondise, ndiwazi amacebo akho."
Psalms119:126 Lixesha lokuba wenze, Yehova, ngenxa yokuba bawutshitshisile waza watshitshisa umthetho wakho."
Psalms119:127 Ngenxa yoko ndiyithanda imithetho yakho ngaphezu kwegolide embiweyo; ewe, ngaphezu kwegolide engcwengiweyo."
Psalms119:128 Ke ngoko, ndiyigqala njengelungileyo yonke imiyalelo yakho; yaye ndiwuthiyile wonke umendo wobuxoki."
Psalms119:129 Ingcebiso yakho iyamangalisa; ke ngoko, umphefumlo wam uyazigcina."
Psalms119:130 Ukutyhilwa kwamazwi akho kuyakhanyisa; inika ukuqonda koswele ukuqonda.
Psalms119:131 Ndakhamisa umlomo wam, ndancwina, Ngokuba ndiyikhumbula imiyalelo yakho."
Psalms119:132 Ndibheke, undibabale, Njengoko ubusenza kwabathanda igama lakho."
Psalms119:133 Landela ukunyathela kwam ngelizwi lakho, Musa ukundilawula ngobubi."
Psalms119:134 Ndihlangule ekubandezelekeni kwabantu, Ndigcine imithetho yakho."
Psalms119:135 Bukhanyise ubuso bakho kumkhonzi wakho; undifundise iimfihlelo zakho.
Psalms119:136 Emehlweni am kuphuma imijelo yamanzi, Ngokuba abawugcini umyalelo wakho."
Psalms119:137 Ulilungisa, Yehova, nezigwebo zakho zinobulungisa."
Psalms119:138 Icebo lakho oliwisele umthetho lilungile, lithembekile."
Psalms119:139 Ikhwele lam lindidlile, Ngokuba iintshaba zam ziwalibele amazwi akho."
Psalms119:140 Ilizwi lakho liqaqambile kakhulu; ngenxa yoko umkhonzi wakho emthanda.
Psalms119:141 Ndimncinane, ndideliwe; andiyilibali imithetho yakho."
Psalms119:142 Ubulungisa bakho bubulungisa obungunaphakade, Umyalelo wakho uyinyaniso."
Psalms119:143 Ndicinezelekile, ndicinezelekile; Kodwa imithetho yakho iyandivuyisa."
Psalms119:144 Ubulungisa bengcinga yakho buya kuhlala ngonaphakade; ndiqondise, ndiphile."
Psalms119:145 Ndalila ngentliziyo yam yonke; Ndiphendule, Yehova, ndiya kuyigcina imithandazo yakho."
Psalms119:146 Ndadanduluka kuwe; ndisindise, ndiwagcine amacebo akho."
Psalms119:147 Ndema ngesifingo, ndamemeza, Ndikholosa ngelizwi lakho."
Psalms119:148 Amehlo am aphengela umlindo wasebusuku, Ukuze ndicinge intetho yakho."
Psalms119:149 Live ilizwi lam ngokokulunga kwakho, Yehova, ndiphilise ngokwamasiko akho."
Psalms119:150 Abasondelayo balandele ububi, Banyawukile emyalelweni wakho."
Psalms119:151 Ukufuphi, Yehova; yonke imithetho yakho iyinyaniso."
Psalms119:152 Ndiyawazi amacebo akho kwasekuqaleni, Ngokuba umi ngonaphakade."
Psalms119:153 yibazele indlebe ukucinezeleka kwam, undisindise, Ngokuba ndingawulibali umyalelo wakho."
Psalms119:154 Ndibambezele etyaleni lam, undisindise; ndiphilise ngelizwi lakho."
Psalms119:155 Lunyawukile kwabangendawo usindiso, Ngokuba abazifuni iintsikelelo zakho."
Psalms119:156 Iinceba zakho zininzi, Yehova; ndihlaziyeke ngokuncwina kwakho."
Psalms119:157 Baninzi abandisukelayo neentshaba zam; noko andiphambuki kwicebiso lakho.
Psalms119:158 Ndababona abanginizayo, ndadana; ngokuba bengaligcinanga ilizwi lakho."
Psalms119:159 Bona ukuthanda kwam imithetho yakho, Ndiphilise, Yehova, ngokwenceba yakho."
Psalms119:160 Kwasekuqaleni liyinyaniso ilizwi lakho, Zonke izigwebo zobulungisa bakho zingunaphakade."
Psalms119:161 Izikhulu zindisukela ngelize; Intliziyo yam iyaloyika ilizwi lakho.
Psalms119:162 Ndinemihlali ngentetho yakho, Njengombangiwe yobuninzi."
Psalms119:163 Ndikuthiyile, lisikizi kubuxoki; Ndiyawuthanda umyalelo wakho."
Psalms119:164 Ndikudumisa kasixhenxe ngemini, Ngenxa yezigwebo zobulungisa bakho."
Psalms119:165 Banoxolo olukhulu abawuthandayo umyalelo wakho; Akukho sikhubekiso kubo.
Psalms119:166 Yehova, ndikholose ngosindiso lwakho, yaye ndiyayenza imiyalelo yakho."
Psalms119:167 Umphefumlo wam uyawagcina amacebo akho; kwaye ndibathanda kakhulu.
Psalms119:168 Ndiyayigcina imiyalelo yakho namacebo akho, Ngokuba zonke iindlela zam ziphambi kwakho."
Psalms119:169 Ngamana ukukhalela kwam uncedo kungafika phambi kobuso bakho, Yehova; ndiqondise ngokwelizwi lakho."
Psalms119:170 Mawufike phambi kobuso bakho umthandazo wam; Ndisindise ngelizwi lakho.
Psalms119:171 Umlomo wam uya kuncoma xa undifundisayo ukunxano kwakho.
Psalms119:172 Ulwimi lwam luya kuyithetha intetho yakho, Ngokuba yonke imithetho yakho inobulungisa."
Psalms119:173 Isandla sakho masindincede; kuba ndizinyulele iziyalezo zakho.
Psalms119:174 Ndiyalukhumbula usindiso lwakho, Yehova; nomyalelo wakho uluvuyo lwam."
Psalms119:175 Ngamana umphefumlo wam ungaphila, ukudumise; andincede amasiko akho."
Psalms119:176 Ndiya ndimka njengemvu elahlekileyo; mfune umkhonzi wakho; Ngokuba andiyilibali imithetho yakho.
Psalms120:1 (Ingoma.) Ndanqula uYehova, wandiva;"
Psalms120:2 Wusindise, Yehova, umphefumlo wam emlonyeni wenkohliso, naselulwimini lwenkohliso."
Psalms120:3 Niya kunikwa ntoni na? Okanye uya kwenziwa njani na, ngolwimi oluxokayo?"
Psalms120:4 Iintolo ezitsolo zegorha, Kunye namalahle omthi wejunipha."
Psalms120:5 Yeha ke mna, ngenxa yokuba ndihlala kwaMesheki, ngenxa yokuba ndihlala ezintenteni zakwaKedare!"
Psalms120:6 Umphefumlo wam kade uhleli nalowo uluthiyileyo uxolo.
Psalms120:7 Ndithanda uxolo; Ke ndithi ndakuthetha, babe yimfazwe."
Psalms121:1 Ndiwaphakamisela ezintabeni na amehlo am, luvela phi na uncedo lwam?"
Psalms121:2 Uncedo lwam luvela kuYehova, umenzi wezulu nomhlaba."
Psalms121:3 Akayi kuluyekela unyawo lwakho ekubetheni; akalali lowo ukujongileyo.
Psalms121:4 Yabona, umlindi wakwaSirayeli akalali, akalali;"
Psalms121:5 Ngumlindi wakho uYehova: NguYehova isithunzi sakho ngasekunene kwakho.
Psalms121:6 Ilanga aliyi kukubetha emini, nenyanga ebusuku."
Psalms121:7 uYehova uya kukugcina ebubini bonke; Uya kuwugcina umphefumlo wakho.
Psalms121:8 uYehova uya kukugcina ukuphuma kwakho nokungena kwakho ukususela ngoku kuse kwixesha elingenammiselo.
Psalms122:1 (Ingoma kaDavide.) Ndavuya bakuthi kum, Masiye endlwini kaYehova;"
Psalms122:2 Iinyawo zethu ziya kuma emasangweni akho, Yerusalem."
Psalms122:3 iYerusalem yayakhiwe njengesixeko esimi ndawonye;
Psalms122:4 Apho zinyuka ziye khona izizwe, ezizizizwe zikaYehova, ukuze zibe lingqina kuSirayeli, zilidumise igama likaYehova."
Psalms122:5 Ngokuba kukho iitrone ezimisiweyo zokugweba, Iitrone zendlu kaDavide."
Psalms122:6 Thandazelani uxolo lweYerusalem, ukuze baphumelele abakuthandayo."
Psalms122:7 Makube luxolo phakathi kweendonga zakho nempumelelo ezindongeni zakho.
Psalms122:8 Ngenxa yabazalwana bam namadlelane am ngoku ndiya kuthi: Uxolo malube nani!
Psalms122:9 Ngenxa yendlu kaYehova uThixo wethu ndiya kukufunela okulungileyo.
Psalms123:1 Ingoma yezinyuko. Ndiwaphakamisela kuwe amehlo am, wena uhleli emazulwini;"
Psalms123:2 Yabona, njengoko amehlo abakhonzi ekhangele kwizandla zeenkosi zabo, nanjengoko amehlo entombi ekhangela isandla senkosikazi yayo; ngako oko amehlo ethu akuYehova uThixo wethu, ade asibabale."
Psalms123:3 Sibabale, Yehova, sibe nenceba kuthi, ngokuba sicekise kakhulu;"
Psalms123:4 Umphefumlo wethu uzele kukudela kwabahleli ngoxolo, Ukucukucezwa kwabanekratshi."
Psalms124:1 (iNgoma kaDavide.) Ukuba ibingenguye uYehova ongakuthi, amaSirayeli ange athi;"
Psalms124:2 Ukuba bekungengenxa kaYehova ukuba abe ngakuthi xa abantu besivukela!
Psalms124:3 Basidla kamsinya, ukuvutha komsindo wabo kuthi."
Psalms124:4 Amanzi asigubungela, Ahamba amanzi phezu kwemiphefumlo yethu."
Psalms124:5 Kudlule amanzi akhukhumeleyo emphefumlweni wethu;
Psalms124:6 Makabongwe uYehova, ongasinikelanga ukuba sibe lixhoba emazinyweni abo."
Psalms124:7 Usindile umphefumlo wethu njengentaka emgibeni wababambisi beentlanzi; umgibe uqhawukile, sasinda ke."
Psalms124:8 Uncedo lwethu lusegameni likaYehova, umenzi wezulu nehlabathi."
Psalms125:1 iNgoma yazo iiNgoma.
Psalms125:2 Njengoko iintaba zayijikeleza iYerusalem, uYehova ubajikelezile abantu bakhe ukususela ngoku de kube ngonaphakade."
Psalms125:3 Ngokuba ayiyi kuhlala intonga yongendawo esiqwini selungisa; Ukuze amalungisa angazoluleli izandla zawo ebubini.
Psalms125:4 Yehova, yenza okulungileyo kwabalungileyo nabantliziyo zithe tye."
Psalms125:5 Abo batyekayo ezindleleni zabo ezigwenxa, uYehova uya kubakhupha, kunye nabenzi bobubi; kube luxolo kuSirayeli."
Psalms126:1 (iNgoma.) Xa uYehova wayitshintshayo inxalenye yaseZiyon, saba njengamaphupha."

Psalms126:3 uYehova usenzele izinto ezinkulu; esivuya ngayo.
Psalms126:4 Yehova, sibuyisele ikamva lethu njengemilambo yasezantsi."
Psalms126:5 Abo bahlwayela ngeenyembezi baya kuvuna ngovuyo;
Psalms126:6 Lowo uhamba elila yaye ethwele imbewu exabisekileyo uya kubuya evuya ngokuqinisekileyo aze azise abaninzi bakhe.
Psalms127:1 iNgoma yazo iiNgoma. Ukuba akayakhi uYehova indlu, bafumana basebenza abakhi bayo; xa uYehova engawugcini umzi, umlindi uvuka ilize."
Psalms127:2 Lilize ukuba uvuke kusasa, ulale ebusuku, udle isonka sokubandezeleka; ngokuba Usilalisa ngolo hlobo intanda yakhe."
Psalms127:3 Uyabona, ilifa likaYehova ngoonyana, Sisiqhamo sesizalo sonina."
Psalms127:4 Njengeentolo esandleni segorha; kukwanjalo nakubantwana abancinane.
Psalms127:5 Hayi, uyolo lomntu umphongolo uzele ngabo; abayi kudana, kodwa baya kuthetha neentshaba zabo esangweni."
Psalms128:1 (Ingoma) Hayi, uyolo lwabo bonke abamoyikayo uYehova; abahamba ngeendlela zakhe."
Psalms128:2 Ngokuba uya kudla umsebenzi wezandla zakho; uya kuvuya, uphiliswe."
Psalms128:3 Umkakho woba ngaseluphelweni lwendlu yakho njengomdiliya ovelisa iziqhamo ezininzi;
Psalms128:4 Yabona, umntu owoyika uYehova uya kusikelelwa ngolo hlobo."

Psalms128:6 Uya kubabona oonyana boonyana bakho, uxolo malube phezu kwamaSirayeli."
Psalms129:1 (Ingoma yezidanga.) Banditshutshisa izihlandlo ezininzi kwasebuncinaneni bam, ukuze athi uSirayeli:"
Psalms129:2 Banditshutshisa izihlandlo ezininzi kwasebuncinaneni bam, àbandoyisa."
Psalms129:3 Amakhuba ebelima emhlana wam, eyolule imisele yawo."
Psalms129:4 uYehova ulilungisa, uzaphule izintya zabangendawo."
Psalms129:5 Mabadane bonke abayithiyayo iZiyon, babuye;"
Psalms129:6 Mababe njengengca eluphahleni, Yoma ingekahlumi;"
Psalms129:7 angasizaliyo isandla sakhe umvuni; obophayo akasivuli isifuba sakhe.
Psalms129:8 Abadlulayo bangathi, Intsikelelo kaYehova mayibe phezu kwenu; siyanisikelela egameni likaYehova."
Psalms130:1 Ndinqula wena, Yehova, ndisezihogweni;"
Psalms130:2 Yehova, live ilizwi lam; iindlebe zakho mazilibekele indlebe ilizwi lomthandazo wam."
Psalms130:3 Yehova, ebugwenxeni ubugwenxa bakho, ngubani na onokuma, Yehova?"
Psalms130:4 Kuwe ke ukuxolela, ukuze woyikwe."
Psalms130:5 Ndithembele kuYehova, uthembile umphefumlo wam, Ndikholose ngelizwi lakhe."
Psalms130:6 Umphefumlo wam ulindele kuYehova ngaphezu kwabalindele ingomso; Ndithi, ngaphezu kwabo bajonge ingomso."
Psalms130:7 uSirayeli makakholose ngoYehova, ngokuba kuYehova kukho inceba, nosindiso lwakhe lukhulu."

Psalms131:1 iNgoma kaDavide. Kwaye andiziqeqesheli izinto ezinkulu okanye izinto eziphezulu kakhulu kum.
Psalms131:2 Ndazinqanda, ndathi tu, njengomntwana olunyulweyo kunina; umphefumlo wam unjengomntwana olunyulweyo."
Psalms131:3 uSirayeli makakholose ngoYehova kususela ngoku kude kuse ephakadeni.
Psalms132:1 Ingoma yeeleta. Yehova, mkhumbule uDavide neembandezelo zakhe zonke."
Psalms132:2 Wafunga uYehova, wafunga imbalasane kaYakobi;"
Psalms132:3 Andiyi kungena ententeni yendlu yam, Andiyi kukhwela esililini sam;"
Psalms132:4 Andiyi kuwaphumza amehlo am, amehlo am awabi nabuthongo:"
Psalms132:5 ndide ndimfumanele indawo uYehova, nendawo yeGorha likaYakobi."
Psalms132:6 Yabona, siyivile e-Efrata, siyifumene ezweni lehlathi."
Psalms132:7 Siya kungena ezintenteni zakhe; soguqa ezinyaweni zakhe.
Psalms132:8 Vuka, Yehova, ekuphumleni kwakho; wena netyeya yamandla akho."
Psalms132:9 Ababingeleli bakho mabambathe ubulungisa; banoyolo abanyulwa bakho.
Psalms132:10 Ngenxa kaDavide umkhonzi wakho, musa ukutyeka ebusweni bomthanjiswa wakho."
Psalms132:11 uYehova umfungele uDavide inyaniso; akayi kuzohlwaya; Ndiya kuhlala etroneni yakho kunye neziqhamo zomzimba wakho.
Psalms132:12 Ukuba bathe oonyana bakho bawugcina umnqophiso wam, Nesingqiniso sam endibafundisayo: Oonyana babo bothi nabo bahlale Etroneni yakho nanini."
Psalms132:13 Ngokuba uYehova uyinyule iZiyon; wayefuna ibe yindawo yakhe yokuhlala.
Psalms132:14 Nantsi indawo yam yokuphumla kwam nanini; kuba ndandiyifuna.
Psalms132:15 Ndiya kukusikelela kakhulu ukudla kwakhe, Ndibadlise isonka abasweleyo bakhe."
Psalms132:16 Ndiya kubambesa usindiso ababingeleli balo, nabangcwele balo bavuye;"
Psalms132:17 Ndiya kumtyala khona uphondo uDavide; Ndimkhanyisele umthanjiswa wam.
Psalms132:18 Iintshaba zakhe ndiya kuzambesa udano; Ke sona isithsaba sakhe siya kuphuma igazi.
Psalms133:1 Ingoma kaDavide. Yabonani, ukuba kuhle, ukuba mnandi, Bakuba oonyana babantu behleli bodwa!"
Psalms133:2 Kunjengeoli elungileyo entloko, esihla iye ezindevini, ezindevini zika-Aron;"
Psalms133:3 Kunjengombethe waseHermon, ohla phezu kweentaba zaseZiyon, kuba uYehova wayimisela khona intsikelelo, ubomi, kude kuse ephakadeni."
Psalms134:1 (Ingoma yezinyuko.) Yabonani, mbongeni uYehova, nonke nina bakhonzi bakaYehova, bemiyo endlwini kaYehova ebusuku."
Psalms134:2 Phakamisani izandla zenu engcweleni, nimdumise uYehova;"
Psalms134:3 uYehova, owenza amazulu nehlabathi, akusikelele eZiyon."
Psalms135:1 Dumisani uYehova. Dumisani Igama likaYehova; Mdumiseni, nina bakhonzi bakaYehova!"
Psalms135:2 Nina nimiyo endlwini kaYehova, Ezintendelezweni zendlu yoThixo wethu;"
Psalms135:3 Dumisani uYehova; ngokuba uYehova ulungile; Libetheleni uhadi igama lakhe; kuba kumnandi.
Psalms135:4 Kuba uYehova unyule uYakobi noSirayeli ukuba babe sisityebi sakhe.
Psalms135:5 Kuba ndiyazi mna ukuba uYehova mkhulu nokuba iNkosi yethu ingaphezu koothixo bonke.
Psalms135:6 Yonke into ayithandayo uYehova uyenzile emazulwini nasemhlabeni, kuzo zonke iilwandle nemilambo yehlabathi."
Psalms135:7 Ulonyusa amafu esiphelweni sehlabathi; imvula uyenzela imibane; ukhupha umoya ezintweni zakhe.
Psalms135:8 Owabulala amazibulo aseYiputa, awabantu naweenkomo;"
Psalms135:9 owathumela imiqondiso nezimanga phakathi kwenu, Yiputa, kuFaro nakubakhonzi bakhe bonke;"
Psalms135:10 owanqoba iintlanga ezinkulu, wabulala ookumkani abanamandla;"
Psalms135:11 uSihon, ukumkani wama-Amori, no-Ogi, ukumkani waseBhashan, nezikumkani zonke zakwaKanan;"
Psalms135:12 Walinika ilizwe labo njengelifa, ilifa labantu bakhe amaSirayeli."
Psalms135:13 Igama lakho, Yehova, lingunaphakade; nesikhumbuzo sakho, Yehova, kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana."
Psalms135:14 Ngokuba uYehova uya kubagweba abantu bakhe, abe nosizi ngabakhonzi bakhe."
Psalms135:15 Izithixo zeentlanga yisilivere negolide, Umsebenzi wezandla zabantu."
Psalms135:16 Zinemilebe yomlomo, kodwa azithethi; banamehlo, kodwa ababoni;"
Psalms135:17 Zineendlebe nje, aziva; kwaye akukho moya emlonyeni wawo."
Psalms135:18 Abenzayo bayafana nabo; banjalo bonke abazimela ngaye.
Psalms135:19 Dumisani uYehova, nina ndlu kaSirayeli, mbongeni uYehova, nina ndlu ka-Aron;"
Psalms135:20 Nina bendlu kaLevi, mbongeni, nina nimoyikayo uYehova, mbongeni uYehova."
Psalms135:21 Makabongwe uYehova eZiyon, ulohlala eYerusalem. Dumisani uYehova."
Psalms136:1 Mdumiseni uYehova; ngokuba elungile, ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:2 Mdumiseni uThixo woothixo, Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:3 Dumisani uYehova wookumkani, Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:4 Nguye yedwa owenza imisebenzi ebalulekileyo ebalulekileyo, Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:5 KuloMenzi wezulu ngobulumko: Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe.
Psalms136:6 KuloMtwabululi wehlabathi phezu kwamanzi: Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe.
Psalms136:7 KuMenzi wezikhanyiso ezikhulu, Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:8 Ilanga malilawule imini, Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:9 Inyanga neenkwenkwezi zilawula ebusuku: Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe.
Psalms136:10 Kulowabulala amazibulo abo eYiputa, Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe;"
Psalms136:11 Wabasondeza oonyana bakaSirayeli phakathi kwabo, Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:12 Ngesandla esithe nkqi, nangesandla esolukileyo: Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:13 KuloMgabuli woLwandle oluBomvu, lwagabuka, ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:14 Makacande kulo uSirayeli: Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe.
Psalms136:15 uFaro nempi yakhe bajulwa eLwandle oluBomvu, ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:16 Kulohambisa abantu bakhe entlango: Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe.
Psalms136:17 Ukongamela kookumkani abakhulu, Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:18 Nookumkani abadumileyo ababulawayo, ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:19 uSihon, ukumkani wama-Amori, ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe;"
Psalms136:20 no-Ogi, ukumkani waseBhashan, ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:21 Walinikela ilizwe labo laba lilifa, Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:22 Malibe lilifa likaSirayeli umkhonzi wakhe, Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:23 Usikhumbule ehlazweni lethu, Ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:24 Usihlangule ezonweni zethu, ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:25 Onika inyama yonke ukudla, ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms136:26 Mdumiseni uThixo wamazulu, ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Psalms137:1 Emilanjeni yaseBhabheli, sahlala khona, salila, sakuyikhumbula iZiyon."
Psalms137:2 Iintsika zethu sazixhoma emngcunubeni phakathi kwawo;
Psalms137:3 Ngokuba apho babesibambe khona, babiza kuthi ingoma; kwaye abo basitshabalalisayo bafuna ulonwabo lwethu, besithi: Siculele ingoma yaseZiyon."
Psalms137:4 Siya kuyivuma njani ingoma kaYehova kwilizwe lasemzini?
Psalms137:5 Ukuba ndithe ndakulibala, Yerusalem, Masizilibale iinkohliso zakhe isandla sam sokunene."
Psalms137:6 Ukuba andithanga ndikukhumbule, ulwimi lwam malunamathele ekhuhlangubeni lam; andisayi kuyinyula iYerusalem ngaphezu kovuyo lwam olukhulu."
Psalms137:7 Bakhumbule, Yehova, oonyana bakaEdom, Ngemini yeYerusalem; abo bathi, Yidilizeni, yidilizeni, kuse elusekweni lwalo."
Psalms137:8 Ntombi yaseBhabheli, wena ufanelwe kukutshatyalaliswa; unoyolo lowo usivuzayo njengoko usikhonze ngako kuthi."
Psalms137:9 Hayi, uyolo lomtyumza ngamatye abantwana bakho!"
Psalms138:1 Ndiya kubulela kuwe ngentliziyo yam yonke; Ndiya kuvuma phambi koothixo.
Psalms138:2 Ndiya kuguqa etempileni yakho engcwele, ndibulele kwigama lakho, ngenxa yenceba yakho, nangenxa yenyaniso yakho, ngenxa enokuba ulikhulisile ilizwi lakho ngaphezu kwegama lakho lonke."
Psalms138:3 Ngemini yokubiza kwam, wandiphendula, wandomeleza ngomoya wam;"
Psalms138:4 Baya kubulela kuwe, Yehova, bonke ookumkani behlabathi, Bakuweva amazwi omlomo wakho;"
Psalms138:5 Ewe, baya kumemelela ngeendlela zikaYehova, Ngokuba mkhulu ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova."
Psalms138:6 Nangona uYehova ephakamile, uyabanyamekela abathobekileyo, kodwa ubazi abakude le abanekratshi."
Psalms138:7 Ukuba ndithe ndahamba ebunzimeni, uya kundiphilisa; Uya kusolula isandla sakho emsindweni weentshaba zam, undisindise esokunene sakho."
Psalms138:8 uYehova makandenzele isicelo sam: Yehova, inceba yakho ingunaphakade; musa ukuyishiya imisebenzi yezandla zakho."
Psalms139:1 Umhobe kaDavide. Yehova, undigocagocile, wandazi."
Psalms139:2 Wena uyakwazi ukudandatheka kwam nokreqo lwam, Uyaziqonda izicamango zam nakude."
Psalms139:3 Uhambahamba indlela yam nezilili zam, Uyazazi zonke iindlela zam."
Psalms139:4 Ngokuba akukho lizwi elulwimini lwam Ongalaziyo ke, Yehova."
Psalms139:5 Wandijikela ngasemva nasemva, Wasibeka phezu kwam isandla sakho;"
Psalms139:6 Kuyandimangalisa ukwazi oko; iphezulu, andikwazi ukufikelela kuyo."
Psalms139:7 Ndingahambela phi na ukumka emoyeni wakho? Ndingabalekela phi na ukumka ebusweni bakho?
Psalms139:8 Xa ndinyuke ndaya emazulwini, ulapho; ndawendlala umandlalo wam kwelabafileyo, nanko ukho."
Psalms139:9 Ukuba ndithe ndathabatha amaphiko esifingo, ndahlala ekupheleni kolwandle;"
Psalms139:10 Isandla sakho siya kundikhapha, Esokunene sakho siya kundibamba."
Psalms139:11 Ukuba ndithe, Okunene, buya kundigubungela ubumnyama; ubusuku bube kukukhanya kum."
Psalms139:12 Ewe, ubumnyama abuyi kukufihla; kodwa ubusuku bukhanya njengemini; kobakho ubumnyama nokukhanya."
Psalms139:13 Ngokuba uzithabathe izintso zam, Wandambesa esizalweni sikama."
Psalms139:14 Ndithanda ukudumisa; ngokuba ndenziwe ngokoyikekayo, ngokubalulekileyo; zibalulekile izenzo zakho; kwaye umphefumlo wam uyazi kakuhle."
Psalms139:15 Izinto zam azizange zifihleke kuwe xa ndenziwayo emfihlekweni, yaye ndenziwa ngendlela emangalisayo kweyona mimandla isemazantsi omhlaba."
Psalms139:16 Amehlo akho andibona ndigqibelele; kwaye encwadini yakho kubhaliwe konke ukhupho lwam oludalwe emva kwanolunye lwazo.
Psalms139:17 Hayi, ukuxabiseka kweengcinga zakho, Thixo! hayi indlela enkulu ngayo isibalo sayo!"
Psalms139:18 Ndizibalile, zininzi ngaphezu kwentlabathi; xa ndivuka ndisenawe."
Psalms139:19 Inene, wena Thixo, uya kubabulala abangendawo;"
Psalms139:20 Ngokuba bathetha kakubi ngawe, zalingcikiva igama lakho iintshaba zakho."
Psalms139:21 Yehova, andinabo na abakuthiyayo? Andivi buhlungu na ngenxa yamadoda amakhulu?"
Psalms139:22 Ndibathiya ngentiyo ephelelisileyo, Kum mna baziintshaba."
Psalms139:23 Ndigocagoce, Thixo, uyazi intliziyo yam; ndicikide, uzazi iingcinga-ngcinga zam."
Psalms139:24 Kwaye ubone ukuba kukho indlela engalunganga kum, kwaye undikhokelele kumendo wanaphakade."
Psalms140:1 Ndihlangule, Yehova, kongendawo; Ndikhusele kumcudisi;"
Psalms140:2 obubonakalisa ububi ezintliziyweni zabo; bahlala behlanganisene emfazweni.
Psalms140:3 Balola ulwimi lwabo njengenyoka; Ubuthi bezizwe buphantsi komlomo wabo. Sela.
Psalms140:4 Ndisindise, Yehova, esandleni songendawo; Ndikhusele kumcudisi; obeceba ukubhukuqa uhambo lwam."
Psalms140:5 Abakhukhumeleyo bandithiyele ngomgibe nezintya; Baneka umnatha endleleni; bandenze igin. Sela.
Psalms140:6 Ndithi kuYehova, UnguThixo wam; Yehova, live izwi lomthandazo wam;"
Psalms140:7 uYehova, ligwiba losindiso lwam, Wayigqubuthela intloko yam ngemini yemfazwe."
Psalms140:8 Yehova, musa ukumnika ongendawo iminqweno yakhe; aliyi kubuya libekho icebo lakhe elibi; ukuze bangaziphakamisi. Sela."
Psalms140:9 Ke zona iintloko zabandingqongileyo, Nobubi bomlomo wabo buya kubagubungela;"
Psalms140:10 Makawele phezu kwabo amalahle avuthayo; mabaphoswe emlilweni; emhadini onzulu, ukuze bangabi savuka."
Psalms140:11 Makungabikho mhlebi ehlabathini; ububi buya kuzingela umbulali ukuze amtshabalalise.
Psalms140:12 Ndiyazi ukuba uYehova uya kulixhasa ityala lehlwempu nehlwempu.
Psalms140:13 Inene, amalungisa aya kulidumisa igama lakho; aya kuhlala kuwe amalungisa."
Psalms141:1 (Indumiso kaDavide.) Yehova, ndinqula wena; khawuleza undilandele; Phulaphula izwi lam xa ndikubiza."
Psalms141:2 Umthandazo wam mawube nesiqhumiso phambi kwakho; ndiziphakamise izandla zam njengombingelelo.
Psalms141:3 Yehova, beka umbonisi phambi komlomo wam; ndivale umnyango emlonyeni."
Psalms141:4 Intliziyo yam musa ukuyithobela ebubini nasebubini, ekwenzeni ububi nakubantu abenza ububi; andiyi kudla ubumnandi babo."
Psalms141:5 Malindibethe ilungisa; makube yinceba leyo, makandohlwaye; iya kuba yi-ole elungileyo, engayi kuqhekeza intloko yam;"
Psalms141:6 Xa abagwebi bawo bekhahlelwa ezindaweni ezilulwalwa, baya kuwaphulaphula amazwi am; kuba zimnandi."
Psalms141:7 Athe saa amathambo ethu emlonyeni wendlu yofileyo, njengomntu egawula imithi, ayigawule."
Psalms141:8 Kodwa amehlo am akuwe, Yehova; ndithembele kuwe; musa ukuwuyeka umphefumlo wam;"
Psalms141:9 Ndisindise ezintabeni abandakhele zona, Ezintabeni zabenzi bobubi."
Psalms141:10 Mabaguqe ngamadolo abangendawo, ndibaleke mna;"
Psalms142:1 (Imbali kaDavide: umthandazo wakhe waba semqolombeni.) Ndadanduluka kuYehova ngezwi lam; Ngelizwi lam ndithandaza kuYehova.
Psalms142:2 Ndiphalaze kuye ukukhala kwam; Ndabonisa inzame zam phambi kwakhe.
Psalms142:3 Ekutyhafeni komphefumlo wam phakathi kwam, wayeyazi yena indlela yam; Ndathi ndihamba nje, bandithiyela ngokufihlakeleyo."
Psalms142:4 Ndabheka ngasekunene kwam, ndakhangela, akwabakho bani undazi; akukho uwukhathalele umphefumlo wam."
Psalms142:5 Ndabiza kuwe, Yehova, ndathi, Uyindawo yam yokusabela, nesabelo sam ezweni labaphulaphulayo."
Psalms142:6 Kubekele indlebe ukuhlahlamba kwam; ngokuba ndithobeke kakhulu; Ndihlangule kwabandisukelayo; ngokuba bomelele kunam.
Psalms142:7 Wukhuphe entolongweni umphefumlo wam, Ndibulele kwigama lakho; Amalungisa aya kundirhawula; ngokuba uya kundenzela inceba."
Psalms143:1 (Indumiso kaDavide.) Yehova, wubekele indlebe umthandazo wam, uwubekele indlebe umthandazo wam; ndiphendule ngokuthembeka kwakho nangobulungisa bakho."
Psalms143:2 Musa ukumsa ematyaleni umkhonzi wakho, ngokuba akukho mntu uhleliyo uya kulilungisa emehlweni akho."
Psalms143:3 Ngokuba utshaba luwusukele umphefumlo wam; Wabubethela phantsi ubomi bam; Undibeke ebumnyameni njengabo bafa kudala.
Psalms143:4 Ngenxa yoko umphefumlo wam ukhwankqisiwe; Ibibhibhile intliziyo yam phakathi kwam.
Psalms143:5 Ndikhumbula imihla yamandulo; Ndiyigqala yonke imisebenzi yakho; Ndicamngca ngomsebenzi wezandla zakho.
Psalms143:6 Ndizolulela kuwe izandla zam; umphefumlo wam ukungxamele njengomhlaba owomileyo. Sela.
Psalms143:7 Khawuleza undiphendule, Yehova, umphefumlo wam udandathekile; musa ukubusithelisa kum ubuso bakho, hleze ndifane nabahla baye kwelabafileyo."
Psalms143:8 Ndivise kwakusasa inceba yakho; ngokuba ndikholose ngawe; Ndazise indlela endiya kuhamba ngayo; kuba ndiwuphakamisela kuni umoya wam.
Psalms143:9 Yehova, ndihlangule ezintshabeni zam; Ndibalekela kuwe ukuze ndizimele."
Psalms143:10 Ndifundise ukwenza ukuthanda kwakho; ngokuba unguThixo wam. Umphefumlo wakho ulungile; Ndikhaphele ezweni lenyaniso.
Psalms143:11 Ngenxa yegama lakho, Yehova, ndiphilise;"
Psalms143:12 Ngenceba yakho zibhangise iintshaba zam, Ubatshabalalise bonke abawusukelayo umphefumlo wam, Ngokuba ndingumkhonzi wakho."
Psalms144:1 (Indumiso kaDavide.) Makabongwe uYehova, mandla am, Ulofundisa izandla zam ukulwa, Ozifundisayo ukulwa neminwe yam!"
Psalms144:2 Ukulunga kwam nenqaba yam; inqaba yam ephakamileyo, umsindisi wam; Ingweletshetshe yam, ndikholose ngaye; owabathobayo abantu bam phantsi kwam."
Psalms144:3 Yehova, uyintoni na umntu, ukuze umazi! okanye unyana womntu, ukuba uya kuphendula kuye!"
Psalms144:4 Ufana nomphunga umntu, imihla yakhe injengethunzi elidlulayo."
Psalms144:5 Wathoba amazulu akho, Yehova, uhle; Zichukumise iintaba, ziqhume."
Psalms144:6 Thumela imibane, ubaphangalalise; tola iintolo zakho, ubatshabalalisile."
Psalms144:7 Khawusibeke phezulu isandla sakho; Ndihlangule, ndisindise emanzini amaninzi, esandleni soonyana beentlanga;"
Psalms144:8 abamlomo uthetha inkohlakalo, Abasandla sokunene sisesokunene sobuxoki."
Psalms144:9 Ndiya kukubethela ingoma entsha, Thixo; Ndiya kukubethela umrhubhe ontambo zilishumi."
Psalms144:10 Ulonika ookumkani usindiso, Ohlangula umkhonzi wakhe uDavide kumkhonto oyingozi."
Psalms144:11 Ndihlangule, ndihlangule esandleni soonyana bolunye uhlanga, abamlomo uthetha inkohlakalo, abasandla sokunene sisesokunene sobuxoki;"
Psalms144:12 oonyana bethu babe njengezityalo ezikhule kwasebutsheni babo; iintombi zethu zibe njengeembombo ezikhazimliswe njengebhotwe;
Psalms144:13 ahluthe oovimba bethu, kubekho kukudla ngeentlobo ngeentlobo, neegusha zethu zivelise amawaka angamashumi amawaka ezitratweni zethu."
Psalms144:14 Ke iinkomo zethu zomelele emsebenzini; ukuba kungabikho kuphuma nokuphumayo; ukuba akukho sikhalazo ezitalatweni zethu.
Psalms144:15 Lunoyolo uhlanga olunjalo; Hayi, uyolo lwabantu abaThixo wabo unguYehova."
Psalms145:1 (Umhobe kaDavide.) Ndiya kubulela kuwe, Thixo wam, kumkani; yaye ndiya kulidumisa igama lakho ngonaphakade kanaphakade."
Psalms145:2 Ndiya kukubonga yonke imihla; yaye ndiya kulidumisa igama lakho ngonaphakade kanaphakade.
Psalms145:3 uYehova mkhulu yaye ngowokudunyiswa kunene; nobukhulu bakhe abunakulinganiswa.
Psalms145:4 Izizukulwana ngezizukulwana ziya kuyincoma imisebenzi yakho, Zixelise ubugorha bakho."
Psalms145:5 Ndiya kukhankanya ubuqaqawuli bobungangamsha bakho, nezimanga zakho;"
Psalms145:6 Bathetha abantu ngamandla ezenzo zakho ezoyikekayo, ndibalise ngobukhulu bakho."
Psalms145:7 Baya kuvakalisa ngokuyintabalala ukukhumbula ukulunga kwakho okukhulu, nokudumisa ubulungisa bakho."
Psalms145:8 uYehova unemfesane, unobubele; uzeka kade umsindo, mkhulu ngenceba."
Psalms145:9 Ulungile uYehova kubo bonke, Imfesane yakhe ikuzo zonke izenzo zakhe."
Psalms145:10 Zonke izenzo zakho ziya kukubonga, Yehova; Bakubonge abakho benceba."
Psalms145:11 Uzuko lobukumkani bakho baluthethe, Bathethe ngamandla akho;"
Psalms145:12 Ukuba babazise oonyana babantu ubugorha bakhe, nobungangamela bobukumkani bakhe."
Psalms145:13 Ubukumkani bakho bubukumkani bamaphakade onke, nolawulo lwakho lukwizizukulwana ezingunaphakade."
Psalms145:14 uYehova ungumxhasi wabo bonke abawayo, Ngumphakamisi wabo bonke abagobileyo."
Psalms145:15 Onke amehlo akhangele kuwe; wabanika ukudla kwakho ngexesha elililo.
Psalms145:16 Uyasivula isandla sakho, uzihluthise iinto zonke eziphilileyo ngeento ezikholekileyo."
Psalms145:17 Ulilungisa uYehova ngeendlela zakhe zonke, Ungcwele ngezenzo zakhe zonke."
Psalms145:18 Usondele uYehova kubo bonke abamnqulayo, bonke abamnqulayo ngenyaniso."
Psalms145:19 Uya kwenza okukholekileyo kwabamoyikayo; Uya kukuva ukuzibika kwabo, abasindise."
Psalms145:20 uYehova uyabakhusela bonke abo bamthandayo, kodwa bonke abangendawo uya kubatshabalalisa."
Psalms145:21 Umlomo wam uya kuzixela iingoma zikaYehova, Yonke inyama ilidumise igama lakhe elingcwele ngonaphakade."
Psalms146:1 Dumisani uYehova. Mbonge uYehova, mphefumlo wam!"
Psalms146:2 Ndiya kumdumisa uYehova lo gama ndidla ubomi; Ndiyathanda ukuhlabelela uThixo wam lo gama ndidla ubomi.
Psalms146:3 Musani ukukholosa ngamanene, Ngonyana womntu ongenanceba kuye."
Psalms146:4 Uyaphuma umphefumlo wakhe, abuyele emhlabeni wakhe; Kwangaloo mini ingqondo yakhe yaphambana."
Psalms146:5 Hayi, uyolo lwalowo uluncedo lunguThixo kaYakobi, okholose ngoYehova uThixo wakhe!"
Psalms146:6 Lowo wenza izulu nomhlaba, nolwandle, neento zonke ezikwezo zinto, lowo ugcina inyaniso ngonaphakade;"
Psalms146:7 Umgwebayo otyumkileyo, Ngopha abalambileyo ukudla; uYehova uyabakhulula abathinjwa;"
Psalms146:8 uYehova uvula amehlo eemfama; NguYehova ophakamisa abagobileyo; uYehova uyawathanda amalungisa.
Psalms146:9 uYehova uyabakhusela abasemzini; unceda iinkedama nabahlolokazi, uyijike indlela yabangendawo."
Psalms146:10 uYehova uya kulawula ngonaphakade njengeNkosi, uThixo wakho, iZiyon, kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana. Dumisani uYehova."
Psalms147:1 Mdumiseni uYehova, ngokuba kulungile ukuvuma uzuko loThixo wethu; ngokuba kumnandi oko; kwaye indumiso ithandekayo."
Psalms147:2 uYehova uyakha iYerusalem, ahlanganise abagxothiweyo bakwaSirayeli."
Psalms147:3 Ulophilisa abaphuke intliziyo, Abophe amanxeba abo;"
Psalms147:4 Ubala inani leenkwenkwezi; uzibiza zonke ngamagama azo.
Psalms147:5 iNkosi yethu inkulu, inamandla amakhulu, ingqondo yayo ayinasiphelo."
Psalms147:6 NguYehova ophakamisa abalulamileyo, uyabawisa abangendawo."
Psalms147:7 Vumani ngendumiso kuYehova; nivume indumiso yoThixo wethu ngomrhubhe.
Psalms147:8 Ulogubungela izulu ngamafu, Ulungisela umhlaba imvula, Uloseza utyani ezintabeni;"
Psalms147:9 Unika ukudla kwakhe amarhamncwa, Nakumahlungulu akhalayo;"
Psalms147:10 Akakholiswa bubugorha behashe; akazithandi iinyawo zomntu.
Psalms147:11 uYehova uyakholiswa ngabo bamoyikayo, abakholose ngenceba yakhe."
Psalms147:12 Mbonge uYehova, wena Yerusalem! Mdumise uThixo wakho, Ziyon!"
Psalms147:13 Ngokuba uyayomeleza imivalo yamasango akho; Abantwana bakho ubasikelele ngawe.
Psalms147:14 Nguye owenza uxolo ezweni lakho, Wakondla ngengqolowa etyebileyo."
Psalms147:15 Uthumela umyalelo wakhe ehlabathini; ilizwi lakhe libaleka kakhulu.
Psalms147:16 Unika ikhephu njengoboya; Unika ukubanda njengothuthu.
Psalms147:17 Uchithachitha umkhenkce wakhe njengamaqhekeza; Ngubani na onokuma phambi kwengqele yakhe?
Psalms147:18 Uthumela ilizwi lakhe, azinyibilikise; Uvuthuza umoya wakhe kwaye amanzi aqukuqela."
Psalms147:19 Wamazisa uYakobi ilizwi lakhe, Wamazisa uSirayeli izigwebo zakhe neziyalezo zakhe."
Psalms147:20 Akazange akwenze oko ebantwini, nabo babengawazi imigwebo yakhe. Dumisani uYehova."
Psalms148:1 Dumisani uYehova. Dumisani uYehova emazulwini, Mdumiseni ezindaweni eziphakamileyo."
Psalms148:2 Mdumiseni, nonke zithunywa zakhe, Mdumiseni, nonke mikhosi yakhe."
Psalms148:3 Mdumiseni, nina langa, nani nyanga, mdumiseni, nonke zinkwenkwezi zinokukhanya."
Psalms148:4 Mdumiseni, nina mazulu amazulu, Namanzi angaphezu kwezulu."
Psalms148:5 Mazilidumise ezo nto igama likaYehova, ngokuba wawisa umthetho, zadalwa."
Psalms148:6 Waziqinisa ngonaphakade kanaphakade;
Psalms148:7 Dumisani uYehova ehlabathini, nonke nina zimpungutye namaqula."
Psalms148:8 Umlilo nesichotho; ikhephu kunye nomphunga; sisiphango esilenzayo ilizwi lakhe.
Psalms148:9 Zonke iintaba neenduli; yonke imithi yeziqhamo nemisedare;
Psalms148:10 neenkomo zonke; izinto ezirhubuluzayo neentaka eziphaphazelayo:
Psalms148:11 Ookumkani behlabathi, neentlanga zonke; abathetheli nabagwebi behlabathi lonke."
Psalms148:12 Amakhwenkwe namantombazana; abantu abadala kunye nabantwana:
Psalms148:13 Mabalidumise igama likaYehova, ngokuba lilodwa igama lakhe; Ubuqaqawuli bakhe buphezu komhlaba namazulu."
Psalms148:14 Ubaphakamisele abantu bakhe uphondo, Indumiso yabakhe benceba bonke; koonyana bakaSirayeli, kubantu ababesondele kuye. Dumisani uYehova."
Psalms149:1 Dumisani uYehova. Vumani kuYehova ingoma entsha, Indumiso yakhe ebandleni labangcwele."
Psalms149:2 Makavuye uSirayeli ngoMenzi wakhe; Oonyana baseZiyon mabavuye eNkosini yabo!
Psalms149:3 Mabalidumise igama lakhe ngokungqungqa, Bavume kuye ngengqongqo nohadi."
Psalms149:4 Ngokuba uYehova uyakholiswa ngabantu bakhe; Uya kubahombisa abalulamileyo ngosindiso.
Psalms149:5 Abathembekileyo mabavuye ngozuko; wabaculela ezingqengqelweni zabo.
Psalms149:6 Inguquko kaThixo mayibe semilonyeni yabo nekrele elintlangothi-mbini ezandleni zabo;
Psalms149:7 ukuba baphindezele impindezelo kwiintlanga, zohlwaye;"
Psalms149:8 babakhonkxe ookumkani bazo ngemixokelelwane, nabathetheli bazo ngemixokelelwane yesinyithi;"
Psalms149:9 kwathiwa, Banembeko ngenxa yabo bonke abangcwele bakhe. Dumisani uYehova."
Psalms150:1 Dumisani uYehova. Mdumiseni uThixo engcweleni yakhe, Mdumiseni endaweni yamandla akhe."
Psalms150:2 Mdumiseni ngenxa yobugorha bakhe, Mdumiseni ngobukhulu bakhe."
Psalms150:3 Mdumiseni ngesandi sesigodlo, Mdumiseni ngohadi nangohadi."
