Psalms150:4 Mdumiseni ngengqongqo nengqungqo, Mdumiseni ngeento ezineentambo neentambo."
Psalms150:5 Mdumiseni ngamacangci akhenkcezayo, mdumiseni ngamacangci akhenkcezayo."
Psalms150:6 Yonke into ephefumlayo mayimdumise uYehova. Dumisani uYehova.
Proverbs1:1 Amazwi kaSolomon unyana kaDavide, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli;"
Proverbs1:2 Ubazi ubulumko noqeqesho; ukunakana kwamagama engqiqo;
Proverbs1:3 yokwamkela imfundiso yobulumko, nesiko, nesiko, nobulungisa;"
Proverbs1:4 Ukunika abo bafuna amaqhinga, ulwazi kunye neengcebiso kwabaselula."
Proverbs1:5 Oweva osisilumko, aqokele afunde; Umntu onengqondo uya kucebisana nobulumko."
Proverbs1:6 Ukuqonda izaci neenkcazelo; Amazwi ezilumko nezintsonkotha zazo.
Proverbs1:7 Ukoyika uYehova kukuqala kokwazi; Ubulumko noqeqesho izimathane ziludelile.
Proverbs1:8 Nyana wam, yiva uqeqesho lukayihlo, Ungawushiyi umyalelo kanyoko."
Proverbs1:9 Kuba iya kuba sisivatho sokuhomba entlokweni yakho, nemixokelelwane yentamo yakho."
Proverbs1:10 Nyana wam, xa aboni bekulinga, awukholwa;"
Proverbs1:11 Ukuba bathe, Hamba nathi, masilinde igazi, sifune abamsulwa emfihlekweni, simsulwa."
Proverbs1:12 Wathi abo badlayo usaphila njengengcwaba; nabo bangcathu, njengabo behla ngezinyuko;"
Proverbs1:13 Sozifumana zonke izinto ezinqwenelekayo, sozizalisa izindlu zethu ngamaxhoba."
Proverbs1:14 Liphose phakathi kwethu iqashiso lakho; masibe nesipaji esinye sonke.
Proverbs1:15 Nyana wam, musa ukuhamba nabo endleleni; Lugcine unyawo lwakho endleleni yabo."
Proverbs1:16 Kuba iinyawo zabo zigidimela ebubini, zigijimela kuphalaza igazi;"
Proverbs1:17 Okunene umnatha owanekwayo phambi kwamehlo eentaka zonke ulilize.
Proverbs1:18 Balalela igazi labo; bafihla ubomi babo emfihlekweni.
Proverbs1:19 Zizo ezo iindlela zabo bonke abalungileyo; ethatha ubomi babanikazi bayo.
Proverbs1:20 Ubulumko bumemeza; Uxela ilizwi lakhe ezitratweni.
Proverbs1:21 Ubiza phambi kwebandla, ekungeneni kwamasango; Emzini ubalisa amabali akhe, esithi."
Proverbs1:22 Ziyatha, kunini na ningàzi? Ngaba abagxeki bakunanzile ukugxeka; Izinyabi zithiya ukwazi?"
Proverbs1:23 Buyelani ekukhalimeni kwam; niyabona, ndowugalela kuni uMoya wam, ndinazise amazwi am."
Proverbs1:24 Ngenxa enokuba ndanibiza, anavuma; Ndasolula isandla sam, akwabona mntu;"
Proverbs1:25 Anilivumanga icebo lam lonke, anavuma ukundithethisa."
Proverbs1:26 Nam ndiya kukuhleka ububi benu; Ndiya kuhleka ekufikeni koloyiko lwenu;
Proverbs1:27 Ngokuba ekufikeni kwakho unxunguphalo, kuza njengembubhiso, ukutshabalala kwakho kuza njengomoya wesaqhwithi; xa kufike ilishwa namashwa."
Proverbs1:28 Bosuka bandibhenele, ndingaphenduli; baya kundifuna kamsinya, bangandifumani;"
Proverbs1:29 Kuba bakuthiyile ukwazi yaye abanyulanga ukoyika uYehova;
Proverbs1:30 Abaliphulaphula icebiso lam; Bakucekisile konke ukukhalima kwam.
Proverbs1:31 Ngoko baya kudla iziqhamo zendlela yabo baze baneliseke ngamacebo abo.
Proverbs1:32 Ngokuba intiyo yezinyabi iya kuzibulala, Nokulunga kwezinyabi kuya kuzitshabalalisa."
Proverbs1:33 Kodwa ondiphulaphulayo uya kuhlala ekhuselekile, ezolile, angoyiki ububi."
Proverbs2:1 Nyana wam, ukuba uthe wawamkela amazwi am, Wayifihla imimiselo yam;"
Proverbs2:2 ukuze uyithobele ubulumko indlebe yakho, uyiguqulele ekuqondeni intliziyo yakho;"
Proverbs2:3 Ewe, ukuba uthe wabiza ukwazi, walisa ekuqondeni ilizwi lakho;"
Proverbs2:4 Ukuba ubufuna njengesilivere, yaye ubufuna njengobuncwane obufihliweyo;"
Proverbs2:5 Uya kwandula ukukuqonda ukoyika uYehova, ukuqonde uThixo."
Proverbs2:6 Ngokuba uYehova upha ubulumko; emlonyeni wakhe kuphuma ukwazi nokuqonda.
Proverbs2:7 Uwagcinela amalungisa ubulumko; Ndiyingweletshetshe kwabahamba ngobulungisa.
Proverbs2:8 Ugcina umendo wobulungisa, Ayigcine indlela yabakhe benceba."
Proverbs2:9 Apho uya kukuqonda okusesikweni, nesiko, nesidima; ewe, nayiphi na indlela ilungile."
Proverbs2:10 Ubulumko buya kungena entliziyweni yakho, ukwazi yikholise umphefumlo wakho;"
Proverbs2:11 Iingcinga zokusindisa, ukuqonda kokusindisa."
Proverbs2:12 Ukuba kukuhlangule emendweni wobubi, nakumntu othetha okubi;"
Proverbs2:13 abatyekayo emendweni wobulungisa, bahamba ngeendlela zobumnyama;"
Proverbs2:14 abavuyela ukwenza ububi, bagcobe ngobuxoki bongendawo;"
Proverbs2:15 abandlela zigoso-goso, abo batyekayo ezindleleni zabo;"
Proverbs2:16 Ukuba uhlangulwe kumkamntu, Kowolunye uhlanga, ovakalisa ilizwi lakhe;"
Proverbs2:17 oshiya iqabane lobutsha bakhe aze awulibale umnqophiso kaThixo wakhe.
Proverbs2:18 Kuba indlu yakhe isingise ekufeni, Neendlela zakhe zisingise ekufeni."
Proverbs2:19 Akukho namnye oya kuye angabuyi, kwaye akayi kuzibamba iindlela zobomi."
Proverbs2:20 Ukuze uhambe ngomendo wamalungisa, Ugcine umendo wamalungisa."
Proverbs2:21 Ngokuba amalungisa aya kuhlala emhlabeni, amalungisa aya kuhlala kuwo."
Proverbs2:22 Ke bona abangendawo baya kunqunyulwa emhlabeni, nabangendawo banqunyulwe kulo."
Proverbs3:1 Nyana wam, musa ukuwulibala umyalelo wam; Intliziyo yakho mayiyibambe imithetho yam;"
Proverbs3:2 ngokuba iya kubandisa ubude bemihla yakho, neminyaka yobomi, noxolo."
Proverbs3:3 Musa ukuswela inceba nenyaniso; Zinxibe kuwe emqaleni; yibhale elucwecweni lwentliziyo yakho.
Proverbs3:4 Wofumana ke ukwamkeleka, nokwamkeleka kakuhle emehlweni kaThixo nakubantu."
Proverbs3:5 Kholosa ngoYehova ngentliziyo yakho yonke; kwaye ungayami ngokwakho ukuqonda.
Proverbs3:6 Umazi kuzo zonke iindlela zakho, kwaye uya kuwenza uthi tye umendo wakho."
Proverbs3:7 Musa ukuba sisilumko; yoyika uYehova, usuke ebubini."
Proverbs3:8 Kuya kuba sempilweni entle enkabeni yakho nomongo emathanjeni akho.
Proverbs3:9 Mzukise uYehova ngempahla yakho, nangongeniselo lwakho lonke."
Proverbs3:10 Ozala amaqonga akho yintabalala, ozalatha isixovulelo sakho ngewayini;"
Proverbs3:11 Nyana wam, musa ukuwucekisa uqeqesho lukaYehova; ungadinwa kukukhalima kwakhe."
Proverbs3:12 Ngokuba uYehova uyamohlwaya amthandayo; njengoyise wonyana akholiswayo nguye.
Proverbs3:13 Hayi, uyolo lomntu ofumene ubulumko, Lomntu ozuze ingqondo!"
Proverbs3:14 Kuba ishishini labo liwugqithile urhwebo lwesilivere, nongeniselo lwabo ngaphezu kwegolide embiweyo."
Proverbs3:15 Uxabiseke ngaphezu kweeperile, yaye yonke into onokuyinqwenela ayinakulinganiswa naye."
Proverbs3:16 Imihla emide isesandleni sabo sokunene; yaye esandleni sakhe sasekunene kukho ubutyebi nozuko.
Proverbs3:17 Iindlela zabo ziindlela zolonwabo, neendlela zabo zonke ziluxolo."
Proverbs3:18 Bungumthi wobomi kwabawubambayo, Banoyolo bonke obubambayo."
Proverbs3:19 uYehova walidala ngobulumko ihlabathi; ngokuba wadala amazulu.
Proverbs3:20 Ngokwazi kwakhe agqabhuka amaqula, Kwavuthuza amafu umbethe."
Proverbs3:21 Nyana wam, mayingawashiyi amehlo akho; Londoloza ubulumko nesiluleko."
Proverbs3:22 Koba bubomi emphefumlweni wakho, Nenceba emqaleni wakho."
Proverbs3:23 Uya kwandula uhambe indlela yakho unoxolo, aluyi kubetheka unyawo lwakho."
Proverbs3:24 Xa uthe walala, musa ukoyika; ewe, uya kulala, bube mnandi ubuthongo bakho."
Proverbs3:25 Musa ukoyika lunkwantyiso luzayo ngesiquphe, Nokutshabalala kwabangendawo, kwakufika."
Proverbs3:26 Ngenxa yokuba uYehova uya kuba lithemba lakho, yaye uya kulugcina unyawo lwakho lungabanjiswa."
Proverbs3:27 Musani ukwala ukwenza okulungileyo kwabafaneleyo, ukuba kusemandleni enu ukukwenza."
Proverbs3:28 Musa ukuthi kummelwane wakho, Hamba, ubuye, ndokunika ngomso; xa unayo."
Proverbs3:29 Uze ungacebi ububi ngommelwane wakho, ngokuba yena uhleli nawe enoxolo."
Proverbs3:30 Musa ukubambana nomntu kungekho sizathu, ukuba akonanga;"
Proverbs3:31 Musa ukuyimonela indoda egonyamelayo, Unganyuli nanye yeendlela zayo;"
Proverbs3:32 Kuba ongendawo ulisikizi kuYehova; Ke lunabathe tye ucweyo lwakhe.
Proverbs3:33 Ingqalekiso kaYehova isendlwini yongendawo; kodwa isakhiwo samalungisa uyayisikelela.
Proverbs3:34 Ewe, uyabagxeka abagxeki, kodwa unenceba kwabalulamileyo."
Proverbs3:35 Izilumko ziya kuludla ilifa uzuko;
Proverbs4:1 Nina bantwana, yivani imfundiso kayihlo, niyilumkele, ukuze nikwazi ukuqonda."
Proverbs4:2 Ngenxa yokuba ndininika imfundiso elungileyo, musani ukuwutyeshela umthetho wam."
Proverbs4:3 Kuba bendingunyana kabawo, Ndithambile, ndiyintanda emehlweni kama."
Proverbs4:4 Wandiyala ke, wathi kum, Intliziyo yakho mayiwabambe amazwi am; Gcina imithetho yam, nobomi bam."
Proverbs4:5 Rhweba ubulumko, rhweba ingqiqo; musa ukuyilibala; kwaye ungaphambuki emazwini omlomo wam."
Proverbs4:6 Musa ukumshiya, wokugcina; mthande, wokugcina."
Proverbs4:7 Ubulumko yeyona nto ibalulekileyo; Rhweba ke ubulumko, urhwebe ingqondo nako konke ukuqonda."
Proverbs4:8 Mphakamise, wokuphakamisa; uya kukuhlonipha xa umbuza."
Proverbs4:9 Buya kukunika isihombo sokuhomba entlokweni yakho; wokunika isithsaba sokuhomba.
Proverbs4:10 Phulaphula, ungunyana wam, uze uwamkele amazwi am; woba mininzi iminyaka yobomi."
Proverbs4:11 Ndikuyalele indlela yobulumko; Ndikukhaphele ngeendlela ezithe tye.
Proverbs4:12 Ekuhambeni kwakho akayi kuphazamiseka ukunyathela kwakho; nokuba uyabaleka, akuyi kukhubeka."
Proverbs4:13 Bamba ingqeqesho; musa ukumshiya; mgcine; ngokuba ububomi bakho.
Proverbs4:14 Musa ukungena emendweni wabangendawo, Ungahambi emendweni wabangendawo."
Proverbs4:15 Yicezele, ungadluli kuyo; yijike, udlule."
Proverbs4:16 Kuba abalali, ababi benza ububi; Bomkelwa bubuthongo, ukuba abakhanga;"
Proverbs4:17 Ngokuba badla isonka sokungendawo, Basele newayini yobutshijolo."
Proverbs4:18 Kodwa umendo wamalungisa unjengokukhanya okuqaqambileyo okuqhubeka kukhanya de kube semini enkulu.
Proverbs4:19 Indlela yabangendawo injengesithokothoko; abayazi into abakhubeka ngayo.
Proverbs4:20 Nyana wam, wabekele indlebe amazwi am; yiva amazwi endlebe yam."
Proverbs4:21 Musa ukuwashiya amehlo akho; zigcine entliziyweni yakho.
Proverbs4:22 Kuba bubomi kwababufumanayo, usindiso enyameni yabo yonke."
Proverbs4:23 Yinike intliziyo yakho ngako konke ukunyameka; kuba ubutyebi bobomi buphuma kuyo.
Proverbs4:24 Shenxisa emlonyeni wobuxoki kuwe, mayibe kude kuwe emlonyeni womlomo."
Proverbs4:25 Amehlo akho makakhangele kakuhle, neentshiyi zakho mazikhangeleke kakuhle."
Proverbs4:26 Qikelela umkhondo wonyawo lwakho, Uwumise wonke umendo wakho."
Proverbs4:27 Musa ukutyekela ekunene nasekhohlo; Susa unyawo lwakho ebubini.
Proverbs5:1 Nyana wam, buve ubulumko bam, Uyibazele indlebe ingqondo yam;"
Proverbs5:2 Ukuze uqonde icebo, Nomlomo wakho ugcine ukwazi."
Proverbs5:3 Kuba umlomo womfazi wasemzini uvuza njengenqatha lobusi, nemilebe yakhe ibuthelezi ngaphezu kweoli."
Proverbs5:4 Ke ukuphela kwakhe kukrakra njengomlambo, kubukhali njengekrele elintlangothi mbini;"
Proverbs5:5 Iinyawo zakhe zehla zaya ekufeni; ukunyathela kwakhe ukuya emazantsi.
Proverbs5:6 Musani ukuyicinga indlela yobomi, neendlela zabo, ukuze ningazazi."
Proverbs5:7 “Bantwana bam, ndiphulaphuleni ngoku, ningemki emazwini omlomo wam."
Proverbs5:8 Suka umke kuye, ungasondeli emnyango wendlu yakhe;"
Proverbs5:9 Ukuba ubungangamsha bakho ungabunikeli bambi, Iminyaka yakho uyinike isijorha;"
Proverbs5:10 ukuze abasemzini banganeli bubutyebi benu; umsebenzi wakho usendlwini yolunye uhlanga;
Proverbs5:11 Ekugqibeleni uya kukhala, xa inyama yakho itshabalala kunye nomzimba wakho."
Proverbs5:12 Ndathi, Ndikuthiyile uqeqesho, Hayi, ukuba bubi kwentliziyo yam!"
Proverbs5:13 Kwaye andizange ndiliphulaphule ilizwi labafundisi bam, kwaye andibaphulaphulanga abo bandifundisayo!"
Proverbs5:14 Ndaphantse ukuba sebubini bonke, Ophakathi kwebandla nebandla."
Proverbs5:15 Sela amanzi equleni lakho, namanzi aqukuqelayo equleni lakho."
Proverbs5:16 Makatwazeke amaqula akho, Yagaleleka imijelo yamanzi ezitratweni."
Proverbs5:17 Mayibe yeyakho, ingabi yabasemzini kuni."
Proverbs5:18 Malisikelelwe kakuhle, uvuye ngumfazi wobutsha bakho;"
Proverbs5:19 Makabe njengenkunzi yebhokhwe ephilileyo, nentombi ethandekayo; Ngamana amabele akhe angakuhluthisa; yaye usoloko uchukunyiswa luthando lwakhe."
Proverbs5:20 Kutheni na wena, nyana wam, ufanele uthandwe ngumfazi wasemzini uze uqhwabe incanca yowasemzini?"
Proverbs5:21 Kuba iindlela zomntu ziphambi kwamehlo kaYehova, yaye uyazazi zonke iindlela zakhe."
Proverbs5:22 Umenzi wobubi uya kuzithwala izono zakhe, abanjiswe yimixokelelwane yezono zakhe."
Proverbs5:23 Uya kufa engenatyala; ebuninzini bokumatha kwakhe uya kulahleka.
Proverbs6:1 Nyana wam, xa uthe wammela ummelwane wakho, Naxa uthe wabambana nomnye ngesandla owasemzini,"
Proverbs6:2 Ubanjwe ngentetho yomlomo wakho, Ubanjwe ngamazwi omlomo wakho."
Proverbs6:3 Yenza ngoko, nyana wam, uzisindise, ukuba uthe wawa esandleni sommelwane wakho; hamba, zithobe kwaye uqinisekise umhlobo wakho."
Proverbs6:4 Musa ukuwayeka alale amehlo akho, namashiya akho makangalali;"
Proverbs6:5 Zisindise njengexhama esandleni somzingeli, nanjengentaka esandleni somthiyeli."
Proverbs6:6 Yiya embovaneni, vilandini; Khangela iindlela zakhe, ulumke:"
Proverbs6:7 engenamkhokheli, namgcini, namlawuli;"
Proverbs6:8 Siphe ukudla ehlotyeni; Yilungise ngexa lokuvuna;
Proverbs6:9 Kunini na ulala, vilandini? Uya kuvuka nini na ebuthongweni bakho?"
Proverbs6:10 Ukulala kancinane, ukozela kancinane, ukusonga iingalo zikabani kancinane, ukulala."
Proverbs6:11 Bokuza ubuhlwempu bakho njengomhambi, Nentswelo yakho njengendoda exhobileyo."
Proverbs6:12 Ongendawo, ongendawo uhamba ngomlomo wobubi;"
Proverbs6:13 Utyanda ngoshiyi, uthetha ngeenyawo, Walatha ngeminwe yakhe;"
Proverbs6:14 Inkohliso isentliziyweni yakhe, uyila ububi ngamaxesha onke; uhlwayela iiyantlukwano."
Proverbs6:15 Ngako oko, intlekele yakhe iya kumfikela kube kanye; uya kwaphuka ngephanyazo, angaphili."
Proverbs6:16 Ezi ezintandathu uzithiyileyo uYehova, zasixhenxe zingamasikizi kuye."
Proverbs6:17 Ngamehlo aqwayingayo, lulwimi lobuxoki; Zizandla eziphalaza igazi elimsulwa;"
Proverbs6:18 Intliziyo eyila ububi, ziinyawo ezikhawulezayo ukubalekela ebubini;"
Proverbs6:19 Lingqina elixokayo, elifutha amanga, Nongenisa ukungavisisani phakathi kwabazalwana."
Proverbs6:20 Nyana wam, gcina umthetho kayihlo, ungatyeki emyalelweni kanyoko."
Proverbs6:21 Sibophe entliziyweni yakho ngamaxesha onke, Usinxibe emqaleni wakho;"
Proverbs6:22 Ukuba uthe wahamba, uya kukukhokela; Ukuba ulala, buya kukugcina; yaye xa uvuka, iya kuthetha nawe."
Proverbs6:23 Ngokuba ulukhanyiso umthetho; nomyalelo ulukhanyiso; Uqeqesho lwemfundo yindlela yobomi;
Proverbs6:24 Ukuba akukhwebuke kumfazi onobubi, Nolwimi olukhohlisayo lomkamntu."
Proverbs6:25 Musa ukubukhanuka ubunzwakazi bakhe ngentliziyo yakho; makangayichukumisi ngamashiya.
Proverbs6:26 Kuba ngenxa yehenyukazi umntu udla iqhekeza lesonka; Umkamntu okrexezayo uzingela umphefumlo onqabileyo.
Proverbs6:27 Umntu unokuwuthabatha na umlilo esifubeni sakhe, Zingatshi na iingubo zakhe?"
Proverbs6:28 Unokuhamba na umntu phezu kwamalahle avuthayo, zingatshisi iinyawo zakhe?"
Proverbs6:29 Lowo ungena nomfazi wommelwane wakhe; akasayi kuba msulwa lowo umchukumisayo.
Proverbs6:30 Alidelwa isela xa lisiba ukuze lihluthe, xa lithe lalamba;"
Proverbs6:31 Ukuba uthe wafunyanwa, wobuya kasixhenxe; woyirhola yonke impahla yendlu yakhe."
Proverbs6:32 Okrexeza umfazi ke akanangqondo; owenjenjalo uyawonakalisa umphefumlo wakhe.
Proverbs6:33 Uya kufumana ububi nocukucezo; nongcikivo lwakhe alucimi.
Proverbs6:34 Kuba ikhwele libubushushu bendoda; ke ngoko, akayi kuwuconga umhla wempindezelo."
Proverbs6:35 Ayiyi kulubeka ucamagusho; nokuba uthe wampha izipho ezininzi, akaneliswa."
Proverbs7:1 Nyana wam, gcina intetho yam, uyigcine imithetho yam."
Proverbs7:2 Gcina imithetho yam, uphile; nomyalelo wam njengokhozo lweliso lakho."
Proverbs7:3 Sibophe eminweni yakho, sibhale elucwecweni lwentliziyo yakho."
Proverbs7:4 Yithi, Ungudade wethu; uze ubize ukuqonda kwakho;"
Proverbs7:5 Ukuze ugcinwe kumkamntu, Kowolunye uhlanga, okudumisa ngamazwi."
Proverbs7:6 Kuba ngefestile yendlu yam, ndalunguza eluqayini lwam;"
Proverbs7:7 Yabona, phakathi kwamadodana azizidenge, kukho umfana ongenangqondo."
Proverbs7:8 Hamba esitratweni kufuphi nembombo yakhe; wagoduka.
Proverbs7:9 Ngokuhlwa, ngokuhlwa, kumnyama nakubumnyama;"
Proverbs7:10 Wahlangatyezwa yinkazana ethiwe wambu ngehenyukazi, enentliziyo enobuqhokolo."
Proverbs7:11 Ulukhuni, uyinjubaqa, Azihlali endlwini yakhe iinyawo zakhe;"
Proverbs7:12 Ngoku ungaphandle, ngoku usezitratweni, ulala eqongqotha iimbombo zonke."
Proverbs7:13 Ngoko wambamba waza wamanga waza wathi kuye ngobuso obuneentloni:
Proverbs7:14 Ndinemibingelelo yombulelo ekum; namhlanje ndizifezile izibhambathiso zam.
Proverbs7:15 Ngenxa yoko ndiphume ndeza kukukhawulela, ndabufuna ubuso bakho ngenyameko, ndakufumana."
Proverbs7:16 Umandlalo wam ndawuhombisa ngelinen ecikizekileyo, ngemifanekiso eqingqiweyo, ngelinen ecikizekileyo yaseYiputa."
Proverbs7:17 Umandlalo wam ndiwuthambisa ngemore, nekhala, nesinamon."
Proverbs7:18 Yiza, sihluthe luthando kude kuse; sithuthuzele ngothando."
Proverbs7:19 Ekubeni indoda elungileyo ingekho ekhaya, ithabatha uhambo olude."
Proverbs7:20 Wayithabatha ingxowa yemali, waza wabuyela ekhaya ngomhla omisiweyo."
Proverbs7:21 Ngentetho yakhe emnandi kakhulu, wamenza waziva iimvakalelo zakhe, wamnyanzela ngokuphethula komlomo wakhe."
Proverbs7:22 Uyamsukela kamsinya njengenkunzi yenkomo isiya ekuxhelweni, nanjengesidenge xa ezolula iintonga zaso;"
Proverbs7:23 Lwada utolo lwacanda esibindini sakhe; njengentaka esiwa emgibeni, ingazi ukuba isindiselwe umphefumlo wayo."
Proverbs7:24 Ke ngoko, bonyana, ndiveni, Niyibazele indlebe intetho yomlomo wam."
Proverbs7:25 Musa ukuyiyekela intliziyo yakho ixexezele ezindleleni zakhe, Ungatyeki ezindleleni zakhe."
Proverbs7:26 Kuba wawisa abaninzi abangxwelerhiweyo, kwabulawa naye abaninzi abanamandla."
Proverbs7:27 Indlu yakhe iyindlela yendlu yofileyo, Ezihla ziye ezindlwini zokufa."
Proverbs8:1 Abumemezi na ubulumko? Kwakutheni ukuze ilizwi lakhe livakale?
Proverbs8:2 Emantloko eendawo eziphezulu, ngasendleleni, emendweni."
Proverbs8:3 Ubiza emasangweni, emasangweni omzi, emasangweni amasango;"
Proverbs8:4 Ndibiza kuni, madoda; Ilizwi lam lisiya koonyana babantu."
Proverbs8:5 Buqondeni ubulumko, zinyabi, zinyabi, yibani nentliziyo elumkileyo."
Proverbs8:6 Yivani; kuba ndiya kuthetha izinto ezimangalisayo; nokuvula umlomo wam kuya kuba yinyaniso.
Proverbs8:7 Ngokuba umlomo wam uxela inyaniso; Okungendawo kulisikizi emlonyeni wam.
Proverbs8:8 Yonke intetho yomlomo wam isebulungiseni; akukho nto igwenxa okanye itenxileyo kuzo.
Proverbs8:9 Zonke izinto zisingise kwizilumko, zilungile kwabazuze ukwazi."
Proverbs8:10 Yamkelani uqeqesho lwam, ningamkeli silivere; nolwazi ngaphezu kwegolide embiweyo."
Proverbs8:11 Kuba ubulumko bulungile ngaphezu kweeperile; nazo zonke izinto ezinqwenelekayo azinakulinganiswa nabo.
Proverbs8:12 Mna, bulumko, ndihleli ngengqondo, Ndazuza ukwazi inzululwazi."
Proverbs8:13 Ukoyika uYehova kukuthiya into embi; Ndikuthiyile ukuzidla, ukukratsha, indlela egwenxa, nomlomo ongendawo;"
Proverbs8:14 Inkumbulo yeyam, nobulumko bugqibelele; Yingqondo; Ndinamandla."
Proverbs8:15 Ookumkani balawula ngam, Nezidwangube ziceba ubulungisa."
Proverbs8:16 Balawula ngam abathetheli, nabagwebi bonke belimiweyo."
Proverbs8:17 Abandithandayo ndiyabathanda nam; nabo bandifunayo baya kundifumana.
Proverbs8:18 Bunam ubutyebi nozuko; ewe, ubutyebi banaphakade nobulungisa."
Proverbs8:19 Zilungile iziqhamo zam ngaphezu kwegolide embiweyo, nakwengcwengekileyo; umvuzo wam yisilivere esulungekileyo."
Proverbs8:20 Ndihamba ngomendo wobulungisa, phakathi kweendlela ezisesikweni;"
Proverbs8:21 Ukuze ndibenzele okulungileyo abandithandayo; ndibuzalise ubuncwane babo.
Proverbs8:22 uYehova wandenza ndaba yintlahlela yendlela yakhe, Ndaba ngowamandulo emisebenzini yakhe yakudala."
Proverbs8:23 Mna ndasekwa kususela kumaxesha amandulo, kwasephakadeni, Kwasemaphakadeni elimiweyo."
Proverbs8:24 Ndazalwa kungekabikho bunzulu; kungekho maqula azele ngamanzi.
Proverbs8:25 Iintaba azikasekwa, neenduli zingekaveli;"
Proverbs8:26 Akenzanga hlabathi, namasimi, Nothuli lomhlaba."
Proverbs8:27 Ekulilungiseni kwakhe izulu, ndandikho apho;"
Proverbs8:28 Ekuwatywineni kwakhe amafu phezulu, Ekutywineni kwakhe amaqula oonogumbe behlabathi."
Proverbs8:29 uEnere waluwisela umthetho ulwandle, ukuba amanzi angawexuki umthetho wakhe, Ekuzimiseni kwakhe iziseko zehlabathi."
Proverbs8:30 Ke kaloku ndandinaye, njengokungathi omnye esondlwe naye;"
Proverbs8:31 Vuyani ngenxa yesahlulo sehlabathi; noyolo lwam lwalukoonyana babantu.
Proverbs8:32 Bantwana bam, ndiveni kaloku, ngokuba hayi, uyolo lwabazigcinayo iindlela zam!"
Proverbs8:33 Yivani uqeqesho, nibe nobulumko, ningalushiyi."
Proverbs8:34 Hayi, uyolo lomntu ondivayo, Ozigcinayo iingcango zam imihla yonke, Elondoloza iingcango zeminyango yam;"
Proverbs8:35 Ngokuba ondifumeneyo mna ufumene ubomi, nenceba evela kuYehova."
Proverbs8:36 Ke yena ondingcatshayo utshabalalisa umphefumlo wakhe; bonke abandithiyileyo bathanda ukufa.
Proverbs9:1 Ubulumko buyakhile indlu yabo, Zikroliwe iintsika zabo zosixhenxe."
Proverbs9:2 Wazixhela iinkomo zakhe; Uyiphithikezile iwayini yakhe; walungisa netafile yakhe.
Proverbs9:3 Wathuma abakhonzazana bakhe; ubiza iindawo eziphakamileyo zesixeko;
Proverbs9:4 Masiphambukele apha isidenge;
Proverbs9:5 Yizani nidle isonka sam, nisele iwayini endiyiphithikezileyo;"
Proverbs9:6 Shiyani iziyatha, niphile; nihambe ngendlela yokuqonda."
Proverbs9:7 Omthethisa umgxeki uzihlazisa ngokwakhe; ke yena omohlwayayo umenzi wobubi, umkela isiqalekiso."
Proverbs9:8 Musa ukumthethisa umgxeki, hleze akuthiye; yohlwaya isilumko, sokuthanda."
Proverbs9:9 Sifundise isilumko, solumka ngakumbi; fundisa indoda elungileyo, yoba nemfundo eninzi."
Proverbs9:10 Ingqalo yobulumko kukoyika uYehova, nokwaziwa koyiNgcwele yingqiqo."
Proverbs9:11 Ngenxa yam iya kuba mininzi imihla yakho, ibe mininzi iminyaka yobomi."
Proverbs9:12 Ukuba uthe walumka, uya kuzifumanela ubulumko;"
Proverbs9:13 Umfazi osisinyabi uyaxokozela, akazi nto, akazi nto;"
Proverbs9:14 Ngokuba ehleli emnyango wendlu yakhe, Etroneni yakhe ezindaweni eziphakamileyo zesixeko."
Proverbs9:15 Ndibize abakhweli abahamba kakuhle endleleni yabo:
Proverbs9:16 Masiphambukele apha isidenge; wathi kuye lowo ubefuna ukuqonda.
Proverbs9:17 Amanzi abiweyo anencasa, Nesonka esityiwa ngasese sinencasa."
Proverbs9:18 Akazi ukuba abafileyo bakhona; nokuba abamenywa bakhe basezinzulwini zelabafileyo.
Proverbs10:1 Amazwi kaSolomon. Unyana osisilumko uyamvuyisa uyise; Ke unyana osisinyabi ngumthwalo kunina.
Proverbs10:2 Ubutyebi bokungendawo abuncedi lutho, Ke bona ubulungisa buhlangula ekufeni."
Proverbs10:3 uYehova akawuyeki ufe yindlala umphefumlo welungisa, kodwa ubutyebi babangendawo uyayigxotha."
Proverbs10:4 Osebenza ngesandla esityhafileyo uba lihlwempu; Ke sona isandla sabakhutheleyo siyatyebisa.
Proverbs10:5 Obutha ehlotyeni uyinkwenkwe elumkileyo; Olalayo ngexa lokuvuna ngunyana olihlazo.
Proverbs10:6 Ziintsikelelo entlokweni yelungisa; Ke wona umlomo wabangendawo ugubungela ugonyamelo.
Proverbs10:7 Ukukhunjulwa kwelungisa kuhleli kunentsikelelo, Ke igama labangendawo liyabola."
Proverbs10:8 Intliziyo elumkileyo iyayamkela imiyalelo;
Proverbs10:9 Ohamba ngobulungisa uhamba enyanisekile; Ke yena ojibilizayo ngeendlela zakhe uyaziwa.
Proverbs10:10 Oqhwanyazayo ubanga ububi, Ophaphazelayo uya kuwa."
Proverbs10:11 Lithende lobomi umlomo welungisa; Ke wona umlomo wabangendawo ugubungela ugonyamelo.
Proverbs10:12 Intiyo ivelisa iqhenqa, kodwa uthando lugubungela zonke izono."
Proverbs10:13 Ubulumko bufumaneka emlonyeni wesilumko; Intonga isemhlana wesinyabi.
Proverbs10:14 Isilumko siyalugcina ukwazi; Umlomo wesinyabi usondele kwintshabalalo.
Proverbs10:15 Ubuncwane bobutyebi ngumzi wabo oliqele; intshabalalo yabasweleyo bubuhlwempu babo.
Proverbs10:16 Umsebenzi welungisa usingisa ebomini; ke sona isiqhamo songendawo sisingisa esonweni.
Proverbs10:17 Ogcina uqeqesho umendweni wobomi; Ophulukene noqeqesho uyandwendwa.
Proverbs10:18 Oyifihlayo intiyo ungumlomo wobuxoki; Othukayo usisidenge.
Proverbs10:19 Ukona kwamazwi amaninzi, akaswele nto; Owuvalayo umlomo sisilumko."
Proverbs10:20 Yisilivere esulungekileyo ulwimi lwelungisa; Ke yona intliziyo yabangendawo yinto engento.
Proverbs10:21 Umlomo welungisa udlisa abaninzi; Izimathane zifa ngokuswela ubulumko.
Proverbs10:22 Intsikelelo kaYehova iyatyebisa, kodwa ayibandisi ubuhlwempu."
Proverbs10:23 Ngokuba kumnandi kwisidenge ukwenza ububi; Ubulumko bunobuqili kwindoda enengqondo.
Proverbs10:24 Ukunxunguphala kongendawo kuya kuba phezu kwakhe; Ke akunqwenelayo amalungisa aya kunikwa.
Proverbs10:25 Njengoko udlula umoya wesaqhwithi, akabikho ongendawo; Ke lona ilungisa luseko lwaphakade."
Proverbs10:26 Njengeviniga emazinyweni, nanjengomsi emehlweni, kukwanjalo ukonakala kwabayithumileyo."
Proverbs10:27 Ukoyika uYehova kongeza imihla; Ke yona iminyaka yabangendawo iyanqanyulwa.
Proverbs10:28 Ukulinda kwamalungisa luvuyo; Ukulinda kwabangendawo kuyadaka.
Proverbs10:29 Indlela kaYehova inamandla kumalungisa, kodwa abenzi bobubi baya kutshatyalaliswa."
Proverbs10:30 Ilungisa alishukunyiswa naphakade; Ke bona abangendawo abayi kuphila emhlabeni.
Proverbs10:31 Umlomo welungisa uxela ubulumko; Ulwimi olungendawo luyanqanyulwa.
Proverbs10:32 Umlomo welungisa uyakwazi okwamkelekileyo; Ke yona imilebe yongendawo ithetha ubuxoki.
Proverbs11:1 Lisikizi kuYehova isikali esixokayo;
Proverbs11:2 Kwafika ukukhukhumala, kofika ukucukucezwa; Ke bona abathobekileyo ubulumko."
Proverbs11:3 Ubulungisa babalungileyo buyabakhapha; ke bona ububi babangendawo buyabatshabalalisa.
Proverbs11:4 Ubutyebi abuyincedi nganto ngemini yembandezelo; Ke bona ubulungisa buhlangula ekufeni.
Proverbs11:5 Ubulungisa bogqibeleleyo bulungelelanisa indlela yakhe; Ongendawo ukhubeka ngokungendawo kwakhe.
Proverbs11:6 Ubulungisa bamalungisa buyabasindisa, Ke bona abakreqi baya kubanjwa bubulukhuni babo."
Proverbs11:7 Ekufeni kongendawo liyadaka ithemba lakhe; Ithemba labangendawo liyadaka.
Proverbs11:8 Ilungisa liyahlangulwa embandezelweni, Ongendawo afike endaweni yakhe."
Proverbs11:9 Intshembenxa iyamonakalisa ummelwane wayo ngomlomo; Ke wona amalungisa aya kusindiswa ngokwazi.
Proverbs11:10 Ngokuhamba kakuhle kwamalungisa, umzi uyavuya; Ekutshabalaleni kongendawo kubakho uvuyo."
Proverbs11:11 Ngentsikelelo yelungisa siyaphaka nyiswa isixeko; Ngomlomo wabangendawo siyatshatyalaliswa.
Proverbs11:12 Oswele ubulumko udela ummelwane wakhe; Ke indoda enengqondo izola.
Proverbs11:13 Umntu oshiyiweyo utyhila ucweyo; Ke yena ontliziyo inyanisekileyo uyayigubungela into.
Proverbs11:14 Ukuba akukho kucetyiswa, bayawa abantu; kodwa xa baninzi abacebisi lusindiso."
Proverbs11:15 Okholosa ngowasemzini uya kuba sisilumko kuloo nto; Oyithiyileyo ibheyile uqinile.
Proverbs11:16 Umfazi olungileyo ugcina isidima; Amadoda anamandla agcina ubutyebi.
Proverbs11:17 Uwuphethe kakuhle umphefumlo wakhe umntu onobubele; Ke yena osijorha uyawonakalisa umzimba wakhe.
Proverbs11:18 Ongendawo uyinkohliso; Ke yena ohlwayela ubulungisa unomvuzo oyinyaniso.
Proverbs11:19 Ubulungisa busingisa ebomini; Ophuthuma ububi usukela ukufa kwakhe.
Proverbs11:20 Balisikizi kuYehova abantliziyo ingendawo;
Proverbs11:21 Noko ke, ukuba kuxhawula isandla, umntu ongendawo akafuni kohlwaywa, kodwa inzala yamalungisa iyasinda."
Proverbs11:22 Njengegolide empumlweni yehagu, Uyinzwakazi eswele ukuqonda."
Proverbs11:23 Umnqweno wamalungisa yinto elungileyo; Ke ithemba labangendawo kukuphuphuma komsindo.
Proverbs11:24 Kukho ohlakazayo, eyanda; kwaye kukho uthintelo ngaphezu kokuyimfuneko, kodwa lutyekela ekusweleni."
Proverbs11:25 Umoya onobubele uyatyeba;
Proverbs11:26 Olahla ingqolowa, uyamqalekiswa ngabantu; kodwa ithamsanqa liya kuba entlokweni yalowo uthengisayo."
Proverbs11:27 Ongxamele okulungileyo ufuna okwamkelekileyo; Ongxamele ububi, buya kumfikela."
Proverbs11:28 Okholosa ngobutyebi bakhe uya kuwa yena, Ke wona amalungisa ayavuka njengokhula."
Proverbs11:29 Oyivusayo indlu yakhe uya kuwudla ilifa umphefumlo wakhe; Isinyabi siya kukhonza izilumko.
Proverbs11:30 Isiqhamo selungisa ngumthi wobomi; nalowo ubamba imiphefumlo elumkileyo.
Proverbs11:31 Qaphelani, ilungisa liya kuphindezelwa ehlabathini, ngakumbi abakhohlakeleyo nomoni!"
Proverbs12:1 Uthanda uqeqesho othanda ukwazi; Uthiya isohlwayo úthiyile.
Proverbs12:2 Olungileyo uyamkeleka kuYehova; Ke yena oyila ububi uphuma kuye.
Proverbs12:3 Akuzimaseki mntu, enokungendawo; Ke yona ingcambu yamalungisa ayinakushukunyiswa."
Proverbs12:4 Umfazi olungileyo sisithsaba endodeni yakhe; Ke yena ohlazileyo unjengokubola emathanjeni ayo.
Proverbs12:5 Iingcinga zamalungisa zinobulungisa; Iingcinga zabangendawo yinkohliso.
Proverbs12:6 Amazwi abangendawo afuna igazi; Ke wona umlomo wamalungisa uyabasindisa.
Proverbs12:7 Batshabalala abangendawo, ababikho; Indlu yamalungisa iyema."
Proverbs12:8 Indoda idunyiswa ngokobulumko bayo, Intliziyo engendawo ideliwe."
Proverbs12:9 Ulungile ophantsi enesicaka esilungileyo, ngaphezu kozidlayo oswele ukudla."
Proverbs12:10 Ilungisa liyawazalelela umphefumlo wenkomo yalo; Iimfesane zabangendawo zibubujorha.
Proverbs12:11 Owusebenzayo amasimi akhe uya kuhlutha kukudla;
Proverbs12:12 Ongendawo ukhanuka okuzingelwa ngabangendawo; Ke yona ingcambu yamalungisa iyanika.
Proverbs12:13 Isiphoso somlomo wakhe sibanjwe ongendawo, Ke lona ilungisa liyahlangulwa embandezelweni."
Proverbs12:14 Umntu uyahlutha kokulungileyo ngesiqhamo somlomo wakhe, aze umntu afumane umvuzo womvuzo wezandla zakhe."
Proverbs12:15 Indlela yesimathane ithe tye kwamehlo akho; Ophulaphula ukucetyiswa usisilumko.
Proverbs12:16 Isimathane siyaziwa ngomsindo wesinyabi; Ke sona isilumko siyakufihla ukucukucezwa.
Proverbs12:17 Othetha inyaniso uxela ubulungisa; Ingqina elixokayo liyinkohliso.
Proverbs12:18 Kukho abathetha njengokuhlaba kwekrele, kodwa ulwimi lwezilumko luphilile."
Proverbs12:19 Umlomo wenyaniso umi ngonaphakade; Ke lona ulwimi oluxokayo lolwephanyazo.
Proverbs12:20 Inkohliso isentliziyweni yabayila ububi; Ke bona abacebi boxolo bayavuya.
Proverbs12:21 Ilungisa aliqubisani nobubi; Ke bona abangendawo bazala bububi.
Proverbs12:22 Ilisikizi kuYehova umlomo oxokayo, kodwa abo benza ngenyaniso ukholekile kuye."
Proverbs12:23 Isilumko sikufihla ukwazi; Intliziyo yesinyabi ivakalisa ukumatha.
Proverbs12:24 Isandla sabasebenzayo siya kulawula, ke sona ivila liya kohlwaywa."
Proverbs12:25 Imbandezelo entliziyweni yendoda iyenza igobe; Liyayivuyisa ilizwi elihle.
Proverbs12:26 Ilungisa ligqithisela ummelwane walo ngobuhle; Ke indlela yabangendawo iyamlahlekisa.
Proverbs12:27 Ikhoboka aliyi kubanjiswa lizingela, kodwa impahla yomntu okhutheleyo ixabisekile."
Proverbs12:28 Busemendweni wobulungisa ubomi; kwaye akukho kufa emendweni wakho.
Proverbs13:1 Unyana osisilumko uva uqeqesho lukayise; Ke yena umgxeki akeva kukhalinyelwa.
Proverbs13:2 Umntu uya kudla isiqhamo somlomo wakhe, kodwa umphefumlo wabakreqi uya kudla ugonyamelo."
Proverbs13:3 Obambe umlomo wakhe ugcine umphefumlo wakhe; Owuvulayo umlomo wakhe uyatshabalala.
Proverbs13:4 Umphefumlo womntu omdala uyanqwena, awuzuzi;"
Proverbs13:5 Ilungisa liyithiyile into ebubuxoki; Ke yena ongendawo ulisikizi, uneentloni."
Proverbs13:6 Kusesikweni ukuligcina ilungisa endleleni; Okungendawo kuyamtshabalalisa umoni.
Proverbs13:7 Kukho ozenza isityebi, engenayo nento; Kukho ozenza isisweli, kanti usisityebi kunene."
Proverbs13:8 Ucamagusho lomphefumlo wendoda bubutyebi bayo; Osweleyo akeva kululekwa.
Proverbs13:9 Ukukhanya kwelungisa kuyavuya, Ke sona isibane sabangendawo siyacinywa."
Proverbs13:10 Ukukhukhumala kusenza sibe nehlazo kuphela, kodwa ubulumko bunabanokwazi."
Proverbs13:11 Ubutyebi ofunyanwa ngelize buya kuncipha; Ke yena owandisa ngomsebenzi uya kubanda.
Proverbs13:12 Ukulindela okubanjezelweyo kubulala intliziyo; Umnqweno xa uthe wafika, ngumthi wobomi."
Proverbs13:13 Odela ilizwi uya kutshabalala; Owoyikayo umyalelo uya kufumana umvuzo.
Proverbs13:14 Umyalelo wesilumko liqula lobomi, Ukuze kumkiwe ezirhintyelweni zokufa."
Proverbs13:15 Ingqondo entle iyamkeleka; Ke yona indlela yabakreqi inzima.
Proverbs13:16 Sonke isilumko sisebenza ngokwazi; Isinyabi siya kwaneka ukumatha.
Proverbs13:17 Umthunywa ongendawo weyela ebubini; Umthunywa othembekileyo uyaphilisa.
Proverbs13:18 Ubuhlwempu nocukucezo lomntu osilahlayo isohlwayo; Osihlonelayo isohlwayo uyazukiswa.
Proverbs13:19 Umnqweno ogqibeleleyo unencasa emphefumlweni; Ke ukusuka ebubini kulisikizi kwisinyabi.
Proverbs13:20 Ohamba nezilumko uba sisilumko naye; Ke yena olikholwane lesidenge uyatshabalala.
Proverbs13:21 Aboni basukelwa bububi; Ke wona amalungisa ayavuzwa.
Proverbs13:22 Olungileyo ushiya ilifa kubantwana bakhe, Ke ubutyebi bomoni bugcinelwe ilungisa."
Proverbs13:23 Intsimi yehlwempu inokutya okuninzi, kanti ke into yonakala ngenxa yokuswela isigwebo."
Proverbs13:24 Ophethe intonga umthiyile unyana wakhe; ke omthandayo umqeqesha esemncinane.
Proverbs13:25 Ilungisa lidla wahlutha umphefumlo walo; Ke sona isisu songendawo siyalamba.
Proverbs14:1 Ubulumko bomfazi buyayakha indlu yakhe; Isinyabi siyayichitha ngezakhe izandla.
Proverbs14:2 Uhamba ngobulungisa bakhe uyamoyika uYehova; Ongendawo ngeendlela zakhe uyamdela.
Proverbs14:3 Emlonyeni wesinyabi kukho intonga yekratshi; Umlomo wezilumko uyazisindisa.
Proverbs14:4 Apho kungekho nkomo, umkhombe uhlambulukile;"
Proverbs14:5 Ingqina elinyanisileyo aliwathethi amanga; Ke lifutha amanga ingqina elixokayo.
Proverbs14:6 Umgxeki ufuna ubulumko, angabufumani, kodwa ukwazi kulula kohlakaniphileyo."
Proverbs14:7 Suka ebusweni begeza; Ukuba akuwubonanga umlomo wokwazi.
Proverbs14:8 Ubulumko bosisilumko kukuyiqonda indlela yaso; Ukumatha kwezinyabi yinkohliso.
Proverbs14:9 Isono sigculela izimathane; Phakathi kwamalungisa yinceba.
Proverbs14:10 Intliziyo iyazazi iintlungu zayo; kwaye owasemzini akanxulumani nolonwabo lwakhe.
Proverbs14:11 Indlu yabangendawo iyatshatyalaliswa; Ke intente yamalungisa iyachuma.
Proverbs14:12 Kukho indlela ethe tye emehlweni omntu, Ukanti ukuphela kwayo ziindlela zokufa."
Proverbs14:13 Nasekuhlekeni intliziyo inomvandedwa; kwaye isiphelo saloo lonwabo sinzima.
Proverbs14:14 Intliziyo ewexukileyo yanelisa iindlela zakhe, yaye umntu olungileyo uhlutha bubomi bakhe."
Proverbs14:15 Isimathane sikholwa yinto yonke, Ke sona isilumko siyazazi iindlela zaso."
Proverbs14:16 Isilumko siyoyika, sisuke ebubini; Ke sona isinyabi siyaqumba, sikholosile."
Proverbs14:17 Ozeka kade umsindo wenza ngobudenge, nomntu oyila ububi uthiyiwe."
Proverbs14:18 Ilifa lesimathane kukumatha; Ke zona izilumko zithwele ukwazi.
Proverbs14:19 Abenzi bobubi basibekeka phambi kwabalungileyo; nabangendawo emasangweni amalungisa.
Proverbs14:20 Ihlwempu lithiywa kowalo umzi; Ke bona isityebi siba nabahlobo abaninzi.
Proverbs14:21 Omgxekayo ummelwane wakhe uyona; Obabala abaziintsizana, uyolo lwakhe."
Proverbs14:22 Abayi kulahlekiswa na abayila ububi? Ke yona inceba nenyaniso iba kwabacinga okulungileyo.
Proverbs14:23 Kuwo wonke umsebenzi kukho ingeniso, kodwa ukuthetha ngomlomo kungaphumeleli."
Proverbs14:24 Umthwalo wezilumko bubutyebi bazo; Ukumatha kwezinyabi kukumatha.
Proverbs14:25 Ingqina lenyaniso lisindisa imiphefumlo; Ke elifutha amanga lifutha amanga.
Proverbs14:26 Ekoyikeni uYehova kukho ithemba eliqinileyo, nabantwana bakhe baya kuba nendawo yokusabela."
Proverbs14:27 Ukoyika uYehova lithende lobomi, Ukuze kusukwe ezirhintyelweni zokufa."
Proverbs14:28 Ubungangamsha bokumkani buphakathi kwezizwe ezininzi; Ke ukutshabalala kwesidwangube kukuswela kwabantu.
Proverbs14:29 Ozeka kade umsindo unengqondo eninzi;
Proverbs14:30 Bubomi benyama intliziyo epholileyo; Inomona ke wona ukubola kwamathambo.
Proverbs14:31 Ocudisa isisweli ukhanyela uMdali wakhe; Ke yena omhlonelayo unenceba kumahlwempu.
Proverbs14:32 Ongendawo utshatyalaliswa bububi bakhe; Ke lona ilungisa lilinda ukufa kwalo.
Proverbs14:33 Entliziyweni yonengqondo buyahlala ubulumko; Ke yona intliziyo yesinyabi iyaziwa.
Proverbs14:34 Ubulungisa buyaphakamisa uhlanga; Ke sona isono lihlazo kuhlanga lonke.
Proverbs14:35 Ububele bokumkani bukwikhoboka elisisilumko, kodwa umsindo wakhe unxamnye nehlazo."
Proverbs15:1 Impendulo ethambileyo ibuyisa ubushushu; Ilizwi elidubulayo linyusa umsindo.
Proverbs15:2 Ulwimi lwezilumko lulungisa ukwazi; Ke yona imilebe yesinyabi impompoza ukumatha.
Proverbs15:3 Amehlo kaYehova akuyo yonke indawo, yaye abona ababi nabalungileyo."
Proverbs15:4 Ukuphola kolwimi ngumthi wobomi;
Proverbs15:5 Isimathane sigiba uqeqesho lukayise; Osigcinileyo isohlwayo sisilumko.
Proverbs15:6 Indlu yelungisa nguvimba omkhulu; ke wona umvuzo wongendawo ngamashwa.
Proverbs15:7 Umlomo wesilumko usasaza ukwazi: Ke yona intliziyo yesinyabi ayinanto.
Proverbs15:8 Umbingelelo wabangendawo lisikizi kuYehova; Ke wona umthandazo wamalungisa luvuyo lwakhe.
Proverbs15:9 Ilisikizi kuYehova indlela yongendawo; ke ophuthuma ubulungisa uyamthanda.
Proverbs15:10 Isohlwayo siqatha kojika endleleni; othiya isohlwayo uya kufa.
Proverbs15:11 Yintlekele nentshabalalo phambi koYehova; kukangakanani ke kunentliziyo yoonyana babantu?
Proverbs15:12 Umgxeki akakuthandi ukohlwaywa, Akayi kwizilumko."
Proverbs15:13 Intliziyo evuyileyo iyabuchwayithisa ubuso; Ubuhlungu bubuhlungu bentliziyo.
Proverbs15:14 Intliziyo enengqondo ifuna ukwazi; Umlomo wesinyabi usukelana nokumatha.
Proverbs15:15 Yonke imihla yesisweli mibi; Ke yena ontliziyo ichwayithileyo uhlala evuya.
Proverbs15:16 Intwana yokoyika uYehova ilungile, Ngaphezu kobutyebi obuninzi neembandezelo."
Proverbs15:17 Ukutya imifuno kuphela apho kukho uthando kulunge ngaphezu kokutyiwa yinkukhu enentiyo.
Proverbs15:18 Umntu onomsindo uxhaya ingxabano;
Proverbs15:19 Indlela yesimathane injengothango lweminga; Ke yona indlela yamalungisa iqaqambile.
Proverbs15:20 Umntwana osisilumko uyamvuyisa uyise; Umntu osisinyabi udela unina.
Proverbs15:21 Ukumatha lunoyolo oswele ubulumko; Ke indoda enengqondo ithi tye ukuhamba.
Proverbs15:22 Iingcinga ziyadana ngokungabikho kokucweya; Ke zona zima ngamaphakathi amaninzi.
Proverbs15:23 Unoyolo umntu ngempendulo yomlomo wakhe;
Proverbs15:24 Indlela yobomi iphakamile kunobulumko, Ukuba alishiye elabafileyo."
Proverbs15:25 uYehova uyayincothula indlu yabanekratshi, Amise umlimandlela womhlolokazi."
Proverbs15:26 Zingamasikizi kuYehova iingcinga zongendawo; Ke amazwi ahlambulukileyo ayathandeka.
Proverbs15:27 Olungileyo uyihlisela ububi indlu yakhe; Ke yena othiya izibabalo uya kudla ubomi.
Proverbs15:28 Intliziyo yelungisa iya kuphendula; Ke yona imilebe yongendawo impompoza ububi.
Proverbs15:29 uYehova ukude nabangendawo, kodwa uyawuva umthandazo wamalungisa."
Proverbs15:30 Ukukhanya kwamehlo kuvuyisa intliziyo; Iindaba ezimnandi zityebisa amathambo.
Proverbs15:31 Indlebe esivayo isohlwayo sobomi, Ihlala phakathi kwezilumko."
Proverbs15:32 Ophulukene noqeqesho ucekisa umphefumlo wakhe; Osivayo isohlwayo uba nokuqonda.
Proverbs15:33 Ukoyika uYehova luqeqesho lobulumko; kwaye ukuthobeka kukhokela isidima.
Proverbs16:1 Ingqondo yentliziyo isebantwini; Ke yona impendulo yolwimi ivela kuYehova.
Proverbs16:2 Zonke iindlela zendoda ziqaqambile emehlweni ayo; NguYehova olinganiselayo imiphefumlo.
Proverbs16:3 Ziyekele kuYehova izenzo zakho, Zizimase iingcinga zakho."
Proverbs16:4 Zonke izinto uYehova uzenzele ngokwakhe, kwanongendawo uzenzele imini yeshwangusha."
Proverbs16:5 Balisikizi kuYehova bonke abantliziyo izidlayo;
Proverbs16:6 Ngenceba nenyaniso buyahlanjululwa ubungendawo; Ngokoyika uYehova abantu bayatyeka ebubini.
Proverbs16:7 Xa iindlela zomntu zikholekile kuYehova, wenza kwaneentshaba zakhe zibe seluxolweni naye."
Proverbs16:8 Umvuzo omncinane osesikweni ulungile kunomvuzo omkhulu wokungalungisi.
Proverbs16:9 Intliziyo yomntu icinga indlela yakhe; NguYehova oyalela ukunyathela kwakhe.
Proverbs16:10 Isigwebo sobuthixo sisemlonyeni wokumkani; umlomo wakhe awugwebi.
Proverbs16:11 Isikali esisesikweni nesikali sesikaYehova; Yonke imilinganiso yengxowa ingumsebenzi wakhe.
Proverbs16:12 Lisikizi kubo ookumkani ukwenza okungendawo, Kuba itrone izinziswa bubulungisa."
Proverbs16:13 Ukumkani uyavuyiswa ngumlomo wobulungisa; yaye bayamthanda Lowo uthetha inyaniso.
Proverbs16:14 Umsindo wokumkani unjengezithunywa zokufa; Ke indoda elumkileyo iyakuzola.
Proverbs16:15 Ekukhanyeni kobuso bokumkani kukho ubomi; uvuyo lwakhe lunjengelifu lemvula yasekwindla.
Proverbs16:16 Ukurhweba ubulumko kungakanani na ukulunga kwako, ngaphezu kwegolide embiweyo! nokuzuza ukuqonda kulunge ngakumbi kunesilivere!"
Proverbs16:17 Ubuninzi bendlela yelungisa kukutyeka ebubini; Ogcina indlela yakhe ugcine umphefumlo wakhe.
Proverbs16:18 Ikratshi likhokelela entshabalalweni;
Proverbs16:19 Kulungile ukuba nokuthobeka kwabalulamileyo, Ngaphezu kokwabelana ngamaxhoba nabanekratshi."
Proverbs16:20 Oyilungisayo imicimbi uya kufumana okulungileyo; ke yena okholose ngoYehova, hayi, uyolo lwakhe."
Proverbs16:21 Ontliziyo ilumkileyo kuthiwa sisilumko; Nomlomo omnandi wongeza imfundiso.
Proverbs16:22 Ingqondo ingumthombo wobomi kumniniyo; Ke isohlwayo sesinyabi bubudenge.
Proverbs16:23 Intliziyo yesilumko iyawuqiqisa umlomo waso, Songeze uqeqesho emlonyeni waso."
Proverbs16:24 Linqatha lobusi amazwi amnandi, amnandi emphefumlweni, aphilisa emathanjeni."
Proverbs16:25 Kukho indlela ethe tye emehlweni omntu, Ukanti ukuphela kwayo ziindlela zokufa."
Proverbs16:26 Lowo ubulalekayo uzenza buthathaka; ngokuba umlomo wakhe uyamcebisa.
Proverbs16:27 Ongendawo umba ububi, Emlonyeni wakhe ngathi ngumlilo otshayo."
Proverbs16:28 Umntu osisinyabi ungenisa intlebendwane;
Proverbs16:29 Umntu okhohlakeleyo ungcatsha usapho lwakhe, amkhokelele ngendlela engalunganga."
Proverbs16:30 Owavala amehlo akhe, ukuba acinge ububi; ngokushukumisa umlomo wakhe ubonakalisa ububi."
Proverbs16:31 Isithsaba sokuhomba zizimvi, Sifunyanwa endleleni yobulungisa."
Proverbs16:32 Ozeka kade umsindo ulunge ngaphezu kwegorha; Owulawulayo umphefumlo wakhe ufana nomntu othimba isixeko.
Proverbs16:33 Kuphosa iqashiso emkhombeni; kodwa sonke isimo sawo sivela kuYehova.
Proverbs17:1 Indawo engumqwebedu, enoxolo, ilungile Ngaphezu kwendlu ezele luqhumiso."
Proverbs17:2 Umkhonzi onengqiqo uya kumlawula unyana oziintloni, abe nesahlulo selifa phakathi kwabazalwana."
Proverbs17:3 Imbiza yeyesilivere negolide eziko; Umcikidi weentliziyo nguYehova.
Proverbs17:4 Ongendawo uwubazela indlebe umlomo wobuxoki; Umntu oxokayo uliphulaphula ngolwimi olungendawo.
Proverbs17:5 Ogculela ihlwempu udela uMdali walo; yaye ovuyela ilishwa akayi kufuna ukohlwaywa.
Proverbs17:6 Isithsaba samadoda amakhulu sisithsaba soonyana; Isihombo sabantwana nguyise.
Proverbs17:7 Ilizwi elilungileyo alisebenzi isidenge;
Proverbs17:8 Sililitye elinqabileyo emehlweni alowo unalo isipho;
Proverbs17:9 Olufihlayo ukreqo ufuna uthando; kodwa umbalisi wohlula abahlobo abaninzi.
Proverbs17:10 Isilumko sifikelwa sisohlwayo ngaphezu kwekhulu kwisinyabi.
Proverbs17:11 Abangendawo bafuna ukutyeka bodwa; ke ngoko kuya kuthunyelwa kuye umthunywa okhohlakeleyo.
Proverbs17:12 Kulungile ukuhlangana nebhere ehluthe abantwana bayo, Ngaphezu kokuhlangana nesidenge ebudeni baso."
Proverbs17:13 Obuyekeza ububi ngokulungileyo, akayi kuyishiya indlu yakhe ububi."
Proverbs17:14 Kunjengokukha amanzi, kukuqala kwengxabano; ngoko yiyeke ingxabano ngaphambi kokuba ungenelele."
Proverbs17:15 Omgwebelayo ongendawo, kwanoligwebayo ilungisa, bangamasikizi kuYehova bobabini."
Proverbs17:16 Yini na ukuba kukho umvuzo esandleni sesinyabi, ukuba sifumane ubulumko, wena ungenantliziyo kubo?"
Proverbs17:17 Umhlobo uthanda ngamaxesha onke; Umzalwana uzalelwe embandezelweni.
Proverbs17:18 Umntu ongaqondiyo ubamba ngesandla, Uboleka phambi kommelwane wakhe."
Proverbs17:19 Othanda ukunyelisa uthanda ukunxaxha;
Proverbs17:20 Ontliziyo inobubi akafumani okulungileyo; Ulwimi olungendawo lweyela ebubini.
Proverbs17:21 Ozala iesile usisisweli; Akanakonwaba uyise wedonki.
Proverbs17:22 Intliziyo evuyileyo iyalungisa, ichachise; Umoya odakumbileyo uyawomisa amathambo."
Proverbs17:23 Ongendawo uthabatha isicengo emkhombeni, Ukuze ayijike indlela yesiko."
Proverbs17:24 Ubulumko buphambi konengqondo; ke wona amehlo esidenge abuyela eziphelweni zehlabathi.
Proverbs17:25 Ubuhlungu kuyise umntwana osisiyatha, nentlungu kulowo wamzalayo."
Proverbs17:26 Akulungile ukohlwaya ilungisa, nokohlwaya amanene ngenxa yobulungisa."
Proverbs17:27 Owanqandayo amazwi akhe unokwazi; Onengqondo ingumphefumlo olungisayo.
Proverbs17:28 Kwanesidenge, xa sathe cwaka, kuthiwa sisilumko; nalowo uwuvalayo umlomo wakhe ugqalwa njengonengqondo."
Proverbs18:1 Uzifunela ngomnqweno wakhe umntu ongento, Obuthwala bonke ubulumko;"
Proverbs18:2 Ubudenge abukholiswa yingqondo yakho;
Proverbs18:3 Ekufikeni kongendawo kuya kuba yindelo, nokudela;"
Proverbs18:4 Ngamanzi enzonzobila amazwi omlomo womntu, nomthombo wobulumko ngumlambo oqukuqelayo."
Proverbs18:5 Akulungile ukubamkela ubuso babangendawo, Nokuliwisa olilungisa ekugwebeni."
Proverbs18:6 Umlomo wesinyabi uyabethana, Nomlomo waso ukhala;"
Proverbs18:7 Umlomo wesinyabi yintshabalalo yaso, Nomlomo waso sisirhintyelo somphefumlo waso."
Proverbs18:8 Amazwi entlebi anjengamanxeba, ahla aye embilinini."
Proverbs18:9 Lowo udlala ngothando emsebenzini wakhe ukwangumzalwana wakhe osisaphuli-mthetho esikhulu.
Proverbs18:10 Yinqaba eliqele igama likaYehova;
Proverbs18:11 Ubuncwane bobutyebi ngumzi wabo oyinqaba, Njengodonga oluphakamileyo lwekratshi labo."
Proverbs18:12 Intliziyo yendoda inekratshi ngaphambi kwentshabalalo, Ukuthobeka kukhokela indumiso."
Proverbs18:13 Ophendula engekaviwa, usisidenge, uneentloni kuye."
Proverbs18:14 Umphefumlo womntu uya kusigcina isifo sakhe; Umoya owaphukileyo ngubani na ongawunyamezelayo?
Proverbs18:15 Intliziyo yesilumko ifumana ukwazi; indlebe yezilumko ifuna ukwazi.
Proverbs18:16 Isipho somntu siyamvulela ithuba, simzise phambi kwamadoda amakhulu."
Proverbs18:17 Lowo ufika kuqala ekugwebeni kwakhe ubonakala elungile; Weza ummelwane wakhe, wamgocagoca."
Proverbs18:18 Ikamva lipheliswa iimfazwe, kwahlula abomeleleyo."
Proverbs18:19 Mzalwana wam, umntu okreqileyo ungaphezu kwesixeko esiliqele, neendonga zaso zinjengemivalo yenqaba."
Proverbs18:20 Umntu uyahlutha sisiqhamo somlomo wakhe isisu; uya kwanela ngobuninzi bomlomo wakhe.
Proverbs18:21 Ukufa nobomi kusemandleni olwimi, yaye abo baluthandayo baya kudla iziqhamo zalo."
Proverbs18:22 Othe wafumana umfazi, ufumene okulungileyo, ukholekile kuYehova."
Proverbs18:23 Ihlwempu liyathandaza; zaphendula izityebi ngezwi elikhulu.
Proverbs18:24 Umntu onobuhlobo ufanele abe nobuhlobo; kodwa kukho umhlobo obambelela ngaphezu komntakwenu.
Proverbs19:1 Lilungile ihlwempu elihamba ngobulungisa balo, ngaphezu kothetha kakubi, ke sona isinyabi sona."
Proverbs19:2 Kanjalo, xa umphefumlo uswele ukwazi, akulungile; Ke yena onyawo zingxamayo wenza isono."
Proverbs19:3 Ukumatha komntu kuphenula indlela yakhe; Ijalele uYehova intliziyo yakhe.
Proverbs19:4 Ukutyeba kongeza izihlobo ezininzi; kodwa ihlwempu liyahlukaniswa nendlu yalo.
Proverbs19:5 Ingqina elixokayo alibi msulwa, nexoki alisindi."
Proverbs19:6 Baninzi abaya kucela inceba kukumkani; elowo ke sisihlobo sikalowo uphayo.
Proverbs19:7 Bonke abazalwana behlwempu balithiyile; kangakanani, abahlobo bakhe bemka kuye? uyawasukela ngamazwi, asuke atyhafe."
Proverbs19:8 Owuzuza ilifa ubulumko uthanda umphefumlo wakhe; Ogcina ingqondo uya kufumana okulungileyo.
Proverbs19:9 Ingqina elixokayo alibi msulwa; Ofutha amanga uyatshabalala.
Proverbs19:10 Uvuyo alusifanelanga isidenge; ngakumbi xa umkhonzi elawula abathetheli.
Proverbs19:11 Intliziyo yomntu izeka kade umsindo; yaye sisihombo sakhe ukukubetha ngoyaba ukunxaxha.
Proverbs19:12 Kukugquma kwengonyama entsha umsindo wokumkani; Ke uvuyo lwakhe lunjengombethe engceni.
Proverbs19:13 Ulishwa likayise umntwana osisinyabi; Ke ingxabano yomfazi ngumda ongunaphakade.
Proverbs19:14 Indlu nobutyebi lilifa looyise; Ke yena umfazi osisilumko uvela kuYehova.
Proverbs19:15 Ubuvila bukhokelela ebuthongweni obukhulu; nomphefumlo wabafileyo uya kufa yindlala.
Proverbs19:16 Owugcinayo umyalelo ugcine umphefumlo wakhe; Ozidelayo iindlela zakhe uya kufa.
Proverbs19:17 Obabala isisweli uboleka uYehova; yaye uya kumbuyekeza oko wamnika kona.
Proverbs19:18 Mqeqeshe unyana wakho, xa kusekho ithemba, Ungawucongi umphefumlo wakho ngenxa yokukhala kwakhe."
Proverbs19:19 Onomsindo omkhulu umelwe kukuhlawula, kuba xa uthe wamhlangula, uya kuphinda enze kwaloo nto."
Proverbs19:20 Live icebo, ulwamkele uqeqesho, Ukuze ulumke ekupheleni kwakho."
Proverbs19:21 Zininzi iingcinga entliziyweni yomntu; kodwa injongo kaYehova iya kuqina.
Proverbs19:22 Umnqweno womntu yinceba yakhe; Ke lilungile ihlwempu ngaphezu kwendoda enamanga.
Proverbs19:23 Ukoyika uYehova kusa ebomini, Onako uya kwanela; akayi kuvelelwa bububi."
Proverbs19:24 Ukubola kusifaka isandla sakhe esifubeni sakhe, kungasibuyiseli emlonyeni wayo."
Proverbs19:25 Umbethile umgxeki, sibaze isidenge; Umohlwaye onengqondo, woqonda azi."
Proverbs19:26 Ombhuqayo uyise, omgxothayo unina, Ngunyana owenza okuziintloni, ohlazisayo."
Proverbs19:27 Nyana wam, musa ukumamela amazwi obulumko alahlekisayo."
Proverbs19:28 Ingqina elingendawo lidela isiko, Nomlomo ongendawo udla ubutshinga."
Proverbs19:29 Izigwebo zilungiselwe abagxeki;
Proverbs20:1 Ingumgxeki iwayini, singxola isiselo esinxilisayo; kwaye nabani na olahlekiswa yiyo akalumkanga."
Proverbs20:2 Ngumgqumo onjengowengonyama entsha umothuso wokumkani; Omgculelayo wona umphefumlo wakhe.
Proverbs20:3 Kuluzuko endodeni ukupheza ingxabano; Ke sona isinyabi siyayinqanda.
Proverbs20:4 Ukubola akuyi kukhula ngenxa yengqele; ngoko ke, xa lithe lavunwa, liya kucela, lingaswele nto."
Proverbs20:5 Ngamanzi anzulu icebo entliziyweni yendoda; Ke indoda enengqondo iya kuyikhupha.
Proverbs20:6 Abantu abaninzi baya kuvakalisa ukulunga kwakhe, kodwa ngubani na onokufumana indoda ethembekileyo?"
Proverbs20:7 Ilungisa lihamba ngobulungisa balo; mabasikeleleke abantwana bakhe emva kwakhe.
Proverbs20:8 Ukumkani, ehleli esihlalweni sokugweba, Uchithachitha ububi bonke ngamehlo akhe."
Proverbs20:9 Ngubani na ongathi, Ndiyihlambulule intliziyo yam, Ndihlambulukile esonweni sam?"
Proverbs20:10 Ngamasikizi kuYehova zombini iiefa neeefa ngeefa.
Proverbs20:11 Kwanenkwenkwe iyaziwa ngezenzo zayo, ukuba kuqaqambile na, nokuba kubulungisa na, nokuba kunyulu, kusini na."
Proverbs20:12 Indlebe evayo, neliso elibonayo, uYehova wazenza zombini ezi zinto."
Proverbs20:13 Musa ukuthanda ubuthongo, hleze uhlwempuzeke; vula amehlo akho, uya kuhlutha sisonka."
Proverbs20:14 Akunto, akunto, utsho umthengi; athi ke emkile aqhayise."
Proverbs20:15 Ininzi igolide neerubhi, Ke wona umlomo wokwazi sisivatho esinqabileyo."
Proverbs20:16 Thabatha ingubo yolunye uhlanga, uthabathe isibambiso kuye ngenxa yomfazi wolunye uhlanga."
Proverbs20:17 Sinencasa emntwini isonka sobuxoki; kodwa kamva, umlomo wakhe uya kuzaliswa luhlalutye."
Proverbs20:18 Iingcinga zonke zicetywa bubulumko;
Proverbs20:19 Ohamba ehleba uhlakaza ucweyo; Ngoko ke musa ukumphazamisa odumisa ngomlomo wakhe.
Proverbs20:20 Othuka uyise nokuba ngunina, Isibane sakhe siya kucinywa ebumnyameni."
Proverbs20:21 Ilifa linokufunyanwa ngokukhawuleza ekuqalekeni; kodwa ukuphela kwayo akuyi kusikelelwa.
Proverbs20:22 Musa ukuthi, Ndiya kubuphindezela ububi; wena nje ukholose ngoYehova, wokusindisa."
Proverbs20:23 Ngamasikizi kuYehova ubunzima; kwaye iqondo elingalunganga alilungile.
Proverbs20:24 Iindlela zomntu ziphuma kuYehova; Umntu angathini na ukuyiqonda indlela yakhe?
Proverbs20:25 Esi sisirhintyelo kumntu othe watya ukutya okungcwele, aze abuze ngesibhambathiso."
Proverbs20:26 Uchithachitha abangendawo ukumkani olumkileyo, Aguqulele phezu kwabo ivili elijikelezayo."
Proverbs20:27 Sisibane sikaYehova umphefumlo womntu, Owahlolisisayo onke amathumbu esisu."
Proverbs20:28 Inceba nenyaniso ikhusela ukumkani, Uyixhasa itrone yakhe ngenceba."
Proverbs20:29 Isihombo samadodana ngamandla awo; Isihombo samadoda amakhulu zizimvi.
Proverbs20:30 Ububomvu benxeba buguxa ububi; kuyafana nakwimithambo engaphakathi esiswini.
Proverbs21:1 Yimijelo yamanzi intliziyo yokumkani esandleni sikaYehova; Usalathisa apho athanda khona.
Proverbs21:2 Zonke iindlela zendoda zithe tye kwawayo amehlo; Uyigocagocile intliziyo uYehova.
Proverbs21:3 Ukwenza okusesikweni nomgwebo kukholekile kuYehova ngaphezu kombingelelo.
Proverbs21:4 Amehlo aqwayingayo, nokuqwayinga kwentliziyo, Kwanekhuba labangendawo, sisono."
Proverbs21:5 Iingcinga zamatshijolo ziba bubutyebi bodwa; ke bonke abangxamayo bayaswela.
Proverbs21:6 Ukuzuza ubutyebi ngolwimi oluxokayo Ngumphunga ophephezelwa ngabafuna ukufa.
Proverbs21:7 Ukubhuqwa kwabangendawo kuyabaqweqwedisa; ngokuba abavumi ukugweba.
Proverbs21:8 Ilibi, ilungile indlela yendoda; Ke yena ohlambulukileyo, umsebenzi wakhe ulungile."
Proverbs21:9 Kulungile ukuhlala elungqamekweni oluphezu kwendlu, Kunokuhlala ndlwini-nye nomfazi onengxabano."
Proverbs21:10 Umoya wongendawo unqwenela ububi, Ummelwane wakhe akayiboni inceba emehlweni akhe."
Proverbs21:11 Ekubethwa komgxeki siyalumka isidenge; sakuba sithe safundiswa isilumko, samkela ukwazi."
Proverbs21:12 Ilungisa liwazi ngobulumko indlu yongendawo; kodwa uThixo uyabatshabalalisa abangendawo ngenxa yobungendawo babo.
Proverbs21:13 Ovingca iindlebe zakhe ekukhaleni kwesisweli, Naye uya kubiza, angaviwa."
Proverbs21:14 Isipho entsithelweni sisusa umsindo; Umvuzo esifubeni ususa umsindo.
Proverbs21:15 Kuluvuyo kwilungisa ukwenza okulungileyo; Ke abenzi bobubi baya kutshabalala.
Proverbs21:16 Umntu ondwendwayo emendweni wokuqonda uya kuhlala esikhungwini sabafileyo.
Proverbs21:17 Othanda iziyolo uya kuba lihlwempu; Othanda iwayini neoli akabi sisityebi.
Proverbs21:18 Ongendawo uya kuba yintlawulelo yelungisa, nalowo unxaxhayo abe yintlawulelo yelungisa."
Proverbs21:19 Kulungile ukuhlala entlango, Kunokuhlala nomfazi onengxabano neengqumbo."
Proverbs21:20 Kukho ubuncwane obunqwenelekayo neoli endlwini yesilumko; ke sona isidenge siyayonakalisa.
Proverbs21:21 Ophuthuma ubulungisa nenceba ubona ubomi nokusesikweni nozuko.
Proverbs21:22 Isilumko siyenyuka siye emzini wamagorha, siyitshabalalise inqaba esikholose ngayo."
Proverbs21:23 Obambe umlomo wakhe nolwimi lwakhe Ugcina umphefumlo wakhe ebubini.
Proverbs21:24 Igama lakhe lingumgxeki, umkhukhumali, Owenza ngokukhukhumala."
Proverbs21:25 Icebo lomntu liyambulala; ngokuba izandla zakhe azivumi ukusebenza.
Proverbs21:26 Unqwenela imini yonke, kodwa ilungisa aliniki, lingavimbi."
Proverbs21:27 Umbingelelo wabangendawo lisikizi; yimalini ayizisa ngengqondo engendawo?
Proverbs21:28 Ingqina elixokayo liyatshabalala; Ke yena ovayo usoloko ethetha.
Proverbs21:29 Indoda engendawo iyingwanyalala ubuso, Ke lona ilungisa liyayilungisa indlela yalo."
Proverbs21:30 Akukho bulumko nakuqonda okanye njongo nxamnye noYehova.
Proverbs21:31 Ihashe lilungiselwe imini yokulwa, kodwa usindiso luvela kuYehova."
Proverbs22:1 Igama elilungileyo lingaphezulu kobutyebi obuninzi; Isimilo esilungileyo silunge ngaphezu kwesilivere negolide.
Proverbs22:2 Izityebi namahlwempu bayahlangana: uYehova nguMdali wazo zonke izinto.
Proverbs22:3 Umntu osisilumko, xa angaboni nto imbi, azifihle; ke zona izinyabi ziya kugqitha kuyo;"
Proverbs22:4 Ukuthobeka nokoyika uYehova bubutyebi, nozuko, nobomi."
Proverbs22:5 Ameva nezirhintyelo endleleni yabangendawo; Lowo uwugcinayo kuzo umphefumlo wakhe.
Proverbs22:6 Mfundise umntwana indlela ethe tye, Nokuba athe wamkhulu, akasayi kumka kuyo."
Proverbs22:7 Isityebi siya kuwalawula amahlwempu; Nobolekayo ngumkhonzi endodeni embolekayo.
Proverbs22:8 Ohlwayela ubugqwetha, wovuna into engeyako; nomsimelelo wokuvutha komsindo wakhe wotshabalala."
Proverbs22:9 Oliso libanzi uya kusikelelwa; ngokuba unika amahlwempu isonka sakhe.
Proverbs22:10 Mgxothe umgxeki, kusuke ingxabano; ewe, iingxabano nonyeliso ziya kuphela."
Proverbs22:11 Othanda intliziyo ehlambulukileyo, Ngenxa yenceba yomlomo wakhe, ukumkani ungumhlobo wakhe."
Proverbs22:12 Amehlo kaYehova agcina ukwazi, Uyalitshabalalisa ilizwi labangendawo."
Proverbs22:13 Wathi uSebhodu, Kukho ingonyama phandle, ndiya kubulawa ebaleni."
Proverbs22:14 Liqula elinzulu umlomo wabafazi bolunye uhlanga; omgibayo uYehova uya kuwela kuyo.
Proverbs22:15 Ukumatha kubotshiwe entliziyweni yomntwana; Ke yona intonga yesohlwayo iya kumsusa kuye.
Proverbs22:16 Ocudisa isisweli, ukuba andise ubutyebi baso; Nowabela isityebi, uya kuswela yena."
Proverbs22:17 Thoba indlebe yakho, uve amazwi ezilumko, Uyibhekise intliziyo yakho ekwazini kwam."
Proverbs22:18 Ngokuba kumnandi, xa uthe wawagcina embilinini; ziya kuwufanela umlomo wakho."
Proverbs22:19 Ukuze ithemba lakho likuYehova, ndikwazisile namhlanje."
Proverbs22:20 Andinibhalelanga na izinto ezimangalisayo, ezinamacebo nokwazi?"
Proverbs22:21 Ndiya kwazisa inyaniso yamazwi enyaniso; Ukuba uphendule amazwi enyaniso, ubaphendule abo bakuthumayo?"
Proverbs22:22 Musa ukusihlutha isisweli, ngokuba lilihlwempu; uze ungawacinezeli amahlwempu emnyango."
Proverbs22:23 Ngenxa yokuba uYehova uya kubamela aze awutshabalalise umphefumlo wabo baphangayo.
Proverbs22:24 Musani ukunxulumana nomntu onomsindo; kwaye ungahambi nomntu onomsindo.
Proverbs22:25 Hleze ungazifundi iindlela zayo, Uwufumanele umgibe umphefumlo wakho."
Proverbs22:26 Musa ukuba phakathi kwabaqhwabayo, Ozibambisayo ngezinto ezibolekiweyo."
Proverbs22:27 Ukuba uthe akwaba nanto yakuhlawula, Yini na ukuba athabathe ukhuko lwakho phantsi kwakho?"
Proverbs22:28 Musa ukuwususa umda omdala, abawumisayo ooyihlo;"
Proverbs22:29 Uyambona na umntu okhutheleyo? uya kuma phambi kookumkani; akanakuma phambi kongendawo.
Proverbs23:1 Xa uthe wahlala phantsi, ukuba udle nomlawuli, zigqale izinto eziphambi kwakho;"
Proverbs23:2 Ukuba unqwenela ukutya, beka isitshetshe emqaleni wakho."
Proverbs23:3 Musa ukuzinqwenela izidlo zakhe ezinencasa, Kukudla kwenkohliso."
Proverbs23:4 Musani ukuzisebenzela ukuba sisityebi; bushiye ngasemva ubulumko bakho.
Proverbs23:5 Ngaba uyathanda ukubeka amehlo akho kwindawo ephosakeleyo? Kuba okunene ubutyebi benza amaphiko; ziphaphazela njengexhalanga esibhakabhakeni.
Proverbs23:6 Musa ukudla isonka seliso elibi, Ungazinqweneli izidlo zakhe ezinencasa;"
Proverbs23:7 Ngokokuba elinganisele entliziyweni yakhe, unjengoko athi kuwe, Yidla, sela; kodwa intliziyo yakhe ayikho kuwe."
Proverbs23:8 Uya kuyilahla loo nto uyityileyo, ulahlekelwe namazwi akho amnandi."
Proverbs23:9 Musa ukuthetha ezindlebeni zesinyabi, Ngokuba siya kugxeka ubulumko bamazwi akho."
Proverbs23:10 Musa ukuwususa umda omdala; kwaye aliyi kungena entsimini yeenkedama.
Proverbs23:11 Ngokuba womelele umsindisi wabo; wobambana nawe yena.
Proverbs23:12 Yinikele intliziyo yakho eluqeqeshweni, Ubephulaphule amazwi okwazi."
Proverbs23:13 Musa ukuluyeka uqeqesho lomntwana, kuba xa uthe wambetha ngentonga akayi kufa."
Proverbs23:14 Mbethe ngentonga, uze uwusindise umphefumlo wakhe kwelabafileyo."
Proverbs23:15 Nyana wam, ukuba ithe yalumka intliziyo yakho, Yovuya intliziyo yam, ewe eyam."
Proverbs23:16 Ewe, ziya kuvuya izintso zam xa imilebe yakho ithetha inyaniso."
Proverbs23:17 Intliziyo yakho mayingabamoneli aboni; Ke yoyika uYehova imini yonke.
Proverbs23:18 Ngokuba inene, kukho isiphelo; kwaye ithemba lakho aliyi kutshabalala."
Proverbs23:19 Yiva, nyana wam, ulumke, Uyinyathelise intliziyo yakho ithi gca endleleni."
Proverbs23:20 Musa ukuba phantsi kwabasela iwayini; phakathi kwabadla inyama bengxola.
Proverbs23:21 Kuba isela-wayini nedla-kudla liya kuba lihlwempu;
Proverbs23:22 Mphulaphule uyihlo, lowo wakuzalayo, Ungamdeli unyoko akuba mkhulu."
Proverbs23:23 Thenga inyaniso, ungathengisi ngayo; nobulumko, nengqeqesho, nokuqonda."
Proverbs23:24 Uyise olilungisa uba nemihlali kakhulu; Ozala umntwana osisilumko unoyolo ngenxa yakhe.
Proverbs23:25 Woba noyolo uyihlo nonyoko, Agcobe lowo wakuzalayo."
Proverbs23:26 Ndinike intliziyo yakho, nyana wam, Amehlo akho azibone iindlela zam."
Proverbs23:27 Kuba sisihogo esinzulu ihenyukazi; kwaye omnye umfazi ngumngxuma omxinwa.
Proverbs23:28 Ulalela njengexhoba, andise abangendawo ebantwini."
Proverbs23:29 Ngubani onelishwa? ngubani uxolo? Ngubani na ophikayo, uthetha ngubani na? Ngubani na onamanxeba ngelize? ngubani onamehlo abomvu?"
Proverbs23:30 Bazeka kade ukusela iwayini; abahamba befuna iwayini ephithikeziweyo.
Proverbs23:31 Musa ukuyijonga iwayini, xa ibomvu, nokuba ibengezela eglasini, xa inyibilika."
Proverbs23:32 Ekugqibeleni iluma njengenyoka, iluma njengonomadudwane."
Proverbs23:33 Amehlo akho aya kubabona abafazi beentlanga, intliziyo yakho ithethe okubi;"
Proverbs23:34 Ewe, uya kuba njengolele esazulwini solwandle, nanjengolele esanekweni."
Proverbs23:35 Uya kuthi, Bandibetha, andizange ndigule; Bandibetha, andakuva; Ndizovuka nini ndiphinde ndiyijonge?"
Proverbs24:1 Musa ukubamonela abantu ababi, ungakunqweneli ukuba uhlale nabo."
Proverbs24:2 Kuba intliziyo yabo ifunda ukubola, nemilebe yabo ithetha kakubi."
Proverbs24:3 Indlu yona yakhiwe ngobulumko; izinziswe ngengqondo;
Proverbs24:4 Ngokwazi kuzaliswa amaqonga bubutyebi obunqwenelekayo nobunqwenelekayo.
Proverbs24:5 Indoda elumkileyo iyomelela; ewe, umntu onolwazi wongeza amandla."
Proverbs24:6 Kuba uya kulwa idabi lakho unecebo lobulumko, yaye xa kukho abacebisi abaninzi kukho usindiso."
Proverbs24:7 Ubulumko bungaphezu kwesidenge, Abuwuvuli umlomo wabo emnyango."
Proverbs24:8 Lowo uceba ukwenza ububi kuya kuthiwa ngongendawo.
Proverbs24:9 Iingcinga zobudenge sisono; Lisikizi ebantwini umgxeki.
Proverbs24:10 Ukuba uthe watyhafa ngemini yembandezelo, Mancinane amandla akho;"
Proverbs24:11 Ukuba nikuhilile ukubakhusela abasiwa ekufeni, nababuganga bokubulawa;"
Proverbs24:12 Ukuba uthe, Yabona, besingakwazi oko; Ngaba uyayiqwalasela into ecingwa yintliziyo? kanti lowo uwugcinayo umphefumlo wakho akazi? Akayi kumbuyekeza elowo ngokwemisebenzi yakhe na?"
Proverbs24:13 Yidla ubusi, nyana wam, kuba bulungile; nenqatha lobusi, enencasa ekhuhlangubeni lakho;"
Proverbs24:14 Ukwazi ubulumko kuya kuba njalo emphefumlweni wakho;
Proverbs24:15 Musa ukulilinda ikhaya lamalungisa, wena ungendawo; indawo yakhe yokuphumla ayonakaliswanga."
Proverbs24:16 Kuba ilungisa liwa kasixhenxe lize livuke, kodwa abangendawo baya kuwela ebubini."
Proverbs24:17 Musa ukuvuya ekuweni kotshaba lwakho, Ungagcobi ekukhubekeni kwentliziyo yakho."
Proverbs24:18 Ngamana uYehova angakuboni oko, kungabi ngokuthanda kwakhe, yaye uya kuwususa umsindo wakhe kuye."
Proverbs24:19 Musa ukuxhalela ububi, ungamoneli ongendawo;"
Proverbs24:20 Ngokuba akukho mvuzo kongendawo; Isibane sabangendawo siya kucinywa.
Proverbs24:21 Nyana wam, moyike uYehova nokumkani, ungangeneleli kwabatshintshileyo."
Proverbs24:22 Kuba iya kubonakala kwangoko intlekele yabo; Ngubani na olaziyo isiphelo sabo bobabini?
Proverbs24:23 Nazo ezo zinto zezezilumko. Ukuhlonela umntu ekugwebeni akulungile.
Proverbs24:24 Othi kongendawo, Ulilungisa wena; Ziya kumqalekisa iintlanga, zimthiye iintlanga;"
Proverbs24:25 Banoyolo abo bamohlwayayo, Kubo banoyolo;"
Proverbs24:26 Lowo uphendulayo uya kwanga umlomo wakhe;
Proverbs24:27 Lilungise ishishini lakho khona, ube ulungile entsimini; wandule ukwakha indlu yakho."
Proverbs24:28 Musa ukuba lingqina ngommelwane wakho ngaphandle kwesizathu; kwaye musani ukukhohliswa zizipaji zenu.
Proverbs24:29 Musa ukuthi, Njengoko enze ngako kum, ndiya kwenjenjalo nam kuye; ndiya kumbuyisela umntu ngokwemisebenzi yakhe."
Proverbs24:30 Ndacanda ezweni lobukhoboka, nasesidiliyeni sesilumko;"
Proverbs24:31 Yabona, luzele yimithana enameva ngaphambili, ludilikile udonga lwamatye."
Proverbs24:32 Ndabona, ndacinga kakuhle; Ndayibona ndaza ndafumana umyalelo."
Proverbs24:33 Ukulala kancinane, ukozela kancinane, nokusonga iingalo zomntu kancinane, alale."
Proverbs24:34 Ngoko ubuhlwempu bakho bokuza njengondwendwe; Nentswelo yakho njengomntu oxhobileyo.
Proverbs25:1 Nale yimizekeliso kaSolomon, awayibhalayo amadoda kaHezekiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda."
Proverbs25:2 Kuluzuko kuThixo ukufihla into; Ke isidima sokumkani ukuyigocagoca loo nto.
Proverbs25:3 Izulu liphakamile, nomhlaba unzulu, nentliziyo yookumkani ayinakulinganiswa."
Proverbs25:4 Lisuse igwebu lesilivere, kuphume isitya somhlambululi."
Proverbs25:5 Shenxisa ongendawo kukumkani, Yozinza itrone yakhe ngobulungisa."
Proverbs25:6 Uze ungaveli phambi kokumkani, ungemi endaweni yamadoda amakhulu."
Proverbs25:7 Kuba kulungile ukuthi, Nyuka apha; Kunokuba uzithobe phambi kwenkosi ebone amehlo akho."
Proverbs25:8 Musa ukungxamela ingxabano, hleze ukwazi oko uya kukwenza ekupheleni kwako, ukuba uthe wakudanisa ummelwane wakho."
Proverbs25:9 Thetha nommelwane wakho; imfihlakalo uze ungayityhili komnye;
Proverbs25:10 ukuze lowo uvayo anganihlazisi, lingasuswa ihlazo lakho."
Proverbs25:11 Ziilamuni zegolide kwizitya zesilivere.
Proverbs25:12 Isohlwayo esilumkileyo sikwindlebe evayo, Lijikazi legolide, nesidanga segolide engcwengiweyo."
Proverbs25:13 Umthunywa othembekileyo othunyelwayo ufana nekhephu ngekhephu ngexesha lokuvuna, kuba iyabaphumza umoya yabaniniyo."
Proverbs25:14 Oqhayisa ngesipho sobuxoki ufana namafu nomoya ongenamvula.
Proverbs25:15 Ngokuzeka kade umsindo, ukumkani uya koyiseka, Nolwimi oluthambileyo lwaphula amathambo."
Proverbs25:16 Ufumene ubusi? yidla, uhluthe, ungahluthi, uhlanze;"
Proverbs25:17 Lususe unyawo lwakho endlwini yommelwane wakho; ukuze angadinwa nguwe aze akucaphukele kakhulu.
Proverbs25:18 Indoda engqina ubuxoki ngommelwane wayo iyisambatho nekrele notolo olubukhali.
Proverbs25:19 Ukukholosa ngenginingini ngexesha lembandezelo Lizinyo elaphukileyo nomlenze owaphukileyo.
Proverbs25:20 Lowo wenzakalisa intliziyo ufana nomntu okhulula ingubo yakhe xa kubanda, nanjengewayini ephithikezwa ngetyuwa."
Proverbs25:21 Ukuba okuthiyileyo uthe walamba, mphe ukudla adle; ukuba lunxaniwe, luseze amanzi;"
Proverbs25:22 Kuba ufumba wena amalahle omlilo phezu kwentloko yakhe, yaye uYehova wokuvuza."
Proverbs25:23 Umoya ovela ngasentla uvelisa isiphango;
Proverbs25:24 Kulungile ukuhlala elungqamekweni oluphezu kophahla, Kunokuhlala nomfazi onentsimbi ndlwini-nye."
Proverbs25:25 Ngamanzi abandayo emphefumlweni onxaniweyo Iindaba ezilungileyo, ezivela ezweni elikude."
Proverbs25:26 Liqula elibhukuqekileyo, nomthombo owonakeleyo, olilungisa eliwa phambi kongendawo."
Proverbs25:27 Ukudla ubusi obuninzi akulungile; ke ngoko, akuhlonipheki ukuba abantu bavavanye isidima sabo."
Proverbs25:28 Ufana nesixeko esiqhekeziweyo, esingamabhodlo, ongawunqandiyo umoya wakhe."
Proverbs26:1 Njengekhephu ehlotyeni, njengemvula ngexa lokuvuna, Ayisifanele isidenge uzuko."
Proverbs26:2 Njengentaka ebhadulayo, nanjengesikhukukazi esiphaphazelayo, ukuqalekisa akuyi kuza ngelize;"
Proverbs26:3 Isiniya ngowehashe, umkhala ngowe-esile, umsimelelo ngowomhlana wesidenge."
Proverbs26:4 Musa ukusiphendula isidenge ngokobudenge baso, Hleze ufane naso."
Proverbs26:5 Siphendule isidenge ngobudenge baso, Hleze sibe sisilumko kwawaso amehlo."
Proverbs26:6 Othumela ilizwi njengegeza, Uzinqumla iinyawo, usela ububi."
Proverbs26:7 Imilenze yesiqhwala ayanelanga; Umzekeliso onjalo emlonyeni wesidenge.
Proverbs26:8 Obopha ilitye kwinkwitshi Ufana nohlonela isidenge.
Proverbs26:9 Njengoko kunyuka uviko esandleni senxila, unjalo umzekeliso emlonyeni wesinyabi."
Proverbs26:10 uThixo omkhulu owenza zonke izinto uyabavuza abaziziyatha nabakreqi.
Proverbs26:11 Njengenja ibuyela emhlanzweni wayo, isidenge sibuyela emanyathelweni aso."
Proverbs26:12 Ngaba uyambona na umntu osisilumko? kukho ithemba ngesinyabi kunayo.
Proverbs26:13 uSebhodo uthi, Kukho ingonyama endleleni; ingonyama egqumayo."
Proverbs26:14 Njengocango lujikajika kwiihenjisi zalo, Linjalo ivila esililini salo."
Proverbs26:15 Ongendawo ufaka isandla sakhe esifubeni sakhe; yamenza intloni ukuyibuyisela emlonyeni kwakhona.
Proverbs26:16 Ikhoboka lizicingela ukuba lilumke kunamadoda asixhenxe akwaziyo ukupha.
Proverbs26:17 Lowo ke ugxuphuleka entweni ezingeyakhe, ufana nalowo wandibamba ngeendlebe."
Proverbs26:18 Njengendoda ephambeneyo ephosa iibhombu, iintolo nokufa,"
Proverbs26:19 Kukwanjalo ke nakulowo ulahlekisa ummelwane wakhe, athi, Andenza umthambo na?"
Proverbs26:20 Apho kungekho nkuni, uyafa umlilo; Ngoko ke apho kungekho mnyelisi, ziyaphela izibetho."
Proverbs26:21 Njengamalahle avuthayo, iinkuni zomlilo; unjalo ke nangomntu othanda ukuthuba."
Proverbs26:22 Amazwi entlebi anjengamanxeba, ahla aye embilinini."
Proverbs26:23 Liziko elivutha umlilo, nentliziyo enobubi, liziko elilethwe ngesilivere."
Proverbs26:24 Lowo uthiyayo ngomlomo wakhe, ucebe entliziyweni yakhe;"
Proverbs26:25 Xa ethetha kakuhle, uze ungakholwa nguye, kuba kukho amasikizi asixhenxe entliziyweni yakhe."
Proverbs26:26 Omthiyayo ugutyungelwe ngenkohliso, ububi bakhe buya kwaziwa kamsinya kulo lonke ibandla."
Proverbs26:27 Ombe umngxuma uya kweyela kuwo; lowo uliqengqile ilitye, liya kubuyela kuye."
Proverbs26:28 Ulwimi oluxokayo luyabathiya abatshutshiswa lulo; kwaye loo mlomo uyonakalisa.
Proverbs27:1 Musa ukuqhayisa ngengomso; ngokuba ungayazi ukuba iya kuthini na loo mini.
Proverbs27:2 Mawudunyiswe ngomnye, ingabi ngumlomo wakho; umntu wasemzini, hayi imilebe yakho."
Proverbs27:3 Ilitye elinzima nentlabathi enzima; Ke yona ingqumbo yesimathane inobubi kunezo zibini.
Proverbs27:4 Umsindo sisijorha, umsindo sisijorha; nekhwele, ngubani na onokuma phambi kwalo?"
Proverbs27:5 Kulungile ukohlwaywa ekuhleni ngaphezu kothando olufihlakeleyo.
Proverbs27:6 Amanxeba omhlobo athembekile; kodwa yinkohliso ukwanga kotshaba.
Proverbs27:7 Ozele ngumoya uyithiyile ingxondorha; Kumphefumlo olambileyo, yonke into ekrakra imnandi."
Proverbs27:8 Umntu ondwendwayo endaweni yakhe ufana nentaka ephekuziweyo endlwaneni yayo.
Proverbs27:9 Ioli nentlaka emhlophe zenza intliziyo ibe nemihlali;
Proverbs27:10 Musa ukumfulathela umhlobo wakho nomhlobo kayihlo; uze ungangeni endlwini yomzalwana wakho ngemini yeshwangusha lakho; ngokuba ummelwane wakho okufuphi ulungile kunomzalwana wakho okude.
Proverbs27:11 Yiba nobulumko, nyana wam, uyivuyise intliziyo yam, Ukuze ndimphendule ngezwi ondingcikivayo."
Proverbs27:12 Isilumko sibona ububi, sibufihle; kwaye abo bangantsonkothanga baya phambili kwaye bayohlwaywa."
Proverbs27:13 Thabatha ingubo yolunye uhlanga, uthabathe isibambiso kuye ngenxa yomfazi wolunye uhlanga."
Proverbs27:14 Othe wasikelela ummelwane wakhe ngezwi elikhulu, wavuka kwakusasa, koba sisishwabulo kuye."
Proverbs27:15 Lithontsi elizothileyo ngemini yemvula, Nomfazi onengxabano mnye."
Proverbs27:16 Ufihla umoya nokutyeba kwesandla sakhe sokunene.
Proverbs27:17 Isinyithi silola isinyithi; indoda ilola ubuso bowayo ngokunjalo.
Proverbs27:18 Lowo uwugcina umkhiwane uya kutya isiqhamo sawo; ngokunjalo ke othembele kukumkani uya kuzukiswa.
Proverbs27:19 Njengobuso emanzini buye bajongana nobuso, injalo intliziyo yomntu emntwini."
Proverbs27:20 Imbuqo nentshabalalo ayiyi kuzala; ngokunjalo akahluthi amehlo omntu.
Proverbs27:21 Njengembiza yesilivere, iziko legolide; umntu onjalo ukumdumisa."
Proverbs27:22 Nokuba uthe wangcwatywa ngotolo, isinyabi wasingcwaba ngotolo ngotolo, Ukumatha kwaso abuyi kumka."
Proverbs27:23 Yilumkele ubume bomhlambi wakho, Waluse umhlambi wakho."
Proverbs27:24 Emva kokuba bonke ubutyebi abubo banaphakade, kwaye ingaba isithsaba siya kubakho ukusuka kwesinye isizukulwana kuye kwesinye?"
Proverbs27:25 Kuvela umtya, kubonakale utyani obuthambileyo, buhlanganiswe utyani ezintabeni;"
Proverbs27:26 Iimvana yingubo yakho, lixabiso lentsimi iinkunzi zeebhokhwe."
Proverbs27:27 Wokwanela ubisi lwebhokhwe ekutyeni kwakho, nasekudleni kwendlu yakho, nasekunyamekeleni abakhonzazana bakho;"
Proverbs28:1 Abangendawo babaleka ababasukelayo; Ke wona amalungisa akholosa njengengonyama.
Proverbs28:2 Baninzi abathetheli bakho, ngenxa yobugwenxa belizwe;"
Proverbs28:3 Umfo oyintloko ekutshutshiseni isisweli Unjengemvula etshayelayo, ingashiyi kudla."
Proverbs28:4 Abatyekayo emthethweni badumisa abangendawo; Ke abawugcinayo umyalelo bayazixhokonxa ngabo.
Proverbs28:5 Abangendawo abanangqondo yodwa; Ke bona abamquqelayo uYehova baqonda izinto zonke.
Proverbs28:6 Lilungile ihlwempu elihamba ngobulungisa balo, Ngaphezu kongendawo ongendawo, nokuba esisityebi."
Proverbs28:7 Obamba umyalelo ngunyana onengqondo; Ke yena ohamba namahenyukazi uhlazisa uyise.
Proverbs28:8 Owongeza ubutyebi bakhe ngorhwebo, ngogonyamelo, Ubuthela obabala abaziintsizana."
Proverbs28:9 Osusa indlebe yakhe ekuwuthobeleni umyalelo, nomthandazo wakhe ulisikizi."
Proverbs28:10 Olahlekisa ilungisa ngendlela embi, uya kweyela esihogweni sakhe; ke wona amalungisa aya kukudla ilifa okulungileyo."
Proverbs28:11 Isityebi siziba sisilumko; Ke zona izisweli ezinengqondo ziyamgocagoca.
Proverbs28:12 Ekudlamkeni kwamalungisa kwanda uzuko; kodwa xa kuthe kwenyuka ububi, ubani azimele."
Proverbs28:13 Ocamagushela izono zakhe akayi kuba nampumelelo; kodwa othe wayixela, wayijika, wosinda."
Proverbs28:14 Hayi, uyolo lomntu ohlala enkwantya; Ke yena ontliziyo ilukhuni weyela ebubini."
Proverbs28:15 Njengengonyama egqumayo, nebhere ejingayo; Unjalo umlawuli ongendawo kwizisweli."
Proverbs28:16 Inganga eliswele ukuqonda, linokucudisa okuninzi; Ke yena othiya ubutyebi, uya kongeza imihla."
Proverbs28:17 Umntu othe wagonyamela ngegazi lakhe, abalekele emhadini; makungabikho bani umnqandayo."
Proverbs28:18 Ohamba ngobulungisa uya kusindiswa; Ke ongendawo uyakhubeka ngeendlela zakhe.
Proverbs28:19 Osebenza amasimi akhe woba nentabalala;
Proverbs28:20 Umntu onyanisekileyo uneentsikelelo ezininzi; Ke yena ongxamayo ukuba sisityebi, akabi msulwa."
Proverbs28:21 Ukuhlonela umntu akulunganga, kuba umntu wona ngenxa yeqhekeza lesonka."
Proverbs28:22 Indoda eliso libi ikhawulezela ukutyeba; Akacingi ukuba ukuswela kuya kuyifikela.
Proverbs28:23 Omohlwayayo wothi kamva afumane inceba, Ngaphezu koncoma ngolwimi."
Proverbs28:24 Ophanga uyise nokuba ngunina, athi, Asinto imbi leyo; ifana neqabane lesikrelemnqa."
Proverbs28:25 Okhukhumeleyo uxhaya ihlazo; Ke yena okholose ngoYehova uyatyetyiswa.
Proverbs28:26 Okholose ngentliziyo yakhe usisidenge; ke yena ohamba ngengqiqo uya kusindiswa.
Proverbs28:27 Opha ihlwempu akasweli; Ke yena ofihla amehlo akhe uneengqalekiso ezininzi.
Proverbs28:28 Ekuphakameni kwabangendawo bayasithela abantu; kodwa xa etshabalala ayanda amalungisa.
Proverbs29:1 Ohlala eyenze lukhuni intamo yakhe ekhalinyelwa, Uya kutshabalala kwaoko, kungabikho kuphiliswa."
Proverbs29:2 Ekulawuleni kwelungisa banoyolo; Kodwa xa umntu okhohlakeleyo elawula, abantu bayakhala."
Proverbs29:3 Othanda ubulumko uvuyisa uyise; Ke yena osebenza namahenyukazi uya kuchitha ubutyebi bakhe.
Proverbs29:4 iNkosi iliseka ihlabathi ngomgwebo;
Proverbs29:5 Umntu olahlekisa ilizwe lakhe uthiyela iinyawo zakhe ngomnatha.
Proverbs29:6 Kukho isirhintyelo elukreqweni lwabangendawo; Ke wona amalungisa aya kuvuya avuye.
Proverbs29:7 Ilungisa liyalazi ityala lesisweli; ke yena ongendawo akaliqondi.
Proverbs29:8 Iingxilimbela ziphemba umzi ngomgibe; Ke zona izilumko ziyawudambisa umsindo.
Proverbs29:9 Saxabana isilumko nesiyatha, Socaphuka, sihleka, kungabikho kuthozama."
Proverbs29:10 Amadoda amagazi ayalithiya ilungisa, Ke lona ilungisa lifuna umphefumlo walo."
Proverbs29:11 Isinyabi siya kuxela bonke ubulumko baso, Ke sona isilumko sikuchaza kwaso."
Proverbs29:12 Ukuba umlawuli uphulaphula ubuxoki, bonke abakhonzi bakhe baba bubi."
Proverbs29:13 Ihlwempu nesikhohlisi bayaqubisana; uYehova uyawakhanyisela amehlo abo omabini.
Proverbs29:14 Ukumkani ogweba ityala lezisweli ngenyaniso, Itrone yakhe iya kuzinza ngonaphakade."
Proverbs29:15 Intonga nesohlwayo sinika ubulumko; Ke yena umntwana oshiyiweyo udanisa unina.
Proverbs29:16 Ekwandeni kongendawo kuyanda ubutshinga, Ke wona amalungisa aya kukubona ukuwa kwabo."
Proverbs29:17 Mqeqeshe unyana wakho, wokuphefumlisa; ewe, iya kuwenza wonwabe umphefumlo wakho."
Proverbs29:18 Apho kungekho buso, bayatshabalala abantu; Hayi, uyolo lwalowo uwugcinayo umthetho!"
Proverbs29:19 Umkhonzi akanakuhlwahlwa ngamazwi, Ngokuba nokuba uyaqiqa, akaphenduli."
Proverbs29:20 Uyambona na umntu ongxamileyo ngamazwi akhe? kukho ithemba ngesinyabi kunayo.
Proverbs29:21 Osiqeqeshela kwasebuncinaneni isicaka sakhe Uya kuba ngunyana wakhe ngonaphakade.
Proverbs29:22 Umntu onomsindo uxhaya; Umntu onobushushu uzele lukreqo.
Proverbs29:23 Ikratshi lomntu liya kumthoba; Umphefumlo othobekileyo uyazukiswa.
Proverbs29:24 Ozimanya nesela uthiye umphefumlo wakhe; uyasiva isiqalekiso, anganginizi."
Proverbs29:25 Ukugubha ngumntu kunesirhintyelo; ke yena okholose ngoYehova uya kusindiswa.
Proverbs29:26 Abaninzi bafuna ukuthandwa ngumlawuli; kodwa umgwebo wonke uvela kuYehova.
Proverbs29:27 Indoda enobugqwetha lisikizi kumalungisa; Ilungisa lisikizi kongendawo.
Proverbs30:1 Amazwi ka-Agure unyana kaYake, asisiprofeto: Yathetha indoda leyo kuItiyeli, noItiyeli, noUkali,"
Proverbs30:2 Kuba ndisisijorha, andiqondi;"
Proverbs30:3 Andifundanga bulumko, Ukuba andimazi oyiNgcwele oyiNgcwele."
Proverbs30:4 Ngubani na owenyuka waya emazulwini okanye wehla? ngubani na owahlanganisa umoya ngamanqindi? Ngubani na osongele amanzi engutyeni? Ngubani na otywine zonke iziphelo zehlabathi? Lingubani na igama lakhe, lingubani na igama lonyana wakhe, ukuba uyalazi?"
Proverbs30:5 Onke amazwi kaThixo anyulu, Ndiyingweletshetshe kwabazimela ngaye."
Proverbs30:6 Musa ukongeza emazwini akhe, Hleze wohlwaywe, ufunyanwe ulixoki."
Proverbs30:7 Ndafuna kuwe izinto ezimbini; musani ukukhanyela kum, andikafi;"
Proverbs30:8 Shenxisa kum inkohlakalo nenkohliso; musa ukundinika ubutyebi, nokuba bububutyebi; ndidlise ukudla okundigcina ndiphaphile;"
Proverbs30:9 Hleze ndihluthe, ndikhanyele, ndithi, Ngubani na uYehova? ukuze ndingabi lihlwempu, ndibe, ndifumane igama loThixo wam."
Proverbs30:10 Musa ukusigwebela isicaka enkosini yaso, Hleze usitshabhise, ube netyala."
Proverbs30:11 Kukho isizukulwana esitshabhisa uyise, Singamsikeleli unina;"
Proverbs30:12 Kukho isizukulwana esibonakala sicocekile, kanti asikahlambululi ukungcola kwaso;"
Proverbs30:13 Kukho isizukulwana, hayi, ukuphakama kwamehlo aso! ephakamise amashiya abo."
Proverbs30:14 Kukho isizwe esimazinyo angamakrele, esimazinyo aziintshetshe, Zokudla iintsizana zehlabathi, namahlwempu phakathi kwabantu."
Proverbs30:15 Umkhweli wehashe uneentombi ezimbini ezidanduluka zisithi: “Siphe! Zintathu izinto ezinganeliyo, zine ezingatshoyo ukuthi, Kwanele;"
Proverbs30:16 Ingcwaba; nesizalo esingazaliyo; umhlaba ongenamanzi; nomlilo ongatshoyo ukuthi: Kwanele!
Proverbs30:17 Iliso eligculela uyise, elidela ukuva unina, liya kulihlutha amahlungulu asentlanjeni, alidle amaxhalanga."
Proverbs30:18 Kukho izinto ezintathu ezibalulekileyo kum, ezine endingazaziyo:"
Proverbs30:19 Ngumendo wokhozi ezulwini; indlela yenyoka eweni; umjelo ophakathi elwandle; nendlela yomfo nomkhonzazana.
Proverbs30:20 Injalo indlela yehenyukazi; uyadla, asule umlomo wakhe, athi, Andenzanga bubi."
Proverbs30:21 Kukho izinto ezintathu ezothusayo emhlabeni, ongenakukwazi ukuzithwala:"
Proverbs30:22 Kuba umkhonzi akanakuba ngukumkani; nesidenge asihluthi;
Proverbs30:23 Ngaphantsi komfazi olisikizi, xa athe wenda; nomkhonzazana oza kuba yindlalifa yenkosikazi yakhe."
Proverbs30:24 Kukho izinto ezine ezingenamandla ehlabathini, kambe ke zilumkile;"
Proverbs30:25 Iimbovane luhlanga oluthambileyo, Isuka ilungise ukudla kwayo ehlotyeni;"
Proverbs30:26 Iimbila zimbalwa, kodwa izindlu zabo zakhela emaweni;"
Proverbs30:27 Iinkumbi azinakumkani, ziphela zingamaqela ngamaqela;"
Proverbs30:28 Icilitshe libamba izandla zalo, Kanti lisemabhotweni ookumkani."
Proverbs30:29 Kukho izinto ezintathu ezihamba kakuhle, ewe, zine zihamba kakuhle:"
Proverbs30:30 Ingonyama le inamandla phakathi kwezilwanyana, ayijiki mntwini;"
Proverbs30:31 Ingwenya emnyama; kunye nomntwana; nokumkani ekungekho bani unokuma phambi kwakhe.
Proverbs30:32 Ukuba uthe wenza ngobudenge ngokuziphakamisa, nokuba uthe wakhumbula ububi, beka isandla emlonyeni."
Proverbs30:33 Kuba ukucofa ubisi kuvelisa amasi, Ukucofa impumlo kuvelisa igazi;"
Proverbs31:1 Amazwi kakumkani uLemuweli, awamqeqesha ngawo unina."
Proverbs31:2 Yintoni, nyana wam? Yini na, nyana wesizalo sam? kuthini na, emva kwesibhambathiso sam?"
Proverbs31:3 Amandla akho musa ukuwanika amankazana, Iindlela zakho uzinike ookumkani."
Proverbs31:4 Asiyindawo yokumkani, Lemuweli, akubafanelanga ookumkani ukusela iwayini; esi siselo sinxilisayo sezabathetheli."
