Proverbs31:5 Ukuze bangaseli, bawulibale umyalelo, basijike isigwebo salo lonke ihlwempu;"
Proverbs31:6 Isiselo esinxilisayo sinikeni otshabalalayo;
Proverbs31:7 Makasele, abulibale ubuhlwempu bakhe, Angabi sacinga ngokubandezeleka kwakhe."
Proverbs31:8 Wuvule umlomo wakho kulowo ungenakuthetha, Ngenxa yabo bonke abo bamiselwe intshabalalo."
Proverbs31:9 Vula umlomo wakho, ugwebe ngobulungisa, Ukhusele usizana nolihlwempu."
Proverbs31:10 Ngubani na ongamfumanayo umfazi olungileyo? Kuba ixabiso lakhe lingaphezulu leeperile.
Proverbs31:11 Ikholose ngaye intliziyo yendoda yakhe, ukuze angaphangi;"
Proverbs31:12 Uyiphatha kakuhle, kungabi kakubi, yonke imihla yobomi bakhe;"
Proverbs31:13 Ufuna uboya begusha nelinen ecikizekileyo, Asebenze ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo ngezandla zakhe."
Proverbs31:14 Unjengeenqanawa zabarhwebi; uya kuthabatha kude ukudla kwakhe.
Proverbs31:15 Uvuka ekuseni, ayinike ukudla indlu yakhe nabakhonzazana bakhe."
Proverbs31:16 Uyalikhangela ilizwe, alithenge; ngeziqhamo zezandla zakhe utyala isidiliya."
Proverbs31:17 Ubhinqa amandla esinqeni sakhe, Womeleza izandla zakhe."
Proverbs31:18 Uyawubona umsebenzi wakhe ulungile; Isibane sakhe asicimi ebusuku.
Proverbs31:19 Ubeka izandla zakhe phezu kwentonga yokusonta, nezandla zakhe zibambe ihagu."
Proverbs31:20 Isandla sakhe usolulela kwihlwempu; Ewe, izandla zakhe uzolulela kumahlwempu."
Proverbs31:21 Ikhephu akaboyiki, ngenxa yabasendlwini yakhe, kuba elowo endlwini yakhe uvathe iingubo ezibomvu;"
Proverbs31:22 Uzenzela ezakhe iingubo ngengubo; iimpahla zakhe ziyisilika nezimfusa.
Proverbs31:23 Iyaziwa indoda yakhe emasangweni, ngokuba ihleli namadoda amakhulu elizwe."
Proverbs31:24 Wenza ilinen ecikizekileyo, athengise ngayo; amabhanti uwanike umthengisi."
Proverbs31:25 Ngamandla nozuko ziingubo zakhe; kwaye uya kunandipha ikamva.
Proverbs31:26 Umlomo wakhe uwuvula ngobulumko; Umyalelo wenceba uselulwimini lwakhe.
Proverbs31:27 Unikela ingqalelo ekushukumeni kwabasendlwini yakhe, yaye akasidli isonka sevila."
Proverbs31:28 Bayasuka oonyana bakhe, bathi unoyolo; nendoda yakhe, imdumise;"
Proverbs31:29 Zininzi iintombi ezenza kakuhle, kodwa wena uzidlule zonke."
Proverbs31:30 Ubukumkani buyakhohlisa, ubuhle bungamampunge; kodwa ngumfazi owoyika uYehova oya kudunyiswa."
Proverbs31:31 Mnikeni kwiziqhamo zezandla zakhe; zimdumise emasangweni omzi izenzo zakhe.
Ecclesiastes1:1 Amazwi omprofeti, unyana kaDavide, ukumkani waseYerusalem."
Ecclesiastes1:2 Amampunge awo amampunge, itsho iNtshumayeli, amampunge awo amampunge; yonke into ingamampunge."
Ecclesiastes1:3 Unalungelo lini umntu emigudwini yakhe yonke, ayenzayo phantsi kwelanga?"
Ecclesiastes1:4 Kumka esinye isizukulwana, kuza esinye isizukulwana, kodwa elimiweyo limi ngonaphakade."
Ecclesiastes1:5 Ilanga liyaphuma kwakhona, ilanga litshona lize liphikele kwindawo yalo apho liphume khona."
Ecclesiastes1:6 Umoya uya ezantsi, ubhekise entla; isahexa, yaye umoya ubuya ngokwemijikelo yawo."
Ecclesiastes1:7 Yonke imilambo iya elwandle; ukanti ulwandle belungazali; apho ivela khona imilambo, ibuyela kwalapho."
Ecclesiastes1:8 Yonke into inomsebenzi; alihluthi iliso kukubona, nendlebe ayihluthi kukuva."
Ecclesiastes1:9 Okwakuyikho, kuya kubakho; kuya kwenzeka ntoni na; akukho nto intsha phantsi kwelanga."
Ecclesiastes1:10 Ukuba kukho into ekuthiwa, Yabona, intsha! phambi kwethu kwakudala."
Ecclesiastes1:11 Izinto zokuqala azikhunjulwa; Kanjalo, abo baya kuza, abasayi kukhunjulwa nabaza emva kwabo."
Ecclesiastes1:12 Mna Mmoledi, ndandingukumkani wakwaSirayeli, Yerusalem."
Ecclesiastes1:13 Intliziyo yam ndayinikela ukuba iphengulule yaye iphengulule ngobulumko ngayo yonke into eyenzekayo phantsi kwesibhakabhaka: lo mzamo wobuhlungu uThixo awunike oonyana babantu ukuze baqeqeshwe ngabo.
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ndizibonile ke zonke izenzo ezenziwayo phantsi kwelanga; yabona, ingamampunge neentuthumbo zomphefumlo."
Ecclesiastes1:15 Into egoso ayinakolulwa; nento engekhoyo ayinakubalwa.
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ndathetha mna nentliziyo yam, ndathi, Yabona, ngoku ndikwimeko entle, ndingobulumko ngaphezu kwabo bonke ababephethe iYerusalem phambi kwam; nentliziyo yam ibone ubulumko nokwazi okukhulu."
Ecclesiastes1:17 Intliziyo yam ndayinikela ekwazini ubulumko, nasekwazini ubugeza nobuyatha;"
Ecclesiastes1:18 Ngokuba ebuninzini bobulumko, kukho iintlungu ezininzi;"
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ndathi mna entliziyweni yam, Khawuze khe ndikulinge ngovuyo; Ziyolise ngoko; yabona, kwanaloo nto ingamampunge."
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ndathi ngokuhleka, Kukuphambana, nolonwabo: Wenza ntoni na?"
Ecclesiastes2:3 Bendisithi, ngentliziyo yam ukuzinikela ewayinini, kodwa ndayinikela intliziyo yam ngobulumko; yaye ndibambelele ngobudenge de ndibone oko baya kukwenza oonyana babantu phantsi kwezulu yonke imihla yobomi babo."
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ndizenzele imisebenzi emikhulu; ndazakhela izindlu; Mna ndityale izidiliya zam;
Ecclesiastes2:5 Ndazenzela imiyezo namasimi, ndatyala kuyo imithi eneziqhamo zonke;"
Ecclesiastes2:6 Ndazenzela amaqula okunkcenkceshela imithi evelisa imithi.
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ndazuza izicaka nezicakakazi, kwaza kwazalelwa endlwini yam; Kananjalo bendineenkomo neenkomo ezininzi ngaphezu kwabo bonke ababengaphambi kwam eYerusalem."
Ecclesiastes2:8 Kwakhona ndaqokelela isilivere negolide nobuncwane obukhethekileyo bookumkani nobamaphondo, yaye ndineemvumi neemvumikazi nezinto ezivuyisayo zoonyana babantu, njengezixhobo zeentlobo ngeentlobo."
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ndakhula, ndanda, ndanda ngaphezu kwabo bonke ababengaphambi kwam eYerusalem; bahlala nam ubulumko bam."
Ecclesiastes2:10 Andikuthandi konke akunqwenelayo amehlo am; andiyivimbanga intliziyo yam namnye umvuyo; ngokuba intliziyo yam yayivuya emigudwini yam yonke;
Ecclesiastes2:11 Ndabheka mna ezenzweni zam zonke, ezazenzayo izandla zam, nomsebenzi endawenza;"
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ndajika ke mna, ndakhangela ubulumko, nobugeza, nobuyatha; Angenza ntoni na umntu oza emva kokumkani? kuninzi okwenziweyo."
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ndabona ukuba ubulumko bukhulu kunobudenge, njengokuba ukukhanya kubungaphezu kobumnyama."
Ecclesiastes2:14 Amehlo esilumko asentlokweni yaso; ke sona isidenge sihamba ebumnyameni;
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ndathi mna entliziyweni yam, Njengoko sihlelwa kuko isinyabi, kuya kuba njalo nakum; kwaye kutheni ndikrelekrele ngakumbi? Ndathi ke entliziyweni yam nalo ngamampunge."
Ecclesiastes2:16 Ngokuba akukho silumko ngaphezu kwesidenge, ukuze kukhunjulwe ngonaphakade; ngokuba oko kuza kweli phakade kuya kulibaleka. Ke yena umntu osisilumko ufa njani? ngaphezu kwesidenge."
Ecclesiastes2:17 Ngenxa yoko ndibuthiyile ubomi; ngenxa yokuba unzima kum umsebenzi owenziweyo phantsi kwelanga, ngenxa yokuba yonk’ into ililize yaye umphefumlo uyagula."
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ndayithiya yonke imisebenzi endayenzayo phantsi kwelanga, ekubeni ndiya kuyishiya nomntu oya kubakho emva kwam."
Ecclesiastes2:19 Waziwa ngubani na, ukuba woba sisilumko, nokuba woba sisiyatha, kusini na? Noko ke uya kulawula kuzo zonke iinzame endazifundisayo, kwaye ndenze ngobulumko phantsi kwelanga. Oku kukwabubudenge."
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ngoko ke ndaba buhlungu intliziyo yam ngenxa yemisebenzi yonke endayenzayo phantsi kwelanga.
Ecclesiastes2:21 Ngokuba kubakho umntu omsebenzi wakhe bubulumko nokwazi nokuqiqa; ke lowo ungenzanga nto, uya kuyishiya ibe sisabelo sakhe. Kwanaloo nto ingamampunge nobubi obukhulu."
Ecclesiastes2:22 Kuba uzuza ntoni umntu kuko konke ukusebenza kwakhe nzima nangentlungu yentliziyo yakhe azikhathaze ngayo phantsi kwelanga?
Ecclesiastes2:23 Ngokuba yonke imihla yakhe inobubi, nomsebenzi wakhe unzima; nasebusuku ayiphumli intliziyo yakhe. Oku kukwabubudenge."
Ecclesiastes2:24 Akukho nto ilungileyo ebantwini kunokuba badle, basele, ukuze umphefumlo wakhe ube nemihlali ngemisebenzi yakhe. Ndaphinda ndabona ukuba iphuma esandleni sikaThixo."
Ecclesiastes2:25 Ngokuba ngubani na ongadlayo ngaphezu kwam, ngubani na ongangxamelayo khona?"
Ecclesiastes2:26 Ngokuba umntu olungileyo phambi kwakhe umnika ubulumko nokwazi nolonwabo; ke yena umoni umnika ubutyebi, ukuze amnike okulungileyo phambi koThixo; Kukwalilize nentuthumbo yokomoya."
Ecclesiastes3:1 Into yonke inexesha elimisiweyo, nexesha layo phantsi kwezulu:"
Ecclesiastes3:2 Ukuzalwa kunexesha lako, ukufa kunexesha lako; ukutyala kunexesha lako, ukuvuna okutyelweyo kunexesha lako;"
Ecclesiastes3:3 ukubulala kunexesha lako, ukuphilisa kunexesha lako; ixesha elikhoyo lokudilizwa kunye nexesha lokwakha;"
Ecclesiastes3:4 ukulila kunexesha lako, ukuhleka kunexesha lako; kukho ixesha lokwenza isijwili nexesha lokucula;"
Ecclesiastes3:5 kukho ixesha lokuchithachitha amatye, kukho nexesha lokufumba amatye; kukho ixesha lokuthandaza, nexesha lokungathandazi linexesha lako;"
Ecclesiastes3:6 ukuzuza kunexesha lako, ukulahlekelwa kunexesha lako; ixesha elikhoyo lokugcina kunye nexesha lokulahla;"
Ecclesiastes3:7 ukukrazula kunexesha lako, ukuthunga kunexesha lako; kukho ixesha lokuthi cwaka nexesha lokuthetha;"
Ecclesiastes3:8 ukuthanda kunexesha lako, ukuthiya kunexesha lako; kukho ixesha lemfazwe, kukho nexesha loxolo."
Ecclesiastes3:9 Unceda ntoni na lowo usebenza nzima?
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ndawubona umzamo, awunike oonyana babantu uThixo, ukuba bafundise."
Ecclesiastes3:11 Zonke izinto uzenze zantle ngexesha lazo; walibeka elimiweyo ezintliziyweni zabo, ukuze ungawazi namnye umsebenzi awawenzayo uThixo, athabathele ekuqaleni ade ase ekupheleni."
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ndiyazi ke ukuba akukho nto ilungileyo phakathi kwabo, ingekuko ukuba umntu onoyolo, enze okulungileyo ebomini bakhe."
Ecclesiastes3:13 Kanjalo, ukuba wonk’ ubani adle, asele, aze abone okulungileyo kuyo yonke imisebenzi yakhe, sisipho esivela kuThixo."
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ndiyazi ke ukuba yonke into aya kuyenza uThixo, yiyo eya kuba ngonaphakade; akukho nto inokuziswa kuyo kwaye akukho nto inokukhutshwa kuyo; yaye uThixo uyakwenza oko ukuze abantu bamoyike."
Ecclesiastes3:15 Bekuyintoni na ngoku? nabo baya kubakho, bebesele bekho; kwaye uThixo uxela kwangaphambili."
Ecclesiastes3:16 Ndabuya ndabona phantsi kwelanga indawo yokugweba, ngokuba okungendawo kukhona; nendawo yobulungisa, ukuba okungendawo kukhona."
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ndathi mna entliziyweni yam, Nolilungisa nongendawo, uThixo uya kulithetha ityala labo; ngokuba umise ixesha layo yonke imicimbi, nazo zonke izenzo."
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ndathi mna entliziyweni yam ngemeko yoonyana babantu, ukuba uThixo unokusityhilela kubo nokuba babone ukuba bazizilwanyana zasekhaya."
Ecclesiastes3:19 Ngokuba bayahlelwa oonyana babantu, ziyahlelwa neenkomo, sinye isihlo kubo nakuzo; njengoko kunjalo ukufa kwabo, kunjalo ukufa kwabo; ewe, mnye umoya kubo bonke; ngokokuba akukho namnye ngaphezu kwenkomo, ngokuba yonke into ingamampunge."
Ecclesiastes3:20 Bonke baya ndaweni-nye; zonke zavela eluthulini, zabuyela eluthulini zonke."
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ngubani na owaziyo umoya woonyana babantu, ukuba uyenyuka na?"
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ndaqonda ke ngoko, ukuba akukho nto ilunge ngaphezu kokuba umntu axhamle imisebenzi yakhe; ngokuba kusisabelo sakhe oko; ngokuba ngubani na oya kumzisa ukuba akubone okuya kubakho emva kwakhe?"
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ndabuya ke mna, ndabubona bonke ububi obenziwayo phantsi kwelanga; yaye kwicala labacinezeli kwakukho amandla; Ke bona bengenamthuthuzeli."
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ndabanqula abafileyo abafileyo, ngaphezu kwabadla ubomi abasahleliyo ngoku."
Ecclesiastes4:3 Ewe, ulunge ngakumbi kunababini abangazange babekho, abangazange bawubone umsebenzi ombi owenziwe phantsi kwelanga."
Ecclesiastes4:4 Kananjalo ndayiqonda ke mna yonke imigudu, nayo yonke imisebenzi elungileyo, yokuba umntu abe nekhwele ngommelwane wakhe ngenxa yoko. Kwanamampunge nokusukelana nomoya."
Ecclesiastes4:5 Isidenge sisonga izandla zaso, siyidle inyama yaso."
Ecclesiastes4:6 Kulungile ukuzalisa sandla sinye ngokuphumla, kunokuzalisa zozibini izandla ngomsebenzi onzima onzima."
Ecclesiastes4:7 Ndabuya mna, ndabona kungekho nto phantsi kwelanga."
Ecclesiastes4:8 Kukho mnye, akakho owesibini; ewe, akanamntwana nabantakwabo; nangona kunjalo, yonke imizamo yakhe ayipheli; alihluthi iliso lakhe bubutyebi; Athi, Ndiya kukhonza bani na, ndiwuhluthe okulungileyo umphefumlo wam? Ikwangamampunge, ewe, yingxaki ebuhlungu."
Ecclesiastes4:9 Kulungile ukuba babe ngababini kunokuba abe mnye; ngenxa yokuba banomvuzo ngomsebenzi wabo.
Ecclesiastes4:10 Kuba xa bathe bawa, omnye wothabatha iqabane lakhe; kodwa ngelishwa omnye akazange awe; ngokuba engenaye umphakamisa."
Ecclesiastes4:11 Kananjalo ababini, balala ndawonye, baya kuva ukusitha; angathini na ukusitha yedwa?"
Ecclesiastes4:12 Ukuba umntu uthe wameyisa umntu, baya kumchasa ababini; nentsontelo emithathu ayikhawulezi ukuqhawuka."
Ecclesiastes4:13 Ulungile umntwana olihlwempu, esisilumko, ngaphezu kokumkani oselekhulile esisidenge, ongasabeliyo ukucetyiswa."
Ecclesiastes4:14 Kuba uphuma entolongweni ukuba alawule; kanti ozalelwe ebukumkanini bakhe uba lihlwempu.
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ndababona bonke abadla ubomi, behamba phantsi kwelanga kunye nomntwana wesibini, oya kuphuma kuye."
Ecclesiastes4:16 Akukho kuphela kwabantu bonke, kwanabo bonke angaphambi kwabo; nabasemva kwakhe abayi kukholiswa nguye. Ewe, kwanaloo nto ingamampunge, iwuthuthumbisa umphefumlo."
Ecclesiastes5:1 Gcina unyawo lwakho xeshikweni uya endlwini kaThixo; ukuthanda ukuva ngaphezu kombingelelo wezidenge; ngenxa yokuba bengacingi ukuba benza ububi.
Ecclesiastes5:2 Musa ukungxama ngomlomo wakho, intliziyo yakho ingaphangi ukuthetha phambi koThixo; ngokuba uThixo usemazulwini, ke wena usehlabathini; ke ngoko amazwi akho kufuneka abe mancinane."
Ecclesiastes5:3 Ngokuba iphupha liza neendaba ezininzi; kwaye ilizwi lesidenge laziwa ngamazwi amaninzi.
Ecclesiastes5:4 Xa uthe wafunga kuThixo, musa ukulibala ukusizalisekisa; ngokuba akakholiswa ziziyatha; hlawula isithembiso sakho."
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kulungile ukuba ungathembisi, kunokuthembisa ungahlawuli."
Ecclesiastes5:6 Musa ukuwuvumela umlomo wakho ukuba uyikhubekise inyama yakho; uze ungatsho phambi kwesithunywa sezulu ukuba ibiyimpazamo. Yini na ukuba uThixo abe noburhalarhume ngelizwi lakho, asonakalise isenzo sezandla zakho?"
Ecclesiastes5:7 Ngokuba kumaphupha namazwi, maninzi amazwi; kodwa yoyika uThixo."
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ukuba ubona ukucinezelwa kwehlwempu nokugqwethwa komthetho nokusesikweni kwelinye ilizwe, musa ukumangaliswa yiloo nto, kuba oyena uphakamileyo uphakamileyo kunoyena uphakamileyo, yaye ukho nophakamileyo kunabo."
Ecclesiastes5:9 Ungeniselo lwelizwe lolwabantu bonke; Ukumkani ulungiselwa amasimi.
Ecclesiastes5:10 Othanda isilivere akaneliswa yisilivere; nokuba uthanda ubutyebi, akaphumi;"
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ekwandeni kokulungileyo, bayanda abakudlayo;"
Ecclesiastes5:12 Bumnandi ubuthongo bosebenzayo, nokuba incinane, nokuba ininzi into ayidlayo; ke bona ubutyebi besityebi abukulalisi."
Ecclesiastes5:13 Kukho ububi obukhulu endibubonileyo phantsi kwelanga;
Ecclesiastes5:14 obo butyebi butshabalala ngento embi; uzale unyana, kungekho nto esandleni sakhe."
Ecclesiastes5:15 Uya kubuya eze esizalweni sonina, ahambe njengoko weza ngako;"
Ecclesiastes5:16 Kananjalo bububi obukhulu, ukuba uya kuhamba ngeendlela zonke njengoko weza; yaye uba yintoni umphumo walowo ubetha umoya?"
Ecclesiastes5:17 Yaye yonke imihla yakhe uyidla ebumnyameni, enentlungu enkulu nomsindo ngenxa yokugula kwakhe."
Ecclesiastes5:18 Bona ke endikubonileyo: kulungile, kumnandi ukuba umntu adle, asele, abone okulungileyo kokubila kwakhe konke, akwenzayo phantsi kwelanga, yonke imihla yobomi bakhe, amnikayo uThixo bona; ngokuba kusisabelo sakhe."
Ecclesiastes5:19 Kananjalo wonke umntu, athe uThixo wamnika ubutyebi, wamnika negunya lokudla, adle, abone okulungileyo emisebenzini yakhe; sisipho esivela kuThixo."
Ecclesiastes5:20 Ngokuba akayi kucinga kakhulu ngemihla yobomi bakhe; ngokuba uThixo emphendule ngovuyo lwentliziyo yakhe.
Ecclesiastes6:1 Kukho ububi endibubonileyo phantsi kwelanga, bukhulu phakathi kwabantu;"
Ecclesiastes6:2 Umntu athe uThixo wamnika ubutyebi nozuko, ongaswele nto emphefumlweni wakhe, kuko konke asukuba enqwenela ngako, kodwa uThixo akamnikanga gunya lokuzidla; udliwa ngowasemzini; asinto, asinto sisifo esibi."
Ecclesiastes6:3 Ukuba umntu uthe wazala ikhulu labantwana, wadla ubomi iminyaka emininzi, yande imihla yeminyaka yakhe, umphefumlo wakhe awahlutha zizinto ezilungileyo, angangcwatywa; Ndithi, ukuzalwa engalindelekanga kungcono kunaye."
Ecclesiastes6:4 Kuba ingene ngelize, imka ebumnyameni, negama lakhe ligutyungelwe bubumnyama;"
Ecclesiastes6:5 Ngaphezu koko, akazange alibone ilanga engazi nto; buphumla ngakumbi kunabanye."
Ecclesiastes6:6 Nokuba uthe wadla ubomi iminyaka engamawaka amabini, akaboni nto ilungileyo; azihambi ndaweni-nye zonke?"
Ecclesiastes6:7 Yonke imisebenzi yomntu uyenzela umlomo wakhe; ke umnqweno wakhe awuwuzali.
Ecclesiastes6:8 Ngokuba isilumko sisigqitha ngantoni na isidenge? Liyintoni na ihlwempu, ngubani na okwaziyo ukuhamba phakathi kwabaphilileyo?"
Ecclesiastes6:9 Ukubona kwamehlo kulunge ngaphezu kokuhambahamba kwenkanuko;
Ecclesiastes6:10 Sele kuthethiwe ke, yaziwa ukuba yena ungumntu;"
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ekubeni kukho izinto ezininzi nje, ezongeza amampunge;"
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ngokuba ngubani na owaziyo okumlungeleyo umntu ebomini, ngangenani lemihla yobomi bakhe obungamampunge, ayigqiba njengesithunzi? ngokuba ngubani na owaziyo okuya kubakho emva kwakhe phantsi kwelanga?"
Ecclesiastes7:1 Igama elilungileyo lingaphezulu nakwioli elungileyo; Umhla wokufa unjengomhla wokuzalwa komntu.
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kulungile ukuya endlwini yobumnyama ngaphezu kokuya endlwini yemigidi; kuba kukuphela kwabantu bonke; yaye ophilayo uya kukubeka entliziyweni yakhe.
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kulungile ukuba nosizi ngaphezu kokuhleka; ngokuba intliziyo inobuso obuthe khunubembe.
Ecclesiastes7:4 Intliziyo yezilumko isendlwini yobumnyama; ke yona intliziyo yezidenge isendlwini yovuyo.
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kulungile ukuva ukukhalimela kwesilumko, kunokuba uve ingoma yezidenge."
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ngokuba lilizwi levaba phantsi kwembiza ukuhleka kwesidenge; kwanaloo nto ingamampunge.
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ewe, ukucudisa kugezisa isilumko; kwaye isipho siyayiphula intliziyo."
Ecclesiastes7:8 Kulungile ukugqitywa kwendawo, ngaphezu kokuqalwa kwayo;"
Ecclesiastes7:9 Musa ukukungxamela ukuqumba ngomoya wakho, ngokuba ingqumbo isesifubeni sezidenge."
Ecclesiastes7:10 Musa ukuthi, Ibiyini na ukuba imihla yokuqala ibilungile kunale? ngenxa yokuba akuceli ngengqiqo."
Ecclesiastes7:11 Bulungile ubulumko, kunye nelifa, bulungile kwabalibonayo ilanga."
Ecclesiastes7:12 Ngokuba ubulumko buligwiba, imali iyindawo yokusabela, kodwa ingenelo yolwazi kukuba ubulumko buyabasindisa abo banabo."
Ecclesiastes7:13 Wukhangele umsebenzi kaThixo; ngokuba ngubani na onokolula into ajikileyo?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Vuyani ngomhla wentsikelelo, niqondele imini yobubi;"
Ecclesiastes7:15 Le nto yonke ndayibona ngemihla yam engamampunge: kubakho ilungisa elitshabalalayo noko linobulungisa, kubekho ongendawo ophila ixesha elide, ngenxa yobungendawo bakhe."
Ecclesiastes7:16 Musa ukuba lilungisa ngezinto ezininzi; musani ukuqhayisa. Kutheni uzozonakalisa?
Ecclesiastes7:17 Musa ukuba ngongendawo ngokukhulu, ungazenzi isidenge; ungafa lingekafiki ixesha lakho?"
Ecclesiastes7:18 Kulungile ukuba uthe wabubamba; ewe, musa ukusisusa isandla sakho kuyo; ngokuba owoyika uThixo wophuma kuyo yonke."
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ubulumko buyasiqinisa isilumko, ngaphezu kweshumi lamagorha esixekweni."
Ecclesiastes7:20 Ngokuba akukho mntu ulilungisa ehlabathini, wenza okulungileyo, angoni."
Ecclesiastes7:21 Kananjalo, musani ukuwanikela ingqalelo amazwi onke athethwayo; hleze umve umkhonzi wakho etshabhisa."
Ecclesiastes7:22 Ngokuba intliziyo yakho ihlala isazi ukuba uyabatshabhisa abanye;
Ecclesiastes7:23 Zonke ezo zinto ndizilingile ngobulumko, ndathi, Ndiya kulumka; kodwa bekude kum."
Ecclesiastes7:24 Yintoni ekude, enzulu kakhulu, ngubani na onokufikelela kuyo?"
Ecclesiastes7:25 Intliziyo yam ndayinikela ekwazini nasekuphengululeni nasekufuneni ubulumko nenjongo yezinto, nokwazi ububi bobuyatha, ewe, ubudenge nobuyatha."
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ndafumanisa ukuba kukrakra ngaphezu kokufa, inkazana engumgibe intliziyo yakhe, nezandla zingamathambo; Olungileyo emehlweni kaThixo uya kusinda kuye; ke yena umoni uya kubanjiswa nguye."
Ecclesiastes7:27 Qaphelani, nantsi into endiyifumeneyo, utsho umshumayeli, njengoko ndifunda nganye nganye, ukuze ndifumane umbhalo."
Ecclesiastes7:28 Okufunayo umphefumlo wam, ndingakufumani; indoda enye ewakeni ndiyifumene; andifumananga ntokazi phakathi kwabo bonke."
Ecclesiastes7:29 Yabona, le nto kuphela ndiyifumene, yokuba uThixo wamenza umntu olilungisa; kodwa babefuna ukuveliswa okungakumbi."
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ngubani na onjengesilumko? kwaye ngubani oyaziyo inkcazo yetyala? Ubulumko bomntu bukhanyisa ebusweni bakhe, nokonakala kobuso bakhe kuya kuguqulwa."
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ndikucebisa ukuba uwugcine umyalelo kakumkani, yaye oku kuphathelele isifungo sikaThixo."
Ecclesiastes8:3 Musa ukukungxamela ukumka ebusweni bakhe; ngokuba wenza into ayithandayo.
Ecclesiastes8:4 Apho ilizwi lokumkani linegunya; ngubani na onokuthi kuye, Wenza ntoni na?"
Ecclesiastes8:5 Ogcina umthetho akayi kuva ububi; intliziyo yezilumko iyalazi ixesha nesigwebo.
Ecclesiastes8:6 Ngokuba yonke into inexesha layo nesigwebo;
Ecclesiastes8:7 Kuba engayazi into eya kubakho; ngokuba ngubani na onokumxelela ukuba kuya kuba nini na?
Ecclesiastes8:8 Akukho bani unagunya phezu komphefumlo ukusindisa umphefumlo; akanamandla ngemini yokufa, akukho luphumlo kwelo dabi; nobugwenxa abuyi kubasindisa abo bunikiweyo."
Ecclesiastes8:9 Konke oku ndakubonayo, ndaza ndayinikela intliziyo yam kuwo wonke umsebenzi owenziweyo phantsi kwelanga: kukho ixesha laxa umntu elawula omnye ukuze amenzakalisa."
Ecclesiastes8:10 Bangcwatywa ke abangendawo, nabaphumayo, nababephumileyo engcweleni, balityalwa kuloo mzi bebewenzela; kwaye ngamampunge."
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ngenxa enokuba ukugwetywa kwesenzo esibi akukukhawulezisi ukwenza oko, ngenxa yoko intliziyo yoonyana babantu izele kukwenza ububi."
Ecclesiastes8:12 Kwanokuba umoni enze okubi izihlandlo ezilikhulu, yolule imihla yakhe, noko ndiyazi ukuba kuya kuba kuhle kwabamoyikayo uThixo, nabamoyikayo kakuhle;"
Ecclesiastes8:13 Ke yena ongendawo akayi kuhamba kakuhle, akayi kuyolula imihla yakhe njengesithunzi; ngokuba akamoyiki uThixo."
Ecclesiastes8:14 Kukho amampunge enzekayo ehlabathini; ukuba kukho abantu abalungileyo abachatshazelwa ngumsebenzi wabantu ababi; kananjalo, kukho abantu abangendawo ababonakala ngokokwenza kwamalungisa; Nam ndathi ngamampunge."
Ecclesiastes8:15 Ndaluncoma ke mna uvuyo, ngokuba akukho nto imlungeleyo umntu phantsi kwelanga, ngaphandle kokuba adle, asele, avuye; ngokuba buya kuba ngumsebenzi wakhe, ngemihla yobomi bakhe amnikayo uThixo phantsi kwelanga."
Ecclesiastes8:16 Xa ndandinikela intliziyo yam ekwazini ubulumko nokubona umsebenzi owenziwa ehlabathini; (kuba kukho imini nobusuku, abuboni ubuthongo emehlweni akhe)."
Ecclesiastes8:17 Ndawubona ke wonke umsebenzi woThixo oyinyaniso, ukuba akukho namnye unako ukuwuqonda umsebenzi owenziwayo phantsi kwelanga; ngaphezulu koko; Nokuba isilumko safuna ukwazi, akasifumani."
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ndacinga ke ngentliziyo yonke le nto, ukuba ndiyithethe yonke le nto, yokuba amalungisa, nezilumko, nemisebenzi yabo, isesandleni sikaThixo; akukho bani waziyo uthando nentiyo kuyo yonke into ephambi kwakhe."
Ecclesiastes9:2 Izinto zonke zibahlela ngokufanayo bonke: esinye isihlo selungisa, esinye sibe sesongendawo; kolungileyo, kwabahlambulukileyo, nabangcolileyo; Kwalowo uhlabayo, nakongahlabiyo; njengoko anjalo olungileyo, unjalo nomoni; ofungayo, makabe njengokoyika isifungo."
Ecclesiastes9:3 Kubi ke kuzo zonke izinto ezenziwayo phantsi kwelanga, ukuba behlelwa yinto enye bonke, kwanentliziyo yoonyana babantu izele bububi, ibe bubugeza entliziyweni yabo bedla ubomi, bazibulale ke bona yiya kwabafileyo."
Ecclesiastes9:4 Kuba kukho ithemba kulowo unamathela kubo bonke abaphilayo, ekubeni inja ephilayo ilunge ngakumbi kunengonyama efileyo."
Ecclesiastes9:5 Ngokuba abadla ubomi bayazi ukuba baya kufa; ke bona abafileyo abazi lutho, abanamvuzo; ngokuba balityelwe, abasakhunjulwa nganto."
Ecclesiastes9:6 Seluphelile kade uthando lwabo, nentiyo yabo, nekhwele labo; àbanasabelo naphakade ezintweni zonke ezenzekayo phantsi kwelanga."
Ecclesiastes9:7 Yiya udle isonka sakho unovuyo, usele iwayini yakho unentliziyo echwayithileyo; ngokuba ngoku ekholisiwe uThixo imisebenzi yakho."
Ecclesiastes9:8 Iingubo zakho mazibe mhlophe ngamaxesha onke; nentloko yakho ayifuneki ngamafutha aqholiweyo.
Ecclesiastes9:9 Hlala kakuhle nomfazi omthandileyo ngemihla yonke yobomi bakho obungamampunge, omnikileyo phantsi kwelanga, ngemihla yakho yonke engamampunge; ngokuba sisabelo sakho eso ebomini, nasemisebenzini yakho oyenzayo phantsi kwelanga."
Ecclesiastes9:10 Konke esikufumanayo ukuba sikwenze isandla sakho kwenze ngamandla akho; ngokuba akusekho kwenza, nakucinga, nakwazi, nakulumka kwelabafileyo, apho uya khona wena."
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ndabuya ndabona phantsi kwelanga, ukuba ugqatso asilolwabanamendu, nedabi asilolwabanamandla, nesonka asisosezilumko, nobutyebi asibobabuthathaka, nenceba asiyoyabasweleyo ngenxa yezilumko; kodwa wonke umntu uzalwa enexesha nethuba."
Ecclesiastes9:12 Kuba naye umntu akalazi ixesha lakhe; njengentlanzi ebanjiswe ngomnatha ombi, nanjengeentaka ezibanjiswe ngomgibe; ngoko abantwana babantu babanjwa ngexesha elinzima xa libafikela ngequbuliso."
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ndabuya ndabubona obu bulumko phantsi kwelanga, ndabona ukuba bukhulu;"
Ecclesiastes9:14 Kwaye kukho umzi omncinane, unamadoda ambalwa; Wafikela ukumkani omkhulu, wawungqinga, wakha udonga olukhulu lokungqinga."
Ecclesiastes9:15 Kwafunyanwa kuwo indoda elihlwempu inobulumko, yona yawusiza umzi ngobulumko bayo; noko akubangakho namnye owakhumbulayo loo mntu ulihlwempu."
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ndathi ke mna, Bulunge ubulumko ngaphezu kobugorha; ukanti ubulumko besisweli budelekile, namazwi alo akaviwa."
Ecclesiastes9:17 Amazwi ezilumko aviwe kwathi cwaka, Ngaphezu kokukhala komlawuli phakathi kwezinyabi."
Ecclesiastes9:18 Bulunge ubulumko ngaphezu kweempahla zokulwa; ke yena umoni emnye utshabalalisa izinto ezininzi.
Ecclesiastes10:1 Iimpukane ezifileyo zikhupha amafutha aqholiweyo; bunjalo ubudenge obuncinane kowaziwa ngobulumko nozuko.
Ecclesiastes10:2 Intliziyo yesilumko isesandleni saso sokunene; kodwa intliziyo emthubi kwicala lasekhohlo.
Ecclesiastes10:3 Ewe, nasendleleni, xa sihamba endleleni isidenge, siyaphelelwa bubulumko, sixelele wonke umntu ukuba sisidenge."
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ukuba ukufutha komlawuli kuthe kwenyuka kwakuchasa, musa ukuyishiya indawo yakho; kuba ithomalalisa ubugwenxa obukhulu."
Ecclesiastes10:5 Kukho ububi endibubonileyo phantsi kwelanga, obunjengobubi bomlawuli;"
Ecclesiastes10:6 Ubutyhakala bunikwa isidima esikhulu, yaye izityebi zihleli phantsi emhlabeni."
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ndabona abakhonzi bekhwele emahasheni, neenkosana zihamba emhlabeni njengezicaka."
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ombe umngxuma uya kweyela kuwo; othe waphula uthango, inyoka iya kumluma."
Ecclesiastes10:9 Osusa amatye, uya kwenzakala ngawo; ocanda iinkuni uya kuba sengozini."
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ukuba intsimbi ithe yaba buthuntu, akalulola uhlangothi lwayo, woyenza ibe namandla ngakumbi; ke ubulumko buyanceda bulungise."
Ecclesiastes10:11 Okunene, inyoka iya kuluma kungekho kukhafula; kwaye uMthetheleli akangcono."
Ecclesiastes10:12 Alungile amazwi omlomo wezilumko; ke yona imilebe yomlomo wesidenge iya kusiginya.
Ecclesiastes10:13 Ingqalo, yamazwi omlomo waso bubudenge, nengqibo yomlomo waso bubugeza ongendawo."
Ecclesiastes10:14 Kwanesidenge sithetha amazwi; akukho bani unokuxela okuya kwenzeka; Kuya kubakho ntoni na emva kwakhe, ngubani na onokumxelela?"
Ecclesiastes10:15 Umsebenzi wezidenge uyazidinisa zonke ezo, ngokuba aziyazi indlela yokuya emzini."
Ecclesiastes10:16 Yeha, wena lizwe likumkani ungumntwana, zidle amatshawe adlayo!"
Ecclesiastes10:17 Hayi, uyolo lwehlabathi, xa ukumkani wakho engunyana wabathetheli, Neenkosi zakho zidla ngexesha elifanelekileyo, ukuze zibe namandla, kungekhona ukunxila!"
Ecclesiastes10:18 Isakhiwo sitshabalala ngobuvila obukhulu; ngenxa yobuvila bezandla indlu iyawa.
Ecclesiastes10:19 Itheko lenziwa yintsini, newayini indenza ndonwabe, kodwa imali iphendula yonk’ into."
Ecclesiastes10:20 Musa ukumtshabhisa ukumkani, nasesandleni sakho; Musa ukuqalekisa isityebi egumbini lakho lokulala; ngokuba intaka yezulu yolikhupha ilizwi, kwaye omaphiko wolixela."
Ecclesiastes11:1 Siphose isonka sakho phezu kwamanzi, ngokuba wosifumana kwakuba ziintsuku ezininzi."
Ecclesiastes11:2 Yahlula izahlulo zibesixhenxe, zibe nesibhozo; ngokuba akuyazi into embi eya kubakho ehlabathini."
Ecclesiastes11:3 Xa amafu ezele yimvula, agaleleka emhlabeni; ukuba umthi uthe wawa, wabheka ezantsi, nokuba uthe wabheka entla, kuloo ndawo uwe kuyo umthi lowo, yoba lapho."
Ecclesiastes11:4 Okhangela umoya akayi kuhlwayela; nokhangela amafu akayi kuvuna.
Ecclesiastes11:5 Kanye njengokuba ungayazi indlela yomphefumlo kwanendlela akhula ngayo amathambo esibelekweni somfazi omithiyo, ngokunjalo akuyazi imisebenzi kaThixo owenza zonke izinto."
Ecclesiastes11:6 Yihlwayele imbewu yakho kusasa, ungasiphumzi isandla sakho ngokuhlwa;"
Ecclesiastes11:7 Ewe, kulungile ukukhanya, kuyathandeka kwamehlo ukulibona ilanga."
Ecclesiastes11:8 Ukuba umntu uthe wadla ubomi iminyaka emininzi, wadla ubomi ebantwini bonke; Makakhumbule imihla yobumnyama; ngokuba baya kuba baninzi. Yonke into ezayo ingamampunge."
Ecclesiastes11:9 Vuya, ndodana, ebutsheni bakho; ikuvuyise intliziyo yakho ngemihla yesijwili sakho, uhambe ngeendlela zentliziyo yakho, nangokukhangela kwamehlo akho; kodwa yazini ukuba uThixo uya kunigweba kuko konke oko."
Ecclesiastes11:10 Yisuse ke ingqumbo entliziyweni yakho, ubudlulise ububi enyameni yakho; ngokuba ezintsha, ezintsha, amampunge."
Ecclesiastes12:1 Mkhumbule uMdali wakho ngemihla yobutsha bakho, xa ingekafiki imihla yobubi, ingekafiki iminyaka, ukuba uthe: “Andiyoliswa yiyo;"
Ecclesiastes12:2 Xa ilanga, nokukhanya, nenyanga, neenkwenkwezi, azibi mnyama, namafu akabuyi emva kwemvula."
Ecclesiastes12:3 Ngaloo mini baye begubha ababoniseli bendlu, bayaguqa abomeleleyo, bayeke abasila ngenxa yokuba betyhafile, nabavelela ngeefestile benza mnyama;"
Ecclesiastes12:4 ziya kuvalwa iingcango ezitratweni, sakudamba isandi sengxokozelo;"
Ecclesiastes12:5 Xa bezoyika iziganga, endleleni kunkwantya, umile um-amangile, usuke ube ngumthwalo umqiwu, uphele umnqweno; Ngokuba umntu uya endlwini yakhe ende, bathi abamatsheke basasaze izitalato."
Ecclesiastes12:6 Kunjengoko kwaphulwa intambo yesilivere, nokuba kukwaphulwa kwesitya segolide, nokuba sisitya sequla, nokuba kukwaphuke ivili."
Ecclesiastes12:7 Luya kubuyela emhlabeni uthuli, njengoko belunjalo, umoya ubuyele kuThixo owawunikayo."
Ecclesiastes12:8 Amampunge awo amampunge, itsho iNtshumayeli; yonke into ingamampunge."
Ecclesiastes12:9 Ngaphezu koko, ekubeni umshumayeli wayesisilumko, wayesafundisa abantu ukwazi; ewe, wacingisisa kakuhle waphengulula walungisa izivakalisi ezininzi."
Ecclesiastes12:10 Umshumayeli wayefuna ukufumana amazwi amkelekileyo, yaye oko kubhaliweyo kwakuchanekile, amazwi enyaniso."
Ecclesiastes12:11 Amazwi ezilumko anjengentonga nanjengezikhonkwane ezibethelelwe ziinkokeli zamabandla, ezinikwe ngumalusi omnye."
Ecclesiastes12:12 Kwaye kwakhona, ngoku, nyana wam, lumka: akukho siphelo ekudalweni kweencwadi ezininzi; Ukufunda okuninzi kudinisa inyama."
Ecclesiastes12:13 Ukuhlanganiswa kwentetho, yakuba ivakele into yonke, nanku: Yoyika uThixo, ugcine imithetho yakhe, ngokuba indawo leyo yimfanelo yoluntu lonke."
Ecclesiastes12:14 Kuba wonke umsebenzi uThixo uya kuwuzisa ekugwetyweni kwayo yonke into efihliweyo, enoba ilungile okanye imbi."
SongOfSongs1:1 iNgoma yazo iiNgoma, eyekaSolomon."
SongOfSongs1:2 Makandange ngokwanga komlomo wakhe, Ngokuba izincokoliso zakho zimnandi ngaphezu kwewayini."
SongOfSongs1:3 Ngenxa yevumba elimnandi lesiqhumiso sakho, igama lakho linjengesiqhumiso esithululwayo; yilonto amantombazana ekuthanda."
SongOfSongs1:4 Nditsale, sibaleke emva kwakho; ukumkani wandingenisa ezingontsini zakhe; siya kuvuya, sivuye ngawe, sicinge ngothando lwakho ngaphezu kwewayini; Amalungisa ayakuthanda."
SongOfSongs1:5 Zintombi zaseYerusalem, ndimnyama, kodwa ndimhle, njengeentente zomsedare, nanjengengubo kaSolomon."
SongOfSongs1:6 Musani ukundikhangela ngakuba ndife mnyama, ngokuba nditshe lilanga; Abantwana bam bandiqumbele; bandimisela umveleli wezidiliya; ke sona isidiliya sam asisisindisanga."
SongOfSongs1:7 Wena uwuthandayo umphefumlo wam, ndixelele apho walusela khona, Walusela khona umhlambi wakho emini; kutheni ndifanele ndibe njengalowo waphambukayo emhlambini wabahlobo bakho?"
SongOfSongs1:8 Ukuba akuyazi loo nto, ukuba mhle phakathi kwabafazi, hamba ngomzekelo womhlambi, waluse iibhokhwe zakho ngaseminqubeni yabalusi."
SongOfSongs1:9 Ntanda yam, ndikufanisa neenqwelo zokulwa zikaFaro;"
SongOfSongs1:10 Zinomkhitha izidlele zakho, Umxokelelwane wegolide, Umqala wakho ngamatyathanga."
SongOfSongs1:11 Sokwenzela iintambo zegolide ezineentambo zesilivere.
SongOfSongs1:12 Xa ukumkani ehleli ngasesithebeni sakhe, iindaba zam zikhupha ivumba lazo."
SongOfSongs1:13 Intanda yam sisipha semore kum; uya kulala phakathi kwamabele am ubusuku bonke.
SongOfSongs1:14 Intanda yam kum injengentlabathi yeminquba, ezidiliyeni zase-Engedi."
SongOfSongs1:15 Yabona, umhle, sithandwa sam; yabona, umhle; unamehlo ehobe."
SongOfSongs1:16 Yabona, umhle, sithandwa sam, ewe, unomtsalane; neemandlalo zethu ziluhlaza."
SongOfSongs1:17 Imiqadi yendlu yethu yimisedare, Imiqadi yethu yimisipres."
SongOfSongs2:1 Ndiyintyantyambo yaseSharon, ndiyinyibiba yasezintlangeni."
SongOfSongs2:2 Njengenyibiba phakathi kwemithana, injalo intanda yam phakathi kweentombi."
SongOfSongs2:3 Njengomapile phakathi kwemithi yehlathi, Injalo intanda yam phakathi koonyana. Bendihleli emthunzini wawo ndinovuyo olukhulu, Neziqhamo zawo zibe nencasa ekhuhlangubeni lam."
SongOfSongs2:4 Yandisa endlwini yetheko, nebhanile yayo phezu kwam luthando."
SongOfSongs2:5 Ndibambe ngamaphiko akho, Ndidlise iiapile, Ngokuba ndisifa luthando."
SongOfSongs2:6 Isandla sayo sokhohlo siphantsi kwentloko yam, Esokunene sayo sindiwole."
SongOfSongs2:7 Zintombi zaseYerusalem, ndinifungela amaxhamakazi, nangexhama lelizwe, ukuba aniyi kuluxhokonxa, ningaluvuseleli uthando lwam, nide nibone."
SongOfSongs2:8 Izwi lentanda yam! yabona, isiza, itsiba ezintabeni, isuka imitsi ezindulini."
SongOfSongs2:9 Intanda yam injengexhama, nexhama; nantso imi emva kodonga lwakowethu, ikroba ngeefestile, iphuma imivalo;"
SongOfSongs2:10 Intanda yam yathetha, yathi kum, Vuka, ntanda yam, ntwana yam, uze."
SongOfSongs2:11 Ngokuba, yabonani, ubusika bugqithile, imvula iphelile;"
SongOfSongs2:12 Iintyatyambo ziyavela emhlabeni; ixesha lokuntyiloza kweentaka lifikile, nesandi sokugoba sivakele ezweni lakowethu;"
SongOfSongs2:13 Umkhiwane uvelisa amakhiwane awo aluhlaza, Imidiliya ineediliya ezinevumba elimnandi. Vuka, sithandwa sam, ntombi yam, hamba!"
SongOfSongs2:14 Vukuthu lam, emqhokrweni wamawa, entsithelweni, ndibubone ubuso bakho, ndilive ilizwi lakho; Ngokuba ilizwi lakho limnandi, ubuso bakho buhle."
SongOfSongs2:15 Sithabatheleni iimpungutye, iimpungutye ezincinane ezonakalisa izidiliya, ngokuba izidiliya zethu zineediliya ezilungileyo."
SongOfSongs2:16 Intanda yam yeyam, nam ndingowaso; Ulusela phantsi kweenyibiba."
SongOfSongs2:17 Lide liphume ilanga namathunzi asabe, jika, sithandwa sam, ube njengexhama ezintabeni zaseBhetere."
SongOfSongs3:1 Ndimlindele esililini sam ebusuku, lowo uthandwa ngumphefumlo wam; Ndamkhangela andamfumana."
SongOfSongs3:2 Ndosuka ndime, ndijikajike umzi ezitratweni, nasezitratweni, ndimfuna lowo uthandwa ngumphefumlo wam; Ndamkhangela andamfumana."
SongOfSongs3:3 Bandifumana abalindi abajikeleze umzi; Ndathi kuye, Uyambona na lowo uthandwa ngumphefumlo wam?"
SongOfSongs3:4 Ndagqitha kubo kancinane, ndamfumana lowo uthandwa ngumphefumlo wam; Ndambamba andamyeka ndade ndamsa endlini kamama nasegumbini lokulala lalowo undimithisileyo."
SongOfSongs3:5 Zintombi zaseYerusalem, ndinifungela amaxhamakazi, nangexhama lelizwe, ukuba aniyi kuluvuselela uthando lwam, nide niluthande."
SongOfSongs3:6 Ngubani na lo, unyuka evela entlango njengemiqulu yomsi, egalelwe imore nesiqhumiso esimhlophe, kunye nemifuno yonke yomrhwebi?"
SongOfSongs3:7 Naso ke isilili sakhe, esisingqengqelo sikaSolomon; kukho amashumi amathandathu amadoda anobukroti phezu kwalo, kumakroti akwaSirayeli."
SongOfSongs3:8 Bonke bephela baphethe amakrele, ngenxa yokuba bafundiswe ukulwa; elowo unekrele ethangeni lakhe ngenxa yonkwantyo lwasebusuku."
SongOfSongs3:9 Ukumkani uSolomon wazenzela inqwelo kwihlathi laseLebhanon.
SongOfSongs3:10 Iintsika zayo wazenza ngesilivere, nemiphantsi yazo ngegolide, nesigubungelo sayo ngemisonto emsi nemfusa;"
SongOfSongs3:11 Nina zintombi zaseZiyon, phumani nize nibone uKumkani uSolomon enesithsaba awasinikwa ngunina ngomhla womtshato wakhe nangomhla wovuyo lwentliziyo yakhe."
SongOfSongs4:1 Yabona, umhle, sithandwa sam; yabona, umhle; unamehlo ehobe engxoweni yakho; iinwele zakho zinjengomhlambi weebhokhwe ezintabeni zaseGiliyadi."
SongOfSongs4:2 Amazinyo akho anjengomhlambi weegusha ezichetyiweyo, Eziphuma ekuhlanjweni; Ngamnye kubo uzala amawele, yaye akukho namnye uludlolo phakathi kwawo."
SongOfSongs4:3 Imilebe yakho injengomsonto omfusa, yaye intetho yakho imnandi; iintlafuno zakho zinjengothanda lwerharnati ezingxoweni zakho."
SongOfSongs4:4 Intamo yakho injengenqaba kaDavide, eyakhiwe ngokweentonga, Ekuxhonywe kuyo iwaka leengweletshetshe, Onke amakhaka amagorha."
SongOfSongs4:5 Amabele akho omabini anjengamantshontsho amabini eebhokhwe adla phakathi kweenyibiba.
SongOfSongs4:6 Lide liphume ilanga namathunzi asabe, ndiya kuya entabeni yemore nasendulini yesiqhumiso."
SongOfSongs4:7 Uyinzwakazi, sithandwa sam sonke; akukho bala kuwe."
SongOfSongs4:8 Hamba nam, ugxa wam, siye eLebhanon, uhambe nam eLebhanon, ukhangele encotsheni yeAmana, encotsheni yeSenire neHermon, emiqolombeni yeengonyama, ezintabeni zamahlosi."
SongOfSongs4:9 Uyizukisa intliziyo yam, dade wethu, mtshakazi; Uyihombisile intliziyo yam ngelinye lamehlo akho, Ngomxokelelwane omnye emqaleni wakho."
SongOfSongs4:10 Hayi, ukuba ntle kwenceba yakho, dade wethu, mtshakazi! Lubeka phi na ke uthando lwakho ngaphezu kwewayini! nevumba leoli yakho elimnandi njengabo bonke ubulawu!"
SongOfSongs4:11 Umlomo wakho uvuza incindi, mlingane wam; Bubusi namasi ngaphantsi kolwimi lwakho; ivumba leengubo zakho linjengevumba leLebhanon."
SongOfSongs4:12 Udade wethu, ummelwane wam, uhleli endle; Gubungela iqula, vala iqula."
SongOfSongs4:13 Amahlumelo akho ngumyezo wemirharnate, kunye neziqhamo ezimnandi; iCamphor, nespikenard;"
SongOfSongs4:14 inareda nesafron; ubulawu, nesinamon, nemithi yonke yesiqhumiso; imore nehaloti, nobulawu bonke;"
SongOfSongs4:15 Umthombo wemiyezo, Ithende lamanzi aphilileyo, Imilambo yaseLebhanon."
SongOfSongs4:16 Vuka, moya wasentla; uze, wena Mzantsi! Vuthela emyezweni wam, ukuze kuphume ubulawu bawo. Isithandwa sam masingene emyezweni waso, sidle isiqhamo saso esimnandi."
SongOfSongs5:1 Ndingenile emyezweni wam, dade wethu, mtshakazi wam; Ndiyithathile imore yam nobulawu bam; Ndilidlile inqatha lam lobusi nobusi bam; Ndiyayisela iwayini yam, namasi am; yityani, oh bahlobo! sela, ewe, sela kakhulu, zintanda."
SongOfSongs5:2 Ndilele, yona intliziyo yam isaphaphile; lilizwi lentanda yam, inkqonkqoza, isithi, Ndivulele, mzalwana wam, ntanda yam, vukuthu lam elingenazinqambi, ngokuba intloko yam izele ngumbethe, neenwele zam zizele ngamathontsi. Ngobusuku."
SongOfSongs5:3 Ndikhulule ingubo yam; Sendizihlambile na iinyawo zam; Ndingazingcolisa njani?
SongOfSongs5:4 Intanda yam yasifaka isandla elucangweni, saxuxuzela isisu sam ngenxa yaso."
SongOfSongs5:5 Ndavuka ndaya kuyivula intanda yam; izandla zam zivuza imore, neminwe yam ivuza imore enuka kamnandi, ezikrobeni zezitshixo."
SongOfSongs5:6 Ndasivulela mna intanda yam; Ke yona intanda yam yemka, yemka; Wakhathazeka umoya wam ekuthetheni kwakhe; Ndiye ndambiza, akandiphendula."
SongOfSongs5:7 Bandifumana abalindi abajikeleze umzi, bandibetha, bandingcikiva; Abalindi beendonga bandihlutha isigqubuthelo sam."
SongOfSongs5:8 Zintombi zaseYerusalem, ndiyanifungisa, ukuba nithe nafumana ndithandwa, mxeleleni ukuba ndiyathandwa."
SongOfSongs5:9 Yini na ukuba isithandwa sakho sibe ngaphezu kwezinye izithandane, Wena nzwakazindini phakathi kweentokazi? Yintoni eyenza isithandwa sakho sibengcono kunezinye izithandani, ukuba uya kusifunga ngolo hlobo?"
SongOfSongs5:10 Intanda yam imhlophe, ingqombela, Inkulu phakathi kwamawaka alishumi."
SongOfSongs5:11 Intloko yayo iyigolide engcwengiweyo, ecikizekileyo;"
SongOfSongs5:12 Amehlo ayo anjengamehlo amahobe ngasemilanjeni yamanzi, Ehlanjwe ngobisi, ecocekile kunene."
SongOfSongs5:13 Izidlele zayo zinjengemityino yetyeleba, zinjengentyantyambo yokuqhola; Umlomo wayo unjengeenyibiba ezivuza imore evumba limnandi."
SongOfSongs5:14 Izandla zayo ziintonga zegolide, zimibalabala, Isisu sayo sinjengophondo lwendlovu ebenyezelayo, ethiwe wambu ngesafire."
SongOfSongs5:15 Iinyawo zayo ziintsika zemarmore emhlophe, zibekwe phezu kweziseko zegolide engcwengiweyo; ubuso bakhe bunjengeLebhanon, bubuhle njengemisedare."
SongOfSongs5:16 Umlomo wakhe umnandi; ewe, uthandeka ngokupheleleyo. Yiyo leyo intanda yam, nguye lowo uwethu, Zintombi zaseYerusalem."
SongOfSongs6:1 Iye phi na intanda yakho, Wena nzwakazindini phakathi kweentokazi? Isithandwa sakho siye phi? masimkhangele nawe."
SongOfSongs6:2 Intanda yam yehla yaya emyezweni waso, kwiziqholo, ukuze idle emiyezweni ize ivune iinyibiba."
SongOfSongs6:3 Mna ndingowentanda yam, nentanda yam yeyam; Ulusela phantsi kweenyibiba."
SongOfSongs6:4 Uyinzwakazi, sithandwa sam, njengeTire, uyinzwakazi njengeYerusalem, woyikeka njengeenkamba."
SongOfSongs6:5 Wasuse amehlo akho kum, ngokuba endimisile; Iinwele zakho zinjengomhlambi weebhokhwe waseGiliyadi."
SongOfSongs6:6 Amazinyo akho anjengomhlambi weegusha ezisandul’ ukuhlanjwa, ezizala amawele, kungekho nanye kuzo engazaliyo."
SongOfSongs6:7 Njengeqhekeza lerharnati, iintlafuno zakho zisezingxoweni zakho;"
SongOfSongs6:8 Kukho ookumkanikazi abamashumi amathandathu, nezithende ezimashumi asibhozo, neentombi ezingenakubalwa."
SongOfSongs6:9 Hobe lam, wena oyinqambi, wedwa; nguye yedwa ovela kunina, nguye onyuliweyo walowo wamzalayo. Zambona iintombi, zamsikelela; Ewe, abatshakazi nabayeni, yaye baguquka."
SongOfSongs6:10 Ngubani na onjengentsasa, emhle njengenyanga, eqaqambileyo njengelanga, eyoyikeka njengemikhosi exhonywe ngebhanile?"
SongOfSongs6:11 Ndehla ndaya emyezweni weminoti ukuze ndibone iziqhamo zentlambo yomlambo oqukuqelayo, ukuze ndibone ukuba umdiliya awuphumelelanga na nokuba iirharnati zihlumile na."
SongOfSongs6:12 Bendisazi nje, umphefumlo wam undenze ndanjengenqwelo yokulwa ka-Aminadibhi;"
SongOfSongs6:13 Buya, buya, mShulamiti; buya, buya, ukuze sikujonge. Uza kubona ntoni eMoshulame? Iqela lemikhosi emibini, njengokuba kunjalo."
SongOfSongs7:1 Azi kuhle ukunyathela kwakho ngeembadada, ntombi yokumkani! Amalungu amanqe akho anjengamatye anqabileyo, umsebenzi wezandla ezinkulu."
SongOfSongs7:2 Iinkaba zakho zinjengendebe engqukuva, efuna kusezwa; isisu sakho siyimfumba yengqolowa ebiyelwe ngomdiza."
SongOfSongs7:3 Amabele akho omabini anjengamawele amabini.
SongOfSongs7:4 Intamo yakho injengenqaba yophondo lwendlovu; Amehlo akho anjengamachibi eentlanzi aseHeshbhon, esangweni leBharabhim; Impumlo yakho injengenqaba yaseLebhanon ekhangele eDamasko."
SongOfSongs7:5 Intloko yakho injengeKarmele, iinwele zentloko yakho zinjengosinga olubomvu; ukumkani ugcinwe evarandeni."
SongOfSongs7:6 Hayi, ubuhle bakho!"
SongOfSongs7:7 Ukumila kwakho kunjengomthi wesundu; Amabele akho anjengeediliya;
SongOfSongs7:8 Ndathi, Ndiya kukhwela emthini wesundu, ndiwanqumle amasebe awo; Ngoku, amabele akho anjengeediliya, nevumba lempumlo yakho libe njengeeapile;"
SongOfSongs7:9 Ikhuhlangubo lakho liyathandeka kum njengewayini enencasa, Yehla kamnandi, Ikhuphise umlomo wabaleleyo."
SongOfSongs7:10 Mna ndingowentanda yam, Umnqweno waso ukum."
SongOfSongs7:11 Yiza, sithandwa sam, sihambe siye emaphandleni; sihlala ezidolophini."
SongOfSongs7:12 Masivuke kusasa, siye ezidiliyeni; Makhe sibone ukuba iidiliya zintshula na, ukuba zikhahlela na iidiliya; Ndoninika khona abandithandayo."
SongOfSongs7:13 iMandereake inevumba elimnandi, yaye kwiminyango yethu kukho zonke iintlobo zeziqhamo ezilungileyo, ezitsha nezindala, endizibekele wena, sithandwa sam."
SongOfSongs8:1 Hayi, ubunjengodade wethu Owanyayo amabele kama! ukuba bendikufumene phandle, bendiya kukwanga; ewe, andifanelanga kugxekwa."
SongOfSongs8:2 Bendiya kukuqhuba, ndikuse endlwini kama, andifundise;"
SongOfSongs8:3 Isandla sakhe sokhohlo siya kuba phantsi kwentloko yam, Esokunene sakhe siya kundiwola."
SongOfSongs8:4 Zintombi zaseYerusalem, ndiyaniluleka, ndithi, musani ukuluvusa uthando lwam, musani ukuluvusa uthando lwam, nide nizivumele."
SongOfSongs8:5 Ngubani na onyuka evela entlango, aze ayame ngentanda yakhe? Ndakukhulisa phantsi kom-apile; kulapho wazalelwa khona unyoko; Wakuzalela khona owakuthwala."
SongOfSongs8:6 Ndibeke njengomsesane wokutywina entliziyweni yakho, njengomsesane wokutywina esandleni sakho; ngokuba uthando lunamandla njengokufa; Ikhwele libukrakra njengeBhodulabahu; Ukulamba kwalo ngamalahle omlilo."
SongOfSongs8:7 Amanzi amaninzi akanakulucima uthando;
SongOfSongs8:8 Sinodade wethu omncinane, Akakabi namabele; Kufuneka senze ntoni ngodade wethu xa kuthethwa ngaye?"
SongOfSongs8:9 Ukuba ludonga, sokwakha ibhotwe lesilivere phezu kwalo; ukuba lucango, solurhangqa ngamaplanga omsedare."
SongOfSongs8:10 Ndiludonga mna, namabele am anjengenqaba; ngoku ndandiliqabane elithandekayo emehlweni akhe."
SongOfSongs8:11 uSolomon ubenesidiliya eBhahali-hamon; Isidiliya wasinikela kubaveleli; yaziishekele eziliwaka zesilivere ngokwesiqhamo saso.
SongOfSongs8:12 Isidiliya sam, esesam, siphambi kwam; Wena Solomon uya kunikwa iwaka, yaye abo bagcina iziqhamo zabo baya kunikwa amakhulu amabini."
SongOfSongs8:13 Wena, bahleli emiyezweni, zizihlobo ilizwi lakho; mandiyive."
SongOfSongs8:14 Khawuleza, sithandwa sam, ube njengexhama nexhamakazi Ezintabeni zobulawu."
Isaiah1:1 Umbono kaIsaya unyana ka-Amotsi, awawubonayo ngokusingisele kuYuda neYerusalem, ngemihla ka-Uziya, noYotam, noAhazi, noHezekiya, ookumkani bakwaYuda."
Isaiah1:2 Yivani, mazulu, uve, hlabathi, ngokuba uYehova ethethile, esithi, Ndivelele, ndikhulise abantwana, bandizukisa ke bona."
Isaiah1:3 Inkomo iyawazi umniniyo, neesile liyawazi umkhumbi womniniyo, ukanti yena uSirayeli akaqondi, abantu bam abakhathali."
Isaiah1:4 Luhlanga lonayo, luhlanga luthwaxwa bubugwenxa, sizukulwana samanginingini, esiziinqambi; Bamnikela umva uYehova, bemgculela oyiNgcwele kaSirayeli, bajikile."
Isaiah1:5 Yini na ukuba usafuneke ubethwe? yonke intloko iyafa, yonke intliziyo idandathekile."
Isaiah1:6 Ukususela entendeni yonyawo kwesa entloko akukho mntu uphila kamnandi kuyo; ibingamanxeba, nemivumbo, namanxeba amatsha;"
Isaiah1:7 Ilizwe lenu liyinkangala, imizi yenu itshiswe ngomlilo; ilizwe lakho lidliwe ngabasemzini phambi kwakho, ngoku seliyinkangala, njengoko lalingcwatywe ngabasemzini."
Isaiah1:8 Isele ke intombi enguZiyon, njengokhula esidiliyeni, njengomandlalo entsimini yeekomkom, njengomzi ongqingiweyo."
Isaiah1:9 Ukuba uYehova wemikhosi ebengasishiyelanga nje abambalwa, singe saba njengeSodom, sisuke saba njengeGomora."
Isaiah1:10 Liveni ilizwi likaYehova, nina bokumkani baseSodom; wubekeleni indlebe umyalelo woThixo wethu, bantu baseGomora."
Isaiah1:11 Yeyani na kum le mibingelelo yenu mininzi kangaka? utsho uYehova. Ndanelisekile ngamadini anyukayo eenkunzi zeegusha, namanqatha amathole atyetyisiweyo; kwaye andikholiswanga ligazi leenkunzi zeenkomo, neleemvana, neleenciniba."
Isaiah1:12 Ukuba uza kubonakala phambi kwam, ngubani na oyalele ukuba ungene ezintendelezweni zam?"
Isaiah1:13 Nize ningabi sazisa izipho ezilambatha; Isiqhumiso silisikizi kum; ukuthwasa kwenyanga, nesabatha, nokukhala kwamabandla, andiyi kukuphelisa; bubungendawo, yitheko."
Isaiah1:14 Ukuthwasa kweenyanga zenu namatheko enu awawuthiyile umphefumlo wam; ilishwa kum; Ndidiniwe kukunxiba.
Isaiah1:15 Ukuba nithe nazolula izandla zenu, ndiya kuwafihla amehlo am kuni; ewe, ukuba nithandaza ngamandla, andiyi kuva; izandla zakho zizele ligazi."
Isaiah1:16 Zihlambe, uhlambuluke; susani ububi beentlondi zenu phambi kwamehlo am; yekani ukwenza ububi;"
Isaiah1:17 fundani ukwenza okulungileyo; gwebani ityala, gwebani ityala lenkedama; lindelani umhlolokazi."
Isaiah1:18 Khanize siyigwebe le nto, utsho uYehova; nokuba izono zenu zide zavela zayingqombela njengengqombela, zoba mhlophe njengekhephu; nokuba zide zayingqombela njengebala elibomvu, zovela zinjengoboya begusha."
Isaiah1:19 Ukuba nithe nathanda naphulaphula, nodla izinto ezilungileyo zelizwe;"
Isaiah1:20 Ukuba nithe anavuma, naqhayisa, nobhujiswa likrele, kuba umlomo kaYehova uthethile."
Isaiah1:21 Utheni na ukuba lihenyukazi umzi lo, ubunyanisile; ubuzele kukugweba; bekuhlala ubulungisa khona; kodwa ngoku ingababulali."
Isaiah1:22 Isilivere yakho isuke yaba ligwebu, iwayini yakho entle ingxengelelwe ngamanzi;"
Isaiah1:23 Abathetheli bakho ngabakreqi, ngamadlelana namasela; wonke umntu uyazithanda izipho kwaye usukela imivuzo; abaligwebi inkedama, ityala lomhlolokazi alifiki kubo."
Isaiah1:24 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi, uYehova wemikhosi, imbalasane yakwaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ndiya kuzisindisa ezintshabeni zam, ndiphindezele impindezelo ezintshabeni zam."
Isaiah1:25 Ndiya kusibuyisela phezu kwakho isandla sam, ndikuhlambe ukungcola kwakho, ndisuse zonke izinqe zakho."
Isaiah1:26 Ndobabuyisa abagwebi bakho njengokwasekuqaleni, namaphakathi akho njengokwamatanci; emva koko uya kubizwa ngokuba ngumzi wobulungisa, umzi othembekileyo."
Isaiah1:27 iZiyon iya kukhululwa ngokusesikweni, nabaguquki bayo ngokusesikweni;"
Isaiah1:28 Ukutshatyalaliswa kwabakreqi naboni kuya kuba kunye, nabo bamshiyileyo uYehova baya kutshabalala."
Isaiah1:29 Ngokuba baya kudana ngenxa yemioki ebeniyinqwenela, nibe neentloni yimiyezo eniyinyulileyo;"
Isaiah1:30 ngenxa yokuba niya kuba njengomthi wom-oki omagqabi omileyo, nanjengomyezo ongenamanzi;"
Isaiah1:31 nenjengele ibe njengentambo, nomenzi wayo ube yintlantsi, kutshe kuphele kokubini kunye, kungabikho ucimayo."
Isaiah2:1 Ilizwi awalibonayo uIsaya unyana ka-Amotsi, ngokusingisele kuYuda neYerusalem."
Isaiah2:2 Ekupheleni kwemihla, intaba yendlu kaYehova iya kuma encotsheni yazo iintaba, izongamele iinduli; zonke izizwe ziya kuthontelana khona."
Isaiah2:3 Kwaye abantu abaninzi baya kuhamba kwaye bathi: Yizani, masinyuke siye entabeni yeNkosi, endlwini yoThixo kaYakobi; asiyalele iindlela zakhe, sihambe ngeendlela zakhe; ngenxa yokuba umthetho nelizwi likaYehova liya kuphuma eZiyon liye eYerusalem."
Isaiah2:4 Uya kugweba phakathi kweentlanga, ohlwaye iintlanga ezininzi, ziwakhande amakrele azo abe ngamarhengqa, nezikhali zazo zibe zizikere zokuthena imithi;"
Isaiah2:5 Nina bendlu kaYakobi, yizani sihambe ekukhanyeni kukaYehova."
Isaiah2:6 Ngenxa yoko ubanikele umva abantu bakho, indlu kaYakobi; ngokuba beze empumalanga, besenza amatola njengamaFilisti, betsaleleke koonyana bezinye iintlanga."
Isaiah2:7 Ilizwe labo lizele yisilivere negolide, nobuncwane babo buyiphela; ilizwe labo lizele ngamahashe, neenqwelo zokulwa zabo azinasiphelo."
Isaiah2:8 Kwaye ihlabathi labo lizele zizithixo; baqubuda kumsebenzi wezandla zabo, owenziwe yiminwe yabo;"
Isaiah2:9 Kwaye indoda encinci yaqubuda, kwaye indoda enkulu yazithoba; ke ngoko, musani ukubaxolela."
Isaiah2:10 Ngena eliweni uze uzifihle eluthulini ngenxa yokoyika uYehova nangenxa yobukhulu bakhe.
Isaiah2:11 Amehlo aphakamileyo abantu aya kuthotywa, neqhayiya labantu liya kuthotywa, yaye ngaloo mini nguYehova yedwa oya kuphakanyiswa."
Isaiah2:12 Kuba imini kaYehova wemikhosi iya kuba phezu kwabo bonke abanekratshi, abaziphakamisayo, nabo bonke abaziphakamisayo; kwaye uya kuthotywa."
Isaiah2:13 Nemisedare yonke emide, emide yaseLebhanon, nemioki yonke yaseBhashan;"
Isaiah2:14 nasezindulini zonke ezinde, nasezindulini zonke eziphakamileyo;"
Isaiah2:15 naphezu kweenqaba zonke ezinde, nasezindongeni zonke ezakhiweyo iindonga;"
Isaiah2:16 nakwiinqanawa zonke zaseTarshishe, nakuyo yonke imifanekiso eqingqiweyo."
Isaiah2:17 Ukuphakama kwendoda kuya kuthotywa, nokuphakama kwabantu kuthotywe; yaye nguYehova yedwa oya kuba mkhulu ngaloo mini."
Isaiah2:18 Yaye uya kuzitshabalalisa ngokupheleleyo izithixo.
Isaiah2:19 Kwaye baya kungena emaphandleni nakwimingxuma yomhlaba ngenxa yokoyika uYehova nangenxa yozuko lobungangamsha bakhe, ekuphakameni kwakhe ukuze ashukumise umhlaba."
Isaiah2:20 Ngaloo mini umntu uya kuyiphosa ezinambuzaneni naselulwaneni imifanekiso yakhe yesilivere, nemifanekiso yakhe yegolide, abayenzele ukuyinqula;"
Isaiah2:21 ukuba bangene ezimfanteni zeengxondorha nomkhenkce weengxondorha, ngenxa yokoyika uYehova, nangenxa yozuko lobukhulu bakhe, ekumeni kwakhe ukuba alinyikimise ihlabathi."
Isaiah2:22 Myeke umntu omphefumlo usemathatheni akhe, ngokuba uya kufundelwa ntoni na?"
Isaiah3:1 Ngokuba, yabonani, iNkosi, uYehova wemikhosi, ithabatha iYerusalem neYerusalem, ingumsimelelo, nomsimelelo, nomsimelelo wonke, nomsimelelo wamanzi;"
Isaiah3:2 igorha negorha, umgwebi nomprofeti, indoda elumkileyo, eqolileyo;"
Isaiah3:3 yingqwayi-ngqwayi yamashumi amahlanu, nobekekileyo, nongumcebisi, nesifundiswa esisisilumko, nothetha olulumkileyo."
Isaiah3:4 Ndobanika oonyana babe ngabathetheli babo, nabantwana babalawule;"
Isaiah3:5 Ziya kucinezelana iintlanga, elowo engowakowabo;"
Isaiah3:6 Kwathi, xa omnye wamthabathayo umzalwana wakhe endlwini kayise, wathi, Nina ninengubo, sikhonzeni;"
Isaiah3:7 Wofunga ngaloo mini, athi, Andiyi kuba ngugqirha; ngokuba endlwini yam akukho sonka nangubo; musa ukundenza umlawuli wesizwe."
Isaiah3:8 Kuba iYerusalem iphangiwe noYuda uwile, ngenxa yokuba iilwimi zabo nezenzo zabo zinxamnye noYehova ukuze bawacaphukise amehlo ozuko lwakhe."
Isaiah3:9 Imbonakalo yobuso babo iyangqina ngabo; bayaxela izono zabo njengeSodom, abakhanyeli. Yeha imiphefumlo yabo! ngokuba baziphindezelele ngobubi."
Isaiah3:10 Yithi kumalungisa, izinto ziya kumhambela kakuhle, ngokuba aya kudla iziqhamo zezenzo zawo."
Isaiah3:11 Yeha, ongendawo! kuya kuba kubi kuye, ngokuba uya kunikwa umvuzo wezandla zakhe."
Isaiah3:12 Ke bona abantu bam, ngabacinezeli babo, balawulwa ngabafazi. Bantu bam, abo banilahlekisayo, bawonakalisayo umendo weendlela zenu."
Isaiah3:13 uYehova umi ukuze abalamlele, yaye umi ukuze agwebe uhlanga."
Isaiah3:14 uYehova uya kungena ematyaleni namadoda amakhulu abantu bakhe, nabathetheli bakhe, ngenxa yokuba nisidlile isidiliya; amaxhoba eentsizana asezindlwini zenu."
Isaiah3:15 Nithini na xa nibatyumza abantu bam naxa nisila ubuso babaxhwalekileyo? itsho iNkosi, uYehova wemikhosi."
Isaiah3:16 Ngaphezu koko, utsho uYehova ukuthi: “Kungenxa yokuba iintombi zaseZiyon zikhukhumele, zihamba ngeentamo namehlo etyeketyeke, zihamba zigila, zihexa ngeenyawo."
Isaiah3:17 Ngako oko, iNkosi iya kuzibetha ngesando iintloko zeentombi zaseZiyon, uYehova azihlube iindawo zazo zokusithela."
Isaiah3:18 Ngaloo mini uYehova uya kuzisusa izivatho zabo eziduma ezinyaweni zabo, nezidanga zabo nezibopho zabo njengenyanga."
Isaiah3:19 Amakhamandi nezacholo nenkunkuma;
Isaiah3:20 neminqwazi, nezidanga, nezithsaba, neetafile, namajikazi;"
Isaiah3:21 Amakhonkco nezacholo zempumlo,"
Isaiah3:22 iingubo, iingubo, iingubo, iingubo;"
Isaiah3:23 iiglasi, nelinen ecikizekileyo, neminqwazi, namalaphu."
Isaiah3:24 Endaweni yevumba elimnandi kuya kubakho ivumba; kwibhanti yamagxa; nangenxa yenkqayi elungiswe kakuhle; nasendaweni yesicakazana nesinqe setyala; nokutshisa ngenxa yobuhle.
Isaiah3:25 Amadoda akho aya kuwa likrele, namagorha akho emfazweni;"
Isaiah3:26 Kwaye amasango ayo aya kukhala, akhale; ke yena otshabalalayo uya kudla ubomi ehlabathini."
Isaiah4:1 Ngaloo mini abafazi abasixhenxe bobambelela ndodeni-nye, besithi, Sodla isonka sethu, sambathe iingubo zethu; masibhenele egameni lakho, ukuba sikususe ukucukucezwa kwethu."
Isaiah4:2 Ngaloo mini iqashiso likaYehova liya kuba lihle, liqaqambe, nesiqhamo somhlaba sibe sihle size sibe nomtsalane kwabasindileyo bakwaSirayeli."
Isaiah4:3 Wothi oseleyo eZiyon, noseleyo eYerusalem, kuthiwe ungcwele, bonke ababhaliweyo phakathi kwabadla ubomi eYerusalem;"
Isaiah4:4 ekuhlambeni kukaYehova ukungcola kweentombi zaseZiyon, yalihlambulula igazi leYerusalem kuyo ngomoya wogwebo, nangomoya womlilo."
Isaiah4:5 uYehova uya kudala phezu kwayo yonke indawo yokuhlala yeNtaba yeZiyon naphezu kwamabandla ayo ilifu elingumsi emini nokukhanya komlilo ovuthayo ebusuku, kuba kuya kubakho indawo yokusithela phezu ‘kozuko lonke."
Isaiah4:6 Kuya kubakho umnquba njengomthunzi emini ekubaleleni kwelanga, nendawo yokusabela, neyokusithela esiphangweni nasemvuleni."
Isaiah5:1 Intanda yam makhe ndiyivumele ingoma yentanda yam, ngesidiliya sayo. Intanda yam inesidiliya endulini echumayo."
Isaiah5:2 Wasakha ngothango, wakhupha amatye aso, watyala owona mdiliya ubalaseleyo, wakha inyango phakathi kwaso, wenza nesixovulelo kuso; wayelindele ukuba sivelise iidiliya, sivelise iidiliya zelizwe."
Isaiah5:3 Kaloku ke, bemi baseYerusalem, nani madoda akwaYuda, gwebani phakathi kwam nesidiliya sam;"
Isaiah5:4 Kunokwenziwa ntoni na esidiliyeni sam, endingayenzanga ke kuso? Yini na ukuba ndilinde ukuba sivelise iidiliya, sisuke sivelise iidiliya zomhlaba?"
Isaiah5:5 Yiyani ngoku; Ke kaloku makhe ndinazise into endiya kusenza yona isidiliya sam ndiludilizile udonga lwaso, ibe siya kunyhashwa."
Isaiah5:6 Ndolitshabalalisa ke, aliyi kugawulwa, aliyi kumbiwa; kodwa imithana enameva iya kuhluma ndiya kuwawisela umthetho amafu ukuba anganisi mvula."
Isaiah5:7 Kuba isidiliya sikaYehova wemikhosi yindlu kaSirayeli, namadoda akwaYuda sisityalo sokumyolisa; funa ubulungisa, nanku ikhala."
Isaiah5:8 Yeha, abahlomela indlu kwindlu, abasondeza intsimi kwindima eyiekile, kude kungabikho ndawo, nihlale nedwa phakathi kwelizwe!"
Isaiah5:9 uYehova wemikhosi uthethe ezindlebeni zam, wathi, Inene, izindlu ezininzi ziya kuba ngamanxuwa, ezinkulu, ezintle, zingabi namhlali."
Isaiah5:10 Kuba ishumi leendima zesidiliya liya kuvelisa ibhete enye, nembewu yehomere yenze iefa."
Isaiah5:11 Yeha, abavuka kusasa belandela isiselo esinxilisayo; balala kude kube sebusuku, ide ibatshise iwayini."
Isaiah5:12 Ugwali, nogwali, neqebengwana, nogwali, newayini, emgidini wabo;"
Isaiah5:13 Kungenxa yoko le nto abantu bam bathinjwa bengazi;
Isaiah5:14 Ngeso sizathu, izihogo zawukhulisa, zaza zawuvula umlomo wawo ngokungenamlinganiselo, nozuko lwazo, nesihlwele sazo, nozuko lwazo, ezigcobayo, ziya kuhla phezu kwalo."
Isaiah5:15 Ke yena umncinane uya kuthotywa, neqhawe lithotywe, athotywe amehlo abaphakamileyo;"
Isaiah5:16 Ke yena uYehova wemikhosi uya kuziphakamisa ngogwebo, azingcwalise uThixo oyiNgcwele ngobulungisa."
Isaiah5:17 Kuya kwandula ke amatakane adle ngendlela yawo, yaye okuseleyo kwezityebileyo kuya kudla abasemzini."
Isaiah5:18 Yeha, abatsala ubugwenxa ngeentsontelo zenkohlakalo, nesono njengentsontelo yenqwelo!"
Isaiah5:19 abathi, Makawukhawulezise umsebenzi wakhe, siwubone; malisondele, lize icebo loyiNgcwele kaSirayeli, ukuze silazi."
Isaiah5:20 Yeha, abathi okubi kulungile, okulungileyo kubi; into eyenza ubumnyama bube kukukhanya, ukukhanya kube bubumnyama; obeka ubukrakra endaweni yobumnandi nencasa endaweni yobukrakra!"
Isaiah5:21 Yeha, abazibona belumkile, banengqondo kwawabo amehlo!"
Isaiah5:22 Yeha ke izigantsontso ezisela iwayini, namadoda anamandla aphithikeza isiselo esinxilisayo;"
Isaiah5:23 othi ongendawo ulilungisa ngenxa yomvuzo, abushenxise kuye ubulungisa belungisa!"
Isaiah5:24 Ngako oko, njengokuba umlilo uzitshisa iindiza, nelangatye liwudla umququ, ingcambu yabo iya kuba njengokubola, nentyantyambo yabo inyuke njengothuli; ngokuba bewucekisile umyalelo kaYehova wemikhosi, balicekisile ilizwi labo yeenkundla. Oyingcwele kaSirayeli."
Isaiah5:25 Wavutha ke umsindo kaYehova kubantu bakhe, usolula phezu kwabo isandla sakhe, waboyisa; Ngenxa yoko awubuyanga umsindo wakhe, kodwa isandla sakhe sisasolulile."
Isaiah5:26 Uya kuziphakamisela ibhanile iintlanga ezikude, azivuthele isigodlo kuzo, zivela eziphelweni zehlabathi; kwaye yabona, baya kuza kamsinya."
Isaiah5:27 Akukho utyhafileyo, akayi kukhubeka kuzo; akuyi kulala, akuyi kulala mntu; umbhinqo wamanqe azo awusayi kuthukuluka, nomtya weembadada zazo awusayi kunqunyulwa."
Isaiah5:28 Iintolo zazo zitsolile, nezaphetha zazo zonke zityediwe; neempuphu zamahashe abo zibalelwa njengelitye elinqabileyo;"
Isaiah5:29 Ukugquma kwabo kuya kuba njengengonyama, bagqume njengengonyama; ewe, baya kubharhula, bahluthe okuphangiweyo, balithabathe benoxolo, kungabikho ulihlangulayo."
Isaiah5:30 Zogquma phezu kwabo ngaloo mini, njengokugquma kolwandle; yaye xa ubani ekhangela ehlabathini, khangela, kukho ubumnyama nosizi, nokukhanya nobumnyama emazulwini alo."
Isaiah6:1 Ngomnyaka wokufa kuka-Osiya ukumkani, ndambona uYehova ehleli etroneni ende, ephakamileyo, isambatho sakhe sizalise itempile."
Isaiah6:2 Kumi iipiramidi phezu kwayo, iyileyo inamaphiko amathandathu; ngamabini ifihle ubuso bayo, ngamabini ifihle iinyawo zayo, ngamabini iphaphazela."
Isaiah6:3 Waza omnye wabiza omnye wathi, Ulilungisa, ulilungisa, ulilungisa, unguKumkani waseMasomomo; ihlabathi lizele bubuqaqawuli bakhe."
Isaiah6:4 Zashukuma iiplanga lilizwi lodandulukayo, nendlu yazala ngumsi."
Isaiah6:5 Ndaza ndathi: “Yeha ke mna! ngokuba nditshatyalalisiwe; kuba ndiyindoda enemilebe emdaka, kwaye ndihlala phakathi kwabantu abanemilebe emdaka; ngokuba amehlo am abone iNkosi, uYehova wemikhosi."
Isaiah6:6 Yaphaphazela yeza kum enye iserafi, iphethe ilahle elivuthayo ngesandla sayo, eyalithabatha ngesandla sayo esibingelelweni;"
Isaiah6:7 yazibeka emlonyeni wam, yathi, Khangela, uchukumise izandla zakho; bususiwe ubugwenxa bakho, sihlanjululwe isono sakho."
Isaiah6:8 Kananjalo ndeva izwi likaYehova, lisithi, Ndothuma bani na? Ngubani na owosiyela? Ndathi ke, Ndikho; ndithumelele."
Isaiah6:9 Wathi, Yiya, uthi kwaba bantu, Yivani, nive, ningaqondi; uyabona, kodwa akuboni."
Isaiah6:10 Yityebise intliziyo yaba bantu, wenze lukhuni iindlebe zabo, uwavale amehlo abo; hleze babone ngamehlo, beve ngeendlebe zabo, baqonde ngeentliziyo zabo, baguquke, baze baphiliswe."
Isaiah6:11 Ndathi ke, Nkosi, koda kube nini na? Saphendula sathi, Ide yonakale imizi, ingabi nabemi, ingabi nabemi, litshabalale ilizwe;"
Isaiah6:12 uYehova wabafudusela kude abantu, kwabakho ukuphanziswa okukhulu ezweni."
Isaiah6:13 Kusaya kubakho isahlulo seshumi sawo, sibuye sidliwe; ngaloo ndlela imbewu engcwele iya kuba bubutyebi bayo."
Isaiah7:1 Ngemihla ka-Ahazi, unyana kaYotam, unyana ka-Uziya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, wayifikela iYerusalem uRetsin, ukumkani wakwa-Aram, noPeka, unyana kaRemaliya, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli kodwa akazange akwazi ukoyisa."
Isaiah7:2 Kwaxelwa kwindlu kaDavide, kwathiwa, Ama-Aram enze umnqophiso noEfrayim. Yadidizela intliziyo yakhe, nentliziyo yabantu bakhe, njengokudidizela kwemithi yehlathi phambi komoya."
Isaiah7:3 Wathi uYehova kuIsaya, Hamba uye kumkhawulela ngoku uAhazi, wena noShehare-yasub unyana wakho, ekupheleni komjelo wechibi eliphezulu, emendweni ongasentsimini yomxovuli weengubo;"
Isaiah7:4 Wathi kuye, Zikhangele, uthi cwaka; Musa ukoyika, ungaqhiphuki umbilini ngenxa yaloo misila mibini iqhumayo, ngenxa yomsindo kaRetsine kuma-Aram nonyana kaRemaliya."
Isaiah7:5 Ngenxa enokuba ama-Aram, uEfrayim, nonyana kaRemaliya, becebe ngawe, besithi,"
Isaiah7:6 Masimhlasele uYuda size simdinise, yaye masimenze abe nekhwele, simisele ukumkani phakathi kwakhe, unyana kaTabhehali."
Isaiah7:7 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Loo mbambano ayiyi kubakho, ingabikho."
Isaiah7:8 Ngokuba intloko yama-Aram yiDamasko, intloko yeDamasko nguRetsin; phambi kweminyaka engamashumi amathandathu anesihlanu uEfrayim uya kwaphulwa, angabi luhlanga."
Isaiah7:9 Intloko yamaEfrayim kukwaSamari, intloko yakwaSamari ngunyana kaRemaliya. Ukuba awukholwa, awuyi kuqinisekiswa."
Isaiah7:10 Waphinda uYehova wathetha kuAhazi, esithi:"
Isaiah7:11 Zicelele umqondiso kuYehova uThixo wakho; intle, nokuba unzulu, nokuba uphezulu."
Isaiah7:12 Wathi uAhazi, Andiyi kucela, andiyi kumlinga uYehova."
Isaiah7:13 Wathi, Phulaphulani, nina bendlu kaDavide! Yinto encinane le kuni ukuba nihlisele ishwangusha, nimbandezele uThixo wam?"
Isaiah7:14 Ke ngoko, iNkosi ngokuqinisekileyo iya kuninika umqondiso; Uyabona, intombi le iya kumitha, izale unyana, imthiye igama elinguEmanuweli."
Isaiah7:15 Uya kudla ubusi nobusi, ukuze alahle ububi, anyule okulungileyo."
Isaiah7:16 Kuba ngaphambi kokuba loo nkwenkwe ikwazi ukugatya okubi nokukhetha okulungileyo, ilizwe olithiyileyo liya kushiywa ngookumkani balo ababini."
Isaiah7:17 uYehova wozisa wena nabantu bakho, nendlu kayihlo, imihla ekungazanga kubekho ingangayo, kususela koko wemkayo uEfrayim kwaYuda; nokumkani waseAsiriya."
Isaiah7:18 Ngaloo mini uYehova uya kubetha ikhwelo phezu kwempukane esesiphelweni semilambo yaseYiputa naphezu kwenyosi esezweni laseAsiriya.
Isaiah7:19 Kwaye ziya kufika ziphumle zonke emingxunyeni nasengxondorheni nakuwo onke ameva nakuwo onke ameva.
Isaiah7:20 Ngaloo mini uYehova uya kuyicheba intloko noboya bemilenze ngesitshetshe esiqeshiweyo sokumkani waseAsiriya phesheya koMnayile, uzidle iindevu."
Isaiah7:21 Ngaloo mini umntu uya kwalusa inkuku neegusha ezimbini;
Isaiah7:22 Ngenxa yobutyebi bobisi bazo, niya kudla ibhotolo; ngokuba bonke abaseleyo belizwe baya kudla incindi nobusi."
Isaiah7:23 Ngaloo mini zonke iindawo ezazinewaka lemidiliya enewaka leesilivere, ziya kuba yimithana enameva neenkunzane."
Isaiah7:24 Kuya kufika abantu khona bephethe izaphetha neentolo; ngokuba lonke ilizwe liya kuba yimithana enameva neenkunzane.
Isaiah7:25 Kuzo zonke iintaba eziya kombiwa ngentonga, akuyi koyikwa yimithana enameva namakhakakhaka, kodwa iya kuba yindawo yokugxotha iinkomo nokunyathela amathole."
Isaiah8:1 Wathi uYehova kum, Thabatha incwadi esongwayo enkulu, ubhale kuyo ngosiba lomntu, uthi, Mahersal-hasbhas;"
Isaiah8:2 Ndathabatha amangqina am athembekileyo ukuze ndiwabhale, umbingeleli u-Uriya noZekariya unyana kaYeberekiya."
Isaiah8:3 Ndafika kumprofetikazi; wakhawula, wazala unyana. Wathi uYehova kum, Mbize ngokuba nguMahersal-hasbhas."
Isaiah8:4 Kuba ngaphambi kokuba umntwana akwazi ukubiza ngokuthi: “Tata noMama, ubutyebi baseDamasko namaxhoba aseSamariya aya kuthwalelwa phambi kokumkani waseAsiriya."
Isaiah8:5 Waphinda uYehova wathetha kum, esithi:"
Isaiah8:6 Kuthiwa abantu bala kuwo amanzi aseSilowa awawa ngobunono kwaye bagcoba ngoRetsin nonyana kaRemaliya;
Isaiah8:7 Ngako oko, yabonani, iNkosi iwazisela amanzi omlambo, ukuba ngamandla, maninzi, ukuze awafikele, ukumkani waseAsiriya nobuqaqawuli bakhe bonke; uya kunyuka aye emideni yayo yonke, aludlule lonke unxweme lwalo,"
Isaiah8:8 liya kucanda kwaYuda; uya kuvula, adlule, afike entanyeni; ukunaba kwamaphiko akhe kuya kuzalisa ububanzi belizwe lakho, Emanuweli!"
Isaiah8:9 Yibani mnandi, nityunyuzwe; niphulaphule, nonke mazwe akude; zibopheni, niqotywe; zibopheni, niqotywe."
Isaiah8:10 Cebani icebo, lotshitsha; Thethani ilizwi, aliyi kubakho; ngokuba uThixo unathi."
Isaiah8:11 Kuba wenjenje uYehova ukuthetha kum ngesandla esomeleleyo waza wandiyalela ukuba ndingahambi ngendlela yolu hlanga, wathi:"
Isaiah8:12 Musa ukuthi, Ngumnqophiso wabo bonke abathi abo bantu, Ngumnqophiso; musani ukoyika ukunkwantya kwabo, musani ukoyika."
Isaiah8:13 Mbongeni uYehova wemikhosi; kwaye makabe luloyiko kuni, kwaye makabe nguye uloyiko kuni."
Isaiah8:14 Yoba yingcwele; ke kuzo zombini izindlu zakwaSirayeli iya kuba yisikhubekiso, nesikhubekiso, nomgibe nomgibe kubemi baseYerusalem."
Isaiah8:15 Abaninzi kubo baya kukhubeka bawe, baphuke, batshiswe, babanjiswe."
Isaiah8:16 Bopha ubungqina, uwuqinise umthetho phakathi kwabafundi bam."
Isaiah8:17 Ndiya kulindela kuYehova obufihlayo ubuso bakhe kwindlu kaYakobi, ndize ndimfune."
Isaiah8:18 Yabona, mna nabantwana andinikileyo uYehova, singabemiqondiso nezimanga kwaSirayeli, ezivela kuYehova wemikhosi, ulohlala entabeni yaseZiyon."
Isaiah8:19 Xa bathe kuni, Quqelani kwimimoya yabafileyo, nabakhafuli abalalelayo, abaxokozelayo, abantu abayi kumquqela na uThixo wabo? ngabaphilayo kwabafileyo?"
Isaiah8:20 Kuwo umyalelo nakubungqina, Ukuba abathanga bathethe eli lizwi, boba abanasifingo."
Isaiah8:21 Baya kucanda kulo, bengaginywanga, belambile; kwaye xa belambile, baya kuba nomsindo, baqalekise ukumkani wabo noThixo wabo, baze bajonge phezulu."
Isaiah8:22 Kwaye baya kuya ehlabathini; nanko kukho imbandezelo nobumnyama; kwaye baya kuqhutywa ebumnyameni.
Isaiah9:1 Ke yena ubumnyama abuyi kuba njengomsindo wakhe, ekulitshutshiseni kwakhe ilizwe lakwaZebhulon nelizwe lakwaNafetali umzuzwana, wabatshutshisa kakubi endleleni eya elwandle, phesheya kweYordan, iGalili yeentlanga."
Isaiah9:2 Ke abo bahamba ebumnyameni babone ukukhanya okukhulu; abo bahleli ethunzini lokufa bakhanyiselwa kukukhanya.
Isaiah9:3 Ubandisile abantu, akwandise luvuyo;"
Isaiah9:4 Ngokuba uyaphule idyokhwe yomthwalo wabo, umsimelelo osemagxeni abo, nomsimelelo womxinzeleli wabo, njengoko kwakunjalo ngemihla yakwaMidiyan."
Isaiah9:5 Kuba yonke imfazwe yegorha inesandi esididekileyo, neengubo zizele ligazi; kodwa kuya kuba kumlilo nakukudla."
Isaiah9:6 Kuba sizalelwe umntwana, sinikwe unyana; ukuthethela kusegxalabeni lakhe, ukubizwa kwakhe kuthiwe nguMmangaliso, nguMcebisi, uThixo oligorha, nguSonini-nanini, nguMthetheli woxolo."
Isaiah9:7 Akuyi kubakho ukwanda kolongamo noxolo ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo etroneni kaDavide nasebukumkanini bakhe ukuze abuqinise buqinise ngobulungisa nangokusesikweni ukususela ngoku kuse kwixesha elingenammiselo. Ubukhwele bukaYehova wemikhosi buya kukwenza oko.
Isaiah9:8 uYehova wathumela ilizwi kuYakobi, lamndulula ke uSirayeli."
Isaiah9:9 Kwaye bonke abantu baya kwazi, oko kukuthi, uEfrayim nabemi bakwaSamari, abathetha ngekratshi nangentliziyo eqinileyo."
Isaiah9:10 Izitena ziwile, siya kwakha ngamatye aqingqiweyo; imithombe igawulwe, siya kuyitshintsha ibe yimisedare."
Isaiah9:11 Ngako oko uYehova uya kubavelisela abachasi bakaRetsine, azihlanganisele ndawonye iintshaba zakhe;"
Isaiah9:12 Ama-Aram engaphambili, amaFilisti ngasemva; kwaye ziya kudla uSirayeli ngomlomo ovulekileyo. Ngenxa yoko awubuyanga umsindo wakhe, kodwa isandla sakhe sisasolulile."
Isaiah9:13 Kuba uhlanga alubuyelanga kuLowo ulohlwayayo, yaye alukhange lufune uYehova wemikhosi."
Isaiah9:14 Kungenxa yoko le nto uYehova eya kumnqumla uSirayeli intloko nomsila, isebe nerhengqa ngamini-nye."
Isaiah9:15 Indoda enkulu nebekekileyo, yintloko ke leyo; yaye umprofeti ofundisa ubuxoki ngumsila."
Isaiah9:16 Ngokuba abathetheli baba bantu babandwendwisa; nabo bakhokelwa zizo bayatshabalala.
Isaiah9:17 Ke ngoko, iNkosi ayiyi kukholiswa ngabo bafana babo, kwaye ayiyi kuba namfesane kubo nabahlolokazi, ngenxa yokuba bonke bangabahanahanisi nabakhohlisayo, kwaye yonke imilomo ithetha ubudenge. Ngenxa yoko awubuyanga umsindo wakhe, kodwa isandla sakhe sisasolulile."
Isaiah9:18 Kuba okungendawo kuvutha njengomlilo, kutshisa imithana enameva neenkunzane, liwatshise amatyholo, linyuke njengomsi."
Isaiah9:19 Ngokuvutha komsindo kaYehova wemikhosi umhlaba wenziwa mnyama, neentlanga ziya kuba njengamalahle avuthayo; Akukho bani uya kumconga umzalwana wakhe."
Isaiah9:20 Uya kusikrazula isandla sakhe sokunene, walambe; ngasekhohlo uya kudla, bangahluthi; elowo adle inyama yesandla sakhe;"
Isaiah9:21 uManase, uEfrayim; noEfrayim noManase, bona kunye baya kuba nxamnye noYuda. Ngenxa yoko awubuyanga umsindo wakhe, kodwa isandla sakhe sisasolulile."
Isaiah10:1 Yeha, abamisa umthetho, nababhala phantsi imizekeliso;"
Isaiah10:2 Ukuphambukisa osweleyo koko kulungileyo nokuhlutha okusesikweni kwabasweleyo bohlanga lwam, ukuze abahlolokazi babe lixhoba labo, neenkedama ziphangwe!"
Isaiah10:3 Niya kuthini na ke ngomhla wokuvelelwa kwenu, nivela kude? Uya kubalekela kubani na ukuba akuncede? ulushiye phi na uzuko lwakho?"
Isaiah10:4 Ngaphandle kwam baya kuguqa phakathi kwabathinjwa, bawe phakathi kwababuleweyo. Ngenxa yoko awubuyanga umsindo wakhe, kodwa isandla sakhe sisasolulile."
Isaiah10:5 uAsiriya, luswazi lomsindo wam, luswazi olusesandleni sabo ngumsindo wam."
Isaiah10:6 Ndiza kumthumela kuhlanga lwabahanahanisi, yaye ndiya kumyalela nxamnye nabantu bomsindo wam ukuba athabathe okuthinjiweyo aze athabathe into ethinjiweyo aze abanyathele njengodaka ezitratweni."
Isaiah10:7 Ke akenjinjalo; intliziyo yakhe ayiyicingi loo nto; kodwa kusentliziyweni yakhe ukutshabalalisa nokutshabalalisa iintlanga ezimbalwa.
Isaiah10:8 Kuba uthi, Abathetheli bam asingookumkani ngokupheleleyo na?"
Isaiah10:9 iKalno ayifane na neKarkemishe? Xa ndithi, iHamati ayinjengeArpadi? iSamariya ayinjengeDamasko na?"
Isaiah10:10 Njengoko isandla sam sazifumanayo izikumkani zemifanekiso eqingqiweyo, ezinemifanekiso yazo eqingqiweyo yadlula kuyo, iYerusalem neSamariya;"
Isaiah10:11 andiyi kuthi na ke ndiyenze kwiYerusalem nezithixo zayo, njengoko ndenza ngako kowakwaSamari nezithixo zawo ezingeni?"
Isaiah10:12 Ngako oko, xa ithe iNkosi yawugqiba wonke umsebenzi wayo entabeni yeZiyon naseYerusalem, ndozivelela iziqhamo zentliziyo eqinileyo yokumkani waseAsiriya, nesihombo sozuko lwakhe."
Isaiah10:13 Ngokuba wathi, Ndenza ngamandla esandla sam, nangobulumko bam; ngenxa enokuba ndilumkile, ndayishenxisa imida yezizwe, ndabuthabatha ubuncwane babo, ndabaphanzisa abantu njengendoda enobukroti."
Isaiah10:14 Sabufumana isandla sam ubutyebi bezizwe njengendlu yentaka, ndalibutha mna lonke ihlabathi, njengokubutha amaqanda; akwabakho namnye oshukumisa iphiko, evula umlomo, akakroba."
Isaiah10:15 Izembe lingamqhayisela na umnqunquli walo? Okanye isarha iya kuziphakamisela kulowo uyishukumisayo? kube ngathi iphiko livuthelwa ngabasithwaliyo, okanye kube ngathi lithwalwa intshontsho ngokungathi alikho esigodoni."
Isaiah10:16 Ngako oko uYehova, uYehova wemikhosi, uya kuwathumela iintlungu phakathi kwamanqatha akhe; phantsi kokukhanya kwakhe uya kuphemba umlilo njengomlilo ovuthayo."
Isaiah10:17 Ukhanyiso lukaSirayeli luya kuba ngumlilo, oyiNgcwele wakhe abe lilangatye; kwaye ngenye imini liya kutshisa, litshise ameva alo nameva;"
Isaiah10:18 yaye uya kulutshabalalisa uzuko lwehlathi lakhe nolwelizwe lakhe elinemveliso, umphefumlo nomzimba, yaye ziya kuba njengokufa komthwali-mthetho."
Isaiah10:19 Imithi eseleyo yehlathi lakhe iya kuba buthathaka, ukuze inkwenkwe ibhale phantsi."
Isaiah10:20 Kuya kuthi ngaloo mini, angabi sahlala amasalela akwaSirayeli, nabasindileyo bendlu kaYakobi, nabawaxabelayo; kodwa mna ngokuqinisekileyo ndiya kuma phambi koYehova, Lowo Ungcwele kaSirayeli."
Isaiah10:21 Amasalela aya kubuya, amasalela akwaYakobi, abuyele kuThixo oligorha."
Isaiah10:22 Kuba nangona uhlanga lwakho, Sirayeli, belunjengentlabathi yaselwandle, obuya kubuya amasalela alo;"
Isaiah10:23 Kuba iNkosi enguMongami uYehova wemikhosi iza kuzisa intshabalalo, ewe, izaliseke kulo lonke ilizwe."
Isaiah10:24 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Bantu bam, bemi eZiyon, musani ukuyoyika uAsiriya;"
Isaiah10:25 Ngokuba lisaya kuba lifutshane ixesha, ukuba iphele ingqumbo, nomsindo wam ubatshabalalise."
Isaiah10:26 Yaye uYehova wesaqhwithi uya kumqwenga, njengoko amaMidiyan awoyiswa kwiliwa likaOrebhe; kwanjengokuba ibinjalo intonga yakhe phezu kolwandle, uya kuyiphakamisa ngokohlobo lwaseYiputa."
Isaiah10:27 Kuya kuthi ngaloo mini, ususwe umthwalo wakhe esixhantini sakho, nedyokhwe yakhe esandleni sakho, idake idyokhwe ngenxa yokuthanjiswa."
Isaiah10:28 Ekufikeni kwakhe eAyati wawela, waya eMigron; eMigmas wazibeka iinqwelo zakhe zokulwa."
Isaiah10:29 Badlula ngendlela; ayakha iGebha; iRama iyoyika; iGibheha yasaba ngenxa kaSawule.
Isaiah10:30 Liphakamise ilizwi lakho, Owu ntombi yaseGalim;"
Isaiah10:31 iMadmena isusiwe; abantu baseGebhim bahlanganisana ukuba basabe.
Isaiah10:32 Uya kuhlala eNobhi ngaloo mini; uya kubeka isandla sakhe entabeni yentombi enguZiyon, endulini yaseYerusalem."
Isaiah10:33 Yabona, iNkosi, uYehova wemikhosi, iya kuwavikiva amagatya ngokunkwantyisa, aphakamileyo nophakamileyo agawulwe, abaziphakamisayo bathotywe;"
Isaiah10:34 Uya kuwagawula amatyholo ehlathi ngesixengxe, iwe iLebhanon ngekrele."
Isaiah11:1 Kuya kuphuma intonga kwindlu kaYese, kuhlume ihlumelo ezingcanjini zakhe;"
Isaiah11:2 Wohlala phezu kwakhe uMoya kaYehova, umoya wobulumko nowokuqonda, umoya womnqweno nowamandla, umoya wokwazi nowokoyika uYehova;"
Isaiah11:3 Womdlisa ubomi ngentliziyo ephilileyo, esoyika uYehova; angagwebi ngokubona kwamehlo akhe, engayi kukhalimela ngokuva kweendlebe zakhe."
Isaiah11:4 Uya kuligweba ityala lehlwempu ngobulungisa, abakhalimele abalulamileyo behlabathi ngokuthe tye; uya kuwubetha umhlaba ngentonga yomlomo wakhe, ababulale ongendawo ngomoya womlomo wakhe."
Isaiah11:5 Ubulungisa buya kuba ngumbhinqo esinqeni sakhe, nokuthembeka kube ngumbhinqo wamanqe akhe."
Isaiah11:6 Ingcuka iya kuhlala nemvana, ingwe netakane lebhokhwe; laye ithole, nethole, nenkomo, yatyetyiswa kunye; nomntwana uya kuzikhokela."
Isaiah11:7 Ithokazi lenkomo nebhere ziya kudla utyani; amathole azo abuthe ndaweni-nye, ingonyama idle utyani njengenkomo."
Isaiah11:8 Kwaye umama oncancisayo uya kudlala emanzini benyoka, nomntwana olunyulweyo afake isandla sakhe kuloo nto imanzi."
Isaiah11:9 Aziyi kwenzakalisa okanye ziyonakalisa intaba yam engcwele iphela, ngenxa yokuba umhlaba uya kuzala kukwazi uYehova njengamanzi egubungele ulwandle."
Isaiah11:10 Ngaloo mini kuya kubakho indoda yakwaYese, eya kuma njengoqhwithela lwabantu; Emveni koko ziya kufuna iintlanga, yaye ukuphumla kwakhe kuya kuba nobuqaqawuli."
Isaiah11:11 Ngaloo mini uYehova uya kuphinda esolule isandla sakhe isihlandlo sesibini kumasalela abantu bakhe abaseleyo, eAsiriya naseYiputa, ePatrosi, eKushe, eElam, naseShinare naseShinare. iHamati neziqithi zolwandle."
Isaiah11:12 Uya kuziphakamisela ibhanile iintlanga, ahlanganise abagxothiweyo bakwaSirayeli, abahlanganisele abasabileyo bakwaYuda kwiimbombo zone zomhlaba."
Isaiah11:13 Kwaye ikhwele likaEfrayim liya kumka, kwaye iintshaba zikaYuda ziya kutshabalala; uEfrayim akayi kumkhweletela uYuda, noYuda akayi kumqumbela uEfrayim."
Isaiah11:14 Wophaphazela egxalabeni lamaFilisti, aye ngasentshonalanga; baya kuyiphanga iMpuma kunye; baya kusolula isandla sabo phezu koEdom noMowabhi; oonyana baka-Amon baya kubaphulaphula."
Isaiah11:15 uYehova uya kulubetha ngesiqalekiso ulwimi lolwandle lwaseYiputa; Woyishukumisa ngesandla sakhe phezu komlambo ngomoya wakhe onamandla, awubethe imilambo esixhenxe, abakhwelise abantu ngeembadada ezomileyo."
Isaiah11:16 Kuya kubakho umendo wamasalela abantu bakhe, abaseleyo eAsiriya; njengoko kwakunjalo kuSirayeli, ngemini yokunyuka kwawo evela ezweni laseYiputa."
Isaiah12:1 Ngaloo mini uya kuthi, Yehova, ndiya kubulela kuwe; nangona ubundiqumbele, wabuya umsindo wakho, wandithuthuzela."
Isaiah12:2 Yabona, uThixo ulusindiso lwam; Ndiya kukholosa, andiyi koyika; ngokuba uYehova ungamandla am nendumiso yam; waba lusindiso kum."
Isaiah12:3 Ke ngoko, niya kukha amanzi ngovuyo emithonjeni yosindiso."
Isaiah12:4 Niya kuthi ngaloo mini, Dumisani uYehova, libizeni igama lakhe, zivakaliseni ezintlangeni izenzo zakhe, nivakalise ukuba liyingxonde igama lakhe."
Isaiah12:5 Memelelani uzuko lukaYehova; ngokuba wenze imisebenzi ebalulekileyo, eyaziwa ehlabathini lonke."
Isaiah12:6 Dumani nivuye, nina bemi baseZiyon, ngokuba mkhulu phakathi kwenu oyiNgcwele kaSirayeli."
Isaiah13:1 Isihlabo saseBhabheli, awasibonayo uIsaya, unyana ka-Amos."
Isaiah13:2 Phakamisa ibhanile entabeni ephakamileyo, uphakamise ilizwi lakho kubo, phakamisa isandla sakho, bangene ngeengcango zamanene."
Isaiah13:3 Mna ndibawisele umthetho abenceba bam, ndabiza iingxilimbela zam ngenxa yomsindo wam, abaqhayisa ngobude bam."
