Isaiah13:4 Kuvakala isandi sengxokolo ezintabeni, ngathi sesezizwe ezininzi; Kuhlanganiselwe ndawonye ukudubadubeka kwezizwe; uYehova wemikhosi uhlanganisa imikhosi."
Isaiah13:5 Bavela ezweni elikude, ekupheleni kwamazulu, uYehova nezixhobo zomsindo wakhe, ukuba alonakalise ihlabathi lonke."
Isaiah13:6 Lilani; ngokuba ikufuphi imini kaYehova; liya kuza njengenkangala evela kuSomandla.
Isaiah13:7 Ngako oko, zonke izandla ziya kubethwa, neentliziyo zabantu bonke ziya kuthamba."
Isaiah13:8 Baya kunkwantya; baya kufikelwa bububi naziimbandezelo; baya kuva ubunzima njengozalayo; ziyangqubana; ubuso babo buya kuba njengamalangatye.
Isaiah13:9 Yabona, imini kaYehova iyeza, inobujorha, ishushu, ishushu, ukuze iliguqule ilizwe libe yintlango; abatshabalalise aboni bakhe kulo."
Isaiah13:10 Kuba iinkwenkwezi zezulu neenkwenkwezi zazo aziyi kukhanyisa kukhanya kwazo; liya kuba mnyama ilanga ekuphumeni kwalo, nenyanga ingakhanyisi ukukhanya kwayo."
Isaiah13:11 Kwaye ndiya kuwuvelela umhlaba ngenxa yenkohlakalo yawo nabakhohlakeleyo ngenxa yenkohlakalo yabo; yaye ndiya kulibangela lithotywe ikratshi labakhukhumeleyo neqhayiya labangcangcazelisayo.
Isaiah13:12 Umntu ndiwenze athandeke ngaphezu kwegolide engcwengiweyo; nendoda enjengentonga yegolide yakwaOfire.
Isaiah13:13 Ngoko ke ndiya kuwanyikimisa amazulu, nomhlaba uya kunyikima endaweni yawo ngomsindo kaYehova wemikhosi nangemini yomsindo wakhe."
Isaiah13:14 Kuya kuba njengeenciniba ezisukelwayo, nanjengegusha engayichomiyo;"
Isaiah13:15 Bonke abafunyenweyo baya kutyunyuzwa; yaye wonke ubani othe wawumanya nawo uya kuwa likrele.
Isaiah13:16 Yaye abantwana babo baya kutyunyuzwa phambi kwamehlo abo; izindlu zabo ziya kuphangwa, nabafazi babo baya kuhlaziswa."
Isaiah13:17 Yabona, ndixhoxha amaMedi angayikhathaleleyo isilivere; yona igolide, abayi kukholiswa yiyo."
Isaiah13:18 Izaphetha zawo zowaphula amadodana; nesiqhamo sesizalo sikanina abayi kuba namfesane; amehlo abo akayi kubaconga abantwana.
Isaiah13:19 Yaye iBhabhiloni, iqhayiya lookumkani, iqhayiya lamaKhaledi, iya kuba njengokubhukuqa kukaThixo iSodom neGomora."
Isaiah13:20 Aliyi kuba sanabemi, yaye ukususela kwesinye isizukulwana ukuya kwesinye liya kuba sanabemi; nomArabhu akanako ukumisa intente khona; yaye abalusi abayi kwenza nawuphi na umhlambi apho."
Isaiah13:21 Kodwa amarhamncwa asendle aya kuba yindle; nezindlu zabo ziya kuzaliswa zizidalwa; kuya kuhlala khona izikhova, kuphaphazele khona iintaka."
Isaiah13:22 Kwaye amarhamncwa eziqithi aya kubhomboloza ezindlwini zabo ezishiyiweyo, neempungutye ezindlwini zabo zobukumkani ezithandekayo; ixesha lakhe lisondele, nemihla yakhe ayiyi kolulwa."
Isaiah14:1 Ngokuba uYehova uya kuba nemfesane kuYakobi, angawanyuli amaSirayeli, awashiye emhlabeni wawo; nabasemzini baya kuzimanya nabo, banamathele kwindlu kaYakobi."
Isaiah14:2 Abantu baya kubathabatha, babase endaweni yabo; kwaye abendlu kaSirayeli baya kuwadla ilifa ezweni likaYehova, babe ngabakhonzi nezicakakazi; kwaye baya kubalawula abacinezeli babo."
Isaiah14:3 Kuya kuthi, xa athe uYehova waniphumza ebubini benu, nasekunkwantyiseni kwenu, nasekukhonzeni kwakho nzima,"
Isaiah14:4 nize nithethe le mizekeliso nxamnye nokumkani waseBhabhiloni nithi, ‘Hayi indlela ehambe ngayo lo zwilakhe! Umzi wegolide umile!"
Isaiah14:5 uYehova uwaphule umsimelelo wabangendawo, nentonga yobukhosi yabalawuli."
Isaiah14:6 Lowo wohlwaya iintlanga ngomsindo wakhe, engenasiphelo; lowo ulawula iintlanga ngomsindo, uyatshutshiswa, akukho unqandayo;"
Isaiah14:7 Liphumle, lizolile ihlabathi lonke; bagqabhuka yimincili."
Isaiah14:8 Kananjalo imisipres ikuvuyele, nemisedare yaseLebhanon, isithi, Ulele nje, akuyi kusihlasela impungutye."
Isaiah14:9 Izihogo ezisuka ezantsi zinyathele ukukuhlangabeza ekuzeni kwakho; wabaphakamisa ezitroneni zabo bonke ookumkani beentlanga.
Isaiah14:10 Baya kuthetha bonke, bathi kuni, Nani wenziwe ofayo njengathi na? uyafana nathi?"
Isaiah14:11 Buhlile uzuko lwakho kwelabafileyo, nesandi seehadi zakho;"
Isaiah14:12 Utheni na ukuwa emazulwini, Lusifa, nyana wesifingo! Ukuphoswa phantsi kwakho, mngquli weentlanga!"
Isaiah14:13 Ngenxa enokuba uthe entliziyweni yakho, Ndiya kunyukela emazulwini, ndiyinyuse itrone yam ibe ngaphezu kweenkwenkwezi zikaThixo; Ndiya kuhlala ke entabeni yebandla, kweleembombo zasentla."
Isaiah14:14 Ndiya kunyuka ndiye ezindaweni eziphakamileyo zamafu; ndiya kuba njengoPhezukonke.
Isaiah14:15 Noko ke, uya kuhliselwa kwelabafileyo, emacaleni omhadi."
Isaiah14:16 Abakubonayo baya kukukhangela, bakukhangele, bathi, Yilaa yini na le indoda eyayilinyikimisa elimiweyo, ebizinyikimisa izikumkani?"
Isaiah14:17 owalenza ilizwe njengenkqantosi, ebezigungxula imizi yalo; ongayivulanga indlu yamabanjwa akhe?"
Isaiah14:18 Bonke ookumkani beentlanga, bonke bephela, balele benozuko, ngamnye endlwini yakhe."
Isaiah14:19 Ke wena, ulahliwe esizalweni sakho, njengamadlavu namadlavu, nanjengeengubo zababuleweyo, abahlatywe ngekrele, abehla baye emangcwabeni; inyathelwe njengesidumbu."
Isaiah14:20 Musa ukuzibandakanya nabo kwelabafileyo, ngokokuba walonakalisayo ilizwe lakho, wababulala abantu bakho; abayi kukwaziwa naphakade abantwana benkohliso."
Isaiah14:21 Balungiseleleni ukusikwa ngoonyana bakhe, ngenxa yobungendawo booyise; hleze bavuke, balidle ilifa ilizwe, bazalise ubuso behlabathi ngemizi."
Isaiah14:22 Ndiya kusukela phezulu kubo, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, ndilitshabalalise igama leBhabheli, namasalela, nonyana, nomzukulwana, utsho uYehova;"
Isaiah14:23 Ndiya kuyenza indawo yamaxolo akrakra, nezamachibi amanzi; yaye ndiza kuyidiliza ngerhamncwa elitshabalalisayo,” utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Isaiah14:24 Ufungile uYehova wemikhosi wathi, Inyaniso, njengoko ndakhumbulayo, koba njalo; njengoko ndicebe ngako, koba njalo;"
Isaiah14:25 Ndiya kumaphula uAsiriya ezweni lam, ndimnyathelele phantsi ezintabeni zam; iya kumka idyokhwe yakhe kubo, nomthwalo wakhe esixhantini sabo."
Isaiah14:26 Lilo elo icebo elicetyiweyo ngehlabathi lonke; siso eso isandla esolukileyo phezu kweentlanga zonke.
Isaiah14:27 Kuba uYehova wemikhosi wenze icebo, ngubani na oya kuliphelisa? isandla sakhe esokile, ngubani na ongasibuyisayo?"
Isaiah14:28 Ngomnyaka wokufa kokumkani uAhazi, yaba ngumthwalo onzima."
Isaiah14:29 Musa ukuvuya, Palestina, lonke, ngakuba yaphukile intonga ebikubetha; kuba engcanjini yenyoka kuya kuphuma umthi, isiqhamo sawo sibe yinyoka yomlilo, ephaphazelayo."
Isaiah14:30 Baya kudla abazizisweli, abasweleyo balale bekholosile; kwaye ndiya kuyibulala ingcambu yakho ngendlala, kwaye uya kuwabulala intsalela yakho."
Isaiah14:31 Bhomboloza, wena sango! biza, sixekondini! wena, lonke elasePalestina, ubhuqiwe; kuba kuya kunyuka umsi entla, kungabikho mntu ngamaxesha akhe amisiweyo."
Isaiah14:32 Bathini na ukuphendula abathunywa beentlanga? Ukuba uYehova uyizinzisile iZiyon, yaye amahlwempu abantu bakhe baya kukholosa ngayo."
Isaiah15:1 Isihlabo sikaMowabhi. Ngokuba iphanzisiwe ebusuku iAri yakwaMowabhi; kuba ngobusuku ibhuqiwe iKire yakwaMowabhi, yathi shwaka;"
Isaiah15:2 Wenyuka waya eBhayiti naseDibhon, kummandla weentaba, ukuya kulila; uMowabhi uya kuzilela ngenxa yeNebho neMedebha; zonke iintloko zabo ziya kuba ziinkqayi, zonke iindevu zabo ziya kuchetywa."
Isaiah15:3 Baya kunxiba ezimnyama ezitalatweni zabo;
Isaiah15:4 Iya kubiza iHeshbhon, ne-Elehali; ilizwi labo liya kuvakala naseYatsa; ke ngoko amagorha axhobileyo akwaMowabhi aya kuduma; ubomi bakhe buya kuba nzima kuye."
Isaiah15:5 Intliziyo yam iyakhala ngenxa kaMowabhi; abasabayo bakhe baya kusabela eTsohare, ithokazi lenkomo eliminyaka mithathu; kuba endleleni yaseHoronayim baya kuduma ngentshabalalo."
Isaiah15:6 Ngenxa yokuba amanzi aseNimrim aya kuba yintlango, ngenxa yokuba ingca yomile, ingca iwile, ayibikho luhlaza."
Isaiah15:7 Ke ngoko, baya kuthabatha intabalala abayifumeneyo, abayibeke kwiqula lemingcunube."
Isaiah15:8 Isikhalo sajikeleza emdeni wakwaMowabhi; ukukhala kwakhe kufik’ e-Eglayim, ukukhala kwakhe kufike eBhelim."
Isaiah15:9 Kuba amanzi aseDimon aya kuzala ligazi, yaye ndiya kuzisa okungakumbi phezu kweDimon, ndizisa iingonyama phezu kwabasindileyo bakwaMowabhi nakwabaseleyo belizwe."
Isaiah16:1 Thumani umangaleli wehlabathi ephuma eSela, aye entlango, entabeni yentombi enguZiyon."
Isaiah16:2 Kuba njengentaka ephaphazelayo eshiywe kwindlwane yayo, zinjalo iintombi zakwaMowabhi kwimilambo yaseArnon."
Isaiah16:3 Cebani icebo, zigwebeni; senza isithunzi sakho sibe njengobusuku emva kwemini; fihla abagxothiweyo; Sukuzenza ngathi uyabhadula."
Isaiah16:4 Mabahlale nawe abathinjwa, uMowabhi; Yiba lihlathi kubo ebusweni bombhuqi; ngokuba abaphangi abasekho, umbhuqi uphelile, abacinezeli abasekho ehlabathini."
Isaiah16:5 Yaye itrone iya kumiselwa ngokuqinileyo ngenceba, yaye uya kuhlala phezu kwayo enenyaniso ententeni kaDavide, ngoxa elindele umgwebo nokusesikweni nokukhawulezisa ubulungisa."
Isaiah16:6 Silivile ikratshi likaMowabhi; unekratshi kakhulu, ewe, nekratshi lakhe, nekratshi lakhe, nomsindo wakhe;"
Isaiah16:7 Ngako oko uMowabhi uya kukhalela uMowabhi, akhale uMowabhi; uya kulilela iziseko zeKir-haresheti; ngenene babethwe."
Isaiah16:8 Kuba amasimi aseHeshbhon abunile, neediliya zaseSibhema; Abathetheli beentlanga baziqhekeza iziseko zabo, beza eYazere, babhadula entlango; amasebe awo anaba phezu kolwandle."
Isaiah16:9 Ngako oko ndiya kuwulila ngokulila kukaYashere, womdiliya waseSibhema; ndikunyakamisa ngeenyembezi zam, Heshbhon, nawe Elale, ngenxa yokuba ukukhala kwakho kuye kwafika ngenxa yeziqhamo zakho zasehlotyeni nangenxa yokuvuna kwakho."
Isaiah16:10 Kwaye uvuyo nemigcobo isusiwe entsimini etyebileyo; kodwa ezidiliyeni akuyi kubakho kuvuma nakukuvuya; Ndayeka ukukhala kwabo kwakudala.
Isaiah16:11 Ngako oko izibilini zam ziya kukhala njengezembe kwaMowabhi, izibilini zam zikhala eKir-hares."
Isaiah16:12 Xa kubonakala ukuba uMowabhi udiniwe, uya kuthandaza engcweleni yakhe; kodwa akayi kuphumelela."
Isaiah16:13 Lilo elo ilizwi awalithethayo uYehova ngoMowabhi ukususela ngelo xesha ukuya phambili.
Isaiah16:14 Wathetha uYehova, wathi, Kungekadluli iminyaka emithathu, njengeminyaka yomqeshwa, buya kudeleka uzuko lukaMowabhi, kunye nenani elikhulu labantu; kwaye intsalela iya kuba ncinane kakhulu, ibe buthathaka."
Isaiah17:1 Umyalezo waseDamasko. Yabona, ifudusiwe iDamasko, ayisayi kuba saba ngumzi, ibe yimiwewe;"
Isaiah17:2 Ibhuqiwe imizi yaseArohere; ziya kuba ziinkomo, kungabikho uwothusayo."
Isaiah17:3 Kuya kuma inqaba kwaEfrayim nobukumkani baseDamasko, namasalela akwa-Aram; baya kuba njengobuqaqawuli boonyana bakaSirayeli; utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Isaiah17:4 Kuya kuthi ke ngaloo mini ubungcwele bukaYakobi bube buthathaka nokutyeba kwenyama yakhe kuya kuncipha.
Isaiah17:5 Kuya kuba njengomvuni ebutha ingqolowa, ewunqumla ukhula ngesandla sakhe; yaye kuya kuba njengalowo uhlanganisa ukhula entlanjeni yakwaFaro."
Isaiah17:6 Kuya kusala iidiliya ezingekavunwa, njengokuvuthulwa komnquma, zibe zibini, zibe ntathu iziqhamo entloko, zibe zine, zibe zintlanu emasebeni akhe angaphandle; utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli."
Isaiah17:7 Ngaloo mini umntu uya kukhangela kuMenzi wakhe, namehlo akhe akhangele koyiNgcwele kaSirayeli."
Isaiah17:8 Akayi kukhangela ezibingelelweni, umsebenzi wezandla zakhe, angayikhangeli into eyenziwa yiminwe yakhe, izikhondo zemithi engcwele nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo."
Isaiah17:9 Ngelo xesha imizi yakhe enqabileyo iya kuba njengegatsha elishiyiweyo, elisikelelweyo, abalishiyileyo ngenxa yoonyana bakaSirayeli, libe senkangala."
Isaiah17:10 Ngenxa enokuba umlibele uThixo, umsindisi wakho, akwalikhumbula neliwa lokunqaba kwakho, ngenxa yoko uya kutyala izityalo ezintle, uzimilisele emagqabini olwandle."
Isaiah17:11 Woyihluma isityalo sakho ngaloo mini, kusasa uya kuyintshulisa imbewu yakho; kodwa ukuvuna kuya kuba lithemba ngemini yembandezelo nembandezelo."
Isaiah17:12 Yeha, ingxokolo yeentlanga ehlokoma njengolwandle! nesandi sezizwe ezingxolayo njengamanzi!"
Isaiah17:13 Iintlanga ziya kugquma njengesandi samanzi amaninzi, kodwa uThixo uya kuzikhalimela, yaye ziya kusabela kude ziphetshethwe njengomququ ezintabeni phambi komoya nanjengomoya ovuthuza phambi kwesaqhwithi."
Isaiah17:14 Kwathi, ngokuhlwa, kukho iliza lembandezelo; kungekafi, akakho. Siso eso isabelo sabasiphangayo, sisiphelo sabasiphangayo."
Isaiah18:1 Yeha ilizwe elizaliswe ngamaphiko, phesheya kwemilambo yakwaKushi!"
Isaiah18:2 owathuma abathunywa elwandle, beneengqayi zengcongolo phezu kwamanzi, besithi, Hambani, bathunywa banamendu, niye kubantu abathe saa, abahlukene phakathi, kubantu aboyikekayo abangapha nangapha; luhlanga olulinganiselweyo, olunyathelweyo, olulizwe lilonakaliswe yimilambo."
Isaiah18:3 Nonke bemi belimiweyo, nani bahleli ehlabathini, ekuwuphakamiseni kwakhe ibhanile ezintabeni; xa evuthela ixilongo, uyeva."
Isaiah18:4 Kuba utsho uYehova kum ukuthi: “Ndiza kuphumla, yaye ndiya kuqiniseka kwindawo yam yokuhlala njengobushushu botyani nanjengelifu lombethe ekufudumaleni kwesivuno."
Isaiah18:5 Kuba ngaphambi kokuvuna, xa amathupha agqibela, naxa iidiliya ezimuncu zivuthwa entyantyambo, ufanele awagawule amasebe ngeemela zokuthena imithi, awasuse amasebe, awanqumle."
Isaiah18:6 Oba kunye aya kushiywa abe ngawamaxhalanga eentaba, abe ngawamarhamncwa elizwe, afike kuwo iintaka ehlotyeni, achithe ubusika phezu kwawo onke amarhamncwa elizwe."
Isaiah18:7 Ngelo xesha, isipho esivela kuYehova wemikhosi siya kuphuma kuhlanga oluthe saa nolwahlulelene, nakuhlanga olwalunzima ukususela ekuqaleni de kube ngoku; luhlanga olulinganiselweyo, olunyathelweyo, olulizwe lalo latshatyalaliswa yimilambo, lwesa endaweni yegama likaYehova wemikhosi, entabeni yeZiyon."
Isaiah19:1 Isigidimi esivela eYiputa. Yabona, uYehova ekhwele efini elinamendu, engena eYiputa;"
Isaiah19:2 Ndiya kuwaxhokonxa amaYiputa phezu kwamaYiputa, alwe elowo nomzalwana wakhe, elowo nomzalwana wakhe; Isixeko siyavukelana nesixeko, yaye ubukumkani buvukela ubukumkani."
Isaiah19:3 Umoya weYiputa uya kutshabalala phakathi kwayo; kwaye ndiya kulitshitshisa icebo lakhe, kwaye baya kufuna oothixo, nabakhafuli, nemimoya yabafileyo, nabakhafuli."
Isaiah19:4 Ndiya kuwanikela amaYiputa esandleni sokumkani olukhuni; nokumkani okhohlakeleyo uya kubalawula,’ utsho uYehova, uYehova wemikhosi."
Isaiah19:5 Amanzi aya kuphela elwandle, umlambo ube senkangala, wome;"
Isaiah19:6 iya kude imilambo; aya kuba namanzi, ome imithombo yamanzi; umququ neeflegi ziya kubuna."
Isaiah19:7 Iingcongolo eziphambi kwehlumelo, emlonyeni wehlumelo, nayo yonke into edliwe lihluma, iya koma, itshabalale, ingabi sabakho."
Isaiah19:8 Abalobi baya kulila, nabo bonke abo baphosa amagwegwe emilanjeni baya kubhomboloza, nabo baneka iminatha phezu kwamanzi baya kudandatheka."
Isaiah19:9 Ngaphezu koko, baya kudana abo basebenza ngelinen ecikizekileyo, nabaluki beminatha."
Isaiah19:10 Yaye ngokuqinisekileyo baya kuqhiphuka umbilini abo benza iintlanzi namachibi eentlanzi.
Isaiah19:11 Eneneni, iinkosana zaseTsowane ziziziyatha, icebo labacebisi abalumkileyo bakaFaro lidelekile; Ningathini na ukuthi kuFaro, Ndingunyana wezilumko, ndingunyana wookumkani bamandulo?"
Isaiah19:12 Baphi na? Zingaphi na izilumko zakho? yaye ngoku baya kukuxelela, yaye bayakwazi oko uYehova wemikhosi akucebileyo ngeYiputa."
Isaiah19:13 Bazizimathane abathetheli baseTsohan, balahlekane abathetheli baseNofe; bawalahlekisile amaYiputa, amakhaya ezizwe zawo."
Isaiah19:14 uYehova wafaka kuyo umoya ombi, yalahlekisa iYiputa ekwenzeni kwayo konke, njengokugxadazela kwenxila emhlanzweni walo."
Isaiah19:15 Yaye iYiputa ayiyi kuba namsebenzi onokwenziwa yintloko nomsila, isebe okanye ityholo."
Isaiah19:16 Ngaloo mini iJiputa yoba njengamankazana, yoyike, ngenxa yesandla sikaNdikhoyo uSomandla-onke esilingisa phezu kwayo."
Isaiah19:17 Ilizwe lakwaYuda liya kuyinkwantyisa iYiputa; wonke umntu othi uzoloyika icebo likaYehova lamabhunga alicwangciseyo.
Isaiah19:18 Ngaloo mini imizi emihlanu ezweni lamaYiputa iya kuthetha intetho yelakwaKanan, ifunge uYehova wemikhosi; omnye uya kubizwa ngokuba ngumzi Wotshabalalo."
Isaiah19:19 Ngaloo mini kuya kubakho isibingelelo sikaYehova phakathi kwelizwe laseYiputa nelitye lesikhumbuzo emdeni kaYehova.
Isaiah19:20 Oko koba ngumqondiso nobungqina kuYehova wemikhosi ezweni laseYiputa; ngokuba baya kukhala kuYehova ngenxa yabacinezeli, abathumele umsindisi omkhulu, abahlangule."
Isaiah19:21 uYehova uya kuzazisa eYiputa, amazi uYehova amaYiputa ngaloo mini, azise imibingelelo namadini anyukayo; ewe, yenza isibhambathiso kuYehova, usizalise."
Isaiah19:22 uYehova uya kuwavelela amaYiputa; Uya kubetha, aphilise; baya kubuyela kuYehova, yena eve, abaphilise."
Isaiah19:23 Ngaloo mini kuya kubakho uhola wendlela ophuma eYiputa uye eAsiriya;
Isaiah19:24 Ngelo xesha uSirayeli uya kuba ngowesithathu kunye neYiputa neAsiriya, njengentsikelelo phakathi kwelizwe;"
Isaiah19:25 awasikelela uYehova wemikhosi, esithi, Nisikelelwe abantu bam eYiputa, nomsebenzi wezandla zam eAsiriya, nelifa lam kwaSirayeli."
Isaiah20:1 Ngomnyaka wokufika kukaTartan eAshdode, wathunywa nguSargon, ukumkani waseAsiriya, ukuba aye kulwa neAshdode, ayithimba;"
Isaiah20:2 Ngelo xesha, wathetha uYehova ngoIsaya, unyana ka-Amotsi, wathi, Yiya, ukhulule ingubo emanqeni akho, uzikhulule iimbadada ezinyaweni zakho. Wayenza ke, ehamba ze, enganxibanga nto ezinyaweni zakhe."
Isaiah20:3 Wathi uYehova, Njengokuba uIsaya, umkhonzi wam, wahamba ze iminyaka emithathu, enganxibanga zihlangu iminyaka emithathu, waba ngumqondiso nomqondiso phezu kweYiputa nakwaKushi;"
Isaiah20:4 Uya kuthi ke ukumkani waseAsiriya athabathe abathinjwa baseYiputa nabathinjwa bamaKushi, abaselula nabakhulileyo, beze, benganxibanga zimbadada, ewe, iindonga zizele, ukuze iYiputa ihlazeke."
Isaiah20:5 Baya kunkwantya baze babe neentloni ngenxa yeKushi ababeyilindele nangenxa yozuko lwabo eYiputa.
Isaiah20:6 Kwaye abemi besi siqithi baya kuthi ngaloo mini: Qaphelani, eli lithemba lethu apho sisabela khona ukuze sibone uncedo lokukhululwa kukumkani waseAsiriya; sosinda njani na?"
Isaiah21:1 Isihlabo sentlango yolwandle. Njengezaqhwithi zasezantsi zivuthuza; ngoko liphuma entlango, ezweni eloyikekayo."
Isaiah21:2 Ndaxelelwa umbono onzima; Ishishini elinganyanisekanga liyinkohliso, nabangenyanisekanga bayarhwaphiliza. Nyuka, Elam, ngqinga, Medi; Ndayeka yonke incwina yakhe."
Isaiah21:3 Ngenxa yoko, ndiyaqaqanjelwa amanqe am; Ndaba buhlungu kakhulu xa ndiyibona."
Isaiah21:4 Yaduma intliziyo yam, yandothusa; ubusuku bolonwabo lwam baguquka baluloyiko kum."
Isaiah21:5 Kulungiswa isithebe, kuboniselwa inqaba, kudle, kusele; Sukumani, zidwangube, phakamisani ikhaka lenu;"
Isaiah21:6 Ngokuba uYehova uthe kum, Yiya umise umboniseli, uthethe into ayibonayo."
Isaiah21:7 Wabona inqwelo yokulwa, nabamahashe, nabakhweli bamaesile, nabakhweli beenkamela; yaye waphulaphula ngenyameko ngentlonelo enkulu."
Isaiah21:8 Wadanduluka wathi, Ngonyama, Nkosi, ndisamise emboniselweni emini, ndihleli ezintenteni zam ubusuku bonke."
Isaiah21:9 Nantso, kusiza inqwelo yokulwa yamadoda, nabamahashe; Wathi, Iwile iBhabheli, iwile iBhabheli; Wayiqhekeza yonke imifanekiso eqingqiweyo yoothixo bakhe."
Isaiah21:10 Owu sanda sam, ngqolowa yesanda sam! endikuvileyo kuYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ndinixelele."
Isaiah21:11 Umthwalo wamaDuma. Wandibiza ekwaSehire, wathi, Mlindi, bunjani na ubusuku? Mlindi, kuthekani na ngobusuku?"
Isaiah21:12 Uthi umlindi, Kuyeza ukusa, kuhlwa; xa ufuna ukubuza, uyabuza; buya, yiza."
Isaiah21:13 Isigidimi esingeArabhi. Niya kuchitha ubusuku kwihlathi laseArabhiya, nina balingane abahambahambayo bakwaDedan."
Isaiah21:14 Baziseleni amanzi abanxaniweyo, abemi belizwe lakwaTema, banqande obaleka nesonka sabo."
Isaiah21:15 Kuba babebalekile ikrele, ikrele eliyingozi, nesaphetha esitshiswayo, neembandezelo zemfazwe."
Isaiah21:16 Kuba uthi uYehova kum: “Emva konyaka omnye, ngokweminyaka yomqeshwa, nalo lonke uzuko lwakwaKedare luya kuphela."
Isaiah21:17 Aya kuncipha amasalela enani lezaphetha zamagorha, oonyana bakaKedare; ngokuba utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli."
Isaiah22:1 Umthwalo woburhabaxa bomphezulu. Kuthekani ngawe xa unyukela eluphahleni?
Isaiah22:2 Wena uzeleyo zizithukuthuku, sixekondini esizele zizithukuthezi, mzi wolonwabo; ababuleweyo kuni ababulawanga ngekrele, ababulawanga emfazweni."
Isaiah22:3 Bonke ookumkani bakho basabile kunye, bakhonkxwa ngabatoli; bonke abafunyanwa kuwe bakhonkxwa kunye ekubalekeleni kwabo kude."
Isaiah22:4 Ngoko ke, ndathi: Ndoyise! Ndiya kulila ngokukrakra, ndingazikhathazi ngenxa yokuphangwa kwentombi yabantu bakowethu."
Isaiah22:5 Kuba yimini yokubandezeleka neyokunyathelwa neyokudubadubeka kweNkosi enguMongami uYehova wemikhosi entlanjeni yombono, yokudilizwa kweendonga nokuhlaba umkhosi ezintabeni."
Isaiah22:6 uElam wawuthabatha umphongolo, neenqwelo zokulwa zamadoda nabamahashe;"
Isaiah22:7 Kuya kuthi ke iintili zakho ozinyulileyo zizaliswe ziinqwelo, nabakhweli bamahashe bagxalathele esangweni."
Isaiah22:8 Wasisusa isigqubuthelo sakwaYuda, wasikhangela ngaloo mini isikrweqe sendlu yehlathi."
Isaiah22:9 Niwabonile ke amanxuwa omzi kaDavide, ukuba maninzi; wawabutha amanzi echibi lasezantsi;"
Isaiah22:10 Nizibalile izindlu zaseYerusalem, nizidilizile ezo zindlu, ukuze niluqinise udonga;"
Isaiah22:11 Nenza isisele samanzi echibi elidala phakathi kweendonga zombini, anajongana nomenzi walo, nalowo walenzayo kwakudala."
Isaiah22:12 Ngaloo mini iNkosi enguMongami uYehova wemikhosi ibiza ukulila nokuzila nokucheba nokunxiba iimpahla zokuzila.
Isaiah22:13 Yabonani, kukho uvuyo nemivuyo kwabaxhelwa iinkomo, kuxhelwe izimvu, kudle inyama, kusele iwayini; masidle, sisele; kuba ngomso siya kufa."
Isaiah22:14 Waza uYehova wemikhosi wazityhila ezindlebeni zam wathi: “Eneneni, obu bubi abuyi kususwa kuni nide nife,” itsho iNkosi enguMthetheleli, uYehova wemikhosi."
Isaiah22:15 “Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi: “Hamba uye kulo mgcini-ndyebo, kuShebhena, ophethe indlu, uthi:"
Isaiah22:16 Uyintoni na apha? Unabani na apha, ozenzele ingcwaba apha, njengokuba ezimbela ingcwaba phezulu, ezimbele isakhiwo eweni?"
Isaiah22:17 Uyabona, uYehova uya kukusa ekuthinjweni okukhulu, akugubungele kude kuse ephakadeni;"
Isaiah22:18 Uya kuyijika, uyiphose njengebhola ezweni elikhulu, ufele khona, zibe lihlazo leenqwelo zokulwa zendlu yenkosi yakho."
Isaiah22:19 Ndiza kunigxotha nisuke endaweni yenu, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo uya kunisasaza ningabikho endaweni yenu."
Isaiah22:20 Kuya kuthi ngaloo mini, ndibize umkhonzi wam, uEliyakim, unyana kaHilekiya;"
Isaiah22:21 Ndiza kumambesa isambatho sakho ndize ndimbophe ngebhanti lakho, ndibunikele ubukumkani bakho esandleni sakhe, yaye uya kuba nguyise wabemi baseYerusalem nowendlu kaYuda."
Isaiah22:22 Ndiya kusibeka isitshixo sendlu kaDavide egxalabeni lakhe; ngokunjalo uya kuvula kungabikho uvalayo; uya kuvala kungabikho uvulayo.
Isaiah22:23 Ndiya kumbethelela njengesikhonkwane endaweni etywiniweyo; ibe yitrone yenkqubela yendlu kayise.
Isaiah22:24 Baya kubuxhoma phezu kwakhe bonke ubunzima bendlu kayise, abazukulwana, nabantwana, nempahla emfutshane, kuthabathele ezindebeni, kuse empahleni yonke."
Isaiah22:25 Ngaloo mini, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, siya kususwa isikhonkwane esibethelelwe endaweni etywiniweyo, sigawulwe, siwe; nomthwalo owawukuyo uya kunqunyulwa, ngenxa yokuba uYehova ethethile."
Isaiah23:1 Umthwalo weTire. Bhombolozani, zinqanawa zaseTarshishe! Ngokuba ichithakele, akusekho ndlu, akusekho mnyango; bakutyhilelwa kuvela ezweni lamaKitim."
Isaiah23:2 Yithini cwaka, bemi besi siqithi; wena uzaliswe ngabarhwebi baseTsidon, abawela ulwandle."
Isaiah23:3 Yayisemanzini amaninzi imbewu yakwaSihore, ukuvuna koMnayile kwaba ngumvuzo wakhe; ke yona imicimbi yeentlanga."
Isaiah23:4 Dana, Tsidon, kuba luthethile ulwandle, namandla olwandle, lusithi, Andiyi kuzala mntwana, andiyi kukondla ntombi, andiyi konyusa zintombi."
Isaiah23:5 Njengengxelo ephathelele iYiputa, ngokuqinisekileyo baya kubandezeleka kakhulu ngenxa yamarhe angeTire."
Isaiah23:6 eTarshishe; bhombolozani, nina bemi basesiqithini!"
Isaiah23:7 Kunje na kuwe, wena wonwabileyo, owasemandulo kwakudala? iinyawo zakhe ziya kumsa kude, ukuba abe ngumphambukeli."
Isaiah23:8 Ngubani na lo ucebe iqhinga ngeTire, ngomzi wesithsaba, obarhwebi bawo bangabathetheli, obarhwebi bawo bangamanene elimiweyo?"
Isaiah23:9 uYehova wemikhosi ucinge ukungcolisa ubungangamsha balo lonke uzuko, ukuba acukuceze zonke iingangamsha zehlabathi;"
Isaiah23:10 Canda kulo ilizwe lakowenu njengoMnayile, ntombi inguTarshishe;"
Isaiah23:11 Isandla sakhe usolulele phezu kolwandle, wazinyikimisa izikumkani; uYehova wayalela eso sixeko sabarhwebi ukuba sitshabalalise iinqaba zaso."
Isaiah23:12 Wathi: “Awuyi kuba sabuya uvuye, ntombindini idlwengulweyo, ntombi yaseTsidon! nalapho akuyi kuba nakuphumla."
Isaiah23:13 Kukho ilizwe lamaKaledi; Akwabakho olu hlanga, ade ama-Asiriya abamisela ukuba babe bona babemi entlango; bazakha iinqaba zakhe ezinde, bezakha iingxande zakhe ezinde; kwaye uyitshabalalise."
Isaiah23:14 Lilani, zinqanawa zaseTarshishe, ngokuba kubhuqiwe amandla enu."
Isaiah23:15 Kuya kuthi ngaloo mini, ilityalwe iTire iminyaka engamashumi asixhenxe, njengemihla yokumkani omnye; emva kweminyaka engamashumi asixhenxe, iTire iya kumemelela njengehenyukazi."
Isaiah23:16 Musani ukuhamba niwujikeleze umzi, nililibale ihenyukazi; vumani iingoma ezimnandi, vumani iingoma ezininzi, ukuze ukhunjulwe."
Isaiah23:17 Ekupheleni kweminyaka engamashumi asixhenxe uYehova uya kuyivelela iTire, ize iguquke ukuze ifumane umvuzo ize ikrexeze nazo zonke izikumkani zehlabathi."
Isaiah23:18 Yaye umsebenzi wakhe nomvuzo wakhe woba ngcwele kuYehova; ayinakugcinwa okanye igcinwe; ngokuba umcimbi wakhe uya kuba ngowabahleli phambi koYehova, badle ukudla okuninzi, neempahla zokuhomba."
Isaiah24:1 Yabona, uYehova uyalichithachitha ihlabathi, ulenze kube senkangala, ulenza ligwilike, uyabachithachitha abemi balo."
Isaiah24:2 Kuya kuba njengoko kube njalo ebantwini, kube njalo kumbingeleli; njengekhoboka, injalo inkosi yaso; njengentombi, njengenkosikazi yayo; njengomthengi, njengomthengisi; njengomboleki, njengomboleki; njengoko umbolekisayo, unjalo kuye obolekayo."
Isaiah24:3 Ilizwe liya kuphanziswa ngokupheleleyo lize litshatyalaliswe ngokupheleleyo, ngenxa yokuba uYehova elithethile eli lizwi."
Isaiah24:4 Ihlabathi lidanile, lidanile, ihlabathi lidanile, lidanile, abaqhankqalazi behlabathi badanile."
Isaiah24:5 Kananjalo ihlabathi lihlanjelwe phakathi kwabemi balo; ngenxa yokuba baphule imithetho, bawuguqula umthetho, bawaphula umnqophiso ongunaphakade."
Isaiah24:6 Ngoko ke, isiqalekiso silidlile ilizwe, batshabalale abemi balo; ke ngoko, abemi behlabathi bayatshiswa, kwaye kukho abantu abambalwa abaseleyo."
Isaiah24:7 Iwayini entsha ilungile, iidiliya zibunile, bonke abantu abavuyayo bayancwina."
Isaiah24:8 Iphelile imihlali yamagubu, iphelile ingxokozelo yabadlamkileyo, iphelile imihlali yengqongqo."
Isaiah24:9 Abayi kusela wayini bevuma ingoma; isiselo siya kuba krakra kwabasiselayo.
Isaiah24:10 Uqhekekile umzi osenyanyeni, zivalekile zonke izindlu ukuba zingangenwa mntu."
Isaiah24:11 Kubakho ukukhala ngewayini ezitratweni; lonke uvuyo luba mnyama, uvuyo lwehlabathi luphelile."
Isaiah24:12 Umzi usele walinxuwa, nesango liphanzisiwe;"
Isaiah24:13 Kuya kuba njalo emhlabeni phakathi kwabantu, kuya kubakho ukunyikima komnquma, njengokuvuthululwa kweediliya ekupheleni kokuvuna."
Isaiah24:14 Ziya kuphakamisa amazwi azo, zivume ubukhulu bukaYehova, ziphakamise izandla zazo elwandle."
Isaiah24:15 Ngoko ke, zukisani uYehova ngomlilo, igama likaYehova, uTHIXO kaSirayeli, eziqithini zolwandle."
Isaiah24:16 Sivile iingoma ezivela eziphelweni zomhlaba zisithi: “Uzuko malube kwilungisa. Ndathi ke mna, Ukubhitya kwam, ukubhitya kwam! abarhwebi abangamaqhophololo benza ngobuqhophololo; ewe, abarhwebi abanobuqhophololo benze ubuqhophololo obukhulu."
Isaiah24:17 Ufikelwe lunkwantyo, nomgongxo, nesibatha, wena mmi wehlabathi;"
Isaiah24:18 Kuya kuthi, othe walibaleka ilizwi elinkwantyisayo, eyele emgongxweni; onyuka ephuma emhadini, abanjiswe sisibatha; ngokuba iifestile eziphezulu zivuliwe, zanyikima iziseko zehlabathi."
Isaiah24:19 Ihlabathi liya kugungxulwa litshatyalaliswe, ligungqiswe ngokupheleleyo ihlabathi;"
Isaiah24:20 Umhlaba uya kugxadazela njengenxila, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo kuya kushukuma njengendlu yangasese; ukreqo lwakhe luya kuba nzima phezu kwakhe; liya kuwa, lingabi savuka."
Isaiah24:21 Ngaloo mini uYehova uya kubavelela ikhusi kwelona zulu liphakamileyo nookumkani bomhlaba emhlabeni.
Isaiah24:22 Baya kuhlanganiswa njengamabanjwa emhadini, bavalelwe entolongweni, banikelwe, kwakuba ziintsuku ezininzi."
Isaiah24:23 Iya kuthi ke inyanga ime ngxi, nelanga liya kuba neentloni, xa uYehova wemikhosi uya kulawula eNtabeni yeZiyon naseYerusalem ngozuko phambi kwamadoda akhe amakhulu."
Isaiah25:1 Yehova, unguThixo wam; Ndithanda ukukuphakamisa, ukudumisa igama lakho; ngokuba wenze imisebenzi ebalulekileyo; icebo lakho elidala liyinyaniso kwaye liyinyaniso."
Isaiah25:2 Ngokuba umzi uwenze walinxuwa; Umzi onqatyisiweyo, ulinxuwa, ibhotwe lolunye uhlanga alinakuba sisixeko; soze yakhiwe."
Isaiah25:3 Ngako oko ziya kukuhlonela iintlanga ezinamandla, ikoyike imizi yezizwe ezinobungcwangu."
Isaiah25:4 Ngokuba waba yinqaba kolusizana, waba yinqaba kofunyenweyo ekubandezelekeni kwakhe, ihlathi esiphangweni, umthunzi womgxobhozo, xa umoya wamagorha usisaqhwithi eludongeni."
Isaiah25:5 Uyidambisile ingxokozelo yabasemzini, njengokufudumeza kwendawo ebaleleyo; Kwanobushushu ethunzini lelifu, Isebe labanamandla liyathotywa."
Isaiah25:6 uYehova wemikhosi uya kwenzela zonke iintlanga isidlo esityebileyo kule ntaba, isidlo sewayini ecocekileyo, esinemongo, newayini engqushiweyo."
Isaiah25:7 Wosichitha ke kule ntaba isigqubuthelo esizigqubutheleyo zonke iintlanga, nesigqubuthelo esizigqubutheleyo iintlanga zonke."
Isaiah25:8 Uya kuginya ukufa ngoloyiso; izisule iNkosi uYehova iinyembezi ebusweni bonke; yaye uya kusishenxisa isisongelo sabantu bakhe ehlabathini lonke, ngenxa yokuba uYehova ethethile."
Isaiah25:9 Kwaye ngaloo mini kuya kuthiwa: Qaphela, lo nguThixo wethu; sithembele kuye, wosihlangula. NguYehova; sithembele kuye, sogcoba, sivuye ngosindiso lwakhe."
Isaiah25:10 Kuba isandla sikaYehova siya kuhlala kule ntaba, noMowabhi uya kunyathelwa phantsi kwakhe, kanye njengokunyathelwa kwengca phambi kwendawo yokulahla inkunkuma."
Isaiah25:11 Aya kuzolula izandla zawo phezu kwawo, njengokuba indadi izaneka izandla ukuba idade;"
Isaiah25:12 Uya kuzigungxula iinqaba ezinde ezinde, azidilize, azidilize emhlabeni, eluthulini."
Isaiah26:1 Ngaloo mini kuya kuvunywa le ngoma ezweni lakwaYuda; Sinesixeko esiliqele; usindiso luya kumkhela uThixo iindonga neendonga.
Isaiah26:2 Vulani amasango, ukuba angene amalungisa agcina inyaniso."
Isaiah26:3 Ocinga ngawe uya kumgcina enoxolo, kuba ekholose ngawe."
Isaiah26:4 Kholosa ngoYehova ngonaphakade, kuba uYehova unamandla angunaphakade."
Isaiah26:5 Ngokuba uyabatshabalalisa abahlala phezulu; umzi ophakamileyo uyawumisa; yibeke phantsi, yibeke phantsi; yizise eluthulini."
Isaiah26:6 Unyawo luya kukunyathela, iinyawo zabasweleyo, amanyathelo amahlwempu."
Isaiah26:7 Indlela yamalungisa inobulungisa; Wena ulilungisa uyawulinganisela umendo wamalungisa.
Isaiah26:8 Ewe, silindele kuwe, Yehova, emendweni wemigwebo yakho; umnqweno wemiphefumlo yethu kukukhumbula igama lakho."
Isaiah26:9 Ngomphefumlo wam ndakunqwenela ebusuku; ewe, ngomoya wam ophakathi kwam, ndiya kukufuna kamsinya, ngokuba ekufikeni kwemigwebo yakho phezu komhlaba, baya kufunda ubulungisa abemi behlabathi."
Isaiah26:10 Makabekelwe ongendawo, angafundi bulungisa; ezweni lobulungisa uya kwenza ububi, angabuboni ubukhulu bukaYehova."
Isaiah26:11 Nkosi, xa siphakamile isandla sakho, aziyi kukubona; ewe, umlilo weentshaba zakho uya kuwatshisa."
Isaiah26:12 Yehova, nguwe osinike uxolo, ngokuba yonke imisebenzi yethu uyenze kuthi."
Isaiah26:13 Yehova, Thixo wethu, besiphethwe ngabanye ookumkani ngaphandle kwakho; kodwa ngawe wedwa siya kulinqula igama lakho."
Isaiah26:14 Abafileyo abo abasayi kuba saphila; bafile, abasayi kuvuka; ngoko ke, wabavelela, wabatshabalalisa, watshabalalisa konke ukukhunjulwa kwabo."
Isaiah26:15 Ubandisile abantu, Yehova, ubandisile abantu; Uzukisiwe; Ubuzise eziphelweni zehlabathi;"
Isaiah26:16 Yehova, babekuvelela embandezelweni, bathulula umthandazo ngesohlwayo sakho."
Isaiah26:17 Njengomfazi omithiyo oseza kuzala, uba sentlungwini yaye ukhalela ezindleleni zakhe; saba njalo emehlweni akho, Yehova."
Isaiah26:18 Samitha, sisezintlungwini, sazala umphefumlo ngokufuziselayo; asilisindisanga ihlabathi; abemi behlabathi abakhubekanga."
Isaiah26:19 Abafileyo bakho baya kuphila, nesidumbu sam siya kuvuka; sukani nimemelele, nina bahleli eluthulini; kuba uya kuba ngumbethe wezityalo umbethe wakho, nehlabathi libavuthulule abangasekhoyo."
Isaiah26:20 Hambani, bantu bam, ningene emagumbini enu angaphakathi, nivale iingcango zenu; zimela umzuzwana, ude uphele umsindo."
Isaiah26:21 Kuba, yabonani, uYehova uphuma endaweni yakhe, ukuze abavelele abemi behlabathi ngenxa yobubi babo;"
Isaiah27:1 Ngaloo mini uYehova uya kuyibetha iLeviyatan, inyoka elomeleleyo, neLeviyatan, inyoka ephinyaphinyelayo, ngekrele layo elinzima, likhulu, elo lomeleleyo; liya kuyibulala inamba elwandle."
Isaiah27:2 Vumani kuye namhla, uthi, Isidiliya sewayini ebomvu;"
Isaiah27:3 Mna, iNkosi, ndiya kunisindisa; ndiya kusinkcenkceshela yonke iminithi; ukuba ndiwugcine imini nobusuku, ukuze kungabikho mntu uwonakalisayo."
Isaiah27:4 Ubushushu abukho kum; Bendiya kucanda kuwo, ndiwatshise kunye."
Isaiah27:5 Makawathabathe amandla am, axolelane nam; wenze uxolo nam."
Isaiah27:6 Abo baphuma kwaYakobi uya kwendelisela iingcambu, uSirayeli aqhame iintyatyambo, axhobe, awuzalise umhlaba ngeziqhamo."
Isaiah27:7 Ngaba wayembetha na xa wayebetha abo babembetha? Wabulawa na ngokubulawa kwababulewe nguye?
Isaiah27:8 Uneqabane lakho, ukuba lithe labonakala, wolwa nalo; awubambe umoya wakhe ngemini yolophu lwasempumalanga."
Isaiah27:9 Ngenxa yoko ububi bukaYakobi buya kuhlanjululwa; kwaye esi sisiqhamo sonke sokususa isono sakhe; ukuba uthe wawenza onke amatye esibingelelo njengekalika ephukileyo, ayiyi kuma iziphunzi zemithi nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo."
Isaiah27:10 Ke wona umzi onqatyisiweyo uya kuba yintlango, nekhaya laba yintlango; ithole liya kudla khona, liguge, liwadle amasebe awo."
Isaiah27:11 Ukuba amasebe awo abuna, ophulwa; beza abafazi abo bazitshisa; ngokuba bengabantu abangenangqondo; ngoko ke uMenzi wabo akayi kuba nanceba kubo, noMdali wabo akayi kuba nanceba kubo."
Isaiah27:12 Ngaloo mini uYehova uya kunibetha, ethabathela emlanjeni, ase emlanjeni waseYiputa, nihlanganiselwe ngabanye ngabanye, nina nyana bakaSirayeli."
Isaiah27:13 Ngaloo mini kuya kukhaliswa ixilongo elikhulu, yaye abo babesele beza kutshabalala kwilizwe laseAsiriya nabo babethinjwe kwilizwe laseYiputa baya kuza, banqule uYehova entabeni engcwele eYerusalem."
Isaiah28:1 Yeha ke, isithsaba sekratshi, amanxila akwaEfrayim, ebengezela ngaso intyantyambo etyatyambileyo, encotsheni yeentlambo ezichumileyo zababuleweyo yiwayini!"
Isaiah28:2 Yabona, iNkosi inendoda eyomeleleyo, eyomeleleyo, eya kulithoba ihlabathi ngesandla sayo njengesiphango sesichotho, njengesiphango esibhubhisayo, njengokuphalazeka kwamanzi amaninzi."
Isaiah28:3 Siya kunyashwa isithsaba sekratshi, amanxila akwaEfrayim;"
Isaiah28:4 Kwaye ukukhanya kokukhanya okusentlanjeni etyebileyo kuya kuba yintyatyambo edubulayo, nanjengesiqhamo esikhawulezayo ngaphambi kokuba kufike ihlobo; athi oyibonayo, abone, isesandleni sakhe, ayidle;"
Isaiah28:5 Ngaloo mini uYehova wemikhosi uya kuba phakathi kwamasalela abantu bakhe isithsaba sokuhomba, nesangqawe sokuhomba;"
Isaiah28:6 unjengomoya wogwebo kwabahleli ematyaleni, nobugorha kwabangenisa imfazwe esangweni."
Isaiah28:7 Kwanabo ke baphambukile ewayinini, bahexile ekunxileni; umbingeleli nomprofeti bayotywe sisiselo esinxilisayo, badleke yiwayini, bayahexa sisiselo esinxilisayo; bayalahleka ngemibono, bayagexa ekugwebeni."
Isaiah28:8 Kuba zonke iitafile zizele ngumhlanzo nomdaka, akukho ndawo ihlambulukileyo."
Isaiah28:9 Uya kufundisa bani na ukwazi? Ngubani na oya kumqondisa loo mfundiso? abalunyulweyo ebisini, abalunyulweyo ebisini."
Isaiah28:10 Ngokokuba umthetho umelwe kukuba ngumthetho phezu komthetho, umthetho ube ngumthetho phezu komthetho; umgca phezu komgca, umgca phezu komgca; incinci apha, kwaye incinci phaya."
Isaiah28:11 Kuba uya kuthetha kwaba bantu ngemilebe yolunye ulwimi, nangalulwimi lumbi;"
Isaiah28:12 owathi kubo, Nantsi indawo yokuphumla, phumzani abadiniweyo; kwaye olu lusindiso; abavuma ukuva."
Isaiah28:13 Ke ilizwi likaYehova laba ngumthetho kubo, umthetho phezu komthetho; umgca phezu komgca, umgca phezu komgca; intwana apha, intwana phaya; ukuze bahambe bawe umva, baphuke, babanjiswe, babanjiswe."
Isaiah28:14 Liphulaphuleni ke ilizwi likaYehova, nina bagxeki, nina balawuli baseYerusalem."
Isaiah28:15 Ngokuba nisithi, Sinqophisene nokufa, sivumelene nelabafileyo; ukuba kuthe kwabakho ulwaphulo olukhulu, aluyi kusiwela;"
Isaiah28:16 Ngako oko itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndibeka eZiyon ilitye, ilitye locikido, ilitye elinqabileyo lembombo, loseko olusekiweyo; lowo ukholwayo akayi kungxama."
Isaiah28:17 Ndiya kubeka isiko elutyani lokulinganisa, nobulungisa ndibeke ulutya lokulinganisa;"
Isaiah28:18 Uya kubhangiswa umnqophiso wenu nokufa, ungabikho umnqophiso wenu neNkosi; xa kudlula indyikitya yokufa, iya kunyathelwa phantsi."
Isaiah28:19 Ukususela ekundulukeni kwayo, iya kunithabatha; ngokuba ingomso liyadlula, imini nobusuku; kwaye kuya kucaphukisa ukuqonda oko."
Isaiah28:20 Ngokuba iibhedi zimfutshane kunomntu, nengubo yokwaleka incinane kunokuba azisongele ngayo."
Isaiah28:21 Kuba uYehova uya kuma, njengasentabeni yePersim; uya kucaphuka njengasentilini yeGibheyon, ukuba enze isenzo sakhe, isenzo sakhe esibalulekileyo; yaye uyawufeza umsebenzi wakhe, isenzo sakhe esimangalisayo."
Isaiah28:22 Musani ukuhlekisa ngoku, ukuze zingatywinwa iintambo zenu; kuba ndisivile ngeNkosi enguMongami uYehova wemikhosi ukutshabalala kwehlabathi lonke."
Isaiah28:23 Phulaphulani kwaye niphulaphule ilizwi lam; liphulaphuleni ilizwi lam.
Isaiah28:24 Umlimi ulima iimini ezi zonke na, ukuba ahlwayele? Uya kuzivula na iibhokisi zelizwe lakhe, aziqhekeze na?"
Isaiah28:25 Akathi na, akuba eyiqondile imbonakalo yayo, azilahle iimpethu, aze alahle ikumin, aze afefe ingqolowa yokuqala, nerhasi, nokhula endaweni yazo?"
Isaiah28:26 Kuba uThixo wakhe uyamcebisa aze amfundise.
Isaiah28:27 Ngenxa yokuba imibhobho ayikrolwanga ngesikroba, ayivulelwanga ivili yenqwelo ikumin; ke iimpethu zibulawa ngentonga, nekumin ngentonga."
Isaiah28:28 Ingqolowa iya kucolwa; kuba ayiyi kuyibhula, ayiyi kuyaphula ngevili yenqwelo yakhe yokulwa, ayiyi kuyaphula nabakhweli bayo."
Isaiah28:29 Nale nto iphuma kuYehova wemikhosi, obalaseleyo ngecebo, nomsebenzi oncomekayo."
Isaiah29:1 Yeha, iAriyeli, Ariyeli, mzi kaDavide! ukwanda ngonyaka; wazibingelela."
Isaiah29:2 Ndiya kuyihlisela ishwangusha iAriyeli, kubekho ukuncwina nokubandezeleka, ndibe njengeAriyeli;"
Isaiah29:3 Ndiza kumisa inkampu ngakuwe ndize ndikurhangqe ngentaba ndize ndikumisele iinqaba;
Isaiah29:4 uya kuphoswa emhlabeni, uthethe usemhlabeni, ukuthetha kwakho kudambe eluthulini, nelizwi lakho liphume emhlabeni njengelomntu onomoya wokuvumisa, ukuthetha kwakho kuhlebeze eluthulini."
Isaiah29:5 Ingxokolo yabakuphambukeli bakho iya kuba njengothuli olucolekileyo, ingxokolo yamagorha ibe njengomququ ophephukayo; ewe, kuya kwenzeka kanye."
Isaiah29:6 uYehova wemikhosi uya kunivelela ngeendudumo, nangenyikima, nangesandi esikhulu, nangesaqhwithi, nangesaqhwithi, nangelangatye lomlilo otshabalalisayo."
Isaiah29:7 Yoba njengephupha ebusuku, ingxokolo yeentlanga zonke eziyiphumela umkhosi iAriyeli;"
Isaiah29:8 Koba njengokuthi olambileyo aphuphe, akhangele, adle; kodwa uvuka ulambatha umphefumlo wakhe, mhlawumbi njengomntu onxaniweyo aphuphe, akhangele, asele; evuka, nanko ediniwe, nomphefumlo wakhe ulambile; kuya kuba njalo ngengxokolo yeentlanga zonke ezilwa ngokuchasene neNtaba yeZiyon."
Isaiah29:9 Yiba wena, umangaliswe; biza kwaye ubize; Banxilile kungewayini; bayaphuthaphutha, kodwa hayi ngesiselo esinxilisayo."
Isaiah29:10 Ngenxa yokuba uYehova ukulalise ebuthongweni obunzulu yaye uyawavala amehlo akho; Wagubungela abaprofeti benu neenkokeli zenu, iimboni zenu."
Isaiah29:11 Kuwe, umbono wezinto zonke ufana namazwi encwadi etywiniweyo, athi umntu ayinike umphengululi, esithi: “Yifunde; Wathi yena, Andinako; ngokuba iqinisekisiwe."
Isaiah29:12 Kwaye incwadi inikwe umntu ongafundanga, kwaye kuthiwa: Yifunde, kwaye athi, Andifundanga."
Isaiah29:13 Ngako oko wathi uYehova, Ngenxa enokuba aba bantu besondela kum ngomlomo wabo, bendibeke ngemilebe yomlomo wabo; kanti intliziyo yabo ikude lee kum, nokundoyika kwabo kungomlomo wabantu."
Isaiah29:14 Ngako oko, yabona, ndiya kuphinda ndibaphathe aba bantu ummangaliso, ummangaliso, ummangaliso; butshone ubulumko bezilumko zabo, isithele ingqondo yezilumko zabo."
Isaiah29:15 Yeha ke abo banqwenela ukufihla iingcinga zabo kuYehova, benze imisebenzi yabo emnyameni, bathi, Ngubani na osibonayo? kwaye ngubani esimaziyo?"
Isaiah29:16 Ewe, ukutshintshisa kwenu kuya kuba njengodongwe lombumbi; kuba umsebenzi walowo uyenzileyo uthi, Akandenzanga na kum? Okanye ngaba icebo lakhe lithi, Akaqondi?"
Isaiah29:17 Asiloxesha lifutshane na ukuba iLebhanon ibe yintsimi echumayo, nentsimi echumayo igqalwe njengehlathi?"
Isaiah29:18 Ngaloo mini baya kuva amazwi encwadi, namehlo eemfama abone ebumnyameni nasebumnyameni."
Isaiah29:19 Kwaye abalulamileyo baya kukwandisa ukugcoba kwabo eNkosini, kwaye amahlwempu phakathi kwabantu aya kugcoba ngoyiNgcwele kaSirayeli."
Isaiah29:20 Ngokuba ubhuqiwe umngcangcazelisi, utshabalele umgxeki, batshatyalaliswe bonke abalindele ubutshinga."
Isaiah29:21 Owenza umntu ngobugwenxa ngenxa yelizwi amthiyele owohlwayayo esangweni, Limkeke ilungisa ilize."
Isaiah29:22 Ngako oko, kwathiwa nguYehova, owamkhululayo uAbraham ngendlu kaYakobi, uYakobi akayi kudana, ngoku, nobuso bakhe abuyi kuba buthuntu."
Isaiah29:23 Kwaye ekuboneni kwabantwana bakhe, umsebenzi wezandla zam, phakathi kwabo, baya kulingcwalisa igama lam, bamngcwalise oyiNgcwele kaYakobi, bamoyike uThixo kaSirayeli."
Isaiah29:24 Kwanemiphefumlo ebhadulayo iya kuqonda, nabo bakhalazayo baya kufunda ukufunda."
Isaiah30:1 Yeha ke aba baqhayisi, utsho uYehova; kwaye uyigqume ngesigqubuthelo, kungengamphefumlo wam, ukuze bongeze isono phezu kwesono;"
Isaiah30:2 owehla waya eYiputa, akabuza emlonyeni wam; ukuba bomeleze ngamandla kaFaro, bakholose ngomthunzi weYiputa!"
Isaiah30:3 Ngoko ke amandla kaFaro aya kuba lidano kuni, nikholose ngomthunzi weYiputa ngehlazo lenu."
Isaiah30:4 Kuba iinkosana zakhe zaziseTsowan, noonozakuzaku bakhe bafike eHanes."
Isaiah30:5 Bonke bephela baneentloni ngabantu abangabancedi nganto, kungekho ncedo naluncedo, kodwa beneentloni, behlazekile."
Isaiah30:6 Umyalezo wamarhamncwa asezantsi: Ezweni leembandezelo neembandezelo, apho kuphuma khona ingonyama entsha, nengonyama entsha, nenyoka, nenyoka ephaphazelayo, ubutyebi babo baya kubuthwala emagxeni amaesile, nobutyebi babo bube phezu kwamagxa ama-esile ubutyebi obusemagxeni abo imihlambi yeenkamela, kubantu abangenakuyinceda nangayiphi na indlela."
Isaiah30:7 AmaYiputa ke anceda ngelize, nangelize; ngenxa yoko ndadanduluka ndathi, Amandla abo ngawokuhlala bathi cwaka."
Isaiah30:8 Yiya ngoku, ukubhale etafileni ephambi kwabo, ukubhale encwadini, kube khona ngonaphakade kanaphakade."
Isaiah30:9 Ngabantu abazele lukreqo, ngoonyana bobuxoki, ngoonyana abangevayo isiyalo sikaYehova;"
Isaiah30:10 abathi kwiimboni, Ze ningaboni; nakubaprofeti bathi, Musani ukusiprofetela iinyaniso, ningasiprofeti ubuxoki, ningasiprofeti ubuxoki;"
Isaiah30:11 Sukani endleleni, phumani endleleni, Lowo Ungcwele kaSirayeli umi phambi kwethu."
Isaiah30:12 Ngenxa yeso sizathu, kwathiwa ngoyiNgcwele kaSirayeli: Ngenxa yokuba nilidelile eli lizwi, kwaye nakholosa ngengcinezelo nenkohlakalo, kwaye nihleli kuyo;"
Isaiah30:13 Ngako oko, obo bungendawo kuni buya kuba njengexesha eliza kuwa, elaphulwa eludongeni olude, oluqhekezwa ngokuqhwanyaza kwalo."
Isaiah30:14 Kwaye uya kuwuqhekeza njengokuqhekezwa kwesitya sombumbi akayi kusinda, ukuze ngokudubula kwakhe kungafunyanwa ilaphu lokubasa umlilo eziko, nokuba kukha amanzi equleni."
Isaiah30:15 Ngokuba itsho iNkosi, uYehova oyiNgcwele kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ekuphumleni nasekuphumleni uya kugcinwa; ngokuzolileyo nangethemba liya kuba ngamandla akho, kwaye awuzange ufune."
Isaiah30:16 Wathi ke yena, Hayi; ngokuba siya kubaleka ngamahashe; ke ngoko, niya kubaleka, nithi: Siya kukhwela kwiimbaleki; ngoko ke, abo banisukelayo baya kungxama."
Isaiah30:17 Niya kubaleka niliwaka, ekukhalimeni komnye; uya kusinda esohlwayweni sabahlanu, ude uhlale njengesibane encotsheni yentaba, nanjengebhanile endulini."
Isaiah30:18 Ngako oko uYehova uya kukha alinde ukuze abe nenceba kuni, aphakame, ukuze abe nemfesane kuni; ngokuba nguThixo wogwebo uYehova; hayi, uyolo lwabo bonke abalindele kuye!"
Isaiah30:19 Ngokuba iintlanga ziya kuhlala eZiyon, eYerusalem; akusenako ukukhala; ukuba akeva, wophendula wena."
Isaiah30:20 Nokuba uYehova aninike isonka sobandezelweyo namanzi okubandezeleka, abalusi benu bangabi saphemba ekoneni, amehlo enu esababona abalusi benu;"
Isaiah30:21 iindlebe zakho zive ilizwi ngasemva kwakho, lisithi, Nantsi indlela; hambani ngayo, nokuba nisinga ekunene, nokuba nisinga ekhohlo."
Isaiah30:22 Ize nenze inqambi isigqubuthelo semifanekiso yenu eqingqiweyo yesilivere, nesingxobo semifanekiso yenu segolide; wothi kuyo, Hamba uhambe."
Isaiah30:23 Wokunika imvula imbewu yakho, uwuhlwayele umhlaba; nesonka semveliso yomhlaba, sibe sityebi, sibe ninzi; iinkomo zakho ziya kudla ngaloo mini emadlelweni abanzi."
Isaiah30:24 Kwangokunjalo iinkomo neemazi zamaesile eziwugcinayo umhlaba ziya kudla ingca ecocekileyo, eselwayo ngemihlakulo, nesefo."
Isaiah30:25 Kuya kubakho imijelo nemisinga yamanzi ezintabeni zonke ezinde naphezu kweenduli zonke eziphakamileyo, ngemini yembulalo enkulu, ekuweni kweenqaba ezinde."
Isaiah30:26 Kananjalo ukukhanya kwenyanga kuya kuba njengokukhanya kwelanga, nokukhanya kwelanga kube njengokukhanya kweentsuku ezisixhenxe ngokuphindwe kabini, ngemini yokubopha kukaYehova abantu bakhe, apholise inxeba yenxeba labo."
Isaiah30:27 Yabona, igama likaYehova liyeza, livela kude, evutha ngumsindo, nomthwalo wakhe unzima; umlomo wakhe uzele ngumsindo, nolwimi lwakhe lunjengomlilo odlayo."
Isaiah30:28 Ukuphefumla kwakhe njengomlambo otyhutyhayo, kuya kufikelela esazulwini sentamo, ukuze azitshabalalise iintlanga ngesihluzo samampunge; kwaye kuya kubakho umkhala emihlathini yeentlanga ezibalahlekisayo."
Isaiah30:29 Niya kuyivuma ingoma njengobusuku bomthendeleko; nokuchwayitha kwentliziyo njengokuhamba komntu ngesigodlo ukuya entabeni kaYehova, kuMthetheli wakwaSirayeli."
Isaiah30:30 uYehova uya kulivakalisa ilizwi lakhe elinendili, alise isandla sakhe esiseleyo, ngokuvutha komsindo wakhe, nokulenya komlilo otshabalalisayo, ekuchithachitheni isaqhwithi nesichotho."
Isaiah30:31 Kuba ngelizwi likaYehova umAsiriya obethe ngentonga uya koyiswa.
Isaiah30:32 Kuyo yonke indawo apho intsika ayimisayo uYehova phezu kwayo, kuya kubakho amagubu namacangci; uya kulwa naye ngeemfazwe ezingcangcazelisayo."
Isaiah30:33 Ngokuba ibikhona iTofete kwakudala; ewe, ilungiselwe ukumkani; wawunzulu, wawenza banzi; imfumba yakhe ingumlilo neenkuni ezininzi; uMoya kaYehova, njengomlambo wesulfure, uwutshisa ngomlilo."
Isaiah31:1 Yeha, abehla baye eYiputa ukuba bacele uncedo; abo bakhwele amahashe bakholosa ngeemoto, ngokuba zininzi; nabamahashe, ngokuba beqine kunene; kodwa abakhangeli kuLowo Ungcwele kaSirayeli, yaye abamfuni uYehova!"
Isaiah31:2 Ulumkile ke naye; uya kuzisa ububi, angawakhumbuli amazwi akhe; uya kuvuka endlwini yenginingini, amandla noncedo lwamanginingini."
Isaiah31:3 AmaYiputa ngabantu, akangoThixo; amahashe awo yinyama, akamoya. Ukuba uYehova uyasolula isandla sakhe, umncedi uya kuwa, abo bancedwayo baya kuwa, yaye bonke xa bebonke baya kusilela."
Isaiah31:4 Ngokuba utsho uYehova kum ukuthi, Njengengonyama, njengengonyama, igquma ixhoba layo, njengoko bekhala ngako abalusi abaninzi, ayiyi kubawoyika amazwi abo, ayiyi kuthotywa singxokozelo eyabo ayikho. uYehova wemikhosi uya kuhla ngolo hlobo ukuze alwele intaba yaseZiyon nenduli yayo."
Isaiah31:5 uYehova wemikhosi uya kuyikhusela iYerusalem njengeentaka; kwaye uya kusikhusela asisindise; kwaye uya kuyigcina.
Isaiah31:6 Buyelani kulowo nigwilike kuye oonyana bakaSirayeli;
Isaiah31:7 Kuba ngaloo mini baya kuyilahla elowo imifanekiso yakhe yesilivere, nemifanekiso yakhe yegolide, ezonisileyo izandla zenu."
Isaiah31:8 Ke kaloku uAsiriya uya kuwa likrele, kungengakrele; Ikrele, asilamntu, liya kumtshabalalisa; kodwa uya kusaba phambi kwekrele, nabafana bakhe baya koyika."
Isaiah31:9 Uya kungena enqabeni yakhe esoyika, neenkosana zakhe ziya koyika ibhanile,” utsho uYehova, omlilo uyiZiyon neziko lakhe liseYerusalem."
Isaiah32:1 Yabona, ukumkani uya kulawula ngokobulungisa, abathetheli bathethele ngobulungisa;"
Isaiah32:2 Umntu abe njengendawo yokuzimela xa umoya ubhudlayo, abe njengendawo yokuzimela esiphangweni; njengemijelo yamanzi emhlabeni owomileyo, njengomthunzi wengxondorha enkulu ezweni elibharhileyo."
Isaiah32:3 Akayi kuba mnyama amehlo ababonayo; zibazeke iindlebe zabevayo.
Isaiah32:4 Intliziyo yabangxamileyo iyakuqonda ukwazi, ulwimi lwabathintithayo lulungiselwe ukuthetha kakuhle."
Isaiah32:5 Osweleyo akuyi kuba sathiwa ulilungisa, okanye kuthiwe unesisa;"
Isaiah32:6 Kuba umntu osisidenge uya kuthetha ububi nentliziyo yakhe yenza ububi ngokuhanahanisa nokumxokisa uYehova, ukuze athulule umphefumlo wolambileyo, yaye uya kusitshabalalisa isiselo sonxaniweyo."
Isaiah32:7 Kananjalo izixhobo zongendawo zingendawo: uceba ukutshabalalisa isisweli ngobuxoki, naxa ihlwempu lithetha inyaniso."
Isaiah32:8 Kodwa ke abantu abakhululekileyo bacinga ngezinto ezinkulu kwaye uya kuma kwizinto zesisa.
Isaiah32:9 Vukani, bathuthuzeli; liveni ilizwi lam, zintombi zingakhathaliyo; yiva intetho yam."
Isaiah32:10 Niya koyika imihla emininzi, neminyaka emininzi, zintokazi zingakhathaliyo; ngokuba ukuvuna kuya kuphela;"
Isaiah32:11 Yibani nemihlali, zintombi zingakhathaliyo; yoyikani, nina bangenamsebenzi; khululani, khululani, bhinqani ezinqeni zenu ilaphu elirhabaxa."
Isaiah32:12 Baya kulilela ilize ngenxa yamasimi anqwenelekayo, ngenxa yediliya eneziqhamo."
Isaiah32:13 Kuya kuhluma ameva neenkunzane ezweni labantu bam; ewe, nasezindlwini zonke zovuyo kumzi onoyolo;"
Isaiah32:14 Kuba iingxande ezinde zilahliwe; uninzi lwesixeko luya kuhlala; iinqaba nemboniselo zibe yimihadi ngonaphakade, zibe yimihadi yamahashe asendle, zibe lidlelo leenkomo;"
Isaiah32:15 ade agalele phezu kwethu uMoya ophuma phezulu, isuke intlango ibe yintsimi echumayo, ibe lintsimi echumayo njengehlathi."
Isaiah32:16 Kulapho buya kuhlala ubulungisa entlango, buhlale ubulungisa ezweni elichumayo."
Isaiah32:17 Umsebenzi wobulungisa uya kuba luxolo; ukuze umgwebo ube ngowoxolo, uqiniseke ngonaphakade."
Isaiah32:18 Kwaye abantu bam baya kuhlala ekwakhiweni koxolo nakwiindawo ezikhuselekileyo nasezindaweni zokuphumla ezithe cwaka;
Isaiah32:19 Xa kukho isichotho, yihla uye ehlathini; yaye isixeko siya kuhlala endaweni ephantsi."
Isaiah32:20 Hayi, uyolo lwenu bahlwayela ngasemanzini onke, banyathela ngamanqina eenkomo naweesile."
Isaiah33:1 Yeha, nina baphangi, ningaphangi; yaye benza isidubedube, kodwa abazange benze isidubedube! ukuba uyayeka ukuphanga, uya kuphangwa; yaye ukuba uyayeka ukwenza ukunganyaniseki, baya kwenza ubuqhophololo kuwe."
Isaiah33:2 Yehova, yiba nenceba kuthi; besikulindele; masibe ngamahlwempu kubo rhoqo ekuseni, kwaye siyaphilisa ngamaxesha okubandezeleka."
Isaiah33:3 Kuyasaba abantu ngenxa yesandi sesiphithiphithi; ngenxa yokuphakama kwakho ziyaphangalaliswa iintlanga.
Isaiah33:4 Yaye amaxhoba enu aya kuhlanganiswa, njengoko izihlwele ziqokelelana; uya kubagila njengeenkumbi."
Isaiah33:5 uYehova uphakamile; ngokuba yena ehleli phezulu; uyizalisile iZiyon ngokusesikweni nangobulungisa.
Isaiah33:6 Kuya kubakho ukuqiniseka kwamaxesha akho, nobutyebi bosindiso, nobulumko, nokwazi; ukoyika uYehova bubuncwane bakhe."
Isaiah33:7 Yabona, amagorha abo ayankqangaza ngaphandle; abathunywa boxolo baya kulila ngokukrakra."
Isaiah33:8 Iindlela zezonakele, umhambi umile; Uwaphule umnqophiso, uzidelile iidolophu, akakhathalelanga mntu."
Isaiah33:9 Ihlabathi lithe thaa, lilusizi, iLebhanon ineentloni, ishwabene; iSharon isuke yaba njengenkqantosi; neBhashana neKarmele zibutha iziqhamo zazo."
Isaiah33:10 Kungokunje ndiya kuma, utsho uYehova; ngoku ndiya kuzinyusa; ngoku ndiya kuziphakamisa."
Isaiah33:11 Niya kumitha isikhotha, nizale iindiza; umoya wenu uya kunitshisa njengomlilo."
Isaiah33:12 Iintlanga ziya kuba njengekalika etshisiweyo; baya kutshiswa ngomlilo, njengameva ahlahliweyo."
Isaiah33:13 Yivani, nina madoda, into endiyenzileyo; nani basondeleyo, niwazi amandla am."
Isaiah33:14 Bayankwantya aboni baseZiyon; Uloyiko lwabamangalisa abahanahanisi. Ngubani na kuthi oya kuhlala emlilweni ovuthayo? Ngubani na kuthi oya kuhlala emlilweni ongunaphakade?
Isaiah33:15 Ohamba ngobulungisa, othetha ubulungisa; ocekisayo ubutyebi bobubi, ovuthulula izandla zakhe ukuba angamkeli isicengo, ovingca iindlebe zakhe ukuba eve igazi, ocima amehlo akhe ukuba abone ububi;"
Isaiah33:16 Uya kuhlala ezindaweni eziphakamileyo; Inqaba yakhe yingxonde yeengxondorha; uya kunikwa isonka; amanzi akhe omelela.
Isaiah33:17 Amehlo akho aya kumkhangela ukumkani ebuqaqawulini bakhe, Elimiweyo elikude."
Isaiah33:18 Intliziyo yakho iya kucamanga kukoyika; Uphi umbhali? uphi umamkeli obebala iinqaba?
Isaiah33:19 uhlanga lomlilo akuyi kulubona, uhlanga oluntetho inzulu kunokuba ulubona; Ngolwimi olukhubekisayo, eningenakuluqonda."
Isaiah33:20 Khangela phezu kweZiyon, isixeko somtshato wethu; ezintongeni zawo akuyi kuncothuka, neentambo zawo zonke aziyi kunqunyulwa."
Isaiah33:21 Kodwa apho kuthi uYehova ozukileyo uya kuba yindawo enemilambo ebanzi nemisinga equkuqelayo; apho kungangeni khona mkhombe ubheqayo, kungekho nanqanawa yobukroti inokudlula khona."
Isaiah33:22 Ngenxa yokuba uYehova enguMgwebi wethu, uYehova nguMmisi-mthetho wethu, uYehova nguKumkani wethu; yena wosisindisa."
Isaiah33:23 Izalisekile imisebenzi yakho; aziyibopheleli iseyile yazo, aziyitwabululi iseyile; kulapho kwabiwe khona amaxhoba amaninzi amaxhoba iziqhwala ziya kuphanga."
Isaiah33:24 Akanako ummi wakhona ukuthi, Ndiyafa; abantu abahlala khona bobuxolelwe ubugwenxa babo."
Isaiah34:1 Sondelani, zintlanga, nive; yivani, zintlanga; malive ihlabathi nenzaliseko yalo; elimiweyo nenzaliseko yalo."
Isaiah34:2 Ngokuba umsindo kaYehova uphezu kweentlanga zonke, nobushushu bakhe buphezu komkhosi wazo wonke; Wababetha ngesiqalekiso, wabanikela ekusikweni."
Isaiah34:3 Ababuleweyo baya kungcwatywa, kunyuke ukunuka kwabo ezidumbini zabo, zigutyungelwe iintaba ligazi labo."
Isaiah34:4 Lonke ibhunga lezulu liya kutshabalala, izulu lisongwe njengombhalo, onke amacandelo alo awile njengegqabi lomdiliya eliwayo, nanjengekhiwane eliwa emkhiwaneni."
Isaiah34:5 Ngokuba ezulwini ikrele lam liya kuhlanjwa; yabona, liya kuhla phezu koEdom, naphezu kwabantu endisiqalekiso, ibe ngumgwebo."
Isaiah34:6 Umkhonto kaYehova uzele ligazi, utyetyiswe ngamanqatha, uligazi leemvana nezeenciniba, namanqatha ezintso zeenkunzi zeegusha; ngenxa yokuba uYehova unombingelelo eBhotsera nokuxhela okukhulu kwilizwe lakwaEdom."
Isaiah34:7 Kuya kuhla iinqu kunye nabo, iinkunzi ezintsha, kunye neenkomo; yaye ilizwe labo liya kumanziswa ligazi, nothuli lwabo luya kutyeba."
Isaiah34:8 Ngokuba le yimini yempindezelo kaYehova, unyaka wempindezelo ibango leZiyon."
Isaiah34:9 Imilambo yabo iya kuba ngumthwebeba, uthuli lwabo lube yisalfure, ilizwe labo libe yitela etshayo."
Isaiah34:10 Aliyi kucinywa imini nobusuku; umsi wayo uya kunyuka ngonaphakade; Ihlala isenkangala kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana; akuyi kucanda mntu kulo, kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni."
Isaiah34:11 Ke bona ububi nobukrakra bobudla ilifa; kuhlale khona isikhova nehlungulu, abeke phezu kwalo irhengqa lesidubedube namatye angamampunge."
Isaiah34:12 Baya kubizela ebukumkanini izidwangube zakhe, kungabikho bani khona, zonke iinkosana zakhe zibe lilize."
Isaiah34:13 Kuya kuhluma imithana enameva ezingxandeni zakhe, amarhawu namakhakakhaka ezingxandeni zakhe ezinde;"
Isaiah34:14 Amarhamncwa omqwebedu okunene aya kuqubisana namarhamncwa esi siqithi, nenjengele ibize iqabane layo; nesikhova siya kuphumla khona size siyifumanele indawo yokuphumla."
Isaiah34:15 Kulapho inyoka ejuba ijuba iya kwenza indlwane yayo, izale amaqanda, ifukame emthunzini wayo; yaye amaxhalanga aya kuhlanganisana, elowo neqabane lakhe."
Isaiah34:16 Khangelani incwadi kaYehova, niyilese; ngokuba ndiwuwisele umthetho umlomo wam, ukuba uzihlanganise nomoya wakhe."
Isaiah34:17 Wabalawula ngamaqashiso, Sabatyakatya ke isandla sakhe; baya kulidla ilifa ngonaphakade, bahlale kulo ukusuka kwesinye isizukulwana kuse kwesinye."
Isaiah35:1 Inemihlali intlango nomqwebedu; iyagcoba inkqantosi, iyadubula njengentyatyambo."
Isaiah35:2 Liya kutyatyamba kakhulu, libe nemihlali, ewe, ngovuyo nemihlali; ziya kububona ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova, nozuko loThixo wethu."
Isaiah35:3 Yomelezani izandla eziwileyo, niwaqinise amadolo agexayo."
Isaiah35:4 Yithini kwabantliziyo zinkwantyayo, Yomelelani, ningoyiki; yabonani, uThixo wenu uyeza enempindezelo, nguThixo ophindezelayo; uya kuza kunihlangula."
Isaiah35:5 Aya kuvulwa amehlo eemfama, zivulwe iindlebe zezithulu;"
Isaiah35:6 Isiqhwala siya kutsiba njengexhama, nolwimi lwesimumu luya kukhala; kuba amanzi aya kugalela engobozini, nemilambo engobozini."
Isaiah35:7 Umhlaba owomileyo wojika ube lidike, owomileyo ube yimithombo yamanzi; Kuba apho zilala khona iimpungutye, kuya kubakho utyani ngeengcongolo neengcongolo."
Isaiah35:8 Kuya kubakho umendo, kubekho umendo, kuthiwe ukubizwa kwayo, yindlela engcwele le oyinqambi akayi kudlula kuyo; iya kuba yeyabo bona: abahambayo nokuba bezizidenge, abasayi kumka kuyo."
Isaiah35:9 Akuyi kubakho ngonyama khona, aliyi kuphuma rhamncwa khona, aliyi kufunyanwa khona; ke abakhululwa ngokuhlawulelwa baya kuhamba khona;"
Isaiah35:10 Kwaye abakhululwa beNkosi baya kubuya kwaye baya kuza eZiyon beneengoma novuyo olungayi kubuyela kwiintloko zabo; baya kubafumana imihlali nemivuyo, sisabe isingqala nokuncwina."
Isaiah36:1 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinesine wobukumkani bukaHezekiya, ukumkani waseAsiriya uSenaribhe wayithimba yonke imizi enqatyisiweyo yakwaYuda, wayingenela."
Isaiah36:2 Ukumkani waseAsiriya wathumela abathetheli baseLakishe eYerusalem kukumkani uHezekiya, benempi enkulu. Wema kwitonela lechibi eliphezulu, kwindlela enkulu yomyezo womalusi."
Isaiah36:3 Waphuma waya kuye uEliyakim unyana kaHilekiya umgcini wendlu noShebhena unobhala noYowaki unyana ka-Asafu umphathi wenkundla.
Isaiah36:4 Wathi kubo uRabheshake, Yithini kuHezekiya, Itsho iNkosi enkulu, ukumkani waseAsiriya, ukuthi, Liyintoni na ithemba lakho?"
Isaiah36:5 Ndithi (kakade la ngamazwi alambathayo), ndinengqiqo namandla emfazwe; ngoku ukholose ngabani na, ukreqile nje kum?"
Isaiah36:6 Uyabona, ukholose ngeYiputa, ngentonga yengcongolo evikivekileyo; eya kuthi, xa athe umntu ayame ngayo, imngene esandleni, imhlabe; uya kuba njalo kuFaro, ukumkani waseYiputa, nakubo bonke abakholose ngaye."
Isaiah36:7 Ke ukuba nithi kum, Sikholose ngoYehova uThixo wethu, ndithi, Asinguye na uHezekiya owadiliza izibingelelo eziphakamileyo nezibingelelo zakhe, wathi kumaYuda nakwiYerusalem, Ize niqubude phambi kwesi sibingelelo sodwa?"
Isaiah36:8 Ke kaloku, yenza isibambiso kukumkani wam, ukumkani waseAsiriya, yaye ndokunika amawaka amabini amahashe, ukuba uthe wabeka abakhweli-mahashe ecaleni kwakho."
Isaiah36:9 Wothini na ke ukulahla omnye wakubathetheli babakhonzi abancinane benkosi yam, ukholose ngeYiputa ngeenqwelo zokulwa nangabamahashe?"
Isaiah36:10 Yaye ngoku ndiliphakamisile eli hlabathi ngaphandle kukaYehova ukuba ndilitshabalalise? uYehova uthe kum, Nyuka uye kweli lizwe, ulonakalise."
Isaiah36:11 Wathi uEliyakim, noShebhena, noYowaki kuRabheshake, Thetha kubakhonzi bakho ngesi-Aram; ngokuba siyayiqonda, anithethi kuthi ngesiYuda ezindlebeni zabantu abaseludongeni."
Isaiah36:12 Wathi uRabheshake, Inkosi yam indithume ukuba ndiwathethe la mazwi enkosini yakho na, nakuwe na? Ndathi ke, akandithumanga na kumadoda abehleli eludongeni, ukuze adle ilindle lawo, asele newayini yawo?"
Isaiah36:13 Wesuka wema uRabheki, wadanduluka ngelizwi elikhulu ngolwimi lwamaYuda, wathi: “Waveni amazwi okumkani omkhulu, ukumkani waseAsiriya."
Isaiah36:14 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Makanganilukuhli uHezekiya, ngokuba akayi kuba nako ukunihlangula."
Isaiah36:15 Musani ukumvumela uHezekiya anikholise ngoYehova ngokuthi, Inene, uYehova wosisindisa; lo mzi awuyi kunikelwa esandleni sokumkani waseAsiriya."
Isaiah36:16 Musani ukumphulaphula uHezekiya, ngokuba uthi kukumkani waseAsiriya, Yenza umnqophiso nam ngomnikelo, uphume kum; badle elowo iidiliya zakhe, badle elowo umkhiwane wakhe, basele elowo amanzi equla lakhe;"
Isaiah36:17 ndide ndize ndinise ezweni elinjengelizwe lenu, ilizwe lengqolowa newayini entsha, ilizwe lesonka nezidiliya."
Isaiah36:18 Zilumkeleni, hleze anilahlekise uHezekiya, esithi, uYehova wosisindisa. Oothixo beentlanga balihlangule na ilizwe labo esandleni sokumkani waseAsiriya?"
Isaiah36:19 Baphi na oothixo baseHamati neArfadi? Baphi na oothixo baseSefarvayim? Balihlangule na elakwaSamari esandleni sam?
Isaiah36:20 Nguwuphi na koothixo bonke bala mazwe owalihlangulayo ilizwe lakhe esandleni sam, ukuze uYehova ayisindise iYerusalem esandleni sam?"
Isaiah36:21 Bathi cwaka ke, abamphendula nelizwi elinye; ngokuba umthetho wokumkani ubusithi, Musani ukumphendula."
Isaiah36:22 uEliyakim unyana kaHilekiya owayephethe indlu uShebhena unobhala noYowaki unyana ka-Asafu irhuluneli beza kuHezekiya beneengubo ezikrazukileyo baza bamxelela amazwi kaRabheshake.
Isaiah37:1 Akuva ukumkani uHezekiya, wazikrazula iingubo zakhe, wazigqubuthela ngezirhwexayo, wangena endlwini kaYehova."
Isaiah37:2 Wathuma uEliyakim, umgcini wendlu, noShebhena umbhali, nababingeleli abakhulu, bezibhinqe ezirhwexayo, kuIsaya umprofeti, unyana ka-Amos."
Isaiah37:3 Bathi kuye, Kwathiwa nguHezekiya, Namhlanje yimini yokusindeka, yeyokugiba, yogiba; ngokuba kuzelwe oonyana, akakho ke amandla okuzala."
Isaiah37:4 Mhlawumbi uYehova uThixo wakho uya kuwava amazwi kaRabheshake, lowo ukumkani waseAsiriya, inkosi yakhe, emthumeleyo ukungcikiva uTHIXO ophilayo, yaye uya kuwakhalimela amazwi uYehova uThixo wakho awavileyo; ke ngoko, phakamisa umthandazo wakho ngenxa yentsalela."
Isaiah37:5 Beza ke abakhonzi bokumkani uHezekiya kuIsaya.
Isaiah37:6 Wathi uIsaya kubo, Yizani, nithi enkosini yenu, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Musa ukuwoyika amazwi owavileyo, abawenze kum abakhonzi bokumkani waseAsiriya."
Isaiah37:7 Yabona, ndimthumela umoya, ukuba eve udaba olubi, abuyele ke ezweni lakhe; yaye ndiya kumnqumla ngekrele elizweni lakhe."
Isaiah37:8 Ngoko zabuya iinkosana zikaRabheshake zaza zamfumana ukumkani waseAsiriya esilwa neLibhena, ngenxa yokuba wayevile ukuba wayeyishiyile iLakishe."
Isaiah37:9 Weva uTiraka, ukumkani wakwaKushi, wathi, Uphumile weza kulwa nawe. Wathi akukuva oko, wathumela abathunywa kuHezekiya, esithi,"
Isaiah37:10 Yiza uthethe kuHezekiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, uthi, Makangakulukuhli uThixo wakho, okholose ngaye wena, usithi, Ayisayi kunikelwa iYerusalem esandleni sokumkani waseAsiriya."
Isaiah37:11 Uyabona, ukuvile wena abakwenzayo ookumkani baseAsiriya kumazwe onke, ngokuwatshabhisa; kwaye uya kusindiswa?"
Isaiah37:12 Ngaba oothixo beentlanga ezazitshabalalisa ookhokho babasindisa, iGoshan neHaran neRetsefe noonyana base-Eden ababeseTelazare?"
Isaiah37:13 Uphi na ukumkani waseHamati nokumkani waseArpadi nokumkani wesixeko saseSefarvayim neHena neIwa?
Isaiah37:14 Wawathabatha uHezekiya amaphepha encwadi esandleni sabathunywa, wawafunda; yaye uHezekiya wenyuka waya endlwini kaYehova waza wayivula phambi koYehova."
Isaiah37:15 uHezekiya wathandaza kuYehova wathi:
Isaiah37:16 Yehova wemikhosi, Thixo kaSirayeli, wena uhleli phezu kweekerubhi, unguThixo wena wedwa kwizikumkani zonke zehlabathi; Wenza izulu nehlabathi."
Isaiah37:17 Thoba, Yehova, uve; vula amehlo akho, Yehova, ubone, uve onke amazwi kaSaneribhe, awathumele ukungcikiva uThixo ophilileyo."
Isaiah37:18 Okunene, uYehova, ookumkani baseAsiriya baziphanzisile zonke iintlanga namazwe azo;"
Isaiah37:19 babanikela oothixo bazo emlilweni, kuba babengethixo, bebengumsebenzi wezandla zomntu, umthi nelitye; babatshabalalisa ke."
Isaiah37:20 Ke kaloku, Yehova Thixo wethu, sihlangule esandleni sakhe, ukuze zonke izikumkani zehlabathi zazi ukuba nguwe wedwa uYehova."
Isaiah37:21 Wathumela ke uIsaya, unyana ka-Amotsi, kuHezekiya, esithi, uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, uthe, njengoko undithandazele ngako, ngenxa kaSaneribhe ukumkani waseAsiriya;"
Isaiah37:22 Lilo eli ilizwi awalithethayo uYehova ngaye; Intombi, intombi enguZiyon, egxeka, ihleka; Intombi enguYerusalem yahlunguzela intloko phezu kwakho."
Isaiah37:23 Ngubani na lo umtshabhisileyo, umnyelisileyo? Uliphakamise kubani na ilizwi lakho, uwaphakamisele amehlo akho kubani na? nxamnye naLowo Ungcwele kaSirayeli."
Isaiah37:24 Ungcikivile uYehova ngabakhonzi bakho, usithi, Ngobuninzi beenqwelo zam zokulwa ndiqabele mna encotsheni yeentaba, ekupheleni kweLebhanon; ndiya kuyigawula imisedare yakhe emide kakhulu, nemisipres yakhe; yaye ndiya kungena kwindawo ephakamileyo yelizwe lakhe nakwihlathi leKarmele yakhe."
Isaiah37:25 Ndemba, ndasela amanzi; ndayitshisa ngokunyathela konyawo lwam yonke imilambo engamanxuwa."
Isaiah37:26 Anikuva na kwangemihla yamandulo ukuba ndenze le nto; kwamandulo, ukuba ndandikudalile? Ndiyakwenza oku, ukuba uyenze amanxuwa imizi enqatyisiweyo."
Isaiah37:27 Ngeso sizathu, babengabemi abanamandla amancinane, besoyika kwaye beneentloni;"
Isaiah37:28 Kodwa ndiyakwazi ukuhlala kwakho, nokuphuma kwakho, nokungena kwakho, nokundiqumba kwakho."
Isaiah37:29 Ngenxa enokuba unyuke umsindo wakho kum, nesandi sakho esi ezindlebeni zam, ndiya kufaka isando sam empumlweni yakho, nomkhala wam emlonyeni wakho, ndikubuyisele ngendlela oweza ngayo."
Isaiah37:30 Ke lo ngumqondiso kuwe: Kulo nyaka kodliwa ummilela wodwa; ngomnyaka wesibini nowuqala, ngomnyaka wesithathu nohlwayela, nivune, nityale izidiliya, nidle iziqhamo zazo."
Isaiah37:31 Kwaye abasindileyo bendlu yakwaYuda baya kuphinda bendelisele iingcambu phantsi baze bathwale isiqhamo phezulu.
Isaiah37:32 Ngokuba amasalela aya kuza evela eYerusalem, nabasabayo entabeni yeZiyon; ubukhwele bukaYehova wemikhosi buya kukwenza oko."
Isaiah37:33 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova ngokumkani waseAsiriya, ukuthi, Akayi kungena kulo mzi, akayi kutola notolo kuwo, akayi kuwuzela enengweletshetshe, akayi kuwukhela udonga lwangaphambili."
Isaiah37:34 Uya kubuya ngendlela eze ngayo, yaye akayi kungena kulo mzi, utsho uYehova."
Isaiah37:35 Ngokuba ndiya kuwukhusela lo mzi, ndiwusindise ngenxa yam, nangenxa kaDavide, umkhonzi wam."
Isaiah37:36 Kwaphuma ke isithunywa sikaYehova, saxabela eminqubeni yama-Asiriya ikhulu elinamanci asibhozo anesihlanu lamawaka; bavuka kusasa, bezizidumbu ezifileyo bonke."
Isaiah37:37 Ke kaloku uSenaribhe, ukumkani waseAsiriya, wemka, waya kuhlala eNineve."
Isaiah37:38 Kwathi, ethandaza endlwini yothixo wakhe uNiserogi, bambulala ngekrele oonyana bakhe, uAdrameleki noSaretsere; yaye basabela kwilizwe lakwa-Aram, yaye uEsar-hadon unyana wakhe walawula esikhundleni sakhe."
Isaiah38:1 Ngelo xesha wahliwa sisifo uHezekiya, wafa. Waya umprofeti uIsaya, unyana ka-Amos, kuye, wathi kuye, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Zilawule indlu yakho, ngokuba uya kufa, akuyi kuphila."
Isaiah38:2 uHezekiya wabubhekisa eludongeni ubuso bakhe, wathandaza kuYehova."
Isaiah38:3 Ndathi mna, Camagu, Yehova, ndikhumbule ukuhamba kwam phambi kwakho ngokunyaniseka nangentliziyo epheleleyo, ndakwenza okulungileyo emehlweni akho. uHezekiya walila ngokukrakra."
Isaiah38:4 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuIsaya, lisithi:"
Isaiah38:5 Wathi kuHezekiya, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaDavide uyihlo, ukuthi, Ndiwuvile umthandazo wakho, ndizibonile iinyembezi zakho; uyabona, ndiya kongezelela kwimihla yakho ishumi elinesihlanu leminyaka."
Isaiah38:6 Ndiza kukusindisa wena nesi sixeko esandleni sokumkani waseAsiriya, yaye ndiya kusikhusela esi sixeko."
Isaiah38:7 Nangu ke umqondiso kuwe, uphuma kuYehova, ukuba uya kulenza uYehova elo lizwi alithethileyo;"
Isaiah38:8 Yabona, ndiyasibuyisa isithunzi sezinyuko esawayo kumzekelo ka-Ahazi, ngezinyuko ezilishumi. Labuya ke ilanga izinyuko ezilishumi ngokwezinyuko elisatshona kuzo."
Isaiah38:9 Into eyabhalwa nguHezekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, xa wayesifa, wachacha ekufeni kwakhe:"
Isaiah38:10 Ndathi ke ekupheleni kwemihla yam, Ndiya kuya emasangweni elabafileyo;"
Isaiah38:11 Ndathi, Andiyi kumbona uYehova, uYehova, ezweni labamvayo;"
Isaiah38:12 Umoya wam uphelile, uphelile kum, njengentente yomalusi; Ndibuchebile ubomi bam njengomluki; uya kundithabatha ngesifo esibulalayo; Uya kundidlisa ubomi imini nobusuku."
Isaiah38:13 Ndathi kwada kwasa, uya kuwaqhekeza onke amathambo am njengengonyama; Uya kundidlisa ubomi imini nobusuku."
Isaiah38:14 Ndalila njengompelwane; amehlo am ayaphela kukubheka phezulu; ndizenze ngathi.
Isaiah38:15 Ndiya kuthini na? wathetha nam, wayenza ngokwakhe; Ndiya kuyihamba kakuhle iminyaka yam, ndinomoya owaphukileyo."
Isaiah38:16 Nkosi yam, bubomi bomphefumlo wam; wondibuyisa ke, undiphilise."
Isaiah38:17 Yabona, bendiba nomvandedwa ngenxa yoxolo, kodwa ngokuthanda umphefumlo wam wawusindisa esihogweni sesihogo, ngenxa enokuba wazilahlela emva kwakho zonke izono zam."
Isaiah38:18 Kuba iHadesi aliyi kukudumisa, ukufa akuyi kukudumisa; abahla baye emhadini abayi kukholwa yinyaniso yakho."
Isaiah38:19 Lowo udla ubomi, lo udla ubomi, nguye oya kukudumisa, njengoko ndisenjenjalo namhla: ubawo uya kubazisa inyaniso yakho oonyana bakho."
Isaiah38:20 uYehova ebethanda ukundisindisa; ngoko ke sobetha uhadi yonke imihla yobomi bethu endlwini kaYehova.
Isaiah38:21 Ngokuba wathi uIsaya, Mabathabathe isipha samakhiwane, bawafake njengodaka, niphiliswe."
Isaiah38:22 Wathi uHezekiya, Uyintoni na umqondiso wokuba ndiya kunyuka ndiye endlwini kaYehova?"
Isaiah39:1 Ngelo xesha uMerodage-bhaladan unyana kaBhaladan, ukumkani waseBhabheli, wathumela incwadi nezipho kuHezekiya; ngokuba ubevile ukuba ubesifa, wabuya wachacha."
Isaiah39:2 Wakholiswa ngabo uHezekiya, wababonisa indlu yakhe yengqwebo, isilivere, negolide, nobulawu, neoli entle, nendlu yakhe yonke yeentonga zakhe, nento yonke eyayikho ebuncwaneni bakhe akwabakho nto endlwini yakhe nakubukumkani bakhe bonke, angabavumelanga uHezekiya ukuba bayibone."
Isaiah39:3 Waya umprofeti uIsaya kukumkani uHezekiya, wathi kuye, Atheni na la madoda? bevela phi na ukuza kuwe? Wathi uHezekiya, Beza kum, bevela ezweni elikude, eBhabheli."
Isaiah39:4 Wathi, Abone ntoni na endlwini yakho? Wathi uHezekiya, Abone into yonke esendlwini yam; akubangakho nto ndingababonisanga yona ebuncwaneni bam."
Isaiah39:5 Wathi uIsaya kuHezekiya, Liphulaphule ilizwi likaYehova wemikhosi;"
Isaiah39:6 Yabona, iyeza imihla yaxa konke okusendlwini yakho noko kwaqwetywa ngooyihlo kwada kwayile mini kuya kuthinjwa ngayo kusiwe eBhabhiloni; akuyi kusala nto, utsho uYehova."
Isaiah39:7 Koonyana bakho abaya kuphuma kuwe, oya kubazala, ubasuse; yaye ziya kugcinwa kwibhotwe likakumkani waseBhabhiloni."
Isaiah39:8 Wathi uHezekiya kuIsaya, Lilungile ilizwi likaYehova olithethileyo. Waqhubeka wathi: Kuba kuya kubakho uxolo nenyaniso ngemihla yam."
Isaiah40:1 Thuthuzelani, bathuthuzeleni abantu bam, utsho uThixo wenu."
Isaiah40:2 Ziveni nikhululekile ukuthetha neYerusalem, nimemeze kuyo, nithi kuphelile ukulwa kwayo, nokuba buxolelwe ububi bayo; ngokuba wamkela esandleni sikaYehova kabini ngenxa yezono zakhe zonke."
Isaiah40:3 Yivani odandulukayo entlango, lisithi, Yigeceni entlango indlela kaYehova;"
Isaiah40:4 Yonke imifula iya kuphakanyiswa, zonke iintaba neenduli zonke zigungxulwe; iindawo ezimagqagala zibe zithabazi, iindawo ezimagqagala zibe zithabazi;"
Isaiah40:5 Bubonakala ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova, ibubone inyama yonke kunye, ngokuba uthethile umlomo kaYehova."
Isaiah40:6 Ilizwi lathi: Wowu. Anathi: Ndibize ntoni? Yonke inyama iyingca, bonke ubuhle bayo bunjengentyantyambo yasendle;"
Isaiah40:7 Buyoma utyani, iyabuna intyantyambo; ngokuba umoya kaYehova uvuthuza kubo; ngokwenene, banjani abantu."
Isaiah40:8 Buyoma utyani, iyabuna intyantyambo; ke lona ilizwi likaThixo wethu lithembekile ngonaphakade."
Isaiah40:9 Wena Ziyon, mshumayeli weendaba ezilungileyo, nyuka uye entabeni ephakamileyo; Yerusalem, mshumayeli weendaba ezilungileyo, liphakamise ngamandla ilizwi lakho; ziphakamiseni, musani ukoyika; uthi kwimizi yakwaYuda, Nanko uThixo wenu;"
Isaiah40:10 Uyabona, iNkosi uYehova iya kuza, inesandla esithe nkqi, isandla sayo siya kuyilawula; yabona, umvuzo wakhe unawo, esebenza phambi kwakhe."
Isaiah40:11 Iya kuwalusa umhlambi wayo njengomalusi; uya kuwabutha amatakane esandleni sakhe, awathwale ngesifuba sakhe, abathundeze ngocoselelo abathuthuzeli."
Isaiah40:12 Ngubani na owalinganisa amanzi kumqolo wesandla sakhe, walinganisa amazulu ngentende yesandla sakhe, wathabatha uthuli lomhlaba ngomlinganiselo walinganisa iintaba ngesikali neenduli ngesikali?"
Isaiah40:13 Ngubani na owalathisa uMoya kaYehova, wamfundisa, ingenguye umcebisi wakhe?"
Isaiah40:14 Wacebisana nabani na, owamfundisa nowamfundisa indlela yomgwebo nowamfundisa ukwazi nowamazisa indlela yokuqonda?"
Isaiah40:15 Yabona, iintlanga zibalelwa ekubeni zinjengethontsi emphandeni, njengesuntswana esikalini; yabona, iziqithi uzigqala njengento encinane."
Isaiah40:16 iLebhanon ayilingene kubaswa, neenkomo zayo azilingene kubalidini elinyukayo."
Isaiah40:17 Zonke iintlanga zinjengento engento phambi kwakhe; kuye zibalelwa ekubeni ngamampunge namampunge.
Isaiah40:18 Ningamfanekisa ke nabani na uThixo? okanye unokumfanisa?
Isaiah40:19 Umfanekiso oqingqiweyo utyhidwa yingcibi, awaleke ngegolide umnyibilikisi, enze nemixokelelwane yesilivere."
Isaiah40:20 Ihlwempu likhetha umthi ongento yanto; ufuna umsebénzi olichule wokulungisa lo mfanekiso uqingqiweyo.
Isaiah40:21 Beningazi na? Anivanga na? Anixelelwanga na kwasekuqaleni? Aniqondanga na na iziseko zehlabathi?
Isaiah40:22 Nguye lo uhleli esazulwini sehlabathi, abemi balo banjengeenkumbi; waneka izulu njengeqhiya, walaneka njengentente yokuhlala;"
Isaiah40:23 Kuyabatshabalalisa abathetheli; Uyabatshabalalisa abagwebi behlabathi.
Isaiah40:24 Ewe, aziyi kumiselwa; ewe, azinakutyalwa; ewe, uhlanga lwabo aluyi kumila emhlabeni; uya kubuya azivule, zome, zithabathe umoya ovuthuzayo njengeendiza."
Isaiah40:25 Ke kaloku niya kundifanisa, ndilingane nabani? Watsho uNgcwele."
Isaiah40:26 Phakamisani amehlo enu, nikhangele, ukuba ngubani na owazidalayo ezo zinto; Uzibiza zonke ziphela ngamagama, ngenxa yobukhulu bamandla akhe, ngenxa enokuba ekhaliphile ngamandla; akukho namnye usilelayo."
Isaiah40:27 Yini na ukuba uthi, Yakobi, Indlela yam isithele kuYehova, nebango lam limkile kuThixo wam?"
Isaiah40:28 Beningazi na? Ngaba akuvanga na ukuba uThixo ongunaphakade, uYehova, uMdali weziphelo zomhlaba, akaphelelwa lithemba okanye aphelelwe lithemba? akukho ukuhlolwa kwengqondo kuye."
Isaiah40:29 Umnika otyhafileyo amandla; nalowo ungenamandla uyawongezelela ukuqina kwawo.
Isaiah40:30 Namadodana adinwe atyhafe, amadodana akhubeke aphele."
Isaiah40:31 Ke bona abakholose ngoYehova bona amandla amatsha; baya kunyuka ngamaphiko njengexhalanga; baya kugidima, bangadinwa; baya kuhamba bangatyhafi."
Isaiah41:1 Yithini cwaka phambi kwam, nina ziqithi; izizwe mazihlaziye amandla azo; makasondele kubo; mabathethe ke; masisondele kunye ematyaleni."
Isaiah41:2 Ngubani na ovuse empumalanga lowo ukhawulelwa bubulungisa ezinyaweni zakhe? Wabanika ikrele lakhe njengothuli, nesaphetha sakhe sanjengeengcongolo ezivuthelweyo;"
Isaiah41:3 Wabasukela, wagqitha enoxolo; naye ke akahamba ngeenyawo."
Isaiah41:4 Ngubani na owakwenzayo oku, owabiza izizukulwana kwasentloko? ndinguYehova, ingowokuqala, nowokugqibela; Nguye lowo."
Isaiah41:5 Iziqithi zakubona oko, zoyika; zagungqa iziphelo zehlabathi, zasondela, zemka."
Isaiah41:6 Umntu uyancedisa ummelwane wakhe; Wathi elowo kumzalwana wakhe, Yomelela."
Isaiah41:7 Ingcibi yemithi yomeleza umnyibilikisi wegolide, nalowo uyinyibilikisayo elucwecweni; yaye uyibethelele ngezikhonkwane, ukuze ingashukumi."
Isaiah41:8 Ke wena Sirayeli, ungumkhonzi wam, wena Yakobi, endikunyulileyo, mbewu ka-Abraham, umhlobo wam."
Isaiah41:9 Endakubambayo kwaseziphelweni zehlabathi, endakubizayo phakathi kookumkani bakho, ndathi kuwe, Ungumkhonzi wam wena; Mna ndaninyula, andinilahlanga;"
Isaiah41:10 Musani ukoyika; ngokuba ndinani; sukoyika; ngokuba nguThixo wenu; Ndiya kukomeleza; ewe, ndiya kukunceda; ewe, ndiya kukuxhasa ngesandla sam sokunene sobulungisa bam."
Isaiah41:11 Yabona, bonke abakusukelayo baya kusuka beneentloni, bedanile; nabo basukuzana nawe baya kutshabalala."
Isaiah41:12 Uya kuwafuna, ungawafumani amadoda alwa nawe;"
Isaiah41:13 Ngokuba mna, Yehova Thixo wakho, ndiya kubamba ngesandla sakho sokunene, ndithi kuwe, Musa ukoyika; Ndiza kukunceda."
Isaiah41:14 Musa ukoyika, mbungu Yakobi, nani madoda akwaSirayeli; ndiya kukunceda mna, utsho uYehova, uMkhululi wakho oyiNgcwele kaSirayeli."
Isaiah41:15 Yabona, ndikwenza inkabi yenkomo, inamazinyo;"
Isaiah41:16 Uya kuzivuthela, umoya uzithabathe, umoya ovuthuzayo uziphangalalise; yaye niya kugcoba ngoYehova nigcobe ngoyiNgcwele kaSirayeli."
Isaiah41:17 Xa amahlwempu namahlwempu ekhangele amanzi, aze angabikho, nolwimi lwawo lome lunxano, mna, iNkosi, ndiya kubaphendula, kwaye mna, Thixo kaSirayeli, andiyi kubuya umva kubo."
Isaiah41:18 Ndiya kuyivula imilambo eluqayini, nemithombo ezihlanjeni; Ndiya kuyijika intlango ibe lichibi lamanzi, nomhlaba ongumqwebedu ube yimithombo yamanzi."
Isaiah41:19 Ndiya kutyala entlango imisedare, nemithombe, nemimirtile, neminquma; Ndiya kutyala enkqantosini umpayini, ndingabi mipayini, ingenguye enkqantosini;"
Isaiah41:20 ukuze babone, bazi, babone, baqonde ukuba isandla sikaYehova sikwenzile oko, nokuba Lowo Ungcwele kaSirayeli nguye owenze loo nto."
Isaiah41:21 Lifundeni ityala lenu, utsho uYehova; ziziseni izizathu zenu, utsho uKumkani kaYakobi."
Isaiah41:22 Mabawukhuphe, basixelele okuya kuhla; okanye usazise okuzayo."
Isaiah41:23 Xelani izinto ezizayo, ukuze sazi ukuba ningoothixo: Ewe, yenzani okulungileyo okanye nenze okubi, ukuze soyike size sibone kunye."
Isaiah41:24 Yabonani, ningamampunge; ulisikizi oninyulayo;"
Isaiah41:25 Mna ndizele owasentla, oya kuza; empumalanga yena uya kundibiza igama lam, abathetheli beze njengodongwe, baxovule udongwe njengombumbi."
Isaiah41:26 Ngubani na owakuxelayo oko kwasekuqaleni? kwaye kuqala, masithi: Ngaba ulungile? Ewe, akukho bani unaziyo, ewe, akukho bani ukuxelelayo, ewe, akukho bani uwavayo amazwi akho."
Isaiah41:27 Ndim endaqala ndathi kwiZiyon, Yabona, ndikho, ndayinika iYerusalem umshumayeli weendaba ezilungileyo."
Isaiah41:28 Ngokuba ndabona, akwabakho bani; naphakathi kwabo bekungekho mcebisi uphendulayo, xa ndibabuzayo."
Isaiah41:29 Yabona, bonke bephela bangamampunge; Zingamampunge izenzo zabo, imifanekiso yabo ethululwa ngumoya nochuku."
Isaiah42:1 Yabonani, umkhonzi wam endimxhasayo; umnyulwa wam, okholwa nguye umphefumlo wam; ndibeke uMoya wam phezu kwakhe; uya kugweba phakathi kweentlanga."
Isaiah42:2 Akayi kunkqangaza, aliphakamise, alivakalise ezitratweni ilizwi lakhe."
Isaiah42:3 Ingcongolo ephotheneyo akayi kuyaphula;
Isaiah42:4 Akayi kusilela, akayi kuncama, ade aligwebe ihlabathi; neziqithi ziya kulindela umyalelo wakhe."
Isaiah42:5 Utsho uThixo, uYehova, owadala izulu, alaneke; walifundisa ihlabathi nezinto eziphuma kulo; Nguye yena obanika abantu abakuyo ukuphefumla, ubanike umoya kwabahamba kuyo;"
Isaiah42:6 Mna, Yehova, ndikubizile ngokobulungisa, ndakubamba ngesandla, ndiya kukugcina, ndikwenze umnqophiso weentlanga, isikhanyiso seentlanga;"
