Isaiah42:7 ukuba uvule amehlo eemfama, ukuba ukhuphe abakhonkxiweyo ezintolongweni, nabahleli ebumnyameni entolongweni."
Isaiah42:8 NdinguYehova, lilo elo igama lam; andiluniki omnye uzuko lwam, nendumiso yam andiyiniki imifanekiso eqingqiweyo."
Isaiah42:9 Yabona, bayeza abaphambili, ndixela izinto ezintsha; ingekantshuli ndiyanixelela."
Isaiah42:10 Vumani kuYehova ingoma entsha, indumiso yakhe kwaseziphelweni zehlabathi, nina bahla baye elwandle, neento zonke ezikulo; iziqithi nabemi bazo."
Isaiah42:11 Mayiphakamise izwi intlango nemizi yayo, imizi emiyo amaKedare; mabamemelele abemi bengxondorha, bagcobe ezincotsheni zeentaba."
Isaiah42:12 Mabamzukise uYehova, bavakalise indumiso yakhe eziqithini."
Isaiah42:13 uYehova uya kuphuma njengegorha, uya kuxhoxha ikhwele njengegorha; Uya kubiza, ewe, agqume; uya kuzoyisa iintshaba zakhe."
Isaiah42:14 Ndathula ixesha elide, ndathi tu; Ndathula ndaziphatha; ngoku, ndiya kukhala njengomfazi oneendevu; kwaoko ndiya kutshabalalisa, ndidle."
Isaiah42:15 Ndozitshabalalisa iintaba neenduli, ndiyitshise yonke imifuno yazo; imilambo ndiya kuyenza iziqithi, ndiwatshise amadike."
Isaiah42:16 Ndozihambisa iimfama ngendlela ezingayaziyo, ndizihambise ngendlela ezingayaziyo; Ndiya kubakhapha ngeendlela abangazaziyo; ndiya kubenza bube khaphukhaphu ubumnyama phambi kwabo, ndizenze zithi tye izinto ezigoso. Ezo zinto ndiya kuzenza kubo, ndingazishiyi."
Isaiah42:17 Baya kuguquka badane kakhulu, abakholosa ngemifanekiso eqingqiweyo, abathi kwetyhidiweyo, Noothixo bethu!"
Isaiah42:18 Yivani, nina zithulu; khangelani, zimfamandini, yabona."
Isaiah42:19 Ngubani na oyimfama, ingenguye umkhonzi wam? okanye sisithulu njengomthunywa wam endimthumileyo? Ngubani oyimfama ofezeke, oyimfama njengomkhonzi kaYehova?"
Isaiah42:20 Ubona izinto ezininzi, akazigqali; zivule iindlebe zakhe, akeva."
Isaiah42:21 uYehova unonelele ubulungisa bakhe; uya kuwubamba umyalelo, awuhloniphe."
Isaiah42:22 Ke olu luhlanga oluphangiweyo, oluphangiweyo; bonke babanjiwe emhadini, bafihlwe ezintolongweni; Ndilixhoba, akukho msindisi; Akwabakho uthi, Musa ukubuya."
Isaiah42:23 Ngubani na kuni oya kuva oko? Ngubani na oya kuva, eve kwixesha elizayo?"
Isaiah42:24 Ngubani na onikele uYakobi ukuba aphangwe, owamnikela uSirayeli kumasela? AsingoYehova na esone kuye? ngenxa yokuba bengahambi ngeendlela zakhe, bengawugcinanga umthetho wakhe."
Isaiah42:25 Wathululela phezu kwakhe ukuvutha komsindo wakhe, namandla emfazwe; wamtshisa, akakunyamekela oko ngentliziyo."
Isaiah43:1 Kwaye ngoku, itsho njalo iNkosi, uMdali wakho, Owu Yakobi, noMdali wakho, Owu Sirayeli: Musa ukoyika, kuba ndikukhulule, ndikubizile ngegama lakho; ungowam."
Isaiah43:2 Nokuba uthe wacanda emanzini, ndoba nawe; nasemilanjeni, ayisayi kukukhukulisa; ukuba uthe waphuma emlilweni, akuyi kurhawuka; nedangatye aliyi kukutshisa wena."
Isaiah43:3 Kuba ndinguYehova uThixo wakho, Lowo Ungcwele kaSirayeli, uMsindisi wakho, ndinikele ngeYiputa ukuba ibe yintlawulelo yakho, iTiyopiya neShebha ngenxa yakho."
Isaiah43:4 Ngenxa enokuba uzukile kum, uzukile, uzukile ke mna, ndakuthanda; ngoko ke, ndiya kuninika abantu nobomi."
Isaiah43:5 Musa ukoyika, ngokuba ndinawe; Ndiya kuyizisa imbewu yakho ivela empumalanga, ndikubuthe nasentshonalanga;"
Isaiah43:6 Ndiya kuthi kumntla, Suka; nakumzantsi ndithi, Musa ukuzibamba; nazisa oonyana bam bevela kude, neentombi zam ziye eziphelweni zehlabathi;"
Isaiah43:7 Wonke umntu obizwa ngegama lam, ngenxa yokuba ndidala uzuko lwam, ndamdala mna; ewe, ndiyenzile."
Isaiah43:8 Khupha iimfama ezinamehlo, nabazizithulu beneendlebe;"
Isaiah43:9 mazihlanganisane zonke iintlanga, zihlangane iintlanga; Nguwuphi na ke kubo onokuzixela ezi zinto, asibonise owokuqala? mabaze namangqina abo, bagwetyelwe; okanye uve besithi, Yinyaniso le."
Isaiah43:10 Namangqina am, utsho uYehova, nomkhonzi wam endimnyulileyo, ukuze nazi, nikholwe ndim, niqonde ukuba ndim;"
Isaiah43:11 Mna ndinguYehova; akukho msindisi ingendim.
Isaiah43:12 Ndashumayela ndaza ndanikela ubungqina nangona kwakungekho thixo wasemzini phakathi kwenu; ngako oko, namangqina am, utsho uYehova, ukuba ndinguThixo."
Isaiah43:13 Ewe, phambi kwamhla bendinaye; akukho bani unokuwuhlutha esandleni sam. Ndiza kusebenza, kwaye ngubani oya kukuvumela?"
Isaiah43:14 Kutsho uYehova, umkhululi wakho, oyiNgcwele kaSirayeli, ukuthi; Ngenxa yenu ndithumele eBhabheli, ndaza ndazithoba zonke iingangamsha zabo, namaKaledi, ngeenqanawa zokumemelela kwawo."
Isaiah43:15 Mna, Yehova, ndingoyiNgcwele wenu, uMdali kaSirayeli, iNkosi yenu."
Isaiah43:16 Utsho uYehova, umenzi wendlela elwandle, indlela emanzini amaninzi;"
Isaiah43:17 umkhuphi wenqwelo yokulwa, nehashe, nemikhosi, namandla; balala phantsi kunye, abayi kuvuka; babhuqiwe, bafile njengentsontelo."
Isaiah43:18 Musani ukucinga ngezontlandlolo, musani ukucinga ngezo nto ezidala;"
Isaiah43:19 Yabonani, ndiya kwenza into entsha; ngoku iya kuxhobisa; ubungathanga uyazi? Ndiya kwenza indlela enkangala, nemilambo enkqantosini;"
Isaiah43:20 Izilo zelizwe ziya kundizukisa, iimpungutye neenciniba, ngenxa yokuba ndenza amanzi entlango nemilambo entlango ukuze basele abantu bam, abanyuliweyo bam."
Isaiah43:21 Ndim ozenzele olu hlanga; baya kuyixela indumiso yam.
Isaiah43:22 Akundinqulanga ke, Yakobi; kodwa wadinwa ndim, Sirayeli."
Isaiah43:23 Akundizisanga iimvana zamadini akho anyukayo; akundizukisanga ngemibingelelo yakho. Andikwenzanga ukuba ukhonze ngambingelelo kwaye andikukhathazi ngesiqhumiso.
Isaiah43:24 Akundithengelanga ngcongolo emnandi ngemali, akundanelisanga ngamanqatha exhoba lakho; ke undikhonzisile ngezono zakho, undithobile ngobugwenxa bakho."
Isaiah43:25 Ndim ocima izikreqo zakho ngenxa yam, kwaye andizikhumbuli izono zakho."
Isaiah43:26 Ndikhumbule; masilwe; shumayela, kwaye uya kugwetyelwa."
Isaiah43:27 Uyihlo wokuqala wonile, nabafundisi bakho bandicekisile."
Isaiah43:28 Ndabenza inqambi ke abathetheli abangcwele, ndamnikela uYakobi kwisiqalekiso nesingcikivo sikaSirayeli."
Isaiah44:1 Kaloku ke yiva, Yakobi, mkhonzi wam; namaSirayeli endiwanyulileyo."
Isaiah44:2 uYehova, uMenzi wakho, uMbumbi kwasesizalweni, wathi, Uya kukunceda; Musa ukoyika, mkhonzi wam Yakobi; noYeshurun, endimnyulileyo."
Isaiah44:3 Kuba ndiya kugalela amanzi konxaniweyo, nemisinga emhlabeni owomileyo; Ndiya kuthulula uMoya wam phezu kwendlu yakho, nentsikelelo yam phezu kwembewu yakho."
Isaiah44:4 Baya kuhluma njengengca, njengemingcunube ngasemijelweni yamanzi."
Isaiah44:5 Omnye uya kuthi: “LelikaYehova; omnye uya kumbiza ngegama likaYakobi; omnye asayine uYehova ngesandla sakhe, ambize ngegama likaSirayeli."
Isaiah44:6 Utsho uYehova, uKumkani wakwaSirayeli, uMkhululi wakhe, uYehova wemikhosi; ndingowokuqala, ndingowokugqibela; akukho Thixo ingendim."
Isaiah44:7 Ngubani na onokubiza njengam, aze axele aze akuqinisekise ngenxa yam, ekubeni ndabasusayo abantu bamandulo? kwaye okuzayo, nokuzayo, makwazeke."
Isaiah44:8 Musani ukoyika nokoyika; namangqina am. Akukho Thixo na ingendim? ewe, akukho Thixo; Andinaluvo."
Isaiah44:9 Abayili bemifanekiso eqingqiweyo bonke bephela baluchuku; nezinto zabo ezinqwenelekayo aziyi kuphumelela; kwaye bona bangamangqina abo; ababoni, abazi; ukuze beme badane."
Isaiah44:10 Ngubani na owenze uthixo nomfanekiso oqingqiweyo?
Isaiah44:11 Yabona, onke amadlelane akhe adanile, abasebenzi bangabantu; mabaqokelelene ndawonye, beme; ukanti baya kunkwantya, badane kunye."
Isaiah44:12 Umnyibilikisi wenza amalahle ngesando, usebenza ngehamile, usebenza ngamandla ezandla zakhe; ewe, ulambe, abe namandla; akaseli manzi kwaye udiniwe."
Isaiah44:13 Ingcibi yemithi yolula umyalelo wayo; uthengisa ngomsonto; Isilungisa ngemilinganiselo, isibetha ngekhampasi, isenze ngokomfanekiselo wendoda, ngokobuhle bomntu; ukuba ingahlala endlini."
Isaiah44:14 Uzakhela imisedare aze athabathe umsipres nompleyini awenze lukhuni ngayo phakathi kwemithi yehlathi; uhlwayela uthuthu, nemvula iyamtyisa."
Isaiah44:15 Wothi ke umntu atshe; ewe, ebebhaka isonka; ewe, wenza uthixo, uyamnqula; wenza umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, awuwele phezu kwawo."
Isaiah44:16 Inxalenye yawo uyitshisa ngomlilo; uyidla inyama kunye nesahlulo sayo; makatye ahluthe; ewe, wabuya wachwayita, wathi, Tshotsho, ndiyotha, ndiwubonile umlilo;"
Isaiah44:17 Okuseleyo kuwo wenza uthixo, umfanekiso wakhe oqingqiweyo; uqubuda kuyo, aqubude kuyo, athandaze kuyo, athi, Ndihlangule; ngokuba unguThixo wam."
Isaiah44:18 Bebengazi, bengaqondi, ngokuba ebevingcile amehlo abo ukuba bangaboni; neentliziyo zabo, ukuze bangaqondi;"
Isaiah44:19 kungabikho bani ugqibe entliziyweni yakhe, kungabikho kwazi, kungabikho kuqonda, ukuba kuthi, Inxalenye yawo ndiyitshisile ngomlilo; ewe, ndabhaka isonka emalahleni awo; ndosa inyama, ndadla; oseleyo kuwo ndiya kuwenza amasikizi na? ndingawela esiqwini somthi?"
Isaiah44:20 Uvusa uthuthu; Intliziyo enenkohliso imlahlekisile, ukuba angawusindisi umphefumlo wakhe; ithi, Akukho buxoki na esandleni sam sokunene?"
Isaiah44:21 Khawuve oku, Yakobi, Sirayeli; ngokuba ungumkhonzi wam; Ndikudalile; ungumkhonzi wam; Sirayeli, akuyi kulityalwa ndim."
Isaiah44:22 Ndilucimile njengelifu elimnyama ukreqo lwakho, nezono zakho njengelifu elimnyama; buyela kum; ngokuba ndikukhulule ngokukuhlawulela;"
Isaiah44:23 Memelelani, nina mazulu; ngokuba uYehova ekwenzile; gcobani, zinzulu zehlabathi. Dumani, zintaba, hlathi, nani nonke mithi ekulo, ngokuba uYehova emhlawulele wamkhulula uYakobi, wamzukisa kwaSirayeli."
Isaiah44:24 Utsho uYehova, uMkhululi wakho, uMdaluli wakho, uMenzi wakho kwasesizalweni sikanyoko, ukuthi, Mna Yehova ndinguMenzi wezinto zonke; owaneka isibhakabhaka yedwa; nto leyo iyodwa eyandisa ihlabathi;"
Isaiah44:25 uMtshitshisi wemiqondiso yabaphololoza into engeyiyo; abo bajikisa izilumko, bakuguqule kube kukumatha ukwazi;"
Isaiah44:26 uMmisi welizwi lomkhonzi wakhe, uMzalisi wecebo labathunywa bakhe; abathi kwiYerusalem, Iya kubuya yakhiwe; nakwimizi yakwaYuda: Iya kukhiwa, ndiwamise amanxuwa ayo;"
Isaiah44:27 uNdithi kumanzi enzonzobila, Yitshani, ndiyomise imilambo yakho;"
Isaiah44:28 owathi kuKoreshi, Ngumalusi wam lowo, oya kukufeza konke ukuthanda kwam; ndithi kwiYerusalem, Uya kubuyiswa; nakwitempile, Iziseko zakho ziya kuzinza."
Isaiah45:1 Wathi uYehova kumthanjiswa wakhe, kuKoreshi, endimbambe ngesandla sakhe sokunene, ukuba ndizinyathele iintlanga phambi kwakhe; ndiwakhulule amanqe ookumkani, ukuba ndivule iingcango ezimbini phambi kwakhe; neengcango mazingavalwa;"
Isaiah45:2 Ndiya kukwalathisa, ndilungelelanise iindawo ezimagoso; ndiya kuwaphula amasango obhedu, ndiwaphule imivalo yesinyithi;"
Isaiah45:3 ndikunike ubuncwane obusemnyameni, neengqwebo eziselelweyo, ukuze wazi ukuba mna Yehova ndinguThixo kaSirayeli, okubiza ngegama lakho."
Isaiah45:4 Ngenxa kaYakobi, umkhonzi wam, ngenxa kaSirayeli, abanyulwa bam, ndakubiza ngegama lakho; ndikubize ngegama nokuba awundazi."
Isaiah45:5 NdinguYehova, akukho wumbi, akukho Thixo ingendim; Ndikubophile, ungandazi."
Isaiah45:6 Ukuze bazi, bethabathela empumalanga nasentshonalanga, ukuba akukho wumbi; NdinguYehova, akakho omnye."
Isaiah45:7 Ndenza ukukhanya, ndoyise ubumnyama; Ndidala uxolo, ndidala ubutshinga; Mna, Yehova, ndizenza zonke ezi zinto."
Isaiah45:8 Yihlani, mazulu, linise izulu ubulungisa; Mna Yehova ndikwenzile."
Isaiah45:9 Yeha, oxabana noMenzi wakhe! Abaninzi baye baxabana nabaninzi behlabathi. Lunokuthi na udongwe kumenzi walo, Wenza ntoni na? Awunazandla na umsebenzi wakho?"
Isaiah45:10 Yeha, lowo uthi kuyise, Uzala ntoni na? Uzele na?"
Isaiah45:11 Utsho uYehova, oyiNgcwele kaSirayeli, uMenzi wakhe, ukuthi, Ndibuze ukuba yintoni na eya kubahlela oonyana bam, undiyalele ngomsebenzi wezandla zam."
Isaiah45:12 Ndim owenza ihlabathi, ndadala abantu phezu kwalo; Mna, izandla zam, lotwaneka izulu, nomkhosi walo lonke ndawuwisela umthetho."
Isaiah45:13 Mna ndimvelisile ngobulungisa, ndiya kuzilungelelanisa iindlela zakhe zonke; yena uya kuwakha umzi wam, abakhulule abathinjwa bam, kungengaxabiso, kungengamvuzo; utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Isaiah45:14 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Umsebenzi weYiputa, nomsebenzi wakwaKushi namaShebha, amadoda amade, uya kuza kuwe ube ngowenu; ziya kukulandela; baya kuza ekuthinjweni, bakhubeke kuwe; baya kukuwola, besithi, Inene, uThixo ukuwe; akukho wumbi, akukho Thixo."
Isaiah45:15 Inyaniso, unguThixo ozisithelisayo, Thixo kaSirayeli, uMkhululi."
Isaiah45:16 Baya kudana, babuye babe neentloni bonke bephela;"
Isaiah45:17 Ke uSirayeli uya kusindiswa nguYehova ngosindiso olungunaphakade;
Isaiah45:18 Kuba uYehova walenza le izulu izulu, ukuthi, Yena uThixo wenza, wenza ihlabathi; Ukuzinzisile ke, akukudalelwanga ukuba kube khona, ukwenze ukuba ube nabemi ndinguYehova; kwaye akukho mntu wumbi."
Isaiah45:19 Andithethanga entsithelweni, endaweni emnyama yelizwe; anditshongo koonyana bakaYakobi ukuthi, Ndiquqeleni enyanyeni; Mna, Yehova, ndivakalisa ubulungisa, ndivakalisa ubulungisa."
Isaiah45:20 Hlanganisani nize; sondelani kunye, nina nisabayo ezintlangeni."
Isaiah45:21 Yitsho, usondele kubo; ewe, mabathethe bodwa, bathi, Ngubani na owathetha ezi zinto kwakudala? yathethwa ngubani ukusukela ngoko? Andinguye na uYehova? akukho wumbi ngaphandle kwam; uThixo onobulungisa, onguMsindisi; akukho mntu ngaphandle kwam."
Isaiah45:22 Bhekani kum, nisindiswe, nonke ziphelo zehlabathi; ngokuba ndinguThixo, akukho wumbi."
Isaiah45:23 Ndizifungile, ilizwi liphume emlonyeni ngobulungisa, alibuyanga lathi, Aya kuguqa kum onke amadolo, zifunge mna zonke iilwimi;"
Isaiah45:24 Okunene uya kuthi, KuYehova ndinobulungisa namandla; baya kuza kuye abantu; baya kudana bonke abamqumbelayo."
Isaiah45:25 Bonke oonyana bakaSirayeli baya kugwetyelwa kuYehova, bazukiswe."
Isaiah46:1 uBhele waqubuda, uNebho waqubuda; imifanekiso yabo yayiphezu kweenkomo neenkomo; iimoto zakho zahanjiswa; ngumthwalo kwinkomo ediniweyo."
Isaiah46:2 Baguqa, baqubuda kunye; ababanga nako ukuwuzisa umthwalo, kodwa bona ngokwabo bathinjwa."
Isaiah46:3 Ndiphulaphuleni, ndlu kaYakobi, nani nonke masalela endlu kaSirayeli, nina nizelwe eluxolweni, nina bazelwe eluxombeni."
Isaiah46:4 Kwaye kude kube lixesha lenu ndinguye; kude kuse ezimvini, ndiya kunithwala; ndenze, ndiya kubeka; ndonithwala, ndinisindise."
Isaiah46:5 Niya kundifanisa nabani na, Niya kundifanisa, nindifanise nabani na, ukuze sifane nathi?"
Isaiah46:6 Bayiphosa engxoweni igolide, bayilinganisa isilivere ngesikali, baqesha umnyibilikisi; umenze uthixo; baqubuda, ewe, bathandaze."
Isaiah46:7 Bamthwala emagxeni, bamthwala, bambeka endaweni yakhe, wema; akayi kuyishiya indawo yakhe; ewe, uya kubiza kuye, angaphenduli, okanye amsindise ekubandezelekeni kwakhe."
Isaiah46:8 Khumbulani lo mbandela, nibonise amadoda enu; Khumbulani, nina bakreqi!"
Isaiah46:9 Khumbulani izinto zokuqala zamandulo, kuba ndinguThixo, akakho omnye; ndinguThixo, akukho unjengam;"
Isaiah46:10 ukuba ndixele isiphelo, kwasekuqaleni, ekungazanga kubekho kwakukudala, uthi, Icebo lam liya kuma, ndikwenze konke ukuthanda kwam;"
Isaiah46:11 Ubiza intaka empumalanga, ezweni elikude, wempatho yam; ewe, bendithe, Ndiya kubuya ndikho; Ndiyicwangcisile, ndiza kuyenza nam."
Isaiah46:12 Phulaphulani, nina madoda omeleleyo, nikude nobulungisa;"
Isaiah46:13 Ndisondeza ubulungisa bam; ayiyi kuba kude, nosindiso lwam aluyi kulibala; yaye ndiya kubeka usindiso eZiyon kuSirayeli, uzuko lwam."
Isaiah47:1 Yihla, uhlale eluthulini, nkazanandini, ntombi inguBhabheli, hlala phantsi emhlabeni; akukho trone, ntombi ingamaKaledi, ngokuba akuyi kuba sathiwa ululamile, uthambile;"
Isaiah47:2 Thabatha umgubo, usile; vula izitshixo zakho, vula umlenze wakho, khupha isinqe, unqumle isinqe."
Isaiah47:3 Kuya kubonakala amampunge akho, kubonakale ukucukucezwa kwakho; Ndiza kuziphindezela, andizudibana nawe njengomntu."
Isaiah47:4 uMkhululi wethu ke, igama lakhe nguYehova wemikhosi, oyiNgcwele kaSirayeli."
Isaiah47:5 Zithulele, ngena ebumnyameni, ntombi yamaGalati; ngokuba akuyi kuba sabizwa ngokuba ungumfazi wezikumkani."
Isaiah47:6 Ndaba noburhalarhume kubantu bam, ndalenza inqambi ilifa lam, ndalinikela ezandleni zakho; wawubeke idyokhwe enzima kakhulu kwangemihla yakudala."
Isaiah47:7 Wathi, Ndiya kuba ngumfazi ngonaphakade, ukuze ungazibekeli entliziyweni ezi zinto, ungalicingi ikamva labo."
Isaiah47:8 Ngoko ke yivani, nina bathanda iziyolo, niqhayisayo, nina nithi entliziyweni yenu, Ndim kwaphela, akukho wumbi; andiyi kuba ngumhlolokazi, andiyi kukwazi ukulahlekelwa ngabantwana;"
Isaiah47:9 Ziya kukuhlela ezo zinto zombini, ngamini-nye, ukungabi nabantwana nobuhlolokazi;"
Isaiah47:10 Ngokuba ukholose ngezinto zakho ezimbi; uthe: Akukho bani undibonayo. Bubulumko bakho nokwazi kwakho okukuphambanisileyo; wathi entliziyweni yakho, Ndim kwaphela, akukho wumbi."
Isaiah47:11 Ke ngoko, ububi buya kunifikela; akuyi kulazi apho liphuma khona, wofikelwa bububi; aniyi kukwazi ulibazisa, kuwe ngequbuliso isiphanziso ongayi kukwazi."
Isaiah47:12 Khawuyeke nokukhafula kwakho okukhulu, nokukhafula kwakho okuninzi, ozibophe ngako kwasebuncinaneni bakho; ukuba kunjalo, uya kuba nako ukwenza inzuzo, ukuba kunjalo, uya kuba nako ukuphumelela."
Isaiah47:13 Udiniwe bubuninzi bezicwangciso zakho; Ke kaloku, mazibaleke iinkwenkwezi, mabavuke abavumisi ngeenkwenkwezi, bakusindise kwezo zinto ziya kukuhlela;"
Isaiah47:14 Yabona, baya kuba njengeendiza; umlilo uya kubatshisa; abanako ukuzisindisa emandleni elangatye;"
Isaiah47:15 Kuya kuba njalo nakuwe owawusebenza naye, abarhwebi bakho kwasebutsheni bakho; akukho bani uya kukuhlangula."
Isaiah48:1 Liveni eli lizwi, nina bendlu kaYakobi, enibizwa ngalo igama likaSirayeli, naphuma emanzini akwaYuda, nina nishumayelayo egameni likaYehova, nibiza uThixo kaSirayeli, kodwa kungenganyaniso; nangenyaniso ubulungisa abukho."
Isaiah48:2 Ngenxa enokuba bezibiza, bephuma emzini ongcwele, behleli kuThixo kaSirayeli; NguYehova wemikhosi igama lakhe."
Isaiah48:3 Izinto zokuqala ndazixela kwasekuqaleni; zaphuma emlonyeni wam, ndazibonisa; Ndenze ngokungacwangciswanga, kwaye kwenzeka."
Isaiah48:4 Kuba ndiyazi ukuba uneenkani, nentamo yakho ingumsipha wesinyithi, nebunzi lakho lubhedu;"
Isaiah48:5 Kananjalo ndinixelele kwasekuqalekeni; ingekabonakali, ndakubonise yona, ukuze ungathi, Wenze le nto uThixo wam, umfanekiso wam oqingqiweyo nomtyhido wam bawumisile."
Isaiah48:6 Nivile; ziboneni zonke ezi zinto; kwaye awuyi kuthetha? Ukususela ngoku ndikubonise izinto ezintsha, izinto ezifihlakeleyo, ongazazi."
Isaiah48:7 Zidalwa ngoku, azidalwanga kwasekuqaleni; akubavanga naphambi kwelanga; hleze uthi, Yabona, bendizazi."
Isaiah48:8 Ewe, aneva; ewe, ubungazi; ibingavulekanga indlebe yakho kususela koko; kuba ndandisazi ukuba uya kwenza ngobuqhophololo uze kuthiwe ungumkreqi kwasesibelekweni."
Isaiah48:9 Ngenxa yegama lam ndiya kuwubekela bucala umsindo wam, nangenxa yendumiso yam ndiya kuwucima, ukuze ndingonakalisi."
Isaiah48:10 Uyabona, ndikuhlambulule, akwaba ngasilivere; ndikunyule ezikweni lembandezelo;"
Isaiah48:11 Ngenxa yam, ewe, ngenxa yam, ndiya kukwenza; lingáthini na ukungcoliswa igama lam? andiluniki omnye uzuko lwam."
Isaiah48:12 Ndiphendule, Yakobi, Sirayeli, ukuhlahlamba kwam; Ndinguye; ndingowokuqala, ndingowokugqibela;"
Isaiah48:13 Isandla sam saseka ihlabathi, esokunene sam saneke izulu; xa ndizibiza, zema kunye."
Isaiah48:14 Zihlanganiseni, niphulaphule; Nguwuphi na kubo owathetha ezo zinto? uYehova wayemthanda; Uya kwenza okulungileyo kwiBhabhiloni, yaye isandla sakhe siya kuba nxamnye namaKhaledi."
Isaiah48:15 Mna, ewe, ndithethile; ewe, ndimbizile; ndimzisile, kwaye uya kuyiphumelelisa indlela yakhe."
Isaiah48:16 Sondelani kum, nive oku; Kwasekuqaleni andithethanga emfihlekweni; ngokuba ndikho, ndikho; nangoku iNkosi uYehova indithumile ngomoya wayo."
Isaiah48:17 Utsho uYehova, umkhululi wakho, oyiNgcwele kaSirayeli; NdinguYehova, uThixo wakho, ungokufundisa okulungileyo, ohamba ngendlela oya kuhamba ngayo."
Isaiah48:18 Akwaba ubuyibazele indlebe imiyalelo yam! uxolo lwakho lwaba njengomlambo, nobulungisa bakho njengamaza olwandle;"
Isaiah48:19 Yayinjengentlabathi imbewu yakho, nabantwana ezibilinini zakho babe njengohlalutye lwakho; aliyi kunqunyulwa litshabalale igama lakhe phambi kwam."
Isaiah48:20 Phumani eBhabheli, babalekeni kumaKaledi; uthi, uYehova umkhulule ngokumhlawulela umkhonzi wakhe uYakobi."
Isaiah48:21 Abanxanwanga oko ebahambisa entlango; Wabakhuphela amanzi engxondorheni; Waphinda walicanda iliwa, kwaphuma amanzi."
Isaiah48:22 Akukho luxolo kwabangendawo, utsho uYehova."
Isaiah49:1 Yivani, ziqithi; yivani, zintlanga ezikude; uYehova wandibiza kwasesizalweni sam; walibiza igama lam kwasesizalweni sikama."
Isaiah49:2 Wawenza umlomo wam wanjengekrele elibukhali; Wandisithelisa esithunzini sesandla sakhe, wandenza ingcongolo ekhazimlisiweyo; wandifihla engutyeni;"
Isaiah49:3 wathi kum, Ungumkhonzi wam, Sirayeli, endiya kuqhayisa ngaye."
Isaiah49:4 Ndathi mna, Ndifumane ndabulaleka, ndawachitha amandla am, ndafumana ndazixhamla; Ke lona ibango lam likuYehova, nomthetho wam unoThixo wam."
Isaiah49:5 Kaloku ke, utsho uYehova, owandidalayo kwasesizalweni sam, ukuba ndibe ngumkhonzi kuye, ukuze ndibuyisele uYakobi kuye; engekahlanganiselwa ndawonye uSirayeli, mna ndiya kuzukiswa emehlweni kaYehova, uThixo wam abe khona amandla am."
Isaiah49:6 Wathi, Kuyinto encinane ukuba ube ngumkhonzi kum wokuvusa izizwe zakwaYakobi, ubuyise abagcini bakwaSirayeli; Ndiya kukukhanyisela iintlanga, ukuze ube lusindiso kum isiphelo sehlabathi."
Isaiah49:7 Utsho uYehova, uMkhululi kaSirayeli, oyiNgcwele wakhe, kowacekisayo umntu, kothiyiweyo ziintlanga, kumkhonzi wabathetheli, ookumkani baya kukubona oko, basuke beme; ngenxa yayo abathetheli baya kuguqa yeNkosi ethembekileyo, yoyiNgcwele kaSirayeli, yokunyula nina."
Isaiah49:8 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ndakuva ngexesha lenceba, ndakunceda ngemini yosindiso; abazukulwana abalahliweyo;"
Isaiah49:9 Yithi kubathinjwa, Phumani; zibonakaliseni nisebumnyameni. Baya kudla emendweni, namadlelo abo abe sezigangeni zonke;"
Isaiah49:10 Abayi kulamba, abayi kunxanwa; ubushushu nelanga aziyi kubabetha; ngokuba Lowo unenceba kubo uya kubakhokelela, abakhokelele emithonjeni yamanzi."
Isaiah49:11 Ndiya kuzenza zonke iintaba zam zibe yindlela, umendo wam uphakame."
Isaiah49:12 Yabonani, baya kuvela kude; yabona, beza bevela entla nasentshonalanga; nakwilizwe lamaSinime."
Isaiah49:13 Memelelani, nina mazulu; kwaye ugcobe, hlabathi! memelelani ngovuyo, zintaba; ngenxa yokuba uYehova wabathuthuzela abantu bakhe waza waba nenceba kwabo basweleyo."
Isaiah49:14 Ke yathi iZiyon, uYehova undishiyile, iNkosi yam indishiyile."
Isaiah49:15 Umfazi angalulibala yini na usana lwakhe, ukuba angabi namfesane kunyana wesizalo sakhe? Nokuba bathe balibala, andiyi kukulibala mna."
Isaiah49:16 Yabona, ndikubhalele ezintendeni zezandla zam; iindonga zakho zihlala zingam."
Isaiah49:17 Oonyana bakho baya kukhawuleza; iintshaba zakho nabakonakalisayo baya kuphuma kuwe.
Isaiah49:18 Phakamisa amehlo akho ngeenxa zonke, ubone; Ndihleli nje, utsho uYehova, uze uwanxibe onke njengezivatho, ubophelelekile kuwe njengomtshakazi."
Isaiah49:19 Kuba amanxuwa akho, namanxuwa akho, nelizwe lakho elinxuwa, licuthene kakhulu, ngenxa yabemi balo, babe kude abakudlayo."
Isaiah49:20 Baya kuthi ezindlebeni zakho oonyana bakho, owakubazala, wakuba ubhujelwe, Le ndawo imxinwa; ndinike indawo yokuhlala."
Isaiah49:21 Wothi ke entliziyweni yakho, Ngubani na lo undizalele lo? kwaye ngubani ovelise oku? Yabona, ndindedwa; khangela, babephi na?"
Isaiah49:22 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabonani, ndiyasiphakamisela ezintlangeni isandla sam, ndiyiphakamisele ezintlangeni ibhanile yam, zibazise oonyana bakho ngesandla sabo, neentombi zakho zithwalwe emagxeni abo."
Isaiah49:23 Ookumkani baya kuba ngooyihlo ababakhulisayo, nabafazi babo babe ngodade babakhulisi bakho; baya kuqubuda ngobuso, bakhothe uthuli lweenyawo zakho; wazi ukuba ndinguYehova, ngenxa yokuba abo bakholose ngam abayi kudana."
Isaiah49:24 Kuya kuthatyathwa na amaxhoba kwigorha, okanye umbanjwa uya kusindiswa ngomthetho?"
Isaiah49:25 Wathi uYehova, Nabathinjiweyo bamaRefa baya kubanjwa, namaxhoba omngcangcazelisi aya kusindiswa;"
Isaiah49:26 Abakuxinzelela phantsi ndobadlisa inyama yabo; baya kunxila ligazi labo njengewayini enencasa, yazi yonke inyama, ukuba mna, Yehova, ndinguMkhululi wakho, uMkhululi wakho, iNgxaki kaYakobi."
Isaiah50:1 Wathi uYehova, Liphi na isiqinisekiso sikanyoko endamlahlayo? ndithengise ngani kubanamatyala kum? Yabona, uzithengisile ngenxa yobugwenxa bakho; yaye unyoko walahlwa ngenxa yezono zakho."
Isaiah50:2 Yini na ukuba ndifike kungekho mntu? ndithe xa ndifowuna akwaphendula mntu? Ngaba ingalo yam imfutshane na, ukuba ingasindisi? okanye andinawo amandla okusindisa? Yabona, ngokukhalima kwam ndiyalugqatsa ulwandle, nemilambo ibe yintlango; ziyabola iintlanzi zabo, ngokuba kungekho manzi, ziyafa lunxano."
Isaiah50:3 Ndambesa izulu ngezimnyama zokuzila, ndilenze libe yingubo yobumnyama."
Isaiah50:4 iNkosi uYehova indinike ulwimi lwabafundileyo, ukuze ndikwazi ukuthetha ilizwi ngexesha elililo kodiniweyo;"
Isaiah50:5 iNkosi uYehova yayivula indlebe yam, yaye andizange ndivukele okanye ndiwufulathele."
Isaiah50:6 Ndiwunikela umhlana wam ukuba ubethwe, nezidlele zam kwabaxheliweyo beenwele zabo; andibusithelisanga ubuso bam ehlazweni nasekutshicelweni."
Isaiah50:7 Ngokuba iNkosi uYehova iya kundinceda; ke ngoko, andiyi kuba nazintloni;"
Isaiah50:8 Usondele kondixelelayo; ngubani na oya kubambana nam? Masime ndawonye: Ngubani na ummangaleli wam? makeze kum.
Isaiah50:9 Yabona, iNkosi uYehova iyandinceda; ngubani na owondigweba? yabona, bonke bephela baya konakala njengengubo; amanundu aya kubadla."
Isaiah50:10 Ngubani na kuni owoyika uYehova, ophulaphula izwi lomkhonzi wakhe, ahambe ebumnyameni, kungekho kukhanya? makakholose ngegama likaYehova, ahlale ngoThixo wakhe."
Isaiah50:11 Yabonani, nonke niphela, nina baphemba umlilo, baxhobe iintolo ezinomlilo, hambani niye elangatyeni lomlilo wenu, nasezintolweni ezinomlilo enizivuthisileyo. Kufuneka uyifumane esandleni sam; uya kulala ngeentlungu."
Isaiah51:1 Phulaphulani kum, nina babumelayo ubulungisa, nina bamquqelayo uYehova; khangela ilitye ekroliweyo kulo, nequla lomhadi ekumbiwe kulo."
Isaiah51:2 Bhekani uyihlo uAbraham noSara abanizalayo, ngokuba ndathi engoyedwa, ndamsikelela, ndabandisa."
Isaiah51:3 Ngokuba uYehova uya kuyithuthuzela iZiyon, uwathuthuzele onke amanxuwa ayo; uya kuliguqula ilizwe lakhe libe njenge-Eden, nelizwe layo libe njengomyezo kaYehova; Kuya kufunyanwa imihlali nemivuyo kuyo, imibulelo nezwi lendumiso."
Isaiah51:4 Ndiphulaphuleni, bantu bam; ndiphulaphuleni, bantu bam; ngokuba umyalelo uya kuphuma kum, ndiwumise umyalelo wam, ube sisikhanyiso ebantwini."
Isaiah51:5 Busondele ubulungisa bam; Kuvele usindiso lwam, zaye izandla zam ziya kubagweba abantu; iziqithi ziya kulindela kum, kwaye ziya kuthembela esandleni sam."
Isaiah51:6 Phakamiselani amehlo enu emazulwini uze ukhangele emhlabeni, ngenxa yokuba amazulu aya kuthi shwaka njengomsi, nomhlaba uya kuguga njengesambatho, nabo bahleli kuwo baya kufa ngolo hlobo; kodwa usindiso lwam luya kuba ngonaphakade, nobulungisa bam abuyi konakaliswa."
Isaiah51:7 Phulaphulani kum, nina nibaziyo ubulungisa, nina bantu banesiyalo sam entliziyweni yabo; Musani ukuzoyika izingcikivo zabantu, ningazoyiki izithuko zabo."
Isaiah51:8 Kuba amanundu aya kubadla njengengubo, umbungu ubadle njengoboya begusha; ke bona ubulungisa bam buya kuba ngunaphakade, nosindiso lwam lube kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana."
Isaiah51:9 Vuka, vuka, nxiba amandla, ngalo kaYehova! yisuk’ ume ngokweemini zasephakadeni, kwizizukulwana zasephakadeni. Asinguwe na owabulala uRahabhi, wayibetha ingwenya?"
Isaiah51:10 Asinguwe na owatshisayo ulwandle, amanzi anzongonzongo kakhulu; ukuba amanzi anzongonzongo elwandle enze indlela yokuba kudlule abahlawulelweyo?"
Isaiah51:11 Ke abakhululwa bakaYehova baya kubuya beze eZiyon benemihlali; novuyo olungunaphakade luya kuba phezu kweentloko zabo; ulonwabo novuyo baya kulufumana; nobuhlwempu nentswelo iya kusaba.
Isaiah51:12 Mna ndinguye uMthuthuzeli wenu;
Isaiah51:13 Kwaye umlibale uYehova, uMdali wakho, uMenzi wezulu, uMseki wehlabathi; nahlala ninkwantya imini yonke bubushushu bomcudisi, ngokokuba seningxamele ukutshabalalisa? buphi na ke ubushushu bomcudisi?"
Isaiah51:14 Umbanjwa ungxamela ukukhululwa, angafi emhadini, nokuba siphele isonka sakhe."
Isaiah51:15 Ke mna ndinguYehova, uThixo wakho, uMlatyuzisi wolwandle, agqume amaza alo, igama lakhe nguYehova wemikhosi."
Isaiah51:16 Ndiwabekile amazwi am emlonyeni wakho, ndakugubungela ngesithunzi sesandla sam, ukuba ndityale amazulu, ndiseke iziseko zehlabathi, ndithi kwiZiyon, Ningabantu bam."
Isaiah51:17 Zivuse, zivuse, zivuse, Yerusalem wena uyiseleyo indebe yobushushu bakhe esandleni sikaYehova; Usele intlenge yendebe engcangcazelayo, wayijija."
Isaiah51:18 Bekungekho namnye uyithundezayo iYerusalem, phakathi koonyana bonke eyabazalayo; bekungekho namnye usibambe ngesandla sakhe phakathi koonyana bonke abo wabakhulisayo."
Isaiah51:19 Zazimbini izinto zakuhlela; ngubani na oya kukuvela? imbuqo, nembubhiso, nendlala, nekrele; ndinithuthuzele ngabani na?"
Isaiah51:20 Oonyana bakho bawile, balele ezimbombeni zezitrato zonke, njengenkunzi yenkomo ibanjiswe ngomnatha; bazele ngumsindo kaYehova, bubugwenxa boThixo wakho."
Isaiah51:21 Ngako oko yiva oku ngoku, wena uludwayi, unxilileyo, kungengawayini;"
Isaiah51:22 itsho iNkosi yakho uYehova, uThixo wakho, omela abantu bakhe, ukuthi, Yabona, esandleni sakho ndiphethe indebe ehexisayo, indebe enombilini yomsindo wam; awusenakuphinda usele."
Isaiah51:23 Ndiya kuwunikela esandleni sabanitshutshisayo; abathi kumphefumlo wakho, Qoqa, siwele; Walala njengomhlaba, nanjengendlela kwabo badlulayo."
Isaiah52:1 Vuka, vuka; nxiba amandla akho, Ziyon! Nxiba iingubo zakho zokuhomba, Yerusalem, mzi ungcwele, ngokuba ukususela ngoku akuyi kungena kuwe ongalukanga, noyinqambi."
Isaiah52:2 Ziphakamise, usuke eluthulini; Suk’ ume, uhlale phantsi, Yerusalem; zikhulule iimbophelelo zentamo yakho, mthinjwa, ntombi inguZiyon!"
Isaiah52:3 Ngokuba utsho uYehova ukuthi, Kwathengiswa ngani ngelize; kwaye uya kusala ungenayo nesenti."
Isaiah52:4 Kuba itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi: “Abantu bam babehle baya eYiputa ukuze baphambukele khona; yaye iAsiriya yabacinezela ngaphandle kwesizathu.
Isaiah52:5 Kaloku ke yintoni na enamapha, utsho uYehova, bethatyathwe ngelize nje abantu bam? mabathi abalawuli babo, utsho uYehova; negama lam linyeliswa yonke imihla."
Isaiah52:6 Ke ngoko, abantu bam baya kulazi igama lam; ke ngoko, baya kwazi ngaloo mini ukuba ndim lowo uthethayo; khangela, ndim."
Isaiah52:7 Hayi, ukuba zintle kwazo ezintabeni iinyawo zabashumayela iindaba ezilungileyo, abavakalisa uxolo; lowo uzisa iindaba ezilungileyo, lowo uvakalisa usindiso; abathi kwiZiyon, Ngukumkani uThixo wakho!"
Isaiah52:8 Phulaphula ilizwi labagcini bakho; baya kuvuma ngazwi-nye, ngenxa yokuba baya kubona ngamehlo xa uYehova eyibuyisa iZiyon."
Isaiah52:9 Memelelani nivume kunye, manxuwa aseYerusalem; ngokuba uYehova ubathuthuzele abantu bakhe, wayikhulula ngentlawulelo iYerusalem."
Isaiah52:10 uYehova usityhilile isandla sakhe esingcwele phambi kwamehlo eentlanga zonke; yaye zonke iziphelo zehlabathi ziya kulubona ke usindiso loThixo wethu.
Isaiah52:11 Mkani, mkani apho, musani ukuyichukumisa into eyinqambi; evela kuye; Hlambuluka, nina bathwali beempahla zikaYehova."
Isaiah52:12 Kuba musani ukumka kamsinya, musani ukuqhwesha; ngokuba uYehova uya kukukhokela; yaye uThixo kaSirayeli woba ngumvuzo wenu."
Isaiah52:13 Yabonani, umkhonzi wam uya kwenza ngengqiqo;"
Isaiah52:14 Abaninzi bamangaliswa nguwe; ubuso bakhe bonakele ngaphezu kobabo bonke abantu, nembonakalo yakhe ibinobubi kunoonyana babantu."
Isaiah52:15 Uya kuzichithachitha ke iintlanga ezininzi; ookumkani baya kuthi khamnqa kuye; kuba oko bangekakuxeleli, baya kukubona; nento abangayivanga baya kuva."
Isaiah53:1 Ngubani owamkele ingxelo yethu? sityhileke kubani na isandla sikaYehova?
Isaiah53:2 Kuba uya kuntshula phambi kobuso bakhe njengegatya, nanjengengcambu emhlabeni owomileyo; kwaye xa siza kumbona, asinakunqwenela nto ilunge ngakumbi."
Isaiah53:3 Udeliwe, ushiyiwe ngabantu; umntu olusizi kunye nomntu oqhele ukuba lusizi; sabusithelisa ubuso bethu kuye, ngokungathi kunjalo; udeliwe, asimthabatha;"
Isaiah53:4 Okwenene, uzithabathele kuye iintsizi zethu, wazithwala iintlungu zethu;"
Isaiah53:5 Kodwa wahlatywa ngenxa yezikreqo zethu, wacinezelwa ngenxa yobugwenxa bethu; isibetho esizisela uxolo sawela phezu kwakhe; nangemivumbo yakhe siphilisiwe thina."
Isaiah53:6 Sonke silahlekile njengezimvu; elowo walahleka ngendlela yakhe; uYehova wabuzisa kuye ubugwenxa bethu sonke.
Isaiah53:7 Wacudiswa, waba buhlungu, engawuvuli umlomo wakhe; Njengemvana usiwa ekuxhelweni, nanjengegusha esisidenge phambi kwabachebi bayo, wenjenjalo ukungawuvuli umlomo wakhe."
Isaiah53:8 Wakhululwa entolongweni nasekugwetyweni; Ngubani na oya kuyixela isini sakhe? ngokuba wanqanyulwa, waba sehlabathini labaphilileyo; ubethweswa ubugwenxa besizwe sakowethu."
Isaiah53:9 Lenza ingcwaba lakhe laba nongendawo, nosisityebi ekufeni kwakhe; ngokuba akenzanga bubi, kungekho nkohliso emlonyeni wakhe."
Isaiah53:10 Kodwa uYehova wafuna ukumtyumza; waba buhlungu; ukuba uthe wenza idini lesono ngenxa yomphefumlo wakhe, wobabona abantwana bakhe, ayolule imihla yakhe, ibe nempumelelo inkoliseko kaYehova esandleni sakhe."
Isaiah53:11 Wokubona ukusebenza nzima komphefumlo wakhe, aneliswe; Ngokwazi kwakhe uya kumenza ilungisa kakhulu umkhonzi wam olilungisa; Uya kubuthwala ubugwenxa babo."
Isaiah53:12 Ngoko ke ndiya kumabela isahlulo kunye namadoda amakhulu, alabe amaxhoba namagorha; ngokuba wawuthulula umoya wakhe ekufeni, wabalelwa kwabangendawo; wathwala izono zabaninzi, wabathandazela abakreqi."
Isaiah54:1 Memelela, ludlolo, ludlolo; qhwaba izandla, duma ngezwi elikhulu, wena ungamithiyo; ngokuba baninzi abantwana boshiywa, ngaphezu kwabantwana bomfazi onendoda; utsho uYehova."
Isaiah54:2 Yandise indawo yentente yakho, wandise amalaphu ezakhiwo zakho;"
Isaiah54:3 Kuba uya kutsiba uye ekunene nasekholo; oonyana bakho bazidle ilifa iintlanga, bahlale emizini engamanxuwa."
Isaiah54:4 Musani ukoyika; ngokuba aniyi kudana, aniyi kuma; kuba uya kulilibala ihlazo lobutsha bakho yaye akuyi kuba salikhumbula ihlazo lobuhlolokazi bakho."
Isaiah54:5 Ngokuba indoda yakho nguMenzi wakho; NguYehova wemikhosi igama lakhe; noMkhululi wakho, oyiNgcwele kaSirayeli; Uya kubizwa ngokuba nguThixo wehlabathi lonke."
Isaiah54:6 Ngenxa yokuba uYehova ukubize njengomfazi oshiyiweyo nomphefumlo onentlungu, nanjengebhinqa eliselula xa elahliwe, utsho uThixo wakho."
Isaiah54:7 Ndakushiya umzuzwana omncinane; ndiya kukubutha ngemfesane enkulu.
Isaiah54:8 Ngomkhukula woburhalarhume ndabusithelisa ubuso bam kuwe okwephanyazo; ndiya kuba nemfesane kuwe ngenceba engunaphakade; utsho uMkhululi wakho uYehova.
Isaiah54:9 Kuba kum kunjengamanzi kaNowa, kuba njengoko ndafungayo ukuba amanzi kaNowa akasayi kuphinda adlule phezu komhlaba; ngoko ndafunga ukuba andiyi kunicaphukela, ndinikhalimele kakhulu."
Isaiah54:10 Ngokuba ziya kushukuma iintaba, neenduli zishukume; yona inceba yam ayiyi kumka kuwe, ungashukumi nomnqophiso wam woxolo; utsho onemfesane kuwe, uYehova."
Isaiah54:11 Owu mashwa, baqhutywa sisaqhwithi naze ningathuthuzeleki, yabona, ndiwabeka amatye akho abe nemibala emihle, neziseko zakho ndizizinzise ngesafire."
Isaiah54:12 Ndozenza iingcango zakho ngeagati, namasango akho ngamatye, nemida yakho yonke ngamatye anqabileyo."
Isaiah54:13 Bonke abantwana bakho baya kuba ngabafundi bakaYehova; yaye luya kuba lukhulu uxolo lwabantwana bakho.
Isaiah54:14 Uya kuqiniselwa ngobulungisa; uya kuba kude namaxhala; ngokuba akuyi koyika, akuyi kunkwantya; ngokuba ayiyi kusondela kuwe."
Isaiah54:15 Yabona, bayaqukana, bahlanganisane, andikho mna kuloo nto; bonke abanibuthayo baya kuwa ngenxa yakho."
Isaiah54:16 Yabona, mna ndadala ingcibi etshisa amalahle emlilweni, ivelise impahla ngokweshishini layo; ndadala nomonakalisi wokuyonakalisa."
Isaiah54:17 Akukho nto iya kwenziwa kuwe ayiyi kuphumelela; kwaye zonke iilwimi ziya kusukuma phezu kwakho kwaye zibagwebe. Lilo eli ilifa labakhonzi bakaYehova, nobulungisa babo buphuma kum, utsho uYehova."
Isaiah55:1 Bonke abanxaniweyo, beza emanzini, nabangenamali; yizani, nithenge, nidle; Ewe, yizani nithenge iwayini nobisi ngaphandle kwemali nangaphandle kwexabiso."
Isaiah55:2 Yini na ukuba nilinganisele imali ngezinto ezingezizo izonka? nomsebenzi wenu kwinto enganelisiyo? Phulaphulani kum ninyameke, nidle okulungileyo, uvuye umphefumlo wenu ngokugqithileyo."
Isaiah55:3 Guqani, nize kum; yivani, uphile umphefumlo wenu; yaye ndiya kwenza umnqophiso ongunaphakade nani, iinceba zikaDavide."
Isaiah55:4 Qaphelani, ndimmisele ukuba abe lingqina labantu, inkokeli nenkokeli yabantu."
Isaiah55:5 Yabona, uya kubiza uhlanga ongalwaziyo, neentlanga ebezingakwazi ziya kubalekela kuwe ngenxa kaYehova uThixo wakho nangenxa yaLowo Ungcwele kaSirayeli; ngokuba enizukisile."
Isaiah55:6 Funani uYehova engekafunyanwa, nimbize esekufuphi."
Isaiah55:7 Ongendawo makajike endleleni yakhe, ongendawo abuye ezicamangweni zakhe; makaguqukele kuYehova, woba nemfesane kuye; ibuyele kuThixo wethu, ngokuba woxolela futhi."
Isaiah55:8 Kuba iingcinga zam asizizo iingcinga zenu, neendlela zenu asizizo iindlela zam, utsho uYehova."
Isaiah55:9 Inene, njengokuba izulu liphezu komhlaba, ngokunjalo iindlela zam ziziphakamele iindlela zenu, neengcinga zam ziziphakamele iingcinga zenu."
Isaiah55:10 Kuba njengoko kusihla imvula nekhephu ezulwini, ingabuyeli khona, kodwa iwunyakamise umhlaba, iwukhulise, iwukhulise, ukuze inike imbewu umhlwayeli, imnike isonka odlayo."
Isaiah55:11 Kuya kuba njalo ngelizwi lam eliphuma emlonyeni wam: aliyi kubuyela kum ndedwa, kodwa liya kukwenza ukuthanda kwam, likuphumelelise konke endikuthume lona."
Isaiah55:12 Kuba niya kuphuma ninovuyo, nikhokelwa ninoxolo; iintaba neenduli ziya kunyikima ngovuyo phambi kwenu, nemithi yelizwe ibethe izandla."
Isaiah55:13 Endaweni yemithi enameva kuya kuhluma umsipres, esikhundleni semithana kuhlume ummirtile; kwaye kuYehova kuya kuba njengegama, njengomqondiso ongunaphakade ongenakunqunyulwa."
Isaiah56:1 Wathi uYehova, Gcinani isiko, nenze ubulungisa; ngokuba lusondele ukuba luze usindiso lwam, nobulungisa bam buza kutyhilwa."
Isaiah56:2 Hayi, uyolo lomntu okwenzayo oku, nonyana womntu oyibambileyo; ogcina isabatha, ukuba angayihlambeli; osibambayo isandla sakhe singenzi nanye into embi."
Isaiah56:3 Makangathethi ke unyana wolunye uhlanga, onamathele kuYehova, esithi, uYehova undahlule ngokupheleleyo ebantwini bakhe; Makangatsho umkhonzi ukuthi, Yabona, ngumthi owomileyo."
Isaiah56:4 Kuba utsho uYehova kumathenwa agcina iisabatha zam nabanyula into endiyithandayo nababambelele ngokuqinileyo emnqophisweni wam;
Isaiah56:5 ndobanika endlwini yam nasezindongeni zam indawo negama elilungileyo ngaphezu koonyana neentombi; ndiya kubanika igama elingunaphakade, elingenakunqanyulwa."
Isaiah56:6 Yaye oonyana bolunye uhlanga abanamathela kuYehova ukuze bakhonze yena nokuthanda igama likaYehova ukuze babe ngabakhonzi bakhe, wonk’ ubani ogcina isabatha ukuze ayihlambele nobambelela emnqophisweni wam;"
Isaiah56:7 ndobazisa entabeni yam engcwele, bavuye endlwini yam yokuthandaza; amadini abo anyukayo neminikelo yabo yokholeka esibingelelweni sam; ngokuba indlu yam iya kubizwa ngokuba yindlu yokuthandaza yabantu bonke."
Isaiah56:8 Itsho iNkosi uYehova, ekubabuthayo abagxothiweyo bakwaSirayeli, ukuthi, Noko ke ndiya kuhlanganisela kuye nabanye ngaphaya kwababuthiweyo bakhe;"
Isaiah56:9 Onke amarhamncwa asendle yizani adle, nawo onke amarhamncwa ehlathi."
Isaiah56:10 Abahlebi bakhe baziimfama, àbazi bonke; lala, xoka, ngathi ukozela."
Isaiah56:11 Ewe, bona banjengeebhokhwe ezilambileyo, ezingahluthiyo, babe ngabalusi abangaqondiyo; bonke bephela bakhangela kwezabo iindlela, elowo ekhangela kweyakhe inzuzo, kowayo ummelwane."
Isaiah56:12 Wathi ke, Yizani, ndiya kuthabatha iwayini, sizalise ngesi siselo sinxilisayo; nengomso liya kuba njenganamhla, linde kunene."
Isaiah57:1 Ilungisa liyatshabalala; akukho mntu ke ukunyamekelayo oko ngentliziyo; kwaye abantu abanenceba bayasuswa, ngaphandle nje kokuba amalungisa asusiwe ebubini obuzayo."
Isaiah57:2 Uya kungena enoxolo; baya kuphumla kwiimandlalo zabo, ngamnye ohamba ngobulungisa bakhe."
Isaiah57:3 Ke sondelani apha, nina nyana bemilingo, nzala yehenyukazi nehenyukazi."
Isaiah57:4 Udlala nabani? Uwuvula kubani na umlomo wakho, ulukhuphele phandle ulwimi lwakho? Aningabantwana bokreqo na, sisizukulwana sobuxoki?"
Isaiah57:5 Izithixo yini na, phantsi kwemithi yonke eluhlaza, nibaxhela abantwana ezimbombeni zamatye?"
Isaiah57:6 Isahlulo sakho siphantsi kwamatye agudileyo omlambo; yabona, kukuphela kwakho; Wabagalela nento eselwayo, bazisa nomnikelo oshiswa emlilweni. Ngaba kufuneka ndithuthuzeleke ngale nto?"
Isaiah57:7 Uzandlala iimandlalo zakho entabeni ende; wenyuka nawe ukuya kwenza idini.
Isaiah57:8 Wasibeka isikhumbuzo sakho nasemva kweengcango nemigubasi, ngenxa yokuba wazibonakalisa komnye uthile ungenguye mna waza wenyuka; watwabulula iimandlalo zakho, wanqophisana nabo; wawuthanda iibhedi zabo apho wawubabone khona."
Isaiah57:9 Wahambela kukumkani unevumba elimnandi, walinyusa ivumba lakho, wazithuma kude izigidimi zakho, wazithoba ukuya kwelabafileyo."
Isaiah57:10 Udiniwe bubuninzi bendlela yakho; kodwa akutshongo ukuthi, Akukho themba; ufumene ubomi esandleni sakho; ke ngoko, anibanga lusizi."
Isaiah57:11 Ubusoyika bani okanye ubusoyika bani na, ukuba uxoke ungandicingeli yaye ungakubeki oko entliziyweni yakho? Andithi cwaka na kwakudala, ungandoyiki?"
Isaiah57:12 Ndiya kubuxela mna ubulungisa bakho, nezenzo zakho; ngokuba abayi kuninceda."
Isaiah57:13 Ekubizeni kwakho, mazikusindise izihlwele zakho; kodwa umoya uya kubathabatha bonke; kodwa okholosa ngam uya kulidla ilifa ilizwe, ayidle ilifa intaba yam engcwele;"
Isaiah57:14 Ndiya kuthi, Dumisani, zukisani, lungisani indlela, susani ukreqo emendweni wabantu bam."
Isaiah57:15 Kuba kuthiwa, Osenyangweni uhleli ngonaphakade, ogama lingcwele; Ndihleli endaweni ephakamileyo engcweleni, nomoya othobekileyo, ukuze ndihlaziye umoya wabathobekileyo, ndihlaziye iintliziyo zabantliziyo zaphukileyo."
Isaiah57:16 Kuba andiyi kuhlala ndiphikisana, kwaye andiyi kuhlala ndinomsindo, kuba umoya uya kuphelelwa ngamandla phambi kwam kunye nemimoya endiyenzileyo."
Isaiah57:17 Ndaba noburhalarhume kububi bokubawa kwakhe, ndambetha;"
Isaiah57:18 Iindlela zakhe ndizibonile: ndiya kumphilisa; Ndiza kumkhokela kwakhona ndize ndibuyisele intuthuzelo kuye nabo bazilileyo bakhe.
Isaiah57:19 Ndidala iziqhamo zomlomo; Uxolo, uxolo kwabakude nakwabakufuphi, utsho uYehova; ndiya kumphilisa."
Isaiah57:20 Ke bona abangendawo banjengolwandle oluvuzayo, alunakuzola; amanzi alo avelisa udaka nodaka."
Isaiah57:21 Akukho luxolo kwabangendawo, utsho uThixo wam."
Isaiah58:1 Danduluka uphimisele, ungathinteleki; phakamisa izwi lakho njengesigodlo, ubaxelele abantu bam ububi babo, uyixelele indlu kaYakobi izono zayo."
Isaiah58:2 Ke bona baya kundifuna imihla yonke, bakuvuyele ukuzazi iindlela zam; njengohlanga olwenze okuthe tye, olungatyekiyo emyalelweni woThixo walo; bacela kum imiyalelo yomthetho; bayakuvuyela ukusondela kuThixo."
Isaiah58:3 Bathi sizile ukudla, ungaboni na wena? Yini na ukuba siyicinezele imiphefumlo yethu, nibe ningazi? Yabona, ngomhla wokuzila kwakho, ukholekile kuwe, unqwenele yonke imigudu yakho;"
Isaiah58:4 Yabonani, nizila ukudla, nibambana, nibetha ngenqindi elikhohlakeleyo; musani ukuzila njengoko nisenzayo namhla, ukuze livakale ilizwi lenu."
Isaiah58:5 Ngaba kukuzila endikunyulileyo na? Ngaba ngumhla wokuba umntu awucinezele umphefumlo wakhe? Ukuthokombisa intloko njengexhalanga na, waza wandlala ezirhwexayo nothuthu phantsi kwendlu yakho? Ngaba uyathanda ukuyibiza ngokuba yimini yokuzila ukutya ekholisa uYehova?"
Isaiah58:6 Asikokuzila endikunyulileyo na? Ukukhulula amakhamandela obugwenxa, ukukhulula imithwalo enzima, ukukhulula abatyumkileyo, ukwaphule zonke iidyokhwe?"
Isaiah58:7 Asikuko na ukuba unike olambileyo isonka sakho, nokuba ungenise amahlwempu agxothiweyo endlwini yakho? xa ubona umntu eze, uyamambesa; ungayifihli inyama yakho?"
Isaiah58:8 Kuya kwandula ke ukukhanya kwakho kuphume njengokusa, buhlume kamsinya ubomi bakho; nobulungisa bakho buya kuhamba phambi kwakho; Uzuko lukaYehova luya kuba ngumvuzo wakho."
Isaiah58:9 Uya kwandula ubize, asabele uYehova; uya kubiza, athi, Ndikho! Ukuba uthe wayisusa idyokhwe, nokukhomba ngomnwe, nokuthetha nje, phakathi kwenu;"
Isaiah58:10 ukuba uthe wawelulela umphefumlo wakho kolambileyo, wawudlisa umphefumlo ocinezelweyo; apho ukukhanya kwakho kuya kukhanya ebumnyameni, nobumnyama bakho bube njengemini."
Isaiah58:11 uYehova uya kuhlala ekwalathisa, uwuhluthise umphefumlo wakho kowomileyo, watyebisa amathambo akho; yaye uya kuba njengomyezo onyakanyiswa yimvula nanjengomthombo omanzi angatshiyo."
Isaiah58:12 Abaya kuba ngabakho baya kwakha amanxuwa akudala; ukubizwa kwakhe kuthiwe, nguMcinzi weentanda, nguMlungisi weendlela;"
Isaiah58:13 Ukuba uthe walubuyisa unyawo lwakho kwisabatha, ukuba uwubone umhla wam ongcwele; uthi ukuyibiza isabatha luvuyo, ingcwele kaYehova; kwaye umhlonele ngokungazenzi iindlela zakho kwaye ungafuni ukuthanda kwakho kwaye ungathethi amazwi akho."
Isaiah58:14 Apho uya kugcoba ngoYehova; yaye ndiya kukuzisa kwiindawo eziphakamileyo zomhlaba ndikubophelele elifeni likaYakobi uyihlo, ngenxa yokuba umlomo kaYehova uthethile kuwe."
Isaiah59:1 Yabonani, isandla sikaYehova asisifutshane ukuba sihlangule; indlebe yakhe ayinzima, ukuba ingevi;"
Isaiah59:2 Bubugwenxa benu obunahlukanisileyo noThixo wenu, zizono zenu ezibusithelisileyo ubuso bakhe kuni, ukuba angevi."
Isaiah59:3 Kuba izandla zenu zidyobhekile ligazi, neminwe yenu bubungendawo; nomlomo wenu uthetha ubuxoki, ulwimi lwenu ludumzela ububi."
Isaiah59:4 Akukho bani ufuna okusesikweni, akukho namnye umthethelelayo inyaniso; bakhukhumele, bathetha ubuxoki; bakhawula ububi, bazale ubutshinga."
Isaiah59:5 Baqandusela amaqanda, baluka izindlu zokuluka; Lowo udla amaqanda abo uya kufa;"
Isaiah59:6 Iingubo zabo aziyi kuba yimpahla, nemisebenzi yabo abayi kuzinxiba; izenzo zabo zizenzo zobutshinga, nenkohliso isezandleni zabo."
Isaiah59:7 Iinyawo zabo zigidimela ebubini, zikhawuleze ukuya kuphalaza igazi elimsulwa; iingcinga zabo ziingcinga zobutshinga; emendweni wabo yimbuqo nentshabalalo."
Isaiah59:8 Abayazi indlela yoxolo; akukho okusesikweni ezindleleni zabo; bazenzele iindlela ezigoso; ongena khona akalwazi uxolo.
Isaiah59:9 Ke ngoko, umthetho ukude kuthi, nobulungisa abufikeleli kuthi; sifuna ukukhanya, kodwa sihamba ebumnyameni."
Isaiah59:10 Siyaphuthaphutha njengeemfama eludongeni, siyaphuthaphutha ngokungathi asinamehlo; siyakhubeka emini njengasebusuku; sisemanxuweni njengabafileyo."
Isaiah59:11 Sonke sigquma njengamabhere, sibhomboloza njengamahobe; silindele umgwebo, akukho; usindiso, kodwa lukude kuthi."
Isaiah59:12 Ngenxa yokuba izikreqo zethu zibe zikhulu phambi kwakho, nezono zethu ziphezu kwethu, ngenxa yokuba izikreqo zethu zinathi; kwaye siyabazi ubugwenxa bethu;"
Isaiah59:13 Ngokona kuYehova nangokuthetha ubuxoki nokubuya umva kuThixo wethu, ukuthetha ingcinezelo nemvukelo, ukuthetha inkohliso namazwi obuxoki asuka entliziyweni."
Isaiah59:14 Ubuye umva umyalelo, nobulungisa bumi kude, ngokuba inyaniso ikhubekile ezitratweni, nobulungisa abuyi kungena."
Isaiah59:15 Ewe, inyaniso iyakhanyelwa; otyekayo ebubini uya kuba lixhoba lakhe."
Isaiah59:16 Wathi akubona ukuba akukho mntu, wamangaliswa ukuba kungekho mntu; ke ngoko, isandla sakhe samzisela usindiso; nobulungisa bakhe bamxhasa."
Isaiah59:17 Kuba wanxiba ubulungisa ngokwengubo yentsimbi, nesigcina-ntloko sosindiso entloko; wambatha iingubo zempindezelo, wambatha ikhwele njengengubo yokwaleka."
Isaiah59:18 Ngokwezenzo zabo uya kubuyisela umsindo kwabo balwa naye, ababuyekezele impindezelo abakhonzi bakhe; eziqithini uya kuyibuyisela imbuyekezo."
Isaiah59:19 Baya kuloyika ke igama likaYehova entshonalanga, nozuko lwakhe empumalanga. Xa utshaba lusiza njengonogumbe, uMoya kaYehova uya kuluphakamisela ibhanile."
Isaiah59:20 Uya kuza umsindisi eZiyon nakuYakobi ababuyayo ebubini,” utsho uYehova."
Isaiah59:21 Mna ke nguwo lo umnqophiso wam nabo, utsho uYehova; Umoya wam uphezu kwakho, namazwi am endiwabeke emlonyeni wakho, akayi kumka emlonyeni wakho, nasemlonyeni wembewu yakho, nasemlonyeni wembewu yakho, utsho uYehova, kususela ngoku kude kuse ephakadeni."
Isaiah60:1 Vuka, ukhanye; ngokuba kufikile ukukhanya kwakho, nobuqaqawuli bukaYehova bukhanyisile phezu kwakho."
Isaiah60:2 Ngokuba, uyabona, ubumnyama buya kuwugubungela umhlaba, nobumnyama beentlanga; kodwa uYehova uya kubonakala kuwe, bubonakale ubuqaqawuli bakhe phezu kwakho."
Isaiah60:3 Iintlanga ziya kuza ekukhanyeni kwakho, nookumkani beze eluzukweni lovuko lwakho."
Isaiah60:4 Phakamisa amehlo akho ezindaweni zonke, ubone; bonke bayahlanganisana, besiza kuwe; oonyana bakho bavela kude, neentombi zakho zidilize ngakuwe."
Isaiah60:5 Uya kwandula ke ubone, ugqabhuke kunye, yoyike intliziyo yakho, yande; ngokuba ubutyebi bolwandle buya kubuyela kuwe, nobutyebi beentlanga buya kuza kuwe."
Isaiah60:6 Inkitha yeenkamela iya kukugubungela, iinkamela zamaMidiyan nezakwaEfa; wonke uShebha uya kuza; baya kuzisa igolide nesiqhumiso; yaye baya kuxela iindumiso zikaYehova."
Isaiah60:7 Yonke imihlambi yakwaKedare ibuthelana kuwe, iinkunzi zeegusha zakwaNebhayoti ziya kukulungiselela; baya kunyuka baya esibingelelweni sam bevuya, ndiyihombise indlu yozuko lwam."
Isaiah60:8 Ngubani na, ephaphazela njengelifu, njengamavukuthu ephaphazela ezifestileni zawo?"
Isaiah60:9 Ziya kuhamba iziqithi phambi kwam, neenqanawa zaseTarshishe, zibazise oonyana bakho bevela kude, benesilivere yabo negolide yabo, egameni likaYehova uThixo wakho, koyiNgcwele kaSirayeli; undizukisile."
Isaiah60:10 Iintlanga ziya kuzakha iindonga zakho, ookumkani bazo bakukhonze; kuba ndikubethe ndinomsindo, kodwa ndaba nenceba kuwe ngokuthanda kwam."
Isaiah60:11 Ngenxa yoko aya kuhlala evuliwe amasango akho; imini nobusuku abuyi kuvalwa; ukuze abantu baziswe kuwe imikhosi yeentlanga, nookumkani bazo beze kuziswa."
Isaiah60:12 Kuba uhlanga norhulumente ongakukhonzeyo uya kutshabalala; ewe, ezo ntlanga ziya kutshatyalaliswa ngokupheleleyo."
Isaiah60:13 Ubuqaqawuli beLebhanon buya kuza kuwe, umsipres, umpayini netyeya kunye, ukuze ihombise indawo yengcwele yam; kwaye ndiya kuyenza ngcwele indawo yeenyawo zam."
Isaiah60:14 Oonyana babacinezeli bakho baya kuza kukuphulaphula; Baya kuqubuda ezinyaweni zakho bonke abakugibayo; yaye baya kuyibiza ngokuba sisiXeko sikaYehova, iZiyon yaLowo Ungcwele kaSirayeli."
Isaiah60:15 Ukuba uthe wacekiswa, wathiywa, akwadlula bani kuwe, ndiya kukwenza isihomo esingunaphakade, esiyolisayo kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana."
Isaiah60:16 Uya kwanya amasi eentlanga, wanye ibele lokumkani; wazi ukuba mna Yehova ndinguMkhululi wakho, uMkhululi wakho, ingxolo kaYakobi."
Isaiah60:17 Endaweni yobhedu ndizisa igolide, esikhundleni sesinyithi ndizisa isilivere, ubhedu lube ngamatye, esikhundleni samatye isinyithi; Yaye abakhonzi bakho ndiya kubenzela uxolo nobulungisa abakhonzi bakho."
Isaiah60:18 Akuyi kuba savakala lugonyamelo ezweni lakho, nembubhiso nangcinezelo ezweni lakho; iindonga zakho uya kuthi luSindiso, namasango akho uthi yiNdumiso."
Isaiah60:19 Ilanga aliyi kuba saba sisikhanyiso kuwe emini; nenyanga ayiyi kukukhanyisela ngenxa yozuko, kodwa uYehova uya kuba sisikhanyiso sakho esingunaphakade, uThixo wakho abe luzuko lwakho."
Isaiah60:20 Ilanga lakho aliyi kuba satshona; nenyanga yakho ayisayi kubakho, ngenxa yokuba uYehova uya kuba sisikhanyiso esingunaphakade kuwe, ziphele iintsuku zesijwili sakho."
Isaiah60:21 Bonke abantu bakho bayakuba ngamalungisa, balidle ilifa ilizwe ngonaphakade, behlume lesityalo sam, umsebenzi wezandla zam, ukuze ndihombe."
Isaiah60:22 Omncinanana uya kuba liwaka, nomncinci abe luhlanga olunamandla; Mna, Yehova, ndiya kukukhawulezisa oko ngexesha elifanelekileyo."
Isaiah61:1 uMoya kaYehova uphezu kwam; ngenxa yokuba uYehova endithambisele ukuba ndishumayele iindaba ezilungileyo kwabalulamileyo; Undithume ukuba ndiphilise abantliziyo ityumkileyo, ndivakalise inkululeko kubathinjwa, ndibhengeze ukukhululwa entolongweni;"
Isaiah61:2 ukuxela umnyaka wenkoliseko kaYehova, nomhla wempindezelo yoThixo wethu; ukuthuthuzela bonke abanesijwili;"
Isaiah61:3 Ukuba abekwe eZiyon amalungisa, ukuba anikwe uzuko esikhundleni sothuthu, neoli yemihlali esikhundleni sesijwili, ingubo yendumiso esikhundleni somphefumlo odakumbileyo; ukubizwa kwabo kuthiwe yimithi yobulungisa, etyelwe nguYehova, ukuze kuzukiswe yena."
Isaiah61:4 Baya kwakha amanxuwa angunaphakade, bavuse iindawo ezichithakeleyo zangaphambili;"
Isaiah61:5 Baya kuma abasemzini, baluse imihlambi yenu, oonyana bezinye iintlanga babe ngabalimi benu, nabezidiliya zenu."
Isaiah61:6 Ke nina ukubizwa kwenu, kuya kuthiwa ningababingeleli bakaYehova; abantu baya kunibiza ngokuba ningabakhonzi boThixo wethu; niya kudla ubutyebi beentlanga, nibe nozuko nozuko lwazo."
Isaiah61:7 Ngenxa yehlazo lenu, niya kwamkela kabini; basidle ilifa isabelo sabo bedidekile; ke ngoko, baya kuba nobutyebi obuphindiweyo ezweni labo; baya kuba novuyo olungunaphakade."
Isaiah61:8 Kuba mna, Yehova, ndithanda ubulungisa, ndikuthiyile ubusela njengomlilo; ndiya kuwumisela ngenyaniso umsebenzi wabo, ndenze umnqophiso ongunaphakade nabo."
Isaiah61:9 Yaye imbewu yabo iya kwaziwa phakathi kweentlanga, nembewu yabo phakathi kweentlanga; bonke abababonayo baya kwazi ukuba bangabantwana abasikelelwe nguYehova."
Isaiah61:10 Ndinemihlali ndanemihlali ngoYehova, umphefumlo wam uya kugcoba ngoThixo wam; ngokuba wandambesa ingubo yosindiso, wandambesa ngengubo yokwaleka yobulungisa, nanjengomyeni ovatho izivatho, nanjengomtshakazi ozihombisa izivatho zakhe."
Isaiah61:11 Kuba njengoko ilizwe livelisa iimbewu zalo, njengoko umyezo otyalwe kuwo ukhula; ngoko iNkosi uYehova iya kuzisa ubulungisa nendumiso phambi kweentlanga zonke."
Isaiah62:1 Ngenxa yeZiyon andiyi kuthi tu, ngenxa yeYerusalem andiyi kuzola, bude bubonakale njengokukhanya ubulungisa bayo, nosindiso lwayo njengesikhuni esidangazelayo;"
Isaiah62:2 Iintlanga ziya kububona ubulungisa bakho, nookumkani bonke babubone ubuqaqawuli bakho; uya kubizwa ngegama elitsha, eliya kubizwa ngumlomo kaYehova;"
Isaiah62:3 Uya kuba sisithsaba esiqaqambileyo esandleni sikaYehova nonkontsho lwasebukhosini esandleni soThixo wakho.
Isaiah62:4 Akuyi kuba sathiwa unguLosweli; nelizwe lakho akuyi kuba sathiwa yiNahatoti; ngokuba uYehova ekuvuyele, lithembeke ilizwe lakho."
Isaiah62:5 Njengokuba indodana izeka intombi, oonyana bakho baya kuzeka wena; njengokuba umyeni enemihlali ngomtshakazi, uThixo wakho uya kuba nemihlali ngawe."
Isaiah62:6 Phezu kweendonga zakho, Yerusalem, ndimise abagcini: imini yonke nobusuku bonke abayi kuze bathi quthu; Nina babiza kuYehova, musani ukuthi cwaka;"
Isaiah62:7 Musani ukumnika ukuphumla, ade ayimise iYerusalem, ayenze ibe sisihombo ehlabathini."
Isaiah62:8 uYehova ufunge ngesandla sakhe sokunene, nesandla sakhe esithe nkqi, esithi, Andisayi kuba sazinika iintshaba zakho ingqolowa yakhe, ukuba ibe kukudla kwakho; noonyana bolunye uhlanga bafanele bangayiseli iwayini yakho odiniweyo ngayo."
Isaiah62:9 Ke bona abawabuthayo baya kuzidla, badumise uYehova; yaye abo bayisongileyo baya kuyisela kwiintsapho zam ezingcwele."
Isaiah62:10 Phumani ngamasango; lungisani indlela yabantu; lahlani, tshabalalisani umendo; susa amatye; phakamisa umgangatho kubantu."
Isaiah62:11 Yabona, uYehova uthethile wesa eziphelweni zehlabathi, wathi, Yithini kwintombi enguZiyon, Yabona, usindiso lwakho luyeza; yabona, umvuzo wakhe unawo, esebenza phambi kwakhe."
Isaiah62:12 Ukubizwa kwabo kuya kuthiwa, ngabantu abangcwele, abakhululwe nguYehova; ukubizwa kwakho kuthiwe, Uswelekelwe, ngumzi ongashiyiweyo."
Isaiah63:1 Ngubani na lo wakwaEdom, onxibe iimpahla ezimbejembeje zaseBhotsera? Ongena engutyeni yakhe, ohamba ebuninzini bamandla akhe? Mna othetha ubulungisa ndinegunya lokusindisa."
Isaiah63:2 Kutheni sibomvu isambatho sakho, nezambatho zakho zibe njengezomntu oxovula iwayini etyebileyo?"
Isaiah63:3 Isixovulelo ndisixovule ndedwa; kwakungekho nanye kwiintlanga ezazikunye nam; igazi lawo liya kutshizwa ezingubeni zam, ndizidyobhise zonke iingubo zam."
Isaiah63:4 Kuba umhla wokukhulula usentliziyweni yam, nomnyaka wokukhulula kwam ngokuhlawulela ufikile."
Isaiah63:5 Ndahamba ke, akwabakho mncedi; kwaye ndamangaliswa ukuba kwakungekho bani ukuxhasayo; sandisindisa ke isandla sam; yaye usizi lwam, lwandixhasa."
Isaiah63:6 Ndiya kuzinyhasha iintlanga ndinomsindo, ndizinxilise ndinomsindo, ndiwawise emhlabeni amandla azo."
Isaiah63:7 Ndithanda ukuthetha ubabalo lukaYehova, indumiso kaYehova ngako konke asenzele kona uYehova, nokulunga okukhulu kwindlu kaSirayeli awayibonakalisayo kubo ngokobabalo lwakhe nangokwengxokolo yeentlanga ububele bakhe."
Isaiah63:8 Ngokuba wathi, Bangabantu bam okwenyaniso, oonyana abangaxokiyo; ngoko ke waba nguMsindisi wabo."
Isaiah63:9 Kuko konke ukubandezeleka kwabo babecinezelwe, yaza ingelosi yobuso bakhe yabasindisa; ngothando lwakhe nangenceba yakhe wabakhulula ngokumisela yena; wawathwala, wawathwala yonke imihla yamandulo."
Isaiah63:10 Bamphikisa ke uMoya wakhe oyiNgcwele; ke waba lutshaba lwabo, walwa nabo."
Isaiah63:11 Wacinga ngeemini zamandulo, uMoses nabantu bakhe, wathi, Uphi na lowo wabakhuphayo elwandle, umalusi womhlambi wakhe? Uphi yena owafaka umoya oyingcwele kuye?"
Isaiah63:12 owabakhokela ngasekunene kukaMoses ngesandla sakhe esikhazimlayo, waza wawahlulahlula amanzi phambi kwabo ukuba enze igama lakhe ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo?"
Isaiah63:13 Ngubani na owabakhokelela enzulwini, njengehashe entlango, ukuba bangakhubeki?"
Isaiah63:14 Njengenkomo ehla iye entilini, uMoya kaYehova wayiphumza; wenjenje ukubakhokela abantu bakho, ukuze uzenzele igama elizukileyo."
Isaiah63:15 Khangela usemazulwini, ubone ukuba usententeni yakho engcwele enobungangamsha; kungakanani na kum ukuzondelela kwakho, namandla akho, nesandi sezibilini zakho, neenceba zakho? babanjwe?"
Isaiah63:16 Yena ungubawo wethu okunene, nakuba uAbraham engasazi, noSirayeli engasazi; Wena, Yehova, ungubawo, wena ungumsindisi wethu; igama lakho likho kwasephakadeni."
Isaiah63:17 Yini na, Yehova, ukuba usilahlekise ezindleleni zakho, uyiqaqadekise intliziyo yethu, ukuze singakoyiki wena? Buya ngenxa yabakhonzi bakho, izizukulwana zelifa lakho."
Isaiah63:18 Abantu bakho abangcwele balihlutha umzuzwana; ababandezeli bethu bayayihlambela ingcwele yakho.
Isaiah63:19 Singabakho; akubalawulanga; ababizwa ngegama lakho.
Isaiah64:1 Ukuba uthe wawaqhekeza amazulu, wehla, zowa iintaba phambi kwakho;"
Isaiah64:2 Njengokutshisa komlilo onyibilikayo, nomlilo uwatshisa amanzi; ukuze lazise igama lakho ezintshabeni zakho, zigungqe iintlanga phambi kwakho."
Isaiah64:3 Ekwenzeni kwakho izinto ezoyikekayo, ebesingazilindelanga, wehla, iintaba zazamazama phambi kobuso bakho."
Isaiah64:4 Kususela kwasephakadeni, abantu abevanga, abamamelanga nangendlebe, ababonanga ngeliso uThixo, ingenguwe, izinto owazilungisela abo balindele kuye."
Isaiah64:5 Udibana nomntu onoyolo, esenza okusesikweni, Okukhumbulayo ezindleleni zakho; yabona, unomsindo; ngokuba soyisakele; umonde ukhona, yaye siya kusindiswa."
Isaiah64:6 Ke thina sinjengento eyinqambi sonke siphela, nanjengengubo emdaka yonke ubulungisa bethu; siya kubuna sonke njengegqabi; nobugwenxa bethu busithabathe njengomoya."
Isaiah64:7 Akwabakho ulinqulayo igama lakho, uziphakamisayo ukuba abambelele kuwe; ngokuba ubusithelisile ubuso bakho kuthi, wasitshisa ngobugwenxa bethu."
Isaiah64:8 Kaloku ke, Yehova, ungubawo; siludongwe, yaye wena ungumenzi wethu; thina sonke singumsebenzi wesandla sakho."
Isaiah64:9 Nkosi, musa ukuva ubunzima obukhulu, kwaye ungacingi ububi ngonaphakade; uyabona, siyathandaza kuwe, singabantu bakho sonke."
Isaiah64:10 Imizi yobungcwele bakho iyinxuwa, iZiyon ilinxuwa, iYerusalem ilinxuwa."
Isaiah64:11 Indlu yethu engcwele, entle, ababeyidumisela kuyo oobawo, iye yatshiswa ngomlilo, yaye zonke izinto esizithandayo zitshatyalalisiwe."
Isaiah64:12 Yehova, ngaba uya kuwukhumbula lo mbandela? ufuna ukuthula usicinezele kakhulu?"
Isaiah65:1 Ndifunyenwe ngababengandibuzi; Ndazenza ndafunyanwa ngababengandifuni; Ndathi, Yabonani, ndingowohlanga olungabizwanga igama lam;"
Isaiah65:2 Izandla zam ndizolulela imini yonke kubantu abaziinjubaqa, abahamba ngendlela yobutshinga, abalandela ezabo iingcinga;"
Isaiah65:3 Luhlanga oluhlala lundigculela emehlweni am; ababingelela emiyezweni, abaqhumisela ezibingelelweni zezitena;"
Isaiah65:4 abo babehlala emangcwabeni nabachitha ubusuku kumatye ezikhumbuzo, besidla inyama yehagu, yaye ezityeni zabo kukho isuphu yezinto ezilizothe;"
Isaiah65:5 Bathi, Yima wedwa, ungasondeli kum; ngokuba ndingcwele kunani. Ngumsi empumlweni yam, ngumlilo ovutha imini yonke."
Isaiah65:6 Yabona, kubhaliwe phambi kobuso bam, kwathiwa, Andiyi kuthi tu, kodwa ndiya kubabuyekeza izifuba zabo."
Isaiah65:7 Ubugwenxa benu, nobugwenxa booyihlo kunye, utsho uYehova, oqhumiseleyo ezintabeni, wangcikiva ezindulini; ngako oko umsebenzi wabo wokuqala ndiya kuwulinganisela ngesifuba sabo."
Isaiah65:8 Wathi uYehova, Njengokuba bufunyanwa ubulembu ngexesha elililo, athi umntu, Musa ukonakalisa; kuba ithamsanqa likuyo; Ndiya kwenjenjalo ngenxa yabakhonzi bam, ukuze ndingonakalisi bonke."
Isaiah65:9 Ndiya kuvelisa imbewu kaYakobi, indlalifa yentaba yam kwaYuda; balidle ilifa abanyulwa bam, bahlale khona abakhonzi bam;"
Isaiah65:10 iSharon ibe likriwa, intili yeAgore ibe yindawo yemfuyo yabantu bam abandifunayo;"
Isaiah65:11 Ke nina nimkileyo kuYehova, nayilibalayo intaba yam engcwele, nilungisela elo qela isithebe, niselisela ngokwenani lalo."
Isaiah65:12 Ngoko ke ndiya kunifundela ikrele, yaye niya kuqubuda nonke phambi kokubulawa; ngokuba ndakubizayo, anasabela; ndathetha, aneva; kodwa wenza okubi emehlweni am, wazikhethela into endingayithandiyo."
Isaiah65:13 Ngako oko itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabonani, abakhonzi bam baya kudla, ke nina niya kulamba; yabonani, abakhonzi bam baya kusela, ke nina niya kunxanwa; yabonani, abakhonzi bam baya kuvuya, ke nina niya kudana."
Isaiah65:14 Yabonani, abakhonzi bam baya kumemelela ngokuchwayitha kwentliziyo, ke nina niya kulila nixheke umphefumlo, nilile nintlungu yomphefumlo."
Isaiah65:15 Shiya igama lakho libe sisiqalekiso kubanyulwa bam, kuba iNkosi enguMongami uYehova iya kunibulala ize ibize abakhonzi bayo ngelinye igama;"
Isaiah65:16 ukuba lowo uzisikeleleyo ehlabathini uya kuzisikelela ngoThixo oyinyaniso; yaye lowo ufungayo ehlabathini uya kufunga uThixo oyinyaniso; ngokuba zilityelwe iintlekele zangaphambili, zisithele emehlweni am."
Isaiah65:17 Ngokuba, niyabona, ndidala amazulu amatsha nehlabathi elitsha; angakhunjulwa awokuqala, angenyuki athi qatha entliziyweni."
Isaiah65:18 Kodwa yibani nemihlali nigcobe ngonaphakade ngenxa yoko ndikudalayo;
Isaiah65:19 Ndiya kugcoba ngeYerusalem, ndigcobe ngenxa yabantu bam;"
Isaiah65:20 Akuyi kuba savela usana, nexhego elingayigqibanga imihla yalo; ngokuba inkwenkwe iya kufa ikwiminyaka elikhulu; ke yena umoni iminyaka elikhulu uya kuqalekiswa."
Isaiah65:21 Baya kwakha izindlu, bahlale kuzo; yaye baya kutyala amasimi eediliya baze badle iziqhamo zawo."
Isaiah65:22 Abayi kwakha bakha bambi; abayi kutyala mntu wumbi, badle kuwo; kuba iya kuba njengemihla yomthi imihla yabantu bam, badle into esetyenzwe zizandla zabo abanyulwa bam."
Isaiah65:23 Abayi kukukhonza ilize, abayi kuzalela ukhwankqiso; kuba bayinzala yabasikelelweyo bakaYehova, nenzala yabo iya kuba kubo."
Isaiah65:24 Kuya kuthi bengekabizi, ndisabele; bathi besathetha, ndive."
Isaiah65:25 Kuya kudla ndawonye ingcuka nemvana, ingonyama idle utyani njengenkomo, nothuli lube kukudla kwenyoka; Aziyi kwenzakalisa okanye zonakalise yonke intaba yam engcwele, utsho uYehova."
Isaiah66:1 Wathi uYehova, Amazulu ayitrone yam, ihlabathi sisihlalo seenyawo zam. Iphi na le ndlu undakhela yona? Iphi na indawo yam yokuphumla?"
Isaiah66:2 Ngokuba sizenzile zonke ezo zinto isandla sam, zabakho ke zonke ezo zinto, utsho uYehova; Ndiya kukhangela kulo mntu ulihlwempu, utyhafileyo emoyeni, ogubhayo ngelizwi lam."
Isaiah66:3 Oxhela inkomo ufana noxhela umntu; Obingelela imvana ufana nonqumla intamo yenja; Osondeza idini lomlilo ufana nosondeza igazi lehagu; Oqhumisa isiqhumiso ufana nosikelela into ebubutshinga. Bezinyulele nje iindlela zabo, umphefumlo wabo wawananza amazothe abo:"
Isaiah66:4 nam ke ndozinyulela iziphoso zabo, ndibazisele ububi babo; ngokuba ndibize, akwabakho usabelayo; ndithe xa ndithetha abandimamela basuka benza okubi emehlweni am bazikhethela into endingayithandiyo."
Isaiah66:5 Liveni ilizwi likaYehova, nina nigubhayo lilizwi lakhe; Oonyana benu abanithiyayo, abanigxothayo kubo ngenxa yegama lam, bathi, Makazukiswe uYehova, kodwa uya kubonakala ngenxa yovuyo lwenu, badane."
Isaiah66:6 Lilizwi lesandi esiphuma esixekweni; lilizwi eliphuma etempileni; lilizwi likaYehova ophindezelayo iintshaba zakhe.
Isaiah66:7 Ngaphambi kokuba azale, wazala; ingekafiki inimba yakhe, wazala umntwana oyinkwenkwe."
Isaiah66:8 Ngubani na okhe weva kunjalo? Ngubani na okhe wabona izinto ezinjalo? Ngaba ihlabathi liya kuvelisa ngenye imini? Kuya kuzalwa uhlanga kwaoko? ngenxa yokuba kamsinya nje yakuba iZiyon yazala, iyazala abantwana bayo."
Isaiah66:9 Ndiya kuzala na, ndingazali na? Wathi uYehova, Ndingasizalisa na, ndisivale isizalo sikanina? utsho uThixo wakho."
Isaiah66:10 Vuyisanani neYerusalem, vuyani nayo, nonke bamthandayo; Vuyisanani naye, nonke nina nimzilayo;"
Isaiah66:11 ukuze nanye nihluthe libele lentuthuzelo yakhe; ukuze nisele ubisi nize nixhamle ubutyebi bozuko lwakhe.
Isaiah66:12 Ngokuba utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yabonani, ndimnika uxolo njengomlambo, nozuko lweentlanga njengomlambo oqukuqelayo; uya kwanya khona, udle emacaleni akhe, ubethe amadolo akhe."
Isaiah66:13 Njengothuthuzela unina, ndiya kwenjenjalo mna ukunithuthuzela; yaye niya kuthuthuzeleka eYerusalem."
Isaiah66:14 Kuya kuthi, akukubona, ibe nemihlali intliziyo yakho, namathambo akho adubule njengesityalo; yaye isandla sikaYehova siya kwaziwa kubakhonzi bakhe, nomsindo wakhe kwiintshaba zakhe."
Isaiah66:15 Kuba, yabonani, uYehova uya kuza ngomlilo, zinjengesaqhwithi iinqwelo zakhe zokulwa, ukuze anyamezele ubushushu bakhe ngomsindo, nokukhalima kwakhe ngesithombo somlilo."
Isaiah66:16 Kuba uYehova uya kulwa nayo yonke inyama ngomlilo nangekrele lakhe, yaye baya kuba baninzi abo boyisiweyo nguYehova."
Isaiah66:17 Abo bazingcwalisayo, bazihlambululele imiyezo, emva komthi ophakathi, badle inyama yehagu, nezinto ezinezothe, neempuku, baya kutshabalala kunye; utsho uYehova."
Isaiah66:18 Ngokuba ndiyazazi izenzo zabo neengcinga zabo; Kuya kufika ndihlanganise zonke iintlanga neelwimi; kwaye baya kuza kubona ubuqaqawuli bam.
Isaiah66:19 Ndiya kwenza umqondiso phakathi kwazo yaye abo basindileyo kubo ndiya kubathumela ezintlangeni, iTarshishe nePule neLude, abo bazingela ngesaphetha, iTubhali noYavan, kwiziqithi ezikude ezithe thaa akazange abe khona wakuva ukusebeza kwam, akabubona ubuqaqawuli bam; yaye baya kubuvakalisa ubungcwele bam phakathi kweentlanga."
Isaiah66:20 Baya kubazisa bonke abazalwana benu, bevela ezintlangeni zonke, bekhwele emahasheni, nangeenqwelo zokulwa, nangeenqwelo zokulwa, nangeenqwelo zokulwa, nangezilwanyana ezinamendu, entabeni yam engcwele eYerusalem, utsho uYehova; umnikelo ngesitya esihlambulukileyo endlwini kaYehova."
Isaiah66:21 Ndiza kubathabatha babe ngababingeleli nabaLevi,’ utsho uYehova."
Isaiah66:22 Kuba kanye njengoko amazulu amatsha nomhlaba omtsha endiya kuwenza uya kuma phambi kwam,’ utsho uYehova, iya kwenjenjalo ukuma intsapho yenu negama lenu."
Isaiah66:23 Ukususela kwenye inyanga ukusa kwenye, ukususela kwisabatha ukuya kwenye, yonke inyama iya kuza ukuze iqubude phambi kwam,” utsho uYehova."
Isaiah66:24 Baya kuphuma babone izidumbu zamadoda angcatshiweyo; kuba iimpethu zabo aziyi kufa, nomlilo wabo ungacimi; ibe lisikizi kwinyama yonke."
Jeremiah1:1 Amazwi kaYeremiya unyana kaHilekiya, wakubabingeleli baseAnatoti, ezweni lakwaBhenjamin:"
Jeremiah1:2 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuye ngemihla kaYosiya, unyana ka-Amon, ukumkani wakwaYuda, ngomnyaka weshumi elinesithathu wobukumkani bakhe."
Jeremiah1:3 Kwathi ngemihla kaYehoyakim unyana kaYosiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, kwada kwaba sekupheleni konyaka weshumi elinanye kaZedekiya unyana kaYosiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, de kwabakho ukufakwa entolongweni kweYerusalem ngenyanga yesihlanu."
Jeremiah1:4 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Jeremiah1:5 Ndandikwazi ndingekakudali kwasesizalweni; ungekaphumi embilinini, ndakungcwalisa, ndakumisa waba ngumprofeti weentlanga."
Jeremiah1:6 Ndaza ndathi: “Owu Nkosi Yehova! yabona, andikwazi ukuthetha kuba ndingumntwana."
Jeremiah1:7 Wathi uYehova kum, Musa ukuthi, Ndisengumntwana: uze uye kuyo yonke into endikuthuma kuyo, uthethe yonke into endikuwisela umthetho ngayo."
Jeremiah1:8 Musa ukuboyika, kuba ndinawe ukuba ndikusindise, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah1:9 Wasolula uYehova isandla sakhe, wachukumisa umlomo wam. Wathi uYehova kum, Yabona, ndibeke amazwi am emlonyeni wakho."
Jeremiah1:10 Uyabona, ndikumise namhla ukuba ulawule iintlanga noorhulumente, ukuba unyothule, udilize, utshabalalise, udilize, wakhe, umise;"
Jeremiah1:11 Kwakhona kwabonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum lisithi: “Yeremiya, ubona ntoni na? Ndathi: Ndibona intonga yomthi wom-amangile."
Jeremiah1:12 Wathi uYehova kum, Ubone walungisa, ngokuba ndikhawuleze ukulenza ilizwi lam."
Jeremiah1:13 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum ngokwesibini, lisithi, Uyabona na? Ndathi, Ndibona imbiza; ubuso bakhe bubheke ngasentla."
Jeremiah1:14 Wathi uYehova kum, Kuya kubonakala ububi buvela ngasentla, bube phezu kwabemi bonke behlabathi."
Jeremiah1:15 Ngokuba, yabona, ndibiza zonke izizwe zezikumkani zasentla, utsho uYehova; ziya kuza, zimise iyileyo itrone yayo ekungeneni kwamasango aseYerusalem nasezindongeni zayo zonke ngeenxa zonke, nasezixekweni zonke zakwaYuda."
Jeremiah1:16 Ndiya kuzithetha kubo izigwebo zam ngenxa yobubi babo bonke, ngenxa yokuba bendishiyile baza batshisa abanye oothixo ngomsi baza baqubuda kwimisebenzi yezandla zabo."
Jeremiah1:17 Bhinqa isinqe sakho, ume, uthethe kubo konke endikuwisela umthetho ngako; uze ungaboyiki, hleze ndikudanise phambi kwabo."
Jeremiah1:18 Ngokuba, yabona, ndikwenze namhla umzi oyinqaba, intsika yesinyithi, udonga lobhedu kulo lonke ilizwe, kookumkani bakwaYuda, nakubathetheli balo, nakubabingeleli balo, nakubantu belizwe."
Jeremiah1:19 Kwaye baya kulwa nawe; kodwa abayi kukoyisa; ngokuba ndinawe, utsho uYehova, ukuze ndikusindise."
Jeremiah2:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Jeremiah2:2 Yiyani nixele ezindlebeni zeYerusalem, nithi, uYehova uthethile; Ndicinga ngawe, ububele bobutsha bakho, uthando lomtshato wakho, xa wawundilandela entlango, kumhlaba ongalimiyo."
Jeremiah2:3 Ubengcwele uSirayeli kuYehova, wentlahlela yongeniselo lwakhe; bonke abayidlayo bozeka ityala; bofikelwa bububi,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah2:4 Liveni ilizwi likaYehova, nina bendlu kaYakobi, nonke zizwe zendlu kaSirayeli;"
Jeremiah2:5 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Bafumana bubi buni na kum ooyihlo, bandishiyayo, balandela amampunge;"
Jeremiah2:6 Abatshongo ukuthi, Uphi na uYehova owasikhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa, owasikhokela entlango, ezweni eliyinkqantosi, ezweni elingumqwebedu, ezweni lenxano, nelethunzi lokufa, kumhlaba omthubi apho kungadlulanga mntu, ekungazanga kuhlale mntu khona?"
Jeremiah2:7 Ndaningenisa ezweni elichumayo, ukuba nidle iziqhamo zalo, nezinto ezilungileyo zalo; nafika nalenza inqambi ilizwe lam, nelifa lam laba lisikizi."
Jeremiah2:8 Ababingeleli abatshongo ukuthi, Uphi na uYehova? nababebambe umthetho abandazi;"
Jeremiah2:9 Ngako oko, andiyi kuthetha kuni, utsho uYehova, ukuba ndilwe noonyana boonyana benu."
Jeremiah2:10 Kuba welani eziqithini zamaKiti, nibone; thumelani kwaKedare, nigqale, nikhangele, ukuba zikho na izinto ezinjalo na;"
Jeremiah2:11 ukuba uhlanga lwakhe lwananisa na ngoothixo balo, bengethixo ke bona? kodwa abantu bam baluxabisile uzuko lwabo ngento engancedi nganto."
Jeremiah2:12 Mangaliswani, mazulu, yile nto, noyike kakhulu, nicaphuke kakhulu;"
Jeremiah2:13 Ngokuba benze ububi obubini abantu bam; Bandishiyile mna, thende lamanzi aphilileyo; bazimbele amaqula, amaqula aqhekekileyo, abangenamanzi."
Jeremiah2:14 uSirayeli ungumkhonzi na? Ngaba ulikhoboka elizalelwe kuloo ndawo? yini na ukuba abhuqwe?
Jeremiah2:15 Iingonyama ezintsha zagquma, zakhala ngenxa yakhe, zalenza laba senkangala ilizwe lakhe; imizi yakhe yatshiswa, ayaba nabemi."
Jeremiah2:16 Oonyana baseNofe nabaseTahapanese nabo basiqhekeza isithsaba sakho.
Jeremiah2:17 Asinguwe na lo wenze le nto kuwe, ngokumfulathela uYehova uThixo wakho, oko ubuhamba ngendlela?"
Jeremiah2:18 Unantoni na ke endleleni yaseYiputa, ukuba usele amanzi oMnayile? Okanye yintoni na enawe nendlela yaseAsiriya, ukuba usele amanzi oMlambo lowo?"
Jeremiah2:19 Buya kukhalimela ububi bakho, bukhalimele ububi bakho; ke yazi uze ubone ukuba kubi nekrakra ukuba umnikele umva uYehova uThixo wakho yaye akukho loyiko kuwe, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova wemikhosi."
Jeremiah2:20 Ngokuba ndiyaphule idyokhwe yakho, ndizophula izitropu zakho; wathi wena, Andiyi kutsiba; nihambahamba ezindulini zonke ezinde, naphantsi kwemithi yonke eluhlaza;"
Jeremiah2:21 Ke mna ndikutyala umdiliya wohlobo, imbewu yenyaniso yonke; utheni na ukundenza umdiliya obolileyo wolunye uhlanga?"
Jeremiah2:22 Nokuba uthe wahlamba ngesepha yetyuwa wathabatha isepha eninzi, kodwa ububi bakho buphambi kobuso bam,’ itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Jeremiah2:23 Ungathini na ukuthi, Andizenzanga nqambi, andimlandelanga uBhahali? Yibone indlela yakho emfuleni, ukwazi okwenzileyo; Uqhuba intombi enamendu, ihamba ngomkhondo wayo;"
Jeremiah2:24 Ewe, yimazi ye-esile lasendle, eqhele intlango, ethi ngokuthanda kwayo, isezele impepho; Ngubani na onokulijika ithuba lakhe? bonke abayifunayo soze badinwe; bomfumana ngenyanga yakhe."
Jeremiah2:25 Luthintele unyawo lwakho lunxitywe iimbadada, nomqala wakho unganxanwa; kodwa uthe, Akukho themba kuba ndandibathanda abasemzini, ndaza ndabalandela."
Jeremiah2:26 Njengokudana kwesela xa lifunyenwe, kunjalo ukudana kwendlu kaSirayeli; bona, nookumkani babo, nabathetheli babo, nababingeleli babo, nabaprofeti babo;"
Jeremiah2:27 Uthi kwimizalwane, Ungubawo; nasetyeni, Nandikhupha; ngokuba bandinikela ikhosi, abandinikelanga buso; kodwa ngexesha lokubandezeleka kwabo baya kuthi, Vuka, sisindise!"
Jeremiah2:28 Baphi na kaloku oothixo bakho ozenzeleyo? Mabavuke ukuba abakusindisanga ngexesha lobubi bakho; ngenxa yokuba oothixo bakho balingana nenani lezixeko zakho, Yuda!"
Jeremiah2:29 Yini na ukuba nindimangalele? Nonke nindingcatshile; utsho uYehova.
Jeremiah2:30 Ndifumane ndababetha oonyana benu; abavumanga kukhalinyelwa; ikrele lenu labadla abaprofeti benu njengengonyama eqwengayo.
Jeremiah2:31 Owu bantu, likhangeleni ilizwi likaYehova. Yintlango na kwaSirayeli? ilizwe lobumnyama? Ngako oko bathi abantu bam: Singookumkani; asiyi kuphinda size kuwe?"
Jeremiah2:32 Iyazilibala na intombi izivatho zayo, umtshakazi uyazilibala na iingubo zakhe? ke bona abantu bam bandilindile imihla engenakubalwa."
Jeremiah2:33 Yini na ukuba niyeke ukufuna uthando? ngenxa yoko ubafundisa abangendawo iindlela zakho.
Jeremiah2:34 Kananjalo elucwecweni lwakho kwafunyanwa igazi lemiphefumlo yamahlwempu amsulwa;
Jeremiah2:35 Uthi ke, Ndimsulwa, wophuma kum umsindo wakhe. Yabona, ndiya kubambana nawe ngenxa yokuba usithi, Andonanga."
Jeremiah2:36 Yini na ukuba ungxame ukuyijika indlela yakho? yaye uya kuba neentloni ngeYiputa, kanye njengoko waba neentloni ngeAsiriya."
Jeremiah2:37 Ewe, phuma kuye, zibeke izandla zakho entlokweni yakho, ngokuba uYehova ulilahlile ithemba lakho, nawe akuyi kuphumelela kulo."
Jeremiah3:1 Babesithi, Ukuba indoda ithe yamala umfazi wayo, waza umfazi wamala, wendela kwenye indoda, inokumbuyela na loo ndoda? Ngaba elo lizwe aliyi kungcoliswa kakhulu? ke ukrexeze nezithandane ezininzi; buyela kum, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah3:2 Phakamisa amehlo akho, ubone apho ungalala khona. Wahlala nabo ezindleleni, njengomArabhi entlango; yaye ulenze inqambi ihlabathi ngobuhenyu bakho nobungendawo bakho."
Jeremiah3:3 Zanqamka ke iimvula, akwabakho zimvula zamva; ubunebunzi lehenyukazi, akwavuma ukuba neentloni."
Jeremiah3:4 Awuyi kundibiza na ngoku, uthi, Bawo, usingcikivo sobutsha bam?"
Jeremiah3:5 Uya kuwugcina na umsindo wakhe ngonaphakade? Ngaba uya kuhlala kude kube sekupheleni? Yabona, uthethe, kwaye wenze okubi kangangoko unakho."
Jeremiah3:6 Wathi uYehova kum ngemihla yokumkani uYosiya, Ukubonile na akwenzileyo umbandezeli kaSirayeli? enyuka zonke iintaba ezinde, naphantsi kwemithi yonke eluhlaza, wahenyuza khona."
Jeremiah3:7 Akwenza konke oko, ndathi, Buyela kum. Kodwa akazange abuye. Wayibona le nto uYuda, udade onemvukelo."
Jeremiah3:8 Ndabona, ngenxa yokukrexeza kwakhe umbandezeli kaSirayeli, ndamala, ndamnika incwadi yokwahlukana; Ke yena uYuda, umninawa wakhe, yena ongathembekanga, wasuka naye wakrexeza."
Jeremiah3:9 Kwathi ke ngenxa yekratshi lawo, wawenza inqambi umhlaba, wenza udaka, namatye, neentonga;"
Jeremiah3:10 Kodwa ngenxa yoko konke oko, uYuda, umninawa wakhe, akazange abuyele kum ngentliziyo yakhe yonke; kodwa ngenkohliso, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah3:11 Waza uYehova wandiphendula wathi: “uSirayeli onemvukelo ungqineke elilungisa kunoYuda ongathembekanga.
Jeremiah3:12 Yiya umemeze la mazwi entla, uthi, Buya, Sirayeli unezothe, utsho uYehova; andiyi kuwisa umsindo wam phezu kwakho; kuba yinceba leyo, utsho uYehova, yaye andiyi kuba nomsindo ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo."
Jeremiah3:13 Buvume nje ububi bakho ngenxa yokuba nonile kuYehova uThixo wakho, wazihambisa iindlela zakho kwabasemzini, phantsi kwemithi yonke eluhlaza, analiphulaphula izwi lam; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah3:14 Guqukani, nyana bangendawo, utsho uYehova; kuba ndingumtshakazi, yaye ndiya kukuthabatha wedwa esixekweni nababini entsatsheni, ndinizise eZiyon;"
Jeremiah3:15 ndininike abalusi bentliziyo yam, banaluse ngokwazi nangengqiqo."
Jeremiah3:16 Kothi nanda nande ehlabathini ngelo xesha, utsho uYehova, bangabi sathi, Ityeya yomnqophiso kaYehova; kwaye ayiyi kungena kwiingcinga zabo; khumbula ukuba; kwaye abazange bayivelele; kwaye ayisayi kuphinda yenziwe."
Jeremiah3:17 Ngelo xesha baya kuyibiza iYerusalem ngokuba yitrone kaYehova; zibuthelane khona zonke iintlanga ngenxa yegama likaYehova eYerusalem; bangabi sahamba ngeengcinga zentliziyo yabo embi.
Jeremiah3:18 Ngaloo mihla baya kuhamba abantu bendlu kaYuda kunye noonyana bendlu kaSirayeli, bahlangane bevela ezweni lasentla, beze ezweni endalinika ooyihlo ukuba libe lilifa."
Jeremiah3:19 Ndathi ke mna, Ndothini na ukukumisa phakathi koonyana, ndikunike ilizwe elilungileyo, ilifa elilungileyo phakathi kwamatyala eentlanga? ndathi, Nindibize ngoyise; kwaye andiyi kundishiya."
Jeremiah3:20 Inene, kanye njengoko umfazi eyala indoda yakhe ngenkohliso, ngokunjalo nindiqhawule ngokuthembeka, nina ndlu kaSirayeli, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah3:21 Kwavakala ilizwi kwiindawo eziphakamileyo, isikhalo nemithandazo yoonyana bakaSirayeli, ngenxa yokuba babephambukile endleleni yabo baza bamlibala uYehova uThixo wabo."
Jeremiah3:22 Buyani, nyana baneenkani, ndizinyange iimbandezelo zenu. Uyabona, siza kuwe; ngokuba wena, Yehova, unguThixo wethu."
Jeremiah3:23 Ngokwenene, usindiso luthenjiswe ilize ukusuka emathafeni nasezintabeni; ewe, usindiso lukaSirayeli lukuYehova uThixo wethu."
Jeremiah3:24 Kuba izenzo zoobawo zawugqiba kwasebuncinaneni bethu; impahla yabo emfutshane, neenkomo zabo, noonyana babo, neentombi zabo."
Jeremiah3:25 Silala ecukucezweni, ihlazo lethu lisibekele; kuba sonile kuYehova uThixo wethu, thina nookhokho bethu ukususela ebutsheni bethu de kube namhla, yaye asiliphulaphulanga ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wethu."
Jeremiah4:1 Sirayeli, ukuba uthe waguquka, utsho uYehova, zohlwaya ngenxa yam;"
