Jeremiah4:2 Fungani nithi, NgoYehova ohleliyo, ngobulungisa, nangobulungisa; zaye iintlanga ziya kuzisikelela ngaye, ziqhayise ngaye."
Jeremiah4:3 Kuba wathi uYehova kumadoda akwaYuda naseYerusalem, ‘Likhumbeni ilizwe elilinyiweyo, yaye ningahlwayeli emithaneni enameva."
Jeremiah4:4 Namathelani kuYehova, yalusani ulwaluko lwentliziyo yenu, madoda akwaYuda, bemi baseYerusalem, ukuze umsindo wam ungapheli njengomlilo, uvuthe, kungabikho uwucimayo ngenxa yobubi bezinto zenu ezimbi izenzo."
Jeremiah4:5 Xelela kumaYuda, uxelele iYerusalem; nithi, Vuthelani isigodlo elizweni; bizani, hlanganisani, nithi, Hlanganisani, singene emizini enqatyisiweyo."
Jeremiah4:6 Phakamisani ibhanile eZiyon; buyani, musani ukulinda; ngokuba entla ndizisa ububi, nembubhiso enkulu."
Jeremiah4:7 Ingonyama iwushiyile umngxunya wayo, kunduluke umonakalisi weentlanga; uyishiyile indawo yakhe, ukuze aliphanzise ilizwe lakho; nezixeko zakho ziya kuba ngamanxuwa, zingabi namnini."
Jeremiah4:8 Bhinqani ngamarhonya, nilile nisenza isijwili, ngenxa yokuba umsindo kaYehova awujikanga kuthi."
Jeremiah4:9 Kuya kuthi ngaloo mini, utsho uYehova, iphele intliziyo yokumkani nentliziyo yabathetheli; bathi manga ababingeleli, nabaprofeti bathi manga."
Jeremiah4:10 Ndathi ke, Awu, Nkosi Yehova! Ngenene ululahlekisile olu hlanga neYerusalem ngokuthi: Niya kuba noxolo; xa ikrele lifika emoyeni."
Jeremiah4:11 Ngelo xesha kuya kuthiwa kwaba bantu nakwiYerusalem, Umoya owomileyo encotsheni yentlango uyifikele intombi yabantu bam, ungavuthuzi, ungahlambululi;"
Jeremiah4:12 Kwanomoya onamandla uvela kwezo ndawo, uya kundifikela; nangoku ndiya kubagweba."
Jeremiah4:13 Yabona, unyuka njengamafu, zinjengesaqhwithi iinqwelo zokulwa zawo; anamendu kunamaxhalanga amahashe awo. Yeha ke thina! ngokuba sibhuqiwe."
Jeremiah4:14 Yihlambulule ububi intliziyo yakho, Yerusalem, ukuze usindiswe. Iingcinga zakho ezingenanto ziya kuhlala ixesha elingakanani kuwe?"
Jeremiah4:15 Kuba ilizwi liphuma kwaDan, livakalisa uyeha evela ezintabeni zakwaEfrayim."
Jeremiah4:16 Xela iintlanga; Yabonani, vakalisani ngeYerusalem, nithi, Abalindi beza bevela ezweni elikude, bevakalisa ilizwi labo emizini yakwaYuda."
Jeremiah4:17 Bachasene nayo yonke into, njengabalusi; ngokuba wakreqa kum, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah4:18 Indlela yakho neentlondi zakho zakuzisela ezo zinto; bububi bakho, ngokuba bukrakra, ngokuba bufike entliziyweni yakho."
Jeremiah4:19 Mandla am, mathumbu am! Ndibuhlungu entliziyweni yam; Iyaxokozela intliziyo yam phakathi kwam; Andikwazi ukuthi cwaka, kuba usivile isandi sesigodlo, umoya wam, ukuhlaba umkhosi."
Jeremiah4:20 Kuxelwa intshabalalo kantshabalalo; ngokuba ihlabathi liphela litshabalele; ngoko nangoko iintente zam zadilizwa kunye nekhethini zam ngomzuzwana.
Jeremiah4:21 Kuya kude kube nini na ndibona ibhanile, ndisiva isandi sesigodlo?"
Jeremiah4:22 Kuba bamathile abantu bam, mna abandazi; ngoonyana abangenamandla, abangenangqondo; balumkile ekwenzeni ububi, kodwa ekwenzeni okulungileyo abaqondi."
Jeremiah4:23 Ndalibona ihlabathi, nalo, lisenyanyeni, lisesikweni; nezulu, akwabakho kukhanya kulo."
Jeremiah4:24 Ndazibona iintaba, nanzo zinyikima, neenduli zonke zinyikima."
Jeremiah4:25 Ndakhangela, ndabona ukuba akukho mntu, neentaka zonke zezulu zibalekile."
Jeremiah4:26 Ndakhangela, ndaza ndabona ilizwe elityebileyo linjengentlango, nezixeko zalo zonke zazitshatyalalisiwe phambi kobuso bukaYehova nangenxa yomsindo wakhe."
Jeremiah4:27 Kuba utsho uYehova ukuthi: “Ilizwe lonke liya kuba yinkangala ephanzileyo; kodwa andiyi kukuphelisa.
Jeremiah4:28 Ngenxa yoko ihlabathi liya kukhala, libe mnyama izulu phezulu;"
Jeremiah4:29 Isixeko sonke siyasaba ngenxa yesandi sabakhweli-mahashe nesabatoli; baya kungena emahlathini banyuke ematyeni;
Jeremiah4:30 Ukuba uyeba, uya kuthini na? Nokuba uthe wayambetha ingubo emfusa, nokuba uthe wahomba ngezihombo zegolide, nokuba ubuqabe ubuso bakho ngepeyinti, uya kwenzelwa ilize; abakuthandayo baya kukucekisa, bafuna umphefumlo wakho."
Jeremiah4:31 Ngokuba ndisivile izwi lomfazi onenimba, nenimba, kubuhlungu kuzala umntwana olizibulo, izwi lentombi enguZiyon, lidanduluka, izolulela izandla zayo, lisithi, Athi ke mna! ngokuba umphefumlo wam udinwe ngababulali."
Jeremiah5:1 Zityhutyheni izitrato zaseYerusalem; khanikhangele, yazini, nibugocagoce ububanzi bayo, ukuba nomfumana na, ukuba ukho na owenza okusesikweni, ofuna ukunyanisa; kwaye ndiya kukuxolela."
Jeremiah5:2 Nokuba bangathi: “NgoYehova ophilayo! okunene bafunga ubuxoki.
Jeremiah5:3 Yehova, ngaba amehlo akho akamiliselwe enyanisweni? Wababetha, ababi buhlungu; Wabatshabalalisa, abavuma ukohlwaywa; babenza lukhuni ubuso babo njengelitye; abavuma ukubuya."
Jeremiah5:4 Ndathi ke mna, Ndilihlwempu; baziziyatha, ngokuba abayazi indlela kaYehova, nomthetho woThixo wabo."
Jeremiah5:5 Ndiya kuya kumadoda amakhulu, ndithethe nawo; ngokuba bebeyazi indlela kaYehova, nomyalelo woThixo wabo; ke bona bayaphule idyokhwe, bawaqhawula amakhamandela;"
Jeremiah5:6 Ngako oko iya kubabulala ingonyama yehlathi, ibaqweqwedise nengcuka yangokuhlwa; Ingwe yolinda imizi yabo; bonke abaphuma khona baya kuqwengwa; ngokuba buninzi ubugwenxa babo namasikizi abo anda."
Jeremiah5:7 Ndothini na ukukuxolela kulo mbandela? Oonyana bakho bandishiyile, bafunga abangethixo;"
Jeremiah5:8 Babefana namahashe atyetyisiweyo kwakusasa, elowo esukela umkakhe."
Jeremiah5:9 Mandingaveleli na ke ngenxa yezo zinto? utsho uYehova, ungaphindezeli na ke umphefumlo wam ebantwini abanje?"
Jeremiah5:10 Nyukani ezindongeni zayo, nonakalise; kodwa akupheli; susa amacala ayo; ngokuba àbabakaYehova."
Jeremiah5:11 Ngenxa yokuba inginizile indlu kaSirayeli nendlu kaYuda, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah5:12 Bamkhanyela uYehova, besithi, Akakho; kwaye akukho bubi buya kusihlela; asiyi kubona krele nandlala;"
Jeremiah5:13 abaprofeti baya kuba ngumoya, kungabikho lizwi kubo; kuya kwenziwa kubo."
Jeremiah5:14 Ngako oko utsho uYehova, uThixo wemikhosi, ukuthi, Ekubeni ulithethileyo elo lizwi, yabona, ndiwenza umlilo amazwi omlomo wakho, naba bantu babe ziinkuni, ubadle."
Jeremiah5:15 Yabonani, ndinizisela abantu bakude, nina bendlu kaSirayeli, utsho uYehova; luhlanga oluqinileyo, luhlanga oludala, luhlanga oluntetho ungayaziyo, ongayivayo ukuba luthetha ntoni na."
Jeremiah5:16 Indlu yabo injengengcwaba elivulekileyo, bonke bephela bangamagorha."
Jeremiah5:17 Luya kudla ukuvuna kwakho nesonka sakho, oluya kudliwa ngoonyana bakho neentombi zakho; liya kudla impahla yakho emfutshane neenkomo zakho; baya kudla izidiliya zakho nemikhiwane yakho; baya kuzidiliza ngekrele imizi yakho enqatyisiweyo, abakholose ngayo."
Jeremiah5:18 Ke ngaloo mihla, utsho uYehova, andiyi kunitshabalalisa."
Jeremiah5:19 Yaye ukuba nithi: “Kutheni uYehova, uThixo wethu, esenzela zonke ezi zinto? Wathi kubo, Njengokuba nindishiyile mna, nakhonza oothixo bolunye uhlanga ezweni lenu, niya kukhonza abasemzini ezweni elingelenu."
Jeremiah5:20 Kuxeleni kwindlu kaYakobi, nikuxelele uYuda, nithi,"
Jeremiah5:21 Khanive, bantu bazizidenge, nani baswele ukuqonda; banamehlo, kodwa ababoni; baneendlebe, kodwa abeva;"
Jeremiah5:22 Anindoyiki na? utsho uYehova. Aniyi kungcangcazela na phambi kwam, mna ndayibeka intlabathi elunxwemeni lolwandle, ngomthetho ongunaphakade, ukuba ningaweleki kuwo? ukuba zithe zigquma, aziyi kucanda na khona?"
Jeremiah5:23 Ke aba bantu banentliziyo eneenkani, eneenkani; baphakame bahamba."
Jeremiah5:24 Bakuthi ezintliziyweni zabo, Masimoyike uYehova uThixo wethu, oninisa imvula yokuqala neyokugqibela ngexesha lakhe; Usigcinela iiveki ezimisiweyo zokuvuna."
Jeremiah5:25 Ubugwenxa benu bunilahlekisile kwezo zinto, nezono zenu zinilukuhlileyo kokulungileyo."
Jeremiah5:26 Kuba phakathi kwabantu bam kufunyanwa abantu abangendawo; babeka isibatha, babambisa abantu."
Jeremiah5:27 Njengendlwane ezele ziintaka, izindlu zabo zizele yinkohliso; bathi bakukhula baba zizityebi."
Jeremiah5:28 Bazizityebi, baqaqambileyo, ewe, bayigqithisele imisebenzi yabangendawo; kwaye abaligwebi ityala lehlwempu."
Jeremiah5:29 Mandingaveleli na ke ngenxa yezo zinto? Wathi uYehova: Umphefumlo wam awuyi kuziphindezela na kolo hlanga?
Jeremiah5:30 Kwenziwe into ekhwankqisayo neyamasikizi ehlabathini;
Jeremiah5:31 Abaprofeti baprofeta ubuxoki, nababingeleli banobukhosi ngamandla abo; kwaye abantu bam bangathanda ukuba kube njalo; uya kwenza ntoni na ekupheleni kwayo?"
Jeremiah6:1 Hlabani ndawonye, nyana bakaBhenjamin, niye eYerusalem, nivuthele isigodlo eTekowa, nivuse isimangalo eBhete-hakereme; ngokuba kuvele ububi, nembubhiso enkulu, entla."
Jeremiah6:2 Intombi yaseZiyon ndayifanisa nenzwakazi enobubele.
Jeremiah6:3 Kofika abalusi nemihlambi yabo; bagxumekele iintente zabo ngeenxa zonke; bafanele bondle ngamnye kweyakhe indawo.
Jeremiah6:4 Yingcwaliseleni imfazwe; vuka, sinyuke emva kwemini. Yeha ke thina! kuba imini iyemka, kuba amathunzi angokuhlwa asankenteza."
Jeremiah6:5 Vukani, singene ebusuku, sizitshabalalise iingxande zakhe ezinde;"
Jeremiah6:6 Ngokuba utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Yigawuleni imithi, niyilungisele iYerusalem intaba; niyatshutshiswa phakathi kwabo nonke."
Jeremiah6:7 Njengokuba umthombo umpompoza amanzi alo, wenjenjalo ukumpompoza ububi balo; Kuvakala ugonyamelo nokuphanga kuyo; phambi kwam ziingxwabangxwaba namanxeba angunaphakade."
Jeremiah6:8 Ngamana ungaqhubeka ufundiswa, Yerusalem, ukuze umphefumlo wam ungakushiyi; ukuze ndikwenze kube senkangala, libe lilizwe elingenabemi."
Jeremiah6:9 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Baya kuwanqumla amasalela akwaSirayeli njengomdiliya; Buyisa isandla sakho njengobutha iidiliya esixovulelweni."
Jeremiah6:10 Ndiya kuthetha kubani na, ndibaqononondise, beve? yabonani, azilukanga iindlebe zabo, abeva; yabona, ilizwi likaYehova lisisingcikivo kubo; abanaluvuyo kuyo."
Jeremiah6:11 Ngoko ndizele ngumsindo kaYehova; Ndidiniwe kukuzibamba, ndiyiphalazele phezu kwabantwana abangaphandle nebandla labafana kunye;"
Jeremiah6:12 Ziya kugqithela kubambi izindlu zabo, namasimi abo nabafazi babo kunye; kuba ndiya kusolula isandla sam nxamnye nabemi belizwe,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah6:13 Kuthabathela kwabancinane kwesa kwabakhulu, bonke bephela babawa; baqalela kumprofeti ukuya kumbingeleli, bonke bephela benza ngenkohliso."
Jeremiah6:14 Baliphilisa nje kancinane inxeba lentombi yabantu bam, besithi: “Luxolo, luxolo! kungekho luxolo."
Jeremiah6:15 Baya kudaniswa, ngokuba benze amasikizi; ewe, babengenazintloni konke konke kwaye babengenazintloni; ke ngoko baya kuwa phakathi kwabawayo; ekubaveleleni kwam baya kuwa, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah6:16 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yimani ezindleleni, nikhangele, nibuze ngeendlela zakudala, ukuba yiyiphi na indlela yokulungileyo, yiyani kuyo, noyifumanela ukuphumla imiphefumlo yenu; Bathi ke bona, Asiyi kucanda kuyo."
Jeremiah6:17 Ndabuya ndanimisela abagadi, ndathi, Liveni isandi sesigodlo; Bathi ke bona, Asiyi kuva."
Jeremiah6:18 Ngako oko yivani, zintlanga, wazi, wena bandla, okubahlelayo;"
Jeremiah6:19 Yiva, hlabathi, yabona, ndisizisela intlekele esi sizwana, ewe, isiqhamo seengcinga zaso, ngenxa yokuba singawaphulaphulanga amazwi am nomthetho wam, kodwa batyekile kuwo."
Jeremiah6:20 Yini na ukuba kuza kum isiqhumiso esivela kwaShebha, Nengcongolo evumba limnandi, evela ezweni elikude? Akandikholisi namadini enu anyukayo, neminikelo yenu etshiswayo ayimnandi kum."
Jeremiah6:21 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndibangcikiva aba bantu, bakhubeke aba ooyise noonyana, kunye; ummelwane wakhe nomhlobo wakhe baya kutshabalala."
Jeremiah6:22 Wathi uYehova, Yabonani, kuya kuvela uhlanga lwasentla, uhlanga olukhulu luya kubonakala ekupheleni kwehlabathi."
Jeremiah6:23 Baqubule isaphetha nentshuntshe; bakhohlakele, abananceba; ilizwi labo ligquma njengolwandle; yaye bakhwele emahasheni, bexhobe njengamadoda alwa nawe, ntombi yaseZiyon!"
Jeremiah6:24 Siluvile udaba olu, lokuthi, izandla zethu zinciphekile; sicinezelekile naziintlungu njengozalayo."
Jeremiah6:25 Musani ukungena entsimini, ningahambi ngendlela; ngokuba ikrele lotshaba liyijikelezile;"
Jeremiah6:26 Ntombi yabantu bam, bhinqa iingubo zokuzila, uzigalele ngothuthu; nilililele okuphela kwamzeleyo isijwili esikrakra; ngokuba ngequbuliso siya kusihlasela utshaba."
Jeremiah6:27 Ndikwenze inqaba nenqaba phakathi kwabantu bam, ukuze uyazi indlela yabo, ubacikide."
Jeremiah6:28 Bonke bephela baziinjubaqa, behamba ngongcikivo, nangobhedu nesinyithi; bonke bayatshabalalisa."
Jeremiah6:29 Ukufudumala kutshiswa ngumlilo, ilothe itshiswa ngumlilo; unyibilikela phantsi umnyibilikisi, ngokuba ongendawo akakhululwa ngentlawulelo."
Jeremiah6:30 Abantu baya kubabiza ngokuba yisilivere edelekileyo, ngenxa yokuba uYehova ebacekisile."
Jeremiah7:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya, lisithi:"
Jeremiah7:2 Yima esangweni lendlu kaYehova, udanduluke khona apho, uthi, Liphulaphuleni ilizwi likaYehova, nonke nina maYuda angenayo ngezi ngcango ukuba anqule uYehova."
Jeremiah7:3 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Zilungiseni iindlela zenu nezenzo zenu, ndinibeke kule ndawo."
Jeremiah7:4 Musani ukukholosa ngamazwi obuxoki, athi, Yitempile kaYehova, itempile kaYehova, itempile kaYehova, yiyo leyo."
Jeremiah7:5 Ngokuba, ukuba nithe naziguqula iindlela zenu neentlondi zenu, ukuba nithe naziguqula ngokupheleleyo; xa ugweba ngokugqibeleleyo phakathi komntu nommelwane wakhe;"
Jeremiah7:6 Ukuba uthe akwamcudisa owasemzini, nenkedama, nomhlolokazi, akwaphalaza igazi elimsulwa kule ndawo, akwalandela thixo bambi, ukuba kube kubi kuwe;"
Jeremiah7:7 ndinibeke kule ndawo, ezweni endalinika ooyihlo, kude kuse ephakadeni;"
Jeremiah7:8 Yabonani, nikholose ngamazwi obuxoki, angakuncediyo;"
Jeremiah7:9 Ngaba niya kuba, nibulale nikrexeze nifunge ngobuxoki niqhumisele ngesiqhumiso kuBhahali nilandele abanye oothixo eningabaziyo?"
Jeremiah7:10 Nothi ke nime ngakum kule ndlu ibizwa ngegama lam, nisithi, Sinikelwe ukuba senze onke la masikizi?"
Jeremiah7:11 Le ndlu ibizwa ngegama lam yaba ngumqolomba wamasela na emehlweni enu? Yabonani, ndibonile; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah7:12 Ngoku ke yiyani endaweni yam eShilo, apho ndilibeke khona kuqala igama lam, nize nibone oko ndakwenzayo khona ngenxa yobubi babantu bam amaSirayeli."
Jeremiah7:13 Kaloku ke, ngenxa yokuba niyenzile yonke le misebenzi, utsho uYehova, ndathetha kuni, ndavuka kusasa, ndathetha, anaphulaphula; ndinibizile, anandiphendula;"
Jeremiah7:14 Ndiya kwenza kule ndlu ibizwa ngegama lam, enikholose ngayo, nakule ndawo ndaninika yona nina nooyihlo, njengoko ndenzayo kwiShilo."
Jeremiah7:15 Ndiya kunigxotha phambi kwam, njengoko ndabagxothayo abazalwana benu bonke, oonyana bakaEfrayim bonke."
Jeremiah7:16 Wena ke musa ukubathandazela aba bantu, ungaphimiseli kuhlahlamba nakuthandaza ngenxa yabo, ungandithandazi, ngokuba andiyi kuva;"
Jeremiah7:17 Anikuboni na abakwenzayo ezixekweni zakwaYuda nasezitratweni zaseYerusalem?
Jeremiah7:18 Oonyana baphatha iinkuni, ooyise baphemba umlilo, abafazi baxovula intlama, ukuba enzelwe izonkana ukumkanikazi wezulu, bathululele thixweni bambi ngesiselo, ukuze bandiqumbise."
Jeremiah7:19 Ngaba bayandicel’ umngeni? utsho uYehova; asingabo na ababadanisayo ebusweni babo?
Jeremiah7:20 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, umsindo wam nobushushu bam buya kuphalazelwa kule ndawo, phezu kwabantu, naphezu kweenkomo, naphezu kwemithi yelizwe, naphezu kweziqhamo zelizwe, naphezu kweziqhamo zehlabathi; uya kuvutha, ungacimi."
Jeremiah7:21 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Zisani amadini enu anyukayo kumadini enu anyukayo, nidle inyama;"
Jeremiah7:22 Kuba andizange ndithethe nookhokho benu yaye andizange ndibawisele umthetho ngomhla wokubakhupha kwam ezweni laseYiputa ngokuphathelele iminikelo etshiswayo okanye imibingelelo.
Jeremiah7:23 Nantsi into endibawisele umthetho ngayo: Phulaphulani ilizwi lam: ndoba nguThixo wenu, nina nibe ngabantu bam; hambani ngeendlela zonke endiniwisele umthetho ngazo, ukuze nibe nempumelelo."
Jeremiah7:24 Kodwa abazange baphulaphule yaye abazange bazinqumle iindlebe zabo, kodwa bahamba ngamacebo neengcinga zentliziyo yabo embi baza babuya umva, ababheka phambili."
Jeremiah7:25 Ukususela kwimini abaphuma ngayo ookhokho benu ezweni laseYiputa de kube namhla, ndibathumele kuni bonke abakhonzi bam, abaprofeti, ndivuka ekuseni yonke imihla, ndize ndibathumele kuni."
Jeremiah7:26 Ke abaphulaphula kum, abazinqumla iindlebe zabo, bazenza lukhuni iintamo zabo; benze okubi kunooyise."
Jeremiah7:27 Ke ngoko, baxelele onke la mazwi; abavuma ukukuphulaphula; kwaye ubabize; kodwa abayi kukuphendula."
Jeremiah7:28 Ke uya kuthi kubo, Lulo olu uhlanga olungaliphulaphuliyo ilizwi likaYehova uThixo walo, olungayivumiyo intethiso; inyaniso yalahleka kwaye yanqunyulwa emlonyeni wabo."
Jeremiah7:29 Cheka iinwele zakho, Yerusalem, uzilahle, uphakamise umvandedwa enyangweni; ngokuba uYehova usilahlile isizukulwana somsindo wakhe, uwujikile umhlana."
Jeremiah7:30 Ngokuba oonyana bakaYuda benze ububi emehlweni am, utsho uYehova; babeke izinto zabo ezinezothe endlwini ebizwa ngegama lam, ukuze bayenze inqambi."
Jeremiah7:31 Bakha iindawo eziphakamileyo zaseTofete, kwintlambo yonyana kaHinom, ukuze batshise oonyana babo neentombi zabo ngomlilo; into endingabawiselanga mthetho ngayo, ibingathanga qatha entliziyweni yam."
Jeremiah7:32 Ngako oko, uyabona, iyeza imihla, utsho uYehova, abangasayi kuba sathi yiTofete, ngumfula wakwaBhen-hinom; ngokuba baya kungcwatyelwa eTofete, ngokungabikho ndawo."
Jeremiah7:33 Izidumbu zaba bantu ziya kuba kukudla kweentaka zezulu nokwezilo zelizwe; kwaye akukho bani uya kubakrazula.
Jeremiah7:34 Ndiya kuliphelisa ilizwi lovuyo nelizwi lovuyo, ilizwi lomyeni nelizwi lomtshakazi ezixekweni zakwaYuda nasezitratweni zaseYerusalem, kuba ilizwe liya kuba yintlango."
Jeremiah8:1 Ngelo xesha, utsho uYehova, baya kuwakhupha emangcwabeni abo amathambo ookumkani bakwaYuda, namathambo eenkosana, namathambo ababingeleli, namathambo abaprofeti, namathambo ezizwe abemi baseYerusalem."
Jeremiah8:2 Ziya kuwaneka phambi kwelanga nenyanga, naphambi kwezulu lonke, ezo babezithandayo, nababezikhonza, nababezilandela, nababe befuna, baqubuda kuye; abayi kuhlanganiswa, abayi kungcwatywa; baya kuba lundwendwe emhlabeni."
Jeremiah8:3 Kuya kunyula ukufa phakathi kwamasalela esi sizukulwana singendawo, abaseleyo ezindaweni zonke endiwagxothele kuzo, utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Jeremiah8:4 Yaye uya kuthi kubo, ‘Utsho uYehova; Ngaba baya kuwa baze bangavuki? Uya kuthi gu bucala, angabuyi na?"
Jeremiah8:5 Kutheni aba bantu baseYerusalem bebuyela umva luwexuko lukanaphakade? bebambelele kuloo nkohliso, bayala ukubuya."
Jeremiah8:6 Ndabaza indlebe, ndeva, bathetha kakuhle; akukho bani uzohlwayayo ngeento zakhe ezimbi, athi, Yintoni na le ndiyenzileyo? elowo wajika indlela yakhe, ekungeneni kwehashe edabini."
Jeremiah8:7 Ewe, impungutye ezulwini iyawazi amaxesha ayo amisiweyo; nogwali, nogwali, nogwali, baligqale ixesha lokufika kwabo; ke bona abantu bam abalazi isiko likaYehova."
Jeremiah8:8 Ningathini na ukuthi, Sizizilumko, nomyalelo kaYehova unathi? Yabonani, nifumane nenze le nto; Usiba lwababhali luyinto engeyanto."
Jeremiah8:9 Zidanile izilumko, zisoyika, zivalelwe entolongweni; yabona, ziyalicekisa ilizwi likaYehova; Bungakanani na ke ubulumko bazo?"
Jeremiah8:10 Ngako oko abafazi babo ndiya kubanikela kubambi, namasimi abo ndiwanike abawahluthayo; ngokuba, bethabathela komncinane besa komkhulu, bonke bephela bazinikele kwabasweleyo, bethabathela kumprofeti besa kumbingeleli, bonke bephela benza ngenkohliso."
Jeremiah8:11 Bakuphilisa kancinane ukwaphuka kwentombi yabantu bam, besithi, Luxolo, luxolo; kungekho luxolo."
Jeremiah8:12 Baya kudaniswa, ngokuba benze amasikizi; ewe, babengenazintloni konke konke kwaye babengenazintloni; ke ngoko baya kuwa phakathi kwabawayo; ekuveleni kwabo baya kutshabalala, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah8:13 Ndiya kubatshabalalisa ngenene, utsho uYehova; kungabikho zidiliya emdiliyeni, kungabikho makhiwane emkhiwaneni, amagqabi aya kubuna; kwaye izinto endibanike zona ziya kudlula kubo."
Jeremiah8:14 Sihlaleleni na? zihlanganiseni, singene emizini enqatyisiweyo, sizole khona; ngokuba uYehova uThixo wethu usithumbile, wasiseza ngamanzi anetyhefu; ngokuba sonile kuYehova."
Jeremiah8:15 Besithembe uxolo, akwabakho nto ilungileyo; nangenxa yexesha lokuphiliswa, kwaye yabona, kukho ukubandezeleka!"
Jeremiah8:16 Ukukhala kwamahashe akhe kuviwe kwaDan; ngokuba beya kulidla ihlabathi neento zonke ezikulo; isixeko nabemi baso.
Jeremiah8:17 Ngokuba, yabonani, ndithumela phakathi kwenu iinyoka, imilomo engenakukhafulwa, zinilume; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah8:18 Ukuba bendifuna ukuzithuthuzela ngenxa yokuba buhlungu, intliziyo yam idandathekile ngaphakathi kwam."
Jeremiah8:19 Liveni ilizwi lesikhalo sentombi yabantu bam ngokuphathelele abo bahlala kwilizwe elikude: uYehova akakho na eZiyon? Inkosi yakhe ayinaye na? Yini na ukuba bandingcikive ngemifanekiso yabo eqingqiweyo, nangezinto ezingento zolunye uhlanga?"
Jeremiah8:20 Ukuvuna kudlule, ihlobo lidlule, yaye asikasindiswa."
Jeremiah8:21 Ngokuba ndibuhlungu ngenxa yokwaphuka kwentombi yabantu bakowethu; Ndimnyama; Ndothuka.
Jeremiah8:22 Akukho mafutha aqholiweyo na eGiliyadi? akukho gqirha apho? Kutheni na ukuba impilo yentombi yabantu bakowethu ingalungi?
Jeremiah9:1 Hayi, ngeyaba manzi intloko yam, amehlo am abe lithende leenyembezi; bendikhalela ababuleweyo bentombi yabantu bakowethu imini nobusuku."
Jeremiah9:2 Akwaba bendinendlu yabaphambukeli entlango; Ndiya kubashiya abantu bam, ndibashiye! ngokuba bonke ngabakrexezi, libandla labahenyuzi."
Jeremiah9:3 Balutyedile ulwimi lwabo, njengesaphetha sabo, ukuba bathethe ubuxoki; kuba basuka ebubini baye ebubini, yaye mna abandazi,’ utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah9:4 Elowo makamlinde ummelwane wakhe, ningamthembi umzalwana wenu; ngokuba abazalwana benu baya kunginizela elowo, elowo ummelwane wakhe ehamba enyelisa."
Jeremiah9:5 Elowo uyaxoka kummelwane wakhe, abathethi nyaniso;"
Jeremiah9:6 Ukuhlala kwakho kuphakathi kwenkohliso; ngenkohliso abavumi ukundazi; utsho uYehova.
Jeremiah9:7 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Yabona, ndiyabanyibilikisa, ndibacikide; ngokuba ndiya kuthini na ngentombi yabantu bakowethu?"
Jeremiah9:8 Lutolo olutsolileyo ulwimi lwabo; lithetha inkohliso; umntu uthetha uxolo nommelwane wakhe ngomlomo wakhe, kodwa entliziyweni yakhe ubeka umgcini wakhe."
Jeremiah9:9 Mandingabohlwaya na ke ngenxa yezo zinto? Wathi uYehova: Umphefumlo wam awuyi kuziphindezela na kolo hlanga?
Jeremiah9:10 Ndiya kuphakamisa isikhalo nesikhalo phezu kweentaba, ndikhale phezu kwamakriwa entlango, ngenxa yokuba etshisiwe, kungabikho ugqithayo kuwo; kodwa abantu abanakuliva izwi lenkomo; iintaka zezulu neenkomo zasaba; abasekho."
Jeremiah9:11 Ndiya kuyenza iYerusalem ibe sisikhundla seempungutye; nezixeko zakwaYuda ndiya kuzenza zibe yinkangala ephanzileyo, engenamniniyo."
Jeremiah9:12 Ngubani na indoda elumkileyo, ikuqonde oko? yaye ngubani na lo umlomo kaYehova uthethe naye ukuba amxelele oku, ngenxa yokuba ihlabathi litshatyalalisiwe, litshiswe njengemfumba yerhonya, ekungekho bani udlulayo kuyo?"
Jeremiah9:13 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ngenxa enokuba bebuyile emyalelweni wam, endawubeka phambi kwabo, abaliphulaphula izwi lam, abahamba ngawo;"
Jeremiah9:14 Kodwa baqhubeka behamba ngokotyekelo lwentliziyo yabo noBhahali ababefundiswe ngookhokho babo.
Jeremiah9:15 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli; Yabona, ndiyabadlisa aba bantu ingqolowa, ndibaseze inyongo;"
Jeremiah9:16 Ndiya kubaphangalalisa phakathi kweentlanga ababengazazi bona nooyise; yaye ndiza kuthumela ikrele emva kwabo ukuze libatshabalalise.
Jeremiah9:17 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Zigcineni, nibize iintombi ezimnyama, zize; Thumelani izilumko zize;"
Jeremiah9:18 basililele, bahle iinyembezi amehlo ethu, atyityizele amanzi amashiya ethu."
Jeremiah9:19 Kuba ilizwi lokulila livakele liphuma eZiyon, lisithi: Hayi indlela esonakalisa ngayo! sidanile, ngokuba silishiyile ihlabathi, ngokuba izakhiwo zethu zisigxothile."
Jeremiah9:20 Ngoko ke, liphulaphuleni ilizwi likaYehova, bafazi, niphulaphule ilizwi lomlomo wakhe, nifundise iintombi zenu ingoma yesijwili, yaye ngamnye kummelwane wakhe makafundise ingoma yesijwili."
Jeremiah9:21 Ngokuba ukufa kungene ngeefestile zethu;
Jeremiah9:22 Uthi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Izidumbu zabantu ziya kuwa njengomgquba entsimini, nanjengomva wesandla sabavuni, kungabikho mntu uzibuthayo."
Jeremiah9:23 Wathi uYehova, Isilumko masingaqhayisi ngobulumko baso, igorha malingaqhayisi ngamandla alo, nesityebi masingaqhayisi ngobutyebi baso."
Jeremiah9:24 Oqhayisayo ke makaqhayise ngako oko, ukuze andicacisele, endazi mna ukuba ndinguYehova, owenza inceba, nesiko, nobulungisa, ehlabathini; kuba ndiyakholiswa koku,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah9:25 Yabona, iyeza imihla, utsho uYehova, endiya kubohlwaya ngayo bonke abalukileyo kwanakwabangalukileyo;"
Jeremiah9:26 amaYiputa, nakwaYuda, namaEdom, noonyana baka-Amon, namaMowabhi, neendawo zonke ezimiyo entlango; kuba zonke ezi ntlanga azalukanga, yaye yonke indlu kaSirayeli ayilukanga ngentliziyo."
Jeremiah10:1 Liphulaphuleni ilizwi likaYehova, ndlu kaSirayeli;"
Jeremiah10:2 Wathi uYehova, Musani ukufunda iindlela zeentlanga, ningayoyiki imiqondiso yezulu; ngokuba iintlanga ziya kuboyika."
Jeremiah10:3 Kuba azinto zanto izithethe zabantu, ekubeni umntu egawula umthi ehlathini, umsebenzi wezandla zakhe usebenza ngezembe."
Jeremiah10:4 Bazivathisa ngesilivere nangegolide; basibethelela ngezikhonkwane nangezando, ukuba singashukumi."
Jeremiah10:5 Zintle njengesundu, azithethi; kufuneka bathwale kuba abakwazi ukuhamba. Musani ukuboyika; ngokuba azinakwenza bubi, azikuboni okulungileyo."
Jeremiah10:6 Ngokuba akukho unjengawe, Yehova; Umkhulu wena, yaye igama lakho likhulu ngamandla."
Jeremiah10:7 Ngubani na ongekhe akoyike, Nkosi yezizwe? ngokuba yeyakho, ngenxa yokuba phakathi kwezilumko zonke zeentlanga nakubo bonke oorhulumente bazo akukho unjengawe."
Jeremiah10:8 Ke bona baziziyatha, baziziyatha; imihlambi ifunda into engento."
Jeremiah10:9 Iziswe isilivere ephekiweyo ivela eTarshishe, negolide evela eUfazi, njengomsebenzi wengcibi nowezandla zotoli; Yonke ke le nto yenziwa zizilumko."
Jeremiah10:10 Kodwa uYehova nguThixo oyinyaniso, nguThixo ophilayo, nguKumkani ongunaphakade; ihlabathi liyanyikima buburhalarhume bakhe, neentlanga aziyi kuba nako ukubuthwala ubushushu bakhe."
Jeremiah10:11 Uthi kubo, Bona oothixo abangalenzanga izulu nehlabathi, baya kudaka ehlabathini, phantsi kweli zulu."
Jeremiah10:12 Wenza elimiweyo ngamandla akhe, waliseka ngobulumko bakhe elimiweyo, waneka izulu ngengcinga yakhe."
Jeremiah10:13 Akulikhupha ilizwi lakhe ingxolo yamanzi ezulwini, unyusa umphunga uye esiphelweni sehlabathi; Wenza imibane emvula, urhola umoya koovimba bakhe."
Jeremiah10:14 Wonke umntu unesibindi ngokwazi; Wonke umkhohlisi udaniswa ngumfanekiso oqingqiweyo, ngokuba umfanekiso wakhe ubuxoki, awunamoya."
Jeremiah10:15 Kungamampunge nje, kungumsebenzi oyinkohliso; ngexesha lokundwendwela kwabo baya kutshabalala."
Jeremiah10:16 Isabelo sikaYakobi asinjengazo, ngokuba nguMenzi weento zonke yena; uSirayeli ngumsimelelo welifa lakhe; NguYehova wemikhosi igama lakhe."
Jeremiah10:17 Hlanganisani ubutyebi benu emaphandleni, bemi bonqaba;"
Jeremiah10:18 Ngokuba wathi uYehova, Yabona, ndiya kubalahla abemi behlabathi, kwangelo xesha, ndibadubadube, balifumane."
Jeremiah10:19 Yeha ke mna, ngenxa yokwaphuka kwam! Inxeba lam libuhlungu, kodwa ndathi: Inene, kubuhlungu, ndiya kukuthwala."
Jeremiah10:20 Intente yam ibhuqiwe, neentambo zam zonke ziqhawukile; oonyana bam bandishiyile, abasekho; akukho wakuyimisa intente yam, waneka iingubo zam."
Jeremiah10:21 Kuba abalusi baba ziziyatha, abamquqela uYehova; ke ngoko, abayi kuphumelela, kwaye zonke izimvu zabo ziya kuchithwa-chithwa."
Jeremiah10:22 Yabonani, kuya kufika isandi seziqhamo, nengxokozelo enkulu, iphuma ezweni lasentla, ukuba imizi yakwaYuda ibe yintlango, nokuba libe liqolo leempungutye."
Jeremiah10:23 Ndiyazi, Yehova, ukuba ayikho semandleni akhe indlela yomntu; akukho bani uya kuzilungisa iimpahla zakhe."
Jeremiah10:24 Ndikhalimele, Yehova, kodwa kube ngokwesiko; kungabi ngomsindo wakho, hleze utshabalalise."
Jeremiah10:25 Phalaza umsindo wakho ezintlangeni ongazaziyo, naphezu kwezizwe ezingalinquliyo igama lakho; ngokuba amdlile uYakobi, amdla, amginya, nendlu yakhe yajika yaba senkangala."
Jeremiah11:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya, lisithi:"
Jeremiah11:2 Waveni amazwi alo mnqophiso, nithethe kumadoda akwaYuda, nakubemi baseYerusalem;"
Jeremiah11:3 Wathi kubo, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli; Uqalekisiwe umntu ongawathobeliyo amazwi alo mnqophiso;"
Jeremiah11:4 endabawisela umthetho ngako ooyihlo, ekubakhupheni kwam ezweni laseYiputa, ezikweni lesinyithi, ndathi, Liphulaphuleni ilizwi lam, nenze njengoko ndiniwisela umthetho ngako; niya kuba ngabantu bam, mna ndibe nguThixo wenu;"
Jeremiah11:5 ukuze ndisimise isifungo endasifungela ooyihlo, sokuba ndibanike ilizwe elibaleka amasi nobusi, njengoko kunjalo namhla. Ndaphendula ndathi, Makube njalo, Yehova!"
Jeremiah11:6 Wathi uYehova kum, Wamemezeni onke la mazwi emizini yakwaYuda, nasezitratweni zaseYerusalem, uthi, Waveni amazwi alo mnqophiso, niwenze."
Jeremiah11:7 Kuba ndabakhalimela kakhulu ookhokho benu ngomhla endabakhupha ngawo ezweni laseYiputa de kwayile mini, ngoxa ndandivuka ekuseni ndaza ndabaluleka ndisithi, ‘Liphulaphuleni ilizwi likabani."
Jeremiah11:8 Kodwa abazange baphulaphule, abazange bazinqumle iindlebe zabo, kodwa ngamnye wahamba ngobubi bentliziyo yakhe engendawo; ke ngoko, ndiya kubazisela onke amazwi omnqophiso endibawisele umthetho wokuba bawenze; kodwa abazange."
Jeremiah11:9 Wathi uYehova kum, Kufunyenwe iyelenqe phakathi kwamadoda akwaYuda naphakathi kwabemi baseYerusalem."
Jeremiah11:10 Babuyela ezonweni zooyise, ababengavumi ukuwaphulaphula amazwi am; alandela thixo bambi ukuze babakhonze; Indlu kaSirayeli nendlu kaYuda ziwaphule umnqophiso wam endawenza nooyise;"
Jeremiah11:11 Ngako oko utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndibazisela ububi abangayi kuba nako ukuphuma kubo; nokuba babiza kum, andiyi kuva."
Jeremiah11:12 Ngoko izixeko zakwaYuda nabemi baseYerusalem baya kuhamba baze bakhale koothixo abaqhumisela kubo, kodwa abayi kubasindisa ngexesha lokubandezeleka kwabo."
Jeremiah11:13 Kuba oothixo bakho bangangenani lemizi yakho, Yuda; yaye ngokwenani lezitrato zaseYerusalem nazakha izibingelelo zehlazo, izibingelelo zokuqhumisela kuBhahali."
Jeremiah11:14 Wena ke, musa ukubathandazela aba bantu, ungaphimiseli kuhlahlamba nakuthandaza ngenxa yabo; ngokuba andiyi kuva xa bekhala kum ngeembandezelo zabo."
Jeremiah11:15 Yintoni na endikholisiweyo yiyo endlwini yam, ekubeni ehlazisa abaninzi, nenyama engcwele ikushiyile? ukuba wenze ububi, uya konwaba."
Jeremiah11:16 iNkosi ukubize ngegama, umnquma oluhlaza, obukekayo, nesiqhamo esimnandi; kwavakala isandi sengxokozelo enkulu, wafaka umlilo kuwo, aqhawuka amasebe awo."
Jeremiah11:17 Kuba uYehova wemikhosi, owakutyalayo, uthethe intlekele ngawe ngenxa yobubi bendlu kaSirayeli nendlu kaYuda, abazenzileyo kubo ngokundicaphukisa ngokuqhumisela kuBhahali."
Jeremiah11:18 uYehova wandibiza, ndaza ndazi;"
Jeremiah11:19 Ndaba njengemvana esiwa ekuxhelweni; Bendingazi ke bona ukuba bacebe ngam, besithi, Masiwonakalisa umthi nesiqhamo sawo, siwunqumle ezweni labaphilileyo, lingabi sathiwa igama lawo."
Jeremiah11:20 Kodwa, Yehova wemikhosi, ogweba ngobulungisa, ozicikidayo izintso nentliziyo, mandiyibone impindezelo yakho kubo, ngenxa yokuba ndinixelele ngetyala lam."
Jeremiah11:21 Wathi ke uYehova ngabantu baseAnatoti, abawunqwenelayo umphefumlo wakho, abo bathi, Uze ungaprofeti egameni likaYehova, hleze sikubulale ngezandla zethu."
Jeremiah11:22 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Yabonani, ndiya kubavelela; amanene aya kubulawa ngekrele; oonyana babo neentombi zabo ziya kufa yindlala;"
Jeremiah11:23 Akuyi kubakho masalela kubo, ngenxa yokuba ndiwazisela intlekele amadoda aseAnatoti ngonyaka wokukohlwaya kwawo."
Jeremiah12:1 Unyanisile, Yehova, xa ndibambeneyo nawe; Andiyi kuthetha kuwe ngezigwebo zakho; kungani na ukuba indlela yabangendawo ibe nempumelelo? Kutheni bonwabile bonke abo basebenza ngenkohliso?"
Jeremiah12:2 Ubatyalile, bendelwa neengcambu; ayahluma, ewe, axakathe isiqhamo; Ikufuphi emlonyeni wabo, ikude nezintso zabo."
Jeremiah12:3 Ke wena, Yehova, uyandazi; Wandibona, wayicikida intliziyo yam ngawe; bahlube njengeegusha eziya kuxhelwa; balungiselele umhla wokubulawa."
Jeremiah12:4 Kuya kude kube nini na ilizwe lilila, nezityalo zalo lonke ilizwe loma ngenxa yobungendawo babemi? izilwanyana neentaka ezitshabaleleyo; ngokuba bathi, Akayi kusibona isiphelo sethu."
Jeremiah12:5 Ukuba ugidima nabahamba ngeenyawo, bakudinisa, wothini na ukukhuphisana namahashe? yaye ukuba banihlisele ishwangusha kwilizwe loxolo enilithembileyo, niya kwenza ntoni na kumathambeka aseYordan?"
Jeremiah12:6 Ngokuba nabazalwana bakho, nabendlu kayihlo, banginizile kuwe; ewe, bayakubiza emva kwakho; musa ukukholwa ngabo, nokuba bathetha amazwi amnandi kuwe."
Jeremiah12:7 Ndilishiyile ikhaya lam, ndililahlile ilifa lam; Intanda yomphefumlo wam ndiyinikele esandleni seentshaba zayo."
Jeremiah12:8 Ilifa lam linjengengonyama yasehlathini kum; luyandibiza; yiyo loo nto ndandiyithiya.
Jeremiah12:9 Ilifa lam linjengentaka edla inyama, xa lijikelezwe ziintaka ezingeenxa zonke kulo; yizani, hlanganisani onke amarhamncwa elizwe, yizani nidle."
Jeremiah12:10 Abalusi abaninzi basonakalisile isidiliya sam;
Jeremiah12:11 Balenza laba senkangala, labe liyinkangala; libharhile lonke ilizwe, ngokuba akukho mntu ukubekela ntliziyo oko."
Jeremiah12:12 Ababhuqi bafikelele ezindongeni zonke zentlango, ngokuba umkhonto kaYehova uya kubulala, kuthabathele esiphelweni sehlabathi kuse esiphelweni sehlabathi; akukho nyama iya kuba luxolo."
Jeremiah12:13 Bahlwayela ingqolowa, bavuna ameva; babandezelekile, kodwa akukho nto ilungileyo; yaye baya kuba neentloni ngemali eniyifumanayo ngenxa yokuvutha komsindo kaYehova."
Jeremiah12:14 Wathi uYehova ngabamelwane bam bonke abanobubi, abalichukumisayo ilifa, endilidle ilifa abantu bam amaSirayeli; Yabona, ndiyabahlangula emhlabeni wabo nendlu kaYuda ndiya kuyihlangula phakathi kwabo."
Jeremiah12:15 Emva kokuba ndibanyothule, ndiya kubuya, ndibe nemfesane kubo, ndibuyisele elowo elifeni lakhe, elowo emhlabeni wakhe."
Jeremiah12:16 Akwaba bebengazifunda iindlela zabantu bam, bafunge igama lam, bathi, Ehleli nje uYehova! njengoko babafundisayo abantu bam ukuthetha ngoBhahali; baya kwakhiwe khona phakathi kwabantu bam."
Jeremiah12:17 Ke ukuba bathe abeva, ndolubetha olo hlanga ngesiqalekiso, ndilutshabalalise; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah13:1 Wathi uYehova kum, Yiya uzithengele ilinen emhlophe, uyibhinqe, ungayifaki emanzini."
Jeremiah13:2 Ngoko ndathabatha ibhanti ngokwelizwi likaYehova ndaza ndabhinqa esinqeni sam ngalo.
Jeremiah13:3 Laphinda lafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Jeremiah13:4 Thabatha umbhinqo osesinqeni sakho, uhambe uye emEfrati, uwufihle khona emhadini wengxondorha."
Jeremiah13:5 Ndaya ke, ndawufihla emEfrati, njengoko uYehova wandiwisela umthetho ngako."
Jeremiah13:6 Kwadlula imihla emininzi, wathi uYehova kum, Suka uye emEfrati, ubuthabathe ubutyebi endakuwisela umthetho ngako, ukuba uwufihle khona."
Jeremiah13:7 Ndaya ke emEfrati, ndemba, ndathabatha ingqolowa kuloo ndawo bendiyifihle kuyo; nalo ibhanti laphukile, akwanceda nto."
Jeremiah13:8 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Jeremiah13:9 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ndiya kuliphelisa ikratshi lakwaYuda, ikratshi elikhulu laseYerusalem."
Jeremiah13:10 Aba bantu bangendawo, bangavumiyo ukuweva amazwi am, bahamba ngokweminquba yentliziyo yabo, balandela thixo bambi ukuze babakhonze, babakhonze: baya kuba njengalo mbhinqo wamampunge;"
Jeremiah13:11 Ngokuba njengokuba umbhinqo ubopha indoda esinqeni, ndenjenjalo ukuyibopha kum yonke indlu kaSirayeli, nendlu yonke kaYuda, utsho uYehova; ukuze babe ngabantu bam, negama, nendumiso, nozuko, kodwa abevanga."
Jeremiah13:12 Ke ngoko, baxelele eli lizwi; Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Zonke iingqayi ziya kuzaliswa ngewayini;"
Jeremiah13:13 Wothi ke kubo, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndibazalisa ngesinxilo bonke abemi beli lizwe, nookumkani abahleli etroneni kaDavide, nababingeleli, nabaprofeti, nabo bonke abahleli eYerusalem;"
Jeremiah13:14 ndibaqobe, ooyise noonyana kunye, utsho uYehova; andiyi kuba nanceba, andiyi kuthenga, andiyi kuba nanceba, ndibatshabalalise."
Jeremiah13:15 Phulaphulani niphulaphule; musani ukuzidla, ngokuba ethethile uYehova."
Jeremiah13:16 Mzukiseni uYehova uThixo wenu, engekadali ubumnyama, engekabetheki ezintabeni zocolothi iinyawo zenu;"
Jeremiah13:17 Ukuba anithanga niphulaphule, wokhala umphefumlo wam entsithelweni ngenxa yoqhankqalazo lwenu; antywizise amehlo am, antywizise iinyembezi, ngenxa yokuba umhlambi kaYehova uthinjiwe."
Jeremiah13:18 Yithi kukumkani nakwinkosikazi, Zithobeni, hlala phantsi; ngokuba baya kuhla abathetheli bakho, isithsaba sozuko lwakho."
Jeremiah13:19 Imizi yasemzantsi iya kuvalwa, kungabikho uvulayo; Wonke uYuda uya kuthinjwa, asiwe ekuthinjweni ngokupheleleyo."
Jeremiah13:20 “Phakamisa amehlo akho, ukhangele kwabo bangasentla: Uphi na umhlambi ozinikiweyo, umhlambi wakho omhle?"
Jeremiah13:21 Wothini na, xa athe wakubetha? ngokuba wabafundisa ukuba babe ngabalawuli nabaphathi bakho;"
Jeremiah13:22 Naxa uthe entliziyweni yakho, Kungani na ukuba ndifikelwe zezi zinto? Ngenxa yobukhulu bobugwenxa bakho, zihlutywe iingubo zakho, zihlutywe izithende zakho."
Jeremiah13:23 UmKushi unokuluguqula na ulusu lwakhe, nengwe inokuwaguqula na amabala ayo? kulapho ke niyakwazi ukwenza okulungileyo, nina baqhele ukwenza okubi."
Jeremiah13:24 Ndiya kubaphangalalisa ke, njengeendiza eziphephuka nomoya wentlango;"
Jeremiah13:25 Sisabelo sakho eso, isabelo sakho somlinganiso ophuma kum, utsho uYehova; ngokuba undilibele, wakholosa ngobuxoki."
Jeremiah13:26 Ngoko ke ndiya kukuhluba iingubo zakho, zingabikho ebusweni bakho, kubonakale ukucukucezwa kwakho."
Jeremiah13:27 Ndakubona ukukrexeza kwakho, ndakuthoba, elihlazo lobuhenyu bakho, nezothe zakho ezindulini zelizwe. Yeha, wena Yerusalem! Aniyi kuhlanjululwa na? iyakuba nini?"
Jeremiah14:1 Ilizwi likaYehova elafika kuYeremiya ngokuphathelele ubuthathaka.
Jeremiah14:2 uYuda uyalila, namasango akhe adandathekile; ezimnyama emhlabeni; kwenyuka ukukhala kweYerusalem."
Jeremiah14:3 Iingangamsha zabo zithuma abantwana bazo emanzini; bafika emhadini, abafumana manzi; babuya zilambatha izitya zabo; badanile, baneentloni, bagqubuthele intloko."
Jeremiah14:4 Ngenxa yokuba umhlaba uqhekekile, kuba kungabangakho mvula ehlabathini, abalimi badanile, bagqubuthele intloko."
Jeremiah14:5 Nembande yazala endle, yawushiya, ngokuba kwakungekho luhlaza."
Jeremiah14:6 Ema ezigangeni amahashe asendle, awuthi cwaka njengoodyakalashe; amehlo aso ayengaboni, kuba kwakungekho ngca."
Jeremiah14:7 Wena, Yehova, ukuba senze okungekho sikweni, kwenze ngenxa yegama lakho; ngokuba zininzi iimbandezelo zethu; sonile kuwe."
Jeremiah14:8 Wena themba likaSirayeli, uMsindisi wakhe ngexesha lentlekele, kutheni na ukuba ube njengomphambukeli elizweni nanjengowasemzini olala ebuthongweni?"
Jeremiah14:9 Yini na ukuba ube njengendoda ekhwankqisayo, igorha elingenakusindisa; ke wena, Yehova, uphakathi kwethu, negama lakho libizwe phakathi kwethu; ungasishiyi."
Jeremiah14:10 Wathi uYehova kolu hlanga, Babethanda ukulahleka, abazinqanda iinyawo zabo; ke ngoko, uYehova akakholiswa ngabo; ngoku niya kubukhumbula ububi babo, nizohlwaye ngenxa yezono zabo;"
Jeremiah14:11 Wathi uYehova kum, Musa ukuluthandazela olu hlanga;"
Jeremiah14:12 Ukuba bathe bazila ukudla, andiyi kuva ukuhlahlamba kwabo; nokuba bazisa idini elinyukayo nedini elinyukayo, andiyi kukholiswa ngabo; kodwa ndiya kubatshabalalisa ngekrele nangendlala nangendlala yokugula."
Jeremiah14:13 Ndaza ndathi: “Owu Nkosi Yehova! yabonani, abaprofeti bathi kubo, Aniyi kulibona ikrele, aniyi kulamba; ndiya kuninika uxolo oluqinileyo kule ndawo."
Jeremiah14:14 Wathi uYehova kum, Abaprofeti baprofeta ubuxoki egameni lam; andibathumanga, andibawiselanga mthetho, andithethanga kubo; ezintliziyweni zabo."
Jeremiah14:15 Wathi ke uYehova kubaprofeti abaprofeta egameni lam, andibathumanga, ndathi, Akuyi kubakho mkhonto ungapheleyo kweli lizwe; Abo baprofeti baya kutshatyalaliswa likrele nayindlala."
Jeremiah14:16 Nabantu abaprofetayo baya kukhutshelwa phandle ezitratweni zaseYerusalem ngenxa yendlala nekrele; bangabangcwabi bona, nabafazi babo, noonyana babo, neentombi zabo; ngokuba ndiya kuthulula ubugwenxa babo phezu kwabo."
Jeremiah14:17 Ke ngoko, baxelele eli lizwi; Amehlo am akasayi kuphalala iinyembezi ubusuku nemini, angaphezi;"
Jeremiah14:18 Ndathi ndakuphuma ndaya entsimini, wabona abo boyisiweyo likrele; ndithi ndakungena kuwo umzi, ndibone abafa yindlala! Ewe, umprofeti nombingeleli balahlekile kwihlabathi abangalaziyo."
Jeremiah14:19 Umlahle kwaphela na uYuda? Wayithiya na iZiyon umphefumlo wakho? Usibethile na, kungabikho kuphiliswa? Sithembe uxolo, akulungile; nangenxa yexesha lokuphiliswa, kodwa, khangela!"
Jeremiah14:20 Yehova, siyabazi ububi bethu, nokungendawo koobawo; ngokuba sonile kuwe."
Jeremiah14:21 Musa ukuba lisikizi kuthi, ngenxa yegama lakho; ungayideli itrone yozuko lwakho; Khumbula, ungawaphuli umnqophiso wakho nathi."
Jeremiah14:22 Phakathi kweentlanga ezingento, ngaba ukho na onokunisa imvula? Ngaba isibhakabhaka siyana? Asinguwe na, Yehova, Thixo wethu? ke ngoko siya kukulinda, ngokuba nguwe ozenzileyo ezi zinto."
Jeremiah15:1 Wathi ke uYehova kum, Kungafanelana kumi ooMoses noSamuweli phambi kwam, ubungebheki oko iingcinga zam kwaba bantu; zisuse phambi kwam, uhambe."
Jeremiah15:2 Kuya kuthi, xa bathe kuwe, Siya ngaphi na? uthi kubo, uYehova uthethile; Abo bafanelwe kukufa baya ekufeni; abafanele umkhonto mababe nekrele; Abo bafanelwe yindlala, mabalambe; nabo bafanele ukuthinjwa, mabahambe baye ekuthinjweni."
Jeremiah15:3 Ndiya kubavelisela iintlobo ezine, utsho uYehova: umkhonto wokubulala, nezinja ukuba zidle, neentaka zezulu namarhamncwa, ukuba zidle, zonakalise."
Jeremiah15:4 Ndobasusa ezikumkanini zonke zehlabathi, ngenxa kaManase unyana kaHezekiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, ngenxa yoko wakwenzayo eYerusalem."
Jeremiah15:5 Ngokuba ngubani na oya kuba nenceba kuwe, Yerusalem? ngubani na oya kunililela? ngubani na oya kuphuma akubuze ukuba unjani na?"
Jeremiah15:6 Undishiyile, utsho uYehova, ubuyile; ke ngoko, ndiya kusolula isandla sam phezu kwakho, ndikutshabalalise; Ndidiniwe kukubhaka."
Jeremiah15:7 Ndiya kubahluza emasangweni elimiweyo; Ndiya kubaphanga oonyana babo, ndibatshabalalise abantu bam, ngokuba abaguqukanga ezindleleni zabo."
Jeremiah15:8 Abahlolokazi babo baninzi kum kunentlabathi yolwandle; Ngokukhawuleza ndamjula phezu kwayo kunye noloyiko phezu komzi.
Jeremiah15:9 Lowo wazala abasixhenxe akasekho; wawuncama umoya; latshona ilanga lakhe phambi kwemini enkulu; waphakama eneentloni, waphakama; nentsalela yabo ndiya kuyinikela ekreleni phambi kweentshaba zabo,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah15:10 Yeha ke mna, Mama, ngenxa yokuba undenze umntu wengxabano, umntu wengxabano nehlabathi liphela! andibolekisanga nanzala, yaye abantu babengandiboleki nanzala; kodwa bonke bephela bandingcikiva."
Jeremiah15:11 Wathi uYehova, Okunene, kuya kuba kuhle okuseleyo kwakho; utshaba lwakho ndiya kulubuza ngexesha lobubi nangexesha lembandezelo."
Jeremiah15:12 Ngaba intsimbi iya kwaphula intsimbi yasentla nentsimbi?
Jeremiah15:13 Ubuncwane bakho nobuncwane bakho ndobunikela ukuba buphangwe, nangenxa yezono zakho zonke, nangenxa yamazwe akho onke."
Jeremiah15:14 Ndiya kukuwelisa neentshaba zakho, uye ezweni ongalaziyo, ngokuba umlilo ophenjwe ngumsindo wam uya kukutshisa."
Jeremiah15:15 Wena, Yehova, uyakwazi oku; ndikhumbule, ndivelele, baxelele abandisukelayo; musa ukundisusa ekunyamezeleni kwakho; yazi ukuba ndohlwaywa ngawe."
Jeremiah15:16 Afumaneka amazwi akho, ndawadla; Ilizwi lakho kum laba yimihlali nemivuyo yentliziyo yam, ngokuba ndabizwa ngegama lakho, Yehova, Thixo wemikhosi."
Jeremiah15:17 Andihlalanga phakathi kwebandla labagxeki, andikonwabanga; Ndindedwa ngenxa yesandla sakho, ngokuba undizalisile ngomsindo."
Jeremiah15:18 Yini na ukuba umvandedwa wam uphele, nenxeba lam libulale, lingavumi ukuphola? Ngaba uya kuba njengexoki kum na njengamanzi aqukuqelayo?"
Jeremiah15:19 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ukuba uthe waguquka, ndokubuyisa, ubuye ume phambi kwam; kodwa aniguquki kubo."
Jeremiah15:20 Ndiya kubenzela udonga aba bantu benziwe iinqaba zobhedu; baya kulwa nawe, bangabi nakukweyisa; kuba ndinawe ukuba ndikuhlangule ndize ndikusindise,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah15:21 Ndiya kukuhlangula esandleni songendawo, ndikuhlangule esandleni sowomeleleyo."
Jeremiah16:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Jeremiah16:2 Uze ungazeki mfazi, ungabi nanyana nazintombi kule ndawo."
Jeremiah16:3 Ngokuba utsho uYehova ngoonyana neentombi ezizalelwa kule ndawo, nangoonina ababazalayo, nangooyise ababazalela kweli lizwe, ukuthi,"
Jeremiah16:4 Baya kufa ukufa okubuhlungu; abayi kulila; kwaye abayi kungcwatywa; kwaye baya kuba njengemvukelo ehlabathini, kwaye baya kutshatyalaliswa likrele nendlala; izidumbu zabo zibe kukudla kweentaka zezulu nokwamarhamncwa."
Jeremiah16:5 Ngokuba wathi uYehova, Musani ukungena endlwini yobumnyama, musani ukuya kumbambazela, musani ukubalilela; ngokuba ndilususile kwaba bantu uxolo lwam, inceba nemfesane yam;"
Jeremiah16:6 Kuya kufa abakhulu nabancinane kweli lizwe; abayi kungcwatywa, abayi kumbambazela, bengayi kuzicenta, bangazihlubi ngenxa yabo."
Jeremiah16:7 Ke yena umntu akayi kuzikrazula ngenxa yesijwili sakhe, ukuze abathuthuzele ngenxa yofileyo; yaye akukho bani ubanika indebe yentuthuzelo ukuba bayisele ngenxa kayise nonina."
Jeremiah16:8 Uze ungangeni endlwini yomthendeleko, ukuba uhlale nabo, udle, usele."
Jeremiah16:9 Ngokuba utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Yabonani, ndiya kuyithumela kule ndawo phambi kwamehlo enu nangexesha lenu izwi lemihlali nezwi lemivuyo, izwi lomyeni nezwi lomyeni; umyeni khawume umtshakazi."
Jeremiah16:10 Xa uthe wawathetha kwaba bantu la mazwi onke, baza bathi kuwe, Yini na ukuba uYehova athethe obu bubi bukhulu ngathi ngathi? Buyini na ubugwenxa bethu? Siyini na isono sethu esone ngaso kuYehova uThixo wethu?"
Jeremiah16:11 Uze uthi kubo, Kungenxa yokuba ooyihlo bendishiyile, utsho uYehova; balandela thixo bambi, babakhonza, babanqula, bandinikela ikhosi, abandigcina umthetho;"
Jeremiah16:12 Nenza okubi ngaphezu kooyihlo; kuba, yabonani, elowo kuni uhamba ngobubi bentliziyo yakhe enobubi, ukuze bangandiva."
Jeremiah16:13 Ndiya kunilahla kweli lizwe, ndinise ezweni eningalaziyo, nina nooyihlo; bakhonze thixo bambi apho ubusuku nemini; andiyi kuba nanceba kuwe khona."
Jeremiah16:14 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova, iyeza imihla ekungayi kuba sathiwa, Ngeva iNkosi, owabakhuphayo oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni laseYiputa;"
Jeremiah16:15 ehleli nje uYehova, owabanyusayo oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni lasentla, nasemazweni onke awawagxothela kuwo; yaye ndiza kubabuyisela kwilizwe labo endalinika ookhokho babo."
Jeremiah16:16 Yabonani, ndithumela ababambisi beentlanzi abaninzi, beze bababambise, utsho uYehova; emva koko ndizise abazingeli abaninzi, beze babazingele ezintabeni zonke, nasezindulini zonke, nasezimfanteni zeengxondorha."
Jeremiah16:17 Ngokuba amehlo am azibonile zonke iindlela zabo; azisithele kum, nenkohlakalo yazo ayifihlakele kwamehlo am."
Jeremiah16:18 Kwaye ndiya kuqala ngokububuyekeza ububi babo nesono sabo kabini; ngenxa yokuba belenze inqambi ilizwe lam, belizalisa ilifa lam ngezidumbu zabo ezinezothe."
Jeremiah16:19 Yehova, mandla am, nqaba yam, ndawo yokusabela kwam ngomhla weshwangusha, ziya kuza kuwe iintlanga, zivela eziphelweni zehlabathi, zisithi, Oobawo badla ilifa lobuxoki, nenkohlakalo, nento engento."
Jeremiah16:20 Umntu uya kuzenzela oothixo yini na, ongenguye oothixo?"
Jeremiah16:21 Ngako oko, yabonani, ndiya kubazisa, ndibazise isandla sam namandla am; zazi ukuba igama lam linguYehova."
Jeremiah17:1 Isono sikaYuda sibhalwe ngenkxola yesinyithi, nencam yedayimani; kubhaliwe ecwecweni lentliziyo yabo, nasezimpondweni zezibingelelo zenu;"
Jeremiah17:2 oonyana babo bezikhumbula izibingelelo zabo, nezibingelelo zabo ngasemithini eluhlaza, ezindulini ezinde."
Jeremiah17:3 Wena, ntaba yam yelizwe, ndiya kuyinikela imfuyo yakho nobuncwane bakho bonke ukuba buthinjwe, nezakhiwo zakho eziphakamileyo zibhukuqwe emazweni akho onke."
Jeremiah17:4 Uya kuliyeka nawe ilifa lakho endakunika lona; ndikwenze ukuba ukhonze iintshaba zakho ezweni ongalaziyo; ngokuba uwuvuthe ngomsindo wam, uya kuvutha ngonaphakade."
Jeremiah17:5 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Uqalekisiwe umntu okholose ngomntu, owenza inyama ngesandla, ontliziyo imkayoyo kuYehova;"
Jeremiah17:6 Ngenxa yokuba uya kuba njengozwilakhe entlango, angayiboni xa kufika okulungileyo; uya kuhlala ezindaweni ezomileyo entlango, ezweni letyuwa elingenammi."
Jeremiah17:7 Hayi, uyolo lomntu okholose ngoYehova, Okholose ngoYehova!"
Jeremiah17:8 Kuba uya kuba njengomthi otyalwe ngasemanzini nonabisa iingcambu zawo ngasemlanjeni, yaye akayi kubona xa kufika ubushushu, kodwa amagqabi awo aya kuba luhlaza; kwaye ayiyi kuphela ngonyaka wembalela, ingayeki ukuthwala isiqhamo."
Jeremiah17:9 Intliziyo inenkohliso ngaphezu kweento zonke, nentliziyo inenkohliso; ngubani na onokuyazi?"
Jeremiah17:10 Mna, Yehova, ndiyayicikida intliziyo, ndiyazicikida izintso, ukuze ndinike elowo ngokwesiko lakhe, ngokwesiqhamo seentlondi zakhe."
Jeremiah17:11 Njengonomyayi ohleli phezu kwamaqanda, akawaqandusela; ngako oko, osisityebi, engengobulungisa, uya kubushiya phakathi kwemihla yakhe, aze ekugqibeleni abe sisidenge."
Jeremiah17:12 Itrone leyo ibiphezulu kwasekuqalekeni, indawo yengcwele yethu;"
Jeremiah17:13 Themba likaSirayeli, Yehova, bonke abatyekayo kuwe, baya kudana, nabandishiyileyo, babhalwe phantsi, ngokuba bemshiyile uYehova, umthombo wamanzi aphilileyo."
Jeremiah17:14 Ndiphilise, Yehova, ndiphile; ndisindise, ndisinde, ngokuba indumiso yam nguwe."
Jeremiah17:15 Yabona, bathi kum, Liphi na ilizwi likaYehova? mayize ngoku."
Jeremiah17:16 Mna ke, andikusukelanga ukuba ngumalusi emva kwakho; uyazi: into egqithileyo emlonyeni wam ibiphambi kwakho."
Jeremiah17:17 Musa ukundothusa: ulithemba lam ngemini yembandezelo.
Jeremiah17:18 Mabadane abandisukelayo, andiyi kudana; mabeme ngoloyiko, andiyi koyika; bazizisele imini yeshwangusha, ubatshabalalise ngobubi obuphindiweyo."
Jeremiah17:19 Wathi uYehova kum, Hamba uye kuma esangweni loonyana bohlanga, abangena ngalo ookumkani bakwaYuda, bephuma, nasemasangweni onke aseYerusalem;"
Jeremiah17:20 Wathi kubo, Liphulaphuleni ilizwi likaYehova, nina kumkani bakwaYuda, nani maYuda nonke, nani nonke bemi baseYerusalem, bangenayo ngala masango."
Jeremiah17:21 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Zigcineni, ningathwali mthwalo ngomhla wesabatha, ningangeni ngamasango aseYerusalem;"
Jeremiah17:22 Ngomhla wesabatha ize ningawukhuphi umthwalo ezindlwini zenu, ningenzi namnye umsebenzi ngawo; niwungcwalise umhla wesabatha, njengoko ndabawiselayo umthetho ooyihlo."
Jeremiah17:23 Kodwa abazange baphulaphule, yaye abazange bazinqumle iindlebe zabo, kodwa bazenza lukhuni iintamo zabo ukuze bangeva okanye bangavumi ukuyalelwa."
Jeremiah17:24 “Ukuba nithe naphulaphula ngenyameko, utsho uYehova, ningangeni nanye into emasangweni esi sixeko ngomhla wesabatha, kodwa ukuze nilungcwalise umhla wesabatha, ningenzi namnye umsebenzi kuni;"
Jeremiah17:25 Kuya kwandula ke emasangweni esi sixeko kungene ookumkani neenkosana ezihleli etroneni kaDavide, zikhwele iinqwelo namahashe, zona neenkosana zazo, amadoda akwaYuda nabemi baseYerusalem; kwaye esi sixeko siya kuhlala ngonaphakade."
Jeremiah17:26 Baya kuza bevela emizini yakwaYuda, ezindaweni ezingeenxa zonke eYerusalem, ezweni lakwaBhenjamin, entlango, ezintabeni, nasezantsi, bezisa amadini anyukayo, nemibingelelo, nemibingelelo, neziqhumiso, nemibingelelo yoxolo dumisani endlwini kaYehova."
Jeremiah17:27 Ukuba anithanga nindiphulaphule, ukuba niwungcwalise umhla wesabatha, anathwalisa mthwalo, ningangeni ngamasango aseYerusalem ngomhla wesabatha; ndiya kuphemba umlilo emasangweni ayo, utshise iingxande ezinde zeYerusalem, ongacimiyo."
Jeremiah18:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya, lisithi:"
Jeremiah18:2 Suka uhle, uye endlwini yombumbi, ndiya kukwazisa khona amazwi am."
Jeremiah18:3 Ndehla ke, ndaya endlwini yombumbi, ndambona esenza umsebenzi weevili ezijikelezayo."
Jeremiah18:4 Sachithwa isitya abesenza ngodongwe, esandleni sombumbi; ke ngoko, wenza enye into, njengoko kwakuthandeka emehlweni ombumbi, ukuba ayenze."
Jeremiah18:5 Kwabonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Jeremiah18:6 Andithi na nina, ndlu kaSirayeli, ndinimise njengolo mbumbi? utsho uYehova. Yabonani, njengodongwe esandleni somenzi, ninjalo nina esandleni sam, nina ndlu kaSirayeli!"
Jeremiah18:7 Kunini na ndithetha ngohlanga nobukumkani, ukuba ndibutshabalalise, ndibutshabalalise?"
Jeremiah18:8 Ukuba abantu endibathethe nxamnye nabo bayaguquka kubungendawo babo, nam ndiya kuzohlwaya ngenxa yobubi ebendicinga ukubenza kubo."
Jeremiah18:9 Ngelo xesha ndithetha ngohlanga nobukumkani, ukuba ndilwakhe, ndibuqinise;"
Jeremiah18:10 Ukuba bathe benza ububi emehlweni am, abaliphulaphula ilizwi lam, ndozohlwaya ngenxa yokulunga, ndathi, ndobabonisa kona."
Jeremiah18:11 Hamba ngoku, uthethe kumadoda akwaYuda, nakubemi baseYerusalem, uthi, uYehova uthethile; Yabonani, ndinicingela ububi, ndinicingela okulungileyo; Yisuseni elowo endleleni yakhe egwenxa, nizilungise iindlela zenu nezenzo zenu, ukuze zilunge."
Jeremiah18:12 Bathi bona, Akukho themba, ngokuba siya kuhamba ngokwecebo lethu, elowo enze amacebo entliziyo yakhe embi."
Jeremiah18:13 Ngenxa yoko, wathi uYehova, Buzani ezintlangeni, nivile na into enjengale: Intombi enyulu yakwaSirayeli yenze into ecekisekayo kunene."
Jeremiah18:14 Ikhephu laseLebhanon liya kulishiya na iliwa lelizwe? okanye amanzi abandayo aphuma komnye ummandla ashiywe?
Jeremiah18:15 Ngokuba bendishiyile abantu bam;
Jeremiah18:16 ukwenza ihlabathi labo libe yinkangala nentsebenziswano engenasiphelo; bonke abadlulayo baya kuma bemangalisiwe, bahlunguzele iintloko."
Jeremiah18:17 Njengomoya wasempumalanga, ndobaphangalalisa phambi kweentshaba zabo; ndisuse ubuso babo, ndingabi savela ebusweni babo, ngemini yobubi babo."
Jeremiah18:18 Bathi ke, Yiza uhlabele uYeremiya; ngokuba awuyi kuphela umyalelo kumbingeleli, necebo lesilumko, nelizwi lomprofeti yizani simbethe ngolwimi, singaliphulaphuli ilizwi lakhe."
Jeremiah18:19 Ndiphendule, Yehova, uliphulaphule izwi lababambene nam."
Jeremiah18:20 Kuya kuvuzwa ngobubi na ngokulungileyo? ngokuba bewumbele isihogo umphefumlo wam. Khumbula ukuma kwam phambi kwakho ukuba ndithethe kakuhle ngabo, ndiwubuyise umsindo wakho kubo."
Jeremiah18:21 Ngako oko banikele oonyana babo endlaleni, igazi labo ulinikele kugonyamelo lwekrele; abafazi babo bangabi nabantwana, babe ngabahlolokazi; amadoda abo makabulawe; abafana babo babulawa ngekrele emfazweni."
Jeremiah18:22 Makuvakale ukukhala ezindlwini zabo, xa ubazisela ibandla ngesiquphe; ngokuba bambe umngxuma wokundibambisa, iinyawo zam bazifihle esibatheni."
Jeremiah18:23 Kodwa, Yehova, uyawazi onke amacebo abo okundibulala; musa ukubuxolela ubugwenxa babo, ungasicimi isono sabo ebusweni bakho, kodwa bavumele baguquke phambi kwakho; wenjenjalo kubo ngexesha lomsindo wakho."
Jeremiah19:1 Wathi uYehova, Yiya uthabathe imbiza yodongwe kumbumbi, uwuthabathe emadodeni amakhulu abantu, nakumadoda amakhulu ababingeleli;"
Jeremiah19:2 Phuma uye emfuleni wakwaBhen-hinom, osekungeneni kwesango lasempumalanga, uwagqithisele khona amazwi endiya kuwathetha kuwe."
Jeremiah19:3 Uthi, Liveni ilizwi likaYehova, nina bokumkani bakwaYuda nani bemi baseYerusalem; Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Yabonani, le ndawo ndiyizisela ububi; kuba oya kuliva, ziya kubetha iindlebe zakhe;"
Jeremiah19:4 ngenxa yokuba baye bandinikela umva baza banikela umva kule ndawo baza batshisa thixo bambi kuyo ngenxa yabanye oothixo ababengabazi bona nookhokho babo, nookumkani bakwaYuda, baza bayizalisa le ndawo ngabathile."
Jeremiah19:5 Kwakhona bakha iindawo eziphakamileyo zikaBhahali ukuze babatshise oonyana babo emlilweni njengomnikelo otshiswayo kuBhahali, into endingabayalelanga yona okanye ndingayithethanga nendingayenzanga njengoko kwakuthe qatha entliziyweni yam."
Jeremiah19:6 Ngako oko, uyabona, iyeza imihla, utsho uYehova, engasayi kuba sabizwa le ndawo ngokuthi yiTofete, nomfula wakwaBhen-hinom; kuya kuthiwa yiNtlambo yokuBulala."
Jeremiah19:7 Ndiya kuliphelisa icebo lakwaYuda neYerusalem kule ndawo; Ndobahlisa ngekrele phambi kweentshaba zabo, nasesandleni sabawufunayo umphefumlo wabo; yaye ndiya kuwanika amanqatha azo kwiintaka zasendle namarhamncwa asendle abe kukutya kwawo."
Jeremiah19:8 Ndiya kusenza esi sixeko sibe linxuwa nesigculelo; bonke abadlulayo baya kumangaliswa, bengcikive bonke ubugwenxa bakhe."
Jeremiah19:9 Ndiza kubadlisa inyama yoonyana babo nenyama yeentombi zabo, yaye ngamnye uya kudla inyama yeqabane lakhe ngenxa yongqingo nokubandezeleka eziya kubohlwaya ngako iintshaba zabo nabo bafuna umphefumlo wabo yona."
Jeremiah19:10 Yaphula ke ikhonkco phambi kwamehlo amadoda ahamba nawe;
Jeremiah19:11 Wothi ke kubo, Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Yabonani, ndingowasenkangala; Ndiya kwenjenje ukusiqhekeza esi sizwe nesi sixeko, njengeziko elingenako ukunyanyeka; yaye baya kulingcwabela eTofete kude kungabi sabakho ndawo yakungcwaba."
Jeremiah19:12 Ndiya kuyenza le ndawo, utsho uYehova, nakubemi bayo, ndiwenze lo mzi ube njengeTofete."
Jeremiah19:13 Ziya kwenziwa inqambi izindlu zaseYerusalem nezindlu zookumkani bakwaYuda, njengendlu yaseTofete, ngenxa yezindlu zonke eziqhumayo, ezinyuka ziye ezintendelezweni zezulu, zithululele thixweni bambi."
Jeremiah19:14 uYeremiya wafika evela eTofete, apho uYehova wayemthumele khona ukuba aprofete; wema entendelezweni yendlu kaYehova; wathi kubo bonke abantu:"
Jeremiah19:15 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Yabonani, ndiwuzisela lo mzi, nemizi yawo yonke, bonke ububi endibuthethileyo ngabo, ngenxa enokuba bezenza lukhuni iintamo zabo, ukuba bangaliphulaphula ilizwi lam amazwi."
Jeremiah20:1 uPaskure, unyana wombingeleli uImere, umphathi wendlu kaYehova, weva uYeremiya eprofeta la mazwi."
Jeremiah20:2 Wandula ke uPashure wambulala uYeremiya umprofeti waza wamfaka esitokisini esasikwisango eliphakamileyo lakwaBhenjamin, lendlu kaYehova."
Jeremiah20:3 Ngengomso uPashure wamzisa uYeremiya endlwini yobuncwane. Wathi uYeremiya kuye, uYehova akathi unguPashure, uthi nguMagorissabhibhi."
Jeremiah20:4 Ngokuba etshilo uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndikwenza into embi wena, nakubahlobo bakho bonke; yaye baya kuwa likrele leentshaba zabo, yaye aya kukubona amehlo akho; yaye ndiza kumzisa wonke uYuda esandleni sam wokumkani waseBhabheli, abafudusele eBhabheli, ababulale ngekrele."
Jeremiah20:5 Ngaphezu koko, ndiza kuwanikela onke amandla esi sixeko nawo wonke umsebenzi waso nezinto zonke zaso ezinqwenelekayo nobuncwane bonke bookumkani bakwaYuda ndibunikele esandleni seentshaba zabo eziya kusiphanga zize zibathimbe bazise eBhabheli."
Jeremiah20:6 Wena ke, Pashure, nabo bonke abahleli endlwini yakho, niya kuthinjwa; yaye ngokuqinisekileyo uya kufika eBhabhiloni, ufele khona ungcwatyelwe khona, wena nabo bonke abahlobo bakho obaprofetele ubuxoki."
Jeremiah20:7 Yehova, undikhohlisile, ndaza ndazivumela ukuba ndikhohliswe; Unamandla kunam, woyisile; Ndenza iziqhulo yonke imihla, wonke umntu uyandihlekisa."
Jeremiah20:8 Ngokuba ndithethe, ndikhala, ndinogonyamelo nokubhuqa; kuba ilizwi likaYehova lenziwe intlekisa nesigculelo kum yonke imihla."
Jeremiah20:9 Ndathi ke, Andisayi kuphinda ndithethe ngaye, andisayi kuthetha ngegama lakhe. Ke ilizwi lakhe lalinjengomlilo ovuthayo, ovalelwe emathanjeni am entliziyweni yam;"
Jeremiah20:10 Ngokuba ndive intlebendwane yabaninzi, bathi, Kunxunguphalo ngeenxa zonke. Baya kusixela, kwaye siya kuxela. Bandibona bonke abo ndibaziyo xa ndisukuma, ndisithi: Mhlawumbi angalingwa, simoyise, siziphindezele kuye."
Jeremiah20:11 Ke uYehova unam njengegorha elinamandla; ke ngoko, abandisukelayo baya kukhubeka baze bangoyisi; ngokuba abayi kuba nampumelelo;"
Jeremiah20:12 Ke wena, Yehova wemikhosi, ulicikidayo ilungisa, obona izintso nentliziyo, mandiyibone impindezelo yakho kubo, ngokuba ndinivulele ityala lam."
Jeremiah20:13 Vumani kuYehova, mbongeni uYehova, Ngokuba ewuhlangule umphefumlo wolishwa esandleni samanginingini."
Jeremiah20:14 Mayiqalekiswe imini endazalwa ngayo; Ngamana ungabongwa umhla owandizala ngawo umama.
Jeremiah20:15 Uqalekisiwe lowo umshumayeli weendaba ezilungileyo kuyise, esithi, Kuzelwe unyana; imenza onwabe kakhulu."
Jeremiah20:16 Yaye loo ndoda mayibe njengezixeko uYehova azitshabalalisayo ize ingabi nakuguquka;
Jeremiah20:17 Ngokuba engandibulalanga kwasesizalweni; okanye umama ube lingcwaba lam, ithanga lakhe lihlale likhulu kunelam."
Jeremiah20:18 Ibiyini na ukuba ndiphume esizalweni, ukuze ndibone umsebenzi nokwaphuka, nemihla yam iphelele ekudaneni?"
Jeremiah21:1 Ilizwi likaYehova elafikayo kuYeremiya, ekuthumeni kokumkani uZedekiya kuye uPashure unyana kaMelekiya, noZefaniya unyana kaMahaseya, umbingeleli, kuye, lisithi,"
Jeremiah21:2 Masithandaze kuYehova; ngokuba uNebhukadenetsare, ukumkani waseBhabheli, esilwa nathi; ukuba uYehova uyasenzela yonke imimangaliso yakhe, uya kusinikela umva."
Jeremiah21:3 Wathi uYeremiya kubo: “Yizani kuZedekiya, nithi:"
Jeremiah21:4 Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Yabonani, ndiya kuzibuyisa izixhobo zemfazwe ezisezandleni zenu, enilwa ngazo ukumkani waseBhabheli, aningqingile ke amaKaledi ngaphandle kweendonga; uya kubabuyisela phakathi kwabahlanganiselwe kulo mzi."
Jeremiah21:5 Ndiya kulwa nani ngesandla esolukileyo, nangesandla esithe nkqi, ngomsindo nangobushushu, nangobushushu obukhulu;"
Jeremiah21:6 Ndiya kubatshabalalisa abemi balo mzi, abantu neenkomo; ziya kufa sisibetho."
Jeremiah21:7 Emva koko, utsho uYehova, ndiya kumnikela uZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, nabakhonzi bakhe, nabantu, namasalela esi sixeko, kwindyikitya yokufa ngekrele, ndiwabulale kakumkani uNebhukadenetsare ukuba asindise. eBhabheli nasesandleni seentshaba zabo nasesandleni sabafuna umphefumlo wabo; yaye uya kuboyisa ngohlangothi lwekrele; Akayi kuba nanceba kubo, akayi kuba namfesane kubo, akayi kuba namfesane kubo."
Jeremiah21:8 Wathi kwaba bantu, Utsho uYehova; Yabonani, ndikubonisa indlela yobomi nendlela yokufa."
Jeremiah21:9 Bonke abahlala kulo mzi baya kufa likrele, nayindlala, nayindyikitya yokufa; ke yena othe waya kuwahlasela amaKaledi aningqingayo, wophila, ube lixhoba kuye umphefumlo wakhe."
Jeremiah21:10 Ngokuba lo mzi ndiwuvelele ububi, andawukhangela okulungileyo, utsho uYehova; iya kunikelwa esandleni sokumkani waseBhabheli, ayitshise ngomlilo."
Jeremiah21:11 Indlu yokumkani wakwaYuda uthi, Liveni ilizwi likaYehova;"
Jeremiah21:12 Nina bendlu kaDavide, utsho uYehova, ukuthi, Kusasa phumezeni umgwebo, nimsindise ophangiweyo esandleni somcudisi, ukuze umsindo wam ungaphumi njengomlilo, uvuthe, kungabikho ucimayo ngenxa yomlilo ububi bezenzo zakho."
Jeremiah21:13 Yabonani, ndibambene nani, bemi bentili, beliwa lehewu, utsho uYehova; abathi, Ngubani na oya kusihlasela? Ngubani na owongena emizini yethu?"
Jeremiah21:14 Ke ndonivelela ngokweentlondi zenu, utsho uYehova; Ndiza kufaka umlilo ehlathini lakhe, kwaye uya kutshisa yonke into ngeenxa zonke kulo."
Jeremiah22:1 Wathi uYehova; Yihla uye endlwini yokumkani wakwaYuda, uthethe khona eli lizwi,"
Jeremiah22:2 uthi, Liveni ilizwi likaYehova, kumkani wakwaYuda, uhleliyo etroneni kaDavide, wena, nabakhonzi bakho, nabantu bakho, abangenayo ngala masango."
Jeremiah22:3 Wathi uYehova; Yenzani ngokwesiko nangobulungisa, nibasindise abo baphangweyo esandleni somcudisi; musani ukwenza ububi, musani ukuthabatha owasemzini, nenkedama, nomhlolokazi, ningaphalazi gazi limsulwa kule ndawo."
Jeremiah22:4 Ngokuba ukuba nithe nayenza okunene le nto, bongena ngamasango ale ndlu ookumkani, abahleli etroneni kaDavide, bekhwele ezinqwelweni nasemahasheni, yena nabakhonzi bakhe, nabantu bakhe;"
Jeremiah22:5 Ke ukuba anithanga niweve la mazwi, ndizifungile mna, utsho uYehova, ukuba le ndlu iya kuba linxuwa."
Jeremiah22:6 Ngokuba utsho uYehova kwindlu yokumkani wakwaYuda, ukuthi, UlelaseGiliyadi wena kum, uyincopho yeLebhanon; kodwa okunene ndiya kukwenza intlango, imizi engenabemi."
Jeremiah22:7 Ndiya kunilungisela abonakalisi, elowo abe neempahla zakhe, bagawule imisedare yakho ekhethekileyo, bayiphose emlilweni."
Jeremiah22:8 Kuya kudlula kwesi sixeko izizwe ezininzi, yaye ngasinye siya kuthi kwesaso: “Kutheni uYehova esenze saba sikhulu kangaka esi sixeko?"
Jeremiah22:9 Baya kuphendula bathi, Kungenxa yokuba bewushiyile umnqophiso kaYehova uThixo wabo, baqubuda thixweni bambi, babakhonza."
Jeremiah22:10 Musani ukumbambazela ofileyo, ningamzileli; kodwa lilani ngokukrakra ngenxa yalowo uhambayo, ngenxa yokuba akasayi kuze abuye okanye alibone ilizwe lakhe."
Jeremiah22:11 Kuba utsho uYehova ngokuphathelele uShalum unyana kaYosiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, owayelawula esikhundleni sikaYosiya uyise, owashiya le ndawo, ukuthi: “Akayi kuphinda abuyele khona;"
Jeremiah22:12 Kambe ke uya kufela apho abanjwe khona, angabi saphinda alibone eli lizwe."
Jeremiah22:13 Yeha, owakha indlu yakhe ngobungendawo, namagumbi akhe okuhlala ngobugwenxa; osebenzela uwabo engahlawulwa, angamniki umsebenzi wakhe;"
Jeremiah22:14 owathi, Ndiya kuzakhela indlu ebanzi, enamagumbi aphezulu anombilini; ndiya kummbela iifestile; Wayaleka ngemisedare, wayiqabela ngengqombela."
Jeremiah22:15 Uya kulawula na, xa unxibe umsedare? Uyihlo ebengadli na, asele, enze ngokusesikweni nangobulungisa, kwamhambela kakuhle;"
Jeremiah22:16 Wayelilungisa ityala losizana nolihlwempu; wahlutha; ibingekuko ukundazi na? utsho uYehova.
Jeremiah22:17 Kodwa amehlo akho nentliziyo yakho akakhange akhangele nje kuphela ukubawa kwakho nokuphalazwa kwegazi elimsulwa nengcinezelo nogonyamelo ukuze wenze oko.
Jeremiah22:18 Wathi ke uYehova ngoYowakim unyana kaYosiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, Musani ukumkhalela, nithi, Yoo, mzalwana wam! okanye, Dadewethu! musani ukumkhalela, nisithi: Oh! okanye: Oh uzuko lwakhe!"
Jeremiah22:19 Uya kungcwatywa kwindawo yokungcwaba iesile, arhuqwe aze alahlwe ngaphandle kwamasango aseYerusalem."
Jeremiah22:20 Nyuka uye eLebhanon, ubize; uphakamise ilizwi lakho eBhashan uze ukhwaze ukwikona yemida, kuba bonke abo ubathandayo batshabalele."
Jeremiah22:21 Ndathetha kuni, ninoyolo; wathi, Andifuni kuva. Yindlela yakho leyo kwasebuncinaneni bakho, ukuba ungaliphulaphulanga ilizwi lam."
Jeremiah22:22 Umoya uya kubatshabalalisa bonke abalusi bakho, nabo bakuthandayo baya kuya ekuthinjweni; inene, ngelo xesha niya kudana, nibe neentloni ngenxa yobungendawo benu bonke."
Jeremiah22:23 Wena mmi waseLebhanon, owakha indlwane yakho ngemisedare, hayi indlela oya kusinda ngayo xa ufikelwa yintlungu, inimba yomfazi ozalayo!"
Jeremiah22:24 Ndihleli nje, utsho uYehova, ukuba uKoniya unyana kaYehoyakim, ukumkani wakwaYuda, ubengumsesane wokutywina esandleni sam, sokunene, bendiya kumtsalela khona;"
Jeremiah22:25 Ndiya kukunikela esandleni sabo bafuna umphefumlo wakho, nasesandleni sabo uboyikayo, nasesandleni sikaNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, nasesandleni samaKaledi."
Jeremiah22:26 Ndonigxothela kwelinye ilizwe, wena nonyoko owakuzalayo; uya kufela khona."
Jeremiah22:27 Kodwa kwilizwe abafuna ukubuyela kulo, abasayi kubuyela kulo."
Jeremiah22:28 Ngaba lo mfo uKoniya ngumfanekiso odelekileyo owaphukileyo? Ngaba sisitya esingenaluvuyo? Yini na ukuba bajulwe, yena nabantwana bakhe, baphoswe ezweni abangalaziyo?"
Jeremiah22:29 Lizwe, lizwe, lizwe, live ilizwi likaYehova!"
Jeremiah22:30 Wathi uYehova, Lo mfo mbaleleni ukuba akanamntwana, yindoda engenampumelelo emihleni yayo;"
Jeremiah23:1 Yeha ke, abalusi abatshabalalisa, bachithachithe umhlambi wedlelo lam! utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah23:2 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ngenxa yabalusi abaluse abantu bam; Wazichithachitha umhlambi wam, wazigxotha, akwazivelela; yabonani, ndiya kunivelela ngenxa yobubi beentlondi zenu; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah23:3 Ndiya kuwabutha amasalela omhlambi wam emazweni onke endawachithachithela kuwo, ndiwabuyisele emadlelweni awo; kwaye baya kwanda kwaye bande;"
Jeremiah23:4 ndiwamisele abalusi abaya kuwalusa; yaye abasayi koyika okanye bankwantye, yaye abayi kuswela nto,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah23:5 Yabonani, iyeza imihla, utsho uYehova, endiya kummisela uDavide iHlumelo elililungisa, libe ngukumkani ongukumkani, enze yena ngengqiqo, enze ubulungisa nokusesikweni ehlabathini."
Jeremiah23:6 Ngemihla yakhe uYuda uya kukhululwa noSirayeli ekhuselekile; negama lakhe aya kubizwa ngalo, lilo eli: uYehova ububulungisa bethu."
Jeremiah23:7 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova, iyeza imihla abangayi kuba sathi, NguYehova ovayo, owabakhuphayo oonyana bakaSirayeli ezweni laseYiputa;"
Jeremiah23:8 Ke ngoYehova ophilileyo, owabakhuphayo oonyana bendlu kaSirayeli ezweni lasentla, nasemazweni onke endabafudusela kuwo; kwaye baya kuhlala emhlabeni wabo."
Jeremiah23:9 Intliziyo yam yaphukile phakathi kwam ngenxa yabaprofeti; Ayanyikima onke amathambo am; Ndifana nenxila nanjengomntu owethwe yiwayini ngenxa kaYehova nangenxa yamazwi akhe angcwele.
Jeremiah23:10 Ngokuba ilizwe lizele ngabakrexezi; ngokuba ilizwe likhalela isifungo; iindawo ezinqwenelekayo zentlango ngumqwebedu, nendlela yawo imbi, nokuqina kwawo akukuhle."
Jeremiah23:11 Ngokuba umprofeti nombingeleli abangcwele; ndizifumene nasendlwini yam izinto zabo ezimbi; utsho uYehova.
Jeremiah23:12 Ngoko umendo wabo uya kuba njengeendlela ezibuthelezi esithokothokweni; baya kusukelwa bawe khona; kuba ndiya kubazisela intlekele, unyaka wokukohlwaya kwabo,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah23:13 Ndabona ubudenge babaprofeti bakwaSamari; baprofeta ngoBhahali, babandwendwisa abantu bam amaSirayeli."
Jeremiah23:14 Ndabona into eyoyikekayo kubaprofeti baseYerusalem: bayakrexeza yaye bahamba ebuxokini; Bazomelezile izandla zenginingini, ukuba kungabuyi mntu ebubini bakhe; kum bonke banjengeSodom, nabemi bayo banjengeGomora."
Jeremiah23:15 Ke ngoko, kwathethwa yiNkosi yemikhosi kubaprofeti; Yabona, ndiyabadlisa amanqatha, ndibaseze inyongo; kuba kubaprofeti baseYerusalem kuphuma okungendawo, kwaya kulo lonke ihlabathi."
Jeremiah23:16 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Musani ukuwaphulaphula amazwi abaprofeti abaniprofetelayo; bakwenza into engento; bathetha umbono wentliziyo yabo, ongaphumi emlonyeni kaYehova."
Jeremiah23:17 Bathi kwabandigxekayo, uYehova uthe, Niya kuba noxolo; nakubo bonke abahambayo ngobubi bentliziyo yabo, bathi, Aniyi kuwela ebubini;"
Jeremiah23:18 Kuba ngubani na wema entendelezweni kaYehova waza walibona waliva ilizwi lakhe? Ngubani na olivayo ilizwi lakhe, waliva?"
Jeremiah23:19 Yabona, umoya ovuthuzayo womsindo kaYehova, uyaphuma, sisiphango esinamandla; iya kuwa nzima phezu kweentloko zabangendawo."
Jeremiah23:20 Awuyi kubuya umsindo kaYehova, ade azizalise iingcinga zentliziyo yakhe; ekupheleni kosuku kufuneka unikele ingqalelo kuyo."
Jeremiah23:21 Andibathumanga abaprofeti abo, kugidime bona; Andithethanga kubo, kodwa bona baprofeta."
Jeremiah23:22 Ukuba bathe basuka bama elucengeni lwam, bababeka abantu bam amazwi am, babuya baguquka endleleni yabo embi, nasebubini bezenzo zabo."
Jeremiah23:23 Utsho uYehova, ndingabi nguThixo wakude na?"
Jeremiah23:24 Ngubani na ongamfihlayo ezindaweni ezifihlakeleyo, ukuba ndingamboni? utsho uYehova. Andizalise izulu nomhlaba? utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah23:25 Ndikuvile abakuthethayo abaprofeti, abaprofeta ubuxoki egameni lam, besithi, Ndiphuphile, ndiphuphile."
Jeremiah23:26 Koda kube nini na ezintliziyweni zabaprofeti abaprofeta ubuxoki? ewe, bangabenzi bokukhohlisa kweentliziyo zabo;"
Jeremiah23:27 bacinga ngokubalibazisa abantu bam igama lam ngamaphupha abo, abawalawulayo koonyana babo, njengoko ooyise balilibalayo igama lam ngenxa kaBhahali."
Jeremiah23:28 Umprofeti onephupha makalawule iphupha elo; Lowo unelizwi lam, makathethe ilizwi lam enyanisekile. Uyintoni na umququ kwingqolowa? utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah23:29 Alinjengomlilo na ilizwi lam? utsho uYehova; nanjengesando esiqhekeza ilitye?
Jeremiah23:30 Ngako oko yabonani, ndibambene nabaprofeti, utsho uYehova, abawebayo amazwi am, elowo kwelakhe amazwi."
Jeremiah23:31 Yabonani, ndibambene nabaprofeti, utsho uYehova, abathetha ngeelwimi zabo, bathi, Uthetha yena."
Jeremiah23:32 Yabonani, ndichasene nabaprofeta amaphupha abuxoki, utsho uYehova, bawalawule, babalahlekise abantu bam ngobuxoki babo, nobuxoki babo; andibathumanga, ndingabawiselanga mthetho; ngenxa yoko abayi kulunceda olu hlanga, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah23:33 Ke kaloku, xa babuzayo aba bantu, nokuba ngumprofeti, nokuba ngumbingeleli, bathi, Siyintoni na isihlabo sikaYehova? wandule uthi kubo, Uyintoni na umthwalo? nam ndiya kunishiya, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah23:34 Umprofeti, nombingeleli, nabantu, abathi, Isihlabo sikaYehova, ndiya kuyivelela loo ndoda nendlu yayo."
Jeremiah23:35 Nithi elowo kummelwane wakhe, elowo kumzalwana wakhe, nithi, Utheni na uYehova ukuphendule? nokuthi: Wathini uYehova?"
Jeremiah23:36 Musani ukuba sathetha ngomthwalo kaYehova, kuba ilizwi lomntu wonke liya kuba ngumthwalo kuye; kuba niwajikile amazwi kaThixo ophilayo, kaYehova wemikhosi, uThixo wethu."
Jeremiah23:37 Uze uthi kumprofeti, ‘Ukuphendule wathini uYehova? nokuthi: Wathini uYehova?"
Jeremiah23:38 Kodwa ekubeni nisithi: ‘Sisigidimi sikaYehova! ngako oko, utsho uYehova; Ekubeni lithetha eli gama, lithi: Icebo likaYehova;"
Jeremiah23:39 Ngako oko, yabonani, ndiya kunilibala kuphele, ndinilahle, nina nomzi endaninika wona, nina nooyihlo, ndinigxothe phambi kobuso bam;"
Jeremiah23:40 ndiya kukuzisela ingcikivo engunaphakade, ihlazo elingunaphakade, elingenakulityalwa."
Jeremiah24:1 uYehova wandibonisa, nanzo iingobozi ezimbini zamakhiwane zimi phambi kwetempile kaYehova, zimi ngasemva koNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, noYekoniya unyana kaYehoyakim, ukumkani wakwaYuda, nabathetheli bakwaYuda, kunye nabachweli, bathinjwa nemivalo yesinyithi yaseYerusalem, bayisa eBhabheli."
Jeremiah24:2 Enye ingobozi ibinamakhiwane alunge kunene, enjengamakhiwane asele evuthiwe; enye ingobozi ibinamakhiwane amaninzi amabi, engenakudliwa ngokuba ebemabi kakhulu."
Jeremiah24:3 Wathi uYehova kum, Ubonile na, Yeremiya? Ndathi, Amakhiwane; amakhiwane alungileyo, alunge kakhulu; kwaye embi, embi kakhulu, engatyiwayo, embi kakhulu."
Jeremiah24:4 Laphinda labonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Jeremiah24:5 Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi; Njengaloo makhiwane alungileyo, ndiya kwenjenjalo ukubazi abathinjwa bakwaYuda, endibafudusileyo kule ndawo, ndibase ezweni lamaKaledi, ngenxa yabo."
Jeremiah24:6 Ndiya kulimisela okulungileyo iliso lam kubo, ndibabuyisele kweli lizwe; ndiya kubakha, ndingabagungxuli; ndibatyale, ndingabagungxuli."
Jeremiah24:7 Ndobanika nentliziyo yokundazi, ukuba ndinguYehova; kwaye baya kuba ngabantu bam, mna ndibe nguThixo wabo; ngokuba baya kubuyela kum ngentliziyo yabo yonke."
Jeremiah24:8 Njengamakhiwane amabi, angenakudliwa ngobubi bawo; Inene, utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ndiya kumnikela uZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, nabathetheli bakhe, namasalela aseYerusalem aseleyo kweli lizwe, nabemi belizwe laseYiputa."
Jeremiah24:9 Kwaye ndiza kubanikela ukuba bangcangcazele ezikumkanini zonke zehlabathi ngenxa yobubi babo, ngokunyelisa nokugculela nangehlazo kuzo zonke iindawo endiya kubagxothela kuzo."
Jeremiah24:10 Ndiza kubathumelela ikrele nendlala nendyikitya yokufa bade badlule emhlabeni endawunika bona nooyise.
Jeremiah25:1 Ilizwi elafikayo kuYeremiya ngokusingisele ebantwini bonke bakwaYuda, ngomnyaka wesine wobukumkani bukaYehoyakim unyana kaYosiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, ongumnyaka wokuqala wobukumkani bukaNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli."
Jeremiah25:2 Oko wakuthethayo uYeremiya umprofeti kubo bonke abantu bakwaYuda, nakubo bonke abemi baseYerusalem, esithi,"
Jeremiah25:3 Kususela kumnyaka weshumi elinesithathu kaYosiya unyana ka-Amon, ukumkani wakwaYuda, kuzise kule mini, le minyaka imashumi mabini anamithathu, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lathetha nawe, lisithi, ndivuka kusasa, ndivuke kusasa, ndivuke ekuseni. Ndiyathetha; kodwa aniphulaphulanga."
Jeremiah25:4 uYehova wathumela kuni bonke abakhonzi bakhe, abaprofeti, wavuka kusasa, wabathuma; kodwa aniphulaphulanga, neendlebe zenu anibathobelanga."
Jeremiah25:5 Bathi ke bona, Guqukani elowo endleleni yakhe embi, nasebubini beentlondi zenu, nihlale ezweni elo, aninikileyo uYehova, nina nooyihlo, kude kuse ephakadeni;"
Jeremiah25:6 ningalandeli thixo bambi, ningabakhonzi, ningabakhonzi, ningandikhonzi ngomsebenzi wezandla zenu; andiyi kukwenza nto imbi."
Jeremiah25:7 Aniphulaphulanga kum, utsho uYehova; ukuze uwusebenzise umsebenzi wezandla zakho kuni."
Jeremiah25:8 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Ngenxa enokuba ningawaphulaphulanga amazwi am,"
Jeremiah25:9 Yabonani, ndithumela kuNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, umkhonzi wam, zonke izizwe zasentla, utsho uYehova, ukuba ndibazisele, ukuba bahlasele eli lizwe, nabemi balo, nabamelwane bawo onke abamelwane iintlanga Uya kubabetha ngesiqalekiso, abenze imimangaliso nesigculelo nesiphanziso ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo."
Jeremiah25:10 Ndiya kulisusa kubo izwi lemivuyo nezwi lemivuyo, izwi lomyeni nezwi lomtshakazi, nesandi sogwali nokukhanya kwesibane."
Jeremiah25:11 Kwaye lonke ihlabathi liya kuba lilizwe elihle; ezi ntlanga ziya kumkhonza ukumkani waseBhabheli iminyaka emashumi asixhenxe.
Jeremiah25:12 Emva kweminyaka engamashumi asixhenxe ndiya kumkhalimela ukumkani waseBhabhiloni nolo hlanga ngenxa yobungendawo babo nangenxa yelizwe lamaKhaledi, utsho uYehova, ndilenze libe senkangala kude kube sekupheleni kwexesha elilinganiselweyo,"
Jeremiah25:13 ndowazisa kweli lizwe onke amazwi am endawathethayo ngalo, nayo yonke into ebhaliweyo kule ncwadi, ayiprofetileyo uYeremiya ngeentlanga zonke."
Jeremiah25:14 Kuba iintlanga ezininzi nookumkani abakhulu baya kukhonza ngabo, yaye ndiya kubavuza ngokwezenzo zabo nangokwezenzo zezandla zabo."
Jeremiah25:15 Ngokuba utshilo kum uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Thabatha le ndebe yewayini yobushushu esandleni sam, zisele ngayo iintlanga zonke, endikuthumela kuzo;"
Jeremiah25:16 Ziya kusela, zihexe, zigeze, ngenxa yekrele endilithumela phakathi kwazo."
Jeremiah25:17 Ndayithabatha ke indebe esandleni sikaYehova, ndazinika amanzi zonke iintlanga, awayendithumele kuzo uYehova:"
Jeremiah25:18 oko kukuthi, iYerusalem, nemizi yakwaYuda, nookumkani bayo, nabathetheli bayo, ukuba benziwe iimpanza, nommangaliso, nesigculelo, nentshabhiso; kunjani namhlanje;"
Jeremiah25:19 uFaro ukumkani waseYiputa, nabakhonzi bakhe, nabathetheli bakhe, nabantu bakhe bonke;"
Jeremiah25:20 nomxukuxela wonke, nookumkani bonke belizwe lakwaUtse, nookumkani bonke belizwe lamaFilisti, neAshkelon, neAsa, ne-Ekron, namasalela aseAshdode;"
Jeremiah25:21 uEdom, noMowabhi, noonyana baka-Amon;"
Jeremiah25:22 nookumkani bonke baseTire, nookumkani bonke baseTsidon, nookumkani bonke beziqithi eziphesheya kolwandle;"
Jeremiah25:23 uDedan, noTema, noBhuse, nabo bonke abakweleembombo zone;"
Jeremiah25:24 nookumkani bonke bama-Arabhi, nookumkani bonke bolunye uhlanga, ababemi entlango;"
Jeremiah25:25 nookumkani bonke bakwaZimri, nookumkani bonke bakwaElam, nookumkani bonke bamaMedi;"
Jeremiah25:26 nookumkani bonke belasentla, abakufuphi nabakude, elowo nowabo, nezikumkani zonke zehlabathi eziphezu komhlaba, asele emva kwabo ukumkani waseSesaki."
Jeremiah25:27 Ngako oko uthi kubo, Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Yabonani, ndinguYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli; Sela, unxile, usele, uwe, ungabuyi uvuke ngenxa yekrele endilithumela phakathi kwenu."
Jeremiah25:28 Ukuba bathe abavuma ukuyithabatha indebe esandleni sakho ukuba bayisele, wothi kubo, Utsho uYehova wemikhosi; Ngokuqinisekileyo uya kusela."
Jeremiah25:29 Ngokuba, yabonani, sendiqalile ukuwenza ububi emzini obizwa ngegama lam; Aniyi kuba msulwa, ngokuba ikrele ndilibizela bonke abemi behlabathi; utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
