Jeremiah25:30 Ke ngoko, profeta onke amazwi ngokuchasene nabo, uze uthi kubo: iNkosi iya kubharhula phezulu kwaye iliphakamise ilizwi layo ebudodeni bayo obungcwele; uya kubharhula phezu kwentente yakhe; njengabo baxovula umdiliya, uya kuphakamisa isikhalo kubo bonke abemi behlabathi."
Jeremiah25:31 Ingxolo iye eziphelweni zehlabathi; ngokuba uYehova ubambene neentlanga, uya kulwa nenyama yonke; abangendawo ubanikela ekreleni; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah25:32 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Yabonani, ububi buya kuphuma kolunye uhlanga, buye kolunye;"
Jeremiah25:33 Yaye ngaloo mini, abo baya koyiswa nguYehova, baya kususela kwesinye isiphelo sehlabathi ukusa kwesinye isiphelo sehlabathi; abayi kumbambazelelwa, abayi kuhlanganiswa, bangcwatywe; iya kugcinwa emhlabeni."
Jeremiah25:34 Lilani, balusi, nilile; Zigaleleni eluthuthwini, zintloko zomhlambi; kwaye uya kuwa njengento ethandekayo."
Jeremiah25:35 Abalusi baya kufuna indlela yokusaba, neenkokeli zomhlambi aziyi kusinda."
Jeremiah25:36 Ilizwi lokukhala kwabalusi liya kuvakala isikhalo sezikhulu zomhlambi, ngenxa yokuba uYehova ulitshabalalisile idlelo labo."
Jeremiah25:37 Neendawo zokuhlala zoxolo ziphangiwe ngenxa yokuvutha komsindo kaYehova.
Jeremiah25:38 Uyishiyile indawo yakhe yokuzimela njengengonyama, ngenxa yokuba ilizwe labo libe yinkangala ephanzileyo ngenxa yokuvutha komsindo womcinezeli nangenxa yomsindo wakhe."
Jeremiah26:1 Ekuqaleni kobukumkani bukaYehoyakim unyana kaYosiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, kwafika eli lizwi, liphuma kuYehova, lisithi,"
Jeremiah26:2 Wathi uYehova; Yima entendelezweni yendlu kaYehova, uthethe kuyo yonke imizi yakwaYuda, eya kuqubuda endlwini kaYehova, onke amazwi endikuwisela umthetho wokuba uwathethe kubo; ayinciphisi igama:"
Jeremiah26:3 Ukuba kunjalo, baya kuphulaphula baze baguquke, ngamnye endleleni yakhe embi, ukuze ndizisole ngobubi endicinga ukubenza kubo ngenxa yobubi bezenzo zabo."
Jeremiah26:4 Wothi kubo, uYehova uthethile; njengokungathi anindiphulaphulanga, ukuba nihambe ngomyalelo wam endiwubeka phambi kwenu;"
Jeremiah26:5 ukuba niwaphulaphule amazwi abakhonzi bam, abaprofeti, endibathumele kuni, bavuka kusasa, babathuma, anaphulaphula;"
Jeremiah26:6 Ndiza kuyenza le ndlu ibe njengeShilo ndize ndisenze esi sixeko sibe sisiqalekiso kuzo zonke iintlanga zomhlaba.
Jeremiah26:7 Beva ke uYeremiya ababingeleli, nabaprofeti, nabantu bonke, ethetha la mazwi endlwini kaYehova."
Jeremiah26:8 Kwathi, akugqiba uYeremiya ukuthetha konke awayemwisele umthetho uYehova ukuba akuthethe ebantwini bonke, bambamba ababingeleli, nabaprofeti, nabantu bonke, besithi, Inene, uya kufa."
Jeremiah26:9 Yini na ukuba uprofete egameni likaYehova, usithi, Le ndlu iya kuba njengeShilo, nesi sixeko sibe linxuwa, singabi nammi? Yaye bonke abantu bahlanganisana kuYeremiya endlwini kaYehova."
Jeremiah26:10 Bakuyiva loo nto abathetheli bakwaYuda, bemka endlwini yokumkani, benyuka baya endlwini kaYehova, bahlala phantsi ekungeneni kwesango elitsha lendlu kaYehova."
Jeremiah26:11 Ababingeleli nabaprofeti bathetha kwiinkosana nakubantu bonke, bathi: “Le ndoda ifanelwe kukufa; ngokuba uprofetele kulo mzi, njengoko nive ngeendlebe zenu."
Jeremiah26:12 Wathetha uYeremiya kubathetheli bonke nakubantu bonke, esithi, uYehova undithume ukuba ndiprofete ngale ndlu nakulo mzi onke amazwi eniwavileyo."
Jeremiah26:13 Kaloku ke, zilungiseni iindlela zenu neentlondi zenu, niliphulaphule ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wenu; yaye uYehova uya kuzohlwaya ngenxa yobubi athethe ngabo."
Jeremiah26:14 Mna, yabonani, ndisesandleni senu; yenza kum njengoko uthanda, njengoko uthanda."
Jeremiah26:15 Niyazi ke ukuba, ukuba nithe nandibulala, inene, wobeka igazi elimsulwa phezu kwenu, naphezu kwalo mzi, naphezu kwabemi bawo; ngokuba uYehova undithume kuni ukuba ndiwathethe onke la mazwi ezindlebeni zakho."
Jeremiah26:16 Bathi iinkosana nabantu bonke kubabingeleli nakubaprofeti, Le ndoda ayifanelwe sisigwebo sokufa, ngokuba ithethe kuthi egameni likaYehova uThixo wethu."
Jeremiah26:17 Kwasuka kwema ke amadoda kumadoda amakhulu elizwe, athetha kulo lonke ibandla labantu, esithi:"
Jeremiah26:18 uMikaya waseMorashe waprofeta ngemihla kaHezekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, wathi kubantu bonke bakwaYuda, Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, iZiyon iya kutyalwa njengentsimi, iYerusalem ibe ngumwewe; intaba yendlu yona ibe njengokuphakama kwehlathi."
Jeremiah26:19 Bambulala na uHezekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, namaYuda onke? Akoyikanga uYehova na, wambuza uYehova, waza uYehova wazohlwaya ngenxa yobubi abebuthethile ngabo? Ngoko ke sinokwenza ububi obukhulu kwimiphefumlo yethu."
Jeremiah26:20 Kananjalo bekukho indoda eyayiprofeta egameni likaYehova, u-Uriya unyana kaShemaya, waseKiriyati-yeharim, eprofeta ngalo mzi nangeli lizwe, ngokwamazwi onke kaYeremiya."
Jeremiah26:21 Waweva ukumkani uYehoyakim, namagorha akhe onke, nabathetheli bonke, amazwi akhe; ukumkani wafuna ukumbulala; Weva ke u-Uriya woyika, wasaba, waya eYiputa."
Jeremiah26:22 Ukumkani uYehoyakim wathumela amadoda eYiputa, uElinatan unyana ka-Akebhore, namanye amadoda eYiputa."
Jeremiah26:23 Bamkhupha u-Uriya eYiputa, bamzisa kukumkani uYehoyakim; abo bambulala ngomkhonto, isidumbu sakhe basiphosa emangcwabeni abantu nje abaqhelekileyo."
Jeremiah26:24 Ke isandla sika-Ahikam, unyana kaShafan, besinoYeremiya, ukuze banganikelwa esandleni sabantu ukuba bambulale."
Jeremiah27:1 Ekuqalekeni kobukumkani bukaYehoyakim unyana kaYosiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya, lisithi,"
Jeremiah27:2 Wathi uYehova kum; Zenzele imixokelelwane needyokhwe, uzibeke entanyeni yakho;"
Jeremiah27:3 Wazithumela kukumkani wakwaEdom, nakukumkani wakwaMowabhi, nakukumkani woonyana baka-Amon, nakukumkani waseTire, nakukumkani waseTsidon, kunye nabathunywa abafika eYerusalem kuZedekiya ukumkani kwaYuda;"
Jeremiah27:4 Wabawisela umthetho wokuba bathi kwinkosi yabo, Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Uya kuthi kubanini bakho:"
Jeremiah27:5 Ndenza umhlaba ngamandla am amakhulu nangesandla sam esoluliweyo, umntu nerhamncwa elisemhlabeni, ndawunika lowo ndibone ukulunga kwawo."
Jeremiah27:6 Kaloku ke onke la mazwe ndiwanikele esandleni sikaNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, umkhonzi wam; namarhamncwa asendle ndamnika ukuba amkhonze."
Jeremiah27:7 Zonke iintlanga ziya kumkhonza yena, nonyana wakhe, nonyana wonyana wakhe, kude kufike ixesha lelizwe lakhe, zikhonze ngaye iintlanga ezininzi nookumkani abakhulu."
Jeremiah27:8 Kuya kuthi ke, uhlanga nobukumkani obungayi kumkhonza uNebhukadenetsare yedwa, ukumkani waseBhabheli, obungayifakiyo intamo yabo edyokhweni yokumkani waseBhabheli, ndiluvelele olo hlanga, Yehova; ngekrele nangendyikitya yokufa, ndide ndibatshabalalise ngesandla sakhe."
Jeremiah27:9 Ngoko ke musani ukubaphulaphula abaprofeti benu, namatola enu, namaphupha enu, nabathandazeli benu, nabakhafuli benu, abathi kuni, Andiyi kumkhonza ukumkani waseBhabheli."
Jeremiah27:10 Kuba baniprofetela ubuxoki, ukuze nigxothwe ezweni lenu; nokuba bendiya kunigxotha, nitshabalale."
Jeremiah27:11 Ke zona iintlanga ezibeka iintamo zazo edyokhweni kakumkani waseBhabhiloni zize zimkhonze, ndiya kuzola elizweni lazo,’ utsho uYehova; baya kulityala, bahlale kulo."
Jeremiah27:12 Kananjalo uZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda ndamxelela ngokwaloo mazwi onke, ndathi, Zingeniseni iintamo zenu edyokhweni yokumkani waseBhabheli, nimkhonze yena nabantu bakhe, nobomi bakhe."
Jeremiah27:13 Kutheni na ukuba nife, wena nohlanga lwakho, ngekrele, ngendlala nangendyikitya yokufa, njengoko watshoyo uYehova ngohlanga ukuba ukumkani waseBhabhiloni akayi kumkhonza?"
Jeremiah27:14 Ngoko musani ukuwaphulaphula amazwi abaprofeti abathetha kuni, besithi, ‘Aniyi kumkhonza ukumkani waseBhabhiloni, kuba baniprofetela ubuxoki."
Jeremiah27:15 Ngokuba andibathumanga, utsho uYehova; bona baprofeta ubuxoki egameni lam; Ndonigxotha ke, ndinitshabalalise, nina nabaprofeti abaniprofetelayo."
Jeremiah27:16 Ndaphinda ndathetha kubabingeleli nakwaba bantu bonke, ndathi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi; Musani ukuwaphulaphula amazwi abaprofeti benu abaniprofetelayo, besithi, Yabona, impahla yendlu kaYehova iza kukhawuleza ibuyiselwe eBhabheli; ngokuba baniprofetela ubuxoki."
Jeremiah27:17 Musani ukubaphulaphula; mkhonzeni ukumkani waseBhabheli, niphile; bekutheni ukuze eso sixeko sitshatyalaliswe?"
Jeremiah27:18 Kodwa ukuba bangabaprofeti, yaye ilizwi likaYehova likubo, mabangene kuYehova wemikhosi, ukuze iimpahla eziseleyo endlwini kaYehova nasendlwini kakumkani wakwaYuda zingene bona neYerusalem, musani ukuya eBhabheli."
Jeremiah27:19 Kuba utsho uYehova wemikhosi ngokuphathelele iintsika nolwandle ngokuphathelele iziseko nangamasalela eempahla ezishiywe kwesi sixeko:
Jeremiah27:20 engathatyathwanga nguNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, ekumthabatheni kwakhe uYekoniya, unyana kaYehoyakim, ukumkani wakwaYuda, wamsa eYerusalem, wamsa eBhabheli, nabathetheli bonke bakwaYuda nabaseYerusalem;"
Jeremiah27:21 Ewe, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ngokusingisele kwimpahla eseleyo endlwini kaYehova, nasendlwini yokumkani wakwaYuda naseYerusalem;"
Jeremiah27:22 Baza kuthinjelwa eBhabhiloni, bahlale khona de kube yimini endibavelela ngayo,” utsho uYehova; ndiya kubanyusa khona, ndibabuyisele kule ndawo."
Jeremiah28:1 Kwangaloo mnyaka, ekuqaleni kobukumkani bukaZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, ngomnyaka wesine, ngenyanga yesihlanu, wathetha kum uHananiya, unyana womprofeti uAsiriya, waseGibheyon. Wathi endlwini kaYehova, phambi kwababingeleli nabantu bonke,"
Jeremiah28:2 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ndiyayaphula idyokhwe yokumkani waseBhabheli."
Jeremiah28:3 Emva kweminyaka emibini ndiya kuzibuyisela kule ndawo zonke iimpahla zendlu kaYehova awayezithabathe kule ndawo uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabhiloni waza wazisa eBhabhiloni.
Jeremiah28:4 Ndiza kubabuyisela kule ndawo uYekoniya unyana kaYehoyakim ukumkani wakwaYuda nabo bonke abathinjwa bakwaYuda ababeye eBhabhiloni,” utsho uYehova; kuba ndiya kuyaphula idyokhwe yokumkani waseBhabhiloni."
Jeremiah28:5 Wathi uYeremiya umprofeti kuHananiya umprofeti, emehlweni ababingeleli, nasemehlweni abantu bonke ababemi endlwini kaYehova:"
Jeremiah28:6 Wathi uYeremiya umprofeti, Amen, uyayenza le nto uYehova; uwalimisile uYehova amazwi awawaprofeteleyo, wokuba azibuyisele kule ndawo iimpahla zendlu kaYehova, neento zonke ezibe zithinjelwe eBhabheli."
Jeremiah28:7 Noko ke, niyaliva na ngoku eli lizwi ndilithethayo nisaliva naphambi kweendlebe zabo bonke abantu?"
Jeremiah28:8 Abaprofeti bamandulo ababengaphambi kwam naphambi kwakho baprofeta imfazwe, nobubi, nendyikitya yokufa, kumazwe amaninzi nanamandla amakhulu."
Jeremiah28:9 Umprofeti oprofeta uxolo, ukuba ilizwi lomprofeti libonakala, loo mprofeti uya kwaziwa ukuba nguYehova omthumileyo."
Jeremiah28:10 Waza umprofeti uHananiya wayisusa idyokhwe entanyeni kaYeremiya umprofeti waza wayaphula.
Jeremiah28:11 Wathetha uHananiya phambi kwabantu bonke, wathi, Utsho uYehova; Ndiya kwenjenje ukuyaphula idyokhwe kaNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, ezintanyeni zeentlanga zonke iminyaka emibini. Wahamba ke uYeremiya umprofeti."
Jeremiah28:12 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya umprofeti emva kokuba umprofeti uHananiya eyaphule idyokhwe entanyeni kaYeremiya umprofeti lisithi:
Jeremiah28:13 Yiya uthethe kuHananiya, uthi, uYehova uthethile; Uyaphule idyokhwe yomthi; ke uya kubenza idyokhwe yentsimbi."
Jeremiah28:14 Ngokuba utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ndibeka idyokhwe yesinyithi ezintanyeni zezo ntlanga zonke, ukuze zimkhonze uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli; ziya kumkhonza, ndimnike amarhamncwa elizwe."
Jeremiah28:15 Emva koko umprofeti uYeremiya wathi kuHananiya umprofeti: “Phulaphula, Hananiya! uYehova akalithumelanga; nisuka nilukholwe ngobuxoki olu hlanga."
Jeremiah28:16 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndiya kukulahla emhlabeni; uya kufa kulo nyaka, ngokuba efundise ukugwilika kuYehova."
Jeremiah28:17 Wafa ke umprofeti uHananiya ngenyanga yesixhenxe yaloo nyaka.
Jeremiah29:1 Ngawo la amazwi encwadi, awayithumelayo uYeremiya umprofeti eYerusalem, kumadoda amakhulu asele ekuthinjweni, nakubabingeleli, nakubaprofeti, nakubantu bonke, awabafudusayo uNebhukadenetsare eYerusalem ukuya eBhabhiloni;"
Jeremiah29:2 Emva koko ukumkani uYekoniya nokumkanikazi nabalungiseleli neenkosana zakwaYuda nezaseYerusalem nabachweli nabakhandi besinyithi bemka eYerusalem;
Jeremiah29:3 ngesandla sikaElasa unyana kaShafan, noGemariya unyana kaHilekiya, awathi uZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda wabathumela eBhabheli kuNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, esithi,"
Jeremiah29:4 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Kubathinjwa bonke endibafudusileyo eYerusalem, ndabafudusela eBhabheli;"
Jeremiah29:5 Yakhani izindlu, nihlale kuzo; tyalani imiyezo nidle iziqhamo zayo;"
Jeremiah29:6 Zekani abafazi, nizale oonyana neentombi; bathabatheleni abafazi oonyana benu, nizendisele amadoda iintombi zenu, zizale oonyana neentombi; ukuze wande khona, unganciphi."
Jeremiah29:7 Nizamele uxolo lomzi endinifudusele kuwo, niwuthandazele kuYehova; ngokuba niya kuba noxolo ngoxolo lwawo."
Jeremiah29:8 Ngokuba utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Musani ukulahlekiswa ngabaprofeti benu, namatola enu aphakathi kwenu, ningawaphulaphuli amaphupha enu eniwaphuphayo;"
Jeremiah29:9 Ngokuba baniprofetela ubuxoki egameni lam; andibathumanga, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah29:10 Kuba uYehova uthe, Yakuzaliseka iminyaka emashumi asixhenxe eBhabheli, ndize ndikhangele kuni, ndilimise ilizwi lam elilungileyo, ndinibuyisele kule ndawo."
Jeremiah29:11 Ngokuba ndiyazazi iingcinga endizicingayo ngani, utsho uYehova: iingcinga zoxolo, ezingezizo ezobubi, ukuba ndininike ithemba."
Jeremiah29:12 Niya kwandula ke nibize kum, nithandaze kum, ndiniphulaphule."
Jeremiah29:13 Niya kundifuna, nindifumane, ukuba nithe nandifuna ngentliziyo yenu yonke;"
Jeremiah29:14 Ndofunyanwa phakathi kwenu, utsho uYehova; Ndiya kukubuyisa ukuthinjwa kwenu, ndinibuthe ezintlangeni zonke, nasezindaweni zonke endanichithangala kuzo, utsho uYehova; ndinibuyisele endaweni endanifudusela kuyo."
Jeremiah29:15 Ngokuba nisithi, uYehova usivelisele abaprofeti eBhabheli;"
Jeremiah29:16 Yazini into ayithethayo uYehova ngokumkani ohleli etroneni kaDavide, nakubantu bonke abahlala kwesi sixeko, nangabantakwenu abangazange baye nawe ekuthinjweni;"
Jeremiah29:17 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Yabonani, ndibathumela ikrele, nendlala, nendyikitya yokufa, ndibenze babe njengamakhiwane amabi, angenakudliwa ngokuba mabi kunene;"
Jeremiah29:18 Ndiya kubatshutshisa ngekrele, ngendlala, nangendyikitya yokufa, ndibanyikimise ezikumkanini zonke zehlabathi, babe yintshabhiso, nommangaliso, nesigculelo, nesingcikivo phakathi kwabo zonke iintlanga endibagxothele kuzo."
Jeremiah29:19 Ngenxa enokuba bengawaphulaphulanga amazwi am, utsho uYehova, endawathuma kubo ngabakhonzi bam abaprofeti, ndavuka kusasa, ndabathuma; aniphulaphulanga; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah29:20 Liveni ilizwi likaYehova, nonke nina bathinjwa, endinithabathileyo eYerusalem, ndabasa eBhabheli."
Jeremiah29:21 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ngoAhabhi unyana kaKolaya, nakuZedekiya unyana kaMahaseya, abaprofeta ubuxoki egameni lam; Yabona, ndiyabanikela esandleni sikaNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli; ubabulale phambi kwakho;"
Jeremiah29:22 Yaye ngokuqinisekileyo baya kuqalekiswa ngabo bonke abathinjwa bakwaYuda abaseBhabhiloni, besithi, ‘uYehova uya kukwenza ube njengoZedekiya nanjengoAhabhi owatshisa ukumkani waseBhabhiloni emlilweni;"
Jeremiah29:23 ngenxa enokuba benze ububi kwaSirayeli, babakrexeza abafazi babamelwane babo, bathetha amazwi obuxoki egameni lam, endingabawiselanga methetho ngawo nam ndiyazi, kwaye ndilingqina, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah29:24 Thetha kuShemaya waseMonelam, uthi,"
Jeremiah29:25 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ngenxa enokuba uthumele iincwadi egameni lakho kubantu bonke abaseYerusalem, nakuZefaniya unyana kaMahaseya, umbingeleli, nakubabingeleli bonke; kwaye wathi:"
Jeremiah29:26 uYehova ukumisele ukuba ube ngumbingeleli esikhundleni sombingeleli uYehoyada ukuba ube ngumlindi endlwini kaYehova, ngenxa yokuba nabani na ophambeneyo nozenza umprofeti, umvalela entolongweni aze avalelwe."
Jeremiah29:27 Kutheni ke ngoko ungamkhalimelanga uYeremiya waseAnatoti, ozenza umprofeti kuni?"
Jeremiah29:28 Kungenxa yoko le nto wasithumela eBhabheli, esithi, Kuya kuba lixesha elide ukuthinjwa; yakhani izindlu nihlale kuzo; tyalani imiyezo nidle iziqhamo zayo."
Jeremiah29:29 Umbingeleli uZefaniya wayifunda le leta ngoxa umprofeti uYeremiya wayephulaphule.
Jeremiah29:30 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya, lisithi:"
Jeremiah29:31 Thumela kubo bonke abathinjwa, uthi, Utsho uYehova ngoShemaya waseNehelam; Ngokuba eniprofete uShemaya, ndingamthumanga mna, wanenza nakholwa bubuxoki."
Jeremiah29:32 Ngako oko, wathi uYehova, Yabona, ndimvelela uShemaya waseNehelam nembewu yakhe; akayi kuba nandoda iya kuhlala phakathi kwaba bantu; angayi kubona okulungileyo endikwenzela abantu bam, utsho uYehova; ngokuba wafundisa ukugwilika kuYehova."
Jeremiah30:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya, lisithi:"
Jeremiah30:2 Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Wabhale encwadini onke amazwi endiwathethileyo kuwe;"
Jeremiah30:3 Ngokuba, uyabona, iyeza imihla, utsho uYehova, endiya kukubuyisa ukuthinjwa kwabantu bam amaSirayeli namaYuda,” utsho uYehova; yaye ndiza kubabuyisela kwilizwe endalinika ookhokho babo, yaye baya kulidla ilifa."
Jeremiah30:4 Ngawo la ke amazwi, awawathethayo uYehova ngoSirayeli noYuda."
Jeremiah30:5 Kuba uYehova wathi, Sive ilizwi eligubhisayo, elokunkwantya, asililo eloxolo."
Jeremiah30:6 Uyabuza ngoku, ubonile na ukuba indoda leyo, ikhulelwe? Yini na ukuba ndibone abafo bonke, izandla zabo zisemanqeni abo njengomfazi ozalayo, ubuso bonke buthe matshamatsha?"
Jeremiah30:7 yho! ngokuba inkulu loo mini, akubangakho namnye unjengayo; lixesha lembandezelo kuYakobi; ke wena uya kukhululwa kuyo."
Jeremiah30:8 Kuba ngaloo mini, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, ndiya kuyaphula idyokhwe yakhe entanyeni yakho, ndiziqhawule izitropu zakho, bangabi samkhonza oonyana bolunye uhlanga;"
Jeremiah30:9 bakhonze uYehova uThixo wabo, noDavide ukumkani wabo, endiya kubavelisela yena."
Jeremiah30:10 Ke wena musa ukoyika, wena mkhonzi wam Yakobi, utsho uYehova; musa ukoyika, Sirayeli; ngokuba, uyabona, ndiya kukuhlangula kwakude, nembewu yakho ezweni ethinjelwe kulo; yaye uYakobi uya kubuya aphumle, aphumle, kungabikho bani uya kumothusa."
Jeremiah30:11 Ngokuba ndinawe, utsho uYehova, ukuba ndikuhlangule; ukuba ndithe ndazitshabalalisa zonke iintlanga endakuphangalalisela kuzo, andiyi kutshabalalisa wena; kodwa ndokhalimela kude kube ngoku, ndingakushiyi msulwa."
Jeremiah30:12 Kuba utsho uYehova ukuthi, Inxeba lakho alinakuphiliswa, inxeba lakho libuhlungu."
Jeremiah30:13 Akukho bani unokulinda ukuba ukhonkxwe; awunayeza.
Jeremiah30:14 Bonke abakuthandayo bakulibele; abafuni Wena; ngokuba ndikubethile ngobetho lotshaba, ngokobetho lwabanobujorha, ngenxa yobuninzi bobubi bakho; ngokuba zininzi izono zenu."
Jeremiah30:15 Uyalila na ngenxa yokubandezeleka kwakho? Asikuko nokuba uyabulala umvandedwa wakho, ngenxa yobuninzi bobugwenxa bakho; ngenxa yobuninzi bezono zenu, ndenzé kwanjalo kuni."
Jeremiah30:16 Ngoko ke bonke abakudlayo baya kutshabalala; kwaye zonke iintshaba zakho ziya kuya ekuthinjweni, ngasinye sazo; yaye nabani na okuphangayo uya kuphangwa, nabo bonke abo bakuphangayo ndiya kubanikela babe lixhoba."
Jeremiah30:17 Ngokuba ndiya kukuphilisa, ndiya kuyiphilisa imivumbo yakho, utsho uYehova; ngokuba bathi ungowasemzini, besithi, iZiyon ayifunwa mntu."
Jeremiah30:18 Wathi uYehova, Yabona, ndiya kuzibuyisa iintente zikaYakobi, ndiya kuzibabalwa ngezakhiwo zakhe; yaye isixeko siya kwakhiwa phezu kwethemba laso, nebhotwe liya kuma endleleni yaso."
Jeremiah30:19 Kwaye ukusuka kubo kuya kuqala umbulelo nelizwi labo bavuyayo; ndibandise, bangabi mbalwa; Ndiya kuphinda ndibazukise, yaye abayi kujongelwa phantsi."
Jeremiah30:20 Oonyana babo boba njengokwamandulo, nebandla labo lomelele phambi kwam, ndibavelele bonke abaxini babo."
Jeremiah30:21 Iingangamsha zabo ziya kuvela kubo, umlawuli wabo aphume kubo; ndimsondeze, asondele kum; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah30:22 Niya kuba ngabantu bam, mna ndibe nguThixo wenu;"
Jeremiah30:23 Yabonani, umoya ovuthuzayo weNkosi, uya kuzalisa; liya kuwa phezu kweentloko zabangendawo;"
Jeremiah30:24 Awuyi kubuya umsindo kaYehova, ade ayenze, ade ayimise iminkqangiyelo yentliziyo yakhe; ekupheleni kosuku kufuneka unikele ingqalelo kuyo."
Jeremiah31:1 Ngelo xesha, utsho uYehova, ndiya kuba nguThixo wezizwe zonke zakwaSirayeli, zibe ngabantu bam bona."
Jeremiah31:2 Wathi uYehova, Bababalwa entlango abantu abasindileyo ekreleni; uSirayeli, xa ndaya kumphumza."
Jeremiah31:3 uYehova wazityhila kum kwakudala, wathi, Ewe, ndikuthandile ngothando olungunaphakade; ngenxa yoko ndinitsalele imfesane."
Jeremiah31:4 Ndiya kubuya ndikwakhe, wakheke, ntombi inguSirayeli; uya kubuya uzihombise ngeentente zakho, uphume umemelele."
Jeremiah31:5 Uya kuqhubeka utyala izidiliya ezintabeni zakwaSamari; abalimi baya kutyala baze bazitye njengezinto eziqhelekileyo.
Jeremiah31:6 Ngokuba kuya kufika imini, abaya kumemelela ngayo abalusi ezintabeni zakwaEfrayim, besithi, Sukani nime, sinyuke siye eZiyon kuYehova, uThixo wethu."
Jeremiah31:7 Ngokuba utsho uYehova ukuthi, Vumani kuYakobi, gcobani phakathi kookumkani beentlanga; vakalisani, dumisani, nithi, Basindise, Yehova, abantu bakho, amasalela akwaSirayeli."
Jeremiah31:8 Yabona, ndiyabazisa bevela ezweni lasentla, ndibahlanganisele eziphelweni zehlabathi; isihlwele esikhulu siya kubuyela khona."
Jeremiah31:9 Baya kuza beneenyembezi, ndibakhokelele ngemithandazo; Ndiya kubakhapha emijelweni yamanzi, emendweni othe tye, abangayi kukhubeka kuwo; kuba ndinguyise kaSirayeli, yaye uEfrayim lizibulo lam."
Jeremiah31:10 Liveni ilizwi likaYehova, zintlanga, nilivakalise nakwiziqithi ezikude, uthi, Umchithachithi kaSirayeli uya kuwabutha, awagcine njengomalusi womhlambi wakhe."
Jeremiah31:11 Kuba uYehova wamhlangula uYakobi waza wamhlangula esandleni salowo unamandla kunaye.
Jeremiah31:12 Ngako oko baya kuza bacule ngeZiyon, begalela ukulunga kukaYehova, kunye nengqolowa, newayini entsha, neoli, nempahla emfutshane, neenkomo; umphefumlo wabo uya kuba njengomyezo onyakanyiswa yimvula; kwaye abayi kulila konke konke."
Jeremiah31:13 Iya kwandula intombi ibe nemihlali ekungqungqeni, amadodana namadoda amakhulu kunye;"
Jeremiah31:14 Ndowanelisa imiphefumlo yababingeleli ngeoli, bahluthe abantu bam zizinto zam ezilungileyo; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah31:15 Wathi uYehova, Kuvakele izwi eRama, isikhalo nesikhalo esikrakra; uRakeli, owayekhalela abantwana bakhe, akavuma kuthuthuzelwa ngenxa yabantwana bakhe, ngokuba babengekho."
Jeremiah31:16 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Lithinteleni ilizwi lenu, lingakhali, ningalili amehlo enu, ngokuba umvuzo womsebenzi wenu uya kuba khona, utsho uYehova; yaye baya kubuya kwilizwe lotshaba."
Jeremiah31:17 Kunethemba ekupheleni kwakho, utsho uYehova, ukuba oonyana bakho baya kubuyela emideni yabo."
Jeremiah31:18 Ndimvile ngenene uEfrayim ekhala, esithi; Wandibetha, ndaqeqeshwa njengenkunzi yenkomo, engaqhelananga nedyokhwe; ngokuba wena, Yehova, unguThixo wam."
Jeremiah31:19 Ndathi ndakuzohlwaya, ndazohlwaya; ndathi xa ndiza kufa, ndabetha esinqeni sam; Ndadana, ewe, ndadana, ngokuba bendithwele ihlazo lobutsha bam."
Jeremiah31:20 Ngunyana wam na uEfrayim? Ndingumntwana onomtsalane? Kuba oko ndithethe kakubi ngaye, ndisamkhumbula; ke ngoko, isisu sam siphazamisekile nguye; inene, ndiya kuba nenceba kuye, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah31:21 Zenzele imiqondiso yendlela, zenzele iimfumba eziphakamileyo; yibhekise intliziyo yakho emendweni, endleleni ohambe ngayo; buya, ntombi inguSirayeli, buyela emizini yakowenu."
Jeremiah31:22 Kunini na unxaxha, ntombi yotshaba? ngokuba uYehova udale into entsha ehlabathini: Umfazi uya kuchasa indoda."
Jeremiah31:23 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Noko ke, baya kuthetha olu lwimi ezweni lakwaYuda, nasezixekweni zalo, ekukubuyiseni kwam ukuthinjwa kwabo; uYehova akusikelele, wena sakhiwo sobulungisa, nawe ntaba engcwele!"
Jeremiah31:24 Aya kuhlala amaYuda nemizi yawo yonke kunye, abalimi nabafuyi."
Jeremiah31:25 Kuba ndiyawanelisa umphefumlo otyhafileyo, yaye ndiyawanelisa wonke umphefumlo osentlungwini."
Jeremiah31:26 Ngaphezu koko, ndavuka, ndabona; ubuthongo bam bebumnandi kum."
Jeremiah31:27 Yabona, kuza imihla, utsho uYehova, endiya kuhlwayela ngayo imbewu yabantu nembewu yenkomo, utsho uYehova, indlu kaSirayeli nendlu kaYuda;"
Jeremiah31:28 Kuya kuthi ke, ndibaphaphele, ukuba ndikrazule, ndiqhekeze, nditshabalalise, ndibacudise; ndobaphaphela ukuba ndakhe, ndityale; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah31:29 Ngelo xesha akuyi kuba sathiwa, Aba ooyise badle iidiliya ezibolileyo, amazinyo oonyana ahexa;"
Jeremiah31:30 elowo uya kufa ngenxa yobubi bakhe; umntu odla iidiliya ezimuncu, uya kuba buthelezi amazinyo akhe;"
Jeremiah31:31 Yabona, kuza imihla, utsho uYehova, endiya kwenza ngayo umnqophiso omtsha nendlu kaSirayeli; nakwindlu kaYuda;"
Jeremiah31:32 kungekhona ngenxa yomnqophiso endawenzela ooyise, ekubabambeni kwam ngesandla, ukuba ndibakhuphe ezweni laseYiputa; bawaphule umnqophiso wam, ndibe ndiyindoda kubo; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah31:33 Nguwo ke lo umnqophiso, endiya kuwenza nendlu kaSirayeli; Emveni kwaloo mihla, utsho uYehova, ndiya kuwubeka umyalelo wam embilinini yabo, ndiwubhale ezintliziyweni zabo; yena uya kuba nguThixo wabo, bona babe ngabantu bam."
Jeremiah31:34 Abayi kuba safundisana elowo umzalwana wakhe, esithi, Mazini uYehova; ngokuba bonke bephela baya kundazi, kuthabathela komncinane kuse koyena mkhulu phakathi kwabo; ngokuba ndiya kubaxolela ubugwenxa babo ndingabi sasikhumbula isono sabo."
Jeremiah31:35 Utsho uYehova, onika ilanga libe sisikhanyiso emini, onika imithetho yenyanga neenkwenkwezi njengokukhanya ebusuku, uMlatyuzisi wolwandle, ekugqumeni kwamaza alo; NguYehova wemikhosi igama lakhe;"
Jeremiah31:36 Ukuba ithe yasuka loo mithetho phambi kwam, utsho uYehova, bophela oonyana bakaSirayeli bangabi luhlanga phambi kwam ngamaxa onke."
Jeremiah31:37 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ukuba lingaba nokulinganiswa izulu phezulu, zibe nokulinganiswa iziseko zehlabathi phantsi komhlaba, nam ndobalahla yonke imbewu kaSirayeli, ngenxa yento yonke abayenzileyo; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah31:38 Yabonani, iyeza imihla, utsho uYehova, oya kuthi umzi lowo wakhelwe uYehova, kuthabathele enqabeni ende kaHananeli, kuse esangweni lembombo;"
Jeremiah31:39 luphume ulutya lokulinganisa phambi kwayo, uye endulini yeGarebhe, lujike luye ePooko;"
Jeremiah31:40 Yonke intlambo yezidumbu nothuthu nawo onke amasimi ukuya kutsho entlanjeni yomsinga waseKidron, ukuya kutsho kwimbombo yeSango Lamahashe ngasempuma, yoba yinto engcwele kuYehova; aliyi kuphinda lonakale, lingabi sachithwa."
Jeremiah32:1 Ilizwi likaYehova elafikayo kuYeremiya, ngomnyaka weshumi kaZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda: loo mnyaka ke ngumnyaka weshumi elinesibhozo kaNebhukadenetsare."
Jeremiah32:2 Ngenxa yokuba ngelo xesha iintendelezo zokumkani waseBhabhiloni zaziyingqingile iYerusalem, yaye umprofeti uYeremiya wayevalelwe kwintendelezo yentolongo yendlu kakumkani wakwaYuda."
Jeremiah32:3 Ngenxa enokuba uZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda wambhalela, wathi, Yini na ukuba uprofete, usithi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndiyawunikela lo mzi esandleni sokumkani waseBhabheli, ukuba awuthimbe;"
Jeremiah32:4 uZedekiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, akayi kusinda esandleni samaKaledi, kodwa ngokuqinisekileyo uya kunikelwa esandleni sokumkani waseBhabhiloni yaye umlomo wakhe uya kuthetha umlomo nomlomo naye, namehlo akhe abone amehlo akhe;"
Jeremiah32:5 amse uZedekiya eBhabheli, ahlale khona ndide ndimvelele, utsho uYehova; nokuba nithe nalwa namaKaledi, aniyi kuphumelela."
Jeremiah32:6 uYeremiya wathi: “Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Jeremiah32:7 Yabona, uHanameli unyana kaShalum, uyihlokazi, uza kuwe, athi, Yithenge intsimi yam eseAnatoti, ngokuba kulunge kuwe ukuyithenga."
Jeremiah32:8 Weza kum uHanameli, unyana kabawokazi, phambi kweyadi yentolongo ngokwelizwi likaYehova, wathi kum, Yithenge intsimi yam eseAnatoti, esezweni lakwaBhenjamin; Ilifa lelakho, usindiso lolwakho; uzithengele yona. Ndaza ke ndazi ukuba lilizwi likaYehova elo."
Jeremiah32:9 Ndawuthenga umhlaba kuHanameli, unyana kabawokazi, eAnatoti, ndamnika iishekele zesilivere ezilishumi elinesixhenxe."
Jeremiah32:10 Ndabubhala ubungqina ndaza ndabuqinisekisa ndaza ndathabatha amangqina ndaza ndayilinganisela imali yakhe esikalini.
Jeremiah32:11 Ndaluthabatha ke ngoko uxwebhu lwentengo, lwatywinwa ngokusemthethweni, lwatywinwa ngokusemthethweni, ndaluvula."
Jeremiah32:12 uBharuki unyana kaNeriya, unyana kaMahaseya, ndamnika phambi kukaHanameli unyana kabawokazi, nasemehlweni amangqina abesayine incwadi yentengiso. Onke amaYuda awayephila kwinkundla yentolongo."
Jeremiah32:13 Ndamwisela umthetho uBharuki phambi kwawo, ndathi:"
Jeremiah32:14 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Thabatha ezi ncwadi, incwadi yentengo, itywiniwe, ivuliwe; zibeke engqayini yodongwe, ukuze zihlale iintsuku ezininzi."
Jeremiah32:15 Ngokuba utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Kuya kuthatyathwa izindlu, namasimi, nezidiliya, kweli lizwe;"
Jeremiah32:16 Ndalunikela uxwebhu lwentengo kuBharuki unyana kaNeriya, ndathandaza kuYehova ndathi:"
Jeremiah32:17 Owu Yehova! yabona, walenza izulu nehlabathi ngamandla akho amakhulu, nangesandla sakho esolukileyo, akukho ukuthintela."
Jeremiah32:18 Unemfesane kumawaka, ubuphindezela ubugwenxa booyise esondweni loonyana babo emva kwabo; igama lakhe nguThixo omkhulu, onamandla, uYehova wemikhosi;"
Jeremiah32:19 Umkhulu ngomnqweno wakho, uyasebenza ngamandla, ngokuba amehlo akho aphezu kweendlela zonke zoonyana babantu, ukuba unike ulowo ngokwendlela yakhe, nangokweziqhamo zezenzo zakhe;"
Jeremiah32:20 owenza imiqondiso nezimanga ezweni laseYiputa unanamhla, kumaSirayeli naphakathi kwezinye iintlanga; wazenzela igama njengoko kunjalo namhla;"
Jeremiah32:21 Wabakhupha abantu bakho amaSirayeli kwilizwe laseYiputa ngemiqondiso nezimanga ngesandla esomeleleyo ngesandla esoluliweyo nangoloyiko olukhulu;
Jeremiah32:22 Wabanika eli lizwe wabafungelayo ooyise, ukuba uya kubanika, ilizwe elibaleka amasi nobusi;"
Jeremiah32:23 Bangena ke, balihlutha; kodwa abaliphulaphula izwi lakho, abahambanga ngomyalelo wakho; abakwenza konke owabawisela umthetho ngako ukuba bakwenze; ngenxa yoko nibazisele obu bubi bonke."
Jeremiah32:24 Yabona, iintaba zingenile kulo mzi, ukuba ziwuthimbe; isixeko sanikelwa esandleni samaKaledi ayesilwa, ngenxa yekrele, nendlala, nendyikitya yokufa; kwaye khangela kwaye khangela."
Jeremiah32:25 Wathi kum, Nkosi Yehova, zithengele intsimi ngemali, ungqinise amangqina; ngenxa yokuba isixeko sasinikelwe esandleni samaKhaledi."
Jeremiah32:26 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya, lisithi:"
Jeremiah32:27 Yabona, ndinguYehova, uThixo wenyama yonke; ingaba ikhona into efana nam?"
Jeremiah32:28 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndiyawunikela lo mzi esandleni samaKaledi, nasesandleni sikaNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, ukuba awungene."
Jeremiah32:29 AmaKhaledi alwa nesi sixeko aya kuza asitshise esi sixeko aze asitshise ndawonye nezindlu aqhumisela phezu kophahla lukaBhahali yaye athululela iminikelo ethululwayo kwabanye oothixo ukuze andigculele.
Jeremiah32:30 Ngokuba oonyana bakaSirayeli noonyana bakaYuda baye besenza ububi bodwa phambi kwam kwasebuncinaneni babo; ngokuba oonyana bakaSirayeli bendiqumbisile ngezenzo zezandla zabo; utsho uYehova.
Jeremiah32:31 Ngenxa enokuba lo mzi waba yintlekisa kum ngenxa yomsindo wam nomsindo wam, kususela ekuwakhiweni kwawo kude kube namhla; ukuba ndiyisuse ebusweni bam,"
Jeremiah32:32 ngenxa yobubi bonke boonyana bakaSirayeli, noonyana bakaYuda, ababenzayo ukuze bandiqumbise, bona, nookumkani babo, nabathetheli babo, nababingeleli babo, nabaprofeti babo, namadoda akwaYuda, nabemi basezweni iYerusalem."
Jeremiah32:33 Bandinikela ikhosi, abandinikela ikhosi; nangona ndandibafundisa ukuvuka ekuseni ndize ndibafundise, kodwa abazange baphulaphule ukuze bamkele umyalelo."
Jeremiah32:34 Babeka izinto zabo ezinezothe endlwini ebizwa ngegama lam, ukuze bayenze inqambi;"
Jeremiah32:35 Bakha iindawo eziphakamileyo zikaBhahali kwintlambo yonyana kaHinom, ukuze batshise oonyana babo neentombi zabo emlilweni ngenxa kaMoleki; endingabawiselanga mthetho ngayo, engathanga qatha entliziyweni yam, ukuba benze eli masikizi, ukuba bawagrogrise amaYuda."
Jeremiah32:36 Kaloku ke, utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, ngenxa yalo mzi, uthi ngawo, Uya kunikelwa esandleni sokumkani waseBhabheli ngekrele, nangendlala, nangendyikitya yokufa;"
Jeremiah32:37 Yabona, ndiyababutha emazweni onke, endabachithachitha kuwo ngomsindo wam, nangomsindo wam, nangobushushu bam; ndiya kubabuyisela kule ndawo, ndibahlalise ngoxolo."
Jeremiah32:38 Kwaye baya kuba ngabantu bam, mna ndibe nguThixo wabo;"
Jeremiah32:39 ndibanike intliziyo enye, nendlela enye, ukuze bandoyike imihla yonke, ngenxa yabo, nangenxa yabantwana babo emva kwabo;"
Jeremiah32:40 Ndiya kubenzela umnqophiso ongunaphakade, ukuba ndingatyeki kubo ekwenzeni okulungileyo; ndibeke ukundoyika entliziyweni yabo, ukuze bangandishiyi."
Jeremiah32:41 Ewe, ndoba nemihlali ngabo, ndibenzele okulungileyo, ndibatyale kweli lizwe ngentliziyo yam yonke, nangomphefumlo wam wonke."
Jeremiah32:42 Ngokuba wathi uYehova, Njengoko ndabaziselayo aba bantu bonke obu bubi bukhulu kangaka, ndenjenjalo ukubazisela konke okulungileyo endikuthethayo ngabo."
Jeremiah32:43 Kuya kuthengwa imihlaba kweli lizwe nithi, Liyintlango, elingenamntu nankomo; wanikelwa esandleni samaKaledi."
Jeremiah32:44 Abantu baya kuthenga imihlaba ngemali baze batyikitye amaxwebhu baze bawatywine, bathabathe amangqina kwilizwe lakwaBhenjamin nakwiindawo ezijikeleze iYerusalem nakwizixeko zakwaYuda nakwizixeko ezisezintabeni nakwizixeko zakwaBhenjamin intlambo yomlambo oqukuqelayo nakwiidolophana ezikude kwintlambo yomhlaba nemizi engasezantsi, ngokuba ndiya kuliguqula iqashiso layo, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah33:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya okwesibini, esentendelezweni yentolongo, lathi,"
Jeremiah33:2 utsho uYehova, uMenzi wabo, uYehova, uMenzi wabo, ukuba akuqinise; uYehova ligama lakhe;"
Jeremiah33:3 Ubundibizile, ndakusabela, ndikubonise izinto ezinkulu nezinqabileyo, ongazaziyo."
Jeremiah33:4 Ngokuba utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ngazo izindlu zalo mzi, nangezindlu zookumkani bakwaYuda, abawe ezintabeni, nalikrele;"
Jeremiah33:5 Baza kulwa namaKaledi, kodwa ukuze bazalise izidumbu zabantu endababulala ngomsindo wam nangomsindo wam, nangenxa yobubi babo bonke ndabusithelisa ubuso bam kwesi sixeko."
Jeremiah33:6 Yabona, ndibazisela usindiso nonyango, ndibaphilise, ndibatyhilele uxolo oluninzi nenyaniso."
Jeremiah33:7 Ndiza kubabuyisa abathinjiweyo bakwaYuda nabathinjwa bakwaSirayeli ndize ndibakhe njengangaphambili.
Jeremiah33:8 Ndiya kubahlambulula ebubini babo bonke, abone ngabo kum; yaye ndiza kubaxolela bonke ubugwenxa babo abandone ngabo nabandone ngabo."
Jeremiah33:9 Kuya kuba ligama lam lokuvuya, indumiso, nembeko kum, phambi kwezizwe zonke zehlabathi eziya kukuva konke okulungileyo endiwenzela kona; yaye baya koyika baze bangcangcazele ngenxa yako konke okulungileyo nangenxa yayo yonke impumelelo endimenzela yona."
Jeremiah33:10 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Kuya kubuya kuviwe kule ndawo, le nto nithi iya kuba yintlango, ingabi nankomo, emizini yakwaYuda, nasezitratweni zaseYerusalem, kube senkangala, ingenamntu, ingenamntu umhlali ongenasilwanyana;"
Jeremiah33:11 Ilizwi lemihlali nezwi lemivuyo; izwi lomyeni nezwi lomtshakazi, nezwi labathi, Dumisani uYehova wemikhosi, ngokuba elungile uYehova; ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe, nabazisa imibingelelo yendumiso endlwini kaYehova. Ngokuba ndiya kukubuyisa ukuthinja kwelizwe njengoko bekunjalo ekuqaleni; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah33:12 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Kule ndawo ilinxuwa, ingenamntu, ingenankomo, nasemizaneni yonke, kuya kubuya kubekho abathengisi abalusela imihlambi yabo."
Jeremiah33:13 Emizini yasezintabeni, nasemizini yasezihlanjeni, nasemizini yelasezantsi, nasezweni lakwaBhenjamin, nakwee ngeenxa zonke eYerusalem, nasemizini yakwaYuda, iya kubuya idlule impahla emfutshane phantsi kwezandla zakhe oxela iindaba ezilungileyo yabonani, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah33:14 Yabona, kuza imihla, utsho uYehova, endiya kulimisa ilizwi elilungileyo, endalithethayo kwindlu kaSirayeli nendlu kaYuda."
Jeremiah33:15 Ngaloo mihla nangelo xesha ndiya kumhlumisela uDavide iHlumelo lobulungisa; yaye uya kwenza okusesikweni nobulungisa ehlabathini.
Jeremiah33:16 Ngaloo mihla uya kukhululwa ngentlawulelo uYuda, neYerusalem yona iya kuhlala ikhuselekile; yaye lilo eli igama aya kubizwa ngalo: uYehova bubulungisa bethu."
Jeremiah33:17 Kuba kusithiwa nguYehova, uDavide akadinganga mntu wakuhlala etroneni yendlu kaSirayeli;"
Jeremiah33:18 Kanjalo, ababingeleli babaLevi mabangabi nandoda phambi kwam esondeza iminikelo etshiswayo neminikelo yokudla okulula, enikela imibingelelo rhoqo."
Jeremiah33:19 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya, lisithi:"
Jeremiah33:20 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ukuba uthe wawaphula umnqophiso wam wemini, nomnqophiso wam wobusuku, akwabakho mini nabusuku ngexesha labo;"
Jeremiah33:21 Ke ngoko umnqophiso wam noDavide umkhonzi wam mawuwaphulwe, angabi nanyana ungukumkani etroneni yakhe; nabaLevi, nababingeleli, abakhonzi bam."
Jeremiah33:22 Njengokuba izulu lingenakubalwa, ingenakulinganiswa intlabathi yolwandle, ndiya kwenjenjalo ukuyandisa imbewu kaDavide, umkhonzi wam, nabaLevi abandikhonzayo."
Jeremiah33:23 Ngapha koko, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya, lisithi:"
Jeremiah33:24 Akukuboni na abakuthethayo aba bantu, xa babesithi, Izizukulwana ezibini, awazinyulayo uYehova, uzicekisile? bakubagxeka abantu bam, bangabi saba luhlanga phambi kwabo."
Jeremiah33:25 Wathi uYehova, Umnqophiso wam ubunjengemini nobusuku, ukuba andiyi kuyimisa imimiselo yezulu neyehlabathi;"
Jeremiah33:26 Ndoyilahla ke nembewu kaYakobi noDavide umkhonzi wam, ukuba ndingathabathi namnye wasembewini yakhe oyinkosi yembewu ka-Abraham noIsake noYakobi; ngokuba ndiya kukubuyisa ukuthinjwa kwabo, nenceba yabo phezu kwabo."
Jeremiah34:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya, akubon’ ukuba uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, enempi yakhe yonke, nezikumkani zonke zelimiweyo phantsi kobukumkani bakhe, ziyilwa neYerusalem zonke iintlanga nemizi yayo, lisithi,"
Jeremiah34:2 Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Yiya, uthethe kuZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, uthi kuye, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndikuthabathe; Uyabona, lo mzi ndiya kuwunikela esandleni sokumkani waseBhabheli, awutshise ngomlilo."
Jeremiah34:3 Akuyi kusinda esandleni sakhe, kodwa uya kubanjwa, unikelwe esandleni sakhe; amehlo akho aya kuwabona amehlo okumkani waseBhabhiloni, yaye uya kuthetha ngomlomo wakho nangomlomo wakho, yaye uya kuya eBhabhiloni."
Jeremiah34:4 Live ilizwi likaYehova, Zedekiya, kumkani wakwaYuda; Utsho uYehova ngani ukuthi, Aniyi kufa likrele,"
Jeremiah34:5 uya kufa unoxolo; ngokutshiselwa kooyihlo, ookumkani bokuqala ababekho ngaphambi kwakho bakutshise ngesiqhumiso; baya kukhalela wena, besithi, Oh! kuba ndithethe ilizwi,’ utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah34:6 Wawathetha ke uYeremiya umprofeti onke la mazwi kuZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, eYerusalem."
Jeremiah34:7 Xa umkhosi wamajoni kakumkani waseBhabhiloni wawusilwa neYerusalem nazo zonke izixeko zakwaYuda ezazisele, iLakishe neAsheki, ngenxa yokuba ezi zixeko zokusabela zazisele kwizixeko zakwaYuda."
Jeremiah34:8 Lilo eli ilizwi elafikayo likaYehova kuYeremiya, emveni kokuba ukumkani uZedekiya wenza umnqophiso nabantu bonke ababeseYerusalem, ukuba bakhale ukuba bakhululwe;"
Jeremiah34:9 elowo alikhulule ikhoboka lakhe, elowo alikhulule ikhobokazana lakhe elingumHebhere nokuba ngumHebherekazi; ukuze kungabikho namnye umkhonzayo, ongumYuda ongumzalwana wakhe."
Jeremiah34:10 Zakuva zonke iinkosana nabantu bonke ababengene emnqophisweni ukuba elowo akhulule ikhoboka lakhe, elowo ikhobokazana lakhe, angabi sabakho, bathobela; bahamba ke."
Jeremiah34:11 Kodwa emva koko bajika baza babuyisa ikhoboka nekhobokazana ababebakhulule, babacinezela ngamakhoboka namakhobokazana."
Jeremiah34:12 Lafika ke ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya, livela kuYehova, lisithi:"
Jeremiah34:13 Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ndenza umnqophiso nooyihlo, ekubakhupheni kwam ezweni laseYiputa, endlwini yobukhoboka, ndathi,"
Jeremiah34:14 Ekupheleni kweminyaka esixhenxe, elowo makashiye umzalwana wakhe ongumHebhere lowo kwathengiswa kuwe; ukuba uthe wakhonza iminyaka emithandathu, makahambe eze kuwe;"
Jeremiah34:15 Nangoku ke najika nenza okuthe tye emehlweni am ngokuthi, elowo makakhulule ummelwane wakhe; yaye wenza umnqophiso phambi kwam endlwini ebizwa ngegama lam."
Jeremiah34:16 Nabuya ke nalenza inqambi igama lam, nabuyela elowo ikhoboka lakhe, nabuyela elowo ikhobokazana lakhe, enalikhulula ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo, nazinikela kubo, ukuba babe ngabakhonzi kuni, nabakhonzi benu."
Jeremiah34:17 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova ukuthi, Anindiphulaphulanga ngokuthi nibize inkululeko, elowo ngenxa yomzalwana wakhe; yabonani, ndininika inkululeko, utsho uYehova, yokuphuma ekreleni, nasendyikityeni yokufa, nasendlaleni; ndiya kukuphakamisa ezikumkanini zonke zehlabathi;"
Jeremiah34:18 Ndowanikela amadoda awaphule umnqophiso wam, angawagcinanga amazwi omnqophiso awawenzayo phambi kwam, abeya kulityatya ithole, acanda phakathi kwalo;"
Jeremiah34:19 neenkosana zakwaYuda neenkosana zaseYerusalem, abalungiseleli nababingeleli nabo bonke abantu belizwe abadlula phakathi kwenxalenye yethole lenkomo;"
Jeremiah34:20 ndibanikele esandleni seentshaba zabo, nasesandleni sabafuna umphefumlo wabo; izidumbu zabo zibe kukudla kweentaka zezulu nokwamarhamncwa."
Jeremiah34:21 Ndiza kumnikela uZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda nabathetheli bakhe esandleni seentshaba zabo nasesandleni sabafuna umphefumlo wabo nasesandleni somkhosi wokumkani waseBhabhiloni ophuma kuni.
Jeremiah34:22 Yabona, ndiwisa umthetho, utsho uYehova, ndibabuyisele kulo mzi; baya kulwa nawe, bathimbe, bakutshise ngomlilo; nezixeko zakwaYuda ndiya kuzenza zibe yinkangala ephanzileyo, engenammi."
Jeremiah35:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya ngemihla kaYehoyakim unyana kaYosiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, lisithi,"
Jeremiah35:2 Yiya endlwini yamaRekabhi, uthethe nawo, uwangenise endlwini kaYehova, kwelinye igumbi, uwaseze iwayini."
Jeremiah35:3 Ndandula ke ndathabatha uYashaniya unyana kaYeremiya unyana kaHabhasiniya nabazalwana bakhe noonyana bakhe bonke nendlu yonke yamaRekabhi;
Jeremiah35:4 Ndabazisa endlwini kaYehova, kwigumbi loonyana bakaHanan, unyana kaIgedaliya, umfo wakwaThixo, elalikwigumbi leenkosana elaliphezu kwegumbi likaMahaseya unyana wakhe kaSalum, yaba umgcini-sango:"
Jeremiah35:5 Ndabeka phambi koonyana bendlu yamaRekabhi iimbiza ezizele yiwayini nezitya ndaza ndathi kubo: “Selani iwayini.
Jeremiah35:6 Bathi bona, Asiyi kusela wayini, ngokuba uYonadabhi unyana kaRekabhi, ubawo, wasiwisela umthetho, wathi, Ze ningaseli wayini naphakade, nina noonyana benu;"
Jeremiah35:7 ningakhi ndlu, ningahlwayeli mbewu, ningatyala nesidiliya, ningabi nanto yakwenza; hlalani ezintenteni yonke imihla yenu; ukuze niphile imihla emininzi emhlabeni eningabaphambukeli kuwo."
Jeremiah35:8 Saliphulaphula ke ilizwi likaYonadabhi unyana kaRekabhi, ubawo, kuko konke awasiwisela umthetho ngako ukuba singaseli wayini yonke imihla yethu, thina, nabafazi bethu, noonyana bethu, neentombi zethu;"
Jeremiah35:9 nokuba bangasakhela izindlu ukuba sihlale kuzo; kananjalo asinasidiliya, nantsimi nambewu;"
Jeremiah35:10 Ke thina sasihlala ezintenteni, saphulaphula, senza ngako konke awasiwisela umthetho ngako uYonadabhi ubawo."
Jeremiah35:11 Kwathi, ekungeneni kukaNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli kweli lizwe, sathi, Yizani, singene eYerusalem ngenxa yemikhosi yamaKaledi, ngenxa yemikhosi yama-Aram; hlalani eYerusalem."
Jeremiah35:12 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya, lisithi:"
Jeremiah35:13 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ewe, uthi kumadoda akwaYuda, nakubemi baseYerusalem, Aniwuphulaphulanga na lo mthetho, ukuba niwaphulaphule amazwi am? utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah35:14 Azaliseka amazwi kaYonadabhi, unyana kaRekabhi, awabawisela oonyana bakhe ukuba bangaseli wayini; ngokuba abaseli nanamhla, bawuthobela umthetho kayise kodwa anindiphulaphulanga."
Jeremiah35:15 Ndathumela kuni bonke abakhonzi bam, abaprofeti, abavuka kusasa, babathuma, besithi, Guqukani, elowo endleleni yakhe embi, nilungise iintlondi zenu, ningalandeli thixo bambi; musani ukuzenza khonzani, nihlale ezweni endalinika nina nooyihlo; kodwa anindiphulaphulanga, anaphulaphula nam."
Jeremiah35:16 Ngokuba oonyana bakaYonadabhi unyana kaRekabhi bawugcinile umthetho kayise, abebawisele umthetho ngawo; ke olu hlanga alundiphulaphulanga."
Jeremiah35:17 Ngako oko utsho uYehova, uThixo wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Yabonani, ndiwazisela amaYuda, nabemi bonke baseYerusalem, bonke ububi endibuthethileyo kubo, ngenxa enokuba ndithethile kubo kodwa wabatshabalalisa abeva; Ndababiza, kodwa abazange baphendule."
Jeremiah35:18 Wathi uYeremiya kwindlu yamaRekabhi, Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ngokuba uwuthobele umthetho kaYonadabhi uyihlo, wayigcina yonke imithetho yakhe, wenza ngako konke abewise umthetho ngako;"
Jeremiah35:19 Ngako oko utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, uYonadabhi, unyana kaRekabhi, akayi kuswela mntu wokuma phambi kwam ngonaphakade."
Jeremiah36:1 Ngomnyaka wesine wobukumkani bukaYehoyakim unyana kaYosiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya, lisithi,"
Jeremiah36:2 Thabatha incwadi esongwayo, ubhale kuyo onke amazwi endiwathethileyo kuwe, ngokusingisele kuSirayeli, nakuYuda, nakuzo zonke iintlanga, kususela kwimini endathetha ngayo kuwe, kususela kwimihla kaYosiya kude kube ngoku usuku."
Jeremiah36:3 Mhlawumbi indlu kaYuda ingabuva bonke ububi endicinga ukubenza kubo; ukuze babuye elowo endleleni yakhe embi; ukuze ndibuxolele ubugwenxa babo nesono sabo.
Jeremiah36:4 uYeremiya wabiza uBharuki unyana kaNeriya, wawabhala encwadini uBharuki onke amazwi kaYehova, awaphuma emlonyeni kaYeremiya, abemxelele yona."
Jeremiah36:5 uYeremiya wamwisela uBharuki umthetho, esithi, Mna ndivalelwe; andiyi kungena endlwini kaYehova;"
Jeremiah36:6 Yiya ke, uwalese eloo ncwadi uyibhale emlonyeni wam, amazwi kaYehova, apho bawevayo abantu endlwini kaYehova ngomhla wokuzila ukudla; funda apho asaphulaphule onke amaYuda asuka ezilalini zawo."
Jeremiah36:7 Mhlawumbi baya kuwuzisa umthandazo wabo phambi koYehova baze babuye, ngamnye endleleni yakhe ephosakeleyo, ngenxa yokuba ingqumbo nomsindo awuthethileyo uYehova ngolu hlanga mkhulu."
Jeremiah36:8 uBharuki unyana kaNeriya wenza ngokomyalelo kaYeremiya umprofeti, wawalesa encwadini amazwi kaYehova endlwini kaYehova."
Jeremiah36:9 Ngomnyaka wesihlanu wobukumkani bukaYehoyakim unyana kaYosiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, ngenyanga yesithoba, kwavakaliswa ukuba bazile ukudla bonke abantu baseYerusalem, nabo bonke abantu abaphuma ezweni lakwaYuda iilali zesixeko. uYuda waya eYerusalem."
Jeremiah36:10 Wawalesa uBharuki amazwi kaYeremiya encwadini, endlwini kaYehova, egumbini likaGemariya, unyana kaShafan, umbhali, entendelezweni ephezulu, ekungeneni kwesango elitsha lendlu kaYehova. uYehova, phambi kwabantu bonke."
Jeremiah36:11 Waweva uMika, unyana kaGemariya, unyana kaShafan, onke amazwi kaYehova encwadini."
Jeremiah36:12 Ngoko wehla waya endlwini kakumkani kwigumbi lonobhala, waza wazibona zonke iinkosana zihleli apho, uElishama unobhala noDelaya unyana kaShemaya noElinatan unyana ka-Akibhore noGemariya unyana kaShafan. noZedekiya unyana kaHananiya, nabathetheli bonke;"
Jeremiah36:13 Wawathetha uMika kuwo onke amazwi abewevile ekuleseni kukaBharuki incwadi phambi kwabantu.
Jeremiah36:14 Bonke abathetheli bathumela kuBharuki uYehudi unyana kaNetaniya, unyana kaShelemiya, unyana kaKushi, besithi, Incwadi leyo uyilesileyo phambi kwabantu, yiphathe ngesandla sakho, uze. uBharuki unyana kaNeriya wayithabatha incwadi ngesandla sakhe, weza kubo."
Jeremiah36:15 Bathi kuye, Khawuhlale, uyilese ezindlebeni zethu. Wafunda ke uBharuki ezindlebeni zabo."
Jeremiah36:16 Kwathi, bakuweva onke loo mazwi, boyika bobabini, bathi kuBharuki, Lo mazwi siya kumxelela ukumkani onke."
Jeremiah36:17 Kwaye bambuza uBharuki baza bathi: “Sixelele, wawabhala njani na onke la mazwi aphuma emlonyeni wakhe?"
Jeremiah36:18 Wabaphendula uBharuki, wathi, Loo mazwi wawathetha kum onke loo mazwi ngomlomo wakhe, ndawabhala encwadini ngeinki."
Jeremiah36:19 Bathi abathetheli kuBharuki, Hamba uye kuzimela, wena noYeremiya; kwaye musa ukwazisa nabani na apho ukhoyo."
Jeremiah36:20 Bangena entendelezweni yokumkani, bayibeka incwadi esongwayo egumbini likaElishama umbhali, bawathetha onke amazwi ukumkani ubephulaphule."
Jeremiah36:21 Ukumkani wathuma uYehudi, ukuba ayithabathe incwadi esongwayo; wayithabatha ke egumbini likaElishama umbhali. uYehudi wafunda apho wayephulaphule ukumkani, nazo zonke iinkosana zazimi phambi kokumkani."
Jeremiah36:22 Ukumkani wayehleli endlwini yasebusika ngenyanga yesithoba, umlilo usavutha phambi kwakhe."
Jeremiah36:23 Kwathi, uYehudi wathabatha izikhwebu ezintathu nokuba zine, wazinqunqa ngemela, waziphosa emlilweni obekusasa, yada yawela indlebe yonke emlilweni obukuyo nakusasa."
Jeremiah36:24 Abankwantyanga, abazikrazulanga iingubo zabo, kwanabakhonzi bokumkani ababeweva loo mazwi onke."
Jeremiah36:25 Ke uElinatan noDelaya noGemariya bambongoza ukumkani ukuba angayitshisi incwadi esongwayo, akabaphulaphula."
Jeremiah36:26 Ukumkani wabawisela umthetho ooYerakemeli unyana wokumkani, noSeraya unyana ka-Asriyeli, noShelemiya unyana ka-Abhedeli, ukuba bambambe uBharuki umbhali, noYeremiya umprofeti; uYehova wabazimeza."
Jeremiah36:27 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya emva kokuba ukumkani eyitshisile incwadi esongwayo namazwi abewabhalile uBharuki emlonyeni kaYeremiya, lisithi:"
Jeremiah36:28 Thabatha enye incwadi, ubhale kuyo onke amazwi okuqala, abesencwadini yokuqala awayitshisayo uYehoyakim ukumkani wakwaYuda."
Jeremiah36:29 Uze uthi kuYehoyakim ukumkani wakwaYuda, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Utsho uYehova ukuthi, NdinguYehova; Uyitshisile incwadi, wathi, Yini na ukuba ubhale kuyo, usithi, Ukumkani waseBhabheli uya kuza na, alonakalise eli lizwe, atshabalalise abantu neenkomo kulo?"
Jeremiah36:30 Ngako oko, wathetha uYehova ngoYehoyakim ukumkani wakwaYuda, wathi, Akuyi kubakho bani uya kuhlala etroneni kaDavide; isidumbu sakhe siya kulahlelwa elwandle emini, ebusuku yingqele."
Jeremiah36:31 Kwaye ndiya kumvelela yena nezicaka zakhe nezicaka zakhe ngenxa yobugwenxa babo; yaye ndiza kubazisela bona nabemi baseYerusalem namadoda angendawo akwaYuda konke endikuthethileyo ngabo; ke abeva.
Jeremiah36:32 uYeremiya wathabatha enye incwadi esongwayo, wayinika uBharuki unyana kaNeriya, umbhali; owawabhalayo kuyo, ephuma emlonyeni kaYeremiya, onke amazwi encwadi awayitshisayo uYehoyakim ukumkani wakwaYuda ngomlilo; kongezelelwa kuwo amazwi amaninzi anjengawo."
Jeremiah37:1 Ukumkani uZedekiya, unyana kaYosiya, waba ngukumkani esikhundleni sikaKoniya unyana kaYehoyakim, owabekwa nguNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli ezweni lakwaYuda."
Jeremiah37:2 Kodwa yena nabakhonzi bakhe okanye abantu belizwe abazange bawaphulaphule amazwi kaYehova awayewathethile ngoYeremiya umprofeti.
Jeremiah37:3 Ukumkani uZedekiya wathuma ooYehukali unyana kaShelemiya, noZefaniya, unyana kaMahaseya, umbingeleli, kuYeremiya umprofeti, esithi, Masithandaze kuYehova uThixo wethu."
Jeremiah37:4 uYeremiya ebengena ephuma ebantwini, ngokuba bebengamfakanga entolongweni."
Jeremiah37:5 Emva koko imikhosi kaFaro yemka eYiputa, yaye akuva elo lizwi amaGalati awayengqinge iYerusalem, ayishiya iYerusalem."
Jeremiah37:6 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya umprofeti, lisithi:"
Jeremiah37:7 Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Uze uthi kukumkani wakwaYuda, lowo uthume kum ukuba andibuze; Yabonani, imikhosi kaFaro ephume isiza kuninceda, iya kubuyela ezweni layo eYiputa;"
Jeremiah37:8 AmaKaledi aya kubuya alwe nesi sixeko, asithimba, asitshise ngomlilo."
Jeremiah37:9 Wathi uYehova, Musani ukuzikhohlisa, nithi, AmaKaledi aya kusishiya ngonaphakade, ngokuba akayi kumka."
Jeremiah37:10 Kuba, ukuba nibe niyixabele yonke impi yamaKaledi alwayo nani, kwasala kubo abangxwelerhiweyo, kodwa bebeya kuma elowo ententeni yakhe, bawutshise lo mzi ngomlilo."
Jeremiah37:11 Ekuphumeni komkhosi wamaKaledi eYerusalem ngenxa yokoyika umkhosi kaFaro.
Jeremiah37:12 Wemka uYeremiya eYerusalem, esiya ezweni lakwaBhenjamin, ukuba azinyulele phakathi kwabantu."
Jeremiah37:13 Kwathi, esesangweni lakwaBhenjamin, nanko kukho umthetheli wabasiki, ogama linguIriya, unyana kaShelemiya, unyana kaHananiya; wambamba uYeremiya umprofeti, wathi, Uwela esandleni samaKaledi."
Jeremiah37:14 Wathi uYeremiya, Bubuxoki; andizinikezele kumaKaledi. Akazange amphulaphule, ngoko uIriya wamthabatha uYeremiya wamsa kwiinkosana."
Jeremiah37:15 Ngoko iinkosana zamqumbela uYeremiya, zamoyisa zaza zamfaka entolongweni endlwini yonobhala uYonatan, ngenxa yokuba wayeyenze indlu yentolongo."
Jeremiah37:16 Wangena uYeremiya equleni nasezindlwini; wahlala khona uYeremiya imihla emininzi.
Jeremiah37:17 Wathumela ukumkani uZedekiya ukuba amkhuphe; Ukumkani wambuza endlwini yakhe ngasese, wathi, Kukho lizwi na liphuma kuYehova? Wathi uYeremiya, Ewe, ngokuba usithi, Uya kunikelwa esandleni sokumkani waseBhabheli."
Jeremiah37:18 Ngaphezu koko, uYeremiya wathi kuKumkani uZedekiya: “Ndone ngantoni na kuwe okanye kubakhonzi bakho okanye kolu hlanga, ukuba nindifake entolongweni nje?"
Jeremiah37:19 Baphi na abaprofeti benu ababeniprofetela, besithi, Ukumkani waseBhabheli akayi kunihlasela, akayi kulihlasela eli lizwe?"
Jeremiah37:20 Ngako oko, yiva, nkosi yam, nkosi yam; Ngamana umthandazo wam wamkelekile emehlweni akho; ukuze ungandivumeli ndibuyele endlwini kaYonatan umbhali, ukuze ndingafele khona."
Jeremiah37:21 Ke kaloku ukumkani uZedekiya wayalela uYeremiya ukuba abuyele kwiYadi yentolongo, amnike iqhekeza lesonka esisesitratweni sombhaki yonke imihla, de siphele isonka esixekweni. Ngoko uYeremiya wahlala eyadini yentolongo."
Jeremiah38:1 Ke kaloku uShefatiya unyana kaMatan, noGedaliya, unyana kaPashkure, noYukali unyana kaShelemiya, noPashure unyana kaMalekiya, baweva amazwi abewathetha uYeremiya ebantwini bonke, esithi,"
Jeremiah38:2 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Bonke abaseleyo kulo mzi bobulawa likrele, nayindlala, nayindyikitya yokufa; ophuma aye kumaKaledi wophila; ngokuba umphefumlo wakhe uya kuba lixhoba, aphile."
Jeremiah38:3 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Esi sixeko siya kunikelwa ngonaphakade esandleni somkhosi wokumkani waseBhabhiloni, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo uya kusithimba."
Jeremiah38:4 Bathi ke abathetheli kukumkani, Siyakucela kuwe, ukuba mayibulawe le ndoda, ngokuba wenjenje ukuxengxeza izandla zamagorha aseleyo kulo mzi, nezandla zabantu bonke, ngokuthetha ngokwaloo mazwi; yada indoda yenza njalo engafuni okulungileyo kwesi sizwe, kodwa ezimbi."
Jeremiah38:5 Wathi ukumkani uZedekiya, Yabonani, usezandleni zenu, ngokuba akangokumkani onako ukwenza nantoni na kuni."
Jeremiah38:6 Bandula ke bamthabatha uYeremiya baza bamphosa equleni likaMalekiya unyana kakumkani kakumkani, elalikwintendelezo yentolongo; bamehlisa uYeremiya ngeentsontelo. Bekungekho manzi equleni, ludaka lodwa; ngoko ke, uYeremiya watshona eludakeni."
Jeremiah38:7 Xa uEbhedi-melege, umKushi, omnye wabalungiseleli ababesendlwini kakumkani, weva ukuba uYeremiya ufakwe equleni; Ukumkani wahlala esangweni lakwaBhenjamin;"
Jeremiah38:8 Waphuma uEbhedi-meleki endlwini yokumkani, wathetha kukumkani, esithi,"
Jeremiah38:9 Nkosi yam kumkani, la madoda enze ububi ngako konke akwenzileyo kuYeremiya umprofeti, lowo amphosayo equleni; unjengobulawa yindlala kuloo ndawo akuyo, ngokuba akusekho sonka kulo mzi."
Jeremiah38:10 Ukumkani wamwisela umthetho uEbhedi-meleki wakwaKushi, wathi, Thabatha apha amadoda amashumi mathathu, umkhuphe uYeremiya umprofeti emhadini, engekafi."
Jeremiah38:11 Wawathabatha ke amadoda lawo uEbhedi-melege, wangena endlwini yokumkani ngaphantsi kwengxowa yobuncwane, wathabatha khona izikhondo zelaphu neempahla ezibolileyo, wazithobela emhadini kuYeremiya ngeentsontelo."
Jeremiah38:12 Wathi uEbhedi-meleki wakwaKushi kuYeremiya, Beka la malaphu amadala namalaphu abolileyo ezingxoweni zakho phantsi kweentambo. Wenjenjalo uYeremiya."
Jeremiah38:13 Bandula ke bamtsala uYeremiya ngeentsontelo baza bamkhupha emhadini, yaye uYeremiya waqhubeka ehlala ephambi kweyadi yentolongo."
Jeremiah38:14 Wathumela ukumkani uZedekiya, wamzisa kuye uYeremiya umprofeti, ekumnyango wesithathu wendlu kaYehova; Wathi ukumkani kuYeremiya, Ndiya kukubuza zwi-nye; ungafihli nto kum."
Jeremiah38:15 Wathi uYeremiya kuZedekiya, Ukuba ndithe ndakuxelela, akuyi kundibulala na? nokuba ndikucebise anindiva na?"
Jeremiah38:16 Ukumkani uZedekiya wamfungela uYeremiya ngasese, esithi, uYehova ovayo, owasenzela lo mphefumlo, andiyi kukubulala, andiyi kukunikela esandleni sala madoda angawuboniyo umphefumlo wakho."
Jeremiah38:17 Wathi uYeremiya kuZedekiya, Utsho uYehova, uThixo wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Yabona, ndinguYehova, uThixo wemikhosi, Thixo kaSirayeli. Ukuba uthe waphuma waphuma waya kubathetheli bokumkani waseBhabheli, wophila umphefumlo wakho, nalo mzi ungatshiswa ngomlilo; niphile wena nendlu yakho."
Jeremiah38:18 Ke ukuba anithanga niphume niye kubathetheli bokumkani waseBhabheli, lo mzi wonikelwa esandleni samaKaledi, awutshise ngomlilo, ke nina aniyi kusinda esandleni sawo."
Jeremiah38:19 Wandula ke uKumkani uZedekiya wathi kuYeremiya: “Ndiyawoyika amaYuda athe awela kumaKhaledi, hleze andinikele esandleni sawo aze andigculele."
Jeremiah38:20 Wathi uYeremiya, Akayi kukusindisa. Liphulaphuleni ilizwi likaYehova endinixelela lona; uya kuphila kakuhle, uphile umphefumlo wakho."
Jeremiah38:21 Ke ukuba uthe akwavuma ukuphuma, lilo eli ilizwi andibonise lona uYehova:"
Jeremiah38:22 Yabona, bonke abafazi abaseleyo endlwini yokumkani wakwaYuda baya kusiwa kwiinkosana zokumkani waseBhabheli, bathi bona, Abahlobo bakho bakuxabele, bakoyisa; zitshone eludakeni iinyawo zenu, zijike."
Jeremiah38:23 Ke ngoko, bonke abafazi bakho nabantwana bakho baya kubanikela kumaKaledi; yaye akuyi kusinda esandleni sawo, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo uya kubanjwa sisandla sokumkani waseBhabhiloni; awutshise lo mzi ngomlilo."
Jeremiah38:24 Wathi uZedekiya kuYeremiya, La mazwi makangaziwa mntu, ukuze ungafi."
Jeremiah38:25 Ukuba ke bathe bakuva abathetheli ukuba ndithethile kuwe, beza kuwe, bathi kuwe, Khawusixelele oko ukuthethileyo kukumkani; musa ukusifihla kuthi, asiyi kukubulala; nento athe wakuxelela yona ukumkani:"
Jeremiah38:26 uthi kubo, Ndisicelile isicelo sam kukumkani, ukuze angandivumeli ndibuyele endlwini kaYonatan, ndifele khona."
Jeremiah38:27 Beza kuYeremiya bonke abathetheli, bambuza; wabaxelela ngokwaloo mazwi onke abemwisele umthetho ngawo ukumkani. Bayeka ukuthetha naye; ngokuba loo nto ayiqondwanga."
Jeremiah38:28 uYeremiya wahlala phambi kweyadi yentolongo kwada kwayimini eyathinjwa ngayo iYerusalem, waza waba lapho ekuthinjweni kweYerusalem."
Jeremiah39:1 Ngomnyaka wesithoba wobukumkani bukaZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, ngenyanga yeshumi, uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli wayingqinga iYerusalem, nomkhosi wakhe wonke, wayingqinga."
Jeremiah39:2 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinamnye kaZedekiya, ngenyanga yesine, ngosuku lwesithoba enyangeni leyo, wawiswa umzi."
Jeremiah39:3 Zangena ke zonke iinkosana zokumkani waseBhabheli, zahlala esangweni eliphakathi: ooNergali-saretsere, noSamgarnebho, noSarsegim, noRabhesarisi, noNergali-tseretsere, noRabhege, nabanye abathetheli bokumkani waseBhabheli."
Jeremiah39:4 Wababona uZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, namadoda onke okulwa, basaba baphuma phakathi komzi ebusuku ngendlela yomyezo wokumkani, ngesango eliphakathi kweendonga zombini, baphuma phandle kwindlela ecacileyo."
Jeremiah39:5 Umkhosi wamaKaledi wabasukela, wamthimba uZedekiya ezinkqantosini zaseYeriko; emva kokuba embambile, amzisa kuNebhukadenetsare, ukumkani waseBhabhiloni, eRibhela kwilizwe laseHamati, apho waba ngumgwebi wakhe."
Jeremiah39:6 Wandula ukumkani waseBhabhiloni wababulala oonyana bakaZedekiya uRibhela phambi kwamehlo akhe; zabulala zonke izidwangube zakwaYuda ukumkani waseBhabheli.
Jeremiah39:7 Ngaphezu koko, wamkrukra amehlo uZedekiya, wamkhonkxa ngemixokelelwane ukuze amse eBhabhiloni."
Jeremiah39:8 AmaKaledi ayitshisa indlu yokumkani, nezindlu zabantu, azidiliza neendonga zeYerusalem."
Jeremiah39:9 Wawathabatha uNebhuzaradan umthetheli wabasiki, wabathabatha amasalela abantu ababesele esixekweni, nabaseleyo, wabafudusela eBhabheli, nabanye abantu;"
Jeremiah39:10 Ke uNebhuzaradan, umthetheli wabasiki, wabashiya ezweni lakwaYuda inxenye yabantu abazizisweli, ababengenanto, wabanika izidiliya namasimi ngelo xesha."
Jeremiah39:11 uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli wamwisela umthetho uNebhuzaradan, umthetheli wabasiki, ngoYeremiya, esithi,"
Jeremiah39:12 Mbambe, umgcine, ungamenzi nto imbi; kodwa nenze kuye njengoko athethayo kuni."
Jeremiah39:13 Wathuma uNebhuzaradan umthetheli wabasiki, benoNebhusabhanon, noRabhesarisi, noNergali-saretsere, umRabhege, nabathetheli bonke bokumkani waseBhabheli;"
Jeremiah39:14 Bathumela ke, bamthabatha uYeremiya entendelezweni yentolongo, bamnikela kuGedaliya, unyana ka-Ahikam, unyana kaShafan, ukuba ambuyisele endlwini yakhe; ke ngoko, wahamba waya kuhlala phakathi kwabantu."
Jeremiah39:15 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya ngoxa wayevalelwe eyadini yentolongo, lisithi:"
Jeremiah39:16 Yiya uthethe kuEbhedi-melege umKushi, uthi, Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli; Yabona, ndiwushumayeza lo mzi ububi, asiwulungele; ziya kuzaliseka phambi kwenu ngaloo mini."
Jeremiah39:17 Ke mna ndiya kunisindisa ngaloo mini,’ utsho uYehova, yaye akuyi kunikelwa ezandleni zabantu oboyikayo."
Jeremiah39:18 Kuba ngokuqinisekileyo ndiya kukusindisa, yaye akuyi kuwa likrele, kodwa umphefumlo wakho uya kuba lixhoba lakho, ngenxa yokuba ukholose ngam,’ utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah40:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya, ekumziseni kwakhe uNebhuzaradan, umthetheli wabasiki, ekhonkxiwe phakathi kwabathinjwa bonke baseYerusalem nabakwaYuda, ababefudusiwe kude ekuthinjweni eBhabhiloni."
Jeremiah40:2 Umthetheli wabasiki wamthabatha ke uYeremiya, wathi kuye, uYehova uThixo wakho uthethe obu bubi ngale ndawo;"
Jeremiah40:3 Waza ke uYehova wakwenza njengoko wakuthethayo; ngokuba nonile kuYehova, analiphulaphula izwi lakhe; ngenxa yoko yaba le nto."
Jeremiah40:4 Yabona, namhlanje ndiya kuyikhulula imixokelelwane ebisesandleni sakho; Ukuba kuthe kwalunga kuwe ukuya nam eBhabheli, yiza; ndoninyamekela kakuhle; ke ukuba kubi emehlweni akho ukuya nam eBhabheli, yiyeke; uyabona, ihlabathi liphela liphambi kwakho; apho kuthe kwalunga emehlweni akho ukuba uye khona, yiya khona."
Jeremiah40:5 Uthe engekabuyi, wathi, Buyela kuGedaliya, unyana ka-Ahikam, unyana kaShafan, lowo ukumkani waseBhabheli ammiseleyo ukuba abe ngumphathi wemizi yakwaYuda, uhlale naye kude kube sekufeni izizwe; apho kubonakala kufanelekileyo ukuba uye khona. Ingqwayi-ngqwayi yabalindi yamnika ukutya nomvuzo, yamkhulula."
Jeremiah40:6 uYeremiya waya kuGedaliya unyana ka-Ahikam eMizpa; waya wahlala naye phakathi kwabantu ababesele elizweni.
Jeremiah40:7 Beva bonke abathetheli beintendelezo zelizwe, bona namadoda abo, ukuba ukumkani waseBhabheli umise uGedaliya unyana ka-Ahikam, ukuba abe ngumlawuli welizwe, umise amadoda, nabafazi, nabantwana ekunyamekeleni kwakhe nabasweleyo belizwe, ababengabathinjelwa eBhabheli;"
Jeremiah40:8 Beza ke kuGedaliya uMizpa, onguIshmayeli, unyana kaNetaniya, noYohanan noYonatan, oonyana bakaKareha, noSeraya, unyana kaTanumet, noonyana bakaEfayi, noMonetofa, noYeshaniya unyana ka. Owu waseMahaka, bona namadoda abo."
Jeremiah40:9 uGedaliya unyana ka-Ahikam, unyana kaShafan, wabafungela namadoda abo, esithi, Musani ukoyika ukuwakhonza amaKaledi; hlalani kweli lizwe, nikhonze ukumkani waseBhabheli, konilungela."
Jeremiah40:10 Mna ke, yabona, ndihlala eMizpa ukuze ndikhonze amaKhaledi aya kuza kuthi; kodwa wena, qokelela iwayini neziqhamo zasehlotyeni neoli uze uzigalele ezityeni zakho uze uhlale kwizixeko zakho ozoyisile."
Jeremiah40:11 Kwangokunjalo, eva onke amaYuda awayekwaMowabhi, noonyana baka-Amon, namaEdom, nabebekumazwe onke, ukuba ukumkani waseBhabheli uwashiyile amasalela akwaYuda, nokuba umisele unyana kaGedaliya ukuba abe likrele ityala kubo ka-Ahikam, unyana kaShafan;"
Jeremiah40:12 Ke onke amaYuda abuya kuzo zonke iindawo awayethinjelwe kuzo aza eza kwilizwe lakwaYuda kuGedaliya eMizpa aqokelela iwayini eninzi neziqhamo zasehlotyeni ezininzi.
Jeremiah40:13 Ngaphezu koko, uYohanan unyana kaKareya nabo bonke abaphathi-mkhosi ababekwelo lizwe beza kuGedaliya eMizpa."
Jeremiah40:14 Wathi kuye, Uyazi na ukuba uBhahali, ukumkani woonyana baka-Amon, uthume uIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya, ukuba akubulale? Kodwa uGedaliya unyana ka-Ahikam akazange abakholelwe."
Jeremiah40:15 Waza uYohanan unyana kaKareya wathetha kuGedaliya ngasese eMizpa, wathi: “Mandimbulale uIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya, kungabikho bani waziyo; Yini na ukuba ade akubulale, ukuze kuvakaliswe onke amaYuda ahlanganiseneyo kuwe, atshatyalaliswe amasalela akwaYuda?"
Jeremiah40:16 Wathi uGedaliya unyana ka-Ahikam kuYohanan unyana kaKareha, Musa ukuyenza loo nto, ngokuba uthetha ngobuqhophololo ngoIshmayeli."
Jeremiah41:1 Ngenyanga yesixhenxe, kweza uIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya, unyana kaElishama, owendlu yokumkani, nabathetheli bokumkani, enamadoda alishumi, kuGedaliya unyana ka-Akikam, eMitspe; yaye apho badla isonka ndawonye eMisepa."
Jeremiah41:2 Wesuka ke uIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya, namadoda alishumi abenaye, bambulala uGedaliya, unyana ka-Ahikam, unyana kaShafan, ngentshuntshe; bambulala, lowo ubemwisele ukumkani waseBhabheli yiba yirhuluneli ilizwe uye."
Jeremiah41:3 uIshmayeli wawabulala onke amaYuda abenaye, noGedaliya, noMitspa, namaKaledi afumanekayo khona, namadoda okulwa."
Jeremiah41:4 Ngosuku lwesibini emva kokumbulala kwakhe uGedaliya, kwakungekho mntu waziyo,"
Jeremiah41:5 kweza abanye abavela kwaShekem, eShilo naseSamariya, amadoda angamashumi asibhozo, echetyiwe iindevu zawo, neempahla zawo zikrazulwe yaye zichetyiwe, ephethe iminikelo neziqhumiso ezandleni zawo, ukuze azizise endlwini kaYehova."
Jeremiah41:6 Waphuma eMizpa uIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya, eya kuwakhawulela, emana emana edanduluka; waqubisana nawo, wathi kuwo, Yizani kuGedaliya unyana ka-Ahikam."
Jeremiah41:7 Bakufika phakathi esixekweni, uIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya wababulala waza wabaphosa emhadini, yena namadoda awayenaye."
Jeremiah41:8 Ke kuwo kwafunyanwa amadoda alishumi, awathi kuIshmayeli, Musa ukusibulala, ngokuba sinobuncwane kweli lizwe: ingqolowa, nerhasi, neoli, nobusi. Wayindulula, akababulala phakathi kwabazalwana babo."
Jeremiah41:9 Umhadi awazilahlela kuwo uIshmayeli zonke izidumbu zamadoda awawabulalayo ngenxa kaGedaliya, ngumhadi awawenzayo ukumkani uAsa, ngenxa yokumoyika kwakhe uBhasha ukumkani wakwaSirayeli; waza uIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya wayizalisa ngababuleweyo."
Jeremiah41:10 Waza uIshmayeli wabathimba yonke intsalela yabantu ababeseMizpa, iintombi zikakumkani nabo bonke abantu ababesele eMizpa, abo uNebhuzaradan umphathi wamafanankosi wababeka phantsi kolawulo lukaGedaliya unyana ka-Ahikam; noIshmayeli unyana waseNetaniya wabafudusa, wemka waya koonyana baka-Amon."
Jeremiah41:11 Weva uYohanan unyana kaKareha, nabathetheli bonke bentendelezo, ababenaye, bonke ububi abenzileyo uIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya."
Jeremiah41:12 Bawathabatha onke amadoda, baya kulwa noIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya, bamfumana emanzini amaninzi aseGibheyon."
Jeremiah41:13 Kwathi, akumbona uYohanan unyana kaKariya, nabathetheli bonke bemikhosi ababenaye, onke amadoda abenoIshmayeli, avuya."
Jeremiah41:14 Ajika ke onke amadoda awayemthimbile uIshmayeli eMizpa, abuya eza kuYohanan unyana kaKareha."
Jeremiah41:15 Ke uIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya wabaleka, enamadoda asibhozo kuYohanan, waya koonyana baka-Amon."
Jeremiah41:16 uYohanan unyana kaKareha wathabatha kunye naye bonke abathetheli bempi ababenaye, namasalela onke abantu, awabakhululayo wabakhululayo kuIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya, eMizpa, ekuzaleni kwakhe uGedaliya unyana wakhe ka-Akikame, owabulawayo ewe, amadoda okulwa, nabafazi, nabantwana, namathenwa, awayebabuyisele eGibheyon;"
Jeremiah41:17 Ngoko bemka baya kuhlala kumzi waseKihamam kufuphi neBhetelehem ukuze bangene eYiputa.
Jeremiah41:18 Ngenxa yamaKhaledi, ngenxa yokuba ayewoyika, ekubeni uIshmayeli unyana kaNetaniya wamxabelayo uGedaliya unyana ka-Akimkam, lowo wayemiswe ngukumkani waseBhabhiloni ukuba abe yirhuluneli yelizwe."
Jeremiah42:1 Beza ke bonke abathetheli bamaqela, ooYohanan unyana kaKareha, noIshaniya unyana kaHoshaya, nabantu bonke, kwathabathela komncinane kwesa komkhulu;"
Jeremiah42:2 Wathi kuYeremiya umprofeti: “Masikholeke kuwe isicelo sethu, usithandazele kuYehova uThixo wakho nangenxa yala masalela onke; (kuba simbalwa kwabaninzi, njengoko asibonayo amehlo akho;)"
Jeremiah42:3 Ukuze uYehova uThixo wakho asibonise indlela esinokuhamba ngayo nento esinokuyenza.
Jeremiah42:4 Wathi uYeremiya umprofeti kubo, Ndivile; yabonani, ndiya kuthandaza kuYehova uThixo wenu ngokwamazwi enu; nento yonke aya kukuphendula yona uYehova, ndonixelela; Andiyi kukumisa nganto."
Jeremiah42:5 Bathi bona kuYeremiya, uYehova woba lingqina elinyanisileyo, elithembekayo, ngathi, ukuba asithanga sikwenze konke, awokuthumayo kuthi uYehova uThixo wakho."
Jeremiah42:6 Nokuba lilungile okanye libi, siya kuliphulaphula ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wethu esikuthumela kuye; ukuze izinto zisihambele kakuhle, ukuba siyaliphulaphula ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wethu."
Jeremiah42:7 Emva kweentsuku ezilishumi lafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya.
Jeremiah42:8 Wabiza uYohanan unyana kaKareha, nabathetheli bonke bamatyala ababenaye, nabantu bonke, kwathabathela komncinane kwesa komkhulu;"
Jeremiah42:9 Wathi kubo, Utsho uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, enindithumele kuye, ukuba ndiyise isicelo senu kuye;"
Jeremiah42:10 Ukuba nithe nabuya nahlala kweli lizwe, ndonakha, ndinganigungxuli; ngokuba ndiyazohlwaya ngenxa yobubi endibenzileyo kuni."
Jeremiah42:11 Musani ukumoyika ukumkani waseBhabheli, enimoyikayo; Musani ukumoyika, utsho uYehova, ngokuba ndinani, ukuba ndinihlangule, ndinisindise esandleni sakhe."
Jeremiah42:12 Ndiya kuba nenceba kuni, ukuze abe nenceba kuni, anibuyisele ezweni lenu."
Jeremiah42:13 Ke ukuba nithe, Asihlali kweli lizwe, asivumi ukuliphulaphula ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wenu;"
Jeremiah42:14 Yithi, Hayi; Ke siya kuya ezweni laseYiputa, apho singayi kubona mfazwe khona, singayi kusiva isandi sesigodlo, singalambelanga sonka; siya kuhlala khona;"
Jeremiah42:15 Liveni ke ilizwi likaYehova, masalela akwaYuda; Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Ukuba uthe wabubhekisa ubuso bakho eYiputa ngonaphakade, waphambukela khona;"
Jeremiah42:16 Liya kwandula ke ikrele eniloyikayo lifike kuni apho ezweni laseYiputa, nendlala eniyoyikayo inilandele apho eYiputa; uya kufela khona."
Jeremiah42:17 Kuya kuba njalo nakumadoda onke abubhekise ubuso bawo eYiputa, ukuba aphambukele khona; baya kufa likrele, nayindlala, nayindyikitya yokufa; yaye akuyi kubakho namnye kubo oya kusala okanye asinde kwintlekele endiya kuyizisela yona."
Jeremiah42:18 Ngokuba utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Njengoko waphalazekayo ubushushu bam nobushushu bam phezu kwabemi baseYerusalem; wophalazelwa ke umsindo wam phezu kwenu, ekungeneni kwenu eYiputa; abe lihlazo, nesimanga, nentshabhiso, nesikizi; kwaye anisayi kuphinda niyibone le ndawo kwakhona."
Jeremiah42:19 Utshilo uYehova ngani, masalela akwaYuda; Musani ukuya eYiputa; yazi ngokuqinisekileyo kuba ndikulumkisile namhlanje."
Jeremiah42:20 Ngenxa enokuba besuka bankwantya ezintliziyweni zenu, ekundithumeleni kuYehova uThixo wenu, nisithi, Sithandazele kuYehova uThixo wethu; yaye njengako konke aya kukuthetha uYehova uThixo wethu, sixelele oku, yaye siya kukwenza."
Jeremiah42:21 Kwaye ngoku, ndikuxelele ngayo namhlanje; kodwa aniliphulaphulanga ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wenu, nako konke awandithumayo ngako kuni."
Jeremiah42:22 Ke kaloku yazini ngokuqinisekileyo ukuba niya kufa likrele, ngendlala nangendyikitya yokufa kuloo ndawo nifuna ukuya kuyo nize nihlale njengabaphambukeli."
Jeremiah43:1 Kwathi, akugqiba uYeremiya ukuwathetha ebantwini bonke, onke amazwi kaYehova uThixo wabo, abemthumele kubo uYehova uThixo wabo, onke la mazwi."
Jeremiah43:2 Bathi ooAzariya unyana kaHoshaya, noYohanan unyana kaKareha, namadoda onke akhukhumeleyo, kuYeremiya, wathi, Uyaxoka; uYehova uThixo wethu akakuthumanga ukuba uthi, Musani ukuya eYiputa ukuba niphambukele khona;"
Jeremiah43:3 Noko ke, uBharuki unyana kaNeriya wathi kuwe nxamnye nathi, ‘Sizinikele esandleni samaKhaledi, ukuze asibulale asithabathele ekuthinjweni eBhabhiloni."
Jeremiah43:4 uYohanan unyana kaKareya nazo zonke iintloko zomkhosi nabo bonke abantu abazange baliphulaphule ilizwi likaYehova lokuba bahlale kwilizwe lakwaYuda.
Jeremiah43:5 Kodwa uYohanan unyana kaKareya nabo bonke abaphathi-mkhosi bathabatha onke amasalela akwaYuda awayebuyile kuzo zonke iintlanga awayegxothelwe kuzo ukuba aye kuhlala ezweni lakwaYuda;
Jeremiah43:6 amadoda, nabafazi, nabantwana, neentombi zokumkani, nabo bonke ooNebhuzaradan, umthetheli wabasiki, noGedaliya unyana ka-Ahikam, unyana kaShafan, noYeremiya umprofeti, noBharuki unyana kaNeriya; abo bashiyekileyo."
Jeremiah43:7 Bafika ke ezweni laseYiputa, ngokuba bengaliphulaphulanga ilizwi likaYehova; bafika ke eTagpannesi."
Jeremiah43:8 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYeremiya Tagepanese, lisithi:"
Jeremiah43:9 Thabatha ngesandla sakho amatye amakhulu, uze ulufihle udongwe ezikweni lezitena, ekungeneni kwendlu kaFaro waseTagepanese, phambi kwamehlo amadoda akwaYuda;"
Jeremiah43:10 Wathi kubo, Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Yabonani, ndinguYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli; Yabona, ndithumela ukuba kuthatyathwe uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, umkhonzi wam, ndiyibeke itrone yakhe phezu kwala matye ndiwaqhushekileyo; uya kuyitwabulula intente yakhe yobukumkani phezu kwabo."
Jeremiah43:11 Uya kuthi ke akufika aloyise ilizwe laseYiputa, asindise abo bafe befe; kwaye abo bafanele ukuthinjwa baya ekuthinjweni; yaye abo bafanelwe likrele bathabatha ikrele."
Jeremiah43:12 Ndiya kuzitshisa izindlu zoothixo baseYiputa; uya kubatshisa, abathinjiweyo; uya kumka khona unoxolo."
Jeremiah43:13 Uya kuzitshabalalisa izigodo zaseBhete-shemeshe, ezisezweni laseYiputa; nezindlu zoothixo baseYiputa uya kuzitshisa ngomlilo."
Jeremiah44:1 Ilizwi elafikayo kuYeremiya ngokusingisele kumaYuda onke abehleli ezweni laseYiputa, abehleli eMigdoli, naseTagepanese, naseNofu, nasezweni lasePatrosi, lalisithi,"
Jeremiah44:2 utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli; Nibubonile bonke ububi endayiziselayo iYerusalem, nemizi yonke yakwaYuda; yabona ke namhla kusenkangala, akuhlali mntu khona."
Jeremiah44:3 Ngenxa yobubi ababenzayo ngokundicekisa ngokutshisa isiqhumiso nangokukhonza thixo bambi ababengabazi, bona okanye nina okanye ooyihlo."
Jeremiah44:4 Ndathumela kuni bonke abakhonzi bam, abaprofeti, ndavuka kusasa, ndabathuma, ndathi, Musani ukuwenza la masikizi, ndiwathiyileyo."
Jeremiah44:5 Kodwa abevanga, abazinqumla iindlebe zabo, ukuba babuye ebubini babo, ukuze isiqhumiso sinyuke siye thixweni bambi."
Jeremiah44:6 Ngoko ke baphalazwa umsindo wam nobushushu bam ezixekweni zakwaYuda nasezitratweni zaseYerusalem zaba senkangala, njengoko kunjalo namhla."
Jeremiah44:7 Ngako oko utsho uYehova, uThixo wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli; Yenzani ke obu bubi bukhulu emphefumlweni wenu, ngokutshabalalisa indoda, nomfazi, umntwana nosana, ezweni lakwaYuda, kungasali namnye;"
Jeremiah44:8 Ngenxa enokuba nindiqumbise ngezenzo zezandla zenu, ngokuqhumisela thixweni bambi ezweni laseYiputa, enanihleli kulo, ukuze niziqhayise, nibe sisiqalekiso nesingcikivo ezintlangeni zonke zeentlanga emhlabeni?"
Jeremiah44:9 Nizilibele na izinto ezingendawo zooyihlo, izinto ezingendawo zookumkani bakwaYuda nezenzo ezingendawo zabafazi babo nezenzo ezingendawo zabafazi benu ababenzayo kwilizwe lakwaYuda nasezitratweni zelizwe lakwaYuda ilizwe laseYerusalem?"
Jeremiah44:10 Abakhange bathotywe de kube namhla, yaye abazange boyike yaye abahambanga emthethweni wam nangemiyalelo yam emiselweyo endayibeka phambi kwenu’ phambi kookhokho benu."
Jeremiah44:11 Ngoko ke utsho uNdikhoyo onamandla onke, uThixo kaSirayeli. Uyabona, ndikhangele kuwe ukuba wenze ububi, uwatshabalalise onke amaYuda."
Jeremiah44:12 Ndiya kuwathabatha amasalela akwaYuda, abubhekise ubuso bawo ezweni laseYiputa ukuba aphambukele khona, atshabalale onke, awe ezweni laseYiputa; baya kutshatyalaliswa likrele nayindlala; baya kufa likrele nayindlala, kuthabathela komncinane kuse komkhulu; ibe yintlekisa, ummangaliso, nentshabhiso, nehlazo."
Jeremiah44:13 Kuba ndiza kubohlwaya abemi belizwe laseYiputa njengoko ndayivelelayo iYerusalem ngekrele nangendlala nangendyikitya yokufa.
Jeremiah44:14 Ngokokuze kungasindi namnye kumasalela akwaYuda, azileyo ukuba aphambukele ezweni laseYiputa, ukuba abuyele ezweni lakwaYuda, angxamele ukubuyela kulo, ukuba ahlale khona; akukho bani uya kubuya ngaphandle kwabo basabileyo."
Jeremiah44:15 Amphendula uYeremiya onke amadoda, abesazi ukuba abafazi bawo baqhumisela thixweni bambi, nabafazi bonke ababemi khona, abantu bonke ababehleli ezweni laseYiputa, ababehleli ezweni laseYiputa, basePatrosi, bathi:"
Jeremiah44:16 Ke lona ilizwi enilithethileyo kuthi egameni likaYehova, asiyi kukuphulaphula."
Jeremiah44:17 Noko ke, yonke into ephuma emlonyeni wethu, siya kuyitshisa ngomsi ukumkanikazi wezulu, sizigalele iziselo zakhe njengoko senjenjalo, thina, noobawo, nookumkani bethu, nabathetheli bethu; izixeko kwaYuda nasezitratweni zaseYerusalem; ngokuba sasinokutya okuninzi ngelo xesha, kwaye sasingcathu, singaboni bubi."
Jeremiah44:18 Kodwa ukususela oko sayekayo ukuqhumisela kukumkanikazi wezulu nokumthululela iminikelo ethululwayo, sasiswele yonke into yaye satshatyalaliswa likrele nendlala."
Jeremiah44:19 Xa saqhumisela kukumkanikazi wezulu saza samgalela umnikelo othululwayo, sasimenzela isonka sokumnqula nokumthulula nomnikelo wakhe othululwayo, sasingengobayeni bethu na?"
Jeremiah44:20 Wathi uYeremiya ebantwini bonke, kumadoda nakubafazi, nakubantu bonke abamphendulayo, wathi,"
Jeremiah44:21 Isiqhumiso enasizisa kwizixeko zakwaYuda nasezitratweni zaseYerusalem, nina nookhokho benu nookumkani benu neenkosana zenu nabantu belizwe, uYehova akazange azikhumbule, nam andizange ndingene ingqondo yakhe?"
Jeremiah44:22 ukuze uYehova angabi saba nako ukukunyamezela ngenxa yobubi bezenzo zenu nangenxa yezinto ezicekisekayo enazenzayo; ngenxa yeso sizathu, ilizwe lakho libe yinkangala, isimanga, nesiqalekiso, lingenammi, njengoko linjalo namhlanje."
Jeremiah44:23 Ngenxa yokuba naphakamisa isiqhumiso nona kuYehova, analiphulaphula ilizwi likaYehova, anahamba ngomthetho wakhe nangemiyalelo yakhe emiselweyo nangobungqina bakhe; ke ngoko, obu bubi buwile njengokuba bunjalo namhlanje."
Jeremiah44:24 Ngaphezu koko, uYeremiya wathi kubo bonke abantu nakubo bonke abafazi: “Liveni ilizwi likaYehova, nonke nina maYuda akwilizwe laseYiputa!"
Jeremiah44:25 utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Nina nabafazi benu niyathetha ngomlomo wenu, nangezandla zenu nikuzàlise, nisithi, Masenze izibhambathiso zethu, esabhambathisa ngazo, zokuqhumisela kukumkanikazi wezulu, simthululele iminikelo ethululwayo:"
Jeremiah44:26 zimiseni nizimise kambe izibhambathiso zenu; zenzeni nizenze kambe izibhambathiso zenu. Ngako oko liveni ilizwi likaYehova, nonke maYuda, ahleliyo ezweni leYiputa: Yabonani, ndifungé igama lam elikhulu, utsho uYehova, inene, aliyi kuba sabizwa igama lam ngumlomo kabani wakwaYuda ezweni lonke leYiputa, esithi, Ihleli nje iNkosi."
