Jeremiah44:27 Yabonani, ndiwaphaphela ukuba kube kubi, kungalungi, agqityelwe onke amadoda akwaYuda ezweni laseYiputa, likrele nayindlala, ade aphele."
Jeremiah44:28 Baya kubuya ezweni leYiputa abasindé ekreleni, baye ezweni lakwaYuda bembalwa; alàzi onke amasalela akwaYuda, azileyo ezweni leYiputa ukuba aphambukele kulo, ukuba liliphi na ilizwi eliya kuma khona: lelam, lelabo, kusini na."
Jeremiah44:29 Nangu ke umqondiso kuni, utsho uYehova, wokuba ndiya kunivelela kule ndawo, ukuze nazi ukuba amazwi am aya kuma, animele ububi."
Jeremiah44:30 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yabonani, ndiyamnikela uFaro-hofra, ukumkani weYiputa, esandleni seentshaba zakhe, esandleni sabafuna umphefumlo wakhe, njengoko ndamnikelayo uZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda esandleni sikaNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, utshaba lwakhe, olube lufuna umphefumlo wakhe."
Jeremiah45:1 Ilizwi, awalithetha uYeremiya umprofeti uBharuki, unyana kaNeriya, ekuwabhaleni kwakhe la mazwi encwadini, laxelwa nguYeremiya, ngomnyaka wesine kaYehoyakim unyana kaYosiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda, ukuthi,"
Jeremiah45:2 Wathi uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli kuwe, Bharuki!"
Jeremiah45:3 Ubusithi, Yeha ke mna! ngokuba uYehova wongeze isingqala kumvandedwa wam; Ndidiniwe kukuncwina kwam, andifumani kuphumla."
Jeremiah45:4 Uze uthi kuye, ‘Utsho uYehova; Yabona, into endiyakhileyo ndiyayigungxula, into endiyityeleyo ndiyayigungxula, nalo lonke ilizwe;"
Jeremiah45:5 Ngaba uzifunela izinto ezinkulu? musani ukubakhangela; ngokuba, yabonani, ndiyizisela ububi inyama yonke, utsho uYehova; ke ndokunika umphefumlo wakho ube lixhoba, apho uya khona."
Jeremiah46:1 Into eyafikayo kuYeremiya umprofeti, ililizwi likaYehova ngokusingisele kwiintlanga."
Jeremiah46:2 NangeYiputa, nangemikhosi kaFaro-nego ukumkani waseYiputa, ebisemlanjeni ongumEfrati, iKarkemishe, owamoyisayo uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, ngomnyaka wesine kaYehoyakim unyana kaYosiya, ukumkani wakwaYuda."
Jeremiah46:3 Nikani ikhaka nekrele, nisondele ekulweni;"
Jeremiah46:4 Yondla amahashe; yimani, bamahashe, yimani ninxibe izigcina-ntloko; hlabani imikhonto ninxibise iibrigandines."
Jeremiah46:5 Yini na ukuba ndibabone besoyika, barhoxe? yaye amadoda awo anamandla othuka aza asaba ngokukhawuleza yaye akazange akhangele ngasemva, ngenxa yokuba kwakunkwantya macala onke, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah46:6 Makangasabe onamendu, makungasindi amagorha; baya kukhubeka, bawe ngasentla emlanjeni ongumEfrati."
Jeremiah46:7 Ngubani na unyuka njengomlambo, amanzi awo aqukuqela njengemilambo?"
Jeremiah46:8 iYiputa iyenyuka njengomlambo, namanzi ayo ajika njengemilambo; Wathi, Ndiya kunyuka, ndiwugqume umhlaba; Ndiya kuwutshabalalisa umzi nabemi bawo."
Jeremiah46:9 Nyukani, mahashe; nobushushu, zinqwelo zokulwa! kwaphuma amagorha; AmaKushi namaLubhi ephethe ikhaka; namaBhaledi abambe kwaye azingele ngesaphetha."
Jeremiah46:10 Kuba le yimini yoMlawuli, iNkosi uYehova wemikhosi, imini yempindezelo, ukuze aziphindezelele kubachasi bakhe; liya kudla ikrele, lihluthe, linxile ligazi labo; Umbingelelo kwilizwe langasentla, kufuphi nomlambo ongumEfrati."
Jeremiah46:11 Nyuka uye eGiliyadi uze uthabathe ioli yobulawu, ntombi enyulu yaseYiputa; uya kusebenzisa amayeza amaninzi ngelize; ngokuba akuyi kuphila."
Jeremiah46:12 Iintlanga zikuvile ukucukucezwa kwakho, ukukhala kwakho kwazalisa ihlabathi; ngokuba igorha lixhotyiwe, zawa zombini kunye."
Jeremiah46:13 Ilizwi uYehova awalixelela umprofeti uYeremiya ngokuphathelele isibakala sokuba uNebhukadenetsare, ukumkani waseBhabhiloni, wayeza kufika aze aloyise ilizwe laseYiputa."
Jeremiah46:14 Xelelani kwiYiputa, nimemeze eMigdoli, nivakalise eNofu naseTagepanese; nithi, Suk’ ume, zilungise; ngokuba ikrele liya kukonakalisa yonke indawo."
Jeremiah46:15 Yini na ukuba atshabalale amagorha akho? abazange bayeke, kuba uYehova wayebagxothile."
Jeremiah46:16 Wabhukuqa abaninzi, omnye wawa phezu komnye, bathi, Sukani, sibuyele ebantwini bakowethu, ezweni esazalelwa kulo, ngenxa yekrele elidlavulayo."
Jeremiah46:17 Baduma khona, besithi, Faro, kumkani waseYiputa! ugqithile umda wexesha."
Jeremiah46:18 Ndihleli nje, utsho ukumkani ogama lakhe linguYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Inene, uya kuza enjengeTabhore phakathi kweentaba, enjengeKarmele ngaselwandle;"
Jeremiah46:19 Zilungiseleleni ukuya ekuthinjweni, mmi, ntombi iyiYiputa; ngokuba iNofe iya kuba linxuwa, ibe linxuwa, ingabi nammi."
Jeremiah46:20 iYiputa injengethokazi elihle, kodwa iyeza imbuqo; ivela ngasentla."
Jeremiah46:21 Abakhonzi bakhe basemathunjini akhe njengeenkomo ezityetyisiweyo; ngokuba nabo bajika, basaba kunye; abazange balinde, kuba imini yokutshatyalaliswa kwabo yayifikile kubo, kwanexesha lokubatyelela."
Jeremiah46:22 Ilizwi layo liya kushukuma njengenyoka; kuba baya kunyuka benomkhosi baze bayixabele ngamazembe, njengabagawuli beenkuni."
Jeremiah46:23 Baya kuligawula ihlathi lakhe, utsho uYehova, nangona lingayi kugocwagocwa; ngokuba baninzi ngaphezu kweenkumbi, nakuba bengabalwa."
Jeremiah46:24 Intombi eyiYiputa iya kudana; uya kunikelwa esandleni sabantu basentla.
Jeremiah46:25 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli; Yabona, ndiyayibetha inkitha yaseNo, noFaro, neYiputa, noothixo bayo, nookumkani bayo; uFaro nabo bonke ababekholose ngaye;"
Jeremiah46:26 Ndiya kubanikela esandleni sabafuna umphefumlo wabo, nasesandleni sikaNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, nasesandleni sabakhonzi bakhe; yaye emva koko ndiya kunikwa mna njengakwimihla yakudala,’ utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah46:27 Ke wena musa ukoyika, mkhonzi wam Yakobi; musa ukoyika, Sirayeli; ngokuba, uyabona, ndiya kukukhulula, ndikuhlawulele kude nasembewini yakho ezweni lokuthinjwa kwabo; noYakobi uya kubuya abe ngoxolo, aphumle, kungabikho umothusayo;"
Jeremiah46:28 Musa ukoyika, mkhonzi wam Yakobi, utsho uYehova, ngokuba ndinawe; ngokuba ndiya kuzitshabalalisa zonke iintlanga endikuphalalisele kuzo; kodwa andiyi kukonakalisa, ndiya kukohlwaya ngokulinganayo; kodwa andiyi kukuyekela umsulwa."
Jeremiah47:1 Ilizwi likaYehova elafikayo kuYeremiya umprofeti, kumaFilisti, engekayixabeli uFaro iGasa."
Jeremiah47:2 Wathi uYehova; Yabona, amanzi aya kunyuka ephuma entla, abe ngumkhukula okhukulayo, awugubungela umhlaba nenzaliseko yawo; umzi nabemi bawo baya kumemelela khona amadoda, balile bonke abemi belizwe."
Jeremiah47:3 Ngenxa yesandi samanqina amahashe akhe anobukroti, nangenxa yesandi seenqwelo zakhe zokulwa, isandi samavili akhe, ooyise ababheneli kubantwana ngenxa yezandla ezithe tye;"
Jeremiah47:4 ngenxa yemini ezayo yokuphangwa onke amaFilisti nokutshabalalisa wonke umncedi oseleyo eTire naseSidon, ngenxa yokuba uYehova uya kuwaphanga amaFilisti, intsalela yelizwe lakwaKatore."
Jeremiah47:5 Inkqayi yeGasa; Yatshatyalaliswa iAshkelon namasalela entili yabo; koda kube nini uzibulala?
Jeremiah47:6 Krele likaYehova, koda kube nini na ukuba uthi cwaka? Buyela ebhedini yakho, phumla kwaye uzolile."
Jeremiah47:7 Ungathini na ukuthi cwaka, uYehova ekuwisele umthetho nje ngeAshkelon naselunxwemeni? kulapho Wanyula khona."
Jeremiah48:1 Ngokuba utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Yeha iNebho! ngokuba yaphukile; Yahlaziswa iKiriyatayim, yathinjwa; uMisgabe uneentloni kwaye uyoyika."
Jeremiah48:2 Akuyi kuba sabakho ndumiso ivela kuMowabhi: iHeshbhon iceba ububi nxamnye naye; masiyigqibe ebahlalini. Nawe Madmene wonqanyulwa; ikrele liya kukusukela.
Jeremiah48:3 Kuya kubakho isikhalo eHoronayim, imbubhiso nokwaphuka okukhulu."
Jeremiah48:4 Utshabalele uMowabhi; abantwana bakhe abancinci balila.
Jeremiah48:5 Ngokuba kuya kuhlala kulila entabeni yaseLuhiti; ngenxa yokuba ekuhleni ukuya eHoronayim iintshaba zasiva isikhalo sentshabalalo.
Jeremiah48:6 Sabani, sizani imiphefumlo yenu, nibe njengomlimi entlango."
Jeremiah48:7 Ngenxa enokuba ukholose ngezenzo zakho nangobutyebi bakho, nawe uya kuthinjwa; yaye uKemoshe uya kuya ekuthinjweni nababingeleli bakhe neenkosana zakhe."
Jeremiah48:8 Umbhuqi uya kuzifikela zonke izixeko, kungasindi mzi; idake intili, nethafa libe senkangala, njengoko watshoyo uYehova."
Jeremiah48:9 Mnikeni amaphiko uMowabhi, asabe, asinde; kuba izixeko zakhe ziya kuba ngamanxuwa, akukho bani uya kuhlala kuzo."
Jeremiah48:10 Uqalekisiwe owenza umsebenzi kaYehova ngobuqhophololo, aqalekiswe onqanda ikrele lakhe egazini;"
Jeremiah48:11 Wayezolile uMowabhi kwasebutsheni bakhe, yaye wayehleli esitulweni sakhe, yaye akazange athululelwe ukusuka kwesinye isitya ukuya kwesinye, okanye ekuthinjweni; ke ngoko, incasa yakhe yahlala kuye, nevumba lakhe aliguqukanga."
Jeremiah48:12 Ngako oko, yabonani, iyeza imihla, utsho uYehova, endiya kuthumela abahambi kubo, babagxothe, bayichithe imiphanda yabo, baziqhekeze iingxowa zabo."
Jeremiah48:13 Uya kuhlaziswa uMowabhi ngenxa kaKemoshe, kanye njengoko indlu kaSirayeli yahlaziswayo ngenxa yesifungo sayo saseBheteli."
Jeremiah48:14 Ningathini na ukuthi, Singamagorha, singamagorha emfazwe?"
Jeremiah48:15 Uya kuphangwa uMowabhi, uthinjwa emizini yakhe, abafana bakhe abanyuliweyo basiwe ekubulaweni; utsho uYehova, ogama lakhe linguYehova wemikhosi."
Jeremiah48:16 Kusondele ukusindeka kukaMowabhi, ukusindeka kwakhe ngokukhawuleza;"
Jeremiah48:17 Lilileni ngenxa yakhe nonke; bathi bonke abalaziyo igama lakhe, Hayi, ukwaphulwa kwenduku eyomeleleyo, intonga yokuhomba!"
Jeremiah48:18 Intombi yakho ehlala eDibhon yehla eluzukweni lwakho yaye isoloko inxaniwe; kuba umtshabalalisi wakwaMowabhi uya kunihlasela, azitshabalalise iinqaba zenu."
Jeremiah48:19 Yima endleleni, mmi waseArohere, ubone; buza kulowo ubalekileyo nosindileyo, athi, Kwenzeke ntoni na?"
Jeremiah48:20 uneentloni uMowabhi; lilani, lilani; Xelelani iArnon ukuba uphangiwe uMowabhi;"
Jeremiah48:21 Kwafika umgwebo kulo ilizwe; neHolon, neYahasa, neMefahati;"
Jeremiah48:22 neDibhon, neNebho, neBhete-dibhelatayim;"
Jeremiah48:23 neKiriyatayim, neBhete-gamule, neBhete-mehon;"
Jeremiah48:24 neKeriyoti, neBhotsera, nemizi yonke yelizwe lakwaMowabhi, ekude kwanekufuphi."
Jeremiah48:25 Uphondo lukaMowabhi lwaphukile, nengalo yakhe yaphukile,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah48:26 Mnxiliseni, ngokuba eqhayise ngoYehova; Uya kuziqikaqika uMowabhi emhlanzweni wakhe, naye uya kuba yintlekisa."
Jeremiah48:27 Wayengeyintlekisa na kuwe uSirayeli? Wafunyanwa phakathi kwamasela na? kuba oko nithetha ngaye, umke evuya."
Jeremiah48:28 Phumani ezixekweni, nihlale emaweni, nina bemi bakwaMowabhi, nibe njengevukuthu elakhela ecandeni emlonyeni wequla."
Jeremiah48:29 Silivile ikratshi likaMowabhi, oyena unekratshi, ikratshi lakhe nekratshi lakhe nekratshi lakhe nekratshi lentliziyo yakhe."
Jeremiah48:30 Mna ndiwazi umsindo wakhe, utsho uYehova; kodwa akuyi kuba njalo; ubuxoki bakhe abuyi kusebenza ngolo hlobo."
Jeremiah48:31 Ngako oko ndiya kumlilela uMowabhi, ndilile ngenxa kaMowabhi wonke ephela; Intliziyo yam iyakhala ngenxa yamadoda akwaKoreshi."
Jeremiah48:32 Ndiya kuzibika kuwe ngokukhala kweYasere, mdiliya waseSibhema; ehlotyeni iziqhamo zakho neediliya zakho zigaleleke umbhuqi."
Jeremiah48:33 Kwaye kwashenxiswa imivuyo nemigcobo kwilizwe elikhulu nelizwe lakwaMowabhi; ndayiyeka iwayini ezinyukweni; akukho namnye uya kunyathela ngovuyo; ukuduma kwabo akuyi kuba yimivuyo.
Jeremiah48:34 Ukususela kwisikhalo esisuka eHeshbhon ukusa e-Elehali ukuya eYahaze, ukusuka eTsoware ukusa eHoronayim baphakamisa amazwi abo njengethokazi lenkomo elineminyaka emithathu ubudala; ngokuba amanzi aseNimrim aya kuba yintlango."
Jeremiah48:35 Ndomtshabalalisa ke uMowabhi, utsho uYehova, obingelela koothixo bakhe ezigangeni, oqhumisela umsi."
Jeremiah48:36 Ngako oko intliziyo yam iya kulila njengogwali kuMowabhi; intliziyo yam iya kukhala izigodlo kumadoda akwaKoreshi;
Jeremiah48:37 Kuba zonke iintloko ziya kuchetywa, zonke iindevu zichetyiwe; bonke bephela banamanxeba ezandleni, benxibe ezirhwexayo ezinqeni zabo."
Jeremiah48:38 Eluphahleni lonke lwakwaMowabhi nasezitratweni zakhe kuya kukhwazwa, ngenxa yokuba ndimaphule uMowabhi njengento engonwabanga,’ utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah48:39 Baya kunkqangaza, besithi, Hayi, ukutyumzwa! Utheni na ukubuya uMowabhi eneentloni! ngenxa yoko uMowabhi ube yintlekisa, uyoyikiswa ngeenxa zonke."
Jeremiah48:40 Ngokuba utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, utshaba lutshwebeleza njengexhalanga, lolule amaphiko alo phezu koMowabhi."
Jeremiah48:41 iKeriyoti ithinjiwe, neenqaba ezinqatyisiweyo zithinjiwe, yaye ngaloo mini intliziyo yamagorha akwaMowabhi iya kuba njengentliziyo yomfazi ezindleleni zakhe."
Jeremiah48:42 uMowabhi uya kutshatyalaliswa angabi saba luhlanga, ngenxa yokuba uqhayise ngoYehova."
Jeremiah48:43 Kuya kuwelwa lunkwantyo nomgongxo nesibatha, wena mmi wakwaMowabhi,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah48:44 Osaba unkwantyo weyela emhadini; onyuka ephuma emhadini, abanjiswe ngumgibe; kuba ndiza kumzisela uMowabhi unyaka wokukohlwaya,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah48:45 Abo basabileyo bema phantsi komthunzi weHeshbhon ngenxa yamandla, kodwa kuya kuphuma umlilo uvela eHeshbhon nedangatye phakathi kukaSihon, litshise imbombo yakwaMowabhi neentloko zabo bacaphukileyo."
Jeremiah48:46 Yeha, wena Mowabhi! abantu bakwaKamoshe batshabalele, ngenxa yokuba oonyana bakho baye bathinjwa, neentombi zakho zisiwe ekuthinjweni."
Jeremiah48:47 Kodwa ke ekupheleni kwemihla ndiya kulibuyisela iqashiso lakwaMowabhi,” utsho uYehova. Seza kufika apha isigwebo sikaMowabhi."
Jeremiah49:1 Ngoonyana baka-Amon, utsho uYehova ukuthi, uSirayeli akananyana na? akanayo na indlalifa? Ngoko kwakutheni ukuze ukumkani wabo athabathe uGadi aze abahlalise abantu bakhe ezixekweni zakhe?"
Jeremiah49:2 Ngako oko, yabonani, iyeza imihla, utsho uYehova, endiya kumbulala ngayo umkhosi iRabha yoonyana baka-Amon; liya kuba yimfumba yenkangala, nemizi yalo itshiswe ngomlilo; kulapho uSirayeli aya kudla ilifa leendlalifa zakhe, utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah49:3 Lila, Heshbhon, ngokuba ibhuqiwe iAyi; khalani, zintombi zaseRabha, bhinqani iingubo ezimnyama; khalani nibaleke niye ezindongeni; ngokuba ukumkani wabo uya kuthinjwa, kunye nababingeleli bakhe nabathetheli bakhe."
Jeremiah49:4 Ngubani na oqhayisa ngeentlambo zakho, entilini yakho, ntombi yombandezeli? owakholosa ngobutyebi bakhe, wathi, Ngubani na oya kuza kum?"
Jeremiah49:5 Yabona, ndiya kukuzisela unkwantyo, itsho iNkosi, uYehova wemikhosi, ngenxa yabo bonke abangeenxa zonke kuwe; nigxothwe elowo kuni kwakanye; yaye akukho bani uya kubabutha ababhaduli."
Jeremiah49:6 Emva koko ndiya kubabuyisa abathinjwa boonyana baka-Amoni,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah49:7 NgoEdom, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, ukuthi, Akusekho bulumko na kwaTeman? Litshabalele na icebo lezilumko? Bumkile na ubulumko babo?"
Jeremiah49:8 Sabani, jikani, hlalani enkolontyweni, bemi bakwaDedan; kuba ndiya kumzisela intlekele uEsawu ngexesha lokumxabela kwam."
Jeremiah49:9 Ukuba abavuni beediliya bafika kuwe, abayi kuzishiya ngasemva na? njengamasela ebusuku, aya konakalisa ade ahluthe."
Jeremiah49:10 Ngokuba mna ndimtyhilile uEsawu, ndizithiyile iindawo zakhe ezisitheleyo, angabi nako ukuzimela; Abantwana bakhe baphangiwe, nabazalwana bakhe nabamelwane abakunye naye, kwaye akakho apho."
Jeremiah49:11 Shiya iinkedama zakho, ndozidlisa ubomi; nabahlolokazi bakho bakholose ngam."
Jeremiah49:12 Ngokuba utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ababengenalungelo lakuyisela indebe, mabasele; kanti nguwe oya kuhamba ungohlwaywa? akuyi kuba yimfuneko kuwe, kodwa inene uya kusela kuyo."
Jeremiah49:13 Ngokuba ndizifungile mna, utsho uYehova, ndathi, iBhotsera iya kuba linxuwa, nento edelekileyo, nentshabalalo, nentshabhiso; kwaye zonke izixeko zakhe ziya kuba yinkangala ngonaphakade."
Jeremiah49:14 Ndeva izwi liphuma kuYehova, kwathunyelwa umthunywa ezintlangeni, esithi, Zihlanganiseni, nimhlasele, nihlale edabini."
Jeremiah49:15 Ngokuba, uyabona, ndikwenza ube ngowamncinanana ezintlangeni, nodelekileyo ezintlangeni."
Jeremiah49:16 Ukunkwantya kwakho kukukhohlisile, nekratshi lentliziyo yakho likukhohlisile, Wena uhleli ezimfanteni zamawa, wena ubambelele kwindawo ephakamileyo yenduli; nokuba uthe wakhela phezulu njengexhalanga indlwane yakho, ndokuhlisa nalapho; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah49:17 uEdom abe yintlango; bonke abadlulayo baya kumangaliswa, bengcikive bonke ubugwenxa bakhe."
Jeremiah49:18 Kanye njengoko yatshatyalaliswayo iSodom neGomora nezixeko ezingabamelwane, utsho uYehova, akuyi kuhlala mntu khona, makungahlali mntu khona."
Jeremiah49:19 Yabona, utshaba luya kunyuka njengengonyama, luphume eYordan emlanjeni, luye ekhayeni lamagorha; ndosuka ndimbaleke kwaoko; ngubani na ke umnyuliweyo, endinokuthi ndimwise? ngokuba ngubani na onjengam? ngubani na oya kundinika ixesha? Nguwuphi na umalusi onokuma phambi kwam?"
Jeremiah49:20 Ngako oko yiva icebo likaYehova, olishumayele kuEdom; nezicwangciso zakhe azicwangcisele abemi bakwaTemane: Ewe, baya kuvelisa abancinane emhlambini; Ngokuqinisekileyo uya kuzenza kube senkangala izakhiwo zabo kunye nabo."
Jeremiah49:21 Ihlabathi liyanyikima sisithonga sokuwa kwabo; isandi sokukhala kwabo sivakala eLwandle oluBomvu.
Jeremiah49:22 Yabona, utshaba luyanyuka njengexhalanga, lutshwebeleza, luwolule amaphiko alo phezu kweBhotsera, intliziyo yamagorha akwaEdom ngaloo mini iya kuba njengentliziyo yomfazi ezindleleni zakhe."
Jeremiah49:23 Ngokusingisele kwiDamasko. Ihlazekile iHamati neArpadi, ngokuba kuviwe iindaba ezimbi; badimazekile; kukho usizi elwandle; aliyi kuthi tu."
Jeremiah49:24 iDamasko yatyhafa, yajika, yasaba; wafikelwa ziintlungu nozalayo."
Jeremiah49:25 Utheni na, umzi wendumiso, umzi wemivuyo yam!"
Jeremiah49:26 Ngako oko amadodana akhe aya kuza ezintendelezweni zakhe, atshabalale onke amagorha ngaloo mini; utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Jeremiah49:27 Ndiya kulufaka umlilo eludongeni lweDamasko, uzitshise iingxande ezinde zikaBhen-hadade."
Jeremiah49:28 Ngokuphathelele uKedare nezikumkani zaseHatsore uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabhiloni aya kuboyisa, utsho uYehova ukuthi: “Sukuma, nyuka uye kwaKedare uze ubaphange abantu baseMpuma.”"
Jeremiah49:29 Iintente zabo nemfuyo yabo bozithabatha; bawathabatha amalaphu abo entente, neempahla zabo zonke, neenkamela zabo; baya kuthi kubo, Sifikelwe kukoyika;"
Jeremiah49:30 Sabani, balekani kude, hlalani ezinzulwini zentliziyo, bemi baseHatsore, utsho uYehova; ngenxa yokuba uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabhiloni ecebe icebo ngani yaye ucebe icebo ngani."
Jeremiah49:31 Sukani nime, ninyuke niye kwabatyebileyo, abahleli kamnandi, utsho uYehova, abangenaminyango nemiqobo, abahlala bodwa."
Jeremiah49:32 Iinkamela zabo ziya kuphangwa, nemfuyo yabo eninzi iya kuphangwa; ndiya kubachithachitha abasemacaleni kuyo yonke imimoya; yaye ndiza kuyizisa intshabalalo yabo macala onke,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah49:33 iHatsore iya kuba lilizwe leempungutye, ibe yintlango ngonaphakade; akuyi kuhlala mntu khona, yaye akuyi kuhlala mntu khona."
Jeremiah49:34 Ilizwi likaYehova elafika kuYeremiya umprofeti ngokuphathelele uElam ekuqaleni kolawulo lukaZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, lalisithi:"
Jeremiah49:35 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Yabonani, ndiyasaphula isaphetha sakwaElam, intloko yamandla abo."
Jeremiah49:36 Ndiya kuzisa kwaElam imimoya yomine evela kwiimbombo zone zezulu ndize ndibachithachithe kuyo yonke loo mimoya; yaye akuyi kubakho luhlanga bangayi kufika kulo abathinjwa bakwaElam.
Jeremiah49:37 Ndomqhiphukisa umbilini uElam phambi kweentshaba zakhe, naphambi kwabafuna imiphefumlo yabo; ndibazisele ububi, ukuvutha komsindo wam, utsho uYehova; yaye ndiza kuthumela ikrele emva kwabo ukuze libatshabalalise."
Jeremiah49:38 Ndiza kuyibeka kwaElam itrone yam, nditshabalalise ukumkani neenkosana apho,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah49:39 Kodwa ke ekupheleni kwemihla ndiya kulibuyisela iqashiso lakwaElam,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah50:1 Ilizwi uYehova awalithethayo ngeBhabhiloni nelizwe laseGalati ngomprofeti uYeremiya.
Jeremiah50:2 Xelani ezintlangeni, yazisani, niphakamise ibhanile; vakalisani, musani ukuzifihla; nithi, Ithinjiwe iBhabheli, uhlazekile uBhele, waqotywa uMerodaki; zihlazekile izigodo zabo, zaphukile imifanekiso yabo eqingqiweyo."
Jeremiah50:3 Ngokuba abantu basentla basukele phezulu kulowo walenza kube senkangala ilizwe labo, kungamiwa mntu kulo; baya kuphuma bahambe, abantu neenkomo."
Jeremiah50:4 Ngaloo mihla nangelo xesha, utsho uYehova, oonyana bakaSirayeli baya kuhamba kunye noonyana bakaYuda, balile; baya kuhamba baye kufuna uYehova uThixo wabo."
Jeremiah50:5 Baya kubuza indlela yaseZiyon, ubuso babo bubheke kuyo, besithi, Yizani, nisithelele kuYehova emnqophisweni ongunaphakade ongayi kulityalwa."
Jeremiah50:6 Abantu bam baba ngumhlambi weegusha ezilahlekileyo; abalusi babo babandwendwisa, babandwendwisa ezintabeni; besuka entabeni, baya endulini, beyilibele indawo yabo yokuphumla."
Jeremiah50:7 Bonke abawafumanayo bawadla; baza abachasi babo bathi: ‘Asizange sikhubeke, ngenxa yokuba bamonile uYehova, isiseko sobulungisa, uYehova, ithemba lookhokho babo."
Jeremiah50:8 Mkani phakathi kweBhabhiloni nize nilishiye ilizwe lamaKhaledi nize nibe njengeebhokhwe ezikhokela umhlambi.
Jeremiah50:9 Kuba, yabonani, ndinyusa ibandla leentlanga ezinkulu ezweni lasentla, ukuba lihlasele iBhabheli; uya kuthatyathwa khona; Iintolo zabo zibe njengezegcisa; akukho namnye uya kubuya elambatha."
Jeremiah50:10 Loba lixhoba elamaKaledi; bonke abayithabathayo baya kuhlutha; utsho uYehova.
Jeremiah50:11 Ngokuba navuya, ngenxa yokuba ninoyolo, nina batshabalalisi belifa lam;"
Jeremiah50:12 uya kudana kakhulu unyoko; uya kuba neentloni lowo wakuzalayo; yabona, isiphelo seentlanga siya kuba yintlango, umhlaba ongumqwebedu, nenkqantosi."
Jeremiah50:13 Ngenxa yomsindo kaYehova ayisayi kumiwa, kodwa iya kuba yinkangala ephanzileyo;"
Jeremiah50:14 Zingcwaliseleni imfazwe neBhabheli yonke indawo; bonke abazingelayo utshaba bayamzingela, abangaziyeki utolo; ngokuba wonile kuYehova."
Jeremiah50:15 Dumani ngayo kuyo yonke indawo; wanikela isandla sakhe; ziwile iziseko zayo, zidilikile iindonga zayo; ngokuba yimpindezelo kaYehova; phindezelani kuye; yenzani kuye njengoko enze ngako."
Jeremiah50:16 Mbhubhiseni umhlwayeli eBhabheli, nosebenzisa irhengqa ngexesha lokuvuna; ngenxa yokoyika ikrele elicinezelayo, elowo uya kubheka ebantwini bakowabo, basabele elowo ezweni lakowabo."
Jeremiah50:17 Uyigusha elusali uSirayeli; iingonyama zamsukela; engekadliwa ngukumkani waseAsiriya; waza ekugqibeleni lo Nebhukadenetsare, ukumkani waseBhabhiloni, wawaphula amathambo akhe."
Jeremiah50:18 Ngoko ke utsho uNdikhoyo onamandla onke, uThixo kaSirayeli. Yabona, ndiya kumbetha ukumkani waseBhabheli nelizwe lakhe, njengoko ndambethayo ukumkani waseAsiriya;"
Jeremiah50:19 Ndiza kumbuyisela uSirayeli endaweni yakhe yokuhlala, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo uya kudla eKarmele naseBhashan, nomphefumlo wakhe waneliswe eNtabeni yakwaEfrayim naseGiliyadi."
Jeremiah50:20 Ngaloo mihla nangelo xesha, utsho uYehova, buya kufunwa ububi bukaSirayeli, bungabikho; nezono zakwaYuda zingafunyanwa, ngenxa yokuba ndiya kubaxolela abo ndibagcinayo."
Jeremiah50:21 Nyuka uye kwilizwe laseMeratayim ukuze ulwe nalo, nakubemi basePekodi; nibatshabalalise, nibatshabhise ngesiqalekiso, utsho uYehova; nenze njengoko ndaniwiselayo umthetho."
Jeremiah50:22 Kukho isithonga semfazwe elizweni, nesokwaphuka okukhulu."
Jeremiah50:23 Hayi, ukunqamka kwawo elimiweyo liphela, ukuqhekezwa kwawo! Hayi, ukwenziwa ummangaliso kweBhabheli phakathi kweentlanga!"
Jeremiah50:24 Ndikubekele isibatha, wabanjiswa, wena Bhabheli, ungazi; wafunyanwa, nawe wathinjwa, ngokuba ulwe noYehova."
Jeremiah50:25 uYehova wazivula iintonga zakhe, wazizisa izixhobo zomsindo wakhe; kuba lo ngumsebenzi weNkosi enguMongami uYehova wemikhosi kwilizwe lamaKhaledi."
Jeremiah50:26 Yizani kuye, nivale ngeenxa zonke, nivule ubuncwane bakhe, nimtyumze njengemfumba yeemfumba, nimtshabalalise ngesiqalekiso; kungabikho nto iseleyo kuye."
Jeremiah50:27 Zibulaleni zonke iinkunzi zalo ezintsha zeenkomo; mabehle baye kuxhelwa nje; yeha kubo! ngokuba ifikile imini yabo, ixesha lokuvelelwa kwabo."
Jeremiah50:28 Ilizwi labasabayo nabasindileyo ezweni laseBhabheli, ukutsho impindezelo kaYehova, uThixo wethu, iZiyon, nempindezelo yetempile yakhe."
Jeremiah50:29 Bahlanganiseleni eBhabheli abatoli besaphetha, bonke abatoli beentshaba, bayirhawule ngeenxa zonke; makungasindi nto; Mvuze ngokwemisebenzi yakhe; yenzani kuye njengoko wenza ngako, ngokuba eqhayisele kuYehova, koyiNgcwele kaSirayeli."
Jeremiah50:30 Ngako oko amadodana ayo aya kuza ezitratweni, onke amagorha ayo anqunyulwe ngaloo mini; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah50:31 Yabonani, ndinimangalele, nina bakhukhumeleyo, itsho iNkosi uYehova wemikhosi; ngokuba ifikile imini yakho, ixesha lokukuvelela kwam."
Jeremiah50:32 Kwaye abanekratshi baya kukhubeka bawe, kungabikho ubaphakamisayo; Ndiya kuphemba umlilo ezixekweni zakhe, umtshise macal’ onke."
Jeremiah50:33 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Bacudiswa oonyana bakaSirayeli noonyana bakaYuda kunye, babathimba bonke ababathimbileyo; abavumi ukubakhulula."
Jeremiah50:34 Umsindisi wabo womelele; NguYehova wemikhosi igama lakhe; Yena uya kubagweba aphele, eliphumza ilizwe, akhwankqise abemi baseBhabheli."
Jeremiah50:35 Kuza unkwantyo kumaKhaledi,’ utsho uYehova, “ukuba alwe nabemi baseBhabhiloni neenkosana zayo nezilumko zayo."
Jeremiah50:36 Ikrele malibafikele amaxoki; ikrele maliwafikele amagorha akhe; baya koyika.
Jeremiah50:37 Ikrele lamahashe abo, neenqwelo zabo zokulwa, neempahla zonke ezikuwo; baya kuba njengabafazi; ikrele malibufikele ubuncwane bakhe; yaye baya kuphangwa."
Jeremiah50:38 Ukubalela makuwafikele amanzi alo; baya kubuna, ngokuba lilizwe lemifanekiso eqingqiweyo, abayithandayo nemifanekiso yabo."
Jeremiah50:39 Ngako oko kuya kuhlala khona amarhamncwa asemathafeni, namarhamncwa eziqithi, kuhlale iinciniba khona; kwaye akuyi kubakho abemi ngonaphakade; kwaye akuyi kubakho mmi kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana."
Jeremiah50:40 Njengoko wayitshabalalisayo uThixo iSodom neGomora, nemimelwane yayo, utsho uYehova; ngako oko akuyi kuhlala mntu khona, akuyi kuphambukela nyana womntu khona."
Jeremiah50:41 Yabonani, kuya kuvela uhlanga lwasentla, lube luhlanga olukhulu, kuxhotywe ookumkani abaninzi emazweni;"
Jeremiah50:42 Baphethe isaphetha nentshuntshe; bakhohlakele, abananceba; ilizwi labo liya kugquma njengolwandle, yaye baya kukhwela emahasheni, ngamnye exhobe njengendoda yokulwa, nxamnye nawe, ntombi yaseBhabhiloni."
Jeremiah50:43 Ukumkani waseBhabheli waluva udaba lwabo, zoma izandla zakhe;"
Jeremiah50:44 Yabona, utshaba luya kunyuka njengengonyama ephuma emanzini aseYordan, luye ekhayeni eliyingxondorha; ke kwaoko ndiya kubenza basabe ebusweni bakhe; ngubani na ke umnyuliweyo, endinokuthi ndimwise? ngokuba ngubani na onjengam? ngubani na oya kundinika ixesha? Nguwuphi na umalusi onokuma phambi kwam?"
Jeremiah50:45 Ngako oko yivani icebo likaYehova, alicebileyo ngeBhabheli; necebo lakhe alicebileyo ngelizwe lamaKaledi: Inene, baya kuzala abancinane emhlambini; inene, uya kuwenza amanxuwa amakhaya abo kunye nabo."
Jeremiah50:46 Ngenxa yesandi sokuthinjwa kweBhabhiloni ihlabathi liyanyikima, nesikhalo sivakala phakathi kweentlanga."
Jeremiah51:1 Wathi uYehova; Yabona, ndixhoxha umoya womonakalisi phezu kweBhabheli, nabasukela phezulu kum;"
Jeremiah51:2 yaye ndiza kuthumela abaxhasi eBhabhiloni abaya kuyivuthela nelize nelizwe layo; ngokuba bomngqonga ngemini yentlekele.
Jeremiah51:3 Umtoli makatyesele isaphetha sakhe kogobileyo, nakoziphakamisayo emehlweni akhe; alibacongi abafana balo; uwutshabalalise wonke umkhosi wakhe ngesiqalekiso."
Jeremiah51:4 Baya kuwa ababuleweyo ezweni lamaKaledi, nababuleweyo ezitratweni zalo."
Jeremiah51:5 Ngokuba uSirayeli noYuda babengabashiyi uThixo wabo, uYehova wemikhosi; nangona ilizwe labo lalizele zizono koyiNgcwele kaSirayeli."
Jeremiah51:6 Sabelani eBhabheli, nisindise elowo umphefumlo wakhe; ngokuba eli lixesha lempindezelo kaYehova; uya kumnika imbuyekezo."
Jeremiah51:7 iBhabheli yaba yindebe yegolide esandleni sikaYehova, ilinxilisa lonke elimiweyo; zasela iintlanga iwayini yakhe; ngoko ke, izizwe ziyageza."
Jeremiah51:8 iBhabhiloni yawa ngoko nangoko yaza yatshatyalaliswa; mlileleni; thabatha iyeza lentlungu yakhe, ukuba kunjalo, unokuphila."
Jeremiah51:9 Ngesiyinyanga iBhabheli, ayiphiliswanga; Makahambe, elowo aye ezweni lakowabo; ngokuba isigwebo sakhe safika emazulwini, samphakamisa, sasinga ezulwini."
Jeremiah51:10 uYehova ubuvelisile ubulungisa bethu; yizani nisixelele umsebenzi kaYehova, uThixo wethu, iZiyon."
Jeremiah51:11 Danyaza iintolo; qokelela amakhaka; uYehova wawuxhokonxa umoya wookumkani bamaMedi, ngokuba umnkqangiyelo wakhe ukwiBhabheli, ukuba ayonakalise ngokuba yimpindezelo kaYehova, yimpindezelo yetempile yakhe."
Jeremiah51:12 Misa iindonga zaseBhabheli ngebhanile, qinisani abalindi, xhobisani abalindi, nilungise imizi, ngokuba uYehova ekhumbulile, wenza njengoko wakuthethayo kwabahlala eBhabheli."
Jeremiah51:13 Wena uhleli emanzini amaninzi, unobuncwane obuninzi, kufikile ukuphela kwakho, nomlinganiselo wokubawa kwakho."
Jeremiah51:14 uYehova wemikhosi wafunga ngaye, wathi, Inyaniso, ndiya kukuzalisa ngabantu njengeenkumbi; yaye baya kukhala ngawe."
Jeremiah51:15 Wenza elimiweyo ngamandla akhe, waliseka elimiweyo ngobulumko bakhe, waneka izulu ngengqondo yakhe."
Jeremiah51:16 Akulivakalisa ilizwi lakhe, maninzi amanzi esibhakabhakeni; wanyusa umphunga waya eziphelweni zehlabathi;"
Jeremiah51:17 Elowo udela okwakhe ukwazi; Wonke umkhohlisi udaniswa ngumfanekiso oqingqiweyo, ngokuba umfanekiso wakhe ubuxoki, awunamoya."
Jeremiah51:18 Kungamampunge lawo, sisenzo senkohliso; ngexesha lokundwendwela kwabo baya kutshabalala."
Jeremiah51:19 Isabelo sikaYakobi asinjengazo; ngokuba nguMenzi wezinto zonke yena, noSirayeli ntonga yelifa lakhe; NguYehova wemikhosi igama lakhe."
Jeremiah51:20 Wena usisixengxe sam, usisikrweqe sam sokulwa; ngokuba ndiya kuzihlekeza ngawe iintlanga, ndizonakalise ngawe izikumkani;"
Jeremiah51:21 Ndiya kulaphula ngawe ihashe nomkhweli walo; ndiya kuyiqhekeza ngawe inqwelo yokulwa nomkhweli wayo;
Jeremiah51:22 ndihlekeze ngawe indoda nomfazi; ndihlekeza ngawe indoda enkulu nomtsha; ndihlekeze ngawe amadodana nomthinjana;
Jeremiah51:23 Ndiya kumtyumza kunye umalusi nomhlambi wakhe; Ndiya kumtyumza ngawe umlimi neenkomo zakhe; ndibaqhekeze ngawe abaphathi nabaphathi;
Jeremiah51:24 Ndiza kukubuyekeza iBhabhiloni nabo bonke abemi bamaKhaledi ngenxa yobubi babo bonke ababenze eZiyon phambi kwamehlo enu,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah51:25 Yabona, ndinento ngakuwe, ntaba ikrazukileyo, utsho uYehova, elonakalisileyo lonke ihlabathi; ndiya kusolula isandla sam phezu kwakho, ndikutyumze emaweni, ndikwenze intaba etshisiweyo;"
Jeremiah51:26 abayi kuthabatha kuwe ilitye lembombo, nalitye lasiseko; kodwa uya kuba yintlango ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah51:27 Phakamisani ibhanile elizweni, vuthelani isigodlo ezintlangeni; zingcwaliseleni iintlanga; Misela umphathi phezu kwakhe; ukwenza amahashe eze njengehashe."
Jeremiah51:28 Zingcwaliseni iintlanga nxamnye nayo, ookumkani bamaMedi neenkosana zakhe zonke iinkosana zakhe nelizwe lonke eliphantsi kolawulo lwakhe."
Jeremiah51:29 Ilizwe liya kunyikima lize likhale, ngenxa yokuba lonke icebo likaYehova liya kuzaliseka nxamnye neBhabhiloni, ukuze ilizwe laseBhabhiloni libe yintlango, lingabi nammi."
Jeremiah51:30 Ayeka ukulwa, ahlala ezinqabeni zawo; amandla abo ephelile; babenjengabafazi; bazitshisa izakhiwo zakhe; imivalo yakhe yaphukile."
Jeremiah51:31 Kuya kuqubisana nomthunywa omnye, kuqubisane nomnye umthunywa, ukuya kuxelela ukumkani waseBhabheli ukuba umzi wakhe uthinjwe nganeno;"
Jeremiah51:32 Zema izitrato, ingcongolo isitsha ngumlilo, namagorha ankwantya."
Jeremiah51:33 Ngokuba utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, Intombi eyiBhabheli injengesibetho esi, lixesha lokuvuna; Kwaba mzuzwana ke, lafika ixesha lokuvuna kwakhe."
Jeremiah51:34 Wadla uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, wandisusa, wandenzela isidlo, saginywa njengengwenya, wahlutha isisu sakhe ngokutya kwam, wandigxotha."
Jeremiah51:35 Ugonyamelo olwenziwe kum, nenyama yam yiBhabheli, baya kuthi abemi baseZiyon; negazi lamaKaledi, iYerusalem yothi."
Jeremiah51:36 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndikuthethelele, ndikugwebele, ndikugwebele; ndiya kulomisa iilwandle zalo, ndilomise ithende layo;"
Jeremiah51:37 iBhabheli iya kuba ngumwewe wamatye, nendlu yeempungutye, izinto eziwothusayo, nezothuso, ingabi nammi."
Jeremiah51:38 Zibharhula kunye njengengonyama, zibhomboloza njengamathole engonyama."
Jeremiah51:39 Ekutshisweni kwawo ndiya kubenzela itheko ndize ndibanxilise, ukuze bonwabe baze balale ubuthongo obungunaphakade bangavuki,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah51:40 Ndiya kubathobela ekuxhelweni njengamatakane, njengeenkunzi zeegusha neenciniba."
Jeremiah51:41 Yathatyathwa njani iSesage! Hayi, ukudunyiswa kwehlabathi lonke! Hayi indlela eye yamangalisa ngayo iBhabhiloni phakathi kweentlanga!"
Jeremiah51:42 Ulwandle luphezu kweBhabhiloni, lugutyungelwe ngamaza ayo amaninzi."
Jeremiah51:43 Imizi yakhe yaba linxuwa, yaba lilizwe lomqwebedu nenkqantosi, lilizwe elingumqwebedu, ekungacandi bani kulo."
Jeremiah51:44 Ndiya kumvelela uBhele eBhabheli, ndiyirhole emlonyeni wakhe into uyiseleyo; kwaye iintlanga aziyi kuba sahlanganisana kuye; Ewe, nodonga lwaseBhabheli luya kuwa."
Jeremiah51:45 Phumani kuyo, bantu bam, nize wonk’ ubani asindise umphefumlo wakhe kwingqumbo kaYehova;"
Jeremiah51:46 ize ingatyhafi intliziyo yenu, noyike iindaba eziya kuvakala ezweni; Kuya kubakho amarhe unyaka omnye, emva koko ngomnye unyaka kuze kufike amarhe nogonyamelo elizweni, umlawuli evukelana nomlawuli."
Jeremiah51:47 Ngako oko, uyabona, iyeza imihla endiya kuyigweba ngayo imifanekiso eqingqiweyo yaseBhabheli; nelizwe lakhe lonke liya kuba neentloni, nabo bonke ababuleweyo bakhe bawe phakathi kwakhe."
Jeremiah51:48 Liya kuvuya izulu nomhlaba nayo yonke into ekuzo ngenxa yeBhabhiloni, ngenxa yokuba ababhuqi bayo beza kuyo bevela ngasemntla,” utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah51:49 Njengoko iBhabhiloni ibhukuqa ababuleweyo bakwaSirayeli, nababuleweyo behlabathi lonke baya kuwa ngendlela efanayo eBhabhiloni."
Jeremiah51:50 Nina nisindileyo ekreleni, bakani, musani ukuma; mkhumbuleni uYehova nisekude, ithi qatha ezintliziyweni zenu iYerusalem."
Jeremiah51:51 Sidanile, ngokuba sive indelo; ihlazo ligqubuthele ubuso bethu; ngokuba abasemzini bangene engcweleni yendlu kaYehova."
Jeremiah51:52 Ngako oko, yabonani, iyeza imihla, utsho uYehova, endiya kuyigweba ngayo imifanekiso yakhe eqingqiweyo, bancwine ababuleweyo ezweni lakhe."
Jeremiah51:53 Nokuba iBhabheli ithe yenyuka yaya ezulwini, nokuba ithe yomelela inqaba yayo, abangendawo bosuka bayifikele, bephuma kum; utsho uYehova."
Jeremiah51:54 Kuvakele isandi sesikhalo eBhabheli, nentshabalalo enkulu ephuma ezweni lamaKaledi."
Jeremiah51:55 Ngenxa yokuba uYehova wayibhuqa iBhabhiloni waza wayiphelisa ingxolo enkulu kuyo; agqume amaza akho njengamanzi amaninzi, sivakala isandi sesandi sawo;"
Jeremiah51:56 Ngokuba umbhuqi wayifikela, iBhabheli ke, namagorha ayo athinjwa, zaphulwe zonke izaphetha zayo; ngokuba uYehova, uThixo wempindezelo, uya kukubuyisela ngonaphakade."
Jeremiah51:57 Ndiyabanxilisa abathetheli bayo nezilumko zayo, nabathetheli bayo, nabathetheli bayo, namagorha ayo; baya kulala ubuthongo obungunaphakade yaye abayi kuvuka,” utsho uYehova ogama lakhe linguYehova wemikhosi."
Jeremiah51:58 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Udonga olubanzi lweBhabheli luya kudilizwa kuphele, amasango ayo aphakamileyo atshiswe ngomlilo; kwaye abantu baya kuzidlisa ilize, nabantu emlilweni, yaye baya kulamba."
Jeremiah51:59 Ilizwi awathi uYeremiya umprofeti wamwisela umthetho ngalo uSeraya, unyana kaNeriya, unyana kaMahaseya, ekuyeni kwakhe eBhabheli noZedekiya ukumkani wakwaYuda, ngomnyaka wesine wobukumkani bakhe; Ke uSeraya lo ke ebeyinkosana ezolileyo."
Jeremiah51:60 uYeremiya wabubhala encwadini bonke ububi obuya kuza eBhabheli, onke la mazwi abhaliweyo eBhabheli."
Jeremiah51:61 uYeremiya waqhubeka wathi kuSeraya: “Ukuba uthe wafika eBhabhiloni waza wabona, wawafunda onke la mazwi;"
Jeremiah51:62 Uze uthi, Awu, Yehova, uthethe kakubi ngale ndawo ukuba uyitshabalalise, ingasali kuyo, kungasali mntu, kuthabathele nenkomo; yona iya kuba yintlango ngonaphakade."
Jeremiah51:63 Wakugqiba ukuyifunda le ncwadi, uze ubophe ilitye kuyo, uyiphose esazulwini somlambo umEfrati."
Jeremiah51:64 Uya kuthi, Iya kutsho ke iBhabheli ukuthi xumbu kwayo, ingaphumi ngenxa yobubi endiya kuyizisela bona; kwaye baya kudinwa. Amazwi kaYeremiya asamile."
Jeremiah52:1 uZedekiya ubeminyaka imashumi mabini anamnye ezelwe, ukuba ngukumkani kwakhe; waba neminyaka elishumi elinamnye engukumkani eYerusalem. Igama lonina belinguHamutali, intombi kaYeremiya, waseLibhena."
Jeremiah52:2 Wenza okubi emehlweni kaYehova, njengoYehoyakim."
Jeremiah52:3 Kwathi ngenxa yomsindo kaYehova kwenzeka eYerusalem nakwaYuda, wada wabagxotha ebusweni bakhe, kangangokuba uZedekiya wamvukela ukumkani waseBhabhiloni."
Jeremiah52:4 Ngonyaka wesithoba wolawulo lwakhe, ngenyanga yeshumi, ngomhla weshumi enyangeni leyo, uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabhiloni wayihlasela iYerusalem nomkhosi wakhe wonke waza wayingqinga waza wakha iinqaba ngokuchasene nayo ukujikeleza."
Jeremiah52:5 Wangqingwa ke umzi, kwada kwangumnyaka weshumi elinamnye wokumkani uZedekiya."
Jeremiah52:6 Ngenyanga yesine, ngomhla wesithoba enyangeni leyo, yaba nkulu indlala esixekweni, kangangokuba abantu belizwe babengenasonka."
Jeremiah52:7 Wabhujiswa ke umzi, asaba onke amadoda anobukroti, aphuma phakathi komzi ebusuku ngesango eliphakathi kweendonga zombini ezisemyezweni wokumkani; Yaye amaKaledi ayekufuphi isixeko ngeenxa zonke, kwaye waqhubeka entlango."
Jeremiah52:8 Umkhosi wamaKaledi wamsukela ukumkani, wamthimba uZedekiya ezinkqantosini zaseYeriko; yaphangalala yonke impi yakhe, yemka kuye."
Jeremiah52:9 Bandula ke bambamba ukumkani baza bamzisa kukumkani waseBhabhiloni eRibhela kwilizwe laseHamati; apho wamgweba khona.
Jeremiah52:10 Ukumkani waseBhabheli wababulala oonyana bakaZedekiya ekhangele; Kananjalo wazibulala zonke iinkosana zakwaYuda eRibhela.
Jeremiah52:11 Wacinywa amehlo kaZedekiya; yaye ukumkani waseBhabhiloni wamkhonkxa ngemixokelelwane waza wamsa eBhabhiloni waza wamfaka entolongweni de kwayimini yokufa kwakhe.
Jeremiah52:12 Ngenyanga yesihlanu, ngomhla weshumi enyangeni leyo, oko kukuthi, unyaka weshumi elinesithoba kaNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabhiloni, uNebhuzaradan umphathi wamafanankosi, owayesebenzela ukumkani waseBhabhiloni, weza eYerusalem;"
Jeremiah52:13 Yatshiswa indlu kaYehova, nendlu yokumkani; zatsha zonke izindlu zaseYerusalem, nezindlu zonke zamadoda amakhulu."
Jeremiah52:14 Lonke ibutho lomkhosi lamaKaledi, elinomthetheli wabacibi-mlilo, lazidiliza zonke iindonga zaseYerusalem ngeenxa zonke."
Jeremiah52:15 uNebhuzaradan umthetheli wabasiki, namahlwempu abantu, namasalela abantu, abaseleyo phakathi komzi, nabathinjwa abazinikele kukumkani waseBhabheli, nenxenye yabaninzi ababakhokelayo kude njengamabanjwa."
Jeremiah52:16 Ke uNebhuzaradan umthetheli wabasiki, wabashiya abazizisweli belizwe, ukuba babe ngabalimi nabalimi."
Jeremiah52:17 Ke iintsika zobhedu zendlu kaYehova, nezitya zokuhlambela, nentlabathi yobhedu, ezibe zisendlwini kaYehova, amaGalati aziqhekeza, aluthabatha kuzo lonke ubhedu olo, aya nazo eBhabheli."
Jeremiah52:18 Neembiza, nemihlakulwana, neeemele, nezitya zokutshiza, neenkamba, neempahla zonke zobhedu ebekulungiselelwa ngazo."
Jeremiah52:19 Neenkamba, neengcedevu, neenkamba, neepani, neziphatho, neenkamba, neendebe; igolide leyo ibiyigolide, nesilivere leyo, yamthabatha umthetheli wabakhandi."
Jeremiah52:20 Iintsika zambini, nolwandle olunye, neshumi elinambini leenkomo zobhedu, ezibe ziphantsi kweentsika ezo, awazenzayo ukumkani uSolomon endlwini kaYehova, alwaba nakulinganiswa ubhedu lwezo mpahla zonke."
Jeremiah52:21 Neentsika ezo, ukuphakama kwenye intsika bekuziikubhite ezilishumi elinesibhozo; nomtya ubuziikubhite ezilishumi elinambini ngeenxa zonke; ubungqingqwa bayo bebuyiminwe emine; ibingumngxuma."
Jeremiah52:22 Kwaye kukho intloko yobhedu phezu kwayo; ukuphakama kwentloko enye bekuziikubhite ezintlanu, intloko ephothiweyo nezithsaba ezijikelezileyo, zazezobhedu. Ikholamu yesibini kunye neziqhushumbisi zazinje."
Jeremiah52:23 Iirharnati ezingamashumi asithoba anesithandathu, ngapha nangapha; zonke iintsontelo zelinen ephothiweyo zaba likhulu ngeenxa zonke."
Jeremiah52:24 Umthetheli wabasiki wamthabatha uSeraya, umbingeleli omkhulu, noZefaniya, umbingeleli wesibini, nabagcini-masango bobathathu."
Jeremiah52:25 Yathabatha ithenwa phakathi komzi, umthetheli wamadoda okulwa; kwafunyanwa amadoda asixhenxe kukumkani phakathi komzi; nonobhala wamatyala, owabahlanganisayo abantu belizwe; namadoda angamashumi amathandathu kubantu belizwe, awafunyanwayo phakathi komzi."
Jeremiah52:26 Wabathabatha ke uNebhuzaradan umthetheli wabasiki, wabasa kukumkani waseBhabheli, eRibhela."
Jeremiah52:27 Ukumkani waseBhabhiloni waboyisa waza wababulala eRibhela kwilizwe laseHamati. Ngoko uYuda wathinjwa wemka kwilizwe lakhe.
Jeremiah52:28 Ngabo aba abantu awabafudusayo uNebhukadenetsare: ngomnyaka wesixhenxe, amaYuda angamawaka amathathu, anamanci mabini anamathathu;"
Jeremiah52:29 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinamnye wobukumkani bukaNebhukadenetsare, wasusa eYerusalem amakhulu asibhozo, anamanci mathathu anamabini amadoda."
Jeremiah52:30 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omabini anesithathu wobukumkani bukaNebhukadenetsare, uNebhuzaradan umthetheli wabasiki wathabatha amakhulu asixhenxe anamanci mane anesihlanu abantu ekuthinjweni phakathi kwamaYuda; bonke abantu babengamawaka amane anamakhulu amathandathu."
Jeremiah52:31 Kwathi ngomnyaka wamashumi omathathu anesixhenxe wokuthinjwa kukaYehoyakin, ukumkani wakwaYuda, ngenyanga yeshumi elinesibini, ngosuku lwamashumi omabini anesihlanu enyangeni leyo, uEvili-merodaki, ukumkani waseBhabheli, ngomnyaka wokuqala wobukumkani bakhe. Waba ngukumkani phezu kwentloko kaYehoyakin, ukumkani wakwaYuda, wamkhupha entolongweni;"
Jeremiah52:32 Wathetha kakuhle naye, wayimisa itrone yakhe, yangaphezu kweetrone zookumkani ababenaye eBhabheli."
Jeremiah52:33 Wanxiba izambatho zakhe zasentolongweni, waza waqhubeka esidla isonka phambi kobuso bakhe yonke imihla yobomi bakhe."
Jeremiah52:34 Umphako wakhe wawunikwa imihla ngemihla, kukumkani waseBhabheli, kwada kwayimini yokufa kwakhe, yonke imihla yobomi bakhe."
Lamentations1:1 Hayi, ukuma komzi obemi khona! hayi indlela awayefana ngayo nomhlolokazi! Oyena mkhulu phakathi kweentlanga nokumkanikazi esahlukweni, utheni na ukuba abe ngumgwebi!"
Lamentations1:2 Ulila kakhulu ebusuku, iinyembezi zakhe zisezidleleni zakhe; kuzo zonke izithandwa zakhe akukho mthuthuzeli; Bonke abahlobo bakhe bamngcatshile baza baba ziintshaba zakhe."
Lamentations1:3 uYuda wathinjwa ngenxa yokubandezeleka nangenxa yobukhoboka obuninzi; uhleli ezintlangeni, akabuboni ukuphumla; bonke abasukeli bakhe bambamba enyanyeni."
Lamentations1:4 Izitrato zaseZiyon ziyakhala, ngokuba akukho namnye uzayo emithendelekweni; onke amasango ayo aludaka; ababingeleli bakhe bayancwina, Iintombi zakhe zinosizi, yena ebuhlungu."
Lamentations1:5 Abachasi bakhe baninzi, ababandezeli bakhe banempumelelo; ngokuba uYehova wamxina ngenxa yezikreqo zakhe ezininzi; oonyana bakhe bathinjwa phambi kweentshaba."
Lamentations1:6 Bonke ubuhle bayo buphumile entombini enguZiyon;
Lamentations1:7 iYerusalem yazikhumbula, ngexesha leshwangusha layo neentsizi zayo, zonke izinto zayo ezinqwenelekayo ebinazo kwamandulo, Ekuweni kwabantu bayo phambi kotshaba, akwabakho mncedi; Abachasi bambona baza bahlekisa ngaye ngeesabatha zakhe."
Lamentations1:8 iYerusalem yenze isono esikhulu; wasuswa ke ngoko; Bonke ababelihlonela babelidela, kuba bebona ukungcola kwalo; ewe wancwina wajonga ngasemva."
Lamentations1:9 Ubunqambi bakhe busezingutyeni zakhe; akacingi ngekamva lakhe lokugqibela; ke ngoko, wemka ngendlela engaqhelekanga, engenamncedi. Yehova yibone inkxwaleko yam, ngokuba utshaba luzizukisile."
Lamentations1:10 Utshaba lwesa isandla salo phezu kwezinto zalo zonke ezizithandayo, ngenxa enokuba libona iintlanga zingena engcweleni yakhe, owuwise umthetho wena, ukuba zingangeni ebandleni lakho."
Lamentations1:11 Bonke abantu bakhe bayancwina, befuna isonka; babanika iilekese njengokutya kokuhlaziya umoya; yabona, Yehova, zigcine; ngokuba ndisuke ndaba ngongendawo."
Lamentations1:12 Akunto na kuni nonke nina nidlula ngendlela? Khangelani nibone, ukuba kukho na umvandedwa onjengam, wenziweyo kum, andicinezele ngawo uYehova ngemini yomsindo wakhe."
Lamentations1:13 Ephezulu, wathumela umlilo emathanjeni am, wawagubungela; Uzithiyele iinyawo zam, wandiguqula; Ebendiphethe kakubi ndidiniwe imini yonke."
Lamentations1:14 Idyokhwe yezikreqo zam ibotshwe sisandla sakhe; Uwaphule amandla am, uYehova undinikele esandleni sabo, endingenakusuka kubo."
Lamentations1:15 uYehova uwanyhashe onke amagorha phakathi kwam; Umeme ibandla ukuba laphule amadodana am; iNkosi yam ixovule intombi enguYuda, njengesixovulelo sewayini."
Lamentations1:16 Ndiyazilela ezi zinto; iliso lam, iliso lam liphalaza amanzi, Ngokuba ekude kum umthuthuzeli owenza umphefumlo wam; Babhidekile abantwana bam, ngokuba utshaba loyisile."
Lamentations1:17 iZiyon iyazolula izandla zayo, ayinamthuthuzeli; uYehova wawisa umthetho ngoYakobi, ukuba bamtyelele ngaphakathi; iYerusalem injengomfazi osexesheni phakathi kwabo."
Lamentations1:18 uYehova ulilungisa; ngokuba bendiphikise umlomo wakhe.
Lamentations1:19 Ndibabizile abandithandayo, basuka bandixokisa; ababingeleli bam namadoda amakhulu am bazinikele kuwo umzi, xa babefuna ukudla kwabo, ukuba bawubuyise umphefumlo wabo."
Lamentations1:20 Khangela, Yehova! ngokuba ndibandezelekile; isisu sam asiphumli; Intliziyo yam iguqukile phakathi kwam; ngokuba bendiqhayisa kakhulu; ngaphandle baphanga umkhonto, Endlwini kukufa njengokufa."
Lamentations1:21 Bandivile ukuba ndiyancwina; akukho bani undithuthuzelayo; Zonke iintshaba zam zibuvile ububi bam; bayavuya kuba eyenzile; Uya kuyizisa imini oyimemileyo, ziya kuba njengam ke."
Lamentations1:22 Mabufike phambi kwakho bonke ububi bazo; uze wenze kuzo kanye njengoko undenze ngako ngenxa yokunxaxha kwam konke, ngenxa yokuba zininzi izono zam nentliziyo yam ivaliwe."
Lamentations2:1 iNkosi iyigubungele intombi enguZiyon ngefu ngomsindo wayo, izikhuphe ezulwini ubuhle bukaSirayeli, yayisa emhlabeni; ayisayi kusikhumbula isihlalo seenyawo zayo ngemini yomsindo wayo."
Lamentations2:2 Wayiphanzisa yonke iminquba kaYakobi uYehova, akaba namfesane kuye; Ngomsindo wakhe wazibhukuqa iimboniselo zentombi enguYuda; Wawakhahlela phantsi; Wabenza inqambi ubukumkani nabathetheli babo."
Lamentations2:3 Ngomsindo wakhe wazitshabalalisa zonke iimpondo zikaSirayeli, Wasusa isandla sakhe sokunene elutshabeni, Wamtshisa uYakobi njengomlilo olenya ngeenxa zonke."
Lamentations2:4 Isityedile isaphetha sayo njengotshaba; Wema ngasekunene kwakhe, enjengombandezeli, wayibulala yonke into enayo emehlweni akhe, ententeni yentombi enguZiyon; Wawuphalaza njengomlilo umsindo wakhe."
Lamentations2:5 uYehova waba njengotshaba, esidla uSirayeli, ewaginya zonke iingxande zakhe ezinde;"
Lamentations2:6 Wawuhluba umsimelelo wakhe ngogonyamelo, ngokungathi uphuma entsimini; wazitshabalalisa iindawo zakhe zokuhlangana; uYehova uyilibele imithendeleko neesabatha zaseZiyon, yaye ekuvutheni komsindo wakhe, uye wamcekisa ukumkani nombingeleli."
Lamentations2:7 iNkosi yam isilahlile isibingelelo sayo, iyisimbile ingcwele yayo, izinikele iindonga zeengxande zayo ezinde esandleni sotshaba; benza ingxolo endlwini kaYehova njengakwimini yomthendeleko."
Lamentations2:8 uYehova ucinge ukonakalisa udonga lwentombi enguZiyon; Wolula umsonto, asatyeka enzonzobileni isandla sakhe; ke ngoko, wenza iindonga zikhala; badanile kunye."
Lamentations2:9 Amasango akhe atshonile emhlabeni; Amazwi akhe atshabalalisa, ayaphula; ukumkani wayo nabathetheli bayo baphakathi kweentlanga; umthetho awusekho; nabaprofeti bayo ababuboni ubuso bukaYehova."
Lamentations2:10 Ahlala phantsi athi cwaka amadoda amakhulu entombi enguZiyon; bagalela uthuli entloko; banxibe iingubo ezimnyama; Iintombi zaseYerusalem zithobe iintloko zazo.
Lamentations2:11 Amehlo am azele zinyembezi, ziyabila isisu sam, intliziyo yam ibuhlungu ngenxa yokwaphuka kwentombi yabantu bakowethu; ngokuba besifa isiqaqa abantwana neentsana ezitratweni zomzi."
Lamentations2:12 Bathi koonina, Iphi na ingqolowa newayini? Baphakanyiswa njengabangxwelerhiweyo ezitratweni zomzi, Ekuziphalazeni kwemiphefumlo yabo ezifubeni zoonina."
Lamentations2:13 Ndiya kungqina ngantoni na kuwe? Ndikufanekise nantoni na, ntombi yaseYerusalem? Ndibona ntoni na kuwe, ukuze ndikuthuthuzele, ntombindini iyintombi, inguZiyon? ngokuba kukhulu ngangolwandle ixesha lakho; ngubani na onokukuphilisa?"
Lamentations2:14 Abaprofeti bakho bakubonisa izinto ezililize nezibubudenge, yaye ababutyhilanga ububi bakho ukuze bakuthintele ukuthinjwa; ke ndanibona imithwalo ebuxoki, nokugxothwa."
Lamentations2:15 Bonke abadlulayo bancoma; Bavuthela umlozi, bahlunguzela iintloko ngentombi enguYerusalem, besithi, Ngulo mzi na lo, lo kuthiwa kuphela kwenzwakazi, yimihlali yehlabathi lonke?"
Lamentations2:16 Zonke iintshaba zakho zikwakhamisela umlomo; babetha umlozi kwaye batshixizela amazinyo; bathi, Simdlile; ngenene le yimini ebesiyilindele; siyifumene, sayibona."
Lamentations2:17 Wenza ke uYehova njengoko wayecinga; Wasifeza isigwebo, awayesiwisele umthetho kwakudala, esithi, Wawa, akananceba; uluvuyisile utshaba lwakho, Luphakamise uphondo lwababandezeli bakho."
Lamentations2:18 Intliziyo yabo ikhala kuYehova, Ludonga lwentombi enguZiyon, maziphume iinyembezi njengomlambo imini nobusuku linganqabi iliso lakho."
Lamentations2:19 Vuka, ukhale ebusuku; yiphalaze njengamanzi intliziyo yakho phambi koYehova, ekuqaleni kwemilindo; ziphakamisele kuyo izandla zakho, ngenxa yomphefumlo wabantwana bakho, ababulawa yindlala emantloko ezitrato zonke."
Lamentations2:20 Khangela, Yehova, ubone ukuba wenze kubani na le nto. Ngaba abafazi baya kudla iziqhamo zabo nabantwana ixesha elide? Ngaba umbingeleli nomprofeti baya kubulawa engcweleni kaYehova?"
Lamentations2:21 Balele phantsi emhlabeni amadoda amakhulu; Umthinjana wam namadodana am awile likrele; Wababulala ngemini yomsindo wakho; nabulala, akwacoleka."
Lamentations2:22 Nakubiza ukundoyika kwam ezindaweni zonke, ngokwemini yomthendeleko, akwabakho usindayo, usalayo, ngemini yomsindo kaYehova;"
Lamentations3:1 Mna ke ndingumntu obone intlupheko ngentonga yokuphuphuma komsindo wakhe.
Lamentations3:2 Wandikhokela wandisa ebumnyameni, akwaba sekukhanyeni."
Lamentations3:3 Okunene, undijikile; undijikela imini yonke isandla sakhe."
Lamentations3:4 Uyondlekile inyama yam nolusu lwam; uwaphule amathambo am.
Lamentations3:5 Wandakhela phezu kwam waza wandirhangqa ngenyongo nenkathazo.
Lamentations3:6 Undibeke ezindaweni ezimnyama, njengabafayo kwakudala;"
Lamentations3:7 Undibiyele ngothango, ukuba ndingabi nakuphuma; Wayenza nzima ityathanga lam."
Lamentations3:8 Nokuba ndibize, ndidanduluke, awuwuva umthandazo wam."
Lamentations3:9 Uzibiyele iindlela zam ngamatye aqingqiweyo, uzenze zaba gwenxa iindlela zam."
Lamentations3:10 Kum ube njengebhere elalele, enjengengonyama izimele;"
Lamentations3:11 Uzitshintshile iindlela zam, wandiqwenga; Undenze inkqantosi."
Lamentations3:12 Wasigoba isaphetha sakhe, wandimisa ndibe lutolo lotolo."
Lamentations3:13 Wafaka iintolo zekhondom yakhe ezintso zam.
Lamentations3:14 Ndisuke ndayintlekisa kubantu bonke bakowethu; bacula imini yonke.
Lamentations3:15 Undihluthise ngezinto ezikrakra, wandiseza incindi enencasa."
Lamentations3:16 Ubuye wawatyumza ngohlalu amazinyo am, wandixinzelela phantsi ngothuthu."
Lamentations3:17 Uwukhwelisile umphefumlo wam eluxolweni; Ndiyilibele impumelelo.
Lamentations3:18 Ndathi ke, Amandla am nethemba lam likuYehova;"
Lamentations3:19 Zikhumbule iimbandezelo zam, neembandezelo zam, nentlabathi, nenyongo;"
Lamentations3:20 Umphefumlo wam uyazikhumbula unangoku ezo zinto, usibekekile kum."
Lamentations3:21 Ndikhumbula oku engqondweni yam, ngenxa yoko ndinethemba."
Lamentations3:22 Ziinceba zikaYehova le nto ingasayi kutshabalala, ngokuba ingunaphakade inceba yakhe."
Lamentations3:23 Iyahlaziyeka imiso ngemiso; kukhulu ukuthembeka kwakho.
Lamentations3:24 Isabelo sam nguYehova, utsho umphefumlo wam; ke ngoko, ndiya kumthemba."
Lamentations3:25 uYehova unguThixo kwabakholose ngaye, kumphefumlo omquqelayo."
Lamentations3:26 Kulungile ukuba umntu alindele usindiso lukaYehova, aze alinde ngokuthe cwaka."
Lamentations3:27 Kuyilungele indoda ukuba iyithwale idyokhwe kwasebutsheni bayo.
Lamentations3:28 Uhleli yedwa, wonwabile;"
Lamentations3:29 Uwubeka eluthulini umlomo wakhe; ukuba kunjalo, kusenokubakho ithemba."
Lamentations3:30 Unika lowo umbethayo isidlele sakhe; uzele ziintloni.
Lamentations3:31 Ngenxa yokuba uYehova akayi kumshiya ngonaphakade.
Lamentations3:32 Nokuba uthe wenza umvandedwa, woba nemfesane ngokobuninzi benceba yakhe."
Lamentations3:33 Kuba uyabacudisa oonyana babantu ngokuzithandela nangentuthumbo.
Lamentations3:34 Ukunyathela phantsi kweenyawo zakhe bonke abathinjwa behlabathi;
Lamentations3:35 Uyaphambuka egunyeni lakhe phambi koPhezukonke,"
Lamentations3:36 uYehova akakuthandi ukumjongela phantsi umntu kwishishini lakhe.
Lamentations3:37 Ngubani othethayo, yaye yintoni eyenzekayo xa uYehova engayaleli?"
Lamentations3:38 Akukho okubi nokulungileyo emlonyeni wOsenyangweni na?
Lamentations3:39 Yini na ukuba umntu akhalaze ngenxa yezono zakhe?
Lamentations3:40 Masizihlole, sizivavanye iindlela zethu, size sibuyele kuYehova."
Lamentations3:41 Masizinyuse iintliziyo zethu nezandla zethu, sizise kuThixo osemazulwini;"
Lamentations3:42 Sikreqile, sigwilikile; Anixolanga."
Lamentations3:43 Wazambesa ngomsindo, wasitshutshisa; Wabulala, akwaba nanceba."
Lamentations3:44 Uzigqubuthele ngelifu, ukuze ungafiki umthandazo wethu."
Lamentations3:45 Usenze amatyotyombe nenkunkuma phakathi kwabantu.
Lamentations3:46 Zisakhamisele umlomo wazo zonke iintshaba zethu;
Lamentations3:47 Sifikelwe kukunkwantya, nemigibe, nokwaphuka nokwaphuka."
Lamentations3:48 Iliso lam lihla imijelo yamanzi, ngenxa yokwaphuka kwentombi yabantu bakowethu."
Lamentations3:49 Iliso lam liyaphalala, aliyi kuma;"
Lamentations3:50 de uYehova wakhangela phantsi waza wabona esezulwini.
Lamentations3:51 Iliso lam liyayibetha intliziyo yam, ngenxa yeentombi zonke zomzi wakowethu."
Lamentations3:52 Zindizingele njengentaka iintshaba zam ngelize;
Lamentations3:53 Babubulalela umphefumlo wam emhadini, bandigibisela ngamatye."
Lamentations3:54 Amanzi ahamba phezu kwentloko yam; Ndathi ke, Nditshabalele."
Lamentations3:55 Ndibize igama lakho, Yehova, ndisemhadini."
Lamentations3:56 Ulivile ilizwi lam; musa ukuyifihla indlebe yakho emphefumlweni wam, ekuzibikeni kwam."
Lamentations3:57 Usondele imini endakubizayo; ubusithi, Musa ukoyika."
Lamentations3:58 Owu, Yehova, uya kuyiphikisa imicimbi yomphefumlo wam; Wabusindisa ubomi bam."
Lamentations3:59 Yehova, ukubonile ukungalungisi kwam; ligwebe ityala lam ngenxa yam."
Lamentations3:60 Uyibonile yonke impindezelo yabo, uzivile zonke iingcinga zabo ngam."
Lamentations3:61 Yehova, ukuvile ukudelela kwabo, uzivile zonke iingcinga zabo ngam;"
Lamentations3:62 Umlomo wabakreqayo kum, Namayelenqe abo ngam imini yonke."
Lamentations3:63 Khangela indlela abahlala ngayo kunye nendlela abama ngayo; Ngumculo wabo.
Lamentations3:64 Yehova, bavuze ngokomsebenzi wezandla zabo."
Lamentations3:65 Banike ubuthuntu bentliziyo, intshwabulo yakho mayibe kubo;"
Lamentations3:66 Basukeleni nibatshabalalise ngomsindo phantsi kwamazulu kaYehova.
Lamentations4:1 Hayi, ukuba mfiliba kwegolide! Hayi, ukuguquguquka kwegolide ecikizekileyo! amatye engcwele aphalazwe ezitratweni zonke."
Lamentations4:2 Zintanda, Ziyon, xa kuthelekiswa negolide engcwengiweyo, Hayi, ukubalelwa ekuthini zizitya zodongwe, umsebenzi wezandla zombumbi!"
Lamentations4:3 Kwaneemlonya ziwarhola amabele, Zanyise amathole azo; Ke yona intombi yabantu bam isuke yaba sisijorha njengenciniba entlango."
Lamentations4:4 Ulwimi losana lunamathela ekhuhlangubeni lakhe linxano; Abantwana bacela isonka, akukho ubakhathaleleyo."
Lamentations4:5 Ababedlile babonakala ezitratweni;
Lamentations4:6 Kuba isohlwayo sobubi bentombi yabantu bam sikhulu kunesohlwayo sesono seSodom, eyabhukuqwayo ngephanyazo, akwabikho zandla ziseleyo kuyo."
Lamentations4:7 Babeqaqambile abaNaziri bakhe ngaphezu kwekhephu, bemhlophe ngaphezu kobisi, beyingqombela kuneerubhi emzimbeni, ukubengezela kwabo kunjengesafire."
Lamentations4:8 Ubuso babo bumnyama ngaphezu kwamalahle; Abanakwa ezitratweni; ulusu lwabo lutshele emathanjeni abo; yoma yanjengentonga.
Lamentations4:9 Abo babulewe ngekrele balunge ngakumbi kunabo babulawa yindlala, ngenxa yokuba ngabo baluvulayo ucango, boyisiwe ngenxa yokunqongophala kweziqhamo zelizwe."
Lamentations4:10 Izandla zomfazi onenceba ziseza abantwana; kukudla kwabo ekubhujisweni kwentombi yabantu bam.
Lamentations4:11 uYehova uwufezile umsindo wakhe; Uwuphalazile umsindo wakhe waza wafaka umlilo eZiyon, wazitshisa neziseko zayo."
Lamentations4:12 Bebengayi kukholwa ookumkani belimiweyo, nabemi bonke belimiweyo, ukuba amasango aseYerusalem alutshaba;"
Lamentations4:13 ngenxa yezono zabaprofeti bakhe, nangenxa yezinto ezimbi zababingeleli bakhe, abaphalaza igazi lamalungisa kuyo;"
Lamentations4:14 Babebhadula ezitalatweni njengeemfama, bedyobhekile ligazi, ukuze abantu bangabi nakuchukumisa neempahla zabo."
Lamentations4:15 Bathi kuwo, Hambani; ayicocekanga; mkani, mkani, musani ukuphatha; ekubalekeni kwabo, babhadula ezintlangeni, bathi, Abayi kubuya baphambukele khona."
Lamentations4:16 Umsindo kaYehova wabahlula; akasayi kuba sabakhangela; abakhange babe nesimilo sababingeleli, bengawathandi amadoda amakhulu."
Lamentations4:17 Thina, amehlo ethu akhangele uncedo lwethu olungamampunge; ngokuqaphela kwethu sasilindele isizwe esingenako ukusigcina."
Lamentations4:18 Bazingela amanyathela ethu, ukuba singahambi ezitratweni zethu; ngokuba kufikile ukuphela kwethu."
Lamentations4:19 Abasisukelayo banamendu ngaphezu kwexhalanga lezulu;
Lamentations4:20 Umoya wamathatha ethu, umthanjiswa kaYehova, ubambeke equleni labo, ebesithi ngaye, Siya kuhlala emthunzini wakhe ezintlangeni."
Lamentations4:21 Yiba nemihlali ugcobe, ntombi yakwaEdom, uhleliyo ezweni lakowethu; idlule phezu kwakho indebe; uya kunxila ukhulule."
Lamentations4:22 Isohlwayo sobungendawo bakho sigqityiwe, ntombi yaseZiyon! Akayi kuphinda athimbe; Ubuvelelele ububi bakho, ntombi yakwaEdom! uya kuzityhila izono zakho."
Lamentations5:1 Kukhumbule, Yehova, okusihleleyo; Lumka, ulibone ihlazo lethu."
Lamentations5:2 Ilifa lethu lidlulele kwabasemzini, nezindlu zethu kolunye uhlanga;"
Lamentations5:3 Siziinkedama neenkedama, Ooomama bethu ngabahlolokazi."
Lamentations5:4 Amanzi ethu siwasele ngemali; iinkuni zethu zathengiswa.
Lamentations5:5 Zicinezelekile iintamo zethu: Sisebenza nzima, asiphumli."
Lamentations5:6 Sasiza kumaYiputa nama-Asiriya, ukuba ahluthe ngesonka;"
Lamentations5:7 Oobawo bonile, abasekho; sabuthwala ubugwenxa babo."
Lamentations5:8 Besilawulwa ngabakhonzi, kungekho usihlangulayo esandleni sabo."
Lamentations5:9 Isonka sethu sisithabatha ngokubeka umphefumlo wethu esichengeni, ngenxa yekrele entlango."
Lamentations5:10 Ulusu lwethu lumnyama njengeziko Ngenxa yokulamba.
Lamentations5:11 Bazukisa abafazi baseZiyon, Umthinjana emizini yakwaYuda."
Lamentations5:12 Baxhonywe abathetheli ngezandla; ubuso bamadoda amakhulu buhlazekile.
Lamentations5:13 Bathabatha abafana ukuba basile, abantwana bawa phantsi kweenkuni."
Lamentations5:14 Amadoda amakhulu ema esangweni, amadodana eneengoma zawo;"
Lamentations5:15 Iphelile imihlali yentliziyo yethu; Umngqungqo wethu ube sisikhalo.
Lamentations5:16 Siwele isithsaba entlokweni yethu; Yeha ke thina xa sonile!
Lamentations5:17 Ngenxa yoko idiniwe intliziyo; ngenxa yezo zinto amehlo ethu anorhatyazo.
Lamentations5:18 Ngenxa yentaba yaseZiyon, kuba ibharhile, Kuhamba iimpungutye phezu kwayo."
Lamentations5:19 Yehova, uhleli ngonaphakade; Itrone yakho ikwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana."
Lamentations5:20 Yini na ukuba usilibale ngonaphakade, Usishiye kude kube kude?"
Lamentations5:21 Yehova, masizohlwaye ngawe, size sizohlwaye; hlaziya imihla yethu njengesiqhelo."
Lamentations5:22 Kodwa yena usilahlile okunene; unomsindo omkhulu kuthi.
Ezekiel1:1 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omathathu, ngenyanga yesine, ngolwesihlanu usuku enyangeni leyo, ndakubon’ ukuba ndiphakathi kwabathinjwe emlanjeni oyiKebhare, avuleka amazulu, ndabona imibono kaThixo."
Ezekiel1:2 Ngomhla wesihlanu enyangeni leyo, oko kukuthi, umnyaka wesihlanu wekratshi lokumkani uYehoyakin."
Ezekiel1:3 Lafika ilizwi likaYehova ngokungqalileyo kuHezekile unyana kaBhusi umbingeleli kwilizwe lamaKhaledi kufuphi nomlambo iKebhare; saba phezu kwakhe khona isandla sikaYehova.
Ezekiel1:4 Ndabona, nanko kukho umoya ovuthuzayo, uvela ngasentla, uvela ngelifu elikhulu, nomlilo ogubungelayo, kukukhanya okumhlophe, kuphuma phakathi komlilo;"
Ezekiel1:5 Kwabakho ke kuwo umzekeliso wezinto eziphilileyo zone. Imbonakalo yawo ibinje; babenemo yomntu.
Ezekiel1:6 Inye ibe inobuso obune, inye ibe inamaphiko amane."
Ezekiel1:7 Imilenze yazo ibiyimilenze ethe tye; umphantsi weenyawo zazo ubunjengomphantsi wenqina lethole, zibengezela ngokwembonakalo yobhedu olukhazimlisiweyo."
Ezekiel1:8 Zazinezandla zomntu phantsi kwamaphiko azo emacaleni azo omane; zone kuzo zazinobuso namaphiko.
Ezekiel1:9 Amaphiko azo abehlangene; ababuyanga; bahamba baya phambili ngabanye.
Ezekiel1:10 Ke imfano yobuso bazo ibinobuso obune bomntu, nobuso bengonyama bune ngasekunene; zibe zinobuso benkomo zone ngasekhohlo; zinobuso bokhozi zone."
Ezekiel1:11 Ubuso bazo babunjalo, namaphiko azo ayelukile; iingalo zombini zazihlangene, zombini zazigqubuthele imizimba yazo."
Ezekiel1:12 Bonke baya ngaphambili; apho sukuba umoya ubufuna ukuya khona, zaya khona; kwaye abazange babuye ekuhambeni kwabo."
Ezekiel1:13 Imfano yezinto eziphilileyo ezo, imbonakalo yazo, ibingathi ngamalahle omlilo abasiweyo; ibingathi yimbonakalo yezikhuni ezitshangazayo; kwabengezela umlilo, kwaphuma imibane emlilweni."
Ezekiel1:14 Izinto eziphilileyo bezigidima zibuye, ngokokubonakala kombane."
Ezekiel1:15 Ndakhangela ezintweni eziphilileyo, ndabona iivili emhlabeni, ecaleni kwezinto eziphilileyo, zinganye iivili kubuso ngobuso bazo obune."
Ezekiel1:16 Ukubonakala kweevili nokusetyenzwa kwazo kwakunjengokubonakala kweevili nokubukeka kwazo zone, zibe zifana ngokufanayo, ukubonakala kwazo nokusetyenzwa kwazo kwakunjengevili phakathi kwevili."
Ezekiel1:17 Ekuhambeni kwakhe wahamba kumacala awo omane, yaye akazange ajike ekuhambeni kwakhe."
Ezekiel1:18 Amakhonkco awo ebephakame ngokoyikeka; Amakhonkco azo ebezele ngamehlo ngeenxa zonke kuzo zone.
Ezekiel1:19 Zakuhamba izinto eziphilileyo, zahamba nazo iivili kunye nazo; zakusuka izinto eziphilileyo emhlabeni, zasuka nazo iivili."
Ezekiel1:20 Apho sukuba ubusiya khona umoya, zaya apho sukuba umoya ubusiya khona; zasuka iivili, ngokokuba umoya wento ephilileyo ubukho ezivilini ezo."
Ezekiel1:21 Bakuba bemkile, naye wemka; zema, zema; zakusuka emhlabeni, zasuka iivili kunye nazo, ngokokuba umoya wezinto eziphilileyo ubukho ezivilini ezo."
Ezekiel1:22 Umfanekiselo wezulu phezu kweentloko zezidalwa eziphilileyo ube ufana nelitye lekristale eyoyikekayo, phezu kwentloko yazo;"
Ezekiel1:23 Ngaphantsi kwesibhakabhaka amaphiko ayewolule, elinye emva kwelinye, iyileyo inamabini agubungeleyo kweli cala, elinye inamabini ayigubungeleyo imizimba yazo kweli cala."
Ezekiel1:24 Ekuhambeni kwazo ndeva isandi samaphiko azo, sinjengesandi samanzi amaninzi, ngathi sisandi soSomandla, sisandi sentetho, ngathi sisandi somkhosi; zakuma, zawathoba amaphiko azo."
Ezekiel1:25 Kuthe ke kwakuvakala izwi liphuma entlokweni yazo, zesuka zawathoba amaphiko azo."
Ezekiel1:26 Ngaphezu kwendawo ephezu kweentloko zazo, kwabonakala kunjengetrone, wanga lilitye lesafire;"
Ezekiel1:27 Ndabona ke, ngathi yimbonakalo yobhedu, ngathi yimbonakalo yomlilo kuyo, kuthabathela embonakalweni yesinqe kwenyusa; ukukhanya macala onke."
Ezekiel1:28 Ngathi yimbonakalo yomnyama obakhoyo efini mini ngemvula, kwabonakala ukukhanya, njengako yonke indawo. Le yimbonakalo yembonakalo yobuqaqawuli bukaYehova. Ndithe ndakuyibona le nto, ndawa ngobuso, ndaliva ilizwi lomntu othethayo."
Ezekiel2:1 Wathi kum, Nyana womntu, yima ngeenyawo zakho, ndithethe nawe."
Ezekiel2:2 Kwangena ke kum umoya ethetha nam, wandimisa ndema, ndamva ethetha nam."
Ezekiel2:3 Waza wahlabela mgama wathi kum: “Nyana womntu, ndikuthuma koonyana bakaSirayeli, kubantu abazele yimvukelo, abajikileyo kum; bona bandingcatshile bona nooyise, unanamhla."
Ezekiel2:4 Ngokuba ngabantwana abangenabuntu, abantliziyo ilukhuni ndikuthuma kubo; uze uthi kubo, Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel2:5 Yaye bona, ukuba bafuna ukuva okanye abayeke baqhubeke (kuba yindlu yemvukelo), baya kwazi ukuba bekukho umprofeti phakathi kwabo."
Ezekiel2:6 Wena ke, nyana womntu, musa ukuboyika, ungawoyiki amazwi abo; ungawoyiki amazwi abo, ungawoyiki amehlo abo, ngokuba yindlu ezele lukreqo."
Ezekiel2:7 Wowathetha kubo amazwi am, kungakhathaliseki ukuba bathe baweva, nokuba bathe bayama, ngokuba beyienkani ezinkulu."
Ezekiel2:8 Wena ke, nyana womntu, yiva endikuthethayo kuwe; musa ukuba nekratshi, njengaloo ndlu ineenkani; vula umlomo wakho, utye endikunika kona."
Ezekiel2:9 Ndathi ndakukhangela, ndabona isandla sithunyelwe kum; nantso incwadi kuyo;"
Ezekiel2:10 Wayityhila ke phambi kwam; kwaye kubhaliwe ngaphakathi nangaphandle, kwaye kubhaliwe ukulila nokulila kunye namashwa."
Ezekiel3:1 Wathi ke kum, Nyana womntu, kudle okufumanayo; yidle le ncwadi isongwayo, uye uthethe kwindlu kaSirayeli."
Ezekiel3:2 Ndawuvula ke umlomo wam, wandidlisa loo ncwadi isongwayo;"
Ezekiel3:3 Wathi kum, Nyana womntu, sidle isisu sakho, uzalise isisu sakho ngomsebenzi endikunikayo; Ndayidla ke; emlonyeni wam ebumnandini njengobusi."
Ezekiel3:4 Wathi kum, Nyana womntu, hamba uye kwindlu kaSirayeli, uthethe kubo amazwi am."
Ezekiel3:5 Kuba anithunyelwanga kubantu abalulwimi lunzima, nabalulwimi lunzima, nithunyelwe kwindlu kaSirayeli;"
Ezekiel3:6 Asikuko ngenxa yabantu abaninzi abalulwimi lumbi, abalulwimi lunzima, abamagama angavakaliyo; Inene, ukuba bendikuthume kubo, ngebekuvile."
Ezekiel3:7 Akavuma ke indlu kaSirayeli ukukuphulaphula; ngenxa yokuba abafuni kundiphulaphula, ngenxa yokuba yonke indlu kaSirayeli yonakele nentliziyo yabo ilukhuni."
Ezekiel3:8 Yabona, ndibenza lukhuni ubuso bakho, njengobuso babo; ibunzi lakho libe lukhuni, kwanjengebunzi labo;"
Ezekiel3:9 Ndilenza laba lukhuni ngaphezu kwelitye ibunzi lakho; musa ukuboyika, ungaqhiphuki umbilini ngamehlo abo, nokuba yindlu ezele lukreqo."
Ezekiel3:10 Waqhubeka wathi kum: “Nyana womntu, wathabathele entliziyweni yakho onke amazwi am endiya kuwathetha kuwe, uweve ngeendlebe zakho."
Ezekiel3:11 Yiya kubathinjwa, koonyana babantu bakowenu, uthethe kubo, uthi kubo, Itsho iNkosi uYehova; okanye baya kuva, okanye bayeke."
Ezekiel3:12 Wandithabatha uMoya, ndeva emva kwam izwi elikhulu, lisithi, Mabubongwe ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova, endaweni yabo."
Ezekiel3:13 Ndeva nesandi samaphiko ezinto eziphilileyo, elo libetha elo, nesandi seevili ngakuzo, nesandi sesandi esikhulu."
Ezekiel3:14 Wandifunqula uMoya, wandisusa; Ke sona isandla sikaYehova saba phezu kwam."
Ezekiel3:15 Ndafika kubathinjwa eTelabhibhi, ababehleli ngasemlanjeni oyiKebhare, ndahlala khona, ndahlala khona iintsuku zasixhenxe, ndimangalisiwe, phakathi kwabo."
Ezekiel3:16 Ekupheleni kweentsuku ezisixhenxe kwabonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel3:17 Nyana womntu, ndikwenze umveleli wendlu kaSirayeli; live ilizwi emlonyeni wam, ubalumkise ngokuphuma kum."
Ezekiel3:18 Ukuba ndithe kongendawo, Inene, uya kufa; ungathethi naye umoni, ulumkise umoni ngendlela yakhe embi, ukuba awusindise umphefumlo wakhe; Ongendawo uya kufa ngobungendawo bakhe; ke igazi lakhe ndolibiza esandleni sakho."
Ezekiel3:19 Wena ke, xa uthe wamvuselela ongendawo, akabuya ebubini bakhe, nangendlela yakhe engendawo, wofa ngobugwenxa bakhe; kodwa uwuhlangule umphefumlo wakho."
Ezekiel3:20 Kananjalo, ukuba lithe ilungisa libuya ebulungiseni balo, lenza okungendawo, ndibeke isikhubekiso phambi kwalo, liya kufa; ngokuba ungamlumkisanga, wofa ngenxa yesono sakhe, nangenxa yobulungisa bakhe abenzileyo abayi kukhunjulwa; ke igazi lakhe ndolibiza esandleni sakho."
Ezekiel3:21 Wena ke, xa uthe walivuselela ilungisa, ukuba lingoni, alona ke: lophila ngokuba livuselelwe; kwaye uwuhlangule umphefumlo wakho."
Ezekiel3:22 Saye isandla sikaYehova phezu kwam; Wathi kum, Yima, uye entlango, ndothetha nawe khona."
Ezekiel3:23 Ndesuka ndema, ndaphuma ndaya entilini, ndabona ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova bumi khona, bunjengobuqaqawuli endabubonayo emlanjeni oyiKebhare, ndawa ngobuso."
Ezekiel3:24 Kwangena uMoya kum, wandimisa, wathetha nam, wathi, Hamba uye kuzivalela endlwini yakho."
Ezekiel3:25 Wena ke, nyana womntu, yabona, baya kukunika imixokelelwane, bakubophe ngayo, ungaphumi phantsi kwayo;"
Ezekiel3:26 Ndiya kulunamathelisa ulwimi lwakho emlonyeni wakho, ukuze ube sisimumu, ungabi sisikhalimela esinamandla, ngenxa yokuba yindlu ezele yimvukelo."
Ezekiel3:27 Kodwa ndakuthetha nawe, ndiya kuwuvula umlomo wakho, uze uthi kubo, ‘Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova; Lowo uvayo makeve; nothe wayishiya, makame; ngokuba yindlu ezele zizikreqo."
Ezekiel4:1 Wena ke, nyana womntu, thabatha icwecwe, ulibeke ecaleni kwakho, uwuphose kulo umzi waseYerusalem;"
Ezekiel4:2 wakhele yena ikhusi phezu kwayo, uyifunqule induli encinane; Umise intsika, ubeke iinkunzi zeegusha macala onke."
Ezekiel4:3 Uthabathe ipani yesinyithi, uyimise ibe ludonga lwesinyithi phakathi kwakho nomzi lowo; beka ubuso bakho phambi kwayo, wena uya kungqingwa, ikungqinge. Iya kuba ngumqondiso kwindlu kaSirayeli."
Ezekiel4:4 Lala ngecala lakho lasekhohlo, ububeke ubugwenxa bendlu kaSirayeli phezu kwalo; ngokuba inani leentsuku enilala ngalo, niya kubuthwala ububi babo."
Ezekiel4:5 Kuba iminyaka yobubi babo ndiyenza ukuba ibe ngangenani leentsuku, iintsuku ezimakhulu mathathu anamanci asithoba; ngaloo ndlela uya kubuthwala ubugwenxa bendlu kaSirayeli."
Ezekiel4:6 Uya kuthi wakuba ukufezile oko, ulale ngecala lakho lasekunene, ubuthwale ubugwenxa bendlu kaYuda iintsuku ezimashumi mane;"
Ezekiel4:7 Ngoko ke, bhekisa ubuso bakho kungqingo lweYerusalem, ugqubuthele isandla sakho, uprofete ngayo."
Ezekiel4:8 Yabona, ndikufaka imixokelelwane, ukuze ungatyeki, uye kwelinye, ude uzigqibe iintsuku zokungqinga kwakho;"
Ezekiel4:9 Thabatha ingqolowa, nerhasi, neembotyi, neentlumayo, namazimba, namazimba, uzigalele esityeni sinye, wenze isonka ngazo ngokwenani leentsuku oya kulala ngazo ngecala lakho, iintsuku ezimakhulu mathathu anamanci asithoba kufuneka uzidle."
Ezekiel4:10 Ukudla kwakho oya kukudla, makube ziishekele ezimashumi mabini ngemini; yitya qho."
Ezekiel4:11 Sela amanzi ngokomlinganiselo, isahlulo sesithandathu sehin; rhoqo kwaye emva koko kufuneka usele."
Ezekiel4:12 Udla njengesonka serhasi, usosa ngobulongwe bomntu phambi kwamehlo akhe."
Ezekiel4:13 Wathi uYehova, Oonyana bakaSirayeli baya kusidla siyinqambi ezintlangeni, endiya kubachithachithela kuzo."
Ezekiel4:14 Ndaza ndathi: “Owu Nkosi Yehova! Yabona, umphefumlo wam awenziwanga nqambi; Akukho nyama inezothe yakha yangena emlonyeni wam."
Ezekiel4:15 Wathi kum, Uyabona, ndikunika ithokazi lenkomo, elinjengesiphene; wosilungisa isonka sakho ngaso."
Ezekiel4:16 Wathi ke kum, Nyana womntu, yabona, ndiyawaphula umsimelelo osisonka eYerusalem, basidle isonka ngomlinganiselo, benesithukuthezi; bawasele amanzi ngomlinganiselo nangokumangalisayo;"
Ezekiel4:17 ngokokude baswele isonka namanzi, bamangalise omnye ngenxa yomnye, batshabalale ngenxa yobungendawo babo."
Ezekiel5:1 Wena ke, nyana womntu, thabatha ikrele elibukhali, uthabathe icala lencakuba, uligqithisele entlokweni yakho, nasesilevini sakho; ngoku thatha isikali sokulinganisa kwaye wahlule iinwele."
Ezekiel5:2 Isahlulo sesithathu somzi uze usitshise ngomlilo, zakuzaliseka iintsuku zongqingo; thabatha inxalenye yesithathu, uyihlabe ngemela, uze usasaze isahlulo sesithathu emoyeni, ndirhole ikrele emva kwabo."
Ezekiel5:3 Wothatha enye yazo, uyibophe ezingxoweni zakho;"
Ezekiel5:4 ubuye uthabathe kuzo, uziphose emlilweni, uzitshise ngomlilo; kuba kuya kuphuma umlilo kuyo yonke indlu kaSirayeli."
Ezekiel5:5 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Le Yerusalem ndiyimise phakathi kweentlanga, namazwe angeenxa zonke kuyo."
Ezekiel5:6 Uyicekisile imithetho yam ngaphezu kweentlanga, nemithetho yam ngaphezu kwamazwe angeenxa zonke kuye; ngenxa yokuba bayicekisile imiyalelo yam nemithetho yam, abahamba ngayo."
Ezekiel5:7 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ngenxa enokuba ninempumelelo ngaphezu kweentlanga ezingeenxa zonke kuni, anahamba ngemimiselo yam, anayigcina imithetho yam, anenza ngokwemithetho yeentlanga ezingeenxa zonke kuni;"
Ezekiel5:8 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabonani, ndiya kulwa nani, ndenze izigwebo kuni emehlweni eentlanga."
Ezekiel5:9 Ndiya kwenza kuwe endingazanga ndikwenze ngaphambili, endingayi kubuya ndikwenze ngenxa yamasikizi akho onke."
Ezekiel5:10 Ngako oko ooyise baya kudla oonyana phakathi kwenu, oonyana badle ooyise; Ndiza kukuwisa izigwebo ndize ndiyichithachithe yonke intsalela yakho koomoya bonke."
Ezekiel5:11 Ngoko ke ndadla ubomi, itsho iNkosi uYehova; Ekubeni ingcwele yam uyenze inqambi ngamasikizi akho onke, nangamasikizi akho onke, ndokuthoba; aliyi kuba nanceba iliso lam, ndingabi nazintloni."
Ezekiel5:12 Isahlulo sesithathu kuni siya kufa yindyikitya yokufa, yaye siya kutshatyalaliswa yindlala phakathi kwenu; isahlulo sesithathu siya kuwa ngumkhonto ecaleni kwakho; esinye isahlulo sesithathu ndisichithachithe emimoyeni yonke, ndirhole ikrele emva kwabo."
Ezekiel5:13 Wophela ke umsindo wam, ndibeke umsindo wam kubo, ndize ndithuthuzeleke; bazi ukuba mna, Yehova, ndithethile ngenzondelelo yam, emva kokuba ndiwukhuphele kubo umsindo wam."
Ezekiel5:14 Ndiya kukwenza ube senkangala, udelekile ezintlangeni ezingeenxa zonke kuwe, emehlweni abo bonke abadlulayo."
Ezekiel5:15 Oko kuya kuba lihlazo nesingcikivo, sibe sisohlwayo nommangaliso kwiintlanga ezingeenxa zonke kuwe, ekukuveleni kwam ngomsindo nangobushushu, nangalohlwaya kalukhuni. Mna Yehova ndithethile:"
Ezekiel5:16 ekuzithumeni kwam kuwe iintolo ezimbi zendlala, eziya kubatshabalalisa, ndibathumele ukuba batshabalalise; Ndokwandisa ukulamba kwenu, ndiwaphule umsimelelo osisonka senu;"
Ezekiel5:17 Ndiya kuthumela kuwe indlala namarhamncwa, akuphange; idlule phezu kwakho indyikitya yokufa negazi; ndinizisele ikrele. Mna Yehova ndithethile."
Ezekiel6:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel6:2 Nyana womntu, bhekisa ubuso bakho ezintabeni zakwaSirayeli, uprofete kuzo;"
Ezekiel6:3 uthi, Zintaba zakwaSirayeli, liveni ilizwi leNkosi uYehova; Itsho iNkosi uYehova kwiintaba, neenduli, nemilambo, nezihlambo; Yabona, ndikuzisela umkhonto, ndiya kuzitshabalalisa iziganga zakho;"
Ezekiel6:4 Ziya kuphanziswa izibingelelo zenu nemifanekiso yenu eqingqiweyo iya kwaphulwa; yaye nina nithe nabethwa phambi kwezithixo zenu ezinezothe ndiya kunitshabalalisa.
Ezekiel6:5 Ndizibeke emhlabeni izidumbu zoonyana bakaSirayeli phambi kwezigodo zabo; yaye ndiza kuwachithachitha amathambo enu ngeenxa zonke ezibingelelweni zenu.
Ezekiel6:6 Kuzo zonke iindawo enihlala kuzo izixeko ziya kuba ngamanxuwa, neziganga zibe ngamanxuwa; ukuze zidilizwe zize zitshatyalaliswe izibingelelo zenu, ukuze yaphulwe ize itshatyalaliswe imifanekiso yenu eqingqiweyo, nemifanekiso yenu eqingqiweyo igawulwe nemisebenzi yenu."
Ezekiel6:7 Nababuleweyo baya kuwa phakathi kwenu, nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel6:8 Ndiya kushiya amasalela, ukuze kubekho kuni abasindileyo ekreleni phakathi kweentlanga, ekuchithwachithweni kwenu emazweni."
Ezekiel6:9 Abo basindileyo kuwe baya kundikhumbula phakathi kweentlanga abaya kuthinjelwa kuzo, ngenxa yokuba ndaphukile ngenxa yeentliziyo zabo zoonongogo abandishiyileyo, nangenxa yamehlo abo alandela izithixo zabo baqubuda baqubuda; babulewe ngenxa yobubi ababenzileyo ngamasikizi abo onke."
Ezekiel6:10 Baya kwazi ukuba ndinguYehova, ukuba ndingatshongo ilize ukuba ndiya kubenza obu bubi kubo."
Ezekiel6:11 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Qhwabanisa isandla sakho, unyathele ngonyawo lwakho, usithi, Yeha, kuwo onke amasikizi endlu kaSirayeli! ngokuba baya kuwa likrele, nayindlala, nayindyikitya yokufa."
Ezekiel6:12 Okude uya kufa yindyikitya yokufa; okufuphi uya kuwa ngomkhonto; yaye lowo uhlala elinganiselwe uya kufa yindlala; ngoko ke ndiya kubukhuphela ubushushu bam kubo.
Ezekiel6:13 Niya kwazi ukuba ndinguYehova, bakuba ababuleweyo babo bephakathi kwezigodo zabo ngeenxa zonke ezibingelelweni zabo, ezindulini zonke ezinde, ezincotsheni zonke zeentaba, naphantsi kwemithi yonke eluhlaza, naphantsi kwemioki yonke ethe shinyi, ababekuyo iintanda zayiqhola ivumba elithozamisayo kuzo zonke izithixo zazo."
Ezekiel6:14 Ndiya kusolula isandla sam phezu kwabo, ndilenze ilizwe libe yintlango, intlango enjengentlango yaseDibhela, ezindaweni zonke zokuhlala kwabo; zazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel7:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel7:2 Wena ke, nyana womntu, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova kwilizwe lakwaSirayeli; Ekugqibeleni, isiphelo sifike kwiimbombo zone zelizwe."
Ezekiel7:3 Ke kaloku isiphelo sikufikele, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo ndiya kuthumela umsindo wam kuwe ndize ndikugwebe ngokweendlela zakho ndize ndikwenzele izinto zonke ezicekisekayo."
Ezekiel7:4 Aliyi kuba nanceba kuwe iliso lam, ndingakucongi; ke ndiya kuzibuyisela phezu kwakho iindlela zakho, abe phakathi kwakho amasikizi akho; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel7:5 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Nanku ububi, ububi, bubi bunye."
Ezekiel7:6 Isiphelo sifikile, isiphelo sifikile; umlindi; Yabona, ifikile;"
Ezekiel7:7 Nina bemi beli lizwe, nifike kusasa; ixesha lifikile, imini yentlekele isondele, kungekhona isikhalo seentaba."
Ezekiel7:8 Ndowuthululela kuwe ngokukhawuleza umsindo wam, ndize ndiwuhlisele kuwe umsindo wam; ke ndiya kukugweba ngokweendlela zakho, ndiwabeke phezu kwakho amasikizi akho onke."
Ezekiel7:9 Aliyi kuba nanceba iliso lam, ndingabi nanceba; ke ndiya kuwabeka phezu kwakho ngokweendlela zakho, nangamasikizi akho phakathi kwakho; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova owohlwayayo."
Ezekiel7:10 Yabona, ilanga liyeza; kwasa kwadlula; yopha intonga, kwavela ikratshi."
Ezekiel7:11 Ugonyamelo luvele luswazi lwentswela-bulungisa;
Ezekiel7:12 Lifikile ilixa, isondele imini; othengayo makangavuyi, nothengisayo makangalili; ngokuba ukuvutha komsindo kuyayizela ingxokolo yakhe yonke."
Ezekiel7:13 Kuba othengisayo akanakubuyela entweni abethengise ngayo, nokuba ubesadla ubomi phakathi kwabadla ubomi; ngenxa yokuba umbono uchaphazela isihlwele esilapho, esingayi kubuya; akukho bani uya kumxhasa ebubini bobomi bakhe."
Ezekiel7:14 Bavuthela isigodlo, balungisa yonke into; kodwa akukho namnye uya kulwa, ngokuba umsindo wam ukuyo yonke ingxokolo yakhe."
Ezekiel7:15 Ngaphandle ikrele, ngendyikitya yokufa nendlala ngaphakathi; oselizweni uya kubulawa ngentshuntshe; ophakathi komzi uya kudliwa yindlala nayindyikitya yokufa."
Ezekiel7:16 Kodwa abo basabayo kuzo baya kusaba baye ezintabeni njengamahobe aphuma ezintlanjeni, ekhalelana ngenxa yesiphoso sakhe."
Ezekiel7:17 Zonke izandla ziya kuba buthathaka, nawo onke amadolo aya kuba buthathaka njengamanzi."
Ezekiel7:18 Bazibhinqise ngamarhonya, babhinqe iintlungu; yaye ebusweni babo bonke kuya kubakho ihlazo, neentloko zabo zonke zibe ziinkqayi."
Ezekiel7:19 Isilivere yabo baya kuyiphosa ezitratweni, negolide yabo ithinjwe; isilivere yabo negolide yabo ayiyi kuba nako ukubasindisa ngemini yokuphuphuma komsindo kaYehova; abayi kwanelisa umphefumlo wabo, bazalise izisu zabo ngokuba sisono sabo eso."
Ezekiel7:20 Isihombo sakhe, abesibeke ngokobuhle; kodwa bawenzela kuzo izinto zabo ezinezothe, nezingamasikizi; ke ngoko, ndiyibeke kude kubo."
Ezekiel7:21 Ndiya kuyinikela esandleni sabasemzini ibe lixhoba, nakwabangendawo behlabathi ukuba ibe lixhoba; baya kulihlambela;"
Ezekiel7:22 ke ndiya kubanikela umva, bayenze inqambi indawo yam yokuzimela, kuba amasela aya kungena kuyo, ayenze inqambi."
