Ezekiel7:23 Yenza umxokelelwane, ngokuba ilizwe liliphalaza igazi, nomzi uzele lugonyamelo."
Ezekiel7:24 Ngoko ke ndiya kuzisa ezona ntlanga zikhohlakeleyo, yaye ziya kuzidla ilifa izindlu zazo; neendawo zabo ezingcwele ziya kuba ziinqambi."
Ezekiel7:25 Intshabalalo iyeza; yaye baya kufuna uxolo, lungabikho."
Ezekiel7:26 Kufike ububi phezu kobubi, kubekho udaba phezu kodaba; baya kubufuna apho ubuso bomprofeti; ke wona umthetho uya kutshabalala kumbingeleli, nakwintlanganiso yamadoda amakhulu."
Ezekiel7:27 Ukumkani uya kulila, nesikhulu sibe senkangala, ziyekelele izandla zabantu belizwe eli; zazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel8:1 Ngomnyaka wesithandathu, ngenyanga yesithandathu, ngolwesihlanu enyangeni leyo, ndihleli endlwini yam, namadoda amakhulu akwaYuda ehleli ngakum, sawa phezu kwam isandla seNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel8:2 Ndabona, ndabona into efana nembonakalo yomlilo, kuthabathele esinqeni sayo kwehlisa, ingumlilo; kuthabathele esinqeni sayo kunyuse, ibingathi yimbonakalo eqaqambileyo yemfumba etyheli."
Ezekiel8:3 Wathabatha isandla, wandibamba ngentamo yentloko yam; uMoya wandithabatha phakathi komhlaba nezulu, wandizisa phambi kobuso bukaThixo eYerusalem, ekungeneni kwesango eliphakathi, elibheke ngasentla; apho kwakukho isihlalo somfanekiso wekhwele, elizala ikhwele."
Ezekiel8:4 Nabo ke bukhona ubuqaqawuli bukaThixo kaSirayeli, bunjengombono endawubonayo entilini leyo."
Ezekiel8:5 Wathi kum, Nyana womntu, phakamisela amehlo akho ngasentla. Ndawaphosa amehlo am kwindlela esinga entla, ndabheka ngasentla kwesango lesibingelelo, kukho lo mfanekiso usemantla emnyango."
Ezekiel8:6 Wathi kum, Nyana womntu, uyakubona na abakwenzayo? Ngawaphi na la masikizi amakhulu, le iwenzayo apha indlu kaSirayeli, ukuze ndide ndimke engcweleni yam? kodwa guqukani kwakhona, kwaye niya kubona iinyikima ezinkulu."
Ezekiel8:7 Wandisa esangweni lentsimi; ndajonga, ndabona umngxuma eludongeni."
Ezekiel8:8 Wathi kum, Nyana womntu, khawugqobhoze eludongeni; ndagqobhoza eludongeni, ndabona ucango lukhona."
Ezekiel8:9 Wathi kum, Ngena, uwabone amasikizi abawenzayo apha."
Ezekiel8:10 Ndangena, ndakhangela; nanzo zonke izinambuzane, nezilwanyana eziziinqambi, nazo zonke izithixo zendlu kaSirayeli, zithululelwe eludongeni yonke."
Ezekiel8:11 Kumi phambi kwazo amadoda amakhulu angamashumi asixhenxe endlu kaSirayeli, noYasaniya unyana kaShafan emi phakathi kwawo, iyileyo iphethe imbiza yayo yesiqhumiso esandleni; kwenyuka ilifu lesiqhumiso."
Ezekiel8:12 Wathi ke kum, Nyana womntu, ukubonile na akwenzayo emnyameni amadoda amakhulu endlu kaSirayeli, iyileyo egumbini layo lokuphumla? ngokuba besithi, uYehova akasiboni; uYehova uwushiyile umhlaba."
Ezekiel8:13 Wabuya wathi kum, Guquka, ubone amasikizi amakhulu abawenzayo."
Ezekiel8:14 Wandisa ekungeneni kwesango lendlu kaYehova elingasentla; naba ke abafazi behleli phantsi, belilela uTamo."
Ezekiel8:15 Wathi kum, Ubonile na, nyana womntu? guqukani, wobona ubunzima ngaphezu koku."
Ezekiel8:16 Wandisa entendelezweni ephakathi yendlu kaYehova, ndabona emnyango wetempile kaYehova, phakathi kwevaranda nesibingelelo, amadoda angathi amashumi mabini anamahlanu, eyinikele umva itempile evela kuYehova. Yehova, ubuso bazo bubheke empumalanga; baye balinqula ilanga empumalanga."
Ezekiel8:17 Wathi kum, Ubonile na, nyana womntu? Yinto encinane na kwindlu kaYuda, ukwenza amasikizi akwenzayo khona? kuba balizalisa ilizwe ngogonyamelo baza babuya bandicekisa; nanzo zigalela iqhina empumlweni."
Ezekiel8:18 Ke ngoko, nam ndiya kwenza ngomsindo;"
Ezekiel9:1 Wadanduluka ngelizwi elikhulu ezindlebeni zam, esithi, Basondele abathetheli balo mzi, elowo ephethe isixhobo sakhe sokutshabalalisa."
Ezekiel9:2 Nanko, kusiza amadoda amathandathu, evela ngendlela yesango eliphezulu elisingise entla, iyileyo iphethe isixhobo sokulwa ngesandla sayo kubo indoda yambethe ilinen ecikizekileyo, inophondo lombhali ecaleni layo; bangena, bema esibingelelweni sobhedu."
Ezekiel9:3 Ubuqaqawuli bukaThixo kaSirayeli benyuka busuka kwiikherubhi eziphezu kwayo baya emnyango wendlu. Wabiza indoda eyambethe ilinen emhlophe, enophondo lombhali ecaleni layo;"
Ezekiel9:4 Wathi uYehova kuyo, Yiya esazulwini somzi, esazulwini seYerusalem, ubeke uphawu emabunzini abantu abancwinayo, abakhalayo ngenxa yamasikizi onke awenzekayo phakathi kwayo."
Ezekiel9:5 Ithe ke kwabanye, bendisakuva, yathi, Phumani phakathi komzi, nimbulale; ungalicongi iliso lakho, ungacongi."
Ezekiel9:6 Amaxhego, amadodana, namaxhego, nabantwana, nabafazi, kodwa ningasondeli nakwindoda inophawu; niqale endaweni yam engcwele. Baqala ke ngabantu abadala ababephambi kwendlu."
Ezekiel9:7 Wathi ke kubo, Yenzeni inqambi indlu le, niwazalise amasimi ngababuleweyo; phuma Baphuma ke, babulala kuwo umzi."
Ezekiel9:8 Kwathi ekubulaweni kwabo, ndathi ndiselapho, ndawa ngobuso, ndakhala, ndisithi, Awu, Nkosi Yehova! Uya kuwatshabalalisa na onke amasalela akwaSirayeli ngokuwuthululela komsindo wakho phezu kweYerusalem?"
Ezekiel9:9 Wathi kum, Ububi bendlu kaSirayeli nobendlu kaYuda bukhulu kunene, nelizwe lizele ligazi, nomzi uzele yinkohliso; ngokuba besithi, uYehova ulilahlile ihlabathi, uYehova akaboni."
Ezekiel9:10 Ke ngoko emehlweni am aliyi kuba nanceba iliso lam kubo, ndingabi namfesane kubo, ndibanikele entlokweni yabo;"
Ezekiel9:11 Kwabonakala indoda enxibe le nto, inophondo olumnyama ecaleni layo, ixela udaba, isithi, Ndenze njengoko ubundithethile."
Ezekiel10:1 Ndabona, ndabona ezulwini phezu kweentloko zeekerubhi, kunjengelitye lesafire, ngathi ngukubonakala kwetrone;"
Ezekiel10:2 Wathetha kwindoda eyambethe ilinen emhlophe, wathi, Ngena phakathi kweevili ezijikelezayo phantsi kweekerubhi, uwagcwalise amalahle avuthayo ngesandla sakho phakathi kweekerubhi, uwasasaze phezu komzi. Uye wangena phambi kwamehlo am."
Ezekiel10:3 Ekungeneni kwendoda leyo, iikerubhi bezimi ngasekunene kwendlu; ilifu layizalisa intendelezo engaphakathi."
Ezekiel10:4 Benyuka ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova, besuka ezikerubhini, bema emnyango wendlu yazala lilifu indlu, nentsimi yazala bubuqaqawuli bobuqaqawuli bukaYehova."
Ezekiel10:5 Kuvakala isandi samaphiko eekerubhi, siye kufikelela entendelezweni engaphandle, sinjengezwi loSomandla akuthetha."
Ezekiel10:6 Kwathi, wayiwisela umthetho indoda, ebethe isigqubuthelo, wathi, Faka umlilo phakathi kweenyawo, phakathi kweekerubhi; Wangena ke wema ecaleni kwamavili."
Ezekiel10:7 Yasolula enye ikerubhi isandla sayo phakathi kweekerubhi, emlilweni ophakathi kweekerubhi, yawuthabatha, yawunikela esandleni salowo wayambethe ilinen emhlophe; wayithatha waphuma."
Ezekiel10:8 Ngaphakathi kweekerubhi kwabonakala into efana nesandla somntu, phantsi kwamaphiko azo."
Ezekiel10:9 Ndakhangela, ndabona, ndabona iivili ezine zisecaleni leekerubhi, ivili enye isecaleni lekerubhi enye, ivili enye isecaleni lekerubhi enye; Ukubonakala kweevili bekunjengembonakalo yelitye lekrizolite."
Ezekiel10:10 Ke ukubonakala kwazo zone kwakufana nqwa, kwanga kukho ivili phakathi kwevili."
Ezekiel10:11 Ekuhambeni kwakhe wahamba kumacala azo omane; aziphambuka, zahamba apho abekhangele khona ukumkani; azijika ekuhambeni kwazo."
Ezekiel10:12 Umzimba wawo uphela nomhlana wawo nezandla zawo namaphiko azo neenyawo zazo zonke zazizele ngamehlo, ewe, neenyawo zazo zozine."
Ezekiel10:13 Iivili ezo zabizwa phambi kweendlebe zam, kwathiwa, Livili wena."
Ezekiel10:14 Inye ibe inobuso obune: ubuso bokuqala ibubuso bekerubhi, ubuso besibini ibubuso bomntu; obesithathu ibubuso bengonyama, obesine ibubuso bokhozi."
Ezekiel10:15 Zesuka iikerubhi; Esi sisidalwa esiphilayo endasibona kumlambo iKebhare.
Ezekiel10:16 Kwathi, ekuhambeni kweekerubhi, zahamba iivili ecaleni lazo; kwanaxa iikherubhi zawaphakamisa amaphiko azo ukuba zinyuke ziye emhlabeni, namavili ayengaphumi nakuzo."
Ezekiel10:17 Bema, bema; zathi zakusuka, zasuka nazo, ngokuba umoya wento ephilileyo ube ukho kuzo."
Ezekiel10:18 Baphuma ke ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova, emnyango wendlu, bema phezu kweekerubhi."
Ezekiel10:19 Iikerubhi zawaphakamisa amaphiko azo, zesuka emhlabeni phambi kwamehlo am; yaye ubuqaqawuli bukaThixo kaSirayeli babuphezu kwawo."
Ezekiel10:20 Yilaa nto iphilileyo, ndayibonayo phantsi koThixo kaSirayeli emlanjeni oyiKebhare; ndazi ke ukuba ziziikerubhi."
Ezekiel10:21 Inye ibe inobuso obune, inye ibe inamaphiko amane; nemfano yezandla zomntu ibiphantsi kwamaphiko azo."
Ezekiel10:22 Ke imfano yobuso bazo, ibe ibobaa buso ndabubonayo emlanjeni oyiKebhare, nokubonakala kwazo nazo ngokwazo."
Ezekiel11:1 Wandithabatha uMoya, wandisa emnyango wendlu kaYehova, osempumalanga, okhangele empumalanga; phakathi kwabo ndabona uYashaniya unyana ka-Ashure, noPelatiya unyana kaBhenaya, iintloko zabantu."
Ezekiel11:2 Waqhubeka wathi kum: “Nyana womntu, la ngamadoda aceba ububi naceba amayelenqe kwesi sixeko."
Ezekiel11:3 Abathi, Ayikufuphi; masakhe izindlu; lo mzi yimbiza, thina ke siyinyama."
Ezekiel11:4 Ngako oko profeta ngabo, profeta, nyana womntu;"
Ezekiel11:5 Wehla phezu kwam uMoya kaYehova, wathi kum, Thetha; Wathi uYehova; Nithi, ndlu kaSirayeli, ndiyayazi yonke into ethe qatha entliziyweni yenu."
Ezekiel11:6 Nibandisile ababuleweyo kulo mzi, nazizalisa izitrato zawo ngababuleweyo."
Ezekiel11:7 Ngako oko itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Nina nibasiweyo, nibabeke khona bayinyama, lo mzi uyimbiza; ndiya kunikhupha kuyo."
Ezekiel11:8 Niloyika ikrele; yaye ndiza kunizisela ikrele,’ itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel11:9 Ndiya kunikhupha kuyo, ndininikele esandleni soonyana bolunye uhlanga, ndinivelele nina."
Ezekiel11:10 Niya kuwa likrele; ndiya kunigweba emdeni wakwaSirayeli; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova.
Ezekiel11:11 Esi sixeko asiyi kuba yimbiza yenu, nani aniyi kuba yinyama kuso; ndiya kunigweba emdeni wakwaSirayeli."
Ezekiel11:12 Niya kwazi ke ukuba ndinguYehova, ngenxa yokuba anihambanga ngokwemiyalelo yam emisiweyo naza nenza ngokwesiko leentlanga ezinijikelezileyo."
Ezekiel11:13 Ndathi ndakuprofeta, wafa uPelatiya unyana kaBhenaya. Ndawa ngobuso, ndadanduluka ngelizwi elikhulu, ndathi: “Owu, Nkosi Yehova! Uya kuwatshabalalisa na ke amasalela akwaSirayeli?"
Ezekiel11:14 Laphinda labonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel11:15 Nyana womntu, abazalwana bakho, noonyana bakho, abendlu yakho, nakwindlu yonke kaSirayeli, bona abo bathi kubo abemi baseYerusalem, Mkani uYehova, niye ezweni lethu anikwe ukuba sisityebi."
Ezekiel11:16 Ngako oko ithi, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ekubeni ndibaphangalalisa phakathi kweentlanga, ndibaphangalalise emazweni, ndoba njengengcwele kubo emazweni abafika kuwo."
Ezekiel11:17 Ngako oko itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ndiya kunibutha phakathi kweentlanga, ndinibuthe emazweni enilusali kuwo, ndininike umhlaba wakwaSirayeli."
Ezekiel11:18 Baya kufika khona, bawasuse onke amasikizi ayo, nawo onke amasikizi ayo;"
Ezekiel11:19 Ndiya kubanika intliziyo enye ndibeke umoya omtsha ngaphakathi kwenu; ndiya kuyisusa intliziyo yelitye enyameni yabo, ndibanike intliziyo yenyama;"
Ezekiel11:20 ukuze bahambe ngeendlela zam, bagcine imithetho yam, bayenze; yaye baya kuba ngabantu bam, nam ndibe nguThixo wabo."
Ezekiel11:21 Ke bona abantliziyo ilandela intliziyo yezinto zabo ezinezothe, nezingamasikizi abo, ndiya kuyibuyisela indlela yabo entlokweni yabo; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel11:22 Iikerubhi zawaphakamisa amaphiko azo, kwaneevili ngakuzo; yaye ubuqaqawuli bukaThixo kaSirayeli babuphezu kwawo."
Ezekiel11:23 Benyuka ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova, besuka phakathi kwesixeko, bema entabeni engasempumalanga kuso isixeko."
Ezekiel11:24 Emva koko umoya wandithabatha waza wandithabatha embonweni ngomoya kaThixo wandisa eKhaledi kumabanjwa. Ngoko umbono endawubonayo wenyuka wemka kum.
Ezekiel11:25 Ndawaxelela ngamabanjwa zonke izinto uYehova awayendibonise zona.
Ezekiel12:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel12:2 Nyana womntu, uhlala endlwini ezele luvukelo enamehlo okubona kodwa angaboni; baneendlebe zokuva, abeva; ngokuba bayindlu eneenkani."
Ezekiel12:3 Ukuba kunjalo, nyana womntu, zilungise izinto zakho, uzibeke, uzibeke phambi kwamehlo abo emini; uyishiye indawo yakho, uye ndaweni yimbi emehlweni abo;"
Ezekiel12:4 Likhupheni ngoko impahla yenu phambi kwamehlo abo emini, njengento enokuthatyathwa; yaye baphume ngokuhlwa phambi kwamehlo abo njengabaphuma ekuthinjweni."
Ezekiel12:5 Uyatyhoboza eludongeni emehlweni abo;
Ezekiel12:6 Yithwale emagxeni akho phambi kwamehlo akho, uyikhuphe ngokuhlwa; bugqume ubuso bakho, ukuze ungaliboni ihlabathi; ngokuba ndikwenze umqondiso kwindlu kaSirayeli."
Ezekiel12:7 Ndenza njengoko ndiwiselwe umthetho ngako: Ndazikhupha izinto zam emini, njengempahla yokuthinjwa, ngokuhlwa ndalugqobhoza udonga ngesandla; Ndayikhupha ngorhatya, ndayithwala egxalabeni phambi kwamehlo abo."
Ezekiel12:8 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum kusasa, lisithi:"
Ezekiel12:9 Nyana womntu, indlu kaSirayeli, indlu eneenkani, ayitshongo na kuwe ukuthi, Wenza ntoni na?"
Ezekiel12:10 Wathi kubo, Itsho iNkosi uYehova; Eli lizwi lisingisele kwisikhulu saseYerusalem nakwindlu yonke kaSirayeli ephakathi kwayo."
Ezekiel12:11 Yithi, Ndisisimanga sakho; njengoko ndenze ngako, baya kwenziwa ngokunjalo; baya kumka, bathinjwe."
Ezekiel12:12 Isikhulu esiphakathi kwabo siya kuyithwala ngegxalaba, sihambe ngokuhlwa; baya kulugqobhoza udonga ukuyikhupha; uya kugqubuthela ubuso bakhe, ukuze angaliboni ihlabathi ngamehlo akhe."
Ezekiel12:13 Ndiya kuyiwela, ibanjiswe ngumnatha wam; Ndiya kumsa eBhabheli, ezweni lamaKaledi; noko ke, akayi kuyibona, nokuba ithe yafela khona."
Ezekiel12:14 Ndiya kuchithachitha imiphefumlo yonke ngeenxa zonke kuye, kunye namaqela akhe onke; ndirhole ikrele emva kwabo;"
Ezekiel12:15 bazi ukuba ndinguYehova, ekubaphangalaliseni kwam ezintlangeni, ndibaphangalalisele emazweni;"
Ezekiel12:16 Ndoshiya amadoda ambalwa, asinde ekreleni, nasendlaleni, nasendyikityeni yokufa; ukuze bawaxele onke amasikizi abo ezintlangeni abaya kufika kuzo; zazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel12:17 Ngaphezu koko, kwabonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum lisithi:"
Ezekiel12:18 Nyana womntu, sidle isonka sakho ungcangcazela, uwasele amanzi akho ungcangcazela yaye unesithukuthezi;"
Ezekiel12:19 Wathetha kwizizwe zehlabathi, wathi, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ngokusingisele kubemi baseYerusalem, nomhlaba wakwaSirayeli; Isonka sabo bosidla bexhalabile, bawasele amanzi abo bemangalisiwe, nelizwe lakhe libe senkangala, kuko konke okukulo, ngenxa yogonyamelo lwabo bonke abemi balo."
Ezekiel12:20 Izixeko ezinabemi ziya kuphanziswa, nelizwe libe yintlango; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel12:21 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel12:22 Nyana womntu, uthini na wena emhlabeni wakwaSirayeli, ukuthi, Imihla iyoluka, ubuso bonke buphela?"
Ezekiel12:23 Wandula ke uthi kubo, ‘Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova; Ndiya kuyiphelisa le mizekeliso, ingabi sathetha ngayo kwaSirayeli; wathi kubo, Isondele imihla, nesiphelo sombono wonke."
Ezekiel12:24 Kuba akuyi kuba sabakho buso obulambathayo okanye ukuvumisa ngenkohliso phakathi kwendlu kaSirayeli.
Ezekiel12:25 Ngokuba ndinguYehova; ndiya kuthetha, nelizwi endiya kulithetha libe yinyaniso; aliyi kuba sabakho, ngokuba ngemihla yenu, ndlundini ineenkani, ndithetha ilizwi, ndilenze; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel12:26 Laphinda labonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel12:27 Nyana womntu, yabona, indlu kaSirayeli ithi, Umbono awubonayo yena lo, ngowemihla emininzi; uprofetele amaxesha akude."
Ezekiel12:28 Ngako oko uthi kubo, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Akayi kulityaziswa nalinye ilizwi lam; ilizwi endilithethileyo liya kwenzeka; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel13:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel13:2 Nyana womntu, profeta kubaprofeti bakwaSirayeli abaprofetayo, uthi kwabaprofeta ngeentliziyo zabo, Liveni ilizwi likaYehova!"
Ezekiel13:3 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi; Yeha, abaprofeti abaziziyatha, abalandela owabo umphefumlo, abangaboni nto!"
Ezekiel13:4 Baba njengeempungutye entlango abaprofeti bakho;
Ezekiel13:5 Ayizange inyuke iye emathubeni, yaye ayizange iyenzele uthango indlu kaSirayeli ukuze ime edabini ngomhla kaYehova."
Ezekiel13:6 Babona ukuvumisa okukhohlakeleyo, nokuvumisa okukhohlakeleyo, abathi, uYehova uthethile, uYehova angabathumanga; kwaye bathembisa abanye ukuba baya kuliqinisa ilizwi."
Ezekiel13:7 Anibonanga mbono ulilize na, anivumisanga ngobuxoki na, ngoxa nisithi, ‘uYehova uthethile; nokuba andithethi?"
Ezekiel13:8 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ekubeni nithethe into ekhohlakeleyo, nibone amanga; ngako oko, yabonani, ndinengxaki nani;"
Ezekiel13:9 Kwaye isandla sam siya kuba phezu kwabaprofeti ababona amampunge nabanobuxoki; Sirayeli; nazi ukuba ndiyiNkosi uYehova.
Ezekiel13:10 Ngenxa yokuba bebalahlekisa abantu bam ngokuthi: “Luxolo! akwabakho luxolo; elowo esakha udonga, kodwa ke abanye besakha ngodongwe olungenakwenziwa."
Ezekiel13:11 Xelela abalilelayo ngodongwe olungagungqiyo, ukuba liya kuwa; nawe, sichotho esikhulu, uya kuwa; nomoya wesaqhwithi uya kuyiqweqwedisa."
Ezekiel13:12 Yabonani, xa luthe lwawa udonga, akuyi kuthiwa kuni, Luphi na udonga olo benidla ngalo?"
Ezekiel13:13 Ngako oko itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ndiya kuyiqweqwedisa ngomoya woqhwithela ngomsindo wam; kuya kubakho imvula eninzi ngomsindo wam, nesichotho esikhulu ngomsindo wam, ukuba nditshabalalise."
Ezekiel13:14 Ndiya kuluchitha udonga olwakhiwe ngodongwe olungaqiniyo, ndiluwise emhlabeni, sityhileke isiseko salo, luwe, nitshabalale kulo; yazini ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel13:15 Ndiya kuwufikela umsindo wam eludongeni nakwabo bayakhe ngodongwe olungenakwenziwa, ndithi kuni, Udonga alusekho, nabakhi balo abasayi kuba sabakho;"
Ezekiel13:16 Aba ngabaprofeti bakwaSirayeli ababeprofeta ngeYerusalem, bebona uxolo ebusweni bayo, kungekho luxolo, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel13:17 Wena ke, nyana womntu, bhekisa ubuso bakho kwiintombi zabantu bakowenu, eziprofeta okweentliziyo zazo; uprofete kubo;"
Ezekiel13:18 Wathi, Itsho iNkosi uYehova; Yeha ke abafazi abathunga iingalo zonke iingalo nabenza amalaphu eentloko zabo bonke ubukhulu ukuze bazingele imiphefumlo! Nithiyele na imiphefumlo yabantu bam, niyigcine imiphefumlo eza kuni?"
Ezekiel13:19 Niya kundenza inqambi na phakathi kwabantu bam ngenxa yokuzalisa isandla kwerhasi nangenxa yamaqhekeza esonka, ukuze nibulale imiphefumlo ebingafanga nokusindisa imiphefumlo eyalayo ukuphila ukuze iqhathe abantu bam ababuvayo ubuxoki benu?"
Ezekiel13:20 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabonani, ezigumeni zenu nizithiyileyo imiphefumlo yabantu, nibasabisa ngazo; Ndiya kuwukrazula ezandleni zenu, ndiya kuyishiya imimoya, kunye nemimoya ukuba ukuzingela ukuzingela. Bhabha uye kude."
Ezekiel13:21 Ndiya kuzikrazula iingubo zenu, ndibasindise abantu bam esandleni senu, bangabi saba sezandleni zenu ukuba zizingele; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel13:22 Ngenxa enokuba niyenza buhlungu intliziyo yelungisa ngobuxoki; wazomeleza izandla zakhe ezonakeleyo, ukuba angabuyeli endleleni yakhe embi, ngokumthembisa ubomi."
Ezekiel13:23 Ngako oko aniyi kuphinda nibone into ekhohlakeleyo nokuvumisa; kuba ndiya kubasindisa abantu bam esandleni senu, nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel14:1 Ke kaloku kweza kum amadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, ahlala ngakum."
Ezekiel14:2 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel14:3 Nyana womntu, la madoda anyuse izigodo zawo ezintliziyweni zawo, abeka ubugwenxa bawo phambi kwawo; ndithethe nabo kwaphela?"
Ezekiel14:4 Ngoko ke thetha nabo uthi kubo: ‘Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ukuthi: Elowo wendlu kaSirayeli, othe wanyusa izigodo zakhe entliziyweni yakhe, owabeka phambi kobuso bakhe isingcikivo sobubi bakhe, weza kumprofeti; Mna, Yehova, ndiya kumphendula lowo uzayo, ngobuninzi bemifanekiso yakhe eqingqiweyo;"
Ezekiel14:5 ukuze ndingenise indlu kaSirayeli ezintliziyweni zabo, ngenxa yokuba bonke bandinikele umva ngezithixo zabo ezinezothe."
Ezekiel14:6 Ngako oko yithi kwindlu kaSirayeli, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Guqukani, nizilahle izigodo zenu; ubuye kuwo onke amasikizi akho."
Ezekiel14:7 Elowo wendlu kaSirayeli, nowasemzini ophambukele kwaSirayeli, othe wazahlula kum, nozahlulayo kum, nonyusa izigodo zakhe entliziyweni yakhe, nobeka phambi kwendlu yakhe isikizi lenkohlakalo yakhe weza kumprofeti ukuba abuze kuye. Ngam; Mna, Yehova, ndiya kumphendula ngokuphuma kum."
Ezekiel14:8 Ndoyikhangela loo ndoda, ndiyenze ibe ngumqondiso nomzekeliso, ndiyinqumle ebantwini bam; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel14:9 Ukuba umprofeti uthe wamlukuhla, ekuthetheni kwakhe, mna Yehova ndimqhathile loo mprofeti, ndosolulela kuye isandla sam, ndimtshabalalise phakathi kwabantu bam amaSirayeli."
Ezekiel14:10 Kwaye baya kuluthwala ubugwenxa babo; sibe njengokohlwaywa komprofeti lowo umquqelayo;
Ezekiel14:11 ukuze indlu kaSirayeli ingabi sabuya ukubuya kum, ingabi sazenza iinqambi ngezikreqo zayo zonke; ukuze babe ngabantu bam, ndibe nguThixo wabo; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel14:12 Laphinda labonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel14:13 “Nyana womntu, ukuba ilizwe lithe lashiywa, ndosolula isandla sam phezu kwalo, ndiwaphule umsimelelo osisonka, ndilizisele indlala kulo, nditshabalalise abantu neenkomo kulo."
Ezekiel14:14 Kwanokuba la madoda mathathu, uNowa, uDaniyeli noYobhi, ebekho, ebeya kuzisindisa kuphela ngobulungisa bawo, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel14:15 Ukuba ndithe ndathumela iindudumo ezweni, zalonakalisa, laba yintlango, kungabikho udlulayo phakathi kwamarhamncwa;"
Ezekiel14:16 Nokuba ebekho la madoda mathathu, ndihleli nje, itsho iNkosi uYehova, ebengayi kusindisa nyana nantombi; ngabo kuphela abaya kusindiswa, kodwa ilizwe libe senkangala."
Ezekiel14:17 Nokuba ndithe ndalizisela ikrele elo lizwe, ndathi, ‘Ikrele! ukuze nditshabalalise kulo umntu nenkomo."
Ezekiel14:18 Nokuba ebekho phakathi kwenu la madoda mathathu, ndihleli nje, itsho iNkosi uYehova, ebengayi kusindisa nyana nantombi, kodwa aya kusindiswa yedwa."
Ezekiel14:19 Nokuba ndithe ndathumela indyikitya yokufa kwelo lizwe, ndathulula ubushushu bam phezu kwalo ngegazi, ukuze nditshabalalise kulo umntu nenkomo;"
Ezekiel14:20 bekho apho ooNowa noDaniyeli noYobhi, ndihleli nje, itsho iNkosi uYehova, bebengayi kusindisa nyana nantombi; baya kukhulula umphefumlo wabo kuphela ngobulungisa babo."
Ezekiel14:21 Kuba ithi iNkosi enguMongami uYehova: “Kuya kuba njani na ukuba ndithumele izigwebo zam ezine ezibuhlungu eYerusalem, ezizezi, ikrele nendlala neendudumo nendyikitya yokufa ukuze kupheliswe kuyo umntu nesilwanyana?"
Ezekiel14:22 Yabonani, kuya kubakho abasindileyo kuwo, abangoonyana neentombi; yabonani, baya kuphuma beze kuni, niyibone indlela yabo neentlondi zabo; yaye ngokuqinisekileyo niya kuthuthuzeleka ngenxa yentlekele endiyizisele iYerusalem nangenxa yako konke endikuzisele kona."
Ezekiel14:23 Baya kunithuthuzela, xa niyibonayo indlela yabo neentlondi zabo; yaye niya kwazi ukuba yonke into endiyenzileyo andiyenzanga ngaphandle kwesizathu,’ itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel15:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel15:2 Nyana womntu, umdiliya ulungile na ngaphezu kweminye imithi, namasebe emithi yehlathi?"
Ezekiel15:3 Kuya kuthatyathwa umthi na kuwo wokusebenza umsebenzi? okanye baya kuxhoma isikhonkwane kuso na?
Ezekiel15:4 Yabona, kufakwe emlilweni njengokudla; umlilo utshisa iincam zayo zombini, nombindi wayo urhawuke. Ngaba iwufanele nawuphi na umsebenzi?"
Ezekiel15:5 Yabona, xa ibifile, ibingenamsebenzi; Ukuba ungawutshiselwa ngumlilo, ubungafanelanga na kuwo nawuphi na umsebenzi?"
Ezekiel15:6 Ngako oko itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Njengomdiliya phantsi kwemithi yehlathi, endiwutshisayo emlilweni, ukuba ube ziinkuni, ndenjenjalo ukubanika abemi baseYerusalem;"
Ezekiel15:7 ndibubhekise ubuso bam kubo; baya kuphuma komnye umlilo, badle umlilo wumbi; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova xa ndibubhekisa ubuso bam kubo."
Ezekiel15:8 Ndiya kulenza ilizwe kube senkangala, ngenxa yokuba banyanisile; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel16:1 Kwaphinda kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel16:2 Nyana womntu, iYerusalem yazi amasikizi ayo,"
Ezekiel16:3 uthi, Itsho iNkosi uYehova kwiYerusalem; Ukuzalwa kwakho nenzala yakho kuphuma ezweni lakwaKanan; uyihlo waye engumAmori, unyoko engumHetikazi."
Ezekiel16:4 Ukuzalwa kwakho ke, ngemini yokuzalwa kwakho ayinqunyulwanga inkaba yakho, akuhlanjwanga ngamanzi ukuba ukhohlise; ubungebanga netyuwa konke konke, akuchaphazelekanga konke konke."
Ezekiel16:5 Akubangakho liso linenceba kuwe, ukuze wenze noko inye kwezo zinto kuwe, ukuba abe nenceba kuwe; ke wena waphoswa ezweni, ngenxa yento elisikizi kuwe, ngomhla wokuzalwa kwakho."
Ezekiel16:6 Ndithe ndigqitha kuwe, ndakubona udyobhekile egazini lakho, ndathi kuwe, Usegazini lakho njalo, phila; Ewe, ndathi kuwe usegazini lakho, Phila!"
Ezekiel16:7 Ndakwenza wandisa njengembewu yelizwe, wanda, wahluma, wafikelela eehokweni ezintle;"
Ezekiel16:8 Ndagqitha kuwe, ndakubona, yabona, ixesha lakho lilixesha lothando; Ndatwabulula ingubo yam phezu kwakho, ndabamba ubuze bakho; ndakufungela, ndenza umnqophiso nawe, itsho iNkosi uYehova; waba ngowam ke."
Ezekiel16:9 Ndanihlamba ke ngamanzi; Ndilihlambe amagazi akho, ndakuthambisa ngeoli."
Ezekiel16:10 Ndakwambesa ngelaphu elilukiweyo, ndakunxiba izixathula zezikhumba zamahlengezi, ndakujikelisa ngelinen ecikizekileyo, ndakwambesa isilika."
Ezekiel16:11 Ndakuhombisa ngezacholo, ndakufaka izacholo ezandleni, nomxokelelwane emqaleni wakho."
Ezekiel16:12 Ndakunika ikhonkco lempumlo, namajikazi ezindlebeni zakho, nesithsaba sokuhomba entloko."
Ezekiel16:13 Wavatha ke igolide nesilivere; Iingubo zakho zaba zezelinen ecikizekileyo, nezesilika, nezilukiweyo; wadla umgubo ocoliweyo nobusi neoli, yaye umhle kakhulu, yaye waphumelela ebukumkanini."
Ezekiel16:14 Udumo lwakho ludume phakathi kweentlanga ngenxa yobuhle bakho, ngenxa yokuba lwazaliseka ngenxa yobuhle bam endakunikayo, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel16:15 Kodwa wena wakholosa ngobuhle bakho waza wahenyuza ngenxa yegama lakho, yaye waphalaza ubuhenyu bakho kubo bonke abadlula ngendlela; ibiyeyakhe."
Ezekiel16:16 Wathabatha ezingutyeni zakho, wahombisa iingubo zakho ezimibalabala, wakrexeza kuyo; aziyi kuza, kwaye aziyi kubakho."
Ezekiel16:17 Wathabatha izihombo zakho ezintle zegolide yam nesilivere yam endakunikayo, wazenzela imifanekiso yabantu waza wakrexeza nayo."
Ezekiel16:18 Wathabatha iingubo zakho ezilukiweyo, wazambatha; Ioli yam nesiqhumiso sam ubeke phambi kwayo."
Ezekiel16:19 Ukudla kwam endikunikileyo, oko kukuthi, umgubo ocoliweyo, neoli, nobusi, endakudlisayo, ùkwenze ube livumba elithozamisayo; Kwaba njalo, itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel16:20 Wathabatha oonyana bakho neentombi zakho, owazizalela mna, wabingelela ngazo ukuba badle. Ngaba ukukrexeza kwakho yinto encinci?"
Ezekiel16:21 Nibabulele ke oonyana bam waza wabanikela emlilweni?
Ezekiel16:22 Kuzo zonke izinto zakho ezingcolileyo neqhayiya lakho, awuzange uyikhumbule imihla yozuko lwakho, xa wawungenazintloni, wawumbi, yaye wawungcoliswe ligazi lakho."
Ezekiel16:23 Oku kwenzeka emva kwabo bonke ububi bakho—yeha, yeha nina, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova!"
Ezekiel16:24 kananjalo wazakhela indawo entle, wazenzela iindawo eziphakamileyo ezitratweni zonke."
Ezekiel16:25 Wazakhela iindawo eziphakamileyo kuzo zonke izidima zendlela, wabenza ubuhle bakho baba lizothe, watyhila iinyawo zakho kuye wonk’ ubani odlula ngendlela, yaye ngokufuthi wakrexeza neyakho."
Ezekiel16:26 Wahenyuza namaYiputa, angabamelwane nawe, inyama enkulu; ndakwandisa ubuhenyu bakho ukuba undiqumbise."
Ezekiel16:27 Yabona, kungenxa yoko le nto ndolulela phezu kwakho isandla sam, ndaza ndakunciphisa ukutya obukudlayo, ndaza ndakunikela kwintando yabo bakuthiyayo, iintombi zamaFilisti ezazineentloni ngenxa yezono zakho indlela yakho elihlazo."
Ezekiel16:28 Waphinda wakrexeza nama-Asiriya, ngenxa yokuba unganelanga; ewe, wenza okufanayo kubo, kodwa noko akwanelanga."
Ezekiel16:29 Wasuka wahenyuza kwesa kwaKanan kwesa kwelamaKaledi; kanti akwanelisekanga yiyo.
Ezekiel16:30 Hayi, ukuthamba kwentliziyo yakho, itsho iNkosi uYehova; ngokuba wenze zonke ezo zinto, umsebenzi wehenyukazi elilawulayo;"
Ezekiel16:31 ukuze wakhe uzuko lwakho emantloko eendlela zonke, wenze ukuphakama kwakho ezitratweni zonke; anibanga njengehenyukazi, ningcikiva umvuzo;"
Ezekiel16:32 Kunjengomfazi okrexezayo, owamkela abasemzini!"
Ezekiel16:33 Onke amahenyukazi anika izipho, kodwa wena ubanika izipho zakho zonke intanda yakho, ubaqeshe, ukuze beze kuwe bevela ngeenxa zonke ngenxa yobuhenyu bakho."
Ezekiel16:34 Kwahlukile kuwe, nakubamankazana eburheletyweni bakho, ekungekho namnye ukulandelayo ngokuhenyuza;"
Ezekiel16:35 Ngako oko, henyukazi, live ilizwi likaYehova."
Ezekiel16:36 “Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi, ‘Ngenxa yokuba ukungcola kwakho kuphalaziwe yaye amampunge akho atyhilwe ngokuhenyuza kwakho nabantu obathandayo nakubo bonke oothixo abangahlambulukanga bezinto zakho ezicekisekayo nangegazi koonyana bakho owabanikayo;"
Ezekiel16:37 Ngako oko, uyabona, ndiya kubahlanganisa bonke abo ubathandayo, owabathandayo, nabo bonke owabathandayo, kunye nabo bonke owabathiyayo; Kwaye ndiya kubahlanganisa ngeenxa zonke kuwe kwaye ndiya kulityhila kubo ihlazo lakho, ukuze balibone lonke ihlazo lakho."
Ezekiel16:38 Ndiya kukugweba ngokwesiko labatshabhisi bomtshato, baphalaze igazi; Ndiya kuninika igazi lomsindo nekhwele."
Ezekiel16:39 Ndiya kukunikela esandleni sabo, bayitshabalalise indawo yakho enkulu, bazitshabalalise iziganga zakho; baya kukuhluba iingubo zakho, bazithabathe izihombo zakho zokuhomba, bakushiye uze."
Ezekiel16:40 Kwaye baya kukunyusela isihlwele, bakuxulube ngamatye, baze bakuhlabe ngamakrele abo."
Ezekiel16:41 Ziya kuzitshisa izindlu zakho ngomlilo, zikugwebe phambi kwabafazi abaninzi; Ndiya kukuyeka ukuhenyuza, ungabi sahlawula;"
Ezekiel16:42 ndiwubeke phezu kwakho umsindo wam, limke ikhwele lam kuwe, ndithule, ndingabi saqumba."
Ezekiel16:43 Ngenxa yokuba akuyikhumbulanga imihla yobutsha bakho, kodwa undikhwankqise kuzo zonke ezi zinto; yabona, ndiya kukubeka ngokwendlela yakho entlokweni yakho, itsho iNkosi uYehova; yaye musani ukusenza esi senzo silihlazo ngaphezu kwawo onke amasikizi enu."
Ezekiel16:44 Yabona, wonk’ ubani osebenzisa imizekeliso ya kukusebenzisa ngale mizekeliso, esithi: “Injalo unina, injalo intombi yakhe."
Ezekiel16:45 Wena uyintombi yonyoko, oyithiyileyo indoda yakhe nabantwana bakhe; wena ungudade woodade benu, abamthiyileyo amadoda abo nabantwana babo; unyoko ngumHetikazi, uyihlo engumAmori."
Ezekiel16:46 Udade wenu omkhulu nguSamari namagxamesi akhe ahleli ngasekhohlo kwakho; nomsakwenu omncinane kuwe, ehleli ngasekunene kwakho, yiSodom namagxamesi ayo."
Ezekiel16:47 Kodwa akuhambanga ngeendlela zabo ungenzanga ngokwezinto zabo ezicekisekayo, kodwa ngokungathi yinto encinane, wonakalise ngakumbi kuzo zonke iindlela zakho."
Ezekiel16:48 Ndihleli nje, itsho iNkosi uYehova, iSodom udade wenu, yona namagxamesi ayo, ayenzanga le nto uyenzileyo, wena neentombi zakho."
Ezekiel16:49 Yabona, inkohlakalo yaseSodom, umzalwana wayo, yabe iliqhayiya, nokutya okutyebileyo, nokutyeba okukhulu, ikuye namagxamesi akhe;"
Ezekiel16:50 Kwaye babeqhayisa kwaye benyelisa phambi kwam; ke ngoko, ndawathabatha njengoko ndibona kufanelekile."
Ezekiel16:51 NoSamari akonanga ngokwesiqingatha sezono zakho; kodwa wena uye wawandisa amasikizi akho ngaphezu kwabo, waza wabenza oodade wenu bangamalungisa ngamasikizi akho onke ozenzileyo."
Ezekiel16:52 Nani ke nibagwebe abazalwana benu, lithwaleni ihlazo lezono zenu, enone zona ezimbi kunezabo; bona balungile kunawe; oodade."
Ezekiel16:53 Ekubabuyiseni kwam abathinjwa babo, abathinjwa baseSodom nezixeko eziyingqongileyo, nabathinjwa baseSamariya neentombi zayo, ndiya kubabuyisela phakathi kwabo abathinjwa bakho;"
Ezekiel16:54 ukuze ulithwale ihlazo lakho, udane ngenxa yeento zonke ozenzileyo, ngokuba ubathuthuzele."
Ezekiel16:55 Xa oonyana bakho, iSodom namagxamesi ayo, babuyela emhlabeni wabo wokuqala, noSamari namagxamesi akhe babuyela ezweni labo lamandulo, nawe neentombi zakho niza kubuyela ezweni lakowenu."
Ezekiel16:56 Ngenxa enokuba iSodom umsakwenu ayizange ikhankanywe emlonyeni wakho ngemini yekratshi lakho.
Ezekiel16:57 Abukabonwa ububi bakho, njengakwimihla yokugculelwa kweentombi zama-Aram, neyabangeenxa zonke kuye, neentombi zamaFilisti, ebezikucunula ezindaweni zonke."
Ezekiel16:58 Ulithwele ihlazo lakho nezinto zakho ezicekisekayo,” utsho uYehova."
Ezekiel16:59 Kuba itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi: “Nawe ndiya kwenza njengoko wenze ngako, wena osidelileyo isifungo ngokwaphula umnqophiso."
Ezekiel16:60 Ndiya kuwukhumbula umnqophiso wam endawenza nawe ngemihla yobuncinane bakho, ndenze umnqophiso ongunaphakade nawe."
Ezekiel16:61 Apho niya kukukhumbula ukushukuma kwenu, kwaye niya kuba neentloni ekubamkeleni kwenu abantwana benu, abadala benu nabancinane benu; Ndokunika bona babe ziintombi zakho, kodwa bangabi ngomnqophiso wakho."
Ezekiel16:62 Ndiwumise umnqophiso wam nani; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova;
Ezekiel16:63 ukuze ucinge uze ume uneentloni uze ungabi sawuvula umlomo wakho kwakhona ngenxa yehlazo lakho, ukuba ndiya kuphinda ndikuxolelanise ngenxa yako konke okwenzileyo,’ itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel17:1 Kwafika uMoya kaYehova kum, wathi,"
Ezekiel17:2 Nyana womntu, yenza iqhina, uthethe ngomzekeliso kwindlu kaSirayeli;"
Ezekiel17:3 Utsho ukuthi, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndiwuthabathel’ indlebe; Ixhalanga elikhulu, elimaphiko makhulu, namaphiko amade, lizele ziintsiba ezimibalabala, leza eLebhanon, lathabatha incopho yomthi womsedare."
Ezekiel17:4 Wagawula amahlamvu awo aphezulu wawazisa ezweni labarhwebi; Wayibeka emzini wabarhwebi.
Ezekiel17:5 Nathabatha imbewu emhlabeni nayityala emhlabeni otyebileyo; ibeke ngasemanzini amakhulu ibeke okomthi wehobe.
Ezekiel17:6 Yahluma, yaba ngumdiliya onabileyo ombonakalo intle, ojikela ekupheleni, neengcambu zawo zibe phantsi kwawo; waba ngumdiliya, waqhama, wavelisa amasebe."
Ezekiel17:7 Kwabakho elinye ixhalanga elikhulu, elimaphiko makhulu, linoboya obuninzi; nanku lo mdiliya unabela iingcambu zawo, unabela neengcambu zawo, wawanyakamisa imisele yamasimi awo;"
Ezekiel17:8 Ubutyelwe kuwo umhlaba omhle, ngasemanzini amaninzi, ukuze wenze isiqhamo, ukuba ube yidiliya elungileyo."
Ezekiel17:9 Ngaba nithi, Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi; Ngaba iya kuphumelela? Ke yena akayi kuzinyothula na iingcambu zawo, azinqumle iziqhamo zawo, ubune? Iya kubuna onke amagqabi omthombo wayo, nokuba ingenawo amandla amakhulu okanye abantu abaninzi bokuwuncothula ngeengcambu zawo."
Ezekiel17:10 Yabona, ukuba luthi lwatyalwa, lomila na? Awuyi koma na, ukuba uthe wafikelwa lulophu lwasempumalanga? Iya koma emseleni obukhule kuwo."
Ezekiel17:11 Kwafika umoya kaYehova kum, wathi:"
Ezekiel17:12 Yithi ke kwindlu eneenkani, Anikwazi na ukuba kuyintoni na oko? Yithi kubo, Yabonani, ukumkani waseBhabheli weza eYerusalem, wamthabatha ukumkani wakhe nabathetheli bakhe, wabasa naye eBhabheli;"
Ezekiel17:13 Wathabatha koonyana bokumkani, wenza umnqophiso naye, wamfungela; woyisa iingxilimbela zehlabathi."
Ezekiel17:14 Ke ubukumkani bube buncinane, ukuba ungabuphakamisi kodwa ngokubugcina."
Ezekiel17:15 Wasuka ke wagwilika kuye ngokuthumela abakhonzi bakhe eYiputa, ukuze amnike amahashe namadoda amaninzi. Ngaba uya kuphumelela? Wosinda na owenze ezo zinto? Okanye ngaba uza kuyiqhekeza aze asinde?"
Ezekiel17:16 “Mna ndihleliyo, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova, ndiya kufela endaweni ahleli kuyo ukumkani, lowo wamenza ukumkani, osifumba sakhe wasidelayo, nowaphuleyo ikamva lakhe, ewe, uya kufa naye eBhabhiloni."
Ezekiel17:17 Ke yena uFaro, enengxokolo yakhe enamandla nengxokolo yakhe enkulu, akayi kulwa naye ngokwakha iintaba, nangokukha iimboniselo zokutshabalalisa abantu abaninzi."
Ezekiel17:18 Ekubeni, esidelile isifungo ukuba uyaphule, yabona, unike isandla sakhe, wenza zonke ezo zinto; akayi kusinda."
Ezekiel17:19 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ndihleli nje, isifungo sakhe awasaphulileyo, nesifungo sam awaphuleyo, ndiya kumnika entlokweni yakhe."
Ezekiel17:20 Yaye ngokuqinisekileyo ndiya kuyihlasela, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo iya kubanjiswa ngumnatha wam, ndiyizise eBhabhiloni ndize ndilwe nayo imfazwe ngenxa yokunxaxha kwayo endone ngako."
Ezekiel17:21 Kwaye bonke abasabileyo bakhe ngomphefumlo wakhe wonke ndiya kuwa kunye nelizwe, kwaye amasalela ayakuba ziintsali emazweni onke; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova othethileyo."
Ezekiel17:22 “Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi: “Ndiya kuthabatha indawo ephakamileyo yomsedare ndiyibeke; ndowunqumla umthi encotsheni yamasebe awo, ndiwutyale entabeni ephakamileyo, entle kunene;"
Ezekiel17:23 Ndiya kulityala ke entabeni ende yakwaSirayeli, livelise iziqhamo, libe ngumsedare olungileyo; phantsi kwawo kuhlale zonke iintaka zeentlobo ngeentlobo; emthunzini wakhe baya kuhlala."
Ezekiel17:24 Yazi yonke imithi yelizwe, ukuba mna Yehova ndimise umthi omde, ndahluma umthi omncinane, ndomisa umthi omanzi, ndiwuqhamisile umthi owomileyo; Mna Yehova ndithethile, ndenza."
Ezekiel18:1 Kwaphinda kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel18:2 Iyintoni na kuni le mizekeliso ngomhla wamaSirayeli, nisithi, Ooyise badla iidiliya ezibolileyo, aba buthelezi amazinyo oonyana?"
Ezekiel18:3 Ndihleli nje, utsho uYehova, anisayi kuba sazekelisa ngale mizekeliso ezweni lakwaSirayeli."
Ezekiel18:4 Yabonani, yonke imiphefumlo yeyam; unjengomphefumlo kayise, unjalo umphefumlo wonyana wam; umphefumlo owonayo umele ufe."
Ezekiel18:5 Kodwa ukuba umntu uthe walungisa, wenza ubulungisa nobulungisa,"
Ezekiel18:6 Wayengadli ezintabeni, engawaphakamiseli amehlo akhe emifanekisweni eqingqiweyo yendlu kaSirayeli, engamhlambeli umfazi wommelwane, engasondeli nakumfazi wenyanga;"
Ezekiel18:7 akacudisa mntu, wasibuyisela isibambiso sakhe konetyala, akaphanga mntu, wasinika olambileyo isonka sakhe, wamambesa oze ngengubo;"
Ezekiel18:8 Obengasebenzisi nzala, akathabathanga nkongozelo, osigcineyo isandla sakhe ebubini, ugweba ngenyaniso phakathi komntu nomntu;"
Ezekiel18:9 wahamba ngemimiselo yam, wawagcina amasiko am, ukuba enze ngenyaniso; ulilungisa, inene, uya kuphila; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel18:10 Ngokungathi wazala unyana wesela, umbulali, wenza ngolo hlobo komnye wabo;"
Ezekiel18:11 Ke ukuba akenzanga nanye kwezo zinto, wodlela ezintabeni, umhlambele umfazi wommelwane wakhe;"
Ezekiel18:12 Wacudisa usizana nolihlwempu, wathinjwa, akasibuyisa isibambiso, wawaphakamisela kwizigodo amehlo akhe, wenza amasikizi;"
Ezekiel18:13 Wayesebenzisa inzala, ethabatha inzala; uyakuphila ke? akayi kuphila; bayawenza onke amasikizi; inene, uya kufa; igazi lakhe malibe phezu kwakhe."
Ezekiel18:14 Yabonani ke, ethe wazala unyana othe wazibona zonke izono zikayise azenzileyo, walinda, ukuba angenzi ngolo hlobo;"
Ezekiel18:15 ongadliyo ezintabeni, angawaphakamiseli amehlo akhe kwizigodo zendlu kaSirayeli, akamenza inqambi umfazi wommelwane wakhe;"
Ezekiel18:16 Nokuba uthe wacudisa abantu, angasilulameli isibambiso, angaxhakamfuli; isonka sakhe asinike olambileyo, amgubungele oze ngengubo;"
Ezekiel18:17 owabamba isandla sendoda elihlwempu, yona engathabathanga nzala, nanzala, neyayigcina imali yam, wahamba ngemali yam; akayi kufa ngobugwenxa bukayise; uya kuphila."
Ezekiel18:18 Ke yena uyise, ngenxa yokuba wamcinezela ngenkohlakalo waza waphanga umntakwabo waza wenza okungafanelekanga phakathi kwabantu bakowabo, yabona, naye uya kufa ngenxa yobungendawo bakhe."
Ezekiel18:19 Ke nina nithi, Ngani na? Unyana akabuthwali na ubugwenxa bukayise? Ukuba inkwenkwe ithe yenza ngokwesiko nangobulungisa, yayigcina yonke imithetho yam, ukuba iyayenza, iphila."
Ezekiel18:20 Umphefumlo owenza isono kuya kufa wona. Unyana akayi kuthwala ubugwenxa bukayise, noyise akayi kubuthwala ubugwenxa bonyana;"
Ezekiel18:21 Kodwa ukuba umntu ongendawo uthe waguquka ezonweni zakhe zonke azenzileyo waza wayigcina yonke imiyalelo yam emisiweyo waza wenza ubulungisa nobulungisa, ngokuqinisekileyo uya kuphila, akayi kufa."
Ezekiel18:22 Bonke ubugwenxa bakhe abenzileyo abuyi kubizwa kuye; uya kuphila ngobulungisa bakhe abenzileyo.
Ezekiel18:23 Kumnandi na kum ukufa kongendawo? itsho iNkosi uYehova, akukuko nokuba abuye ezindleleni zakhe, aphile?"
Ezekiel18:24 Kodwa ukuba ilungisa liyaguquka ebulungiseni balo, lenze ngokungekho sikweni, lenze ngokwamasikizi awenzileyo ongendawo, ngaba liya kuphila na? Bonke ubulungisa bakhe abenzileyo abunakubizwa;"
Ezekiel18:25 Ke nina nithi, Indlela kaYehova ayilungelelene. Yivani, ndlu kaSirayeli; Indlela yam ayilunganga? Ngaba iindlela zenu azilunganga?"
Ezekiel18:26 Xa ilungisa liguquka ebulungiseni balo, lenza ngobugqwetha, lize life ngenxa yoko; ngenxa yobubi bakhe abenzileyo, uya kufa."
Ezekiel18:27 Kanjalo, ukuba uthe waba mbi, wabangela ububi abenzileyo, wenza okulungileyo nobulungisa, uya kuwugcina umphefumlo wakhe uphila."
Ezekiel18:28 Ekubeni ebuyile ezikreqweni zakhe zonke azenzileyo waza wabuya, ngokuqinisekileyo uya kuphila, akayi kufa."
Ezekiel18:29 Yathi ke indlu kaSirayeli, Indlela kaYehova ayilungelelene. Iindlela zam azilungelelene na, ndlu kaSirayeli? Ngaba iindlela zenu azilunganga?"
Ezekiel18:30 Ngoko ke ndiya kunigweba, nina bendlu kaSirayeli, ngamnye ngendlela yakhe, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova. Guqukani, niguquke kuzo zonke izikreqo zenu; ngoko abuyi kunifikela ububi."
Ezekiel18:31 Lahla zonke izikreqo zakho okreqe ngazo kuwe; nizenzele intliziyo entsha nomoya omtsha; Yini na ukuba nife, ndlu kaSirayeli?"
Ezekiel18:32 Kuba andikholiswanga kukufa komntu ofayo, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova. Ngoko ke, guquka, uphile."
Ezekiel19:1 Ngaba uzihlabe na izikhulu zakwaSirayeli?
Ezekiel19:2 Wathi, Uyintoni na unyoko? Yayiyingonyamakazi, ilele phakathi kweengonyama, ilundla amathole ayo phakathi kweengonyama."
Ezekiel19:3 Yakhulisa elinye lamantshontsho ayo, yaba livukuthu, yafunda ukubambisa inyamakazi; yatya abantu."
Ezekiel19:4 Neentlanga zeva ngaye; Wabanjiswa ngumgibe wabo, bamthabatha bamsa ezweni laseYiputa ngamakhamandela."
Ezekiel19:5 Yakubona ukuba ulibele, iphelelwe lithemba, yathabatha elinye lamathole ayo, yalenza ingonyama."
Ezekiel19:6 Yahamba neengonyama, yaba yingonyama, yafunda ukubambisa ixhoba, yadla abantu;"
Ezekiel19:7 Wazi ukuba izindlu zookumkani babo zibunile, wayichitha imizi yabo; elimiweyo laba yintlango nenzaliseko yalo, ngesandi sesandi salo."
Ezekiel19:8 Zamhlasela iintlanga, ziphuma emazweni onke, zagaleleka kuye; wabanjiswa ngumgibe wabo."
Ezekiel19:9 Bamfaka amakhamandela, bamsa kukumkani waseBhabheli;"
Ezekiel19:10 Unyoko unjengomdiliya, otyelwe ngasemanzini, ekuphumleni kwakho;"
Ezekiel19:11 Waba neentonga zobukumkani ezomeleleyo zokuwalawula;
Ezekiel19:12 Wesuka waqumba, wakhahlelwa emhlabeni, lwaza ulophu lwasempumalanga lwatshisa iziqhamo zakhe; iintonga zawo ezomeleleyo ziqhawukile, zome; umlilo ubatshisa."
Ezekiel19:13 Ngoku ke utyelwe entlango, ezweni elingumqwebedu, elomileyo."
Ezekiel19:14 Kuphuma umlilo emahlamvini amasebe awo, uzitshise iziqhamo zawo, akwabakho msimelelo unamandla okuba ngumsimelelo wakomkhulu. Kukukhala, kwaye kuya kuba sisikhalo."
Ezekiel20:1 Kwathi ngomnyaka wesixhenxe, ngenyanga yesihlanu, ngolweshumi enyangeni leyo, kwafika amadoda, evela kumadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, ukuba acele kuYehova, ahlala nam."
Ezekiel20:2 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel20:3 Nyana womntu, thetha namadoda amakhulu akwaSirayeli, uthi kuwo, uYehova uthethile; Uza kuthetha nam? Ndihleli nje, andiyi kubuzwa nini, utsho uYehova;"
Ezekiel20:4 Nyana womntu, uya kubagweba na, uya kubagweba na? mabawazi amasikizi ooyise;"
Ezekiel20:5 Wathi kubo, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi; Ekubanyuleni kwam uSirayeli, ndasiphakamisa isandla sam koonyana bendlu kaYakobi, endazazisa kubo ezweni laseYiputa, ndasiphakamisela kubo isandla sam, ndathi, NdinguYehova, uThixo wenu;"
Ezekiel20:6 Mhla ndabaphakamisayo isandla sam ndibakhupha ezweni laseYiputa ndize ndibase kwilizwe endalibonayo, lizele lubisi nobusi, eliligugu kuwo onke amazwe."
Ezekiel20:7 Ndathi kubo, Lahlani elowo kwizinto ezinezothe phambi kwakhe, ningazenzi iinqambi ngoothixo abangcolileyo baseYiputa; NdinguYehova, uThixo wenu."
Ezekiel20:8 Kodwa bandijikele, abazange bandiphulaphule; àbazilahla izinto ezinezothe emehlweni abo, ababashiya oothixo baseYiputa; umsindo wam kubo ezweni laseYiputa."
Ezekiel20:9 Koko ndenzayo ngenxa yegama lam, ukuze lingahlanjelwa phambi kweentlanga ababephakathi kwazo, endazazisa kuzo phambi kwamehlo abo, ukuba ndibakhuphe ezweni laseYiputa."
Ezekiel20:10 Kungenxa yoko le nto ndabakhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa, ndabasa entlango."
Ezekiel20:11 Ndabanika imiyalelo yam, ndabazisa amasiko am, awothi umntu ewenzile aphile ngawo."
Ezekiel20:12 Kananjalo ndabanika iisabatha zam, ukuba zibe ngumqondiso phakathi kwam nabo, ukuze bazi ukuba mna Yehova ndiya bangcwalisa."
Ezekiel20:13 Indlu kaSirayeli yesuka indichasile entlango; abahamba ngemithetho yam, bayicekisa imithetho yam, awothi umntu ewenzile, aphile ngayo; Iisabatha zam zihlanjelwe kakhulu;"
Ezekiel20:14 Oko ke ndenze ngenxa yegama lam, ukuze lingadyojwa phambi kweentlanga, endizikhuphileyo emehlweni azo."
Ezekiel20:15 Kananjalo mna ndabaphakamisela isandla entlango, ndathi, Andiyi kubangenisa ezweni endabanika lona, eligubungele amasi nobusi, eliligugu kumazwe onke;"
Ezekiel20:16 Ngenxa yokuba beyicekisile imimiselo yam baza abahamba ngemimiselo yam, bazenza inqambi iisabatha zam, ngenxa yokuba intliziyo yabo yalandela izithixo zabo ezinezothe."
Ezekiel20:17 Kodwa laba nenceba iliso lam kubo, ukuze ndingabatshabalalisi, ndingabatshabalalisi entlango."
Ezekiel20:18 Ndathi ke koonyana babo, Musani ukuhamba ekhondweni looyihlo, ningayigcini imithetho yabo, ningazenzi iinqambi ngezigodo zabo."
Ezekiel20:19 NdinguYehova, uThixo wenu; hambani ngemimiselo yam, niyigcine imiyalelo yam, niyenze;"
Ezekiel20:20 uzingcwalise iisabatha zam; ube ngumqondiso phakathi kwam nani, ukuze nazi ukuba ndinguYehova uThixo wenu."
Ezekiel20:21 Kodwa aba bantu bandivukela, abahamba ngemimiselo yam emisiweyo yaye abawagcinanga amasiko am ukuze bawenze, awothi nabani na owenzayo aphile ngawo; bazihlambele iisabatha zam; Ndathi ke, Ndiya kuthulula ubushushu bam phezu kwabo, ndenzele kubo umsindo wam entlango."
Ezekiel20:22 Ndasibuyisa ke isandla sam, ndenza ngenxa yegama lam, ukuba lingahlanjelwa emehlweni eentlanga, endabagxothayo emehlweni azo."
Ezekiel20:23 Kananjalo ndasiphakamisela kubo isandla sam entlango, ukuba ndibachithachithe ezintlangeni, ndibachithachithe emazweni;"
Ezekiel20:24 ngenxa yokuba bengazange bayigcine imimiselo yam eyayimisiwe, kodwa bayigatya imimiselo yam eyayimisiwe baza bazenza inqambi iisabatha zam, namehlo abo alandela imifanekiso eqingqiweyo kaYehova uyise."
Ezekiel20:25 Ngenxa yoko ndabamisela imithetho engalunganga, nemiyalelo abangenakuphila ngayo;"
Ezekiel20:26 Ndabenza inqambi ngezipho zabo, ndabanikela emlilweni yonke into evula isibeleko, ukuze ndibaguqule babe yintlango, ukuze bazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel20:27 “Ngoko ke, nyana womntu, thetha kwindlu kaSirayeli, uthi kubo, ‘Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova. Kodwa ngenxa yale nto bandingcikiva ooyihlo ngokundingcatsha."
Ezekiel20:28 Ndabazisa kwelo zwe ndabaphakamisela isandla sam ukuba ndibanike lona, basuka bakhangela zonke iinduli ezinde, nemithi yonke eshinyeneyo, babingelela khona, baziswa kukuhleka kwabo idini; kwaye apho benza ivumba elimnandi, kwaye bagalela iziselo zabo apho."
Ezekiel20:29 Ndathi kubo, Niya kufika phi na? Igama lawo ke kuthiwa yiBhama, unanamhla."
Ezekiel20:30 Ngako oko yithi kwindlu kaSirayeli, Itsho iNkosi uYehova; Nizenzé iinqambi na ngokwesiko looyihlo? bakrexeze ngokulandela amasikizi abo?"
Ezekiel20:31 Kuba xa nizisa izipho zenu, xa nibatshisa oonyana benu emlilweni, nizenze iinqambi ngezithixo zenu zonke ezinezothe enizinqulayo unanamhla; Ndihleli nje, itsho iNkosi uYehova, andisayi kubuzwa nini;"
Ezekiel20:32 Ke yona into ethe qatha entliziyweni yakho, ayiyi kubakho, xa nithi, Siya kuba njengeentlanga, njengezizwe zehlabathi, sisebenzela umthi namatye."
Ezekiel20:33 Ndiphila nje, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova, ngokuqinisekileyo ndiya kunilawula ngesandla esomeleleyo nangengalo eyoluliweyo nangomsindo othululwayo."
Ezekiel20:34 Ndiza kunikhupha ezintlangeni ndize ndinihlanganisele kumazwe enisasazeke kuwo ngesandla esomeleleyo nangesandla esoluliweyo nangomsindo othululwayo.
Ezekiel20:35 Ndiya kunisa entlango yeentlanga, ndilwe nani khona, ubuso ngobuso;"
Ezekiel20:36 Njengoko ndabalwelayo ooyihlo kwintlango yaseYiputa, ndiya kwenjenjalo ukunilwela, itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel20:37 Ndiya kunidlula phantsi kwentonga, ndinifake kwimbophelelo yomnqophiso."
Ezekiel20:38 Ndiya kubatshabalalisa phakathi kwenu abagwilikayo nabanginizayo; ndiya kubakhupha ezweni lokuphambukela kwabo, bangayi ke ezweni lakwaSirayeli; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel20:39 “Nina ke, bendlu kaSirayeli, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi, Hambani, niye kukhonza elowo izithixo zakhe ezingento, nize emveni koko, anindiphulaphula; kodwa ize ningalenzi inqambi igama lam elingcwele ngezipho zenu nangezigodo zenu."
Ezekiel20:40 Ngokuba entabeni yam engcwele, entabeni ende yakwaSirayeli, itsho iNkosi uYehova, kulapho iya kundikhonza khona yonke indlu kaSirayeli, bonke abasehlabathini; khona apho ndiya kubakholisa, ndifune khona iminikelo yenu, nemirhumo yezipho zenu, nezipho zenu zonke ezingcwele."
Ezekiel20:41 Ndiya kukholiswa livumba lenu elithozamisayo kuni, ekunikhupheni kwam ezintlangeni, ndinibuthe emazweni enilusali kuwo; ndongcwaliswa kuni phambi kweentlanga."
Ezekiel20:42 Niya kwazi ukuba ndinguYehova ekuniziseni kwam kwilizwe lakwaSirayeli, kwilizwe endaphakamisa isandla sam ukuba ndilinike ookhokho benu."
Ezekiel20:43 Niya kuzikhumbula ke ezo iindlela zenu nangezenzo zenu zonke, enizenze iinqambi ngazo; ube neentloni emehlweni akho ngenxa yobubi bonke obenzileyo."
Ezekiel20:44 Niya kwazi ke ukuba ndinguYehova ekunisebenzeleni kwam ngenxa yegama lam, kungekhona ngenxa yeendlela zenu ezimbi nangenxa yezenzo zenu ezimbi, nina bendlu kaSirayeli,’ itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel20:45 Ngaphezu koko, kwabonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum lisithi:"
Ezekiel20:46 Nyana womntu, bhekisa ubuso bakho kwelasezantsi, uliwise ilizwi lakho usingise ezantsi, uprofete ngehlathi lelizwe lasezantsi;"
Ezekiel20:47 Uthi kwihlathi lasemzantsi, Live ilizwi likaYehova; Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi; Yabona, ndifaka umlilo phakathi kwakho, utshise yonke imithi eluhlaza phakathi kwakho, nemithi yonke eyomileyo;"
Ezekiel20:48 Kwaye yonke inyama iya kubona ukuba mna, iNkosi, ndiwutshisile; awuyi kucinywa."
Ezekiel20:49 Ndathi ke, Owu Nkosi Yehova! Bathi kum, Akathethi ngemizekeliso na?"
Ezekiel21:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel21:2 Nyana womntu, bhekisa ubuso bakho eYerusalem, ilizwi lakho lithethe ezingcweleni, uprofete ngomhlaba wakwaSirayeli;"
Ezekiel21:3 Uthi kwilizwe lakwaSirayeli, uYehova uthethile; Yabona, ndinendawo ngawe: ndirhola ikrele lam esingxotyeni salo, ndinqumle kuwe olilungisa nongendawo;"
Ezekiel21:4 Ukususela ngelo xesha ndiya kumtshabalalisa kuwe olilungisa nongendawo, ngoko ke ikrele lam liya kuphuma esingxotyeni salo ukuze lilwe nayo yonke inyama ukususela emzantsi kuse emntla;"
Ezekiel21:5 yazi yonke inyama, ukuba mna Yehova ndilirholile ikrele lam esingxotyeni salo; aliyi kubuya libuye."
Ezekiel21:6 Nyana womntu, uyancwina, ngokuba zaphukile izinqe; bancwine ngeentlungu phambi kwamehlo abo."
Ezekiel21:7 Xa bathe kuwe, Uyancwina na? ukuze niphendule, nithi, Ngenxa yelizwi elo; ngokuba iya kuza, zinyibilike zonke iintliziyo; yabona, iyeza, iya kubakho; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel21:8 Laphinda labonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel21:9 Nyana womntu, profeta uthi, uYehova uthethile; Yithi, Ikrele, ikrele liloliwe, lirholile;"
Ezekiel21:10 Limiselwe ukubulala kakhulu; ilungele ukukhanya: ngaba sinokuvuya? idela intonga yonyana wam njengemithi yonke.
Ezekiel21:11 Wanikela ukuba libanjwe; eli krele liloliwe, yaye sele eza kulinikela esandleni sombulali."
Ezekiel21:12 Lila ulile, nyana womntu; ngokuba liya kuba phezu kwabantu bam, libe phezu kwezikhulu zonke zakwaSirayeli; kobakho ukuhlatywa komkhonto phezu kwabantu bam; wandule ubethe esinqeni."
Ezekiel21:13 Hi ke, ukuba ikrele liyayidela intonga? ayisayi kuba sabakho; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel21:14 Wena ke, nyana womntu, profeta, uqhwabe izandla, ikrele maligoqwe okwesithathu, ikrele labangcangcazelisiweyo; ngumkhonto wamadoda amakhulu abekekileyo, Ahamba ezimele."
Ezekiel21:15 Ndiwamisele ikrele emasangweni abo onke, ukuze intliziyo yabo ibe buthathaka, nezifuba zabo zibe ngamanxuwa. Ah! ikhazimlisiwe, isongelwe ukuba ihlanjwe."
Ezekiel21:16 Hamba uye kuwe ngandlela yimbi, okanye uye ekunene, okanye ekhohlo, apho sukuba ubuso bakho buya khona."
Ezekiel21:17 Nam ndiya kuqhwaba izandla zam, ndiwuthobe umsindo wam; Mna Yehova ndithethile."
Ezekiel21:18 Laphinda labonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel21:19 “Wena ke, nyana womntu, ukulungele ukuhamba ngeendlela ezimbini, ukuze lifike ikrele likakumkani waseBhabhiloni, zombini ziphume ezweni elinye; uzikhethele indawo, uyikhethe ekuqaleni kwendlela eya esixekweni."
Ezekiel21:20 Gecani indlela, ukuze ikrele lifike eRabhati yoonyana baka-Amon, nekaYuda, eYerusalem, umzi oyinqaba."
Ezekiel21:21 Kuba ukumkani waseBhabhiloni wayemi ekudibaneni kweendlela, ekuqalekeni kweendlela ezimbini, ukuze avumise;"
Ezekiel21:22 Esandleni sakhe sokunene uhlabe isihlabo ngeYerusalem, ukuba kumiswe abathetheli, kuvulwe umlomo wokubulala, kuphakanyiswe izwi lokuhlaba umkhosi, kumiswe imiqadi emasangweni, kwakhiwe iintaba, kwakhiwe inqaba."
Ezekiel21:23 Kubo ibe njengesihlabo esikhohlakeleyo phambi kwamehlo abo, kwabafunge isifungo;"
Ezekiel21:24 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ngenxa enokuba nikukhumbule okungendawo kwenu, ekutyhilekeni kwezikreqo zenu, ukuze zibonakale izono zenu emisebenzini yenu yonke; ngokuba, ndathi, uya kuza esikhumbuzweni, uya kubanjwa ngesandla."
Ezekiel21:25 “Wena ke, kumkani ongendawo wakwaSirayeli, omini ifike ekupheleni kobubi."
Ezekiel21:26 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Khulula unkontsho, sithulwe nesithsaba; akuyi kuba njalo: phakamisani othobekileyo, bathobe abaphakamileyo."
Ezekiel21:27 Ndiya kuyibuyisela, ndiyibuyise, ndiyibuyisele; kwaye akuyi kubakho de kufike lowo ulilungelo lakhe; kwaye ndiya kumnika yona."
Ezekiel21:28 Wena ke, nyana womntu, profeta, uthi, ‘Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ngokusingisele koonyana baka-Amoni, ngokuphathelele indelo yabo; nani nithi, Umkhonto urholelwe umkhonto; ngokuba igazi liqhekeziwe ukuba lisila ngenxa yokukhanya."
Ezekiel21:29 Bakubona unyanye, bethetha ubuxoki, ukuze bakuse ezintanyeni zabatyhoboziweyo, abangendawo iphelileyo imini yabo."
Ezekiel21:30 Ndiya kuyibuyisela esingqengqelweni sayo na? Ndiya kukugweba endaweni owadalwa kuyo, ezweni owazalelwa kulo."
Ezekiel21:31 Ndiza kuwuthululela phezu kwakho umsindo wam, ndikuvuthulule ngomlilo womsindo wam ndikunikele esandleni samadoda akhohlakeleyo nezilumko ukuba atshabalalise."
Ezekiel21:32 Uya kuba kukudla komlilo; igazi lakho liya kuba sezweni; akuyi kuba sakhunjulwa, ngokuba mna Yehova ndithethile."
Ezekiel22:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel22:2 Uyawugweba na ke, nyana womntu, umzi wamagazi? ewe, mbonise zonke izinto zakhe ezoyikekayo."
Ezekiel22:3 Uze uthi, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Lo mzi uphalaza igazi khona, ukuze lifike ixesha lawo, wenze umfanekiso oqingqiweyo ukuba uwenze inqambi."
Ezekiel22:4 Unetyala legazi lakho olithululeyo; uzenze inqambi ngezigodo zakho ozenzileyo; uyisondeza imihla yakho, wayifikelela iminyaka yakho; ngenxa yoko ndikwenze isingcikivo ezintlangeni, nesigculelo kumazwe onke."
Ezekiel22:5 Abo basondeleyo kuwe nabo bakude nawe baya kukugculela, abo banegama elingcolileyo nabanomsindo kakhulu."
Ezekiel22:6 Yabona, iinkosana zakwaSirayeli, ngasinye sasisesandleni saso ukuphalaza igazi."
Ezekiel22:7 Zikhanyiselwe kuwe nguyise nonina; Angabaphambukeli phakathi kwenu; kuni batshutshisa iinkedama nabahlolokazi.
Ezekiel22:8 Uzidelile izinto zam ezingcwele, neesabatha zam uzihlambele."
Ezekiel22:9 Phakathi kwenu kukho abahlekayo ukuphalazwa kwegazi; adle phezu kwakho ezintabeni; bayakuhlazisa.
Ezekiel22:10 Zifumene kuwe ihlazo looyise; babathobile ngawe abangcwele.
Ezekiel22:11 Wenza amasikizi emfazini wommelwane wakhe; omnye umenza inqambi umolokazana wakhe ngokuhlazeka; yaye omnye wenu uhlaze udade wabo, intombi kayise."
Ezekiel22:12 Bathabathe izipho kuwe ukuze baphalaze igazi; uthabathe inzala yemboleko-mali, ubathabatha abantu bakho ngokudelela; ke mna undilahlile; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel22:13 Yabona, ndibeke isandla sam phezu kobutyebi bakho obumenemeneyo, obenzileyo, naphezu kwamagazi akho obuphakathi kwakho."
Ezekiel22:14 Intliziyo yakho iya kuma na? Izandla zakho ziya kuthi nkqi na, ngemihla endiya kukuphatha ngayo? Mna Yehova ndithethile, yaye ndiya kwenza."
Ezekiel22:15 Ndiza kukuchithachitha phakathi kweentlanga ndize ndikuchithachithe kwamanye amazwe ndize ndikususe kuni ukungahlambuluki kwakho.
Ezekiel22:16 Uya kulidla ilifa ilifa lakho phambi kwamehlo eentlanga, nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel22:17 Kwabonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel22:18 Nyana womntu, indlu kaSirayeli yaba sisigqubuthelo kum; lonke ubhedu nebhekile nentsimbi nelothe esazulwini seziko; yayiziingqekembe zesilivere."
Ezekiel22:19 Ngako oko itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ngenxa enokuba nigwetywe amagwebu nonke niphela, yabonani, ndiya kunibutha eYerusalem."
Ezekiel22:20 Ekuhlanganiseni kwabo isilivere, nobhedu, nesinyithi, nelothe, nebhekile, phakathi eziko, ukuba kuqhunyiswe umlilo kuyo, inyibilikiswe; ke ngoko ndiya kunibutha ndinomsindo, ndinomsindo, ndinishiye khona, ndininyibilikise."
Ezekiel22:21 Ewe, ndiya kunibutha, ndinivuthe emlilweni wokuvutha komsindo wam, ninyibilike kuwo."
Ezekiel22:22 Njengoko isilivere inyibilika eziko, iya kunyibilikiswa eziko; nazi ukuba mna, Yehova, ndiwuphalazile umsindo wam phezu kwenu."
Ezekiel22:23 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel22:24 Nyana womntu, uthi kulo, Nililizwe eliyinqambi, elinganelwayo ngomhla wengqumbo;"
Ezekiel22:25 Licebo labaprofeti bakhe kulo; njengengonyama ebharhulayo, edla ixhoba layo; badle imiphefumlo; bathabatha ubutyebi nezinto ezixabisekileyo; bamenza abahlolokazi khona."
Ezekiel22:26 Ababingeleli balo bayawuhlambela umyalelo wam, bazihlambele iingcwele zam; abacalula phakathi kwengcwele nento eyinqambi, abacalula okuyinqambi nokuhlambulukileyo, bazifihle iisabatha zam emehlweni am, ndazenza inqambi phakathi kwabo."
Ezekiel22:27 Iinkosana zayo phakathi kwayo zinjengeengcuka eziqwenga ixhoba layo, ukuze ziphalaze igazi zize zitshabalalise imiphefumlo ukuze zizuze ubutyebi bobuxoki."
Ezekiel22:28 Abaprofeti bayo bawugubungela ngodongwe olungaqinanga yaye babaprofetela ubuxoki besithi: ‘Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova, kodwa uYehova akathethanga."
Ezekiel22:29 Abantu belizwe babecinezela yaye bephanga yaye becinezela olihlwempu nosweleyo, bemcinezela owasemzini ngokungekho sikweni."
Ezekiel22:30 Ndakhangela kubo indoda eyayinokwakha uthango ize ime ethubeni phambi kwam ikhusele ilizwe, ukuze ndingalitshabalalisi; kodwa andizange ndifumane nto."
Ezekiel22:31 Ngoko ke ndathulula ubushushu bam phezu kwabo; Ndibatshise ngomlilo wokuvutha komsindo wam; ndibeke indlela yabo entlokweni yabo, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel23:1 Kwaphinda kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel23:2 Nyana womntu, kwakukho abafazi ababini, iintombi zamfazi mnye."
Ezekiel23:3 Baqhubeka behenyuza eYiputa; bahenyuza ebutsheni babo, apho bacinezelwa khona amabele, yaye bawenza amakhoboka amabele obunyulu babo."
Ezekiel23:4 Amagama abo ke nguNtente-yakhe omkhulu kubo, noNtente-yam-kuye umsakwabo; baba ngabam, bazala oonyana neentombi. Amagama abo yayinga; ElakwaSamari nguOhola, iYerusalem nguNtente-yakhe."
Ezekiel23:5 Yaye uOhola waqhubeka esenza ngathi yeyam; Wawanqwenela ama-Asiriya abamelwane bakhe, amasikizi akhe."
Ezekiel23:6 Bazambethe iingubo ezinde ezimsi, nabathetheli, nabathetheli, amadodana angamagatyana, amadodana ehashe onke."
Ezekiel23:7 Ngoko wahenyuza kubo, nabo bonke abanyuliweyo baseAsiriya, nabo bonke awayebanqwenela; wazenza inqambi ngezigodo zabo."
Ezekiel23:8 Akabuyanga kubuhenyu bakhe, awaphuma nabo eYiputa; kuba babelala naye ebutsheni bakhe, yaye bawaphula amabele obunyulu bakhe, yaye bathululela ubuhenyu babo phezu kwakhe."
Ezekiel23:9 Ndamnikela ke esandleni sentanda yakhe, esandleni sama-Asiriya, awayebalangazelela."
Ezekiel23:10 Bamhluba ubuntombi bakhe, bathabatha oonyana bakhe neentombi zakhe, bambulala ngekrele; ngokuba babemgweba."
Ezekiel23:11 Wabona uNtente-yakhe, u-Aholibha, ukuba uthando lwakhe lungcolile kunaye, nobuhenyu bakhe bungaphezu kobuhenyu bomninawa wakhe."
Ezekiel23:12 Wayewathanda ama-Asiriya nabamelwane bakhe nabaphathi-mikhosi abanxibe kakuhle neerhuluneli, abakhweli bamahashe, bonke abafana abanomtsalane."
Ezekiel23:13 Ndabona ukuba uzenze inqambi, bahamba kwicala elinye bobabini."
Ezekiel23:14 Wongeza ke ukuhenyuza kwakhe, ngenxa enokuba ebona amadoda egalelwa eludongeni, imifanekiso yamaKaledi yazala ibomvu."
Ezekiel23:15 Babhinqa amanqina ezinqeni zabo, baba baninzi abathwele iingubo ezimibalabala entloko, zonke izikhulu zabona ngokwesiko lamaKaledi, ilizwe lokuzalwa kwawo."
Ezekiel23:16 Wawabona ngamehlo akhe, wabanqwena, wathuma abathunywa kwelamaKaledi."
Ezekiel23:17 Eza ke amaKaledi kuye, esesililini sokuncokolisa, amenza inqambi ngobufebe babo; wazenza inqambi ngabo, yemka kubo intliziyo yakhe."
Ezekiel23:18 Wakulahla ke ukuhenyuza kwakhe, wawalahla amampunge akhe;"
Ezekiel23:19 Kodwa waqhubeka elandisa ubuhenyu bakhe ngokukhumbula imihla yobutsha bakhe xa wayehenyuza ezweni laseYiputa.
Ezekiel23:20 Ngenxa yokuba ebakhumbula abo babathandayo, abanyama yabo injengenyama yamahashe, nabangumthonyama ngathi ngumsinga wamahashe."
Ezekiel23:21 Wamana ukhwaza, ukhumbula ihlazo lobutsha bakho, ekunyatheleni kwakho amathole amaYiputa, ngenxa kayihlo ebutsheni bakho."
Ezekiel23:22 Ngako oko, Ntente-yam-kuye, itsho iNkosi uYehova; Yabona, ndikuxhoxhela izithandwa zakho, lowo ujikileyo kubo umphefumlo wakho, ndize ndibazise nxamnye nawe macala onke;"
Ezekiel23:23 Onke amaKaledi, namaKaledi, noPekodi, noShowa, noKowa, nama-Asiriya onke anabo, amadodana onke anqwenelekayo, nabathetheli, namabamba, amadoda amakhulu, abathetheli nabamahashe, bonke bekhwele emahasheni;"
Ezekiel23:24 Baya kukufikela ngeenqwelo zokulwa, neenqwelo zokulwa, neevili, kwaye ngengxokolo yabantu bakubeke iingweletshetshe, ingweletshetshe, nengweletshetshe, nengxokolo; ndiwumise phambi kwabo umyalelo, banigwebe ngezigwebo zabo."
Ezekiel23:25 Ndonimisela ikhwele lam, baphathe kuni; Baya kususa impumlo yakho neendlebe zakho; namasalela akho aya kuwa likrele; baya kuthabatha oonyana bakho neentombi zakho; amathambo akho aya kutshiswa ngumlilo."
Ezekiel23:26 Baya kukuhluba iingubo zakho, bazithabathe izihombo zakho zokuhomba."
Ezekiel23:27 Ndiza kuliphelisa ihlazo lakho nohenyuzo lwakho owalikhupha ezweni laseYiputa, ukuze ungawaphakamiseli amehlo akho kuzo, ungabi sayicinga iYiputa."
Ezekiel23:28 Ngokuba itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndiya kukunikela esandleni sabo ubathiyileyo, esandleni sabo ibajikileyo intliziyo yakho."
Ezekiel23:29 Baya kukuphatha ngentiyo, bawuthabathe wonke umsebenzi wakho, bakushiye wedwa; lityhileke ihlazo lobuhenyu bakho, ihlazo lakho, nobuhenyu bakho."
Ezekiel23:30 Ndiya kuzenza ezi zinto kuni, ngenxa yokuba nikrexezile neentlanga nangenxa yokuba nizenze iinqambi ngezithixo zazo ezinezothe."
Ezekiel23:31 Uhambe ngendlela yomsakwenu; ke ngoko, ndiya kuyinikela indebe yakhe esandleni sakho."
Ezekiel23:32 Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi: “Uya kuyisela endebeni enzulu nenkulu kadade wenu; Uya kuba yintlekisa, intlekisa; inabaninzi."
Ezekiel23:33 Uya kuzala kukunxila nakukubandezeleka, yindebe yembandezelo neyokwaphula kwindebe yomzalwana wakho uSamari."
Ezekiel23:34 Uya kuyisela uze uyiginye, yaye uya kuziqhekeza iziqwenga zayo, uzikrazule namabele, ngenxa yokuba nditshilo, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel23:35 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ekubeni undilibele, wandiphosa emva komhlana wakho, uya kulithwala ihlazo lakho nobuhenyu bakho."
Ezekiel23:36 Wathi uYehova kum, Nyana womntu, uya kubagweba na ooNtente-yakhe noNtente-yam-kuye? ewe, exela izingcikivo zabo kubo;"
Ezekiel23:37 bakrexezile, izandla zabo zinegazi; bakrexeza nezigodo zabo; oonyana babo, ababazalela mna kum, babatshisa ngomlilo."
Ezekiel23:38 Benjenjalo kum: bayenze inqambi ingcwele yam kwangaloo mini, bazenza inqambi iisabatha zam;"
Ezekiel23:39 Ngenxa yokuba bazixhela izithixo zabo ezinezothe ababenqulwa ngoonyana babo, bangena kwangaloo mini engcweleni yam ukuze bayenze inqambi; kwaye yabona, besenza njalo endlwini yam."
Ezekiel23:40 Wathuma amadoda akude, kwathunyelwa kuwo umthunywa; yabona, ziyeza; lowo uzihlambisileyo, wawagquma amehlo akho, wahomba izivatho;"
Ezekiel23:41 wahlala esingqengqelweni esilungileyo, wawulungiselela itafile, wabeka phezu kwayo isiqhumiso sam neoli yam;"
Ezekiel23:42 Kwabakho izwi lesihlwele, lithuthuzelayo; athi amaSabhaya aziswa entlango, enesihlwele esikhulu, enezacholo ezandleni nezizithsaba zokuhomba entloko."
Ezekiel23:43 Ndathi kumfazi oselehagele ekukrexezeni, Baya kukrexeza na, yena nabo?"
Ezekiel23:44 Bangena ke kuye njengoko babengenamfazi okrexezayo; Bangena ke kuNtente-yakhe, noNtente-yam-kuye, bahenyuza abafazi abo."
Ezekiel23:45 Ke amadoda angamalungisa aya kubagweba ngokwesiko lamahenyukazi, nangokwesiko labafazi abaphalaza igazi labo; ngokuba bebakrexeza, banegazi ezandleni zabo."
Ezekiel23:46 Kuba itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi: “Ndiza kubangela ukuba isihlwele sibahlasele ndize ndisinikele ukuba sisisuse sibatshabalalise.
Ezekiel23:47 Isihlwele siya kubagibisela ngamatye, sibathumele ngamakrele aso; nibabulale oonyana babo neentombi zabo, nitshise izindlu zabo ngomlilo."
Ezekiel23:48 Ngoko ndiza kuluphelisa igama elibi ehlabathini, ukuze bonke abafazi bafundiswe ukuba bangenzi ngokwezithuko zakho."
Ezekiel23:49 Baya kunibuyekeza ngokwezinto zenu ezimbi, nezono zezigodo zenu niya kuzithwala; nazi ukuba ndiyiNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel24:1 Ngomnyaka wesithoba wodwa, ngenyanga yeshumi, ngolweshumi enyangeni leyo, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel24:2 Nyana womntu, libhale igama laloo mini uthi: Ngaloo mini ukumkani waseBhabhiloni wayihlasela iYerusalem."
Ezekiel24:3 Yixele umzekeliso kwindlu yababandezeli, uthi kubo, iNkosi uYehova ithethile; Beka imbiza, yibeke kwaye ugalele amanzi kuyo:"
Ezekiel24:4 Hlanganisela kuyo iinyama zayo; zonke iinyama ezilungileyo, umlenze negxalaba; yizalise ngamathambo akhethiweyo."
Ezekiel24:5 Thabatha itakane elikhethekileyo legusha, utshise amathambo phantsi kwalo, lizale kakuhle, amathambo alo aphekwe kulo."
Ezekiel24:6 Ngako oko wathi uYehova, Yeha, umzi wamagazi, imbiza enamathumba, ekungaphumiyo ilindle kuyo! yikhuphe iinyama zayo; musa ukuvumela kakhulu ukuba kuwele kuyo."
Ezekiel24:7 Ngokuba igazi lakhe likuso; yibeke phezu kwelitye; akasiphosa phantsi, ukuba asigubungele ngothuli;"
Ezekiel24:8 Ukuze kuvuswe umsindo, impindezelo; igazi lakhe ndilibeke phezu kwelitye, ukuze lingagqunywa."
Ezekiel24:9 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yeha, umzi ozele ligazi! Ndiza kuphakamisa imfumba yomlilo."
Ezekiel24:10 Thetha iinkuni, faka umlilo, yitshiseni inyama nobulawu, atshe amathambo;"
Ezekiel24:11 uyibeke phezu kwamalahle ayo, ingasenanto, ukuze luvuthe lutshe ubhedu lwayo, bunyibilike ubunqambi bayo phakathi kwayo, lidle intlenge yayo."
Ezekiel24:12 Wadinwa kukuthetha ubuxoki, nomsindo wakhe omkhulu awuzange uphume kuye; ilindle lakhe liya kuba semlilweni."
Ezekiel24:13 Kukho ukudana ebunqambini bakho; ngenxa enokuba ndikuhlambulule, akwahlambuluka, akusayi kuphinda uhlanjululwe ezonweni zakho, ndide ndibeke ubushushu bam phezu kwakho."
Ezekiel24:14 Mna Yehova ndithethile; Kuya kubakho ntoni na, ndiya kuyenza; andiyi kubuya, andiyi kuba nanceba, andiyi kuzohlwaya; baya kukugweba ngokweendlela zakho nangokwezenzo zakho, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel24:15 Laphinda labonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel24:16 Nyana womntu, yabona, ndiwususa umnqweno wamehlo akho ngesibetho; kodwa ze ningambambazeli, nilile;"
Ezekiel24:17 Musani ukulila, musani ukumbambazela ofileyo;"
Ezekiel24:18 Ndathetha ke nabantu kusasa, kwahlwa, wafa umkam; kusasa ndenza njengoko ndiyalelwe."
Ezekiel24:19 Bathi abantu kum, Akuthandi na ukusixelela, ukuba ezi zinto zithini na kuthi, wakuba wenjenjalo?"
Ezekiel24:20 Ndabaphendula ndathi, Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel24:21 Yithi kwindlu kaSirayeli, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabonani, ndiyayenza inqambi ingcwele yam, nobukhulu bamandla enu, nenkangeleko yamehlo enu, nento oyinqwenelayo umphefumlo wenu; Oonyana bakho neentombi zakho eziseleyo kuwe ziya kuwa likrele."
Ezekiel24:22 Niya kwenza njengoko ndenzayo: Musani ukuwuvala umlomo wenu, nidle isonka sabantu;"
Ezekiel24:23 iintsontelo zenu ziya kuba phezu kwentloko yenu, neembadada zenu zibe sezinyaweni zenu; musani ukulila, musani ukulila; ke niya kulila ngenxa yobugwenxa benu, nilile omnye komnye."
Ezekiel24:24 uHezekile woba ngumqondiso kuni; niya kwenza njengako konke awakwenzayo; yaye iya kuza, nazi ukuba ndiyiNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel24:25 Wena ke, nyana womntu, akuyi kuba naliphi na ixesha endiya kuwasusa ngalo amandla abo, imihlali yozuko lwabo, nento enqwenelekayo yamehlo abo, nento abayithembileyo ngoonyana neentombi zabo;"
Ezekiel24:26 ngelo xesha kuya kufika osindileyo kuwe, eve ngeendlebe zakho?"
Ezekiel24:27 Ngaloo mini uya kuvuleka umlomo wakho, kulowo ukhululweyo, uthethe, ungabi saba sisidenge; Yena uya kuba ngumqondiso kubo; zazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel25:1 Kwaphinda kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel25:2 Nyana womntu, bhekisa ubuso bakho koonyana baka-Amon, uprofete kubo;"
Ezekiel25:3 Wathi koonyana baka-Amon, Liveni ilizwi leNkosi uYehova. Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi; Ngokuba uthe: Hayi! nasezweni lakwaSirayeli, oko bekusenkangala; nabendlu yakwaYuda, ekufuduselweni kwabo ekuthinjweni;"
Ezekiel25:4 Yabona, ndikunika abantu basempumalanga, ukuba babe lilifa labo, baqinise iingxande zabo ezinde kuwe, bazakhele kuwe; baya kudla iziqhamo zakho, basele amasi akho."
Ezekiel25:5 Ndiya kuyenza iRabha ibe yindawo yeenkamela, eloonyana baka-Amon ndilenze libe yindawo yemfuyo; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel25:6 Kuba itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi: “Ngenxa yokuba niqhwabe izandla nangqisha ngeenyawo nanemihlali ezintliziyweni zenu ngako konke ukuxhalaba kwenu ngomhlaba wakwaSirayeli;
Ezekiel25:7 Yabona, ngenxa yoko ndisolula phezu kwakho isandla sam, ndikunikela ezintlangeni, ukuba ube lixhoba; Ndiya kuninqumla ezintlangeni, ndinitshabalalise kwezinye izizwe; ndiya kukutshabalalisa; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel25:8 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ngenxa enokuba bathe ooMowabhi noSehire, Yabona, injengeentlanga zonke indlu kaYuda;"
Ezekiel25:9 Ngako oko, yabona, ndiya kulivula icala lakwaMowabhi, emizini, emizini yakhe, ngasemdeni wakhe, ubuhle belizwe, iBhete-yeshimoti, neBhahali-mehon, neKiriyatayim;"
Ezekiel25:10 Ndiza kubanika abantu baseMpuma kunye noonyana baka-Amoni, yaye ndiza kubanika ubutyebi, ukuze oonyana baka-Amoni bangabalwa phakathi kweentlanga."
Ezekiel25:11 Ndiya kumvelela uMowabhi; zazi ukuba ndinguYehova.
Ezekiel25:12 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ngenxa enokuba amaEdom ephindezelela impindezelo yendlu kaYuda, enze isono esikhulu, ephindezela kubo;"
Ezekiel25:13 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ndiya kusolula isandla sam kwaEdom, nditshabalalise kulo umntu nenkomo; Ndiya kuyijika ibe yintlango yakwaTeman; yaye abantu bakwaDedan baya kuwa ngekrele."
Ezekiel25:14 Ndiya kuphindezela kwaEdom ngesandla sabantu bam amaSirayeli, benze kuEdom ngokomsindo wam nangokomsindo wam; yaye baya kuyazi impatho yam, itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel25:15 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi; ngokuba amaFilisti ebephindezela impindezelo, ephindezela ngenkohlakalo yentliziyo, ukuba atshabalalise ngenxa yentiyo yakudala;"
Ezekiel25:16 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndiya kusolula isandla sam phezu kwamaFilisti, ndiwanqumle amaKrete, ndiwatshabalalise amasalela aselunxwemeni lolwandle."
Ezekiel25:17 Ndiya kubazisela usindiso olukhulu ngesohlwayo esoyikekayo; bazi ukuba ndinguYehova, ekuthetheni kwam usindiso lwam kubo."
Ezekiel26:1 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinamnye, ngolokuqala enyangeni leyo, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel26:2 Nyana womntu, ngenxa enokuba iTire yathi ngeYerusalem, Yabona, liqhekekile, amasango abantu! waguqukela kuM; Ndiya kwaneliswa, ngoku ubhuqiwe."
Ezekiel26:3 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndikunqambi, Tire; ndiya kuxhokonxela iintlanga ezininzi ngawe, njengokuba ulwandle luphakamisa amaza alo;"
Ezekiel26:4 zizigungxule iindonga zaseTire, zizigungxule iinqaba zakho ezinde; yaye ndiya kulusula uthuli lwakhe ndize ndimenze abe njengencopho yeliwa."
Ezekiel26:5 Iya kuba yindawo yokwaneka iminatha phakathi elwandle, ngenxa yokuba nditshilo, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova, ibe iya kuba lixhoba ezintlangeni."
Ezekiel26:6 Neentombi zam ezisemaphandleni ziya kubulawa ngekrele; zazi ukuba ndinguYehova.
Ezekiel26:7 Ngokuba itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, iTire ndiyizisa uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, evela entla, ukumkani wookumkani, enamahashe, neenqwelo zokulwa, nabamahashe, namaqela abantu, nabantu abaninzi."
Ezekiel26:8 Iintombi zakho ezisemaphandleni uya kuzibulala ngekrele; uya kukwakhela inqaba, ayiqinise intaba, aphakamise ingweletshetshe."
Ezekiel26:9 Iinqwelo zokulwa uya kubeka phezu kweendonga zakho, azidilize iinqaba zakho ezinde ngeentsimbi zakhe;"
Ezekiel26:10 Ngenxa yobuninzi bamahashe akhe, uthuli lwawo luya kukugubungela; Iindonga zakho ziya kunyikima ngesandi sabakhweli-mahashe, nesevili, neseenqwelo zokulwa, ekungeneni kwabo emasangweni akho, njengokuba abantu bebengena emzini wobubi."
Ezekiel26:11 Ngamanqina amahashe akhe uya kuzigqusha zonke izitrato zakho; uya kubabulala abantu bakho ngekrele, namalengalenga akho awe emhlabeni."
Ezekiel26:12 Baya kubuphanga ubutyebi bakho baze bathengise impahla yakho njengento ephangiweyo, bazidilize neendonga zakho nezindlu zakho ezintle baya kuzidiliza, eyakho nemithi yakho nothuli lwakho baya kuyigibisela emanzini."
Ezekiel26:13 Ndoyiphelisa ingxokozelo yeengoma zakho; nesandi samakrele akho asisayi kuba saviwa.
Ezekiel26:14 Ndiya kukwenza intswahla yeliwa, ube yindawo yokwaneka iminatha; akuyi kuba sakhiwa, ngokuba mna Yehova ndithethile; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel26:15 “Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova kwiTire ukuthi: “Iziqithi aziyi kunyikima na xa sivakala isandi sokuwa kwakho, nasekukhaleni kwababuleweyo, nasekubulaweni kwabantu kuwe?"
Ezekiel26:16 Ziya kuhla zonke izikhulu zaselwandle ezitroneni zazo, zibeke emhlabeni iingubo zazo, zikhulule iingubo zazo ezilukiweyo; baya kwambatha ukungcangcazela; baya kuhlala phantsi bengcangcazela umzuzu ngamnye kwaye beme besoyika."
Ezekiel26:17 Baya kukubethela uhadi, bathi kuwe, Hayi, ukuphanziswa kwakho, wena bekukho oomatiloshe, wena mzi wodumo, ubunamandla ngolwandle, wena nabemi bawo, aba baqhiphula umbilini bonke bephela!"
Ezekiel26:18 Ziyanyikima iziqithi ngomhla wokuwa kwakho; ewe, iziqithi eziselwandle ziya kushukuma xa uhamba."
Ezekiel26:19 Kuba itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi: “Ukuba ndiya kukwenza ube sisixeko esiphanzileyo, njengezixeko ezingenabantu; ekuwiseni kwam unogumbe phezu kwenu, namanzi amaninzi phezu kwenu;"
Ezekiel26:20 ukuba ndithe ndakuhlisa nabahle baya emhadini, kwanabantu bamandulo, ndakuhlisela emihadini yehlabathi, ezindaweni ezingezizo zamandulo, nabehla baya emhadini emhadini, ukuba ungabi nabemi; kwaye ndiya kugcoba kwihlabathi labaphilayo;"
Ezekiel26:21 Ndiya kwenza into eyoyikekayo kuwe, ungabi sabakho; nokuba uthe wafunwa, awusayi kufunyanwa, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel27:1 Kwaphinda kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel27:2 Kaloku, nyana womntu, yibethelele isimbonono iTire;"
Ezekiel27:3 Ithi kwiTire, wena uhleli ngaselwandle, wena mrhwebi wezizwe zeziqithi ezininzi, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndihleli elwandle, kwanawe, kungabikho ukusindisayo, kuthabathele khona ikrele; Uthe wena, Tire, Bubuhle obugqibeleleyo."
Ezekiel27:4 Imida yakho isesazulwini solwandle, Ubuhle bakho bupheleliswe ngabakhi bakho."
Ezekiel27:5 Bazenza zonke iiplanga zeenqanawa zakho ngemisipres yaseSenire; bathabatha imisedare yaseLebhanon ukuba banibale.
Ezekiel27:6 Iintsika zakho bazenza ngemioki yaseBhashan; Abaninzi baseAsiriya benza iibhedi zakho ngeempondo zeendlovu, eziqithini zamaKiti."
Ezekiel27:7 Ilinen ecikizekileyo, ephothiweyo yaseYiputa yaba iyiluko eyalukwayo, yaba yiluko lwakho; umbala ozuba nomfusa weziqithi zika-Elisa zezona zinto zikunxibisayo."
Ezekiel27:8 Abemi baseTsidon neArvadi baye baba ngoomateloshe bakho; Izilumko zakho, Tire, zibe nawe, zaba ngoomatiloshe bakho."
Ezekiel27:9 Amadoda amakhulu aseGebhali nezilumko zakhe zazinawe, emagumbini enu okuhlala; yonke imikhombe yolwandle yayiyeyakho, noomateloshe bayo, ukuba bahluthe ishishini lakho."
Ezekiel27:10 AmaPersi, namaLudi, namaPuti ebesemkhosini wakho, engamadoda akho okulwa; baxhoma phezu kwakho ingweletshetshe nesigcina-ntloko; Bazisa uzuko lwakho."
Ezekiel27:11 Amadoda aseArvade nomkhosi wakho wamajoni ayejikeleze iindonga zakho, namaGamade ayekwiinqaba zakho ezinde; baxhoma iingweletshetshe zabo ezindongeni zakho zonke; Ubuhle bakho bugqibelele."
Ezekiel27:12 iTarshishe yaba ngumrhwebisana wakho ngenxa yobuninzi bobuncwane obuninzi; baberhweba ngesilivere, nangesinyithi, nangenkcenkce, nangelothe."
Ezekiel27:13 OoYafane noTubhali noMesheki baye bengabarhwebeli bakho;
Ezekiel27:14 Usapho lakwaTogarma lwaludla ngokurhweba ngeengxowa zakho ngamahashe, abakhweli neenqwelo-mafutha."
Ezekiel27:15 Oonyana bakaDedan babengabarhwebi nawe; Iziqithi ezininzi bezingumsebenzi wesandla sakho; bakuzisela iimpondo zeendlovu nobhedu njengesipho.
Ezekiel27:16 Ama-Aram ayerhwebisana nawe ngenxa yobuninzi bemisebenzi yakho owayenzayo; bathenga kuwe iiemeraldi, nezimfusa, nezilukiweyo, nelinen ecikizekileyo, nekorale, neagati."
Ezekiel27:17 ElakwaYuda nelizwe lakwaSirayeli lalirhwebelana nawe; Baberhweba ngengqolowa yaseMiniti nasePanag, nobusi, nangeoli, nangebhalsam."
Ezekiel27:18 iDamasko yarhwebelana nawe, ngenxa yemisebenzi yakho emininzi, ngenxa yentabalala yabo bonke ubutyebi; kwiwayini yaseHelbone kunye noboya obumhlophe."
Ezekiel27:19 OoDan noYavan, ababehamba babuya bazakha ezintlanganisweni zakho; bekukho intsimbi ekhandiweyo, ikasiya nomhlwa;"
Ezekiel27:20 uDedane uberhwebelana nawe ngeengubo zenqwelo ezinqabileyo.
Ezekiel27:21 Elakwa-Arabhi nezikhulu zonke zakwaKedare zakukhonza ngamatakane eegusha neenkunzi zeegusha neenciniba; ngokuba babengabarhwebeli bakho.
Ezekiel27:22 Abarhwebi bakwaShebha nabakwaRama babengabarhwebeli bakho;
Ezekiel27:23 iHaran neKane ne-Eden, abarhwebi bakwaShebha, iAsiriya nabaseKilemade, babengabarhwebi nawe;"
Ezekiel27:24 babengabarhwebeli bakho ngeengubo ezirhwexayo, ezilukiweyo, nangeengxowa zamalaphu amahle, ziqhinwe ngamaqamelo emisedare, ekurhwebeni kwakho."
Ezekiel27:25 Iinqanawa zaseTarshishe zazicula ngawe kwindawo yentengiso yakho, yaye wawuzele luzuko nozuko olukhulu esazulwini solwandle."
Ezekiel27:26 Unyawo lwakho lukusa emanzini amakhulu, ulophu lwasempumalanga lwakulaphula elwandle."
Ezekiel27:27 Ubutyebi bakho nempahla yakho ethengiswayo, iimpahla zakho ezithengiswayo, oomatiloshe bakho noomatiloshe bakho, oovimba bakho nabarhwebi beempahla zakho ezithengiswayo nawo onke amadoda akho emfazwe akunye nawe nawo wonke umkhosi wakho naphakathi kwakho uya kuwela elwandle ngemini yokutshabalala kwakho."
Ezekiel27:28 Ngenxa yesandi sokuduma kwabaqhubi bakho, amadlelo ayanyikima."
Ezekiel27:29 Bonke ababheqi, oomatiloshe, nabo bonke oomatiloshe elwandle, baya kuhla enqanaweni, beme emhlabeni;"
Ezekiel27:30 Livakale ilizwi labo ngani, bambambazele kakrakra, bazigalele ngothuli entloko, bazigalele ngothuthu;"
Ezekiel27:31 Baya kuhluba umzimba wakho ngokupheleleyo, babhinqe ezirhwexayo, bakumbambazelele ngentliziyo ebuhlungu, batsho ngesikhalo esikrakra."
