Ezekiel27:32 Yaye ekuzileni kwabo baya kukuhlabela isimbonono baze benze isijwili ngenxa yakho besithi: ‘Sisiphi na isixeko esinjengeTire, esinjengaleyo yomile esazulwini solwandle?"
Ezekiel27:33 Ekuphumeni kwakho ubutyebi bakho elwandle, wazala ngabantu abaninzi; Ngobuninzi bobuncwane bakho neshishini lakho ubenze batyebisa ookumkani behlabathi."
Ezekiel27:34 Imini iya kugaleleka elwandle ezantsi kwamanzi, ishishini lakho nabantu bakho bonke bawele kuwe."
Ezekiel27:35 Bonke abemi beziqithi baya kumangaliswa nguwe, nookumkani bazo babe namanwele kunene, ubuso babo bunkwantye."
Ezekiel27:36 Abarhwebi basentlangeni baya kukubethela umlozi; uya kuba yinto eyoyikekayo, ungabi sabakho."
Ezekiel28:1 Kwaphinda kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel28:2 Nyana womntu, yithi kwinganga yeTire, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ngenxa enokuba intliziyo yakho iphakamile, usithi, NdinguThixo, ndihleli etroneni kaThixo embilinini yolwandle; nangona ungumntu ungengoThixo, nokuba ubeka intliziyo yakho njengentliziyo kaThixo."
Ezekiel28:3 Yabona, ulumke ngaphezu koDaniyeli; akukho mfihlo banokuyifihla kuwe."
Ezekiel28:4 Ngobulumko bakho nangengqondo yakho uzenzele ubutyebi, wafumana igolide nesilivere ebuncwaneni bakho."
Ezekiel28:5 Ngobuninzi bobulumko bakho ubandisile ubuhandiba bakho, nangezenzo zakho, yaphakama intliziyo yakho ngobutyebi bakho."
Ezekiel28:6 Ngako oko itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ekubeni uyenze yanjengentliziyo yoThixo intliziyo yakho;"
Ezekiel28:7 Ngako oko, uyabona, ndikuzisela iintlanga ezinamandla, ezintlangeni, ziphakamise imikhonto yazo ekuzukiseni ubulumko bakho, ziluhlambele uzuko lwakho."
Ezekiel28:8 Baya kukuhlisela emhadini, ufe ukufa kwababuleweyo elwandle."
Ezekiel28:9 Usatsho ukuthi kulowo ukubulaliyo, NdinguThixo? uya kuba yindoda, ungabi nguThixo esandleni salowo ukubulaliyo."
Ezekiel28:10 Uya kufa ukufa kwabangendawo ngesandla seentlanga; ngokuba nditshilo, itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel28:11 Kwabonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum lisithi:
Ezekiel28:12 Nyana womntu, kubekele indlebe ukuhlahlamba kokumkani waseTire, uthi kuye, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, mna Yehova, ndikuvile; Uzalisa isilumko nobuhle obugqibeleleyo."
Ezekiel28:13 Ubuse-Eden emyezweni kaThixo; Onke amatye anqabileyo ayeyingubo yakho: isardiyo, netopazi, nedayimani, namalahle, nebherilo, neyaspisi, nesafire, nesmarado, nekalike, negolide; ngawe ngemini ophumelele ngayo."
Ezekiel28:14 Wena uyikerubhi ethanjisiweyo, engumkhuseli; Ndanibeka ngolu hlobo: usentabeni engcwele kaThixo; wawuhamba usihla phakathi kwamatye anomlilo."
Ezekiel28:15 Ulilungisa ezindleleni zakho kususela kokoyiswa, kwada kwafumaneka ubungendawo kuwe;"
Ezekiel28:16 Ngobuninzi bomsebenzi wakho uzele kukugonyamela, wona ke; ngako oko, ndiya kuniphosa entabeni kaThixo, nina bangendawo; Ndiya kukutshabalalisa, wena kerubhi eliyinqaba, phakathi kwamatye anomlilo."
Ezekiel28:17 Intliziyo yakho iphakamile ngenxa yobuhle bakho, wabuchitha ubulumko bakho kunye nozuko lwakho; Ndiya kukuwisa, ndikubeke phambi kookumkani, ukuze bakubone."
Ezekiel28:18 Uzihlambele iingcwele zakho ngobuninzi bezono zakho, ngobubi beshishini lakho; ndikhuphe umlilo phakathi kwakho, ukudle, ndikwenze ube luthuthu emhlabeni phambi kwamehlo abo bonke abakubonayo."
Ezekiel28:19 Bonke abakwaziyo phakathi kweentlanga baya kumangaliswa nguwe; uya kuba yinto eyoyikekayo, ungabi sabakho."
Ezekiel28:20 Laphinda labonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel28:21 Nyana womntu, bhekisa ubuso bakho eTsidon, uprofete kuyo;"
Ezekiel28:22 Wathi, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Itsho iNkosi uYehova; Khangela, ndinengxaki nawe, Sidon! yaye ndiya kuzukiswa phakathi kwenu, bazi ukuba ndinguYehova xa ndisifeza isohlwayo sakhe ndize ndingcwaliswe kuso."
Ezekiel28:23 Ndiya kuthumela kuwo indyikitya yokufa negazi ezitratweni zawo; yaye abo bawonileyo baya kugwetywa phambi kwakhe ngekrele elikuwo macala onke; zazi ukuba ndinguYehova.
Ezekiel28:24 Akuyi kuba sabakho luviko libukhali kwindlu kaSirayeli, naluviko lubuhlungu kubo bonke ababavelelayo, ababacekisayo; bazi ukuba ndiyiNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel28:25 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ekubahlanganiseni kwam abantu bendlu kaSirayeli ezintlangeni abaphangalaliswe kuzo, ndoba nemihlali, ndibabone emehlweni eentlanga, bahlale ezweni labo endibanike lona kumkhonzi wam. uYakobi unayo."
Ezekiel28:26 Baya kuhlala kulo bekholosile, bakhe izindlu, batyale nezidiliya; ewe, baya kuphila bengafihlisi, ekwenzeni kwam izigwebo kubo bonke ababacekisayo ababathabathayo; bazi ukuba ndinguYehova uThixo wabo."
Ezekiel29:1 Ngomnyaka weshumi, ngenyanga yeshumi, ngolweshumi elinesibini enyangeni leyo, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel29:2 Nyana womntu, bhekisa ubuso bakho kuFaro ukumkani waseYiputa, uprofete ngaye, nangeYiputa yonke iphela."
Ezekiel29:3 Thetha, uthi, Utsho uYehova; Yabona, ndinengxaki nawe, Faro ukumkani waseYiputa, inamba enkulu, ilele emilanjeni yayo, yathi, Umlambo wam ngowam, ndizenzele mna."
Ezekiel29:4 Ndiya kufaka amagwegwe emihlathini yakho, ndizinamathisele eqongeni lakho iintlanzi zemilambo yakho, ndikukhuphe emilanjeni yakho, ndizinamathisele elusu lwakho zonke iintlanzi zemilambo yakho."
Ezekiel29:5 Ndiya kukulahlela entlango, wena neentlanzi zonke zemijelo yakho; niya kuwa emhlabeni; anihlanganiswanga nina, anihlanganizwanga; ndaninika amarhamncwa asendle neentaka zezulu ukuba ube kukudla kwazo."
Ezekiel29:6 Yaye bonke abemi baseYiputa baya kwazi ukuba ndinguYehova, ngenxa yokuba wayeyingcongolo kwindlu kaSirayeli."
Ezekiel29:7 Bakubamba ngesandla, wasuka waphuka, wakrazuka onke amagxa abo; kwaye xa bexhomekeke kuwe, waphuka kwaye wamisa zonke izinqe zabo."
Ezekiel29:8 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndikuzisela umkhonto, ndinqumle kuwe umntu nenkomo;"
Ezekiel29:9 Ilizwe laseYiputa liya kuba yinkangala ephanzileyo; bazi ukuba ndinguYehova, ngenxa enokuba usithi, Umlambo ngowam, ndiwenze mna."
Ezekiel29:10 Ngoko ke, yabona, ndinxamnye nawe nemijelo yakho, yaye ndiza kulenza ilizwe laseYiputa libe yinkangala ephanzileyo, ukususela kwinqaba yaseSiena ukusa kumda wakwaKushe."
Ezekiel29:11 Akuyi kucanda lunyawo lwamntu kuyo, akuyi kucanda lunyawo lwenkomo kuyo, ayisayi kwakhiwe iminyaka emashumi mane."
Ezekiel29:12 Ndiya kulenza kube senkangala ilizwe laseYiputa phakathi kwamazwe abharhileyo, nemizi yalo phakathi kwemizi engamanxuwa ibe ngamanxuwa iminyaka emashumi mane; ndiwachithachithe amaYiputa ezintlangeni, ndiwachithachithe emazweni."
Ezekiel29:13 Kodwa ithi iNkosi enguMongami uYehova: “Kuza kuthiwa sekudlule iminyaka engamashumi amane ukususela oko ndawaqokelelayo amaYiputa ezintlangeni awayechithachitheke kuzo.
Ezekiel29:14 Ndiya kubabuyisa abathinjiweyo eYiputa, ndibabuyisele ezweni lasePatrose, ezweni lokuhlala kwabo; kwaye baya kuba norhulumente omncinci apho."
Ezekiel29:15 Baya kuba ngoorhulumente abaphantsi; aniyi kuba saziphakamisa iintlanga, ngenxa enokuba ndiya kuzinciphisa, ukuze zingabi sazilawula iintlanga."
Ezekiel29:16 Ayisayi kuba saba yithemba lendlu kaSirayeli, ekukhumbuleni ububi bayo ekuboneleleni kwayo; kodwa baya kwazi ukuba ndiyiNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel29:17 Kwathi ngomnyaka wamashumi omabini anesixhenxe, ngenyanga yokuqala, ngolokuqala enyangeni leyo, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel29:18 Nyana womntu, uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabhiloni wawunikela umkhosi wakhe wamajoni inkonzo enkulu nxamnye neTire; kodwa akazange afumane mvuzo, nkqu nomkhosi wakhe waseTire, ngenxa yenkonzo yakhe isetyenziswe ngokuchasene:"
Ezekiel29:19 Ngako oko itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ilizwe laseYiputa ndilinikela kuNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli; liya kuyithimba into eninzi yalo, liphange amaxhoba ayo, liyiphange impahla yayo; kwaye oku kuya kuba ngumvuzo womkhosi wakhe."
Ezekiel29:20 Ndamnika ilizwe laseYiputa umsebenzi wakhe, ngokuba ubekhonza mna; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel29:21 Ngaloo mini ndiya kuyikhulisa uphondo lwendlu kaSirayeli, yaye ndiya kukunika ukuvulwa komlomo phakathi kwabo; zazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel30:1 Kwaphinda kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel30:2 Nyana womntu, profeta uthi, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Lilani, yeha ke loo mini!"
Ezekiel30:3 Ngokuba ikufuphi imini, ikufuphi imini kaYehova, yimini yamafu; iya kuba lixesha leentlanga."
Ezekiel30:4 Umkhonto uya kufika phezu kweYiputa; kuya kubakho iintlungu ezinkulu kwaKushi, ekuyisuseni ababuleweyo eYiputa ingxokolo yayo, zichithwe iziseko zayo;"
Ezekiel30:5 AmaTiyopiya namaLibhiya namaLidiya nabo bonke abantu abaxubene neKubhan namadoda elizwe awenze umnqophiso aya kuwa ngekrele kunye nawo.
Ezekiel30:6 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Baya kuwa abaxhasi beYiputa; lihle iqhayiya lamandla akhe; ukusuka enqabeni yaseSiena baya kuwa likrele khona, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel30:7 Woba yinkangala ephanzileyo phakathi kwamazwe abharhileyo, nemizi yawo ibe phakathi kwemizi engamanxuwa;"
Ezekiel30:8 bazi ukuba ndinguYehova, ekufakeni kwam umlilo eYiputa, baphuke bonke abancedi bayo."
Ezekiel30:9 Ngaloo mini abathunywa bam bohamba ngeenqanawa, ukuze boyikise amaKushi angazange akhathale, azibhijabhije ngokwawo njengakwimini yeYiputa, kuba, khangela!"
Ezekiel30:10 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi; Ndiya kuyitshabalalisa isihlwele saseYiputa ngesandla sikaNebhukadenetsare, ukumkani waseBhabhiloni."
Ezekiel30:11 Yena nabantu bakhe, aboyikeka phakathi kwezizwe, baya kuziswa ukuba balitshabalalise ihlabathi; baya kuwarhola amakrele abo eYiputa, balizalise ilizwe ngababuleweyo."
Ezekiel30:12 Ndoyomisa imijelo yoMnayile, ndithengise ngelizwe ezandleni zabangendawo; yaye ndiya kulenza kube senkangala ilizwe nenzaliseko yalo ngesandla sabasemzini; Mna Yehova ndithethile."
Ezekiel30:13 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ndiya kuzitshabalalisa izigodo ezizizithixo, ndizisuse eNofe izigodo zazo; kwaye akuyi kuba sabakho nkosana ezweni laseYiputa, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo ndiya kubangela uloyiko ezweni laseYiputa."
Ezekiel30:14 Ndiya kuyenza iPatrosi ibe yintlango ndize ndiyitshise ngomlilo iTsowane ndize ndiphumeze isohlwayo esinguNo;
Ezekiel30:15 ndowuthulula ubushushu bam phezu kweSin, inqaba yaseYiputa; kwaye ndiya kwenza uninzi lwe-No."
Ezekiel30:16 Ndiya kufaka umlilo eYiputa, izibilini zesono zibe krakra, uNowa aqwengwe, iNofu ibe sentlungwini yonke imihla."
Ezekiel30:17 Amadodana aseAfene nasePibheshete aya kuwa likrele, yona ke loo mizi ithinjwe."
Ezekiel30:18 Imini iya kuba mnyama eTehafene, ekuzaphuleni kwam idyokhwe yaseYiputa; nokukhanya kwamandla akhe kuya kuphela kuye, ilifu liya kumgubungela, iintombi zakhe zisiwe ekuthinjweni."
Ezekiel30:19 Ndiya kuwabetha amaYiputa, azi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel30:20 Kwathi ngomnyaka weshumi elinamnye, ngenyanga yokuqala, ngolwesixhenxe enyangeni leyo, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel30:21 Nyana womntu, ndasaphula isandla sikaFaro ukumkani waseYiputa; uyabona, ayiyi kubotshwa ukuba iphole, ukuba ibotshwe kusongwa, igawulwe ukuba ibambe umkhonto."
Ezekiel30:22 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabona, ndinendawo noFaro ukumkani waseYiputa nekrele ndiya kuliwisa esandleni sakhe."
Ezekiel30:23 Ndowaphangalalisela amaYiputa ezintlangeni, ndiwachithachithe emazweni;"
Ezekiel30:24 Ndiya kuzomeleza izandla zokumkani waseBhabheli, ndibeke ikrele lam esandleni sakhe; kodwa ndiya kuzaphula izandla zikaFaro, aze ancwine phambi kwakhe ngokugcuma komntu owenzakeleyo ofayo."
Ezekiel30:25 Ndiya kuzomeleza izandla zokumkani waseBhabheli, ziwe izandla zikaFaro; bazi ukuba ndinguYehova ekunikeleni kwam ikrele lam esandleni sokumkani waseBhabhiloni, lize lolulele kwilizwe laseYiputa."
Ezekiel30:26 Ndowaphangalalisela amaYiputa ezintlangeni, ndiwachithachithe emazweni; zazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel31:1 Kwathi ngomnyaka weshumi elinamnye, ngenyanga yesithathu, ngolokuqala enyangeni leyo, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel31:2 Nyana womntu, thetha kuFaro, ukumkani waseYiputa, nengxokolo yakhe; Ufana nabani ngokobukhulu bakho?"
Ezekiel31:3 Yabona, uAsiriya ebengumsedare waseLebhanon, omasebe mahle, eyingubo yokwaleka, emide; umphezulu wawo waba phakathi kwamasebe ashinyeneyo."
Ezekiel31:4 Amphakamisile amanzi, umkhukula wamphakamisa, imilambo yakhe yahamba ngeenxa zonke elutyalweni lwakhe, nemilambo yakhe yahamba yonke imithi yelizwe."
Ezekiel31:5 Ngenxa yoko ukuphakama kwawo kwaba phezu kwemithi yonke yelizwe, amasebe awo anda, aba made, ngenxa yamanzi amaninzi ekuhlumeni kwawo."
Ezekiel31:6 Zonke iintaka zezulu zakha indlu yazo emasebeni akhe, zonke izilwanyana zelizwe zazalela phantsi kwamasebe awo, zaza zonke iintlanga ezinkulu zahlala emthunzini wawo."
Ezekiel31:7 Ubumhle ubukhulu bawo, ngobude bamasebe awo, kuba ingcambu yawo ibikufuphi namanzi amaninzi."
Ezekiel31:8 Imisedare eyayisemyezweni kaThixo yayingenakuwufihla; yaye kwakungekho mthi emyezweni kaThixo owawufana nawo ngobuhle bawo.
Ezekiel31:9 Ndawenza mhle ngobuninzi bamasebe awo, kangangokuba yonke imithi yase-Eden eyayisentsimini yoTHIXO oyinyaniso yaba nomona ngayo."
Ezekiel31:10 Ngako oko itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ngenxa enokuba eziphakamisile, wayiphakamisa intloko yakhe phakathi kweengqimba zamafu, yazinyusa intliziyo yakhe ekuphakameni kwakhe;"
Ezekiel31:11 Kungenxa yoko le nto ndamnikela esandleni sengxokozelo yeentlanga; inene, uya kuqhubana naye; Ndamgxotha ngenxa yobungendawo bakhe."
Ezekiel31:12 Bamtshabalalisa ke abasemzini, abakhohlakeleyo ezintlangeni, bamshiya; kuzo zonke iintaba nezihlambo amasebe akhe awela, amasebe akhe aqhaqheka kuyo yonke imilambo yelizwe; yaye bonke abantu behlabathi behla emthunzini wakhe baza bamfulathela."
Ezekiel31:13 Ekutshabalaleni kwawo, ziya kuhlala zonke iintaka zezulu, zibe emasebeni awo zonke izilo."
Ezekiel31:14 Ukuze kungabikho namnye umthi wamanzi owuphakamisayo ube phezulu, nencam yawo ingakhuli phakathi kwamasebe ashinyeneyo, nokuba yonke imithi yawo ingabi phezu kwawo wonke umntu oseza amanzi; ngokuba bonke bephela benikelwe ekufeni, kwelasezantsi ilizwe, phakathi koonyana babantu, nabahle baya kwelabafileyo."
Ezekiel31:15 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi; Ekuhleni kwakhe kwelabafileyo, ndenza ubumnyama; Ndayibangela iLebhanon izilile ngenxa yakhe, yaye yonke imithi yelizwe yadandatheka ngenxa yakhe."
Ezekiel31:16 Ngesithonga sokuwa kwakhe ndazingcangcazelisa iintlanga, ekumhliseleni kwam ukuya kwelabafileyo, nabahle baya emhadini; nemithi yase-Eden, eyona nto ingcwele, neyona intle yaseLebhanon, yonke esela amanzi, iya kuhluthwa kwelasezantsi ilizwe."
Ezekiel31:17 Nabo behla naye ukuya kwelabafileyo, phakathi kwababuleweyo ngekrele; nabazizisweli zakhe, ababehleli emthunzini wakhe phakathi kweentlanga."
Ezekiel31:18 Ulingana nabani na ngozuko nangobukhulu phakathi kwemithi yase-Eden? kodwa uya kuphoswa phantsi nemithi yase-Eden kweyona nxalenye isezantsi yomhlaba; phakathi kwabangalukileyo uya kulala nababuleweyo ngekrele. NguFaro ke lowo, nengxokolo yakhe yonke; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel32:1 Kwathi ngomnyaka weshumi elinesibini, ngenyanga yeshumi elinesibini, ngolokuqala enyangeni leyo, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel32:2 Nyana womntu, menzele isimbonono uFaro ukumkani waseYiputa, uthi kuye, Unjengehobe leentlanga, unjengentlanzi enkulu elwandle; waphuma nemijelo yakho, namanzi ngeenyawo zakho, wayihlambela imijelo yabo."
Ezekiel32:3 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi; Ngako oko ndiya kuzizisa phezu kwakho ndinengxokolo yeentlanga ezininzi; baya kunitsala ngomnatha wam.
Ezekiel32:4 Ndiya kukulahlela ezweni, ndikujule emhlabeni, zihlale phezu kwakho zonke iintaka zezulu, ndiwazalise amarhamncwa elizwe ngawe."
Ezekiel32:5 Ndiya kuyibeka phezu kweentaba inyama yakho, ndizalise iintlambo ngobude bakho."
Ezekiel32:6 Ndiya kulinyakamisa ilizwe odada kulo ngegazi lakho, linyuke lize ezintabeni; imilambo iya kuzala ngawe."
Ezekiel32:7 Ndiya kulisibekela izulu ekunikhupheni kwam, nizenze mnyama iinkwenkwezi zaso; ndiya kulisibekela ilanga ngamafu, nenyanga ingakhanyisi ngokukhanya kwayo."
Ezekiel32:8 Ndiza kuzenza zibe mnyama zonke izibane eziqaqambileyo esibhakabhakeni ngenxa yakho nobumnyama phezu kwelizwe lakho,’ itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel32:9 Ndiza kuzikhathaza iintliziyo zeentlanga ezininzi ekuziseni kwam intshabalalo phakathi kweentlanga kumazwe obungawazi.
Ezekiel32:10 Ndiya kuzimangalisa ngawe iintlanga ezininzi, babe nokoyika kunene ookumkani bazo, ekulinyuseni kwam ikrele lam phambi kwabo; baya kugubha ngamaxesha onke, elowo ngenxa yomphefumlo wakhe, ngemini yokuwa kwakho."
Ezekiel32:11 Kuba itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi, ‘Umkhonto wokumkani waseBhabhiloni uya kukuhlasela."
Ezekiel32:12 Ndiya kusiwisa isihlwele sakho ngamakrele abo banamandla, abacinezeli beentlanga, bephela;"
Ezekiel32:13 Kwaye yonke imfuyo yakhe ndiya kuyitshabalalisa emanzini amaninzi; nonyawo lomntu aluyi kuba sabaphazamisa, namanqina eenkomo akasayi kuba sabaphazamisa."
Ezekiel32:14 Ndiya kuwenza abe nzulu amanzi ayo, nemilambo yayo iqukuqele njengeoli,’ itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel32:15 Xa ndilenza ilizwe laseYiputa libe yintlango ndize ndithabathe ilizwe elizeleyo, ukuba ndiya kuboyisa bonke abemi balo, baya kwazi ke ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel32:16 Siso esi isikhalo abaya kumkhalela ngaso: Iintombi zeentlanga ziya kumkhalela; baya kuyimbambazelela iYiputa nengxokolo yayo yonke; itsho iNkosi uYehova.
Ezekiel32:17 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinesibini, ngolweshumi elinesihlanu enyangeni leyo, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel32:18 Nyana womntu, yililela ingxokolo yeYiputa, uyizise kwelabafileyo, yona neentombi zeentlanga, kwese eziphelweni zehlabathi, nabahla baye emhadini."
Ezekiel32:19 Ngubani oyena umhle ngaphezu kwakhe? yihla, uye kulala nabahlobo bakho."
Ezekiel32:20 Baya kuwa phakathi kwababuleweyo ngekrele; wanikwa umkhonto; yiqweqwediseni, nengxokolo yayo yonke."
Ezekiel32:21 Ziya kuthetha kuye iinjengele zamagorha eHadesi, ndawonye nabancedi bakhe, bathi, balele, balele, abangalukileyo, babulewe ngekrele."
Ezekiel32:22 Ukhona uAsiriya nengxokolo yakhe yonke; Angaphakathi kuye amangcwaba akhe; mabawe likrele bonke ababuleweyo;
Ezekiel32:23 abekwe emacaleni omhadi, namangcwaba ayo amaninzi phakathi; bonke ababuleweyo, abawe likrele, abalothusayo ilizwe labahleliyo."
Ezekiel32:24 Ukhona uElam, nengxokolo yakhe yonke engeenxa zonke engcwabeni lakhe, bonke ababuleweyo, abawa ngekrele, abehlayo waya ezindaweni ezisezantsi bengalukile, ababesothusa ilizwe labahleliyo; noko ke, babeneentloni ngabo kunye nabo behla beza kubo."
Ezekiel32:25 Bamenzela isilili phakathi kwababuleweyo, yena nebandla lakhe lonke; Azele nguye amangcwaba akhe: bonke abangalukileyo, bebulewe ngekrele; nakubeni uloyiko lwabo lwalusehlabathini labaphilayo, ukanti babenentloni ngabo nabo babehlela ezantsi esihogweni; Ubekwe phakathi kwabo boyisiweyo."
Ezekiel32:26 Ukhona uMesheki, noTubhali, nengxokolo yakhe yonke; baphahlwe ngamangcwaba akhe: bonke bengalukile, bebulewe ngekrele; ngokuba besothuse ilizwe labahleliyo."
Ezekiel32:27 Kwaye abayi kuba nabuhlobo kunye namageza awileyo kwabo bangembanga abo babahlisela emhadini nezixhobo zabo zemfazwe; babeke amakrele abo phantsi kweentloko zabo; ubugwenxa babo buwafikele emathanjeni abo, nakuba besoyikwa ngamagorha ezweni labahleliyo."
Ezekiel32:28 Ewe, uya kwaphulwa phakathi kwabangalukanga, yaye uya kudibana nababuleweyo ngekrele."
Ezekiel32:29 Ukhona uEdom, nookumkani bakhe, nabathetheli bakhe bonke, abatshabalalayo emandleni abo ngababuleweyo ngekrele; baya kulala kwabangalukileyo nabehle baye emhadini."
Ezekiel32:30 Zikhona iinkosana zasentla, zonke ziphela, namaTsidon onke, ezehlileyo zabulawa; ngenxa yokunkwantya kwabo baya kudana ngenxa yamandla abo; yaye balala benganqunyulwanga kunye nabo babulewe ngekrele, yaye bathwele ihlazo labo kunye nabo behlayo baya enkampini."
Ezekiel32:31 uFaro uya kubabona aze athuthuzeleke ngenxa yesihlwele sakhe sonke, esinguFaro nawo wonke umkhosi wakhe wamajoni owoyiswe ngekrele,’ itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel32:32 Kuba ndibangele ukuba koyikwe kum kwilizwe labaphilayo, yaye uya kulala phakathi kwabangalukanga kwanabo babulewe ngekrele, uFaro nesihlwele sakhe sonke,’ itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel33:1 Kwaphinda kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel33:2 Nyana womntu, thetha koonyana babantu bakowenu, uthi kubo, Ukuba ndithe ndalizisela ikrele elo lizwe, xa abantu belo lizwe bathabatha enye indoda emideni yabo, bammisela ukuba ibagcine;"
Ezekiel33:3 Yalibona ikrele lilifikela ilizwe elo, yavuthela isigodlo, yabalumkisa abantu;"
Ezekiel33:4 bonke abathe baliva isandi sesigodlo, akalumkisa; ukuba lithe lafika ikrele, lamthabatha, igazi lakhe loba phezu kwentloko yakhe."
Ezekiel33:5 Wasiva isandi sesigodlo, akalumkisa; igazi lakhe malibe phezu kwakhe. Kodwa lowo umlumkisayo uya kuwusindisa umphefumlo wakhe."
Ezekiel33:6 Ukuba ke umlindi uthe walibona ikrele lisiza, akalivuthela isigodlo, abantu abalumkiswa; ukuba lithe lafika ikrele, labulala omnye kubo, urhoxile ebubini bakhe; ke igazi lakhe ndolibiza esandleni somboniseli lowo."
Ezekiel33:7 Wena ke, nyana womntu, ndikwenze umboniseli kwindlu kaSirayeli; ngoko ke umele uve ilizwi eliphuma emlonyeni wam kwaye ubalumkise ngokuphuma kum."
Ezekiel33:8 Ukuba ndithe kongendawo, Wena ungendawo, inene, uya kufa; ukuba uthe akwamlumkisa ongendawo ngendlela yakhe, wofa ongendawo ngobungendawo bakhe; ke igazi lakhe ndolibiza esandleni sakho."
Ezekiel33:9 Wena ke, xa uthe wamvuselela ongendawo ngendlela yakhe, ukuba emke kuyo; ukuba uthe akabuya endleleni yakhe, wofa ngobugwenxa bakhe; kodwa uwuhlangule umphefumlo wakho."
Ezekiel33:10 Ngako oko, nyana womntu, thetha kwindlu kaSirayeli; Nithetha ngolu hlobo, nithi, Xa izikreqo zethu nezono zethu ziphezu kwethu, yaye sibunile ngenxa yazo, singathini na ukuphila?"
Ezekiel33:11 Yithi kubo, Ndihleli nje, itsho iNkosi uYehova, andiyi kukuvuyela ukufa kongendawo; ukuze ongendawo aguquke endleleni yakhe nasebomini bakhe. Yini na ukuba nife, ndlu kaSirayeli?"
Ezekiel33:12 Ngako oko, nyana womntu, yithi koonyana babantu bakowenu, Ubulungisa belungisa abuyi kulisindisa ngemini yesono salo; ngenxa yobubi bakhe; yaye ilungisa aliyi kukwazi ukuphila ubulungisa balo ngemini yokona kwalo."
Ezekiel33:13 Ukuba ndithe kwilungisa, lophila; ukuba ke uthe akholosa ngobulungisa bakhe, enze ngobugqwetha, abuyi kukhunjulwa ubulungisa bakhe; kodwa ngenxa yobugwenxa bakhe abenzileyo, uya kufa ngabo."
Ezekiel33:14 Kananjalo anditsho ukuthi kongendawo, Inene, uya kufa; xa athe waguquka esonweni sakhe, wenza ubulungisa nobulungisa;"
Ezekiel33:15 Ukuba uthe waba mbi, uya kukubuyisa isibambiso, abuyise into ephangiweyo, ahamba ngemimiselo yakhe, akenzi ububi; inene, uya kuphila, akayi kufa."
Ezekiel33:16 Zonke izono zakhe awona ngazo aziyi kukhunjulelwa kuye; inene, uya kuphila."
Ezekiel33:17 Bathi ke oonyana babantu bakowenu, Indlela kaYehova ayilungelelene, nendlela yabo ayilungelelene."
Ezekiel33:18 Xa umntu olilungisa eguquka ebulungiseni bakhe, enze okungekho bulungisa, uya kufa ngenxa yoko."
Ezekiel33:19 Kodwa ukuba ongendawo uyabuya kubungendawo bakhe, enze ubulungisa nobulungisa, uya kuphila ngabo."
Ezekiel33:20 Ke nina nithi, Indlela kaYehova ayilungelelene. Nina ke, ndlu kaSirayeli, ndiya kunigweba elowo ngokweendlela zakhe;"
Ezekiel33:21 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinesibini wokuthinjwa kwethu, ngenyanga yeshumi, ngolwesihlanu enyangeni leyo, kwafika kum osindileyo ovela eYerusalem, wathi, Umzi ubulewe."
Ezekiel33:22 Yaye isandla sikaYehova saba phezu kwam ngokuhlwa, ngaphambi kokuba bafike abakhululekileyo; Wawuvula umlomo wam, wada weza kum kusasa; wavuleka umlomo wam, ndangabi saba sisidenge."
Ezekiel33:23 Kwabonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel33:24 Nyana womntu, bathetha abo babehleli emanxuweni elizwe lakwaSirayeli, besithi, uAbraham wayeyedwa, walidla ilifa elimiweyo; kodwa thina sibaninzi; linikwe thina ilizwe ukuba libe lilifa."
Ezekiel33:25 Ngako oko uthi kubo, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Nidla igazi, amehlo enu niwaphakamisele ezigodweni zenu, niphalaze igazi; kwaye uya kulidla ilifa ilizwe?"
Ezekiel33:26 Nimi phezu kwekrele lenu, nenza izinto ezicekisekayo, nimenza inqambi umfazi ngamnye; kwaye uya kulidla ilifa ilizwe?"
Ezekiel33:27 Yithi kubo, Itsho iNkosi uYehova; Ndihleli nje, amanxuwa aya kuwa likrele, nosendle ndimnikele ukuba adle amarhamncwa, nabasemboniselweni nasemiqolombeni bambulale isifo sendyikitya yesifo esisulelayo."
Ezekiel33:28 Ndiya kulenza kube senkangala ilizwe, buphele ubungangamsha bamandla alo; neentaba zakwaSirayeli ziya kuba yintlango, ukuze kungabikho bani udlulayo kuzo;"
Ezekiel33:29 bazi ukuba ndinguYehova, ndakulenza kube senkangala ilizwe, ngenxa yamasikizi onke abawenzileyo."
Ezekiel33:30 Wena ke, nyana womntu, oonyana babantu bakowenu basathetha ngawe ezindongeni naseminyango yezindlu, bethetha elowo nomzalwana wakhe, besithi, Yiza, uve ukuba lithini na elo lizwi; yeNkosi phumani."
Ezekiel33:31 Beza kuwe njengokuza kwabantu, bahlala phambi kwakho ngokwabantu bam, baweva amazwi akho, abavuma ukwenza; kuba benza uthando olukhulu ngomlomo wabo, kodwa iintliziyo zabo zilandela ukubawa kwabo."
Ezekiel33:32 Yabona, kubo ufana nengoma emnandi kakhulu, ozwi limyoli, okwaziyo ukukubetha uhadi; ngokuba bawevile amazwi akho, abaweva."
Ezekiel33:33 Kwakuba njalo, yabona, iya kufika; bazi ukuba umprofeti ubephakathi kwabo."
Ezekiel34:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel34:2 Nyana womntu, profeta kubalusi bakwaSirayeli, uthi kubo, Itsho iNkosi uYehova kubalusi; Yeha ke, abalusi bakwaSirayeli, abazalusa ngokwabo! Abalusi mabangawalusi na umhlambi?"
Ezekiel34:3 Nidla amanqatha, ninxiba izinxibo zoboya, abatyebileyo nibaxhela; kodwa aniwalusi umhlambi."
Ezekiel34:4 Ezigulayo anizomelezanga, ezifayo aniziphilisanga, ezaphukileyo anizibophanga, ezigxothiweyo anizibuyisanga, nezilahlekileyo anizifunanga; kodwa wabalawula ngogonyamelo nangenkohlakalo."
Ezekiel34:5 Zaba lusali ngokuswela umalusi, zaba kukudla kwamarhamncwa onke elizwe, zaba lusali."
Ezekiel34:6 Iigusha zam zaduka ezintabeni zonke, nasezindulini zonke ezinde, zabe zithe saa emhlabeni wonke, akwabakho uzifunayo nongakufunayo."
Ezekiel34:7 Ngako oko, balusi, liveni ilizwi likaYehova;"
Ezekiel34:8 Ndihleli nje, itsho iNkosi uYehova, ngokuba umhlambi wam ube lixhoba, umhlambi wam ube kukudla kwamarhamncwa onke elizwe, ngenxa yokuba kungekho malusi, nabalusi bam bengawukhathaleli umhlambi wam kodwa abalusi bayazalusa ngokwabo, kwaye abawavumeli umhlambi wam udle;"
Ezekiel34:9 Ngoko ke, balusi, liphulaphuleni ilizwi likaYehova;"
Ezekiel34:10 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi; Yabonani, ndinento ngakubalusi; yaye ndiya kuwubiza umhlambi wam ezandleni zabo ndize ndikuyekise ukwalusa umhlambi wam; bangabi sazalusa bona abalusi; kuba ndiya kuwusindisa umhlambi wam emlonyeni wabo, ukuze ungabi kukudla kwabo."
Ezekiel34:11 Kuba itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi: “Yabona, ndiya kuzigocagoca izimvu zam ndize ndizifune."
Ezekiel34:12 Njengomalusi ewugcinayo umhlambi wakhe, ngemini yokubakho kwakhe phakathi kweegusha zakhe ezichithakeleyo; ndiya kuwufuna umhlambi wam, ndiwusindise ezindaweni zonke othe saa kuwo ngemini yamafu nobumnyama."
Ezekiel34:13 Ndiya kuzikhupha ezintlangeni ndize ndizibuthe emazweni ndize ndizise emhlabeni wazo, ndiwadlise ezintabeni zakwaSirayeli emilanjeni nasezindaweni zonke ezimiweyo zelizwe."
Ezekiel34:14 Ndiya kuwalusela ebutyanini obulungileyo, abe yindlwane ezintabeni ezinde zakwaSirayeli; ziya kubutha emadlelweni alungileyo, zidle ekriweni elityebileyo ezintabeni zakwaSirayeli."
Ezekiel34:15 Ndiza kuzondla izimvu zam ndize ndizenze zibe nemihlali,’ itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel34:16 Into elahlekileyo ndiya kuyifuna; ke etyebileyo, neyomeleleyo, ndiya kuyitshabalalisa; ndiya kuzalusa ngokusesikweni."
Ezekiel34:17 “Nina ke, mhlambi wam, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova, ukuthi, Yabonani, ndiya kugweba phakathi kwemazi yenkomo neemazi, naphakathi kweenkunzi zeegusha neenciniba."
Ezekiel34:18 Yinto encinane na kuni, ukuthi nidle utyani obulungileyo, nikunyhashe oko kuseleyo ngamanqina enu? nisele amanzi anzongonzongo, nihlambe aseleyo ngamanqina enu?"
Ezekiel34:19 Umhlambi wam udla obunyhashiweyo ngamanqina akho; basela into oyinqambi ngeenyawo zakho.
Ezekiel34:20 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi uYehova kubo ukuthi; yabona, ndiya kugweba phakathi kwamanqatha natyebileyo;"
Ezekiel34:21 Ngokuba nabetha ngecala lakho nangegxalaba, nayibetha yonke imilwelwe ngeempondo zakho, wada wayichithachitha;"
Ezekiel34:22 Ndiya kuwusindisa umhlambi wam, ungabi saba lixhoba; ndiya kugweba phakathi kweenkomo neemazi."
Ezekiel34:23 Ndiya kumisa phezu kwawo umalusi abe mnye, awaluse, umkhonzi wam uDavide; Uya kuwalusa, abe ngumalusi wawo;"
Ezekiel34:24 Mna Yehova ndiya kuba nguThixo wawo, umkhonzi wam uDavide abe yisikhulu phakathi kwawo; Mna Yehova ndithethile."
Ezekiel34:25 Ndiya kuwenza umnqophiso woxolo ndiwatshabalalise amarhamncwa amabi emhlabeni, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo aya kuhlala entlango ekhuselekile aze alale ehlathini."
Ezekiel34:26 Ndowenza wona, kwaneendawo ezingeenxa zonke endulini yam, ube yintsikelelo; ndiya kunisa imvula ngexesha layo; kuya kubakho iimvula zentsikelelo."
Ezekiel34:27 Umthi welizwe wothwala isiqhamo sawo, ilizwe livelise ukudla kwalo, bakhuseleke ezweni labo; bazi ukuba ndinguYehova, ekuwaphuleni kwam amathambo edyokhwe yabo, ndibahlangule isandla sabo babekhonza ngokwabo."
Ezekiel34:28 Akayi kuba saba lixhoba leentlanga, angadli amarhamncwa elizwe; kodwa baya kuhlala bekhuselekile, yaye akukho bani uya kuboyikisa."
Ezekiel34:29 Ndiya kubavelisela isityalo esinegama, ukuze bangabi sabulawa yindlala ehlabathini, bangabi sathwala ihlazo leentlanga."
Ezekiel34:30 Baya kwazi ukuba mna Yehova Thixo wabo ndinabo, bangabantu bam bona, indlu kaSirayeli; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel34:31 Nina ke, zimvu zam, zimvu zedlelo lam, nani bantu; ndinguThixo wenu; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel35:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel35:2 Nyana womntu, bhekisa ubuso bakho entabeni yakwaSehire, uprofete;"
Ezekiel35:3 Uthi kuyo, Utsho uYehova; Yabona, ntaba yakwaSehire, ndiya kulwa nawe, ndisolulele kuwe isandla sam, ndikwenze kube senkangala;"
Ezekiel35:4 Ndiza kuzenza izixeko zakho zibe yinkangala, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo uya kuba yintlango; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel35:5 Ngenxa yokuba waba nentiyo engunaphakade waza waliphalaza igazi loonyana bakaSirayeli ngogonyamelo lwekrele ngexesha lentlekele yabo, ngexesha lokuphela kobubi babo;"
Ezekiel35:6 Ngako oko, ndihleli nje, utsho uYehova, ndiya kukumisela igazi, igazi likulandele;"
Ezekiel35:7 Ngoko ndiya kuyenza iNtaba yaseSehire ibe yinkangala ephanzileyo, ndibatshabalalise abo badlulayo kuyo nababuyayo."
Ezekiel35:8 Ndiya kuzizalisa iintaba zakhe ngababuleweyo bakhe; ezindulini zakho, nasemifuleni yakho, nasezihlanjeni zakho zonke, ababuleweyo ngekrele bawe."
Ezekiel35:9 Ndiya kukwenza kube senkangala kuwe ngonaphakade, nemizi yakho ingabuyi; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel35:10 Ngenxa enokuba usithi, Iintlanga ezi zombini namazwe la omabini ngawam, sowadla ilifa; xa uYehova wayekho."
Ezekiel35:11 Ngako oko ndihleli nje, itsho iNkosi uYehova, ndiya kwenza kuwe ngokomsindo wakho, nekhwele lakho, owenze kubo ngentiyo yakho; kwaye ndiya kuzazisa kubo xa ndikugweba."
Ezekiel35:12 Uya kwazi ukuba ndinguYehova, ndikuvile konke ukugiba kwakho, owakuthethayo ngeentaba zakwaSirayeli, usithi, Ndiyintlango; siyinikelwe ukuba siyidle."
Ezekiel35:13 Undiqhayise ngemilebe yomlomo wakho, uwandisile amazwi akho kum, ndiwevile."
Ezekiel35:14 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi; Xa ihlabathi liphela livuya, ndiya kukwenza intlango."
Ezekiel35:15 Njengoko walidlayo ilifa lendlu kaSirayeli, ngenxa yokuba ibiyintlango, ndiya kwenjenjalo kuwe; uya kuba yintlango, ntaba yakwaSehire, nelakwaEdom lonke liphela; zazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel36:1 Wena ke, nyana womntu, profeta ngazo iintaba zakwaSirayeli, uthi, Zintaba zakwaSirayeli, liveni ilizwi likaYehova!"
Ezekiel36:2 Wathi uYehova; Ngokuba utshaba lwathi ngawe, Hayi!"
Ezekiel36:3 uprofete uthi, Utsho uYehova; Ngenxa enokuba bakwenze intlango, bakudla ngeenxa zonke, ukuze ube bubutyebi bamasalela eentlanga, ususwe emlonyeni wabo bathethayo, ube lihlazo zabantu."
Ezekiel36:4 Ngoko ke, nina zintaba zakwaSirayeli, liveni ilizwi likaYehova; Kwatsho uYehova kwiintaba, neenduli, nemilambo, nakwiimbombo, nakwimiwewe engamanxuwa, nakwimizi engamanxuwa, eyaba lixhoba, into yokugculelwa ngamasalela eentlanga ezingeenxa zonke;"
Ezekiel36:5 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ngenxa yomlilo wekhwele lam, ndithethe ngawo amasalela eentlanga nakwaEdom lonke elakwaEdom, elilenze ilifa lalo ilizwe lam, bechwayithile, benobubi bentliziyo yabo yonke, benobubi, baya kuza kunigxotha njengokuphanga."
Ezekiel36:6 Ke kaloku, profeta ngokuphathelele ilizwe lakwaSirayeli, uthi kuzo iintaba neenduli, imilambo neentlambo, ‘Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi, ‘Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi, ‘Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova. Yabonani, ndithethe ngekhwele lam, nomsindo wam, ngenxa enokuba nithwele ihlazo leentlanga."
Ezekiel36:7 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova ukuthi, Mna ndisiphakamisile isandla sam; iintlanga ezingeenxa zonke kuni, ziya kuthwala ihlazo lazo."
Ezekiel36:8 Ke nina, zintaba zakwaSirayeli, niya kuvelisa amasebe, nibanike abantu bam amaSirayeli iziqhamo zabo; ngokuba seleza kuza."
Ezekiel36:9 Ngokuba, uyabona, ndingakuwe; ndiya kubuyela kuwe, uhlwayelwe, utyalwe;"
Ezekiel36:10 Ndiya kwandisa abantu phezu kwenu, indlu kaSirayeli iphela, bonke, nezixeko ziya kuba nabemi neendawo eziphanzileyo ziya kwakhiwa."
Ezekiel36:11 Ndiya kwandisela abantu neenkomo phezu kwenu; kwaye baya kwanda bathwale isiqhamo; ndiya kukwenza ube ngoobutyebi bakho obudala, ndikwenze ulunge ngakumbi kunoko wawuqalileyo; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel36:12 Ndiya kubahambisa abantu phezu kwenu, bantu bam amaSirayeli; baya kulihlutha, libe lilifa labo, ungabi salithabatha ebantwini."
Ezekiel36:13 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ngenxa enokuba besithi kuwe, Ilizwe lakho liyazitshabalalisa iintlanga, liziphanga iintlanga zakho;"
Ezekiel36:14 Ngako oko anisayi kuphinda nidle abantu nize niziphange iintlanga zenu, itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel36:15 Andiyi kuphinda ndizivumele iintlanga zibe neentloni zeentlanga kuwe, yaye aniyi kuba sathwala ihlazo leentlanga, yaye aniyi kuba saziyekela ziwile iintlanga zenu; utsho uYehova."
Ezekiel36:16 Ngaphezu koko, kwabonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum lisithi:"
Ezekiel36:17 Nyana womntu, xa indlu kaSirayeli yabe ihleli emhlabeni wayo, bawenza inqambi ngokweendlela zabo nangezenzo zabo;"
Ezekiel36:18 Ngoko ke ndaphalaza ubushushu bam phezu kwabo ngenxa yegazi abaliphalaza elizweni naphezu kwezigodo zabo abalenze inqambi ngazo.
Ezekiel36:19 Ndazivakalisa ezintlangeni, zaziswa ke ezizweni; Ndabagweba ngokweentshukumo zabo, nangezenzo zabo."
Ezekiel36:20 Bafika ezintlangeni ababeye kuzo, balihlambela igama lam elingcwele ngokuthi kubo: “Aba ngabantu bakaYehova, yaye balishiya ilizwe lakhe.”"
Ezekiel36:21 Ndaba nemfesane egameni lam elingcwele, ebeyilihlambele indlu kaSirayeli ezintlangeni abaya kuzo."
Ezekiel36:22 Ngako oko yithi kwindlu kaSirayeli, uYehova uthethile; Andikwenzi oku ngenxa yenu, nina ndlu kaSirayeli; ndikwenza ngenxa yegama lam elingcwele, enilenze inqambi ezintlangeni enaye kuzo."
Ezekiel36:23 Ndiya kulingcwalisa igama lam elikhulu, elingcwalisiweyo phakathi kweentlanga, enilingcwalisileyo phakathi kwazo; zazi iintlanga ukuba ndinguYehova,’ utsho uYehova, ekuzingcwaliseni kwam kuni phambi kwamehlo azo."
Ezekiel36:24 Kuba ndiya kunithabatha ezintlangeni, ndinibuthe emazweni onke, ndinise emhlabeni wenu."
Ezekiel36:25 Ndiya kunitshiza ngamanzi amhlophe, nihlambuluke; Ndiya kunihlambulula kuko konke ukungcola kwenu nakomoya wenu ongcolileyo."
Ezekiel36:26 Ndoninika intliziyo entsha, ndininike umoya omtsha ngaphakathi kwenu; ndiyisuse intliziyo yelitye enyameni yenu, ndininike intliziyo yenyama."
Ezekiel36:27 Ndiza kufaka umoya wam kuni ndize ndinihambise ngemimiselo yam, nize niyigcine imigwebo yam nize niyifeze;"
Ezekiel36:28 niya kuhlala ezweni endalinika ooyihlo; nibe ngabantu bam, mna ndibe nguThixo wenu."
Ezekiel36:29 Ndiya kunisindisa kuyo yonke inkunkuma yenu, ndibize ukutya ndize ndikwandise, kungabikho ndlala kuni."
Ezekiel36:30 Ndiya kuyandisa iziqhamo zemithi, nemveliso yelizwe, ukuze ningabuyi namkeliswe isingcikivo sendlala ezintlangeni."
Ezekiel36:31 Wozikhumbula ke iindlela zakho ezimbi, neentlondi zakho ezingalungileyo, uzithiye ngenxa yobugwenxa bakho nangenxa yamasikizi akho."
Ezekiel36:32 Andiyi kukwenza oku ngenxa yenu, utsho uYehova; danani, danani ngenxa yeendlela zenu, nina ndlu kaSirayeli."
Ezekiel36:33 Wathi uYehova, Ngaloo mini, ndinihlambulule ezonweni zenu zonke, ndinihlalise emizini, akhiwe amanxuwa."
Ezekiel36:34 Ilizwe ebeliphanzile liya kulinywa, ngoxa liyinkangala phambi kwamehlo abo bonke abadlulayo."
Ezekiel36:35 Baya kuthi, Eli lizwe, bekusenkangala kulo, lisuke laba njengomyezo wase-Eden; namanxuwa, nemizi engamanxuwa, namanxuwa abe zimboniselo, ezinabemi."
Ezekiel36:36 Ziya kwazi ke iintlanga eziseleyo ezikujikelezileyo ukuba mna, Yehova, ndakha iindawo eziphanzileyo, ndize ndityale indawo ebiphanzile; Mna Yehova ndithethile, yaye ndiya kwenza."
Ezekiel36:37 Wathi uYehova, Ndisaya kuyibuza loo nto kwindlu kaSirayeli, ukuba ndiyenze kubo; ndiya kubandisa njengomhlambi;"
Ezekiel36:38 njengomhlambi ongcwele, njengomhlambi waseYerusalem ngamaxesha ayo; izixeko eziphanzileyo ziya kuzaliswa yimihlambi yabantu, ukuze bazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel37:1 Saba phezu kwam isandla sikaYehova, wandikhupha ngoMoya kaYehova, wandibeka emfuleni ozele ngamathambo;"
Ezekiel37:2 Wandijikajika, ndawajika ndawabona emaninzi entilini; nantso omile kakhulu."
Ezekiel37:3 Wathi ke kum, Nyana womntu, aya kuphila na ke la mathambo? Ndaphendula ndathi, Nkosi Yehova, nguwe owaziyo."
Ezekiel37:4 Wathi ke kum, Profeta kula mathambo, uthi kuwo, Mathambondini omileyo, liveni ilizwi likaYehova."
Ezekiel37:5 “Itsho iNkosi uNdikhoyo ngala mathambo niyabona, ndiniphefumlela, niphile;"
Ezekiel37:6 Ndiya kunifaka umsipha, ndinenze inyama phezu kwenu, ndinambese ulusu, ndifake umoya kuni, niphile; nazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel37:7 Ndaprofeta njengoko bendiwiselwe umthetho ngako; Ndithe ndingekaprofeti, kwavakala isandi, nanko kushukuma, esondela amathambo, ithambo kwelinye ethanjeni."
Ezekiel37:8 Ndawabona, ndabona izihlunu nenyama kubonakala kuwo, lususu lwawagubungela ngaphezulu, kodwa kungekho mphefumlo kuwo."
Ezekiel37:9 Waza wahlabela mgama wathi kum: “Profeta nxamnye nomoya, profeta, nyana womntu, uthi kumoya, ‘Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova; Phuma kwimimoya yomine, moya, uphefumlele phezu kwababuleweyo, ukuze baphile."
Ezekiel37:10 Ndaprofeta ke ngoko bendiwisele umthetho ngako; wangena umoya kuwo; aphila, ema ngeenyawo zawo engumkhosi omkhulu."
Ezekiel37:11 Wathi ke kum, Nyana womntu, la mathambo yindlu kaSirayeli yonke; Yabona, bathi, Amathambo ethu omile, nethemba lethu litshabalele; sinqanyulelwe amalungu ethu."
Ezekiel37:12 Ngako oko profeta, uthi kubo, Itsho iNkosi uYehova; Yabonani, bantu bam, ndiya kuwavula amangcwaba enu, ndininyuse niphume emangcwabeni enu, ndinise emhlabeni wakwaSirayeli."
Ezekiel37:13 Niya kwazi ukuba ndinguYehova, ekuwavuleni kwam amangcwaba enu, bantu bam, ndinikhuphe emangcwabeni enu;"
Ezekiel37:14 Ndofaka uMoya wam kuni, niphile, ndinibeke emhlabeni wenu; nazi ukuba mna Yehova ndithethile, ndikwenzile; utsho uYehova."
Ezekiel37:15 Laphinda labonakala ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Ezekiel37:16 “Wena ke, nyana womntu, thabatha intonga ibe nye, ubhale kuyo ukuthi, EkaYuda neyoonyana bakaSirayeli, abahlobo bakhe; uthabathe enye intonga, ubhale kuyo, uthi, EkaYosefu, umthi wakwaEfrayim, nendlu yonke kaSirayeli, amadlelane akhe;"
Ezekiel37:17 Wozibeka kwintonga-nye; kwaye ziya kuba nto-nye esandleni sakho.
Ezekiel37:18 Bakuthetha nawe oonyana babantu bakowenu, bathi, Akuthandi na ukusixela na?"
Ezekiel37:19 Yithi kubo, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yabonani, ndiya kuwuthabatha umthi kaYosefu, osesandleni sikaEfrayim, nezizwe zakwaSirayeli, abazalwana bakhe, ndizibeke ngakuye kwimithi yakwaYuda, ndiwenzele umthi lowo baya kwenza umthi omnye ube mnye esandleni sam."
Ezekiel37:20 Izinti oya kubhala kuzo zibe sesandleni sakho phambi kwamehlo abo.
Ezekiel37:21 Wathi kubo, Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi; Yabonani, ndiya kubathabatha oonyana bakaSirayeli phakathi kweentlanga abahamba kuzo, ndibabuthe ezimbombeni zonke, ndibase emhlabeni wabo."
Ezekiel37:22 Ndibenze luhlanga lunye emhlabeni, ezintabeni zakwaSirayeli; ukumkani omnye uya kuba ngukumkani wabo bonke bephela, bangabi saba ziintlanga ezimbini, bangabi sahlukana babe zizikumkani ezibini;"
Ezekiel37:23 Abayi kubuya bazenze iinqambi ngemifanekiso yabo eqingqiweyo, nangezinto zabo ezinezothe, nangezikreqo zabo zonke; ndibahlangule kuzo zonke izakhiwo zabo, abone kuzo, ndibahlambulule; baya kuba ngabantu bam, mna ndibe nguThixo wabo."
Ezekiel37:24 Umkhonzi wam uDavide woba ngukumkani wabo; yaye bonke baya kuba nomalusi omnye; nabo baya kuhamba ngemimiselo yam, bagcine imiyalelo yam, bayenze."
Ezekiel37:25 Bohlala ezweni elo, ndalinika umkhonzi wam uYakobi, ababemi kulo ooyihlo; Baya kuhlala khona, bona, nabantwana babo, nabantwana babantwana babo, kude kuse ephakadeni; noDavide umkhonzi wam uya kuba ngumlawuli wabo ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo."
Ezekiel37:26 Ndiya kwenza umnqophiso woxolo nabo; uya kuba ngumnqophiso ongunaphakade kubo; Ndiya kubabeka, ndibandise, ndibeke ingcwele yam kubo ngonaphakade."
Ezekiel37:27 Umnquba wam woba nabo; ewe, ndiya kuba nguThixo wabo, babe ngabantu bam bona."
Ezekiel37:28 Yaye iintlanga ziya kwazi ukuba ndinguYehova oningcwalisayo uSirayeli, ngenxa yokuba indawo yam engcwele iya kuba phakathi kwabo ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo."
Ezekiel38:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi,"
Ezekiel38:2 Nyana womntu, bhekisa ubuso bakho kuGogi, ezweni lakwaMagogi, inkosana enkulu yakwaMesheki noTubhali, uprofetele kuye."
Ezekiel38:3 Uthi, uYehova uthe; Yabona, ndinengxaki nawe, Gogi, nkosi enkulu yaseMeshege naseTubhali."
Ezekiel38:4 Ndiza kukubuyisa ndize ndikufake amagwegwe emihlathini yakho, ndikukhuphe nomkhosi wakho wonke, amahashe nabakhweli-mahashe, bonke abaxhobe ngazo zonke iintlobo zesikrweqe, ewe, isihlwele esikhulu esinamakhaka namakhaka, bonke bephela uphethe amakrele:"
Ezekiel38:5 namaPersi, namaKushi, namaLubhi; bonke bephela bephethe ingweletshetshe nezigcina-ntloko;"
Ezekiel38:6 uGomere nemizalwane yakhe yonke; nendlu kaTogarma entla, nomkhosi wakhe wonke, nezizwe ezininzi ezinawe."
Ezekiel38:7 Lunga, uzilungise, wena nengxokolo yakho yonke, ihlanganiselwe kuwe, ube ngumboniseli wayo."
Ezekiel38:8 Emva kwemihla emininzi uya kuvelelwa; Ekupheleni kweminyaka, uya kungena ezweni elabuyela kulo ikrele, lihlanganiselwe ezintlangeni ezininzi, uye kwiintaba zakwaSirayeli ezahlala zisenkangala; Ithatyathwe kuzo zonke iintlanga, yaye bonke baya kuhlala bekhuselekile."
Ezekiel38:9 Uya kusuk’ ume njengesaqhwithi, njengelifu eliwugubungelayo umhlaba, wena namaqela akho onke, nezizwe ezininzi ezinawe."
Ezekiel38:10 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi; Kwakhona kuya kwenzeka ukuba ngexesha elifanayo izinto ziya kuza engqondweni yakho, kwaye uya kucinga ingcinga embi;"
Ezekiel38:11 Uya kuthi, Ndiya kunyuka ndiye ezweni lamaphandle; Ndiya kubafikela abaphumli, abahleli ngoxolo, bonke abahleli bengenazindonga, bengenazithintelo naminyango;"
Ezekiel38:12 ukuphangwa nokuphangwa kwempahla ephangiweyo; ukuze ubuyisele isandla sakho kwiindawo eziphanzileyo ezimiweyo ngoku, nakwizizwana ezihlanganiselwe kwizizwana ezinemfuyo nempahla, ezihlala esazulwini selizwe."
Ezekiel38:13 OoShebha noDedan nabarhwebi baseTarshishe nabarhwebi bonke bakhona baya kuthi kuwe, Uze koyisa na? Ulihlanganisile na ihlokondiba lakho ukuba liphange amaxhoba? Kuhluthwe isilivere negolide, kuhluthwe iinkomo, neempahla, nokuhlutha impahla eninzi?"
Ezekiel38:14 Ngako oko profeta, nyana womntu, uthi kuGogi, uYehova uthethile; Akuyi kuba njalo na ngelo xesha, ekuhlaleni kwabantu bam amaSirayeli ngoxolo?"
Ezekiel38:15 Uya kuphuma endaweni yakho ezingontsini zasentla, wena neentlanga ezininzi ezinawe, zonke zikhwele emahasheni, isihlwele esikhulu, nomkhosi omkhulu onamandla."
Ezekiel38:16 Uya kubafikela abantu bam amaSirayeli njengelifu eligubungele ilizwe; kuya kuthi ekupheleni kwemihla, ndikuzisele ezweni lam, zindazi iintlanga, ekuzingcwaliseni kwam kuwe, Gogi, emehlweni azo."
Ezekiel38:17 Wathi uYehova, Nguwe na lowa, ndandithetha yena ngeemini zamandulo ngomlomo wabakhonzi bam, abaprofeti bakwaSirayeli, ababeprofeta iminyaka kwezo mini ngelithi, Ndiya kukuzisa ukuba ulwe nabo?"
Ezekiel38:18 Ngelo xesha uGogi uya kuhlasela ilizwe lakwaSirayeli,’ utsho uYehova, ngokuqinisekileyo ndiya kuvutha umsindo wam phambi kwamehlo am."
Ezekiel38:19 Ke ndathi ndinekhwele, ndinomlilo wokuvutha komsindo wam, Kuya kubakho inyikima enkulu ngaloo mini emhlabeni wakwaSirayeli;"
Ezekiel38:20 ngenxa yam ziya kudidizela phambi kwam iintlanzi zolwandle, neentaka zezulu, nezilo zelizwe, nezinambuzane zonke ezinambuzelayo emhlabeni, nezizwe zonke zehlabathi; neentaba ziya kushukuma liya kuwa, namatye aya kuwa, kwaye zonke iindonga ziya kuwa emhlabeni."
Ezekiel38:21 Ndiya kumbiza ngokuba likrele ezintabeni zam zonke, utsho uYehova; ikrele lomntu liya kuma kumzalwana wakhe."
Ezekiel38:22 Ndiya kulwa naye ngesibetho nangegazi; yaye ndiza kunisa imvula phezu kwakhe naphezu kwamaqela akhe naphezu kweentlanga ezininzi ezikunye naye nesichotho esikhulu, umlilo nesulfure."
Ezekiel38:23 Ngoko ke ndiya kuzizukisa, ndizingcwalise; Ndiya kwaziwa emehlweni eentlanga ezininzi, zazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel39:1 Wothi ke, nyana womntu, profeta kuGogi, uthi, uYehova uthethile; Yabona, ndinengxaki nawe, Gogi, nkosi enkulu yaseMeshege naseTubhali."
Ezekiel39:2 Ndiya kukubuyisa, ndikushiye isahlulo sesithandathu, ndikunyuse use entla, ndikuse ezintabeni zakwaSirayeli."
Ezekiel39:3 Isaphetha sakho ndiya kusibetha esandleni sakho sasekhohlo, neentolo zakho ziwe esandleni sakho sasekunene."
Ezekiel39:4 Uya kuwa ezintabeni zakwaSirayeli, wena namaqela akho onke, neentlanga ezinawe; ndikunikele kwiintaka zeentlobo ngeentlobo, nakukudla kwamarhamncwa asendle."
Ezekiel39:5 Uya kuwa emhlabeni, ngokuba ndithethile, utsho uYehova."
Ezekiel39:6 Ndiza kubaphosa umlilo kwaMagogi naphakathi kwabo bahlala ngokungakhathali eziqithini, ukuze bazi ukuba ndinguYehova."
Ezekiel39:7 Ndiya kulazisa igama lam elingcwele phakathi kwabantu bam amaSirayeli; kwaye andisayi kubavumela ukuba balihlambele igama lam elingcwele; zazi iintlanga ukuba ndinguYehova, Lowo Ungcwele kaSirayeli."
Ezekiel39:8 Yabona, le nto iyeza, iya kubakho; utsho uYehova; yile mini bendithetha ngayo."
Ezekiel39:9 Ke abemi bezixeko zakwaSirayeli baya kuphuma batshise izixhobo, iingweletshetshe, iingweletshetshe, izaphetha, neentolo, neentonga, neencula, bazitshise ngomlilo iminyaka esixhenxe."
Ezekiel39:10 Ukuze bangathathi iinkuni ezweni, bagawule nanye ematyholweni; ngokuba baya kuzitshisa izikrweqe ngomlilo; yaye ngokuqinisekileyo baya kubatshabalalisa abo babewatshabalalisa nabo babewatshabalalisa,’ itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel39:11 Kuya kuthi ngaloo mini ndimnike uGogi indawo yokungcwaba kwaSirayeli, intlambo yabarhwebi ngakwimpuma yolwandle; kwaye iya kuzivala iimpumlo zabakhweli; ngcwaba uGogi nabantu bakhe bonke, bakubize ngokuba yintlambo yeHamongogi."
Ezekiel39:12 Indlu kaSirayeli yabangcwaba iinyanga ezisixhenxe, ukuze balihlambulule ilizwe;"
Ezekiel39:13 bonke abantu belizwe eli baya kubangcwaba; yaye liya kuba ligama labo ngemini yokuzukiswa kwam,” utsho uYehova."
Ezekiel39:14 Bahlula amadoda asebenza ngokusisigxina, ahambahamba engcwabeni ilizwe, nalawo ahambahamba ehlabathini lonke ukuze alihlambulule; ekupheleni kweenyanga ezisixhenxe baya kufuna."
Ezekiel39:15 Abamahashe baya kucanda ilizwe, ukuba uthe wabona ithambo lomntu, makamise uphawu ecaleni kwalo, lide ingcwaba alingcwabe emfuleni weHamongoge."
Ezekiel39:16 Igama lesixeko liya kuba yiHamona. Ngoko baya kulicoca ilizwe.
Ezekiel39:17 “Wena ke, nyana womntu, utsho uYehova; Zixeleleni zonke iintaka ezineentsiba, nakumarhamncwa onke asendle, nithi, Buthani, yizani; zihlanganiseni ngeenxa zonke embingelelweni wam endinizisa khona, umbingelelo omkhulu ezintabeni zakwaSirayeli, ukuze nidle inyama, nisele igazi."
Ezekiel39:18 Niya kudla inyama yamagorha nisele negazi leenkosana zomhlaba, eleenkunzi zeegusha neleenkunzi zeegusha neleenciniba neleenkunzi zenkomo nelezilwanyana ezityetyisiweyo zaseBhashan."
Ezekiel39:19 Niya kudla amanqatha, nihluthe, nisele igazi nide ninxile embingelelweni wam endinienzele khona."
Ezekiel39:20 Niya kwanela etafileni yam ngamahashe neenqwelo zokulwa, namagorha namadoda onke okulwa; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel39:21 Ndiza kunika uzuko lwam phakathi kweentlanga, yaye zonke iintlanga ziya kuwubona umgwebo wam endiya kuwenza nesandla sam endiya kusisa phezu kwazo."
Ezekiel39:22 Ngoko indlu kaSirayeli iya kwazi ukuba ndinguYehova uThixo wayo ukususela ngaloo mini.
Ezekiel39:23 Yaye iintlanga ziya kwazi ukuba abo bendlu kaSirayeli bathinjwa ngenxa yokunxaxha kwabo, ngenxa yokuba baye bandikhonza ngokungathembeki; bawa ke bonke likrele."
Ezekiel39:24 Ndabenza ngokokungahlambuluki kwabo nanjengokunxaxha kwabo, ndaza ndabusithelisa ubuso bam kubo."
Ezekiel39:25 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova ukuthi, Kaloku ndiyasibuyisela isabelo sikaYakobi, ndisikwe yimfesane ngenxa yendlu yonke kaSirayeli, ndibe nobukhwele ngegama lam elingcwele;"
Ezekiel39:26 Emva koko balithwala ihlazo labo nako konke ukunxaxha kwabo aboniswe ngako, ngoxa babehleli kwilizwe labo bekhuselekile, kungekho bani uboyikisayo."
Ezekiel39:27 Ekubabuyiseni kwam ezintlangeni, ndibabuthe emazweni eentshaba zabo, ndibangcwalise emehlweni eentlanga ezininzi;"
Ezekiel39:28 bazi ukuba ndinguYehova uThixo wabo, owabafudusayo phakathi kweentlanga;"
Ezekiel39:29 Andiyi kuphinda ndibufihle ubuso bam kubo, ngenxa yokuba ndithulule umoya wam phezu kwendlu kaSirayeli,’ itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel40:1 Ngomnyaka wamashumi omabini anamihlanu wokuthinjwa kwethu, ekuqaleni komnyaka, ngolweshumi enyangeni leyo, ngomnyaka weshumi elinesine wokuthinjwa komzi, ngaloo mini saba phezu kwam isandla sikaYehova wandizisa khona."
Ezekiel40:2 Wandisa ezweni lakwaSirayeli phambi koThixo, wandimisa entabeni ephakame kakhulu, ngaseludongeni lomzi ngasezantsi;"
Ezekiel40:3 Wandisa khona, ndabona indoda enjengokubonakala kobhedu, iphethe esandleni sayo intsontelo yelinen emhlophe, noswazi lokulinganisa; wema esangweni."
Ezekiel40:4 Wathi kum loo mntu, Nyana womntu, khangela ngamehlo akho, uve ngeendlebe zakho, uyibhekise intliziyo yakho ezintweni zonke endikubonisa zona; ngokuba uziswe apha ngenjongo yokukubonisa; yixelele indlu kaSirayeli konke okubonayo."
Ezekiel40:5 Kwakukho udonga ngaphandle kwendlu, olujikelezileyo ngeenxa zonke, isesandleni somntu lowo ingcongolo yokulinganisa, iziikubhite ezintandathu, iyileyo iyikubhite enye, nobubanzi besandla; wabulinganisa ububanzi besakhiwo, ingcongolo enye; nokuphakama, ingcongolo enye."
Ezekiel40:6 Weza esangweni elibheke empumalanga, wenyuka izinyuko zalo, walinganisa isango lesango, laba yingcongolo enye ububanzi; nomnye umnyango waba yingcongolo enye ububanzi."
Ezekiel40:7 Negumbi elincinane ngalinye laba yingcongolo enye ubude, layingcongolo enye ububanzi; phakathi kwamagumbi iikubhite ezintlanu; nomgubasi ekungeneni komnyango wawuyingcongolo enye kuphela."
Ezekiel40:8 Walinganisa iivaranda zesango elingaphakathi, zaba yingcongolo enye."
Ezekiel40:9 Walinganisa ivaranda yesango ke, yaziikubhite ezisibhozo; iimbombo zalo zaba ziikubhite ezimbini; nevaranda yesango yona yayingaphakathi."
Ezekiel40:10 Ke amagumbi esango elisempumalanga aba mathathu nangapha, aba mathathu nangapha; zaba mlinganiso mnye omathathu, zaba mlinganiso mnye iiplanga zeminyango, zaba mlinganiso mnye ngapha nangapha."
Ezekiel40:11 Wabulinganisa ububanzi bomnyango wesango, baziikubhite ezilishumi; ubude besango, buziikubhite ezilishumi elinantathu."
Ezekiel40:12 Ke umda phambi kwamagumbi wawuyikubhite enye ngapha, wayikubhite enye nangapha umda; amagumbi okulinda amathandathu ngapha, amagumbi amathandathu nangapha."
Ezekiel40:13 Walinganisa isango, ethabathela eluphahleni lwamagumbi okulinda, esa eluphahleni lwamanye; laba ziikubhite ezimashumi mabini anantlanu ububanzi, ethabathela kwelinye umnyango esa komnye."
Ezekiel40:14 Iintsika wazenza zangamashumi omathandathu eekubhite, yeza emgubasini wentendelezo ejikelezileyo ngeenxa zonke esangweni."
Ezekiel40:15 Ukusukela phambi kwesango lokungena phambi kwevaranda yesango eliphakathi kwaba ziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu.
Ezekiel40:16 Kwakukho iifestile ezicutheneyo emagumbini nakwiimbombo zawo, ngaphakathi kwesango macala onke, ukusa evarandeni, neefestile ngaphakathi macala onke, yaye kwikona yesango ngalinye kwakukho imithi yesundu."
Ezekiel40:17 Wandisa entendelezweni engaphandle, ndawabona amagumbi nomgangatho wentendelezo, ejikelezileyo ngeenxa zonke; amagumbi angamashumi amathathu kumgangatho wokuqala."
Ezekiel40:18 Indawo egandayiweyo, emacaleni amasango, ibheke kubude bamasango, ibe yeyangaphantsi."
Ezekiel40:19 Walinganisa ububanzi, ethabathela phambi kwesango lentendelezo ephantsi, esa phambi kwelentendelezo ephakathi ngaphandle, zalikhulu leekubhite ngasempumalanga nangasentla."
Ezekiel40:20 Isango lentendelezo engaphandle elijonge ngasemntla, wabulinganisa ubude balo nobubanzi balo;"
Ezekiel40:21 amagumbi akhe okulinda aba mathathu nangapha, emathathu nangapha; iimbombo zalo, neevaranda zalo, zaba ngangomlinganiso womnyango wokuqala; baba ziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu ubude, baziikubhite ezimashumi mabini anantlanu ububanzi."
Ezekiel40:22 Iifestile zalo, neevaranda zalo, namasundu alo, zaba ngangomlinganiso wesango elibheke empumalanga; Benyuka khona ngezinyuko ezisixhenxe; nevaranda yakhe ibikufuphi nazo."
Ezekiel40:23 Isango lentendelezo ephakathi lalimalunga nesango langasentla nelasempumalanga; walinganisa ethabathela kwelinye isango, esa kwelinye, iikubhite ezilikhulu."
Ezekiel40:24 Wandisa ngasemzantsi, kukho isango elingasezantsi; walinganisa iikona zeengcango zalo, neevaranda zalo, kwangokwaloo milinganiso."
Ezekiel40:25 Bekukho iifestile kulo nakwiivaranda zalo, zijikelezile ngeenxa zonke, njengeziya iifestile; zaba ziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu ubude, zaba ziikubhite ezimashumi mabini anantlanu ububanzi."
Ezekiel40:26 Kwakukho izinyuko ezisixhenxe zokunyuka uye kulo, neevaranda zalo zaziphambi kwazo;"
Ezekiel40:27 Bekukho isango entendelezweni ephakathi, elisingise ezantsi;"
Ezekiel40:28 Wandisa entendelezweni ephakathi ngesango lasezantsi; walinganisa umnyango wasezantsi, waba njalo;"
Ezekiel40:29 namagumbi alo okulinda, neekona zalo, neevaranda zalo, kwangokwaloo milinganiso; ubude buziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu, ububanzi buziikubhite ezimashumi mabini anantlanu."
Ezekiel40:30 Ivaranda ejikelezayo ibiziikubhite ezimashumi mabini anantlanu ubude, yaba ziikubhite ezintlanu ububanzi."
Ezekiel40:31 Ivaranda yayo yayikhangele entendelezweni ephandle; bekukho amasundu ezikoneni zalo, nomnyango walo ube nezinyuko ezisibhozo."
Ezekiel40:32 Wandisa entendelezweni ephakathi, esingise empumalanga; walinganisa isango, kwaba ngokomlinganiselo;"
Ezekiel40:33 namagumbi alo okulinda, neekona zalo, neevaranda zalo, kwangokwaloo mlinganiso; ubude buziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu, ububanzi buziikubhite ezimashumi mabini anantlanu."
Ezekiel40:34 Ivaranda yayo yayikhangele entendelezweni ephandle; bekukho amasundu emigubasini yeminyango yalo, ngapha nangapha; yaye ukunyuka ukuya kuyo kwakukho izinyuko ezisibhozo."
Ezekiel40:35 Wandisa esangweni lasentla, walilinganisa ngaloo milinganiso;"
Ezekiel40:36 amagumbi alo, neevaranda zalo, neevaranda zalo, neefestile zalo, zijikelezile ngeenxa zonke; zaba ziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu ubude, zaba ziikubhite ezimashumi mabini anantlanu ububanzi."
Ezekiel40:37 Izakhelo zayo zaba entendelezweni ephandle; bekukho amasundu emigubasini yeminyango yalo, ngapha nangapha; yaye ukunyuka ukuya kuyo kwakukho izinyuko ezisibhozo."
Ezekiel40:38 Amagumbi neengcango zawo bezisezimbombeni zeminyango, apho bekuhlanjwa khona amadini anyukayo."
Ezekiel40:39 Evarandeni yesango bekukho iitafile ezimbini ngapha, iitafile ezimbini nangapha, zokunikela amadini anyukayo, nawesono, nawetyala."
Ezekiel40:40 Ngaphandle, konyukayo esiya ekungeneni kwesango langasentla, bekukho iitafile ezimbini; nakwelinye icala ngasevarandeni yesango bekukho iitafile ezimbini."
Ezekiel40:41 Bekukho iitafile ezine ngapha, iitafile ezine nangapha, ngecala lesango; Iitafile ezisibhozo, zokubingelela kuzo imibingelelo yabo;"
Ezekiel40:42 Iitafile ezine zaba zezamatye aqingqiweyo ombingelelo otshiswayo, ubude bube yikubhite enye enesiqingatha, ububanzi buyikubhite enye enesiqingatha, ukuphakama bekuyikubhite enye; bazibeka kuzo izixhobo zokuxhela amadini anyukayo nexhoba."
Ezekiel40:43 Amagwegwe angangobubanzi besandla ngaphakathi, ebethelelwe ngeenxa zonke; yaye phezu kweetafile kwakukho inyama yedini."
Ezekiel40:44 Ngaphandle kwesango elingaphakathi kwakukho amagumbi eemvumi entendelezweni engaphakathi esecaleni kwesango lasemntla; elinye lingasecaleni lesango lasempumalanga, libheke entla."
Ezekiel40:45 Wathi kum, Eli gumbi, likhangele ezantsi, lelababingeleli abalungiselela indlu;"
Ezekiel40:46 Igumbi elibheke ngasentla lelababingeleli abalungiselela esibingelelweni; ngoonyana bakaTsadoki, koonyana bakaLevi, abasondela kuYehova ukuba balungiselele kuye."
Ezekiel40:47 Wayilinganisa intsimi, baba ziikubhite ezilikhulu ubude bayo, nobubanzi bayo baba ziikubhite ezilikhulu; nesibingelelo siphambi kwendlu."
Ezekiel40:48 Wandisa evarandeni yendlu, walinganisa isango ngevaranda: iikubhite zontlanu ngapha, iikubhite zontlanu nangapha; ububanzi besango babuziikubhite ezintathu ngapha, iikubhite ezintathu nangapha ileyisi."
Ezekiel40:49 Ubude bevaranda baba ziikubhite ezimashumi mabini, ububanzi baba ziikubhite ezilishumi elinanye ngasezinyukweni wandisa kwizinyuko ababedla ngokunyuka kuzo, bekukho iintsika kwelinye icala lembombo, enye ngaphaya."
Ezekiel41:1 Wandisa etempileni, walinganisa imigubasi; Ububanzi bube buntandathu phezu apho, ububanzi bube buntandathu ngapha, njengobubanzi bomnquba."
Ezekiel41:2 Ububanzi bomnyango bebuziikubhite ezilishumi; amacala omnyango aba ziikubhite ezintlanu ngapha, iikubhite ezintlanu nangapha; wabulinganisa ubude bayo, baziikubhite ezimashumi mane, ububanzi baba ziikubhite ezimashumi mabini."
Ezekiel41:3 Wangena, walinganisa umphezulu womnyango, waziikubhite ezimbini; umnyango waba ziikubhite ezintandathu; ububanzi bomnyango buziikubhite ezisixhenxe."
Ezekiel41:4 Wabulinganisa ubude bayo, baziikubhite ezimashumi mabini; zaba ziikubhite ezimashumi mabini ububanzi phambi kwendlu; yathi kum, Le yingcwele kangcwele."
Ezekiel41:5 Walulinganisa udonga lwendlu, lwaziikubhite ezintandathu; ububanzi bendawo yokwayama baba ziikubhite ezine, obujikelezileyo ngeenxa zonke."
Ezekiel41:6 Amagumbi endawo yokwayama aba mathathu, igumbi phezu kwegumbi, aba mashumi mathathu ngokulandelelana; yaye ayengena eludongeni lwendlu emagumbini asemacaleni ajikelezayo ukuze awaxhase, kodwa ayengabambeleli eludongeni lwendlu."
Ezekiel41:7 Kwaphoswa khona uphokozo, olusa emagumbini endawo yokwayama; ngokuba ibiyijikeleza indlu le ngeenxa zonke; ngenxa yoko benyuka ububanzi bendlu, inyuka isuka kweyangaphantsi, iye kwelikhulu eliphakathi."
Ezekiel41:8 Ndabona kwasendlwini le indawo ephakamileyo, ejikelezileyo ngeenxa zonke;"
Ezekiel41:9 Ukuphakama kodonga lwegumbi elingaphandle bekuziikubhite ezintlanu; indawo eseleyo yaba yindawo yamagumbi endawo yokwayama.
Ezekiel41:10 Phakathi kwamagumbi ibe ibububanzi beekubhite ezimashumi mabini obujikelezileyo, bayijikeleza indlu ngeenxa zonke."
Ezekiel41:11 Iminyango yendawo yokwayama yayikhangele endaweni eshiyekileyo; omnye umnyango ukhangele ngasentla, omnye umnyango ukhangele ngezantsi; ububanzi bendawo eseleyo baba ziikubhite ezintlanu, bajikeleza ngeenxa zonke."
Ezekiel41:12 Isakhiwo esibe siphambi kwendawo eqhiwukileyo, sasiziikubhite ezimashumi asixhenxe ububanzi baso ngecala lasentshonalanga; udonga lwesakhiwo eso lwaluziikubhite ezintlanu ububanzi balo, lwajikeleza ngeenxa zonke, neekubhite ezimashumi asithoba ubude."
Ezekiel41:13 Wayilinganisa ke indlu leyo, yaba ziikubhite ezilikhulu ubude bayo; indawo ejikelezileyo, nesakhiwo eso, neendonga zaso, zaba ziikubhite ezilikhulu ubude;"
Ezekiel41:14 Ububanzi bomphambili wendlu nobendawo yecala elisingise empuma baba ziikubhite ezilikhulu.
Ezekiel41:15 Wabulinganisa ubude besakhiwo endaweni engasese, ebe singasemva kwaso, neevaranda zaso ngapha nangapha, iikubhite ezilikhulu;"
Ezekiel41:16 Iiplanga ezicekethekileyo neefestile, ngeenxa zonke kuzo zontathu, zijikelezile emnyango, zaba ngamaplanga ngeenxa zonke; kwathabathela emgangathweni wesa ezifestileni;"
Ezekiel41:17 kwada kwasa phezulu emnyango, endlwini ngaphakathi nangaphandle, naseludongeni lonke, ngaphakathi nangaphandle, kwaba yimilinganiso."
Ezekiel41:18 Kwaye kwenziwe iikerubhi namasundu, yaba ngumthi wesundu phakathi kweekerubhi neekerubhi; Ikerubhi nganye inobuso obubini;"
Ezekiel41:19 yabubuso bendoda leyo bubheke esundwini ngapha, yabubuso bengonyama bubheke esundwini ngapha; yayakhiwe yonke indlu ngeenxa zonke;"
Ezekiel41:20 Zenziwa zathabathela emgangathweni wesa phezu komnyango, iikerubhi namasundu, eludongeni lwetempile."
Ezekiel41:21 Imigubasi yetempile, yayinamacala amane alinganayo phambi kwengcwele; Imbonakalo yomnye, injengokubonakala kwenye."
Ezekiel41:22 Isibingelelo somthi sasiziikubhite ezintathu ukuphakama kwayo, nobude baso baba ziikubhite ezimbini; iimbombo zalo, nobude balo, neendonga zalo, bezizezemithi; wathi kum, Le yitafile ephambi koYehova."
Ezekiel41:23 Bezimbini iingcango zetempile nezengcwele.
Ezekiel41:24 Iminyango leyo ibinamaphiko amabini, iingcango zizijinga ezimbini; iiflegi ezimbini komnye umnyango, neeflegi ezimbini komnye umnyango."
Ezekiel41:25 Yaye phezu kwayo, kwiingcango zetempile, kwaye kwenziwe iikerubhi namasundu ezindongeni kwakukho amaplanga ashinyeneyo ngaphandle kweveranda."
Ezekiel41:26 Iifestile ezicekethekileyo namasundu zazingapha nangapha, emacaleni evaranda nasemagumbini endawo yokwayama kuyo indlu, nezinyuko."
Ezekiel42:1 Waphuma nam, waya entendelezweni engaphandle, ngendlela yasentla; waza wandisa kwigumbi elimalunga negumbi elahlukileyo, elisecaleni kwesakhiwo eso, kwicala elingasentla."
Ezekiel42:2 Phambi kobude obuziikubhite ezilikhulu kwakukho umnyango ongasemntla, ububanzi buziikubhite ezingamashumi amahlanu."
Ezekiel42:3 Malunga neekubhite ezimashumi mabini zentendelezo ephakathi, malunga nombekelelo wamatye wentendelezo engaphandle, bekukho iivaranda, zikhangelene, zineevaranda ezintathu."
Ezekiel42:4 Phambi kwamagumbi kwakukho indawo yokuma, ububanzi bayo buziikubhite ezilishumi; wona amasango awo ngangasentla."
Ezekiel42:5 Ke amagumbi aphezulu ayemafuphine, kuba iivaranda beziphakamile kunawaphantsi naphakathi esakhiweni;"
Ezekiel42:6 Ngokuba ayekwimigangatho emithathu, kodwa ayengenazintsika njengeentsika zasemasimini; ngenxa yoko isakhiwo sasikumgangatho ophantsi kunowasezantsi nophakathi ukusuka emhlabeni."
Ezekiel42:7 Udonga olube lungaphandle kwamagumbi okudlela, olukhangele entendelezweni engaphandle, phambi kwaloo magumbi, lwaba ziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu ubude."
Ezekiel42:8 Ngokuba ubude bamagumbi entendelezo engaphandle baba ziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu; nanko ke kukho amasimi alikhulu ngasetempileni.
Ezekiel42:9 Ngaphantsi kwala magumbi, umnyango wawukhangele empumalanga xa umntu ephuma entendelezweni engaphandle."
Ezekiel42:10 Ekuphakameni kodonga lwentendelezo, kusingise empumalanga, ekhangelene nendawo esecaleni, ephambi kwesakhiwo."
Ezekiel42:11 Indlela phambi kwawo yayibonakala injalo amagumbi, esingise entla, nobude bawo nobubanzi bawo; kwaye zonke iilwandle zazimi ngendlela yazo neengcango zazo."
Ezekiel42:12 Njengoko injalo iminyango yawo lawo, injalo neminyango yamagumbi abe ekhangele ngezantsi;"
Ezekiel42:13 Wahlabela mgama wathi kum: “Amagumbi angasentla nangasezantsi phambi kwendawo engasese, ngawo lawo amagumbi angcwele, apho ababingeleli abasondela kuYehova baya kudlela khona izinto ezingcwele; nomnikelo wokudla, nedini lesono, nedini letyala; ngokuba le ndawo ingcwele."
Ezekiel42:14 Bakungena ababingeleli, abaphumi engcweleni, baye entendelezweni engaphandle; ngokuba bangcwele; yaye baya kunxiba ezinye iimpahla baze basondele kwizinto zabantu."
Ezekiel42:15 Wathi akugqiba ukuyilinganisa indlu engaphakathi, wandizisa esangweni elibheke empumalanga, walinganisa ngeenxa zonke;"
Ezekiel42:16 Walinganisa icala lasempumalanga ngengcongolo yokulinganisa; laba ziikubhite ezimakhulu mahlanu ngenduku yokulinganisa.
Ezekiel42:17 Walinganisa icala langasentla; iikubhite ezimakhulu mahlanu, ngengcongolo yokulinganisa, ngeenxa zonke."
Ezekiel42:18 Walinganisa icala lasezantsi, iikubhite ezimakhulu mahlanu, ngentonga yokulinganisa."
Ezekiel42:19 Wabheka ecaleni lasentshonalanga, walinganisa amakhulu amahlanu eekubhite ngentonga yokusila."
Ezekiel42:20 Wayilinganisa emacaleni omane, yaba ludonga ngeenxa zonke;"
Ezekiel43:1 Yandisa esangweni, isango elisingise empumalanga;"
Ezekiel43:2 Nabo ke ubuqaqawuli bukaThixo kaSirayeli, buvela empumalanga, nelizwi lakhe linjengesandi samanzi amaninzi;"
Ezekiel43:3 Imbonakalo ke endayibonayo, yayinjengembonakalo leya, ndayibonayo ukuba ndiya kuwonakalisa umzi; ubuso bebunjengobuso endabubonayo emlanjeni oyiKebhare; ndawa ngobuso."
Ezekiel43:4 Ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova bangena endlwini ngesango elibheke empumalanga.
Ezekiel43:5 Wandithabatha umoya, wandisa entendelezweni engaphakathi; nabo ke ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova buyizalisile indlu."
Ezekiel43:6 Ndaliva lithetha nam ngaphakathi endlwini; yema indoda leyo ecaleni kwam.
Ezekiel43:7 Wathi kum, Nyana womntu, nantsi indawo yetrone yam, indawo yeenyawo zam, apho ndiya kuhlala khona phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli ngonaphakade, lingayenzi inqambi igama lam elingcwele indlu kaYehova. Sirayeli kwakhona nookumkani bazo neempahla zabo, nezidumbu zookumkani bazo kwiindawo zabo ezizukileyo;"
Ezekiel43:8 ngokubeka iingcango zabo ezingcangweni zam, nemigubasi yazo emigubasini yeminyango yam, balubeka eludongeni phakathi kwam nabo, balenze inqambi igama lam elingcwele ngamasikizi abo abawenzileyo; ke ngoko, ndabatshabalalisa ngomsindo wam."
Ezekiel43:9 Ngoku ke mabasuse ubuhenyu babo nezidumbu zookumkani babo kum, ndihlale phakathi kwabo ngonaphakade."
Ezekiel43:10 Nyana womntu, indlu kaSirayeli yibonise indlu, ukuze badane ngenxa yobugwenxa babo; kwaye ulinganise umzekelo."
Ezekiel43:11 Ukuba bathe baliva ihlazo ngenxa yezinto zonke abazenzileyo, babonise ukuma kwendlu le, nembonakalo yayo, neevaranda zayo, neengcango zayo, neengcango zayo, nezimo zayo zonke, nemiyalelo yayo yonke, nezimo zayo zonke, nezimo zayo zonke imithetho yayo, uyibhale phantsi bazenze phambi kwazo, bakugcine konke ukuma kwayo, nemimiselo yayo yonke, bayigqibe."
Ezekiel43:12 Nguwo lo umyalelo wayo indlu; Entla kwentaba, umda wayo uya kuba yingcwele kangcwele nguwo lo umyalelo wayo indlu."
Ezekiel43:13 Yiyo le imilinganiso yesibingelelo ngokwekubhite: yikubhite yikubhite nobubanzi besandla; umzantsi woba yikubhite enye, ububanzi bube yikubhite enye; yoba ngasentla kwesibingelelo."
Ezekiel43:14 Kuthabathela emgangathweni kuse esitulweni esiphantsi, koba ziikubhite ezimbini ukuphakama, nobubanzi bube yikubhite enye; kuthabathela esihlalweni esincinane kuye kwesikhulu, koba ziikubhite ezine, ububanzi bube yikubhite enye."
Ezekiel43:15 Ke ngoko, isibingelelo siya kuba ziingcango ezine; ukusuka esibingelelweni ukuya phezulu kuya kubakho iimpondo ezine."
Ezekiel43:16 Ubude besibingelelo boba ziikubhite ezilishumi elinambini, ububanzi baso bube ziikubhite ezilishumi elinambini, amacala aso alingane."
Ezekiel43:17 Ubude balo boba ziikubhite ezilishumi elinesine, ububanzi bube ziikubhite ezilishumi elinesine kumacala alo omane; Ukujikeleza komandlalo koba sisiqingatha sekubhite; umzantsi wawo wawuwenziwe wamnye, ngapha nangapha; nezinyuko zayo ziya kubheka ngasempuma."
Ezekiel43:18 Waqhubeka wathi kum: “Nyana womntu, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova; Yiyo le imimiselo yesibingelelo ekusenziwe kwaso, ukwenziwa kwaso amadini anyukayo, nokutshizwa kwaso ngegazi."
Ezekiel43:19 Nikani ababingeleli abangabaLevi koonyana bakaTsadoki, abaya kundikhonza, inkomo ibe lidini lesono; itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel43:20 Thabatha egazini layo, uliqabe ezimpondweni zaso zone, nasezimbombeni zone zomzi, naseludinini ngeenxa zonke; ke ngoko, yicoce, icoce."
Ezekiel43:21 Uthabathe inkunzi entsha yenkomo yedini lesono, uyitshise endaweni emisiweyo yayo indlu, ngaphandle kwengcwele."
Ezekiel43:22 Ngomhla wesibini wosondeza inkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti egqibeleleyo, ibe lidini lesono; bahlambulule isibingelelo njengoko behlanjululwe ngenkomo."
Ezekiel43:23 Wakuba ugqibile ukuyicoca, wozisa inkunzi entsha, inkomo egqibeleleyo, nenkunzi yegusha egqibeleleyo;"
Ezekiel43:24 Wowusondeza phambi koYehova, ababingeleli bagalele ityuwa phezu kwawo, bawenze ube lidini elinyukayo kuYehova."
Ezekiel43:25 Iintsuku ezisixhenxe uya kunikela inkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti ibe lidini lesono ngemini; ilungiselwe inkunzi entsha, nenkunzi yemvu, empahleni emfutshane, zigqibelele zonke."
Ezekiel43:26 Iintsuku ezisixhenxe bosihlambulula isibingelelo, basihlambulule; kwaye mabazithembise bona."
Ezekiel43:27 Emva kwezo ntsuku, ngomhla wesibhozo, ababingeleli bowenza amadini enu anyukayo, nemibingelelo yenu yombulelo esibingelelweni; yaye ndiya kukholiswa nguwe, itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel44:1 Wandibuyisela emnyango wengcwele ongaphandle, okhangele empumalanga; kwaye yavalwa."
Ezekiel44:2 Wathi uYehova kum; Olu cango lumele luvalwe, lungavulwa, kungangeni bani ngalo; ngokuba uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, ungene ngalo, liya kuvalwa ke."
Ezekiel44:3 Le nto yokumkani; sihlale khona isikhulu, sidle isonka phambi koYehova; wangena ngevaranda yesango waphuma wahamba."
Ezekiel44:4 Yandisa ngendlela yesango lasentla, phambi kwendlu; Ndakhangela, nango ubuqaqawuli bukaYehova buyizalisile indlu kaYehova, ndawa ngobuso."
Ezekiel44:5 Wathi uYehova kum: “Nyana womntu, phulaphula, ubone ngamehlo akho, uve ngeendlebe zakho, konke endikuxelela kona ngemithetho yonke yendlu kaYehova, nemithetho yayo yonke; uze unikele ingqalelo emnyango wendlu, nayo yonke indlela yokuphuma engcweleni."
Ezekiel44:6 Uze uthi kubavukeli, kwindlu kaSirayeli, ‘Itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova; Kwanele ngawo onke amasikizi enu, ndlu kaSirayeli."
Ezekiel44:7 Ngenxa enokuba ningenise abasemzini engcweleni yam, njengesiqalekiso entliziyweni yam, nesiqalekiso enyameni yam, ukuba babe sengcweleni yam, ukuze niyenze inqambi eyindlu yam, ekusikhupheni kwenu isonka sam, namanqatha, negazi; bandimisa ke ngenxa yamasikizi akho onke."
Ezekiel44:8 Aniyigcinanga inkonzo yengcwele yam;
Ezekiel44:9 Utsho uYehova ukuthi, Makungabikho mntu wasemzini ontliziyo ikrexezayo, ongathembekanga ngenyama, oya kungena engcweleni yam, ongowasemzini ophakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli."
Ezekiel44:10 Ke bona abaLevi, abakreqayo kum, ekundwendweni koonyana bakaSirayeli, abandwendwela kude kum, balandela izigodo zabo; bobuthwala nabo ubugwenxa babo."
Ezekiel44:11 Boba ngabakhonzi engcweleni yam, nabagcina amasango endlu le, nabalungiselelayo kuyo indlu; bobingelela idini elinyukayo nombingelelo wabantu, beme phambi kwabo, balungiselele."
Ezekiel44:12 Ngenxa yokuba babebakhonza phambi kwemifanekiso yabo eqingqiweyo baza babangela ukuba indlu kaSirayeli iwekele ebubini; ngako oko ndibaphakamisele isandla sam, itsho iNkosi uYehova, ukuba babuthwale ubugwenxa babo."
Ezekiel44:13 Abayi kufika kum ukuze bandenzele ububingeleli, bangasondeli kwiingcwele zam zonke, kwingcwele kangcwele; baya kulithwala ihlazo labo, namasikizi abo abawenzileyo."
Ezekiel44:14 Ndiza kubamisa phezu kwenkonzo yendlu ngokwenkonzo yayo yonke nangokwezinto zonke ezenzelwa kuyo.
Ezekiel44:15 Ke bona ababingeleli babaLevi, oonyana bakaTsadoki, abawugcinayo umsebenzi wengcwele yam, ekundinikeleni kwabo oonyana bakaSirayeli, bosondela bona kum, ukuba bandilungiselele, beme ngakum, ukuba bandinike ioli kunye namafutha igazi, itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel44:16 Bongena bona engcweleni yam, basondele esithebeni sam, ukuba bandikhonze, bagcine inkonzo yam."
Ezekiel44:17 Ekungeneni kwabo ngamasango entendelezo ephakathi, bonxiba ilinen emhlophe; kungabikho boya kuzo ekukhonzeni kwabo emasangweni entendelezo ephakathi, nakwintendelezo ephakathi."
Ezekiel44:18 Bafanele bathwale iinkanda zelinen entloko, babhinqe iibhulukhwe zelinen ezinqeni zabo; musa ukuzibophelela kuyo nantoni na ebilayo."
Ezekiel44:19 Ekuphumeni kwabo baya entendelezweni engaphandle, entendelezweni engaphandle kwabantu, bazihluba iingubo zabo ababefudula belungiselela ngazo, bazibeke emagumbini angcwele, bambathe ngubo zimbi; yaye abazange bazihlambe ngeempahla zabo."
Ezekiel44:20 Mabangazichebi iintloko zabo, bangaziyeki zibe nde iinwele zabo; baya kulinganisa iintloko zabo kuphela."
Ezekiel44:21 Kananjalo akukho mbingeleli unako ukusela iwayini ekungeneni kwakhe kwintendelezo ephakathi.
Ezekiel44:22 Abafanele bathabathe abafazi babo mhlolokazi okanye oshiywe lixesha, kodwa bafanele bathabathe iintombi zesizwe sendlu kaSirayeli okanye umhlolokazi owayenombingeleli ngaphambili."
Ezekiel44:23 Ubafundise abantu bam, ukubahlula okungcwele kokungangcwele, ukuba bahlule phakathi kwento ehlambulukileyo nento ehlambulukileyo;"
Ezekiel44:24 Yaye ekulweni baya kuma ematyaleni; kwaye baya kuligweba ngokwemithetho yam; niyigcine imiyalelo yam nemimiselo yam emabandleni am onke; bazingcwalise iisabatha zam.
Ezekiel44:25 Abasondelanga emntwini ofileyo, ukuba bamenze inqambi; kodwa ngoyise, nonina, nonyana, nentombi yakhe, nomzalwana wakhe, nodade wabo, abangabanga nandoda, bangazenza iinqambi bona, bona ngokwabo."
Ezekiel44:26 Emva kokuhlanjululwa kwakhe, babalelwa iintsuku ezisixhenxe."
Ezekiel44:27 Yaye ngemini yokungena kwakhe endaweni engcwele, kwintsapho elapho ukuze ikukhonze endaweni engcwele, umele azise umnikelo wakhe wesono,’ itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel44:28 Oko koba lilifa labo, ibe ndim ilifa labo; musani ukubanika ubutyebi kwaSirayeli; Yimpahla yabo."
Ezekiel44:29 Idini elinyukayo, nedini lesono, nedini letyala, bolidla bona; yaye yonke into engcwalisiweyo kwaSirayeli yoba yeyabo."
Ezekiel44:30 Iingqalo kwiinto zonke zokuqala, nokusondezwa kwasemlilweni kweento zonke zokudla kwenu kwasemlilweni, kweentlobo zonke, yoba yeyombingeleli; umnike umbingeleli intlama yakho yokuqala, ukuze asikelele endlwini yakho."
Ezekiel44:31 Ababingeleli mabangayidli yonke into ezifeleyo neqwengiweyo, nokuba kusezintakeni, nokuba kusezinkomeni."
Ezekiel45:1 Ukuba nilabela ilizwe ngeqashiso, nosondeza isahlulo esikhethekileyo kuYehova kulo ilizwe; Ubude babuziikubhite ezingamashumi amabini anesihlanu amawaka, nobubanzi buziikubhite ezilishumi lamawaka. Yoba ngcwele emideni yayo yonke ngeenxa zonke."
Ezekiel45:2 Kubo apho yoba ngamakhulu amahlanu obude, ibe ngamakhulu amahlanu ububanzi, ibe macala onke; nedlelo lakhe laba ziikubhite ezimashumi mahlanu ngeenxa zonke."
Ezekiel45:3 Ngalo mlinganiso wokulinganisa ubude amashumi amabini anesihlanu amawaka, nobubanzi bamawaka alishumi; kwaye kuyo kuya kubakho iNgcwele yeeNgcwele kunye neNgcwele yeeNgcwele."
Ezekiel45:4 Indawo engcwele kulo ilizwe iya kuba yeyababingeleli, abakhonzi bengcwele, abasondela ukuba bakhonze uYehova; yoba yindawo yezindlu zabo, nendawo engcwele yengcwele."
Ezekiel45:5 Amashumi amabini anesihlanu amawaka ubude, neshumi lamawaka ububanzi, libe lelabaLevi, abakhonzi bendlu, libe lilifa labo iindawo ezimashumi mabini."
Ezekiel45:6 Nosabela isixeko sibe ngamawaka amahlanu obubanzi, namashumi amabini anesihlanu amawaka ubude, ngokomrhumo wengcwele; uya kuba ngowendlu yonke kaSirayeli."
Ezekiel45:7 Soba nesabelo sokumkani kwelinye icala, nangaphaya komsondezo wengcwele, nobutyebi besixeko, ecaleni komsondezo wengcwele, naphambi kwelizwe lesixeko ngasentshonalanga ngakwicala lasentshonalanga nasempumalanga, kude kuse empumalanga; ubude bujongane nenye indawo, kuthabathela kumda wasentshona kuse emdeni wasempumalanga."
Ezekiel45:8 Ilizwe loba yindyebo yakhe kwaSirayeli, nezikhulu zam zingabuyi zibe sabaxinzelela phantsi abantu bam; yaye ilizwe eliseleyo baya kulinika indlu kaSirayeli ngokweentsapho zabo."
Ezekiel45:9 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Niyanele, zikhulu zakwaSirayeli;"
Ezekiel45:10 Uya kuba nomlinganiselo olungileyo nebhafu elungileyo nebhafu elungileyo.
Ezekiel45:11 Iefa nesiqu mazibe ngumlinganiso mnye, ukuze umbhobho uthabathe isahlulo seshumi sehomere, ne-efa ithabathe isahlulo seshumi sehomere; iqabane lakhe malilandele ihomere."
Ezekiel45:12 Ishekele yoba ziigera ezimashumi mabini; Amashumi amabini eeshekele, amashumi amabini anesihlanu eeshekele, neshumi elinesihlanu leeshekele kuni."
Ezekiel45:13 Kuko oku ukudla kwasemlilweni eniya kuwuzisa; nesahlulo sesithandathu se-efa yehomere yengqolowa, wanikela isahlulo sesithandathu se-efa yehomere yerhasi."
Ezekiel45:14 Umlinganiso weoli, webhate yeoli, wenze isahlulo seshumi sebhate yonkozo, ezibhate ezilishumi ehomereni ke; kuba iibhate ezilishumi yihomere."
Ezekiel45:15 Nexhwane libe linye empahleni emfutshane engamakhulu amabini, emakriweni achumileyo akwaSirayeli; libe lidini elinyukayo, libe lidini elinyukayo, libe lidini lombulelo, ukubacamagushela; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel45:16 Bonke abantu belizwe eli bosinikela lo mnikelo kwisikhulu sakwaSirayeli.
Ezekiel45:17 Yaye yoba yeyesikhulu iminikelo etshiswayo neminikelo yokudla neminikelo ethululwayo emithendelekweni nangeenyanga ezintsha nangesabatha ngayo yonke imithendeleko yendlu kaSirayeli; uya kulilungiselela idini lesono nomnikelo wokudla, nedini elinyukayo, nemibingelelo yoxolo, yokucamagusha ngenxa yezono zendlu kaSirayeli."
Ezekiel45:18 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ngenyanga yokuqala, ngolokuqala enyangeni leyo, wothabatha inkunzi entsha, inkomo egqibeleleyo, uyihlambulule ingcwele;"
Ezekiel45:19 Umbingeleli wocaphula egazini ledini lesono, aliqabe emigubasini yendlu le, nasezimbombeni zone zesibingelelo, nasemigubasini yentendelezo ephakathi;"
Ezekiel45:20 Uze wenjenjalo nangolwesixhenxe enyangeni leyo, ngenxa yabo bonke abaphambukayo, nabamsulwa; ngoko ke kufuneka ulungelelanise indlu."
Ezekiel45:21 Ngeyokuqala inyanga, ngosuku lweshumi elinesine enyangeni leyo, noba nepasika, umthendeleko weentsuku ezisixhenxe; zodliwa izonka ezingenagwele."
Ezekiel45:22 Ngaloo mini isikhulu solungiselela inkunzi entsha yenkomo, ibe lidini lesono ngenxa yaso nangenxa yabantu bonke belizwe."
Ezekiel45:23 Ngeentsuku ezisixhenxe zomthendeleko nosondeza kuYehova idini elinyukayo: iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo zibe sixhenxe, neenkunzi zeegusha ezigqibeleleyo zibe sixhenxe; nenkunzi yebhokhwe exhonti ibe lidini lesono yonke imini."
Ezekiel45:24 Wenza ukudla kwasemlilweni, iefa yengqolowa, ne-efa enkunzini yegusha, nehin yeoli nge-efa."
Ezekiel45:25 Ngenyanga yesixhenxe, ngosuku lweshumi elinesihlanu enyangeni leyo, uya kwenza okufanayo ngomthendeleko weentsuku ezisixhenxe, ngokwedini lesono, nangokwedini elinyukayo, nangokweminikelo yokudla, nangokweoli."
Ezekiel46:1 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi; Isango lentendelezo ephakathi, elikhangele empumalanga, lovulwa iintsuku ezintandathu zokusebenza; kodwa ngomhla wesabatha liya kuvulwa, nangomhla wokuthwasa kwenyanga livulwe."
Ezekiel46:2 Isikhulu songena ngevaranda yesango elingaphandle, simi emgubasini wesango, ababingeleli balungiselele idini laso elinyukayo, nemibingelelo yaso yombulelo, siqubude ekungeneni kwesango; nandule ke uphume; kodwa isango aliyi kuvalwa kude kuhlwe."
Ezekiel46:3 Ngendlela efanayo, abantu belizwe baya kuqubuda emnyangweni weli sango phambi koYehova ngeesabatha nasekuthwaseni kwenyanga."
Ezekiel46:4 Umnikelo otshiswayo esiya kuwuzisa isikhulu kuYehova ngomhla wesabatha, woba ziimvana ezintandathu ezigqibeleleyo, nenkunzi yegusha egqibeleleyo;"
Ezekiel46:5 Umnikelo wokudla woba yiefa enkunzini yegusha, nomnikelo wokudla kuzo iimvana ube ngangoko sinako ukukunika, ibe yihin yeoli kuyo iefa."
