Ezekiel46:6 Ngosuku lokuthwasa kwenyanga, liya kuba yinkunzi entsha yenkomo, egqibeleleyo, neemvana ezintandathu, nenkunzi yegusha; baya kufuna isiphene."
Ezekiel46:7 Solungiselela ukudla kwasemlilweni, iefa enkunzini entsha, iefa enkunzini yegusha, kuzo iimvana esifunyenweyo isandla saso, ibe yihin yeoli kuyo iefa."
Ezekiel46:8 Ekungeneni kwesikhulu, songena ngevaranda yesango, siphume ngendlela yaso."
Ezekiel46:9 Kodwa ekufikeni kwabantu belizwe phambi koYehova ebudeni bemithendeleko, lowo ungena ngeSango laseMntla ukuze athandaze uya kuphuma ngeSango lasemzantsi; yaye lowo ungena ngesango lasemzantsi uya kuphuma ngesango lasemntla."
Ezekiel46:10 Yaye isikhulu phakathi kwabo songena ekungeneni kwabo; bathi ekuphumeni kwabo, baphume."
Ezekiel46:11 Emithendelekweni nasemithendelekweni umnikelo wokudla okuziinkozo woba yiefa enkunzini yenkomo, ne-efa kuyo inkunzi yegusha, nakuzo iimvana, ibe ngangoko anokunikela ngako, ibe yihin yeoli kuyo iefa."
Ezekiel46:12 Ukuba ukumkani uthe walungiselela ukwenza idini elinyukayo, nokuba yimibingelelo yombulelo kuYehova, womvulela isango elibheke empumalanga, alilungiselele idini lakhe elinyukayo nemibingelelo yakhe yombulelo, njengoko ebesenza ngomhla wesabatha; kufuneka uphume ngoku; yaye emva kokuba ephumile, omnye uyavala isango."
Ezekiel46:13 Uze wenze idini elinyukayo kuYehova ngemini, ngemvana emnyaka mnye, egqibeleleyo; woyilungisa imiso ngemiso."
Ezekiel46:14 Wolungiselela yona imiso ngemiso, ukudla kwasemlilweni, sibe sisahlulo sesithandathu se-efa, neoli ibe sisahlulo sesithathu sehin yokuthambisa umgubo ocoliweyo; loba lidini elinyukayo lamaxesha onke kuYehova, libe ngumthetho ongunaphakade."
Ezekiel46:15 Ngoko ntsasa nganye bamele balungiselele imvana nomnikelo wokudla okuziinkozo neoli njengomnikelo otshiswayo othe rhoqo.
Ezekiel46:16 Itsho iNkosi uYehova; Ukuba ukumkani uthe wampha omnye woonyana bakhe isipho, ilifa lakhe loba ngoonyana bakhe; liya kuba lilifa labo."
Ezekiel46:17 Ukuba sithe sampha omnye kubakhonzi baso isipho elifeni laso, soba sesalowo kude kube ngumnyaka wenkululeko; emva koko iya kubuyela kukumkani, libe lilifa loonyana bakhe kubo."
Ezekiel46:18 Isikhulu asibanyathelanga ilifa labantu, ukuba sibagxothe empahleni yabo; Kodwa uya kubanika oonyana bakhe ilifa ebutyebini bakhe, ukuze bangabi lusali abantu bam, elowo elifeni lakhe."
Ezekiel46:19 Emva kokundizisa emnyango osecaleni lesango, emagumbini okudlela angcwele ababingeleli, akhangele ngasemntla;"
Ezekiel46:20 Waqhubeka wathi kum: “Le yindawo apho ababingeleli baya kuphekela khona idini letyala nedini lesono, apho baya kuphekela khona idini elinyukayo; ukuze bangayikhuphi ngaphandle, ukuba bangcwalise abantu."
Ezekiel46:21 Wandisa entendelezweni engaphandle, wandisa emagumbini omane entendelezo; nanko kukho intsimi ezimbombeni zentsimi."
Ezekiel46:22 Emagumbini omane entendelezo kwakukho iintendelezo ezihlangeneyo, ubude baso buziikubhite ezimashumi mane, ububanzi buziikubhite ezimashumi mathathu;"
Ezekiel46:23 Kwaye kwenziwa intsika ngeenxa zonke kuzo zone;
Ezekiel46:24 Wathi kum, Ezi ziindawo zabapheki, apho abakhonzi bendlu baya kupheka khona umbingelelo wesidlangalala."
Ezekiel47:1 Yandibuyisela emnyango wayo indlu; Ndabona amanzi ephuma phantsi komnyango wendlu, esingise empumalanga; ngokuba umphambili wendlu ubumi ngasempumalanga, amanzi abe evela ezantsi ecaleni lasempumalanga kuyo indlu, ngecala lasezantsi leziko."
Ezekiel47:2 Wandisa ngendlela yesango langasentla, wandihambisa ngendlela engaphandle, wesa esangweni elingaphandle, ngendlela ekhangele empumalanga; ndabona amanzi empompoza kwicala lasekunene."
Ezekiel47:3 Xa indoda leyo iphethe umtya esandleni sayo, yaphuma yasinga empumalanga, yalinganisa iwaka leekubhite, yandisa emanzini; amanzi enyuke efikelela emaqatheni."
Ezekiel47:4 Wabuya walinganisa iwaka, wandithuthuzela emanzini; amanzi ayefika emadolweni. Wabuya walinganisa iwaka, wandithuthuzela; amanzi ebefika esinqeni."
Ezekiel47:5 Walinganisa iwaka; ibingumlambo endingenakuwuwela, kuba amanzi ebenyuka njengamanzi odada, njengomlambo ongawelekiyo."
Ezekiel47:6 Wathi kum, Ubonile na, nyana womntu? Yandibuyisela elunxwemeni lomlambo."
Ezekiel47:7 Ekubuyeni kwam, nanko kukho imithi emininzi elunxwemeni lomlambo, ngapha nangapha;"
Ezekiel47:8 Yathi kum, La manzi aqukuqela esiya ezweni lasempumalanga, ehla entlango, angena elwandle;"
Ezekiel47:9 Kuya kuthi ke, yonke into ephilileyo, enyakazelayo ezindaweni zonke othe wafika kuzo umlambokazi lowo, iphile; zibe zininzi kunene iintlanzi; ngokuba osuka efike khona la manzi, ngokuba ophiliswa; kwaye yonke into iya kuphila apho ufika khona umlambo."
Ezekiel47:10 Kuya kuma ababambisi beentlanzi phezu kwawo, bathabathele e-En-gedi, baye e-En-heglayim; iya kuba yindawo yokwaneka iminatha; ziya kuba ngokohlobo lwazo iintlanzi zabo, njengeentlanzi zoLwandle Olukhulu, ukuba zininzi kunene."
Ezekiel47:11 Ke iindawo zalo ezinodaka nemigxobhozo yalo aziyi kuphiliswa; baya kunikwa ityuwa.
Ezekiel47:12 Kufuphi nomlambo, ngaseludinini lwawo, ngapha nangapha, yonke imithi iya kuhluma edliwayo, engabuni amagqabi, nesiqhamo sawo singatshi; liya kuthwala isiqhamo esitsha ngeenyanga zalo, ngokuba amanzi alo aphuma engcweleni;"
Ezekiel47:13 Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Yiyo le imida eniya kuyidla ilifa ilizwe ngokwezizwe ezilishumi elinazibini zakwaSirayeli: uYosefu woba namacandelo amabini."
Ezekiel47:14 Ilizwe niya kulidla ilifa, elowo kummelwane wakhe, ngokuba ndasiphakamisa isandla sam ukuba ndilinike ooyihlo; loba lilifa lenu eli lizwe."
Ezekiel47:15 Nguwo lo umda welizwe langasentla, wothabathela kuLwandle Olukhulu ngendlela yeHetolone, ukuba baye eSedade;"
Ezekiel47:16 neHamati, neBherota, neSibrayim, phakathi komda weDamasko nomda waseHamati; eHatsarhathikone elunxwemeni lwaseHaurane."
Ezekiel47:17 Umda uthabathela elwandle, uthabathele eHatsare-enon, umda waseDamasko; Licala langasentla ke."
Ezekiel47:18 Ngecala lasempumalanga wolinganisa iHawuran neDamasko neGiliyadi, uthabathela ezweni lakwaSirayeli, iYordan; Licala lasempumalanga ke eli."
Ezekiel47:19 Ngecala lasezantsi ukuya ngasezantsi, uthabathela kwaTamare, wesa emanzini aseMeribhane-Kadeshe, umlambo uya kufika eLwandle oluKhulu. Licala lasezantsi ke elo, ukuya ngasezantsi."
Ezekiel47:20 Ngasentshonalanga koLwandle Olukhulu, ukusuka emdeni, kude kuse eHamati. Licala lasentshonalanga ke elo."
Ezekiel47:21 Zabelani ke eli lizwe ngokwezizwe zakwaSirayeli.
Ezekiel47:22 Lahlula ngamaqashiso, libe lilifa kuni, nakubaphambukeli abaphambukele kuni, abazele oonyana phakathi kwenu; kuwe baya kuba njengabazalelwe kwelo zwe phakathi koonyana bakaSirayeli; aya kudla ilifa ndawonye nawe phakathi kwezizwe zakwaSirayeli."
Ezekiel47:23 Nomnika ilifa lakhe emzalwaneni womphambukeli, ophambukele kuni; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Ezekiel48:1 Ngawo la amagama ezizwe. Ithabathele ekupheleni ngasentla, iye emdeni wendlela yaseHetelone, iye eHamati naseHatsare-enon, umda waseDamasko ngasentla, use emdeni waseHamati; Kuba la ngamacala alo ngasempumalanga nasentshonalanga; inxalenye kaDan."
Ezekiel48:2 Ngasemdeni kaDan, kuthabathela kumda wasempumalanga, kuse emdeni wasentshona, nguAshere."
Ezekiel48:3 Ngasemdeni ka-Ashere, kuthabathela ecaleni lasempumalanga, kuse kumda wasentshonalanga, iNafetali ibe nye."
Ezekiel48:4 Ngasemdeni kaNafetali, kuthabathela ecaleni lasempumalanga, kuse emdeni wasentshona, yoba nguManase."
Ezekiel48:5 Ngasemdeni kaManase, kuthabathela ecaleni lasempumalanga, kuse emdeni wasentshona, uEfrayim elinye."
Ezekiel48:6 Ngasemdeni kaEfrayim, kuthabathela empumalanga kuse entshonalanga, nguRubhen."
Ezekiel48:7 Ngasemdeni kaRubhen, kuthabathela kumda wasempumalanga, kuse emdeni wasentshonalanga: elakwaYuda."
Ezekiel48:8 Ngasemdeni wakwaYuda, kuthabathela kumda wasempumalanga, kuse kumda wasentshona, umrhumo oya kuwuzisa woba ngamashumi amabini anamahlanu amawaka eekubhite ububanzi, nobude bulingane nelinye icala, ukuthabathela empumalanga kuse entshonalanga nengcwele iya kuba kuyo."
Ezekiel48:9 Umnikelo wasemlilweni oya kuwuzisa kuYehova ufanele ube ngamashumi amabini anesihlanu amawaka ubude neshumi lamawaka ububanzi.
Ezekiel48:10 Lo mnikelo ungcwele uya kuba ngowababingeleli; ngasentla ibe ngamashumi amabini anamahlanu amawaka ubude, nasentshona ibe lishumi lamawaka ububanzi, nangasempumalanga ibe lishumi lamawaka ububanzi, nangasezantsi ingamashumi amabini anesihlanu amawaka ubude yaye ingcwele kaYehova iya kuba lapho ngayo."
Ezekiel48:11 Ibe yeyababingeleli abangcwalisiweyo, oonyana bakaTsadoki; abahlambulukileyo enkonzweni yam, abalahlekanga ekulahlekeni koonyana bakaSirayeli, njengoko balahlekayo abaLevi."
Ezekiel48:12 Lo mbingelelo welizwe elibingelelweyo woba yeyona nto ingcwele kubo emdeni wabaLevi.
Ezekiel48:13 Ke endaweni yababingeleli, abaLevi boba ngamashumi amabini anamahlanu amawaka ubude, neshumi lamawaka ububanzi; bonke ubude bube ngamashumi amabini anamahlanu amawaka, nobubanzi bube lishumi lamawaka."
Ezekiel48:14 Ize bangayithengisi, banganibanisi ngayo, banganikeli amazibulo elizwe elo, ngokuba ingcwele kuYehova."
Ezekiel48:15 Okuseleyo kumawaka amahlanu ububanzi, ethabathela kumawaka angamashumi amabini anamahlanu, kube yindawo eyinqambi yesixeko, yeyokuhlala nedlelo; isixeko soba sesazulwini sayo."
Ezekiel48:16 Zizo ke ezi izilinganiso zakhe; Umda wasemntla ungamawaka amane anamakhulu amahlanu, nomda wasemzantsi ungamawaka amane anamakhulu amahlanu, nasempuma amawaka amane anamakhulu mahlanu, nomda wasentshona ube ngamawaka amane anamakhulu mane anesihlanu."
Ezekiel48:17 Idlelo lesixeko ngasentla liya kuba ngamakhulu amabini anamashumi amahlanu, ngasezantsi libe ngamakhulu amabini anamashumi amahlanu, ngasempuma libe ngamakhulu amabini anamashumi amahlanu, nasentshonalanga libe ngamakhulu amabini anamashumi amahlanu."
Ezekiel48:18 Okuseleyo entlango kumrhumo ongcwele koba ngamawaka alishumi ngasempuma, neshumi lamawaka ngasentshonalanga; ibe ichasene nomsondezo ongcwele; yaye imveliso yawo yoba kukutya kwabo bakhonza esixekweni."
Ezekiel48:19 Abasebenza esixekweni baya kusilungiselela ezizweni zonke zakwaSirayeli.
Ezekiel48:20 Umnikelo wokudla okuziinkozo uphela ube ngamashumi amabini anesihlanu amawaka, anamashumi amabini anesihlanu amawaka; ninikele umnikelo wokudla ongcwele kwangokunjalo nangempahla yesixeko."
Ezekiel48:21 Okuseleyo koba kokumkani, ngaphaya komrhumo ongcwele, nakomhlaba wesixeko, ukuya kutsho kumashumi amabini anesihlanu amawaka edini lomlilo ngasempumalanga, ngasentshonalanga, kumda wasentshonalanga, kumda wewaka elinamanci mabini anamahlanu. Yehova, ngokuchasene nesabelo sokumkani; loba lidini elingcwele; nengcwele yendlu yoba sesazulwini sayo."
Ezekiel48:22 Kumhlaba wabaLevi, ukususela kumhlaba wesixeko, phakathi komda wenkosi, phakathi komda wakwaYuda nomda wakwaBhenjamin, kuya kuba ngowokumkani."
Ezekiel48:23 Ke zona izizwe eziseleyo, ukususela kumda osempuma ukusa kumda wasentshona, uBhenjamin uya kuba nesabelo."
Ezekiel48:24 Emdeni wakwaBhenjamin, kuthabathela kumda wasempumalanga, kuse kumda wasentshonalanga, uSimon woba nesabelo esinye."
Ezekiel48:25 Ngasemdeni kaSimon, kuthabathela kumda wasempumalanga, kuse emdeni wasentshona, nguIsakare."
Ezekiel48:26 Ngasemdeni wakwaIsakare, kuthabathela ecaleni lasempumalanga, kuse emdeni wasentshona, iZebhulon ibe nye."
Ezekiel48:27 Ngasemdeni wakwaZebhulon, ukusuka empumalanga kuye entshonalanga, nguGadi."
Ezekiel48:28 Umda kaGadi, ngasezantsi, ngasezantsi umda, wothabathela kwaTamare, use emanzini emfazwe eKadeshe, use umlambo, use kuLwandle oluKhulu."
Ezekiel48:29 Lilo eli ilizwe oya kuzabela izizwe zakwaSirayeli njengelifa, yaye ezi zizabelo zazo, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Ezekiel48:30 Zizo ezo iimbombo zomzi, ngecala langasentla: ngamawaka amane anamakhulu mahlanu eekorale;"
Ezekiel48:31 amasango omzi ongokwamagama ezizwe zakwaSirayeli; ngamasango amathathu ngasentla; isango likaRubhen liya kuba linye, isango likaYuda libe linye, isango likaLevi libe linye."
Ezekiel48:32 Ngasempumalanga koba ngamawaka amane anamakhulu amahlanu, abe namasango amathathu; Isango likaYosefu liya kuba linye, isango likaBhenjamin liya kuba linye, isango likaDan libe linye."
Ezekiel48:33 Ngecala lasezantsi ngamawaka amane anamakhulu amahlanu eekubhite, namasango amathathu; ibe lisango likaSimon, elinye libe lisango likaIsakare, libe lisango likaZebhulon;"
Ezekiel48:34 Ngecala lasentshonalanga ngamawaka amane anamakhulu mahlanu, namasango awo mathathu; libe lisango likaGadi, libe lisango lika-Ashere, libe lisango lakwaNafetali."
Ezekiel48:35 Koba ngathi ishumi elinesibhozo lamawaka eemilinganiselo, yaye igama laloo mzi ukususela ngaloo mini liya kuthi: uYehova ulapho."
Daniel1:1 Ngomnyaka wesithathu wobukumkani bukaYehoyakim ukumkani wakwaYuda, kweza uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani waseBhabheli eYerusalem, wayingqinga."
Daniel1:2 uYehova wamnikela esandleni sakhe uYehoyakim ukumkani wakwaYuda, nenxalenye yempahla yendlu kaTHIXO oyinyaniso, leyo wazizisa kwilizwe laseShinare endlwini yothixo wakhe; yaye ezo zinto wazizisa kwindawo yokugcina ubuncwane bothixo wakhe."
Daniel1:3 Wathi ukumkani kuAspenazi, umthetheli wabalungiseleli bakhe, makazise koonyana bakaSirayeli, nakwimbewu yokumkani, nabathetheli;"
Daniel1:4 Abantwana abangenasiphako kubo, kodwa abathandekayo nabanobuchule kubo bonke ubulumko neexhalanga zolwazi nokuqonda kwenzululwazi, ababenokuma endlwini yokumkani nabo bathi xa ndibafundisa imfundo nolwimi yamaKaledi."
Daniel1:5 Ukumkani ubebanika into yemini ngangemini yayo, ekudleni kokumkani nasewayinini yakhe; wabondla iminyaka emithathu, ukuze ekupheleni beme phambi kokumkani."
Daniel1:6 Phakathi kwabo kwakukho oonyana bakaYuda, uDaniyeli, uHananiya, uMishayeli, noAzariya;"
Daniel1:7 Umphathiswa wamthiya igama, ngenxa yokuba wamthiya igama elinguDaniyeli ngokuba nguBheleshatsare; uHananiya njengoShadraki; noMishayeli kaMeshaki; uAzariya wathi nguAbhede-nego."
Daniel1:8 uDaniyeli wagqiba entliziyweni yakhe, ukuba angazingcolisi ngokudla kokumkani nangewayini ayiselayo; ngoko ke wambongoza umantyi ukuba angamngcolisi."
Daniel1:9 uYehova wamenzela inceba nemfesane uDaniyeli kumthetheli-waka wababusi.
Daniel1:10 Umthetheli wenkundla wathi kuDaniyeli, Ndiyamoyika ukumkani, inkosi yam, omise eniya kukudla, nento eniya kuyisela; Uze uyifake intloko yam kukumkani."
Daniel1:11 Wathi ke uDaniyeli kuMeltsare, owayemise umphathi-mkhosi ukuba avele uDaniyeli, uHananiya, uMishayeli noAzariya, wathi:"
Daniel1:12 Balinge abakhonzi bakho iintsuku ezilishumi; asinika imifuno ukuba sidle, namanzi ukuba asele."
Daniel1:13 Ubuso bethu mabube bubuso bakho, nobuso babantwana abadla ukudla kokumkani, wenze kubakhonzi bakho ngokuthanda kwakho."
Daniel1:14 Wabavumela kuloo nto, wabacikida iintsuku ezilishumi."
Daniel1:15 Ekupheleni kweentsuku ezilishumi, yabonakala imbonakalo yabo intle, betyebile, ngaphezu kwabantwana bonke abadla ukudla kokumkani."
Daniel1:16 Wathabatha ke uMeltsare inxalenye yenyama yabo newayini ababefanele ukuyisela; bawanikela amandla abo.
Daniel1:17 Aba bantwana bane ke uThixo ubanike ukwazi, nokwazi, nobulumko; kwaye uDaniyeli wayeyiqonda yonke imibono namaphupha."
Daniel1:18 Ekupheleni kweentsuku awayethe maziziswe ngazo ukumkani, inkosana yabalungiseleli yabazisa phambi koNebhukadenetsare."
Daniel1:19 Wathetha ukumkani kubo; kubo bonke kwafunyanwa abanjengoDaniyeli, noHananiya, noMishayeli, noAzariya; besakuma phambi kokumkani."
Daniel1:20 Kuyo yonke imibandela yobulumko nengqiqo awababuza yona ukumkani, wafumanisa ukuba babebadlula ngokuphindwe kalishumi bonke abenzi bomlingo nabavumisi ngeenkwenkwezi ababesebukumkanini bakhe buphela."
Daniel1:21 uDaniyeli wahlala kwada kwangumnyaka wokuqala kaKoreshi ukumkani.
Daniel2:1 Ngomnyaka wesibini wobukumkani bukaNebhukadenetsare, uNebhukadenetsare waphupha amaphupha; waphazamiseka umoya wakhe, walala ubuthongo."
Daniel2:2 Ukumkani wathi makubizwe izanuse, nabakhafuli, nabakhafuli, namaKaledi, ukuba bamxelele ukumkani amaphupha akhe. Baya kwandula ke beme phambi kokumkani."
Daniel2:3 Wathi uYehova kubo, Ndiphuphe iphupha;"
Daniel2:4 Athi amaKaledi akwa-Aram kukumkani, Yehova, yidla ubomi ngonaphakade! balawulele abakhonzi bakho iphupha elo, solutyhila usindiso."
Daniel2:5 Waphendula ukumkani wathi kumaGalati, Indishiyile le nto; ukuba anithanga nindixelele iphupha, nokutyhilwa kwalo, niya kwenziwa iziqwenga, izindlu zenu zibe ngamanxuwa."
Daniel2:6 Ukuba nithe nalityhila iphupha, nokutyhilwa kwalo, nozuza izipho, nemivuzo, nembeko enkulu kum; ke ngoko, mandilazise iphupha nokutyhilwa kwalo."
Daniel2:7 Aphendula okwesibini athi, uYehova makabalawulele abakhonzi bakhe iphupha elo; sokuxelela ukutyhilwa kwalo."
Daniel2:8 uNdikhoyo waphendula wathi: “Ndiyazi ukuba uza kukhululeka, kuba uyabona ukuba le nto indishiyile."
Daniel2:9 Kodwa ukuba anithanga nindichazele elo phupha, mnye kuphela umyalelo kuni: kuba nilungiselele amazwi obuxoki nawonakeleyo ukuba niwathethe phambi kobuso bam de kutshintshe ixesha; nindixelele ke iphupha elo, ndazi ke ukuba nondixelela ukutyhilwa kwalo."
Daniel2:10 Aphendula amaKaledi phambi kokumkani, athi, Akukho mntu ehlabathini lonke uyixelayo indaba kakumkani;"
Daniel2:11 Yinto engaqhelekanga leyo ukumkani ayifunayo; akukho bani unokuyixela phambi kokumkani, ingengako oothixo abakhaya lingekho senyameni."
Daniel2:12 Waqumba ke ukumkani, waba noburhalarhume obukhulu, wathi mazibulawe zonke izilumko zaseBhabheli."
Daniel2:13 Kwaphuma umthetho wokuba mazibulawe izilumko; kwaye babefuna ukuba uDaniyeli namahlakani akhe babulawe.
Daniel2:14 Wandula ke uDaniyeli wathetha ngecebo nangobulumko kuAriyogi umthetheli wamafanankosi kakumkani owayephumele ukubulala izilumko zaseBhabhiloni.
Daniel2:15 Waphendula wathi kuAriyoge, umthetheli-mkhosi wokumkani, Yini na ukuba umthetho onje ukuba bukhali kokumkani? Emva koko uArioges wayityhilela le nto kuDaniyeli."
Daniel2:16 Waza uDaniyeli wangena, wacela ukumkani ukuba amnike ixesha, aze amcacisele ukumkani."
Daniel2:17 Emva koko uDaniyeli waya endlwini yakhe waza waxelela abahlobo bakhe uHananiya noMishayeli noAzariya ngale nto;
Daniel2:18 ukuze bacele inceba kuThixo wamazulu, ngayo le mfihlelo; ukuze bangatshatyalaliswa uDaniyeli namakholwane akhe, ndawonye nezilumko zaseBhabheli."
Daniel2:19 Waza wayityhilelwa uDaniyeli loo mfihlakalo ngombono wasebusuku. Waza uDaniyeli wambonga uThixo wamazulu.
Daniel2:20 Waphendula uDaniyeli wathi, Malibongwe igama likaThixo ngonaphakade kanaphakade, ngokuba ubulumko nobugorha bobakhe."
Daniel2:21 Yena uyawaguqula ke amaxesha namaxesha; uguzula ookumkani, amise ookumkani; Unika ubulumko kwizilumko, unika ukwazi kwabakwaziyo ukuqonda."
Daniel2:22 Yena utyhila into enzulu nezisitheleyo; uyakwazi okusebumnyameni, kuhleli ukukhanya kubo."
Daniel2:23 Ndiyabulela kuwe yaye ndiyakudumisa, Thixo woobawo, ondinike ubulumko namandla yaye ngoku undazise oko besikucelile kuwe, ngenxa yokuba usazisile ngoku umbandela welizwe elingcwele ukumkani."
Daniel2:24 uDaniyeli waya kuAriyogi, lowo wayeyalelwe ngukumkani ukuba atshatyalaliswe izilumko zaseBhabheli waya wathi kuye, Musa ukuzitshabalalisa izilumko zaseBhabheli; Ndizise kukumkani, ukuze ndimxelele ukumkani ingcaciso."
Daniel2:25 uAriyogi wangxama wamsa uDaniyeli kukumkani, wathi kuye, Ndifumene indoda yamabanjwa akwaYuda, ize kubikela ukumkani le ngcaciso."
Daniel2:26 Waphendula uYehova, wathi kuDaniyeli, ogama linguBheletshatsare, Ungakwazi na ukundixelela iphupha endilibonileyo, nokutyhilwa kwalo?"
Daniel2:27 Waphendula uDaniyeli phambi kokumkani, wathi, Imfihlakalo abeyicelile ukumkani, izilumko, nabakhwitsi, nabakhwitsi, nabakhafuli, abayi kuyixela kukumkani;"
Daniel2:28 Kodwa ke kukho uThixo emazulwini, ozityhilayo iimfihlakalo, onokumazisa ukumkani uNebhukadenetsare okuya kubakho ekupheleni kwemihla. Lilo elo iphupha lenu, nobuso beentloko zenu ezinkukweni zenu;"
Daniel2:29 Wena kumkani, izicamango zakho zathi tyaba kuwe, esesililini sakho, ukuba kuya kubakho ntoni na emveni koko; noMtyhili weemfihlakalo uyakwazisa okuya kubakho."
Daniel2:30 Mna le mfihlakalo, ukuyityhilelwa kwam, akungenxa yobulumko endinabo ngaphezu kwabaphilileyo bonke; kungenxa yokuba ndiya kumazisa ukumkani le mfihlakalo, ukuze uzazi izicamango zentliziyo eyakho."
Daniel2:31 Wena kumkani, ukhangele, kwaye ubone, kukho umfanekiso omkhulu. Lo mfanekiso mkhulu, kubengezela kubengezela, ubumi phambi kwakho; nokumila kwawo kwakusoyikeka."
Daniel2:32 Intloko yaloo mfanekiso ibiyigolide esulungekileyo, isifuba sawo nezandla zawo ziyisilivere, isisu sawo namanqe awo elubhedu;"
Daniel2:33 Amacala ayo asintsimbi, imilenze yawo yintsimbi, yaye inxalenye yawo ludongwe."
Daniel2:34 Wabona, lada latyumka ilitye, kungengazandla zabantu;"
Daniel2:35 Ziya kwaphulwa ndawonye isinyithi, nodongwe, nobhedu, nesilivere, negolide, zibe njengomququ wengqolowa yasehlotyeni; Wazithabatha umoya, azaba nandawo; lathi ilitye elo, libethileyo emfanekisweni, laba yintaba enkulu, lazalisa ihlabathi lonke."
Daniel2:36 Lilo elo iphupha; ingcaciso yayo soyixela phambi kokumkani.
Daniel2:37 Wena kumkani, ungukumkani wookumkani, ngenxa yokuba uThixo wamazulu ukunike ubukumkani, namandla, namandla, nozuko;"
Daniel2:38 Apho bahleli khona oonyana babantu, izinto ezizitho zine, neentaka zezulu, wazibeka ezandleni zakho, wakwenza umlawuli wazo zonke. Wena le ntloko yegolide."
Daniel2:39 Emveni kwakho kuya kuvela obunye ubukumkani obuncinane kunawe, nobunye ubukumkani besithathu bobhedu, obuya kulawula ihlabathi lonke."
Daniel2:40 Ubukumkani babo buya kuba njengesinyithi ukomelela, ngenxa enokuba isinyithi saphuka, sityumza yonke into; nanjengentsimbi eqhekeze zonke, uya kwaphuka aze aphuke."
Daniel2:41 Njengoko nizibonayo iinyawo neenzwane, enye inxalenye iludongwe lombumbi, enye inxalenye iyisinyithi, ubukumkani buya kuba bobahlukeneyo; kobakho ukomelela kwesinyithi kuwo, ngenxa enokuba isinyithi sixutywe nodongwe nodongwe."
Daniel2:42 Iinzwane beziyintsimbi ngenxalenye, ziludongwe njengenxalenye, ubukumkani buya komelela kwenye, buqhekezwe kwesinye."
Daniel2:43 Njengoko ubona isinyithi sixutywe nodongwe, baya kuxubana nembewu yomntu; kodwa aziyi kunamathelana, kanye njengoko intsimbi ingaxubani nodongwe."
Daniel2:44 Ngemihla yabo kumkani, uThixo wezulu uya kumisa ubukumkani obungayi konakala naphakade; yaye obo bukumkani abuyi kushiyelwa kwezinye iintlanga, kodwa buya kuzitshabalalisa zonke ezo zikumkani, buze bume ngonaphakade."
Daniel2:45 Nalibonayo, ukuba ilitye laqhekezwa entabeni, kungengazandla, lasiqhekeza isinyithi, nobhedu, nodongwe, nesilivere, negolide; uThixo omkhulu wamxelela ukumkani okuya kwenzeka emva koko."
Daniel2:46 Waza ukumkani uNebhukadenetsare wawa ngobuso bakhe, waqubuda kuDaniyeli, wathi maziziswe kuye umnikelo womlilo nesiqhumiso esimnandi."
Daniel2:47 uYehova wamphendula uDaniyeli, wathi, Yinyaniso ukuba uThixo wakho unguThixo woothixo, uNkosi yookumkani, umtyhili weemfihlakalo, ekubeni ukwazile ukuyityhila le mfihlelo."
Daniel2:48 Waza ukumkani wamenza mkhulu uDaniyeli, wampha izipho ezikhulu ezininzi, wammisa ukuba abe ngumphathi welizwe lonke laseBhabheli, nomthetheli wabathetheli bezilumko zonke zaseBhabheli."
Daniel2:49 Waza uDaniyeli wacela kukumkani, wabamisela ooShadraki, noMeshaki, noAbhednego, ukuba balawule iphondo laseBhabheli; ke uDaniyeli wayehleli esangweni lokumkani."
Daniel3:1 Ukumkani uNebhukadenetsare wenza umfanekiso wegolide: ukuphakama kwawo bekuziikubhite ezimashumi mathandathu, ububanzi bawo baba ziikubhite ezintandathu; wema kwintlango yaseDura, kwisithili saseBhabheli."
Daniel3:2 Ukumkani uNebhukadenetsare wathumela ukuba kubizwe abathetheli, namabamba, namabamba, nabagwebi, nabagcini-ndyebo, nabacebisi, nababusi, namabamba, nawo onke amabamba amazwe, ukuba bamise umfanekiso abewumisile uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani usete uye."
Daniel3:3 Bahlanganisana ke abathetheli, namabamba, nabathetheli, nabagwebi, noonondyebo, nabacebisi, namabamba, namabamba, nabo bonke abathetheli belizwe, ukuba bawutyhilile umfanekiso abewumisile uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani; yaye bema phambi komfanekiso awayewumisile uNebhukadenetsare."
Daniel3:4 Wadanduluka ke umthetheli wathi: “Niyalelwe, zizwe, zizwe, zilwimi;"
Daniel3:5 Xa nithe neva isandi sesigodlo, nelembande, nelekitare, nelekitare, nelohadi, nelohadi, nelohlobo lonke lweempahla zokubethwa, niwe phantsi niqubude kumfanekiso wegolide awumisileyo uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani."
Daniel3:6 Wonke umntu ongathanga awe phantsi aze athandaze uya kuphoswa ezikweni elivutha umlilo kwangelo lixa.
Daniel3:7 Ngelo xesha, sakuva lonke uhlanga isandi sembande, nempempe, nempempe, nempempe, nempempe, neempahla zonke zeempahla zonke, nezizwe zonke, nezizwe zonke, neelwimi zonke, zawa phantsi waguqa phantsi umfanekiso wegolide awayewumisile uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani uye."
Daniel3:8 Kungenxa yoko le nto kweza amaKaledi ngelo xesha, awatyhola amaYuda."
Daniel3:9 Athetha athi kukumkani uNebhukadenetsare, Yehova, yidla ubomi ngonaphakade!"
Daniel3:10 Wena ke, kumkani, uwise umthetho wokuba bonke abathe baliva izwi lembande, nelogwali, nelohadi, nelohadi, nelohadi, neleempahla zonke zeempahla zonke, bawe phantsi, baqubude kumfanekiso wegolide."
Daniel3:11 Nabani na ongawanga phantsi aze athandaze uya kuphoswa ezikweni elivutha umlilo.
Daniel3:12 Kukho amanye amaYuda, owawamise ukuba alawule iphondo laseBhabheli, angooShadraki, noMeshaki, noAbhednego; la madoda kumkani akakuhoyanga; akababusi oothixo bakho, akaqubudi kumfanekiso wegolide owumisileyo."
Daniel3:13 uNebhukadenetsare, enomsindo, enomsindo, wathi mabaziswe ooShadraki, noMeshaki, noAbhednego. Awazisa la madoda phambi kokumkani."
Daniel3:14 Waphendula uNebhukadenetsare, wathi kubo, Nenza ngabomi na, Shadraki, Meshaki, Abhede-nego, ukuthi ningambusi uthixo wam, aniqubudi kumfanekiso wegolide endiwumisileyo?"
Daniel3:15 Xa nithe nalungela, ngexesha lokuva kwenu isandi sogwali, nesempempe, nesohadi, nesehadi, nesemfama, nesazo zonke iintlobo zeempahla zokuvuma, niwe phantsi niqubude kumfanekiso endiwenzileyo; ewe, ukuba anithanga nithobele, nophoswa ezikweni elivutha umlilo; yaye ngubani na uTHIXO oya kunihlangula esandleni sam?"
Daniel3:16 Baphendula ooShadraki, noMeshaki, noAbhednego, bathi kukumkani, Nebhukadenetsare, asazi ukuba sikuphendule ngantoni na kweli lizwi;"
Daniel3:17 Ukuba kunjalo, uThixo wethu osilungiselelayo wosisindisa ezikweni elivutha umlilo, asihlangule esandleni sakho, kumkani."
Daniel3:18 Ke, ukuba akunjalo, makwazeke kuwe, kumkani, ukuba asiyi kubabusa thixo bakho, asiyi kuqubuda kumfanekiso wegolide owumisileyo."
Daniel3:19 uNebhukadenetsare wazala ngumsindo, nembonakalo yobuso bakhe yeya kuShadraki, noMeshaki, noAbhede-nego; ke ngoko, wathetha waza waziyalela ukuba zisonge ngokuphindwe kasixhenxe kunoko bekukade kusongwa."
Daniel3:20 Wathi kumadoda anamandla omkhosi wakhe, makabophe ooShadraki, noMeshaki, noAbhede-nego, babaphose ezikweni elivutha umlilo."
Daniel3:21 Aza abotshwa la madoda enxibe izambatho zawo zangaphezulu, iibhulukhwe zawo neminqwazi yawo nezinye iimpahla zawo, aze aphoswe ezikweni elivutha umlilo."
Daniel3:22 Kwathi, ngenxa yokuba ilizwi lokumkani belingqongqo, iziko belenziwe lashushu ngokuncamisileyo, ngenxa yoko ilangatye lomlilo lawabulala amadoda athwele uShadraki, noMeshaki, noAbhednego."
Daniel3:23 La madoda omathathu, ooShadraki, noMeshaki, noAbhednego, awela ezikweni elivutha umlilo, ebotshelelwe."
Daniel3:24 Wamangaliswa uNebhukadenetsare ukumkani, wema ngokukhawuleza, wathi kumaphakathi akhe, Asiwaphoselanga na la madoda mathathu akhonkxwe emlilweni? Aphendula athi kukumkani, Yinyaniso, kumkani;"
Daniel3:25 Waphendula wathi, Yabonani, ndibone amadoda amane, ehamba emlilweni, engaseva ntlungu; ukubonakala kweyesine kufana noNyana kaThixo."
Daniel3:26 Wasondela uNebhukadenetsare emnyango weziko lomlilo, wathi, Shadraki, Meshaki, Abhede-nego, bakhonzi bOsenyangweni, phumani nize apha. Emva koko uShadraki, uMeshaki noAbhednego baphuma emlilweni."
Daniel3:27 Abathetheli, namabamba, nabathetheli, nabacebi bokumkani, ababehlanganisene khona, bawabona amadoda, lomlilo ungenamandla kuwo, neenwele zingarhanga zirhawuke, neengubo zawo zingatshi eentloko, neengubo zawo zokulwa zingarhawukanga batshintshe, bengaqubhanga ivumba lomlilo lawela phezu kwabo."
Daniel3:28 Wathetha uNebhukadenetsare, wathi, Makabongwe uThixo kaShadraki, kaMeshaki, ka-Abhede-nego, osithumileyo isithunywa sakhe, wabahlangula abakhonzi bakhe, ababekholose ngaye, balijika ilizwi lokumkani, bayikhulula ngentlawulelo imizimba yabo, ukuba bakhonze nawuphi na uthixo, banganquli thixo bambi, bangamkhonzi yinqule kodwa uThixo wabo."
Daniel3:29 Ngoko ndiwisa umthetho wokuba zonke iintlanga, nezizwe zonke, neelwimi zonke, ezithetha kakubi ngoThixo kaShadraki, kaMeshaki, ka-Abhede-nego, zinqanyulwe, izindlu zabo zibe ngamanxuwa; ngokuba kungekho wumbi unjengaye inokukhulula."
Daniel3:30 Ukumkani wabanyusela uShadraki, noMeshaki, noAbhednego, wabasa kwisithili saseBhabheli;"
Daniel4:1 uNebhukadenetsare kumkani, ndizibhalele zonke izizwe, neentlanga zonke, neelwimi zonke ezimiyo ehlabathini; Uxolo malube nani."
Daniel4:2 Ndabona ukuba kulungile kum ukwenza imisebenzi ebalulekileyo, nezimanga, awazenzayo uThixo Osenyangweni."
Daniel4:3 Hayi, ukuba mkhulu kwemiqondiso yakhe! Hayi indlela enamandla ngayo imimangaliso yakhe! Ubukumkani bakhe bubukumkani bamaphakade onke, nolawulo lwakhe lukwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana."
Daniel4:4 Mna, Nebhukadenetsare, ndandiphumle endlwini yam yaye ndinempumelelo kwibhotwe lam."
Daniel4:5 Ndabona iphupha, landoyikisa, ndaneengcinga esililini sam, nobuso obusentloko, bandoyikisa."
Daniel4:6 Ndathi ke, maziziswe phambi kwam zonke izilumko zaseBhabheli, ukuba zindityhilele ukutyhilwa kwephupha elo."
Daniel4:7 Beza ke amatola, namatola, namaKaledi, namatola, ndabaxelela iphupha; kodwa abazange bandazise ngengcaciso yayo."
Daniel4:8 Ekugqibeleni wangena phambi kwam uDaniyeli, ogama linguBheleshatsare, ngokwegama lothixo wam, onomoya woothixo abangcwele; ndamxelela iphupha elo, ndathi."
Daniel4:9 Wena Bheleshatsare, sivumisi, ekubeni ndiyazi ukuba umoya woothixo abangcwele unawe yaye akukho mfihlelo ikukhathazayo, ndixelele imibono yephupha lam endilibonileyo nokutyhilwa kwalo."
Daniel4:10 Ubuso bentloko yam bunjengobuso bam esililini sam; Ndajonga ndabona umthi usesazulwini somhlaba, umde kakhulu."
Daniel4:11 Wakhula loo mthi, womelela, ukuphakama kwawo kwafikelela emazulwini, ubuso bawo bafikelela esiphelweni sehlabathi lonke."
Daniel4:12 Amagqabi awo ebemahle, neziqhamo zawo bezizininzi; bekukho ukudla kweento zonke; amarhamncwa elizwe abe emthunzini phantsi kwawo, neentaka zezulu zahlala emasebeni awo, yadla kuwo yonke inyama."
Daniel4:13 Ndabona emibonweni yentloko yam, ndisesililini sam, nanko kusihla umlindi ongowengcwele emazulwini;"
Daniel4:14 Wadanduluka kakhulu, wathi, Wugawuleni lo mthi, niwagawule amasebe awo, niwaqhawule amagqabi awo, nizichithachithe iziqhamo zawo; Makuphume phantsi kwawo amarhamncwa, neentaka emasebeni awo."
Daniel4:15 Kodwa sishiyeni isiqu seengcambu zawo emhlabeni, sibotshelelwe ngeqhina lentsimbi nobhedu, kwingca ethambileyo yelizwe; sinyakamiswe ngumbethe wezulu, sibe yinxalenye yezilo zomhlaba."
Daniel4:16 Intliziyo yakhe mayibe yeyomntu, anikwe intliziyo yenkomo; wambetha kasixhenxe."
Daniel4:17 Le nto ihamba ngokwesiko labalindi, nangosiko lwezwi labangcwele, ukuze bazi abaphilileyo, ukuba Osenyangweni unobukumkani obuphezu kwezikumkani zabantu, abunike lowo athanda ukubumisa; kwaye ukhethe yena ngaphezu kwayo amadoda aphantsi."
Daniel4:18 Mna, kumkani Nebhukadenetsare, ndalibona eli phupha. Ke kaloku, wena Bheleshatsare, ndixelele ingcaciso yayo, ngenxa yokuba zonke izilumko zobukumkani bam azinako ukundixelela loo ngcaciso; kodwa unako; ngokuba unomoya woothixo abangcwele."
Daniel4:19 Waza uDaniyeli, ogama libizwa ngokuba nguBheletsatsare, waphazamiseka umzuzwana omnye, zamothusa izicamango zakhe. Wathi ukumkani, Bheleshatsare, musa ukuyixhalela iphupha, nokutyhilwa kwalo; uBheleshatsare waphendula wathi, Nkosi yam, iphupha lisingisele kwabakuthiyileyo, nokutyhilwa kwalo likuzo iintshaba zakho."
Daniel4:20 Umthi owubonileyo, owakhulayo womelela, okuphakama kwawo kwafikelelayo ezulwini, obuso bafika ehlabathini lonke;"
Daniel4:21 omagqabi abemahle, neziqhamo zawo bezizininzi, kwaye kukho ukudla komntu wonke; ezahlala phantsi kwawo amarhamncwa, neentaka zezulu zahlala emasebeni awo."
Daniel4:22 Nguwe, kumkani, oye wakhula waza womelela, ngenxa yokuba ubukhulu bakho banda bafikelela emazulwini nolawulo lwakho lwesa eziphelweni zomhlaba."
Daniel4:23 Kwaye ukumkani wabona umlindi nabathembekileyo besihla bevela ezulwini waza wathi: Gawulani umthi nize niwutshabalalise; sishiye isiqu seengcambu zawo emhlabeni, senziwe iziko lesinyithi, nobhedu, engceni ethambileyo yelizwe; sinyakamiswe ngumbethe wezulu, sibe yinxalenye yezilo zelizwe, kude kudlule amaxesha amisiweyo asixhenxe;"
Daniel4:24 Yiyo le ingcaciso, kumkani, nomyalelo wOsenyangweni, omfikeleyo ukumkani wam:"
Daniel4:25 baya kukugxotha phakathi kwabantu, indlu yakho ibe namarhamncwa, badle utyani njengeenkomo, bakuseze ngombethe wezulu, kudlule amaxesha amisiweyo asixhenxe de yazi ukuba iNkokeli Ephakamileyo inorhulumente kurhulumente wabantu, kwaye eso sipho ifuna ukumnika yona."
Daniel4:26 Kwaye ngenxa yokuba babeyalela ukuba isiqu seengcambu zomthi masishiywe simile; Ubukumkani bakho buya kuqiniselwa kuwe, wakwazi ukuba amazulu anegunya."
Daniel4:27 Ngako oko, nkosi yam, icebo lam malikholeke kuwe, uzitshabalalise izono zakho ngobulungisa, nobugwenxa bakho ngokubabaza abaziintsizana; ukuba ingaba kukwandiswa kokuthula kwakho."
Daniel4:28 Konke oko kwamfikela ukumkani uNebhukadenetsare.
Daniel4:29 Ekupheleni kweenyanga ezilishumi elinambini, waya endlwini yobukumkani baseBhabheli."
Daniel4:30 Waphendula ukumkani wathi, Le asiyiyo na iBhabheli enkulu, endiyakhayo ngamandla am amakhulu, nangobuqaqawuli bobungangamsha bam, ukuba ibe likomkhulu?"
Daniel4:31 Lakuba lisekho elo lizwi emlonyeni wokumkani, kwavakala ilizwi ezulwini lisithi: “Wena uxelelwe, kumkani Nebhukadenetsare; Ubukumkani bukushiyile."
Daniel4:32 Baya kukugxotha phakathi kwezizwe, uhlale phakathi kwezilwanyana zelizwe; baya kukudlisa utyani njengeenkomo, kudlule amaxesha amisiweyo asixhenxe, ude wazi ukuba iNgangalala inobukumkani ebukumkanini babantu, imnike lowo imthandayo."
Daniel4:33 Kwathi ngelo lixa ilizwi likaNebhukadenetsare wagxothwa ebantwini, wadla utyani njengeenkomo, umzimba wakhe wanyakanyiswa ngumbethe wezulu, zada iinwele zakhe zakhula, zanjengeentsiba, zanjengexhalanga neenzipho zalo iintaka iintsapho."
Daniel4:34 Ekupheleni kwaloo mihla, mna Nebhukadenetsare ndawaphakamisela ezulwini amehlo am, ingqondo yam yabuyela kwakum, Osenyangweni ndamzukisa, ndamzukisa lowo uhleli ngonaphakade, obukumkani bubukumkani obungunaphakade ubukumkani bakhe bukwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana."
Daniel4:35 Baye bonke abemi behlabathi bebalelwe ekubeni yinto engento; kwaye wenza ngokwentando yakhe amabhunga ezulu naphakathi kwabemi bomhlaba; akukho bani unokusithintela isandla sakhe, athi kuye, Wenza ntoni na?"
Daniel4:36 Kwaoko intliziyo yam yabuyela kwakum; ubuqaqawuli bam nobuqaqawuli bam babuyela kum ebuqaqawulini bobukumkani bam; zandifuna abacebisi bam nezikhulu zam; ndaza ndaqiniselwa ebukumkanini bam, ndaza ndongezwa ngobuqaqawuli obugqithisileyo."
Daniel4:37 Kwaye, mna, Nebhukadenetsare, ndiyayincoma, ndiyidumisa, ndiyizukisa iNkosi yamazulu, ozenzo zakhe ziyinyaniso zonke, ozindlela zakhe zigwebayo; kwaye unokubathoba abo bahamba ngekratshi."
Daniel5:1 Ukumkani uBheleshatsare wenzela iirhuluneli zakhe eziliwaka isidlo esikhulu, wasela iwayini phambi kwaloo mawaka."
Daniel5:2 uBheleshatsare wayingcamla iwayini leyo, wathi maziziswe iimpahla zegolide nezesilivere, abezithimbile uNebhukadenetsare uyise etempileni eseYerusalem; wasela kuyo ukumkani nabathetheli bakhe, nabafazi bakhe, nezithende zakhe."
Daniel5:3 Baza bazizisa iimpahla zegolide, ezazithinjwe etempileni yendlu kaThixo eYerusalem; Wayesela khona ukumkani, nabathetheli bakhe, nabafazi bakhe, nabafazi bakhe."
Daniel5:4 Basela iwayini, babadumisa oothixo begolide, abesilivere, nobhedu, nesinyithi, nobemithi, namatye."
Daniel5:5 Kwangelo lixa kwaphuma iminwe esandleni somntu yaza yabhala esiphathweni sezibane eludongeni lwendlu yokumkani, yaye ukumkani wabona inxalenye yesandla esasibhala."
Daniel5:6 Yandula ke inkangeleko yokumkani yatshintsha, zaza zamothusa iingcamango zakhe, kangangokuba amalungu esinqe sakhe aqengqeleka namadolo akhe abethabethana."
Daniel5:7 Ukumkani waliphakamisa izwi lakhe, wabazisa oosiyazi, namaKaledi, nabakhafuli. Wathetha uYehova, wathi kwizilumko zaseBhabheli, Othe wayilesa le ncwadi, wandazisa ukutyhilwa kwayo, uya kunxitywa ingubo ebomvu, nomxokelelwane wegolide emqaleni wakhe, abe ngowesithathu enkosini ubukumkani."
Daniel5:8 Ngoko zonke izilumko zikakumkani zangena, kodwa azizange zikwazi ukuwufunda umbhalo lowo yaye azizange zimazise ukumkani intsingiselo yawo."
Daniel5:9 Wakhathazeka kakhulu ukumkani uBheleshatsare, nembonakalo yakhe yaguquka ngaphakathi kwakhe, nezikhulu zakhe zamangaliswa."
Daniel5:10 Yangena inkosazana endlwini yemigcobo, ngenxa yamazwi okumkani nabathetheli bakhe; wathetha ukumkanikazi, wathi: Owu kumkani, phila ngonaphakade;"
Daniel5:11 Kukho indoda ebukumkanini bakho onomoya woothixo abangcwele; nangemihla kayihlo kwafunyanwa kuye ukukhanya, nokuqiqa, nobulumko, obunjengobulumko boothixo; owamenza ukumkani uNebhukadenetsare, uyihlo, ukumkani, ndithi, uyihlo, abe ngukumkani wabakhafuli, nabakhafuli, namaKaledi, nabakhafuli;"
Daniel5:12 ngenxa yokuba kwafunyanwa kuye umoya omangalisayo, nokwazi, nengqiqo, ukutyhilwa kwamaphupha, nokutyhilwa kwentetho enzima, ecombulula amathandabuzo, kuDaniyeli lowo ukumkani wambiza ngokuba nguBheletshatsare; makaxelelwe uDaniyeli ngoku, acacise."
Daniel5:13 Waza uDaniyeli wasiwa phambi kokumkani. Wathi uYehova kuDaniyeli, UnguDaniyeli na, omnye wabathinjwa bakwaYuda, abathe ukumkani ubawo wabazisa ezweni lamaYuda?"
Daniel5:14 Ndivile ke ngawe, ukuba unomoya woothixo kuwe, nokuba kufunyanwa kuwe ukukhanya, nokuqiqa, nobulumko."
Daniel5:15 Zeziswa phambi kwam izilumko, ezazikhangele iinkwenkwezi, ukuba zifunde esi sibhalo, zindixelele nengcaciso yaso, kodwa aziyityhilanga ingcaciso yaloo nto."
Daniel5:16 Kwaye ndeva ngawe ukuba unako ukwenza iingcaciso nokusombulula amathandabuzo; Ukuba ke uthe wawulesa lo mbhalo, wandazisa ukutyhilwa kwawo, uya kunxitywa ingubo ebomvu, nomxokelelwane wegolide emqaleni wakho, ube ngowesithathu ebukumkanini."
Daniel5:17 Waza wathetha uDaniyeli phambi kokumkani, wathi, Izipho zakho zezakho; ndiya kuyifundela ukumkani incwadi, ndimazise ingcaciso."
Daniel5:18 uYehova, uThixo Osenyangweni wamnika uNebhukadenetsare uyihlo ubukumkani, nobukhulu, nozuko, nozuko;"
Daniel5:19 Yaye ngenxa yobukhulu awabunikwayo, zonke izizwe nezizwe nezizwe neelwimi zazingcangcazela yaye zoyika phambi kwakhe; yaye lowo amthandayo wamgcina ephila; kwanabo athanda ukubavusa; naleyo wayefuna ukuyibeka phantsi."
Daniel5:20 Ke xeshikweni intliziyo yakhe yaziphakamisayo, yaqaqadeka intliziyo yakhe, wakhukhumala, wehliswa etroneni yakhe, baluhlutha ubungangamsha bakhe."
Daniel5:21 Kwaye walahlwa phakathi koonyana babantu; intliziyo yakhe yaba njengeyeenkomo, wahlala namahashe asendle; ade azi ukuba uThixo Osenyangweni nguye olawula izikumkani zabantu, umisa lowo athanda ukumnika."
Daniel5:22 Wena ke, nyana wakhe, Bheleshatsare, akuyithobanga intliziyo yakho, nakuba ubukwazi oko konke;"
Daniel5:23 Uziphakamisile eNkosini yamazulu; iimpahla zendlu yakhe zazibeka phambi kwakho; nasela iwayini ngazo wena, nabathetheli bakho, nabafazi bakho, namashweshwe akho; ubadumise oothixo besilivere, nabegolide, nabobhedu, nabesinyithi, nabemithi, nabamatye, abangaboniyo, abangeva, nabangakwaziyo; akumzukisanga uThixo, osesandleni sakhe ukuphefumla kwakho, osesandleni sakhe zonke iindlela zakho."
Daniel5:24 Sasuswa kuye inxalenye yesandla; kwabhalwa ke lo mbhalo.
Daniel5:25 Nguwo lo ke umbhalo obhaliweyo: MENE, MENE, TEKELE, UFARSIN."
Daniel5:26 Nantsi ukuchazwa kwetyala: MENE; uThixo ubufundile ubukumkani bakho, waza wabufeza."
Daniel5:27 TEATLE; Ulinganiswe esikalini, kwaye ufunyenwe ubuthathaka."
Daniel5:28 PERES; Bahlulwa ubukumkani bakho, banikwa amaMedi namaPersi."
Daniel5:29 Waza uBheleshatsare wakhupha umyalelo, baza bamnxibisa uDaniyeli ingubo ebomvu nentsimbi yomqala yegolide emqaleni wakhe baza bamxelela ukuba uya kuba ngowabathathu umlawuli ebukumkanini."
Daniel5:30 Ngobo busuku wabulawa uBheleshatsare ukumkani wamaKaledi.
Daniel5:31 uDariyo umMedi wabuthabatha ubukumkani, eminyaka ikumashumi mathandathu anamibini ezelwe."
Daniel6:1 Kwakholeka kuDariyo ukunyula iirhuluneli ezilikhulu elinamanci mabini, ukuba zibe nokulawula kubo bonke ubukumkani."
Daniel6:2 Malunga nabongameli aba bathathu; awathi uDaniyeli waba ngowokuqala kubo, ukuze abathetheli babaphendule, angaphathwa bububi ukumkani."
Daniel6:3 Waza lo Daniyeli wakhethwa ukuba alawule iintloko neenkosana, ngenxa yokuba umoya wawumlungele; ukumkani wacinga ukumenza umphathi kubo bonke ubukumkani."
Daniel6:4 Ngoku iinkokeli nabathetheli bafuna ukufumana isizathu ngakuDaniyeli malunga nobukumkani; kwaye ababona siphoso; ngokuba ebethembekile, akufunyanwanga tyala natyala kuye."
Daniel6:5 Aza athi la madoda, Asiyi kufumana nalinye ithuba ngakulo Daniyeli, ukuba asilifumananga kuye ngenxa yomthetho woThixo wakhe."
Daniel6:6 Bahlanganisana abo bathetheli nabaziirhuluneli kukumkani, bathi kuye, Kumkani Dariyo, phila ngonaphakade!"
Daniel6:7 Bonke abaphathi bobukumkani, namabamba, nabathetheli, nabacebisi, namabamba, bacebisana ukuba bawumise umthetho wakomkhulu, benze isigqibo esimisiweyo sokuba nabani na ocela isicelo kuThixo nokuba nguwuphi na, makacele into kuye iintsuku ezimashumi mathathu, kodwa wena, kumkani, uya kuphoswa emhadini weengonyama."
Daniel6:8 Ke kaloku, kumkani, khupha umyalelo uze uwutyobele uxwebhu, ukuze lungaguquki, ngokomthetho wamaMedi namaPersi, ongaguqukiyo."
Daniel6:9 Ngoko ukumkani uDariyo wayibhala loo ncwadi nomthetho.
Daniel6:10 Weva uDaniyeli ukuba incwadi leyo ibisayinwe, wangena endlwini yakhe; iifestile zegumbi lakhe zivuliwe, zikhangele eYerusalem, waguqa ngamadolo kathathu ngemini, ethandaza, ebulela kuThixo wakhe, njengoko ebesenza ngaphambili."
Daniel6:11 Ahlanganisana ke la madoda, amfumana uDaniyeli ethandaza, etarhuzisa phambi koThixo wakhe."
Daniel6:12 Basondela, bathetha kukumkani ngelizwi lokumkani; Akuwubhalanga na umthetho wokuba bonke abasukuba becela into kuThixo nakuwuphi na umntu, ngeentsuku ezimashumi mathathu, ingenguwe kumkani, aphoswe emhadini weengonyama? Waphendula ukumkani, wathi, Loo nto iyinyaniso, ngokomthetho wamaMedi namaPersi, ongaguqukiyo."
Daniel6:13 Aza aphendula athi phambi kokumkani, uDaniyeli, ongomnye wabathinjwa bakwaYuda, akakuphulaphulanga, kumkani, nomthetho owumisileyo; ke ucela isicelo sakhe kathathu ngemini."
Daniel6:14 Wathi ukumkani akuweva loo mazwi, wabandezeleka kunene, wayibhekisa intliziyo yakhe kuDaniyeli ukuba amhlangule; wazama ukumhlangula de kwatshona ilanga."
Daniel6:15 Aza la madoda eza edlongozela kukumkani, athi kukumkani, kumkani, yazi ukuba amaMedi namaPersi anomthetho wokuba kungaguqulwangamthetho kakumkani;"
Daniel6:16 Watsho ke ukumkani; bamzisa uDaniyeli, bamjulela emhadini wengonyama. uYehova wathetha kuDaniyeli, wathi, uThixo wakho, ombusa ngamaxesha onke, wokusindisa."
Daniel6:17 Kwaziswa ilitye, labekwa emnyango womhadi; ukumkani wayiqinisa ngomsesane wakhe wokutywina, nangomsesane wokutywina wabathetheli bakhe; ukuze icebo likaDaniyeli lingaguquki."
Daniel6:18 Waza ukumkani waya ebhotweni lakhe, wachitha ubusuku ezila ukudla; yaye akuzange kubekho lizwi phambi kwakhe, waza waphelelwa bubuthongo."
Daniel6:19 Waza ukumkani wavuka kwakusasa, wangxamela ukuya emhadini weengonyama."
Daniel6:20 Yathi yakufika emhadini, yakhala kuDaniyeli; Waphendula ukumkani, wathi kuDaniyeli, Daniyeli, mkhonzi woThixo ophilileyo, uThixo wakho, ombusa ngamaxesha onke, ube nako na ukuhlangula ezingonyameni?"
Daniel6:21 Wathi ke uDaniyeli kukumkani, Nkosi, phila ngonaphakade!"
Daniel6:22 uThixo wam uthumele ingelosi yakhe, yayivala imilomo yeengonyama, ukuze zingandenzi, ngenxa yokuba phambi kwakhe kufunyenwe ndimsulwa; Andenzanga bubi phambi kwakho, kumkani."
Daniel6:23 Ukumkani wavuya kunene ngakuye, wathi makamkhuphe uDaniyeli emhadini. Wakhutshwa ke uDaniyeli emhadini, akwafunyanwa nanye into embi kuye, ngokuba ebekholwe kuThixo wakhe."
Daniel6:24 Ukumkani wayalela ukuba aziswe amadoda lawo ayemangalele uDaniyeli, aza aphoswa emhadini weengonyama, wona nabantwana bawo, nabafazi bawo; zababamba iingonyama, zawaphula onke amathambo abo, nokuba baye kufika nasezantsi emhadini."
Daniel6:25 Waza uDariyo ukumkani wabhalela kuzo zonke izizwe, neentlanga zonke, neelwimi zonke ezibe zisehlabathini lonke; Uxolo malube nani."
Daniel6:26 Ndikhupha umyalelo wokuba bonke abantu abakurhulumente wonke wobukumkani bam bangcangcazele baze boyike phambi koThixo kaDaniyeli, ngenxa yokuba unguThixo ophilayo ozinzileyo de kube sekupheleni kwexesha, yaye ‘ubukumkani bakhe abuyi kuba bume utshatyalalisiwe, yaye ubukumkani bakhe buya kwanela kude kubezekupheleni."
Daniel6:27 Ulohlangula, usindisa, wenza imiqondiso nezimanga emazulwini nasehlabathini; wamhlangula uDaniyeli emandleni eengonyama."
Daniel6:28 Lo Daniyeli waba nempumelelo ebukumkanini bukaDariyo nasebukumkanini bukaKoreshi umPersi.
Daniel7:1 Ngomnyaka wokuqala wobukumkani bukaBheleshatsare ukumkani waseBhabheli, uDaniyeli waphupha, wabona umbono esililini sakhe; walibhala phantsi iphupha elo, walishwankathela."
Daniel7:2 Wathetha uDaniyeli, wathi, Ndabona embonweni wam ebusuku, nantso imimoya yomine yasezulwini isilwa phezu kolwandle olukhulu."
Daniel7:3 Kwaphuma amarhamncwa amakhulu amane, ephuma elwandle, elinye lahlukile kwelinye."
Daniel7:4 Eyokuqala ibifana nengonyama, inamaphiko okhozi;"
Daniel7:5 Ndabona elinye irhamncwa, elesibini, lifana nebhere, limi ngaphesheya, lineembambo ezintathu emlonyeni walo phakathi kwamazinyo alo; Bathi kuye, Vuka udle inyama eninzi."
Daniel7:6 Emva kwezi zinto ndakhangela, ndabona elinye, linjengehlosi, linamaphiko entaka amane emqolo; Irhamncwa elo lalineentloko ezine; wanikwa ukumkani."
Daniel7:7 Emva kwezi zinto ndabona emibonweni yasebusuku: nalo irhamncwa lesine, eloyikekayo, elomeleleyo, elinamandla; wayenamazinyo amakhulu entsimbi; yalityumza, yaphuka, yakunyathela ngamathupha alo; laye lineempondo ezilishumi."
Daniel7:8 Ndazijonga iimpondo, ndabona olunye uphondo oluncinane phakathi kwazo, oluneempondo ezintathu zokuqala ezincothuliweyo nango olo phondo lwalunamehlo anjengamehlo omntu, nomlomo owawuthetha izinto ezinkulu."
Daniel7:9 Ndabona zada zaphoswa phantsi iitrone, nantso iNyongo yezi mini ihleli, ingubo yayo imhlophe njengekhephu, neenwele zentloko yayo zinjengoboya bezimvu obusulungekileyo; Itrone yakhe injengelangatye lomlilo, neevili zayo zinjengomlilo olenyayo."
Daniel7:10 Kwakuphuma umlambo womlilo phambi kwakhe, iwaka lalilungiselela, ishumi lamawaka ngaphezu kweshumi lamawaka lalimi phambi kwakhe; kwagwetywa, zavulwa iincwadi."
Daniel7:11 Ndabona ngenxa yesandi samazwi amakhulu athethwayo ngesigodlo: ndakhangela lada labulawa irhamncwa, umzimba walo watshatyalaliswa, watshiswa ngomlilo ovuthayo."
Daniel7:12 Ke zona ezinye izilwanyana zahluthwa ulawulo lwazo, kodwa zanda imihla ngemihla."
Daniel7:13 Ndabona embonweni wasebusuku, nanko onjengoNyana woMntu esiza esemafini ezulu, esiza eNkosini yemihla, yamsondeza kuye."
Daniel7:14 Wanikwa igunya, nozuko, nobukumkani, ukuze bamkhonze abantu beentlanga zonke, neentlanga zonke, neelwimi zonke; Ubukumkani bakhe bubukumkani obungunaphakade obungayi kudlula, nobukumkani bakhe bungayi konakaliswa."
Daniel7:15 Mna Daniyeli, umphefumlo wam wazibhijabhija phakathi, nentloko yam yandothusa."
Daniel7:16 Ndasondela komnye wababemi khona, ndambuza inyaniso ngezo zinto zonke. Wandixelela ke wandinika ingcaciso yezinto."
Daniel7:17 La marhamncwa makhulu, mane, ngookumkani abane abaya kubonakala emhlabeni."
Daniel7:18 Ke bona abangcwele bOsenyangweni baya kubuthabatha ubukumkani, babudle ilifa ubukumkani kude kuse ephakadeni."
Daniel7:19 Ke kaloku ndinga ndinga ndingangayazi inyaniso ngeli rhamncwa lesine, elahlukileyo kuwo onke, loyikeka kakhulu, elimazinyo asisinyithi, elizinzipho zobhedu; owayidlayo, waqhekeza, wayinyathela ngeenyawo into eseleyo;"
Daniel7:20 neempondo ezilishumi ezibe zisentlokweni yaso, kwabonakala ezinye iimpondo, ezintathu kuzo zawa phambi kwaso; uphondo olunamehlo, nomlomo uthetha izinto ezininzi ezinkulu, okubonakala kunamandla ngaphezu kwamadlelane alo."
Daniel7:21 Ndabona, kwaza kwalwa olu phondo lwabangcwele, lwaboyisa;"
Daniel7:22 ade afike uMnini-mihla, bagwetywe abangcwele bOsenyangweni; kwaye ixesha liyakufika lokuba abathembekileyo bathabathe ubukumkani."
Daniel7:23 Wathi, Irhamncwa lesine kuya kubakho ubukumkani besine ehlabathini, obungayi kwahluka kuzo zonke ezinye izikumkani, buliphanzise elimiweyo liphela, bulinyathele, bulityumze."
Daniel7:24 Iimpondo ezilishumi eziphuma kobo bukumkani ngookumkani abalishumi abaya kuma, kume omnye emva kwabo; yaye uya kwahluka kowokuqala, yaye uya kuthoba ookumkani abathathu."
Daniel7:25 Uya kuthetha amazwi amakhulu nxamnye nOyena Uphakamileyo aze abatshabalalise abangcwele bOyena Uphakamileyo aze acinge ukutshintsha amaxesha nemithetho, yaye kuya kunikelwa esandleni sakhe ngexesha namathuba nezahlulo zamaxesha."
Daniel7:26 Kodwa ke umgwebo uya kuhlala, kwaye baya kubuthabatha ubukumkani bakhe, baphanzise kwaye batshabalalise kude kube sekupheleni."
Daniel7:27 Ubukumkani, nolawulo, nobukhulu bezikumkani, phantsi kwezulu lonke, buya kunikwa abantu abangcwele bOsenyangweni, obukumkani bubukumkani obungunaphakade, nezikumkani zonke ziya kumkhonza, zimve;"
Daniel7:28 Yaza kuphela apha le nto. Ke yena uDaniyeli, izicamango zam zandothusa kakhulu, ubuso bam baguquka; kodwa ndawugcina loo mbandela entliziyweni yam."
Daniel8:1 Ngomnyaka wesithathu wokulawula kukaBheleshatsare ukumkani, mna, Daniyeli wam, ndabona umbono emva kowokuqala owabonakalayo kum."
Daniel8:2 Ndabona embonweni; ndakubona oko, ndiseShushan komkhulu, kummandla wakwaElam; ndabona embonweni, yaye ndandisecaleni komlambo iUlayi."
Daniel8:3 Ndawaphakamisa amehlo am, ndakhangela, nantso inkunzi yegusha imi ngasemlanjeni, ineempondo ezimbini; zaphakama iimpondo zombini; kodwa enye yayiphakame kakhulu kunomnye, kwaye ephakamileyo yayingasemva."
Daniel8:4 Ndabona inkunzi yegusha ityhoboza, ibhekisa entshonalanga, entla, nasezantsi; akwabakho ukuma phambi kwayo, akwabakho unokuhlangula esandleni sayo; kodwa wenza ngokuthanda kwakhe, wakhula."
Daniel8:5 Ndithe ndisakukhumbula oko, kwathi gqi inkunzi yebhokhwe entshonalanga, iye kulo lonke ihlabathi, ingawuchukumisi umhlaba; yaye ibhokhwe yayinophondo olumangalisayo phakathi kwamehlo ayo."
Daniel8:6 Yafika enkunzini yegusha, ineempondo ezimbini, ndayibona imi ngasemlanjeni, yagidimela kuyo ke ngobushushu bamandla ayo."
Daniel8:7 Ndayibona isondela enkunzini yegusha, yoyika kakhulu, yayibetha inkunzi yegusha, yazaphula iimpondo zayo zombini; ayaba namandla inkunzi yegusha ukuma ngakuyo, yasuka yaziphosa enkunzini yegusha waxabela, wayinyathela, akwabakho bani uyihlangulayo inkunzi yegusha esandleni sayo."
Daniel8:8 Inkunzi yebhokhwe yakhula ngokuncamisileyo, yakuba yomelele, lwaphuka uphondo olukhulu; yaza yavela ezine ezimangalisayo emva koomoya abane bezulu."
Daniel8:9 Kolunye kuzo kwavela uphondo oluncinane, lwaba lukhulu ngokuncamisileyo, lwabheka ngasezantsi, nasempumalanga, nasemhlabeni onqabileyo."
Daniel8:10 Yaba nkulu, yada yaya kufika emazulwini; Waziphosa phantsi ezinye izidumbu nezinye iinkwenkwezi, wazinyathela ngeenyawo."
Daniel8:11 Wazenza umphathi wamatyala, wawususa umbingelelo wamaxesha onke, yaphoswa phantsi ingcwele yakhe."
Daniel8:12 Kwaye wanikwa uluhlu lwamajoni ngokuchasene nedini eliqhelekileyo ngenxa yesikreqo, kwaye wayilahla phantsi inyaniso; yaye yenjenjalo, yaba yimpumelelo."
Daniel8:13 Ndamva ongcwele ethetha, wathi ke omnye kowangcwele: “Koda kube nini na lo mbono ungowomnikelo wemihla ngemihla, nosisigwebo esitshabalalisayo, ukuze kunyhashwe ingcwele neenkundla? utshintsho?"
Daniel8:14 Wathi kum, Koda kube ziintsuku ezingamawaka amabini anamakhulu mathathu; yandule ukuhlanjululwa ingcwele."
Daniel8:15 Mna, Daniyeli, ndawubona loo mbono, ndaza ke ndifuna ukuwucacisa, ndabona emi phambi kwam enjengokubonakala komntu."
Daniel8:16 Ndeva ilizwi lomntu phakathi konxweme lwaseUlayi, lidanduluka, lisithi, Gabriyeli, mawuqonde lo mbono."
Daniel8:17 Wasondela apho bendimi khona; ekuzeni kwayo ndoyika, ndawa ngobuso; wathi kum, Qonda, nyana womntu; ngokuba lo mbono uya kuba lapho ngemihla yokugqibela."
Daniel8:18 Ithe ekuthetheni kwayo nam, ndozela, ndasuke ndanobuthongo obuthe nca, wandichukumisa, wandimisa."
Daniel8:19 Wathi, Yabonani, ndinixelela okuya kubakho ekupheleni kwengqumbo; ngokuba isiphelo siya kuba ngexesha elimisiweyo."
Daniel8:20 Inkunzi yegusha oyibonileyo ineempondo ezimbini, ngookumkani bamaMedi namaPersi;"
Daniel8:21 Ibhokhwe etyetyisiweyo ngukumkani waseGrisi, nophondo olukhulu oluphakathi kwamehlo ayo ngukumkani wokuqala."
Daniel8:22 Ekubeni laphulwe, kuya kuvela ezine phambi kwalo, kuvele oorhulumente abane bephuma eluhlangeni, bengengamandla alo."
Daniel8:23 Kuya kuthi ke ekupheleni kobukumkani babo, bakugqiba abathetheli benze ubumenemene, ukumkani uya kuma enobuso obujorha, enobuso obulukhuni, nezigwebo ezibi."
Daniel8:24 Kwaye amandla akhe aya komelela, kungabi ngokwamandla awo; uya konakalisa ngendlela emangalisayo, aphumelele, enze, atshabalalise anamandla nohlanga olungcwele."
Daniel8:25 Kwaye kwakhona ngecebo lakhe uya kuphumelela emsebenzini esandleni sakhe; kwaye uya kuziphakamisa entliziyweni yakhe, kwaye uya kubatshabalalisa abaninzi ngoxolo; kodwa akayi kubethwa ngesandla."
Daniel8:26 Umbono wokuhlwa kusisa okhankanyiweyo uyinyaniso; kuba iya kuba yimihla emininzi.
Daniel8:27 Mna, Daniyeli, ndanikezela, ndaneentsuku ndisifa; emva koko ndema, ndawenza umsebenzi wokumkani; ndamangaliswa ngumbono lowo, kodwa kungekho bani uqondayo."
Daniel9:1 Ngomnyaka wokuqala kaDariyo unyana ka-Asswerosi, wesizwe samaMedi, owamiselwa ukuba abe ngukumkani wobukumkani bamaKaledi;"
Daniel9:2 Ngonyaka wokuqala wolawulo lwakhe, mna, Daniyeli, ndaliqonda iincwadi inani leminyaka elafika ngayo ilizwi likaYehova kumprofeti uYeremiya, ukuze kugqitywe iminyaka esixhenxe yamanxuwa aseYerusalem."
Daniel9:3 Ndabubhekisa ubuso bam eNkosini uYehova, ukuba ndifune umthandazo nezibongozo, ngokuzila ukudla, nangamarhonya, nangothuthu."
Daniel9:4 Ndathandaza kuYehova uThixo wam, ndavuma ndathi, uYehova, uThixo omkhulu, owoyikekayo, mabagcine umnqophiso nenceba abamthandayo, abayigcinayo imithetho yakhe;"
Daniel9:5 Sonile senza okungendawo senza okungendawo savukela ngokuphambuka emiyalelweni yakho nakwizigwebo zakho.
Daniel9:6 Asibaphulaphulanga abakhonzi bakho, abaprofeti ababethetha egameni lakho kookumkani bethu, nakubathetheli bethu, nakoobawo, nakubo bonke abantu belizwe."
Daniel9:7 Yehova, kobakho okusesikweni, kodwa ubuso bethu budidekile njenganamhlanje; kumadoda akwaYuda, kubemi baseYerusalem, nakumaSirayeli onke, akufuphi nakude, emazweni onke, enawagxothela kuwo ngenxa yezono zabo."
Daniel9:8 Yehova, sinobuso obuneentloni, nobuso bookumkani bethu, nabathetheli bethu, noobawo bethu, ngokuba sonile kuwe."
Daniel9:9 uYehova, uThixo wethu, unenceba, uyaxolela, nakuba sigwilike kuye;"
Daniel9:10 Asizange siliphulaphule ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wethu ukuze sihambe ngokwemithetho yakhe awasinika yona ngenkonzo yabakhonzi bakhe, abaprofeti."
Daniel9:11 Onke ke amaSirayeli awugqithile umyalelo wakho; ngenxa yoko kwaphalazwa phezu kwethu isiqalekiso, nesifungo esibhaliweyo emyalelweni kaMoses, umkhonzi kaThixo, ngokuba sonile kuye."
Daniel9:12 Wawamisa ke amazwi akhe, abewathethile ngathi, nangabagwebi bethu ababesiwisele umthetho, ngokusizisela ububi obukhulu; ngokuba akwenzekanga nto injengeYerusalem phantsi kwezulu lonke."
Daniel9:13 Njengoko kubhaliweyo emyalelweni kaMoses, bonke obu bubi busifikela; ke asimbongozanga uYehova uThixo wethu, ukuba sibuye ebubini bethu, siyiqonde inyaniso yakho."
Daniel9:14 Kungenxa yoko le nto uYehova wayibonayo intlekele waza wayizisa kuthi, ngenxa yokuba ulilungisa uYehova uThixo wethu kuyo yonke imisebenzi yakhe ayenzayo, ngenxa yokuba asiliphulaphulanga ilizwi lakhe."
Daniel9:15 Kaloku ke, Yehova Thixo wethu, owabakhuphayo abantu bakho ezweni laseYiputa ngesandla esithe nkqi, wazenzela igama, njengoko kunjalo namhla; sonile, senze ubugwenxa."
Daniel9:16 Owu, Nkosi, ngokobulungisa bakho bonke, mawubuye umsindo wakho nobushushu bakho, emzini wakho iYerusalem, intaba yakho engcwele, ngenxa yezono zethu, nangenxa yobugwenxa boobawo, iYerusalem, nabantu bakho. Intloni kumntu wonke ophezu kwethu."
Daniel9:17 Thixo wethu, wuve umthandazo womkhonzi wakho, nezibongozo zakhe, ubukhanyise ubuso bakho phezu kwengcwele yakho elinxuwa, ngenxa kaYehova."
Daniel9:18 Thoba indlebe yakho, uve, Thixo wam; vula amehlo akho, ubone amanxuwa ethu, nomzi lowo ubizwa ngegama lakho;"
Daniel9:19 Yehova, yiva; Nkosi, xolela; Yehova, yiva, yenza; ngenxa yakho, Thixo wam, musa ukulibala; ngokuba igama lakho libizwa emzini wakho, naphezu kwabantu bakho."
Daniel9:20 Xa ndandithetha ndithandaza ndixela isono sam nesono sabantu bam amaSirayeli ndaza ndasondeza umthandazo wam phambi koYehova uThixo wam ngenxa yentaba engcwele yoThixo wam;
Daniel9:21 Ke kaloku, ndisathetha emthandazweni, indoda uGabriyeli, leyo ndayibonayo embonweni ekuqaleni, yaphaphatheka ngokukhawuleza, yandichukumisa ngexesha lombingelelo wangokuhlwa."
Daniel9:22 Wandazisa, wathetha kum, wathi, Daniyeli, ndize kukunika ubulumko nokuqonda."
Daniel9:23 Kwafika ilizwi ekuqaleni komhlana wakho, ndize kukubonisa; ngokuba uthandwa kakhulu; uze uwuqonde umcimbi kwaye unakekele ubuso."
Daniel9:24 Iiveki ezimashumi asixhenxe zibekwe phezu kwabantu bakowenu, naphezu komzi wakowenu ongcwele, ukuba kufezwe isikreqo, kucinywe izono, ukucanyagushelwa ubugwenxa, kuzise ubulungisa obungunaphakade, nokuwumisa umbono nesiprofeto; ethambisa iintlanga ingcwele yeeNgcwele."
Daniel9:25 Yazi ke ngoku uze uqonde ukuba ukususela kwixesha lokuphuma komyalelo wokuba iYerusalem mayivuswe ize yakhiwe kude kube nguMesiya, iNkosana, iya kuthabatha iiveki ezisixhenxe neeveki ezingamashumi amathandathu anesibini, iya kwakha indlela nodonga, ngamaxesha anzima."
Daniel9:26 Emveni ke kweeveki ezimashumi mathandathu anambini, uKristu uya kutshatyalaliswa, kungabi ngenxa yakhe; Umzi nengcwele uya kutshatyalaliswa ngabantu benganga ezayo; yaye isiphelo saso siya kuba ngomkhukula, kude kube sekupheleni kwemfazwe kuya kubakho izinto eziziinqambi eziqinisekisiweyo."
Daniel9:27 Kwaye uya kuwumisa umnqophiso nabaninzi ngeveki enye; yaye phakathi evekini uya kuwuphelisa umbingelelo nomnikelo wokudla okuziinkozo, yaye ngenxa yokwanda kwezinto ezicekisekayo uya kuyenza ibe yintlango kude kube sekupheleni yaye iya kuphalazwa phezu kwalowo ulilolo."
Daniel10:1 Ngomnyaka wesithathu kaKoreshi ukumkani wasePersi, wabonakalaliswa uDaniyeli, ogama linguBheletshatsare; loo mbandela wawuyinyaniso, kodwa ixesha elimisiweyo lalide; wakuqonda oko, wawuqonda umbono."
Daniel10:2 Ngaloo mihla mna, Daniyeli, ndalila iiveki ezintathu."
Daniel10:3 Andisidlanga sonka sinencasa, kungekho nyama nawayini emlonyeni wam, andizithambisanga, zada zazaliseka iiveki ezintathu."
Daniel10:4 Ngomhla wamashumi omabini anesine wenyanga yokuqala, bendiselunxwemeni lomlambo omkhulu oyiHidekele;"
Daniel10:5 Ndaphakamisa amehlo am ndaza ndabona indoda eyambethe ilinen, ebotshwe esinqeni ngegolide esulungekileyo yaseUfasi."
Daniel10:6 Umzimba wayo wawunjengoboya begusha, ubuso bayo bunjengombane, ukubonakala kwayo, namehlo ayo enjengezikhuni ezitshangazayo, izandla zayo neenyawo zayo zinjengobhedu olumibalabala, nesandi samazwi ayo ngathi sisandi sesihlwele."
Daniel10:7 Mna, Daniyeli, ndawubona ndedwa umbono lowo, ngenxa yokuba amadoda abenam engawubonanga umbono; kwabakho iindudumo ezinkulu phezu kwabo, basaba baya kuzimela."
Daniel10:8 Mna ndasala ndedwa, ndawubona umbono lowo mkhulu, ndaphelelwa ngamandla;"
Daniel10:9 Ndeva ke isandi samazwi akhe, ndasiva isandi samazwi akhe, ndabiwa bubuthongo obunzulu, ubuso bam bubheke phantsi."
Daniel10:10 Ndabona isandla sindichukumisa, sandimisa emadolweni am nasezandleni zam;"
Daniel10:11 Yathi kum, Daniyeli, ndodandini, waqonde amazwi endiwathetha kuwe, ume nkqo, ngokuba ndithunywe kuwe ngoku. Uthe akutsho ndaphakama ndingcangcazela."
Daniel10:12 Yathi kum, Musa ukoyika, Daniyeli, ngenxa yokuba kususela kumhla wokuqala wanikela intliziyo yakho ekuqondeni nasekuqeqesheni phambi koThixo wakho, waweva amazwi akho;"
Daniel10:13 Ke umthetheli wobukumkani bamaPersi wandimelana nam imihla emashumi mabini anamnye; uyabona, uMikayeli, omnye wakubathetheli abaziintloko, weza kundinceda; yaye ndandilapho nookumkani basePersi."
Daniel10:14 Ndize kukwazisa okuya kubahlela abantu bakowenu ekupheleni kwemihla; ngenxa yokuba lo mbono ngowemihla emininzi.
Daniel10:15 Ithe ekuthetheni kwayo nam, ndabubhekisa ubuso bam emhlabeni, ndasisidenge."
Daniel10:16 Nanko onjengoonyana babantu, echukumisa umlomo wam; Ndawuvula umlomo wam, ndathetha, ndathi kobemi phambi kwam, Camagu, nkosi yam, emehlweni am inimba yam yandongamela, ndaphelelwa ngamandla."
Daniel10:17 Angathini na ke ukuthetha umkhonzi wenkosi yam enkosini yam? ngenxa yokuba mna, ngoko nangoko amandla awazange aphelele kum, yaye kwakungasekho moya kum."
Daniel10:18 Wabuya ke omnye, wandichukumisa njengomntu, wandomeleza."
Daniel10:19 Wathi, Musa ukoyika, sithandwa sam; Uxolo malube nani, yomelelani, ewe, yomelelani. Wathi ekuthetheni kwakhe nam, ndazomeleza, ndathi, Makathethe ukumkani wam; ngokuba undomelezile."
Daniel10:20 Wathi, Uyazi na into endize ngayo kuwe? ngoku ke ndiya kubuya ndiye kulwa neNkosana yasePersi; ndakugqiba, yabona, iNkosana yaseGrisi isiza."
Daniel10:21 Kodwa ndiya kunibonisa okubhalwe kwiZibhalo eziyinyaniso; akukho bani undixolelayo kwezo zinto, ngaphandle kukaMikayeli, inkosana yenu."
Daniel11:1 Kananjalo, ngomnyaka wokuqala kaDariyo umMedi, ndesuka ukuba ndimomeleze ndimhlanganisele."
Daniel11:2 Kwaye ngoku, ndiya kukuxelela inyaniso. Yabona, kuya kuvuka ookumkani abathathu ePersi; unina uya kuba sisityebi ngaphezu kwabo bonke, yaye ngamandla akhe nobutyebi bakhe uya kubaphakamisa bonke nxamnye nobukhosi bamaGrike."
Daniel11:3 Kuya kuvela ukumkani oligorha, alawule ngamandla amakhulu, enze ngokokuthanda kwakhe."
Daniel11:4 Buya kuthi, xa athe waphakama, buqhekezwe ubukumkani bakhe, bahlule oomoya abane basezulwini; kungabi ngokwembewu yakhe, nangokomthetho wakhe abewulawula; ngokuba buya kususwa ubukumkani bakhe, bube bobambi ngaphandle kwabo."
Daniel11:5 Ukumkani wasezantsi uya komelela omnye wakubathetheli bakhe; uya komelela phezu kwakhe, alawule; ulawulo lwakhe luya kuba lulawulo olukhulu."
Daniel11:6 Kwaye bohlanganisana ekupheleni kweminyaka; ngokuba intombi yokumkani wasezantsi iya kuza kukumkani wasentla, ukuba bahlanganiselane; kodwa amandla ezisweli akayi kulisindisa; yaye akayi kuma, nkqu nesandla sakhe, kodwa uya kunikwa, nabo bamzisayo, nabamzalayo, nalowo wamomelezayo kweli phakade."
Daniel11:7 Kodwa ihlumelo leengcambu zakhe liya kuvela elizweni lakhe, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo uya kuza enempi, angene enqabeni yokumkani wasentla, alwe nabo, aze abuye abuye."
Daniel11:8 Wozisa oothixo bazo, nezikhulu zabo, neempahla zabo ezinqwenelekayo zesilivere, nezegolide, azise eYiputa; yaye uya kuhlala ixesha elide kunokumkani wasentla."
Daniel11:9 Ngako oko ukumkani wasezantsi uya kungena ebukumkanini bakhe, abuyele ezweni lakhe."
Daniel11:10 Oonyana bakhe baya kuphakanyiswa, bahlanganisele ndawonye inkitha yamatyala amakhulu; ngokuqinisekileyo omnye uya kuza akhukuliseke, akhukuliseke; ke uya kubuya ayifikele inqaba yakhe engqushu."
Daniel11:11 Wothi ke ukumkani wasezantsi arhole, axabele ukumkani wasentla; yaye uya kuvelisa isihlwele esikhulu; kodwa isihlwele siya kunikelwa esandleni sakhe."
Daniel11:12 Ukuba uthe wasisusa isihlwele, iya kuphakama intliziyo yakhe; kwaye uya kuwisa amashumi amawaka, kodwa ke ngoko akayi kuzinika amandla."
Daniel11:13 Wobuya ukumkani wasentla, amise isihlwele esikhulu ngakumbi kunesokuqala;"
Daniel11:14 Ngelo xesha kuya kusukela phezulu abaninzi ngakukumkani wasezantsi; aziphakamise amasela ohlanga lwakowenu ukuba awumise umbono; kodwa baya kuwa.
Daniel11:15 Ngako oko ukumkani wasentla uya kufika, ayiphakamise intaba, ayithimbe imizi enqatyisiweyo;"
Daniel11:16 Lowo umchasayo uya kwenza ngokukholeka kuye, akukho namnye uya kuma phambi kwakhe; uya kuma ezweni eliqaqambileyo eliya kuphanziswa sisandla sakhe."
Daniel11:17 Wojika, angene enamandla obukumkani bakhe bonke, namalungisa kunye naye; uya kwenjenjalo, amnike intombi yabafazi, amtshabalalise; kodwa akayi kuma ecaleni kwakhe, yaye akayi kuba naye."
Daniel11:18 Emva koko uya kujikela ubuso bakhe eziqithini, azithimbe ezininzi; engenakungcikivwa, uya kuyibhekisa kuye."
Daniel11:19 Wojika, abhekise enqabeni yelizwe lakhe, akhubeke, awe, angafunyanwa."
Daniel11:20 Kuya kubakho ukwanda kwerhafu kobutyebi bakhe ebuqaqawulini bobukumkani; kodwa ngeentsuku ezimbalwa uya kutshatyalaliswa, kungengamsindo okanye yimfazwe."
Daniel11:21 Elifeni lakhe kuya kusuka kume odelekileyo, ongayi kumnika uzuko lwabukumkani; Ke yena uya kungena enoxolo, abuthabathe ubukumkani ngokucenga."
Daniel11:22 Kwaye ngezandla zomkhukula baya kukhohliswa, babethwe phambi kobuso bakhe; ewe, nomphathi womnqophiso."
Daniel11:23 Emva kokwenziwa komnqophiso naye, uya kusebenza ngobuqhophololo, ngenxa yokuba uya kunyuka aze omelele ngohlanga oluncinane."
Daniel11:24 Uya kuhamba enoxolo kwiindawo ezichumayo zelizwe; uya kwenza abangakwenzanga ooyise nooyise; Uya kuwabela amaxhoba nako konke okuphangiweyo nobutyebi; ewe, kwaye uya kukhupha imigaqo-nkqubo yakhe ngokuchasene nezakhiwo eziqinileyo, ewe, okwethutyana."
Daniel11:25 Wophakamisela phezulu amandla akhe nentliziyo yakhe kukumkani wasezantsi, enempi enkulu enempi; ukumkani wasezantsi uya kuphuma alwe nemikhosi emikhulu enamandlakazi; akakho, ngokuba baya kumenzela iyelenqe."
Daniel11:26 Ewe, abadla isonka sakhe baya kumtshabalalisa, nebandla lakhe likhukuliswe, bawe bafe abaninzi."
Daniel11:27 Kwaye iintliziyo zabo kumkani babini ziya kuthanda ukwenza okubi, yaye baya kuthetha ubuxoki esithebeni sinye; kodwa ayiyi kuphumelela, kuba kwanangoko isiphelo siya kuba sexesha elimisiweyo."
Daniel11:28 Uya kubuyela ezweni lakowabo enendyebo eninzi; intliziyo yakhe ichasene nomnqophiso ongcwele; yaye uya kwenza izenzo aze abuyele emhlabeni wakhe.
Daniel11:29 Ngexesha elimisiweyo uya kubuya eze ngasezantsi; kodwa ayiyi kufana neyokuqala neyokugqibela.
Daniel11:30 Ziya kuza kuye iinqanawa zamaKitim; ke ngoko, uya kuba buhlungu aze abuye kwaye abenomsindo ngalo mnqophiso; uya kwenjenjalo; uya kubuya abe nokuqonda kwabatyekayo emnqophisweni ongcwele."
Daniel11:31 Izixhobo ziya kuma phambi kwakhe, yaye ziya kuyenza inqambi ingcwele yendawo enqatyisiweyo kwaye ziwususe umbingelelo wemihla ngemihla zibeke izinto ezinezothe eziphanzisayo."
Daniel11:32 Abawuphatha kakubi umnqophiso, wobatshabalalisa ngobuqhophololo; ke bona abantu abamaziyo uThixo wabo baya kuqina, bathabathe inyathelo."
Daniel11:33 Izilumko phakathi kweentlanga ziya kufundisa abaninzi, kodwa ziya kukhubeka imihla emininzi likrele, nelangatye, kukuthinjwa nokuphangwa."
Daniel11:34 Ukuba bathe bawa, bothatyathwa ngoncedo oluncinane, basuke abaninzi babalandele ngokuqhatha."
Daniel11:35 Yoza ke inxenye yabanengqiqo, ukubacikide, ibahlambulule, bayenze mhlophe, kude kube lixesha lokuphela, kuba kusaya ngokwexesha elimisiweyo."
Daniel11:36 Kwaye ukumkani uya kwenza ngokokuthanda kwakhe; uya kuziphakamisa, azinyuse ngaphezu koothixo bonke, athethe imisebenzi ebalulekileyo ngoThixo woothixo, abe nempumelelo, ude uphele umsindo; ngokuba oko kumisiweyo kuya kwenzeka."
Daniel11:37 Akayi kumnyamekela uTHIXO wookhokho bakhe, okanye athabathe inkanuko yabafazi okanye nawuphi na uthixo; ngokuba uya kuzenza mkhulu kunabo bonke."
Daniel11:38 Kodwa ngobutyebi bakhe uya kumzukisa uTHIXO wemikhosi, nothixo ababengamazi ookhokho bakhe, uya kumzukisa ngegolide nangesilivere namatye anqabileyo nangezinto ezithandekayo."
Daniel11:39 Uya kukwenza oko ezinqabeni, enothixo wolunye uhlanga, amaziyo, andise uzuko; kwaye uya kwenza abaninzi balawule, alabe ilizwe ngenzuzo."
Daniel11:40 Ke kaloku, ekupheleni kwemihla, ukumkani wasezantsi uya kuqubisana naye, ukumkani wasentla ahlangabeze kuye njengesaqhwithi, eneenqwelo zokulwa, nabamahashe, neenqanawa ezininzi; kwaye uya kungena emazweni, atshayele, adlule."
Daniel11:41 Wobuya eze ezweni eliqaqambileyo, atshabalale amazwe amaninzi; baya kusinda esandleni sakhe uEdom, noMowabhi, nezikhulu zoonyana baka-Amon."
Daniel11:42 Uya kusolula isandla sakhe emazweni, nelizwe laseYiputa aliyi kusinda."
Daniel11:43 Uya kubulawula ubutyebi begolide, nobesilivere, nobezinto zonke ezinqwenelekayo zaseYiputa, alandele emanyathelweni akhe amaLibhiya namaKushi."
Daniel11:44 Ziya kumkhwankqisa iindaba ezivela empumalanga nasentla; ke ngoko uya kubheka phambili ngomsindo omkhulu ukuba atshabalalise abaninzi kwaye ababethe ngesiqalekiso.
Daniel11:45 Uya kuyimisa iminquba yendlu yakhe yobukumkani elwandle, entabeni engcwele yozuko; ukanti uya kufika ekupheleni kwakhe, kungabikho umncedayo."
Daniel12:1 Ngelo xesha uya kusuka eme uMikayeli, umthetheli omkhulu, omele oonyana babantu bakowenu; kuya kubakho ixesha lonxunguphalo ekungazanga kubekho linjalo kususela koko kwabakho uhlanga, kude kube lelo xesha; kwaye ngelo xesha, abantu bakho baya kusindiswa, bonke abo babhaliweyo encwadini."
Daniel12:2 Kuya kuvuka abaninzi kwabaleleyo eluthulini lomhlaba, bavukele ubomi obungunaphakade, abanye bavukele ihlazo nehlazo elingunaphakade."
Daniel12:3 Izilumko ziya kuqaqamba njengokukhanya kwezulu; yaye abo bakhokelele abaninzi ebulungiseni baya kuba njengeenkwenkwezi ngonaphakade kanaphakade.
Daniel12:4 Ke wena, Daniyeli, mawuthi cwaka kuloo mazwi, uyitywine incwadi kude kube lixesha lokuphela; baninzi abaya kuphengulula, kwande ukwazi."
Daniel12:5 Mna, Daniyeli, ndakhangela, ndabona abanye bemi, omnye enganeno komlambo, omnye engaphesheya komlambo;"
Daniel12:6 Wathi omnye kwindoda leyo yambethe ilinen emhlophe, ebiphezu kwamanzi omlambo, Koda kube nini na, ukuphela kwale miqondiso?"
Daniel12:7 Ndeva ukuba indoda leyo ebeyinxibile leyo, ebiphezu kwamanzi omlambo, yasiphakamisela ezulwini isandla sayo sokunene nesasekhohlo, yafunga odla ubomi kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni, ukuba kuya kubakho ixesha elimisiweyo namaxesha nesiqingatha; yaye xa athe wawagqiba amandla abantu abangcwele, zonke ezi zinto ziya kugqitywa."
Daniel12:8 Ndakuva, kodwa andaqonda; Ndathi ke, Camagu, Nkosi yam, koba yintoni na ukuphela kwezi zinto?"
Daniel12:9 Yathi, Ewe, Daniyeli, ngenxa yokuba amazwi aya kuvalelwa, aqiniselwe kude kube lixesha lokuphela."
Daniel12:10 Abaninzi baya kuhlanjululwa, benziwe mhlophe, bahlanjululwe; ke abangendawo baya kwenza okungendawo; bonke abangendawo abayi kukuqonda; ke zona izilumko ziya kuqonda."
Daniel12:11 Kususela kwimini yokushenxiswa kwenkonzo yamaxesha onke, nasekumisweni kwezinto ezinezothe eziphanzisayo, yoba ziintsuku eziliwaka, elinamakhulu amabini, anamanci asithoba."
Daniel12:12 Unoyolo olinde wafika kwiintsuku eziliwaka, elinamakhulu amathathu, anamanci mathathu anesihlanu."
Daniel12:13 Ke wena, hamba uye ekupheleni, ngokuba uya kuphumla, umile emsebenzini wakho ekupheleni kwemihla."
Hosea1:1 Ilizwi likaYehova elafika kuHoseya unyana kaBhere, ngemihla kaOsiya, kaYotam, ka-Ahazi, kaHezekiya, ookumkani bakwaYuda, nangemihla kaYarobheham unyana kaYowashe, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
Hosea1:2 Ukuqala kwelizwi likaYehova ngoHoseya. Wathi uYehova kuHoseya, Hamba uye kuthabatha ihenyukazi noonyana behenyukazi; ngokuba ilizwe lihenyuze kakhulu, lemka ekumlandeleni uYehova."
Hosea1:3 Waya ke, wazeka uGomere intombi kaDibhelayim; wakhawula, wamzalela unyana."
Hosea1:4 Wathi uYehova kuye, Mbize ngokuba nguYizereli; okwethutyana, ndophalaza igazi likaYizereli phezu kwendlu kaYehu ndize ndibuphelise ubukumkani bendlu kaSirayeli."
Hosea1:5 Ngaloo mini ndiya kwaphula isaphetha sakwaSirayeli emfuleni waseYizereli.
Hosea1:6 Waphinda wamitha, wazala intombi. Wathi uYehova kuye, Yithiye igama lokuba nguAkenzelwanga-mfesane, ngokuba andiyi kuphinda ndiyenzele nceba indlu kaSirayeli; kodwa ndiya kubasusa kuphele."
Hosea1:7 Kodwa ndiya kuyenzela inceba indlu kaYuda ndize ndibakhulule ngoYehova uThixo wabo, yaye andiyi kubakhulula ngezaphetha okanye ngekrele okanye ngedabi okanye ngamahashe okanye ngabakhweli-mahashe."
Hosea1:8 Uthe akumlumla uLoruhama, wakhawula wazala unyana."
Hosea1:9 Wathi uThixo, Mbize ngokuba nguLowami, ngokuba aningabantu bam, nam andiyi kuba nguThixo wenu."
Hosea1:10 Ke inani loonyana bakaSirayeli liya kuba ngangentlabathi yolwandle, engalinganiswayo, engabalwayo; nalapho kwathiwa kubo, Aningabantu bam nina, kuya kuthiwa kubo, Ningoonyana bakaThixo ophilileyo."
Hosea1:11 Yaye ngokuqinisekileyo baya kuhlanganisana oonyana bakaYuda noonyana bakaSirayeli baze banyule inkokeli enye, baze balishiye ilizwe, ngenxa yokuba iya kuba nkulu imini kaYizereli."
Hosea2:1 Yithini kubazalwana benu, Wenani! noodade benu, uRuhama."
Hosea2:2 Uze umhlasele udadewenu, kuba akangomfazi wam, nam ndingendoda yakhe asuse uthuthu lwakhe nothuthu lwengqolowa yakhe, alususe phakathi kwengqolowa yakhe;"
Hosea2:3 hleze ndimhlube, ndimenze abe njengokuzalwa kwakhe, ndimenze abe njengentlango, ndimmise njengomhlaba ongumqwebedu, ndimbulale ngenxano;"
Hosea2:4 andiyi kubaconga oonyana bakhe; ngokuba bengabantwana bobuhenyu.
Hosea2:5 Ngenxa yokuba unina ehenyuzile; udane owabazalayo; ngokuba wathi, Ndiya kubashiya abaziintsizana, abandinika isonka sam, namanzi am, noboya begusha bam, neflakisi yam, neoli yam, nento endiyiselayo."
Hosea2:6 Ngako oko, yabona, ndiya kuyambesa indlela yakho ngameva, ndakhe udonga, ukuze angazifumani iindlela zakhe."
Hosea2:7 Uya kubasukela abo bamthandayo, kodwa abayi kubafumana; uya kuzifuna, angazifumani; athi, Ndiya kuya ndibuyele endodeni yam yokuqala; ngokuba oko bekulungile kum kunangoku."
Hosea2:8 Kuba wayengazi ukuba ndim owayemnike ingqolowa, iwayini neoli nokuba ndim owandisa isilivere negolide awayilungiselela uBhahali."
Hosea2:9 Ngako oko ndiya kubuya, ndiyithabathe ingqolowa yam ngexesha layo, newayini yam entsha ngexesha layo elimisiweyo;"
Hosea2:10 Ndolibhenca ihlazo lakhe phambi kwamehlo entanda yakhe, kungabikho umhlangulayo esandleni sam."
Hosea2:11 Ndiza kuluphelisa lonke uvuyo lwakhe, imihla yakhe yokubhiyoza, ukuthwasa kwenyanga kwakhe neesabatha zakhe nawo onke amatheko akhe."
Hosea2:12 Ndiya kuzitshabalalisa izidiliya zakhe, nemikhiwane yakhe, abesithi, Ngumvuzo wam endiwunikiweyo zintanda zam; ndiya kuyenza ityholo, idliwe ngamarhamncwa."
Hosea2:13 Ndiya kumvelela ngemihla yooBhahali, abeqhumisela ngenxa yabo, evathe ijikazi lakhe, nezivatho zakhe, wazishiya nezigodo zakhe, wandilibala; utsho uYehova."
Hosea2:14 Ngoko ke, yabona, ndiya kumlahlekisa ndize ndimse entlango ndize ndithethe naye kamnandi."
Hosea2:15 Ndomnika izidiliya zakhe, nentili yeAkore ibe lisango lethemba; yaye uya kuvuma apho njengakwimihla yobutsha bakhe nanjengemini yokunyuka kwakhe evela kwilizwe laseYiputa."
Hosea2:16 Kuya kuthi ngaloo mini, utsho uYehova, undibize ngokuthi, Ndoda yam; kwaye akuyi kuba sathi ndinguBhahali."
Hosea2:17 Kuba ndiya kuwasusa amagama ooBhahali emlonyeni wakhe, namagama angabi sakhunjulwa."
Hosea2:18 Ngaloo mini ndobenzela umnqophiso namarhamncwa elizwe, neentaka zezulu, namarhamncwa omhlaba; yaye ndiya kubususa ubutshaba nekrele nemfazwe ehlabathini yaye uya kubayeka balale bekhuselekile."
Hosea2:19 Kwaye ndiya kukuthembisa ngonaphakade; ndikuvuze ngobulungisa, nangenceba, nangenceba, nangenceba."
Hosea2:20 Nam ndiza kukutshata umkhonzazana wam, ukuze umazi uYehova."
Hosea2:21 Ngaloo mini ndiya kuva, utsho uYehova, ndiwaphulaphule amazulu, nehlabathi liphulaphule;"
Hosea2:22 Umhlaba uya kuyiva ingqolowa, newayini entsha, neoli; yaye ziya kuyiva iYizereli."
Hosea2:23 Ndiya kumtyala emhlabeni; ndiya kuba nenceba kulowo ungenzelwanga nceba; Ndiya kuthi kwabangebantu bam: Nabantu bam; bathi, UnguThixo wam wena."
Hosea3:1 Wathi uYehova kum, Uze umthande umfazi olihenyukazi, ngenxa yokuba uYehova ebathanda oonyana bakaSirayeli, abathe babheka thixweni bambi, abathanda iindebe zewayini;"
Hosea3:2 Ndazithengela ke ishumi elinesihlanu leeshekele zesilivere, nehomere yerhasi, nesiqingatha sehomere yerhasi."
Hosea3:3 Ndathi kuye, Uya kundizuza imihla emininzi; musa ukukrexeza, ungabi ngowenye indoda; Nam ndiya kuba nawe."
Hosea3:4 Kuba oonyana bakaSirayeli baya kuhlala imihla emininzi bengenakumkani nenkosana nombingelelo nomfanekiso oqingqiweyo nesambatho samagxa noothixo bendlu.
Hosea3:5 Emveni koko baya kubuya oonyana bakaSirayeli, bamquqele uYehova uThixo wabo, noDavide ukumkani wabo; yaye ngokuqinisekileyo baya kumoyika uYehova nobubele bakhe bothando ekupheleni kwexesha."
Hosea4:1 Liveni ilizwi likaYehova, nyana bakaSirayeli; ngokuba uYehova ubambene nabemi belimiweyo, ngokuba kungekho nyaniso, kungekho nceba, kungekho kwazi uThixo ehlabathini."
Hosea4:2 Ngokutshabhisa, nangokuxoka, nangokubulala, ngokuba, nangokuhenyuza, bagqobhozile, igazi lichukumisa igazi."
Hosea4:3 Ngenxa yoko ihlabathi liya kukhala, zikhwankqise zonke izinto ezimi kulo, kwanamarhamncwa elizwe, neentaka zezulu; ewe, kwaneentlanzi zolwandle ziya kususwa."
Hosea4:4 Kodwa makungabikho mntu ubambana nomnye, okanye uthethise omnye, kuba abantu bakowenu banjengabaxambulisana nombingeleli."
Hosea4:5 Woza ke emini, akhubeke umprofeti kunye nawe ebusuku, ndimtshabalalise unyoko."
Hosea4:6 Bayatshabalala abantu bam ngokungazi; ngokuba ukucekisile ukwazi, ndiya kukucekisa nam, ukuba ungabi ngumbingeleli kum; Wawulibala umyalelo kaThixo wakho; ndobalibala abantwana bakho nam."
Hosea4:7 Bathi bakuba besanda, basuka bagatya, banjalo; ke ngoko uzuko lwabo ndiya kuluguqula lube lihlazo."
Hosea4:8 Badla isono sabantu bam, bayibeka intliziyo yabo ebubini babo;"
Hosea4:9 Kuya kuba njengababingeleli, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo ndiya kubohlwaya ngenxa yeendlela zabo ndize ndibabuyekeze ngezenzo zabo."
Hosea4:10 Kuba baya kudla, bangahluthi; baya kukrexeza, bangandi, ngokuba bayekile ukumphulaphula uYehova."
Hosea4:11 Uhenyuzo, newayini, newayini entsha, ziwexula intliziyo;"
Hosea4:12 Abantu bam babuzisa ubutyebi babo, umsimelelo wabo ubaxelela; ngokuba umoya wobuhenyu ubalahlekisile, bahenyuze phantsi koThixo wabo."
Hosea4:13 Babingelela ezincotsheni zeentaba, baqhumisele ezindulini, phantsi kwemioki, nemipopulari, namasundu, kuba ulungile umthunzi wayo; ke ngoko, iintombi zenu ziyakrexeza, namadoda enu ayakrexeza."
Hosea4:14 Andiyi kuzivelela iintombi zenu, ngokokuba zihenyuza, nabalingane benu bekrexeza; ngokuba bewaqhawule umtshato namahenyukazi, babingelela namahenyukazi; ngenxa yoko abantu abangaqondiyo baya kukhubeka."
Hosea4:15 Ke ukuba uthe wakrexeza, Sirayeli, makangoni uYuda; musani ukuya eGiligali, musani ukunyuka niye eBhetaven, ningafungi, nithi, Ehleli nje uYehova!"
Hosea4:16 Ngokuba ukreqile uSirayeli njengethokazi lenkomo; ngoku, uYehova uya kubalusa njengemvana endaweni ebanzi."
Hosea4:17 uEfrayim uhlobene nezithixo; makame.
Hosea4:18 Isiselo sabo simuncu, bayahenyuza ngamaxesha onke; Amagosa akhe afuna ukuhlazeka, akunike."
Hosea4:19 Umoya umbambile ngamaphiko akhe, kwaye baya kuba neentloni yimibingelelo yabo."
Hosea5:1 Liveni eli lizwi, babingeleli; yivani, ndlu kaSirayeli; yivani, nina bendlu yokumkani; kuba umgwebo wakho uya kunifikela, ngenxa yokuba naba ngumgibe eMizpa nomnatha owawakhiwe eTabhore."
Hosea5:2 Ke zona izixholoxholo zizimisele ukubulala, nangona mna bendikhalimela wonke umntu."
Hosea5:3 Mna ndimazi kakuhle uEfrayim, noSirayeli akafihlakele kum ngokuba ngoku uEfrayim uyakrexeza, uSirayeli uzenze inqambi."
Hosea5:4 Abayi kuziqinisa izenzo zabo ukuze babuyele kuThixo wabo, ngenxa yokuba umoya wobuhenyu uphakathi kwabo, yaye abazange bamazi uYehova."
