Hosea5:5 Libonakala ebusweni bakhe iqhayiya likaSirayeli; ngoko ke, uSirayeli noEfrayim baya kukhubeka ngobugwenxa babo; noYuda wokhubeka kunye nabo."
Hosea5:6 Baya kumfuna uYehova benempahla yabo emfutshane neenkomo zabo; kodwa abayi kumfumana; wabashiya.
Hosea5:7 Benza ubumenemene kuYehova, ngenxa yokuba bazala oonyana basemzini; yandule ke inyanga ibadle kunye nesabelo sabo."
Hosea5:8 Vuthelani isigodlo eGibheha, vuthelani isigodlo eRama; khwaza ngezwi elikhulu, Bhetaven, emva kwakho, Bhenjamin!"
Hosea5:9 Kuya kuba senkangala kwelakwaEfrayim ngemini yokohlwaya; ezizweni zakwaSirayeli ndixele okuya kwenzeka.
Hosea5:10 Abathetheli bakwaYuda baba njengabo basusa impi; ngoko ke, ndiya kuphalaza ubushushu bam phezu kwabo njengamanzi."
Hosea5:11 Wacinezelwa uEfrayim waza watyunyuzwa ekugwetyweni, ngenxa yokuba wayekulungele ukuwuthobela lo myalelo."
Hosea5:12 Ngoko ke ndiya kuba njengenundu kuEfrayim nanjengokubola kwindlu kaYuda.
Hosea5:13 Xa wasibonayo uEfrayim isifo sakhe, uYuda walibona inxeba lakhe; Akaba nako ukukuphilisa, nokuphilisa inxeba lakho."
Hosea5:14 Kuba ndiya kuba njengengonyama kuEfrayim, nanjengengonyama kwindlu kaYuda; nam ndiya kuziqwenga; ndiya kumthabatha, kungabikho umsindisayo."
Hosea5:15 Ndiya kuhamba ndize ndibuyele endaweni yam bade bavume iziphoso zabo kwaye bafune ubuso bam; ekubandezelekeni kwabo baya kundifuna ngokukhawuleza.
Hosea6:1 Yizani sibuyele kuYehova, kuba eqwengile, wosiphilisa; Ubethile, yaye uya kusibopha."
Hosea6:2 Wosidlisa ubomi, kwakuba ntsuku mbini; wosimisa ngomhla wesithathu, sidle ubomi phambi kwamehlo akhe."
Hosea6:3 Soqonda ke, ukuba sisaqhubeka simazi uYehova; ukuphuma kwakhe kunjengokusa; yaye uya kuza kuthi njengemvula, njengemvula egalela emhlabeni."
Hosea6:4 Ndiya kwenza ntoni na kuwe, Efrayim? Ndiya kwenza ntoni na ngawe, Yuda? Ngokuba ukulunga kwakho kunjengelifu lokusa, elidlula njengombethe wokusa."
Hosea6:5 Ngenxa yoko ndababulala abaprofeti; Ndibabulele ngelizwi lomlomo wam, nezigwebo zakho njengokukhanya okuphumayo."
Hosea6:6 Kuba ndithanda inceba, andithandi mbingelelo; kwaye ukwazi uThixo kungaphezu komlilo."
Hosea6:7 Bawaphula ngokwabantu umnqophiso; apho bandiqhatha.
Hosea6:8 iGiliyadi ngumzi wabenzi bobubi, uzele ligazi."
Hosea6:9 Njengoko lilalela umntu ngamatutu, liya kwandula ke libulale iqela lababingeleli endleleni, ngokuba belihlazo."
Hosea6:10 Ndibone into eyoyikekayo kwindlu kaSirayeli: kukho ukrexezo kwaEfrayim, uSirayeli uzenze inqambi."
Hosea6:11 Nawe, Yuda, wawusilungisile isivuno ekubuyiseleni kwam isahlulo sabantu bakowethu."
Hosea7:1 Xa ndifuna ukumphilisa uSirayeli, batyhileka ububi bukaEfrayim nobubi bakwaSamari; ngokuba bexoka; lingena isela, amatutu aphanga ngaphandle."
Hosea7:2 Abatsho entliziyweni yabo ukuthi ndobukhumbula bonke ububi babo; ziphambi kobuso bam.
Hosea7:3 Bamvuyisile ukumkani ngeento zabo ezimbi, nabathetheli ngobuxoki babo."
Hosea7:4 Bonke bephela bangabakrexezi, njengeziko elibaswa ngumoji-zonka, oyekayo ukunyathela intlama, ide ifukuke."
Hosea7:5 Ngemini yokumkani wethu abathetheli bamxhakamfule ngeendebe zewayini; wasolula isandla sakhe kunye nabagculeli.
Hosea7:6 Bazilungisa iintliziyo zabo njengombumbi bebukele; umpheki wabo uhlala ubusuku bonke; kusasa uyavutha njengomlilo olenyayo.
Hosea7:7 Bonke bephela bavutha njengeziko, batshisa abagwebi babo; bonke ookumkani babo bawa; akukho namnye kubo ondinqulayo."
Hosea7:8 uEfrayim uxunelene nabantu; uEfrayim liqebengwana elingaguqukiyo.
Hosea7:9 Abasemzini bawadle bawadla amandla akhe, ukanti yena akakwazi oko; Ewe, izimvi zilapha naphaya, kodwa akazi yena."
Hosea7:10 Libonakala emehlweni akhe iqhayiya likaSirayeli; akabuyelanga kuYehova uThixo wawo, akamfunanga ngenxa yoko."
Hosea7:11 uEfrayim unjengevukuthu elimathileyo, elingenantliziyo; babiza iYiputa, beza eAsiriya."
Hosea7:12 Ekuhambeni kwabo ndiya kubabetha; ndiya kubahlisa njengeentaka zezulu; ndiya kubohlwaya ngokwentlanganiso yabo;
Hosea7:13 Yeha ke bona! ngokuba babaleka kum, mabafikelwe kukutshabalala ngokuba bandingcatshile; Mna ndibakhulule, basuka bona bathetha ubuxoki ngam."
Hosea7:14 Abandinqulanga ngentliziyo yabo, balililela ezililini zabo;"
Hosea7:15 Nangona ndibabophile ndaza ndatywina izandla zabo, kodwa bacinga ububi ngam."
Hosea7:16 Baya kubuya, kungekhona kOsenyangweni; banjengesaphetha esityeketyeke; Baya kuwa likrele abathetheli babo, ngenxa yobulukhuni bolwimi lwabo; ibe yintlekisa kubo ezweni laseYiputa."
Hosea8:1 Faka isigodlo emlonyeni wakho. Uyihlasele njengexhalanga indlu kaYehova, ngenxa yokuba bawaphule umnqophiso wam, bawaphule umyalelo wam."
Hosea8:2 Wondibiza uSirayeli, athi, Thixo wam, siyakwazi, Thixo wethu;"
Hosea8:3 Ulahlile uSirayeli izinto ezilungileyo; utshaba malumsukele.
Hosea8:4 Bamise ookumkani, kungengam; Bamise abathetheli, ndingazi mna; isilivere yabo negolide yabo bazenzele izithixo, ukuze batshatyalaliswe."
Hosea8:5 Ithole lakho, elakwaSamari, likulahlile; Umsindo wam uyavutha; Kuya kuthatha ixesha elingakanani ukuba bafezekise ubumsulwa?"
Hosea8:6 Kuba nalo laliphuma kwaSirayeli: lalisenziwa ngomsebénzi; ngoko ke, asinguThixo, kodwa lithole laseSamariya eliya kutyunyuzwa."
Hosea8:7 Ngokuba babehlwayele umoya, bavuna umoya osisaqhwithi; ihlumelo aliyi kuvelisa umgubo; ukuba kunjalo, boyidla abasemzini."
Hosea8:8 Utshabalale uSirayeli; ngoku baya kuba phakathi kweentlanga njengesenzo sobubi.
Hosea8:9 Kuba bona banyuke baya eAsiriya, njengeesile lasendle; uEfrayim waqesha izithandwa."
Hosea8:10 Ewe, nakuba beqeshwa ezintlangeni, ndiya kubabutha ngoku, bambambazele kancinane ngenxa yomthwalo wokumkani wabathetheli."
Hosea8:11 Kuba uEfrayim uzandisile izibingelelo zesono;
Hosea8:12 Ndambhalela izinto ezinkulu zomyalelo wam;
Hosea8:13 Babingelela inyama, badla; ke uYehova akakholiswa ngabo; ngoku niya kubukhumbula ububi babo, nizohlwaye ngenxa yezono zabo; baya kubuyela eYiputa."
Hosea8:14 Ngokuba uSirayeli wamlibala uMenzi wakhe, wakha iitempile; noYuda uzandisile izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo, kodwa mna ndiya kuphosa umlilo kwizixeko zakhe, kwaye ngokuqinisekileyo uya kuzitshisa iinqaba zakhe ezinde."
Hosea9:1 Musa ukuvuya, Sirayeli, ngokuvuya kweentlanga; ngokuba ukrexezile, umshiyile uThixo wakho, wawuthanda umvuzo wazo zonke izithungu zengqolowa."
Hosea9:2 Isixovulelo sewayini nesixovulelo sewayini asiyi kubondla, nobulembu buya kutshabalala kubo."
Hosea9:3 Abahlali ezweni likaYehova; kodwa uEfrayim uya kubuyela eYiputa, yaye baya kudla izinto ezingahlambulukanga eAsiriya."
Hosea9:4 Abayi kuzisa iwayini kuYehova, yaye abayi kumkholisa; basuke ababuleweyo babe njengesonka sosizi kubo; Bonke abayidlayo boba ziinqambi; ngokuba ukudla kwabo akuyi kungena endlwini kaYehova ngenxa yomphefumlo wabo."
Hosea9:5 Niya kwenza ntoni na ngemini yomthendeleko nangemini yomthendeleko kaYehova?
Hosea9:6 Kuba, yabonani, bemkile ngenxa yembuqo; iYiputa iya kubabutha, iMofi iya kubangcwaba; ziya kudla ilifa iimbovane zabo zesilivere; kukho ameva ezintenteni zabo."
Hosea9:7 Kufike iimini zokuvelela, kufike iimini zempindezelo; Uya kwazi ke uSirayeli ukuthi: Umprofeti usisidenge, uyageza indoda enomoya, ngenxa yobuninzi bobubi bakho, nangenxa yentiyo yakho eninzi."
Hosea9:8 Ngumboniseli uEfrayim ngakuThixo wam; umprofeti ngumgibe womthiyeli ezindleleni zakhe zonke, ulizothe endlwini yoThixo wakhe."
Hosea9:9 Bacikidekile, njengokuba bekunjalo ngemihla yaseGibheha; ke ngoko, uya kuyikhumbula inkohlakalo yabo kwaye abohlwaye ngenxa yezono zabo."
Hosea9:10 Ndamfumana uSirayeli enjengediliya entlango; Ndabubona uyihlo njengeqabaka kuwokuqala umkhiwane; Ke bona baya eBhahali-pehore, bazahlula beneentloni; namadlavu awo asala ngokokuthanda kwawo."
Hosea9:11 uEfrayim, uzuko lwakhe luya kuphaphazela njengentaka;"
Hosea9:12 Nokuba bathe bakhulisa oonyana, ndobaphanga, kungabikho usalayo; ewe, yeha nabo xa ndibashiya!"
Hosea9:13 Njengoko ndayibonayo iTire, uEfrayim uzinzile ekriweni, kodwa uEfrayim uya kubakhokelela kumbulali oonyana bakhe."
Hosea9:14 Yehova, banike; wobanika ntoni na? banike izisu ezomileyo namabele."
Hosea9:15 Bonke ububi babo buseGiligali, kuba ndabathiya khona; ngenxa yobubi beentlondi zabo, ndiya kubagxotha endlwini yam, ndingabi sabathanda;"
Hosea9:16 Ubethiwe uEfrayim, ingcambu yabo yomile, abayi kuxakatha siqhamo; nokuba bathe bazala, ndosibulala nesiqhamo esinqwenelekayo sesizalo sabo."
Hosea9:17 uThixo wam uya kubashiya, ngenxa yokuba bengakuphulaphulanga, yaye baya kuphalaphala ezintlangeni."
Hosea10:1 uSirayeli ngumdiliya onabileyo, wazixakathela iziqhamo ngokwawo; ngobuninzi beziqhamo zakhe, wándisa izibingelelo; ngokulunga kwelizwe lakhe benza imifanekiso emihle."
Hosea10:2 Yaba buthelezi intliziyo yabo; ngoko ke baya kufunyanwa bebuthathaka; uya kuzidiliza izibingelelo zabo, ayitshabalalise izithixo zabo."
Hosea10:3 Ngokuba ngoku baya kuthi, Asinakumkani, kuba asimoyikanga uYehova; uya kusenza ntoni na ukumkani?"
Hosea10:4 Bathetha amazwi yaye bafunga ngobuxoki ngokwenza umnqophiso;
Hosea10:5 Abemi baseSamariya baya kutyhwatyhwa ngenxa yamathole eenkomo aseBhete-aven, ngenxa yokuba abantu bakhona baya kuzilela ngenxa yayo nababingeleli bayo abayenzela isijwili, ngenxa yozuko lwalo, ngenxa yokuba lumkile kulo."
Hosea10:6 Liya kusiwa eAsiriya libe ngumnikelo kukumkani uYarebhi; uya kudana uEfrayim, abe neentloni uSirayeli ngenxa yecebo lakhe."
Hosea10:7 Ke elakwaSamari, ukumkani walo udakile, njengegwebu phezu kwamanzi;"
Hosea10:8 Kananjalo iintaba zaseAfene, oko kukuthi, isono sikaSirayeli, ziya kuphanziswa; Kuya kukhula imithana enameva neenkunzane ezibingelelweni zabo; baya kuthi kwiintaba, Sigubungeleni; nakwiinduli, Masiwe."
Hosea10:9 Kususela kwimihla yaseGibheha, Sirayeli wona; kulapho babemi khona;"
Hosea10:10 Ndiya kubathethisa ke ngokomnqweno wam; kwaye abantu baya kubahlanganisana ukuba bababophe ngeendlela zabo zombini.
Hosea10:11 uEfrayim unjengethokazi lenkomo eliqeqeshiweyo, elithanda ukudla ingqolowa; ke ndayigqitha intamo yalo entle; Ndiya kukhwela phezu kwaEfrayim; uYuda uya kutyala, uYakobi uya kusiqhekeza isanda sakhe."
Hosea10:12 Hlwayela ubulungisa, uvune inceba; limeni amasimi enu, ngokuba ilixesha lokumquqela uYehova, ade afike aninise ubulungisa."
Hosea10:13 Nahlwayela ubugqwetha, navuna ubugqwetha; nadla iziqhamo zobuxoki, ngokuba ukholose ngendlela yenu, nangobuninzi bamagorha akho."
Hosea10:14 Kuya kubakho isiphithiphithi phakathi kwabantu bakowenu, ziphangwe zonke iinqaba zakho, njengoko uSolomon wayibhulayo iBhete-arbhele, ngemini yemfazwe;"
Hosea10:15 Iya kwenjenjalo kuni iBheteli, ngenxa yobubi bezinto zenu ezimbi; ngomso uya kuqalekiswa ukumkani wakwaSirayeli."
Hosea11:1 Oko uSirayeli ebemncinane, ndamthanda, ndambiza unyana wam ngokuba ungumYiputa."
Hosea11:2 Wathi, bababizile, baza barhoxa nabo;"
Hosea11:3 Ke mna ndamfundisa uEfrayim ukuhamba, ndamhlangula esandleni sakhe; babengazi ke ukuba ndibaphilise."
Hosea11:4 Ndabatsala ngeentsontelo zomntu, ngeentsontelo zothando; kubo ndaba njengabo basusa idyokhwe emihlathini yabo, yaye ndabanika inyama."
Hosea11:5 Akayi kubuyela kwilizwe laseYiputa, kodwa iAsiriya yoba ngukumkani wakhe, ngenxa yokuba abavumanga ukubuya."
Hosea11:6 Ikrele liya kuba semizini yakhe, liwavuthululele amagatya akhe, liwadle ngenxa yamacebo abo;"
Hosea11:7 Abantu bam bayathanda ukundishiya; nokuba banqula uPhezukonke, akukho bani unokumphakamisa."
Hosea11:8 Ndingathini ukukushiya, Efrayim? Ndingathini na ukukusindisa, Sirayeli? Ndingathini na ukukufanisa neAdama? ndikwenze ube njengeTsebhoyim? Yaguquka intliziyo yam phakathi kwam, Umvandedwa wam wavutha kunye."
Hosea11:9 Andiyi kukuvumela ukuvutha komsindo wam kuphele, andiyi kubuya ndimonakalise uEfrayim; ngokuba ndinguThixo, andimntu; Ongcwele phakathi kwenu, kwaye andiyi kungena kuwo umzi."
Hosea11:10 Baya kumlandela uYehova; Ubharhula njengengonyama; ukuba uthe wabharhula, bangcangcazele oonyana basentshonalanga."
Hosea11:11 Baya kuvela eYiputa, begubha njengeentaka, nanjengehobe ezweni laseAsiriya; yaye ndiza kubabeka emakhayeni abo,’ utsho uYehova."
Hosea11:12 uEfrayim undirhawule ngobuxoki, indlu kaSirayeli ngenkohliso; noYuda usengukumkani kuThixo, kunye nabangcwele."
Hosea12:1 uEfrayim udla umoya, ngokusukelana nolophu lwasempumalanga; Ukwandisa imihla ngemihla ukuxoka nokonakala; Bazibandakanya nama-Asiriya, kwaza kwasiwa ioli eYiputa."
Hosea12:2 uYehova ubambene noYuda, umvelela uYakobi ngokweendlela zakhe; uya kumbuyekeza ngokwemisebenzi yakhe."
Hosea12:3 Yena wambamba umninawa wakhe ngesithende esizalweni sikanina, waza ke womelela ngokomelela kuThixo."
Hosea12:4 Ewe, womelela ngesithunywa eso; walila, wathandaza kuye; wamfumana eBheteli, wathetha nathi khona;"
Hosea12:5 NdinguYehova, uThixo wemikhosi; uYehova sisikhumbuzo sakhe."
Hosea12:6 Ngoko ke guqukani niye kuThixo wenu; Gcina inceba nokusesikweni, Ukholose ngoThixo wakho ngamaxesha onke."
Hosea12:7 Ungumrhwebi unezikali zenkohliso esandleni sakhe; uyathanda ukucofa.
Hosea12:8 Wathi uEfrayim, Noko ke, ndisisityebi, ndizifumanele okulungileyo; kuyo yonke imisebenzi yam, abayi kufumana bugwenxa kum."
Hosea12:9 Yaye mna, Yehova, uThixo wenu, ezweni laseYiputa, ndiya kunigcina nihlala eminqubeni njengakwimihla yomthendeleko."
Hosea12:10 Ndathetha ngabaprofeti, ndazandisa imibono ndaza ndasebenzisa imizekeliso ngomsebenzi wabaprofeti."
Hosea12:11 Ngaba kukho okungekho sikweni eGiliyadi? okunene, asinto; Babingelela iinkunzi ezintsha zeenkomo eGiligali; nezibingelelo zabo zibe njengemfumba emingxunyeni yelizwe."
Hosea12:12 uYakobi wasabela ezweni lakwa-Aram; uSirayeli wasebenzela inkazana leyo, ekwalusa impahla emfutshane yenkazana leyo."
Hosea12:13 uYehova wamkhupha uSirayeli eYiputa ngomprofeti, waza wasindiswa ngomprofeti."
Hosea12:14 uEfrayim wamgculela kabukhali; ngako oko, igazi lakhe uya kulishiya phezu kwakhe, nehlazo lakhe libuyele eNkosini yakhe."
Hosea13:1 Wathi akuthetha uEfrayim, kwabakho ukothuka; wathi wona kuBhahali, wafa."
Hosea13:2 Baphinda bona, bazenzela imifanekiso eqingqiweyo ngesilivere yabo, bazenzela izithixo njengokuqonda kwabo; yonke loo nto ingumsebenzi weengcibi bathetha ngawo, besithi, Ababingelelayo mabawanga amathole."
Hosea13:3 Ngako oko baya kuba njengelifu lakusasa, nanjengombethe ophuma ngokukhawuleza, nanjengamalaku aphetshethwa emhlabeni sisaqhwithi, nanjengomsi womlilo."
Hosea13:4 Kodwa ndinguYehova uThixo wakho, ngoxa nisezweni laseYiputa, yaye akuyi kwazi thixo ungendim, kuba akukho namnye umsindisi ngaphandle kwam."
Hosea13:5 Mna ndakwazi entlango, ezweni lasekubaleleni."
Hosea13:6 Bahlutha ngokwedlelo labo; bahluthe, ziphakame iintliziyo zabo; ke ngoko, bandikhusele."
Hosea13:7 Ngoko ke ndoba njengengonyama kubo; Ndobabona njengengwe endleleni;
Hosea13:8 Ndothi gaga kubo njengebhere ehluthwe amathole ayo, ndikrazule iintloko zentliziyo yabo, ndibadle khona njengengonyama; irhamncwa liya kubadla."
Hosea13:9 Uphanzile, Sirayeli; kodwa uncedo lwakho lukum."
Hosea13:10 Ndiya kuba ngukumkani wenu; Uphi na omnye wabahlanguli bam ezixekweni zakho zonke? nabagwebi bakho, othe wena, Ndinike ukumkani nabathetheli?"
Hosea13:11 Ndininike ukumkani ndinomsindo, ndimsusa emsindweni wam."
Hosea13:12 Bubotshiwe bububi bukaEfrayim; sigutyungelwe isono sakhe.
Hosea13:13 Uya kufika inimba yozalayo; ungunyana wesidenge; ngokuba akafanele ahlale ithuba elide endaweni yokufa kwabantwana.
Hosea13:14 Ndiya kubahlangula esandleni selabafileyo; Ndiya kubahlangula ekufeni; Kufa, ndiya kuba kukufa kwakho; Wena ngcwaba, ndiya kuba linxuwa kuwe; inguquko iya kusithela emehlweni am."
Hosea13:15 Nokuba uthe wavelisa isiqhamo phakathi kwabazalwana bakhe, uya kufika umoya wasempuma, umoya kaYehova unyuke uvela entlango, yaye umthombo wakhe uya koma, nequla lakhe lome; Uya kubuphanga ubuncwane bazo zonke izinto ezithandekayo."
Hosea13:16 ElakwaSamari liya kusalalwa; ngokuba egwilikile kuThixo wakhe; baya kuwa ngomkhonto; iintsana zabo ziya kuchithwa-chithwa, nabamithiyo babo badliwe."
Hosea14:1 Sirayeli, buyela kuYehova, uThixo wakho; ngokuba ukhubekile ebugwenxeni bakho."
Hosea14:2 Wathabathe amazwi, uguquke kuYehova; nithi ke kuye, Bususe bonke ububi, wamkele ngenceba, ukuze sibuyekeze iinkunzi zeenkomo ezintsha, imilomo yethu."
Hosea14:3 uAsiriya akayi kusisindisa; asiyi kukhwela emahasheni, nomsebenzi wezandla zethu asiyi kuba sathi: Thixo wethu, ngokuba inkedama ifumana inceba kuwe."
Hosea14:4 Ndiya kukuphilisa ukukreqa kwabo, ndiya kubathanda ngesisa, ngokuba umsindo wam ubuyile kuye."
Hosea14:5 Ndiya kuba njengombethe kuSirayeli; uya kutyatyamba njengenyibiba, amilise iingcambu njengeLebhanon."
Hosea14:6 Amasebe awo aya kunaba, yaye ubuhle bakhe bufana nomnquma, yaye ivumba lawo elimnandi liya kuba njengelaseLebhanon."
Hosea14:7 Baya kubuya abahlala emthunzini wakhe; baya kudla ubomi njengengqolowa, batyatyambe njengeediliya; isongo sayo siya kuba njengewayini yaseLebhanon."
Hosea14:8 uEfrayim uya kuthi: “Ndinantoni na yakwenza nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo? Ndamva ndaza ndamazi: Ndifana nomsipres oluhlaza. Kum zifunyanwa iziqhamo zakho.
Hosea14:9 Ngubani na olumkileyo, aziqonde ezo zinto? zilumkile na wena? ngokuba zibubulungisa iindlela zikaYehova, yaye amalungisa ahamba ngazo; ke bona abangendawo baya kuwela kuyo."
Joel1:1 Ilizwi likaYehova elafika kuYoweli, unyana kaPetuweli."
Joel1:2 Yivani oku, nina madoda makhulu, nive, nonke bemi belizwe; Ngaba kwakunjalo ngemihla yenu, nangemihla yooyihlo?"
Joel1:3 Kuxeleni koonyana benu, oonyana benu bakuxele koonyana babo, oonyana babo bakuxele kwisizukulwana esisemva kwabo."
Joel1:4 Okuseleyo kumpethu kudliwa ziinkumbi; okuseleyo kwadliwa ziinkumbi; okuseleyo eenkumbini, kwadliwa ngumqikela."
Joel1:5 Vukani, manxila, nikhale; lilani, nonke baseli bewayini, ngenxa yewayini entsha; ngenxa yokuba isusiwe emlonyeni wakho."
Joel1:6 Ngenxa enokuba lungene ezweni lam uhlanga olunamandla, olungenakubalwa, olumazinyo amazinyo engonyama, nezidlele zengonyama enkulu."
Joel1:7 Uwutshabalalisile umdiliya wam, lwawunyothula umkhiwane wam; Wayikhulula wayilahla; amasebe awo amhlophe."
Joel1:8 Lilile njengentombi eyambethe ukuzila ngenxa yendoda yobutsha bayo.
Joel1:9 Umnikelo otshiswayo nomnikelo othululwayo ugqityiwe endlwini kaYehova; balila ababingeleli, abakhonzi bakaYehova."
Joel1:10 Ilizwe libhuqiwe, ilizwe liyakhala; kuba ingqolowa ibhuqiwe, umququ itshile, ioli iyachithwa."
Joel1:11 Nidanile, balimi; lilani, balimi bewayini, ngenxa yengqolowa nerhasi; ngokuba uvuyo lwehlabathi luphelile."
Joel1:12 Umdiliya ubunile, umkhiwane womile; umrharnate, nesundu, nom-apile, yonke imithi yelizwe yomile; ngokuba bumile uvuyo loonyana babantu."
Joel1:13 Zibopheni nina babingeleli; Dumani, bakhonzi besibingelelo; yizani, nilale ebumnyameni bonke ubusuku, bakhonzi boThixo wam;"
Joel1:14 Ngcwalisani umhla wokuzila ukudla, nibize ingqungquthela, niwahlanganise amadoda amakhulu, nabemi bonke belizwe, endlwini kaYehova uThixo wenu, nikhale kuYehova."
Joel1:15 Yeha loo mini! kuba ikufuphi imini kaYehova, yaye iya kuza njengentshabalalo evela kuSomandla."
Joel1:16 Ayinqunyulwanga na inyama phambi kwamehlo ethu, nemivuyo nemivuyo endlwini yoThixo wethu?"
Joel1:17 Zibolile iimbewu phantsi kwemidumba, ziqhawukile iingxam, ziqhawukile iingxam; kuba ingqolowa yomile."
Joel1:18 Hayi indlela izilwanyana ezikhala ngayo! Ikhohliwe imihlambi yeenkomo, kuba ingenatyani; ewe, imihlambi yempahla emfutshane ithe shwaka."
Joel1:19 Ndikhala kuwe, Yehova, kuba umlilo uwatshisile amakriwa asentlango, nelangatye layirhawula yonke imithi yelizwe."
Joel1:20 Kwanezilwanyana zelizwe zikhala kuwe, kuba itshile imijelo yamanzi, nomlilo uwatshisile amakriwa asentlango."
Joel2:1 Vuthelani isigodlo eZiyon, mbulaleni ukumkani entabeni yam engcwele; mabangcangcazele bonke abemi behlabathi, ngokuba isiza imini kaYehova, kuba ikufuphi;"
Joel2:2 Yimini yobumnyama nobumnyama, yimini yamafu nesithokothoko, njengokusa kwesifingo phezu kweentaba, luhlanga olukhulu, olunamandla; alizange libekho, aliyi kubakho nakwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana."
Joel2:3 Kutsha umlilo phambi kwabo; nasemva kwabo kuvutha amadangatye; ihlabathi linjengomyezo wase-Eden phambi kwabo; ewe, akukho nto iya kusinda."
Joel2:4 Injengokubonakala kwamahashe imbonakalo yabo; nanjengabamahashe, benjenjalo ukubaleka."
Joel2:5 Baya kutsiba njengesandi seenqwelo ezincotsheni zeentaba, njengesandi selangatye leendiza ezitsha, njengamagorha amise uluhlu lwedabi."
Joel2:6 Phambi kobuso babo abantu baya kubandezeleka kakhulu; bonke ubuso buya kuba mnyama.
Joel2:7 Baya kubaleka njengamagorha; baya kunyuka udonga njengamadoda okulwa; yaye baya kuhamba ngamnye ngendlela yakhe yaye abayi kuphambuka kumaqonga abo.
Joel2:8 Akukho namnye unako ukutyhala omnye; baya kuhamba elowo ngendlela yakhe, nokuba bathe bawa ngekrele, abayi kunqunyulwa."
Joel2:9 Baya kubalekela esixekweni; babalekela eludongeni, benyuka ezindlwini; baya kungena ngeefestile njengesela."
Joel2:10 Umhlaba uyanyikima phambi kwabo; liya kunyikima izulu, libe mnyama ilanga nenyanga, zibe mnyama iinkwenkwezi ekukhanyeni kwazo."
Joel2:11 uYehova uya kuliphakamisa izwi lakhe phambi kwamaqela akhe, ngokuba mininzi kakhulu iminquba yakhe; ngokuba inkulu imini kaYehova, yoyikeka kunene; ngubani na onyamezeleyo?"
Joel2:12 Ngako oko, itsho iNkosi, nibuye nimke kum ngeentliziyo zenu zonke, ngokuzila, ngokulila, nangobumnyama;"
Joel2:13 nikrazule iintliziyo zenu, ingabi ziingubo zenu, nibuyele kuYehova uThixo wenu;"
Joel2:14 Ngubani na owaziyo ukuba wobuya aguquke, ashiye intsikelelo ngasemva kwakhe; umnikelo wokudla okuziinkozo nomnikelo othululwayo kaYehova uThixo wenu?"
Joel2:15 Vuthelani isigodlo eZiyon, ngcwalisani imini yokuzila, memani ingqungquthela."
Joel2:16 Hlanganisani abantu, ngcwalisani ibandla, hlanganisani amadoda amakhulu, hlanganisani abantwana nabanyanyisayo; Umyeni makaphume egumbini lakhe, nomtshakazi aphume egumbini lakhe."
Joel2:17 Bafanele balile ababingeleli, abakhonzi bakaYehova, phakathi kweveranda nesibingelelo, bathi, ‘Bashiye abantu bakho, Yehova, unganikeli ilifa lakho lidelele, ukuze zilawule iintlanga; abaya kuthi phakathi kwabantu, Uphi na uThixo wabo?"
Joel2:18 uYehova uya kuba nekhwele ngelizwe lakhe aze abe nenceba kubantu bakhe.
Joel2:19 Waphendula uYehova, wathi ebantwini bakhe, Yabonani, ndinithumela ingqolowa, newayini entsha, neoli, eniya kwaneliswa zizo; andiyi kuba sanenza nibe sisingcikivo ezintlangeni."
Joel2:20 Ndiya kuyishenxisa kuwe imikhosi yasentla, ndiyiqhubele ezweni elingumqwebedu, enkangala, elibheke kulwandle lwaseBhabheli, ngecala lolwandle ngokuba wenza izinto ezinkulu."
Joel2:21 Musa ukoyika, hlabathi; vuyani nigcobe, ngokuba uYehova wenza izinto ezinkulu."
Joel2:22 Musani ukoyika, mpahla inkulu yelizwe; kuba amakriwa asentlango ahluma;"
Joel2:23 Nina nyana baseZiyon, yibani nemihlali nigcobe ngoYehova uThixo wenu; ngokuba elungisele imvula yasentwasahlobo, aninike iimvula, iimvula ezinkulu, nezivuvuvuvu ngenyanga yokuqala."
Joel2:24 Izanda ziya kuzala yingqolowa, namanqatha aphuphume yiwayini neoli;"
Joel2:25 Ndonibuyisela ke iminyaka eyadliwa ziinkumbi, neenkumbi, neenkumbi, neenkumbi, nomkhosi wam omkhulu, endiwuthumele phakathi kwenu."
Joel2:26 Niya kudla nize nihluthe, nilidumise igama likaYehova uThixo wenu onidale ngendlela emangalisayo; yaye abantu bam abayi kudana naphakade;"
Joel2:27 nazi ukuba ndiphakathi kwamaSirayeli, ukuba ndinguYehova uThixo wenu, akukho wumbi; yaye abantu bam abayi kudana naphakade."
Joel2:28 Emva koko ndiya kuthulula uMoya wam phezu kwenyama yonke; oonyana benu neentombi zenu baya kuprofeta, amadoda enu amakhulu aphuphe amaphupha, amadodana enu abone imibono."
Joel2:29 Kwaye phezu kwabakhonzi nabakhonzazana ndothulula uMoya wam ngelo xesha.
Joel2:30 Ndiya kwenza izimanga ezulwini nasehlabathini, igazi nomlilo nentshinyela yomsi."
Joel2:31 Ilanga liya kujika libe bubumnyama nenyanga ibe ligazi, ngaphambi kokuba ifike imini kaYehova enkulu neyoyikekayo."
Joel2:32 Yaye wonk’ ubani obiza egameni likaYehova uya kusindiswa; ngokuba entabeni yeZiyon naseYerusalem kuya kubakho usindiso, njengoko watshoyo uYehova; naphakathi kwabaseleyo kubekho awobabiza uYehova."
Joel3:1 Kuba, yabonani, ngelo xesha nangelo xesha, ekubabuyiseni kwam abantu bakwaYuda nabaseYerusalem ekuthinjweni;"
Joel3:2 Ndiya kuzihlanganisa zonke iintlanga ndize ndizihlisele entlanjeni yakwaYehoshafati ndize ndilwele nazo apho ngenxa yabantu bam nelifa lam likaSirayeli, owazichithachitha phakathi kweentlanga nowabelahlulayo ilizwe."
Joel3:3 Benza amaqashiso ngabantu bam; Unyana wamnika ihenyukazi, wathengisa ngentombazana ngewayini, ukuba isele."
Joel3:4 Yintoni na enam nawe, Tire, nawe, Tsidon, nani mazwe onke asePalestina? uzondinika impindezelo? ukuba uthe wazikhulula, ngokukhawuleza, kamsinya, ndokuphalaza ukuphatha kwakho entlokweni yakho;"
Joel3:5 Ekubeni nithabathe isilivere yam negolide yam, nazisa izinto zam ezinqwenelekayo ezitempileni zenu."
Joel3:6 Kananjalo oonyana bakaYuda noonyana baseYerusalem bathengise ngani kumaGrike, ukuze bawagxothe ezweni lawo;"
Joel3:7 yabonani, ndiya kubavusa kuloo ndawo nathengisa ngayo ngabo, ndiwenze umvuzo wenu entlokweni yenu."
Joel3:8 Ndothengisa ngoonyana benu nangeentombi zenu esandleni soonyana bakaYuda, bathengise ngabo kumaShebha, uhlanga olukude, ngokuba uYehova ethethile."
Joel3:9 Memezani oku phakathi kweentlanga; Zilungiseleleni imfazwe, phakamisani amagorha, mawasondele onke amagorha; mabanyuke."
Joel3:10 Lahlani amakrele enu amakhulu nezikere zokuthena imithi; oswele amandla makathi, Ndomelele."
Joel3:11 Buthani nize, zonke iintlanga, nibuthelane ezindaweni zonke; ehle amagorha akho, Yehova."
Joel3:12 Mazivuke zinyuke iintlanga, ziye entilini yakwaYoshafati; ngokuba ndiya kuhlala phantsi khona, ukuze ndizigwebe zonke iintlanga ngeenxa zonke."
Joel3:13 Hlalani nerhengqa, ngokuba ukuvuna kuvuthiwe; yiza, yihla; ngokuba isixovulelo sizele, siyaphuphuma ioli; ngokuba ububi babo bukhulu."
Joel3:14 Izihlwele zisentilini yogwebo, ngokuba isondele imini kaYehova entilini yogwebo."
Joel3:15 Ilanga nenyanga ziya kuba mnyama, neenkwenkwezi zibe mnyama ekuqaqambeni kwazo;"
Joel3:16 uYehova uya kubharhula eZiyon, akhuphe ilizwi lakhe eYerusalem; amazulu nomhlaba ngokuqinisekileyo uya kunyikima, yaye uYehova uya kuba lithemba labantu bakhe namandla oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Joel3:17 Nazi ukuba mna Yehova ndinguThixo wenu, ohleli eZiyon, entabeni yam engcwele; iYerusalem yoba ngcwele, abasemzini bangabi sacanda kuyo."
Joel3:18 Ngaloo mini iintaba ngokuqinisekileyo ziya kuvuza ubulembu, neenduli ziphalale ubisi, nemilambo yonke yakwaYuda iphalale amanzi, nequla liya kuphuma endlwini kaYehova kwaye iya kunkcenkceshela intlambo yaseSitime."
Joel3:19 iYiputa iya kuba yinkangala ephanzileyo, iEdom ibe yintlango nenkangala, ngenxa yogonyamelo olwenziwa koonyana bakaYuda, ngenxa yokuba bephalaze igazi elimsulwa ezweni labo."
Joel3:20 Ke yena uYuda uya kuphila ngonaphakade, neYerusalem kuse kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana."
Joel3:21 Ndiya kulisula igazi labo endandingalicocanga, ngenxa yokuba uYehova ehleli eZiyon."
Amos1:1 Amazwi ka-Amosi, omnye wabalusi baseTekowa, awawabonayo kuSirayeli, ngemihla ka-Uziya ukumkani wakwaYuda, nangemihla kaYarobheham unyana kaYowashe, ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, iminyaka emibini phambi konyikimo."
Amos1:2 Kwaye wathi: iNkosi iya kugquma iseZiyon kwaye iphakamise ilizwi layo eYerusalem; namadlelo abalusi aya kuba lusizi, nenduli yeKarmele ibe lusizi."
Amos1:3 Wathi uYehova; Ngenxa yezikreqo ezithathu zeDamasko, ngenxa yezine, andiyi kuyeka ukuba netyala; ngokuba iGiliyadi bayibhula ngeempahla zesinyithi:"
Amos1:4 ndiya kuthumela umlilo endlwini kaHazayeli, utshise iingxande ezinde zikaBhen-hadade."
Amos1:5 Ndiya kuludiliza udonga lweDamasko, ndibatshabalalise abemi bethafa laseAtene, nophethe intonga yobukumkani eBhete-eden; yaye oonyana baka-Aram baya kuthinjwa baye eKire,” utsho uYehova."
Amos1:6 Wathi uYehova, Ngenxa yezikreqo ezithathu zikaGasa, ngenxa yezine—andiyi kumyeka; ngenxa yokuba bonke bathatyathelwa ekuthinjweni ukuze babanikele kuEdom:"
Amos1:7 ndiya kuphosa umlilo eludongeni lweGaza, uzitshise iingxande ezinde khona."
Amos1:8 Ndiya kumtshabalalisa ummi waseAshdode, nophethe intonga yobukumkani eAshkelon, ndisibuyisele phezu kwe-Ekron isandla sam; nabaseleyo bamaFilisti baya kutshabalala,’ itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova."
Amos1:9 Wathi uYehova, Ngenxa yezikreqo ezithathu, nokuba zine zeTire, andiyi kukuthintela ekugwetyweni kwayo; ngokuba wabanika uEdom bonke abathinjwa, akawukhumbula umnqophiso wobuzalwana:"
Amos1:10 ndiya kuthumela umlilo eludongeni lweTire, uzitshise iingxande zayo ezinde."
Amos1:11 Wathi uYehova, Andiyi kuyijika, ngenxa yezono ezithathu nokuba zine zikaEdom; ngokuba wamlandela umkhuluwa wakhe ngekrele, wayilahla yonke inceba yakhe, waba nobushushu bomsindo wakhe, wahlala enomsindo ngonaphakade:"
Amos1:12 ndiya kuthumela umlilo kwaTeman, utshise iingxande ezinde zaseBhotsera."
Amos1:13 Wathi uYehova, Ngenxa yobugwenxa obuthathu, nokuba bune boonyana baka-Amon, andiyi kukha ndibubethe kubo; ngokuba baqwenga abafazi abamithiyo baseGiliyadi, ukuze bandise ilizwe labo."
Amos1:14 Ndiya kuphemba umlilo eludongeni lweRabha, utshise iingxande zayo ezinde, kukho uvuyo ngemini yokulwa, kukho umoya ovuthuzayo ngemini yesaqhwithi."
Amos1:15 Uya kuthinjwa emke ukumkani wabo, yena nabathetheli bakhe kunye; utsho uYehova."
Amos2:1 Wathi uYehova; Andiyi kukunqanda ubugwenxa bakhe, ngenxa yezikreqo ezithathu nokuba zine zikaMowabhi; ngokuba wawatshisayo amathambo okumkani wakwaEdom, aba yikalika:"
Amos2:2 ndiya kuthumela umlilo kwaMowabhi, utshise iingxande ezinde zaseKeriyoti;"
Amos2:3 Ndomtshabalalisa umgwebi walo, ndibabulale bonke abathetheli balo kunye naye; utsho uYehova."
Amos2:4 Wathi uYehova, Ngenxa yobugwenxa bukaYuda obuthathu, nokuba bune, andiyi kukuthintela ukohlwaya kwakhe; kuba bawucekisile umthetho kaYehova, abayigcina imiyalelo yakhe, yaye ubuxoki babo babalahlekisisa njengoko bahambayo ookhokho babo."
Amos2:5 Ndiza kuthumela umlilo kwaYuda, uzitshise iingxande ezinde zeYerusalem."
Amos2:6 Wathi uYehova, Andiyi kubuya ngenxa yezono ezithathu, nokuba zine, zikaSirayeli; Ngokuba bathengisa ilungisa ngesilivere, namahlwempu ngeembadada ezimbini;"
Amos2:7 abo balangazelela uthuli lomhlaba entlokweni yamahlwempu, abawalahlekisayo endleleni yabalulamileyo, indoda noyise baya kungena nayo, njengomkhonzi omnye, ekuzukiseni igama lam elingcwele."
Amos2:8 Balala phezu kweempahla ezibanjelwe kwisibingelelo ngasinye, yaye basela iwayini yabo badelekileyo endlwini yothixo wabo."
Amos2:9 Kodwa ndawatshabalalisa ama-Amori phambi kwawo, abude bawo babulingana nobude bemisedare, nawomeleleyo njengemithi yompleyini; ndasitshabalalisa isiqhamo sawo ngaphezulu, neengcambu zawo ngaphantsi."
Amos2:10 Ndanikhupha ezweni laseYiputa, ndanikhokelela entlango iminyaka emashumi mane, ukuze nilihluthe ilizwe lama-Amori."
Amos2:11 Ndabaphakamisa abaprofeti boonyana benu, nabazabazabazayo kumadodana enu. Àkunjalo na, nyana bakaSirayeli? utsho uYehova."
Amos2:12 Wena ke nabaseza iwayini amaNazarete; wabawisela umthetho abaprofeti, wathi, Musani ukuwisa intetho."
Amos2:13 Yabona, ndiya kuzifihla phantsi kwakho, njengemoto ezele yingxokolo;"
Amos2:14 Ngako oko ukusaba kwamendu kuya kudaka, igorha lingazimisi amandla akhe, negorha lingazisindisi."
Amos2:15 Ophethe isaphetha akayi kuma; kodwa lowo uzilayo akanako ukuzisindisa; Ke yena okhwele ihashe akanako ukuzisindisa.
Amos2:16 Yaye lowo ukhaliphileyo phakathi kwabomeleleyo uya kusinda ngaphandle koloyiko ngaloo mini,’ utsho uYehova."
Amos3:1 Liveni eli lizwi alithethileyo uYehova ngani, nyana bakaSirayeli, kubantu bonke endibakhuphileyo ezweni laseYiputa, lisithi:"
Amos3:2 Ndikwazile wena wedwa ezizukulwaneni zonke zehlabathi; ke ngoko ndiya kunivelela ngenxa yobugwenxa benu bonke.
Amos3:3 Bahamba kunye na ababini, bengavani?"
Amos3:4 Ikha ibharhule na ingonyama ehlathini, ingenanto iyiqwengayo? Iya kukhala ingonyama na emhadini wayo, ingabambanga nto?"
Amos3:5 Iya kuwela na intaka endlwini yendlu, kungekho ndlu yayo? Umntu angawuthiyela na umgibe ehlabathini, angaze abambe?"
Amos3:6 Liya kuvuthelwa na isigodlo phakathi komzi, bangoyiki abantu? Kukho ububi na phakathi komzi, abenziwanga nguYehova?"
Amos3:7 Inene, akenzi nto uYehova, akalutyhilanga ucweyo lwakhe kubakhonzi bakhe, abaprofeti."
Amos3:8 Ingonyama igquma, ngubani na ongoyikiyo? Itsho iNkosi uYehova ukuthi, Ngubani na ongayi kuprofeta?"
Amos3:9 Makwazeke kwizindlu zookumkani baseAshdode, nakwizindlu zobukumkani zelizwe laseYiputa, ukuthi, Zihlanganiseni ezintabeni zakwaSamari, nibone ingxokozelo enkulu phakathi kwayo, nabacudisiweyo phakathi kwayo."
Amos3:10 Ngenxa yokuba bengakwazi ukwenza okuthe tye, utsho uYehova, lowo wafumba ubungendawo nokuphanga ezindlwini zabo."
Amos3:11 Ngoko ke, uYehova wathi, Kuya kubakho utshaba ehlabathini; uwakrazule amandla akho kuwe, ziphangwe iingxande zakho ezinde."
Amos3:12 Wathi uYehova, Njengokuba umalusi ethabatha amathupha amabini emlonyeni wengonyama, nokuba yinxalenye yendlebe; benjenjalo ke oonyana bakaSirayeli, abemiyo kwaSamari, baxolelwe embombeni yesingqengqelo, nasezingqengqelweni zaseDamasko."
Amos3:13 Yivani, ninikele ubungqina kwindlu kaYakobi, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova, uThixo wemikhosi."
Amos3:14 Ngaloo mini ndiya kumohlwaya uSirayeli ngenxa yokunxaxha kwakhe kuye, ndiya kuzohlwaya nezibingelelo zaseBheteli; iimpondo zesibingelelo ziya kunqunyulwa ziwe emhlabeni."
Amos3:15 Ndoyitshabalalisa indlu yasebusika, nendlu yasehlotyeni; zitshabalale izindlu zeempondo zeendlovu, nezindlu ezininzi zitshabalale; utsho uYehova."
Amos4:1 Liveni eli lizwi, nina mathokazi aseBhashan, aphezu kwentaba yakwaSamari, enitshutshisayo abaziintsizana, nibanyhasha abaziintsizana, abathi kubaninizo, Siphe sisele;"
Amos4:2 uYehova ufunge ubungcwele bakhe, wathi, Kuya kufika imihla apho aya kunitsala ngamagwegwe okubambisa iintlanzi, nembewu yenu ngamagwegwe okubambisa iintlanzi."
Amos4:3 Uya kuphuma kunye neenkomo, inkomo ibe nye, ibe ngephambi kwayo; ubaphose ebhotweni, utsho uYehova."
Amos4:4 Yizani eBheteli, niwaphule umthetho; luninzi ukreqo eGiligali; noyizisa imibingelelo yenu imiso ngemiso, nesishumi senu ekupheleni kweminyaka emithathu."
Amos4:5 Zisani umbingelelo wombulelo onegwele, nivakalise, nivakalise iminikelo yokuqhutywa yintliziyo; ngokuba kunjalo kuni, nyana bakaSirayeli; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Amos4:6 Ndaninika ubumsulwa bamazinyo emizini yenu yonke, nokuswela isonka ezindaweni zenu zonke; noko anibuyelanga kum; utsho uYehova."
Amos4:7 Kananjalo ndayicima imvula, kwakusele iinyanga ezintathu ngaphambi kokuvuna."
Amos4:8 Ngoko ezimbini okanye ezintathu kwiilali zam zabhadula ukusuka kwidolophana ukuya kwenye ukuya kusela amanzi; kodwa abahlutha; noko anibuyelanga kum; utsho uYehova.
Amos4:9 Ndanibetha ngokhula nokhula; iya kwanda imiyezo yakho, nezidiliya zakho, namakhiwane akho, neminquma yakho, yandile, idliwa ngamasundu; noko anibuyelanga kum; utsho uYehova."
Amos4:10 Ndathumela kuni isibetho ngohlobo lwaseYiputa; Ndalinyusa ivumba leemandlalo zenu, leza emathatheni enu; noko anibuyelanga kum; utsho uYehova."
Amos4:11 Ndabatshabalalisa abanye benu njengoko uThixo wayitshabalalisayo iSodom neGomora, naba njengesikhuni esikhutshwa emlilweni; noko anizohlwayanga; utsho uYehova."
Amos4:12 Ngako oko ndiya kwenjenjalo kuwe, Sirayeli; ngokuba ndiya kwenjenje ke kuwe, zilungiselele ukuhlangana noThixo wakho, Sirayeli."
Amos4:13 Ngokuba yabona, ulowenza iintaba, ulowenza umoya, uloxelela umntu iingcinga zakhe, ulowenza mnyama isifingo, ulongena ezindaweni eziphakamileyo zehlabathi, uYehova, uThixo wemikhosi, igama lakhe."
Amos5:1 Liveni eli lizwi ndilibikayo, ndlu kaSirayeli;"
Amos5:2 Iwile intombi enguSirayeli; akayi kubuya avuke; washiywa ezweni lakowabo; akwabikho mntu umvusayo.
Amos5:3 Kuba itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova ukuthi: “Isixeko esaphuma newaka siya kusala silikhulu, yaye lowo uphume nekhulu uya kusala neshumi kwindlu kaSirayeli."
Amos5:4 Ngokuba wathi uYehova kwindlu kaSirayeli, Quqelani kum, niphile;"
Amos5:5 musani ukuquqela eBheteli, ningangeni eGiligali, ningaweleli niye eBher-shebha ngenxa yokuba iGiligali ngokuqinisekileyo iya kuya ekuthinjweni, neBheteli iya kutshabalala."
Amos5:6 Quqelani kuYehova, naniya kuphila; mhlawumbi ithe yatsha njengomlilo wendlu kaYosefu, wayitshisa, akwabakho uwucimayo eBheteli."
Amos5:7 Wena uguqulayo umgwebo, umise ubulungisa ehlabathini;"
Amos5:8 Quqelani kulowenza isiLimela namaKroza, uloguqula ithunzi lokufa libe ngumso, imini ayenze mnyama, ibe bubusuku; ulobiza amanzi olwandle, awathululele phezu komhlaba: nguYehova igama lakhe."
Amos5:9 Abo baqinisa imbuqo phezu konamandla, ukuze abaphangi bayifikele inqaba."
Amos5:10 Bayamthiya owohlwayayo emnyango, bamthiyile othetha ubulungisa."
Amos5:11 Kususela kwelo xesha, niya kusigqusha isisweli, nithabathe kulo iqashiso lenu; niya kwakha izindlu ngamatye aqingqiweyo, ningahlali kuzo; nityale izidiliya ezilungileyo, ningaseli wayini yazo."
Amos5:12 Ngokuba ndiyazazi izikreqo zenu ezininzi, nezono zenu ukuba zikhulu kwazo;"
Amos5:13 Ngako oko izilumko ziya kuthi tu ngeli xesha; ngokuba lixesha elibi.
Amos5:14 Funani okulungileyo, ningafuni okubi, ukuze niphile; aze uYehova, uThixo wemikhosi, abe nani, njengoko nitshoyo."
Amos5:15 Thiyani okubi, thandani okulungileyo, gcinani ubulungisa esangweni; mhlawumbi uYehova, uThixo wemikhosi, woba nemfesane kumasalela kaYosefu."
Amos5:16 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova, uThixo wemikhosi, uYehova, ukuthi, Ezitratweni zonke kuya kubakho isijwili; ngeendlela zonke baya kuthi, Yeha! intloko! yaye baya kubiza abalimi bezilile, nabo banako ukuhamba ukusuka ekuzilweni ukuya ekuzilileni."
Amos5:17 Zonke izidiliya ziya kukhala, ngenxa yokuba ndiya kudlula kuwe,’ utsho uYehova."
Amos5:18 Yeha, nina banqwenela imini kaYehova! Ngantoni na kuni? Imini kaYehova ibubumnyama, ingabi kukukhanya."
Amos5:19 Njengoko umntu ebaleka ingonyama, aze ahlangane nebhere; athi xa engena endlwini, asibeke isandla sakhe eludongeni, alunywe yinyoka."
Amos5:20 Ayiyi kuba bubumnyama na imini kaYehova, ingabi kukukhanya? Sibubumnyama na, obungenakukhanya?"
Amos5:21 Ndiwathiyile, ndiyawacekisa imithendeleko yenu;"
Amos5:22 Ukuba nindizisele amadini anyukayo, namadini akho anyukayo, akakholiswa ngawo; yaye andiyi kukhangela kumbingelelo weenkomo zakho ezityetyisiweyo."
Amos5:23 Yisuse kum ingxokozelo yeengoma zakho; ngokuba andikuthandi ukuva ukubethwa kweehadi zakho.
Amos5:24 Makugaleleke umgwebo njengamanzi, nobulungisa njengomlambo oqukuqelayo;"
Amos5:25 Imibingelelo neminikelo yokudla naniyizisa kum na entlango iminyaka emashumi mane, nina bendlu kaSirayeli?"
Amos5:26 Nasuka nathwala umnquba wokumkani wakho, noKiune, imifanekiso yakho, inkwenkwezi yothixo wakho, ozenzele yona."
Amos5:27 Ngako oko, ndiya kunifudusela ngaphaya kweDamasko; utsho uYehova, ogama lakhe linguThixo wemikhosi."
Amos6:1 Yeha ke abemi baseZiyon, abakholose ngentaba yakwaSamari, ebizwa ngokuba yintloko yeentlanga, eyaya kuzo indlu kaSirayeli!"
Amos6:2 Yiyani eKalene, nibone; asuke apho, aye eHamati enkulu; Wehla ke waya eGati yamaFilisti. Ngaba ingcono kunaba rhulumente? okanye umda wabo mkhulu kunomda wakho?"
Amos6:3 wena ulonyusayo imini yobubi, usondeza itrone yogonyamelo;"
Amos6:4 Bahlala ezingqengqelweni zeempondo zeendlovu, banabe ezingqengqelweni zabo, badla amatakane empahla emfutshane, namathole eenkomo asemkhumbini;"
Amos6:5 abavuma ngesandi sohadi, nizenzele into yokubetha njengoDavide;"
Amos6:6 abasela iwayini ngezitya baze bazithambise ngeoli eninzi, kodwa abaziva zintlungu ngenxa yokubandezeleka kukaYosefu."
Amos6:7 Ngoku baya kuya ekuthinjweni kunye nabokuqala abathinjwa, nokutya kwabo baleleyo kuya kuthatyathwa."
Amos6:8 iNkosi uYehova imfungele, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, yathi, Ndilithiyile iqhayiya likaYakobi, ndizithiyile iingxande zakhe ezinde; ke ngoko, ndiya kusinikezela esi sixeko nako konke okukuso."
Amos6:9 Ukuba kuthe kwahlala amadoda alishumi ndlwini-nye, aya kufa;"
Amos6:10 Womthabatha uyisekazi waloo mntu, nalowo umtshisileyo, awakhuphele amathambo ngaphandle kwendlu, athi kulowo ungaphakathi endlwini, Kusekho mntu na kuni? kwaye uya kuthi: Hayi!"
Amos6:11 Ngokuba, uyabona, uYehova uwise umthetho, bayibethe indlu enkulu ibe ziintanda, nendlu encinane ibe ziintanda."
Amos6:12 Amahashe ayabaleka na phezu kwengxondorha? Ngubani na olima iinkomo khona? Ngokuba ukujike okusesikweni kwaba lugonyamelo, nesiqhamo sobulungisa wasiguqula saba ngumhlambi."
Amos6:13 Nina nivuyela into engento yanto, nithi: “Besingazuzanga iimpondo ngamandla ethu na?"
Amos6:14 Yabonani, ndinivusela uhlanga, ndlu kaSirayeli, utsho uYehova, uThixo wemikhosi; yaye ziya kunixina ukususela ekungeneni kweHamati ukuya kutsho kumlambo iSekaka."
Amos7:1 Yenjenje ukundibonisa iNkosi uYehova; yabona, udale iinkumbi ekuqalekeni kwehlumelo lokugqibela; yabona, yayisisityalo sokugqibela emva kokugawulwa kokumkani."
Amos7:2 Kwathi, yakugqiba ukuyidla ingca yelizwe, ndathi mna, Nkosi Yehova, ndixolele; wovuka nabani na uYakobi? kuba uselula."
Amos7:3 Waba buhlungu uYehova ngenxa yale nto, wathi, Ayinakwenzeka le nto, utsho uYehova."
Amos7:4 Yenjenje ukundibonisa iNkosi enguMongami uYehova: yaye, khangela!"
Amos7:5 Ndathi ke, Nkosi Yehova, khawuyeke! Ngubani na uYakobi oya kuma? kuba uselula."
Amos7:6 Wazohlwaya uYehova ngenxa yoko, wathi, Nale nto ayiyi kubakho; itsho iNkosi uYehova."
Amos7:7 Yandibonisa yona: nantso iNkosi imi eludongeni lwentambo yokulinganisa, iphethe ngesandla ulutya lokulinganisa."
Amos7:8 Wathi uYehova kum, Uyabona, Amosi na? Ndaza ndathi: Mkhokheli. Wathi uYehova, Yabona, ndibeka ulutya lokulinganisa esazulwini sabantu bam amaSirayeli; Andisayi kuphinda ndiwadlulise."
Amos7:9 Iintaba zakwaIsake ziya kuba senkangala, neengcwele zakwaSirayeli zibe senkangala; yaye ndiya kusuka ndihlasele indlu kaYerobhoham ngekrele."
Amos7:10 uAmatsiya, umbingeleli waseBheteli, wathumela kuYarobheham ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, esithi, vakalisa uAmosi kwindlu kaSirayeli; ilizwe alinakuwathwala onke amazwi alo."
Amos7:11 Kuba utsho uAmosi ukuthi: “uYerobhoham uya kufa likrele, noSirayeli ngokuqinisekileyo uya kuthinjwa asiwe ezweni lakhe."
Amos7:12 Wathi uAmatsiya kuAmosi, Mboni, hamba, ubalekele ezweni lakwaYuda, udle isonka khona, uprofete khona."
Amos7:13 Kodwa uze ungabi saphinda uprofete eBheteli, kuba yindlu yokumkani yokuthandaza, ikwayindlu yokumkani."
Amos7:14 Waphendula uAmosi, wathi kuAmatsiya, Andimprofeti, andinyana wamprofeti; Bendingumalusi weenkomo, ndingumvuni wesikamore;"
Amos7:15 uYehova wandithabatha ndisalusa umhlambi, uYehova wathi kum, Yiya uprofete kubantu bam amaSirayeli."
Amos7:16 Kaloku live ilizwi likaYehova. Uthi wena, Akuyi kuwisa ntetho kumaSirayeli, lingawi ilizwi lakho phezu kwendlu kaIsake."
Amos7:17 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova ukuthi, Umfazi wakho uya kuhenyuza phakathi komzi, bawe likrele oonyana bakho neentombi zakho; yaye ngokuqinisekileyo uya kufela kwilizwe eliyinkangala, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo uSirayeli uya kuthinjwa emke emhlabeni wakhe."
Amos8:1 Yandibonisa iNkosi uYehova: nantso ingobozi ineziqhamo zasehlotyeni.
Amos8:2 Yathi, Uyabona, Amosi? Ndathi: Yingobozi eneziqhamo zasehlotyeni. Wathi uYehova kum, Isiphelo sibafikele abantu bam amaSirayeli; Andisayi kuphinda ndiwadlulise."
Amos8:3 Ziya kumemelela iingoma zetempile ngaloo mini, itsho iNkosi uYehova; ziya kuba ninzi izidumbu; ziya kuwagxotha ngokuzola."
Amos8:4 Yivani oku, nina badla izisweli;"
Amos8:5 Bathi, Kuya kudlula nini na ukuthwasa kwenyanga, sithengise ngengqolowa? Nesabatha, ukuze sihlwayele ingqolowa ngokunciphisa iefa neshekele enkulu, size siguqule izikali ngobuxoki?"
Amos8:6 ukuba sibe nako ukuthenga amahlwempu ngesilivere, namahlwempu ngeembadada ezimbini; ewe, kwaye uthengise inkunkuma yengqolowa?"
Amos8:7 Ufunge uYehova ubukhulu bukaYakobi, esithi, Andiyi kuzilibala izenzo zabo zonke."
Amos8:8 Aliyi kunyikima na ilizwe ngenxa yoku, baze balile bonke abemi balo? liya kunyuka lonke liphela njengomlambo; liya kulahlwa, linxile njengomlambo waseYiputa."
Amos8:9 Ngaloo mini, itsho iNkosi enguMongami uYehova, ndiya kulitshonisa ilanga emini enkulu, ndenze ubumnyama ehlabathini emini enkulu."
Amos8:10 Ndiya kuyijika imithendeleko yenu ibe sisijwili, neengoma zenu zonke zibe sisijwili; Ndiya kubeka ezirhwexayo emanqeni onke, neentloko zonke ndichebe; yaye ndiya kukwenza kube njengentlungu yonyana okuphela kwakhe, nokuphela kwayo kube njengemini yosizi."
Amos8:11 Yabonani, kuza imihla, itsho iNkosi uYehova, endiya kuthumela ngayo indlala elizweni, ingabi kuko ukulambela isonka, kungabi kuko ukunxanelwa amanzi;"
Amos8:12 Yaye ngokuqinisekileyo baya kuchithachithwa ukusuka elwandle ukusa elwandle, nokusuka emntla ukusa ngasempuma, ngokuqinisekileyo baya kubaleka baye kufuna ilizwi likaYehova, kodwa abayi kulifumana."
Amos8:13 Ngaloo mini baya kuwa isiduli umthinjana nabafana, linxano;"
Amos8:14 Ngabo abo bafunga isono sakwaSamari, besithi, Ehleli nje uThixo wakho, Dan! nendlela eya eBher-shebha; nabo baya kuwa, bangabuyi bavuke."
Amos9:1 Ndayibona iNkosi imi ngasesibingelelweni, yathi, Betha ucango oluphezulu, umgubasi uzowushukuma; uwanqumle entloko onke; ndibabulale abokugqibela babo ngekrele;"
Amos9:2 Ukuba bathe bemba emhadini, sobathabatha khona isandla sam; nokuba bathe benyuka baya ezulwini, ndobahlisa."
Amos9:3 Nokuba bathe bazimela encotsheni yeKarmele, ndobafuna nalapho, ndibathabathe; ukuba bathe babusithelisa ubuso bam ezinzulwini zolwandle, ndothumela inyoka khona, ibalume."
Amos9:4 Nokuba bathe bathinjwa phambi kweentshaba zabo, ndolithumela khona ikrele, libabulale; ndiwaguqulele kubo amehlo am, kube kubi, kungabi kokulungileyo."
Amos9:5 uYehova woqhwithela uya kuliphatha ilizwe, libe senkangala, babe buhlungu bonke abemiyo kulo; liya kunyuka lonke liphela njengomlambo; yaye ngokuqinisekileyo baya kurhaxwa ngokungathi barhaxwe ngumlambo waseYiputa."
Amos9:6 Nguye owakha amagumbi akhe emazulwini, Walimisayo ihlabathi ibhunga lakhe; owabiza amanzi olwandle, aphalaza ehlabathini: igama lakhe nguYehova."
Amos9:7 Aninjengoonyana bakaKushi na kum, nina nyana bakaSirayeli? utsho uYehova. Andiwakhuphanga na amaSirayeli ezweni laseYiputa? namaFilisti aseKafetori, nama-Aram aseKire?"
Amos9:8 Yabona, amehlo eNkosi uYehova abone ubukumkani obuzele sisono, ndibutshabalalise, bungabikho ehlabathini; kodwa andiyi kuyibetha ngesiqalekiso indlu kaYakobi; utsho uYehova."
Amos9:9 Kuba ndiwisa umthetho, ndiyihluze indlu kaSirayeli ezintlangeni zonke, njengokuba ihluzwa ingqolowa ngesihlungulo, kungawi nokhozo emhlabeni;"
Amos9:10 Bonke aboni babantu bam baya kunqunyulwa umkhonto, abo bathi, Abuyi kusichukumisa ububi, abuyi kusichukumisa;"
Amos9:11 Ngaloo mini ndiya kuwumisa umnquba owileyo kaDavide, ndizivingce iintanda zawo; ndiya kuwavusa amanxuwa alo, ndilakhe njengokwemihla yamandulo;"
Amos9:12 ukuze bawadle ilifa amasalela akwaEdom, neentlanga zonke ezibizwa ngegama lam; utsho uYehova okwenzayo oko."
Amos9:13 Yabonani, kuza imihla, utsho uYehova, aya kuthi ngayo umlimi abambe umvuni, athi umlimi-zidiliya abambe umhlwayeli; neentaba ziya kuthontsiza iwayini enencasa, neenduli zonke ziya kunyibilika."
Amos9:14 Ndiya kubabuyisa abathinjwa babantu bam amaSirayeli, bayakhe imizi engamanxuwa, bahlale kuyo; baya kutyala izidiliya, basele iwayini yazo; baya kutyala imiyezo, badle iziqhamo zayo."
Amos9:15 Ndobatyala emhlabeni wabo, bangabi sagxothwa emhlabeni wabo endibanike wona; utsho uYehova uThixo wakho."
Obadiah1:1 Umbono kaObhadiya. Itsho iNkosi uYehova ngoEdom, ukuthi, Siviwe ilizwi likaYehova, kuthunywe umthunywa ezintlangeni, esithi, Sukani nime, sisukele phezulu kuye, silwe naye."
Obadiah1:2 Yabonani, ndikwenze umncinanana ezintlangeni; ugxeka kakhulu."
Obadiah1:3 Ukukhukhumala kwentliziyo yakho kukulukuhlile, wena uhleli ezingxondorheni, okhaya liphezulu; othi entliziyweni yakhe, Ngubani na oya kundihlisa?"
Obadiah1:4 Ukuba uthe wakhela phezulu njengexhalanga, nokuba ithe indlu yakho yabekwa phakathi kweenkwenkwezi, ndokuhlisa nalapho; utsho uYehova."
Obadiah1:5 Ukuba amasela ebethe eza kuwe njengamasela ebusuku (hayi, ukunqunyulwa kwakho!), ebengayi kuba anele na? Ukuba abalimi bezidiliya bafike kuwe, babengayi kuzishiya na iidiliya?"
Obadiah1:6 Hayi indlela ezigocagocwe ngayo izinto zikaEsawu! Hayi ukuphengululeka kwezinto zakhe ezifihlakeleyo!
Obadiah1:7 Onke amadoda omnqophiso wakho akufikise emdeni; amadoda abehleli nawe eluxolweni anilukuhla, akoyisa; abadla isonka sakho babeka inxeba phantsi kwakho; akukho ukuqonda kuye."
Obadiah1:8 Andiyi kuthi na ngelo xesha, utsho uYehova, ndizitshabalalise izilumko zakwaEdom, nezilumko ezintabeni zakwaEsawu?"
Obadiah1:9 Aya kugubha amagorha akho, Teman, zigawulwe ngokubulawa zonke iintaba zakwaEsawu."
Obadiah1:10 Ngenxa yokumgonyamela kwakho umntakwenu uYakobi, uya kukugubungela, utshatyalaliswe ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo."
Obadiah1:11 Ngemini owama ngayo nxamnye nayo, mini awathi abasemzini bakhupha umkhosi wakhe nabasemzini abangena emasangweni akhe baza bayenzela amaqashiso iYerusalem, nawe wawunjengabawabo."
Obadiah1:12 Bekungafanelanga uyikhangele imini yomninawa wakho, mhla waba ngumphambukeli; yaye ubungafanelanga ube nemihlali ngoonyana bakaYuda ngemini yokutshatyalaliswa kwabo; Ungathethi ngokuzidla ngemini yembandezelo."
Obadiah1:13 Ubungafanelanga ungene esangweni labantu bam ngemini yeshwangusha labo; ewe, ubungabhekanga kwinkxwaleko yabo ngemini yeshwangusha labo, ungasa izandla zakho phezu kwempahla yabo ngemini yeshwangusha labo;"
Obadiah1:14 Yaye ubungafanelanga ume ekwahlukaneni kweendlela ukuze ubulale abasindileyo; nabo baseleyo ngemini yembandezelo, uze unganikezeli."
Obadiah1:15 Ngokuba isondele imini kaYehova kuzo zonke iintlanga; njengoko wenze ngako, kuya kwenjiwa njalo kuwe; umvuzo wakho uya kubuyela entlokweni yakho."
Obadiah1:16 Njengoko naselayo entabeni yam engcwele, ziya kuhlala zisela ngokunjalo zonke iintlanga, zisele, zidle, zibe njengabangahlanjwanga;"
Obadiah1:17 Ke, entabeni yeZiyon kuya kubakho usindiso, kube yingcwele; nendlu kaYakobi idle ilifa ubutyebi bayo."
Obadiah1:18 Yaye indlu kaYakobi iya kuba ngumlilo, nendlu kaYosefu iya kuba sisihombo somlilo, nabo bendlu kaEsawu baya kuba njengomdiza, batshise kuwo baze bawutshabalalise; akuyi kusala nto endlwini kaEsawu; ngokuba watshoyo uYehova."
Obadiah1:19 Abavela ezantsi baya kuzidla ilifa iintaba zakwaEsawu; yaye amaFilisti aya kulidla ilifa ilizwe lakwaEfrayim nelizwe lakwaSamari entlango; noBhenjamin uya kuyidla ilifa iGiliyadi.
Obadiah1:20 Yaye isiphelo salo mkhosi woonyana bakaSirayeli siya kulithimba ilizwe lakwaKanan kude kuse eTsarefathi; nabathinjwa baseYerusalem abavela eSefaradi baya kudla ilifa izixeko eziya ngasemzantsi.
Obadiah1:21 Konyuka abasindisi entabeni yeZiyon, ukuze bazigwebe iintaba zakwaEsawu; ubukumkani buya kuba bobukaYehova."
Jonah1:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYona, unyana ka-Amitayi, lisithi,"
Jonah1:2 Suk’ ume, uye eNineve, kuloo mzi mkhulu, ubulale ukumkani phezu kwawo; ngokuba ububi babo bunyuke phambi kwam."
Jonah1:3 Wesuka ke uYona, ebalekela eTarshishe phambi koYehova, wehla waya eYafo; wafumana inqanawa esinge eTarshishe, wayihlawulela indlela yakhe, wangena kuyo ukuze abone iTarshishe, emke ebusweni bukaYehova."
Jonah1:4 Ke uYehova wagalelekisa umoya omkhulu elwandle; kwabakho uqhwithela olukhulu elwandle, yaphuka inqanawa leyo."
Jonah1:5 Baza boyika oomatiloshe baza ngamnye wabiza ngamnye kuthixo wakhe waza wayijulela elwandle impahla ebisenqanaweni ukuze kube lula kubo. uYona wehla waya ecaleni lomkhombe; walala phantsi.
Jonah1:6 Weza ke kuye umthetheli-waka, wathi kuye, Uthini na wena, Rabhi? vuka, ubize uThixo wakho, ukuba usikhumbule uThixo wakho, ukuba singabhubhi."
Jonah1:7 Bathi ke elowo kummelwane wakhe, Yizani, senze amaqashiso, sazi ukuba kungenxa yeni na ukuba sihlelwe bububi. Bawisa amaqashiso, iqashiso laphuma noYona."
Jonah1:8 Bathi kuye, Sixelele ukuba sihlelwe ngubani na obu bubi; yintoni umsebenzi wakho kwaye ungowaphi? lithini ilizwe lakho kwaye ungowasiphi isizwe?"
Jonah1:9 Wathi kubo, NdingumHebhere; yaye ndiyamoyika uYehova uTHIXO wamazulu owenza ulwandle nomhlaba owomileyo."
Jonah1:10 Oyika amadoda lawo ngoloyiko olukhulu, athi kuye, Yini na ukuba wenze le nto? Kuba loo madoda ayesazi isizathu sokuba abaleke ebusweni bukaYehova, kuba wayewaxelele."
Jonah1:11 Athi kuye, Masenze ntoni na, ukuze ulwandle lusiyeke? ngokuba ulwandle belugubha, lwagubha."
Jonah1:12 Wathi kuwo, Ndithabatheni, nindijulele elwandle; ngoko ke ulwandle luya kunizolisa, kuba ndiyazi ukuba esi sivuthuvuthu sinifikele, ngenxa yam."
Jonah1:13 Atyhudisa emazeni amadoda, ezama ukuyibuyisela emhlabeni; akhohlwa, ngokuba ulwandle lwalusilwa, lusilwa phambi kwabo."
Jonah1:14 Bathandaza kuYehova, bathi, Siyakuthandaza kuwe, Yehova, ukuba ungabhubhi ngomphefumlo wale ndoda, ungaphalazi igazi elimsulwa phezu kwethu; ngokuba, Yehova, wenze ngokuthanda kwakho."
Jonah1:15 Ambamba ke uYona, amjulela elwandle, lwazola ulwandle."
Jonah1:16 Andula ke loo madoda amoyika ngokugqithiseleyo uYehova aze azise uYehova umbingelelo aze enze izifungo.
Jonah1:17 uYehova wathumela intlanzi enkulu ukuba imginye uYona. uYona wahlala embilinini wentlanzi iimini ezintathu nobusuku obuthathu.
Jonah2:1 uYona wathandaza kuYehova uThixo wakhe esembilinini wentlanzi, wathi,"
Jonah2:2 Ndathi, Ndakhala kuYehova ngenxa yokubandezeleka kwam, wandiva; ndisesiswini sobafileyo, ndakhala, waliva ilizwi lam."
Jonah2:3 Ngokuba wawundiphosa enzulwini, embilinini yolwandle; Yandirhawula imilambo, Adlula phezu kwam onke amaza akho alwayo, namaza akho alwayo."
Jonah2:4 Ndathi ke mna, Ndigxothiwe phambi kobuso bakho; Noko ke ndiya kubuya ndiyikhangele etempileni yakho engcwele."
Jonah2:5 Andirhawula amanzi, ada eza emphefumlweni;"
Jonah2:6 Ndehla ndaya ezingontsini zeentaba; Lindijikelezile ihlabathi nemithwalo yalo; noko ke ubuphakamisile eboleni ubomi bam, Yehova Thixo wam!"
Jonah2:7 Xa umoya wam wawudandathekileyo ngaphakathi kwam, ndacinga ngoYehova, waza umthandazo wam wafika kuwe, etempileni yakho engcwele."
Jonah2:8 Bayirhole inceba abayibonayo into engamampunge,"
Jonah2:9 Ke mna ndiya kubingelela kuni ndinelizwi lombulelo; Ndiza kuyihlawula into endiyithembisileyo. Usindiso luvela kuYehova.
Jonah2:10 uYehova wathetha nentlanzi, yaza yamhlamba uYona emhlabeni owomileyo."
Jonah3:1 Lafika ilizwi likaYehova kuYona okwesibini, lisithi,"
Jonah3:2 Suk’ ume, uye eNineve, kuloo mzi mkhulu, umemeze ilizwi endikuwisela umthetho ngako."
Jonah3:3 Wesuka ke uYona, waya eNineve ngokwelizwi likaYehova. Yaye iNineve yayisisixeko esikhulu kakhulu, esinohambo lweentsuku ezintathu."
Jonah3:4 uYona waqala wangena kuwo umzi, uhambo losuku olunye, wadanduluka esithi, Zisaya kuba ziintsuku ezimashumi mane, iNineve iwile."
Jonah3:5 Abantu baseNineve bakholwa kuThixo, bawubhengeza umhla wozila ukudla, bambatha iingubo ezimnyama, bethabathela komkhulu besa kwabancinane bawo."
Jonah3:6 Lafika ilizwi elo kukumkani waseNineve, wayishiya itrone yakhe, wayikhulula ingubo yakhe enkulu, wazigquma ngezirhwexayo, wahlala eluthuthwini."
Jonah3:7 Wayixela, waza wayizisa iNineve ngokomyalelo kakumkani nabalungiseleli bakhe, esithi: “Makungabikho mntu nasilwanyana sasekhaya, okanye nkomo okanye gusha, engangcanga nto; ungadli, ungaseli manzi."
Jonah3:8 Mabambathe iingubo ezimnyama umntu nenkomo, akhale kuThixo ngamandla; ewe, makabuye elowo endleleni yakhe embi, nakugonyamelo olusezandleni zakhe."
Jonah3:9 Ngubani na owaziyo ukuba uThixo angazohlwaya, abuye, abuye emsindweni wakhe, ukuze singabhubhi?"
Jonah3:10 uThixo wazibona izenzo zabo, ukuba babuyile ezindleleni zabo; uThixo wabenza ububi, abethe uya kubenza kubo; akayenza."
Jonah4:1 Kodwa uYona waba buhlungu kakhulu loo nto, waza wavutha ngumsindo."
Jonah4:2 Wathandaza kuYehova, wathi, Owu Yehova, asilolizwi na endalithethayo ndisezweni lakowethu? Ndabalekela eTarshishe ngenxa engaphambili, kuba ndandisazi ukuba uThixo unemfesane, onemfesane, onobulali, onenceba, nobugwenxa."
Jonah4:3 Wususe ke, Yehova, umoya wam kum; kuba kukulungele ukufa kunokuba udle ubomi."
Jonah4:4 Wathi uYehova, Yinto elungileyo na ukuqumba?"
Jonah4:5 Wemka ke uYona esixekweni, wahlala ngasempumalanga kuwo umzi, wazenzela umnquba, wahlala emthunzini phantsi kwawo, wada wabona ukuba kuya kwenzeka ntoni na kuwo umzi."
Jonah4:6 uYehova uThixo wammisela umthi womthombe, wamgcina uYona, ukuze ube ngumthunzi entlokweni yakhe, umkhulule kwiintlungu zakhe. Yaye uYona wakuvuyela kakhulu ukuphatheka kakuhle."
Jonah4:7 Ngengomso uThixo wamisela umbungu, wawubetha umthi, woma."
Jonah4:8 Ekuphumeni kwelanga, uThixo wahambisa umoya wasempumalanga; ilanga labetha entloko kuYona, wadinwa, wafuna ukufa ngaphakathi kwakhe, wathi, Kulungile ukuba ndife kunokuba ndidle ubomi."
Jonah4:9 Wathi uThixo kuYona, Kulungile na ukuba uvuthe ngumsindo ngale ndoda? Wathi: Kulungile ukundiqumbela kude kuse ekufeni."
Jonah4:10 Wathi uYehova, Unenceba kwikhoboka lakho, ubungamkhonzanga, ukuba unganduluki; abavuka ngabusuku bunye, batshabalala ngabusuku bunye;"
Jonah4:11 ndingabi nanceba na ke ngenxa yeNineve, loo mzi mkhulu, unabantu abangaphezu kwamashumi amathandathu amawaka, abangakwaziyo ukwahlula ekunene kwekhohlo; neenkomo ezininzi?"
Micah1:1 Ilizwi likaYehova elafika kuMika waseMara, ngemihla kaYotam, ka-Ahazi, kaHezekiya, ookumkani bakwaYuda, awalibonayo ngokusingisele kwelakwaSamari neYerusalem."
Micah1:2 Yivani, nonke zintlanga; yivani, hlabathi nenzaliseko yalo, ibe lingqina iNkosi uYehova ngani, uYehova etempileni yakhe engcwele."
Micah1:3 Kuba, yabona, uYehova uya kuyishiya indawo yakhe, ade ahle, anyathele phezu kwemimango yehlabathi."
Micah1:4 Iintaba ziya kunyibilika phantsi kwakhe, neentlambo ziya kucandeka, njengomthwebeba weenyosi phambi komlilo nanjengamanzi athululelwa eweni."
Micah1:5 Konke oku kungenxa yesikreqo sikaYakobi nesono sendlu kaSirayeli. Yintoni impazamo kaYakobi? AsingokwaSamari na? Ziyintoni na iintaba zakwaYuda? AsiyoYerusalem na?
Micah1:6 Ngoko ke ndolenza elakwaSamari libe yimfumba yamasimi, libe njengezidiliya; ndiwaphose amatye alo emfuleni, ndizityhile iziseko zalo."
Micah1:7 Iya kwaphulwa yonke imifanekiso yakhe eqingqiweyo, utshiswe ngomlilo wonke umvuzo wakhe; ngokuba ubuthiwe emvuthweni wehenyukazi, baya kubuyela emvuzweni wehenyukazi."
Micah1:8 Ngako oko, ndiya kukhala, ndikhale, ndize, ndize; ndiya kukhala njengempungutye, ndilile njengeenciniba."
Micah1:9 Kuba inxeba lakhe alinakuphiliswa; ngokuba ibifike kwaYuda; yeza esangweni labantu bam eYerusalem.
Micah1:10 Musani ukuyikhankanya iGati, musani ukukhala; ziqengqeleka eluthulini endlwini ka-Afra."
Micah1:11 Hambani, mmi waseSafire, nize, nineentloni; igama lakhe uya kulamkela kuni."
Micah1:12 Kuba abemi baseMaroti babelindele okulungileyo, kodwa kwakusihla ububi buphuma kuYehova beza esangweni leYerusalem."
Micah1:13 Bophani inqwelo yokulwa, bemi baseLagishe; kukuqala kwesono sentombi enguZiyon, ngenxa yokuba izikreqo zakwaSirayeli zifunyenwe kuwe."
Micah1:14 Ngako oko yiphani iMoreshete yaseGati; izindlu zika-Akishe ziya kuba ngubuxoki kookumkani bakwaSirayeli.
Micah1:15 Ndiya kukuzisela indlalifa, mnini kaMaresa; uya kufika eAdulam, eluzuko lukaSirayeli."
Micah1:16 Zilungise, uzinyule koonyana bakho abanenceba; zandise ukucheba kwakho njengexhalanga; ngokuba anishiya ekuthinjweni."
Micah2:1 Yeha ke, abo bacebayo, benza ububi ezililini zabo! xa kunetha imvula, bayayenza loo nto, kuba kusemandleni ezandla zabo."
Micah2:2 Bacebisana ngamasimi, bazithabatha; nezindlu bazifudusa; bacudisa umfo nendlu yakhe, indoda nelifa layo."
Micah2:3 Ngako oko, wathi uYehova, Yabonani, ndicinga ububi ngesi sizukulwana, ongayi kuzisusa iintamo zenu kuso; ningahambi ngokuzidla, ngokuba eli xesha libi."
Micah2:4 Ngelo xesha umntu uya kukhupha umzekeliso ngawo, abhomboloze elila, esithi, Sibhuqiwe ngenene; Usitshintshile isabelo sabantu bam; Uyisuse njani kum! Wayahlulahlula intsimi yethu."
Micah2:5 Ngoko ke akuyi kuba namntu owenza amaqashiso ebandleni likaYehova.
Micah2:6 Bathi, Musani ukuwisa intetho, bewisa intetho;"
Micah2:7 Wena kuthiwa uyindlu kaYakobi, uyashukunyiswa na uMoya kaYehova? yinto ayenzayo leyo? Akalungisi na amazwi am kohamba ngobulungisa?"
Micah2:8 Ngelo xesha abantu bam baqhubeka bekhula njengeentshaba: Nibahluba ingubo yokwaleka abo badlula ngoxolo njengabantu abaphambukayo emfazweni.
Micah2:9 Abafazi babantu bam bayakugxotha ezindlwini zezihombo zabo; ubuhluthe ubungangamsha babantwana babo ngonaphakade.
Micah2:10 Vuka, uhambe; ngokuba indawo yenu asiyiyo indawo yokuphumla kwenu;"
Micah2:11 Ukuba umntu ohamba nomoya, wathetha ubuxoki, wathetha ubuxoki, wathi, Ndiya kuwisa intetho kuni ngewayini nangesiselo esinxilisayo; kwaye uya kuba ngumprofeti wolu hlanga."
Micah2:12 Ndiya kukuhlanganisa okunene, Yakobi, uphela; okunene ndiya kuwabutha amasalela akwaSirayeli; ndiya kubabutha njengempahla emfutshane yaseBhotsera, njengomhlambi ophakathi kwedlelo lawo;"
Micah2:13 Unyuke phambi kwabo umbhuqi; batyhoboza, bangena ngesango, baphuma ngalo; yaye ukumkani wabo uya kubakhokela, yaye uYehova uya kubakhokela."
Micah3:1 Ndathi ke, Khanive, zintloko zakwaYakobi, nani kumkani bendlu kaSirayeli. Asikokwenu na ukwazi umgwebo?"
Micah3:2 othiya okulungileyo, athande okubi; abo bahlinza ulusu lwabo, nenyama yabo emathanjeni abo;"
Micah3:3 nina, bayidlileyo inyama yabantu bam, bahlube ulusu lwabo; bawaphula amathambo abo, bawanqunqa njengembiza, nenyama embizeni."
Micah3:4 Baya kwandula babize kuYehova, angabaphulaphuli; Ngelo xesha uya kubusithelisa ubuso bakhe kubo, ngokuba benze ububi ngeentlondi zabo;"
Micah3:5 Utsho uYehova ngokusingisele kubaprofeti ababandwendwisayo abantu bam, abatshixiza amazinyo, abadandulukayo, besithi, Luxolo; ke yena ongangeni emlonyeni wabo, bamlungiselele imfazwe."
Micah3:6 Ngoko ke niya kuba nobusuku, ukuze ningabi nabo; kuya kuba mnyama kuwe, ukuze ungaboni; liya kutshona ilanga kubaprofeti, ibe mnyama imini kubo."
Micah3:7 Ziya kudana iimboni, zibe neentloni amatola; ewe, bonke baya kuzifihla izipaji zabo; ngokuba akukho mpendulo kaThixo."
Micah3:8 Ke mna ndizele amandla ngomoya kaYehova, nobulungisa namandla, ukuze ndimxelele uYakobi ukreqo lwakhe, uSirayeli isono sakhe."
Micah3:9 Liveni eli lizwi, nina zintloko zendlu kaYakobi, nani baphathi bendlu kaSirayeli, nina bakuthiyileyo ubulungisa, bakugqwetha konke okusesikweni."
Micah3:10 Bayakha iZiyon ngamagazi, neYerusalem ngobugqwetha;"
Micah3:11 Abathetheli bayo bagweba ngenxa yesicengo, nababingeleli bayo bafundisa ngenxa yesicengo, nabaprofeti bayo baprofeta ngenxa yemali; noko baya kuyama ngoYehova, besithi, uYehova akakho na phakathi kwethu? akukho nto imbi inokusehlela."
Micah3:12 Ngenxa yoko, iZiyon iya kutyalwa njengentsimi ngenxa yenu, iYerusalem ibe yimfumba yamatye, nentaba yayo indlu ibe njengeentaba zehlathi."
Micah4:1 Ke kaloku, ekupheleni kwemihla, intaba yendlu kaYehova iya kuma ezintabeni, izivelele iinduli; kwaye abantu baya kuthontelana ukuya kuyo."
Micah4:2 Ziya kuza iintlanga ezininzi, zisithi, Yizani, sinyuke siye entabeni kaYehova, endlwini yoThixo kaYakobi; asiyalele iindlela zakhe, sihambe ngeendlela zakhe; kuba umyalelo uya kuvela eZiyon, nelizwi likaYehova eYerusalem."
Micah4:3 Uya kugweba phakathi kwezizwe ezininzi, ohlwaye izizwe ezinamandla, avela kude; ziwakhande amakrele azo abe zizitshetshe zeediliya, nezikhali zazo zibe zizikere zokuthena imithi; uhlanga aluyi kuphakamisela olunye uhlanga ikrele, nezizwe zingaphindi zifunde ukulwa."
Micah4:4 Baya kuhlala elowo phantsi komdiliya wakhe, naphantsi komkhiwane wakhe; yaye akukho bani uya kubothusa, ngenxa yokuba umlomo kaYehova wemikhosi ukuthethile oko."
Micah4:5 Ngokuba zonke iintlanga ziya kuhamba ngasinye egameni lothixo waso, kwaye thina siya kuhamba egameni likaYehova uThixo wethu, ngonaphakade kanaphakade."
Micah4:6 Ngaloo mini, utsho uYehova, ndiya kubahlanganisa abathi cwaka, ndibabuthe abagxothiweyo, nabagxothiweyo nam;"
Micah4:7 Abaphukileyo ndiya kubenza amasalela, nabakhulileyo ndibenze uhlanga olunamandla; yaye uYehova uya kubalawula eNtabeni yeZiyon ukususela ngoku kuse kwixesha elingenammiselo."
Micah4:8 Wena ke, nqaba ende yomhlambi, nduli yentombi enguZiyon, kuya kuza kuwe ubukumkani bokuqala ubukumkani buya kufika entombini enguYerusalem."
Micah4:9 Yini na ukuba udanduluke ngezwi elikhulu? Akukho kumkani na kuwe? Ngaba umcebisi wakho ufile? ngokuba intlungu injengomfazi onenimba.
Micah4:10 Zibhijabhije, zala, ntombi inguZiyon, njengozalayo; kuba ngoku uya kusishiya isixeko, uhlale emaphandleni, uye eBhabhiloni; niya kusindiswa khona; uya kukuhlangula uYehova esandleni seentshaba zakho."
Micah4:11 Kananjalo iintlanga ezininzi zikuhlanganisele kuwe, zisithi, Mayihlanjelwe, ayibone amehlo ethu iZiyon."
Micah4:12 Kodwa zona ezi azizazi iingcamango zikaYehova, yaye aziliqondi icebo lakhe, kuba uya kuzihlanganisa njengemfumba emhlabeni."
Micah4:13 Vukani, unxaniwe, ntombi inguZiyon; kuba uphondo lwakho ndilwenza isinyithi, neenzipho zakho zibe lubhedu; uya kwaphula iintlanga ezininzi; yaye indyebo yabo ndiya kuyinikela kuYehova nobutyebi babo kwiNkosi yehlabathi liphela."
Micah5:1 Kaloku ke, hlanganisana, ntombi yomkhosi; Wasingqinga; baya kumbetha ngentonga umgwebi wakwaSirayeli esidleleni."
Micah5:2 “Kodwa wena, Bhetelehem-efrata, nangona umncinane phakathi kwamawaka akwaYuda, noko ke uya kuphuma kuwe uze kum, yaye mna ndiya kuba yinkokeli kaSirayeli; abazalwayo kususela kwamandulo, kwasephakadeni."
Micah5:3 Ngako oko uya kuwanikela kubo, kude kube lixesha lokuzala kwayo; abuye ke amasalela abazalwana bakhe, aye koonyana bakaSirayeli;"
Micah5:4 uya kuma, aluse enamandla kaYehova, enobungangamsha begama likaYehova uThixo wakhe; kwaye ziya kuhlala, ngenxa yokuba ngoku uya kuba mkhulu kude kube sekupheleni kwehlabathi."
Micah5:5 Yoba luxolo loo ndoda, xa ama-Asiriya azileyo ezweni lakowethu; Ukuba uthe wanyathela ezingxandeni zethu ezinde, sonikela kuye abalusi abasixhenxe, namagosa asithoba anamazinyo amabini."
Micah5:6 Baya kulonakalisa ilizwe laseAsiriya ngekrele, nelizwe lakwaNimrodi emasangweni alo; ngokunjalo uya kusihlangula eAsiriya, xa ayingenelayo ilizwe lakowethu, xa athe wangena ezweni lakowethu."
Micah5:7 Amasalela akwaYakobi aya kuba phakathi kwezizwe ezininzi, njengombethe ophuma kuYehova, nanjengemvula ebutyanini, engashiyi mntu, engalindeli oonyana babantu."
Micah5:8 Amasalela akwaYakobi aya kuba phakathi kweentlanga phakathi kwezizwe ezininzi njengengonyama phakathi kwezilo zehlathi, njengehobe phakathi kwemihlambi yeegusha; amaqhekeza, kwaye akukho bani unokukhulula ngentlawulelo."
Micah5:9 Isandla sakho siya kuboyisa iintshaba zakho, zinqunyulwe zonke iintshaba zakho."
Micah5:10 Ngaloo mini, utsho uYehova, ndiya kuwatshabalalisa amahashe akho, angabikho phakathi kwakho, ndizitshabalalise iinqwelo zakho zokulwa."
Micah5:11 Ndiya kuzitshabalalisa izixeko zelizwe lakho, ndizitshabalalise zonke iinqaba zakho."
Micah5:12 Ndowususa umlingo esandleni sakho; nabakhafuli akusayi kuba sabakho;
Micah5:13 Ndoyibhangisa imifanekiso yenu eqingqiweyo, ingabikho phakathi kwenu; aniyi kuphinda niqubude kumsebenzi wezandla zenu."
Micah5:14 Ndiwanyothule amahlathi akho phakathi kwakho, ndiyitshabalalise imizi yakho."
Micah5:15 Ndiya kuphindezela ezintlangeni ndinomsindo, ndinobushushu, ezingazange zakuva."
Micah6:1 Yivani into ayithethayo uYehova; Suk’ ume, ubambane neentaba, iinduli zilive ilizwi lakho;"
Micah6:2 Nina zintaba, liveni ilizwi likaYehova, nani ziseko zehlabathi, ngokuba uYehova ubambene nabantu bakhe, uya kulwa noSirayeli."
Micah6:3 Bantu bam, ndenze ntoni na kuni? kanti ndikudinise ngantoni? ngqinani ngam."
Micah6:4 Kuba ndanikhupha kwilizwe laseYiputa ndaza ndanikhulula endlwini yobukhoboka; Ndathuma ooMoses, uAron, noMiriyam, ukuba banikhokele."
Micah6:5 Owu bantu bam, khumbulani oko kwathethwa nguBhalaki ukumkani wakwaMowabhi noko kwaphendulwa nguBhileham unyana kaBhehore ukususela eShitim ukuya eGiligali; ukuze ubazi ubulungisa bukaYehova."
Micah6:6 Ndiya kumkhawulela uYehova ndinantoni na, ndiqubude phambi koThixo ophakamileyo? Ndiya kumkhawulela ndinamadini anyukayo na, ndinamathole amnyaka mnye na?"
Micah6:7 Wokholiswa na uYehova ngamawaka eenkunzi zeegusha, nangamawaka alishumi emilambo yeoli? Ndomnikela na unyana wam owamazibulo ngenxa yokreqo lwam, isiqhamo sesizalo sam na ngenxa yesono somphefumlo wam?"
Micah6:8 Wena mntu, ukuxelile okulungileyo; Yaye yintoni ayifunayo kuwe uYehova ngaphandle kokuba wenze okulungileyo, uthande uthando, uhambe noThixo wakho ngokuthozama?"
Micah6:9 Izwi likaYehova libhekisa kuwo umzi ukubiza, igama lakho liya kulibona igama lakho; mamela intonga ekuphetheyo."
Micah6:10 Busekho na ubuncwane bokungendawo endlwini yongendawo, nentwana yamasikizi?"
Micah6:11 Ndobagqala benyulu na, ndinomlinganiselo ombi, ndinengxowa yenkohliso?"
Micah6:12 Kuba ubutyebi bayo buzele lugonyamelo, nabemi bakhona bathethe ubuxoki, nolwimi lwabo lusemlonyeni wabo."
Micah6:13 Ngoko ke ndiya kunigulisa ngokunibetha, ndinihlaziye ngenxa yezono zenu."
Micah6:14 Niya kudla, ningahluthi; nokulahlwa kwakho kube phakathi kwakho; uya kubambisa, ungasindisi; nento eniya kuyinika omnye komnye, ndiyinike omnye komnye ikrele."
Micah6:15 Uya kuhlwayela, ungavuni; uxovule umnquma, kodwa ungazithambisi ngeoli; newayini emnandi, kodwa akuyi kusela wayini."
Micah6:16 Zigciniwe imithetho kaOmri, nayo yonke imisebenzi yendlu ka-Ahabhi, nihambe ngokwecebo layo; Ndiya kunenza kube senkangala, ndikwenze intlekisa, nabemi bayo; ke ngoko, kufuneka unxibe ingubo yokwaleka yabantu bam."
Micah7:1 Yeha ke mna! kuba njengokuvunwa kweziqhamo zasehlotyeni, njengokuvunwa kweediliya; akudliwa busika; umphefumlo wam ulangazelela iziqhamo ezivuthiweyo."
Micah7:2 Umntu olungileyo utshabalele ehlabathini, kwaye akukho malungisa phakathi kwabantu; bonke bafuna igazi; elowo uzingela umzalwana wakhe ngomnatha."
Micah7:3 Ukuba ngezandla zozibini benze ububi, bacele kukumkani; umgwebi acele umvuzo; nendoda enkulu ixela umnqweno wayo owoyikekayo; Bayivala ke."
Micah7:4 Olungileyo kubo ufana nqwa nothango, ilungisa libukhali ngaphezu kothango lweminga; iyeza imini yokulinda kwenu; ngoku iza kuba sisidubedube."
Micah7:5 Musa ukukholosa ngomhlobo, ungathembeli ngamakholwa; Gcina iingcango zomlomo wakho ngenxa yalowo ulele esifubeni sakho."
Micah7:6 Ngokuba unyana uyambeka uyise, intombi isukela phezulu kunina, umolokazana kusukela phezulu kuninazala; iintshaba zomntu ngabantu bendlu yakhe;"
Micah7:7 Mna ke ndiya kuqwalasela kuYehova; ndiya kulindela kuThixo wokusindiswa kwam; uya kundiva uThixo wam.
Micah7:8 Musa ukundivuyelela, lutshaba lwam; ukuba ndithe ndawa, ndovuka; kuba, ndihleli ebumnyameni nje, uYehova uya kuba kukukhanya kum."
Micah7:9 Ukujala kukaYehova ndiya kukuthwala, kuba ndonile kuye, ade andise ematyaleni, andigwebe; Uya kundikhanyisela, ndibubone ubulungisa bakhe."
Micah7:10 Utshaba lwam luya kubona, lugutyungelwe kukudana, luthi kum, Uphi na uYehova, uThixo wakho? amehlo am aya kumbona; ngoku niya kunyathelwa njengodaka lweendlela."
Micah7:11 Ngaloo mini ziya kwakhiwa iindonga zakho, ngaloo mini umgwebo uya kuba kude."
Micah7:12 Ngelo xesha uya kuphinda eze kuwe evela eAsiriya nakwizixeko ezinqatyisiweyo nokususela kwinqaba ukusa kuMlambo nokususela kolunye ulwandle kuse kolunye ulwandle nokususela entabeni ukusa kolunye.
Micah7:13 Kodwa ilizwe liya kuba yintlango ngenxa yabemi balo, ngenxa yemiphumo yezenzo zabo."
Micah7:14 Baluse abantu bakho ngentonga yakho, izimvu zelifa lakho, ezizihlalela zodwa ehlathini phakathi kweKarmele; mabadle eBhashan naseGiliyadi, njengokwamandulo."
Micah7:15 Ndiza kumbonisa imimangaliso njengemihla yokuphuma kwakho kwilizwe laseYiputa.
Micah7:16 Iintlanga ziya kukubona oku, zibe neentloni ngenxa yobugorha bazo bonke; baya kubeka izandla emlonyeni, iindlebe zabo ziya kuthi cwaka."
Micah7:17 Ziya kukhotha uthuli njengeenyoka, ziphume emingxunyeni yazo njengeempethu; ziya kumoyika uYehova uThixo wethu, zoyike wena."
Micah7:18 Ngubani na onguThixo onjengawe, oxolela ubugwenxa, osidelayo isono samasalela elifa lakhe? Akayi kuwugcina umsindo wakhe ngonaphakade, ngokuba ethanda inceba."
Micah7:19 Uya kuguquka kwakhona kwaye abe nenceba kuthi; Uya kubunyathela ubugwenxa bethu; kwaye uya kuziphosa zonke izono zabo enzulwini yolwandle.
Micah7:20 Yena uya kuyingqina inyaniso kuYakobi nakuAbraham, ngenceba awababeka ngayo oobawo ngesifungo, kwakudala."
Nahum1:1 Isihlabo saseNineve. Incwadi yobuso kaNahum wase-Elkosite.
Nahum1:2 uYehova nguThixo onobukhwele, ophindezelayo; uYehova ngumphindezeli, unengcwangu; uYehova ngumphindezeli kubachasi bakhe, ezigcinele iintshaba zakhe umsindo wakhe."
Nahum1:3 iNkosi inomonde, inamandla; uYehova unendlela yakhe esaqhwithi nasesiphangweni, yaye amafu luthuli lweenyawo zakhe."
Nahum1:4 Ukhalimela ulwandle, alutshise, ayomise nemilambo yonke; ishwabene iBhashan, iKarmele yomile, intyantyambo yaseLebhanon yomile."
Nahum1:5 Iintaba ziyashukuma ngenxa yakhe, neenduli ziyanyibilika, nomhlaba uyavutha bubuso bakhe, ewe, umhlaba nabo bonke abahlala kuwo."
Nahum1:6 Ngubani na ongemayo phambi komsindo wakhe? yaye ngubani na onokukumisa ukuvutha komsindo wakhe? Umsindo wakhe uphalazeka njengomlilo, namawa ayadilizwa nguye."
Nahum1:7 uYehova nguThixo, uligwiba ngemini yeshwangusha; kwaye uyabazi abo bakholose ngaye."
Nahum1:8 Ke uya kuyitshabalalisa indawo yabo ngomkhukula unogumbe, azisukele iintshaba zabo emnyameni."
Nahum1:9 Uthini ngoYehova? uya kutshabalalisa; ixhala aliyi kuvuka okwesibini.
Nahum1:10 Kuba bofanelana bebuthelana ndawonye ngokweziphingo, benxila njengenxila, baya kutshatyalaliswa njengeendiza ezomileyo."
Nahum1:11 Uphuma kuwe oceba ububi ngoYehova, umcebisi ongendawo."
Nahum1:12 Wathi uYehova, Nokuba bathe cwaka, nokuba baninzi, baya kubhangiswa ekudluleni kwakhe. Nangona ndanixinzelela phantsi, andiyi kuphinda ndinicinezele."
Nahum1:13 Kuba ngoku ndiya kuyaphula idyokhwe yakhe, isuke kuwe, ndiziqhawule imixokelelwane yakho;"
Nahum1:14 Yawisa umthetho iNkosi ngani, ukuba akusayi kuba sahlwayelwa nto yimbi yegama lenu; Endlwini yothixo wakho ndowutshabalalisa umfanekiso oqingqiweyo notyhidiweyo; ngokuba enobubi."
Nahum1:15 Yabonani, zisezintabeni iinyawo zalowo uzisa iindaba ezilungileyo, lowo uvakalisa uxolo. Yenza imithendeleko yakho, Yuda, zalisa izibhambathiso zakho; ngokuba akayi kubuya acande kuwe ongendawo; unqunyulwe okulungileyo."
Nahum2:1 Umtyholi uphumile ebusweni bakho; zigcineni izixhobo zenu, zigcineni iindlela, ziqiniseni izinqe zenu, nize womeleze amandla enu kangangoko."
Nahum2:2 Ngokuba uYehova ulususile uzuko lukaYakobi njengobuqaqawuli bukaSirayeli;
Nahum2:3 Ingweletshetshe yamagorha akhe ibomvu, amagorha anxibe iingubo ezibomvu;"
Nahum2:4 Iinqwelo zokulwa ziya kungena emabaleni, zime zithe tye, zajongana ezitratweni; usuke wanjengombane, wabaleka njengombane."
Nahum2:5 Uya kuthetha izinto zakhe ezilungileyo; baya kukhubeka endleleni yabo; ziya kugxalathelana ukuya eludongeni lwakhe, ibe ilungile ingxonde yomkhosi wayo."
Nahum2:6 Amasango emilambo aya kuvulwa, lichitheke ibhotwe."
Nahum2:7 Yaye uHushabe uya kuthatyathelwa ekuthinjweni, yena uya kuphakanyiswa, nezalamane zakhe ziya kumsa ngaphambili njengesandi samahobe ahleli esifubeni sawo."
Nahum2:8 Kodwa iNineve injengechibi elidala, kodwa yona iya kubaleka. Linda, linda, baya kulila; kodwa akukho bani uya kubheka ngasemva."
Nahum2:9 Thabathani isilivere, nithinge igolide; kuba akukho kuphela ukubuthwa nokuhomba kweento zonke ezilungileyo."
Nahum2:10 Ulambatha, udidekile, intliziyo iyanyibilika, amadolo akho ayabethana, nesinqe sakho sibuhlungu, ubuso babo bumnyama."
Nahum2:11 Iphi na indawo yokuhlala yeengonyama nedlelo leengonyama, apho ingonyama, ewe, ingonyama entsha, nengonyama entsha, ihambile, kungekho bani ubothusayo?"
Nahum2:12 Ingonyama le iqwenga okwanele amathole ayo, iwuzele iingonyamakazi zayo, iwuzalise umzi wayo ngexhoba, nemiqolomba yayo ngamanqina."
Nahum2:13 Yabona, ndinendawo ngawe, utsho uYehova wemikhosi; ndiya kuzitshisa iinqwelo zakhe zokulwa, umkhonto uzidle iingubo zakho; yaye ndiza kulisusa ixhoba lakho emhlabeni, nelizwi labathunywa bakho lingabi saviwa."
Nahum3:1 Yeha, umzi uzele ligazi! uzele bubuxoki nokuphanga; into ethinjiweyo ayimki;"
Nahum3:2 Kuvakala isandi sesabhokhwe nesandi samavili nesamahashe abalekayo neenqwelo zokulwa ezibalekayo.
Nahum3:3 Umkhweli wehashe uphakamisa ikrele elibengezelayo, nokubengezela komkhonto; nezidumbu zabo azinakuphela; bakhubeka phezu kwezidumbu zabo."
Nahum3:4 Ngenxa yobuninzi bezihenyuzo zehenyukazi elinethamsanqa, umnini-kukhafula, othengisa iintlanga ngobuhenyu balo, nemizalwane ngobukhafula balo."
Nahum3:5 Yabonani, ndinendawo nani, utsho uYehova wemikhosi; yaye ngokuqinisekileyo ndiya kuyivuna intlawulelo yakho ebusweni bakho ndize ndilibonise ihlazo lakho ezintlangeni nakookumkani ihlazo lakho."
Nahum3:6 Ndiya kunigalela ngothuli, ndinigculele, ndinibeke njengesixhanti."
Nahum3:7 Kuya kuthi, bonke abakubonayo bakoyike, bathi, iNineve ibhuqekile; ngubani na oya kumlilela? ndingabafuna phi na abathuthuzeli bakho?"
Nahum3:8 Ngaba ulungile wena ngaphezu kwabemi boMlambo umNayile, ababemi phakathi kwemilambo, ababezungulwe ngamanzi, elunxwemeni lolwandle, eludonga lwayo lululwandle?"
Nahum3:9 Ayengamandla ayo amaKushi kwanamaYiputa, engenakuphela ndawo ke; uPute noLubime bebengabancedisi bakho."
Nahum3:10 Ke yena wafuduswa, waya ekuthinjweni; nabantwana bakhe banyathelwa ezimbonjeni zezitrato zonke; yaye amadoda akhe abekekileyo ayelawula, nawo onke amadoda akhe amakhulu ekhonkxiwe ngemixokelelwane."
Nahum3:11 Nawe uya kunxila; uya kungcwatywa, ufune ubungangamsha ngenxa yotshaba."
Nahum3:12 Zonke iinqaba zakho ziya kuba njengemikhiwane enamakhiwane aqalela ekuqaleni; xa zishukunyiswa, zowela emlonyeni walowo uzidlayo."
Nahum3:13 Yabona, abantu bakho bangamankazana phakathi kwakho; amasango elizwe lakho aya kuvulelwa iintshaba zakho; umlilo uya kuzitshisa izitshixo zakho."
Nahum3:14 Lungiselela amanzi ongqingo, qinisa iinqaba zakho; ngena eludakeni, uxovule udongwe, utywine izitena."
Nahum3:15 Apho umlilo uya kukutshisa; ikrele liya kukutshabalalisa, ulidle njengenkumbi ekhothululayo; ukuze ufane neentethe, ube njengeenkumbi."
Nahum3:16 Ubandisile ke abarhwebi bakho ngaphezu kweenkwenkwezi zezulu;
Nahum3:17 Isithsaba sakho sinjengeenkumbi, neenkosana zakho zinjengeenkumbi ezinkulu ezihlala ezindongeni ngemini ebandayo, kodwa ekuphumeni kwelanga ziyabaleka, kungaziwa ukuba ziphi na."
Nahum3:18 Wena kumkani waseAsiriya, abalusi bakho balele; ziya kuhlala eluthulini iingangamsha zakho; bathe phangalala abantu bakho ezintabeni, akukho ubabuthayo."
Nahum3:19 Akukho kuphiliswa emivuzweni yakho; Inxeba lakho linzima; bonke abazivayo iziqhamo zakho baya kukuqhwabela izandla; Ngubani na ke, ukuba ubugwenxa bakho bungahlali buhleli phezu kwakho?"
Habakkuk1:1 Ilizwi awalibonayo umprofeti uHabhakuki.
Habakkuk1:2 Kunini na, Yehova, ndibiza, ungandiva; ndibize ngogonyamelo, ungahlanguli;"
Habakkuk1:3 Yini na ukuba ubuxele ubugwenxa bam, undikhangelise? kuba phambi kwam ukubhuqa nogonyamelo luphambi kwam;"
Habakkuk1:4 Ke ngoko, umthetho awusalindelwe, nomgwebo awupheli; ngokuba abangendawo bawaxinzelele phantsi amalungisa; ke ngoko ukugwetywa okungalunganga kuyaqhubeka."
Habakkuk1:5 Khangelani, nina phakathi kweentlanga, nondele, nimangaliswe ngendlela emangalisayo; ngokuba ndiya kwenza umsebenzi ngemihla yenu, eningasayi kukholwa nguwo, nokuba nithe nawuxelelwa."
Habakkuk1:6 Ngokuba, yabonani, ndixhoxha amaKaledi, laa madoda anobujorha, azizigantsontso;"
Habakkuk1:7 Ziyoyikeka, ziyoyikeka, ziphuma kubo isigwebo nesidima sabo."
Habakkuk1:8 Amahashe alo anamendu ngaphezu kwamangwe, abukhali ngaphezu kweengcuka zasebusuku; baya kuphaphazela njengokhozi oludlayo."
Habakkuk1:9 Bonke bephela baya kuza benogonyamelo; ubuso babo buya kwanya njengomoya wasempumalanga, bababuthe abathinjwa njengentlabathi."
Habakkuk1:10 Baya kugculela ookumkani, nezidwangube zibe yintlekisa kubo; ziya kuzigculela zonke iinqaba; ngokuba baya kubutha uthuli, baluthabathe."
Habakkuk1:11 Uya kwandula ke atshintshe imbono yakhe, adlule aze acatshukiswe kukuvakalisa amandla akhe kuthixo wakhe."
Habakkuk1:12 Akuphumi na ukusa kwixesha elingenammiselo, Yehova Thixo wam, Lowo Ungcwele wam? asiyi kufa. uYehova wabagweba; wena Thixo oligorha, ubaqinisele ukuba ubakhalimele."
