Habakkuk1:13 Unamehlo ahlambulukileyo, ukuba angayikhangeli into embi, ukuba ungaboni okubi; Olibonayo inginingini, uthi cwaka, ongendawo akamdli na umntu owadlulayo kuye?"
Habakkuk1:14 Ubenza abantu babe njengeentlanzi zolwandle na, njengezinambuzane ezingenamlawuli?"
Habakkuk1:15 Benyuka bonke bephela, babanyusa endlwini, babambisa ngeminatha yabo, bahlanganisana ngomnatha; ngoko ke, bonwabile, bonwabile."
Habakkuk1:16 Ngenxa yoko bayazibingelela, ushushu umsi wamantshontsho abo; kuba isabelo sabo sityebile, nokutya kwabo kuninzi."
Habakkuk1:17 Ngaba ngoku baya kuphosa iminatha yabo baze bacebe ukubulala iintlanga?
Habakkuk2:1 Mna ndiya kuma emboniselweni yam, ndihlale phezu kwenqaba, ndibonisele, ukuba ndiyibone into aya kundixelela yona, nento endiya kuyijika ngenxa yesohlwayo sam."
Habakkuk2:2 Wandiphendula uYehova, wathi, Bhala lo mbono, uwukrole emacwecweni, ukuze owulesayo abaleke."
Habakkuk2:3 Kuba umbono usaya kuba ngowexesha elimisiweyo, ukhawulezela ekupheleni, angathethi wona amanga; ukuba uzilazisile, ulinde yena; ngokuba iya kuza, ayiyi kuphela."
Habakkuk2:4 Yabona, umoya wakhe ophakemeyo awulungisi kuye; ke lona ilungisa liya kudla ubomi ngokholo lwalo."
Habakkuk2:5 Kananjalo, emke newayini, uyindoda enekratshi, engahlali endlwini; owandisa umnqweno wakhe njengofileyo, enjengokufa, angahluthi; ke zonke iintlanga ziyahlutha bahlanganiselwa kuye, bahlanganisa bonke izizwe kuye."
Habakkuk2:6 Aziyi kumhlazisa na zonke ziphela, zimngcikive, zisithi, Uha, lowo wandisa okungekwakhe! ixesha elingakanani? nokumthwalela udongwe olungqingqwa!"
Habakkuk2:7 Abanilumayo abayi kuvuka kwaoko na, baze basuke bangesuki abakuqumbisayo, ube lixhoba labo?"
Habakkuk2:8 Ekubeni wena ubhunyule iintlanga ezininzi, aya kukuphanga onke amasalela eentlanga; ngenxa yamagazi oluntu, nangenxa yogonyamelo olwenzekayo ehlabathini, phakathi komzi, nabemi bawo bonke."
Habakkuk2:9 Yilahleko ke yalowo uyinyamekelayo indlu yakhe, ukuba akhe indlu yakhe phezulu, akhululeke ebubini!"
Habakkuk2:10 Uyixabele indlu yakho, ngokutshabalalisa iintlanga ezininzi; wonile kumphefumlo wakho."
Habakkuk2:11 Kuba ilitye eliseludongeni liya kukhala, umthi usabele."
Habakkuk2:12 Yeha, owakha umzi ngamagazi, owuqinisele umzi ngobungendawo!"
Habakkuk2:13 Yabona, akuphumi kuYehova wemikhosi na ukuthi abantu basebenze umlilo, babulaleke ilize?"
Habakkuk2:14 Kuba ihlabathi liya kuzala kukwazi uzuko lukaYehova, njengamanzi egubungele ulwandle."
Habakkuk2:15 Yeha, lowo useza ummelwane wakhe, lowo umnika indebe yakho, umnxilisa, ukuze ubone amampunge abo!"
Habakkuk2:16 Uzele luhlazo kuzuko; sela nawe, unxile; indebe yesandla sokunene sikaYehova iya kubuyela kuwe, nozuko lwakho luya kutshicelwa lihlazo."
Habakkuk2:17 Kuba ugonyamelo lwaseLebhanon luya kukugubungela nokuphangwa kwezilwanyana eziyingcangcazelisayo, ngenxa yamagazi oluntu nangenxa yogonyamelo olwenziwe emhlabeni, isixeko nakubo bonke abemi baso."
Habakkuk2:18 Unceda ntoni na umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, ukuba uthe wawunqumla umdali wawo? Umfanekiso otyhidiweyo, nomyali wobuxoki, omdali wento engenakuthetha?"
Habakkuk2:19 Yeha lowo uthi kwityholo: “Vuka! kwilitye elithe cwaka: Vuka, uya kufunda! Uyabona, wambeswe yigolide nesilivere; akukho moya kuwe;"
Habakkuk2:20 uYehova ke yena usetempileni yakhe engcwele; lithe cwaka phambi kwakhe ihlabathi lonke.
Habakkuk3:1 Umthandazo kaHabhakuki umprofeti ngoShigiyon.
Habakkuk3:2 Yehova, ndilivile ilizwi lakho, ndasuka ndoyika; Yehova, mayiphile imisebenzi yakho phakathi kweminyaka, Yazise phakathi kweminyaka; Unomsindo, khumbula inceba."
Habakkuk3:3 uThixo weza evela kwaTeman, Lowo Ungcwele evela kwiNtaba yaseParan. Sela. Ubuqaqawuli bakhe bagubungela amazulu, yaye umhlaba wazala yindumiso yakhe."
Habakkuk3:4 Ubuqaqawuli bakhe bunjengokukhanya; kwaphuma iimpondo esandleni sakhe, yaye amandla akhe efihliwe."
Habakkuk3:5 Yandulela indyikitya yokufa, yahamba iinyawo zakhe ngamalahle avuthayo."
Habakkuk3:6 Usukile walilinganisa ihlabathi; zathi saa iintaba ezingunaphakade, zasibekeka iinduli ezingunaphakade; iindlela zakhe zingunaphakade."
Habakkuk3:7 Ndazibona iintente zakwaKushan zisenkathazweni, neempahla zelizwe lakwaMidiyan zididizela."
Habakkuk3:8 Ngaba uYehova waba nomsindo nxamnye nemilambo? Ngaba umsindo wakho wawuphezu kwemilambo? Ukujamela kwakho ulwandle na, xa ukhwele amahashe akho, zikholose iinqwelo zakho zokulwa?"
Habakkuk3:9 Sihlulwe saphele isaphetha sakho; ngokwesifungo sezizukulwana ngezizukulwana, nelizwi lakho. Ucanda imilambo ihlabathi;"
Habakkuk3:10 Iintaba zakubona, zanyikima; Isikhukula saphakamisa izwi lakhe, waphakamisa izandla zakhe."
Habakkuk3:11 Ilanga nenyanga zema endaweni yazo, ngokukhanya kweentolo zakho zadlula ngokukhanya komkhonto wakho."
Habakkuk3:12 Ihlabathi ulicanda ngomsindo, ubulala iintlanga ngomsindo."
Habakkuk3:13 Uphume ukubasindisa abantu bakho, ewe, ukubasindisa ngomthanjiswa wakho; Uyaphule intloko endlwini yongendawo, Usihlube isiseko sakhe, use entanyeni. Sela."
Habakkuk3:14 Ubaxabele abathetheli bemizi yakhe ngeentonga zakho; baphuma njengesaqhwithi, beza kundigubungela; ukonwaba kwabo kwaba njengokuwadla ngasese amahlwempu."
Habakkuk3:15 Wakhwela amahashe akho elwandle, emanzini amaninzi;"
Habakkuk3:16 Ndathi ndakukuva oko, saxuxuzela isisu sam; Wabengezela umlomo wam ngelizwi elo; Kwangena isihogo emathanjeni am, ndangcangcazela phakathi kwam, Ukuze ndiphumle ngemini yokusindeka;"
Habakkuk3:17 Nokuba umkhiwane awusayi kutyatyamba, nemidiliya ingavelisi siqhamo; umsebenzi womnquma uya kupheliswa, namasimi angayi kuvelisa kudla; izilwanyana ezincinci kufuneka zitshatyalaliswe kusasa, kwaye kungabikho iinkomo kusasa;"
Habakkuk3:18 Ke mna, ndiya kudlamka ndikuYehova, Ndigcobe ndikuThixo umsindisi wam."
Habakkuk3:19 uYehova ungamandla am, uzenza iinyawo zam, zibe njengezamaxhama, undikhaphela endaweni ephakamileyo kum. Kumongameli wokubethelwa izinto ezineentambo."
Zephaniah1:1 Ilizwi likaYehova elafika kuZefaniya unyana kaKushi, unyana kaGedaliya, unyana ka-Amariya, unyana kaHezekiya, ngemihla kaYosiya unyana ka-Amon, ukumkani wakwaYuda."
Zephaniah1:2 Ndiza kuqalekisa yonk’ into ephuma emhlabeni,’ utsho uYehova."
Zephaniah1:3 Ndiya kutshabalalisa umntu nenkomo; Ndiya kuzitshabalalisa iintaka zezulu, neentlanzi zolwandle, nezikhubekiso zabangendawo; yaye ndiza kumnqumla umntu emhlabeni,’ utsho uYehova."
Zephaniah1:4 Isandla sam ndiya kusolula phezu koYuda, naphezu kwabemi bonke baseYerusalem; ndiwatshabalalise amasalela kaBhahali kule ndawo, negama leMarim ndawonye nababingeleli;"
Zephaniah1:5 Nabo banqula imizimba yasezulwini phezu kophahla; nabanqulayo, bafunga uYehova, bafunga uMalkame;"
Zephaniah1:6 nabatyekayo kuYehova; nabangamfunanga uYehova, abangambuzanga uYehova."
Zephaniah1:7 Yithini cwaka phambi kweNkosi enguMongami uYehova, ngenxa yokuba ikufuphi imini kaYehova; ngokuba uYehova uwulungisile umbingelelo, ubarhole abamenyiweyo bakhe."
Zephaniah1:8 Kuya kuthi ke ngomhla wombingelelo kaYehova, ndibakhalimele abathetheli, noonyana bokumkani, nabo bonke abanxiba ngubo zimbi."
Zephaniah1:9 Kwangaloo mini ndiya kubohlwaya bonke abagqobhoza iingcango, abazalise izindlu zabaninizo ngogonyamelo nenkohliso."
Zephaniah1:10 Ngaloo mini,’ utsho uYehova, kuya kubakho isandi sokukhwaza sivela kwiSango Leentlanzi, isandi sokukhwaza sivela kowesibini, nesandi esikhulu esiphuma ezintabeni."
Zephaniah1:11 Lilani, bemi baseMakate, ngokuba babhuqiwe bonke abarhwebi; bonke abanxiba isilivere baya kutshabalala."
Zephaniah1:12 Ngelo xesha ndiya kuyigocagoca iYerusalem ngezibane ndize ndibohlwaye abo bahleli ezingqengqelweni zabo, abathi ezintliziyweni zabo: ‘uYehova akenzi okulungileyo okanye okubi."
Zephaniah1:13 Ngako oko ilifa labo liya kuphangwa, nezindlu zabo zibe ngamanxuwa; baya kwakha izindlu, bangahlali kuzo; baya kutyala izidiliya, kodwa abayi kuyisela iwayini yazo."
Zephaniah1:14 Isondele imini enkulu yeNkosi, ikufuphi, iyakhawuleza kakhulu, ilizwi lemini yeNkosi; igorha liya kubhomboloza ngokukrakra apho."
Zephaniah1:15 Loo mini yimini yomsindo, yimini yesibetho nesihelegu, yimini yentshabalalo nentshabalalo, yimini yobumnyama nesithokothoko, yimini yamafu nesithokothoko."
Zephaniah1:16 Imini yesigodlo nokuhlaba umkhosi nxamnye nezixeko ezinqatyisiweyo nakwiinqaba eziphakamileyo.
Zephaniah1:17 Ndiya kubazisela ukubandezeleka abantu ukuze bahambe njengeemfama, ngenxa yokuba bonile kuYehova; igazi labo liya kuphalazwa njengothuli, nenyama yabo njengomthi."
Zephaniah1:18 Isilivere yabo negolide yabo ayiyi kuba nako ukubasindisa ngemini yokuphuphuma komsindo kaYehova; nehlabathi liphela liya kutshiswa ngumlilo wekhwele lakhe;
Zephaniah2:1 Hlanganisani, ewe, hlanganisani, nina bantu bangathandekiyo;"
Zephaniah2:2 Ngaphambi kokuba uwiswe umyalelo, ngaphambi kokuba loo mini idlule njengomququ, ngaphambi kokuba umsindo kaYehova unifikele, ngaphambi kokuba imini yomsindo kaYehova inifikele."
Zephaniah2:3 Funani uYehova, nonke balulamileyo belizwe, okwenzileyo okusesikweni kwakhe; funani ubulungisa, funani ululamo; mhlawumbi uya kungcwatywa ngemini yomsindo kaYehova."
Zephaniah2:4 Kuba iGaza iya kuba sisishiyi, neAshkelon ibe yintlango; baya kuyigxotha iAshdode emini emaqanda, inyothulwe iEkron."
Zephaniah2:5 Yeha, abemi baselunxwemeni, bemi baseKrete! Ilizwi likaYehova lichasene nani; iKanan, ilizwe lamaFilisti, ndiya kukutshabalalisa, kungabikho mmi."
Zephaniah2:6 Unxweme lolwandle luya kuba ngamakriwa, neminquba yabalusi, nezibaya zeenkomo;"
Zephaniah2:7 Yaye ilizwe liya kuba lelamasalela endlu yakwaYuda; aya kudla kuyo; baya kulala ezindlwini zaseAshkelon; ngokuba uya kuwavelela uYehova uThixo wawo, awabuyise ekuthinjweni kwawo."
Zephaniah2:8 Ndikuvile ukungcikiva kukaMowabhi, ukungcikiva koonyana baka-Amon, ababangcikive ngako abantu bam, baziphakamisa phezu kwelizwe labo."
Zephaniah2:9 Ngako oko, ndihleli nje, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, ukuthi, uMowabhi uya kuba njengeSodom, noonyana baka-Amon babe njengeGomora, nemihadi yetyuwa, nenkangala ephanzileyo, kude kuse ephakadeni; amasalela abantu bam ziya kuzihlutha, namasalela abantu bam azihluthe."
Zephaniah2:10 Lilo elo ikratshi labo, ngenxa yokuba baye babadelela baza baziphakamisa abantu bakaYehova wemikhosi."
Zephaniah2:11 uYehova uya kunkwantya kubo, kuba uya kubabulala ngephango bonke oothixo behlabathi; yaye abantu baya kumnqula elowo endaweni yakhe, kuzo zonke iziqithi zeentlanga."
Zephaniah2:12 Nina, maKushi, niya kubulawa ngekrele lam;"
Zephaniah2:13 Uya kusolula isandla sakhe ngasezantsi, ayitshabalalise iAsiriya; woyijika iNineve ibe yintlango, umqwebedu onjengentlango."
Zephaniah2:14 Kuya kuhlala phakathi kwabo iintaka, amarhamncwa onke eentlanga; Kuhlala iintaka nokhwalimanzi ezindaweni zabo eziphakamileyo; ilizwi labo liya kumemelela ezifestileni; ukonakala kuya kuba sezingcangweni, ngenxa yokuba kuya kutyhilwa umsebenzi wemisedare."
Zephaniah2:15 Nguwo lowo umzi onoyolo, owahlala ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo, owathi entliziyweni yawo, Ndim kwaphela, akukho wumbi; Utheni na ukuba ube senkangala, ube sisikhundla samarhamncwa! bonke abadlula kuwo baya kuvuthela impempe, bewangawangisa ngesandla."
Zephaniah3:1 Yeha, umzi ongcolileyo, ongcolileyo, oxinzelela phantsi!"
Zephaniah3:2 Akaliphulaphulanga lizwi; akavuma ukukhalinyelwa; akamthembanga uYehova; akasondela kuThixo wakhe.
Zephaniah3:3 Abathetheli balo kulo baziingonyama ezibharhulayo; abagwebi bawo baziingcuka zasebusuku; abawaphuli amathambo kude kuse.
Zephaniah3:4 Abaprofeti bayo bangamatshijolo, ngabantu abanganyanisekanga;"
Zephaniah3:5 uYehova ulilungisa uphakathi kwawo; akenzi bubi; Imiso ngemiso uphuma phandle, akasileli; Ke yena ongendawo akanazintloni."
Zephaniah3:6 Ndazitshabalalisa iintlanga; zibhuqiwe iinqaba zabo; ndiziphanzisile iindlela zabo, ukuba kungadluli mntu;"
Zephaniah3:7 Ndathi, Okunene niya kundoyika, nilwamkele uqeqesho; ukuze lingatshabalali ikhaya labo, ndabaxabela ke; bavuka kusasa, bayonakalisa yonke imisebenzi yabo."
Zephaniah3:8 Ngako oko yilindeleni kum, utsho uYehova, ide ifike imini endiya kuvuka ngayo, ndeyise; Ngokuba injongo yam kukuhlanganisa iintlanga, ndibabuthe ookumkani, ukuze ndiwuthulule phezu kwabo umsindo wam, ewe, konke ukuvutha komsindo wam ngokuba ihlabathi lonke liya kutshiswa ngumlilo wekhwele lam."
Zephaniah3:9 Kuba ngelo xesha ndiya kuzinika iintlanga intetho enyulu, ukuze zonke zibize igama likaYehova, ukuze zimkhonze ngamxhelo mnye."
Zephaniah3:10 Bethabathela phesheya kwemilambo yakwaKushi, abathandaza kum, intombi yabantu bam abasasazekileyo, baya kubingelela kum."
Zephaniah3:11 Ngaloo mini akuyi kudana ngenxa yezenzo zakho zonke, ondiqumbise ngazo; kuba ngelo xesha ndiya kubashenxisa kuni abo banandipha ikratshi lenu, yaye anisayi kuphinda niqhayise ngentaba yam engcwele."
Zephaniah3:12 Ndiza kubashiya abadakumbileyo nabangamahlwempu phakathi kwenu, yaye baya kukholosa egameni likaYehova."
Zephaniah3:13 Amasalela akwaSirayeli akayi kwenza bubi, akayi kuxoka; nolwimi lwenkohliso aluyi kufunyanwa emlonyeni wabo; ngokuba baya kudla, bazole, kungabikho ubothusayo."
Zephaniah3:14 Memelela, ntombi inguZiyon; vuya, Sirayeli; vuya, ugcobe ngentliziyo yakho yonke, ntombi inguYerusalem;"
Zephaniah3:15 uYehova ukususile ukugwetywa kwakho, uzidedisile iintshaba zakho; ukumkani wakwaSirayeli, uYehova, uphakathi kwenu; aniyi kuphinda nibone ububi."
Zephaniah3:16 Ngaloo mini kuya kuthiwa kwiYerusalem, Musa ukoyika, wena Ziyon: mazingawi izandla zakho."
Zephaniah3:17 uYehova uThixo wakho uphakathi kwakho; uya kugcoba ngawe, evuya; uya kuphumla eluthandweni lwakhe, akunandiphe ngengoma."
Zephaniah3:18 Ndiya kubahlanganisa abalidayo emthendelekweni, nabaphuma phakathi kwenu, abaluxanduva kubo ngokudelela."
Zephaniah3:19 Yabona, ngelo xesha ndiya kuziphelisa zonke izinto ezinitshutshisayo, nabo bema ngxi, ndiya kubasindisa, ndibahlanganise abathinjiweyo; yaye ndiya kufumana indumiso nodumo lwabo kuwo onke amazwe abahlazeke kuwo."
Zephaniah3:20 Ngelo xesha ndiya kunizisa, ndinibuthe ngexesha elililo; kuba ndiya kunenza nibe negama nendumiso phakathi kweentlanga zonke zomhlaba ekubuyiseleni kwam ukuthinjwa kwenu phambi kwamehlo enu,” utsho uYehova."
Haggai1:1 Ngomnyaka wesibini wobukumkani bukaDariyo, ngenyanga yesithandathu, ngolokuqala enyangeni leyo, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuZerubhabheli, ibamba lakwaYuda, unyana kaShalatiyeli, ngoHagayi umprofeti, lisithi, kuYoshuwa, ukumkani wakwaYuda unyana kaYotsadeki, umbingeleli omkhulu, uthi:"
Haggai1:2 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Aba bantu bathi, Ixesha alikabikho, ixesha lokwakhiwa kwendlu kaYehova alikabikho."
Haggai1:3 Kwaza kwafika ilizwi likaYehova ngomprofeti uHagayi, lisithi:"
Haggai1:4 Ngaba lixesha lenu na, nina, lokuba nihlale ezindlwini zenu ezinqatyisiweyo, yaye le ndlu sele iyinkangala?"
Haggai1:5 Ke kaloku, utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Zigqaleni iindlela zenu."
Haggai1:6 Nidle kakhulu, navula kancinane; niyadla, ningahluthi; niyasela, anganeli sisiselo; niyanxiba, kodwa akufudumezi; yaye lowo wamkela intlawulo uya kubaphosela etyaleni elinemingxuma."
Haggai1:7 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Zigqaleni iindlela zenu."
Haggai1:8 Nyukani niye entabeni, nize nemithi, nakhe indlu; kwaye ndiya kugcoba ngayo, kwaye ndiya kundizukisa, utsho uYehova."
Haggai1:9 Ulinde ixesha elide, nantso i nto incinane; nithe nakuza nayo ekhaya, ndayivuthela. Ngoba? utsho uYehova wemikhosi. Ngenxa yebhodlo lendlu yam, nibalekela endlwini yenu nonke."
Haggai1:10 Ngenxa yoko, isibhakabhaka saba ngumbethe ngenxa yawo, nomhlaba wavingca iziqhamo zawo."
Haggai1:11 Ndabiza imbalela phezu komhlaba, naphezu kweentaba, naphezu kwengqolowa, naphezu kothuli, naphezu kweoli, naphezu kwemveliso yomhlaba, naphezu kwabantu, naphezu kweenkomo, naphezu komsebenzi wonke wezandla."
Haggai1:12 Baliphulaphula ke ooZerubhabheli unyana kaShalatiyeli, noYoshuwa unyana kaYotsadaki, umbingeleli omkhulu, namasalela onke abantu, ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wabo, namazwi kaHagayi umprofeti, njengoko wakuthethayo uYehova uThixo wabo wamthuma; basaba abantu phambi koYehova."
Haggai1:13 Wathetha uHagayi umthunywa kaYehova ebantwini ngelizwi likaYehova, wathi, Ndinani, utsho uYehova."
Haggai1:14 uYehova wawuxhokonxa umoya kaZerubhabheli unyana kaShalatiyeli, irhuluneli yakwaYuda, nomoya kaYoshuwa unyana kaYotsadeki, umbingeleli omkhulu, nomoya wayo yonke intsalela yohlanga; beza basebenza endlwini kaYehova wemikhosi, uThixo wabo;"
Haggai1:15 ngosuku lwamashumi omabini anesine lwenyanga yesithandathu, ngomnyaka wesibini kaDariyo ukumkani."
Haggai2:1 Ngenyanga yesixhenxe, ngosuku lwamashumi omabini analunye enyangeni leyo, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova ngoHagayi umprofeti, lisithi,"
Haggai2:2 Yithi kuZerubhabheli unyana kaShalatiyeli, ibamba lakwaYuda, nakuYoshuwa unyana kaYotsadaki, umbingeleli omkhulu, nakwabanye abantu, uthi,"
Haggai2:3 Ngubani na kuni apha oseleyo, owayibonayo le ndlu isebuqaqawulini bayo bokuqala? Ngoku ubona njani? Ngaba ithelekiswa nayo emehlweni akho?"
Haggai2:4 Kaloku ke yomelela, Zerubhabheli, utsho uYehova; yomelela, Yoshuwa nyana kaYosdeki, mbingeleli mkhulu; nomelele, nonke zintlanga zehlabathi, utsho uYehova, nisebenze; ngokuba ndinani, utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Haggai2:5 Ngokwelizwi elo, endakwenzayo kuni ekuphumeni kwenu eYiputa, ndisaligcinile, noMoya wam uphakathi kwenu; sukoyika."
Haggai2:6 Ngokuba utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Kungekudala, umzuzwana ke, ndinyikimise izulu, nehlabathi, nolwandle, nomhlaba owomileyo;"
Haggai2:7 ndizinyikimise zonke iintlanga, zifike izinto ezinqwenelekayo zeentlanga zonke; yaye ndiya kuyizalisa ngozuko le ndlu,’ utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Haggai2:8 Isilivere yeyam, igolide yeyam; utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Haggai2:9 Ubuqaqawuli bale ndlu yokugqibela buya kuba ngaphezu kobokuqala, utsho uYehova wemikhosi; kule ndawo ndiya kunika uxolo; utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Haggai2:10 Ngomhla wamashumi amabini anesine wenyanga yesithoba apho kuphela, ngomnyaka wesibini wobukumkani bukaDariyo, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova ngoHagayi umprofeti, lisithi:"
Haggai2:11 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Khanibuze ngomyalelo kubabingeleli, uthi,"
Haggai2:12 Ukuba ubani uthe wathabatha inyama engcwele ngomphetho wengubo yakhe, waza ngenxeba lakhe wachukumisa isonka okanye into eselwayo okanye iwayini okanye ioli okanye nayiphi na enye inyama, yoba ngcwele na? Baphendula ababingeleli bathi, Hayi."
Haggai2:13 Wathi ke uHagayi, Ukuba uthe wafika oyinqambi ngenxa yomfi, kwezo zinto, zoba ziinqambi na? Baphendula ababingeleli, bathi, Yonziwa inqambi."
Haggai2:14 Waphendula uHagayi, wathi, Kunjalo kolu hlanga, lube nje olu hlanga phambi kwam, utsho uYehova; kube njalo ke kuwo wonke umsebenzi wezandla zabo; nento abayibingelelayo khona ayihlambulukile."
Haggai2:15 Ngoku ke gqaleni, kuthabathele kule mini kuse phambili, kungekabekwa litye phezu kwelitye etempileni kaYehova."
Haggai2:16 Kususela ngaloo mini, xa umntu ebefike esitheni esimilinganiso imashumi mabini, asuke afumane libe linye ishumi; xa umntu weza kwisixovulelo seoli ukuza kukhupha iiemele ezingamashumi amahlanu kwisixovulelo, zazingamashumi amabini kuphela."
Haggai2:17 Ndanibetha ngombethe, nangombethe, nangesichotho, kuyo yonke imisebenzi yezandla zenu; noko anibuyelanga kum; utsho uYehova."
Haggai2:18 Ke kaloku, nikelani ingqalelo ukususela kulo mhla kuse phambili, ukususela kusuku lwamashumi amabini anesine lwenyanga yesithoba, ewe, ukususela kumhla esabekwa ngawo isiseko setempile kaYehova, nikelani ingqalelo kulo mbandela."
Haggai2:19 Isekho na imbewu eqongeni? ewe, umdiliya, nomkhiwane, nomrharnate, nomnquma, awakavelisi; Ukususela namhlanje ndiya kuthamsanqelisa."
Haggai2:20 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuHagayi ngomhla wamashumi amabini anesine enyangeni leyo, lisithi,"
Haggai2:21 Yitsho kuZerubhabheli, ibamba lakwaYuda, ukuthi, Ndiya kulinyikimisa izulu nehlabathi;"
Haggai2:22 Ndiya kuyibhukuqa itrone yezikumkani, ndiwatshabalalise amandla oorhulumente beentlanga; ndiya kuzibhukuqa iinqwelo zokulwa nabakhweli bazo; amahashe nabakhweli bawo baya kuwa, ngamnye ngekrele lomntakwabo."
Haggai2:23 Ngaloo mini, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, ndiya kukuthabatha, Zerubhabheli nyana kaSalatiyeli, mkhonzi wam, utsho uYehova, ndikwenze umsesane wokutywina; ngokuba ndikunyule; utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Zechariah1:1 Ngenyanga yesithoba neyesibini, ngomnyaka wesibini kaDariyo, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuZekariya unyana kaBherekiya, unyana kaIdo umprofeti, lisithi,"
Zechariah1:2 uYehova waba nomsindo kunene kooyihlo.
Zechariah1:3 Ngako oko uthi kubo, Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, “Buyelani kum, utsho uNdikhoyo onamandla onke; nam ndobuyela kuni,” utsho uNdikhoyo onamandla onke."
Zechariah1:4 Musani ukuba njengooyihlo, ababebizwayo ngabaprofeti bokuqala, besithi, Utsho uYehova wemikhosi; Guqukani ezindleleni zenu ezimbi nakwizenzo zenu ezibi, kodwa abazange babaphulaphule, yaye abazange bandiphulaphule,’ utsho uYehova."
Zechariah1:5 Baphi ooyihlo? nabaprofeti baya kudla ubomi ngonaphakade na?
Zechariah1:6 Kodwa amazwi am, nemiyalelo yam, endayimisela abakhonzi bam, abaprofeti, ayibafumananga na ooyihlo? Abuya ke athi, Njengoko uYehova wemikhosi ukwenzileyo kuthi ngokuhamba kwethuba, nangemisebenzi yethu, wenzé kuthi thina."
Zechariah1:7 Ngomhla wamashumi amabini anesine wenyanga yeshumi elinanye, oko kukuthi, inyanga enguSebhati, ngomnyaka wesibini kaDariyo, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuZekariya unyana kaBheregiya, unyana kaIdo umprofeti, lisithi,"
Zechariah1:8 Ndakhangela ebusuku, ndabona indoda ekhwele ihashe elibomvu, emi phakathi kwemimirtile esemhlabeni; ngasemva kwakhe ingamahashe abomvu, amfusa, namhlophe."
Zechariah1:9 Ndathi ke, Camagu, nkosi yam! Sathi kum isithunywa esibe sithetha nam, Ndokubonisa ukuba yintoni na."
Zechariah1:10 Waphendula umntu obemi phakathi kwemimirtile wathi, Aba ngoonyana abathunywe nguYehova ukuba bahambe ehlabathini."
Zechariah1:11 Basiphendula isithunywa sikaYehova esimi phakathi kwemimirtile, bathi, Silihambahambe ihlabathi, nalo lonke elimiweyo lizolile."
Zechariah1:12 Saphendula ke isithunywa sikaYehova, sathi, Yehova wemikhosi, koda kube nini na unesihe, ngenxa yeYerusalem nemizi yakwaYuda, owayibhavumayo le minyaka imashumi mathandathu?"
Zechariah1:13 uYehova wayiphendula ingelosi eyayithetha nam ngamazwi alungileyo nathuthuzelayo.
Zechariah1:14 Sathi kum isithunywa esibe sithetha nam, Biza, uthi, Itsho iNkosi wemikhosi ukuthi, Itsho iNkosi wemikhosi; Ndinekhwele ngeYerusalem neZiyon, ikhwele elikhulu."
Zechariah1:15 Andanelisekanga ncam ngabo baphumlayo beentlanga; ngenxa yokuba andikholiswanga kancinane, nabo ke bancedisa ekubandezelekeni kwabo."
Zechariah1:16 Ngako oko, utsho uYehova ukuthi, Ndiyibuyele iYerusalem ngemfesane; Indlu yam iya kwakhelwa khona, utsho uYehova wemikhosi; intambo yokulinganisa iya kolulwa phezu kweYerusalem."
Zechariah1:17 Yiya kwakhona uthi: Itsho iNkosi yeMasomomo; Izixeko zam ziya kwandiswa ngempumelelo; yaye uYehova uya kuqhubeka eyithuthuzela iZiyon aze aqhubeke ekhetha iYerusalem.
Zechariah1:18 Ndawaphakamisa amehlo am, ndakhangela, nanzo iimpondo ezine."
Zechariah1:19 Ndathi kwisithunywa esibe sithetha nam, Yintoni na? Saphendula sathi, Ezi ziimpondo ezichithachithe uYuda, uSirayeli, neYerusalem."
Zechariah1:20 Yaza iNkosi yandibonisa abachweli abane.
Zechariah1:21 Ndathi ke, Baya kwenza ntoni na aba bantu? Sathetha, sathi, Ezi ziimpondo ezachithachitha uYuda, akwaba sabakho uphakamisa intloko; yakwaYuda ukuba iyichithachithe."
Zechariah2:1 Ndaphinda ndawaphakamisa amehlo am, ndakhangela, nanko umntu ephethe ngesandla ulutya lokulinganisa."
Zechariah2:2 Ndathi ke, Uya ngaphi na? Wathi kum, Makhe ndiyilinganise iYerusalem, ndibone ububanzi bayo nobude bayo."
Zechariah2:3 Yabona, naso isithunywa esibe sithetha nam, siphuma;"
Zechariah2:4 Wathi kuyo, Gidima, uthethe nalaa ndodana, uthi, iYerusalem iya yakhiwe njengemizi engenakudonga, ngenxa yobuninzi babantu neenkomo zayo."
Zechariah2:5 Kuba mna, utsho uYehova, ndiya kuba ludonga lomlilo macala onke nokukhanya ngaphakathi kuyo."
Zechariah2:6 “Khangela! kuba ndinichithachithe njengemimoya yomine yezulu,” utsho uYehova."
Zechariah2:7 Zisindise, Ziyon, ohlala nentombi yaseBhabheli."
Zechariah2:8 Kuba utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Lo undithumile emva kozuko lweentlanga owazithimbayo; ngokuba ochukumisayo uchukumisa ukhozo lweliso lakhe."
Zechariah2:9 Kuba, uyabona, ndiya kulingisa ngesandla sam kuzo, zibe lixhoba labakhonzi bazo; nazi ukuba uYehova wemikhosi undithumile."
Zechariah2:10 Memelela, uvuye, ntombi inguZiyon; ngokuba ndiyeza, ndihlale phakathi kwakho; utsho uYehova."
Zechariah2:11 Ngaloo mini iintlanga ezininzi ziya kuhlangana noYehova, zibe ngabantu bam; yaye ndiya kuhlala phakathi kwenu, nazi ukuba uYehova wemikhosi undithumile kuni."
Zechariah2:12 Yaye uYehova uya kusidla ilifa isabelo sikaYuda emhlabeni ongcwele aze ayinyule kwakhona iYerusalem.
Zechariah2:13 Izinto ezizitho zine, nenyama yonke, phambi koYehova, ngokuba unyukile yena engcweleni yakhe."
Zechariah3:1 Wandibonisa uYoshuwa, umbingeleli omkhulu, emi phambi kwesithunywa sikaYehova, uSathana emi ngasekunene kwakhe, eza kulwa naye."
Zechariah3:2 Wathi uYehova kuSathana, Wanga uYehova akukhalimele, Sathana! ewe, uYehova oyinyulileyo iYerusalem ngamana angayikhalimela. Iziko alicinywanga na emlilweni?"
Zechariah3:3 uYoshuwa wayenxibe iimpahla ezimdaka waza wema phambi kwengelosi.
Zechariah3:4 Waphendula ke wathetha nabemiyo ngakuye, esithi, Mhlubeni iingubo ezimdaka. Wathi kuye, Uyabona, ndibususile ububi bakho kuwe, ndikwambese ingubo ende."
Zechariah3:5 Ndathi ke, Mabambeke unkontsho oluhle entloko; Bamfaka unkontsho oluhle entloko, bamambesa; Sema isithunywa sikaYehova."
Zechariah3:6 Ingelosi kaYehova yamkhalimela uYoshuwa, isithi:"
Zechariah3:7 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Ukuba nithe nahamba ngeendlela zam, nayigcina imithetho yam, nayigweba indlu yam, nazigcina iintendelezo zam, ndoninika izihlalo, ninyathele kuzo."
Zechariah3:8 Ke kaloku, khawuphulaphule, wena Yoshuwa, mbingeleli omkhulu, wena namaqabane akho ahleli phambi kwakho, ngenxa yokuba bangabantu abathe manga, ngenxa yokuba ndizisa umkhonzi wam, uLehlomela."
Zechariah3:9 Ngokuba nalo ilitye endalibeka phambi koYoshuwa; lityeni linye kuya kubakho amehlo asixhenxe; yabona, ndiyawubhala umbhalo wakhe, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, ndibususe ubungendawo belo lizwe ngamini-nye."
Zechariah3:10 Ngaloo mini, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, niya kubizela elowo ummelwane wakhe phantsi komdiliya naphantsi komkhiwane."
Zechariah4:1 Saphinda seza isithunywa esibe sithetha nam, sandivusa njengomntu ovuswa ebuthongweni."
Zechariah4:2 Wathi kum, Uyabona na? Ndathi, Ndabona, naso isiphatho sezibane segolide yonke, sinesitya phezu kwaso, sinezibane zaso ezisixhenxe phezu kwaso, nemibhobho yosixhenxe yezibane zaso phezu kwaso;"
Zechariah4:3 neminquma emibini ngakuso, omnye ungasekunene kwesitya, omnye ungasekhohlo."
Zechariah4:4 Ndaphendula ndathi, Ndathetha kwisithunywa esibe sithetha nam, ndathi, Yintoni na, nkosi yam?"
Zechariah4:5 Saphendula isithunywa esibe sithetha nam, sathi kum, Akuyazi na ukuba yintoni na le? Ndathi: Hayi, nkosi yam!"
Zechariah4:6 Yaza yaphendula yathi kum: “Nali ilizwi likaYehova kuZerubhabheli, lisithi: “Akungabukroti okanye ngamandla, kodwa kungomoya wam,” utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Zechariah4:7 Ungubani na wena, ntaba inkulu? phambi koZerubhabheli uya kuba lithafa, yaye uya kulisusa ilitye lengcwaba lakhe edanduluka esithi, Tarhu, inceba kuwe!"
Zechariah4:8 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Zechariah4:9 Izandla zikaZerubhabheli zaseka le ndlu; nezandla zakhe ziya kuyigqiba; nazi ukuba uYehova wemikhosi undithumele kuni.
Zechariah4:10 Ngokuba ngubani na owoyidela imini yezinto ezincinane? kuba baya kuba nemihlali basibone isitovu esandleni sikaZerubhabheli naba basixhenxe; ngamehlo kaYehova akhangela ehlabathini lonke.
Zechariah4:11 Ndaphendula ndathi kubo, Yini na ukuba le minquma mibini ibekwe ngasekunene kwesiphatho sesibane ngasekhohlo?"
Zechariah4:12 Ndaphendula okwesibini, ndathi kuso, Yini na ukuba ezi mbaxa zimbini zeminquma ziphalaze ioli yegolide emivuzweni emibini yegolide?"
Zechariah4:13 Sandiphendula, sathi, Akuyazi na ukuba yintoni na? Ndathi: Hayi, nkosi yam!"
Zechariah4:14 Wathi ke, Aba babini ngabathanjiswa, bema neNkosi yehlabathi lonke."
Zechariah5:1 Ndajika ke, ndawaphosa amehlo am, ndakhangela, nantso incwadi iphaphazela."
Zechariah5:2 Wathi kum, Uyabona na? Ndathi, Ndibona incwadi esongwayo iphaphazela; baziikubhite ezimashumi mabini ubude bayo, neekubhite ezilishumi ububanzi bayo."
Zechariah5:3 Yathi kum, Esi sisiqalekiso esigubungela ihlabathi lonke; ngokuba bonke abasukuba beba ngokukokwabo, baya kutshabalala ngaphaya; yaye othe wafunga uya kutshabalala njengakwelinye icala."
Zechariah5:4 Ndiya kuyikhupha, utsho uYehova wemikhosi; iya kungena endlwini yesela, nasendlwini yalowo ufunge ubuxoki egameni lam; Yohlala endlwini yayo, iyitshise ndawonye nemithi yayo namatye ayo."
Zechariah5:5 Ingelosi eyayithetha nam yaphuma yaza yathi kum: “Phakamisa amehlo akho uze ubone oko kuphumayo.
Zechariah5:6 Ndaza ndathi: Yintoni na le? Athi: Ndim lo uphumileyo. Waza wathi, Nguwo lo umnqophiso wabo phezu kwehlabathi lonke."
Zechariah5:7 Nantso italente yelothe inyuswa, nanko kuhleli inkazana esazulwini se-efa leyo."
Zechariah5:8 Wathi, Yimbi le; Wayiphosa kwi-efa; waphosa ubunzima belothe emlonyeni wayo."
Zechariah5:9 Ndawaphakamisa ke amehlo am, ndakhangela, ndabona abafazi ababini bevela, umoya usemaphikweni abo; ngokuba zazinamaphiko njengengwamza, wayiphakamisa iefa leyo, yaba phakathi komhlaba nezulu."
Zechariah5:10 Ndathi kwisithunywa esibe sithetha nam, Bakusa phi na?"
Zechariah5:11 Wathi kum, Ndiya kwakha indlu ezweni laseShinare; yaye iya kuma ngokuqinileyo, ime apho emhlabeni wayo."
Zechariah6:1 Ndajika, ndawaqwalasela amehlo am, ndakhangela, nanzo iinqwelo zokulwa zine, ziphuma phakathi kweentaba ezimbini; yaye iintaba yayiziintaba zobhedu."
Zechariah6:2 Enqwelweni yokuqala ibingamahashe abomvu; enqwelweni yesibini ingamahashe amnyama;
Zechariah6:3 Enqwelweni yesithathu ibingamahashe amhlophe; enqwelweni yesine ibingamahashe aqingqwe ngomkrolo.
Zechariah6:4 Ndasiphendula isithunywa esibe sithetha nam, ndathi, Yintoni na, nkosi yam?"
Zechariah6:5 Saphendula ke isithunywa, sathi kum, Aba ngoomoya abane bezulu, abafika bema phambi kweNkosi yehlabathi lonke."
Zechariah6:6 Kuyo amahashe amnyama, aya kwelasentla; nabamhlophe babalandela; namaqebengwana agcadiweyo aphuma aye ngasezantsi."
Zechariah6:7 Yaphuma inkosana yaza yafuna ukuhamba nehlabathi, yaza yathi, Hamba, uhambe nehlabathi. Ngoko bahamba bejikeleza ihlabathi."
Zechariah6:8 Sandibiza saza sathetha nam, sathi: “Yabona, abo baphambukela entla bawuthi shwaka umphefumlo wam entla."
Zechariah6:9 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kum, lisithi:"
Zechariah6:10 Thabatha kwabo bathinjelwe ekuthinjweni, uHeledayi, uTobhiya noYedaya, abaphuma eBhabhiloni, uze kwangaloo mini, ungene endlwini kaYosiya unyana kaZefaniya;"
Zechariah6:11 Ke kaloku thabatha isilivere negolide wenze izithsaba uze ubeke entlokweni kaYoshuwa unyana kaYehodeki umbingeleli omkhulu;
Zechariah6:12 Thetha kuye uthi, Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Le ndoda, igama layo linguLute; yaye uya kukhula endaweni yakhe aze ayakhe itempile kaYehova."
Zechariah6:13 Nguye oya kuyakha itempile kaYehova; uya kuba nozuko, ahlale, alawule etroneni yakhe; abe ngumbingeleli etroneni yakhe, ibe icebo loxolo libe phakathi kwabo bobabini."
Zechariah6:14 Kwaye izithsaba ziya kuba zezoHelem noTobhiya noYedaya noHen unyana kaZefaniya njengesikhumbuzo setempile kaYehova.
Zechariah6:15 Yaye abo bakude baya kuza beza kwakha itempile kaYehova, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo niya kwazi ukuba uYehova wemikhosi undithumile kuni. Yaye oku kuya kwenzeka ukuba uthe waliphulaphula ngenyameko ilizwi likaYehova uThixo wakho."
Zechariah7:1 Ngomnyaka wesine kaDariyo ukumkani, ngolwesine lwenyanga yesithoba apho, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuZekariya waseKisilevu;"
Zechariah7:2 Bathuma ooSeretsere noRegemeleki namadoda abo endlwini kaThixo, ukuba bathandaze kuYehova;"
Zechariah7:3 bathethe kubabingeleli ababesendlwini kaYehova wemikhosi, nakubaprofeti, bathi, Ndilile na ngenyanga yesihlanu, ndize ndizahlule, njengoko bendisenjenjalo iminyaka engaka?"
Zechariah7:4 Ke kaloku kwafika ilizwi likaYehova wemikhosi kum, lisithi:"
Zechariah7:5 Thetha kubantu bonke belizwe eli, nakubabingeleli, uthi, Enere, oko wakuzila ukudla, walila ngenyanga yesihlanu nangeyesixhenxe, ngaloo minyaka imashumi asixhenxe, ukuzila ukudla ngenxa yam na?"
Zechariah7:6 Xa benisidla nayisela, bekungadli na, bekungàseli nina na?"
Zechariah7:7 Anifanele nikuve na amazwi kaYehova awawathethayo ngabaprofeti bokuqala ekwakhiweni kweYerusalem yaza yaphumelela nakwizixeko eziyingqongileyo, ngoxa abantu babehlala emzantsi naseBalani leBala?"
Zechariah7:8 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuZekariya, lisithi:"
Zechariah7:9 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Thethani inyaniso, niyenzele inceba, niyenzele inceba, elowo kumzalwana wakhe."
Zechariah7:10 Umhlolokazi nenkedama, nomphambukeli, nehlwempu, uze ungamcinezeli; uze ungathethi kakubi ngomzalwana wakho entliziyweni yakhe."
Zechariah7:11 Abavumanga ke ukuva, barhola igxalaba labo, bazivala iindlebe zabo, ukuba abeva."
Zechariah7:12 Ewe, iintliziyo zabo bazenza zanjengelitye, ukuze bangawuva umyalelo namazwi, awawathumelayo uYehova wemikhosi ngomoya wakhe, ngabaprofeti bokuqala; ke ngoko, umsindo omkhulu uvela kuYehova wemikhosi."
Zechariah7:13 Ke ngoko, xa wabizayo, abeva; ngoko ke bakhwaza, yaye andizange ndiphulaphule, utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Zechariah7:14 Kodwa ndabachithachitha ngomoya wesaqhwithi phakathi kweentlanga zonke ababengazazi. Ngenxa yoko ilizwe laba yintlango emva kwabo, ekungacandi mntu kulo, kungabuyi mntu kulo; ngokuba balijika ilizwe elo elihle laba yintlango."
Zechariah8:1 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova wemikhosi kum, lisithi:"
Zechariah8:2 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Ndinekhwele ngeZiyon, ikhwele elikhulu;"
Zechariah8:3 Wathi uYehova; ndibuyele eZiyon; ndiya kuhlala eYerusalem, kuthiwe iYerusalem ngumzi wenyaniso; nentaba kaYehova wemikhosi yintaba engcwele."
Zechariah8:4 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Kusaya kuhlala amadoda amakhulu namaxhegokazi ezitratweni zaseYerusalem, elowo ephethe umsimelelo wakhe iminyaka emininzi;"
Zechariah8:5 Kuya kuzala izitrato zomzi ngamakhwenkwe namantombazana, edlala ezitratweni zawo;"
Zechariah8:6 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Ukuba kuyinto engummangaliso emehlweni amasalela olu hlanga, kule mini yanamhlanje, kuya kuba yinto engummangaliso yini na nasemehlweni am? utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Zechariah8:7 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Yabonani, ndiya kubasindisa abantu bam ezweni lasempumalanga, naselizweni lasentshonalanga;"
Zechariah8:8 Ndobazisa, bahlale phakathi kweYerusalem; yaye baya kuba ngabantu bam, nam ndibe nguThixo wabo ngokuthembeka nangobulungisa."
Zechariah8:9 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Izandla zenu mazomelele, nina bawevayo la mazwi, kule mini yaphakade, ngomlomo wabaprofeti, ekusekweni kwendlu kaYehova wemikhosi; itempile yayinokwakhiwa."
Zechariah8:10 Ngokuba phambi kwaloo mihla bekungekho mvuzo wabantu, kungekho mvuzo wawungekho; nophumileyo nongenayo, akubangakho luxolo ngenxa yobubi; ngokuba ndibamisele bonke bephela, elowo alwe owakhe."
Zechariah8:11 Ngoku ke andiyi kuphinda ndibe phakathi kwamasalela esi sizwe njengokwemihla yakudala,” utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Zechariah8:12 Ngokuba imbewu yoxolo; umdiliya wothwala isiqhamo sawo, nehlabathi linike indyebo yalo, nezulu linike umbethe walo; yaye zonke ezi zinto ndiya kuzinika intsalela yolu hlanga."
Zechariah8:13 Njengoko nisuke naba sisiqalekiso ezintlangeni, ndlu kaYuda, nani ndlu kaSirayeli! ngoko ndiya kunisindisa, nibe yintsikelelo; musani ukoyika, mazomelele izandla zenu."
Zechariah8:14 Ngokuba utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Njengoko ndakhumbulayo ukunivelela, oko ooyihlo bandingcikivayo, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, andazohlwaya ke."
Zechariah8:15 Kwakhona ndicinge ukwenza okulungileyo kwiYerusalem nakwindlu kaYuda ngale mihla; sukoyika.
Zechariah8:16 Zizo ezo izinto enifanele nizenze; Elowo uxelela ummelwane wakhe inyaniso; gwebani ngenyaniso nangoxolo emasangweni enu.
Zechariah8:17 Makungabikho namnye kuni ucinga ububi entliziyweni yakhe ngommelwane wakhe; ningathandi izifungo zobuxoki, ngokuba zonke ezi zizinto endizithiyileyo,” utsho uYehova."
Zechariah8:18 Kwafika ilizwi likaYehova wemikhosi kum, lisithi:"
Zechariah8:19 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Uzilo lweyesine inyanga, nozilo lweyesihlanu, nozilo lweyesixhenxe, nozilo lweyeshumi, kuya kuba yimihlali, nemivuyo, nemibhiyozo yemihlali endlwini kaYuda; ke ngoko thanda inyaniso noxolo."
Zechariah8:20 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Noko ke, iintlanga nabemi bemizi emininzi baya kuza;"
Zechariah8:21 Baya kuhamba abemi bomnye baye kwesinye, bathi, Masikhawuleze siye kuthandaza kuYehova, simquqele uYehova wemikhosi; Nam ndiya kuhamba."
Zechariah8:22 Ewe, iintlanga ezininzi nezizwe ezinamandla ziya kuza kumquqela uYehova wemikhosi eYerusalem, zimbongoze uYehova."
Zechariah8:23 Utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Ngelo xesha aya kulithimba amadoda alishumi eelwimi zonke zeentlanga, alithabathe icwecwe lomYuda, esithi, Siya kuhamba nani, ngokuba sivile ukuba kusithiwa, ndikunye nawe."
Zechariah9:1 Ilizwi likaYehova liya kuhlala ezweni laseHadrage neDamasko;
Zechariah9:2 iHamati yoba ngumda wayo; Tire neTsidon, nilumke kakhulu;"
Zechariah9:3 ITire yayakhela inqaba yaza yaqokelela isilivere njengothuli negolide esulungekileyo njengodaka lwezitrato.
Zechariah9:4 Yabona, uYehova uya kuligqogqa, nobugorha balo uwaphose elwandle; uya kutsha ngumlilo."
Zechariah9:5 iAshkelon iya kukubona oko, yoyike; nayo iGasa iya kuyibona ilusizi kakhulu, ne-Ekron; ngokuba liya kudaniswa ithemba lakhe; nokumkani uya kutshabalala eGaza, neAshkelon ayiyi kuthinjwa."
Zechariah9:6 Yaye eAshedodi ndiya kuba yindoda yohlobo lwam, ndize ndilitshabalalise ikratshi lamaFilisti."
Zechariah9:7 Ndiya kulisusa igazi lakhe emlonyeni wakhe, namasikizi akhe phakathi kwamazinyo akhe; kodwa lowo useleyo uya kuba ngokaThixo wethu, yaye ngokuqinisekileyo uya kuba njengerhuluneli yelizwe lakwaYuda, ne-Ekron ibe njengomYebhusi."
Zechariah9:8 Ndoyirhawula indlu yam ngenxa yomkhosi, ngenxa yodlulayo, nangenxa yobuyayo; yaye akukho zwilakhe uya kudlula kubo, ekubeni ngoku ndikubonile oko ngawam amehlo."
Zechariah9:9 Vuya kakhulu, ntombi inguZiyon; duma, ntombi inguYerusalem; Yabona, iNkosi yakho iza kuwe; Ulilungisa, unosindiso; ithobekile, ikhwele idonki, nedonki."
Zechariah9:10 Ndoziphanzisa iinqwelo zokulwa kwaEfrayim namahashe eYerusalem, zisongele isaphetha semfazwe; athethe uxolo kuzo iintlanga; Ubukumkani bakhe buya kuthabathela elwandle buse elwandle, buthabathele kumlambo iNayile, buzise eziphelweni zehlabathi."
Zechariah9:11 Ke wena, ngegazi lomnqophiso wakho ndiya kubakhupha abathinjwa bakho emhadini ongenamanzi;"
Zechariah9:12 Phethukelani entabeni leyo, nina babanjwa lithemba; namhlanje ndiyathembisa ukuba ndiya kukubuyekeza kabini;"
Zechariah9:13 Ukuba ndithe ndamelula uYuda, isaphetha sam ndimfakele uEfrayim noonyana bakho, Ziyon, ndiya kubaphakamisa oonyana bakho, Greece, ndikwenze ube njengekrele elinamandla."
Zechariah9:14 uYehova uya kubonakala phezu kwabo, luhambe njengombane utolo lwakhe; yaye iNkosi enguMongami uYehova iya kuvuthela ixilongo layo ize ihambe ngezaqhwithi ezisuka emzantsi."
Zechariah9:15 uYehova wemikhosi uya kubakhusela; zodliwa, zityunyuzwe ngamatye okusawula; baya kusela, benze isandi njengewayini; baya kuzala ngokweengqayi, nanjengeekona zesibingelelo."
Zechariah9:16 Yaye uYehova uThixo wabo uya kubahlangula ngaloo mini njengezimvu zabantu bakhe, ngenxa yokuba baya kuba njengamatye axhonywe njengeflegi ezweni lakhe."
Zechariah9:17 Kuba kungakanani na ukulunga kwabo, bungakanani na ubuhle babo! Ingqolowa iya kubavuyisa abafana, moss iimpelesi."
Zechariah10:1 Celani imvula kuYehova emvula yasekwindla; ngoko xa uYehova wenza amafu abengezelayo, wobanika imvula kuyo yonke ingca yelizwe."
Zechariah10:2 Kuba izithixo ezinezothe ezinqulwayo zithethe ilize, nabaneshologu babone ubuxoki, baxela amaphupha obuxoki; bathuthuzela ilize; zahamba njengomhlambi, zoyika, ngokuba kwakungekho malusi."
Zechariah10:3 Umsindo wam uvuthelwe kubalusi, ndaza ndazivelela iinkunzi zeebhokhwe, ngenxa yokuba uYehova wemikhosi wawuvelela umhlambi wakhe, indlu kaYuda, waza wawenza wanjengehashe lakhe elihle edabini."
Zechariah10:4 Kuvela kuye ilitye lembombo; kuya kuvela kuye isikhonkwane; kuya kuvela kuye isaphetha; kuya kuvela kuye bonke abakhandanisi ngakunye.
Zechariah10:5 Baya kuba njengamagorha anyathela iintshaba zawo eludakeni lwezitrato, emfazweni; yaye baya kulwa, ngenxa yokuba uYehova unabo, nabakhweli-mahashe baya kuba neentloni."
Zechariah10:6 Ndiya kuyomeleza indlu kaYuda, ndiyisindise indlu kaYosefu, ndibabuyise, baphile; kuba ndiyabasizela, kwaye baya kuba ngathi andibagatyanga; ngokuba ndinguYehova uThixo wabo, ndiya kubaphulaphula."
Zechariah10:7 Yoba njengegorha uEfrayim, yoba nemihlali intliziyo yabo, ngokungathi basele iwayini; ewe, abantwana babo baya kubona, bavuye; iintliziyo zabo ziya kuvuya ngoYehova."
Zechariah10:8 Ndiya kubethelela umlozi, ndibabuthe; ngokuba ndibakhulule ngokubahlawulela; baya kwanda, njengoko babesanda ngako."
Zechariah10:9 Ndiya kubahlwayela ezintlangeni, bandikhumbule emazweni akude; baya kuhlala nabantwana babo, babuye."
Zechariah10:10 Ndobabuyisa ezweni laseYiputa, ndibabuthe eAsiriya; Ndiya kubazisa ezweni laseGiliyadi nelaseLebhanon; kwaye ayiyi kufunyanwa ndawo yabo."
Zechariah10:11 Uya kuhamba ebandezelekile embilinini wolwandle, abethe amaza elwandle, yome yonke imithombo yomlambo; Iqhayiya leAsiriya liya kuthotywa, imke intonga yaseYiputa."
Zechariah10:12 Ndiya kubomeleza ngoYehova; yaye baya kuhamba egameni lakhe,’ utsho uYehova."
Zechariah11:1 Vula iingcango zakho, Lebhanon, ukuba umlilo uyidle imisedare yakho."
Zechariah11:2 iBhokola, umsipres; ngokuba kuwe imisedare; ngokuba abanamandla batshatyalalisiwe. Bhombolozani, nina mithi yeturpentine yaseBhashan; ngokuba ihlathi lokuvuna liwile."
Zechariah11:3 Yivani ukukhala kwabalusi; ngokuba bubhuqiwe ubungangamsha bazo; lilizwi leengonyama ezibharhulayo; ngokuba laphukile iqhayiya laseYordan.
Zechariah11:4 Utsho uYehova, uThixo wam, ukuthi, Yalusa umhlambi;"
Zechariah11:5 abathi babulawe ngabaninizo, bazigqale njengabamsulwa; bathi: “Makabongwe uYehova! ngokuba zizityebi, nabalusi bawo àbawacongi."
Zechariah11:6 Ngokuba andiyi kuphinda ndibaconge abemi belizwe,” utsho uYehova; kodwa qaphelani, ndiya kuwanikela la madoda, ngamnye esandleni sesakhe, nasesandleni sokumkani wakhe, kwaye aya kuloyisa ilizwe, kwaye andiyi kubasindisa esandleni sabo."
Zechariah11:7 Ndiya kuwalusa impahla emfutshane exhelwayo, neegusha ezihlwempuzekileyo; Ndathabatha iintonga ezimbini; omnye ndathi nguBuhle, omnye ndathi nguZintya; ndazalusa iigusha."
Zechariah11:8 Ndatshabalalisa abalusi abathathu nganyanga-nye; wesuka wemka kubo umoya wam, bandingcatsha kananjalo."
Zechariah11:9 Ndathi, Andiyi kunalusa; nento emele kukhutshelwa ngaphandle, mayigqitywe; abanye ke badla inyama yomnye."
Zechariah11:10 Ndathabatha intonga yam, uMnandi, ndayaphula, ukuze ndiwaphule umnqophiso wam endanqophisana ngawo neentlanga zonke."
Zechariah11:11 Latyhoboza ngaloo mini, zaza izimvu ezisweleyo ezibe zindilindile zazi ukuba lilizwi likaYehova eli."
Zechariah11:12 Ndathi kubo, Ukuba nibona ukuba kulungile, ndinikeni umvuzo wam; ukuba akunjalo, yiyeke. Bandilinganisela ke, bandilinganisela amashumi amathathu eesilivere zesilivere."
Zechariah11:13 Wathi uYehova kum, Yiphose kumbumbi; Ndathabatha amashumi amathathu esilivere, ndawaphosa endlwini yombumbi wendlu kaYehova."
Zechariah11:14 Ndayaphula intonga yam enye, enjengamasebe, ukuze ndibuqhawule ubuhlobo phakathi koYuda noSirayeli."
Zechariah11:15 Wathi uYehova kum, Thabatha iintonga zomalusi osisimathane."
Zechariah11:16 Ngokuba, yabona, ndivusa ehlabathini umalusi, ongayi kuvelela amadoda amakhulu, ongayi kufuna izisweli, angaphilisi ezaphukileyo, angadlisi ivila; uya kuba nenyama etyebileyo, aziqhawule izikhonkwane zabo."
Zechariah11:17 Yeha, umalusi onqula izithixo, owulahlayo umhlambi! ikrele liya kuba sesandleni sakhe, nakwiliso lakhe lasekunene; somile isandla sakhe, neliso lakhe lasekunene liya kuba mnyama ngokupheleleyo."
Zechariah12:1 Ilizwi likaYehova kuSirayeli, utsho uYehova, uManeki wezulu, uMseki wehlabathi, owenza umphefumlo womntu kulo;"
Zechariah12:2 Yabona, iYerusalem ndiyenza ibe yindebe ehexayo ezintlangeni zonke ezingeenxa zonke, ekungqingweni kwayo kwaYuda neYerusalem."
Zechariah12:3 Ngaloo mini iYerusalem ndiya kuyenza ilitye elinzima ezintlangeni zonke;
Zechariah12:4 Ngaloo mini, utsho uYehova, ndiya kuwabetha ngokugeza onke amahashe nabakhweli bawo; ndiya kuwavula amehlo am phezu kwendlu kaYuda, ndiwabethe onke amahashe ezizwe abe ziimfama."
Zechariah12:5 Zothi iinkosana zakwaYuda ezintliziyweni zazo, Bangamandla am abemi baseYerusalem, ngoYehova wemikhosi, uThixo wabo."
Zechariah12:6 Ngaloo mini ndiya kuzenza iinkosana zakwaYuda zibe njengombumbi emithini, nanjengezikhuni ezitshangaziswayo phakathi kweemfumba; badle bonke abantu ngeenxa zonke, ngasekunene nangasekhohlo, yakhiwe iYerusalem, endaweni yayo, iYerusalem."
Zechariah12:7 Kananjalo uYehova uya kuzisindisa iintente zakwaYuda kuqala, ukuze uzuko lwendlu kaDavide nozuko lwabemi baseYerusalem lungaqhayisi ngoYuda."
Zechariah12:8 Ngaloo mini uYehova uya kubakhusela abemi baseYerusalem; noyena oswelekileyo kubo ngaloo mini uya kuba njengoDavide; indlu kaDavide ibe njengoThixo, njengesithunywa sikaYehova phambi kwabo."
Zechariah12:9 Yaye ngaloo mini ndiya kuzama ukuzitshabalalisa zonke iintlanga ezihlasela iYerusalem.
Zechariah12:10 Ndiya kuthulula uMoya wenceba nomthandazo phezu kwendlu kaDavide, naphezu kwabemi baseYerusalem; bakhangele kum bamhlabileyo, bambambazelele, njengomntu ombambazelayo okuphela kwakhe, bammbambazelele, njengokuba alilela owamazibulo."
Zechariah12:11 Ngelo xesha kuya kubakho isikhalo esikhulu eYerusalem, njengesikhalo saseHadaderimon ethafeni laseMegidon."
Zechariah12:12 Kuya kukhala ilizwe, izizukulwana ngezizukulwana; intsapho yendlu kaDavide ngaphandle, nabafazi babo ngaphandle; nemizalwane yendlu kaNatan ngokwamaqela, nabafazi babo ngokwamaqela;"
Zechariah12:13 nemizalwane yendlu kaLevi ngabanye, nabafazi babo ngabanye; kwisizwe sakwaShimehi bebodwa, nabafazi babo bebodwa;"
Zechariah12:14 Zonke iintsapho eziseleyo, intsapho nganye kumntu ngamnye nabafazi bayo bebodwa."
Zechariah13:1 Ngaloo mini kuya kubakho iqula lesono nokungcola kubemi baseYerusalem kwindlu kaDavide nabemi baseYerusalem;
Zechariah13:2 Kuya kuthi ngaloo mini, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, ndiwanqumle amagama oothixo ehlabathini, bangabi sakhunjulwa; yaye ndiza kuzohlwaya kunye nabaprofeti naloo moya ungendawo ukuya phesheya."
Zechariah13:3 Ukuba umntu uthe waprofeta, uyise nonina abamzeleyo bothi kuye, Akuyi kuphila; ngenxa yokuba uxoke egameni likaYehova, yaye uyise nonina abamzalayo bomhlaba ekuprofeteni kwakhe."
Zechariah13:4 Kuya kuthi ngaloo mini, badane abaprofeti, elowo akhangele ubuso bakhe ekuprofeteni kwakhe; kwaye babenganxibanga sambatho esirhabaxa ukuze bakhohlise;"
Zechariah13:5 Wothi, Andimprofeti, ndingumlimi; ngokuba kwasebuncinaneni bam wandifundisa ukwalusa iinkomo."
Zechariah13:6 Kothiwa kuye, Ayini na la manxeba asezandleni zakho? Aphendule ke athi: Ngabo abo ndahlatywa endlwini yabahlobo bam."
Zechariah13:7 Suk’ ume, krelendini, vuka, malusi wam, indoda engumhlobo wam, utsho uYehova wemikhosi; betha umalusi, zichithwachithwe izimvu;"
Zechariah13:8 “Kuya kuthi ke ehlabathini lonke,” utsho uYehova, iinxalenye ezimbini zalo ziya kunqunyulwa zize zife; ke owesithathu uya kuhlala kuyo."
Zechariah13:9 Esinye isahlulo sesithathu ndiya kusitshisa emlilweni, sinyibilike njengokunyibilikiswa kwesilivere; baya kubiza egameni lam, ndibaphendule mna; abantu bam, bathi, uYehova nguThixo wam."
Zechariah14:1 Yabonani, kuza imini kaYehova, eya kwabiwe amaxhoba enu phakathi kwenu."
Zechariah14:2 Ndozihlanganisela eYerusalem zonke iintlanga ukuba zilwe; nesixeko siya kuthinjwa, izindlu ziphangwe, nabafazi baya kuhlaziswa; isiqingatha sesixeko siya kuya ekuthinjweni, yaye amasalela abantu akayi kushenxiswa esixekweni."
Zechariah14:3 Uya kwandula ke uYehova aphume aze alwe nezo ntlanga, kanye njengoko walwayo ngemini yedabi."
Zechariah14:4 Ngaloo mini iinyawo zakhe ziya kuma phezu kweNtaba yemiNquma ephambi kweYerusalem, ngasempumalanga, iNtaba yemiNquma ibe phakathi, ithabathele empumalanga ise entshonalanga; kuya kubakho intaba enkulu intlambo enkulu; isiqingatha sentaba siya kuhambela entla, nesiqingatha sayo siye ngasemzantsi."
Zechariah14:5 Nosabela entlanjeni yeentaba; ngokuba intili yeentaba iya kufika eAsale, nisabe njengoko nasabayo ngenxa yendudumo yehlabathi, ngemihla kaUziya ukumkani wakwaYuda, eze uYehova uThixo wam, abe phezu kwenu bonke abathembekileyo."
Zechariah14:6 Ngaloo mini ukukhanya akuyi kukhanya, nokuba kumnyama;"
Zechariah14:7 Kodwa kuya kuba yimini enye eya kwaziwa nguYehova, kungekhona imini okanye ubusuku; kodwa kuya kubakho ukukhanya ngokuhlwa."
Zechariah14:8 Kuya kuthi ngaloo mini, kuphume eYerusalem amanzi aphilileyo; isiqingatha sazo siye kulwandle lokuqala, esinye isiqingatha sazo siye kulwandle olungasemva; ihlobo nobusika kuya kuba njalo."
Zechariah14:9 uYehova uya kuba ngukumkani wehlabathi lonke; ngaloo mini iya kuba nguYehova yedwa, ogama lakhe linguYehova."
Zechariah14:10 Ilizwe lonke liya kuba njengethafa, ukusuka eGebha lise eRimon ezantsi kweYerusalem; liya kuphakanyiswa, lihlale endaweni yalo, lithabathele esangweni lakwaBhenjamin, lise endaweni yesango lokuqala, lise esangweni lembombo, lithabathele enqabeni ende ethabathela kwaHananeli esa ezingontsini zokumkani."
Zechariah14:11 Abantu baya kuhlala kulo, yaye akusayi kuphinda kubekho intshabalalo epheleleyo; kodwa iYerusalem iya kumiwa ngoxolo."
Zechariah14:12 Siya kuba seso isohlwayo uYehova aya kuzohlwaya ngaso zonke iintlanga ezilwa neYerusalem; Inyama yawo iya kudla emi ngeenyawo zawo, namehlo awo atyele emakrolomeni awo, nolwimi lwawo ludle emlonyeni wawo."
Zechariah14:13 Kuya kuthi ngaloo mini kubekho isidubedube esikhulu esivela kuYehova; kwaye baya kubamba elowo ngesandla sommelwane wakhe, kwaye isandla sakhe siya kuba phezulu kunesandla sommelwane wakhe."
Zechariah14:14 Naye uYuda uya kulwa eYerusalem; buhlanganiswe ubutyebi beentlanga zonke ezilumelwaneyo, igolide, nesilivere, neempahla, into eninzi kakhulu."
Zechariah14:15 Isibetho samahashe, iimeyile, iinkamela, needonki, nazo zonke izilwanyana eziya kuba seminqubeni, ziya kuba njengeso sifo."
Zechariah14:16 Yaye wonk’ ubani oseleyo kuzo zonke iintlanga ezazisiza eYerusalem uya kunyuka minyaka le ukuya kunqula uKumkani, uYehova wemikhosi, aze enze umthendeleko weMetlagagana."
Zechariah14:17 Nabani na osukuba ephuma kuzo zonke iintsapho zomhlaba osukuba enganyuki aye eYerusalem ukuya kunqula uYehova, uYehova wemikhosi, akayi kunisa mvula nakubo."
Zechariah14:18 Ukuba isizwe saseYiputa asinyuki, asizanga, akubangakho mvula; kuya kubakho isohlwayo uYehova aya kuzohlwaya ngaso iintlanga ezingenyukiyo ziye kubhiyozela umthendeleko weminquba."
Zechariah14:19 Siya kuba seso isohlwayo sesono seYiputa nesohlwayo sesono seentlanga zonke ezingenyukiyo ziye kubhiyozela umthendeleko weminquba.
Zechariah14:20 Ngaloo mini kuya kubhalwe ezintsimbini zamahashe ukuthi: “Ningcwele kuYehova; kwaye iimpahla zendlu kaYehova ziya kuba njengempahla ephambi kwesibingelelo.
Zechariah14:21 Ewe, zonke iimbiza eYerusalem nakwaYuda zoba ngcwele kuYehova wemikhosi; bathabathe kuyo bonke abazisa umnikelo ngayo, bagubungele ngayo; yaye ngaloo mini akusayi kuba sabakho mKanan endlwini kaYehova wemikhosi."
Malachi1:1 Isigidimi selizwi likaYehova kuSirayeli ngoMalaki.
Malachi1:2 Ndinithandile, utsho uYehova. Kodwa uthi: Usithande njani? uEsawu ebengengomkhuluwa kaYakobi na? utsho uYehova, kodwa ndathanda uYakobi;"
Malachi1:3 Ndamthiya uEsawu, Ndazitshabalalisa iintaba zakhe, Nelifa lakhe laba leleempungutye entlango."
Malachi1:4 Ngoxa uEdom wathi: “Sizizisweli, kodwa siya kubuya siwakhe amanxuwa; utsho uYehova wemikhosi ukuthi, Bona baya kwakha, kodwa mna ndiya kugungxula; yaye baya kuzibiza ngokuba: “Isiphelo sobungendawo yaye: Ngabantu abacaphukeleyo uYehova ngonaphakade."
Malachi1:5 Amehlo enu aya kukubona oko, nithi, Mkhulu uYehova emdeni wakwaSirayeli;"
Malachi1:6 Unyana uyambeka uyise, nomkhonzi uyayihlonela inkosi yakhe; ukuba ndinguyihlo, kuphi na ukubekwa kwam? ukuba ndingukumkani, kuphi na ukoyikwa kwam? Utsho uYehova wemikhosi kuni, nina babingeleli, nina balinyelisa igama lam; Nithi ke, Silihlambele ngantoni na igama lakho?"
Malachi1:7 Nizisa esibingelelweni sam isonka esiyinqambi; nithi, Sikungcolise ngantoni na? Kuba uthi: Isithebe sikaYehova yinto edelekileyo."
Malachi1:8 Ukuba nizisa umntu oyimfama njengombingelelo, akunto imbi oko? Ukuba nibingelela ngesiqhwala nangesifayo, akunto imbi oko? Linike kaloku irhuluneli yenu; Ngaba uya kuvuya nawe, okanye athathe ubuntu bakho? utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Malachi1:9 Kaloku ke khanimbongoze uThixo, ukuba abe nenceba kuthi; utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Malachi1:10 Ngubani na kuni oya kuzitshixa iingcango ngelize? musani ukufaka umlilo kwisibingelelo sam. Aninanzeleli kuni, utsho uYehova wemikhosi; andiyi kuyamkela esandleni senu imibingelelo;"
Malachi1:11 Kuba kuthabathela ekuphumeni kwelanga kuse ekutshoneni kwalo, likhulu igama lam phakathi kweentlanga; yaye kuyo yonke indawo kuya kwenziwa isiqhumiso egameni lam nombingelelo osulungekileyo, ngenxa yokuba igama lam liya kuba likhulu phakathi kweentlanga,” utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Malachi1:12 Ke nina nenze inqambi ngokuthi, Isithebe sikaYehova singcolile; neziqhamo zayo, ewe, ukudla kwayo kulisikizi."
Malachi1:13 Kananjalo nathi, Yabona, kukudinwa okunjani na! ke nina niya kuyicima, utsho uYehova wemikhosi; Bazisa abadumbileyo, nabaziziqhwala, nabafayo; ngoko xa ubingelela; Ndiyithathe kuwe? utsho uYehova."
Malachi1:14 Uqalekisiwe lowo umlukuhlisi, xa kukho iduna emhlambini wakhe, nokuba enze isibhambathiso, asondeza kuYehova into eyonakeleyo; ngokuba ndinguKumkani omkhulu, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, negama lam liyoyikeka phakathi kweentlanga."
Malachi2:1 Ngoku ke lo mthetho ubhekiswa kuni, babingeleli."
Malachi2:2 Ukuba anithanga niphulaphule, anavuma ukulizukisa igama lam entliziyweni yenu, utsho uYehova wemikhosi; ndonithumela isiqalekiso, ndiya kuziqalekisa iintsikelelo zenu; ziqalekise, ngokuba ungazibekeli ntliziyo."
Malachi2:3 Yabona, ndiyayichitha inzala yakho, nditshize umswane ebusweni bakho, nomswane wemithendeleko yakho; yaye omnye uya kunithabatha kunye nayo."
Malachi2:4 Niya kuqonda ke ukuba ndim lo unithumele lo myalelo, ukuze ungabikho umnqophiso wam noLevi; utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Malachi2:5 Umnqophiso wam naye ububomi noxolo; ndamnika ngenxa yokoyika awandoyika ngako, nangenxa yokoyika igama lam."
Malachi2:6 Umthetho wokwenyaniso wawusemlonyeni wakhe, yaye ububi akuzange kufumaneke emlonyeni wakhe; wahamba nam enoxolo nangobulungisa, etyeka ebubini."
Malachi2:7 Kuba umlomo wombingeleli ngowokugcina ukwazi, nomthetho ufanele kufunwa emlonyeni wakhe, kuba ungumthunywa kaYehova wemikhosi."
Malachi2:8 Ke nina nilahlekile; nikhubekise abaninzi emthethweni; niwaphule umnqophiso kaLevi; utsho uYehova wemikhosi.
Malachi2:9 Ngoko ke nam ndaninenza abadelekileyo nabangenamsebenzi ebantwini bonke, ngenxa yokuba anizigcinanga iindlela zam, kodwa naba nomkhethe emthethweni."
Malachi2:10 Asinguye na ubawo mnye sonke? Xa ndisithi sidalwe nguThixo omnye? Yini na ukuba sone elowo kumzalwana wakhe, siwuhlambele umnqophiso woobawo?"
Malachi2:11 uYuda wenze ngobumenemene, kwenziwe amasikizi kwaSirayeli naseYerusalem; kuba uYuda wayebuhlambele ubungcwele bukaYehova awayemthanda waza watshata intombi yothixo wasemzini."
Malachi2:12 Nabani na owenza oko, uYehova uya kumshenxisa ezintenteni zikaYakobi nakulowo ufundisayo nakulowo uzisa umbingelelo kuYehova wemikhosi."
Malachi2:13 Oko ke nenze oku ngokusigubungela isibingelelo sikaYehova ngeenyembezi, ngokulila, nangokukhwaza, ukuze angabi sawukhangela umbingelelo, angawamkeli ngovuyo ezandleni zenu."
Malachi2:14 Ke nina nithi, Ngani na? Ngenxa yokuba uYehova ebelingqina phakathi kwakho nomfazi wobutsha bakho, lowo wonayo kuye; noko ke, liqabane lakho, ngumfazi womnqophiso wakho."
Malachi2:15 Akayenzanga na enye? Nakuba kunjalo, wayenazo iintsalela zomoya. Kwaye kutheni? Ukuze afune imbewu yobuthixo. Ke kaloku, yigcineni imiphefumlo yenu, yaye makungabikho bani owonayo kumfazi wobutsha bakhe."
Malachi2:16 Ngokuba, uYehova, uThixo kaSirayeli, uthi, uluthiyile ulwaluko; ngokuba umntu ugubungela ubugwenxa ngengubo yakhe, utsho uYehova wemikhosi; Zigcineni ke imiphefumlo yenu, ukuze ningenzi ubugqwetha."
Malachi2:17 Nimdinisile uYehova ngamazwi enu. Ke nina nithi, Simhluphe ngantoni? Xa nithi, Bonke abenza okubi balungile emehlweni kaYehova, uyakholiswa ngabo; okanye: Uphi na uThixo womgwebo?"
Malachi3:1 Yabona, ndiyasithuma umthunywa wam, agece indlela phambi kwam; Iya kuza ke ngesiquphe etempileni yayo iNkosi leyo niyilindeleyo, uMthunywa womnqophiso enivuya naso; yabona, uyeza, utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Malachi3:2 Ngubani na ke onokuyinyamezela imini yakuza kwakhe? ngubani na oya kubakho ekubonakaleni kwakhe? ngokuba unjengomlilo womnyibilikisi, unjengesepha yomxovuli;"
Malachi3:3 Uya kuhlala ke engumsulungekisi nomsulungekisi wesilivere, abasulungekise oonyana bakaLevi, abahluze njengegolide nesilivere, ukuze bazise umnikelo kuYehova ngobulungisa."
Malachi3:4 Yaye umbingelelo wakwaYuda nowaseYerusalem uya kumkholisa uYehova njengakwimihla yakudala nanjengakwiminyaka yokuqala.
Malachi3:5 Ndiya kusondela kuni ukuba ndigwebe; ndibe lingqina elikhawulezayo kubakhafuli, nakubakrexezi, nakubafungi bobuxoki, nakubacudisa umqeshwa ngenxa yomvuzo wakhe, nakubahlolokazi, nenkedama, nomphambukeli ophambukayo esandleni sakhe sokunene, engoyiki nto mna, utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Malachi3:6 Kuba mna, Yehova, anditshintshanga; ngoko ke, oonyana bakho bakaYakobi abazange batshabalale."
Malachi3:7 Ukususela kwimihla yookhokho benu niye nayishiya imiyalelo yam emiselweyo, anayigcina. Buyelani kum, ndibuyele kuni, utsho uYehova wemikhosi. Ke nina nithi, Siya kubuyela phi na?"
Malachi3:8 Umntu angamtshabalalisa na uThixo? Usandidinga. Kodwa uthi: Sakubela ntoni? Izishumi neminikelo.
Malachi3:9 Uqalekisiwe ngesiqalekiso, ngenxa yokuba undibethe, ewe, olu hlanga luphela."
Malachi3:10 Zisani zonke izishumi ebuncwaneni, ukuze kubekho ukudla endlwini yam; khanindicikide ngale nto, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, ukuba andithanga ndikuvulele na iingcango zezulu, ndinisikelele, ndinivulele iingcango zezulu. Ingakuchitheli kuhle, ukuba akuyi kubakho indawo eyaneleyo yokuyifumana."
Malachi3:11 Ndiya kumvelela odlayo ngenxa yenu, angonakalisi iziqhamo zelizwe lenu; nomdiliya wenu awusayi kusithela emasimini, phambi kwexesha lawo; utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Malachi3:12 Zonke iintlanga zothi nithamsanqelekile, kuba niya kuba lilizwe eliligugu, utsho uNdikhoyo onamandla onke."
Malachi3:13 Amazwi enu aye aqatha kum, utsho uYehova. Ke nina nithi, Yini na ukuba sithethe kangaka ngawe?"
Malachi3:14 Nithi, Kulilize ukumkhonza uThixo; yaye kunceda ngantoni ukuba sigcine umyalelo wakhe size sihambe silusizi phambi koYehova wemikhosi?"
Malachi3:15 Kungokunje sithi banoyolo abanekratshi; ewe, abo benza ububi bayaqinisekiswa; Ewe, abo bacelayo kuThixo bayakhululwa."
Malachi3:16 Ke abamoyikayo uYehova bathetha elowo nowabo;
Malachi3:17 Yaye baya kuba ngabam, utsho uYehova wemikhosi, ngaloo mini ndisenza amatye am ayimfuneko; yaye ndiya kubaconga njengomntu oconga unyana wakhe omkhonzayo."
Malachi3:18 Kulapho ke uya kubuyela khona, uhlule phakathi kwelungisa nongendawo, omkhonzayo uThixo nongamkhonziyo."
Malachi4:1 Ngokuba nalo ilanga liphuma livutha njengelanga; basuke bonke abakhukhumeleyo, nabo bonke abenza ubutshinga, babe njengeendiza;"
Malachi4:2 Ke kuni, nina baloyikayo igama lam, ilanga lobulungisa liya kuphuma, linophiliso phantsi kwamaphiko alo; yaye niya kuphuma nize nikhule njengamathole asesitalini."
Malachi4:3 Uya kubanyathela abangendawo; kuba baya kuba njengaphantsi kweentende zeenyawo zenu ngemini endiya kukwenza ngayo oku,’ utsho uYehova wemikhosi."
Malachi4:4 Khumbulani umyalelo kaMoses, umkhonzi wam, endamwiselayo eHorebhe ngokusingisele kumaSirayeli onke, okuyimiyalelo namasiko."
Malachi4:5 Yabonani, ndiya kuthumela kuni uEliya umprofeti, ingekafiki imini enkulu eyoyikekayo kaYehova."
Malachi4:6 Woyibuyisela intliziyo yooyise koonyana, neentliziyo zoonyana kooyise, ukuze ndingezi, ndilibethe ihlabathi ngobubi."
Matthew1:1 Incwadi yomlibo wokuzalwa kukaYesu Kristu, unyana kaDavide, unyana ka-Abraham."
Matthew1:2 uAbraham wazala uIsake; uIsake wazala uYakobi; uYakobi wazala uYuda nabazalwana bakhe;
Matthew1:3 uYuda wazala uPeres noZara ngoTamare; uFares wazala uEsrom; uEsrom wazala uAram;
Matthew1:4 uAram wazala uAminadabhi; uAminadabhi wazala uNashon; uNashon wazala uSalmon;
Matthew1:5 uTalmon wazala uBhohazi ngoRakabhi; uBhohazi wazala uObhedi ngoRute; uObhedi wazala uYese;
Matthew1:6 uYese wazala uDavide ukumkani; uDavide ukumkani wazala uSolomon ngomfazi kaUriya;
Matthew1:7 uSolomon wazala uRehobhowam; uRehobhoham wazala uAbhiya; uAbhiya wazala uAsa;
Matthew1:8 uAsa wazala uYoshafati; uYoshafati wazala uYoram; uYoram wazala u-Oziya;
Matthew1:9 u-Oziya wazala uYotam; uYotam wazala uAhazi; uAhazi wazala uHezekiya;
Matthew1:10 uHezekiya wazala uManase; uManase wazala uAmon; uAmon wazala uYosiya;
Matthew1:11 uYosiya wazala uYekoniya nabazalwana bakhe, ngexesha lokufuduselwa kwabo eBhabhilon."
Matthew1:12 Emva kokufuduselwa kwabo eBhabhilon, uYekoniya wazala uSalatiyeli; uSalatiyeli wazala uTsorubhabheli;"
Matthew1:13 uZorobhabheli wazala uAbhihudi; uAbhihudi wazala uEliyakim; uEliyakim wazala uAzore;
Matthew1:14 uAzore wazala uTsadoki; uTsadoki wazala uAkim; uAkim wazala uElihudi;
Matthew1:15 uElihudi wazala uElazare; uElazare wazala uMatan; uMatan wazala uYakobi;
Matthew1:16 uYakobi wazala uYosefu indoda kaMariya, ekuthe ngaye kwazalwa uYesu, ekuthiwa nguKristu."
Matthew1:17 Zonke izizukulwana ngoko, ezithabathela kuAbraham zizise kuDavide, zizizukulwana ezilishumi elinazine; nezithabathela kuDavide zizise ekufuduselweni kwabo eBhabhilon, zizizukulwana ezilishumi elinazine; nezithabathela ekufuduselweni kwabo eBhabhilon zizise kuKristu, zizizukulwana ezilishumi elinazine."
Matthew1:18 Ke kaloku ukuzalwa kukaYesu Kristu kwaye kungolu hlobo: Kwathi, akubon’ ukuba unina uMariya useseleganelwe uYosefu, bengekahlangani, wafunyanwa emithi ngoMoya oyiNgcwele."
Matthew1:19 Ke kaloku uYosefu indoda yakhe, eyindoda elilungisa, engathandi ukumvezisa, wanga amala ngasese."
Matthew1:20 Akubon’ ukuba uyazicinga ezi zinto, naso isithunywa seNkosi sibonakala kuye ephupheni, sisithi, Yosefu, nyana kaDavide, musa ukoyika ukumthabathela kuwe uMariya, umfazi wakho; kuba oko kukhawulweyo phakathi kwakhe kungoMoya, uMoya oyiNgcwele."
Matthew1:21 Uya kuzala unyana ke, umbize ngegama elinguYesu; kuba yena eya kubasindisa abantu bakhe ezonweni zabo."
Matthew1:22 Ke kaloku konke oku kwenzeke, ukuze kuzaliseke okwathethwayo yiNkosi ngomprofeti, isithi,"
Matthew1:23 Uyabona, intombi le iya kumitha, izale unyana, Bambize ngegama elinguEmanuweli, oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, uThixo unathi."
Matthew1:24 Uthe ke uYosefu, evukile ebuthongweni, wenza ngoko besimmisele ngako isithunywa seNkosi, wamthabathela kuye umkakhe;"
Matthew1:25 Akamazi wada wazala unyana wakhe wamazibulo; wamthiya igama elinguYesu.
Matthew2:1 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba uYesu uzelwe eBhetelehem yelakwaYuda, emihleni kaHerode ukumkani, kwabonakala kufika eYerusalem izazi zivela empumalanga, zisithi,"
Matthew2:2 Uphi na lo uzelweyo, ukumkani wamaYuda? Kuba sibone inkwenkwezi yakhe empumalanga, size kumnqula."
Matthew2:3 Ezivile ke ezo kumkani uHerode, wakhathazeka, yena nayo yonke iYerusalem naye."
Matthew2:4 Wabahlanganisa ke bonke ababingeleli abakhulu nababhali babantu, wababuza ukuba ubeya kuzalelwa phi na uKristu."
Matthew2:5 Baza bathi kuye, eBhetelehem yelakwaYuda; kuba kubhaliwe ngokunjalo ngomprofeti kwathiwa,"
Matthew2:6 Nawe Bhetelehem, mhlaba wakwaYuda, Akunguye nakanye omncinanana phakathi kwabalawuli bakwaYuda, kuba kuwe kuya kuphuma uMlawuli, oya kubalusa abantu bam amaSirayeli."
Matthew2:7 Kwakuba njalo, uHerode, ezibize ngasese izazi ezo, waqondisisa kuzo kakuhle ixesha lokubonakala kwenkwenkwezi leyo;"
Matthew2:8 Wazithuma ke eBhetelehem, wathi, Hambani niye nicokise ukubuzisa ngomntwana lowo; xa ke nithe namfumana, ze nindibikele, ukuze nam ndiye kumnqula."
Matthew2:9 Zimvile ke zona ukumkani, zahamba; nantso inkwenkwezi leyo zayibonayo empumalanga izikhokela, yada yaya kuma phezu kwendawo abekuyo umntwana lowo."
Matthew2:10 Zathi ke, zakuyibona inkwenkwezi, zavuya ngovuyo olukhulu."
Matthew2:11 Zingenile endlwini, zambona umntwana enoMariya unina, zawa phantsi, zaqubuda kuye; igolide, nentlaka yokuqhumisa, nemore."
Matthew2:12 Zakuba zihlatyelwe nguThixo ephupheni ukuba zingabuyi ziye kuHerode, zemka ngayimbi indlela ukuya ezweni lakowazo."
Matthew2:13 Zithe xa zimkile ke zona, naso isithunywa seNkosi sibonakala kuYosefu ephupheni, sisithi, Vuka, umthabathe umntwana nonina, usabele eYiputa, ube khona apho ndide ndikuxelele; uya kumfuna umntwana lowo ukuba amtshabalalise."
Matthew2:14 Evukile ke yena, wamthabatha umntwana nonina ebusuku, wemka waya eYiputa."
Matthew2:15 Waba khona apho wada wabhubha uHerode, ukuze kuzaliseke okwathethwayo yiNkosi ngomprofeti isithi, Ndambiza unyana wam ukuba aphume eYiputa."
Matthew2:16 Uthe ke uHerode, akubona ukuba izazi zidlale ngaye, waba nomsindo kunene, wathumela, wababulala bonke abantwana abaseBhetelehem, nakuyo yonke imida yayo, abaminyaka mibini bezelwe nangaphantsi, ngokwesiko lazo. Ixesha awayelibuzile ngenkuthalo kwizilumko."
Matthew2:17 Kwaza kwazaliseka okwathethwayo ngomprofeti uYeremiya, esithi,"
Matthew2:18 Kwavakala eRama izwi, isijwili, nesijwili, nesijwili esikhulu, uRakeli elilela abantwana bakhe, engafuni kuthuthuzeleka, ngokuba bengasekho."
Matthew2:19 Uthe ke akuba efile uHerode, sabonakala isithunywa seNkosi sibonakala ephupheni kuYosefu eYiputa."
Matthew2:20 Vuka, umthabathe umntwana nonina, uye ezweni lakwaSirayeli; kuba bafile abo babezonda ubomi bomntwana."
Matthew2:21 Wavuka ke, wamthabatha umntwana nonina, weza ezweni lakwaSirayeli."
Matthew2:22 Uthe ke akuva ukuba uArkelawo ungukumkani kwelakwaYuda esikhundleni sikaHerode uyise, woyika ukuya khona; wathi, ehlatyelwe nguThixo ephupheni, wemka waya kwimimandla yelaseGalili."
Matthew2:23 Ufike wahlala emzini ekuthiwa yiNazarete, ukuze kuzaliseke okwathethwayo ngabaprofeti, kwathiwa, Uya kubizwa ngokuba ungumNazarete."
Matthew3:1 Ngaloo mihla kweza uYohane umbhaptizi, eshumayela entlango yelakwaYuda, esithi,"
Matthew3:2 Guqukani, kuba ubukumkani bamazulu busondele."
Matthew3:3 Kuba lo nguye awayethetha yena uIsaya umprofeti, esithi, Izwi lodandulukayo entlango, lisithi, Yilungiseni indlela yeNkosi, Wutyenenezeni umendo wayo."
Matthew3:4 Ke uYohane lowo ingubo yakhe ibiyeyoboya benkamela, enombhinqo wentlonze esinqeni sakhe; kwaye ke ukudla kwakhe kuziinkumbi nobusi basendle."
Matthew3:5 Babephuma ke besiya kuye abaseYerusalem, nabelakwaYuda bonke, nabommandla wonke waseYordan."
Matthew3:6 Babhaptizwa nguye eYordan apho, bezixela izono zabo."
Matthew3:7 Ke kaloku, akubona into eninzi yabaFarisi nabaSadusi besiza ekubhaptizeni kwakhe, wathi kubo, Nzalandini yamarhamba, ngubani na onibonisileyo ukuba niyibaleke ingqumbo ezayo?"
Matthew3:8 Velisani ngoko iziqhamo eziyifaneleyo inguquko;
Matthew3:9 Musani ukucinga ukuthi ngaphakathi kwenu, Thina sinobawo uAbraham; kuba ndithi kuni, Unako uThixo kuwo la matye ukumvelisela abantwana uAbraham."
Matthew3:10 Kaloku izembe selibekiwe engcanjini yemithi, ngoko wonke umthi ongavelisi siqhamo sihle, uyagawulwa, uphoswe emlilweni."
Matthew3:11 Mna okunene ndinibhaptizela enguqukweni ngamanzi; kodwa lowo uzayo emva kwam unamandla kunam, ozimbadada ndingakulingeneyo ukuziphatha; yena uya kunibhaptiza ngoMoya oyiNgcwele nangomlilo;"
Matthew3:12 Osesandleni sakhe ifolokhwe yakhe isesandleni sakhe, aze asihlambulule isanda sakhe, ayibuthele kuvimba ingqolowa yakhe; Ke wona umququ uya kuwutshisa ngomlilo ongacimiyo."
Matthew3:13 Kuthi ngelo xa afike uYesu eYordan kuYohane, evela eGalili, ukuba abhaptizwe nguye."
Matthew3:14 Kodwa uYohane wayemalela, esithi, Mna kufuneka ndibhaptizwe nguwe nje, uza kum na wena?"
Matthew3:15 Uphendule uYesu wathi kuye, Vuma okwakalokunje; kuba kusifanele thina ukwenjenjalo ukuzalisa bonke ubulungisa. Waza wamvumela."
Matthew3:16 Ebhaptiziwe ke uYesu, wenyuka kwaoko emanzini, lasuka lavuleka izulu kuye, wambona uMoya kaThixo esihla njengehobe, esiza phezu kwakhe."
Matthew3:17 Nalo izwi liphuma ezulwini, lisithi, Lo nguNyana wam oyintanda, endikholisiweyo nguye."
Matthew4:1 Waza uYesu wenyuswa nguMoya, wasiwa entlango, ukuba ahendwe nguMtyholi."
Matthew4:2 Akuba ezile ukutya iimini ezimashumi mane nobusuku obumashumi mane, walamba."
Matthew4:3 Efikile ke umhendi kuye, wathi, Ukuba unguNyana kaThixo, yitsho la matye abe zizonka."
Matthew4:4 Waphendula ke yena wathi, Kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Akaphili ngasonka sodwa umntu; uphila ngamazwi onke aphuma emlonyeni kaThixo."
Matthew4:5 uMtyholi wamthabatha wamsa kuwo umzi ongcwele, wammisa eluchochoyini lwetempile."
Matthew4:6 Athi kuye, Ukuba unguye uNyana kaThixo, ziphose ezantsi; kuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Uya kuziwisela umthetho ngawe izithunywa zakhe, zaye ziya kukufukula ngezandla, hleze ubetheke ngonyawo lwakho eweni ilitye."
Matthew4:7 Wathi uYesu kuye, Kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Uze ungayihendi iNkosi uThixo wakho."
Matthew4:8 Ubuya uMtyholi amthabathe amse entabeni ephakame kakhulu, ambonise zonke izikumkani zehlabathi, nozuko lwazo;"
Matthew4:9 Athi kuye, Zonke ezi zinto ndokunika, ukuba uthe wawa phantsi, waqubuda kum."
Matthew4:10 Waza wathi uYesu kuye, Suka umke, Sathana, kuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Uze uqubude eNkosini uThixo wakho, ukhonze yena yedwa."
Matthew4:11 Wasuka ke uMtyholi ukumyeka; nanko kufika izithunywa zezulu zimlungiselela.
Matthew4:12 Ke kaloku, akuva uYesu ukuba uYohane unikelwe entolongweni, wemka waya kwelaseGalili."
Matthew4:13 Esukile eNazarete, weza wahlala eKapernahum, eselunxwemeni lolwandle, emideni yakwaZebhulon neyakwaNafetali;"
Matthew4:14 ukuze kuzaliseke okwathethwayo ngoIsaya umprofeti, esithi,"
Matthew4:15 Ilizwe lakwaZebhulon, nelizwe lakwaNafetali, ngasendleleni yaselwandle, phesheya kweYordan, eGalili yeentlanga;"
Matthew4:16 Abantu abo bahleli ebumnyameni babone ukukhanya okukhulu; nabo babehleli kummandla wethunzi lokufa, ukukhanya bakhanyiselwe."
Matthew4:17 Waqala oko uYesu ukumemeza, esithi, Guqukani, kuba ubukumkani bamazulu busondele."
Matthew4:18 Uthe ke uYesu, ehamba ngaselwandle lwaseGalili wabona abazalwana ababini, uSimon ekuthiwa nguPetros noAndreya, umzalwana wakhe, bephosa umnatha elwandle; kuba babengababambisi beentlanzi."
Matthew4:19 Athi kubo, Ndilandeleni; ndonenza nibe ngababambisi babantu."
Matthew4:20 Bayishiya kwaoko iminatha yabo, bamlandela."
Matthew4:21 Uhambele phambili esuka apho, wabona abanye abazalwana ababini, uYakobi unyana kaZebhedi, noYohane umzalwana wakhe, besemkhombeni noZebhedi uyise, belungisa iminatha yabo; wababiza."
Matthew4:22 Basishiya kwaoko isikhitshana noyise, bamlandela."
Matthew4:23 Waye uYesu elihamba lonke elaseGalili, efundisa ezindlwini zabo zesikhungu, eshumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zobukumkani, ephilisa izifo zonke nezikhuhlane zonke ebantwini."
Matthew4:24 Lwaphuma ke udumo lwakhe lwaya kulo lonke elaseSiriya, babazisa kuye bonke abagulayo ababebanjwe zizifo ngezifo naziintuthumbo ngeentuthumbo, nabaphethwe ziidemon, nabanesithuthwane, nabafe umzimba wabaphilisa."
Matthew4:25 Walandelwa zizihlwele ezininzi zivela eGalili, naseDekapoli, naseYerusalem, nakwelakwaYuda, naphesheya kweYordan."
Matthew5:1 Uthe ke, akuzibona izihlwele ezo, wenyuka intaba; waza akuhlala phantsi, beza kuye abafundi bakhe"
Matthew5:2 Wawuvula umlomo wakhe, wabafundisa, esithi,"
Matthew5:3 Banoyolo abangamahlwempu ngomoya; ngokuba ubukumkani bamazulu bobabo.
Matthew5:4 Banoyolo abakhedamileyo; ngokuba baya konwatyiswa bona.
Matthew5:5 Banoyolo abanobulali; ngokuba umhlaba baya kuwudla ilifa bona.
Matthew5:6 Banoyolo abalambela banxanelwe ubulungisa; ngokuba baya kuhluthiswa bona.
Matthew5:7 Banoyolo abo banenceba, kuba baya kwenzelwa inceba bona."
Matthew5:8 Banoyolo abahlambulukileyo intliziyo; ngokuba baya kumbona uThixo bona.
Matthew5:9 Banoyolo abaxolisi; ngokuba baya kubizwa ngokuthi bangoonyana bakaThixo bona.
Matthew5:10 Banoyolo abatshutshiswa ngenxa yobulungisa; ngokuba ubukumkani bamazulu bobabo.
Matthew5:11 Ninoyolo nina xa bathe abantu baningcikiva, banitshutshisa, bathetha zonke izinto ezikhohlakeleyo ngani bexoka, ngenxa yam."
Matthew5:12 Vuyani nigcobe kunene; ngokuba umvuzo wenu mkhulu emazulwini; kuba benjenjalo ukubatshutshisa abaprofeti ababekho phambi kwenu.
Matthew5:13 Niyityuwa yehlabathi nina; ke ukuba ityuwa ithe ayaba nasongo, yothiwani na ukuvakaliswa? ayisalungele nto, kukulahlwa phandle, inyathelwe ngabantu."
Matthew5:14 Nina nilukhanyiselo lwehlabathi; Umzi omi phezu kwentaba awunakufihlakala;
Matthew5:15 Kananjalo abantu abasibaneki isibane basibeke phantsi kwesitya; kwaye ibakhanyisela bonke abasendlwini.
Matthew5:16 Malukhanye ngokunjalo ukhanyiselo lwenu phambi kwabantu; ukuze bayibone imisebenzi yenu emihle, bamzukise uYihlo osemazulwini."
Matthew5:17 Ningabi ndize kuchitha umthetho, nokuba ngabaprofeti; andize kuchitha, ndize kuzalisekisa."
Matthew5:18 Kuba inene ndithi kuni, Koda kudlule izulu nehlabathi, kungakhanga kudlule nalinye iganyana nokuba lisuntswana emthethweni, kude kwenzeke konke."
Matthew5:19 Othe ngoko wachitha noko umnye kule mithetho mincinanana, wabafundisa abantu ngokunjalo, kothiwa ungomncinanana ebukumkanini bamazulu; othe wenza wafundisa ngayo, kothiwa ngomkhulu ebukumkanini bamazulu."
Matthew5:20 Kuba ndithi kuni, Ukuba ubulungisa benu abuthanga bugqithe kakhulu kobababhali nabaFarisi, anisayi kukha ningene ebukumkanini bamazulu."
Matthew5:21 Nivile ukuba kwathiwa kumanyange, Uze ungabulali; othe wabulala, woba sisisulu somgwebo;"
Matthew5:22 Ke mna ndithi kuni, Wonke umntu ofumana amqumbele umzalwana wakhe, woba sisisulu somgwebo; othe ke kumzalwana wakhe, Ntw’ ingento, woba sisisulu sentlanganiso yamatyala; uya kuba sengozini yesihogo somlilo."
Matthew5:23 Xa sukuba uwusondeza umnikelo wakho esibingelelweni, wathi ulapho wakhumbula ukuba umzalwana wakho unendawo ngakuwe;"
Matthew5:24 Sishiye apho isipho sakho phambi kwesibingelelo, uhambe; uxolelana nomzalwana wakho kuqala, wandule ukuza uwusondeze umnikelo wakho."
Matthew5:25 Lungisana kamsinya nokumangaleleyo, usesendleleni naye; hleze ummangaleli lowo akunikele kumgwebi, aze umgwebi akunikele kumsila, uze uphoswe entolongweni."
Matthew5:26 Inene ndithi kuwe, Akusayi kukha uphume khona apho, ude uhlawule nemalanana yokugqibela."
Matthew5:27 Nivile ukuba kwathiwa kumanyange, Uze ungakrexezi."
Matthew5:28 Ke mna ndithi kuni, Wonke umntu okhangela umntu oyinkazana, ukuba amkhanuke, uselemkrexezile entliziyweni yakhe."
Matthew5:29 Ukuba iliso lakho lokunene liyakukhubekisa, linyothule ulilahle kuwe; kuba kukulungele kanye ukuba kutshabalale libe linye emalungwini akho, kunokuba umzimba wakho uphela uphoswe esihogweni."
Matthew5:30 Ukuba ke isandla sakho sokunene siyakukhubekisa, sinqumle usilahle kuwe; kuba kukulungele kanye ukuba kutshabalale libe linye emalungwini akho, kunokuba umzimba wakho uphela uphoswe esihogweni."
Matthew5:31 Kwathiwa ke, Othe wamala umfazi wakhe, makamnike incwadi yokwahlukana."
Matthew5:32 Ke mna ndithi kuni, othe wamala umfazi wakhe ngaphandle kwendawo yombulo, uyamkrexezisa; nothe wazeka owaliweyo, uyakrexeza."
Matthew5:33 Kananjalo nivile ukuba kwathiwa kumanyange, Uze ungafungi;"
Matthew5:34 Ke mna ndithi kuni, Maningakhe nifunge nto; nokuba lizulu; ngokuba yitrone kaThixo;"
Matthew5:35 Nangomhlaba; nokuba lisihlalo seenyawo zakhe; ngokuba ngumzi woKumkani omkhulu.
Matthew5:36 Uze ungayifungi nentloko yakho, ngokuba ungenamandla okwenza nalunye unwele lube mhlophe okanye lube mnyama."
Matthew5:37 Ilizwi lenu ke malibe nguewe, ewe; Hayi, hayi; kuba okungaphezulu koko kuvela kongendawo."
Matthew5:38 Nivile ukuba kwathiwa, Iliso maliphindezelwe ngeliso, nezinyo ngezinyo."
Matthew5:39 Ke mna ndithi kuni, maningaxhali nongendawo; kodwa othe wakubetha esidleleni sakho sokunene, mguqulele nesinye."
Matthew5:40 Nalowo ufuna ukukumangalela, akuhluthe ingubo yangaphantsi, myekele neyokwaleka."
Matthew5:41 Nosukuba ekunyanzelela imayile enye, hamba naye zibe mbini."
Matthew5:42 Mphe lowo ukucelayo, nalowo ufuna ukuboleka kuwe ungamnikeli umva."
Matthew5:43 Nivile ukuba kwathiwa, Uze umthande ummelwane wakho, uluthiye utshaba lwakho."
Matthew5:44 Ke mna ndithi kuni, Zithandeni iintshaba zenu, basikeleleni abo baniqalekisayo, benzeleni okulungileyo abo banithiyayo, nibathandazele abo banigxekayo banitshutshise;"
Matthew5:45 ukuze nibe ngabantwana boYihlo osemazulwini; ngokuba yena elenza ilanga lakhe liphume phezu kwabakhohlakeleyo nabalungileyo, nemvula eyinisa phezu kwabalungisayo nabangalungisiyo."
Matthew5:46 Ukuba nithanda abo banithandayo, ninamvuzo mni na? Abenzi kwaloo nto na nababuthi berhafu?"
Matthew5:47 Naxa nithe nabulisa abazalwana benu bodwa, yintoni na egqithiseleyo eniyenzayo? Abenzi benjenjalo na nababuthi berhafu?"
Matthew5:48 Ngoko yibani ngabafezekileyo, njengokuba uYihlo osemazulwini efezekile."
Matthew6:1 Lumkani, ubulungisa benu ningabenzeli ebusweni babantu, ngokunga ningabonwa ngabo; okanye, aninamvuzo kuYihlo osemazulwini."
Matthew6:2 Ngoko ke, xa sukuba uliza abantu, ungahlokomisi xilongo phambi kwakho, njengoko benza ngako abahanahanisi ezindlwini zesikhungu, nasezitratweni, ukuze bazukiswe ngabantu. Inene ndithi kuni, Bawufincile umvuzo wabo."
Matthew6:3 Ke wena, xa uthe wasisa, masingakwazi isandla sakho sokhohlo into esiyenzayo esokunene;"
Matthew6:4 ukuze amalizo akho abe semfihlekweni, aze uYihlo obona emfihlekweni akubuyisele ekuhleni."
Matthew6:5 Naxa sukuba uthandaza, uze ungabi njengabahanahanisi; ngokuba bethanda ukuthandaza bemi ezindlwini zesikhungu nasezimbombeni zezitrato, ngokokuze babe nokubonwa ngabantu. Inene ndithi kuni, Bawufincile umvuzo wabo."
Matthew6:6 Ke wena, xa sukuba uthandaza, ngena egumbini lakho, uthi, uluvalile ucango lwakho, uthandaze kuYihlo osemfihlekweni; aze uYihlo obona emfihlekweni akubuyisele ekuhleni."
Matthew6:7 Nithandaza njalo ke, maningenzi milembelele ingeyanto, njengabeentlanga; kuba beba boviwa ngenxa yamazwi abo amaninzi."
Matthew6:8 Ngoko maningafani nabo; kuba ekwazi uYihlo enikusweleyo, ningekamceli."
Matthew6:9 Thandazani ngoko nina nenjenje: Bawo wethu osemazulwini, malingcwaliswe igama lakho."
Matthew6:10 Mabufike ubukumkani bakho. Makwenziwe ukuthanda kwakho nasemhlabeni, njengokuba kusenziwa emazulwini."
Matthew6:11 Siphe namhla isonka sethu semihla ngemihla.
Matthew6:12 Usixolele amatyala ethu, njengokuba nathi sibaxolela abanamatyala kuthi."
Matthew6:13 Ungasingenisi ekuhendweni, kodwa usihlangule ebubini. Kaloku ubukumkani bubobakho, namandla, nozuko, kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni. Amen."
Matthew6:14 Kuba xa nithi nibaxolele abantu izigqitho zabo, uYihlo osemazulwini wonixolela nani."
Matthew6:15 Ukuba anibaxoleli abantu izigqitho zabo, noYihlo ke akayi kunixolela iziphoso zenu."
Matthew6:16 Xa sukuba ke nizila ukudla, maningabi njengabahanahanisi, bona bamatshekileyo; kuba babenza bubi ubuso babo, ukuze babonakale ebantwini ukuba bazilile. Inene ndithi kuni, Bawufincile umvuzo wabo."
Matthew6:17 Ke wena, xa uzila ukudla, yithambise intloko yakho, ubuhlambe ubuso bakho;"
Matthew6:18 ukuze ungabonakali ebantwini ukuba uzilile, ubonakale kuYihlo osemfihlekweni; aze uYihlo obona emfihlekweni akubuyisele ekuhleni."
Matthew6:19 Musani ukuziqwebela ubutyebi emhlabeni, apho konakalisa inundu nomhlwa, nalapho amasela agqobhozayo ebe;"
Matthew6:20 ziqwebeleni ke ubutyebi emazulwini, apho kungonakalisi nundu namhlwa, nalapho amasela angagqobhoziyo ebe."
Matthew6:21 Kuba apho bukhona ubutyebi benu, yoba lapho nentliziyo yenu."
