Matthew6:22 Isibane somzimba liliso; xa sukuba iliso lakho ngoko lingenakumbi, umzimba wakho uphela wokhanyiseleka."
Matthew6:23 Kodwa xa sukuba iliso lakho likhohlakele, umzimba wakho uphela woba bubumnyama. Ukuba ngoko ukukhanya okukuwe kububumnyama, bungakanani na ubumnyama obo!"
Matthew6:24 Akukho mntu unako ukukhonza nkosi mbini; kuba eya kuyithiya le, athande leya; athi mhlawumbi abambelele kule, ayidele leya; Aninako ukukhonza uThixo nobutyebi."
Matthew6:25 Ngenxa yoko ndithi kuni, Musani ukubuxhalela ubomi benu, nisithi nodla ntoni na; nosela ntoni na; kwanomzimba wenu, nisithi niya kwambatha ntoni na. Ubomi abungaphezulu na kuko ukudla, nomzimba awungaphezulu na kwinto yokwambatha?"
Matthew6:26 Yondelani ezintakeni zasezulwini; ngokuba azihlwayeli, azivuni, azibutheli koovimba; ukanti uYihlo osemazulwini uyazondla. Anizigqithile ngokugqithileyo na?"
Matthew6:27 Nguwuphi na ke kuni onokuthi ngokuxhala ongeze ebukhulwini bakhe ikubhite ibe nye?
Matthew6:28 Kanjalo yini na ukuba nixhalele into yokwambatha? Qondani ngeenyibiba zasendle, ukuhluma kwazo; azibulaleki, azisonti nokusonta;"
Matthew6:29 Ke ndithi kuni, noSolomon kubo bonke ubunewunewu bakhe, wayengavathiswanga nanjenganye kuzo ezi."
Matthew6:30 Ukuba ke ingca, leyo isendle, ethi namhla ibekho, ize ngomso iphoswe eziko, wenjenjalo uThixo ukuyambathisa, akayi kunambathisa kakhulu ngakumbi na, bantundini balukholo luncinane?"
Matthew6:31 Musani ukuxhala ngoko, nisithi, Sodla ntoni na? sosela ntoni na? okanye, Siya kwambatha ntoni na?"
Matthew6:32 Kuba zonke ezo zinto zingxanyelwe ziintlanga; kuba uYihlo osemazulwini uyazi ukuba ezo zinto zonke ziyafuneka kuni.
Matthew6:33 Funani ke tanci ubukumkani bukaThixo nobulungisa bakhe, zaye zonke ezo zinto ziya kongezelelwa kuni."
Matthew6:34 Ngoko musani ukuxhalela ingomso; kuba ingomso liya kuxhalela okwalo. Buyanele imini leyo ububi bayo.
Matthew7:1 Musani ukugweba, ukuze ningagwetywa."
Matthew7:2 Kuba ngogwebo enigweba ngalo, niya kugwetywa kwangalo nani; nangomlinganiselo enilinganisela ngawo, niya kulinganiselwa kwangawo nani."
Matthew7:3 Yini na ke ukuba usibone isibi esisesweni lomzalwana wakho, kanti wona umqadi okwelakho iliso akuwuqiqi?"
Matthew7:4 Okanye ungáthini na ukuthi kumzalwana wakho, Yeka ndisikhuphe isibi esweni lakho; kanti nanku umqadi kwelakho iliso?"
Matthew7:5 Mhanahanisindini, wukhuphe kuqala umqadi kwelakho iliso; wandule ukubona kakuhle ukusikhupha isibi eso esweni lomzalwana wakho."
Matthew7:6 Musani ukukunika izinja okungcwele, kanjalo ningaziphosi iiperile zenu phambi kweehagu, hleze zizinyathele ngamanqina azo, zijike ziniqwenge."
Matthew7:7 Celani, nophiwa; funani, nofumana; nkqonkqozani, novulelwa;"
Matthew7:8 Kuba wonke umntu ocelayo, uyazuza; nalowo ufunayo, uyafumana; nalowo unkqonkqozayo uya kuvulelwa."
Matthew7:9 Nguwuphi na umntu kuni ongathi, ukuba unyana wakhe uthe wacela isonka, amnike ilitye?"
Matthew7:10 Athi, ukuba uthe wacela intlanzi, amnike inyoka?"
Matthew7:11 Ukuba ke ngoko nina, nikhohlakele nje, niyakwazi ukubapha abantwana benu izipho ezilungileyo, wobeka phi na yena uYihlo osemazulwini ukugqithisela ngokubapha okulungileyo abo bamcelayo?"
Matthew7:12 Zonke izinto ngoko enisukuba ninga bangazenza abantu kuni, yenzani ezikwanjalo nani kubo; kuba oko kungumthetho nabaprofeti."
Matthew7:13 Ngenani ngesango elimxinwa; ngokuba libanzi isango, iphangalele nendlela, esa entshabalalweni, baninzi ke abangena ngalo."
Matthew7:14 Ngokuba limxinwa isango, icuthene nendlela, esa ebomini; bambalwa ke abalifumanayo."
Matthew7:15 Balumkeleni abaprofeti ababuxoki, abeza kuni ngezambatho zeegusha, ngaphakathi ke beziingcuka eziqwengayo."
Matthew7:16 Nobaqonda ngeziqhamo zabo. Ngaba abantu bakha iidiliya emithaneni enameva okanye amakhiwane enkunzaneni?
Matthew7:17 Ngokunjalo wonke umthi olungileyo uvelisa iziqhamo ezihle; ke wona umthi ongenguwo uvelisa iziqhamo ezibi,"
Matthew7:18 umthi olungileyo awunakuvelisa ziqhamo zibi, nomthi ongenguwo awunakuvelisa ziqhamo zihle."
Matthew7:19 Wonke umthi ongavelisi ziqhamo zihle uyagawulwa, uphoswe emlilweni."
Matthew7:20 Ngoko ke nobaqonda ngeziqhamo zabo.
Matthew7:21 Asingabo bonke abathi kum, Nkosi, Nkosi, abaya kungena ebukumkanini bamazulu; kodwa ngulowo wenza ukuthanda kukaBawo osemazulwini."
Matthew7:22 Baninzi abaya kuthi kum ngaloo mini, Nkosi, Nkosi, sasingathe na egameni lakho? Sazikhupha na iidemon egameni lakho? Nenze egameni lakho imisebenzi emininzi ebalulekileyo?"
Matthew7:23 Ndandule ndibaxelele, ndithi, Andizanga ndinazi; mkani kum, nina nenza okuchasene nomthetho."
Matthew7:24 Ngoko ke wonke umntu owevayo la mazwi am, awenze, uya kufaniswa nendoda eyingqondi, yona yayakhelayo elulwalweni indlu yayo."
Matthew7:25 Yehla imvula, yeza imilambo, yavuthuza imimoya, yagaleleka kuloo ndlu; ayawa, kuba ibisekelwe elulwalweni."
Matthew7:26 Nomntu wonke owevayo la mazwi am, angawenzi, uya kufaniswa nendoda esisiyatha, yona yayakhelayo entlabathini indlu yayo."
Matthew7:27 Yehla imvula, yeza imilambo, yavuthuza nemimoya, yagaleleka kuloo ndlu; yawa; saba sikhulu ukuwa kwayo."
Matthew7:28 Ke kaloku kwathi, xeshikweni uYesu ebewagqibile la mazwi, zakhwankqiswa izihlwele yimfundiso yakhe;"
Matthew7:29 kuba ebebafundisa njengonegunya, engafundisi njengabo ababhali."
Matthew8:1 Ke kaloku, akuhla entabeni apho, walandelwa ngabantu abaninzi."
Matthew8:2 Nanko kusiza oneqhenqa, waqubuda kuye, esithi, Nkosi, ukuba uyathanda, unako ukundihlambulula."
Matthew8:3 Wasolula isandla uYesu, wamchukumisa, esithi, Ndiyathanda; Hlambuluka. Lahlambuluka kwaoko iqhenqa lakhe."
Matthew8:4 Athi uYesu kuye, Lumka ungaxeleli bani; hamba uye kuzibonisa kumbingeleli, usondeze umnikelo awamisa wona uMoses, ube bubungqina kubo."
Matthew8:5 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba uYesu ungene eKapernahum, kweza kuye umthetheli-khulu, embongoza, esithi,"
Matthew8:6 esithi, Nkosi, isicaka sam silele ekhaya, sinedumbe, sithuthunjelwa ngokunzulu."
Matthew8:7 Athi uYesu kuye, Ndoza ndisiphilise mna."
Matthew8:8 Waphendula umthetheli-khulu, wathi, Nkosi, andikulingene ukuba ude ungene phantsi kophahla lwam; thetha ilizwi lodwa, sophiliswa isicaka sam."
Matthew8:9 Kuba nam ndingumntu ophantsi kwegunya labanye, ndinamasoldati phantsi kwam; ndithi kweli, Yiya, liye; ndithi kweliya, Yiza, lize; nakumkhonzi wam, Yenza oku, akwenze."
Matthew8:10 Evile ke uYesu wamangaliswa, wathi kwabamlandelayo, Inene ndithi kuni, andifumananga lukholo lungaka nakwaSirayeli."
Matthew8:11 Ndithi ke kuni, baninzi abaya kuza bevela empumalanga nasentshonalanga, bangqengqe ndawonye noAbraham noIsake noYakobi ebukumkanini bamazulu."
Matthew8:12 Kodwa bona abantwana bobukumkani baya kukhutshelwa emnyameni ongaphandle; khona apho kuya kubakho ukulila nokutshixiza kwamazinyo.
Matthew8:13 Wathi uYesu kumthetheli-khulu, Hamba; makwenzeke kuwe njengoko ukholiwe. Saphiliswa kwangelo lixa isicaka sakhe."
Matthew8:14 Efikile uYesu kwaPetros, wabona umkhwekazi wakhe elele, egula ngumkhuhlane."
Matthew8:15 Wachukumisa isandla sakhe, yamyeka icesina, wavuka, wabalungiselela."
Matthew8:16 Kuthe ke kwakuhlwa, kwaziswa kuye into eninzi yabaphethwe ziidemon; wabakhupha oomoya abo ngelizwi, wabaphilisa bonke ababesifa;"
Matthew8:17 ukuze kuzaliseke okwathethwayo ngoIsaya umprofeti, esithi, Yena ngokwakhe wabuthabatha ubulwelwe bethu, wazithwala izifo zethu."
Matthew8:18 Uthe ke uYesu, akubona abantu abaninzi bemphahlile, wathi makumkiwe kuyiwe ngaphesheya."
Matthew8:19 Kweza mbhali uthile, wathi kuye, Mfundisi, ndiya kukulandela apho ungaya khona."
Matthew8:20 Athi uYesu kuye, Iimpungutye zinemingxuma, neentaka zezulu zineendawo zokuhlala; yena uNyana woMntu akanayo nendawo angalalisa kuyo intloko."
Matthew8:21 Uthe ke omnye wabafundi bakhe kuye, Nkosi, ndivumele ndiye kungcwaba ubawo kuqala."
Matthew8:22 Wathi ke uYesu kuye, Ndilandele; bayeke abafileyo bangcwabe abafileyo babo."
Matthew8:23 Engenile ke emkhombeni, bamlandela abafundi bakhe."
Matthew8:24 Kwasuka kwabakho uqhwithela olukhulu elwandle, ngokokude umkhombe ugutyungelwe ngamaza; waye ke yena elele ubuthongo."
Matthew8:25 Beza abafundi bakhe bamvusa, besithi, Nkosi, sisindise, siyatshabalala."
Matthew8:26 Athi kubo, Yini na ukuba nibe ngamagwala, bantundini balukholo luncinane? Waza wavuka, wayikhalimela imimoya nolwandle; kwabakho ukuzola okukhulu."
Matthew8:27 Bamangaliswa ke abantu abo, besithi, Ngumntu mni na lo, le nto alulanyelwayo nayimimoya nalulwandle?"
Matthew8:28 Kuthe akufika ngaphesheya, ezweni lamaGergasi, kwaqubisana naye abantu ababini abaphethwe ziidemon, bephuma emangcwabeni, belugcalagcala, kwada kwayinkohla ukuba kudlule umntu ngaloo ndlela."
Matthew8:29 Basuka bakhala besithi, Yintoni na enathi nawe, Yesu, Nyana kaThixo? Apha uze kusithuthumbisa na phambi kwelona xesha?"
Matthew8:30 Bekukho ke mgama kubo ugxuba olukhulu lweehagu lusidla.
Matthew8:31 Zaye ke iidemon zimbongoza, zisithi, Ukuba uyasikhupha, sivumele siye kungena elugxubeni lweehagu olo."
Matthew8:32 Wathi kuwo, Hambani. Zithe ke zakuphuma, zaya kungena elugxubeni lweehagu; lwasuka lonke ugxuba lweehagu lwaphaphatheka, lwehla eweni, lwela elwandle; zatshabalala emanzini."
Matthew8:33 Bathe ke abo babezalusa basaba, baya ekhaya, babika into yonke, kwanendawo yababephethwe ziidemon."
Matthew8:34 Wasuka wonke umzi waphuma, waya kumkhawulela uYesu; bathi bakumbona, bambongoza ukuba emke emideni yabo."
Matthew9:1 Engenile ke emkhombeni, wawela, weza kowabo."
Matthew9:2 Ke kaloku bazisa kuye umntu onedumbe, elele elukhukweni. uYesu, elubona ukholo lwabo, wathi konedumbe; Nyana, yomelela; zixolelwe izono zakho."
Matthew9:3 Kwabonakala kukho abathile bakubachazi-mthetho phakathi kwabo, besithi, Lo uyanyelisa;"
Matthew9:4 uYesu, ezibona iingcingane zabo, wathi, Yini na ukuba nicinge izinto ezimbi ezintliziyweni zenu?"
Matthew9:5 Kuba kukuphi na okulula ngakumbi, ukuthi, Zixolelwe izono zakho; nokuthi, Vuka, uhambe?"
Matthew9:6 Kodwa ukuze nazi ukuba unalo igunya uNyana woMntu lokuxolela izono emhlabeni apha (selesithi konedumbe), Vuka, uthabathe ukhuko lwakho, uye endlwini yakho."
Matthew9:7 Wavuka ke, wemka waya endlwini yakhe."
Matthew9:8 Zikubonile ke oko izihlwele, zamangaliswa, zamzukisa uThixo, obanike abantu igunya elingaka."
Matthew9:9 Edlula apho, uYesu wabona umntu ehleli endaweni yerhafu, okuthiwa nguMateyu, athi kuye, Ndilandele. Wesuka ke, wamlandela."
Matthew9:10 Kwathi, akubon’ ukuba uhleli ngasesithebeni endlwini, kwabonakala into eninzi yababuthi berhafu naboni, yeza yahlala ndawonye noYesu nabafundi bakhe."
Matthew9:11 Bakukubona oko abaFarisi, bathi kubafundi bakhe, Kungani na ukuba umfundisi wenu adle nababuthi berhafu naboni?"
Matthew9:12 Evile ke uYesu, wathi kubo, Akufuneki gqirha kwabaphilileyo, lifuneka kwabafayo."
Matthew9:13 Khaniye nifunde ukuba kukuthini na ukuthi, Ndithanda inceba, andithandi mbingelelo; kuba andize kubiza malungisa, ndize kubiza aboni ukuba baguquke."
Matthew9:14 Beza kuye abafundi bakaYohane, besithi, Kungani na ukuba sizile ukudla kaninzi, thina nabaFarisi, kanti bona abafundi bakho abakuzili?"
Matthew9:15 Wathi uYesu kubo, Banako yini na abegumbi lomtshakazi ukukhedama, lo gama umyeni asenabo? Kodwa kuya kufika mihla awothi asuswe kubo umyeni, bandule ke ukuzila."
Matthew9:16 Akukho ke ubeka isiziba somchako omtsha engutyeni endala; kuba eso sifakiweyo siyakrazula engutyeni, sibe sibi ngokunye isikroba."
Matthew9:17 Kanjalo ayithiwa iwayini entsha ezintsubeni ezindala; kwenjiwe njalo, zingagqabhuka iintsuba, iphalale iwayini, zitshabalale neentsuba; yona iwayini entsha ithiwa ezintsubeni ezintsha, zigcinakale ezo nto zombini."
Matthew9:18 Esathetha ezi zinto kubo, nanko kusiza umphathi, waqubuda kuye, esithi, Intombi yam ibhubhe ngoku; yiza ubeke isandla sakho phezu kwayo, yophila."
Matthew9:19 Wesuka uYesu wamlandela, kwanabafundi bakhe."
Matthew9:20 Nanko kusiza ntokazi ithile, eyayinethombo legazi iminyaka elishumi elinamibini; yafika ngasemva yachukumisa umqukumbelo wengubo yakhe;"
Matthew9:21 kuba ibisithi ngaphakathi kwayo, Ukuba ndithe ndachukumisa ingubo yakhe nje kodwa, ndophiliswa."
Matthew9:22 Wajika uYesu, wayibona, wathi, Ntombi yam, yomelela; ukholo lwakho lukusindisile. Yaphiliswa umfazi kwangelo lixa."
Matthew9:23 Uthe akufika uYesu endlwini yomphathi, wazibona iingwali nabantu abaninzi bephithizela;"
Matthew9:24 Athi kubo, Khwelelani; kuba intombazana ayifile, ilele. Basuka bamwa ngentsini."
Matthew9:25 Uthe ke bakukhutshelwa phandle abantu, wangena, wayibamba ngesandla, yaza yavuka intombazana leyo."
Matthew9:26 Lwaza lwaphuma udumo lwale nto, lwaya kuwo wonke loo mhlaba."
Matthew9:27 Kuthe ke akuba edlula apho uYesu, walandelwa ziimfama ezimbini, zidanduluka, zisithi, Senzele inceba, nyana kaDavide."
Matthew9:28 Zithe, akungena endlwini, zeza kufika kuye iimfama, athi kuzo uYesu, Niyakholwa na ukuba ndinako ukukwenza oko? Bathi kuye, Ewe, Nkosi."
Matthew9:29 Wandula ukuwachukumisa amehlo azo, esithi, Ngokokholo lwenu makwenzeke kuni."
Matthew9:30 Aqabuka amehlo abo; Waza uYesu waziyala kalukhuni, esithi, Lumkani ingaziwa mntu le nto."
Matthew9:31 Kodwa zona zaphuma, zalubhengeza udumo lwakhe kuwo wonke loo mmandla."
Matthew9:32 Ke kaloku zakubon’ ukuba ziyaphuma, kwabonakala kuziswa kuye umntu osisidenge, ophethwe yidemon."
Matthew9:33 Yakukhutshelwa ke indimoni, sathetha isisidenge, zamangaliswa izihlwele, zathi, Ayizanga ibonwe into enjalo kwaSirayeli."
Matthew9:34 Kodwa bona abaFarisi bathi, Ukhupha iindimoni ngomphathi weendimoni."
Matthew9:35 Waye uYesu eyihamba yonke imizi nemizana, efundisa ezindlwini zabo zesikhungu, eshumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zobukumkani, ephilisa izifo zonke nezikhuhlane zonke ebantwini."
Matthew9:36 Uthe ke, akuzibona izihlwele, wasikwa yimfesane zizo, ngokuba zibe zityhafile, zichithakele ngokwezimvu ezingenamalusi."
Matthew9:37 Aze athi kubafundi bakhe, Ukuvuna okunene kuninzi, kodwa bona abasebenzi bambalwa."
Matthew9:38 Khungani ngoko eNkosini yokuvuna, ikhuphe abasebenzi, baye ekuvuneni kwayo."
Matthew10:1 Waza wababizela kuye abafundi bakhe abalishumi elinababini, wabanika igunya koomoya abangcolileyo, ukuze babakhuphe, nelokuphilisa izifo nezikhuhlane zonke."
Matthew10:2 Ngawo la ke amagama abapostile abalishumi elinababini; Owokuqala ibinguSimon ekuthiwa nguPetros, noAndreya umzalwana wakhe; uYakobi kaZebhedi, noYohane umzalwana wakhe;"
Matthew10:3 uFilipu noBhartolomeyu; uTomas, noMateyu, umbuthi werhafu; uYakobi ka-Alifeyu, noLebheyu, ogama limbi linguTadeyu;"
Matthew10:4 uSimon umKanan noYuda Sikariyoti, lowo wamngcatshayo."
Matthew10:5 Aba balishumi elinababini wabathuma uYesu, ebawisela umthetho, esithi, Ze ningasingi endleleni yeentlanga, ningangeni nasemzini wamaSamariya;"
Matthew10:6 Kodwa yiyani kanye kwizimvu ezilahlekileyo zendlu kaSirayeli.
Matthew10:7 Ekubeni nihamba, vakalisani, nithi, Ubukumkani bamazulu busondele."
Matthew10:8 Philisani imilwelwe, hlambululani abaneqhenqa, vusani abafileyo, khuphani iidemon; namkele ngesisa, yiphani ngesisa."
Matthew10:9 Ningaphathi golide nasilivere nalubhedu emibhinqweni yenu;
Matthew10:10 nangxowa yandlela, nangubo zangaphantsi ngambini, nambadada, namsimelelo; kuba umsebenzi ufanelwe kukudla kwakhe."
Matthew10:11 Emzini ke enithe nangena kuwo, nokuba kusemzaneni, ize nibuzise ukuba ngubani na kuwo ofanelekileyo; hlalani khona apho nide nimke khona."
Matthew10:12 Xa ningena endlwini, ze nibabulise."
Matthew10:13 Ukuba ke ifanelekile indlu leyo, malube phezu kwayo uxolo lwenu; ukuba ayifanelekile, uxolo lwenu malubuyele kwakuni."
Matthew10:14 Nothe akawamkela, akaweva amazwi enu, nakuphuma kuloo ndlu nakuloo mzi, vuthululani uthuli lweenyawo zenu."
Matthew10:15 Inene ndithi kuni, Koba nokunyamezeleka okomhlaba waseSodom nowaseGomora ngomhla womgwebo, kunokwaloo mzi."
Matthew10:16 Niyabona, mna ndinithuma njengezimvu phakathi kweengcuka; ngoko yibani nobulumko njengeenyoka, nibe njengamahobe ukungabi nabuqhinga."
Matthew10:17 Balumkeleni ke abantu; kuba baya kuninikela ezintlanganisweni zamatyala, banityakatye ezindlwini zabo zesikhungu;"
Matthew10:18 niya kusiwa phambi kweerhuluneli nookumkani ngenxa yam, ze kube bubungqina kubo, nakuzo iintlanga."
Matthew10:19 Xa sukuba ke beninikela, ize ningaxhaleli ukuba nothetha ngakuphi na, nokuba nothetha ntoni na, kuba niya kuyinikwa ngelo lixa into nothetha ngayo."
Matthew10:20 Kaloku asinini abathethayo, nguMoya kaYihlo othethayo ngaphakathi kwenu."
Matthew10:21 Ke kaloku umzalwana uya kunikela umzalwana ekufeni, aze uyise anikele umntwana, bathi nabantwana bavukelane nabazali, bababulalise;"
Matthew10:22 niya kuthiywa ngabantu bonke ngenxa yegama lam; ke onyamezelayo kwada kwaba kwasekupheleni, uya kusindiswa yena."
Matthew10:23 Xa sukuba ke benitshutshisa kuloo mzi, sabelani kuwumbi; kuba inene ndithi kuni, Aniyi kukha niyigqibe imizi yakwaSirayeli, engekafiki uNyana woMntu."
Matthew10:24 Akukho mfundi mkhulu kunomfundisi wakhe, akukho mkhonzi mkhulu kunenkosi yakhe."
Matthew10:25 Kumanele umfundi ukuba abe njengomfundisi wakhe, nomkhonzi ukuba abe njengenkosi yakhe. Ukuba umninindlu bambize ngoBhelezebhule, akukhona bobabiza ngaye yini na abo bendlu yakhe?"
Matthew10:26 Musani ukuboyika ngoko; kuba akukho nto igqunyiweyo ingasayi kutyhilwa; nefihlakeleyo, engasayi kwaziwa."
Matthew10:27 Oko ndikuthetha kuni emnyameni, kuthetheni ekukhanyeni; noko nikuvayo endlebeni, kuxeleni phezu kwezindlu."
Matthew10:28 Ningaboyiki abo babulala umzimba, kodwa bengenako ukuwubulala wona umphefumlo; yoyikani kanye lowo unako ukutshabalalisa umphefumlo kwanomzimba esihogweni somlilo."
Matthew10:29 Abathengiswa ngepeni na oongqatyana ababini? yaye akuyi kuwa namnye kuzo emhlabeni ngaphandle koYihlo.
Matthew10:30 Kwaneenwele ezi zentloko yenu zibaliwe zonke.
Matthew10:31 Musani ukoyika ngoko; nibagqithile oongqatyana abaninzi nina.
Matthew10:32 Wonke umntu ngoko oya kundivuma phambi kwabantu, ndiya kumvuma nam phambi koBawo osemazulwini."
Matthew10:33 Osukuba ke eya kundikhanyela phambi kwabantu, ndiya kumkhanyela nam phambi koBawo osemazulwini."
Matthew10:34 Ningabi ndize kungenisa uxolo emhlabeni; ndize kungenisa luxolo, ndize kungenisa ikrele."
Matthew10:35 Kuba ndize kubambanisa umntu noyise, intombi nonina, umolokazana noninazala."
Matthew10:36 Zaye iintshaba zomntu ziya kuba ngabendlu yakhe.
Matthew10:37 Lowo uthanda uyise nokuba ngunina kunam, akandifanele mna; nalowo uthanda unyana wakhe nokuba yintombi yakhe kunam, akandifanele mna."
Matthew10:38 Nongawuthabathiyo umnqamlezo wakhe, alandele emva kwam, akandifanele mna."
Matthew10:39 Lowo uwufumeneyo umphefumlo wakhe, wolahlekwa nguwo; nalowo uwulahlileyo umphefumlo wakhe ngenxa yam, uya kuwufumana."
Matthew10:40 Lowo wamkela nina, wamkela mna; nalowo wamkela mna, wamkela owandithumayo."
Matthew10:41 Lowo wamkela umprofeti egameni lomprofeti, uya kwamkela umvuzo womshumayeli; nothe wamkela ilungisa ngokuba lililungisa, uya kwamkela umvuzo welungisa."
Matthew10:42 Nothe waseza noko amnye waba bangabona bancinane indebe yodwa yamanzi abandayo egameni lomfundi, inene ndithi kuni, akayi kukha alahlekelwe ngumvuzo wakhe."
Matthew11:1 Kwathi, xeshikweni uYesu ebegqibile ukubamisela abafundi bakhe abalishumi elinababini, wesuka apho waya kufundisa nokushumayela emizini yabo."
Matthew11:2 Ke kaloku uYohane, eyive esentolongweni imisebenzi kaKristu, wesusa bababini kubafundi bakhe,"
Matthew11:3 Athi kuye, Wena ungulowo uzayo na, silinde omnye, sini na?"
Matthew11:4 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuwo, Hambani niye kumbikela uYohane izinto enizivayo nenizibonileyo;"
Matthew11:5 Iimfama zibuya zibone, neziqhwala ziyahamba, abaneqhenqa bayahlanjululwa, nezithulu ziyeva, abafileyo bayavuswa, namahlwempu ayazishunyayezwa iindaba ezilungileyo."
Matthew11:6 Unoyolo othe akakhutyekiswa ndim.
Matthew11:7 Bakubon’ ukuba bayemka abo, waqala uYesu wathi kwizihlwele ngaye uYohane, Naye niphuma nisiya kubona ntoni na entlango? Yayiyingcongolo na, izanyazanyiswa ngumoya?"
Matthew11:8 Naye niphume naya kubona ntoni na kodwa? Yabe ingumntu ovethe iingubo ezitofotofo na? Yabonani, abo banxiba iingubo ezitofotofo basezindlwini zookumkani."
Matthew11:9 Naye niphume naya kubona ntoni na kodwa? Umprofeti? Ewe, ndithi kuni, nangaphezu komprofeti."
Matthew11:10 Kuba lo ngulowo kubhaliweyo ngaye, kwathiwa, Yabona, mna ndiyasithuma isithunywa sam ngaphambi kobuso bakho, Esiya kuyilungisa indlela yakho phambi kwakho."
Matthew11:11 Inene ndithi kuni, Phakathi kwabo bazelweyo ngabafazi, akuvelanga mkhulu kunoYohane umbhaptizi; kanti ke nomncinane kwabanye ebukumkanini bamazulu mkhulu kunaye."
Matthew11:12 Kususela kwimihla kaYohane umbhaptizi, kude kube ngoku, ubukumkani bezulu buyagonyamelwa, bathi abagonyamelayo babuthimbe."
Matthew11:13 Kuba bonke abaprofeti nomthetho baprofeta kwada kwakho uYohane.
Matthew11:14 Ukuba niyavuma ukukwamkela oko, yena nguEliya, lo bekuthiwa uza kufika."
Matthew11:15 Lowo uneendlebe zokuva makeve.
Matthew11:16 Ke kaloku ndiya kusifanisa nantoni na esi sizukulwana? Bufana nabantwana abahleli kwiindawo zembutho, bebiza amadlelane abo;"
Matthew11:17 Sisithi, Sanigwalela, naza anangqungqa; senze isijwili kuni, anambambazela nina."
Matthew11:18 Kuba uYohane weza engadli, engaseli, basuka bathi, Unedemon."
Matthew11:19 uNyana woMntu yena weza esidla, esela, basuka bathi, Khanibone umntu olidla-kudla, olisela-wayini, umhlobo wababuthi berhafu naboni. Ke ubulumko bugwetyelwe kokuphuma ebantwaneni babo."
Matthew11:20 Waza waqala ukuyidubula loo mizi yayenzeke kuyo inkoliso yemisebenzi yakhe yamandla, ngokuba ingaguqukanga;"
Matthew11:21 Yeha, wena Korazin! Yeha, wena Bhetesayida! Ngokuba imisebenzi yamandla eyenzeke kuni, ukuba yayenzeke eTire naseTsidon, ingeyaguqukayo kwakudala loo mizi ngeengubo ezirhwexayo naseluthuthwini."
Matthew11:22 Ke ndithi kuni, Kuya kuba nokunyamezeleka kwiTire nakwiTsidon ngomhla womgwebo kunani."
Matthew11:23 Nawe Kapernahum, uphakanyiselweyo ezulwini, uya kuphoselwa phantsi kwelabafileyo; ngokuba imisebenzi yamandla eyenzeke kuwe, ukuba yayenzeke eSodom, inge ihleli kwada kwaba namhla."
Matthew11:24 Ke ndithi kuni, Kuya kuba nokunyamezeleka okomhlaba waseSodom ngomhla womgwebo kunawe."
Matthew11:25 Ngelo xesha waphendula uYesu wathi, Ndiyabulela kuwe, Bawo, Nkosi yezulu nomhlaba, ngokuba ezi zinto wazifihlayo kwizilumko nakwiingqondi, wazityhilela iintsana;"
Matthew11:26 ewe, Bawo, ngokuba kwakholeka phambi kwakho ukuba kube njalo."
Matthew11:27 Zonke izinto zinikelwe kum nguBawo; kanjalo akukho umaziyo uNyana, nguYise yedwa; kanjalo akukho umaziyo uYise, kuphela nguNyana, nalowo asukuba uNyana ethanda ukumtyhilela."
Matthew11:28 Yizani kum nonke nina nibulalekayo, nisindwayo ngumthwalo, ndoninika ukuphumla."
Matthew11:29 Thabathani idyokhwe yam niyithwale, nifunde kum; ngokuba ndinobulali, ndithobekile ngentliziyo; noyifumanela ukuphumla imiphefumlo yenu."
Matthew11:30 Kuba idyokhwe yam imnandi, nomthwalo wam ulula."
Matthew12:1 Ngelo xesha uYesu wacanda emasimini ngesabatha; Baye ke belambile abafundi bakhe, baqala ukukha izikhwebu, badla."
Matthew12:2 Bakukubona oko abaFarasi, bathi kuye: “Khangela, abafundi bakho benza oko kungavumelekileyo ukwenziwa ngesabatha."
Matthew12:3 Wathi kubo, Aniyilesanga na into awayenzayo uDavide, xa walambayo, yena nabo babenaye;"
Matthew12:4 okokuba wangena endlwini kaThixo, wazidla izonka ezibekwa phambi koThixo, ekube kungavumelekile ukuba azidle yena, kwanabo babenaye, kuvumelekele ababingeleli bodwa?"
Matthew12:5 Anilesanga na emthethweni, ukuba ngesabatha ababingeleli etempileni bayayingcolisa isabatha, bangazeki tyala noko?"
Matthew12:6 Ndithi ke kuni, omkhulu kunayo itempile ukho apha."
Matthew12:7 Ukuba ke nibe nikwazile ukuba kuthini na ukuthi, Ndithanda inceba, andithandi mbingelelo, ninge ningabagwebanga abangenatyala."
Matthew12:8 Kuba uNyana woMntu lo uyiNkosi yayo nesabatha.
Matthew12:9 Esukile ke apho, waya kungena endlwini yabo yesikhungu."
Matthew12:10 Kwabonakala kukho umntu owome isandla; Baye ke bembuza besithi, Kuvumelekile na ukuphilisa ngesabatha? ukuze bammangalele."
Matthew12:11 Wathi kubo, Nguwuphi na umntu kuni ongathi, enegusha enye, yaza ukuba yeyela emhadini ngesabatha, angayibambi ayirhole?"
Matthew12:12 Ubeke phi na ke umntu ukuyigqitha imvu? Ngoko ke kuvumelekile ukwenza okulungileyo ngesabatha.
Matthew12:13 Athi kuloo mntu, Solule isandla sakho. Wasolula; yabuya yaphila, ifana neyawo."
Matthew12:14 Baza baphuma abaFarisi benza ibhunga ngaye lokuba bamtshabalalise.
Matthew12:15 Uthe ke uYesu, ekwazi oko, wemka, apho; walandelwa ngabantu abaninzi; wabaphilisa bonke."
Matthew12:16 Wabakhalimela ukuba bangamtyhili;
Matthew12:17 ukuze kuzaliseke okwathethwayo ngoIsaya umprofeti, esithi,"
Matthew12:18 Mboneni ke umkhonzi wam endimnyulileyo; intanda yam okholisiweyo yiyo umphefumlo wam; ndiya kumbeka uMoya wam phezu kwakhe, waye eya kuzibikela iintlanga umgwebo."
Matthew12:19 Akayi kuphika, akayi kunkqangaza; Akukho bani uya kuliva ilizwi lakhe ezitratweni."
Matthew12:20 Ingcongolo etyumkileyo akayi kuyaphula, nomsonto oqhumayo akayi kuwucima, ade awuphumelelisele ekoyiseni umgwebo;"
Matthew12:21 Kaloku ziya kuthembela egameni lakhe iintlanga.
Matthew12:22 Kwaza kwaziswa kuye umntu ophethwe yidemon, eyimfama, esisidenge;"
Matthew12:23 Yamangaliswa isihlwele sonke, sathi, Lo asinguye na unyana kaDavide?"
Matthew12:24 Bakuva ke oko abaFarasi, bathi: “Lo yena akazikhuphi iidemon, kuphela ngoBhelezebhule umphathi weendimoni."
Matthew12:25 Uthe ke uYesu, ezazi iingcingane zabo, wathi kubo, Ubukumkani bonke obahlulelene bodwa buyaphanza; nomzi wonke nendlu yonke eyahlulelene yodwa ayiyi kuma."
Matthew12:26 Ukuba ke uSathana ukhupha uSathana, wahlulelene yedwa; bothini na ngoko ukuma ubukumkani bakhe?"
Matthew12:27 Ukuba mna ndizikhupha iidemon ngoBhelezebhule, bazikhupha ngabani na onyana benu? ngenxa yoko baya kuba ngabagwebi benu bona."
Matthew12:28 Kodwa ukuba ndizikhupha iidemon ngoMoya kaThixo mna, ngoko bunifikele kanti ubukumkani bukaThixo."
Matthew12:29 Angathini na umntu ukuba nako ukungena endlwini yegorha elo, ayiphange impahla yalo, ukuba akathanga tanci alibophe igorha elo? andule ke ukuyiphanga indlu yakhe."
Matthew12:30 Lowo ungengakum, uchasene nam; nalowo ungandibuthisiyo, uyachithachitha."
Matthew12:31 Ngenxa yoko ndithi kuni, Konke ukona nokunyelisa bokuxolelwa abantu; kodwa kona ukunyelisa uMoya oyiNgcwele abasayi kukuxolelwa abantu."
Matthew12:32 Nothe wathetha ilizwi elichasene noNyana woMntu uya kuxolelwa; kodwa othe wathetha elichasene noMoya oyiNgcwele, akasayi kuxolelwa yena, nakweli phakade, nakwelo lizayo."
Matthew12:33 Wenzani umthi ube mhle, nesiqhamo sawo sibe sihle; okanye niwenze mbi umthi, nesiqhamo sawo sibe sibi; ngokuba umthi waziwa ngesiqhamo sawo."
Matthew12:34 Nzalandini yamarhamba, ningathini na ukuba nako ukuthetha izinto ezilungileyo, nikhohlakele nje? kuba umlomo uthetha ngokuphuphuma kwentliziyo."
Matthew12:35 Umntu olungileyo, ebuncwaneni obulungileyo bentliziyo yakhe, ukhupha izinto ezilungileyo; nomntu okhohlakeleyo, ebuncwaneni obukhohlakeleyo, ukhupha izinto ezikhohlakeleyo."
Matthew12:36 Ndithi ke kuni, Onke amazwi angewani abathe bawathetha abantu, baya kuphendula ngawo ngomhla womgwebo;"
Matthew12:37 kuba ngawo amazwi akho uya kugwetyelwa, nangawo amazwi akho uya kugwetywa."
Matthew12:38 Baphendula ke abathile bakubabhali nabaFarisi, besithi, Mfundisi, sifuna ukubona umqondiso."
Matthew12:39 Waphendula ke wathi kubo, Isizukulwana esingendawo, esikrexezayo, singxamele umqondiso; kwaye asiyi kunikwa mqondiso, ingenguwo umqondiso kaYona umprofeti."
Matthew12:40 Kuba, njengokuba uYona ebemini ntathu nabusuku buthathu esiswini sentlanzi enkulu; kwangokunjalo uNyana woMntu woba mini ntathu nabusuku buthathu embilinini womhlaba."
Matthew12:41 Amadoda aseNiniva aya kusuka eme ngomgwebo nesi sizukulwana, asigwebe; ngokuba aguquka wona ngomemezo lukaYona; ukanti ke omkhulu kunoYona nanku apha."
Matthew12:42 Ukumkanikazi waseZantsi uya kusuka eme ngomgwebo nesi sizukulwana, asigwebe; ngokuba wavela eziphelweni zomhlaba, esiza kuva ubulumko bukaSolomon; ukanti ke omkhulu kunoSolomon nanku apha."
Matthew12:43 Xa umoya ongcolileyo uthe waphuma emntwini, ucanda ezindaweni ezingenamanzi, ufuna ukuphumla, ungakufumani."
Matthew12:44 Uze uthi, Ndiya kubuyela kwasendlwini yam endaphuma kuyo; uthi ke wakufika uyifumane ize, itshayelwe, ivathisiwe."
Matthew12:45 Wandule ke ukuya uthabathe uze nabanye oomoya, abasixhenxe abakhohlakeleyo kunawo, bangene beme khona; lize ikamva laloo mntu libe libi kunesiqaleko sakhe. Kuya kuba njalo nakwesi sizukulwana singendawo."
Matthew12:46 Esathetha neendimbane ezo, kwathi thaphu unina nabazalwana bakhe, bema ngaphandle, befuna ukuthetha naye."
Matthew12:47 Wathi ke othile kuye, Nanku unyoko nabazalwana bakho, bemi ngaphandle, befuna ukuthetha nawe."
Matthew12:48 Uphendule ke wathi kulowo ubemxelele, Ngubani na uma? Ngoobani bona abazalwana bam?"
Matthew12:49 Wasolula isandla sakhe kubafundi bakhe, wathi, Nanku uma nabazalwana bam."
Matthew12:50 Kuba othe wakwenza ukuthanda kukaBawo osemazulwini, nguye lowo ongumntakwethu, nodade wethu, noma."
Matthew13:1 Kwangaloo mini waphuma uYesu endlwini, waya wahlala ngaselwandle."
Matthew13:2 Kwahlanganisana kuye abantu abaninzi, wada yena wangena emkhombeni, wahlala phantsi; yaye yonke indimbane yema elunxwemeni."
Matthew13:3 Wathetha kubo iindawo ezininzi ngemizekeliso, esithi, Yabonani, umhlwayeli waphuma waya kuhlwayela."
Matthew13:4 Ekuhlwayeleni kwakhe, inxalenye yembewu yawa ngasendleleni, zeza iintaka zayidla zayigqiba."
Matthew13:5 Embi yawa ezindaweni ezilulwalwa, apho ibingenamhlaba mninzi;"
Matthew13:6 Zathi ke lakuphuma ilanga zagqatswa; zaza ngenxa yokuba zingenangcambu zoma kwaphela.
Matthew13:7 Embi yawa emithaneni enameva; imithana enameva yakhula, yayiminxa."
Matthew13:8 Enye yawa kuwo wona umhlaba olungileyo, yavelisa isiqhamo, enye ikhulu, enye amashumi amathandathu, nenye amashumi amathathu."
Matthew13:9 Lowo uneendlebe zokuva makeve.
Matthew13:10 Beza abafundi bathi kuye, Kungani na ukuba uthethe kubo ngemizekeliso?"
Matthew13:11 Waphendula ke wathi kubo, Kungokuba nikuphiwe nina ukuzazi iimfihlelo zobukumkani bamazulu, babe ke bona bengakuphiwanga."
Matthew13:12 Kuba osukuba enako, yena uya kuphiwa, aze abe nako ngokugqithiseleyo; kodwa osukuba engenako, uya kuhluthwa kwanoko anako."
Matthew13:13 Ngoko ke ndithetha nabo ngemizekeliso, kuba bona ababoni; besiva nje abeva, bengaqondi noko."
Matthew13:14 Sizaliseka kubo ke isiprofeto sikaIsaya esithi, Ukuva niya kuva, ningaqondi; nokubona niya kubona, ningaqiqi;"
Matthew13:15 Kuba intliziyo yaba bantu ithe fithi kukutyeba, Beva ngeendlebe ezithe nkqi, Bayawacima namehlo abo; hleze babone ngamehlo, beve ngeendlebe, baqonde ngentliziyo, bajike, ndibaphilise."
Matthew13:16 Kodwa anethamsanqa amehlo enu, ngokuba ebona; neendlebe zenu, ngokuba zisiva."
Matthew13:17 Kuba ndithi kuni, Inene, baninzi abaprofeti nabantu abangamalungisa, abanqwenelayo ukuzibona izinto enizibonayo abazibona; nokuva izinto enizivayo, anaziva."
Matthew13:18 Nina ngoko wuveni umzekeliso womhlwayeli:
Matthew13:19 akubon’ ukuba ubani uyaliva ilizwi lobukumkani, engaliqondi, uyafika ongendawo, akuhluthe okuhlwayelwe entliziyweni yakhe; Nguye lo owahlwayelwa ngasendleleni;"
Matthew13:20 Lowo ke uhlwayelwe ezindaweni ezilulwalwa, ngulo ulivayo ilizwi, alamkele kwaoko ngovuyo;"
Matthew13:21 abe ke engenangcambu ngaphakathi kwakhe, eme umzuzwana kodwa; uthi ke kwakuhla imbandezelo nokuba yintshutshiso ngenxa yelizwi, akhutyekiswe kwaoko."
Matthew13:22 Lowo uhlwayelwe emithaneni enameva, ngulo ulivayo ilizwi; Lithe ke ixhala leli phakade, nokulukuhla kobutyebi, kuliminxe ilizwi, lisuke lingabi nasiqhamo."
Matthew13:23 Lowo ke uhlwayelwe kuwo umhlaba omhle, ngulo ulivayo ilizwi aliqonde; luxakatha isiqhamo, omnye lixakathe ikhulu, omnye amashumi amathandathu, nomnye amashumi amathathu."
Matthew13:24 Wababekela omnye umzekeliso, esithi, Ubukumkani bamazulu bufanekiswa nomntu owahlwayela imbewu entle entsimini yakhe."
Matthew13:25 Kuthe ke, xa baleleyo abantu, lwafika utshaba lwakhe, lwahlwayela umdiza phakathi kwengqolowa, lwemka."
Matthew13:26 Ithe ke yakudubula, yakuba neenkozo, wandula ukubonakala nomdiza."
Matthew13:27 Bezile ke abakhonzi bomninindlu, bathi kuye, Nkosi, ubungahlwayelanga imbewu entle yini na entsimini yakho? luvela phi na ke umdiza?"
Matthew13:28 Wathi kubo, Ngumntu olutshaba owenze le nto. Bathi abakhonzi kuye, Uyathanda na ke ukuba siye siwubuthe?"
Matthew13:29 Uthe ke yena, Hayi; hleze nithi, xa niwubuthayo umdiza, nincothule nengqolowa kunye nawo."
Matthew13:30 Yekani kukhule ndawonye kokubini, kude kube sekuvuneni; ngexa ke lokuvuna ndothi kubavuni, Buthani kuqala umdiza, niwubophe ube zizithungu, utshiswe, kodwa yona ingqolowa yihlanganiseleni kuvimba wam."
Matthew13:31 Wababekela omnye umzekeliso, esithi, Ubukumkani bamazulu bufana nokhozo lwemostade, awaluthabathayo umntu, waluhlwayela entsimini yakhe."
Matthew13:32 Olona luncinane kuzo zonke iimbewu; kodwa xa luthe lwahluma, luyayidlula imifuno ngobukhulu, lube ngumthi, ngokokude iintaka zezulu zize zihlale emasebeni awo."
Matthew13:33 Wathetha omnye umzekeliso kubo; Ubukumkani bamazulu bufana negwele, awalithabathayo umfazi, walifihla ezilinganisweni zozithathu zomgubo, wada wabiliswa uphela."
Matthew13:34 Ezi ndawo zonke uYesu wazithetha ngemizekeliso kuzo izihlwele; Ubengathethi ke kubo kungengamzekeliso;
Matthew13:35 Ukuze kuzaliseke okwathethwayo ngomprofeti, esithi, Ndiya kuwuvula ngemizekeliso umlomo wam; Ndiya kuthetha izinto ezazifihliwe kwasekusekweni kwehlabathi."
Matthew13:36 Waza uYesu wazindulula izihlwele wangena endlwini. Beza kuye abafundi bakhe, besithi, Sixelele umzekeliso womdiza wentsimi."
Matthew13:37 Waphendula ke wathi kubo, Lo uhlwayela imbewu entle nguNyana woMntu;"
Matthew13:38 intsimi ke lihlabathi; imbewu ke entle ngoonyana bobukumkani abo; Umdiza ke ngoonyana bongendawo;
Matthew13:39 Utshaba ke olwawuhlwayelayo wona nguMtyholi; ukuvuna kukupheliswa kwephakade eli; abavuni ke zizithunywa zezulu.
Matthew13:40 Njengokuba ngoko ubuthwa umdiza, utshiswe ngomlilo; kuya kuba njalo ekuphelisweni kweli hlabathi."
Matthew13:41 uNyana woMntu uya kuthuma izithunywa zakhe, zize zibuthe, zikhuphe ebukumkanini bakhe, zonke izikhubekiso, nabo benza okuchasene nomthetho;"
Matthew13:42 zibaphose ezikweni elivutha umlilo; khona apho kuya kubakho ukulila nokutshixiza kwamazinyo.
Matthew13:43 Aya kwandula ke amalungisa ukubengezela njengelanga ebukumkanini boYise wawo. Lowo uneendlebe zokuva makeve.
Matthew13:44 Kanjalo ubukumkani bamazulu bufana nobutyebi obufihlwe entsimini, athe umntu wabufihla; athi ke umntu akuyifumana, ayifihle, aze ngenxa yovuyo lwakhe aye athengise ngeento zonke anazo, ayithenge loo ntsimi."
Matthew13:45 Kanjalo ubukumkani bamazulu bufana nomrhwebi, efuna iiperile ezintle;"
Matthew13:46 owathi ke akuyifumana iperile inye, exabiso likhulu, wemka waya wananisa ngeento zonke abenazo, wayithenga."
Matthew13:47 Kanjalo ubukumkani bamazulu bufana nomnatha, owaphoswa elwandle, wahlanganisa zonke iintlobo zeentlobo zazo."
Matthew13:48 Ekuthe wazala, bawurholela elunxwemeni, bahlala phantsi, bazibuthela ezintle ezityeni, bazilahla ke ezimbi."
Matthew13:49 Kuya kuba njalo ekuphelisweni kwephakade eli: ziya kuphuma izithunywa zezulu, zibakhethe abangendawo phakathi kwamalungisa;"
Matthew13:50 zibaphose ezikweni lomlilo; khona apho kuya kubakho ukulila nokutshixiza kwamazinyo.
Matthew13:51 Athi kubo uYesu, Niziqondile na zonke ezi ndawo? Bathi kuye, Ewe, Nkosi."
Matthew13:52 Wathi kubo, Ngenxa yoko, umbhali wonke ofundiselwe ebukumkanini bamazulu ufana nomntu ongumninindlu, orhola ebuncwaneni bakhe izinto ezintsha kwanezindala."
Matthew13:53 Kwathi, akuyigqiba uYesu le mizekeliso, wanduluka khona apho."
Matthew13:54 Akufika kwelakowabo, wabafundisa endlwini yabo yesikhungu, ngokokude bakhwankqiswe bathi, Lo ubuzuze phi na obu bulumko, nale misebenzi yamandla?"
Matthew13:55 Lo asinguye na unyana wengcibi yokwakha? Unina akabizwa ngokuba nguMariya na? Abazalwana bakhe bathi, ooYakobi, noYose, noSimon, noYuda, yini na?"
Matthew13:56 Noodade wabo abakho nathi bonke na? Uzizuze phi na phofu lo zonke ezi zinto?
Matthew13:57 Baye bekhubeka kuye. Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Umprofeti akasweli mbeko, kungaba kukowabo, nakokwabo."
Matthew13:58 Akenza misebenzi mininzi yamandla khona apho ngenxa yokungakholwa kwabo.
Matthew14:1 Ngelo xesha uHerode, umphathi wesahlulo sesine selizwe, waluva udaba lukaYesu,"
Matthew14:2 wathi kubakhonzi bakhe, Lo nguYohane umbhaptizi; uvukile kwabafileyo; kungoko kubonakala kuye imisebenzi yamandla."
Matthew14:3 Kuba uHerode wambamba uYohane, wambopha, wamfaka entolongweni, ngenxa kaHerodiya, umfazi kaFilipu, umninawa wakhe."
Matthew14:4 Kuba wayethe uYohane kuye, Akuvumelekile ukuba ube naye."
Matthew14:5 Uthe ke eza kumbulala, woyika abantu, ngokuba babesithi ungumprofeti."
Matthew14:6 Kwakubon’ ukuba kwenziwa isikhumbuzo sokuzalwa kukaHerode, yathi intombi kaHerodiya yangqungqa, yamkholisa uHerode."
Matthew14:7 Ekubeni wayithembisa ngesifungo ukuba woyinika oko ingakucelayo.
Matthew14:8 Ke yona, iqhutywe ngunina, yathi, Ndinike apha ngesitya intloko kaYohane umbhaptizi."
Matthew14:9 Waba buhlungu ukumkani, kodwa, ngenxa yesifungo, nangenxa yabo babehleli naye esithebeni, wathi mayinikwe."
Matthew14:10 Wasusa umntu, wamnqumla uYohane intloko entolongweni apho."
Matthew14:11 Yaziswa intloko yakhe ngesitya, yanikwa intombazana leyo, yathi yona yayisa kunina."
Matthew14:12 Beza abafundi bakhe, basithabatha isidumbu, basingcwaba; baya babikela uYesu."
Matthew14:13 Evile ke uYesu, wemka apho ngomkhombe, waya endaweni eyintlango eyedwa."
Matthew14:14 Ephumile ke uYesu, wabona into eninzi yabantu, wasikwa yimfesane ngabo, wayiphilisa imilwelwe yabo."
Matthew14:15 Kuthe ke kwakuhlwa, beza kuye abafundi bakhe, besithi, Le ndawo iyintlango, kanjalo ilixa lise lidlule; zindulule izihlwele, ziye emizaneni, zizithengele ukudla."
Matthew14:16 Wathi kubo uYesu, Akufuneki ukuba zimke; zipheni nina zitye."
Matthew14:17 Bathi ke bona kuye, Asinanto apha, ingezizo izonka ezihlanu neentlanzi ezimbini."
Matthew14:18 Wathi ke yena, Ziziseni kum apha."
Matthew14:19 Wathi izihlwele mazingqengqe phantsi engceni, wazithabatha izonka zozihlanu neentlanzi zombini, wathi, ekhangele ezulwini, wasikelela; waziqhekeza ke izonka ezo, wazinika abafundi bakhe, abafundi ke banika izihlwele."
Matthew14:20 Badla ke bonke bahlutha, kwaza kwaqokelelwa iingobozi ezilishumi elinambini zokutya okuseleyo."
Matthew14:21 Ke kaloku abo babesidla babengamadoda akumawaka amahlanu, ngaphandle kwabafazi nabantwana."
Matthew14:22 Waza uYesu wabanyanzela kwaoko abafundi bakhe ukuba bangene emkhombeni, bamandulele baye phesheya, lo gama azindululayo izihlwele yena."
Matthew14:23 Ezindulule ke izihlwele, wenyuka intaba ngasese, ukuba athandaze. Kwahlwa ke ekhona apho yedwa."
Matthew14:24 Ke kaloku umkhombe wawuselunxwemeni lolwandle, uqhutywa ngamaza, kuba umoya ubuvela ngaphambili."
Matthew14:25 Kuthe ke ngowesine umlindo wobusuku, wesuka waya kubo uYesu, ehamba phezu kolwandle."
Matthew14:26 Bakumbona ke abafundi bakhe ehamba phezu kolwandle, bankwantya, besithi: “Ngumhlola; bakhala kukoyika."
Matthew14:27 Wathetha ke kwaoko uYesu kubo, esithi, Yomelelani; ndim; musani ukoyika."
Matthew14:28 uPetros wamphendula ke wathi, Nkosi, ukuba nguwe, yitsho ndize kuwe ndihamba phezu kwamanzi."
Matthew14:29 Wathi, Yiza. Wehla ke uPetros emkhombeni, wahamba phezu kwamanzi, esiya kuYesu."
Matthew14:30 Kodwa, ebona umoya unamandla, woyika; wathi eqala ukutshona, wakhala, esithi, Nkosi, ndisindise."
Matthew14:31 Wasolula kwaoko ke isandla uYesu, wambamba, wathi kuye, Ehla wena ulukholo luncinane, uthandabuzelani na?"
Matthew14:32 Bakuba bengenile emkhombeni, wadamba umoya."
Matthew14:33 Bazile ke abo basemkhombeni, baqubuda kuye, besithi, Inyaniso, unguNyana kaThixo."
Matthew14:34 Bewelile, bafika emhlabeni waseGenesarete."
Matthew14:35 Emazile amadoda aloo ndawo, athumela kuwo wonke loo mmandla, azisa kuye bonke ababesifa."
Matthew14:36 Baza bambongoza uYesu ukuba bachukumise nje kodwa intshinga yengubo yakhe; baza bonke abayichukumisayo baphiliswa kanye.
Matthew15:1 Ngelo xesha beza kuYesu abaseYerusalem ababhali nabaFarisi, besithi,"
Matthew15:2 Kungani na ukuba abafundi bakho basigqithe isithethe samanyange? ngokuba abazihlambi izandla zabo, xa badla isonka."
Matthew15:3 Waphendula ke yena wathi kubo, Nani, kungani na ukuba niwugqithe umthetho kaThixo ngenxa yesithethe senu?"
Matthew15:4 Kuba uThixo wawisa umthetho, esithi, Mbeke uyihlo nonyoko; wathi kanjalo, Omthethela kakubi uyise nokuba ingunina, makafe ukufa."
Matthew15:5 Ke nina nithi, Othe kuyise nokuba kukunina, Iselingumnikelo kuThixo, into onge uba uncedwa ngayo ndim, ukholisile;"
Matthew15:6 ingambeki uyise nonina; yoba msulwa. Niwuphangile ke igunya umthetho kaThixo ngenxa yesithethe senu.
Matthew15:7 Bahanahanisindini, watyapha ukuprofeta ngani uIsaya, esithi,"
Matthew15:8 Aba bantu basondela kum ngomlomo wabo, bandibeke ngemilebe yomlomo wabo; kodwa intliziyo yabo ikude lee kum."
Matthew15:9 Bafumana ke bendihlonela, Befundisa iimfundiso eziyimithetho yabantu."
Matthew15:10 Wayibizela kuye indimbane, wathi kubo, Phulaphulani niqonde."
Matthew15:11 Asikokungena emlonyeni okumenza inqambi umntu; ke okuphuma emlonyeni, kuko oko okumenza inqambi umntu."
Matthew15:12 Beza abafundi bakhe bathi kuye, Uyazi na ukuba abaFarisi bathe bakuliva elo lizwi bakhubeka?"
Matthew15:13 Waphendula ke wathi, Zonke izityalo ezingatyalwanga nguBawo wasemazulwini ziya kuncothulwa."
Matthew15:14 Bayekeni; ngabakhokeli beemfama abakwaziimfama; Ke kaloku, xa sukuba imfama ikhokela imfama, zombini ziya kweyela emhadini."
Matthew15:15 Waphendula ke uPetros wathi kuye, Sixelele lo mzekeliso."
Matthew15:16 Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Anikabi nakuqonda na nani nangoku?"
Matthew15:17 Anikaqondi na ukuba yonke into engena emlonyeni ingena esiswini, ize iphoswe entlanjeni?"
Matthew15:18 Ke zona izinto eziphuma emlonyeni, ziphuma kuyo intliziyo; zimenza inqambi umntu."
Matthew15:19 Kuba kuyo intliziyo kuphuma izicamango ezingendawo, ookubulala, ookukrexeza, oomibulo, oobusela, ookungqina ubuxoki, ookunyelisa."
Matthew15:20 Zizo ezo izinto ezimenza inqambi umntu; kodwa kona ukudla ngezandla ezingahlanjwanga akumenzi nqambi umntu.
Matthew15:21 Ephumile khona apho, uYesu wasinga kwimida yaseTire neTsidon."
Matthew15:22 Kwathi thu umKananekazi evela kuloo mida, ekhala esithi, Ndenzele inceba, Nkosi, nyana kaDavide; intombi yam iphethwe yidemon kakubi."
Matthew15:23 Kodwa akamphendulanga nelizwi eli. Beza abafundi bakhe, bamcela besithi, Mndulule; ngokuba uyakhala emva kwethu."
Matthew15:24 Waphendula ke yena wathi, Ndithunywe kwizimvu ezilahlekileyo zendlu kaSirayeli zodwa."
Matthew15:25 Weza ke waqubuda kuye, esithi, Nkosi, ndincede."
Matthew15:26 Uphendule ke wathi, Asinto intle ukusithabatha isonka sabantwana, siphoswe ezinjaneni."
Matthew15:27 Wathi ke yena, Ewe, Nkosi; kuba neenjana zidla kwiimvuthuluka eziwa etafileni yabaninizo."
Matthew15:28 Waphendula ke uYesu wathi kuye, Mfazi, lukhulu ukholo lwakho; makwenzeke kuwe ngokuthanda kwakho. Yaphiliswa intombi yakhe kwangelo lixa."
Matthew15:29 Emka apho uYesu, weza ngaselwandle lwaseGalili; wenyuka intaba, wahlala phantsi khona."
Matthew15:30 Kweza kuye izihlwele ezininzi, zinazo iziqhwala, iimfama, izidenge, izilima, nabanye abaninzi, zababeka phantsi ezinyaweni zikaYesu; wabaphilisa."
Matthew15:31 Zada zamangaliswa izihlwele ezo, zakubona izidenge zithetha, izilima ziphilile, iziqhwala zihamba, neemfama zibona; zamzukisa uThixo kaSirayeli."
Matthew15:32 Ebabizele ke kuye uYesu abafundi bakhe, wathi, Ndisikwa yimfesane ngenxa yezihlwele, ngokuba sekuntsuku ntathu behleli nam, bengenanto bangayidlayo;"
Matthew15:33 Bathi ke kuye abafundi bakhe, Sozizuza phi na entlango apho izonka ezingaka, zokuhluthisa isihlwele esingaka?"
Matthew15:34 Athi kubo uYesu, Zingaphi na izonka eninazo? Bathi ke bona, Zisixhenxe, neentlanzi ezimbalwa."
Matthew15:35 Wathi kwizihlwele mazihlale phantsi emhlabeni.
Matthew15:36 Wazithabatha ke izonka zosixhenxe neentlanzi, wabulela, waqhekeza, wanika abafundi bakhe, abafundi ke banika izihlwele."
Matthew15:37 Badla bahlutha bonke, kwaza kwaqokelelwa iingobozi ezisixhenxe zizele yintsalela."
Matthew15:38 Ke kaloku abo babesidla babengamawaka amane amadoda, ngaphandle kwabafazi nabantwana."
Matthew15:39 Esindulule ke isihlwele, wangena emkhombeni, weza emacaleni aseMagadala."
Matthew16:1 Bafika ke abaFarisi nabaSadusi, bathi, bemlinga, bacela ukuba ababonise umqondiso ophuma ezulwini."
Matthew16:2 Waphendula ke wathi kubo, Ngokuhlwa nithi, Liya kusa; kuba izulu limlilo ukuba bomvu."
Matthew16:3 Kanjalo kusasa nithi, Namhla luqhwithela; kuba izulu limlilo ukuba bomvu, lisibekele. Bahanahanisindini, niyakwazi ukubucalula ubuso bezulu; Ke imiqondiso yamaxesha aninako na ukuyicalula?"
Matthew16:4 Isizukulwana esingendawo, esikrexezayo, sifuna umqondiso; kwaye asiyi kunikwa mqondiso, ingenguwo umqondiso kaYona umprofeti. Wabashiya ke wemka."
Matthew16:5 Bakufika abafundi bakhe ngaphesheya, baye balibele ukuphatha izonka."
Matthew16:6 Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Ligqaleni nililumkele igwele labaFarisi nabaSadusi."
Matthew16:7 Baye becamanga phakathi kwabo, besithi, Kungokuba singaphathanga zonka."
Matthew16:8 Ekwazi ke oko uYesu, wathi kubo, Ehlani, nina balukholo luncinane! Yini na ukuba nicamange, ngokuba ningaphathanga zonka?"
Matthew16:9 Anikaqondi na, anizikhumbuli na izonka ezihlanu zamawaka amahlanu, nokuba zazingaphi na iingobozi enazithabathayo?"
Matthew16:10 Kwanezonka ezisixhenxe zamawaka amane, nokuba zazingaphi na iingobozi enazithabathayo?"
Matthew16:11 Yini na le nto ningaqondi, ukuba bendingatsho ngasonka, ukuthi kuni, manililumkele igwele labaFarisi nabaSadusi?"
Matthew16:12 Bandula ukuqonda, ukuba ubengatsho ukuthi mabalumkele igwele lesonka; ubesithi mabalumkele imfundiso yabaFarisi nabaSadusi."
Matthew16:13 Akufika uYesu emacaleni aseKesareya yakwaFilipu, wababuza abafundi bakhe, esithi, Bathi abantu ndingubani na mna, Nyana woMntu?"
Matthew16:14 Bayesithi ke bona, Inxenye ithi, UnguYohane umbhaptizi; bambi bathi, UnguYeremiya, mhlawumbi ungomnye wakubaprofeti."
Matthew16:15 Athi kubo, Ke nina nithi ndingubani na?"
Matthew16:16 Waphendula ke uSimon Petros wathi, Wena unguye uKristu, uNyana kaThixo ophilileyo."
Matthew16:17 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Unoyolo, Simon kaYona, ngokuba akukutyhilelwanga oku yinyama negazi, ukutyhilelwe nguBawo osemazulwini."
Matthew16:18 Nam ke, ndithi kuwe, UnguPetros wena; ndiya kulakhela phezu kolu lwalwa ibandla lam; kwaye amasango esihogo akayi koyisa ngokuchasene nayo."
Matthew16:19 Ndiya kukunika izitshixo zobukumkani bamazulu; kuthi ke othe wakubopha emhlabeni, kubopheke emazulwini; kuthi othe wakukhulula emhlabeni, kukhululeke emazulwini."
Matthew16:20 Wabayala abafundi bakhe, ukuba bangaxeleli bani ukuba yena unguye uKristu."
Matthew16:21 Waqalela kwelo xa uYesu ukubabonisa abafundi bakhe, okokuba umelwe kukuba aye eYerusalem, eve ubunzima obukhulu kuwo amadoda amakhulu nababingeleli abakhulu, nababhali, abulawe, athi ngomhla wesithathu abuye avuke."
Matthew16:22 Waza uPetros wamthabatha, waqala ukumkhalimela, esithi, Makube lee kuwe, Nkosi;"
Matthew16:23 Wajika ke wathi kuPetros, Suka uye emva kwam, Sathana, usisikhubekiso kum; ngokuba ungazinyamekeli ezikaThixo izinto, unyamekela ezabantu."
Matthew16:24 Wandula wathi uYesu kubafundi bakhe, Ukuba kukho othanda ukundilandela, makazincame ngokwakhe, awuthwale umnqamlezo wakhe, andilandele."
Matthew16:25 Kuba othe wathanda ukuwusindisa umphefumlo wakhe, wolahlekelwa nguwo; ke othe wawulahla umphefumlo wakhe ngenxa yam, wowufumana."
Matthew16:26 Kuba, kumnceda ntoni na umntu, ukuba uthe wazuza ihlabathi liphela, waza wonakalelwa ke ngumphefumlo wakhe? Okanye worhola ntoni na umntu, ibe sisananelo somphefumlo wakhe?"
Matthew16:27 Kuba uNyana woMntu uza kuza esebuqaqawulini boYise, enezithunywa zakhe, andule ukubavuza bonke ngabanye ngokokwenza kwabo."
Matthew16:28 Inene, ndithi kuni, Kwabemiyo apha kukho abangayi kukha beve kufa, bade bambone uNyana woMntu esiza, esebukumkanini bakhe."
Matthew17:1 Uthi uYesu emveni kweentsuku ezintandathu, athabathe uPetros noYakobi noYohane umzalwana wakhe, abanyuse baye entabeni ende ngasese, bebodwa."
Matthew17:2 Wenziwa waba kumila kumbi phambi kwabo, bathi ubuso bakhe bakhazimla njengelanga, zasuka ke iingubo zakhe zamhlophe njengokukhanya."
Matthew17:3 Nanko kubonakala kubo uMoses noEliya, bethetha naye."
Matthew17:4 Waphendula ke uPetros, wathi kuYesu, Nkosi, kulungile ukuba sibe lapha; omnye ube ngowakho, omnye ube ngokaMoses, omnye ube ngokaEliya."
Matthew17:5 Kwathi, esathetha, kwathi gqi ilifu elikhanyayo, labenzela ithinzi; nalo izwi liphuma efini apho, lisithi, Lo nguNyana wam oyintanda, endikholisiweyo nguye; mveni yena."
Matthew17:6 Bakukuva oko abafundi, bawa ngobuso, boyika kakhulu."
Matthew17:7 Waya ke uYesu, wabachukumisa, wathi, Vukani ningoyiki."
Matthew17:8 Bathe ke bakuwaphakamisa amehlo abo, ababona mntu, yanguYesu yedwa."
Matthew17:9 Bakubon’ ukuba bayehla entabeni apho, wabawisela umthetho uYesu esithi, Ize ningawuxeleli bani umbono lo, ade avuke kwabafileyo uNyana woMntu."
Matthew17:10 Bambuza abafundi bakhe, besithi, Yini na phofu ukuba ababhali bathi, uEliya umelwe kukufika tanci?"
Matthew17:11 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Okunene uEliya uya kufika tanci, azimise zonke izinto."
Matthew17:12 Ke ndithi kuni, uEliya uselefikile. Abamazanga, basuka benza kuye konke abakuthandayo; kwangokunjalo naye uNyana woMntu wova ubunzima ngabo."
Matthew17:13 Bandula ukuqonda abafundi ukuba ubethetha kubo ngaye uYohane umbhaptizi.
Matthew17:14 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba bafikile esihlweleni, kweza kuye indoda, yaqubuda kuye, yathi."
Matthew17:15 Nkosi, menzele inceba unyana wam; ngokuba unesathuthwane, ubandezelekile; kuba futhi esiwa emlilweni, nasemanzini futhi."
Matthew17:16 Ndithe ndamzisa kubafundi bakho, ababa nako ukumphilisa."
Matthew17:17 Waphendula ke uYesu wathi, Sizukulwanandini singakholwayo, sigwenxa, koda kube nini na ndinani? Koda kube nini na ndininyamezele? Mziseni kum apha."
Matthew17:18 Waza uYesu wayikhalimela indimoni leyo; wemka kuye; waphiliswa umntwana kwangelo lixa.
Matthew17:19 Bandula beza abafundi kuYesu bebodwa, bathi, Bekungani na ukuba singabi nako ukuwukhupha thina?"
Matthew17:20 Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Bekungenxa yokungakholwa kwenu; kuba inene ndithi kuni, Beningathi, ninokholo olunjengokhozo lwemostade, nithi kule ntaba, Suka apha uye phaya, isuke, ihambe; kwaye iya kufuduswa; akukho nanye into eya kuninqabela."
Matthew17:21 Olu hlobo ke aluphumi, kungengako ukuthandaza nokuzila ukudla."
Matthew17:22 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba bahleli kwelaseGalili, wathi uYesu kubo, uNyana woMntu uza kunikelwa ezandleni zabantu;"
Matthew17:23 baya kumbulala, athi ngomhla wesithathu abuye avuke. Baba buhlungu kakhulu."
Matthew17:24 Ke, bakubon’ ukuba bafikile eKapernahum, kweza kuPetros abo bamkela imali yetempile, bathi, Umfundisi wenu akayirholi na imali yetempile?"
Matthew17:25 Athi, Ewe. Akungena endlwini, uYesu wamphangela, esithi, Uthini na wena, Simon? Ookumkani behlabathi bamkela kubaphi na irhafu nomnikelo? koonyana babo, kwabasemzini, kusini na?"
Matthew17:26 Athi uPetros kuye, Kwabasemzini. Athi uYesu kuye, Bakhululekile ngoko ke bona abantwana."
Matthew17:27 Kodwa ukuze singabakhubekisi, hamba uye elwandle, uphose umlobothi wakho, uthabathe loo ntlanzi ithe yavela tanci. Wothi wakuwunqika umlomo wayo, ufumane ishekele; yithabathe yona, ubanike, ibe yeyam nawe."
Matthew18:1 Ngelo lixa beza abafundi kuYesu, besithi, Ngubani na ke omkhulu kunabanye, ebukumkanini bamazulu?"
Matthew18:2 Waza uYesu wabizela kuye umntwana, wammisa phakathi kwabo."
Matthew18:3 Wathi, Inene, ndithi kuni, Ukuba anithanga niguquke, nibe njengabantwana aba, aniyi kukha ningene ebukumkanini bamazulu."
Matthew18:4 Osukuba ngoko ethe wazithoba njengalo mntwana nguye omkhulu kunabanye ebukumkanini bamazulu.
Matthew18:5 Kanti othe wamkela umntwana onje, noko amnye, egameni lam, wamkela mna;"
Matthew18:6 Ke othe wakhubekisa noko amnye waba bancinane bakholwayo kum, ngekumlungele kanye ukuba ubegangxwe ilitye lokusila entanyeni yakhe, antywiliselwe enzulwini yolwandle."
Matthew18:7 Yeha ihlabathi ngenxa yezikhubekiso! Kuba kumele ukuba zifike izikhubekiso; yeha ke loo mntu siza ngaye isikhubekiso!
Matthew18:8 Ukuba ke isandla sakho, nokuba lunyawo lwakho luya kukhubekisa, lunqumle, ululahle kude; kukulungele kanye ukuba ungene ebomini usisiqhwala, mhlawumbi usisilima, kunokuba uthi, unezandla ezibini, mhlawumbi uneenyawo ezimbini, uphoswe emlilweni ongunaphakade."
Matthew18:9 Nokuba iliso lakho liya kukhubekisa, linyothule, ulilahle; kukulungele kanye ukuba ungene ebomini unaliso linye, kunokuba uthi, unamehlo amabini, uphoswe esihogweni somlilo."
Matthew18:10 Lumkani, ningadeli namnye waba bancinane; Kuba ndithi kuni, Izithunywa zabo emazulwini zihlala zibubona ubuso bukaBawo osemazulwini."
Matthew18:11 Kuba uNyana woMntu weza kusindisa oko kulahlekileyo.
Matthew18:12 Nithini na? Ukuba umntu unekhulu lezimvu, ize kulahleke enye kuzo, akazishiyi na ezingamashumi asithoba anesithoba, aye ezintabeni, aye kufuna leyo ilahlekileyo?"
Matthew18:13 Ukuba uthe wayifumana, inene ndithi kuni, uyayivuyela leyo ngaphezu kokuvuyela ezo zimashumi asithoba anesithoba, zingalahlekanga."
Matthew18:14 Kwangokunjalo asikukuthanda kukaYihlo osemazulwini, ukuba kulahleke namnye waba bancinane."
Matthew18:15 Ukuba ke umzalwana wakho uthe wakona, yiya umohlwaye inguwe naye ninedwa; ukuba uthe wakuva, woba umzuzile umzalwana wakho."
Matthew18:16 Ke ukuba uthe akeva buya uthabathe nawe abe mnye nokuba babini, ukuze onke amazwi amiswe ngomlomo wamangqina amabini, nokuba ngamathathu."
Matthew18:17 Ukuba ke uthe akabeva, xelela ibandla; ukuba uthe akaliva ibandla, kuwe makabe njengomntu weentlanga nombuthi werhafu."
Matthew18:18 Inene, ndithi kuni, Konke enithe nakubopha emhlabeni, kobotshwa emazulwini;"
Matthew18:19 Kanjalo ndithi kuni, Ukuba ababini kuni bathe bavumelana emhlabeni apha ngeendawo zonke abangazicelayo, bozenzelwa nguBawo osemazulwini."
Matthew18:20 Kuba apho bahlanganisene khona egameni lam, nokuba babini nokuba bathathu, ndikho mna apho phakathi kwabo."
Matthew18:21 Weza uPetros kuye wathi, Nkosi, koba futhi kangaphi na umzalwana wam endona, ndimxolela? Koda kube kasixhenxe na?"
Matthew18:22 Athi uYesu kuye, Andithi kuwe, koda kube kasixhenxe; ndithi, koda kube kamashumi asixhenxe aphindiweyo kasixhenxe."
Matthew18:23 Ngoko ke ubukumkani bamazulu bufanekiswa nomntu ongukumkani, owafuna ukubalelana nabakhonzi bakhe."
Matthew18:24 Kuthe ke akuqala ukubalelana nabo, kwaziswa kuye omnye onetyala leetalente ezingamawaka alishumi."
Matthew18:25 Kuthe ke ekubeni engenanto yakuhlawula, yathi inkosi yakhe, makuthengiswe ngaye, nangomfazi wakhe, nangabantwana bakhe, nangeento zonke anazo, kuhlawulwe."
Matthew18:26 Wawa phantsi ngoko umkhonzi lowo, waqubuda kuyo, esithi, Nkosi, khawundenze kuhle, ndokuhlawula lonke."
Matthew18:27 Yasikwa ke yimfesane inkosi yaloo mkhonzi, yamkhulula, yamxolela ityala elo."
Matthew18:28 Uphumile ke loo mkhonzi, wafumanana nomnye wabakhonza kunye naye obenetyala kuye leedenariyo ezilikhulu; wambamba, wamkrwitsha, esithi, Ndihlawule ityala onalo."
Matthew18:29 Wawa phantsi ngoko ezinyaweni zakhe lo ubekhonza kunye naye, wamana embongoza, esithi, Khawundenze kuhle, ndokuhlawula lonke."
Matthew18:30 Akavumanga ke; waya wamphosa entolongweni, ade alihlawule ityala elo."
Matthew18:31 Bathe ke abo babekhonza kunye naye, bakubona oko kwenzekileyo, baba buhlungu kakhulu, beza bayityela inkosi yabo konke oko kwenzekileyo."
Matthew18:32 Yaza inkosi yaso, yasibizela kuye, yathi kuso, mkhonzindini ungendawo, ndakuxolela lonke elaa tyala, ekubeni wandibongozayo;"
Matthew18:33 ubungamelwe na kukuba ube nenceba nawe kokhonza kunye nawe, njengokuba nam bendinenceba kuwe?"
Matthew18:34 Yaqumba inkosi yakhe, yamnikela kubathuthumbisi, ade alihlawule lonke ityala lakhe kuyo."
Matthew18:35 Wothi noBawo wasemazulwini enjenjalo kuni, ukuba anithanga nonke ngabanye nabaxolela abazalwana benu iziphoso zabo ngeentliziyo zenu."
Matthew19:1 Kwathi, xeshikweni uYesu ebewagqibile la mazwi, wanduluka kwelaseGalili, weza emideni yelakwaYuda, phesheya kweYordan."
Matthew19:2 Wayelandelwa ngabantu abaninzi; wabaphilisa khona.
Matthew19:3 Kweza kuye abaFarisi bemlinga, besithi kuye, Kuvumelekile na ukuba indoda imale umfazi wayo nangasiphi na isizathu?"
Matthew19:4 Waphendula ke wathi kubo, Aniyilesanga na, ukuba lowo wabadalayo kwasekuqalekeni wabadala bayindoda nenkazana?"
Matthew19:5 Wathi, Ngenxa yoko umntu womshiya uyise nonina, anamathele emfazini wakhe, baze abo babini babe nyama-nye?"
Matthew19:6 Ngako oko abasebabini, banyama-nye. Oko ke ngoko uThixo akumanyileyo, makungahlulwa mntu."
Matthew19:7 Bathi kuye, Yini na ukuba uMoses awise umthetho wokuthi, makamnike incwadi yokwahlukana, amale?"
Matthew19:8 Athi kubo, uMoses ngenxa yobulukhuni beentliziyo zenu wanivumela ukuba nibale abafazi benu; ke ekuqalekeni bekungenjalo."
Matthew19:9 Ndithi ke kuni, Othe wamala umfazi wakhe, kungengaluhenyuzo, wazeka omnye, uyakrexeza;"
Matthew19:10 Bathi kuye abafundi bakhe, Ukuba unjalo umcimbi womntu nomfazi, akulungile ukuzeka."
Matthew19:11 Wathi ke yena kubo, Asibantu bonke abaliqondayo eli lizwi, ingengabo banikiweyo."
Matthew19:12 Kuba kukho amathenwa azalwa enjalo kwasesizalweni sonina; kukho namathenwa enziwa abantu amathenwa; kukho namathenwa azithenwayo ngenxa yobukumkani bamazulu. Lowo unako ukukwamkela, makakuthabathe;"
Matthew19:13 Kwaza kwaziswa kuye abantwana, ukuze abeke izandla phezu kwabo, abathandazele; basuka abafundi babakhalimela."
Matthew19:14 Wathi ke uYesu, Bayekeni abantwana, ningabaleli ukuza kum; kuba ubukumkani bamazulu bobabo banjalo."
Matthew19:15 Wazibeka izandla phezu kwabo, wemka apho."
Matthew19:16 Kwabonakala kusiza othile, wathi kuye, Mfundisi ulungileyo, yiyiphi na into elungileyo endingenza yona, ukuze ndibe nabo ubomi?"
Matthew19:17 Uthe ke yena kuye, Yini na ukuba uthi ndilungile? Akukho ulungileyo, mnye kwaphela, nguThixo. Ukuba ke uthe wangena ebomini, yigcine imithetho."
Matthew19:18 Athi kuye, Yiphi na? Wathi ke uYesu, uze ungabulali, uze ungakrexezi, uze ungebi, uze ungangqini buxoki;"
Matthew19:19 Beka uyihlo nonyoko; nawo lo: uze umthande ummelwane wakho njengoko uzithanda ngako.
Matthew19:20 Ithi kuye indodana leyo, Zonke ezo zinto ndazigcina kwasebuncinaneni bam; ndisaswele ntoni na?"
Matthew19:21 Wathi uYesu kuyo, Ukuba unga ungafezeka, hamba uye kuthengisa ngeempahla zakho, uphe amahlwempu, woba nobutyebi emazulwini; uze ke undilandele."
Matthew19:22 Ilivile ke indodana ilizwi elo, yemka ibuhlungu; kuba ibinemfuyo eninzi."
Matthew19:23 Waza wathi uYesu kubafundi bakhe, Inene, ndithi kuni, Koba ngenkankulu ukuba isityebi singene ebukumkanini bamazulu."
Matthew19:24 Kananjalo ke ndithi kuni, Kulula ukuba inkamela iphumele entunjeni yenaliti, kunokuba isityebi singene ebukumkanini bukaThixo."
Matthew19:25 Bakuva ke abafundi bakhe, bakhwankqiswa kakhulu, besithi, Ngubani na ke ongasindiswayo?"
Matthew19:26 Ondele ke uYesu, wathi kubo, Kubantu le nto ayinakwenzeka; ke kuye uThixo zonke izinto zinako ukwenzeka."
Matthew19:27 Waphendula ke uPetros wathi kuye, Uyabona, thina sishiye iinto zonke sakulandela; siya kuba nantoni na ke?"
Matthew19:28 Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Inene, ndithi kuni, Nina nindilandeleyo, ekuzalweni okutsha, xa athe wahlala uNyana woMntu phezu kwetrone yozuko lwakhe, niya kuhlala nani phezu kweetrone ezilishumi elinambini, nigweba ezizweni ezilishumi elinazibini zakwaSirayeli."
Matthew19:29 Umntu wonke oshiye izindlu, nokuba ngabazalwana, nokuba ngoodade, nokuba nguyise, nokuba ngunina, nokuba ngumfazi, nokuba ngabantwana, nokuba ngamasimi, ngenxa yegama lam, uya kwamkela kalikhulu, abudle ilifa ubomi obungunaphakade."
Matthew19:30 Ke baninzi abokuqala abaya kuba ngabokugqibela; baze abokugqibela babe ngabokuqala.
Matthew20:1 Kaloku ubukumkani bamazulu bufana nomntu ongumninindlu, owaphuma ekuseni, waya kuqesha abasebenzi bokuya esidiliyeni sakhe."
Matthew20:2 Akuba evumelene nabasebenzi ngedenariyo ngemini, wabathumela esidiliyeni sakhe."
Matthew20:3 Ephume malunga nelixa lesithathu, wabona abanye bemi endaweni yembutho bengasebenzi."
Matthew20:4 Wathi kubo; Hambani nani niye esidiliyeni, ndoninika okusukuba kufanelekile. Bahamba ke."
Matthew20:5 Wabuya waphuma malunga nelixa lesithandathu nelesithoba, wenza kwangokunjalo."
Matthew20:6 Ephumile ke malunga nelixa leshumi elinanye, wabafumana abanye bemi bengasebenzi; athi kubo, Yini na ukuba nime apha imini yonke ningasebenzi?"
Matthew20:7 Bathi kuye, Akukho bani usiqeshileyo. Athi kubo, Hambani nani niye esidiliyeni; kwaye nakuphi na okufanelekileyo niya kukwamkela."
Matthew20:8 Kwakuhlwa, uthi umninisidiliya egoseni lakhe, Babize abasebenzi, ubamkelise, uqala kwabokugqibela ude uye kwabokuqala."
Matthew20:9 Bezile abo bebeqeshwe malunga nelixa leshumi elinanye, bamkela elowo idenariyo."
Matthew20:10 Ke kaloku bakuza abokuqala, baba baya kwamkela into engaphezulu; nabo bamkela elowo idenariyo."
Matthew20:11 Bathe ke bakwamkela, bamkrokrela umninindlu,"
Matthew20:12 besithi, Aba bokugqibela basebenze ilixa lalinye, usuke wabalinganisa nathi, thina sithwele ubunzima nobushushu bemini."
Matthew20:13 Uphendule ke wathi komnye wabo, Wethu, andikoni; ubungavumelananga nam ngedenariyo yini na?"
Matthew20:14 Thabatha okwakho uhambe; ndiya kumnika lowo wokugqibela kwanjengoko ndikunike ngako.
Matthew20:15 Akuvumelekile na ukuba ndenze endikuthandayo ngokukokwam? Iliso lakho likhohlakele na, ngokuba ndilungile mna?"
Matthew20:16 Ngokunjalo abokugqibela baya kuba ngabokuqala, nabokuqala, baya kuba ngabokugqibela; kuba baninzi ababiziweyo, ke bambalwa abanyuliweyo."
Matthew20:17 Ke kaloku, enyuka uYesu esiya eYerusalem, wabathabatha abafundi abalishumi elinababini ngasese endleleni, wathi kubo,"
Matthew20:18 Niyabona, siyenyuka siya eYerusalem; waye uNyana woMntu eya kunikelwa kubabingeleli abakhulu nakubabhali, kwaye baya kumgweba ukuba afe,"
Matthew20:19 bamnikele kuzo iintlanga ukuba zidlale ngaye, zimtyakatye, zimbethelele emnqamlezweni, athi ngomhla wesithathu abuye avuke."
Matthew20:20 Ngelo xesha kweza kuye unina woonyana bakaZebhedi, enoonyana bakhe, equbuda, ecela into kuye."
Matthew20:21 Wathi ke yena kuye, Uthanda ntoni na? Athi kuye, Yithi aba nyana bam bobabini bahlale, omnye ngasekunene kwakho, omnye ngasekhohlo, ebukumkanini bakho."
Matthew20:22 Uphendule ke uYesu wathi, Aniyazi into eniyicelayo. Ninako na ukuyisela indebe endiza kuyisela, nibhaptizwe ngobhaptizo endibhaptizwa ngalo mna? Bathi kuye, Sinako."
Matthew20:23 Athi kubo, Okunene indebe yam niya kuyisela, nobhaptizo endibhaptizwa ngalo mna niya kubhaptizwa kwangalo; kodwa kona ukuhlala ngasekunene kwam nangasekhohlo kwam asikwam ukupha ngako, asikwam ukupha ngako; kwabo kulungiselwe bona nguBawo."
Matthew20:24 Bekuvile ke oko abalishumi, babacaphukela abo bazalwana bobabini."
Matthew20:25 Ke yena uYesu, ebabizele kuye, wathi, Niyazi ukuba abaphathi beentlanga bayazigagamela, nabo bazizikhulu benza ngegunya kuzo."
Matthew20:26 Ze kungabi njalo ke phakathi kwenu; osukuba enga angaba mkhulu phakathi kwenu, makabe ngumlungiseleli wenu;"
Matthew20:27 nosukuba efuna ukuba ngowokuqala phakathi kwenu, makabe ngumlungiseleli wenu;"
Matthew20:28 kwanjengokuba uNyana woMntu engezanga kulungiselelwa; weza kulungiselela, nokuncama ubomi bakhe, bube yintlawulelo yokukhulula abaninzi."
Matthew20:29 Bakubon’ ukuba bayaphuma eYeriko, walandelwa yindimbane enkulu."
Matthew20:30 Nanko kuhleli iimfama zimbini ngasendleleni, zathi, zakuva ukuba kudlula uYesu, zadanduluka, zisithi, Senzele inceba, Nkosi, nyana kaDavide."
Matthew20:31 Ke kaloku indimbane yazikhalimela ukuba zithi tu; kwaba kukhona ke zidandulukayo, zisithi, Senzele inceba, Nkosi, nyana kaDavide."
Matthew20:32 Wema uYesu, wazibiza wathi, Ninga ndinganenzela ntoni na?"
Matthew20:33 Zithi kuye, Nkosi, ukuba kuvulwe amehlo ethu."
Matthew20:34 Wasikwa ke yimfesane uYesu, wawachukumisa amehlo azo, zaba nokubona kwaoko ngamehlo azo, zamlandela."
Matthew21:1 Ke kaloku, bakusondela eYerusalem, befikile eBhetefage, eNtabeni yemiNquma, uYesu wesusa abafundi bababini, wathi,"
Matthew21:2 Athi kubo, Hambani niye emzaneni lo ukhangelene nani, nofumana kwaoko iesile libotshelelwe, linethole; likhululeni nilizise kum."
Matthew21:3 Ukuba kukho othe wathetha into kuni, nothi, Ayafuneka eNkosini; wothi kwaoko azithumele."
Matthew21:4 Konke oku kwenzeke, ukuze kuzaliseke okwathethwayo ngomprofeti, esithi,"
Matthew21:5 Yithini kwintombi uZiyon, Yabona, uKumkani wakho uza kuwe, Elulamile, ekhwele e-esileni, nethole le-esile."
Matthew21:6 Bahamba ke abafundi, benza njengoko uYesu wayebayalele ngako,"
Matthew21:7 balizisa iesile nethole, babeka iingubo zabo phezu kwazo, bamhlalisa phezu kwazo."
Matthew21:8 Yathi ke inkoliso yezihlwele yazandlala iingubo zayo endleleni; abanye bagawula amasebe emithini, bawandlala endleleni."
Matthew21:9 Zaye ke izihlwele, ebezihamba ngaphambili, nebezilandela, zidanduluka, zisithi, Hosana kuye unyana kaDavide! Makabongwe lowo uzayo egameni leNkosi; Hosana enyangweni."
Matthew21:10 Akungena eYerusalem, wonke umzi wazamazama, usithi, Ngubani na lo?"
Matthew21:11 Zathi ke indimbane, Lo nguYesu, umprofeti ongowaseNazarete yelaseGalili."
Matthew21:12 Waza uYesu wangena etempileni kaThixo, wabakhupha bonke ababethengisa nababethenga etempileni, wazibhukuqa iitafile zabatshintshi bemali, nezihlalo zabathengisa ngamahobe."
Matthew21:13 Wathi kubo, Kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Indlu yam iya kubizwa ngokuba yindlu yokuthandaza; Ke nina niyenze umqolomba wezihange."
Matthew21:14 Kweza kuye iimfama neziqhwala, etempileni apho, waziphilisa, wabaphilisa."
Matthew21:15 Bathe ke ababingeleli abakhulu nababhali, bakuyibona imimangaliso awayenzayo, kwanabantwana bedanduluka etempileni, besithi, Hosana kuye uNyana kaDavide: bacaphuka kakhulu,"
Matthew21:16 bathi kuye, Uyayiva na into abayithethayo aba? Athi kubo uYesu, Ewe; anizanga nikulese na ukuthi, Emlonyeni weentsana nabanyayo ulungiselele indumiso?"
Matthew21:17 Wabashiya, waphuma ngaphandle komzi, waya eBhetani; walala khona."
Matthew21:18 Uthe ke kwakusa, xa abuyela kuwo umzi, walamba."
Matthew21:19 Wathi, ebone mkhiwane uthile ngasendleleni, waya kuwo, akafumana nto kuwo, yangamagqabi odwa; wathi kuwo, Makungaze kuvele siqhamo kuwe naphakade. Wabuna kwangoko umkhiwane lowo."
Matthew21:20 Bakukubona oko abafundi bakhe, bamangaliswa, besithi, Utheni na ukubuna kwangoko umkhiwane?"
Matthew21:21 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Inene, ndithi kuni, Ukuba nithe nanokholo, anathandabuza, anisayi kwenza le nto yomkhiwane yodwa; nothi kule ntaba, Thabatheka; uphoseke elwandle; iya kwenziwa."
Matthew21:22 Neento zonke enithe nazicela ekuthandazeni nikholwa, nozamkela."
Matthew21:23 Kuthe akungena etempileni, xa afundisayo, beza kuye ababingeleli abakhulu namadoda amakhulu abantu, besithi, Ezi zinto uzenza ngagunya lini na? ngubani na ke okunike eli gunya?"
Matthew21:24 Waphendula ke uYesu wathi kubo, Nam ndiya kubuza kuni zwi-nye; endothi, ukuba nithe nandixelela lona, ndinixelele nam ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto."
Matthew21:25 Ubhaptizo lukaYohane lwaluphuma phi na? ezulwini, nokuba ngabantu? Bacamanga ke bona bodwa, besithi, Ukuba sithe, Lwaphuma emazulwini; wothi kuthi, Ibiyini na phofu ukuba ningakholwa nguye?"
Matthew21:26 Ukuba ke sithe, Lwaphuma ebantwini; siyaboyika abantu; kuba bonke bebambe ukuthi uYohane ungumprofeti."
Matthew21:27 Baphendula bathi kuYesu, Asazi. Wathi ke kubo, Nam ke andinixeleli ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto."
Matthew21:28 Nithini na ke? Umntu othile ube enoonyana ababini; weza kowokuqala, wathi, Mntwana wam, hamba uye kusebenza namhla esidiliyeni sam."
Matthew21:29 Waphendula wathi, Andiyi; waguquka kamva, wemka."
Matthew21:30 Weza nakowesibini, wathetha kwangokunjalo. Waphendula ke yena wathi, Ndiyaya, nkosi;"
Matthew21:31 Nguwuphi na kwabo bobabini owenza ukuthanda kukayise? Bathi kuye, Owokuqala. Athi kubo uYesu, Inene ndithi kuni, Bayaniphangela ke ukungena ebukumkanini bukaThixo ababuthi berhafu namahenyukazi."
Matthew21:32 Ngokuba uYohane weza kuni ngendlela yobulungisa, anakholwa nguye; kodwa bakholwa nguye bona ababuthi berhafu namahenyukazi; ke nina, nakukubona oko, anibuyanga nizohlwaye, ukuze nikholwe nguye."
Matthew21:33 Yivani omnye umzekeliso: Bekukho umninindlu othile, owatyala isidiliya, wasibiyela, wemba kuso isixovulelo seediliya, wakha inyango, waqeshisa ngaso kubalimi, wahambela kwelinye."
Matthew21:34 Lithe ke lakusondela ixesha leziqhamo, wathuma abakhonzi bakhe kubalimi abo, ukuya kwamkela iziqhamo zaso."
Matthew21:35 Besuka abalimi babathabatha abakhonzi bakhe, bathi omnye bamtyabula, omnye bambulala, nomnye bamgibisela ngamatye."
Matthew21:36 Wabuya ke wathuma abanye abakhonzi, bebaninzi kunabokuqala, benjenjalo nakubo."
Matthew21:37 Uthe ke kamva wathuma kubo unyana wakhe, esithi, Baya kumhlonela yena unyana wam."
Matthew21:38 Bathe ke bakumbona unyana abalimi, batshono ukuthi, Lo yindlalifa; yizani siyibulale, silihluthe ilifa layo."
Matthew21:39 Bamthabatha, bamkhuphela ngaphandle kwesidiliya, bambulala."
Matthew21:40 Xa athe wafika ngoko umninisidiliya, uya kwenza ntoni na kwabo balimi?"
Matthew21:41 Bathi kuye, Uya kubatshabalalisa kakubi abo bangendawo, aze isidiliya eso aqeshise ngaso kubalimi bambi, abomamkelisa iziqhamo ngamaxesha azo."
Matthew21:42 Athi kubo uYesu, Anizanga nikulese na ezibhalweni ukuthi, Ilitye abalicekisayo abakhi, Lelona laba yintloko yembombo; yenziwe yiNkosi le;"
Matthew21:43 Kungoko ndithi kuni, Ubukumkani bukaThixo buya kususwa kuni, bunikwe uhlanga oluzivelisayo iziqhamo zabo."
Matthew21:44 Kanjalo lowo uwe phezu kweli litye uya kutyumka, ke lowo lithe lamwela liya kumcola."
Matthew21:45 Bathi ababingeleli abakhulu nabaFarisi, bakuyiva imizekeliso yakhe, baqonda ukuba uthetha ngabo."
Matthew21:46 Baza befuna ukumbamba, basuka boyika abantu, kuba babesithi ungumprofeti."
Matthew22:1 Wabuya waphendula uYesu wathetha kubo ngemizekeliso, wathi,"
Matthew22:2 Ubukumkani bamazulu bufanekiswa nomntu ongukumkani, owenzela unyana wakhe umtshato;"
Matthew22:3 Wasusa abakhonzi bakhe ukuba baye kubabiza abamenyiweyo, beze emsithweni, kodwa abavumanga ukuza."
Matthew22:4 Wabuya wesusa abanye abakhonzi, esithi, Yitshoni kwabamenyiweyo ukuthi, Yabonani, isidlo sam sendisilungisile; iinkomo zam neento zam ezityetyisiweyo zixheliwe, konke sekulungile; yizani emsithweni."
Matthew22:5 Abakhathalanga ke bona; basuka bemka, omnye waya kweyakhe intsimi, omnye waya ekurhwebeni kwakhe."
Matthew22:6 Bathi ke abaseleyo bababamba abakhonzi bakhe, babaphatha kakubi, bababulala."
Matthew22:7 Evile ke ukumkani, waqumba, wawukhupha umkhosi wakhe, wabatshabalalisa abo babulali, wawutshisa nomzi wabo."
Matthew22:8 Aze athi kubakhonzi bakhe, Umsitho okunene sewulungile wona, kodwa abamenyiweyo bebengafanelekile."
Matthew22:9 Yiyani ngoko ezindleleni, nithi abo nithe nabafumana, nibabize beze emsithweni."
Matthew22:10 Baphuma abo bakhonzi baya ezindleleni, bahlanganisa bonke ababafumanayo, abakhohlakeleyo kwanabalungileyo; wazala umsitho ngabamenyiweyo."
Matthew22:11 Ke kaloku akungena ukumkani, eza kukhangela abamenyiweyo, wabona apho umntu ongambethe ngubo yamsitho."
Matthew22:12 Athi kuye, Wethu, utheni na ukungena apha, ungenáyo ingubo yomsitho? Wabe engathethi."
Matthew22:13 Wathi ukumkani kubalungiseleli, Mbopheni iinyawo nezandla, nimthabathe, nimkhuphele ebumnyameni bangaphandle; khona apho kuya kubakho ukulila nokutshixiza kwamazinyo."
Matthew22:14 Kuba baninzi ababiziweyo, ke bambalwa abanyuliweyo."
Matthew22:15 Baza abaFarisi baya benza ibhunga lokuba bamthiyele ekuthetheni kwakhe.
Matthew22:16 Bathumela kuye abafundi babo benamaHerode, besithi, Mfundisi, siyazi ukuba uyinyaniso, uyifundisa indlela kaThixo ngenyaniso; kananjalo akukhathali nangubani, kuba akukhethi buso bamntu."
Matthew22:17 Sixelele ngoko, uthini na wena? Kuvumelekile na ukumnika irhafu uKesare, akuvumelekile, sini na?"
Matthew22:18 Eyazi ke uYesu inkohlakalo yabo, wathi, Nindilingelani na, bahanahanisindini?"
Matthew22:19 Ndiboniseni iqhosha lerhafu. Bamzisela ke idenariyo.
Matthew22:20 Athi kubo, Ngokabani na lo mfanekiso nombhalo?"
Matthew22:21 Bathi kuye, NgokaKesare. Athi kubo, Ngoko ke buyiselani izinto zikaKesare kuKesare; nezinto zikaThixo kuThixo."
Matthew22:22 Bakukuva ke oko, bamangaliswa, bamshiya, bemka."
Matthew22:23 Kwangaloo mini kweza kuye abaSadusi, bona abo bathi akukho luvuko, bambuza, besithi,"
Matthew22:24 besithi, Mfundisi, uMoses wathi, Ukuba ubani uthe wafa engenabantwana, wothi umzalwana wakhe amngene umfazi wakhe, amvelisele imbewu umzalwana wakhe."
Matthew22:25 Ke kaloku kwaye kukho kuthi abazalwana abasixhenxe; waza owokuqala akubon’ ukuba uzekile wabhubha, wathi, kuba engenambewu, wamshiya kumzalwana wakhe umfazi wakhe."
Matthew22:26 Wenjenjalo nowesibini, nowesithathu, kwada kwaya kowesixhenxe."
Matthew22:27 Emveni ke kwabo bonke, wafa naye umfazi."
Matthew22:28 Ngoko eluvukweni uya kuba ngumfazi wawuphi na kweso sixhenxe? kuba bonke babenaye.
Matthew22:29 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Niyalahleka, kuba ningazazi izibhalo kwanamandla kaThixo."
Matthew22:30 Kuba eluvukweni abazeki, abendiswa; banjengezithunywa zikaThixo emazulwini."
Matthew22:31 Ngalo ke uvuko lwabafileyo, anikulesanga na okwathethwayo kuni nguThixo, esithi,"
Matthew22:32 Mna ndinguThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi? uThixo akangowabafileyo, ungowabaphilileyo."
Matthew22:33 Zathi izihlwele zakukuva oko, zakhwankqiswa yimfundiso yakhe."
Matthew22:34 Ke kaloku bathe abaFarisi, bakuva ukuba ubethe labakhohla abaSadusi, bahlanganiselana ndawonye."
Matthew22:35 Ke kaloku omnye wabo, ongumqondisi-mthetho, wambuza umbuzo, emlinga, esithi,"
Matthew22:36 Mfundisi, owona myalelo mkhulu emthethweni nguwuphi na?"
Matthew22:37 Wathi ke uYesu kuye, Uze uyithande iNkosi uThixo wakho ngentliziyo yakho iphela, nangomphefumlo wakho uphela, nangengqondo yakho iphela."
Matthew22:38 Lo ngowokuqala nomkhulu umthetho.
Matthew22:39 Owesibini ke ufana nawo: Uze umthande ummelwane wakho ngoko uzithanda ngako.
Matthew22:40 Kule mithetho yomibini kuxhomekeke umyalelo uphela nabaprofeti.
Matthew22:41 Bakubon’ ukuba bahlanganisene ke abaFarisi, uYesu wababuza,"
Matthew22:42 esithi, Nithini na nina ngoKristu? ngunyana kabani na? Bathi kuye, Nyana kaDavide."
Matthew22:43 Athi kubo, Yini na phofu ukuba uDavide ngoMoya ambize ngokuthi, Nkosi, esithi,"
Matthew22:44 Yathi iNkosi eNkosini yam, Hlala ngasekunene kwam, Ndide iintshaba zakho ndizenze isihlalo seenyawo zakho?"
Matthew22:45 Ukuba uDavide ngoko umbiza ngokuba Nkosi, ungunyana wakhe ngani na?"
Matthew22:46 Akubangakho namnye ubenako ukumphendula nezwi eli; kananjalo kususela kuloo mini, akubanga sabakho mntu waba nabuganga bakumbuza nto."
Matthew23:1 Waza uYesu wathetha kwindimbane nakubafundi bakhe,"
Matthew23:2 besithi, Ababhali nabaFarisi bahleli esihlalweni sikaMoses;"
Matthew23:3 Konke ngoko abasukuba besithi kuni kugcineni, ze nikugcine nikwenze; kodwa ze ningenzi ngokwemisebenzi yabo; kuba bayathetha baze bangenzi."
Matthew23:4 Kuba babopha imithwalo enzima, esindayo, bayibeke emagxeni abantu; kodwa bona abafuni kuzishukumisa nangomnwe lo wabo."
Matthew23:5 Yonke imisebenzi yabo ke bayenza ukuze babonwe ngabantu; bawenza banzi amafilakteriyu abo, bayandise imiqukumbelo yeengubo zabo."
Matthew23:6 Bathanda izihlalo eziphambili esidlweni, nezihlalo eziphambili ezindlwini zesikhungu,"
Matthew23:7 nemibuliso ezindaweni zembutho, nokubizwa kwabantu ngokuthi, Rabhi, Rabhi."
Matthew23:8 Ke nina maningabizwa kuthiwe Rabhi, kuba mnye uMkhokeli wenu, uKristu; nina ke nonke ningabazalwana."
Matthew23:9 Ningabizi mntu ngokuba nguyihlo emhlabeni apha; kuba mnye uYihlo wenu, lowo usemazulwini."
Matthew23:10 Kananjalo maningabizwa ngokuba ningabakhokeli; kuba mnye uMkhokeli wenu, uKristu."
Matthew23:11 Omkhulu ke kuni makabe ngumlungiseleli wenu.
Matthew23:12 Osukuba ke eziphakamisa uya kuthotywa; nozithobayo uya kuphakanyiswa.
Matthew23:13 Yeha nina, babhali nabaFarisi, bahanahanisindini! Kuba nibuvala ubukumkani bamazulu phambi kwabantu; kuba aningeni nina, nabangenayo anibavumeli ukuba bangene."
Matthew23:14 Yeha nina, babhali nabaFarisi, bahanahanisindini! ngokuba nizidla izindlu zabahlolokazi, nize ngokunyhwalaza nithandaze uzungu;"
Matthew23:15 Yeha nina, babhali nabaFarisi, bahanahanisindini! Ngokuba nijikajika ulwandle nomhlaba ukuze nenze abe mnye ongena ebuYudeni; nithi ke, nakuba nibe, nimenze abe ngumntwana wesihogo ngokuphindiweyo kunani."
Matthew23:16 Yeha, nina bakhokelindini baziimfama! Nina nithi, Othe wafunga itempile, akunto oko; ke othe wafunga igolide yetempile, unetyala."
Matthew23:17 Ziyatha, zimfama, kanene yiyiphi na enkulu? Yigolide, yitempile eyingcwalisayo igolide, kusini na?"
Matthew23:18 Kanjalo nothi, Othe wafunga isibingelelo, akunto; ke othe wafunga umnikelo ophezu kwawo, unetyala."
Matthew23:19 Ziyatha, zimfama, kanene yiyiphi na enkulu? Ngumnikelo, sisibingelelo esiwungcwalisayo umnikelo, kusini na?"
Matthew23:20 Lowo usifungayo ngoko isibingelelo ufunga sona neento zonke eziphezu kwaso.
Matthew23:21 Nalowo uyifungayo itempile, ufunga yona nomiyo kuyo."
Matthew23:22 Nalowo usifungayo izulu, ufunga itrone kaThixo nohleli phezu kwayo."
Matthew23:23 Yeha nina, babhali nabaFarisi, bahanahanisindini! Kuba ninikela izishumi zetyeleba nedile nekumin, kanti nizishiyile ezona ndawo zinzima zomthetho, umgwebo nenceba nokholo; ezi benimelwe kukuba nizenze, nithi neziya ningazishiyi."
Matthew23:24 Bakhokelindini baziimfama, abahluza imbuzane, niginye inkamela."
Matthew23:25 Yeha nina, babhali nabaFarisi, bahanahanisindini! Kuba nihlambulula umphandle wendebe nesitya, kanti ngaphakathi zizele kukuphanga nokugqithisela."
Matthew23:26 mFarisindini, imfama, hlambulula kuqala okungaphakathi kwendebe nesitya, ukuze nomvandedwa ube ube nyulu."
Matthew23:27 Yeha nina, babhali nabaFarisi, bahanahanisindini! ngokuba nifana namangcwaba aqatywe mhlophe, abonakala emahle ngaphandle, kanti ngaphakathi azele ngamathambo abafileyo nako konke ukungcola."
Matthew23:28 Ngokukwanjalo nani ngaphandle nibonakala ebantwini ukuba ningamalungisa, kanti ngaphakathi nizele luhanahaniso nokuchasa umthetho."
Matthew23:29 Yeha nina, babhali nabaFarisi, bahanahanisindini! ngokuba niwakha amangcwaba abaprofeti, nivathise amangcwaba amalungisa;"
Matthew23:30 Kwaye nithi, Ukuba sasikho thina kwimihla yoobawo, singe singabanga nabudlelane nabo ngegazi labaprofeti."
Matthew23:31 Ngoko niyangqina kwanina, ukuba ningoonyana babo babulala abaprofeti."
Matthew23:32 Wuzaliseni ngoko umlinganiso wooyihlo.
Matthew23:33 Zinyokandini, nzalandini yamarhamba, ningáthini na ukuwusaba umgwebo wesihogo?"
Matthew23:34 Ngenxa yoko, niyabona, mna ndinithumela abaprofeti nezilumko nababhali; nithi ke inxenye kubo niyibulale, niyibethelele eminqamlezweni; nithi inxenye kubo niyityakatye ezindlwini zenu zesikhungu, niyitshutshise kwimizi ngemizi;"
Matthew23:35 ukuze linifikele lonke igazi elinobulungisa, elaphalazwayo emhlabeni, lithabathela egazini lika-Abheli ilungisa, lizise egazini likaZekariya, unyana kaBharakiya, enambulalayo phakathi kwetempile nesibingelelo."
Matthew23:36 Inene, ndithi kuni, Zonke ezo zinto ziya kusihlela esi sizukulwana."
Matthew23:37 Yerusalem, Yerusalem, wena ubabulalayo abaprofeti, ubagibisele ngamatye abo bathunywe kuwe, kufuthi kangakanani na ndithande ukubabuthela ndawonye abantwana bakho, ngohlobo esithi isikhukukazi siwabuthele ndawonye amathole aso ngaphantsi kwamaphiko, anavuma!"
Matthew23:38 Yabonani, indlu yenu ishiywa nani ize."
Matthew23:39 Kuba ndithi kuni, Aniyi kuba sandibona emveni koku, nide nithi, Makabongwe lowo uzayo egameni leNkosi."
Matthew24:1 Ephumile uYesu, wemka etempileni; bathe abafundi bakhe beza kumbonisa izakhiwo zetempile."
Matthew24:2 Wathi kubo uYesu, Niyazibona na zonke ezi zinto? Inene, ndithi kuni, Akusayi kusala apha ilitye phezu kwelitye, elingayi kuchithwa."
