Matthew24:3 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba uhleli eNtabeni yemiNquma, beza kuye abafundi bebodwa, bathi, Sixelele ukuba ziya kubakho nini na ezo zinto; uya kuba yini na umqondiso wokufika kwakho, nowokupheliswa kwephakade eli?"
Matthew24:4 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Lumkani ningalahlekiswa mntu."
Matthew24:5 Kuba baninzi abaya kuza egameni lam, besithi, banguye uKristu; balahlekise abantu abaninzi."
Matthew24:6 Niya kuthi ke nive iimfazwe namarhe eemfazwe; lumkani ningabi navuso, kuba zonke ezo zinto zimele ukuhla; kanti kona ukuphela akukabikho."
Matthew24:7 Kuba uhlanga luya kuvukelana nohlanga, nobukumkani buvukelane nobukumkani; kuya kubakho iindlala, neendyikitya zokufa, nezinyikimo zomhlaba kwiindawo ngeendawo."
Matthew24:8 Zonke ke ezo zinto zikukuqaleka kwenimba.
Matthew24:9 Ngelo xesha baya kuninikela ekubandezelweni, banibulale; niya kuthiywa ziintlanga zonke ngenxa yegama lam."
Matthew24:10 Ngelo xesha baninzi abaya kukhutyekiswa, bangcatshane, bathiyane."
Matthew24:11 Kwaye kuya kuvela abaprofeti ababuxoki babe baninzi, balahlekise abantu abaninzi."
Matthew24:12 Nangenxa yokwanda kokuchasa umthetho, luya kuphola uthando lwabaninzi."
Matthew24:13 Ke onyamezeleyo kwada kwaba sekupheleni, lowo uya kusindiswa."
Matthew24:14 Zaye ezi ndaba zilungileyo zobukumkani ziya kuvakaliswa kulo elimiweyo liphela, zibe bubungqina kuzo zonke iintlanga; kwandule ke kufike ukuphela."
Matthew24:15 Xa nithe nalibona isikizi lesiphanziso, ekuthethwe ngalo ngoDaniyeli umprofeti, limi endaweni engcwele (lowo ulesayo makaqiqe);"
Matthew24:16 Ngelo xa mabathi abakwelakwaYuda basabele ezintabeni;
Matthew24:17 Ophezu kwendlu makangehli aye kuthabatha into endlwini yakhe;
Matthew24:18 nosentsimini makangabuyeli emva aye kuthabatha iingubo zakhe.
Matthew24:19 Yeha ke, abamithiyo nabanyisayo ngaloo mihla!"
Matthew24:20 Thandazani ke, ukuba intsabo yenu ingabi sebusika nangesabatha."
Matthew24:21 Kuba ngelo xesha kuya kubakho imbandezelo enkulu, ekungazanga kubekho injalo kwasekuqalekeni kwehlabathi, kwada kwaba kalokunje, ekungasayi kubuye kubekho injalo."
Matthew24:22 Kanjalo ukuba ibingayi kuthi loo mihla inqanyulelwe, bekungayi kubakho nyama isindayo; ngenxa ke yabanyuliweyo, loo mihla iya kunqanyulelwa."
Matthew24:23 Ngelo xa ke, ukuba ubani uthe kuni, Nanku apha uKristu, nokuba uthe, Nankuya phaya; musani ukukholwa yiyo."
Matthew24:24 Kuya kuvela ooKristu ababuxoki, nabaprofeti ababuxoki, benze imiqondiso emikhulu nezimanga; ngokokude, ukuba bekunokwenzeka, balahlekise nabanyuliweyo."
Matthew24:25 Yabonani, ndinixelele ngenxa engaphambili."
Matthew24:26 Ukuba ngoko bathi kuni, Nanko entlango, musani ukuphuma niye. Musani ukuphuma; nanko emagumbini afihlakeleyo; musani ukukholwa yiyo."
Matthew24:27 Kuba kwanjengokuba umbane uthi uphume empumalanga, ubonakale kude kuse entshonalanga; koba njalo nokufika koNyana woMntu."
Matthew24:28 Kuba apho sukuba sikhona isidumbu, aya kuhlanganisana khona amaxhalanga."
Matthew24:29 Kwaoko ke, emveni kwembandezelo yaloo mihla, ilanga liya kwenziwa mnyama, ithi nenyanga ifiphale, zithi neenkwenkwezi ziwe ezulwini, athi namandla amazulu azanyazanyiswe."
Matthew24:30 Uya kubonakala ngelo xesha umqondiso woNyana woMntu ezulwini; zimbambazele ngelo xesha zonke izizwe zomhlaba, zimbone uNyana woMntu esiza esemafini ezulu, enamandla, nobuqaqawuli obukhulu."
Matthew24:31 Azithumele izithunywa zakhe zasemazulwini, zinexilongo elisandi sikhulu, zibahlanganisele ndawonye abanyulwa bakhe, baphume kumacala omane omoya, kuthabathela esiphelweni sezulu, kuse kwesinye isiphelo samazulu."
Matthew24:32 Fundani kuwo umkhiwane umzekeliso; xa selithe lathamba isebe lawo, lahluma amagqabi, niyazi ukuba likufuphi ihlobo."
Matthew24:33 Ngokukwanjalo nani, xa nithe nazibona zonke ezo zinto, yazini ukuba kukufuphi, sekusemnyango."
Matthew24:34 Inene ndithi kuni, Asisayi kudlula esi sizukulwana, zingadanga zonke ezo zinto zibekho."
Matthew24:35 Liya kudlula izulu nehlabathi, kodwa amazwi am akayi kudlula."
Matthew24:36 Kodwa akukho bani uwaziyo loo mhla nelo lixa, azazi nezithunywa zamazulu, nguBawo yedwa."
Matthew24:37 Ke kaloku, njengokuba ibinjalo imihla kaNowa, koba njalo nokufika koNyana woMntu."
Matthew24:38 Kuba njengokuba babesithi, ngemihla yangaphambi konogumbe, babesidla, besela, bazeke, besendiswe, kwada kwayimini awangena ngayo emkhombeni uNowa,"
Matthew24:39 kwaye abazange baqonde wada wafika unogumbe, wabakhukulisa bonke; koba njalo nokufika koNyana woMntu."
Matthew24:40 Ngelo xesha ababini boba sentsimini; omnye amkelwe, omnye ashiywe."
Matthew24:41 Abafazi ababini boba besila etyeni lokusila; omnye amkelwe, omnye ashiywe."
Matthew24:42 Phaphani ngoko; ngokuba ningazi ukuba lilixa liphi na eza ngalo iNkosi yenu.
Matthew24:43 Yazini ke oku, ukuba ebesazi umninindlu ukuba isela liza ngawuphi na umlindo wobusuku, ange elindile, akavuma ukuba indlu yakhe igqojozwe."
Matthew24:44 Nani ngoko yibani nilungile, ngokuba uNyana woMntu uza ngelixa eningalikhumbuleliyo."
Matthew24:45 Ngubani na ke loo mkhonzi uthembekileyo, uqondayo, eyathi inkosi yakhe yammisa phezu kwabendlu yayo, ukuze abanike ukudla ngexesha elifanelekileyo?"
Matthew24:46 Unoyolo loo mkhonzi, iya kuthi yakufika inkosi yakhe imfumane esenjenjalo."
Matthew24:47 Inene ndithi kuni, iya kummisa phezu kwayo yonke impahla yayo."
Matthew24:48 Ukuba ke loo mkhonzi ungendawo uthe entliziyweni yakhe, Inkosi yam iyalibala ukuza;"
Matthew24:49 Aqale ukubabetha abakhonza kunye naye, adle, asele namanxila;"
Matthew24:50 iya kufika inkosi yaloo mkhonzi ngemini engayilindeleyo, nangelixa angalaziyo;"
Matthew24:51 imsike kubini, immisele isabelo sakhe nabahanahanisi; khona apho kuya kubakho ukulila nokutshixiza kwamazinyo."
Matthew25:1 Ngelo xesha ubukumkani bamazulu buya kufanekiswa neentombi ezilishumi, ezazithabathayo izibane zazo, zaphuma zaya kumkhawulela umyeni."
Matthew25:2 Ezintlanu ke kuzo zaye ziziingqondi, ezintlanu ziziziyatha."
Matthew25:3 Ezo ke ezizizidenge zazithabatha izibane zazo, azaphatha oli nazo."
Matthew25:4 Kodwa eziziingqondi zaphatha ioli ezityeni zazo, kwanezibane zazo."
Matthew25:5 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba ulibele umyeni, zozela zonke zalala."
Matthew25:6 Ke kaloku ezinzulwini zobusuku kwamenyezwa, Nanko umyeni esiza; phumani niye kumkhawulela."
Matthew25:7 Zaza zavuka zonke ezo ntombi, zalungisa izibane zazo."
Matthew25:8 Zathi ke eziziziyatha kweziziingqondi, Sipheni kwioli yenu leyo; ngokuba izibane zethu zicima."
Matthew25:9 Zaphendula ke eziziingqondi, zathi, Hayi; hleze anganeli kuthi nakuni; yiyani kanye kwabathengisayo, nizithengele."
Matthew25:10 Kuthe ke, zisaya kuthenga, wafika umyeni; zaza ezo bezisezilungile zangena naye emsithweni, lwavalwa ke ucango."
Matthew25:11 Zithi ke kamva zifike nezinye iintombi ezo, zisithi, Nkosi, Nkosi, sivulele."
Matthew25:12 Waphendula ke yena wathi, Inene ndithi kuni, andinazi nina."
Matthew25:13 Phaphani ngoko, ngokuba ningayazi imini kwanalo ilixa."
Matthew25:14 Kaloku ubukumkani bamazulu bunjengomntu owathi, eza kuhambela kwelinye, wabiza abakhe abakhonzi, wayinikela kubo impahla yakhe."
Matthew25:15 Wathi omnye wamnika iitalente zantlanu, omnye zambini, nomnye yaba nye; elowo ngokwamandla akhe; wanduluka kwaoko."
Matthew25:16 Lowo ke wamkela iitalente ezintlanu, waya wasebenza ngazo, wenza esinye isihlanu seetalente."
Matthew25:17 Kwangokunjalo nalowo wamkela ezimbini, naye wazuza esinye isibini."
Matthew25:18 Ke naye lowo wamkela yanye, waya wemba emhlabeni, wayifihla imali yenkosi yakhe."
Matthew25:19 Emva kwexesha elide, ifike inkosi yabo bakhonzi, ibalelane nabo."
Matthew25:20 Weza lowo wamkela iitalente ezintlanu, wazisa esinye isihlanu seetalente phezu kwazo, esithi, Nkosi, wandinika iitalente zantlanu; khangela, ndizuze esinye isihlanu seetalente phezu kwazo."
Matthew25:21 Yathi ke kuye inkosi yakhe, Hee ke, mkhonzi ulungileyo, uthembekileyo! Ubuthembekile kwiinto ezimbalwa; ndiya kukumisa phezu kweento ezininzi; ngena eluvuyweni lwenkosi yakho."
Matthew25:22 Weza ke nalowo wamkela iitalente ezimbini, wathi, Nkosi, wandinika iitalente zambini; khangela, ndizuze esinye isibini seetalente phezu kwazo."
Matthew25:23 Yathi kuye inkosi yakhe, Hee ke, mkhonzi ulungileyo, uthembekileyo! Ubuthembekile kwiinto ezimbalwa; ndiya kukumisa phezu kweento ezininzi; ngena eluvuyweni lwenkosi yakho."
Matthew25:24 Weza ke nalowo wamkela italente yanye, wathi, Nkosi, bendikwazi wena ukuba ungumntu olukhuni, uvuna apho ubungahlwayelanga khona, ubuthe apho ungelelanga khona;"
Matthew25:25 Ndasuka ndoyika, ndaya ndayiselela italente yakho ngomhlaba; nanku unako okwakho."
Matthew25:26 Yaphendula ke inkosi yakhe, yathi kuye, Sisicakandini singendawo, silivila, ubusazi nje ukuba ndivuna apho ndingahlwayelanga khona, ndiqokelele apho ndingahlwayelanga khona;"
Matthew25:27 ubumelwe kukuthi ngoko ube ubuyibeke imali yam kubananisi, ndaza ndakufika mna, ndabuya ndakuzuza okwam kunenzala."
Matthew25:28 Mhlutheni ngoko italente leyo, niyinike lowo uneetalente ezilishumi."
Matthew25:29 Kuba wonke umntu onako Uya kunikwa, abe nako ngokugqithiseleyo; ke ongenako, uya kuhluthwa kwanoko anako."
Matthew25:30 Naye umkhonzi ongancedi lutho, mkhupheleni ebumnyameni obungaphandle; khona apho kuya kubakho ukulila nokutshixiza kwamazinyo."
Matthew25:31 Xa ke athe wafika uNyana woMntu esebuqaqawulini bakhe, enazo zonke izithunywa ezingcwele, ngelo xa uya kuhlala phezu kwetrone yobuqaqawuli bakhe;"
Matthew25:32 zihlanganiswe phambi kwakhe zonke iintlanga, abahlule abanye kwabanye, njengokuba umalusi ezahlula izimvu ezibhokhweni;"
Matthew25:33 athi zona izimvu azimise ngasekunene kwakhe, athi kodwa zona iibhokhwe azimise ngasekhohlo."
Matthew25:34 Uya kuthi ke ukumkani kwabangasekunene kwakhe, Yizani, nina nisikelelweyo nguBawo, nibudle ilifa ubukumkani obalungiselwa nina kwasekusekweni kwehlabathi."
Matthew25:35 Kuba ndalamba, nandipha ukudla; ndanxanwa, nandiseza; ndandingowasemzini, nandingenisa endlwini;"
Matthew25:36 ndandize, nandambesa; ndandisifa, nandivelela; ndandisentolongweni, neza kum."
Matthew25:37 Oza amphendule ke amalungisa, esithi, Nkosi, sakubona nini na ulambile, sakonga; unxaniwe, saseza?"
Matthew25:38 Sakubona nini na ungowasemzini, sakungenisa endlwini? Uze, sakwambesa?"
Matthew25:39 Sakubona nini na ke usifa, okanye usentolongweni, seza kuwe?"
Matthew25:40 Aze aphendule ukumkani athi kuwo, Inene ndithi kuni, Ekubeni nithe nenjenjalo nakomnye waba bazalwana bam bangabona bangabona bancinane, nenjenjalo nakum."
Matthew25:41 Uya kuthi nakwabangasekhohlo, Mkani kum, nina baqalekiswa, niye emlilweni ongunaphakade, owalungiselwa uMtyholi nezithunywa zakhe."
Matthew25:42 Kuba ndalamba, anandiseza; ndanxanwa, anandiseza;"
Matthew25:43 ndandingowasemzini, anandingenisa ndlwini; ndandize, anandambesa; ndandisifa, ndandisentolongweni, anandivelela."
Matthew25:44 Boza ke bamphendule nabo, besithi, Nkosi, sakubona nini na ulambile, okanye unxaniwe, okanye ungowasemzini, okanye uze, okanye usifa, okanye usentolongweni, asakulungiselela?"
Matthew25:45 Aze abaphendule athi, Inene ndithi kuni, Ekubeni ningenjanga njalo nakumnye waba bangabona bangabona bancinane, anenjanga njalo nakum."
Matthew25:46 Abo baya kumka aba baye elubethweni olungunaphakade; ke wona amalungisa aya kuya ebomini obungunaphakade.
Matthew26:1 Kwathi, xeshikweni uYesu ebewagqibile onke la mazwi, wathi kubafundi bakhe,"
Matthew26:2 Niyazi ukuba emveni kweentsuku ezimbini kukho ipasika, aze uNyana woMntu anikelwe ukuba abethelelwe emnqamlezweni."
Matthew26:3 Bahlanganisana ngoko ababingeleli abakhulu, nababhali, namadoda amakhulu abantu, endlwini yombingeleli omkhulu okuthiwa nguKayafa."
Matthew26:4 Babhunga ukuba bambambe uYesu ngobuqhophololo, bambulale."
Matthew26:5 Babesithi ke, Kungabi ngomthendeleko, hleze kubekho isaqunge phakathi kwabantu."
Matthew26:6 Kwathi, uYesu eseBhetani, endlwini kaSimon owayeneqhenqa,"
Matthew26:7 Kweza kuye umfazi enehlala lelabhastile, linamafutha aqholiweyo axabiso likhulu, wamgalela entloko, akubon’ ukuba uhleli ngasesithebeni."
Matthew26:8 Bekubonile ke oko abafundi bakhe, bacaphuka, besithi, Yeyani na le nkcitho?"
Matthew26:9 Kuba la mafutha ngekuthengiswe ngawo ngexabiso elikhulu, kwaphiwa amahlwempu."
Matthew26:10 Ekwazi ke oko, uYesu wathi kubo, Umfazi lo nimaphulelani na? ngokuba undenzele umsebenzi olungileyo."
Matthew26:11 Kuba amahlwempu lawo nihleli ninawo; ke mna anihleli ninam.
Matthew26:12 Kuba xa egalele la mafutha aqholiweyo emzimbeni wam, wenzele ukungcwatywa kwam."
Matthew26:13 Inene ndithi kuni, Apho zithe zavakaliswa khona ezi ndaba zilungileyo kulo lonke ihlabathi, iya kuxelwa nayo le nto ayenzileyo yena, ibe sisikhumbuzo ngaye."
Matthew26:14 Ngelo xesha kwaphuma omnye weshumi elinababini, ekuthiwa nguYuda Sikariyoti, waya kubabingeleli abakhulu,"
Matthew26:15 Wathi kubo, Ningandinika ntoni na, ndimnikele kuni? Banqophisana naye ngamaqhosha esilivere amashumi mathathu."
Matthew26:16 Waza kwalapho wafuna ithuba elimlungeleyo lokuze amnikele kubo.
Matthew26:17 Ke kaloku, ngowokuqala umhla wezonka ezingenagwele, beza abafundi kuYesu, besithi kuye, Ùfuna ukuba sikulungisele phi na ukuyidla ipasika?"
Matthew26:18 Wathi ke yena, Hambani niye kuwo umzi, kuthile, nithi kuye, Uthi uMfundisi, ixesha lam likufuphi; ndiya kuyenzela kwakho ipasika nabafundi bam."
Matthew26:19 Benza ke abafundi njengoko uYesu wayebayalele ngako; bayilungisa ke ipasika.
Matthew26:20 Kwakuhlwa ke, wahlala ngasesithebeni nabalishumi elinababini."
Matthew26:21 Xa badlayo, wathi, Inene ndithi kuni, omnye kuni aba uya kundingcatsha."
Matthew26:22 Bakuba buhlungu kakhulu, baqala ukuthi kuye bonke ngabanye, Ingaba ndim, yini na, Nkosi?"
Matthew26:23 Waphendula ke yena wathi, Osithe nkxu nam isandla esityeni, nguye lowo uya kundingcatsha."
Matthew26:24 uNyana woMntu uyemka okunene, njengoko kubhalwe ngaye; yeha ke, loo mntu uNyana woMntu angcatshwa nguye! Ngekumlungele ukuba ebengazalwanga loo mntu."
Matthew26:25 Waphendula ke uYuda, lowo umngcatshayo, wathi, Ingaba ndim, yini na, Rabhi? Wathi ke yena kuye, Uselutshilo nawe."
Matthew26:26 Bakubon’ ukuba bayadla, uYesu wasithabatha isonka, wathi akusikelela, waqhekeza, wanika abafundi, wathi, Thabathani nidle; ngumzimba wam lo."
Matthew26:27 Wayithabatha nendebe, wabulela, wabanika, esithi, Selani kuyo nonke;"
Matthew26:28 kuba ligazi lam eli lomnqophiso omtsha, eliphalala ngenxa yabaninzi, ukuze kuxolelwe izono."
Matthew26:29 Ndithi ke kuni, Andisayi kusela kwesi siqhamo somdiliya, kuthabathela kweli xesha, kude kube yiloo mini sukuba ndisisela nani sisitsha ebukumkanini bukaBawo."
Matthew26:30 Bakuba bevume ingoma yokubonga, baphuma baya eNtabeni yemiNquma."
Matthew26:31 Ngelo xesha uthi uYesu kubo, Nina nonke niya kukhubeka ngam ngobu busuku; ngokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ndiya kumbetha umalusi, zichithwachithwe izimvu zomhlambi."
Matthew26:32 Kodwa emveni kokuvuka kwam, ndiya kunandulela ndiye kwelaseGalili."
Matthew26:33 Waphendula ke uPetros wathi kuye, Nokuba bonke baya kukhubeka ngawe, andisayi kukha ndikhubeke mna."
Matthew26:34 Athi uYesu kuye, Inene ndithi kuwe, Kwangobu busuku, ingekalili inkuku, uya kundikhanyela kathathu."
Matthew26:35 Athi uPetros kuye, Ndingafanelana ndimelwe kukuba ndife nawe, andingekhe ndikukhanyele. Batsho ke bonke abafundi."
Matthew26:36 Ngelo xesha, ufika uYesu nabo kumhlatyana ekuthiwa yiGetsemane, athi kubafundi, Hlalani phantsi apha, ndikhe ndiye kuthandaza phaya."
Matthew26:37 Wathabatha uPetros noonyana bobabini bakaZebhedi, waqala ukuba buhlungu nokudandatheka kakhulu."
Matthew26:38 Athi kubo, Umphefumlo wam ubuhlungu kakhulu, ngokokude ube sekufeni; hlalani apha, nilinde nam."
Matthew26:39 Waza, ehambele phambili umganyana, wawa ngobuso bakhe, wathandaza, esithi, Bawo, ukuba kunokwenzeka, mayidlule kum le ndebe; noko makungabi njengokuthanda kwam, makube njengokuthanda kwakho."
Matthew26:40 Uyeza kubafundi, abafumane belele, athi kuPetros, Ninje na ukungabi nako ukulinda nam nexa elinye?"
Matthew26:41 Phaphani nithandaze, ukuze ningangeni ekuhendweni; umoya wona okunene unentumekelelo, ke yona inyama ithambile."
Matthew26:42 Wabuya wemka okwesibini, wathandaza, esithi, Bawo, ukuba ayinako le ndebe ukudlula kum ndingathanga ndiyisele, makwenzeke ukuthanda kwakho."
Matthew26:43 Afike abafumane bebuye balala, kuba amehlo abo ayenzima bubuthongo."
Matthew26:44 Wabashiya, wabuya wemka, wathandaza okwesithathu, ethetha kwalona elo lizwi."
Matthew26:45 Andule ukuza kubafundi bakhe, athi kubo, Lalani ngoku, niphumle; yabonani, lisondele ilixa lokuba uNyana woMntu anikelwe ezandleni zaboni."
Matthew26:46 Vukani, sihambe; yabonani, usesondele lowo undingcatshayo."
Matthew26:47 Kuthe, esathetha, kwathi gqi uYuda, omnye wabalishumi elinababini; weza enendimbane enkulu inamakrele neentonga, ivela kubabingeleli abakhulu namadoda amakhulu abantu."
Matthew26:48 Ke kaloku lowo umngcatshayo wayebanike umqondiso, esithi, Lowo ndithe ndamanga, nguye;"
Matthew26:49 Wafika ke kwaoko kuYesu, wathi, Vuya, Rabhi; wamanga."
Matthew26:50 Athi uYesu kuye, Wethu, yini na ukuba uze? Beza ngoko, bamsa izandla uYesu, bambamba."
Matthew26:51 Waza omnye wabo babenoYesu wolula isandla, warhola ikrele lakhe, wamxabela umkhonzi wombingeleli omkhulu, wamnqamla indlebe."
Matthew26:52 Waza wathi uYesu kuye, Libuyisele endaweni yalo ikrele lakho; kuba bonke abathabatha ikrele baya kutshabalala likrele."
Matthew26:53 Uba andinako na ngoku ukumbongoza uBawo, andikhuphele imikhosi yezithunywa zezulu engaphezu kweshumi elinamibini?"
Matthew26:54 Bezingathini na ke oko ukuzaliseka izibhalo ezithi, kumele ukuba kube nje?"
Matthew26:55 Ngalo elo lixa wathi uYesu kwindimbane, Niphumele ukuza kubamba mna na, ninamakrele neentonga nje, ngathi niphumele isihange? Bendihleli nani imihla ngemihla, ndifundisa etempileni, anandibamba."
Matthew26:56 Kodwa konke oku kwenzeke, ukuze zizaliseke izibhalo zabaprofeti. Basuka bonke abafundi bamshiya, babaleka."
Matthew26:57 Abo ke bambambayo uYesu, bamrholela kuKayafa, umbingeleli omkhulu, apho babehlanganisene khona ababhali namadoda amakhulu."
Matthew26:58 Ke yena uPetros wamlandela, ebekele kude, kwada kwaya entendelezweni yendlu yombingeleli omkhulu. Engene ngaphakathi, wahlala phantsi namadindala, ukuba abone isiphelo."
Matthew26:59 Ke kaloku, baye ababingeleli abakhulu, namadoda amakhulu, nentlanganiso yamatyala iphelele, befuna ubungqina obubuxoki ngoYesu, ukuze bambulale;"
Matthew26:60 nangona afikayo amangqina abuxoki aba maninzi, ababufumananga. Ada ke afika amangqina abuxoki emabini."
Matthew26:61 Athi, Lo wathi, Ndinako ukuyichitha itempile kaThixo, ndibuye ndiyakhe ngeentsuku ezintathu."
Matthew26:62 Wesuka wema umbingeleli omkhulu, wathi kuye, Akuphenduli nto na? bangqina ntoni na aba ngawe?"
Matthew26:63 Wathi tu uYesu. Waphendula umbingeleli omkhulu wathi kuye, Ndikufungisa uThixo ophilileyo, ukuba usixelele ukuba unguye na uKristu, uNyana kaThixo."
Matthew26:64 Athi uYesu kuye, Uselutshilo nawe. Ke ndithi kuni, Emveni koku niya kumbona uNyana woMntu, ehleli ngasekunene kwamandla, esiza esemafini ezulu."
Matthew26:65 Waza umbingeleli omkhulu wazikrazula iingubo zakhe, esithi, Unyelisile; sisawafunelani na amangqina? yabonani, ngoku nikuvile ukunyelisa kwakhe."
Matthew26:66 Nithini na? Baphendula ke bona bathi, Unetyala lokufa."
Matthew26:67 Baza bamtshicela ebusweni, bamntlitha, abanye ke bambetha ngentende zezandla."
Matthew26:68 Zithi, Siprofetele, wena Kristu, ukubethileyo ngubani na?"
Matthew26:69 Ke kaloku uPetros wayehleli ngaphandle entendelezweni; kweza kuye sicakazana sithile, sisithi, Nawe ubunaye uYesu lo waseGalili."
Matthew26:70 Wakhanyela ke yena phambi kwabo bonke, esithi, Andiyazi into oyithethayo."
Matthew26:71 Ephumile waya esangweni, sambona esinye, sathi kwababekhona, Naye lo ebenaye uYesu waseNazarete."
Matthew26:72 Waphinda wakhanyela efunga, esithi, Andimazi loo mntu."
Matthew26:73 Kwakuba mzuzwana, beza abo babemi khona, bathi kuPetros, Inyaniso, nawe ungowabo; kuba intetho yakho iyakudiza."
Matthew26:74 Waza waqala ukushwabula nokufunga, esithi, Andimazi loo mntu. Yalila kwaoko inkuku."
Matthew26:75 Walikhumbula uPetros ilizwi likaYesu, abelithethile kuye, esithi, Ingekalili inkuku, uya kundikhanyela kathathu. Waza waphuma phandle, walila ngokukrakra."
Matthew27:1 Kwathi kwakusa, babhunga bonke ababingeleli abakhulu namadoda amakhulu abantu ngaye uYesu, ukuba bamsike."
Matthew27:2 Bathe ke bakumbopha, bamrhola, bamnikela kuPontiyo Pilato, irhuluneli."
Matthew27:3 Uthe ke uYuda, lowo umngcatshayo, akubona ukuba ugwetyiwe, wazohlwaya, wawabuyisela loo maqhosha esilivere amashumi mathathu kubabingeleli abakhulu namadoda amakhulu,"
Matthew27:4 esithi, Ndonile, kuba ndingcatshe igazi elingenatyala. Bathi ke bona, Iyini na kuthi loo nto? zibonele wena."
Matthew27:5 Wawaphosa phantsi etempileni apho loo maqhosha esilivere, wemka, waya wazixhoma."
Matthew27:6 Bawathabatha ke ababingeleli abakhulu loo maqhosha esilivere, bathi, Akuvumelekile ukuba awaphose emkhumbini wokulondoloza imali, kuba elixabiso legazi."
Matthew27:7 Babhunga ke, bathenga ngawo umhlaba wombumbi, ukuze ube yindawo yokungcwaba abasemzini."
Matthew27:8 Kungoko wabizwayo loo mhlaba ngokuba ngumhlaba wegazi, kwada kwanamhlanje."
Matthew27:9 Kwazaliseka ke okwathethwayo ngomprofeti uYeremiya, esithi, Bawathabatha amaqhosha esilivere amashumi mathathu, ixabiso lalowo uqiqiweyo, lowo waqingqwelwa ngoonyana bakaSirayeli;"
Matthew27:10 bawanikela ngenxa yentsimi yombumbi, njengoko yandiyalelayo iNkosi."
Matthew27:11 Wema ke uYesu phambi kwerhuluneli, yambuza irhuluneli isithi, Unguye na uKumkani wamaYuda? Wathi ke uYesu kuye, Nawe utsho."
Matthew27:12 Uthe ke akumangalelwa ngababingeleli abakhulu namadoda amakhulu, akaphendula nto."
Matthew27:13 Aze athi uPilato kuye, Akuziva na ukuba zininzi kwazo iindawo abazingqinayo ngawe?"
Matthew27:14 Akazange amphendule nelizwi elinye; yada yamangaliswa kakhulu irhuluneli leyo.
Matthew27:15 Ke kaloku ngemithendeleko irhuluneli ibiqhele ukubakhululela abantu umbanjwa abe mnye, abasukuba bemfuna."
Matthew27:16 Baye ke ngelo xesha benombanjwa obesazeka, ekuthiwa nguBharabhas."
Matthew27:17 Bakubon’ ukuba ngoko bahlanganisene, wathi kubo uPilato, Nithanda ukuba ndinikhululele wuphi na? uBharabhas, uYesu ekuthiwa nguKristu, kusini na?"
Matthew27:18 Kuba ebesazi ukuba bamnikele ngomona.
Matthew27:19 Akuba ehleli esihlalweni sokugweba, umfazi wakhe wathumela kuye, esithi, Uze ungabi nakuthini kuloo mntu ulilungisa, kuba namhlanje ndive izinto ezininzi ezinzima ephupheni, ngenxa yakhe."
Matthew27:20 Ke bona ababingeleli abakhulu namadoda amakhulu bazeyisela izihlwele ukuba zicele uBharabhas, zimbulale uYesu."
Matthew27:21 Yaphendula ke irhuluneli yathi kubo, Nguwuphi na kwaba bobabini enithanda ukuba ndinikhululele yena? Bathi ke bona, uBharabhas."
Matthew27:22 Athi uPilato kubo, Ndimenzeni na ke uYesu ekuthiwa nguKristu? Bathi kuye bonke, Makabethelelwe emnqamlezweni."
Matthew27:23 Yathi ke irhuluneli, Kuba enze bubi buni na? Kwaba kukhona ke bakhalayo ngakumbi, besithi, Makabethelelwe emnqamlezweni."
Matthew27:24 Uthe ke uPilato, akubona ukuba akancedi lutho, ebona ukuba sisuke sangakumbi isiphithiphithi, wathabatha amanzi, wahlamba izandla phambi kwezihlwele, esithi, Andinatyala egazini lalo mntu ulilungisa; ziboneleni nina."
Matthew27:25 Baphendula ke bonke abantu, bathi, Igazi lakhe malibe phezu kwethu, naphezu kwabantwana bethu."
Matthew27:26 Waza wabakhululela uBharabhas; wathi ke, emtyakatyile uYesu, wamnikela ukuba abethelelwe emnqamlezweni."
Matthew27:27 Aza amasoldati erhuluneli amthabatha uYesu, amsa endlwini yerhuluneli, alihlanganisela kuye ibutho lawo liphela."
Matthew27:28 Amhluba, amnxiba ingubo ebomvu."
Matthew27:29 Baluka isithsaba sameva, bambeka ngaso entloko, bafaka ingcongolo esandleni sakhe sokunene, baguqa ngamadolo phambi kwakhe, bahlekisa ngaye, besithi: “Awu, Kumkani wamaJuda!"
Matthew27:30 Amtshicela, ayithabatha ingcongolo, ambetha entloko."
Matthew27:31 Athi, akuba edlale ngaye, amhluba ingubo leyo, amambathisa kwaezakhe iingubo; amrhola, aya kumbethelela emnqamlezweni."
Matthew27:32 Athe ke ekuphumeni, afumana umntu waseKirene, ogama linguSimon; anyanzela lowo ukuba awuthwale umnqamlezo wakhe."
Matthew27:33 Bakufika kwindawo ekuthiwa yiGologota, oko kukuthi, yindawo yokakayi."
Matthew27:34 Amnika iviniga iphithikezwe nenyongo, ukuba ayisele; wathi akuba eyivile, akavuma ukuyisela."
Matthew27:35 Athi ke, akumbethelela emnqamlezweni, abelana ngeengubo zakhe, esenza amaqashiso, ukuze kuzaliseke okwathethwayo ngomprofeti, esithi, Babelana ngeengubo zam, benza amaqashiso ngesambatho sam."
Matthew27:36 Ahlala phantsi, amlinda khona apho."
Matthew27:37 Babeka ngaphezu kwentloko yakhe ityala lakhe libhaliwe, kwathiwa, lo nguYesu uKumkani wamaYuda."
Matthew27:38 Kwaza kwabethelelwa naye eminqamlezweni izihange ezibini, esinye ngasekunene, nesinye ngasekhohlo."
Matthew27:39 Bamtshabhisa ke abadlulayo, behlunguzela iintloko zabo,"
Matthew27:40 besitsho ukuthi, Wena uchitha itempile, uyakhe ngeentsuku ezintathu, zisindise; Ukuba unguNyana kaThixo, yihla emnqamlezweni."
Matthew27:41 Ngokukwanjalo nababingeleli abakhulu bedlala ngaye, benababhali namadoda amakhulu, besithi,"
Matthew27:42 Wabasindisa abanye; yena ngokwakhe akanako ukuzisindisa. Ukuba unguKumkani wakwaSirayeli, makehle kalokunje emnqamlezweni, size simkholwe."
Matthew27:43 Wakholosa ngoThixo; makamhlangule ngoku, ukuba uyamthanda; kuba wathi, NdinguNyana kaThixo."
Matthew27:44 Zaye ke nezihange, ezibe zibethelelwe eminqamlezweni naye, zimngcikiva kwangokunjalo."
Matthew27:45 Kuthe ke, kuthabathele kwilixa lesithandathu, kwada kwesa kwilixa lesithoba, kwehla ubumnyama phezu kwawo wonke umhlaba."
Matthew27:46 Ke kaloku, malunga nelixa lesithoba, wadanduluka uYesu ngezwi elikhulu, esithi, Eli! Eli! Lama sabhaktani! Oko kukuthi, Thixo wam, Thixo wam, undishiye ngani na?"
Matthew27:47 Inxenye ke yababemi khona, yakuva, yathi, Lo mntu ubiza uEliya."
Matthew27:48 Wesuka wagidima kwaoko omnye kubo, wathabatha imfunxa, wayizalisa ngeviniga, wayifaka engcongolweni, wamseza."
Matthew27:49 Bathe ke bona abanye, Khawuyeke, sibone ukuba uEliya uza kumsindisa na."
Matthew27:50 uYesu, ephinde wadanduluka ngelizwi elikhulu, wawukhupha umoya."
Matthew27:51 Lasuka ikhuselo lengcwele lakrazuka kubini, lithabathela phezulu lada lesa phantsi; Wanyikima umhlaba, namawa acandeka;"
Matthew27:52 Amangcwaba avuleka; yaza yavuka imizimba emininzi yabangcwele ababelele;
Matthew27:53 baphuma emangcwabeni emveni kokuvuka kwakhe, bangena kuwo umzi ongcwele, babonakala kuninzi."
Matthew27:54 Ke kaloku umthetheli-khulu, nabo babelinda uYesu naye, bakubona ukunyikima oko, nezo zinto zenzekileyo, boyika kakhulu, besithi, Inyaniso, lo ebenguNyana kaThixo."
Matthew27:55 Kwaye kukho ke khona abafazi abaninzi, bekhangele bemgama, bona babelandele uYesu kwakwelaseGalili, bemlungiselela;"
Matthew27:56 ekwakukho phakathi kwabo uMariya waseMagadala, noMariya unina wooYakobi noYose, kwanonina woonyana bakaZebhedi."
Matthew27:57 Kwathi kwakuhlwa, kweza umntu osisityebi waseArimati, ogama linguYosefu, owayengumfundi kaYesu naye."
Matthew27:58 Yena lowo waya kuPilato, wawucela umzimba kaYesu. Waza uPilato wathi makawunikwe umzimba."
Matthew27:59 Ewuthabathile ke umzimba uYosefu, wawusongela kwilinen entle emhlophe."
Matthew27:60 Wawubeka kwelakhe ingcwaba elitsha, abelixhole eweni; waqengqela ilitye elikhulu emnyango wengcwaba elo, wemka."
Matthew27:61 Baye ke bekhona apho uMariya waseMagadala nomnye uMariya, behleli phantsi malunga nengcwaba."
Matthew27:62 Ke kaloku ngengomso, eliyimini yokulungiselela, bahlanganisana ababingeleli abakhulu nabaFarisi kuPilato;"
Matthew27:63 besithi, Nkosi, sikhumbule ukuba umlahlekisi lowa wathi esahleli, Emveni kweentsuku ezintathu, ndiya kuvuka."
Matthew27:64 Yitsho ngoko linqatyiswe ingcwaba, kude kube lusuku lwesithathu, hleze abafundi bakhe beze ebusuku, bambe, bathi ke ebantwini, Uvukile kwabafileyo; luze olokugqibela ulahlekiso lube lubi kunolokuqala."
Matthew27:65 Wathi ke uPilato kubo, Ninabo abalindi;"
Matthew27:66 Baya ke bona balinqabisa ingcwaba, ngokulitywina ilitye, bekunye nabalindi."
Matthew28:1 Ke kaloku, ekupheleni kwesabatha, ekuseni ngolokuqala usuku lweveki, kweza uMariya waseMagadala nomnye uMariya, beza kulikhangela ingcwaba."
Matthew28:2 Kwasuka kwabakho unyikimo olukhulu lomhlaba, kuba isithunywa seNkosi sehla ezulwini, seza saliqengqa ilitye lesuka emnyango, sahlala phezu kwalo."
Matthew28:3 Imbonakalo yayo ibinjengombane, nesambatho sayo simhlophe njengekhephu."
Matthew28:4 Ngokoyika sona ke bangcangcazela abalindi, baba njengabafileyo."
Matthew28:5 Saphendula ke isithunywa, sathi kubafazi abo, Musani ukoyika nina; kuba ndiyazi ukuba nifuna uYesu, lowo ubebethelelwe emnqamlezweni."
Matthew28:6 Akakho apha; kuba uvukile, njengoko watshoyo; yizani niyibone indawo apho ibilele khona iNkosi;"
Matthew28:7 Yiyani ngokukhawuleza, nibaxelele abafundi bakhe ukuthi uvukile kwabafileyo; niyabona, uyanandulela ukuya kwelaseGalili; nombona khona apho; yabonani, ndinixelele."
Matthew28:8 Bephume kamsinya engcwabeni, benoloyiko novuyo olukhulu; wagidima waya kubabikela abafundi bakhe."
Matthew28:9 Ke kaloku, xa baya kubabikela abafundi bakhe, kwathi gqi uYesu wabahlangabeza, esithi, Vuyani! Beza ke bambamba ngeenyawo, baqubuda kuye."
Matthew28:10 Athi ngoko uYesu kubo, Musani ukoyika; yiyani kubatyela abazalwana bam ukuba baye eGalili; bondibona khona apho."
Matthew28:11 Bakubon’ ukuba bayaya ke, kwesuka kwafika abathile babalindi kuwo umzi, bababikela ababingeleli abakhulu zonke izinto ezenzekileyo."
Matthew28:12 Bakubon’ ukuba ke ngoko, bakubon’ ukuba bahlanganisene ndawonye namadoda amakhulu, babhunga, bawanika imali eninzi amasoldati lawo,"
Matthew28:13 besithi, Yithini, Beza ebusuku abafundi bakhe, bamba silele."
Matthew28:14 Nokuba ithe yavakala le nto kwirhuluneli, thina soyithomalalisa, senze ningabi naxhala."
Matthew28:15 Ayithabatha ke imali leyo, enza njengoko abexelelwe ngako. Laza elo zwi laduma kumaYuda, kwada kwanamhlanje."
Matthew28:16 Bahamba ke abafundi abalishumi elinamnye, baya eGalili, kuloo ntaba wayebayalele yona uYesu."
Matthew28:17 Baza bakumbona baqubuda kuye, kodwa inxenye yathandabuza."
Matthew28:18 Weza uYesu wathetha kubo, esithi, Linikwe mna lonke igunya emazulwini nasehlabathini."
Matthew28:19 Hambani ngoko niye kuzenza abafundi zonke iintlanga, nibabhaptizela egameni loYise, loNyana, loMoya oyiNgcwele;"
Matthew28:20 nibafundisa ukuba bazigcine zonke izinto endiniwisele umthetho ngazo. Niyabona, mna ndinani yonke imihla, kude kube sekuphelisweni kwephakade eli. Amen."
Mark1:1 Ukuqaleka kwayo ivangeli kaYesu Kristu, uNyana kaThixo."
Mark1:2 Njengoko kubhaliweyo ebaprofetini, kwathiwa, Yabona, mna ndithuma umthunywa wam ngaphambi kobuso bakho, Oya kuyilungisa indlela yakho phambi kwakho."
Mark1:3 Ilizwi lodandulukayo entlango, lisithi, Wulungiseni umendo weNkosi, Wutyenenezeni umendo wayo."
Mark1:4 Kwaye kukho uYohane, ebhaptiza entlango, evakalisa ubhaptizo lwenguquko, ukuze kuxolelwe izono."
Mark1:5 Laye liphuma lisiya kuye lonke ilizwe lakwaYuda nabaseYerusalem, baye bonke bebhaptizwa nguye eYordan emlanjeni, bezixela izono zabo."
Mark1:6 Waye ke uYohane ambethe uboya benkamela, enombhinqo wentlonze esinqeni sakhe; Wadla iinkumbi nobusi basendle;"
Mark1:7 Wayeshumayela esithi, Emva kwam kuza lowo unamandla kunam, endingafanelekileyo ukuba ndithobe phantsi, ndiwuthukulule nomtya weembadada zakhe."
Mark1:8 Mna okunene ndanibhaptiza ngamanzi, kodwa yena uya kunibhaptiza ngoMoya oyiNgcwele."
Mark1:9 Kwathi ngaloo mihla kweza uYesu, evela eNazarete yelaseGalili, wabhaptizwa nguYohane eYordan apho."
Mark1:10 Uthe kwaoko, akuba enyuka ephuma emanzini, walibona izulu livulekile, noMoya enjengehobe, esihla phezu kwakhe."
Mark1:11 Kwabakho nezwi eliphuma ezulwini, lisithi, Wena unguNyana wam oyintanda, endikholisiweyo nguye."
Mark1:12 Uthe kwaoko uMoya wamkhuphela entlango.
Mark1:13 Waye esentlango apho iintsuku ezimashumi mane, ehendwa nguSathana; waye kunye namarhamncwa; zaye izithunywa zezulu zimlungiselela."
Mark1:14 Ke kaloku emveni kokufakwa kukaYohane entolongweni, weza uYesu kwelaseGalili, eshumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zobukumkani bukaThixo,"
Mark1:15 esithi, Lizalisekile ixesha, nobukumkani bukaThixo busondele; guqukani, nikholwe kuzo iindaba ezilungileyo ezi."
Mark1:16 Uthe ke, ehamba ngaselwandle lwaseGalili, wabona uSimon, noAndreya umzalwana wakhe, bephosa umnatha elwandle; ngokuba babengababambisi beentlanzi."
Mark1:17 Wathi kubo uYesu, Yizani apha nindilandele; ndonenza nibe ngababambisi babantu."
Mark1:18 Bayishiya kwaoko iminatha yabo, bamlandela."
Mark1:19 Ehambele phambili kancinane, wabona uYakobi, lo kaZebhedi, noYohane umzalwana wakhe, besemkhombeni wabo, belungisa iminatha yabo."
Mark1:20 Wababiza kwaoko, bamshiya uyise uZebhedi enqanaweni nabaqeshwa, bamlandela."
Mark1:21 Bangena eKapernahum; wathi kwaoko ngomhla wesabatha, wangena endlwini yesikhungu, wafundisa."
Mark1:22 Bakhwankqiswa kukufundisa kwakhe; ngokuba ebebafundisa njengonegunya, engafundisi njengabo ababhali."
Mark1:23 Kwaye kukho endlwini yabo yesikhungu umntu onomoya ongcolileyo; wadanduluka wathi,"
Mark1:24 besithi, Siyeke; Yintoni na enathi nawe, Yesu waseNazarete? uze kusitshabalalisa na? Ndiyakwazi wena, lowo unguye, ungoyiNgcwele kaThixo."
Mark1:25 Wawukhalimela uYesu, esithi, Yithi tu, uphume kuye."
Mark1:26 Uthe umoya ongcolileyo wambetha wee xhwenene; wakhala ngezwi elikhulu, waphuma kuye."
Mark1:27 Bakhwankqiswa ke bonke, ngokokude babuzisane, besithi, Yintoni na le nto? Yeyiphi imfundiso entsha? kuba oomoya abangcolileyo aba ubathethela ngegunya, bamthobele."
Mark1:28 Lwaphuma ke kwaoko udumo lwakhe; lwaya kuwo wonke ummandla welaseGalili.
Mark1:29 Bakuba bephumile endlwini yesikhungo, bangena endlwini kaSimon noAndreya, benoYakobi noYohane."
Mark1:30 Ke umkhwekazi kaSimon wayelele phantsi ebanjwe yicesina, baza bamxelela kwaoko."
Mark1:31 Wasondela kuye, wayibamba ngesandla, wayiphakamisa; yamyeka kwaoko icesina, wabalungiselela."
Mark1:32 Ke kaloku, kwakuhlwa, xa litshonayo ilanga, bazisa kuye bonke ababesifa, nababephethwe ziidemon."
Mark1:33 Waye umzi wonke uhlanganisene ndawonye emnyango apho.
Mark1:34 Waphilisa babaninzi ababesifa zizifo ngezifo; wakhupha needemon ezininzi; waye engazivumeli iidemon ukuba zithethe, kuba bezimazi."
Mark1:35 Uthe ke kusasa, kusemnyama, wavuka, waphuma, wemka waya endaweni eyintlango, wathandaza khona apho."
Mark1:36 Bamlandela ooSimon nabo babenaye.
Mark1:37 Bathe bakumfumana bathi kuye, Bonke bayakufuna."
Mark1:38 Wathi kubo, Masihambe siye emizini ekufuphi, ukuze nakhona ndivakalise iindaba ezilungileyo, kuba ndiphumele oko."
Mark1:39 Wayevakalisa ke ezindlwini zabo zesikhungu kulo lonke elaseGalili, ezikhupha needemon."
Mark1:40 Kweza kuye oneqhenqa, embongoza, esiwa ngamadolo phambi kwakhe, esithi kuye, Ukuba uyathanda, unako ukundihlambulula."
Mark1:41 uYesu, esikwe yimfesane ke, wasolula isandla, wamchukumisa, wathi kuye, Ndiyathanda; Hlambuluka."
Mark1:42 Akutsho, lemka kwaoko kuye iqhenqa, wahlambuluka."
Mark1:43 Wamkhalimela, wamndulula kwaoko;"
Mark1:44 Athi kuye, Lumka ungaxeleli bani nanye into; hamba uye kuzibonisa kumbingeleli, usondeze oko wamisayo uMoses, ngenxa yokuhlanjululwa kwakho, kube bubungqina kubo."
Mark1:45 Ke yena, akuphuma, waqala ukuyivakalisa kakhulu nokuyibhengeza loo ndawo, ngokokude angabi saba nako uYesu ukungena mzini ekuhleni; waba ngaphandle ezindaweni eziziintlango; babesithi beze kuye bevela ngeenxa zonke."
Mark2:1 Kwakuba ntsuku, wabuya wangena eKapernahum; kwavakala ukuba usendlini."
Mark2:2 Kwathi kwaoko kwahlanganisana into eninzi yabantu, ngokokude kungabi sabakho kukhwelelana, nakule mimandla isemnyango; wayelithetha ke kubo ilizwi."
Mark2:3 Kwafika abantu kuye bezisa onedumbe, ethwelwe ngabané."
Mark2:4 Bakuba bengenakusondela kuye ngenxa yendimbane, banqika uphahla apho abekhona, baza bakuba begqobhozile, baluhlisa ukhuko abelele kulo lowo unedumbe."
Mark2:5 Akulubona uYesu ukholo lwabo, wathi konedumbe, Mntwana wam, uzixolelwe izono zakho."
Mark2:6 Kwaye kukho ababhali abathile behleli, becamanga ezintliziyweni zabo, besithi,"
Mark2:7 Yini na ukuba lo enjenje ukuthetha izinyeliso? Ngubani na onako ukuxolela izono, ingenguye uThixo yedwa?"
Mark2:8 Eqiqe kwaoko uYesu ngomoya wakhe, ukuba benjenjalo ukucamanga ngaphakathi kwabo, wathi kubo, Yini na ukuba nicamange ezi zinto ezintliziyweni zenu?"
Mark2:9 Okukhona kulula phi na, ukuthi konedumbe, Zixolelwe izono zakho; nokuthi, Vuka, uthabathe ukhuko lwakho, uhambe?"
Mark2:10 Ke ukuze nazi ukuba unalo igunya uNyana woMntu lokuxolela izono emhlabeni apha (selesithi konedumbe),"
Mark2:11 Ndithi kuwe, Vuka, uthabathe ukhuko lwakho, uye endlwini yakho."
Mark2:12 Wavuka kwaoko, waluthabatha ukhuko, waphuma phambi kwabo bonke; Bada bathi nqa bonke, bamzukisa uThixo, besithi, Asizanga sikubone okunje."
Mark2:13 Wabuya waphuma waya ngaselwandle; zaye zisiza kuye zonke izihlwele;
Mark2:14 Uthe ke edlula, wabona uLevi, lo ka-Alifeyu, ehleli endaweni yerhafu, wathi kuye, Ndilandele. Wesuka ke wamlandela."
Mark2:15 Kwathi ekuhlaleni kwakhe ngasesithebeni endlwini yakhe, kwahlala nento eninzi yababuthi berhafu naboni ndawonye noYesu nabafundi bakhe; kuba babebaninzi, baye ke bemlandela."
Mark2:16 Baye ababhali kwanabaFarisi, bakumbona esidla ndawonye nababuthi berhafu naboni, besithi kubafundi bakhe, Yini na ukuba adle asele nababuthi berhafu naboni?"
Mark2:17 Evile ke uYesu, wathi kubo, Akufuneki gqirha kwabaphili leyo lifuneka kwabafayo. Andize kubiza malungisa, ndize kubiza aboni ukuba baguquke."
Mark2:18 Baye ke abafundi bakaYohane nababaFarisi bezila ukudla. Beza bathi kuye, Kungani na ukuba abafundi bakaYohane nababaFarisi bazile ukudla, kanti bona abafundi bakho abakuzili?"
Mark2:19 Wathi uYesu kubo, Banako yini na abegumbi lomtshakazi ukuzila ukudla, xa anabo umyeni? ngalo lonke ixesha basenabo umyeni, abanako ukuzila."
Mark2:20 Kodwa kofika mihla awoza asuswe kubo umyeni, bandule ke ukuzila ngaloo mihla."
Mark2:21 Akukho ke uthungela isiziba esitsha engutyeni endala;
Mark2:22 Kanjalo akukho utha iwayini entsha ezintsubeni ezindala; okanye iwayini, leyo intsha, yozigqabhuza iintsuba, iphalale iwayini, zitshabalale neentsuba; yona iwayini entsha imelwe kukuthiwa ezintsubeni ezintsha."
Mark2:23 NgoMhla wokuPhumla wacanda emasimini. Baqala ke abafundi bakhe ukukha izikhwebu.
Mark2:24 Baza bathi kuye abaFarisi, Khangela, yini na ukuba benze ngemini yesabatha oko kungavumelekileyo?"
Mark2:25 Wathi kubo, Anizanga niyilese na into awayenzayo uDavide, oko wayeswele, elambile nokulamba, yena nabo babenaye?"
Mark2:26 Okokuba wangena endlwini kaThixo ngemihla ka-Abhiyatare umbingeleli omkhulu, wazidla izonka ezibekwa phambi koThixo, ekungavumelekileyo ukuba zidliwe ngabo bangebabingeleli, wanika nabo babenaye?"
Mark2:27 Wayesithi kubo, Isabatha le yabakho ngenxa yomntu, asingumntu owabakhoyo ngenxa yesabatha."
Mark2:28 Ngoko ke uNyana woMntu lo uyiNkosi yayo nesabatha.
Mark3:1 Wabuya wangena endlwini yesikhungu; Kwaye kukho apho umntu onesandla esomileyo.
Mark3:2 Baye ke bemlalele ukubona ukuba womphilisa na ngesabatha; ukuze bammangalele.
Mark3:3 Athi kuloo mntu unesandla esomileyo, Phakama uze phakathi."
Mark3:4 Athi kubo, Okuvumelekileyo ngesabatha kukwenza okulungileyo, kukwenza okubi, kusini na? Kukusindisa, kukubulala, kusini na? Bathi tu ke bona."
Mark3:5 Akuba ebasingasingile ngengqumbo, ebuhlungu ngenxa yokuqaqadeka kwentliziyo yabo, wathi kumntu lowo, Solule isandla sakho. Wasolula, saphila ke isandla sakhe, saba ngesinye."
Mark3:6 Baphuma abaFarisi, benza kwaoko ibhunga namaHerode ngaye, lokuba bamtshabalalise."
Mark3:7 Wemka uYesu nabafundi bakhe, waya elwandle; yamlandela inkitha enkulu yaseGalili nakwelakwaYuda"
Mark3:8 naseYerusalem, nakwaIdume, naphesheya kweYordan; NakwelaseTire neTsidon, inkitha enkulu, yakuva ukuba zininzi kwazo izinto abezenza, yeza kuye."
Mark3:9 Waza wathi kubafundi bakhe, umkhonjana umlinde ngenxa yendimbane, hleze bamxinzelele phantsi."
Mark3:10 Kuba wayephilise abantu abaninzi; ngokokude bathi ngunga phezu kwakhe, ukuze bamchukumise bonke ababenezibetho;"
Mark3:11 Nabo oomoya abangcolileyo babesithi, xa sukuba bembona, bawe phantsi kuye, bakhale, besithi, Wena unguye uNyana kaThixo."
Mark3:12 Wabakhalimela ukuba bangamtyhili.
Mark3:13 Unyuke ke intaba, abizele kuye abo abethanda ukubabiza yena ngokwakhe; beza kuye."
Mark3:14 Wamisela abalishumi elinababini, ukuze babe naye, nokuba abathume baye kushumayela;"
Mark3:15 nokuba negunya lokuphilisa izifo, nelokukhupha iidemon;"
Mark3:16 Kwaye uSimon awamthiya ngokuba nguPetros;
Mark3:17 noYakobi kaZebhedi, noYohane umzalwana kaYakobi; Waza wabathiya igama elinguBhowanerges, oko kukuthi, oonyana beendudumo;"
Mark3:18 noAndreya, noFilipu, noBhartolomeyu, noMateyu, noTomas, noYakobi ka-Alifeyu, noTadeyu, noSimon umKanan,"
Mark3:19 NoYuda Sikariyoti, lowo wamngcatshayo naye, bangena endlwini."
Mark3:20 Kwabuya kwahlanganisana isihlwele, ngokokude bangabi nakutya isonka."
Mark3:21 Bakuva ke oogxa bakhe, baphuma besiya kumbamba; kuba babesithi, Uyageza."
Mark3:22 Baye bona ababhali, ababehle bevela eYerusalem, besithi, UnoBhelezebhule;"
Mark3:23 Wababizela kuye, wathetha nabo ngemizekeliso, esithi, Angathini na uSathana ukukhupha uSathana?"
Mark3:24 Nobukumkani, ukuba buthe bahlulelana bodwa, abunako ukuma obo bukumkani;"
Mark3:25 nendlu, ukuba ithe yahlulelana yodwa, ayinako ukuma loo ndlu;"
Mark3:26 NoSathana, ukuba uthe wazichasa ngokwakhe, wahlulelana yedwa, akanako ukuma, uphelile."
Mark3:27 Akukho bani unako ukungena endlwini yegorha elo, ayiphange impahla yalo, ukuba akathanga tanci alibophe igorha elo; andule ke ukuyiphanga indlu yakhe."
Mark3:28 Inene ndithi kuni, Zonke izono baya kuzixolelwa oonyana babantu, kwanezinyeliso abasukuba benyelisa ngazo;"
Mark3:29 Ke yena othe wanyelisa uMoya oyiNgcwele, akanako ukuxolelwa naphakade; unetyala lokugwetywa okungunaphakade."
Mark3:30 Kuba besithi, Unomoya ongcolileyo."
Mark3:31 Bafika ngoko abazalwana bakhe nonina, bema ngaphandle, bathumela kuye bembiza."
Mark3:32 Zaye izihlwele zihleli zimphahlile; bathi kuye, Nanku unyoko nabazalwana bakho ngaphandle, bekufuna."
Mark3:33 Wabaphendula wathi, Ngubani na uma? Ngoobani na nabazalwana bam?"
Mark3:34 Akuba ebasingasingile ngeenxa zonke ababehleli bemphahlile, wathi, Nanku uma nabazalwana bam."
Mark3:35 Kuba othe wakwenza ukuthanda kukaThixo, lowo ngumzalwana wam, nodade wethu, noma."
Mark4:1 Wabuya waqala ukufundisa ngaselwandle. Kwahlanganisana kuye indimbane enkulu, wada yena wangena emkhombeni, wahlala elwandle; saye sonke isihlwele siphezu kolwandle emhlabeni."
Mark4:2 Wayebafundisa iindawo ezininzi ngemizekeliso. Wayesithi kubo ekufundiseni kwakhe,"
Mark4:3 Phulaphulani; Yabona, umhlwayeli waphuma waya kuhlwayela;"
Mark4:4 kwathi ekuhlwayeleni kwakhe, inxalenye yembewu yawa ngasendleleni, zeza iintaka zezulu zayidla zayigqiba."
Mark4:5 Enye yawa endaweni elulwalwa, apho ibingenamhlaba mninzi; yantshula ke kwaoko, ngenxa yokuba ingenabunzulu bamhlaba;"
Mark4:6 Kuthe ke, lakuba shushu ilanga, yatsha; yathi ngenxa yokuba ingenangcambu, yoma kwaphela."
Mark4:7 Yimbi yawa phakathi kwemithana enameva, yaza imithana enameva yakhula, yayiminxa, ayaba nasiqhamo."
Mark4:8 Embi yawa kuwo wona umhlaba olungileyo, yavelisa isiqhamo, yahluma, yaqhama; yavelisa enye amashumi amathathu, enye amashumi amathandathu, nekhulu enye."
Mark4:9 Wathi kubo, Lowo uneendlebe zokuva makeve."
Mark4:10 Ke kaloku, xa abeyedwa, abo babemphahlile, ndawonye nabalishumi elinababini, bambuza umzekeliso lowo."
Mark4:11 Uthe ke kubo, Nikuphiwe nina ukuyazi imfihlelo yobukumkani bukaThixo;"
Mark4:12 ukuze bebona babone, bangaqiqi; besiva ke beve, bangaqondi; hleze babuye baguquke, baxolelwe izono zabo."
Mark4:13 Wathi kubo, Aniwazi na lo mzekeliso? Nothini na ke ukuyazi imizekeliso yonke?"
Mark4:14 Uhlwayela imbewu yelizwi.
Mark4:15 Aba ke basendleleni, apho ilizwi lihlwayelwa khona, ngaba basendleleni, xa bathe beva, afike kwaoko uSathana, alithabathe ilizwi elihlwayelweyo ezintliziyweni zabo."
Mark4:16 Ngokukwanjalo ngaba abo bahlwayelwa ezindaweni ezilulwalwa; abathi, bakuliva ilizwi, balamkele kwaoko bevuya;"
Mark4:17 babe bengenangcambu ngaphakathi kwabo, beme umzuzwana kodwa; bathi kamva, kwakuhla imbandezelo, nokuba yintshutshiso, ngenxa yelizwi, bakhutyekiswe kwaoko."
Mark4:18 Aba bahlwayelweyo emithaneni enameva ngaba; abo balivayo ilizwi,"
Mark4:19 Aze amaxhala eli phakade, nokulukuhla kobutyebi, neenkanuko zezinye izinto, zingene ziliminxe ilizwi, lisuke lingabi nasiqhamo."
Mark4:20 Abo bahlwayelwe kuwo umhlaba omhle ngaba; bathi bona balivayo ilizwi, balamkele, baxakathe isiqhamo, omnye amashumi amathathu, omnye amashumi amathandathu, nomnye ikhulu."
Mark4:21 Wayesithi kubo, Isibane esi sikha siziswe ukuze sibekwe ngaphantsi kwesitya yini na, nokuba kuphantsi kwesingqengqelo? nengabekwa phezu kwesiphatho sezibane?"
Mark4:22 Akukho nto ifihlakeleyo ingayi kubonakala; kananjalo akubangakho nto ifihliweyo ingafihlelwa ukuba ize ekuhleni.
Mark4:23 Ukuba ubani uneendlebe zokuva, makeve."
Mark4:24 Wayesithi kubo, Yilumkeleni into eniyivayo; umlinganiselo enilinganisela ngawo, niya kulinganiselwa ngawo nani, kongezwe kuni nina nivayo."
Mark4:25 Kuba osukuba enako, uya kunikwa; nosukuba engenako, uya kuhluthwa kwanoko anako."
Mark4:26 Uthe ke, Ubukumkani bukaThixo bunjengokuba abengathi umntu aphose imbewu emhlabeni;"
Mark4:27 Ubusuku nemini alale, avuke, ize imbewu intshule, ikhule engazi ukuba njani na."
Mark4:28 Kuba umhlaba uvelisa iziqhamo ngokwawo; kuqala ibe likhaba, kwalandela isikhwebu, ize ibe yingqolowa ezalisekileyo esikhwebini;"
Mark4:29 Xa sithe savuthwa isiqhamo, alifake kwaoko irhengqa, ngokuba kusekusondele ukuvuna."
Mark4:30 Uthe ke, Siya kubufanekisa nantoni na ubukumkani bukaThixo? Siya kuthelekisa ngamzekeliso mni na?"
Mark4:31 Bunjengokhozo lwemostade, oluthi, xa sukuba luhlwayelwa emhlabeni, lube luloluncinane kuzo zonke iimbewu ezisemhlabeni;"
Mark4:32 luthi ke, xa luthe lwahlwayelwa, lukhule lube lukhulu kuyo yonke imifuno, lwenze amasebe amakhulu, ngokokude iintaka zezulu zibe nako ukuhlala phantsi komthunzi wawo."
Mark4:33 Wayelithetha kubo ilizwi ngemizekeliso emininzi enjalo, njengoko baye benako ukuva."
Mark4:34 Ubengathethi ke kubo kungengamzekeliso; ke ubesithi, bakuba bodwa, abacombululele iindawo zonke abafundi bakhe."
Mark4:35 Kwangaloo mini kwakuhlwa, athi kubo, Masiwele siye ngaphesheya."
Mark4:36 Basindulula isihlwele, bamthabatha esemkhombeni ngoko. Kwaye ke kukho eminye imikhonjana inaye."
Mark4:37 Kwabakho uqhwithela olukhulu lomoya; aye ke amaza ephoseka emkhombeni, abetha wafuna ukuzala kwangoku."
Mark4:38 Ke yena ebesemva emkhombeni, elele emqamelweni; bamvuse, bathi kuye, Mfundisi, akukhathali na, sitshabalala nje?"
Mark4:39 Wavuka, wawukhalimela umoya, wathi kulo ulwandle, Yithi tu, uthi tu. Wadamba umoya, kwabakho ukuzola okukhulu."
Mark4:40 Wathi kubo, Yini na ukuba nibe nje, ukuba ngamagwala? Yini na ukuba ningabi nalukholo?"
Mark4:41 Boyika ngoloyiko olukhulu, batshono ukuthi, Ngubani na ke lo, le nto alulanyelwa nangumoya nalulwandle?"
Mark5:1 Baza bawelela ngaphesheya kolwandle, kummandla wamaGadara."
Mark5:2 Akuba ephumile emkhombeni, wahlangatyezwa kwaoko ngumntu onomoya ongcolileyo, ephuma emangcwabeni,"
Mark5:3 owayenekhaya lakhe emangcwabeni; kwaye kungekho bani unako ukumbopha nangemixokelelwane;
Mark5:4 Ngokuba wayebotshwa futhi ngamakhamandela nemixokelelwane, asuke amatyathanga asuke asuke akhe, awakroboze namakhamandela;"
Mark5:5 Ube ehlala ubusuku nemini esezintabeni nasemangcwabeni ekhala, ezicenta ngamatye."
Mark5:6 Uthe ke akumbona uYesu esekude, wabaleka, waqubuda kuye."
Mark5:7 Wadanduluka ngezwi elikhulu, wathi, Yintoni na enam nawe, Yesu, Nyana kaThixo Osenyangweni? Ndikufungisa uThixo, ukuba ungandithuthumbisi."
Mark5:8 Kuba ebethe kuye, Phuma emntwini apho, moyandini ungcolileyo."
Mark5:9 Yambuza ke esithi, Ungubani na igama lakho? Waphendula ke yena esithi, NdinguMkhosi igama lam; kuba sibaninzi."
Mark5:10 Waye ke embongoza kakhulu ukuba angabandululi bemke kwelo zwe.
Mark5:11 Bekukho ke apho ngasezintabeni ugxuba olukhulu lweehagu lusidla.
Mark5:12 Zambongoza zonke iindimoni, zisithi, Sithumele ezihagwini, ukuze singene kuzo."
Mark5:13 Wazivumela kwaoko uYesu. Baphuma ke oomoya abangcolileyo, baya kungena ezihagwini; lwaza ugxuba olo lwaphaphatheka, lwehla eweni, lwela elwandle;"
Mark5:14 Bathe ke abo babezalusa iihagu basaba, babika ekhaya nasemaphandleni. Baphuma ke abantu, baya kuyibona loo nto ihlileyo."
Mark5:15 Bafike kuYesu, bambone obephethwe ziidemon, lowo ke wayenomkhosi, ehleli, ambathisiwe, enengqondo ephilileyo; baza boyika."
Mark5:16 Baza abo babeyibonile le nto babacokisela, ukuba kuthekeni na kobephethwe ziidemon; kwanokweehagu."
Mark5:17 Baqala ukumbongoza ukuba emke emideni yabo.
Mark5:18 Akuba engene emkhombeni, lowo ubephethwe ziidemon wambongoza ukuba abe naye."
Mark5:19 Kodwa uYesu akamvumelanga. Usuke wathi kuye, Hamba, uye endlwini yakho kwabakowenu, ubabikele oko zingako ukuba zinkulu izinto ekwenzele zona iNkosi, yaba nenceba kuwe."
Mark5:20 Wemka, waqala ukuzivakalisa eDekapoli oko zingako ukuba zinkulu izinto uYesu abemenzele zona; bamangaliswa bonke."
Mark5:21 Kwathi, akubon’ ukuba uYesu uwelile ngomkhombe, wabuya weza kwelinye icala, kwahlanganisana kuye isihlwele esikhulu; waye engaselwandle apho."
Mark5:22 Kwabonakala kusiza omnye wakubaphathi bendlu yesikhungu, ogama linguYayiro; Uthe ke akumbona, wawa ezinyaweni zakhe."
Mark5:23 Wambongoza kakhulu, esithi, Intombi yam igulela ukufa; khawuze ubeke izandla phezu kwayo, ukuze iphile; yophila ke."
Mark5:24 Wahamba naye uYesu; yaye indimbane enkulu imlandela, imxinile."
Mark5:25 Kwaye kukho ntokazi ithile, eyayinethombo legazi iminyaka elishumi elinamibini."
Mark5:26 Wayeve ubunzima obuninzi kumagqirha amaninzi, edleke konke abenako, engancedi lutho, esuke wahambela phambili ebubini:"
Mark5:27 yathi yakuva ngaye uYesu, yeza phakathi kwesihlwele ngasemva, yayichukumisa ingubo yakhe;"
Mark5:28 kuba ibisithi, Ukuba ndithe ndachukumisa neengubo zakhe ezi, ndosindiswa."
Mark5:29 Watsha kwaoko umthombo wegazi layo; yeva emzimbeni wayo ukuba iphilisiwe kweso sibetho.
Mark5:30 uYesu, ethe kwaoko wawazi ngaphakathi kwakhe amandla aphume kuye, wajika esendimbaneni, wathi, Ngubani na ochukumise iingubo zam?"
Mark5:31 Bathi kuye abafundi bakhe, Ubona nje ukuba isihlwele sikuxinile, utsho na ukuthi, Ngubani na lo undichukumisileyo?"
Mark5:32 Wasingasinga, ukuba ambone lowo uyenzileyo le nto."
Mark5:33 Ithe ke intokazi leyo, isoyika, ingcangcazela, ikwazi oko kwenzekileyo kuyo, yeza yawa phantsi phambi kwakhe, yamxelela inyaniso yonke."
Mark5:34 Wathi ke kuyo, Ntombi yam, ukholo lwakho lukusindisile; hamba ngoxolo, phila kwisibetho sakho."
Mark5:35 Kwathi, esathetha, kwafika amadoda evela kwamphathi wendlu yesikhungu, athi, Ifile intombi yakho; usamkhathazelani na uMfundisi?"
Mark5:36 Kwangoko uYesu, elivile elo zwi lithethwayo, wathi kumphathi wendlu yesikhungu, Musa ukoyika, kholwa kuphela."
Mark5:37 Akavumela mntu ukuba alandelane naye, kwakuphela nguPetros noYakobi noYohane, umzalwana kaYakobi."
Mark5:38 Afike endlwini yomphathi wendlu yesikhungu, abone isiphithiphithi, abalilayo nabenza isijwili esikhulu."
Mark5:39 Akungena athi kubo, Yini na ukuba niphithizele, nilile? Intombazana ayifile, ilele."
Mark5:40 Basuka bamwa ngentsini. Athi akuba ebakhuphele phandle bonke, amthabathe uyise womntwana nonina, nabo babenaye, angene apho wayelele khona umntwana lowo."
Mark5:41 Wayibamba ngesandla intombazana leyo, wathi kuyo, Talita, kumi; oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, Ntombazana, ndithi kuwe, Vuka."
Mark5:42 Yavuka kwaoko intombazana leyo, yahambahamba; kuba ibiminyaka ilishumi elinamibini izelwe. Bathi nqa ngokuthi nqa okukhulu."
Mark5:43 Wabayala kakhulu ukuba kungaziwa mntu oku; wathi mayiyinikwe idle.
Mark6:1 Ephumile ke apho, weza kwelakowabo; bamlandela ke abafundi bakhe."
Mark6:2 Kwathi kwakubakho isabatha, waqala ukufundisa endlwini yesikhungu; baza abaninzi, bakuva, bakhwankqiswa, besithi, Lo uzizuze phi na ezi zinto? Bubulumko buni na obu abunikiweyo, le nto nemisebenzi yamandla engaka yenziwe ngezandla zakhe?"
Mark6:3 Lo akayiyo na ingcibi yokwakha, unyana kaMariya, umzalwana ke kaYakobi noYose noYuda noSimon? Noodade wabo abakho kuthi na apha? Baye bekhubeka kuye."
Mark6:4 Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Umprofeti akasweli mbeko, kungaba kukowabo, nakwizizalwana zakhe, nakokwabo."
Mark6:5 Wayengenako ukwenza namnye umsebenzi wamandla khona apho, kwakuphela ukubeka izandla phezu kwemilwelwe embalwa, wayiphilisa."
Mark6:6 Wamangaliswa kukungakholwa kwabo. Waye ejikeleza imizana, efundisa."
Mark6:7 Ubabizele kuye abalishumi elinababini, waqala ukubathuma ngababini, ngababini; ebanika igunya koomoya abangcolileyo;"
Mark6:8 Wabathethela ngelithi, mabangaphathi nto yandlela, ibe ngumsimelelo wodwa; nangxowa yamphako, nasonka, namali enxilini;"
Mark6:9 Banxibe iimbadada; ningambathi neengubo zangaphantsi ngambini.
Mark6:10 Wayesithi kubo, Apho nithe nangena endlwini, hlalani khona nide nimke kuloo ndawo."
Mark6:11 Abo sukuba benganamkeli, benganiva nokuniva, nakuphuma kuloo ndawo, vuthululani uthuli oluphantsi kweenyawo zenu, kube bubungqina oko kubo. Inene ndithi kuni, Koba nokunyamezeleka okweSodom neGomora ngomhla womgwebo, kunokwaloo mzi."
Mark6:12 Baphuma bavakalisa ukuba mabaguquke abantu.
Mark6:13 Bakhupha needemon ezininzi, bayithambisa ngeoli imilwelwe emininzi, beyiphilisa."
Mark6:14 Wakuva ukumkani uHerode; (kuba lalithe laduma igama lakhe;) wayesithi, Uvukile kwabafileyo uYohane umbhaptizi; ngenxa yoko le misebenzi yamandla iyenzeka ngaye."
Mark6:15 Baye abanye besithi, NguEliya; Babesithi ke abanye, Ngumprofeti, nokuba ufana nomnye wakubaprofeti."
Mark6:16 Ekuvile ke oko uHerode, wathi, Lo nguYohane, lowa ndamnqamla intloko mna; uvukile kwabafileyo."
Mark6:17 Kuba uHerode ngokwakhe wabethe wathuma, wambamba uYohane, wambopha entolongweni, ngenxa kaHerodiya, umfazi kaFilipu umninawa wakhe; kuba ebemzekile."
Mark6:18 Kuba wayesithi uYohane kuHerode, Akuvumelekile ukuba ube nomfazi womzalwana wakho."
Mark6:19 Ke kaloku uHerodiya waba nenqala ngakuye, wafuna ukumbulala; kodwa akabanga nako:"
Mark6:20 kuba uHerode wayemoyika uYohane, emazi ukuba uyindoda elilungisa, engcwele, wayemgcinile; wayesithi ke akumva, enze iindawo ezininzi, amve kamnandi."
Mark6:21 Ke kaloku, kwakufika umhla owamlungelayo, uHerode ngemini yokuzalwa kwakhe wayebenzela isidlo izikhulu zakhe, namabamba akhe amakhulu, namagqala elaseGalili;"
Mark6:22 yakubon’ ukuba ingene intombi kaHerodiya lowo, yangqungqa, yamkholisa uHerode nabo babehleli ndawonye naye. Wathi ukumkani kwintombazana leyo, Ndicele into osukuba uyithanda; ndokupha."
Mark6:23 Wayifungela ngelithi, Into othe wayicela kum ndokupha, kude kube kwisiqingatha sobukumkani bam."
Mark6:24 Iphumile ke yathi kunina, Ndicele ntoni na? Wathi ke yena, Intloko kaYohane umbhaptizi."
Mark6:25 Yena kungena kwaoko ngokungxama kuye ukumkani, yacela, isithi, Ndithanda ukuba undinike kalokunje ngesitya intloko kaYohane umbhaptizi."
Mark6:26 Ukumkani waba buhlungu kakhulu; noko, ngenxa yesifungo sakhe, nangenxa yabo babehleli ndawonye naye, akathandanga kuyilandulela."
Mark6:27 Ukumkani ke wasusa umsiki, wamthethela ngelithi, mayiziswe intloko yakhe."
Mark6:28 Wayizisa intloko yakhe ngesitya, wayinika intombazana leyo; yaza intombazana yayinika unina."
Mark6:29 Bekuvile oko abafundi bakhe, beza basithabatha isidumbu sakhe, basibeka engcwabeni."
Mark6:30 Bahlanganisana abapostile kuYesu, bambikela iinto zonke, ezo babezenzile, kwanezo babezifundisile."
Mark6:31 Wathi kubo, Yizani nina ngasese kwindawo eyintlango, niphumle kancinane; kuba bebaninzi abezayo nabemkayo; babengenalo ke nethutyana lokuba badle."
Mark6:32 Bemka ngomkhombe ngasese, baya kwindawo eyintlango."
Mark6:33 Isihlwele sababona bemka bathi abaninzi bamazi, babalekela khona ngeenyawo, bevela kuyo yonke imizi; babaphangela, bathuthelana kuye."
Mark6:34 Uthe ke akuphuma uYesu, wabona isihlwele esikhulu; wasikwa yimfesane ngabo, ngokuba babenjengezimvu ezingenamalusi; waqala ukubafundisa iindawo ezininzi."
Mark6:35 Kwakubon’ ukuba seyihambile kakhulu imini, beza kuye abafundi bakhe, bathi, Le ndawo iyintlango, nemini seyihambile kakhulu;"
Mark6:36 bandulule bemke, baye emaphandleni ajikelezileyo nasemizaneni, bazithengele izonka; kuba bengenanto bangayidlayo."
Mark6:37 Waphendula ke wathi kubo, Bapheni nina batye. Bathi kuye, Simke na siye kuthenga izonka ngeedenariyo ezimakhulu mabini, sibaphe badle?"
Mark6:38 Athi kubo, Zingaphi na izonka eninazo? yiyani nibone. Besazi, bathi, Zintlanu, neentlanzi ezimbini."
Mark6:39 Wabathethela ngelithi, mababangqengqise bonke, babe ziziqhu ngeziqhu engceni eluhlaza."
Mark6:40 Bahlala phantsi beziingcamba ngeengcamba ngamakhulu, nangamashumi ngamahlanu."
Mark6:41 Wazithabatha izonka zozihlanu neentlanzi zombini, wathi ekhangele ezulwini wasikelela, waziqhekeza izonka, wanika abafundi bakhe, ukuba babeke phambi kwabo; wathi neentlanzi zombini wazabela bona bonke."
Mark6:42 Badla bahlutha bonke.
Mark6:43 Baza basusa izitya zizele ngamaqhekeza zalishumi elinazibini, basusa nakwiintlanzi."
Mark6:44 Ababesidla izonka babengamadoda akumawaka amahlanu.
Mark6:45 Wabanyanzela kwaoko abafundi bakhe ukuba bangene emkhombeni, bamandulele baye ngaphesheya eBhetesayida, lo gama asindululayo isihlwele yena."
Mark6:46 Akuba ebulisene nabo, wemka waya kuthandaza entabeni."
Mark6:47 Kwakuhlwa, umkhombe ubuphakathi elwandle, eyedwa emhlabeni."
Mark6:48 Wababona bebulaleka ekuqhubeni; kuba umoya ububavele ngaphambili. Athi ngolwesine ulindo lobusuku eze kubo, ehamba phezu kolwandle; wanga angacanda kubo."
Mark6:49 Kodwa bakumbona ehamba phezu kolwandle, bangathi ngumshologu, bakhala;"
Mark6:50 kuba bonke bambona, bakhathazeka. Wathetha kwaoko nabo, wathi kubo, Yomelelani; ndim; musani ukoyika."
Mark6:51 Wenyuka waya kubo emkhombeni, wadamba umoya. Bathi nqa ngaphakathi kwabo ngokuncamisileyo kunene, bamangaliswa;"
Mark6:52 kuba bengakuqondanga okwezonka; kuba intliziyo yabo yabe iqaqadekile.
Mark6:53 Bewelile, bafika emhlabeni waseGenesarete, balubeka elunxwemeni."
Mark6:54 Bakuphuma emkhombeni, bamazi kwaoko;"
Mark6:55 bawubaleka wonke loo mmandla, baqala ukubathwala ngeenkuko abafayo, bebasa apho babemva ukuba ukhona."
Mark6:56 Nalapho sukuba ebengena khona, nokuba kusemzaneni, nokuba kusemizini, nokuba kusemaphandleni, babesithi, bababeke abafayo ezitratweni, bambongoze ukuba khe bachukumise intshinga yengubo yakhe. Baye ke bephiliswa abo babemchukumisa."
Mark7:1 Bahlanganisana ke abaFarisi, nabathile kubachazi-mthetho, bevela eYerusalem;"
Mark7:2 Babona inxenye kubafundi bakhe besidla isonka ngezandla eziziinqambi, oko kukuthi, ngezingahlanjwanga, basuka basola."
Mark7:3 Kuba abaFarisi namaYuda onke abadli, ukuba abakhanga bazihlambe izandla kunene, bebambe isithethe samanyange."
Mark7:4 Nokuba bavela endaweni yembutho, abadli bengakhanga bahlambe; Kukho nezinye izinto ezininzi, abazamkele ukuba bazibambe, ezinjengeentlambo zeendebe, neebhekile, nezitya zobhedu, neetafile."
Mark7:5 Bambuza ke abaFarisi nababhali, besithi, Kungani na ukuba abafundi bakho bangahambi ngokwesithethe samanyange, le nto badla isonka ngezandla ezingahlanjwanga?"
Mark7:6 Waphendula ke wathi kubo, Watyapha uIsaya ukuprofeta ngani, bahanahanisi, njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Aba bantu bandibeka ngomlomo, Kanti yona intliziyo yabo ikude lee kum."
Mark7:7 Bafumana ke bendihlonela, Befundisa iimfundiso eziyimithetho yabantu."
Mark7:8 Nithi, niwuyeka okaThixo umthetho, nibambe isithethe sabantu esinjengeentlambo zeebhekile neendebe; naye nizenza nezinye izinto ezininzi ezinjengezo."
Mark7:9 Wayesithi kubo, Natyapha kambe niwutshitshise umthetho kaThixo, ukuze nisigcine isithethe senu."
Mark7:10 Kaloku uMosis wathi: “Beka uyihlo nonyoko; nokuthi, Othuka uyise nokuba ngunina, makafe ukufa;"
Mark7:11 Ke nina nithi, Ukuba umntu uthe kuyise nokuba kukunina, YiKorbhan, oko kukuthi, ingumnikelo kuThixo, into onge uba uncedwa ngayo ndim, ukholisile; uya kukhululwa;"
Mark7:12 anisayi kumvumela ukuba amenzele nto, nokuba nguyise nokuba ngunina;"
Mark7:13 Nilenza litshitshile ilizwi likaThixo ngesithethe senu enasinikayo, naye nizenza izinto ezininzi ezinjengezo."
Mark7:14 Esibizele kuye sonke indimbane, wathi kubo, Phulaphulani kum nonke, niqonde."
Mark7:15 Akukho nto ingaphandle komntu ethi ingena kuye ibe nako ukumenza inqambi; zizinto eziphumayo kuye ezimenza inqambi umntu.
Mark7:16 Ukuba ubani uneendlebe zokuva, makeve."
Mark7:17 Baye ke, xa ebengene endlwini, evela kuyo indimbane, bembuza abafundi bakhe umzekeliso lowo."
Mark7:18 Athi kubo, Nikwanje nani na ukuswela ingqondo? Aniqondi na ukuba yonke into engaphandle ingena emntwini, ayinako ukumenza inqambi;"
Mark7:19 Kaloku akungeni entliziyweni yakhe, kungekabi kusesiswini sakhe;"
Mark7:20 Wayesithi ke, Into ephumayo emntwini, yiyo leyo emenza inqambi umntu;"
Mark7:21 Kuba ngaphakathi, kuyo intliziyo yomntu, kuphuma izicamango ezingendawo, ookukrexeza, oomibulo, ookubulala;"
Mark7:22 ubusela, ukubawa, okungendawo, inkohliso, uburheletya, iliso elibi, ukunyelisa, ukukratsha, ukuswela kuqonda;"
Mark7:23 zonke ezi zinto zingendawo ziphuma ngaphakathi, zimenze inqambi umntu."
Mark7:24 Esukile apho ke, waya emideni yaseTire neyaseTsidon. Wangena endlwini, wanga akungaziwa mntu; akaba nako ukufihlakala noko."
Mark7:25 Kuba yathi yakuva ngaye intokazi entombi ibinomoya ongcolileyo, yeza yawa ezinyaweni zakhe."
Mark7:26 Ke kaloku intokazi leyo ingumGrikekazi, umSirofenike ngokuzalwa; yambongoza ukuba ayikhuphe idemon entombini yayo."
Mark7:27 Uthe ke uYesu kuyo, Khawuyeke kuhluthe abantwana kuqala; kuba akukuhle ukusithabatha isonka sabantwana, siphoswe ezinjaneni."
Mark7:28 Waphendula ke wathi kuye, Ewe, Nkosi; kuba nazo iinjana phantsi kwetafile zidla kwiimvuthuluka zabantwana."
Mark7:29 Wathi kuyo, Ngenxa yelo zwi, hamba; idemon iphumile entombini yakho."
Mark7:30 Yesuka yaya endlwini yayo, yafumana iphumile idemon, intombi ilele phezu kwesi ngqengqelo."
Mark7:31 Wabuya waphuma emideni yaseTire, waya eTsidon, weza kulwandle lwaseGalili, ecanda phakathi kwemida yaseDekapoli."
Mark7:32 Kwaziswa kuye umntu osisithulu, osisithulu; bambongoza ukuba abeke isandla sakhe phezu kwakhe."
Mark7:33 Wamthabatha ke esihlweleni, wayibeka bucala iminwe yakhe ezindlebeni zakhe, watshica, wachukumisa ulwimi lwakhe."
Mark7:34 Wakhangela ezulwini, wancwina, wathi kuyo, Efata; oko kukuthi, Vuleka."
Mark7:35 Zavuleka kwaoko iindlebe zaso, zacombuluka iingqambu zolwimi lwaso, sathetha salungisa."
Mark7:36 Wabayala ukuba mabangaxeleli bani; kodwa okukhona wabayalayo, kwaba kukhona bakuvakalisa ngakumbi."
Mark7:37 Bakhwankqiswa ngokuncamisileyo kanye, besithi, Uzenze iinto zonke kakuhle; uzenza nezithulu zive, nabangenakuthetha bathethe."
Mark8:1 Ke kaloku, ngaloo mihla, ekubeni zininzi izihlwele, kungekho nanto idliwayo na, uYesu wababizela kuye abafundi bakhe, wathi kubo,"
Mark8:2 Ndisikwa yimfesane ngenxa yezihlwele; ngokuba sekuntsuku ntathu behleli nam, bengenanto bangayidlayo;"
Mark8:3 ukuba ndithe ndabandulula baya emakhayeni abo bengadlanga, botyhafa endleleni; kuba inxenye yabo ivela kude."
Mark8:4 Bamphendula abafundi bakhe, besithi, Wokuzuza phi na umntu ukuba nako ukubahluthisa aba ngezonka, entlango apha?"
Mark8:5 Wababuza esithi, Zingaphi na izonka eninazo? Bathi ke bona, Zisixhenxe."
Mark8:6 Wayalela isihlwele ukuba sihlale phantsi emhlabeni. Wazithabatha izonka zosixhenxe, wabulela, waqhekeza, wanika abafundi bakhe, ukuba babeke phambi kwabo; zazibeka phambi kwabantu."
Mark8:7 Baye beneentlanzana ezimbalwa; akuba esikelele, wathi mazibekwe phambi kwabo nazo."
Mark8:8 Badla ke bahlutha, kwaza kwaqokelelwa iingobozi zasixhenxe zamaqhekeza aseleyo."
Mark8:9 Ke kaloku abo babesidla babemalunga namawaka amane. Wabandulula ke.
Mark8:10 Wangena kwaoko emkhombeni, nabafundi bakhe, weza emacaleni aseDalmanuta."
Mark8:11 Baphuma abaFarisi, baqala ukubuzana naye, befuna kuye umqondiso ophuma ezulwini, bemlinga."
Mark8:12 Encwina kakhulu emoyeni wakhe, wathi, Yini na ukuba esi sizukulwana singxamele umqondiso? Inene, ndithi kuni, Akukho mqondiso uya kunikwa esi sizukulwana."
Mark8:13 Wabashiya, wabuya wangena emkhombeni, wemka waya ngaphesheya."
Mark8:14 Ke kaloku abafundi babelibele ukuphatha izonka; kananjalo babengenanto isikhephe emkhombeni ngaphandle kwesonka esinye.
Mark8:15 Wabayala esithi, Ligqaleni, nililumkele igwele labaFarisi, negwele likaHerode."
Mark8:16 Baye becamanga bodwa besithi, Kungokuba singenazonka."
Mark8:17 Ekwazi oko uYesu, wathi kubo, Yini na ukuba nicamange, ngokuba ningenazonka? Anikaqondi na ukuba anikaqondi? Isaqaqadekile na intliziyo yenu?"
Mark8:18 Ninamehlo nje, aniboni na? Nineendlebe nje, aniva na? anikhumbuli na?"
Mark8:19 Oko ndaqhekezela amawaka amahlanu izonka ezihlanu, zazingaphi na iingobozi zizele ngamaqhekeza enazisusayo? Bathi kuye, Balishumi elinababini."
Mark8:20 Okuya ke ezisixhenxe ndaziqhekezela amawaka amane, zazingaphi na iingobozi zizele ngamaqhekeza enazisusayo? Bathi ke bona, Zisixhenxe."
Mark8:21 Uthe ke kubo, Phofu yini na ukuba ningaqondi?"
Mark8:22 Ufika eBhetesayida; bazisa imfama kuye, bambongoza ukuba ayichukumise."
Mark8:23 Wayibamba ngesandla imfama, wayirholela ngaphandle komzi; Watshica emehlweni ayo, wabeka izandla phezu kwayo, wayibuza ukuba ibona nto na?"
Mark8:24 Yaza yakhangela phezulu yathi, Ndiyababona abantu behamba, ngathi yimithi."
Mark8:25 Wabuya wazibeka izandla phezu kwamehlo ayo, wayikhangelisa phezulu; yabuya yaphila, yababona bonke kakuhle."
Mark8:26 Wayindulula ukuba iye endlwini yayo, esithi, Uze ungangeni esixekweni, ungathethi nakubani kuwo umzi."
Mark8:27 Waphuma uYesu nabafundi bakhe, waya emizini yaseKesareya yakwaFilipu; waye endleleni ebabuza abafundi bakhe, esithi kubo, Kuthiwa ngabantu ndingubani na mna?"
Mark8:28 Baphendula ke bona, bathi, UnguYohane umbhaptizi; bambi ke bathi, Ungomnye wakubaprofeti."
Mark8:29 Athi kubo, Ke nina nithi ndingubani na? Aphendule ke uPetros athi kuye, Wena unguye uKristu."
Mark8:30 Wabakhalimela ukuba bangaxeleli bani ngaye.
Mark8:31 Waqala ukubafundisa, okokuba uNyana woMntu umelwe kukuba eve ubunzima obukhulu, alahlwe ngawo amadoda amakhulu nababingeleli abakhulu nababhali, abulawe, athi emveni kweentsuku ezintathu abuye avuke."
Mark8:32 Elo zwi wayelithetha ngokungafihlisiyo. Waza uPetros wamthabatha, waqala ukumkhalimela."
Mark8:33 Uthe ke yena, ejikile, wabakhangela abafundi bakhe, wamkhalimela uPetros, esithi, Suka uye emva kwam, Sathana, ngokuba ungazinyamekeli ezikaThixo izinto, unyamekela ezabantu."
Mark8:34 Esibizele kuye indimbane, kwanabafundi bakhe, wathi kubo, Osukuba ethanda ukundilandela, makazincame, awuthwale umnqamlezo wakhe, andilandele."
Mark8:35 Kuba othe wathanda ukuwusindisa umphefumlo wakhe, wolahlekelwa nguwo; ke yena othe wawulahla umphefumlo wakhe ngenxa yam, nangenxa yeendaba ezilungileyo ezi, wowusindisa lowo."
Mark8:36 Kuba komnceda ntoni na umntu, ukuba uthe walizuza ihlabathi liphela, waza wonakalelwa ke ngumphefumlo wakhe?"
Mark8:37 Okanye worhola ntoni na umntu, ibe sisananelo somphefumlo wakhe?"
Mark8:38 Othe waneentloni ngam nangamazwi am, kwesi sizukulwana sikrexezayo, sonayo, uNyana woMntu woba neentloni ngaye lowo, xa athe weza esebuqaqawulini boYise, enezithunywa ezingcwele."
Mark9:1 Wayesithi kubo, Inene ndithi kuni, Kukho abathile kwabemiyo apha, abangayi kukha beve kufa bona, bade babubone ubukumkani bukaThixo busiza ngamandla."
Mark9:2 uYesu ke, emveni kweentsuku ezintandathu, athabathe uPetros noYakobi noYohane, abanyuse baye entabeni ende ngasese, bebodwa."
Mark9:3 Zabengezela iingubo zakhe, zamhlophe njengekhephu; njengokuba kungekho mcoci weempahla emhlabeni unako ukuba mhlophe."
Mark9:4 Kwabonakala kubo uEliya enoMoses; baye bethetha noYesu.
Mark9:5 Waphendula ke uPetros wathi kuYesu, Rabhi, kuhle ukuba sibe lapha; masenze iminquba ibe mithathu, omnye ube ngowakho; omnye ube ngowakho, omnye ube ngokaMoses, omnye ube ngokaEliya."
Mark9:6 Kuba ubengayazi into abengayithethayo; ngokuba bebesoyika kunene.
Mark9:7 Kwabakho ilifu elibenzela ithinzi, kweza nezwi liphuma efini apho, lisithi, Lo nguNyana wam oyintanda; mveni yena."
Mark9:8 Basingasinga, ababi sabona mntu, yanguYesu yedwa enabo."
Mark9:9 Bakubon’ ukuba bayehla entabeni apho, wabayala ukuba bangazityeli bani ezo zinto bazibonileyo, ade avuke kwabafileyo uNyana woMntu."
Mark9:10 Elo zwi balibamba lakubo bodwa bebuzana ukuba ukuvuka kubo abafileyo kukuthini na.
Mark9:11 Bambuza besithi, Yini na ukuba ababhali bathi, uEliya umelwe kukufika tanci?"
Mark9:12 Uphendule ke wathi kubo, Okunene uEliya, efike tanci, wobuya azimise zonke izinto; kwaba njani na kubhalwe ngaye uNyana woMntu, ukuba umelwe kukuthi eve ubunzima obukhulu, enziwe into engento?"
Mark9:13 Ke ndithi kuni, ufikile uEliya, baza benza kuye konke abakuthandayo, kwanjengoko kubhaliweyo ngaye."
Mark9:14 Akufika kubafundi bakhe, wabona indimbane enkulu ibangqongileyo, nababhali bebuzana nabo."
Mark9:15 Sakumbona sakhwankqiswa kwaoko sonke isihlwele, sabalekela kuye, sambulisa."
Mark9:16 Wababuza ababhali, esithi, Nibuzana ntoni na nabo?"
Mark9:17 Waphendula omnye wasesihlweleni wathi, Mfundisi, bendizise unyana wam kuwe, enomoya ongathethiyo;"
Mark9:18 apho uthe wamqubula khona, uyamntlala, aze alephuze amagwebu, atshixize amazinyo akhe, asuke ome; ndithethe kubafundi bakho ukuba bawukhuphe; ababa nako."
Mark9:19 Umphendule ke wathi, Sizukulwanandini singakholwayo, koda kube nini na ndinani? Koda kube nini na ndininyamezele? Mziseni kum."
Mark9:20 Bamzisa kuye. Akumbona, wesuka kwaoko umoya, wambetha wee xhwenene; yawa emhlabeni, yaqikaqika, ilephuza amagwebu."
Mark9:21 Wabuza kuyise, ukuba kumgama ungakanani na imhlile le nto? Wathi ke yena, Kwaesengumntwana."
Mark9:22 Umphose futhi emlilweni, kwanasemanzini, ukuba umtshabalalise; kodwa ukuba unako ukwenza into, sisize, usikwe yimfesane sithi."
Mark9:23 Wathi uYesu kuye, Ewe, ukuba unokukholwa! Zonke izinto zinokwenzeka kuye okholwayo."
Mark9:24 Wakhala kwaoko uyise womntwana lowo, wathi eneenyembezi, Ndiyakholwa, Nkosi; kuncede ukungakholwa kwam."
Mark9:25 Uthe ke uYesu, ebone ukuba isihlwele sibalekela ndaweni-nye, wawukhalimela umoya ongcolileyo, esithi kuwo, Moyandini ungathethiyo usithulu, mna ndiyakuthethela, phuma kuye, ungabi sangena kuye."
Mark9:26 Wakhala umoya, wambetha wee xhwenene kunene, waphuma kuye; bada abaninzi bathi, Ufile."
Mark9:27 uYesu ke wambamba ngesandla, wamphakamisa; wavuka."
Mark9:28 Eye kungena endlwini, bambuza abafundi bakhe ngasese, besithi, Yayiyini na ukuba singabi nako ukuwukhupha thina?"
Mark9:29 Wathi kubo, Olu hlobo alunako ukuphuma nganto, kungengako ukuthandaza nokuzila ukudla."
Mark9:30 Bephumile apho, babehamba becanda kwelaseGalili; wayengathandi ukuba kwazi bani oko;"
Mark9:31 kuba wayebafundisa abafundi bakhe, esithi kubo, uNyana woMntu unikelwa ezandleni zabantu; baya kumbulala; aze emveni kokuba ebulewe, abuye avuke ngomhla wesithathu."
Mark9:32 Baye bengakuqondi oko kuthetha; baye besoyika nokumbuza.
Mark9:33 Weza kufika eKapernahum. Akuba esekhaya, wayebabuza esithi, Nibe nicamanga ntoni na phakathi kwenu endleleni?"
Mark9:34 Bahlala bathi cwaka ke; kuba endleleni babebambene ngokuthi, ngubani na omkhulu phakathi kwabo."
Mark9:35 Akuba ehleli phantsi, wababiza abalishumi elinababini, wathi kubo, Ukuba ubani uthanda ukuba ngowokuqala, woba ngowokugqibela kwabo bonke, nomlungiseleli wabo bonke."
Mark9:36 Uthabathe umntwana, wammisa phakathi kwabo, wamwola, wathi kubo."
Mark9:37 Othe wamkela noko amnye wabantwana abanje, egameni lam, wamkela mna; nothe wamkela mna, akamkeli mna, wamkela lowo wandithumayo."
Mark9:38 uYohane wamphendula wathi: “Mfundisi, sabona umntu ekhupha iindimoni egameni lakho, kodwa samalela ke, kuba engasilandeli thina."
Mark9:39 Wathi ke uYesu, Musani ukumalela; kuba akukho namnye uya kwenza umsebenzi wamandla egameni lam, aze abe nako ukuthetha kakubi ngam."
Mark9:40 Kaloku ongachasiyo ungecala lethu.
Mark9:41 Kuba othe waniseza nendebe le yamanzi egameni lam, ngokuba ningabakaKristu, inene ndithi kuni, akasayi kuphulukana nomvuzo wakhe."
Mark9:42 Nothe wakhubekisa noko amnye waba bancinane bakholwayo kum, ngekumlungele kanye ukuba ubegangxwe ilitye lokusila entanyeni yakhe, waphoswa elwandle."
Mark9:43 Nokuba isandla sakho siyakukhubekisa, sinqumle; kukulungele kanye ukuba ungene ebomini usisilima, kunokuba uthi, unezandla zozibini, uye esihogweni, emlilweni ongacimiyo,"
Mark9:44 apho kumpethu ingafiyo, kumlilo ungacimiyo."
Mark9:45 Nokuba unyawo lwakho luya kukhubekisa, lunqumle; kukulungele kanye ukuba ungene ebomini usisiqhwala, kunokuba uthi, uneenyawo zombini, uphoswe esihogweni, emlilweni ongacimiyo,"
Mark9:46 apho kumpethu ingafiyo, kumlilo ungacimiyo."
Mark9:47 Ukuba iliso lakho liya kukhubekisa, linyothule; kukulungele kanye ukungena ebukumkanini bukaThixo unaliso linye, kunokuba uthi, unamehlo amabini, uphoswe esihogweni somlilo,"
Mark9:48 apho kumpethu ingafiyo, kumlilo ungacimiyo."
Mark9:49 Kuba bonke baya kugalelwa ityuwa ngomlilo, athi onke amadini agalelwe ityuwa ngetyuwa."
Mark9:50 Ityuwa ilungile yona, kodwa ukuba ithe ityuwa ayaba nabutyuwa, noyivakalisa ngantoni na? Yibani netyuwa phakathi kwenu, nihlale ninoxolo omnye komnye."
Mark10:1 Esukile apho, uze kungena emideni yakwaYuda, ecanda kweliphesheya kweYordan. Wabuya wabafundisa ngokwesiqhelo."
Mark10:2 Beza kuye abaFarisi, bambuza ukuba kuvumelekile na ukuba indoda imale umfazi wayo? emlinga."
Mark10:3 Waphendula ke wathi kubo, Waniwisela mthetho mni na uMoses?"
Mark10:4 Bathi ke bona, uMoses wakuvumela ukubhala incwadi yokwahlukana, nokumala."
Mark10:5 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Ngokuba lukhuni kwentliziyo yenu, wanibhalela loo mthetho;"
Mark10:6 Kodwa kwasekuqalekeni kwendalo, uThixo wabenza baba yindoda nenkazana."
Mark10:7 Ngenxa yoko ke, umntu womshiya uyise nonina, anamathele emfazini wakhe;"
Mark10:8 baze abo babini babe nyama-nye. Ngako oko, abasebabini, banyama-nye."
Mark10:9 Oko ke ngoko uThixo akumanyileyo, makungahlulwa mntu."
Mark10:10 Endlwini abafundi bakhe babuya bambuza ngayo loo nto.
Mark10:11 Athi kubo, Othe wamala umfazi wakhe, wazeka omnye, uyakrexeza kulowa."
Mark10:12 Nokuba umfazi uthe wayala indoda yakhe, wendela kwenye, uyakrexeza."
Mark10:13 Kwaye bezisa abantwana kuye ukuze abachukumise; basuka abafundi babakhalimela abo babazisayo.
Mark10:14 Ke kaloku ekubonile oku uYesu, wacaphuka, wathi kubo, Bavumeleni abantwana beze kum, ningabaleli: ngokuba ubukumkani bukaThixo bubobabo banjalo."
Mark10:15 Inene, ndithi kuni, Othe akabamkela ubukumkani bukaThixo njengomntwana, akayi kukha angene kubo."
Mark10:16 Waza wabawola, wabeka izandla phezu kwabo, wabasikelela."
Mark10:17 Ephumile ke, uya endleleni, kweza othile ngokubaleka, wawa ngamadolo kuye, wambuza esithi, Mfundisi ulungileyo, ndenze ntoni na, ukuze ndibudle ilifa ubomi obungunaphakade?"
Mark10:18 Uthe ke uYesu kuye, Yini na ukuba uthi ndilungile? Akukho ulungileyo, mnye kwaphela, nguThixo."
Mark10:19 Uyayazi imithetho: musa ukukrexeza, musa ukubulala, musa ukuba, musa ukungqina ubuxoki, musa ukulumkisa, beka uyihlo nonyoko."
Mark10:20 Uphendule ke wathi kuye, Mfundisi, zonke ezo zinto ndazigcina, kwasebuncinaneni bam."
Mark10:21 Uthe ke uYesu, ondele kuye wamthanda, wathi kuye, Kukho nto-nye uyisweleyo: hamba uye kuthengisa ngeento zonke onazo, uphe amahlwempu, woba nobutyebi ke emazulwini; yiza, uwuthabathe umnqamlezo, uwulandele, mna."
Mark10:22 Wathi ke khunubembe ngelo zwi, wemka ebuhlungu; kuba ebenemfuyo eninzi."
Mark10:23 uYesu esingasingile, wathi kubafundi bakhe, Hayi, ukuba ngenkankulu ukuya kungena kwabo banobutyebi ebukumkanini bukaThixo!"
Mark10:24 Bakhwankqiswa ke abafundi ngamazwi akhe. Wabuya waphendula ke uYesu, wathi kubo, Bantwana, hayi, ukuba ngenkankulu ukuthi abo bakholose ngobutyebi bangene ebukumkanini bukaThixo!"
Mark10:25 Kulula ukuba inkamela iphumele entunjeni yenaliti, kunokuba isityebi singene ebukumkanini bukaThixo."
Mark10:26 Baye bekhwankqiswa ke ngokuncamisileyo, besitshono ukuthi, Ngubani na ongasindiswayo?"
Mark10:27 Ondele ke uYesu, wathi kubo, Kubantu akunakwenzeka; kuye yena uThixo akunakuba kungenzeki; kuba zonke izinto zinako ukwenzeka kuye uThixo."
Mark10:28 Waqala uPetros ukuthi kuye, Uyabona, thina sishiye iinto zonke sakulandela."
Mark10:29 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Inene, ndithi kuni, Akukho namnye ushiye indlu, nokuba ngabazalwana, nokuba ngoodade, nokuba nguyise, nokuba ngunina, nokuba ngumfazi, nokuba ngabantwana, nokuba ngamasimi, ngenxa yam nangenxa yeendaba ezilungileyo ezi,"
Mark10:30 ongayi kuthi amkeliswe kalikhulu: ngoku ngeli xesha, izindlu, nabazalwana, noodade, noonina, nabantwana, namasimi, ndawonye neentshutshiso; nakwelizayo iphakade, ubomi obungunaphakade."
Mark10:31 Ke baninzi abokuqala abaya kuba ngabokugqibela; nabokugqibela abokuqala.
Mark10:32 Ke kaloku babesendleleni, benyuka besiya eYerusalem; waye uYesu ehamba phambi kwabo. Bathi nqa; Bakulandela ke boyika. Wabuya wabathabatha abalishumi elinababini waqala ukubaxelela izinto eziza kumhlela,"
Mark10:33 besithi, Niyabona, siyenyuka, siya eYerusalem; waye uNyana woMntu eya kunikelwa kubabingeleli abakhulu, nakubabhali; baya kumgweba ukuba afe, bamnikele kuzo iintlanga;"
Mark10:34 Ziya kudlala ngaye, zimtyakatye, zimtshicele, zimbulale, athi ngomhla wesithathu abuye avuke."
Mark10:35 Kuthi kuze kuye uYakobi noYohane, oonyana bakaZebhedi, besithi, Mfundisi, sithanda ukuba usenzele into esothi siyicele."
Mark10:36 Wathi ke yena kubo, Nithanda ukuba ndinenzele ntoni na?"
Mark10:37 Bathe ke bona kuye, Siphe ukuhlala, omnye ngasekunene kwakho, nomnye ngasekhohlo kwakho, ebuqaqawulini bakho."
Mark10:38 Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Aniyazi into eniyicelayo; ninako na ukuyisela indebe endiyiselayo mna? nibhaptizwe ngobhaptizo endibhaptizwa ngalo mna?"
Mark10:39 Bathi ke bona kuye, Sinako. Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Okunene indebe endiyiselayo mna, niya kuyisela; nobhaptizo endibhaptizwa ngalo mna, niya kubhaptizwa kwangalo;"
Mark10:40 Kodwa kona ukuhlala ngasekunene kwam nangasekhohlo kwam, asikwam ukupha ngako; kodwa kuya kunikwa abo kulungiselwe bona."
Mark10:41 Bevile abalishumi, baqala ukubacaphukela ooYakobi noYohane."
Mark10:42 Ke kaloku, uYesu ebabizele kuye, uthi kubo, Niyazi ukuba abo kuthiwa balawula iintlanga, banobukhosi kuzo; nabo bazizikhulu zazo benza ngegunya kuzo."
Mark10:43 Ze kungabi njalo ke phakathi kwenu; osukuba enga angaba mkhulu phakathi kwenu, makabe ngumlungiseleli wenu;"
Mark10:44 nosukuba efuna ukuba ngowokuqala, makabe ngumkhonzi wabo bonke;"
Mark10:45 Kuba noNyana woMntu engezanga kulungiselelwa; weza kulungiselela, nokuncama ubomi bakhe, bube yintlawulelo yokukhulula abaninzi."
Mark10:46 Baza kufika eYeriko. Ekuphumeni kwakhe eYeriko apho, nabafundi bakhe nendimbane elingeneyo, unyana kaTimeyu, uBhartimeyu, imfama, waye ehleli ngasendleleni engqiba."
Mark10:47 Wathi akuva ukuba nguYesu waseNazarete, waqala ukudanduluka wathi, Yesu nyana kaDavide, ndenzele inceba."
Mark10:48 Baye abaninzi bemkhalimela ukuba athi tu; kwaba kokukhona ke wadandulukayo ngakumbi, esithi, Nyana kaDavide, ndenzele inceba."
Mark10:49 Wema uYesu, wathi makabizwe. Bayibiza ke imfama, besithi kuyo, Yomelela, suk’ ume; uyakubiza."
Mark10:50 Ithe ke yona, ilahle ingubo yayo, yesuka yeza kuYesu."
Mark10:51 Aphendule athi kuyo uYesu, Uthanda ukuba ndikwenzele ntoni na? Yathi ke imfama kuye, Nkosi, ukuba ndibuye ndibone."
Mark10:52 Wathi kuyo uYesu, Hamba uhambe; ukholo lwakho lukusindisile. Yabuya yabona kwaoko, yamlandela uYesu endleleni apho."
Mark11:1 Ke kaloku, bakusondela eYerusalem, eBhetefage naseBhetani, eNtabeni yemiNquma, wesusa bababini kubafundi bakhe,"
Mark11:2 Athi kubo, Hambani niye emzaneni lo ukhangelene nani; nothi nakungena kuwo, nifumane ithole le-esile libotshelelwe, ekungazanga kuhlale namnye umntu phezu kwalo; mkhululeni nize naye."
Mark11:3 Nokuba ubani uthe kuni, Yini na ukuba nikwenze oko? yithini iNkosi iyalifuna; wothi kwaoko alithumele apha."
Mark11:4 Basuka ke baya, balifumana ithole libotshelelwe ngasemnyango ngaphandle, ekuhlanganeni kweendlela; bayamkhulula ke."
Mark11:5 Baye abathile kwababemi khona besithi kubo, Nenza ntoni na, nilikhulula nje ithole?"
