Mark11:6 Bathetha ke kubo njengoko uYesu ebebawisele umthetho ngako; baza babandulula.
Mark11:7 Balizisa ithole kuYesu; baziphosa iingubo zabo phezu kwalo; wahlala phezu kwakhe.
Mark11:8 Ke kaloku abaninzi bazandlala iingubo zabo endleleni; baye ke abanye bexhuzula amahlamvu emithini, bewandlala endleleni."
Mark11:9 Baye abo babehamba ngaphambili, nabo babelandela, bedanduluka, besithi, Hosana; Makabongwe lowo uzayo egameni leNkosi."
Mark11:10 Mabubongwe ubukumkani bukabawo wethu uDavide, obuzayo egameni leNkosi! Hosana enyangweni!"
Mark11:11 uYesu wangena eJerusalem, waya endlwini kaThixo, waza wasingasinga izinto zonke, kwaza kwakuhlwa, waphuma waya eBhetani nabalishumi elinababini."
Mark11:12 Uthe ngengomso, bakubon’ ukuba baphumile eBhetani, walamba."
Mark11:13 Wathi, ebone umkhiwane ukude, unamagqabi, waya kukhangela ukuba angafumana nto na kuwo. Akufika kuwo, akafumana nto, kwakuphela ngamagqabi; kuba belingekafiki ixesha lamakhiwane."
Mark11:14 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuwo, Makungaze kudle mntu siqhamo kuwe naphakade. Beva abafundi bakhe."
Mark11:15 Bakufika eJerusalem, waza uYesu wangena endlwini kaThixo, wabakhupha ababethengisa nababethenga endlwini kaThixo, wazibhukuqa neetafile zabatshintshi bemali, nezihlalo zabathengisa ngamahobe."
Mark11:16 Wayengavumi ukuba kubekho ucanda etempileni ethwele isitya.
Mark11:17 Wayefundisa, esithi kubo, Akubhaliwe na kwathiwa, Indlu yam iya kubizwa ngokuba yindlu yokuthandaza iintlanga zonke? Ke nina niyenze umqolomba wezihange."
Mark11:18 Beva ababhali nababingeleli abakhulu; baye befuna ukuba bangathini na ukumtshabalalisa; kuba babemoyika yena, ngokuba indimbane yonke ibikhwankqisiwe yimfundiso yakhe."
Mark11:19 Kwathi kwakuhlwa, waphuma waya ngaphandle komzi."
Mark11:20 Kwakusa, xa babedlula, bawubona umkhiwane womile ukususela ezingcanjini."
Mark11:21 Ekhumbule uPetros, wathi kuye, Rabhi, khangela, umkhiwane owuqalekisileyo womile."
Mark11:22 Uphendule ke uYesu wathi kubo, Yibani nokholo kuThixo."
Mark11:23 Inene ndithi kuni, Othe kule ntaba, Funquleka, uphoseke elwandle; engathandabuzi entliziyweni yakhe, asuke akholwe ukuba ezo zinto azithethayo zinokwenzeka; woba nako oko akuthethayo."
Mark11:24 Ngenxa yoko ndithi kuni izinto enisukuba nizicela, nithandaza, kholwani ukuba ninokuzamkela; noba nazo."
Mark11:25 Naxa sukuba nimi nithandaza, ukuba ninendawo ngakothile, mxoleleni, ukuze noYihlo osemazulwini anixolele iziphoso zenu."
Mark11:26 Ke, ukuba anixoleli nina, naye uYihlo osemazulwini akasayi kunixolela iziphoso zenu."
Mark11:27 Babuya beza eYerusalem; kuthi, akubon’ ukuba uyahamba etempileni, kufike kuye ababingeleli abakhulu, nababhali, namadoda amakhulu;"
Mark11:28 bathi kuye, Uzenza ezi zinto ngagunya lini na? Ngubani na okunike eli gunya lokwenza ezi zinto?"
Mark11:29 Waphendula ke uYesu wathi kubo, Nam ndiya kunibuza zwi-nye, ze nindiphendule; ndonixelela ke, ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto."
Mark11:30 Ubhaptizo lukaYohane lwaluphuma emazulwini, lwaluphuma ebantwini, sini na? ndiphendule."
Mark11:31 Bacamanga ke bona bodwa, besithi, Ukuba sithe, Lwaluphuma emazulwini; Wothi, Ibiyini na phofu ukuba ningakholwa nguye?"
Mark11:32 Ukuba ke sithe, Lwaphuma ebantwini; baye besoyika abantu; kuba bonke babebambe ukuthi uYohane ubengumprofeti inene."
Mark11:33 Baphendula bathi kuYesu, Asazi. Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Nam ke andinixeleli ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto."
Mark12:1 Waza waqala ukuthetha nabo ngemizekeliso. Ubani watyala isidiliya, wasibiyela ngothango, wemba isixovulelo seediliya, wakha inyango, waqeshisa ngaso kubalimi, wahambela kwelinye."
Mark12:2 Wathi ngelo xesha, wathuma umkhonzi kubalimi abo, ukuba amkele kubalimi esiqhameni sesidiliya eso."
Mark12:3 Basuka bona bambamba, bamtyabula, bamndulula elambatha."
Mark12:4 Wabuya wathuma kubo omnye umkhonzi; lowo bamgibisela ngamatye, bamngxwelerha entloko, bamndulula ehlazekile."
Mark12:5 Wabuya wathuma omnye; naye bambulala, nabanye abaninzi; inxenye beyityabula, inxenye beyibulala."
Mark12:6 Uthe ngoko, esenaye unyana emnye, intanda yakhe, wamthuma naye kubo ukugqibela, esithi, Baya kumhlonela yena unyana wam."
Mark12:7 Kodwa abo balimi bathetha bodwa besithi, Yindlalifa le; yizani simbulale, libe lelethu ilifa."
Mark12:8 Bamthabatha ke, bambulala, bamkhuphela ngaphandle kwesidiliya."
Mark12:9 Uya kwenza ntoni na ke ngoko umninisidiliya? Uya kufika abatshabalalise abo balimi, asinikele kubambi isidiliya eso."
Mark12:10 Anisilesanga na esi sibhalo; Ilitye abalicekisayo abakhi, Lelona laba yintloko yembombo;"
Mark12:11 Le nto yenziwe yiNkosi, yaye iyamangalisa emehlweni ethu?"
Mark12:12 Baza bafuna ukumbamba, basuka boyika izihlwele, kuba baqonda ukuba uwuthethe ngabo lo mzekeliso. Bamshiya bemka."
Mark12:13 Bathumela kuye abathile bakubaFarisi bakumaHerode, ukuze bambambise ngokuthetha kwakhe."
Mark12:14 Befikile ke bona, bathi kuye, Mfundisi, siyazi ukuba uyinene, kanjalo akukhathali nangubani; kuba akukhethi buso bamntu, indlela kaThixo ufundisa ngayo ngenyaniso, kuKesare, akunjalo?"
Mark12:15 Sirhole, okanye masingaphi? Ke yena, ekwazi ukuhanahanisa kwabo, wathi kubo, Nindilingelani na? Ndiziseleni idenariyo, ndiyibone."
Mark12:16 Bayizisa. Athi kubo, Ngokabani na lo mfanekiso nombhalo? Bathi ke bona kuye, NgokaKesare."
Mark12:17 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Nikelani kaloku izinto zikaKesare kuKesare, nezinto zikaThixo kuThixo. Baye bemangaliswa nguye."
Mark12:18 Kwafika kuye nabaSadusi, bona abo bathi akukho luvuko; bambuza, besithi."
Mark12:19 Mfundisi, uMosis wasibhalela wathi: “Ukuba ozalana nothile uthe wafa waza washiya umfazi wakhe waza akashiya bantwana, makathi umzalwana wakhe amzeke umfazi wakhe, amvelisele imbewu ozalana naye."
Mark12:20 Ke bekukho abantu abasixhenxe bezalana; waza owokuqala wazeka umfazi, wafa akashiya mbewu."
Mark12:21 Uthe ke owesibini wamzeka, wafa, akashiya mbewu; nowesithathu wenjenjalo."
Mark12:22 Bamzeka ke bosixhenxe; abashiya mbewu. Ekugqibeleni kwabo bonke, wafa naye umfazi."
Mark12:23 Ngoko eluvukweni, uya kuba ngumfazi wawuphi na kubo? kuba bosixhenxe babenaye engumfazi."
Mark12:24 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Anilahleki na, ngenxa yokuba ningazazi izibhalo kwanamandla kaThixo?"
Mark12:25 Kuba, xa bathe babuya bavuka kwabafileyo, abazeki, abendiswa; banjengezithunywa ezisemazulwini."
Mark12:26 Ngokusingisele kwabafileyo, ukuba baya kuvuka, anilesanga na encwadini kaMoses, ethetha ngetyholo, okokuba wathi uThixo kuye, Mna ndinguThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi?"
Mark12:27 AkaThixo wabafileyo, unguThixo wabaphilileyo. Nina ke ngoko niyalahleka kakhulu."
Mark12:28 Kwafika omnye wakubabhali; wabeva bebuzana; waqonda ukuba ubaphendule kakuhle. Wambuza esithi, Owona mthetho uphambili kuyo yonke nguwuphi na?"
Mark12:29 Wamphendula uYesu wathi, Owona ungaphambili kuyo yonke imithetho ngulo: Yiva, Sirayeli; iNkosi uThixo wethu yiNkosi enye;"
Mark12:30 uze uyithande ke iNkosi uThixo wakho ngentliziyo yakho iphela, nangomphefumlo wakho uphela, nangengqondo yakho iphela, nangamandla akho ephela. Nguwo lo wokuqala umthetho."
Mark12:31 Owesibini ke ufana nawo: Uze umthande ummelwane wakho ngoko uzithanda ngako. Akukho mthetho wumbi mkhulu kunale.
Mark12:32 Wathi umbhali kuye, Ngxatsho ke, Mfundisi, uthethe inyaniso; ngokuba mnye uThixo; akukho wumbi, nguye yedwa;"
Mark12:33 nokuthi umthande yena ngentliziyo iphela, nangengqiqo iphela, nangomphefumlo uphela, nangamandla ephela, nokuthi umthande ummelwane wakho njengoko uzithanda ngako, kungaphezu kwawo onke amadini atshiswayo kuphele, kwanemibingelelo."
Mark12:34 uYesu embonile ukuba uphendule ngengqiqo, wathi kuye, Akukude wena ebukumkanini bukaThixo. Akwabakho namnye waba nabuganga bakumbuza nto."
Mark12:35 Waphendula uYesu, efundisa etempileni, wathi, Batsho ngani na ababhali ukuthi, uKristu ngunyana kaDavide?"
Mark12:36 Kuba uDavide ngokwakhe wathi ngoMoya oyiNgcwele, Yathi iNkosi eNkosini yam, Hlala ngasekunene kwam, Ndide iintshaba zakho ndizenze isihlalo seenyawo zakho."
Mark12:37 uDavide ngoko ngokwakhe umbiza ngokuthi, Nkosi; Kuvela phi na ke ukuba ngunyana wakhe? Yaye indimbane yamva ngovuyo."
Mark12:38 Wayesithi kubo ekufundiseni kwakhe, Balumkeleni ababhali, abathanda ukuhamba ngeengubo ezinde, nemibuliso ezindaweni zembutho,"
Mark12:39 nezihlalo eziphambili ezindlwini zesikhungu, neendawo eziphambili ezidlweni;"
Mark12:40 abadla izindlu zabahlolokazi, baze ngokunyhwalaza bathandaze uzungu; abo baya kwamkela ugwebo olugqithiseleyo."
Mark12:41 uYesu wayehleli malungana nomkhumbi wokulondoloza imali, ekhangela indlela abantu abaphosa ngayo imali emkhumbini wokulondoloza imali; zaye izityebi ezininzi ziphosa kakhulu."
Mark12:42 Kwafika mhlolokazi uthile ulihlwempu, waphosa iimalanana zambini eziyikodrante."
Mark12:43 Ebabizele kuye abafundi bakhe, wathi kubo, Inene ndithi kuni, Lo mhlolokazi ulihlwempu uphose ngaphezu kwabo bonke abaphosileyo emkhumbini wokulondoloza imali;"
Mark12:44 kuba bonke baphose bethabatha kwikhupha labo; ukanti yena ekusweleni kwakhe uphose yonke into abenayo, impilo yakhe yonke."
Mark13:1 Kwakubon’ ukuba uyaphuma etempileni, uthi omnye umfundi wakhe kuye, Mfundisi, uyawabona na la matye angaka, nezi zakhiwo zingaka?"
Mark13:2 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Uyazibona na ezi zakhiwo zikhulu? Akusayi kusala litye phezu kwelitye, elingayi kuchithwa."
Mark13:3 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba uhleli eNtabeni yemiNquma, malunga netempile, bambuza ngasese uPetros, noYakobi, noYohane, noAndreya, besithi,"
Mark13:4 Sixelele ukuba ziya kubakho nini na ezo zinto? uya kuba yini na umqondiso, xa zonke ezo zinto ziya kuzaliseka?"
Mark13:5 Wabaphendula uYesu waqala ukuthi, Lumkani ningalahlekiswa mntu;"
Mark13:6 Kuba baninzi abaya kuza egameni lam, besithi, banguye uKristu; balahlekise abantu abaninzi."
Mark13:7 Xa nithe neva iimfazwe namarhe eemfazwe, musani kuba navuso; kanti kona ukuphela akukabikho."
Mark13:8 Kuba uhlanga luya kuvukelana nohlanga, nobukumkani buvukelane nobukumkani; kuya kubakho iinyikima zomhlaba kwiindawo ngeendawo; kuya kubakho neendlala neenkathazeko; ziingqaleko ke zenimba ezo."
Mark13:9 Zilumkeleni ke okwenu; kuba baya kuninikela ezintlanganisweni zamatyala; Niya kubethwa ezindlwini zesikhungu, nimiswe phambi kwabalawuli nookumkani ngenxa yam, kube bubungqina kubo."
Mark13:10 Kumele ukuthi ke ukuqala kuvakaliswe iindaba ezilungileyo ezi kuzo zonke iintlanga.
Mark13:11 Xa sukuba ke benirhola, beninikela, musani ukuyixhalela kwangaphambili into eniya kuyithetha, ningacamangi nokucamanga; uMoya oyiNgcwele."
Mark13:12 Ke kaloku umzalwana uya kunikela umzalwana ekufeni, aze uyise anikele unyana; bathi nabantwana bavukelane nabazali, bababulalise;"
Mark13:13 niya kuthiywa ngabantu bonke ngenxa yegama lam; kodwa onyamezeleyo kwada kwaba sekupheleni, lowo uya kusindiswa."
Mark13:14 Ke kaloku, xa nithe nalibona isikizi lesiphanziso, ekwakuthethwa lona ngoDaniyeli umprofeti, limi apho lingamele ukuba likhona (umfundi makaqiqe), ngelo xesha mabathi abo bakwelakwaYuda basabele ezintabeni;"
Mark13:15 Ophezu kwendlu ke makangehli aye endlwini, angangeni aye kuthabatha into endlwini yakhe;"
Mark13:16 Nalowo usentsimini makangabuyeli emva, aye kuthabatha ingubo yakhe."
Mark13:17 Yeha ke, abamithiyo nabanyisayo ngaloo mihla!"
Mark13:18 Thandazani ke, ukuba intsabo yenu ingabi sebusika."
Mark13:19 Kuba yona loo mihla iya kuba yimbandezelo, engazanga ibekho enjalo kwasekuqalekeni kwendalo awayidalayo uThixo, kwada kwakalokunje;"
Mark13:20 Kanjalo ukuba iNkosi ibingayinqamlelanga loo mihla, bekungayi kubakho mntu usindayo; koko ithe ngenxa yabanyulwa ebanyulileyo, yayinqamlela imihla leyo."
Mark13:21 Ngelo xa ke, ukuba ubani uthe kuni, Nanku apha uKristu; nanko ekho; musani ukukholwa nguye;"
Mark13:22 Kuba kuya kuvela ooKristu ababuxoki, nabaprofeti ababuxoki, benze imiqondiso nemimangaliso yokulahlekisa nabanyuliweyo, ukuba bekunokwenzeka."
Mark13:23 Lumkani ke nina; yabonani, ndinixelele izinto zonke ngenxa engaphambili."
Mark13:24 Ngaloo mihla, emva kwaloo mbandezelo, ilanga liya kwenziwa mnyama, ithi nenyanga ingabi mhlophe ukukhanya kwayo;"
Mark13:25 Iinkwenkwezi zezulu ziya kuwa, athi namandla asezulwini azanyazanyiswe."
Mark13:26 Baya kumbona ke ngelo xesha uNyana woMntu esiza esemafini, enamandla amakhulu nobuqaqawuli."
Mark13:27 Uya kuzithuma ngelo xesha izithunywa zakhe, abahlanganisele ndawonye abanyulwa bakhe, baphume kumacala omane omoya, kuthabathele esiphelweni somhlaba, kuse esiphelweni sezulu."
Mark13:28 Fundani kuwo umkhiwane umzekeliso; xa selithe lathamba isebe lawo, lahluma amagqabi, niyazi ukuba likufuphi ihlobo."
Mark13:29 Ngokukwanjalo nani, xa nithe nazibona ezo zinto zisihla, yazini ukuba kukufuphi, sekusemnyango."
Mark13:30 Inene ndithi kuni, Asisayi kudlula esi sizukulwana, zingadanga zonke ezo zinto zibekho."
Mark13:31 Liya kudlula izulu nehlabathi, kodwa amazwi am akayi kudlula."
Mark13:32 Kodwa akukho bani uwaziyo loo mhla nelo lixa, azazi nezithunywa ezisemazulwini, akazi noNyana lo, kuphela nguYise."
Mark13:33 Lumkani, hlalani nilindile, nithandaze; ngokuba anilazi ukuba linini na ixesha elo;"
Mark13:34 njengokuba wathi umntu ehambela kwelinye, eshiya indlu yakhe, wabanika igunya abakhonzi bakhe, elowo wamnika umsebenzi wakhe, waza umgcini-mnyango wamwisela umthetho ukuba alinde."
Mark13:35 Phaphani ngoko, ngokuba ningakwazi ukuba kunini na ukuza komninindlu: kuko ngokuhlwa, kuko phakathi kobusuku, kuko ekulileni kweenkuku, kuko kusasa;"
Mark13:36 hleze afike ngebhaqo, anifumane nilele."
Mark13:37 Oko ndikutsho kuni, ndikutsho kubo bonke, Lindani."
Mark14:1 Ke kaloku bekuza kubakho ipasika, izonka ezingenagwele, emveni kweentsuku ezimbini; baye ke ababingeleli abakhulu nababhali befuna ukuba bangathini na ukumbamba ngenkohliso, bambulale."
Mark14:2 Babesithi ke, Kungabi ngomthendeleko, hleze kubekho isaqunge ebantwini."
Mark14:3 Kuthe eseBhetani, endlwini kaSimon owayeneqhenqa, akubon’ ukuba uhleli, kweza umfazi enehlala lelabhastile, linamafutha enadusi engangxengelelweyo, exabiso likhulu; walityumza iselwa, wamgalela entloko."
Mark14:4 Kwaye ke kukho abathile abacaphukayo phakathi kwabo, besithi, Yenzelweni na le nkcitho yamafutha aqholiweyo?"
Mark14:5 Kuba la mafutha bekungathengiswa ngawo ngeedenariyo ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amathathu, kuphiwe amahlwempu. Baye bamkrokrela."
Mark14:6 Uthe ke uYesu, Myekeni; yini na ukuba nimkhathaze? Undenzele umsebenzi omhle."
Mark14:7 Kuba amahlwempu lawo nihleli ninawo, nize xa sukuba nithanda, nibe nako ukuwenzela okulungileyo; ke mna anihleli ninam."
Mark14:8 Yena ukwenzile abenako; uphange weza wawuthambisela ukungcwatywa umzimba wam.
Mark14:9 Inene ndithi kuni, Apho zithe zavakaliswa khona ezi ndaba zilungileyo kulo lonke ihlabathi, iya kuxelwa nayo le nto ayenzileyo yena, ibe sisikhumbuzo ngaye."
Mark14:10 uYuda Sikariyoti, omnye kwabeshumi elinababini, wesuka waya kubabingeleli abakhulu, ukuba amnikele kubo."
Mark14:11 Bakuva ke oko, bavuya, bamthembisa ngokumnika imali. Wayefuna ukuba angathini na ukumnikela ngexesha elimlungeleyo."
Mark14:12 Ke kaloku, ngowokuqala umhla wezonka ezingenagwele, xa bekubingelelwa imvana yepasika, bathi kuye abafundi bakhe, Unga singaya kulungisa phi na, ukuze uyidle ipasika?"
Mark14:13 Ususa babini kubafundi bakhe, athi kubo, Hambani niye kuwo umzi; nohlangatyezwa ngumntu ethwele umphanda wamanzi; mlandeleni."
Mark14:14 Xa athe angena, nothi kumninindlu, Uthi uMfundisi, Liphi na igumbi labahambi, apho ndingadlela khona ipasika nabafundi bam?"
Mark14:15 Yena wonibonisa igumbi eliphezulu, elikhulu, landlelwe lalungiswa; silungiseleleni apho."
Mark14:16 Baphuma abafundi bakhe abo baya kungena kuwo umzi, bafumana kunjengoko wayebaxelele, bayilungisa ipasika."
Mark14:17 Kwathi kwakuhlwa, eze nabalishumi elinababini."
Mark14:18 Bakubon’ ukuba bahleli, bayadla, wathi uYesu, Inene, ndithi kuni, omnye kuni aba uya kundingcatsha, lowo ke udla nam."
Mark14:19 Baqala ke ukuba buhlungu, nokuthi kuye ngabanye, Ingaba ndim, yini na? Wathi omnye, Ingaba ndim na?"
Mark14:20 Uphendule ke wathi kubo, Ngomnye kwabeshumi elinababini, lowo ke uthi nkxu nam esityeni."
Mark14:21 uNyana woMntu uyemka okunene, njengoko kubhalwe ngaye; yeha ke, loo mntu uNyana woMntu angcatshwa nguye! Ngekumlungele ukuba ebengazalwanga loo mntu."
Mark14:22 Bakubon’ ukuba bayadla, uYesu wasithabatha isonka, wathi akusikelela, waqhekeza, wabanika, wathi, Thabathani nidle; ngumzimba wam lo."
Mark14:23 Wayithabatha nendebe, wabulela, wabanika; basela kuyo bonke."
Mark14:24 Wathi kubo, Ligazi lam eli lomnqophiso omtsha, eliphalala ngenxa yabaninzi."
Mark14:25 Inene ndithi kuni, Andisayi kubuya ndisele esiqhameni somdiliya, kude kube yiloo mini sukuba ndisisela sisitsha ebukumkanini bukaThixo."
Mark14:26 Bakuba bevume ingoma yokubonga, baphuma baya eNtabeni yemiNquma."
Mark14:27 Athi kubo uYesu, Nonke niya kukhubeka ngam ngobu busuku; ngokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ndiya kubetha kumalusi, zichithwachithwe izimvu."
Mark14:28 Ke emveni kokuvuka kwam, ndiya kunandulela, ndiye kwelaseGalili."
Mark14:29 Wathi ke uPetros kuye, Nokuba baya kukhubeka bonke, mna nakanye."
Mark14:30 Athi uYesu kuye, Inene ndithi kuwe, namhlanje, kwangobu busuku, ingekalili kabini inkuku, uya kundikhanyela kathathu."
Mark14:31 Kwaba kukhona wathetha wancamisa, esithi, Ndingafanelana ndimelwe kukufa nawe, andingekhe ndikukhanyele. Kwangokunjalo batsho nabo bonke."
Mark14:32 Bafika kumhlatyana ogama liyiGetsemane. Athi kubafundi bakhe, Hlalani phantsi apha, ndikhe ndithandaze;"
Mark14:33 Wathabatha uPetros noYakobi noYohane, waqala ukuba buhlungu nokudandatheka kakhulu."
Mark14:34 Athi kubo, Umphefumlo wam ubuhlungu kakhulu, ngokokude ube sekufeni; hlalani apha nilinde."
Mark14:35 Ehambele phambili umganyana, wawa emhlabeni, wathandazela, ukuba kunokwenzeka, lidlule kuye ilixa elo."
Mark14:36 Wayesithi, Abha, Bawo, zonke izinto zinokwenzeka kuwe; yigqithise kum le ndebe; noko ke makungabi kokuthandwa ndim, makube kokuthandwa nguwe."
Mark14:37 Uyeza, abafumane belele; athi kuPetros, Simon, ulele na? Ubungenakulinda na nelixa libe linye?"
Mark14:38 Lindani nithandaze, ukuze ningangeni ekuhendweni; umoya okunene unentumekelelo, ke yona inyama ithambile."
Mark14:39 Wabuya wemka wathandaza, ethetha kwalona elo lizwi."
Mark14:40 Uthe akubuya wabafumana bebuye balala, kuba amehlo abo ayenzima bubuthongo; baye bengazi into abangamphendula yona."
Mark14:41 Ubuye okwesithathu, athi kubo, Lalani ngoku niphumle. Kwanele, ilixa lifikile; yabonani, uNyana woMntu uyanikelwa ezandleni zaboni."
Mark14:42 Vukani, sihambe; yabonani, lowo undingcatshayo usondele."
Mark14:43 Kwaoko, esathetha, uthi qatha uYuda, owayengoweshumi elinababini, enendimbane enkulu, inamakrele neentonga, isuka kubo ababingeleli abakhulu, nakubabhali, nakuwo amadoda amakhulu."
Mark14:44 Ke kaloku lowo umngcatshayo ubebanike umqondiso, esithi, Endithe ndamanga, nguye; mbambeni, nimrhole nimnqandile."
Mark14:45 Efikile, uye kuye kwaoko, athi, Rabhi, Rabhi; wamanga."
Mark14:46 Baza bamsa izandla, bambamba."
Mark14:47 Uthe ke omnye kwababemi khona, warhola ikrele, wamxabela umkhonzi wombingeleli omkhulu, wamnqamla indlebe."
Mark14:48 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Niphumele ukuza kubamba mna na, ninamakrele neentonga nje, nanga niphumele isihange?"
Mark14:49 Bendinani imihla ngemihla etempileni ndifundisa, anandibamba; kodwa kunje, ukuze zizaliseke izibhalo."
Mark14:50 Bamshiya ke bonke, babaleka."
Mark14:51 Walandelwa yindodana ethile, ithe yambu ilinen entle emzimbeni; abafana bambamba."
Mark14:52 Ithe yayilahla ilinen entle leyo, yabaleka kubo ize."
Mark14:53 Bamrholela uYesu kumbingeleli omkhulu, bahlanganisana kuye bonke ababingeleli abakhulu, namadoda amakhulu, nababhali."
Mark14:54 Waza uPetros wamlandela, ebekele kude, wada waya ngaphakathi entendelezweni yendlu yombingeleli omkhulu; waye ehleli phantsi ndawonye namadindala, esotha umlilo."
Mark14:55 Baye ke ababingeleli abakhulu, nayo intlanganiso yamatyala iphelele, befuna ubungqina ngaye uYesu bokuze bambulalise; akafumana nto."
Mark14:56 Kuba babebaninzi ababengqina ubuxoki ngaye, baye ubungqina babo bungayelelani."
Mark14:57 Besuka ke abathile, bengqina ubuxoki ngaye, besithi,"
Mark14:58 Thina samva yena esithi, Mna ndiya kuyichitha le tempile yenziweyo ngezandla, ndize ngeentsuku ezintathu ndakhe enye engenziwe ngazandla."
Mark14:59 Baye bungayelelani kwangokunjalo nobabo ubungqina.
Mark14:60 Wesuka wema phakathi umbingeleli omkhulu, wambuza uYesu, esithi, Akuphenduli nento le na? bangqina ntoni na aba ngawe?"
Mark14:61 Wahlala wathi tu, akaphendula. Wabuya umbingeleli omkhulu wambuza, wathi kuye, Unguye na uKristu, uNyana waLowo ungowokubongwa?"
Mark14:62 Uthe ke uYesu, Ndinguye; niya kumbona nokumbona uNyana woMntu, ehleli ngasekunene kwamandla, esiza esemafini ezulu."
Mark14:63 Usuka ke umbingeleli omkhulu azikrazule iingubo zakhe, athi, Sisawafunelani na amangqina?"
Mark14:64 Nikuvile ukunyelisa; nithini na nina? Bamgweba ke bonke ukuba unetyala lokuba afe.
Mark14:65 Yaqala inxenye ukumtshicela, nokumgqubuthela ubuso, nokumntlitha, nokuthi kuye, Profeta; aza amadindala ammbetha."
Mark14:66 Kuthi, akubon’ ukuba uPetros usentendelezweni ezantsi, kweza esinye sezicakazana zombingeleli omkhulu."
Mark14:67 Ithi yakumbona uPetros esotha, yamjonga, yathi, Nawe ubunaye uYesu waseNazarete."
Mark14:68 Wakhanyela ke esithi, Andiyazi, andiyiqondi kanye into oyithethayo wena. Waphuma waya evarandeni; yalila inkuku."
Mark14:69 Waphinda umkhonzazana wambona, waqala ukuthi kwababemi khona, Lo ngowakubo."
Mark14:70 Waphinda wakhanyela. Kwakuba mzuzwana, babuya abo babemi khona bathi kuPetros, Inyaniso, ungowabo; kuba ungowaseGalili, nokuthetha kwakho kuyafana nokwabo."
Mark14:71 Waqala ke ukushwabula nokufunga, esithi, Andimazi loo mntu nimthethayo."
Mark14:72 Yalila okwesibini inkuku. Walikhumbula ke uPetros ilizwi, abelithethile uYesu kuye, lokuthi, Ingekalili kabini inkuku, uya kundikhanyela kathathu. Wathi akucinga, walila."
Mark15:1 Bathi, kwaoko kwakusa, ababingeleli abakhulu benza ibhunga, ndawonye namadoda amakhulu, nababhali, nentlanganiso yamatyala iphelele; bambopha uYesu bemka naye, bamnikela kuPilato."
Mark15:2 Wambuza ke uPilato, esithi, Wena unguye na uKumkani wamaYuda? Waphendula ke wathi kuye, Nawe utsho."
Mark15:3 Bammangalela ke ngeendawo ezininzi ababingeleli abakhulu; kodwa yena akaphendulanga nento.
Mark15:4 Wabuya ke uPilato wambuza, esithi, Akuphenduli nento le? Khangela ukuba zininzi kwazo iindawo abazingqina ngawe."
Mark15:5 Kodwa uYesu akabanga saphendula nto; ngokokude amangaliswe uPilato.
Mark15:6 Ke kaloku ngomthendeleko wayebakhululela umbanjwa abe mnye, abasukuba bemcela."
Mark15:7 Kwaye kukho ke obekuthiwa nguBharabhas, ebotshwe ndawonye nabanye abenzi besaqunge, ababulalayo nokubulala esaqungeni apho."
Mark15:8 Sankqangaza isihlwele, saqala ukucela, ukuba enze ngoko abehlala esenza ngako kubo."
Mark15:9 Wabaphendula ke uPilato, esithi, Nithanda ukuba ndinikhululele ukumkani wamaYuda na?"
Mark15:10 Kuba ebesazi ukuba ababingeleli abakhulu abo bamnikele ngomona.
Mark15:11 Ke bona ababingeleli abakhulu bayixhokonxa indimbane, ukuba icele ukuba kanye abakhululele uBharabhas."
Mark15:12 Waphinda waphendula ke uPilato, wathi kubo, Ningamenza ntoni na ke ngoko kulowo nithi unguKumkani wamaYuda?"
Mark15:13 Babuya ke bankqangaza bathi, Mbethelele emnqamlezweni!"
Mark15:14 Wathi ke uPilato kubo, Kuba enze bubi buni na? Kwaba kukhona ke bancamisayo ukunkqangaza, besithi, Mbethelele emnqamlezweni!"
Mark15:15 Kwathi ngoko uPilato, enga angasiyenelisa isihlwele, wabakhululela uBharabhas; wamnikela uYesu, akuba emtyakatyile, ukuba abethelelwe emnqamlezweni."
Mark15:16 Aza amasoldati amrholela entendelezweni, ebizwa ngokuba yirhuluneli; balibizele ndawonye ibutho lonke."
Mark15:17 Bamambesa iingubo ezimfusa, baluluka isithsaba sameva, bamfaka ngaso entloko."
Mark15:18 Baza bathi kuye, Vuya, Kumkani wamaYuda!"
Mark15:19 Ayembetha entloko ngengcongolo; ayemtshicela; ayeguqa ngamadolo, aqubude kuye."
Mark15:20 Athi akuba edlale ngaye, amhluba ebomvu, amambathisa kwaezakhe iingubo; amrhola, aya kumbethelela emnqamlezweni."
Mark15:21 Anyanzela umhambi othile, uSimon waseKirene, evela ephandleni, lowo nguyise ka-Alesandire noRufo, ukuba awuthwale umnqamlezo wakhe."
Mark15:22 Amzisa endaweni yaseGolgota, oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, yindawo yokakayi."
Mark15:23 Ayemnika iwayini enemore, ukuba ayisele; kodwa akayamkelanga."
Mark15:24 Athi, akumbethelela emnqamlezweni, abelana ngeengubo zakhe, esenza amaqashiso ngazo, ukuba ulowo uya kuthabatha ntoni na."
Mark15:25 Laye ke ilixa lesithathu, bambethelela emnqamlezweni."
Mark15:26 Umbhalo wesimangalo sakhe wawubhalwe ngaphezulu, wawusithi, UKUMKANI WAMAYUDA."
Mark15:27 Kwaye kubethelelwe kunye naye eminqamlezweni izihange ezibini; omnye ngasekunene kwakhe, nomnye ngasekhohlo kwakhe."
Mark15:28 Saza sazaliseka isibhalo esithi, Wabalwa nabanxaxha."
Mark15:29 Bamnyelisa ke abadlulayo, behlunguzela iintloko zabo, besithi, Yeha, wena uchitha itempile, uyakhe ngeentsuku ezintathu!"
Mark15:30 Zisindise, uhle emnqamlezweni."
Mark15:31 Ngokukwanjalo nababingeleli abaziintloko bahlekisa ngabo kunye nababhali, besithi: “Abanye wabasindisa; yena ngokwakhe akanako ukuzisindisa."
Mark15:32 uKristu, uKumkani wakwaSirayeli, makehle kalokunje emnqamlezweni, ukuze sibone, sikholwe. Baye nabo babebethelelwe eminqamlezweni kunye naye bemnyelisa."
Mark15:33 Ke kaloku, lakuba lilixa lesithandathu, kwehla ubumnyama phezu kwawo umhlaba uphela, kwada kwalilixa lesithoba."
Mark15:34 Ngelixa lesithoba wadanduluka uYesu ngezwi elikhulu, esithi, Eloyi, Eloyi, lama sabhaktani? Oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, Thixo wam, Thixo wam, undishiye ngani na?"
Mark15:35 Inxenye ke yababemi khona yakuva yathi, Niyabona, ubiza uEliya."
Mark15:36 Wagidima ke omnye, wazalisa imfunxa ngeviniga, wayifaka engcongolweni, wamseza, esithi, Khaniyeke; Makhe sibone ukuba uEliya uza kumthula na."
Mark15:37 Wadanduluka ngelizwi elikhulu uYesu, wawunikela umoya wakhe."
Mark15:38 Lathi ikhuselo lengcwele lakrazuka kubini, lithabathela phezulu lada lesa phantsi."
Mark15:39 Ebonile ke umthetheli-khulu obemi malunga naye, ukuba wenjenjalo ukudanduluka waphuma umphefumlo, uthe, Inyaniso, lo mntu ubenguNyana kaThixo."
Mark15:40 Kwakukho ke nabafazi, bekhangele bemgama; phakathi kwabo kwakukho uMariya waseMagadala, noMariya unina wooYakobi omnci nokaYose, kwanoSalome;"
Mark15:41 ababesithi, oko ebeseGalili, bamlandele, bamlungiselele; kwanabanye abaninzi, ababenyuke naye ukuya eYerusalem."
Mark15:42 Ke kaloku, kwakuhlwa, ngokuba kwakuyimini yokulungiselela, oko kukuthi, umhla ongaphambi kwesabatha,"
Mark15:43 kweza uYosefu, owaseArimati, umphakathi obekekileyo, owayebulindile naye ubukumkani bukaThixo; waya kungena ngobuganga kuPilato, wacela umzimba kaYesu."
Mark15:44 Wamangaliswa ke uPilato kukuba selefile. Ebizele kuye umthetheli-khulu, wambuza ukuba uselenexesha na efile."
Mark15:45 Ekwazile ke kumthetheli-khulu, wawunikela uYosefu umzimba."
Mark15:46 Yena, ethenge ilinen ecikizekileyo, wamthula, wamsongela kwilinen entle; wamlalisa engcwabeni elixholwe eweni; waqengqela ilitye emnyango wengcwaba."
Mark15:47 Babona ke ooMariya waseMagadala, noMariya unina kaYose, apho wayebekwe khona."
Mark16:1 Yakubon’ ukuba idlule isabatha, ooMariya waseMagadala, noMariya unina kaYakobi, noSalome, bathenga ubulawu, ukuba beze bamthambise."
Mark16:2 Kwathi, kwakusa, ngolokuqala usuku lweveki, beza engcwabeni, ukuphuma kwelanga."
Mark16:3 Baye bethetha bodwa, besithi, Ngubani na oya kusiqengqela ilitye, lisuke emnyango wengcwaba?"
Mark16:4 Bathi bakukhangela, babona ukuba liqengqiwe lesuka ilitye; kuba belilikhulu kakhulu."
Mark16:5 Bakuba bengenile engcwabeni, babona umfana ehleli ngasekunene, ambethe ingubo ende emhlophe; basuka boyika."
Mark16:6 Athi kubo, Musani ukuqhiphuka umbilini; nifuna uYesu waseNazarete, obebethelelwe emnqamlezweni; Akakho apha; nantsi indawo ababembeke kuyo."
Mark16:7 Hambani ke niye, nibaxelele abafundi bakhe noPetros ukuthi, uyanandulela ukuya kwelaseGalili; nombona khona apho, njengokuba wayetshilo kuni."
Mark16:8 Baphuma kamsinya, babaleka engcwabeni; Baye ke bengcangcazela bakhwankqiswa; abathetha nto nakubani; kuba bebesoyika."
Mark16:9 Uthe ke uYesu, evuke ekufeni kusasa ngolokuqala usuku lweveki, wabonakala kuqala kuMariya waseMagadala, awayekhuphe kuye iidemon zasixhenxe."
Mark16:10 Waya yena wabikela ababenaye, bakubon’ ukuba bakhedamile, bayalila."
Mark16:11 Basuka nabo, bakuva ukuba uhleli, nokuba ukhe wabonwa nguye, abakholwa."
Mark16:12 Emva koko wabonakala ngolunye uhlobo kwababini bakubo, behamba besinga emaphandleni."
Mark16:13 Nabo baya babikela abanye;
Mark16:14 Emva koko wabonakala kwabalishumi elinamnye, behleli ngasesithebeni; wakungcikiva ukungakholwa kwabo, nobulukhuni beentliziyo zabo, ngokuba bengakholwanga ngabo babembonile evukile."
Mark16:15 Wathi kubo, Hambani niye kulo lonke ihlabathi, nizishumayele iindaba ezilungileyo kuyo yonke indalo."
Mark16:16 Lowo ukholiweyo wabhaptizwa, wosindiswa; ke yena ongakholwayo, uya kugwetywa."
Mark16:17 Imiqondiso ke eya kulandelana nabo bakholwayo; Egameni lam baya kukhupha iidemon; baya kuthetha ngeelwimi ezintsha;
Mark16:18 baya kuphatha iinyoka; nokuba bathe basela into ebulalayo, ayisayi kukha ibenzakalise bona; baya kubeka izandla phezu kwemilwelwe, iphile."
Mark16:19 Ithe ngoko yona iNkosi, emveni kokuthetha kubo, yanyuselwa emazulwini, yahlala ngasekunene kukaThixo."
Mark16:20 Ke bona baphuma, bavakalisa ezindaweni zonke, iNkosi isebenza nabo, iliqinisela ilizwi ngemiqondiso. Amen."
Luke1:1 Ekubeni ke bebaninzi abasa isandla sabo, ukuyibeka eludwengeni udaba olukholiweyo phakathi kwethu,"
Luke1:2 njengokuba basinikelayo abo bathi kwasekuqalekeni baba ngamangqina okuzibonela, nabakhonzi balo ilizwi;"
Luke1:3 Kwabonakala kulungile nakum, ndizazi zonke izinto, kwasekuqaleni, ukuba ndikubhalele ngokulandelelana kwazo, Tiyofilo odume kunene,"
Luke1:4 ukuze uyazi kakuhle ingqiniseko yezo zinto uzifundisisiweyo.
Luke1:5 Ngemihla kaHerode ukumkani wakwaJuda, kwakukho umbingeleli othile, ogama linguZakariya, engoweqela lika-Abhiya, nomfazi wakhe engoweentombi zika-Aron, igama lakhe linguElizabhete."
Luke1:6 Bebengamalungisa ke bobabini emehlweni kaThixo, behamba ngayo yonke imithetho nemimiselo yeNkosi, bengenakusoleka."
Luke1:7 Baye bengenamntwana, ngokokuba uElizabhete ebengazali, kanjalo bobabini babesebekhulile."
Luke1:8 Ke kaloku kwathi, xa wayesenza ububingeleli ngokweqela lakhe, phambi koThixo."
Luke1:9 Ngokwesiko lobubingeleli, kwaba liqashiso lakhe ukuba aqhumisele ngesiqhumiso, xa angenayo etempileni yeNkosi."
Luke1:10 Yaye yonke inkitha yabantu ithandaza ngaphandle ngelixa lesiqhumiso.
Luke1:11 Kwabonakala ke kuye isithunywa seNkosi, simi ngasekunene kwesibingelelo sesiqhumiso."
Luke1:12 uZekariya wathi akumbona wakhathazeka, wangenelwa luloyiko."
Luke1:13 Sathi kuye isithunywa eso, Musa ukoyika, Zakariya, kuba umthandazo wakho uviwe; wothi ke umfazi wakho uElizabhete akuzalele unyana, umthiye igama elinguYohane."
Luke1:14 Uya kuba novuyo novuyo; bathi nabaninzi bakuvuyele ukuzalwa kwakhe.
Luke1:15 Kuba uya kuba mkhulu emehlweni eNkosi, angakhe asele wayini nasiselo sinxilisayo; uya kuzaliswa nguMoya oyiNgcwele kwasekuzalweni kwakhe."
Luke1:16 Nento eninzi ke yoonyana bakaSirayeli uya kuyibuyisela eNkosini uThixo wabo.
Luke1:17 Yena uya kuhamba phambi kobuso bayo, enomoya enamandla kaEliya, ukuba azibuyisele iintliziyo zooyise kubantwana, nabangevayo kuko ukuqonda kwamalungisa; alungisele iNkosi abantu abalungisiweyo."
Luke1:18 Wathi uZekariya kuso isithunywa, Ndiya kukwazi ngani na oko? ngokuba mna ndimdala, waye nomfazi wam selekhulile."
Luke1:19 Saphendula ke isithunywa, sathi kuye, Mna ndinguGabriyeli, oma phambi koThixo. Ndithunyiwe ukuba ndithethe kuwe, ndikushumayele ezi ndaba zilungileyo."
Luke1:20 Uyabona, uya kuba sisidenge, ungabi nako ukuthetha, kude kube yimini eziya kuthi zenzeke ngayo ezi zinto, ngenxa enokuba ungakholwanga ngamazwi am; aya kuzalisekiswa wona ngexesha lawo."
Luke1:21 Baye abantu bemlindile uZekariya, bemangalisiwe kukulibala kwakhe endaweni engcwele leyo."
Luke1:22 Uthe ke akuphuma, akaba nako ukuthetha kubo; baqonda ukuba ubone umbono endaweni engcwele apho, waye yena emana ukunqwala kubo, wahlala engathethi."
Luke1:23 Kwathi, yakuzaliseka imihla yolungiselelo lwakhe, wemka waya endlwini yakhe."
Luke1:24 Emveni ke kwezo ntsuku, uElizabhete umfazi wakhe wamitha, wazifihla iinyanga zantlanu, esithi,"
Luke1:25 Yenjenje uYehova kum ngemihla eyandikhangelayo, ukuba ndikususe ukungcikiveka kwam phakathi kwabantu."
Luke1:26 Ngenyanga yesithandathu, isithunywa esinguGabriyeli sathunyelwa nguThixo emzini welaseGalili, ogama liyiNazarete,"
Luke1:27 kwintombi, eganelwe indoda egama linguYosefu, yendlu kaDavide; laye igama lentombi leyo lalinguMariya."
Luke1:28 Sangena isithunywa kuye, sathi, Vuya, wena ubabalweyo! iNkosi inawe; usikelelwe wena phakathi kwabafazi."
Luke1:29 Uthe ke akusibona, wee qhiphu umbilini ngenxa yelizwi laso; wayecamanga ukuba ungaba mbuliso mni na lo."
Luke1:30 Sathi ke isithunywa kuye, Musa ukoyika, Mariya, kuba uThixo ukwenzela isisa."
Luke1:31 Uyabona, uya kuthabatha esizalweni, uzale unyana, umthiye igama elinguYesu."
Luke1:32 Yena uya kuba mkhulu, abizwe ngokuba nguNyana wOsenyangweni; iNkosi uThixo iya kumnika itrone kaDavide, uyise."
Luke1:33 Uya kuba ngukumkani phezu kwendlu kaYakobi kude kube ngunaphakade; ubukumkani bakhe abuyi kuba nasiphelo.
Luke1:34 Wathi ke uMariya kuso isithunywa, Kuya kuthini na ukubakho oku, ndingazani nandoda nje?"
Luke1:35 Saphendula isithunywa sathi kuye, uMoya oyiNgcwele uya kuza phezu kwakho, athi namandla Osenyangweni akusibekele; kungoko loo nto ingcwele izalwa nguwe iya kubizwa ngokuba nguNyana kaThixo."
Luke1:36 Uyabona, naye uElizabhete ozalana naye, ukhawule unyana ebudaleni bakhe; yaye le yinyanga yesithandathu kuye, lowo kwakusithiwa uludlolo."
Luke1:37 Ngokuba akukho nanye into eya kumnqabela yena uThixo.
Luke1:38 Wathi ke uMariya, Nanko umkhonzazana weNkosi; makube kum ngokwelizwi lakho. Saza isithunywa semka kuye."
Luke1:39 Ke kaloku, wesuka uMariya ngaloo mihla, wasinga kweleentaba ngobungxamo, emzini wakwaYuda;"
Luke1:40 wangena endlwini kaZekariya, wambulisa uElizabhete."
Luke1:41 Kwathi, akuwuva uElizabhete umbuliso kaMariya, lwasuka lwaxhuma usana esizalweni sakhe, uElizabhete wazala nguMoya oyiNgcwele;"
Luke1:42 Wadanduluka ngezwi elikhulu, wathi, Ùnentsikelelo wena phakathi kwabafazi; sinentsikelelo nesiqhamo sesizalo sakho."
Luke1:43 Iyintoni na ke le nto kum, ukuba eze kum unina weNkosi yam?"
Luke1:44 Kuthe, kuthe lakubakho izwi lombuliso wakho ezindlebeni zam, lwasuka lwaxhuma usana ngovuyo esizalweni sam."
Luke1:45 Unoyolo lowo wakholwayo koko, kuba kuya kubakho inzaliseko yezo zinto zithethiweyo kuye yiNkosi."
Luke1:46 Wathi ke uMariya, Umphefumlo wam uyenza nkulu iNkosi;"
Luke1:47 Nomoya wam ugcobile ngoThixo uMsindisi wam;
Luke1:48 Kuba wakukhangela ukuthobeka komkhonzazana wakhe; kuba, uyabona, ziya kuqala kwangoku ukuthi ndingonoyolo zonke izizukulwana."
Luke1:49 Ngokuba undenzele izinto ezinkulu uSomandla; lingcwele igama lakhe.
Luke1:50 Inceba yakhe ikwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana Kwabo bamoyikayo.
Luke1:51 Wenze amandla ngengalo yakhe; ubachithachithe abanekratshi ekucingeni kweentliziyo zabo.
Luke1:52 Ubathobile abanamandla ezitroneni zabo, wabaphakamisa abathobekileyo."
Luke1:53 Wahluthisa abalambileyo ngezinto ezilungileyo; wabandulula abazizityebi belambatha.
Luke1:54 Wasiza uSirayeli, umkhonzi wakhe, ngokukhumbula inceba yakhe;"
Luke1:55 Njengoko wathethayo koobawo bethu, kuAbraham nakwimbewu yakhe ngonaphakade."
Luke1:56 Wahlala ke uMariya naye iinyanga ngathi zaba ntathu, waza wabuyela endlwini yakhe."
Luke1:57 Ke kaloku, ixesha likaElizabhete lazaliseka lokuba azale; wazala unyana."
Luke1:58 Bakuva abamelwane nemizalwane yakhe, ukuba iNkosi iyenze nkulu inceba yayo kuye; baye bevuyisana naye."
Luke1:59 Kwathi ngomhla wesibhozo, beza kumalusa umntwana; Bambiza ngegama likayise uZekariya."
Luke1:60 Waphendula unina, wathi, Hayi; uya kubizwa ngokuba nguYohane."
Luke1:61 Bathi kuye, Akukho namnye ubizwa ngelo gama kwimizalwane yakho."
Luke1:62 Baye ke benqwala kuyise besithi, angathanda ukuba athiweni na ukubizwa."
Luke1:63 Wacela itafile, wabhala esithi, Igama lakhe nguYohane. Bamangaliswa bonke."
Luke1:64 Wavuleka ke kwaoko umlomo wakhe, lwathukululeka nolwimi lwakhe, wamana ethetha, ebonga uThixo."
Luke1:65 Kwehla ukoyika phezu kwalo lonke umelwane lwabo, yaye kulo lonke eleentaba lakwaYuda kuxoxwa ezi zinto."
Luke1:66 Bathi bonke abazivayo, bazibeka entliziyweni yabo, besithi, Azi uya kuba yintoni na lo mntwana? Saye isandla seNkosi sinaye."
Luke1:67 uZakariya uyise wazala nguMoya oyiNgcwele, waprofeta esithi,"
Luke1:68 Makabongwe uNdikhoyo, uThixo kaSirayeli; ngokuba ubavelele, wabakhulula abantu bakhe;"
Luke1:69 Yasiphakamisela uphondo losindiso Endlwini kaDavide umkhonzi wakhe;
Luke1:70 njengoko wathethayo ngomlomo wabaprofeti bakhe abangcwele, ababekho kwasephakadeni;"
Luke1:71 ukuze sihlangulwe ezintshabeni zethu, nasesandleni sabo bonke abasithiyayo;"
Luke1:72 Ukubenzela inceba oobawo bethu, nokukhumbula umnqophiso wakhe ongcwele;"
Luke1:73 Isifungo awasifungela ubawo uAbraham,"
Luke1:74 ukuze asinike, ukuba sihlangulwe esandleni seentshaba zethu, simkhonze singenaloyiko;"
Luke1:75 Ngobungcwele nangobulungisa phambi kwakhe, yonke imihla yobomi bethu."
Luke1:76 Nawe, mntwana, uya kubizwa ngokuba ungumprofeti wOsenyangweni, kuba uya kuhamba phambi kobuso beNkosi, ulungise iindlela zayo;"
Luke1:77 Ukubazisa abantu bakhe usindiso ngoxolelo lwezono zabo;
Luke1:78 Ngenceba yoThixo wethu; ekwasiveleleyo kokusa kwasenyangweni;
Luke1:79 Ukuba ukukhanya kwabahleli emnyameni nasethunzini lokufa, Ukuba uzikhokele iinyawo zethu endleleni yoxolo."
Luke1:80 Wakhula umntwana, waya esomelela emoyeni; wayesezintlango, kwada kwayimini yokubonakalaliswa kwakhe kuSirayeli."
Luke2:1 Ke kaloku kwathi ngaloo mihla, kwaphuma ummiselo kuKesare Awugusto othi, malibhalwe encwadini yomlibo wokuzalwa lonke elimiweyo."
Luke2:2 Olu lubhalo lwaba lolokuqala, akubon’ ukuba uKireniyo uyirhuluneli yeSiriya."
Luke2:3 Baphuma ke bonke, besiya kubhaliswa, elowo waya kowabo."
Luke2:4 Wenyuka ke noYosefu, evela kwelaseGalili, kumzi oyiNazarete, waya kwelakwaYuda, emzini kaDavide, ekuthiwa yiBhetelehem; ngokuba ebengowendlu kaDavide, engowemizalwane yakhe;"
Luke2:5 esiya kubhalwa, enoMariya, umfazi lowo wayemganelwe, selekhulelwe."
Luke2:6 Ke kaloku kwathi, xa bakhona, yazaliseka imihla yokuba azale."
Luke2:7 Wamzala unyana wakhe wamazibulo, wamsongela eziqhiyeni, wamlalisa emkhumbini wesitali, ngokuba babengenandawo endlwini yabahambi."
Luke2:8 Kwaye kukho abalusi kwakwelo lizwe, behlala ezindle, belinda ebusuku imihlambi yabo."
Luke2:9 Babona ngesithunywa seNkosi simi phezu kwabo, bathi nobuqaqawuli beNkosi bababengezelela ngeenxa zonke; besuka boyika ngokoyika okukhulu."
Luke2:10 Sathi kubo isithunywa, Musani ukoyika; kuba, yabonani, ndinishumayeza iindaba ezilungileyo zovuyo olukhulu, oluya kuba kubo bonke abantu."
Luke2:11 Nizalelwe namhlanje kwisixeko sikaDavide uMsindisi, onguKrestu iNkosi."
Luke2:12 Lo ngumqondiso kuni; Nofumana lusana lusongelwe eziqhiyeni, lulele emkhumbini."
Luke2:13 Kwabakho ke ngesiquphe, ndawonye nesithunywa eso, inkitha yomkhosi wasemazulwini, idumisa uThixo, isithi,"
Luke2:14 Uzuko kuThixo enyangweni, Uxolo emhlabeni, Inkolelo ebantwini."
Luke2:15 Ke kaloku kwathi, zakumka kubo izithunywa zisiya ezulwini, abo abalusi bathi omnye komnye, Masiye eBhetelehem apho, siyibone le nto ihlileyo, esiyazisiweyo nguYehova."
Luke2:16 Beza ngobungxamo, bamfumana uMariya, kwanoYosefu, nalo usana lulele emkhumbini wesitali."
Luke2:17 Bakuyibona loo nto, balibhengeza ilizwi elabe lithethwe kubo ngaye lo mntwana."
Luke2:18 Bathi bonke abo bevayo, bamangaliswa zezo zinto zabe zithethwe kubo ngabalusi."
Luke2:19 Waye ke uMariya ezigcina zonke ezi zinto eziguquguqula entliziyweni yakhe.
Luke2:20 Babuya abalusi, bemzukisa bemdumisa uThixo, ngenxa yazo zonke izinto ababezivile nababezibonile, njengoko kwabe kuthethiwe kubo."
Luke2:21 Xeshikweni ke zazizalisekile iintsuku ezisibhozo zokuba umntwana aluswe, wathiywa igama elinguYesu, elo wabelithiyiwe sisithunywa sezulu, engekamithwa nokumithwa."
Luke2:22 Zithe ke zakuzaliseka iintsuku zokuhlanjululwa kwakhe ngokomthetho kaMosis, bamsa eJerusalem, ukuba bammise phambi kweNkosi."
Luke2:23 Njengoko kubhaliweyo emthethweni weNkosi, kwathiwa, Yonke into eliduna, evula isizalo, kuthiwe ingcwele eNkosini;"
Luke2:24 nokuba benze idini njengoko kutshiwoyo emthethweni kaYehova, isibini samahobe, nokuba ngamavukuthu amabini."
Luke2:25 Kwabonakala kukho umntu eYerusalem, ogama linguSimon; waye loo mntu elilungisa, emoyika uThixo, elinde intuthuzelo kaSirayeli; waye noMoya oyiNgcwele ephezu kwakhe."
Luke2:26 Wayetyhilelwa nguMoya oyiNgcwele, ukuba akayi kubona kufa, engekamboni uKristu weNkosi."
Luke2:27 Weza ngaye uMoya etempileni; kwathi, ekumngeniseni kwabo abazali umntwana uYesu, ukuba bamenzele ngokwesiko lomthetho."
Luke2:28 Wamwola ngeengalo zakhe, wambonga uThixo, wathi,"
Luke2:29 Kaloku, Nkosi yam, uyamndulula ngoku umkhonzi wakho enoxolo, ngokwelizwi lakho."
Luke2:30 Ngokuba amehlo am alubonile usindiso lwakho,"
Luke2:31 Owulungisileyo phambi kobuso babantu bonke;
Luke2:32 Isikhanyiso sokukhanyisela iintlanga, nesihombo sabantu bakho amaSirayeli."
Luke2:33 Bamangaliswa ooYosefu nonina zezo zinto zithethwayo ngaye.
Luke2:34 uSimon wabasikelela, wathi kuMariya unina, Uyabona, lo umiselwe ukuwa nokuvuka kwabaninzi kwaSirayeli; nokuba ngumqondiso ochasiweyo;"
Luke2:35 ukuze ube nokutyhilwa izicamango eziphuma ezintliziyweni ezininzi; ewe ke, nowakho umphefumlo ikrele liya kuwutyhutyha."
Luke2:36 Kwaye kukho noAna umprofetikazi, intombi kaFanuweli, wesizwe sika-Ashere. Yena waye eselekhulile kakhulu, waye ke ebehleli nendoda iminyaka esixhenxe, ethabathela ebuntombini bakhe."
Luke2:37 Eye yena engumhlolokazi ominyaka ngathi imashumi asibhozo anamine, obengemki etempileni, ekhonza uThixo ngokuzila ukudla nangokukhunga ubusuku nemini."
Luke2:38 Wathi yena ngokwakhe, weza kwangelo lixa, wabulela kuYehova; wayethetha ngayo kubo bonke abo babelinde ukukhululwa ngentlawulelo, eYerusalem."
Luke2:39 Bakuba bezigqibile zonke izinto ngokomthetho weNkosi, babuyela kwelaseGalili, emzini wabo iNazarete."
Luke2:40 Ke kaloku wakhula umntwana, waya esomelela emoyeni, ezele bubulumko; lwaye nobabalo lukaThixo luphezu kwakhe."
Luke2:41 Abazali bakhe babehamba iminyaka ngeminyaka besiya eYerusalem emthendelekweni wepasika.
Luke2:42 Kuthe, xa wayeneminyaka elishumi elinamibini ezelwe, benyuka baya eYerusalem ngokwesiko lomthendeleko lowo."
Luke2:43 Bakuba bezigqibile ke iintsuku ezo, ekubuyeni kwabo, umntwana uYesu wasalela eYerusalem. Babengazi ke uYosefu nonina."
Luke2:44 Babeba ke naye uphakathi kwesihlwele, bahamba uhambo lwemini enye; Baye ke bemfuna phakathi kwemizalwane nabazana nabo."
Luke2:45 Bathe bakuba bengamfumani, babuyela eYerusalem, bemfuna."
Luke2:46 Kwathi, emva kweentsuku ezintathu, bamfumana etempileni, ehleli phakathi kwabafundisi, ebaphulaphula, ebabuza."
Luke2:47 Basuka bonke ababemphulaphula bathi nqa yingqondo yakhe na ziimpendulo zakhe.
Luke2:48 Bakumbona bakhwankqiswa. Unina wathi kuye, Mntwana wam, yini na ukuba usenjenje? uyabona, uyihlo nam besikufuna sibuhlungu."
Luke2:49 Wathi kubo, Benindifunela ntoni na? Beningazi na ukuba ndimelwe kukuba ndibe semicimbini kaBawo?"
Luke2:50 Ke bona abayiqondanga into awayeyithetha kubo.
Luke2:51 Wehla nabo, waya kufika eNazarete, wabalulamela. Waye ke unina ezigcina zonke ezi zinto entliziyweni yakhe."
Luke2:52 uYesu wayehambela phambili ebulumkweni nasebukhulwini, nasekuthandweni nguThixo nangabantu."
Luke3:1 Ke kaloku, ngomnyaka weshumi elinesihlanu wobukumkani bukaTibheriyo Kesare, inguPontiyo Pilato irhuluneli yelakwaYuda, inguHerode umphathi wesahlulo sesine esilelaseGalili, inguFilipu ke umzalwana wakhe umphathi wesahlulo sesine esilelaseItureya nelaseTrakoniti, inguLisaniyo umphathi wesahlulo sesine esilelaseAbhilene,"
Luke3:2 Ke bona ababingeleli abakhulu ooAnas noKayafa, lafika ilizwi likaThixo kuYohane unyana kaZekariya entlango."
Luke3:3 Weza kuwo wonke ummandla waseYordan, evakalisa ubhaptizo lwenguquko ukuze kuxolelwe izono;"
Luke3:4 Njengoko kubhaliweyo encwadini yamazwi kaIsaya umprofeti, esithi, Izwi lodandulukayo entlango, lisithi, Yilungiseni indlela yeNkosi, Wutyenenezeni umendo wayo."
Luke3:5 Zonke iintlambo ziya kugungxulwa, zonke iintaba neenduli zigungxulwe; zibe magoso-goso, neendlela ezimagqagala zibe lula;"
Luke3:6 Yaye yonke inyama iya kulubona usindiso lukaThixo.
Luke3:7 Wayesithi ngoko kuzo izihlwele ezaziphuma zisiza kubhaptizwa nguye, Nzalandini yamarhamba, ngubani na owanibonisayo, ukuba niyibaleke ingqumbo ezayo?"
Luke3:8 Velisani ngoko iziqhamo eziyifaneleyo inguquko; ize ningaqali nithi ngaphakathi kwenu, Thina sinobawo uAbraham; kuba ndithi kuni, Unako uThixo kuwo la matye ukumvelisela abantwana uAbraham."
Luke3:9 Kaloku izembe selibekiwe engcanjini yemithi, ngoko wonke umthi ongavelisi siqhamo sihle, uyagawulwa, uphoswe emlilweni."
Luke3:10 Zaye izihlwele zambuza, zisithi, Masenze ntoni na ke?"
Luke3:11 Aphendule ke athi kubo, Lowo uneengubo zangaphantsi ezimbini, makebele ongenayo: nalowo uneengubo zangaphantsi ezimbini, makabele ongenayo; nalowo unokudla, makenze kwangokunjalo."
Luke3:12 Kweza ke nababuthi berhafu ukuba babhaptizwe, bathi kuye, Mfundisi, masenze ntoni na?"
Luke3:13 Wathi kubo, Ningabizi nto ngaphezu kwenikumiselweyo."
Luke3:14 Ayebuza kuye ke namasoldati, esithi, Masenze ntoni na ke thina? Wathi kubo, Musani ukungcangcazelisa mntu, ningadli mntu; yanelani ngumvuzo wenu."
Luke3:15 Bakubon’ ukuba abantu babelindile, becamanga bonke ezintliziyweni zabo ngaye uYohane, ukuba angaba lo unguye na uKrestu;"
Luke3:16 Waphendula uYohane wathi kubo bonke, Mna okunene ndinibhaptiza ngamanzi; kodwa uyeza lowo unamandla kunam, endingafanelekileyo ukuba ndiwuthukulule nomtya weembadada zakhe: uya kunibhaptiza ngoMoya oyiNgcwele nangomlilo yena;"
Luke3:17 Osesandleni sakhe ifolokhwe yakhe isesandleni sakhe, aze asihlambulule isanda sakhe, ayibuthele kuvimba ingqolowa; ke wona umququ uya kuwutshisa ngomlilo ongacimekiyo."
Luke3:18 Waye ke ebavuselela nangezinye izinto ezininzi, eshumayela iindaba ezilungileyo ebantwini."
Luke3:19 Ke kaloku uHerode, umphathi wesahlulo sesine selizwe, ohlwayiwe nguye ngenxa kaHerodiya umkaFilipu umninawa wakhe, nangenxa yazo zonke izinto ezimbi abezenzile uHerode;"
Luke3:20 wongezelela le kuzo zonke, yokuba amvalele entolongweni uYohane."
Luke3:21 Ke kaloku, bakubhaptizwa abantu bonke, kwathi, ebhaptiziwe naye uYesu, ethandaza, lavuleka izulu;"
Luke3:22 Wehla phezu kwakhe uMoya oyiNgcwele, enembonakalo yehobe, kweza nezwi eliphuma ezulwini, lisithi, Wena unguNyana wam oyintanda; Ndikholiswa nguwe."
Luke3:23 uYesu ngokwakhe waqala eneminyaka engathi imashumi mathathu ezelwe, enjengonyana kaYosefu, unyana kaHeli,"
Luke3:24 owayengunyana kaMatati, unyana kaLevi, unyana kaMeleki, unyana kaYana, unyana kaYosefu,"
Luke3:25 owayengunyana kaMatatiya, unyana ka-Amos, unyana kaNahum, unyana kaEsli, unyana kaNage,"
Luke3:26 unyana kaMahati, unyana kaMatatiya, unyana kaShimehi, unyana kaYosefu, unyana kaYuda,"
Luke3:27 obengunyana kaYowana, unyana kaResa, unyana kaTsorubhabheli, unyana kaSalatiyeli, unyana kaNeri,"
Luke3:28 owayengunyana kaMeleki, unyana ka-Adi, unyana kaKosam, unyana kaElimodam, unyana kaEre,"
Luke3:29 owayengunyana kaYose, unyana kaEliyezere, unyana kaYorim, unyana kaMatati, unyana kaLevi,"
Luke3:30 obengunyana kaSimon, unyana kaYuda, unyana kaYosefu, unyana kaYonan, unyana kaEliyakim,"
Luke3:31 owayengunyana kaMeleya, unyana kaMenan, unyana kaMatatha, unyana kaNatan, unyana kaDavide,"
Luke3:32 owayengunyana kaYese, unyana kaObhedi, unyana kaBhohazi, unyana kaSalmon, unyana kaNashon,"
Luke3:33 unyana ka-Aminadabhi, unyana ka-Aram, unyana ka-Etserom, unyana kaPeres, unyana kaYuda,"
Luke3:34 owayengunyana kaYakobi, unyana kaIsake, unyana ka-Abraham, unyana kaTara, unyana kaNahore,"
Luke3:35 owayengunyana kaSaruki, unyana kaRagawu, unyana kaFaleki, unyana kaHebhere, unyana kaSala,"
Luke3:36 owayengunyana kaKenan, unyana ka-Arpakishadi, unyana kaSem, unyana kaNowa, unyana kaLameki,"
Luke3:37 unyana kaMatusela, unyana kaEnoki, unyana kaYaredi, unyana kaMalaleli, unyana kaKenan,"
Luke3:38 Owayengunyana kaEnoshe, owayengunyana kaSete, owayengunyana ka-Adam, owayengunyana kaThixo."
Luke4:1 Ke kaloku uYesu, ezele nguMoya oyiNgcwele, wabuya eYordan, wesiwa nguMoya entlango."
Luke4:2 Wantsuku zimashumi mane ehendwa nguMtyholi. Akadla nto ngezo ntsuku; zakuphela ke, walamba."
Luke4:3 Wathi uMtyholi kuye, Ukuba unguNyana kaThixo, yitsho kweli litye libe sisonka."
Luke4:4 Wamphendula uYesu wathi, Kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Akaphili ngasonka sodwa umntu; uphila ngamazwi onke kaThixo."
Luke4:5 uMtyholi, emnyuse entabeni ephakamileyo, wambonisa zonke izikumkani zelimiweyo, ngesiquphe sexesha."
Luke4:6 Wathi uMtyholi kuye, Ndokunika bonke obu bukhosi bazo nozuko lwazo; ngokuba bunikelwe kum; nosukuba ndithanda ukumnika."
Luke4:7 Ukuba ke ngoko uthe wandinqula, zonke ezo nto ziya kuba zezakho."
Luke4:8 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Suka umke, uye emva kwam, Sathana, ngokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Uze uqubude eNkosini uThixo wakho, ukhonze yena yedwa."
Luke4:9 Wamsa eYerusalem, wammisa eluchochoyini lwetempile, wathi kuye, Ukuba unguye uNyana kaThixo, ziphose ezantsi phaya."
Luke4:10 Kuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Uya kuziwisela umthetho ngawe izithunywa zakhe, ukuba zikugcine;"
Luke4:11 Kwaye ziya kukufukula ngezandla, Hleze ubetheke etyeni ngonyawo lwakho."
Luke4:12 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Kuthiwe, Uze ungayihendi iNkosi uThixo wakho."
Luke4:13 Waza uMtyholi, ekugqibile konke ukuhenda, wesuka kuye umzuzu."
Luke4:14 Wabuya uYesu enamandla oMoya, weza kwelaseGalili; lwaye lwaphuma udumo lwakhe;"
Luke4:15 Wayefundisa ezindlwini zabo zesikhungu, ezukiswa ngabo bonke."
Luke4:16 Weza kufika eNazarete, apho wayekhulele khona, wathi ngokwesiko lakhe ngomhla wesabatha, wangena endlwini yesikhungu, wesuka wema ukuba alese."
Luke4:17 Waza wanikwa incwadi yomshumayeli uIsaya. Eyityhilile ke incwadi, wafumana indawo le kubhalwe kuyo,"
Luke4:18 uMoya weNkosi uphezu kwam, Ethe ngenxa yoko yandithambisela ukushumayela iindaba ezilungileyo kumahlwempu. Indithume ukuba ndiphilise abantliziyo ityumkileyo, ndivakalise inkululeko kubathinjwa, nokubuyiselwa kokubona kwabaziimfama, ndindulule abaqobekileyo bekhululekile;"
Luke4:19 Ndivakalise umnyaka owamkelekileyo weNkosi.
Luke4:20 Eyisongile ke incwadi, wayibuyisela kwisicaka, wahlala phantsi. Aye amehlo abo bonke abasendlwini yesikhungu enamathele kuye."
Luke4:21 Waqala ukuthi kubo, Namhlanje esi sibhalo sizalisekile ezindlebeni zenu."
Luke4:22 Baye bonke bemngqinela, bemangaliswa ngamazwi amnandi aphuma emlonyeni wakhe. Ayesithi, Lo asinguye na unyana kaYosefu?"
Luke4:23 Wathi kubo, Kakade niya kuwuthetha kum lo mzekeliso uthi, Gqirha, ziphilise; okungangoko sikuve kwenzeke eKapernahum, kwenze nakowenu apha."
Luke4:24 Wathi ke, Inene, ndithi kuni, Akukho mprofeti wamkelekileyo kowabo."
Luke4:25 Kodwa inene ndithi kuni, Babebaninzi abahlolokazi kwaSirayeli ngemihla kaEliya, oko lalivingcekile izulu iminyaka emithathu eneenyanga ezintandathu, xeshikweni kwakukho indlala enkulu kulo lonke ilizwe;"
Luke4:26 Kodwa uEliya akathunywanga nakumnye kubo; wathunywa eTsarfati yakwaTsidon kumhlolokazi, kwakuphela."
Luke4:27 Kwaye kukho abantu abaninzi abaneqhenqa kwaSirayeli ngexesha likaElisha umprofeti; akwahlanjululwanga namnye kubo, ingenguNahaman umAram."
Luke4:28 Bathi bonke ababesendlwini yesikhungu, bakuziva ezi zinto, bazala ngumsindo."
Luke4:29 Besuka bamkhuphela ngaphandle komzi, bamrholela elungqamekweni lwentaba, owakhelwe kuyo umzi wabo, ukuze bamphose ezantsi eweni."
Luke4:30 Kodwa yena wacanda phakathi kwabo wemka.
Luke4:31 Wehla waya eKapernahum, idolophu yelaseGalili, waza wafundisa abantu ngesabatha."
Luke4:32 Baye ke bekhwankqiswa kukufundisa kwakhe; ngokuba ilizwi lakhe libe linegunya.
Luke4:33 Kwaye kukho endlwini yesikhungu apho umntu onomoya wedemon engcolileyo;
Luke4:34 besithi, Siyeke; Yintoni na enathi nawe, Yesu waseNazarete? uze kusitshabalalisa na? Ndiyakwazi wena ukuba ungubani; Lowo Ungcwele kaThixo."
Luke4:35 Wawukhalimela uYesu, esithi, Yithi tu, uphume kuye. Ithe ke idemon yamntlala esazulwini, yaphuma kuye, ingamenzakalisanga."
Luke4:36 Bakhwankqiswa ke bonke, bathetha bodwa, besithi, Lilizwi lini na eli? kuba ubathethela ngegunya nangamandla oomoya abangcolileyo aba, baze baphume."
Luke4:37 Lwaye luphuma udaba lwakhe, lusiya kuzo zonke iindawo zaloo mmandla."
Luke4:38 Esukile endlwini yesikhungu, wangena endlwini kaSimon. Waye ke umkhwekazi kaSimon ebanjwe ngumkhuhlane omkhulu; bambongoza ngenxa yakhe."
Luke4:39 Wema phezu kwakhe, wawukhalimela umkhuhlane; Wavuka kwangoko ke, wabalungiselela."
Luke4:40 Kuthe ke bakubon’ ukuba liyatshona ilanga, bonke abo babenabafayo zizifo ngezifo, babazisa kuye; wabeka izandla phezu kwabo bonke ngabanye, wabaphilisa."
Luke4:41 Zaye ke neendimoni ziphuma kwabaninzi, zikhala zisithi, Wena unguye uKristu, uNyana kaThixo. Uthe ezikhalimela, akazivumela ukuba zithethe; kuba bezimazi ukuba unguye uKristu."
Luke4:42 Kwakuba sekusile, waphuma waya endaweni eyintlango. Zaye zimfuna izihlwele, zeza kuye, zamnqanda ukuba angemki kuzo."
Luke4:43 Uthe ke kuzo, Ndimelwe kukuba ndizishumayele iindaba ezilungileyo zobukumkani bukaThixo nakweminye imizi, ngokuba ndithunywe oko."
Luke4:44 Wayevakalisa ke ezindlwini zesikhungu kwelaseGalili.
Luke5:1 Ke kaloku kwathi, zakubon’ ukuba simxinile abantu, ukuba balive ilizwi likaThixo, wesuka wema ngasedikeni laseGenesarete."
Luke5:2 Wabona imikhombe emibini imi ngasedikeni apho; baye ababambisi beentlanzi bephumile kuyo, behlamba iminatha yabo."
Luke5:3 Uthe ke uYesu, engene komnye umkhombe, owawungokaSimon, wamcela ukuba awuke akhwelise kancinane emhlabeni. Wahlala phantsi, wabafundisa abantu emkhombeni."
Luke5:4 Akupheza ke ukuthetha, wathi kuSimon, Khwelelisela enzulwini, nihlise iminatha yenu, kubanjiswe."
Luke5:5 Waphendula uSimon wathi kuye, Mongameli, sibulaleke ubusuku buphela, asabamba nento; kodwa ngelakho ilizwi ndiya kuwuhlisa umnatha."
Luke5:6 Bathi, bakukwenza oko, bavingcela inkitha enkulu yeentlanzi; wawuqhaqheka ke umnatha wabo."
Luke5:7 Baza bakhweba abalingane babo ababekomnye umkhombe, ukuba beze kubancedisa. Beza, bayizalisa imikhombe yomibini, yada yafuna ukutshona."
Luke5:8 Ekubonile ke oko uSimon Petros, wawa emadolweni kaYesu, esithi, Mka kum; ngokuba ndiyindoda engumoni, Yehova;"
Luke5:9 Kuba wathi makatha, kwanabo bonke ababenaye, ngobanjiso lweentlanzi ezo bazibambisayo."
Luke5:10 Kwakwanjalo ke noYakobi noYohane, oonyana bakaZebhedi, ababengamadlelane noSimon. Wathi ke uYesu kuSimon, Musa ukoyika; uthabathela kweli xesha, uya kubambisa abantu."
Luke5:11 Bakuba ke bezikhiphile izikhitshana, bashiya konke, bamlandela."
Luke5:12 Kwathi ekomnye umzi, babona ngendoda ezele liqhenqa; yathi yakumbona uYesu, yawa ngobuso, yambongoza isithi, Nkosi, ukuba uyathanda, unako ukundihlambulula."
Luke5:13 Wasolula isandla, wamchukumisa, esithi, Ndiyathanda, hlambuluka. Lathi kwaoko iqhenqa lemka kuye."
Luke5:14 Wayithethela ngelithi, mayingaxeleli bani; wathi, Hamba uye kuzibonisa kumbingeleli, usondeze idini, ngenxa yokuhlanjululwa kwakho, njengoko wamisayo uMoses, kube bubungqina kubo."
Luke5:15 Kwaba kukhona luphuma udumo lwakhe; kwahlanganisana izihlwele ezikhulu, ukuze zimve, nokuba ziphiliswe nguye ebulwelweni bazo."
Luke5:16 Waye ke yena emana ukuzisithelisa entlango, wathandaza."
Luke5:17 Ke kaloku kwathi ngamini ithile wafundisa, kuhleli abaFarisi nabafundisi-mthetho, ababephume kuyo yonke imizana yelaseGalili, nelakwaYuda, naseYerusalem; ekhoyo ukubaphilisa."
Luke5:18 Kwabonakala amadoda ethwele ngokhuko umntu ofe umzimba, efuna ukumngenisa endlwini, ambeke phambi kwakhe."
Luke5:19 Athi, akuba engafumani ndawo angamngenisa ngayo ngenxa yendimbane, akhwela phezu kwendlu, agqobhoza ezifulelweni, amhlisa ke phakathi, amhlisa ngokhuko, ambeka phakathi, phambi koYesu."
Luke5:20 Akulubona ke ukholo lwawo, wathi kuye, Mntundini, uzixolelwe izono zakho."
Luke5:21 Baqala ukucamanga ababhali nabaFarisi, besithi, Ngubani na lo uthetha izinyeliso? Ngubani na onako ukuxolela izono, ingenguye uThixo yedwa?"
Luke5:22 Eziqiqile ke uYesu izicamango zabo, waphendula wathi kubo, Nicamanga ntoni na ezintliziyweni zenu?"
Luke5:23 Okukhona kulula kukuphi na, kukho ukuthi, Zixolelwe izono zakho; nokuthi, Vuka uhambe?"
Luke5:24 Ke ukuze nazi, ukuba unalo igunya uNyana woMntu lokuxolela izono emhlabeni apha (selesithi konedumbe), Ndithi kuwe, Vuka, uthabathe ukhuko lwakho, uye endlwini yakho."
Luke5:25 Usuke wema kwangoko phambi kwabo, wayithabatha loo nto abelele kuyo, wemka waya endlwini yakhe, ezukisa uThixo."
Luke5:26 Besuka bathi nqa bonke, bamzukisa uThixo, bazala kukoyika, besithi, Sibone imimangaliso namhlanje."
Luke5:27 Emva kwezi zinto waphuma, wabona umbuthi werhafu, ogama linguLevi, ehleli endaweni yerhafu, wathi kuye, Ndilandele."
Luke5:28 Ekushiye konke, wesuka wamlandela."
Luke5:29 uLevi ke wamenzela itheko elikhulu endlwini yakhe. Kwaye kukho inkitha yababuthi berhafu nabanye abantu ababehleli ndawonye nabo.
Luke5:30 Baye ababhali babo nabaFarisi bebakrokrela abafundi bakhe, besithi, Kungani na ukuba nidle nisele nababuthi berhafu naboni?"
Luke5:31 Uphendule uYesu wathi kubo, Akufuneki gqirha kwabaphili leyo; kodwa ngabafayo."
Luke5:32 Andize kubiza malungisa, ndize kubiza aboni ukuba baguquke."
Luke5:33 Baza bathi kuye, Kungani na ukuba abafundi bakaYohane bazile ukudla futhi, benze imithandazo, benjenjalo nababaFarisi; kodwa abakho bayadla basele?"
Luke5:34 Wathi ke kubo, Ninako yini na ukubazilisa ukudla abegumbi lomtshakazi, xa anabo umyeni?"
Luke5:35 Kodwa kofika mihla awoza asuswe kubo umyeni, bandule ke ukuzila ngaloo mihla."
Luke5:36 Ke kaloku wathetha umzekeliso kubo; Akukho ke ubeka isiziba sengubo entsha engutyeni endala; okanye, wothi nentsha ikrazule, sithi nesiziba esitsha singavisisani nendala."
Luke5:37 Kananjalo akukho mntu uyitha kwiimvaba ezindala iwayini entsha engekabili; okanye iwayini, leyo intsha, yozigqabhuza iintsuba, iphalale iwayini, zitshabalale neentsuba."
Luke5:38 Kodwa iwayini entsha ifanele ukuthiwa ezintsubeni ezintsha; kwaye zombini zigciniwe.
Luke5:39 Kanjalo akukho uthi, ebesele endala, athande entsha kwaoko, kuba uthi, Endala yeyona inencasa."
Luke6:1 Kwathi ngesabatha yokuqala, wacanda emasimini; Baza abafundi bakhe bakha izikhwebu, badla, bezihlikihla ezandleni zabo."
Luke6:2 Abathile baFarasi babesithi kubo: “Yini na ukuba nenze oko kungavumelekileyo ngesabatha?
Luke6:3 Wabaphendula uYesu wathi, Aniyilesanga na into awayenzayo uDavide, xa walambayo, yena nabo babenaye?"
Luke6:4 Okokuba wangena endlwini kaThixo, wazithabatha izonka ezibekwa phambi koThixo, wazidla, wanika nabo babenaye, ekungavumelekileyo ukuba zidliwe, ingengabo ababingeleli bodwa?"
Luke6:5 Wayesithi kubo, uNyana woMntu lo uyiNkosi yayo nesabatha."
Luke6:6 Kwathi ke kaloku, nangenye isabatha, wangena endlwini yesikhungu, wafundisa. Kwaye kukho apho umntu owome isandla sokunene."
Luke6:7 Baye ke bemlalele ababhali nabaFarisi, ukuba wophilisa na ngesabatha; ukuze bafumane indawo yokummangalela."
Luke6:8 Kodwa yena ezazi iingcamango zabo, wathi kuloo mntu unesandla esomileyo, Phakama, umele phakathi. Uye waphakama wema."
Luke6:9 Wathi ngoko uYesu kubo, Ndiya kunibuza zwi-nye; Okuvumelekileyo ngesabatha kukwenza okulungileyo, kukwenza okubi, kusini na? kukusindisa ubomi, kukubulala, kusini na?"
Luke6:10 Akuba ebasingasingile bonke, wathi kumntu lowo, Solule isandla sakho. Wenjenjalo; saphila ke isandla sakhe, saba nesesinye."
Luke6:11 Basuka ke bona baphambana; baye bethetha bodwa, ukuba bangamenza ntoni na uYesu."
Luke6:12 Kwathi ke ngaloo mihla, waphuma wasinga entabeni, esiya kuthandaza. Wayebudlulisa ubusuku bonke ethandaza kuThixo."
Luke6:13 Kwathi kwakusa, wababizela kuye abafundi bakhe, wanyula kubo abalishumi elinababini, awababiza ngokuba ngabapostile;"
Luke6:14 uSimon, awamthiya igama elinguPetros, noAndreya umzalwana wakhe, noYakobi noYohane, noFilipu, noBhartolomeyu,"
Luke6:15 uMateyu noTomas, uYakobi ka-Alifeyu, noSimon ekuthiwa nguZelote,"
Luke6:16 uYuda kaYakobi, noYuda Sikariyoti, owaba ngumngcatshi."
Luke6:17 Wehla nabo, wema ethafeni, nenkitha yabafundi bakhe, nenkitha enkulu yabantu, bephuma kulo lonke elakwaYuda, neYerusalem, nangaselwandle lwaseTire neTsidon, ababeze kuva kuye ukuba baphiliswe kwizifo zabo;"
Luke6:18 Kwanabo babekhathazwa ngoomoya abangcolileyo, baye bephiliswa."
Luke6:19 Zaye izihlwele zonke zifuna ukumchukumisa; ngokuba kube kuphuma amandla kuye, abaphilise bonke."
Luke6:20 Waza yena wawaphakamisela amehlo akhe kubo abafundi bakhe, wathi, Ninoyolo, nina mahlwempu; ngokuba bobenu ubukumkani bukaThixo."
Luke6:21 Ninoyolo, nina nilambayo kalokunje; ngokuba niya kuhluthiswa. Ninoyolo, nina nililayo kalokunje; ngokuba niya kuhleka."
Luke6:22 Ninoyolo nina xa bathe abantu banithiya, naxa bathe banigxotha kubo, baningcikiva, balilahlela phandle igama lenu ngokungathi likhohlakele, ngenxa yakhe uNyana woMntu."
Luke6:23 Vuyani ngaloo mini, nisuke imitsi; kuba, niyabona, umvuzo wenu mkhulu emazulwini; babesenjenjalo ooyise kubo abaprofeti."
Luke6:24 Kodwa yeha, nina zityebi! ngokuba niyifumene intuthuzelo yenu."
Luke6:25 Yeha, nina bahluthiyo! ngokuba niya kulamba. Yeha, nina bahlekayo kalokunje! ngokuba niya kukhedama nilile."
Luke6:26 Yeha nina, xa bathe bathetha kakuhle ngani bonke abantu! kuba ooyise babo babesenjenjalo kubaprofeti ababuxoki."
Luke6:27 Ke mna ndithi kuni nindivayo, Zithandeni iintshaba zenu, yenzani okulungileyo abo banithiyayo;"
Luke6:28 Basikeleleni abo baniqalekisayo, nibathandazele abo banigxekayo."
Luke6:29 Lowo ukubetha esidleleni, mnike nesinye; nothabatha ingubo yakho yokwaleka, ungali neyangaphantsi."
Luke6:30 Yiphe wonke umntu ocelayo kuwe; nalowo uzithabathayo iimpahla zakho, uze ungaphindi uzicele kuye."
Luke6:31 Enithanda ukuba abantu benze ngako kuni, yenzani nani kwangokunjalo kubo."
Luke6:32 Ukuba nithanda abo banithandayo, ninambulelo mni na? kuba naboni bayabathanda abo babathandayo."
Luke6:33 Xa nithi nenze okulungileyo kwabanenzela okulungileyo, ninambulelo mni na? ngokuba naboni benza kwaloo nto."
Luke6:34 Xa niboleka abo nithembe ukwamkela kubo, ninambulelo mni na? Kuba naboni bayababoleka aboni, ukuze babuye bazuze okwakhona."
Luke6:35 Ke nina, zithandeni iintshaba zenu, nenze okulungileyo; niboleke ningathembe lutho. Woba mkhulu ke umvuzo wenu, nize nibe ngoonyana bOsenyangweni; ngokuba yena enobubele kwabangabuleliyo nabangendawo."
Luke6:36 Ngoko ke yibani nenceba, njengokuba naye uYihlo enenceba."
Luke6:37 Musani ukugweba, naye ningasayi kugwetywa; musani ukusingela phantsi, naye ningasayi kusingelwa phantsi; xolelani, naniya kuxolelwa;"
Luke6:38 Yiphani, naniya kuphiwa nani; umlinganiselo omhle, ohlohliweyo, ohlunguzelweyo, ophalalayo, nowuphiwa esondweni lengubo yenu. Kuba umlinganiselo enilinganisela ngawo, niya kulinganiselwa kwangawo nani."
Luke6:39 Ke kaloku wathetha umzekeliso kubo, esithi, ingakhe ibe nako na imfama ukukhokela imfama? Aziyi kweyela emhadini zombini na?"
Luke6:40 Akukho mfundi mkhulu kunomfundisi wakhe; ke wonke ogqibeleleyo uya kuba njengomfundisi wakhe.
Luke6:41 Yini na ke ukuba usibone isibi esisesweni lomzalwana wakho, kanti akuwuqiqi umqadi okwelakho iliso?"
Luke6:42 Ungathini na ukuba nako ukuthi kumzalwana wakho, Mzalwana, yeka ndisikhuphe isibi esisesweni lakho, ungawuboni nje wena umqadi okwelakho iliso? Mhanahanisindini, wukhuphe kuqala umqadi kwelakho iliso, wandule ke ukubona kakuhle ukusikhupha isibi esisesweni lomzalwana wakho."
Luke6:43 Kuba akukho mthi mhle uvelisa isiqhamo esibi; kananjalo akukho mthi mbi uvelisa isiqhamo esihle.
Luke6:44 Kuba wonke umthi waziwa ngesiqhamo sawo. Kuba abantu abawakhi makhiwane emithaneni enameva, bangakhi zidiliya etyholweni;"
Luke6:45 Umntu olungileyo, ebuncwaneni obulungileyo bentliziyo yakhe, uvelisa oko kulungileyo; nomntu okhohlakeleyo, ebuncwaneni obukhohlakeleyo bentliziyo yakhe, uvelisa oko kukhohlakeleyo; kuba umlomo wakhe uthetha ngokuphuphuma kwentliziyo."
Luke6:46 Yini na ke ukuba nindibize ngokuthi, Nkosi, Nkosi, nibe ningazenzi izinto endizithethayo?"
Luke6:47 Lowo uzayo kum, aweve amazwi am, awenze, ndonibonisa lowo afana naye;"
Luke6:48 Ufana nomntu owakha indlu, wemba nzulu, wabeka isiseko phezu kolwalwa. Kwathi ke, kwakubakho unogumbe, wagaleleka kuloo ndlu umlambo, awaba nako ukuyishukumisa;"
Luke6:49 Kodwa lo uwevileyo akawenza, ufana nomntu owakhe indlu phezu komhlaba, kungekho siseko; wagaleleka kuyo umlambo, yawa kwaoko; kwaba kukhulu ukuwa kwaloo ndlu."
Luke7:1 Ke kaloku, emveni kokuba ebewagqibile onke amazwi akhe, besiva abantu, wangena eKapernahum."
Luke7:2 Kwaye kukho umkhonzi womthetheli-khulu othile, owabethandwa nguye, esifa, eza kubhubha."
Luke7:3 Uthe ke akuva ngaye uYesu, wathumela kuye amadoda amakhulu amaYuda, emcela ukuba eze kumphilisa umkhonzi wakhe."
Luke7:4 Akufika ke kuYesu, ambongoza enyamekile, esithi, Ukufanele oko lowo ungamenzelayo oko;"
Luke7:5 Kuba uyaluthanda uhlanga lwethu, wasakhela nendlu yesikhungu."
Luke7:6 Wahamba ke uYesu nabo. Akubon’ ukuba ke akasekude endlwini, umthetheli-khulu wathuma izihlobo kuye, esithi kuye, Nkosi, ungazikhathazi, kuba andikulingene ukuba ungade ungene phantsi kophahla lwam;"
Luke7:7 Kungoko nam ndingakufanelanga ukuda ndize kuwe; thetha ngezwi lodwa, sophiliswa isicaka sam."
Luke7:8 Kuba nam ndingumntu omiswe phantsi kwegunya labanye, ndinamasoldati aphantsi kwam; ndithi kweli, Yiya, liye; ndithi kweliya, Yiza, lize; nakumkhonzi wam, Yenza oku, akwenze."
Luke7:9 Ezivile ke uYesu ezi zinto, wamangaliswa nguye, wajika, wathi kwindimbane ebimlandela, Ndithi kuni, andifumananga lukholo lungaka nakwaSirayeli."
Luke7:10 Abo babethunyiwe babuyela endlwini, bamfumana umkhonzi obengumlwelwe ephilile."
Luke7:11 Kwathi ngengomsomnye waya emzini ekuthiwa yiNayin; Kwaye kuhamba naye into eninzi yabafundi bakhe, nendimbane enkulu."
Luke7:12 Ke kaloku, akusondela esangweni lomzi lowo, kwabonakala kuthwalelwa phandle umntu ofileyo, ekuphela konyana ozalwa ngunina; waye yena engumhlolokazi. Yaye nendimbane elingeneyo yomzi inaye."
Luke7:13 Ithe ke iNkosi yakumbona, yasikwa yimfesane ngenxa yakhe, yathi kuye, Musa ukulila."
Luke7:14 Yafika ke yalichukumisa ithala, bema ke ababethwele. Ithe ke yona, Mfana, ndithi kuwe, Vuka!"
Luke7:15 Wavuka wahlala umfi lowo, waza wathetha. Waza wamnikela kunina."
Luke7:16 Baza bankwantya bonke, bamzukisa uThixo, besithi, Kuvele umprofeti omkhulu phakathi kwethu; nokuthi, uThixo ubavelele abantu bakhe."
Luke7:17 Lwaphuma ke olo ludaba lungaye, lwahamba kwelakwaYuda liphela, nakuloo mmandla wonke."
Luke7:18 Bazibika kuYohane abafundi bakhe zonke ezi zinto.
Luke7:19 Ebizele kuye babini bathile kubafundi bakhe, uYohane wabathuma kuYesu esithi, Wena ungulowo uzayo na? okanye sikhangele enye?"
Luke7:20 Efikile kuye amadoda lawo, athi, uYohane umbhaptizi usithume kuwe esithi, Wena ungulowo uzayo na, wena? okanye sikhangele enye?"
Luke7:21 Ke kaloku, kwangelo lixa, waphilisa abaninzi kuzo izifo, nakuzo izibetho, nakoomoya abakhohlakeleyo; wathi ke iimfama ezininzi wazibabala ukubona."
Luke7:22 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuwo, Hambani niye kumbikela uYohane izinto enizibonileyo nenizivileyo; okokuba iimfama zibuya zibone, iziqhwala ziyahamba, abaneqhenqa bayahlanjululwa, izithulu ziyeva, abafileyo bayavuswa, amahlwempu ayazishunyayezwa iindaba ezilungileyo."
Luke7:23 Unoyolo othe akakhutyekiswa ndim.
Luke7:24 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba bemkile abathunywa bakaYohane, waqala wathi kwisihlwele ngaye uYohane, Naye niphume nisiya kubona ntoni na entlango? Yayiyingcongolo na, izanyazanyiswa ngumoya?"
Luke7:25 Naye niphume naya kubona ntoni na kodwa? Yaye ingumntu ovethe iingubo ezitofotofo na? Yabonani, abo banxiba iingubo eziqaqambileyo, badle ubuncwane, ngabasezindlwini zookumkani."
Luke7:26 Naye niphume naya kubona ntoni na kodwa? Umprofeti? Ewe, ndithi kuni, node wagqithisa kumprofeti."
Luke7:27 Lo ngulowo kubhaliweyo ngaye, kwathiwa, Yabona, mna ndiyasithuma isithunywa sam ngaphambi kobuso bakho, Esiya kuyilungisa indlela yakho phambi kwakho."
Luke7:28 Kuba ndithi kuni, Akukho namnye, kwabazelweyo ngabafazi, umprofeti omkhulu kunoYohane umbhaptizi; kanti ke nomncinanana kwabanye ebukumkanini bukaThixo, mkhulu kunaye."
Luke7:29 Bathi bonke abantu, bakuva, nababuthi berhafu, bagwebela uThixo, bebhaptiziwe ngobhaptizo lukaYohane."
Luke7:30 Kodwa bona abaFarisi nabaqondisi-mthetho bazitshitshisela icebo likaThixo, kuba bengabhaptizwanga nguye."
Luke7:31 Ithe ke iNkosi, Ndiya kubafanisa nantoni na ke ngoko abantu besi sizukulwana? kwaye zifana nantoni?"
Luke7:32 Bafana nabantwana abahleli endaweni yembutho, bekhwazana besithi, Sanigwalela, naza anangqungqa; senze isijwili kuni, analila nina."
Luke7:33 Kuba uzile uYohane umbhaptizi engadli sonka, engaseli wayini; nithi ke, Unedemon."
Luke7:34 Uzile uNyana woMntu esidla, esela; nithi, Khanibone umntu olidla-kudla, olisela-wayini, umhlobo wababuthi berhafu naboni!"
Luke7:35 Kodwa ubulumko bugwetyelwe kokuphuma ebantwaneni babo bonke.
Luke7:36 Ke kaloku omnye umFarisi ubemcela ukuba adle naye; waza wangena endlwini yomFarisi lowo, wahlala phantsi."
Luke7:37 Kwabonakala kukho mfazi emzini apho, obengumoni, esazi ukuba uYesu uhleli endlwini yomFarisi lowo, wazisa ihlala lelabhastile, linamafutha aqholiweyo."
Luke7:38 Wema ezinyaweni zakhe ngasemva, elila; waqala ukuzinyela iinyawo zakhe ngeenyembezi, ezisula ngeenwele zentloko yakhe, ezanga kakhulu iinyawo zakhe, ezithambisa ngamafutha lawo."
Luke7:39 Akukubona ke oko umFarisi lowo ubembizile, wathetha ngaphakathi kwakhe, esithi, Lo mntu, ukuba ube engumprofeti, ange esazi ukuba ngumfazi ongubani na, oluhlobo luni na, lo umchukumisayo; ngokuba ungumoni."
Luke7:40 Uphendule uYesu wathi kuye, Hina, Simon, ndinendawo yokuthetha kuwe. Wathi ke yena, Mfundisi, yitsho."
Luke7:41 Kwaye kukho mboleki-mali uthile, enabantu ababini abanamatyala kuye; omnye wayenetyala leedenariyo ezimakhulu mahlanu, omnye ke zimashumi mahlanu."
Luke7:42 Bakuba ke bengenanto yokuhlawula, usuke wabaxolela bobabini. Ndixelele ngoko, nguwuphi na kubo oya kumthanda kakhulu?"
Luke7:43 Waphendula uSimon wathi, Ndiba ngulowo uxolelwe ngokungaphezulu. Wathi ke yena kuye, Ugwebe walungisa."
Luke7:44 Wajika wakhangela kumfazi, wathi kuSimon, Uyambona na lo mfazi? Ndingene endlwini yakho, akundinikanga manzi eenyawo zam; ke yena uzinyele iinyawo zam ngeenyembezi, wazisula ngeenwele zentloko yakhe."
Luke7:45 Akundanganga wena; ke yena, kuseloko ndangenayo, akayekanga ukuzanga kakhulu iinyawo zam."
Luke7:46 Intloko yam akuyithambisanga ngaoli; ke yena iinyawo zam uzithambise ngamafutha aqholiweyo.
Luke7:47 Ngenxa yoko ndithi kuwe, Izono zakhe uzixolelwe, bezizininzi; ke yena oxolelwe kancinane, uthanda kancinane;"
Luke7:48 Wathi ke kuyo, Zixolelwe izono zakho."
Luke7:49 Baqala abo babehleli naye esithebeni ukuthi ngaphakathi kwabo, Ngubani na lo oxolela izono?"
Luke7:50 Wathi ke kumfazi, Ukholo lwakho lukusindisile; hamba ngoxolo."
Luke8:1 Kwathi emveni koko, wayihamba imizi ngemizi nemizana, evakalisa iindaba ezilungileyo zobukumkani bukaThixo. Babenaye abalishumi elinababini."
Luke8:2 Kwanabafazi abathile, ababephiliswe koomoya abakhohlakeleyo nasebulwelweni, uMariya ekuthiwa nguMagadala, ekwakuphume kuye iidemon ezisixhenxe,"
Luke8:3 noYohana, umfazi kaKuza, igosa likaHerode, noSusana, nabanye abaninzi; bona babemlungiselela ngeempahla zabo."
Luke8:4 Kuthe ke kwahlanganisana kuye isihlwele esikhulu, besiza kuye bephuma kwimizi ngemizi, ubethetha ngomzekeliso."
Luke8:5 Umhlwayeli waphuma waya kuyihlwayela imbewu yakhe. Ekuhlwayeleni kwakhe, inxalenye yembewu yawa ngasendleleni; yaza yanyathelwa, zathi iintaka zezulu zayidla zayidla."
Luke8:6 Embi yawa elulwalweni; ithe ke yahluma, yatsha ngenxa yokungabi namanzi."
Luke8:7 Embi yawa emithaneni enameva; imithana enameva yakhula kunye nayo, yayiminxa."
Luke8:8 Yimbi yawa kuwo wona umhlaba olungileyo, yahluma, yavelisa isiqhamo kalikhulu. Uthe akuba ezithethile ezi zinto, wakhala esithi, Lowo uneendlebe zokuva makeve."
Luke8:9 Bambuza ke abafundi bakhe, besithi, Ungaba uyintoni na lo mzekeliso?"
Luke8:10 Uthe ke yena, Nikuphiwe nina ukuzazi iimfihlelo zobukumkani bukaThixo; ukuze bebona nje bangaboni, besiva nje bangaqondi."
Luke8:11 Ke kaloku lo mzekeliso uthi: Imbewu lilizwi likaThixo.
Luke8:12 Aba ngasendleleni ngabo bavayo; andule ke afike uMtyholi, alithabathe ilizwi ezintliziyweni zabo, ukuze bangakholwa, basindiswe."
Luke8:13 Abo ke baselulwalweni ngabasakuthi, bakuliva, balamkele ngovuyo ilizwi; aba ke abanangcambu, bona bakholwa umzuzwana, ze bathi ngexa lokuhendwa balahle."
Luke8:14 Leyo ke yawayo emithaneni enameva, ngabo bathi, belivile, bahambe benamaxhala nobutyebi neziyolo zobu bomi, baminxwe, baze bangavelisi siqhamo."
Luke8:15 Le ke isemhlabeni omhle, ngabo bona bathi ngentliziyo entle, elungileyo, bakuliva ilizwi, balibambe, bavelise iziqhamo benomonde."
Luke8:16 Akukho ke uthi, esilumekile isibane, asisibeke ngesitya, athi mhlawumbi asibeke ngaphantsi kwesingqengqelo; usixhoma esiphathweni saso, ukuze abo bangenayo bakubone ukukhanya."
Luke8:17 Kuba akukho nto ifihlakeleyo ingayi kubonakala; kananjalo akukho nto ifihlakeleyo ingayi kwaziwa, ize ekuhleni."
Luke8:18 Lumkani ngoko ukuva eniva ngako; kuba osukuba enako, uya kunikwa; osukuba ke engenako, uya kuhluthwa kwanoko asukuba ekuko."
Luke8:19 Ke kaloku kwafika kuye unina nabazalwana bakhe, baza ababa nako ukufikelela kuye ngenxa yendimbane."
Luke8:20 Wabikelwa ke, kwathiwa, Unyoko nabazalwana bakho bemi ngaphandle, befuna ukukubona."
Luke8:21 Uphendule ke wathi kubo, Uma nabazalwana bam ngaba bona balivayo ilizwi likaThixo, balenze."
Luke8:22 Kwathi ngamhla uthile, wangena emkhombeni, kwanabafundi bakhe, wathi kubo, Masiwele siye ngaphesheya kolwandle. Banduluka ke."
Luke8:23 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba bayahamba ngomkhombe, walala ubuthongo. Kwehla uqhwithela lomoya edikeni; bazaliswa ngamanzi, baba semngciphekweni."
Luke8:24 Beza ke bamvusa, besithi, Mfundisi, nkosi, siya kufa. Wavuka ke, wawukhalimela umoya nokulatyuza kwamaza; zapheza, kwabakho ukuzola."
Luke8:25 Wathi kubo, Luphi na ukholo lwenu? Basuka boyika, bamangaliswa, batshono ukuthi, Ngubani na lo? kuba uyalela kwanemimoya namanzi, zimthobele."
Luke8:26 Bafika kumhlaba wamaGadara, okhangelene nelaseGalili."
Luke8:27 Akuba ephumile emhlabeni, wahlangatyezwa ngumntu othile ophuma esixekweni, obeneendimoni ixesha elide, enganxibanga ngubo imbi, engahlali endlwini, emane esemangcwabeni."
Luke8:28 Ithe ke yakumbona uYesu, yakhala kunene, yawa phambi kwakhe, yathi ngezwi elikhulu, Yini na enam nawe, Yesu, Nyana kaThixo Osenyangweni? Ndiyakukhunga, ungandithuthumbisi."
Luke8:29 (Kuba wayewuthethele umoya ongcolileyo ukuba uphume emntwini; kuba futhi wawumbamba, ekhonkxiwe ngamakhamandela namakhamandela, waye wawaqhawula amakhamandela, wakhutshelwa entlango nguMtyholi.)"
Luke8:30 uYesu wambuza esithi, Ungubani na igama lakho? Uthe ke yena, NdinguMkhosi; ngokuba bekungene kuye iidemon ezininzi."
Luke8:31 Wayembongoza ukuba angazithetheli ziye kungena enzonzobileni.
Luke8:32 Bekukho ke apho ugxuba lweehagu ezininzi, lusidla entabeni; zaye zimbongoza, ukuba azivumele ziye kungena kuzo. Wabavumela ke."
Luke8:33 Ziphumile ke iidemon emtwini lowo, zangena ezihagwini; lwaza ugxuba olo lwaphaphatheka, lwehla eweni, lwela edikeni, lwarhaxwa."
Luke8:34 Bakukubona ke okuhlileyo abo babezalusa, basaba, baya babika ekhaya nasemaphandleni."
Luke8:35 Baphuma ke abantu, baya kukubona okuhlileyo; beza kuYesu, bamfumana ehleli umntu lowo, beziphume kuye iidemon, ambathisiwe, enengqondo ephilileyo, engasezinyaweni zikaYesu; baza boyika."
Luke8:36 Baza nabo babeyibonile le nto bababikela ukuba utheni na ukuphiliswa obephethwe ziidemon.
Luke8:37 Yamcela yonke inkitha yommandla wabaseGadara, ukuba emke kubo; kuba babebanjwe kukoyika okukhulu. Wenyuka ke waya emkhombeni, wabuya wabuya."
Luke8:38 Ke kaloku indoda leyo, zaye ziphume kuyo iidemon, yayimkhunga ukuba ibe naye."
Luke8:39 Buyela endlwini yakho, ubacacisele oko zingako izinto uThixo akwenzele zona. Wemka, wavakalisa kuwo wonke umzi oko zingako izinto uYesu ayenzele zona."
Luke8:40 Ekubuyeni kwakhe uYesu, iindimbane zamamkela ngovuyo; kuba bonke babemlindile."
Luke8:41 Kwabonakala kusiza indoda egama linguYayiro, yaye yona ingumphathi wendlu yesikhungu, yawa ezinyaweni zikaYesu, yambongoza ukuba aye kungena endlwini yayo."
Luke8:42 Kuba yabe inentombi, iyizala inye, eminyaka ngathi ilishumi linamibini izelwe, yaye yona iqhawuka. Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba uyahamba abantu bamxina."
Luke8:43 Kwaye umfazi owayenethombo legazi iminyaka elishumi elinamibini, eyayichithe yonke impilo yakhe kumagqirha, ebengenako ukuphiliswa bani,"
Luke8:44 yeza ngasemva, yachukumisa umqukumbelo wengubo yakhe, lee qoko kwangoko ithombo legazi lakhe."
Luke8:45 Wathi uYesu, Ngubani na lo undichukumisileyo? Bakhanyela bonke, wathi uPetros nabo babenaye, Mongameli, isihlwele sikuxinile, sikuxinile, utsho na ukuthi, Ngubani na lo undichukumisileyo?"
Luke8:46 Uthe ke uYesu, Ukho ondichukumisileyo; kuba mna ndiyawazi amandla aphumileyo kum."
Luke8:47 Ithe ke intokazi leyo, yakubona ukuba ayifihlakele, yeza igubha, yawa phambi kwakhe, yaxela emehlweni abo bonke abantu, ukuba bekungasizathu sini na ebimchukumisile, nokuphiliswa kwayo kwangoko."
Luke8:48 Uthe ke yena kuyo, Yomelela, ntombi yam, ukholo lwakho lukusindisile; hamba ngoxolo."
Luke8:49 Kwathi, esathetha, kufika othile, evela kwamphathi wendlu yesikhungu, esithi kuye, Ibhubhile intombi yakho; musani ukumkhathaza uMfundisi."
Luke8:50 Evile ke uYesu, wamphendula wathi, Musa ukoyika; kholwa kuphela; wophiliswa."
Luke8:51 Engenile ke endlwini, akavumelanga mntu ukuba angene naye, kwaba kuphela nguPetros, noYakobi, noYohane, noyise wentombi, nonina."
Luke8:52 Baye ke bonke balila, beyimbambazelela. Wathi ke yena, Musani ukulila; Akafile, ulele."
Luke8:53 Basuka bamwa ngeentsini, besazi ukuba ifile."
Luke8:54 Uthe ke yena, wabakhuphela phandle bonke, wayibamba ngesandla, wabiza esithi, Ntombi, vuka."
Luke8:55 Wabuya umoya wayo, yesuka yema kwangoko;"
Luke8:56 Bakhwankqiswa ke abazali bayo; wabayala ukuba bangayixeleli bani le nto yenzekileyo.
Luke9:1 Ke kaloku, ebabizele ndawonye abafundi bakhe abalishumi elinababini, wabanika amandla negunya kuzo zonke iidemon, nokuphilisa izifo."
Luke9:2 Wabathuma ukuba babuvakalise ubukumkani bukaThixo, bayiphilise imilwelwe."
Luke9:3 Wathi kubo, Ningaphathi nto yandlela, namisimelelo, nangxowa yamphako, nasonka, namali; ningabi nangubo zangaphantsi ngambini;"
Luke9:4 Nendlu enithe nangena kuyo, hlalani khona, nimke khona."
Luke9:5 Abo sukuba benganamkeli, yithini nakuphuma kuloo mzi, niluvuthulule nothuli ezinyaweni zenu, kube bubungqina oko kubo."
Luke9:6 Bephumile ke, bayihambahamba imizi, bezishumayela iindaba ezilungileyo, bephilisa ezindaweni zonke."
Luke9:7 Ke kaloku uHerode, umphathi wesahlulo sesiné selizwe, waziva zonke izinto ezenziwayo nguye;"
Luke9:8 kuthiwe ke ngabanye, Kubonakale uEliya; kuthiwe ngabanye, Kubuye kwavuka umprofeti wakuwo amanyange."
Luke9:9 Wathi uHerode, uYohane mna ndamnqamla intloko; lo ke ngubani na, ndiva kuthethwa izinto ezinje ngaye? Wayefuna ke ukumbona."
Luke9:10 Bebuyile abapostile, bamcacisela ukuba zinkulu kwezinto ababezenzile. Wabathabatha ke, wemka waya nabo ngasese kwindawo eyintlango yomzi ekuthiwa yiBhetesayida."
Luke9:11 Sithe ke isihlwele, yakukwazi oko, samlandela; waza wabamkela, wathetha kubo ngobukumkani bukaThixo, wabaphilisa ababeswele ukuphila."
Luke9:12 Ke kaloku, kwakubon’ ukuba selithambekile ke ilanga, beza abalishumi elinababini, bathi kuye, Zindulule izihlwele, ukuze ziye emizini nasemaphandleni, zilale, zifumane ukudla; ngokuba sisentlango apha indawo."
Luke9:13 Uthe ke yena kubo, Bapheni nina batye. Bathi ke bona, Asisenanto ingeyiyo izonka ezihlanu neentlanzi ezimbini; ngaphandle kokuba siye kubathengela inyama aba bantu bonke."
