Luke9:14 Kuba amadoda ngathi ayemawaka mahlanu. Wathi ke kubafundi bakhe, Bangqengqise babe ngamaqela ngamashumi ngamahlanu, babe ngamahlanu."
Luke9:15 Benjenjalo, babangqengqisa bonke."
Luke9:16 Ezithabathile ke izonka zozihlanu neentlanzi zombini, wakhangela ezulwini, wazisikelela, waqhekeza; wamana enika abafundi, ukuba babeke ezihlweleni."
Luke9:17 Batya bahlutha bonke, kwaza kwasuswa okuseleyo kubo izitya zamaqhekeza zalishumi elinazibini."
Luke9:18 Ke kaloku kwathi, ekubeni ethandaza eyedwa, bantontelana kuye abafundi, wabuza kubo, esithi, Izihlwele ezi zithi ndingubani na?"
Luke9:19 Baphendula ke bona bathi, UnguYohane umbhaptizi; abanye ke bathi, NguEliya; abanye ke bathi, kubuye kwavuka umprofeti wakuwo amanyange."
Luke9:20 Athi kubo, Ke nina nithi ndingubani na? Waphendula ke uPetros wathi, NguKristu kaThixo."
Luke9:21 Wabayala kalukhuni, ebathethela ngelithi, le nto mabangayithethi nakubani;"
Luke9:22 esithi, uNyana woMntu umelwe kukuba eve ubunzima obukhulu, alahlwe ngawo amadoda amakhulu nababingeleli abakhulu nababhali, abulawe, athi ngomhla wesithathu avuke."
Luke9:23 Wayesithi ke kubo bonke, Ukuba ubani uthanda ukundilandela, makazincame, awuthwale umnqamlezo wakhe imihla ngemihla, andilandele ke."
Luke9:24 Kuba othe wathanda ukuwusindisa umphefumlo wakhe, wolahlekelwa nguwo; ke othe wawulahla umphefumlo wakhe ngenxa yam, wowusindisa lowo."
Luke9:25 Kumnceda ntoni na umntu ukuthi azuze ihlabathi liphela, abe ke ezilahlile, mhlawumbi ezonakalisile?"
Luke9:26 Kuba othe waneentloni ngam, nangawo amazwi am, uNyana woMntu woba neentloni ngaye lowo, xa athe weza esebuqaqawulini bakhe, nobukaYise, nobezithunywa ezingcwele."
Luke9:27 Ndithi ke kuni, Inene, kukho abathile kwabemiyo apha, abangayi kukha beve kufa bona, bade babubone ubukumkani bukaThixo."
Luke9:28 Ke kaloku kuthe, emveni kwezi zinto, malunga neentsuku ezisibhozo, wathabatha uPetros noYohane noYakobi; wenyuka wava entabeni, esiya kuthandaza."
Luke9:29 Kwathi, ekuthandazeni kwakhe, ubuso bakhe babonakala bububumbi, nengubo yakhe yamhlophe yabengezela."
Luke9:30 Kwabonakala amadoda amabini ethetha naye, angooMoses noEliya,"
Luke9:31 ababebonakala besebuqaqawulini; babethetha ngophumo lwakhe, abeza kulufeza eYerusalem."
Luke9:32 Ke kaloku uPetros, nabo babenaye, babesindwa bubuthongo; baza ke bakuthi balulu, babubona ubuqaqawuli bakhe, naloo madoda mabini abemi naye."
Luke9:33 Ekwahlukaneni kwawo kuye, wathi uPetros kuye uYesu, Mongameli, kuhle ukuba sibe lapha, omnye ube ngowakho, omnye ube ngokaMoses, omnye ube ngokaEliya, engayazi into ayithethayo."
Luke9:34 Kuthe ke esathetha kwabakho ilifu, labenzela ithinzi. Boyika ke ekungeneni kwabo efini apho."
Luke9:35 Kwabakho nezwi liphuma efini, lisithi, Lo nguNyana wam oyintanda; mveni yena."
Luke9:36 Lakuba libekho izwi elo, wafunyanwa uYesu eyedwa. Bagcina ke bona, ababikela mntu ngaloo mihla kwizinto ababezibonile."
Luke9:37 Kwathi ngengomso, bakubon’ ukuba bayehla entabeni, wahlangatyezwa sisihlwele esikhulu."
Luke9:38 Kwabonakala kuvela indoda esihlweleni apho, yankqangaza isithi, Mfundisi, ndiyakukhunga, mbone unyana wam;"
Luke9:39 Uyabona, ubanjwe ngumoya, akhale ngesiquphe; isuke imkrazule, alenze amagwebu, kube nzima ukuba emke kuye."
Luke9:40 Ndabakhunga ke abafundi bakho ukuba bawukhuphe; ababa nako.
Luke9:41 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Sizukulwanandini singakholwayo, sigwenxa, koda kube nini na ndikuni, ndininyamezele? Mzise apha unyana wakho."
Luke9:42 Akubon’ ukuba useza ke, isuke idemon yamntlala, yambetha, wathi xhwenene kunene. Wawukhalimela uYesu umoya ongcolileyo, waphila umntwana, wambuyisela kuyise."
Luke9:43 Bakhwankqiswa ke bonke bubungangamela bukaThixo. Bakubon’ ukuba bamangalisiwe bonke zizinto zonke awazenzayo uYesu, wathi kubafundi bakhe."
Luke9:44 Wabekeleni nina iindlebe la mazwi; kuba uNyana woMntu uza kunikelwa ezandleni zabantu.
Luke9:45 Kodwa bona babengaliqondi eli, lizwi; laye lifihliwe kubo, ukuze bangaliboni. Babesoyika nokumbuza ngelo lizwi."
Luke9:46 Kwabakho ke ukubuzana phakathi kwabo, kokuthi, nguwuphi na kubo omkhulu;"
Luke9:47 Ekubonile ke uYesu ukucamanga kwentliziyo yabo, uthabathe umntwanana, wammisa ngakuye."
Luke9:48 Wathi kubo, Othe wamamkela lo mntwanana egameni lam, wamkela mna; nothe wamkela mna, wamkela owandithumayo; kuba lowo umncinane phakathi kwenu nonke, ngoyena mkhulu."
Luke9:49 Uphendule ke uYohane wathi, Mfundisi, sabona umntu ekhupha iidemon egameni lakho; samalela ke, ngokuba engasilandeli thina."
Luke9:50 uYesu wathi kuye: “Musani ukumalela, kuba ongachasiyo ungecala lethu."
Luke9:51 Ke kaloku kwathi, lakufika ixesha lokunyuselwa kwakhe phezulu, wazimisela ngokuqinileyo ukuya eYerusalem."
Luke9:52 Wathuma abathunywa phambi kobuso bakhe; baya ke, bangena kwidolophana yamaSamariya, ukuba bamlungiselele."
Luke9:53 Akamamkela, ngokuba ubuso bakhe bebubheke eYerusalem."
Luke9:54 Bekubonile ke oko abafundi bakhe, ooYakobi noYohane bathe, Nkosi, uyafuna na ukuba sitsho, kuhle umlilo ezulwini, ubatshise kuphele, njengoko noEliya wenjenjalo?"
Luke9:55 Wathi guququ, wabakhalimela, wathi, Anazi ukuba ningabomoya onjani na;"
Luke9:56 kuba uNyana woMntu engaze kutshabalalisa miphefumlo yabantu, uze kusindisa. Baza baya mzaneni wumbi;"
Luke9:57 Ke kaloku kwathi, bakubon’ ukuba bayahamba ngendlela, wathi othile kuye, Ndiya kukulandela, apho uthe waya khona, Nkosi."
Luke9:58 Wathi uYesu kuye, Iimpungutye zinemingxuma, neentaka zezulu zineendlwana; yena uNyana woMntu akanayo nendawo angalalisa kuyo intloko."
Luke9:59 Wathi ke kuwumbi, Ndilandele. Uthe ke yena, Nkosi, ndivumele ndiye kungcwaba ubawo kuqala."
Luke9:60 Wathi uYesu kuye, Bayeke abafileyo, bangcwabe abafileyo babo; ke wena hamba uye kushumayela ubukumkani bukaThixo."
Luke9:61 Wathi ke nomnye, Ndiya kukulandela, Nkosi; kodwa ndivumele ndiye kuqala, ndiye kubulisa abo basendlwini yam."
Luke9:62 Uthe ke uYesu kuye, Akukho namnye usibekileyo isandla sakhe epuluweni, abe emana ekhangela kokusemva, ubulungeleyo ubukumkani bukaThixo."
Luke10:1 Ke kaloku, emveni kwezi zinto, iNkosi yabalula yamisela abanye kanjalo abamashumi asixhenxe, yabathuma ngababini ngababini phambi kobuso bayo, kuyo yonke imizi neendawo ebiza kuya kuzo yona."
Luke10:2 Yayisithi ngoko kubo, Ukuvuna okunene kuninzi, kodwa bona abasebenzi bambalwa; khungani ngoko eNkosini yokuvuna, ikhuphe abasebenzi, baye ekuvuneni kwayo."
Luke10:3 Hambani; niyabona, mna ndinithuma njengeemvana phakathi kweengcuka."
Luke10:4 Musani ukuphatha ngxowa yamali, nangxowa yamphako, nazimbadada, yaye ningabulisi mntu endleleni."
Luke10:5 Endlwini enisukuba ningene kuyo, yithini kuqala, Uxolo malube kule ndlu."
Luke10:6 Ukuba angaba ulapho owoxolo, uxolo lwenu lohlala phezu kwakhe; ukuba ke akunjalo, lobuyela kwakuni."
Luke10:7 Hlalani ke kuloo ndlu, nisidla nisela izinto abanazo; kuba umsebenzi uwufanele umvuzo wakhe. Musani ukuphuma niye kwindlu ngendlu."
Luke10:8 Emzini ke enisukuba ningena kuwo, banamkele, yidlani izinto abazibeka phambi kwenu;"
Luke10:9 Niyiphilise imilwelwe ekhona, nithi kubo, Busondele kuni ubukumkani bukaThixo."
Luke10:10 Emzini ke enithe nangena kuwo, baza àbanamkeli, phumani niye ezitratweni zawo, nithi,"
Luke10:11 Kwanothuli lomzi wenu oluncamileyo, siyaluvuthululela kuni; noko ke kwazini oko, ukuba busondele kuni ubukumkani bukaThixo."
Luke10:12 Ke ndithi kuni, Koba nokunyamezeleka okweSodom ngaloo mini, kunokwaloo mzi."
Luke10:13 Yeha, wena Korazin! Yeha, wena Bhetesayida! Ngokuba imisebenzi yamandla eyenzeke kuni, ukuba yayenzeke eTire naseTsidon, ingeyaguqukayo kwakudala loo mizi, ihleli ngeengubo ezirhwexayo naseluthuthwini."
Luke10:14 Kodwa koba nokunyamezeleka okweTire nokweTsidon ngomgwebo kunani.
Luke10:15 Nawe Kapernahum, uphakanyiselweyo ezulwini, uya kuphoswa phantsi kwelabafileyo."
Luke10:16 Lowo univayo uva mna; Lowo unigibayo, ugiba mna; lowo ke ugiba mna, ugiba owandithumayo."
Luke10:17 Babuya ke abamashumi asixhenxe bevuya, besithi, Nkosi, needemon ezi zisithobele egameni lakho."
Luke10:18 Uthe ke kubo, Bendimbona uSathana njengombane esiwa ezulwini."
Luke10:19 Niyabona, ndininika igunya lokunyathela phezu kweenyoka noonomadudwane, naphezu kwawo onke amandla alo utshaba; kanjalo akukho nto ingakhe inenzakalise."
Luke10:20 Noko ke maningakuvuyeli oku, kokuba oomoya benithobele; yithini kanye ke kugcobani; ngokuba amagama enu ebhaliwe emazulwini."
Luke10:21 Ngelo lixa wagcoba uYesu ngomoya, wathi, Ndiyabulela kuwe, Bawo, Nkosi yezulu nomhlaba; ngokuba ezi zinto uzifihlile kwizilumko nakwiingqondi, wazityhilela iintsana; ngokuba kwakholeka phambi kwakho ukuba kube njalo."
Luke10:22 Zonke izinto zinikelwe kum nguBawo; kanjalo akukho waziyo ukuba ungubani na uNyana, nguYise yedwa; nokuba ungubani na uYise, nguNyana yedwa, nalowo asukuba uNyana ethanda ukumtyhilela."
Luke10:23 Wathi guququ kubafundi bakhe, wathi ngasese, Anethamsanqa wona amehlo abona izinto enizibonayo."
Luke10:24 Kuba ndithi kuni, Baninzi abaprofeti nookumkani ababethande ukubona izinto enizibonayo abazibona; nokuva izinto enizivayo, anaziva."
Luke10:25 Kwabonakala kusuka umqondisi-mthetho othile, emlinga nokumlinga, esithi, Mfundisi, ndenze ntoni na ukuze ndibudle ilifa ubomi obungunaphakade?"
Luke10:26 Uthe ke yena kuye, Emthethweni kubhalwe ntoni na? Ufunda njani?"
Luke10:27 Waphendula ke wathi, Uze uyithande iNkosi uThixo wakho ngentliziyo yakho iphela, nangomphefumlo wakho uphela, nangamandla akho ephela, nangengqondo yakho iphela, nommelwane wakho njengoko uzithanda ngako."
Luke10:28 Uthe ke kuye, Uphendule walungisa; yenza oko, wobudla ubomi."
Luke10:29 Ke yena, ethanda ukuzigwebela, wathi kuYesu, Ngubani na ongummelwane wam?"
Luke10:30 Uphendule ke uYesu, wathi, Umntu othile wayesihla evela eYerusalem, esiya eYeriko. Wagaxeleka ezihangeni, ezamhluba iingubo, zamngxwelerha, zemka, zimshiya engathi uza kufa."
Luke10:31 Ke kaloku kwathi, kwehla mbingeleli uthile ngaloo ndlela, wathi akumbona wacezela phaya."
Luke10:32 Kwangokunjalo ke nomLevi, akufika kuloo ndawo, weza wambona, wacezela phaya."
Luke10:33 Uthe ke umSamariya othile, eseluhambeni lwakhe, wafika kuye;"
Luke10:34 Waya kuye, wawabopha amanxeba akhe, egalela ioli newayini, wamkhwelisa eqegwini lakhe, wamsa endlwini yabahambi, wamonga."
Luke10:35 Akumka ngengomso, warhola iidenariyo zambini wanika umninindlu, wathi kuye, Uze umonge; nento othe wadleka kuyo, ndokubuyekeza ekubuyeni kwam."
Luke10:36 Nguwuphi na kwabo bathathu ngoko, othi wena, waba ngummelwane walowo wagaxeleka ezihangeni?"
Luke10:37 Uthe ke yena, Ngulowo wamenzela inceba. Wathi ngoko uYesu kuyo, Hamba uye kwenjenjalo nawe."
Luke10:38 Ke kaloku kwathi, ekuhambeni kwabo, yena wangena mzini uthile, yathi ke intokazi ethile egama linguMarta, yamamkela ngobubele endlwini yayo."
Luke10:39 Yaye ke inodade wabo ogama linguMariya, owathi yena wahlala ngasezinyaweni zikaYesu, waliphulaphula ilizwi lakhe."
Luke10:40 uMarta ke yena wakruthakrutheka kukulungiselela okuninzi. Wema ke kufuphi wathi, Nkosi, akukhathali na, kukuba umsakwethu andiyekele ndilungiselele ndedwa? Yitsho kuye ukuba andincede."
Luke10:41 Waphendula ke uYesu wathi kuye, Marta, Marta, uzixhalabise ngezinto ezininzi;"
Luke10:42 Inye yona into efunekayo; uMariya ke unyule eso sabelo silungileyo, singayi kususwa kuye."
Luke11:1 Kwathi, esendaweni ethile ethandaza, akupheza, wathi omnye umfundi wakhe kuye, Nkosi, sifundise ukuthandaza, kwanjengoko uYohane wabafundisayo abafundi bakhe."
Luke11:2 Wathi kubo, Xa sukuba nithandaza, yithini, Bawo wethu osemazulwini, malingcwaliswe igama lakho. Mabufike ubukumkani bakho. Makwenzeke ukuthanda kwakho nasemhlabeni, njengokuba kusenziwa emazulwini."
Luke11:3 Siphe imihla ngemihla isonka sethu semihla ngemihla.
Luke11:4 Sixolele izono zethu; kuba nathi sibaxolela bonke abanamatyala kuthi. Ungasingenisi ekuhendweni; usihlangule ebubini.
Luke11:5 Wathi kubo, Nguwuphi na kuni ongathi, enomhlobo, aze aye kuye phakathi kobusuku, athi kuye, Sihlobo, ndiboleke izonka zibe zithathu;"
Luke11:6 kuba ke umhlobo wam uphambukele kum eseluhambeni, ndaye ndingenanto ke ndingayibeka phambi kwakhe?"
Luke11:7 Aphendule lowo wangaphakathi athi, Musa ukundikhathaza; seluvaliwe ucango, nabantwana bam basesililini nam; andinako ukuvuka ndikunike."
Luke11:8 Ndithi kuni, Nokuba akayi kuvuka amnike, ngakuba engumhlobo wakhe, noko ngenxa yozingiso lwakhe olungenantloni wovuka, amnike inani alisweleyo."
Luke11:9 Nam ndithi kuni, Celani, nophiwa; funani, nofumana; nkqonkqozani, novulelwa."
Luke11:10 Kuba wonke umntu ocelayo, uyazuza; nalowo ufunayo, uyafumana; nalowo unkqonkqozayo uya kuvulelwa."
Luke11:11 Nguwuphi na ke uyise kuni oya kuthi, unyana akucela isonka, amnike ilitye; Athi, ukuba uthe wacela intlanzi, amnike inyoka esikhundleni sentlanzi?"
Luke11:12 Athi, ukuba uthe wacela iqanda, amnike unomadudwane?"
Luke11:13 Ukuba ke ngoko nina, nikhohlakele nje, niyakwazi ukubapha abantwana benu izipho ezilungileyo, wobeka phi na ke yena uYihlo osemazulwini ukugqithisela ukubapha uMoya oyiNgcwele abo bamcelayo?"
Luke11:14 Wayekhupha idemon, yaye ke isisidenge. Kwathi, yakuphuma idemon, sathetha isisidenge; bamangaliswa abantu."
Luke11:15 Kodwa abathile kubo bathi, Uzikhupha iidemon ngoBhelezebhule, umphathi weedemon."
Luke11:16 Baye ke bemlinga, befuna kuye umqondiso ophuma ezulwini."
Luke11:17 Ke kaloku yena, ezazi iingcamango zabo, wathi kubo, Bonke ubukumkani obahlulelene bodwa buyaphanza; nendlu eyahlulelene nendlu, iyawa."
Luke11:18 Ukuba ke noSathana wahlulelene yedwa, bothini na ukuma ubukumkani bakhe? Ngokuba nithi, ndizikhupha iidemon ngoBhelezebhule."
Luke11:19 Ukuba mna ndizikhupha iidemon ngoBhelezebhule, bazikhupha ngabani na onyana benu? ngenxa yoko baya kuba ngabagwebi benu bona."
Luke11:20 Ke ukuba ndizikhupha iidemon ngomnwe kaThixo, ngoko bunifikele kanti ubukumkani bukaThixo."
Luke11:21 Xa igorha lixhobile, lilinda ibhotwe lalo, impahla yalo iseluxolweni;"
Luke11:22 Xa lithe lafika igorha elinamandla kunalo, laloyisa, lolihlutha zonke izikrweqe zalo ebelikholose ngazo, liwabe amaxhoba alo."
Luke11:23 Lowo ungengakum, uchasene nam; nalowo ungandibuthisiyo, uyachithachitha."
Luke11:24 Xa umoya ongcolileyo uthe waphuma emntwini, ucanda ezindaweni ezingenamanzi, ufuna ukuphumla; uze wakuba ungakufumani, usuke uthi, Ndiya kubuyela kwasendlwini yam endaphuma kuyo."
Luke11:25 Uthi wakufika, uyifumane itshayelwe, ivathisiwe."
Luke11:26 Wandule ukuya kuthabatha abanye oomoya abasixhenxe abakhohlakeleyo kunawo, bangene ke bahlale khona; bangene ke bahlale khona; lize ikamva laloo mntu libe libi kunesiqaleko sakhe."
Luke11:27 Ke kaloku kwathi, ekuzithetheni kwakhe ezi zinto, intokazi ethile yaliphakamisa izwi layo esihlweleni apho, yathi kuye, Sinoyolo isizalo esakubambayo, namabele owawanyayo."
Luke11:28 Uthe ke yena, Yithi kanye, Banoyolo abo balivayo ilizwi likaThixo baligcine."
Luke11:29 Ke kaloku, zakubon’ ukuba ziqukene iindimbane, waqala ukuthi, Esi sizukulwana singendawo, singxamele umqondiso; kwaye asiyi kunikwa mqondiso, ingenguwo umqondiso kaYona umprofeti."
Luke11:30 Kuba, njengokuba uYona waba ngumqondiso kwabaseNineve, uya kuba kwanjalo uNyana woMntu kwesi sizukulwana."
Luke11:31 Ukumkanikazi waseZantsi uya kusuka eme ngomgwebo namadoda esi sizukulwana, awagwebe; ngokuba wavela eziphelweni zomhlaba, esiza kuva ubulumko bukaSolomon; ukanti ke omkhulu kunoSolomon nanku apha."
Luke11:32 Amadoda aseNineve aya kusuka eme ngomgwebo nesi sizukulwana, asigwebe; ngokuba aguquka wona ngomemezo lukaYona; ukanti ke omkhulu kunoYona nanku apha."
Luke11:33 Akukho ke uthi, esibanekile isibane, asibeke endaweni efihlakeleyo, nokuba kuphantsi kwesitya; usibeka esiphathweni saso, ukuze abo bangenayo bakubone ukukhanya."
Luke11:34 Isibane somzimba liliso. Xa sukuba iliso lakho lingenakumbi, umzimba wakho uphela uyakhanyiseleka; kodwa xa sukuba iliso lakho lingendawo, umzimba wakho uba bubumnyama."
Luke11:35 Ngoko xunela ekuthini ukukhanya okukuwe kungabi bubumnyama.
Luke11:36 Ukuba ngoko umzimba wakho uphela ukhanyiselekile, ungenandawo imnyama, uya kukhanyiseleka uphela, njengaxenikweni sithe isibane sakukhanyisela ngokudangazela kwaso."
Luke11:37 Ke kaloku, akuba ethethile, umFarisi othile wayemcela ukuba aye komulela kuye. Ungenile ke wahlala phantsi."
Luke11:38 Uthe ke akubona oku, umFarisi wamangaliswa kukuba engathanga kuqala ahlambe, phambi kokuba adle."
Luke11:39 Yathi ke iNkosi kuye, Kungokunje, nina baFarisi nihlambulula umphandle wendebe nesitya; kodwa umbilini wakho uzele kukuphanga nokungendawo."
Luke11:40 Ziyatha, lo wawenza ingaphandle akawenzanga na owangaphakathi?"
Luke11:41 Kodwa ke yenzani amalizo ngokwezinto eninazo; niyabona, zonke izinto zihlambulukile kuni."
Luke11:42 Yeha nina, baFarisi! Ngokuba ninikela izishumi zetyeleba nezenxina nezemifuno yonke, nize nidlule kuwo umgwebo nokuthanda uThixo; ezi benimelwe kukuthi nizenze, nithi neziya ningazishiyi."
Luke11:43 Yeha nina, baFarisi! Kuba nithanda izihlalo eziphambili ezindlwini zesikhungu, nemibuliso ezindaweni zembutho."
Luke11:44 Yeha nina, babhali nabaFarisi, bahanahanisindini! ngokuba ninjengamangcwaba angabonakaliyo, abahambá phezu kwawo bengawazi."
Luke11:45 Waphendula ke omnye wabaqondisi-mthetho, wathi kuye, Mfundisi, uzithethile nje ezo zinto, usiphatha kakubi nathi."
Luke11:46 Uthe ke yena, Yeha, nani baqondisi-mthetho! Kuba abantu nibathwalisa imithwalo enzima, nibe ke nina ngokwenu ningayichukumisi imithwalo leyo nangamnye umnwe wenu."
Luke11:47 Yeha nina! Ngokuba niyawakha amangcwaba abaprofeti, babe ke ooyihlo bebabulele."
Luke11:48 Inene niyangqina ukuba niyayivumela imisebenzi yooyihlo; kuba bona bababulala okunene, nibe ke nina niwakha amangcwaba abo."
Luke11:49 Ngenxa yoko nobulumko bukaThixo bathi, Ndiya kubathumela abaprofeti nabapostile, bathi inxenye kubo bayibulale, bayitshutshise;"
Luke11:50 ukuze kubizwe kwesi sizukulwana igazi labo bonke abaprofeti elaphalazwayo, kwasekusekweni kwehlabathi;"
Luke11:51 Ukususela kwigazi lika-Abheli ukuya kutsho kwigazi likaZakariya, owatshabalala phakathi kwesibingelelo nendlu kaThixo. Inene ndithi kuni, liya kubizwa kwesi sizukulwana."
Luke11:52 Yeha nina, baqondisi-mthetho! ngokuba nisithabathile isitshixo sokwazi; anangena ngokwenu, naba ke nabangenayo nabalela."
Luke11:53 Ke kaloku, akuba ezithethile ezi zinto kubo, ababhali nabaFarisi baqala ukumvuselela kakhulu, nokumcaphukisa ukuba athethe izinto ezininzi,"
Luke11:54 bemlalele, befuna ukunqakula into ephuma emlonyeni wakhe, ukuze bammangalele."
Luke12:1 Kuthe ngoko, akubon’ ukuba ahlanganisene ndawonye amawaka-waka abantu, ngokokude banyathelane, waqala ukuthi kubafundi bakhe, Phambi kwako konke, lilumkeleni igwele labaFarisi, eliluhanahaniso."
Luke12:2 Akukho nto ke igqunyiweyo, engasayi kutyhilwa; nefihlakeleyo, ayiyi kwaziwa."
Luke12:3 Ngoko ke konke enikuthethe emnyameni, kuya kuviwa emhlotsheni; nokuthethe endlebeni emagumbini, kumenyezwe phezu kwezindlu."
Luke12:4 Ndithi ke kuni, zihlobo zam, Musani ukuboyika abo babulala umzimba, baze emva koko bangabi nanto yimbi bangayenzayo."
Luke12:5 Ndiya kunibonisa ke enomoyika; yoyikani lowo uthi emva kokubulala, abe negunya lokuphosa esihogweni. Ewe, ndithi kuni, Yoyikani yena lowo."
Luke12:6 Abathengiswa ngeepeni ezimbini na oongqatyana abahlanu? Ukanti akukho namnye kubo olityelweyo emehlweni kaThixo?
Luke12:7 Kwaneenwele ezi zentloko yenu zibaliwe zonke. Musani ukoyika ngoko; nibagqithile oongqatyana abaninzi nina.
Luke12:8 Ndithi ke kuni, Wonke umntu othe wandivuma phambi kwabantu, kwanoNyana woMntu uya kumvuma phambi kwezithunywa zikaThixo."
Luke12:9 Ondikhanyeleyo ke emehlweni abantu, wokhanyelwa emehlweni ezithunywa zikaThixo."
Luke12:10 Nothe wathetha ilizwi elichasene noNyana woMntu uya kuxolelwa; kodwa lowo unyelise uMoya oyiNgcwele, akasayi kuxolelwa."
Luke12:11 Xa sukuba ke benizisa ezindlwini zesikhungu, nakwirhuluneli, nakwabanegunya, ize ningaxhaleli ukuba ningaziphendulela ngokunjani na, nangantoni na, nokuba ningathethani na."
Luke12:12 uMoya oyiNgcwele uya kunifundisa kwangelo lixa izinto enimelwe kukuthi nithethe zona.
Luke12:13 Ke kaloku uthe ubani kuye endimbaneni, Mfundisi, yitsho kumzalwana wam, ahlulelane nam ilifa."
Luke12:14 Uthe ke yena kuye, Mntundini, ndimiswe ngubani na ukuba ndibe ngumahluli nomabi phakathi kwenu?"
Luke12:15 Wathi kubo, Lumkani, nizilinde ngasekubaweni; ngokuba ubomi bomntu abumi ngabuninzi bempahla yakhe."
Luke12:16 Wathetha ke umzekeliso kubo, esithi, Umhlaba womntu othile osisityebi wachuma kakhulu;"
Luke12:17 wayecamanga phakathi kwakhe, esithi, Ndiya kuthini na; ngokuba andinandawo ndiya kuzihlanganisela kuyo iziqhamo zam?"
Luke12:18 Wathi, Nantsi into endiya kuyenza; ndiya kubawisa phantsi oovimba bam, ndakhe abangaphezulu kwabo; ndizihlanganisele khona zonke iziqhamo zam, nempahla yam;"
Luke12:19 ndithi kuwo umphefumlo wam, Mphefumlo, unezinto ezininzi ezilungileyo, ezibekelwe iminyaka emininzi; phumla, udle, sela, yiba nemihlali."
Luke12:20 Uthe ke uThixo kuye, Msweli-kuqonda, ngobu busuku umphefumlo wakho uya kubizwa kuwe; ziya kuba zezikabani na ke ezo zinto uzilungisileyo?"
Luke12:21 Unjalo lowo uziqwebela ubutyebi, engenabutyebi kuThixo."
Luke12:22 Wathi ke kubo abafundi bakhe, Ngenxa yoko ndithi kuni, Musani ukubuxhalela ubomi benu, ngokuthi ningadla ntoni na; kwanomzimba, ngokuthi ningambatha ntoni na."
Luke12:23 Ubomi bukhulu kunokudla, nomzimba kunento yokwambatha."
Luke12:24 Qwalaselani amahlungulu la, ngokuba akahlwayeli, akavuni; kuwo akukho qonga navimba; nina nibeke phi na ke, ukuzigqitha iintaka?"
Luke12:25 Nguwuphi na ke kuni onokuthi ngokuxhala ongeze ebukhulwini bakhe ikubhite ibe nye?
Luke12:26 Ukuba ngoko aninako ukwenza neyona nto incinane, yini na ukuba nizixhalele ezinye?"
Luke12:27 Qondani ngeenyibiba, ukuhluma kwazo; azibulaleki, azisonti nokusonta; ke ndithi kuni, uSolomon kubo bonke ubunewunewu bakhe, wayengavathiswanga nanjenganye kuzo ezi."
Luke12:28 Ukuba ke ingca, leyo isendle, ethi namhla ibekho, ize ngomso iphoswe eziko, wenjenjalo uThixo ukuyambesa; wobeka phi na ke kuni, bantundini balukholo luncinane?"
Luke12:29 Nize ningafuni ukuba ningadla ntoni na, nisele ntoni na;"
Luke12:30 ngokuba zonke ezo nto zingxanyelwe ziintlanga zehlabathi; uYihlo ke uyazi ukuba niziswele ezo zinto.
Luke12:31 Funani ke ubukumkani bukaThixo; zaye zonke ezo zinto ziya kongezelelwa kuni.
Luke12:32 Musani ukoyika, mhlambi mncinane; ngokuba kukholekile kuYihlo ukuninika ubukumkani."
Luke12:33 Thengisani ngeempahla zenu, niphe amalizo; zilungiseleni iingxowa ezingagugiyo, ubutyebi obungapheliyo emazulwini, apho kungasondeliyo sela, kungonakalisi nanundu;"
Luke12:34 kuba apho bukhona ubutyebi benu, yoba lapho nentliziyo yenu."
Luke12:35 Mazibhinqiwe izinqe zenu, nezibane zenu zivutha;"
Luke12:36 nani nibe njengabantu abayilindileyo inkosi yabo, xeshikweni iya kubuya emsithweni; ukuze, yakufika inkqonkqoze, bayivulele kwaoko."
Luke12:37 Banoyolo abo bakhonzi, eyothi yakufika inkosi, ibafumane belindile. Inene ndithi kuni, iya kubhinqa, ibangqengqise bona, ize isondele ibalungiselele."
Luke12:38 Nokuba ithe yeza ngowesibini umlindo wobusuku, nokuba ithe yeza ngowesithathu umlindo, yafika kunjalo, banoyolo abo bakhonzi."
Luke12:39 Kwazini ke oku, ukuba umninindlu ebesazi ukuba isela liza ngaliphi na ilixa, ange elindile, akayiyekela indlu yakhe igqojozwe."
Luke12:40 Nani ngoko yibani nilungile, ngokuba uNyana woMntu uza ngelixa eningalikhumbuleliyo."
Luke12:41 Waza wathi uPetros kuye, Nkosi, lo mzekeliso uwuthetha kuthi, uwuthetha kubo bonke, kusini na?"
Luke12:42 Ithe ke iNkosi, Ngubani na ke elo gosa lithembekileyo, liqondileyo, eyothi inkosi ilimise phezu kwabendlu yayo, ukuze libanike umamkelo wabo wokudla ngexesha elifanelekileyo?"
Luke12:43 Unoyolo loo mkhonzi, iya kuthi yakufika inkosi yakhe imfumane esenjenjalo."
Luke12:44 Inene ndithi kuni, iya kummisa phezu kwayo yonke impahla yayo."
Luke12:45 Ukuba ke loo mkhonzi uthe entliziyweni yakhe, Inkosi yam iyalibala ukuza; aqale ukubabetha abakhonzi nabakhonzazana, adle, asele, anxile;"
Luke12:46 Iya kufika inkosi yaloo mkhonzi ngemini angayilindeleyo, nangelixa angalaziyo, imxabele kubini, immisele isabelo sakhe kwabangakholwayo."
Luke12:47 Yena ke loo mkhonzi, ubekwazi ukuthanda kwenkosi yakhe, akalungisa, akenza ngokuthanda kwayo, uya kutyatyulwa ngemivumbo emininzi."
Luke12:48 Ke yena obengazi, wenza ke okufanele imivumbo, uya kutyatyulwa ibe mbalwa. Kubo bonke abanikwe okukhulu, kuya kufunwa okukhulu kubo; nakulowo kubekwe okukhulu kuye, kuya kubizwa okungaphezulu."
Luke12:49 Ndize kuphosa umlilo ehlabathini; Ndiya kuthini na, ukuba sele uphethiwe?"
Luke12:50 Kukho ke lubhaptizo ndifanele ukubhaptizwa ngalo; Asikuko nokuba ndicinezelekile lude lufezeke!
Luke12:51 Niba ndize kungenisa uxolo na ehlabathini? Ndithi kuni, Hayi; ndisuke ndaweni-nye;"
Luke12:52 Kuba kuya kuthi, kuthabathela kwalapha, kubekho abahlanu ndlwini-nye bebambene, abathathu bebambene nababini, nababini bebambene nabathathu."
Luke12:53 Kuya kubambana uyise nonyana, unyana noyise; unina nentombi, intombi nonina; uninazala nomolokazana wakhe, umolokazana noninazala;"
Luke12:54 Wayesithi ke nakuzo izihlwele, Xa nithe nalibona ilifu liphuma entshonalanga, nithi kwaoko, Kuza isiphango; kwaye kunjalo."
Luke12:55 Naxa sukuba nibona umoya wasezantsi uvuthuza, nithi, Kuya kubakho ulophu; kwaba njalo."
Luke12:56 Bahanahanisindini, niyakwazi ukubucalula ubuso bezulu nomhlaba; Yini na ke ukuba ningalicaluli nje eli xesha?"
Luke12:57 Yini na ke ukuba nina ngokwenu ningakwahluli okububulungisa?
Luke12:58 Xa uya nommangaleli wakho kumantyi, nisendleleni, yithi nisendleleni, qiniseka ukuba uzihlangule kuye; hleze akurholele emgwebini, aze umgwebi akunikele epoliseni, aze igosa likuphose entolongweni."
Luke12:59 Ndithi kuwe, Akusayi kukha uphume khona apho, ude uhlawule nemalanana yokugqibela."
Luke13:1 Ke kaloku kwaye kukho abathile ngelo xesha, ababembikela amaGalili, agazi uPilato waliphithikeza namadini awo."
Luke13:2 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Niba na loo maGalili ebengaboni ngaphezu kwawo onke amaGalili, ngokuba eve ubunzima obunjalo?"
Luke13:3 Ndithi kuni, Hayi; nothi, xa sukuba ningaguquki, nitshabalale kwangokunjalo nonke."
Luke13:4 Hi, bona abo balishumi elinesibhozo, bawelwa yinqaba eseSilowa, yababulala; niba na babenetyala ngaphezu kwabo bonke abantu abemiyo eYerusalem?"
Luke13:5 Ndithi kuni, Hayi; nothi, xa sukuba ningaguquki, nitshabalale kwangokunjalo nonke."
Luke13:6 Wathetha ke nalo mzekeliso; Ubani wayenomkhiwane, utyelwe esidiliyeni sakhe; weza efuna isiqhamo kuwo, akafumana nto."
Luke13:7 Wathi ke kumsebenzi-sidiliya, Uyabona, ndiminyaka mithathu ndiza ndifuna isiqhamo kulo mkhiwane, ndingafumani nto; wugawule; yini na ukuba uwuqobe umhlaba?"
Luke13:8 Aphendule ke yena wathi kuye, Nkosi, wuyeke nangalo mnyaka, ndide khendimbe ndiwurhaqe, ndigalele umgquba."
Luke13:9 Ukuba ke uthe wavelisa isiqhamo, wowuyeka; ke ukuba akubanga njalo, wobuya uwugawule."
Luke13:10 NgoMhla wokuPhumla wayefundisa kwenye yezindlu zesikhungu.
Luke13:11 Kwabonakala kukho ntokazi ibinomoya Wobulwelwe iminyaka elishumi elinesibhozo; yaye igobile, ingenako kanye ukuziphakamisa."
Luke13:12 Eyibonile ke uYesu, wayibiza wathi kuyo, Ntokazindini, khululeka ebulwelweni bakho."
Luke13:13 Wayibeka ke izandla; yoluka kwangoko, yazukisa uThixo."
Luke13:14 Waphendula umphathi wendlu yesikhungu, ecaphuka, ngokuba uYesu waphilisa ngesabatha, wathi ebantwini, Mithandathu imihla ekufanele kusetyenzwa ngayo; yizani ke ngoko niphiliswe, kungabi ngesabatha usuku."
Luke13:15 Yamphendula ke ngoko iNkosi, yathi, Mhanahanisindini, akathi na elowo kuni ayikhulule ngesabatha inkomo yakhe, nokuba liesile lakhe, emkhumbini wesitali, alirhole aye kuyiseza?"
Luke13:16 Lo ke, eyintombi ka-Abraham nje, ayibophileyo uSathana, khangela, le minyaka ilishumi elinesibhozo, ubengamele ukukhululwa na kulo mabophe ngomhla wesabatha?"
Luke13:17 Akuba ezithethile ezi zinto, badaniswa bonke abachasene naye; zathi zonke izihlwele zavuya ngazo zonke izinto ezizukileyo ezenziwa nguye."
Luke13:18 Wayesithi ke, Bufana nantoni na ubukumkani bukaThixo? ndiya kulifanisa nantoni na?"
Luke13:19 Bunjengokhozo lwemostade, awaluthabathayo umntu, waluphosa emyezweni wakhe; yahluma, yaba ngumthi omkhulu; zathi iintaka zezulu zahlala emasebeni awo."
Luke13:20 Wabuya wathi, Ndiya kubufanisa nantoni na ubukumkani bukaThixo?"
Luke13:21 Bufana negwele, awalithabathayo umfazi, walifihla ezilinganisweni zozithathu zomgubo, wada wabiliswa uphela."
Luke13:22 Waye ecanda kwimizi ngemizi, nemizana ngemizana, efundisa, esinga eYerusalem."
Luke13:23 Uthi ke omnye kuye, Nkosi, bambalwa na abasindiswayo? Wathi kubo."
Luke13:24 Uthe ke yena kubo, Zamani ukungena ngesango elimxinwa; ngokuba ndithi kuni, baninzi abaya kufuna ukungena, bakhohlwe."
Luke13:25 Xa athe wavuka umninindlu, waluvala ucango, naza naqala ukuma ngaphandle, nankqonkqoza elucangweni, nisithi, Nkosi, Nkosi, sivulele; Aphendule athi kuni, Andinazi apho nivela khona;"
Luke13:26 Noqala nithi, Sadla, sasela, phambi kwakho, wafundisa nasezitratweni zethu."
Luke13:27 Athi, Ndithi kuni, andinazi apho nivela khona; mkani kum, nina nonke basebenzi bobutshinga."
Luke13:28 Khona apho kuya kubakho ukulila nokutshixiza kwamazinyo, xa nithe nabona uAbraham, noIsake, noYakobi, nabo bonke abaprofeti, ebukumkanini bukaThixo; nibe ke nina nikhutshelwe phandle."
Luke13:29 Baya kuza bevela empumalanga nasentshonalanga, nasentla, nasezantsi, bangqengqe ebukumkanini bukaThixo."
Luke13:30 Yabonani, bakho abokugqibela abaya kuba ngabokuqala; bakho nabokuqala abaya kuba ngabokugqibela."
Luke13:31 Kwangaloo mini kweza abaFarisi abathile, besithi kuye, Phuma umke apha, ngokuba uHerode ufuna ukukubulala."
Luke13:32 Wathi kubo, Yiyani nithi kuloo mpungutye, Uyabona, ndikhupha iidemon, ndifinyeze iimpiliso, namhla nangomso; ndithi ngowesithathu umhla ndifeze."
Luke13:33 Kodwa ndimelwe kukuthi ndihambe namhlanje nangomso nangolandelayo, ngokuba akangekhe umprofeti atshabalale ngaphandle kweYerusalem."
Luke13:34 Yerusalem, Yerusalem, ebabulalayo abaprofeti, ibagibisele ngamatye abo bathunywe kuyo! kufuthi kangakanani na ndithande ukubahlanganisela ndawonye abantwana bakho, ngohlobo esithi isikhukukazi siwabuthele ndawonye amathole aso ngaphantsi kwamaphiko, anavuma!"
Luke13:35 Yabonani, indlu yenu ishiywa nani ize. Inene, ndithi kuni, Aniyi kuba sandibona, kude kube lixesha eniya kuthi, Makabongwe lowo uzayo egameni leNkosi."
Luke14:1 Kwathi, akuba engene ngesabatha endlwini yomnye wakubaphathi babaFarisi, ukuba adle isonka, bahlala bemlalele bona."
Luke14:2 Kwabonakala kukho phambi kwakhe mntu uthile unegalimoya.
Luke14:3 Waza uYesu wathetha kubachazi-mthetho nabaFarasi, esithi: “Ngaba kuvumelekile na ukuphilisa ngesabatha?"
Luke14:4 Bathi cwaka ke bona. Wamthabatha, wamphilisa, wamndulula;"
Luke14:5 Wabaphendula esithi, Ngubani na kuni othi, eneesile, nokuba yinkomo, yeyele emhadini, aze angayirholi kwaoko ngomhla wesabatha?"
Luke14:6 Ababa nako ukumphendula kwezo zinto.
Luke14:7 Ke kaloku wathetha umzekeliso kwababemenyiwe, akugqala ukunyula kwabo izilili zobukhulu; esithi kubo."
Luke14:8 Xa uthe wamenyelwa emsithweni ngubani, musa ukungqengqa esililini sobukhulu; hleze obekekileyo kunawe abe ubemenyiwe nguye;"
Luke14:9 eze lowo ukumemileyo, athi kuwe, Khwelela lo mntu; uze uqale ukuthabatha indawo esekugqibeleni udanile."
Luke14:10 Xa uthe wamenywa, hamba uye uhlale kweyona ndawo iphantsi, ukuze, xa athe weza lowo ukumemileyo, athi kuwe, Sihlobo, nyukela ngasentla; wandule ke ukuba nozuko emehlweni abo bahleli ndawonye nawe."
Luke14:11 Ngokuba wonke umntu oziphakamisayo, uya kuthotywa; nozithobayo uya kuphakanyiswa."
Luke14:12 Wayesithi ke nakulowo ummemileyo, Xa sukuba usenza isidlo sasemini, nokuba sesangokuhlwa, musa ukubiza izihlobo zakho, nabazalwana bakho, nemizalwane yakho, nabamelwane abazizityebi; hleze nabo babuye bakumeme, ize ibe yimbuyekezo kuwe."
Luke14:13 Yithi xa sukuba usenza isidlo, umeme amahlwempu, izilima, iziqhwala, iimfama;"
Luke14:14 Woba nentsikelelo; ngokuba àbanako ukubuyekeza kuwe; kuba uya kubuyekezwa wena eluvukweni lwamalungisa.
Luke14:15 Ke kaloku, akuziva ezo zinto omnye kwabo babehleli naye, wathi kuye, Unoyolo oya kudla isonka ebukumkanini bukaThixo."
Luke14:16 Uthe ke yena kuye, Umntu othile wenza isidlo esikhulu, wamema abaninzi."
Luke14:17 Wasusa umkhonzi wakhe ngelixa lesidlo, ukuba aye kuthi kwabamenyiweyo, Yizani; ngokuba zonke izinto sezilungile."
Luke14:18 Baqala bonke ngakunye ukuzilanduleka. Wathi owokuqala kuye, Ndithenge intsimi, kufuneka ukuba ndiye kuyibona; ndiyakucela, mandibe ngowabalandulelwayo."
Luke14:19 Wathi omnye, Ndithenge iinkomo zeedyokhwe ezintlanu, ndiya kuziva; ndiyakucela mandibe ngowabalandulelwayo."
Luke14:20 Wathi omnye, Ndizeke umfazi, ngenxa yoko andinakuza."
Luke14:21 Efikile loo mkhonzi, wayibikela ke inkosi yakhe ezo ndawo. Waqumba ke umninindlu, wathi kumkhonzi wakhe, Phuma kamsinya uye ezitratweni nakwizitrato zomzi, ungenise apha amahlwempu, nezilima, neziqhwala, neemfama."
Luke14:22 Wathi umkhonzi, Nkosi, kwenzeke njengoko ubuyalele, ukanti kusekho indawo."
Luke14:23 Yathi inkosi kumkhonzi, Phuma uye ezindleleni nasezintangweni, ubanyanzele bangene, ukuze indlu yam izale."
Luke14:24 Kuba ndithi kuni, akukho nanye kuloo madoda abemenyiwe, eya kusiva isidlo sam."
Luke14:25 Kwaye kuhamba naye izihlwele ezikhulu; wajika, wathi kuzo."
Luke14:26 Ukuba ubani uza kum, angamthiyi uyise, nonina, nomfazi, nabantwana, nabazalwana, nodade, ewe, nobakhe ubomi, akanakuba ngumfundi wam."
Luke14:27 Nosukuba engawuthwali umnqamlezo wakhe, andilandele, akanakuba ngumfundi wam."
Luke14:28 Kuba nguwuphi na kuni othi, ethanda ukwakha inqaba, angakhe ahlale phantsi kuqala, abale indleko, ukuba unazo na izinto zokuyigqiba?"
Luke14:29 Hleze, akubon’ ukuba usibekile isiseko, angabi nakugqiba, bathi bonke ababonayo baqale ukuhlekisa ngaye;"
Luke14:30 besithi, Lo mntu waqala ukwakha, wakhohlwa ukugqiba."
Luke14:31 Kananjalo nguwuphi na ukumkani othi, esiya kuhlangana nomnye ukumkani emfazweni, angakhe ahlale phantsi kuqala, acinge ukuba unako na, enashumi-nye lamawaka, ukuhlangabeza omzelayo enamashumi amabini amawaka?"
Luke14:32 Ukuba ke akanako, uthi esekude, athume isigidimi, acele iindawo zoxolo."
Luke14:33 Ngokukwanjalo ngoko, wonke umntu kuni ongazishiyiyo zonke iimpahla zakhe, akanakuba ngumfundi wam."
Luke14:34 Ityiwa ilungile, kodwa ukuba ithe ayaba nasongo, yothiwani na ukuvakaliswa?"
Luke14:35 Awuwulungele nomhlaba, awuwulungele nomgquba; kodwa abantu bayawukhupha. Lowo uneendlebe zokuva makeve."
Luke15:1 Ke kaloku, babesondela kuye bonke ababuthi berhafu naboni, ukuba bamve."
Luke15:2 Baye bekrokra abaFarisi nababhali, besithi, Lo wamkela aboni, adle nabo."
Luke15:3 Wathetha lo mzekeliso kubo, esithi,"
Luke15:4 Nguwuphi na umntu kuni othi, enekhulu lezimvu, ize kulahleke enye kuzo, angazishiyi ezingamashumi asithoba anesithoba entlango, asinge kuleyo ilahlekileyo, ade ayifumane?"
Luke15:5 Athi ke akuyifumana, ayibeke emagxeni akhe, evuya."
Luke15:6 Athi akufika ekhaya, ababizele ndawonye abahlobo nabamelwane, esithi kubo, Vuyisanani nam; ngokuba ndiyifumene imvu yam ebilahlekile."
Luke15:7 Ndithi kuni, ngokukwanjalo kuya kubakho uvuyo emazulwini ngomoni eba mnye oguqukayo, kunamashumi asithoba anesithoba amalungisa, angaswele nguquko."
Luke15:8 Kanti nguwuphi na umfazi eneedrarhima zilishumi, ongethi, ukuba ithe yalahleka enye idrarhima, alumeke isibane, ayitshayele indlu, afune enyamekile, ade ayifumane?"
Luke15:9 Athi akuyifumana, ababizele ndawonye abahlobo nabamelwane, esithi, Vuyisanani nam; kuba ndiyifumene intwana ebindilahlekile."
Luke15:10 Ngokukwanjalo ndithi kuni, kubakho uvuyo emehlweni ezithunywa zikaThixo ngomoni eba mnye oguqukayo."
Luke15:11 Uthe ke, Umntu othile ube enoonyana ababini."
Luke15:12 Wathi omnci wabo kuyise, Bawo, ndinike isahlulo sempahla esilunge nam. Wababela ke ukudla kwakhe."
Luke15:13 Kuthe kungekabi ntsuku zininzi, wahlanganisa into yonke unyana omnci, wesuka kwelakowabo, waya ezweni elikude;"
Luke15:14 Akubon’ ukuba udle konke, kwabakho indlala enzima kwelo zwe; waqala ukuswela."
Luke15:15 Waya wanamathela komnye kubemi belo zwe; wathi yena wamthumela emihlabeni yakhe, ukuba aye kwalusa iihagu."
Luke15:16 Ubenqwenela ke ukusizalisa isisu sakhe ngeengxam ezabe zidliwa ziihagu; bekungekho mntu umphayo.
Luke15:17 Ke kaloku, akuba nokuziqonda, wathi, Kanene bangakanani na abaqeshwa bakabawo abadikwa zizonka, kanti ke mna ndiphela yindlala."
Luke15:18 Ndiya kusuka ndiye kubawo, ndithi kuye, Bawo, ndonile kuwo amazulu, nasemehlweni akho."
Luke15:19 Andisafanele kubizwa ngonyana wakho; ndénze ndibe njengomnye kubaqeshwa bakho.
Luke15:20 Wesuka ke waya kuyise. Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba usekude lee, uyise wambona, wasikwa yimfesane, wagidima, wawa entanyeni yakhe, wamanga."
Luke15:21 Uthe ke unyana kuye, Bawo, ndonile kuwo amazulu, nasemehlweni akho; andisafanele kubizwa ngokuba ndingunyana wakho."
Luke15:22 Uthe ke uyise kubakhonzi bakhe, Rholani ingubo ende, eyona intle, nimambathise; afake umsesane esandleni sakhe, neembadada ezinyaweni zakhe."
Luke15:23 Nizise ithole, eliya lityetyisiweyo, nilixhele; sidle, sibe nemihlali;"
Luke15:24 Ngokuba lo nyana wam ubefile, wabuya waphila; ubelahlekile, wafunyanwa. Baqala ke ukuba nemihlali."
Luke15:25 Ke kaloku unyana wakhe omkhulu ebesentsimini. Wathi xa esondela endlwini, weva iingoma nokungqungqa."
Luke15:26 Wabizela kuye omnye kubakhonzi, wambuza ukuba zingaba ziyini na ezi zinto."
Luke15:27 Uthe ke yena kuye, Umninawa wakho ufikile; uyihlo ke uxhele ithole, eliya lityetyisiweyo; ngokuba ebuye wamzuza ephilile."
Luke15:28 Waqumba akavuma ukungena. Waphuma uyise, wambongoza."
Luke15:29 Waphendula ke yena wathi kuyise, Uyabona, le minyaka ingakanana ndiyakukhonza, andikhange ndigqithe mthetho wakho;"
Luke15:30 kodwa xenikweni afikileyo lo nyana wakho, wayidlayo wayigqiba impilo yakho namahenyukazi, umxhelele ithole eliya lityetyisiweyo."
Luke15:31 Uthe ke yena kuye, Mntwana wam, wena uhleli unam, nazo zonke izinto zam zezakho."
Luke15:32 Kufanelekile ukuba senze imihlali, sivuye; ngokuba umninawa wakho lo ubefile, wabuya waphila; ubelahlekile, wafunyanwa."
Luke16:1 Ke kaloku, wayesithi nakubafundi bakhe, Kwaye kukho umntu othile osisityebi, obenegosa; laza lona lamangalelwa kuye, lokuba uyichithe impahla yakhe."
Luke16:2 Elibizile ke, wathi kulo, Yintoni na le ndiyivayo ngawe? Khawenze ingxelo yobugosa bakho; kuba akusayi kuba saba ligosa."
Luke16:3 Lathi ke igosa ngaphakathi kwalo, Ndiya kuthini na? Ngokuba inkosi yam iyabuhlutha ubugosa kum; ukungqiba ndineentloni."
Luke16:4 O! ndiyayazi into endiya kuyenza, ukuze xa ndithe ndakhutshwa ebugoseni, bandamkele ezindlwini zabo."
Luke16:5 Libabizele kulo ngabanye abanetyala enkosini yalo, lathi kowokuqala, Unatyala lingakanani na enkosini yam?"
Luke16:6 Uthe ke yena, Likhulu leekore zeoli. Wathi kuye, Thabatha incwadi yakho, uhlale phantsi kamsinya, ubhale amashumi amahlanu."
Luke16:7 Aze athi komnye, Wena ke unatyala lingakanani na? Uthe ke yena, Likhulu leekore zengqolowa. Wathi kuye, Thabatha incwadi yakho, ubhale amashumi asibhozo."
Luke16:8 Yaza inkosi leyo yalincoma igosa elingalungisiyo, ngokuba lenza ngokuqonda; ngokuba bona abeli phakade kwesabo isizukulwana banokuqonda, ngaphezu kwabo abokukhanya."
Luke16:9 Nam ndithi kuni, Zenzeleni izihlobo ngobutyebi bokungalungisi; ukuze xa nithe naphelelwa, banamkele eminqubeni engunaphakade."
Luke16:10 Othembekileyo kokona kuncinane, uthembekile nakokukhulu; nongalungisiyo kokuncinane, akalolungisa nakokukhulu."
Luke16:11 Ukuba ngoko anibanga nakuthembeka ebutyebini bokungalungisi, ngubani na owonithemba kobo buyinyaniso?"
Luke16:12 Ukuba anibanga nakuthembeka koko komnye, ngubani na oya kuninika okukokwenu?"
Luke16:13 Akukho mkhonzi unako ukukhonza nkosi mbini; kuba eya kuyithiya le, athande leya; athi mhlawumbi abambelele kule, ayidele leya; Aninako ukukhonza uThixo nobutyebi."
Luke16:14 Ke kaloku baye beziva ezo ndawo zonke nabo abaFarisi, amathanda-mali; baye bemsinekela ke."
Luke16:15 Wathi kubo, Nina ningabazigwebelayo emehlweni abantu; kodwa uThixo uyazazi iintliziyo zenu; kuba oko kuphakanyisiweyo phakathi kwabantu, kulisikizi emehlweni kaThixo."
Luke16:16 Umthetho nabaprofeti babekho kwada kwakuYohane; kuselokoko, ubukumkani bukaThixo buyashunyayelwa, bonke bayangena kubo ngokugonyamela."
Luke16:17 Ke kulula ukuba lidlule izulu nomhlaba, kunokuba kuwe nalinye isuntswana lomthetho."
Luke16:18 Othe wamala umfazi wakhe, wazeka omnye, uyakrexeza; nomntu wonke ozeka owaliweyo endodeni, uyakrexeza."
Luke16:19 Ke bekukho umntu othile osisityebi, obevatha ezibomvu nezelinen ecikizekileyo, esenza imihlali yokuzuka kwakhe imihla yonke."
Luke16:20 Kwaye kukho inqindi ethile egama linguLazaro, eyayibekwe esangweni lakhe, ezele zizilonda;"
Luke16:21 Linqwenela ukuhluthiswa ngeemvuthuluka eziwa etafileni yesityebi eso; zibe zisithi izinja, zize zikhothe izilonda zaso."
Luke16:22 Lafa ke ihlwempu elo, lasiwa zizithunywa zezulu esifubeni sika-Abraham; safa ke nesityebi, sangcwatywa."
Luke16:23 Esesihogweni, wawaphakamisa amehlo akhe, esezintuthukweni, wambona uAbraham ekude, noLazaro esesifubeni sakhe."
Luke16:24 Samemeza sona sathi, Bawo, Abraham, ndenzele inceba, uthume uLazaro, ukuba athi nkxu incam yomnwe wakhe emanzini, aphozise ulwimi lwam; ngokuba ndiyathuthunjelwa kweli langatye."
Luke16:25 Uthe ke uAbraham, Mntwana wam, khumbula ukuba wena wazifincelela ebomini bakho izinto zakho ezilungileyo, noLazaro ngokukwanjalo izinto ezimbi; ngoku ke yena uyathuthuzelwa, wena ke uyathuthunjelwa."
Luke16:26 Ngaphezu koko ke, phakathi kwethu nani kuthiwe zinzi umsantsa omkhulu, ukuze aba bathanda ukuphumela, besuka apha besiya kuni, bangabi nako; kananjalo abanako ukuwela beze kuthi, abaphuma nalapho."
Luke16:27 Sathi, Ndiyakucela ngoko, bawo, ukuba umthume endlwini kabawo;"
Luke16:28 Kuba ndinabazalwana abahlanu; ukuze abaqononondise, ukuze bangathi nabo beze kule ndawo yentuthumbo."
Luke16:29 Athi uAbraham kuso, BanoMoses nabaprofeti; mabeve bona."
Luke16:30 Sithe ke sona, Hayi, bawo Abraham; ukuba kuthe kwaya kubo ovela kwabafileyo, boguquka."
Luke16:31 Uthe ke kuso, Ukuba uMoses nabaprofeti ababeva, abayi koyiseka, nokuba kuthe kwavuka bani kwabafileyo."
Luke17:1 Wathi ke kubo abafundi, Azinakuba zingezi izikhubekiso; yeha ke, loo mntu ziza ngaye!"
Luke17:2 Ngekumlungele kanye ukuba agangxwe ilitye lokusila entanyeni yakhe, wajulelwa elwandle, kunokuba akhubekise noko amnye kwaba bancinane."
Luke17:3 Zilumkeleni; ukuba ke umzalwana wakho uthe wakona, mkhalimele; ukuba uthe waguquka, mxolele."
Luke17:4 Nokuba uthe wakona kasixhenxe ngemini, waza wabuyela kuwe kasixhenxe ngemini, esithi, Ndiyaguquka, utsho uYehova; uze umxolele."
Luke17:5 Bathi ke abapostile eNkosini, Songezelele elukholweni."
Luke17:6 Ithe ke iNkosi, Ukuba beninokholo olunjengokhozo lwemostade, beningathi kulo mthombe, Ncothuka, utyaleke phakathi elwandle; yaye ifanele ikuthobele."
Luke17:7 Nguwuphi na ke kuni othi, enomkhonzi elima, mhlawumbi esalusa, oya kuthi, akungena evela entsimini, athi kwaoko kuye, Yiza uhlale phantsi;"
Luke17:8 Ongayi kuthi kanye kuye, Lungisa into endiya kuyidla, uze ubhinqe, undilungiselele, ndide ndidle ndisele; wothi emva koko udle usele wena?"
Luke17:9 Anganombulelo kuloo mkhonzi yini na, ngokuba enze izinto azimiselweyo? Andijongi."
Luke17:10 Ngokukwanjalo nani, xa nithe nazenza zonke izinto enazimiselwayo, yithini, Singabakhonzi abangancedi lutho;"
Luke17:11 Kwathi ekuhambeni kwakhe ukuya eYerusalem, wacanda phakathi kwelaseSamariya nelaseGalili."
Luke17:12 Akuba engene mzini uthile, amhlangabeza amadoda alishumi aneqhenqa, amela mgama."
Luke17:13 Wona aphakamisa ilizwi, esithi, Yesu, Nkosi, senzele inceba."
Luke17:14 Ewabonile ke, wathi kuwo, Hambani niye kuzibonakalalisa kubabingeleli. Kwathi ke, ekuhambeni kwabo, bahlanjululwa."
Luke17:15 Ithe ke enye kuwo, yakubona ukuba iphilisiwe, yabuya imzukisa uThixo ngezwi elikhulu."
Luke17:16 Yawa ngobuso ezinyaweni zakhe, ibulela kuye; yaye yona ingumSamariya."
Luke17:17 Uphendule ke uYesu wathi, Bebengahlanjululwanga balishumi na? Baphi na ke abalithoba?"
Luke17:18 Akufumanekanga na babuyileyo, besiza kuzukisa uThixo, ngulo wolunye uhlanga yedwa na?"
Luke17:19 Wathi kuyo, Vuka, uhambe; ukholo lwakho lukusindisile."
Luke17:20 Ke kaloku, akubuzwa ngabaFarisi ukuba ubukumkani bukaThixo buya kufika nini na, wabaphendula wathi, Ubukumkani bukaThixo abufiki bunokulolongeka."
Luke17:21 Kananjalo abasayi kuthi, Nanku apha! okanye, nankuya phaya! Kuba, yabonani, ubukumkani bukaThixo bungaphakathi kwenu."
Luke17:22 Wathi ke kubo abafundi, Kuya kufika mihla, niya kunqwenela ngayo ukuwubona noko umnye umhla woNyana woMntu, ningawuboni;"
Luke17:23 baya kuthi ke kuni, Nanku apha; nokuba, yabonani; musani ukubalandela, ningawalandeli;"
Luke17:24 Kuba kwanjengokuba umbane ubaneka, uphuma kwelinye icala eliphantsi kwezulu, ukhanye usingise kwelinye eliphantsi kwezulu; uya kuba njalo uNyana woMntu ngomhla wakhe."
Luke17:25 Kodwa kuqala umelwe kukuthi eve ubunzima obukhulu, alahlwe sesi sizukulwana."
Luke17:26 Njengokuba kwaye kuhle ngemihla kaNowa, koba kwanjalo nangemihla yoNyana woMntu."
Luke17:27 Babesidla, babesela, babezeka, babesendisa, kwada kwayimini awangena ngayo uNowa emkhombeni, wafika unogumbe, wabatshabalalisa bonke."
Luke17:28 Kwaba kwanjalo nangemihla kaLothe; babesidla, babesela, babethenga, babethengisa, babetyala, babesakha;"
Luke17:29 Kodwa ngemini awaphuma ngayo uLote eSodom, kwana umlilo nesulfure ezulwini, batshatyalaliswa bonke."
Luke17:30 Kuya kuba kwanjengoko ngemini atyhileka ngayo uNyana woMntu.
Luke17:31 Ngaloo mini, oya kuba phezu kwendlu, zibe iimpahla zakhe zisendlwini, makangehli aye kuzithabatha; nosentsimini makangabuyeli emva."
Luke17:32 Khumbulani umkaLote.
Luke17:33 Othe wafuna ukuwusindisa umphefumlo wakhe, wolahlekelwa nguwo; yaye othe wawulahla umphefumlo wakhe, wowusindisa."
Luke17:34 Ndithi kuni, Ngobo busuku ababini boba sililini sinye; omnye amkelwe, omnye ashiywe."
Luke17:35 Abafazi ababini boba besila ndawonye; omnye amkelwe, omnye ashiywe."
Luke17:36 Amadoda amabini aya kube esentsimini; omnye amkelwe, omnye ashiywe."
Luke17:37 Baphendula ke bathi kuye, Phi na, Nkosi? Wathi ke kubo, Apho ukhoyo umzimba, aya kuhlanganisana khona amaxhalanga."
Luke18:1 Ke kaloku, wayethetha nomzekeliso kubo, wokuba bamelwe kukuhlala bethandaza, bangethi amandla;"
Luke18:2 Esithi, Kwaye kukho umgwebi emzini othile, ongamoyikiyo uThixo, ongamhloneleyo nomntu."
Luke18:3 Kwaye kukho umhlolokazi othile kuloo mzi, yeza kuye isithi, Ndikhulule kummangaleli wam."
Luke18:4 Kwaba mzuzu engavumi; kodwa kamva wathi ngaphakathi kwakhe, Nakuba ndingamoyiki uThixo, ndingamhlonele nomntu;"
Luke18:5 noko, ngenxa yokuba lo mhlolokazi endibulala, ndomlungisa, ndimkhulule, hleze ade eze andaphule."
Luke18:6 Ithe ke iNkosi, Kuveni okuthethwa ngumgwebi ongalungisiyo."
Luke18:7 Ke yena uThixo akayi kukha abalungise na abanyulwa bakhe, abakhala kuye imini nobusuku, noko azeka kade umsindo ngabo?"
Luke18:8 Ndithi kuni, Uya kubalungisa, abakhulule kamsinya. Kodwa ke akufika uNyana woMntu, wolufumana na ke ukholo ehlabathini apha?"
Luke18:9 Ke kaloku wathetha lo mzekeliso kwabathile, ababekholose ngokuthi ngaphakathi kwabo bangamalungisa, bebadela abanye."
Luke18:10 Amadoda amabini enyuka aya etempileni, esiya kuthandaza; omnye engumFarisi, omnye engumbuthi werhafu."
Luke18:11 UmFarisi, ezimise yedwa, wayethandaza esithi, Thixo, ndiyabulela kuwe, ukuba ndingenjengabanye abantu, abaphangi, abangemalungisa, abakrexezi; ndingenjengaye nalo mbuthi werhafu."
Luke18:12 Ndizila ukudla kabini ngeveki, ndinikela izishumi zako konke endikuzuzayo."
Luke18:13 Waye umbuthi werhafu emi kude, engathandi nokuphakamisela amehlo akhe ngasezulwini, wasuke wabetha esifubeni sakhe, esithi, Thixo, yiba netarhu kum, mna moni."
Luke18:14 Ndithi kuni, Wehla lo waya endlwini yakhe, egwetyelwe yena kunalowa; ngokuba wonke umntu oziphakamisayo uva kuthotywa; nozithobayo uya kuphakanyiswa."
Luke18:15 Kwaye ke bezisa kuye neentsana zabo, ukuze azichukumise; bebonile ke abafundi bakhe, babakhalimela."
Luke18:16 Ke yena uYesu wazibizela kuye, wathi, Bavumeleni abantwana beze kum, ningabaleli; kuba ubukumkani bukaThixo bubobabo banjalo."
Luke18:17 Inene, ndithi kuni, Othe akabamkela ubukumkani bukaThixo njengomntwana, akasayi kukha angene kubo."
Luke18:18 Umphathi othile wambuza, esithi, Mfundisi ulungileyo, mandenze ntoni na, ukuze ndibudle ilifa ubomi obungunaphakade?"
Luke18:19 Uthe ke uYesu kuye, Yini na ukuba uthi ndilungile? Akukho ulungileyo, mnye kwaphela, nguThixo."
Luke18:20 Uyayazi imithetho: musa ukukrexeza, musa ukubulala, musa ukuba, musa ukungqina ubuxoki, beka uyihlo nonyoko."
Luke18:21 Uthe ke yena, Zonke ezo zinto ndazigcina kwasebuncinaneni bam."
Luke18:22 Ekuvile ke oko uYesu, wathi kuye, Kusekho nto-nye uyisweleyo; zonke izinto onazo thengisa ngazo, wabele amahlwempu; woba nobutyebi ke emazulwini; uze ke undilandele."
Luke18:23 Ezivile ke ezo ndawo, waba buhlungu kakhulu; kuba ube esisityebi kunene."
Luke18:24 uYesu akumbona ebuhlungu kakhulu, wathi, Hayi, ukuba ngenkankulu ukuya kungena kwabo banobutyebi ebukumkanini bukaThixo!"
Luke18:25 Kuba kulula ukuba inkamela iphumele entunjeni yenaliti, kunokuba isityebi singene ebukumkanini bukaThixo."
Luke18:26 Bathi ke abo bevayo, Ngubani na ke ongasindiswayo?"
Luke18:27 Uthe ke yena, Izinto ezingenakwenzeka kubantu, zinokwenzeka kuye uThixo."
Luke18:28 Uthe ke uPetros, Uyabona, thina sishiye iinto zonke sakulandela."
Luke18:29 Wathi kubo, Inene, ndithi kuni, Akukho namnye ushiye indlu, nokuba ngabazali, nokuba ngabazalwana, nokuba ngumfazi, nokuba ngabantwana, ngenxa yobukumkani bukaThixo;"
Luke18:30 ongasayi kwamkela izinto eziphindaphindiweyo ngalo eli xesha, aze ngelo lizayo iphakade amkele ubomi obungunaphakade."
Luke18:31 Ke kaloku ubathabathile abalishumi elinababini, wathi kubo, Niyabona, siyenyuka, siya eYerusalem; zaye ziya kuphelela zonke izinto ezibhaliweyo ngabaprofeti, kuye uNyana woMntu."
Luke18:32 Kuba uya kunikelwa kuzo iintlanga, kudlalwe ngaye, aphathwe kakubi, atshicelwe;"
Luke18:33 Baya kumtyakatya, bambulale, athi ngomhla wesithathu abuye avuke."
Luke18:34 Bona abaqondanga nento kwezi zinto; laye neli lizwi lifihlakele kubo, babengazazi izinto ezithethwayo."
Luke18:35 Kwathi ke ekusondeleni kwakhe eYeriko, kuhleli imfama ethile ngasendleleni, ingqiba."
Luke18:36 Ithe yakuva kudlula isihlwele, yamana ibuza ukuba ingaba yintoni na le."
Luke18:37 Bayixelela ke ukuba kudlula uYesu waseNazarete.
Luke18:38 Yabhomboloza isithi, Yesu, nyana kaDavide, ndenzele inceba."
Luke18:39 Baye abo babehamba ngaphambili beyikhalimela, ukuba ithi tu; kwaba kukhona ke yona ikhalayo ngakumbi, isithi, Nyana kaDavide, ndenzele inceba."
Luke18:40 Wema ke uYesu, wathi mayiziswe kuye,"
Luke18:41 esithi, Ufuna ukuba ndikwenzele ntoni na? Ithe ke yona, Nkosi, ukuba ndibuye ndibone."
Luke18:42 uYesu wathi kuyo, Buya ubone; ukholo lwakho lukusindisile."
Luke18:43 Kwangoko yabuya yabona, yamlandela imzukisa uThixo; bathi bonke abantu, bakukubona oko, badumisa uThixo."
Luke19:1 Waye engene uYesu, ecanda eYeriko."
Luke19:2 Kwakho ndoda ibizwa ngegama elinguZakeyu; yaye yona iyintloko yababuthi berhafu; yaye isisityebi yona.
Luke19:3 Yayifuna ukumbona uYesu, ukuba ngubani na; ayaba nako ngenxa yendimbane, ngokuba enesiqu esincinane."
Luke19:4 Wabaleka ke, wakhwela emthini womthombe ukuba ambone, kuba wayeza kudlula ngaloo ndlela."
Luke19:5 Akufika kuloo ndawo, wakhangela phezulu uYesu, wayibona, wathi kuyo, Zakeyu, khawuleza uhle; kuba namhlanje ndimelwe kukuhlala endlwini yakho."
Luke19:6 Wakhawuleza ke, wehla, wamamkela ngobubele, evuya."
Luke19:7 Baye bonke, bakuyibona loo nto, bekrokra, besithi, Ungene waya kulala kwindoda engumoni."
Luke19:8 Wema ke uZakeyu, wathi kuyo iNkosi; Uyabona, isiqingatha sempahla yam, Nkosi, ndisinika amahlwempu; ukuba ndidle into kabani na ngobuxoki, ndimbuyisela kane."
Luke19:9 Uthe ke uYesu kuye, Namhlanje kufike usindiso kule ndlu, ngokokuba naye engunyana ka-Abraham."
Luke19:10 Kuba uNyana woMntu weza kufuna nokusindisa oko kulahlekileyo.
Luke19:11 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba bayaziva ezi zinto, uqokele wathetha umzekeliso, ngenxa yokuba ebekufuphi eYerusalem, nangokuba babesiba ubukumkani bukaThixo buza kubonakala kwangoko."
Luke19:12 Uthe ngoko, Umntu othile olinene wahambela ezweni elikude, eya kuzamkelela ubukumkani, aze abuye."
Luke19:13 Ubabizile ke abakhonzi bakhe abalishumi, wabanika iimina zalishumi, wathi kubo, Rhwebani, ndide ndifike."
Luke19:14 Ke abemi bomzi wakhe babemthiyile, bathumela izigidimi emva kwakhe, besithi, Asifuni ukuba lo abe ngukumkani phezu kwethu."
Luke19:15 Kwathi akuba ebuyile, ebamkele ubukumkani, wathi, mababizelwe kuye abo bakhonzi wayebanike imali leyo, ukuze azi ukuba unantsi urhwebe ntoni na."
Luke19:16 Weza ke owokuqala, esithi, Nkosi, imina yakho yenze iimina zalishumi."
Luke19:17 Uthe kuye, Hee ke, mkhonzi ulungileyo; ngokuba waba nokuthembeka entweni encinanana, yiba negunya kwimizi elishumi."
Luke19:18 Weza nowesibini, esithi, Nkosi, imina yakho yenze iimina zantlanu."
Luke19:19 Wathi nakuye, Nawe yiba phezu kwezixeko ezihlanu."
Luke19:20 Weza nomnye esithi, Nkosi, nantsi imina yakho endibe ndinayo, ndiyibeke eqhiyeni;"
Luke19:21 kuba ndibe ndikoyika wena, ngokuba ungumntu obungqabangqaba, uthabatha into ongayibekanga, uvune into ongayihlwayelanga."
Luke19:22 Athi ke kuye, Ndiya kukugweba ngokuphuma emlonyeni wakho, mkhonzindini ungendawo; ubusazi nje ukuba mna ndingumntu obungqabangqaba, othabatha into angayibekanga, avune into angayihlwayelanga;"
Luke19:23 ibiyini na phofu, ukuba ungayibeki imali yam ebhankini, ndaza mna ekufikeni ndaba ndiyibize inenzala?"
Luke19:24 Wathi kwababemi khona, Mhlutheni imina leyo, niyinike lowo uneemina ezilishumi."
Luke19:25 Bathi ke kuye, Nkosi, uneemina ezilishumi."
Luke19:26 Kuba ndithi kuni, Wonke umntu onako uya kunikwa; ongenako, uya kuhluthwa kwanoko anako."
Luke19:27 Ke zona ezo ntshaba zam zazingathandanga ukuba ndibe ngukumkani phezu kwazo, ziziseni apha, nizincinithe phambi kwam."
Luke19:28 Waye, akuba ezithethile ezi zinto, ehamba ngaphambili, enyuka esiya eYerusalem."
Luke19:29 Kwathi, akuba esondele eBhetefage naseBhetani, entabeni ekuthiwa yeyemiNquma, wesusa bababini kubafundi bakhe,"
Luke19:30 esithi, Hambani niye emzaneni lo ukhangelene nani; nothi, nakungena kuwo, nifumane iesile libotshelelwe, ekungazanga kuhlale namnye umntu phezu kwalo; likhululeni nilizise apha."
Luke19:31 Nokuba ubani uyanibuza, esithi, Yini na ukuba nilikhulule? nothi kuye, Liyafuneka eNkosini."
Luke19:32 Basuka ke baya abo babethunyiwe, bafumana kunjengoko abekutshilo kubo."
Luke19:33 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba bayalikhulula ithole, bathi abaninilo kubo, Nilikhululelani na ithole?"
Luke19:34 Bathi ke bona, Liyafuneka eNkosini."
Luke19:35 Balizisa kuYesu, baphosa iingubo zabo phezu kwethole elo, bamkhwelisa uYesu."
Luke19:36 Akubon’ ukuba uyahamba ke, bamana bezandlala iingubo zabo endleleni."
Luke19:37 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba selesondele ekuhleni kwayo iNtaba yemiNquma, yaqala yonke inkitha yabafundi yavuya, yadumisa uThixo ngezwi elikhulu, ngayo yonke imisebenzi yamandla abayibonayo;"
Luke19:38 besithi, Makabongwe lo Kumkani uzayo egameni leNkosi;"
Luke19:39 Bathi kuye abathile bakubaFarisi esihlweleni apho, Mfundisi, bakhalimele abafundi bakho."
Luke19:40 Waphendula wathi kubo, Ndithi kuni, kuthe cwaka aba, kunkqangaze amatye la."
Luke19:41 Akusondela, wawubona umzi, wawulilela,"
Luke19:42 esithi, Akwaba ubusazi nawe lo kwangayo yona le mini yakho, izinto ezizezoxolo lwakho! kungoku zifihliwe emehlweni akho."
Luke19:43 Kuba uya kufikelwa yimihla, eziya kuthi iintshaba zakho zikubiyele ngothango, zikurhangqe, zikuxine ngeenxa zonke;"
Luke19:44 zikukhahlele phantsi wena, nabantwana bakho phakathi kwakho; zingashiyi litye phezu kwelitye kuwe; ngokuba ungalazanga ixesha lokuvelelwa kwakho."
Luke19:45 Wayengena etempileni, waqala ukubakhupha abo babethengisa kuyo, nababethenga;"
Luke19:46 esithi kubo, Kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Indlu yam yindlu yokuthandaza; ke nina niyenze umqolomba wezihange."
Luke19:47 Wayefundisa imihla ngemihla etempileni apho. Baye ke ababingeleli abakhulu, nababhali, kwanabaziintloko zabantu, befuna ukumtshabalalisa;"
Luke19:48 Baye ke bengafumani nto banokuyenza, kuba bonke abantu babemlalele ngenyameko."
Luke20:1 Kwathi ngenye imini, akubon’ ukuba uyabafundisa abantu etempileni, eshumayela iindaba ezilungileyo, wafikelwa ngababingeleli abakhulu nababhali, namadoda amakhulu."
Luke20:2 Bathetha kuye besithi, Sixelele; uzenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto? Ngubani na ke okunike eli gunya?"
Luke20:3 Waphendula ke wathi kubo, Nam ndiya kubuza kuni zwi-nye; kwaye undiphendule:"
Luke20:4 Ubhaptizo lukaYohane lwaluphuma emazulwini, lwaluphuma ebantwini, sini na?"
Luke20:5 Bacamanga ke bona bodwa, besithi, Ukuba sithe, Lwaluphuma emazulwini; Wothi, Ibiyini na phofu ukuba ningakholwa nguye?"
Luke20:6 Ukuba ke sithe, Lwaphuma ebantwini; bonke abantu bosigibisela ngamatye; kuba beyisekile ukuba uYohane ubengumprofeti."
Luke20:7 Baphendula ngokuthi, abazi ukuba luvela phi na."
Luke20:8 Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Nam ke andinixeleli ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto."
Luke20:9 Waza waqala wathetha ebantwini lo mzekeliso; Ubani watyala isidiliya, waqeshisa ngaso kubalimi, wahambela kwelinye ilizwe umzuzu owaneleyo."
Luke20:10 Wathi ngelo xesha, wathuma umkhonzi kubalimi, ukuba bamnike esiqhameni sesidiliya; ke bona abalimi bamtyabula, bamndulula elambatha."
Luke20:11 Wabuya wathuma omnye umkhonzi. Bamtyabula ke nalowo, bamhlazisa, bamndulula elambatha."
Luke20:12 Waphinda wathuma nowesithathu; naye lowo bamngxwelerha, bamkhuphela ngaphandle."
Luke20:13 Uthe ke umninisidiliya, Ndiya kuthini na? Ndiya kuthuma unyana wam oyintanda; mhlawumbi bomhlonela yena."
Luke20:14 Bathe ke bakumbona abalimi, bacamanga bodwa, besithi, Yindlalifa le; yizani, siyibulale, ukuze ilifa libe lelethu."
Luke20:15 Bamkhuphela ngaphandle kwesidiliya, bambulala. Uya kuthini na ke ngoko kubo umninisidiliya?"
Luke20:16 Uya kufika abatshabalalise abo balimi, asinikele bambi isidiliya eso. Bakuva ke bona, bathi, Makube lee!"
Luke20:17 Wondela ke kubo, wathi, Yintoni na phofu le ibhaliweyo: Ilitye abalicekisayo abakhi, Lelona laba yintloko yembombo?"
Luke20:18 Bonke abathe bawa phezu kweli litye, botyumka; ke lowo lithe lamwela liya kumcola."
Luke20:19 Baza ababingeleli abakhulu nababhali bafuna ukumsa izandla ngelo lixa; basuka boyika abantu, kuba baqonda ukuba uwuthethe ngabo lo mzekeliso."
Luke20:20 Bamcupha ke, bathuma iintlola ezizenza amalungisa, ukuze zimbambise ngokuthetha, ukuze bamnikele kurhuluneli nakwigunya lerhuluneli."
Luke20:21 Zambuza ke zisithi, Mfundisi, siyazi ukuba uthetha ufundise ngobulungisa, ungakhethi buso bamntu, usuka ufundise indlela kaThixo ngenyaniso."
Luke20:22 Kuvumelekile na ukuba simnike irhafu uKesare, akuvumelekile, sini na?"
Luke20:23 Ebuqondile kakuhle ubuqhetseba bazo, wathi kuzo, Nindilingelani na?"
Luke20:24 Ndiboniseni idenariyo. Inomfanekiso nombhalo kabani na? Baphendula bathi, NgokaKesare."
Luke20:25 Uthe ke kubo, Nikelani kaloku izinto zikaKesare kuKesare, nezinto zikaThixo kuThixo."
Luke20:26 Ababa nako ukumbamba amazwi akhe phambi kwabantu; bamangaliswa yimpendulo yakhe; bathi cwaka.
Luke20:27 Kwafika ke kuye abathile bakubaSadusi, bona abo bakuphikayo ukuba kukho uvuko; bambuza,"
Luke20:28 besithi, Mfundisi, uMoses wasibhalela wathi, Ukuba ozalana nothile uthe wafa enomfazi, wafa ke lowo engenabantwana, maze ozalana naye amzeke umfazi lowo, amvelisele imbewu umzalwana wakhe."
Luke20:29 Ke bekukho abantu abasixhenxe bezalana; waza owokuqala wazeka umfazi, wafa engenabantwana."
Luke20:30 Nowesibini wamzeka umfazi lowo, wafa naye engenabantwana."
Luke20:31 Nowesithathu wamzeka; Benjenjalo ke bosixhenxe, bafa bengashiyanga bantwana."
Luke20:32 Emveni ke kwabo bonke, wafa naye umfazi."
Luke20:33 Eluvukweni ngoko, ungumfazi wawuphi na kubo? kuba abasixhenxe bebenaye engumfazi."
Luke20:34 Waphendula ke uYesu wathi kubo, Abeli phakade bayazeka, bayendiswa;"
Luke20:35 ke bona abo kuthiwe bafanele ukufika kwelo phakade, nakukuvuka kwabafileyo, abazeki, abendiswa;"
Luke20:36 abasenakubuya bafe; kuba bengangezithunywa zezulu; bangoonyana bakaThixo, bengabovuko njalo."
Luke20:37 Ke kaloku, le ndawo yokuba abafileyo bayavuka, noMoses wayithi thupha kwindawo ethetha ngetyholo, xenikweni athi, iNkosi inguThixo ka-Abraham, inguThixo kaIsake, inguThixo kaYakobi."
Luke20:38 AkaThixo ke wabafileyo, ungowabaphilileyo; kuba bonke baphile ngaye."
Luke20:39 Baphendula ke abathile bakubabhali, bathi, Mfundisi, utyaphile ukutsho."
Luke20:40 Baye ke bengasenabuganga bakumbuza nento le.
Luke20:41 Wayesithi kubo, Batsho ngani na ukuthi, uKristu ngunyana kaDavide?"
Luke20:42 Uthi noDavide encwadini yeeNdumiso, Yathi iNkosi eNkosini yam, Hlala ngasekunene kwam;"
Luke20:43 Ndide iintshaba zakho ndizenze isihlalo seenyawo zakho.
Luke20:44 uDavide ngoko umbiza ngokuthi, Nkosi, ungunyana wakhe ngani na?"
Luke20:45 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba bayava abantu bonke, wathi kubafundi bakhe."
Luke20:46 Balumkeleni ababhali, abathanda ukuhamba ngezambatho ezinde, nemibuliso ezindaweni zembutho, nezihlalo eziphambili ezindlwini zesikhungu, neendawo eziphambili ezidlweni;"
Luke20:47 abadla izindlu zabahlolokazi, baze ngokunyhwalaza bathandaze uzungu; abo baya kwamkela ugwebo olugqithiseleyo."
Luke21:1 Waza wabona izityebi ziphosa iminikelo yazo emkhumbini wokulondoloza imali.
Luke21:2 Wabona ke mhlolokazi uthile ulihlwempu, ephosa apho iimalanana ezimbini."
Luke21:3 Wathi, Inene ndithi kuni, Lo mhlolokazi ulihlwempu uphose ngaphezu kwabo bonke;"
Luke21:4 Kuba bonke aba baphose eminikelweni kaThixo, bethabatha kwintabalala yabo; ukanti lo, ekusweleni kwakhe, uphose yonke impilo abenayo."
Luke21:5 Ke kaloku, kwakubon’ ukuba abathile bayathetha ngayo itempile, ukuba ihonjiswe ngamatye amahle nangeminikelo, wathi,"
Luke21:6 Ezi zinto nizibona nje, kuya kufika imihla ekungayi kusala litye phezu kwelitye, elingayi kuchithwa."
Luke21:7 Bambuza ke besithi, Mfundisi, ziya kubakho nini na ke ezi zinto? uya kuba yintoni na umqondiso, xa ezo zinto ziya kubakho?"
Luke21:8 Wathi ke yena, Lumkani ningalahlekiswa; kuba baninzi abaya kuza egameni lam, besithi, banguye uKristu; ixesha lisondele; musani ukubalandela ngoko."
Luke21:9 Xa nithe neva iimfazwe neziphithiphithi, musani ukunkwantya; kuba ezo zinto zimele ukuthi zihle kuqala; kodwa isiphelo asiyi kuba kwaoko."
Luke21:10 Wandula wathi kubo, Uhlanga luya kuvukelana nohlanga, nobukumkani buvukelane nobukumkani."
Luke21:11 Kuya kubakho iinyikima zomhlaba ezinkulu kwiindawo ngeendawo, neendlala, neendyikitya zokufa; kuya kubakho izinto ezoyikekayo, kwanemiqondiso emikhulu evela ezulwini."
Luke21:12 Ngaphambili ke kwazo zonke ezo zinto, baya kunisa izandla, banitshutshise, beninikela ezindlwini zesikhungu nasezintolongweni, nisiwe phambi kookumkani neerhuluneli ngenxa yegama lam."
Luke21:13 Oko ke kuya kuthi kube bubungqina kuni.
Luke21:14 Kumiseni ngoko ezintliziyweni zenu, ukuba ningakucingi ngaphambili ukuziphendulela."
Luke21:15 Kuba mna ndiya kuninika umlomo nobulumko, abangayi kuba nako ukubuphikisa nokumelana nabo, bonke abanichasileyo."
Luke21:16 Ke kaloku niya kunikelwa nangabazali, nangabazalwana, nayimizalwane, nazizihlobo; bathi inxenye kuni babulawe;"
Luke21:17 niya kuthiywa ngabantu bonke ngenxa yegama lam.
Luke21:18 Akusayi kutshabalala nonwele olu entlokweni yenu.
Luke21:19 Ekunyamezeleni kwenu, noyizuza imiphefumlo yenu."
Luke21:20 Xa nithe nayibona iYerusalem irhawulwe yimikhosi, yazini oko ukuba kusondele ukuphanza kwayo."
Luke21:21 Ngelo xa mabathi abakwelakwaYuda basabele ezintabeni; nabaphakathi kwawo mabaphume bemke; nabasemaphandleni mabangangeni kuwo.
Luke21:22 Kuba yimihla yempindezelo leyo, ukuze kuzaliseke konke okubhaliweyo."
Luke21:23 Yeha ke, abamithiyo nabanyisayo ngaloo mihla! kuba kuya kubakho ingxakeko enkulu ezweni, nengqumbo kwaba bantu;"
Luke21:24 Baya kuwa ngohlangothi lwekrele, bathinjwe, basiwe kuzo zonke iintlanga, neYerusalem inyathelelwe phantsi ziintlanga, ade azaliseke amaxesha eentlanga."
Luke21:25 Kuya kubakho imiqondiso elangeni nasenyangeni nasezinkwenkwezini; nasemhlabeni kubekho ukuxinezeleka kweentlanga, zithingaza; kugquma ulwandle namaza;"
Luke21:26 Abantu besifa kukoyika nakukulindela izinto ezilizelayo elimiweyo; kuba amandla ezulu aya kuzanyazanyiswa.
Luke21:27 Baya kumbona ke ngelo xesha uNyana woMntu esiza ngelifu, enamandla nobuqaqawuli obukhulu."
Luke21:28 Ke kaloku, zakubon’ ukuba ezi zinto ziyaqala ukuhla, sukani nime, niziphakamise iintloko zenu; kuba iyasondela inkululeko yenu."
Luke21:29 Ke kaloku wathetha umzekeliso kubo; Wukhangele umkhiwane nemithi yonke;
Luke21:30 xa iselithe yavelisa amagqabi, niyabona nazi ngokwenu ukuba ihlobo selikufuphi."
Luke21:31 Kwangokunjalo nani, xa nithe nazibona ezi zinto zisihla, yazini ukuba bukufuphi ubukumkani bukaThixo."
Luke21:32 Inene ndithi kuni, Asisayi kudlula esi sizukulwana, zide zihle zonke ezi zinto."
Luke21:33 Liya kudlula izulu nehlabathi, kodwa amazwi am akayi kudlula."
Luke21:34 Zilumkeleni ke, hleze zisindwe iintliziyo zenu kukuzingxala, nakukunxila, nangamaxhala obu bomi, ize loo mini inifikele ngebhaqo."
Luke21:35 Kuba iya kubazela njengomgibe bonke abahleli phezu kwehlabathi lonke.
Luke21:36 Phaphani ngoko, amaxesha onke nikhunga, ukuze kuthiwe nikufanele ukuzisaba zonke ezo zinto ziza kuhla, nokumiswa phambi koNyana woMntu."
Luke21:37 Ke kaloku, emini ebefundisa etempileni; waphuma ebusuku, waya wahlala entabeni ekuthiwa yeyemiNquma."
Luke21:38 Baye bonke abantu besiza kuye kwakusasa etempileni, ukuba bamve."
Luke22:1 Ke kaloku, wawusondela umthendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele, ekuthiwa yipasika."
Luke22:2 Baye ababingeleli abakhulu nababhali befuna ukuba bangathini na ukumbulala; ngokuba bebesoyika abantu.
Luke22:3 Wangena ke uSathana kuYuda, ogama limbi linguSikariyoti, ongowenani labalishumi elinababini."
Luke22:4 Wemka, waya wathetha nababingeleli abakhulu nabaphathi betempile, ukuba angáthini na ukumnikela kubo."
Luke22:5 Bavuya ke, banqophisana naye ukumnika imali,"
Luke22:6 wabavumela, wamana efuna ithuba elimlungeleyo lokumnikela kubo, kungekho siphendu."
Luke22:7 Wafika ke umhla wezonka ezingenagwele, ekwakumele ukuba kubingwe ngawo imvana yepasika."
Luke22:8 Wesusa uPetros noYohane, esithi, Hambani niye kusilungiselela ipasika, ukuze siyidle."
Luke22:9 Bathe ke bona kuye, Ùfuna ukuba siyilungise phi na?"
Luke22:10 Uthe ke yena kubo, Yabonani, nakungena kuwo umzi lo, nohlangatyezwa ngumntu ethwele umphanda wamanzi; mlandeleni, niye endlwini angena kuyo."
Luke22:11 Nothi kumninindlu, Uthi uMfundisi kuwe, Liphi na igumbi labahambi, apho ndingadlela khona ipasika nabafundi bam?"
Luke22:12 Yena wonibonisa igumbi eliphezulu, elikhulu, landlelwe; lungisani apho ke."
Luke22:13 Bemka ke, bafumana kunjengoko ebetshilo kubo, bayilungisa ipasika."
Luke22:14 Uthe ke lakufika ilixa, wahlala phantsi, nabapostile abalishumi elinababini kunye naye."
Luke22:15 Wathi kubo, Asikuko nokuba ndinqwenile ukuyidla nani le pasika, ndingekabuva ubunzima;"
Luke22:16 Kuba ndithi kuni, Andiyi kubuya ndibe sadla kuyo, ide izaliseke ebukumkanini bukaThixo."
Luke22:17 Wayithabatha nendebe, wabulela, wathi, Yithabatheni, nabelane ngayo;"
Luke22:18 Kuba ndithi kuni, Andisayi kusela kwisiqhamo somdiliya, bude bufike ubukumkani bukaThixo."
Luke22:19 Wathabatha isonka, wathi akubulela, wasiqhekeza, wabanika, esithi, Ngumzimba wam lo, onikelwa ngenxa yenu; oku kwenzeleni ukundikhumbula."
Luke22:20 Kwangokunjalo nayo indebe wayithabatha, kwakukhovwa ukudliwa, esithi, Le ndebe ingumnqophiso omtsha osegazini lam, eliphalalela nina."
Luke22:21 Kodwa niyabona, isandla sondingcatshayo sinam etafileni apha."
Luke22:22 uNyana woMntu okunene uyemka njengoko kumisiweyo; kodwa ke, yeha, loo mntu angcatshwa nguye!"
Luke22:23 Baqala bona ukubuzana phakathi kwabo, ukuba ingaba ke nguwuphi na kubo, oza kuyenza le nto."
Luke22:24 Ke kaloku kwabakho nokubangisana phakathi kwabo, kokuthi, nguwuphi na kubo ekungathiwa ngomkhulu."
Luke22:25 Uthe ke yena kubo, Ookumkani beentlanga bayazigagamela; kwanabo benza ngegunya kuzo, kuthiwa ngabancedi."
Luke22:26 Ze ningabi njalo; omkhulu kuni makabe njengomnci; nomkhulu, makabe njengokhonzayo."
Luke22:27 Kuba nguwuphi na omkhulu: ngulowo uhleli esithebeni, ngulowo ulungiselelayo, kusini na? Asinguye na ohleli esithebeni? phakathi kwenu ndinjengomlungiseleli."
Luke22:28 Nina ke ningabo bahlala nam ekuhendweni kwam;
Luke22:29 Nam ndinimisela ubukumkani, njengokuba uBawo endimisele mna;"
Luke22:30 ukuze nidle, nisele, esithebeni sam ebukumkanini bam, nihlale ezitroneni, nigweba izizwe ezilishumi elinazibini zakwaSirayeli."
Luke22:31 Ithe ke iNkosi, Simon, Simon, uyabona, uSathana ubenibanga, ukuba anele njengengqolowa."
Luke22:32 Ke mna ndikhungile ngawe, ukuba ukholo lwakho lungapheli; nawe ke, xa ubuye wabuya, uze ubazimase abazalwana bakho."
Luke22:33 Uthe ke yena kuye, Nkosi, sendikulungele ukuya nawe nasentolongweni, nasekufeni."
Luke22:34 Ithe ke yona, Ndithi kuwe, Petros, ayisayi kulila namhlanje inkuku, ungekakhanyeli kathathu ukuba uyandazi."
Luke22:35 Yathi kubo, Okuya ndanithuma ningenangxowa yamali, nangxowa yamphako, nazimbadada, khe naswela nto na? Bathi ke bona, Akukho nto."
Luke22:36 Ithe ke kubo, Kungokunje, lowo unengxowa yemali makayithabathe, enjenjalo nonengxowa yomphako; nalowo usweleyo, makathengise ngengubo yakhe, athenge ikrele."
Luke22:37 Kuba ndithi kuni, Oku kubhaliweyo kusamele ukufezeka kum, khona oku: Wabalwa nabachasi-mthetho;"
Luke22:38 Bathi ke bona, Nkosi, uyabona, nanga amakrele emabini. Uthe ke yena kubo, Kwanele."
Luke22:39 Waphuma ke, waya ngokwesiko lakhe eNtabeni yemiNquma; Bamlandela ke nabafundi bakhe."
Luke22:40 Akufika kuloo ndawo, wathi kubo, Thandazani, ukuze ningangeni ekuhendweni."
Luke22:41 Waziqhiwula yena kubo umgama ongangokugibisela ilitye, waguqa ngamadolo, wathandaza,"
Luke22:42 esithi, Bawo, ukuba uyavuma, mayidlule le ndebe, kum; kodwa makungabi kukuthanda kwam, makube kokwakho okwenzekayo."
Luke22:43 Kwabonakala ke kuye isithunywa, sivela ezulwini, simomeleza."
Luke22:44 Esentlungwini enkulu, kwaba kukhona wathandaza enyamekile; kwasuka ukubila kwakhe kwaba njengamathontsi egazi, esiwa emhlabeni."
Luke22:45 Wavuka ekuthandazeni, weza kubafundi bakhe, wabafumana belele ngokuba buhlungu kwentliziyo."
Luke22:46 Wathi kubo, Yini na ukuba nilale? vukani nithandaze, ukuze ningangeni ekuhendweni."
Luke22:47 Kwathi, esathetha, kwathi gqi indimbane, waye nalowo kuthiwa nguYuda, omnye weshumi elinababini, ehamba phambi kwabo; wasondela kuYesu eza kumanga."
Luke22:48 Uthe ke uYesu kuye, Yuda, umngcatsha uNyana woMntu ngokumanga na?"
Luke22:49 Ke kaloku abo babemphahlile, bakukubona okuza kuhla, bathi kuye, Nkosi, sixabele na ngekrele?"
Luke22:50 Omnye kubo abo wamxabela umkhonzi wombingeleli omkhulu, wamnqamla indlebe yokunene."
Luke22:51 Waphendula ke uYesu wathi, Yekani, kwanele. Wayichukumisa indlebe yakhe, wamphilisa."
Luke22:52 Uthe ke uYesu kubabingeleli abakhulu, nabaphathi betempile, namadoda amakhulu, ababeze kuye, Niphume ninamakrele neentonga na, ngathi niphumele isihange?"
Luke22:53 Bendinani imihla ngemihla etempileni, anolula zandla ngakum; kambe eli lilixa lenu, negunya lobumnyama."
Luke22:54 Bambambile ke, bamrhola, bamsa endlwini yombingeleli omkhulu; Waza uPetros walandela ekude."
Luke22:55 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba babase umlilo phakathi kwentendelezo, behleli phantsi ndawonye, uthe wahlala uPetros phakathi kwabo."
Luke22:56 Ke umkhonzazana othile umbonile ehleli ebandezini, wamjonga wathi, Nalo ube enaye."
Luke22:57 Wakhanyela ke yena, esithi, Ntokazindini, andimazi."
Luke22:58 Kwakuba mzuzwana, omnye wambona wathi, Nawe ungowabo. Wathi ke uPetros, Mntundini, andinguye."
Luke22:59 Kwakuba kuhambe ilixa ngathi linye, omnye uqinisele wathi, Inyaniso, nalo ubenaye; kuba ukwangowaseGalili."
Luke22:60 Uthe ke uPetros, Mntundini, andiyazi into oyithethayo. Kwaoko, esathetha, yalila inkuku."
Luke22:61 Yajika iNkosi, yondela kuPetros. Walikhumbula ke uPetros ilizwi leNkosi, njengoko ibithe kuye, Ingekalili inkuku, uya kundikhanyela kathathu."
Luke22:62 Waza uPetros, ephume phandle, walila ngokukrakra."
Luke22:63 Aye amadoda ambambileyo uYesu edlala ngaye, emtyakatya."
Luke22:64 Athe akuba emgqubuthele, ambetha ebusweni, ambuza esithi, Profeta; ngubani na lo ukubethileyo?"
Luke22:65 Ayethetha nezinye izinto ezininzi ngaye.
Luke22:66 Kwathi kwakusa, ahlanganisana amadoda amakhulu abantu, nababingeleli abakhulu, nababhali, bamrholela entlanganisweni yawo yamatyala, besithi,"
Luke22:67 Unguye na uKristu? Sixelele. Uthe ke yena kubo, Ukuba ndithe ndanixelela, anisayi kukholwa;"
Luke22:68 nokuba ke ndithe ndanibuza, anisayi kundiphendula, anisayi kundikhulula."
Luke22:69 Ethabathela kweli xa, uNyana woMntu uya kuba ehleli ekunene kwamandla kaThixo."
Luke22:70 Bathi ke bonke, Unguye na ke wena uNyana kaThixo? Uthe ke yena kubo, Nina nithi ndinguye."
Luke22:71 Bathi ke bona, Sisabufunelani na ubungqina? kuba thina ngokwethu sivile ngomlomo wakhe."
Luke23:1 Yesuka yonke inkitha yabo, yamrholela kuPilato."
Luke23:2 Aza aqala ukummangalela, esithi, Simfumene lo elahlekisa uhlanga, engavumi ukuba kunikelwe irhafu kuKesare, esithi, unguye uKristu uKumkani."
Luke23:3 Wambuza ke uPilato, esithi, Wena unguye na uKumkani wamaYuda? Waphendula ke wathi kuye, Nawe utsho."
Luke23:4 Uthe ke uPilato kubabingeleli abakhulu nakwizihlwele, Andifumani tyala kulo mntu."
Luke23:5 Kwaba kukhona ke bajokisayo, besithi, Uxhokonxa abantu, efundisa kulo lonke elakwaYuda, eqalele kwelaseGalili, wada wezisa apha."
Luke23:6 Ke kaloku uPilato, akuva elaseGalili, wabuza ukuba umntu lo ngowaseGalili na."
Luke23:7 Kwathi, akuqonda ukuba ungowolawulo lukaHerode, wamthumela kuHerode, owayeseseYerusalem naye ngelo xesha."
Luke23:8 Ke kaloku uHerode, akumbona uYesu, wavuya kunene; kuba bekumzuzu ethanda ukumbona, ngenxa yokuba ebeve kuthethwa izinto ezininzi ngaye; wayethembe ukubona umqondiso usenziwa nguye."
Luke23:9 Wayembuza ke amazwi amaninzi; kodwa akamphendulanga nento.
Luke23:10 Bema ke ababingeleli abakhulu nababhali, bammangalela kabukhali."
Luke23:11 uHerode ke, kwanempi yakhe, wamenza into engento, wadlala ngaye, wamthi wambu ngengubo eqaqambileyo, wamthumela kuPilato."
Luke23:12 Kwangaloo mini baba zizihlobo ke uPilato noHerode; kuba ngenxa engaphambili babenobutshaba phakathi kwabo.
Luke23:13 Uthe ke uPilato, ebabizele ndawonye ababingeleli abakhulu, nabaphathi, nabantu,"
Luke23:14 wathi kubo, Nizise kum lo mntu, ngathi ngophambukisa abantu; niyabona ke, ndimncinile mna phambi kwenu, andafumana tyala kulo mntu, kwezo zinto nimmangalele ngazo;"
Luke23:15 KwanoHerode, kuba ndanithumela kuye. Niyabona, akenziwanga nto ifanelwe kukufa."
Luke23:16 Ndothi ke ngoko, ndakumbetha, ndimkhulule."
Luke23:17 Kuba umelwe kukuthi abakhululele abe mnye ngomthendeleko.
Luke23:18 Bankqangaza bonke kwaoko, besithi, Msuse lo, usikhulule uBharabhas,"
Luke23:19 owathi ngenxa yesaqunge esithile esabakho phakathi komzi, nangenxa yokubulala, waphoswa entolongweni."
Luke23:20 Waphinda ngoko uPilato wathetha kubo, efuna ukumkhulula uYesu."
Luke23:21 Basuka ke bona bankqangaza, besithi, Mbethelele emnqamlezweni!"
Luke23:22 Uthe ke yena okwesithathu kubo, Kuba enze bubi buni na lo? Andifumananga tyala lakufa kuye; ndothi ngoko, ndakumbetha, ndimkhulule."
Luke23:23 Bamxina ke bona ngezandi ezikhulu zamazwi, becela ukuba abethelelwe emnqamlezweni; Ayeyisa amazwi abo nezababingeleli abakhulu."
Luke23:24 Waza uPilato wagweba ngelithi, makwenziwe ngokwesicelo sabo."
Luke23:25 Wabakhululela ke owayethe ngenxa yesaqunge nokubulala waphoswa entolongweni, lowo babecela yena; wamnikela uYesu ekuthandeni kwabo."
Luke23:26 Kuthe ke xa bamrholayo, babamba Simon uthile, waseKirene, obevela emaphandleni; bawubeka phezu kwakhe umnqamlezo, ukuba awuthwale emva koYesu."
Luke23:27 Wayelandelwa ke yinkitha eninzi yabantu, neyabafazi ababemmbambazelela, bemlilela."
Luke23:28 Wabaguqukela ke uYesu, wathi, Zintombi zaseYerusalem, musani ukundililela mna; kanye zilileleni nina, nabantwana benu;"
Luke23:29 Kuba niyabona, iyeza imihla ekuya kuthiwa ngayo, Banoyolo abaziidlolo, nezizalo ezingazalanga, namabele anganyisanga."
Luke23:30 Oko baya kuqala bathi ezintabeni, Siweleni; nakwiinduli, Sigubungeleni."
Luke23:31 Ukuba benza ezi zinto komanzi umthi, kuya kuba njani na kowomileyo?"
Luke23:32 Ke kaloku baberhola nabanye abangabambi, bebabini, bengabenzi bobubi, beya kubulawa kunye naye."
Luke23:33 Bakufika kwindawo leyo kuthiwa luKakayi, bambethelela emnqamlezweni khona apho uYesu, kwanabenzi bobubi abo, omnye ngasekunene, nomnye ngasekhohlo."
Luke23:34 Wathi ke uYesu, Bawo, baxolele; kuba abayazi into abayenzayo. Babelana ngeengubo zakhe, benza amaqashiso."
Luke23:35 Baye bemi abantu bebonela. Babemsinekela ke nabaphathi bamaYuda kunye nabo, besithi, Wabasindisa abanye; makazisindise, ukuba unguye uKristu, umnyulwa kaThixo."
Luke23:36 Eza ke kuye amasoldati edlala ngaye, emnika iviniga,"
Luke23:37 besithi, Ukuba wena unguye uKumkani wamaYuda, zisindise."
Luke23:38 Kwaye ke kubhalwe nombhalo phezu kwakhe, ngamagama esiGrike, nawesiRoma, nawesiHebhere, kwathiwa, lo nguKumkani wamaYuda."
Luke23:39 Ke kaloku, omnye wabenzi bobubi ababexhonyiwe wayemnyelisa, esithi, Ukuba wena unguye uKristu, zisindise, nathi usisindise."
Luke23:40 Waphendula ke omnye wamkhalimela, esithi, Akumoyiki na wena uThixo, ukwakoku kugwetywa nje?"
Luke23:41 Thina ke okunene sigwetywe ngobulungisa; kuba thina samkela umvuzo wemisebenzi yethu; kodwa yena lo akenzanga nto ingendawo.
Luke23:42 Wathi kuYesu, Uze undikhumbule, Nkosi, xa uthe weza usebukumkanini bakho."
Luke23:43 uYesu wathi kuye, Inene, ndithi kuwe, Namhlanje uya kuba nam eParadisi."
Luke23:44 Ke kaloku, kwakumalunga nelixa lesithandathu, kwaza kwakho ubumnyama phezu kwawo umhlaba uphela, kwada kwalilixa lesithoba."
Luke23:45 Laba mnyama ilanga, lasuka ikhuselo lengcwele lakrazuka kubini."
Luke23:46 Wadanduluka ngezwi elikhulu uYesu, wathi, Bawo, ndiyawunikela ezandleni zakho umoya wam. Akuba etshilo, waphuma umphefumlo."
Luke23:47 Ke kaloku umthetheli-khulu, akukubona okuhlileyo, wazukisa uThixo, esithi, Inene, lo mntu ubelilungisa."
Luke23:48 Zathi zonke izihlwele ezabe zibuthelene kuloo mbonelo, zakukubona okuhlileyo, zabuya zibetha izifuba zazo."
Luke23:49 Baye ke bonke abazana naye bemi kude, kwanabafazi ababelandelene naye, bevela kwelaseGalili, bezikhangela ezi zinto."
Luke23:50 Kwabonakala kukho indoda egama linguYosefu, iphakathi; waye eyindoda elungileyo, elilungisa;"
Luke23:51 Yena waye engavumelananga necebo labo, nesenzo sabo; wayengowaseArimati, umzi wamaYuda, owayebulindile naye ubukumkani bukaThixo;"
Luke23:52 eyathi yona yeza kuPilato, yawucela umzimba kaYesu."
Luke23:53 Yawuthula, yawusongela kwilinen entle; yawubeka engcwabeni elixholwe etyeni, ekungazanga kulale bani kulo."
Luke23:54 Ke kaloku loo mhla wawungowokulungiselela, nesabatha ibisondele."
Luke23:55 Kwathi nabafazi ababehamba naye, bevela kwelaseGalili, balikhangela ingcwaba, nokubekwa komzimba wakhe."
Luke23:56 Babuya ke, balungisa ubulawu namafutha aqholiweyo. Baphumla ngomhla wesabatha ngokomthetho."
Luke24:1 Ke kaloku, ngolokuqala usuku lweveki, ngesifingo, beza engcwabeni, bephethe ubulawu ababebulungisile, kukho nabanye abathile kubo."
Luke24:2 Balifumana ke ilitye liqengqiwe, lesuka engcwabeni."
Luke24:3 Bakuba bengenile, abawufumananga umzimba weNkosi uYesu."
Luke24:4 Kwathi, ekukhohlweni kwabo yile nto, kwabonakala amadoda amabini, ebafikela, eneengubo ezibengezelayo."
Luke24:5 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba bangenelwe kukoyika, beqondele emhlabeni, athi kubo, Yini na ukuba ophilileyo nimfune phakathi kwabafileyo?"
Luke24:6 Akakho apha, uvukile; khumbulani ukuthetha kwakhe kuni, oko wayeseseGalili,"
Luke24:7 esithi, uNyana woMntu umelwe kukuthi anikelwe ezandleni zabantu aboni, abethelelwe emnqamlezweni, athi ngomhla wesithathu abuye avuke."
Luke24:8 Bawakhumbula ke amazwi akhe;
Luke24:9 bebuyile engcwabeni, bazibika zonke ezo zinto kwabalishumi elinamnye, nakubo bonke abanye."
Luke24:10 YayinguMariya waseMagadala, noYohana, noMariya unina kaYakobi, nabanye abafazi ababenabo, abazixelayo ezo zinto kubapostile."
