Luke24:11 Asuka amazwi abo abonakala ngathi yinto nje engento kubo, baza abakholwa."
Luke24:12 Esukile ke uPetros, wagidima waya engcwabeni; athi eqondele, azibone iilinen abesongelwe kuzo, zilele zodwa; wemka, emangalisiwe koko kuhlileyo."
Luke24:13 Kwabonakala kusiya babini bakubo, kwangaloo mini, kumzana ozitadiya zimashumi mathandathu, umgama wawo neYerusalem, ogama liyiEmawusi."
Luke24:14 Baye bona bexoxa bodwa ngazo zonke izinto ezibe zihlile.
Luke24:15 Kwathi besathetha bebuzana, uYesu ngenkqu wasondela wahamba nabo."
Luke24:16 Kuloko amehlo abo ayebanjiwe, ukuba bangamazi."
Luke24:17 Wathi kubo, Ziindawo zini na ezi nincokola ngazo, nihamba nibe nithe matshamatsha?"
Luke24:18 Uphendule ke omnye, lo ugama linguKleyopa, wathi kuye, Umhambi eYerusalem apha nguwe wedwa na, ukuba ungazazi nje izinto ezihle khona ngazo ezi mini?"
Luke24:19 Wathi kubo, Ziphi na? Bathi ke bona kuye, EzingoYesu waseNazarete, obeyindoda engumprofeti, enobunkunkqele ekwenzeni nasekuthetheni, phambi koThixo nabo bonke abantu;"
Luke24:20 ukuba bathini na ababingeleli abakhulu nabaphathi bethu ukumnikela ukuba agwetywe afe, bambethelela nasemnqamlezweni."
Luke24:21 Ke kaloku, thina besithembe ukuba nguye oza kukhulula uSirayeli ngentlawulelo; kunjalonje ke, namhla lusuku lwesithathu zenzekile ezo zinto."
Luke24:22 Asuka nabafazi abathile ababevela kuthi aba basikhwankqisa, ababeyile engcwabeni kwakusasa;"
Luke24:23 Zakuba zingawufumani umzimba wakhe, zeza zisithi, zibone nombono wezithunywa zezulu, ezibe zisithi uhleli."
Luke24:24 Basuka nabathile ababenathi, baya engcwabeni, bafika kunjengoko babetshilo abafazi; ke yena abambonanga."
Luke24:25 Wathi ke yena kubo, Oyi!"
Luke24:26 uKrestu ebengamelwe na kukuthi abuve obu bunzima, aze angene eluzukweni lwakhe?"
Luke24:27 Uqalele ke kuMoses nakubo bonke abaprofeti, wabachazela kuzo zonke izibhalo iindawo ezingaye."
Luke24:28 Basondela kuloo mzana babesiya kuwo; wanga yena uyegqitha.
Luke24:29 Bamzama, besithi, Hlala nathi; ngokuba kuza kuhlwa, nemini seyimkile. Wangena ukuba ahlale nabo."
Luke24:30 Kwathi, ekungqengqeni kwakhe ngasesithebeni ndawonye nabo, wasithabatha isonka, wasikelela, waqhekeza, wabanika."
Luke24:31 Aqabuka amehlo abo, bamazi; Wanyamalala emehlweni abo."
Luke24:32 Batshono ukuthi, Intliziyo yethu ibingavuthi na ngaphakathi kwethu, xa ebethetha nathi endleleni, naxa ebesityhilela izibhalo?"
Luke24:33 Besuka kwangelo lixa, babuyela eYerusalem, babafumana abalishumi elinamnye, bequkene ndawonye kwanabo babenabo,"
Luke24:34 besithi, iNkosi inene ivukile, yabonakala kuSimon."
Luke24:35 Baye nabo bezichankcisa izinto zendlela, nokwazeka kwayo kubo ekuqhekezeni isonka."
Luke24:36 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba bayazithetha ezo zinto, uYesu ngokwakhe wema phakathi kwabo, wathi kubo, Uxolo malube nani."
Luke24:37 Besuka bankwantya, bangenelwa kukoyika, beba babone umshologu."
Luke24:38 Wathi kubo, Yini na ukuba nikhathazeke? Yini na ukuba kunyuke izicamango ezintliziyweni zenu?"
Luke24:39 Khangelani izandla zam neenyawo zam, ngokuba ndim kanye; ngokuba umshologu awunanyama namathambo, njengokuba nindibona ndinawo mna."
Luke24:40 Utshilo, wababonisa izandla neenyawo zakhe."
Luke24:41 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba abakakholwa, ngenxa yovuyo, bemangalisiwe, wathi kubo, Ninanto na idliwayo apha?"
Luke24:42 Bamnika ke intwana yentlanzi eyosiweyo, neyenqatha lobusi."
Luke24:43 Wathabatha, wadla phambi kwabo."
Luke24:44 Uthe ke kubo, Ngawo la amazwi endawathethayo kuni ndisenani, okokuba zimelwe kukuzaliseka zonke izinto ezibhaliweyo emthethweni kaMoses, nasebaprofetini, nasezindumisweni, ukuba zizaliseke, mna."
Luke24:45 Wandula wayivula ingqiqo yabo, ukuze baziqonde izibhalo;"
Luke24:46 wathi kubo, Kubhaliwe ngokunjalo, umelwe ngokunjalo uKristu kukuthi eve ubunzima, abuye avuke kwabafileyo ngomhla wesithathu;"
Luke24:47 nokuba kuvakaliswe egameni lakhe inguquko noxolelo lwezono kuzo zonke iintlanga, kuqalelwa eYerusalem."
Luke24:48 Nina ke ningamangqina ezi zinto.
Luke24:49 Yabonani, mna ndilithumela kuni idinga likaBawo; ke nina hlalani kuwo umzi oyiYerusalem, nide nambathiswe amandla aphuma enyangweni."
Luke24:50 Ke kaloku wabarholela ngaphandle, kwada kwaya eBhetani, waziphakamisa izandla zakhe, wabasikelela."
Luke24:51 Kwathi, ekubasikeleleni kwakhe, wahlukana nabo, wenyuswa wasiwa emazulwini."
Luke24:52 Baza bona, bakuba bequbudile kuye, babuyela eYerusalem benovuyo olukhulu."
Luke24:53 Bamana behleli etempileni, bembonga uThixo. Amen."
John1:1 Ekuqalekeni ube ekho uLizwi, waye uLizwi ekuye uThixo, waye uLizwi enguThixo."
John1:2 Yena lowo ebekho kwasekuqalekeni kuThixo.
John1:3 Izinto zonke zabakho ngaye; engekho yena, akubangakho nanye into ethe yabakho."
John1:4 Kuye kwakukho ubomi; baye obo bomi baba lukhanyiso eluntwini.
John1:5 Olu khanyiso lukhanya ebumnyameni; kwaye ubumnyama abuzange bukoyise ukukhanya kwalo.
John1:6 Kwakho mntu uthunyiweyo evela kuThixo, ugama linguYohane."
John1:7 Yena weza kungqina, engqinela ukukhanya, ukuze bonke bakholwe ngaye."
John1:8 Yena lowo ubengelulo ukhanyiso; weza kungqina ngalo ukhanyiso.
John1:9 Lowo ulukhanyiso lwenene olukhanyisela wonke umntu, wayesiza ehlabathini."
John1:10 Ube esehlabathini ke, ihlabathi labakho ngaye, kodwa ihlabathi alamazi."
John1:11 Weza kwabakhe, baza abakhe abamamkelanga."
John1:12 Ke bonke abamamkelayo wabanika igunya lokuba babe ngabantwana bakaThixo, abo ke bakholwayo kwigama lakhe;"
John1:13 Abangazalwanga ngagazi, nangakuthanda kwanyama, nangakuthanda kwandoda; bazalwa nguThixo."
John1:14 uLizwi ke waba ngumntu, waza wahlala phakathi kwethu. Sabubukela ubungangamsha bakhe awabunikwa nguYise, njengoko ekukuphela koNyana wakhe; ubungangamsha ke obuphuphuma ububele nenyaniso."
John1:15 uYohane wangqina ngoLizwi; wadanduluka esithi, Ubenguye lo bendithetha yena, ndisithi, Lowo uzayo emva kwam, usuke waba phambi kwam, ngokuba waye etanci kum."
John1:16 Enzalisekweni yakhe thina sonke samkela kwaubabalo phezu kobabalo.
John1:17 Ngokuba umthetho wawiswa ngoMoses, lwabakho lona ubabalo nenyaniso ngoYesu Kristu."
John1:18 Akukho namnye wakha wambona uThixo; uNyana okuphela kwamzeleyo, lowo usesifubeni sikaYise, nguye ocacise oko."
John1:19 Nabu ke ubungqina bukaYohane, oko amaYuda athuma ababingeleli nabaLevi, bephuma eYerusalem, ukuze bambuze besithi, Wena ungubani na?"
John1:20 Wavuma yena, akakhanyela; wavuma ke esithi, Andinguye uKristu mna."
John1:21 Bambuza, besithi, Untoni na ke? UnguEliya na? Wathi yena, Andinguye. Unguye na umprofeti lowo? Wathi yena, Hayi."
John1:22 Athi ngoko kuye, Ungubani na? ukuze sibaphendule abo basithumileyo. Uthini na wena ngawe?"
John1:23 Wathi, Mna ndililizwi lodandulukayo entlango, lisithi, Yityenenezeni indlela yeNkosi, njengoko watshoyo uIsaya umprofeti."
John1:24 Baye abo babethunyiwe bengabakubo abaFarisi.
John1:25 Bambuza bathi kuye, Ubhaptizelani na phofu, ukuba wena akunguye uKristu, noEliya, nomprofeti lowo?"
John1:26 Wabaphendula uYohane wathi, Mna ndibhaptiza ngamanzi, kodwa phakathi kwenu kumi eningamaziyo nina."
John1:27 Yena ngothe, esiza emva kwam nje, wesuka waba phambi kwam, endingafanelekileyo mna ukuba ndinyobulule umtya wembadada yakhe."
John1:28 Ezi zinto zenzeka eBhetabhara, phesheya kweYordan, apho uYohane wayebhaptiza khona."
John1:29 Ngengomso uYohane umbona uYesu esiza kuye, athi, Nantso iMvana kaThixo, ethwala isuse isono sehlabathi."
John1:30 Nguye lo ndathi ngaye mna, Emva kwam kuza indoda, esuke yaba phambi, kwam; ngokuba yayitanci kum."
John1:31 Ke nam bendingamazi; le nto ndeza mna, ndibhaptiza ngamanzi, kukuze ibonakalaliswe kuSirayeli."
John1:32 uYohane wangqina, esithi, Ndimbonile uMoya, esihla njengehobe, ephuma ezulwini, wahlala phezu kwakhe."
John1:33 Ke nam bendingamazi, kodwa lowo wandithumayo ukuba ndibhaptize ngamanzi, nguye owathi kum: ‘Lowo ùbone uMoya esihla phezu kwakhe, ahlale kuye, nguye obhaptiza ngoMoya oyiNgcwele.’"
John1:34 Nam ndibonile, ndingqinile, ukuba lo nguye uNyana kaThixo."
John1:35 Ngengomso ubuye wema uYohane nababini kubafundi bakhe;
John1:36 ondele kuYesu ehamba, uthi, Nantso iMvana kaThixo."
John1:37 Bamva ethetha abafundi ababini, bamlandela uYesu."
John1:38 Ke kaloku ujikile uYesu, ababone belandela, athi kubo, Nifuna ntoni na? Bathi ke bona kuye, Rabhi (oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, Mfundisi), uhlala phi na?"
John1:39 Athi kubo, Yizani nibone. Beza, babona ke apho ahlala khona; bahlala naye loo mini;"
John1:40 YayinguAndreya, umntakwabo-Simon Petros, omnye wâbo bafundi babini beva ngoYohane, baza bamlandela uYesu."
John1:41 Yena ufumana kuqala owakhe umzalwana, uSimon, athi kuye, Simfumene uMesiya (oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, uKristu)."
John1:42 Wamsa kuYesu; uthe ke uYesu wondela kuye, wathi, Wena unguSimon, unyana kaYona; kuya kuthiwa unguKefas, oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, unguKefas."
John1:43 Ngengomso uYesu wafuna ukuphuma aye kwelaseGalili; ufumana uFilipu, athi kuye, Ndilandele."
John1:44 Ke uFilipu ebengowaseBhetesayida, idolophu yakuloAndreya noPetros."
John1:45 uFilipu ufumana uNataniyeli, athi kuye, Lowo uMoses wabhala ngaye emthethweni, kwanabaprofeti, simfumene, uYesu unyana kaYosefu, lowo waseNazarete."
John1:46 Wathi uNataniyeli kuye, Inako na into elungileyo ukuphuma eNazarete? Athi uFilipu kuye, Yiza ubone."
John1:47 uYesu wambona uNataniyeli esiza kuye, athi ngaye, Nanko umSirayeli inyaniso, ekungekho nkohliso kuye."
John1:48 Athi uNataniyeli kuye, Undazi ngantoni na? Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Phambi kokuba uFilipu akubize, uphantsi komkhiwane, ndandikubona."
John1:49 Aphendule uNataniyeli athi kuye, Rabhi, wena unguye uNyana kaThixo; wena unguye uKumkani wakwaSirayeli."
John1:50 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Ngokuba ndithe kuwe, Ndandikubona uphantsi komkhiwane, uyakholwa na? uya kubona izinto ezinkulu kunezi."
John1:51 Athi kuye, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Emveni koku niya kulibona izulu livulekile, nezithunywa zikaThixo zinyuka zisihla phezu koNyana woMntu."
John2:1 Kwathi ngomhla wesithathu kwabakho umsitho eKana yelaseGalili; waye unina kaYesu ekhona.
John2:2 Wamenyelwa ke noYesu kwanabafundi bakhe emsithweni lowo.
John2:3 Yakuphela iwayini, wathi unina kaYesu kuye, Abanawayini."
John2:4 Uthi uYesu kuye, Yintoni na enam nawe, mfazi? ilixa lam alikafiki."
John2:5 Athi unina kubalungiseleli, Asukuba ekuthetha kuni, kwenzeni."
John2:6 Kwakumi khona ke imiphanda yamatye imithandathu, ngokwentlambululo yamaYuda, engena ngaminye iibhate ezimbini nantathu."
John2:7 Athi kubo uYesu, Yizaliseni imiphanda ngamanzi. Bazizalisa zada zafikelela eludinini."
John2:8 Athi kubo, Yikhani ngoku, nise kwinjoli. Bayithwala ke."
John2:9 Ke kaloku, yakuweva injoli amanzi abenziwe iwayini, engayazi nalapho ivela khona;"
John2:10 Yathi kuye, Wonke umntu ubeka kuqala iwayini emnandi, aze akhuphe iwayini emnandi; 22 Xa bathe basela bakholisa, andule ukubeka enganeno kwaleyo; wena uyibandezile iwayini emnandi, kwada kwangoku."
John2:11 Lo mqondiso wakhe wokuqala uYesu wawenza eKana yelaseGalili, walubonakalalisa uzuko lwakhe; bakholwa kuye abafundi bakhe."
John2:12 Emva koko uYesu, nonina, nabantakwabo, nabafundi bakhe, baya eKapernahum, bahlala khona iintsukwana."
John2:13 Yayikufuphi ke ipasika yamaYuda, wenyuka uYesu waya eYerusalem."
John2:14 Wabafumana etempileni ababethengisa ngeenkomo nezimvu namahobe, nabananisa ngemali behleli."
John2:15 Wenze iziniya ngentambo, wabakhupha bonke etempileni, kwanezimvu neenkomo; wayiphalaza imali yabananisi, wazibhukuqa neetafile;"
John2:16 Waza wathi nakwabo bathengisa ngamahobe: “Zikhupheni apha ezi zinto; musani ukuyenza indlu kaBawo indlu yokuthengisela.
John2:17 Bakhumbula ke abafundi bakhe, ukuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ukuzondelela indlu yakho kundidlile kanye."
John2:18 Aphendula ke ngoko amaYuda, athi kuye, Usibonisa mqondiso mni na, uzenza nje ezi zinto?"
John2:19 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Yichitheni le tempile, mna ke ndiya kuyivusa ngeentsuku ezintathu."
John2:20 Athi ke ngoko amaYuda, Yayiminyaka imashumi mane anesithandathu nje isakhiwa le tempile, ke wena woyivusa ngeentsuku ezintathu na?"
John2:21 Kodwa yena ubethetha ngetempile yomzimba wakhe.
John2:22 Kwathi akuvuka kwabafileyo, bakhumbula abafundi bakhe okokuba wayekuthethile oko kubo, basikholwa isibhalo, nelizwi awalithethayo uYesu."
John2:23 Kwathi, xa uYesu wayeseJerusalem kwitheko lePasika, abantu abaninzi bakholwa kulo igama lakhe bakubona imimangaliso ayenzayo."
John2:24 Ke yena uYesu akaziyekelanga kubo, ngenxa yokuba ebazi bonke;"
John2:25 Kwakungekho mfuneko yakuba kungqine bani ngomntu, kuba ubekwazi yena okungaphakathi komntu."
John3:1 Kwaye kukho ke umntu wakubaFarisi, ogama linguNikodemo, umphathi wamaYuda."
John3:2 Yena weza kuYesu ebusuku, wathi kuye, Rabhi, siyazi ukuba ungumfundisi ophuma kuThixo; kuba akukho namnye unako ukuyenza le miqondiso uyenzayo wena, ukuba uThixo akanaye."
John3:3 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Inene, inene, ndithi kuwe, Ukuba akathanga umntu azalwe ngokutsha, akanakububona ubukumkani bukaThixo."
John3:4 Uthi uNikodimo kuye, Angathini na umntu ukuzalwa emdala? Unokungena okwesibini na esizalweni sikanina, azalwe?"
John3:5 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Inene, inene, ndithi kuwe, Ukuba umntu akathanga azalwe ngamanzi nanguMoya, akanakungena ebukumkanini bukaThixo."
John3:6 Oko kuzelwe yinyama kuyinyama; Oko kuzelwe nguMoya kungumoya.
John3:7 Musa ukumangaliswa kukuba ndithe kuwe, Nimelwe kukuthi nizalwe ngokutsha."
John3:8 Umoya uphepheza apho uthanda khona, ùsive isandi sawo, kodwa ungawazi apho uvela khona, nalapho úya khona: bakwanjalo bonke abazelwe nguMoya."
John3:9 Waphendula uNikodemo wathi kuye, Zingathini na ezi zinto ukuba nokubakho?"
John3:10 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Wena, ungumfundisi nje wakwaSirayeli, akuzazi na ezi zinto?"
John3:11 Inene, inene, ndithi kuwe, Sithetha esikwaziyo, singqine esikubonileyo; nisuke ningabamkeli ubungqina bethu."
John3:12 Ukuba ndinixelele izinto ezisemhlabeni, naza anakholwa, nothini na ukukholwa, ukuba ndithe ndanixelela izinto ezisemazulwini?"
John3:13 Akukho namnye unyukileyo waya emazulwini, ngulowo yedwa wehla ephuma emazulwini, uNyana woMntu, lowo usemazulwini."
John3:14 Njengokuba ke uMoses wayiphakamisayo inyoka entlango, umelwe kukuphakanyiswa ngokunjalo uNyana woMntu;"
John3:15 ukuze bonke abakholwayo kuye bangatshabalali, koko babe nobomi obungunaphakade."
John3:16 Kuba wenjenje uThixo ukulithanda kwakhe ihlabathi, ude wancama uNyana wakhe okuphela kwamzeleyo, ukuze bonke abakholwayo kuye bangatshabalali, koko babe nobomi obungunaphakade."
John3:17 Kuba uThixo akamthumanga uNyana wakhe ehlabathini, ukuze aligwebe ihlabathi; ukuze ihlabathi lisindiswe ngaye."
John3:18 Lowo ukholwayo kuye, akagwetywa; ke lowo ungakholwayo, uselegwetyiwe, ngokuba engakholwanga kwigana loNyana okuphela kwamzeleyo uThixo."
John3:19 Ke kaloku, umgwebo nguwo lo, ukuba ukhanyiso lufikile ehlabathini, baza abantu bathanda ubumnyama ngaphezu kokhanyiso; kuba imisebenzi yabo ingendawo."
John3:20 Kuba bonke abenza okubi, bayaluthiya ukhanyiso, bangezi elukhanyisweni, ukuze imisebenzi yabo ingohlwaywa."
John3:21 Ke lowo uyenzayo inyaniso uyeza elukhanyisweni, ukuze imisebenzi yakhe ibonakalaliswe; ngokuba isetyenzelwe kuThixo."
John3:22 Emveni kwezi zinto, weza uYesu nabafundi bakhe emhlabeni wakwaYuda; walibala khona apho nabo, wabhaptiza."
John3:23 Waye ke noYohane ebhaptiza e-Enon, kufuphi neSalem, ngokuba amanzi abemaninzi khona apho; babesiza ke babhaptizwe."
John3:24 Kuba ebengekaphoswa entolongweni uYohane.
John3:25 Kwabakho ke imbuzwano kubafundi bakaYohane namaYuda ngokuhlanjululwa.
John3:26 Beza kuYohane, bathi kuye, Rabhi, lowa wayenawe phesheya kweYordan, umngqinela, yabona, yena uyabhaptiza; beza kuye ke bonke."
John3:27 Waphendula uYohane wathi, Akanakwamkela nto umntu, engayinikwanga ivela emazulwini."
John3:28 Nani ngokwenu niyandingqinela ukuba ndathi, Andinguye uKristu mna; ndathi, Ndithunyiwe phambi kwakhe."
John3:29 Lowo unomtshakazi ngumyeni; isihlobo ke somyeni, esimiyo simve, sivuya kunene ngenxa yezwi lomyeni; ngoko olu luvuyo lwam luzalisekile."
John3:30 Yena umelwe kukuthi ande, ndinciphe ke mna."
John3:31 Lowo uvela phezulu ungaphezu kwabo bonke; lowo ungowehlabathi ungowasemhlabeni, kwaye uthetha okwehlabathi. Lowo uvela ezulwini ungaphezu kwabo bonke;"
John3:32 akubonileyo ke wakuva, uyakungqina oko; akukho bani ubamkelayo ubungqina bakhe."
John3:33 Lowo ubamkeleyo ubungqina bakhe, utywine waqinisela ukuthi, uThixo uyinyaniso;"
John3:34 kuba lowo uthunywe nguThixo, uthetha amazwi kaThixo; kuba uThixo akamniki uMoya ngomlinganiselo."
John3:35 uYise uyamthanda uNyana; uzinikele zonke izinto esandleni sakhe.
John3:36 Lowo ukholwayo kuNyana, unobomi obungunaphakade; ke lowo ungamviyo uNyana, akayi kubona bomi; ingqumbo kaThixo ihleli phezu kwakhe."
John4:1 Ithe ngoko iNkosi, yakwazi ukuba abaFarisi bavile ukuba uYesu ugqithisile kuYohane ngokwenza nokubhaptiza abafundi;"
John4:2 (Nakuba uYesu ngokwakhe wayengabhaptizi, kwakubhaptiza abafundi bakhe),"
John4:3 Yalishiya yona elakwaYuda, yabuya yaya kwelaseGalili."
John4:4 Kwakufuneka ecande eSamariya.
John4:5 Wafika kwidolophu yaseSamariya ekuthiwa yiSikare, kufuphi nendawo awathi uYakobi wayinika uJosefu unyana wakhe."
John4:6 Lalilapho iqula likaYakobi. Uthe ke ngoko uYesu, ebulalekile kukuhamba, wahlala enjalo phezu komthombo;"
John4:7 Kufika intokazi yelamaSamariya, isiza kukha amanzi, athi uYesu kuyo, Ndiphe ndisele."
John4:8 (Kuba abafundi bakhe bebemke baya kuthenga ukudla esixekweni.)
John4:9 Ithi ngoko intokazi engumSamariyakazi kuye, Uthini na wena, ungumYuda nje, ukucela kum into eselwayo, ndingumSamariyakazi nje? kuba amaYuda akanazinkqubano namaSamariya."
John4:10 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuyo, Ukuba ubusazi isipho sikaThixo, nokuba ngubani na lo uthi kuwe, Ndiphe ndisele; unge ucele kuye wena, wakupha amanzi aphilileyo."
John4:11 Ithi intokazi kuye, Nkosi, akunanto yakukha, nequla linzulu; uwazuza phi na ke amanzi aphilileyo lawo?"
John4:12 Wena umkhulu yini na kunobawo wethu uYakobi, owasinikayo iqula eli, wayesela kulo yena, nabantwana bakhe, nemfuyo yakhe?"
John4:13 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuyo, Bonke abasela kula manzi, baya kubuya banxanwe;"
John4:14 ke yena othe wasela kuwo amanzi, endiya kumpha wona mna, akasayi kuza anxanwe naphakade; kodwa amanzi, endiya kumpha wona, aya kuba kuye iqula lamanzi ampompozela ebomini obungunaphakade."
John4:15 Ithi intokazi kuye, Nkosi, ndiphe loo manzi, ukuze ndinganxanwa, ndingezi nokuza kukha apha."
John4:16 Athi uYesu kuyo, Hamba uye kubiza indoda yakho, uze apha."
John4:17 Yaphendula intokazi yathi, Andinandoda. Wathi ke uYesu kuyo, Ulungisile ukuthi, Andinandoda;"
John4:18 kuba ubunamadoda amahlanu; onayo ngoku asindoda yakho, ùnyanisile ukutsho."
John4:19 Ithi intokazi kuye, Nkosi, ndiyabona ukuba ungumprofeti wena."
John4:20 Oobawo bethu babenqula kule ntaba; nina ke nithi iseYerusalem indawo apho abantu bamelwe kukunqula khona.
John4:21 Athi uYesu kuyo, Ntokazindini, kholwa ndim, ukuba kuza ilixa, eningasayi kuthi nakule ntaba, naseYerusalem, nimnqule uBawo."
John4:22 Nina ninqula eningakwaziyo; thina sinqula esikwaziyo, ngokuba usindiso luphuma kumaYuda."
John4:23 Kodwa kuza ilixa, nangoku selikho, xa abanquli abayinyaniso baya kumnqula uBawo ngoMoya nangenyaniso; kuba uBawo ufuna abanjalo ukumnqula."
John4:24 uThixo unguMoya; abo ke bamnqulayo bamelwe kukumnqula ngoMoya nangenyaniso.
John4:25 Ithi intokazi kuye, Ndiyazi ukuba uMesiya uyeza, ekuthiwa nguKristu; xa athe weza yena, uya kusityela izinto zonke."
John4:26 Athi uYesu kuye, Mna ndithethayo nawe ndinguye."
John4:27 Kwathi kwangoko bafika abafundi bakhe, bamangaliswa kukuba athethe nomntu oyinkazana; noko ke akubangakho namnye owathi. Ufuna ntoni na? okanye, Yini na ukuba uthethe nayo?"
John4:28 Yawushiya ngoko umphanda wayo intokazi, yemka yaya ekhaya;"
John4:29 Yizani, nibone umntu ondixelele izinto zonke endakha ndazenza; lo akangebi nguye uKristu yini na?"
John4:30 Baphuma ke ekhaya, baye besiza kuye."
John4:31 Ke kaloku ngelo xesha abafundi babemthandaza, besithi, Rabhi, yidla."
John4:32 Uthe ke yena kubo, Mna ndinokudla endikudlayo, eningakwaziyo nina."
John4:33 Babethetha bodwa ngoko abafundi, besithi, Ingaba kukho omziseleyo na ukudla?"
John4:34 Athi uYesu kubo, Okwam ukudla kukuba ndenze ukuthanda kowandithumayo, ndiwufeze umsebenzi wakhe."
John4:35 Anitsho na ukuthi, Kusele iinyanga ezine, kuvunwe? Yabonani, ndithi kuni, Waphakamiseni amehlo enu, niwakhangele amasimi; ngokuba aselemhlophe ukuba kuvunwe."
John4:36 Novunayo wamkela umvuzo, abuthele iziqhamo ebomini obungunaphakade, ukuze nalowo uhlwayelayo avuye, kunye nalowo uvunayo."
John4:37 Kule nto liyinyaniso iqhalo elithi, Omnye uyahlwayela, nomnye avune."
John4:38 Mna ndanithuma ukuvuna oko ningabulalekanga kuko nina; abanye babulalekile, naza nangena nina ekubulalekeni kwabo."
John4:39 Ke kaloku, kwakholwa kuye into eninzi yamaSamariya kuloo mzi, ngenxa yelizwi lentokazi leyo, yangqinayo yathi, Undityele izinto zonke endakha ndazenza."
John4:40 Akufika ngoko kuye amaSamariya, amcela ukuba ahlale nawo; wahlala khona ke imihla emibini."
John4:41 Into eninzi yakholwa ngakumbi ngenxa yelizwi lakhe.
John4:42 Wayesithi kwintokazi leyo, Asisakholwa ngenxa yokuthetha kwakho, kuba sizivele thina ngokwethu, sazi ukuba, inyaniso, lo unguye uMsindisi wehlabathi, uKristu."
John4:43 Ke kaloku, emveni kweentsuku ezimbini, waphuma khona, wemka waya kwelaseGalili."
John4:44 Kuba uYesu ngokwakhe wangqina, ukuba umprofeti akanambeko kowabo."
John4:45 Xenikweni ngoko wafikayo kwelaseGalili, bamamkela abaseGalili ababezibonile zonke izinto awazenzayo eYerusalem emthendelekweni; kuba babeyile nabo emthendelekweni."
John4:46 Wabuya ngoko weza uYesu eKana yelaseGalili, apho amanzi ebewenze iwayini. Kwaye kukho igosa lakomkhulu elithile, elinyana wayesifa eKapernahum."
John4:47 Lithe lakuva lona ukuba uYesu uphumile kwaYuda, wafika eGalili, laya kuye, lamcela ukuba ehle amphilise unyana walo, kuba ebeza kubhubha."
John4:48 Wathi ngoko uYesu kulo, Ukuba anithanga nibone imiqondiso nemimangaliso, anisayi kukha nikholwe."
John4:49 Lithi kuye igosa lakomkhulu, Nkosi, yihla engekabhubhi umntwana wam."
John4:50 Athi uYesu kuyo, Hamba uhambe; unyana wakho uhleli. Wakholwa umntu lowo lilizwi awalithethayo uYesu kuye, wahamba ke."
John4:51 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba usehla, izicaka zakhe zamhlangabeza, zambikela zisithi, Unyana wakho uhleli."
John4:52 Wabuza ngoko kuzo ilixa aqale ukuchacha ngalo; zathi kuye, Izolo, ngelixa lesixhenxe, yamyeka icesina."
John4:53 Wazi ngoko uyise, ukuba bekukwangelo lixa abethe ngalo uYesu kuye, Unyana wakho uhleli; wakholwa, yena nendlu yakhe iphela."
John4:54 Lo mqondiso waphinda wawenza uYesu, ekuphumeni kwakhe kwelakwaYuda, wafika kwelaseGalili."
John5:1 Emva koko ke kwaye kukho umthendeleko wamaYuda, wenyuka uYesu waya eYerusalem."
John5:2 Ke kaloku kukho eYerusalem apho, ngakwelezimvu isango, ichibi, ekuthiwa ukubizwa yiBhetesda ngesiHebhere, lineevaranda ezintlanu."
John5:3 Kwakulele kuzo inkitha eninzi yemilwelwe: iimfama, iziqhwala, abome umzimba, belinde ukuzanyazanyiswa kwamanzi."
John5:4 Kuba isithunywa sezulu ngaxesha lithile besisihla, singene echibini, siwagxobhagxobhe amanzi; lowo ngoko ubethe angene tanci emva kokugxojwagxojwagxojwa kwamanzi, ubephila nakusiphi na isifo abebanjwe siso."
John5:5 Kwakukho ndoda ithile apho, eyayingumlwelwe iminyaka emashumi mathathu anesibhozo."
John5:6 uYesu embona lowo elele, esazi ukuba uselenexesha elikhulu enjalo, uthi kuye, Uyafuna na ukuba uphile?"
John5:7 Waphendula umlwelwe wathi, Nkosi, andinamntu wokuthi, xa athe agxojwagxojwa amanzi, andiphose echibini. Kuthi ke, ndakubon’ ukuba mna ndiyaya, ndiphangelwe ngomnye ukuhla."
John5:8 Athi uYesu kuye, Vuka, uthabathe ukhuko lwakho, uhambe."
John5:9 Usuke kwaoko waphila umntu, waluthabatha ukhuko lwakhe, wahamba. Ke kaloku kwakuyisabatha loo mini."
John5:10 Ayesithi ke amaYuda kophilisiweyo, Yisabatha; akuvumelekile ukuba uthwale ukhuko lwakho."
John5:11 Wawaphendula wathi, Owandiphilisayo, nguye owathi kum, Thabatha ukhuko lwakho, uhambe."
John5:12 Ambuza ngoko athi, Ngubani na yena loo mntu uthe kuwe, Thabatha ukhuko lwakho, uhambe?"
John5:13 Ke kaloku, owaphiliswayo ebengazi ukuba ngubani na; kuba uYesu wathi shwaka, kwakubon’ ukuba kukho izihlwele kuloo ndawo."
John5:14 Kwathi emveni kwezi zinto, uYesu umfumana etempileni, athi kuye, Uyabona, uphilile;"
John5:15 Wemka umntu lowo, waxela kumaYuda, ukuba nguYesu omenze waphila."
John5:16 Ngenxa yoko ayemtshutshisa uYesu amaYuda, afuna ukumbulala; ngokuba wayesenza ezo zinto ngesabatha."
John5:17 Wawaphendula ke uYesu wathi, uBawo uyasebenza kude kube ngoku, nam ndiyasebenza."
John5:18 Ngenxa yoko ke ayefuna ngakumbi amaYuda ukumbulala; ngokuba ubengaphule sabatha yodwa, wayetshilo nokuthi, uThixo ngowakhe uYise, ezenza alingane noThixo."
John5:19 Waphendula ngoko uYesu, wathi kuwo, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, uNyana akanakwenza nto ngokwakhe, engathanga abone uYise eyenza; kuba izinto asukuba ezenza yena, uyazenza uNyana kwangokunjalo;"
John5:20 Kuba uYise uyamthanda uNyana, embonisa zonke izinto azenzayo yena; uya kumbonisa nemisebenzi emikhulu kunale, ukuze nina nimangaliswe."
John5:21 Kuba, njengoko uYise abavusayo abafileyo, abadlise ubomi; kwangokunjalo noNyana ubadlisa ubomi abo athandayo."
John5:22 Kuba uYise akagwebi namnye; uthe umgwebo wonke wawunikela kuNyana;
John5:23 ukuze bonke bambeke uNyana, kwanjengoko bambekayo uYise. Lowo ungambekiyo uNyana, akambeki uYise owamthumayo."
John5:24 Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Lowo ulivayo ilizwi lam, akholwe ngulowo wandithumayo, unobomi obungunaphakade; akezi ekugwetyweni; uphume ekufeni wangena ebomini."
John5:25 Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Kuza ilixa, nangoku selikho, xa abafileyo baya kuliva ilizwi loNyana kaThixo, bathi abalivileyo badle ubomi."
John5:26 Kuba njengokuba uYise enabo ubomi kuye ngokwakhe; ngokunjalo wamnika noNyana ukuba abe nobomi kuye ngokwakhe.
John5:27 Wamnika negunya lokugweba, ngokuba enguNyana woMntu."
John5:28 Musani ukumangaliswa kuko oko; ngokuba kuza ilixa abaya kuthi ngalo bonke abasemangcwabeni balive ilizwi lakhe;
John5:29 Kwaye baya kuphuma; beze eluvukweni lobomi; baye eluvukweni lokugwetywa abo benza izinto ezimbi.
John5:30 Mna ngokwam andinakwenza nto; njengoko ndivayo, ndigweba ngako, nomgwebo wam ububulungisa; ngokuba andifuni kuthanda kwam, ndifuna ukuthanda kukaBawo owandithumayo."
John5:31 Ukuba mna ndisuka ndizingqinele, ubungqina bam abungebi yiyo inene."
John5:32 Kukho omnye ongqinayo ngam; ndiyazi ke, ukuba buyinene ubungqina angqinayo ngam."
John5:33 Nina nithumele kuYohane; uyingqinele ke inyaniso.
John5:34 Mna ke andamkeli bungqina mntwini; ndizithetha ezi zinto, ukuze nina nisindiswe."
John5:35 Yena lowo waye esisibane esidangazelayo, nesikhanyiso, na ke nina nathanda ukuvuya umzuzwana ekukhanyeni kwakhe."
John5:36 Kodwa ndinabo ubungqina obungaphezu kobukaYohane; kuba imisebenzi awandinikayo uBawo ukuba ndiyifeze, yona le misebenzi ndiyenzayo mna, iyangqina ngam, ukuba uBawo undithumile."
John5:37 NoBawo ngokwakhe, yena owandithumayo, ungqinile ngam. Anizanga nilive izwi lakhe nakanye, niyibone nembonakalo yakhe."
John5:38 Ilizwi lakhe alihlali kuni, kuba anikholwa kulowo amthumileyo."
John5:39 Ziphengululeni izibhalo; ngokuba nina niba ninobomi obungunaphakade kuzo; zaye zona zingqina ngam.
John5:40 Nibe ke nina ningathandi ukuza kum, ukuze nibe nobomi."
John5:41 Andamkeli luzuko bantwini.
John5:42 Ndiyanazi nina, ukuba uthando lukaThixo aninalo ngaphakathi kwenu."
John5:43 Mna ndize egameni likaBawo, anindamkeli; ukuba omnye uthe weza ngelilelakhe igama, nomamkela yena."
John5:44 Ningathini na ukuba nako ukukholwa, nisamkelela uzuko omnye komnye nje nina, nibe uzuko lona oluvela kuThixo yedwa ningalufuni?"
John5:45 Ningabi ndiya kunimangalela kuBawo mna; ukho onimangalelayo, uMoses, lowo nimthembileyo nina."
John5:46 Ukuba benikholiwe nguMoses, ninge nikholiwe ndim, kuba yena wabhala ngam."
John5:47 Ke ukuba anikholwa zizibhalo zakhe, nothini na ukukholwa ngamazwi am?"
John6:1 Emveni kwezi zinto, wemka uYesu, waya phesheya kolwandle lwaseGalili, lwaseTibheriya."
John6:2 Wayelandelwa yindimbane enkulu, kuba yayiyibona imiqondiso yakhe abeyenza kwabafayo."
John6:3 uYesu wenyuka intaba, waza wahlala phantsi nabafundi bakhe."
John6:4 Yaye ke ikufuphi ipasika, umthendeleko wamaYuda."
John6:5 Ewaphakamisile ngoko uYesu amehlo akhe, ebone isihlwele esikhulu sisiza kuye, wathi kuFilipu, Sozithenga phi na izonka, ukuze badle aba?"
John6:6 Ubesitsho ke emlinga; kuba ubeyazi yena into abeza kuyenza.
John6:7 uFilipu wamphendula wathi, Izonka zeedenariyo ezimakhulu mabini azibanele, ukuze elowo athabathe intwana."
John6:8 Athi kuye omnye kubafundi bakhe, uAndreya, umzalwana kaSimon Petros,"
John6:9 Kukho nkwenkwana apha, inezonka ezihlanu zerhasi neentlanzi ezimbini; kodwa ke ziyintoni na ezo kwabangakanana?"
John6:10 Uthe ke uYesu, Bahlaliseni phantsi abantu. Kwaye ke kukho utyani obuninzi kuloo ndawo. Ahlala phantsi ke amadoda, engathi amawaka mahlanu inani."
John6:11 Wazithabatha ke izonka uYesu; wathi akubulela wababela abafundi, bathi ke abafundi babela abo babehleli phantsi, kwaba kwanjalo nakwiintlanzi, ngangokuthanda kwabo."
John6:12 Bakuhlutha ke, wathi kubafundi bakhe, Buthani amaqhekeza aseleyo, ukuze kungonakali."
John6:13 Babutha ngoko, bazalisa iingobozi zalishumi elinazibini ngamaqhekeza abesele kubo ababedlile, ezonka ezihlanu zerhasi."
John6:14 Ngoko abantu abo, bakuwubona umqondiso awawenzayo uYesu, bathi, Lo nguye inyaniso umprofeti lowo uzayo ehlabathini."
John6:15 Uthe ngoko uYesu, esazi ukuba bahlalele ukuza kumbamba ngamandla, bamenze ukumkani, wabuya wemka, waya entabeni Yena yedwa."
John6:16 Ke kaloku, kwakuhlwa, behla abafundi bakhe, baya elwandle."
John6:17 Bengenile emkhombeni, baluwela ulwandle, besiya eKapernahum, kwakusekumnyama, waye uYesu engafikanga kubo."
John6:18 Lwaye nolwandle lusilwa, kananjalo kuvuthuza umoya omkhulu."
John6:19 Bakuba ngoko begweqile izitadiya ezingathi zimashumi mabini anantlanu, nokuba zimashumi mathathu, bambona uYesu ehamba phezu kolwandle, esondela ngasemkhombeni;"
John6:20 Athi ke yena kubo, Ndim; musani ukoyika."
John6:21 Bathanda ke bona ukumamkela emkhombeni;
John6:22 Ngengomso indimbane leyo, ibimi phesheya kolwandle, yabona ukuba akukho mkhombe wumbi khona apho, ingenguwo lowo bangene kuwo abafundi bakhe, nokuba uYesu akangenanga nabafundi bakhe emkhombeni, wemka nabafundi bakhe, bemka bodwa;"
John6:23 (Kodwa kweza eminye imikhombe evela eTibheriya, kufuphi nendawo apho babedle isonka, emva kokuba iNkosi yayibulele)"
John6:24 Xa ngoko indimbane yabonayo ukuba uYesu akakho apho nabafundi bakhe, besuka bangena nabo emikhombeni, beza eKapernahum, bemfuna uYesu."
John6:25 Bathe bakumfumana phesheya kolwandle, bathi kuye, Rabhi, ufike nini na apha?"
John6:26 Wabaphendula uYesu wathi, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Anindifuni ngakuba nabona imiqondiso, nindifuna ngokuba nadla kwezaa zonka, nahlutha."
John6:27 Musani ukusebenzela ukudla okutshabalalayo; sebenzelani ukudla okuhlala kuse ebomini obungunaphakade, aya kunipha kona uNyana woMntu; kuba uYise uThixo utywine waqinisela yena lowo."
John6:28 Bathe ngoko kuye, Masenze ntoni na, ukuze sisebenze imisebenzi kaThixo?"
John6:29 Waphendula uYesu, wathi kubo, Umsebenzi kaThixo nguwo lo, ukuba nikholwe kuye othunyiweyo nguye."
John6:30 Bathi ngoko kuye, Wenza mqondiso mni na ke ngoko, ukuze sibone, sikholwe nguwe? Usebenza ntoni na?"
John6:31 Oobawo bâtya imana entlango; njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Wabanika isonka siphuma ezulwini, ukuba badle sona."
John6:32 Uthe ngoko uYesu kubo, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, AsinguMoses oninike isonka esiphuma ezulwini; nguBawo oninika isonka esiphuma ezulwini, esiyinyaniso."
John6:33 Kuba isonka sikaThixo ngulowo uhla ephuma ezulwini, alinike ubomi ihlabathi."
John6:34 Baza bathi kuye: “Nkosi, khawusinike eso sonka ngamaxa onke."
John6:35 Wathi ke uYesu kubo, Isonka sobomi esi ndim; lowo uzayo kum, akasayi kulamba; lowo ukholwayo kum, akasayi kunxanwa naphakade."
John6:36 Ndithe ke kuni, Nindibonile nokundibona, anakholwa noko."
John6:37 Konke andinikayo uBawo, kuya kuza kum; nozayo kum, andisayi kukha ndimlahlele phandle;"
John6:38 ngokuba ndihle emazulwini, ndingaze kwenza ukuthanda kwam; ndize kwenza ukuthanda kwalowo wandithumayo."
John6:39 Kuko ke oku ukuthanda kowandithumayo, kukaBawo: ukuba konke awandinikayo, ndingalahli nento kuko, ndikuvuse ngomhla wokugqibela."
John6:40 Kuko ke oku ukuthanda kowandithumayo, ukuthi babe nobomi obungunaphakade bonke abambonayo uNyana, bakholwe kuye; ndaye mna ndiya kumvusa ngomhla wokugqibela."
John6:41 Ayemkrokrela ngoko amaYuda, ngokuba wathi, Ndim isonka, esi sehlayo emazulwini."
John6:42 Ayesithi ke, Lo asinguye na kanene uYesu, unyana kaYosefu, esimaziyo thina uyise nonina? Angáthini na ke ngoko ukuthi, Ndihle emazulwini?"
John6:43 Waphendula ngoko uYesu wathi kubo, Musani ukukrokra phakathi kwenu."
John6:44 Akukho namnye unako ukuza kum, engathanga uBawo owandithumayo amtsale; ndaye mna ndiya kumvusa ngomhla wokugqibela."
John6:45 Kubhaliwe ebaprofetini kwathiwa, Baye bonke beya kuba ngabafundiswa bakaThixo; Bonke ngoko abathe beva kuBawo, bafunda kuye, bayeza kum."
John6:46 Kungekuba kukho bani umbonileyo uBawo, ingenguye ovela kuThixo; nguye yedwa ombonileyo uBawo."
John6:47 Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Lowo ukholwayo kum unobomi obungunaphakade."
John6:48 Ndim isonka sobomi.
John6:49 Ooyihlo bayidla imana leyo entlango, bafile noko."
John6:50 Esi sisonka esihla sivela ezulwini, ukuba umntu akudle, angafi."
John6:51 Ndim isonka esiphilileyo, esi sehlayo emazulwini. Ukuba ubani uthe wasidla esi sonka, wodla ubomi ngonaphakade; ke isonka endiya kusinika mna siyinyama yam, endiya kuyinikela ubomi behlabathi."
John6:52 Abambana ngoko amaYuda phakathi kwawo, esithi, Angathini na lo ukusinika inyama yakhe siyidle?"
John6:53 Wathi ngoko uYesu kuwo, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Ukuba anithanga niyidle inyama yoNyana woMntu, nilisele igazi lakhe, aninabo ubomi kuni."
John6:54 Lowo uyidlayo eyam inyama, alisele elam igazi, unobomi obungunaphakade; ndaye mna ndiya kumvusa ngomhla wokugqibela."
John6:55 Kuba inyama yam ikukudla, inyaniso; negazi lam liluselo, inyaniso."
John6:56 Lowo uyidlayo eyam inyama, alisele elam igazi, uhleli kum, nam ndihleli kuye."
John6:57 Njengokuba uBawo ophilileyo wandithumayo, ndibe nam ndihleli ngaye uBawo, lowo undidlayo, uya kuphila ngam."
John6:58 Siso eso isonka esehla emazulwini; kungenjengokuba ooyihlo bayidlayo imana, bafa noko. Lowo usidlayo esi sonka, uya kuphila ngonaphakade."
John6:59 Ezi zinto wazithetha endlwini yesikhungu, efundisa eKapernahum."
John6:60 Into eninzi ngoko kubafundi bakhe yakuva yathi, Lilizwi elinqabileyo eli; ngubani na onokuyiva?"
John6:61 Esazi uYesu ngaphakathi kwakhe, ukuba bayakrokra lilo abafundi bakhe, wathi kubo, Kuyanikhubekisa na oku?"
John6:62 Hi na ke, ukuba nithe nambona uNyana woMntu enyukela apho ebefudula ekhona?"
John6:63 Ngumoya odlisa ubomi; inyama yona ayincedi lutho. Amazwi la ndiwathethayo kuni mna angumoya, abubomi."
John6:64 Kodwa kukho abathile kuni abangakholwayo. Kuba ebesazi kwasekuqalekeni uYesu, ukuba ngoobani na ababengakholwa, nokuba ngubani na oya kumngcatsha."
John6:65 Wayesithi, Kungenxa yoku ndatshoyo kuni ukuthi, Akukho namnye unako ukuza kum, ukuba akathanga akunikwe nguBawo."
John6:66 Ukususela ngelo xesha into eninzi yabafundi bakhe yabuya umva, ayaba sahamba naye."
John6:67 Wathi ngoko uYesu kwabalishumi elinababini, Nani nifuna ukumka, yini na?"
John6:68 Wamphendula ngoko uSimon Petros wathi, Nkosi, sosuka siye kubani na? Nguwe onamazwi obomi obungunaphakade."
John6:69 Nathi sikholiwe, sazile, ukuba wena unguye uKristu, uNyana kaThixo ophilileyo."
John6:70 Wabaphendula uYesu wathi, Andininyulanga na mna, nina balishumi elinababini? Ukanti omnye kuni ungumtyholi?"
John6:71 Wayethetha ngoYuda Sikariyoti kaSimon, kuba lowo ibinguye obeza kumngcatsha, engomnye weshumi elinababini."
John7:1 Emveni kwezi zinto, wayehamba uYesu kwelaseGalili; kuba ebengathandi ukuhamba kwelakwaYuda; ngokuba amaYuda ebefuna ukumbulala."
John7:2 Ke kaloku, wawukufuphi umthendeleko wamaYuda weminquba."
John7:3 Bathi ngoko kuye abazalwana bakhe, Gqitha apha, uye kwelakwaYuda, ukuze nabafundi bakho bayibone imisebenzi yakho oyenzayo."
John7:4 Kuba akukho namnye wenza into emfihlekweni, abe yena ngokwakhe efuna ukuba sekuhleni. Ukuba uyazenza ezi zinto, zibonakalise ngokwakho kwihlabathi."
John7:5 Kuba nabazalwana bakhe bebengakholwa kuye.
John7:6 Wathi ngoko uYesu kubo, Ixesha lam alikabikho, ke elenu ixesha lihlala lilungile."
John7:7 Ihlabathi alinakunithiya nina; mna ke liyandithiya, ngokuba mna ndingqina ngalo, ukuba imisebenzi yalo ayindawo."
John7:8 Nyukani nina, niye kulo mthendeleko; mna andikanyuki, ndiye kulo mthendeleko; ngokuba ixesha lam alikazaliseki."
John7:9 Akuba ke ezithethile ezi zinto kubo, wahlala kwelaseGalili."
John7:10 Ke, bakuba benyukile abazalwana bakhe, wenyuka naye, waya emthendelekweni, kungekhona ekuhleni, kubusithela."
John7:11 Ayemfuna ngoko amaYuda emthendelekweni, esithi, Uphi na yena?"
John7:12 Kwaye kukho ukukrokra okukhulu ngaye ebantwini; inxenye ibisithi, Ulungile; abanye ke besithi, Hayi; ke yena ulahlekisa abantu."
John7:13 Noko ke bekungekho namnye ubethetha ngaye ngokusekuhleni, ngenxa yokoyika amaYuda."
John7:14 Ke kaloku, kwakubon’ ukuba sekuphakathi komthendeleko, wenyuka uYesu waya etempileni, wafundisa."
John7:15 Amangaliswa amaYuda, esithi, Lo mfo ube nolwazi ngani na, engafundanga nje?"
John7:16 Wawaphendula uYesu, wathi, Eyam imfundiso asiyam, yeyalowo wandithumayo."
John7:17 Ukuba kukho othi afune ukukwenza ukuthanda kwakhe, woyazi imfundiso le: ukuba iphuma kuThixo, nokuba mna ndithetha okukokwam, kusini na."
John7:18 Lowo uthetha okwakhe, ufuna olulolwakhe uzuko; ke lowo ufuna uzuko lowamthumayo, uyinene yena, akukho kungalungisi kuye."
John7:19 Umthetho aniwunikelwanga na nguMoses? Kanti ke akukho namnye kuni uwugcinayo umthetho; Yini na ukuba nifune ukundibulala?
John7:20 Saphendula isihlwele sathi, Unedemon; ngubani na ofuna ukukubulala?"
John7:21 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Ndenze umsebenzi wamnye, namangaliswa ke nonke."
John7:22 uMoses uninike ulwaluko ngenxa yoku; Kungekuba iphume kuMoses, kungenxa yokuba iphuma kooyihlo. Niyalùsa ke nina nangesabatha."
John7:23 Ukuba umntu uyaluswa ngoMhla woPhumlo, ukuze ungaphulwa umthetho kaMosis. Nindijalele na ngokuba ndiphilise umntu, waphila kwaphela, ngesabatha?"
John7:24 Musani ukugweba ngokwembonakalo; gwebani ngomgwebo olungisayo.
John7:25 Babesithi ngoko abathile kwabaseYerusalem, Asinguye na lo bafuna ukumbulala?"
John7:26 Niyabona, uthetha ngokuphandle, abathethi nto kuye; bangaba kanti na ke bayazi okwenyaniso abaphathi, ukuba lo nguye uKristu okwenyaniso?"
John7:27 Thina siyamazi lo apho avela khona; xa sukuba ke uKristu esiza, akukho namnye uya kumazi apho avela khona."
John7:28 Wadanduluka ngoko uYesu, efundisa etempileni, wathi, Nina niyandazi, nikwazi nalapho ndivela khona; andizanga ngokwam; uyinyaniso owandithumayo, eningamaziyo nina."
John7:29 Ke mna ndiyamazi; ngokuba ndivela kuye, waye yena endithumile."
John7:30 Babefuna ngoko ukumbamba, kodwa akubangakho namnye umsa isandla, ngokuba ilixa lakhe belingekafiki."
John7:31 Ke kaloku, into eninzi esihlweleni yakholwa kuye; yayisithi, uKristu, xa athe wafika, angaba uya kwenza imiqondiso emininzi na kunale ayenzileyo lo?"
John7:32 AbaFarisi beva abantu bezikrokrela ezi zinto ngaye; Baza abaFarisi nababingeleli abakhulu bathuma amadindala, ukuba ambambe."
John7:33 Wathi ngoko uYesu kubo, Liselixesha elifutshane endinani, ndize ndiye kowandithumayo."
John7:34 Niya kundifuna, ningandifumani; nithi apho ndikhona mna, ningabi nakufika nina."
John7:35 Athi ngoko amaYuda phakathi kwawo, Uza kuya phi na lo, le nto singayi kumfumana thina? Angaba uza kuya kwiintsali zakwaentlanga, afundise iintlanga?"
John7:36 Liyintoni na eli lizwi alithethileyo, lithi, Niya kundifuna, ningandifumani; nithi apho ndikhona mna, ningabi nakufika nina?"
John7:37 Ke kaloku, ngomhla wokugqibela, ongowona mkhulu womthendeleko, wema uYesu, wadanduluka esithi, Ukuba kukho othi anxanwe, makeze kum asele."
John7:38 Lowo ukholwayo kum, njengoko satshoyo isibhalo, kuya kumpompoza imilambo yamanzi aphilileyo, iphuma embilinini wakhe."
John7:39 Oku wakutsho ke ngaye uMoya, ababeza kumamkeliswa abo bakholwayo kuye; kuba ebengekamkelwa uMoya oyiNgcwele; ngokuba uYesu ebengekazukiswa."
John7:40 Yaye ngoko into eninzi esihlweleni, yakuliva ilizwi elo, isithi, Lo nguye umprofeti, inyaniso."
John7:41 Baye abanye besithi, Lo nguye uKristu. Babesithi ke abathile, uKristu angavela na kwelaseGalili na?"
John7:42 Asitsho na iziBhalo ukuthi uKrestu uyaphuma embewini kaDavide, ephuma eBhetelehem, apho wayekhona uDavide?"
John7:43 Ke ngoko sathi qheke kubini isihlwele ngenxa yakhe.
John7:44 Inxenye ke kubo yayithanda ukumbamba; kodwa akubangakho namnye umsa izandla.
John7:45 Afika ngoko amadindala kubabingeleli abakhulu nakubaFarisi; bathi kubo, Yini na ukuba ningezi naye?"
John7:46 Aphendula amadindala athi, Akuzanga kuthethe mntu njengoko athetha ngako lo mntu."
John7:47 Bawaphendula ngoko abaFarisi, bathi, Ningaba nilahlekisiwe nani na?"
John7:48 Kubaphathi nakubaFarisi kungaba kukho mntu ukholiweyo kuye yini na?
John7:49 Kodwa aba bantu bangawaziyo umthetho baqalekisiwe.
John7:50 Athi kubo uNikodemo (lowo wezayo kuYesu ebusuku, engomnye wabo),"
John7:51 Umthetho wethu uyamgweba yini na umntu, ukuba awuthanga uve kuye kuqala, uqonde into ayenzayo?"
John7:52 Baphendula bathi kuye, Ungaba ungowaseGalili nawe na? Phengulula ubone, kuba akuveli mprofeti kwelaseGalili."
John7:53 Walowo ke waya kweyakhe indlu.
John8:1 uYesu ke waya eNtabeni yemiNquma.
John8:2 Kwathi kwakusa, wabuya wangena etempileni; baye bonke abantu besiza kuye; wahlala phantsi, wabafundisa."
John8:3 Ababhali nabaFarisi bazisa kuye umfazi obanjwe ekrexeza; bammisa ke esazulwini,"
John8:4 bathi kuye, Mfundisi, lo mfazi wabanjwa ekrexeza, kanye kuloo ntlondi."
John8:5 Ke kaloku, emthethweni uMoses wasiyalela ukuba abanjalo bagityiselwe ngamatye;"
John8:6 Bakutsho ke oko, bemlinga, ukuze babe nokummangalela. Kodwa uYesu, ethobe phantsi, wabhala ngomnwe emhlabeni, ngokungathi akeva."
John8:7 Uthe ke bakumana bembuza, waphakama, wathi kubo, Ongenasono kuni makaqale amgibisele ngelitye."
John8:8 Wabuya wathoba, wabhala emhlabeni."
John8:9 Bathe ke bona bakuva, besohlwaywa naluvalo lwabo, baphuma ngabanye, beqalela kwabakhulu, kwada kwaba kwabokugqibela. Wasala yedwa uYesu, waye umfazi emi phakathi."
John8:10 Ephakamile ke uYesu, akabona mntu kwakuphela ngumfazi lowo; wathi kuye, Mfazindini, baphi na abo bamangaleli bakho? Akukho ukugwebileyo na?"
John8:11 Wathi ke yena, Noko amnye, Nkosi. Wathi ke uYesu kuyo, Nam andikugwebi; hamba, ungabi sona."
John8:12 Wabuya ngoko uYesu wathetha kubo, esithi, Ndim ukhanyiselo lwehlabathi; lowo undilandelayo akasayi kuhamba ebumnyameni; yena uya kuba nalo ukhanyiso lobomi."
John8:13 Bathe ngoko abaFarisi kuye, Wena uyazingqinela; Ingxelo yakho ayinyanisekanga."
John8:14 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo, Nokuba ndithi ndizingqinele mna ngokwam, buyinene ubungqina bam; ngokuba ndiyazi apho ndavela khona, nalapho ndiya khona; ke nina anazi apho ndivela khona, nalapho ndiya khona."
John8:15 Nina nigweba ngokwenyama; mna andigwebi mntu.
John8:16 Nokuba ndithi ndigwebe mna, umgwebo wam uyinene; ngokuba andindedwa, ndim noBawo owandithumayo."
John8:17 Nasemthethweni wenu ke kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ubungqina babantu ababini buyinene."
John8:18 Mna ndingulowo uzingqinelayo; uyandingqinela nalowo wandithumayo, uBawo."
John8:19 Bathi ngoko kuye, Uphi na uYihlo? Waphendula uYesu wathi, Anindazi mna; anindazi noBawo; ukuba benindazile mna, ninge nimazile noBawo."
John8:20 Loo mazwi wawathetha uYesu ngasemkhumbini wokulondoloza imali, efundisa endlwini kaThixo. Akubangakho namnye umsa izandla; ngokuba belingekafiki ilixa lakhe."
John8:21 Wabuya ngoko uYesu wathi kubo, Ndiyemka mna; niya kundifuna, nifele esonweni senu; apho ndiya khona mna, aninako ukufika nina."
John8:22 Ayesithi ngoko amaYuda, Angaba uya kuzibulala na? ngokuba esithi, Apho ndiya khona mna, aninako ukufika nina."
John8:23 Wathi kuwo, Nina ningabangaphantsi; mna ndingowaphezulu; nina ningabeli hlabathi; mna andingoweli hlabathi."
John8:24 Ndatsho ngoko kuni ukuthi, Niya kufela ezonweni zenu; kuba ekubeni nithe anakholwa ukuba ndinguye, niya kufela ezonweni zenu."
John8:25 Athi ngoko kuye, Ungubani na? Athi kubo uYesu, Ndiyiloo nto ndayixelayo kuni kwasekuqaleni."
John8:26 Ndineendawo ezininzi zokuthetha nokugweba ngani; lowo wandithumayo uyinene; ndaye mna ndithetha ehlabathini, izinto endazivayo kuye, ndizithethe."
John8:27 Akaqondanga ukuba ebethetha ngoYise kuwo.
John8:28 Wathi ngoko uYesu kuwo, Xa nithe namphakamisa uNyana woMntu, noqonda oko ukuba ndinguye, nokuba andenzi nto ngokwam; ndisuka ndizithethe ezi zinto njengoko wandifundisayo uBawo."
John8:29 Lowo wandithumayo unam; uBawo akandishiyanga ndedwa; kuba mna ndihlala ndizenza izinto ezikholekileyo kuye.
John8:30 Akubon’ ukuba uyazithetha ezi zinto, bakholwa kuye, baba baninzi."
John8:31 Uthe ngoko uYesu kuloo maYuda akholiweyo kuye, Ukuba nina nithe nahlala elizwini lam, noba ningabafundi bam, inyaniso."
John8:32 Naniya kuyazi inyaniso, yaye inyaniso iya kunikhulula."
John8:33 Aphendula athi kuye, Thina siyimbewu ka-Abraham, asizanga sibe ngamakhoboka amntu; utsho ngani na ukuthi, Niya kukhululwa?"
John8:34 Wawaphendula uYesu wathi, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Bonke abenza isono bangamakhoboka esono."
John8:35 Ikhoboka ke alihlali endlwini ngonaphakade; ngunyana ohlala ngonaphakade.
John8:36 Ngoko ukuba uNyana uthe wanikhulula, noba nikhululekile inene."
John8:37 Ndiyazi ukuba niyimbewu ka-Abraham; ke nifuna ukundibulala, ngokuba ilizwi lam lingenakuhamba kuni."
John8:38 Mna ndithetha endikubonileyo kuBawo; nani ke nenza enikubonileyo kuyihlo.
John8:39 Aphendula athi kuye, Ubawo nguAbraham. Athi kuwo uYesu, Ukuba beningabantwana baka-Abraham, ninge niyenza imisebenzi ka-Abraham."
John8:40 Kaloku ke, nifuna ukubulala mna, mntu unixelele inyaniso endayiva kuThixo; akakwenzanga oko uAbraham."
John8:41 Nina nenza imisebenzi yooyihlo. Athi ngoko kuye, Thina asizelwe ngabuhenyu; mnye uBawo wethu, uThixo."
John8:42 Uthe ke uYesu kuwo, Ukuba uThixo ebenguYihlo, ninge nindithanda; kuba mna ndaphuma kuThixo, ndifikile ke; kuba andizanga ngokwam, nguye owandithumayo."
John8:43 Yini na ukuba ningayiqondi intetho yam? ngenxa yokuba ningenakuliva ilizwi lam.
John8:44 Nina ningaboyihlo uMtyholi, neenkanuko zoyihlo niyathanda ukuzenza. Yena waye esisibulala-mntu kwasekuqaleni, akemi enyanisweni, ngokuba akukho nyaniso kuye. Xa sukuba ethetha ubuxoki, uthetha okukokwakhe; ngokuba ulixoki, noyise wawo."
John8:45 Mna ke, ngokuba ndithetha inyaniso, anikholwa ndim."
John8:46 Ngubani na kuni ondohlwayayo ngenxa yesono? Ukuba ke ndithetha inyaniso, kungani na ukuba ningakholwa ndim?"
John8:47 Lowo ungokaThixo, uyaweva amazwi kaThixo; ngenxa yoko aniweva nina, ngokuba ningengabakaThixo."
John8:48 Aphendula ke ngoko amaYuda, athi kuye, Asitsho na ukuthi, ungumSamariya na, kwaye unedemon?"
John8:49 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Andinademon mna; ndibeka uBawo; nina ke nibe nindihlaza."
John8:50 Mna ke andifuni luzuko lwam; ukho lowo ufunayo, ugwebayo."
John8:51 Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Ukuba umntu uthe waligcina ilizwi lam, akasayi kuza abone kufa naphakade."
John8:52 Athi ngoko amaYuda kuye, Kukalokunje, siyazi ukuba unedemon. uAbraham wafa, nabo abaprofeti bafa; wena ke uthi, Ukuba umntu uthe waligcina ilizwi lam, akasayi kuza eve kufa naphakade."
John8:53 Wena ungaba umkhulu yini na kunobawo wethu uAbraham, yena wafayo? nabaprofeti bafa; uzenza bani na?"
John8:54 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Ukuba mna ndithi ndizizukise, uzuko lwam alungebi nto; nguBawo ondizukisayo; enithi nguThixo wenu;"
John8:55 Kambe animazanga; Mna ke ndiyamazi; nokuba ndithe andimazi, ndoba ndilixoki njengani; ndiyamazi, ndiligcinile nelizwi lakhe."
John8:56 Uyihlo uAbraham wagcobela ukuwubona umhla wam, wawubona, wavuya."
John8:57 Athi ngoko amaYuda kuye, Ungekabi naminyaka imashumi mahlanu nje, umbonile na uAbraham?"
John8:58 Wathi kuwo uYesu, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Engekabikho uAbraham, mna ndikho kade."
John8:59 Ngoko achola amatye ukuba amgibisele. Wazimela ke uYesu, waphuma etempileni, wacanda phakathi kwabo;"
John9:1 Uthe ke edlula, wabona umntu obe eyimfama kwasekuzalweni kwakhe."
John9:2 Bambuza ke abafundi bakhe, besithi, Rabhi, ngubani na owonayo, ngulo, ngabazali bakhe, sini na, ukuze azalwe eyimfama nje?"
John9:3 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Akone lo, akone bazali bakhe; uzelwe eyimfama ukuze ibonakalaliselwe kuye."
John9:4 Ndimelwe kukuyisebenza imisebenzi yowandithumayo, kusesemini; kuza ubusuku, xa kungekho namnye unako ukusebenza."
John9:5 Xa ndisesehlabathini, ndilukhanyiselo lwehlabathi."
John9:6 Akuba etshilo, watshica emhlabeni, wenza udaka ngamathe, wawathambisa ngodongwe amehlo emfama leyo."
John9:7 Wathi kuyo, Hamba uye kuhlamba echibini laseSilowa (oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, Thunyiwe). Yemka ngoko, yaya yahlamba, yeza ibona."
John9:8 Baye ngoko abamelwane, nababembona ngaphambili ukuba uyimfama, besithi, Lo asinguye na obehleli engqiba?"
John9:9 Inxenye ibisithi, Nguye lo; abanye ke besithi, Ufana naye; yena ke wayesithi, Ndinguye."
John9:10 Bathi ngoko kuye, Atyhilwe na amehlo akho?"
John9:11 Waphendula yena wathi, Umntu ekuthiwa nguYesu wenze udaka, waqaba amehlo am, wathi kum, Yiya echibini leSilowa, uhlambe; ndiyile ke ndahlamba, ndabuya ndibona."
John9:12 Bathi ngoko kuye, Uphi na yena? Wathi, Andazi."
John9:13 Bamzisa kubaFarisi lowo ubefudula eyimfama.
John9:14 Ke kaloku kwakuyisabatha, oko uYesu wenza udaka, wawavula amehlo akhe."
John9:15 Babuya ngoko ke bambuza nabaFarisi, ukuba utheni na ukuba abuye abone. Uthe ke yena kubo, Ubeke udaka emehlweni am, ndaza ndahlamba;"
John9:16 Babesithi ngoko abathile bakubaFarisi, Lo mntu asingowakwaThixo, ngokuba isabatha akayigcini. Babesithi abanye, Angathini na umntu ongumoni ukwenza imiqondiso engakanana? Kwabakho iyantlukwano phakathi kwabo."
John9:17 Babuya bathi kwimfama, Uthini na wena ngaye, ewavulile nje amehlo akho? Wathi, Ungumprofeti."
John9:18 Akakholwa ngoko amaYuda ngaye, ukuba ebeyimfama, wabuya wabona, ada abiza abazali balowo ubuye wabona."
John9:19 Ababuza esithi, Lo ngunyana wenu na, enithi nina wazalwa eyimfama? Kutheni na ke ngoku ebona?"
John9:20 Abazali bakhe bawaphendula bathi, Siyazi ukuba lo ngunyana wethu, kwanokuba ke wazalwa eyimfama;"
John9:21 Le nto ke abonayo ngoku asazi; novule amehlo akhe, asimazi thina; Buzani kuye, woziphendulela."
John9:22 Batsho abazali bakhe, ngokuba babesoyika amaYuda; kuba amaYuda abeselenqophisene ngokuthi, Ukuba uthe umntu wamvuma ukuba unguKristu, aze akhutshwe esikhungwini."
John9:23 Bathi ngoko abazali bakhe, Uselemkhulu; buzani kuye."
John9:24 Ambiza ngoko okwesibini umntu obeyimfama, athi kuye, Zukisa uThixo; siyazi thina ukuba lo mntu ungumoni."
John9:25 Uphendule ngoko yena, wathi, Ukuba ungumoni, andazi; ndazi nto-nye, eyokuba ndibe ndiyimfama nje, ngoku ndiyabona."
John9:26 Abuye ke athi kuye, Wenze ntoni na kuwe? utheni na ukuwavula amehlo akho?"
John9:27 Wawaphendula wathi, Sendinixelele, naza aneva; nithandelani na ukubuya nive? Ngaba nani nifuna ukuba ngabafundi bakhe na?"
John9:28 Amtshabhisa ngoko athi, Nguwe ongumfundi wakhe; Thina singabafundi bakaMoses."
John9:29 Siyazi thina, ukuba uThixo uthethile kuMoses; lo yena asimazi apho avela khona."
John9:30 Waphendula umntu lowo, wathi kubo, Nasi apha isimanga, ukuthi nina ningazi apho avela khona; ukanti uwavulile amehlo am."
John9:31 Siyazi ke ukuba uThixo akabeva aboni; kodwa ukuba umntu uthi amhlonele uThixo, akwenze ukuthanda kwakhe, uyamva lowo."
John9:32 Kwasephakadeni akuzanga kuviwe ukuba umntu wakha wavula amehlo ozelwe eyimfama.
John9:33 Ukuba lo ebengenguye owakwaThixo, ebengenakwenza nto."
John9:34 Aphendula athi kuye, Wena wazalelwa ezonweni kanye; usifundisa ntoni na? Bamkhuphela ngaphandle."
John9:35 Weva uYesu ukuba amkhuphele phandle; Uthe akuba emfumene, wathi kuye, Uyakholwa na kuNyana kaThixo?"
John9:36 Uphendule yena wathi, Ongubani na, Nkosi, ukuze ndikholwe kuye?"
John9:37 uYesu wathi kuye, Umbonile; nguye lo uthetha nawe."
John9:38 Wathi ke yena, Ndiyakholwa, Nkosi. Waza waqubuda kuye."
John9:39 Wathi uYesu, Mna ndizele ugwebo kweli hlabathi, ukuze abangaboniyo babone; bathi ababonayo babe ziimfama."
John9:40 Baziva ezo nto abakubaFarisi ababenaye, bathi kuye, Singaba siziimfama nathi na?"
John9:41 Wathi kubo uYesu, Ukuba beniziimfama, ngeningenasono; kungoku nithi, Siyabona; ngoko ke isono senu sihleli."
John10:1 Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Ongangeniyo ngalo isango ebuhlantini bezimvu, osuka akhwele ngandawo yimbi, lowo ulisela nesihange."
John10:2 Ke yena ongena ngalo isango ngumalusi wezimvu.
John10:3 Umgcini-sango uyamvulela lowo; nezimvu ziyaliva ilizwi lakhe, azibize ezakhe ngamagama, azikhokelele phandle."
John10:4 Athi akuzikhupha ezakhe izimvu, uhamba phambi kwazo, zize izimvu zimlandele, ngokuba ziyalazi izwi lakhe."
John10:5 Ke owasemzini aziyi kumlandela; ziya kusaba kuye; ngokuba azilazi ilizwi labasemzini.
John10:6 Lo mzekeliso wawuthetha kubo uYesu; ke bona abaziqondanga ukuba zizinto zini na ezo abezithetha kubo.
John10:7 Waphinda ngoko uYesu wathi kubo, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Ndim isango lezimvu."
John10:8 Bonke abafika ngaphambi kwam bangamasela nezihange, kodwa izimvu azibeva."
John10:9 Ndim isango; ukuba umntu uthe wangena ngam, wosindiswa; uya kungena ephuma, afumane utyani."
John10:10 Isela alizi lingazele ukuze libe, lixhele, litshabalalise. Mna ndizele ukuze babe nobomi, babe nabo ke ngokugqithiseleyo."
John10:11 Ndim umalusi olungileyo; umalusi olungileyo ubuncamela izimvu ubomi bakhe.
John10:12 Ungumqeshwa, engenguye umalusi, o izimvu ezingezizo ezakhe, uthi akubona ingcuka isiza, azishiye izimvu, asabe;"
John10:13 Umqeshwa lo ke ubaleka kuba engumqeshwa engazikhathalele izimvu.
John10:14 Ndim umalusi olungileyo, ndiyazazi ezam, ndiyaziwa zezam."
John10:15 Njengoko endazi uBawo, nam ndiyamazi uBawo, nobomi bam ndibuncamela izimvu."
John10:16 Ndinazo nezinye izimvu, ezingezizo ezobu buhlanti. Kwanazo ndimelwe kukuzizisa; zaye ziya kuliva ilizwi lam; zibe mhlambi mnye, nomalusi abe mnye."
John10:17 Ngenxa yoku uBawo uyandithanda; ngokuba mna ndibuncama ubomi bam, ukuze ndibuye ndibuthabathe."
John10:18 Akukho namnye ubuhluthayo kum, ndiyabuncama ngokwam; ndinegunya lokubuncama, ndinegunya lokubuya ndibuthabathe; lo mthetho ndawamkela kuBawo."
John10:19 Abuya ngoko amaYuda athi qheke kubini ngenxa yala mazwi.
John10:20 Yayisithi ke into eninzi kuwo, Unedemon, uyageza; yini na ukuba nimphulaphule?"
John10:21 Abanye bathi, La mazwi asingowomntu unendimoni. Idemon inako na ukuwavula amehlo eemfama?"
John10:22 Ke kaloku kwabakho umthendeleko wokuhlaziywa kwetempile eYerusalem; kwaye kusebusika.
John10:23 Waye ehambahamba uYesu etempileni, evarandeni kaSolomon."
John10:24 Amngqonga ngoko amaYuda, athi kuye, Koda kube nini na usiphongomisile? Ukuba unguye uKristu wena, sixelele ngokuphandle."
John10:25 Wawaphendula uYesu wathi, Ndinixelele, noko anikholwa; imisebenzi endiyenzayo mna egameni likaBawo, yona iyangqina ngam."
John10:26 Nina anikholwa; ngokuba aningabo abezimvu zam; njengoko ndanixelelayo.
John10:27 Ezam izimvu ziyaliva ilizwi lam, ndibe nam ndizazi, zindilandela;"
John10:28 mna ndizinika ubomi obungunaphakade; azisayi kutshabalala naphakade; akukho namnye uya kuzihlutha esandleni sam.
John10:29 uBawo ondinike zona ungaphezu kwabo bonke; akukho namnye unako ukuzihlutha esandleni sikaBawo.
John10:30 Mna noBawo sibanye.
John10:31 Abuya ngoko amaYuda achola amatye ukuba amxulube.
John10:32 Wawaphendula uYesu wathi, Mininzi imisebenzi emihle endanibonisayo, ivela kuBawo; Nindixuluba ngenxa yawuphi na umsebenzi?"
John10:33 Amphendula amaYuda esithi, Asikuxulubeli msebenzi mhle; kungenxa yokunyelisa; nangokuba wena usithi, ungumntu, usuke uzenze uThixo."
John10:34 Wawaphendula uYesu wathi, Akubhaliwe na emthethweni wenu, kwathiwa, Mna ndithe ningoothixo?"
John10:35 Ukuba uthe bona bangoothixo, àbafikelwa kubo ilizwi likaThixo, sibe ke sona isibhalo singenakwaphulwa;"
John10:36 Nithi nina ngaye lowo uYise wamngcwalisayo, wamthuma ehlabathini, ukuthi, Uyanyelisa; Ngokuba ndithe, NdinguNyana kaThixo?"
John10:37 Ukuba andiyenzi imisebenzi kaBawo, musani ukukholwa ndim."
John10:38 Ke ukuba ndiyayenza, nokuba anikholwa ndim, kholwani yiyo yona imisebenzi; ukuze nazi, nikholwe, ukuba uBawo ukum, nam ndikuye."
John10:39 Abuya ngoko afuna ukumbamba; kodwa wasinda esandleni sabo.
John10:40 Wabuya wemka, waya phesheya kweYordan, kwindawo abebhaptizela kuyo uYohane kuqala; wahlala khona."
John10:41 Kweza babaninzi kuye, bathi, uYohane okunene akenzanga namnye umqondiso;"
John10:42 Bakholwa kuye, abaninzi apho."
John11:1 Ke kaloku, kwaye kusifa umntu othile, uLazaro waseBhetani, umzi wakulooMariya, noMarta udade wabo."
John11:2 Yaye ke inguloo Mariya, wayithambisayo iNkosi ngamafutha aqholiweyo, wazisulayo iinyawo zayo ngeenwele zakhe, omnakwabo uLazaro wayesifa."
John11:3 Bathumela ngoko oodade babo kuye, besithi, Nkosi, uyabona, lowo umthandayo uyafa."
John11:4 Evile ke uYesu wathi, Esi sifo asiyelele kufeni; singenxa yozuko lukaThixo, ukuze uNyana kaThixo azukiswe ngaso."
John11:5 Ke uYesu wayebathanda ooMarta nomsakwabo, noLazaro."
John11:6 Uthe ngoko akuva ukuba uyafa, wakha okunene wahlala kuloo ndawo abekuyo iintsuku ezimbini."
John11:7 Waza emveni koko wathi kubafundi bakhe, Masibuye siye kwelakwaYuda."
John11:8 Bathi abafundi bakhe kuye, Rabhi, amaYuda ebefuna ngoku ukukuxuluba ngamatye nje; Ùya kubuya uye khona na?"
John11:9 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Akalishumi elinamabini na amaxa emini? Ukuba umntu uthi ahambe emini, akakhubeki; ngokuba elubona ukhanyiselo lweli hlabathi."
John11:10 Kodwa ukuba umntu uthi ahambe ebusuku, uyakhubeka; ngokuba ukukhanya kungekho kuye."
John11:11 Wazithetha ezi zinto; aze emveni koko athi kubo, uLazaro, umhlobo wethu, ulele; ndiyaya ukuba ndimvuse ebuthongweni."
John11:12 Bathi ngoko abafundi bakhe, Nkosi, ukuba ulele, wosinda."
John11:13 Ke yena uYesu ubethetha ukufa kwakhe. Bona ke bebeba uthetha ngokulala ubuthongo.
John11:14 Wandula ngoku uYesu wathi kubo ngokungafihilisiyo, uLazaro ufile."
John11:15 Ndiyavuya ke ngenxa yenu, ukuba ndibe ndingekho khona, ukuze nikholwe, masiye kuye noko."
John11:16 Uthe ngoko uTomas, okuthiwa nguDidimo, kubafundi kunye naye, Masiye nathi, ukuze sife naye."
John11:17 Efikile ngoko uYesu, wafika eselesengcwabeni iintsuku zone."
John11:18 Ke kaloku iBhetani ibikufuphi neYerusalem, umgama wayo uzizitadiya ezingathi zilishumi elinantlanu."
John11:19 Kwafika abaninzi bakumaYuda, kwabo babenoMarta noMariya, ukuze babakhuze ngaye umnakwabo."
John11:20 Akuva ngoko uMarta ukuba uYesu uyeza, wamhlangabeza; ke yena uMariya wahlala endlwini."
John11:21 Wathi ngoko uMarta kuYesu, Nkosi, ukuba ubulapha, umnakwethu ange engafanga."
John11:22 Nangoku ndiyazi ukuba, ongathi ukucele kuThixo, oko wokunika uThixo."
John11:23 Athi kuye uYesu, Umnakwenu uya kubuya avuke."
John11:24 Athi uMarta kuye, Ndiyazi ukuba uya kubuya avuke eluvukweni, ngomhla wokugqibela."
John11:25 Wathi uYesu kuye, Ndim uvuko, ndim ubomi; lowo ukholwayo kum, nokuba ubethe wafa, wodla ubomi."
John11:26 Bonke abadla ubomi bekholwa kum, abasayi kufa naphakade; Uyakholwa na koko?"
John11:27 Athi kuye, Ewe, Nkosi, mna ndiyakholwa ukuba wena unguye uKristu, uNyana kaThixo, lowo uzayo ehlabathini."
John11:28 Akuba etshilo wemka, waya wabiza uMariya umsakwabo ngasese, wathi, uMfundisi ukho, uyakubiza."
John11:29 Evile ke yena, wasuka ngokukhawuleza waya kuye."
John11:30 Ke kaloku, uYesu ebengekangeni edolophini, kodwa wayesekuloo ndawo wayedibene kuyo noMarta."
John11:31 Athe ngoko amaYuda abenaye endlwini emkhuza, akumbona uMariya, ukuba usuke kamsinya waphuma, amlandela esithi, Uya engcwabeni, ukuya kulila khona."
John11:32 uMariya ngoko, akufika apho uYesu ebekhona, akumbona, wawa ezinyaweni zakhe, esithi kuye, Nkosi, ukuba ubulapha, ange engafanga umnakwethu."
John11:33 Uthe ngoko uYesu, akumbona elila, namaYuda abeze naye elila, wafutheka, wakhathazeka."
John11:34 Athi, Nimbeke phi na? Bathi kuye, Nkosi, yiza ubone."
John11:35 Walila uYesu.
John11:36 Ayesithi ngoko amaYuda, Yabonani ke ukumthanda kwakhe!"
John11:37 Ke abathile kuwo bathi, Ubengenako na lo, wawavulayo amehlo emfama, ukwenza ukuba nalo angafi?"
John11:38 Abuye ke uYesu afutheke ngaphakathi kwakhe, eze engcwabeni. Laye ke lingumqolomba, kubekwe ilitye phezu kwawo."
John11:39 Athi uYesu, Lisuseni ilitye. Athi kuye uMarta, udade wofileyo, Nkosi, uselenuka, kuba untsuku-ne efile."
John11:40 Athi uYesu kuye, Anditshongo na kuwe ukuthi, Ukuba uthe wakholwa, wolubona uzuko lukaThixo?"
John11:41 Balisusa ngoko ilitye apho abelele khona ofileyo. Wawaphakamisa ke amehlo uYesu, wakhangela phezulu, wathi, Bawo, ndiyabulela kuwe kuba undivile."
John11:42 Mna ke bendisazi ukuba uhleli undiva; ke nditsho ngenxa yesihlwele esixhonteleyo, ukuze bakholwe ukuba wena wandithuma."
John11:43 Akuba etshilo, wadanduluka ngezwi elikhulu, wathi, Lazaro, phuma."
John11:44 Waphuma ofileyo, ebotshiwe iinyawo nezandla ngezithandelo, nobuso bakhe bujikelwe ngeqhiya. Athi kubo uYesu, Mkhululeni, nimyeke ahambe."
John11:45 Ithe ngoko into eninzi kumaYuda, ebize kuMariya, yakuzibona izinto azenzileyo uYesu, yakholwa kuye."
John11:46 Ke abathile kuwo bemka baya kubaFarisi, babaxelela izinto azenzileyo uYesu."
John11:47 Bahlanganisa ngoko ababingeleli abakhulu nabaFarisi intlanganiso yamatyala, bathi, Senza ntoni na? ngokuba lo mntu wenza imiqondiso emininzi."
John11:48 Ukuba sithe samyeka ngokunje, bonke baya kukholwa kuye; athi ke amaRoma eze, athimbe indawo yethu, kwanohlanga lwethu."
John11:49 Ke kaloku omnye wabo, uKayafa, engumbingeleli omkhulu ngaloo mnyaka, wathi kubo, Anazi nto nina;"
John11:50 Kananjalo aniqondi ukuba kusilungele, ukuba kufe umntu abe mnye ngenxa yabantu, ukuze lungatshabalali uhlanga luphela."
John11:51 Oku ke akakuthethanga kuphuma kuye; wathi, kuba ebengumbingeleli omkhulu ngaloo nyaka, waprofeta ukuba uYesu uza kulufela uhlanga;"
John11:52 kungabi ngenxa yohlanga olo lodwa, kube ngenxa yabantwana bakaThixo abalusali, ukuba abahlanganisele ndawonye."
John11:53 Kususela kuloo mini ngoko babhunga ukuba bambulale.
John11:54 Ngoko uYesu akabanga sahamba ekuhleni phakathi kwamaYuda; Wesuka apho, waya ezweni elikufuphi nentlango, emzini ekuthiwa kukwaEfrayim, walibala khona apho nabafundi bakhe."
John11:55 Yayikufuphi ke ipasika yamaYuda; kwenyuka into eninzi iphuma kwelo zwe, yaya eYerusalem phambi kwayo ipasika, ukuze izenze nyulu."
John11:56 Ayemfuna ngoko uYesu, ethetha odwa, emi etempileni, esithi, Nithini na?"
John11:57 Ke kaloku ababingeleli abakhulu nabaFarisi babewise umthetho wokuthi, ukuba umntu uthe wazi apho akhona, maze axele, ukuze bambambe."
John12:1 uYesu ngoko, kwiintsuku ezintandathu eziphambi kwayo ipasika, weza eBhetani, apho ebekhona uLazaro owayefile, awamvusayo kwabafileyo."
John12:2 Bamenzela isidlo khona; uLazaro ke ebengomnye wabo babehleli naye etafileni.
John12:3 Wathabatha ke uMariya iponti yamafutha aqholiweyo enadusi engangxengelelweyo, exabiso likhulu; wathambisa iinyawo zikaYesu, wazisula iinyawo zakhe ngeenwele zakhe; yazala ke indlu livumba lamafutha lawo aqholiweyo."
John12:4 Uthe ngoko omnye wakubafundi bakhe, uYuda Sikariyoti, okaSimon, lowo umngcatshayo."
John12:5 Bekungani na ukuba la mafutha aqholiweyo angathengiswanga ngeedenariyo ezimakhulu mathathu, kuphiwe amahlwempu?"
John12:6 Watsho ke, kungengakuba ebekhathalele mahlwempu; kodwa ngenxa yokuba ebelisela, inaye ingxowa, ziphatha oko zifakwa kuyo."
John12:7 Wathi ngoko uYesu, Myeke; uwagcinele imini yokungcwatywa kwam."
John12:8 Kuba amahlwempu nihleli ninawo; ke mna anihleli ninam.
John12:9 Yathi ngoko indimbane enkulu yakumaYuda yakwazi ukuba ulapho; yeza kungengenxa kaYesu yedwa, yeza ukuze ibone noLazaro, lowo wamvusayo kwabafileyo."
John12:10 Kodwa ababingeleli abakhulu babhunga ukuze bambulale noLazaro;
John12:11 ngokuba ngenxa yakhe abaninzi bamaYuda bemka, bakholwa kuye uYesu."
John12:12 Ngengomso indimbane eyabe ize emthendelekweni, yakuva ukuba uYesu uyeza eYerusalem,"
John12:13 Yathabatha amasebe esundu, yaphuma yaya kumkhawulela, yadanduluka, yathi, Hosana! Makabongwe uKumkani wakwaSirayeli, uzayo egameni leNkosi."
John12:14 Uthe ke uYesu, elifumene iesile, wahlala phezu kwalo; njengoko kubhaliwe kwathiwa,"
John12:15 Musa ukoyika, ntombi inguZiyon; yabona, uKumkani wakho uza, ekhwele etholeni le-esile."
John12:16 Ezo zinto ke abaziqondanga abafundi bakhe ukuqala; bathi kodwa akuba ezukisiwe uYesu, bandula ukukhumbula ukuba ezi zinto zibhaliwe ngaye, nokuba bayazenza ezi zinto kuye."
John12:17 Ibe ingqina ngoko indimbane leyo, ibe inaye oko wambizayo uLazaro ukuba aphume engcwabeni, wamvusa kwabafileyo."
John12:18 Ngenxa yoko indimbane yamhlangabeza; ngokuba yayivile ukuba uwenzile lo mqondiso.
John12:19 Bathe ngoko abaFarisi phakathi kwabo, Niyabona na kodwa ukuba anincedi lutho? nalo ihlabathi lilandela yena."
John12:20 Ke kaloku, kwakukho amaGrike athile kwababenyukile, beze kunqula emthendelekweni."
John12:21 Wona ngoko eza kuFilipu waseBhetesayida yelaseGalili, acela kuye, esithi, Nkosi, singa singabona uYesu."
John12:22 Ufika uFilipu axelele uAndreya; bathi kanjalo ooAndreya noFilipu baxelele uYesu.
John12:23 Wabaphendula ke uYesu esithi, Lifikile ilixa lokuba uNyana woMntu azukiswe."
John12:24 Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Ukuba ukhozo lwengqolowa oluwe emhlabeni aluthanga lufe, lona lona luhlala lungabi nto; ke ukuba luthe lwafa, luthwala isiqhamo esininzi."
John12:25 Lowo uwuthandayo umphefumlo wakhe, wolahlekelwa nguwo; lowo uwuthiyayo umphefumlo wakhe kweli hlabathi, wowulondolozela ubomi obungunaphakade."
John12:26 Ukuba ubani uthi andikhonze, makandilandele; apho ndikhona mna, woba lapho nomkhonzi wam; ukuba ubani uthi andikhonze, wombeka uBawo."
John12:27 Ngoku umphefumlo wam ukhathazekile; ndithini na? Bawo, ndisindise kweli lixa; kungokunje ndizele leli lixa."
John12:28 Bawo, lizukise igama lakho. Kweza ngoko izwi liphuma ezulwini, lisithi, Ndilizukisile, ndiya kubuya ndilizukise."
John12:29 Baye ngoko abantu ababemi khona, bekuva oko, bathi kuyaduduma. Abanye bathi, Kuthethe isithunywa sezulu kuye."
John12:30 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Eli lizwi alibangakho ngenxa yam; libekho ngenxa yenu."
John12:31 Kungoku ukugwetywa kwalo eli hlabathi; kungoku umphathi walo eli hlabathi aya kukhutshelwa phandle.
John12:32 Mna ke, ukuba ndithe ndaphakanyiswa emhlabeni, ndiya kubatsalela bonke kum."
John12:33 Wakutsho ke oku, eqondisa ukuba kukufa kuni na abeza kufa ngako."
John12:34 Samphendula isihlwele sathi, Thina sivile emthethweni, ukuba uKristu yena uhlala ngonaphakade; utsho ngani na wena ukuthi, uNyana woMntu umelwe kukuthi aphakanyiswe? Ungubani na lo Nyana woMntu?"
John12:35 Uthe ngoko uYesu kubo, Liselilifutshane ixesha lokuba ukhanyiso lube nani. Hambani nisenokhanyiso, hleze ubumnyama bunifikele; kuba lowo uhamba ebumnyameni akakwazi apho aya khona."
John12:36 Xa nisenokhanyiso, kholwani kulo ukhanyiso, ukuze nibe ngabantwana bokukhanya. Ezi zinto wazithetha uYesu, wemka, wazimela."
John12:37 Ke kaloku, nakuba wayenze imiqondiso engaka phambi kwabo, abakholwanga kuye;"
John12:38 ukuze ilizwi likaIsaya umprofeti lizaliseke, awalithethayo esithi, Nkosi, ngubani na okholiweyo ludaba lwethu? Nengalo yeNkosi ityhileke kubani na?"
John12:39 Ababa nako ukukholwa ngoko, ngokuba uIsaya ubuya athi,"
John12:40 Uwamfamekisile amehlo abo, Uyiqaqadekisile intliziyo yabo; ukuze bangaboni ngamehlo, baqonde ngentliziyo, bajike, ndibaphilise."
John12:41 Ezi zinto wazithetha uIsaya, oko wabubonayo ubuqaqawuli bakhe, wathetha ngaye."
John12:42 Noko ke nakubo abaphathi into eninzi yakholwa kuye; kodwa ngenxa yabaFarisi babengamvumanga, ukuze bangagxothwa esikhungwini;"
John12:43 kuba babethanda uzuko oluvela ebantwini, ngaphezu kozuko oluvela kuThixo."
John12:44 Wadanduluka ke uYesu, wathi, Lowo ukholwayo kum, akakholwa kum, ukholwa kulowo wandithumayo."
John12:45 Lowo undibonayo ubona owandithumayo.
John12:46 Mna, lukhanyiso, ndifikile ehlabathini, ukuze bonke abakholwayo kum bangahlali ebumnyameni."
John12:47 Nokuba umntu uthe weva amazwi la am, akakholwa, mna andimgwebi; kuba andize kuligweba ihlabathi, ndize kulisindisa ihlabathi."
John12:48 Lowo undigibayo, angawamkeli amazwi am, unaye omgwebayo; ilizwi endilithethileyo, lilo eliya kumgweba ngomhla wokugqibela."
John12:49 Ngokuba mna andithethanga okuphuma kum; owandithumayo, uBawo ngokwakhe, nguye owandiwisela umthetho wokuba ndithini na, nokuba ndithethe ntoni na."
John12:50 Ndiyazi nokwazi ukuba umthetho wakhe lowo bubomi obungunaphakade. Ngoko ke izinto endizithethayo mna, njengoko uBawo andixeleleyo, ndenjenjalo ukuzithetha."
John13:1 Ke kaloku, phambi komthendeleko wepasika, esazi uYesu ukuba lifikile ilixa lokuba anduluke kweli hlabathi, aye kuYise, ebathandile abakhe abasehlabathini, wabathanda kwada kwasekupheleni."
John13:2 Kwathi, sakuba isidlo sangokuhlwa, eselifakile umtyholi entliziyweni kaYuda Sikariyoti, okaSimon, ukuba amngcatshe."
John13:3 uYesu wayesazi ukuba uYise uzinikele ezandleni zakhe zonke izinto, nokuba waphuma kuThixo, waya kuThixo:"
John13:4 usuka esidlweni, azibeke phantsi iingubo zakhe; wathabatha itawuli, wabhinqa."
John13:5 Emva koko wagalela amanzi esityeni sokuhlambela, waqala ukuzihlamba iinyawo zabafundi, nokuzisula ngetawuli abeyibhinqile."
John13:6 Uza ke kuSimon Petros; athi kuye uPetros, Nkosi, zihlanjwe nguwe na iinyawo zam?"
John13:7 Waphendula uYesu, wathi kuye, Endikwenzayo mna akukwazi wena okwangoku; wokwazi kamva."
John13:8 Athi uPetros kuye, Akusayi kuzihlamba iinyawo zam, naphakade. Umphendule uYesu, wathi, Ukuba andithanga ndikuhlambe, akunasabelo nam."
John13:9 Athi uSimon Petros kuye, Nkosi, mazingabi ziinyawo zam zodwa, mazibe zizandla nentloko."
John13:10 Uthi uYesu kuye, Kulowo uhlanjiweyo akusafuneki nto, selikukuhlanjwa kweenyawo zodwa; uhlambulukile kwaphela; nani ke nihlambulukile, kodwa aninjalo nonke."
John13:11 Kuba ebemazi lowo umngcatshayo; Wathi ngenxa yoko, Anihlambulukile nonke."
John13:12 Ngoko, xeshikweni ebezihlambile iinyawo zabo, wazithabatha iingubo zakhe, wabuya wahlala phantsi, wathi kubo, Niyayazi na into endiyenzileyo kuni?"
John13:13 Nina ukundibiza nithi ndinguMfundisi, nithi ndiyiNkosi; kuba ndinjalo."
John13:14 Ngoko ke, ukuba ndizihlambile iinyawo zenu mna, ndiyiNkosi noMfundisi; nani nifanele ukuhlambana iinyawo."
John13:15 Kuba ndininike umzekelo, ukuze nani nenze, njengoko ndenze ngako mna kuni."
John13:16 Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Akukho mkhonzi umkhulu kunenkosi yakhe; nalowo uthunyiweyo mkhulu kunalowo umthumileyo."
John13:17 Ukuba niyazazi ezi zinto, ninoyolo ukuba nithi nizenze."
John13:18 Andithethi ngani, nonke; ndiyabazi abo mna ndibanyulileyo; oko kwenzeke ukuze isibhalo sizaliseke, esithi, Lowo udla isonka nam, undiphakamisele isithende sakhe."
John13:19 Ndiqala kwangoku ukunixelela kungekehli, ukuze, xa kuthe kwehla, nikholwe ukuba ndinguye."
John13:20 Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Lowo wamkela endithe ndamthuma, wamkela mna; nalowo wamkela mna, wamkela owandithumayo."
John13:21 Akuba ezithethile uYesu ezi zinto, wakhathazeka emoyeni wakhe, wangqina wathi, Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, omnye kuni aba uya kundingcatsha."
John13:22 Baye ngoko abafundi bekhangelana, bethingaza ukuba uthetha bani na."
John13:23 Ke kaloku, bekwayame esifubeni sikaYesu omnye umfundi wakhe, obethandwa nguYesu."
John13:24 Unqwala ngoko uSimon Petros kulowo, ukuba abuze ukuba angaba uthetha bani na."
John13:25 Eyame esifubeni sikaYesu, uthi kuye, Nkosi, ngubani na?"
John13:26 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Ngulowo ndiya kumnika iqhekeza lesonka, xa ndithe ndalithi nkxu. Elithi nkxu iqhekeza, walinika uYuda Sikariyoti, okaSimon."
John13:27 Waza emveni kweqhekeza elo, wangena uSathana kuye lowo. Wathi ngoko uYesu kuye, Okwenzayo, kwenze kamsinya."
John13:28 Ke kaloku, bekungekho namnye, kwababehleli naye esithebeni, ubesazi ukuba utsho ngani na kuye."
John13:29 Kuba abathile, ekubeni ingxowa ibikuYuda, bebeba uYesu uthi kuye, Thenga ezo zinto sizifunela umthendeleko; nokuba makabanike into amahlwempu."
John13:30 Elithabathile ngoko yena iqhekeza, waphuma kwaoko;"
John13:31 Xeshikweni ngoko aphumileyo, uthi uYesu, Kukalokunje, uNyana woMntu uzukisiwe, naye uThixo uzukisiwe kuye."
John13:32 Ukuba ke uThixo uzukisiwe kuye, noThixo uya kumzukisa kuye ngokwakhe, waye eya kumzukisa kwangoku."
John13:33 Bantwana bam, liselilifutshane ixesha lokuba ndibe nani. Niya kundifuna; njengoko sendithe kumaYuda, Apho ndiya khona mna, aninako ukufika nina; ngoko ke ndithi kuni."
John13:34 Ndiniwisela umthetho omtsha, wokuba nithandane; Njengoko ndinithandileyo mna, ukuba nani nithandane."
John13:35 Ngayo le nto baya kwazi bonke, ukuba ningabafundi bam, ukuba nithe nathandana."
John13:36 Wathi uSimon Petros kuye, Nkosi, uya ngaphi na? Umphendule uYesu, wathi, Apho ndiya khona, aninako ukundilandela ngoku; wondilandela emveni koko."
John13:37 Wathi uPetros kuye, Nkosi, kungani na ukuba ndingabi nako ukukulandela ngoku? Ndiya kuwuncamela wena umphefumlo wam."
John13:38 Wamphendula uYesu wathi, Wowuncamela mna na umphefumlo wakho? Inene, inene, ndithi kuwe, Ayisayi kulila inkuku, ungathanga undikhanyele kathathu."
John14:1 Intliziyo yenu mayingakhathazeki; kholwani kuThixo, nikholwe nakum."
John14:2 Endlwini kaBawo zininzi iindawo zokuhlala; ukuba bekungenjalo, ngendanixelelayo. Ndiyemka, ndiya kunilungisela indawo;"
John14:3 Ukuba ke ndimkile ndaya kunilungisela indawo, ndiya kubuya ndize, ndinamkelele kum; ukuze apho ndikhona mna, nibe khona nani."
John14:4 Apho ke ndiya khona mna niyakwazi, nendlela niyayazi."
John14:5 Athi uTomas kuye, Nkosi, asazi apho uya khona; singathini na ke ukuyazi indlela?"
John14:6 Uthi uYesu kuye, Ndim indlela, ndim inyaniso, ndim ubomi; akukho namnye uzayo kuBawo, engezi ngam."
John14:7 Ukuba benindazile mna, ninge nimazile noBawo; ngoku ke niyamazi, nimbonile nokumbona."
John14:8 Athi uFilipu kuye, Nkosi, sibonise uYihlo, kosanelisa."
John14:9 Athi uYesu kuye, Ndinaxesha lingakanana ndinani nje, akukandazi na, Filipu? Lowo undibonileyo mna umbonile uBawo; utsho ngani na ke wena ukuthi, Sibonise uYihlo?"
John14:10 Akukholwa na ukuba mna ndikuye uBawo, abe ke uBawo ekum? Amazwi endiwathethayo mna kuni, andiwathethi ngokuphuma kum; uBawo ke ohleli kum, nguye oyenzayo imisebenzi le."
John14:11 Kholwani ndim, ukuba mna ndikuye uBawo, nokuba uBawo ukum; okanye nikholwe ndim ngenxa yayo imisebenzi leyo."
John14:12 Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Lowo ukholwayo kum, imisebenzi endiyenzayo mna, uya kuyenza naye yena; nemikhulu kunale uya kuyenza; ngokuba mna ndisiya kuBawo."
John14:13 Nento enithe nayicela egameni lam, ndoyenza yona, ukuze uYise azukiswe ngoNyana."
John14:14 Ukuba nithe nacela into ngegama lam, ndoyenza mna."
John14:15 Ukuba niyandithanda, yigcineni imithetho yam."
John14:16 Mna ndiya kucela kuBawo, aze aninike omnye uMthetheleli, ukuze ahlale nani ngonaphakade."
John14:17 uMoya wenyaniso; lowo ihlabathi lingenako ukumamkela, ngokuba lingamboni, lingamazi nokumazi, ngokuba uhleli nani, kanjalo uya kuba kuni."
John14:18 Andiyi kunishiya niziinkedama; ndiyeza kuni.
John14:19 Liselilifutshane ixesha, ukuze ihlabathi lingabi sandibona; ke nina niyandibona; ngokuba ndisidla ubomi mna, nani niya kudla ubomi."
John14:20 Ngaloo mini niya kwazi nina ukuba ndikuye uBawo, nani nikum, nam ndikuni."
John14:21 Lowo unayo imithetho yam ayigcine, nguye ondithandayo; lowo ke undithandayo, uya kuthandwa nguBawo; nam ndiya kumthanda, ndizibonakalalise kuye."
John14:22 Athi kuye uYuda (ingenguye uSikariyoti), Nkosi, kutheni na, le nto uza kuzibonakalalisa kuthi, ungazibonakalalisi kulo ihlabathi?"
John14:23 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye, Ukuba umntu uyandithanda, woligcina ilizwi lam; wothi uBawo amthande, size kuye, sihlale naye."
John14:24 Lowo ungandithandiyo akawagcini amazwi am; ilizwi enilivayo asililo elam, lelikaBawo owandithumayo."
John14:25 Ezi zinto ndizithethile kuni ndisahleli nani.
John14:26 Ke uMthetheleli, uMoya oyiNgcwele, aya kumthuma uBawo egameni lam, yena uya kunifundisa zonke izinto, anikhumbuze zonke izinto endizithethileyo kuni."
John14:27 Ndishiya uxolo kuni; ndininika uxolo lwam; andininiki njengokunika kwehlabathi. Mayingakhathazeki intliziyo yenu, mayingabi nabugwala."
John14:28 Nivile ukuba ndithe mna kuni, Ndiyemka, ndibuye ndize kuni. Ukuba benindithanda, ngenavuyayo kuba ndathi, Ndiya kuBawo; ngokuba uBawo mkhulu kunam."
John14:29 Ngoku ke ndinixelele kungekehli, ukuze, xa kuthe kwehla, nikholwe."
John14:30 Andisayi kuba sathetha zinto zininzi nani; kuba esiza umphathi weli hlabathi, engenanto nam."
John14:31 Ke, ukuze liqonde ihlabathi ukuba ndiyamthanda uBawo; kwaye njengoko uBawo endiwisele umthetho, ndenjenjalo. Vukani, simke apha."
John15:1 Mna ndingumdiliya wenyaniso, umlimi wawo ke nguBawo."
John15:2 Amasebe onke akum angavelisi siqhamo, uyawasusa;"
John15:3 Nina nihlambulukile, ngenxa yelizwi endilithethileyo kuni."
John15:4 Hlalani kum, mna ndihlale kuni. Njengokuba isebe lingenako ukuthwala isiqhamo ngokwalo, lingahlalanga emdiliyeni; aninako ukuphinda nina, ukuba anihlalanga kum."
John15:5 Umdiliya ndim, nina ningamasebe; lowo uhleli kum, ndibe mna ndihleli kuye, yena uthwala isiqhamo esininzi; ngokuba, ningekum, aninakwenza nto."
John15:6 Ukuba umntu uthe akahlala kum, ulahlelwa phandle njengesebe, ome; bazibuthe abantu, baziphose emlilweni, zitshiswe."
John15:7 Ukuba nithe nahlala kum, namazwi am ahlala kuni, nocela into enisukuba niyithanda, niyenzelwe."
John15:8 Uzukiswa uBawo ngale nto, yokuba nithwale isiqhamo esininzi; niya kuba ngabafundi bam ngokunjalo."
John15:9 Njengoko uBawo wandithandayo, nam ndanithanda; hlalani ke eluthandweni lwam."
John15:10 Ukuba nithi niyigcine imithetho yam, hlalani eluthandweni lwam; njengokuba mna ndayigcinayo imithetho kaBawo, ndahlala eluthandweni lwakhe."
John15:11 Ezi zinto ndizithethile kuni, ukuze uvuyo lwam luhlale kuni, luthi novuyo lwenu luzaliseke."
John15:12 Nguwo lo umthetho wam, wokuba nithandane, njengoko ndanithandayo nina."
John15:13 Akukho namnye unalo uthando olungaphezu kolu, lokuba ubomi bakhe abuncamele izihlobo zakhe."
John15:14 Nizizihlobo zam nina, ukuba nithi nikwenze konke endinimisela khona mna."
John15:15 Ngoku ke andinibize ngokuba ningabakhonzi; ngokuba umkhonzi akakwazi okwenziwa yinkosi yakhe; ke mna ndithe nizizihlobo; ngokuba zonke izinto endaziva kuBawo, ndanazisa zona."
John15:16 Aninyula mna; ndim owanyula nina, ndanimisela ukuba nihambe nithwale isiqhamo, size nesiqhamo senu sihlale; ukuze oko enithe nakucela kuBawo egameni lam, aninike."
John15:17 Ndiniwisela lo mthetho wokuba nithandane.
John15:18 Ukuba ihlabathi linithiyile, yazini ukuba lindithiye kuqala kunani."
John15:19 Ukuba beningabehlabathi, ihlabathi linge likuthanda okwalo; ke ngokuba ningengabehlabathi, ndaninyulayo mna kulo ihlabathi, ngenxa yoko linithiyile ihlabathi."
John15:20 Likhumbuleni ilizwi endalithethayo mna kuni, elithi, Akukho mkhonzi umkhulu kunenkosi yakhe. Ukuba banditshutshisile mna, bonitshutshisa nani; Ukuba ilizwi lam baligcina, nelenu boligcina."
John15:21 Ezo zinto ke baya kuzenza kuni ngenxa yegama lam, ngokuba bengamazi owandithumayo."
John15:22 Ukuba bendingezanga ndathetha kubo, ngebengabanga nasono; ngoku abanasikhuselo sesono sabo."
John15:23 Lowo uthiyileyo mna uthiye noBawo.
John15:24 Ukuba bendingenzanga phakathi kwabo imisebenzi engenziwanga mntu wumbi, ngebengabanga nasono; ngoku ke babonile; noko bandithiyile mna noBawo."
John15:25 Kwenzeke ukuze lizaliseke ilizwi elibhaliweyo emthethweni wabo, elithi, Bandithiya kungekho sizathu."
John15:26 Kodwa akufika uMthetheleli, endiya kumthuma mna kuni evela kuBawo, uMoya wenyaniso ophuma kuBawo, wongqina ngam."
John15:27 Nani ke niyangqina, ngokuba beninam kwasekuqalekeni."
John16:1 Ezi zinto ndizithethile kuni, ukuze ningakhutyekiswa."
John16:2 Baya kunigxotha esikhungwini; ewe, kuza ilixa lokuba bonke abanibulalayo, babe bona bakhonza uThixo."
