John16:3 Ezo zinto baya kuzenza kuni, ngokuba bengamazanga uBawo kwanam."
John16:4 Ezi zinto ndizithethile kuni, ukuze, xa lithe lafika ilixa, nizikhumbule ukuba mna ndandinixelele. Ezi zinto ke andizithethanga kuni kwasekuqaleni, ngokuba bendinani."
John16:5 Ngoku ke ndiyemka, ndiya kowandithumayo; akukho namnye kuni undibuzayo, athi, Uya phi na?"
John16:6 Ngokuba ke ezi zinto ndizithethile kuni, iintlungu ziyizalisile intliziyo yenu."
John16:7 Kodwa mna ndinixelela inyaniso; kunilungele ukuba ndimke; kuba, ndingemkanga, uMthetheleli akayi kuza kuni; ke, ndithe ndemka, ndiya kumthumela kuni."
John16:8 Efikile ke, uya kulohlwaya ihlabathi lidane, ngenxa yesono, nangenxa yobulungisa, nangenxa yomgwebo;"
John16:9 ngenxa yesono, ngokokuba bengakholwa kum;"
John16:10 ngenxa yobulungisa, ngokokuba ndisiya kuBawo, ize ningabi sandibona;"
John16:11 ngenxa yomgwebo, ngokokuba umphathi weli hlabathi egwetyiwe."
John16:12 Ndisenezinto ezininzi zokuthetha kuni, kodwa aninako ukuzithwala ngoku."
John16:13 Xa ke athe wafika yena uMoya wenyaniso, uya kunikhokelela kuyo yonke inyaniso; uya kuthetha athe wakuva, anibikele izinto ezizayo."
John16:14 Yena uya kundizukisa; ngokuba eya kwamkela kokukokwam, aze anibikele ke."
John16:15 Zonke ezo anazo uBawo zezam; ngenxa yoko ndathi, uya kwamkela kokukokwam, aze anibikele ke."
John16:16 Selilixesha elifutshane, ize ningandiboni; kubuye kube lixesha elifutshane, nibuye nindibone, ngokuba mna ndiya kuBawo."
John16:17 Ithe ngoko inxenye yakubafundi bakhe phakathi kwayo, Yintoni na le ayithethayo kuthi, athi, Liselilixesha elifutshane, nibuye ningandiboni; kubuye kube lixesha elifutshane, nibuye nindibone; nokuthi, Mna ndiya kuBawo."
John16:18 Babesithi ngoko, Yintoni na le ayithethayo, athi, Lixesha elifutshane? Asinakuyazi into ayithethayo."
John16:19 Wazi ngoko uYesu ukuba babethanda ukumbuza, wathi kubo, Nibuzana ngale nto na, yokuba ndithe, Selilixesha elifutshane, nibuye ningandiboni; kubuye kube lixesha elifutshane, nibuye nindibone?"
John16:20 Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, niya kulila nihlahlambe, ke lona ihlabathi liya kuvuya; niya kuxhalaba nina, ke ukuxhalaba kwenu kuya kuba luvuyo."
John16:21 Umfazi xa aza kuzala, uyaxhalaba, ngokuba ilixa lakhe lifikile; xa athe ke wazala umntwana, akabi sayikhumbula loo mbandezelo, ngenxa yovuyo lokuba kuzelwe umntu ehlabathini."
John16:22 Nani ke ngoko nixhalabile ngokunje; kodwa ndobuya ndinibone; yaye iya kuvuya intliziyo yenu, novuyo lwenu akukho namnye uya kuluhlutha kuni."
John16:23 Ngaloo mini aniyi kundibuza nto. Inene, inene, ndithi kuni, Zonke izinto enithe nazicela kuBawo egameni lam, woninika."
John16:24 Okwangoku anikaceli nto egameni lam; celani, niya kwamkela, ukuze uvuyo lwenu luzaliseke."
John16:25 Ezi zinto ndizithethile kuni ngokuntsonkotha; kuza ilixa endingasayi kuba sathetha kuni ngezafobe; ndiya kunibikela ngokusekuhleni ngaye uBawo.
John16:26 Ngaloo mini niya kucela egameni lam; anditsho kuni ukuthi, mna ndiya kunicelela kuBawo;"
John16:27 Kuba uBawo ngokwakhe uyanithanda; ngokuba nina nindithandile, nakholwa ukuba mna ndaphuma kuThixo."
John16:28 Ndaphuma kuBawo, ndeza ehlabathini; ndibuya ndilishiye ihlabathi, ndiye kuBawo."
John16:29 Bathi kuye abafundi bakhe, Uyabona, ngoku uthetha ngokusekuhleni, akuthethi nto ngakuntsonkotha."
John16:30 Ngoku siyazi, ukuba uyazazi zonke izinto, akusafuneki kuwe ukuba ubani akubuze nto; ngaloo nto siyakholwa ukuba waphuma kuThixo."
John16:31 Wawaphendula uYesu wathi, Niyakholwa na ngoku?"
John16:32 Niyabona, kuza ilixa, nakaloku lifikile, lokuba nichithwe, elowo aye kowabo, nindishiye ndedwa; ukanti andindedwa, ngokuba uBawo unam."
John16:33 Ezi zinto ndizithethile kuni, ukuze nibe noxolo kum. Ehlabathini niya kuba nembandezelo; kodwa yomelelani; mna ndiloyisile ihlabathi."
John17:1 Ezi zinto wazithetha uYesu, wawaphakamisa amehlo akhe wakhangela ezulwini, wathi, Bawo, lifikile ilixa; mzukise uNyana wakho, ukuze noNyana wakho akuzukise;"
John17:2 njengokuba wamnika igunya kubantu bonke, ukuze bonke omnike bona, abanike ubomi obungunaphakade."
John17:3 Bubo ke obu ubomi obungunaphakade, ukuba mabakwazi, wena ukuphela koThixo oyinyaniso, naye uYesu Kristu omthumileyo."
John17:4 Mna ndikuzukisile emhlabeni, ndiwufezile umsebenzi obundinikile ukuba ndiwenze."
John17:5 Ndizukise ke ngoku, wena Bawo, kuwe ngokwakho, ngozuko ebendinalo kuwe, lingekabikho ihlabathi."
John17:6 Ndilibonakalisile igama lakho kubo abantu obundinike bona, bephuma ehlabathini; babengabakho, wabanika mna; Ilizwi lakho baligcinile."
John17:7 Ngoku baqondile, ukuba zonke izinto ondinike zona ziphuma kuwe."
John17:8 Ngokuba amazwi ondinike wona, ndiwanike bona; bona bawathabatha, baqonda ngokwenyaniso ukuba ndaphuma kuwe; bakholwa ukuba wena wandithuma."
John17:9 Ndithandazela bona; andiceleli lona ihlabathi, ndicelela abo undinike bona; ngokuba bengabakho."
John17:10 Ke zonke ezam zezakho, zibe ezakho zezam; Ndizukisiwe ke kubo."
John17:11 Andisekhona ehlabathini, ke bona basesehlabathini; mna ndiza kuwe. Bawo Ongcwele, bagcine ngegama lakho abo undinike bona, ukuze babe banye, njengokuba sibanye."
John17:12 Oko bendinabo ehlabathini mna, bendibalondolozele egameni lakho; owandinika bona ndibagcinile; akukho namnye kubo utshabaleleyo, ingenguye lowo wentshabalalo, ukuze isibhalo sizaliseke."
John17:13 Ngoku ke ndiza kuwe; nezi zinto ndizithetha ehlabathini, ukuze babe nalo uvuyo lwam luzalisekile kubo."
John17:14 Mna ndibanike ilizwi lakho; laza ihlabathi labathiya, ngokuba bengengabo abehlabathi, njengokuba nam ndingenguye owehlabathi."
John17:15 Andiceli ukuba ubasuse ehlabathini; ndicela ukuba ubagcine kuyo inkohlakalo.
John17:16 Abangabo abehlabathi, njengokuba nam ndingenguye owehlabathi."
John17:17 Bangcwalise ngayo inyaniso yakho; ilizwi lakho liyinyaniso.
John17:18 Njengokuba wandithuma ehlabathini, nam ndibathume bona ehlabathini."
John17:19 Ngenxa yabo ke ndiyazingcwalisa mna, ukuze nabo babe ngabangcwalisiweyo yinyaniso."
John17:20 Andiceleli ke aba bodwa, ndicelela nabo baya kukholwa kum ngelizwi labo;"
John17:21 ukuze bonke babe banye; njengokuba wena, Bawo, ukum, mna ndikuwe, ukuze nabo babe banye kuthi; ukuze ihlabathi likholwe ukuba wena wandithuma."
John17:22 Uzuko owandinika lona, ndilunike bona; ukuze babe banye, njengokuba thina sibanye;"
John17:23 mna ndikubo, wena ukum, ukuze babe ngabazalisekileyo ntweni-nye; ukuze liqonde ihlabathi ukuba wena undithumile, wabathanda, njengokuba wandithandayo nam."
John17:24 Bawo, ndithanda ukuba nabo abo undinike bona, babe nam, apho ndikhona mna; ukuze balubone uzuko lwam owandinika lona; ngokuba wandithanda kwaphambi kokusekwa kwehlabathi."
John17:25 Bawo olilungisa, ihlabathi lona alikwazanga, ke mna ndikwazile; naba bathe bazi ukuba wena wandithuma;"
John17:26 ndabazisa negama lakho, ndandiya kubazisa; ukuze uthando ondithande ngalo lube kubo, nam ndibe kubo."
John18:1 Akuba ezithethile uYesu ezi zinto, waphuma nabafundi bakhe, waya phesheya komlanjana oyiKidron, apho kwakukho umyezo, awangena kuwo yena nabafundi bakhe."
John18:2 NoYuda ke, lowo umngcatshayo, ubeyazi indawo leyo, kuba uYesu ubesakubutha futhi khona apho nabafundi bakhe."
John18:3 Athi ngoko uYuda, ethabathe ibutho lamasoldati namadindala kubabingeleli abakhulu nabaFarisi, eze khona enezikhanyiso nezibane neentonga."
John18:4 Ezazi ngoko uYesu zonke izinto ezimzelayo, waphuma, wathi kubo, Nifuna bani na?"
John18:5 Bamphendula bathi, uYesu waseNazarete. Athi kubo uYesu, Ndinguye. Waye ke noYuda, lowo umngcatshayo, emi nabo."
John18:6 Akutsho ngoko kubo ukuthi, Ndinguye, bahlehla, bawa emhlabeni."
John18:7 Wabuya ke wababuza esithi, Nifuna bani na? Bathi ke bona, uYesu umNazarete."
John18:8 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Ndinixelele ukuba ndinguye; ukuba ngoko nifuna mna, bayekeni aba bemke;"
John18:9 ukuze lizaliseke ilizwi awalithethayo elithi, Kwabo undinike bona, andilahlekwanga namnye."
John18:10 Uthe ngoko uSimon Petros, enekrele, walirhola, wamxabela umkhonzi wombingeleli omkhulu, wamnqamla indlebe yokunene. Igama lesicaka lalinguMalko."
John18:11 Wathi ngoko uYesu kuPetros, Lifake ikrele lakho esingxotyeni salo; indebe andinikileyo uBawo andisayi kuyisela na?"
John18:12 Laza elo qela lamajoni nomthetheli-waka namadindala amaYuda bambamba uYesu, bambopha."
John18:13 Wamsa kuAnas kuqala; kuba wayenguyise womkakhe kuKayafa, obengumbingeleli omkhulu ngaloo mnyaka."
John18:14 Ke kaloku uKayafa wayengulowo wabhunga namaYuda ngokuthi, Kuyinto elungileyo, ukuba umntu omnye afele abantu."
John18:15 Ke kaloku uSimon Petros wayemlandela uYesu, naye omnye umfundi. Loo mfundi ke wayesazeka kumbingeleli omkhulu, wangena noYesu entendelezweni yendlu yombingeleli omkhulu."
John18:16 uPetros ke wayemi ngasemnyango ngaphandle. Waphuma ke omnye umfundi, lowo ubesazeka kumbingeleli omkhulu, wathetha nomgcini-sango, wamngenisa uPetros."
John18:17 Sathi ngoko isicakazana esingumgcini-sango kuPetros, Ingaba nawe ungowabafundi balo mntu yini na? Athi, Andinguye."
John18:18 Ke kaloku kwakumi khona abakhonzi namadindala bebase umlilo wamalahle; bamana besotha, waye ke uPetros emi nabo esotha."
John18:19 Umbingeleli omkhulu ngoko wambuza uYesu ngabafundi bakhe, nangayo imfundiso yakhe."
John18:20 Wamphendula uYesu wathi, Mna ndathetha ngokungafihlisiyo kulo ihlabathi; Bendisoloko ndifundisa endlwini yesikhungu nasetempileni, apho amaYuda ebesakubuthelana khona; andithethanga nto emfihlekweni."
John18:21 Yini na ukuba ubuze kum? Buza kwabo bayivileyo into endayithethayo kubo; uyabona, bayakwazi oko ndakuthethayo."
John18:22 Ke kaloku, akuba etshilo, elinye lamadindala, elalimi khona, lammonxoza uYesu, lathi, Wenjenje na ukumphendula umbingeleli omkhulu?"
John18:23 Wamphendula uYesu wathi, Ukuba ndithethe kakubi, ngqinela ububi obo; kodwa ukuba ndithethe kakuhle, undibethelani na?"
John18:24 uAnas wamthumela ke ebotshiwe kuKayafa umbingeleli omkhulu.
John18:25 Ke kaloku uSimon Petros wayemi esotha. Bathi ngoko kuye, Ingaba nawe ungowabafundi bakhe yini na? Wakhanyela ke wathi, Andinguye."
John18:26 Athi omnye umkhonzi wombingeleli omkhulu, osisalamane soPetros wamnqamla indlebe, Andikubonanga mna yini na emyezweni unaye?"
John18:27 Wabuya ke wakhanyela uPetros. Yasuka yalila kwaoko inkuku.
John18:28 Bamsusa ngoko uYesu kuKayafa, bamsa kwindlu yerhuluneli; bekukusasa ke oko; yaye bona abazange bangene endlwini yerhuluneli, ukuze bangazenzi inqambi; ukuze bayidle ipasika."
John18:29 Waphuma ke uPilato waya kubo, wathi, Nimisa tyala lini na kuye lo mntu?"
John18:30 Baphendula bathi kuye, Ukuba ebengenguye umenzi wobubi, singe singamnikelanga kuwe."
John18:31 Wathi ngoko uPilato kubo, Mthabatheni nina, nimgwebe ngesiko lenu. Athi ngoko amaYuda kuye, Akuvumelekile kuthi ukuba sibulale umntu;"
John18:32 ukuze ilizwi likaYesu lizaliseke awalithethayo, eqondisa ukuba kukufa kuni na abeza kufa ngako."
John18:33 Wabuya ngoko wangena uPilato endlwini yerhuluneli, wambiza uYesu, wathi kuye, Wena unguye na uKumkani wamaYuda?"
John18:34 Wamphendula uYesu wathi, Uyithetha le nto iphuma kuwe, wayixelelwa ngabanye ngam, sini na?"
John18:35 Waphendula uPilato wathi, Mna ndingumYuda na? Luhlanga lwakowenu nababingeleli abakhulu abakunikeleyo kum; wenze ntoni na?"
John18:36 Waphendula uYesu wathi, Ubukumkani bam asibubo obeli hlabathi; ukuba bebububo obeli hlabathi ubukumkani bam, abakhonzi bam bebeya kulwa, ukuze ndinganikelwa kumaYuda; ngoku ke ubukumkani bam asibobalapha."
John18:37 Wathi ngoko uPilato kuye, Hina ke, ungukumkani na wena? Waphendula uYesu wathi, Nawe uthi ndingukumkani. Mna ndizalelwe oku; ndizele oku ehlabathini, ukuze ndiyingqinele inyaniso. Bonke abangabenyaniso bayaliva ilizwi lam."
John18:38 Athi uPilato kuye, Yintoni na yona inyaniso? Akuba etshilo, wabuya waphuma waya kumaYuda, athi kuwo, Mna andifumani nalinye ityala kuye."
John18:39 Ke kaloku ninesiko lokuba ndinikhululele abe mnye ngepasika; ninga ke ndinganikhululela ukumkani wamaYuda na?
John18:40 Babuya ngoko bonke bankqangaza, besithi, Mayingabi ngulo, mayibe nguBharabhas. Waye ke uBharabhas esisihange."
John19:1 Waza ngoko uPilato wamthabatha uYesu, wamtyakatya."
John19:2 Aza amasoldati aluka isithsaba sameva, ambeka entloko, amnxiba ingubo ebomvu,"
John19:3 besithi, Vuya, Kumkani wamaYuda! bambetha ke ngezandla."
John19:4 Wabuya ngoko waphuma phandle uPilato; athi kubo, Yabonani, ndimzisa phandle kuni, ukuze nazi ukuba andifumani nalinye ityala kuye."
John19:5 Waphuma phandle ngoko uYesu, enxibe isithsaba sameva nengubo ebomvu; Athi kubo uPilato, Nanko umntu."
John19:6 Bathe ngoko, bakumbona ababingeleli abakhulu namadindala, bankqangaza, besithi, Mbethelele emnqamlezweni! Athi kubo uPilato, Mthabatheni nina, nimbethelele emnqamlezweni; kuba mna andifumani tyala kuye."
John19:7 Amphendula amaYuda athi, Thina sinomthetho; ngomthetho wethu ke ufanele ukufa, ngokuba ezenze uNyana kaThixo."
John19:8 Uthe ngoko uPilato, akuliva elo lizwi, woyika ngakumbi."
John19:9 Wabuya wangena endlwini yerhuluneli, wathi kuYesu, Ungowaphi na wena? Akaphendula ke uYesu kuye."
John19:10 Athi ngoko uPilato kuye, Akuthethi na kum? Akwazi na ukuba ndinegunya lokukubethelela emnqamlezweni, nokuba ndinegunya lokukukhulula?"
John19:11 Uphendule uYesu wathi, Unge ungenagunya nakanye kum, ukuba ubungalinikwanga livela phezulu; ngenxa yoko ondinikeleyo kuwe unesono esikhulu ngakumbi."
John19:12 Ngenxa yoko wayefuna uPilato ukumkhulula; kodwa amaYuda ayenkqangaza esithi, Ukuba uthe wamkhulula lo, akusihlobo sikaKesare; bonke abazenza ukumkani bachasa uKesare."
John19:13 Elivile ngoko uPilato eli lizwi, wamzisa phandle uYesu, wahlala esihlalweni sokugweba kwindawo ekuthiwa, siSandlalo saMatye;"
John19:14 Ke kaloku kwakuyimini yokulungiselela ipasika, ilixa ke ngathi lilelesithandathu; athi kumaYuda, Nanko uKumkani wenu!"
John19:15 Basuka ke bona bankqangaza, besithi, Msuse, mbethelele emnqamlezweni! Athi kubo uPilato, Ndimbethelele emnqamlezweni na uKumkani wenu? Baphendula ababingeleli abakhulu bathi, Asinakumkani ngaphandle kukaKesare."
John19:16 Wandula ngoko ukumnikela kubo, ukuze abethelelwe emnqamlezweni. Bamthabatha ke uYesu, bemka naye."
John19:17 Waphuma ethwele umnqamlezo wakhe waya kwindawo ekuthiwa yiNdawo yoKhakhayi, leyo kuthiwa ngesiHebhere yiGolgota,"
John19:18 apho bambethelela khona emnqamlezweni, nabanye naye abangabambi bebabini, ngeenxa zombini, uYesu ke ephakathi."
John19:19 uPilato wabhala nombhalo, wawubeka emnqamlezweni. Kwaye ke kubhaliwe kwathiwa, UYESU waseNazarete, uKumkani wamaYuda."
John19:20 Lo mbhalo ngoko into eninzi yamaYuda yawulesa; ngokuba indawo, uYesu awayebethelelwe kuyo emnqamlezweni, yayikufuphi nomzi; kwaye ke kubhalwe ngesiHebhere, nangesiGrike, nangesiRoma."
John19:21 Bathi ngoko ababingeleli abakhulu bamaYuda kuPilato, Musa ukubhala ukuthi, uKumkani wamaYuda; wathi, NdinguKumkani wamaYuda."
John19:22 Waphendula uPilato wathi, Endikubhalileyo ndikubhalile."
John19:23 Athe ngoko amasoldati, xa abembethelele emnqamlezweni uYesu, azithabatha iingubo zakhe, enza izabelo ezine, laelo isoldati lanesabelo; kwanengubo yangaphantsi. Ke yona ingubo yangaphantsi ibingenamthungo; yayilukiwe iphela, ithabathele phezulu."
John19:24 Atshono ngoko ukuthi, Masingayikrazuli, masiyenze amaqashiso, ukuba yoba yekabani na; ukuze sizaliseke isibhalo esithi, Babelana ngeengubo zam, benza amaqashiso ngesambatho sam. Amasoldati ke ngoko azenza ezi zinto."
John19:25 Ke kaloku kwakumi ngasemnqamlezweni kaYesu unina, nomsakwabo bonina, uMariya umkaKleyopa, noMariya waseMagadala."
John19:26 uYesu ngoko, akumbona unina, naye umfundi abemthanda emi khona, uthi kuye unina, Mfazi, nanko unyana wakho!"
John19:27 Aze athi kumfundi lowo, Nanko unyoko! Wathi kwakwelo lixa loo mfundi wamthabatha, wamsa ekhayeni lakhe."
John19:28 Emveni koko, uYesu, esazi ukuba zonke izinto sezifezekile, ukuze sifezeke isibhalo, wathi, Ndinxaniwe."
John19:29 Kwakukho isitya sizele yiviniga; bazalisa imfunxa ngeviniga, bayibeka phezu kwehisope, bayisa emlonyeni wakhe."
John19:30 Xa ngoko uYesu wabeyamkele iviniga, wathi, Kugqityiwe! Wathoba intloko, wawunikela umoya wakhe."
John19:31 Athe ngoko amaYuda, ekubeni yayiyimini yokulungiselela, ukuba imizimba ingahlali emnqamlezweni ngesabatha (kuba loo sabatha ibingumhla omkhulu), acela kuPilato ukuba imilenze yabo yaphulwe, babanjwe, kude."
John19:32 Eza ngoko amasoldati, ayaphula okunene imilenze yowokuqala, neyomnye obebethelelwe emnqamlezweni naye."
John19:33 Kodwa akufika kuYesu, akubona ukuba uselefile, akayaphula imilenze yakhe."
John19:34 Lesuka elinye isoldati lamhlaba ngomkhonto ecaleni, kwaoko kwaphuma igazi namanzi."
John19:35 Nalowo ubonileyo ungqinile, nobungqina bakhe buyinyaniso; naye yena uyazi ukuba uthetha inyaniso, ukuze nani nikholwe."
John19:36 Ezo zinto zenzeka ukuze isibhalo sizaliseke esithi, Akuyi kwaphulwa thambo lakhe."
John19:37 Kanjalo nesinye isibhalo sithi, Baya kukhangela kulowo bamhlabileyo."
John19:38 Ke kaloku emveni koko, uYosefu waseArimati (engumfundi kaYesu, ke enguye ngokufihlakeleyo ngenxa yokoyika amaYuda), wacela kuPilato, ukuba awususe umzimba kaYesu. Waza uPilato wavuma; Weza ngoko, wawuthabatha umzimba kaYesu."
John19:39 Kweza noNikodemo, lowo wezayo kuYesu ekuqaleni ebusuku, ephethe umxube wemore nehaloti, omalunga nekhulu leeponti."
John19:40 Bawuthabatha ke umzimba kaYesu, bawubopha ngezisongelo zelinen, ndawonye nobulawu, njengoko kulisiko lokungcwaba kumaYuda."
John19:41 Ke kaloku, bekukho kuloo ndawo wayebethelelwe kuyo emnqamlezweni umyezo; nasemyezweni apho bekukho ingcwaba elitsha, ekungazanga kubekwe mntu kulo."
John19:42 uYesu ngoko bambeka khona apho, ngenxa yemini yokulungiselela kwamaYuda; kuba ingcwaba belikufuphi."
John20:1 Ngolokuqala usuku lweveki, kuza engcwabeni uMariya waseMagadala kusasa, kusentsundu, alibone ilitye lisusiwe engcwabeni."
John20:2 Agidime ngoko, eze kuSimon Petros nakomnye umfundi, lowo ubethandwa nguYesu, athi kubo, Bayisusile iNkosi engcwabeni; asazi apho bayibeke khona."
John20:3 Waphuma ngoko uPetros nomnye umfundi lowo, besiya engcwabeni."
John20:4 Ke kaloku baye begidima bona bobabini kunye; waza omnye umfundi lowo wamshiya ngamendu uPetros, wafika kuqala engcwabeni."
John20:5 Uthe ke eqonde, wabona iingubo zelinen abesongelwe kuzo zizodwa; akangena."
John20:6 Afike ngoko uSimon Petros emlandela, angene engcwabeni, azibone iingubo zelinen abesongelwe kuzo zizodwa;"
John20:7 neqhiya ebisentlokweni yakhe, ingadibene neelinen abesongelwe kuzo, isongiwe yodwa ndaweni ithile."
John20:8 Wandula ngoko wangena nomnye umfundi, lowo ubefike kuqala engcwabeni, wabona, wakholwa;"
John20:9 Kuba babengekasiqondi isibhalo esithi, umelwe kukuthi avuke kwabafileyo."
John20:10 Babuya ke bagoduka abafundi.
John20:11 Ke yena uMariya wema ngaphandle ngasengcwabeni elila.
John20:12 Wabona izithunywa zezulu ezibini, zam bethe ezimhlophe, zihleli; esinye ngasentloko, esinye ngasezinyaweni, apho wawulele khona umzimba kaYesu."
John20:13 Zithi zona kuye, Mfazi, ulilelani na? Athi kubo, Ngokuba bayithathile iNkosi yam; andazi apho bayibeke khona."
John20:14 Akutsho wajika, wambona uYesu emi; wayengazi ke ukuba nguYesu."
John20:15 Athi uYesu kuye, Mfazi, ulilelani na? ufuna bani na? Yena, esiba ngumgcini-myezo, uthi kuye, Nkosi, ukuba umsusile apha, ndixelele apho umbeke khona; mna ndiye kumthabatha."
John20:16 Athi uYesu kuye, Mariya. Wajika ke, wathi kuye, Rabhoni; oko kukuthi, Mfundisi."
John20:17 Athi uYesu kuye, Ungandichukumisi; kuba andikanyuki ndiye kuBawo; ke hamba uye kubazalwana bam, uthi kubo, Ndiyenyuka, ndiya kuBawo, kuYihlo; nakuThixo wam, nakuThixo wenu."
John20:18 Afike uMariya waseMagadala, ababikele abafundi ukuba uyibonile iNkosi; yathetha ezi zinto kuye."
John20:19 Kwakuhlwa ngoko, ngolokuqala usuku lweveki, zakubon’ ukuba iingcango zivaliwe, apho babehlanganisene khona abafundi, ngenxa yokoyika amaYuda, wafika uYesu wema phakathi, wathi kubo, Uxolo malube nani."
John20:20 Akuba etshilo wababonisa izandla necala lakhe. Bavuya ngoko abafundi bakuyibona iNkosi.
John20:21 Waphinda ngoko uYesu wathi kubo, Uxolo malube nani; njengokuba uBawo endithumile mna, nam ndiyanithuma nina."
John20:22 Akuba etshilo wabaphefumlela, wathi kubo, Yamkelani uMoya oyiNgcwele;"
John20:23 abazono nithe nazixolela, bazixolelwe; nabazono nithe nazibamba, zibambekile."
John20:24 Kodwa uTomas, omnye kwabalishumi elinababini, okuthiwa nguDidimo, wayengenabo oko wafikayo uYesu."
John20:25 Bathi ngoko kuye abanye abafundi, Siyibonile iNkosi. Wathi ke yena kubo, Ukuba andithanga ndilibone inxeba lezikhonkwane ezandleni zayo, ndiwufake umnwe wam enxebeni lezikhonkwane, ndisifake isandla sam ecaleni layo, andisayi kukholwa."
John20:26 Baye emveni kweentsuku ezisibhozo bekwangaphakathi abafundi bakhe, wayenabo noTomas. Afike uYesu, zakubon’ ukuba zivaliwe iingcango, wema phakathi, athi, Uxolo malube nani."
John20:27 Aze athi kuTomas, Ethe apha umnwe wakho, uzibone izandla zam; khawusondeze apha isandla sakho, usifake ecaleni lam; musa ukuba ngongakholwayo, yiba ngokholwayo."
John20:28 Waphendula uTomas, wathi kuye, Nkosi yam, Thixo wam!"
John20:29 Athi uYesu kuye, Ngokuba undibonile, Tomas, ukholiwe. Banoyolo abo bangabonanga, bakholwa noko."
John20:30 Mininzi ke okunene neminye imiqondiso awayenzayo uYesu emehlweni abafundi bakhe, engabhalwanga kuyo le ncwadi;"
John20:31 Kodwa le ibhalelwe ukuze nikholwe ukuba uYesu unguye uKristu, uNyana kaThixo, nokuze nithi, nikholwa, nibe nabo ubomi egameni lakhe."
John21:1 Emva koko waphinda uYesu wazibonakalalisa kubafundi ngaselwandle lwaseTibheriya, wazibonakalisa ngale ndlela."
John21:2 Babendawonye uSimon Petros, noTomas okuthiwa nguDidimo, noNataniyeli waseKana yelaseGalili, nabakaZebhedi, nabanye kubafundi bakhe bebabini."
John21:3 Athi uSimon Petros kubo, Ndiya kubambisa iintlanzi. Bathi kuye, Nathi sihamba nawe. Baphuma, bangena emkhombeni kwaoko; ababamba nto ngobo busuku."
John21:4 Kwakuba sekusile, wema uYesu elunxwemeni, noko abafundi bebengazi ukuba nguYesu."
John21:5 Athi ngoko uYesu kubo, Bantwana, aninanto idliwayo na? Baphendula bathi kuye, Hayi."
John21:6 Wathi ke yena kubo, Wuphoseni umnatha ngecala lasekunene lomkhombe, nofumana. Baphosa ke; ababa saba nako ukuwutsala, ngenxa yenkitha yeentlanzi."
John21:7 Athi ngoko loo mfundi ubethandwa nguYesu kuPetros, YiNkosi. Uthe ngoko uSimon Petros, akuva ukuba yiNkosi, wabhinqa ingubo yokwaleka (kuba ebeze), waziphosa elwandle."
John21:8 Ke bona abanye abafundi beza ngenqanawa; kuba bebengemgama emhlabeni, ngathi bebekubhite ezimakhulu mabini, bewurhuqa umnatha weentlanzi."
John21:9 Bathi ngoko, bakuwelela emhlabeni, babona umlilo wamalahle ukhona, kukho nentlanzi kuwo, kwanesonka."
John21:10 Athi kubo uYesu, Zisani kwezo ntlanzi nizibambise ngokunje."
John21:11 Wakhwela uSimon Petros, wawutsalela emhlabeni umnatha, uzele ziintlanzi ezinkulu, zilikhulu elinamanci mahlanu anesithathu;"
John21:12 Athi kubo uYesu, Yizani nidle. Akubangakho namnye ke kubafundi waba nabuganga bakumbuza esithi, Ungubani na? besazi nje ukuba yiyo iNkosi."
John21:13 Uza ke uYesu, asithabathe isonka, abanike, ayenjenjalo nentlanzi."
John21:14 Oku sekukokwesithathu ezibonakalalisa uYesu kubafundi bakhe, evukile kwabafileyo."
John21:15 Bakomula, athi uYesu kuSimon Petros, Simon kaYona, uyandithanda na ngaphezu kwaba? Athi kuye, Ewe, Nkosi; uyaqonda wena ukuba ndiyakuthanda. Athi kuye, Dlisa amatakane am."
John21:16 Aphinde athi kuye okwesibini, Simon kaYona, uyandithanda na? Athi kuye, Ewe, Nkosi; uyaqonda wena ukuba ndiyakuthanda. Athi kuye, Dlisa izimvu zam."
John21:17 Athi kuye okwesithathu, Simon kaYona, uyandithanda na? Waba buhlungu uPetros, kuba ethe kuye okwesithathu, Uyandithanda na? Wathi kuye, Nkosi, uyazazi zonke izinto wena; uyaqonda wena ukuba ndiyakuthanda. Athi uYesu kuye, Dlisa izimvu zam."
John21:18 Inene, inene, ndithi kuwe, Oko ubusemtsha ubuzibhinqisa ngokwakho, uhambe apho uthanda khona; kodwa xa uthe waluphala, uya kuzolula izandla zakho, ubhinqiswe ngomnye, akuse apho uthanda khona, hayi."
John21:19 Wakutsho ke oku, eqondisa ukuba kukufa kuni na abeya kuzukisa uThixo ngako. Akutsho wathi kuye, Ndilandele."
John21:20 Ejikile ke uPetros, ubone umfundi obethandwa nguYesu elandela, owayama esifubeni sakhe esidlweni, wathi, Nkosi, ngubani na okungcatshayo?"
John21:21 uPetros akumbona lowo, uthi kuYesu: “Nkosi, lo mfo uza kwenza ntoni na?"
John21:22 Athi uYesu kuye, Ukuba ndithi ndithande ukuba yena ahlale ndide ndifike, iyini na loo nto kuwe? ndilandele wena."
John21:23 Laphuma ngoko eli lizwi, laya kubazalwana, ukuba loo mfundi akayi kufa. Waye uYesu engatshongo kuye ukuthi, Akayi kufa; wathi, Ukuba ndithi ndithande ukuba yena ahlale ndide ndifike, iyini na loo nto kuwe?"
John21:24 Nguye lo umfundi ongqinayo ngezi zinto, wazibhala ezi zinto; kanjalo siyazi ukuba ubungqina bakhe buyinene."
John21:25 Kukho ke nezinye izinto ezininzi awazenzayo uYesu, ezingathi zithe zabhalwa ngazinye, ndithi nehlabathi eli alingezibambi iincwadi ezingabhalwayo. Amen."
Acts1:1 Umbhalo wokuqala ndawenza, Tiyofilo, ngazo zonke izinto awaqala ngazo uYesu ukuzenza kwanokuzifundisa,"
Acts1:2 kwada kwayimini awanyuswa ngayo, emveni kokuba ebawisele umthetho ngoMoya oyiNgcwele abapostile awabanyulayo;"
Acts1:3 awathi kanjalo, emveni kokuva kwakhe ubunzima, wazimisa ephila, ngobungqina obuninzi obungenasiphako, ebonakala kubo iintsuku ezimashumi mane, ethetha izinto ezingabo ubukumkani bukaThixo."
Acts1:4 Kwathi, ehlanganisene nabo, wabathethela ngelithi, mabangaphumi eYerusalem, balilinde idinga likaBawo, enalivayo kum."
Acts1:5 Kuba uYohane okunene wabhaptiza ngamanzi; kodwa niya kubhaptizwa ngoMoya oyiNgcwele, kungekabi kade emva kwezi ntsuku."
Acts1:6 Bona ke ngoko, bebuthelene, babembuza besithi, Nkosi, wobubuyisela ngeli xesha na ubukumkani kuSirayeli?"
Acts1:7 Uthe ke kubo, Asikokwenu ukwazi amaxesha nokuba ngamathuba, awamise ngelakhe igunya uBawo."
Acts1:8 Niya kwamkela ke amandla, akubon’ ukuba uMoya oyiNgcwele uhlile phezu kwenu; nibe ngamangqina am eYerusalem, kwanakulo lonke elakwaYuda, nelaseSamariya, kude kuse nasekupheleni komhlaba."
Acts1:9 Ezithethile ezi zinto, bakubon’ ukuba bakhangele, wanyuswa; lathi ilifu lemka naye emehlweni abo."
Acts1:10 Bakuba beqwalasele ezulwini, njengoko wayenyuka, kwabonakala kumi ngakubo amadoda amabini, eneengubo ezimhlophe;"
Acts1:11 ayesithi ke, Madoda, maGalili, nimeleni na, nijonge ezulwini? Lo Yesu unyusiweyo kuni wasiwa emazulwini, uya kuza ngolu hlobo nimbone esiya ngalo emazulwini."
Acts1:12 Baza babuyela eYerusalem, bevela entabeni ekuthiwa yeyemiNquma, ekufuphi neYerusalem, uhambo lwesabatha."
Acts1:13 Bakuba bengenile, banyukela kwigumbi eliphezulu, apho kwakuhlala uPetros, noYakobi, noYohane, noAndreya, uFilipu, noTomas, uBhartolomeyu, noMateyu, noYakobi ka-Alifeyu, noSimon Zelote, uYuda, umzalwana kaYakobi."
Acts1:14 Aba bonke babezingisa ngamxhelo mnye ekuthandazeni nasekukhungeni, ndawonye nabafazi, noMariya unina kaYesu, kwandawonye naba zalwana bakhe."
Acts1:15 Ngaloo mihla wema uPetros phakathi kwabafundi, wathi, (inani lamagama xa lihlangene lingathi lilikhulu elinamanci mabini);"
Acts1:16 Madoda, bazalwana, esi sibhalo simelwe kukuba sizaliseke, sathethwayo ngaphambili nguMoya oyiNgcwele ngomlomo kaDavide ngaye uYuda, owaba ngumkhokeli wabo bambambayo uYesu;"
Acts1:17 ngokuba wayebalelwe kuthi, wasizuza isabelo solu lungiselelo."
Acts1:18 Lowo ke ngoko wazuza umhlaba ngomvuzo wokungalungisi; wawa ngobuso, wagqabhuka phakathi, zaphalala zonke izibilini zakhe."
Acts1:19 Kwazeka oko kubo bonke abemi baseYerusalem; wada loo mhlaba ngeyabo intetho kuthiwe yiAkeldama, oko kukuthi, ngumhlaba wegazi."
Acts1:20 Kuba kubhaliwe encwadini yeeNdumiso kwathiwa, Umzi wakhe mawube yintlango, Kungabikho umiyo kuwo; Buthi nobuveleli bakhe buthatyathwe ngomnye."
Acts1:21 Kungoko athe, kula madoda abehamba nathi ngalo lonke ixesha, yakuba iNkosi uYesu ibingena iphuma phakathi kwethu,"
Acts1:22 iqalele elubhaptizweni lukaYohane, kwada kwayimini awanyuswa ngayo kuthi, kumele ukuba kubekho ongomnye, eya kuba lingqina lokuvuka kwakhe, kunye nathi."
Acts1:23 Bamisa ababini, uYosefu ogama linguBharsabhas, ogama limbi linguYusto, noMatiya."
Acts1:24 Bathandaza bathi, Wena, Nkosi, wena uzaziyo iintliziyo zabantu bonke, bonisa ukuba ngaba babini umnyulileyo;"
Acts1:25 ukuze asithabathe isabelo solu lungiselelo nobupostile, awaphambukayo kubo uYuda, ukuze aye kweyakhe indawo."
Acts1:26 Bawisa amaqashiso abo; laphuma iqashiso noMatiya; wabalelwa kwabapostile abalishumi elinamnye.
Acts2:1 Ke kaloku, ekuzalisekeni kwawo umhla wepentekoste, baye bonke bemxhelo mnye ndaweni-nye."
Acts2:2 Kwaza ngequbuliso kwaphuma ezulwini isandi esinjengesomoya ovuthuza ngamandla, sayizalisa yonke indlu ababehleli kuyo."
Acts2:3 Kwabonakala kubo iilwimi ezabekayo, ngathi zezomlilo, lwaolo lwaolo lwahlala phezu kwabo bonke ngabanye."
Acts2:4 Bazaliswa bonke nguMoya oyiNgcwele, baqala ukuthetha ngalwimi zimbi, njengoko uMoya wayebanika ukuba bathethe baphimisele."
Acts2:5 Ke kaloku kwakumi eYerusalem apho amaYuda, amadoda awoyika uThixo, evela kuzo zonke iintlanga eziphantsi kwezulu."
Acts2:6 Sithe ke sakubakho esi sandi, yabuthelana inkitha, yadubadubeka, ngokuba bonke ngabanye babebeva bona bethetha ngezakomawabo iintetho."
Acts2:7 Bathi nqa ke bonke, bamangaliswa, wathi omnye komnye, Kanene aba bonke bathethayo asingamaGalili na?"
Acts2:8 Kwenzeka njani ukuba sibeve sonke ngabanye bethetha ngezakomawethu iintetho, esazalelwa kuzo?"
Acts2:9 amaPati, namaMedi, namaElam, nabemi baseMesopotami, nakwelakwaYuda, nakwelaKapadoki, kwelasePonto, nelaseAsiya;"
Acts2:10 elaseFrigi, nelasePamfili, kwelaseJiputa, nakwelaseLibhiya, malunga neKirene, nabasemzini abaseRoma, abangamaYuda nabangeni ebuYudeni;"
Acts2:11 AmaKrete nama-Arabhi, siyabeva bethetha ngeelwimi zethu imisebenzi ebalulekileyo kaThixo."
Acts2:12 Bathi nqa ke bonke, bakhohlwa, omnye esithi komnye, Azi, ingaba ifuna ukuba yintoni na le nto?"
Acts2:13 Baye abanye bebagculela, besithi, Aba bazele yiwayini entsha;"
Acts2:14 Ke kaloku uPetros, esuke wema nabalishumi elinamnye, waliphakamisa izwi lakhe, wathi kubo, Madoda, maYuda, nani nonke nimiyo eYerusalem, makwazeke oku kuni, niwabekele indlebe amazwi am."
Acts2:15 Aba abanxilile, njengoko nina niba kunjalo, kuba kuselilixa lesithathu lemini."
Acts2:16 Kodwa oku koko kwathethwayo ngomprofeti uYoweli.
Acts2:17 Kuya kuthi ngemihla yokugqibela, utsho uThixo, ndithulule uMoya wam phezu kwenyama yonke, baprofete oonyana benu neentombi zenu, amadodana enu abone imibono, namadoda enu amakhulu aphuphe amaphupha;"
Acts2:18 Naphezu kwabakhonzi bam, naphezu kwabakhonzazana bam, ngaloo mihla ndiya kumthulula uMoya wam; kwaye baya kuprofeta."
Acts2:19 Ndiya kwenza izimanga ezulwini phezulu, nemiqondiso emhlabeni phantsi; igazi, nomlilo, nentshinyela yomsi;"
Acts2:20 Ilanga liya kujikwa libe mnyama, nenyanga ibe ligazi, phambi kokuba ifike imini yeNkosi enkulu."
Acts2:21 Baya kuthi bonke abasukuba belinqula igama leNkosi basindiswe.
Acts2:22 Madoda, maSirayeli, waveni la mazwi; uYesu waseNazarete, indoda eqondakalisiweyo nguThixo kuni, ngemisebenzi yamandla, nangezimanga, nangemiqondiso, awayenzayo uThixo ngayo phakathi kwenu, njengokuba nisazi nani ngokwenu:"
Acts2:23 yena lowo, ekhutshwe ngecebo elimisiweyo likaThixo nangokwazi kwakhe kwenxa engaphambili uThixo, namthabatha, nambethelela emnqamlezweni, namsika ngezandla zabangendawo;"
Acts2:24 athe uThixo wamvusa, eyikhulule inimba yokufa, kuba ebengenako ukubanjwa kuko."
Acts2:25 Kuba uDavide uthi, esingisele kuye, Ndahlala ndiyibona iNkosi phambi kwamehlo am, Ngokuba ingasekunene kwam, ukuze ndingashukunyiswa."
Acts2:26 Ngenxa yoko yaba nemihlali intliziyo yam, lwagcoba ulwimi lwam; Ngaphezu koko ke nenyama yam iya kuphumla inethemba;"
Acts2:27 Ngokuba akuyi kuwushiya umphefumlo wam kwelabafileyo, Kananjalo akuyi kumyekela oyiNgcwele wakho ukuba abone ukubola."
Acts2:28 Wandazisa iindlela zobomi; Uya kundizalisa ngemihlali ngokubona ubuso bakho.
Acts2:29 Madoda, bazalwana, mandivunyelwe ndithethe kuni ngokuphandle ngomawokhulu uDavide, ukuba wafa wangcwatywa; nengcwaba lakhe likho kuthi unanamhla."
Acts2:30 Ngoko, ekubeni engumprofeti, esazi nokuba uThixo wamfungela isifungo esithi, esiqhameni sesinqe sakhe ngokwenyama, uya kuvelisa uKristu, ukuba ahlale etroneni yakhe;"
Acts2:31 Ebonile ngenxa engaphambili, wathetha ngako ukuvuka kukaKristu, ukuba umphefumlo wakhe ungashiywanga kwelabafileyo nenyama yakhe ingabonanga kubola."
Acts2:32 Lo Yesu uThixo wamvusa, esingamangqina ako oko thina sonke."
Acts2:33 Ephakanyiselwe phezulu nje ngasekunene kukaThixo, elamkele kuye uYise idinga loMoya oyiNgcwele, uthulule le nto niyibonayo, niyivayo ngoku."
Acts2:34 Kuba uDavide, enganyukanga waya emazulwini, ke uthi ngokwakhe, Yathi iNkosi eNkosini yam, Hlala ngasekunene kwam;"
Acts2:35 Ndide iintshaba zakho ndizenze isihlalo seenyawo zakho.
Acts2:36 Ngoko mayazi ngokuqinisekileyo yonke indlu kaSirayeli, ukuba uThixo wamenza iNkosi noKristu, kwayena lo Yesu nambethelelayo emnqamlezweni nina."
Acts2:37 Ke kaloku bathe, bakukuva oko, bahlabeka entliziyweni, bathi kuPetros nakwabanye abapostile, Madoda, bazalwana, sithini na?"
Acts2:38 Wathi uPetros kubo, Guqukani, nibhaptizwe nonke ngabanye egameni likaYesu Kristu, ukuze kuxolelwe izono, namkele isipho soMoya oyiNgcwele."
Acts2:39 Kaloku idinga likuni, nakubantwana benu, nakubo bonke abakude, esukuba iNkosi uThixo wethu iya kubabiza."
Acts2:40 Ngamanye amazwi amaninzi wayeqononondisa, ebavuselela esithi, Zisindiseni kwesi sizukulwana sigwenxa."
Acts2:41 Bathe ke ngoko, abalamkele ilizwi lakhe ngovuyo, babhaptizwa; kongezelelwa kwangaloo mini imiphefumlo engathi imawaka mathathu."
Acts2:42 Bazingisa ukuzingisa emfundisweni yabapostile, nasebudlelaneni, nasekuqhekezeni isonka, nasemithandazweni."
Acts2:43 Ke kaloku kwabakho ukoyika kwimiphefumlo yonke; kwenzeka izimanga ezininzi kwanemiqondiso ngabapostile.
Acts2:44 Ke kaloku bonke ababekholwa babendawonye, benobudlelane ngeento zonke."
Acts2:45 Baye bethengisa nangemihlaba nangemihlaba yabo, babele bonke abantu njengoko ebesukuba eswele ngako."
Acts2:46 Babezingisa ukuhlala bemxhelo mnye etempileni imihla ngemihla, beqhekeza isonka kwizindlu ngezindlu, besidla ukudla benemigcobo, benolungelelwano lwentliziyo,"
Acts2:47 bemdumisa uThixo, benonelelwe ngabantu bonke. Yaye iNkosi isongeza ebandleni imihla ngemihla abasindiswayo."
Acts3:1 Ke kaloku, uPetros, noYohane babenyuka bendawonye, besiya etempileni ngexesha lomthandazo, ililixa lesithoba."
Acts3:2 Kwaye ke kuthwelwe ndoda ithile, ibisisiqhwala kwasekuzalweni kwayo, ababeyibeka imihla ngemihla emnyango wetempile, lowo kuthiwa Mhle, ukuba icele amalizo kwabangenayo etempileni;"
Acts3:3 eyathi, yakubona uPetros noYohane beza kungena etempileni, yacela ukuba bayilize."
Acts3:4 Uthe ke uPetros, enoYohane, eqwalasele kuyo wathi, Khangela kuthi apha."
Acts3:5 Wabagqala ke, elindele ukwamkela into kubo."
Acts3:6 Uthe ke uPetros, Isilivere negolide andinayo; kodwa endinako ndikunika kona: Egameni likaYesu Kristu umNazarete, vuka uhambe."
Acts3:7 Wayibamba ngesandla sokunene, wayiphakamisa; zomelezeka kwaoko iinyawo zayo namaqatha ayo."
Acts3:8 Yesuka umtsi, yema, yahambahamba, yangena nabo etempileni, ihambahamba itsiba, imdumisa uThixo."
Acts3:9 Baza bonke abantu bayibona ihambahamba, idumisa uThixo;"
Acts3:10 Babeqonda kakuhle, ukuba ingulowa ubehlalela amalizo ngasemnyango oMhle wetempile, bathi qhiphu umbilini, bathi nqa yiloo nto ihlileyo kuye."
Acts3:11 Ke kaloku, sakubon’ ukuba isisiqhwala sibambe ooPetros noYohane, abantu babalekela kubo evarandeni ekuthiwa yekaSolomon, bemangalisiwe kakhulu."
Acts3:12 Akukubona ke oko uPetros, waphendula wathi kubo abantu, Madoda, maSirayeli, yini na ukuba nimangaliswe yile nto? Kanjalo yini na ukuba nisijonge, ngathi senze ukuba lo mntu ahambe ngawethu amandla, nangobungcwele bethu?"
Acts3:13 uThixo ka-Abraham, kaIsake, kaYakobi, uThixo woobawo bethu, umzukisile uYesu uNyana wakhe; enamnikelayo, namkhanyela phambi koPilato, ekubeni yena ugqibe kwelokuba amkhulule."
Acts3:14 Ke nina namkhanyela oyiNgcwele, oliLungisa, nacela ukuba ninikwe indoda engumbulali."
Acts3:15 Ke yona iMbangi yobomi nayibulala, awayivusayo uThixo kwabafileyo; esingamangqina ako oko."
Acts3:16 Nangenxa yokukholwa kwigama layo, lo nimbonayo, nimaziyo, limomelezile igama layo; lwathi ukholo olungayo lwamnika oku kuphila kupheleleyo phambi kwenu nonke."
Acts3:17 Nangoku, bazalwana, ndiyazi ukuba nenze ngokungazi, njengabo nabo abaphathi benu."
Acts3:18 Ke zona izinto uThixo, awazixelayo ngenxa engaphambili ngomlomo wabo bonke abaprofeti bakhe, ukuba uKristu wayeza kuva ubunzima, wenjenjalo ukuzalisekisa oko."
Acts3:19 Guqukani ke ngoko, nijike, ukuze zicinywe izono zenu;"
Acts3:20 ithume uYesu Kristu, owavakaliswayo kuni ngenxa engaphambili;"
Acts3:21 elimelwe kukumamkela izulu, kude kufike amaxesha okubuyiswa kweento zonke, awawathethayo uThixo ngomlomo wabo bonke abaprofeti bakhe abangcwele, kususela kunaphakade."
Acts3:22 Kaloku uMosis wathi koobawo: “iNkosi uThixo wenu iya kunivelisela umprofeti kubazalwana benu onjengam nje; ize nimve yena kuzo zonke izinto asukuba eya kuzithetha kuni.
Acts3:23 Yothi ke yonke imiphefumlo engathanga imve loo mprofeti, itshatyalaliswe, ingabikho phakathi kwabantu."
Acts3:24 Nabo bonke abaprofeti, ukususela kuSamuweli nabalandelayo, bonke abo bathethayo, baprofeta ngokunjalo ngale mihla."
Acts3:25 Nina ningoonyana babo abaprofeti, nabomnqophiso awanqophisana ngawo noobawo bethu uThixo, esithi kuAbraham, Yaye ke iya kusikeleleka embewini yakho yonke imizalwane yehlabathi."
Acts3:26 uThixo ke, akuba emvusile uNyana wakhe uYesu, wamthuma kuni kuqala, ukuba anisikelele ngokuniguqula nonke ngabanye kwiinkohlakalo zenu."
Acts4:1 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba bayathetha kubo abantu, bafika ababingeleli, nomphathi wetempile, nabaSadusi;"
Acts4:2 bebindekile ngenxa yokuba befundisa abantu, bekuxela ukuvuka kubo abafileyo ngoku kukaYesu ukuvuka."
Acts4:3 Babasa izandla, babafaka entolongweni, kwada kwaba ngengomso; kuba bekuse kuhlwile."
Acts4:4 Ke into eninzi yabo babelivile ilizwi, yakholwa; lathi inani lamadoda lingathi kumawaka amahlanu."
Acts4:5 Ke kaloku kwathi ngengomso, abaphathi babo, namadoda amakhulu, nababhali, bathi,"
Acts4:6 Kwahlanganisana eYerusalem uAnas umbingeleli omkhulu, noKayafa, noYohane, noAlesandire, kwanabanye bemizalwane yombingeleli omkhulu;"
Acts4:7 Bakuba bebamise phakathi, bababuza besithi, Le nto nina niyenze ngamandla mani na, nangagama lini na?"
Acts4:8 Wathi ke uPetros, ezele nguMoya oyiNgcwele, wathi kubo, Nina baphathi babantu, nani madoda makhulu akwaSirayeli,"
Acts4:9 ukuba thina namhlanje siyacikideka ngomsebenzi omhle owenziweyo lowo ungenamandla, ukuba ungáphiliswa njani na;"
Acts4:10 Makwazeke kuni nonke, nakubo bonke abantu bakwaSirayeli, ukuba kusegameni likaYesu Kristu waseNazarete, enambethelelayo emnqamlezweni nina, athe uThixo wamvusa kwabafileyo; kungaye lowo, ukuba lo mntu eme apha phambi kwenu ephilile."
Acts4:11 Lo ngulo ilitye elenziwa into engento nini bakhi, elisuke laba yintloko yembombo."
Acts4:12 Kananjalo usindiso alukho kuwumbi; kuba akukho gama limbi phantsi kwezulu, linikiweyo phakathi kwabantu, esimele ukusindiswa ngalo."
Acts4:13 Ke kaloku, bakubona ukungafihlisikuthetha koPetros noYohane, beqiqa nokuba ngabantu abangenamfundo, abangenakwazi, bamangaliswa; babaqonda ukuba babenaye uYesu."
Acts4:14 Bakumbona ke umntu emi nabo, yena lowo uphilisiweyo, ababanga nandawo yakuphika."
Acts4:15 Bakuba bethe mabaphume entlanganisweni yamatyala, bacebisana bodwa,"
Acts4:16 besithi, Siya kubathini na aba bantu? Kuba okunene, ukuba kuhle ngabo umqondiso owazekayo, oyinto ebonakalayo kubo bonke abemi eYerusalem, kwaye asinakuyikhanyela loo nto."
Acts4:17 Ukuze ke loo nto ingahlakazeki ngakumbi ebantwini, masise sibasongela ngelokuba bangabi sathetha mntwini ngeli gama."
Acts4:18 Bebabizile, babathethela ngelithi, mabangabi sakhankanya nakanye, bangafundisi nokufundisa ngegama likaYesu."
Acts4:19 Ke kaloku uPetros noYohane baphendula, bathi kubo, Yahlulani nina, ukuba bubulungisa na emehlweni kaThixo ukuva nina, kunokuva uThixo;"
Acts4:20 Kaloku thina asinakuyeka ukuthetha ngezinto esizibonileyo nesizivileyo.
Acts4:21 Bathe ke bona, beqokele ngokubasongela, babandulula, bengafumani sizathu bangababetha ngaso, ngenxa yabantu; ngokuba bonke babemzukisa uThixo ngoko kwakuhlile."
Acts4:22 Kuba umntu owathi waphiliswa phezu kwakhe lo mqondiso wokuphiliswa wayeneminyaka engaphezu kwamashumi amane.
Acts4:23 Bakuba ke bekhululwe, baya kowabo, bababikela zonke izinto ababezithethile kubo ababingeleli abakhulu namadoda amakhulu."
Acts4:24 Bona ke, bakukuva oko, baphakamisa izwi kuThixo ngamxhelo mnye, bathi, Nkosi, wena unguThixo owalenzayo izulu nomhlaba nolwandle, neento zonke ezikwezo nto;"
Acts4:25 owatshoyo ngomlomo kaDavide umkhonzi wakho, ukuthi, Yini na ukuba iintlanga zenze imbuthumbuthu, nabantu bacamange into engeyakonto?"
Acts4:26 Bazimisa ookumkani behlabathi, Nabaphathi bahlanganisana ndawonye Ngokuyichasa iNkosi, naye uKristu wayo."
Acts4:27 Kuba okunene uHerode, kwanoPontiyo Pilato, ndawonye neentlanga nabantu bakwaSirayeli, babuthelana ndawonye nxamnye noNyana wakho ongcwele uYesu, owamthambisayo,"
Acts4:28 ukuba benze izinto zonke ezamiswayo ngenxa engaphambili sisandla sakho nalicebo lakho, ukuba zibekho."
Acts4:29 Ngoku ke, Nkosi, zikhangele izisongelo zabo, ubanike abakhonzi bakho ukuba balithethe ilizwi lakho ngako konke ukungafihlisi."
Acts4:30 Ngokusolula isandla sakho uphilise; nokuba kwenzeke imiqondiso nezimanga ngegama loMkhonzi wakho ongcwele, uYesu."
Acts4:31 Bakubon’ ukuba bakhungile, yazanyazanyiswa indawo ababehlanganisene kuyo; Bazaliswa bonke nguMoya oyiNgcwele, balithetha ilizwi likaThixo ngokungafihlisiyo."
Acts4:32 Ke kaloku inkitha yababekholiwe yayintliziyo-nye, imphefumlo mnye; kwaye kungekho namnye ubesithi kukho nto iyeyakhe empahleni yakhe; baye badlelana zonke izinto."
Acts4:33 Baye abapostile bekungqinela ngamandla amakhulu ukuvuka kweNkosi uYesu; kwaye kukho ukubabalwa okukhulu kubo bonke.
Acts4:34 Kwakungekho namnye phakathi kwabo, wayeswele; kuba bonke ababenemihlaba, nokuba zizindlu, babethengisa ngazo, baze bazise amaxabiso ezinto ezithengisiweyo,"
Acts4:35 bawabeke ezinyaweni zabapostile; waye ke elowo esabelwa njengoko ebesukuba eswele ngako.
Acts4:36 noYose, owathiywa ngabapostile ukuba nguBharnabhas, (oko kukuthi ngentetho evakalayo, unyana wentuthuzelo), umLevi waseSipro,"
Acts4:37 Enomhlaba, wathengisa ngawo, wayizisa imali leyo, wayibeka ezinyaweni zabapostile."
Acts5:1 Ke kaloku indoda ethile, uHananiya, inoSafira umkayo, yathengisa ngendawo."
Acts5:2 Yashinta kulo ixabiso layo, esazi naye umkayo; yazisa nxenye ithile, yayibeka ezinyaweni zabapostile."
Acts5:3 Uthe ke uPetros, Hananiya, kungani na ukuba uSathana azalise intliziyo yakho, ukuba umxokise uMoya oyiNgcwele, ushinte kulo ixabiso lomhlaba?"
Acts5:4 Xa ihleliyo, ibingeyakho na? Wakuba uyithengisile, ibingabisemandleni akho na? Yini na ukuba uyibeke le nto entliziyweni yakho? Akuxoke ebantwini, uxoke kuThixo."
Acts5:5 Ewavile ke uHananiya la mazwi, wawa, waphuma umphefumlo; kwabakho ukoyika okukhulu kubo bonke ababezivile ezi zinto."
Acts5:6 Besuka abafana, bamsongela, bamthwalela phandle, bamngcwaba."
Acts5:7 Kwakuba kuhambe iiyure ezintathu, wathi umkakhe, engayazi loo nto ihlileyo, wangena."
Acts5:8 Wamphendula ke uPetros wathi, Ndixelele, umhlaba lo nawuthengisayo ngale ndawo na? Wathi ke yena, Ewe, ngako oko."
Acts5:9 Uthe ke uPetros kuye, Yini na ukuba nivumelane ngokumlinga uMoya weNkosi? Uyabona, iinyawo zabo bangcwabe indoda yakho zisemnyango, baya kukuthwalela phandle."
Acts5:10 Wawa phantsi kwangoko ezinyaweni zakhe, waphuma umphefumlo. Bangena abafana, bamfumana efile, bamkhuphela phandle, bamngcwaba ngasendodeni yakhe."
Acts5:11 Kwabakho ukoyika okukhulu kulo lonke ibandla, nabo bonke ababeziva ezi zinto."
Acts5:12 Kwaye kwenzeka ngezandla zabapostile imiqondiso nezimanga ezininzi phakathi kwabantu; baye bonke bemxhelo mnye evarandeni kaSolomon.
Acts5:13 Ke kaloku, kwabanye akubangakho namnye waba nabuganga bakusinamathelisa kubo;"
Acts5:14 Kwaba kukhona bekongezwa abakholwayo kwiNkosi, into eninzi yamadoda neyabafazi;"
Acts5:15 bada bakhutshelwa phandle imilwelwe ezitratweni, bayibeka ezingqengqelweni nasezingqengqelweni, ukuze kuthi, akubon’ ukuba uPetros uyeza, kubekho kuyo sisithunzi sakhe;"
Acts5:16 Yaye ke ibuthelana eYerusalem nenkitha yabemizi ejikelezileyo, ithwele imilwelwe nabakhathazwa ngoomoya abangcolileyo, baye bephiliswa bonke."
Acts5:17 Waza wesuka umbingeleli omkhulu nabo bonke ababenaye (abangabehlelo labaSadusi), bazala ngumsindo;"
Acts5:18 bababamba abapostile, babafaka entolongweni."
Acts5:19 Sazivula ke isithunywa seNkosi ebusuku iingcango zentolongo, sabakhupha, sathi,"
Acts5:20 Hambani, niye kuma nithethe etempileni kubo abantu onke amazwi obu bomi."
Acts5:21 Bathe ke bona bakukuva oko, bangena kwakusasa etempileni, bafundisa. Wafika ke umbingeleli omkhulu nabo babenaye, wayibizela ndawonye intlanganiso yamatyala, nawo onke amadoda amakhulu akoonyana bakaSirayeli, bathumela entolongweni ukuba baziswe."
Acts5:22 Ke kaloku, akufika amadindala, akabafumananga entolongweni, abuya abika, athi,"
Acts5:23 Intolongo siyifumene okunene ivalwe ngokuqinileyo kanye, nabalindi bemi ngaphandle phambi kweminyango. Sivulile ke, asifumananga mntu ngaphakathi."
Acts5:24 Ke kaloku, bakukuziva ezo zinto umbingeleli omkhulu, nomphathi wetempile, kwanababingeleli abakhulu, bathandabuza kubo, ukuba ingaba ingaba ingaba yintoni na le nto."
Acts5:25 Kwafika omnye wababikela, esithi, Yabonani, amadoda ebeniwafake entolongweni, emi etempileni, efundisa abantu."
Acts5:26 Wesuka umphathi enamadindala, wabazisa kungengamandla; kuba babesoyika abantu, hleze baxulutywe ngamatye."
Acts5:27 Bebazisile ke, babamisa entlanganisweni yamatyala; wababuza umbingeleli omkhulu."
Acts5:28 Esithi, Besinganithethelanga na, ukuba ningafundisi ngeli gama? niyabona, niyizalisile iYerusalem ngemfundiso yenu, nizimisele ukulizisa igazi lalo mntu phezu kwethu."
Acts5:29 Waphendula ke uPetros nabapostile, bathi, Simelwe kukuthi sive uThixo kunokuba sive abantu."
Acts5:30 uThixo woobawo bethu wamvusa uYesu, enambulalayo nina ngokumxhoma emthini."
Acts5:31 Lowo uThixo wamphakamisa ngesandla sakhe sokunene, waba nguMthetheli noMsindisi, ukuze amnike uSirayeli inguquko noxolelo lwezono."
Acts5:32 Thina ke singamangqina akhe ezo zinto, ukwanjalo noMoya oyiNgcwele, awamnika abo bamvayo yena uThixo."
Acts5:33 Bathe ke bona bakukuva oko, bahlabeka ezintliziyweni zabo, babhunga ukuba babasike."
Acts5:34 Ke kaloku kwesuka kwema othile entlanganisweni yamatyala, umFarisi ogama linguGamaliyeli, umfundisi womthetho, obekekileyo kubantu bonke, wathi makhe bakhutshelwe phandle kancinane abapostile;"
Acts5:35 Wathi kubo, Madoda, maSirayeli, zilumkeleni ngento eniza kuyenza kwaba bantu."
Acts5:36 Kuba ngaphambi kwale mihla kwesuka uTuda, esithi yena ngokwakhe unguthile; ekwathi kwanamathela kuye inani lamadoda angathi kumakhulu mane; bathi bonke ababemlulamele babhangazeka, ababa nto."
Acts5:37 Emva kwalowo kwesuka uYudas waseGalili ngemihla yobhalo lomlibo wokuzalwa, wakhukulisa abantu banela; naye lowo watshabalala; baza bonke ababemlulamele bachithwachithwa."
Acts5:38 Kungoku ke ndithi kuni, Khwelelani kwaba bantu nibayeke; ngokuba eli cebo, nalo msebenzi, ukuba lingaba lelabantu, lotshitsha."
Acts5:39 Ukuba ke lelikaThixo, aninakulitshitshisa; hleze nifunyanwe ningabalwa kwanoThixo."
Acts5:40 Bamthambela ke; bebabizile abapostile, babatyabula, babathethela ngelithi, mabangathethi ngegama likaYesu; babandulula ke."
Acts5:41 Bemka ke ngoko bona ebusweni bentlanganiso yamatyala, bevuya, ngokuba kuthiwe bakufanele ukuhlaziswa ngenxa yegama lakhe."
Acts5:42 Baye bangayeki ukufundisa nokushumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zikaYesu Kristu, imihla yonke etempileni, nasemizini ngemizi."
Acts6:1 Ke kaloku ngaloo mihla, bakubon’ ukuba bayanda abafundi, kwabakho ukukrokra kwawesiGrike amaYuda, esithi, ngenxa yokuba abahlolokazi bawo babengananzwa kulungiselelo lwemihla ngemihla."
Acts6:2 Bathe ke abalishumi elinababini bawubizela kubo indimbane yabafundi, bathi, Akukholekile ukuba thina silishiye ilizwi likaThixo, silungiselele ezitafileni."
Acts6:3 Ngoko ke, bazalwana, khangelani ukujonga phakathi kwenu amadoda asixhenxe avunyiweyo, azele nguMoya oyiNgcwele nobulumko, esingawamisela phezu kwalo mcimbi."
Acts6:4 Thina ke siya kuzingisa emthandazweni, nakubulungiseleli belizwi."
Acts6:5 Labakholisa ke ilizwi elo zwi emehlweni abo bonke abantu, baza banyula uStefano, indoda ezele lukholo nanguMoya oyiNgcwele, noFilipu, noProkoro, noNikanore, noTimon, noParmenas, noNikolawo owaguqukela ebuYudeni, wakwa-Antiyokwe;"
Acts6:6 abathe babamisa phambi kwabapostile, bathi, bakuba bethandazile, babeka izandla phezu kwabo."
Acts6:7 Laye liya likhula ilizwi likaThixo; Laye liya lisanda kakhulu inani labafundi eYerusalem; laye neqela elikhulu lababingeleli lilululamela ukholo.
Acts6:8 Ke kaloku uStefano, ezele lukholo namandla, wayesenza izimanga nemiqondiso emikhulu phakathi kwabantu."
Acts6:9 Kwesuka ke kwesuka kwesuka abathile bendlu yesikhungu ebizwa ngokuba yelabaKhululwa, neyabaseKirene, neyamaAleksandriya, neyabaseKilikiya naseAsiya, bephikisana noStefano."
Acts6:10 Baye ke bengabanga nako ukumelana nobulumko, nomoya awayethetha ngawo."
Acts6:11 Baza balukuhla amadoda, awathi, Simvile ethetha amazwi okunyelisa ngoMoses nangoThixo."
Acts6:12 Baza babaxhokonxa abantu, namadoda amakhulu nababhali; bamfikela, bambamba, bamzisa entlanganisweni yamatyala."
Acts6:13 Bamisa amangqina obuxoki, awathi, Lo mntu akayeki ukuthetha amazwi okunyelisa le ndawo ingcwele nomthetho;"
Acts6:14 Kuba simve esithi, uYesu waseNazarete lo uya kuyichitha le ndawo, awenze wambi amasiko awawanikela kuthi uMoses."
Acts6:15 Baye bonke ababehleli entlanganisweni yamatyala, beqwalasele kuye, babubona ubuso bakhe, ngathi bubuso besithunywa sezulu."
Acts7:1 Wathi ke umbingeleli omkhulu, Zinjalo na ke ezi ndawo?"
Acts7:2 Uthe ke yena: “Madoda, bazalwana, nani bobawo, phulaphulani. uThixo wozuko wabonakala kubawo wethu uAbraham, eseMesopotami, engekami kwelakwaHaran."
Acts7:3 Wathi kuye, Phuma ezweni lakowenu, kwelokuzalwa kwakho, uye ezweni endiya kukubonisa lona."
Acts7:4 Wesuka ke ezweni lamaKaledi, wahlala eHaran. Wathi, akuba efile uyise, wamfudusela kweli lizwe nihleli kulo nina ngoku."
Acts7:5 Akamnika lifa khona, kwanendawo engangonyawo, kodwa wathembisa ukuba uya kumnika ibe yeyakhe, nembewu yakhe emva kwakhe, engekabi namntwana."
Acts7:6 Wenjenje uThixo ukuthetha, wathi, Imbewu yakhe iya kuba ngabaphambukeli ezweni lasemzini; ukuba baye ebukhobokeni, babaphathe kakubi, iminyaka emakhulu mane."
Acts7:7 Nohlanga olo, ethe yangamakhoboka kulo, ndiya kulugweba mna, watsho uThixo; yaye, emveni kwezi zinto, iya kuphuma indikhonze kule ndawo."
Acts7:8 Waza wamnika umnqophiso wolwaluko, wathi ngokunjalo uAbraham wamzala uIsake, wamalusa ngomhla wesibhozo; uIsake ke wazala uYakobi; uYakobi wazala oomawokhulu abalishumi elinababini."
Acts7:9 Bathi oomawokhulu, bemmonele, bathengisa ngoYosefu eYiputa;"
Acts7:10 wamncothula kuzo zonke iimbandezelo zakhe, wambabala ngobulumko phambi koFaro, ukumkani waseYiputa; wammisa ukuba abe yirhuluneli phezu kweYiputa nendlu yakhe yonke."
Acts7:11 Ke kaloku kwafika indlala enkulu kulo lonke elaseJiputa nelaseKanana, baza oobawo-mkhulu abazange bafumane kudla."
Acts7:12 Akuva ke uYakobi ukuba kukho ingqolowa eYiputa, wesusa oobawo bethu okokuqala."
Acts7:13 Kwathi ngokwesibini uYosefu wabonakalaliswa kubazalwana bakhe; Saza ke isizalwana sikaYosefu saziswa kuFaro.
Acts7:14 Wathumela uYosefu, wambiza uyise uYakobi, nemizalwane yakhe yonke, imiphefumlo emashumi asixhenxe anantlanu."
Acts7:15 Wehla ke uYakobi, waya eYiputa, wabhubha yena noobawo bethu;"
Acts7:16 baza bathwalwa basiwa kwaShekem, babekwa engcwabeni awalithengayo uAbraham ngexabiso lemali koonyana bakaHamore, usoShekem."
Acts7:17 Kuthe ke, lakuba lisondele ixesha ledinga, awalifungayo uThixo kuAbraham, bakhula abantu, banda eYiputa,"
Acts7:18 kwada kwavela kumkani wumbi, ubengamazi uYosefu."
Acts7:19 Lowo wabalumkisa abakowethu, wabaphatha kakubi oobawo bethu, ngokokuze bazilahle iintsana zabo, ukuze zingabudli ubomi."
Acts7:20 Ekuthe ke kwelo xesha, kwazalwa uMoses; waye emhle kuThixo, wondliwa iinyanga zantathu endlwini kayise."
Acts7:21 Wagxothwa ke, yamchola intombi kaFaro, yazondlela ukuba abe ngunyana wayo."
Acts7:22 Waqeqeshwa ke uMoses kubo bonke ubulumko bamaYiputa; waye ke eyinkunkqele ngamazwi nangezenzo.
Acts7:23 Kwathi, kwakuba yiminyaka emashumi mane, kwafika entliziyweni yakhe ukukha aye kuvelela abazalwana bakhe, oonyana bakaSirayeli."
Acts7:24 Waza wabona omnye ephathwa kakubi, wamkhusela, wamphindezelela lowo ucinezelweyo, wambulala umYiputa."
Acts7:25 Wayeba ke yena boqonda abazalwana bakhe ukuba uThixo ebeya kubasindisa ngesandla sakhe; abaqondanga ke bona.
Acts7:26 Kwathi ngengomso wabonakala kubo besilwa, wabanyanzela ukuba baxolisane, esithi, Madoda, niyazalana nina; yini na ukuba nonane?"
Acts7:27 Kodwa yena lowo wayemonile ummelwane wakhe wamgiba, esithi, Umiswe ngubani na ukuba ube ngumphathi nomahluli phakathi kwethu?"
Acts7:28 Uza kundibulala na nam, njengokuba umbulele umYiputa izolo?"
Acts7:29 Wasaba ke uMoses ngelo lizwi, waba ngumphambukeli ezweni lakwaMidiyan, apho wazalela khona oonyana ababini."
Acts7:30 Kuthe ke kwakuzaliseka iminyaka emashumi mane, kwabonakala kuye kwintlango yentaba yeSinayi isithunywa seNkosi, elangatyeni lomlilo etyholweni."
Acts7:31 Akukubona oko uMoses, wamangaliswa ngumbono lowo; akusondela ukuba awukhangele, kwafika ilizwi likaYehova kuye, lisithi,"
Acts7:32 Mna ndinguThixo wabo ooyihlo, uThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi. Wagubha uMoses, akaba nabuganga, akukhangela."
Acts7:33 Ithe ke iNkosi kuye, Khulula iimbadada zakho ezinyaweni zakho; kuba indawo leyo umi kuyo ingumhlaba ongcwele."
Acts7:34 Ndikubonile ndakubona ukuphathwa kakubi kwabantu bam abaseYiputa, ndakuva nokuncwina kwabo, ndihlile, ukuze ndibahlangule. Yiza ngoku, ndikuthume eYiputa."
Acts7:35 Lo Moses bamkhanyelayo, besithi, Umiswe ngubani na, ukuba ube ngumphathi nomahluli? yena uThixo wamthuma ukuba abe ngumphathi nomhlanguli ngesandla sesithunywa esabonakalayo kuye etyholweni."
Acts7:36 Yena lowo wabakhupha, emveni kokuba wenze izimanga nemiqondiso ezweni laseYiputa, naseLwandle oluBomvu, nasentlango, iminyaka emashumi mane."
Acts7:37 Lo nguloo Moses wathi koonyana bakaSirayeli, iNkosi, uThixo wenu, iya kunivelisela umprofeti kubazalwana benu, onjengam nje; nize nimve yena."
Acts7:38 Nguye lo owayesebandleni entlango, ndawonye nesithunywa sezulu, ebesithetha naye entabeni yeSinayi, enoobawo bethu;"
Acts7:39 Abavumanga ukumphulaphula oobawo, besuka bamgxotha, babuyela eYiputa ezintliziyweni zabo;"
Acts7:40 besithi kuAron, Senzele uthixo oya kuhamba phambi kwethu; kuba lo Moses wasikhuphayo ezweni laseYiputa, asazi ukuba uhlelwe yintoni na."
Acts7:41 Benza ithole ngaloo mihla, benyusa amadini, bewanyusa amadini, baba nemihlali yimisebenzi yezandla zabo."
Acts7:42 Wajika ke uThixo, wabanikela ukuba bakhonze umkhosi wezulu; njengoko kubhaliweyo encwadini yabaprofeti kwathiwa, Nibe nisondeza kum na kum amadini amadini, ndlu kaSirayeli, iminyaka emashumi mane entlango?"
Acts7:43 Nathwala umnquba kaMoleki, Nenkwenkwezi yothixo wenu uRemfan, Imifanekiso ke leyo enayenzayo ukuba niqubude kuyo; Ndaye ke ndiya kunifudusela ngaphaya kweBhabheli."
Acts7:44 Umnquba wesingqino wawukoobawo bethu entlango, njengoko wayemisele ngako owayethetha noMoses, ukuba awenze ngokomfanekiso abewubonile;"
Acts7:45 Lowo bawungenisayo, bawungenisayo noYesu ekuthinjweni kweentlanga, ezo wazigxothayo uThixo ebusweni boobawo bethu, kwada kwayimihla kaDavide;"
Acts7:46 owababalwayo nguThixo, wacela ukuba amfumanele uThixo kaYakobi umnquba."
Acts7:47 Kodwa uSolomon wamakhela indlu.
Acts7:48 Kodwa Osenyangweni yena akahlali zitempileni zenziwe ngazandla; njengoko watshoyo umprofeti.
Acts7:49 Izulu liyitrone yam, Ke ihlabathi sisihlalo seenyawo zam; Yindlu enjani na eniya kundakhela yona? itsho iNkosi; Yiyiphi na yona indawo yokuphumla kwam?"
Acts7:50 Asisandla sam na sazenza zonke ezo zinto?
Acts7:51 Nina bantamo zilukhuni, bangalukileyo ngentliziyo, nangendlebe, nihleli nibambene noMoya oyiNgcwele; kwanjengoko ooyihlo, nani ninjalo."
Acts7:52 Kubo abaprofeti nguwuphi na ongatshutshiswanga ngooyihlo? bababulala abo babekuxela ngenxa engaphambili ukuza koliLungisa; enithe ke ngoku ningabangcatshi nababulali bakhe;
Acts7:53 nina nawamkelayo umthetho, niwumiselwa zizithunywa zezulu, anawugcina."
Acts7:54 Ke kaloku, bathi, bakukuziva ezi zinto, bahlabeka ezintliziyweni zabo, bamtshixizela amazinyo."
Acts7:55 Ke yena, ezele nguMoya oyiNgcwele, waqwalasela ezulwini, wabona ubuqaqawuli bukaThixo, noYesu emi ngasekunene kukaThixo."
Acts7:56 Wathi, Yabonani, ndiwabona amazulu evulekile, ndimbona uNyana woMntu emi ngasekunene kukaThixo."
Acts7:57 Badanduluka ke ngezwi elikhulu, bazivingca iindlebe zabo, besuka bemka phezu kwakhe ngamxhelo mnye,"
Acts7:58 bamkhuphela ngaphandle komzi, bamgibisela ngamatye. Amangqina azibeka iingubo zawo ezinyaweni zendodana egama linguSawule."
Acts7:59 Ayemgibisela ngamatye uStefano, yena ebiza esithi, Nkosi Yesu, wamkele umoya wam."
Acts7:60 Waguqa ngamadolo, wadanduluka ngezwi elikhulu, esithi, Nkosi, musa ukubabeka tyala ngesi sono. Akutsho walala ubuthongo."
Acts8:1 Waye ke uSawule ekuthakazela ukufa kwakhe. Ke kaloku kwehla ngelo xesha intshutshiso enkulu phezu kwalo ibandla eliseYerusalem; baye bonke baba ziintsali kulo lonke ilizwe lakwaYuda nelaseSamariya, kwasala abapostile bodwa."
Acts8:2 Aza amadoda amoyikayo uThixo amngcwaba uStefano, amenzela isijwili esikhulu."
Acts8:3 Waye ke uSawule elidlavula ibandla, engena kwizindlu ngezindlu, erhola amadoda kwanabafazi, ebafaka entolongweni."
Acts8:4 Bona ke ngoko ababeziintsali batyhutyha ilizwe, beshumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zelizwi."
Acts8:5 Wehla ke uFilipu, waya emzini welaseSamariya, wamvakalisa kubo uKristu."
Acts8:6 Zaye izihlwele zizinyamekela ngamxhelo mnye izinto ezibe zithethwa nguFilipu, ekuyiveni nasekuyiboneni kwazo imiqondiso abeyenza."
Acts8:7 Kuba oomoya abangcolileyo babephuma kwinto eninzi ebinabo, bebhomboloza ngezwi elikhulu; yathi ke into eninzi enedumbe neziziqhwala yaphiliswa."
Acts8:8 Kwabakho uvuyo olukhulu kuloo mzi.
Acts8:9 Ke kaloku bekukho ndoda ithile, kuthiwa nguSimon, eyayifudula ithakatha kuloo mzi, ibetha abantu baseSamariya, isithi yona ngokwayo inguthile omkhulu;"
Acts8:10 ababeyiphulaphula bonke, bethabathela komncinane besa komkhulu, besithi, Lo ungamandla kaThixo amakhulu."
Acts8:11 Baye ke bemphulaphula, ngenxa yokuba ixesha elide wabetha bee nqa ngobunyangi bakhe."
Acts8:12 Xenikweni ke bakholwayo nguFilipu, eshumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zezinto zobukumkani bukaThixo, nezegama likaYesu Kristu, babhaptizwa amadoda kwanabafazi."
Acts8:13 Naye uSimon wakholwa, waza akuba ebhaptiziwe, wahlala enoFilipu. Wamangaliswa yimimangaliso nemiqondiso eyayisenzeka."
Acts8:14 Ke kaloku, bakuva abapostile ababeseYerusalem ukuba abaseSamariya balamkele ilizwi likaThixo, bathumela kubo uPetros noYohane;"
Acts8:15 abathi bona bakuhla, babathandazela, ukuba bamkele uMoya oyiNgcwele;"
Acts8:16 (Kuba ebengekaweli namnye kubo; babebhaptizwe nje egameni leNkosi uYesu.)
Acts8:17 Baza bababeka izandla, bamamkela ke uMoya oyiNgcwele."
Acts8:18 Uthe ke uSimon, akubona ukuba ngokubekwa kwezandla zabapostile uyanikwa uMoya oyiNgcwele, wezisa kubo imali,"
Acts8:19 esithi, Ndinikeni nam eli gunya, ukuze lowo, ndithe ndazibeka izandla phezu kwakhe, amkele uMoya oyiNgcwele."
Acts8:20 Uthe ke uPetros kuye, Isilivere yakho mayiye kutshabalala nawe; ngokuba ubusiba isipho sikaThixo singazuzwa ngemali."
Acts8:21 Akunasabelo naqashiso kulo mbandela, kuba intliziyo yakho ayithe tye emehlweni kaThixo."
Acts8:22 Guquka ngoko kobo bubi bakho, ukhunge kuThixo, ukuba ingathi mhlawumbi ixolelwe ingcingane yentliziyo yakho."
Acts8:23 Kuba ndiyabona ukuba usenyongweni yobukrakra, nasentanjeni yentswela-bulungisa."
Acts8:24 Waphendula ke uSimon wathi, Ndikhungeleni nina eNkosini, ukuze ndingahlelwa nanye yezo zinto nizithethileyo."
Acts8:25 Bona ke, bakuba beqononondisile, belithetha ilizwi leNkosi, babuya beza eYerusalem; kanjalo imizi emininzi yelaseSamariya bayishumayeza iindaba ezilungileyo."
Acts8:26 Ke kaloku kwathetha isithunywa seNkosi kuFilipu, sisithi, Suka usinge ezantsi, ngendlela ehla ivela eYerusalem, eya eGaza, yona iyintlango."
Acts8:27 Wesuka ke, wahamba, kwaye kukho indoda engumTiyopiya, ithenwa, igunya likaKandase ukumkanikazi wamaTiyopiya, eliphethe bonke ubutyebi bakhe, elibe lize kunqula eYerusalem;"
Acts8:28 Yayibuya ke, ihleli enqwelweni yayo, ilesa incwadi yomprofeti uIsaya."
Acts8:29 Uthe ke uMoya kuFilipu, Yiya ukhwele kule nqwelo."
Acts8:30 Wabaleka ke uFilipu, waya kuyo, wayiva ilesa incwadi yomprofeti uIsaya, wathi, Uyaziqonda na kodwa izinto ozilesayo?"
Acts8:31 Ithe ke yona, Ndingaba nako ngani na, kungekho undikhokelayo nje? Kanjalo yamcela uFilipu ukuba akhwele ahlale nayo."
Acts8:32 Ke kaloku indawo yesibhalo eyayilesa yona ibisithi, Njengemvu esiwa ekuxhelweni; nanjengemvana esisimumu phambi komchebi wayo, wenjenjalo ukungawuvuli umlomo wakhe."
Acts8:33 Ekuthotyweni kwakhe umgwebo wakhe wasuswa. Ngubani na ke owosixela isizukulwana sakhe? ngokuba buyasuswa ubomi bakhe emhlabeni.
Acts8:34 Laphendula ke ithenwa lathi kuFilipu, Ndiyakukhunga, umprofeti lo uyithetha ngabani na le nto; Ithetha yena, okanye mntu wumbi?"
Acts8:35 Wawuvula ke uFilipu umlomo wakhe, eqalela kweso sibhalo, walishumayeza iindaba ezilungileyo zikaYesu."
Acts8:36 Ke kaloku, xa babehamba ngendlela, bafika manzini athile; lathi ithenwa, Nanga amanzi; Kwala ntoni na ukuba ndingabhaptizwa?"
Acts8:37 Uthe ke uFilipu, Ukuba uyakholwa ngentliziyo yakho iphela, kuvumelekile. Waphendula ke wathi, Ndiyakholwa ukuba uYesu Kristu unguye uNyana kaThixo."
Acts8:38 Lathi mayime inqwelo; behla bobabini, baya emanzini, uFilipu kwanethenwa; wambhaptiza."
Acts8:39 Xeshikweni ke babenyukile, baphuma emanzini, uMoya weNkosi wamthi xwi uFilipu; alaba sambona ithenwa, kuba lalihamba ngeyalo indlela livuya."
Acts8:40 uFilipu ke wafunyanwa eAzoto, wayityhutyha imizi yonke, wayishumayeza iindaba ezilungileyo, wada wafika eKesareya."
Acts9:1 Ke kaloku uSawule, esabafuthela ngezigrogriso nokubabulala abafundi beNkosi, waya kumbingeleli omkhulu."
Acts9:2 Wacela kuye iincwadi zokuya eDamasko ezindlwini zesikhungu, ukuze athi, ethe wafumana abathile bale Ndlela, amadoda kwanabafazi, abazise bekhonkxiwe eYerusalem."
Acts9:3 Kuthe ke ekuhambeni kwakhe, wasondela eDamasko; waza ngesiquphe wabanekelwa ngeenxa zonke lukhanyiso oluvela ezulwini."
Acts9:4 Wawa emhlabeni, weva ilizwi lisithi kuye, Sawule, Sawule, unditshutshiselani na?"
Acts9:5 Wathi ke yena, Ungubani na, Nkosi? Ithe ke iNkosi, Mna ndinguye uYesu omtshutshisayo wena; wenzakala ukuba ukhabe iimviko nje."
Acts9:6 Waza egubha, eqhiphuke umbilini, wathi, Nkosi, ufuna ukuba ndenze ntoni na? Ithe ke iNkosi kuye, Vuka, uye kuwo umzi; woyixelelwa into omelwe kukuyenza."
Acts9:7 Ke kaloku amadoda abehamba naye ema engenakuthetha, eliva okunene lona izwi, kodwa engaboni mntu."
Acts9:8 Wavuka uSawule emhlabeni; Uthe ke avuleka amehlo, akabona mntu; bamrhola ke ngesandla, bamngenisa eDamasko."
Acts9:9 Kwaba ntathu iintsuku engaboni, engadli, engaseli."
Acts9:10 Ke kaloku bekukho mfundi uthile eDamasko, ugama linguHananiya; yathi iNkosi kuye embonweni, Hananiya! Wathi ke yena, Ndilapha, Nkosi."
Acts9:11 Ithe ke iNkosi kuye, Phakama, uye esitratweni ekuthiwa sesithe Tye, ubuzise endlwini kaYuda lowo kuthiwa nguSawule, waseTarso; kuba nanko ethandaza;"
Acts9:12 Ubone embonweni indoda egama linguHananiya, ingena, imbeka isandla, ukuze abuye abone."
Acts9:13 Waphendula ke uHananiya wathi, Nkosi, ndivile kwabaninzi ngale ndoda, ukuba zininzi kwazo izinto ezimbi ezenze kwabangcwele bakho eYerusalem;"
Acts9:14 Nalapha, inegunya kubabingeleli abakhulu lokukhonkxa bonke abo balinqulayo igama lakho."
Acts9:15 Yathi ke kuye iNkosi, Hamba uhambe; ngokuba lowo usisitya esinyuliweyo kum, sokuphatha igama lam phambi kweentlanga, nookumkani, noonyana bakaSirayeli;"
Acts9:16 kuba mna ndiya kumbonisa ukuba zinkulu kwezinto ezinzima, amelwe kukubandezeleka ngazo ngenxa yegama lam."
Acts9:17 Wemka ke uHananiya, waya kungena endlwini; Wabeka izandla phezu kwakhe, wathi, Sawule, mzalwana, indithumile iNkosi uYesu, ebonakeleyo kuwe endleleni oze ngayo, ukuze ubuye ubuye ubone, uzaliswe nguMoya oyiNgcwele."
Acts9:18 Kwangoko kwawa emehlweni akhe okungamaxolo, wabuya wabona kwaoko, wavuka, wabhaptizwa."
Acts9:19 Ekudleni kwakhe, womelela. Ke kaloku uSawule waba neentsuku ezithile nabafundi baseDamasko."
Acts9:20 Waye kwaoko, ezindlwini zesikhungu, emvakalisa uYesu, ukuba lowo unguye uNyana kaThixo."
Acts9:21 Bathi nqa ke bonke ababemva, bathi; Lo asinguye na owababhuqa eYerusalem abo babelinqula eli gama, weza nalapha ngenjongo, ukuba abase bekhonkxiwe kubabingeleli abakhulu?"
Acts9:22 Kwaba kukhona womelelayo uSawule; wabetha adubadubeka amaYuda abemi eDamasko, ebonakalalisa ukuba lo nguye uKristu."
Acts9:23 Ke kaloku, kwakuzaliseka imihla eyaneleyo, abhunga amaYuda ukuba amsike."
Acts9:24 Kodwa iyelenqe lawo laziwa nguSawule. Awagcina ke namasango imini nobusuku, ukuba amsike."
Acts9:25 Bamthabatha ke abafundi ebusuku, bamhlisa ngodonga, bemthoba ngengobozi."
Acts9:26 Ke kaloku, akufika uSawule eYerusalem, wamana elinga ukuzibandakanya nabafundi; kodwa bamoyika bonke, bengakholwa ukuba ungumfundi."
Acts9:27 uBharnabhas ke wamthabatha wamsa kubapostile, wabacacisela ukuyibona kwakhe iNkosi endleleni, nokuba yathetha naye, nokuthetha kwakhe ngokungafihlisiyo eDamasko egameni likaYesu."
Acts9:28 Waye enabo ke, engena ephuma eYerusalem."
Acts9:29 Waza wathetha ngokungafihlisiyo egameni leNkosi uYesu, ephikisana namaYuda amaGrike. Babefuna ukumbulala."
Acts9:30 Bekwazile ke oko abazalwana, bamhlisela eKesareya, bamthumela eTarso."
Acts9:31 Laye ke ngoko ibandla kulo lonke elakwaYuda, nelaseGalili, nelaseSamariya, linoxolo, lisakheka. Baye behamba beyoyika iNkosi, besanda ngentuthuzelo yoMoya oyiNgcwele."
Acts9:32 Ke kaloku, akuba uPetros etyhutyha iindawo zonke, wehla weza nakwabangcwele ababemi eLida."
Acts9:33 Wafumana ke khona umntu othile, ogama linguEneya, eminyaka isibhozo elele elukhukweni enedumbe."
Acts9:34 Wathi ke uPetros kuye, Eneya, uyakuphilisa uYesu Kristu; vuka, wandlule. Wavuka kwangoko."
Acts9:35 Bambona bonke abemiyo eLida naseSaron, baguqukela eNkosini."
Acts9:36 Ke kaloku, eYopa kwakukho mfundikazi uthile, ugama linguTabhita, ekuthiwa ngentetho evakalayo nguDorkas;"
Acts9:37 Kwathi ke ngaloo mihla, wahliwa sisifo, wafa; bathe ke bakuba bemhlambile, bambeka egumbini eliphezulu."
Acts9:38 Ke kaloku iLida ibikufuphi nje neYopa; bathi abafundi, bevile ukuba uPetros ukhona, bathuma amadoda amabini kuye, bembongoza ukuba eze kubo, angalibali."
Acts9:39 Wesuka ke uPetros wahamba nabo. Efikile, bamsa egumbini eliphezulu; bema ngakuye bonke abahlolokazi, belila, bembonisa iingubo zangaphantsi nezokwaleka abezenza uDorkas oko ebenabo."
Acts9:40 uPetros wabakhuphela phandle bonke, waguqa wathandaza; wamjikela emzimbeni, wathi, Tabhita, vuka. Yawavula ke amehlo ayo, yathi yakumbona uPetros, yavuka yathi nkqo."
Acts9:41 Waza wambamba ngesandla, wamphakamisa, wababiza abangcwele nabahlolokazi, wammisa phambi kwabo ehleli."
Acts9:42 Kwazeka oko kuyo yonke iYopa; bakholwa eNkosini into eninzi.
Acts9:43 Uthe ke wahlala imihla emininzi eYopa kunye noSimon uthile, umsuki wezikhumba."
Acts10:1 Kwakukho ndoda ithile eKesareya, ekuthiwa nguKorneli, umthetheli-khulu webutho elibizwa ngokuba libutho lamaTaliyane,"
Acts10:2 emoyikayo uThixo, kunye nayo yonke indlu yakhe, ibaliza abantu;"
Acts10:3 Yabona embonweni kakuhle, malunga nelixa lesithoba lenini, kufika kuyo isithunywa sikaThixo, sisithi kuyo, Korneli!"
Acts10:4 Eqwalasele ke kuso, wangenelwa kukoyika, wathi, Yintoni na, Nkosi? Uthe ke yena kuye, Imithandazo yakho namalizo akho anyukile, aba sisikhumbuzo phambi koThixo."
Acts10:5 Thumela ngoku amadoda eYopa, ubize uSimon, ogama limbi linguPetros;"
Acts10:6 yena ulundwendwe lukaSimon, umsuki wezikhumba, ondlu ingaselwandle; yena lowo uya kukuxelela into omelwe kukuyenza."
Acts10:7 Ke kaloku, sakuba simkile isithunywa eso besithetha noKorneli, wabiza zazibini kwizicaka zakhe zasendlwini, nesoldati elimhlonelayo uThixo kwabehlala ehleli naye;"
Acts10:8 Uthe ke, ebacacisele zonke ezi ndawo, wabathuma eYopa."
Acts10:9 Ke kaloku ngengomso, bakubon’ ukuba basendleleni bona, besondela kuwo umzi, wenyuka uPetros, waya phezu kwendlu, malunga nelixa lesithandathu, ukuba athandaze."
Acts10:10 Wesuka walamba kakhulu, wanga angakhe adle;"
Acts10:11 Walibona izulu livulekile, kusihla kuye isitya esithile, ngathi yilinen enkulu ebotshwe ngamasondo omane, sithotyelwa emhlabeni."
Acts10:12 Ekwaye kukho kuzo zonke izinto zomhlaba ezizitho zine, namarhamncwa, nezinambuzane, neentaka zezulu."
Acts10:13 Kwabakho nezwi kuye lisithi, Vuka, Petros; xhela, udle."
Acts10:14 Uthe ke uPetros, Hayi, Nkosi; kuba yonke into eyinqambi, nokuba yengcolileyo, andizanga ndiyidle."
Acts10:15 Labuya ilizwi okwesibini lisithi kuye, Izinto azihlambululeyo uThixo, musa ukuzenza iinqambi wena."
Acts10:16 Kwabakho ke oku kathathu; sabuya isitya eso senyuswa, sasiwa ezulwini."
Acts10:17 Ke kaloku, xa uPetros wayethingaza ngaphakathi kwakhe, ukuba ungaba uyintoni na umbono lowo awubonileyo, kwasuka kwathi gqi amadoda abethunyiwe evela kuKorneli, ebuza ngendlu kaSimon, emi esangweni."
Acts10:18 Akhwaza ebuza ukuba uSimon, ogama limbi linguPetros, ulundwendwe apha na."
Acts10:19 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba uPetros uyacinga ngawo umbono lowo, wathi uMoya kuye, Nanga amadoda amathathu ekufuna;"
Acts10:20 Vuka ngoko, uhle, uhambe nawo, ungathandabuzi nto, kuba athunywe ndim."
Acts10:21 Wehla ke uPetros, waya kuwo amadoda abethunyiwe kuye evela kuKorneli; wathi, Niyabona, ndingulowo nimfunayo;"
Acts10:22 Bathe ke bona, uKorneli umthetheli-khulu, indoda elilungisa, emoyikayo uThixo, engqinelwe kakuhle lulo lonke uhlanga lwamaYuda, uhlatyelwe nguThixo ngesithunywa esingcwele, ukuba akuthumele endlwini yakhe, eve amazwi alungileyo, wena."
Acts10:23 Wababizela phakathi ngoko, aba lundwendwe lwakhe. Ngengomso uPetros wemka nawo, nabazalwana abathile baseYopa bahamba naye."
Acts10:24 Ngengomsomnye bangena eKesareya. Waye ke uKorneli ebalindile; wayebizele ndawonye imizalwane yakhe, nezihlobo ezisondeleyo."
Acts10:25 Uthe ke akungena uPetros, uKorneli wamhlangabeza, wawa ezinyaweni zakhe, waqubuda kuye."
Acts10:26 uPetros ke wamvusa, esithi: “Phakama! nam ngokwam ndingumntu."
Acts10:27 Wangena ethetha naye, wabafumana bebuthelene bebaninzi;"
Acts10:28 Uthe ke kubo, Niyazi kakuhle nina, ukuba akusesikweni ukuthi indoda engumYuda inamathele isondele kowolunye uhlanga; ke yena uThixo undibonisile, ukuba ndingabizi mntu ngokuthi uyinqambi, ungongcolileyo."
Acts10:29 Kungoko ke ndizileyo ndingaphikanga ndakubizwa. Ndiyabuza ngoko, ukuba nindibize ngandawoni na?"
Acts10:30 uKorneli wathi, Kuse kuntsuku ne ndizila ukudla, kwada kwaleli lixa lemini. Ngelixa lesithoba ke bendithandaza endlwini yam, kwesuka kwathi gqi indoda, yema phambi kwam, inengubo eqaqambileyo;"
Acts10:31 Yathi, Korneli, umthandazo wakho uviwe, namalizo akho akhunjulwe phambi koThixo."
Acts10:32 Thumela ngoko eYopa, ubize eze uSimon, ogama limbi linguPetros; yena ulundwendwe endlwini kaSimon, umsuki wezikhumba ngaselwandle; oya kuthi akufika athethe nawe."
Acts10:33 Ndithumele ngoko kwaoko kuwe; wenze kakuhle ngokufika kwakho. Ke ngoko sikho sonke apha phambi koThixo, ukuze sive zonke izinto ozimiselweyo nguThixo."
Acts10:34 Wawuvula ke uPetros umlomo wakhe, wathi, Ndiyaqiqa okwenyaniso ukuba uThixo akamkhethi wabuso bamntu;"
Acts10:35 kwiintlanga zonke, lowo umoyikayo, asebenze ubulungisa, wamkelekile kuye."
Acts10:36 Ilizwi elo walithumelayo koonyana bakaSirayeli, eshumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zoxolo ngoYesu Kristu, (nguye iNkosi yabo bonke);"
Acts10:37 Elo lizwi lavakala kulo lonke elakwaJuda, elaqalwa kwelaseGalili, emva kobhaptizo awayelushumayela ngoYohane:"
Acts10:38 okokuba uThixo wamthambisa njani uYesu waseNazarete ngoMoya oyiNgcwele nangamandla, owatyhutyha ilizwe, esenza okulungileyo, ephilisa bonke ababecinezelwe nguMtyholi; ngokuba uThixo ubenaye."
Acts10:39 Thina singamangqina azo zonke izinto awazenzayo ezweni lamaYuda, kwanaseYerusalem; abambulalayo, bamxhoma emthini;"
Acts10:40 Lowo uThixo wamvusa ngomhla wesithathu, wambeka ekuhleni;"
Acts10:41 kungekhona kubo bonke abantu, kodwa kumangqina awayenyulwe ngenxa engaphambili nguThixo: kuthi ke thina, sadlayo sasela naye emveni kokuvuka kwakhe kwabafileyo."
Acts10:42 Wasiyalela ke, ukuba sishumayele ebantwini, singqine ukuba yena nguye omisiweyo nguThixo, ukuba abe ngumgwebi wabaphilileyo nabafileyo."
Acts10:43 Ngaye bonke abaprofeti bangqina ngaye ukuba ngegama lakhe bonke abakholwayo kuye bofumana uxolelo lwezono.
Acts10:44 Kwathi, esathetha uPetros la mazwi, wasuka wabawela uMoya oyiNgcwele bonke ababeliva ilizwi."
Acts10:45 Bamangaliswa ke abolwaluko, ababeze noPetros, ngokuba isipho soMoya oyiNgcwele sathululwa naphezu kweentlanga;"
Acts10:46 kuba aziva zithetha ngalwimi zimbi, zimenza mkhulu uThixo. Waphendula ke uPetros wathi,"
Acts10:47 Kukho unako yini na ukuthintela amanzi, ukuba bangabhaptizwa aba bamamkeleyo uMoya oyiNgcwele, kwanjengathi nje?"
Acts10:48 Waza ke wabayalela ukuba babhaptizwe egameni leNkosi. Bamcela ngoko ukuba akhe ahlale iintsuku ezithile.
Acts11:1 Ke kaloku abapostile nabazalwana ababekwelakwaYuda beva ukuba nazo iintlanga zilamkele ilizwi likaThixo.
Acts11:2 Ke kaloku, akuba enyuke uPetros waya eYerusalem, babambana naye abolwaluko,"
Acts11:3 besithi, Uye wangena kumadoda angalukileyo, wadla nawo."
Acts11:4 uPetros wayithetha ke loo nto kwasekuqalekeni, wabacacisela ngokomthetho, esithi,"
Acts11:5 Mna ndandikwisixeko saseYopa ndithandaza, ndabona ethongweni umbono, kusihla isitya esithile, ngathi yilinen enkulu, ithotywa ezulwini ngamasondo omane, yafika ke nakum."
Acts11:6 Ndithe ndakuqwalasela kuyo, ndakuqwalasela kuyo, ndabona izinto zomhlaba ezizitho zine, namarhamncwa, nezinambuzane, neentaka zezulu."
Acts11:7 Ndeva ilizwi lisithi kum, Vuka, Petros; xhela utye."
Acts11:8 Ndithe ke mna, Hayi, Nkosi; ngokuba yonke into eyinqambi, nokuba yengcolileyo, ayizanga ingene emlonyeni wam."
Acts11:9 Landiphendula ke ilizwi okwesibini, liphuma ezulwini, lathi, Izinto azihlambululeyo uThixo, musa ukuzenza iinqambi wena."
Acts11:10 Kwabakho ke oku kathathu, zaza zonke ezo nto zabuya zarholelwa ezulwini."
Acts11:11 Gqi, kwaoko amadoda amathathu, esele efikile endlwini ebendikuyo, esuswe eKesareya ukuba eze kum."
Acts11:12 Wathi ke uMoya kum, mandihambe nawo, ndingathandabuzi nto. Bahamba nam ke aba bazalwana bathandathu, sangena endlwini yendoda leyo."
Acts11:13 Yasichazela ukuba yasibona isithunywa sezulu endlwini yayo, simi sathi kuyo, Thuma amadoda eYopa, aye kubiza uSimon, ogama limbi linguPetros;"
Acts11:14 oya kuthetha kuwe amazwi, owosindiswa ngawo wena nayo yonke indlu yakho."
Acts11:15 Ke kaloku, ndakuba ndithetha, uMoya oyiNgcwele wabawela, njengoko wehlayo nathi ekuqaleni."
Acts11:16 Ndakhumbula ke izwi leNkosi lokokuba ibithe, uYohane okunene wabhaptiza ngamanzi; kodwa nina niya kubhaptizwa ngoMoya oyiNgcwele."
Acts11:17 Kaloku uThixo wabapha isipho esifana neso wasiphayo nathi thina sakholwayo kwiNkosi uYesu Krestu. Bendiyintoni na mna, ukuba ndingade ndimchase uThixo?"
Acts11:18 Bakuziva ke ezo zinto, bathi cwaka, bamzukisa uThixo, besithi, Kanti na ke neentlanga ezi uThixo uziphe ukuguqukela ebomini."
Acts11:19 Abo ke babeziintsali ngembandezelo eyabakho ngoStefano, batyhutyha ilizwe, bada beza kwelaseFenike, naseSipro, nakwa-Antiyokwe, bengalithethi bantwini bambi, belithetha kumaYuda odwa."
Acts11:20 Yaye ke inxenye kubo ingamadoda aseSipro naseKirene; eyathi yona yakufika kwa-Antiyokwe, yathetha kwawesiGrike amaYuda, ishumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zeNkosi uYesu."
Acts11:21 Saye isandla seNkosi sinabo, laza lakholwa into eninzi, yabuyela eNkosini."
Acts11:22 Lwavakala ke udaba lwabo ezindlebeni zebandla laseYerusalem; bakhupha uBharnabhas, ukuba ahambe, aye kufika kwa-Antiyokwe;"
Acts11:23 Othe akufika, walubona ubabalo lukaThixo, wavuya, wabavuselela bonke, ukuba bathi ngengqibo yentliziyo bahlale bethe nca eNkosini."
Acts11:24 Ngokuba ebeyindoda elungileyo, ezele nguMoya oyiNgcwele nalukholo. Kongezelelwa eNkosini inani elaneleyo."
Acts11:25 Wemka ke uBharnabhas, waya eTarso, esiya kufuna uSawule;"
Acts11:26 Uthe akuba emfumene, wamsa kwa-Antiyokwe. Ke kaloku kwathi, umnyaka uphela, bahlangana nebandla, bafundisa inani elaneleyo. Kwaye abafundi babizwa ngokuba ngamaKristu kuqala kwa-Antiyokwe."
Acts11:27 Ke kaloku ngaloo mihla, kwehla abaprofeti, besuka eYerusalem, beza kwa-Antiyokwe."
Acts11:28 Kwesuka ke omnye wabo ogama linguAgabho, waqondisa ngaye uMoya ukuba kuza kubakho indlala enkulu kulo lonke elimiweyo; eyabakho ke ngemihla kaKlawudiyo Kesare."
Acts11:29 Kubo ke abafundi, njengoko uthile ebenabo ubutyebi, wathi elowo kubo wagqiba ukuthumela into yokubanceda abazalwana ababemi kwelakwaYuda;"
Acts11:30 Benjenjalo ke, bathumela kumadoda amakhulu ngesandla sikaBharnabhas noSawule."
Acts12:1 Ke kaloku, ngelo xesha uHerode ukumkani wabesa izandla abathile balo ibandla, ukuba abaphathe kakubi;"
Acts12:2 Wambulala ke uYakobi, umzalwana kaYohane, ngekrele."
Acts12:3 Uthe ke akubona ukuba oko kuwakholisile amaYuda, waqokela ngokubamba noPetros. Loo mihla yayiyimihla yezonka ezingenagwele."
Acts12:4 Akuba ke embambile, wamfaka entolongweni, wamnikela kumaqela amane amasoldati angamane, ukuba amgcine; engxamele ukumzisa ebantwini emva kwepasika."
Acts12:5 uPetros wayegcinwa entolongweni, kodwa ibandla laqhubeka limthandazela kuThixo."
Acts12:6 Xa ke uHerode wayeza kumkhupha, uPetros ngobo busuku wayelele phakathi kwamasoldati amabini, ekhonkxiwe ngemixokelelwane emibini; baye nabalindi beyigcinile intolongo phambi kwesango."
Acts12:7 Naso isithunywa seNkosi, sisithi gaga phezu kwakhe, kwakhanya nokukhanya entolongweni, sambetha ecaleni uPetros, samvusa, sisithi, Phakama ngokukhawuleza. Yawa imixokelelwane yakhe ezandleni zakhe."
Acts12:8 Sathi kuye isithunywa, Bhinqa, unxibe iimbadada zakho. Wenjenjalo ke. Athi kuye, Yambathisa ingubo yakho, undilandele."
Acts12:9 Waphuma ke, wamlandela; ebengazi ukuba iyinene le nto yenziweyo ngesithunywa sezulu; ebeba ke ubone umbono."
Acts12:10 Begqithile ke kwelokuqala nakwelesibini iqela labalindi, bafika esangweni lentsimbi elibhekisa kuwo umzi; eyabavulela yona ngoku iphumayo, baphuma ke, bahamba isitrato sasinye; semka kwaoko isithunywa eso kuye."
Acts12:11 Wathi uPetros akuziqonda, wathi, Ngoku ndiyazi okwenyaniso, ukuba iNkosi ithume isithunywa sayo, yandihlangula esandleni sikaHerode, nakuko konke ulindelo lwabantu bamaYuda."
Acts12:12 Eyibonile ke loo nto, waya kungena endlwini kaMariya, unina kaYohane, ogama limbi linguMarko, apho kwakuhlanganisene khona into eninzi ithandaza."
Acts12:13 Akubon’ ukuba ke unkqonkqozile uPetros elucangweni lwesango, kweza kuphulaphula isicakazana esigama linguRoda."
Acts12:14 Elazisile ilizwi likaPetros, akalivula isango, ngenxa yovuyo;"
Acts12:15 Bathi ke kuye, Uyageza. Kodwa wayesoloko eqinisekisa ukuba kunjalo. Bathi ke bona, Sisithunywa sakhe."
Acts12:16 Uthe ke uPetros wamana enkqonkqoza; bathi ke bakuluvula bambona, bathi nqa."
Acts12:17 Uwangawangisile ke ngesandla kubo, ukuba bathi cwaka, wabacacisela ukumkhupha kwayo iNkosi entolongweni. Wathi ke, Babikeleni ooYakobi nabazalwana ezi zinto. Waphuma waya kwenye indawo."
Acts12:18 Ke kaloku, kwakusa, ayibanga ncinane inkathazeko phakathi kwamasoldati, yokuba angaba utheni na uPetros."
Acts12:19 Uthe ke uHerode, akuba emfuna engamfumani, wabancina abalindi, wathi makumkiwe nabo, baye kubulawa. Wehla kwelakwaYuda, waya eKesareya, wahlala khona."
