Acts12:20 Ke kaloku uHerode wayebaqumbele kakhulu abaseTire nabaseTsidon. Beza ke kuye bemxhelo mnye, bathi, bemthomalalisile uBlasto, obephethe igumbi lokulala ukumkani, bazicelela uxolo; ngokuba ilizwe labo belisondliwa lilizwe lokumkani."
Acts12:21 Ke kaloku uHerode, ngemini emisiweyo, ambethe ingubo yobukumkani, wahlala etroneni yakhe, wawisa ukuthetha kwakhe kubo."
Acts12:22 Baduma ke abantu, besithi, Lilizwi lothixo elo, asilamntu."
Acts12:23 Samthi qwaka ke kwaoko isithunywa seNkosi, ngenxa enokuba engamzukisanga uThixo; wadliwa ziimpethu, waphuma umphefumlo."
Acts12:24 Laye ke likhula, lisanda ilizwi likaThixo."
Acts12:25 Ke kaloku uBharnabhas noSawule babuya eYerusalem, belufezile ulungiselelo olo, bethabathe nabo uYohane, ogama limbi linguMarko."
Acts13:1 Ke kaloku, kwa-Antiyokwe kwakukho abaprofeti nabafundisi abathile ebandleni, njengoBharnabhas, noSimon ekuthiwa nguNigere, noLukiyo waseKirene, noManayen owayondlwa noHerode umphathi wesahlulo sesine, noSawule."
Acts13:2 Bakubon’ ukuba ke bayabusa eNkosini, bezila ukudla, wathi uMoya oyiNgcwele, Ndahluleleni ke uBharnabhas kwanoSawule, baye emsebenzini endibabizele kuwo."
Acts13:3 Bathe ke, bakuba bezile ukudla, bathandaza, babeka nezandla phezu kwabo, babandulula."
Acts13:4 Bona ke ngoko, bakuthunywa nguMoya oyiNgcwele, behla baya kwaSeluki; besuka khona apho ngomkhombe, baya eSipro."
Acts13:5 Bathe bakufika eSalamis, balishumayela ilizwi likaThixo ezindlwini zesikhungu zamaJuda. BabenoYohane umlungiseleli wabo."
Acts13:6 Besigqibile ke isiqhithi, bada beza kufika ePafo, bafumana siyazi uthile, ungumprofeti wobuxoki, umYuda ogama linguBhar-yesu,"
Acts13:7 owayehlala kwibamba uSergiyo Pawulos, indoda enokuqonda; owababizela kuye ooBharnabhas noSawule, efuna ukuliva ilizwi likaThixo."
Acts13:8 Wamelana nabo ke uElima, usiyazi lowo (kuba litsho igama lakhe lakuthethwa ngentetho evakalayo), efuna ukulijika ibamba elukholweni."
Acts13:9 Waza uSawule, okwabizwa ngokuba nguPawulos, ezele nguMoya oyiNgcwele, wamjongisa kuye,"
Acts13:10 wathi, Wena uzeleyo yiyo yonke inkohliso, nabubo bonke ubutshijolo, nyanandini woMtyholi, lutshabandini lobulungisa bonke, akuyi kupheza na ukuzijika iindlela ezithe tye zeNkosi?"
Acts13:11 Uyabona, uyabona, isandla seNkosi siphezu kwakho; ùya kuba yimfama, kube mzuzu ungaliboni ilanga. Kwaoko wawelwa yinkungu nobumnyama; wayejikeleza, efuna abangamrhola ngesandla."
Acts13:12 Lithe ke ibamba, lakukubona oko kwenzekileyo, lakholwa, likhwankqisiwe yiyo imfundiso yeNkosi."
Acts13:13 Ke kaloku, bakunduluka ePafo, benduluka uPawulos neqela lakhe, beza ePerga yasePamfili. Wemka ke kubo uYohane, wabuyela eYerusalem."
Acts13:14 Bendulukile ke bona ePerga, batyhutyha beza kufika kwa-Antiyokwe kwelasePisidi. Bangena endlwini yesikhungo ngoMhla wokuPhumla, bahlala phantsi."
Acts13:15 Ke kaloku, emva kokufundwa komthetho nabaprofeti, abaphathi bendlu yesikhungu bathumela kubo, besithi, Madoda, bazalwana, ukuba ninelizwi lovuselelo olu ebantwini, thethani."
Acts13:16 Waphakama ke uPawulos, wawangawangisa ngesandla, wathi: “Madoda, maSirayeli, nani nimoyikayo uThixo, phulaphulani."
Acts13:17 uThixo waba bantu bakwaSirayeli wabanyula oobawo bethu, wabaphakamisa abantu ekuphambukeleni kwabo ezweni laseYiputa, wabakhupha kulo ngengalo ephakamileyo."
Acts13:18 Kwathi ngexesha eliyiminyaka engathi imashumi mane, wayithwala imikhwa yabo entlango."
Acts13:19 Wathi akuwisa iintlanga ezisixhenxe emhlabeni wakwaKanan, wababela umhlaba wazo ngeqashiso."
Acts13:20 Emva koko, iminyaka engathi imakhulu mane anamanci mahlanu, wabanika abagwebi, kwada kwakuSamuweli umprofeti."
Acts13:21 Emva koko bacela ukumkani, uThixo wabanika uSawule, unyana kaKishe, indoda yesizwe sakwaBhenjamin, iminyaka emashumi mane."
Acts13:22 Akuba ke emsusile, wabavelisela uDavide njengokumkani; awamngqinelayo kanjalo, wathi, Ndimfumene uDavide okaYese, indoda engantliziyo yam, eya kukwenza konke ukuthanda kwam."
Acts13:23 Embewini yalo mntu uthe uThixo ngokwedinga wavelisela uSirayeli uMsindisi uYesu;
Acts13:24 kwakubon’ ukuba uYohane uvakalise tanci, phambi kokungena kwakhe, ubhaptizo loguquko kubo bonke abantu bakwaSirayeli."
Acts13:25 Xa ke uYohane ebesekulufezeni uhambo lwakhe, ubesithi, Nithi nina ndingubani na? Andinguye. Kodwa, yabonani, uyeza emva kwam, endingafanelekileyo mna ukuba ndizithukulule iimbadada ezinyaweni zakhe."
Acts13:26 Madoda, bazalwana, nyana bomlibo wakwa-Abraham, nabo phakathi kwenu bamoyikayo uThixo, ilizwi lolu lusindiso lathunyelwa kuni."
Acts13:27 Kuba abo bemiyo eYerusalem, nabaphathi babo, bengamazanga lowo, kwanamazwi abaprofeti aleswayo iisabatha ngeesabatha zonke, bawazalisa ngokumgweba;"
Acts13:28 bathi, bengafumananga nalinye ityala lokufa, bacela kuPilato ukuba asikwe."
Acts13:29 Xa ke babezifezile zonke izinto ezibhaliweyo ngaye, bamthula emthini, bambeka engcwabeni."
Acts13:30 Kodwa uThixo wamvusa kwabafileyo.
Acts13:31 Yena lowo wabonwa imihla emininzi ngabo babenyuke naye, bevela kwelaseGalili besiya eYerusalem; ngabo ke abangamangqina akhe ebantwini."
Acts13:32 Nathi ke sinishumayeza iindaba ezilungileyo zokuba idinga elo labakho koobawo,"
Acts13:33 zokokuba uThixo ulizalisile lona kuthi, bantwana babo, ngokumvusa uYesu; njengokuba nakwiNdumiso yesibini kubhaliwe kwathiwa, UnguNyana wam wena, Mna ndikuzele namhla."
Acts13:34 Malunga ke nokumvusa kwakhe kwabafileyo, angabi sabuyela ekuboleni, uselethe ukuthetha, Ndiya kuninika iinceba eziqinisekileyo zikaDavide."
Acts13:35 Kungoko athi nakwenye iNdumiso, Akuyi kumyekela oyiNgcwele wakho ukuba abone ukubola."
Acts13:36 Kuba uDavide okunene, akuba elisebenzele kwesakhe isizukulwana icebo likaThixo, walala ubuthongo, wabekwa kooyise, wakubona ukubola;"
Acts13:37 Ke yena owavuswayo nguThixo, akabonanga kubola."
Acts13:38 Makwazeke ngoko kuni, madoda, bazalwana, ukuba ngaye lowo kuxelwa kuni uxolelo lwezono;"
Acts13:39 nakuzo zonke izinto ebeningenako ukugwetyelwa nikhululeke kuzo ngomthetho kaMoses, bonke abakholwayo bayagwetyelwa ngaye yena lowo."
Acts13:40 Lumkani ke, ningafikelwa koko kwathethwa ngako ebaprofetini."
Acts13:41 Khangelani, nina badeli, nimangaliswe, nitshabalale; ngokuba mna ndisebenza umsebenzi ngemihla yenu, Umsebenzi eningasayi kukholwa kuwo, nokuba kukho othi anicacisele."
Acts13:42 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba ayaphuma amaYuda endlwini yesikhungu, babongoza abeentlanga, ukuba la mazwi athethwe kubo ngesabatha ezayo."
Acts13:43 Sakubon’ ukuba ke sichithakele isikhungu, into eninzi yamaYuda neyabangene ebuYudeni, abamhlonelayo uThixo, yabalandela ooPawulos noBharnabhas;"
Acts13:44 Kuthe ke ngelandelayo isabatha, waphantsa ukuhlanganisana umzi wonke, ukuba ulive ilizwi likaThixo."
Acts13:45 Athe ke amaYuda, akuzibona izihlwele, azala ngumona, aziphika izinto ezibe zithethwa nguPawulos, aphika enyelisa."
Acts13:46 Bathetha ke ngokungafihlisiyo uPawulos noBharnabhas, bathi, Bekufanele ukuba lithethwe kuni kuqala ilizwi likaThixo; ekubeni ke nina nililahlile, nazigweba ukuba anibufanele ubomi obungunaphakade, niyabona, sibheka kuzo iintlanga."
Acts13:47 Kuba isiwisele umthetho ngokunjalo iNkosi, yathi, Ndikubekile ukuba ube lukhanyiselo lweentlanga, ukuze ube ngowosindiso, kude kuse ekupheleni kwehlabathi."
Acts13:48 Zakuva ke oko iintlanga, zavuya, zalizukisa ilizwi leNkosi, bakholwa bonke ababemiselwe ubomi obungunaphakade."
Acts13:49 Laye ke ilizwi leNkosi lihanjiswa kulo lonke ilizwe elo.
Acts13:50 Ke kaloku amaYuda abaxhokonxa abafazi ababehlonela uThixo, ababekekileyo, ababekekileyo, nabaninimzi; abaxhoxhela intshutshiso ooPawulos noBharnabhas, abakhupha emideni yawo."
Acts13:51 Bathe ke bona bawavuthululela uthuli lweenyawo zabo, beza eIkoniyo."
Acts13:52 Baye ke abafundi bezaliswe luvuyo nanguMoya oyiNgcwele.
Acts14:1 Ke kaloku kwathi eIkoniyo, bangena kunye kwindlu yesikhungu yamaYuda, bathetha ngokokude kukholwe inkitha enkulu yamaYuda kwanamaGrike."
Acts14:2 Asuka ke wona amaYuda angavumiyo ukuva, ayenza yamibi imiphefumlo yabeentlanga ngakubo abazalwana."
Acts14:3 Balibala ke ngoko ixesha elaneleyo, bethetha ngokungafihlisiyo ngeNkosi, eyalingqinelayo ilizwi lobabalo lwayo, inika nokuba kwenzeke imiqondiso nezimanga ngezandla zabo."
Acts14:4 Yahlulelana ke inkoliso yomzi, inxenye yangakumaYuda, inxenye yangakubapostile."
Acts14:5 Kuthe ke, kuthe kwabakho ukuhlasela kwabeentlanga, kwanamaYuda, kunye nabaphathi bawo, ukuba babaphathe kakubi, babagibisele ngamatye:"
Acts14:6 bakuqiqa oko bona, basabela emizini yelaseLikawoni, iListra neDerbhe, nakuloo mimandla;"
Acts14:7 Baye bezishumayela nalapho iindaba ezilungileyo.
Acts14:8 Ke kaloku eListra bekuhleli indoda ethile, ikhubazekile ezinyaweni zayo, isisiqhwala kwasesizalweni sikanina, engazange ihambe."
Acts14:9 Yona leyo yayimva uPawulos ethetha; owathi, eqwalasele kuyo, ebona ukuba inokholo lokusindiswa."
Acts14:10 Sathi ngezwi elikhulu, Yima, ume ngeenyawo zakho, uthi nkqo. Yatsiba, yahambahamba."
Acts14:11 Ke kaloku iindimbane, zakukubona oko akwenzileyo uPawulos, zaphakamisa izwi lazo ngokwesiLikawoni, zisithi, Oothixo bahlile beza kuthi, befana nabantu."
Acts14:12 Bambiza ke uBharnabhas ngokuthi nguZeyus; noPawulos ke, uMerkuriyo, ngenxa yokuba ebesisithethi esiyintloko."
Acts14:13 Kuthe ngoko umbingeleli kaZeyus, obephambi komzi wabo, wazisa iinkunzi zeenkomo nezidanga zeentyantyambo emasangweni, wafuna ukubingelela, kunye neendimbane."
Acts14:14 Bekuvile ke oko abapostile ooBharnabhas noPawulos, bazikrazula iingubo zabo, babalekela phakathi kwabantu, bedanduluka;"
Acts14:15 besithi, Madoda, yini na ukuba nenze ezi zinto? Nathi singabantu abeva enikuvayo nina; sinishumayeza iindaba ezilungileyo zokuba nibuye kwaba thixo bangento, nibuyele kuThixo ophilileyo, owenza izulu nomhlaba nolwandle, neento zonke ezikwezo zinto;"
Acts14:16 owathi kudala waziyeka zonke iintlanga, ukuba zihambe ngezazo iindlela;"
Acts14:17 Kambe ke noko akayekanga ukuzingqinela, esenza okulungileyo, esinika imvula evela ezulwini, namaxesha aneendyebo, ezanelisa iintliziyo zethu ngokudla nangemihlali."
Acts14:18 Besitsho, kwaba ngenkankulu ukuzidambisa iindimbane, ukuba zingabingeleli kubo."
Acts14:19 Ke kaloku kwafika amaYuda evela kwa-Antiyokwe naseIkoniyo, aza azixhokonxa iindimbane, amxuluba ngamatye uPawulos, amrholela ngaphandle komzi, eba ufile."
Acts14:20 Kodwa, bakubon’ ukuba bamngqongile ke abafundi, wavuka waya kungena kuwo umzi. Ngengomso waphuma enoBharnabhas, waya eDerbhe."
Acts14:21 Bakuba ke bezishumayele iindaba ezilungileyo kuloo mzi, befundisa abantu abaninzi, babuya beza eListra, naseIkoniyo, nakwa-Antiyokwe;"
Acts14:22 besomeleza imiphefumlo yabafundi, bebavuselela ukuba bahlale behleli elukholweni, nokokuba simelwe kukuphumela ezimbandezelweni ezininzi, ukungena ebukumkanini bukaThixo."
Acts14:23 Bathe ke bakuba benyule amadoda amakhulu kwibandla ngebandla, bethandazile kunye nokuzila ukudla, bawayaleza eNkosini awayekholwe kuyo."
Acts14:24 Betyhutyhe elasePisidi, bafika kwelasePamfili."
Acts14:25 Bathi, belithethile ilizwi ePerga, behla baya kwa-Atali."
Acts14:26 Besuka khona apho ngomkhombe, baya kwa-Antiyokwe, apho babenikelwe khona elubabalweni lukaThixo, ukuba baye emsebenzini, lo ke bawufezileyo."
Acts14:27 Befikile ke, balihlanganisela ndawonye ibandla, balibikela oko zingako izinto awazenzayo uThixo enabo, nokokuba iintlanga wazivulela ucango lokholo."
Acts14:28 Balibala ke khona apho ixesha elingelincinane, ndawonye nabafundi."
Acts15:1 Kwehla abathile bevela kwelakwaYuda, babafundisa abazalwana, besithi, Ukuba anithanga naluswe ngokwesiko likaMoses, aninako ukusindiswa."
Acts15:2 Kuthe ngoko, kwakubon’ ukuba uPawulos noBharnabhas baba nempikiswano nembuzwano engencinane nabo, kwagqitywa kwelokuba uPawulos noBharnabhas, nabanye abathile kubo, mabenyuke baye kubapostile namadoda amakhulu eYerusalem, ngawo lo mbuzo."
Acts15:3 Bathi ke, bephelekelelwe libandla, balityhutyha elaseFenike nelaseSamariya, bexela ukuguquka kwazo iintlanga; babanga uvuyo olukhulu kubo bonke abazalwana."
Acts15:4 Befikile ke eYerusalem, bamkelwa libandla nangabapostile nangamadoda amakhulu; kananjalo babika ukuba zinkulu kwazo izinto awazenzayo uThixo enabo."
Acts15:5 Kodwa kwesuka kwavuka amakholwa athile ehlelo labaFarisi, besithi, Mabaluke, nokuba bathethelwe ngelithi, mabawugcine umthetho kaMoses."
Acts15:6 Bahlanganisana ke abapostile namadoda amakhulu, ukuba bayikhangele loo ndawo."
Acts15:7 Ke kaloku, kwakubon’ ukuba kubekho imbuzwano enkulu, wesuka uPetros wathi kubo, Madoda, bazalwana, niyazi nina, ukuba uThixo kwangemihla yakudala wanyula phakathi kwethu, ukuba iintlanga zilive ngomlomo wam ilizwi leendaba ezilungileyo ezi, zihambe ngomlomo wam, kholwani."
Acts15:8 uThixo umazi-ntliziyo wazingqinela, ezinika uMoya oyiNgcwele kwanjengathi;"
Acts15:9 akacalula phakathi kwethu nazo, ezihlambulule iintliziyo zazo ngokholo."
Acts15:10 Ngoku ke nimlingelani na uThixo, ngokubeka idyokhwe entanyeni yabafundi, esibe singenamandla okuyithwala, thina kwanoobawo bethu?"
Acts15:11 Ke ngalo ubabalo lweNkosi uYesu Kristu, siyakholwa ukuba sosindiswa kwangohlobo ezisindiswa ngalo nazo."
Acts15:12 Yathi cwaka ke yonke inkitha yabantu, yaphulaphula ooBharnabhas noPawulos, becacisa oko yayingako imiqondiso nezimanga, awazenzayo uThixo phakathi kwazo iintlanga ngabo."
Acts15:13 Ke kaloku, emva kokuthi cwaka kwabo, waphendula uYakobi wathi, Madoda, bazalwana, ndiphulaphuleni."
Acts15:14 uSimon lo ukucacisile ukuba wathini na ekuqaleni uThixo ukuzivelela iintlanga, ukuba kuzo alinyulele abantu elakhe igama."
Acts15:15 Ayavumelana nako oko amazwi abaprofeti; njengoko kubhaliwe kwathiwa,"
Acts15:16 Emva koko ndiya kubuya ndize ndibuye ndiwakhe umnquba owileyo kaDavide, ndiya kubuya ndiwakhe amanxuwa ayo, ndiyimise;"
Acts15:17 Okokuze amaqongqolo abantu ayifune iNkosi, Kwaneentlanga zonke ezibizwe ngalo igama lam; Itsho iNkosi, leyo izenzayo zonke ezi zinto."
Acts15:18 Iyaziwa ke nguThixo kuselokwaphakade yonke imisebenzi yakhe.
Acts15:19 Ngoko ke mna ndithi, masingabakhathazi abo baphuma ezintlangeni babuyela kuThixo;"
Acts15:20 kodwa masibabhalele ukuba bazikhwebule kwizingcoliso zezithixo, nombulo, nento ekrwitshiweyo, negazi."
Acts15:21 Kuba uMosis kwakudala unabamvakalisayo kwimizi ngemizi, eleswa ezindlwini zesikhungu ezi iisabatha ngeesabatha."
Acts15:22 Kwalunga ke abapostile namadoda amakhulu, kunye nebandla liphela, ukuba banyule amadoda phakathi kwabo, ukuba baye kwa-Antiyokwe kunye noPawulos noBharnabhas; noYuda ogama limbi linguBharsabhas, noSilas, amadoda aziintloko phakathi kwabazalwana."
Acts15:23 Babhala ke iincwadi ngesandla ngabo; Abapostile namadoda amakhulu nabazalwana bayabulisa kubo abazalwana basezintlangeni, kwa-Antiyokwe, naseSiriya, naseKiliki;"
Acts15:24 Ngenxa yokuba sivile ukuba abathile baphuma kuthi banikhathaza ngamazwi, beyiqweqwedisa imiphefumlo yenu, besithi, Naluke, niwugcine umthetho, thina singabawiselanga mthetho unjalo."
Acts15:25 Kwabonakala kulungile kuthi, simxhelo mnye, ukuba sinyule amadoda kuni, kunye neentanda zethu, uBharnabhas noPawulos;"
Acts15:26 abantu ababuncamileyo ubomi babo ngenxa yegama leNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu.
Acts15:27 Sibathumile ngoko ooYuda noSilas, abothi nabo banibikele ezi ndawo ngomlomo."
Acts15:28 Kuba kwabonakala kulungile kuye uMoya oyiNgcwele, nakuthi, ukuba kungabekwa phezu kwenu mthwalo ungaphezu kwezo zifunekayo;"
Acts15:29 zokuba nizile izinto ezibingelelwe kwizithixo, negazi, nento ekrwitshiweyo, nombulo; enothi nakuzigcina kuzo, nibe niyalungisa, nihambe kakuhle."
Acts15:30 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba bayenduluka ke, beza kwa-Antiyokwe;"
Acts15:31 Bathe ke bona bakuba balesa, bavuya ngenxa yothuthuzeleko olo."
Acts15:32 Ke kaloku ooYuda noSilas, bengabaprofeti nabo, babakhuthaza abazalwana ngokuthetha okukhulu, babomeleza."
Acts15:33 Bakuba ke benze ixesha, banduluka bexolile kubazalwana, baya kubapostile."
Acts15:34 Kodwa kuSilas kwabonakala kulungile ukuba akhe ahlale khona.
Acts15:35 Balibala ke ooPawulos noBharnabhas kwa-Antiyokwe, befundisa, beshumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zelizwi leNkosi, kwanabanye abaninzi."
Acts15:36 Ke kaloku emva kwemihla ethile, wathi uPawulos kuBharnabhas, Makhe sibuye siye kuvelela abazalwana bethu kuyo yonke imizi esalazisa kuyo ilizwi leNkosi, sibone ukuba banjani na."
Acts15:37 Ke kaloku uBharnabhas wangxamela ukuba bathabathe nabo uYohane, ogama limbi linguMarko;"
Acts15:38 kodwa uPawulos wathi akufanelekile ukumthabatha, ahambe nabo, lowo wemkayo kubo kwelasePamfili, akaya nabo emsebenzini."
Acts15:39 Kwabakho ingxabano enkulu phakathi kwabo, ngokokude bahlukane; uBharnabhas wamthabatha ke uMarko, wemka ngomkhombe, waya eSipro."
Acts15:40 uPawulos wanyula uSilas, wemka, enikelwe kubabalo lukaThixo ngabazalwana."
Acts15:41 Walityhutyha ke elaseSiriya nelaseKiliki, ewomeleza amabandla."
Acts16:1 Ke kaloku wafika eDerbhe naseListra. Kwabonakala kukho mfundi uthile apho, ugama linguTimoti, unyana wentokazi ethile engumYudakazi okholiweyo, kodwa uyise engumGrike; ke uyise yena engumGrike;"
Acts16:2 Ekungqinelwe kakuhle ngako ngabazalwana baseListra naseIkoniyo.
Acts16:3 Lowo uPawulos wathanda ukuba aphume naye; wamthabatha wamalusa, ngenxa yamaYuda abekwezo ndawo; kuba bonke babemazi uyise ukuba ungumGrike."
Acts16:4 Ke kaloku, xa babeyihamba imizi, babanikela imimiselo ukuba bayigcine, leyo ibimiswe ngabapostile namadoda amakhulu aseYerusalem."
Acts16:5 Ayezimaseka ke ngoko amabandla elukholweni, esanda ngenani imihla ngemihla."
Acts16:6 Ke kaloku, bakulityhutyha ilizwe laseFrigi nelaseGalati, balelwa nguMoya oyiNgcwele ukulithetha ilizwi kwelaseAsiya."
Acts16:7 Bakuba befikile eMisiya, balinga ukuya eBhithiniya, kodwa akabavumelanga uMoya."
Acts16:8 Badlula eMisiya behla baya eTrowa.
Acts16:9 Kwabonakala umbono kuPawulos ebusuku. Indoda ethile yaseMakedoni yayimi imbongoza isithi, Welela ngapha kwelaseMakedoni, usincede."
Acts16:10 Ke kaloku, akuwubona umbono lowo, saza ke sazabalazela ukuba siye kwelaseMakedoni, sigqibe kwelokuba iNkosi isibizele ukuba sibashumayeze iindaba ezilungileyo."
Acts16:11 Sindulukile ngoko eTrowa, seza ngqo eSamotraki, sathi ngengomso seza eNeyapoli;"
Acts16:12 ukusuka apho, seza eFilipi, owona mzi wokuqala wecala elo lilelaseMakedoni, uyikoloni, salibala ke kuloo mzi."
Acts16:13 NgoMhla wokuPhumla saphuma saya ngaphandle kwedolophu ngasemlanjeni, apho kuthandazwa khona; sahlala phantsi, sathetha kubafazi ababebuthelene khona."
Acts16:14 Yasiva intokazi ethile egama linguLidiya, umthengisi weengubo ezibomvu, womzi weTiyatira, emhlonelayo uThixo, entliziyo yayivulayo iNkosi ukuba izinyamekele izinto ezazithethwa nguPawulos."
Acts16:15 Ke kaloku, yakuba ibhaptiziwe nendlu yayo, yasibongoza isithi, Ukuba nithi ndikholiwe eNkosini, ngenani endlwini yam, nihlale khona. Wasinyanzela."
Acts16:16 Ke kaloku kwathi, kwakubon’ ukuba siyaya endaweni yokuthandaza, sahlangatyezwa sisicakazana esithile, sinomoya wemilozi; sona besizizuzisa iinkosi zaso inzuzo enkulu ngokuvumisa."
Acts16:17 Sona eso sithene mbende noPawulos nathi, samana sidanduluka sisithi, Aba bantu bangabakhonzi bakaThixo Osenyangweni, bona basazisayo indlela yosindiso."
Acts16:18 Oko sakwenza sona imihla emininzi. Ebindekile ke uPawulos, wathi guququ, wathi kuwo umoya, Ndiyakuthethela egameni likaYesu Kristu ukuba uphume kuso. Waphuma kwangelo lixa."
Acts16:19 Zithe ke iinkosi zayo, zakubona ukuba liphelile ithemba lenzuzo yawo, zabathabatha ooPawulos noSilas, zabarholela endaweni yembutho, phambi kwabaphathi;"
Acts16:20 Babazisa kubathetheli, besithi, Aba bantu bayawuphazamisa kakhulu umzi wethu, bengamaYuda;"
Acts16:21 Basifundisa amasiko ekungavumelekileyo ukuba siwamkele, nokuba siwenze, singamaRoma."
Acts16:22 Isihlwele sabahlanganyela; nabathetheli bazithi qwenge iingubo zabo, bathi mababethwe ngeentswazi."
Acts16:23 Bathi, bakuba bababethe imivumbo emininzi, babaphosa entolongweni, bamthethela umgcini wababanjwa ukuba abagcine ngokunqabileyo;"
Acts16:24 owathi, amkele umyalelo onjalo, wabaphosa kwengaphakathi intolongo, waziqinisa iinyawo zabo emithini."
Acts16:25 Ke kaloku, ezinzulwini zobusuku uPawulos noSilas babethandaza, bedumisa uThixo; yaye amabanjwa abeva ke."
Acts16:26 Kwabakho ke ngequbuliso unyikimo olukhulu lomhlaba, ngokokude zizanyazanyiswe iziseko zentolongo; zavuleka kwaoko iingcango zonke, athukululeka amakhamandela abo bonke."
Acts16:27 Ethe tyithi ke ebuthongweni umgcini wababanjwa, ebona iingcango zentolongo zivulekile, warhola ikrele, eza kuzibulala, eba ababanjwa babalekile."
Acts16:28 Wadanduluka ke uPawulos ngezwi elikhulu, esithi, Musa ukuzenzakalisi; kuba silapha sonke."
Acts16:29 Uthe ngoko, ebize izibane, waxhumela phakathi, egubha, wawa phambi koPawulos noSilas."
Acts16:30 Wabazisa phandle, wathi, Zinkosi, ndimelwe kukuthini na, ukuze ndisindiswe?"
Acts16:31 Bathi ke bona, Kholwa kuyo iNkosi uYesu Kristu, wosindiswa wena nendlu yakho."
Acts16:32 Balithetha kuye ilizwi leNkosi, nakubo bonke ababesendlwini yakhe."
Acts16:33 Wabathabatha ngelo lixa lobusuku, wayihlamba imivumbo yabo; babhaptizwa kwaoko, yena nabo bonke abakhe."
Acts16:34 Kananjalo, ebanyuse wabasa endlwini yakhe, wabeka ukudla phambi kwabo, wagcoba nendlu yakhe yonke, kuba ekholwa kuThixo."
Acts16:35 Kwakusa, abathetheli bathuma amadindala, besithi, Bakhulule abo bantu;"
Acts16:36 Uwaxelile ke umgcini wababanjwa la mazwi kuPawulos, wathi, Abathetheli bathumele ukuba nikhululwe; ke ngoko phumani, nihambe ngoxolo."
Acts16:37 Uthe ke uPawulos kuwo, Basityabule ekuhleni singagwetywanga, sibantu bangamaRoma; basiphosa entolongweni; ngoku basikhupha ngasese na? hayi inene; mabeze bona ngokwabo, basikhuphe."
Acts16:38 Awaxela ke la mazwi amadindala kubathetheli; boyika, bakuva ukuba bangamaRoma."
Acts16:39 Beza bababongoza, babakhupha, babacela ukuba baphume kuwo umzi."
Acts16:40 Bephumile ke entolongweni, baya kungena kwaLidiya; bathi, bebabonile abazalwana, babathuthuzela, bemka."
Acts17:1 Ke kaloku, bakuba beyihambile iAmfipoli neApoloni, beza eTesalonika, apho yayikhona indlu yesikhungu yamaYuda."
Acts17:2 Ke kaloku, ngokwesiko lakhe ke uPawulos wangena kubo, wathi iisabatha ezintathu, exoxa nabo ngezibhalo,"
Acts17:3 Etyhila, ebeka phambi kwakhe ukuba uKristu ubemelwe kukuva ubunzima, aze avuke kwabafileyo; nokuba, lo Yesu, ndivakalisayo kuni, nguye uKristu."
Acts17:4 Inxenye kuwo yoyiseka, yazibandakanya noPawulos noSilas, kwanenkitha enkulu yamaGrike amhlonelayo uThixo, nakubafazi abaziintloko ababa mbalwa."
Acts17:5 Ke kaloku amaYuda angengakholwayo, emmonele, azithabathela amadoda athile angamatshijolo, angamatshijolo, ahlanganisana ihlokondiba, awuqhumisela umzi uphela; abantu."
Acts17:6 Akuba engabafumani, amrholela uYason nabazalwana abathile kubaphathi bomzi, edanduluka esithi, Aba baliqungaqungileyo elimiweyo, bafikile nalapha;"
Acts17:7 athe uYason wabamkela ngobubele; baye bonke aba besenza okuchasene nemimiselo kaKesare, besithi, Kukho kumkani wumbi, onguYesu."
Acts17:8 Zazikhathaza iindimbane nabaphathi bomzi, bakuziva ezi zinto."
Acts17:9 Bethabathe isibambiso kuYason nakwabanye, babakhulula."
Acts17:10 Ke kaloku bathi abazalwana kwaoko bamndulula uPawulos noSilas ngobusuku, ukuba baye eBhereya; abathi bona bakufika, baya endlwini yesikhungu yamaYuda."
Acts17:11 La ke aye enobuntu kunawaseTesalonika; la wona alamkela ilizwi ngentumekelelo yonke, ezincina izibhalo imihla ngemihla, ukuba zingaba zinjalo na ezo zinto."
Acts17:12 Into eninzi ngoko yakholwa; nakumaGrikekazi abekekileyo, nakumadoda, nokuba mbalwa."
Acts17:13 Akwazi ke amaYuda aseTesalonika, ukuba ilizwi likaThixo lazisiwe nguPawulos naseBhereya, eza azizamazamisa nalapho iindimbane."
Acts17:14 Bandula ke kwaoko abazalwana, bamsusa uPawulos ukuba abheke ngaselwandle; kwasala uSilas noTimoti khona."
Acts17:15 Bathe ke abakhapha uPawulos, bamsa eAtene; bakuba bakuba bamkele umthetho oya kooSilas noTimoti, wokuba beze kuye kwakamsinya, bemka."
Acts17:16 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba uPawulos ubalindile eAtene, wacaphuka, akuwubona umzi uzizithixo kuphela."
Acts17:17 Wayexoxa ke ngoko endlwini yesikhungu namaYuda, nabamhlonelayo uThixo; nasendaweni yembutho imihla ngemihla, nabasukuba bekhona."
Acts17:18 Ke kaloku izithanda-bulumko ezithile zamaEpikure nezamaStoyike zamquqela; Babesithi inxenye, Liya kuthini na eli pholopholo? Abanye ke bathi, Ngathi ngumazisi wezithixo zasemzini; ngokuba wayebashumayeza iindaba ezilungileyo zikaYesu, novuko lwabafileyo."
Acts17:19 Bamthabatha ke bamsa eAreyopago, besithi, Singakhe siyive na le mfundiso intsha ithethwa nguwe, ukuba iyini na?"
Acts17:20 Kuba uzisa izinto ezithile zasemzini ezindlebeni zethu; singa singazi ngoko, ukuba zingaba zithetha ukuthini na ezi zinto."
Acts17:21 Kuba onke ama-Atene nabasemzini babechithachitha ixesha labo engenzi nto yimbi, ingekuxeleli nokuva entsha."
Acts17:22 Wema ke uPawulos esazulwini seAreta, wathi, Madoda aseAtene, ndiyabona ukuba ezintweni zonke nincamisile ukuhlonela izithixo."
Acts17:23 Kuba ndithe, ndihamba ndisingasinga izinto enizihlonelayo, ndafumana nesibingelelo ekubhalwe kuso, kwathiwa, kongaziwayo uThixo. Lowo ke ngoko nina nimnqula ningamazi, ndinazisa yena."
Acts17:24 uThixo yena, owenza ihlabathi neento zonke ezikulo, lowo, eyiNkosi nje yezulu nomhlaba, akahlali zitempileni zenziwe ngazandla."
Acts17:25 Akaphiliswa zizandla zabantu, ngokoswele nto, inguye nje obanika bonke ubomi, nomphefumlo, nazo zonke izinto."
Acts17:26 Kanti wazenza ngagazi-nye zonke iintlanga zabantu, ukuba zime phezu kwawo wonke umhlaba, emisa amaxesha amisiweyo ngenxa engaphambili, nemida yokuma kwazo;"
Acts17:27 ukuze bayifune iNkosi, ukuba kambe bangaphuthaphutha bayifumane, nakuba ingekude kuthi sonke ngabanye."
Acts17:28 Kuba kuyo sihleli, siyashukuma, sikho; njengokuba neembongi ezithile zakowenu zitshilo ukuthi, Kuba nathi siyinzala yakhe."
Acts17:29 Siyinzala kaThixo nje ke, masingacingi ukuba ubuthixo bufana negolide nesilivere nelitye, into eqingqwe ngobungcibi nangengcinga yomntu."
Acts17:30 Loo maxesha ke oko kungazi, uThixo wawayeka ngabomi; kungoku uyala abantu bonke ezindaweni zonke ukuba baguquke;"
Acts17:31 Ngokuba umise umhla, aza kuligweba ngawo elimiweyo ngobulungisa, ngendoda ayimiseleyo; abanike isiqinisekiso bonke abantu ngokumvusa kwabafileyo."
Acts17:32 Ke kaloku, bakuva ngokuvuka kwabafileyo, inxenye yayihlekisa ngaloo nto, abanye bathi, Sobuya sikuve wena ngale nto."
Acts17:33 Wemka ke uPawulos phakathi kwabo.
Acts17:34 Kodwa amadoda athile anamathele kuye, akholwa, anoDiyonisiyo waseAreyopago, nomfazi ogama linguDamari, nabanye ndawonye nabo."
Acts18:1 Ke kaloku, emva kwezi zinto, wahlukana uPawulos neAtene, weza eKorinte."
Acts18:2 Wafumana umYuda othile wasePonto ngokuzalwa, ogama linguAkwila, esandula ukuvela eItali, noPrisila umkakhe, weza kubo; (ngenxa yokuba uKlawudiyo ebemise ukuthi, makahlukane neRoma onke amaYuda); weza kubo."
Acts18:3 Kuthe ke, ngenxa yokuba belilinye ishishini labo, waselehlala nabo esebenza, kuba babengabenzi beentente, ishishini labo."
Acts18:4 Wayexoxa ke endlwini yesikhungu iisabatha ngeesabatha zonke, ezamela ukweyisa amaYuda namaGrike."
Acts18:5 Ke kaloku, bakuhla bevela eMakedoni ooSilas noTimoti, uPawulos waxinwa ngumoya, waqononondisa kumaYuda ukuba uYesu lo nguye uKristu."
Acts18:6 Uthe ke, akuchasa, akunyelisa, wavuthulula iingubo zakhe, wathi kuwo, Igazi lenu malibe phezu kwentloko yenu; mna ndihlambulukile; kuthabathela kweli xesha, ndiya kuya kuzo iintlanga."
Acts18:7 Esukile ke apho, waya kungena endlwini yothile, ogama linguYusto, umhlonelayo uThixo, ondlu yakhe ibikufuphi nendlu yesikhungu."
Acts18:8 Ke kaloku uKrispo, umphathi wendlu yesikhungu, wakholwa yiNkosi, nendlu yakhe yonke; nento eninzi yamaKorinte yakuva yakholwa, yabhaptizwa."
Acts18:9 Yathi ke iNkosi ngombono ebusuku kuPawulos, Musa ukoyika, thetha, ungathi tu;"
Acts18:10 kuba mna ndinawe, kanjalo akukho namnye uya kukusa sandla, akuphathe kakubi; ngokuba ndinabantu abaninzi kulo mzi."
Acts18:11 Wahlala khona ke unyaka oneenyanga ezintandathu, efundisa ilizwi likaThixo phakathi kwabo."
Acts18:12 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba uGaliyo wayelibamba kwelaseAkaya, amaYuda amvukela ngamxhelo mnye uPawulos, amzisa esihlalweni sokugweba,"
Acts18:13 besithi, Lo ukweyisa abantu ukuba bamnqule uThixo ngokunxamnye nomthetho."
Acts18:14 Ke kaloku, xa uPawulos aza kuvula umlomo, wathi uGaliyo kumaYuda, Ukuba ibiyinto yentswela-bulungisa, nokuba ibiyinto yobutshinga, nokuba ibiyeyobutshijolo, maYuda, ngekungene kuni;"
Acts18:15 Kodwa ukuba yimbuzwano ngelizwi, namagama, nomthetho wenu, zikhangeleleni nina; kuba mna andiyi kuba ngumgwebi wezinto ezinjalo."
Acts18:16 Waza wabagxotha esihlalweni sokugweba.
Acts18:17 Ambamba ke onke amaGrike uSostene, umphathi wendlu yesikhungu, ambetha phambi kwesihlalo sokugweba. Ke yena uGaliyo akakhathalelanga nanye yezo zinto."
Acts18:18 Ke kaloku uPawulos ukhe wahlala imihla eyaneleyo. Waza, ebabulisile abazalwana, wemka ngomkhombe waya kwelaseSiriya, enoPrisila noAkwila; eyichebile intloko eKenkreya, kuba waye enesibambiso."
Acts18:19 Wehla ke wafika e-Efese, wabashiya apho, wangena endlwini yesikhungo, waxoxa namaYuda."
Acts18:20 Uthe ke, akumcela ukuba akhe ahlale umzuzu kuwo, akavuma;"
Acts18:21 Wababulisa ke esithi, Nokuba kutheni, ndimelwe kukuwenzela eYerusalem umthendeleko ozayo; kodwa ndobuya ndibuyele kuni, ukuba uThixo uyavuma. Waza wemka ngomkhombe e-Efese."
Acts18:22 Wehla eKesareya, wenyuka waya kubulisa ibandla, wehla waya kwa-Antiyokwe."
Acts18:23 Enze ixesha elithile khona, wemka, walityhutyha ilizwe laseGalati, nelaseFrigi, ebomeleza bonke abafundi."
Acts18:24 Ke kaloku umYuda othile ogama linguApolo, owazalelwa eAleksandriya, indoda eliciko, enobunkunkqele ezibhalweni, weza e-Efese."
Acts18:25 Lo mntu wayeyifundisiwe ngomlomo indlela yeNkosi; waye evutha ngumoya wathetha, efundisa ngokucokisekileyo izinto zeNkosi, esazi kakuhle ubhaptizo lukaYohane lodwa."
Acts18:26 Waza yena wathetha ngokungafihlisiyo endlwini yesikhungu. Bathe ke bakumva ooAkwila noPrisila, bamthabathela kubo, bamtyhilela ngokucokisekileyo ngakumbi indlela kaThixo."
Acts18:27 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba ungadlula aye kwelaseAkaya, abazalwana babhala, bababongoza abafundi ukuba bamamkele; owathi akufika, wabanceda kakhulu abo bakholwayo ngalo ubabalo;"
Acts18:28 kuba waweyisa, wawancamisa ekuhleni amaYuda, ebonakalalisa ngazo izibhalo ukuba uYesu lo unguye uKristu."
Acts19:1 Ke kaloku kwathi, xa uApolo eseKorinte, uPawulos ewatyhutyhile amacala asentla, weza e-Efese;"
Acts19:2 Wathi kubo, uMoya oyiNgcwele namamkela na, nakholwayo nje? Bathe ke bona kuye, Asizanga sive nokuva ukuba kukho uMoya oyiNgcwele."
Acts19:3 Wathi kubo, Nabhaptizelwa ngantoni na phofu? Bathe ke bona, Elubhaptizweni lukaYohane."
Acts19:4 Wathi uPawulos, uYohane okunene wabhaptiza ngobhaptizo lwenguquko, esithi ebantwini, mabakholwe kulowo uzayo emva kwakhe, oko kukuthi, kuKristu Yesu."
Acts19:5 Bathe ke bona bakukuva oko, babhaptizwa egameni leNkosi uYesu."
Acts19:6 Akuba uPawulos ebabeke izandla, wehla uMoya oyiNgcwele phezu kwabo; Baye bethetha ngeelwimi, beprofeta."
Acts19:7 Aye onke amadoda engathi alishumi elinababini.
Acts19:8 Ke kaloku, wangena endlwini yesikhungu, wathetha ngokungafihlisiyo iinyanga zantathu, exoxa nabantu, ebeyisela kwizinto ezingabo ubukumkani bukaThixo."
Acts19:9 Kodwa abanye bakuba beqaqadekile, bengakholwa, bethetha kakubi ngayo iNdlela leyo phambi kwesihlwele, wemka kubo, wabahlula abafundi bakhe, exoxa imihla ngemihla esikolweni sikaTirano."
Acts19:10 Loo nto ke yenzeka iminyaka emibini; ngokokude bonke abemiyo kwelaseAsiya balive ilizwi leNkosi, amaYuda kwanamaGrike."
Acts19:11 uThixo ke wenza imisebenzi yamandla ebalulekileyo ngesandla sikaPawulos.
Acts19:12 Kaloku iiqhiya neefaskoti ziphuma emzimbeni wakhe, zisiwe kwabagulayo, zisuke kubo izifo, bathi noomoya abakhohlakeleyo baphume kubo."
Acts19:13 Ke kaloku abathile bakumaYuda abhadulayo, angabafungisi, bazamela ukulibiza igama leNkosi uYesu phezu kwabanoomoya abakhohlakeleyo, besithi, Sinifungisa uYesu lowo uvakaliswayo nguPawulos."
Acts19:14 Kwaye kukho ke nyana bathile basixhenxe bakaSkeva, umYuda, umbingeleli omkhulu, ababekwenza oko."
Acts19:15 Waphendula ke umoya okhohlakeleyo, wathi, uYesu ndiyamazi, noPawulos ndiyamazi kakuhle; Ningoobani na ke?"
Acts19:16 Wesuka umntu obukuye umoya okhohlakeleyo, wabatsibela, wabagagamela, wabeyisa, ngokokude babaleke baphume kuloo ndlu bengxwelerhiwe, beze."
Acts19:17 Kwathi ke oko kwazeka kuwo onke amaYuda, kwanakumaGrike amiyo e-Efese; bawelwa kukoyika bonke, lenziwa likhulu igama leNkosi uYesu."
Acts19:18 Yaye into eninzi yabakholiweyo isiza, izivuma izixela izenzo zabo."
Acts19:19 Yathi ke nento eyaneleyo yabasebenza izenzo zobugqi, yazizisa ndaweni-nye iincwadi zayo, bawayazitshisa phambi kwabo bonke; bawabala amaxabiso azo, bafumana engamawaka amashumi mahlanu esilivere."
Acts19:20 Lenjenjalo ke ilizwi leNkosi ukwanda ngamandla nokweyisa.
Acts19:21 Ke kaloku, zakuzaliseka ezi zinto, wamisa emoyeni wakhe uPawulos ukuba athi, elityhutyhile elaseMakedoni nelaseAkaya, aye eYerusalem, esithi, Emveni kokuba ndithe ndakhona, ndimelwe kukuba ndibone neRoma."
Acts19:22 Ke ngoko wathumela eMakedoni bababini kwabalungiselelayo, ooTimoti noErasto; yena ke ukhe wahlala umzuzu kwelaseAsiya."
Acts19:23 Ke kaloku kwabakho ngelo xesha inkathazeko engencinane ngayo iNdlela le.
Acts19:24 Kuba uthile, ogama linguDemetriyo, umkhandi wesilivere, obesenza iitempile zesilivere zika-Artemis, wayezizuzisa iingcibi inzuzo enkulu."
Acts19:25 Waziqukela ndawonye, kwanabasebenzi bezinto ezinjalo, wathi, Madoda, niyazi kakuhle ukuba buphuma kule nzuzo ubutyebi bethu."
Acts19:26 Kananjalo niyabona, niyeva, ukuba akuse-Efese kodwa, kuphantse ukuba kulo lonke elaseAsiya, athe lo Pawulos waphambukisa isihlwele esaneleyo, ngokusoyisa ngokusoyisa, esithi, asingoothixo abo benziwa ngezandla."
Acts19:27 Ngoko ke asiyiyo lo msebenzi wethu wodwa osisichengeni sokungabi nanto; kwanetempile yothixokazi omkhulu uArtemis ibe yinto engento, butshabalale nobungangamela bakhe, oqubuda kulo lonke elaseAsiya nelimiweyo."
Acts19:28 Bakukuva ke oko, bazala ngumsindo, badanduluka, besithi, Mkhulu uArtemis wabase-Efese!"
Acts19:29 Wazala umzi uphela sisidubedube; besuka indulumbane ngamxhelo mnye endaweni yokubonela, bamthi hlasi uGayo noAristarko, abelaseMakedoni, ababehamba noPawulos."
Acts19:30 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba uPawulos angangena esihlweleni, abamvumela abafundi."
Acts19:31 Abathile ke bakubaphathi belaseAsiya, benobuhlobo kuye, bathumela kuye, bambongoza ukuba angazinikeli endaweni yokubonela."
Acts19:32 Abanye ke ngoko babenkqangaza enye into, abanye yimbi, kuba ibandla labe lidubadubekile; baye abaninzi bengazi ukuba babuthelene ngenxa yantoni na."
Acts19:33 Baza bamrholela uAlesandire esihlweleni, amaYuda emtyhalela phambili. Uwangawangisile ke uAlesandire ngesandla, wafuna ukuziphendulela ebantwini."
Acts19:34 Kodwa bakuqonda ukuba ungumYuda, benza inzwinini enye bonke bephela, benkqangaza umzuzu omaxa amabini, besithi, Mkhulu uArtemis wabase-Efese!"
Acts19:35 Esizolisile ke umbhali isihlwele, wathi, Madoda ase-Efese, nguwuphi na umntu ongaziyo, ukuba umzi wase-Efese ungumkhonzi wothixokazi omkhulu uArtemis, nowomfanekiselo owawa kuZeyus?"
Acts19:36 Ekubeni ngoko ezi zinto zingenakuphikiswa, nifanele ukuthi cwaka, ningenzi nto ngokungxama."
Acts19:37 Kuba niwazise apha la madoda, engebaphangi bamabandla kaThixo, nabanyelisi bothixokazi wenu."
Acts19:38 Ukuba ke ngoko uDemetriyo neengcibi ezinaye banendawo emntwini, zikho iimini zamatyala, akho namabamba; mabamangalelane."
Acts19:39 Ke ukuba nifuna into nganto zimbi, yoconjululwa kwesesikweni intlanganiso."
Acts19:40 Kuba sisesichengeni sokumangalelwa ngenxa yesaqunge sanamhlanje, kungekho sizathu sakuziphendulela ngale ngxokolo."
Acts19:41 Akutsho, wayindulula intlanganiso."
Acts20:1 Ke kaloku, sakuba sidambile isiphithiphithi eso, uPawulos wababizela kuye abafundi bakhe, wababulisa, wemka waya kwelaseMakedoni."
Acts20:2 Ewatyhutyhile ke loo macala, ebayalile kakhulu, weza kwelamaGrike."
Acts20:3 Wahlala apho iinyanga zantathu. Ke kaloku, xa abezalelwe kuye amaYuda, xa aza kuya ngomkhombe kwelaseSiriya, wagqiba kwelokuba acande kwelaseMakedoni ngokubuya."
Acts20:4 Waphelekelelwa ke, kwada kweza kwelaseAsiya nguSopatro waseBhereya; nabaseTesalonika, uAristarko noSekundo; noGayo waseDerbhe, noTimoti; kwabaseAsiya, ooTikiko noTrofimo."
Acts20:5 Aba ke bona basandulela, basilinda eTrowa."
Acts20:6 Semka ngomkhombe eFilipi, emva kwemihla yezonka ezingenagwele, seza kubo eTrowa ngeentsuku ezintlanu; sahlala khona iintsuku zasixhenxe."
Acts20:7 Ke kaloku, ngolokuqala usuku lweveki, bakubon’ ukuba abafundi bahlanganisene ukuba baqhekeze isonka, uPawulos wayeshumayela kubo, eza kumka ngengomso; Wayiqhuba intetho yakhe kwada kwaphakathi kobusuku."
Acts20:8 Kwaye kukho izibane ezininzi kwigumbi eliphezulu, apho babehlanganisene khona."
Acts20:9 Kwakuhleli efestileni ndodana ithile ingama linguYutiko, isindwa bubuthongo obunzulu;"
Acts20:10 Wehla ke uPawulos, waziphosa phezu kwayo, wayiwola, wathi, Musani ukuzikhathaza; ngokuba umphefumlo wakhe ukuye."
Acts20:11 Wenyuka ke, waqhekeza isonka, wadla; kananjalo waxoxa ngokwaneleyo kwada kwasa, wemka njalo."
Acts20:12 Bamzisa ke umfana ehleli, bethuthuzelekile noko."
Acts20:13 Ke kaloku thina sandulela ukuya emkhombeni, sasinga eAso, apho besiza kumthabatha khona uPawulos; kuba ebemisele ngokunjalo, yena eza kuhamba ngeenyawo."
Acts20:14 Uthe akuhlangana nathi eAso, samthabatha, saya kufika eMitilene."
Acts20:15 Semka apho ngomkhombe, ngengomso safika malungana neKiyo; Sathi ngengomso safika eSamo, sahlala eTrogiliyo; saza ngengomso seza eMileto."
Acts20:16 Kuba uPawulos wagqiba kwelokuba kudlulwe ngomkhombe e-Efese, ukuze angabi nakwenza xesha lide kwelaseAsiya; kuba wayekhawulezele ukuthi, ukuba unako, awenze umhla wepentekoste eYerusalem."
Acts20:17 EseMileto wathumela e-Efese, wabiza amadoda amakhulu alo ibandla."
Acts20:18 Befikile ke kuye, wathi kubo, Niyazi ukuba bendihleli nani ngamaxesha onke, kususela kwimini yokuqala endafikayo kwelaseAsiya;"
Acts20:19 ndikhonza iNkosi ngako konke ukuthobeka kwentliziyo, ndineenyembezi ezininzi, nokulingwa okwandihlelayo ngokulalela amaYuda;"
Acts20:20 nokokuba andinifihlelanga nto, ndanibonisa nje, ndanifundisa esidlangalaleni nakwizindlu ngezindlu,"
Acts20:21 ndiqononondisa kuma Yuda nakumaGrike ukuguqukela kuThixo, nokukholwa kuyo iNkosi yethu, uYesu Kristu."
Acts20:22 Nangoku, yabonani, mna ndiya eYerusalem, ndibotshiwe nguMoya, ndingazazi izinto eziya kundihlela khona;"
Acts20:23 ndanele ukwazi ukuba uMoya oyiNgcwele uqononondisa kwimizi ngemizi, esithi ndilindwe ngamakhamandela naziimbandezelo."
Acts20:24 Kambe ke ubomi bam andibugqali njengobalulekileyo kum, ukuze ndilufeze ugqatso lwam ngovuyo, nolungiselelo endalwamkelayo lweNkosi uYesu, lokungqina iindaba ezilungileyo zobabalo lukaThixo."
Acts20:25 Nangoku, yabonani, ndiyazi mna, ukuba nina nonke ndahambayo phakathi kwenu, ndibuvakalisa ubukumkani bukaThixo, anisayi kubuya nibubone ubuso bam."
Acts20:26 Kungoko ndingqinayo kuni ngayo le mini yanamhla, ukuba mna ndimsulwa egazini labo bonke;"
Acts20:27 Kuba ndanixelela lonke icebo likaThixo.
Acts20:28 Zilumkeleni ngoko, nawo wonke umhlambi, athe uMoya oyiNgcwele wanimisa ukuba ngabaveleli bawo, ukuba nilaluse ibandla likaThixo, awazizuzelayo ngelilelakhe igazi."
Acts20:29 Kuba mna ndiyakwazi oku, ukuba emva kokumka kwam, kuya kungena phakathi kwenu iingcuka ezibawayo, zingawucongi umhlambi."
Acts20:30 Nakuni ngokwenu kuya kusuka amadoda athetha izinto ezigwenxa, ukuba abarhole abafundi emva kwawo."
Acts20:31 Kungoko ndithi, Phaphani, nikhumbule, ukuba iminyaka emithathu, ubusuku nemini, andiyekanga ukululeka bonke ngabanye, ndineenyembezi."
Acts20:32 Ngoku ke, bazalwana, ndiyaniyaleza kuThixo, nakwilizwi lobabalo lwakhe, enako ukunakha, aninike ilifa phakathi kwabo bonke abangcwalisiweyo."
Acts20:33 Andinqwenelanga silivere nagolide nangubo kabani.
Acts20:34 Nani ngokwenu niyazi ukuba ezi zandla zazisebenzela iintswelo zam, nezababenam."
Acts20:35 Ndanibonisa zonke izinto, ukuba ngokwenjenjalo ukubulaleka nimelwe kukuthi niyisize imilwelwe, nikhumbule namazwi eNkosi uYesu, yokuba yona yathi, Ukupha kunoyolo ngaphezu kokuphiwa."
Acts20:36 Akuba etshilo, waguqa ngamadolo, wathandaza kunye nabo bonke."
Acts20:37 Basuka balila kakhulu bonke, bawa entanyeni kaPawulos, bamanga,"
Acts20:38 bebuhlungu kakhulu, ngokukodwa lilizwi alithethileyo lokuthi, abasayi kubuya babubone ubuso bakhe. Bamkhapha ke bamsa emkhombeni."
Acts21:1 Ke kaloku kwathi, sindulukile kubo, sindulukile, seza ngqo eKose; ngengomso safika eRodo, sesuka apho seza ePatara."
Acts21:2 Sathi, siyifumene inqanawa ewelela eFenike, sangena kuyo, sanduluka."
Acts21:3 Ke kaloku, sakuba siyifumene iSipro, sayishiya ngasekhohlo, saya ngomkhombe kwelaseSiriya, sehla eTire; kuba umkhombe uza kuwuthula khona apho umthwalo."
Acts21:4 Sathi sibafumene abafundi, sahlala khona iintsuku zasixhenxe; bona bathi kuPawulos ngoMoya, makangenyuki aye eYerusalem."
Acts21:5 Ke kaloku, xa sizigqibileyo iintsuku ezo, saphuma sahamba; basiphelekelela bonke, ndawonye nabafazi nabantwana, sada sangaphandle komzi; saguqa ngamadolo elunxwemeni, sathandaza."
Acts21:6 Sathi sabulisana, sakhwela enqanaweni; babuya bagoduka."
Acts21:7 Ke kaloku, silufezile uhambo lwethu ngohambo lwethu ukusuka eTire, safika eTolemayi, sababulisa abazalwana, sahlala nabo usuku lwalunye."
Acts21:8 Ke kaloku ngengomso, thina besinoPawulos, semka seza eKesareya. Sangena endlwini kaFilipu, umshumayeli weendaba ezilungileyo, obengowabaya basixhenxe; wahlala naye."
Acts21:9 Lowo ke wayeneentombi ezine, ziseziintombi, ziprofeta."
Acts21:10 Sakubon’ ukuba ke sihleli khona iintsuku ezininzi, kwehla kwelakwaYuda mprofeti uthile, ugama linguAgabho."
Acts21:11 Wathi akufika kuthi, wawuthabatha umbhinqo kaPawulos, wazibopha izandla neenyawo, wathi, Utsho uMoya oyiNgcwele ukuthi, Aya kwenjenjalo ukumbopha indoda engowalo mbhinqo amaYuda eYerusalem, amnikele entolongweni, izandla zeentlanga."
Acts21:12 Sakuva ke ezi zinto, sambongoza thina kwanabakuloo ndawo, ukuba angenyuki aye eYerusalem."
Acts21:13 Waphendula uPawulos wathi, Nenzani na ukulila niyityumze intliziyo yam? kuba mna ndingalungele kubotshwa kodwa; ndilungele nokufa eYerusalem, ngenxa yegama leNkosi uYesu."
Acts21:14 Akuba ke engoyiseki, sathi cwaka, sisithi, Makwenzeke ukuthanda kweNkosi."
Acts21:15 Ke kaloku, emva kwezo ntsuku, sabopha iinqwelo, senyuka saya eYerusalem."
Acts21:16 Kwahamba nathi abathile nakubafundi baseKesareya, besisa thina kuMnaso waseSipro, obengumfundi kwakudala, esaba lundwendwe lwakhe."
Acts21:17 Ke kaloku, sakufika eYerusalem, basamkela ngovuyo abazalwana."
Acts21:18 Ngengomso ke uPawulos wangena kunye nathi kuYakobi; ayekho ke onke amadoda amakhulu.
Acts21:19 Ubabulisile, wamana ebacacisela zonke izinto awazenzayo uThixo phakathi kweentlanga, ngalo ulungiselelo lwakhe."
Acts21:20 Bathe ke bona bakukuva oko, bayizukisa iNkosi, batsho nokuthi kuye, Uyabona, mzalwana, oko angako amawakawaka amaYuda akholiweyo; baye bonke bewuzondelele umthetho;"
Acts21:21 Atyelwe ke ngawe, ukuba uyawafundisa onke amaYuda aphakathi kweentlanga, ukuba ahlukane noMoses, usithi, makangabalusi abantwana bawo, angahambi ngawo amasiko."
Acts21:22 Kuyintoni na ke ngoko? Kumelwe kuhlanganisana inkitha; kuba baya kuva ukuba ufikile.
Acts21:23 Ngoko yenza le nto sikuxelela yona: Kukho kuthi apha amadoda amane, anesibambiso azibophe ngaso;"
Acts21:24 Wathabathe wona, uzenze nyulu kunye nawo, ube nokuhlawulisa, ukuze achebe iintloko zawo; bazi bonke ukuba azinto zanto iindaba ezilungileyo ezi uzisiwe ngawe; kodwa ukuba nawe uhambe ngokufanelekileyo, uwugcina umthetho."
Acts21:25 Kodwa ngazo iintlanga ezikholiweyo, sabhala sagqiba kwelokuba zingabambi nto injalo; kuphela ibe kukuzigcina entweni ebingelelwe izithixo, nasegazini, nasentweni ekrwitshiweyo, nasembulweni."
Acts21:26 Waza uPawulos wawathabatha ke amadoda lawo, wathi ngengomso, ezenze nyulu kunye nawo, wangena etempileni, eqondisisa inzaliseko yeentsuku zokwenza nyulu, ude usondezwe umnikelo ngenxa yabo bonke ngabanye."
Acts21:27 Ke kaloku, xa iintsuku ezisixhenxe ezo beziza kuphela, athi amaYuda avela kwelaseAsiya, akumbona etempileni, asidubaduba sonke isihlwele, amsa izandla,"
Acts21:28 enkqangaza esithi, Madoda, maSirayeli, sizani. Nanku lo mntu ufundisa bonke ezindaweni zonke okuchasene nabantu, nomthetho, nale ndawo; othe ngaphezu koko wawangenisa amaGrike etempileni, wayenza inqambi le ndawo ingcwele."
Acts21:29 (Kuba abebone ngaphambili uTrofimo wase-Efese, ndawonye naye esixekweni, abeba uPawulos umngenise etempileni.)"
Acts21:30 Washukuma umzi uphela, babalekela ndawonye abantu; bamthabatha uPawulos, bamrholela ngaphandle kwetempile; zavalwa kwaoko iingcango."
Acts21:31 Ke kaloku, xa babeza kumbulala, lwafika udaba kumthetheli-waka webutho, lokuba iYerusalem iphela idubadubekile;"
Acts21:32 owathi kwangelo lixa wathabatha amasoldati nabathetheli-khulu, wabaleka, wehla waya kubo. Bakumbona ke umthetheli-waka namasoldati, bayeka ukumbetha uPawulos."
Acts21:33 Waza wasondela umthetheli-waka, wambamba, wathi makakhonkxwe ngemixokelelwane emibini; wayebuza ukuba ungubani na, nokuba wenze ntoni na."
Acts21:34 Abanye abantu benkqangaza enye into, abanye yimbi. Akuba engenako ke ukuyazi inyaniso ngenxa yesiphithiphithi eso, wathi makasiwe enqabeni yomkhosi."
Acts21:35 Uthe akufika kwizinyuko, wathwalwa ngamasoldati, ngenxa yesiphithiphithi sabantu;"
Acts21:36 kuba yayilandela inkitha yabantu, inkqangaza isithi, Msuseni!"
Acts21:37 Xa ke wayeza kungeniswa enqabeni yomkhosi, wathi uPawulos kumthetheli-waka, Kuvumelekile na ukuba ndithethe kuwe? Wathi, Uyasazi na isiGrike?"
Acts21:38 Asinguye na laa mYiputa, wathi ngaphambi kwale mihla wenza isaqunge, wakhokelela entlango amawaka amane amadoda angababulali?"
Acts21:39 Uthe ke yena uPawulos, Mna ndingumYuda waseTarso, umzi waseKiliki, ummi womzi ongadume ngako."
Acts21:40 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba umvumele, wema uPawulos ematyeni okunyuka, wawangawangisa ngesandla kubo abantu. Uthe ke, kwathi cwaka kakhulu, wathetha kubo ngesiHebhere, esithi,"
Acts22:1 Madoda, bazalwana, nani bobawo, kuphulaphuleni ukuziphendulela kwam kuni ngoku."
Acts22:2 Bakuva ke ukuba udanduluka ngesiHebhere kubo, bazola okunye."
Acts22:3 Mna okunene ndingumntu ongumYuda, owazalelwa eTarso, umzi waseKiliki; ukanti ndakhulela kulo mzi ezinyaweni zikaGamaliyeli, ndafundiswa ngomyalelo ogqibeleleyo wemithetho yooyihlo, ndinenzondelelo kuThixo, njengokuba ninjalo nina nonke namhlanje."
Acts22:4 Ndayitshutshisa le Ndlela, ndada ndesa ekufeni, ndibopha, ndifaka ezintolongweni amadoda kwanabafazi;"
Acts22:5 njengokuba nombingeleli omkhulu endingqinela, nayo yonke intlanganiso yamadoda amakhulu; endamkela kubo iincwadi zokuya kubazalwana, ndaya eDamasko, ndiya kuzisa ababekhona bebotshiwe eYerusalem, ukuze babethwe."
Acts22:6 Ke kaloku kwathi, ndihamba, ndisondela eDamasko, malunga emini enkulu, ngesiquphe ndabanekelwa ngeenxa zonke lukhanyiselo olukhulu luphuma ezulwini."
Acts22:7 Ndawa emhlabeni, ndeva ilizwi lisithi kum, Sawule, Sawule, unditshutshiselani na?"
Acts22:8 Ndaphendula ke mna ndathi, Ungubani na, Nkosi? Yathi kum, Mna ndinguYesu waseNazarete, omtshutshisayo wena."
Acts22:9 Bona ke ababenam balubona okunene ukhanyiselo olo, besuka boyika; ke abalivanga ilizwi lalowo wayethetha nam."
Acts22:10 Ndathi ke, Ndithini na, Nkosi? Yathi ke iNkosi kum, Vuka, uye eDamasko; woxelelwa khona ngazo zonke izinto ozimiselweyo ukuba uzenze."
Acts22:11 Ndakuba ke ndingenakondela ngenxa yobuqaqawuli bolo lukhanyiselo, ndarholwa ngesandla ngabo babenam, ndafika eDamasko."
Acts22:12 Ke kaloku, uHananiya uthile, indoda emhlonelayo uThixo ngokomthetho, engqinelwe kakuhle ngawo onke amaYuda ami khona,"
Acts22:13 weza kum, wema, wathi kum, Sawule, mzalwana, buya ubone. Ndaza ndajonga kuye kwangelo lixa."
Acts22:14 Uthe ke yena, uThixo woobawo bethu ukumisile wena ukuba ukwazi ukuthanda kwakhe, umbone lowo uliLungisa, uve ilizwi eliphuma emlonyeni wakhe;"
Acts22:15 ngokuba uya kuba lingqina lakhe kubo bonke abantu, lezinto ozibonileyo nozivileyo."
Acts22:16 Ngoku ke ulibelelani na? Suk’ ume, ubhaptizwe, uhlambulule izono zakho, unqula igama leNkosi."
Acts22:17 Ke kaloku kwathi, ndakuba ndibuyele eYerusalem, ndakubon’ ukuba ndiyathandaza etempileni, ndaba sethongweni;"
Acts22:18 Ndayibona isithi kum, Khawuleza, uphume kamsinya eYerusalem; ngokuba bengayi kubamkela ubungqina bakho ngam."
Acts22:19 Ndathi ke mna, Nkosi, bayazi kakuhle bona ukuba mna ndandibafaka entolongweni, ndibatyabula kuzo zonke izindlu zesikhungu abo bakholwayo kuwe;"
Acts22:20 naxeshikweni laphalazwayo igazi likaStefano, ingqina lakho, ndaye ndimi kufuphi nam, ndikuthakazela ukusikwa kwakhe, ndizigcinile iingubo zabo babemsika."
Acts22:21 Yathi kum, Hamba; ngokuba mna ndiya kukuthuma kude kwiintlanga."
Acts22:22 Bamphulaphula ke, wada wafika kwelo lizwi, baza baphakamisa amazwi abo besithi, Msuseni emhlabeni umntu onje; kuba akufanelekile ukuba adle ubomi."
Acts22:23 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba bayakhala, bezilahla iingubo zabo, bephosa uthuli phezulu;"
Acts22:24 Wathi umthetheli-waka, makangeniswe enqabeni yomkhosi; wathi makancinwe ngekatsi; ukuze azi ukuba kungani na ukuba benjenje ukunkqangaza ngaye."
Acts22:25 Ke kaloku, xa bamolulayo ngeentambo, wathi uPawulos kumthetheli-khulu obemi khona, Kuvumelekile na, ukuba nimtyakatye umntu ongumRoma, engagwetywanga nokugwetywa?"
Acts22:26 Evile ke umthetheli-khulu, waya wabika kumthetheli-waka, esithi, Yilumkele into oza kuyenza; kuba lo mntu ungumRoma."
Acts22:27 Weza ke umthetheli-waka wathi kuye, Ndixelele, ungumRoma na? Wathi, Ewe."
Acts22:28 Waphendula umthetheli-waka wathi, Le nkululeko ndayizuza ngexabiso elikhulu. Wathi ke uPawulos, Mna ndizelwe ndizelwe."
Acts22:29 Basuka kuye kwaoko ngoko abo babeza kumncina; woyika ke nomthetheli-waka akuqonda ukuba ungumRoma, nangenxa yokuba ebembophile."
Acts22:30 Ke kaloku ngengomso, enga angayazi inyaniso yento amangalelwe ngayo ngamaYuda, wamkhulula ezintanjeni, wathi, mabeze ababingeleli abakhulu, nayo yonke intlanganiso yabo yamatyala; waza wamhlisa uPawulos, wammisa phambi kwabo."
Acts23:1 Waqwalasela ke uPawulos entlanganisweni yamatyala, wathi, Madoda, bazalwana, mna ndahlala ngokwalowo ungowakwaThixo, ndinesazela esilungileyo, kwada kwayile mini."
Acts23:2 Umbingeleli omkhulu uHananiya wayalela abo babemi ngakuye ukuba bambethe emlonyeni.
Acts23:3 Wathi uPawulos kuye, Uza kukubetha uThixo, ludongandini luqatyiweyo;"
Acts23:4 Bathi ke abo babemi khona, Uyamthuka na umbingeleli omkhulu kaThixo?"
Acts23:5 Wathi uPawulos, Bendingazi, bazalwana, ukuba ungumbingeleli omkhulu; kuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Uze ungathethi kakubi ngomphathi wabantu bakowenu."
Acts23:6 Ke kaloku uPawulos, esazi ukuba elinye icala lelabaSadusi, elinye ke lingabaFarisi, wadanduluka entlanganisweni yamatyala, wathi, Madoda, bazalwana, mna ndingumFarisi, unyana womFarisi; umbuzo."
Acts23:7 Akuba etshilo, kwabakho impambano phakathi kwabaFarisi nabaSadusi, yahlulelana inkitha leyo."
Acts23:8 Kuba okunene abaSadusi babesithi, akukho luvuko, nasingelosi, namoya; kodwa abaFarisi bazivuma zombini ezo ndawo."
Acts23:9 Kwabakho ke unkqangazo olukhulu; besuka ababhali becala labaFarisi balwa kakhulu, besithi, Asifumani nanye into embi kulo mntu; ke ukuba kuthethe kuye umoya, nokuba sisithunywa sezulu, masingalwi noThixo."
Acts23:10 Kuthe ke, yakuba nkulu impambano, wathi umthetheli-waka esoyikela ukuba uPawulos angaqwengwa ngabo, wathi mawuhle umkhosi, umxwile phakathi kwabo, umzise enqabeni yawo."
Acts23:11 Ngobusuku obulandelayo iNkosi yema ngakuye, yathi, Yomelela, Pawulos; kuba njengokuba waqononondisa ngam eYerusalem, kwangokunjalo umelwe kukuthi ungqine naseRoma."
Acts23:12 Kwathi kwakusa, amaYuda athile enza ibhunga, azibopha ngesiqalekiso, esithi akayi kudla, akayi kusela, ade ambulale uPawulos."
Acts23:13 Baye ke bengaphezu kwamashumi omane ababefungele ukuyenza loo nto.
Acts23:14 Afika ke kubabingeleli abakhulu nakumadoda amakhulu, athi, Sizibophe ngesiqalekiso esikhulu, ukuba singadli nto, side simbulale uPawulos."
Acts23:15 Ngoku ke nina bhekisani kumthetheli-waka kunye nentlanganiso yamatyala, ukuba amhlise, eze naye kuni ngomso, ngokungathi niza kuziqiqa ngokukhona kucokisekileyo iindawo ezithethwa ngaye; sibe ke thina, engekasondeli, sesilungele ukumbulala."
Acts23:16 Ke kaloku, akukuva unyana wodade boPawulos ukumlalela kwabo, wafika wangena enqabeni yomkhosi, wambikela uPawulos."
Acts23:17 uPawulos ubizele ke kuye omnye wakubathetheli-khulu, wathi, Yisa le ndodana kumthetheli-waka; kuba inento eza kuyibika kuye."
Acts23:18 Uyithabathile ke yena, wayizisa kumthetheli-waka, wathi, uPawulos, umbanjwa undibizele kuye, wacela ukuba ndizise le ndodana kuwe; inento eza kuyithetha kuwe."
Acts23:19 Wayibamba ke ngesandla umthetheli-waka, waya nayo ngasese, wayibuza wathi, Unantoni na oza kuyibika kum?"
Acts23:20 Yathi ke, AmaYuda avumelene ukukucela ukuba umhlise uPawulos, umse ngomso entlanganisweni yamatyala, ngokungathi aza kubuza ngokukhona kucokisekileyo into ngaye."
Acts23:21 Ke wena uze ungabayekeleli; kuba bamlalele kubo phezu kwawo amadoda angaphezu kwamashumi omane, awabophe ngesifungo ukuba akayi kudla, akayi kusela, ade ambulale; ukanti sewulungile, ukhangele; ngenxa yedinga elivela kuwe."
Acts23:22 Umthetheli-waka wayindulula ke indodana leyo, wayithethela ngelithi, mayingaxeleli bani, ukuba izibonakalalisile kuye ezi zinto."
Acts23:23 Ebizele kuye abathetheli-khulu ababini, wathi, Lungisani amasoldati abe makhulu mabini, ukuba aye eKesareya, nabamahashe babe mashumi asixhenxe, nababinzi babe makhulu mabini, ngelesithathu ilixa lobusuku;"
Acts23:24 nilungise namaqegu, ukuze bamkhwelise uPawulos, bamse kuFelikis irhuluneli, asindile."
Acts23:25 Wabhala ke incwadi ngolu hlobo.
Acts23:26 uKlawudiyo Lisiya uyabulisa kuFelikis irhuluneli edume kunene.
Acts23:27 Le ndoda yayibanjwe ngamaYuda, iza kubulawa ngawo, koko ndathi gaxa kuwo ndinomkhosi, ndayihlangula, ndakuqonda ukuba ingumRoma."
Acts23:28 Ndakuba ke ndingalazi ityala abeyimangalela ngalo, ndayihlisa, ndayisa entlanganisweni yawo yamatyala;"
Acts23:29 Ndayifumana imangalelwe ngeembuzwano zomthetho wawo, kodwa ingenalo nalinye ityala elilingene ukufa, nokufakwa iintambo."
Acts23:30 Ke kaloku, kwakubon’ ukuba ndilihletyelwe iyelenqe ebeliza kwenziwa ngayo le ndoda ngamaYuda, ndithumele kuwe kwangelo lixa, ndathi nakubamangaleli bayo, mabazithethe kuwe iindawo abanazo ngakuyo. Sala kakuhle."
Acts23:31 Aza amasoldati, njengoko abeyalelwe, amthabatha uPawulos, amzisa kwa-Antipatri ngobusuku."
Acts23:32 Ngengomso abashiya abamahashe, ukuba bahambe naye, abuyela enqabeni yomkhosi;"
Acts23:33 abathi bona, bakufika eKesareya, bayinikela incwadi kwirhuluneli, bammisa noPawulos phambi kwayo."
Acts23:34 Iyilesile ke irhuluneli, yabuza ukuba ungowabuphi na uburhulumente; Uthe ke akuqonda ukuba ungowaseKiliki;"
Acts23:35 Wathi ndokuva kakuhle, xa bathe bafika nabamangaleli bakho; wathi makagcinwe endlwini yerhuluneli kaHerode."
Acts24:1 Ke kaloku, emva kweentsuku ezintlanu, wehla umbingeleli omkhulu, uHananiya, enamadoda amakhulu, neciko elithile elinguTertulo, bona bengabamangaleli bakaPawulos kwirhuluneli."
Acts24:2 Ke kaloku, akubizelwa ndawonye, waqala uTertulo ukummangalela, esithi, Sizola kakhulu ngawe, nokuthi lusenzelwa olu hlanga imisebenzi emihle kakhulu, ngolungiselelo lwakho;"
Acts24:3 Sikwamkela oko, nasezindaweni zonke, Felikis odume kunene, sinombulelo."
Acts24:4 Ke ukuze ndingabi sakubambezela ngakumbi, ndiyakubongoza ukuba ukhe usive kancinane ngokuthantamisa kwakho."
Acts24:5 Kuba siyifumene le ndoda isisitshididi, umphambanisi kuwo onke amaYuda akwelimiweyo, ingumkhokeli walo ihlelo lamaNazarete;"
Acts24:6 owazama ukuhlambela itempile, esathi samthabatha, safuna ukubagweba ngomthetho wethu."
Acts24:7 Kodwa umthetheli-waka uLisiya wafika phezu kwethu, wamhlutha esandleni sethu ngogonyamelo olukhulu;"
Acts24:8 ebathethela ngelithi, mabeze kuwe abamangaleli bakhe, wothi wena ngokwakho, wakuzincina zonke iindawo, ube nako ukuziqonda kuye ezo siyimangalela ngazo thina."
Acts24:9 Avumelana nawo ke amaYuda, esithi zinjalo ezo zinto."
Acts24:10 Waphendula ke uPawulos, yakunqwala kuye irhuluneli ukuba athethe, waphendula wathi, Ndisazi nje, ukuba sekuyiminyaka emininzi ungumgwebi kolu hlanga, kokukhona ndiziphendulela ngomxhelo owonwabileyo."
Acts24:11 Kungokuba uqonde, ukuba ziselishumi elinambini iintsuku, ndenyuka ndaya kunqula eYerusalem;"
Acts24:12 nasetempileni abandifumananga ndixoxa namntu, ndisenza nasiphendu, nasezindlwini zesikhungu, naphi phakathi komzi;"
Acts24:13 Kananjalo abanako ukuzimisa izinto abandimangalela ngazo ngoku.
Acts24:14 Ke ndiyakuvuma oku kuwe, ukuba ngeNdlela abathi bona sisiphambusa, ndenjenjalo ukumnqula uThixo woobawo, ndikholwa zizinto zonke ezibhaliweyo emthethweni nasebaprofetini;"
Acts24:15 ndinethemba kuThixo, into ke abayilindileyo nabo ngokwabo, ukuba kuza kubakho uvuko lwabafileyo, lwamalungisa kwanolwabangemalungisa."
Acts24:16 Ke kaloku, kule nto nam ngokwam ndiyazama, ukuba ngamaxesha onke ndingabi nasazela sikhubekisa nganto ngakuThixo nangakubantu."
Acts24:17 Emva kweminyaka emininzi, ndafika ndizisa amalizo neminikelo kuhlanga lwakowethu."
Acts24:18 Kwezo nto andifumana etempileni ndenziwe nyulu, ndingenzi siphendu, ndingenzi nasiphithiphithi amaYuda athile elaseAsiya;"
Acts24:19 abemelwe kukubakho apha phambi kwakho, andimangalele, ukuba angaba anendawo ngakum;"
Acts24:20 okanye mabathi aba balapha, ukuba kukho nto imbi bayifumene kum, bakubon’ ukuba ndimi entlanganisweni yamatyala;"
Acts24:21 ingelilo elo lizwi linye, ndadandulukayo ngalo ndimi phakathi kwabo, lokuthi, Kungalo uvuko lwabafileyo endimangalelwayo mna nini namhla."
Acts24:22 Ke kaloku, akuziva ezi zinto uFelikis, ezazi ngokhona kucokisekileyo iindawo zaloo Ndlela, wabalibazisa, wathi, Xa athe wehla uLisiya umthetheli-waka, ndoziqiqa kakuhle iindawo zenu."
Acts24:23 Wamisela umthetheli-khulu, ukuba agcinwe uPawulos, abe nokuyekelelwa, kungalelwa nabani wakowabo ukumnceda, nokuba eze kuye."
Acts24:24 Ke kaloku, emva kwemihla ethile, wafika uFelikis enoDrusila umkakhe, umYudakazi, wathumela ukuba kubizwe uPawulos, wamva ethetha ngokukholwa kuKristu."
Acts24:25 Ethetha ngobulungisa, nokuzeyisa, nangogwebo oluza kubakho, wangenwa kukoyika uFelikis, waphendula wathi, Hamba okwakalokunje; ndakuba ndinethuba, ndokubiza uze."
Acts24:26 Kunye ke noko, wayethembe ukuba wonikwa imali nguPawulos, ukuze amkhulule; ngako oko kwaba kukhona ambiza futhi, ukuba eze axoxe naye."
Acts24:27 Ke kaloku, kwakubon’ ukuba kudlule iminyaka emibini, kwangena uFelikis uPorkiyo Festo;"
Acts25:1 Uthe ngoko uFesto, akuba engene eburhulumenteni, wathi emva kweentsuku ezintathu, wenyuka waya eYerusalem, esuka eKesareya."
Acts25:2 Umbingeleli omkhulu nabaphathi bamaYuda bammangalela uPawulos kuye, bambongoza,"
Acts25:3 becela ukuba abababale abe ebize eze eYerusalem, bemlalele ukuze bambulale endleleni."
Acts25:4 Waphendula ke uFesto wathi, ugcinwe eKesareya uPawulos; naye ke ngokwakhe uza kuya kamsinya."
Acts25:5 Wathi, Mabathi ngoko abanako phakathi kwenu, behle nam, baye kuyimangalela le ndoda, ukuba kukho bubi kuye."
Acts25:6 Akuba ke elibele kubo iintsuku ezingaphezu kweshumi, wehla waya eKesareya; ngengomso, akuba ehleli esihlalweni sokugweba, wathi uPawulos makaziswe."
Acts25:7 Akufika, amaYuda awayehle evela eYerusalem amngqonga, emtyhola ngezityholo ezininzi ezinzulu uPawulos, awayengenako ukuzingqina."
Acts25:8 Uthe ke eziphendulela wathi, Kumthetho wamaYuda, nasetempileni, nakuKesare, andonanga nto."
Acts25:9 Ke uFesto, ethanda ukukholisa amaYuda, wamphendula uPawulos wathi, Uyafuna na ukunyuka uye eYerusalem, lithethwe khona ityala lezi zinto phambi kwam?"
Acts25:10 Wathi ke uPawulos, Ndimi esihlalweni sokugweba sikaKesare, apho limele ukuthethwa khona ityala lam. AmaYuda andiwonanga nganto, njengokuba nawe usazi kakuhle."
Acts25:11 Ke ukuba ndonile, nokuba ndenze into elingene ukufa, andali ukufa; kodwa ukuba akukho nanye yezo zinto bandimangalela ngazo aba, akukho namnye unako ukundinikela kubo. Ndibhenela kuKesare."
Acts25:12 Waza uFesto, akuba ethethe nentlanganiso yamatyala, waphendula wathi, Ubhenele kuKesare; uya kuya kuKesare."
Acts25:13 Kwakuba ntsuku, uAgripa, ukumkani, noBhernike beza eKesareya, besiza kubulisa uFesto."
Acts25:14 Bakuba ke behleli khona imihla emininzi, uFesto wamcacisela ukumkani iindawo ezingoPawulos, esithi, Kukho ndoda ithile ishiyiweyo nguFelikis,"
Acts25:15 abathi, oko ndibe ndiseYerusalem, ababingeleli abakhulu namadoda amakhulu amaYuda bammangalela, befuna ukuba igwetywe."
Acts25:16 Endathi kubo, Asilosiko lamaRoma ukumnikela umntu ekufeni, ngaphambi kokuba lowo umangalelweyo ajongane nabamangaleli, aze afumane ithuba lokuziphendulela ngalo ityala analo."
Acts25:17 Bathe ke bakuba befikile apha, andizange ndilibazise, ngengomso ndahlala esihlalweni sokugweba, ndathi mayiziswe le ndoda."
Acts25:18 Abamangaleli bakhe, bakuvela, abamisanga nalinye ityala lezo zinto bendizicingela mna;"
Acts25:19 Kodwa ke baye beneembuzwano ezithile naye ngokuhlonela kwabo izithixo, nangaYesu uthile ufileyo, abesithi yena uPawulos uhleli."
Acts25:20 Ndakuthingaza ke mna ngawo umbuzo wale ndawo, ndathi, Unga ungaya eYerusalem na, lithethwe khona ityala lezi zinto?"
Acts25:21 Akubon’ ukuba ke uPawulos ubhenele ukuba agcinelwe isigwebo soMhlekazi, ndathi makagcinwe, ndide ndimthumele kuKesare."
Acts25:22 Wathi ke uAgripa kuFesto, Bendinga nam ndingakhe ndimve umntu lowo. Wathi yena, Uya kumva ngomso."
Acts25:23 Kwathi ngengomso, akufika uAgripa enoBhernike, benobukhazikhazikhazi obukhulu, bangene kwindawo yetyala, benabathetheli-waka namadoda amakhulu omzi, waziswa uPawulos ngokomlomo kaFesto."
Acts25:24 Wathi ke uFesto, Agripa, kumkani, nani nonke madoda akhoyo apha kunye nathi, niyayibona le ndoda, ethe yonke inkitha yamaYuda yandenzela yona naseYerusalem nalapha, ibhomboloza isithi, akafanele kuphila, hayi kwaphela."
Acts25:25 Kodwa ndithe ndakufumana ukuba akenzanga nto ilingene ukufa, nokuba yena ngokwakhe ubhenele kuMhlekazi, ndagqiba kwelokuba ndimthumele kuye,"
Acts25:26 endingenanto iyinyaniso ndingayibhalayo ngaye enkosini yam. Ngako oko ndimzise phambi kwenu, ngokukodwa phambi kwakho, kumkani Agripa, ukuze, kwakubon’ ukuba kunciniwe, ndibe nento endingayibhalayo;"
Acts25:27 Kum kubonakala ibubudenge, ukuba kuthunyelwe ikhonkxwa, lingaqondakaliswa netyala elinalo."
Acts26:1 Wathi ke uAgripa kuPawulos, Uvunyelwe ukuba uziphendulele. Wasolula ke isandla uPawulos, waziphendulela;"
Acts26:2 Ndiba onoyolo, kumkani Agripa, ngokuba ndiza kuziphendulela namhlanje phambi kwakho, ngazo zonke iindawo endimangalelwe ngazo ngamaYuda;"
Acts26:3 ngokukodwa ekubeni unolwazi ngawo onke amasiko neembuzwano zamaYuda. Kungoko ndiyakubongoza ukuba undive, undinyamezele."
Acts26:4 Indlela endandiphila ngayo kwasebuncinaneni bam, eyayikho ekuqaleni kohlanga lwakowethu eYerusalem, ayawazi onke amaYuda."
Acts26:5 Endaziyo kwasekuqalekeni, ukuba angathanda ukungqina, ukuba, ngelona licokisekileyo ihlelo lonqulo lwakowethu, ndahlala ndingumFarisi."
Acts26:6 Ngoku ke ndimi ndigwetyiwe, ngenxa yethemba ledinga elenziwa nguThixo koobawo;"
Acts26:7 ezithembe ukufika kulo izizwe zakowethu ezilishumi elinazibini, zimkhonza nje uThixo ngenyameko imini nobusuku; Elo themba elo ndimangalelwe ngamaYuda, kumkani Agripa."
Acts26:8 Yini na ukuba nithi, yinto eningenakukholwa yiyo, ukuba uThixo uyabavusa abafileyo?"
Acts26:9 Mna okunene ke bendiba nam ngokwam, ndimelwe kukukwenza izinto ezininzi ezichasene negama likaYesu waseNazarete."
Acts26:10 Endakwenzayo ke oko eYerusalem; nento eninzi yabangcwele ndayitshixela ezintolongweni, ndakuba ndamkele igunya kubabingeleli abakhulu; kwaye xa bebulawa, ndakhupha ilizwi lam ngokuchasene nabo."
Acts26:11 Nakuzo zonke izindlu zesikhungu ndibe ndibohlwaya futhi, ndibanyanzela ukuba banyelise; ndathi, ndibagezela ngokuncamisileyo, ndabatshutshisa, ndada ndesa kwimizi engaphandle."
Acts26:12 Endathi ke, xa ndisiya eDamasko, ndinegunya nomyalelo kubabingeleli abakhulu;"
Acts26:13 Emini enkulu endleleni, kumkani, ndabona ukukhanya kuvela ezulwini, okungaphezu kokuqaqamba kwelanga, kundibanekela ngeenxa zonke, nabo babehamba nam."
Acts26:14 Sakubon’ ukuba siwile sonke emhlabeni, ndeva izwi lithetha nam ngentetho yesiHebhere, lisithi, Sawule, Sawule, unditshutshiselani na? wenzakala, ukhaba iimviko nje."
Acts26:15 Ndathi ke mna, Ungubani na, Nkosi? Wathi ke yena, Mna ndinguYesu omtshutshisayo wena."
Acts26:16 Kodwa sukuma, ume ngeenyawo; kuba ndibonakele kuwe ngenxa yoku, ukuze ndikwenze umlungiseleli nengqina lezi zinto uzibonileyo, nendiya kubonakala kuwe ngazo;"
Acts26:17 ndikuhlangula ebantwini nasezintlangeni, endikuthumela kuzo ngoku;"
Acts26:18 ukuba uvule amehlo abo, ukuze babuye ebumnyameni, beze ebumhlotsheni; babuye egunyeni likaSathana, beze kuThixo; ukuze bamkele uxolelo lwezono, nelifa phakathi kwabangcwalisiweyo, ngokukholwa kum."
Acts26:19 Kuthe ngoko, kumkani Agripa, andibanga ngongawuthobeliyo umbono wasemazulwini;"
Acts26:20 ndesuka ndababikela abaseDamasko kuqala, nabaseYerusalem, nakulo lonke ilizwe lakwaYuda, nakuzo iintlanga, ukuba baguquke babuyele kuThixo, benze imisebenzi efanele inguquko."
Acts26:21 Ngenxa yezi zinto amaYuda andibamba etempileni, azamela ukundibulala."
Acts26:22 Ngoko ndizuze uncedo kuThixo nje, ndihleli kwada kwayile mini, ndingqina kwabancinane kwanabakhulu, ndingathethi nanye into ngaphandle kwezo, bathi abaprofeti noMoses ziya kubakho;"
Acts26:23 zokuba uKristu ubeza kuva iintlungu, nokuba ubeza kuthi, engowokuqala eluvukweni lwabafileyo, azise ukukhanya ebantwini nasezintlangeni."
Acts26:24 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba uyaziphendulela ngokunjalo, uFesto wathi ngezwi elikhulu, Uyageza, Pawulos; imfundo eninzi iyakugezisa."
Acts26:25 Wathi ke yena, Andigezi, Festo odumileyo; kodwa ndithetha amazwi enyaniso nawengqondo ephilileyo."
Acts26:26 Kuba ezo ndawo uyazazi kakuhle ukumkani, endithetha kuye ngokungafihlisiyo; kuba ndikholosekile kukuba akukho nanye yezi zinto ifihlakeleyo kuye; kuba le nto ibingenzelwanga egumbini."
Acts26:27 Uyakholwa na, kumkani Agripa, ngabaprofeti? Ndiyazi ukuba uyakholwa."
Acts26:28 Wathi ke uAgripa kuPawulos, Ngokuncinane undeyisela ukuba ndibe ngumKristu."
Acts26:29 Wathi uPawulos, Ndithandaza kuThixo, ukuba ingabi nguwe wedwa, ibe ngabo bonke abandivayo namhlanje, abaya kuthi, nangokuncinane nangokukhulu, babe njengam nje, ngaphandle kwezi ntambo."
Acts26:30 Akuba etshilo, besuka ukumkani, nerhuluneli, noBhernike, kwanababehleli nabo;"
Acts26:31 beshenxile, bathetha bodwa besithi, Lo mntu akenze nanye into elingene ukufa neentambo."
Acts26:32 Wathi ke uAgripa kuFesto, Lo mntu ange enokukhululwa, ukuba ubengabhenele kuKesare."
Acts27:1 Ke kaloku, kwakugqitywa kwelokuba sisuke ngomkhombe siye kwelaseItali, bamnikela uPawulos kwanabanye ababanjwa abathile kumthetheli-khulu, ogama linguYuliyo, webutho loMhlekazi."
Acts27:2 Sangena enqanaweni yaseAdramitatiyo, iza kunduluka isiya kwimida yelaseAsiya, sanduluka, wayekunye nathi uAristarko, umMakedoni waseTesalonika."
Acts27:3 Ngemini elandelayo sagaleleka eSidon; waza uYuliyo wamphatha uPawulos ngobubele, wamvumela ukuba aye ezihlotyeni zakhe, ongiwe."
Acts27:4 Sanduluka apho, sahamba ngomkhombe, sabetha ezantsi kweSipro, ngenxa yokuba imimoya ibivela ngaphambili."
Acts27:5 Sathi sakuwela ulwandle lwaseKiliki nasePamfili, safika eMira yelaseLikiya."
Acts27:6 Apho umthetheli-khulu wafumana umkhombe wakwa-Alesandire, usiya kwelaseItali, wasibeka khona."
Acts27:7 Ke kaloku iintsuku zanela sihamba kancinane, kwaba ngenkankulu ukuba sifike ngaseKinido. Uthe wakuba umoya ungasivumeli ukuba sihambe, sabetha ezantsi kweKrete ngaseSalimone."
Acts27:8 Sahamba ngenkankulu, safika kwindawo ebizwa ngokuba ngamaChweba aMahle; kufuphi nawo umzi waseLaseya."
Acts27:9 Ke kaloku, kwakubon’ ukuba ixesha laligqithile, nakubon’ ukuba kuseyingozi ukuhamba ngomkhombe, ekubeni kaloku ukuzila kwase kusele kudlule, wabayala uPawulos,"
Acts27:10 wathi kubo, Madoda, ndiyabona ukuba olu hambo luza kuba nenkxwaleko nokonakala okukhulu, kungekwamthwalo namkhombe wodwa, kukokobomi bethu nabo."
Acts27:11 Kodwa umthetheli-khulu wayethambele okomqhubi nokomninimkhombe ukuthetha, kunokukaPawulos."
Acts27:12 Ke kaloku, ichweba lingakulungele nje ukuba kudluliswe busika kulo, abona baninzi kubo baceba ukuba kundulukwe khona, ukuba mhlawumbi bangaba bafike eFenike, badlulise ubusika khona apho. Eli lizibuko laseKrete, elibheke emzantsi-ntshona, nakumntla-ntshona."
Acts27:13 Kuthe ke, wakubetha impepho umoya wasezantsi, beba bakuzuzile ababekungxamele, banduluka, badlula kufuphi neKrete."
Acts27:14 Kuthe kungekabi ntsuku zininzi, kwabakho umoya ovuthuzayo, ogama liyiYurokelo."
Acts27:15 Kuthe ke kwakubon’ ukuba uthiwe hlasi umkhombe, awaba nako ukumelana nomoya, sasesiwuyeka; saqhutywa."
Acts27:16 Sathi sakubaleka ke, sibetha ngaphantsi kwesiqithana esithile, ekuthiwa yiKlawuda, kwaba ngenkankulu ukuba sibe nako ukuwubamba umkhonjana;"
Acts27:17 abathe bakuwufunqula, basebenza ngezinto zokunceda, bewubhinqisa umkhombe; kananjalo bathi, besoyika ukuba bangeyela entlabathini, bazifinyeza iiseyile, baqhutywa benjalo."
Acts27:18 Sakuba ke sivuthuza ngamandla, ngengomso bawenza khaphukhaphu umkhombe;"
Acts27:19 Ngosuku lwesithathu, sazilahla ngezandla zethu iimpahla zomkhombe."
Acts27:20 Kuthe ke, kwakubon’ ukuba akubonakali langa nankwenkwezi iintsuku ezininzi, kucinezele neliqhwa elingelincinane, laphela kwathi tu lonke ithemba lokuba singasindiswa."
Acts27:21 Emva kokuzila ukudla ixesha elide, wesuka wema uPawulos phakathi kwabo, wathi, Hina madoda, ninge naniphulaphule kum, ananduluka eKrete, nizuzane nale nkxwaleko noku konakala."
Acts27:22 Nangoku ndiyaniluleka ukuba nibe nomxhelo owonwabileyo; kuba kuni aba, akukho uya kulahlekelwa bubomi bakhe, yoba ngumkhombe wodwa."
Acts27:23 Kuba ngobu busuku bekumi ngakum isithunywa sikaThixo, endingowakhe, endimkhonzayo,"
Acts27:24 sisithi, Musa ukoyika, Pawulos; umelwe kukuma phambi koKesare; uyabona, uThixo ukubabale ngabo bonke abasemkhombeni nawe."
Acts27:25 Kungoko ndithi, Yibani nomxhelo owonwabileyo, madoda; kuba ndiyakholwa nguThixo, ukuba kuya kuba njalo ngolo hlobo athethe ngalo kum."
Acts27:26 Kodwa simelwe kukuphoswa siqithini sithile.
Acts27:27 Ke kaloku, kwakufika ubusuku beshumi elinesine, sakubon’ ukuba siqhutywaqhutywaqhutywa ngumoya eAdriya, mayela phakathi kobusuku, oomatrose bazindla ukuba kukho mhlaba uthile basondelayo kuwo."
Acts27:28 Baza bakuba beyiphosile ilothe, bafumana ukuba ziifatom ezimashumi mabini; bethe tyi ke kancinane, baphinda bayiphosa ilothe, bafumana ukuba ziifatom ezilishumi elinantlanu."
Acts27:29 Bandula ke, besoyika ukuba hleze siwele ematyeni, baphosa iiankile ezine ngasemva, banqwenela ukuba kuse."
Acts27:30 Ke kaloku, bakubon’ ukuba bayabaleka oomatiloshe emkhombeni, bawuhlisa umkhombe elwandle, babonakala beza kuphosa iiankile enqanaweni."
Acts27:31 Wathi uPawulos kumthetheli-khulu nakumajoni, Ukuba aba abathanga bahlale emkhombeni, aninakusindiswa."
Acts27:32 Andula amasoldati azinqamla iintsontelo zomkhonjana, awuyeka wawa, wemka."
Acts27:33 Kwakuba kusile, uPawulos wabacenga bonke ukuba batye, esithi, Namhlanje ngumhla weshumi elinesine nilindile, nilindile, ningadli nto;"
Acts27:34 ke ngoko ndiyanibongoza ukuba nidle ukudla; kuba oko kuyelelene nokusindiswa kwenu; kuba akuyi kuwa nalunwele lwentloko kabani kuni.
Acts27:35 Akuba etshilo, wathabatha isonka, wabulela kuThixo phambi kwabo bonke, waqhekeza, waqala wadla."
Acts27:36 Bonke ke baba nomxhelo owonwabileyo, bathabatha ukudla nabo."
Acts27:37 Saye sonke emkhombeni siyimiphefumlo engamakhulu amabini anamashumi asixhenxe anesithandathu.
Acts27:38 Bakuba ke behluthi, bawenza khaphukhaphu umkhombe, beyiphosa elwandle ingqolowa."
Acts27:39 Kwakuba sekusile, abawazanga loo mhlaba, kodwa babona ichwetyana elithile linonxweme, babhunga ukuwutyhalela kulo umkhombe, ukuba bangaba nako."
Acts27:40 Baza, bezinqumla zonke iiankile, baziyekela elwandle, bezikhulule kunye nezibophelelo zemithi yokujika;"
Acts27:41 Bakuba ke begaxeleke endaweni enolwandle ngeenxa zombini, wangqubeka khona umkhombe; umphambili wabambelela ngokuqinileyo, wahlala engenakushukunyiswa;"
Acts27:42 Ke kaloku icebo lamasoldati lalisithi mababulawe amabanjwa, ukuze kungabikho bani udadayo, basabe."
Acts27:43 Kodwa umthetheli-khulu, enga angamsindisa uPawulos, wawalela kwinjongo yawo; Wathi abo banako ukudada, mabaziphose kuqala elwandle, bafike emhlabeni;"
Acts27:44 Abaseleyo ke, inxenye ikhwele eziplangeni, inxenye iphezu kwamaqhekeza omkhombe. Kwaye kwenzeka ukuba basinda bonke bekhuselekile emhlabeni."
Acts28:1 Bakuba besindile, baqala ukuqonda ukuba isiqhithi eso kuthiwa yiMelita."
Acts28:2 Amabharbhari ke lawo asenzela ububele obungasincinane; kuba aphemba umlilo, asamkela sonke ngenxa yemvula esifikeleyo, nangenxa yokubanda."
Acts28:3 Ke kaloku, akubon’ ukuba uPawulos utheze inyanda yeentsasa, wayibeka phezu komlilo, kwaphuma inyoka ebushushwini obo, yanamathela esandleni sakhe."
Acts28:4 Athe ke amabharbhari, akulibona irhamncwa lijinga esandleni sakhe, athi omnye komnye, Kanene lo mntu ungumbulali, nakuba esindile elwandle, impindezelo ayimvumeli ukuba adle ubomi."
Acts28:5 Lalivuthululela emlilweni irhamncwa, akeva kwenzakala."
Acts28:6 Ke bona babelinde ukuba uza kudumba, mhlawumbi athi qwaka, afe. Bakulinda ke umzuzwana, bakubona ukuba akahliwa nto, bajika bathi unguthixo."
Acts28:7 Ke kaloku, kuloo mmandla bekukho imihlaba yomntu omkhulu wesiqithi, ogama linguPubliyo; owasamkela ngobubele, wasenza undwendwe lwakhe iintsuku zantathu."
Acts28:8 Ke kaloku kwathi, uyise kaPubliyo wayelele phantsi ebanjwe yicesina nokuphalaza igazi; awathi uPawulos wangena kuye, wathandaza, wabeka izandla phezu kwakhe, wamphilisa."
Acts28:9 Kwakuba kusenzeka oko, beza nabanye ababenezifo esiqithini apho, baphiliswa;"
Acts28:10 bathi bona basenzela iimbeko ezininzi; sanduluka, basithwalisa ngezinto esizisweleyo."
Acts28:11 Ke kaloku, emva kweenyanga ezintathu, sanduluka ngomkhombe wakwa-Alesandire, obudlulise ubusika esiqithini, ogama linguCastor noPoluks."
Acts28:12 Sathi sakufika eSirakusi, sahlala khona iintsuku zantathu."
Acts28:13 Sisuka khona sajikeleza, safika eRegiyo; kwakuba ntsuku mnye, kwavuthuza umoya wasezantsi, safika ngengomso ePotiyoli;"
Acts28:14 Safumana abazalwana apho, basibongoza ukuba sihlale nabo iintsuku zibe sixhenxe; seza ngokunjalo eRoma."
Acts28:15 Bathe, bakukuva oko abazalwana, beza kusikhawulela, bada beza kufika kwintlanganiso ka-Apiyo naseTavene-Ntathu; awathi uPawulos, akubabona, wambulela uThixo, womelela."
Acts28:16 Ke kaloku, sakufika eRoma, umthetheli-khulu wabanikela ababanjwa kumthetheli-mkhosi, kodwa uPawulos wavunyelwa ukuba ahlale yedwa, nesoldati elimgcinayo."
Acts28:17 Ke kaloku kwathi, emva kweentsuku ezintathu, uPawulos wababizela ndawonye abaziintloko bamaYuda, ababebuthelene, wathi kubo, Madoda, bazalwana, nakuba ndingenzanga nto ichasene nabantu, namasiko awobawo, noko ndesuka ndaba ngumbanjwa eYerusalem, ndanikelwa ezandleni zamaRoma."
Acts28:18 Athe wona akundincina, afuna ukundikhulula, ngenxa yokuba kungekho tyala lakufa kum."
Acts28:19 Athe ke amaYuda akuphika, ndanyanzeleka ukuba ndibhenele kuKesare; kungengakuba ndibe ndibe ndilumangalela ngako uhlanga lwakowethu."
Acts28:20 Ndinibongoze ke ngenxa yeso sizathu ukuba nize, ndinibone, ndithethe nani, kuba ngenxa yethemba lakwaSirayeli ndikhonkxiwe ngalo mxokelelwane."
Acts28:21 Bathe ke bona kuye, Thina asizuzanga zincwadi zithetha ngawe, zivele kwelakwaYuda; kananjalo akufikanga bani wakubazalwana, owabika, wathetha nto ikhohlakeleyo ngawe."
Acts28:22 Sithanda ukuva ngawe, ukuba ucinga ntoni na; kuba ngalo eli hlelo siyazi ukuba lichasiwe ezindaweni zonke."
Acts28:23 Ke kaloku, bakummisela imini, kweza kuye into eninzi endlwini abehlala kuyo, wabatyhilela; awabacaciselayo, ebungqinela ubukumkani bukaThixo, ebebeyisela kokungoYesu, ethabatha emthethweni kaMoses kwanakubaprofeti, ethabathela kusasa kwada kwahlwa."
Acts28:24 Inxenye ke yakholwa zizo zinto, yaza inxenye ingakholwa."
Acts28:25 Bakuba bengavumelananga bodwa, bemka, akuba uPawulos ethethe ilizwi lalinye, wathi, uMoya oyiNgcwele wathetha kakuhle ngoIsaya umprofeti, koobawo bethu,"
Acts28:26 esithi, Hamba uye kwaba bantu, uthi, Ukuva oku niya kuva, ningaqondi; nokubona niya kubona, ningaqiqi;"
Acts28:27 Kuba intliziyo yaba bantu ithe fithi kukutyeba, Beva ngeendlebe ezithe nkqi, Bayawacima namehlo abo; hleze babone ngamehlo, beve ngeendlebe, baqonde ngentliziyo, bajike, ndibaphilise."
Acts28:28 Makwazeke ngoko kuni, ukuba usindiso lukaThixo luthunyelwe kuzo iintlanga; ziya kuluva zona."
Acts28:29 Akuba ezithethile ezi zinto, emka amaYuda, eneempikiswano ezinkulu phakathi kwawo."
Acts28:30 uPawulos wahlala iminyaka emibini iphela kweyakhe indlu ayiqeshileyo, wabamkela bonke ababesiza kuye,"
Acts28:31 ebuvakalisa ubukumkani bukaThixo, efundisa iindawo ezingeNkosi uYesu Kristu ngako konke ukungafihlisi, engalelwa bani."
Romans1:1 uPawulos, umkhonzi kaYesu Kristu, owabizwayo ukuba abe ngumpostile, owahlulelwa iindaba ezilungileyo zikaThixo,"
Romans1:2 (awathi ngedinga ngenxa engaphambili ngabo abaprofeti bakhe ezibhalweni ezingcwele),"
Romans1:3 ethetha ngoNyana wakhe, uYesu Krestu iNkosi yethu, owazalwa engowembewu kaDavide ngokwenyama;"
Romans1:4 wamiswa ukuba unguNyana kaThixo, enamandla, ngokomoya wobungcwele, ngokuvuka kwabafileyo;"
Romans1:5 Esathi ngaye samkela ubabalo nobupostile, ukuze ngenxa yegama lakhe kubekho ukulululamela ukholo phakathi kwazo zonke iintlanga;"
Romans1:6 eniphakathi kwabo nani, ababiziweyo bakaYesu Kristu;"
Romans1:7 ubhalela bonke abaseRoma, abaziintanda zikaThixo, abangcwele ababiziweyo, esithi, Makube lubabalo kuni, noxolo oluvela kuThixo uBawo wethu, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
Romans1:8 Kuqala ke, ndiyabulela kuThixo wam ngoYesu Kristu ngenxa yenu nonke, kuba ukholo lwenu luxelwa ehlabathini liphela."
Romans1:9 Kaloku ulingqina lam uThixo, endimkhonzayo ngomoya wam kwiindaba ezilungileyo zoNyana wakhe, okokuba andiyeki ukunikhankanya;"
Romans1:10 ndihlala ndikhunga, ukuba ndingade ngoku ndibe nempumelelo, ndize kuni nangakuphi, ngako ukuthanda kukaThixo."
Romans1:11 Kuba ndilangazelela ukunibona, ukuze ndinabele sibabalo sithile sisesomoya, ukuze nizimaseke;"
Romans1:12 oko ke kukuze ndivuseleleke nam phakathi kwenu, ngalo ukholo olukuthi sobabini, ngolwenu kwanangolwam."
Romans1:13 Ke andithandi ukuba ningazi, bazalwana, ukuba kufuthi ndizimisela entliziyweni yam ukuza kuni (ndathintelwa kwada kwanamhla), ukuze ndibe nasiqhamo sithile naphakathi kwenu, kwanjengaphakathi kwezinye iintlanga."
Romans1:14 KumaGrike kwanakumabharbhari, ndimelwe kukushumayela, kwakwizilumko kwanakwabaswele ukuqonda."
Romans1:15 Ngoko ke ndingxamele ukuzishumayela iindaba ezimnandi nakuni baseRoma.
Romans1:16 Kaloku andinazintloni ngazo iindaba ezimnandi zikaKrestu, kuba zingamandla kaThixo okusindisa bonke abakholwayo, kumYuda kuqala, kwanakumGrike."
Romans1:17 Kuba ngazo kutyhilwa ubulungisa bukaThixo, buphuma elukholweni buse elukholweni, njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Olilungisa ke uya kudla ubomi ngokokholo."
Romans1:18 Kuba ityhilekile ingqumbo kaThixo ivela emazulwini, ichase konke ukungahloneli Thixo, nentswela-bulungisa yabantu, abayithintelayo inyaniso ngokuswela ukulungisa."
Romans1:19 Ngokuba oko kwazekayo ngoThixo kuyabonakala ngaphakathi kwabo; ngokuba uThixo wabonakalalisa kubo.
Romans1:20 Kuba kwasekudalweni kwehlabathi, iindawo zakhe ezibe zingenakubonwa zibonwa kakuhle, ziqondeke, ngezinto ezenziweyo, kwa-amandla akhe angunaphakade, nobuThixo bakhe, ukuze bangabi nakuziphendulela;"
Romans1:21 Ngenxa enokuba bathe, bemazi uThixo, abamzukisa ngokoThixo, ababulela kuye; basuka bazizinto ezingento ezicamangweni zabo, yaza intliziyo yabo engenakuqonda yenziwa yamnyama;"
Romans1:22 bathi besiba bazizilumko, besuka baba ziziyatha;"
Romans1:23 baza ubuqaqawuli bukaThixo ongenakonakala babananisela intsobi yomfanekiselo womntu onokonakala, noweentaka, nowezinto ezizitho zine, nowezinambuzane."
Romans1:24 Kungoko athe, besezinkanukweni zeentliziyo zabo, uThixo wabanikela nokubanikela ekungcoleni, ukuba bahlazisane ngemizimba yabo;"
