Romans1:25 bona bananisele ubuxoki inyaniso kaThixo, basihlonela basikhonza isidalwa, begqitha kuMdali, ongowokubongwa kuse kuwo amaphakade. Amen."
Romans1:26 Ngenxa yoko, uThixo wabanikela ekuthabathekeni okulihlazo; kuba namankazana abo umsebenzi wasemvelweni awananisela okunxamnye nemvelo;"
Romans1:27 Kwaza kwangokunjalo ke namadoda, ewushiya umsebenzi wenkazana wasemvelweni, avutha ngokukhanukana kwawo; amadoda esenza okuziintloni kumadoda, ezamkelela umbuyekezo wokulahleka kwawo, abemelwe ke nguwo."
Romans1:28 Njengokuba ke bekumangele ukuhlala bemazi kakuhle uThixo, uThixo wabanikela engqiqweni engacikidekileyo, ukuba benze izinto ezingafanelekileyo;"
Romans1:29 bezele yiyo yonke intswela-bulungisa, okungendawo, ukubawa, ulunya; kuzele ngumona, ukubulala, iimpikiswano, inkohliso, ubutshijolo; abahlebezi,"
Romans1:30 abahlebi, abathiyekileyo kuThixo, abasileyo, abanekratshi, abaqhankqalazi, abacebi bezinto ezimbi, abangeva bazali;"
Romans1:31 bangenakuqonda, bagqithise iminqophiso, bangenamhawu, abangenatarhu, abangenanceba;"
Romans1:32 bona bathi, besazi kakuhle isimiselo sikaThixo, sokuba abo bazenzayo izinto ezinjalo bafanelwe kukufa, banganeli kukuzenza, basuka bathakazelele nabo bazenzayo."
Romans2:1 Kungoko ndithi, Akunakuziphendulela, mntundini ugwebayo, nokuba ungubani; kuba ngokugweba omnye, uzigweba kwawena; kuba wena ugwebayo wenza kwaezo zinto."
Romans2:2 Siyazi ke ukuba isigwebo sikaThixo siwa ngokwenyaniso phezu kwabo bazenzayo izinto ezinjalo.
Romans2:3 Ucinga na ke, mntundini ugweba abo bazenzayo izinto ezinjalo, ube usenza kwazona nawe, ukuthi, uya kusisaba na wena isigwebo sikaThixo?"
Romans2:4 Okanye uyabudela na ubutyebi bobubele bakhe, nonyamezelo, nokuzeka kade umsindo; ungazi ukuba ububele bukaThixo bukusa enguqukweni?"
Romans2:5 Ke uthi, ngokuba lukhuni kwakho, nentliziyo yakho engenakuguquka, uziqwebele ingqumbo, ngemini yengqumbo nokutyhilwa komgwebo onobulungisa kaThixo;"
Romans2:6 eya kubuyekeza elowo ngokwemisebenzi yakhe;
Romans2:7 Abo bathi ngomonde ekwenzeni okulungileyo bafune uzuko nembeko nokungonakali ubomi obungunaphakade;
Romans2:8 Ke bona abaneenkani, bengayilulameli inyaniso, balulamela intswela-bulungisa, nengqumbo, nengqumbo;"
Romans2:9 imbandezelo noxinaniso emphefumlweni wabantu bonke abasebenza okubi, kowomYuda ukuqala, kwanakowomGrike;"
Romans2:10 kubekho uzuko ke, nembeko, noxolo, kubantu bonke abasebenza okulungileyo, kumYuda ukuqala, kwanakumGrike."
Romans2:11 Kuba kuThixo akukho kukhetha buso.
Romans2:12 Kuba bonke abonileyo bengenamthetho, baya kutshabalala ngokunjalo bengenamthetho; nabo bonke abonileyo benomthetho, baya kugwetywa ngomthetho;"
Romans2:13 Ngokuba angabevayo umthetho asingabo abangamalungisa phambi koThixo; kodwa abenzi bomthetho abaya kugwetyelwa.
Romans2:14 Kuba xa abeentlanga abangenamthetho, besenza ngemvelo izinto ezisemthethweni, abo bengenawo umthetho, bangumthetho kubo ngokwabo:"
Romans2:15 abawubonakalalisa umsebenzi womthetho obhalwe ezintliziyweni zabo, singqinela isazela sabo, singqinelane nesazela sabo, neecamango zabo ziyamangalelana, nokuba ziyabagweba;"
Romans2:16 Kuya kuba njalo mhlenikweni uThixo aya kuzigweba izinto ezifihlakeleyo zabantu ngoYesu Kristu, ngokweendaba zam ezilungileyo."
Romans2:17 Uyabona, wena unegama lokuba ungumYuda, wayame ngomthetho, uqhayisa ngoThixo;"
Romans2:18 uyakwazi ukuthanda kwakhe; uzicikida izinto eziyiyo, uwutyelwe umthetho;"
Romans2:19 kwaye ukholose nje, ukuba wena ungumkhokeli weemfama, ukhanyiselo lwabasebumnyameni;"
Romans2:20 umluleki wabaswele ukuqonda, umfundisi weentsana, onesimilo sokwazi nesenyaniso emthethweni."
Romans2:21 Ndithi, wena ke umfundisayo omnye, akuzifundisi? wena ushumayela ukuba makubekho, uyeba na?"
Romans2:22 Wena ke, uthi mawungakrexezi, uyakrexeza na? Wena ukruqukileyo zizithixo, uhlambela na?"
Romans2:23 Wena ke uqhayisa ngomthetho, uyamhlazisa uThixo ngokugqitha umthetho?"
Romans2:24 Kaloku igama likaThixo linyeliswa ngenxa yenu phakathi kweentlanga, njengoko kubhaliweyo."
Romans2:25 Ulwaluko luyanceda okunene, ukuba uyawenza umthetho; kodwa ukuba ungumgqithi womthetho, ulwaluko lwakho lusuke lwaba kukungaluki."
Romans2:26 Ngoko ke, ukuba ongalukileyo uthi azigcine izimiselo zomthetho, akuyi kuthi na ukungaluki kwakhe kubalelwe ekuthini kukwaluka?"
Romans2:27 Kuthi ukungaluki, oko kwasemvelweni, ngokuwuzalisa umthetho, kukugwebe wena ungumgqithi-mthetho, noko unesibhalo nolwaluko?"
Romans2:28 Kuba umYuda asingulowo unguye ngokwangaphandle; Nolwaluko asilulo olo lwangaphandle enyameni;
Romans2:29 umYuda ngulowo wasemfihlekweni; Ulwaluko lolwentliziyo ngomoya, kungengantetho; lowo ukudunyiswa kwakhe kungaphumi bantwini, kuphuma kuThixo."
Romans3:1 Ugqithisele ngantoni na ngoko umYuda kwabanye? Kunceda ntoni na ukwaluka?
Romans3:2 Kukhulu, ngeendlela zonke. Kuba ke, ukuqala, baphathiswa izihlabo zikaThixo."
Romans3:3 Kuyini na khona, ukuba abathile abakholwanga? Ngaba ukungakholwa kwabo kuya kuluphuthisa na ukholo lukaThixo?"
Romans3:4 Nakanye! uThixo yena makabe nenyaniso, bonke abantu ke babe ngamaxoki; njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ukuze ube nokugwetyelwa emazwini akho, Weyise ekugwetyweni."
Romans3:5 Ke ukuba ukuswela-kulungisa kwethu kuqondakalisa ubulungisa bukaThixo, sothini na? Ulilungisa nguThixo na, ophindezelayo? (Ndithetha njengendoda)"
Romans3:6 Nakanye! Oko ubengathini na uThixo ukuligweba ihlabathi?
Romans3:7 Ukuba inyaniso kaThixo iphuphumele ekuthini azukiswe ngobuxoki bam; yini na ukuba ndisagwetywe njengomoni?
Romans3:8 Yini na ukuba singabi sesisithi (ngoko ke sinyeliswayo, ngoko ke abathile bathi, sithi thina), Masenze okubi, ukuze kuvele okulungileyo? abakugwetywa kuyeleleyo."
Romans3:9 Kuthiweni na ngoko? Ngaba thina sibhetele kunabo? Hayi, nakanye! Kuba besesiwamisele ngenxa engaphambili amaYuda kwanamaGrike, ukuba baphantsi kwesono bonke;"
Romans3:10 njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Akukho lungisa, hayi, nalinye;"
Romans3:11 Akukho uqondayo; akukho umfunisisayo uThixo.
Romans3:12 Bonke baphambukile, abancedi lutho xa bebonke; Akukho wenza okulungileyo, hayi, nokuba abe mnye."
Romans3:13 Lingcwaba elivulekileyo umqala wabo; Ngeelwimi zabo bamana ukukhohlisa; Ubuhlungu bephimpi buphantsi komlomo wabo.
Romans3:14 Abamlomo uzele ziziqalekiso nobukrakra.
Romans3:15 Iinyawo zabo zinamendu okuphalaza igazi;
Romans3:16 Lityumtyum neentsizi ezindleleni zabo;
Romans3:17 Nendlela yoxolo abayazanga.
Romans3:18 Akukho koyika Thixo phambi kwamehlo abo.
Romans3:19 Siyazi ke ukuba izinto zonke ozithethayo umthetho, uzithetha kwabaphantsi komthetho; ukuze imilomo yonke ivingcwe, nehlabathi lonke libe netyala kuThixo."
Romans3:20 Ngoko ke, ngokwasemisebenzini yomthetho, akuyi kugwetyelwa nyama emehlweni akhe; kuba isono saziwe ngokubakho komthetho."
Romans3:21 Ngoku ke kubonakaliswe ubulungisa bukaThixo, kungekho mthetho, bungqinelwa nguwo umthetho nabaprofeti;"
Romans3:22 ubulungisa ke bukaThixo, obungokukholwa kuYesu Kristu, bube bobabo bonke, buphezu kwabo bonke abakholwayo;"
Romans3:23 Kuba bonile bonke, basilelela eluzukweni lukaThixo;"
Romans3:24 begwetyelwe ngesisa lubabalo lwakhe ngako ukukhululwa ngentlawulelo ekuYesu Kristu;
Romans3:25 athe uThixo wammisa, ukuba abe sisicamagushelo ngegazi lakhe, ngako ukukholwa, ukuze bubonakalaliswe ubulungisa bakhe ngenxa yokuyekelelwa kwezono ezibe zenziwe ngenxa engaphambili, ekunyamezeleni kukaThixo;"
Romans3:26 ukuze bubonakalaliswe ubulungisa bakhe ngeli xesha lakalokunje, ukuze abe lilungisa, kwanomgwebeli walowo waselukholweni lukaYesu."
Romans3:27 Luphi na ngoko uqhayiso? Ayibandakanywa. Ngawuphi umthetho? yemisebenzi? Hayi, kungomthetho wokholo."
Romans3:28 Ngoko ke sigqiba kwelithi, umntu ugwetyelwa ngokholo, kungekho misebenzi yamthetho."
Romans3:29 Ngaba unguThixo wamaJuda kuphela? Akanguye na noweentlanga? Ewe, ngoweentlanga nazo;"
Romans3:30 ekubeni emnye uThixo, oya kugwebela abolwaluko ngokwaselukholweni, nabangengabolwaluko ngalo ukholo."
Romans3:31 Umthetho ngoko siyawuphuthisa na ngalo ukholo? Nakanye! Siyawumisa umthetho.
Romans4:1 Yintoni na ngoko esiya kuthi, uAbraham, ubawo wethu, ufumene yona ngokwenyama?"
Romans4:2 Kuba uAbraham, ukuba wayegwetyelwe ngokwasemisebenzini, ange eneqhayiya; kodwa phambi koThixo."
Romans4:3 Kuba sithini na isibhalo? uAbraham wakholwa kuThixo, kwaza oko kwabalelwa kuye ebulungiseni."
Romans4:4 Ke kaloku, kulowo usebenzayo, umvuzo awubalelwa ngokwaselubabalweni;"
Romans4:5 Ke kulowo ungasebenziyo, ekholwa kuye lowo umgwebelayo umntu ongahloneli Thixo, ukholo lwakhe lubalelwa ebulungiseni."
Romans4:6 Kwanjengokuba noDavide eluchaza ubabalo lomntu, athe uThixo wabalela ubulungisa ngaphandle kwemisebenzi;"
Romans4:7 Esithi, Banoyolo ababugwenxa babo buxolelweyo, nabazono zigutyungelweyo;"
Romans4:8 Inoyolo indoda eya kuthi iNkosi ingakhe ibalele sono kuyo.
Romans4:9 Olu luyolo ngoko lunconywayo lulolwabolwaluko bodwa na? Asilulo olwabo bangebolwaluko nabo na? Kuba sithi, kuAbraham ukholo lwabalelwa ebulungiseni."
Romans4:10 Kwathiwani na ke ngoko ukubalelwa kuye? Wayekuko nokuba walukile na? Hayi, ndisekungalukini."
Romans4:11 Waza wamkela umqondiso wolwaluko, waba litywina lokuqinisa ubulungisa bokholo awayenalo esekungalukini, ukuze abe nguyise wabo bonke abakholwayo besekubeni bengalukanga; ukuze babalelwe kubo ubulungisa;"
Romans4:12 abe nguyise wabalukileyo, kungengabolwaluko bodwa;"
Romans4:13 Kuba ukumbeka ngedinga uAbraham, nembewu yakhe, lokuba yindlalifa yalo ihlabathi, bekungengomthetho; bekungobulungisa bokholo."
Romans4:14 Kuba abo basemthethweni, ukuba ngabo iindlalifa, ukholo lungaba lwenziwe into engento, nedinga lingaba liphuthisiwe;"
Romans4:15 Kaloku umthetho usebenza ingqumbo. Ke apho kungekho mthetho, akukho sigqitho."
Romans4:16 Ngoko ke ilifa liphuma elukholweni, ukuze libe ngokobabalo; ukuze idinga liqiniseke kuyo yonke imbewu; kungekuphela nje abo basemthethweni, kodwa kwanabo baselukholweni luka-Abraham; ngubani ubawo wethu sonke."
Romans4:17 Njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ndikumisile ukuba ube nguyise weentlanga ezininzi;"
Romans4:18 Owakholwayo ngethemba, kungekho nethemba eli, ukuze abe nguyise weentlanga ezininzi, njengoko kwakutshiwoyo ukuthi, Iya kuba njalo imbewu yakho."
Romans4:19 Akazange abe buthathaka elukholweni, akawukhathalelanga umzimba wakhe owawusele ufile, xa wayeneminyaka emalunga nekhulu ubudala, kwanakukufa kwesizalo sikaSara."
Romans4:20 Akazange athandabuze idinga likaThixo ngokungakholwa; womelela elukholweni, ezukisa uThixo;"
Romans4:21 Eqinisekile ukuba oko akuthembisileyo, unako nokukwenza."
Romans4:22 Kungoko kwabalelwa nokubalelwa ebulungiseni kuye.
Romans4:23 Ke kaloku, ukuba kwabalelwa kuye, akubhalwanga ngenxa yakhe yedwa;"
Romans4:24 Kodwa nangenxa yethu, baza kubalelwa kuthi, thina bakholwayo kulowo wamvusayo uYesu iNkosi yethu kwabafileyo;"
Romans4:25 owanikelwa ngenxa yezono zethu, waza wabuya wavuswa ngenxa yokugwetyelwa kwethu."
Romans5:1 Ngoko, sigwetyelwe nje ngokwaselukholweni, sinoxolo kuThixo ngayo iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu;"
Romans5:2 Esaba nako ngaye ukuthi singene ngokholo kolu lubabalo simiyo kulo, siqhayise ngokuthemba uzuko lukaThixo."
Romans5:3 Asikukuphela ke oko; sizingca nangeembandezelo ezi, sisazi ukuba imbandezelo isebenza unyamezelo;"
Romans5:4 unyamezelo ke lusebenza ukucikideka; namava, ithemba;"
Romans5:5 Ithemba alidanisi; ngokuba uthando lukaThixo luthululelwe ezintliziyweni zethu ngoMoya oyiNgcwele, esamnikwayo."
Romans5:6 Kuba uKristu uthe, sakuba sisengama-athalala, wabafela ngexesha elimisiweyo abangahloneli Thixo."
Romans5:7 Kuba kungangenkankulu ukuthi ubani afele ilungisa; kuba uthi mhlawumbi ubani abe nobuganga bokumfela olungileyo;
Romans5:8 Ke yena uThixo uqondakalisa okwakhe ukusithanda ngokuthi, sakubon’ ukuba sisengaboni, uKristu asifele."
Romans5:9 Kokukhona sigwetyelwe nje ngegazi lakhe, siya kusindiswa ngaye kuyo ingqumbo."
Romans5:10 Kuba xa sithe, besiziintshaba nje, saxolelaniswa noThixo ngako ukufa koNyana wakhe: kokhona, sixolelanisiwe nje, siya kusindiswa ngobomi bakhe."
Romans5:11 Asikukuphela ke oko; singabazingca nokuzingca nangaye uThixo, ngayo iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, esamkele ngayo kalokunje ucamagushelo."
Romans5:12 Ngenxa yoko, njengokuba isono sangena ngamntu mnye ehlabathini, kwangena ke ukufa ngaso isono; kwaza ngokunjalo ukufa kwabatyhutyha abantu bonke, ekubeni bonke bonayo;"
Romans5:13 Kuba kude kwakho umthetho, kukho isono ehlabathini, sibe ke isono singabalelwa ekubeni ungekho umthetho."
Romans5:14 Ke ukufa kwalawula, ukususela kuAdam kwezisa kuMoses, nakwabo bangonanga ngendlela efana nesigqitho sika-Adam, ongumfanekiselo walowo ubeza kubakho."
Romans5:15 Kodwa ke sona isipho asibanga njengesiphoso. Kuba, xa abaninzi bafa sisiphoso somnye, kokukhona ubabalo lukaThixo, nesipho esingobabalo olu, esa ngamntu mnye, uYesu Kristu, lwaphuphumela kubo abaninzi aba."
Romans5:16 Kaloku isipho sesiphoso asinjengokuba kwaba njalo ngalowo mnye wonayo. Kuba okunene isigwebo seza ngenxa yalowo mnye, sesa ekugwetyweni; ke sona isibabalo seza ngenxa yeziphoso ezininzi, sesa ekugwetyelweni."
Romans5:17 Kaloku xa kwathi ngesono samntu mnye ukufa kwalawula ngalowo mnye; kobeka phi na ke abamkela ukuphuphuma kobabalo, noko kuphiwa ubulungisa, baya kulawula ebomini ngaye lo umnye, uYesu Kristu."
Romans5:18 Ngoko ke, njengokuba kwathi ngasiphoso sinye kwabakho ukugwetywa kwabo bonke abantu; Ngokunjalo nangesenzo esinye sobulungisa, isipho sesisa kwabafikela bonke abantu, begwebela ubomi."
Romans5:19 Kuba njengokuba kwathi, ngokungeva komntu omnye lowo, abaninzi benziwa aboni, ngokunjalo kuya kuthi, nangokuva komnye lo, abaninzi benziwe amalungisa."
Romans5:20 Ke kaloku umthetho ungene, ukuze isikreqo sande. Ke apho sandayo isono, lwaphuphuma ngakumbi ubabalo;"
Romans5:21 ukuze, njengokuba isono saba nokulawula ngokufa, ngokunjalo nobabalo lube nokulawula ngobulungisa, luse ebomini obungunaphakade ngoYesu Kristu, iNkosi yethu."
Romans6:1 Sithini na ke ngoko? Sihlale esonweni na, ukuze ubabalo lwande?"
Romans6:2 Nakanye! Thina safayo nje kwisono, singathini na ukuba sahlala kuso?"
Romans6:3 Anazi na ukuba thina sonke, sabhaptizelwayo kuKristu Yesu, sabhaptizelwa ekufeni kwakhe?"
Romans6:4 Ngoko ke sangcwatywa naye ngokubhaptizelwa ekufeni, ukuze, njengokuba uKrestu wavuswayo kwabafileyo ngalo uzuko loYise, sithi ngokunjalo nathi sihambe sinobomi obutsha."
Romans6:5 Kuba xa similiselwe kuye ngemfano yokufa kwakhe, somiliselwa kuye nangeyokuvuka kwakhe;"
Romans6:6 sikwazi nje oku, ukuba umntu wethu omdala wabethelelwa emnqamlezweni kunye naye, ukuze umzimba wesono uphuthiswe, size singabi sasikhonza isono;"
Romans6:7 Kaloku owafayo ugwetyelwe, wakhululwa kuso isono."
Romans6:8 Ukuba ke safa kunye noKristu, siyakholwa ukuba sodla ubomi kwandawonye naye;"
Romans6:9 Siyazi ukuba uKristu, evusiwe nje kwabafileyo, akabi safa; ukufa akusayi kuba nagunya kuye."
Romans6:10 Kuba ukufa awakufayo, wafela isono kwaba kanye;"
Romans6:11 Ngokunjalo nani zibaleleni ekuthini, ningabafileyo okunene kwisono; kodwa ningabadla ubomi kuThixo, nikuKristu Yesu, iNkosi yethu."
Romans6:12 Ngoko ke isono masingalawuli emzimbeni wenu onokufa, ukuze nisilulamele ngokwenza iinkanuko zawo."
Romans6:13 Kaloku amalungu enu maningawanikeli kuso isono, ukuba abe ziintonga zentswela-bulungisa;"
Romans6:14 Kaloku isono asiyi kuniphatha ngabukhosi; kuba aniphantsi komthetho, niphantsi kobabalo."
Romans6:15 Kuthiweni na ngoko? Sone na, kuba singekho phantsi komthetho, siphantsi kobabalo? Makube lee oko."
Romans6:16 Anazi na ukuba lowo nizinikela kuye ukuba ngabakhonzi bokumlulamela, ningabakhonzi ngoku kulowo nimlulamelayo; nokuba kungokwesono, kusingise ekufeni, nokuba kungokululama, kusingise ebulungiseni?"
Romans6:17 Makabulelwe ke kuThixo, kuba nithe, beningabakhonzi besono, nawululamela ngokwentliziyo umfuziselo wemfundiso enanikelwayo kuwo;"
Romans6:18 Nakhululwa ke kuso isono, naba ngabalawulwa bobulungisa."
Romans6:19 Ndithetha ngokwabantu, ngenxa yobulwelwe benyama yenu; kuba njengoko nawanikelayo amalungu enu ukuba abe ngabakhonzi bako ukungcola nokuchasa umthetho, ukuba nichase umthetho; ngokunjalo ke ngoku, wanikeleni amalungu enu ukuba abe ngabakhonzi kubo ubulungisa, ukuba ningcwaliseke."
Romans6:20 Kuba, oko nibe ningabakhonzi besono, beningabakhululekileyo kubo ubulungisa."
Romans6:21 Naye ninasiqhamo sini na ke ngelo xesha, ngezi zinto nineentloni ngazo ngoku? Kuba isiphelo sezo zinto kukufa."
Romans6:22 Ngoku ke, nikhululwe nje esonweni, naba ngabakaThixo, ninaso isiqhamo senu esisabungcwele, isiphelo ke eso bubomi obungunaphakade."
Romans6:23 Kaloku umvuzo wesono kukufa; ke sona isipho sikaThixo bubomi obungunaphakade, kuKristu Yesu iNkosi yethu."
Romans7:1 Anazi na, bazalwana (kuba ndithetha kwabawaziyo umthetho), ukuba umthetho umphatha ngobukhosi umntu ngexesha lonke adla ubomi ngalo?"
Romans7:2 Kuba umfazi owendileyo, ubotshiwe ngumthetho endodeni yakhe, lo gama idla ubomi; ke ukuba ithe yafa indoda, ukhululekile kuwo umthetho wendoda."
Romans7:3 Ngoko ke, ukuba uthe waba kuyimbi indoda, yakubon’ ukuba indoda yakhe isadla ubomi, kothiwa ngumkrexezikazi, ukuba angabi mkrexezikazi, ethe waba kuyimbi indoda."
Romans7:4 Ngoko ke, bazalwana bam, nani n’abulawa nafa kuwo umthetho ngawo umzimba kaKristu; ukuze nibe kuwumbi, kulowo ke uvukileyo kwabafileyo, ukuze sixakathe isiqhamo kuThixo thina."
Romans7:5 Kuba oko besikwinyama, ukuthabatheka zizono, okube kuxhokonxwa ngawo umthetho, kwakusebenza emalungwini ethu ekuxakatha isiqhamo esisa ekufeni."
Romans7:6 Ke ngoku sikhululwe thina kuwo umthetho, safayo nje kwesasibanjwe kuko, ukuze sikhonze sinobutsha bomoya, singakhonzi sinobudala bomthetho obhaliweyo."
Romans7:7 Sithini na ke ngoko? Umthetho usisono na? Makube lee oko. Ke ngendingasazanga isono, bekungekabikho emthethweni; kuba nenkanuko ngendingayazanga, ukuba umthetho ubungatshongo ukuthi, Uze ungakhanuki."
Romans7:8 Isono ke sizuze ithuba ngawo umthetho, sasebenza ngaphakathi kwam yonke inkanuko; kuba, kungekho mthetho, isono sifile."
Romans7:9 Mna ke bendifudula ndiphilile, ungekho umthetho; uthe ke wakufika umthetho, sabuya saphila isono, ndafa ke mna;"
Romans7:10 waza umthetho obumiselwe ukusa ebomini, ndawufumana usingisa ekufeni."
Romans7:11 Kuba isono, sizuze ithuba ngawo umthetho, sandilukuhla, saza ngawo sandibulala."
Romans7:12 Ngoko ke umyalelo okunene ungcwele; nomthetho ungcwele, unobulungisa, ulungile."
Romans7:13 Oko ke kulungileyo kwaba kukufa na ke kum? Makube lee oko. Isono ke, ukuze sibonakale sisisono, sisebenza ukufa kum ngako oko kulungileyo; ukuze isono ngawo umthetho sibe sisono ngokuncamisileyo."
Romans7:14 Siyazi ke ukuba umthetho ungowomoya; ke mna ndingowenyama; kuthengiswe ngam, ndaba phantsi kwesono."
Romans7:15 Kuba oko ndikwenzayo andikwazi mna; kuba endikuthandayo, oko andikwenzi; kodwa endikuthiyayo, oko ndiyakwenza."
Romans7:16 Ukuba ke endingakuthandiyo ndenza khona oko, ndivumelana nomthetho ukuba mhle."
Romans7:17 Ngoko ke ayisendim osebenza oko, seyisisono esi simiyo ngaphakathi kwam."
Romans7:18 Kuba ndiyazi ukuba ngaphakathi kwam, oko kukuthi enyameni yam, akumi okulungileyo; kuba ukuthanda kukho ukubakho oku kum; ke kona ukwenza okulungileyo andikufumani."
Romans7:19 Kuba okulungileyo endikuthandayo, andikwenzi; khona okubi, endingakuthandiyo, oko ndiyakwenza."
Romans7:20 Ukuba ke endingakuthandiyo ukwenza oko, ayisendim okwenzayo oko, seyisisono esi simiyo ngaphakathi kwam."
Romans7:21 Ndifumana ngoko lo mthetho kum, wokuba kuthi, ndifuna ukwenza okulungileyo, kusuke kubekho okubi kum."
Romans7:22 Kuba ndikholene nomthetho kaThixo ngokomntu ongaphakathi;
Romans7:23 Kodwa ndibona mthetho wumbi, emalungwini am, usilwa nomthetho wengqiqo yam, undithimbela emthethweni wesono, lowo usemalungwini am."
Romans7:24 Athi ke mna, mntu uludwayi! Ngubani na oya kundihlangula kulo mzimba woku kufa?"
Romans7:25 Ndiyambulela uThixo ngoYesu Krestu iNkosi yethu. Ngoko ke mna ngokwam ngayo ingqiqo okunene ndikhonza umthetho kaThixo; kodwa ngayo inyama umthetho wesono.
Romans8:1 Ngoko ke, ngoku akukho kugwetywa kwabakuKristu Yesu; abangahambiyo ngokwenyama, abahamba ngokoMoya."
Romans8:2 Kaloku ngokumanywa kwam noKrestu Yesu, uMoya umniki-bomi undikhulule ekulawulweni sisono nakukufa."
Romans8:3 Kuba oko wawungenako umthetho, ngenxa yokuba uswele amandla ngayo inyama, uThixo wamthuma owakhe uNyana, ekwimeko yenyama enesono, ngenxa yesono, wasigweba isono esenyameni;"
Romans8:4 ukuze ubulungisa bomthetho buzaliseke kuthi, thina singahambiyo ngokwenyama, sihamba ngokoMoya."
Romans8:5 Abo bangokwenyama banyamekela izinto zasenyameni; abo ke bangokoMoya banyamekela izinto zoMoya.
Romans8:6 Kaloku ukunyameka kwenyama ikukufa; ke ukunyamekela ezoMoya bubomi noxolo.
Romans8:7 Kaloku ukunyameka kwenyama kububutshaba kuThixo, kuba umthetho kaThixo kungawululameli, kuba kungenako nokuba nako ukwenjenjalo."
Romans8:8 Abo ke bakwinyama, abanakumkholisa uThixo."
Romans8:9 Ke nina aningabo abaphila ngokwesimo esonakeleyo, ningabo bakhokelwa nguMoya, ukuba kambe uMoya kaThixo uhleli kuni. Ukuba ke umntu akanaye uMoya kaKristu, akangowakhe lowo."
Romans8:10 Ukuba ke uKristu ungaphakathi kwenu, umzimba okunene ufile ngenxa yesono; kodwa uMoya ububomi ngenxa yobulungisa."
Romans8:11 Ukuba ke uMoya walowo wamvusayo uYesu kwabafileyo, umi ngaphakathi kwenu, yena owamvusayo uKristu kwabafileyo uya kuyenza iphile nemizimba yenu enokufa, ngaye uMoya wakhe omiyo ngaphakathi kwenu."
Romans8:12 Ngoko ke, bazalwana, singabanetyala; kodwa kungekuyo inyama ukuze siphile ngokwenyama."
Romans8:13 Kuba xa niphila ngokwenyama, niza kufa; ke ukuba niyazibulala ngoMoya, zife iintlondi zomzimba, nophila."
Romans8:14 Kaloku abo bakhokelwa nguMoya kaThixo, bangoonyana bakaThixo."
Romans8:15 Kuba anamkelanga moya wabukhoboka, ukuba nibuye noyike; namkele uMoya wokwenziwa oonyana, esidanduluka ngaye sithi, Abha, Bawo."
Romans8:16 uMoya ngokwakhe ungqinelana nomoya wethu, ukuba singabantwana bakaThixo."
Romans8:17 Ukuba ke singabantwana, sikwaziindlalifa; iindlalifa zikaThixo, iindlalifa ke kunye noKristu; ukuba okunene siva ubunzima kunye naye, ukuze sizukiswe nokuzukiswa kunye naye."
Romans8:18 Ndigqiba kwelithi, iintlungu zeli xesha lakalokunje azinakulinganiswa nobuqaqawuli obu buza kutyhilwa kuthi."
Romans8:19 Kuba ukulangazelela kwendalo kulinde ukutyhileka koonyana bakaThixo.
Romans8:20 Kuba indalo yathotyelwa kwimeko ephuthileyo, kungengakuthanda kwayo, kodwa kungokuthanda kwalowo wayithobayo, enethemba;"
Romans8:21 Ngenxa yokuba nayo indalo ngokwayo iya kukhululwa ebukhobokeni bokonakala, isingiswe enkululekweni yozuko lwabantwana bakaThixo."
Romans8:22 Kuba siyazi ukuba kude kube ngokunje yonke indalo iyancwina inenimba.
Romans8:23 Asiyiyo ke yodwa; sisuka nathi, banayo intlahlela yoMoya, thina aba ke ngokwethu, sincwine ngaphakathi kwethu, silinde ukwenziwa oonyana; inkululeko yomzimba wethu ke leyo."
Romans8:24 Kaloku sasindiselwa ethembeni; ke ithemba elise libonwa asithemba; kuba oko akubonayo umntu, angaba usakuthembeleni na?"
Romans8:25 Kodwa ke into esingayiboniyo, esithembe ukuyifumana, siyilindela ngomonde."
Romans8:26 Ngokukwanjalo ke noMoya uncedisana nokuswela kwethu amandla, kuba esingakuthandazelayo ngokoko simelwe kukuthandaza ngako, asikwazi; uthi ke uMoya ngokwakhe asithethelele ngezincwino ezingathethekiyo."
Romans8:27 Ke oziphengululayo iintliziyo uyakwazi into okuyiyo ukunyameka koMoya; ngokuba ubathethelela abangcwele ngokukaThixo.
Romans8:28 Siyazi ke ukuba zonke izinto zisebenziselana okulungileyo kwabo bamthandayo uThixo, kwababiziweyo ngokwengqibo yakhe."
Romans8:29 Ngokuba abo wabaziyo ngenxa engaphambili, wabamisela ngenxa engaphambili ukuba bafane nomfanekiselo woNyana wakhe, ukuze abe ngowamazibulo kubazalwana abaninzi."
Romans8:30 Abo ke wabamiselayo kwangaphambili, wababiza kananjalo; abo ke wababizayo, wabuya wabagwebela bona; abo ke wabagwebelayo, wabuya wabazukisa kananjalo."
Romans8:31 Sithini na ke ngoko kwezi zinto? Ukuba uThixo ungakuthi, ngubani na ongasichasayo?"
Romans8:32 Lowo, gxebe, ungamconganga owakhe uNyana, wesuka wamnikela ngenxa yethu sonke, angathini na ukuba angasibabali ngazo zonke ezo zinto, ndawonye naye?"
Romans8:33 Ngubani na oya kubamangalela abanyulwa bakaThixo, inguThixo nje obagwebelayo? nguThixo ogwebelayo."
Romans8:34 Ngubani na ogwebayo? nguKristu owafayo, wathi ngaphezu koko, wabuya wavuka, ongasekunene kukaThixo, osithethelelayo."
Romans8:35 Ngubani na oya kusahlula eluthandweni lukaKristu? Yimbandezelo na, luxinaniso na, yintshutshiso na, yindlala na, bubuze na, yingozi na, likrele na?"
Romans8:36 Njengoko kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ngenxa yakho sibulawa imini yonke; yiyo loo nto sesifana neegusha eziya kuxhelwa nje."
Romans8:37 Kanti ke, kwezi zinto zonke sisuka soyise sitshatshele ngalowo wasithandayo."
Romans8:38 Kuba ndeyisekile kukuba nakufa, nabomi, nazithunywa zezulu, nazilawuli, nanto zikhoyo, nanto zizayo, nanto zizayo;"
Romans8:39 Nabuphakamo, nabunzulu, nasinye isidalwa, asiyi kuba nako ukusahlula thina eluthandweni lukaThixo, olukuye uKristu Yesu, iNkosi yethu."
Romans9:1 Ndithetha inyaniso ndikuKristu, andixoki, sanesazela sam sindingqinela nakuMoya oyiNgcwele;"
Romans9:2 ngokuba ndineentlungu kakhulu, nentuthumbo enkulu engapheliyo, entliziyweni yam."
Romans9:3 Kuba bendingade ndinqwenele ukusingelwa phantsi mna ngokwam, ndaphuma kuKristu ngenxa yabazalwana bam, abayimizalwane yam ngokwenyama;"
Romans9:4 Ngoobani bona oonyana bakaSirayeli; ekukokwabo ukwenziwa oonyana, nokuzukiswa, nokuphiwa iminqophiso, nokuwiswa komthetho, nenkonzo kaThixo, namadinga;"
Romans9:5 abangababo ooyise; awaphuma kubo uKristu ngokwenyama, uThixo ongophezu konke, engowokubongwa kude kube ngunaphakade. Amen."
Romans9:6 Ke, xa nditshoyo, andithethi nto nje, ngokungathi ilizwi likaThixo liphalele. Kuba asingabo bonke abaphuma kuSirayeli abangamaSirayeli;"
Romans9:7 kananjalo abathe, ngakuba beyimbewu ka-Abraham, baba ngabantwana bonke; kusuke kwathiwa, Imbewu yakho iya kubizwa ngoIsake;"
Romans9:8 Oko kukuthi, asingabantwana benyama abangabantwana bakaThixo; ngabantwana bedinga ababalelwa ekuthini bayimbewu."
Romans9:9 Kuba lilo eli ilizwi ledinga, Ngeli xesha nyakenye ndiya kuza, waye uSara eya kuba nonyana."
Romans9:10 Asiyiyo le yodwa; kwathi nakuRebheka, akubon’ ukuba ukhawule ngamnye, ngoIsake ubawo wethu."
Romans9:11 (Kuba abantwana bengekazalwa, bengenzanga nto ilungileyo, nokuba imbi, ukuze icebo likaThixo elingokonyulo lime, lingabi ngokwasemisebenzini, libe liphuma kulowo ubizayo);"
Romans9:12 Kwathiwa kuye, Omkhulu uya kukhonza komnci;"
Romans9:13 njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, uYakobi ndamthanda, ke uEsawu ndamthiya."
Romans9:14 Sithini na ke ngoko? Kukho ukuswela kulungisa kusini na kuye uThixo? Makube lee oko.
Romans9:15 Kuba esithi kuMoses, Ndiya kuba nenceba kosukuba ndinenceba kuye, ndibe netarhu kosukuba ndinetarhu kuye."
Romans9:16 Ngoko ke asikokothandayo, asikokobalekayo; kokukaThixo onenceba."
Romans9:17 Kuba isibhalo sithi kuFaro, Ndakuvelisela yona le nto, yokuba ndiwabonakalalisele kuwe amandla am, nokuthi laziswe igama lam kulo lonke ihlabathi."
Romans9:18 Ngoko ke unenceba kwathanda ukumenzela inceba, athi ke athandayo amenze lukhuni."
Romans9:19 Uya kuthi kum ngoko, Usasolelani na ke? Kuba ngubani na omelana necebo lakhe?"
Romans9:20 Ehla ke, mntundini! ungubani na wena, ukuba uphendulane noThixo? Into exonxiweyo ingatsho na kumxonxi wayo ukuthi, Yini na ukuba undenjenje ukundenza?"
Romans9:21 Akanagunya na umbumbi phezu kodongwe ukuba enze kwangaloo ntlama, esinye isitya sibe sebekeka, nesinye esingabekekanga?"
Romans9:22 Hi, ke, ukuba uThixo, ethanda ukubonakalalisa ingqumbo yakhe, nokwazisa amandla akhe, wathwala enokuzeka kade okukhulu izitya zengqumbo, zilungiselwe intshabalalo;"
Romans9:23 ukuze abaze ubutyebi bozuko lwakhe ezityeni zenceba, abezilungisele uzuko ngenxa engaphambili;"
Romans9:24 ezi wazibizayo, kwathina aba, kungekuwo amaYuda odwa, kukwiintlanga nazo?"
Romans9:25 Njengokuba esithi nakwekaHoseya, Ndiya kubabiza abangebantu bam ngokuba ngabantu bam; nentanda yakhe, engathandwa."
Romans9:26 Kwathi, apho kwabe kusithiwa kubo, Aningobantu bam nina; baya kubizwa khona ngokuthi, bangoonyana bakaThixo ophilileyo."
Romans9:27 Kananjalo uIsaya udanduluka ngoSirayeli, esithi, Nangona inani loonyana bakaSirayeli lingangentlabathi yaselwandle, kosinda amasalela odwa."
Romans9:28 Kuba elifeza ilizwi, aligqibe ngobulungisa; ngokuba iNkosi iya kwenza ilizwi layo phezu komhlaba, ilifinyeze."
Romans9:29 Kwanjengokuba uIsaya ebetshilo ngenxa engaphambili ukuthi, Ukuba iNkosi wemikhosi ibingasishiyelanga mbewu, singe sisuke saba njengeSodom, sisuke safana neGomora."
Romans9:30 Sithini na ke ngoko? Sithi, iintlanga ebezingasukeli bulungisa, zabubamba ubulungisa, ubulungisa ke baselukholweni."
Romans9:31 Kodwa yena uSirayeli obesukela umthetho wobulungisa, akafikelelanga emthethweni wobulungisa."
Romans9:32 Ngani? Ngokuba abakufunanga ngokwaselukholweni, bakufuna ngokwasemisebenzini yomthetho. Kuba babetheka elityeni eli lokubetheka;"
Romans9:33 njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Yabona, ndibeka eZiyon ilitye lokubetheka, Iliwa lesikhubekiso; bonke abakholwayo kuye abayi kudaniswa."
Romans10:1 Bazalwana, inkolelo yeyam intliziyo, nesikhungo sam kuye uThixo, ngenxa yamaSirayeli, sesokuba asindiswe."
Romans10:2 Ndiyabangqinela ukuba banokumzondelela uThixo, koko bengamzondeleli ngokokwazi okukuko."
Romans10:3 Kuba bathe, bengabazi ubulungisa bukaThixo, befuna nokumisa obabo ubulungisa, ababululamela ubulungisa bukaThixo."
Romans10:4 Kaloku intsingiselo yomthetho nguKrestu, ukuze abe bubulungisa kubo bonke abakholwayo."
Romans10:5 Kuba uMoses ubulungisa basemthethweni uthi ukububhala, Umntu ozenzileyo ezi zinto uya kudla ubomi ngazo."
Romans10:6 Ke bona obaselukholweni ubulungisa buthetha ngolu hlobo, Musa ukuthi entliziyweni yakho, Ngubani na oya kunyuka aye emazulwini ukuba ahlise uKristu? oko kukuthi, ukumhlisa uKristu phezulu;"
Romans10:7 nokuthi, Ngubani na oya kuhla aye enzonzobileni? oko kukuthi, ukumnyusa uKristu kwabafileyo."
Romans10:8 Ithini na ke le nto? Ilizwi likufuphi kuwe, emlonyeni wakho nasentliziyweni yakho: elo ke lilizwi lokholo, esilivakalisayo."
Romans10:9 Ngokuba, xa uthe wamvuma ngomlomo wakho ukuba uyiNkosi uYesu, wakholwa ngentliziyo yakho ukuba uThixo wamvusa kwabafileyo, wosindiswa."
Romans10:10 Kuba umntu ukholwa ngentliziyo, ukuze abe nobulungisa; kwaye ngomlomo uvumo lwenziwa losindiso."
Romans10:11 Kuba isibhalo sithi, Bonke abakholwayo kuye abayi kudaniswa."
Romans10:12 Akukho kwahluka kwamYuda namGrike; kuba ikwayiloo Nkosi eyiNkosi yabo bonke, ibubutyebi kubo bonke abayinqulayo."
Romans10:13 Kuba bonke abasukuba belinqula igama leNkosi bosindiswa.
Romans10:14 Bothini na ke ukumnqula lowo bangakholwanga kuye? Bothini na ukukholwa kulowo bangevanga ngaye? Bothini na ke ukuva, kungekho mshumayeli?"
Romans10:15 Bangathini na ke ukushumayela, bengathunywanga? njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Hayi, ukuba zintle kwazo iinyawo zabashumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zoxolo, zabashumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zezinto ezilungileyo!"
Romans10:16 Kodwa abazilulamelanga bonke iindaba ezilungileyo. Kuba uIsaya uthi, Nkosi, ngubani na okholiweyo ludaba lwethu?"
Romans10:17 Ngoko ke ukholo luphuma eludabeni, udaba ke lukho ngelizwi likaThixo."
Romans10:18 Ndithi ke, Abevanga na? Ilizwi labo laphuma laya kulo lonke ihlabathi, Namazwi abo aya eziphelweni zelimiweyo."
Romans10:19 Ndithi ke, Kodwa ubengazi na uSirayeli? Kuqala uMoses uthi, Ndiya kunikhweletisa ngabangebantu, ndiniqumbise ngohlanga olunobudenge."
Romans10:20 Ke yena uIsaya akanqwanqwi, uthi, Ndifunyenwe ngababengandifuni; ndabonakalaliswa kwababengandifuni."
Romans10:21 Kodwa kuSirayeli uthi, Imini yonke izandla zam ndizolulele kubantu abangevayo, abaphikisayo."
Romans11:1 Ngoko ke ndithi, uThixo ubagibile na abantu bakhe? Makube lee oko. Kuba nam ndingumSirayeli, wembewu ka-Abraham, wesizwe sikaBhenjamin."
Romans11:2 uThixo akabagibanga bona abantu bakhe, abebazi ngenxa engaphambili. Aniyazi na into esiyithethayo isibhalo ngoEliya? ukuba awangxengxezeleyo kuThixo ngoSirayeli, esithi,"
Romans11:3 Nkosi, abaprofeti bakho ababulele, nezibingelelo zakho azichithile; mna ndisele ndedwa; afuna ke umphefumlo wam."
Romans11:4 Lithini na ke ilizwi likaThixo kuye? Ndizishiyele amadoda angamawaka asixhenxe, angaguqanga dolo kuBhahali."
Romans11:5 Ngokukwanjalo ke ngoko, nakweli xesha lakalokunje, kukho amasalela ngokonyulo lobabalo."
Romans11:6 Ukuba ke kungobabalo, akusengamisebenzi; okanye ubabalo alungebi saba lubabalo. Ukuba ke kungokwasemisebenzini, akuselubabalo; okanye umsebenzi awusengumsebenzi."
Romans11:7 Kuthiweni na ke ngoko? uSirayeli akakufumananga oko abekufuna; ke abanyuliweyo bakufumana, bathi ke abanye baqaqadekiswa"
Romans11:8 njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, uThixo ubanike umoya wobuthongo, amehlo okuba bangaboni, neendlebe zokuba bangeva, kwada kwanamhlanje."
Romans11:9 Uthi ke uDavide, Isithebe sabo masibe ngumgibe, nesirhintyelo, nesikhubekiso, nembuyekezo kubo;"
Romans11:10 Makabe mnyama amehlo abo, ukuba bangaboni; Nomhlana wabo wugobe ngamaxesha onke."
Romans11:11 Ndithi ngoko, Bakhubeka ukuze bawe na? Nakanye! Ngesiphoso sabo usindiso lwafika kuzo iintlanga, ukuze zibakhweletise."
Romans11:12 Ukuba ke isiphoso sabo saba bubutyebi behlabathi, nokuncipha kwabo kwaba bubutyebi beentlanga; Kobeka phi na ke inzaliseko yazo?"
Romans11:13 Kuba ndithetha kuni, zintlanga. Ekubeni okunene mna ndingumpostile weentlanga, ndiyaluzukisa ulungiselelo lwam;"
Romans11:14 ukuba ndingade ndibakhweletise abenyama yam, ndisindise inxenye yabo."
Romans11:15 Kuba xa ukulahlwa kwabo kuluxolelaniso lwehlabathi, koba yintoni na ukwamkelwa kwabo? Akububomi obuphuma kwabafileyo, yini na?"
Romans11:16 Ukuba ke intlahlela ingcwele, ikwanjalo nentlama; ukuba ke ingcambu ingcwele, akwanjalo namasebe."
Romans11:17 Ukuba inxenye yamasebe yavuthululwa, wathi ke wena, ungumnquma wasendle, wamiliselwa phakathi kwawo, wabelana nawo ngeengcambu nasekutyebeni komnquma;"
Romans11:18 Musani ukuwaqhayisela amasebe; ke ukuba uyawaqhayisela, yazi ukuba asinguwe oyithweleyo ingcambu;"
Romans11:19 Uya kuthi ngoko, Axhuzulwa amasebe, ukuze mna ndimiliselwe."
Romans11:20 Ke; aqhuzulwa ngenxa yokungakholwa, ke wena umi ngokwaselukholweni; musa ukukratsha, yoyika;"
Romans11:21 Kuba, xa uThixo angawaconganga awasemvelweni amasebe, lumka hleze angakucongi nawe lo."
Romans11:22 Khawububone ke ububele nobukhali bukaThixo; ubukhali okunene kwabo bawayo; kodwa kuwe, ububele, ukuba uthe wahlala kobo bubele; okanye wogawulwa nawe lo."
Romans11:23 Nabo ke, ukuba abathanga bahlale ekungakholweni, bomiliselwa; kuba uThixo unako ukubuya abamilisele."
Romans11:24 Kuba wena, xa wagawulwa kumnquma ongowasendle ngokwemvelo, waza wamiliselwa ngokunxamnye nemvelo komhle umnquma: bobeka phi na aba bangamasebe ngokwemvelo, ukumiliselwa kwabo kowabo umnquma?"
Romans11:25 Kuba andithandi, bazalwana, ukuba ningayazi le mfihlelo, ukuze ningabi ziingqondi ngokwenu; ukuba ukuqaqadeka kuwahlele amaSirayeli ngenxenye, ide ingene inzaliseko yazo iintlanga;"
Romans11:26 aze ngokunjalo ke wonke uSirayeli asindiswe, njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Uya kuvela eZiyon uMhlanguli, Akusonge kumke kwaYakobi ukungahloneli Thixo."
Romans11:27 Nguwo lo umnqophiso wam nabo, Xa ndithe ndazisusa izono zabo."
Romans11:28 Okunene ngokweendaba ezilungileyo, baziintshaba ngenxa yenu; kodwa ngokonyulo, ngabaziintanda ngenxa yoobawo."
Romans11:29 Kuba azinabuyambo izibabalo ezi, nobizo olu lukaThixo."
Romans11:30 Kuba, njengokuba nani benifudula ningamvi uThixo, ngoku ke nenzelwe inceba kukungakholwa kwabo;"
Romans11:31 kwangokunjalo, nabo ababanga namvo ngoku, ukuze ngokwenzelwa kwenu inceba, benzelwe nabo inceba."
Romans11:32 Kuba kaloku uThixo ubavalele ndawonye entsweleni-kuva bonke, ukuze abenzele inceba bonke."
Romans11:33 Hayi, ubunzulu bobutyebi nobobulumko nobokwazi kukaThixo! Asikuko nokuba ayiphengululeki imigwebo yakhe, azilandeki iindlela zakhe!"
Romans11:34 Kuba ngubani na oyazileyo ingqiqo yeNkosi? Ngubani na obuye waba ngumcebisi wakhe?
Romans11:35 Ngubani na khona owayinikayo ngenxa engaphambili, kwaza kwabuyekezwa kuye?"
Romans11:36 Ngokuba ziphuma kuyo ke, zikho ngayo, zikholo yona, zonke ezo zinto. Malube kuyo uzuko, kude kube ngunaphakade. Amen."
Romans12:1 Ndiyanivuselela ngoko, bazalwana, ngeemfefe zikaThixo, ukuba niyinikele imizimba yenu ibe lidini eliphilileyo, elingcwele, elikholekileyo kuThixo: inkonzo yenu ke leyo yasengqondweni."
Romans12:2 Musani ke ukuthatha isimilo sabantu beli phakade, kodwa iingqondo zenu maziguquke zihlaziyeke, nize niyivume intando kaThixo, yona ilungileyo, ikholekileyo, igqibeleleyo."
Romans12:3 Ngalo ubabalo endababalwa ngalo ndithi kuni nonke: Musani ukuzicingela ngaphezu koko umntu amelwe kukuzicingela ngako; mabacinge ingcinga ephilileyo, njengoko uThixo abele ulowo umlinganiso wokholo."
Romans12:4 Kuba, kwanjengokuba sinamalungu amaninzi mzimbeni mnye, abe ke onke amalungu la engenamsebenzi mnye."
Romans12:5 Ngokunjalo thina, sibaninzi nje, simzimba mnye ngokumanywa noKrestu, yaye sonke ngabanye singamalungu omnye elomnye."
Romans12:6 Masizisebenzise ke iziphiwo ezahlukeneyo esababalwa ngazo nguThixo. Ukuba sinesiphiwo sokuvakalisa ilizwi elivela kuThixo, masilivakalise ngokokholo esinalo;"
Romans12:7 nokuba sinobulungiseleli, masihlale ebulungiselelini obo; nokuba ngofundisayo, makahlale emfundisweni leyo;"
Romans12:8 nokuba ngovuselelayo, makahlale ekuvuseleleni oko; owabayo makabe engenakumbi; owongamelayo, makahlale enyamekile; owenza inceba makayenze inceba echwayithile."
Romans12:9 Uthando malungabi naluhanahaniso. Kwenyanyeni okungendawo; namathelani kokulungileyo.
Romans12:10 Mayela nothando olu lobuzalwana, ndithi, yenzelanani ububele; mayela nembeko leyo, phangelanani;"
Romans12:11 Musani ukunqena ishishini; ushushu emoyeni; khonzani iNkosi;
Romans12:12 Vuyani ninethemba; nyamezelani embandezelweni; nizingisa emthandazweni;
Romans12:13 Yiboneleleni iintswelo zamakholwa; ziphatheni ngokubuka iindwendwe.
Romans12:14 Basikeleleni abanitshutshisayo; sikelelani, ningaqalekisi."
Romans12:15 Vuyani nabavuyayo, nilile nabalilayo."
Romans12:16 Cingelanani nto-nye; musani ukucinga izinto eziphakamileyo, tsalelani kwezithobekileyo. Musani ukuba ziingqondi ngokwenu."
Romans12:17 Musani ukubuyekeza ububi ngobubi nakubani. Yenzani okulungileyo phambi kwabantu bonke.
Romans12:18 Yenzani unako-nako ukuhlalisana ngoxolo nabantu bonke.
Romans12:19 Zintanda, musani ukuziphindezelela, yikhweleleni ingqumbo; kuba iziBhalo zithi: “Impindezelo yeyam; kuya kubuyekeza mna, utsho uYehova."
Romans12:20 Ngoko ke, ukuba utshaba lwakho lulambile, luphe ludle; ukuba lunxaniwe, luseze; kuba ngokwenjenjalo ke, woba ufumba amalahle omlilo phezu kwentloko yalo."
Romans12:21 Musa ukoyiswa bububi; boyise ububi ngokulungileyo.
Romans13:1 Yonke imiphefumlo mayiwalulamele amagunya awongamileyo. Kuba akukho gunya lingelilo elivela kuThixo; amagunya ke akhoyo amiswe nguThixo.
Romans13:2 Ngoko ke, umntu olichasayo igunya umelana nommiselo kaThixo;"
Romans13:3 Kuba abaphathi aba asingabokoyikwa kwimisebenzi elungileyo, ngabokoyikwa kwemibi, ungawoyiki na ke amandla? yenza okulungileyo, wodunyiswa kwalilo;"
Romans13:4 kuba lingumlungiseleli kaThixo, wokuba kulungele wena. Ke, ukuba uthe wenza okubi, yoyika; kuba alifumane aliphathe ikrele; kuba lingumlungiseleli kaThixo, umphindezeli ngengqumbo kowenza okubi."
Romans13:5 Kungoko ndithi, kufuneka ukulilulamela, ningakwenzi oko ngenxa yengqumbo yodwa, nikwenze nangenxa yesazela."
Romans13:6 Kungenxa yoko le nto ninikela irhafu; kuba ngababusi bakaThixo, bezingisa ukusebenza loo nto."
Romans13:7 Ngoko ke bonke banikeni okubafaneleyo: lowo kufuneka irhafu kuye, mnike irhafu; isiko kubani; ukoyika kofanelwe kukoyikwa; imbeko kofanelwe yimbeko."
Romans13:8 Musani ukuba natyala lanto mntwini, lingelilo elokuthandana; kuba omthandayo omnye uzalise umthetho."
Romans13:9 Kuba oku kuthi, Uze ungakrexezi, uze ungabulali, uze ungebi, uze ungangqini ubuxoki, uze ungakhanuki; Ukuba ke kukho wumbi umthetho, uqondwa ngokufutshane kweli lizwi lokuthi, Uze umthande ummelwane wakho ngoko uzithanda ngako."
Romans13:10 Uthando alusebenzi bubi kuye ummelwane; ngoko ke uthando luyinzaliseko yomthetho.
Romans13:11 Ke oko masikwenze, silazi nje ixesha eli, ukuba lilixa ngoku lokuba sivuke ebuthongweni; kuba ngoku usindiso lukufuphi kuthi, kunokuya saqalayo ukukholwa."
Romans13:12 Ubusuku buhambile, ukusa ke kusondele. Masiyilahle ngoko imisebenzi yobumnyama, sixhobe iintonga zokukhanya."
Romans13:13 Masihambe sinyanisekile, njengasemini; kungekhona eburheletyweni, nasekunxileni, kungekhona eburheletyweni;"
Romans13:14 Yambathani ke iNkosi uYesu Kristu;
Romans14:1 Lowo uswele amandla elukholweni, mamkeleni, kodwa ke kungabi ngokucalula zicamango."
Romans14:2 Omnye ukholwa ukuba angazidla izinto zonke; kodwa yena oswele amandla udla imifuno.
Romans14:3 Lowo udlayo, makangamenzi into engeyakonto ongadliyo; nalowo ungadliyo, makangamgwebi odlayo; kuba uThixo umamkele."
Romans14:4 Ungubani na wena ugweba isicaka somnye? Ukuma kwaso, nokuba kukuwa kwaso, kusenkosini yaso, ewe, uya kuma, kuba uThixo unako ukummisa."
Romans14:5 Omnye umntu ubeka umhla othile kunomnye umhla, wumbi ke ubeka imihla yonke. Elowo ke makaqiniseke kweyakhe ingqiqo."
Romans14:6 Lowo uwunyamekelayo umhla, uwunyamekelela iNkosi; nalowo ungawunyamekeliyo umhla, engawunyamekeli nje, wenzela iNkosi; lowo udlayo, udlela iNkosi, kuba ebulela kuThixo; nalowo ungadliyo, akadli nje, wenzela iNkosi, ube ebulela kuThixo."
Romans14:7 Kuba akukho namnye kuthi uzidlelayo ubomi, akukho namnye uzifelayo."
Romans14:8 Kuba nokuba sithi sidle ubomi, sibudlela iNkosi; nokuba sithi sife, sifela iNkosi. Ngoko ke, nokuba sithi sidle ubomi, nokuba sithi sife, singabeNkosi."
Romans14:9 Kuba uKristu wafa, wabuya wavuka, wabuya wadla ubomi, ngenxa yoku, ukuze aphathe ubukhosi kwabafileyo, kwanakwabaphilileyo."
Romans14:10 Ke wena, yini na ukuba umgwebe umzalwana wakho? Yini na ukuba umenze into engeyakonto umzalwana wakho? kuba siya kuma sonke phambi kwesihlalo sokugweba sikaKristu."
Romans14:11 Kuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ndihleli nje mna, itsho iNkosi, aya kugoba kum onke amadolo, Zidumise uThixo zonke iilwimi."
Romans14:12 Ngoko ke elowo kuthi uya kuziphendulela kuThixo.
Romans14:13 Ngoko ke masingabi sagwebana, kodwa makungabikho bani ubeka isikhubekiso okanye umkhubekiso komnye nomnye."
Romans14:14 Ndiyazi, ndeyisekile, ndiseNkosini uYesu nje, ukuba akukho nto iyinqambi ngokwayo; kodwa ke kuye obalela into ekuthini iyinqambi, kulowo iyinqambi."
Romans14:15 Ukuba ke umzalwana wakho wenziwa buhlungu ngenxa yokusuka udle, akusahambi ngokothando. Musa ukumtshabalalisa ngokudla kwakho, yena lowo uKristu wamfelayo."
Romans14:16 Ngoko okulungileyo kwenu makunganyeliswa.
Romans14:17 Kaloku ubukumkani bukaThixo abukukudla nakusela; bubulungisa, noxolo, novuyo kuMoya oyiNgcwele."
Romans14:18 Kuba omkhonzayo uKristu kwezo zinto, ukholekile kakuhle kuye uThixo;"
Romans14:19 Masiphuthume ke izinto ezisingisa eluxolweni, nezinto zokwakhana."
Romans14:20 Musani ukuwuchitha umsebenzi kaThixo ngenxa yokutya. Zonke izinto okunene zinyulu; kodwa kubi kuloo mntu udlayo esikhubekisa.
Romans14:21 Kulungile ukuba ungatyi nyama, ungaseli wayini, nokuba ungamkhubekisi umzalwana wakho, nokuba akhubeke, nokuba buthathaka."
Romans14:22 Unokholo na? Yiba nalo kuwe phambi koThixo. Unoyolo lowo ungazigwebiyo kuloo nto ayicikidayo.
Romans14:23 Ke lowo uthandabuzayo, ukuba uthe wadla, uselegwetyiwe, kuba engadli ngokwaselukholweni;"
Romans15:1 Thina ke bomeleleyo sifanele ukukuthwala ukuswela amandla kwabangomeleleyo, singazikholisi."
Romans15:2 Masithi sonke ngabanye simkholise ummelwane kokulungileyo ukuze akheke.
Romans15:3 Kuba naye uKristu akazikholisanga; wathi, njengokuba kubhaliwe, Iingcikivo zabakungcikivayo zawa phezu kwam."
Romans15:4 Kuba zonke izinto ezabhalwayo ngenxa engaphambili, zaye zibhalelwa okwethu ukufundiswa, ukuze sithi ngalo unyamezelo novuselelo lwezibhalo sibe nalo ithemba."
Romans15:5 Wanga ke uThixo wonyamezelo novuselelo anganinika ukucinga nto-nye phakathi kwenu, ngokukaKristu Yesu;"
Romans15:6 ukuze nithi, nimxhelo mnye, engamlomo mnye uThixo, uYise weNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
Romans15:7 Kungoko ndithi, Yamkelanani, njengokuba naye uKristu wasamkelayo, ukuba kuzukiswe uThixo."
Romans15:8 Ndithi ke, uYesu Kristu waba ngumlungiseleli wolwaluko ngenxa yenyaniso kaThixo, ukuze aqinise izithembiso zakhe koobawo;"
Romans15:9 zithi ke iintlanga zimzukise uThixo ngenxa yenceba yakhe; njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ngenxa yoko, ndiya kukudumisa phakathi kweentlanga, Ndilibethele uhadi igama lakho."
Romans15:10 Kananjalo athi, Yibani nemihlali, zintlanga, ndawonye nabantu bakhe."
Romans15:11 Kananjalo, Yidumiseni iNkosi, nonke nina zintlanga; nimdumise, nonke nina bantu."
Romans15:12 Kananjalo uIsaya uthi, Liya kubakho iHlumelo likaYese; Uya kuvela oya kulawula iintlanga; ziya kuthembela kuye iintlanga."
Romans15:13 Wanga ke uThixo wethemba angcwalise ngalo lonke uvuyo noxolo ekukholweni, ukuze niphuphume ithemba ngamandla oMoya oyiNgcwele."
Romans15:14 Ke kaloku, bazalwana bam, ndeyisekile nam ngokwam, mayelana nani, kukuba nani ngokwenu nizele nazaliswa kukulunga, nizele kuko konke ukwazi, ninako nokululekana."
Romans15:15 Ke kaloku, mawethu, ndinibhalele ngobubele obungasifanelanga, ndisithi, ndinikhumbuza, ngako ubabalo endababalwa ngalo nguThixo;"
Romans15:16 ukuze ndibe ngumlungiseleli kaYesu Kristu kuzo iintlanga, osebenza ubulungiseleli beendaba ezilungileyo zikaThixo, ukuze ukusondezwa kweentlanga kwamkeleke kakuhle, kungcwalisiwe ngoMoya oyiNgcwele."
Romans15:17 Ngoko ke ndiyazingca, ndikuKristu Yesu, ngezinto ezilunge kuThixo."
Romans15:18 Kuba mna andiyi kuba nabuganga bakuthetha nto ngazinto angazisebenzanga uKristu ngam, ukuze zimlulamele iintlanga, ngelizwi ke nangomsebenzi;"
Romans15:19 Ngamandla emiqondiso nezimanga, ngamandla oMoya kaThixo; endide ndathi, ndithabathela eYerusalem, ndajikelezisa, ndezisa kwelaseIliriko, ndazizalisa iindaba ezilungileyo zikaKristu."
Romans15:20 Ndenjenjalo ke ukuzondelela ukushumayela iindaba ezilungileyo; kungekhona apho uKristu wakhankanywayo, ukuze ndingakhi phezu kwesiseko somnye;"
Romans15:21 kube njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Abo bangabikelwanga nto ngaye, baya kubona; nabangevanga nto baya kuqonda."
Romans15:22 Kungoko ndabanjezelwayo nokubanjezelwa futhi, ukuba ndingafiki kuni."
Romans15:23 Ngoku ke ndingasenandawo nje kule mimandla, ndiseneminyaka emininzi ndilangazelela ukuza kuni,"
Romans15:24 xa ndihambela kwelaseSpani, ndoza kuni; kuba ndithemba ukunibona xa ndicandayo kuni, nokuphelekelelwa nini ukuya khona, ukuba ndithe kuqala ndakha ndadlelana nani ngokwaneleyo."
Romans15:25 Ngoku ke ndisinga eYerusalem, ndisiya kulungiselela abangcwele."
Romans15:26 Kuba kwakholeka kwabelaseMakedoni nabelaseAkaya, ukuba badlelane namahlwempu abo bangcwele baseYerusalem ngokuwupha okuthile."
Romans15:27 Inene, kukholekile kubo; banetyala kubo. Kuba iintlanga, xa zadlelanayo nabo ngezinto zabo ezizezomoya, zikwafanele ukubabusela ngezizezenyama."
Romans15:28 Ngoko ke, ndakuba ndikufinyezile oko, ndasinqabisela kubo eso siqhamo, ndobuya ngani ukuya kwelaseSpani."
Romans15:29 Ndiyazi ke ukuba ndothi, ndakuza kuni, ndize ndinentsikelelo ezalisekileyo yeendaba ezilungileyo zikaKristu."
Romans15:30 Ke kaloku, ndiyaniyala, bazalwana, ngayo iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, nangenxa yothando loMoya, ukuba nikhuthalele kunye nam ekundithandazeleni kuThixo;"
Romans15:31 ukuze ndihlangulwe kwabangakholwayo kwelakwaYuda; ukuze ulungiselelo lwam olusingisele kwiYerusalem lwamkeleke kubo abangcwele;
Romans15:32 ukuze ndize kuni ndinovuyo, ngokuthanda kukaThixo, siphumzane."
Romans15:33 uThixo ke woxolo makabe nani nonke. Amen.
Romans16:1 Ke kaloku ndimyaleza kuni uFibhi, udade wethu, ongumlungiseleli webandla eliseKenkreya;"
Romans16:2 ukuze nimamkele ngokwaseNkosini, ngokufanele abangcwele, nimncede emcimbini asukuba enifunela wona; kuba yena ubengumongi wabaninzi, nowam lo."
Romans16:3 Imibuliso kuPrisila noAkwila, abasebenzisi bam abakuKristu Yesu;"
Romans16:4 bona bathi, ngenxa yobomi bam, bazibeka emgoqweni ezabo iintamo, ekungabuleli mna ndedwa kubo, ekubulela nawo onke amabandla azo iintlanga."
Romans16:5 Bulisani nakwibandla elisendlwini yabo. Bulisani kuPeneto intanda yam, oyintlahlela yelaseAkaya kuKristu."
Romans16:6 Bulisani kuMariya, yena wabulalekayo kakhulu ngenxa yethu."
Romans16:7 Imibuliso kuAndroniko noYuniya, imizalwane yam nabathinjwa ndawonye nam, bona badumileyo phakathi kwabapostile, kanjalo baba kuKristu ngaphambi kwam."
Romans16:8 Imibuliso kuAmpliya, intanda yam ngokwaseNkosini."
Romans16:9 Imibuliso ku-Urbhano, umncedisi wethu kuKristu, noStaki intanda yam."
Romans16:10 Bulisani kuApele ocikidekileyo kuKristu. Bulisani kwabendlu ka-Aristobhulo.
Romans16:11 Bulisani kuHerodiyon, umzalwane wam. Bulisani kwabakuloNarkiso, abaseNkosini."
Romans16:12 Imibuliso kuTrifena noTrifosa, abo babulalekayo eNkosini. Bulisani kwintanda yakhe kuPersi, lowo wabulalekayo kakhulu eNkosini."
Romans16:13 Imibuliso kuRufo onyuliweyo waseNkosini, nonina, uma."
Romans16:14 Imibuliso kuAsinkrito, kuFilego, kuHerma, kuPatrobha, kuHerma, nabazalwana abanabo."
Romans16:15 Imibuliso kuFilologo noYuliya, uNere nodade wabo, no-Olimpa, nabo bonke abangcwele bakunye nabo."
Romans16:16 Bulisanani ngolwango olungcwele. Ayanibulisa amabandla kaKrestu.
Romans16:17 Ke kaloku ndiyaniyala, bazalwana, balumkeleni abo benza iimbambaniso nezikhubekiso, ezinxamnye nemfundiso enayifundayo nina, kwaye uziphephe."
Romans16:18 Kuba abanjalo abakhonzi yona iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, bakhonza esabo isisu; baze, ngamazwi anencasa nalalanisayo, balukuhle iintliziyo zabangazani nabubi."
Romans16:19 Kuba ukululama kwenu kuye kwafika kubo bonke. Ndiyavuya ngoko ngani; ndinga ke ningaba ngabalumkileyo okunene kokulungileyo; kodwa nibe ngabangenabuqhinga kokubi.
Romans16:20 uThixo ke woxolo uya kumtyumza uSathana kamsinya phantsi kweenyawo zenu. Ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu malube nani. Amen.
Romans16:21 Uyanibulisa uTimoti, osebenza nam, noLukiyo, noYason, noSosipatro, imizalwane yam."
Romans16:22 Ndiyanibulisa ngokwaseNkosini, mna Tertiyo, uyibhalileyo le ncwadi."
Romans16:23 Uyanibulisa uGayo, esilundwendwe lwakhe, mna nebandla liphela. Uyanibulisa uErasto, igosa lomzi, noKwarto umzalwana."
Romans16:24 Ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu malube nani nonke. Amen.
Romans16:25 Ke kaloku, kuye onako ukunizimasa ngokweendaba zam ezilungileyo, novakaliso lukaYesu Kristu, ngokokutyhilwa kwemfihlelo ebifihliwe kwasephakadeni;"
Romans16:26 Ngoku ke ibonakalisiwe, nangezibhalo zabaprofeti, ngokomthetho kaThixo ongunaphakade, yabonakalaliswa kuzo zonke iintlanga, ukuze lumlulamele ukholo;"
Romans16:27 kuThixo olumke yedwa, ngaye uYesu Kristu, malubekho uzuko kude kube ngunaphakade. Amen. (Yabhalelwa amaRoma eseKorinte, yaza yathunyelwa nguFebhi umkhonzi webandla laseKenkreya.)"
1Corinthians1:1 uPawulos, obizwe ngokuthanda kukaThixo, ukuba abe ngumpostile kaYesu Kristu, noSostene umzalwana,"
1Corinthians1:2 Ubhalela ibandla likaThixo eliseKorinte, abangcwalisiweyo kuKristu Yesu, abangcwele ababiziweyo, kunye nabo bonke abalinqulayo ezindaweni zonke igama leNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, eyabo neyethu;"
1Corinthians1:3 bathi, Makube lubabalo kuni, noxolo oluvela kuThixo uBawo wethu, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
1Corinthians1:4 Ndihlala ndibulela kuye uThixo wam ngani, ngenxa yobabalo lukaThixo, awanibabala ngalo nikuKristu Yesu;"
1Corinthians1:5 kuba natyetyiswa kuye ngezinto zonke, ngokuthetha konke, nangokwazi konke;"
1Corinthians1:6 njengokuba ubungqina bukaKristu baqiniswayo kuni;
1Corinthians1:7 Ngoko ke anisileli nakwesinye isipho enisibabalweyo; nilinde ukufika kweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu;
1Corinthians1:8 oya kuniqinisa kude kube sekupheleni, ukuze ningabi nakusoleka ngemini yeNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
1Corinthians1:9 Uthembekile uThixo, enabizelwa nguye ebudlelaneni boNyana wakhe, uYesu Kristu iNkosi yethu."
1Corinthians1:10 Ke kaloku, ndiyaniyala, bazalwana, ngalo igama leNkosi yethu, uYesu Kristu, ukuba nithethe nto-nye nonke, nokuba kungabikho zahlukahlukano kuni; ke nibe ngabalungisiweyo, nigqibelele ngqiqweni-nye, nasicamangweni sinye."
1Corinthians1:11 Kuba ndazisiwe ngani, bazalwana bam, ngabakuloKlowe, ukuba kukho iimpikiswano phakathi kwenu."
1Corinthians1:12 Ukutsho ke ndithi kuthiwa, ulowo kuni uthi, Mna ndingokaPawulos; omnye ke athi, Mna ndingoka-Apolo; omnye ke athi, Mna ndingokaKefas; nam ke ndingokaKristu."
1Corinthians1:13 Wahluliwe na uKristu? Kwabethelelwa uPawulos yini na emnqamlezweni ngenxa yenu? Nabhaptizelwa egameni likaPawulos na?
1Corinthians1:14 Ndiyambulela uThixo, kuba ndingabhaptizanga namnye kuni, ingenguKrispo noGayo;"
1Corinthians1:15 hleze kubekho othi, ndabhaptiza egameni lam."
1Corinthians1:16 Ndabhaptiza ke nendlu kaStefana; ngaphandle kwabo, andazi ukuba ndabhaptiza wumbi."
1Corinthians1:17 Kaloku uKristu akandithumanga kubhaptiza; wandithuma ukushumayela iindaba ezilungileyo, kungabi ngabulumko bakuthetha, ukuze umnqamlezo kaKristu ungalanjathiswa."
1Corinthians1:18 Kaloku ilizwi lomnqamlezo libubudenge okunene kwabatshabalalayo; ke kuthi, thina basindiswayo, lingamandla kaThixo."
1Corinthians1:19 Kuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ndiya kubutshabalalisa ubulumko bezilumko, Ingqondo yeengqondi ndiyitshitshise."
1Corinthians1:20 Siphi na ke isilumko? uphi na umbhali? Uphi na umcalula-ndaba weli hlabathi? uThixo akabenzanga baba bubudenge na ubulumko beli hlabathi?
1Corinthians1:21 Kuthe ke, ebulumkweni bukaThixo, ihlabathi alamazi uThixo ngobulumko balo, kwakholeka kuThixo ukusindisa abo bakholwayo, ngabo ubudenge bokuvakalisa iindaba ezilungileyo."
1Corinthians1:22 Kuba amaYuda efuna umqondiso, namaGrike efuna ubulumko;"
1Corinthians1:23 Ke thina sishumayela uKrestu ebethelelwe emnqamlezweni, isikhubekiso kumaJuda nebubudenge kumaGrike."
1Corinthians1:24 Ke kwabo babiziweyo, amaYuda kwanamaGrike, sivakalisa uKristu ongamandla kaThixo, nobulumko bukaThixo."
1Corinthians1:25 Kaloku into kaThixo ebubudenge inobulumko kunabantu; nento kaThixo engenamandla yomelele kunabantu.
1Corinthians1:26 Kuba luboneni ubizo lwenu, bazalwana, ukuba azizininzi izilumko ngokwenyama, ababaninzi abanamandla, akamaninzi amanene."
1Corinthians1:27 Kodwa uThixo usuke wanyula izinto ezibubudenge zehlabathi, ukuze ngokwenjenjalo adanise izilumko; Kananjalo uThixo usuke wanyula izinto ezibonakala ngathi azinamandla ehlabathini, ukuze azidanise izinto ezinamandla;"
1Corinthians1:28 nezinto zehlabathi ezingenabuntu, nezingento yanto, wazinyula uThixo, nezingathi azikho, ukuba aziphuthise izinto ezikhoyo;"
1Corinthians1:29 ukuze kungaqhayisi namnye umntu emehlweni akhe.
1Corinthians1:30 Ke nina nikuKristu Yesu, owathi ngenxa yethu waba bubulumko obuvela kuThixo, nobulungisa, nobungcwalisa, nentlawulelo;"
1Corinthians1:31 Ukuze, njengoko kubhaliweyo, Oqhayisayo aqhayise ngeNkosi."
1Corinthians2:1 Mna ke, ndakuba ndizile kuni, bazalwana, andizanga ngabugcisa bakuthetha nabulumko, ndinazisa ubungqina bukaThixo."
1Corinthians2:2 Kuba ndagqiba kwelokuba ndingazi nto phakathi kwenu, ingenguYesu Kristu, naye ke ebethelelwe emnqamlezweni."
1Corinthians2:3 Mna kuni ndafika ndaba ngothambileyo, onokoyika, onokugubha okukhulu."
1Corinthians2:4 Nokuthetha kwam, nokuvakalisa kwam uKristu kube kungengamazwi oyisa ngabulumko babantu;"
1Corinthians2:5 ukuze ukholo lwenu lungabi sebulumkweni babantu, lube semandleni kaThixo."
1Corinthians2:6 Ke sithetha ubulumko phakathi kwabagqibeleleyo, ubulumko ke obungebubo obeli phakade, nobabaphathi beli phakade ababhangayo."
1Corinthians2:7 Sithetha ubulumko bukaThixo obusemfihlekweni, obo ke bufihlakeleyo, awathi uThixo kwangaphambi kwawo amaphakade, wabumisela uzuko lwethu;"
1Corinthians2:8 ekungabangakho namnye wabaphathi beli phakade ubaziyo; kuba, ukuba babebazi, ngebengayibethelelanga emnqamlezweni iNkosi yozuko."
1Corinthians2:9 Kodwa njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Izinto ezingabonwanga liso, nezingaviwanga ndlebe, Nezingathanga qatha entliziyweni yomntu, Zizo uThixo awazilungisela abo bamthandayo."
1Corinthians2:10 uThixo wazityhila kuthi ke ngoMoya wakhe; kuba uMoya uphengulula zonke izinto, neenzulu zikaThixo."
1Corinthians2:11 Kuba nguwuphi na kubantu ozaziyo izinto zomntu, ingenguwo umoya womntu okuye? Ngokunjalo nezinto zikaThixo akukho namnye uzaziyo, ingenguye uMoya kaThixo."
1Corinthians2:12 Ke thina asamkelanga moya wehlabathi; samkele uMoya ophuma kuThixo; ukuze sizazi izinto esazibabalwa nguThixo.
1Corinthians2:13 Esizithethayo nokuzithetha, kungengamazwi anokufundiswa bubulumko babantu, kungawo anokufundiswa nguMoya oyiNgcwele; sithelekisa izinto zoMoya nezoMoya."
1Corinthians2:14 Owemvelo ke umntu akazamkeli izinto zoMoya kaThixo; kuba zibubudenge kuye; kanjalo akanakuzazi, ngokuba ziphicothwa ngokoMoya."
1Corinthians2:15 Ke ongowoMoya okunene uphicotha zonke izinto, kodwa yena ngokwakhe akaphicothwa mntu."
1Corinthians2:16 Kuba ngubani na oyaziyo ingqiqo yeNkosi, oya kuthi ayifundise? Ke thina sinayo ingqiqo kaKristu."
1Corinthians3:1 Nam ke, bazalwana, bendingenakuthetha kuni njengakwaboMoya; bendinokuthetha njengakwabenyama, njengakwabaziintsana kuKristu."
1Corinthians3:2 Ndaniseza amasi, andaninika kudla kuqinileyo, kuba nibe ningekabi nakomelela, unangoku anikabi nako."
1Corinthians3:3 Kuba nisengabenyama; oku nje kukhoyo phakathi kwenu umona, neenkani, neenkani, neembambaniso, aningabenyama na? Anihambi ngokwabantu na?"
1Corinthians3:4 Kuba xa uthile athi, Mna ndingokaPawulos; omnye ke athi, Mna ndingoka-Apolo; aningabenyama na?"
1Corinthians3:5 Engubani na yena uPawulos? engubani na yena uApolo? Ingabalungiseleli nje kuphela, enakholwa ngabo, njengokuba iNkosi yamnikayo ulowo nalowo?"
1Corinthians3:6 Mna ndatyala, uApolo wankcenkcesha; ke nguThixo owahlumisayo."
1Corinthians3:7 Ngoko ke lowo utyalayo akalutho, nalowo unkcenkceshayo akalutho; ke nguThixo okhulisayo."
1Corinthians3:8 Lowo utyalayo ke, nalowo unkcenkceshayo, banto-nye; kodwa elowo uya kwamkela owakhe umvuzo ngokukokwakhe ukubulaleka."
1Corinthians3:9 Kuba singabasebenzi kunye noThixo; intsimi kaThixo nina, nisisakhiwo sikaThixo."
1Corinthians3:10 Ngokobabalo lukaThixo endababalwa ngalo, ndithi, ngokomakhi osisilumko, ndibeke ilitye lesiseko, athi ke omnye akhe phezu kwalo; Ke elowo makakhangele ukuba uthini na ukwakha kwakhe phezu kwalo."
1Corinthians3:11 Kuba akukho namnye unako ukubeka litye limbi lesiseko, nxamnye nelo libekwe kade, linguYesu onguKristu."
1Corinthians3:12 Ukuba ke umntu wakha phezu kwesi siseko igolide, isilivere, amatye anqabileyo, imithi, ingca, iindiza;"
1Corinthians3:13 Umsebenzi walowo nalowo wobonakalaliswa; kuba loo mini iya kuwazisa, ngokuba iya kuvela inomlilo; nomsebenzi walowo nalowo, umlilo uya kuwucikida ubunjani bawo;"
1Corinthians3:14 Ukuba umsebenzi awawakhayo umntu phezu kwalo, uthe wahlala uhleli, wowamkela umvuzo."
1Corinthians3:15 Ukuba umsebenzi womntu uthe watshiswa, wolahlekelwa ngumvuzo wakhe; ke yena okwakhe wosindiswa; kanti kungomlilo."
1Corinthians3:16 Anazi na ukuba niyitempile kaThixo? Anazi na ukuba uMoya kaThixo umi ngaphakathi kwenu?
1Corinthians3:17 Ukuba umntu uyayonakalisa itempile kaThixo, uThixo womonakalisa lowo; kuba itempile kaThixo ingcwele, niyitempile ke nina."
1Corinthians3:18 Makungabikho namnye uzikhohlisayo. Ukuba ubani kuni uba usisilumko kweli hlabathi, makabe sisidenge, ukuze abe sisilumko."
1Corinthians3:19 Kaloku ubulumko beli hlabathi bubudenge kuye uThixo; kuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Yena uyazibambisa izilumko kubuqhetseba bazo;"
1Corinthians3:20 kwathiwa kananjalo, iNkosi iyazazi izicamango zezilumko, ukuba azinto."
1Corinthians3:21 Ngoko ke makungabikho namnye uqhayisa ngabantu; Ngokuba zonke izinto zezenu;
1Corinthians3:22 nokuba nguPawulos, nokuba nguApolo, nokuba nguKefas, nokuba lihlabathi, nokuba bubomi, nokuba kukufa, nokuba zizinto ezingeneyo, nokuba zezizayo; zonke zezenu;"
1Corinthians3:23 Nina ke ningabakaKristu; noKristu ngokaThixo.
1Corinthians4:1 Makenjenjalo ke umntu ukucinga ngathi, athi singabakhonzi bakaKristu, athi singamagosa eemfihlelo zikaThixo."
1Corinthians4:2 Ke kaloku ke, kufuneka kuwo amagosa, ukuba ulowo kuwo afumaneke ethembekile."
1Corinthians4:3 Kum ke yeyona nto incinanana, ukuba ndincinwe nini, nayimini yamatyala yabantu; kodwa andizigwebi okwam,"
1Corinthians4:4 kuba andizazeleli, nto; noko andigwetyelwe, koko; ondincinayo ke yiNkosi."
1Corinthians4:5 Ngoko ke, musani ukugweba nto phambi kwelona xesha, ide ifike iNkosi, eya kuthi izikhanyise nokuzikhanyisa izinto ezifihlakeleyo zobumnyama, iwabonakalalise amacebo entliziyo; andule ke ulowo nalowo abe nodumo oluvela kuThixo."
1Corinthians4:6 Ezi zinto ke, bazalwana, ndizilinganisele ngam noApolo, ngenxa yenu; ukuze nifunde kuthi, ukuba masingacingeli mntu ngaphezu koko kubhaliweyo, ukuze kungabikho namnye uzikhukhumalisa ngakomnye ngenxa yomnye."
1Corinthians4:7 Kuba ngubani na okubalulayo kwabanye? Yintoni na ke onayo ongayamkeliswanga? Phofu ke, ukuba wamkelisiwe, uqhayiselani na, ngathi akwamkeliswanga?"
1Corinthians4:8 Ngoku senihluthi, senizizityebi, nalawula ningenathi. Ndiyathanda ke ukuba kambe beningabalawuli, ukuze nathi silawule kunye nani."
1Corinthians4:9 Kuba ngathi mna uThixo thina bapostile usivelise mva, sanga singabamiselwe ukufa; kuba sanekwe senziwa intlekisa kulo ihlabathi, nakwizithunywa zezulu, nakubantu."
1Corinthians4:10 Thina siziziyatha ngenxa kaKristu, ke nina niziingqondi kuKristu; Thina sibuthathaka, ke nina nomelele; Nizukile, ke thina sideliwe."
1Corinthians4:11 Kude kube ngoku silambile, sinxaniwe, sihamba ze, siyantlithwa, asinakhaya;"
1Corinthians4:12 Sibulaleka sisebenza ngezandla; xa sinyeliswayo, siyasikelela; sitshutshiswa, siyanyamezela;"
1Corinthians4:13 Sinyeliswa, siyakhala; senziwe inkunkuma yehlabathi, inkuthu yezinto zonke, unanamhla."
1Corinthians4:14 Ezi zinto andizibhaleli ukuba nidane; ndiyaniluleka njengabantwana bam abathandekayo.
1Corinthians4:15 Kuba ningafanelana ninabakhaphi bemawaka alishumi kuKristu, ababaninzi bona ooyihlo; kuba kuKristu Yesu nizelwe ndim lo, ngazo iindaba ezilungileyo."
1Corinthians4:16 Ndiyaniyala ngoko, yibani ngabaxelisa mna."
1Corinthians4:17 Ngenxa yoko ndinithumele uTimoti, ongumntwana wam oyintanda, othembekileyo, waseNkosini, oya kunikhumbuza iindlela zam ezikuKristu, njengoko ndifundisayo ezindaweni zonke, kuwo onke amabandla."
1Corinthians4:18 Ke kaloku inxenye ithe yakhukhumala, ngathi andiyi kuza kuni."
1Corinthians4:19 Ndiya kuza ke kuni kamsinya, ukuba iNkosi ithe yavuma, ukuze ndinganeli kukwazi ukuthetha kwabakhukhumeleyo, ndazi amandla abo."
1Corinthians4:20 Kaloku ubukumkani bukaThixo abusekuthetheni, busemandleni."
1Corinthians4:21 Nifuna ntoni na? Ndoza kuni ndinoswazi, kuko ukuza ndinothando, nomoya wobulali?"
1Corinthians5:1 Kwandile kwavakala ukuba kukho umbulo phakathi kwenu; ngumbulo ke lowo ongazanga ukhankanywe naphakathi kweentlanga, owokuba uthile abe nomfazi kayise."
1Corinthians5:2 Ke nina nithe nasuka nazidla, nesuka nenze isijwili, ukuze asuswe kuni lowo uyenzileyo le nto."
1Corinthians5:3 Kuba okunene mna, ndingekho nje okunene ngesiqu, ndikho ngomoya;"
1Corinthians5:4 Egameni leNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, xa nithe nahlangana ndawonye nomoya wam, ngokwamandla eNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu,"
1Corinthians5:5 ukunikelwa onjalo kuSathana, ukuba inyama itshatyalaliswe, ukuze umoya usindiswe ngemini yeNkosi uYesu."
1Corinthians5:6 Iqhayiya lenu alilungile. Anazi na, ukuba igwele elincinane liyayibilisa intlama iphela?"
1Corinthians5:7 Likhupheni ngoko kuthi tu igwele elidala, ukuze nibe yintlama entsha, ekubeni ningabangenagwele. Kuba ipasika yethu ubingelelwe thina nguKristu;"
1Corinthians5:8 Ngoko ke masiyenze umthendeleko, kungengagwele elidala, negwele lobubi, nelokungendawo; kodwa ngezonka ezingenagwele zokunyaniseka nenyaniso."
1Corinthians5:9 Ndanibhalela encwadini ukuba maningazidibanisi nabahenyuzi;
1Corinthians5:10 Kodwa ke kungabi ngoku kwanehlabathi elihenyuzayo, nokubawa, nabaphangi, nabakhonza izithixo; kuba oko nimelwe kukuthi nimke ehlabathini."
1Corinthians5:11 Kungoku ke ndinibhalela ukuba maningazidibanisi nosukuba enegama lokuba ngumzalwana, ukanti wenza umbulo, nokuba ulibawa, nokuba ungumkhonzi wezithixo, nokuba ungumtshabhisi, nokuba ulinxila, nokuba ungumphangi; Maningatyi nonjalo."
1Corinthians5:12 Ndinamsebenzi mni na ukuba ndigwebe nabangaphandle? Anigwebi abangaphakathi na?
1Corinthians5:13 Ke abangaphandle bagwetywa nguThixo. Ize nimnyothule kuni nina lowo ungendawo.
1Corinthians6:1 Nabani na kuni othi, xa athe wamangalela omnye, makaye kumangala phambi kwabangemalungisa, kungabi phambi kwabangcwele?"
1Corinthians6:2 Anazi na, ukuba abangcwele aba baya kuligweba ihlabathi? Ukuba ke ihlabathi ligwetywa phambi kwenu, anikufanele na ukuwathetha awona mancinanana amatyala?"
1Corinthians6:3 Anazi na, ukuba siya kugweba izithunywa zezulu? Kobeka phi na ke kwizinto zobu bomi?"
1Corinthians6:4 Xa sukuba ke ngoko nisiya ematyaleni ngezinto zobu bomi, nimisa abo bangento kulo ibandla, ukuba kugwebe bona na?"
1Corinthians6:5 Nditsho ukuba nidane. Akukho silumko na phakathi kwenu? Akukho namnye unako ukugweba phakathi kwabazalwana bakhe?
1Corinthians6:6 Kodwa umzalwana umangalela umzalwana, naphambi kwabangakholwayo."
1Corinthians6:7 Kaloku ngoku ke ninesono na phakathi kwenu, ukuba niyamangalelana. Yini na ukuba ningathi kanye nimeneze? Yini na ukuba ningavumi kanye?"
1Corinthians6:8 Nisuka nina none abanye, nilumkise, nako oko nibe nikwenza kubazalwana."
1Corinthians6:9 Anazi na, ukuba abangemalungisa abayi kubudla ilifa ubukumkani bukaThixo? Musani ukulahlekiswa; abenza umbulo, nabakhonzi bezithixo, nabakrexezi, nabafeba, nabakrexezi"
1Corinthians6:10 Kwanamasela, namabawa, namanxila, nabatshabhisi, nabaphangi, abayi kubudla ilifa ubukumkani bukaThixo."
1Corinthians6:11 Naye ninjalo ke inxenye yenu; kuloko nahlanjululwayo, kuloko nangcwaliswayo, kuloko nagwetyelwayo egameni leNkosi uYesu, nangoMoya kaThixo wethu."
1Corinthians6:12 Zonke izinto zivumelekile kum, noko azindilungele zonke. Zonke izinto zivumelekile kum, noko asindim oya kubekwa phantsi kwagunya lelayiphi;"
1Corinthians6:13 izidlo zezesisu, nesisu sesezidlo; kodwa uThixo uya kubhangisa kokubini, sona nazo. Ke wona umzimba asingowombulo, ngoweNkosi; nayo iNkosi yeyomzimba."
1Corinthians6:14 uThixo ke wayivusayo iNkosi, uya kusivusa nathi ngamandla akhe."
1Corinthians6:15 Anazi na ukuba imizimba yenu ngamalungu kaKristu? Ndiya kuthi na ke, ndiwathabathe amalungu kaKristu lowo, ndiwenze amalungu ehenyukazi? Makube lee oko."
1Corinthians6:16 Yintoni na? Anazi na, ukuba onamathele kulo ihenyukazi, umzimba mnye nalo? Kuba babini, utsho, baya kuba nyama-nye."
1Corinthians6:17 Ke onamathele eNkosini, umoya mnye nayo."
1Corinthians6:18 Wubalekeni umbulo. Zonke izono athe umntu wazenza, zingaphandle komzimba; ke yena owenza umbulo, wona owakhe umzimba."
1Corinthians6:19 Yintoni na? Anazi na, ukuba umzimba wenu uyitempile yoMoya oyiNgcwele ongaphakathi kwenu, eninaye evela kuThixo; nokuba ke aningabenu?"
1Corinthians6:20 Kuba nathengwa ngexabiso. Mzukiseni ke uThixo ngomzimba wenu nangomoya wenu, izinto ezizezikaThixo ezo."
1Corinthians7:1 Ke kaloku, ngokubhekisele kwiindawo enandibhalela ngazo, ndithi, Kumlungele umntu ukuba angamchukumisi umntu oyinkazana."
1Corinthians7:2 Kodwa ke, ngenxa yohenyuzo, elowo makabe nowakhe umfazi, athi elowo abe neyakhe indoda."
1Corinthians7:3 Indoda mayimenzele okumfaneleyo umfazi wayo; enjenjalo ke nomfazi endodeni.
1Corinthians7:4 Umfazi akanagunya kowakhe umzimba, yindoda enalo; kwangokunjalo ke, nendoda ayinagunya kowayo umzimba, ngumfazi onalo."
1Corinthians7:5 Musani ukwazana, ngaphandle kokuba nivumelene okomzuzwana, ukuze nizinikele nina ziqu nizila ukutya nokuthandaza; nibuye nihlangane, ukuze anganihendi uSathana ngenxa yokungazithibi kwenu."
1Corinthians7:6 Nditsho ngegunya, andiwisele umthetho."
1Corinthians7:7 Kuba ndinga bonke abantu bangaba njengam nje; Kodwa elowo unesakhe isipho, asibabalwe nguThixo;"
1Corinthians7:8 Ndithi ke kwabangazekanga nabangendanga, nakubahlolokazi, kubalungele ukuba bathe bahlala njengam nje."
1Corinthians7:9 Kodwa ke, ukuba abanakuzibamba, mabazeke, mabende, kuba kukhona kulungileyo ukuba kuzekwe, kwendiwe, kunokutshiseka."
1Corinthians7:10 Ke kaloku abazekileyo nabendileyo ndiyabathethela, phofu ingendim, iyiNkosi;"
1Corinthians7:11 Kodwa ke ukuba uthe wahlukana nayo, makahlale angendi, okanye makaxolelaniswe nendoda yakhe; indoda mayingamali umfazi wayo."
1Corinthians7:12 Ke kaloku kwabanye ndithi mna, akutsho iNkosi, Ukuba kukho mzalwana uthile unomfazi ongakholiweyo, aze umfazi lowo athande ukuhlala naye, makangamali."
1Corinthians7:13 Nomfazi onendoda engelokholwa, ize yona ithande ukuhlala naye, makangahlukani nayo."
1Corinthians7:14 Kuba indoda leyo ingakholiweyo ingcwalisiwe nguye umfazi, nomfazi lowo ungakholiweyo ungcwalisiwe yiyo indoda; okanye abantwana benu ngebeba baziinqambi; kungokunje bangcwele."
1Corinthians7:15 Kodwa ke ukuba lowo ungakholiweyo uyahluka, makahluke; umzalwana nokuba ngudade akabotshelelwe, xa kunjalo; ke uThixo usibizele eluxolweni."
1Corinthians7:16 Kuba, wazi ngani na, mfazi, ukuba woyisindisa indoda yakho? Wazi ngani na, ndoda, ukuba womsindisa umkakho?"
1Corinthians7:17 Ke, njengoko uThixo wamabelayo ulowo, njengoko iNkosi imbizileyo ulowo, makahambe ngokunjalo. Ndimisa ngokunjalo ke kuwo onke amabandla."
1Corinthians7:18 Kukho mntu wabizwa engowalukileyo na? Makangazenzi ongalukileyo. Kukho mntu wabizwa engalukanga na? makangaluki.
1Corinthians7:19 Ukwaluka oku akunto, nokungaluki oku akunto; okuyinto kukubamba imithetho kaThixo."
1Corinthians7:20 Elowo makahlale elubizweni abizwe ekulo.
1Corinthians7:21 Wabizwa ulikhoboka na? ungakukhathaleli oko; nokuba unokukhululeka, sebenzisa kanye oko."
1Corinthians7:22 Ukuba lowo wabizwayo waba seNkosini elikhoboka, ungumkhululwa weNkosi; ngokunjalo nalowo wabizwayo engokhululekileyo, ulikhoboka likaKristu."
1Corinthians7:23 Nathengwa ngexabiso; musani ukuba ngabakhonzi babantu.
1Corinthians7:24 Bazalwana, elowo ekubizweni awabizwa ekuko, makahlale kuko ekuThixo."
1Corinthians7:25 Ke kaloku, ngazo iintombi andinammiselo weNkosi; ndibona oku mna, njengowenzelwe inceba yiNkosi ukuba athembeke."
1Corinthians7:26 Ndiba ngoko, kulungile oku ngenxa yengxakeko engeneyo, kulungile emntwini ukuthi aselehlala njengoko anjalo."
1Corinthians7:27 Ubotshelelwe na emfazini? musa ukufuna ukukhululwa. Ukhululekile na emfazini? musa ukufuna umfazi.
1Corinthians7:28 Kodwa ke ukuba uthe wazeka, akonanga; nentombi, ukuba ithe yatshata, ayonanga. Kodwa ke abanjalo baya kuba neengxaki enyameni;"
1Corinthians7:29 Nditsho ke, bazalwana, ukuthi, ixesha lifinyele, ukuze kwelisaseleyo bathi nabo banabafazi, babe njengabangenabo;"
1Corinthians7:30 Bathi ke abalilayo, babe njengabangalili; nabavuyayo, mababe njengabangavuyanga; nabathengayo, babe njengabangenanto;"
1Corinthians7:31 bathi abasebenzayo ngeli hlabathi, babe njengabangalixhamliyo; kuba ukumila kweli hlabathi kuyadlula."
1Corinthians7:32 Ndithanda ukuba ningabi naxhala. Ongazekileyo uxhalela izinto zeNkosi, ukuba angathini na ukuyikholisa iNkosi;"
1Corinthians7:33 Ozekileyo ke uxhalela izinto zehlabathi, ukuba angathini na ukumkholisa umkakhe."
1Corinthians7:34 Kukho umahluko phakathi komfazi nentombi enyulu. Ongendileyo uxhalela izinto zeNkosi, ukuze abe ngcwele ngomzimba nangomoya; owendileyo ke uxhalela izinto zehlabathi, ukuba angathini na ukuyikholisa indoda yakhe."
1Corinthians7:35 Oku ke ndikuthetha ndisingisele kokunilungeleyo; ndingenzeli ukunirhintyela, koko ndiniphose ngokufanelekileyo, nikhonze iNkosi, ningenasiphako."
1Corinthians7:36 Kodwa ke ukuba umntu uba uhlaza intombi yakhe, xa ithe yegqitha entlahleni yayo, emelwe kukwenjenjalo, makenze akuthandayo; akoni; makuzekwe."
1Corinthians7:37 Noko ke omiyo eqinile entliziyweni, engaxakwe nto, enegunya ke lokwenza ngokuthanda kwakhe, kananjalo egqibile entliziyweni yakhe kwelokuba ayigcine intombi yakhe, uyatyapha ukwenjenjalo."
1Corinthians7:38 Ngoko ke lowo wendisayo uyatyapha; kodwa ke lowo ungendisiyo nguyena ukholisayo.
1Corinthians7:39 Umfazi ubotshiwe ngumthetho ngalo lonke ixesha isaphilileyo indoda yakhe; ke ukuba indoda yakhe ithe yafa, ukhululekile, angendiselwa kwayithandayo; kuphela eNkosini."
1Corinthians7:40 Kodwa unoyolo ngakumbi, ukuba uthe wahlala enjengoko anjalo, ngokwam mna ukubona; ndiba ke ndinaye nam uMoya kaThixo."
1Corinthians8:1 Ke kaloku, ngeendawo zamadini enziwa kwizithixo, ndithi, Siyazi ukuba sinokwazi sonke. Ulwazi luyakhukhumalisa, ke lona uthando luyakha."
1Corinthians8:2 Ukuba umntu uba wazi nto, akakazi nento ngoko amelwe kukwazi ngako."
1Corinthians8:3 Ukuba ke umntu uyamthanda uThixo, lowo uyaziwa nguye."
1Corinthians8:4 Ngayo ke ukudliwa kwamadini enziwa kwizithixo, siyazi ukuba akukho nto isisithixo ehlabathini; siyazi ukuba mnye kwaphela uThixo, akukho wumbi."
1Corinthians8:5 Kuba kambe, nokuba kukho ekuthiwa bangoothixo, nokuba kusezulwini, nokuba kusemhlabeni, njengokuba kukho oothixo abaninzi, neenkosi ezininzi,"
1Corinthians8:6 Kodwa kuthi thina mnye uThixo, uYise, eziphuma kuye zonke izinto; neNkosi inye, uYesu Kristu, ezingaye zonke izinto;"
1Corinthians8:7 Ke ukwazi oko akubantwini bonke. Inxenye ke ithi, isenesazela ngesithixo unangoku, idle ngokwedini elenziwa kwisithixo; sisuke isazela sabo siswele amandla."
1Corinthians8:8 Ke ukudla akusithandisi phambi koThixo; kuba nokuba sithe sadla, asigqithe nganto; nokuba asidli, asigqithe nganto."
1Corinthians8:9 Lumkani ke, hleze elo gunya lenu libe sisiwiso kwabaswele amandla."
1Corinthians8:10 Kuba xa athe umntu wakubona, wena unokwazi, uhleli esithebeni etempileni yesithixo, asisayi kuthi na isazela salowo uswele amandla, somelele ukuba adle amadini enziwa kwizithixo?"
1Corinthians8:11 Ngokwazi kwakho uya kutshabalala umzalwana obuthathaka, awathi uKristu wamfela."
1Corinthians8:12 Kambe ke, xa nisona ngokunjalo kubazalwana, nisilimaza isazela sabo esiswele amandla, nona kuKristu."
1Corinthians8:13 Ngenxa yoko ndithi, Ukuba ukudla kuyamkhubekisa umzalwana wam, andisayi kudla nyama, lisahleli ihlabathi, ukuze ndingamkhubekisi umzalwana wam."
1Corinthians9:1 Andingompostile na? Andingokhululekileyo na? Andimbonanga na uYesu Kristu, iNkosi yethu? aningumsebenzi wam na eNkosini?"
1Corinthians9:2 Ukuba andimpostile kwabanye, kuni nina ndinguye; kuba itywina lokuqinisa obam ubupostile linini aba baseNkosini."
1Corinthians9:3 Okwam ukuziphendulela kwabandincinayo kuko oku,"
1Corinthians9:4 Asinagunya na lokutya nokusela?
1Corinthians9:5 Asinagunya na, njengabanye abapostile, nabazalwana beNkosi, noKefas, ukuba siphelekwe ngabafazi bethu bengamakholwa?"
1Corinthians9:6 Okanye ndim ndedwa noBharnabhas, asinagunya lakuyeka ukusebenza?"
1Corinthians9:7 Ngubani na okha aphume umkhosi ngeyakhe indleko? Ngubani na otyala isidiliya, aze angadli siqhamo saso? Ngubani na owalusa umhlambi, aze angadli kubisi lomhlambi?"
1Corinthians9:8 Ndizithetha ngokomntu yini na ezo zinto? Awutsho nawo na umthetho?
1Corinthians9:9 Emthethweni kaMoses kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Uze ungayibophi umlomo inkomo ibhula. Ziinkomo yini na uThixo?"
1Corinthians9:10 Kanene akatsho ngenxa yethu na? Kambe ke kubhaliwe ngenxa yethu: Lowo ulimayo ufanele ukulima enethemba; nalowo ubhulayo enethemba lokuba uya kubelana nabanye ngethemba lakhe.
1Corinthians9:11 Ukuba ke thina sanihlwayelela izinto ezizezoMoya, yinto enkulu na, ukuba siya kuvuna izinto zenu ezizezenyama?"
1Corinthians9:12 Ukuba abanye babelana ngokwenza ngeli gunya kuni, asikukhona singenjenjalo na thina ngakumbi? Asilisebenzisanga ke elo gunya; sisuke sithwale izinto zonke, ukuze singazibambezeli ngani iindaba ezilungileyo zikaKristu."
1Corinthians9:13 Anazi na ukuba abo bazisebenzayo izinto ezingcwele badla okwetempile? abo bahlala behleli esibingelelweni bahlulelana nesibingelelo eso?
1Corinthians9:14 Ngokunjalo neNkosi le yabamisela abazazisayo iindaba ezilungileyo, ukuba baphile ngeendaba ezilungileyo ezi."
1Corinthians9:15 Ke mna andiphathanga nanye kwezo zinto. Ezi zinto andizibhaleli ukuze kwenjiwe njalo kum; kuba bekungilungele kanye ukuba ndife, kunokuba ubani alilambathise iqhayiya lam."
1Corinthians9:16 Kuba xa ndithi ndizishumayele iindaba ezilungileyo, andinaqhayiya; kuba ndimelwe kukuzishumayela. Yeha ke mna, ukuba ndisuka ndingazishumayeli iindaba ezilungileyo!"
1Corinthians9:17 Kaloku xa ndikwenzayo oko ndinokuzithandela, ndoba ndinomvuzo; ke xa ndikwenza ndingenakuzithandela, ndoba ndingophathiswe ubugosa nje."
1Corinthians9:18 Uyintoni na ke ngoko umvuzo wam? Okunene ke, ndithi ndakuzishumayela iindaba ezilungileyo, ndizenze zingabi nandleko iindaba ezilungileyo zikaKristu, ukuze ndingalisebenzisi igunya lam ezindabeni ezilungileyo ezi."
1Corinthians9:19 Kuba ndikhululekile nje kubo bonke, ndizikhonzisile kubo bonke, ukuze ndibazuze abona baninzi."
1Corinthians9:20 KumaYuda ndaba njengomYuda, ukuze ndiwazuze amaYuda; kwabo baphantsi komthetho ndaba njengophantsi komthetho, ukuze ndibazuze abaphantsi komthetho;"
1Corinthians9:21 kwabo bangenamthetho, ndaba njengongenamthetho, (ndingenguye phofu ongenamthetho kuThixo, ndingosemthethweni kuKristu), ukuze ndibazuze abangenamthetho;"
1Corinthians9:22 kwabo bangenamandla, ndaba njengongenamandla, ukuze ndibazuze abangenamandla; kubo bonke ndesuka ndaba ziinto zonke, ukuze ngeendlela zonke ndisindise inxenye."
1Corinthians9:23 Oko ke ndikwenza ngenxa yeendaba ezilungileyo, ukuze ndibe lidlelane nabo ngazo."
1Corinthians9:24 Anazi na, ukuba abo babalekayo elugqatsweni, babaleka bonke okunene, kodwa ke mnye owamkelayo umvuzo? Balekani ngokunjalo ke, ukuze nizuze."
1Corinthians9:25 Bonke ke abantu abazamayo, baba ziingcathu ezintweni zonke. Oko ke ukuze bazuze isithsaba esinokonakala; ke thina, singenakonakala."
1Corinthians9:26 Mna ke ngoko ndenjenjalo ukubaleka, ndingangi andiqondi; ndenjenjalo ukulwa, ndingangi ndibetha umoya;"
1Corinthians9:27 Ndisuka ndiwuqobe umzimba wam, ndiwuxinzelele phantsi, hleze ndithi, ndakuba ndizivakalisile iindaba ezilungileyo kwabanye, ndibe mna ndingumlahlelwa phandle."
1Corinthians10:1 Ke andithandi ukuba ningazi, bazalwana, ukuba oobawo babephantsi kwalo ilifu bonke; balucanda ulwandle bonke;"
1Corinthians10:2 Babhaptizelwa bonke kuye uMoses efini elo naselwandle;
1Corinthians10:3 Badla bonke oko kudla kunye kukokomoya;
1Corinthians10:4 basela bonke olo luselo lunye lulolomoya, kuba babesela kwiliwa elilelomoya elibe libalandela, iliwa elo lalinguye uKristu."
1Corinthians10:5 Kodwa noko uThixo akakholiswanga ngabaninzi kubo; ngokuba bathiwa entlango.
1Corinthians10:6 Ezo zinto ke zabe ziyimizekelo kuthi, ukuze singabi ngabakhanuki bezinto ezimbi, njengokuba bakhanukayo bona abo."
1Corinthians10:7 Kanjalo musani ukuba ngababusi bezithixo, njengenxenye yabo; njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Abantu bahlala phantsi ukuba badle, basele, baza besuka bema ukuba badlale."
1Corinthians10:8 Kanjalo masingenzi mbulo, njengokuba inxenye yabo yenzayo umbulo, kwawa ngamini-nye amawaka amashumi mabini anamathathu."
1Corinthians10:9 Kanjalo masingamhendi uKristu, njengokuba inxenye yabo yahendayo, yaza yatshabalala ziinyoka."
1Corinthians10:10 Kanjalo musani ukukrokra njengoko inxenye yabo yakrokrayo, yaza yatshabalala ngumtshabalalisi."
1Corinthians10:11 Zonke ke ezo zinto zabahlelayo bona, beziyimifuziselo; zabhalelwa ke ukululeka thina aba, bafikelweyo ziziphelo zawo amaphakade."
1Corinthians10:12 Ngoko ke lowo uba umi, makalumke angawi."
1Corinthians10:13 Anibanjwanga sihendo singesabantu; kodwa uThixo uthembekile, ongayi kuvumela ukuba nilingwe ngaphezu kweninako; owothi, kunye nesilingo eso, avelise ithuba lokuphuma kuso, nibe nako ukuthwala."
1Corinthians10:14 Kungoko ndithi, zintanda zam, kubalekeni ukubusa izithixo."
1Corinthians10:15 Ndithetha njengakwizilumko; kugwebeni endikuthethayo.
1Corinthians10:16 Indebe yentsikelelo le siyisikelelayo, asibubudlelane na begazi likaKristu? Isonka esisiqhekezayo, asibubudlelane na bomzimba kaKristu?"
1Corinthians10:17 Kaloku thina, sibaninzi nje, sisonka sinye, simzimba mnye, kuba sonke sabelana ngeso sonka sinye."
