1Corinthians10:18 Khangelani uSirayeli ngokwenyama. Abo bawadlayo amadini, abadlelani nesibingelelo eso?"
1Corinthians10:19 Ndithini na ke ngoko? Okanye amadini enziwa into na?
1Corinthians10:20 Ndithi ke, Amadini eziwenzayo iintlanga, ziwenzela iindimoni, aziwenzeli uThixo. Andithandi ke ukuba nibe ngamadlelane needemon nina."
1Corinthians10:21 Aninako ukusela indebe yeNkosi nendebe yeendimoni. Aninako ukuba nenxaxheba esithebeni seNkosi, nasesithebeni seendimoni."
1Corinthians10:22 Siyayikhweletisa na iNkosi? Ngaba sinamandla kunaye?
1Corinthians10:23 Zonke izinto zivumelekile kum, noko azindilungele zonke. Zonke izinto zivumelekile kum, noko azakhi zonke."
1Corinthians10:24 Makungabikho namnye ufuna okukokwakhe ukulungelwa;
1Corinthians10:25 Yonke into ethengelwa endaweni yokuthenga inyama, yidleni, ningaphicothi nto ngenxa yesazela;"
1Corinthians10:26 Kuba umhlaba lo ngoweNkosi, nenzaliseko yawo."
1Corinthians10:27 Ukuba ke ubani wakubo abangakholwayo uthi animeme, nithande ukuya; yonke into ebekwa phambi kwenu yidleni, ningaphicothi nto ngenxa yesazela."
1Corinthians10:28 Kodwa ke ukuba ubani uthe kuni, Le nto ilidini elenzelwe izithixo, musani ukudla, ngenxa ke yalowo uyithe thupha loo nto, nangenxa yesazela; kuba umhlaba lo ngoweNkosi, nenzaliseko yawo."
1Corinthians10:29 Ndithi, isazela ke, singesiso esakho wena; sisesomnye lowo. Kuba yini na ukuba inkululeko yam igwetywe sesazela somnye?"
1Corinthians10:30 Kaloku ukuba mna ndidlelana ngobabalo, yini na ukuba ndinyeliswe ngenxa yoko ndikubulelayo mna?"
1Corinthians10:31 Ke ngoko, nokuba niyadla, nokuba niyasela, nokuba nenza yiphi na into, zenzeleni uzuko lukaThixo izinto zonke."
1Corinthians10:32 Musani ukuba sisikhubekiso nakumaYuda, nakumaGrike, nakuwo ibandla likaThixo;"
1Corinthians10:33 njengokuba nam ndikholisa bonke ezintweni zonke, ndingafuni okwam ukulungelwa, ndifuna okwabaninzi, ukuze basindiswe."
1Corinthians11:1 Yibani ngabaxelisa mna, njengokuba nam ndixelisa uKristu."
1Corinthians11:2 Ke kaloku ndiyanidumisa, bazalwana, kuba nindikhumbula ngeendawo zonke, nizibambile izithethe, njengoko ndaninikelayo."
1Corinthians11:3 Kodwa ndithanda ukuba nazi, ukuba intloko yomntu wonke oyindoda nguKristu; intloko yomfazi yindoda; intloko ke kaKristu nguThixo."
1Corinthians11:4 Umntu wonke oyindoda, ethandaza, mhlawumbi eprofeta, enento entloko, uya intloko yakhe."
1Corinthians11:5 Umntu wonke ke ongumfazi, ethandaza, mhlawumbi eprofeta, engenasigqubuthelo entloko, uyayihlaza eyakhe intloko; kuba oko kunto-nye nokuba uchetyiwe."
1Corinthians11:6 Kuba umfazi, ukuba akagqubuthele, makaselenquthulwa nokunquthulwa. Ke ukuba kulihlazo kumfazi ukuba anquthulwe, mhlawumbi achetywe, makabe nesigqubuthelo."
1Corinthians11:7 Kuba indoda okunene ayifanele ukuba nesigqubuthelo entloko, ekubeni ingumfanekiselo nozuko lukaThixo; ke yena umfazi luzuko lwendoda."
1Corinthians11:8 Kuba indoda ayiphume emfazini; ngumfazi oyindoda;
1Corinthians11:9 kuba indoda ayidalwanga ngenxa yomfazi; umfazi ke ngendoda.
1Corinthians11:10 Ngenxa yoko umfazi ufanele ukuba abe nomqondiso wegunya phezu kwentloko, ngenxa yezithunywa zezulu."
1Corinthians11:11 Kodwa eNkosini apha indoda ayingaphandle komfazi, nomfazi akangaphandle kwendoda;"
1Corinthians11:12 kuba, njengokuba umfazi ephume kwindoda, ngokunjalo nayo indoda ingaye umfazi; kodwa zonke izinto zikaThixo."
1Corinthians11:13 Zigwebeleni ngokwenu. Kumfanele na ukuba umfazi athandaze kuThixo, engagqubuthele?"
1Corinthians11:14 Kananjalo imvelo ngokwayo ayinifundisi na, ukuba indoda okunene ethi ibe neenwele ezinde, kulihlazo oko kuyo?"
1Corinthians11:15 Ke yena umfazi, ukuba uthi abe neenwele ezinde, kuluzuko oko kuye; ngokuba wazinikwa iinwele ezinde endaweni yesigqubuthelo."
1Corinthians11:16 Ke ukuba ubani ubonakala ethanda ukuphika, thina asinasiko linjalo, kwanawo amabandla kaThixo."
1Corinthians11:17 Ke kaloku, ndinithethela le ndawo nje, andinincomi, ukuba ukuhlangana kwenu ndawonye akusingisi kokhona kulungileyo;"
1Corinthians11:18 Kuba kuqalake, nakuhlangana ebandleni, ndiyeva ukuba kubakho izahlukahlukano phakathi kwenu; nam ke ndiyakholwa yiyo."
1Corinthians11:19 Kuba kumele ukuba kubekho nezahlukano phakathi kwenu, ukuze abacikidekileyo babonakale phakathi kwenu."
1Corinthians11:20 Xenikweni ngoko nithe nahlangana ndawonye, asikuko ukuba nidle isidlo seNkosi;"
1Corinthians11:21 Kaloku xa batyayo elowo udla owakhe isidlo, aze omnye alambe, omnye anxile."
1Corinthians11:22 Yintoni na? Aninazindlu zokudlela nokusela na? Okanye nidela ibandla likaThixo na, nibadanisa nje abangenanto? Ndithini na kuwe? Ndinidumise na kule nto? andikuncomi;"
1Corinthians11:23 Kuba mna ndakwamkela eNkosini oko ndikunikeleyo nokukunikela kuni: Okokuba iNkosi uYesu, ngobusuku eyanikelwa ngabo, yathabatha isonka;"
1Corinthians11:24 yaza yakuba ibulele, yasiqhekeza, yathi, Thabathani, nidle, ngumzimba wam lo, owaphulelwa nina; oku kwenzeleni ukundikhumbula."
1Corinthians11:25 Kwangokunjalo yathabatha nayo indebe, emva kokuba kudliwe, isithi, Le ndebe ingumnqophiso omtsha osegazini lam; ngamaxesha onke enisukuba niyisela, oku kwenzeleni ukundikhumbula."
1Corinthians11:26 Kuba ngamaxesha onke enisukuba nisidla eso sonka, niyisele loo ndebe, niyakwazisa ukufa kweNkosi, ide ifike."
1Corinthians11:27 Ngoko ke, osukuba esidla eso sonka, ayisele indebe yeNkosi, ngokungafanelekileyo, woba netyala lomzimba negazi leNkosi."
1Corinthians11:28 Makazicikide ke ngokwakhe umntu, aze ngokunjalo adle kwisonka eso, ayisele nendebe leyo;"
1Corinthians11:29 kuba lowo udlayo, uselayo, ngokungafanelekileyo, uzidlela aziselele ukugwetywa, engawucaluli nje umzimba weNkosi."
1Corinthians11:30 Ngenxa yoku baninzi phakathi kwenu abaswele amandla, nabayimilwelwe, banele nabalele ukufa."
1Corinthians11:31 Kuba xa besizicalula, ngesiba asigwetywa."
1Corinthians11:32 Sigwetywa nje ke, siyaqeqeshwa yiNkosi, ukuze singasingelwa phantsi ndawonye nehlabathi."
1Corinthians11:33 Ngoko ke, bazalwana bam, xa nihlangene ndawonye ukuba nidle, lindanani."
1Corinthians11:34 Ukuba ubani ulambile, makatye ekhaya; ukuze ningahlangani ndawonye ukuze nigwetywe. Eziseleyo ke iindawo ndozilungisa ndakufika."
1Corinthians12:1 Ke ngezipho ezizezoMoya andithandi ukuba ningazi, bazalwana."
1Corinthians12:2 Niyazi ukuba nanifudula niziintlanga, nikhukuliselwe ezithixweni ezizizidenge, njengoko nisakuthi nikhokelwe ngako."
1Corinthians12:3 Kungoko ndinazisayo, ukuba akukho namnye, ethetha ekuMoya kaThixo, unokuthi ungosingelwe phantsi uYesu; kanjalo akukho namnye unako ukuthi uyiNkosi uYesu, engekuye uMoya oyiNgcwele."
1Corinthians12:4 Ke kaloku kukho izabelo ngezabelo zezibabalo, kodwa ke ikwanguloo Moya mnye."
1Corinthians12:5 Kukho nezabelo ngezabelo zezabelo zemisebenzi, kodwa ikwayiloo Nkosi inye."
1Corinthians12:6 Kukho nezabelo ngezabelo zeentsebenzo, kodwa ke ikwanguloo Thixo mnye uzisebenzayo izinto zonke kubo bonke."
1Corinthians12:7 Elowo ke uphiwa ukubonakalalisa uMoya, kuze kubekho okulungele bonke;"
1Corinthians12:8 Kuba omnye okunene uphiwa ngaye uMoya ilizwi lobulumko; omnye ke, ilizwi lokwazi kwangaloo Moya;"
1Corinthians12:9 wumbi ke uphiwa ukholo kwangaloo Moya; omnye ke, izibabalo zeziphiliso kwangaloo Moya;"
1Corinthians12:10 omnye ke uphiwa imimangaliso; omnye isiprofeto esi; omnye ke, ukucalula oomoya; wumbi ke, iintlobo zeelwimi; omnye ke, ukucaciswa kweelwimi;"
1Corinthians12:11 Zonke ke ezi zinto zisetyenzwa kwangaloo Moya mnye; umabela elowo ngokwakhe njengoko athandayo.
1Corinthians12:12 Kuba, kwanjengokuba umzimba umnye, unamalungu amaninzi, abe ke onke amalungu aloo mzimba mnye, emaninzi nje, emzimba mnye, ukwanjalo ke noKristu lo."
1Corinthians12:13 Kaloku thina sonke sabhaptizelwa mzimbeni mnye ngaMoya mnye, nokuba singamaYuda, nokuba singamaGrike, nokuba singamakhoboka, nokuba singabakhululekileyo; nokuba sasezwa Moyeni mnye sonke."
1Corinthians12:14 Kaloku nomzimba lo ungelungu linye, ungamaninzi."
1Corinthians12:15 Ukuba luthe unyawo, Ngokuba ndingesiso isandla, andingowasemzimbeni; Lo asingowasemzimbeni na?"
1Corinthians12:16 Nokuba ithe indlebe, Ngokuba ndingelilo iliso, andingowasemzimbeni; Lo asingowasemzimbeni na?"
1Corinthians12:17 Ukuba umzimba lo uphela ubuliliso, bekuya kuba phi na ukuva? Ukuba ubukukuva uphela, bekuya kuba phi na ukusezela?"
1Corinthians12:18 Kungoku ke, uThixo uthe wawamisa amalungu onke emzimbeni, njengoko ethanda."
1Corinthians12:19 Ukuba ke onke ebelungu linye, ubuya kuba phi na umzimba?"
1Corinthians12:20 Kungoku ke maninzi okunene amalungu, kodwa mnye wona umzimba."
1Corinthians12:21 Alinako ke iliso ukuthi kwisandla, Akufuneki kum; kanjalo intloko ayinakuthi kwiinyawo, Anifuneki kum."
1Corinthians12:22 Kambe ke wona amalungu la malungu omzimba abonakala ebuthathaka ngakumbi.
1Corinthians12:23 Namalungu omzimba esiba ngaswele imbeko kunamanye, lawo ngawona siwabeka embekweni; aze amalungu ethu abekekileyo, abe ngawona abekekileyo."
1Corinthians12:24 Amalungu ethu ke abekekileyo akufuneki nto kuwo. Usuke uThixo wawumanya umzimba, wathi ilungu elingento walibeka kweyona mbeko inkulu;"
1Corinthians12:25 ukuze kungabikho kwahlukahlukana emzimbeni; kodwa ukuba amalungu anyamekelane;
1Corinthians12:26 kuthi, nokuba lilungu elinye eliva ubunzima, avelane amalungu onke; nokuba lilungu elinye elizukiswayo, avuyisane amalungu onke."
1Corinthians12:27 Nina ke ningumzimba kaKristu, ngokwamalungu mnye."
1Corinthians12:28 Inxenye uThixo wayimisa ebandleni, kuqala yangabapostile, okwesibini abaprofeti, okwesithathu abafundisi; kwaza kwaba yimisebenzi yamandla, kwaba zizibabalo zeziphiliso, iintsizo, izilawulo, iintlobo zeelwimi."
1Corinthians12:29 Bangabapostile bonke na? Bangabaprofeti bonke na? Ngabafundisi bonke? Banemisebenzi yamandla bonke na?
1Corinthians12:30 Baneziphiwo zokuphilisa bonke? Bathetha ngalwimi zimbi bonke yini na? Batolika bonke bephela?
1Corinthians12:31 Zondelelani ke ezona zibabalo zilungileyo, kanti ke ndisanibonisa eyona ndlela incamisileyo."
1Corinthians13:1 Ndingafanelana ndithetha ngeelwimi zabantu nezezithunywa zezulu; uthando ke ndingenalo, ndisuke ndaba yixina ehlokomayo, necangci elikhenkcezayo."
1Corinthians13:2 Ndingafanelana ndinabo nobuprofeto, ndizazi iimfihlelo zonke, ndinako konke ukwazi; ndingafanelana ndinalo lonke ukholo, ngokokude ndisuse iintaba, uthando ke ndingenalo, andinto yanto."
1Corinthians13:3 Ndingafanelana ndisamkelisa amahlwempu ngempahla yam yonke, nokuba ndithe umzimba wam ndawunikela ukuba utshiswe, uthando ke ndingenalo, akundincedi lutho."
1Corinthians13:4 Uthando luzeka kade umsindo, lunobubele; uthando alunamona; Uthando alukhukhumali, alukhukhumali;"
1Corinthians13:5 Aluziphathi okuziintloni; alufuni okukokwalo; alucaphuki; alucaphuki;
1Corinthians13:6 Aluvuyeli kungalungisi; luvuyisana nenyaniso;
1Corinthians13:7 Luthwala iinto zonke; lukholwa ziinto zonke; luthemba iinto zonke;
1Corinthians13:8 Uthando aluze lutshitshe; nokuba ke ziziprofeto, ziya kutshitshiswa; nokuba ziilwimi, ziya kupheza; nokuba kukwazi, kuya kuphuthiswa."
1Corinthians13:9 Kuba siyazi ngokuyinxenye, siprofeta ngokuyinxenye."
1Corinthians13:10 Xa kuthe ke kwafika okuzalisekileyo, kuya kwandula ukuphuthiswa okuyinxenye."
1Corinthians13:11 Oko bendingumntwana, bendithetha ngokomntwana, bendiqonda ngokomntwana, bendicamanga ngokomntwana; ndithe ke, ndakuba yindoda, ndazibhangisa izinto zobuntwana."
1Corinthians13:12 Kuba ngoku sikhangela esipilini ngokwamanakanibe; oko ke, siya kukhangelana ebusweni. Ngoku ndiyazi ngokuyinxenye; oko ke ndiya kwazi, njengokuba ndaziwayo nam."
1Corinthians13:13 Kungoku ke kuhleli ukholo, ithemba, uthando, ezo zinto zontathu; eyona inkulu ke kuzo apho luthando."
1Corinthians14:1 Phuthumani uthando olo, nibe kodwa nizizondelela izipho ezizezoMoya, ngokukodwa ke ukuba niprofete."
1Corinthians14:2 Kaloku lowo uthetha ngalulwimi lumbi akathethi bantwini, uthetha kuThixo, kuba akukho namnye umvayo; kanti ke ngomoya uthetha iimfihlelo."
1Corinthians14:3 Ke yena oprofetayo uthetha ebantwini ulwakheko, noyalo, nokhuzo."
1Corinthians14:4 Lowo uthetha ngalulwimi lumbi uzakha yena; ke yena oprofetayo wakha ibandla.
1Corinthians14:5 Ndiyathanda ke ukuba nithethe ngalwimi zimbi nonke, noko ke ndithanda ngokukodwa ukuba niprofete. Kuba yena oprofetayo mkhulu kunalowo uthetha ngalwimi zimbi, xa lo angayicacisiyo intetho, ukuze ibandla libe nokwakheka."
1Corinthians14:6 Kunjalo ke, bazalwana, ukuba ndithe ndeza kuni, ndithetha ngalwimi zimbi, bendiya kuninceda ntoni na, xa ndingathanga ndithethe kuni ndinesityhilelo, ndinokwazi, ndinesiprofeto, ndinemfundiso?"
1Corinthians14:7 Khona kwizinto ezihlokomayo ezingenamphefumlo, ezinjengembande, nohadi, ukuba azithanga zahlule ukuhlokoma kwazo, bekungathiwani na ukwaziwa oko kubethwayo ngembande, noko kubethwayo ngohadi?"
1Corinthians14:8 Kuba kanjalo, xa ixilongo lithe lalila ngezwi elingaqondakaliyo, ngubani na owoyixhobela imfazwe?"
1Corinthians14:9 Ngokukwanjalo nani, ukuba anithanga nithethe ngalo ulwimi intetho eqondeka kakuhle, yothiwani na ukwaziwa into enithetha yona? kuba nothethela esibhakabhakeni."
1Corinthians14:10 Nokuba zingaba sezingakanani na ukuba zininzi kwazo iintlobo zeentetho ehlabathini, akukho nalunye kuzo olungenanto luthetha yona."
1Corinthians14:11 Ukuba ngoko andithanga ndiyazi intsingiselo yentetho, ndoba ngumbharbhari kothethayo, nothethayo woba ngumbharbhari kum."
1Corinthians14:12 Ngokukwanjalo nani, ekubeni kaloku nizondelela izipho ezizezoMoya, zifuneleni ukuba nibe nazo ngokugqithiseleyo, ukuze lakheke ibandla."
1Corinthians14:13 Ngenxa yoko ndithi, othethayo ngalwimi zimbi, makathandazele ukuba icace intetho yakhe."
1Corinthians14:14 Kuba xa ndithandaza ngalulwimi lumbi, umoya wam uyathandaza okunene wona, ke yona ingqiqo yam ayinasiqhamo."
1Corinthians14:15 Kuthini na ke ngoko? Ndiya kuthandaza ngomoya, ndithandaze nangengqiqo; ndiya kuvuma ngomoya, ndivume nangengqiqo."
1Corinthians14:16 Okanye, ukuba uthe wasikelela ngomoya wodwa, wothini na lowo uhleliyo endaweni yongenakwazi ukuthi, Amen, ekubuleleni kwakho, ekubeni kaloku into oyithethayo engayazi?"
1Corinthians14:17 Kuba okunene wena uyatyapha ukubulela, kodwa onguwumbi akakheki."
1Corinthians14:18 Ndiyabulela kuThixo wam, kuba ndithetha ngalwimi zimbi ngaphezu kwenu nonke;"
1Corinthians14:19 Kodwa ke ebandleni ndithanda ukuthetha amazwi abe mahlanu ngayo ingqiqo yam, ukuze ndibafundise nabanye, kunokuba ndithethe amazwi angamawaka alishumi, ngalulwimi lumbi."
1Corinthians14:20 Bazalwana, musani ukuba ngabantwana engqondweni, ebubini yibani ziintsana, engqondweni ke yibani ngabantu abakhulu."
1Corinthians14:21 Emthethweni kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Ndiya kuthetha kwaba bantu ngalwimi zimbi nangamlomo wumbi; noko kunjalo, abayi kundiva, itsho iNkosi."
1Corinthians14:22 Ngoko ke iilwimi ezi zikho ukuba zibe ngumqondiso kwabo bangakholwayo, kungekubo abakholwayo: ke sona isiprofeto asisesabangakholwayo, sesabakholwayo."
1Corinthians14:23 Xa lithe lahlangana ndawonye ibandla liphela, bathetha bonke ngalwimi zimbi, kwaza kwangena abangenakwazi, nokuba ngabangakholwayo, abasayi kuthi na, niyageza?"
1Corinthians14:24 Ke ukuba bathi bonke baprofete, kuze ke kungene umntu ongakholwayo, nokuba ngongenakwazi, uyohlwaywa ngabo bonke, adane;"
1Corinthians14:25 zize ngokunjalo izinto ezifihlakeleyo zentliziyo yakhe zibonakalaliswe; wothi ngokunjalo, esiwa ngobuso, amnqule uThixo, exela ukuba uThixo uphakathi kwenu okwenyaniso."
1Corinthians14:26 Kuthini na ke ngoko, bazalwana? Xa sukuba nihlangene, uthi elowo kuni abe nengoma, abe nemfundiso, abe nalulwimi lumbi, abe nesityhilelo, abe nokuchaza intetho. Zonke izinto mazenziwe ukuze zakheke."
1Corinthians14:27 Kaloku ukuba umntu uthetha ngalulwimi lumbi, makuthethe babini, mhlawumbi bathathu, bangegqithi, kube ngokulandelelana, aze omnye atolike."
1Corinthians14:28 Ke xa kungekho mchazi-ntetho, makathi cwaka ebandleni; makathethe kuye ngokwakhe nakuThixo."
1Corinthians14:29 Abaprofeti ke, makuthethe babini, mhlawumbi bathathu, abanye bacalule."
1Corinthians14:30 Ukuba ke kuthe watyhilelwa into omnye ehleli khona, owokuqala makathi cwaka."
1Corinthians14:31 Kuba ninako ukuprofeta ngabanye nonke, ukuze bafunde bonke, bavuselelwe bonke."
1Corinthians14:32 Kwaye oomoya babaprofeti bayabathobela abaprofeti.
1Corinthians14:33 Kuba uThixo akangowesiphithiphithi, ngowoxolo; njengokuba kunjalo kuwo onke amabandla abangcwele."
1Corinthians14:34 Abafazi benu mabathi tu emabandleni; kuba abavunyelwa bona ukuba bathethe. Basuka bathobele, njengokuba usitsho nomthetho."
1Corinthians14:35 Ukuba ke banga bangaqonda into, mabayibuze ekhaya kwawabo amadoda; kuba lihlazo kubafazi ukuthetha ebandleni."
1Corinthians14:36 Yintoni na? Kanene ilizwi likaThixo laphuma livela kuni na? Ngaba lize kuni nedwa?
1Corinthians14:37 Ukuba umntu uba ungumprofeti, nokuba uba ungowoMoya, makazazi kakuhle izinto endinibhalela zona, ukuba yimithetho yeNkosi."
1Corinthians14:38 Ke ukuba umntu akazi, makangazi."
1Corinthians14:39 Kungoko ndithi, bazalwana, kuzondeleleni ukuprofeta, ningakwaleli ukuthetha ngalwimi zimbi."
1Corinthians14:40 Zonke izinto mazenziwe ngokubekekileyo, nangolungelelwano."
1Corinthians15:1 Ke kaloku, bazalwana, ndiyanazisa iindaba ezilungileyo, ezo ndazishumayela kuni, nazamkelayo nokuzamkela, nimiyo kuzo;"
1Corinthians15:2 Nisindiswayo nokusindiswa ngazo, ukuba nizibambile ngelizwi endazishumayela ngalo kuni; ukuba anithe nafumana nakholwa."
1Corinthians15:3 Kuba ndaninikela kweziyintloko izinto oko ndakwamkelayo nokukwamkela: okokuba uKristu wazifela izono zethu, ngokwezibhalo;"
1Corinthians15:4 nokokuba wangcwatywa, nokokuba uvukile ngomhla wesithathu ngokwezibhalo;"
1Corinthians15:5 nokokuba wabonwa nguKefas, emva koko ngabalishumi elinababini."
1Corinthians15:6 Emveni kuko wabonwa ngaxesha linye ngabazalwana abangaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu, ababengaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu; abasahleliyo nangoku abona baninzi kubo; inxenye ke yalala ukufa."
1Corinthians15:7 Emva koko wabonwa nguYakobi; emva koko kubo bonke abapostile.
1Corinthians15:8 Ekugqibeleni ke kwabo bonke, kwanga kukwinto ezelwe lingekabi lilixa layo, wabonwa nandim."
1Corinthians15:9 Kuba mna ndingoyena mncinanana kubapostile, endingafanele kubizwa ngokuba ngumpostile, ngenxa enokuba ndalitshutshisa ibandla likaThixo."
1Corinthians15:10 Ke ngobabalo lukaThixo ndiyinto endiyiyo, nobabalo lwakhe kum alubanga nakulambatha; ndesuka ndabagqitha bonke ngokubulaleka; ingendim ke, ilubabalo lukaThixo olunam."
1Corinthians15:11 Ngoko ke, nokuba ndim, nokuba ngabo, senjenjalo thina ukushumayela; nenjenjalo ke nina ukukholwa."
1Corinthians15:12 Ke, ukuba uKristu uyashunyayelwa ukuba uvukile kwabafileyo, batsho ngani na abathile phakathi kwenu ukuthi, akukho luvuko lwabafileyo?"
1Corinthians15:13 Ke, ukuba akukho luvuko lwabafileyo, woba akavukanga noKristu;"
1Corinthians15:14 Ukuba ke uKristu akavukanga, koba akunto ukushumayela kwethu, loba luyalambatha nokholo lwenu."
1Corinthians15:15 Sofunyanwa ke singawo namangqina amxokayo uThixo; ngokuba sangqinayo ngoThixo ukuba wamvusa uKristu, angamvusanga, ukuba ke kanti abafileyo abavuki."
1Corinthians15:16 Kuba, ukuba abafileyo abavuki, noKristu woba akavukanga."
1Corinthians15:17 Ukuba ke uKristu akavukanga, loba luyinto engeyanto ukholo lwenu; nisesezonweni zenu;"
1Corinthians15:18 ngoko nabalele ukufa bekuKristu, boba batshabalele."
1Corinthians15:19 Ukuba singabathembele kuKristu kobu bomi bodwa, soba sizezona ntsizana kubantu bonke."
1Corinthians15:20 uKristu yena kunje uvukile kwabafileyo, waba yintlahlela yabalele ukufa."
1Corinthians15:21 Kuba ekubeni kaloku kungomntu ukufa, kukwangomntu ukuvuka kwabafileyo."
1Corinthians15:22 Kuba, njengokuba kuye uAdam bafa bonke, ngokunjalo nakuye uKristu baya kudliswa ubomi bonke."
1Corinthians15:23 Elowo ke kolwakhe uluhlu; kamva abakhe bangabakaKristu ekufikeni kwakhe.
1Corinthians15:24 Kwandule ke ukubakho isiphelo, xa athe wabunikela ubukumkani kuye uThixo uYise, xa athe wabubhangisa bonke ubulawuli, nalo lonke igunya, namandla."
1Corinthians15:25 Kuba umelwe yena kukuthi alawule, ade azibeke phantsi kweenyawo zakhe zonke iintshaba."
1Corinthians15:26 Olokugqibela utshaba oluya kubhangiswa kukufa;
1Corinthians15:27 Kuba izinto zonke wazithobela phantsi kweenyawo zakhe. Ke xa athi, zonke izinto zithotyiwe, kuyabonakala ukuba akabalwa lowo wazithobela phantsi kwakhe zonke izinto."
1Corinthians15:28 Xa ke zithe zathotyelwa phantsi kwakhe zonke izinto, uya kwandula noNyana ngokwakhe athotyelwe phantsi kwalowo wazithobela phantsi kwakhe zonke izinto, ukuze uThixo abe zizinto zonke kubo bonke."
1Corinthians15:29 Okanye baya kuthini na abo babhaptizelwa abafileyo, ukuba abafileyo abavuki? yini na ke ukuba babhaptizelwe abafileyo?"
1Corinthians15:30 Nathi, yini na ukuba sibe semngciphekweni amaxa onke?"
1Corinthians15:31 Ndisekufeni imihla ngemihla; qondani ngokuzingca kwam ngani, endinako ndikuKristu Yesu, iNkosi yethu."
1Corinthians15:32 Ukuba ndithe ngokwabantu ndalwa namarhamncwa e-Efese, kundinceda ntoni na? masidle, sisele; kuba ngomso siya kufa."
1Corinthians15:33 Musani ukulahlekiswa. Incoko embi yonakalisa izimilo ezilungileyo.
1Corinthians15:34 Vumelani ubulungisa, ningoni; kuba inxenye inentswela-kumazi uThixo; nditsho ukuba nidane."
1Corinthians15:35 Wosuka ubani athi, Bathini na ukuvuka abafileyo? beza benamzimba mni na?"
1Corinthians15:36 Msweli-kuqonda wena, into oyihlwayelayo ayenziwa iphile, ukuba ayikhanga ife;"
1Corinthians15:37 Kanjalo loo nto uyihlwayelayo, akuhlwayeli sona isiqu sento esiya kubakho; uhlwayela ukhozo nje, lungathi lube lolwengqolowa, nokuba lolwezinye iintlobo;"
1Corinthians15:38 Kodwa uThixo ulunika isiqu, njengoko athandileyo; iyileyo imbewu uyinika esisesayo isiqu."
1Corinthians15:39 Yonke inyama ayinyama-nye; enye yinyama yabantu, enye yinyama yeenkomo, enye yeyeentlanzi, enye yeyeentaka."
1Corinthians15:40 Kukho nemizimba yasezulwini, nemizimba yasemhlabeni; kodwa ubuqaqawuli bowasezulwini bunye, bubodwa ubuqaqawuli bowasemhlabeni."
1Corinthians15:41 Bubodwa ubuqaqawuli belanga, bubodwa ubuqaqawuli benyanga, bubodwa ubuqaqawuli beenkwenkwezi; kuba inkwenkwezi iyahluka kwenye inkwenkwezi ngobuqaqawuli."
1Corinthians15:42 Lunjalo ke kanye novuko lwabafileyo. Uhlwayelwa unokonakala; luvuswa lungenakonakala;
1Corinthians15:43 Uhlwayelwa uswele imbeko; Uhlwayelwa uswele amandla, uvuka unobuqaqawuli; luvuka lusemandleni;"
1Corinthians15:44 Kuhlwayelwa umzimba wemvelo; kuvuka umzimba womoya. Kukho umzimba ongowemvelo, kukho nomzimba ongowomoya."
1Corinthians15:45 Ngokunjalo kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Owokuqala umntu uAdam waba ngumphefumlo odla ubomi; owokugqibela uAdam waba ngumoya odlisa ubomi."
1Corinthians15:46 Ke akuqali okomoya; kuqala okwemvelo, kwandule ukuza okomoya, kwandule ke oko koMoya."
1Corinthians15:47 Owokuqala umntu uphume emhlabeni, ungowomhlaba; owesibini umntu ke, iNkosi, uphume emazulwini."
1Corinthians15:48 Njengoko enjalo owomhlaba, bakwayiyo abomhlaba; kanjalo nento ayiyo osemazulwini, bakwayiyo abo basemazulwini."
1Corinthians15:49 Njengoko sawambathayo umfanekiselo wowomhlaba, siya kuwambatha nomfanekiselo wosemazulwini."
1Corinthians15:50 Ke, bazalwana, nditsho ukuthi, inyama negazi azinako ukubudla ilifa ubukumkani bukaThixo; nokonakala akunakukudla ilifa ukungonakali."
1Corinthians15:51 Niyabona, ndinixelela imfihlelo: Okunene asiyi kulala ukufa sonke; Asiyi kulala sonke, kodwa siya kwenziwa ngakumbi sonke;"
1Corinthians15:52 Ngesiquphe, ngephanyazo, ngexilongo lokugqibela; kuba liya kukhala ixilongo, bavuke abafileyo bengenakonakala, senziwe ngakumbi ke thina."
1Corinthians15:53 Kuba kumele oku konakalayo ukwambatha ukungonakali, noku kufayo ukwambatha ukungafi."
1Corinthians15:54 Xa ke oku konakalayo kuthe kwambatha ukungonakali, noku kufayo kuthe kwambatha ukungafi, liya kwandula ukwenzeka ilizwi elibhaliweyo lokuthi, Ukufa kufincelwe eloyisweni."
1Corinthians15:55 Luphi na, kufa, ulwamvila lwakho? luphi na, bethuna, uloyiso lwakho?"
1Corinthians15:56 Ulwamvila lokufa sisono; amandla esono ngumthetho.
1Corinthians15:57 Makubulelwe ke kuThixo osinikayo uloyiso olo, ngayo iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
1Corinthians15:58 Ngoko ke, bazalwana bam baziintanda, qinani, ningabi nakushukuma; nihlale niphuphuma umsebenzi weNkosi, nisazi nje ukuba ukubulaleka kwenu akulambathi eNkosini."
1Corinthians16:1 Ke kaloku, ngokubuthwa kwemali yokusiza amakholwa, yenzani ngokunjalo nani ndawamisela amabandla kaThixo akwelaseGalati."
1Corinthians16:2 Ngolokuqala usuku, iiveki ngeeveki, elowo kuni makabeke ekhaya, eqweba, into asukuba esikelelwe ngayo;"
1Corinthians16:3 Ndakuba ndifikile, enisukuba nibacikidile nakholwa ngabo, ndobathuma bona benencwadi, base isipho senu esi eYerusalem."
1Corinthians16:4 Ke ukuba kuthe kwabonakala ukuba nam ndiye, bohamba kunye nam."
1Corinthians16:5 Emva koko ndiya kuza kuni, xa ndithe ndacanda kwelaseMakedoni, kuba ndiya kwanela ukucanda nje elaseMakedoni."
1Corinthians16:6 Ke kuni mhlawumbi ndingathi ndihlale ndidlulise nobusika, ukuze nina nindiphelekelele apho ndisukuba ndisiya khona."
1Corinthians16:7 Kuba andithandi ukuba ndinibone ngoku ndidlulayo; kodwa ndithemba ukuba ndokha ndihlale kuni ixesha elithile, ukuba iNkosi ithe yavuma."
1Corinthians16:8 Kodwa ndiya kuhlala e-Efese kude kubekho ipentekoste.
1Corinthians16:9 Kuba ndivulelwe umnyango omkhulu onamandla, bebaninzi nabachasi."
1Corinthians16:10 Ukuba uTimoti uthe wafika, ize nikhangele ukuba angabi nakoyika phakathi kwenu; kuba uyawusebenza umsebenzi weNkosi, kwanjengam."
1Corinthians16:11 Makungabikho mntu ngoko umenza into engento. Mphelekeleleni ke ninoxolo, ukuze eze kum; kuba ndimlindile kunye nabazalwana."
1Corinthians16:12 Ke kaloku, ngaye nApolo umzalwana, ndamvuselela kakhulu, ukuba eze kuni kunye nabazalwana. Kuye akubangakho kanye ukuthanda ukuza okwakalokunje; woza ke, xa athe wanethuba elilungileyo."
1Corinthians16:13 Phaphani, yimani elukholweni; yibani ngamadoda; yomelelani."
1Corinthians16:14 Zonke izinto zenu mazenziwe ngothando.
1Corinthians16:15 Ndiyanivuselela ke nina, bazalwana, niyayazi indlu kaStefana, ukuba iyintlahlela yelaseAkaya, yazinikela ekulungiseleleni abangcwele;"
1Corinthians16:16 ukuba nibalulamele abanjalo, nakubo bonke abasincedayo nababulalekayo."
1Corinthians16:17 Ndiyavuya ke ngokufika kukaStefana noFortunato noAkayiko; ngokuba bakwenzelelele bona ukungabikho kwenu;
1Corinthians16:18 Kuba bawuphumzile umoya wam nowenu. Bazini kakuhle ngoko abanjalo.
1Corinthians16:19 Ayanibulisa amabandla aseAsiya. Bayanibulisa kunene eNkosini uAkwila noPrisila, kunye nebandla elisendlwini yabo."
1Corinthians16:20 Bayanibulisa abazalwana bonke. Bulisanani ngolwango olungcwele.
1Corinthians16:21 Umbuliso ungesam isandla, mna Pawulos."
1Corinthians16:22 Ukuba ubani akayithandi iNkosi uYesu Kristu, makasingelwe phantsi."
1Corinthians16:23 Ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu malube nani.
1Corinthians16:24 Uthando lwam malube nani nonke bakuKristu Yesu. Amen. (Incwadi yokuqala eya kwabaseKorinte yabhalwa nguStefano noFortunato noAkayiko noTimoti eFilipi.)
2Corinthians1:1 uPawulos, umpostile kaYesu Kristu ngokuthanda kukaThixo, noTimoti umzalwana, ubhalela ibandla likaThixo eliseKorinte, ndawonye nabo bonke abangcwele abakulo lonke elaseAkaya;"
2Corinthians1:2 bathi, Makube lubabalo kuni, noxolo oluvela kuThixo uBawo wethu, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
2Corinthians1:3 Makabongwe uThixo, uYise weNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu, uYise onenceba, uThixo wentuthuzelo yonke,"
2Corinthians1:4 osithuthuzelayo kuyo yonke imbandezelo yethu, ukuze sibe nako ukubathuthuzela abakwinto yonke eyimbandezelo, ngayo intuthuzelo esithuthuzelwa ngayo nathi nguye uThixo."
2Corinthians1:5 Kaloku, njengokuba iintlungu zikaKristu ziphuphumela kuthi, ngokunjalo ithi nentuthuzelo yethu iphuphume ngoKristu."
2Corinthians1:6 Ukuba ke siyabandezelwa, oko kungenxa yentuthuzelo yenu nosindiso lona olusebenzayo, ukuze ninyamezele kwaezo ntlungu sizivayo nathi;"
2Corinthians1:7 Kanjalo ithemba lethu ngani liqinisekile; sisazi ukuba, njengokuba ningamadlelane nathi ngazo iintlungu, ngokunjalo niyakuba ngawo nangentuthuzelo."
2Corinthians1:8 Kuba asithandi, bazalwana, ukuba ningayazi, imbandezelo yethu eyasihlelayo kwelaseAsiya: ukuba saxineka ngokuncamisileyo ngokomelela, ngokokude sibuncame kanye nobomi."
2Corinthians1:9 Ke kaloku besinesigwebo sokufa ngokwethu, ukuze singakholosi ngokwethu, sithembele kuThixo ovusa abafileyo;"
2Corinthians1:10 owasihlangulayo ekufeni okungaka, ohlangulayo; esithembele ngaye ukuba usaya kusihlangula;"
2Corinthians1:11 Nani nincedisana nani ngokusikhungela, ukuze isipho esingokubabalwa, esenzelwe sona thina ngabantu abaninzi, sibulelwe ngabaninzi ngenxa yethu."
2Corinthians1:12 Kuba oko kuqhayisa kwethu kukungqina kwesazela sethu, ukuba sithe ehlabathini apha, ngokukodwa ke kuni, sahlala singabangenakumbi, sinokungcwengeka okuvela kuThixo, singenabulumko bubobenyama, sinobabalo lukaThixo."
2Corinthians1:13 Kuba asinibhaleli zimbi izinto, ikwazezo nizilesayo, nizaziyo kakuhle; Ndiyathemba ke ukuba niya kuvuma kude kuse ekupheleni;"
2Corinthians1:14 njengokuba nasaziyo kakuhle ngokuyinxenye, ukuba siliqhayiya lenu, kwanjengokuba nani nilelethu ngemini yeNkosi uYesu."
2Corinthians1:15 Ke kaloku ndinaloo nkoloseko ke, ndanqwenela ukunga ndingeza kuni kuqala, ukuze nibabalwe okwesibini;"
2Corinthians1:16 ndize ndicande kuni ukuya kwelaseMakedoni, ndibuye, ndivela kwelaseMakedoni, ndize kuni, ndiphelekelelwe nini ukuya kwelakwaYuda."
2Corinthians1:17 Xa ngoko ndandifuna oko, ndandifeketha na kanti? Okanye izinto endizicebayo, ndiziceba ngokwenyama yini na ukuze nje kubekho kum nje, ukuba ube nguewe, ewe; nohayi, hayi?"
2Corinthians1:18 Ethembekile nje ke uThixo, ilizwi lethu kuni alibanga nguewe nohayi."
2Corinthians1:19 Kuba yena okaThixo uNyana, uYesu Kristu, owavakaliswayo phakathi kwenu sithi (ndim ke noSilvano noTimoti), akabanga nguewe nohayi; kuye nguewe kwakanye."
2Corinthians1:20 Kuye onke amadinga kaThixo anguewe, ukuye uAmen, ukuze kuzukiswe uThixo ngathi."
2Corinthians1:21 Osiqiniselayo ke ndawonye nani kuKristu, osithambisayo ke, nguThixo;"
2Corinthians1:22 ositywine wasiqinisa, wasinika isinyaniso soMoya, saba sezintliziyweni zethu."
2Corinthians1:23 Ke mna ndibiza uThixo, ukuba abe lingqina emphefumlweni wam, ukuba kungokunivela, endithe ndaba andikezi eKorinte."
2Corinthians1:24 Anditsho ngakulugagamela ukholo lwenu; nditsho ngokuba singabasebenza nani uvuyo lwenu; kuba nimi ngokholo.
2Corinthians2:1 Mna ke okwam, ndagqiba kweli lokuba ndingabuyi ndize kuni ndibuhlungu."
2Corinthians2:2 Kuba mna ukuba ndinenza buhlungu, kusekho bani na ke ondenza ndibe nemihlali, ongenguye lowo wenziwe wabuhlungu kwandim?"
2Corinthians2:3 Ndanibhalela ke oku, ukuze ndakufika ndingabi buhlungu ngabo bendimelwe kukuvuya ngabo; ndikholose ngani nonke, ukuba uvuyo lwam ikwalolwenu nonke."
2Corinthians2:4 Kuba ndanibhalela ekubandezelekeni nasekuxinezelekeni okukhulu kwentliziyo yam, ndineenyembezi ezininzi; ndingenzeli ukuze nenziwe buhlungu, ndisenzela ukuze nilwazi uthando endinithanda ngalo ngokugqithiseleyo."
2Corinthians2:5 Ke ukuba ubani wenze kwabuhlungu, akenze kwabuhlungu mna, wenze ngenxenye nina nonke;"
2Corinthians2:6 Kumanele lowo unjalo oko kumkhalimela kwabaninzi;
2Corinthians2:7 Ngoko ke senithi kanye senimxolela, nimthuthuzele, hleze lowo unjalo aselesuka edliwa kukuba buhlungu ngokugqithiseleyo."
2Corinthians2:8 Kungoko ndiyaniyala ukuba niluqinisekise uthando lwenu kuye.
2Corinthians2:9 Kuba ndabhalela kona oku, ukuze ndikwazi ukucikideka kwenu, ukuba ningábevayo na ezintweni zonke."
2Corinthians2:10 Enimxolelayo ke into, ndiyamxolela nam;"
2Corinthians2:11 hleze asidleke uSathana, kuba amaqhinga akhe siyawazi."
2Corinthians2:12 Ke kaloku, ndakuba ndifikile eTrowa, ndishumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zikaKristu, ndakuba ndivulelwe nomnyango weNkosi;"
2Corinthians2:13 Andibanga nakonwaba emoyeni wam, ngokungamfumani uTito, umzalwana wam; ndesuka ndababulisa, ndemka ndaya kwelaseMakedoni."
2Corinthians2:14 Makubulelwe ke kuThixo, ohlala esiphuphuma uqhayiso ngoKristu, elibonakalalisa ngathi ivumba lokwaziwa kwakhe ezindaweni zonke."
2Corinthians2:15 Kuba kuye uThixo silivumba elimnandi likaKristu, phakathi kwabasindiswayo naphakathi kwabatshabalalayo."
2Corinthians2:16 Kwabanye silivumba lokufa elisa ekufeni; kwabanye ilivumba lobomi elisa ebomini. Ngubani na ke ozilingeneyo ezo zinto?
2Corinthians2:17 Kaloku asithi, njengabaninzi abo, silingxengelele ilizwi likaThixo; sisuka ngokwabokungcwengeka, sisuka ngokwabakwaThixo, sithethe phambi kwamehlo kaThixo, sikuKristu."
2Corinthians3:1 Xa sitshoyo, singaba siyawaqala siziyaleze na? Okanye sifuna, njengabathile, kusini na, iincwadi zokuyalezwa kuni, nokuba zezokuyalezwa nini?"
2Corinthians3:2 Incwadi yethu thina, ebhalwe ezintliziyweni zethu, nini; iyaziwa, ileswa ngabantu bonke;"
2Corinthians3:3 Nibonakalalisiwe nje ukuba niyincwadi kaKristu, eyalungiselelwa sithi, engabhalwanga ngainki, ebhalwe ngoMoya kaThixo ophilileyo; kungekhona kumacwecwe amatye, kusemacwecweni angawenyama entliziyo."
2Corinthians3:4 Sinenkoloseko enjalo ke kuThixo ngaye uKristu.
2Corinthians3:5 Kungekuko ukuba silingene ngokwethu ukucamanga nto engathi iphuma kuthi ngokwethu; ukukulingana kwethu oko kuphuma kuThixo;
2Corinthians3:6 osenze nokusenza sakulingana ukuba ngabalungiseleli bomnqophiso omtsha; asingowombhalo lo, singawomoya; kuba ubhalo luyabulala, umoya ke udlisa ubomi."
2Corinthians3:7 Ke ukuba ulungiselelo lokufa, lukrolwe ematyeni ngokrolo, lwaba nobuqaqawuli, ngokokude oonyana bakaSirayeli bangabi nakuqwalasela ebusweni bukaMoses, ngenxa yobuqaqawuli bobuso bakhe; uzuko olo lwaluza kubhangiswa."
2Corinthians3:8 Luthini na ulungiselelo lwakhe uMoya, ukungabi nobuqaqawuli ngokugqithiseleyo?"
2Corinthians3:9 Kuba, ukuba ulungiselelo olugwebayo lunobuqaqawuli, kokukhona luya kugqithisela ngobuqaqawuli ulungiselelo lobulungisa."
2Corinthians3:10 Kaloku kwanoko kwenziwe kwaba nobuqaqawuli, akwenziwanga kwaba nobuqaqawuli ngale ndawo, ngenxa ke yobuqaqawuli obu bona bubalaselayo."
2Corinthians3:11 Kuba xa oko bekuza kubhanga kunobuqaqawuli, kokukhona oku kuhleliyo kunobuqaqawuli."
2Corinthians3:12 Sinethemba elinjalo nje ke ngoko, kokukhona singafihlisiyo ukuthetha;"
2Corinthians3:13 singabi njengoMoses, wabeka isigqubuthelo ebusweni bakhe, ukuze oonyana bakaSirayeli bangaqwalaseli esiphelweni soko bekuza kubhanga."
2Corinthians3:14 Zesuka noko zaqaqadekiswa iingqiqo zabo, kuba nanamhla sisahleli kwaeso sigqubuthelo ekulesweni kwawo umnqophiso omdala, singabhenqwanga, isigqubuthelo eso sibhangiswa kuKristu."
2Corinthians3:15 Kude kube namhla, xa kufundwa uMoses, kusuke kubekho isigqubuthelo entliziyweni yabo."
2Corinthians3:16 Ke xenikweni ithe ke yona yabuyela eNkosini sosuswa kuphele isigqubuthelo eso.
2Corinthians3:17 iNkosi ke inguye uMoya; apho ke akhoyo uMoya weNkosi, kubakho inkululeko."
2Corinthians3:18 Ke thina sonke, sinobuso nje obubhenqwe isigqubuthelo, sibukhangela njengokwasesipilini ubuqaqawuli beNkosi, senziwa similise okwaloo mfanekiselo, sivela ebuqaqawulini sisinge ebuqaqawulini, kwanjengokuvela eNkosini enguMoya."
2Corinthians4:1 Ngoko ke, sinalo nje olu lungiselelo, sithi, njengoko senzelwe inceba, singethi mandla;"
2Corinthians4:2 sisuke sazilahla izinto ezifihlakeleyo eziziintloni, singahambi ngobuqhetseba, singalikhohlakalisi ilizwi likaThixo; sisuka ngokuyibonakalalisa inyaniso siziyaleze kuso sonke isazela sabantu emehlweni kaThixo."
2Corinthians4:3 Kodwa ke ukuba iindaba ezimnandi esizishumayelayo azicacanga, koba zifihlakele kwabatshabalalayo."
2Corinthians4:4 Athi kubo uthixo weli phakade wazimfamekisa ngaphakathi kwabo iingqiqo zabangakholwayo, ukuze singabengezeli kubo isikhanyiso seendaba ezilungileyo zobuqaqawuli bukaKristu, ongumfanekiselo kaThixo."
2Corinthians4:5 Kaloku asizishumayeli thina, sivakalisa uKrestu Yesu ukuba uyiNkosi; sibe ke thina singabakhonzi benu ngenxa kaYesu."
2Corinthians4:6 Ngokuba nguThixo, yena wathi ukhanyiso malukhanye ebumnyameni, okhanyisele iintliziyo zethu, ukuze kukhanye ukwaziwa kobuqaqawuli bukaThixo ebusweni bukaYesu Kristu."
2Corinthians4:7 Ke kaloku obu butyebi sibuphethe ngezitya zodongwe, ukuze incamisa yamandla ibe yekaThixo, ingaphumi kuthi."
2Corinthians4:8 Siyabandezelwa ngeenxa zonke, singaxineki; siyathingaza, kodwa asincami;"
2Corinthians4:9 siyatshutshiswa, kodwa asishiywa; sikhahlelwa phantsi, asitshatyalaliswa;"
2Corinthians4:10 sihlala sikuthwele ngomzimba ukufa kweNkosi uYesu ukuze nobomi bukaYesu bubonakalaliselwe emizimbeni yethu.
2Corinthians4:11 Kuba thina badla ubomi simana sinikelwa ekufeni ngenxa kaYesu, ukuze nobomi bukaYesu bubonakalaliselwe enyameni yethu enokufa."
2Corinthians4:12 Ngoko ke kusebenza ukufa kuthi, ke kuni kusebenza ubomi."
2Corinthians4:13 Sinawo nje ke kwaloo moya wokholo, ngokoko kubhaliweyo kwathiwa, Ndakholwa, kungoko ndathethayo; nathi ke siyakholwa, kungoko sithethayo nokuthetha;"
2Corinthians4:14 sisazi ukuba lowo wayivusayo iNkosi uYesu, uya kusivusa nathi ngoYesu, asimise phambi kwakhe, ndawonye nani."
2Corinthians4:15 Kuba konke oko kungenxa yenu, ukuze luthi ubabalo, lwakuba lwandile ngabona baninzi, luwuphuphumise umbulelo, use ekuzukiseni uThixo."
2Corinthians4:16 Kungoko singethi mandla; kuba nokuba umntu wethu wangaphandle uya esonakala, usuka yena owangaphakathi aye ehlaziyeka imihla ngemihla."
2Corinthians4:17 Kaloku imbandezelo yethu, eyeyomzuzwana, isisebenzela ubunzima obuncamisileyo, obuncamisileyo."
2Corinthians4:18 Kaloku thina asixuneli ezintweni ezibonwayo, sixunela kwezingabonwayo; kuba ezibonwayo zezexeshana; ke zona ezingabonwayo zezonaphakade."
2Corinthians5:1 Siyazi ke ukuba xa ithe yachithwa indlu yethu esemhlabeni, engulo mnquba, sinesakhiwo esiphuma kuThixo, yona emazulwini, yona engenakwenziwa ngazandla, engunaphakade."
2Corinthians5:2 Kuba kulo siyancwina, silangazelela ukwambatha, saleke indlu yethu yasemazulwini;"
2Corinthians5:3 ukuba siya kufunyanwa sambethe okunene, singeze."
2Corinthians5:4 Kuba kwathina aba bakulo mnquba siyancwina sisindwa, kungengakuba sithanda ukuhlutywa;"
2Corinthians5:5 Ke kaloku lo usisebenzele kwaloo nto nguThixo, osinike nokusinika isinyaniso sakhe uMoya."
2Corinthians5:6 Ngoko ke sihlala somelele, sisazi ukuba, sikowethu nje emzimbeni, sikude kowethu eNkosini."
2Corinthians5:7 (Kuba sihamba ngokholo, asihambi ngokubona;)"
2Corinthians5:8 Singaxhalaba, ndithi ke, síthanda kanye ukuba kude nenyama yethu, siye kuhlala neNkosi."
2Corinthians5:9 Kungoko sizondelela ukuthi, nokuba sisekhaya, nokuba sikude nekhaya, sibe ngabakholekileyo kuyo."
2Corinthians5:10 Kuba sonke simele sibonakale phambi kwesihlalo sokugweba sikaKristu; ukuze elowo azuziswe okwenziwe ngomzimba, ngoko akwenzileyo, nokuba kokulungileyo, nokuba kokubi."
2Corinthians5:11 Sikwazi njalo ke ukoyikeka kweNkosi, sizamela ukuba beyiseke abantu; sibonakalalisiwe ke kuThixo; ndiyathemba ke ukuba nakuzo izazela zenu sibonakalalisiwe."
2Corinthians5:12 Kuba asibuyi siziyaleze kuni;
2Corinthians5:13 Kuba, nokuba siyageza, kungenxa kaThixo; nokuba sinengqondo ephilileyo, kungenxa yenu."
2Corinthians5:14 Kaloku uthando lukaKristu lusifingile nje; Kuba sigqiba kwelithi, omnye ufele bonke emnye, ngoko bafile bonke abo;"
2Corinthians5:15 wabafela ke bonke, ukuze abo badla ubomi bangabi sazidlela ubomi, babudlele owafayo wavuka ngenxa yabo."
2Corinthians5:16 Ngoko ke thina sisusela kweli xesha, asisazi namnye ngokwenyama; nokuba ke besimazi uKristu ngokwenyama, kungoku asisamazi ngokwenyama."
2Corinthians5:17 Ngoko ke, ukuba ubani ukuKristu, usisidalwa esitsha; izinto ezindala zidlule; yabonani, zisuke zaba ntsha izinto zonke."
2Corinthians5:18 Zonke izinto ke ziphuma kuThixo, owasixolelanisa naye ngokwakhe ngoYesu Kristu, wasinika ulungiselelo loxolelaniso;"
2Corinthians5:19 Oko ke, uThixo waye ekuKristu, elixolelanisa naye ngokwakhe ihlabathi, engazibaleli kubo iziphoso zabo; yaye uphathise kuthi ilizwi loxolelaniso."
2Corinthians5:20 Sizizigidimi ke ngoko ngenxa kaKristu, ngokungathi uThixo uniyala ngathi; siyanikhunga ngenxa kaKristu, manixolelaniswe naye uThixo;"
2Corinthians5:21 kuba lowo ungazani nasono, wamenza isono ngenxa yethu; ukuze thina sibe bubulungisa bukaThixo kuye."
2Corinthians6:1 Sisebenzisana naye nje ke, siyaniyala, ukuba ubabalo lukaThixo ningafumane nilwamkele;"
2Corinthians6:2 Kuba uthi, Ndakuva ngexesha elamkelekileyo, ndakusiza ngomhla wosindiso; yabonani, lingoku ixesha elamkeleke kakuhle; yabonani, ungoku umhla wosindiso:"
2Corinthians6:3 singabakhubekisi nanye into, ukuze ubulungiseleli bungabi nakubekwa bala;"
2Corinthians6:4 sithi ke, ezintweni zonke sibonakalalisa njengabalungiseleli bakaThixo, sinokuzeka kade umsindo, sibandezelekile, sisezingxalweni, sibandezelekile;"
2Corinthians6:5 Ngokuba ngemivumbo, ngokuba sezintolongweni, nasezidubedukeni, ngokubulaleka, ekuphandeni, ngokuzila ukudla;"
2Corinthians6:6 ngobunyulu, ngolwazi, ukuzeka kade umsindo, ngobubele, ngoMoya oyiNgcwele, naseluthandweni olungenaluhanahaniso,"
2Corinthians6:7 Ngelizwi lenyaniso, ngamandla kaThixo, ngesikrweqe sobulungisa ngasekunene nangasekhohlo;"
2Corinthians6:8 sikuzuko nakwintswela-mbeko, sikudumo olubi nakudumo oluhle; njengabakhohlisi, ukanti siyinyaniso;"
2Corinthians6:9 ngathi singabangaziwayo, ukanti saziwa kakuhle; ngathi singabafileyo, nanku sidla ubomi; singabohlwaywa, singabulawa;"
2Corinthians6:10 ngathi sibuhlungu, ukanti sihlala sivuya; ngathi singamahlwempu, ukanti singabatyebisa abaninzi; ngokungathi singenanto, ukanti sinezinto zonke."
2Corinthians6:11 Umlomo wethu uvulekile kuni, baseKorinte; intliziyo yethu yenziwe yabanzi."
2Corinthians6:12 Anibandezanga nto kuthi, nibandezelekile ezibilini zenu."
2Corinthians6:13 Umbuyekezo ke lowo (ndithetha njengakubantwana bam), ndithi yibani banzi nani."
2Corinthians6:14 Musani ukunxulumana nabolunye uhlobo, abangakholwayo ke; kuba kunakwabelana kuni na ubulungisa nokuchasa umthetho? Kunabudlelane buni na ke ukukhanya nobumnyama?"
2Corinthians6:15 Unakuvumelana kuni na ke uKristu noBheliyali? Unasabelo sini na ke okholwayo kunye nongakholwayo?
2Corinthians6:16 Inakudibana kuni na ke itempile kaThixo nezithixo? Kuba nina niyitempile kaThixo ophilileyo; njengokuba watshoyo uThixo ukuthi, Ndiya kuhlala phakathi kwabo, ndihambe phakathi kwabo; ndibe nguThixo wabo, bona babe ngabantu bam."
2Corinthians6:17 Kungoko ndithi, Phumani phakathi kwabo, nizahlule, itsho iNkosi, nento engcolileyo ningayichukumisi; kwaye ndiya kunamkela;"
2Corinthians6:18 Ndiya kuba nguyihlo, nina nibe ngoonyana neentombi kum; itsho iNkosi uSomandla."
2Corinthians7:1 Sinawo nje ngoko la madinga, zintanda, masizihlambulule kuko konke ukudyobheka kwenyama nokomoya sibufeza ubungcwele, sisoyika uThixo."
2Corinthians7:2 Samkeleni; asonanga mntu, asonakalisanga mntu, asonakalisanga mntu."
2Corinthians7:3 Anditsho ngakunigweba; kuba sendithe ngaphambili, nisezintliziyweni zethu ukuba sife nani, sidle ubomi nani."
2Corinthians7:4 Ndinokungafihlisi okukhulu kuni, ukuzingca kwam ngani; ndizele yintuthuzelo, ndinovuyo olugqithileyo kuyo yonke imbandezelo yethu."
2Corinthians7:5 Kuba sithe sakufika kwelaseMakedoni, ayaba nakuphumla nakanye inyama yethu; sabandezelwa ngeenxa zonke; ngaphandle ikukulwa, ngaphakathi kukoyika."
2Corinthians7:6 Kodwa ke uThixo, obathuthuzelayo abathobekileyo, wasithuthuzela ngokufika kukaTito;"
2Corinthians7:7 akwaba ngakufika kwakhe ke kuphela, kwaba ngayo intuthuzelo awathuthuzeleka ngayo kuni, esityela ulangazelelo lwenu, isijwili senu, nokuzohlwaya kwenu ngam; kangangokuba ndaba nemihlali ngakumbi."
2Corinthians7:8 Kuba nakuba ndikhe ndanenza buhlungu ngencwadi leyo, andizohlwayi, nakuba ndikhe ndazohlwaya;"
2Corinthians7:9 Ngoku ke ndiyavuya, ndingavuyeli kuba neenziwa buhlungu, ndivuyela ukuba nenziwa buhlungu ngokwasinga enguqukweni;"
2Corinthians7:10 Kaloku ukuba buhlungu ngokukaThixo kusebenza inguquko esingisa elusindisweni, ekungekho kuzohlwaya ngayo; ke kona okwehlabathi ukuba buhlungu kusebenza ukufa."
2Corinthians7:11 Kuba, yabonani kwaezo zinto, ukuba nenziwa buhlungu ngokokukaThixo, kwathi ukunyameka okungako kuni, kwanenzondelelo kuni; yimpindezelo enjani! Ezintweni zonke niziqondakalisile, ukuba nimsulwa kulo mcimbi."
2Corinthians7:12 Ngoko ke, noko ndanibhalelayo, andikwenzanga oko ngenxa yalowo wamonayo omnye, kanjalo andikwenzanga ngenxa yalowo woniwayo; ndakwenzela ukuze kubonakalaliswe kuni ukuninyamekela kwethu emehlweni kaThixo."
2Corinthians7:13 Ngoko ke, sithuthuzelekile ngenxa yokuthuthuzeleka kwenu; saza savuya kakhulu ngakumbi ngokuvuya kukaTito; ngokuba waphunyuzwayo umoya wakhe nini nonke."
2Corinthians7:14 Ngokuba ukuqhayisa endaqhayisa ngako ngani, andidaniswanga ngako; njengokuba sazithetha kuni izinto zonke sinyanisile, ngokunjalo nokuqhayisa kwethu oko phambi koTito kwaba yinyaniso."
2Corinthians7:15 Imfesane yakhe isenkulu ngakuni ngokugqithiseleyo, akukhumbula ukumva kwenu nonke nokokuba namamkelayo ninokoyika nokugubha."
2Corinthians7:16 Ndiyavuya ngoko, kuba ndomelezekile kuni ezintweni zonke."
2Corinthians8:1 Ke kaloku, bazalwana, siyanazisa ubabalo lukaThixo oluhlakaziweyo phakathi kwamabandla akwelaseMakedoni;"
2Corinthians8:2 okokuba ekucikidweni kwawo okukhulu yimbandezelo, kuthe ukuphuphuma kovuyo lwawo, nobuhlwempu bawo obendeleyo, kwaphuphumela ekutyebiseni ukunyanisa kwawo."
2Corinthians8:3 Kuba ndiyangqina, ewe, nangaphezu kwamandla abo, bazinikela ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo;"
2Corinthians8:4 besikhunga kakhulu, besikhunga, ukuba silwamkele ubabalo olo, nobudlelane ke obo bokulungiselela abangcwele."
2Corinthians8:5 Abakwenza njengoko sathemba ngako, basuka bazinikela eNkosini, nakuthi, ngokuthanda kukaThixo;"
2Corinthians8:6 ngokokude simyale uTito, ukuba athi, njengokuba ebeqalile, alufezele kuni ngokunjalo nolo lubabalo."
2Corinthians8:7 Ke, kwanjengokuba niphuphuma iinto zonke, ukholo, nokuthetha, nokwazi, nokunyameka konke, nokusithanda kwenu, maniphuphume nakulo olu lubabalo."
2Corinthians8:8 Anditsho ngakwammiselo; ukutsho, ndenziwa kukunyameka kwabanye, ndicikida nenyaniso yolwenu uthando;"
2Corinthians8:9 Kuba niyalwazi ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, okokuba yathi, ibisisityebi nje, yaba lihlwempu ngenxa yenu, ukuze nina nibe zizityebi ngobuhlwempu bayo obo."
2Corinthians8:10 Ngale ndawo ke ndinipha okwam ukubona; kuba oko kunilungele nina aba nayiqalayo kwanyakenye le nto; ananela kuyenza, nayithanda nokuyithanda."
2Corinthians8:11 Ngoko ke yifezekiseni le nto; ukuze, kwanjengokuba bekukho intumekelelo yokuthanda, kwangokunjalo kubekho nokuyifeza ngeninako."
2Corinthians8:12 Kuba intumekelelo, ukuba selikho, yamkeleka kakuhle ngokoko asukuba enako umntu, kungabi ngokoko angenako."
2Corinthians8:13 Kuba andithi mabaphumle abanye abantu, nibandezeleke nina;"
2Corinthians8:14 ukuze kubekho ukulingana ngexesha lakalokunje, ukuphuphuma kwenu makufikelele ekusileleni kwabo, ukuze nokuphuphuma kwabo kufikelele ekusileleni kwenu;"
2Corinthians8:15 njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Lowo wabutha kakhulu akabanga nakusalelayo; nowayebutha kancinane akabanga nakusilela."
2Corinthians8:16 Makubulelwe ke kuThixo, ongenise kwaoko kuninyamekela entliziyweni kaTito."
2Corinthians8:17 Ngokuba wasamkela okunene isiyalo; ke uthe, enyamekile, uthe ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo, waya kuni."
2Corinthians8:18 Sathuma ke kunye naye umzalwana odume phakathi kwawo onke amabandla, ngokuvakalisa iindaba ezilungileyo."
2Corinthians8:19 Asiyikuphela ke loo nto; wanyulwa nokunyulwa ngawo amabandla, ukuba abe ngohamba nathi ngolu lubabalo silulungiselelweyo sithi, ekuzukiseni kwayo iNkosi, nasekubonakalaliseni nina ngokwentumekelelo yenu;"
2Corinthians8:20 silumkele oku, ukuze kungabikho bani usigxekayo kobu bu butyebi bulungiselelwa sithi;"
2Corinthians8:21 Silungiselela izinto ezilungileyo, kungekuphela nje emehlweni eNkosi, kodwa nasemehlweni abantu."
2Corinthians8:22 Sithume ke kunye nabo umzalwana wethu, esimcikide futhi ngeendawo ezininzi, samfumana ekhuthele;"
2Corinthians8:23 Nokuba kuthethwa ntoni ngoTito, yazini ukuba ulidlelane nam, nomsebenzisi wam kuni; nokuba kuthethwa ngabazalwana bethu, yazini ukuba bangabathunywa bamabandla kaThixo, baluzuko lukaKristu."
2Corinthians8:24 Lo mbonakalaliso ngoko wothando lwenu, nowokuzingca kwethu ngani, wubonakalaliseni kubo, naphambi kwamabandla."
2Corinthians9:1 Kuba okunene ngako ukulungiselela abangcwele, okunene akufuneki ukuba ndinibhalele;"
2Corinthians9:2 Kuba ndiyakwazi ukuthumekelela kwenu, endiqhayisa ngako ngani kwabelaseMakedoni, ndisithi elaseAkaya beliselilunge kwanyakenye; nokuzondelela kwenu kwaxhokonxa abaninzi."
2Corinthians9:3 Ke kaloku ndithume abazalwana, ukuze iqhayiya lethu ngani lingalanjathiswa ngale ndawo; ukuze nithi, njengokuba benditshilo, nibe senilungile;"
2Corinthians9:4 hleze kuthi, ukuba bathe bafika nam abelaseMakedoni, banifumana ningekalungi, sidaniswe thina (ukuba asingethi, kudane nina) koko kukholosa kokuqhayisa."
2Corinthians9:5 Ngoko ke ndibe kuyafuneka ukubavuselela abazalwana, ukuba baqale beze kuni, bayilungise ngaphambili isisa senu, enisixelelwe ngenxa engaphambili, ukuze sibe silungile, sibe sinjengesibabalo, singabi sesokubawa."
2Corinthians9:6 Nditsho ke ukuthi, Lowo uhlwayela ngokuvimba wovuna kwangokuvimba; nalowo uhlwayela ngesisa wovuna kwangesisa."
2Corinthians9:7 Elowo makanike njengoko agqibe ngako entliziyweni; kungabi ngokuphuma kabuhlungu, nangokunyanzelwa; kuba uThixo uthanda umphi ochwayithileyo."
2Corinthians9:8 Unako ke uThixo ukuphuphumisela kuni ubabalo lonke; ukuze nithi, nihlala ninako nje ukwanela konke ngeendawo zonke, niphuphumele emsebenzini wonke olungileyo;"
2Corinthians9:9 njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Wasasaza, wapha abasweleyo, ubulungisa bakhe buhlala buhleli."
2Corinthians9:10 Lowo unika imbewu umhlwayeli wokulungiselela isonka sokudla kwenu, aphinde ayandise imbewu yenu, andise isiqhamo sobulungisa benu;"
2Corinthians9:11 nithi ngeendawo zonke nityetyiselwe ekunyaniseni konke, kona kusebenzayo ngathi umbulelo kuThixo."
2Corinthians9:12 Ngokuba ulungiselelo lwalo mbuso alwaneli kuzalisela iintsilelo zabangcwele; lusuka kananjalo luphuphume imibulelo emininzi kuye uThixo;
2Corinthians9:13 besithi nje, ngako ukucikideka kolo lulungiselelo, bamzukise uThixo ngenxa yokulululamela kwenu uvumo lwenu kwiindaba ezilungileyo zikaKristu, nangenxa yokunyanisa kokudlelana kwenu ngokusingisele kubo nakubantu bonke;"
2Corinthians9:14 Ngoku ke benikhungela ngenxa yenu, benilangazelela ngenxa yobabalo lukaThixo oluncamisileyo kuni aba."
2Corinthians9:15 Makubulelwe ke kuThixo ngenxa yesipho sakhe esingathethekiyo.
2Corinthians10:1 Ke kaloku, ndiyaniyala ngabo ubulali nokuthantamisa kukaKristu, mna Pawulos ngokwam, ndingothobekileyo kambe phakathi kwenu, ndakuba ndingekho ndiba nobuganga ngakuni;"
2Corinthians10:2 Ndiyakhunga ke, ukuze ndingathi, ndakuba ndikho, ndibe nobugagu ngoko kukholosa, ndiba ndoba nobuganga ngako kubo abathile, ababa sihamba ngokwenyama;"
2Corinthians10:3 Kuba noko sihamba sisenyameni, asiphumi mkhosi ngokwenyama;"
2Corinthians10:4 (Kuba izixhobo zethu zemfazwe ayizizo ezenyama, kodwa ngaye uThixo zinamandla okuwisa iinqaba;)"
2Corinthians10:5 siwisa ngazo nje amabhongo, nayo yonke into ephakamileyo, eziphakamisayo ngokuchasa ukwazi uThixo; iingqiqo zonke sizithimbela ekumlulameleni uKristu;"
2Corinthians10:6 sikulungele ukuphindezela konke ukungathobeli, kwakufika ukululama kwenu."
2Corinthians10:7 Izinto nizikhangela ngokwembonakalo yangaphandle na? Ukuba umntu ukholose ngokuthi ungokaKristu, makabuye acinge oku ngokwakhe, ukuba njengokuba engokaKristu yena, ngokunjalo singabakaKristu thina."
2Corinthians10:8 Kuba, naxa bendingathi ndigqithisele ukuqhayisa ngalo igunya lethu, esalinikwayo yiNkosi ukuba sinakhe, singanichithi, bendingedaniyo;"
2Corinthians10:9 ukuze ndingangi ndifuna ukunoyikisa ngazo iincwadi ezi;
2Corinthians10:10 Kuba kuthiwa, iincwadi zakhe zinzima, zinamandla; kodwa ubukho bakhe ngenyama bubuthathaka, nokuthetha kwakhe akunto yanto."
2Corinthians10:11 Onjalo ke makacinge le nto: njengoko sithetha ngako ngeencwadi, sakuba singekho, sikwanjalo ngawo umsebenzi, sakuba sikho."
2Corinthians10:12 Kuba asinabuganga bakuzibalela nakuzifanisa nabo abathile abaziyalezayo;
2Corinthians10:13 Ke thina asisayi kuqhayisa sigqithise emlinganiselweni; soqhayisa ngokomlingani selo womda esiwabelwe nguThixo, ukuba ube ngumlinganiselo oya kufikelela nakuni."
2Corinthians10:14 Kuba asizoluli ngokugqithiseleyo, ngathi asifikanga kuni;"
2Corinthians10:15 Singaqhayisi sigqithise emlinganiselweni ngokubulaleka kwethu abanye; ke sinethemba, lwakukhula ukholo lwenu, siya kwenziwa bakhulu phakathi kwenu ngokomda wethu, ngokugqithiseleyo;"
2Corinthians10:16 side sizishumayele iindaba ezilungileyo ezindaweni ezingaphaya kwenu; singaqhayisi ngesilinganiselo somnye, ngezinto ke esezilungisiwe."
2Corinthians10:17 Oqhayisayo ke makaqhayise ngeNkosi.
2Corinthians10:18 Kaloku oyena ucikidekileyo asingoziyalezayo, ngoyalezwa yiNkosi."
2Corinthians11:1 Akwaba ningandi nyamezela kancinane ekusweleni kuqonda kwam!
2Corinthians11:2 Kuba ndiyanikhweletela ngekhwele likaThixo; kuba ndanendisa ndodeni-nye, ukuze ndinimise phambi koKristu niyintombi enyulu."
2Corinthians11:3 Ndiyoyika ke, hleze kuthi, njengokuba inyoka yamlukuhlayo uEva ngobuqhetseba bayo, zonakaliswe ngokunjalo nani iingqiqo zenu, zimke ekunyaniseni kuye uKristu."
2Corinthians11:4 Kuba kaloku, xa lowo uzayo avakalisa omnye uYesu, esingamvakalisanga thina, nokuba namkela moya wumbi enaningamkelanga wona, nokuba ziindaba ezilungileyo ezizimbi enaningamkelanga zona, beningaba kambe niyatyapha ukumnyamezela."
2Corinthians11:5 Kuba ndiba andisilele nganto kwabona bapostile baziincamisa.
2Corinthians11:6 Nakuba ke ndiliyilo ngentetho, andinjalo ngokwazi; sabonakalaliswa kuni ngeendawo zonke."
2Corinthians11:7 Ndenza isono na ngokuzithoba, ukuze niphakanyiswe nina, ngokuba ndanishumayezayo ngesisa iindaba ezilungileyo zikaThixo?"
2Corinthians11:8 Amanye amabandla kaThixo ndawabhunyula, ndisamkela umvuzo ukuze ndilungiselele nina."
2Corinthians11:9 Kanjalo xa ndandikho kuni ndiswele, andibanga mthwalo mntwini; kuba ukuswela kwam bakwenzelela abazalwana, ababevela kwelaseMakedoni; Ndiyazigcina."
2Corinthians11:10 Ikum nje inyaniso kaKristu, ndithi olo luqhayiso aluyi kuvingcwa mlomo mayela nam, mna, kwimimandla yelaseAkaya."
2Corinthians11:11 Ngani na? ngokuba ndinganithandi na? uThixo uyazi.
2Corinthians11:12 Endikwenzayo ke ndiya kukwenza, ukuze ndibahluthe ithuba lokujinda abafuna ithuba; ukuze entweni abaqhayisela ngayo, bafunyanwe bekwanjengathi."
2Corinthians11:13 Kuba abanjalo ngabapostile ababuxoki, ngabasebenzi abakhohlisayo, bezimilisa okwabapostile bakaKristu."
2Corinthians11:14 Ke akummangaliso oko; kuba noSathana ngokwakhe uzimilisa okwesithunywa sokukhanya.
2Corinthians11:15 Ngoko ke akunto inkulu ukuba nabalungiseleli bakhe bazimilise okwabalungiseleli bobulungisa; abasiphelo siya kuba ngokwemisebenzi yabo.
2Corinthians11:16 Ndibuya ndithi, Makungabikho mntu uba ndingoswele ukuqonda; okanye ke kambe, ndamkeleni njengoswele ukuqonda, ukuze ke ndiqhayise kancinane nam."
2Corinthians11:17 Oku ndikuthethayo, andikuthethi ngokweNkosi; ndikuthetha ngokoswele ukuqonda, ndinoko kukholosa koqhayiso."
2Corinthians11:18 Ekubeni bebaninzi ke abaqhayisa ngokwenyama, ndoqhayisa nam."
2Corinthians11:19 Kaloku niyabanyamezela ngovuyo abaswele ukuqonda, niziingqondi nje nina."
2Corinthians11:20 Kuba niyanyamezela, ukuba umntu unenza amakhoboka, ukuba umntu uyanidla, ukuba umntu uyanibambisa, ukuba umntu uyaziphakamisa, ukuba umntu uyanibetha ebusweni."
2Corinthians11:21 Ndithetha ngengcikivo, ngathi siswele amandla thina. Entweni ke asukuba umntu enobuganga (ndithetha ndinokuswela ukuqonda), ndinobuganga nam."
2Corinthians11:22 BangamaHebhere na? Ndinguye nam. BangamaSirayeli na? nam ndinjalo. Bayimbewu ka-Abraham na? nam kunjalo.
2Corinthians11:23 Bangabalungiseleli bakaKristu na? (Ndithetha njengesidenge) Ndingaphezulu; ngokubulaleka okugqithiseleyo, ngemivumbo egqithe emgceni, ngokuba sezintolongweni ngokugqithiseleyo, ngokuba sekufeni futhi."
2Corinthians11:24 KumaYuda ndafumana izihlandlo ezihlanu imivumbo emashumi mane, kwasala omnye."
2Corinthians11:25 Kukathathu ndibethwa ngeentswazi, okunye ndaxulutywa ngamatye, ndaphukelwa ngumkhombe kathathu, ndenze ubusuku nemini enzulwini;"
2Corinthians11:26 ngokuhamba okufuthi, ngeengozi zamanzi, ngeengozi zezihange, ngeengozi ngabakowethu, ngeengozi ngenxa yeentlanga, ngeengozi phakathi komzi, ngeengozi entlango, ngeengozi elwandle, ngeengozi phakathi kwabazalwana ababuxoki."
2Corinthians11:27 Ekubulalekeni nasekubulalekeni, ngokuphapha okufuthi, ngokulamba nokunxanwa, ngokuzila ukudla okufuthi, ngengqele nobuze."
2Corinthians11:28 Ndingasazibali zona izinto ezingaphandle kwezo, ndingungelwe imihla ngemihla kukuwaxhalela onke amabandla kaThixo."
2Corinthians11:29 Ngubani na okha aswele amandla, ndingasweli mandla nam? Ngubani na okha akhutyekiswe, ndingatshi?"
2Corinthians11:30 Ukuba ndimelwe kukuqhayisa, ndoqhayisa ngezinto zokuswela amandla kwam."
2Corinthians11:31 uThixo uYise weNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu, ongowokubongwa kude kube ngunaphakade, uyazi ukuba andixoki."
2Corinthians11:32 eDamasko irhuluneli ephantsi kokumkani uAreta yayiwugcina umzi waseDamasko, ifuna ukundibamba;"
2Corinthians11:33 Ndaza ngekroba ndathotywa ngomnyazi eludongeni, ndasinda ezandleni zakhe."
2Corinthians12:1 Ukuqhayisa okunene akundilungele; Ndiya kuza kwimibono nezityhilelo zeNkosi.
2Corinthians12:2 Ndazi umntu okuKristu, ekusekuyiminyaka elishumi elinamine (enoba ubesemzimbeni na andazi, nokuba ubengekho na emzimbeni, andazi; kwaziwa nguThixo), ethe lowo waxwilwa, wada wasiwa nakwelesithathu izulu."
2Corinthians12:3 Ndamazi ke umntu onjalo (nokuba ubesemzimbeni na, nokuba ubengekho na emzimbeni, andazi; kwaziwa nguThixo);"
2Corinthians12:4 okokuba waxwilwa wasiwa eParadisi, weva amazwi angenakuthethwa, ekungavumelekileyo ukuba umntu awathethe."
2Corinthians12:5 Onjalo ke ndiya kuqhayisa ngaye, kodwa andiyi kuqhayisa ngokwam nganto ikum; ingaba kungokuswela kwam amandla kodwa."
2Corinthians12:6 Kuba xa bendingathi ndithande ukuqhayisa, bendingayi kuba ndiswele ukuqonda, kuba bendiya kuba ndithetha inyaniso; kuba ndiya kuthetha inyaniso; kodwa ndiyayeka, ukuze kungabikho bani ucinga ngam ngaphezu koko abona ndikuko, athi mhlawumbi akuve kum."
2Corinthians12:7 Kwathi, ukuze ndingaziphakamisi ngokungaphezulu ngenxa yezityhilelo eziyincamisa, ndanikwa uviko enyameni, isithunywa sikaSathana, ukuze sindintlithe, ukuze ndingaziphakamisi ngokungaphezulu."
2Corinthians12:8 Ndayibongoza kathathu iNkosi ngaso isithunywa eso, ukuba sisuke kum."
2Corinthians12:9 Ithe yona kum, Ubabalo lwam lukwanele; kuba amandla am azalisekiswa ekuswelekeni kwamandla. Ngoko ke sendiya kuqhayisa kamnandi kakhulu ngokuswela kwam amandla, ukuze ahlale phezu kwam amandla kaKristu."
2Corinthians12:10 Kungoko ndikholisiweyo kukuswela amandla, kukuphathwa kakubi, ziingxakeko, ziintshutshiso, ziingxinano, ngenxa kaKristu; kuba xa ndibuthathaka, kuxa kanye ndinamandla."
2Corinthians12:11 Ndisuke ndaba sisidenge ngokuqhayisa; Nindinyanzelile nina; kuba mna ndibe ndifanele ukuyalezwa nini; kuba andisilelanga nganto kwabona bapostile baziincamisa, nakuba ndingento yanto."
2Corinthians12:12 Imiqondiso yokuba ngumpostile, inene, yasetyenzwa phakathi kwenu ngokunyamezela konke, ngemiqondiso, nezimanga, nemisebenzi yamandla."
2Corinthians12:13 Kaloku yintoni na enasilela ngayo kwamanye amabandla kaThixo, ingekukuba mna ngokwam ndingabanga mthwalo kuni? ndixoleleni ngobugwenxa bam."
2Corinthians12:14 Yabonani, sendilungele ukuza kuni okwesithathu; ndaye ndingayi kuba mthwalo kuni; kuba andifuni zinto zenu, ndifuna nina; kuba asingabantwana abafanele ukuqwebela abazali, ngabazali abafanele ukuqwebela abantwana."
2Corinthians12:15 Mna ke, kuya kuba mnandi kakhulu ukuba ndichithe, ndidleke kuphele, ngenxa yemiphefumlo yenu; nakuba okukhona ndinithanda kakhulu, kokukhona ndithandwa kancinane."
2Corinthians12:16 Kungade kube kunjalo, mna kambe andibanga mthwalo kuni; mandibe, ndinobuqhetseba nje, ndisuke ndanibambisa ngenkohliso."
2Corinthians12:17 Kukho mntu na ke kwabo ndabathumayo kuni, endanidlayo ngaye?"
2Corinthians12:18 Ndamyala uTito, ndathuma umzalwana lowo kunye naye. Wanidla na ke uTito? asihambanga ngamoya mnye na? Asihambanga ngamanyathelo mnye na?"
2Corinthians12:19 Niyawaseniba siyaziphendulela kusini na kuni? sithetha phambi kukaThixo, sikuKristu; sisuke senze izinto zonke, zintanda, ngenxa yokwakheka kwenu."
2Corinthians12:20 Kuba ndiyoyika, hleze ndithi ndakufika, ndinifumane ningenjengendikuthandayo, ndifunyanwe kuni ndingenjengenikuthandayo; hleze kubekho iimbambaniso, amakhwele, imisindo, amayelelwano, intlebendwane, iintsebenzo, ukudumba, iziphithiphithi:"
2Corinthians12:21 hleze ndithi, ndakuba ndifikile, andithobe uThixo wam phakathi kwenu, ndize ndikhedame ngenxa yabaninzi asebebonile, abaguquka ekungcoleni, nasembulweni, naseburheletyweni ababenzayo."
2Corinthians13:1 Eli liza kuba lixesha lesithathu ndisiza kuni. Onke amazwi aya kumiswa ngomlomo wamangqina amabini, nokuba mathathu."
2Corinthians13:2 Sendinixelele ngenxa engaphambili, njengoko ndandikho okwesibini, ndinixela ngenxa engaphambili, naxa ndingekhoyo ngoku, ndibhalela abo bone ngenxa engaphambili, nabanye bonke, ukuba xa ndithe ndabuya ndeza, andiyi kubaconga;"
2Corinthians13:3 Njengokuba nifuna ubungqina bokuba uKristu uthetha kum, ongenamandla phakathi kwenu, unamandla kuni."
2Corinthians13:4 Kuba nakuba wabethelelwayo emnqamlezweni ngokwasekusweleni amandla, udla ubomi ngokwasemandleni kaThixo. Kuba nathi siswele amandla kuye, noko siya kudla ubomi naye ngokwasemandleni kaThixo, ngokubhekisele kuni."
2Corinthians13:5 Zivavanyeni ukuba niselukholweni kusini na; zibonakaliseni ngokwenu. Anazi na ngokwenu ukuba uYesu Kristu ungaphakathi kwenu?
2Corinthians13:6 Ndiyathemba ke ukuba niyakwazi, ukuba asingabo abo bangenakucikideka thina."
2Corinthians13:7 Ke kaloku ndiyathandaza kuThixo, ukuba ningenzi nanye into embi; kungekuko ukuze sibonakale sicikidekile thina, ikukuze nenze into entle nina, ke thina sibe njengabangenakucikideka."
2Corinthians13:8 Kuba asinakwenza nto ngokuchasa inyaniso; sinokwenzela inyaniso.
2Corinthians13:9 Kuba siyavuya, xa sukuba singenamandla thina, nibe nina ninamandla;"
2Corinthians13:10 Ngenxa yoko ndibhala ezi zinto ndingekho, ukuze ndingathi, ndakuba ndikho, ndenze kabukhali ngokwegunya, endalinikwa yiNkosi ukuba libe lelokwakha, lingabi lelokuchitha."
2Corinthians13:11 Elokugqiba, bazalwana, ndithi, Hambani kakuhle. Yibani ngabafezekileyo, thuthuzelekani, cingani nto-nye, hlalani ngoxolo; waye uThixo wothando noxolo uya kuba nani."
2Corinthians13:12 Bulisanani ngolwango olungcwele.
2Corinthians13:13 Bayanibulisa bonke abangcwele.
2Corinthians13:14 Ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, nothando lukaThixo, nodlelano loMoya oyiNgcwele, malube nani nonke. Amen. (Incwadi yesibini eya kwabaseKorinte yabhalwa eFilipi, isixeko saseMakedoni, nguTito noLucas.)"
Galatians1:1 uPawulos, umpostile (okungengabantu, kungengamntu, kungoYesu Kristu, noThixo uYise, owamvusayo kwabafileyo);"
Galatians1:2 Nabo bonke abazalwana abakunye nam babhalela amabandla aseGalati:
Galatians1:3 bathi, Makube lubabalo kuni, noxolo oluvela kuThixo uYise, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu;"
Galatians1:4 owazinikelayo ngenxa yezono zethu, ukuze asihlangule kweli phakade langoku lingendawo, ngokokuthanda kukaThixo uBawo wethu;"
Galatians1:5 Makube kuye uzuko, kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni. Amen."
Galatians1:6 Ndimangalisiwe kukuba niphambuke kamsinya kangaka kulowo wanibizayo ngobabalo lukaKristu, niye kwiindaba ezilungileyo ezizimbi;"
Galatians1:7 Le ingeyiyo enye; koko kukho bathile banikhathazayo, bathandayo ukuzigqwetha iindaba ezilungileyo zikaKristu."
Galatians1:8 Ke, nokokuba sisuke thina aba, nokokuba sisuke isithunywa sasezulwini sanishumayeza iindaba ezilungileyo ezinxamnye nezo sanishumayezayo, masisingelwe phantsi."
Galatians1:9 Njengoko besesitshilo, ndiyaphinda, ndithi nangoku, Ukuba ubani unishumayeza iindaba ezilungileyo ezinxamnye nezo nazamkelayo, makasingelwe phantsi."
Galatians1:10 Kuba ngoku ndithomalalisa abantu, ndithomalalisa uThixo, kusini na? Ndifuna ukukholisa abantu na? Kuba, ukuba ndingaba ndisakholisa abantu, ndingaba andingumkhonzi kaKristu."
Galatians1:11 Ke kaloku, ndiyanazisa, bazalwana, ukuba azingokomntu iindaba ezilungileyo ezi, zashunyayelwayo ndim;"
Galatians1:12 Kuba nam lo andizamkelanga mntwini, andizifundiswanga nokuzifundiswa; ndazamkela ngokutyhilelwa nguYesu Kristu."
Galatians1:13 Kuba nayiva eyam ihambo eyayifudula isebuYudeni, ukuba ndaye ndilitshutshisa ndilibhuqa ibandla likaThixo ngokuncamisileyo;"
Galatians1:14 Ndaye ndihambela phambili ebuYudeni, ngaphezu kwabaninzi ababeziintanga zam eluhlangeni lwakowethu, ndizizondelele ngokugqithiseleyo izithethe zoomawokhulu."
Galatians1:15 Ke, xenikweni kwakholekayo kuThixo, owandahlulayo kwasesizalweni sikama, wandibiza ngalo ubabalo lwakhe,"
Galatians1:16 ukuba amtyhile uNyana wakhe ngaphakathi kwam, ukuze ndimshumayele ngeendaba ezilungileyo phakathi kweentlanga; kwaoko andibhekisanga nto kwinyama negazi."
Galatians1:17 Kanjalo andinyukanga ndiye eYerusalem, kubo ababengabapostile ngaphambi kwam; ndesuka ndaya kwelaseArabhi, ndaza ndabuyela eDamasko."
Galatians1:18 Ndandula ndathi, emva kweminyaka emithathu, ndenyuka ndaya eYerusalem, ukuba ndazane noPetros; ndahlala naye iintsuku ezilishumi elinantlanu."
Galatians1:19 Andibonanga wumbi ke kubapostile, yaba nguYakobi, umzalwana weNkosi, yedwa."
Galatians1:20 Izinto ke endinibhalela zona, yabonani, ndithetha emehlweni kaThixo, andixoki."
Galatians1:21 Emva koko ndeza kwimimandla yelaseSiriya nelaseKilikiya;
Galatians1:22 Ndaye ke ndingaziwa ngesiqu ngawo amabandla akwelamaYuda, akuKristu;"
Galatians1:23 banela ukuva kwakuphela ukuba, Lowo wayefudula esitshutshisa, ngoku ushumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zokholo abefudula elubhuqa."
Galatians1:24 Bamzukisa ke uThixo ngam.
Galatians2:1 Ndaza emva kweminyaka elishumi elinamine, ndabuya ndenyuka ndaya eYerusalem ndinoBharnabhas, ndathabatha noTito."
Galatians2:2 Ndenyuka ke ngokwesityhilelo, ndazandlala phambi kwabo iindaba ezilungileyo endizivakalisayo phakathi kweentlanga; ndazandlala ke phambi kwabo badumileyo bebodwa, hleze ndibe ndifumana ndibaleka, mhlawumbi ndibe ndafumana ndabaleka."
Galatians2:3 Kodwa noTito lo, lo ubenam, ekubeni engumGrike, akanyanzelekanga ukuba aluke;"
Galatians2:4 ngenxa yabazalwana ababuxoki, abangeniswayo bengaqondi, bona bangene ngokufihlakeleyo, besiza kuhlola inkululeko yethu esinayo kuKristu Yesu, ukuze basikhonze ebukhobokeni;"
Galatians2:5 Esathi abo asabavumela ngolulamo nokwexa elinye; ukuze inyaniso yeendaba ezilungileyo ihlale ihleli kuni.
Galatians2:6 Ke aba babonakala bayinto, nokuba babefudula benjani, akunamsebenzi kum; uThixo akakhethi buso bamntu;"
Galatians2:7 Kodwa bathi bakubona ukuba ndiphathiswe iindaba ezimnandi zamaJuda, kanye njengoko zaziphathisiwe uPetros iindaba ezimnandi zolwaluko."
Galatians2:8 (Kuba lo wasebenza ngokusebenzayo ngoPetros ebupostile bolwaluko, waye waba namandla kum phakathi kweentlanga);"
Galatians2:9 bathi ooYakobi noKefas noYohane, abo ke babedume ukuba baziintsika, baluqonda ubabalo endababalwa ngalo, basinika thina noBharnabhas izandla zokunene zobudlelane; ukuze thina siye kwiintlanga, bona baye kwabolwaluko."
Galatians2:10 Kuphela nje banqwenela ukuba siwakhumbule amahlwempu; Oko ke ndandikukhuthalele ukukwenza.
Galatians2:11 Ke kaloku, xenikweni uPetros wafikayo kwa-Antiyokwe, ndamelana naye ngokusekuhleni, ngokuba ube engogwetyiweyo."
Galatians2:12 Kuba phambi kokuba kufike abathile bevela kuYakobi, wadla ndawonye nabeentlanga; bathi bakufika, wesuka wanqwanqwa, wazahlulahlula, esoyika abo bolwaluko."
Galatians2:13 Namanye amaYuda amkhohlisa ngokunjalo; wada noBharnabhas wakhukuliswa luhanahaniso lwabo.
Galatians2:14 Ndithe ke ndakubona ukuba abahambi ngokuthe tye ngokwenyaniso yeendaba ezilungileyo, ndathi kuPetros phambi kwabo bonke, Ukuba wena ungumYuda nje, uphila ngokwesiko lamaYuda, yini na ukuba ubanyanzele abeentlanga? IiNtlanga zazifanele ziphile njengamaYuda?"
Galatians2:15 Thina singamaYuda ngemvelo, singengabo aboni beentlanga;"
Galatians2:16 sisazi nje ukuba umntu akagwetyelwa ngokwasemisebenzini yomthetho; kungokukholwa kuYesu Kristu, nathi sakholwa kuYesu Kristu, ukuze sigwetyelwe ngokwaselukholweni lukaKrestu, kungabi ngokwasemisebenzini yomthetho; kuba ngokwasemisebenzini yomthetho akuyi kugwetyelwa nyama."
Galatians2:17 Ke ukuba, sifuna nje ukugwetyelwa ngoKristu, sifunyanwa singaboni nathi ngokwethu, ndiyabuza ndithi, uKristu ungumlungiseleli wesono na ke ngoko? Makube lee oko."
Galatians2:18 Kuba, ukuba izinto endazichithayo, ndibuya ndakhe zona, ndiyaziqondakalisa ngokwam ukuba ndingumgqithi."
Galatians2:19 Kuba mna ngomthetho ndafa kumthetho, ukuze ubomi ndibudlele kuThixo."
Galatians2:20 Ndibethelelwe emnqamlezweni noKristu; ingendim, ke nguKristu oselesidla ubomi kum. Ubomi ke endibudlayo ngoku, ndisenyameni, ndibudlela ekukholweni kuNyana kaThixo, owandithandayo, wazinikela ngenxa yam."
Galatians2:21 Andilutshitshisi ubabalo lukaThixo; kuba, ukuba bungomthetho ubulungisa, oko uKristu angaba wafumana wafa."
Galatians3:1 Ehlani, maGalati aswele ukuqonda! Ngubani na oninyangileyo, ukuba ningayithambeli nje inyaniso, ebethe nje phambi kwamehlo enu uYesu Kristu wabhalwa, wabhegezwa phakathi kwenu, ebethelelwe emnqamlezweni?"
Galatians3:2 Ndithanda ukukha ndiqonde kuni le ndawo yodwa: Namamkela uMoya emisebenzini yomthetho, namamkela ezindabeni zokholo, kusini na?"
Galatians3:3 Niziziyatha na? Nakuba niqale kuMoya, ngoku nigqibela kwinyama na?"
Galatians3:4 Izinto ezinzima kangaka nafumana naziva na? ukuba bekulilize.
Galatians3:5 Lowo uniphayo uMoya, esebenza imisebenzi yamandla phakathi kwenu, ukwenza ngokwasemisebenzini yomthetho, ukwenza oko, ukwenza ngokwasezindabeni zokholo, kusini na?"
Galatians3:6 njengokuba uAbraham wakholwayo nguThixo, kwaza oko kwabalelwa ebulungiseni kuye."
Galatians3:7 Yazini ngoko ukuba abaselukholweni, ngabo abo abangabantwana baka-Abraham."
Galatians3:8 Isibhalo, sabona ngenxa engaphambili ukuba uThixo ubeya kuzigwebela iintlanga ngokholo, sazishumayela ngenxa engaphambili iindaba ezilungileyo kuAbraham, sisithi, Ziya kusikeleleka ngawe zonke iintlanga."
Galatians3:9 Ngoko ke abaselukholweni bayasikelelwa ndawonye noAbraham okholwayo.
Galatians3:10 Kuba bonke abangabasemisebenzini yomthetho, baphantsi kwesiqalekiso;"
Galatians3:11 Kodwa ke kuyabonakala ukuba akukho mntu ugwetyelwa ngomthetho kuye uThixo, kuba lowo ulilungisa uya kudla ubomi obuphuma elukholweni."
Galatians3:12 Ke wona umthetho asingowaselukholweni; uthi, Umntu owazenzayo ezo zinto uya kudla ubomi ngazo."
Galatians3:13 uKristu wasikhulula, wasikhulula esiqalekisweni somthetho, ngokwenziwa isiqalekiso ngenxa yethu, kuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Uqalekisiwe wonke umntu oxhonywe emthini;"
Galatians3:14 ukuze intsikelelo ka-Abraham ibe sezintlangeni ngoKristu Yesu; ukuze idinga loMoya silamkele ngalo ukholo.
Galatians3:15 Bazalwana, ndithetha ngokwabantu; nokuba ungumnqophiso wabantu, nokuba uthe waqiniselwa, akukho uwutshitshisayo, athi mhlawumbi ongeze kuwo."
Galatians3:16 Enziwa ke kuye uAbraham idinga, nakuyo imbewu yakhe. Akathi, nakuzo iimbewu, ngathi uthetha ezininzi; usuka ngathi uthetha nye, uthi, Nakuyo imbewu yakho: nguKristu ke lowo."
Galatians3:17 Ukutsho ke ndithi, Umnqophiso ozinzisiweyo ngenxa engaphambili nguThixo, usingisele kuKristu, awunakuphangwa igunya ngumthetho, owabakhoyo emva kweminyaka engamakhulu omane anamanci mathathu, ukuze ulibhangise idinga elo."
Galatians3:18 Kaloku ilifa elo, ukuba liphuma emthethweni, loba alisaphumi edingeni; ke yena uThixo umbabale uAbraham ngedinga."
Galatians3:19 Uyintoni na ke ngoko umthetho? Walekelwa ngenxa yezigqitho, ide ifike imbewu leyo lalibekwe kuyo idinga; wawumiswe ngezithunywa zezulu, usesandleni somlamleli."
Galatians3:20 Ke umlamleli akamnye, kodwa uThixo mnye."
Galatians3:21 Umthetho ngoko uchasene na namadinga kaThixo? Nakanye! Kuba, ukuba bekuwiswe umthetho onako ukudlisa ubomi, inene, ngebuphume emthethweni lowo ubulungisa."
Galatians3:22 Ke sona isibhalo sisuke sazivalela zonke phantsi kwesono, ukuze idinga eliphuma ekukholweni kuYesu Kristu linikwe abakholwayo."
Galatians3:23 Kodwa ngaphambi kokufika kokholo, sasilindwa siphantsi komthetho, sivalelwe ndawonye kude kufike ukholo olu, luza kutyhilwa."
Galatians3:24 Ngoko ke umthetho waba ngosikhaphela kuKristu, ukuze sigwetyelwe ngokwaselukholweni."
Galatians3:25 Lwakuba lufikile ke ukholo, asibi saba phantsi kwamkhapheli."
Galatians3:26 Kaloku nina nonke ningoonyana bakaThixo ngako ukukholwa, nikuKristu Yesu."
Galatians3:27 Kuba nina nonke, nabhaptizelwayo kuKristu, namambatha uKristu."
Galatians3:28 Akusekho mYuda namGrike; akusekho khoboka nakhululekileyo; akusekho ndoda nankazana; kuba nina nonke nimntu mnye, nikuKristu Yesu."
Galatians3:29 Ukuba ke nina ningabakaKristu, niyimbewu ka-Abraham ngoko, neendlalifa ngokwedinga."
Galatians4:1 Ndithi ke, indlalifa, ngexesha lonke engumntwana, ayahluke nganto kumkhonzi, nakuba iyinkosi yeento zonke;"
Galatians4:2 iphantsi kwabagcini namagosa, kude kufike ixesha elimiswe ngaphambili nguyise."
Galatians4:3 Ngokunjalo nathi, xenikweni besingabantwana, besingamakhoboka aphantsi kweziqalelo zehlabathi."
Galatians4:4 Lithe ke lakuzaliseka ixesha, uThixo wamkhupha weza uNyana wakhe, othe wazalwa ngumntu oyinkazana;"
Galatians4:5 ukuze abakhulule ngokubathenga abaphantsi komthetho, ukuze sikuzuze ukwenziwa oonyana."
Galatians4:6 Ngokuba ke ningoonyana, uThixo wamkhupha uMoya woNyana wakhe, weza ezintliziyweni zenu, edanduluka esithi, Abha, Bawo."
Galatians4:7 Ngoko ke akusengumkhonzi, ungunyana; ukuba ke ungunyana, ukwayindlalifa kaThixo ngoKristu."
Galatians4:8 Kaloku, naningamazi uThixo, nanikhonza kwabo ngemvelo bangethixo."
Galatians4:9 Ngoku ke, nakuba nimazile uThixo, hayi kanye mandithi, nakuba naziwe nguThixo, nenza ntoni na ukubuya niguqukele kwiziqalelo ezingenamandla, ezingenaluncedo, enithanda ukubuya nikhonze zona ngokutsha?"
Galatians4:10 Nimana nigcina imihla, neenyanga, namaxesha, neminyaka."
Galatians4:11 Ndiyanoyikela, hleze ndibe ndifumane ndabulaleka ngenxa yenu."
Galatians4:12 Ndiyanikhunga, bazalwana, yibani njengam; ngokuba ndinjengani; anindenzanga nto konke konke."
Galatians4:13 Niyazi ke ukuba bekungenxa yokuswela amandla kwenyama yam, ukunishumayeza kwam iindaba ezilungileyo ngokokuqala."
Galatians4:14 Ukulingwa kwam okwakusenyameni yam, anikwenzanga into engento, anikucekisanga nina nokukucekisa; nesuka nandamkela njengesithunywa sikaThixo, njengoKristu Yesu ngokwakhe."
Galatians4:15 Luphi na ngoko ubabalo enanithetha ngalo? Kuba ndiyaningqinela, ukuba bekunokwenzeka, ninge nawakrukrayo amehlo enu, nandinika."
Galatians4:16 Ndisuke ndaba lutshaba lwenu na ke, ngokuthetha inyaniso kuni?"
Galatians4:17 Bayanizondelela, ingekuko okulungileyo; ewe, bathanda ukunivalela ngaphandle, ukuze nibachaphazele bona."
Galatians4:18 Kuhle ke ukuba kuncekelelwe ngamaxesha onke entweni entle, kunganeli ukuba njalo ndakuba ndikho kuni."
Galatians4:19 Bantwanana bam, endibuye ndanenimba ngabo, ade uKristu amiliswe ngaphakathi kwenu;"
Galatians4:20 bendithanda ke ukubakho kuni ngoku, ndilenze libe lilimbi ilizwi lam; kuba ndiyathandabuza ngani."
Galatians4:21 Ndixeleleni, nina nithanda ukuba phantsi komthetho, aniwuva na umthetho?"
Galatians4:22 Kuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, uAbraham wayenoonyana ababini: omnye engowekhobokazana, omnye engowomfazi okhululekileyo."
Galatians4:23 Kodwa lowo wekhobokazana wayezelwe ngokwenyama; kodwa lowo womfazi okhululekileyo wayephume ngalo idinga.
Galatians4:24 Eziyintsonkotha ezo zinto; kuba aba bayiyo iminqophiso emibini; Omnye uvela entabeni yeSinayi, uzalela ebukhobokeni, onguHagare ke wona lowo."
Galatians4:25 Kuba loo nto inguHagare yiSinayi, intaba ekwelama-Arabhi, elungelelene neYerusalem yakalokunje, esebukhobokeni ke nabantwana bayo."
Galatians4:26 Ke yona ephezulu iYerusalem ikhululekile, enguma wethu leyo."
Galatians4:27 Kuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Yiba nemihlali, ludlolo lungazaliyo; Gqabhuka umemelele, wena ungenanimba; ngokuba baninzi abantwana besishiywa, ngaphezu kwabonendoda."
Galatians4:28 Thina ke, bazalwana, ngokokukaIsake, singabantwana bedinga."
Galatians4:29 Kusuke, kwanjengokuba wayesithi oko owazalwa ngokwenyama amtshutshise owazalwa ngokoMoya, kwaba njalo nakaloku."
Galatians4:30 Sithini na ke sona isibhalo? Likhuphele phandle ikhobokazana nonyana walo; kuba unyana wekhobokazana akasayi kuba ndlalifa kunye nonyana wokhululekileyo.
Galatians4:31 Ngoko ke, bazalwana, asingabantwana bekhobokazana thina; singabowokhululekileyo."
Galatians5:1 Yimani ngoko enkululekweni, athe uKristu wasikhululela kuyo; nize ningabuyi nibanjwe yidyokhwe yobukhoboka."
Galatians5:2 Niyabona, mna, Pawulos, ndithi kuni, ukuba nithe naluka, uKristu akasayi kuninceda lutho."
Galatians5:3 Ndiphinda ndingqina ke kumntu wonke owalukileyo, ukuba ungonetyala lokuwenza umthetho uphela."
Galatians5:4 Nibhambathisiwe nguKristu kuni, nina nigwetyelwayo emthethweni; niwile elubabalweni."
Galatians5:5 Kaloku thina sihlala silindile ngoMoya, ithemba lobulungisa ngokwaselukholweni."
Galatians5:6 Kuba kwabakuKristu Yesu, akunamandla anto ukwaluka, kwanokungaluki; lukholo ke olusebenza ngothando."
Galatians5:7 Nibaleke kakuhle; ngubani na osuke wanithintela ukuba ningayithambeli inyaniso?
Galatians5:8 Olo loyiseko lwenu aluphumi konibizayo.
Galatians5:9 Igwele elincinane liyayibilisa intlama iphela.
Galatians5:10 Mna ndikholosekile malunga nani eNkosini, ukuba aniyi kucinga nto yimbi; ke onikhathazayo uya kuluthwala ugwebo, nokuba ngongubani."
Galatians5:11 Mna ke, bazalwana, ukuba ndingaba ndisavakalisa ulwaluko, ndisatshutshiselwani na? Isono somnqamlezo sithe sayekwa."
Galatians5:12 Akwaba bebengade banqanyulwe abo banibandezelayo!
Galatians5:13 Kuba nina nabizelwa enkululekweni, bazalwana; kodwa ke musani ukusebenzisa inkululeko yokuxhelela inyama; kodwa khonzanani niqhutywa luthando."
Galatians5:14 Kuba wonke umthetho uzaliswe ngazwi linye, ngeli leli; Uze umthande ummelwane wakho ngoko uzithanda ngako."
Galatians5:15 Ukuba niyagrenyana, nidlane, lumkani ukuba ningagqitywa omnye ngomnye."
Galatians5:16 Ke ndithi, Hambani ngokoMoya, naningasayi kuthi ke niyizalise inkanuko yenyama."
Galatians5:17 Kaloku inyama ikhanuka ngokuchasene noMoya, uMoya ke ukhanuka ngokuchasene nenyama; ezo zinto ke ziphambene, ukuze ningazenzi izinto enisukuba nizithanda."
Galatians5:18 Ukuba ke nikhokelwa nguMoya, anikho phantsi komthetho."
Galatians5:19 Iyabonakala ke yona imisebenzi yenyama, eyile; uhenyuzo, ukungcola, uburheletya,"
Galatians5:20 Unqulo-zithixo, ubugqwirha, intiyo, amayelenqe, ingqumbo, iinkani, iinkani, amayelenqe,"
Galatians5:21 oomona, ookubulala, ookunxila, iindywala, nezinto ezinjengezo; endinixelelayo ngenxa engaphambili, njengokuba besendinixelele kade, ukuba abazenzayo izinto ezinjalo abayi kubudla ilifa ubukumkani bukaThixo."
Galatians5:22 Ke sona esoMoya isiqhamo luthando, uvuyo, uxolo, ukuzeka kade umsindo, ububele, ukulunga, intembeko,"
Galatians5:23 akukho mthetho uchasene nezinto ezinjalo.
Galatians5:24 Ke kaloku abo ke bakaKristu, inyama bayibethelele emnqamlezweni, kunye neminqweno neenkanuko zayo."
Galatians5:25 Ukuba sidla ubomi ngokoMoya, masihambe nokuhamba kwangokoMoya."
Galatians5:26 Masingafuni luzuko olulambathayo, sicaphukisana, simonelana."
Galatians6:1 Bazalwana, ukuba umntu uthe waqutyulwa nokuqutyulwa sisiphoso esithile, nina bangaboMoya, mlulekeni onjalo ninomoya wobulali; uzilumkele, ukuze ungahendwa nawe."
Galatians6:2 Thwalisanani ubunzima, xa nenjenjalo ke nithobela umyalelo kaKrestu."
Galatians6:3 Kuba umntu, ukuba uba uyinto, engento, uyazikhohlisa."
Galatians6:4 Elowo ke makawucikide owakhe umsebenzi, wayeya kwandula ukuba neqhayiya ngokwakhe yedwa, angabi nalo ngomnye;"
Galatians6:5 Kaloku wonke umntu uya kuwuthwala owakhe umthwalo.
Galatians6:6 Makathi ke lowo ufundiswayo ilizwi, abelane nalowo ufundisayo ngeento zonke ezilungileyo."
