Galatians6:7 Musani ukulahlekiswa; uThixo yena asingowokuhlekisa; kuba into athe wahlwayela yona umntu, wovuna kwayona;"
Galatians6:8 ngokuba lowo uhlwayelela eyakhe inyama, wovuna ukonakala ngokwasenyameni; lowo uhlwayelela uMoya ke, wovuna ubomi obungunaphakade ngokwaseMoyeni."
Galatians6:9 Ke ekwenzeni okulungileyo masingethi amandla; kuba sovuna ngexesha elililo, ukuba asityhafi."
Galatians6:10 Njengoko singathi sibe nethuba, masisebenze okulungileyo kubo bonke, ngokukodwa ke kwabendlu yokholo."
Galatians6:11 Bonani ukuba kukhulu kokubhala endinibhalele ngako ngesam isandla.
Galatians6:12 Bonke abathanda ukuba babe nesimilo esihle ngokwangaphandle, abo ke baninyanzela ukuba naluswe; benzela nje kodwa ukuze bangatshutshiswa ngawo umnqamlezo kaKristu."
Galatians6:13 Kuba kwanabo balukayo, bengawubambi umthetho; bafuna nje ukuba nalùswe, ukuze baqhayise ngeyiyeyenu inyama."
Galatians6:14 Kodwa mna mandingakhe ndiqhayise nganto, ingenguwo umnqamlezo weNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu, ekuthe ngaye ihlabathi kum labethelelwa emnqamlezweni, ndathi nam kwihlabathi ndabethelelwa emnqamlezweni."
Galatians6:15 Kuba kwabakuKristu Yesu, akunamandla anto ukwaluka nokungaluki; into enamandla sisidalwa esitsha."
Galatians6:16 Nabani na ohamba ngalo mgaqo ndimnqwenelela uxolo nenceba, kunye nalo lonke usapho lukaThixo – nguSirayeli omtsha ke lowo."
Galatians6:17 Elokugqiba ndithi, Makungabikho namnye undixhamlayo; kuba mna, iimpawu zeNkosi uYesu ndiziphethe ngomzimba wam."
Galatians6:18 Ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu malube nomoya wenu, mawethu. Amen. (KwabaseGalati ibhalwe eRoma.)"
Ephesians1:1 uPawulos, umpostile kaYesu Kristu ngokuthanda kukaThixo, ubhalela abangcwele abase-Efese, abakholwayo kuKristu Yesu;"
Ephesians1:2 Makube lubabalo kuni, noxolo oluvela kuThixo uBawo wethu, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
Ephesians1:3 Makabongwe uThixo, uYise weNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, osibabale ngazo zonke iintsikelelo zoMoya kwezasemazulwini iindawo, sikuKristu;"
Ephesians1:4 njengokuba wathi, ngaphambi kokusekwa kwehlabathi, wasinyulela kuye, ukuba sibe ngcwele, singabi nakusoleka phambi kwakhe;"
Ephesians1:5 ethe ngenxa engaphambili wasimisela ngenxa engaphambili ukuba senziwe oonyana ngoYesu Kristu kuye ngokwakhe, ngokwenkolelo yokuthanda kwakhe;"
Ephesians1:6 Ngenxa yozuko lobabalo lwakhe, awasibabala ngalo sikuye othandiweyo;"
Ephesians1:7 esinayo sikuye inkululeko ngokuhlawulelwa ngegazi lakhe, uxolelo lwezono, ngokobutyebi bobabalo lwakhe;"
Ephesians1:8 Uye waphuphumela kuthi kubo bonke ubulumko nokuqonda;
Ephesians1:9 esazisile ke imfihlelo yokuthanda kwakhe, ngokokuthanda kwakhe, awamisa ngako ngokwakhe;"
Ephesians1:10 ukuze ngexesha lokuzaliseka kwamaxesha, azihlanganisele zonke izinto kuye uKristu, ezisemazulwini kwanezisemhlabeni; nakuye:"
Ephesians1:11 Esathi kuye nathi sazuza ilifa, simiselwe ngenxa engaphambili ngokwengqibo yozisebenzayo zonke ezo nto ngokwecebo lokuthanda kwakhe;"
Ephesians1:12 ukuze sibe ngabokudumisa uzuko lwakhe, thina aba sathembela kuKristu kuqala;"
Ephesians1:13 enithe nakholwa kuye nani, emveni kokuliva kwenu ilizwi lenyaniso, iindaba ezilungileyo zosindiso lwenu; enathi, nakholwa kuye, natywinwa natywinwa nguMoya oyiNgcwele wedinga;"
Ephesians1:14 osisinyaniso selifa lethu, ukude kugqibelele ukukhululeka ngentlawulelo kwabo baziinqobo kuye, ukuba kudunyiswe uzuko lwakhe."
Ephesians1:15 Ngoko ke, ndakuba ndivile ngokholo eninalo kwiNkosi uYesu, nangothando eninalo kubo bonke abangcwele."
Ephesians1:16 Andiphezi ukubulela ngenxa yenu, xa ndinikhumbula emithandazweni yam;"
Ephesians1:17 ukuze uThixo weNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, uYise wozuko, aninike umoya wobulumko wokunityhilela, nimazi kakuhle;"
Ephesians1:18 Akhanyiselwe amehlo engqondo yakho; ukuze nilazi ithemba lobizo lwakhe, nento obuyiyo ubutyebi bozuko lwelifa lakhe phakathi kwabangcwele;"
Ephesians1:19 nokuba buyintoni na ubukhulu bamandla akhe kuthi bakholwayo, ngokokusebenza kwamandla akhe amakhulu;"
Ephesians1:20 awayenzayo ekuKristu, ekumvuseni kwabafileyo, wammisa ngasekunene kwakhe kwezasezulwini iindawo;"
Ephesians1:21 ngaphezu kwabo bonke ubulawuli, negunya, namandla, nobukhosi, nalo lonke igama elibizwayo, kungabi kweli hlabathi lodwa, kwanakwelo lizayo;"
Ephesians1:22 Waza izinto zonke wazithobela phantsi kweenyawo zakhe, wammisa ukuba abe yintloko yezinto zonke kulo ibandla."
Ephesians1:23 Lingumzimba wakhe ke lowo, ozalise konke ngako konke."
Ephesians2:1 Nani unidlise ubomi, nifile nje ziziphoso na zizono;"
Ephesians2:2 enanifudula nihamba kuzo ngokwesimo seli hlabathi, ngokomphathi wegunya lesibhakabhaka, womoya lo usebenzayo ngoku kubo abangevayo;"
Ephesians2:3 Esathi sonke phakathi kwethu sasifudula sihamba ngokweenkanuko zenyama yethu, sifeza iinkanuko zenyama nezengqondo; kwaye ngemvelo sasingabantwana bengqumbo, njengabanye."
Ephesians2:4 Ke yena uThixo, esisityebi ngenceba, uthe ngenxa yothando lwakhe olukhulu awasithanda ngalo."
Ephesians2:5 Nakuba besifile zizono, usidlise ubomi ndawonye noKristu, nisindiswe ngokubabalwa."
Ephesians2:6 Wasivusa naye ndawonye, wasihlalisa naye kwezasemazulwini iindawo, sikuKristu Yesu;"
Ephesians2:7 ukuze ubutyebi obuncamisileyo bobabalo lwakhe abubonakalalise emaphakadeni azayo, ngokusenzela ububele ngoKristu Yesu."
Ephesians2:8 Kuba nisindiswe ngokubabalwa nangalo ukholo; nako oko akuphumi kuni, kusisipho sikaThixo;"
Ephesians2:9 Akuphumi misebenzini, hleze kubekho bani uqhayisayo."
Ephesians2:10 Kuba thina singumsebenzi wakhe kuKristu Yesu, sidalelwe imisebenzi emihle, awayilungisayo uThixo ngenxa engaphambili, ukuze sihambe kuyo."
Ephesians2:11 Ngoko ke khumbulani ukuba nina nifudula niziintlanga ngokwenyama, nibizwa ngokuba ningabangalukileyo, ngabo kuthiwa ngabolwaluko olwenziwe ngezandla enyameni;"
Ephesians2:12 Okuba ngelo xesha nibe ningenaKristu, ningazani nawo umzi wakwaSirayeli, ningabasemzini kuyo iminqophiso yedinga, ningenathemba, ningenaThixo ehlabathini."
Ephesians2:13 Ke ngoku ngoKristu Yesu, nina, enibe nifudula nikude, nithe naba kufuphi ngalo igazi likaKristu."
Ephesians2:14 Kaloku yena uluxolo lwethu, yena owasenza izinto zombini, waba nye, waluchitha ke udonga lothango oluphakathi;"
Ephesians2:15 ewubhangisile ngenyama yakhe ubutshaba, nomthetho wemithetho ekwimimiselo; ukuze abo babini benze ngaphakathi kwakhe, babe mntu mnye, mtsha, esenza uxolo;"
Ephesians2:16 nokuze abaxolelanise bobabini noThixo, babe mzimbeni mnye ngawo umnqamlezo, ebubulala ubutshaba ngawo;"
Ephesians2:17 Weza ke washumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zoxolo kuni abo bakude, nakwabakufuphi;"
Ephesians2:18 Kuba kungaye ukungeniswa kwethu sobabini, siMoya mnye kuye uYise."
Ephesians2:19 Ngoko ke anisengabasemzini nabasemzini;
Ephesians2:20 Nakhelwe phezu kwesiseko sabapostile nabaprofeti, inguYesu Kristu ngokwakhe ilitye lembombo;"
Ephesians2:21 Ekuye sonke isakhiwo eso sihlangene, sikhula, sibe yitempile engcwele eNkosini."
Ephesians2:22 Enithi nani nakhelwe ndawonye kuye, ukuze nibe yindawo yokuhlala kaThixo ngaye uMoya."
Ephesians3:1 Ngenxa yoko mna Pawulos, mbanjwa kaYesu Kristu ngenxa yenu zintlanga,"
Ephesians3:2 Ukuba nikuvile ulungiselelo lobabalo lukaThixo, endababalwa ngalo kuni;"
Ephesians3:3 okokuba wandazisa imfihlelo leyo ngokotyhilelo; (njengoko ndibhale ngaphambili ngamafutshane),"
Ephesians3:4 enothi ngoko, nakulesa, nibe nokuqiqa ukwazi kwam kwimfihlelo kaKristu;"
Ephesians3:5 ababengathanga kuzimbi izizukulwana bayaziswe oonyana babantu, njengoko bayityhilelweyo ngoku abapostile bakhe abangcwele, nabaprofeti bakhe, ngaye uMoya;"
Ephesians3:6 ukuze iintlanga zibe ziindlalifa kunye naye, zibe zimzimba mnye, zibe ngamadlelane ngedinga lakhe elikuKristu, ngazo iindaba ezilungileyo;"
Ephesians3:7 endabamiselayo mna ngokwesipho sobabalo lukaThixo, endasibabalwa ngalo ngokusebenza kwamandla akhe."
Ephesians3:8 Mna lo ungoyena mncinanana kubo bonke abangcwele, ndababalwa ngolo lubabalo, lokuba ndishumayele phakathi kweentlanga iindaba ezilungileyo zobutyebi obungalandekiyo bukaKristu;"
Ephesians3:9 ndibakhanyisele bonke abantu, bayibone into obuyiyo ubudlelane bemfihlelo ebifihliwe kwasemaphakadeni, ikuye uThixo owazidalayo zonke izinto ngoYesu Kristu;"
Ephesians3:10 ukuze ngoku izilawuli namandla, kwezasezulwini iindawo, zaziswe ngalo ibandla ubulumko bukaThixo obuziintlobo ezininzi;"
Ephesians3:11 ngokwengqibo yaphakade, awayenzayo ngoKristu Yesu, iNkosi yethu;"
Ephesians3:12 Esikuye ke sinokungafihlisi, nokungeniswa kwethu sikholosile, ngokukholwa kuye;"
Ephesians3:13 Kungoko ndicelayo ukuba ningethi amandla ziimbandezelo zam, ezingenxa yenu, zona ezi ziluzuko lwenu."
Ephesians3:14 Ngenxa yoko ndiguqa ngamadolo am kuye uYise weNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu;
Ephesians3:15 Ekuthiywe ngaye yonke imizalwane esemazulwini nesemhlabeni,"
Ephesians3:16 ukuze aninike, ngokobutyebi bozuko lwakhe, ukomelezwa ngamandla ngaye uMoya wakhe, ngokusingisele emntwini ongaphakathi;"
Ephesians3:17 ukuze uKristu ahlale ngokholo ezintliziyweni zenu; ukuze nina, nimiliselwe nisekelwe eluthandweni;"
Ephesians3:18 ninako ke ukubuqiqa into obuyiyo ububanzi, nobude, nobunzulu, nokuphakama;"
Ephesians3:19 kwanokulwazi uthando lukaKristu oluncamise ukwazi, ukuze niye nizala ngako konke ukuzala kukaThixo."
Ephesians3:20 Kuye ke onako ukwenza okungaphezu kweento zonke ngokugqithiseleyo kakhulu, ngaphezu kwesikucelayo nesinokukuqiqa, ngokokwamandla asebenzayo ngaphakathi kwethu;"
Ephesians3:21 kuye malubekho uzuko ebandleni elikuKristu Yesu, kuse kuzo zonke izizukulwana zalo iphakade lasemaphakadeni. Amen."
Ephesians4:1 Ndiyanivuselela ngoko, mna mbanjwa waseNkosini, ukuba nihambe ngokuwufaneleyo ubizo enabizwa ngalo;"
Ephesians4:2 Ninako konke ukuthobeka kwentliziyo, ubulali, ukuzeka kade umsindo, ninyamezelana ngothando."
Ephesians4:3 Zabalazelani ukubugcina ubunye boMoya ngentambo yoxolo.
Ephesians4:4 Mnye umzimba, mnye noMoya, njengokuba nabizwayo nokubizwa, naba nathemba linye lobizo lwenu."
Ephesians4:5 Inye iNkosi, lunye ukholo, lunye ubhaptizo,"
Ephesians4:6 Mnye uThixo, uYise wabo bonke, ophezu kwabo bonke, okubo bonke, ophakathi kwenu nonke."
Ephesians4:7 Kodwa elowo kuthi ubabalwa ngokomlinganiselo wesisa sikaKrestu.
Ephesians4:8 Kungoko athi, Enyuke waya enyangweni, wathimba intimbo, Wabapha izipho abantu."
Ephesians4:9 Oko ke kuthi, wenyuka, kuyintoni na, kungekwakukuthi, wehla nokuhla kuqala, waya kwezona zisezantsi iindawo zomhlaba?"
Ephesians4:10 Lowo wehlayo ikwangulowo wenyukayo, waya ngaphezu kwawo onke amazulu, ukuze azalise zonke izinto."
Ephesians4:11 Wabapha abanye ukuba babe ngabapostile; abanye ke bangabaprofeti; inxenye yaba ngabashumayeli; inxenye ke yaba ngabalusi nabafundisi;
Ephesians4:12 ukuze abangcwele bagqibelele, kuse umsebenzi wolungiselelo, ukuze uwakhe umzimba kaKristu;"
Ephesians4:13 side thina sonke sifike kubo ubunye bokholo, nobokumazi okumazi kakuhle uNyana kaThixo, ebudodeni obupheleleyo, emlinganisweni wobukhulu bokuzala kukaKristu;"
Ephesians4:14 ukuze singabi saba ziintsana, silatyuzwa, siphetshethwa ngumoya wonke wemfundiso, ngokukhohlisa kwabantu, ngobuqhetseba bobuqhinga;"
Ephesians4:15 Ke sithetha inyaniso ngothando, sikhule ngeendawo zonke kuye, lo uyintloko, uKristu;"
Ephesians4:16 ekuphuma kuye ukuthi, umzimba wonke uhlangane kakuhle, ubandakanywe ngako konke ukwabanayo ukwasebenza ilungu ngalinye, ukhulisa umzimba ekuzakhenise eluthandweni."
Ephesians4:17 Ke ngoko, oku ndiyakutsho, ndikungqinela ngokwaseNkosini, ukuba ningabi sahamba njengoko zihamba ngako ezinye iintlanga, ngamampunge engqiqo yazo;"
Ephesians4:18 Zenziwe mnyama iingqondo, zahlukanisiwe nobomi bukaThixo ngenxa yokungazi okukuzo, ngenxa yobumfama bentliziyo;"
Ephesians4:19 abathe, bengaziva, bazinikela eburheletyweni, besebenza ubunqambi bonke, bebawa."
Ephesians4:20 Ke nina animfundanga ngokunjalo uKristu;
Ephesians4:21 Ukuba okunene nimvile, nafundiswa nguye, njengokuba inyaniso ikuye uYesu;"
Ephesians4:22 yokuba nithi ngakwihambo yangaphambili nimlahle umntu omdala, owonakaliswayo ngokokweenkanuko zokulukuhla;"
Ephesians4:23 manihlaziywe ke kuwo umoya wengqiqo yenu;
Ephesians4:24 Nambathe umntu omtsha, othe ngokukaThixo wadalelwa ebulungiseni, nasebungcweleni benyaniso."
Ephesians4:25 Kungoko ke ndithi, lahlani ubuxoki, thethani inyaniso elowo nommelwane wakhe; ngokuba singamalungu, omnye elelomnye."
Ephesians4:26 Qumbani, ningoni; ilanga malingade litshone nicaphukile;"
Ephesians4:27 kananjalo musani ukumkhwelela indawo uMtyholi lo.
Ephesians4:28 Lowo ubayo makangabi seba; kanye ke makabulaleke esebenza okulungileyo ngezandla zakhe, ukuze abe nako ukwabela osweleyo."
Ephesians4:29 Makungaphumi nanye intetho ebolileyo emlonyeni wenu;
Ephesians4:30 Kanjalo musani ukumenza buhlungu uMoya oyiNgcwele kaThixo, enathi kuye natywinwa, naqiniselelwa imini yentlawulelo."
Ephesians4:31 Mabukhweleliswe kuni bonke ubukrakra, nomsindo, nengqumbo, nengcolo, nonyeliso, ndawonye nolunya lonke;"
Ephesians4:32 Ke nina yibani nobubele omnye komnye, nibe nemfesane kakhulu, nixolelane, njengokuba naye uThixo wanixolelayo ekuKristu."
Ephesians5:1 Ngoko yibani ngabaxelisa uThixo, ngokwabantwana abaziintanda;"
Ephesians5:2 nihambe eluthandweni, kwanjengokuba naye uKristu wasithandayo, wazinikela ngenxa yethu, ukuba abe ngumnikelo nedini kuye uThixo, ukuba abe livumba elimnandi."
Ephesians5:3 Ke umbulo, nako konke ukungcola, nokubawa, makungakhe kukhankanywe phakathi kwenu, njengoko kubafaneleyo abangcwele;"
Ephesians5:4 kwanamanyala, nentetho yobuyatha, nobuhiba, izinto ezo ezingafanelekileyo. Makube kokukhona ninemibulelo."
Ephesians5:5 Kuba oku nikwazi, ukuba wonke umenzi wombulo, nomntu ongcolileyo, nolibawa, engumkhonzi wezithixo, akanalifa ebukumkanini bukaKristu noThixo."
Ephesians5:6 Makungabikho namnye unilukuhlayo ngamazwi alambathayo; kuba iza ngenxa yezo zinto ingqumbo kaThixo phezu kwabangevayo.
Ephesians5:7 Ngoko musani ukuba ngamahlulelana nabo.
Ephesians5:8 Kuba nina naye nifudula nibubumnyama, ke ngoku nikukukhanya, niseNkosini nje; hambani ke ngokwabantwana bokukhanya."
Ephesians5:9 (Kuba sona isiqhamo soMoya sikuko konke ukulunga, nobulungisa, nenyaniso;)"
Ephesians5:10 Nicikida ukuba yintoni na ekholekileyo kakuhle kwiNkosi.
Ephesians5:11 Kanjalo musani ukuba nabudlelane ngemisebenzi yobumnyama engenasiqhamo;
Ephesians5:12 Kuba izinto ezenziwa kubo emfihlekweni kulihlazo nokuzithetha.
Ephesians5:13 Ke zonke ezi zinto, zakohlwaywa, ziyabonakalaliswa kukukhanya; kuba konke okubonakalaliswayo kukukhanya."
Ephesians5:14 Kungoko athi, Vuka wena uleleyo, uvuke kwabafileyo; uKristu wokukhanyisela."
Ephesians5:15 Khangelani ngoko, ukuba ningathini na, ukuze kucokiseke ukuhamba kwenu; ningabi njengabaswele ubulumko, yibani njengezilumko;"
Ephesians5:16 nizongela ixesha eli, ngokuba le mihla ayindawo."
Ephesians5:17 Ngenxa yoko musani ukuba ziintsweli-kuqonda; yibani ngabakuqondayo into okuyiyo ukuthanda kweNkosi.
Ephesians5:18 Musani ukunxila yiwayini, ekukhoyo kuloo nto ukuzibhubhisa; kodwa nizaliswe nguMoya;"
Ephesians5:19 nithetha omnye komnye ngeendumiso neengoma nezango ezizezomoya, nivuma, nibetha uhadi entliziyweni yenu kuyo iNkosi,"
Ephesians5:20 nimana nibulela ngenxa yeento zonke, egameni leNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, kuye uThixo uYise;"
Ephesians5:21 Nilulamelana ngokoyika uThixo.
Ephesians5:22 Nina bafazi, walulameleni awenu amadoda, ngokokululamela iNkosi;"
Ephesians5:23 Ngokuba indoda le iyintloko yomfazi, njengokuba naye uKristu eyintloko yebandla, eli; waye yena ngokwakhe enguMsindisi wawo umzimba."
Ephesians5:24 Ke, kwanjengokuba ibandla eli limlulamela uKristu, mabathi ngokunjalo nabafazi bawalulamele awabo amadoda ezintweni zonke."
Ephesians5:25 Nina madoda, bathandeni abafazi benu, njengokuba naye uKristu walithandayo ibandla, wazinikela ngenxa yalo;"
Ephesians5:26 ukuze asingcwalise, asihlambulule ngokuhlamba kwamanzi ngelizwi;"
Ephesians5:27 ukuze alimise phambi kwakhe linobuqaqawuli, lilibandla elingenabala, elingenamibimbi nanye into enjalo; mayibe ngcwele, ingabi nasiphako."
Ephesians5:28 Ngoko amelwe amadoda ukubathanda abawo abafazi, njengokuba beyimizimba yawo. Lowo umthandayo umkakhe, uyazithanda;"
Ephesians5:29 kuba akukho namnye wakha wayithiya eyakhe inyama; usuka ayondle, ayigcine, njengokuba nayo iNkosi ilenjenjalo ibandla."
Ephesians5:30 Ngokuba singamalungu omzimba wayo, singabenyama yayo, singabamathambo ayo."
Ephesians5:31 Ngenxa yoko ke, umntu womshiya uyise nonina, anamathele kuye umkakhe, baze abo babini babe nyama-nye."
Ephesians5:32 Loo mfihlelo inkulu; ke mna ndithetha ndisingisele kuKristu, ndisingisele nakulo ibandla."
Ephesians5:33 Kodwa ke manithi nani ngabanye, elowo amthande umkakhe, njengoko azithanda ngako; Umfazi ke makayoyike indoda."
Ephesians6:1 Nina bantwana, baveni abazali benu ngokwabaseNkosini; kuba oko kububulungisa."
Ephesians6:2 Beka uyihlo nonyoko; wona lowo ngumthetho wokuqala onedinga;
Ephesians6:3 ukuze kulunge kuwe, ube nexesha elide emhlabeni."
Ephesians6:4 Nani boyise, musani ukubacaphukisa abantwana benu; bondleleni ekuqeqesheni nasekululekeni kweNkosi."
Ephesians6:5 Nina bakhonzi, baveni abaziinkosi zenu ngokwenyama, ninokuzoyikela nokugubha, ningenakumbi ezintliziyweni zenu, ninge niva uKristu ngokwakhe,"
Ephesians6:6 kungabi ngankonzo yamehlo, ngathi ningabakholisi-bantu; makube njengabakhonzi bakaKristu, nikwenza ukuthanda kukaThixo ngokwasentliziyweni;"
Ephesians6:7 nisebenza ngentumekelelo, ngathi kukwiNkosi, akukhona kubantu;"
Ephesians6:8 nisazi nje ukuba into esukuba ilungile, athe ulowo wayenza, uya kwamkeliswa kwayona yiNkosi, nokuba ungumkhonzi nokuba ungokhululekileyo."
Ephesians6:9 Nani baziinkosi zabo, yenzani kwaezo zinto kubo, nikuyeke ukusongela; kananjalo akukho kukhetha buso kuye."
Ephesians6:10 Elokugqiba, bazalwana bam, ndithi, Yomelelani eNkosini, nasekuqineni kokomelela kwayo."
Ephesians6:11 Xhobani sonke isikrweqe sikaThixo, ukuze nibe nako ukumisa nibuchase ubuqhinga boMtyholi."
Ephesians6:12 Kuba umzamo wethu asingowokuzamana negazi nenyama; ngowokuzamana nazo izilawuli, nawo amagunya, nazo iziphatha-hlabathi zobumnyama balo eli phakade, nayo imimoya ekhohlakeleyo kwezasezulwini iindawo."
Ephesians6:13 Ngoko ke, qubulani sonke isikrweqe sikaThixo, ukuze nibe nako ukuchasa ngomhla ombi, nithi nikufezile konke, nime nimi."
Ephesians6:14 Yimani ngoko, nibhinqe inyaniso esinqeni senu, ninxibe isigcina-sifuba sobulungisa;"
Ephesians6:15 Nibophe ezinyaweni zenu ulungiselelo lweendaba ezilungileyo zoxolo.
Ephesians6:16 Ngaphezu kweento zonke, qubulani ikhaka lokholo, enothi ngalo nibe nako ukuzicima zonke iintolo ezinomlilo zongendawo."
Ephesians6:17 Yamkelani isigcina-ntloko sosindiso, nalo ikrele loMoya, elililizwi likaThixo;"
Ephesians6:18 ngako konke ukuthandaza nokukhunga, nithandaza amaxesha onke nikuye uMoya; niyiphaphamele loo nto ngako konke ukuzingisa nokukhunga, ngenxa yabo bonke abangcwele;"
Ephesians6:19 nakum, ukuze ndilinikwe ilizwi lokuba ndiwuvule umlomo wam ngokungafihlisiyo, ukuyazisa imfihlelo yeendaba ezi zilungileyo;"
Ephesians6:20 endisisigidimi ngenxa yazo ndisezintanjeni; ukuze ndithethe ngako ukungafihlisi, njengoko ndimelwe kukuthetha ngako."
Ephesians6:21 Ke kaloku, ukuze nani nikwazi okukokwam, ukuba ndinjani na, wonazisa konke uTikiko, umzalwana oyintanda, umlungiseleli othembekileyo ngokwaseNkosini;"
Ephesians6:22 endimthumele khona oku kuni, ukuze nizazi iindaba zethu, nokuze azithuthuzele iintliziyo zenu."
Ephesians6:23 Makube luxolo kubo abazalwana, nothando, ndawonye nokholo oluvela kuThixo uYise, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
Ephesians6:24 Ubabalo malube nabo bonke abayithandayo iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu ngokungenakonakala. Amen. (Ibhalelwa kwabase-Efese eseRoma, nguTikiko.)"
Philippians1:1 uPawulos noTimoti, abakhonzi bakaYesu Kristu, babhalela bonke abangcwele abakuKristu Yesu, abaseFilipi, ndawonye nabaveleli nabalungiseleli;"
Philippians1:2 Makube lubabalo kuni, noxolo oluvela kuThixo uBawo wethu, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
Philippians1:3 Ndiyambulela uThixo wam xa ndinikhumbula.
Philippians1:4 Ekukhungeni kwam konke ndikhunga ngenxa yenu nonke, ndivuyiswa;"
Philippians1:5 Ngenxa yobudlelane benu obubhekisele kuzo iindaba ezilungileyo, kususela kwimini yokuqala kude kube ngoku;"
Philippians1:6 ndikholose ngayo le nto, yokuba lowo wawuqalayo ngaphakathi kwenu umsebenzi olungileyo, wowufeza, ide ibe yiloo mini kaYesu Kristu;"
Philippians1:7 njengokuba kufanelekile ukuba ndicinge oku ngani nonke, ngokuba nikum entliziyweni; nithe, nasezintanjeni zam, nasekuziphenduleleni kwam, nasekuziqiniseni kwam iindaba ezilungileyo, naba ngamadlelana nam ngobabalo olu, nina nonke."
Philippians1:8 Kaloku uThixo ulingqina lam lokuba kukhulu ukunilangazelela kwam nonke, ndineemfesane zikaYesu Kristu."
Philippians1:9 Ndithandazela ke oku, ukuba uthando lwenu luphuphume ngakumbi nangakumbi ekwazini nasekucingeni konke,"
Philippians1:10 ukuze nizicikide izinto eziziincamisa; ukuze nibe msulwa, ningabi nasiphako, ide ibe yiloo mini kaKristu;"
Philippians1:11 nizele ziziqhamo zobulungisa ezingoYesu Kristu, nikhangelise ekuzukiseni nasekudumiseni uThixo."
Philippians1:12 Ke kaloku ndinga ningàzi, bazalwana, ukuba izinto ezindihleleyo, zibethe kwakukhona zihambayo iindaba ezilungileyo;"
Philippians1:13 ngokokude iintambo zam ezi zibonakale kuyo yonke indlu yomkhosi nakwabanye bonke, ukuba ndikuKristu;"
Philippians1:14 baze abona bazalwana baninzi bathi, beseNkosini, bekholose ngeentambo zam ezi, babe kukhona benobuganga bokulithetha ilizwi, bengenakoyika."
Philippians1:15 Okunene abathile bamvakalisa uKristu ngomona neenkani; ukanti ke inxenye ikholwa;
Philippians1:16 Abanye bamvakalisa uKristu ngeyelenqe, benganyanisekanga, beba baya kongezelela imbandezelo kwiintambo zam;"
Philippians1:17 ke aba, benziwa luthando, bamazisa wKristu besazi ukuba ndimiselwe ukuziphendulela iindaba ezilungileyo."
Philippians1:18 Kuthiweni na ngoko? Noko kunjalo, ngeendlela zonke, nokuba kungokunyhwalaza, nokuba kungenyaniso, kwaziswa uKristu. Ndiyavuya kuko oko, ndaye ndisaya kuvuya."
Philippians1:19 Kuba ndiyazi ukuba oku kuya kuphumelela elusindisweni lwam ngako ukundithandazela, nangoncedo loMoya kaYesu Kristu;"
Philippians1:20 kuye ngokulangazelela nangokuthemba kwam, ukuba andiyi kudaniswa nganto; uya kusuka ngako konke ukungafihlisi, njengokwamaxesha onke, athi nangoku enziwe mkhulu uKristu emzimbeni wam, nokuba na kungobomi, nokuba kungokufa."
Philippians1:21 Kuba kum mna, ukudla ubomi kunguKristu, ukufa kuyinzuzo."
Philippians1:22 Ke ukuba ukudla ubomi ndisenyameni kusisiqhamo somsebenzi kum oko, into ke endonyula yona andiyazi."
Philippians1:23 Kuba ndixinekile phakathi kwezinto ezimbini; ndinawo umnqweno wokunga ndinganduluka, ndiye kuba noKristu; eyona nto ingcono kakhulu:"
Philippians1:24 Kodwa ukuhlala ndihleli ndisenyameni yeyona nto ifunekayo ngenxa yenu.
Philippians1:25 Kananjalo, ndikholose ngoko nje, ndiyazi ukuba ndiya kuhlala ndihlale, ndihleli nani nonke, ukuze nihambele phambili, nivuyiswe lukholo;"
Philippians1:26 ukuze iqhayiya lenu kuKristu Yesu ngam liye lisanda ngokwanda, ngako ukubuya ndibekho kuni."
Philippians1:27 Kuphela nje ihambo yenu mayibe njengokufanele ukuzishumayela iindaba ezilungileyo zikaKristu; ukuze, nokuba ndithe ndeza kunibona, nokuba ndingekhoyo, ndive iindaba zenu, ukuba nimi moyeni mnye, nicinga nto-nye, nizama ukholo lwenu, ivangeli;"
Philippians1:28 Into ke leyo engumbonakalaliso wentshabalalo okunene kubo, kodwa ingumbonakalaliso wosindiso kuni, kube ke oko kuvela kuThixo."
Philippians1:29 Kaloku naninikwe igunya ngenxa kaKrestu, ukuze ninganeli kukholwa kuye kuphela, koko nive ubunzima ngenxa yakhe,"
Philippians1:30 ninawo umzamo onjengalowo nawubonayo kum, nangoku niwuvayo ukuba ukho kum."
Philippians2:1 Ukuba ngoko kukho intuthuzelo kuKristu, ukuba kukho intuthuzelo yothando, ukuba kukho ubudlelane boMoya, ukuba kukho imfesane neemfefe,"
Philippians2:2 Luzaliseni uvuyo lwam, ukuze nicinge nto-nye, ninaluthando lunye, ninamphefumlo mnye, nicinga nto-nye."
Philippians2:3 Ningenzi nanye into ngokweyelenqe, nangokozuko olulambathayo. Yithini ngokuthobeka kwentliziyo omnye ambalele omnye ekuthini nguyena wongamileyo kunaye."
Philippians2:4 Elowo makaxunele kwezakhe izinto zodwa, elowo makaxunele nakwezabanye."
Philippians2:5 Yibani nale ngcinga kuni, wayenayo kuye uKristu Yesu;"
Philippians2:6 Owathi, esebumeni bukaThixo, akathi ukulingana noThixo akukuphanga;"
Philippians2:7 usuke wazenzisa, wathabatha ubume bomkhonzi, wenziwa wafana nabantu;"
Philippians2:8 wathi ngemo efunyenwe enjengomntu, wazithoba, waba ngolulamileyo, wada wesa ekufeni, ukufa ke kwasemnqamlezweni."
Philippians2:9 Kungoko athe uThixo wamphakamisa kakhulu, wamnika igama elingaphezu kwawo onke amagama;"
Philippians2:10 ukuze ngegama likaYesu onke amadolo agobe, awabasemazulwini, nawabasemhlabeni, nawabaphantsi komhlaba;"
Philippians2:11 zithi zonke iilwimi zixele ukuba uYesu Kristu uyiNkosi, kuze kuzukiswe uThixo uYise."
Philippians2:12 Ngoko ke, zintanda zam, njengokuba nahlala ninokuva, lusebenzeni nilufeze olwenu usindiso, ninokuzoyikela nokungcangcazela;"
Philippians2:13 Kuba nguThixo okusebenzayo Ngaphakathi kwenu ukuthanda oko, kwanokusebenza oko, ngenxa yenkolelo yakhe."
Philippians2:14 Yenzani zonke izinto ngaphandle kokumbombozela nokuxambulisana,"
Philippians2:15 ukuze nibe ngabantwana bakaThixo abangenakusoleka, abangenatyala phakathi kohlanga olujijekileyo, olugwenxa, enikhanya phakathi kwalo njengezikhanyiso ehlabathini."
Philippians2:16 Nibambelele elizwini lobomi; nibe liqhayiya lam, nide nise kwimini kaKristu, ukuba andifumananga ndabaleka, kanjalo andifumananga ndabulaleka."
Philippians2:17 Ewe, nokuba ndiyathululwa ngokomnikelo phezu kombingelelo nombuso wokholo lwenu, ndiyavuya, ndivuyisana nani nonke."
Philippians2:18 Yithini ke ngokoko nani nivuye, nivuyisane nam."
Philippians2:19 Ke kaloku ndithembele eNkosini uYesu, ukuba ndonithumela uTimoti kamsinya, ukuze nam ndonwabe, ndakuzazi iindawo ezingani."
Philippians2:20 Kuba andinamntu wumbi, umphefumlo uvana nowam, owothi ayikhathalele ngokwenyaniso imicimbi engani."
Philippians2:21 Kuba bonke bafuna ezabo izinto, zingezizo ezikaYesu Kristu."
Philippians2:22 Ukucikideka ke kwakhe niyakwazi: ukuba wathi, njengomntwana kuyise, wakhonza kunye nam kuzo iindaba ezilungileyo."
Philippians2:23 Lowo ke ngoko ndithembe ukumthuma kwaoko, xa ndithe ndayiqonda imicimbi engam."
Philippians2:24 Ke ndithembele eNkosini, ukuba nam ngokwam ndoza kamsinya."
Philippians2:25 Kodwa ke ndibe kuyafuneka ukuba ndinithumele uEpafrodito, umzalwana wam osebenza nam, umphumi-mkhosi nam, umthunywa wenu ke, umlungiseleli wam kwiintswelo zam;"
Philippians2:26 ekubeni ke ebenilangazelela nina nonke, edandatheka, ngenxa enokuba nevayo ukuba wayesifa."
Philippians2:27 Kuba okunene wayesifa, ephantse ukufa. Ke uThixo wamenzela inceba; akenzela yena yedwa, wenzela nam lo, ukuze ndingabi buhlungu, ndibuhlungu kade."
Philippians2:28 Kukhona ngoko ndimthuma ngokukhawuleza, ukuze nithi nakumbona nibuye nivuye, kuthi nokwam ukuba buhlungu kudambe."
Philippians2:29 Mamkeleni ke ngokwaseNkosini, ninovuyo lonke; nibabeke abanjalo."
Philippians2:30 Kaloku, ngenxa yomsebenzi kaKristu, wada waphantsa ukufa, engabucongi ubomi bakhe, ukuze enzelelele ukusilela kwenu ekundilungiseleleni."
Philippians3:1 Elokugqiba, bazalwana bam, vuyani niseNkosini. Ukunibhalela kwaezo zinto akunqenekile okunene kum, ke nina kuyaninqabisa."
Philippians3:2 Zilumkeleni izinja, balumkeleni abasebenzi beento ezimbi, balumkeleni abo basika."
Philippians3:3 Kuba abolwaluko sithi, thina bakhonza uThixo ngomoya, siqhayise ngoKristu Yesu, singakholosi ngenyama;"
Philippians3:4 nakuba mna ndibe ndingakholosayo ngenyama; Ukuba kukho bani uba unokukholosa ngenyama, bendingaba ngakumbi mna."
Philippians3:5 Ndaluswa ngomhla wesibhozo, ndingowembewu kaSirayeli, ndingowesizwe sikaBhenjamin, ndingumHebhere wamaHebhere; ngokomthetho ndingumFarisi;"
Philippians3:6 ngokwenzondelelo ndilitshutshisa ibandla; ngobulungisa obo basemthethweni ndingongenakusoleka.
Philippians3:7 Ndisuke, zona ezo zinto zabe ziyinzuzo kum, zona ezo ndazibalela ekuthini ziyinkxwaleko ngenxa kaKristu."
Philippians3:8 Ewe, okunene, ndisuka izinto zonke ndizibalele ekuthini ziyinkxwaleko, ngenxa yokongama kokumazi uKristu Yesu iNkosi yam;"
Philippians3:9 ndifunyanwe kuye, ndingenabo obam ubulungisa, bona obuphuma emthethweni;"
Philippians3:10 ukuze ndimazi, kwanamandla ovuko lwakhe, nobudlelane naye ngeentlungu zakhe, ndifaniswe nokufa kwakhe;"
Philippians3:11 ukuba ndingade ndifikelele ekuvukeni kwabafileyo.
Philippians3:12 Kungekuko ukuthi sendamkele, nokuthi sendigqibelele;"
Philippians3:13 Bazalwana, mna andizibaleli ekuthini ndigangile; ke ndenza nto-nye: ndithi, ndizilibala izinto ezisemva, ndisolulela kwezingaphambili;"
Philippians3:14 Ndiphuthume ngokoxunele umvuzo wobizo lwaphezulu lukaThixo kuKristu Yesu.
Philippians3:15 Masithi ngoko, ngangoko singako thina bagqibeleleyo, sicinge oko; kanjalo ukuba nicinga into ngokukumbi, uThixo wonityhilela naleyo."
Philippians3:16 Noko ke, apho sifikelele khona, masihambe ngamgca mnye, masicinge nto-nye."
Philippians3:17 Yibani ngabaxelisa mna, bazalwana, nixunele kubo abahamba ngokunjalo, njengokuba ninomfuziselo, thina aba ke."
Philippians3:18 Kuba baninzi abahambayo, endathetha futhi kuni ngabo, ngoku ke ndithetha ndilila nokulila, ndisithi, bazizo iintshaba zomnqamlezo kaKristu;"
Philippians3:19 Abasiphelo siyintshabalalo, abaThixo usisisu sabo, abaluzuko lulihlazo labo, abanyamekela izinto zomhlaba."
Philippians3:20 Kaloku thina ngokwethu sisemazulwini; apho kananjalo silinde khona uMsindisi, iNkosi uYesu Kristu;"
Philippians3:21 eya kuwenza kumila kumbi umzimba wokuthobeka kwethu, ukuze wona wenziwe ufane nawo umzimba wozuko lwakhe, ngokokusebenza kwalowo unako ukuzithobela phantsi kwakhe zonke izinto."
Philippians4:1 Ngoko ke, bazalwana bam abaziintanda, balangazelelwayo, luvuyo lwam, sithsaba sam, yimani ngokunjalo eNkosini, zintanda."
Philippians4:2 uWodiya ndiyamyala, noSintike ndiyamyala, ukuba bacinge nto-nye beseNkosini."
Philippians4:3 Ndiyakucela nawe, sinxulumana senyaniso, bambisana nabo bafazi bazama nam ezindabeni ezilungileyo, kwanoKlemente, nabanye abasebenzisi bam, abamagama asencwadini yobomi."
Philippians4:4 Vuyani eNkosini amaxesha onke; ndiyaphinda ndithi, Vuyani!"
Philippians4:5 Ukuba nengqiqo kwenu makwazeke ebantwini bonke. iNkosi isondele.
Philippians4:6 Ningaxhaleli nto; mazithi iingcelo zenu ezintweni zonke, ngako ukuthandaza nokukhunga, ndawonye nokubulela, zaziswe kuye uThixo."
Philippians4:7 Lwaye uxolo lukaThixo, olugqithisele kuko konke ukuqonda, luya kuzigcina iintliziyo zenu neengqiqo zenu kuKristu Yesu."
Philippians4:8 Elokugqiba, bazalwana, ndithi, iinto zonke eziyinene, iinto zonke ezindilekileyo, iinto zonke ezibubulungisa, iinto zonke ezinyulu, iinto zonke ezithandekayo, iinto zonke eziludumo lulungileyo; Ukuba ke kukho sidima, ukuba kukho ndumiso, zicingeni ezo zinto."
Philippians4:9 Kwaezo zinto nazifundayo, nazamkela, naziva, nazibona kum, yenzani zona ezo; waye uThixo woxolo eya kuba nani."
Philippians4:10 Ke kaloku ndaye ndivuya eNkosini kakhulu, ukuba ngoku kokugqibela kude kwathi ukukunyamekela kwenu okwam, kwabuya kwatyatyamba: enikuxhalabeleyo ke, koko naniswele ithuba."
Philippians4:11 Kungekuko ukuba ndithetha ngokuswela; kuba mna ndafunda ukuthi entlalweni endikuyo ndanele.
Philippians4:12 Ndiyakwazi nokuba kunjani ukuhlwempuzeka, ndiyazana nobutyebi; kuko konke, nasezintweni zonke, ndiqhelanisiwe nokuhlutha kwanokulamba, nokutyeba kwanokuswela."
Philippians4:13 Ndinokuzenza izinto zonke, ndikulowo undomelezayo, uKristu."
Philippians4:14 Noko ke natyapha ukuba nobudlelane nam ngembandezelo.
Philippians4:15 Nani ke baseFilipi, niyazi ukuba, ekuqalekeni kweendaba ezilungileyo ezi, xenikweni ndaphumayo kwelaseMakedoni, akubangakho nalinye ibandla eladlelana nam, ngokusingisele emcimbini wokunikela nowokwamkela, yaba nini nedwa."
Philippians4:16 Ngokuba, naseTesalonika, kwaba kanye nakabini nithumela, nindinceda ekusweleni kwam."
Philippians4:17 Ingekuko ukuba ndibe ndifuna ukuphiwa; ikukuba ndibe ndifuna isiqhamo esandela emcimbini wenu.
Philippians4:18 Ke ndinezinto zonke nje, ndityebile, ndihluthi, ndizamkele nje kuEpafrodito izinto ezavela kuni: ivumba elimnandi, umbingelelo owamkelekileyo, okholekileyo kakuhle kuye uThixo."
Philippians4:19 Kodwa ke uThixo wam wokwenzelelela konke ukuswela kwenu ngokobutyebi bakhe, ngokozuko olukuKristu Yesu."
Philippians4:20 Makubekho uzuko kuThixo uBawo wethu, kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni. Amen."
Philippians4:21 Imibuliso kubo bonke abangcwele abakuKristu Yesu. Bayanibulisa abazalwana abanam.
Philippians4:22 Bayanibulisa bonke abangcwele, ngokukodwa ke aba bendlu kaKesare."
Philippians4:23 Ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu malube nani nonke. Amen. (Ibhalelwa kwabaseFilipi eseRoma, nguEpafrodito.)"
Colossians1:1 uPawulos, umpostile kaYesu Kristu ngokuthanda kukaThixo, noTimoti umzalwana,"
Colossians1:2 ubhalela abaseKolose, abazalwana abangcwele abakholwayo kuKristu; uthi, Makube lubabalo kuni, noxolo oluvela kuThixo uBawo wethu, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
Colossians1:3 Sibulela kuye uThixo uYise weNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, sihlala sinithandazela;"
Colossians1:4 Njengoko seva ngokholo lwenu kuKristu Yesu, nothando eninalo kubo bonke abangcwele."
Colossians1:5 Nangenxa yethemba enalibekela lona emazulwini, nalivayo ngenxa engaphambili ngelizwi lenyaniso leendaba ezilungileyo;"
Colossians1:6 Lowo ufikileyo kuni, njengokuba kunjalo kuwo wonke umhlaba; luxakatha isiqhamo, kwanjengoko lwenjenjalo nangaphakathi kuni, kususela kwimini enaluvayo, nalwazi ubabalo lukaThixo ngenyaniso;"
Colossians1:7 Njengoko nafundayo nakuEpafra, ongumkhonzi oyintanda kunye nathi, engumlungiseleli othembekileyo kaKristu ngenxa yenu;"
Colossians1:8 owasazisayo nokusazisa ngothando lwenu lwaseMoyeni.
Colossians1:9 Ngenxa yoko nathi, kususela kwimini esakuvayo oko, asiyeki ukunithandazela, nokukhunga, ukuze nizaliswe kukukwazi kakuhle ukuthanda kwakhe, ninobulumko bonke, nangokuqonda koMoya;"
Colossians1:10 ukuze nihambe ngokuyifaneleyo iNkosi, nise kuko konke ukukholisa, nixakathe isiqhamo kuwo wonke umsebenzi olungileyo, nikhulela ekumazini uThixo;"
Colossians1:11 nisomelezwa ngokomelela konke, ngokokuqina kozuko lwakhe, nide nise kuko konke ukunyamezela, nokuzeka kade umsindo, kunye novuyo;"
Colossians1:12 nibulela kuye uYise, osenze sakulingana ukuba nesabelo kwilifa labangcwele ekukhanyeni;"
Colossians1:13 owasihlangulayo egunyeni lobumnyama, wasifudusela ebukumkanini boNyana wakhe oyintanda;"
Colossians1:14 esinayo sikuye inkululeko ngokuhlawulelwa ngegazi lakhe, uxolelo lwezono;"
Colossians1:15 Ungumfanekiselo kaThixo ongenakubonwa, owamazibulo kwindalo yonke."
Colossians1:16 Ngokuba zadalelwa kuye zonke izinto, ezisemazulwini nezisemhlabeni, ezinokubonwa nezingenakubonwa, nokuba ziitrone, nokuba zibubukhosi, nokuba zizilawuli, nokuba ngamagunya; zonke izinto zidalwe nguye, zidalelwe yena."
Colossians1:17 Yena ke ungaphambi kweento zonke, nazo zonke izinto zima zimi kuye."
Colossians1:18 Yena ke uyintloko yomzimba, yebandla; oyingqalo, owamazibulo kubo abafileyo; ukuze ezintweni zonke abe ngovelela."
Colossians1:19 Kuba kwakholeka kuye uYise ukuba kuhlale kuye konke ukuzaliseka;
Colossians1:20 nokuthi ngaye azixolelanise naye zonke izinto, elwenzile uxolo ngalo igazi lomnqamlezo; ndithi ngaye, nokuba zizinto ezisemhlabeni, nokuba zezisemazulwini."
Colossians1:21 Nani, enibe nifudula ningazani, niziintshaba ngengqondo yenu ngokwasemisebenzini engendawo, kungoku unixolelanisile;"
Colossians1:22 ngomzimba wenyama yakhe ngokufa ukuze animise phambi kwakhe ningcwele, ningenakusoleka, ningenakusoleka;"
Colossians1:23 Ukuba kaloku nihlala nihleli elukholweni, nisekelwe niqinile, ningashukunyiswa nimke ethembeni leendaba ezilungileyo ezi nazivayo, zona zashunyayelwayo kwindalo yonke ephantsi kwezulu; endaba ngumlungiseleli wazo, mna Pawulos;"
Colossians1:24 Ngoku ndiyavuya ezintlungwini zam ngenxa yenu, ndikuzalisa enyameni yam okusileleyo kwiimbandezelo zikaKristu, ngenxa yomzimba wakhe olilo ibandla;"
Colossians1:25 endithe ndaba ngumlungiseleli wawo ngokokugosisa kukaThixo, awandinikela ngako ngenxa yenu, ukuba ndilizalise ilizwi likaThixo;"
Colossians1:26 Kwanaloo mfihlelo, ibifihliwe kwasemaphakadeni nasezizukulwaneni, nakungokunje ibonakalalisiweyo kubo abangcwele bakhe;"
Colossians1:27 awathandayo uThixo ukubazisa bona into obuyiyo ubutyebi bozuko lwaloo mfihlelo phakathi kwazo iintlanga; nguKristu ke ongaphakathi kwenu, ithemba lozuko;"
Colossians1:28 Sazisa yena ke thina, siluleka wonke umntu, sifundisa wonke umntu ngabo bonke ubulumko; ukuze simise wonke umntu egqibelele ekuKristu Yesu;"
Colossians1:29 endibulalekela kona oko, ndizama ngokokusebenza kwakhe okusebenzayo kum ngamandla."
Colossians2:1 Kuba ndithanda ukuba nikwazi ukuba kukhulu kwako ukuzama endikuzamayo ngenxa yenu, nabo baseLawodike, nabo bonke abangabubonanga ubuso bam ngokwenyama;"
Colossians2:2 ukuze zithuthuzeleke iintliziyo zabo, bebandakanywe ngothando, kuse kubo bonke ubutyebi benzaliseko yokuqonda, kuse ekwazini imfihlelo engcwele kaThixo, nekaYise, nekaKristu;"
Colossians2:3 efihlwe kuye bonke ubutyebi bobulumko nobokwazi.
Colossians2:4 Nditsho ke, ukuze kungabikho bani unilukuhlayo ngentetho egudileyo."
Colossians2:5 Kuba nangona ndingekhoyo ngenyama, khona ngomoya ndinani, ndivuya, ndibona ulungelelwano lwenu, nokuzimaseka kokukholwa kwenu kuKristu."
Colossians2:6 Njengokuba ngoko namamkelayo uKristu Yesu iNkosi, hambani kuye;"
Colossians2:7 Nndele nakhelwe kuye, naqiniswa elukholweni njengoko nafundiswayo nafezeka kulo ngumbulelo."
Colossians2:8 Lumkani, kungabikho bani unithimbayo ngayo intanda-bulumko, nangokulukuhla okungento yanto, ngokwesithethe sabantu, ngokweziqalelo zehlabathi, kungengokukaKristu."
Colossians2:9 Kuba kuhleli kuye konke ukuzaliseka kobuThixo ngokomzimba;
Colossians2:10 nigqibelele kuye, oyintloko yabo bonke ubulawuli negunya;"
Colossians2:11 Nathi kuye naluswa nokwaluswa ngolwaluko olungenakwenziwa ngazandla, ngako ukuhluba umzimba wenyama, ngalo ulwaluko lukaKristu;"
Colossians2:12 ningcwatywe naye elubhaptizweni; enathi nikuye, navuswa nokuvuswa naye, ngokukholwa kwenu kukusebenza kukaThixo, owamvusa kubo abafileyo."
Colossians2:13 Nani, nifile nje ziziphoso nakukungaluki kwenyama yenu, unidlise ubomi ndawonye naye, enixolele zonke iziphoso."
Colossians2:14 Wawucima umbhalo wemithetho ochasene nathi, owawuchasene nathi, wasisusa ngokuwubethelela emnqamlezweni;"
Colossians2:15 ebabhunyule ozilawuli noomagunya, wabenza isibonelo ekuhleni, ememelela ngabo ekuwo kuyo."
Colossians2:16 Makungabikho mntu ngoko unigwebayo ngento edliwayo, nangento eselwayo, nangendawo yomthendeleko, nangenyanga ethwasileyo, nangeesabatha;"
Colossians2:17 Ezi sisithunzi sezinto ezizayo; ke wona umzimba ngokaKristu.
Colossians2:18 Makungabikho namnye unilukuhlayo emvuzweni wenu, ngokuqhutywa yintliziyo ethobekileyo, enqula izithunywa zezulu, egxuphuleka kwizinto angazibonanga, ephuthunyiswe enyameni yakhe,"
Colossians2:19 engabambe yona iNtloko, ekuphuma kuyo ukuthi umzimba wonke ukhule ngokukhulisa kukaThixo, uncedwa, ubandakanywa ngako konke ukuxhomekelelana kwamalungu nemisipha."
Colossians2:20 Ngoko ke, ukuba nifile noKristu, niphuma kuzo iziqalelo zehlabathi, yini na ukuba niyithobele imimiselo, ningathi niphila kweli hlabathi?"
Colossians2:21 (Musani ukuphatha, musa ukungcamla, musa ukuphatha;"
Colossians2:22 ezize zonke zitshabalale) ngenxa yemithetho neemfundiso zabantu?
Colossians2:23 Okunene zizinto ezo ezidunyelwe bubulumko ngokunqula okuzithandelayo, nangokuthobeka kwentliziyo, nokulahla umzimba; kungengambeko yanelisa inyama."
Colossians3:1 Ukuba ngoko navuswa kunye noKristu, funani izinto zaphezulu, apho akhona uKristu, ehleli ngasekunene kukaThixo."
Colossians3:2 Nyamekelani izinto zaphezulu, ingabi kwizinto zasemhlabeni."
Colossians3:3 Kaloku nafa, baye ubomi benu bufihlakele ndawonye noKrestu kuye uThixo."
Colossians3:4 Xa athe wabonakalaliswa uKristu, obubomi bethu, ngelo xesha niya kubonakalaliswa nani, ninaye ebuqaqawulini."
Colossians3:5 Bhubhisani ngoko amalungu enu asemhlabeni; uhenyuzo, ukungcola, ukuthabatheka okuhlazisayo, inkanuko embi, nokubawa, okuyinkonzo yezithixo kona oko;"
Colossians3:6 eza ngenxa yezo zinto ingqumbo kaThixo phezu kwabangevayo;
Colossians3:7 enanifudula nihamba kuzo nani, oko nibe nisidla ubomi nikuzo."
Colossians3:8 Kodwa ke ngoku nani zilahleni zonke ezi zinto; ingqumbo, umsindo, ulunya, ukunyelisa; ukuthetha amanyala kungabikho emlonyeni wenu."
Colossians3:9 Musani ukuxokisana, nizihlubile nje umntu omdala, kunye nezenzo zakhe;"
Colossians3:10 nambatha lowo umtsha, uhlaziyelwa ekwazini okuhle, ngokomfanekiselo walowo wamdalayo;"
Colossians3:11 apho kungekho mGrike namYuda, kwaluka nokungaluki, mbharbhari namSkitiya, khoboka namkhululeki; usuke uKristu waba zizinto zonke, waba kubo bonke."
Colossians3:12 Yambathani ngoko, njengabanyulwa bakaThixo, abangcwele, abathandiweyo, iimfesane zeemfefe, ububele, ukuthobeka kwentliziyo, ubulali, ukuzeka kade umsindo;"
Colossians3:13 ninyamezelana, nixolelana, ukuba ubani uthi abe nokusola ngakubani; njengokuba naye uKristu wanixolelayo, yenjani njalo nani."
Colossians3:14 Ke, phezu kwazo zonke ezo zinto, yalekani uthando, oluyintambo yogqibelelo."
Colossians3:15 Uxolo lukaThixo, enabizelwa kwakulo mzimbeni mnye, malulawule ezintliziyweni zenu, nibe nokubulela."
Colossians3:16 Ilizwi likaKristu malihlale ngaphakathi kwenu ngokobutyebi; nifundisana, nilulekana ngeendumiso neengoma nezango ezizezomoya, nivume kamnandi entliziyweni yenu kuyo iNkosi."
Colossians3:17 Nako konke enisukuba nikwenza ngelizwi, nokuba kungomsebenzi, yenzani izinto zonke egameni leNkosi uYesu, nibulela ngayo kuye uThixo uYise."
Colossians3:18 Nina bafazi, walulameleni awenu amadoda, njengoko kufanele eNkosini."
Colossians3:19 Nina madoda, bathandeni abafazi benu, ningabi krakra ngakubo."
Colossians3:20 Nina bantwana, balulameleni abazali benu ezintweni zonke; kuba oko kukholekile kuyo iNkosi."
Colossians3:21 Nina boyise, musani ukubacaphukisa abantwana benu, ukuze bangafi iintliziyo."
Colossians3:22 Nina bakhonzi, balulameleni ezintweni zonke abaziinkosi zenu ngokwenyama; kungabi ngankonzo yamehlo, ngathi ningabakholisi-bantu; makube ngokwentliziyo engenakumbi, nisoyika uThixo;"
Colossians3:23 Nako konke enisukuba nikwenza, kusebenzeni ngokwasemphefumlweni, kunge kukwiNkosi, akukhona kubantu;"
Colossians3:24 nisazi nje ukuba niya kuyamkela eNkosini imbuyekezo yelifa; kuba nikhonza iNkosi uKristu.
Colossians3:25 Lowo umonayo omnye uya kukuthwala oko kona one ngako; akukho kukhetha buso bamntu.
Colossians4:1 Nina baziinkosi, baphatheni ngokufanelekileyo nangokulungeleleneyo abanikhonzayo; nisazi nje ukuba nani ngokwenu nineNkosi emazulwini."
Colossians4:2 Hlalani nithandaza, nizilinde kuko oko ninombulelo;"
Colossians4:3 nisithandazela kananjalo, ukuba uThixo asivulele umnyango wentetho, ukuba siyithethe imfihlelo kaKristu, endikhonkxwe ngenxa yayo;"
Colossians4:4 ukuze ndiyibonakalalise, njengoko ndimelwe kukuthetha ngako."
Colossians4:5 Hambani ngobulumko ngakwabo bangaphandle, nilonga ixesha eli."
Colossians4:6 Ukuthetha kwenu makuhlale kumnandi, kuvakalisiwe ngetyuwa, ukuze nazi ukuba nimelwe kukuthini na ukuphendula bonke ngabanye."
Colossians4:7 Izinto zonke ezilunge nam uya kunazisa uTikiko, umzalwana oyintanda, umlungiseleli othembekileyo, ongumkhonzi kunye nam eNkosini;"
Colossians4:8 endimthumele khona oku kuni, ukuze azazi iindawo ezingani, azithuthuzele iintliziyo zenu;"
Colossians4:9 kunye no-Onesimo, umzalwana othembekileyo, oyintanda, ophuma kuni. Baya kunazisa zonke izinto ezenzekayo apha."
Colossians4:10 Uyanibulisa uAristarko, ongumbanjwa ndawonye nam, noMarko umtshana kaBharnabhas, enamkela imithetho ngaye; ukuba uthe weza kuni, mamkeleni;"
Colossians4:11 noYesu, ekuthiwa nguYusto, kwabolwaluko; ngabo bodwa abasebenzisana nam ngenxa yobukumkani bukaThixo, abathe bona baba sisonwabiso kum."
Colossians4:12 Uyanibulisa uEpafra ongomnye wenu, umkhonzi kaKristu, ehlala ezama ngenxa yenu emithandazweni, ukuze nime nigqibelele, nizalisekile kuko konke ukuthanda kukaThixo."
Colossians4:13 Kuba ndiyamngqinela ukuba unenzondelelo enkulu ngenxa yenu, nabo baseLawodike, nabo baseHirapoli."
Colossians4:14 Uyanibulisa uLuka, igqirha eliyintanda, noDemas."
Colossians4:15 Imibuliso kubazalwana abaseLawodike, nakuNimfa, nakulo ibandla elisendlwini yakhe."
Colossians4:16 Xa ke le ncwadi ithe yaleswa kuni, ize nenze ukuba ileswe nasebandleni eliseLawodike; nani niyilese leyo iphuma eLawodike."
Colossians4:17 Yithini kuArkipo, Lukhangele ulungiselelo owalwamkelayo lwaseNkosini, ukuze uluzalise."
Colossians4:18 Umbuliso lo ungesam isandla, mna Pawulos. Khumbulani iintambo zam. Ubabalo malube nani. Amen. (Yabhalwa eRoma ukuya kwabaseKolose nguTikiko no-Onesimo.)"
1Thessalonians1:1 uPawulos noSilvano noTimoti babhalela ibandla labaseTesalonika, elikuThixo uYise, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu; bathi, Makube lubabalo kuni, noxolo oluvela kuThixo uBawo wethu, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
1Thessalonians1:2 Sihlala sibulela kuye uThixo ngenxa yenu nonke; sinikhumbula emithandazweni yethu;
1Thessalonians1:3 Ndiwukhumbula ngokungayeki umsebenzi wenu wokholo, nokubulaleka kwenu kothando, nomonde wenu wokuthemba iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, phambi koThixo uBawo wethu;"
1Thessalonians1:4 Sisazi, bazalwana baziintanda, ukunyulwa kwenu nguThixo."
1Thessalonians1:5 Kaloku iindaba ezimnandi endaniphathela zona azizange zibekho kuni ngantetho yodwa; njengokuba nisazi ukuba sasinjani na phakathi kwenu ngenxa yenu.
1Thessalonians1:6 Nani naba ngabaxelisa thina nayo iNkosi, nalamkelayo nje ilizwi nisembandezelweni eninzi, ninovuyo loMoya oyiNgcwele;"
1Thessalonians1:7 Nada naba yimifuziselo kubo bonke abakholwayo, abakwelaseMakedoni nelaseAkaya."
1Thessalonians1:8 Kaloku lahlokoma livela kuni ilizwi leNkosi, akwaba khona kwelaseMakedoni nelaseAkaya lodwa, kusuke nakwiindawo zonke ukukholwa kwenu kuThixo; ngokokude singabi sathetha nto."
1Thessalonians1:9 Kaloku bona aba bayasichazela ukuba kunjani na ukungena kwethu kuni, nendlela enaniguqukela ngayo kuThixo, nisuka kwizithixo, nize nikhonze uThixo ophilayo noyinyaniso,"
1Thessalonians1:10 nilinde uNyana wakhe evela emazulwini, awamvusayo kwabafileyo, kwauYesu osihlangulayo kuyo ingqumbo ezayo."
1Thessalonians2:1 Kuba niyakwazi ngokwenu, bazalwana, ukungena kwethu kuni, ukuba akulambathanga;"
1Thessalonians2:2 Sesuka, nakuba besive ubunzima ngenxa engaphambili, siphethwe kakubi eFilipi, njengoko naziyo, asafihlisa, sikuye uThixo wethu, ukuzithetha kuni iindaba ezilungileyo zikaThixo, sinomzamo omkhulu."
1Thessalonians2:3 Kuba uvuselelo lwethu aluphumi enkohlisweni, lungaphumi ekungcoleni, lungekho enkohlisweni."
1Thessalonians2:4 Sithi, njengoko sicikidiweyo nguThixo, ukuba siphathiswe iindaba ezilungileyo, senjenjalo ukuthetha; singangi sikholisa abantu, kuba sikholisa uThixo ozicikidayo iintliziyo zethu."
1Thessalonians2:5 Kaloku, njengoko naziyo, asizanga sibe nantetho yakucengacenga, namkhusane wakubawa; uThixo ulingqina:"
1Thessalonians2:6 Asifuni nokufuna luzuko bantwini, nokuba kukuni, nokuba kukwabanye; nakuba besinako ukuba ngumthwalo ngokwabapostile bakaKristu."
1Thessalonians2:7 Sisuke saba ngabathantamisayo phakathi kwenu, njengokuba umama ebagcinile abantwana bakhe;"
1Thessalonians2:8 Ngoko ke sinilangazelela nje, kwakholeka kuthi ukuba singaneli kunabela iindaba ezilungileyo zikaThixo nje kodwa, sinabele nobomi bethu, ngenxa enokuba naba ziintanda kuthi."
1Thessalonians2:9 Kaloku niyakukhumbula, bazalwana, ukubulaleka kwethu nemigu yethu; sazivakalisa kuni iindaba ezilungileyo zikaThixo, sisebenza ubusuku nemini, ukuze singabi mthwalo nakubani kuni."
1Thessalonians2:10 Ningamangqina nina, kwanoThixo, ukuba saba njani na ukuba ngcwele, nokuba nobulungisa, nokungabi nakusoleka phakathi kwenu bakholwayo;"
1Thessalonians2:11 Njengoko nisazi, ukuba besiniyala, sinikhuza, siniyala elowo wenu, njengoyise esenza kubantwana bakhe;"
1Thessalonians2:12 ukuze nihambe ngokumfaneleyo uThixo, onibizelayo kobakhe ubukumkani nozuko."
1Thessalonians2:13 Ngenxa yoko nathi siyabulela kuye uThixo singayeki, ukuba nathi, ukulamkela ilizwi likaThixo lodaba kuthi, analamkela lililizwi labantu; nalamkela njengokuba kunjalo okwenyaniso, lililizwi likaThixo elisebenzayo nokusebenzayo, nakuni bakholwayo."
1Thessalonians2:14 Kuba nani, bazalwana, naba ngabaxelisa amabandla kaThixo akwelakwaYuda, akuKristu Yesu;"
1Thessalonians2:15 wona ayibulalayo iNkosi uYesu kwanabawo abaprofeti, asitshutshisa nathi; abamkholisi uThixo, bachasene nabantu bonke;"
1Thessalonians2:16 esalela thina ukuba sithethe kuzo iintlanga, ukuze zisindiswe, esenzela ukuba azalise izono zawo ngamaxesha onke. Iwafikele ke ingqumbo, kwada kwasekupheleni."
1Thessalonians2:17 Thina ke, bazalwana, sanihluthwayo nje ixesha elifutshane ngesiqu, kungengantliziyo, sakhuthalela ngokugqithiseleyo ukububona ubuso benu, sinqwena kakhulu."
1Thessalonians2:18 Kungoko sathandayo ukuza kuni, mna Pawulos lo, kwakanye nakabini; kodwa uSathana wasithintela."
1Thessalonians2:19 Kaloku liyintoni na ithemba lethu, novuyo lwethu, nesithsaba sethu soqhayiso? Asinini na, phambi kweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu ekufikeni kwayo?"
1Thessalonians2:20 Inene, nini uzuko novuyo lwethu."
1Thessalonians3:1 Kungoko kwathi, singasenakuzibamba, kwakholeka kuthi ukuba sisale eAtene sedwa."
1Thessalonians3:2 Sithume uTimoti, umzalwana wethu, umlungiseleli kaThixo, ongugxa wethu kwiindaba ezilungileyo zikaKristu, ukuze anizimase, anithuthuzele ngenxa yokholo lwenu;"
1Thessalonians3:3 ukuze kungabikho namnye ushukunyiswayo zezi mbandezelo, kuba nisazi ngokwenu ukuba simiselwe zona."
1Thessalonians3:4 Kuba xenikweni besikuni, sanixelela ngenxa engaphambili ukuba siza kubandezelwa; njengokuba kwaba njalo, nani niyazi."
1Thessalonians3:5 Ngenxa yoko ke ndingasenakuzibamba, ndathumela ukuba ndilwazi ukholo lwenu, hleze abe unihendile uMhendi, saba sifumane sabulaleka."
1Thessalonians3:6 Ke kaloku, ngoku uTimoti, akufika evela kuni, weza kuthi, wasishumayeza iindaba ezilungileyo zokholo nothando lwenu;"
1Thessalonians3:7 Sithuthuzelekile ngoko, bazalwana, ngani, kuyo yonke imbandezelo nembandezelo yethu, ngalo ukholo lwenu;"
1Thessalonians3:8 Kuba ngoku siphilile, ukuba nina nithi nime eNkosini."
1Thessalonians3:9 Kuba singambuyekeza ngambulelo mni na uThixo ngani, kulo lonke uvuyo esivuya ngalo ngenxa yenu phambi koThixo wethu?"
1Thessalonians3:10 Ubusuku nemini sikhunga ngokugqithiseleyo kakhulu, ukuba sibubone ubuso benu, sikuzalise ukusilela kokholo lwenu?"
1Thessalonians3:11 Wanga ke uThixo ngokwakhe, uBawo wethu, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, angayilungisa indlela yethu yokuza kuni."
1Thessalonians3:12 Yanga ke iNkosi inganandisa, niphuphume eluthandweni, omnye komnye nakubo bonke, kwanjengokuba sisenjenjalo kuni;"
1Thessalonians3:13 ukuze izizimase iintliziyo zenu, zingabi nakusoleka, zibe ngcwele phambi koThixo uBawo wethu, ekufikeni kweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu nabo bonke abangcwele bayo."
1Thessalonians4:1 Elokugqiba ngoko, bazalwana, siyanicela siniyala siseNkosini uYesu, ukuba nithi, njengokuba nakwamkelayo kuthi, okokuba nimelwe kukuthini na ukuhamba nokumkholisa uThixo, nikhule kuko ngakumbi."
1Thessalonians4:2 Kaloku niyayazi imiyalelo esaninika yona ngeNkosi uYesu.
1Thessalonians4:3 Kuba oku kukuthanda kukaThixo, ukungcwaliswa kwenu, ukuba nikhumke kulo uhenyuzo;"
1Thessalonians4:4 ukuze elowo kuni akwazi ukusizuza asiphathe esakhe isitya enobungcwalisa, enembeko;"
1Thessalonians4:5 kungabi ngenkanuko, njengeentlanga ezingamaziyo uThixo;"
1Thessalonians4:6 Ukuba kungabikho ugqithisayo, amlumkise umzalwana wakhe emcimbini lowo, ngenxa enokuba iNkosi ngumphindezeli wazo zonke ezo zinto, njengoko sasinixelele ngenxa engaphambili, saniqononondisa."
1Thessalonians4:7 Kuba uThixo akasibizelanga ekungcoleni; usibizele ebungcwaliseni.
1Thessalonians4:8 Ngoko ke lowo ugibayo, akagibi mntu, ugiba uThixo, owasinikayo nokusinika uMoya wakhe oyiNgcwele."
1Thessalonians4:9 Ke kaloku, ngalo uthando lobuzalwana, akufuneki ukuba ndinibhalele, kuba nina ngokwenu ningabafundiswe nguThixo ukuba nithandane."
1Thessalonians4:10 Okunene niyakwenza oko kubo bonke abazalwana abakwelaseMakedoni liphela. Ke siyanibongoza, bazalwana, ukuba nikhule kuko oko ngakumbi;"
1Thessalonians4:11 Nikhuthalele ukuzola, nenze imicimbi yenu, nisebenze ngezandla zenu, njengoko saniwisela umthetho ngako;"
1Thessalonians4:12 ukuze nihambe ngokunyanisekileyo ngakwabo bangaphandle, ningasweli nto."
1Thessalonians4:13 Ke kaloku andithandi ukuba ningazi, bazalwana, mayela nabalele ukufa, ukuze ningabi buhlungu njengabanye abangenathemba bona."
1Thessalonians4:14 Kuba xa sikholwa ukuba uYesu wafa, wabuya wavuka, kwangokunjalo naye uThixo woza nabo abalele ukufa ngaye uYesu, kunye naye."
1Thessalonians4:15 Kuba oku siyakutsho kuni ngelizwi leNkosi ukuthi, thina babudlayo ubomi, baya kuba besekho ekufikeni kweNkosi, asisayi kubaphangela abalele ukufa."
1Thessalonians4:16 Ngokuba iNkosi ngokwayo iya kuhla emazulwini inendanduluko, inelizwi lesiphatha-zithunywa, inexilongo likaThixo, baze abafele kuKristu bavuke kuqala;"
1Thessalonians4:17 sandule thina babudlayo ubomi, basaseleyo, sixwilelwe emafini kwakunye nabo, siye kuyikhawulela iNkosi esibhakabhakeni; size ngokunjalo sihlale sihleli, sindawonye neNkosi."
1Thessalonians4:18 Ngoko ke, thuthuzelanani ngala mazwi."
1Thessalonians5:1 Ke kaloku ngawo amaxesha namathuba, bazalwana, akufuneki nganto ukuba ndinibhalele;"
1Thessalonians5:2 kuba nani ngokwenu niyazi ngokucacileyo, ukuba imini yeNkosi, njengesela ebusuku, yenjenjalo ukuza kwayo."
1Thessalonians5:3 Kuba xenikweni baya kuthi, Luxolo nokunqaba; oko baya kufikelwa yintshabalaliso ngebhaqo, kwanjengenimba komithiyo; baye bengayi kusinda."
1Thessalonians5:4 Ke nina, bazalwana, ànisebumnyameni, ukuba imini leyo iniqubule njengesela."
1Thessalonians5:5 Nina nonke ningoonyana bokukhanya, ningabantwana bemini; asingabobusuku, asingabobumnyama."
1Thessalonians5:6 Ngoko masingalali, njengabanye aba; masiphaphe sibe ziingcathu."
1Thessalonians5:7 Kuba abaleleyo balala ebusuku; nabanxilayo banxila ebusuku.
1Thessalonians5:8 Ke thina bangabemini masibe ziingcathu; masinxibe isigcina-sifuba sokholo nothando; nesigcina-ntloko esilithemba losindiso.
1Thessalonians5:9 Kuba uThixo akasimiselanga ngqumbo; usimisele ukuzuza usindiso ngayo iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu;
1Thessalonians5:10 owasifelayo, ukuze nokuba sihleli, nokuba silele, sidle ubomi kwakunye naye."
1Thessalonians5:11 Kungoko ndithi, Thuthuzelanani, nakhane, kwanjengokuba nisenjenjalo."
1Thessalonians5:12 Ke kaloku siyanicela, bazalwana, ukuba nibazi ababulalekayo phakathi kwenu, abanongamelayo eNkosini, abanilulekayo,"
1Thessalonians5:13 nibabeke ngokugqithiseleyo kakhulu ukubathanda, ngenxa yomsebenzi wabo. Hlalani ngoxolo phakathi kwenu."
1Thessalonians5:14 Siyanicela ke, bazalwana, bakhalimeleni abanxaxhayo, bathuthuzeleni abathambileyo;"
1Thessalonians5:15 Lumkani, kungabikho bani ubuyekeza ububi ngobubi nakubani; hlalani niphuthuma okulungileyo omnye komnye, nakubantu bonke."
1Thessalonians5:16 Vuyani amaxesha onke;
1Thessalonians5:17 Thandazani ningaphezi;
1Thessalonians5:18 Ezintweni zonke bulelani; kuba oko kukuthanda kukaThixo kuKristu Yesu ngani.
1Thessalonians5:19 Musani ukuwucima uMoya;
1Thessalonians5:20 Iziprofeto musani ukuzenza into engento.
1Thessalonians5:21 Zicikideni zonke izinto; nibambe leyo intle.
1Thessalonians5:22 Khumkani kuzo zonke iintlobo zenkohlakalo.
1Thessalonians5:23 Wanga ke uThixo woxolo ngokwakhe anganingcwalisa niphelelisekile; uthi, ugqibelele owenu umoya nomphefumlo nomzimba, ugcinwe ngokungenakusoleka ekufikeni kweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
1Thessalonians5:24 Uthembekile onibizayo, oya kukwenza nokukwenza oko."
1Thessalonians5:25 Mawethu, sithandazeleni."
1Thessalonians5:26 Babuliseni abazalwana bonke ngolwango olungcwele.
1Thessalonians5:27 Ndiyanifungisa iNkosi ukuba le ncwadi ileswe kubo bonke abazalwana abangcwele.
1Thessalonians5:28 Ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu malube nani. Amen. (Incwadi yokuqala eya kwabaseTesalonika yabhalwa eAtene.)
2Thessalonians1:1 uPawulos noSilvano noTimoti babhalela ibandla labaseTesalonika elikuThixo uBawo wethu, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu;"
2Thessalonians1:2 bathi, Makube lubabalo kuni, noxolo oluvela kuThixo uBawo wethu, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
2Thessalonians1:3 Simelwe kukuhlala sibulela kuThixo ngenxa yenu, bazalwana, njengokuba kufanelekile, ngokuba lukhula ngokugqithiseleyo ukholo lwenu, lusanda uthandano lwenu nonke ngabanye;"
2Thessalonians1:4 Ngoko ke siyaqhayisa ngani phakathi kwamabandla kaThixo, ngenxa yonyamezelo lwenu, nokholo lwenu, ezintshutshisweni zenu zonke, neembandezelo enizinyamezelayo."
2Thessalonians1:5 Nguwo lowo umbonakalaliso womgwebo onobulungisa kaThixo, ukuze nibalelwe ekuthini nibufanele ubukumkani bukaThixo, enithi ngenxa yabo nive nokuva ubunzima;"
2Thessalonians1:6 ukuba kanti yinto ebubulungisa kuThixo ukubabuyekeza ngembandezelo abanibandezelayo;
2Thessalonians1:7 Nina ke, nina babandezelwayo, aniphumle kunye nathi, ekutyhilekeni kweNkosi uYesu, ivela emazulwini inezithunywa zayo ezinamandla;"
2Thessalonians1:8 inomlilo odangazelayo, ibaphindezela abangamaziyo uThixo, nabangazilulameliyo iindaba ezilungileyo zeNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu;"
2Thessalonians1:9 bona abo baya kuva ukubethwa, intshabalalo engunaphakade ke leyo bemke ebusweni beNkosi, nasebuqaqawulini bokomelela kwayo;"
2Thessalonians1:10 Xa ithe yeza kuzukiswa kubangcwele bayo, imangaliseke kubo bonke abakholwayo (ngokuba nakholwa bubungqina bethu kuni), ngaloo mini."
2Thessalonians1:11 Kungoko sihlala sinithandazela, ukuba uThixo wethu anibalele ekuthini nilufanele ubizo olu, azalise ngamandla onke ukuthanda kwakhe ukulunga, nomsebenzi wokholo;"
2Thessalonians1:12 ukuze lizukiswe igama leNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu kuni, nani nizukiswe kuye, ngokobabalo lukaThixo wethu, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
2Thessalonians2:1 Ke kaloku siyanicela, bazalwana, ngokufika kweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, nangokuhlanganiselwa kwethu kuyo,"
2Thessalonians2:2 ukuze ningazanyazanyiswa kwamsinya, nahlukane nengqiqo;"
2Thessalonians2:3 Makungabikho bani unilukuhlayo nangalunye uhlobo; ngokuba ayinakufika yona, lungakhanga lufike ulahlo kuqala, atyhileke loo mntu wesono, unyana wentshabalalo;"
2Thessalonians2:4 Lowo uchasayo, uziphakamisayo ngaphezu kwento yonke ekuthiwa nguThixo, nehlonelwayo; ngokokude azihlalise etempileni kaThixo, ezenza uThixo, ezibonisa ukuba unguye uThixo."
2Thessalonians2:5 Anikhumbuli na ukuba oko bendisekuni ndanixelela ezi zinto?
2Thessalonians2:6 Nangoku niyakwazi okubambezelayo, ukuze atyhileke ngelakhe ixesha."
2Thessalonians2:7 Kuba imfihlelo yokuchasana nomthetho iselisebenza;
2Thessalonians2:8 Uya kutyhileka ke lowo ungendawo, eya kuthi iNkosi imtshabalalise ngomoya womlomo wayo, imbhangise ngokubonakala kokufika kwayo;"
2Thessalonians2:9 Lowo ukufika kwakhe kungokokusebenza kukaSathana, ngayo yonke imisebenzi yamandla, nemiqondiso, nezimanga zobuxoki,"
2Thessalonians2:10 nangako ukulukuhla konke kokungalungisi kwabo batshabalalayo; ngokuba bengakwamkelanga ukuyithanda inyaniso, ukuze basindiswe."
2Thessalonians2:11 Ngenxa yoko uThixo uya kubathumela ulahlekiso olusebenza ngamandla, ukuze bakholwe bubuxoki;"
2Thessalonians2:12 ukuze bagwetywe bonke abangakholwanga yiyo inyaniso, basuka bakholiswa kuko ukungalungisi."
2Thessalonians2:13 Ke thina simelwe kukuhlala sibulela kuye uThixo ngenxa yenu, bazalwana bathandiweyo yiNkosi, ukuba uThixo kwasekuqalekeni waninyulela ukusindiswa, ngokungcwalisa koMoya nokukholwa yinyaniso;"
2Thessalonians2:14 awanibizela kuko oko ngazo iindaba ezilungileyo zethu, ukuba nizuze uzuko lweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
2Thessalonians2:15 Ngoko ke, bazalwana, yimani, nizibambe izithethe enazifundiswayo, nokuba kungelizwi, nokuba kungencwadi yethu."
2Thessalonians2:16 Ke kaloku iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu ngokwayo, noThixo uBawo wethu owasithandayo, ngobabalo wasinika intuthuzelo engunaphakade, nethemba elilungileyo;"
2Thessalonians2:17 Wazithuthuzela iintliziyo zenu, anizimase kuwo onke amazwi nemisebenzi elungileyo."
2Thessalonians3:1 Elokugqiba, sithandazeleni, bazalwana, ukuba ilizwi leNkosi likhululeke, lizukiswe, njengoko lenjenjalo nakuni;"
2Thessalonians3:2 nokuba sihlangulwe ebantwini abangendawo, abakhohlakeleyo; kuba ukholo alubantwini bonke."
2Thessalonians3:3 Ithembekile ke yona iNkosi, eya kunizimasa, inigcine kuyo inkohlakalo."
2Thessalonians3:4 Sikholose ngani ke ngokwaseNkosini, ukuba izinto esinithethela zona niyazenza, nabe nisaya kuzenza."
2Thessalonians3:5 Yayingathi iNkosi iintliziyo zenu izikhokelele eluthandweni lukaThixo, nasekunyamezeleni uKrestu."
2Thessalonians3:6 Ke kaloku siyanithethela, bazalwana, egameni leNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, ukuba nikhwebuke kubo bonke abazalwana abahamba ngokunxaxha, bengahambi ngokwesithethe abasamkelayo kuthi."
2Thessalonians3:7 Kuba niyazi ngokwenu, ukuba nimelwe kukuthini na ukusilinganisa; ngokuba asinxaxhanga phakathi kwenu;"
2Thessalonians3:8 Kuba asidlanga sonka samntu ngelize; sisebenza nzima nangemigudu ubusuku nemini, ukuze singabi mthwalo nakubani kuni;"
2Thessalonians3:9 kungekuba singenagunya; senzela ukuba sibe ngumzekelo kuni, ukuze nisilandele."
2Thessalonians3:10 Kuba naxenikweni besikuni, sanithethela ngelithi, Ukuba umntu akathandi kusebenza, makangadli nokudla."
2Thessalonians3:11 Kuba siyeva ukuba inxenye phakathi kwenu ihamba ngokunxaxha, ingasebenzi nento, izifaka kwizinto zabanye."
2Thessalonians3:12 Abanjalo ke siyabathethela, sibavuselela ngayo iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, ukuba bathi, besebenza ngokuzola, badle esisesabo isonka."
2Thessalonians3:13 Ke nina, bazalwana, musani ukutha amandla ekwenzeni okulungileyo."
2Thessalonians3:14 Ukuba ke kukho bani ungalilulameliyo ilizwi lethu ngencwadi le, mqondeni lowo, ningazidibanisi naye, ukuze adane."
2Thessalonians3:15 Noko ke musani ukumgqala njengotshaba;
2Thessalonians3:16 Yaye ke iNkosi yoxolo ngokwayo inganinika uxolo ngamaxa onke, ngeendlela zonke. iNkosi ibe nani nonke."
2Thessalonians3:17 Umbuliso ngesam isandla, mna Pawulos. Nguwo lowo umqondiso kuzo zonke iincwadi; ndenjenjalo ukubhala."
2Thessalonians3:18 Ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu malube nani nonke. Amen. (Incwadi yesibini eya kwabaseTesalonika yabhalwa eAtene.)
1Timothy1:1 uPawulos, umpostile kaYesu Kristu ngokomthetho kaThixo uMsindisi wethu, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, ithemba lethu;"
1Timothy1:2 ubhalela uTimoti, umntwana wakhe kanye ngokwaselukholweni; uthi, Makube lubabalo, inceba, uxolo, oluvela kuThixo uBawo, noKristu Yesu iNkosi yethu."
1Timothy1:3 Njengoko ndakuyalayo ukuba uhlale e-Efese, ndakuba mna ndisiya kwelaseMakedoni, uhlale e-Efese, ukuze ubathethele abanye, bangafundisi mfundiso yimbi;"
1Timothy1:4 kananjalo banganyamekeli zintsomi namilibo yakuzalwa engaphele ndawo, izinto ezo ezibanga iimbuzwano, zisingise elukholweni;"
1Timothy1:5 Ke intsingiselo yomthetho iluthando oluphuma entliziyweni ehlambulukileyo, nasesazeleni esilungileyo, naselukholweni olungahanahanisiyo;"
1Timothy1:6 abathe abathile, beziphosile kuzo, baphambukela ekuthetheni okungento yanto;"
1Timothy1:7 bethanda ukuba ngabafundisi bomthetho; bengaziqondi izinto abazithethayo, kwanezingqinayo."
1Timothy1:8 Siyazi ke ukuba umthetho mhle, ukuba umntu uthi awuphathe ngokomthetho;"
1Timothy1:9 nisazi nje oku, ukuba umthetho lo awuwiselwe lilungisa, uwiselwe abachasene nomthetho, nabangevayo, abangahloneli Thixo, nabangaboni, abangengcwele, abahlambelayo, ababulali ooyise, ababulali oonina, izigwinta;"
1Timothy1:10 Abenzi bombulo, amadoda azenza iinqambi, amasela abantu, amaxoki, amafunga-buxoki, nokuba kukho nto yimbi ichasene nemfundiso ephilileyo;"
1Timothy1:11 ngokweendaba ezilungileyo zozuko lukaThixo osikelelekileyo, endaphathiswa zona mna."
1Timothy1:12 Ndiyambulela uKrestu Yesu iNkosi yethu, owandinika amandla, kuba wandibalela ekuthini ndithembekile, endimisela ebulungiselelini."
1Timothy1:13 Ndandifudula ndingumnyelisi, nomtshutshisi, nomphathi kakubi; ndesuka ndenzelwa inceba, ngokuba ndakwenza oko ndingazi, ndisekungakholweni;"
1Timothy1:14 Yanda ngokuncamisileyo ubabalo lweNkosi yethu, lunokholo nothando olukuKristu Yesu."
1Timothy1:15 Lithembekile ilizwi eli, lifanelwe kukwamkelwa konke, eli lokuba uKristu Yesu weza ehlabathini ukuba asindise aboni; endingomkhulu kubo;"
1Timothy1:16 Noko ke ndesuka ndenzelwa inceba ngenxa yoku, ukuze uYesu Kristu akubonakalalisele kum, mna ungomkhulu, konke ukuzeka kade umsindo, ndibe ngumzekelo kwabo baza kukholwa kuye, base ebomini obungunaphakade."
1Timothy1:17 Kuye uKumkani wawo amaphakade, ongenakonakala, ongenakubonakala, kuThixo olumkileyo yedwa, makubekho imbeko nozuko, kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni. Amen."
1Timothy1:18 Loo myalelo ndiwunika wena Timoti, mntwana wam, ngokweziprofeto ezandulelayo ngawe, ukuze ulwe imfazwe entle ngazo."
1Timothy1:19 Yiba nokholo, nesazela esilungileyo; abathe abathile balululahlile ukholo, baphukelwa ngumkhombe;"
1Timothy1:20 inoHimenayo noAlesandire; endibanikele kuSathana, ukuze bafunde ukunganyelisi."
1Timothy2:1 Ndiyavuselela ngoko kuqala kwiinto zonke, ukuba kwenziwe izikhungo, imithandazo, izibongozo, imibulelo, ngenxa yabantu bonke;"
1Timothy2:2 Ngenxa yookumkani nabo bonke abasekongameni; ukuze sihlale ngokonwaba nangokuzola, sinokuhlonela uThixo, nokundileka konke."
1Timothy2:3 Kuba oku kuhle, kwamkelekile emehlweni oMsindisi wethu uThixo;"
1Timothy2:4 onga yena bangasindiswa bonke abantu, bafikelele ekuyazini inyaniso."
1Timothy2:5 Kuba mnye uThixo, mnye nomlamli phakathi koThixo nabantu, umntu uKristu Yesu;"
1Timothy2:6 lowo wazinikelayo ukuba abe yintlawulelo yokukhulula abantu bonke; ubungqina ke obo bokungqinwa ngamaxesha angawabo;
1Timothy2:7 endithe ndamiselwa bona mna, ukuba ndibe ngumshumayeli nompostile (ndithetha inyaniso ndikuKristu, andixoki), umfundisi weentlanga elukholweni nasenyanisweni."
1Timothy2:8 Ngoko ndinga angathandaza amadoda kuzo zonke iindawo, ephakamisa izandla ezingcwele, engenangqumbo, engenantandabuzo."
1Timothy2:9 Kwangokunjalo mabathi nabafazi banxibe iingubo ezifanelekileyo, beneentloni, benesidima; Ingabi kukuphotha iinwele, nokunxitywa kwegolide neeperile, nesambatho esixabiso likhulu;"
1Timothy2:10 mabathi (ngokufanele abafazi abathi bahlonela uThixo), bavathe imisebenzi elungileyo."
1Timothy2:11 Umfazi makafunde ethe cwaka, enokuzithoba konke."
1Timothy2:12 Kodwa andimvumeli umfazi ukuba afundise, nokuba ayilawule indoda; kodwa makathi cwaka."
1Timothy2:13 Kuba kwabunjwa uAdam kuqala, kwandula ke ukubunjwa uEva."
1Timothy2:14 Ke kaloku akakhohliswanga uAdam, kodwa ngumfazi owalukuhlwayo waba sisigqitho."
1Timothy2:15 Noko ke wosindiswa ngokuzala, ukuba bathe bema elukholweni, naseluthandweni, nasebungcwaliseni, benesidima."
1Timothy3:1 Lithembekile ilizwi eli lithi, Ukuba ubani ungxamele ubuveleli, unqwenela umsebenzi omhle."
1Timothy3:2 Umveleli ngoko umelwe kukuthi abe ngongenakukhalazelwa, eyindoda yamfazi mnye, eyingcathu, enesidima, ezibekile, ebuka iindwendwe, enokufundisa;"
1Timothy3:3 Engasengazilahleli kwiwayini, engengomntu unxanela inzuzo embi; Uzeke kade umsindo, angabi ngolwa, angabi ngabawa;"
1Timothy3:4 eyongamele kakuhle eyakhe indlu, abantwana bakhe bemthobele, benokundileka konke."
1Timothy3:5 (Kuba ukuba umntu akakwazi ukuyongamela eyakhe indlu, angathini na ukuphatha ibandla likaThixo?)"
1Timothy3:6 angabi ngosandula ukuvela, hleze akhukhumele, awele ekugwetyweni nguMtyholi."
1Timothy3:7 Ngaphezu koko ke umelwe kukuthi abe nobungqina obuhle obuvela kwabangaphandle; hleze awele engcikivweni nasesibatheni soMtyholi.
1Timothy3:8 Kwangokunjalo abalungiseleli bamelwe kukuba nokundileka, bangabi ntlolela yombini, bangazinikeli kwiwayini eninzi, bangangxameli nzuzo imbi;"
1Timothy3:9 mababe nemfihlo yokholo esazeleni esihlambulukileyo.
1Timothy3:10 Nabo aba ke mabacikidwe kuqala; mabandule ke benze umsebenzi wobudikoni, bengenakusoleka."
1Timothy3:11 Kwangokunjalo abafazi bamelwe kukuba nokundileka, bangabi ngabahlebi; mababe nesidima, bathembeke ezintweni zonke."
1Timothy3:12 Abalungiseleli mababe ngamadoda abafazi ngabanye, besongamela kakuhle abantwana nezindlu ezizezabo."
1Timothy3:13 Kuba abo balungiselela kakuhle bazizuzela isimo esihle, nokungafihlisi okukhulu ekukholweni kuKristu Yesu."
1Timothy3:14 Ezi zinto ndizibhala kuwe, ndithembe ukuba ndiya kuza kuwe kamsinya."
1Timothy3:15 Ukuba ke ndithe ndalibala, ndikubhalela ukuze wazi, ukuba kumelwe kukuthiwani na ukuhanjwa endlwini kaThixo, yona ilibandla likaThixo ophilileyo, intsika nesiseko sayo inyaniso."
1Timothy3:16 Kananjalo, ngokuvunyiweyo, inkulu imfihlelo yona leyo yokuhlonela uThixo: wabonakalaliswa esenyameni, wagwetyelwa esemoyeni, wabonakala kwizithunywa zezulu, wavakaliswa phakathi kweentlanga, kwakholwa kuye ehlabathini, wenyuswa waba sebuqaqawulini."
1Timothy4:1 Ke kaloku uMoya uthi ngokucacileyo inxenye iya kumka elukholweni, ngamaxesha asemva, inyamekele oomoya abalahlekisayo, neemfundiso zeedemon;"
1Timothy4:2 Othetha ubuxoki ngohanahaniso; betshiswe isazela sabo ngentsimbi;
1Timothy4:3 bengavumi ukuba kuzekwe, nokuba kudliwe izinto ezidalwe nguThixo, ukuba zamkelwe ngombulelo ngabo bakholwayo, bayaziyo inyaniso."
1Timothy4:4 Kuba sonke isidalwa sikaThixo sihle; asiyonto yakulahlwa, ukuba samkelwe ngombulelo;"
1Timothy4:5 Kuba singcwaliswa ngelizwi likaThixo nangomthandazo.
1Timothy4:6 Ukuba uthe ezi zinto wazibeka phambi kwabazalwana, woba ngumlungiseleli omhle kaYesu Kristu, wondliwe ngamazwi okholo, nawemfundiso entle oyilandelayo."
1Timothy4:7 Ke zona iintsomi ezihlambelayo zamaxhegokazi zigatye;
1Timothy4:8 Kuba eyeyomzimba ingqeqesho inceda kancinane; ke kona ukuhlonela uThixo kunceda ngako konke, kunedinga lobomi bakalokunje, nobobo buza kubakho."
1Timothy4:9 Lithembekile ilizwi eli, lifanelwe kukwamkelwa konke."
1Timothy4:10 Kuba sibulalekela, singcikivelwe oko; ngokuba sithembele kuThixo ophilileyo, onguMsindisi wabantu bonke, ngokukodwa owabakholwayo."
1Timothy4:11 Bathethele ezi zinto, ufundise zona."
1Timothy4:12 Makungabikho namnye ubudelayo ubuncinane bakho; suka ube ngumzekelo wabakholwayo ngentetho, ngehambo, ngothando, ngokholo, ngobunyulu."
1Timothy4:13 Nyamekela ukufunda, uvuselelo, imfundiso, ndide ndifike."
1Timothy4:14 Ungasihilizeli isipho esingokubabalwa, esikuwe; owasinikwayo ngesiprofeto, kunye nokubekwa izandla yintlanganiso yamadoda amakhulu."
1Timothy4:15 Zinyamekele ezo zinto; zinikezele ngokupheleleyo kuzo; ukuze ukuphumelela kwakho kubonakale kwinto yonke.
1Timothy4:16 Zilumkele wena nemfundiso yakho; hlala uhleli kuzo; kuba ngokwenza oko, wozisindisa wena, ubasindise nabo bakuvayo."
1Timothy5:1 Indoda enkulu musa ukuyithethisa kabukhali, yiyale njengoyihlo; amancinane, njengabazalwana;"
1Timothy5:2 Abafazi abakhulu, njengoonyoko; abancinane, njengoodade, unobunyulu bonke."
1Timothy5:3 Babeke abahlolokazi abangabahlolokazi ngenene.
1Timothy5:4 Ke ukuba kukho mhlolokazi uthile unabantwana, nokuba ngabazukulwana, ukuqala mabafunde ukuhlonela elabo ikhaya, bababuyekezele umbuyekezo ooninakhulu; kuba oko kuhle, kwamkelekile emehlweni kaThixo."
1Timothy5:5 Ke yena ongumhlolokazi ngenene, eshiywe yedwa, uthembela kuThixo;"
1Timothy5:6 Kodwa yena oxhamla iziyolo ufile, nakuba ngathi udla ubomi."
1Timothy5:7 Bathethele ezi zinto, ukuze bangabi nakusoleka."
1Timothy5:8 Ukuba ke umntu akabakhathalele abakhe, ngokukodwa abendlu yakhe, ulukhanyele ukholo, unobubi ngaphezu kongakholwayo."
1Timothy5:9 Makangabalelwa enanini lomhlolokazi ongaphantsi kweminyaka emashumi mathandathu, engumfazi wandoda-nye;"
1Timothy5:10 engqinelwe ngemisebenzi emihle; ukuba wondle abantwana, ukuba wamkele iindwendwe, ukuba uzihlambile iinyawo zabangcwele, ukuba ubasizile ababandezelweyo, ukuba usukelene nemisebenzi yonke elungileyo."
1Timothy5:11 Ke bona abahlolokazi abatsha bamangale; kuba xa bathe badimala kuKristu, baya kutshata;"
1Timothy5:12 benesigwebo ngenxa yokuba belulahle ukholo lwabo lokuqala.
1Timothy5:13 Kunye noko ke bafunda ukungasebenzi nto, bethungelana nezindlu; banganeli kungasebenzi nto kodwa, besuka kananjalo babe ngamapholopholo, bazifake kwizinto zabanye, bathethe izinto ezingafanelekileyo."
1Timothy5:14 Ngoko ndinga abahlolokazi abatsha bangenda, bazale, babe ngabanikazi-mizi, bangamniki ochasayo nalinye ithuba lokutshabhisa."
1Timothy5:15 Kuba inxenye iseyiphambukele emva koSathana.
1Timothy5:16 Ukuba kukho abahlolokazi abakholwayo, indoda nokuba yinkosikazi, makabancede, bangathwali ibandla; ukuze ibasize abahlolokazi okwenyaniso."
1Timothy5:17 Amadoda amakhulu alongamela kakuhle makabalelwe ekuthini afanelwe yimbeko ephindiweyo, ngokukodwa lawo abulalekayo elizwini nasemfundisweni."
1Timothy5:18 Kuba isibhalo sithi, Uze ungayibophi umlomo inkomo ibhula; nokuthi, Umsébenzi uwufanele umvuzo wakhe."
1Timothy5:19 Ukumangalelwa kwendoda enkulu musa ukukwamkela, kungabangakho mangqina mabini nokuba mathathu."
1Timothy5:20 Abo bonayo, bohlwaye emehlweni abantu bonke, ukuze nabanye aba babe nokoyika."
1Timothy5:21 Ndiyakuyala phambi koThixo, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, nezithunywa zezulu ezinyuliweyo, ukuba uzigcine ezi zinto ungaqali ugwebe, ungenzi nto ngokwayama bani."
1Timothy5:22 Uze ungabeki mntu izandla ngesiquphe, ungadlelani nabo ngezono zabanye; zigcine nyulu."
1Timothy5:23 Musa ukuba sasela manzi; sela intwana yewayini, ngenxa yesisu sakho, nobulwelwe bakho obufuthi."
1Timothy5:24 Izono zabanye abantu zisekuhleni kanye, ziyandulela ukuya emgwebeni; abanye bayawalandela."
1Timothy5:25 Kwangokunjalo nemisebenzi emihle isekuhleni kanye; nezingenjalo azinakufihlakala.
1Timothy6:1 Onke ke amakhoboka aphantsi kwedyokhwe, ndinga ke angababalela abaniniwo ekuthini, bafanelwe yimbeko yonke, ukuze igama likaThixo nemfundiso inganyeliswa."
1Timothy6:2 Lawo ke ankosi zikholiweyo, makangazideli ngakuba zingabazalwana; kanye ke bakhonze, ngenxa yokuba bethembekile, beziintanda, babelana ngenzuzo. Bafundise ezi zinto, uvuselele."
1Timothy6:3 Ukuba nabani na ufundisa enye into, kwaye engavumelani namazwi aphilileyo angaweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, kunye nemfundiso engokobuthixo;"
1Timothy6:4 unekratshi, engazi nto;"
1Timothy6:5 Iimpikiswano ezigwenxa zabantu abonakele iingqiqo, abahluthwe inyaniso, beba ukuhlonela uThixo kukuzuzela inzuzo embi."
1Timothy6:6 Ke kona ukuhlonela uThixo, kundawonye nokwanela, kusekeleze inzuzo enkulu."
1Timothy6:7 Kuba sibe singangenanga nanto ehlabathini; kananjalo asinakuphuma nanto.
1Timothy6:8 Sinento ke edliwayo neyambathwayo, masaneliswe zezo zinto."
1Timothy6:9 Abo banga bangaba zizityebi, beyela ekuhendweni, nasesibatheni, nasezinkanukweni ezininzi ezibubudenge ezenzakalisayo; zona zibatshonisayo abantu ekonakaleni, nasekutshabalaleni."
1Timothy6:10 Kuba ukuthanda imali yingcambu yeento zonke ezimbi: abathe abathile, ngokuzolukileyo, balahlekana nokholo, bazibhodloza ngobuhlungu obuninzi."
1Timothy6:11 Ke wena, mntu kaThixo, zibaleke ezo zinto; phuthuma ubulungisa, ukuhlonela uThixo, ukholo, uthando, umonde, ubulali."
1Timothy6:12 Yilwa umlo omhle wokholo, bubambe ubomi obungunaphakade, owabizelwa kubo, waza wenza uvumo lwasesidlangalaleni oluhle phambi kwamangqina amaninzi."
1Timothy6:13 Ndiyakuthethela phambi koThixo lowo uzidlisa ubomi zonke izinto, naphambi koYesu Krestu, owangqina uvumo lwesivumo esihle phambi koPontiyo Pilato,"
1Timothy6:14 ukuba uwugcine lo mthetho, ungabi nabala, ungabi nakusoleka, ide ifike iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu;"
1Timothy6:15 aya kubonakaliswa ngamaxesha akhe, lo ungowokuphela kwakhe onegunya, uKumkani kakumkani, uNkosi kankosi;"
1Timothy6:16 okuphela konokungafi, ehleli ekukhanyeni, ekungekho namnye unako ukusondela kuye; ekungekho namnye wakha wambona, nonako ukumbona; kuye makubekho imbeko namandla angunaphakade. Amen."
1Timothy6:17 Bathethele abazizityebi kweli hlabathi ukuba bangaphakami, bangathembeli butyebini bungagqalekiyo, mabathembele kuThixo ophilileyo, obeka phambi kwethu zonke izinto ngokobutyebi, ukuba zidliwe;"
1Timothy6:18 benze okulungileyo, babe zizityebi zemisebenzi emihle, babe nokwaba, babe nobudlelane;"
1Timothy6:19 baziqwebele isiseko esihle, base exesheni eliza kuza, ukuze babubambe ubomi obungunaphakade."
1Timothy6:20 Timoti, loo nto uyiphathisiweyo yigcine, uphambuke ezintethweni ezingento, ezihlambelayo, nakwiinkcaso zemfundo leyo, kubizwa ngokuba kuxokwa;"
1Timothy6:21 abasuke abathile bethe banako, baluphosa ukholo. Ubabalo malube nawe. Amen. (Eyokuqala eya kuTimoti yabhalwa eLawodike, eyona dolophu inkulu eFrigiya Pacatiana.)"
2Timothy1:1 uPawulos, umpostile kaYesu Kristu ngokuthanda kukaThixo, ngokwedinga lobomi obukuKristu Yesu,"
2Timothy1:2 ubhalela uTimoti, unyana wam oyintanda; uthi, Makube lubabalo, inceba, uxolo, oluvela kuThixo uYise, noKristu Yesu iNkosi yethu."
2Timothy1:3 Ndiyabulela kuye uThixo, endamkhonzayo kwakoomawokhulu ndinesazela esihlambulukileyo, ndikukhumbula njengokungapheliyo, ekukhungeni kwam ubusuku nemini;"
2Timothy1:4 Ndilangazelela ukunga ndingakubona, ndizikhumbula nje iinyembezi zakho, ukuze ndizaliswe luvuyo;"
2Timothy1:5 Ndikhunjuzwa nje ukholo olukuwe olungenakuhanahanisa, lona lwahlalayo kuqala kunyokokhulu uLoyisi, nakunyoko uYunike; ndeyisekile ke kukuba nakuwe."
2Timothy1:6 Endithi ngenxa yelo thuba ndikukhumbuze, ukuba usikhwezele isipho sokubabalwa kwakho nguThixo, esikhoyo kuwe ngokubekwa kwezandla zam phezu kwakho."
2Timothy1:7 Kuba uThixo akasinikanga moya wabugwala; koko ngamandla, nangothando, nangengqondo ephilileyo."
2Timothy1:8 Ngoko ke musa ukuba nazintloni ngabo ubungqina beNkosi yethu, nangam, mna mbanjwa wayo;"
2Timothy1:9 owasisindisayo, wasibiza ngobizo olungcwele, engenzi ngokwemisebenzi yethu, esenza ngokweyakhe ingqibo, nobabalo, esababalwa ngalo ngoKristu Yesu phambi kwamaxesha aphakade."
2Timothy1:10 Kodwa ngoku yabonakaliswa ngokubonakala koMsindisi wethu uYesu Krestu, owakubhangisayo ukufa, waza waveza ubomi nokungonakali ekukhanyeni ngazo iindaba ezilungileyo;"
2Timothy1:11 endithe ndamiselwa bona mna, ukuba ndibe ngumshumayeli nompostile nomfundisi weentlanga."
2Timothy1:12 Kungenxa yoko le nto ndibandezelekayo; noko ke andinazintloni, kuba ndiyamazi endikholiweyo nguye; kananjalo ndeyisekile kukuba unako ukuyigcina into endimphathisileyo, ese kuloo mini."
2Timothy1:13 Umzekelo wamazwi aphilileyo owawevayo kum, wubambe elukholweni naseluthandweni olukuKristu Yesu."
2Timothy1:14 Loo nto ilungileyo uyiphathisiweyo, yigcine ngoMoya oyiNgcwele ohleliyo ngaphakathi kwethu."
2Timothy1:15 Oku uyakwazi, ukuba bandinikele umva bonke abaseAsiya; ekubo inguFigelo noHermogene."
2Timothy1:16 iNkosi mayiyenzele inceba indlu kaOnesiforo; ngokuba kwaba futhi endiphumza, akaba nazintloni nguwo umxokelelwane wam."
2Timothy1:17 Uthe akuba eseRoma, wandifuna ngokukhuthala okukhulu, wandifumana."
2Timothy1:18 Yanga iNkosi ingamfumanisa inceba eNkosini ngaloo mini. Wena uzazi kakuhle oko zingako izinto awalungiselela ngazo e-Efese.
2Timothy2:1 Wena ngoko, mntwana wam, yomelela elubabalweni olukuKristu Yesu;"
2Timothy2:2 uthi nezinto owazivayo kum ngamangqina amaninzi, ezo uzibeke phambi kwabantu abathembekileyo, bona baya kukulingana ukufundisa nabanye."
2Timothy2:3 Wena ngoko bunyamezele ububi, njengomphumi-mkhosi olungileyo kaKristu Yesu."
2Timothy2:4 Akukho namnye uthi emfazweni azibhijele ngemicimbi yobu bomi; ukuze amkholise lowo umnyulele ukulwa.
2Timothy2:5 Nakuba ke ubani esithi azame emdlalweni, akathweswa sithsaba, ukuba akathanga azame ngokomthetho."
2Timothy2:6 Umlimi lowo ubulalekayo, umelwe kukwamkela kuqala kwiziqhamo."
2Timothy2:7 Ziqiqe izinto endizithethayo; iNkosi yokunika ukuqonda ezintweni zonke.
2Timothy2:8 Khumbula ukuba uYesu Krestu wavuka kwabafileyo, engowembewu kaDavide, ngokweendaba zam ezilungileyo."
2Timothy2:9 Endiva ububi ngenxa yazo, kude kuse ezintanjeni njengomenzi wobubi; ke lona ilizwi likaThixo alibotshiwe."
2Timothy2:10 Ngenxa yoko izinto zonke ndiyazinyamezela ngenxa yabanyuliweyo, ukuze nabo bazuze usindiso olukuKristu Yesu, ndawonye nozuko olungunaphakade."
2Timothy2:11 Lithembekile ilizwi eli lithi, Kuba xa safa naye, sodla ubomi kwandawonye naye;"
