2Timothy2:12 ukuba siyanyamezela, solawula kwandawonye naye; ukuba siyamkhanyela, naye wosikhanyela;"
2Timothy2:13 Ukuba asikholwa, yena uhleli ethembekile; akanako ukuzikhanyeza."
2Timothy2:14 Bakhumbuze ezo zinto, uqononondise emehlweni eNkosi, ukuba kungenziwa mfazwe yamazwi okungancedi lutho, kuze kubhukuqeke abaphulaphuli."
2Timothy2:15 Kukhuthalele ukuzimisa phambi koThixo ucikidekile, ungumsebénzi ongenazintloni, ulungisa ukulahlula ilizwi lenyaniso."
2Timothy2:16 Ke zona iintetho ezingento, ezihlambelayo, zinxweme; kuba ziya kuhambela phambili kokukhona kungahloneli Thixo."
2Timothy2:17 Nelizwi labo liya kudla njengesilonda esiqhenqethayo; abanoHimenayo noFileto;
2Timothy2:18 abathe bona bayiphosa inyaniso, besithi uvuko seluthe lwakho; silubhukuqa ukholo lwenxenye."
2Timothy2:19 Noko ke limi, lithe nkqi, ilitye lesiseko likaThixo, linambhalo othi, iNkosi iyabazi abangabayo. Kwanokuthi, Mabahlukane nobugwenxa, bonke abalibizayo igama likaKristu."
2Timothy2:20 Ke endlwini enkulu akubikho zitya zagolide nazasilivere zodwa; kubakho nezomthi nezomdongwe. Inxenye ke zezembeko, inxenye azizambeko."
2Timothy2:21 Ukuba ke umntu uthe wazikhuphulula kwezo zinto, woba sisitya sembeko, singcwalisiwe, simlungele kakuhle umninindlu, silungiselwe wonke umsebenzi olungileyo."
2Timothy2:22 Ke zibaleke iinkanuko zobutsha, phuthuma ubulungisa, ukholo, uthando, uxolo nabo bayinqulayo iNkosi ngokwasentliziyweni ehlambulukileyo."
2Timothy2:23 Yinxweme imibuzwana yobudenge engenangqeqesho, usazi ukuba izala imfazwe."
2Timothy2:24 Ke umkhonzi weNkosi akamele kusukuzana; kodwa abe nokuthantamisa kubo bonke, enokufundisa, enomonde;"
2Timothy2:25 Uyabaqeqesha ngobulali abo baphikayo; ukuba mhlawumbi uThixo angabanika inguquko esa ekuyazini inyaniso;
2Timothy2:26 babuye baqabuke, baphume emgibeni kaMtyholi, ababanjiswe nguye ekuthandeni kwakhe."
2Timothy3:1 Ke, kwazi oku, ukuba ngemihla yokugqibela kuya kufika amaxesha anomngcipheko."
2Timothy3:2 Kuba abantu baya kuba ngabazithandayo, ababawayo, abaqhayisi, abanekratshi, abanyelisi, abangeva bazali, abangenambulelo, abangengcwele;"
2Timothy3:3 ngaphandle komsa wemvelo, abachasi boxolo, abatyholi, abangenakuzeyisa, iindlobongela, abangabafuniyo abalungileyo;"
2Timothy3:4 abancethezi, izityhuthutyhuthu, abathiwe lwale likratshi, abathandi beziyolo kunokuba bathande uThixo;"
2Timothy3:5 benokumila kokuhlonela uThixo, ukanti bewakhanyela amandla ako;"
2Timothy3:6 Kuba kwabalulo kwabo abo banyebelezela ezindlwini, bathimbe abafazi abasisidenge, abasindwe zizono, beqhutywa ziinkanuko ngeenkanuko;"
2Timothy3:7 Uhlala efunda, kodwa akanako ukufika ekuyazini inyaniso."
2Timothy3:8 Kwangolo hlobo ke, bathi ooYanes noYambres bamchasa uMoses, ngokunjalo nabo aba bayayichasa inyaniso. Bangabantu abonakele iingqiqo, abangenakucikideka ngakulo ukholo."
2Timothy3:9 Abayi kuhambela phambili ngakumbi; kuba ukungabi nangqiqo kwabo kuya kubonakala kubantu bonke, njengokuba kwaba njalo okwabo."
2Timothy3:10 Ke wena uyayazi imfundiso yam, ihambo, ingqibo, ukholo, ukuzeka kade umsindo, uthando, unyamezelo,"
2Timothy3:11 Iintshutshiso, iintlungu ezinjengezo zandihlelayo kwa-Antiyokwe, eIkoniyo, eListra; ukutshutshiswa okunjengoko ndakuthwalayo, yaza iNkosi yandihlangula kuko konke."
2Timothy3:12 Nabo bonke ke abathanda ukuhlala ngokuhlonela uThixo kuKristu Yesu baya kutshutshiswa.
2Timothy3:13 Ke bona abantu abangendawo noosiyazi, kukhona baya kuhambela phambili ebubini, belahlekisa, belahlekiswa."
2Timothy3:14 Wena ke, hlala kwizinto owazifundayo, waqiniseka ngazo, ukuba wazi ukuba ufunde kubani na;"
2Timothy3:15 nokuba uzaze kwasebuntwaneni izibhalo ezingcwele, ezinako ukukulumkisela elusindisweni ngokukholwa kuKristu Yesu."
2Timothy3:16 Sonke isibhalo, siphefumlelwe nguThixo nje, sikwancedela ukufundisa, ukohlwaya, ukululeka, ukuqeqesha okusebulungiseni,"
2Timothy3:17 ukuze umntu kaThixo afaneleke, exhobele wonke umsebenzi olungileyo."
2Timothy4:1 Ndiyaqononondisa mna ngoko emehlweni kaThixo, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, oza kugweba abaphilileyo nabafileyo, kwanangokubonakala kwakhe nobukumkani bakhe."
2Timothy4:2 Lishumayele ilizwi; yomelela ngexesha elililo, ngexesha elililo; yohlwaya, khalimela, vuselela ngako konke ukuzeka kade umsindo nokufundisa."
2Timothy4:3 Kuba kuya kubakho ixesha abangayi kuyinyamezela imfundiso ephilileyo; baya kusuka ngokweenkanuko zabo bazifumbele abafundisi, bebaba iindlebe;"
2Timothy4:4 babeya kuzisonga zimke iindlebe kuyo inyaniso, baphambukele ke kuzo iintsomi."
2Timothy4:5 Ke wena yiba yingcathu ezintweni zonke, nyamezela ububi, umsebenzi womshumayeli weendaba ezilungileyo wenze, buzalise ubulungiseleli bakho."
2Timothy4:6 Kuba mna sendithululwa ngokomnikelo; nalo ixesha lokunduluka kwam likufuphi.
2Timothy4:7 Umzamo omhle ndiwuzamile, ugqatso ndilufezile, ukholo ndilugcinile;"
2Timothy4:8 Okokugqibela ndibekelwe isithsaba sobulungisa, eya kundibuyisela ngaso ngaloo mini iNkosi, umgwebi olilungisa; ingabi ndim ndedwa ke, ibe ngabo bonke abakuthandayo ukubonakala kwayo."
2Timothy4:9 Khawuleza uze kum kamsinya;
2Timothy4:10 kuba uDemas wandishiya ngokuthanda iphakade langoku, waya eTesalonika; uKreske uye kwelaseGalati, uTito uye kwelaseDalmati."
2Timothy4:11 NguLuka yedwa onam. Thabatha uMarko uze naye; kuba unokundinceda kakuhle emsebenzini.
2Timothy4:12 Ke kaloku uTikiko ndimthumele e-Efese.
2Timothy4:13 Ingubo endayishiya eTrowa kuKarpo, uze uyiphathe ekuzeni kwakho, neencwadi ezo, ngokukodwa ezezintsu."
2Timothy4:14 uAlesandire, umkhandi wobhedu, wandenza ububi obuninzi;"
2Timothy4:15 Mlumkele nawe; ngokuba wawachase kunene amazwi ethu.
2Timothy4:16 Kokokuqala ukuziphendulela kwam, akubangakho namnye unam, basuka bonke bandishiya;"
2Timothy4:17 Noko ke iNkosi yandinceda, yandomeleza; ukuze ngam uvakaliso lweendaba ezilungileyo luzaliseke, neentlanga zonke zive; ndaza ndahlangulwa emlonyeni wengonyama."
2Timothy4:18 Yandihlangula yona iNkosi kuwo wonke umsebenzi ongendawo, indisindisele ebukumkanini bayo obusemazulwini; kuyo makubekho uzuko, kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni. Amen."
2Timothy4:19 Bulisa kuPriska noAkwila, nakwindlu kaOnesiforo."
2Timothy4:20 uErasto wasala eKorinte, kodwa uTrofimo ndamshiya eMileto egula."
2Timothy4:21 Khawuleza uze, kungekabi sebusika. Uyakubulisa uYubhulo, noPudens, noLino, noKlawudiya, nabo abazalwana bonke."
2Timothy4:22 iNkosi uYesu Krestu mayibe nomoya wakho. Ubabalo malube nani. Amen. (Incwadi yesibini eya kuTimoti, owamiselwa ubhishophu wokuqala webandla lase-Efese, yabhalwa eRoma, xa uPawulos waziswa phambi koNero okwesibini.)"
Titus1:1 uPawulos, umkhonzi kathixo, umpostile ke kaYesu Kristu, ngokokholo lwabanyulwa bakaThixo, nokuyazi inyaniso engokokuhlonela uThixo;"
Titus1:2 ngethemba lobomi obungunaphakade, awathi uThixo, ongenakuxoka, wabubeka idinga kwaphambi kwamaxesha aphakade;"
Titus1:3 Walibonakalalisa ke ilizwi lakhe ngamaxesha amisiweyo, ngesigidimi endasiphathiswa mna, ngokomthetho kaThixo uMsindisi wethu;"
Titus1:4 ubhalela uTito, umntwana wam wenene ngokwaselukholweni, esinobudlelane ngalo: Makube lubabalo, nenceba, noxolo oluvela kuThixo uYise, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
Titus1:5 Ndakushiya eKrete ngenxa yoku, ukuze uhambise ukuzilungisa izinto eziseleyo, umise amadoda amakhulu kwimizi ngemizi, njengoko ndakumisela ngako mna;"
Titus1:6 ukuba umntu ungongenakumangaleleka, eyindoda yamfazi mnye enabantwana abakholiweyo, abangamiselwa tyala lakuzibhubhisa, abangaswele kuthobela mntu."
Titus1:7 Kuba umveleli umelwe kukuba ngongenakumangaleleka, njengegosa likaThixo; ungengazithandi, ucaphuka msinya;"
Titus1:8 Umelwe kukuthi abe ngobuka iindwendwe, umthandi wokulungileyo, onesidima, olilungisa, ongcwele, ozingcayo;"
Titus1:9 ebambelele ezwini elithembekileyo ngokwemfundiso, ukuze abe nako ukuvuselela ngayo imfundiso ephilileyo, nokubohlwaya badane abaphikayo."
Titus1:10 Kuba baninzi abathetha izinto ezingento, nabakhohlisayo, ngokukodwa abo bolwaluko;"
Titus1:11 abamelwe kukuvingcwa imilomo; abathi izindlu ziphela bazibhukuqe, befundisa izinto ezingafanelekileyo ngenxa yenzuzo embi."
Titus1:12 Uthi omnye wabo, kwaumprofeti wakowabo, AmaKrete ahlala engamaxoki, amarhamncwa amabi, amarhamncwa axhwalekileyo."
Titus1:13 Obu bungqina buyinene. Ngenxa yoko bohlwaye kabukhali, badane, ukuze baphile elukholweni;"
Titus1:14 banganyamekeli zintsomi zabuYuda, namithetho yabantu abayinikela umva inyaniso."
Titus1:15 Zonke izinto zihlambulukile kwabahlambulukileyo; kwabadyobhekileyo nabangakholwayo, akukho nto ihlambulukileyo; kusuke kwadyobheka nengqiqo nesazela sabo."
Titus1:16 Bayavuma ukuba bayamazi uThixo; kanti ngayo imisebenzi bayamkhanyela, bengamasikizi, bengabangevayo, nakumsebenzi wonke olungileyo bengenakucikideka."
Titus2:1 Ke wena, thetha izinto eziyifaneleyo imfundiso ephilileyo;"
Titus2:2 ukuba amadoda amakhulu abe ziingcathu, andileke, abe nesidima, aphile elukholweni, eluthandweni, ekunyamezeleni;"
Titus2:3 kwangokunjalo abafazi abakhulu mababe nesimilo esibafaneleyo, bangabi ngabatyholi; bangazilahleli kwiwayini eninzi;"
Titus2:4 ukuze bafundise abafazana ukuba babe nesidima, bawathande amadoda abo, babathande abantwana babo;"
Titus2:5 babe nesidima, babe nyulu, bagcine ezindlwini zabo, babe nokulunga, bawathobele awabo amadoda, ukuze ilizwi likaThixo linganyeliswa."
Titus2:6 Kwangokunjalo amadoda amatsha wayale ukuba abe nesidima.
Titus2:7 Ezintweni zonke uze uzibonakalise ungumzekelo wemisebenzi emihle: emfundisweni ubonakala ekungonakali, ukundileka, nokunyaniseka,"
Titus2:8 Ilizwi eliphilileyo, elingenakugwetywa; ukuze ochasayo abe neentloni, engenanto imbi yakuthetha ngani."
Titus2:9 Amakhoboka wathethele ukuba azithobele iinkosi zawo, abe ngakholekileyo kakuhle ezintweni zonke, engaphenduli kwakhona;"
Titus2:10 ingabi ngeentlondi, isuke ibonakalalise konke ukuthembeka okulungileyo; ukuze bayivathise imfundiso yoMsindisi wethu uThixo ezintweni zonke."
Titus2:11 Kuba lubonakele kubantu bonke ubabalo lukaThixo, lulolusindisayo;"
Titus2:12 lusiqeqesha ukuze sithi, sikuncama ukungahloneli Thixo nokukhanuka okukokwehlabathi, sihlale ngokunesidima, nangokubulungisa, nangokuhlonela uThixo, kweli phakade langoku;"
Titus2:13 silinde ithemba elinoyolo, nembonakalo yobuqaqawuli boThixo omkhulu, uMsindisi wethu uYesu Kristu;"
Titus2:14 owazinikelayo ngenxa yethu, ukuze asikhulule kubo bonke ubugwenxa, asihlambululele abantu abayinqobo kuye, abazondelela imisebenzi emihle."
Titus2:15 Ezi zinto zithethe, uvuselele, wohlwaye ngawo wonke ummiselo. Makungabikho namnye ukudelayo;"
Titus3:1 Bakhumbuze ukuba bathobele oozilawuli noomagunya, bathobele abathetheli, bawulungele wonke umsebenzi olungileyo;"
Titus3:2 Mabanganyelisi mntu, bangabi nakulwa, babe nokuthantamisa, bebonakala benobulali bonke kubantu bonke."
Titus3:3 Kaloku nathi besifudula sizizidenge, singeva, silahlekiswa, sikhonza iinkanuko neziyolo ngeenkanuko, siphila ebubini nasekhweleni, sithiyayo."
Titus3:4 Kwathi ke emva koko kwabonakala ububele nothando lukaThixo, uMsindisi wethu, kubantu;"
Titus3:5 kungengamisebenzi yobulungisa esayenzayo thina, kungokwenceba yakhe, wasisindisa ngentlambululo yokuzalwa ngokutsha, nangokuhlaziya koMoya oyiNgcwele;"
Titus3:6 Owasithululayo phezu kwethu ngokobutyebi, ngoYesu Kristu uMsindisi wethu;"
Titus3:7 ukuze sithi, sigwetyelwe ngobabalo lwakhe, sibe ziindlalifa zobomi obungunaphakade ngokwethemba."
Titus3:8 Lithembekile ilizwi elo; nezo zinto ndinga ungaziqinisela, ukuze banyameke, benze imisebenzi emihle, abo bakholiweyo kuThixo. Ezo zinto zilungile, zinokubanceda abantu."
Titus3:9 Kodwa yona imibuzo yobudenge, nemilibo yokuzalwa, neenkani, nokulwa ngawo umthetho, zinxweme, kuba azincedi nganto, zililize."
Titus3:10 Umntu ongumahlukanisi emva kokululekwa kokuqala nokwesibini mmangale;
Titus3:11 usazi nje ukuba onjalo ugwenxeke kwaphela; uyona, ezigwebile ngokwakhe."
Titus3:12 Xa ndithe ndathuma kuwe uArtemas, nokuba nguTikiko, khawuleza uze kum eNikopoli; kuba ndigqibe kwelokuba ndobudlulisa ubusika khona apho."
Titus3:13 uZenas, umqondisi-mthetho, noApolos, baxhobisele indlela ngokunyameka, ukuze bangasweli nto."
Titus3:14 Kwanewethu ke masifunde ukuhlala sisenza imisebenzi emihle, siswele amandla, singabi ngabaswele isiqhamo."
Titus3:15 Bayakubulisa bonke abanam. Ndibulisele kwabasithandayo ngokwaselukholweni. Ubabalo malube nani nonke. Amen. (Yabhalelwa uTito, owamiselwa ukuba abe ngubhishophu wokuqala webandla lamaKrete, eNikopolis yaseMakedoni.)"
Philemon1:1 uPawulos, umbanjwa kaYesu Kristu, noTimoti umzalwana, babhalela uFilemon intanda yethu, ongumsebenzi wethu;"
Philemon1:2 Sibhalela uApiya oyintanda, noArkipo umphumi-mkhosi wethu, nakulo ibandla elisendlwini yakho;"
Philemon1:3 bathi, Makube lubabalo kuni, noxolo oluvela kuThixo uBawo wethu, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
Philemon1:4 Ndihlala ndibulela kuye uThixo wam, ndikukhankanya emithandazweni yam ngamaxesha onke;"
Philemon1:5 Ndiluvile nje uthando lwakho nokholo onalo kuyo iNkosi uYesu nakubo bonke abangcwele,"
Philemon1:6 ukuze ubudlelane bokholo lwakho bube nokusebenza ngokwazi konke okulungileyo okukuni, okuKristu Yesu."
Philemon1:7 Kuba sinovuyo nothuthuzeleko olukhulu ngalo uthando lwakho, ngokuba izibilini zabangcwele ziphunyuziwe ngawe, mzalwana."
Philemon1:8 Ngoko ke, nangona ndinobuganga obukhulu kuKristu, ukuba ndikuthethele into esukuba ifanelekile,"
Philemon1:9 noko ngenxa yothando ndisuka kanye ndikubongoze, ndingonjengoPawulos ixhego, ngoku ke ndikwangumbanjwa kaYesu Kristu."
Philemon1:10 Ndikubongoza ngenxa yonyana wam uOnesimo, endimzeleyo ndisezintanjeni;"
Philemon1:11 obefudula engeluncedo lwanto kuwe, kodwa ngoku kuwe nakum."
Philemon1:12 Endimbuyisele kuye, wena ke mamkele, oko kukuthi, izibilini zam;"
Philemon1:13 ebendinga ndingaya kuhlala nam, ukuze athi esikhundleni sakho andilungiselele, ndisezintanjeni ngenxa yeendaba ezilungileyo ezi;"
Philemon1:14 Kodwa andithandanga kwenza nto ngaphandle kwakho; ukuze ukulunga kwakho kungangi kokokunyanzelwa, kube kokokuvuma."
Philemon1:15 Kuba mhlawumbi waphuma umzuzwana, ukuze umzuze ngokwaphakade;"
Philemon1:16 Engasenjengekhoboka, esuke wangaphezu kwekhoboka, engumzalwana oyintanda, ngokukodwa kum; kubeke phi na ke kuwe, ngokwenyama nangokweNkosi?"
Philemon1:17 Ngoko ke, ukuba unobudlelane nam, mamkele njengam."
Philemon1:18 Ukuba wakona, nokuba unetyala kuwe, oko kubalele kum."
Philemon1:19 Mna Pawulos ndikubhale ngesam isandla ukuthi, mna ndokuhlawula; endingatshoyo kuwe ukuthi, kum unetyala elingaphezulu, elinguwe ngokwakho."
Philemon1:20 Ewe, mzalwana, mandincedeke ngawe mna ngokwaseNkosini; ziphumze izibilini zam ngokwaseNkosini."
Philemon1:21 Ndikubhalele ndeyisekile kukundilulamela kwakho, ndisazi ukuba ùya kwenza nangaphezulu koko ndikuthethayo."
Philemon1:22 Kunye ke noko, ndilungisele indawo yokuhlala; kuba ndithembile ukuba ngayo imithandazo yenu nondiphiwa."
Philemon1:23 Uyakubulisa uEpafra, umbanjwa ndawonye nam wakwaKristu Yesu."
Philemon1:24 uMarko, uAristarko, uDemas, uLucas, abasebenzisi bam."
Philemon1:25 Ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu malube nomoya wenu. Amen. (Yabhalwa eRoma isiya kuFilemon, nguOnesimo umkhonzi.)"
Hebrews1:1 uThixo wayethethile nje kudala, nangeendlela ezininzi, koobawo ngabo oobawo ngabaprofeti;"
Hebrews1:2 Ngale mihla yokugqibela uthe wathetha nathi ngoNyana wakhe, awammisayo ukuba abe yindlalifa yeento zonke, awathi kwangaye wawenza amahlabathi;"
Hebrews1:3 othe, elubengezelo lobuqaqawuli bakhe, nombhalo wenkqu yakhe, ezithwele nokuzithwala zonke izinto ngalo ilizwi lamandla akhe, wesuka, akuba eyenzile ngokwakhe intlambululo yezono, wahlala phantsi ngasekunene kobuKhulu, enyangweni;"
Hebrews1:4 ethe waba ngonamandla ngaphezu kwezithunywa zezulu, ngangoko azuze ilifa legama eligqithiseleyo kunelazo."
Hebrews1:5 Kuba sisiphi na isithunywa, awakha wathi kuso, UnguNyana wam wena, Mna ndikuzele namhla? Nokuthi, Mna ndiya kuba nguYise kuye, Yena abe nguNyana wam?"
Hebrews1:6 Nangexa athi amngenise owamazibulo kwelimiweyo, uthi, Maziqubude kuye zonke izithunywa zikaThixo."
Hebrews1:7 Ngokuphathelele kwizithunywa zezulu uthi: “Ulozenza izithunywa zakhe imimoya, nabalungiseleli bakhe ilangatye lomlilo."
Hebrews1:8 Kuye yena uNyana uthi, Itrone yakho, Thixo, ingunaphakade kanaphakade; yintonga yobulungisa intonga yobukumkani bakho."
Hebrews1:9 Uthanda ubulungisa, uthiye okungendawo; Ngenxa yoko, uThixo, uThixo wakho, ukuthambise Ngeoli yomhlali ngaphezu kwabalingane bakho."
Hebrews1:10 Kananjalo wathi, Wena, Nkosi, waliseka ihlabathi kwasekuqalekeni; Liyimisebenzi yezandla zakho izulu;"
Hebrews1:11 Ezo zinto ziya kutshabalala; ke wena uhlala uhleli; Aye onke njengengubo eya konakala;
Hebrews1:12 Uya kuzisonga njengesambatho, ziguqulwe; ke wena ukwanguwe, neminyaka yakho ayiyi kuphela."
Hebrews1:13 Sisiphi na ke isithunywa, awakha wathi kuso, Hlala ngasekunene kwam, Ndide iintshaba zakho ndizenze isihlalo seenyawo zakho?"
Hebrews1:14 Azingabo na zonke oomoya ababusayo, zithunywe ukuba zilungiselele abo baza kuba ziindlalifa zosindiso?"
Hebrews2:1 Ngenxa yoko, simelwe kukuzinyamekela ngokugqithiseleyo izinto esazivayo, hleze sikhukuliswe simke kuzo."
Hebrews2:2 Kuba, ukuba ilizwi elathethwa ngezithunywa zezulu laqina, kwathi konke ukugqitha nokungeva kwamkela umvuzo oyeleleyo;"
Hebrews2:3 Sothini na thina ukusinda, sakuba siluhilizele usindiso olungakanana? eyathi ekuqaleni ukuthethwa yiyo iNkosi, yaza yaqiniselwa kuthi ngabo bayivayo;"
Hebrews2:4 Naye uThixo engqina ngabo ngemiqondiso, kwanezimanga, nemisebenzi ngemisebenzi yamandla, nezabelo zoMoya oyiNgcwele, ngokokuthanda kwakhe?"
Hebrews2:5 Kaloku akalithobelanga phantsi kwezithunywa zezulu elimiweyo eliza kubakho, eli sithetha ngalo."
Hebrews2:6 Ke, wakha wangqina ubani, esithi, Uyintoni na umntu, le nto umkhumbulelayo? Unyana womntu, le nto umvelelayo?"
Hebrews2:7 Umsilelise kancinane kunezithunywa zezulu; Wamthwesa uzuko nembeko, Wammisa phezu kwemisebenzi yezandla zakho."
Hebrews2:8 Zonke izinto wazithobela phantsi kweenyawo zakhe. Kuba ekubeni wazithobela phantsi kwakhe zonke izinto, akashiyanga nto ingathotyelwanga phantsi kwakhe. Kungokunje asikaziboni zithotyelwe phantsi kwakhe zonke izinto."
Hebrews2:9 Ke sibona lo uncitshiswe kancinane kunezithunywa zezulu, uYesu ke, ethe ngenxa yeentlungu zokufa, ethweswe uzuko nembeko; ukuze ngobabalo lukaThixo eve ukufa ngenxa yabo bonke."
Hebrews2:10 Kuba bekumfanele lowo, ezingenxa yakhe zonke izinto ezo, nezingaye zonke izinto ezo, ekubeni ezise oonyana abaninzi eluzukweni, ukuthi ayenze ngeentlungu igqibelele imbangi yosindiso lwabo."
Hebrews2:11 Kuba lowo ungcwalisayo, kwanabo bangcwaliswayo, baphuma kumnye bonke; kungoko angenazintloni ukubabiza ngokuthi ngabazalwana;"
Hebrews2:12 Esithi, Ndiya kulazisa igama lakho kubo abazalwana bam, Ndivume kuwe indumiso phakathi kwebandla."
Hebrews2:13 Abuye athi, Ndiya kukholosa ngaye. Abuye athi, Yabona, mna nabantwana andinike bona uThixo."
Hebrews2:14 Ekubeni ngoko abantwana abo bengamadlelane naye ngenyama negazi, wathi naye ngokwakhe ngokukwanjalo wabelana nabo ngezo zinto, ukuze ngako ukufa ambhangise lowo unamandla okufa, oko kukuthi, uMtyholi lo;"
Hebrews2:15 abakhulule ebukhobokeni bonke abo babethe ngalo lonke ixesha lokudla kwabo ubomi bazizisulu zokoyika ukufa.
Hebrews2:16 Kuba ndithi, akathabatheli kuye zithunywa; wathabathela kuye imbewu ka-Abraham."
Hebrews2:17 Ngoko ke wafanelwa kukuba afane nabazalwana bakhe ngezinto zonke, ukuze abe ngonenceba, kwanombingeleli othembekileyo omkhulu ezintweni ezilunge kuThixo, ukuze azicamagushele izono zabantu."
Hebrews2:18 Kuba ekubeni eve ubunzima, ehendwa naye ngokwakhe, unako ukubasiza abahendwayo."
Hebrews3:1 Ngoko ke, bazalwana bangcwele, mabelana ngobizo lwasemazulwini, mondeleni uMpostile, uMbingeleli oMkhulu wovumo lwethu, uKristu Yesu;"
Hebrews3:2 ethembekile kulowo wamenzayo, kwanjengoMoses endlwini yakhe iphela."
Hebrews3:3 Kuba lo ubalelwe ekuthini ufanelwe luzuko olungaphezu kolukaMoses; ngangokuba lowo wayakhayo indlu, enembeko engaphezu kwayo indlu."
Hebrews3:4 Kuba yonke into eyindlu inoyakhayo; ke lowo wazakhayo zonke izinto nguThixo.
Hebrews3:5 Ke yena uMosis wayethembekile endlwini yakhe iphela ngokomkhonzi, ukuze bube bubungqina obo bezinto eziya kuthethwa."
Hebrews3:6 Ke yena uKristu uthembeke ngokonyana phezu kwendlu yakhe; esiyindlu yakhe ke thina, ukuba sithe sakubamba ngokuthe nkqi ukungafihlisi kwethu, neqhayiya lethemba lethu, sada sesa ekupheleni."
Hebrews3:7 Ngoko ke, njengoko atshoyo uMoya oyiNgcwele, ukuthi, Namhla, ukuba nithe naliva ilizwi lakhe,"
Hebrews3:8 Musani ukuzenza lukhuni iintliziyo zenu, njengasengcaphukisweni, ngomhla wokuhendwa entlango;"
Hebrews3:9 Oko bandilingayo ooyihlo, bandilinga, Bayibona imisebenzi yam iminyaka emashumi mane."
Hebrews3:10 Kungoko ndaba buhlungu ngenxa yeso sizukulwana, ndathi, Bahlala belahleka ezintliziyweni zabo; abazazi iindlela zam."
Hebrews3:11 Ngoko ndafunga ndinomsindo, ndathi, Abayi kungena ekuphumleni kwam."
Hebrews3:12 Lumkani, bazalwana, hleze kubekho kubani wenu intliziyo engendawo, engakholwayo, enokumka kuThixo ophilileyo;"
Hebrews3:13 manivuselelane imihla ngemihla, xa kusathiwa kunamhla; ukuze kungabikho mntu kuni wenziwa lukhuni kukulukuhla kwesono."
Hebrews3:14 Kaloku siba ngamabelana ngoKristu, ukuba sithe ingqalo yokukholosa kwethu sayibamba ngokuthe nkqi, sada sesa ekupheleni;"
Hebrews3:15 ekubeni kusithiwa, Namhla, ukuba nithe naliva ilizwi lakhe, Musani ukuzenza lukhuni iintliziyo zenu, njengasengcaphukisweni."
Hebrews3:16 Kuba abathile, bevile, bacaphukisa, phofu ingengabo bonke abo baphumayo eYiputa ngoMoses."
Hebrews3:17 Ngoobani ke owakruquka ngabo iminyaka emashumi mane? Yayingengabo na abo bonayo, bazidumbu zawayo entlango?"
Hebrews3:18 Wafungela oobani na ke, ukuba abayi kungena ekuphumleni kwakhe, ingengabo abo bangevanga?"
Hebrews3:19 Siyabona ke, ukuba babengenakungena, ngenxa yokungakholwa."
Hebrews4:1 Masoyike ngoko ke, hleze kuthi, xa lithe lalisakho idinga lokungena ekuphumleni kwakhe, kubekho namnye kuni ongathi usilele kulo."
Hebrews4:2 Kuba sizishunyayeziwe iindaba ezilungileyo kwanjengabo; kodwa lona ilizwi lodaba lingadibananga nje nokholo kwabo balivayo, alabanceda nto."
Hebrews4:3 Kuba thina sakholwayo, siyangena ekuphumleni, ngokoko athe, Njengoko ndafungayo, ndinengqumbo, Ndathi, Unakanye ukuba bokha bangene ekuphumleni kwam! nakubeni imisebenzi yenziwayo kwasekusekweni kwehlabathi."
Hebrews4:4 Kuba wakha wathetha ngawo umhla wesixhenxe, ukuthi, Waza waphumla uThixo ngomhla wesixhenxe kuyo yonke imisebenzi yakhe."
Hebrews4:5 Athi kule ndawo, Ukuba bokha bangene ekuphumleni kwam."
Hebrews4:6 Njengokuba ke kusasele abathile ukuba bangene kuwo, bathi ke abo, kwashunyayelwa iindaba ezilungileyo kuqala kubo, bangangenanga ngenxa yokungakholwa."
Hebrews4:7 Ubuya amise mini ithile, esithi ngoDavide, Namhlanje, emveni kwexesha elingakanana; njengokuba kuthiwe, Namhla, ukuba nithe naliva ilizwi lakhe, Musani ukuzenza lukhuni iintliziyo zenu."
Hebrews4:8 Kuba uYesu, ukuba ubebaphumzile, ange engabuyanga athethe ngawo omnye umhla."
Hebrews4:9 Ngoko ke abantu bakaThixo balindwe luphumlo olunjengolwesabatha.
Hebrews4:10 Kuba lowo ungeneyo ekuphumleni kwakhe, naye ngokwakhe uphumle kuyo imisebenzi yakhe, njengoThixo kweyeyakhe."
Hebrews4:11 Masikhuthalele ngoko ukungena koko kuphumla, ukuze kungabikho namnye ubuya eyele kwakuloo mzekelo wokungeva."
Hebrews4:12 Kuba ilizwi likaThixo liphilile, linamandla, libukhali ngaphezu kwamakrele onke antlangothi mbini; lihlaba liphumele, lide lahlule umphefumlo kwanomoya, amalungu kwanomongo; linokugweba iingcingane nezicamango zentliziyo."
Hebrews4:13 Kananjalo akukho sidalwa singabonakaliyo emehlweni akhe; zonke izinto ke zize, zityhilekile, emehlweni alowo esinokuthana ni naye."
Hebrews4:14 Ngoko, sinombingeleli omkhulu nje ocande emazulwini, uYesu ke, uNyana kaThixo, masilubambe uvumo lwethu."
Hebrews4:15 Kaloku asinambingeleli mkhulu ungenako ukuvelana nezilwelwe zethu; ke, ulingwa ngeento zonke, ngokokufana nathi, engenasono."
Hebrews4:16 Masisondele ke ngoko sinokungafihlisi kuyo itrone yobabalo, ukuze samkeliswe inceba, sifumane ubabalo lokusiza ngexesha elililo."
Hebrews5:1 Kuba wonke umbingeleli omkhulu, engovele ebantwini nje, umiselwa abantu ezintweni ezilunge kuThixo, ukuze asondeze iminikelo kwanamadini ngenxa yezono;"
Hebrews5:2 Ngubani na onokuba nemfesane kwabangazi nto nakwabalahlekayo; kuba naye ngokwakhe enxitywe ubulwelwe.
Hebrews5:3 Ngenxa yoko ke ufanelwe kukuthi, njengokuba esondezela abantu, kwangokunjalo azisondezele amadini ngenxa yezono."
Hebrews5:4 Kanjalo akukho mntu uzithabathela ngokwakhe imbeko leyo; oyithabathayo ngobizwe nguThixo, kwanjengoAron."
Hebrews5:5 Ngokunjalo naye uKristu akazizukisanga ngokwakhe, ukuba abe ngumbingeleli omkhulu; wazukiswa ngowathethayo kuye, wathi, UnguNyana wam wena, Mna ndikuzele namhla."
Hebrews5:6 Kunjengokuba esithi nakwenye indawo, Wena ungumbingeleli ngonaphakade, Ngokohlobo lukaMelkitsedeke."
Hebrews5:7 Owathi ngemihla yenyama yakhe, xa wayesondeze izikhungo kwanezibongozo kulowo unako ukumsindisa ekufeni, kunye nodanduluko olunamandla, neenyembezi, waviwa ngenxa yokoyika kwakhe uThixo;"
Hebrews5:8 Nakuba ebenguNyana, wafunda ukululama ngobunzima awabuvayo;"
Hebrews5:9 waza, egqibelele, waba yimbangi yosindiso olungunaphakade kubo bonke abamlulamelayo;"
Hebrews5:10 ebizwe nguThixo, ukuba abe ngumbingeleli omkhulu ngokohlobo lukaMelkitsedeke."
Hebrews5:11 Esineendawo ezininzi zokuthetha ngaye, ezilukhuni ukuchazwa, ekubeni nina naba buthuntu iindlebe."
Hebrews5:12 Kuba, nakuba benifanele ukuba ngabafundisi, ngenxa yokuba sekumzuzu nakholwayo, nibuye naswela umntu wokunifundisa iziqalelo zokuqala zezihlabo zikaThixo; nisuke naba ngabafanele ukusezwa amasi, aningabokutya okuqinileyo."
Hebrews5:13 Kuba bonke abasasezwa amasi abanamava elizwi lobulungisa, kuba beziintsana."
Hebrews5:14 Kodwa ukudla okuqinileyo kokwabakhulileyo, abo bathi, ngenxa yobugcisa, babe nezimvo eziqheliselwe ukucalula okuhle kwanokubi."
Hebrews6:1 Ngoko ke masithi, siyeka elengqalo ilizwi elithetha ngoKristu, siqhubele kwelokukhula; singabuyi sibeke isiseko senguquko emisebenzini efileyo, nokukholwa kuThixo;"
Hebrews6:2 yemfundiso yeembhaptizo, neyokubekwa izandla, neyovuko lwabafileyo, neyomgwebo ongunaphakade."
Hebrews6:3 Oko ke sokwenza, ukuba angaba uthe uThixo wavuma."
Hebrews6:4 Kuba akunakwenzeka ukuba abo bakha bakhanyiselwa, basiva isipho sasezulwini, baba nesabelo kuMoya oyiNgcwele;"
Hebrews6:5 Baliva ilizwi elilungileyo likaThixo, kwanamandla ehlabathi elizayo;"
Hebrews6:6 ukuba bathe bakreqa, ukuze babuye bahlaziyeke enguqukweni; ekubeni bephinda ukuzibethelelela emnqamlezweni uNyana kaThixo, bamhlaze ekuhleni."
Hebrews6:7 Kuba umhlaba lo, uyiselayo imvula eza futhi phezu kwawo, uvelise imifuno elungele bona abo ulinywa nokulinywa kubo, wamkela intsikelelo kuThixo."
Hebrews6:8 Ke wona, othi uvelise imithana enameva neenkunzane, awunto yanto, ukufuphi nengqalekiso; okuphela kwawo kukutshiswa."
Hebrews6:9 Ke ngani nina, zintanda, sikholose ngelokuthi, nineendawo ezilungileyo kunezo, iindawo eziyelelene nosindiso, nakuba sisenjenje ukuthetha;"
Hebrews6:10 Kuba akanantswela-bulungisa uThixo, ukude awulibale umsebenzi wenu, nomzamo wothando enalubonakalalisa kulo igama lakhe, nabalungiselelayo nje abangcwele, nisamana nibalungiselela."
Hebrews6:11 Sinqwenela ke, ukuba ulowo kuni alubonakalalise kwaolo lukhuthalo, asingise kwinzaliseko yethemba, ade ase ekupheleni;"
Hebrews6:12 Kodwa ke nibe ngabaxelisa abo bathi ngokholo nangomonde bawadla ilifa amadinga.
Hebrews6:13 Kuba wathi uThixo, akumbeka ngedinga uAbraham, ekubeni bekungekho namnye umkhulu kunaye angamfungayo, wazifunga yena;"
Hebrews6:14 Esithi, Inene, ndiya kuthi, ndisikelela, ndikusikelele; ndithi, ndisandisa, ndikwandise."
Hebrews6:15 Waza ngokunjalo, enokunyamezela, walifumanisa idinga."
Hebrews6:16 Kuba abantu okunene bafunga lowo umkhulu kubo, sithi kubo isifungo siphelise yonke impikiswano, sise engqinisekweni."
Hebrews6:17 Uthe ngoko uThixo, athe wathi, ethanda kakhulu ukukubonakalalisa kwiindlalifa zedinga ukungaguquleki kwecebo lakhe, wasuka wakwenza ngesifungo;"
Hebrews6:18 ukuze kuthi, ngezinto ezimbini ezingenakuguquleka, angenako ukuxoka ngazo uThixo, sithi, thina basindileyo, sabamba ithemba elibekwe phambi kwethu, sibe nentuthuzelo eqinileyo;"
Hebrews6:19 Ithemba ke esinalo ngokweankile yomphefumlo, linqabile, likwaqinile, lingena liye ngaphaya kwesikhuselo;"
Hebrews6:20 apho umanduleli wangena khona ngenxa yethu, uYesu, ethe ngokohlobo lukaMelkitsedeke, waba ngumbingeleli omkhulu ongunaphakade."
Hebrews7:1 Kaloku uMelkitsedeki lo, ukumkani waseSalem, umbingeleli kaThixo Osenyangweni, wahlangabeza uAbraham, ekubuyeni kwakhe ekubulaleni ookumkani, wamsikelela;"
Hebrews7:2 Athi uAbraham wamnika nesishumi sazo zonke izinto; kuqala ke, ngentetho evakalayo, ukumkani wobulungisa, aze emveni koko abe ngukumkani waseSalem, oko kukuthi, ngukumkani woxolo;"
Hebrews7:3 Engenayise nanina, namlibo wakuzalwa; kodwa enziwe wafana noNyana kaThixo; uhlala engumbingeleli ngamaxesha onke."
Hebrews7:4 Khangelani ke ngoko ukuba mkhulu kwalo mntu, awathi uAbraham usolukazi wamnika isishumi samaxhoba."
Hebrews7:5 Oonyana bakaLevi okunene, babamkelayo ububingeleli, banomthetho wokubanga isishumi kubo abantu ngokomthetho, oko kukuthi, kubo abazalwana babo, nakuba bephume esinqeni sika-Abraham;"
Hebrews7:6 Kodwa yena, ongenamlibo wakuzalwa uphumayo kubo, ubange isishumi kuAbraham, wasikelela lowo unamadinga."
Hebrews7:7 Ke ngokungenakuphikwa, omncinane usikelelwa yeyona inkulu."
Hebrews7:8 Kananjalo apha okunene ngabantu abanokufa, abathabatha isishumi; kodwa khona apho owamkelayo, ngongqinelweyo ukuba uhleli."
Hebrews7:9 Ukutsho ke ndithi, kubangwe ngoAbraham isishumi nakuLevi, lo wamkelayo izishumi;"
Hebrews7:10 Kuba wayesesinqeni sikayise, oko uMelkitsedeki wamhlangabezayo."
Hebrews7:11 Ke ngoko, ukuba inzaliseko ibingabakho ngobubingeleli bakwaLevi (kuba abantu bewiselwe owobubingeleli umthetho), bekusafuneka ngantoni na ke, ukuba kubuye kuvele mbingeleli wumbi ngokohlobo lukaMelkitsedeke, angabizwa ngokohlobo luka-Aron?"
Hebrews7:12 Kuba ububingeleli baguqulwa nje, kufuneka ukuba kuguqulwe nomthetho."
Hebrews7:13 Kuba lowo, zithethwa ngaye ezi zinto, engowasizwe simbi, ebekungekho namnye kuso ubesinyamekele isibingelelo."
Hebrews7:14 Kuba kusekuhleni kanye, ukuba iNkosi yethu yaphuma kwaYuda; isizwe eso angathethanga nto ngaso uMoses ngobubingeleli."
Hebrews7:15 Ngoku lo mcimbi ucaca ngakumbi, kuba kuvele mbingeleli wumbi ungowodidi lukaMelkitsedeke,"
Hebrews7:16 ongathanga amiswe ngokomyalelo womthetho ongowenyama, wamiselwa ngokwamandla obomi obungenasiphelo."
Hebrews7:17 Kuba ungqina ngokuthi, Wena ungumbingeleli ngonaphakade, Ngokohlobo lukaMelkitsedeke."
Hebrews7:18 Kuba okunene kutshitshiswa umthetho owandulelayo, ngenxa yokuswela amandla, nokungancedi lutho kwawo."
Hebrews7:19 Kaloku umthetho lowo awuzalisanga nto; ke kungeniswe phezu kwawo elona themba lilungileyo; esisondela ngayo kuye uThixo.
Hebrews7:20 Kaloku ke, wenziwa waba umbingeleli ngaphandle kwesifungo;"
Hebrews7:21 (Kuba abo babingeleli bebengenakufungiswa, kodwa yena ufungelwe ngesifungo salowo wathi kuye, Yafunga iNkosi, ayiyi kuzohlwaya, yathi, Wena ungumbingeleli ngonaphakade, Ngokohlobo lukaMelkitsedeke;)"
Hebrews7:22 ngangoko ke uYesu waba ngummeli wowona ulungileyo umnqophiso.
Hebrews7:23 Bathe bona ababingeleli baba baninzi, ngenxa yokuba ukufa kwakungavumi ukuba bahlale behleli;"
Hebrews7:24 Ke yena, ngenxa yokuba ehleli ngonaphakade, unobubingeleleli obungenakudlula."
Hebrews7:25 Ngoko unako nokubasindisa kanye abo bezayo ngaye kuThixo, ehlala ehleli nje ukuba abathethelele."
Hebrews7:26 Kuba ubesifanele umbingeleli omkhulu onjalo, ongcwele, ongenabubi, ongenabala, owahlukileyo kubo aboni, othe waba ngaphezu kwalo izulu;"
Hebrews7:27 ekungafunekiyo ukuba athi imihla ngemihla, njengababingeleli abakhulu aba, anyuse kuqala amadini ngenxa yezono ezizezakhe, andule ukunyusa ngenxa yezabantu; kuba oko wakwenza kwaba kanye, ekuzinyuseni ngokwakhe ngokwedini."
Hebrews7:28 Kuba umthetho umisa abantu abanobulwelwe, babe ngababingeleli abakhulu; Ke lona ilizwi lesifungo, esingasemva komthetho, limise uNyana, ongcwaliswe ngonaphakade."
Hebrews8:1 Ke kaloku, eyona nto ibalulekileyo kwezi zinto sizithethileyo: Sinombingeleli omkhulu onje, othe wahlala phantsi ngasekunene kwetrone yobuKhulu emazulwini;"
Hebrews8:2 umlungiseleli wengcwele, nowomnquba wenyaniso owamiswayo nguYehova, awamiswa ngumntu."
Hebrews8:3 Kuba wonke umbingeleli omkhulu umiselwa ukuba asondeze iminikelo kwanamadini; ekuthe ngenxa yoko kwafuneka ukuba naye lo abe nento ayisondezayo.
Hebrews8:4 Kuba, ukuba ubelapha emhlabeni, ubengayi kuba ngumbingeleli, ekubeni kukho ababingeleli abanikela izipho ngokomthetho:"
Hebrews8:5 bona bakhonza umzekelo nesithunzi sezinto zasemazulwini, kwanjengokuba uMoses wayehlatyelwe nguThixo, xa abeza kuwufeza umnquba; kuba wathi, Khangela ukuba uzenze zonke izinto ngokomfuziselo owawuboniswayo entabeni."
Hebrews8:6 Kodwa kungoku, uzuze umbuso ogqithiseleyo kulowo, kangangokuba engumlamleli womnqophiso olungileyo ngakumbi, wona usekwe phezu kwawona madinga alungileyo."
Hebrews8:7 Kuba, ukuba ubungenakusoleka lowo wokuqala, ubungayi kufunelwa ndawo owesibini."
Hebrews8:8 Kuba uthi, esola, Yabona, kuza imihla, itsho iNkosi, endiya kwenza umnqophiso omtsha nendlu kaSirayeli, nendlu kaYuda;"
Hebrews8:9 Ungahambi ngokomnqophiso endawenzela ooyise, mini ndababamba ngesandla, ndibakhupha ezweni laseYiputa; ngenxa enokuba bengahlalanga emnqophisweni wam, nam andabakhathalela; utsho uYehova."
Hebrews8:10 Nguwo lo umnqophiso, endiya kuwenza nendlu kaSirayeli emva kwaloo mihla, utsho uYehova; ndiya kuyibeka imithetho yam engqondweni yabo, ndiyibhale ezintliziyweni zabo, ndibe nguThixo wabo, babe ngabantu bam;"
Hebrews8:11 Kanjalo abayi kukha bafundise elowo ummelwane wakhe, elowo umzalwana wakhe, esithi, Yazi iNkosi; ngokuba baya kundazi bonke, bethabathela komncinane base komkhulu."
Hebrews8:12 Ngokuba ndiya kukuxolela ukungalungisi kwabo, Nezono zabo, nokuchasa kwabo umthetho, ndingabi sakukhumbula."
Hebrews8:13 Ngokuthi, Umnqophiso omtsha, uwaluphalisile owokuqala. Ke into ebolileyo, yasihasha, seyikufuphi ukuba ithi shwaka."
Hebrews9:1 Ke ngoko nowokuqala umnqophiso wawunezimiselo zombuso, kwanendawo engcwele yehlabathi."
Hebrews9:2 Kuba kwakhiwa umnquba lowo, elokuqala lalinesiphatho sezibane, kwanetafile, nesiboniso sezonka; ebizwa ngokuba yingcwele."
Hebrews9:3 Ngemva kwekhuselo lesibini kwabakho nomnquba ekuthiwa yingcwele kangcwele;
Hebrews9:4 Yayinesitya segolide sokuqhumisela, nayo ityeya yomnqophiso, yalekwe ngegolide ngeenxa zonke, inesitya segolide ngaphakathi esinemana, inentonga ka-Aron eyadubulayo, inawo amacwecwe omnqophiso."
Hebrews9:5 Ke ngaphezu kwayo kwema iikerubhi zobuqaqawuli, zisibekele isicamagushelo; esingenakuthetha ngakumbi ngayo ngoku."
Hebrews9:6 Ke kaloku, zakubon’ ukuba zenziwe ngokunjalo ezo zinto, ababingeleli bangena okunene amaxa onke kowokuqala umnquba, beyifeza imisebenzi kaThixo."
Hebrews9:7 Ke kowesibini kungena kube kanye ngomnyaka umbingeleli omkhulu yedwa, kungengagazi, alisondezayo ngenxa yakhe, nangenxa yeziphoso zabantu."
Hebrews9:8 uMoya oyiNgcwele eqondisa ke, ukuba indlela eya kweyona ngcwele ingekabonakali ke, umnquba wokuqala umi."
Hebrews9:9 Lowo ube ngumfuziselo wexesha elililo, ekuthi ngalo kusondezwe iminikelo kwanamadini, izinto ezo ezingenako ukumenza agqibelele lowo ukhonzayo, ngokwesazela;"
Hebrews9:10 ezithe, ndawonye nezinto ezidliwayo, neziselwayo, neentlambululo ngeentlambululo, ezizizimiselo zenyama kuphela, zamiselwa ukuba kude kufike ixesha lolungiso."
Hebrews9:11 Kodwa uKristu, ethe weza, engumbingeleli omkhulu wezinto ezilungileyo eziza kubakho, uthe ngowona mkhulu ugqibeleleyo umnquba, ongenakwenziwa ngazandla, oko kukuthi, ongekuko oku kwakhiwa;"
Hebrews9:12 wangena kwaba kanye kweyona ngcwele, kungengagazi leebhokhwe nelamathole, kungegazi elilelakhe; wasizuzela inkululeko engunaphakade ngokusihlawulela."
Hebrews9:13 Kuba, xa igazi leenkomo neleebhokhwe, nothuthu lwethokazi olufefa oyinqambi, lungcwalisela ekuhlambululeni inyama;"
Hebrews9:14 Lobeka phi na ukugqithisela lona igazi likaKristu, owazisondeza ngoMoya ongunaphakade, engenasiphako, kuye uThixo, ukusihlambulula isazela senu emisebenzini efileyo, ukuze nikhonze uThixo ophilileyo?"
Hebrews9:15 Ngoko ke ungumlamleli womnqophiso omtsha, ukuze bathi abo babiziweyo (kwakubon’, ukuba kubekho ukufa okuhlawulela izigqitho, ezibe ziphantsi kwawo umnqophiso wokuqala), balamkele idinga lelifa elingunaphakade."
Hebrews9:16 Kuba apho kukhoyo umnqophiso womyoleli, kufuneka ukuba kucace ukufa kwalowo unqophisileyo."
Hebrews9:17 Kaloku umnqophiso uqiniseka bakuba befile, okanye awuba namandla xenikweni asadla ubomi umyoleli."
Hebrews9:18 Ngoko ke nowokuqala umnqophiso awusungulwanga ngaphandle kwegazi.
Hebrews9:19 Kuba kuthe, akuwuthetha uMoses umthetho wonke ngokomthetho ebantwini bonke, walithabatha igazi lamathole neleebhokhwe, ndawonye namanzi, noboya obubomvu, nehisope, wayifefa incwadi, kwanabantu bonke;"
Hebrews9:20 esithi, Eli ligazi lomnqophiso aniwisele umthetho ngawo uThixo."
Hebrews9:21 Nomnquba ke, nazo zonke iimpahla zombuso, wazifefa ngegazi."
Hebrews9:22 Kananjalo ngokomthetho ndingade ndithi, zonke izinto ziphantse ukuba zihlanjululwe ngegazi; ngaphandle kokuphalala kwegazi akukho kuxolelwa."
Hebrews9:23 Kwafuneka ngoko, ukuba okunene izizekelo zezinto ezisemazulwini zihlanjululwe ngezinto ezinjalo; zona zona ezo zinto zasemazulwini, zinamadini alungileyo kunalawo."
Hebrews9:24 Kuba uKristu akangenanga kweyona ngcwele inokwenziwa ngezandla, engumfuziselo weyenyaniso; ungene kuwo amazulu ngokwawo, ukuba abonakale ngoku ebusweni bukaThixo ngenxa yethu."
Hebrews9:25 Kwakungekho ukuze azinikele futhi, njengokuba umbingeleli omkhulu ebengena kweyona ngcwele iminyaka ngeminyaka, enegazi lenye into;"
Hebrews9:26 Ange ebemelwe kukuba ebeve ubunzima futhi, kuseloko lasekwayo ihlabathi. Ke uthe ngoku, ekufinyezweni kwawo amaphakade, wabonakalaliswa kwaba kanye, ukuba atshitshise isono ngelilelakhe idini."
Hebrews9:27 Kwanjengokuba ke abantu bamiselwe ukuba bafe kube kanye, ize ke emveni koko ibe ngumgwebo;"
Hebrews9:28 ngokunjalo uKristu, esondezwe kwaba kanye, ukuba asithwale asisuse isono sabaninzi; uya kuthi okwesibini, ngaphandle kwesono, abonakale kwabo bamlindileyo, ezisa usindiso."
Hebrews10:1 Kaloku umthetho unesithunzi nje sodwa sezinto ezilungileyo eziza kubakho, ungenaso sona isimilo sazo izinto, awuze ube nako, iminyaka ngeminyaka, ngaloo madini bawasondeza ngokungapheliyo, ukubenza bagqibelele abo basondelayo."
Hebrews10:2 Okanye ange engayekwanga na ukusondezwa? ngenxa yokuba abo bakhonzayo, behlanjululwe kwaba kanye, bengasenasazela sazono."
Hebrews10:3 Kambe ke, kuwo onke amadini, kubakho nokukhumbula izono unyaka nonyaka."
Hebrews10:4 Kaloku igazi leenkunzi zeenkomo neleebhokhwe alinakuzisusa izono.
Hebrews10:5 Kungoko, akungena ehlabathini, uthi, Akuthandanga mbingelelo, namnikelo wakudla, ke undilungisele umzimba."
Hebrews10:6 Akuwathandanga amadini atshiswayo nawesono.
Hebrews10:7 Ndaza ndathi, Yabona, ndiyeza (Encwadini esongwayo kubhaliwe ngam), ndiza kwenza ukuthanda kwakho, Thixo."
Hebrews10:8 Entla xa athi, Amadini, amadini, namadini anyukayo, nawesono, akunaliswanga; ezisondezwe ngumthetho;"
Hebrews10:9 Uthe ke, Yabona, ndiza kwenza ukuthanda kwakho, Thixo. Ususa esokuqala, ukuze amise esesibini."
Hebrews10:10 Ngoko kuthanda kwakhe, sangcwaliswa ngokusondezwa komzimba kaYesu Krestu kwaba kanye."
Hebrews10:11 Naye wonke umbingeleli umi imihla ngemihla elungiselela, esondeza futhi amaxesha amaninzi kwaloo madini angenako ukuzisusa izono."
Hebrews10:12 Kodwa yena lo, esondeze idini lalinye ngenxa yezono, usuke wahlala phantsi ngasekunene kukaThixo ngokungapheliyo;"
Hebrews10:13 Kususela ngoku elinde ukuba zide iintshaba zakhe zenziwe isihlalo seenyawo zakhe.
Hebrews10:14 Kuba ngamnikelo mnye ubenze bagqibelela ngokungapheliyo abo bangcwaliswayo.
Hebrews10:15 Usingqinela ke naye uMoya oyiNgcwele;
Hebrews10:16 Nguwo lo ke umnqophiso endiya kuwenza nabo emva kwaloo mihla, itsho iNkosi: Ndiya kuyibeka imithetho yam ezintliziyweni zabo, ndize ndiyibhale ezingqondweni zabo;"
Hebrews10:17 Izono zabo nokuchasa umthetho kwabo ndingabi sakukhumbula.
Hebrews10:18 Ke apho uxolelo lwezo zinto lukhoyo, akusekho mnikelo ngenxa yesono."
Hebrews10:19 Ngoko ke, bazalwana, ekubeni sinobuganga bokungena kweyona ngcwele, ngegazi likaYesu;"
Hebrews10:20 Ngendlela entsha, ephilileyo, athe wayilungiselela thina, ephumela ekhusini, oko kukuthi, inyama yakhe;"
Hebrews10:21 Sinombingeleli omkhulu nje phezu kwendlu kaThixo;
Hebrews10:22 masisondele sinentliziyo eyinyaniso, sinenzaliseko yokholo, sifefiwe iintliziyo zethu, sisusiwe isazela esingendawo, nemizimba yethu ihlanjwe ngamanzi amsulwa."
Hebrews10:23 Silubambe uvumo lwethu lokholo, singabi nakuxengaxenga; (kuba uthembekile lowo uthembisileyo);"
Hebrews10:24 Masinyamekelane, sivuselelane eluthandweni nasemisebenzini emihle;"
Hebrews10:25 singakutyesheli ukuhlanganisana kwethu ndawonye, njengoko kulisiko labathile; masivuselelane ngokungakumbi, niyibona nje ukuba imini leyo iyasondela."
Hebrews10:26 Kuba, xa sithi sone ngabomi, emveni kokuba sakwamkelayo ukwazi inyaniso, akusasele dini ngenxa yezono;"
Hebrews10:27 Kusele ke ukulinda okoyikekayo kakhulu, umgwebo nomsindo womlilo, oza kudla abo bachasileyo."
Hebrews10:28 Lowo uwugatyayo umthetho kaMoses, wafa engenanceba, phantsi kwamangqina amabini, nokuba ngamathathu."
Hebrews10:29 Niba, woba ufanelwe yisohlwayo esiqatha kangakanani na, lowo umnyathelele phantsi uNyana kaThixo, wabalelela igazi lomnqophiso, angcwaliswe ngalo, ukuba liyinto engeyiyo, ewenza into engento uMoya, lobabalo?"
Hebrews10:30 Kaloku siyamazi lowo watshoyo ukuthi, Impindezelo yeyam, kuya kubuyekeza mna, itsho iNkosi. Kananjalo wathi, iNkosi iya kubagweba abantu bayo."
Hebrews10:31 Kuyoyikeka ke ukweyela ezandleni zoThixo ophilileyo.
Hebrews10:32 Khumbulani ke imihla yangaphambili, enakhanyiselwa ngayo, nanyamezela umzamo omkhulu weembandezelo;"
Hebrews10:33 Nani ke nenziwa intlekisa nokungcikivwa nangeembandezelo; ngokuyinxenye, nani baba ngamadlelane abenzi bobubi."
Hebrews10:34 Kuba navelana nam ndisezintanjeni; kananjalo nakwamkela ngovuyo ukuphangwa kweempahla zenu, nisazi ukuba ninayo kuni ngokwenu emazulwini eyona mpahla ilungileyo, ihlala ihleli."
Hebrews10:35 Musani ukukulahla ngoko ukungafihlisi kwenu, kona kunokwamkela umvuzo omkhulu."
Hebrews10:36 Kufuneka ukuba nibe nomonde, ukuze nithi, nakuba nikwenzile ukuthanda kukaThixo, nizuzane nalo idinga."
Hebrews10:37 Kuba kusaya kuba mzuzwana mncinanana, Athi lowo uzayo afike, angalibali."
Hebrews10:38 Ke lowo ulilungisa uya kudla ubomi obuphuma elukholweni; kodwa ukuba uthe wahlehla, awuyi kukholiswa nguye umphefumlo wam."
Hebrews10:39 Ke thina asingabahlehla baye entshabalalweni; kodwa ke kwabakholwayo, kukusindiswa komphefumlo."
Hebrews11:1 Ukholo ke kukukholosa ngezinto ezithenjiweyo; kukweyiseka bubukho bezinto ezingabonwayo.
Hebrews11:2 Kuba amanyange angqinelwa ngokuba nalo.
Hebrews11:3 Ngokholo siyaqonda ukuba indalo le yonke yenziwe yabakho ngelizwi likaThixo, ukuze izinto ezi zibonwayo zibe aziphume kwezibonakalayo."
Hebrews11:4 Ngokholo uAbheli wasondeza kuye uThixo umbingelelo ogqithileyo kunokaKayin, awangqinelwa ngawo ukuba ulilungisa, uThixo wayingqinelayo nje iminikelo yakhe; ngalo ke, efile nje, usathetha."
Hebrews11:5 Ngokholo uEnoki wafuduselwa emazulwini ukuba angaboni kufa; akaba nakufunyanwa ke, ngenxa enokuba uThixo wamfudusayo; kuba ngaphambi kokufuduswa kwakhe, wangqinelwa ukuba umkholise kakuhle uThixo."
Hebrews11:6 Ke, lungekho ukholo, akunakubakho ukumkholisa kakuhle; kuba lowo uzayo kuThixo, umelwe kukukholwa ukuba ukho, nokuba ungumvuzi wabo bamfunayo."
Hebrews11:7 Ngokholo uNowa, ehlatyelwe nguThixo ngazo izinto ebezingekabonwa, wathi ngokoyika uThixo wawakha umkhombe wokusindisa indlu yakhe, athe ngalo waligweba ihlabathi, waba yindlalifa yobulungisa obungokokholo."
Hebrews11:8 Ngokholo uAbraham wathi, akubizwa, Wakululamela ukuba aphume, aye kuloo ndawo abeza kuyamkela ukuba ibe lilifa; waphuma engazi apho aya khona."
Hebrews11:9 Ngokholo waba ngumphambukeli emhlabeni wedinga, wanga ukowasemzini, ehleli eminqubeni, ndawonye noIsake noYakobi, beziindlalifa zalo elo dinga kunye naye."
Hebrews11:10 Kuba wayewulindele umzi lo uneziseko, ungcibi, umbangi wawo, inguThixo."
Hebrews11:11 Ngokholo noSara ngokwakhe wamkela amandla okumisa umzi, waza wazala, liseligqithile ixesha lokuba amithe, ekubeni wambalela ekuthini uthembekile lowo wabekayo ngedinga."
Hebrews11:12 Kungoko kwazalwayo nangomnye, engofileyo ke lowo, into engangeenkwenkwezi zezulu ukuba yintabalala, nanjengentlabathi eselunxwemeni lolwandle, engenakubalwa."
Hebrews11:13 Aba bonke bafa ngokokholo, bengawafumananga amadinga; besuka bawabona kude, bakholosa, bathakazela, bavuma ukuba bangabasemzini, balundwendwe emhlabeni."
Hebrews11:14 Kuba abo bathetha izinto ezinjalo, babonakalalisa ukuba bangxamele ikowabo."
Hebrews11:15 Ke, ukuba okunene babekhumbula elo babephuma kulo, ngebaba nethuba lokubuyela kulo."
Hebrews11:16 Kodwa ngoku bazolulela kwelona lilungileyo, oko kukuthi, kwelasemazulwini. Kungoko uThixo angenazintloni ngabo, ukuba kuthiwe unguThixo wabo, kuba ebalungisele umzi."
Hebrews11:17 Ngokholo uAbraham wamnikela uIsake, ekuvavanyweni kwakhe;"
Hebrews11:18 Kwakusithiwa ngaye, Imbewu yakho iya kubizwa ngoIsake;"
Hebrews11:19 ekubalele ngokuba uThixo unako ukuvusa nakwabafileyo; apho athe wamthabatha khona ngokomfanekiso.
Hebrews11:20 Ngokholo uIsake wabasikelela uYakobi noEsawu, ngazo izinto eziza kubakho."
Hebrews11:21 Ngokholo uYakobi wabasikelela bobabini oonyana bakaYosefu, xa aqhawukayo; waqubuda esimelele ngentonga yakhe."
Hebrews11:22 Ngokholo uYosefu uthe, xa abhubhayo, wakukhankanya ukuphuma koonyana bakaSirayeli; Wawisa umthetho ngawo amathambo akhe."
Hebrews11:23 Ngokholo uMoses uthe akuba ezelwe, wafihlwa iinyanga zantathu ngabazali bakhe, ngenxa enokuba bambona ukuba ungumntwana omhle; abawoyika umthetho wokumkani."
Hebrews11:24 Ngokholo uMoses uthe, akuba mkhulu, akavuma ukubizwa ngokuba ungunyana wentombi kaFaro;"
Hebrews11:25 enyula kanye ukuba aphathwe kakubi, ndawonye nabantu bakaThixo, kunokuba axhamle isono okomzuzwana;"
Hebrews11:26 ekubalele ukungcikivwa kukaKristu kububutyebi obungaphezu kobutyebi baseYiputa, kuba wayekhangele ukwamkela umvuzo."
Hebrews11:27 Ngokholo wayishiya iYiputa, akawoyika umsindo wokumkani; kuba wakrota, wanga uyambona lowo ungenakubonwa."
Hebrews11:28 Ngokholo uyenzile ipasika nokutshizwa kwegazi, ukuze lowo wayewatshabalalisa amazibulo angawachukumisi."
Hebrews11:29 Ngokholo baluwela uLwandle oluBomvu, kwanga kusemhlabeni owomileyo; athe amaYiputa, akukulinga oko, antywiliselwa."
Hebrews11:30 Ngokholo zawa iindonga zaseYeriko, zakuba zijikeleziwe iintsuku zasixhenxe."
Hebrews11:31 Ngokholo uRahabhi ihenyukazi akatshabalalanga nabo bangevayo, akuba ezamkele ngoxolo iintlola."
Hebrews11:32 Ndisathetha ntoni na? Kuba ndingaphelelwa lixesha ndibalisa ngoGidiyon, kwanoBharaki, noSamson, noYifeta; ekaDavide, noSamuweli, neyabaprofeti;"
Hebrews11:33 abathe ngokholo beyisa izikumkani, basebenza ubulungisa, bazuza amadinga, bavingca imilomo yeengonyama;"
Hebrews11:34 bacima amandla omlilo, basinda kwiintlangothi zekrele, bomelela ekubeni bebeswele amandla, baba ngamagorha emfazweni, bagxotha imikhosi yabasemzini."
Hebrews11:35 Abafazi babazuza abafileyo babo bevukile; abanye ke batyakatywa, bengalwamkelanga ukhululo; ukuze bazuze uvuko olulungileyo;"
Hebrews11:36 Bambi ke benziwa intlekisa, batyakatywa; phezu koko ke baviswa imixokelelwane nentolongo;"
Hebrews11:37 baxulutywa ngamatye, basarhwa kubini, bahendwa; babulawa ngekrele; beswele, bebandezelwa, bengcungcuthekiswa;"
Hebrews11:38 (elalingabafanelanga ihlabathi), bedinga koozintlango, noozintaba, noomiqolomba, nakwimiqolomba yomhlaba."
Hebrews11:39 Aba ke bonke, ngenxa yokuba bangqinelwe ngokholo, abalamkelanga idinga;"
Hebrews11:40 uThixo esazalelele thina ngeyona nto ilungileyo, ukuze bangenziwa bagqibelele ngaphandle kwethu."
Hebrews12:1 Ngoko ke, nathi ke, siphahlwe lilifu elingakanana nje lamangqina, masithi nathi, siwubekile nxamnye wonke umthwalo, naso isono esinokusirhawula ngokusisulu, silubaleke ngomonde ugqatso olubekwe phambi kwethu;"
Hebrews12:2 sise amehlo kuyo iMbangi noMgqibelelisi wokholo lwethu, uYesu; owathi, ngenxa yovuyo olwalubekwe phambi kwakhe, wawunyamezela umnqamlezo, elidelile ihlazo, waza wahlala phantsi ngasekunene kwetrone kaThixo."
Hebrews12:3 Mqondeni lowo ukunyamezeleyo ukumphikisa okungaka kwaboni, ukuze ningadinwa, ingatyhafi imiphefumlo yenu."
Hebrews12:4 Nizamana nesono kude kube segazini.
Hebrews12:5 Kananjalo senilulibele uvuselelo olu, luthetha kuni njengakubantwana, lusithi, Nyana wam, musa ukukucekisa ukuqeqesha kweNkosi, Kananjalo ungatyhafi wakohlwaywa yiyo;"
Hebrews12:6 Kuba lowo imthandayo iNkosi iyamqeqesha, Ibatyakatye ke bonke oonyana ebamkelayo."
Hebrews12:7 Ukuba ninyamezela uqeqesho, uThixo woba uniphethe njengoonyana; kuba nguwuphi na unyana ongaqeqeshwayo nguyise?"
Hebrews12:8 Ukuba ke aniqeqeshwa, abathe baba ngamadlelane ngalo bonke, noba nina niyimigqakhwe ngoko, aningoonyana."
Hebrews12:9 Kananjalo sibe sinabo oobawo benyama okunene besiqeqesha, sabahlonela; asiyi kuthi ngakumbi na sithobele uYise woomoya bonke, sidle ubomi?"
Hebrews12:10 Kuba bona okunene basiqeqesha imihla embalwa, ngokokuzithandela kwabo; kodwa yena usilungele, ukuze sahlulelane ngobungcwele bakhe."
Hebrews12:11 Lonke ke uqeqesho okunene ngokwakalokunje alubonakali luluvuyo, lubonakala luyintlungu; kodwa kamva lubanika isiqhamo esiluxolo, oko kukuthi sobulungisa, abo baqhelisiweyo lulo."
Hebrews12:12 Kungoko ndithi, Zimiseni izandla eziwileyo, namadolo anedumbe;"
Hebrews12:13 iinyawo zenu nizenzele imizila ethe tye, ukuze into eqhwalelayo ingaphambuki endleleni; kanye ke mayiphiliswe."
Hebrews12:14 Phuthumani uxolo nabantu bonke, nobungcwele, ekungekho namnye uya kuyibona iNkosi, engenabo;"
Hebrews12:15 Lumkani kungabikho mntu uphulukana nalo ubabalo lukaThixo, hleze kuvele ingcambu yobukrakra, inikhathaze, badyobhe abaninzi ngayo;"
Hebrews12:16 kungabikho bani ulihenyu, nokuba ngumhlambeli, njengoEsawu, owathi ngenxa yentwana yokudla wananisa ngobuzibulo bakhe."
Hebrews12:17 Niyazi ukuba wathi kamva, ethanda ukuyidla ilifa intsikelelo, walahlwa; kuba akafumananga thuba languquko, noko wayingxamelayo ngeenyembezi."
Hebrews12:18 Kuba anizanga entabeni echukunyiswayo, isitsha ngumlilo, nakubumnyama, nakubumnyama, nakuqhwithela;"
Hebrews12:19 nesandi sesigodlo, nesandi samazwi; elathi bona abalivayo babùya ukuba lingabi sathethwa kubo ilizwi;"
Hebrews12:20 Kuba babengenakuwuthwala loo umthetho, othi, Nokuba inkomo yayichukumise intaba, yayiza kuxulutywa ngamatye, okanye ihlabe ngomkhonto."
Hebrews12:21 Yaye loo mbono wawusoyikeka kangangokuba uMoses athi, Ndiyoyika kakhulu, ndingcangcazela."
Hebrews12:22 Ke nina nifikile entabeni yeZiyon, nasemzini kaThixo ophilileyo, iYerusalem yasemazulwini, nakumkhosi ongenakubalwa wezithunywa zezulu;"
Hebrews12:23 Ibandla, nebandla lamazibulo, abhaliweyo emazulwini, nakuThixo uMgwebi wabo bonke, nakumoya wamalungisa agqibelele;"
Hebrews12:24 nakuMlamleli womnqophiso omtsha, uYesu, nakwigazi lokufefa, elithetha ezona zinto zilungileyo kunelika-Abheli."
Hebrews12:25 Lumkani, ningamali lowo uthethayo. Kuba, ukuba abo bamalayo lowo wathethayo emhlabeni, abasindanga, kobeka phi na ke ukugqithisela kuthi, ukuba siyasuka simfulathele lowo uthethayo esemazulwini;"
Hebrews12:26 olizwi oko lawuzamazamisayo umhlaba; ngoku ke ubeke ngedinga, esithi, Kusaya kuba ngumzuzwana endiya kuthi mna ndinganyikimisi mhlaba wodwa, ndinyikimise nalo izulu."
Hebrews12:27 Eli ke lithi: Kusaya kuba ngumzuzwana, kubonakalalisa ukuguqulwa kwezinto ezizanyazanyiswayo, ngathi kokwezenziweyo, ukuze zihlale zona ezingenakuzanyazanyiswa."
Hebrews12:28 Masithi ngoko, sisamkela ubukumkani obungenakuzanyazanyiswa nje, sibe nombulelo, simkhonze ngawo uThixo ngokukholekileyo, sinokuhlonela nokoyika;"
Hebrews12:29 Kaloku uThixo wethu ungumlilo odlayo.
Hebrews13:1 Uthando lobuzalwana maluhlale luhleli.
Hebrews13:2 Musani ukukulibala ukubuka iindwendwe; kuba ngokwenjenjalo inxenye ibuke izithunywa zezulu, ingazi."
Hebrews13:3 Bakhumbuleleni abakhonkxiweyo, ninge nikhonkxiwe nani; nabo ke baphathwa kakubi, njengokuba nisemzimbeni nani."
Hebrews13:4 Umtshato mawubekeke ngeendlela zonke, nesilili masingadyojwa; ke abenza umbulo nabakrexezi, uThixo uya kubagweba."
Hebrews13:5 Iihambo zenu mazingabi nankanuko; yanelani zizinto eninazo; kuba etshilo ukuthi, Andiyi kukha ndikushiye, ndingayi kukushiya;"
Hebrews13:6 ngokokude somelele sithi, iNkosi ilusizo lwam, andiyi koyika;"
Hebrews13:7 Bakhumbuleleni abakhokeli benu, abalithethayo kuni ilizwi likaThixo; nisingasinga impumelelo yehambo yabo, nixelise bona elukholweni lwabo."
Hebrews13:8 uYesu Krestu ikwanguye izolo, nanamhla, kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni."
Hebrews13:9 Musani ukuphetshethwa ziimfundiso ngeemfundiso nezingezizo. Kuba kuhle ukuba intliziyo iqine lubabalo; kungabi ngeento ezidliwayo, abangancedekanga zizo abo bahamba kuzo."
Hebrews13:10 Sinesibingelelo thina, abangenagunya lakudla kuso abo bakhonza umnquba."
Hebrews13:11 Kaloku ezo zinto ziphilileyo, zigazi lazo lingeniswa ngenxa yesono kweyona ngcwele nguye umbingeleli omkhulu, imizimba yazo itshiselwa ngaphandle kweminquba."
Hebrews13:12 Kungoko athe noYesu, ukuze abangcwalise abantu ngegazi elilelakhe, weva ubunzima ngaphandle kwesango."
Hebrews13:13 Masiphume ke ngoko siye kuye ngaphandle kweminquba, sithwele ingcikivo yakhe."
Hebrews13:14 Kuba apha asinamzi uhleliyo, singxamele lowo uza kuza."
Hebrews13:15 Ngoko masithi ngaye sinyuse ngamaxesha onke kuye uThixo umbingelelo wendumiso, oko kukuthi, isiqhamo somlomo olivumayo igama lakhe."
Hebrews13:16 Ke ukwenza okulungileyo nobudlelane, musani ukukulibala; kuba imibingelelo enjalo uyakholiswa kakuhle yiyo uThixo."
Hebrews13:17 Bathambeleni abakhokeli benu, nibathobele; kuba bona abalali, ngenxa yemiphefumlo yenu, ngokwabaza kuphendula, ukuze bakwenze oko bevuyile, bengancwini; kuba anisizakali kuko oko."
Hebrews13:18 Sithandazeleni; kuba sikholosekile kukuthi sinesazela esilungileyo, singa ezintweni zonke singahamba kakuhle."
Hebrews13:19 Ndiyavuselela ke ngokugqithiseleyo, ukuba nenze oko, ukuze ndibuyiselwe kuni kamsinyane."
Hebrews13:20 Ke kaloku uThixo woxolo, owamvusayo kwabafileyo iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, uMalusi omkhulu wezimvu, ngegazi lomnqophiso ongunaphakade,"
Hebrews13:21 wanga anganilungisa, nigqibelele emisebenzini yonke elungileyo, ukuze nikwenze ukuthanda kwakhe, esenza ngaphakathi kwenu oko kukholekileyo emehlweni akhe, ngoYesu Kristu. Kuye makubekho uzuko, kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni. Amen."
Hebrews13:22 Ndiyanivuselela ke nina, bazalwana, linyamezeleni ilizwi lovuselelo olu; kuba ke ndinibhalele ngokufutshane."
Hebrews13:23 Yazini ukuba umzalwana wethu uTimoti ukhululwe; endothi, ukuba uthe wafika kamsinya, ndinibone ndinaye."
Hebrews13:24 Babuliseni bonke abakhokeli benu, nakubo bonke abangcwele. Bayanibulisa abemi baseItali."
Hebrews13:25 Ubabalo malube nani nonke. Amen. (Ibhalelwe amaHebhere evela eItali, nguTimoti.)"
James1:1 uYakobi, umkhonzi kaThixo neNkosi uYesu Kristu, ubhalela izizwe ezilishumi elinazibini eziziintsali, ebulisa."
James1:2 Kugqaleni kuluvuyo olukhulu, bazalwana bam, xa niwela kwizilingo ngezilingo;"
James1:3 nisazi nje ukuba ucikido lokholo lwenu lusebenza umonde.
James1:4 Umonde ke mawube nomsebenzi ozalisekileyo, ukuze nibe ngabazalisekileyo, abagqibeleleyo, ningaswele nto."
James1:5 Ukuba ubani kuni uswele ubulumko, makacele kuThixo, onika bonke engenakumbi, engangcikivi; kwaye uya kuyinikwa."
James1:6 Makacele ekholwa, engathandabuzi; Kuba lowo uthandabuzayo ufana nokulatyuza kolwandle, luqhutywa ngumoya, luntsileka."
James1:7 Kuba loo mntu makangabi uya kwamkela nto kuyo iNkosi.
James1:8 Indoda emphefumlo umbaxa iyahlozinga kuzo zonke iindlela zayo.
James1:9 Ke umzalwana othobekileyo makaqhayise ngako ukuphakama kwakhe;
James1:10 osisityebi ke makaqhayise ngako ukuthobeka kwakhe; ngokuba uya kudlula njengentyantyambo yengca.
James1:11 Kuba lithi lakuphuma ilanga, kunye nolophu, liyitshise ingca, ize ke intyantyambo yayo ivuthuluke, buthi nobuhle bembonakalo yayo butshabalale; siya kwenjenjalo nesityebi ukungcumbeka eluhambeni lwaso."
James1:12 Inoyolo indoda ekunyamezelayo ukulingwa; ngokuba yothi, yakuba icikidekile, isamkele isithsaba sobomi, ebabeke ngedinga iNkosi abo bayithandayo."
James1:13 Makungabikho namnye utshoyo akuhendwa ukuthi, Ndihendwa kwaThixo;"
James1:14 Elowo ke uhendwa akutsalwa, abanjiswe, yeyakhe inkanuko."
James1:15 Ithi inkanuko, yakuba ithabathile, izale isono; isono, xa sithe safezwa, sivelisa ukufa."
James1:16 Musani ukulahlekiswa, bazalwana bam baziintanda."
James1:17 Sonke isipho esilungileyo, naso sonke isipho esigqibeleleyo, sesaphezulu; sihla sivela kuye uYise wezikhanyiso, ongenabuyambo nasithunzi sakujika."
James1:18 Uthandile, wasizala ngelizwi lenyaniso, ukuze sibe yintlahlela yazo izidalwa zakhe."
James1:19 Ngoko ke, bazalwana bam baziintanda, makathi umntu wonke enze msinya ukuva, enze kade ukuthetha, enze kade ukuqumba;"
James1:20 Kuba ingqumbo yendoda ayisebenzi bulungisa bukaThixo.
James1:21 Kungoko endithi, nibubekile nxamnye bonke ubunyhukunyhuku nokuphuphuma ulunya, namkele ninobulali ilizwi elimiselweyo kuni, elinako ukuyisindisa imiphefumlo yenu."
James1:22 Yibani ke ngabenzi belizwi, ningabi ngabaphulaphuli kodwa, nizikhohlisa."
James1:23 Kuba umntu, ukuba ungumphulaphuli nje welizwi, engemenzi walo, lowo ufana nendoda eqiqa ubuso bayo bobuntu esipilini;"
James1:24 kuba iyaziqiqa, imke, ilibale kwaoko ukuba ibinjani na."
James1:25 Ke yena oqondela emthethweni ogqibeleleyo wayo inkululeko, ahlale ehleli kuwo, ethe nje akaba ngumphulaphuli olibalayo, esuke waba ngumenzi womsebenzi: yena uya kuba noyolo ekwenzeni kwakhe."
James1:26 Ukuba ubani kuni uba ungonqulayo, abe engalubambi ngomkhala ulwimi lwakhe, elukuhla intliziyo yakhe, unqulo lwalowo alunto yanto."
James1:27 Unqulo lona oluhlambulukileyo, olu ngadyobhekileyo phambi koThixo uBawo, lulo olu: kukuvelela iinkedama nabahlolokazi embandezelweni, yabo: kukuzigcina engenabala kulo ihlabathi."
James2:1 Bazalwana bam, musani ukukuphatha ngokukhetha buso bamntu, ukukholwa yiNkosi yethu yozuko, uYesu Kristu."
James2:2 Kuba, xa kuthe kwangena endlwini yenu yesikhungu indoda enemisesane yegolide, inengubo eqaqambileyo, kwaza ke kwangena ihlwempu, lineengubo ezimdaka;"
James2:3 naza nakhangela kulowo uvethe ingubo eqaqambileyo, nathi kuye, Hlala apha wena kakuhle; ndithi kwihlwempu, Yima wena phaya, mhlawumbi uhlale phantsi phantsi kwesihlalo seenyawo zam;"
James2:4 Anikhethi buso na phakathi kwenu, naba ngabagwebi bengcinga embi?"
James2:5 Yivani, bazalwana bam baziintanda: uThixo akawanyulanga na amahlwempu eli hlabathi, ukuba abe zizityebi zokholo, neendlalifa zobukumkani, awababeka ngedinga abo bamthandayo?"
James2:6 Kodwa nina nibadelile abasweleyo. Izityebi azinishicileli na? Azinirholeli ematyaleni na?
James2:7 Azilinyelisi na igama elihle enabizwa ngalo?
James2:8 Ukuba niyawuzalisa umthetho wakomkhulu, ngokwesibhalo esithi, Uze umthande ummelwane wakho ngoko uzithanda ngako, nityaphile;"
James2:9 Kodwa ukuba nikhetha ubuso bomntu, nisebenza isono, niyohlwaywa ngumthetho ngokwabagqithi."
James2:10 Kuba nabani na oya kuwugcina umthetho uphela, aze aphule umthetho omnye, unetyala layo yonke."
James2:11 Kuba lowo wathi, Musa ukukrexeza, ubuye wathi, Musa ukubulala. Ke, ukuba akukrexezi, kodwa ubulala, usewuthe waba ngumgqithi-mthetho."
James2:12 Yithini ukuthetha, yithini ukwenza, nenze njengabaza kugwetywa ngomthetho wenkululeko."
James2:13 Kuba umgwebo awuyi kuba natarhu kulowo ungenzanga nceba; yaye inceba iyawuqhayisela umgwebo.
James2:14 Kunceda ntoni na, bazalwana bam, ukuba umntu uthi unokholo, abe imisebenzi ke engenayo? Lunako na ukumsindisa ukholo?"
James2:15 Ukuba ke umzalwana, nokuba ngudade, uhamba ze, eswele ukudla kwemihla ngemihla,"
James2:16 Athi ke omnye wenu kubo, Hambani ninoxolo, yothani, hluthani; nibe ke ningabaniki izinto ezo ziwufaneleyo umzimba; inceda ntoni na?"
James2:17 Ngokunjalo nalo ukholo, ukuba luthi lungabi namisebenzi, lufile ngokukokwalo."
James2:18 Wosuka omnye, athi, Wena unokholo, ke mna ndinemisebenzi; ndibonise ukholo lwakho olungenamisebenzi yakho; nam ndokubonisa ngokwasemisebenzini yam ukholo lwam."
James2:19 Wena uyakholwa ukuba uThixo mnye; uyatyapha; nazo iidemon ziyakholwa, zibe namanwele."
James2:20 Uyathanda na ke ukwazi, mntundini ungento, ukuba ukholo olu, ingekho imisebenzi, lufile?"
James2:21 uAbraham, ubawo wethu, akagwetyelwanga na ngokwasemisebenzini, akumnikela uIsake, unyana wakhe, phezu kwesibingelelo?"
James2:22 Uyabona ukuba ukholo lwalusebenzisana nemisebenzi yakhe, lwenziwa wagqibelela ukholo ngokwasemisebenzini?"
James2:23 Saza sazaliseka isibhalo esithi, Wakholwa ke uAbraham nguye uThixo, kwaza oko kwabalelwa ebulungiseni kuye, wabizwa ngokuba sisihlobo sikaThixo."
James2:24 Niyabona ke ngoko, ukuba umntu uyagwetyelwa ngokwasemisebenzini; kungabi ngokwaselukholweni lodwa."
James2:25 Ngokunjalo ke, noRahabhi, ihenyukazi, akagwetyelwanga na ngokwasemisebenzini, akubamkela ngobubele abathunywa, abakhuphele phandle ngayimbi indlela?"
James2:26 Kaloku, kwanjengokuba umzimba, ungekho umoya, ufile, ngokunjalo ukholo, ingekho imisebenzi, lufile nalo."
James3:1 Bana beso, le se ke la ba baruti ba bangata, le ntse le tseba hobane re tla fumana kahlolo e fetisang ka boholo."
James3:2 Hobane bohle re kgopisa bohle. Haeba leha e le mang a sa khoptjoe puong, eo ke monna ea phethahetseng, ea khonang ho laola le mele oohle ka tōmo."
James3:3 Bona, re kenya ditomo melomong ya dipere, hore di tle di re utlwe; mme re fetola mmele wa bona kaofela."
James3:4 Bonang, le dikepe, leha di le kgolo hakalo, mme di kgweetswa ke meya e bohale, di sokololwa ka kerama e nyenyane haholo, di ya moo mmusisi a ratang."
James3:5 Ka mokgwa o jwalo, leleme ke setho se senyenyane, mme le ithorisa ka tse kgolo. Bonang, mollo o monyenyane o hotetsa ntho e kgolo hakakang!"
James3:6 Leleme ke mollo, ke lefatshe la bokgopo; mme e tjheswa ka mollo wa dihele."
James3:7 Hobane mefuta yohle ya diphoofolo, le ya dinonyana, le ya dinoha, le ya tse lewatleng, e a thapisoa, mme e se e thapisitswe ke batho."
James3:8 Empa leleme ha ho motho ya ka le thapisang; ke bobe bo sa laoleheng, bo tletse chefo e bolaeang."
James3:9 Ka lona re boka Modimo, Ntate; mme ka lona re rohaka batho, ba bopilweng ka setshwantsho sa Modimo."
James3:10 Molomong o le mong ho tswa poko le thohako. Bana beso, dintho tsena ha di a tshwanela ho ba jwalo."
James3:11 A sediba se ka kolla nqalong e le nngwe metsi a monate le a babang?
James3:12 Banabeso, na sefate sa feiye se ka beha ditholwana tsa mohlwaare na? kapa sefate sa morara, lifeiga? ka mokgwa o jwalo ha ho sediba se ka ntshang metsi a letswai le a monate."
James3:13 Ke mang hara lona ya bohlale, ya nang le tsebo? a ke a bonahatse ka metsamao e metle mesebetsi ya hae ka bonolo ba bohlale."
James3:14 Empa ekare ha le ena le mohono o babang, le kgang ka dipelong tsa lona, le se ke la ithorisa, mme le se ke la bua leshano le hanyetsa nnete."
James3:15 Bohlale bona ha bo tswe hodimo, empa ke ba lefatshe, ba nama, ba bodiabolose."
James3:16 Hobane moo mona le dikomang di leng teng, ho na le moferefere le mesebetsi yohle e mebe."
James3:17 Empa bohlale bo tswang hodimo, pele bo hlwekile, hape bo na le kgotso, bo bonolo, bo bonolo, bo tletse mohau le ditholwana tse molemo, ha bo na leeme, ha bo na boikaketsi."
James3:18 Mme ditholwana tsa ho loka di jalwa kgotsong ho ba etsang kgotso.
James4:1 Zivela phi na iimfazwe nokulwa phakathi kwenu? Aziphumi na apha ezinkanukweni zenu, eziwaphumela umkhosi amalungu enu?"
James4:2 Niyakhanuka, ningabi nakuzuza nto noko; niyabulala, nizonde, ningabi nakuzuza nto noko; niyalwa, nenze imfazwe, ningabi nakuzuza nto ke, ngenxa yokuba ningaceli."
James4:3 Niyacela, ningamkeli noko, ngenxa enokuba nicela kakubi, ukuze oko nikuchithele iziyolo zenu."
James4:4 Bakrexezindini, bakrexezikazindini, anazi na ukuba ubuhlobo balo ihlabathi bubutshaba kuye uThixo? Othe ngoko angaba sisihlobo salo ihlabathi, utshaba lukaThixo."
James4:5 Ngaba isibhalo sifumana sithetha ukuthi: “Umoya ohleli ngaphakathi kwethu ukhweletisa?
James4:6 Ke ubabala kakhulu ngakumbi. Kungoko athi, uThixo uyabachasa abanekratshi, abababale abazithobileyo."
James4:7 Mthobeleni ngoko uThixo. Mchaseni ke uMtyholi, wonibaleka."
James4:8 Sondelani kuye uThixo, wosondela kuni. Hlambululani izandla, boni; nenze nyulu iintliziyo zenu, nina bamphefumlo umbaxa."
James4:9 Yibani ziindwayi, nikhedame, nilile; ukuhleka kwenu makujike kube kukukhedama, novuyo lwenu lube kukuthi dakumba."
James4:10 Zithobeni emehlweni eNkosi, yoniphakamisa."
James4:11 Musani ukuthetha okubi omnye ngomnye, bazalwana. Lowo uthetha kakubi ngomzalwana wakhe, amgwebe umzalwana wakhe, uthetha okubi ngomthetho, egweba umthetho; kodwa ukuba uyawugweba umthetho, akumenzi wamthetho, ungumgwebi."
James4:12 Mnye uMmisi-mthetho, lowo unako ukusindisa nokutshabalalisa; ungubani na wena, umgwebayo omnye?"
James4:13 Wenani kaloku, nina nitshoyo ukuthi, Namhla, nokuba kungomso, siya kuya kulaa mzi, senze khona umnyaka ube mnye, sirhwebe, sizuze;"
James4:14 Kaloku ningayazi nje into eya kwenzeka ngomso. Kuba buyintoni na ubomi bakho? Kungumphunga obonakala ixesha elifutshane, uze ke uthi shwaka."
James4:15 Kungoko ningathi, Ukuba iNkosi ithe yathanda, saphila, siya kwenza le, nalaa nto."
James4:16 Ngoku ke niqhayisa ngokuqhankqalaza kwenu; konke ukuqhayisa okunjalo kubi.
James4:17 Ngoko ke lowo ukwaziyo ukwenza okulungileyo angakwenzi, kusisono kuye."
James5:1 Wenani kaloku, zityebi, lilani nenze isijwili ngeenkxwaleko zenu ezizayo."
James5:2 Ubutyebi benu bubolile, neengubo zenu zidliwe ngamanundu."
James5:3 Igolide nesilivere yenu idliwe ngumhlwa; umhlwa wazo uya kuba lingqina ngakuni, uyidle inyama yenu njengomlilo. Niziqwebele ubutyebi ngemihla yokugqibela."
James5:4 Yabonani, umvuzo wabasebenzi, abavune amasimi enu, lowo nibandezwe kuni ngobuqhetseba, uyakhala; kwaye ukubhomboloza kwabavuni bangene ezindlebeni zeNkosi yemikhosi."
James5:5 Nadla ubuncwane emhlabeni, naxhamla iziyolo; nizondle iintliziyo zenu njengamhla kuxheliweyo."
James5:6 Niligwebe nambulala olilungisa; kanjalo akanichasi.
James5:7 Nyamezelani ngoko, bazalwana, ide ifike iNkosi. Yabonani, umlimi uyasilinda isiqhamo somhlaba esinexabiso elikhulu, anyamezele ngaso, ade amkele imvula yokuqala neyakwindla."
James5:8 Nyamezelani nani; zimiseni iintliziyo zenu, kuba ukufika kweNkosi kusondele."
James5:9 Musani ukukrokrelana omnye nomnye, bazalwana, ukuze ningagwetywa; yabonani, uMgwebi umi phambi komnyango."
James5:10 Bathabatheni, bazalwana bam, abaprofeti ababethetha egameni leNkosi, babe ngumzekelo wokuva ubunzima, nowokunyamezela."
James5:11 Yabonani, sithi, banoyolo abo banyamezelayo. Nivile ngonyamezelo lukaYobhi, nayibona nendlela iNkosi eya kwenza ngayo, ngokuba iNkosi inemfesane kakhulu, inenceba."
James5:12 Ngaphezu kweento zonke, bazalwana bam, musani ukufunga, nokuba lizulu, nokuba ngumhlaba, nokuba sesinye isifungo esiyini; nohayi wenu, hayi; ukuze ningaweli ekugwetyweni."
James5:13 Kukho mntu na phakathi kwenu uva ububi? makathandaze. Ngaba kukho ukonwaba? makavume iindumiso.
James5:14 Kukho mntu na ufayo phakathi kwenu? makabize amadoda amakhulu ebandla; bathandaze phezu kwakhe, bamthambise ngeoli, egameni leNkosi."
James5:15 Umthandazo wokholo uya kumsindisa lowo ugulayo, iNkosi imvuse; nokuba ubethe wenza izono, wozixolelwa."
James5:16 Vumani iziphoso omnye komnye, nithandazelane, ukuze niphiliswe. Umthandazo welungisa unamandla kakhulu."
James5:17 uEliya wayengumntu oneemvakalelo ezibuhlungu njengathi, wathandaza enyamekile ukuba ingani; akwabakho mvula emhlabeni iminyaka emithathu eneenyanga ezintandathu."
James5:18 Waphinda wathandaza, laza izulu lanika imvula, nomhlaba wavelisa iziqhamo zawo."
James5:19 Bazalwana, ukuba ubani kuni uthe walahlekana enyanisweni, wathi ubani wamguqula;"
James5:20 Mazi ukuba lowo wamguqulayo umoni ekulahlekeni kwakhe uya kuwusindisa umphefumlo ekufeni, wagubungela inkitha yezono."
1Peter1:1 uPetros, umpostile kaYesu Kristu, ubhalela abasemzini abachithachitheke kuyo yonke iPonto, neGalati, neKapadoki, neAsiya, neBhithiniya;"
1Peter1:2 nabanyuliweyo ngokokwazi kwenxa engaphambili kukaThixo uYise, ebungcweleni boMoya, kuse ekululameleni nasekufefweni kwegazi likaYesu Kristu: uthi, Makwandiswe kuni ubabalo noxolo."
1Peter1:3 Makabongwe uThixo, uYise weNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, othe ngokobuninzi benceba yakhe, wasizala ngokutsha, ukuba sibe nethemba eliphilileyo ngokuvuka kukaYesu Kristu kwabafileyo;"
1Peter1:4 ukuba sibe nelifa elingenakonakala, elingenakudyobheka, elingenakubuna, eligcinelwe nina emazulwini;"
1Peter1:5 nina bathe ngamandla kaThixo ngokholo bagcinelwa usindiso olulungiselwe ukutyhilwa ngexesha lokugqibela.
1Peter1:6 Enigcoba ngalo, nokuba nithe naba buhlungu umzuzwana ngoku, ukuba nimelwe kuko, phakathi kwezilingo ngezilingo;"
1Peter1:7 ukuze ukucikideka kokholo lwenu kufunyanwe kunqabile kakhulu, ngaphezu kwegolide le itshabalalayo, noko icikidwa ngomlilo; kuse kuyo indumiso nembeko nozuko ekutyhilekeni kukaYesu Kristu."
1Peter1:8 Enithi ningambonanga, niyamthanda; enithi ke nikholwa kuye, noko ngoku ningamboniyo, nigcobe ngovuyo olungathethekiyo, oluzukisiweyo;"
1Peter1:9 nisamkela isiphelo sokholo lwenu, usindiso ke lwemiphefumlo yenu."
1Peter1:10 Usindiso olo babuphengulula, baphengulula ngalo abaprofeti, ababeprofeta ngobabalo oluya kunifikela;"
1Peter1:11 bephengulula ukuba wayesalatha xesha lini na, linjani na, uMoya kaKristu, awayezingqinela kubo ngenxa engaphambili iintlungu ezamiselwa uKristu, nozuko oluya kuzilandela."
1Peter1:12 Batyhilelwa ukuba ezo ndaba zazishunyayelwa ngabo bazivakalisayo kuni ngoku iindaba ezimnandi ngoMoya oyiNgcwele owavela ezulwini; izinto ezo ezizinqwenelayo izithunywa zezulu ukuqondela kuzo.
1Peter1:13 Ngoko, bhinqani izinqe zengqondo yenu, ninobungcathu, niluthembe ngokugqibeleleyo ubabalo oluziswa kuni ekutyhilekeni kukaYesu Kristu;"
1Peter1:14 ngokwabantwana bolulamo, ningazimimeli ngokweenkanuko zangaphambili ekungazini kwenu;"
1Peter1:15 nithi ke, ngokokwalowo ungcwele wanibizayo, nibe ngcwele nani ngokwenu kuyo yonke ihambo."
1Peter1:16 Ngenxa yokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa, Yibani ngcwele; ngokuba ndingcwele mna."
1Peter1:17 Nani nimnqula nithi uYihlo, lowo ugwebayo ngokokwenza komntu wonke, engakhethi buso, lihlaleni ixesha lokuphambukela kwenu apha ninoloyiko;"
1Peter1:18 nisazi nje ukuba anihlawulelwanga nikhululwe ngazinto zinakonakala, oozisilivere noozigolide, kuyo ihambo yenu engento, enayinikelwayo ngooyihlo."
1Peter1:19 Kungegazi elinqabileyo likaKristu, njengelemvana engenasiphako, engenasiphako;"
1Peter1:20 owathi okunene wanyulwa ngenxa engaphambili, lingekasekwa ihlabathi, wabonakalaliswa kuni ekupheleni kwala maxesha;"
1Peter1:21 enithi ngaye nakholwa kuye uThixo, owamvusayo kwabafileyo, wamnika uzuko; ukuze ukholo lwakho nethemba lakho libe kuThixo."
1Peter1:22 Niyenze nyulu nje imiphefumlo yenu ngokuyilulamela inyaniso ngoMoya, kuse ekuthandeni abazalwana okungenaluhanahaniso, thandanani ke ngokwasentliziyweni ehlambulukileyo;"
1Peter1:23 Nizelwe ngokutsha, kungengokwasembewini enokonakala, kungokwasembewini engenakonakala, ngelizwi likaThixo eliphilileyo, elihleliyo ngonaphakade."
1Peter1:24 Kuba Yonke inyama injengengca, Nabo bonke ubuqaqawuli bomntu bunjengentyantyambo yengca. Ingca iyoma, ivuthuluke nentyantyambo yayo;"
1Peter1:25 Ke lona ilizwi leNkosi lihleli ngonaphakade. Elo ke leli lizwi lashunyayelwayo kuni ngeendaba ezilungileyo.
1Peter2:1 Kungoko ndithi, nibulahle ke bonke ububi, nalo lonke ulunya, nokuhanahanisa, nomona, nazo zonke izinyeliso;"
1Peter2:2 Njengeentsana ezisandul’ ukuzalwa, langazelelani ubisi lwelizwi, ukuze nikhule ngalo;"
1Peter2:3 ukuba okunene nikuvile, ukuba iNkosi inobubele."
1Peter2:4 Lowo usiza kuye njengelitye eliphilileyo, elicekiswe okunene ngabantu, kodwa linyuliwe nguThixo, linqabileyo;"
1Peter2:5 Nani ngokwenu, njengamatye aphilileyo, yakhekani nibe yindlu eyiyeyomoya, isibingeleli esingcwele sokunyusa amadini angoMoya, awakholekileyo kakuhle kuye uThixo ngoYesu Kristu."
1Peter2:6 Kungoko ikhoyo nokubakho esibhalweni indawo ethi, Yabona, ndibeka eZiyon ilitye lembombo, elinyuliweyo, elinqabileyo; Lowo ukholwayo kuye akayi kukha adaniswe."
1Peter2:7 Kuni ngoko bakholwayo, liyimbeko; ke kwabangevayo, ilitye abalicekisayo abakhi, Lelona laba yintloko yembombo;"
1Peter2:8 Ilitye ke lokuwisa, iliwa lesikhubekiso, kwabo bakhubekayo, bengaliva ilizwi;"
1Peter2:9 Ke nina nisisizukulwana esinyuliweyo, isibingeleli esibukumkani, uhlanga olungcwele, abantu abayinqobo; ukuze nivakalise isidima salowo wanibizayo ukuba niphume ebumnyameni, ningene ekukhanyeni kwakhe okungummangaliso;"
1Peter2:10 enanifudula ningebantu, ke ngoku ningabantu bakaThixo; enaningenzelwanga nceba, ke ngoku nenzelwe inceba."
1Peter2:11 Zintanda, ndiyanivuselela njengabaphambukeli nabasemzini, ukuba nikhumke ezinkanukweni ezizezenyama, zona ziwuphumele umkhosi umphefumlo."
1Peter2:12 Ihambo yenu mayibe ntle phakathi kweentlanga; ukuze kulo nto bathetha okubi ngani, ngathi ningabenzi bokubi, bathi ngokubona imisebenzi yenu emihle, bamzukise uThixo ngomhla wokuvelelwa."
1Peter2:13 Wuthobeleni ngoko wonke ummiso ongowomntu, ngenxa yeNkosi; nokuba ngukumkani, njengowongamileyo;"
1Peter2:14 nokuba ngabalawuli, njengabathunyiweyo nguye, ukuze baphindezele okunene kubenzi bokubi, badumise abenzi bokulungileyo."
1Peter2:15 Kuba ukuthanda kukaThixo kukuba nithi, ngokwenza okulungileyo, nibethe ithi cwaka intswela-kwazi yabantu abaziintsweli-kuqonda;"
1Peter2:16 nithi ningabakhululekileyo nje, ningabi ngabayenza inkululeko ibe sisigqubuthelo sobubi; nibe ngabakhonzi bakaThixo."
1Peter2:17 Bekani bonke abantu. Thandani abazalwana. Yoyika uThixo. Beka ukumkani.
1Peter2:18 Nina bakhonzi, bathobeleni ninako konke ukoyika iinkosi zenu; ingabi kwabalungileyo nabathantamisayo bodwa, ibe kwanabagwenxa."
1Peter2:19 Kuba oku kuyabuleleka, ukuba umntu uthwala iintsizi, ngenxa yokumazi uThixo, eve ubunzima esoniwa."
1Peter2:20 Kuba kuya kuba ludumo luni na, ukuba ninyamezele nakuntlithwa nisona? Ke ukuba nithi, nisenza okulungileyo, nive ubunzima, nize ninyamezele, oko kuyathandeka kuThixo."
1Peter2:21 Nabizelwa oko; ngokuba noKristu weva ubunzima ngenxa yethu, esishiya nomzekelo, ukuze silandele emkhondweni wakhe:"
1Peter2:22 ongenzanga sono, ekungafunyanwanga nkohliso emlonyeni wakhe;"
1Peter2:23 owathi, etshabhiswa, akaphindi atshabhise; Uthe esiva ubunzima, akasongela; ke ubeyekele kulowo ugwebayo ngobulungisa;"
1Peter2:24 Owathi ngokwakhe, izono zethu wazithwala ngomzimba wakhe emthini, ukuze sithi, sifile ngakwizono, siphilele ebulungiseni;"
1Peter2:25 Kuba beninjengezimvu zilahlekile; kodwa ngoku nibuyele kuye uMalusi noMveleli wemiphefumlo yenu.
1Peter3:1 Ngokunjalo, nina bafazi, wathobeleni awenu amadoda; ukuze kuthi, nokuba kukho kuwo angalivayo ilizwi, athi ngehambo yabafazi, lingekho ilizwi, azuzeke;"
1Peter3:2 ebona ihambo yenu enyulu, enoloyiko."
1Peter3:3 Ukuhomba kwenu makungabi kokwangaphandle, kokulukwa kweenwele, nokunxitywa kwegolide, nokwambathwa kweengubo;"
1Peter3:4 Makube kokomntu ofihlakeleyo wentliziyo, ovethe ukungonakali, umoya onobulali, ozolileyo, oxabiso likhulu emehlweni kaThixo."
1Peter3:5 Kuba besenjenjalo ukuhomba abafazi abangcwele, ababekholose ngoThixo, bewathobele awabo amadoda;"
1Peter3:6 Kwanjengokuba uSara wamlulamelayo uAbraham, embiza ngokuthi yinkosi; eniziintombi eniziintombi zenu, ukuba nisenza okulungileyo, ningoyiki nakuqhiphuka umbilini."
1Peter3:7 Ngokunjalo, nina madoda, hlalani nabo ngokokwazi, nimbeka umfazi, njengesona sitya siethe-ethe, njengeendlalifa kunye nani zobabalo lobomi, ukuze imithandazo yenu ingathinteleki."
1Peter3:8 Elokugqiba, cingani nto-nye nonke, velanani, thandanani njengabazalwana, yibani nemfesane kakhulu, yibani nembeko;"
1Peter3:9 Ningabuyekezi ububi ngobubi, nokutshabhisa ngokutshabhisa; nisazi nje ukuba nabizelwa oko, ukuze niyidle ilifa intsikelelo."
1Peter3:10 Kuba Lowo unga angathanda ubomi, Ayibone imihla elungileyo, Makaluphezise ulwimi lwakhe ebubini, Nomlomo wakhe ungathethi nkohliso."
1Peter3:11 Makaphambuke ebubini, enze okulungileyo; makafune uxolo, aluphuthume."
1Peter3:12 Ngokuba amehlo eNkosi aphezu kwamalungisa, neendlebe zayo zisingisele esikhungweni sawo; ke ubuso beNkosi buphezu kwabenza okubi."
1Peter3:13 Ngubani na yena owonona, ukuba nithe naba ngabalandeli bokulungileyo?"
1Peter3:14 Nokuba nive ubunzima ngenxa yobulungisa, ninoyolo;"
1Peter3:15 iNkosi ke iNkosi yingcwaliseni ezintliziyweni zenu, nihlale ke nikulungele ukuziphendulela kumntu wonke obuzayo kuni ilizwi, ngalo ithemba elingaphakathi kwenu, ninobulali noloyiko;"
1Peter3:16 ukuba nesazela esilungileyo; ukuze kuloo nto banithethela kakubi, ngathi ningabenzi bokubi, badane abo bayigxekayo ihambo yenu elungileyo kuKristu."
1Peter3:17 Ukuba ke kukuthanda kukaThixo ukuba nive ubunzima, okona kunilungeleyo kukubuva nisenza okulungileyo, kunokubuva nisenza okubi."
1Peter3:18 Kuba noKristu wabuva kwakanye ubunzima ngenxa yezono, ilungisa lisiva ubunzima ngenxa yabangemalungisa, ukuze asisondeze kuye uThixo, ebulewe esenyameni, kodwa edliswe ubomi ekuwo umoya."
1Peter3:19 Wahamba ngayo ke, washumayela koomoya abasentolongweni;"
1Peter3:20 ababefudula bengeva, xenikweni ukuzeka kade umsindo kukaThixo kwakulindile ngemihla kaNowa, xeshikweni kwakwakhiwa umkhombe, ekwathi kuwo abantu abambalwa, oko kukuthi, imiphefumlo esibhozo, yasindiswa ngamanzi."
1Peter3:21 Lowo ufana nqwa nobhaptizo olusisindisayo ngoku, ingekuko ukulahla ubunyhukunyhuku benyama;"
1Peter3:22 osekunene kukaThixo, eye emazulwini; kuthotyelwe phantsi kwakhe izithunywa zezulu, noomagunya, namandla."
1Peter4:1 Ekubeni ngoko uKristu eve ubunzima ngenxa yethu esenyameni, xhobani nani kwaloo ngcingane; ngokuba lowo uve ubunzima esenyameni, ukhunyulwe ekoneni;"
1Peter4:2 ukuze ixesha eliseleyo enyameni ningabi saliphilela ezinkanukweni zabantu, niliphilele ekuthandeni kukaThixo."
1Peter4:3 Kuba lanele ixesha elidluleyo ukuba sisebenze ukuthanda kweentlanga, esahamba nje eburheletyweni, ezinkanukweni, ekutshisweni yiwayini, ezindywaleni, ezindywaleni, nasekukhonzeni izithixo, okungekhona esikweni;"
1Peter4:4 Ekubeni benithe nqa, ukuba anibaleki nabo kuloo myezo wonakeleyo, benyelisa;"
1Peter4:5 abaya kuphendula kulowo ulungele ukugweba abaphilileyo nabafileyo.
1Peter4:6 Kuba ngenxa yoku zashunyayelwa iindaba ezilungileyo nakwabafileyo, ukuze bagwetywe ngokwabantu besenyameni, kodwa badle ubomi ngokukaThixo, bekuwo umoya."
1Peter4:7 Ke kaloku ukuphela kweento zonke kusondele. Yibani nobungcathu, niphaphamele ukuthandaza."
1Peter4:8 Ngaphezu kweento zonke ke yibani nothandano olunyamekileyo, ngokuba uthando luya kugubungela inkitha yezono."
1Peter4:9 Bukani iindwendwe ngaphandle kokukrokra.
1Peter4:10 Ngoko wonke umntu wasamkelayo isiphiwo eso, khonzanani ngaso, njengamagosa amahle obabalo lukaThixo."
1Peter4:11 Ukuba umntu uyathetha, makathethe ngokwezihlabo zikaThixo; ukuba umntu uyalungiselela, makalungiselele ngokwasekomeleleni akuphiwa nguThixo, ukuze ezintweni zonke azukiswe uThixo ngoYesu Kristu, elulolwakhe uzuko namandla, kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni. Amen."
1Peter4:12 Zintanda, musani ukuwuthela nqa umlilo okhoyo phakathi kwenu;"
1Peter4:13 Yithini, njengoko ningamadlelane ngeentlungu zikaKristu, nivuye; ukuze, nasekutyhilekeni kobuqaqawuli bakhe, nivuye nigcoba."
1Peter4:14 Ukuba niyangcikivwa ngenxa yegama likaKristu, ninoyolo; kuba uMoya wozuko nokaThixo uphumle phezu kwenu; ngokukokwabo uyanyeliswa, kodwa ngokukokwenu uyazukiswa."
1Peter4:15 Makungabikho ke bani kuni uva ubunzima ngokombulali, nangokwesela, nangokomenzi wobubi, nangokovelela izinto ezimbi;"
