1Peter4:16 Ukuba ke ubani uva ubunzima ngokuba engumKristu, makangadani; makamzukise ke uThixo ngenxa yoko."
1Peter4:17 Kaloku ixesha lokuba umgwebo uqale ngendlu kaThixo. Ukuba ke luqale kuthi, koba yintoni na ukuphela kwabo bangazithobeliyo iindaba ezimnandi zikaThixo?"
1Peter4:18 Ke ukuba ilungisa lisindiswa ngenkankulu, wobonakala phi na umntu ongahloneli Thixo nomoni?"
1Peter4:19 Ngoko ke abo babuvayo ubunzima ngokokuthanda kukaThixo, mabayiyaleze kuye imiphefumlo yabo, enguMdali othembekileyo ekwenzeni okulungileyo."
1Peter5:1 Amadoda amakhulu aphakathi kwenu ndiyawavuselela, mna ndikwayindoda enkulu, nengqina leentlungu zikaKristu, ndinesabelo ebuqaqawulini obuya kutyhileka;"
1Peter5:2 Waluseni umhlambi kaThixo ophakathi kwenu, niwuvelela, kungengakunyanzelwa, makube ngokokuzithandela; kungengenxa yenzuzo embi, makube ngokwentumekelelo;"
1Peter5:3 kungabi njengabazigagamelayo izahlulo zawo, yibani yimizekelo kumhlambi."
1Peter5:4 Nothi, akubonakala uMalusi oyintloko, nisifumane isithsaba salo uzuko esingabuniyo."
1Peter5:5 Ngokunjalo, nina batsha, wathobeleni amadoda amakhulu. Yambathani ukuthobeka kwentliziyo nonke; kuba uThixo uyabachasa abanekratshi, abababale abazithobileyo."
1Peter5:6 Zithobeni ngoko phantsi kwesandla esinamandla sikaThixo, ukuze aniphakamise ngexesha elifanelekileyo,"
1Peter5:7 liphoseni kuye lonke ixhala lenu; ngokuba unikhathalele.
1Peter5:8 Yibani nobungcathu, phaphani; ngokuba ummangaleli wenu, uMtyholi, uhamba njengengonyama egqumayo, efuna ubani angamginyayo;"
1Peter5:9 mchaseni lowo, nizimasekile elukholweni, nisazi ukuba kwaezo ntlungu ziyenzeka kubo abazalwana benu abasehlabathini."
1Peter5:10 Ke kaloku uThixo walo lonke ubabalo, owasibizelayo eluzukweni lwakhe olungunaphakade, sikuKristu Yesu, wanga angathi, nakuba nive ubunzima umzuzwana, anilungise nigqibelele, anizimase, anomeleze, anisekele."
1Peter5:11 Kuye makubekho uzuko namandla, kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni. Amen."
1Peter5:12 NgoSilvano, umzalwana othembekileyo, njengoko ndicinga ngako, ndibhale kuni ngokufutshane, ndivuselela, ndingqina ukuba olu lubabalo oluyinene lukaThixo, nimiyo kulo."
1Peter5:13 Liyanibulisa ibandla eliseBhabheli, elinyuliweyo kunye nani; ngokunjalo noMarcus unyana wam."
1Peter5:14 Bulisanani ngolwango lothando. Uxolo malube nani nonke enikuKristu Yesu. Amen.
2Peter1:1 uSimon Petros, umkhonzi nompostile kaYesu Kristu, ubhalela abo baluzuzileyo ukholo olunqabileyo ngokufana nathi, ngobulungisa bukaThixo, uMsindisi wethu uYesu Kristu:"
2Peter1:2 Makwandiswe kuni ubabalo noxolo, ngokumazi uThixo, noYesu iNkosi yethu;"
2Peter1:3 Njengokuba amandla akhe obuThixo asiphile zonke izinto ezisingise ebomini nasekuhloneleni uThixo, ngako ukumazi lowo wasibizayo ngozuko nesidima;"
2Peter1:4 Esithe ngazo saphiwa amadinga amakhulu kakhulu, anqabileyo, ukuze ngawo nibe ngamadlelane ngemvelo yobuThixo, nisinde ekonakaleni okukhoyo ehlabathini ngenxa yenkanuko."
2Peter1:5 Ngoko ke, ngenxa yoko, nakuba niqokele ukukhuthala konke, nongezelele isidima elukholweni lwenu; nasesidimani ukwazi;"
2Peter1:6 ekwazini ukuzeyisa; nasekuzeyiseni umonde; nasekunyamezeleni ukuhlonela uThixo;
2Peter1:7 nasekuhloneleni uThixo, ukuthanda abazalwana; nakuthando lobuzalwana."
2Peter1:8 Kuba xa zikhoyo ezo zinto kuni, zisanda, zinenza ukuba ninganqeni, ningabi ngabaswele isiqhamo ekuyazini iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
2Peter1:9 Lowo zingekhoyo ezo zinto, uyimfama; ubona ke kusekude, ekulibele nokuhlanjululwa kwezono zakhe zakudala."
2Peter1:10 Endithi ngoko, bazalwana, makube kukhona nikhuthalele ukulwenza luqine ubizo nonyulo lwenu;"
2Peter1:11 Kuba ngokunjalo nophiwa ngokobutyebi ukungena ebukumkanini obungunaphakade beNkosi yethu, uMsindisi uYesu Kristu."
2Peter1:12 Kungoko ndingakuyekiyo ukuhlala ndinikhumbuza ngezo zinto, noko nizaziyo, nizimasekileyo enyanisweni leyo ikhoyo kuni."
2Peter1:13 Ndiba ke kububulungisa, ukuba ngalo gama ndikulo mnquba, ndinivuse ngokunikhumbuza;"
2Peter1:14 ndisazi nje ukuba kukufuphi ukususwa kwalo mnquba wam, njengoko nayo iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu yandazisayo."
2Peter1:15 Kananjalo ndiya kukhuthalela ke ukuba nibe nako, amaxa onke emva kokumka kwam, ukuzikhunjuzwa ezo zinto."
2Peter1:16 Kuba sithe, singalandelanga zintsomi zabuqhinga, sanazisa amandla nokufika kweNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu; sithe saba ngababoneli bobungangamsha bakhe."
2Peter1:17 Kuba wamkela kuThixo uYise imbeko nozuko, ekuzisweni kuye, bubuqaqawuli obubalaseleyo, izwi elinjengeli: Lo nguNyana wam oyintanda, endikholisiweyo mna nguye."
2Peter1:18 Elo lizwi salivayo liphuma ezulwini, sikunye naye entabeni engcwele."
2Peter1:19 Kaloku sinalo nelona lizwi liqinisekileyo lesiprofeto, enityaphayo ukuyigcina loo nto niyilumkela, ngathi sisikhanyiso esikhanyisa endaweni emnyama, kude kuse, liphume ikhwezi ezintliziyweni zenu;"
2Peter1:20 nikwazi oku kuqala, ukuba akukho siprofeto seSibhalo siphuma nakuyiphi na inkcazelo yobuqu."
2Peter1:21 Kaloku akukhanga kubekho siprofeto ngokuthanda komntu, kodwa abantu abangcwele bakaThixo bathetha beqhutywa nguMoya oyiNgcwele."
2Peter2:1 Ke kaloku, kwakukho nabaprofeti ababuxoki phakathi kwabantu; njengokuba naphakathi kwenu kuya kubakho abafundisi ababuxoki, bona baya kungenisa bucala amahlelo entshabalalo, bemkhanyela uMnini-nto-zonke owabathengayo, bezizisela intshabalalo emsinya."
2Peter2:2 Baninzi abaya kulandela intshabalalo yabo; eya kunyeliswa ngenxa yabo indlela yenyaniso.
2Peter2:3 Bathi benokubawa, banibonelele ngamazwi alalanisayo; abakugwetywa kungaphumliyo kwakudala, nayo intshabalalo yabo ayozeli."
2Peter2:4 Kuba, xa uThixo angazisindisanga izithunywa zezulu ezonayo, wesuka waziphosa kwelabafileyo, wabanikela imixokelelwane yobumnyama, ukuba zigcinelwe umgwebo;"
2Peter2:5 Engaliyekanga ihlabathi lakudala, wesuka walondoloza uNowa, umshumayeli wobulungisa, engowesibhozo, elihlisela unogumbe ihlabathi labangahloneli Thixo;"
2Peter2:6 Wayitshisa iSodom neGomora, wayitshisa yaluthuthu, wayigweba ukuba ibhukuqeke, wayenza umzekelo wabaza kuba ngabangahloneli Thixo;"
2Peter2:7 Wamhlangula uLote olilungisa, owayephithikezwe yihambo engcolileyo yabangendawo;"
2Peter2:8 (Kuba loo mntu ulilungisa, ehleli phakathi kwabo, ngokubona nokuva, wayewuthuthumbisa imihla ngemihla umphefumlo walo olungisayo, ngemisebenzi yabo echasene nomthetho;)"
2Peter2:9 iyakwazi iNkosi ukubahlangula ekuhendweni abahlonela uThixo;
2Peter2:10 ngokukodwa ke abo balandela inyama ngokukhanuka ukuzidyobha, abadela ubukhosi, bakhukhumele, abangoyikiyo ukunyelisa izikhakhamela;"
2Peter2:11 Kaloku izithunywa zezulu, zingaphezulu koko ngamandla nokomelela, azibamangaleli ngenxa yeNkosi."
2Peter2:12 Ke aba, njengezinto eziphilileyo, ezingenangqondo, ezemvelo, ezizalelwe ukubanjwa nokutshatyalaliswa, banyelisa izinto abangazaziyo; baya konakala kanye ekonakaleni kwabo;"
2Peter2:13 Baya kwamkela umvuzo wobutshijolo, njengokuba kwabanjalo ukubalela emini ukuzonwabisa; bangamabala neziphako, bexhamla ubuncwane ngokulukuhla kwabo, bezingxala ukudla kwabo kunye nani;"
2Peter2:14 benamehlo azele lukrexezo, angenakuphunyuzwa esonweni; balukuhla imiphefumlo engazinzanga, intliziyo eqheliswe ukubawa; abantwana abaqalekisiweyo:"
2Peter2:15 Beyishiyile indlela ethe tye, balahleka, belandela indlela kaBhileham unyana kaBhohore, owathanda umvuzo wokungalungisi;"
2Peter2:16 Wohlwaywa ke ngokugqitha kwakhe umthetho; lathi iesile, lingenakuthetha nje, lathetha ngezwi lomntu, lamalela umprofeti lowo, ukuba angabi nxamnye nengqondo."
2Peter2:17 Aba ngamaqula angenamanzi, bangamafu aqhutywa ngumoya ovuthuzayo; abagcinelwe inkungu yobumnyama ngonaphakade."
2Peter2:18 Kuba, bevakalisa nje iindumbisa zamazwi angento yanto, babambisa ngeenkanuko zenyama, ngoburheletyo, abo babesindile, kanye kwabo bahambayo ekulahlekisweni."
2Peter2:19 Bebathembisa nje inkululeko, bona ngokwabo bangabakhonzi bokonakala;"
2Peter2:20 Kuba xa bathe, besindile kwiidyokhwe zehlabathi ngokuyazi iNkosi, uMsindisi uYesu Kristu, babuya ke bazibhijele zizo, boyise, isiphelo sabo sibi ngaphezu kwesiqalo."
2Peter2:21 Kuba ngekubalungele kanye, ukuba bebengayazanga indlela yobulungisa, kunokuba bathi beyazile, babuye umva, baphume kuwo umthetho ongcwele abawuwiselwayo."
2Peter2:22 Kodwa bahlelwa ngumzekeliso oyinyani othi, Inja ibuyele emhlanzweni wayo; nemazi yehagu ehlanjiweyo ekuzityibilikeni eludakeni."
2Peter3:1 Ngoku ndinibhalela, zintanda, le ncwadi iyeyesibini; endithi kuzo zombini ndiyivuselele ingqondo yenu engcwengekileyo ngokunikhumbuza;"
2Peter3:2 ukuze niwakhumbule amazwi abethethiwe ngenxa engaphambili ngabaprofeti abangcwele, nawo umthetho wabapostile bethu beNkosi uMsindisi;"
2Peter3:3 nikwazi oku kuqala, ukuba kuya kufika ngemihla yokugqibela abagxeki, behamba ngokwezabo iinkanuko;"
2Peter3:4 besithi, Liphi na idinga lokufika kwakhe? Kuba kuseloko oobawo balalayo ukufa, zonke izinto zahlala zihleli zinjengokwasekuqalekeni kwendalo."
2Peter3:5 Kuba oku kufihlakele kubo ngokuthanda kwabo, ukuba izulu laye likho kwakudala, nomhlaba uvele emanzini, umi emanzini, ngalo ilizwi likaThixo;"
2Peter3:6 elathi ihlabathi langoko lantywiliselwa ngamanzi, latshabalala."
2Peter3:7 Ke lona izulu langoku, nawo umhlaba lo, kwangelo lizwi ezo zinto ziqwetyelwe, zigcinelwe, umlilo, kuse kwimini yomgwebo nentshabalalo yabantu abangahloneli Thixo."
2Peter3:8 Le nto ke inye mayingafihlakali kuni, zintanda, ukuba phambi kweNkosi imini enye injengeminyaka eliwaka, neminyaka eliwaka injengemini enye."
2Peter3:9 iNkosi ayilibali dinga, njengoko abathile baba iyalibala; uzeka kade umsindo wethu ngenxa yethu, engathandi ukuba kutshabalale nabani na kodwa ukuze bonke bafikelele enguqukweni."
2Peter3:10 Imini yeNkosi iya kufika njengesela ebusuku; eliya kuthi ngalo izulu lidlule ingxokozelo, zithi neziqalelo zitshe zinyibilike, nomhlaba nayo imisebenzi ekuwo iya kutsha itshiswe."
2Peter3:11 Ekubeni ngoko zonke ezi zinto ziya kuchithakala, nimele ukuba ngabanjani na ngeehambo ezingcwele nokuhlonela uThixo;"
2Peter3:12 Niyilindele, nikungxamile, ukufika kwayo imini kaThixo, eliya kuthi ngayo izulu litshe lichithakale, zithi neziqalelo zitshe zinyibilike."
2Peter3:13 Thina ke ngokwedinga lakhe silindele amazulu amatsha nomhlaba omtsha, apho kumi ubulungisa."
2Peter3:14 Kungoko, zintanda, nilindele ezo zinto nje, khuthalelani ukuba nifunyanwe kuye niseluxolweni, ningenabala, ningenasiphako."
2Peter3:15 Ukuzeka kade umsindo kweNkosi yethu kubaleleni ekuthini lusindiso; njengokuba wanibhalelayo nomzalwana wethu oyintanda, uPawulos, ngokobulumko awabunikwayo;"
2Peter3:16 njengokuba, nasezincwadini zakhe zonke, ethetha kuzo ngezo ndawo; ekukhoyo kuzo zithile ziqiqeka nzima, abathi abangafundileyo, nabangazimasekileyo, bazigqwethele kokwabo ukutshabalala, njengokuba bezenjenjalo nezinye izibhalo."
2Peter3:17 Nani ngoko, zintanda, nizazi nje ngenxa engaphambili ezo zinto, zigcineni okwenu, ukuze ningathi, nikhukuliswe lulahlekiso lwabangenammiselo, niphalale kokukokwenu ukuqina."
2Peter3:18 Kodwa khulani elubabalweni nasekuyazini iNkosi yethu, uMsindisi uYesu Kristu. Kuye malubekho uzuko nangoku, kuse nakwimini engunaphakade. Amen."
1John1:1 Le nto yayikho kwasekuqalekeni, esakuvayo, esiyibonileyo ngamehlo ethu, esayibonayo, zaza izandla zethu zayiphatha, ngelizwi lobomi;"
1John1:2 Kuba obo bomi babonakaliswayo, nathi sabubona, siyangqina, siyanibonisa, obo bomi bungunaphakade, bona bube bunaye uYise, babonakaliswa kuthi;"
1John1:3 Oko ke sikubonileyo, sikuvileyo, siyakuxela kuni, ukuze nani nibe nobudlelane nathi. Baye ke ubudlelane bethu bunaye uYise, bunaye uNyana wakhe uYesu Kristu."
1John1:4 Ezi zinto sinibhalela ukuze uvuyo lwenu luzaliseke.
1John1:5 Lulo olu ke udaba esiluvileyo kuye, esinityela lona, lokuba uThixo ukukukhanya, akukho bumnyama kuye nakanye."
1John1:6 Ukuba sithi sinobudlelane naye, sibe sihamba ebumnyameni, soba siyaxoka, asiyenzi inyaniso;"
1John1:7 ke, ukuba sihamba ekukhanyeni, njengokuba yena esekukhanyeni, soba sinobudlelane omnye nomnye, lithi negazi likaYesu Kristu, uNyana wakhe, lisihlambulule kuso sonke isono."
1John1:8 Ukuba sithi asinasono, siyazikhohlisa, inyaniso ayikho kuthi."
1John1:9 Ukuba sithi sizivume izono zethu, uthembekile, ulilungisa, ukuba asixolele izono zethu, asihlambulule kuko konke ukungalungisi."
1John1:10 Ukuba sithi asonanga, simenza ixoki; ilizwi lakhe alikho kuthi."
1John2:1 Bantwanana bam, ndinibhalela ezi zinto, ukuze ningoni. Ukuba kukho othe wona, sinoMthetheleli kuye uYise, uYesu Kristu ilungisa."
1John2:2 Yena usisicamagushelo sezono zethu; engesazethu zodwa, usiso nesehlabathi liphela."
1John2:3 Sazi ngale nto ukuba siyamazi, ngokuthi siyigcine imithetho yakhe."
1John2:4 Lowo uthi, Ndimazile, abe engayigcini imithetho yakhe, ulixoki, kulowo ayikho inyaniso."
1John2:5 Ke othi aligcine ilizwi lakhe, okwenyaniso uthando lukaThixo lugqibelele kulowo; sazi ngaloo nto ukuba sikuye."
1John2:6 Lowo uthi uhleli kuye, ufanele ukuthi, njengoko wahambayo yena, enjenjalo ukuhamba naye."
1John2:7 Bazalwana, andinibhaleli mthetho mtsha; ngumthetho omdala, ebeninawo kwasekuqalekeni. Umthetho omdala ke lilizwi enalivayo kwasekuqalekeni."
1John2:8 Ndibuya ndinibhalele umthetho omtsha, okuyinene oko kuye nakuni; ngokuba ubumnyama buyadlula, kwaye ukukhanya okuyinyaniso sekubonakala."
1John2:9 Lowo uthi usekukhanyeni, abe emthiyile umzalwana wakhe, usebumnyameni unangoku."
1John2:10 Lowo umthandayo umzalwana wakhe uhleli ekukhanyeni, akukho sikhubekiso kuye."
1John2:11 Ke lowo umthiyileyo umzalwana wakhe usebumnyameni, uhamba ebumnyameni. Akazi apho aya khona, ngokuba ubumnyama buwamfamekisile amehlo akhe."
1John2:12 Ndiyanibhalela, bantwanana, ngokuba nizixolelwe izono zenu ngenxa yegama lakhe."
1John2:13 Ndiyanibhalela, boyise, ngokuba nimazile owasekuqalekeni. Ndiyanibhalela, madodana, ngokuba nimeyisile ongendawo. Ndiyanibhalela, bantwanana, ngokuba nimazile uBawo."
1John2:14 Ndanibhalela, boyise, ngokuba nimazile owasekuqalekeni. Ndanibhalela, madodana, ngokuba nomelele, laye ilizwi likaThixo lihleli kuni, nimoyisile ke ongendawo."
1John2:15 Musani ukulithanda ihlabathi, kwanezinto ezisehlabathini. Ukuba kukho othi alithande ihlabathi, uthando lukaYise alukho kuye."
1John2:16 Kaloku konke okusehlabathini, inkanuko yenyama, nenkanuko yamehlo, noqhankqalazo lobu bomi, asikokuphuma kuye uYise, kokuphuma ehlabathini."
1John2:17 Ihlabathi ke liyadlula, kwanenkanuko yalo; ke yena owenza ukuthanda kukaThixo uhleli ngonaphakade."
1John2:18 Bantwana, lilixa lokugqibela eli; njengoko nevayo ukuba umchasi-Kristu uyeza, nangoku kuthe kwabakho abachasi-Kristu abaninzi, esaziyo ngalo ukuba lilixa lokugqibela."
1John2:19 Baphuma kuthi, kodwa babengengabo abethu; kuba, ukuba babengabethu, ngebahlalayo nathi; baphuma ukuze babonakale, ukuba bonke babengengabo abethu."
1John2:20 Ke nina ninentambiso evela koyiNgcwele, nizazi ke zonke izinto."
1John2:21 Andinibhalelanga ngakuba ningayazi inyaniso; ndinibhalele ngokuba niyazi, nangokuba kungekho buxoki buphuma enyanisweni."
1John2:22 Ngubani na ixoki, ingenguye okhanyelayo ukuba uYesu unguye uKristu? Lowo ungumchasi-Kristu, omkhanyelayo uYise noNyana."
1John2:23 Lowo umkhanyelayo uNyana, akanaye noYise;"
1John2:24 Nina ngoko, oko nakuvayo kwasekuqalekeni makuhlale kuni. Ukuba kuthi kuhlale kuni oko nakuvayo kwasekuqalekeni, nani niya kuhlala kuye uNyana, nakuye uYise."
1John2:25 Lilo eli idinga, athe yena wasinika lona, ubomi obungunaphakade."
1John2:26 Ezo zinto ndinibhalele ngabo banilahlekisayo.
1John2:27 Nina intambiso enayamkelayo kuye ihleli kuni, anifuni ukuba nifundiswe ngubani; kunjengokuba kwaloo ntambiso inifundisa ngeento zonke, iyinyani, ingebubuxoki, njengoko yanifundisileyo, hlalani kuye."
1John2:28 Ngoku ke, bantwanana, hlalani kuye; ukuze xa athe wabonakalaliswa, sibe nokungafihlisi singadani, simbaleke ekufikeni kwakhe."
1John2:29 Ukuba niyazi ukuba ulilungisa, yazini ukuba bonke abenza ubulungisa bazelwe nguye."
1John3:1 Bonani uthando olungaka asenzele lona uYise, olu lokuba sibizwe ngokuba singabantwana bakaThixo. Ngenxa yoko ihlabathi alisazi thina, ngokuba lingamazanga yena."
1John3:2 Zintanda, ngoku singabantwana bakaThixo. Akukabonakali ke into esiya kuba yiyo; ke siyazi ukuba, xa athe wabonakala, sofana naye; ngokuba siya kumbona njengoko anjalo."
1John3:3 Bonke abanalo eli themba kuye, bazenza nyulu, njengokuba yena enyulu."
1John3:4 Bonke abasenzayo isono benza okuchasene nomthetho, kuba isono sikukwaphula umthetho."
1John3:5 Niyazi ke ukuba yena wabonakaliswa, ukuze azithwale azisuse izono zethu; kananjalo akukho sono kuye."
1John3:6 Bonke abahlala kuye aboni; bonke abonayo abambonanga, abamazi nokumazi."
1John3:7 Bantwanana, makungabikho namnye unikhohlisayo; lowo ubenzayo ubulungisa lilungisa, njengokuba yena elilungisa."
1John3:8 Lowo usenzayo isono ungokaMtyholi; ngokuba uMtyholi wona kwasekuqalekeni. Wabonakaliselwa oku uNyana kaThixo, ukuze ayichithe imisebenzi kaMtyholi."
1John3:9 Bonke abazelwe nguThixo abenzi sono; ngokuba imbewu yakhe ihleli kuye; kanjalo akanakona, ngokuba ezelwe nguThixo."
1John3:10 Babonakala ngaloo nto abantwana bakaThixo, nabantwana bakaMtyholi. Bonke abangenzi bulungisa abangabakaThixo, nalowo ungamthandiyo umzalwana wakhe."
1John3:11 Ngokuba le yintshumayelo enayivayo kwasekuqalekeni, ukuba sithandane;"
1John3:12 singabi njengoKayin, obengowongendawo, wambulala umninawa wakhe. Yini na ukuba ambulale? Ngokuba eyakhe imisebenzi ibingendawo, ke yona eyomninawa ibinobulungisa."
1John3:13 Musani ukumangaliswa, bazalwana bam, ukuba ihlabathi linithiyile."
1John3:14 Siyazi ke ukuba sidlule ekufeni, sangena ebomini, ngokuba sibathanda abazalwana. Lowo ungamthandiyo umzalwana uhleli ekufeni."
1John3:15 Lowo umthiyileyo umzalwana wakhe usisibulala-mntu; niyazi ukuba akukho sibulala-mntu sinobomi bungunaphakade buhleliyo kuso.
1John3:16 Ngale nto silwazile uthando, kuba yena wasincamela ubomi bakhe; nathi ke sifanele ukubancamela abazalwana ubomi bethu."
1John3:17 Osukuba ke enayo impilo yeli hlabathi, aze ambone umzalwana wakhe eswele, azivalele iimfesane zakhe kuye, luthini na ukuhlala uthando lukaThixo ngaphakathi kwakhe?"
1John3:18 Bantwanana bam, masingathandi ngazwi nangamlomo; kodwa ngezenzo nangenyaniso."
1John3:19 Siyazi ngale nto ke ukuba singabenyaniso; siya kuzileleza iintliziyo zethu phambi kwakhe.
1John3:20 Kaloku ukuba intliziyo yethu iyasigweba, uThixo mkhulu kunentliziyo yethu, ezazi izinto zonke."
1John3:21 Zintanda, ukuba intliziyo yethu ayisigwebi, sinokungafihlisi kuye uThixo;"
1John3:22 nesithi sikucele siyakwamkela kuye, ngokuba imithetho yakhe siyigcina, sizenze izinto ezikholekileyo emehlweni akhe."
1John3:23 Nguwo lo umthetho wakhe, ukuba sikholwe ligama lonyana wakhe, uYesu Kristu, sithandane njengoko wasiwiselayo umthetho."
1John3:24 Lowo uyigcinayo imithetho yakhe uhleli kuye, naye uhleli kuye. Sazi ngale nto ke, ukuba uhleli kuthi ngoMoya lo wasinikayo."
1John4:1 Zintanda, musani ukukholwa ngoomoya bonke, bacikideni oomoya ukuba ngabakaThixo na; ngokuba baninzi abaprofeti ababuxoki, abaphume bangena ehlabathini."
1John4:2 Mazini ngale nto uMoya kaThixo: umoya wonke omvumayo uYesu Kristu eze esenyameni, ungokaThixo;"
1John4:3 Nomoya wonke ongamvumiyo uYesu Kristu eze esenyameni, asingokaThixo; lo ngokamchasi-Kristu, enawuvayo ukuba uyeza; nangoku uselukho ehlabathini."
1John4:4 Nina ningabakaThixo, bantwanana, nibeyisile bona, ngokuba lowo ukuni nguyena mkhulu kunalowo usehlabathini."
1John4:5 Bona bangabehlabathi, ngenxa yoko bathetha okwehlabathi, ihlabathi liyabeva ke."
1John4:6 Thina singabakaThixo, lowo umaziyo uThixo uyasiva thina; ongengokaThixo akasiva. Sazi ngale nto ke umoya wayo inyaniso, nomoya walo ulahlekiso."
1John4:7 Zintanda, masithandane; ngokuba uthando lwaphuma kuThixo; Bonke abanothando bazelwe nguThixo, bayamazi uThixo."
1John4:8 Lowo ungenaluthando akazanga amazi uThixo; ngokuba uThixo uluthando.
1John4:9 Kwabonakaliswa ngale nto ukusithanda kukaThixo, ngokuthi uThixo amthume ehlabathini uNyana wakhe, ekuphela kwamzeleyo, ukuze sidle ubomi naye."
1John4:10 Uthando lulapha, ingekukuba samthandayo uThixo thina, ikukuba wasithandayo yena, wamthuma uNyana wakhe ukuba abe sisicamagushelo sezono zethu."
1John4:11 Zintanda, ukuba wenjenjalo uThixo ukusithanda, nathi sifanele ukuthandana."
1John4:12 Akukho namnye wakha wambona uThixo; Ukuba sithi siyathandana, uThixo uhleli kuthi, nothando lwakhe lugqibelele ngaphakathi kwethu."
1John4:13 Sazi ngale nto ukuba sihleli kuye, naye uhleli kuthi; ngokuba usinike okoMoya wakhe."
1John4:14 Nathi sibonile, siyangqina, ukuba uYise wamthuma uNyana ukuba nguMsindisi wehlabathi."
1John4:15 Othe wavuma ukuba uYesu unguye uNyana kaThixo, uThixo uhleli kuye, naye uhleli kuye uThixo."
1John4:16 Thina siyalwazi, sakholwa nokusithanda kukaThixo. Uthixo Luthando; Lowo uhleli eluthandweni uhleli kuye uThixo, noThixo uhleli kuye."
1John4:17 Lugqibelele ngale nto uthando olukuthi, ukuze sibe nokungafihlisi ngomhla womgwebo; ngokuba, njengoko anjalo yena, sinjalo nathi kweli hlabathi."
1John4:18 Akukho loyiko eluthandweni; lusuka uthando olugqibeleleyo luluphose phandle uloyiko; ngokuba uloyiko lunexhala; Lowo ke woyikayo akagqibelele eluthandweni.
1John4:19 Thina siyamthanda, ngokuba yena wasithanda kuqala."
1John4:20 Ukuba umntu uthe, Ndiyamthanda uThixo, wamthiya umzalwana wakhe, ulixoki; kuba lowo ungamthandiyo umzalwana wakhe ambonileyo, angathini na ukumthanda uThixo angambonanga?"
1John4:21 Nguwo lo umthetho esinawo uvela kuye: ukuba athi lowo umthandayo uThixo, amthande nomzalwana wakhe."
1John5:1 Bonke abakholwayo ukuba uYesu unguye uKristu, bazelwe nguThixo; bonke abamthandayo lowo wazalayo, bayamthanda nalowo uzelweyo nguye."
1John5:2 Sazi ngale nto ukuba siyabathanda abantwana bakaThixo, xa sukuba simthanda uThixo, siyigcina imithetho yakhe."
1John5:3 Kuba ukumthanda uThixo kuko ukuthi, siyigcine imithetho yakhe; ayinzima ke imithetho yakhe."
1John5:4 Ngokuba yonke into ezelwe nguThixo iyaleyisa ihlabathi; lulo ke olu uloyiso oluleyisayo ihlabathi, ukholo lwethu."
1John5:5 Ngubani na lowo uleyisayo ihlabathi, ingenguye okholwayo ukuba uYesu unguye uNyana kaThixo?"
1John5:6 Lo ngulowo wezayo ngamanzi negazi, uYesu Kristu; kungengamanzi odwa, kungengamanzi negazi. uMoya ke ungqinayo, ngokuba uMoya uyinyaniso."
1John5:7 Ngokuba bathathu abo bangqinayo emazulwini: uYise, noLizwi, noMoya oyiNgcwele; abo bathathu banye."
1John5:8 Kaloku kukho amangqina amathathu ehlabathini, uMoya, namanzi, negazi. Aba bathathu bavumelana nto-nye."
1John5:9 Ukuba ubungqina babantu siyabamkela, ubungqina bukaThixo bungaphezulu; ngokuba bubo obu ubungqina bukaThixo, angqinele uNyana wakhe ngabo."
1John5:10 Lowo ukholwayo kuNyana kaThixo unabo ubungqina ngaphakathi kwakhe; ngokuba engakholwanga bubungqina abungqinele uThixo ngoNyana wakhe.
1John5:11 Bubo obu ke ubungqina: ukuba uThixo usinike ubomi obungunaphakade; baye obo bomi bukuye uNyana wakhe.
1John5:12 Lowo unaye uNyana, unabo ubomi; lowo ungenaye uNyana kaThixo, akanabo ubomi."
1John5:13 Ndinibhalele ezi zinto, nina nikholwayo kwigama loNyana kaThixo; ukuze nazi ukuba ninobomi obungunaphakade, nokuze nikholwe kwigama loNyana kaThixo."
1John5:14 Kuko oku ukungafihlisi esinako kuye: ukuba sithi sicele into ngokokuthanda kwakhe, uyasiva;"
1John5:15 Ukuba siyazi ukuba uyasiva esisukuba sikucela, siyazi ukuba sinazo izinto ezicelwayo, esizicelileyo kuye."
1John5:16 Ukuba umntu uthe wambona umzalwana wakhe esona isono esingasingisi kufeni, wocela, uThixo amnike ubomi, enika abo bonayo ngokungasingisi kufeni. Kukho isono esisingisa ekufeni; anditsho ukuba makasithandazele."
1John5:17 Konke ukungalungisi kusisono; kukho isono esingasingisi kufeni.
1John5:18 Siyazi ukuba bonke abazelwe nguThixo aboni; kodwa lowo uzelweyo nguThixo uyazigcina, aze ongendawo angamchukumisi."
1John5:19 Siyazi ukuba singabakaThixo, nokuba ihlabathi liphela lilele kongendawo."
1John5:20 Siyazi ke ukuba uNyana kaThixo ufikile, wasinika ingqondo, ukuze simazi oyinyaniso. Sikuye ke oyinyaniso, kuye uNyana wakhe uYesu Krestu. Nguye lo uThixo oyinyaniso, nobomi obungunaphakade."
1John5:21 Bantwanana, zigcineni kuzo izithixo. Amen."
2John1:1 Indoda enkulu ibhalela inkosikazi enyuliweyo nabantwana bayo, endibathandayo mna ngenyaniso; ingendim ndedwa, ingabo bonke abayazileyo inyaniso;"
2John1:2 ngenxa yenyaniso ehleliyo kuthi, eya kuba nathi ngonaphakade."
2John1:3 Makube lubabalo kuni, nenceba, noxolo oluvela kuThixo uYise, neNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, uNyana kaYise, kuni basenyanisweni naseluthandweni."
2John1:4 Ndavuya kunene kuba ndifumene kubantwana bakho kukho abahamba enyanisweni, njengoko samkelayo umthetho kuye uBawo."
2John1:5 Nangoku ndiyakucela, nkosikazi, kungengakuba ndikubhalela umthetho omtsha; ndikubhalela lowo sasinawo kwasekuqalekeni: ukuba sithandane."
2John1:6 Lulo ke olu uthando, ukuba sihambe ngokwemithetho yakhe. Nguwo lo umthetho, njengokuba nevayo kwasekuqalekeni, ukuba nihambe kuwo."
2John1:7 Ngokuba kungene abalahlekisi abaninzi ehlabathini, abangamvumiyo uYesu Kristu esiza esenyameni. Lowo ngumkhohlisi nomchasi-Kristu."
2John1:8 Zilumkeleni, ukuba singalahlekani nezinto esizisebenzileyo; masamkele umvuzo ozalisekileyo."
2John1:9 Bonke abagqithayo, abangahlaliyo emfundisweni kaKristu, abanaThixo; ohleliyo emfundisweni kaKristu, lowo unaye uYise noNyana."
2John1:10 Ukuba ubani uthe weza kuni, engazisi yona le mfundiso, musani ukumamkela endlwini yenu, ningambulisi nokumbulisa;"
2John1:11 Kuba lowo umbulisayo unobudlelane naye ngemisebenzi yakhe engendawo.
2John1:12 Ndinezinto ezininzi nje zokunibhalela, andingi ndinibhalele ngaphepha nangainki; koko ndithembe ukuza kuni, sithethe ngomlomo, ukuze uvuyo lwethu luzaliseke."
2John1:13 Bakubulisa abantwana bodade wenu onyuliweyo. Amen.
3John1:1 Indoda enkulu ibhalela uGayo oyintanda, endimthandayo mna ngenyaniso."
3John1:2 Ntanda, ndinga ungathi ngezinto zonke usikeleleke uphile, njengokuba usikelelekile umphefumlo wakho."
3John1:3 Kaloku ndavuya kunene, bakufika abazalwana, bangqina ngenyaniso ekuwe, njengokuba wena uhamba enyanisweni."
3John1:4 Andinaluvuyo lungaphezu kolu, lokuba ndive ukuba abantwana bam bahamba enyanisweni."
3John1:5 Ntanda, wenza okuthembekileyo, oko sukuba ukwenzela abazalwana nabasemzini;"
3John1:6 abalungqineleyo uthando lwakho phambi kwebandla; owathi, ukuba uthe wabaqhubela ngendlela yobuthixo, ube uyatyapha;"
3John1:7 Kuba baphuma ngenxa yegama lakhe, bengathabathanga nto kuzo iintlanga."
3John1:8 Thina ngoko sifanele ukubamkela abanjalo, ukuze sibe ngabasebenzisana nabo kuyo inyaniso."
3John1:9 Ndalibhalela ibandla, kodwa uDiyotrefe, othanda ukuba mkhulu phakathi kwabo, akasamkeli."
3John1:10 Ngoko ke, ukuba ndithe ndafika, ndoyikhumbula imisebenzi yakhe ayenzayo, ephololoza ngathi ngamazwi angendawo; enganeli koko, akabamkeli abazalwana ngokwakhe, abathintele abo bathanda ukubalela, abakhuphe ebandleni."
3John1:11 Ntanda, musa ukulandela okubi, landela okulungileyo. Lowo wenza okulungileyo ungokaThixo; ke lowo wenza okubi akambonanga uThixo."
3John1:12 uDemetriyo ungqinelwe ngabo bonke, nayiyo inyaniso; nathi ke siyangqina; niyazi ke ukuba ubungqina bethu buyinene."
3John1:13 Ndandinezinto ezininzi endingazibhalayo, kodwa andithandanga kuzibhala ngainki nangalusiba;"
3John1:14 Kodwa ndiyathemba ukuba ndokubona kwakufuphi nje, sithethe ngomlomo. Uxolo malube kuwe. Izihlobo zethu ziyakubulisa. Bulisa abahlobo ngamagama."
Jude1:1 uYuda, umkhonzi kaYesu Kristu, umzalwana kaYakobi, ubhalela abangcwalisiweyo nguThixo uYise, nabagcinelwe uYesu Kristu, ababiziweyo;"
Jude1:2 Makwandiswe kuni inceba, noxolo, nothando."
Jude1:3 Zintanda, ndikukhuthalele ngenyameko yonke nje ukunibhalela ngalo usindiso esidlelana ngalo, kwafuneka ukuba ndinibhalele, ndinivuselele, ukuba niluzamele ukholo abalunikelwayo kwakanye abangcwele."
Jude1:4 Kuba kuthwethwe bantu bathile; abo babebalulelwe ngenxa engaphambili kolo lugwebo, abangahloneli Thixo, belujikela eburheletyweni ubabalo lukaThixo wethu, bemkhanyela okuphela koMnini-nto-zonke, uThixo wethu, iNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu."
Jude1:5 Ndithanda ukunikhumbuza, nangona nikwazi oku kakade, ukuba iNkosi, yakuba ibasindisile abantu emhlabeni waseYiputa, yathi ngokwesibini yabatshabalalisa abo bangakholwanga."
Jude1:6 Kananjalo izithunywa zezulu, ezo zazingalugcinanga ulawulo lwazo, zesuka zalishiya ikhaya lazo, izigcinele umgwebo womhla omkhulu ngemixokelelwane engunaphakade, phantsi kwesithokothoko."
Jude1:7 Njengokuba iSodom neGomora, nayo imizi engakuyo, yenza kakhulu umbulo ngohlobo olufana nolwazo ezo, imka ilandela nyama yimbi, ibekwe ekuhleni ukuba ibe ngumqondiso, iviswa ubetho lomlilo ongunaphakade."
Jude1:8 Kwangokunjalo nabo aba baphuphayo badyobha inyama, batshitshise ubukhosi, banyelise izikhakhamela."
Jude1:9 Kodwa uMikayeli, isiphatha-zithunywa zezulu, oko babebambene naye uMtyholi, bebangisana ngawo umzimba kaMoses, akabanga nabuganga bakumzisela mgwebo wakunyelisa; wesuka wathi, iNkosi mayikukhalimele."
Jude1:10 Ke bona aba banyelisa izinto abangazaziyo; kodwa izinto abazaziyo kakuhle ngemvelo, njengezinto eziphilileyo ezingenangqondo, bayazonakalisa ngazo ezo."
Jude1:11 Yeha ke bona! Kuba bahamba ngendlela kaKayin; bakhukuliswa lulahlekiso lukaBhileham ngenxa yomvuzo; batshabalala ephikeni likaKora.
Jude1:12 Aba zizixhobo zamatye aselwandle ezidlweni zenu zothando, bezingxala ukudla nani, bezidlisa okwabo ngokungenakoyika. Bangamafu angenamanzi, aqhutywaqhutywa yimimoya; yimithi ebunayo, engenasiqhamo, efe kabini, enyothulwe iingcambu;"
Jude1:13 Ngamaza alatyuzayo olwandle, ebila ephuphuma ihlazo lawo; iinkwenkwezi ezibhadulayo, ezigcinelwe ubumnyama bobumnyama ngonaphakade."
Jude1:14 NoEnoki, ongowesixhenxe kuAdam, waprofeta ngabo, esithi, Yabonani, iNkosi iyeza enamawaka alishumi abangcwele bayo,"
Jude1:15 ukuba ibagwebe bonke, ibohlwaye bonke abangahloneli Thixo kubo, ngenxa yemisebenzi yabo yonke yokungahloneli Thixo, abayenze bengahloneli Thixo, nangenxa yazo zonke izinto ezilukhuni, ababezithethile ngaye aboni abangahloneli Thixo."
Jude1:16 Aba ngabakrokri abasolayo, behamba ngokweenkanuko zabo; umlomo wabo uthetha iindumbisa zamazwi, bencoma ubuso bomntu ngenxa yenzuzo."
Jude1:17 Ke nina, zintanda, wakhumbuleni amazwi abethethwe ngenxa engaphambili ngabapostile beNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu;"
Jude1:18 Ngokuba babesithi kuni, Kuya kubakho abagxeki ngexesha lokugqibela, behamba ngokwezabo iinkanuko zokungahloneli Thixo."
Jude1:19 Aba ngabazahlulayo, bengabenyama, abangenaye uMoya."
Jude1:20 Ke nina, zintanda, zakheni elukholweni lwenu olungcwele kanye, nithandaza nikuMoya oyiNgcwele;"
Jude1:21 Hlalani nihleli eluthandweni lukaThixo, niyilinde inceba yeNkosi yethu uYesu Kristu, kuse ebomini obungunaphakade."
Jude1:22 Inxenye ke yibani novelwano, nicalula;"
Jude1:23 kodwa inxenye yisindiseni nizoyika, nibakhupha emlilweni; niyithiya nengubo edyojiweyo yinyama."
Jude1:24 Ke kaloku, kulowo unako ukunigcina ningakhubeka, nokunimisa phambi kobuqaqawuli bakhe ningenabala, ninovuyo olugqithileyo:"
Jude1:25 kuThixo olumke yedwa, uMsindisi wethu, makubekho uzuko nobukhulu, amandla negunya, nangoku, kude kuse ephakadeni. Amen."
Revelation1:1 Isityhilelo sikaYesu Kristu, awamnika sona uThixo, ukuba ababonise abakhonzi bakhe izinto ezimele ukubakho kamsinya; waqondisa wathumela ngaso isithunywa sakhe sasemazulwini kumkhonzi wakhe uYohane,"
Revelation1:2 owalingqinelayo ilizwi likaThixo nobungqina bukaYesu Kristu, kwaneento zonke awazibonayo."
Revelation1:3 Unoyolo lowo uwalesayo, kwanabo bawevayo amazwi aso isiprofeto esi, bazigcine izinto ezibhaliweyo kuso; kuba ixesha likufuphi."
Revelation1:4 uYohane ubhalela amabandla asixhenxe akwelaseAsiya; uthi, Makube lubabalo kuni, noxolo oluvela kulowo ukhoyo, wayekho, uzayo; nakubo ooMoya abasixhenxe abaphambi kwetrone yakhe;"
Revelation1:5 nakuYesu Kristu, olingqina elithembekileyo, Owamazibulo kubo abafileyo, uMphathi wookumkani bomhlaba. Kuye lowo wasithandayo, owasihlambayo ezonweni zethu ngegazi lakhe;"
Revelation1:6 Wasenza ookumkani nababingeleli kuye uThixo uYise; kuye makubekho uzuko namandla, kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni. Amen."
Revelation1:7 Yabonani, esiza namafu; aye eya kumbona amehlo onke, kwanabo bamhlabayo; zaye ziya kummbambazelela zonke izizwe zomhlaba. Ewe kunjalo, Amen."
Revelation1:8 Mna ndinguAlfa no-Omega, isiqalo nesiphelo, itsho iNkosi, leyo ikhoyo, yayikho, izayo, uSomandla."
Revelation1:9 Mna Yohane, endikwangumzalwana wenu, nedlelane nani ngayo imbandezelo, nangabo ubukumkani, nangonyamezelo lukaYesu Kristu, ndaye ndisesiqithini ekuthiwa yiPatmos, ngenxa yelizwi likaThixo, nangenxa yobungqina bukaYesu Kristu."
Revelation1:10 Ndaye ndikuMoya ngemini eyeyeNkosi; ndeva emva kwam izwi elikhulu, ngathi lelexilongo,"
Revelation1:11 esithi, Mna ndinguAlfa no-Omega, owokuqala nowokugqibela; nokuthi, Okubonileyo, kubhale encwadini, ukuthumele kuwo amabandla asixhenxe akwelaseAsiya; e-Efese, eSmirna, ePergamo, naseTiyatira, naseSardesi, eFiladelfi, naseLawodike."
Revelation1:12 Ndaza ndee guququ, ukuba ndilibone ilizwi elo belithetha nam. Ndithe guququ, ndabona iziphatho zezibane zegolide zisixhenxe;"
Revelation1:13 Naphakathi kweziphatho zosixhenxe ezo, ofana noNyana woMntu, ambethe ingubo efike ezinyaweni, ebhinqe emabeleni umbhinqo wegolide."
Revelation1:14 Intloko yakhe ke neenwele zimhlophe, njengoboya bezimvu obumhlophe njengekhephu; amehlo akhe enjengelangatye lomlilo;"
Revelation1:15 iinyawo zakhe zifana nobhedu olubengezelayo, zingathi zivuthiswe eziko; nelizwi lakhe ngathi sisandi samanzi amaninzi."
Revelation1:16 Waye eneenkwenkwezi ezisixhenxe esandleni sakhe sokunene, emlonyeni wakhe kuphuma ikrele elibukhali, elintlangothi mbini; ubuso bakhe bungathi lilanga, likhanya ngamandla alo."
Revelation1:17 Ndithe ndakumbona, ndasuka ndawa ezinyaweni zakhe, ndaba njengofileyo. Waza wabeka isandla sakhe sokunene phezu kwam, esithi kum, Musa ukoyika; ndingowokuqala nowokugqibela;"
Revelation1:18 Ndingulowo udla ubomi, ndaza ndafa; yabona, ndingodla ubomi kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni, Amen; Ndinezitshixo zelabafileyo nezokufa."
Revelation1:19 Zibhale izinto ozibonileyo, nezikhoyo, kwaneziya kubakho emva kwezo."
Revelation1:20 Imfihlakalo yeenkwenkwezi ezisixhenxe ozibonileyo esandleni sam sokunene, neziphatho zezibane zosixhenxe zegolide; Iinkwenkwezi ezo zisixhenxe zizithunywa zawo amabandla asixhenxe;"
Revelation2:1 Isithunywa sebandla elise-Efese, sibhalele uthi: Utsho lowo uzibambayo iinkwenkwezi ezisixhenxe ngesandla sokunene, lowo uhamba phakathi kweziphatho zezibane zosixhenxe zegolide;"
Revelation2:2 Ndiyayazi imisebenzi yakho, nokubulaleka kwakho, nomonde wakho, nokuba ungenako ukubathwala abanobubi; nokuba wabalinga abathi bangabapostile, bengengabo, wabafumana bengamaxoki."
Revelation2:3 Wanyamezela, waba nomonde, ngenxa yegama lam wabulaleka, akwatyhafa."
Revelation2:4 Noko ke ndinale nto ngakuwe, yokuba uthando lwakho lokuqala walushiyayo."
Revelation2:5 Khumbula ngoko apho uwe usuka khona, uguquke, wenze imisebenzi yokuqala; okanye ndoza kuwe kamsinya, ndisishenxise isiphatho sesibane sakho endaweni yaso, ukuba akuthanga uguquke."
Revelation2:6 Kodwa unale ndawo, yokuba uyithiyile imisebenzi yamaNikolawo, endiyithiyileyo nam."
Revelation2:7 Lowo unendlebe makayive into ayithethayo uMoya kuwo amabandla. Lowo weyisayo ndiya kumnika ukuba adle kuwo umthi wobomi, ophakathi kweParadisi kaThixo."
Revelation2:8 Isithunywa sebandla eliseSmirna, sibhalele uthi: Utsho owokuqala nowokugqibela, owayefile, wabuya wadla ubomi;"
Revelation2:9 Ndiyayazi imisebenzi yakho, nembandezelo, nobuhlwempu, (noko usisityebi), nonyeliso lwabo bathi bangamaYuda bona, bengengawo, besisikhungu sikaSathana."
Revelation2:10 Musa ukuzoyika izinto oza kubandezeleka ngazo. Yabona, uMtyholi uza kuyiphosa inxenye yenu entolongweni, ukuze nilingwe; Ke niya kuba nembandezelo imihla elishumi; thembekile kude kuse ekufeni, ndokunika isithsaba sobomi."
Revelation2:11 Lowo unendlebe makayive into ayithethayo uMoya kuwo amabandla. Lowo weyisayo akayi kwenziwa kukufa kwesibini.
Revelation2:12 Isithunywa sebandla elisePergamo, sibhalele uthi: Utsho lowo unekrele elibukhali, elintlangothi mbini;"
Revelation2:13 Ndiyayazi imisebenzi yakho, nalapho uhleli khona, apho sikhona isihlalo sikaSathana; nokuba ulibambe waliqinisa igama lam, akwakukhanyela ukukholwa kwam, nasemihleni uAntipas, owabulawelwa kuni, apho ahleli khona uSathana, wayelingqina lam elithembekileyo."
Revelation2:14 Noko ke ndineendawana ngakuwe: ezi zokuba unabo apho abayibambe bayibambe imfundiso kaBhileham, owamfundisayo uBhalaki ukuphosa isikhubekiso phambi koonyana bakaSirayeli, ukuba badle izinto ezibingelelwe izithixo, benze nombulo."
Revelation2:15 Ngokunjalo nawe unabayibambe bayiqinisa imfundiso yamaNikolawo, into leyo endiyithiyileyo."
Revelation2:16 Guquka; okanye ndoza kuwe kamsinya, ndenze imfazwe nabo ngalo ikrele lomlomo wam."
Revelation2:17 Lowo unendlebe makayive into ayithethayo uMoya kuwo amabandla. Lowo weyisayo ndiya kumnika ukuba adle kuyo imana efihlakeleyo, ndimnike ilitye elimhlophe;"
Revelation2:18 Isithunywa sebandla eliseTiyatira, sibhalele uthi; Utsho uNyana kaThixo, omehlo akhe anjengelangatye lomlilo, neenyawo zakhe zifana nobhedu olubengezelayo;"
Revelation2:19 Ndiyayazi imisebenzi yakho, nothando, nolungiselelo, nokholo, nomonde wakho, nemisebenzi yakho; aze abokugqibela abe ngaphezu kwabokuqala."
Revelation2:20 Kambe ke ndineendawana ngakuwe: ezi zokuba umvumela laa mfazi uIzebhele, othi yena ungumprofetikazi, ukuba abafundise abalahlekise abakhonzi bam, ukuba benze umbulo, badle izinto ezibingelelwe izithixo."
Revelation2:21 Ndamnika ixesha lokuba aguquke kuwo umbulo wakhe; akaguquka.
Revelation2:22 Yabona, mna ndiya kumphosa elukhukweni, nabo bakrexeza kunye naye, embandezelweni enkulu, ukuba abathanga baguquke emisebenzini yabo;"
Revelation2:23 nabantwana bakhe ndiya kubabulala ngokufa; azi onke amabandla ukuba mna ndingulowo uphengulula izintso neentliziyo, ndinike elowo ngokwemisebenzi yenu."
Revelation2:24 Ndithi ke kuni, nakwabanye abaseTiyatira, abo bonke bangenayo loo mfundiso, nabo abo bangazazanga iinzulu zikaSathana, njengoko batshoyo; andiyi kubeka phezu kwenu mthwalo wumbi."
Revelation2:25 Kodwa oko ninako kubambeni nikuqinise ndide ndifike.
Revelation2:26 Lowo weyisayo, lowo uyigcinayo imisebenzi yam, ade ase ekupheleni, ndomnika igunya phezu kweentlanga;"
Revelation2:27 Uya kuzalusa ngentonga yentsimbi; njengokuba izitya zomdongwe zityunyuzwa, njengokuba nam ndamkele kuye uBawo;"
Revelation2:28 ndiya kumnika ikhwezi lokusa.
Revelation2:29 Lowo unendlebe makayive into ayithethayo uMoya kuwo amabandla.
Revelation3:1 Isithunywa sebandla eliseSardesi, sibhalele uthi; Utsho lowo unabo ooMoya abasixhenxe bakaThixo, neenkwenkwezi ezisixhenxe; Ndiyayazi imisebenzi yakho, ukuba unalo igama lokuba uphilile, ukanti ufile."
Revelation3:2 Phapha, uzizimase izinto eziseleyo eziza kufa; kuba andiyifumananga izalisekile imisebenzi yakho phambi koThixo."
Revelation3:3 Khumbula ngoko ukuba utheni na ukwamkela kwakho, nokuva, nokuba utheni na, uguquke. Ukuba ngoko akuthanga ulinde, ndokufikela njengesela, yaye akusayi kulazi ilixa endokufikela ngalo."
Revelation3:4 Unamagama ambalwa naseSardesi apho, angazidyobhanga wona iingubo zawo; baya kuhamba nam benezimhlophe; ngokuba befanelekile."
Revelation3:5 Lowo weyisayo uya kuthiwa wambu ngeengubo ezimhlophe; Andiyi kulicima igama lakhe encwadini yobomi; ndiya kulivuma igama lakhe phambi koBawo, naphambi kwezithunywa zakhe zasemazulwini."
Revelation3:6 Lowo unendlebe makayive into ayithethayo uMoya kuwo amabandla.
Revelation3:7 Isithunywa sebandla eliseFiladelfi, sibhalele uthi; Utsho lowo ungcwele, oyiNyaniso, lowo unaso isitshixo sikaDavide, lowo uvulayo kungavali namnye; avale kungabikho uvulayo;"
Revelation3:8 Ndiyayazi imisebenzi yakho. Yabona, ndimise phambi kwakho ucango oluvulekileyo, akukho namnye unako ukuluvala; kuba uthe, unamandla amancinane, waligcina ilizwi lam, akwalikhanyela igama lam."
Revelation3:9 Yabona, ndibanika abendlu yesikhungu kaSathana, abathi bangamaYuda bona, bengengawo, bexoka; yabona, ndiya kubenza beze baqubude phambi kweenyawo zakho, bazi ukuba mna ndikuthandile."
Revelation3:10 Ngokuba uligcinile ilizwi lomonde wam, nam ndiya kukugcina, ndikusindise kwilixa lokulingwa, eliya kulifikela lonke elimiweyo, ukulinga abo bemiyo phezu kwehlabathi."
Revelation3:11 Yabona, ndiyeza kamsinya; kubambe nkqi oko unako, ukuze kungabikho namnye usithabathayo isithsaba sakho."
Revelation3:12 Lowo weyisayo ndiya kumenza intsika etempileni yoThixo wam, angabi saphuma ephuma, ndaye ndiya kulibhala phezu kwakhe igama loThixo wam, negama lomzi woThixo wam, eyiYerusalem entsha; lowo uhla ephuma emazulwini evela kuThixo wam, ndaye ndiya kulibhala kuye igama lam elitsha."
Revelation3:13 Lowo unendlebe makayive into ayithethayo uMoya kuwo amabandla.
Revelation3:14 Usibhalele isithunywa sebandla eliseLawodike; Utsho uAmen, ingqina elithembekileyo, eliyinyaniso, ingqalo yayo indalo kaThixo;"
Revelation3:15 Ndiyayazi imisebenzi yakho, ukuba akubandi, akushushu; akwaba uyabanda, ungeshushu."
Revelation3:16 Ngenxa enokuba ke udikidiki, ungabandi, ungeshushu, ndiza kukuhlanza uphume emlonyeni wam."
Revelation3:17 Ngenxa yokuba uthi, Ndisisityebi, ndizityebisile, andiswele nto; ube ungazi ukuba uludwayinge, ulusizana, ulihlwempu, uyimfama, uhamba ze;"
Revelation3:18 Ndiyakucebisa, ukuba uthenge kum igolide evuthiswe emlilweni, ukuze ube nobutyebi; neengubo ezimhlophe, ukuze wambeswe, lingabonakali ihlazo lobuze bakho; nentambiso yamehlo, uthambise amehlo akho, ukuze ubone."
Revelation3:19 Mna, bonke endibathandayo ndiyabohlwaya, ndibaqeqeshe; zondelela ngoko uguquke."
Revelation3:20 Yabona, ndimi emnyango ndinkqonkqoza; ukuba uthe umntu waliva izwi lam, waluvula ucango, ndongena kuye, ndidle naye, naye adle nam."
Revelation3:21 Lowo weyisayo, ndiya kumvumela ukuba ahlale nam etroneni yam, njengokuba nam ndeyisayo, ndaza ndahlala phantsi noBawo etroneni yakhe."
Revelation3:22 Lowo unendlebe makayive into ayithethayo uMoya kuwo amabandla.
Revelation4:1 Emva koko ndabona, nango umnyango uvulekile emazulwini; ilizwi lokuqala endalivayo lalingathi lelexilongo, lithetha nam; elathi, Nyukela apha, ndokubonisa izinto ezimele ukubakho emva kwezi."
Revelation4:2 Kwangoko ndaba kuMoya; nanko kumi itrone emazulwini, kukho ohleli phezu kwetrone."
Revelation4:3 Lowo uhleliyo, ukubonakala kwakhe, efana nelitye leyaspisi nelesardiyo, waye umnyama wenze isangqa etroneni apho, ufana nelesmarado ukubonakala kwawo."
Revelation4:4 Kwaye kwenze isangqa etroneni apho iitrone ezimashumi mabini anesine; benezithsaba zegolide entloko.
Revelation4:5 Nasetroneni apho kuphuma imibane, neendudumo, nezandi; kuvutha izibane zomlilo ezisixhenxe phambi kwetrone, ezingabo ooMoya abasixhenxe bakaThixo."
Revelation4:6 Phambi kwetrone kukho ulwandle lwegilasi, lufana nomkhenkce. Esazulwini setrone apho, nasesangqeni setrone, kukho izinto eziphilileyo ezine, zizele ngamehlo ngaphambili nangasemva."
Revelation4:7 Eyokuqala into ephilileyo ifana nengonyama; eyesibini into ephilileyo ifana nethole; eyesithathu into ephilileyo inobuso obungathi bobomntu; eyesine into ephilileyo ifana nokhozi luphaphazela.
Revelation4:8 Zaye zone izinto eziphilileyo ezo, iyileyo naleyo, zinamaphiko ngamathandathu ngeenxa zonke; zizele ngamehlo ngaphakathi, zingaphumli imini nobusuku, zisithi, Ingcwele, ingcwele, ingcwele, iNkosi uThixo uSomandla, leyo yayikho, ikhoyo, izayo."
Revelation4:9 Xa la marhamncwa anika uzuko nembeko nombulelo kulowo uhleli phezu kwetrone, odla ubomi kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni."
Revelation4:10 Amadoda amakhulu amashumi mabini anamane, awa phambi kwalowo uhleli etroneni, amnqula lowo udla ubomi kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni, eziphose izithsaba zawo phambi kwetrone, esithi,"
Revelation4:11 Ufanele, Nkosi yam, ukwamkela uzuko, nembeko, namandla, ngokuba inguwe owadala zonke izinto, nangenxa yokuthanda kwakho zikho, zadalelwa oko."
Revelation5:1 Ndabona esandleni sokunene salowo uhleli etroneni, incwadi ebhalwe ngaphakathi nangaphandle, itywinwe ngamatywina asixhenxe."
Revelation5:2 Ndabona isithunywa sezulu esomeleleyo, sivakalisa ngezwi elikhulu, sisithi, Ngubani na ofanele ukuyivula incwadi, nokuwanqika amatywina ayo?"
Revelation5:3 Akabakho namnye ezulwini, nasemhlabeni, naphantsi komhlaba, unako ukuyivula incwadi, nokuyikhangela oku."
Revelation5:4 Ndandilila kakhulu mna, ngokuba kungafunyanwanga bani ufanele ukuyivula nokuyifunda le ncwadi, nokuyikhangela nakuyo."
Revelation5:5 Yathi enye indoda enkulu kum, Musa ukulila; yabona, iNgonyama yesizwe sakwaYuda, iNgcambu kaDavide, ikweyisile ukuyivula incwadi, nokuwanqika amatywina ayo asixhenxe."
Revelation5:6 Ndabona, nantso, esazulwini setrone nesezinto eziphilileyo zone, naphakathi kwamadoda amakhulu, kumi iMvana, engathi ixheliwe, ineempondo ezisixhenxe namehlo asixhenxe, angabo ooMoya abasixhenxe boMoya, uThixo wathumela ehlabathini lonke."
Revelation5:7 Yeza yaza yathabatha incwadi esandleni sokunene salowo uhleli etroneni.
Revelation5:8 Yathi yakuyithabatha incwadi, izinto eziphilileyo zoné, namadoda amakhulu angamashumi amabini anesine, awa phambi kweMvana, iyileyo inohadi, nengqayi yegolide izele ziziqhumiso, eziyiyo imithandazo yabangcwele."
Revelation5:9 Bavuma ingoma entsha, besithi, Ufanele ukuyithabatha incwadi, nokuwavula amatywina ayo; ngokuba wena waxhelwa, wasithenga ukuba sibe ngabakaThixo ngalo igazi lakho, siphuma kuzo zonke izizwe, neelwimi, nabantu, isizwe;"
Revelation5:10 Wasenza ookumkani nababingeleli kuye uThixo wethu;
Revelation5:11 Ndabona, ndeva izwi lezithunywa zezulu ezininzi, zenze isangqa etroneni, nezinto eziphilileyo, nawo amadoda amakhulu; laye inani lawo lizizigidi ngezigidi;"
Revelation5:12 besithi ngezwi elikhulu, iMvana eyaxhelwayo ifanele ukwamkela amandla, nobutyebi, nobulumko, nokomelela, nembeko, nozuko, nentsikelelo."
Revelation5:13 Ndaziva zonke izidalwa ezisemazulwini, nezisemhlabeni, naphantsi komhlaba, neziselwandle, neento zonke ezikwezo zinto, zisithi, Makubekho ukubongwa, nembeko, nozuko, namandla, lowo uhleli phezu kwetrone, nakuyo iMvana, kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni."
Revelation5:14 Zathi izinto eziphilileyo zone, Amen. Aza amadoda amakhulu angamashumi amabini anesine awa phantsi, aqubuda kulowo udla ubomi kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni."
Revelation6:1 Ndabona, xa iMvana yalivulayo elinye lamatywina, ndeva enye kuzo izinto eziphilileyo zone, isithi, ngathi kungesandi sokududuma, Yiza ubone."
Revelation6:2 Ndabona, nalo ihashe elimhlophe, lowo wayehleli phezu kwalo enesaphetha; wanikwa isithsaba, waphuma eseyisa, nokuze eyise."
Revelation6:3 Xa yalivulayo elesibini itywina, ndeva eyesibini into ephilileyo isithi, Yiza ubone."
Revelation6:4 Kwaphuma elinye ihashe elibomvu; lowo wayehleli phezu kwalo wanikwa igunya lokulususa uxolo emhlabeni, nokuba babulalane, wanikwa ikrele elikhulu."
Revelation6:5 Xa yalivulayo elesithathu itywina, ndeva eyesithathu into ephilileyo isithi, Yiza ubone. Ndabona, nalo ihashe elimnyama; lowo ke wayehleli phezu kwalo wayenesikali esandleni sakhe."
Revelation6:6 Ndaza ndeva izwi esazulwini sezinto eziphilileyo zone, lisithi, Ibhekile yengqolowa iya kudla idenariyo, neebhekile ezintathu zerhasi zidle idenariyo; ioli newayini uze ungayoni."
Revelation6:7 Xa yalivulayo elesine itywina, ndeva izwi lento ephilileyo yesine lisithi, Yiza ubone."
Revelation6:8 Ndabona, nalo ihashe eliluthuthu; lowo ke wayehleli phezu kwalo enguKufa, nelabafileyo lilandela naye. Banikwa igunya lokubulala kwisahlulo sesine somhlaba ngekrele, nangendlala, nangokufa, nangawo amarhamncwa omhlaba."
Revelation6:9 Xa yalivulayo elesihlanu itywina, ndabona phantsi kwesibingelelo imiphefumlo yababuleweyo ngenxa yelizwi likaThixo, nangenxa yobungqina ababenabo."
Revelation6:10 Baye bedanduluka ngezwi elikhulu, besithi, Koda kube nini na, Nkosi engcwele, oyinyaniso, ungagwebi, ungaliphindezeleli igazi lethu kwabo bemiyo phezu komhlaba?"
Revelation6:11 Banikwa bonke ngabanye iingubo ezinde ezimhlophe; kwathiwa kubo, basaya kuphumla ixesha elincinane, bade bazaliseke nabakhonza kunye nabo, nabazalwana babo, abaza kubulawa kwanjengabo."
Revelation6:12 Ndabona, xa yalivulayo elesithandathu itywina, kwasuka kwabakho unyikimo lomhlaba olukhulu; Ilanga laba mnyama, njengengubo erhwexayo yoboya, nenyanga yaba njengegazi;"
Revelation6:13 Zathi iinkwenkwezi zezulu zawela emhlabeni, njengokuba umkhiwane uvuthulula amakhiwane awo avuthuzayo, wakuzanyazanyiswa ngumoya omkhulu."
Revelation6:14 Lathi izulu lemka, njengencwadi esongwayo; zathi zonke iintaba neziqithi zashenxiswa ezindaweni zazo."
Revelation6:15 Ke bona ookumkani bomhlaba, nezinhanha, nezityebi, nabaphathi-mikhosi, nabanamandla, nabakhonzi bonke, nabakhululekileyo, bazifihla emiqolombeni nasemaweni eentaba."
Revelation6:16 Bathi kwiintaba namawa, Siweleni, nisifihle ebusweni balowo uhleli phezu kwetrone, nasengqumbo yeMvana."
Revelation6:17 Ngokuba ufikile umhla omkhulu wengqumbo yayo; ngubani na ke onako ukuma?
Revelation7:1 Emva koko ndabona izithunywa zezulu zine, zimi kwiimbombo zone zomhlaba, zibambe imimoya yomine yomhlaba, ukuze kungabikho moya uvuthuza emhlabeni, naphezu kolwandle, nakuwuphi na umthi."
Revelation7:2 Ndabona esinye isithunywa sezulu, sinyuka siphuma empumalanga, sinetywina loThixo ophilileyo;"
Revelation7:3 esithi, Musani ukulonakalisa ilizwe, nolwandle, nemithi, side sibatywine abakhonzi boThixo wethu emabunzini abo."
Revelation7:4 Ndaliva inani labo babetywiniwe: kwatywinwa ikhulu elinamanci mane anesine lamawaka, kuzo zonke izizwe zoonyana bakaSirayeli."
Revelation7:5 Kwisizwe sakwaYuda, kwatywinwa ishumi elinambini lamawaka. Kwisizwe sakwaRubhen, elinambini lamawaka. Kwisizwe sakwaGadi, elinambini lamawaka."
Revelation7:6 Kwisizwe sakwa-Ashere, kwatywinwa ishumi elinambini lamawaka. Kwisizwe sakwaNafetali, kwatywinwa ishumi elinambini lamawaka. Kwisizwe sakwaManase, elinambini lamawaka,"
Revelation7:7 kwisizwe sakwaSimon, kwatywinwa ishumi elinambini lamawaka. Kwisizwe sakwaLevi, elinambini lamawaka. Kwisizwe sakwaIsakare, elinambini lamawaka."
Revelation7:8 Kwisizwe sakwaZebhulon kwatywinwa ishumi elinambini lamawaka. Kwisizwe sikaYosefu, elinambini lamawaka. Kwisizwe sakwaBhenjamin, kwatywinwa ishumi elinambini lamawaka."
Revelation7:9 Emva koko ndabona, naso isihlwele esikhulu, ebekungekho namnye unako ukusibala, siphuma kuzo zonke iintlanga, nezizwe, nezizwe, nabantu, neelwimi, simi phambi kwetrone naphambi kweMvana, sambethe iingubo ezinde ezimhlophe, namasundu enziwe ngamasundu, izandla zabo;"
Revelation7:10 Badanduluka ngezwi elikhulu, besithi, Usindiso kuye uThixo wethu, lowo uhleli phezu kwetrone, nakuyo iMvana."
Revelation7:11 Zaye zonke izithunywa zezulu zimi, zenze isangqa etroneni, nakuwo amadoda amakhulu, nakuzo izinto eziphilileyo zone, zawa ngobuso phambi kwetrone, zaqubuda kuye uThixo;"
Revelation7:12 zisithi, Amen, Ukubongwa, nozuko, nobulumko, nombulelo, nembeko, namandla, nokomelela, Makube kuye uThixo wethu, kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni. Amen."
Revelation7:13 Yaphendula enye indoda enkulu, isithi kum, Aba bathiwe wambu ngeengubo ezimhlophe bangoobani na? avela phi na?"
Revelation7:14 Ndathi kuye, Nkosi, nguwe owaziyo. Yathi kum, Aba ngabaphuma embandezelweni enkulu, bazihlamba iingubo zabo ezinde, bazenza mhlophe egazini leMvana."
Revelation7:15 Ngenxa yoko baphambi kwetrone kaThixo, bemkhonza imini nobusuku etempileni yakhe; nalowo uhleli phezu kwetrone uya kuba phakathi kwabo."
Revelation7:16 Abayi kuba salamba, abasayi kunxanwa; nelanga aliyi kubakhanyisela, nabuphi na ubushushu."
Revelation7:17 Ngokuba iMvana esesazulwini setrone iya kubalusa, ibakhokelele emithonjeni ephilileyo yamanzi; waye uThixo eya kuzisula zonke iinyembezi emehlweni abo."
Revelation8:1 Xa yalivulayo elesixhenxe itywina, kwabakho ukuzola ezulwini, kwangathi sisiqingatha seyure."
Revelation8:2 Ndazibona izithunywa zezulu ezisixhenxe, ezimayo phambi koThixo; zaza zanikwa izigodlo ezisixhenxe."
Revelation8:3 Seza esinye isithunywa, sema ngasesibingelelweni, sinesiqhumiselo segolide; wanikwa iziqhumiso ezininzi, ukuze azinikele, kunye nemithandazo yabo bonke abangcwele, phezu kwesibingelelo segolide, esiphambi kwetrone."
Revelation8:4 Wenyuka ke umsi wesiqhumiso, kunye nemithandazo yabangcwele, uphuma esandleni sesithunywa eso phambi koThixo."
Revelation8:5 Sathi isithunywa sathabatha isiqhumiselo, sasizalisa ngomlilo wesibingelelo, sawuphosa emhlabeni; kwabakho izandi, neendudumo, nemibane, nenyikima."
Revelation8:6 Zaza izithunywa ezisixhenxe ezinamaxilongo osixhenxe zalungiselela ukuvuthela.
Revelation8:7 Esokuqala isithunywa savuthela ixilongo, kwabakho isichotho nomlilo, ziphithikezwe negazi, zaphoswa emhlabeni, saza isahlulo sesithathu semithi satsha, nayo yonke ingca eluhlaza yatsha yatsha."
Revelation8:8 Sathi esesibini isithunywa savuthela ixilongo, kwanga kuphoswa intaba enkulu, isitsha ngumlilo elwandle, saza isahlulo sesithathu solwandle saba ligazi;"
Revelation8:9 Safa isahlulo sesithathu sezinto eziphilileyo eziselwandle; saza isahlulo sesithathu semikhombe satshatyalaliswa.
Revelation8:10 Sathi esesithathu isithunywa savuthela ixilongo, kwawa inkwenkwezi enkulu ezulwini, ivutha ngathi sisibane, yawa phezu kwesahlulo sesithathu semilambo naphezu kwemithombo yamanzi."
Revelation8:11 Igama lenkwenkwezi leyo kuthiwa nguMhlonyane; saza isahlulo sesithathu samanzi saba ngumhlonyane; into eninzi yabantu yafa ngawo amanzi, ngokuba aba krakra."
Revelation8:12 Sathi esesine isithunywa savuthela ixilongo, saza sabethwa isahlulo sesithathu selanga, nesahlulo sesithathu senyanga, nesahlulo sesithathu seenkwenkwezi; njengokuba isahlulo sesithathu sazo saba mnyama, yathi isahlulo sesithathu sayo imini ayikhanyi, kwangokunjalo nobusuku."
Revelation8:13 Ndabona, ndasiva isithunywa sezulu, siphaphazela esazulwini sezulu, sisithi ngezwi elikhulu, Yeha, yeha, yeha, abo bawumiyo umhlaba, ngenxa yezinye izandi zamaxilongo ezithunywa zezulu ezithathu, ezisahleliyo, ukuvakala!"
Revelation9:1 Sathi esesihlanu isithunywa savuthela ixilongo. Ndabona inkwenkwezi iphuma ezulwini, isiwa emhlabeni, yaza yanikwa isitshixo senzonzobila."
Revelation9:2 Walivula enzonzobileni; kwenyuka umsi emhadini, njengomsi weziko leziko elikhulu; lesuka laba mnyama ilanga nezulu ngumsi womhadi."
Revelation9:3 Emsini apho kwaphuma iinkumbi, zeza emhlabeni, zanikwa igunya, njengokuba benegunya oonomadudwane bomhlaba."
Revelation9:4 Waziwisela umthetho wokuba zingoni utyani bomhlaba, nanye into eluhlaza, nanye imithi; kodwa ngamadoda kuphela, angenalo itywina likaThixo emabunzini abo."
Revelation9:5 Zanikwa igunya lokungababulali, kodwa bathuthunjelwe iinyanga ezintlanu; intuthumbo yabo yayinjengentuthumbo yoonomadudwane, xa athe wamhlaba umntu."
Revelation9:6 Ngaloo mihla abantu baya kukufuna ukufa, bangakufumani; baya kukunqwenela ukufa, kusuke ukufa kusabe kubo."
Revelation9:7 Imo yeenkumbi ezo, ibifana namahashe, elungiselwe ukulwa; entloko izizithsaba ezifana negolide, nobuso bazo bunjengobuso babantu."
Revelation9:8 Zaye zineenwele ezingathi ziinwele zabafazi, namazinyo azo engathi ngawengonyama."
Revelation9:9 Zaye zinezigcina-zifuba ezingathi zezentsimbi; isandi samaphiko azo sasingathi sisandi seenqwelo zamahashe amaninzi, ebalekela emfazweni."
Revelation9:10 Zaye zinemisila efana neyoonomadudwane, ineemvila emisileni yazo, yaye igunya lazo lilelokwenzakalisa abantu iinyanga ezintlanu."
Revelation9:11 Zaye zinokumkani phezu kwazo, usisithunywa senzonzobila, ogama ngesiHebhere linguAbhadon, kodwa ngesiGrike unegama elinguApoliyon."
Revelation9:12 Yeha mnye udlule; yabona, kuza ooyeha ababini emva koko."
Revelation9:13 Sathi esesithandathu isithunywa savuthela ixilongo, ndeva izwi liphuma ezimpondweni zone zesibingelelo segolide, esiphambi koThixo,"
Revelation9:14 lisithi kwisithunywa sesithandathu, esinexilongo, Zikhulule izithunywa zezulu ezine, ezibotshwe emlanjeni omkhulu ongumEfrati."
Revelation9:15 Zaza zakhululwa izithunywa zozine, ezazilungiselwe ilixa, nemini, nenyanga, nomnyaka, ukuba zibulale isahlulo sesithathu sabantu."
Revelation9:16 Inani lempi yabamahashe lalingamakhulu amabini amawaka; ndaliva ke inani labo.
Revelation9:17 Kwaye ngokunjalo ndawabona embonweni amahashe, nabahleli phezu kwawo, benezigcina-zifuba ezivuthayo, ezibomvu, nezesalfure, neentloko zamahashe zazingathi ziintloko zeengonyama; emlonyeni wawo kuphuma umlilo, nomsi, nesulfure."
Revelation9:18 Ngezo zinto zontathu sabulawa isahlulo sesithathu sabantu ngomlilo, nangomsi, nangesulfure, ephuma emlonyeni wawo."
Revelation9:19 Kuba amandla awo asemlonyeni wawo nasemisileni yawo; kuba imisila yawo ifana neenyoka, ineentloko; ngayo ayonakalisa."
Revelation9:20 Nabanye abantu ababengabulawanga ngezi zibetho abaguqukanga kwimisebenzi yezandla zabo, ukuba bangazinquli iidemon, nezithixo zegolide, nezesilivere, nezobhedu, nezelitye, nezemithi; akaboni, angeva, angahambi;"
Revelation9:21 abaguqukanga ekubulaleni kwabo, nasekukhafuleni kwabo, nasembulweni wabo, nakubusela bawo."
Revelation10:1 Ndabona esinye isithunywa sezulu esinamandla, sisihla ezulwini, sithiwe wambu ngelifu; kukho umnyama entloko, ubuso baso bungathi lilanga, iinyawo zaso zingathi ziintsika zomlilo."
Revelation10:2 Yayiphethe ngesandla incwadi encinane evulekileyo, yabeka unyawo lwayo lokunene phezu kolwandle, nolwasekhohlo olwasemhlabeni."
Revelation10:3 Sadanduluka ngezwi elikhulu, ngathi yingonyama igquma; sathi sakudanduluka, iindudumo ezisixhenxe zazivakalisa izandi zazo."
Revelation10:4 Xa iindudumo ezisixhenxe zazivakalisayo izandi zazo, ndandiza kubhala;"
Revelation10:5 Saza isithunywa eso ndasibonayo simi phezu kolwandle naphezu komhlaba, sasiphakamisela ezulwini isandla saso,"
Revelation10:6 wafunga lowo udla ubomi kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni, owadala izulu nezinto ezikulo, nomhlaba nezinto ezikuwo, nolwandle, nezinto ezikuwo, ukuba akuyi kubakho xesha limiyo, ixesha elide:"
Revelation10:7 Kodwa ngemihla yezwi lesesixhenxe isithunywa sezulu, xa sukuba siza kuvuthela ixilongo, iya kuzaliseka imfihlelo kaThixo, njengoko wawazisayo abakhonzi bakhe abaprofeti."
Revelation10:8 Lathi ilizwi endalivayo liphuma ezulwini, labuya lathetha nam, lisithi, Hamba uye uyithabathe incwadana evulekileyo, esesandleni sesithunywa esimi phezu kolwandle naphezu komhlaba."
Revelation10:9 Ndesuka ke ndaya kwisithunywa eso, ndathi kuso, Ndinike incwadana leyo. Wathi kum, Yithabathe, uyidle uyigqibe; yenze krakra isisu sakho, kodwa emlonyeni wakho yoba mnandi njengobusi."
Revelation10:10 Ndayithabatha ke incwadana esesandleni sesithunywa eso, ndayidla ndayigqiba; yaye emlonyeni wam inencasa enjengeyobusi; yaye xa ndayidlayo, saba krakra isisu sam."
Revelation10:11 Sathi kum, Umele ukuba ubuye uprofete ngabantu, neentlanga, neelwimi, nookumkani, abaninzi."
Revelation11:1 Ndaza ndanikwa ingcongolo, ifana nentonga; saye isithunywa eso simi, sisithi, Suka uyilinganise itempile kaThixo, nesibingelelo, nabo banqulayo bekuyo."
Revelation11:2 Kodwa intendelezo engaphandle kwetempile yishiye ngaphandle, ungayilinganisi; ngokuba linikelwe iintlanga; umzi ongcwele ziya kuwunyathela ngeenyawo iinyanga ezimashumi mane anesibini."
Revelation11:3 Ndiya kuwanika amangqina am amabini, aprofete imihla eliwaka elinamakhulu mabini anamanci mathandathu, ethiwe wambu ngeengubo ezirhwexayo."
Revelation11:4 Lawo yile minquma mibini, nezi ziphatho zezibane zibini, zimiyo phambi koThixo womhlaba."
Revelation11:5 Ukuba kukho bani unga angawonakalisa, kophuma umlilo emlonyeni wawo, uziqwenge iintshaba zawo;"
Revelation11:6 Lawo anegunya lokuvala izulu ukuze kungani ngeentsuku zokuprofeta kwawo, yaye anegunya phezu kwamanzi lokuwajika abe ligazi nelokuwubetha umhlaba ngazo zonke izibetho ngokufuthi kangangoko enqwenela."
Revelation11:7 Xa athe abufeza ubungqina bawo, irhamncwa elinyuka liphuma enzonzobileni liya kwenza imfazwe nawo, liweyise, liwabulale."
Revelation11:8 Izidumbu zawo ziya kuqungquluza esitratweni somzi omkhulu, ekuthiwa ngokomoya yiSodom neYiputa, apho neNkosi yethu yabethelelwa khona emnqamlezweni."
Revelation11:9 Ababantu, nezizwe, neelwimi, neentlanga, baya kuzibona izidumbu zawo imihla emithathu enesiqingatha somhla, bangavumi ukuba izidumbu zawo zibekwe emangcwabeni."
Revelation11:10 Nabo bemiyo phezu komhlaba baya kuba nemihlali ngabo, babe nemihlali, bathumelelane izipho; ngokuba abo baprofeti babini babathuthumbisa abo bemiyo phezu komhlaba."
Revelation11:11 Emva kweentsuku ezintathu ezinesiqingatha uMoya wobomi ophuma kuThixo wangena kuwo, ema ngeenyawo zawo; baza bawelwa luloyiko olukhulu abo bawabonayo."
Revelation11:12 Eva izwi elikhulu liphuma ezulwini, lisithi kubo, Nyukelani apha. Benyuka baya ezulwini besefini; zawabona iintshaba zawo."
Revelation11:13 Kwangelo lixa kwabakho unyikimo olukhulu lomhlaba, isahlulo seshumi somzi sawa, kwabulawa kolo lunyikimo abantu abangamawaka asixhenxe; abaseleyo bangenelwa kukoyika, bamzukisa uThixo wezulu."
Revelation11:14 Uyeha wesibini udlule; uyabona, uyeha wesithathu uyeza kamsinya."
Revelation11:15 Sathi esesixhenxe isithunywa savuthela ixilongo; kwabakho amazwi amakhulu emazulwini, esithi, Izikumkani zehlabathi zithe zaba zezeNkosi yethu, nezikaKristu wayo; uya kulawula ngonaphakade kanaphakade."
Revelation11:16 Athi amadoda amakhulu amashumi mabini anamane, abehleli phambi koThixo ezitroneni zawo, awa ngobuso, aqubuda kuye uThixo,"
Revelation11:17 Sithi, Siyabulela kuwe, Nkosi, Thixo Somandla, wena ukhoyo, wawukho, uzayo; ngokuba uwathabathile amandla akho amakhulu, waba ngukumkani."
Revelation11:18 Zaqumba iintlanga, lafika ingqumbo yakho, nexesha labafileyo lokuba bagwetywe, nokuba ubanike umvuzo kubakhonzi bakho abaprofeti, nabangcwele, nabo baloyikayo igama lakho, abancinane, kwaye mkhulu; kwaye uya kubatshabalalisa abo bawonakalisayo umhlaba."
Revelation11:19 Yavulwa itempile kaThixo emazulwini, yabonakala ityeya yomnqophiso wakhe etempileni yakhe; kwabakho imibane, nezandi, neendudumo, nonyikimo lomhlaba, nesichotho esikhulu."
Revelation12:1 Kwabonakala umqondiso omkhulu ezulwini: inkazana ethiwe wambu ngelanga, inyanga iphantsi kweenyawo zakhe, entloko kuye isisithsaba seenkwenkwezi ezilishumi elinambini."
Revelation12:2 Uthe ke emithi, walila, eneneni, egcuma ekuzaleni."
Revelation12:3 Kwabonakala omnye umqondiso ezulwini: nantso, inamba enkulu ebomvu, ineentloko ezisixhenxe neempondo ezilishumi, kwiintloko zayo izizithsaba ezisixhenxe."
Revelation12:4 Umsila wayo wawurhola isahlulo sesithathu seenkwenkwezi, waziphosa emhlabeni. Yathi inamba leyo yema phambi komfazi owayeza kuzala, ukuze, xa athe wazala, imdle imgqibe umntwana wakhe."
Revelation12:5 Wazala umntwana oyinkwenkwe, oza kuzalusa zonke iintlanga ngentonga yentsimbi, umntwana wakhe lowo wathiwa xwi, wasiwa kuye uThixo, nakuyo itrone yakhe."
Revelation12:6 Umfazi wasabela entlango, apho ikhona indawo ayilungiselwe nguThixo, ukuze bamnqake khona iintsuku eziliwaka elinamakhulu mabini anamanci mathandathu."
Revelation12:7 Kwaza kwabakho imfazwe emazulwini, uMikayeli nezithunywa zakhe besilwa nenamba; yasilwa inamba nezithunywa zayo;"
Revelation12:8 Akazange abeyise; azaba safunyanwa indawo yazo emazulwini.
Revelation12:9 Yaphoswa phantsi inamba enkulu, inyoka yakudala, leyo kuthiwa nguMtyholi, uSathana ke, lowo ulilahlekisayo elimiweyo liphela; yaphoswa phantsi emhlabeni, nezithunywa zayo zaphoswa phantsi kunye nayo."
Revelation12:10 Ndeva izwi elikhulu emazulwini lisithi, Ngoku luthe usindiso, namandla, nobukumkani bukaThixo wethu, namandla kaKristu wakhe; ngokuba ukhahlelwe phantsi ummangaleli wabazalwana bethu, lowo ubamangalelayo phambi koThixo wethu imini nobusuku, busuku."
Revelation12:11 Bameyisile bona ngenxa yegazi leMvana, nangenxa yelizwi lobungqina babo; ababuthandanga ubomi babo kwada kwasekufeni."
Revelation12:12 Ngoko ke yibani nemihlali, nina mazulu, nani ninomnquba kuwo. Yeha, abo bawumiyo umhlaba nolwandle! ngokuba uhlile weza kuni uMtyholi, enomsindo omkhulu, esazi nje ukuba ixesha analo lincinane."
Revelation12:13 Yathi inamba, yakubona ukuba iphoswe emhlabeni, yamtshutshisa umfazi ozele umntwana oyinkwenkwe."
Revelation12:14 Umfazi wanikwa amaphiko amabini okhozi olukhulu, ukuze aphaphazele aye entlango, endaweni yakhe, apho anqakwa khona ixesha, namaxesha, nesiqingatha sexesha, kude nobuso benyoka."
Revelation12:15 Inyoka yakhupha emlonyeni wayo amanzi anjengomlambo emva komfazi, ukuze imkhukulise nomlambo."
Revelation12:16 Waza umhlaba wamncedisa umfazi, waza umhlaba wawuvula umlomo wawo, wawuginya umlambo eyawukhuphayo inamba emlonyeni wayo."
Revelation12:17 Yamqumbela umfazi inamba, yemka yaya kulwa nabaseleyo bembewu yakhe, abo bayigcinayo imithetho kaThixo, abanobungqina bukaYesu Kristu."
Revelation13:1 Ndaza ndema phezu kwentlabathi yolwandle. Ndabona kunyuka, kuphuma elwandle, irhamncwa, lineentloko ezisixhenxe neempondo ezilishumi, ezimpondweni zalo izizithsaba ezilishumi, kwiintloko zalo iligama lonyeliso."
Revelation13:2 Laye irhamncwa elo ndalibonayo lifana nengwe, iinyawo zalo zinjengezebhere, umlomo walo unjengomlomo wengonyama. Inamba yalinika amandla alo, netrone yalo, negunya elikhulu."
Revelation13:3 Ndabona enye yazo iintloko zalo, ingathi ixatyelwe yafa; lathi inxeba lalo elibanga ukufa laphila. Lamangaliswa ihlabathi liphela, lilandela irhamncwa."
Revelation13:4 Bayinqula inamba eyalinika igunya irhamncwa, balinqula irhamncwa, besithi, Ngubani na ofana nerhamncwa elo? ngubani na onako ukulwa nayo?"
Revelation13:5 Sanikwa umlomo othetha izinto ezinkulu, nezinyeliso; lanikwa igunya lokuqhubeka iinyanga ezimashumi mane anesibini."
Revelation13:6 Lawuvulela umlomo walo ekumnyeliseni uThixo, ukuba lilinyelise igama lakhe, nomnquba wakhe, nabo bahleli emazulwini."
Revelation13:7 Lanikwa igunya lokulwa nabangcwele, libeyise; lanikwa igunya kuzo zonke izizwe, neelwimi, neentlanga."
Revelation13:8 Baya kulinqula bonke abo bemiyo phezu komhlaba, abamagama angabhalwanga encwadini yobomi yayo iMvana, exheliweyo kususela ekusekweni kwehlabathi."
Revelation13:9 Ukuba ubani unendlebe, makeve."
Revelation13:10 Ukuba ubani ukhokelela ekuthinjweni, uya kusiwa ekuthinjweni; lowo ubulala ngekrele, umelwe kukubulawa naye ngekrele. Nalu unyamezelo nokholo lwabangcwele."
Revelation13:11 Ndabona elinye irhamncwa linyuka liphuma emhlabeni; laye lineempondo ezimbini zifana nezemvana, laye lithetha njengenamba."
Revelation13:12 Lenza lonke igunya lelokuqala irhamncwa, elalingaphambi kwalo; lenza umhlaba nabo bawumiyo ukuba balinqule irhamncwa lokuqala, elaphiliswayo inxeba lalo elibanga ukufa."
Revelation13:13 Senza imiqondiso emikhulu, ngokokude senze umlilo uhle ezulwini, uze emhlabeni phambi kwabantu;"
Revelation13:14 Lalahlekisa abo bemiyo phezu komhlaba, ngemiqondiso elayinikwayo ukuba liyenze emehlweni erhamncwa; lisithi kwabo bemiyo phezu komhlaba, ukuba balenze umfanekiselo irhamncwa, elibe linenxeba lalo ikrele, laphila."
Revelation13:15 Lanikwa igunya lokuwunika umfanekiselo werhamncwa umoya, ukuze umfanekiselo werhamncwa elo uthethe nokuthetha, wenze ukuba babulawe abasukuba bengaqubudi kuwo umfanekiselo werhamncwa."
Revelation13:16 Lenza ukuba bonke, abancinane nabakhulu, abazizityebi nabangamahlwempu, abakhululekileyo nabangamakhoboka, ukuba baphawulwe esandleni sabo sokunene, nokuba kusebunzi;"
Revelation13:17 Kwaye ukuze kungabikho bani unako ukuthenga nokuthengisa, ingenguye lowo unophawu, nokuba ligama lerhamncwa, nokuba linani legama lalo."
Revelation13:18 Nabu ke ubulumko. Lowo unengqiqo makalibale inani lerhamncwa; kuba linani lomntu; inani lakhe ngamakhulu amathandathu anamanci mathandathu anesithandathu.
Revelation14:1 Ndabona, nantso iMvana imi phezu kwentaba yeZiyon, kumi nayo ikhulu elinamanci mane anesine lamawaka, benalo igama loYise libhaliwe emabunzini abo."
Revelation14:2 Ndeva izwi liphuma ezulwini, ngathi sisandi samanzi amaninzi, ngathi sisandi sendudumo enkulu;"
Revelation14:3 Baye bevuma ingoma engathi intsha, phambi kwetrone, naphambi kwezinto eziphilileyo zone, namadoda amakhulu; kwaye kungekho namnye unako ukuyifunda ingoma leyo, lingelilo ikhulu elinamanci mane anesine lamawaka, ababethengiwe emhlabeni."
Revelation14:4 Aba ngabo bangadyobhekanga ngabafazi; ngokuba banyulu. Aba ngabo bayilandelayo iMvana apho isukuba isiya khona. Aba bathengwa bephuma ebantwini, baziintlahlela kuye uThixo nakuyo iMvana."
Revelation14:5 Emlonyeni wabo akufunyanwanga nkohliso, kuba bengenakubekwa bala phambi kwetrone kaThixo."
Revelation14:6 Ndabona esinye isithunywa sezulu, siphaphazela esazulwini samazulu, sineendaba ezilungileyo ezingunaphakade, ukuba sizishumayele kwabo bemiyo phezu komhlaba, nakwiintlanga zonke, nezizwe, neelwimi, nabantu;"
Revelation14:7 sisithi ngezwi elikhulu, Moyikeni uThixo, nimzukise; ngokuba lifikile ilixa lokugweba kwakhe; nimnqule lowo wenza izulu, nomhlaba, nolwandle, nemithombo yamanzi."
Revelation14:8 Kwaza kwalandela esinye isithunywa sezulu, sisithi, Iwile, iwile iBhabheli, loo mzi mkhulu, ngokuba iseze zonke iintlanga ngewayini yomsindo wobuhenyu bayo."
Revelation14:9 Saza esesithathu isithunywa sazilandela, sithetha ngezwi elikhulu, sisithi, Ukuba ubani ulinqula irhamncwa nomfanekiselo walo, walwamkela uphawu lwakhe ebunzini lakhe, nokuba kusesandleni sakhe;"
Revelation14:10 Lowo uya kusela kwiwayini yomsindo kaThixo, egalelwe kwindebe yokucaphuka, ingaxutywanga; uya kuthuthunjiswa ngomlilo nesulfure, phambi kwezithunywa ezingcwele, naphambi kweMvana."
Revelation14:11 Unyuka umsi wokuthuthunjelwa kwawo, use emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni; abanakuphumla imini nobusuku, abo banqula irhamncwa nomfanekiselo walo, nabani na owamkelayo uphawu lwegama lalo."
Revelation14:12 Nalu unyamezelo lwabangcwele, naba abayigcinayo imithetho kaThixo nokukholwa kuYesu."
Revelation14:13 Ndaza ndeva ilizwi liphuma ezulwini lisithi kum: “Bhala uthi: ‘Banoyolo abo bafa bezinikele eNkosini, nemisebenzi yabo iyabalandela."
Revelation14:14 Ndabona, nalo ilifu elimhlophe, efini apho kuhleli ofana noNyana woMntu, enesithsaba segolide entloko, ephethe irhengqa elibukhali esandleni sakhe."
Revelation14:15 Kwaphuma esinye isithunywa sezulu etempileni, sidanduluka ngezwi elikhulu kulowo uhleli efini, sisithi, Lifake irhengqa lakho, uvune; ngokuba isivuno sehlabathi sivuthiwe."
Revelation14:16 Lowo uhleli efini waliphosa irhengqa lakhe emhlabeni; wavunwa ke umhlaba.
Revelation14:17 Kwaphuma nesinye isithunywa sezulu, siphuma etempileni esemazulwini, naso sinerhengqa elibukhali."
Revelation14:18 Kwaphuma esinye isithunywa sezulu esibingelelweni, sinegunya phezu komlilo; sadanduluka ngezwi elikhulu kuleyo yayinerhengqa elibukhali, sisithi, Lifake irhengqa lakho elibukhali, uzihlanganise izihloko zomdiliya womhlaba; ngokuba iidiliya zayo zivuthiwe;"
Revelation14:19 Saza isithunywa saliphosa irhengqa laso emhlabeni, sawubutha umdiliya womhlaba, sawuphosa kwisixovulelo esikhulu sewayini yomsindo kaThixo."
Revelation14:20 Isixovulelo eso saxovulwa ngaphandle komzi, kwaphuma igazi kwisixovulelo eso, lada lada lafika emikhaleni yamahashe, umgama wezitadiya eziliwaka elinamakhulu amathandathu."
Revelation15:1 Ndabona ezulwini omnye umqondiso omkhulu, ongummangaliso; izithunywa zezulu ezisixhenxe zinazo izibetho ezisixhenxe zokugqibela; ngokuba izalisekile ingqumbo kaThixo ngazo."
Revelation15:2 Ndabona ngathi lulwandle lwegilasi, luphithikezene nomlilo; bathi abo baloyisayo irhamncwa, nomfanekiselo walo, naphezu kophawu lwalo, naphezu kwenani legama lalo, bemi phezu kolwandle lwegilasi; enemirhubhe kaThixo."
Revelation15:3 Bayivuma ingoma kaMoses, umkhonzi kaThixo, nengoma yeMvana, besithi: Mikhulu, ingummangaliso imisebenzi yakho, Nkosi, Thixo Somandla; zinobulungisa, ziyinyaniso iindlela zakho, Kumkani wenceba."
Revelation15:4 Ngubani na ongekhe akoyike, Yehova, Angalizukisi igama lakho? Ngokuba nguwe wedwa ongcwele; ngokuba zonke iintlanga ziya kuza ziqubude phambi kwakho; ngokuba ibonakalisiwe imigwebo yakho."
Revelation15:5 Ndaza emva koko ndabona, nantso ivuliwe itempile yomnquba wobungqina emazulwini."
Revelation15:6 Zaphuma ke etempileni izithunywa zezulu ezisixhenxe, zinezibetho ezisixhenxe, zambethe ilinen emhlophe eqaqambileyo, ziyibhinqile ezifubeni imibhinqo yegolide."
Revelation15:7 Yathi enye kuzo izinto eziphilileyo zone, yazinika izithunywa ezisixhenxe iingqayi zegolide ezisixhenxe, zizele ngumsindo kaThixo, odla ubomi kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni."
Revelation15:8 Yazala itempile ngumsi ophuma ebuqaqawulini bukaThixo, nasemandleni akhe; akwabakho namnye unako ukungena etempileni, zada zazaliseka izibetho ezisixhenxe zezithunywa zosixhenxe."
Revelation16:1 Ndeva izwi elikhulu liphuma etempileni, lisithi kwizithunywa zosixhenxe, Hambani niye kuziphalaza iingqayi zomsindo kaThixo phezu komhlaba."
Revelation16:2 Sahamba ke esokuqala, sayiphalaza ingqayi yaso emhlabeni; kwabakho isibetho esibi esibuhlungu ebantwini, abanophawu lwerhamncwa, abo baqubudayo kuwo umfanekiselo walo."
Revelation16:3 Esesibini isithunywa sayiphalaza ingqayi yaso elwandle; lwaba ligazi elinjengelofileyo, yaza yonke imiphefumlo ephilileyo yafa elwandle."
Revelation16:4 Saza esesithathu isithunywa sayiphalaza ingqayi yaso emilanjeni nasemithonjeni yamanzi; zaba ligazi.
Revelation16:5 Ndasiva isithunywa samanzi, sisithi: “Ulilungisa wena ukhoyo, wawukho, uyingcwele, ngokuba ugwebile wenjenje."
Revelation16:6 Ngokuba baliphalazile igazi labangcwele nelabaprofeti, wabanika igazi ukuba balisele; ngokuba befanelekile."
Revelation16:7 Ndaza ndeva esinye siphuma esibingelelweni sisithi: “Ewe, Nkosi, Thixo Somandla, ziyinyaniso, zinobulungisa izigwebo zakho."
Revelation16:8 Saza esesine isithunywa sayiphalaza ingqayi yaso elangeni; laza lanikwa igunya lokutshisa abantu ngomlilo.
Revelation16:9 Batsha abantu bubushushu obukhulu, balinyelisa igama likaThixo, onalo igunya kwezo zibetho; abaguquka bamzukise."
Revelation16:10 Saza esesihlanu isithunywa sayiphalaza ingqayi yaso etroneni yerhamncwa; baba mnyama ubukumkani bakhe; bamana beziluma iilwimi ngenxa yeentlungu;
Revelation16:11 bamnyelisa uThixo wamazulu ngenxa yeentlungu zabo, nangenxa yezilonda zabo; abaguquka emisebenzini yabo."
Revelation16:12 Esesithandathu isithunywa sayiphalaza ingqayi yaso emlanjeni omkhulu ongumEfrati; atsha amanzi awo, ukuze ilungiswe indlela yookumkani abavela empumalanga."
Revelation16:13 Ndabona kuphuma emlonyeni wenamba, nasemlonyeni werhamncwa, nasemlonyeni womprofeti wobuxoki, oomoya abathathu abangcolileyo, befana namasele."
Revelation16:14 Kuba bangoomoya beedemon, besenza imiqondiso; abaphuma baye kubo ookumkani bomhlaba, nabelimiweyo liphela, ukubahlanganisela emfazweni yaloo mini inkulu kaThixo, uSomandla."
Revelation16:15 Uyabona, ndiza njengesela. Unoyolo lowo uphaphileyo, uzigcinayo iingubo zakhe, ukuze angahambi ze, balibone ihlazo lakhe."
Revelation16:16 Wabahlanganisela endaweni ekuthiwa ngesiHebhere yiArmagedon.
Revelation16:17 Saza esesixhenxe isithunywa sayiphalaza ingqayi yaso esibhakabhakeni; kwaphuma izwi elikhulu etempileni yezulu, liphuma etroneni, lisithi, Kwenzekile;"
Revelation16:18 Kwabakho izandi, neendudumo, nemibane; kwabakho nonyikimo lomhlaba olukhulu, ekungazanga kubekho lunjalo unyikimo, kuseloko kwabakhoyo abantu emhlabeni."
Revelation16:19 Umzi lowo mkhulu waba zahlulo zithathu, yathi imizi yeentlanga yawa; iBhabheli enkulu yaba sisikhumbuzo phambi koThixo, ukuba inikwe indebe yewayini yomsindo wengqumbo yakhe."
Revelation16:20 Zasaba, zonke iziqithi zabaleka, neentaba azafunyanwa."
Revelation16:21 Kwesuka kwehla ezulwini phezu kwabantu isichotho esikhulu, esibunzima bubunzima bumalunga netalente ngalinye; baza abantu bamnyelisa uThixo ngenxa yesibetho sesichotho eso; ngokuba sibe sikhulu kakhulu isibetho sayo."
Revelation17:1 Saza seza esinye sezithunywa zezulu ezisixhenxe, ezineengqayi zosixhenxe, sathetha nam, sisithi kum, Yiza apha, ndikubonise ukugwetywa kwalo ihenyukazi elikhulu; Ndiya kukubonisa ukugwetywa kwehenyukazi elikhulu, elihleli phezu kwamanzi amaninzi;"
Revelation17:2 abahenyuze nalo ookumkani bomhlaba, bathi abo bawumiyo umhlaba banxiliswe yiwayini yobuhenyu balo."
Revelation17:3 Sandisa entlango ndikuMoya; ndabona inkazana ihleli phezu kwerhamncwa elimfusa, lizele ngamagama onyeliso, lineentloko ezisixhenxe neempondo ezilishumi."
Revelation17:4 Yaye inkazana leyo ithiwe wambu ngengubo emfusa nemfusa, ihonjiswe ngegolide, namatye anqabileyo, neeperile, inendebe yegolide esandleni sayo, izele ngamasikizi nezingcoliso zobuhenyu bayo."
Revelation17:5 Ebunzi kubhalwe igama elithi, IMFIHLO, IBHABHILONI ENKULU, UNINA WAMAhenyukazi nowamasikizi omhlaba."
Revelation17:6 Ndayibona inkazana leyo inxila ligazi labangcwele, naligazi lamangqina kaYesu; ndamangaliswa ngokumangaliswa okukhulu ndakuyibona."
Revelation17:7 Sathi kum isithunywa eso, Yini na ukuba wamangaliswe? Ndokuxelela mna imfihlelo yenkazana le, neyerhamncwa eli liyithweleyo, lineentloko ezisixhenxe neempondo ezilishumi."
Revelation17:8 Irhamncwa owalibonayo lalikho, alikho; Liya kunyuka liphume enzonzobileni, liye entshabalalweni; baya kumangaliswa abo bemiyo phezu komhlaba, abamagama angabhalwanga encwadini yobomi kususela ekusekweni kwehlabathi, xa balibonayo irhamncwa elaye likho, lisithi, akakho, ukanti ukho."
Revelation17:9 Nantsi ingqiqo enobulumko. Iintloko ezisixhenxe ezi ziintaba ezisixhenxe, ehleli phezu kwazo inkazana leyo."
Revelation17:10 Kananjalo zona zingookumkani abasixhenxe: abahlanu bawile, omnye ukho, omnye akakafiki; athi ke akufika, athabathe ixesha elifutshane."
Revelation17:11 Irhamncwa elaye likho, elingasekhoyo, lona lingowesibhozo, ukwangowabasixhenxe, liye entshabalalweni."
Revelation17:12 Iimpondo ezilishumi ozibonileyo zingookumkani abalishumi, bona abo bangekabi nabukumkani. 11 R kodwa ke bamkela igunya njengookumkani ilixa elinye kunye nerhamncwa."
Revelation17:13 Aba banambono-nye; baya kunikela amandla negunya labo kulo irhamncwa.
Revelation17:14 Aba baya kwenza imfazwe neMvana. iMvana iya kubeyisa, ngokuba inguNkosi kankosi, inguKumkani kakumkani; nabo banayo babiziweyo, banyuliwe, bathembekileyo."
Revelation17:15 Sathi kum, Amanzi lawa manzi uwabonileyo, apho lihleli khona ihenyukazi, ngabantu, nezihlwele, neentlanga, neelwimi."
Revelation17:16 Iimpondo ezilishumi owazibonayo phezu kwerhamncwa, ngabo baya kulithiya ihenyukazi, baliphanzise, balihlube, bayidle inyama yalo, balitshise ngomlilo."
Revelation17:17 Kuba uThixo ubeke ezintliziyweni zabo ukuba benze ingcinga yakhe, benze ngcinga-nye, babunike irhamncwa ubukumkani babo, ade azaliseke amazwi kaThixo."
Revelation17:18 Inkazana owayibonayo nguloo mzi mkhulu, ulawula ookumkani bomhlaba."
Revelation18:1 Ndaza emva koko ndabona isithunywa sezulu sisihla, siphuma ezulwini, sinegunya elikhulu; kwaye umhlaba wakhanyiselwa bubuqaqawuli bakhe."
Revelation18:2 Sadanduluka ngamandla, ngezwi elikhulu, sisithi, Iwile, iwile iBhabheli enkulu, yaba likhaya leedemon, nentolongo yoomoya bonke abangcolileyo, nentolongo yeentaka zonke ezingcolileyo, ezithiyekileyo."
Revelation18:3 Ngokuba zonke iintlanga zisele kuyo iwayini yomsindo wobuhenyu bayo, Nookumkani bomhlaba bahenyuza nayo, Nabarhwebi bomhlaba baba zizityebi, ngenxa yobuninzi bokudla kwayo."
Revelation18:4 Ndaza ndeva elinye izwi liphuma ezulwini lisithi: “Phumani kuyo, bantu bam, ukuze ningadlelani nayo ngezono zayo, nokuze ningamkeliswa kwizibetho zayo."
Revelation18:5 Izono zayo ziye zafikelela emazulwini, Nezinto zayo zokungalungisi uzikhumbule uThixo."
Revelation18:6 Mbuyekezeni njengoko naye ndanivuzayo, niyibuyekeze kabini ngokwemisebenzi yayo;"
Revelation18:7 Yinikeni intuthumbo nesijwili, ngangoko yazizukisayo, yaxhamla iziyolo; ngokuba ibisithi entliziyweni yayo, Ndihleli ndingukumkanikazi, andimhlolokazi, andisayi kubona sijwili."
Revelation18:8 Ngenxa yoko ziya kufika ngamini-nye izibetho zayo, Ukufa, nesijwili, nendlala; Iya kutsha ngumlilo; ngokuba ligorha iNkosi uYehova, lowo uyigwebayo."
Revelation18:9 Ookumkani bomhlaba, abo bahenyuza nayo, baxhamla iziyolo nayo, baya kuyimbambazela, bayenzele isijwili, bakuwubona umsi wokutsha kwayo;"
Revelation18:10 Bemi kude, ngenxa yokoyika intuthumbo yayo, Besithi, Yeha, yeha, mzi mkhulu iBhabheli, mzi unamandla! ngokuba kufike ngaxa linye umgwebo wakho."
