Revelation18:11 Nabarhwebi bomhlaba baya kuyililela, benze isijwili ngenxa yayo; kuba akusekho bani uluthengayo urhwebo lwabo;"
Revelation18:12 Urhwebo lwegolide, nesilivere, namatye anqabileyo, neeperile, nelinen ecikizekileyo, nemfusa, nesilika, nebomvu, nomthi wakho wonke, neempahla zonke zeempondo zeendlovu, neempahla zonke zomthi onqabileyo; nobhedu, nesinyithi, nelitye lenyengane;"
Revelation18:13 nesinamon, neziqhumiso, namafutha aqholiweyo, nentlaka yokuqhumisa, newayini, neoli, nomgubo ocoliweyo, nengqolowa, neenkomo, nempahla emfutshane, namahashe, neenqwelo, nezicaka, nemiphefumlo yabantu."
Revelation18:14 Neziqhamo ezikhanukwa ngumphefumlo wakho zimkile kuwe, nazo zonke izinto ezityebileyo neziqaqambileyo zimkile kuwe; akusayi kuphinda uzifumane."
Revelation18:15 Abarhwebi bezo zinto, abo batyeba ngayo, Baya kuma kude, ngenxa yokoyika intuthumbo yayo, belila nokwenza isijwili;"
Revelation18:16 Besithi, Yeha, yeha, mzi mkhulu Owawuthiwe wambu ngelinen ecikizekileyo, nengubo ebomvu, nengubo emfusa, Uhonjiswe ngegolide, namatye anqabileyo, neeperile!"
Revelation18:17 Ngokuba buphanziswe ngalixa linye ubutyebi obungaka. Bonke oomatiloshe, nebandla lonke lasezinqanaweni, noomateloshe, nabo bonke abashishina elwandle, bema kude."
Revelation18:18 Baye bedanduluka, bakuwubona umsi wokutsha kwayo, besithi, Nguwuphi na ofana nalo mzi mkhulu?"
Revelation18:19 Bagalela uthuli entloko, Bamana bedanduluka, belila, besenza isijwili, Besithi, Yeha, yeha, mzi mkhulu, Apho baba nobutyebi khona bonke aba baneenqanawa elwandle, ngeento ezinqabileyo zawo! ngokuba ngalixa linye uphanzisiwe."
Revelation18:20 Wenzele imihlali, nina mazulu, nani bapostile bangcwele, nani baprofeti; ngokuba uThixo ukuphindezele phezu kwayo."
Revelation18:21 Saza isithunywa esinamandla safunqula ilitye, langa lilitye lokusila, ukuba likhulu kwalo, saliphosa elwandle, sisithi, Iya kwenjiwa nje ke ukugadlelwa kwayo iBhabheli, umzi omkhulu, ingabi safunyanwa."
Revelation18:22 Nesandi sababethi beehadi, neseemvumi, nesabagwali, nesabavutheli-xilongo, asisayi kuba saviwa kuwe; Neengcibi zonke zobungcibi bonke azisayi kuba safunyanwa kuwe; Nesandi selitye lokusila asisayi kuba saviwa kuwe;"
Revelation18:23 Nokukhanya kwesibane akusayi kuba sakhanya kuwe; Nezwi lomyeni nelomtshakazi alisayi kuba saviwa kuwe; ngokuba abarhwebi bakho bebengamanene omhlaba; ngokuba zonke iintlanga zalahlekiswa kukukhafula kwakho.
Revelation18:24 Kuwo kwafunyanwa igazi labaprofeti, nelabangcwele, nelabo bonke abasikiweyo emhlabeni."
Revelation19:1 Ndaza emva koko ndeva izwi elikhulu lesihlwele esikhulu emazulwini lisithi: Haleluya! Usindiso, nozuko, nembeko, namandla, ngaYehova uThixo wethu;"
Revelation19:2 Ngokuba iyinyaniso, inobulungisa, imigwebo yakhe;"
Revelation19:3 Babuya bathi, Haleluya! Umsi wayo unyuka ngonaphakade kanaphakade."
Revelation19:4 Awa amadoda amakhulu amashumi mabini anamane, nezinto eziphilileyo zone, amnqula uThixo ohleli etroneni, esithi, Amen! Alleluya."
Revelation19:5 Kwaphuma ilizwi etroneni, lisithi, Mdumiseni uThixo wethu, nonke nina bakhonzi bakhe, Nani bamoyikayo, abancinane kwanabakhulu."
Revelation19:6 Ndaza ndeva sanga sisandi sesihlwele esikhulu, sanga sisandi samanzi amaninzi, sanga sisandi seendudumo ezinamandla, sisithi: “Haleluya!"
Revelation19:7 Masigcobe, sigcobe, siyizukise; ngokuba ufikile umsitho weMvana, nomfazi wayo uzilungisile."
Revelation19:8 Wanikwa ukuba athiwe wambu ngelinen ecikizekileyo, eqaqambileyo, emhlophe; kuba ilinen ecikizekileyo leyo bubulungisa babangcwele."
Revelation19:9 Yathi kum, Bhala uthi, Banoyolo abo bamenyelwe kwisidlo somtshato weMvana. Sathi kum, La ngamazwi ayinyaniso kaThixo."
Revelation19:10 Ndawa ezinyaweni zaso, ukuba ndiqubude kuso. Sithi kum, Lumka, ungenjenjalo; ndingumkhonzi kunye nawe, nabazalwana bakho abanobungqina bukaYesu; qubuda kuThixo, kuba ubungqina bukaYesu bungumoya wesiprofeto."
Revelation19:11 Ndalibona izulu livulekile, nalo ihashe elimhlophe; Lowo ke wayehleli phezu kwalo ubizwa ngokuba nguThembekile, nguNyaniso; ugweba ngobulungisa, enze imfazwe."
Revelation19:12 Amehlo akhe enjengelangatye lomlilo, entloko izizithsaba ezininzi; waye negama libhaliwe, ekungekho bani ulaziyo, ingenguye ngokwakhe."
Revelation19:13 Wayethiwe wambu ngengubo ethiwe nkxu egazini; igama lakhe kuthiwa nguLizwi likaThixo.
Revelation19:14 Wayelandelwa yimikhosi yasezulwini, ikhwele amahashe amhlophe, yambethe ilinen ecikizekileyo, emhlophe, ecocekileyo."
Revelation19:15 Emlonyeni wakhe kuphuma ikrele elibukhali, ukuze azithi qwaka ngalo iintlanga. Uya kuzalusa ngentonga yentsimbi, exovula isixovulelo sewayini yomsindo nengqumbo kaThixo uSomandla."
Revelation19:16 Engutyeni yakhe nasethangeni lakhe wayenegama libhaliwe kwathiwa, uKumkani kaKumkani, uNkosi kaNkosi."
Revelation19:17 Ndabona isithunywa sezulu, simi elangeni; sadanduluka ngezwi elikhulu, sisithi kuzo zonke iintaka eziphaphazelayo esazulwini sezulu, Yizani nihlanganisele esidlweni sikaThixo omkhulu;"
Revelation19:18 ukuze nidle inyama yookumkani, nenyama yabathetheli, nenyama yamagorha, nenyama yamahashe, neyabakhweli bawo, nenyama yabantu bonke, abakhululekileyo nabangamakhoboka, nabancinane, kwaye mkhulu."
Revelation19:19 Ndalibona irhamncwa, nookumkani bomhlaba, nemikhosi yabo, behlanganisene ndawonye ukuba benze imfazwe nalowo uhleli ehasheni, nomkhosi wakhe."
Revelation19:20 Labanjwa ke irhamncwa; kunye nalo kwabanjwa umprofeti obuxoki, lowo wayenzayo imiqondiso emehlweni alo, wabalahlekisa ngayo abo balwamkelayo uphawu lwerhamncwa, nabo baqubuda kuwo umfanekiselo walo; Bobabini baphoswa behleli edikeni lomlilo elivutha isulfure."
Revelation19:21 Abaseleyo babulawa ngekrele lalowo uhleli ehasheni, ikrele eliphuma emlonyeni wakhe; zathi zonke iintaka zahlutha yinyama yabo."
Revelation20:1 Ndabona isithunywa sezulu, sisihla siphuma emazulwini, sinesitshixo senzonzobila, nomxokelelwane omkhulu esandleni saso."
Revelation20:2 Yayibamba inamba, loo nyoka yakudala enguMtyholi, uSathana ke, yayibopha iminyaka eliwaka."
Revelation20:3 Sayiphosa enzonzobileni, samvalela, satywina phezu kwayo, ukuze ingabi sazilahlekisa iintlanga, ide izaliseke iminyaka eliwaka; emva koko umelwe kukuthi akhululwe ixeshana."
Revelation20:4 Ndabona iitrone, nabahleli phezu kwazo, banikwa ugwebo; ndayibona imiphefumlo yababenqunyulwe iintloko ngenxa yobungqina bukaYesu, nangenxa yelizwi likaThixo, ababengalinquli irhamncwa nerhamncwa, umfanekiso wakhe, bengalwamkelanga uphawu lwakhe emabunzini abo, nasezandleni zabo; badla ubomi, baba ngookumkani kunye noKristu iminyaka eliwaka."
Revelation20:5 Ke abafileyo abaseleyo ababuyanga badle bomi, yada yazaliseka iminyaka eliwaka. Olo luvuko lokuqala."
Revelation20:6 Unoyolo, ungcwele, lowo unesabelo eluvukweni lokuqala; ukufa kwesibini akunagunya kubo abanjalo; baya kusuka babe ngababingeleli bakaThixo nabakaKristu, babe ngookumkani kunye naye iminyaka eliwaka."
Revelation20:7 Xa ithe yazaliseka iminyaka eliwaka, uSathana uya kukhululwa entolongweni."
Revelation20:8 Uya kuphuma, aye kuzilahlekisa iintlanga eziseziphelweni zone zomhlaba, uGogi noMagogi, ukubahlanganisela emfazweni, inani labo linjengentlabathi yolwandle."
Revelation20:9 Banyuka, baya kububanzi behlabathi, bayirhawula inqaba yomkhosi wabangcwele, nomzi othandiweyo; kwehla umlilo uphuma kuThixo, uphuma ezulwini, wabadla wabadla."
Revelation20:10 Umtyholi lowo ubalahlekisayo waphoswa edikeni lomlilo nesulfure, apho likhona irhamncwa nomprofeti wobuxoki; baya kuthuthunjiswa imini nobusuku, kuse emaphakadeni asemaphakadeni."
Revelation20:11 Ndabona itrone enkulu emhlophe, nalowo uhleli phezu kwayo, owathi umhlaba nezulu wasaba ebusweni bakhe, azafunyanelwa ndawo ke."
Revelation20:12 Ndababona abafileyo, abancinane nabakhulu, bemi phambi koThixo; Zavulwa iincwadi, kwavulwa nenye incwadi, eyeyobomi; bagwetywa abafileyo ngokubhaliweyo ezincwadini ezo, ngokwemisebenzi yabo."
Revelation20:13 Lwathi ulwandle lwabakhupha abafileyo abakulo; kwathi ukufa nelabafileyo kwabakhupha abafileyo abakhona; bagwetywa elowo ngokwemisebenzi yakhe.
Revelation20:14 Kwaza ukufa nelabafileyo kwaphoswa edikeni lomlilo. Oko kukufa kwesibini.
Revelation20:15 Uthe ongafunyanwanga ebhaliwe encwadini yobomi, waphoswa edikeni lomlilo."
Revelation21:1 Ndabona izulu elitsha, nomhlaba omtsha; kuba elokuqala izulu nowokuqala umhlaba udlule, nolwandle alusekho, akwaba sabakho lwandle."
Revelation21:2 Ndaza mna, Yohane, ndawubona umzi ongcwele, iYerusalem entsha, usihla uphuma kuThixo, uphuma emazulwini, ulungisiwe njengomtshakazi ehonjiselwe indoda yakhe."
Revelation21:3 Ndeva izwi elikhulu liphuma emazulwini, lisithi, Yabona, umnquba lo kaThixo unabantu; uya kuhlala nabo emnqubeni, bona babe ngabantu bakhe, yena uThixo abe nabo, enguThixo wabo."
Revelation21:4 Azisule uThixo zonke iinyembezi emehlweni abo; kungabi sabakho kufa, kungabi sabakho nasijwili, nakukhala, nantlungu; ngokuba izinto zokuqala zigqithile."
Revelation21:5 Waza lowo uhleli phezu kwetrone wathi, Uyabona, izinto zonke ndizenza ntsha. Wathi kum, Bhala; ngokuba la mazwi ayinyaniso, athembekileyo."
Revelation21:6 Wathi kum, Kwenzekile. Mna ndinguAlfa no-Omega, isiqalo nesiphelo; mna ndomnika lowo unxaniweyo emthonjeni wamanzi obomi, ngesisa."
Revelation21:7 Lowo weyisayo uya kuzidla ilifa izinto zonke; kwaye ndiya kuba nguThixo wakhe, yena abe ngunyana wam."
Revelation21:8 Ke wona amagwala, nabangakholwayo, nabangamasikizi, nababulali, nabenzi bombulo, nabakhafuli, nabakhonzi bezithixo, nawo onke amaxoki, isabelo sawo siya kuba sedikeni elivutha umlilo nesulfure. Oko kukufa kwesibini."
Revelation21:9 Saza seza kum esinye sezithunywa zezulu ezisixhenxe, ezineengqayi ezisixhenxe, ezizele zizibetho zosixhenxe zokugqibela, sathetha nam sisithi, Yiza apha, ndikubonise umtshakazi, umfazi wayo iMvana."
Revelation21:10 Sandisa ndikuMoya entabeni enkulu, ephakamileyo, sandibonisa umzi omkhulu, iYerusalem engcwele, usihla uphuma emazulwini, uvela kuThixo;"
Revelation21:11 Isikhanyiso sawo sifana nelitye elinqabileyo kakhulu, langa leyaspisi ebengezela njengekristale."
Revelation21:12 Unodonga olukhulu oluphakamileyo, unamasango alishumi elinamabini, phezu kwamasango unezithunywa zezulu ezilishumi elinazibini, kubhalwe kuwo amagama angawezizwe ezilishumi elinazibini zoonyana bakaSirayeli."
Revelation21:13 Ngasempumalanga kukho amasango amathathu; ngasentla ngamasango mathathu; ngasezantsi ngamasango mathathu; ngasentshonalanga ingamasango mathathu.
Revelation21:14 Udonga lomzi lunamatye eziseko alishumi elinamabini, kuwo ingamagama abapostile abalishumi elinababini bayo iMvana."
Revelation21:15 Lowo ubethetha nam wayenengcongolo yegolide, ukuba awulinganise umzi lowo, namasango awo, nodonga lwawo."
Revelation21:16 Isixeko eso sasinamacala amane ambombo-ne, ubude bungangobubanzi bawo. Wawulinganisa umzi lowo ngengcongolo, wazitadiya ezilishumi elinesibini lamawaka; ubude nobubanzi nokuphakama kwawo kuyalingana."
Revelation21:17 Walulinganisa nodonga lwaso, ikhulu elinamanci mane anesine leekubhite, ngokomlinganiso womntu, oko kukuthi, owengelosi."
Revelation21:18 Isakhiwo sodonga lwaso yiyaspisi; umzi ke yigolide engcwengekileyo, efana negilasi ebonakalelayo;"
Revelation21:19 Namatye eziseko zodonga lomzi ayevathiswe ngamatye anqabileyo onke. Isiseko sokuqala yiyaspisi; eyesibini yisafire; eyesithathu yaba yikalkedoni; esesine yiemeraldi;
Revelation21:20 Eyesihlanu ibiyisardoniki; eyesithandathu ibiyisardiyo; eyesixhenxe yikrizolite; elesibhozo libe yikrizoli; elesithoba yitopazi; eleshumi yikrisopraso; eleshumi elinanye libe yihakinto; eleshumi elinesibini yiametiste.
Revelation21:21 Namasango lawo alishumi elinamabini aziiperile ezilishumi elinambini; isango ngalinye lenziwe ngaperile-nye; nesitrato somzi yigolide engcwengekileyo, njengegilasi ebonakalelayo."
Revelation21:22 Andibonanga tempile kuwo, kuba iNkosi uThixo uSomandla nayo iMvana yitempile yawo."
Revelation21:23 Ke umzi lowo awufuni langa, kwanayo inyanga, kuba ubuqaqawuli bukaThixo buwukhanyisela, nayo iMvana isisibane sawo."
Revelation21:24 Iintlanga zabo basindiswayo ziya kuhamba ekukhanyeni kwawo; ookumkani bomhlaba bazise kuwo uzuko nembeko yabo.
Revelation21:25 Amasango awo akasayi kuvalwa mini kwaphela, kuba ubusuku abuyi kubakho khona."
Revelation21:26 Baya kuzisa uzuko nembeko yeentlanga ezo kuwo.
Revelation21:27 Akuyi kungena kuwo nanye into eyenza inqambi, eyenza isikizi, nobuxoki; abaya kungena ngabo bodwa babhaliweyo encwadini yobomi yeMvana."
Revelation22:1 za sandibonisa umlambo wamanzi obomi, uqaqambile, ngathi ngumkhenkce, uphuma etroneni kaThixo neyeMvana."
Revelation22:2 Phakathi kwesitrato sawo namacala omabini omlambo, kukho umthi wobomi, ovelisa iintlobo zeziqhamo ezilishumi elinambini, unika iinyanga ngeenyanga zonke isiqhamo sawo; abe amagqabi omthi lowo engawokuphilisa imimoya, izizwe."
Revelation22:3 Akusayi kuba sabakho nasinye isiqalekiso; kodwa itrone kaThixo neyeMvana iya kubakho kuwo; abakhonzi bakhe bamkhonze;
Revelation22:4 Aya kububona ubuso bakhe; negama lakhe liya kuba semabunzini abo.
Revelation22:5 Akuyi kubakho busuku khona; abafuni sibane, nakukhanya kwelanga; ngokuba iNkosi uThixo iya kuzikhanyisela, zilawule ngonaphakade kanaphakade."
Revelation22:6 Sathi kum, La mazwi athembekile, ayinyaniso; iNkosi, uThixo wabaprofeti abangcwele, yathuma isithunywa sayo sasemazulwini ukubabonisa abakhonzi bayo izinto ezimele ukubakho kamsinya."
Revelation22:7 Yabona, ndiyeza kamsinya; unoyolo lowo uwagcinayo amazwi esiprofeto sayo le ncwadi."
Revelation22:8 Mna, Yohane, ndingulowo ubezibona ezi zinto, eziva; Ndathi ndakuva, ndakubona, ndawa ndaqubuda phambi kweenyawo zesithunywa sezulu esandibonisa ezi zinto."
Revelation22:9 Sithi kum, Lumka, ungenjenjalo; ngokuba ndingumkhonzi kunye nawe, nabazalwana bakho abaprofeti, nabo bawagcinayo amazwi ale ncwadi; qubuda kuThixo."
Revelation22:10 Sathi kum, Musa ukuwatywina amazwi esiprofeto sale ncwadi; kuba ixesha likufuphi."
Revelation22:11 Lowo ungongendawo makahlale engongendawo; nalowo uyinyhukunyhuku, makaselehlala eyinyhukunyhuku; lowo ulilungisa makahlale elilungisa; nongcwele makahlale ngcwele."
Revelation22:12 Yabona, ndiyeza kamsinya; umvuzo wam unam, wokuba ndivuze elowo njengoko umsebenzi wakhe uya kuba njalo."
Revelation22:13 Mna ndinguAlfa no-Omega, isiqalo nesiphelo, owokuqala nowokugqibela."
Revelation22:14 Banoyolo abo bayenzayo imithetho yakhe, ukuze babe negunya kuwo umthi wobomi, bangene ngamasango kuwo umzi."
Revelation22:15 Ngaphandle ke zizinja, nabakhafuli, nabenzi bombulo, nababulali, nabakhonzi bezithixo, nabo bonke ababuthandayo, ababenzayo ubuxoki."
Revelation22:16 Mna, Yesu, ndasithuma isithunywa sam sasemazulwini, ukuba ndizingqine kuni ezi zinto ngawo amabandla. Mna ndiyingcambu nenzala kaDavide, ikhwezi eliqaqambileyo lokusa."
Revelation22:17 uMoya nomtshakazi bathi, Yiza. Lowo uvayo makathi, Yiza. Lowo unxaniweyo makeze; nosukuba ethanda, makawathabathe amanzi obomi ngesisa."
Revelation22:18 Kuba ndiyangqina kubo bonke abawevayo amazwi esiprofeto sale ncwadi, ukuba, Ukuba uthe umntu wongeza kwezo zinto, uThixo uya kongeza kuye izibetho ezibhaliweyo kule ncwadi;"
Revelation22:19 Ukuba ke uthe umntu wasusa kuwo amazwi encwadi yesi siprofeto, uThixo uya kusisusa isabelo sakhe encwadini yobomi, nakuwo umzi ongcwele, nakuzo izinto ezibhaliweyo kule ncwadi."
Revelation22:20 Uthi lowo uzingqinayo ezi zinto, Ewe, ndiyeza kamsinya. Amen. Ewe, yiza, Nkosi Yesu."
